Genesis1:1 Pakutomaletu Mulungu adalenga kudzulu na dziko yapansi. 
Genesis1:2 Dziko yapansi ikhali nkhabe kuoneka kwache, pontho pakhali nkhabepo chinthu na chibodzi chene. Mdima ukhali padzulu pa madzi akuzwika ale adazungulira dziko yapansi, pontho Mzimu wa Mulungu akhambuluka-mbuluka padzulu pa madzi." 
Genesis1:3 Tenepo Mulungu adalonga mbati, “Mbakukhale cheza.” Tenepo cheza chidaoneka." 
Genesis1:4 Mulungu adaona kuti chezacho chikhali chadidi, tenepo adasiyanisa cheza na mdima." 
Genesis1:5 Mulungu adathula chezacho masikati, mdima adauthulambo mosiku. Mosiku udagwanda, machibese mbafika; yeneyo ikhali nsiku yakutoma." 
Genesis1:6 Tenepo Mulungu adalonga mbati, “Mbapakhale chakulekanisa madzi, towera madziwo akhale pambuto ziwiri.”" 
Genesis1:7 Natenepo Mulungu adalenga chakulekanisa madzi chile, mbalekanisa madzi a pansi na madzi a kudzulu. Ipyo pidakhaladi tenepo." 
Genesis1:8 Mulungu adathula chakulekanisa madzicho “Thambo.” Mosiku udagwanda, machibese mbafika; yeneyo ikhali nsiku yachiwiri." 
Genesis1:9 Tenepo Mulungu adalonga mbati, “Madzi a pansi pa thambo mbagumanyike pambuto ibodzi, towera nthunda ioneke.” Ipyo pidakhaladi tenepo." 
Genesis1:10 Mulungu adathula nthunda ile, “Dziko yapansi,” pontho adathula madzi adagumanyikana ale, “Bara.” Tenepo Mulungu adapiona kuti pikhali pyadidi." 
Genesis1:11 Tenepo Mulungu adalonga mbati, “Dziko yapansi mbibale mtundu onsene wa pyakumera, pile pyakukhala na ngala, pontho miti yakubala nsapo zakukhala na nthanga.” Ipyo pidakhaladi tenepo." 
Genesis1:12 Natenepo dziko yapansi idamera mtundu onsene wa pyakumera, pile pyakukhala na ngala, pontho miti yakubala nsapo zakukhala na nthanga. Tenepo Mulungu adapiona kuti pikhali pyadidi." 
Genesis1:13 Mosiku udagwanda, machibese mbafika; yeneyo ikhali nsiku yachitatu." 
Genesis1:14 Tenepo Mulungu adalonga mbati, “Mbakukhale pyakumwinikira kuthambo kusiyanisa mosiku na masikati, pontho kuonesa kutoma kwa nsiku, ndzidzi wa chaka, na pyaka;" 
Genesis1:15 pontho mbapigake kuthambo kupereka cheza kudziko yapansi.” Ipyo pidakhaladi tenepo. 
Genesis1:16 Natenepo Mulungu adalenga pyakumwinikira pikulu-pikulu piwiri, dzuwa kuti itonge masikati, pontho mwezi kuti utonge mosiku. Iye adalenga pontho nyenyezi." 
Genesis1:17 Mulungu adaikha pyakumwinikirapi kuthambo kuti pimwinikire dziko yapansi," 
Genesis1:18 kutonga mosiku na masikati, pontho kusiyanisa cheza na mdima. Tenepo Mulungu adapiona kuti pikhali pyadidi." 
Genesis1:19 Mosiku udagwanda, machibese mbafika; yeneyo ikhali nsiku yachinayi." 
Genesis1:20 Tenepo Mulungu adalonga mbati, “M'madzi mbamuinjipe na pinthu pyamoyo pya mtundu na mtundu, pontho mbalame zizinji mbazimbuluke padzulu pa dziko yapansi.”" 
Genesis1:21 Natenepo Mulungu adalenga nsomba zikulu-zikulu za m'bara, pinthu pyamoyo pyonsene pyakukhala m'madzi na mbalame za mtundu onsene. Tenepo Mulungu adaona kuti pikhali pyadidi." 
Genesis1:22 Mulungu adatsanzayisa pyonsenepyo mbapanga pyakulengwa pyonsene pya m'madzi kuti pibalane na kuinjipa m'bara, pontho adapanga mbalame kuti ziinjipe padziko yapansi." 
Genesis1:23 Mosiku udagwanda, machibese mbafika; yeneyo ikhali nsiku yachishanu." 
Genesis1:24 Tenepo Mulungu adalonga mbati, “Padziko yapansi mbapakhale nyama zamtundu na mtundu, zakufuyiwa, zam'tsanga na zakukambadza zene, pontho zikulu na zing'ono zene.” Ipyo pidakhaladi tenepo." 
Genesis1:25 Mulungu adalenga nyama zonsene zam'tsanga malingana na mtundu wawo, nyama zonsene zakufuyiwa malingana na mtundu wawo, pontho na nyama zonsene zakukambadza malingana na mtundu wawo. Tenepo Mulungu adapiona kuti pikhali pyadidi." 
Genesis1:26 Tenepo Mulungu adalonga mbati, “Tendeni tisasanye anthu akulandana na ife, pontho akukhala ninga ife. Iwo anatonga nsomba, mbalame, na nyama zonsene zakufuyiwa, zam'tsanga, pontho na zakukambadza padziko yapansi.”" 
Genesis1:27 Natenepo Mulungu adalenga anthu akulandana na iye; mukulandana na Mulungu iye adalenga anthu. Iye adaalenga mamuna na mkazi," 
Genesis1:28 tenepo adaatsanzayisa mbalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Balanani mbamuinjipe. Dzazani dziko yonsene yapansi kuti mukhale na utongi padzikoyi. Ndikukupasani utongi pana nsomba zonsene, mbalame zonsene, na nyama zonsene za mtundu na mtundu padziko yapansi pano." 
Genesis1:29 Ndikukupasani pyakumera pyonsene pyakukhala na ngala padziko yapansi, pontho miti yonsene yakubala nsapo zakukhala na nthanga kuti mudye." 
Genesis1:30 Mbwenye kuna nyama zonsene zam'tsanga, mbalame zonsene, pontho pyakukambadza pyonsene padziko yapansi, chinthu chonsene chamoyo mwenemo, ndapereka maudzu na masamba a pyakumera kuti pikhale phoso yawo.” Ipyo pidakhaladi tenepo." 
Genesis1:31 Mulungu adayang'ana pana pyonsene pidasasanya iye mbaona kuti pikhali pyadidi. Mosiku udagwanda, machibese mbafika; yeneyo ikhali nsiku yachitanthatu." 
Genesis2:1 Natenepo kudzulu na pansi pano, pontho na pyonsene pili mwenemo pidamala sasanywa." 
Genesis2:2 Pansiku yachinomwe Mulungu adapuma, thangwi iye akhadamalisa basa yonsene ikhaphata iye." 
Genesis2:3 Tenepo iye adatsanzayisa nsiku yachinomwe mbaipambula kukhala nsiku yakupambulika, thangwi pansiku yeneyo iye adapuma podi akhadamalisa basa yonsene yakulenga." 
Genesis2:4 Mwenemu ndiye mule mukhadalengwa kudzulu na pansi pano. Pidalenga MBUYA Mulungu dziko yapansi na kudzulu," 
Genesis2:5 padziko yapansi pakhali nkhabe chakumera na chibodzi chene, thangwi ndzidzi wenewu MBUYA Mulungu hakhadadzati vumbisa mvula tayu, pontho pakhali nkhabe munthu wakulima;" 
Genesis2:6 mbwenye madzi akhadza kubulukira pansi pa mataka mbawazira mataka. 
Genesis2:7 Tenepo MBUYA Mulungu adasasanya mamuna kubulukira kumataka a pansi pano mbampumira muya wakupasa moyo mphuno mwache, tenepo munthuyo adakhala na moyo." 
Genesis2:8 Tenepo MBUYA Mulungu adalima munda mu Edeni kumabulukiro dzuwa, mwenemo adaikhamo munthu adasasanya iye ule." 
Genesis2:9 MBUYA Mulungu adachitisa kuti miti yonsene yakubalika imere mwenemo na kubala nsapo zadidi. Kati na kati ya munda ule, pakhali muti wakupasa moyo, pontho na muti wakupasa udziwisi wa chadidi na chakuipa." 
Genesis2:10 Mkulo ukhafamba mu Edeni mbukapira m'mundamo. Kubulukira penepo mkulo ule udaswa mphapa mbukhala mikulo minayi. 
Genesis2:11 Mkulo wakutoma dzinache ndi Pishoni; wenewu ndiye umbafamba kugwanda na m'dziko ya Havila, kule kumbagumanwa golidi." 
Genesis2:12 Golidi weneyu ndi golidi chadi-chadi, pontho kweneko kuna mafuta akununkhira okhonda oneka-oneka na miyala yakudula yakuthulwa onekisi." 
Genesis2:13 Mkulo wachiwiri dzinache ndi Gihoni; wenewu umbafamba kugwanda na m'dziko ya Kushi. 
Genesis2:14 Mkulo wachitatu dzinache ndi Tigrisi; wenewu umbafamba kumabulukiro dzuwa a dziko ya Asiria. Mkulo wachinayi ndi Yufurate. 
Genesis2:15 Tenepo MBUYA Mulungu adaikha munthu ule m'munda wa Edeni kuti aulime na kuuyang'anira. 
Genesis2:16 MBUYA Mulungu adampanga munthu ule mbati, “Iwe unakwanisa kudya nsapo za miti yonsene ili m'mundamu," 
Genesis2:17 mbwenye nsapo za muti wakupasa udziwisi wa chadidi na chakuipa leka kudya, thangwi nsiku inadya iwe nsapo za muti wenewu, unati ufe.”" 
Genesis2:18 Tenepo MBUYA Mulungu adalonga mbati, “Si pyadidi tayu kuti mamuna akhale yekha. Ndinamsasanyira mwanzache wakuthemerana naye kuti amphedze.”" 
Genesis2:19 Tenepo MBUYA Mulungu adakwata mataka mbasasanya nyama zonsene na mbalame zonsene mbadza nazo kuna munthu ule kuti aone madzina akhafuna iye kuzithula. Dzina yonsene idathula munthu ule, kuthula nyama zile, yeneyo ndiye dzinache." 
Genesis2:20 Natenepo munthu ule adazithula madzina nyama zonsene na mbalame zonsene; mbwenye nkhabe ibodzi mwa izo ikhali mwanzache wakuthemerana naye kumphedza tayu. 
Genesis2:21 Tenepo MBUYA Mulungu adachitisa munthu ule kugona chitulo chakufa nacho. Iye mbali m'chitulo, Mulungu adabulusa mbavu ibodzi ya munthu ule, mbafunga pambutopo na mnofu." 
Genesis2:22 MBUYA Mulungu adasasanya mkazi kubulukira kumbavu idabulusa iye pa mamuna mbadza naye kuna iye. 
Genesis2:23 Tenepo mamuna ule adalonga mbati, “Pakumalisira pache ushu ndiye gogodo ya magogodo anga, pontho mnofu wa mnofu wanga; iye anachemerwa ‘Mkazi,’ thangwi adabulukira muna mamuna.”" 
Genesis2:24 Na thangwi yeneyi mamuna anasiya babache na mache mbaphatikana na mkazache, tenepo awiriwo anakhala mbodzi." 
Genesis2:25 Onsene awiriwa mamuna na mkazi akhakhala chipezi-pezi, kwache hakhachita manyadzo tayu." 
Genesis3:1 Nyoka ikhali yakuchenjera pyakwanga kupiringana nyama zonsene zam'tsanga zikhadalenga MBUYA Mulungu. Iyo idalonga kuna mkazi ule kuti, “Ayi Mulungu adakupanganidi kuti muleke kudya nsapo za m'muti na ubodzi ene m'mundamu?”" 
Genesis3:2 Mkazi ule adatawira mbati, “Ife tinakwanisa kudya nsapo za m'miti yonsene m'mundamu," 
Genesis3:3 kupambula nsapo za muti wapakati pa mundawu. Mulungu adatipanga kuti tileke kudya penu kukhuya nsapo za muti wapakati pa mundawu, thangwi tingachita tenepo, tinati tife.”" 
Genesis3:4 Nyoka idatawira kuti, “Penepyo si pyakuona tayu, kufa munafa tayu." 
Genesis3:5 Thangwi Mulungu akupidziwa kuti sindzidzi imwe nkhudya nsapo za mutiwu maso anu anafunguka mbamukhala ninga Mulungu, kudziwa chadidi na chakuipa.”" 
Genesis3:6 Pidaona mkazi ule kuti muti ukhali wakubalika pyakwanga, nsapo zache zakukoma m'maso pontho zadidi na kuzidya, pontho na kukhumba kukhala munthu wanzeru, adakwata nsapo zinango mbadya. Tenepo adakwata nsapo zinango mbakampasa mamunache, mamunayo mbadyambo." 
Genesis3:7 Sindzidzi pikhadadya iwo nsapo zile, maso awo adafunguka mbadzindikira kuti akhali chipezi-pezi; natenepo adasona masamba a muti wamkuyu mbapivazika okha ene." 
Genesis3:8 Mawulo a nsiku yeneyo Adamu na Hava adava MBUYA Mulungu akufamba-famba m'munda mule, tenepo iwo adabisala pakati pa miti, towera MBUYA Mulungu aleke kuaona." 
Genesis3:9 Mbwenye MBUYA Mulungu adachemera mamunayo mbati, “Uli kupi?”" 
Genesis3:10 Mamunayo adatawira mbati, “Ndidakuvani m'mundamu; ndidachita mantha, pontho ndidabisala thangwi ndikhali chipezi-pezi.”" 
Genesis3:11 Mulungu adavunza mbati, “Adakupanga mbani kuti iwe ukhali chipezi-pezi? Ayi wadya muti udakupanga ine kuti muleke kudya ule?”" 
Genesis3:12 Mamuna ule adamtawira mbati, “Mkazi adandipasa imwe kuti ndikhale nayeyi, ndiye adandipasa nsapo zinango za muti ule, inembo mbandidya.”" 
Genesis3:13 MBUYA Mulungu adavunza mkazi ule mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji udachita tenepo?” Mkazi ule adatawira mbati, “Nyoka ndiye idandinyengeza, tenepo ine ndidadya.”" 
Genesis3:14 Tenepo MBUYA Mulungu adalonga kuna nyoka mbati, “Iwe unati utchunyuswe na thangwi ya pyachita iwepi; wakutembererwa ndiwe kupiringana nyama zonsene zakufuyiwa na zonsene zam'tsanga. Iwe unati ufambe na mimba pontho unati udye fumbi nsiku zonsene za moyo wako." 
Genesis3:15 Ine ndinati ndiikhe chizondi pakati pa iwe na mkaziyu, pontho pakati pa anako na anache panakhala chizondi. Ana a mkaziyu anadzadzada msolo wako, iwembo unaluma chitende chache.”" 
Genesis3:16 Tenepo Mulungu adalonga kuna mkazi mbati, “Ine ndinati ndithimize nyatwa za ndzidzi wako wa mimba pontho kuva kwako kupha pakubala. Unati umkhumbe mamunako, pontho mamunayo anati akutonge.”" 
Genesis3:17 Mulungu adalongambo kuna mamuna mbati, “Na thangwi yakuti udavera mkazako mbudya nsapo za muti udakupanga ine kuti muleke kudya ule, mataka mbakhale akutembererwa. Iwe unati uphate basa pyakwanga moyo wako onsene kuchitisa mataka kubala phoso yakukwana yakuti iwe udye." 
Genesis3:18 Mataka anati amerese minga na dawe. Iwe unati udye mbewu zam'tsanga. 
Genesis3:19 Kuti mataka abalise pinthu, iwe unati uphate basa pyakwanga na kaluma, kufikirana iwe ubwerere kumataka, thangwi udasasanywa kubulukira kumataka. Na thangwi yakuti udasasanywa kubulukira kumataka, unati ubwerere kumataka konthoko.”" 
Genesis3:20 Adamu mkazacheyo adamthula Hava, thangwi iye ndi mama wa madzinza onsene." 
Genesis3:21 Tenepo MBUYA Mulungu adasasanyira Adamu na Hava nguwo ya nthembe mbaavazika. 
Genesis3:22 Tenepo MBUYA Mulungu adalonga mbati, “Chinchino anthu enewa asanduka ninga mbodzi wa ife, pontho ana udziwisi wa chadidi na chakuipa. Iye hadathemeve kutawiriswa kuthukula mkono wache kutchola nsapo za muti wakupasa moyo ule, mbadya, mbakhala na moyo kwenda na kwenda tayu.”" 
Genesis3:23 Natenepo MBUYA Mulungu adaabulusira kunja kwa Munda wa Edeni ule mbaachitisa kuti alime m'mataka akhadasasanywa na iye ale. 
Genesis3:24 Pidaabulusa iye kunja, Mulungu adaikha pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido chakumabulukiro dzuwa a Munda wa Edeni, pontho na talasada yamoto kuzungulira-zungulira khundu zonsene. Yeneyi ikhali njira yakukhondesa nayo anthu kudza chifupi na muti wakupasa moyo ule." 
Genesis4:1 Tenepo Adamu adapita m'bonde na mkazache. Mkaziyo adakwata mimba mbabala mwana wamamuna. Iye adalonga mbati, “Na chiphedzo cha MBUYA ndatambira mwana wamamuna.” Natenepo mkaziyo mwanayo adamthula Kaini." 
Genesis4:2 Kubuluka penepo adabala pontho mwana unango wamamuna dzinache Abele. Abele akhali makabuswa, Kaini akhali nyakulima." 
Genesis4:3 Pidagwanda ndzidzi ene, Kaini adadza na pinango pidavuna iye mbapipereka nsembe kuna MBUYA." 
Genesis4:4 Abele adadza na mwanabira mbodzi wakutoma kubalwa kubulukira pa mkumbi wache. Iye adampha mbapereka nsembe khundu zache zadidiletu kuna MBUYA. Tenepo MBUYA adakomerwa na Abele mbatambira nsembe yache. 
Genesis4:5 Mbwenye iye adakhonda Kaini na nsembe yache ene. Natenepo Kaini adazhangali pyakwanga mbaswirizwa napyo. 
Genesis4:6 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Kaini mbati, “Watani unazhangali? Watani unaswirizwa?" 
Genesis4:7 Iwe mbudachita pinthu pyakulungama, ayi ine mbidakomerwa nawe tayu? Mbwenye iwe ungakhonda kuchita pinthu pyakulungama, kudawa kwakunjunjira pamsuwo pako, kufuna kukuikha pansi pa utongi wache, tenepo iwe wathema kukundwa.”" 
Genesis4:8 Tenepo Kaini adalonga kuna Abele mbaleache mbati, “Tende kumunda.” Pikhali iwo kumunda kule Kaini adasandukira Abele mbaleache mbampha." 
Genesis4:9 MBUYA adamvunza Kaini mbati, “Mbaleako Abele ali kupi?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Sinakudziwa tayu kuna iye. Kadi ine ndine nyakuyang'anira mbaleanga?”" 
Genesis4:10 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Thangwi ninji wachita chinthu chakugoswa ninga chenechi? Chiropa cha mbaleako chikundilirira kubulukira m'mataka." 
Genesis4:11 Iwe chinchino ndiwe wakutembererwa, pontho hunalimave tayu pamataka, ale adafungula mulomo wache kutambira chiropa cha mbaleako kubulukira m'manja mwako." 
Genesis4:12 Ungayesa kulima, mataka hanabalisa chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu. Iwe unakhala manzenza, okhonda khazikika padziko yapansi.”" 
Genesis4:13 Kaini adalonga kuna MBUYA mbati, “Kutchunyuswa kwanga nkhukulu mwakuti sinakwanisa kukupirira tayu." 
Genesis4:14 Lero imwe mukundithamangisa m'dziko muno, pontho ndabuluswa na pamaso panu pene mbandikhala manzenza, okhonda kukhazikika, tenepo munthu anandigumanayo anati andiphe.”" 
Genesis4:15 Mbwenye MBUYA adatawira mbati, “Nkhabe tayu: ngakhala munthu anakupha anthu anomwe anaphiwa kubwezera kuphiwa kuchitwa iweko.” Natenepo MBUYA adaikha chidzindikiro pana Kaini kucheuza munthu onsene anagumanikana na Kaini kuti aleke kumpha." 
Genesis4:16 Tenepo Kaini adenda pyache kubuluka pamaso pa MBUYA mbakakhala m'dziko inango yakuchemerwa “Manzenza,” ile ili kumabulukiro dzuwa a Munda wa Edeni." 
Genesis4:17 Kaini adapita m'bonde na mkazache, tenepo mkazache adakwata mimba mbabala mwana wamamuna dzinache Enoki. Kaini adamanga mzinda mbaithula, Enoki, dzina ya mwanacheyo." 
Genesis4:18 Enoki adabala Iradi, Iradi adabala Mehujaele, Mehujaele adabala Metushaele, Metushaele adabala Lameki." 
Genesis4:19 Lameki akhali na akazi awiri, Ada na Zila." 
Genesis4:20 Ada adabala Yabala, ule akhali kholo wa anthu akufuya pifuyo na akukhala m'makumbi ale." 
Genesis4:21 Mbaleache akhali Yubala, kholo wa anthu onsene akuimba anyakatangale na pitoliro." 
Genesis4:22 Zila adabala Tubali-Kaini, kholo ya amisiri onsene akufula pida pyamtundu na mtundu kubulukira kunkuwa na simbi. Nyamaingache Tubali-Kaini akhali Naama." 
Genesis4:23 Lameki adalonga kuna akazache mbati, “Ada na Zila, ngavani kuno, ine ndapha mwana mphale unango, thangwi iye andimenya." 
Genesis4:24 Ngakhala ndimodi kuti munthu anapha Kaini, anthu anomwe anaphiwa kubwezera kuphiwa kwacheko, tenepo munthu anafunambo kundiphayo, anthu makumanomwe na anomwe anaphiwa kubwezera kuphiwa kwangako.”" 
Genesis4:25 Adamu adapita m'bonde na Hava mbabala pontho mwana unango wamamuna. Hava adalonga mbati, “Mulungu andipasa mwana kupita m'mbuto ya Abele thangwi adaphiwa na Kaini.” Natenepo mwanayo adamthula Seti." 
Genesis4:26 Seti adabala mwana wamamuna mbamthula Enosi. Pandzidzi wenewo anthu adatoma kuphatisa basa dzina ya MBUYA kumpembedza. 
Genesis5:1 Ipi mphidzukulu pya Adamu. Pidalenga Mulungu anthu, iye adaasasanya mwakulandana na iye ene." 
Genesis5:2 Iye adaalenga iwo mamuna na mkazi mbaatsanzayisa. Tenepo iye adaathula “Anthu.” 
Genesis5:3 Pikhali Adamu pyaka dzana na makumatatu pyakubalwa, iye adabala mwana wamamuna wakulandana na iye mbamthula Seti." 
Genesis5:4 Kubuluka penepo Adamu adakhala pontho na moyo pyaka pinango madzana masere. Iye adabala pontho ana anango 
Genesis5:5 mbafa ana pyaka madzana mafemba na makumatatu. 
Genesis5:6 Pikhali Seti na pyaka dzana na pishanu pyakubalwa, iye adabala mwana wamamuna dzinache Enosi." 
Genesis5:7 Kubuluka penepo adakhala pontho na moyo pyaka pinango madzana masere na pinomwe. Iye adabala ana anango 
Genesis5:8 mbafa ana pyaka madzana mafemba na khumi na piwiri. 
Genesis5:9 Pikhali Enosi na pyaka makumafemba pyakubalwa, iye adabala mwana wamamuna dzinache Kenani." 
Genesis5:10 Kubuluka penepo adakhala pontho na moyo pyaka pinango madzana masere na khumi na pishanu. Iye adabala ana anango 
Genesis5:11 mbafa ana pyaka madzana mafemba na pishanu. 
Genesis5:12 Pikhali Kenani pyaka makumanomwe pyakubalwa, iye adabala mwana wamamuna dzinache Mahalalele." 
Genesis5:13 Kubuluka penepo adakhala pontho na moyo pyaka pinango madzana masere na makumanayi. Iye adabala ana anango 
Genesis5:14 mbafa ana pyaka madzana mafemba na khumi. 
Genesis5:15 Pikhali Mahalalele pyaka makumatanthatu na pishanu pyakubalwa, iye adabala mwana wamamuna dzinache Yaredi." 
Genesis5:16 Kubuluka penepo adakhala pontho na moyo pyaka pinango madzana masere na makumatatu. Iye adabala ana anango 
Genesis5:17 mbafa ana pyaka madzana masere na makumafemba na pishanu. 
Genesis5:18 Pikhali Yaredi pyaka dzana na makumatanthatu na piwiri pyakubalwa, iye adabala mwana wamamuna dzinache Enoki." 
Genesis5:19 Kubuluka penepo adakhala pontho na moyo pyaka pinango madzana masere. Iye adabala ana anango 
Genesis5:20 mbafa ana pyaka madzana mafemba na makumatanthatu na piwiri. 
Genesis5:21 Pikhali Enoki pyaka makumatanthatu na pishanu pyakubalwa, iye adabala mwana wamamuna dzinache Metusela." 
Genesis5:22 Kubuluka penepo Enoki adakhala na moyo wakuphatizana na Mulungu pyaka madzana matatu. Iye adabala ana anango 
Genesis5:23 mbafa ana pyaka madzana matatu na makumatanthatu na pishanu. 
Genesis5:24 Enoki moyo wache onsene adakhala mukuphatizana na Mulungu. Kubuluka penepo iye hadaonekeve tayu, thangwi Mulungu adamkwata." 
Genesis5:25 Pikhali Metusela pyaka dzana na makumasere na pinomwe pyakubalwa, iye adabala mwana wamamuna dzinache Lameki." 
Genesis5:26 Kubuluka penepo adakhala pontho na moyo pyaka pinango madzana manomwe na makumasere na piwiri. Iye adabala ana anango 
Genesis5:27 mbafa ana pyaka madzana mafemba na makumatanthatu na pifemba. 
Genesis5:28 Pikhali Lameki pyaka dzana na makumasere na piwiri pyakubalwa, iye adabala mwana wamamuna" 
Genesis5:29 mbalonga mbati, “Kubuluka kuna mataka onthowo ale adatembererwa na MBUYA mwana ushu anadzesa chiphedzo kubuluka panyatwa zathu zakuphata basa mwakunensa.” Tenepo mwanayo adamthula Nowa." 
Genesis5:30 Lameki adakhala pontho na moyo pyaka pinango madzana mashanu na makumafemba na pishanu. Iye adabala ana anango 
Genesis5:31 mbafa ana pyaka madzana manomwe na makumanomwe na pinomwe. 
Genesis5:32 Pidakwanisa Nowa pyaka madzana mashanu, iye adabala ana atatu achimuna dzinawo Semu, Hamu na Yafeti." 
Genesis6:1 Pidainjipa anthu padziko yonsene yapansi, pontho na pikhabalwa atsikana," 
Genesis6:2 pyakulengwa pinango pyauzimu pidaona kuti atsikana a anthu akhali akubalika pyakwanga, natenepo ipyo pidakwata atsikana pikhafuna ipyowo kukhala akazawo." 
Genesis6:3 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Mzimu wanga nkhabe khalave muna anthu kwenda na kwenda tayu, thangwi iwo ngakuipa. Kutomera lero kwenda m'tsogolo iwo hanakhalave pyaka kupiringana dzana ibodzi na makumawiri tayu.”" 
Genesis6:4 Nsiku zenezo pontho kubuluka penepo padziko yapansi pakhali anthu akukhuma, ale akhali pidzukulu pya pyakulengwa pyauzimu, pontho ana achikazi a anthu. Ana enewo akhali anthu amphamvu akale-kale, pontho akuveka." 
Genesis6:5 Pidaona MBUYA kudawika pikulu kudachita anthu onsene a padziko yapansi, pontho kuipa kudachita manyerezero awo ndzidzi onsene," 
Genesis6:6 MBUYA adatsukwala kuti adasasanya munthu mbamuikha padziko yapansi. Mtimache udampha pyakwanga mwakuti 
Genesis6:7 adalonga mbati, “Ndinati ndiapuluze anthu adasasanya inewa pabodzi pene na nyama pontho mbalame, thangwi ndikutsukwala kuti ndidaasasanya.”" 
Genesis6:8 Mbwenye MBUYA adakomerwa na Nowa. 
Genesis6:9 Ishi ndi mbiri ya Nowa. Iye akhali na ana atatu achimuna, Semu, Hamu na Yafeti. Nowa akhali munthu wakulungama pontho wakusowa chakumpokanyisa pakati pa anthu ndzidzi wachewo. Iye akhali munthu wakuphatizana na Mulungu," 
Genesis6:10  
Genesis6:11 mbwenye anthu anango onsene akhali akuipa pamaso pa Mulungu, pontho ugandanga ukhali konsene kwene." 
Genesis6:12 Mulungu adayang'ana dziko yapansi mbaona kuti njakuipa, thangwi anthu akhakhala na makhaliro akudawika." 
Genesis6:13 Mulungu adalonga kuna Nowa mbati, “Ndinati ndipuluze anthu onsenewa. Ndinati ndiavunge monsene mwene, thangwi dziko yonsene yapansi yadzala na ugandanga thangwi ya iwo." 
Genesis6:14 Natenepo pisasanyire wekha ene chimwadiya kubulukira kumatabwa anjale; usasanye masubi m'bwalo mwachemo, pontho uzirime na upula kunja na m'bwalo mwene." 
Genesis6:15 Chimwadiyacho ulaphi wache ukhale makhono dzana na makumanayi, umimbache ukhale makhono makumawiri na atatu, pontho thungache ikhale makhono khumi na atatu." 
Genesis6:16 Usasanye nsoyi ya chimwadiyacho, pontho usiye mbuto yakukwana kati ya khono pakati pa nsoyi na mafufu a chimwadiyacho. Uikhe msuwo pakhundu ya chimwadiyacho. Uchisasanye kuti chikhale na nyumba zitatu zakusanjikizana, yapansi, yapakati na yam'dzulu." 
Genesis6:17 Ine ndikufuna kuvumbisa mvula padziko yonsene yapansi kuvunga pinthu pyonsene pyamoyo. Pinthu pyonsene pya padziko yapansi pinati pife," 
Genesis6:18 mbwenye ndinasasanya chiverano na iwe. Pita m'chimwadiyamo, iwe, mkazako, anako achimuna na akazawo ene." 
Genesis6:19 M'chimwadiyamo upitisemo pyonsene pyakukhala na moyo piwiri-piwiri chikazi na chimuna, towera pisale mbewu." 
Genesis6:20 Mbalame, nyama na pyakukambadza piwiri-piwiri pya mtundu onsene, towera pisale mbewu." 
Genesis6:21 Ukwate pontho phoso ya mtundu onsene, yako na ya nyama zene.”" 
Genesis6:22 Tenepo Nowa adachita pinthu pyonsene pidampanga Mulungu pile. 
Genesis7:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna Nowa mbati, “Pita m'chimwadiya pabodzi pene na banjako yonsene; ine ndagumana kuti ndiwe ene basi ule ambachita pinthu pyakulungama mfendu wenewu." 
Genesis7:2 Ukwate nyama khumi na zinayi, zikazi zinomwe na zimunambo zinomwe za mtundu onsene zakuchena pamaso pa Mulungu, mbwenye ukwate nyama ziwiri zokha mamuna na mkazi za mtundu onsene zokhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Genesis7:3 Ukwate pontho mbalame khumi na zinayi, zikazi zinomwe na zimuna zinomwe za mtundu onsene. Chita tenepo kuti nyama na mbalame za mtundu onsene zisale mbewu kuti zibalane pontho padziko yapansi." 
Genesis7:4 Nsiku zinomwe zingagwanda ndinati ndivumbise mvula ikulu, ile inavumba nsiku makumanayi mosiku na masikati, towera ivunge pinthu pyonsene pyamoyo pyasasanya ine pile.”" 
Genesis7:5 Natenepo Nowa adachita pinthu pyonsene pidampanga MBUYA. 
Genesis7:6 Nowa akhali na pyaka madzana matanthatu pidadza madzi makulu padziko yapansi. 
Genesis7:7 Iye na mkazache, anache achimuna na akazawombo, adapita m'chimwadiya mule kuthawa madzi makulu ale." 
Genesis7:8 Nyama, mbalame, na pyakukambadza pya mtundu onsene, chimuna na chikazi, piwiri-piwiri, zakuchena na zokhonda chena zene pamaso pa Mulungu" 
Genesis7:9 zidapita m'chimwadiya pabodzi pene na Nowa ninga mudalongera Mulungu. 
Genesis7:10 Pidagwanda nsiku zinomwe madzi makulu adadza. 
Genesis7:11 Pandzidzi ukhakwanisa Nowa pyaka madzana matanthatu, pansiku yakhumi na chinomwe ya mwezi wachiwiri mphuno zonsene za nyanza ikulu pansi pa mataka zidatumbuka, pontho misuwo yonsene ya madzi makulu kudzulu adafungulwa." 
Genesis7:12 Tenepo mvula idavumba padziko yapansi nsiku makumanayi, mosiku na masikati." 
Genesis7:13 Pansiku yontho-yonthoyo Nowa na mkazache, anache achimuna atatu, Semu, Hamu na Yafeti, pontho na akazawo ene adapita m'chimwadiya mule." 
Genesis7:14 Iwo adapita m'chimwadiyamo pabodzi pene na nyama za mtundu onsene, zam'tsanga na zakufuyiwa, zakukambadza malingana na mtundu wache, pontho na mbalame za mtundu onsene na pyonsene pya maphaphido." 
Genesis7:15 Pinthu pyonsene pyamoyo, chikazi na chimuna, piwiri-piwiri pidapita m'chimwadiyamo pabodzi pene na Nowa," 
Genesis7:16 ninga mudalongera Mulungu. Tenepo MBUYA adafunga msuwo wa chimwadiya Nowa mbali mwenemo. 
Genesis7:17 Madzi makulu adathimiza kudza padziko yapansi nsiku makumanayi. Natenepo madziwo adazwika mwakuti chimwadiyacho chidathukuka mbachitoma kubeluka. 
Genesis7:18 Madzi adadzala pyakwanga mbathimizika pikulu padziko yapansi, natenepo chimwadiya chidabeluka pamadzi." 
Genesis7:19 Madzi adainjipa kufikirana mapiri onsene akulaphaletu konsene kwene pansi pa thambo adabizwa. 
Genesis7:20 Madzi adathimiza kudzala kufikirana makhono manomwe kubulukira pa nsonga ya mapiri akulapha ale kwenda m'dzulu. 
Genesis7:21 Pinthu pyonsene pyamoyo padziko yapansi, mbalame zonsene, nyama zam'tsanga na zakufuyiwa, zakukambadza zakufamba m'magulu na anthu onsene pidafa." 
Genesis7:22 Pinthu pyonsene pyakupuma m'dziko yapansi pidafa. 
Genesis7:23 MBUYA adavunga pinthu pyonsene pyamoyo m'dziko yapansi; anthu, nyama, pyakukambadza, na mbalame. Akhadasala ndi Nowa ene na onsene akhali na iye m'chimwadiya mule basi." 
Genesis7:24 Madzi makulu ale adakhala nsiku dzana na makumashanu hadzati kupwa. 
Genesis8:1 Mbwenye Mulungu hadaduwalire Nowa na nyama zonsene, zakufuyiwa na zam'tsanga, zikhali na iye m'chimwadiya mule tayu, natenepo adatekenya mphepo padziko yapansi madzi mbatoma kupwa." 
Genesis8:2 Mphuno zonsene za madzi akubulukira pansi na misuwo yonsene ya madzi kudzulu pidafungwa. Natenepo mvula idaleka. 
Genesis8:3 Tenepo madzi adakwata nsiku dzana na makumashanu kuti apwe. 
Genesis8:4 Pansiku yakhumi na chinomwe ya mwezi wachinomwe, mwadiya udadza mbutchama pamapiri a Ararati." 
Genesis8:5 Madzi adathimiza kwenda mbapwa, tenepo pansiku yakutoma ya mwezi wakhumi nsonga za mapiri zidaoneka." 
Genesis8:6 Pidagwanda nsiku makumanayi Nowa adafungula zhanera ya chimwadiya chile 
Genesis8:7 mbabulusira kunja khungubwe kumtuma. Iye hadabwerereve tayu, mbwenye akhambuluka-mbuluka kwene pyache kufikirana madzi akhadapwa padziko yapansi." 
Genesis8:8 Tenepo Nowa adagwinya nkhangaiwa kaona ngakhala madzi akhadapwa padziko yapansi. 
Genesis8:9 Mbwenye nkhangaiwa ile hidakwanise kugumana mbuto yakuphamapo tayu, thangwi pakhali madzi okhokha padzulu ponsene padziko yapansi. Natenepo iye adabwerera kuna Nowa m'chimwadiya mule. Nowa adabulusa mkono wache panja mbakwata nkhangaiwa ile mbaipitisa m'chimwadiya mule." 
Genesis8:10 Nowa adadikhira nsiku zinango zinomwe mbagwinya pontho kunja nkhangaiwa ile bulukira m'chimwadiya mule. 
Genesis8:11 Na kumawulo nkhangaiwa ile idabwerera kuna Nowa uku yapanangira tsamba iwisi ya muti waolivi kumolomo kwache. Natenepo Nowa adadzindikira kuti madzi akhadapwa. 
Genesis8:12 Tenepo adadikhira pontho nsiku zinomwe mbaigwinya kunja nkhangaiwa ile kachitatu. Ndzidzi wenewu iyo hidabwerereve tayu. 
Genesis8:13 Pikhali Nowa pyaka madzana matanthatu na chibodzi pyakubalwa, pansiku yakutoma ya mwezi wakutoma, madzi akhadapweratu padziko yapansi. Nowa adabulusa chakufungira cha chimwadiya chile mbasuzumira kunja mbaona kuti pansi pakhauma." 
Genesis8:14 Pansiku yamakumawiri na achinomwe ya mwezi wachiwiri dziko yapansi idaumiratu. 
Genesis8:15 Mulungu adalonga kuna Nowa mbati," 
Genesis8:16 “Buluka kunja kwa chimwadiya iwe na mkazako, anako achimuna, na akazawo ene." 
Genesis8:17 Bulusa kunja pyakulengwa pyonsene pina iwepyo, mbalame, nyama, na pyakukambadza, towera ziteyane pontho zidzale padziko yonsene yapansi.”" 
Genesis8:18 Natenepo Nowa, mkazache, anache achimuna na akazawo adabulukambo kunja." 
Genesis8:19 Nyama zonsene, pyakukambadza pyonsene, na mbalame zonsene; pyonsene pyakufamba padziko yapansi pidabuluka m'chimwadiya mule magulu-magulu malingana na mtundu wawo." 
Genesis8:20 Nowa adamangira MBUYA guwa; iye adakwata ibodzi ibodzi pamtundu onsene wa nyama na mbalame zakuchena pamaso pa Mulungu mbaziotcha zonsene ninga nsembe paguwapo. 
Genesis8:21 Khwema yadidi ya nsembeyo idamkomera MBUYA, natenepo iye adalonga yekha ene mbati, “Ine nkhabeve pontho kutemberera dziko yapansi thangwi ya pinthu pimbachita munthu tayu; ndikupidziwa kuti kutomera uwanache na lero manyerezero ache ngakuipa. Ine nkhabeve pontho kuvunga pyakulengwa pyonsene ninga mwachitira ine ndzidzi uno tayu." 
Genesis8:22 Dziko yapansi mbilipo, panati pakhale ndzidzi wakubzala na ndzidzi wakuvuna. Ndzidzi onsene panakhala kutonthola na kupisa, malimwe na mainja, mosiku na masikati.”" 
Genesis9:1 Mulungu adatsanzayisa Nowa na anache achimuna ale mbalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Khalani na ana azinji, towera pidzukulu pyanu pikhale m'dziko yonsene yapansi." 
Genesis9:2 Nyama zonsene, pyakukambadza pyonsene, mbalame zonsene na nsomba zonsene zinakugopani. Ipyo pyonsene pyaikhwa pansi pa utongi wanu." 
Genesis9:3 Tenepo munakwanisa kudya pyonsenepyo ninga mudakupasira ine mbewu zonsene ziwisi kuti mudye; chinchino ndakupasani pyonsene kuti pikhale phoso yanu. 
Genesis9:4 Mbwenye lekani kudya nyama uku chiropa chache chili mwenemo, thangwi moyo wache wa nyama umbakhala m'chiropa." 
Genesis9:5 Ngakhala munthu anapha munthu mnzache, iye anati atchunyuswe. Ine ndinati nditchunyuse na imfa nyama zonsene zinapha munthu, pontho na munthu onsene anapha mwanzacheyo." 
Genesis9:6 Mulungu adasasanya munthu mwakulandana na iye, natenepo munthu onsene anapha mwanzacheyo, iye anaphiwambo na munthu mnzache." 
Genesis9:7 “Imwe mwathema kukhala na ana azinji, towera pidzukulu pyanu pikhale padziko yonsene yapansi.”" 
Genesis9:8 Mulungu adalonga kuna Nowa na anache achimuna mbati," 
Genesis9:9 “Ine chinchino ndikusasanya chiverano na iwe, pontho na pidzukulu pyanu," 
Genesis9:10 pontho na pinthu pyonsene pyamoyo; mbalame zonsene, nyama zam'tsanga na zakufuyiwa zonsene, pyonsene pidabuluka na iwe pabodzi m'chimwadiya mule." 
Genesis9:11 Ndikusasanya chiverano changa na iwe: Ine nkhabeve pontho kuvunga pinthu pyonsene pyamoyo na madzi makulu tayu; ine nkhabeve pontho kudzesa madzi makulu kuvunga dziko yapansi tayu.” 
Genesis9:12 Natenepo Mulungu adalonga mbati, “Ichi ntchidzindikiro cha chiverano chinachita ine pakati pa iwe na ine, pontho na papyonsene pyamoyo pina iwe, chiverano cha mifendu yonsene inadzayo:" 
Genesis9:13 Ine ndinaikha taleza m'makole. Chenechi chinakhala chidzindikiro cha chiverano chathu pakati pa ine na dziko yapansi. 
Genesis9:14 Ndzidzi onsene unagudumira ine thambo na makole, pontho taleza mbuoneka m'makolemu" 
Genesis9:15 penepo ndinakumbuka chiverano changa pana iwe na pana pinthu pyonsene pyamoyo. Ine nkhabeve pontho kuvunga moyo wa pyonsene na madzi makulu tayu. 
Genesis9:16 Ndzidzi onsene unaoneka talezawo m'makole, ndinati ndikumbuke chiverano chakukhonda mala pakati pa ine na pinthu pyonsene pyamoyo pya mtundu onsene pya padziko yapansi.”" 
Genesis9:17 Tenepo Mulungu adalonga kuna Nowa mbati, “Ichi ntchidzindikiro cha chiverano chasasanya ine pakati pa pinthu pyonsene pyamoyo padziko yapansi.”" 
Genesis9:18 Ana achimuna a Nowa, ale adabuluka m'chimwadiya akhali, Semu, Hamu na Yafeti. Hamu adabala Kanani." 
Genesis9:19 Enewa akhali ana atatu achimuna a Nowa, tenepo kubuluka muna iwo anthu azinji adabalwa ale adadzala dziko yonsene yapansi." 
Genesis9:20 Nowa akhali nyakulima. Iye akhali munthu wakutoma kubzala mfesa. 
Genesis9:21 Pikhadamwa iye pang'ono vinyu wacheyo, iye adaledzera, tenepo adadula nguwo zache mbagona pyache chipezi-pezi m'khumbi mwache mule." 
Genesis9:22 Pidaona Hamu, babache Kanani, kuti babache akhali chipezi-pezi, adabuluka panja mbakapanga abale ache awiri ale." 
Genesis9:23 Tenepo Semu na Yafeti adakwata chakufinika mbachiikha kunduli paphewa pawo, adafamba chinduli nduli kupita m'khumbi mule mbamfinikiza babawo ule uku maso awo ayang'ana kukhabulukira iwo, towera aleke kumuona pezi babawo." 
Genesis9:24 Pidakungunuka Nowa, pontho pidadziwa iye pikhadachita mwanache wakumalisira pile," 
Genesis9:25 iye adalonga mbati, “Kanani mbatembererwe! Iye anakhala bitchu wa mabitchuletu kuna abale ache.”" 
Genesis9:26 Iye adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Kuzani MBUYA, Mulungu wa Semu. Kanani anakhala bitchu wa Semu." 
Genesis9:27 Mulungu mbachitise nthemba ya Yafeti kukula! Pidzukulu pyache pinakhala pabodzi na anthu a Semu! Kanani anakhala bitchu wa Yafeti.” 
Genesis9:28 Pidamala madzi makulu Nowa adakhala pontho pyaka madzana matatu na makumashanu 
Genesis9:29 mbafa ana pyaka madzana mafemba na makumashanu. 
Genesis10:1 Semu, Hamu na Yafeti, ana atatu achimuna a Nowa, pidamala madzi makulu adabala anawo. Ipi mphidzukulu pyawo:" 
Genesis10:2 Ana achimuna a Yafeti mbawa: Gomeri, Magogi, Madai, Yavani, Tubali, Mesheki na Tirasi." 
Genesis10:3 Pidzukulu pya Gomeri pikhali anthu a ku Ashikenazi, Rifati na Togarima." 
Genesis10:4 Pidzukulu pya Yavani pikhali anthu a ku Elisha, Tarisisi, Kipro na Rodanimu." 
Genesis10:5 Enewa akhali makolo a anthu ale akhakhala pagombe ya bara na pantchuwa. Penepi mphidzukulu pya Yafeti pyakukhala m'dziko na m'madzinza akusiyana-siyana, pontho gulu yonsene kulonga na chilongero chache ene." 
Genesis10:6 Ana achimuna a Hamu mbawa: Kushi, Iguputo, Puti na Kanani." 
Genesis10:7 Pidzukulu pya Kushi pikhali anthu a ku Seba, Havila, Sabita, Raama na Sabiteka. Pidzukulu pya Raama pikhali anthu a ku Sheba na Dedani." 
Genesis10:8 Kushi adabala mwana dzinache Nimurodi, ule adasanduka nyakukunda wamkulu wakutoma padziko yapansi." 
Genesis10:9 Na chiphedzo cha MBUYA iye akhali nyakukhulisa wamkulu. Na thangwi ya penepyo anthu ambalonga kuti, “MBUYA mbakuchitise kukhala nyakukhulisa wamkulu pyakwanga ninga Nimirodi!”" 
Genesis10:10 Mbuto zakutoma za ufumu wache zikhali Babiloni, Ereke, na Akadi m'dziko ya Shinari." 
Genesis10:11 Kubulukira kumbuto yeneyo iye adenda ku Asiria mbakamanga mizinda ya Ninevi, Rehoboti-Iri, Kala" 
Genesis10:12 na Reseni, ile ili pakati pa Ninevi na mzinda ukulu wa Kala." 
Genesis10:13 Pidzukulu pya Iguputo pikhali anthu a ku Ludi, Anamu, Lehabu, Nafitu," 
Genesis10:14 Patirusi, Kasilu pontho na ku Krete, kule kukhadabulukira Afilisti." 
Genesis10:15 Ana achimuna a Kanani mbawa: Sidoni, mwanache wautombo na Heti. Iwo akhali makolo a anthu akhadakwata madzinawo ale." 
Genesis10:16 Kanani akhali pontho kholo wa Ayebusi, Aamori, Agirigashi," 
Genesis10:17 Ahivi, Aariki, Asini," 
Genesis10:18 Aarividi, Azemari na Ahamati. Madzinza akusiyana-siyana a Akanani adafalikira" 
Genesis10:19 mpakana ku madire a Kanani kubulukira ku Sidoni kumwera mbaenda ku Gerari chifupi na Gaza, pontho kumabulukiro dzuwa a Sodomu, Gomora, Adima na Zeboimu chifupi na Lasha." 
Genesis10:20 Penepi ndiye pidzukulu pya Hamu pyakuveka na mbumba pontho pilongero pyawo na m'nthemba zawo zakusiyana-siyana, pontho madzinzawo." 
Genesis10:21 Semu, nanache Yafeti, akhali kholo wa Aheberi onsene." 
Genesis10:22 Ana achimuna a Semu mbawa: Elamu, Ashuri, Aripakisadi, Ludi na Aramu." 
Genesis10:23 Ana achimuna a Aramu mbawa: Uzi, Huli, Geteri na Mashi." 
Genesis10:24 Aripakisadi adabala Shela, Shela adabalambo Eberi." 
Genesis10:25 Eberi akhali na ana awiri achimuna, mbodzi dzinache ikhali Pelegi, thangwi pandzidzi wache anthu a padziko yapansi akhadagawikana; unangomboyi dzinache ikhali Yokotani." 
Genesis10:26 Pidzukulu pya Yokotani pikhali anthu a ku Alimodadi, Shelefu, Hazaramaveti, Yera," 
Genesis10:27 Hadoramu, Uzali, Dikila," 
Genesis10:28 Obali, Abimaele, Sheba," 
Genesis10:29 Ofiri, Havila na Yobabu. Onsenewa pikhali pidzukulu pya Yokotani." 
Genesis10:30 Dziko ikhakhala iwo idafumuka kubulukira ku Mesha nkhwenderatu ku Sefari kumabulukiro dzuwa a dziko yamapiri. 
Genesis10:31 Penepi ndiye pidzukulu pya Semu pyakuveka na mbumba pontho pilongero pyawo, na madzinza awo na nthemba zawo." 
Genesis10:32 Anthu onsenewa mphidzukulu pya Nowa, dzinza na dzinza malingana na makolo awo akusiyana-siyana. Pidamala madzi makulu madzinza onsene a pansi pano adabulukira kuna ana achimuna a Nowa." 
Genesis11:1 Pakutoma anthu onsene a padziko yapansi akhali na chilongero chibodzi, pontho akhaphatisa basa mafala abodzi ene." 
Genesis11:2 Pikhafuluka iwo kwendera kumabulukiro dzuwa a dziko yapansi, adafika pambuto inango yaphedi mu Shinari mbakhazikika kweneko." 
Genesis11:3 Tenepo iwo adalonga kuna unango na mwanzache mbati, “Tendeni tiumbe njerwa kwache tizipise mwadidi mwene.” Natenepo adaumba njerwa zakumangira nazo, pontho akhali na upula wakuphatisira nawo njerwazo." 
Genesis11:4 Tenepo iwo adalonga mbati, “Tendeni timange mzinda wakukhala na nsanja yakulapha yakufikiratu kudzulu, towera tipichitise tekha ene kukhala akuveka, pontho kuti tileke balalika padziko yonsene yapansi.”" 
Genesis11:5 Tenepo MBUYA adatchitha dzaona mzinda na nsanja idamanga anthu ile," 
Genesis11:6 mbalonga mbati, “Ngayang'anani, onsenewa mbanthu abodzi, pontho akulonga chilongero chibodzi; yeneyi ndi nthomatoma ya pinthu pinafuna kuchita iwo m'tsogolo muno. Apo iwo anakwanisa kuchita pinthu pyonsene pinafuna iwo." 
Genesis11:7 Tendeni titchithe pontho tikavunganize chilongero chawo, towera aleke vana unango na mwanzache.”" 
Genesis11:8 Natenepo MBUYA adaabalalisa padziko yonsene yapansi. Iwo adaleka kumanga mzindawo. 
Genesis11:9 Mzindawo udathulwa Babele, thangwi penepo MBUYA adavunganiza chilongero cha anthu onsene, pontho kubulukira penepo adabalalisa anthu padziko yonsene yapansi." 
Genesis11:10 Ipi mphidzukulu pya Semu. Pidagwanda pyaka piwiri kumala kwa madzi makulu, pontho pikhali Semu pyaka dzana pyakubalwa, iye adabala mwana wamamuna dzinache Aripakisadi." 
Genesis11:11 Kubuluka penepo adakhala pontho pyaka madzana mashanu mbabala pontho ana anango. 
Genesis11:12 Pikhali Aripakisadi pyaka makumatatu na pishanu pyakubalwa, adabala mwana wamamuna dzinache Shela;" 
Genesis11:13 kubuluka penepo adakhala pontho na moyo pyaka pinango madzana manayi na pitatu mbabala pontho ana anango. 
Genesis11:14 Pikhali Shela pyaka makumatatu pyakubalwa, adabala mwana wamamuna dzinache Eberi;" 
Genesis11:15 kubuluka penepo adakhala pontho na moyo pyaka pinango madzana manayi na pitatu mbabala pontho ana anango. 
Genesis11:16 Pikhali Eberi pyaka makumatatu na pinayi pyakubalwa, adabala mwana wamamuna dzinache Pelegi;" 
Genesis11:17 kubuluka penepo adakhala pontho na moyo pyaka pinango madzana manayi na makumatatu mbabala pontho ana anango. 
Genesis11:18 Pikhali Pelegi pyaka makumatatu pyakubalwa, adabala mwana wamamuna dzinache Reu;" 
Genesis11:19 kubuluka penepo adakhala pontho na moyo pyaka pinango madzana mawiri na pifemba mbabala pontho ana anango. 
Genesis11:20 Pikhali Reu pyaka makumatatu na piwiri pyakubalwa, adabala wamwana mamuna dzinache Serugi;" 
Genesis11:21 kubuluka penepo adakhala pontho na moyo pyaka pinango madzana mawiri na pinomwe mbabala pontho ana anango. 
Genesis11:22 Pikhali Serugi pyaka makumatatu pyakubalwa, adabala mwana wamamuna dzinache Nahori;" 
Genesis11:23 kubuluka penepo adakhala pontho na moyo pyaka pinango madzana mawiri mbabala pontho ana anango. 
Genesis11:24 Pikhali Nahori pyaka makumawiri na pifemba pyakubalwa, adabala mwana wamamuna dzinache Tera;" 
Genesis11:25 kubuluka penepo adakhala pontho na moyo pyaka pinango dzana na khumi na pifemba mbabala pontho ana anango. 
Genesis11:26 Pikhali Tera pyaka makumanomwe pyakubalwa, adabala ana atatu achimuna, Abramu, Nahori, na Harani." 
Genesis11:27 Ipi mphidzukulu pya Tera, ule adabala Abramu, Nahori na Harani. Harani adabala Loti," 
Genesis11:28 tenepo Harani adafa m'mzinda wa Uri mu Akaladea, mudabalwa iye mule, mwenemo babache akali moyo." 
Genesis11:29 Abramu adasemba Sarai. Nahori adasemba Milika, ule ndi mwana Harani, ule pontho akhali babache Isika." 
Genesis11:30 Mbwenye Sarai akhali ngomwa. 
Genesis11:31 Tera adakwata mwanache Abramu, mdzukuluache Loti mwana Harani na mkwenyache Sarai, ule akhali mkazi Abramu, mbabuluka mumzinda wa Uri wa ku Kaladea mbaenda nawo kudziko ya Kanani. Iwo adenda mpakana kudziko ya Harani mbakhazikika kweneko." 
Genesis11:32 Tera adafa kweneko ana pyaka madzana mawiri na pishanu. 
Genesis12:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna Abramu mbati, “Buluka m'dziko yako, mbusiye abale ako na pya m'nyumba ya babako mbuende kudziko inafuna ine kukuonesa." 
Genesis12:2 Ine ndinati ndikupase pidzukulu pizinji pontho iwo anakhala dzinza ikulu. Ine ndinati ndikutsanzayise mbandichitisa dzinako kukhala yakuveka, towera iwe ukhale mtsanzayiso kuna anango." 
Genesis12:3 Ine ndinati nditsanzayise anyakukutsanzayisa, Mbwenye ndinatemberera anyakukutemberera. Pontho kudzera muna iwe ndinatsanzayisa madzinza onsene.”" 
Genesis12:4 Natenepo Abramu adabuluka ninga mudampangira MBUYA mule, kwache Loti adenda naye pabodzi. Abramu akhali pyaka makumanomwe na pishanu pyakubalwa pikhabuluka iye m'mzinda wa Harani." 
Genesis12:5 Abramu adakwata Sarai mkazache, Loti mwana mbaleache na mfuma yonsene pontho na mabitchu ache onsene akhali na iye mu Harani, mbatoma ulendo wawo kwenda kudziko ya Kanani. Pidafika iwo mu Kanani," 
Genesis12:6 Abramu adafamba m'dzikomo mpakana adafika pamuti wakupambulika wamthundu wa ku More muluwani ya Shekemu. Pandzidzi wenewu Akanani akhali m'dzikomo. 
Genesis12:7 MBUYA adaonekera kuna Abramu mbampanga mbati, “Yeneyi ndiye dziko inafuna ine kupereka kuna pidzukulu pyako.” Tenepo Abramu adamanga guwa yakuperekerapo nsembe kuna MBUYA, akhadamuonekera ule." 
Genesis12:8 Kubuluka penepo iye adafedzera kumwera kudziko yamapiri kumabulukiro dzuwa a mzinda wa Betele mbamanga misasache pakati pa kumadokero dzuwa a Betele na kumabulukiro dzuwa a mzinda wa Ai. Penepo adamanga guwa yakuperekerapo nsembe mbapembedza MBUYA. 
Genesis12:9 Kubuluka penepo Abramu adenda mbuto na mbuto kufedzera kuthando yatchetcha ya Negebu. 
Genesis12:10 Mbwenye m'dziko ya Kanani mukhali njala ikulu mwakuti Abramu adathimiza kwenda kumwera mbafika mu Iguputo, towera akakhale kweneko ndzidzi pang'ono." 
Genesis12:11 Pikhali iye chifupi kupita mu Iguputo, adalonga kuna Sarai mkazache mbati, “Iwe ndiwe mkazi wakubalika pyakwanga." 
Genesis12:12 Anthu a ku Iguputo angakuona anati akalonge kuti, ‘Weneyu ndi mkazache,’ natenepo iwo anandipha mbakuleka iwe na moyo." 
Genesis12:13 Tenepo uapange kuti iwe ndiwe nyamainganga; natenepo iwo anandileka kukhonda kundipha mbandiyang'anira mwadidi thangwi ya iwepo.” 
Genesis12:14 Pidapita iye mu Iguputo mule, anthu a mwenemo adaonadi kuti mkazache akhali wakubalika pyakwanga." 
Genesis12:15 Mathubu a mfumu wa Iguputo adamuona mkazi ule mbakalonga kuna mfumu pya kubalika kudachita iye, natenepo adaendeswa kunyumba yachifumu." 
Genesis12:16 Na thangwi ya mkazi ule, mfumu adamuyang'anira Abramu mwadidi mbampasa mikumbi ya mabira, mbuzi, ng'ombe, mabulu, mabitchu na ngamila." 
Genesis12:17 Mbwenye na thangwi yakuti mfumu adakwata Sarai, mkazi Abramu, MBUYA adagwisa utenda wakugoswa pa mfumu na pana anthu onsene a kunyumba kwache." 
Genesis12:18 Tenepo mfumu adachemeresa Abramu mbamvunza mbati, “Chachita iwe kuna inechi ninji? Udalekeranji kundipanga kuti weneyu ndi mkazako?" 
Genesis12:19 Apo udalongeranji kuti weneyu ndi nyamaingako mbundichitisa kumkwata ninga mkazanga? Mkazako ushu; umkwate pontho mubulukemo m'dziko muno!” 
Genesis12:20 Mfumu ule adatonga amunache kubulusa Abramu m'dzikomo, natenepo iwo adakwata Abramu, na Sarai mkazache, pontho na pyonsene pikhali na iye, mbaabulusa m'dzikomo." 
Genesis13:1 Abramu adabuluka kumpoto kwa dziko ya Iguputo pabodzi pene na mkazache na pyonsene pikhali na iye, pontho Loti adenda naye pabodzi, mbafika kuthando yatchetcha ya Negebu." 
Genesis13:2 Abramu adafuma pyakwanga. Akhali na pifuyo pontho siliva na golidi. 
Genesis13:3 Tenepo iye adabuluka kuthando yatchetcha ya Negebu mbafamba mbuto na mbuto kwendera ku Betele. Iye adafika pambuto, ile ikhali pakati pa Betele na Ai, kule kukhadamanga iye misasache pakutoma pale," 
Genesis13:4 pontho kule kukhadamanga iye guwa yakuperekerapo nsembe. Kweneko Abramu adapembedza MBUYA. 
Genesis13:5 Loti akhafamba na Abramu ule akhalimbo na mikumbi ya pifuyo, pontho akhali na banjache na anyabasache." 
Genesis13:6 Mbwenye pakhali nkhabe mbuto yakukwana ya mpovu mwakuti anthu awiri ale hadakwanise kukhala pabodzi tayu, thangwi onsene uwiriawo akhali na pifuyo pizinji pyakwanga." 
Genesis13:7 Natenepo mapoko-poko adalamuka pakati pa amakabuswa a Abramu na a Loti. Pandzidzi wenewo Akanani na Aperizi akhakhalambo m'dzikomo. 
Genesis13:8 Tenepo Abramu adalonga kuna Loti mbati, “Ife ngubaleathu, natenepo paleke khala mapoko-poko pakati pa iwe na ine, penu pakati pa amakabuswako na amakabuswanga." 
Genesis13:9 Ayi dziko yonseneyi hunaiona iwe tayu? Apo, tende tiphadzane pyathu. Ngakhala iwe unaendera kumabzere, inembo ndinaendera kumadyo; ngakhala iwe unaendera kumadyo, inembo ndinaendera kumabzere.”" 
Genesis13:10 Loti adakwiza maso ache mbaona kuti phedi yonsene ya Yorodani kwendera ku Zoari ikhali na madzi azinji ninga Munda wa MBUYA, penu ninga dziko ya Iguputo. Ndzidzi wenewo MBUYA hakhadadzati kuvunga mizinda ya Sodomu na Gomora." 
Genesis13:11 Natenepo Loti adasankhula phedi yonsene ya Yorodani kuti ikhale yache. Tenepo adabuluka mbafedzera kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa. Enewo ndiye akhali maphadzaniro ache a amuna awiri ale. 
Genesis13:12 Abramu adakhala m'dziko ya Kanani, mbwenye Loti adakhala paphedi ya pakati pa mizinda, mbamanga msasache chifupi na Sodomu," 
Genesis13:13 mzinda ule anthu ache akhali akuipa, pontho akudawika pamaso pa MBUYA." 
Genesis13:14 Pidamala Loti kuphadzana na Abramu, MBUYA adalonga kuna Abramu mbati, “Kubulukira pana iwepo, kwiza maso ako mbuyang'ane kumpoto, kumwera, kumabulukiro dzuwa na kumadokero dzuwa." 
Genesis13:15 Dziko yonsene inaona iweyi ndinati ndiipereke kuna iwe na kuna pidzukulu pyako mbikhala yako kwenda na kwenda. 
Genesis13:16 Ndinati ndikupase pidzukulu pizinji pyakuti nkhabe munthu anakwanisa kupilengesa pyonsene tayu. Pinainjipa ninga tchetcha ya padziko yapansi mwakuti ngakhala munthu anakwanisa kulengesa tchetcha padziko yapansi, penepo pidzukulu pyako pinakwanisika kulengeswambo." 
Genesis13:17 Chinchino ndoko ufambe kuzungulira dziko yonseneyi towera uione, thangwi ndikufuna ndikupase dziko yonseneyi.”" 
Genesis13:18 Natenepo Abramu adathukusa misasache mbakakhala chifupi na miti yakupambulika yamthundu ya ku Mamure kuluwani ya Hebroni. Kweneko adamangako guwa yakuperekerapo nsembe kuna MBUYA. 
Genesis14:1 Mafumu manayi, Amurafele wa ku Shinari, Arioki wa ku Elasara, Kedorilaomere wa ku Elamu na Tidala wa ku Goimu," 
Genesis14:2 adenda kachita nkhondo na mafumu anango ashanu, Bera wa ku Sodomu, Birisha wa Gomora, Shinabu wa ku Adima, Shemebere wa ku Zeboimu na mfumu wa ku Bela (penu Zoari)." 
Genesis14:3 Mafumu onsene ashanu akumalisirawa adagumanyikana paphedi ya Sidimu, ile chinchino ndi Nyanza Yakufa, mbasasanya gulu ibodzi ya nkhondo." 
Genesis14:4 Pyaka khumi na piwiri iwo akhali pansi pa utongi wa Kedorilaomere, mbwenye chaka chakhumi na chitatu iwo adampandukira." 
Genesis14:5 Chaka chakhumi na chinayi Kedorilaomere pabodzi pene na mafumu adasasanya nawo gulu ibodzi ya nkhondo ale, adalamuka mbakakunda Arefaimu a mumzinda wa Ashiteroti-Kanaimu, Azuzi a mumzinda wa Hamu, Aemimu a m'phedi ya Kiriataimu," 
Genesis14:6 na Ahori a m'mapiri a Seiri, mbaathamangisa mpakana ku Eliparani chifupi na nkhomole ya thando yatchetcha." 
Genesis14:7 Kubuluka penepo iwo adazungunukira m'nduli mbaenda ku Kadeshi, ile kale ikhachemerwa Enimishipati. Iwo adakunda anthu onsene a dziko ya Aamaleki pontho na Aamori ene, akhakhala mu Hazazoni Tamara ale." 
Genesis14:8 Tenepo mfumu wa ku Sodomu, mfumu wa ku Gomora, mfumu wa ku Adima, mfumu wa ku Zeboimu na mfumu wa ku Bela (yeneyi ndi Zoari) adandandalisa anyankhondo awo paphedi ya Sidimu, mbamenyana" 
Genesis14:9 na Kedorilaomere mfumu wa ku Elamu, Tidala mfumu wa ku Goimu, Amurafele mfumu wa ku Shinari na Arioki mfumu wa ku Elasara; mafumu mashanu kumenyana na mafumu manayi." 
Genesis14:10 Phedi ya Sidimu ikhadadzala na madzenje a upula, natenepo pikhathawa mafumu a Sodomu na Gomora pabodzi na amunawo ale, anango a iwo adagwera m'madzenje mule, mbwenye anango onsene adathawira kumapiri." 
Genesis14:11 Mafumu manayi ale adathukula pyonsene pya mu Sodomu na Gomora, podi na phoso yawo ene mbaenda pyawo." 
Genesis14:12 Loti, mdzukuluache Abramu, akhakhala mu Sodomu, natenepo iwo adathukula Loti na pinthu pyache pyonsene." 
Genesis14:13 Mbwenye munthu mbodzi, ule akhadathawa, adadza mbalonga pyonsenepi kuna Abramu, munthu wa Chiheberi, ule akhakhala chifupi na miti yakupambulika ile mwenechiroache akhali Mamure wa Chiamori. Mamure na abale ache awiri, Eshikolo na Aneri, akhali gulu ibodzi yankhondo na Abramu." 
Genesis14:14 Pidava Abramu kuti mdzukuluache aphatwa ninga nyaperezo, iye adachemeresa anyankhondo ache onsene a mumsasa mwache. Onsene pabodzi akhali madzana matatu na khumi na asere. Iwo adathamangisa mafumu manayi ale mpakana ku Dani." 
Genesis14:15 Na mosiku mwache Abramu adagawa anyankhondo ache m'magulu-magulu. Iwo adamenya anyamalwawo ale mbaakunda. Natenepo adaathamangisa mpakana ku Hoba kumpoto kwa mzinda wa Damasiko," 
Genesis14:16 mbapulumusa pinthu pyonsene pikhadakwatwa pile. Abramu adapulumusa pontho Loti mdzukuluache mbabwera naye na pinthu pyache pyonsene pabodzi pene na akazi na anthu anango. 
Genesis14:17 Pidabwera Abramu kubulukira kunkhondo kukhadakunda iye Kedorilaomere na mafumu anango kule, mfumu wa mu Sodomu adalamuka kagumanikana naye paphedi ya Shave, yakuchemerwa pontho Phedi ya Mfumu." 
Genesis14:18 Pontho Melekizedeki, ule akhali mfumu wa mzinda wa Salemu, pontho nyansembe wa Mulungu Wakudzulu-dzulu, adadza na mikate na vinyu kuna Abramu," 
Genesis14:19 mbamtsanzayisa mbati, “Mulungu Wakudzulu-dzulu, ule adasasanya kudzulu na pansi pano mbakutsanzayise iwe, Abramu!" 
Genesis14:20 Mulungu Wakudzulu-dzulu ule adakupasa mphamvu zakukunda nazo anyamalwako mbalemedzwe!” Tenepo Abramu adapereka kuna Melekizedeki chakhumi cha pinthu pyonsene pidapulumusa iye pile. 
Genesis14:21 Mfumu wa Sodomu adalonga kuna Abramu mbati, “Pinthu pyonsenepi pidapulumusa iwe ukwate, mbwenye undibwezere anthu anga onsene.”" 
Genesis14:22 Abramu adatawira mbati, “Ine ndinadumbira pikulu pene pamaso pa MBUYA, Mulungu Wakudzulu-dzulu, Nyakusasanya kudzulu na pansi pano," 
Genesis14:23 kuti ine nkhabe koya chinthu na chibodzi chene chako tayu, podi na usalu ene penu nthambo za nkhwaira, towera iwe uleke kwanisa kulonga kuti, ‘Amchitisa Abramu kufuma ndine pano.’" 
Genesis14:24 Ine nkhabe kwata chinthu na chibodzi chene kuti chikhale changa tayu. Chinafuna ine kutawira ntchenecho chene chidaphatisa amunangawa basa. Mbwenye aleke anthu adenda na ine pabodzi, Aneri, Eshikolo na Mamure, akwate khundu yawo.”" 
Genesis15:1 Pikhadamala penepi, Abramu adaona masomphenya mbava MBUYA akulonga kuna iye kuti, “Abramu, leka gopa. Ine ndinakutchinjiriza kuna pyakugoswa, pontho ndinakupasa mfupo ukulu.”" 
Genesis15:2 Mbwenye Abramu adatawira mbati, “MBUYA Mulungu, mfupowo unandiganyalisanji podi ine nkhabe mwana, pontho nyakufuna kupita panyumba panga ndi Eliezere, munthu wa ku Damasikoyu." 
Genesis15:3 Imwe nee mwandipasa mwana tayu; natenepo bitchu wa panyumba panga anati apite panyumba panga.” 
Genesis15:4 Tenepo adava MBUYA akulonga kuna iye kuti, “Eliezere, bitchuyi nkhabe pita panyumba pako tayu, mbwenye mwanako chadi-chadi ndiye anafuna kupita panyumba pako.”" 
Genesis15:5 MBUYA adenda na Abramu panja mbalonga mbati, “Ngayang'ana kudzuluku, pontho yesera kulengesa nyenyezi; iwe unati ukhale na pidzukulu pizinji ninga penepyo.”" 
Genesis15:6 Abramu adakhulupira MBUYA, na thangwi ya penepi MBUYA adakomerwa naye mbamuyesa munthu wakulungama." 
Genesis15:7 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ine ndine MBUYA, ule adakubulusa mu Uri, dziko ya Akaladea, mbandikupasa dziko ino kuti ikhale yako ene.”" 
Genesis15:8 Mbwenye Abramu adavunza mbati, “MBUYA Mulungu, ndinapidziwa tani kuti dzikoyi inakhala yanga ene?”" 
Genesis15:9 Tenepo MBUYA adatawira mbati, “Kandikwatire mwanamphulu wamkazi, mbuzi ikazi, na bira wamamuna. Pyonsene pikhale na pyaka pitatu pyakubalwa. Ukwate pontho jiwa na nkhangaiwa.”" 
Genesis15:10 Abramu adadza nazo nyama zonsene kuna Mulungu, mbazigwanda m'mapindi awiri mbaikha mwadidi mapindiwo mwakuyang'anisana, mbwenye mbalame hadazigwande tayu." 
Genesis15:11 Tenepo malezi adaphama pana nyamapo, mbwenye Abramu adaathamangisa." 
Genesis15:12 Pikhathobila dzuwa, Abramu adagona chitulo chakufa nacho, pontho mdima ukulu wakugoswa udadza pana iye." 
Genesis15:13 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Upidziwiletu kuti pidzukulu pyako pinakhala alendo m'dziko ya enechiro, pontho iwo anakhala mabitchu a anthu a dziko yeneyo mbavuyiwa pikulu pyaka madzana manayi." 
Genesis15:14 Mbwenye ndinatchunyusa dziko inafuna iwo kuiphatira basa ninga mabitchu. Kumamalisiro kwache iwo anabuluka m'dziko ya enechiroyo na mfuma izinji. 
Genesis15:15 Mbwenye iwe unakulupala mwadidi, mbufa mwadidi, pontho unaikhwa m'masiye mwadidi." 
Genesis15:16 Mifendu minayi ya anthu inati ikwane pidzukulu pyako mbipidzati kubwerera kuno, thangwi kudawa kwa Aamori kudzati fika pakundendeya tayu kuti atchunyuswe nako.”" 
Genesis15:17 Pikhathobila dzuwa pontho pikhaswipa kunja, chikalango cha moto wakupuchira na nsakali ya moto idaoneka ikugwanda na pakati pa mapindi a nyama zile." 
Genesis15:18 Pansiku yeneyo MBUYA adachita chiverano na Abramu mbalonga mbati, “Ndinati ndipereke dzikoyi kuna pidzukulu pyako kutomera madire a Iguputo mpakana kumkulo ukulu wa Yufurate;" 
Genesis15:19 kuphataniza pontho na dziko ya Akeni, ya Akenizi, ya Akadimoni," 
Genesis15:20 ya Ahiti, ya Aperizi, ya Arefaimu," 
Genesis15:21 ya Aamori, ya Akanani, ya Agirigashi na ya Ayebusi.”" 
Genesis16:1 Sarai mkazi Abramu hakhadambalira mwana tayu. Mbwenye mkaziyu akhali na bitchu wachikazi wa ku Iguputo, dzinache Hagara." 
Genesis16:2 Natenepo iye adalonga kuna Abramu mbati, “MBUYA andikhondesa kukhala na ana. Ndoko kapite m'bonde na bitchu wangayi; mwinango anakwanisa kundibalira ana.” Abramu adatawirizana napyo pidalonga mkazache pile." 
Genesis16:3 Natenepo mkazi ule adapereka Hagara kuna Abramu kuti akhale mkazache wachibitchu. Penepi pidachitika m'dziko ya Kanani, pidakhala Abramu pyaka khumi mbali mwenemo." 
Genesis16:4 Abramu adapita m'bonde na Hagara, tenepo iye adakwata mimba. Pidadzindikira Hagara kuti ana mimba adatoma kugaya na kululupisa Sarai mbuyache." 
Genesis16:5 Tenepo Sarai adalonga kuna Abramu mbati, “Wachitisa ndiwe kuti ine ndibonere tenepa. Ine ndidakupasa bitchu wanga kukhala mkazako wamng'ono, mbwenye pidadziwa iye kuti ana mimba, adatoma kundilulupisa. Natenepo MBUYA mbapitonge kuti wadidi mbani pakati pa iwe na ine.”" 
Genesis16:6 Abramu adatawira mbati, “Hagarayu ndi bitchu wako, pontho ali pansi pa utongi wako. Chita pinafuna iwe kuna iye.” Natenepo Sarai adaphatisa basa Hagara mwavinga mwakuti iye adathawa." 
Genesis16:7 Mngelo wa MBUYA adagumanikana na Hagara pamphuno ya madzi m'thando yatchetcha panjira yakwendera ku Shuri," 
Genesis16:8 mbalonga mbati, “Iwe Hagara, bitchu wa Sarai, ukubulukira kupi? Apo ukwenda kupi?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ndikuthawa mbuyanga wamkazi.”" 
Genesis16:9 Mngelo wa MBUYA ule adalonga mbati, “Bwerera kuna mbuyako mbukamvere.”" 
Genesis16:10 Mngelo wa MBUYA adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Ine ndinati ndikupase pidzukulu pizinji mwakuti anthu hanakwanisa kupilengesa tayu." 
Genesis16:11 Iwe una mimba, tenepo unabala mwana wamamuna, mbumthula Ishimaele, thangwi MBUYA ava kulira kwako." 
Genesis16:12 Mbwenye mwanako anakhala ninga bulu wam'tsanga; iye anakhala wakupokanyisana na munthu onsene, pontho munthu onsene anapokanyisana nayembo. Iye nkhabe khala pakati pa abale ache onsene tayu.”" 
Genesis16:13 Hagara adapivunza yekha ene mbati, “Ayi ine ndaonadi Mulungu mbandikhala na moyo kuti ndilonge pya penepi?” Natenepo iye adamthula MBUYA kuti, “Mulungu ambaona.”" 
Genesis16:14 Ndi thangwi yache anthu ambachemera mchera uli pakati pa Kadeshi na Beredi ule kuti Mchera wa Nyamoyo Ambandiona ule. 
Genesis16:15 Hagara adambalira Abramu mwana wamamuna mbamthula Ishimaele. 
Genesis16:16 Pandzidzi wenewu Abramu akhali pyaka makumasere na pitanthatu pyakubalwa. 
Genesis17:1 Pikhali Abramu pyaka makumafemba na pifemba pyakubalwa, MBUYA adamuonekera mbalonga mbati, “Ine ndine Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene. Iwe wathema kundivera, pontho ndzidzi onsene phata pyakulungama." 
Genesis17:2 Ndinati ndichite nawe chiverano mbandikupasa pidzukulu pizinji.” 
Genesis17:3 Abramu adalamba, tenepo Mulungu adalonga mbati," 
Genesis17:4 “Ndikuchita nawe chiverano ichi lero: iwe unati ukhale kholo ya madzinza azinji. 
Genesis17:5 Dzinako hinakhalave Abramu tayu, mbwenye Abrahamu, thangwi ndakuchitisa kukhala kholo wa madzinza azinji." 
Genesis17:6 Ine ndinati ndikupase pidzukulu pizinji, pontho anango mwa iwo anakhala mafumu. Iwe unakhala na pidzukulu pizinji pyakwanga mwakuti pinakhala madzinza." 
Genesis17:7 “Chiverano changachi ndinati ndichikhazikise kuti chikhale chiverano chakukhala na kukhala pakati pa iwe na ine, pontho na pidzukulu pyako mpakana mifendu yonsene inafuna kudza m'tsogolo. Ine ndinakhala Mulungu wako, pontho Mulungu wa pidzukulu pyako." 
Genesis17:8 Ine ndinati ndipereke dziko yonsene ya Kanani inakhala imwe ninga alendo leroyi kuti ikhale yako na ya pidzukulu pyako. Dzikoyi inakhala ya pidzukulu pyako kwenda na kwenda, pontho ine ndinakhala Mulungu wawo.”" 
Genesis17:9 Tenepo Mulungu adalonga kuna Abrahamu mbati, “Iwe pabodzi na pidzukulu pyako pyonsene mifendu inafuna kudza m'tsogolomo monsene mwathema kutawirambo kukoya chiverano chasasanya ine na imwe." 
Genesis17:10 Chiverano changa na iwe, pontho na pidzukulu pyako pya m'tsogolomo ntchakuti: Mamuna onsene athema kugwandwa nsonga yachimuna." 
Genesis17:11 Kutomera lero kwenda m'tsogolo mwana wamamuna onsene athema kugwandwa nsonga yachimuna angamala nsiku zisere zakubalwa, kuthimiza penepo mabitchu onsene akubalwa m'nyumba mwako penu na onsene akuchita kugulwa kubulukira kuna munthu wachilendo. Chenechi chinakhala chidzindikiro cha chiverano pakati pa iwe na ine." 
Genesis17:12  
Genesis17:13 Mamuna onsene athema kugwandwa. Chenechi chinakhala chidzindikiro chakuchitwa pamanungo kuonesa kuti chiverano chasasanya ine na iwe ntchakukhala na kukhala. 
Genesis17:14 Mamuna onsene okhonda gwandwa hanayeswa mbodzi wa anthu anga tayu, thangwi iye hadakoye chiverano chasasanya ine naye tayu.”" 
Genesis17:15 Mulungu adalonga pontho kuna Abrahamu mbati, “Iwe wathema kuleka kumchemera mkazako Sarai; kutomera lero, kwenda m'tsogolo dzinache inakhala Sara." 
Genesis17:16 Ine ndinati ndimtsanzayise, pontho ndinakupasa mwana wakubalwa na iye. Ndinati ndimtsanzayise, pontho anakhala mama wa madzinza azinji, pontho pakati pa pidzukulu pyache panabuluka mafumu a anthu.”" 
Genesis17:17 Abrahamu adalamba, kwache adatoma kuseka mbalonga yekha ene mbati, “Ayi akulumwe, nkhukwanisikadi kuti mamuna wa pyaka dzana pyakubalwa kubala mwana? Apo Sara wa pyaka makumafemba pyakubalwa nkhukwanisika kubala mwana?”" 
Genesis17:18 Natenepo Abrahamu adamvunza Mulungu mbati, “Mwatani kumuleka pyache Ishimaele kuti akhale nyakutambira mtsanzayiso kubulukira kuna imwe?”" 
Genesis17:19 Mbwenye Mulungu adatawira mbati, “Nkhabe! Mkazako Sara anakubalira mwana, pontho unamthula Isake. Ine ndinakhazikisa chiverano changa pana iye na pana pidzukulu pyache kwenda na kwenda." 
Genesis17:20 Ndava kupempha kwako pya Ishimaele, natenepo ine ndinamtsanzayisa, pontho ndinampasa ana azinji na pidzukulu pizinji. Iye anakhala baba wa mafumu khumi na awiri, pontho ndinamchitisa kukhala dzinza ikulu." 
Genesis17:21 Mbwenye ndinakhazikisa chiverano changa pana Isake mwanako ule anabalwa na Sara pandzidzi ninga uno chaka chamangwana.” 
Genesis17:22 Pidamala Mulungu kulonga na Abrahamu, iye adabuluka pana Abrahamu." 
Genesis17:23 Nsiku yonthoyo Abrahamu adakwata mwanache Ishimaele na amuna onsene adabalwa m'nyumba mwache mule, pontho na amuna onsene adagula iye, mbaagwanda nsonga zawo zakumaso ninga mudampangira Mulungu." 
Genesis17:24 Abrahamu akhali na pyaka makumafemba na pifemba pyakubalwa pikhagwandwa iye, pontho" 
Genesis17:25 Ishimaele, mwanache, akhali pyaka khumi na pitatu pyakubalwa." 
Genesis17:26 Abrahamu na mwanache Ishimaele adagwandwa nsonga nsiku yontho-yonthoyo 
Genesis17:27 pabodzi pene na amuna onsene a m'nyumba mwa Abrahamu kuthimizapo ale akubalwa m'nyumba mwache penu akuchita kugulwa adagwandwa nawo pabodzi. 
Genesis18:1 MBUYA adaonekera Abrahamu chifupi na miti yakupambulika yamthundu ya ku Mamure. Pikhakhala Abrahamu pamsuwo wa khumbi yache pandzidzi wamasikati mwenemo dzuwa ikuswa miti," 
Genesis18:2 adakwiza maso ache mbaona amuna atatu aimira penepo. Sindzidzi pidaaona iye, adathamanga kagumanikana nawo. Iye adalamba" 
Genesis18:3 mbalonga mbati, “Ambuya, ndaphata miyendo, lekani gwanda okhonda imira pamsuwo panga; ine ndili pano kukutumikirani." 
Genesis18:4 Nditawiriseni kuti ndikakwate madzi akutsuka nawo manyalo anu. Munakwanisa kupuma pano pansi pa mutiwu. 
Genesis18:5 Ndinati ndidze pontho na kudya; penepyo pinakupasani mphamvu zakufamba nazo paulendo wanu. Imwe mwandilemedza pakudza pamsuwo panga, tenepo ndilekeni ndikutumikireni.” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Ande, ife tatawira.”" 
Genesis18:6 Abrahamu adapita mwakuchimbiza m'khumbi mule, mbakalonga kuna Sara mbati, “Chimbiza, ukwate m'kabudumo ufa wadidiletu mbuphike mkate.”" 
Genesis18:7 Tenepo adathamanga kunkumbi wa pifuyo pyache mbakwata mwanamphulu wadidi, wakufewa pontho wakunenepa mbampereka kuna nyabasache, ule adampha na kumtereka mwakuchimbiza." 
Genesis18:8 Iye adakwata mafuta amkaka, mkaka na nyama idatereka iye ile mbapiikha pamaso pa amuna ale. Pikhadya iwo Abrahamu adaimira chifupi na iwo patchinde ya muti ule." 
Genesis18:9 Tenepo iwo adamvunza Abrahamu mbati, “Mkazako Sara ali kupi?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ali m'khumbimo.”" 
Genesis18:10 Mbodzi mwa amuna ale adalonga mbati, “Chaka chamangwana pandzidzi ninga uno ndinati ndibwere pontho, tenepo mkazako Sara anabala mwana wamamuna.” Sara akhali pamsuwo wa khumbiyo kunduli kwa Abrahamu kuvesera pikhalongwapyo." 
Genesis18:11 Abrahamu na Sara akhadakalamba pyakwanga, pontho Sara ndzidzi wache wakukhala na ana ukhadapiringana." 
Genesis18:12 Natenepo Sara adaseka mbalonga yekha ene mbati, “Ine ndamala kale, pontho mamunanga akalamba. Ayi chinchino ndinakwanisa kukomerwa napyo?”" 
Genesis18:13 Tenepo MBUYA adavunza Abrahamu mbati, “Ndi thangwi yanji Sara akhaseka mbalonga kuti, ‘Ndinakwanisadi ine kubala mwana na kukalamba kwachita ineku?’" 
Genesis18:14 Ayi pana chinthu chokhonda kwanisika na MBUYA? Ninga mwalonga ine kale kuti chaka chamangwana pandzidzi ninga uno ndinabwera pontho, tenepo mkazako anabala mwana wamamuna.”" 
Genesis18:15 Na thangwi yakuti Sara akhali na mantha adakhonda mbalonga mbati, “Sidaseka tayu.” Mbwenye MBUYA adatawira mbati, “Ande, iwe udaseka.”" 
Genesis18:16 Kubuluka penepo amuna ale adalamuka mbaenda kumbuto, kule kudakakwanisa iwo kuona Sodomu. Abrahamu adenda nawo pabodzi kuaperekera." 
Genesis18:17 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga yekha ene mbati, “Abrahamu sinambisira tayu pinafuna ine kuchita." 
Genesis18:18 Pidzukulu pyache pinakhala dzinza ikulu pontho yamphamvu. Kudzera muna iye ndinati nditsanzayise madzinza onsene. 
Genesis18:19 Ine ndamsankhula towera apangize anache na pidzukulu pyache kuti atewere njira za MBUYA pakuchita pinthu pyakuthema pontho pyakulungama. Ngakhala iwo anachita tenepo, ine, MBUYA, ndinamchitira pyonsene pidadumbira ine kuna iye.”" 
Genesis18:20 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Abrahamu mbati, “Ine ndava kulira kwa anthu anango pya kuipa kwachita mizinda ya Sodomu na Gomora, pontho kuti kudawa kwawo nkhukulu pyakwanga." 
Genesis18:21 Ine ndathema kutchitha, towera ndikaone ngakhala iwo ngakuipa pyakwanga ninga munavera ine kuliraku. Penepo ndinapidziwa ngakhala ipyo mphyakuonadi, penu tayu.”" 
Genesis18:22 Tenepo amuna awiri adalamuka mbaenda ku Sodomu, mbwenye MBUYA adasalira na Abrahamu." 
Genesis18:23 Tenepo Abrahamu adafedzera chifupi na MBUYA mbamvunza mbati, “Kadi imwe munafunadi kavunga anthu okhonda dawa kubodzi na anyakudawa?" 
Genesis18:24 Ngakhala mumzindamo muna anthu makumashanu okhonda dawa, ayi munavunga basi mzinda onsene? Ayi imwe nkhabe leka khonda kuuvunga tayu, towera kupulumusa anthu makumashanuwo?" 
Genesis18:25 Mphyakuona kuti nee munavunga anyakukhonda dawa kubodzi kwene na anyakudawa tayu. Penepyo nkhabe kwanisika! Imwe nkhabe chita tenepo. Imwe mbamudachita tenepo, anyakukhonda dawa mbamudaatchunyusira kubodzi na anyakudawa. Penepyo nkhabe kwanisika! Si pyakuthema tayu kuti mtongi wa anthu onsene achite pinthu pyakukhonda lungama.”" 
Genesis18:26 MBUYA adatawira mbati, “Ngakhala ndinagumana anthu makumashanu okhonda dawa mumzinda wa Sodomu ndinati ndiuleke khonda kuuvunga thangwi ya iwo.”" 
Genesis18:27 Abrahamu adalonga pontho mbati, “Ndaphata miyendo, ndilekerereni kuwanga kwanga mtima kuthimiza kulonga na imwe, Mbuya. Ine ndine munthu pyanga, pontho nkhabe utongi wakulonga namwe chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu." 
Genesis18:28 Apo mwinango ngakhala kunakhala anthu makumanayi na ashanu okha okhonda dawa, ayi munakavunga mzinda onsene thangwi achelewerapo anthu ashanu basi?” MBUYA adatawira mbati, “Ine nkhabe kauvunga mzinda ngakhala ndinagumanamo anthu makumanayi na ashanu okhonda dawa.”" 
Genesis18:29 Abrahamu adalonga kachitatu mbati, “Mwinango anakakhalamo anthu makumanayi okha.” MBUYA adatawira mbati, “Angakhalamo makumanayi ine nkhabe kauvanga mzindawo tayu.”" 
Genesis18:30 Abrahamu adalonga mbati, “Ndaphata miyendo, Mbuya, lekani kundizhangalira, mbwenye ndathema kuti ndilonge pontho. Apo angakhalako makumatatu okha?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ine nkhabe kauvunga tayu ngakhala ndinagumanako makumatatu.”" 
Genesis18:31 Abrahamu adalonga mbati, “Mbuya, ndaphata miyendo, ndilekerereni kuwanga kwanga mtima kuthimiza kulonga namwe. Apo mwinango nkhagumana anthu makumawiri?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ine nkhabe kauvunga tayu ngakhala ndinagumanako makumawiri.”" 
Genesis18:32 Abrahamu adalonga mbati, “Mbuya, ndaphata miyendo, lekani kundizhangalira. Ndinati ndilonge namwe kakumalisa. Ayi ngakhala munakagumanako anthu khumi okha?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ine nkhabe kauvunga tayu ngakhala ndinagumanako anthu khumi.”" 
Genesis18:33 Pidamala iye kulonga na Abrahamu, MBUYA adenda pyache, Abrahamu adabwererambo kumusa kwache." 
Genesis19:1 Pidadza angelo awiri ale ku Sodomu mawulo a nsiku yeneyo, Loti akhali khale pamsuwo wa mzindawo. Sindzidzi pidaaona iye, adalamuka mbaenda kagumanikana nawo. Iye adalamba pamaso pawo" 
Genesis19:2 mbalonga mbati, “Ambuya ine ndili pano kukutumikirani. Natenepo tendeni kumusa kwanga. Munakwanisa kutsuka manyalo anu mbamugona mosiku uno. Mangwana na machibese munakwanisa kwenda pyanu ulendo wanu.” Mbwenye iwo adatawira mbati, “Tayu, ife tinagona pyathu pachitalo cha mumzinda muno.”" 
Genesis19:3 Iye adaakhakhamiza basi. Pakumalisira pache iwo adatawira mbaenda naye kumusa kwache. Loti adaaphikira mikate yakusowa chakufufumisira, pontho adaasasanyira pyakudya alendowo, tenepo iwo adadya." 
Genesis19:4 Alendo ale mbadzati kwenda kagona, amuna a mu Sodomu adazungulira nyumba ya Loti. Amuna onsene a mumzindamo, aphale na akulu ene, akhali penepo." 
Genesis19:5 Iwo adachemera Loti mbamvunza mbati, “Amuna adadza kuno mawulo ale, ali kupi? Abuluse kunja kuno!” Amuna a mu Sodomu akhafuna kuchita nawo pyauputa." 
Genesis19:6 Loti adabuluka panja mbapifungirika kunja. 
Genesis19:7 Iye adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Anzanga, ndikukupemphani kuti muleke chita pinthu pyakudawika ninga penepi." 
Genesis19:8 Ngayang'anani, ine ndina amiyali awiri okhonda dziwa amuna. Nditawiriseni kuti ndidze nawo enewo kuna imwe, pontho muchite nawo pinafuna imwe pyonsene. Mbwenye lekani chita chinthu na chibodzi chene kuna amunawa. Iwo mbalendo m'nyumba mwangamu, tenepo ndathema kuatchinjiriza.”" 
Genesis19:9 Mbwenye iwo adalonga mbati, “Buluka uko nyakudza iwe! Ndiwe animbo kuti unakwanisa kutipanga chakuti tiphate? Buluka uko, gopa tinakuchitira chinthu chakuipa chikulu piringana chikhafuna ife chitira alendowo.” Iwo adamgwinyira Loti m'nduli mbaenda kuti aswe msuwo." 
Genesis19:10 Mbwenye amuna awiri akhali m'nyumba ale adabulusa mkono awo panja mbamkwekwetera m'nyumba Loti mbafunga msuwowo. 
Genesis19:11 Tenepo amuna awiri akhali m'nyumba ale adachitisa aphale na akulu onsene akhali panja ale kukhala maboli-boli, towera akhonde ona msuwo wa nyumba ile." 
Genesis19:12 Amuna awiri ale adalonga kuna Loti mbati, “Ngakhala una anthu anango pano; ana achimuna, ana achikazi, akamwini, penu abale anango ambakhala na iwe mumzinda muno, uapange kuti mubuluke muno." 
Genesis19:13 Thangwi tinafuna kuvunga mbuto ino. MBUYA ava kulira kwa anthu anango pya kuipa kwachita anthu enewa, tenepo atituma kuti tivunge Sodomu.”" 
Genesis19:14 Natenepo Loti adenda kuna amuna akhafuna kusemba anache ale mbaapanga mbati, “Chimbizani mubuluke muno; MBUYA anafuna kuvunga mbuto ino.” Mbwenye iwo akhanyerezera kuti Loti akhalonga msobwe." 
Genesis19:15 M'makalakwecha angelo ale adayesa-yesa kumchitisa Loti kuchimbiza. Iwo adalonga kuna Loti mbati, “Chimbiza, kwata mkazako na anako achikazi awiriwo mubuluke, towera muleke taya moyo wanu, mzindawu ungavungwa.”" 
Genesis19:16 Loti akhachita nthontho, kwache MBUYA adava naye nsisi. Natenepo amuna awiri ale adaphata pamkono Loti, mkazache na anache awiri mbaaperekera kubuluka mumzinda mule." 
Genesis19:17 Tenepo mbodzi mwa angelo ale adalonga mbati, “Thawani, mupulumuse moyo wanu! Nkhabe yang'ana m'nduli, pontho nkhabe imira paphedi tayu. Thawirani kumapiriko, towera muleke phiwa.”" 
Genesis19:18 Mbwenye Loti adatawira mbati, “Ambuya ndaphata miyendo, lekani kutichita tenepo." 
Genesis19:19 Imwe mwandichitira kale pyadidi, pontho mwapulumusa moyo wanga. Mbwenye kumapiri kwalonga imweko kwalapha pyakwanga; chakuvungacho chinati chindigumane, tenepo ndinati ndife ndidzati fika kweneko." 
Genesis19:20 Ngayang'anani, apa pana luwani chifupiletu kuti ndinakwanisa kuthawira kweneko, pontho njing'ono. Nditawiriseni kuti ndithawire pyanga kweneko. Luwaniyo njing'ono pyakwanga, si tenepo tayu? Tenepo moyo wanga unapulumuka.”" 
Genesis19:21 Iye adatawira mbati, “Ande, ndatawira. Ine sinaivunga tayu luwani yeneyo." 
Genesis19:22 Chimbiza! Thamanga, thangwi ine nkhabe chita chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu iwe mbudzati fika kweneko.” Luwani ile idathulwa Zoari." 
Genesis19:23 Pikhafika Loti mu Zoari dzuwa ikhadabuluka kale. 
Genesis19:24 Tenepo MBUYA adagwisa miyala ya moto ya sulufule kubulukira kudzulu pana Sodomu na Gomora 
Genesis19:25 mbavunga phedi yonsene pabodzi pene na anthu onsene, pontho na pinthu pyonsene pyakumera." 
Genesis19:26 Mbwenye mkazi Loti adayang'ana m'nduli mbasanduka chulu cha munyu. 
Genesis19:27 Bzobzo mangwana mwache Abrahamu adachimbiza kwenda pambuto ile ikhadaimira iye pamaso pa MBUYA. 
Genesis19:28 Iye adayang'ana pana Sodomu na Gomora, pontho na phedi yonsene mbaona utsi okhokha tolo-tolo m'dzikomo ninga dzenje yakunyungulusiramo utale." 
Genesis19:29 Natenepo pidavunga Mulungu mizinda ya phedi, kule kukhakhala Loti, adamkumbuka Abrahamu, pontho adapulumusa Loti kuti aleke vungika." 
Genesis19:30 Na thangwi yakuti Loti akhali na mantha kuti akhale mu Zoari, iye pabodzi na anache achikazi awiri ale adafedzera kumapiri mbakakhala m'nkhwimba." 
Genesis19:31 Mwanache wamkazi wautombo ule adalonga kuna mphwache mbati, “Babathuyi akwenda mbakalamba, pontho nkhabe mamuna na mbodzi ene m'dziko yonseneyi wakuti anakwanisa kutisemba, towera tibale ana." 
Genesis19:32 Tendeni timuledzerese babathuyi, towera angaledzera ife tikwanise kugona naye towera tiinjipise dzinzathuyi kudzera muna babathu.”" 
Genesis19:33 Mosiku wenewo iwo adampasa vinyu babawo kuti amwe. Tenepo wautombo ule adagona naye. Mbwenye Lotiyo akhadaledzera pyakwanga mwakuti hakhadziwa pikhachitikapyo tayu. 
Genesis19:34 Mangwana mwache mwana wautombo ule adalonga kuna mphwache mbati, “Ndagona naye baba dzulo; tenepo tende timuledzerese pontho mosiku uno kuti iwe ugone nayembo. Natenepo tonsene tinabala ana na babathuyi.”" 
Genesis19:35 Natenepo mosiku wenewo iwo adamwesa pontho babawoyo, tenepo wamng'onoyi adagona nayembo babawoyo. Ndzidzi wenewo pontho iye akhadaledzera pyakwanga mwakuti hakhadziwa pikhachitikapyo tayu." 
Genesis19:36 Na njira yeneyi ana achikazi onsene adakwata mimba na babawo. 
Genesis19:37 Mtombo ule adabala mwana wamamuna dzinache Moabu. Iye akhali kholo ya anthu ambachemerwa Amoabu lerowa. 
Genesis19:38 Mng'onomboyi adabala mwana wamamuna dzinache Benami. Iye akhali kholo ya anthu ambachemerwa Aamoni lerowa. 
Genesis20:1 Abrahamu adabuluka ku Mamure mbaenda kuthando yatchetcha ya Negebu mbakakhala pakati pa Kadeshi na Shuri. Ndzidzi pang'ono Abrahamu adakhala mumzinda wa Gerari. 
Genesis20:2 Kweneko iye adalonga kuti Sara mkazache akhali nyamaingache. Tenepo Mfumu Abimeleki wa ku Gerari adachemeresa Sara mbaenda naye kunyumba kwache. 
Genesis20:3 Mosiku unango Mulungu adaonekera Abimeleki kundoto mbalonga mbati, “Iwe unati ufe thangwi wakwata mkazi weneyu; mkaziyu ngwakusembwa kale.”" 
Genesis20:4 Mbwenye Abimeleki hakhadadzati gona naye mkazi ule tayu. Tenepo iye adalonga mbati, “Mbuya, ine sidadawe tayu. Kadi imwe munandivunga pabodzi na anthu anga?" 
Genesis20:5 Abrahamu yekha ene adalonga kuti mkaziyu akhali nyamaingache, mkazi adalongambo chibodzi-bodzi. Ine ndachita penepi na mtima wakusowa chakupokonyisa, pontho manjanga hadadawe tayu.”" 
Genesis20:6 Mulungu adatawira kundoto mbati, “Ande, ndadziwa kuti iwe udachita penepyo na mtima wakusowa chakuupokanya, natenepo ine ndakukhondesa kuti uleke kundidawira. Ndi thangwi yache ine sidakutawirise tayu kukhuya mkaziyo." 
Genesis20:7 Mbwenye chinchino pano bwezera mkaziyu kuna mamunache. Iye ndi mprofeti, pontho iye anati akupempherere, towera uleke kufa. Mbwenye ungakhonda kwene kumbwezera kuna mamunache, ndikukupangadi kuti unati ufe, iwe na anthu ako onsene.”" 
Genesis20:8 Bzobzo mangwana mwache Abimeleki adachemeresa mathubu ache onsene mbaapanga pikhadachitika pile. Tenepo pidapiva iwo, adagoswerwa pyakwanga." 
Genesis20:9 Kubuluka penepo Abimeleki adachemeresa Abrahamu mbamvunza mbati, “Chachita iwe kuna ifechi ninji? Chakudawira ine ninji kuti udzese nyatwa ikuluyi pana ine na pana ufumu wanga onsene. Nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene athema kuchita chinthu ninga chachita iwechi." 
Genesis20:10 Thangwi yache ninji udachita penepi?” 
Genesis20:11 Abrahamu adatawira mbati, “Ine ndikhanyerezera kuti kuno nkhabe na mbodzi ene wakugopambo Mulungu, pontho kuti iwo mbadandipha kuti akwate mkazangayi." 
Genesis20:12 Mbwenye khundu inangoyi mkaziyu ndi nyamaingangadi. Iye ndi mwana babanga, kwache tasiyana amama; tenepo ine ndidamsemba." 
Genesis20:13 Natenepo pidandigwinya Mulungu kubuluka kunyumba ya babanga kwenda madziko a enechiro ndidampanga kuti, ‘Iwe unakwanisa kuonesa kukhulupirika kwako kuna ine konsene kunaenda ife pakulonga kuti ine ndine nkhoswe yako.’ ”" 
Genesis20:14 Tenepo Abimeleki adabwezera Sara ule kuna Abrahamu, pontho na ndzidzi onthowo Abimeleki adapereka mabira, ng'ombe na mabitchu achimuna na achikazi ene kuna Abrahamu." 
Genesis20:15 Abimeleki adalonga kuna Abrahamu mbati, “Dziko yanga yonsene ukuiona, tenepo khala ponsene panafuna iwepo.”" 
Genesis20:16 Kuna Sara adalonga mbati, “Ndikupereka kuna nkhoswe yako kobiri chikwi chibodzi zasiliva kutsikimizira kuna anthu onsene ana iwewa kuti iwe hudadawe tayu; munthu onsene anadziwa kuti iwe hudachite chinthu chakudawika tayu.”" 
Genesis20:17 Tenepo Abrahamu adapemphera kuna Mulungu, Mulungu adawangisambo Abimeleki, mkazache na mabitchu ache achikazi kuti akwanise kubala pontho ana," 
Genesis20:18 thangwi MBUYA akhadafunga nthumbo ya akazi onsene a m'nyumba ya Abimeleki, thangwi ya pikhadachitika kuna Sara mkazi Abrahamu." 
Genesis21:1 MBUYA adamtsanzayisa Sara ninga mukhadadumbira iye. 
Genesis21:2 Tenepo adakwata mimba mbabalira Abrahamu mwana wamamuna uku akalamba kale. Mwanayo adabalwa pandzidzi onthowo ukhadalonga Mulungu kuti anabalwa. 
Genesis21:3 Abrahamu mwanayo adamthula Isake. 
Genesis21:4 Pikhali Isake nsiku zisere zakubalwa, Abrahamu adamgwanda nsonga yachimuna ninga mukhadampangira Mulungu." 
Genesis21:5 Mukhabalwa Isake Abrahamu akhali pyaka dzana pyakubalwa. 
Genesis21:6 Sara adalonga mbati, “Mulungu andichitisa kukomerwa na kusekera. Onsene anavawo anasekera nane pabodzi.”" 
Genesis21:7 Tenepo iye adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Mbani mbadakwanisa kulonga kuna Abrahamu kuti Sara anayamwisa mwana? Kwache ndambalira mwana wamamuna uku akalamba kale.”" 
Genesis21:8 Mwana ule adakula mbamulekesa bele. Tenepo pansiku ikhalekeswa Isake kuyamwa Abrahamu adasasanya phwando ikulu. 
Genesis21:9 Mbwenye Sara adaona mwana wamamuna wa Hagara, munthu wa ku Iguputo adabalira Abrahamu mwana ule, kuti akhasingirira Isake," 
Genesis21:10 natenepo iye adalonga kuna Abrahamu mbati, “Mbuluse bitchu wa mkaziyo na mwanache ene, thangwi mwana bitchu hadatheme kukwata khundu pamfumako inafuna iwe kusiyira mwananga Isake tayu.”" 
Genesis21:11 Penepi pidamsanya mtima Abrahamu pyakwanga thangwi Ishimaele akhalimbo mwanache. 
Genesis21:12 Mbwenye Mulungu adalonga kuna Abrahamu mbati, “Leka swipa mtima na mwana, pontho na bitchu wamkaziyo. Chita pyonsene pinakupanga Sara, thangwi kudzera muna Isake iwe unakhala na pidzukulu ninga mudadumbira ine kale mule." 
Genesis21:13 Ndinapereka pontho ana azinji kuna mwana wa bitchuyi, towera iwo akhale dzinza ikulu. Iye ndi mwanako pontho.”" 
Genesis21:14 Bzobzo mangwana mwache Abrahamu adapereka phoso na dudu ya madzi kuna Hagara. Iye adathukula mwanayo mbamuikha kunduli kwa Hagara mbaagwinya. Mkazi ule adabuluka mbatsalakatika m'thando yatchetcha ya Beeresheba. 
Genesis21:15 Pidamala madzi m'dudu mule, iye adamuleka pyache mwana pansi pa thenthere," 
Genesis21:16 mbakakhala pansi patsogolo mathanyo dzana ibodzi. Iye adalonga yekha ene mbati, “Ine nkhabe kwanisa kuona mwananga akufa.” Uku ali khale penepo mkaziyo adatoma kulira." 
Genesis21:17 Mulungu adava kulira kwa mwana ule. Tenepo kubulukira kudzulu mngelo wa Mulungu adalonga mbati, “Hagara chinaswipa na iwe mtima ninji? Leka gopa! Mulungu ava kulira kwa mwanayo padamgonesa iwe pale." 
Genesis21:18 Lamuka ukamthukule kummatamisa. Ine ndinasasanya dzinza ikulu kubulukira muna pidzukulu pyache.” 
Genesis21:19 Tenepo Mulungu adafungula maso a Hagara mbaona mchera. Iye adenda penepo mbadzaza dudu yache mbakaperekambo anango kuna mwanache. 
Genesis21:20 Mulungu akhali na mwanayo pikhakula iye. Iye adakhala m'thando yatchetcha ya Parani mbasanduka nyaluso pakupha nyama. 
Genesis21:21 Mache adamgumanira mkazi wa ku Iguputo. 
Genesis21:22 Pandzidzi wenewu Abimeleki na Fikolo, mkadamu wa anyankhondo ache, adenda kuna Abrahamu mbalonga mbati, “Pyonsene pinaphata imwe Mulungu ali namwe." 
Genesis21:23 Tenepo chinchino dumbirani pamaso pa Mulungu kuti ine, ananga na pidzukulu pyanga nee munatinyengeza tayu. Pontho onesani udidi kuna ine na kuna dziko inakhala imwe ninga mlendoyi ninga udidi udakuonesa ine.”" 
Genesis21:24 Abrahamu adalonga mbati, “Ndinadumbira.”" 
Genesis21:25 Abrahamu adadungunya kuna Abimeleki pya mchera ukhadakwata anyabasa a Abimeleki ule. 
Genesis21:26 Mbwenye Abimeleki adalonga mbati, “Munthu adachita penepi sinamdziwa tayu. Iwe hudandipange tayu. Ine ndikupiva kwene lero.”"
