Genesis21:27 Tenepo Abrahamu adapereka mabira na ng'ombe kuna Abimeleki natenepo anthu awiriwa adachita chiverano. 
Genesis21:28 Abrahamu adapambula anabira achikazi anomwe kubulukira pa mkumbi pache. 
Genesis21:29 Abimeleki adamvunza mbati, “Unachitiranji tenepo?”" 
Genesis21:30 Abrahamu adatawira mbati, “Tambira anabira anomwewa. Ungachita tenepo, ndiye kuti watawira kuti adakumba m'cherawu ndine pano.”" 
Genesis21:31 Natenepo mbutoyo idachemerwa Beeresheba, thangwi kudumbirisana kwa anthu awiri ale kudachitikira penepo." 
Genesis21:32 Pidamala iwo chita chiverano chawo pa Beeresheba, Abimeleki na Fikolo adabwerera ku dziko ya Afilisti." 
Genesis21:33 Tenepo Abrahamu adabzala muti wabwemba mu Beeresheba mbapembedza MBUYA Mulungu Wakukhala na kukhala. 
Genesis21:34 Abrahamu adakhala m'dziko ya Afilisti ndzidzi ukulu ene. 
Genesis22:1 Kubuluka penepo nsiku inango Mulungu adamuyesa Abrahamu. Iye adamchemera mbati, “Abrahamu!” Abrahamu adatawirambo mbati, “Ndili pano.”" 
Genesis22:2 Penepo Mulungu adalonga mbati, “Kwata Isake mwanako mbodzi ene wapamtima pakoyo mbuende kudziko ya Moria. Kweneko paphiri inafuna ine kakuonesa ukampereke nsembe mwanayo kuna ine.”" 
Genesis22:3 Bzobzo mangwana mwache Abrahamu adapandula nkhuni zakukwana kuotchera nsembe mbazipakiza pabulu wache mbakwata Isake na anyabasache awiri kwenda nawo. Iwo adautoma ulendo wakwenda kumbuto kukhadampanga Mulungu kule. 
Genesis22:4 Pansiku yachitatu Abrahamu adaiona mbuto ile na pakansinzo. 
Genesis22:5 Tenepo iye adalonga kuna anyabasache mbati, “Imwe banga khalani pano na buluyi. Mphaleyu na ine tinaenda uko kapembedza Mulungu. Tenepo tingamala tinati tibwerere kuna imwe kuno.”" 
Genesis22:6 Abrahamu adathukulisa mwanache Isake nkhuni zakuotchera nsembe zile. Iye ene mwenechiro adathukula mpeni na moto. Pikhafamba iwo uwiriawo panjira," 
Genesis22:7 Isake adalonga mbati, “Baba!” Abrahamu adatawira mbati, “Ndawo, mwananga?” Isake adavunza mbati, “Nkhuni na moto takwata, apo mwanabira wakuti tikampereke nsembe ali kupi?”" 
Genesis22:8 Abrahamu adamtawira mbati, “Mulungu mwenechiroache anati apereke mwanabira wakuti timpereke nsembe.” Tenepo uwiriawo adathimiza kufamba pabodzi." 
Genesis22:9 Pidafika iwo kumbuto ikhadampanga Mulungu ile, Abrahamu adamanga guwa mbasanjikapo nkhuni. Iye adamanga mwanache mbamgonesa pankhuni paguwa ile." 
Genesis22:10 Tenepo Abrahamu adafuthula dzanjache mbakwata mpeni kuti aphe mwanache Isake. 
Genesis22:11 Mbwenye mngelo wa MBUYA adachemera Abrahamu kubulukira kudzulu mbati, “Abrahamu, Abrahamu!” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ndili pano.”" 
Genesis22:12 Mngelo adalonga mbati, “Leka kumkuwaza mwana, penu kuchita chinthu na chibodzi chene kuna iye. Chinchino ndapidziwa kuti iwe umbagopa Mulungu, thangwi hudandikhondese mwanako, mwanako mbodzi eneyo tayu.”" 
Genesis22:13 Abrahamu adamwaza maso mbaona bira wamamuna akoloweka nyanga m'thundudzi. Iye adenda kweneko mbakamkwata birayo mbampereka nsembe yakupyerera m'mbuto mwa mwanache. 
Genesis22:14 Abrahamu adaithula mbuto ile kuti, “MBUYA Ambapasa.” Podi na lero ene mbuto yeneyi anthu ambailonga kuti, “Paphiri ya MBUYA, iye ambapasa.”" 
Genesis22:15 Mngelo wa MBUYA adachemera Abrahamu kubulukira kudzulu kachiwiri kache mbati," 
Genesis22:16 “MBUYA alonga kuti, ‘Ine ndinadumbira na dzinanga kuti thangwi ya pinthu pyachita iwepi, kuleka kundikhondesa mwanako, mwanako mbodzi ene basi," 
Genesis22:17 ine ndinati ndikutsanzayise, pontho ndinainjipisa pidzukulu pyako ninga nyenyenzi za kuthambo pontho ninga tchetcha ya pagombe ya bara. Pidzukulu pyako pinati pipokosere mizinda ya anyamalwawo." 
Genesis22:18 Pontho kudzera muna chidzukulu chako madzinza onsene padziko yapansi anatsanzayiswa, thangwi iwe wandivera.’ ”" 
Genesis22:19 Kubuluka penepo Abrahamu adabwerera kuna anyabasache ale mbakwatana nawo pabodzi ulendo wa ku Beeresheba, kukhakhala iye kule." 
Genesis22:20 Mdembu-dembu Abrahamu adadziwa kuti Milika akhadabala ana asere kubalira mbaleache, Nahori:" 
Genesis22:21 Uzi mwana wautombo, Buzi mphwache, Kemuele (Babawo Aramu," 
Genesis22:22 Kesedi, Hazo, Pilidashi, Jidilafi na Betuele)." 
Genesis22:23 Betuele akhali babache Rebeka. Milika adabalira Nahori, mbaleache Abrahamu, ana aserewa." 
Genesis22:24 Reuma, mkazi wachibitchu wa Nahori, adabala Teba, Gahamu, Tahashi na Maaka." 
Genesis23:1 Sara adakhala na moyo pyaka dzana na makumawiri na pinomwe. 
Genesis23:2 Iye adafera ku Kiriati-Ariba (kweneku nkhu Hebroni) m'dziko ya Kanani, kweneko Abrahamu adamusintili mkazache ule." 
Genesis23:3 Tenepo Abrahamu adalamuka pambuto pakhadagona mtembo wa mkazache pale mbaenda kuna anthu akuthulwa Ahiti mbalonga kuna iwo mbati," 
Genesis23:4 “Ine ndine mlendo pakati panu; ndigulisirenimbo mbuto kuti ikhale masiye, towera ndiikhemo mkazanga.”" 
Genesis23:5 Iwo adatawira mbati," 
Genesis23:6 “Ngativeserenimbo ife, Mbuyathu, imwe ndimwe mfumu wamphamvu pakati pathupa; kamuikheni mkazanu m'masiye adidiletu ana ifewa. Nkhabe mbodzi wa ife anakhonda nawo masiye kuti imwe muikhe mkazanu.”" 
Genesis23:7 Tenepo Abrahamu adalamba pamaso pawo 
Genesis23:8 mbalonga mbati, “Ngakhala imwe munapifuna kunditawirisa kuti ndiikhe mkazanga kuno, ndipempherenimbo Eferoni, mwana Zohari kuti" 
Genesis23:9 andigulise nkhwimbache ya Makipela ile ili chifupi na nkhomole ya mundache. Pemphani kuti ndigule naye pa kontache chadi-chadi pano pamaso pa imwe monsene, towera mbuto yeneyi ikhale yanga ene yakuikhiramo anyakufa.”" 
Genesis23:10 Iye ene Eferoni, Mhiti, akhakhala pansi pabodzi na Ahiti anzache kumbuto yakugumanyikira pamsuwo wa mzinda. Tenepo iye adamtawira Abrahamu pamaso pa onsenewo" 
Genesis23:11 mbati, “Nkhabe, mbuyanga, ndiveserenimbo; ine ndikukupasani munda onsene na nkhwimba ene ili mwenemoyo. Ine ndikukupasani pyonsene pene pamaso pa anthu anga. Kaikheni mkazanu.”" 
Genesis23:12 Abrahamu adalamba pontho pamaso pa anthu ale 
Genesis23:13 mbalonga mbati, “Ndaphata miyendo, ngandiveserenimbo kuno. Ine ndinati ndiupagali, towera ndikaikhe mkazanga kweneko.”" 
Genesis23:14 Eferoni adatawira mbati," 
Genesis23:15 “Mbuyanga, mbuto yathema kupagalwi kobiri zasiliva madzana manayi basi. Ayi penepyo ninji pakati pathu? Ndokoni mukaikhe mkazanu.”" 
Genesis23:16 Abrahamu adatawirizana napyo mbamulengesera kobiri idalonga Eferoni pamaso pa Ahiti anzache onsene: kobiri zasiliva madzana manayi malingana na konta ikhaphatiswa basa na anyamalonda. 
Genesis23:17 Natenepo munda wa Eferoni mu Makipela chifupi na Mamure, munda pabodzi pene na nkhwimba ikhali mwenemoyo, pontho na miti yonsene m'madire a mundawo pidaperekwa" 
Genesis23:18 kuna Abrahamu kukhala pyache pene pamaso pa Ahiti onsene akhadadza kumsuwo wa mzinda ule. 
Genesis23:19 Pidamala Penepyo Abrahamu adamuikha Sara mkazache m'nkhwimba m'munda wa Makipela chifupi na Mamure (kweneku nkhu Hebroni) m'dziko ya Kanani. 
Genesis23:20 Natenepo munda pabodzi pene na nkhwimba pikhali pya Ahiti pile pidasanduka mbuto ya Abrahamu yakuikhamo anyakufa. 
Genesis24:1 Abrahamu ndzidzi wenewu akhadakulupala pyakwanga. Pontho MBUYA akhadamtsanzayisa papinthu pyonsene pikhaphata iye. 
Genesis24:2 Iye adalonga kuna nyabasache wamkulu, ule akhali mkadamu wa pinthu pyonsene pikhali na Abrahamu mbati, “Ikha dzanjako pantchafu pangapa kudumbira." 
Genesis24:3 Ndikufuna udumbire na dzina ya MBUYA, Mulungu wa kudzulu pontho na pansi pano, kuti iwe hunasembera mwananga ana akazi a ku Kanani, anthu anakhala ine pakati pawo ale tayu," 
Genesis24:4 mbwenye kuti unaenda kudziko ya kwathu, kuna abale anga mbukakwata mkazi kweneko kuti akhale mkazache mwananga Isake.”" 
Genesis24:5 Mbwenye nyabasa ule adavunza Abrahamu mbati, “Apo ngakhala mkaziyo hanafuna tayu pyakudza kudziko kuno pabodzi na ine, ayi ndimkwate mwananu kwenda naye kudziko kudabulukira imweko?”" 
Genesis24:6 Abrahamu adatawira mbati, “Onenesa kuti mwananga uleke bwerera naye kweneko." 
Genesis24:7 MBUYA, Mulungu Wakudzulu, ule adandibulusa pamsuwo wa babanga na m'dziko ya abale anga, pontho ule adandipanga mbadumbira kuna ine kuti anapereka dzikoyi kuna pidzukulu pyanga, iye anatuma mngelo wache patsogolo pako towera iwe ukwanise kagumana mkazi kweneko wakuti mwananga asembe." 
Genesis24:8 Ngakhala mkaziyo hanafuna tayu kudza nawe pabodzi kuno, penepo iwe unakhala wakusudzuka kuna kudumbira kudachita iwe. Mbwenye podi pitani kwene, iwe leka kwata mwananga kubwerera naye kweneko.”" 
Genesis24:9 Tenepo nyabasa ule adakwata manjache mbaikha pantchafu ya mbuyache Abrahamu mbadumbira kuna Abrahamu pya papinthu penepi. 
Genesis24:10 Tenepo nyabasa ule adakwata nyama za ngamila khumi za mbuyache mbalamuka kwenda. Iye adakwata pontho mitukwa yadidiletu yamtundu na mtundu kubulukira kuna mbuyache. Iye adenda kumzinda kule kukhakhala Nahori kumpoto kwa dziko ya Mesopotamia. 
Genesis24:11 Pidafika iye adachitisa ngamila kugodama pamchera kunja kwa mzinda. Dzuwa ikhadapendamiratu, ndzidzi ukhabwera akazi katunga madzi." 
Genesis24:12 Iye adapemphera mbati, “MBUYA, Mulungu wa mbuyanga Abrahamu, ndichitiseni kupikwanisa lero, pontho onesani kumfuna kwanu kokhonda mala mbuyanga Abrahamu." 
Genesis24:13 Ine ndili pamchera pano pale pakuti atsikana a mumzindamu anati adze dzatungapo madzi. 
Genesis24:14 Ine ndinati ndilonge kuna mbodzi wa iwo kuti, ‘Ine ndaphata miyendo, tereza mulinga yako kuti ine ndimwembo.’ Ngakhala iye analonga kuti, ‘Mwani pontho ngamila zanu ndinazitungira madzi,’ weneyo akhale iye ene, ule asankhulira imwe kuti akhale mkazi nyabasanu Isake. Pingachitikadi tenepo, ndinadziwadi kuti imwe mwaonesa kumfuna kwanu kokhonda mala mbuyanga.”" 
Genesis24:15 Iye mbadzati malisa kupemphera, Rebeka adafika na mulinga yache ili paphewa. Iye akhali mwana wamkazi wa Betuele, mwana wamamuna wa Milika, ule akhali mkazi Nahori, mbaleache Abrahamu." 
Genesis24:16 Mtsikana akhali mwali wakubalika pyakwanga, pontho okhonda dziwa mamuna. Iye adatchithira kumchera kule, mbadzaza mulinga yache mbawambuka." 
Genesis24:17 Nyabasa ule adathamanga kagumanikana naye mbalonga kuna mtsikanayo mbati, “Ndipasenimbo madzi akumwa pang'ono kubulukira m'mulinga mwanumo.”" 
Genesis24:18 Mtsikana adachimbiza kutereza mulinga yache mbaiphatira m'manja mbalonga mbati, “Mwani, mbuyanga.”" 
Genesis24:19 Pidamala iye kumwa, mtsikana ule adalonga mbati, “Ndinati nditunge pontho madzi anango akumwesa ngamila zanu mpakana zonsene zimale kumwa.”" 
Genesis24:20 Natenepo adachimbiza kukhuthula madzi ale mu chakumwera pifuyo mbathamanga kumchera kule katunga madzi azinji kufikirana ngamila zonsene zidamala kumwa. 
Genesis24:21 Mwakukhonda longa chinthu na chibodzi chene nyabasa ule adayang'anisisa mtsikana ule kufuna kudziwa ngakhala ndimomwenedi penu tayu kuti MBUYA achitisa ulendo wache kukhala wakukwanisika. 
Genesis24:22 Pidamala iye mwesa ngamila zile, munthu ule adakwata nthona yakudula pyakwanga ya golidi mbaikha pamphuno ya mtsikana ule mbaikha pontho magoza mawiri agolidi mumkono mwache." 
Genesis24:23 Tenepo mamuna ule adavunza mbati, “Iwe ndiwe mwana ani? Ndaphata miyendo ngatipange, ayi ilipo mbuto m'nyumba ya babako yakuti ife tinakwanisa kugonamo mosiku uno?”" 
Genesis24:24 Iye adatawira mbati, “Ine ndine mwana Betuele, ule adabalwa na Milika, pontho Nahori.”" 
Genesis24:25 Iye adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Ife tili nawo maudzu mazinji a pifuyo, pontho mbuto tili nayo yakuti imwe munakwanisa kugonamo.”" 
Genesis24:26 Tenepo munthu ule adalamba mbalemedza MBUYA. 
Genesis24:27 Iye adalonga mbati, “Mbakuzwe MBUYA, Mulungu wa mbuyanga Abrahamu, ule akhulupirika pakumuonesa mbuyanga kumfuna kwache kokhonda mala. MBUYA anditsogolera kufikiratu kuna nyumba ya abale ache mbuyanga.”" 
Genesis24:28 Mtsikana ule adathamanga kunyumba ya mache mbakalonga pyonsene pile. 
Genesis24:29 Tenepo Rebeka akhali na nkhoswe yache dzinache Labani, tenepo iye adabuluka panja mbathamangira kumchera kukhali nyabasa wa Abrahamu kule." 
Genesis24:30 Sindzidzi pidaona Labani mphete pamphuno ya nyamaingache na magoza munkono mwache, pontho kuva pidalonga mamuna ule kuna Rebeka, adenda kuna iye mbagumana aimira chifupi na ngamila pamcherapo." 
Genesis24:31 Iye adalonga kuna munthuyo mbati, “Dzani kuno imwe munthu wakutsanzayiswa na MBUYA. Mwatani munaimira panja pano? Ine ndasasanya kale nyumba na mbuto ya ngamila zanu.”" 
Genesis24:32 Natenepo munthu ule adapita m'nyumba, mbwenye Labani adatchithisa mitolo ikhadathukula ngamila mbazipasa maudzu kuti zidye. Tenepo Labani adakwata pontho madzi mbapereka kuna mamuna ule na anthu ache kuti atsuke manyalo awo." 
Genesis24:33 Pidadza pyakudya pamaso pawo, mamuna ule adalonga mbati, “Ine nee ndinadyabi mpakana ndilonge chadzera ine kuno.” Labani adatawira mbati, “Ngatipangenitu.”" 
Genesis24:34 Natenepo mamuna ule adalonga mbati, “Ine ndine nyabasache Abrahamu." 
Genesis24:35 MBUYA atsanzayisa mbuyanga pikulu pene, pontho adamchitisa kukhala nyakufuma. Iye ampasa mabira, ng'ombe, siliva na golidi, anyabasa achikazi na achimuna ene, mabulu na ngamila zene." 
Genesis24:36 Sara, mkazi mbuyanga, mbali nkhalamba kale adambalira mwana wamamuna, pontho adapereka kuna mwanayo pyonsene pina iye." 
Genesis24:37 Pontho mbuyanga adandidumbirisa kumvera mbalonga kuti, ‘Leka kumsembera mwanangayi mkazi wa muno mu Kanani, m'dziko munakhala ine muno." 
Genesis24:38 Mbwenye ndoko kunyumba ya babanga na kuna abale anga ukakwate mkazi wakuti mwananga asembe.’ 
Genesis24:39 Tenepo ndidamvunza mbuyanga kuti, ‘Apo ngakhala mkaziyo anakakhonda kudza nane pabodzi kuno?’" 
Genesis24:40 Iye adatawira kuti, ‘MBUYA ule ambavera ine nsiku na nsiku anati atume mngelo wache kuti aende nawe pabodzi, pontho anachitisa ulendo wako kukhala wakukwanisika, towera iwe ukamkwate mkazi kubulukira kuna abale anga na banjanga mbudza naye kuno kuti mwananga amsembe." 
Genesis24:41 Tenepo iwe unasudzulwa kuna kudumbira kudachita iwe. Mbwenye iwe ungaenda kuna abale anga, podi akhonde naye kwene pyawo mwanamkaziyo, iwe unasudzulwa basi kuna kudumbira kudachita iwe kule.’" 
Genesis24:42 “Lero pidadza ine kumcheraku, ndidapemphera kuti, ‘MBUYA, Mulungu wa mbuyanga Abrahamu, ndaphata miyendo, ngakhala imwe munapifuna chitisani ulendo wanga wadzera ine kuno kukwanisika." 
Genesis24:43 Yang'anani, ine ndikuimira pano chifupi na mcherawu, ngakhala mtsikana anadza dzatunga madzi, ine ndinampanga kuti andipasembo madzi akumwa kubulukira m'mulinga mwache." 
Genesis24:44 Penepo iye angatawira kundipasa madzi, pontho kumwesa ngamila, weneyo ene akhale asankhula MBUYA kuti akhale mkazi wa mwana mbuyanga ule.’" 
Genesis24:45 Ine mbandidzati malisa kupemphera chamumtima, Rebeka adadza na mulinga yache paphewa. Iye adatchithira kumchera mbatunga madzi. Tenepo ine ndidalonga kuna iye kuti, ‘Ndaphata miyendo, ndipasenimbo madzi ndimwe.’" 
Genesis24:46 Msanga-msanga iye adatereza mulinga yache mbandipanga kuti, ‘Mwani, pontho ngamila zanu ndinazitungira madzi kuti zimwembo.’ Natenepo ine ndidamwa, tenepo iye adamwesa pontho ngamila zanga." 
Genesis24:47 Ine ndidamvunza kuti, ‘Ndiwe mwana ani?’ Iye adatawira kuti, ‘Ndine mwana Betuele, ule ndi mwana Nahori na Milika.’ Tenepo ine ndidaikha nthona pamphuno pache na magoza mumkono mwache." 
Genesis24:48 Penepo ine ndidalamba kupembedza MBUYA. Ine ndidamkuza MBUYA, Mulungu wa mbuyanga Abrahamu, ule adanditsogolera njira yadidi kuti ndikwate mdzukuluache mwana mbaleache mbuyanga Abrahamu kuti Isake mwanache akamsembe." 
Genesis24:49 Chinchino ngakhala imwe munakomera mtima na kukhulupirika kuna mbuyanga, ndipangeni, ngakhala tayu, ndipangeni basi, towera ndidziwe chakuchita.”" 
Genesis24:50 Labani na Betuele adatawira mbati, “Podi ipi mphyakubulukira kuna MBUYA; ife nkhabe chakuti tikupangeni pontho tayu." 
Genesis24:51 Rebeka ngweneyu ali pano; mkwateni muende naye pontho mbakakhale mkazi mwana mbuyako ninga mudalongera MBUYA.” 
Genesis24:52 Pidava nyabasa wa Abrahamu pidalonga anthu pile, adalamba pamaso pa MBUYA." 
Genesis24:53 Kubuluka penepo nyabasa ule adabulusa pyakuthemesera pyagolidi na pyasiliva, pontho na nguwo mbazipereka kuna Rebeka. Iye adapereka pontho mitukwa yakudula kuna nkhoswe yache na kuna mache." 
Genesis24:54 Tenepo iye pabodzi na anthu onsene akhali na iye penepo adadya na kumwa kwene mbagona konthoko. Mangwana mwache na machibese pidalamuka iwo iye adalonga mbati, “Nditawiriseni kuti ndibwerere kuna mbuyanga.”" 
Genesis24:55 Mbwenye nkhoswe yache na mache Rebeka adalonga mbati, “Mulekeni mtsikanayi kuti tikhale naye kuno dimingu ibodzi penu nsiku khumi. Angamala penepo anakwanisa kwenda pyache.”" 
Genesis24:56 Mbwenye nyabasa ule adalonga mbati, “Lekani kutikhazika. MBUYA achitisa ulendo wathu kukhala wakukwanisika; ndilekeni ndibwerere kuna mbuyanga.”" 
Genesis24:57 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Tendeni timchemere mtsikanayo kuti tive chinafuna iye kulonga.”" 
Genesis24:58 Natenepo iwo adamchemera Rebeka mbamvunza mbati, “Ayi unafuna pyakwenda pabodzi na munthuyi?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ande.”" 
Genesis24:59 Natenepo adamuleka Rebeka pabodzi na bitchu wamkazi ule akhali makayayache kwenda pabodzi na nyabasa wa Abrahamu, pontho na amuna akhali na iye ale." 
Genesis24:60 Tenepo iwo adalonga mafalawo akutsanzayisa nawo Rebeka mbati, “Nyamaingathu, Mulungu akuchitise kukhala mama wa anthu pikwi-pikwi! Pidzukulu pyako mbapikunde mizinda ya anyamalwawo.”" 
Genesis24:61 Tenepo Rebeka na anyabasache achikazi adasasanyika mbapakira ngamila; natenepo onsene adatoma ulendo wawo. 
Genesis24:62 Isake akhadadza m'thando yatchetcha ya “Mchera wa Nyamoyo, Ambandiona ule.” Tenepo iye akhakhala m'thando yatchetcha ya Negebu." 
Genesis24:63 Mawulo anango iye adenda kumunda kuthamula miyendo, tenepo pidakwiza iye maso ache, adaona ngamila zikudza chifupi na iye." 
Genesis24:64 Rebekambo pidaona iye Isake adatchitha pa ngamila pache pale 
Genesis24:65 mbavunza nyabasa wa Abrahamu ule mbati, “Mamuna ali m'munda kudza kuna ifeyi mbani?” Nyabasa wa Abrahamu adatawira mbati, “Weneyu ndi mbuyanga.” Natenepo mtsikana ule adakwata chakumpsampsikira mbampsampsika nacho nkhope yache." 
Genesis24:66 Natenepo nyabasa ule adampanga Isake pyonsene pikhadachita iye. 
Genesis24:67 Kubuluka penepo Isake adamkwata mtsikana ule mbapita naye m'khumbi mukhakhala Sara, mache Isake ule, tenepo mtsikanayo adasanduka mkazache. Isake adamfuna pyakwanga Rebeka, natenepo iye adatsanzayiswa, podi kwene kuti mache akhadafa." 
Genesis25:1 Abrahamu adasemba mkazi unango dzinache Ketura. 
Genesis25:2 Iye adambalira Zimirani, Yokishani, Medani, Midiani, Ishibaki na Shua." 
Genesis25:3 Yokishani adabala Sheba na Dedani, pontho pidzukulu pya Dedani pikhali Aashuri, Aletushi na Aleumi." 
Genesis25:4 Ana achimuna a Midiani akhali Efa, Eferi, Hanoki, Abida na Elida. Onsenewa akhali pidzukulu pya Ketura." 
Genesis25:5 Abrahamu adasiyira Isake pyonsene pikhali na iye. 
Genesis25:6 Mbwenye pikhali iye na moyo adapereka mitukwa kuna ana achimuna akhadabala iye na akazi anango ale. Kubuluka penepo adaagwinya ana enewa kuti akakhale kudziko yakumabulukiro dzuwa kutali na Isake mwanache. 
Genesis25:7 Abrahamu adakulupala pyakwanga mbafa ana pyaka dzana na makumanomwe na pishanu. 
Genesis25:8  
Genesis25:9 Anache, Isake na Ishimaele, adamuikha m'nkhwimba ya Makipela m'munda wa Eferoni mwana Zohari, Mhiti, ule akhali kumabulukiro dzuwa kwa Mamure." 
Genesis25:10 Wenewo ukhali munda ule udagula Abrahamu kubulukira kuna Ahiti; onsene Abrahamu na mkazache ene Sara adaikhwa penepo. 
Genesis25:11 Pidafa Abrahamu, Mulungu adatsanzayisa Isake, ule akhakhala chifupi na “Mchera wa Nyamoyo, Ambandiona ule.”" 
Genesis25:12 Ishimaele, mwana Hagara munthu wa ku Iguputo, ule akhali bitchu wachikazi wa Sara, adabalira Abrahamu mwana ule" 
Genesis25:13 akhalimbo na ana. Anawo mbawa kwache aikhwa panyandandanda kutomera wautombo mpakana chimalisira bele: Nebaioti, Kedara, Adibeele, Mibisamu," 
Genesis25:14 Mishima, Duma, Masa," 
Genesis25:15 Hadadi, Tema, Yeturi, Nafishi na Kedema." 
Genesis25:16 Iwo akhali makolo a madzinza khumi na awiri, natenepo midzi na misasa ikhakhala iwo idachemerwa na madzinawo." 
Genesis25:17 Ishimaele akhali pyaka dzana na makumatatu na pinomwe pikhafa iye. 
Genesis25:18 Pidzukulu pya Ishimaele pidakhala pambuto ya pakati pa Havila na Shuri kumabulukiro dzuwa a Iguputo kunjira yakwendera kudziko ya Asiria. Iwo adakhala mbuto zakusiyana na pidzukulu pinango pya Abrahamu. 
Genesis25:19 Ishi ndi mbiri ya Isake mwana Abrahamu. 
Genesis25:20 Isake akhali pyaka makumanayi pyakubalwa pidasemba iye Rebeka mwana wamkazi wa Betuele (Muaramu wakubulukira ku Mesopotamia), pontho nyamaingache Labani." 
Genesis25:21 Na thangwi yakuti Rebeka akhali wakusowa ana. Isake adampempherera kuna MBUYA. MBUYA adava kupempha kwache, natenepo Rebeka adakwata mimba." 
Genesis25:22 Iye akhadikhira kuti anabala mapasa. Anawo mbadzati balwa adatoma kuthimbana okhokha m'mimba mwache mwakuti Rebekayo adalonga mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji pinthu ninga penepi pikundichitikira?” Natenepo iye adenda kavunza nzeru kuna MBUYA kuti adziwe pikhamchitikirapyo." 
Genesis25:23 MBUYA adamtawira mbati, “Madzinza mawiri ali m'mimba mwakomo. Unabala magulu mawiri a anthu ale anati agawikane. Unango anakhala wamphamvu pyakwanga kupiringana mwanzacheyo. Mkulu anatumikira mwana.”" 
Genesis25:24 Nsiku zache zakubala zidakwana, tenepo adabala ana achimuna amapasa awiri." 
Genesis25:25 Wautombo akhali wakufirira, pontho khandache ikhali ninga nguwo yakusasanywa na ubweya, natenepo iye adathulwa Esau." 
Genesis25:26 Wachiwiri kubalwayi adabalwa uku dzanjache yaphata chitende cha Esau, natenepo mwanayo adathulwa Yakobo. Pikhabalwa ana enewa Isake akhali pyaka makumatanthatu pyakubalwa." 
Genesis25:27 Aphale ale adakula, natenepo Esau adasanduka nyaluso pakukhulisa, munthu wakukhala na moyo wakufuna kukhala m'tsanga. Mbwenye Yakobo akhali munthu wakumatama, pontho wakukhala pamsuwo." 
Genesis25:28 Isake akhamfuna Esau, thangwi akhakomerwa na kudya nyama zikhakhulisa Esau zile, mbwenye Rebeka akhamfuna Yakobo." 
Genesis25:29 Nsiku inango pikhaphika Yakobo nyimo zache, Esau adapita m'nyumba kubulukira kakhulisa. Iye akhadaphatiswa na njala" 
Genesis25:30 mbalonga kuna Yakobo mbati, “Ine ndaphatiswa na njala, ngandipasembo pang'ono chakufiracho.” (Yeneyi ndi thangwi yache iye adathulwa Edomu.)" 
Genesis25:31 Yakobo adatawira mbati, “Ndinati ndikupase male ungandigulisa chidzo cha ukulu wako.”" 
Genesis25:32 Esau adatawira mbati, “Ande, ndatawira! Podi ine ndikufuna kufa na njala; apo chidzo cha ukulumbo chinandiphedzanji?”" 
Genesis25:33 Yakobo adatawira mbati, “Dumbira kuti unandigulisadi chidzo cha ukulu wako.” Esau adadumbira mbagulisa chidzo cha ukulu wache kuna Yakobo." 
Genesis25:34 Tenepo Yakobo adapereka kuna Esau mkate na pimsuzi pya nyimo zile. Iye adadya mbaenda pyache. Na njira yeneyi Esau adalulupisa chidzo cha ukulu wache. 
Genesis26:1 M'dzikomo mukhadadza pontho njala kupambula njala yakutoma ikhali pandzidzi wa Abrahamu ile. Tenepo Isake adenda kuna Abimeleki, mfumu wa Afilisti, ku Gerari." 
Genesis26:2 MBUYA akhadaonekera kuna Isake, pontho akhadampanga mbati, “Leka kwenda ku Iguputo; mbwenye khala m'dziko muno mudakupanga ine kuti ukhalemo." 
Genesis26:3 Khala kuno. Ine ndinati ndikhale nawe mbandikutsanzayisa. Dziko yonseneyi ndinati ndiipereke kuna iwe na kuna pidzukulu pyako. Ine ndinati ndichite pinthu pidadumbira ine kupichita kuna babako Abrahamu. 
Genesis26:4 Ine ndinakupasa pidzukulu pizinji ninga nyenyezi za kuthambo, pontho ndinapereka kuna iwo dziko yonseneyi. Madzinza onsene anatsanzayiswa kudzera muna pidzukulu pyako." 
Genesis26:5 Ine ndinakutsanzayisa, thangwi Abrahamu adandivera mbakoya mwambo wanga na matongero anga onsene.”" 
Genesis26:6 Natenepo Isake adakhala ku Gerari. 
Genesis26:7 Pidavunza amuna a kweneko pya mkazache, iye adalonga kuti akhali nyamaingache. Iye hadalonge kuti Rebeka akhali mkazache tayu thangwi akhagopa kuphiwa na amuna a kweneko, towera akwate Rebeka, ule akhali wakubalika pyakwanga." 
Genesis26:8 Pidakhala Isake kweneko ndzidzi ukulu ene, Mfumu Abimeleki wa Afilisti adasuzumira na pazhanera mbaona Isake na Rebeka akugwa maya." 
Genesis26:9 Natenepo Abimeleki adachemeresa Isake mbalonga mbati, “Weneyu ndi mkazakodi! Apo thangwi yache ninji udalonga kuti ndi nyamaingako?” Isake adatawira mbati, “Thangwi ine ndidanyerezera kuti ndinaphiwa ndingalonga kuti ndi mkazanga.”" 
Genesis26:10 Abimeleki adalonga mbati, “Apo chachita iwe kuna ifechi ninji? Mwinango mbodzi wa amunangawa mbadagona naye mkazako, tenepo iwe mbudatichitisa kukhala anthu akudawa.”" 
Genesis26:11 Abimeleki adacheuza anthu onsene mbati, “Munthu onsene anavuya mamunayi penu mkaziyu anaphiwa.”" 
Genesis26:12 Isake adabzala m'dziko mwenemo, tenepo chaka chenecho adavuna pizinji pyakwanga kadzana kupiringana pidabzala iye pile, thangwi MBUYA adamtsanzayisa." 
Genesis26:13 Isake adathimiza kukhala munthu wakupikwanisa mwakuti adasanduka munthu wakufuma pyakwanga. 
Genesis26:14 Na thangwi yakuti akhali na mikumbi izinji ya mabira na ng'ombe, pontho anyabasa azinji, Afilisti akhadaipirwa naye." 
Genesis26:15 Natenepo iwo adafikhira michera yonsene ikhadakumbwa na anyabasa a Abrahamu mbali moyo. 
Genesis26:16 Tenepo Abimeleki adalonga kuna Isake mbati, “Buluka m'dziko mwathu muno. Iwe wasanduka munthu wamphamvu pyakwanga kupiringana ife.”" 
Genesis26:17 Natenepo Isake adabuluka mbakamanga misasache paphedi ya Gerari, kule kudakhala iye ndzidzi ene." 
Genesis26:18 Iye adakumba pontho michera ikhadakumbwa pandzidzi wa Abrahamu, ikhadafikhirwa na Afilisti pidafa Abrahamu ile. Isake adaithula michera ile madzina onthowo akhadathula babache." 
Genesis26:19 Nyabasa wa Isake adakumba mchera paphedipo mbagumana madzi. 
Genesis26:20 Pakhali mapoko-poko pakati pa amakabuswa a ku Gerari na amakabuswa a Isake mbalonga mbati, “Mcherawu ngwathu.” Natenepo Isake adauthula mcherawo, “Mapoko-poko.”" 
Genesis26:21 Anyabasa a Isake adakumba pontho mchera unango, tenepo pakhali pontho mapoko-poko a pya mchera wenewu. Natenepo Isake adauthula mcherawo “Malwa.”" 
Genesis26:22 Iye adafendedzera kutali na penepo mbakumba mchera unango. Pamchera wenewu pakhali nkhabe mapoko-poko. Natenepo Isake adauthula “Ufulu.” Iye adalonga mbati, “Chinchino MBUYA atipasa ufulu wakukhala m'dziko muno. Tenepo tinati tikhale anthu akupikwanisa.”" 
Genesis26:23 Kubuluka kweneko Isake adafuluka mbaenda ku Beeresheba. 
Genesis26:24 Mosiku wenewo MBUYA adamuonekera mbalonga mbati, “Ine ndine Mulungu wa babako Abrahamu. Leka gopa; ine ndili nawe. Ndinati ndikutsanzayise, pontho ndinakupasa pidzukulu pizinji thangwi ya kudumbira kudachita ine kuna nyabasanga Abrahamu.”" 
Genesis26:25 Isake adamanga guwa yakuperekerapo nsembe mbapembedza MBUYA. Tenepo adamanga msasache penepo, anyabasachembo adakumba mchera unango." 
Genesis26:26 Abimeleki na Ahuzati, phungu wache, pontho na Fikolo, mkadamu wa anyankhondo adadza kubulukira ku Gerari kaona Isake." 
Genesis26:27 Natenepo Isake adavunza mbati, “Lero chachitika ninji kuti mudze dzandiona, podi imwe mudaipirwa nane mbamundithamangisa m'dziko mwanu?”" 
Genesis26:28 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Chinchino ife tadziwa kuti MBUYA ali nawe, tenepo tapinyerezera kuti pakhale kudumbirisana pakati pa iwe na ife. Tinafuna iwepo udumbire" 
Genesis26:29 kuti hunatikuwaza tayu ninga mudachitira ife kuna iwe kukhonda kukukuwaza. Ife tikhali anthu adidi kuna iwe, pontho tidakubulusa mwa mtendere. Tenepo chinchino mphyakuveka kuti MBUYA akutsanzayisa.”" 
Genesis26:30 Isake adaasasanyira phwando, tenepo iwo adadya na kumwa." 
Genesis26:31 Bzobzo mangwana mwache iwo adadumbira kuna unango na mwanzache. Isake adagonekana nawo, tenepo iwo adenda na mtendere." 
Genesis26:32 Pansiku yeneyo anyabasa a Isake adadza mbampanga pya mchera ukhadakumba iwo. Iwo adalonga mbati, “Taagumana madzi.”" 
Genesis26:33 Iye adauthula mcherawo “Kudumbirisana.” Penepa ndiye padabulukira dzina ya mzinda wa Beeresheba. 
Genesis26:34 Pikhali Esau pyaka makumanayi pyakubalwa, adasemba atsikana awiri a Chihiti. Madzinawo mbawa: Yuditi, mwana wamkazi wa Beeri; na Basemati, mwana wamkazi wa Eloni." 
Genesis26:35 Akazi enewa adakhala pyakutsukwalisa kuna Isake na Rebeka. 
Genesis27:1 Isake adakalamba pyakwanga mwakuti adasanduka zimola. Iye adachemera mwanache wautombo Esau mbampanga mbati, “Mwananga.” Iye adatawira mbati, “Baba.”" 
Genesis27:2 Isake adalonga mbati, “Ine ndakalamba, pontho nsiku yakufa kwanga nkhabe kudziwikabi." 
Genesis27:3 Natenepo chinchino pano kwata utako na matswimo ako uende m'tsanga kundipherambo nyama. 
Genesis27:4 Tenepo uiphike mwadidi ninga mumbafunira ine mbudza nayo kuna ine. Ndingamala kudya ndinakutsanzayisa kwakumalisira ndidzati kufa.” 
Genesis27:5 Pikhalonga Isake kupanga Esau, Rebeka akhavesera. Natenepo pidabuluka Esau kwenda kakhulisa," 
Genesis27:6 iye adalonga kuna Yakobo mbati, “Ndalila kuva kwene babako akumpanga Esau kuti," 
Genesis27:7 ‘Kandikwatire nyama undiphikire. Ndingamala kudya, ndinakutsanzayisa pamaso pa MBUYA ndidzati kufa.’ ”" 
Genesis27:8 Rebeka adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Natenepo mwananga, uvesere, pontho uchite pinalonga inepi." 
Genesis27:9 Uende kumkumbi mbukakwateko ana mbuzi akunenepa awiri, towera ndiaphike, pontho kuti ndiasasanye pyakudya pyadidi ninga mumbafunira babako." 
Genesis27:10 Tenepo iwe ukukwate kwenda nako kuna babako, iyembo anakutsanzayisa mbadzati kufa.”" 
Genesis27:11 Mbwenye Yakobo adalonga kuna mache mbati, “Imwe mukupidziwa kuti Esau ndi munthu waubweya m'manungo mwache, mbwenye ine manungo anga ngakumyalala." 
Genesis27:12 Mwinango baba anandimphamphasa mbandigumana kuti ndikumnyengeza; na njira yeneyi ndinapipasa ndekha ene dzedze m'mbuto mwa kutsanzayiswa.” 
Genesis27:13 Mache adamtawira mbati, “Mwananga, leka dzedze yonsene igwere pyanga ine pano; mbwenye iwe chita kwene ninga mwakupangira ine, pontho ndoko kandikwatire mbuzizo.”" 
Genesis27:14 Natenepo iye adenda kazikwata mbuzizo mbadza nazo kuna mache. Machemboyo adaziphika mwadidi ninga mumbafunira babache. 
Genesis27:15 Tenepo Rebeka adakwata nguwo zadidiletu za Esau, zile zidakoya Rebeka m'nyumba, mbazivazika Yakobo." 
Genesis27:16 Iye adakwata nthembe za mbuzi mbaziikha m'mikono mwa Yakobo na khundu inango yakumyalala ya khosi yache. 
Genesis27:17 Mache Yakobo ule adakwata nyama yakuphikwa mwadidi ile pabodzi pene na mkate ukhadaphika iye mbapipereka kuna Yakobo. 
Genesis27:18 Tenepo Yakobo adenda kuna babache mbalonga mbati, “Baba.” Babacheyo adatawira mbati, “Ndawo! Mwanangache ngupi?”" 
Genesis27:19 Yakobo adatawira mbati, “Ndine mwananu wautombo Esau; ndachita ninga mudandipangira imwe mule. Ndaphata miyendo, khalani na matako mudye nyama yakudzeserani ineyi, towera mukwanise kunditsanzayisa.”" 
Genesis27:20 Isake adatawira mbati, “Mwananga, waigumana tani mwakuchimbiza tenepa?” Yakobo adatawira mbati, “MBUYA Mulungu wanu ndiye andiphedza kuti ndiigumane.”" 
Genesis27:21 Isake adalonga kuna Yakobo mbati, “Fedza chifupi na ine towera ndikwanise kukumphamphasa. Kadi ndiwedi mwananga Esau?”" 
Genesis27:22 Yakobo adafedzera chifupi na babache, ule adamphamphasa mbalonga mbati, “Falakoyi ikuveka ninga ya Yakobo, mbwenye mikonoyi ikuveka ninga ya Esau.”" 
Genesis27:23 Iye hadamdzindikire Yakobo tayu, thangwi mikono yache ikhali ubweya ninga ya Esau. Iye akhali chifupi kuti amtsanzayise," 
Genesis27:24 mbwenye adamvunza pontho mbati, “Kadi ndiwedi mwananga, Esau?” Yakobo adatawira mbati, “Ndine ene pano.”" 
Genesis27:25 Isake adalonga mbati, “Dza nayo kuno nyamayo. Ndingamala kudya ndinakutsanzayisa.” Yakobo adadza naye pamaso pa babache mbadza pontho na vinyu pang'ono wakumwera." 
Genesis27:26 Natenepo babache adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Fedza chifupi mwananga, pontho undimpsompsone.”" 
Genesis27:27 Pikhadza iye chifupi kuti ampsompsone, Isake adava khwema ya nguwo zache, natenepo adamtsanzayisa. Iye adalonga mbati, “Khwema yadidi ya mwananga yakhala ninga kununkhira kwa munda udatsanzayiswa na MBUYA ule." 
Genesis27:28 Mulungu akupase bume kubulukira kudzulu, pontho achitise mindako kukhala na mataka akubalisa pinthu. Iye akupase mapira na vinyu wakuinjipa." 
Genesis27:29 Madzinza akhale anyabasako, pontho anthu alambe pamaso pako. Iwe utonge abale ako onsene, pontho pidzukulu pya mako pilambe pamaso pako. Anyakukutembererawo mbatembererwembo, pontho anyakukutsanzayisawo mbatsanzayiswembo.”" 
Genesis27:30 Isake adamalisa kumtsanzayisa Yakobo, tenepo sindzidzi Yakobo nkhubuluka, Esau nanache adadza kubulukira kakhulisa." 
Genesis27:31 Iye adaphikambo pyakudya pyadidi mbaenda napyo kuna babache. Iye adalonga mbati, “Baba, ndaphata miyendo, khalani na matako mudye nyama yakudzeserani ineyi, towera munditsanzayise.”" 
Genesis27:32 Isake adavunza mbati, “Ndiwe ani iwe?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Mwananu wautombo Esau.”" 
Genesis27:33 Isake adatoma kutetemera pyakwanga na mantha mbavunza mbati, “Apo mbani adapha nyama mbadza nayo kuna ine? Ine ndaidya kwene chinchino pano mbudzati bwera. Ine ndamtsanzayisa kwakumalisira. Natenepo mtsanzayisowo ngwache kwenda na kwenda.”" 
Genesis27:34 Pidava Esau penepi, adalira mwakugaluza fala, pontho mwakupha mtima mbalonga mbati, “Nditsanzayisenimbo ine, baba!”" 
Genesis27:35 Isake adatawira mbati, “Mphwako adadza mbandinyengeza. Tenepo iye akwata mtsanzayiso wako onsene.”" 
Genesis27:36 Esau adalonga mbati, “Keneka nkhachiwiri kundichenjerera. Si chachilendo tayu kuti dzinache ndi Yakobo. Iye adandikwatira chidzo cha ukulu wanga, lero pontho andikwatira mtsanzayiso wanga.” Tenepo iye adavunza mbati, “Ayi mudandikoyerambo tayu mtsanzayiso na pang'ono pene?”" 
Genesis27:37 Isake adatawira mbati, “Ine ndamchitisa kukhala mbuyako, pontho kuti abale ache onsene akhale anyabasache. Ndampasa vinyu na mapira. Natenepo nkhabe pontho chinthu chakuti ndinakwanisa kukuchitira tayu, mwananga!”" 
Genesis27:38 Esau adalonga kuna babache mbati, “Baba, mtsanzayiso una imwe ngubodzi ene basi? Nditsanzayisenimbo ine, baba!” Tenepo Esau adalira pikulu pene." 
Genesis27:39 Isake adamtawira mbati, “Mbuto inafuna iwe kukhala inakhala nkhabe mataka akubalisa pinthu. Bume yakubulukira kudzulu nkhabe kugwa m'minda mwako tayu." 
Genesis27:40 Iwe moyo wako onsene unaphatisa basa talasada yakumenyera nkhondo, pontho unakhala bitchu wa mphwako. Mbwenye ungampandukira unabuluka pansi pa utongi wache.”" 
Genesis27:41 Esau adazonda Yakobo thangwi babache akhadamtsanzayisa Yakobo. Iye adanyerezera mumtima mwache kuti, “Ndzidzi wakusintili kufa kwa baba uli chifupi, pingamala penepyo ndinampha Yakobo.”" 
Genesis27:42 Mbwenye pidava Rebeka pya pinthu pikhanyerezera Esau pile, adachemeresa Yakobo mbampanga mbati, “Vesera kuno, mbaleako Esau ana manyerezero akufuna kukupha kuti abwezere." 
Genesis27:43 Natenepo, mwananga, chita pinakupanga inepi. Chinchino pano thawa uende kuna nkhoswe yanga, Labani, kumzinda wa Harani." 
Genesis27:44 Kakhale naye kweneko nsiku zingasi mpakana mtima wa mbaleako ukhuludzike," 
Genesis27:45 pontho aduwalire pinthu pidamchitira iwe. Tenepo ndinatuma munthu kukukwata kubwerera nawe kuno. Nditayirenji ananga onsene awiri ndzidzi ubodzi?” 
Genesis27:46 Rebeka adalonga kuna Isake mbati, “Ndikusanyika, pontho ndatopa nawo akazi a Chihiti a Esau. Ngakhala Yakobo anasembambo mbodzi wa atsikana a Chihitiwa, mphyadidi kuti ine ndife pyanga.”" 
Genesis28:1 Isake adachemera Yakobo. Pidamala iye kumpasa mwenyikiro adampanga mbati, “Leka semba mtsikana wa mu Kanani muno." 
Genesis28:2 M'mbuto mwache ndoko kudziko ya Mesopotamia, kumusa kwa mbuyako wamamuna Betuele, adabala mako ule. Kweneko kasembe mtsikana mbodzi wa ana achikazi a Labani, nkhoswe Yache mako." 
Genesis28:3 Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene mbatsanzayise banjako, pontho mbakupase ana azinji, towera ukhale baba wa madzinza azinji." 
Genesis28:4 Iye akutsanzayise pabodzi na pidzukulu pyako pene ninga mudatsanzayisira iye Abrahamu, towera mupokosere dziko ikhakhala iwe ninga mlendoyi, ile idapereka Mulungu kuna Abrahamu.”" 
Genesis28:5 Isake adagwinya Yakobo ku Mesopotamia, kuna Labani ule akhali mwana wamamuna wa Betuele wa Chiaramu, pontho nkhoswe yache Rebeka, mache Yakobo na Esau." 
Genesis28:6 Esau adapidziwa kuti Isake adamtsanzayisa Yakobo, pontho kuti amgwinya ku Mesopotamia kasemba mkazi. Iye adapidziwa pontho kuti pidatsanzayiswa iye na Isake, Isake onthoyo adampanga kuti aleke semba mkazi wa mu Kanani." 
Genesis28:7 Iye adagumana kuti Yakobo akhadavera babache na mache pontho kuti akhadenda ku Mesopotamia. 
Genesis28:8 Esau adadzindikira kuti babache hadakomerwe na akazi a mu Kanani tayu. 
Genesis28:9 Natenepo iye adenda kuna Ishimaele, mwana Abrahamu, mbakasemba mwanache wamkazi dzinache Mahalati, nyamaingache Nebaioti, kuthimizira pa akazache akale ale." 
Genesis28:10 Yakobo adabuluka ku Beeresheba mbaenda ku Harani. 
Genesis28:11 Pidafika iye pambuto inango iye adaimira kuti agone penepo, thangwi kunja kukhadadoka. Iye adakwata mwala kuuchita nsago mbagona penepo." 
Genesis28:12 Iye adalota kuti akhaona manera akuimira kubulukira pansi kufikiratu kudzulu, na angelo akutchitha na kukwira pamanerapo." 
Genesis28:13 Pontho kuti MBUYA akhaimira chifupi na iye mbalonga mbati, “Ine ndine MBUYA, Mulungu wa Abrahamu na Isake. Ine ndinapereka kuna iwe na kuna pidzukulu pyako dziko inagona iweyi." 
Genesis28:14 Pidzukulu pyako pinainjipa pyakwanga ninga fumbi ya padziko yapansi. Iwo anafalikira khundu zonsene za dziko yapansi. Pontho kudzera muna iwe na kuna pidzukulu pyako ndinati nditsanzayise madzinza onsene. 
Genesis28:15 Kumbuka kuti konsene kunaenda iwe ndinakhala nawe na kukukoya mwadidi, pontho ndinakudzesa pontho kudzikoyi. Ine nee ndinakusiyabi mpakana ndichite pyonsene pidadumbira ine kuti ndinakuchitira.”" 
Genesis28:16 Yakobo adatutumuka kuchitulo mbalonga mbati, “MBUYA ali pano! Iye ali pambuto ino, pontho penepi ine nee ndikhapidziwabi!”" 
Genesis28:17 Iye adachita mantha mbalonga mbati, “Mbuto ino njakugoswadi! Pano pathemadi kukhala nyumba ya Mulungu pontho mphamsuwo wakwendera kudzulu.”" 
Genesis28:18 Bzobzo mangwana mwache Yakobo adalamuka mbakwata mwala ukhadachita iye nsago ule mbauimirisa kuti ukhale chikumbuso. Tenepo adakwata mafuta akusasanywa na olivi mbaakhuthulira padzulu pa mwala ule, kuuchitisa kukhala wakupambulika kuna Mulungu." 
Genesis28:19 Yakobo adaithula mbuto ile Betele. (Luwani ya kweneko pakutoma ikhadziwika na dzina yakuti Luzi.) 
Genesis28:20 Tenepo Yakobo adadumbira kuna MBUYA mbati, “Ngakhala imwe munakhala nane na kundikoya mwadidi paulendo unaenda inewu, pontho na kundipasa pyakudya na nguwo," 
Genesis28:21 pontho ndingabwerera mwadidi mwene kumusa kwa babanga, penepo munakhala Mulungu wanga." 
Genesis28:22 Mwala waimisa ine apawu ninga chikumbuso inakhala mbuto yakukupembedzeranipo, pontho ndinapereka chakhumi cha pyonsene pinandipasa imwe.”" 
Genesis29:1 Yakobo adathimiza ulendo wache mbafika kudziko ya anthu akumabulukiro dzuwa. 
Genesis29:2 Kweneko adaonako mchera uli m'munda, pontho na mikumbi itatu ya mabira ili gone-gone chifupi na mcherawo thangwi mabirawa akhamwa penepo. Mwala wakufunga nawo msuwo wa mcherawo ukhali ukulu." 
Genesis29:3 Ndzidzi onsene ukhagumanyikana mabira pamcherapo, amakabuswa akhagulung'undisa mwalawo kuubulusa pamsuwopo. Angamala penepo akhaubwezera pamsuwo wa mcherawo." 
Genesis29:4 Yakobo adavunza amakabuswa ale mbati, “Amunamwe mukubulukira kupi?” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Tikubulukira ku Harani.”" 
Genesis29:5 Iye adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ayi mumbamdziwambo Labani, mwana wamamuna wa Nahori?” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Ande, timbamdziwa.”" 
Genesis29:6 Tenepo Yakobo adavunza mbati, “Ayi iye ngwakuwanga ene?” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Ande, ngwakuwanga ene, pontho ngayang'anani mwanache wamkazi Rakele nguyo anadza apa na mabira a babacheyo.”" 
Genesis29:7 Yakobo adalonga mbati, “Podi kunjaku kudzati doka tayu, pontho ndzidzi wakufungira mabira m'thanga hudzati kwana tayu. Apo mwatani munakhonda kuamwesa mbamuenda nawo pontho m'tsanga kaadyesa?”" 
Genesis29:8 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Ife nkhabe kwanisa kuchita tenepo tayu mpakana mikumbi yonsene ya mabira ifike pano, pontho mwalawu ugulung'undiswe kuubulusa pamsuwo wa mcherawu. Penepo tinakwanisa kumwesa mabirathu.”" 
Genesis29:9 Yakobo mbali mkati kulonga na amakabuswa ale, Rakele adafika na mabira a babache, thangwi iye akhali makabuswa." 
Genesis29:10 Pidaona Yakobo Rakele mwana Labani, nkhoswe yache mache, pontho na mabira a Labani, adenda mbakagulung'undisa mwala udafunga na iwo pamchera ule, mbamwesa mabira a Labani." 
Genesis29:11 Natenepo Yakobo adampsompsona Rakele mbatoma kulira na kukomerwa. 
Genesis29:12 Iye adalonga kuna Rakele mbati, “Ine ndine mdzukuluache babako, mwana Rebeka.” Natenepo iye adathamanga mbakampanga babache." 
Genesis29:13 Sindzidzi Labani nkhuva pya mdzukuluache, mwana nyamaingache, adachimbiza kagumanikana naye. Iye adamkhumbatira mbampsompsona, tenepo adadza naye kumusa kwache. Pidapanga Yakobo Labani pya pyonsene pidachitika pile," 
Genesis29:14 Labani adalonga mbati, “Ndimomwene, iwe ndiwe manungo anga, pontho chiropa changa.” Pidakhala Yakobo kweneko mwezi wamumphu," 
Genesis29:15 Labani adalonga kuna Yakobo mbati, “Leka kundiphatira basa pezi pene thangwi ndiwe mbaleanga. Unafuna ndikupagalinji?”" 
Genesis29:16 Labani akhali na ana awiri achikazi; wamkulu dzinache ikhali Lea, wamng'onoyimbo dzinache ikhali Rakele." 
Genesis29:17 Lea maso ache akhali akuthima, mbwenye Rakele akhali wakutandwa mwadidi, pontho wakubalika." 
Genesis29:18 Yakobo adafunana na Rakele, natenepo iye adalonga mbati, “Ngakhala munanditawirisa kusemba Rakele ndinati ndikuphatireni basa pyaka pinomwe.”" 
Genesis29:19 Labani adatawira mbati, “Mphyadidi kuti mkaziyu ndipase iwepo kusiyana na kupasa munthu unango. Khala kuno na ine.”" 
Genesis29:20 Yakobo adaphata basa pyaka pinomwe, towera asembe Rakele. Ndzidzi udaphata iye basa udaoneka ninga nsiku pang'ono kuna iye, thangwi iye adamfuna pyakwanga Rakele." 
Genesis29:21 Tenepo Yakobo adalonga kuna Labani mbati, “Nsiku zidapangana ife zakwana; ndipaseni mkazanga ndikazhali naye.”" 
Genesis29:22 Natenepo Labani adachita phwando yakukazhali mbachemera munthu onsene kudza kuphwandoko. 
Genesis29:23 Mbwenye mosiku wenewo, m'mbuto mwa Rakele, Lea ndiye adaperekwa kuna Yakobo, tenepo Yakobo adapita naye m'bonde mkaziyo." 
Genesis29:24 Labani adapereka bitchu wache wamkazi Zilipa, kuna mwanache Lea kuti akhale nyakumphatira basa." 
Genesis29:25 Mangwana mwache Yakobo adadzindikira kuti mkazi akhadapaswa iye ule akhali Lea. Natenepo iye adenda kuna Labani mbakalonga mbati, “Chachita imwe kuna inechi ninji? Rakele ndiye adaphatira ine basa. Apo thangwi yache ninji mwandinyengeza?”" 
Genesis29:26 Labani adamtawira mbati, “Wenewo si mtemo wathu tayu kuno kukazhalisa wamng'ono, nanache mbadzati kazhali." 
Genesis29:27 Dikhira mpakana dimingu ya dzoma ya kukazhali imale, tenepo ndinakupasa Rakele, ngakhala unandiphatira pontho basa pyaka pinango pinomwe.”" 
Genesis29:28 Yakobo adatawirizana napyo. Tenepo pidamala dzoma yakusekera kukazhali kwa Lea, Labani adapereka Rakele kuna Yakobo kuti akhale mkazache." 
Genesis29:29 Labani adapereka bitchu wache wamkazi, Biliha, kuna Rakele kuti akhale nyakumphatira basa." 
Genesis29:30 Yakobo adapitambo m'bonde na Rakele mbamfuna pyakwanga kupiringana Lea. Kubuluka penepo adaphatira pontho Labani basa pyaka pinango pinomwe. 
Genesis29:31 Pidaona MBUYA kuti Lea akhafunwa pang'ono kusiyana na Rakele, iye adamchitisa Lea kukhala na ana, mbwenye Rakele akhali ngomwa." 
Genesis29:32 Lea adakwata mimba mbabala mwana wamamuna. Iye adalonga mbati, “MBUYA aona kusanyika kwanga, tenepo mamunanga anandifuna.” Natenepo mwanayo adamthula Rubeni." 
Genesis29:33 Iye adakwata pontho mimba mbabala mwana mamuna. Iye adalonga mbati, “MBUYA andipasa mwanayi, thangwi iye adaona kuti ine nee ndikhafunwa tayu.” Natenepo mwanayo adamthula Simioni." 
Genesis29:34 Iye adakwata pontho mimba yachitatu mbabala mwana unango wamamuna. Iye adalonga mbati, “Chinchino mamunanga anakhala phathi-phathi na ine, thangwi ndambalira ana atatu achimuna.” Natenepo mwanayo adamthula Levi." 
Genesis29:35 Kubuluka penepo adakwata pontho mimba mbabala mwana mamuna. Iye adalonga mbati, “Ndzidzi uno ndikukuza MBUYA.” Natenepo mwanayo adamthula Yuda. Tenepo iye adaimira kubala." 
Genesis30:1 Mbwenye Rakele hadambalire Yakobo mwana na mbodzi ene tayu, natenepo iye adachita naye ntchanje nanache mbalonga kuna Yakobo mbati, “Ndipase ana, gopa ndinafa.”" 
Genesis30:2 Yakobo adazhangali naye Rakele mbalonga mbati, “Ine si ine Mulungu tayu. Mulunguyo ndiye akukuchitisa kuti ukhonde bala.”" 
Genesis30:3 Rakele adalonga mbati, “Kwata bitchu wanga wachikazi ugone naye, towera andibalire mwana. Na njira yeneyi ndinakwanisa kukhala mama kudzera muna iye.”" 
Genesis30:4 Natenepo adapereka Biliha kuna mamunache, iyembo mbagona naye." 
Genesis30:5 Biliha adakwata mimba mbabalira Yakobo mwana wamamuna. 
Genesis30:6 Rakele adalonga mbati, “Mulungu atonga mseru wanga mwakundikomera. Iye ava kupempha kwanga mbandipasa mwana wamamuna.” Natenepo mwanayo adamthula Dani." 
Genesis30:7 Biliha adakwata pontho mimba mbabala mwana wamamuna wachiwiri. 
Genesis30:8 Rakele adalonga mbati, “Ndathimbana nayedi nananga, kwache ndamkunda.” Natenepo mwanayo adamthula Nafitali." 
Genesis30:9 Pidadzindikira Lea kuti akhadaimira kubala, adapereka Zilipa, bitchu wache wamkazi kuna Yakobo kukhala ninga mkazache." 
Genesis30:10 Tenepo Zilipa adabalira Yakobo mwana wamamuna. 
Genesis30:11 Lea adalonga mbati, “Ndina mwayi.” Natenepo mwanayo adamthula Gadi." 
Genesis30:12 Zilipa adabalira pontho Yakobo mwana unango wamamuna," 
Genesis30:13 tenepo Lea adalonga mbati, “Ndakomerwa pyakwanga pene! Chinchino akazi anandithula munthu wakukomerwa!” Natenepo mwanayo adamthula Asheri." 
Genesis30:14 Pandzidzi wakuvuna tirigu, Rubeni adenda kumunda mbakagumanako mitombwe yamchena mbadza nayo kuna Lea mache. Rakele adalonga kuna Lea mbati, “Ndipasenimbo pang'ono mchena wa mwananu.”" 
Genesis30:15 Lea adatawira mbati, “Kundikwatira mamunanga kwachita iweku, kudakwane tayu? Lero pontho ukufuna kukwata na mchena wa mwananga ene.” Rakele adalonga mbati, “Ngakhala unandipasa mchena wa mwanako, mosiku uno pano unakwanisa kupita m'bonde na Yakobo.”" 
Genesis30:16 Na mawulo, pikhadza Yakobo kubulukira kuminda, Lea adenda kagumanikana naye mbampanga mbati, “Mosiku uno unapita m'bonde na ine pano, thangwi ndachita kukugula na mchena wa mwananga.” Natenepo Yakobo adapita naye m'bonde mosiku wenewo." 
Genesis30:17 Mulungu adava kupempha kwa Lea. Tenepo Lea adakwata mimba mbabalira Yakobo mwana wamamuna wachishanu. 
Genesis30:18 Lea adalonga mbati, “Mulungu andifupa, thangwi ndidapereka bitchu wanga kuna mamunanga.” Natenepo mwanayo adamthula Isakara." 
Genesis30:19 Lea adakwata pontho mimba mbabalira Yakobo mwana wamamuna wachitanthatu. 
Genesis30:20 Iye adalonga mbati, “Mulungu andipasa mtukwa wadidi. Chinchino mamunanga anandilemedza thangwi ndambalira mwana wamamuna wachitanthatu.” Natenepo mwanayo adamthula Zebuloni." 
Genesis30:21 Kubuluka penepo adabala mwana wamkazi mbamthula Dina. 
Genesis30:22 Kubuluka penepo Mulungu adamkumbuka Rakele; iye adava kupempha kwache mbachita kukhala pyakukwanisika kuti Rakele akhale na ana. 
Genesis30:23 Iye adakwata mimba mbabala mwana wamamuna. Iye adalonga mbati, “Mulungu andibulusa manyadzo pakundipasa mwana wamamuna." 
Genesis30:24 Ndinapempha pontho MBUYA kuti andipase mwana unango wamamuna.” Natenepo mwanayo adamthula Yosefe. 
Genesis30:25 Pidabalwa Yosefe, Yakobo adalonga kuna Labani mbati, “Ndilekeni kuti ndibwerere kudziko ya kwathu." 
Genesis30:26 Mundipase akazanga na ananga, adaphatira ine basa ale, tenepo ndinaenda pyanga. Imwe mukuidziwa basa ikulu yakuphatirani ineyi.”" 
Genesis30:27 Labani adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ngakhala iwe unakwanisa kundiverambo nsisi, leka kwendabi, thangwi ine ndadziwa kudzera mukuloteswa kuti MBUYA anditsanzayisa thangwi ya iwepo.”" 
Genesis30:28 Iye adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Longa kontache inafuna iwe kuti upagalwi, ndinati ndikupagali.”" 
Genesis30:29 Yakobo adatawira mbati, “Imwe mukupidziwa mule mwakuphatirani ine basa, pontho na mule mwainjipira pifuyo pyanu mwenemo pili m'manja mwanga." 
Genesis30:30 Pyakuchepa pikhali na imwe, ine ndidzati bwera, pyainjipa pyakwanga, pontho MBUYA akutsanzayisani konsene kukhaenda ine. Mbwenye lero ndinachita lini pinthu pyakuphedza napyo banjanga?”" 
Genesis30:31 Labani adavunza mbati, “Apo ndikupasenji?” Yakobo adatawira mbati, “Lekani kundipasa chinthu na chibodzi chene. Mbwenye ndinathimiza kuyang'anira mikumbi yanu ngakhala munatawirizana na pinalonga inepi." 
Genesis30:32 Munditawirise lero ndiende pakati pa mikumbi yanu yonsene ndikabulusepo mabira na mbuzi zamadamba-madamba penu mathotho-mathotho, pontho na anabira onsene akuswipa. Kupagalwi kwanga kunakhala kweneko." 
Genesis30:33 M'tsogolo muno munakwanisa kuona ngakhala ndachita pyakulungama. Mungabwera dzaona pyapagalwi ine, ngakhala panakhala mabira penu mbuzi pyakukhonda khala na madamba-madamba penu mathotho-mathotho, pontho na bira okhonda swipa, mupidziwe kuti yeneyo yachita kubiwa.”" 
Genesis30:34 Labani adatawira mbati, “Ande, ndatawira, tinapichita ninga mwapilongera iwemo.”" 
Genesis30:35 Mbwenye nsiku yonthoyo, Labani adabulusa mabokho onsene amisilingi-misilingi penu madamba-madamba na mathunzwi onsene amathotho-mathotho na amadamba-madamba, penu amisilingi yakuchena. Iye adabulusa pontho mabira onsene akuswipa mbapereka mkumbiwo kuna mwanache wamamuna kuti audyese." 
Genesis30:36 Tenepo mwanayo adakwata mkumbiwo mbaenda nawo kutali na Yakobo; ulendowo ukhali wa nsiku zitatu. Yakobo adadyesambo mikumbi ya Labani idasalirayo. 
Genesis30:37 Yakobo adakwata matsamvu awisi a miti yapopula, alimodi na njale, mbasuwa pimiti pinango matsamvu mule, natenepo m'matsamvu mule mudaoneka misilingi yakuchena." 
Genesis30:38 Tenepo iye adakwata matsamvu ale mbaaikha m'michera mule, towera pikhale patsogolo pawo ipyo pingabwera kumwa madzi, thangwi penepa ndiye pakhabebesana ipyo." 
Genesis30:39 Natenepo pikhabebesana mbuzi patsogolo pa matsamvu ale, zidakwata bele mbiziteya ana amisilingi-misilingi, amadamba-madamba, pontho amathotho-mathotho." 
Genesis30:40 Yakobo adalekanisa mbuzi na mabira, tenepo adaachitisa onsene kuyang'ana kuna mkumbi wa Labani, ule ukhali wakuswipa na wamisilingi-misilingi. Na njira yeneyi iye adakwanisa kusasanya mkumbi wache mbakhonda kuuvungaza pabodzi na mkumbi wa Labani tayu." 
Genesis30:41 Pifuyo pyakunenepa na pyamphamvu pingabebesana Yakobo akhaikha matsamvu ale patsogolo m'michera mwawo kuti zibebesane chifupi na matsamvuwo. 
Genesis30:42 Mbwenye Yakobo hadaikhe matsamvu ale patsogolo pa pifuyo pyakusowa mphamvu. Natenepo pifuyo pyonsene pyakusowa mphamvu pikhali pya Labani, mbwenye pyonsene pyakunenepa na pyamphamvu pikhali pya Yakobo." 
Genesis30:43 Na njira yeneyi Yakobo adafuma pyakwanga. Akhali na mikumbi izinji ya pifuyo, mabulu na ngamila, pontho na mabitchu achimuna na achikazi." 
Genesis31:1 Yakobo adava kuti ana achimuna a Labani akhalonga mbati, “Yakobo akwata pinthu pyonsene pya babathu. Mfuma yonsene ina iye ile, ikhali ya babathu.”" 
Genesis31:2 Pontho iye ene Yakobo adaona kuti makhaliro a Labani kuna iye hakhali ninga mwakale tayu. 
Genesis31:3 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Bwerera kudziko ya babako na abale ako. Ine ndinakhala nawe.”" 
Genesis31:4 Natenepo Yakobo adatumira mphangwa Rakele na Lea kaapanga kuti agumanikane naye m'minda kukhali mikumbi yache kule. 
Genesis31:5 Iye adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ine ndaona kuti makhaliro a babanu kuna ine si ninga mwakale mule tayu. Mbwenye Mulungu wa babanga ambakhala na ine." 
Genesis31:6 Imwe monsene mukudziwa kuti babanu ndamphatira basa na mphamvu zanga zonsene. 
Genesis31:7 Mbwenye iye andinyengeza mbasanduza kupagalwi kwanga kakhumi. Kwache Mulungu hadanditawirise kuti andikuwaze tayu. 
Genesis31:8 Ndzidzi onsene ukhalonga Labani kuti, ‘Kupagalwi kwako kunakhala kukwata mbuzi zamathotho-mathotho,’ mikumbi yonsene idateya ana amathotho-mathotho. Pikhalonga iye kuti, ‘Kupagalwi kwako kunakhala kukwata mbuzi zamisilingi-misilingi,’ mikumbi yonsene idateya ana amisilingi-misilingi." 
Genesis31:9 Mulungu akwata pifuyo pyonsene kupibulusa kuna babanu mbapipereka kuna ine. 
Genesis31:10 “Pandzidzi wakuteya pifuyo, ndidalota ndoto zakuti mabokho akhabebesa ale akhali amisilingi-misilingi, amathotho-mathotho na amadamba-madamba." 
Genesis31:11 Mngelo wa Mulungu adalonga kuna ine kundoto mbati, ‘Yakobo.’ Ine ndidatawira kuti, ‘Ndili pano.’" 
Genesis31:12 Iye adathimiza kulonga kuti, ‘Ngayang'ana mabokho onsene anabebesana ngamisilingi-misilingi, mathotho-mathotho na amadamba-madamba. Ine ndachitisa penepi kuti pichitike thangwi ndaona pyonsene pinakuchitira Labani." 
Genesis31:13 Ine ndine Mulungu ule adakuonekera ku Betele, kule kudaimisa iwe mwala kukhala chikumbuso mbuupereka manja mwanga pakuukhuthulira mafuta aolivi padzulu pache, pontho kule kudadumbira iwe pamaso panga. Chinchino sasanyika ubwerere kudziko kudabalwa iwe.’ ”" 
Genesis31:14 Rakele na Lea adatawira mbati, “Nkhabe pontho chinthu chasala chakuti tinakwata babathu angafa." 
Genesis31:15 Iye ambatichitira pinthu khala ninga ndife alendo. Iye adatisembesa pontho chinchino kobiri zonsene zidasembeswa na ife amala kuzidya. 
Genesis31:16 Mfuma yonsene yakwata Mulungu kubulukira kuna babathu kuipereka kuna ife, njathu na anathu. Chitani pyonsene pyakupangani Mulungu.”" 
Genesis31:17 Natenepo Yakobo adasasanyika pyakwenda kuna babache m'dziko ya Kanani. Iye adakwizika anache na akazache pa ngamila mbazwinga pifuyo pyache pyonsene kwenda patsogolo pache, pontho na pyonsene pikhadagumana iye m'dziko ya Mesopotamia." 
Genesis31:18  
Genesis31:19 Labani akhadenda kachingisa mabirache, natenepo Rakele adaba milungu ya m'nyumba mwa babache." 
Genesis31:20 Yakobo adanyengezambo Labani pakukhonda kumpanga kuti iye akhafuna kuthawa pyache. 
Genesis31:21 Yakobo adakwata pyonsene pikhali na iye mbabuluka mwakuchimbiza. Iye adawambuka mkulo wa Yufurate mbatoma kwenda kudziko ya mapiri ya Gileadi. 
Genesis31:22 Pidagwanda nsiku zitatu Labani adava kuti Yakobo akhadathawa. 
Genesis31:23 Iye adakwata anthu ache mbatewera Yakobo. Iwo adamala nsiku zinomwe m'njira mpakana adamphatira m'dziko ya mapiri ya Gileadi. 
Genesis31:24 Mosiku wenewu Mulungu adalotesa Labani mbampanga mbati, “Chenjera, leka kamthuswa Yakobo na pang'ono pene.”" 
Genesis31:25 Yakobo akhadamanga msasache paphiri, natenepo Labani adamangambo msasache pabodzi na amunache m'dziko ya mapiri ya Gileadi." 
Genesis31:26 Labani adalonga kuna Yakobo mbati, “Udandinyengezeranji tenepa kukwata ananga kwenda nawo pyako ninga akazi akuphatwa kunkhondo?" 
Genesis31:27 Udandinyengezeranji tenepa kubuluka pyako mwakuzemba? Iwe mbudandipanga, ine mbidakugwinya mwadidi na kusekera pontho kuimba pakuphatisa basa pisekese na anyakatangale." 
Genesis31:28 Iwe hudanditawirise tayu kumpsompsona ananga pontho pidzukulu pyanga kugonekana nawo. Pinthu pidachita iwepyo mphyapezi-pezi. 
Genesis31:29 Ine ndina mphamvu zakukuwaza nazo, mbwenye mosiku wa dzulowu Mulungu wa babako andicheuza kuti ndileke kukuthuswa na pang'ono pene." 
Genesis31:30 Ndapidziwa kuti iwe udabuluka thangwi udatchuwa pyakwanga kwanu, apombo udaberanji milungu ya m'nyumba mwanga?”" 
Genesis31:31 Yakobo adatawira mbati, “Ine ndikhagopa kuti munandipokosera ananuwa." 
Genesis31:32 Mbwenye ngakhala munamgumana unango pano kuti ana milungu yanu, weneyo aphiwe. Amunanga ali pano ninga mboni, sakani chinthu chonsene chanu, pontho chinthu chanucho mungachigumana chikwateni.” Yakobo hadapidziwe tayu kuti Rakele akhadaba milungu ya Labani." 
Genesis31:33 Labani adapita mbakayang'ana m'khumbi mwa Yakobo. Kubuluka penepo adapita mwa Lea, na mwa mabitchu ache awiri achikazi ale, kwache monsenemo hadagumanemo milungu yache ile tayu. Kubuluka penepo adapita m'khumbi mwa Rakele." 
Genesis31:34 Rakele akhadakwata milungu ile, mbaiikha m'thumba ya chakukhalira pa ngamila, tenepo iye adaikhalira. Labani adasaka-saka m'khumbi monsene, kwache hadaigumanemo tayu." 
Genesis31:35 Rakele adalonga kuna babache mbati, “Baba, lekani kundizhangalira, mbwenye ine sinakwanisa kuimira pamaso panu tayu thangwi ndili kumwezi.” Labani adasaka-saka, kwache milungu yache hadaigumane tayu." 
Genesis31:36 Natenepo Yakobo adazhangali pyakwanga mbavunza mbati, “Ndakudawiraninji? Ndaswa mwambo wanji wakuti wakupasani mphamvu zakundisaka-saka nazo?" 
Genesis31:37 Chinchino mwasaka-saka monsene muna pinthu pyanga, apo ntchinthu chanji cha m'nyumba chagumana imwe kuti ntchanu? Chiikheni pakwechapa kuti abale anu na amunanga achione, pontho alekeni iwo apitonge kuti mbani pakati pa imwe na ine achita pyadidi." 
Genesis31:38 Ine ndakhala namwe pyaka makumawiri; mabiranu na mbuzi zanu hazidaleke kuteyana tayu. Pontho ine sidadye kamwana mbuzi penu biranu tayu. 
Genesis31:39 Ndzidzi onsene bira angaphatwa na nyama zam'tsanga, ndikhagula ndekha ene inango kubwezera penepo. Ine nee ndikhadza nayo kuna imwe tayu kukuonesani kuti si ine ndidachitisa penepi. Imwe mukhandipagalisa chinthu chonsene chakubiwa, penu chibiwe na masikati penu na mosiku." 
Genesis31:40 Ndzidzi uzinji ndikhaona nyatwa na kupisa kwa dzuwa masikati, pontho na kutonthola mosiku. Ine nee ndikhakwanisa kuona chitulobi." 
Genesis31:41 Penepi pikhali tenepa pyaka pyonsene makumawiri pikhakhala ine na imwe. Pyaka khumi na pinayi ndidakuphatirani basa towera ndisembe ananu awiriwa, pontho pyaka pitanthatu ndidaphata basa, towera mundipasembo pifuyo pyanupi, kwache imwe mwandipunza kupagalwi kwanga kakhumi." 
Genesis31:42 Ngakhala Mulungu wa babanga, Mulungu wa Abrahamu na Isake hakhali nane tayu, imwe mbamudandigwinya kale chimanja-manja. Mbwenye Mulungu adaona kusanyika kwanga na basa yaphata ine, pontho mosiku wa dzulowu adakusumululani.”" 
Genesis31:43 Labani adatawira Yakobo mbati, “Akaziwa mbananga; anawa nganga, pontho pifuyopi mphyanga. Kulonga pyakuona pyonsene pinaona iwe panopi mphyanga. Podi ine sinakwanisa kuchita chinthu na chibodzi chene kuti ndigoswe anangawa na anawo ene tayu," 
Genesis31:44 ndasasanyika kuchita nawe chiverano. Tende tisasanye mulu wa miyala kuti ukhale chikumbuso cha chiverano chathu.” 
Genesis31:45 Natenepo Yakobo adakwata mwala mbauimisa kuti ukhale chikumbuso. 
Genesis31:46 Iye adapanga amunache kuti asasanye mulu unango wa miyala. Tenepo iwo adadya pyakudya pyawo m'khundu-khundu mwa mulu wa miyala ule. 
Genesis31:47 Labani adauthula mulu ule Yegara-Sahaduta, mbwenye Yakobo adauthula Galedi." 
Genesis31:48 Labani adalonga kuna Yakobo mbati, “Mulu wa miyalawu ndiye unakhala chikumbuso kuna tonsenefe.” Ndi thangwi yache mbuto ile idathulwa Galedi." 
Genesis31:49 Labani adalonga pontho mbati, “MBUYA mbaone pinachita ife tonsene pinalekana ife unango na mwanzache.” Natenepo mbuto ile idathulwa pontho Mizipa." 
Genesis31:50 Labani adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Ngakhala unakavuya anangawa penu kusemba akazi anango, podi kwene kuti ine ndikhonde kupidziwa, mbwenye ukumbuke kuti Mulungu akutiona." 
Genesis31:51 Miyala yamuluka ine pakati pa iwe na ine njishi, pontho mwala wakuti ukhale chikumbuso ngufu." 
Genesis31:52 Pyonsene piwiri, mulu wa miyala na mwala wachikumbuso mphyakutikumbusa. Ine nkhabe gwanda kupiringana muluwu kukusosa tayu. Iwembo leka kugwanda kupiringana mulu wenewu, penu mwala wa chikumbuso kundisosa." 
Genesis31:53 Mulungu wa Abrahamu na Mulungu wa Nahori ndiye anakhala mtongi pakati pathu.” Tenepo na dzina ya Mulungu, ambapembedza Isake babache ule, Yakobo adadumbira kuti anakoya chiverano chile." 
Genesis31:54 Iye adapha nyama mbaipereka nsembe paphiri. Natenepo adachemera amunache kadya. Pidamala iwo kudya adagona paphiri ponthopo. 
Genesis31:55 Bzobzo mangwana mwache, Labani adampsompsona ana achikazi ale, pontho na pidzukulu pyache kugonekana nawo. Kubuluka penepo adalamuka mbabwerera kwawo." 
Genesis32:1 Pikhaenda Yakobo kwawo, angelo anango adagumanikana naye." 
Genesis32:2 Pidaaona iye, adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ino ndi gulu ya Mulungu.” Natenepo mbuto ile idaithula Mahanaimu." 
Genesis32:3 Yakobo adatuma patsogolo pache anyamphangwa kuna nanache, Esau, ku Seiri, dziko ya Edomu." 
Genesis32:4 Iye adaapanga mbati, “Imwe mwathema kalonga ipi kuna mbuyanga Esau: ‘Nyabasanu Yakobo alonga kuti ine ndikhakhala na Labani, pontho ndakhala naye mpakana lero." 
Genesis32:5 Ndina ng'ombe, mabulu, mabira, mbuzi, na mabitchu achimuna na achikazi. Lero ine ndikutuma mphangwa zenezi kuna imwe, mbuyanga, towera mundikomere mtima.’ ”" 
Genesis32:6 Pidabwerera anyamphangwa ale kuna Yakobo, adalonga mbati, “Ife tidenda kuna nananu Esau, tenepo chinchino pano akubwera dzagumanikane namwe. Iye ali pabodzi na amuna madzana manayi.”" 
Genesis32:7 Yakobo akhali na mantha, pontho akhaswipa mtima. Iye adagawa anthu akhali na iye ale m'magulu awiri mbachita chibodzi-bodzi na mabirache, ng'ombe zache na ngamila zache." 
Genesis32:8 Iye adanyerezera kuti, “Ngakhala Esau anasosa gulu ibodzi, gulu inango yakusalayi inakwanisa kuthawa.”" 
Genesis32:9 Natenepo Yakobo adapemphera mbati, “Mulungu wa mbuyanga Abrahamu, Mulungu wa babanga Isake, ndivesereni, MBUYA, ule adalonga kuna ine mbati, ‘Bwerera kudziko ya kwanu na ya abale ako, pontho ndinachitisa pinthu pyako pyonsene kukufambira mwadidi.’" 
Genesis32:10 Ine nyabasanu, ndine munthu okhonda thema kuoneswa kundifuna kwanu kokhonda mala pontho kukhulupirika kwanu konsene. Pikhawambuka ine mkulo wa Yorodani, ndikhali kwene na mthondodzo m'manja mwanga, mbwenye lero ndasanduka magulu mawiri." 
Genesis32:11 Ndikupemphera kuti mundipulumuse m'manja mwa nananga Esau, thangwi ndikugopa kuti mwinango anadza pabodzi pene na akazache pontho anache kutisosa mbativunga tonsenefe." 
Genesis32:12 Mbwenye imwe mudandipanga kuti, ‘Ine ndinati ndichitise pinthu pyako kufamba mwadidi, pontho ndinachitisa pidzukulu pyako kuinjipa ninga tchetcha ya pagombe yakuti nee inakwanisika lengeseka tayu.’ ”" 
Genesis32:13 Pidagona iwo penepo mosiku wenewo, Yakobo adasankhula kubulukira pa pifuyo pyache kuti pikhale mtukwa kuna nanache Esau; mathunzwi madzana mawiri na mabokho makumawiri, mabira achikazi madzana mawiri na achimuna makumawiri, ngamila zamkaka na anawo ene makumatatu, ng'ombe zikazi makumanayi, pontho mikono khumi, pontho mabulu achikazi makumawiri na achimuna khumi." 
Genesis32:14  
Genesis32:15  
Genesis32:16 Iye adapigawa malingana na mtundu wache mbaikha nyabasache mbodzi pa mkumbi onsene kuuyang'anira. Iye adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ndokoni patsogolo panga, pontho musiye mbuto pakati pa mkumbi na mkumbi.”" 
Genesis32:17 Iye adapanga nyabasache wakutoma mbati, “Ungagumanikana na nananga Esau mbakuvunza kuti, ‘Mbuyako mbani? Ukwenda kupi? Pifuyo pili patsogolo pakopi mphyani?’" 
Genesis32:18 Wathema kutawira kuti, ‘Penepi mphya nyabasanu Yakobo. Iye apitumiza kuti pikhale mtukwa kuna mbuyache Esau. Yakobo ene mwenechiroache ali m'ndulimu.’ ”" 
Genesis32:19 Iye adalonga chibodzi-bodzi kuna nyabasa wachiwiri, wachitatu na kuna anango onsene, ale akhali anyakuyang'anira mikumbi ile mbati, “Imwe mwathema kulonga tenepa:" 
Genesis32:20 ‘Ande, nyabasanu Yakobo ali m'ndulimu.’ ” Yakobo akhanyerezera kuti, “Na mitukwayi ndinamkhuludza mtima Esau, pontho ndingagumanikana naye mwinango anandilekerera.”" 
Genesis32:21 Iye adatumiza mitukwa ile patsogolo pache, mbwenye iye ene mwenechiro adagona pamsasapo." 
Genesis32:22 Mosiku onthowo Yakobo adalamuka mbakwata akazache awiri na mabitchu achikazi awiri, pontho na anache khumi na mbodzi ale, mbawambuka mkulo wa Yaboki." 
Genesis32:23 Pidamala iye kuawambusa, iye adawambusa pontho pyonsene pikhali na iye," 
Genesis32:24 mbwenye iye adasalira yekha ene m'nduli. Tenepo munthu unango adadza mbathimbana naye mpakana m'makalakwecha. 
Genesis32:25 Pidaona munthu ule kuti iye akhachimwana kumkunda, adamenya nswukundu ya Yakobo, tenepo mwendo wa Yakobo adabzuguduka pikhathimbana iwo." 
Genesis32:26 Munthu ule adalonga kuna Yakobo mbati, “Ndileke ndiende, kunja kukuchena uku.” Yakobo adatawira mbati, “Nkhabe, ungakhonda kunditsanzayisa sinakuleka tayu.”" 
Genesis32:27 Munthu ule adavunza mbati, “Dzinako mbani?” Yakobo adatawira mbati, “Ndine Yakobo.”" 
Genesis32:28 Munthu ule adatawira mbati, “Dzinako hinakhalave Yakobo tayu. Iwe wathimbana na Mulungu, pontho na anthu mbuakunda, natenepo dzinako inakhala Israele.”" 
Genesis32:29 Yakobo adalonga mbati, “Ngandipangenimbo dzinanu.” Mbwenye iye adatawira mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji unafuna kudziwa dzinanga?” Tenepo iye adamtsanzayisa Yakobo." 
Genesis32:30 Yakobo adalonga mbati, “Ndaona Mulungu maso na maso, kwache ndina moyo.” Natenepo mbuto ile adaithula Peniele." 
Genesis32:31 Pikhabuluka Yakobo pa Peniele, dzuwa idabuluka. Natenepo iye akhatchikhama, thangwi ya nswukundu yache." 
Genesis32:32 Kutomera penepo mpakana lero anthu a ku Israele nkhabe kudya uzingo wa nswukundu tayu, thangwi Yakobo adamenywa chifupi pa uzingo wenewo." 
Genesis33:1 Pidaona Yakobo kuti Esau akubwera pabodzi na amunache madzana manayi ale, iye adagawa ana ale kuna Lea, Rakele na kuna mabitchu achikazi awiri ale." 
Genesis33:2 Iye adakwata mabitchu achikazi awiri ale mbaaikha patsogolo pabodzi na anawo ene; kubuluka penepo Lea na anache, pakumalisira Rakele na Yosefe." 
Genesis33:3 Yakobo adenda patsogololetu pa onsenewo mbalamba kanomwe pikhafika iye chifupi na mbaleache. 
Genesis33:4 Mbwenye Esau adathamanga kagumanikana naye, iye adamkhumbatira mbampsompsona. Onsene awiri akhalira." 
Genesis33:5 Pidamwaza-mwaza Esau maso mbaona akazi na anawo ene, adavunza mbati, “Anthu ana iwewa mbani?” Yakobo adatawira mbati, “Enewa mbana ale apereka Mulungu kuna ine, nyabasanu, thangwi ya kundikomera kwache mtima.”" 
Genesis33:6 Tenepo mabitchu achikazi pabodzi pene na anawo adafika mbalamba. 
Genesis33:7 Kubuluka penepo adafika Lea na anache, pakumalisira pache adafika Rakele na mwanache Yosefe mbalamba." 
Genesis33:8 Esau adavunza mbati, “Apombo gulu inango idagumanikana na ine ile? Penepile pikufuna kulonganji?” Yakobo adatawira mbati, “Penepile mphyakuti mundikomere napyo mtima, mbuyanga.”" 
Genesis33:9 Esau adatawira mbati, “Mbaleanga, ine ndili napyo pyakukwana; koya pina iwepi.”" 
Genesis33:10 Yakobo adalonga mbati, “Nkhabe, ndaphata miyendo ngakhala mwandikomera mtima tambirani mitukwanga. Kuona kwene nkhope yanu, kuna ine kwakhala ninga ndikuona nkhope ya Mulungu, podi imwe mwaonesa kukoma kwanu mtima kuna ine." 
Genesis33:11 Ndaphata miyendo, tambirani mtukwa wabwera na ine kuna imwewu; Mulungu andikomera mtima, tenepo andipasa pyakusowa pyanga pyonsene.” Yakobo adathimiza kumdembetera mpakana iye adatambira." 
Genesis33:12 Esau adalonga mbati, “Mbatisasanyikeni pyakwenda. Ndinatsogola ndine.”" 
Genesis33:13 Yakobo adatawira mbati, “Imwe mukudziwa kuti ana anangowa ngang'ono, pontho ndathema kunyerezera pifuyo pyonsene pinayamwisa anawopi. Ngakhala ipyo pinafambiswa mwakuthamanga, podi ikhale nsiku ene ibodzi, pifuyo pyonsene pinamala kufa." 
Genesis33:14 Ndaphata miyendo, mbuyanga, imwe tsogolani, ine ndinakutewereni pang'ono-pang'ono kufamba ninga munakwanisira ine na pifuyopi, pontho na ana mpakana ndikugumaneni mu Seiri.”" 
Genesis33:15 Esau adalonga mbati, “Nditawirise kuti amunanga anango usale nawo.” Mbwenye Yakobo adatawira mbati, “Nkhabe funika kuchita tenepo; chikhafuna ine kwene ntchakuti mundikomere mtima.”" 
Genesis33:16 Natenepo nsiku yeneyo, Esau adautoma ulendo wakubwerera ku Seiri." 
Genesis33:17 Mbwenye Yakobo adenda ku Sukoti, kule kudakamanga iye nyumbache na mathanga kuti pifuyo pyache pikhalamo. Ndi thangwi yache mbutoyi idathulwa Sukoti." 
Genesis33:18 Pikhadabwerera Yakobo kubulukira ku Mesopotamia, iye adafika mwadidi mwene kumzinda wa Shekemu, m'dziko ya Kanani, mbamanga msasache m'munda chifupi na mzindawo." 
Genesis33:19 Iye adaugula munda ule kubulukira kuna pidzukulu pya Hamori, babawo Shekemu, na kobiri zasiliva zakukwana dzana ibodzi." 
Genesis33:20 Kweneko iye adamanga guwa yansembe mbaithula Eli, Mulungu wa Israele." 
Genesis34:1 Nsiku inango Dina, mwana wamkazi wa Lea na Yakobo, adenda kacheza na akazi a mu Kanani." 
Genesis34:2 Shekemu, mwana Hamori wa Chihivi, ule akhali mfumu wa nthemba yeneyo, pidaona iye Dina, adamphatirira." 
Genesis34:3 Mtimache udakwatika naye Dina, mwana Yakobo. Iye adamfuna pyakwanga mtsikanayo mwakuti adalonga naye mafala akutapira." 
Genesis34:4 Natenepo Shekemu adalonga kuna Hamori babache mbati, “Ndisemberenimbo mtsikanayi kuti akhale mkazanga.”" 
Genesis34:5 Yakobo adava kuti mwanache wamkazi Dina aswipiswa. Podi anache achimuna akhadenda kumunda na pifuyo, iye adamatama pyache mpakana iwo onsene adabwerera kumusa." 
Genesis34:6 Natenepo Hamori, babache Shekemu, adenda kalonga na Yakobo." 
Genesis34:7 Sindzidzi pidava ana a Yakobo pidachitika pile, adafika kumusa kubulukira kuminda. Iwo adatutumuka napyo mbazhangali pyakwanga thangwi Shekemu akhadachita chinthu chakuchitisa manyadzo pyakwanga mu Israele pakuphatirira mwana wamkazi wa Yakobo, chinthu chakuti nee chidatheme kuchitika tayu." 
Genesis34:8 Mbwenye Hamori adalonga mbati, “Mwananga Shekemu mtimache onsene wagona pana mwananuyi. Ine ndaphata miyendo, mpaseni mtsikanayi kuti akhale mkazache." 
Genesis34:9 Tendeni tisemberane; imwe musembe anathu, ifembo tisembe ananu." 
Genesis34:10 Imwe munakwanisa kukhala pakati pathu; munakwanisa kukhala pambuto yonsene inafuna imwe; khalani mwenemo, chitanimo malondanu mbamukhale na pinthu pyanu pene.”" 
Genesis34:11 Tenepo Shekemu adalonga kuna babache Dina na kuna nkhoswe zache mbati, “Ndikomerenimbo mtima ine, pontho ndinati ndikupaseni pyonsene pinafuna imwe." 
Genesis34:12 Ndipangeni konta ya chuma, pontho longani mitukwa inafuna imwe, tenepo ndinati ndikupagalini chonsene chinalonga imwe. Chinafuna ine chene ntchakuti mundipase mtsikanayi kuti akhale mkazanga.”" 
Genesis34:13 Na thangwi yakuti Dina akhadaswipiswa, ana achimuna a Yakobo akhatawira Shekemu, pontho na Hamori, babache Shekemuyo mwakuanyengeza." 
Genesis34:14 Iwo adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ife nkhabe kwanisa chita chinthu ninga chenechi tayu. Ife nkhabe kwanisa kusembesa nyamaingathu kuna mamuna okhonda gwandwa nsonga yachimuna; kweneku nkhutichitisa manyadzo." 
Genesis34:15 Ife tinakwanisa kuphatizana namwe ngakhala munatawira chinthu chibodzi, kuti imwe mukhale ninga ife pakugwanda nsonga zakumaso amunanu onsene." 
Genesis34:16 Tenepo tinakutawirisani kusemba anathu, ifembo tinasemba ananu. Tinakhazikika pakati panu mbatikhala anthu abodzi na imwe." 
Genesis34:17 Mbwenye ngakhala munakhonda kugwandwa nsonga, ife tinamkwata nyamaingathu mbatienda pyathu.”" 
Genesis34:18 Pikhalonga iwopyo pidaoneka pyadidi pamaso pa Hamori na mwanache Shekemu. 
Genesis34:19 Mphale, ule akhali wakulemedzwa pyakwanga kupiringana anthu onsene a pabanja pawo, hadavunge ndzidzi kuchita pidalonga iwopyo tayu, thangwi iye akhamfuna pyakwanga mwana Yakobo." 
Genesis34:20 Natenepo Hamori na mwanache Shekemu adenda kumsuwo wa mpanda wa mzindawo kalonga na anzawo a mumzindamo. 
Genesis34:21 Iwo adalonga mbati, “Anthuwa mbadidi. Tendeni tiatawirise kukhala m'dziko mwathu muno, pontho achitemo malondawo. Dzikoyi njikulu; anakwanisa kukhalambo. Ife tinakwanisa kusemba anawo, iwombo mbasemba anathu." 
Genesis34:22 Mbwenye iwo anatawira kukhala nafe ninga anthu abodzi, ngakhala ife amuna tonsene tinagwandwa nsonga zakumaso ninga mumbachitira iwo." 
Genesis34:23 Ayi pifuyo pyawo na pyonsene pina iwo pinakhala pyathu tayu? Apo tendeni tiphatizane nawo, towera akhale pakati pathu.”" 
Genesis34:24 Amuna onsene ale akhadenda kumsuwo wa mzinda, adatawirizana napyo pidalonga Hamori na mwanache Shekemu, natenepo mwana wamamuna onsene mumzindamo adagwandwa nsonga yachimuna." 
Genesis34:25 Pidagwanda nsiku zitatu, mtswotswo wa amuna ale udzati mala tayu, ana awiri a Yakobo, Simioni na Levi, nkhoswe zache Dina, adakwata matalasadawo mbapita mumzindamo mwakukhonda oniwa na anthu mbapha amuna onsene" 
Genesis34:26 pabodzi pene na Hamori, pontho mwanache Shekemu. Natenepo adamkwata Dina kumbulusa m'nyumba mwa Shekemu mbaenda pyawo." 
Genesis34:27 Pidamala iwo kupha amuna a mumzindamo, ana anango achimuna a Yakobo adadza mbasakaza mzinda onsene kubwezera kuswipiswa kudachitwa nyamaingawo Dina." 
Genesis34:28 Iwo adakwata mabira, ng'ombe, mabulu na pyonsene pya mumzindamo, pontho na pya kumunda." 
Genesis34:29 Iwo adakwata pyakufunika pyonsene, pontho adakwata akazi na ana ene mwakuakhakhamiza mbatswairiratu m'nyumba zawo zonsene mbakhonda kusiya na chibodzi chene." 
Genesis34:30 Yakobo adalonga kuna Simioni na Levi mbati, “Mwandipolomolera nyatwa; chinchino Akanani na Aperizi, pontho na onsene ali m'dziko muno anati andizonde. Ine nkhabe amuna azinji; iwo angagumanyikana pabodzi kumenyana na ine, banjathu yonsene inavungika.”" 
Genesis34:31 Mbwenye iwo adatawira mbati, “Ife nkhabe yang'ana kwene nyamaingathu kuseluswa ninga puta tayu.”" 
Genesis35:1 Mulungu adalonga kuna Yakobo mbati, “Ndokoletu ku Betele mbukakhazikike kweneko. Pontho ukandimangireko guwa yansembe, ule ndidakuonekera pikhathawa iwe pamaso pa mbaleako Esau.”" 
Genesis35:2 Natenepo Yakobo adalonga kuna banjache yonsene na kuna akhali na iye ale mbati, “Bulusani milungu yachilendo ina imweyi, pontho mupichenese mwekha ene mbamuvale nguwo zakuchena." 
Genesis35:3 Kubuluka penepo tendeni ku Betele, kule kunafuna ine kamangira Mulungu guwa yansembe; Mulungu ule adava kupempha kwanga pansiku ya nyatwa zanga, pontho ule ambakhala na ine konsene kunaenda ine.”" 
Genesis35:4 Natenepo iwo adapereka milungu yachilendo ikhali na iwo, pontho mphete zikhavala iwo m'makutu mwawo kuna Yakobo. Tenepo iye adapikwata mbapifikhira pansi pa muti wamthundu chifupi na Shekemu." 
Genesis35:5 Pikhatoma iye na anache ulendo wawo, anthu akhakhala muluwani ya chifupi na iwo ale adaphatwa na mantha pyakwanga mwakuti iwo hadaathamangiseve tayu." 
Genesis35:6 Yakobo pabodzi na anthu ache onsene adadza kuluwani ya Luzi, kule chinchino kumbadziwika na dzina yakuti Betele, m'dziko ya Kanani." 
Genesis35:7 Kweneko adamanga guwa yansembe, tenepo mbutoyo adaithula Eli Betele, thangwi mphenepo padamuonekera Mulungu pikhathawa iye pamaso pa mbaleache Esau." 
Genesis35:8 Debora, makayayache Rebeka, adafa mbamuikha pansi pa muti wamthundu kumwera kwa Betele. Natenepo mutiwo udathulwa “Mthundu wa chiliro.”" 
Genesis35:9 Pidabwerera Yakobo kubulukira ku Mesopotamia, Mulungu adamuonekera pontho mbamtsanzayisa." 
Genesis35:10 Mulungu adalonga mbati, “Dzinako ndi Yakobo, mbwenye kutomera lero kwenda m'tsogolo dzinako inakhala Israele.” Natenepo Mulungu adamthula Israele." 
Genesis35:11 Tenepo Mulungu adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ine ndine Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene. Khala na ana azinji. Madzinza anabulukira muna iwepo, pontho mafumu anabulukira muna iwepo." 
Genesis35:12 Ine ndinati ndikupase dziko idapasa ine Abrahamu na Isake, pontho ndinaipasa pidzukulu pyako iwe ungafa.”" 
Genesis35:13 Tenepo Mulungu adenda mbasiya Yakobo ponthopo. 
Genesis35:14 Yakobo adaimisa mwala wa chikumbuso pambuto pakhadalonga iye na Mulungu pale, pontho kuichitisa kukhala yakupambulika pakukhuthulirapo vinyu na mafuta aolivi." 
Genesis35:15 Mbutoyo adaithula Betele. 
Genesis35:16 Yakobo na banjache adabuluka ku Betele. Pikhadasala iwo na kansinzo kuti afike ku Efurata, ndzidzi wache Rakele wakuti abale mwana ukhadamkwanira. Tenepo iye adanenseka pyakwanga pikhabuluka mwanayo." 
Genesis35:17 Pidandendeya mtswotswowo, nyakumbazika adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Rakele, leka swipa mtima, ndi mwana wamamuna pontho.”" 
Genesis35:18 Pikhathatha iye na imfa, mwanacheyo adamthula Benoni. Mbwenye babache mwanayo adamthula Benjemani." 
Genesis35:19 Pidafa Rakele adaikhwa m'khundu mwa njira yakwendera ku Efurata, kule chinchino kumbadziwika na dzina yakuti Betelehemu." 
Genesis35:20 Yakobo adaimisa mwala wa chikumbuso panthumbipo. Na lero mwalawo uli penepo kuonesa nthumbi ya Rakele. 
Genesis35:21 Yakobo adafedza patsogolo kukhundu inango ya nsanja ya Ederi. 
Genesis35:22 Pikhakhala Israele m'dziko mule, Rubeni adapita m'bonde na Biliha, mkazi wachibitchu wa babache. Yakobo adava penepi mbazhangali napyo. Yakobo akhali na ana khumi na awiri." 
Genesis35:23 Ana a Lea mbawa: Rubeni (mwana wautombo wa Yakobo), Simioni, Levi, Yuda, Isakara na Zebuloni." 
Genesis35:24 Ana a Rakele mbawa: Yosefe na Benjemani. 
Genesis35:25 Ana a Biliha, bitchu wamkazi wa Rakele, mbawa: Dani na Nafitali." 
Genesis35:26 Ana a Zilipa, bitchu wamkazi wa Lea, mbawa: Gadi na Asheri. Ana enewa adabalwa mu Mesopotamia." 
Genesis35:27 Yakobo adenda kuna Isake babache pa Mamure, penu Kiriati-Ariba, ule pontho ndi Hebroni, kule kukhakhala Abrahamu pabodzi pene na Isake." 
Genesis35:28 Isake adafa uku ana pyaka dzana na makumasere, pontho akhadakulupala mwadidi. Tenepo anache Esau na Yakobo adenda kamuikha m'masiye babawo." 
Genesis35:29  
Genesis36:1 Ipi mphidzukulu pya Esau wakuchemerwa pontho Edomu. 
Genesis36:2 Esau adasemba akazi a mu Kanani: Ada, mwana Eloni wa Chihiti; Oholibama mwana Anahi, mdzukuluache Zibeoni wa Chihivi," 
Genesis36:3 na Basemati, mwana Ishimaele, pontho ule ndi nyamaingache Nebaioti." 
Genesis36:4 Ada adabala Elifazi; Basemati adabala Reuele; 
Genesis36:5 Oholibama adabalambo Yeushi, Yalamu na Kora. Ana achimuna onsenewa babawo akhali Esau. Iwo adabalwa m'dziko ya Kanani." 
Genesis36:6 Tenepo Esau adakwata akazache, anache achimuna na achikazi ene, anthu onsene akhali na iye, pifuyo pyache pyonsene pontho na pyonsene pidagumana iye m'dziko ya Kanani mbaenda kudziko inango kutali na mbaleache Yakobo." 
Genesis36:7 Iye adabuluka thangwi dziko ikhakhala iye pabodzi na Yakobo hikhali yakukwana tayu, thangwi onsene awiri akhali na pifuyo pizinji, natenepo nee mbadakwanisa kukhala pabodzi pene tayu." 
Genesis36:8 Natenepo Esau adakhala m'dziko ya mapiri ya Seiri. 
Genesis36:9 Ipi mphidzukulu pya Esau, kholo wa Aedomu ale akhakhala m'dziko ya mapiri ya Seiri." 
Genesis36:10 Ada, mkazi Esau, adabala mwana mbodzi basi wamamuna dzinache Elifazi; tenepo Elifazi akhali na ana ashanu achimuna: Temani, Omara, Zefo, Gatamu na Kenazi. Pontho mkazache unango dzinache Timina akhali na mwana unango wamamuna dzinache Amaleki. Basemati, mkazi Esau, adabala mwana mbodzi basi wamamuna dzinache Reuele. Tenepo Reuele akhali na ana anayi achimuna: Nahati, Zera, Shama na Miza." 
Genesis36:11  
Genesis36:12  
Genesis36:13  
Genesis36:14 Oholibama, mkazi Esau wachitatu, mwana Anahi, pontho mdzukuluache wa Zibeoni, adabala ana atatu achimuna: Yeushi, Yalamu na Kora." 
Genesis36:15 Awa ndi mafumu akubulukira muna Esau. Mwana Esau wautombo dzinache Elifazi ndiye akhali kholo wa mafumu awa: Temani, Omara, Zefo, Kenazi," 
Genesis36:16 Kora, Gatamu na Amaleki. Pyonsenepi ndiye pikhali pidzukulu pya Esau na mkazache Ada." 
Genesis36:17 Mwana Esau dzinache Reuele ndiye akhali kholo wa mafumu awa: Nahati, Zera, Shama na Miza. Pyonsenepi ndiye pikhali pidzukulu pya Esau na mkazache Basemati." 
Genesis36:18 Mafumu ali m'tchindemu mbana a Esau na mkazache Oholibama, mwana Anahi: Yeushi, Yalamu na Kora." 
Genesis36:19 Mafumu onsenewa adabulukira muna Esau. 
Genesis36:20 Awa mbana achimuna a Seiri wa Chihori, ale akhakhala m'nthemba mule: Lotani, Shobali, Zibeoni, Anahi," 
Genesis36:21 Dishoni, Ezeri na Dishoni. Ana enewa a Seiri mu Edomu akhali mafumu a Chihori." 
Genesis36:22 Lotani adabala ana awiri achimuna, Hori na Hemani. Lotani akhali na nyamainga dzinache Timina." 
Genesis36:23 Shobali adabala ana achimuna Alivani, Manahati, Ebali, Shefo na Onamu." 
Genesis36:24 Zibeoni adabala ana achimuna Aia na Anahi. Anahi weneyu ngule adagumana mchera wa madzi akupisa m'thando yatchetcha pandzidzi ukhadyesa iye mabulu a babache Zibeoni. 
Genesis36:25 Anahi adabala mwana wamamuna dzinache Dishoni, pontho mwana wamkazi dzinache Oholibama." 
Genesis36:26 Dishoni adabala ana anayi achimuna, Hemidani, Eshibani, Ithirani na Kerani." 
Genesis36:27 Ezeri adabala ana atatu achimuna, Bilihani, Zaavani, na Akani." 
Genesis36:28 Dishani adabala ana awiri achimuna, Uzi na Arani." 
Genesis36:29 Mafumu a Chihori mbawa: Lotani, Shobali, Zibeoni, Ana, Dishoni, Ezeri na Dishani. Enewa ndiye akhali mafumu a Chihori malingana na mbumba zawo m'dziko ya Seiri." 
Genesis36:30  
Genesis36:31 Mafumu, ale akhatonga mu Edomu, mfumu wa Israele adzati tonga tayu mbawa:" 
Genesis36:32 Bela mwana Beori ndiye akhali mfumu wa Edomu. Mzindache udathulwa Dinihaba. 
Genesis36:33 Pidafa Bela, Yobabu, mwana Zera wa kumzinda wa Bozira ndiye adapita m'mbuto mwache."
