Genesis36:34 Pidafa Yobabu, mwana Hushamu wa kunthemba ya Temani ndiye adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache." 
Genesis36:35 Pidafa Hushamu, Hadadi, mwana Bedadi ule adakunda Amidiani m'dziko ya Moabu ndiye adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache. Mzindache udathulwa Aviti." 
Genesis36:36 Pidafa Hadadi, Samula, wa ku Masireka ndiye adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache." 
Genesis36:37 Pidafa Samula, Shauli, wa ku Rehoboti, gombe ya mkulo wa Yufurate, ndiye adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache." 
Genesis36:38 Pidafa Shauli, Baala-Hanani, mwana Akibori ndiye adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache." 
Genesis36:39 Pidafa Baala-Hanani, mwana Akibori, Hadari ndiye adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache. Mzindache udathulwa Pau. Pontho dzina ya mkazache ikhali Mehetabele mwana Matiredi mdzukuluache Mezahabu." 
Genesis36:40 Madzina a mafumu akubalwa na Esau malingana na mbumba pontho nthembache mbawa: Timina, Aliva, Yeteti," 
Genesis36:41 Oholibama, Ela, Pinoni," 
Genesis36:42 Kenazi, Temani, Mibizari," 
Genesis36:43 Magidiele na Iramu. Enewa ndiye akhali mafumu a Edomu malingana na kukhazikika kwawo m'dziko ikhakhala iwo. Esau akhali kholo wa Aedomu. 
Genesis37:1 Yakobo adathimiza kukhala m'dziko ya Kanani kukhakhala babache kule; 
Genesis37:2 tenepo mbiri ya banjache Yakobo njishi. Yosefe mwana mphale wa pyaka khumi na pinomwe akhadyesa mabira a babache pabodzi pene na abale ache, ana a Biliha na Zilipa, akazi achibitchu a babache. Iye akhadza na mphangwa zakuipa kuna babache zakulonga pinthu pikhachita abale ache." 
Genesis37:3 Yakobo akhamfuna pyakwanga Yosefe kupiringana anache onsene, thangwi iye adabalwa mwenemo Yakobo akalamba kale. Tenepo iye adamsasanyira mkhanjo wakulapha wakukhala na mikono." 
Genesis37:4 Pidaona abale ache kuti babawo akhamfuna pyakwanga Yosefe kupiringana iwo onsene, adamzonda mwakuti iwo hakhalongave naye mafala adidi tayu." 
Genesis37:5 Mosiku unango Yosefe adalota, natenepo pidapilonga iye kuna abale ache, iwo ndiye adanyanyiratu kumzonda." 
Genesis37:6 Iye adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ngavani ndoto zalota ine mosikuzi." 
Genesis37:7 Tonsene tikhali m'munda kumanga misumbu yathu ya tirigu. Mwakututumusa mtolo wanga udaimira dzololo, mbwenye misumbu yanu idadza mbizungulira msumbu wanga mbaulambira.”" 
Genesis37:8 Abale ache adamvunza mbati, “Kadi iwe ukunyerezera kuti unakhala mfumu mbutitonga?” Natenepo iwo ndiye adanyanyiratu kumzonda, thangwi ya ndoto zachezo pontho na pikhalonga iye pya iwo." 
Genesis37:9 Kubuluka penepo Yosefe adalota pontho ndoto zinango mbaapanga abale ache mbati, “Ine ndalota ndoto zinango. Ndidaona dzuwa, mwezi na nyenyezi khumi na ibodzi zikundilambira.”" 
Genesis37:10 Iye adazilonga pontho ndoto zachezo kuna babache. Tenepo babache adamsumulula mbati, “Ndoto zenezi nsamtundu wanji? Kadi iwe ukunyerezera kuti ine, mako na abale ako ene tinabwera pamaso pako mbatikulambira?”" 
Genesis37:11 Abale ache adaipirwa naye, mbwenye babache adakoya pyonsenepi mumtima mwache." 
Genesis37:12 Nsiku inango pikhadenda abale ache Yosefe kumzinda wa Shekemu kudyesa mabira a babawo," 
Genesis37:13 Yakobo adalonga kuna Yosefe mbati, “Ndinafuna kuti uende ku Shekemu kunadyesa abale ako mabira kule.” Yosefe adatawira mbati, “Ande, ndasasanyika.”" 
Genesis37:14 Babacheyo adalonga mbati, “Ndoko ukaone ngakhala abale ako na mabira ene ali pyadidi. Ungamala ubwerere undipange.” Natenepo adamgwinya kubulukira m'phedi ya Hebroni. Yosefe adafika ku Shekemu," 
Genesis37:15 tenepo pidamuona munthu unango akutsalakatika m'minda, adamvunza mbati, “Unasakanji?”" 
Genesis37:16 Iye adatawira mbati, “Ndikusaka abale anga akudyesa mabira ale. Kadi munakwanisa kundipangambo kuna iwo?”" 
Genesis37:17 Munthu ule adatawira mbati, “Iwo abulukako kale kuno, mbwenye ndikhaava kulonga pyakwenda kuluwani ya Dotani.” Natenepo Yosefe adenda kuna abale ache mbaagumana ku Dotani." 
Genesis37:18 Abale ache adamuona na pakansinzo akudza, tenepo iye mbadzati fika, iwo adaverana pyakumpha." 
Genesis37:19 Iwo adalonga kuna unango na mwanzache mbati, “Nyandoto ule uyo anadzayo." 
Genesis37:20 Tendeni timphe, mtembo wache tiuponye mumchera ubodzi wakusowa madzi. Tinakwanisa kalonga kuti adyiwa na pirombo pyam'tsanga. Tenepo tinati tione pinafuna chita ndoto zache.”" 
Genesis37:21 Pidapiva Rubeni, adayesera kumpulumusa Yosefe m'manja mwawo mbalonga mbati, “Mbatilekeni kumpha." 
Genesis37:22 Lekani chuchisa chiropa chache, mbwenye mponyeni kwene muchera m'thando yatchetcha muno mbamukhonda kumkuwaza.” Iye adalonga penepi na manyerezero akufuna kupulumusa Yosefe m'manja mwawo na kumbwezera kuna babache." 
Genesis37:23 Pidafika Yosefe pana abale ache pale, iwo amdula mkhanjo ule, mkhanjo wakulapha wakukhala na mikono." 
Genesis37:24 Kubuluka penepo adamkwata mbamponya mumchera wakusowa madzi. 
Genesis37:25 Pidakhala iwo pansi kudya, adakwiza maso awo mbaona gulu ya Aishimaele ikudza kubulukira ku Gileadi kwenda ku Iguputo. Ngamila zawo zidathukula mitolo ya pinthu pyakukomesa muliwo na pyakununkhira." 
Genesis37:26 Yuda adalonga kuna abale ache mbati, “Ife tinaganyalinji tingampha mbaleathu, chiropa chache mbatichifikhira." 
Genesis37:27 Tendeni timgulise kuna Aishimaelewa, towera tileke kumkuwaza, pontho weneyu ndi mbaleathu chadi-chadi; ndife manungo, pontho chiropa chibodzi.” Abale ache ale adatawirizana napyo." 
Genesis37:28 Tenepo pidadza anyamalonda a Chimidiani chifupi, abale ache adambulusira Yosefe kunja kwa mchera mbamgulisa na kobiri zasiliva zakukwana makumawiri kuna Aishimaele. Iwo adamkwata mbaenda naye ku Iguputo." 
Genesis37:29 Pidabwerera Rubeni kumchera kule, adasuzumira mbagumanamo kuti Yosefe nkhabemo, tenepo adang'amba nguwo zache, thangwi ya kupha mtima." 
Genesis37:30 Iye adenda kuna abale ache mbalonga mbati, “Mphale ule nkhabemo! Apo ndinachita tani?”" 
Genesis37:31 Natenepo iwo adapha mbuzi mbakwata mkhanjo wa Yosefewo mbaubizika m'chiropa cha mbuzi chile. 
Genesis37:32 Iwo adakwata mkhanjo ule mbaenda nawo kuna babawo mbakalonga mbati, “Tagumana ichi. Ayi chenechi si cha mwananu tayu?”" 
Genesis37:33 Yakobo adachidzindikira mbalonga mbati, “Ande, ntchache. Pirombo pyam'tsanga pyamudya. Mwananga Yosefe amala gwanda mapindi-mapindi.”" 
Genesis37:34 Yakobo adang'amba nguwo zache mbavala masakha, thangwi iye akhamsintili mwanache ndzidzi ukulu ene." 
Genesis37:35 Anache onsene achimuna na achikazi ene adamthondoza, kwache adakhonda kuthondozwa, mbalonga mbati, “Ine ndinati ndienda kudziko ya anyakufa uku ndikusintili basi mwananga.” Natenepo adathimiza basi kumsintili mwanache Yosefe." 
Genesis37:36 Tenepo mu Iguputo, Amidiani adamgulisa Yosefe kuna Potifara, ule akhali mbodzi wa mathubu a mfumu, pontho akhali mkadamu wa anyakuyang'anira nyumba ya mfumu." 
Genesis38:1 Pandzidzi wenewo Yuda adasiya abale ache mbaenda kakhala na munthu unango dzinache Hira wa kuluwani ya Adulamu. 
Genesis38:2 Kweneko Yuda adagumanikana na mtsikana wa Chikanani, ule babache akhali Shua. Iye adamsemba mtsikanayo," 
Genesis38:3 mbabala naye mwana wamamuna dzinache Eri. 
Genesis38:4 Mkaziyo adakwata pontho mimba mbabala mwana wamamuna mbamthula Onani. 
Genesis38:5 Iye adabala pontho mwana wamamuna mbamthula Shela. Pikhabalwa mwanayo, Yuda akhakhala ku Kezibu." 
Genesis38:6 Yuda adamsembera mwanache wautombo Eri mkazi dzinache Tamara. 
Genesis38:7 Makhaliro a Eri akhali akuipa mwakuti MBUYA pidamkomere tayu. Natenepo MBUYA adampha. 
Genesis38:8 Tenepo Yuda adalonga kuna mwanache wachiwiri Onani, mphwache Eri mbati, “Ndoko ukampita panyumba mkazi nanako, pontho kachite pyonsene pyakufunika kuna iye ninga kunyadoako, towera mbaleako umbalire ana.”" 
Genesis38:9 Mbwenye Onani adadziwa kuti anawo hanakhala ache tayu. Natenepo ndzidzi onsene ukhapita iye m'bonde na mamfelwa ule, mbewu yache akhaitayira pyache pansi, towera akhonde balira mbaleache ana." 
Genesis38:10 Pikhachita iyepyo, MBUYA hadakomere napyo tayu, natenepo iyembo adaphiwa na MBUYA." 
Genesis38:11 Tenepo Yuda adalonga kuna mkwenyache Tamara mbati, “Banga ndoko kumusa kwa babako. Pontho leka kasembwa mpakana mwananga Shela akule.” Iye adalonga penepi, thangwi akhagopa kuti Shela anafambo ninga mudafera abale ache. Natenepo Tamara adenda kumusa kwawo." 
Genesis38:12 Pidagwanda ndzidzi ukulu ene mkazache Yuda adafa. Pidamala nsiku zakusintili mkazache, iye pabodzi pene na shamwaliache Hira wa ku Adulamu adenda ku Timina kukhachingwa mabirache kule." 
Genesis38:13 Munthu unango adampanga Tamara mbati, “Tebzalako akwenda ku Timina kachingisa mabirache.”" 
Genesis38:14 Natenepo iye adakunundula nguwo za umamfelwa mbavala nguwo yakumpsampsika nayo nkhope mbakakhala pamsuwo wakupitira mu Enaimu, luwani ile ikhali m'khundu mwa njira yakwendera ku Timina. Iye adapidziwa kuti Shela akhadakula, mbwenye Yuda hadafune kumpereka Tamara kuna Shela kuti akhale mamunache tayu." 
Genesis38:15 Pidamuona Yuda, iye adanyerezera kuti akhali puta, thangwi akhadampsampsika nkhope yache." 
Genesis38:16 Na kukhonda dzindikira kuti iye akhali mkwenyache, iye adenda kuna iye m'khundu mwa njira mbalonga naye mbati, “Bwera, ndinafuna ndigone nawe.” Mkazi ule adavunza mbati, “Munandipasanji ndingagona namwe?”" 
Genesis38:17 Iye adatawira mbati, “Ndinakutumizira mwana mbuzi pa pifuyo pyanga.” Mkazi ule adatawira mbati, “Ine ndinatawira ngakhala munandiphatirire pinyolo mpakana mumtumize mwana mbuziyo.”" 
Genesis38:18 Iye adavunza mbati, “Pinyolo wache ngwanji anafuna iwe kuti ndiphatirire?” Mkaziyo adatawira mbati, “Ndinafuna chidindo na nkhambalache, pontho na mthondodzo unafamba na imwewo.” Iye adapipereka kuna mkaziyo. Tenepo iye adagona naye, mkaziyo mbakwata mimba." 
Genesis38:19 Tamara adenda kumusa kwache mbakunundula nguwo yakumpsampsika nayo kunkhope ile mbavala pontho nguwo zache za umamfelwa. 
Genesis38:20 Yuda adatuma Hira shamwaliache na kamwana mbuzi kuna mkazi ule kuti akakwate pinthu pidapereka iye pinyolo kuna mkaziyo, mbwenye Hira hadamgumane mkaziyo tayu." 
Genesis38:21 Hira ule adavunza amuna anango akhakhala pa Enaimupo mbati, “Puta akhali m'khundu mwa njira muno ali kupi?” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Chipo pano nee padzati khala puta tayu.”" 
Genesis38:22 Iye adabwerera kuna Yuda mbalonga mbati, “Nee ndamgumanakobi. Amuna a penepo alonga kuti chipo nee padzati khala puta penepo tayu.”" 
Genesis38:23 Yuda adalonga mbati, “Mulekeni pyache akwate pinthupyo. Ife sinafuna kusekwa na anthu apanobi. Ine ndidayesa-yesa kuti ndimpagali, mbwenye iwe nee udamgumanabi.”" 
Genesis38:24 Pidagwanda miyezi mitatu, munthu unango adalonga kuna Yuda mbati, “Mkwenyako Tamara akuchita uputa, natenepo iye ana mimba pinalonga ifepi.” Yuda adalonga mbati, “Kambuluseni panja mbamumpise pamoto, towera afe.”" 
Genesis38:25 Pikhabuluswa iye panja, adatumiza mphangwa kuna tebzalache mbati, “Mimba ina ineyi ndapaswa na mwenechiro pinthu ipi.” Iye adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Piyang'anisiseni ngakhala munamdzindikira mwenechiro pinthu ipi: chidindo na nkhambalache, pontho na mthondodzo.”" 
Genesis38:26 Yuda adapidzindikira mbalonga mbati, “Iye ngwakulungama kupiringana ine. Ine ndapichimwana kumchitira pidalonga ine, thangwi ndidathema kumpasa mwananga wamamuna Shela kuti asembane naye.” Tenepo Yuda hadagoneve naye mkazi ule tayu." 
Genesis38:27 Pidafika ndzidzi wache wakuti abale, pidadziwika kuti iye anati abale mapasa." 
Genesis38:28 Pikhanenseka iye na mtswotswo wakubala, mwana mbodzi adabulusa mkono kunja, natenepo nyakumbazika adakwata kausalu kakufira mbammanga nako mumkono mwa mwanayo, mbalonga mbati, “Ushu ndiye adatoma kuona kunja.”" 
Genesis38:29 Mbwenye pidabwezera iye mkono wache m'bwalo mphwache adabalwa, tenepo nyakumbazika adalonga mbati, “Mwenemu ndiye mwagumanira iwe njira yakubulukira!” Natenepo iye adathulwa Perezi." 
Genesis38:30 Kubuluka penepo mbaleache ule akhali na usalu wakufira mumkono mwache adabalwa mbathulwa Zera. 
Genesis39:1 Aishimaele akhadamkwata Yosefe kwenda naye ku Iguputo mbakamgulisa na Potifara, mbodzi wa mathubu a mfumu, ule akhali mkadamu wa anyakuyang'anira nyumba ya mfumu." 
Genesis39:2 MBUYA akhali na Yosefe mbachitisa pinthu pyache pyonsene kufamba mwadidi. Tenepo iye akhakhala m'nyumba ya mbuyache wa Chiiguputo ule. 
Genesis39:3 Pidaona mbuyacheyo kuti MBUYA akhali naye, pontho kuti MBUYA akhachitisa pyonsene pikhaphata iye kufamba mwadidi," 
Genesis39:4 Potifara adakomerwa naye mbamkwata kukhala nyakumfiliviri. Natenepo adamuikha kukhala nyakuyang'anira nyumbache yonsene na pyonsene pikhali na iye. 
Genesis39:5 Kutomera penepo kwenda m'tsogolo MBUYA adamtsanzayisa Muiguputo ule, na anthu onsene akhali na iye m'nyumba mwache, pontho na pinthu pyonsene pikhali na iye m'nyumba mwache na pya kumunda kwache kwene." 
Genesis39:6 Potifara adaikha pyonsene pikhali na iye m'manja mwa Yosefe, pontho iye hadaswipe mtima na chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu, kupambula pikhadya iye pene. Yosefe akhali mphale wakubalika pyakwanga, pontho akhali na manungo adidi." 
Genesis39:7 Tenepo pidagwanda ndzidzi ene, mkazi mbuyache adatoma kusirira Yosefe mbampanga kuti akapita naye m'bonde." 
Genesis39:8 Mbwenye Yosefe adakhonda mbampanga mkaziyo mbati, “Mbuyanga nkhabe swipa mtima na chinthu na chibodzi chene chili m'nyumbamu tayu, thangwi ine ndili pano. Iye andiikha kukhala nyakuyang'anira pyonsene pina iye." 
Genesis39:9 Ine ndina utongi onsene m'nyumba muno ninga una iye. Iye hadandikhondesa chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu kupambula imwepo. Apo ndinakwanisa tani kuchita chinthu chakuipa ninga chenechi, pontho na kudawira Mulungu?”" 
Genesis39:10 Podi kwene kuti nsiku na nsiku mkazi akhampanga Yosefe kuti akapite naye m'bonde, Yosefe hakhatawira tayu." 
Genesis39:11 Mbwenye nsiku inango, pidapita Yosefe m'nyumba kaphata basa, nkhabe mbodzi wa anyabasa a m'nyumbamo akhali penepo tayu." 
Genesis39:12 Mkaziyo adaphata mkhanjo wa Yosefe mbamkwekweta mbalonga mbati, “Tende tikapite m'bonde.” Mbwenye Yosefe adafukunyula mbathawira panja, tenepo adamsiyira mkhanjo uli kakaidwe m'manja mwa mkaziyo." 
Genesis39:13 Pidaona mkaziyo kuti Yosefe athawira panja mbasiya mkhanjo wache," 
Genesis39:14 iye adachemera anyabasache a m'nyumbamo mbalonga mbati, “Dzandionerenimbo pili kunopi. Mheberi adatidzesera mamunangayi akutilulupisa. Iye adapita kusubi kwanga kufuna kundiphatirira, mbwenye ine ndidakhuwa pyakwanga." 
Genesis39:15 Tenepo pidava iye kuti ndikukhuwa, adathawira panja mbasiya mkhanjo wache.”" 
Genesis39:16 Mkaziyo adaukoya mkhanjo wa Yosefewo mpakana mbuyache Yosefe adabwerera. 
Genesis39:17 Tenepo iye adampanga mamunache pyonsene pidachitika pile mbati, “Bitchu wa Chiheberi adadza na imwe panoyi, adapita kusubi kwanga kundilulupisa." 
Genesis39:18 Mbwenye pidakhuwa ine, iye adathawira panja mbasiya mkhanjo wache.”" 
Genesis39:19 Mbuyache Yosefe adazhangali napyo 
Genesis39:20 mbatonga kuti Yosefe amangwe, pontho aponywe m'perezo mule mukhakoyiwa anyaperezo a mfumu. Tenepo iye adakhaladi mwenemo." 
Genesis39:21 Mbwenye MBUYA akhali na Yosefe mbamuonesa kumfuna kwache kokhonda mala, natenepo nyakuyang'anira perezo adakomerwa naye." 
Genesis39:22 Iye adamuikha Yosefe kukhala nyapala wa anyaperezo anzache onsene, pontho adaikha m'manja mwache pinthu pyonsene pikhachitika mwenemopyo." 
Genesis39:23 Nyakuyang'anira perezo ule hakhayang'anirave chinthu na chibodzi chene chikhali m'manja mwa Yosefe tayu, thangwi MBUYA akhali na Yosefe mbachitisa pinthu pyonsene pikhaphata iye kufamba mwadidi." 
Genesis40:1 Pidagwanda ndzidzi ene anyabasa awiri a mfumu wa ku Iguputo, nyakuperekera vinyu na nyakuphika mikate wamkulu, akhadapolomola kuna mfumu." 
Genesis40:2 Iye adaazhangalira pyakwanga awiriwa 
Genesis40:3 mbaaponya m'perezo, m'nyumba mwa mkadamu wa anyakulondali, pontho m'nyumba montho mukhakoyiwa Yosefe mule." 
Genesis40:4 Pidakhala iwo m'perezo ndzidzi ukulu ene, mkadamu wa anyakulondali adaikha Yosefe kukhala nyakuafiliviri." 
Genesis40:5 Mosiku unango m'perezomo, nyakuperekera vinyu na nyakuphika mikate wamkulu adalota. Tenepo ndoto zawo zikhalonga pyakusiyana." 
Genesis40:6 Na machibese mwache pidadza Yosefe kuna iwo, adaona kuti nkhope zawo zikhali zakugwa." 
Genesis40:7 Tenepo iye adaavunza mbati, “Lero mwatani munatsukwala tenepa?”" 
Genesis40:8 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Tonsene wa ife mosiku talota ndoto zache. Tenepo nkhabe munthu pano wakutithumbusulira ndoto zenezi tayu.” Yosefe adalonga mbati, “Ndi Mulungu ene basi ambachitisa munthu kukwanisa kuthumbusula ndoto. Ndipangeni ndoto zanuzo.”" 
Genesis40:9 Natenepo nyakuperekera vinyu ule adalonga mbati, “Ine ndoto zanga zikhali tenepa: ndidaona mfesa pamaso panga" 
Genesis40:10 wakukhala na matsamvu matatu. Sindzidzi masamba nkhuphukira, maluwa adaoneka mbizibala nsapo zakutokota kale." 
Genesis40:11 Ine ndikhali na khomitcho ya mfumu m'manja mwangamu; natenepo ndidakwata mfesa zile mbandizitchitchithira m'khomitcho ile, mbandiipereka kuna mfumu.”" 
Genesis40:12 Yosefe adalonga mbati, “Ndoto zenezi zikulonga tenepa: matsamvu matatuwo akuimirira nsiku zitatu." 
Genesis40:13 Nsiku zitatu zinadzazi, mfumu anakusudzula kukulekerera, pontho anakubwezera pabasa ikhaphata iwe. Iwe unaperekera khomitcho kuna iye ninga mukhachitira iwe pakutoma pikhali iwe nyakumperekera vinyu." 
Genesis40:14 Kwache ine ndikupempha kuti ngakhala pinthu pinakufambira mwadidi kweneko, undikumbukembo, pontho undikomerembo mtima kundithula kuna mfumu, towera undiphedze kubuluka m'perezo muno." 
Genesis40:15 Thangwi ine ndidachita kukwatwa mwakukhakhamizwa kubulukira dziko ya Aheberi, podi na kuno kwene ine handidachite chinthu chakuthema kuikhwa nacho m'perezo tayu.”" 
Genesis40:16 Pidaona nyakuphika mikate wamkulu ule kuti kuthumbusula kudachita Yosefe ndoto za nyakuperekera vinyu ule kukhali kwadidi, iye adalongambo kuna Yosefe mbati, “Ine ndikhadalotambo. Ndoto zanga zikhali tenepa: ndikhathukula pitundu pitatu pya mikate pamsolo pangapa." 
Genesis40:17 M'chitundu chapadzululetu mukhali mikate ya mtundu na mtundu kwenda nayo kapasa mfumu, mbwenye mbalame zikhadya mikate ya m'chitundumo.”" 
Genesis40:18 Yosefe adatawira mbati, “Ndoto zenezi zikulonga tenepa: pitundu pitatupyo pikuimira nsiku zitatu." 
Genesis40:19 Nsiku zitatu zinadzazi mfumu anakubulusa m'perezo mbakugwanda msolo, tenepo anakwata manungo ako kuamanika pamuti, mbalamembo zinadya mnofu wako.”" 
Genesis40:20 Pidagwanda nsiku zitatu, pansiku yakukumbukira kubalwa kwa mfumu, mfumuyo adasasanyira mathubu ache onsene phwando; natenepo iye adabulusa m'perezo nyakuperekera vinyu na nyakuphika mikate wamkulu ule mbadza nawo pamaso pa mathubu ache." 
Genesis40:21 Nyakuperekera vinyu ule adambwezera pabasa ikhaphata iye pakutoma; 
Genesis40:22 mbwenye nyakuphika mikate ule adammanikwa pamuti ninga montho mukhadalongera Yosefe, pikhaathumbusulira iye ndoto zawo." 
Genesis40:23 Mbwenye nyakuperekera vinyu ule hadanyerezereve pya Yosefe tayu; adamduwalira pyache. 
Genesis41:1 Pidagwanda pyaka piwiri, mfumu adalota. Tenepo ndoto zache zikhali tenepa: iye akhaimira chifupi na mkulo wa Nailo," 
Genesis41:2 pikhaona iye ng'ombe zikazi zinomwe zakubalika, pontho zakunenepa zikuluthuka m'madzi mbizitoma kudya mabande." 
Genesis41:3 Kubuluka penepo ng'ombe zinango zinomwe zokhonda balika, pontho zakuonda zidaluthukambo m'madzimo mbiziimira m'khundu mwa ng'ombe zinangozo m'khundu-khundu mwa mkulo ule." 
Genesis41:4 Tenepo ng'ombe zakuonda zidadya ng'ombe zakunenepa zile. Mfumu adatutumuka kuchitulo. 
Genesis41:5 Iye adagona pontho mbalota ngala zamapira zinomwe zakuvata, pontho zakudzala na maso zikhabuluka pamphesi ibodzi." 
Genesis41:6 Kubuluka penepo ngala zinango zinomwe zakutonzoneka thangwi zikhavulika na mphepo yakumabulukiro dzuwa zidabulukambo. 
Genesis41:7 Ngala zakuvata, pontho zakudzala na maso zile, zidadyiwa na ngala zakutonzoneka zile. Tenepo mfumu adatutmuka kuchitulo mbadzindikira kuti akhalota." 
Genesis41:8 Mangwana mwache na machibese mfumu ule adasanyika pyakwanga mumtima mwache; natenepo adachemeresa anyamatsenga onsene na anyanzeru onsene a mu Iguputo. Iye adaapanga anthuwo ndoto zache, mbwenye nkhabe na mbodzi ene adakwanisa kumthumbulusira." 
Genesis41:9 Tenepo nyakuperekera vinyu ule adalonga kuna mfumu mbati, “Lero ndathema kutawira kuti ndidachita chinthu chakuipa." 
Genesis41:10 Imwe mudatizhangalira ine pabodzi pene na nyakuphika mikate wamkulu, tenepo tonsene uwiriathu mudatiponya m'perezo m'nyumba ya mkadamu wa anyakulondali." 
Genesis41:11 Mosiku unango tonsene wa ife tidalota ndoto zache, pontho ndotozo zikhalonga pyakusiyana." 
Genesis41:12 Mphale unango wa Chiheberi, nyabasache mkadamu wa anyakulondali ule tikhali naye kweneko. Ife tidampanga ndoto zathu, tenepo iye adatithumbusulira." 
Genesis41:13 Pinthu pidachitikadi ninga montho mudalongera iye. Ine mudandibwezera pabasa ikhali na ine pakutoma, mbwenye nyakuphika mikate wamkulu mudammanika pamuti.”" 
Genesis41:14 Natenepo mfumu adachemeresa Yosefe. Kabodzi kene Yosefe adabuluswa m'perezo. Pidamala iye chingwa tsisi yache mbavala nguwo zinango adadza pamaso pa mfumu. 
Genesis41:15 Mfumu ule adalonga kuna Yosefe mbati, “Ine ndikhadalota ndoto, tenepo nkhabe munthu akukwanisa kundithumbusulira. Ine ndapangwa kuti iwe umbakwanisa kuthumbusula ndoto.”" 
Genesis41:16 Yosefe adatawira mbati, “Ine nkhabe kwanisa kuzithumbusula, mbwenye Mulungu ndiye anapereka kuthumbusula kwadidi kuna imwe, Mfumu.”" 
Genesis41:17 Mfumu ule adalonga mbati, “Ndoto zanga zikhali tenepa: ine ndikhaimira chifupi na mkulo wa Nailo," 
Genesis41:18 pikhaluthuka ng'ombe zikazi zinomwe zakubalika, pontho zakunenepa mumkulo mbizitoma kudya mabande." 
Genesis41:19 Kubuluka penepo ng'ombe zinango zinomwe zokhonda balika, pontho zakuonda zidaluthukambo mumkulo onthowo; ng'ombe zokhonda balika ninga tenepa chipo nee ndidzati ndaziona muno mu Iguputo tayu." 
Genesis41:20 Ng'ombe zokhonda balika na zakuonda zile zidadya ng'ombe zakutoma zakubalika na zakunenepa zile. 
Genesis41:21 Mbwenye podi na pidamala izo kudya, nkhabe munthu mbadatawira tayu kuti izo zadyadi, thangwi izo zikhaoneka zakuonda basi ninga montho mwakale. Natenepo ndidatutumuka kuchitulo." 
Genesis41:22 Ndidalota pontho tenepa: ndidaona ngala zamapira zinomwe zakuvata, pontho zakudzala na maso zikubuluka pamphesi ibodzi." 
Genesis41:23 Kubuluka penepo ngala zinango zinomwe zakutonzoneka thangwi zikhadavulika na mphepo yakumabulukiro dzuwa zidabulukambo. 
Genesis41:24 Ngala zakuvata, pontho zakudzala na maso zidadyiwa na ngala zakutonzoneka zile. Penepi ndidapilonga kuna anyamatsenganga, mbwenye nkhabe na mbodzi ene adakwanisa kundithumbusulira tayu.”" 
Genesis41:25 Yosefe adalonga kuna mfumu ule mbati, “Ndoto ziwiri za mfumu zikulonga chinthu chibodzi. Mulungu aonesa mfumu pile pinafuna iye kuchita." 
Genesis41:26 Ng'ombe zikazi zinomwe zadidi zikuimira pyaka pinomwe, pontho ngala zamapira zinomwe zadidi zile zikuimira pyaka pinomwe. Ndoto zenezi zikulonga chinthu chibodzi chene." 
Genesis41:27 Ng'ombe zikazi zinomwe zokhonda balika pontho zakuonda zidabuluka pakumalisira zile zikuimira pyaka pinomwe, pontho ngala zakutonzoneka zakuvulika, thangwi ya mphepo yakumabulukiro dzuwa zile zikuimira pyaka pinomwe pya njala." 
Genesis41:28 Penepi pili ninga mwakupangirani ine, Mfumu, kuti Mulungu akuoneseni pinafuna iye kuchita." 
Genesis41:29 Panakhala pyaka pinomwe pya utende m'dziko yonsene ino ya Iguputo. 
Genesis41:30 Pingamala pyaka Penepyo, panakhala pyaka pinango pinomwe pya njala. Tenepo utende onsene muno mu Iguputo unaduwalika, thangwi njala inavunga dziko yonseneyi." 
Genesis41:31 Ndzidzi wa utende unaduwalikaletu thangwi njala inafuna kudzayo inakhala yakugoswa pyakwanga. 
Genesis41:32 Ndoto zenezi zidaperekwa kuna mfumu m'njira ziwiri, thangwi pinthu penepi pyakhazikiswadi na Mulungu, pontho kuti iye anati apichite chinchino.”" 
Genesis41:33 Tenepo, Mfumu, sankhulani munthu wanzeru, pontho waudziwisi, pontho mumuikhe kukhala nyakuyang'anira dziko yonseneyi." 
Genesis41:34 Imwe mwathema pontho kusankhula mathubu anango kuti asonkhese chachishanu chonsene papinthu pyavuna anthu pyaka pinomwe pya ndzidzi wa utende. 
Genesis41:35 Muapange kuti asonkhese phoso konsene pandzidzi wa pyaka pya utende pinadzapi. Pontho phosoyo yathema kukoyiwa m'mizinda pansi pa utongi wa mfumu. 
Genesis41:36 Tenepo phoso yeneyo inadyesa dziko pyaka pinomwe pya njala pinafuna kudza mu Iguputo, natenepo dziko hinanenseka na njala tayu." 
Genesis41:37 Nzeru yeneyo idaoneka yadidi kuna mfumu na mathubu onsene. 
Genesis41:38 Natenepo mfumu adaavunza mbati, “Ayi ife tinakwanisa kugumana munthu unango ninga weneyu; munthu wakuti ana Mzimu wa Mulungu?”" 
Genesis41:39 Tenepo mfumu adalonga kuna Yosefe mbati, “Podi Mulungu achitisa pinthu pyonsenepi kudziwika kuna iwe, nkhabe pontho munthu unango waudziwisi, pontho wanzeru ninga iwe tayu," 
Genesis41:40 ine ndinakuikha kukhala mkadamu wa dziko yanga, pontho anthu anga onsene anavera matongero ako. Iwe unakhala wachiwiri wanga.”" 
Genesis41:41 Natenepo mfumu adalonga kuna Yosefe mbati, “Ndikukuikha iwe kukhala mkulu wa boma wa dziko yonsene ya Iguputo.”" 
Genesis41:42 Tenepo adadula mphete yakukhala na chidindo chachifumu m'chala chache mbaivazika m'chala cha Yosefe. Adamvazika pontho mkhanjo wakuchena mwadidi mbamvazika mkufu wa golidi m'khosi mwache. 
Genesis41:43 Iye adamkwizika pachingolo chachiwiri chachifumu, pontho anyakumuyang'anirache achilemedzo adakhuwa patsogolo pache mbati, “Pambukani! Pambukani!” Natenepo Yosefe adaikhwa kukhala mkulu wa boma wa dziko yonsene ya Iguputo." 
Genesis41:44 Mfumu adalonga kuna Yosefe mbati, “Ine ndine mfumu, kwache nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene muno mu Iguputo anachita chinthu na chibodzi chene, penu kwenda konsene kwene mwakukhonda tawiriswa na iwe tayu.”" 
Genesis41:45 Mfumu adamthula Yosefe dzina inango ya Chiiguputo yakuti Zefenati-Panea, mbampasa mkazi dzinache Asenati, mwana Potifera, nyansembe wa mumzinda wa Heliopolisi. Yosefe akhali pyaka makumatatu pyakubalwa pidatoma iye kutumikira mfumu wa ku Iguputo. Pidabuluka iye pamaso pa mfumu adafamba-famba dziko yonsene ya Iguputo." 
Genesis41:46  
Genesis41:47 Pandzidzi wa pyaka pinomwe pya utende dziko idavunadi phoso izinji. 
Genesis41:48 Yosefe adagumanyisa phoso yonsene idaphiwa pyaka pinomwe pya utende pile, mbakaikoya m'mizinda. Mumzinda onsene iye akhaikha phoso yakulimwa kubulukira m'minda ya kuzungulira mzindawo." 
Genesis41:49 Yosefe adakoya phoso izinji pyakwanga. Kuinjipa kwache kukhali ninga tchetcha ya pagombe. Ikhali yakuinjipa pyakwanga mwakuti adaleka kuipima thangwi phosoyo ikhadapiringana pakupimika. 
Genesis41:50 Pyaka pya njala mbipidzati fika, Yosefe adabala naye mkazache, Asenati, ana awiri achimuna." 
Genesis41:51 Iye adalonga mbati, “Mulungu adandichitisa kuduwalira nyatwa zanga zonsene, pontho na banja yonsene ya baba.” Natenepo mwana wautomboyo adamthula Manase." 
Genesis41:52 Iye adalonga pontho mbati, “Mulungu andipasa ana m'dziko ya nyatwa zanga.” Natenepo mwana wachiwiriyo adamthula Eferemu." 
Genesis41:53 Pyaka pinomwe pya utende pile pikhadatsanzaya na dziko ya Iguputo pikhadamala. 
Genesis41:54 Tenepo pyaka pinomwe pya njala pidatoma ninga mukhadalongera Yosefe mule. Mukhali njala m'madziko anango onsene, mbwenye m'dziko yonsene ya Iguputo mukhali phoso." 
Genesis41:55 Anthu a mu Iguputo pidatoma iwo gona na njala, adamulirira mfumu kuti aapase phoso. Natenepo iye adaapanga kuti aende kuna Yosefe pontho akachite pyonsene pinaapanga iye." 
Genesis41:56 Njala idandendeya mbifalikira m'dziko monsene, natenepo Yosefe adafungula nyumba zonsene zakukoyeramo phoso mbagulisa phoso ile kuna anthu a mu Iguputo." 
Genesis41:57 Anthu adadza ku Iguputo kubulukira kumadziko anango onsene kagula phoso kuna Yosefe, thangwi njala ikhadandendeya m'dziko yonsene yapansi." 
Genesis42:1 Pidadziwa Yakobo kuti ku Iguputo kukhali phoso, adalonga kuna anache achimuna mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji munalila yang'anizana kwene?" 
Genesis42:2 Ine ndava kuti kuna phoso m'dziko ya Iguputo; ndokoni kweneko mukatigulirembo pang'ono, towera tileke kunenseka na njala gopa tinafa.”" 
Genesis42:3 Tenepo abale ache Yosefe khumi ale adenda ku Iguputo kagula phoso," 
Genesis42:4 kwache Yakobo hadamtume Benjemani, mphwache Yosefe wa mimba ibodzi, pabodzi na abale ache anango ale tayu, thangwi akhagopa kuti mwinango chinthu chakuipa chinamgwera." 
Genesis42:5 Ana a Yakobo pabodzi na anthu anango adadza kagula phoso thangwi m'dziko ya Kanani mukhali njala. 
Genesis42:6 Yosefe ninga mkulu wa boma wa dziko yonsene ya Iguputo akhagulisa phoso kuna anthu onsene a padziko yapansi. Natenepo abale ache Yosefe adadza mbalamba pamaso pache. 
Genesis42:7 Pidachita Yosefe oneni abale ache ale, adaadzindikira, mbwenye iye adachita ninga nee akhaadziwabi. Iye adavunza mwakuatuzulira maso mbati, “Mukubulukira kupi?” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Ife tabulukira kudziko ya Kanani dzagula phoso.”" 
Genesis42:8 Podi kwene kuti Yosefe adaadzindikira abale ache, mbwenye iwo hadamdzindikire tayu." 
Genesis42:9 Iye adakumbuka ndoto zache zikhadalota iye pya iwo, tenepo adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Imwe ndimwe anyakuzonda; mwadza dzazonda khundu zakusowa mphamvu za dziko yathu ino.”" 
Genesis42:10 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Nkhabe tayu, mbuyanga! Ife tadza kuno ninga mabitchu anu dzagula phoso." 
Genesis42:11 Tonsenefe ngubaleathu. Ife si ife anyakuzonda tayu. Anyabasanufe ndife amuna akulonga pyakuona.” 
Genesis42:12 Yosefe adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Nkhabe! Imwe mwadza dzaona khundu zakusowa mphamvu za dziko yathu ino.”" 
Genesis42:13 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Anyabasanufe tonsene ubaleathu tikhalipo khumi na awiri, ana a baba mbodzi m'dziko ya Kanani. Mbaleathu mbodzi adafa, mbwenye chimalisira bele chasala na babathu.”" 
Genesis42:14 Yosefe adatawira mbati, “Mwenemo ndi montho ninga mudalongera ine kuti imwe ndimwe anyakuzonda." 
Genesis42:15 Umu ndi mule munafuna imwe kuyeswa: ine ndinadumbira na dzina ya mfumu kuti imwe munaenda tayu mpakana mphwanuyo abwere kuno. 
Genesis42:16 Mbodzi wa imwe aende kamkwata. Monsenemwe munabanga koyiwa m'perezo mpakana tione ngakhala mafala alonga imwe ngakuonadi. Mbwenye bibibi, na dzina ya mfumu ndimomwene kuti ndimwe anyakuzonda.”" 
Genesis42:17 Natenepo iye adaaikha m'perezo mbakhala mwenemo nsiku zitatu. 
Genesis42:18 Pansiku yachitatu Yosefe adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ine ndine munthu wakugopa Mulungu, natenepo chitani chinafuna kukupangani inechi kuti muleke kuphiwa." 
Genesis42:19 Ngakhala ndimwedi anthu akulonga pyakuona, munthu mbodzi wa imwe asale m'perezo, monsene anangomwe muende mbamukapereke phoso kuna mabanjanu akunenseka na njalawo." 
Genesis42:20 Kwache mudze naye kuno mphwanu wakumalisiraletuyo, towera ndikhulupire kuti mafalanu alonga imwewa ngakuonadi, pontho kuti imwe muleke kuphiwa.” Iwo adatawira kuchita tenepo" 
Genesis42:21 mbalonga kuna unango na mwanzache mbati, “Ande, lero tikuona nyatwa kupagali pinthu pidamchitira ife mbaleathu pile. Ife tidaiona nyatwache ikulu pikhadatidungunyirira iye kuti tileke kuvunga moyo wache, mbwenye ife hatidapiikhe konta tayu. Ndi thangwi yache lero tikuona nyatwa yeneyi.”" 
Genesis42:22 Rubeni adalonga mbati, “Ine ndidakupanganitu kuti muleke kumchitira chinthu chakuipa mphaleyu, mbwenye imwe nee mudandiverebi. Apo lero yang'anani, ife tikupagalwisi thangwi ya kufa kudachita iyeko.”" 
Genesis42:23 Yosefe akhapiva pyonsene pikhalonga iwopyo, kwache iwo hadapidziwe tayu, thangwi iwo akhalonga naye mwakuchita kuthumbusulirwa na munthu unango." 
Genesis42:24 Yosefe adabuluka pakhali iwo pale mbatoma kulira. Pidakhuludzika iye, adabwerera mbalonga nawo pontho. Tenepo adakwata Simioni mbammanga pamaso pa iwo onsene." 
Genesis42:25 Yosefe adatonga kuti masakha a abale ache adzazwe phoso, pontho kuti kobiri za munthu onsene aziikhe m'masakha, pontho nakuti aapase phoso yakudyera m'njira. Penepi pidachitwadi." 
Genesis42:26 Abale ache Yosefe ale adakwizika pamabulu awo phoso ikhadagula iwo ile mbalamuka kwenda kwawo. 
Genesis42:27 Pambuto ikhadagona iwo mosiku unango, mbodzi wa iwo adasudzula sakhache kuti adyese bulu wache, tenepo iye adagumana kobiri zache padzulu m'sakha mwachemo." 
Genesis42:28 Iye adalonga kuna abale ache mbati, “Ine ndabwezerwa kobiri zanga; ngayang'anani izi zili m'sakha mwangazi!” Mitimawo idaswipa, natenepo na mantha na mantha adavunzana okhokha mbati, “Mulungu chatichitira iyechi ninji?”" 
Genesis42:29 Pidafika iwo kuna babawo Yakobo m'dziko ya Kanani, adalonga pyonsene pikhadachitika kuna iwo." 
Genesis42:30 Iwo adalonga mbati, “Mkulu wa boma wa dziko ya Iguputo akhalonga nafe mwakutituzulira maso mbatipambizira kuti tikhali anyakuzonda dziko yache." 
Genesis42:31 Mbwenye tidatawira kuti, ‘Ife si ife anyakuzonda tayu; ndife anthu akulonga pyakuona." 
Genesis42:32 Ife tonsene ubaleathu tikhalipo khumi na awiri, pontho babathu ndi mbodzi ene. Mbaleathu mbodzi adafa, mbwenye chimalisira bele chasala na babathu m'dziko ya Kanani.’" 
Genesis42:33 Tenepo mamuna ule adatitawira kuti, ‘Kuti ndionedi kuti pinalonga imwepi mphyakuona ndinachita tenepa: mbodzi wa imwe asale na ine kuno; monsenemwe mukwate phoso muende nayo kapasa mabanjanu akunenseka na njalawo." 
Genesis42:34 Mbwenye mudze naye chimalisira bele chanucho kuna ine, towera ndidziwedi kuti si imwe anyakuzonda tayu, mbwenye ndimwedi anthu akulonga pyakuona. Tenepo ndinakubwezerani mbaleanu, pontho munakwanisa kuchita malonda m'dziko muno.’ ”" 
Genesis42:35 Pikhakhuthula iwo masakhawo, munthu onsene m'sakha mwache adagumanamo kabudu ka kobiri. Pidaona iwo kobirizo, iwo pabodzi pene na babawo adachita mantha." 
Genesis42:36 Babawoyo adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Kadi imwe munafuna kuti nditaye ananga onsene? Yosefe nkhabepo, Simioni nkhabepo; apo lero munafuna mundikwatire pontho Benjemani? Nyatwa zonsene zikugwera ine pano.”" 
Genesis42:37 Tenepo Rubeni adalonga kuna babache mbati, “Ngakhala Benjemani sinabwerera naye kuna imwe tayu, imwe munakwanisa kupha pyanu ananga awiri achimunawa. Ndipaseni ndimuyang'anire ndine, tenepo ndinabwerera naye kuna imwe.”" 
Genesis42:38 Mbwenye Yakobo adalonga mbati, “Mwananga munaenda naye tayu; mbaleache afa, tenepo asala ngwekha ene basi. Chinthu chakuipa chinakwanisa kumchitikira m'njiramu. Ine ndakalamba, tenepo kutsukwala kunafuna imwe kundichitisa kunandiendesa kudziko ya anyakufa.”" 
Genesis43:1 Njala idandendeya m'dziko ya Kanani. 
Genesis43:2 Natenepo pidamala iwo kudya phoso ikhadabwera na iwo kubulukira ku Iguputo ile, babawo Yakobo adaapanga anache ale mbati, “Ndokoni pontho mukatigulire phoso pang'ono.”" 
Genesis43:3 Mbwenye Yuda adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Mamuna ule adaticheuza pikulu pene kuti tingakhonda kwene kwenda naye mbaleathuyu, nkhope yache nee tinaionabi." 
Genesis43:4 Ngakhala munamtuma mbaleathuyi pabodzi na ife, tinati tiende kakugulirani phoso." 
Genesis43:5 Mbwenye ngakhala munakhonda kumtuma pabodzi na ife, ifembo nee tinaendakobi, thangwi mamunayo adalonga kuti ngakhala mbaleathu tinakhonda kwenda naye, nkhope yache nee tinaionabi.”" 
Genesis43:6 Israele adavunza mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji mudandidzesera nyatwa pakupanga munthuyo kuti mukhali na mbaleanu unango?”" 
Genesis43:7 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Munthuyo adativunza pya ife na banjathu kuti, ‘Ayi babanu ana moyo na lero? Ayi muna mbaleanu unango?’ Ife tikhamtawira kwene pikhativunza iyepyo. Apo mbatidadziwa tani kuti analonga kuti, ‘Mudze naye pabodzi mbaleanu kuno?’ ”" 
Genesis43:8 Yuda adalonga kuna Israele babache mbati, “Mgwinyeni mphaleyi pabodzi na ine, tenepo ife tinati tiende kabodzi kene, towera ife, imwe na anathu, tikhale na moyo mbatileke kufa." 
Genesis43:9 Ine ndinapereka moyo wanga m'mbuto mwache, pontho pyonsene pinafuna kamchitikira dzavunzeni ine pano. Ngakhala sinabwerera naye mwadidi kuna imwe mbandimpereka m'manja mwanu, penepo muthonye chala ine pano moyo wanga onsene." 
Genesis43:10 Ife mbatidakhonda dembuka, pano mbatidenda kale, pontho ninga taendako kawiri.”" 
Genesis43:11 Tenepo babawo Israele adaapanga mbati, “Ngakhala pili tenepo, chitani ipi: kwatani pinthu pyadidi pya dziko ino mupiikhe m'masakha mwanu mbamuende napyo ninga mitukwa kuna mkulu wa boma wa dzikoyo. Kwatani resini pang'ono, uchi pang'ono, pyakukomesera muliwo, manduyi ninga a apistakio na alimondi." 
Genesis43:12 Kwatani kobiri zinango zapapezi ninga zontho zidakwata imwe pakutoma thangwi mwathema kabwezera kobiri zidabwezerwa imwe padzulu m'masakha mwanu. Mwinango kukhali kudodomeka. 
Genesis43:13 Kwatani mbaleanu mbamubwerere kabodzi kene. 
Genesis43:14 Tenepo Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene mbachitise munthuyo kuva namwe nsisi, towera akutawiriseni kubwerera naye Benjemani na mbaleanu unangoyo. Kulonga pya ine, ngakhala kweneku nkhutaya ana, mbatayike pyawo.”" 
Genesis43:15 Natenepo amuna ale adakwata mitukwa ile, kobiri zile na zinango zapapezi, pontho na Benjemani mbaenda ku Iguputo mbakaonekera pamaso pa Yosefe." 
Genesis43:16 Pidaona Yosefe kuti Benjemani akhali nawo pabodzi adapanga nyakumfiliviri wamkulu wa kumusa kwache mbati, “Kwata anthuwa uende nawo kumusa kwanga. Kaphe nyama, pontho kasasanye kudya. Iwo anadya na ine masikati ano.”" 
Genesis43:17 Iye adachitadi ninga mudampangira Yosefe mbakwatira anthu ale kumusa kwa Yosefe. 
Genesis43:18 Amuna ale akhali na mantha pikhaendeswa iwo kumusa kwa Yosefe. Iwo akhanyerezera kuti akhaendeswa kweneko thangwi ya kobiri zidabwezerwa iwo m'masakha mwawo pandzidzi wakutoma ule. Iwo adanyerezera pontho kuti mwinango akhafuna kaaphata mbaachitisa kukhala mabitchu ache, pontho kaapokosera mabulu awo." 
Genesis43:19 Natenepo iwo adenda kumsuwo kwa Yosefe kuna nyakumfiliviri ule mbampanga mbati," 
Genesis43:20 “Mbuyathu, taphata miyendo, ife tidadza kale pakutoma kuno dzagula phoso." 
Genesis43:21 Mbwenye pambuto idaimira ife mbatigona, tidasudzula masakhathu tonsenefe mbatigumana kobiri zonthozo zidagula na ife phoso zili padzulu m'masakha mwathu. Natenepo ife tabwerere nazo kuna imwe." 
Genesis43:22 Tabwera pontho na kobiri zinango zapapezi zakugulira phoso. Ife nkhabe dziwa ule adaikha kobirizo m'masakha mwathu.” 
Genesis43:23 Nyabasa ule adatawira mbati, “Lekani swipa mtima! Pontho lekani chita mantha. Mulungu wanu, pontho Mulungu wa babanu ndiye akupasani mfuma yeneyo m'masakha mwanu; ine ndidatambira kobiri zidapagalira imwe phosoyo.” Natenepo iye adaabulusira Simioni." 
Genesis43:24 Iye adapitisa anthu ale m'nyumba mwa Yosefe mule. Iye adapereka madzi kuna iwo kuti atsuke manyalo awo, pontho iye adadyesa mabulu awo." 
Genesis43:25 Iwo adasasanya mitukwawo kuti aipereke kuna Yosefe angabwera na kumasikati, thangwi iwo akhadava kuti iwo anadya pabodzi na Yosefe." 
Genesis43:26 Pidadza Yosefe kumusako, iwo adapereka kuna iye mitukwa ikhadadza na iwo ile mbalamba pamaso pache." 
Genesis43:27 Iye adaavunza ngakhala manungo awo akhali akuwanga ene, pontho adalonga mbati, “Imwe mudandipanga pya babanu wakukalamba ule. Iye ali tani? Ayi ana moyo na lero?”" 
Genesis43:28 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Nyabasanu babathu ana moyo basi, pontho ngwakuwanga ene.” Natenepo iwo adalamba kumulemedza." 
Genesis43:29 Pidaona Yosefe Benjemani mbaleache wa mimba ibodzi, adavunza mbati, “Ayi weneyu ndiye chimalisira bele chanu adandipanga imwe pya iye ule?” Iye adalonga pontho mbati, “Mulungu mbakutsanzayise, mwananga.”" 
Genesis43:30 Yosefe adabuluka kabodzi kene, thangwi mtimache udadzala na chitchuwo na mbaleache. Tenepo iye adenda kusubi kwache mbakalira." 
Genesis43:31 Pikhadamala iye samba nkhope, adabuluka. Tenepo adauphata mtima mbalonga mbati, “Tipaseni pyakudya tidye.”" 
Genesis43:32 Natenepo iwo adamuikhira pyakudya pile payekha ene, abale ache ale adaaikhira pa okha enembo, pontho Aiguputo akhali na iye ale adaaikhira pa okha enembo, thangwi Aiguputo hambafuna kudya na Aheberi tayu, thangwi Aiguputo pimbaanyanyasa kudya pabodzi na Aheberi." 
Genesis43:33 Pikhadakhazikwa abale ache pansi pamaso pa Yosefe, iwo adakhala nyandandanda malingana na pyaka pyawo pyakubalwa, kutomera wautombo mpakana chimalisira bele, natenepo akhayang'anizana unango na mwanzache mwakudodoma." 
Genesis43:34 Pikhagawiwa pyakudya kubulukira pakhadakhala Yosefe pale kuperekwa kuna iwo, Benjemani adapaswa pyakuinjipa kashanu kupiringana anthu onsene mwenemo. Natenepo iwo adadya na kumwa pabodzi na Yosefe mbakomerwa." 
Genesis44:1 Yosefe adapanga nyakumfiliviri m'nyumba mwache ule mbati, “Dzaza masakha a anthuwa na phoso ninga munakwanisa iwo kuthukula. Pontho uikhe kobiri za munthu onsene padzulu m'sakha mwache." 
Genesis44:2 Uikhe khomitcho yanga yasiliva padzulu m'sakha ya chimalisira bele pabodzi na kobiri zache zene zikhafuna iye gulira phoso.” Iye adachitadi ninga mudampangira Yosefe. 
Genesis44:3 Bzobzo mangwana mwache amuna ale adagwinywa kwawo pabodzi na mabulu awo. 
Genesis44:4 Pikhadafamba iwo kansinzo pang'ono kubulukira mumzinda, Yosefe adalonga kuna nyakumfiliviri ule mbati, “Chimbiza, athamangire amuna ale, ungaaphata uavunze kuti, ‘Thangwi yache ninji mwabwezera chakuipa pa chadidi?" 
Genesis44:5 Thangwi yache ninji mwaba khomitcho yasiliva ya mbuyanga? Yeneyo ndiye khomitcho imbamwera iye, ile imbaphatisa iye basa pakuombedza. Imwe mwadawa pikulu!’ ”" 
Genesis44:6 Pidaaphata nyakufiliviri ule, adalonga mafala onthowo adalonga mbuyachewo." 
Genesis44:7 Iwo adamtawira mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji, mbuyanga, munalonga tenepa? Ife tinadumbira kuti nee tachita chinthu ninga chenecho tayu." 
Genesis44:8 Imwe mukupidziwa kuti kobiri zidagumana ife m'masakha mwathu pakutoma, tidabwerera nazo kuna imwe kubulukira kudziko ya Kanani. Mphapo, thangwi yache njanji kuti tibe siliva penu golidi wa m'nyumba mwa mbuyanu." 
Genesis44:9 Ngakhala unango pakati pa anyabasanufe munamgumana nayo, weneyo aphiwe, pontho tonsene akusala tisanduke mabitchu anu.”" 
Genesis44:10 Iye adatawira mbati, “Ande, ndatawira; mbwenye munthu anafuna ine kumgumana na khomitchoyo, weneyo ndiye anakhala bitchu wanga; anango akusaliramwe munakwanisa kwenda pyanu.”" 
Genesis44:11 Natenepo iwo adachimbiza kutchithisa masakhawo pansi, munthu onsene mbasudzula sakhache." 
Genesis44:12 Nyakufiliviri Yosefe ule adafufunula mwadidi, kutoma na mkululetu kumalisira na mwanaletu. Tenepo khomitchoyo idamgumanwa m'sakha mwa Benjemani." 
Genesis44:13 Amuna ale adang'amba nguwo zawo mwakutsukwala. Tenepo onsene adakwizika mitolo yawo pamabulu awo mbabwerera kumzinda kule. 
Genesis44:14 Yosefe akhali m'nyumbamo basi pikhapita Yuda na abale ache ale, tenepo iwo adapigwisa okha ene pansi pa manyalo a Yosefe." 
Genesis44:15 Yosefe adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Chachita imwechi ninji? Imwe nkhabe dziwa tayu kuti munthu ninga ine ndinakwanisa kugumana chinthu pakuchita kuombedza.”" 
Genesis44:16 Yuda adatawira mbati, “Tinalonga tani kuna imwe, Mbuyathu? Tinalonganji? Tinalonga tani kuti tioneke okhonda dawa? Mulungu abulusa pakwecha pyakudawa pya anyabasanu. Lero ndife mabitchu a mbuyanga, tonsenefe pabodzi pene na ule agumanwa na khomitcho.”" 
Genesis44:17 Yosefe adatawira mbati, “Tayu, podi na kutani kwene, ine nkhabe chita chinthu ninga chenecho tayu. Weneyo ene akhadakwata khomitchoyo ndiye anakhala bitchu wanga. Monsene akusaliramwe munakwanisa kubwerera pyanu kuna babanu mumtendere.”" 
Genesis44:18 Yuda adenda pana Yosefe mbalonga mbati, “Mbuyanga, ndaphata miyendo, nditawiriseni nyabasanu kulonga namwe. Lekani kundizhangalira. Imwe mwakhala ninga mfumu eneyo." 
Genesis44:19 Mbuyanga, imwe mudativunza kuti, ‘Kadi imwe muna babanu, penu mbaleanu unango?’" 
Genesis44:20 Ife tidatawira kuti, ‘Ande, tina babathu; iye ngwakukalamba, pontho tina mbaleathu unango ule adabalwa mwenemo babathuyi mbali nkhalamba kale. Mbaleache mphaleyo adafa, tenepo asala na moyo m'mimba mwawo ngweneyo ene basi; ambafunwa pyakwanga na babache!’" 
Genesis44:21 Imwe mudatipanga anyabasanufe kuti tidze naye kuno, towera mumuone," 
Genesis44:22 tenepo ife tidalonga kuti mphaleyo hanakwanisa tayu kusiyana na babache; angachita tenepo, babacheyo anafa." 
Genesis44:23 Tenepo imwe mudalonga kuti, ‘Imwe nee munatawiriswa kudza pamaso panga tayu mungakhonda kudza naye kuno mbaleanuyo.’" 
Genesis44:24 “Pidabwerera ife kuna babathu, tidampanga pikhadalonga imwe pile." 
Genesis44:25 Tenepo babathu adatipanga kuti tidze pontho kuno kuti tigule phoso pang'ono. 
Genesis44:26 Ife tidatawira kuti, ‘Ife nkhabe kwanisa kwendako tayu; thangwi tinakatawiriswa tayu kuonana na munthu ule tingakhonda khala na mbaleathu wakumalisirayi. Ife tinakwanisa kwenda ngakhala mbaleathu wakumalisirayi anaende nafe pabodzi.’" 
Genesis44:27 Babathu adalonga mbati, ‘Imwe mukupidziwa kuti mkazanga Rakele adandibalira kwene ana awiri achimuna." 
Genesis44:28 Mbodzi wa iwo andisiya kale. Mwinango adadyiwa na pirombo pyam'tsanga, thangwi nee ndamuonabi chibulukiro chache." 
Genesis44:29 Ngakhala chinchino munandikwatira pontho ushu, chinthu chinango chakuipa mbichimchitikira, kutsukwala kunafuna imwe kundichitisa kunandiendesa kudziko ya anyakufa na unkhalambangawu.’ ”" 
Genesis44:30 Yuda adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Natenepo ngakhala ndinabwerera kuna baba wakusowa mphaleyu, sindzidzi iye nkhundiona kuti mphaleyu hali na ine tayu, iye anati akafe. Moyo wache wakukutizwa pabodzi na moyo wa mphaleyu, pontho iye akalamba pyakwanga mwakuti iye anaenda kudziko ya anyakufa na kutsukwala kunafuna ife kumchitisako." 
Genesis44:31  
Genesis44:32 Chinango ntchakuti, ine ndapereka moyo wanga kuna baba m'mbuto mwa mphaleyu. Ine ndidampanga kuti ngakhala mphaleyu sinadza naye pontho kuna imwe tayu, ndine ndathema kuthonywa chala moyo wanga onsene." 
Genesis44:33 Tenepo nyabasanune ndinasala kuno ndine kukhala bitchu wanu m'mbuto mwa mphaleyu; mtawirise abwerere pyache mudzi na abale achewa. 
Genesis44:34 Ndinakwanisa tani kubwerera kuna baba ngakhala mphale hali na ine tayu? Ine nkhabe kwanisa kupirira kuona nyatwa inafuna kamgwera baba.” 
Genesis45:1 Yosefe hadakwaniseve kuuphata mtima pamaso pa anyabasache, natenepo adaatonga onsenewo kuti abuluke m'subimo. Nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene akhali penepo pikhapitchulula Yosefe kuna abale ache." 
Genesis45:2 Iye adalira pikulu mwakugaluza fala mwakuti Aiguputo adava, natenepo anthu a kunyumba ya mfumu adapangwa." 
Genesis45:3 Yosefe adalonga kuna abale ache ale mbati, “Ndine Yosefe. Ayi baba ana moyo na lero?” Mbwenye pidava abale ache ale penepi, adagoswerwa pyakwanga mwakuti adachimwana kumtawira." 
Genesis45:4 Natenepo Yosefe adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Fedzani chifupi na ine.” Iwo adafedzadi, tenepo Yosefe adalonga mbati, “Ine ndine mbaleanu Yosefe adagulisa imwe mu Iguputo ule." 
Genesis45:5 Natenepo lekani swipa mtima, penu kupisumulula mwekha ene kuti mudandigulisa kuno. Weneyo akhali Mulungu, ule adandituma patsogolo panu kupulumusa moyo wa anthu." 
Genesis45:6 Chaka chino ntchachiwiri kwene cha njala m'dziko muno. Panakhala pontho pyaka pinango pishanu pya njala, pile pyakuti anthu nee analima, penu kuvuna tayu." 
Genesis45:7 Mulungu adandituma patsogolo panu kuti akupulumuseni na njira yakudodomesayi, pontho kuti imwe na pidzukulu pyanu mupulumuke." 
Genesis45:8 Natenepo hakhali imwe tayu adandituma kuno ule, mbwenye akhali Mulungu. Iye adandiikha kukhala mkulu wa boma kupiringana akadamu onsene a mfumu. Ine ndine nyakuyang'anira pinthu pyonsene m'dziko mwache, pontho ndine mtongi wa dziko yonsene ya Iguputo." 
Genesis45:9 “Chimbizani, bwererani kuna babanga mukampange kuti pyalonga mwanako Yosefe mphipi: ‘Mulungu andichitisa kukhala mtongi wa dziko yonsene ya Iguputo. Lekani chita nthontho kudza kuna ine." 
Genesis45:10 Munakwanisa kukhala chifupi na ine m'nthemba ya Gosheni; imwe, ananu, pidzukulu pyanu, mabiranu, mbuzi zanu, ng'ombe zanu na pyonsene pina imwe." 
Genesis45:11 Ngakhala munakhala mu Gosheni ndinakwanisa kukuyang'anirani mwadidi. Kutsogoloku kwasala pyaka pishanu pya njala; tenepo ine sinafuna kuti imwe, mabanjanu na pifuyo pyanu mutcherengeletu tayu.’ ”" 
Genesis45:12 Yosefe adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Tenepo imwe monsene, pontho na iwe ene, Benjemani, munakwanisa kuona kuti ndinedi Yosefe." 
Genesis45:13 Kampangeni babanga pya chilemedzo chikulu china ine muno mu Iguputo, pontho kampangeni pya pyonsene pyaona imwe. Natenepo chimbizani mukabwere naye kuno.”" 
Genesis45:14 Iye adamkhumbatira mbaleache, Benjemani, mbatoma kulira. Benjemani adalirambo pikhakhumbatirana iwo." 
Genesis45:15 Tenepo iye adaampsompsona abale ache onsene uku akulira. Pakumalisira pache abale ache adatoma kulonga naye. 
Genesis45:16 Pidafika mbiri kuna mfumu yakuti abale ache Yosefe afika, mfumu pabodzi pene na mathubu ache onsene adakomerwa pyakwanga." 
Genesis45:17 Iye adalonga kuna Yosefe mbati, “Apange abale ako kuti akwizike mitolo yawo pamabulu awo kuti abwerere kudziko ya Kanani." 
Genesis45:18 Atawirise kakwata babawo, na mabanjawo ene kuti abwere nawo kuno. Ine ndinaapasa mbuto yadidiletu mu Iguputo muno, pontho iwo anadya pyadidi pya m'dzikoyi." 
Genesis45:19 Apange pontho kuti akwate pingolo pya muno mu Iguputo, towera akakwatiremo anawo, mabanjawo, pontho na babawo kubwera nawo kuno." 
Genesis45:20 Iwo aleke swipa mtima kusiya pinthu pyawo m'nduli; mbuto yadidiletu ya muno mu Iguputo inakhala yawo.” 
Genesis45:21 Ana Israele ale adachitadi ninga mudapangirwa iwo mule. Yosefe adaapasa pingolo na phoso ya m'njira ninga mudalongera mfumu. 
Genesis45:22 Iye adapereka pontho kuna abale ache ale nguwo zinango zapapezi, mbwenye Benjemani adampasa kobiri zasiliva madzana matatu na nguwo zinango zishanu zapapezi." 
Genesis45:23 Iye adatumiza kuna babache mabulu khumi akuthukula mitolo ya pinthu pyadidiletu pya m'dziko ya Iguputo na mabulu khumi akuthukula mitolo ya mapira, mikate, na phoso inango ya m'njira." 
Genesis45:24 Iye adaagwinya abale ache ale, tenepo pikhalamuka iwo kwenda, Yosefe adaapanga mbati, “Lekani kulongolozana m'njiramu.”" 
Genesis45:25 Iwo adabuluka mu Iguputo mbabwerera kuna babawo Yakobo m'dziko ya Kanani. 
Genesis45:26 Iwo adampanga babawo mbati, “Yosefe, na lero ana moyo. Iye ndi mtongi wa dziko ya Iguputo!” Yakobo adatutumuka pyakwanga, tenepo iye hadaakhulupire tayu." 
Genesis45:27 Mbwenye pidampanga iwo pyonsene pikhadalonga Yosefe kuna iwo, pontho na pidaona iye pingolo pikhadatumiza Yosefe kuti amkwate kwenda naye ku Iguputo, iye adasisimuka." 
Genesis45:28 Iye adalonga mbati, “Ndatsikimiza, mwananga Yosefe na lero ana moyo! Ine ndathema kwenda kuti ndikamuone mbandidzati kufa.”" 
Genesis46:1 Israele adakwata pyonsene pikhali na iye mbaenda ku Beeresheba, kule kudapereka iye nsembe kuna Mulungu wa babache, Isake." 
Genesis46:2 Mulungu adalonga naye mosiku kumasomphenya mbachemera mbati, “Yakobo, Yakobo!” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ndili pano.”" 
Genesis46:3 Mulungu adalonga mbati, “Ine ndine Mulungu, Mulungu wa babako. Leka gopa kwenda ku Iguputo. Kweneko ndinachitisa pidzukulu pyako kukhala dzinza ikulu." 
Genesis46:4 Ine ndinati ndiende nawe kudziko ya Iguputo, pontho pidzukulu pyako ndinati ndipibwezere pontho kudziko ino. Pandzidzi wa kufa kwako Yosefe anakhala m'khundu mwako.”" 
Genesis46:5 Yakobo adabuluka ku Beeresheba. Anache ale adakwizika iye, anawo ang'ono-ang'ono na akazawo m'pingolo pikhadamtumizira mfumu wa ku Iguputo pile." 
Genesis46:6 Iwo adakwata pifuyo pyawo na pinthu pyawo pikhadagumana iwo m'dziko ya Kanani mbaenda ku Iguputo. Yakobo adakwata pidzukulu pyache pyonsene kwenda napyo pabodzi: 
Genesis46:7 anache achimuna na pidzukulu pyache pyachimuna; anache achikazi na pidzukulu pyache pyachikazi. 
Genesis46:8 Madzina a Aisraelei, Yakobo na pidzukulu pyache, adenda ku Iguputo ale mbawa: Rubeni, mwana wautombo wa Yakobo pabodzi pene na anache achimuna a Rubeni" 
Genesis46:9 Hanoki, Palu, Hezironi na Karimi." 
Genesis46:10 Simioni na anache achimuna: Yemuele, Yamini, Ohadi, Yakini, Zohari na Shauli, mwana adabala iye na mkazi wa Chikanani." 
Genesis46:11 Levi na anache achimuna: Gereshoni, Kohati na Merari." 
Genesis46:12 Yuda na anache achimuna: Eri, Onani, Shela, Perezi na Zera (mbwenye Eri na Onani akhadefera m'dziko ya Kanani). Perezimbo, na anache achimuna: Hezironi na Hamuli." 
Genesis46:13 Isakara na anache achimuna: Tola, Pua, Yashubu na Shimironi." 
Genesis46:14 Zebuloni na anache achimuna: Seredi, Eloni na Yaheleele." 
Genesis46:15 Enewa ndiye akhali ana a Yakobo adabala iye na Lea m'dziko ya Mesopotamia, kupambula mwanache wamkazi Dina. Anache onsene achimuna na achikazi adabala iye na Lea pabodzi pene na pidzukulu pyache akhalipo makumatatu na atatu." 
Genesis46:16 Gadi na anache achimuna: Zefoni, Hagi, Shuni, Eziboni, Eri, Arodi na Areli." 
Genesis46:17 Asheri na anache achimuna: Imina, Ishiva, Ishivi na Beria. Nyamaingawo akhali Sera. Beriambo na anache achimuna: Heberi na Malikiele." 
Genesis46:18 Ana enewa akhali ana a Yakobo adabala iye na Zilipa, bitchu wachikazi ule akhadaperekwa na Labani kuna mwanache wamkazi Lea. Onsene pabodzi pene na pidzukulu pyache akhalipo khumi na atanthatu." 
Genesis46:19 Ana a Yakobo adabala iye na Rakele mbawa: Yosefe na Benjemani. 
Genesis46:20 Mu Iguputo Yosefe akhali na ana awiri achimuna, Manase na Eferemu, adabala iye na Asenati, mwana wa Potifera, nyansembe wa mu Heliopolisi." 
Genesis46:21 Ana achimuna a Benjemani mbawa: Bela, Bekeri, Ashibele, Gera, Naamani, Ehi, Roshi, Mupimu, Hupimu na Aridi." 
Genesis46:22 Enewa ndiye akhali ana achimuna a Yakobo adabala iye na Rakele. Onsene pabodzi pene na pidzukulu pyache akhalipo khumi na anayi. 
Genesis46:23 Dani na mwanache wamamuna Hushimu. 
Genesis46:24 Nafitali na anache achimuna Yazeele, Guni, Yezeri na Shilemu." 
Genesis46:25 Enewa ndiye akhali ana a Yakobo adabala iye na Biliha, bitchu wachikazi ule akhadaperekwa na Labani kuna Rakele. Onsene pabodzi pene na pidzukulu pyache akhalipo anomwe." 
Genesis46:26 Pidzukulu chadi-chadi pyonsene pya Yakobo pabodzi pene na anache akhadenda na iye pabodzi ku Iguputo ale, akhalipo makumatanthatu na atanthatu kupambula akwenyache." 
Genesis46:27 Ana achimuna awiri a Yosefe adabalwa mu Iguputo, tenepo kuvungaza onsene pabodzi a m'banja ya Yakobo adenda ku Iguputo ale, akhalipo makumanomwe." 
Genesis46:28 Yakobo adatuma Yuda patsogolo pawo kampempha Yosefe kuti agumanikane nawo m'nthemba ya Gosheni. Pidafika iwo m'Gosheni," 
Genesis46:29 Yosefe adapakira m'chingolo mwache mbaenda ku Gosheni kagumanikana na babache. Pidagumanikana iwo, Yosefe adakhumbatira babache m'khosi mbalira ndzidzi ukulu ene." 
Genesis46:30 Yakobo adalonga kuna Yosefe mbati, “Chinchino pano ndasasanyika kufa pyanga, thangwi ndakuona, pontho ndadziwa kuti na lero una moyo.”" 
Genesis46:31 Tenepo Yosefe adalonga kuna abale ache na onsene a m'banja ya Yakobo mbati, “Ndathema kwenda kuna mfumu kampanga kuti abale anga na onsene a m'nyumba ya baba, ale akhakhala m'dziko ya Kanani, afika kuna ine." 
Genesis46:32 Ndinakampanga kuti imwe ndimwe amakabuswa, anyakuyang'anira pifuyo, pontho kuti mwadza na mikumbi ya pifuyo pyanu na pinthu pyanu pyonsene." 
Genesis46:33 Mfumuyo angakuchemeresani mbakuvunzani kuti basa imbadziwa imwe njanji," 
Genesis46:34 onesesani mumpange kuti ndimwe amakabuswa kutomera uwananu, ninga mudachitira makolo anu. Na thangwi yeneyi iye anakutawirisani kukhala m'nthemba ya Gosheni.” Yosefe adalonga penepi thangwi adadziwa kuti Aiguputo ambanyansirwa nawo amakabuswa onsene." 
Genesis47:1 Natenepo Yosefe adakwata ashanu mwa abale ache mbaenda nawo kuna mfumu. Iye adalonga kuna mfumuyo mbati, “Babanga na abale anga abwera kubulukira ku Kanani pabodzi pene na mikumbi ya pifuyo pyawo, pontho na pinthu pyawo pyonsene. Iwo ali m'nthemba ya Gosheni.” Tenepo iye adaaonesa abale achewo kuna mfumu." 
Genesis47:2  
Genesis47:3 Mfumu adaavunza mbati, “Basa imbadziwa imwe njanji?” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Mfumu, ife ndife amakabuswa ninga mudachitira makolo athu akale." 
Genesis47:4 Ife tadza dzakhala m'dziko muno thangwi m'dziko ya Kanani njala yakula pyakwanga mwakuti nkhabe maudzu akuti pifuyo pyathu pidye. Taphata miyendo, mfumu, titawiriseni kukhala m'nthemba ya Gosheni.”" 
Genesis47:5 Mfumu ule adalonga kuna Yosefe mbati, “Podi babako na abale ako afika," 
Genesis47:6 pontho dziko ya Iguputo ili pamaso pako, kapase babako na abale ako mbuto yadidiletu m'dziko muno. Atawirise kukhazikika m'nthemba ya Gosheni. Pontho ngakhala unadziwa anyaluso anango pakati pawopa, uaikhe kukhala akadamu akuyang'anira pifuyo pyanga.”" 
Genesis47:7 Natenepo Yosefe adadza naye babache, Yakobo mbamuonesa kuna mfumu. Yakobo adapereka mtsanzayiso wache kuna mfumu," 
Genesis47:8 tenepo mfumu adamvunza mbati, “Una pyaka pingasi pyakubalwa?”" 
Genesis47:9 Yakobo adatawira mbati, “Pyaka pyanga pyakutsalakatika ndi dzana ibodzi na makumatatu. Pyaka pyanga mphyakuchepa, pontho mphya nyatwa. Tenepo nkhabe khala sasawa na pyaka pyakufamba-famba pya makolo anga tayu.”" 
Genesis47:10 Tenepo Yakobo adamtsanzayisa pontho mfumu mbabuluka pamaso pache. 
Genesis47:11 Natenepo Yosefe adakhazikisa babache na abale ache m'dziko ya Iguputo mbaapasa mbuto yadidiletu ya m'dzikomo, chifupi na mzinda ya Ramesesi ninga mudalongera mfumu." 
Genesis47:12 Yosefe adapereka pontho kuna babache, abale ache na onsene a m'nyumba ya babache phoso yakukwana malingana na kuinjipa kwa anawo." 
Genesis47:13 Njala ikhadandendeya pyakwanga mwakuti konsene kwene kukhali nkhabe phoso. Tenepo anthu a mu Iguputo na Kanani adatondwa nayo njala. 
Genesis47:14 Pikhagula anthu phoso mu Iguputo mule, Yosefe akhagumanyisa kobiri zonsene mbaenda nazo kunyumba ya mfumu." 
Genesis47:15 Pidamala kobiri zonsene za mu Iguputo na Kanani, anthu a mu Iguputo adadza kuna Yosefe mbalonga mbati, “Tipaseni ife phoso! Lekani kutiyang'ana kwene kufa na njala. Chitanipo pinthu; kobiri zathu zonsene zamala.”" 
Genesis47:16 Yosefe adatawira mbati, “Bwerani napyo kuno pifuyo pyanu. Ngakhala kobiri zanu zamaliratu, ine ndinakupasani phoso mwakuchita kuchinjisana.”" 
Genesis47:17 Natenepo iwo adadza napyo pifuyo pyawo kuna Yosefe, iyembo adaapasa phoso mwakuchita kuchinjisana na akavalo awo, mabirawo, mbuzi zawo, ng'ombe zawo na mabulu awo. Chaka chenecho iye adapereka phoso kuna anthu mwakuchita kuchinjisana na pifuyo pyawo." 
Genesis47:18 Chaka chinangocho anthu ale adadza kuna Yosefe mbalonga mbati, “Mbuyathu, ife nee tinakubisirani tayu kuti kobiri zathu zonsene zamala, pontho pifuyo pyathu pyasanduka pyanu. Nkhabe pontho chakuti tikupaseni kupambula manungo athu na mindathu ene basi." 
Genesis47:19 Lekani kutiyang'ana kwene kufa na njala. Chitanipo pinthu! Lekani yang'ana kwene mindathu isanduke thando yatchetcha. Tiguleni ife pabodzi na mindathu ene mwakuchita kuchinjisana na phoso. Tonsene tinakhala pyathu mabitchu a mfumu, pontho mindathu mbikhale yache. Tipaseni phoso kuti tileke kufa, pontho tipaseni mbewu kuti tikabzale m'minda mwathu.”" 
Genesis47:20 Yosefe adagula dziko yonsene ya Iguputo kugulira mfumu. Munthu onsene wa mu Iguputo akhakhakhamizwa kuti agulise mindache thangwi njala idandendeya pyakwanga, tenepo dziko yonsene idasanduka ya mfumu." 
Genesis47:21 Yosefe adachitisa anthu kukhala mabitchu kubulukira nkhomo na nkhomo ya Iguputo. 
Genesis47:22 Mbwenye mbuto idakhonda iye kwene gula ikhali ya anyansembe. Iwo hadatheme kuigulisa tayu thangwi mfumu akhaapasa phoso yakuti adye kuapagali thangwi ya basa ikhaphata iwo. 
Genesis47:23 Yosefe adalonga kuna anthu ale mbati, “Podi ine ndakugulani pabodzi pene na mindanu kugulira mfumu, tenepo kwatani mbewuyi mukabzale m'minda mwanu." 
Genesis47:24 Mbwenye phoso ingatokota mupereke kuna mfumu chachishanu cha pyakuvuna pyanu pyonsene. Pyakusalirapyo mphyanu kuti mudye, imwe, ananu na onsene a pabanja panu, pontho kuti muchite mbewu kubzala m'minda mwanu.”" 
Genesis47:25 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Mwatipulumusa; imwe mwatichitira udidi pikulu, mbuyathu, pontho tinakhala mabitchu a mfumu.”" 
Genesis47:26 Natenepo Yosefe adapereka mwambo m'dziko yonsene ya Iguputo wakuti chachishanu chonsene cha pinthu pinavuna iwo pikhale pya mfumu. Mwambo wenewu ulipo na lero. Dziko ene ya anyansembe ndiye hidasanduke ya mfumu tayu. 
Genesis47:27 Aisraele adakhala m'dziko ya Iguputo m'nthemba ya Gosheni, kule kudabala iwo ana azinji mbafumako." 
Genesis47:28 Yakobo adakhala m'dziko ya Iguputo pyaka makumanomwe mpakana iye adakwanisa pyaka dzana na makumanayi na pinomwe pyakubalwa. 
Genesis47:29 Pikhali Israele chifupi kufa, adachemeresa mwanache Yosefe mbampanga mbati, “Ikha manjako pantchafu pangapa mbudumbire kuti ndingafa hunandiikha m'masiye a muno mu Iguputo tayu." 
Genesis47:30 Ndinafuna ndikaikhwe kudaikhwa makolo anga; undithukule kundibulusa muno mu Iguputo mbukandiikhe kudaikhwa iwo.” Yosefe adatawira mbati, “Ndinachita ninga munandipangira imwemu.”" 
Genesis47:31 Israele adalonga mbati, “Dumbira kuti unapichita.” Yosefe adadumbiradi, tenepo Israele adapereka takhuta kuna MBUYA uku mbali patalimba pache." 
Genesis48:1 Pidagwanda ndzidzi ene, Yosefe adapangwa kuti babache akhadwala. Natenepo adakwata anache awiri, Manase na Eferemu, mbaenda kaona Yakobo." 
Genesis48:2 Pidava Yakobo kuti mwanache Yosefe abwera dzamuona, adaphanisira kulamuka mbakhala na matako patalimba." 
Genesis48:3 Yakobo adalonga kuna Yosefe mbati, “Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene adaonekera kuna ine pa Luzi, m'dziko ya Kanani mbanditsanzayisa." 
Genesis48:4 Iye adalonga kuna ine mbati, ‘Ndinati ndikupase ana azinji, tenepo pidzukulu pyako pinasanduka madzinza a anthu azinji; ndinapereka dzikoyi kuna pidzukulu pyako kuti ikhale yawo ene kwenda na kwenda.’ ”" 
Genesis48:5 Yakobo adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Yosefe anako awiri abala iwe muno mu Iguputo, ine ndidzati fika, anawerengwa ninga anga; Eferemu na Manase mbananga sasawa ninga Rubeni na Simioni." 
Genesis48:6 Ngakhala una ana anango, enewo nkhabe werengerwa ninga ananga tayu; dziko inafuna iwo siyirwa inadzera muna Eferemu na Manase." 
Genesis48:7 Ndikuchita tenepo thangwi ya mako Rakele. Na kutsukwala kwanga iye adafa m'dziko ya Kanani, chifupi na Efurata, pikhabwerera ine kubulukira ku Mesopotamia. Ine ndidamuikha penepo m'khundu-khundu mwa njira ya ku Efurata.” (Efurata ndzidzi uno ukudziwika na Betelehemu)." 
Genesis48:8 Pidaona Israele ana a Yosefe ale, adavunza mbati, “Aphale enewa mbani?”" 
Genesis48:9 Yosefe adatawira mbati, “Enewa mbananga, ale andipasa Mulungu m'dziko ino ya Iguputo.” Israele adatawira mbati, “Dza nawo kuna ine towera ndiatsanzayise.”" 
Genesis48:10 Maso a Israele adachita uzimola, thangwi iye akhadakalamba pyakwanga, tenepo iye hadakwanise kuona mwadidi tayu. Yosefe adadza nawo aphale ale kuna iye, tenepo iye adaakhumbatira mbaampsompsona." 
Genesis48:11 Israele adalonga kuna Yosefe mbati, “Ine nee ndikhanyerezera kuti ndinakuona pontho tayu, tenepo Mulungu lero anditawirisa kuona na anako ene.”" 
Genesis48:12 Tenepo Yosefe adaabulusa ana pamiyendo pa Israele mbalamba. 
Genesis48:13 Yosefe adakwata ana awiri ale mbadza nawo chifupi na Israele. Manase adamuikha kukhundu yakumadyo, Eferemu mbamuikha kumabzere kwa Israele." 
Genesis48:14 Mbwenye Israele adagwangwanyisa manjache mbasanjika dzanjache yamadyo pamsolo wa Eferemu, podi kwene kuti akhali wachiwiri kubalwa, mbakwata dzanjache yamabzere mbaisanjika pamsolo wa Manase, podi kwene kuti akhali wautombo." 
Genesis48:15 Tenepo iye adatsanzayisa Yosefe mbalonga mbati, “Mulungu adatumikira ababanga Abrahamu na Isake ule, mbatsanzayise aphalewa! Mulungu adanditsogolera kufikirana lero ule mbaatsanzayise." 
Genesis48:16 Mngelo ule adandipulumusa kuna pyakugoswa pyonsene mbaatsanzayise! Dzinanga na madzina a ababanga, Abrahamu na Isake, mbaveke kudzera muna aphalewa. Iwo mbakhale na ana azinji, pontho na pidzukulu pizinji.”" 
Genesis48:17 Yosefe adaipirwa napyo, pidaona iye kuti babache akhadasanjika dzanjache yamadyo pamsolo wa Eferemu, natenepo iye adabulusa dzanja ya babache pamsolo pa Eferemu mbaiikha pamsolo wa Manase." 
Genesis48:18 Iye adalonga kuna babache mbati, “Si mwenemo tayu, baba: ushu ndiye mwana wautombo, ikhani dzanjanu yamadyo pamsolo pache.”" 
Genesis48:19 Babache adakhonda mbalonga mbati, “Ndikupidziwa, mwananga, ndikupidziwa. Pidzukulu pya Manase pinakhalambo mtundu ukulu. Mbwenye mphwacheyi anakhala wamkulu kupiringana iye, pontho pidzukulu pyache pinakhala madzinza akulu.”" 
Genesis48:20 Natenepo iye adaatsanzayisa nsiku yeneyo mbalonga mbati, “Aisraele anaphatisa basa madzina anu angalonga mafala akutsanzayisa. Iwo analonga kuti, ‘Mulungu mbakuchitise kukhala ninga Eferemu na Manase.’ ” Na njira yeneyi Israele adaikha Eferemu patsogolo pa Manase." 
Genesis48:21 Tenepo Israele adalonga kuna Yosefe mbati, “Ninga munaonera iwe, ine ndili chifupi kufa, mbwenye Mulungu anakhala nawe, pontho anakubwezera kudziko ya makolo ako." 
Genesis48:22 Ine ndikupereka nthemba ya Shekemu kuna iwe, nee kuna abale ako tayu, nthemba yakukhala na mataka akubalisa pinthu, ile idapokosera ine Aamori pakuphatisa basa talasada pontho utanga.”" 
Genesis49:1 Yakobo adachemeresa anache onsene achimuna mbalonga mbati, “Gumanyikanani mwakundizungulira, towera ndikupangeni pinafuna kukuchitikirani m'tsogolo muno:" 
Genesis49:2 “Dzani pabodzi monsenene, ana a Yakobo. Veserani kuna babanu Israele." 
Genesis49:3 “Rubeni, mwananga wautombo, ndiwe mphamvu zanga. Mwana wautombo wa uphaleanga. Mwana wakudungudzisa, pontho wamphamvu pyakwanga kupiringana ananga onsene." 
Genesis49:4 Iwe wakhala ninga madzi akupeluka, mbwenye hunakhala munthu wakufunika pyakwanga tayu, thangwi udagona na mkazanga wachibitchu mbululupisa talimba ya babako." 
Genesis49:5 “Simioni na Levi ngubaleawo. Iwo ambaphatisa basa pida pyawo kuchita pyakuzunguzika. 
Genesis49:6 Ine nkhabe phatizana nawo tayu m'mafalawo a chibiso-biso, penu kukwata khundu pa misonkhano yawo tayu. Thangwi iwo adapha amuna mwakuzhangali, iwo adalamaza ng'ombe zimuna towera asenzeke nazo." 
Genesis49:7 Dzedze kuna kuzhangali kwawo, thangwi kukhali kwakugoswa pyakwanga, pontho na ukali wawo, thangwi ukhali kwakukala mtima. Ine ndinaabalalisa pakati pa ana a Yakobo, mbandiamwaza-mwaza m'dziko yonsene ya Israele." 
Genesis49:8 “Yuda, abale ako anakukuza pikulu. Dzanjako inakhwipa m'khosi mwa anyamalwako. Ana a ababako anakulambira." 
Genesis49:9 Yuda, iwe wakhala ninga mwana nkhalamu. Iwe wabwerera pyamala iwe kudya nyama idapha iwe, ambanjunja mbathathamula ninga nkhalamu. Pontho ninga nkhalamu ikazi, mbani anakwanisa kumzunguza?" 
Genesis49:10 Mthondodzo wachifumu nkhabe buluka pana Yuda tayu, penu utongi pamanyalo ache, mpakana kubwera kwa mwenechiroache. Pontho madzinza anati amvere." 
Genesis49:11 Iye adamangira bulu wache pamfesa, mwana bulu wache pamfesa wadidiletu. Iye ambafula mayalache na vinyu; chakufinika chache na vinyu wakufira ninga chiropa." 
Genesis49:12 Maso ache anafira na vinyu, mano ache anachena na mkaka." 
Genesis49:13 “Zebuloni anakhala m'gombe-gombe mwa bara; iye anakhala gombe ya kutchama miyadiya mikulu-mikulu. Madire a nthembache anafika mpakana ku Sidoni. 
Genesis49:14 “Isakara ndi bulu wamphamvu wakugona pakati pa mathanga. 
Genesis49:15 Pidaona iye kuti mbuto yakupumirapo ikhali yadidi, pontho kuti dziko ikhali yakukoma m'maso, iye adakotamisa phewache kuti athukule mtolo, tenepo iye adakhakhamizwa kuphata basa ninga bitchu." 
Genesis49:16 “Dani anatonga anthu ache. Iwo anakhala ninga madzinza anango a Israele. 
Genesis49:17 Dani anakhala nyoka m'khundu mwa njira; nyoka yaukali m'khundu-khundu mwa njira, ile imbaluma pitende pya kavalo, towera nyakumpakira agwe na madede." 
Genesis49:18 “Ndikudikhira chipulumuso chanu, MBUYA." 
Genesis49:19 “Gadi anasoswa na mapanga, mbwenye iye anazungunukira mbaathamangisa." 
Genesis49:20 “Asheri, pyakudya pyache pinakhala pya mafuta, pontho anapereka pyakudya pyakuthemera mfumu." 
Genesis49:21 “Nafitali ndi nyasa wakuthamanga mwakusudzuka, nyakubala anache akubalika." 
Genesis49:22 “Yosefe akhala ninga mtawi wamfesa, wakumera chifupi na mphuno ya madzi, ule nthambi zache zimbatanthawira m'mafufu." 
Genesis49:23 Anyamalwache adamsosa mwakugoswa na mauta mbamponyera matswimo mwavinga. 
Genesis49:24 Mbwenye utache ukhali wamphamvu, pontho manjache akhadawangisa pikulu, na mphamvu za Mulungu, Nyamphamvu wa Yakobo ule, na Makabuswa, Phanzwi ya Israele." 
Genesis49:25 Ndi Mulungu wa babako anafuna kukuphedza. Ndi Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene anafuna kukutsanzayisa na mtsanzayiso wa mvula kubulukira kudzulu, mtsanzayiso wa madzi akuzwika akubulukira pansi, mtsanzayiso wa pifuyo pizinji na ana azinji," 
Genesis49:26 mtsanzayiso wa mapira na maluwa, mtsanzayiso wa mapiri akale, pontho pinthu pyakukoma m'maso kubulukira kumapiri akukhala na kukhala. Pyonsenepi mbapigwere pana Yosefe, ule adapambulwa pakati pa abale ache." 
Genesis49:27 “Benjemani akhala ninga mbinzi wakugoswa. Na machibese ambadya nyamache, na mawulo ambagawa pyaphata iye mwaupandu.”" 
Genesis49:28 Enewa ndiye madzinza khumi na awiri a Israele. Pontho penepi ndiye pidalonga babawo, pikhaatsanzayisa iye kugonekana na anache onsene kada munthu." 
Genesis49:29 Tenepo Yakobo adalonga kuna anache mbati, “Chinchino ndinafa, tenepo mukandiikhe kumbuto idaikhwa makolo anga, m'dzimba ile ili m'munda mwa Eferoni wa Chihiti," 
Genesis49:30 ku Makipela, kumabulukiro dzuwa a Mamure, m'dziko ya Kanani. Abrahamu adagula nkhwimba na munda wenewu kubulukira kuna Eferoni, towera ikhale masiye." 
Genesis49:31 Kweneko ndiye kudaikhwa Abrahamu na mkazache, Sara; kweneko pontho ndiye kudaikhwa Isake na mkazache Rebeka; pontho kweneko ndiye kudaikha ine Lea." 
Genesis49:32 Munda na nkhwimba pili mwenemopyo pidagulwa kubulukira m'manja mwa Ahiti.” 
Genesis49:33 Pidamala Yakobo kupereka mwambo kuna anache, adagona pontho mbaferatu." 
Genesis50:1 Yosefe adapigwisa pana babache mbalira na kumpsompsona nkhope ya babacheyo. 
Genesis50:2 Tenepo Yosefe adatonga anyaluso kuti asasanye mtembo wa babache na mtombwe, towera aleke vunda." 
Genesis50:3 Kusasanywa kwa mtembo kudakwata nsiku makumanayi, ndzidzi wache wakusasanya mtembo. Aiguputo adamulira nsiku makumanomwe." 
Genesis50:4 Pidamala ndzidzi wakusintili, Yosefe adalonga kuna mathubu a mfumu mbati, “Ndaphata miyendo ndikomerenimbo mtima pakundipangirambo mfumu kuti," 
Genesis50:5 ‘Pikhali babanga chifupi kufa adandidumbirisa kuti ndimuikhe m'masiye, ale akhadasasanya iye kale m'dziko ya Kanani. Natenepo nditawiriseni ndiende kaikha babanga. Ndingamala ndinati ndibwere pontho.’ ”" 
Genesis50:6 Mfumu adatawira mbati, “Ndoko kamuikhe babako ninga mudamdumbirira iwe kuna iye.”" 
Genesis50:7 Natenepo Yosefe adenda kamuikha babache. Mathubu onsene a mfumu, atongi a thando yamiseru, na akadamu onsene m'dziko ya Iguputo adenda naye pabodzi Yosefe." 
Genesis50:8 Banjache, abale ache na onsene a m'nyumba ya babache adenda naye pabodzi. Mbwenye anawo ang'ono na mabira, mbuzi na ng'ombe zawo zidasala m'nthemba ya Gosheni." 
Genesis50:9 Amuna anango akukwira pingolo na anango akupakira akavalo adendambo pabodzi na Yosefe; ukhali mwinji ukulu ene. 
Genesis50:10 Pidafika iwo pambuwa ya Atadi kumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani, iwo adasintili mwakugaluza fala ndzidzi ukulu ene. Tenepo Yosefe adachita mwambo wakusintili nsiku zinomwe." 
Genesis50:11 Pidaona mzika za mu Kanani kuti anthu ale akhasintili pa Atadi, adalonga mbati, “Mwambo wakusintili unachita Aiguputo ngwanji?” Ndi thangwi yache mbuto ile idathulwa Abele-Mizraimu." 
Genesis50:12 Natenepo ana a Yakobo adachitadi ninga mukhadapangirwa iwo; 
Genesis50:13 iwo adathukula mtembo wache mbaenda nawo ku Kanani kauikha m'nkhwimba ya Makipela, kumabulukiro dzuwa a Mamure, m'munda ukhadagula Abrahamu kubulukira m'manja mwa Eferoni wa Chihiti kuti ukhale masiye ule." 
Genesis50:14 Pidamala Yosefe ikha babache, adabwerera ku Iguputo pabodzi pene na abale ache, pontho na onsene akhadenda naye pabodzi kumaliroko ale." 
Genesis50:15 Pidafa babawo, abale ache Yosefe adalonga mbati, “Tinachita tani ife ngakhala Yosefe akukoya mangawa basi, pontho anafuna kutibwezera pyakuipa pidamchitira ife pile?”" 
Genesis50:16 Natenepo iwo adatuma mphangwa kuna Yosefe mbati, “Babathu mbadzati kufa" 
Genesis50:17 adatipanga kuti tikupempheni kuti, ‘Ndaphata miyendo mulekerere pyakudawa pya abale anu pidakuchitirani iwo pile.’ Tenepo ife taphata miyendo, tilekerereni pyakudawa pidakuchitirani ife anyabasa a Mulungu wa babanu.” Yosefe adalira pidatambira iye mphangwa zenezi." 
Genesis50:18 Tenepo abale ache okha ene adadza mbalamba pamaso pache. Iwo adalonga mbati, “Ife tili pano pamaso panu ninga mabitchu anu.”" 
Genesis50:19 Mbwenye Yosefe adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Lekani chita mantha; ine nkhabe kwanisa kupiikha ndekha ene tayu pambuto ya Mulungu." 
Genesis50:20 Imwe mudaphatizana kundichitira chinthu chakuipa, mbwenye Mulungu adachisanduza kukhala chadidi, towera kupulumusa moyo wa anthu azinji ana moyo lerowa, thangwi ya pidachitika pile." 
Genesis50:21 Imwe lekani chita mantha. Ine ndinati ndikutsalakaneni pabodzi pene na ananu ene.” Natenepo iye adaawangisa mtima na mafala adidi akuaphata mtima. 
Genesis50:22 Yosefe adathimiza kukhala m'dziko ya Iguputo pabodzi pene na banja ya babache; pikhafa iye akhali na pyaka dzana na khumi. 
Genesis50:23 Iye adaona ana a Eferemu na pidzukulu pyache. Pontho iye adaona ana a Makiri, mwana Manase, mbakhala nawo m'nyumba mwache." 
Genesis50:24 Iye adalonga kuna abale ache mbati, “Ine ndili chifupi kufa, mbwenye Mulungu anati akuyang'anireni mwadidi mbakutsogolerani kukubulusani m'dziko muno kwenda namwe kudziko idadumbira iye kuna Abrahamu, Isake na Yakobo ile.”" 
Genesis50:25 Tenepo Yosefe adapempha abale ache kuti adumbire, mbalonga mbati, “Dumbirani kuti Mulungu angakutsogolereni kwenda namwe kudziko yeneyo munakwata magogodo anga kwenda nawo.”" 
Genesis50:26 Natenepo Yosefe adafa mu Iguputo uku ana pyaka dzana na khumi pyakubalwa. Iwo adasasanya mtembo wache na mtombwe kuti uleke vunda mbauikha m'baulu. 
Exodus1:1 Ana achimuna a Yakobo, ale adenda na iye ku Iguputo pabodzi pene na mabanjawo akhali awa:" 
Exodus1:2 Rubeni, Simioni, Levi, Yuda," 
Exodus1:3 Isakara, Zebuloni, Benjemani," 
Exodus1:4 Dani, Nafitali, Gadi na Asheri." 
Exodus1:5 Onsene pabodzi pidzukulu pya Yakobo akhali anthu makumanomwe; mwanache Yosefe akhadenda kale ku Iguputo. 
Exodus1:6 Tenepo Yosefe na abale ache, pontho na mfendu wache adafa," 
Exodus1:7 mbwenye pidzukulu pyawo, ale mba Aisraele adabalana pikulu mbakhala anthu akuinjipa pyakwanga mwakuti dziko ya Iguputo mudadzala na anthu enewa." 
Exodus1:8 Pidagwanda ndzidzi ukulu ene, mu Iguputo mudapita mfumu unango kutonga, ule hakhadziwa tayu pya Yosefe." 
Exodus1:9 Tenepo iye adalonga kuna anthu ache mbati, “Aisraelewa ainjipa pontho ngamphamvu pyakwanga mwakuti tikugoswerwa nawo." 
Exodus1:10 Mwinango kunabwera nkhondo iwo anaphatizana na anyamalwathu, towera atikunde mbathawa kubuluka m'dziko muno. Tathema kusaka njira yakualekesa kuinjipa pikulu pene.”" 
Exodus1:11 Natenepo anthu a ku Iguputo adaikhira anyakuyang'anira avinga towera aavuye pakuaphatisa basa mwakuakhakhamiza. Aisraele adamanga mizinda ya Pitomu na Ramese yakukoyeramo pinthu pya Mfumu wa Iguputo. 
Exodus1:12 Mbwenye na kuavuya kukulu kukhachita anthu a ku Iguputo, Aisraele ndiye adanyanya kuinjipa mbafalikira m'nthemba yonseneyo. Tenepo anthu a mu Iguputo adatoma kuagopa Aisraele," 
Exodus1:13 mbaavuya pakuaphatisa basa mwavinga ninga mabitchu. Iwo adaakhakhamiza kuawumbira njerwa na kumunya mataka na mabasawo anango onsene a m'minda. Anthu a ku Iguputo adaaphatisa basa mwavinga pontho mwakukhonda kuavera nsisi. 
Exodus1:14  
Exodus1:15 Tenepo mfumu wa ku Iguputo adalonga kuna Shifira na Pua, anyakubalisa akazi a Chiheberi mbati," 
Exodus1:16 “Mungabalisa mkazi wa Chiheberi, mwanayo angakhala mamuna mpheni, mbwenye angakhala wamkazi mulekeni.”" 
Exodus1:17 Mbwenye anyakubalisa akazi ale akhali akugopa Mulungu, tenepo iwo hadavere pidalonga mfumu pile tayu mbakhonda kupha ana achimuna ale." 
Exodus1:18 Tenepo mfumu adachemeresa akazi ale mbaavunza mbati, “Mwatani munachita tenepa? Munalekeranji kupha ana achimuna?”" 
Exodus1:19 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Akazi a Chiheberi alekana na akazi a kuno ku Iguputo; iwo nkhabe nenseka na kubala tayu, iwo ambabala mwenemo mbodzi wa ife mbadzati fika kweneko.”" 
Exodus1:20 Na thangwi yakuti anyakubalisa akazi akhali akugopa Mulungu, Mulunguyo adaakomera mtima mbaapasa mabanjawo ene. Tenepo Aisraele adathimiza kuinjipa pontho kukhala amphamvu." 
Exodus1:21  
Exodus1:22 Pakumalisira pache mfumu adapereka utongi ukulu kuna anthu ache onsene wakuti: “Ana onsene akachiya achimuna a Chiheberi akaponywe mumkulo wa Nailo, mbwenye ana achikazi mualeke.”" 
Exodus2:1 Ndzidzi wenewo mamuna unango wa dzinza ya Levi adasemba mkazi wa dzinza mwache monthomo," 
Exodus2:2 mbabala naye mwana wamamuna. Pidaona mkaziyo kuti mwanayo akhali wakubalika pyakwanga, iye adambisa miyezi mitatu." 
Exodus2:3 Mbwenye pikhali pyakuchimwanika kuthimiza kumbisa, iye adakwata chitundu chakusasanywa na mitete mbachikwalangula na upula kuti chileke pita madzi. Iye adaikha mwanayo mwenemo mbachisiya pakati pa mitete yakulapha pankhomole ya mkulo wa Nailo." 
Exodus2:4 Nyamaingache mwanayo adaimira patali pang'ono kuona chikhafuna kumchitikira mwanayo. 
Exodus2:5 Mwana wamkazi wa mfumu adadza kumkuloko kasamba, mwenemo anyabasache akhafamba-famba pyawo pankhomole ya mkulo. Kabodzi kene iye adaona chitundu pakati pa mitete yakulapha, tenepo adatuma bitchu wachikazi kachikwatapo." 
Exodus2:6 Mwana mfumu ule adachifungula mbaonamo mwana wamamuna. Mwanayo akhalira, tenepo iye adava naye nsisi. Iye adalonga mbati, “Weneyu ndi mbodzi wa ana a Chiheberi.”" 
Exodus2:7 Nyamaingache mwana ule adamvunza mbati, “Munafuna ndikachemere mkazi wa Chiheberi kuti amuyamwise kukulererani?”" 
Exodus2:8 Iye adatawira mbati, “Ndaphata miyendo ndoko.” Natenepo mtsikana ule adenda kachemera mache eneletu mwanayo." 
Exodus2:9 Mwana mfumu ule adapanga mkazi ule mbati, “Kwata mwanayo ukamuyamwise kundilerera, tenepo ine ndinakupagali.” Natenepo iye adakwata mwana ule mbaenda naye kamuyamwisa." 
Exodus2:10 Pidakula mwanayo, iye adenda naye kuna mwana mfumu, ule adamkwata mbasanduka mwanache ene. Iye adalonga yekha ene mbati, “Mwanayu ndidachita kumnula madzi, tenepo ndinamthula Mose.”" 
Exodus2:11 Nsiku inango, pikhadakula Mose, adenda kafambira anthu ache a Chiheberi mbaona mukhakhakhamizirwa iwo kuphata mabasa akupha. Iye adaona pontho munthu wa ku Iguputo akupha Mheberi, mbodzi wa anthu ache." 
Exodus2:12 Mose adayang'ana-yang'ana, tenepo pidaona iye kuti pakhali nkhabe munthu unango chifupi, iye adapha munthu wa ku Iguputo ule mbafikhira mtembo wache m'tchetcha." 
Exodus2:13 Mangwana mwache iye adenda pontho kweneko mbaona Aheberi okhokha awiri akumenyana. Iye adalonga kuna ule akhaboneresa mwanzache mbati, “Watani unamenya Mheberi mnzako tenepa?”" 
Exodus2:14 Munthu ule adatawira mbati, “Mbani adakuikha kukhala mfumu, pontho nyakutonga mseru pakati pathu? Ayi ukufuna kundipha ninga mudaphera iwe munthu wa ku Iguputo ule?” Tenepo Mose adachita mantha mbalonga yekha ene mbati, “Anthu adziwa pinthu pyachita ine.”" 
Exodus2:15 Pidava mfumu pidachitikapyo, adayesa-yesa kuti aphe Mose, mbwenye Mose adathawa mbaenda kakhala kudziko ya Midiani. Nsiku inango pikhakhala Mose chifupi na mchera, ana anomwe achikazi a nyansembe wa dziko ya Midiani adadza dzatunga madzi mbadzaza pyakumweseramo mbamwesa mabira na mbuzi za babawo." 
Exodus2:16  
Exodus2:17 Mbwenye amakabuswa anango akhathamangisa ana a Yetero. Tenepo Mose adenda kaavunulira mbaatungira madzi akumwesa pifuyo pyawopyo. 
Exodus2:18 Pidabwerera ana ale kuna babawo adaavunza mbati, “Mwatani mwachimbiza kudza lero?”" 
Exodus2:19 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Munthu unango wa ku Iguputo adativunulira kuna amakabuswa, pontho atitungira madzi mbamwesa pifuyo pyathu.”" 
Exodus2:20 Iye adavunza anache ale mbati, “Munthu weneyu ali kupi? Mwatani kudza naye kuno? Ndokoni mukamchemere towera adye nafe pabodzi.”" 
Exodus2:21 Natenepo Mose adatawira kukhala kweneko. Yetero adampasa Zipora mwanache wamkazi kuti akhale mkazache," 
Exodus2:22 mbabala naye mwana wamamuna. Mose adalonga yekha ene mbati, “Ndine mlendo m'dziko muno, tenepo ndinamthula mwanayu Gereshomu.”" 
Exodus2:23 Pidapita ndzidzi ukulu mfumu wa ku Iguputo adafa, mbwenye Aisraele akhabulira basi na ubitchu mbalira kuti aphedzwe. Kulira kwawo kudafika kuna Mulungu," 
Exodus2:24 ule adava kubulira kwawo mbakumbuka chiverano chache na Abrahamu, Isake na Yakobo." 
Exodus2:25 Iye adaona ubitchu wa Aisraele mbadziwa pikhachitika pile. 
Exodus3:1 Nsiku inango pikhadyesa Mose mabira na mbuzi za Yetero, tebzalache, nyansembe wa ku Midiani, iye adawambuka thando yatchetcha na mkumbiwo mbafika kuphiri ya Sinai, phiri ya Mulungu."
