Exodus3:2 Kweneko mngelo wa MBUYA adamuonekera ninga malulume a moto kubulukira m'thenthere. Mose adaona kuti thenthere ikhagaka moto, kwache iyo nee ikhapya tayu." 
Exodus3:3 Iye adalonga yekha mbati, “Penepi ndi malengo-lengo! Pyakhala tani kuti thenthere ichimwane kupya? Ndinati ndifendedze chifupi kuti ndikapione.”" 
Exodus3:4 Pidaona MBUYA kuti Mose akhafendeza chifupi adamchemera kubulukira m'thenthere mbati, “Mose! Mose!” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ndawo, ndili pano!”" 
Exodus3:5 Mulungu adalonga mbati, “Leka fendedzeratu chifupi. Dula nkhwaira zako, thangwi pambuto pana iwepo mphakuchena." 
Exodus3:6 Ndine Mulungu wa makolo ako, Mulungu wa Abrahamu, Isake na Yakobo.” Tenepo Mose adabisa nkhope yache, thangwi akhachita mantha kuyang'ana kuna Mulungu." 
Exodus3:7 MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Ndaona kusanyika kunachita anthu anga m'dziko ya Iguputo; ndava kulira kunachita iwo kufuna kupulumuswa m'manja mwa anyakuyang'anira avinga. Kusanyika kwawo konsene ndikukudziwa," 
Exodus3:8 tenepo ndatchitha kuti ndiapulumuse m'manja mwa anthu a ku Iguputo, pontho kuti ndiabuluse mu Iguputomo mbandiaendesa kudziko yakukoma, ikulu, dziko yamphonje, pontho ile chinchino inakhala Akanani, Ahiti, Aamori, Aperizi, Ahivi, na Ayebusi." 
Exodus3:9 Ine ndavadi kulira kunachita anthu anga, pontho ndaona mule munaavuyira anthu a ku Iguputo." 
Exodus3:10 Chinchino ndikukutuma kuna mfumu wa ku Iguputo, towera ukatsogolere anthu anga kuabulusa mu Iguputomo.”" 
Exodus3:11 Mbwenye Mose adalonga kuna Mulungu mbati, “Ndine ani ine kuti ndiende kuna mfumu, pontho kabulusa Aisraele mu Iguputo?”" 
Exodus3:12 Mulungu adatawira mbati, “Ndinakhala nawe, tenepo ungabulusa anthuwo mu Iguputo, munandipembedza paphiri pano. Chenecho chinakhala chitsikimizo chakuti ndidakutuma ndine.”" 
Exodus3:13 Mbwenye Mose adatawira mbati, “Ine ndingaenda kuna Aisraeleko mbandikaapanga kuti, ‘Mulungu wa makolo anu andituma kuna imwe,’ iwo anakandivunza kuti, ‘Dzinache mbani?’ Apo ndikaapange tani?”" 
Exodus3:14 Mulungu adalonga mbati, “Ine ndine ule ndine. Iwe wathema kaapanga tenepa: ‘Ule ambachemerwa INE NDINE andituma kuna imwepo.’" 
Exodus3:15 Kaapange Aisraele kuti ine, MBUYA, Mulungu wa makolo awo, Mulungu wa Abrahamu, Isake na Yakobo, ndakutuma kuna iwo. Yeneyi ndi dzinanga yakukhala na kukhala, mifendu inadzayo inandichemera na dzina yeneyi." 
Exodus3:16 Ndoko kagumanyise pabodzi akadamu onsene a Aisraele mbuapange kuti ine, MBUYA, Mulungu wa makolo awo, Mulungu wa Abrahamu, Isake na Yakobo ndidakuonekera. Ukaapange kuti ine ndaakumbuka, pontho ndaona pinthu pinaachitira anthu a ku Iguputo." 
Exodus3:17 Ndapinyerezera kuti ndiabuluse m'dziko ya Iguputo, kule kunavuyiwa iwo, tenepo ndinaaendesa kudziko yamphonje; dziko ya Akanani, Ahiti, Aamori, Aperizi, Ahivi na Ayebusi." 
Exodus3:18 “Anthu anga anakava pinafuna iwe kaapanga. Tenepo iwe wathema kwenda na akadamu a Aisraele kuna mfumu wa ku Iguputo kampanga kuti, ‘MBUYA, Mulungu wa Aheberi, apionesera yekha ene kuna ife. Chinchino titawiriseni kwenda ulendo wa nsiku zitatu m'thando yatchetcha kapereka nsembe kuna MBUYA Mulungu wathu.’" 
Exodus3:19 Ndikupidziwa kuti mfumu wa ku Iguputo hanakutawirisani tayu kuchita tenepo ngakhala mkono wamphamvu hunamkhakhamiza tayu. 
Exodus3:20 Mbwenye ndinati ndiphatise basa mphamvu zanga, pontho ndinatchunyusa dziko ya Iguputo pakuchita pinthu pyakudodomesa kweneko. Pingamala penepi iye anakutawirisani kwenda." 
Exodus3:21 “Ndinachitisa anthu a ku Iguputo kukulemedzani, towera anthu anga angabuluka m'dzikomo aleke kubuluka chimanja-manja." 
Exodus3:22 Mkazi onsene wa Chiisraele anaenda kuna tsanthembache wa Chiiguputo na mkazi onsene wakukhala m'nyumba mwache mbakapempha nguwo, golidi na pyakuthemesera pyasiliva. Aisraele anavazika pinthu penepi anawo achimuna na achikazi mbakwata mfuma kubuluka nayo ku Iguputo.”" 
Exodus4:1 Tenepo Mose adamtawira MBUYA mbati, “Mwinango Aisraele anakhonda kandikhulupira penu kavesera pinaapanga ine. Ndikachite tani ngakhala iwo analonga kuti imwe hamudandionekera tayu?”" 
Exodus4:2 Tenepo MBUYA adavunza mbati, “Ninji chaphatira iwe m'manja mwakomo?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ndodo.”" 
Exodus4:3 MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Iponye pansi.” Pidaiponya Mose pansi, idasanduka nyoka, iye mbaithawa." 
Exodus4:4 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Kotama uilokote na kumchira kwacheko.” Mose adakotama mbaiphata, tenepo nyokayo idasanduka pontho ndodo m'manja mwache." 
Exodus4:5 MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Kachite penepi kutsikimizira Aisraele kuti MBUYA, Mulungu wa makolo awo, Mulungu wa Abrahamu, Isake na Yakobo akuonekeradi.”" 
Exodus4:6 MBUYA adalonga pontho kuna Mose mbati, “Pitisa dzanjako mumkhanjo mwako.” Mose adaveradi, tenepo pidaibulusa iye, dzanjayo idadzala na matanya akuchena ninga matalala." 
Exodus4:7 Tenepo Mulungu adalonga mbati, “Bwezera mkono wako mumkhanjomo.” Mose adachitadi tenepo, pontho pidaubulusa iye, ndzidzi wenewo ukhali wakuwanga mbukhala montho mwakale ninga manungo ache anango onsene." 
Exodus4:8 Mulungu adalonga mbati, “Ngakhala anakhonda kakukhulupira penu kukwana na chakudodomesa chakutomachi, penepo iwo anakakhulupira na chachiwirichi." 
Exodus4:9 Ngakhala hanakhulupira tayu basi na pyakudodomesa piwiripi, pontho ngakhala hanakavesera pinakaapanga iwe tayu, katunge madzi pang'ono mumkulo wa Nailo mbukakhuthulira pansi. Madziwo anasanduka chiropa.”" 
Exodus4:10 Mbwenye Mose adalonga kuna MBUYA mbati, “Tayu, Mbuyanga, lekani tuma ine. Ine nkhabe dziwa kulonga mwadidi, podi na kale ene, penu chinchino kubulukira ndzidzi udatoma imwe kulonga na ine. Ine ndine munthu wakulemera lulume pontho wachibubu.”" 
Exodus4:11 MBUYA adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Mbani ambampasa munthu mulomo wache? Mbani ambamchitisa kukhala dodo penu kukhala bewewe? Mbani ambampasa maso penu kumchitisa kukhala boli-boli? Ndine, MBUYA, ambamchitisa tenepo." 
Exodus4:12 Chinchino, ndoko! Ndinakuphedza kulonga, pontho ndinakupanga pyakuti ukalonge.”" 
Exodus4:13 Mbwenye Mose adatawira mbati, “Tayu, Mbuya, ndaphata miyendo tumani munthu unango ene.”" 
Exodus4:14 Na mafala enewa MBUYA adazhangalira Mose mbalonga mbati, “Apo tani mbaleako Aroni, Mlevi? Ndikupidziwa kuti iye anakwanisa kulonga mwadidi. Tenepo, chinchino, iye akudza dzagumanikana nawe, iyembo anakomerwa kukuona." 
Exodus4:15 Iwe unakwanisa kulonga kuna iye mbumpanga pyakuti akalonge. Ndinaphedza monsenene awiri kulonga, pontho ndinapanga monsenene awiri pyakuti muchite." 
Exodus4:16 Iye anakhala nyakukulongera mbalonga kuna anthu m'mbuto mwako. Tenepo kuna iye iwe unakhala ninga Mulungu, kumpanga iye pyakuti alonge kuna anthu." 
Exodus4:17 Kwata ndodoyi, thangwi unachita nayo pyakudodomesa.”" 
Exodus4:18 Tenepo Mose adabwerera kuna Yetero, tebzalache, mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ndaphata miyendo, nditawiriseni kubwerera ku Iguputo kuna abale anga kuti ndikaone ngakhala ana moyo na lero.” Yetero adamtawirisa mbagonekana naye." 
Exodus4:19 Mose mbali ku Midiani, MBUYA adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Bwerera ku Iguputo, thangwi onsene akhafuna kukupha ale amala kufa.”" 
Exodus4:20 Tenepo Mose adakwata mkazache na anache achimuna, mbaapakiza pabulu mbaenda nawo ku Iguputo, uku iye m'manja mwache akwata ndodo ikhadampanga Mulungu kuti akwate ile." 
Exodus4:21 MBUYA adalonga pontho kuna Mose mbati, “Podi chinchino ukwenda ku Iguputo, kaonesese kuti wachita pyakudodomesa pyonsene kuna mfumu pakuphatisa basa mphamvu zidakupasa ine kuti uchitire nazo zile. Mbwenye ndinachitisa mtima wa mfumu kukhala wakuuma, tenepo iye hanatawirisa kuti Aisraele abuluke m'dziko mwachemo tayu." 
Exodus4:22 Natenepo iwe wathema kampanga mfumuyo kuti ine, MBUYA, ndikulonga kuti, ‘Israele ndi mwananga wamamuna wautombo." 
Exodus4:23 Ndidakupanga kuti umtawirise mwananga wamamunayo kuti aende, towera akandipembedza, mbwenye iwe udakhonda pyako. Chinchino ndinati ndiphe mwanako wamamuna wautombo.’ ”" 
Exodus4:24 Panjira padagonera iwo ulendo wawo ku Iguputo, MBUYA adagumanikana na Mose mbafuna kumpha." 
Exodus4:25 Tenepo Zipora, mkazache, adalokota mwala wakusongoka mbagwanda nawo mwanache nsonga yachimuna mbakhuya nawo manyalo a Mose. Na thangwi ya kugwanda nsonga yachimuna kweneku, iye adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Ndiwe mamuna wa chiropa kuna ine.” Natenepo MBUYA hadaphe Mose tayu." 
Exodus4:26  
Exodus4:27 Ndzidzi wenewu MBUYA akhadalonga kuna Aroni mbati, “Ndoko m'thando yatchetcha ukagumanikane na Mose.” Tenepo iye adenda kagumanikana naye paphiri ya Mulungu. Pidagumanikana iye naye adampsompsona." 
Exodus4:28 Natenepo Mose adapanga Aroni pyonsene pikhadalonga MBUYA ndzidzi ukhampanga iye kuti abwerere ku Iguputo; iye adampanga pontho pyakudodomesa pikhadamtonga MBUYA kuti iye achite pile. 
Exodus4:29 Tenepo Mose na Aroni adenda ku Iguputo mbakagumanyisa pabodzi akadamu a Aisraele onsene. 
Exodus4:30 Aroni adaapanga mafala onsene akhadalonga MBUYA kuna Mose ale, tenepo Mose adachita pyakudodomesa pyonsene pamaso pa anthu." 
Exodus4:31 Iwo adakhulupira, pontho pidava iwo kuti MBUYA akhadadza kuna iwo, pontho kuti akhadaona kuvuyiwa kwawo, adalamba pansi mbampembedza." 
Exodus5:1 Tenepo Mose na Aroni adenda kuna mfumu wa ku Iguputo mbalonga mbati, “MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele, akulonga kuti, ‘Tawirisa anthu anga kuti aende, towera akachite phwando yakundilemedza nayo m'thando yatchetcha.’ ”" 
Exodus5:2 Mfumu adavunza mbati, “Apo MBUYA mbani? Ndatani kuti ndimvesere mbanditawirisa Aisraele kwenda? Ine nkhabe kumdziwa MBUYA, tenepo ine nkhabe kutawirisa Aisraele kwenda tayu.”" 
Exodus5:3 Mose na Aroni adatawira mbati, “Mulungu wa Aheberi adapitchulula yekha ene kuna ife. Titawiriseni kuti tiende ulendo wa nsiku zitatu m'thando yatchetcha kapereka nsembe kuna MBUYA Mulungu wathu. Tingakhonda chita tenepo, iye anatipha na utenda penu nkhondo.”" 
Exodus5:4 Mfumu adalonga kuna Mose na Aroni mbati, “Thangwi ache ninji mukulekesa anthu kuphata mabasawo? Bwererani kaphata mabasanu!" 
Exodus5:5 Anthumwe chinchino mwainjipa pyakwanga kupiringana anthu a muno mu Iguputo. Tenepo munafuna kuleka pyanu kuphata basa!” 
Exodus5:6 Nsiku yonthoyo mfumu adatonga anyakuayang'anira avinga a mu Iguputo, pontho akadamu a Aisraele mbati," 
Exodus5:7 “Lekani kuapasave maudzu akuumba nawo njerwa. Apangeni kuti akapisakire okha ene. 
Exodus5:8 Mbwenye aumbe basi konta ya njerwa sasawa ninga mwakale, aleke chepesa. Iwo nkhabe basa izinji ya kuphata tayu, ndi thangwi yache iwo akundipempha ndzidzi onsene kuti ndiatawirise kwenda kapereka nsembe kuna Mulungu wawo!" 
Exodus5:9 Aphatiseni basa anthu enewa pikulu kuti akhale pakaliki-liki mbasowa ndzidzi wakuvesera pinthu pyakunama pinapangwa iwopi.” 
Exodus5:10 Anyakuayang'anira avinga na akadamu a Aisraele ale adenda mbakalonga kuna anthu mbati, “Mfumu alonga kuti iye hanakupasanive maudzu akuumba nawo njerwa tayu." 
Exodus5:11 Iye akulonga kuti imwe mwathema kapisakira mwekha ene maudzu konsene kunaagumana imweko, mbwenye mwathema basi kuumba njerwa konta sasawa ninga mwakale mule.”" 
Exodus5:12 Tenepo anthu adenda konsene kwene mu Iguputo kusaka-saka maudzu. 
Exodus5:13 Anyakuayang'anira avinga adayesa-yesa kuakhakhamiza kuti aumbe nsiku na nsiku konta ya njerwa sasawa ninga mwakale pikhapaswa iwo maudzu. 
Exodus5:14 Anyakuayang'anira avinga ale adamenya akadamu a Aisraele ale akhadapaswa utongi wakuyang'anira pabasa yeneyi. Iwo adavunza mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji imwe anthu mukukhonda kuumba njerwa konta sasawa ninga mwakale mule?”" 
Exodus5:15 Akadamu a Aisraele adenda kadungunya kuna mfumu mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji, Mfumu, mukuchita penepi kuna ife?" 
Exodus5:16 Ife nee tikupaswa maudzu tayu, mbwenye tikutongwa basi kuumba njerwa! Tenepo ife tikumenywa. Aphophonya mbanthu anu onthowa.”" 
Exodus5:17 Mfumu adatawira mbati, “Ndimwe akupolola, pontho imwe nkhabe funa kuphata basa tayu. Ndi thangwi yache mukundipempha kuti ndikutawiriseni kwenda kapereka nsembe kuna MBUYA." 
Exodus5:18 Chinchino bwererani kaphata mabasanu! Imwe nkhabe paswave maudzu tayu, kwache mwathema basi kuumba njerwa konta sasawa ninga mwakale mule.”" 
Exodus5:19 Akadamu a Aisraele adadzindikira kuti iwo akhali panyatwa pidapangwa iwo kuti adathema kuumba njerwa konta sasawa ninga mwakale mule nsiku na nsiku. 
Exodus5:20 Pikhabuluka iwo kwenda, adagumanikana na Mose na Aroni, ale akhaadikhirira." 
Exodus5:21 Iwo adalonga kuna Mose na Aroni mbati, “MBUYA aona pyachita imwepi, tenepo anati akutchunyuseni thangwi ya kuchitisa mfumu na mathubu ache kutizonda. Imwe mwaapasa thangwi ya kutiphera nayo.”" 
Exodus5:22 Tenepo Mose adabwerera pontho kuna MBUYA mbalonga mbati, “MBUYA, mwatani munavunga anthu anu? Mudanditumiranji kuno?" 
Exodus5:23 Kutomera ndzidzi udenda ine kuna mfumu kalonga na dzinanu na lero iye akuavuya basi. Tenepo imwe nee mwachitapo pinthu kuaphedza tayu!” 
Exodus6:1 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Chinchino unati uone pinafuna ine chita kuna mfumu. Ndinamkhakhamiza kutawirisa anthu anga kuti aende. Ndinati ndimkhakhamize maka-maka kuabulusa m'dziko mwachemo.”" 
Exodus6:2 Mulungu adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Ine ndine MBUYA." 
Exodus6:3 Ine ndidaonekera kuna Abrahamu, Isake na Yakobo ninga Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene, mbwenye sidapichite ndekha ene tayu kudziwika kuna iwo na dzinanga yakuchena, MBUYA." 
Exodus6:4 Ndidachita pontho chiverano nawo mbandiapanga kuti ndinaapasa dziko ya Kanani, dziko ile ikhadakhala iwo ninga alendo." 
Exodus6:5 Chinchino ndava kubulira kwa Aisraele, ale adaikhwa paubitchu na anthu a ku Iguputo, tenepo ine ndakumbuka chiverano chidachita ine na iwo." 
Exodus6:6 Tenepo panga Aisraele kuti ine ndikulonga kuna iwo kuti, ‘Ine ndine MBUYA; ine ndinakupulumusani mbandikusudzulani panyatwa ya ubitchu mu Iguputo na mkono wanga wamphamvu. Ndinaatchunyusa pikulu mbandikupulumusani." 
Exodus6:7 Ndinakusanduzani kukhala anthu anga, inembo ndinakhala Mulungu wanu. Penepo imwe munadziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA, Mulungu wanu, ndingakusudzulani paubitchu mu Iguputo." 
Exodus6:8 Ndinakudzesani kudziko, ile idadumbira ine kuna Abrahamu, Isake na Yakobo; mbandiipereka kuna imwe kukhala yanu ene. Ine ndine MBUYA.’ ”" 
Exodus6:9 Mose adalonga penepi kuna Aisraele, mbwenye iwo hadamvesere tayu, thangwi mitimawo idasanyika pikulu na ubitchu wakuphawu." 
Exodus6:10 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Exodus6:11 “Ndoko kapange mfumu kuti iye athema kutawirisa Aisraele kubuluka m'dziko mwachemo.” 
Exodus6:12 Mbwenye Mose adatawira mbati, “Ngakhala Aisraele hakundivesera tayu, apo ndi tani na mfumuyo? Ine ndine munthu pyache wamathatha.”" 
Exodus6:13 Tenepo MBUYA adatonga Mose na Aroni mbati, “Pangani Aisraele na mfumu ene wa ku Iguputo kuti ndakutongani ndine kutsogolera Aisraele kubuluka mu Iguputo.”" 
Exodus6:14 Rubeni, mwana wamamuna wautombo wa Yakobo, akhali na ana anayi achimuna: Hanoki, Palu, Hezironi na Karimi; iwo akhali makolo a mbumba adakwata madzinawo ale." 
Exodus6:15 Simioni akhali na ana atanthatu achimuna: Yemuele, Yamini, Ohadi, Yakini, Zohari na Shauli, mwana wamamuna wa mkazi wa ku Kanani; iwo akhali makolo a mbumba adakwata madzinawo ale." 
Exodus6:16 Levi akhali na ana atatu achimuna: Gereshoni, Kohati na Merari; iwo akhali makolo a mbumba adakwata madzinawo ale. Levi adakhala moyo pyaka dzana na makumatatu na pinomwe." 
Exodus6:17 Gereshoni akhali na ana awiri achimuna: Libini na Shimei: iwo akhali na pidzukulu pizinji. 
Exodus6:18 Kohati akhali na ana anayi achimuna: Amuramu, Izihara, Hebroni na Uziele. Kohati adakhala moyo pyaka dzana na makumatatu na pitatu." 
Exodus6:19 Merari akhali na ana awiri achimuna: Mahili na Mushi. Enewa ndi mbumba ya Levi na pidzukulu pyawo. 
Exodus6:20 Amuramu adasemba Yokebedi, nyamaingache babache, ule adabala Aroni na Mose. Amuramu adakhala moyo pyaka dzana na makumatatu na pinomwe." 
Exodus6:21 Izihara akhali na ana atatu achimuna: Kora, Nefegi na Zikiri." 
Exodus6:22 Uzielembo akhali na ana atatu achimuna: Mishaele, Elizafani na Sitiri." 
Exodus6:23 Aroni adasemba Elisheba, mwana wamkazi wa Aminadabu, pontho nyamaingache Nashoni; iye adambalira Nadabu, Abihu, Eleazara na Itamara." 
Exodus6:24 Kora akhali na ana atatu achimuna: Asiri, Elikana na Abiasafu; enewa akhali makolo a mbumba akhadapambuka kuna mbumba ya Kora ale." 
Exodus6:25 Eleazara, mwana Aroni, adasemba mbodzi wa ana achikazi a Putiele mbabala naye Finiasi. Enewa akhali akadamu a mbumba ya m'dzinza ya Levi malingana mabanjawo." 
Exodus6:26 Nkhuna amuna enewa, Aroni na Mose, kudalonga MBUYA mbati, “Tsogolerani Aisraele kubuluka mu Iguputo.”" 
Exodus6:27 Iwo akhali amuna ale adapanga mfumu wa ku Iguputo kuti abuluse Aisraele mu Iguputo. Anthu ache ngonthowa Mose na Aroni. 
Exodus6:28 Pidalonga MBUYA kuna Mose m'dziko ya Iguputo," 
Exodus6:29 adalonga mbati, “Ine ndine MBUYA. Panga mfumu wa ku Iguputo pyonsene pinakupanga ine.”" 
Exodus6:30 Mbwenye Mose adatawira mbati, “Imwe mukupidziwa kuti ine ndine munthu pyache wamathatha, apo pinakwanisika tani kuti mfumu akandivesere?”" 
Exodus7:1 MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Yang'ana, ndinati ndikuchitise kukhala ninga ndiwe Mulungu kuna mfumu, tenepo mbaleako Aroni analonga kuna iye ninga mprofeti wako." 
Exodus7:2 Panga Aroni pyonsene pyakutonga ine, tenepo iye anapanga mfumu kuti atawirise Aisraele kubuluka m'dziko mwache." 
Exodus7:3 Mbwenye ndinaumisa mtima wa mfumuyo, tenepo iye hanakuveserani tayu, podi kwene kuti ndichite pidzindikiro na pyakudodomesa pizinji mu Iguputo. Penepo ine ndinadzesa kutchunyuka kukulu pana Iguputo mbandibulusa madzinza a anthu anga mu Iguputomo." 
Exodus7:4  
Exodus7:5 Tenepo anthu a ku Iguputo anapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA ndingafuthula mkono wanga kubulusa Aisraele m'dziko mwawomo.” 
Exodus7:6 Mose na Aroni adachita ninga montho mudaatongera MBUYA. 
Exodus7:7 Pandzidzi ukhalonga iwo kuna mfumu, Mose akhali pyaka makumasere pyakubalwa, Aronimbo akhali na pyaka makumasere na pitatu." 
Exodus7:8 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose na Aroni mbati," 
Exodus7:9 “Ngakhala mfumu anakafuna kuti mumtsikimizire pakuchita chakudodomesa, ukapange Aroni kuti akwate ndodo yache mbaiponya pansi pamaso pa mfumuyo, tenepo ndodo inasanduka nyoka.”" 
Exodus7:10 Tenepo Mose na Aroni adenda kuna mfumu mbakachita ninga montho mukhadaapangira MBUYA. Aroni adaponya ndodo yache pansi pamaso pa mfumu na mathubu ache, ndodoyo idasanduka nyoka." 
Exodus7:11 Mfumu adachemeresa amunache anzeru na anyamatsengache, iwombo adachita chibodzi-bodzi na matsengawo." 
Exodus7:12 Iwo adaponya pansi ndodo zawo mbazisanduka nyoka. Mbwenye ndodo ya Aroni idakhudyula ndodo zawo zonsene zile. 
Exodus7:13 Kwache mfumu akhali wakuuma mtima basi, pontho hadaavesere tayu Mose na Aroni ninga montho mukhadalongera MBUYA." 
Exodus7:14 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Mfumu auma mtima pyakwanga mbakhonda kutawira kuti anthu anga aende." 
Exodus7:15 Tenepo ndoko na machibese ukagumanikane naye pinatchithira iye kumkulo. Kwata ndodo idasanduka nyoka ile mbukamdikhire pankhomole ya mkulo. 
Exodus7:16 Tenepo ukalonge kuna mfumu kuti, ‘MBUYA, Mulungu wa Aheberi, andituma kuti ndikupangeni kuti mutawirise anthu ache kwenda, towera akwanise kumpembedza m'thando yatchetcha. Mbwenye na lero, imwe hamudavere tayu." 
Exodus7:17 Mfumu, chinchino MBUYA akulonga kuti munati mumdziwe kuti iye mbani kubulukira pa pinthu pyonsene pinafuna iye kuchita. Yang'anani, ndinamenya madzi mumkulomu na ndodo yanga, tenepo madzi anasanduka chiropa." 
Exodus7:18 Nsomba zinafamo, pontho mkulo unanunkha pyakwanga mwakuti anthu onsene a mu Iguputo hanakwanisa kumwamo madzi tayu.’ ”" 
Exodus7:19 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Panga Aroni kukwata ndodo yache mbaithonyeza kumikulo, mikhwawa, na mathawale konsene mu Iguputo. Madzi anasanduka chiropa, pontho pamtunda ponsene panakhala chiropa, podi na m'ndilo na m'pitomba mwene munakhala chiropa.”" 
Exodus7:20 Tenepo Mose na Aroni adachita ninga mudaapangira MBUYA. Pamaso pa mfumu na mathubu ache, Aroni adakwiza m'dzulu ndodo yache mbamenya nayo madzi, tenepo madzi onsene mumkulomo adasanduka chiropa." 
Exodus7:21 Nsomba zidafamo, mkulowo udanunkha pyakwanga mwakuti anthu a ku Iguputo hadakwanise kumwamo madzi tayu. Ponsene pene mu Iguputo pakhali chiropa." 
Exodus7:22 Tenepo anyamatsenga a mfumu adachita chibodzi-bodzi na matsengawo, kwache mfumu adaumiratu mtima. Mfumu adakhonda kuvesera Mose na Aroni ninga montho mukhadalongera MBUYA." 
Exodus7:23 M'mbuto mwache iye adazungunuka mbabwerera pyache m'nyumba mwache yachifumu okhonda ikha konta penepi. 
Exodus7:24 Anthu onsene a ku Iguputo adakumba m'khundu-khundu mwa mkulo kusaka madzi akumwa, thangwi iwo hadakwanise tayu kumwa madzi a mumkulomo." 
Exodus7:25 Nsiku zinomwe zidagwanda kubuluka pandzidzi udamenya MBUYA madzi mumkulo mule. 
Exodus8:1 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Ndoko kuna mfumu, ukampange kuti MBUYA akulonga kuti, ‘Tawirisa anthu anga kwenda, towera akwanise kandipembedza." 
Exodus8:2 Ungakhonda ndinati nditchunyuse dziko yako yonsene na anyanchidwe. 
Exodus8:3 Mkulo wa Nailo unadzala na anyanchidwe mwakuti anabuluka mumkulomo mbakapita m'nyumba mwako, kusubi kwako, patalimba pako m'nyumba za mathubu ako na anthu ako, pontho na mwakuphikira mikate na mwakumunyira mpambo mwene." 
Exodus8:4 Iwo anakukwirakwirani, iwe, anthu ako, pontho na mathubu ako ene.’ ”" 
Exodus8:5 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Panga Aroni kuti aphatire ndodo yache mbathonya nayo kumikulo, mikhwawa, na mathawale, mbachitisa anyanchidwe kubuluka m'madzimo kudza pamtunda.”" 
Exodus8:6 Aroni adaphatira ndodo yache mbathonya nayo pamadzi ponsene, natenepo anyanchidwe adabuluka m'madzimo mbaphopha pamtunda ponsene." 
Exodus8:7 Kwache anyamatsenga adaphatisa basa matsengawo, iwombo adachitisa kuti anyanchidwe abuluke m'madzimo kudza pamtunda." 
Exodus8:8 Mfumu adachemeresa Mose na Aroni mbalonga mbati, “Pempherani kuna MBUYA kuti abuluse anyanchidwe, natenepo ndinatawirisa anthu anu kwenda, towera akwanise kapereka nsembe kuna MBUYA.”" 
Exodus8:9 Mose adatawira mbati, “Ndinakomerwa pyakwanga kukupemphererani. Longani kwene ndzidzi wathema ine kapempherera, imwe, mathubu anu na anthu anu ene. Tenepo anyanchidwe anamala mbapakhala nee nyanchidwe na mbodzi ene wakusalira kupambula mumkulo wa Nailo mwene basi.”" 
Exodus8:10 Mfumu adatawira mbati, “Upemphere mangwana.” Mose adalonga mbati, “Ndinachita ninga montho mwapemphera imwe, tenepo munapidziwa kuti nkhabeve unango ninga MBUYA, Mulungu wathu tayu." 
Exodus8:11 Anyanchidwe anabuluka pakati pa imwe, mathubu anu na anthu anu ene mbapakhala nee nyanchidwe na mbodzi ene wakusalira kupambula mu Nailo basi.”" 
Exodus8:12 Tenepo Mose na Aroni adenda pyawo kubuluka pamaso pa mfumu. Mose adapemphera kuna MBUYA kuti abuluse anyanchidwe akhadadzesa iye kuna mfumu ale. 
Exodus8:13 MBUYA adachita ninga mudapemphera Mose, tenepo anyanchidwe m'nyumba, papintalo na m'minda adamala kufa." 
Exodus8:14 Anthu a ku Iguputo adaamuluka pamilu mikulu-mikulu, mpakana dziko idanunkha thangwi ya anyanchidwewo." 
Exodus8:15 Pidaona mfumu kuti anyanchidwe ale amala kufa, iye adaumisa pontho mtima ninga montho mukhadapilongera MBUYA mule, mfumu hadavesere Mose na Aroni tayu." 
Exodus8:16 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Panga Aroni kuti amenye pansi na ndodo yache, tenepo mu Iguputo monsene fumbi inasanduka matchunya.”" 
Exodus8:17 Tenepo Aroni adamenya pansi na ndodo yache, tenepo fumbi yonsene mu Iguputo idasanduka matchunya, ale adaumbikira nyama na anthu ene." 
Exodus8:18 Anyamatsenga adapiyeserambo kuphatisa basa matsengawo kuti matchunya adzembo, kwache adapichimwana. Matchunya akhali ponsene pene," 
Exodus8:19 tenepo anyamatsenga ale adalonga kuna mfumu mbati, “Achita penepi ndi Mulungu!” Mbwenye mfumu adaumisa mtima basi, pontho hadavesere Mose na Aroni tayu ninga montho mukhadapilongera MBUYA." 
Exodus8:20 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Mangwana na machibese, ndoko kagumanikane na mfumu pinaenda iye kumkulo mbakumpange kuti MBUYA akulonga kuti, ‘Tawirisa anthu anga kwenda, towera akwanise kandipembedza." 
Exodus8:21 Ndikukucheuza kuti ngakhala unakhonda ndinati ndikutchunyuse na ntchentche pabodzi pene na mathubu ako na anthu ako. M'nyumba za anthu a ku Iguputo munadzala na ntchentche, pontho ponsene pene panakhala ntchentche." 
Exodus8:22 Mbwenye sinachita chibodzi-bodzi tayu m'nthemba ya Gosheni, kunakhala anthu anga kule. Kweneko nee kunakhala wumbi-wumbi wa ntchentche tayu, towera mupidziwe kuti ine MBUYA ndili pabasa mu Iguputo muno." 
Exodus8:23 Ndinasiyanisa pakati pa anthu anga na anthu ako. Chakudodomesa chenechi chinachitika mangwanawa.’ ” 
Exodus8:24 MBUYA adagwisa wumbi-wumbi wa ntchentche m'nyumba mwa mfumu na m'nyumba za mathubu ache. Dziko yonsene ya Iguputo idaipiswa na ntchentche. 
Exodus8:25 Tenepo mfumu adachemeresa Mose na Aroni mbalonga mbati, “Ndokoni kapereke nsembe kuna Mulungu wanu m'dziko montho muno.”" 
Exodus8:26 Mose adatawira mbati, “Kuchita tenepo nee pinakhala pyakuthema tayu, thangwi anthu a mu Iguputo muno anatizunguza angationa tikupereka nsembe kuna MBUYA Mulungu wathu. Ngakhala tinaphatisa basa nyama zenezi mbatidawira anthu a mu Iguputo pakuzipereka nsembe panationa iwopo, anati atiphe na miyala." 
Exodus8:27 Ife tathema kwenda ulendo wa nsiku zitatu m'thando yatchetcha kapereka nsembe kuna MBUYA, Mulungu wathu, ninga montho mudatitongera iye mule.”" 
Exodus8:28 Mfumu adalonga mbati, “Ndinakutawirisani kwenda kapereka nsembe kuna MBUYA, Mulungu wanu, m'thando yatchetcha, mungakhonda kwenda kutali pyakwanga. Chinchino undipempherere kuna MBUYA.”" 
Exodus8:29 Mose adatawira mbati, “Ndingabuluka kwene pano, ndinati ndikapemphere kuna MBUYA kuti mangwana ntchentche zimale kuna imwe, mathubu anu na anthu ene. Kwache muleke kutinyengeza pontho mbamukhonda kuti anthu aleke kwenda kapereka nsembe kuna MBUYA.”" 
Exodus8:30 Mose adabuluka pana mfumupo mbaenda kapemphera kuna MBUYA," 
Exodus8:31 tenepo MBUYA adachita ninga mudapemphera Mose mule. Ntchentche zidabuluka kuna mfumu, mathubu ache na anthu ache ene; nee padasalave ntchentche na ibodzi ene tayu." 
Exodus8:32 Podi na ndzidzi wenewu ene mfumu adaumisa basi mtima mbakhonda kutawirisa anthu kwenda. 
Exodus9:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Ndoko kuna mfumu ukampange kuti MBUYA, Mulungu wa Aheberi akulonga kuti, ‘Tawirisa anthu anga kwenda, towera akwanise kandipembedza." 
Exodus9:2 Ungakhonda pontho kuatawirisa kwenda 
Exodus9:3 ndinati ndikutchunyuse pakutumiza muliri wakugoswa pana pifuyo pyako; akavalo ako, mabulu ako, ngamila zako, ng'ombe zako, mabirako na mbuzi zako." 
Exodus9:4 Ndinasiyanisa pakati pa pifuyo pya Aisraele na pifuyo pya anthu ako, pontho nkhabe chifuyo na chibodzi chene cha Aisraele chinafa tayu." 
Exodus9:5 Ine MBUYA ndapifuna kuti penepi ndipichite mangwanawa.’ ” 
Exodus9:6 Mangwana mwache MBUYA adachita ninga mukhadalongera iye, tenepo pifuyo pyonsene pya ku Iguputo pidafa, mbwenye nkhabe chifuyo na chibodzi chene cha Aisraele chidafa tayu." 
Exodus9:7 Mfumu adatuma anthu kuti akavunze mwadidi pikhadachitika pile, tenepo adapangwa kuti nee chifuyo na chibodzi chene cha Aisraele chikhadafa tayu. Mbwenye mfumu adaumisa mtima mbakhonda tawirisa anthu kwenda." 
Exodus9:8 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose na Aroni mbati, “Tapa dotha yakudzala m'dzanja kubulukira pamoto; Mose akaiwazire m'dzulu pamaso pa mfumu." 
Exodus9:9 Iyo inabalalika ninga fumbi yakufinuka m'dziko yonsene ya Iguputo mbapichitisa kuti pakhale anyakadumu konsene kwene pana anthu na pifuyo pene.” 
Exodus9:10 Tenepo iwo adatapa dotha mbaimira pamaso pa mfumu; Mose adawazira dotha ile m'dzulu mbapabuluka anyakadumu mbichitisa kuti pamanungo pa anthu na pifuyo pakhale pironda. 
Exodus9:11 Anyamatsenga hadakwanise tayu kuonekera kuna Mose, thangwi iwo akhali na anyakadumu okhokha ningambo anthu a ku Iguputo onsene." 
Exodus9:12 Mbwenye MBUYA adachitisa mfumu kuumisa mtimache, tenepo iye hadavesere Mose na Aroni tayu ninga montho mukhadalongera MBUYA." 
Exodus9:13 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Mangwana na machibese uende kagumanikana na mfumu mbukampange kuti MBUYA, Mulungu wa Aheberi akulonga kuti, ‘Tawirisa anthu anga kwenda, towera akwanise kandipembedza." 
Exodus9:14 Ndzidzi uno ndinatchunyusa nee mathubu ako na anthu ako okha tayu, mbwenye ndinati nditchunyuse na iwe ene, towera upidziwe kuti nkhabeve unango sasawa na ine pano padziko yonsene yapansi." 
Exodus9:15 Ngakhala ine ndidatchunyusa iwe na anthu ako na utenda, monsene mbamudamaliratu kuvungika." 
Exodus9:16 Mbwenye kufuna kukuonesa mphamvu zanga ndatawirisa kuti imwe mukhale na moyo, towera ndidziwike konsene kwene padziko yonsene yapansi," 
Exodus9:17 kwache iwe ukuthimiza basi kutumbama mbukhonda tawirisa anthu anga kwenda. 
Exodus9:18 Mangwana pandzidzi ninga uno ndinati ndidzese chonzi cha matalala chakugoswaletu, ale chipo hadachitikepo mu Iguputo muno tayu kutomera pandzidzi udakhazikiswa iwo mpakana lero." 
Exodus9:19 Tenepo tongani kuti pifuyo pyanu na pinthu pyonsene pina imwe pikhale pakupata. Matalala anagwa pana anthu na pifuyo pyakusiyiwa pakwecha, tenepo pinafa.’ ”" 
Exodus9:20 Mathubu anango a mfumu adachita mantha na pikhadalonga MBUYA pile, tenepo adapitisa mabitchu awo na pifuyo pyawo pakupata." 
Exodus9:21 Kwache anango hadapiikhe konta tayu pidalonga MBUYA pile mbasiya pyawo mabitchu na pifuyo pyawo panja pakwecha. 
Exodus9:22 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Kwiza dzanjako kuthambo, tenepo matalala anagwa ponsene pene m'dziko yonsene ya Iguputo pana na anthu, pifuyo na pana mbewu zonsene m'minda.”" 
Exodus9:23 Mose adathonyeza ndodo yache kuthambo, natenepo MBUYA adatumiza chiphaliwali na matalala, pontho njazi idamenya pansi. MBUYA adatumiza" 
Exodus9:24 matalala akulu-akulu pontho na njazi kuchetuma uku na uku. Chikhali chonzi chakugoswa, chile chipo nee chidachitikepo mu Iguputo tayu kutomera pandzidzi udakhazikiswa iwo." 
Exodus9:25 Ponsene pene mu Iguputo matalala adagwisa pinthu kuthimiza anthu onsene na pifuyo pyonsene pikhali pakwecha. Adagwisa mbewu m'minda mbakaula nthambi m'miti yonsene. 
Exodus9:26 Nthemba ya Gosheni kukhakhala Aisraele kule kukhali kumbuto kokha kwene kule kukhali nkhabe matalala. 
Exodus9:27 Mfumu adachemeresa Mose na Aroni mbalonga mbati, “Ndzidzi uno ine ndadawa; MBUYA ngwakulungama, pontho anthu anga na ine ene tadawa." 
Exodus9:28 Pempherani kuna MBUYA thangwi matalala na chiphaliwali penepi pyakwana. Ndinadumbira kukutawirisani kwenda; imwe nkhabeve funika kukhala kuno tayu.” 
Exodus9:29 Mose adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Sindzidzi nkhubuluka mumzinda muno ndinati ndikwize manjanga m'dzulu kupemphera kuna MBUYA. Chiphaliwali chinamatama kulira, pontho nee panakhalave matalala tayu, towera mupidziwe kuti dziko yapansi nja Mbuya." 
Exodus9:30 Mbwenye ndikupidziwa kuti imwe na mathubu anu na lero nkhabe gopa MBUYA Mulungu tayu.” 
Exodus9:31 Bwazi na mapira pidavungika, thangwi mapira adatokota, bwazimbo akhatoma kuchita maluwa." 
Exodus9:32 Mbwenye tirigu hadavungike tayu, thangwi hukhali ndzidzi wache wakutokota tayu." 
Exodus9:33 Mose adabuluka pana mfumupo mbabuluka mumzindamo. Iye adakwiza manjache m'dzulu mbapemphera kuna MBUYA. Matalala, chiphaliwali na mvula pyonsene pidaleka." 
Exodus9:34 Pidaona mfumu pikhadachitika pile adadawa pontho. Iye na mathubu ache adaumisa mtima ninga mwakale," 
Exodus9:35 pontho, ninga montho mukhadapilongera MBUYA kudzera muna Mose, mfumu hadatawirise Aisraele kwenda tayu." 
Exodus10:1 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Ndoko ukaonane na mfumu. Ine ndachitisa iye na mathubu ache kuumisa mtima, towera ndichite pyakudodomesa pyangapi pakati pawo," 
Exodus10:2 pontho kuti imwe mukwanise kupanga ananu na pidzukulu pyanu, mudapupwisira ine anthu a ku Iguputo ndzidzi udachita ine pyakudodomesa ule. Monsenene munapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA.”" 
Exodus10:3 Tenepo Mose na Aroni adenda kuna mfumu mbakalonga mbati, “MBUYA, Mulungu wa Aheberi, akulonga kuti, ‘Unafikira lini kukhonda kundivera? Tawirisa anthu anga kwenda, towera akwanise kandipembedza." 
Exodus10:4 Ngakhala unathimiza kukhonda, ine ndinadzesa nyadzombe m'dziko mwako muno mangwana." 
Exodus10:5 Anainjipa pyakwanga mwakuti anaphopha pansi ponsene. Anadya pyonsene pidakhonda vungwa na matalala; podi na miti ene yasalirayi. 
Exodus10:6 Nyadzombe anadzala m'nyumba mwako, nyumba za mathubu ako na za anthu ako onsene. Ananyanya pyakwanga mwakuti chipo nee makolo anu, penu makolo awombo adzati kumuona tayu kutomera ndzidzi udakhazikika iwo m'dziko muno.’ ” Tenepo Mose adazungunuka mbaenda pyache kubuluka pamaso pa mfumu." 
Exodus10:7 Mathubu a mfumu adalonga kuna mfumuyo mbati, “Munthu weneyu analeka lini kutinensa? Atawiriseni Aisraele kwenda pyawo, towera akwanise kapembedza MBUYA, Mulungu wawo. Kadi imwe nkhabe kuona kuti dziko ya Iguputo ikuvungika tayu?”" 
Exodus10:8 Tenepo Mose na Aroni adachemereswa pontho kuna mfumu, ule adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Munakwanisa kwenda kapembedza MBUYA, Mulungu wanu, kwache mbani maka-maka anafuna kwenda?”" 
Exodus10:9 Mose adatawira mbati, “Tinaenda tonsene, kuthimizapo ana na nkhalamba zathu zene. Tinakwata anathu achimuna na achikazi ene, mabirathu, mbuzi na ng'ombe zathu, thangwi tathema kachita phwando yakulemedza nayo MBUYA.”" 
Exodus10:10 Mfumu adalonga mbati, “Ndinadumbira na dzina ya MBUYA kuti sinakutawirisani kukwata akazanu na ananu ene tayu. Penepa mukuonesa pakwecha kuti imwe munafuna pyakupandukira." 
Exodus10:11 Nkhabe! Amuna okha aende kapembedza MBUYA, thangwi pikhapempha imwe mphenepi.” Na mafala enewa Mose na Aroni adabuluswa pamaso pa mfumu." 
Exodus10:12 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Thonya na dzanjako uku na uku m'dziko ya Iguputo kudzesa nyadzombe. Nyadzombe anabwera mbadya pyakumera pyonsene, pile pikhadasalira khonda vungwa na matalala.”" 
Exodus10:13 Mose adathonyeza ndodo yache kudzulu, tenepo MBUYA adachitisa mphepo yakumabulukiro dzuwa kugundika mbikhala m'dziko monsenemo kubulukira masikati mpakana mosiku onsene. Na machibese mphepo ile idadzesa nyadzombe." 
Exodus10:14 Adadza m'mikumbi-mikumbi mbakhazikika m'dziko monsene. Ukhali mkumbi ukulu wa nyadzombe mwakuti chipo iwo hadatome kumuona, penu dzamuonave tayu." 
Exodus10:15 Ponsene padaphopha na nyadzombe kufikirana pansi padaswipa bii mbadya pyonsene pikhadasiyiwa kukhonda vungwa na matalala, kuthimiza nsapo zonsene m'miti. Nkhabe chinthu chiwisi chidasalira pamuti na ubodzi ene penu chakumera m'dziko yonsene ya Iguputo tayu." 
Exodus10:16 Tenepo mfumu kabodzi kene adachemeresa Mose na Aroni mbalonga mbati, “Ine ndadawira MBUYA, Mulungu wanu, pontho na imwe ene." 
Exodus10:17 Kano ndilekereni kudawa kwanga mbamupemphere kuna MBUYA, Mulungu wanu kuti andibulusire muliri wakuphawu.”" 
Exodus10:18 Mose adabuluka pana mfumupo mbakapemphera kuna MBUYA. 
Exodus10:19 Tenepo MBUYA adasanduza mphepo yakumabulukiro dzuwa ile kukhala mphepo yakugoswa yakumadokero dzuwa mbitswaira nyadzombe onsene mbakamtaya ku Nyanza Yakufira. Nkhabe nyadzombe na mbodzi ene adasalira mu Iguputo monsenemo tayu. 
Exodus10:20 Mbwenye MBUYA adaumisa mtima wa mfumu mbakhonda tawirisa Aisraele kwenda. 
Exodus10:21 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Kwiza dzanjako m'dzulu, tenepo mdima wa ndiwe ani unagwa m'dziko yonsene ya Iguputo.”" 
Exodus10:22 Mose adakwiza dzanjache m'dzulu, tenepo padagwa mdima wakugoswa mu Iguputo monsene mbukhala nsiku zitatu." 
Exodus10:23 Anthu a ku Iguputo hadakwanise kuonana tayu, pontho nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene adabuluka pamsuwo pache tayu ndzidzi wenewo. Mbwenye kukhakhala Aisraele kukhali cheza." 
Exodus10:24 Mfumu adachemeresa Mose mbalonga mbati, “Munakwanisa kwenda kapembedza MBUYA; podi akazanu na ananu ene anakwanisa kwenda namwe. Mbwenye mabiranu, mbuzi na ng'ombe zanu pyathema kusala kuno.”" 
Exodus10:25 Mose adatawira mbati, “Apo imwe mwathema kutipasa nyama zakupereka nsembe, pontho na nsembe zinango zakupyerera kuti tikazipereke kuna MBUYA, Mulungu wathu." 
Exodus10:26 Nkhabe, ife tinati tikwate pifuyo pyathu; nkhabe na chibodzi chene chinafuna siya ife m'nduli tayu. Ife tathema sankhula nyama zakupembedza nazo MBUYA, Mulungu wathu. Ife nkhabe dziwa nyama zakuti tipereke nsembe kuna MBUYA kufikirana tifike kweneko.”" 
Exodus10:27 Mbwenye MBUYA adaumisa mtima wa mfumu, iyembo mbakhonda kuatawirisa kwenda." 
Exodus10:28 Iye adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Buluka pamaso panga! Sinafuna kukuonave tayu! Nsiku inakuona ineyo, unaphiwa!”" 
Exodus10:29 Mose adatawira mbati, “Ndimomwene imwe nee munandionave tayu.”" 
Exodus11:1 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Pasala muliri ubodzi kuti nditchunyuse mfumu na anthu ache. Kubuluka penepo iye anakutawirisani kwenda. Ndimomwene kuti iye anakuthamangisani monsenene." 
Exodus11:2 Tenepo panga Aisraele kuti onsenewo apemphe pinthu pyakupithemesera napyo pyagolidi na pyasiliva kuna atsanthembawo.” 
Exodus11:3 MBUYA adachitisa anthu a ku Iguputo kulemedza Aisraele. Ndimomwene kuti mathubu na anthu onsene adamuyesa Mose munthu wamkulu pyakwanga. 
Exodus11:4 Mose adalonga kuna mfumu mbati, “MBUYA akulonga kuti, ‘Pachiti-chiti ndinati ndiende mu Iguputo monsene," 
Exodus11:5 tenepo ana onsene achimuna autombo a mu Iguputo anati afe, kutomera mwana mfumu makayo, ule anafuna kupita ufumuwo, kufikirana ana a mabitchu achikazi ambapeya tirigu ale, pontho ana ng'ombe autombo anafambo basi." 
Exodus11:6 Kunakhala chiliro chikulu mu Iguputo, chile chipo chidaonekepo tayu, penu kuchitika pontho tayu." 
Exodus11:7 Mbwenye nkhabe na mwanambwa ene anauta Aisraele penu pifuyo pyawo tayu. Penepo imwe munadziwa kuti ine, MBUYA, ndimbasiyanisa pakati pa anthu a ku Iguputo na Aisraele.’ ”" 
Exodus11:8 Mose adamalisa na kulonga mbati, “Mathubu anu onsene anabwera kuna ine mbandibulumundira kundipempha kuti ndikwate anthu anga onsene kuti tiende. Kubuluka penepo ndinati ndiende.” Tenepo na kuzhangali kukulu Mose adabuluka pakhali mfumupo mbaenda pyache." 
Exodus11:9 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Mfumu anathimiza kukhonda kukuvesera, towera ndichite pyakudodomesa pyanga pinango pizinji mu Iguputo.”" 
Exodus11:10 Mose na Aroni adachita pyakudodomesa pyonsenepi pamaso pa mfumu, mbwenye MBUYA adaumisa mtima wa mfumu, iyembo mbakhonda tawirisa kuti Aisraele abuluke m'dziko mwache." 
Exodus12:1 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose na Aroni mu Iguputo mbati," 
Exodus12:2 “Mwezi uno ukhale mwezi wakutoma wa chaka kuna imwe. 
Exodus12:3 Panga Aisraele onsene kuti pansiku yachikhumi ya mwezi uno mamuna onsene athema kusankhula mwanabira, penu mwanambuzi mbodzi pabanja yonsene, towera aphe pabanja pache." 
Exodus12:4 Ngakhala banjache njing'ono pyakwanga mwakuti hinakwanisa kumala nyama yonsene yamumphuyo tayu, iye na tsanthembache anakwanisa kuigawana, malingana na kuinjipa kwa anthu, pontho phindi inakwanisa kudya munthu onsene." 
Exodus12:5 Munakwanisa kusankhula bira, penu mbuzi, kwache yathema kukhala imuna ya chaka chibodzi basi pontho yakusowa chilema." 
Exodus12:6 Tenepo na mawulo a nsiku yachikhumi na chinayi ya mwezi uno, mabanja onsene a Aisraele anacheka nyama." 
Exodus12:7 Anthu akwate chiropa pang'ono mbakhwaze pafufu padzulu na makhundu onsene awiri a msuwo wa nyumba munafuna dyerwa nyamamo. 
Exodus12:8 Mosiku wenewo nyama yathema otchiwa mbidyiwa na masamba akuwawa, pontho na mkate wakusowa chakufufumisira." 
Exodus12:9 Lekani kuidya iwisi, penu kuchita kuitereka, mbwenye yonseneyo muchite kuiotcha, kuthimizapo msolo, miyendo na pya m'mimba pene." 
Exodus12:10 Lekani kusiya na phindi ene mpakana machibese; ngakhala inango yasala, yathema kupyerezwa." 
Exodus12:11 Chimbizani mudye, thangwi imwe muli paulendo; valani bande m'chuno mwanu, nkhwaira kumanyalo kwanu, pontho ndodo m'manja mwanu. Yeneyi ndi Phwando ya Paska yakulemedza nayo ine, Mbuya." 
Exodus12:12 “Mosiku wenewo ine ndinaenda mu Iguputo monsene kupha ana achimuna autombo, ana a anthu na a pifuyo pene, kutchunyusa milungu yonsene ya mu Iguputo. Ine ndine MBUYA." 
Exodus12:13 Chiropa pamisuwo ya nyumba chinakhala chidzindikiro cha nyumba zinakhala imwe. Ndingaona chiropacho, ndinanthala penepo mbandikhonda kukukuwazani ndzidzi unatchunyusa ine anthu a ku Iguputo." 
Exodus12:14 Nsiku yeneyo imwe mwathema kusekera ninga phwando ya chipembedzo kukukumbusani pile pyachita ine, MBUYA. Sekerani phwandoyi mpakana mifendu yonsene inadzayo.”" 
Exodus12:15 MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Imwe mwathema nsiku zinomwe kuleka kudya mkate wakukhala na chakufufumisira. Idyani kwene mkate wakusowa chakufufumisira basi. Pansiku yakutoma imwe mwathema kutaya pyakufufumisira mkate pyonsene pya m'nyumba mwanu, thangwi ngakhala munthu unango anadya mkate wakukhala na chakufufumisira pansiku zinomwezi, ine sinamuyesave ninga mbodzi wa anthu anga tayu." 
Exodus12:16 Pansiku yakutoma, pontho na pansiku yachinomwe, imwe mwathema kugumanyikana pabodzi pene kupembedza. Nkhabe kuphata basa pansiku zenezi tayu, mbwenye munakwanisa kusasanya pyakudya." 
Exodus12:17 Chitani phwando yeneyi, thangwi ikhali pansiku yeneyo idabulusa ine madzinzanu mu Iguputo. Mifendu yonsene inadzayo imwe mwathema kusekera phwando yeneyi ninga matongero okhonda mala." 
Exodus12:18 Kubulukira mawulo a nsiku yachikhumi na chinayi ya mwezi wakutoma mpakana mawulo a nsiku yamakumawiri na chibodzi, imwe mwathema kuleka kudya na mkate ene wakukhala na chakufufumisira." 
Exodus12:19 Nsiku zinomwezi m'nyumba mwanu muleke khala pyakufufumisira mikate, thangwi ngakhala munthu unango, mzika penu mlendo, anadya mkate wakukhala na chakufufumisira, ine sinamuyesave ninga mbodzi wa anthu anga tayu.”" 
Exodus12:20  
Exodus12:21 Mose adachemeresa akadamu onsene a Aisraele mbalonga mbati, “Monsenene mwathema kusankhula mwanabira penu mwanambuzi, mumcheke, towera mabanjanu akwanise kusekera Phwando ya Paska." 
Exodus12:22 Mukwate chikhwasa-khwasa, muchivike m'ndilo yakudzala na chiropa mbamuchikhwaze padzulu na makhundu onsene awiri a misuwo ya nyumba zanu. Nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene athema kubuluka m'nyumba mwache kufikirana machibese." 
Exodus12:23 Ndzidzi unaenda MBUYA mu Iguputo monsene kupha anthu a ku Iguputo, anaona chiropa padzulu na makhundu onsene awiri a misuwo yanu, tenepo hanatawirisa nyakuvunga kupita m'nyumba zanu kukuphani tayu." 
Exodus12:24 Imwe na ananu mwathema kuvera matongero enewa kwenda na kwenda. 
Exodus12:25 Mungapita m'dziko idadumbira MBUYA kuna imwe ile, imwe mwathema kuchita mtemo wenewu." 
Exodus12:26 Ananu angakuvunzani kuti, ‘Mtemo wenewu nkhulonga kuti tani?’" 
Exodus12:27 Imwe munatawira kuti, ‘Ndi nsembe ya Paska yakulemedza nayo MBUYA, thangwi iye anthala nyumba za Aisraele mu Iguputo mbakhonda kuakuwaza mbapha anthu a ku Iguputo.’ ” Aisraele adalamba pansi mbapembedza." 
Exodus12:28 Tenepo Aisraele adenda kachita pikhadatonga MBUYA kuti Mose na Aroni apichite pile. 
Exodus12:29 Pachiti-chiti MBUYA adapha ana achimuna autombo onsene a mu Iguputo. Kutomera mwana wamamuna wa mfumu ule akhafuna kupita ufumuwo mpakana ana achimuna a anyaperezo; ana onsene autombo a pifuyo pidaphiwambo basi. 
Exodus12:30 Mosiku wenewo, mfumu, mathubu ache na anthu onsene anango mu Iguputo adalamuka. Mukhali chiliro chikulu mu Iguputo monsene, thangwi nkhabe panyumba na pabodzi pene tayu padakhonda kufa mwana wamamuna." 
Exodus12:31 Mosiku onthowo mfumu adachemeresa Mose na Aroni mbalonga mbati, “Bulukani muno, iwe na Aisraele ako! Bulukani m'dziko mwanga muno. Ndokoni mukapembedze MBUYA ninga mudapemphera imwe." 
Exodus12:32 Kwatani mabiranu, mbuzi na ng'ombe zanu mbamuende. Pontho pempherani kuti ndikhale na mtsanzayiso.”" 
Exodus12:33 Aiguputo adadembetera anthu kuti achimbize kubuluka m'dzikomo mbalonga mbati, “Mungakhonda kubuluka m'dziko muno, tonsene tinati tife.”" 
Exodus12:34 Tenepo anthu adadzaza mwakumunyira mikate na mpambo wakusowa pyakufufumisira mbapimpsampsira na nguwo mbapithukula pamapewa pawo. 
Exodus12:35 Aisraele akhadachita ninga montho mukhadalongera Mose, tenepo akhadapempha pyakupithemesera napyo pyagolidi na pyasiliva, pontho na nguwo kubulukira kuna anthu a ku Iguputo." 
Exodus12:36 MBUYA adachitisa kuti Aiguputo alemedze Aisraele mbaapasa pinthu pikhadapempha iwo. Penepa Aisraele adakwata mfuma ya Aiguputo. 
Exodus12:37 Tenepo Aisraele adatoma ulendo wa miyendo kubulukira ku Ramese kwenda ku Sukoti. Pakhali amuna ninga pikwi madzana matanthatu, nee kulengesa akazi na ana tayu." 
Exodus12:38 Mwinji ukulu wa anthu anango na mabira azinji, mbuzi na ng'ombe pidendambo na anthu." 
Exodus12:39 Iwo adaphika mikate yakusowa chakufufumisira na mpambo ukhadakwata iwo ku Iguputo ule, thangwi akhadabuluswa mu Iguputo mwakututumusa mwakuti adasowa ndzidzi wakusasanyiratu pyakudya pyawo, penu kusasanya mpambo wakusowa pyakufufumisira." 
Exodus12:40 Aisraele akhadakhala mu Iguputo pyaka madzana manayi na makumatatu. 
Exodus12:41 Pansiku yakumala kwa pyaka madzana manayi na makumatatu madzinza onsene a anthu a MBUYA adabuluka mu Iguputo. 
Exodus12:42 Ukhali mosiku udasankhula MBUYA kuabulusa mu Iguputo mwakuayang'anira mwadidi. Mosiku wenewu Aisraele onsene athema kukhala m'maso chaka na chaka mifendu yonsene inadzayo thangwi ngwakupambulika kuna MBUYA. 
Exodus12:43 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose na Aroni mbati, “Matongero a Phwando ya Paska mbawa: Nkhabe mlendo athema kudya Phwando ya Paska tayu," 
Exodus12:44 mbwenye mabitchu onsene adagula imwe athema kudya, ngakhala chakutoma iwo anagwandwa nsonga yachimuna." 
Exodus12:45 Nkhabe mlendo penu nyaganyo athema kudya tayu. 
Exodus12:46 Nyama yonsene yathema kudyerwa m'nyumba mudaphikwa iyo; mbileke buluswa panja, pontho lekani kuswa magogodo a nyamazo." 
Exodus12:47 Anthu onsene a dzinza ya Aisraele athema kusekera phwando yeneyi; 
Exodus12:48 kwache nee mamuna okhonda gwandwa nsonga yachimuna athema kudya tayu. Ngakhala mlendo akhazikika pakati panu, tenepo anafunambo kudya Phwando ya Paska kulemedza MBUYA, imwe mwathema chakutoma kugwanda amuna onsene nsonga yachimuna m'banja mwache. Tenepo athema kuyeswa ninga mzika ya Israele mbakwanisa kusekera nawo phwandoyi." 
Exodus12:49 Matongero onthowa akulonga kuna mzika ya Israele na kuna alendo ene, ale akhazikika pakati panu.”" 
Exodus12:50 Aisraele onsene adavera mbachita pikhadatonga MBUYA kuna Mose na Aroni pile. 
Exodus12:51 Pansiku yeneyo MBUYA adabulusa madzinza a Israele mu Iguputo. 
Exodus13:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Exodus13:2 “Ndipambulireni ana onsene achimuna autombo, thangwi mwana onsene wachimuna wautombo wa Aisraele, pontho mwana onsene wachimuna wautombo wa pifuyo pyanu nganga.”" 
Exodus13:3 Mose adalonga kuna anthu mbati, “Kumbukani nsiku yeneyi, nsiku idabuluka imwe mu Iguputo, kumbuto kukhali imwe mabitchu kule. Yeneyi ndi nsiku idakubulusani MBUYA mu Iguputo na mphamvu zache zikulu. Paleke kudyiwa mikate yakukhala na pyakufufumisira." 
Exodus13:4 Imwe mukubuluka mu Iguputo pansiku yeneyi mwezi wakutoma, mwezi wa Abibu." 
Exodus13:5 MBUYA adadumbira pikulu pene kuna makolo anu kukupasani dziko ya Akanani, Ahiti, Aamori, Ahivi na Ayebusi. Iye angakudzesani m'dziko yamphonje, imwe mwathema kusekera phwando yeneyi mwezi wakutoma chaka na chaka." 
Exodus13:6 Nsiku zinomwe imwe mwathema kudya mikate yakusowa chakufufumisira, pontho pansiku yachinomwe pachitike phwando yakulemedza nayo MBUYA." 
Exodus13:7 Nsiku zinomwe imwe mwathema nee kudya mikate yakukhala na chakufufumisira, pontho paleke khala mkate wakukhala na chakufufumisira penu chakufufumisira chinango chonsene m'dziko mwanu monsene." 
Exodus13:8 Phwando ingatoma, apangeni ananu onsene achimuna kuti mukuchita pyonsenepi, thangwi ya pinthu pidakuchitirani MBUYA ndzidzi udabuluka imwe mu Iguputo." 
Exodus13:9 Chenechi chinakhala chikumbuso, ninga chinthu chinango chakumangirirwa pamkono panu, penu pachipumu panu; chenechi chinakukumbusani kuthimiza kulonga, pontho kufunza Mwambo wa MBUYA, thangwi MBUYA adakubulusani mu Iguputo na mphamvu zache zikulu." 
Exodus13:10 Tenepo sekerani phwando yeneyi chaka na chaka pandzidzi udaikhwa iyo. 
Exodus13:11 “MBUYA angakudzesani m'dziko ya Kanani, ile adadumbira iye kuna imwe na kuna makolo anu," 
Exodus13:12 imwe mwathema kupereka ana autombo achimuna onsene kuna MBUYA. Nyama yonsene yautombo imuna nja MBUYA," 
Exodus13:13 mbwenye imwe mwathema kuombola ana autombo amuna a mabulu pakupereka kuna MBUYA nsembe mwanabira m'mbuto mwache. Ngakhala imwe nkhabe funa kuombola bulu, buluyo mumkhumule khosi yache. Imwe mwathema kuombola ananu achimuna autombo." 
Exodus13:14 M'tsogolo muno, mwanako wamamuna angavunza kuti penepi pikulonganji, unamtawira kuti, ‘MBUYA adatibulusa mu Iguputo na mphamvu zache zikulu, kumbuto kukhali ife mabitchu kule." 
Exodus13:15 Ndzidzi udaumisa mtima mfumu wa ku Iguputo mbakhonda kutitawirisa kwenda, MBUYA adapha ana onsene achimuna autombo m'dziko ya Iguputo, anthu na pifuyo pene pabodzi. Ndi thangwi yache tikupereka nsembe ana achimuna autombo a pifuyo kuna MBUYA, mbwenye mbatiombola anathu onsene achimuna autombo." 
Exodus13:16 Chenechi chinakhala chikumbuso ninga chinthu chinango chakumangirirwa pamkono pathu penu pachipumu pathu, pinatikumbusa kuti MBUYA adatibulusa mu Iguputo na mphamvu zache zikulu.’ ”" 
Exodus13:17 Pidatawira mfumu wa ku Iguputo kuti anthu aende, Mulungu hadaaendese na njira yakugwanda na kudziko ya Afilisti tayu, podi kwene kuti ikhali njira yachigwandira. Mulungu adalonga mbati, “Ine nkhabe funa kuti anthu asanduze manyerezero awo mbabwerera ku Iguputo, ngakhala iwo anaona kuti akwenda kamenya nkhondo.”" 
Exodus13:18 M'mbuto mwache iye adaadzesa na njira yakuzungulira kudzera m'thando yatchetcha kuyang'ana ku Nyanza Yakufira. Aisraele akhali na pida kamenya nkhondo. 
Exodus13:19 Mose adakwata mtembo wa Yosefe ninga mukhadapichitira Yosefe kuti Aisraele adumbire. Yosefe adalonga mbati, “Ndzidzi unakupulumusani Mulungu, imwe mwathema kuthukula magogodo anga kubulukira pa mbuto ino.”" 
Exodus13:20 Aisraele adabuluka ku Sukoti mbamanga msasa pa Etamu, kunkhomo kwa thando yatchetcha." 
Exodus13:21 Na masikati MBUYA akhaenda patsogolo pawo m'makole akuoneka ninga mzati kuonesa njira, na mosiku akhaenda patsogolo pawo m'moto wakuoneka ninga mzati kuapasa cheza, towera akwanise kufamba mosiku na masikati." 
Exodus13:22 Makole akuoneka ninga mzati ndzidzi onsene ukhaenda patsogolo pa anthu na masikati, pontho moto wakuoneka ninga mzati ukhaenda patsogolo pa anthu na mosiku." 
Exodus14:1 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Exodus14:2 “Panga Aisraele kubwerera m'nduli kuti akamange msasa patsogolo pa Pihahiroti; pakati pa Migidoli na Nyanza Yakufira, chifupi na Baala-Zefoni." 
Exodus14:3 Mfumu ananyerezera kuti Aisraele akwenda mbatsalakatika pyawo m'dzikomo mbachimwana kuwambuka thando yatchetcha. 
Exodus14:4 Ndinamchitisa kuuma mtima mbakuthamangisani, tenepo kukunda kwanga pa mfumu na anyankhondo ache kunachitisa kuti ndilemedzwe. Penepo Aiguputo anapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA.” Aisraele adachita ninga montho mukhadaapangirwa iwo." 
Exodus14:5 Pidapangwa Mfumu wa ku Iguputo kuti anthu akhadathawa, iye na mathubu ache adasanduza manyerezero awo mbalonga mbati, “Tachitaponji? Ife tatawirisa Aisraele kwenda pyawo, pontho tataya mabitchu athu!”" 
Exodus14:6 Mfumu adamanga chingolo chache cha nkhondo mbakwata anyankhondo ache kwenda nawo. 
Exodus14:7 Iye adalamuka pabodzi na pingolo madzana matanthatu pyakusankhulika kuthimizapo pingolo pyache pinango pyonsene pya mu Iguputo pyakutsogolerwa na akadamu awo. 
Exodus14:8 MBUYA adaumisa mtima wa mfumu, tenepo iye adaatewera m'nduli Aisraele, ale akhabuluka mu Iguputo na mulikiti mwakuonesa kukunda." 
Exodus14:9 Anyankhondo a ku Iguputo, na akavalo onsene, pingolo, anyakupitekenya, adaathamangisa mbaafikira chifupi padakhala iwo pale m'khundu mwa Nyanza Yakufira chifupi na Pihahiroti na Baala-Zefoni." 
Exodus14:10 Pidaona Aisraele mfumu na anyankhondo ache akulikitika kudza kuna iwo, adagoswerwa pyakwanga mbakhuwa kuna MBUYA." 
Exodus14:11 Iwo adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Ayi ku Iguputo kule nkhabeko masiye? Ayi udatidzesa m'thando yatchetcha muno kufuna kuti tiphiwe? Yang'ana pyachita iwe pakutibulusa mu Iguputo!" 
Exodus14:12 Ayi ife sidakupange tayu mu Iguputo mule kuti penepi pinachitika? Ife tidakupanga kuti utileke pyathu, pontho kuti tikhale pyathu mabitchu mu Iguputo. Mbapidakhala pyadidi kukhala pyathu mabitchu kweneko, kusiyana na kufa m'thando yatchetcha muno.”" 
Exodus14:13 Mose adatawira mbati, “Lekani goswerwa! Imirani dzololo, tenepo munati muone pinafuna chita MBUYA kukupulumusani lero; imwe munaonave pontho Aiguputo tayu." 
Exodus14:14 MBUYA anakumenyerani nkhondo, tenepo imwe nkhabeve funika chita na chinthu chene tayu.”" 
Exodus14:15 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Mwatani munalira kuti muphedziwe? Panga anthu athimize kwenda m'tsogolo." 
Exodus14:16 Kwiza m'dzulu ndodo yako mbumenye panyanzapo. Madzi anagawikana, tenepo Aisraele anakwanisa kuwambuka na pakuuma." 
Exodus14:17 Ine ndinaumisa mtima Aiguputo pyakwanga mwakuti anaatewera basi na penepo, tenepo ndinatambira chilemedzo pakukunda mfumu, anyankhondo ache, pingolo pyache na anyakupitekenyache." 
Exodus14:18 Ndingaakunda, Aiguputo anapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA.”" 
Exodus14:19 Mngelo wa Mulungu, ule akhadakhala patsogolo pa anyankhondo Aisraele adabuluka patsogolo mbaenda m'nduli mwawo. Makole akuoneka ninga mzati adafambambo mpakana adakhala" 
Exodus14:20 pakati pa Aiguputo na Aisraele. Makole adachitisa kuti Aiguputo aone mdima, mbwenye adapasa cheza kuna Aisraele, natenepo anyankhondo hadakwanise kufikirana chifupi mosiku onsene ule tayu." 
Exodus14:21 Mose adakwata ndodo yache mbathonya nayo panyanza pale, tenepo MBUYA adabweza nyanza ile m'nduli na mphepo ikulu yakumabulukiro dzuwa. Mphepo idamenya mosiku onsene mbiumisa nyanza. Madzi adagawikana," 
Exodus14:22 tenepo Aisraele adawambuka na pakuuma pakati pa mafufu mawiri a madzi. 
Exodus14:23 Aiguputo adaathamangisa na pingolo pyawo, akavalo awo na anyakupifambisa kuatewera na m'nyanzamo." 
Exodus14:24 Makalakwecha mbadzati fika MBUYA adayang'ana pansi kubulukira m'moto na makole pyakuoneka ninga mzati pile pana anyankhondo a ku Iguputo mbaachitisa kuzunguzika pikulu. 
Exodus14:25 Iye adachitisa magaleta a pingolopyo kutcherera mwakuti adafamba mwanyatwa pyakwanga. Aiguputo adalonga mbati, “MBUYA akumenyera nkhondo Aisraele kumenyana nafe. Tendeni tibulukemo pyathu!”" 
Exodus14:26 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Futhulira dzanjako panyanzapo, tenepo madzi anabwerera pana Aiguputo, pingolo pyawo na anyakupitekenyache.”" 
Exodus14:27 Tenepo Mose adafuthulira dzanjache panyanza pale, tenepo m'makalakwecha madzi adabwerera m'mbuto mwache ninga montho mwakale. Aiguputo adayesa kuthawa m'madzi mule, mbwenye MBUYA adaaponyera m'nyanza monthomo." 
Exodus14:28 Madzi adabwerera mbabiza pingolo, anyakupitekenya na anyankhondo onsene a ku Iguputo akhadatewera Aisraele m'nyanza ale; nkhabe na mbodzi ene adasalirapo tayu." 
Exodus14:29 Mbwenye Aisraele adawambuka nyanza ile na pakuuma, pakati pa mafufu mawiri a madzi." 
Exodus14:30 Pansiku yeneyo MBUYA adapulumusa Aisraele kuna Aiguputo, tenepo Aisraele adaaona amala kufa m'khundu mwa nyanza." 
Exodus14:31 Pidaona Aisraele mphamvu zikulu zidakundira MBUYA Aiguputo, iwo adagopa MBUYA; tenepo iwo adaikha chikhulupiro chawo pana MBUYA na pana nyabasache Mose." 
Exodus15:1 Tenepo Mose na Aisraele adaimba nyimbo ishi kuna MBUYA: “Ndinaimbira MBUYA, thangwi ya kukunda kwache kwa demelero; iye aponya m'nyanza akavalo na anyakuapakira." 
Exodus15:2 MBUYA ndi nyakutchinjirizanga wamphamvu; iye ndiye ene andipulumusa. Iye ndi Mulungu wanga, tenepo ndinamkuza, iye ndi Mulungu wa babanga, tenepo ndinaimba pya ukulu wache." 
Exodus15:3 MBUYA ndi nyankhondo; MBUYA ndiye dzinache. 
Exodus15:4 “Iye adaponya m'nyanza anyankhondo a ku Iguputo na pingolo pyawo pene; akadamu ache akufunika adabizwa m' Nyanza Yakufira. 
Exodus15:5 Nyanza yakuzwika idaabisa; iwo adalilima ninga mwala. 
Exodus15:6 “Dzanjanu yamadyo, MBUYA, njakudemelera, thangwi ya mphamvu zache; imbagwanda-gwanda anyamalwa m'mapindi." 
Exodus15:7 Na ukulu wanu wamphamvu imwe mudagwisa anyamalwanu; kuzhangali kwanu kudaapisa ninga moto kupisa maudzu. 
Exodus15:8 Imwe mudamenya na muyanu panyanza, madzi mbagawikana; mbaimira ninga fufu; pambuto pakuzwika pyakwanga pale padasanduka pakuuma." 
Exodus15:9 Nyamalwa adalonga mbati, ‘Ndinati ndiathamangise mbandiaphata; ndinati ndigawe mfumawo mbandikwata pyonsene pinafuna ine; ndinati ndikwate talasadanga mbandiapokosera pinthu pyawo na dzanjanga.’" 
Exodus15:10 Mbwenye muya udapepesa imwe ule, MBUYA, udabiza Aiguputo onsene m'nyanza; iwo adalilima m'madzi akugoswa ninga simbi." 
Exodus15:11 “MBUYA, mbani unango pakati pa milungu akhala ninga imwe? Mbani akhala ninga imwe, wakuchena pontho wakudodomesa? Mbani anakwanisa kuchita pyakudodomesa pontho pyamphamvu ninga pimbachita imwe?" 
Exodus15:12 Imwe mudafuthula dzanjanu yamadyo, tenepo dziko yapansi idakhudyula anyamalwathu." 
Exodus15:13 Mudatsogolera anthu akhadapulumusa imwe ale, kuonesa kuafuna kwanu kokhonda mala; na mphamvu zanu imwe mudaaphata nsenji mpakana kudziko yanu yakupambulika." 
Exodus15:14 Madzinza apiva penepi, tenepo atetemera na mantha; Afilisti aphatwa na mantha." 
Exodus15:15 Mafumu a ku Edomu aswipa mtima; amuna amphamvu a ku Moabu ana mantha; anthu a ku Kanani ali pampani-pani. 
Exodus15:16 Mantha akulu na dzedze pyaagwera. Na kuona mphamvu zanu, MBUYA, iwo aimira dzololo ninga chakusemwa kufikirana anthu anu agwande, anthu adabulusa imwe paubitchu ale." 
Exodus15:17 Imwe mudaadzesa kuno mbamuabzala paphiri panu, mbuto ile imwe, MBUYA, mwaisankhula kukhala mudzi wanu, Nyumba ya Mulungu, ile idamanga imwe mwekha ene." 
Exodus15:18 Imwe, MBUYA, munakhala mfumu kwenda na kwenda.”" 
Exodus15:19 Aisraele adawambuka nyanza na pakuuma. Mbwenye pidafuna wambukambo pingolo pya Aiguputo pabodzi na akavalo awo na anyakupitekenya, MBUYA adabwezera madzi mbaabiza onsene." 
Exodus15:20 Mprofeti Miriamu, nyamaingache Aroni, adakwata chisekese, tenepo akazi onsene adamtsanzira kuimbambo pisekese na kuvina." 
Exodus15:21 Miriamu adaaimbira nyimbo yakuti: “Imbirani MBUYA, thangwi ya kukunda kwache kwa demelero; iye aponya m'nyanza akavalo na anyakuapakira.”" 
Exodus15:22 Tenepo Mose adatsogolera Aisraele kubuluka nawo pa Nyanza Yakufira mbaenda kuthando yatchetcha ya Shuri. Nsiku zitatu iwo adafamba na m'thando yatchetchamo, kwache hadagumane madzi tayu." 
Exodus15:23 Tenepo adafika pambuto panango pakuchemerwa Mara, kwache madzi a penepo akhali akuwawa pyakwanga mwakuti hadakwanise kumwa tayu. Ndi thangwi yache padathulwa Mara." 
Exodus15:24 Anthu adadungunya kuna Mose mbamvunza mbati, “Tinamwanji?”" 
Exodus15:25 Mose adalira kuna MBUYA, tenepo MBUYA adamuonesa kaphindi kamuti. Iye adaponya m'madzi, madzimbo adasanduka akukoma. Penepo MBUYA adaapasa matongero na mwambo, pontho penepo iye adaayesa" 
Exodus15:26 mbalonga mbati, “Ngakhala imwe munandivera monsene mwene pakuchita pinthu pinanyerezera ine kuti mphyakulungama, pontho pakuvera matongero na kukoya mwambo wanga, ine nkhabe kukutchunyusani na utenda wa mtundu onsene tayu, ule udadzesa ine pana anthu a ku Iguputo. Ndine MBUYA, nyakukuwangisani.”" 
Exodus15:27 Kubuluka penepo iwo adafika ku Elimu, kule kukhali mphuno khumi na ziwiri za madzi, pontho miti yamdikhwa makumanomwe; penepo adamanga msasa chifupi na madziwo." 
Exodus16:1 Anthu a dzinza ya Israele adabuluka ku Elimu, tenepo pansiku yakhumi na chishanu ya mwezi wachiwiri, pikhadabuluka iwo mu Iguputo, adafika kuthando yatchetcha ya Sini, pakati pa Elimu na phiri ya Sinai." 
Exodus16:2 M'thandomo anthu onsene adadungunya kuna Mose na Aroni 
Exodus16:3 mbati, “Tikupikhumba kuti MBUYA mbadatipha pyache mu Iguputo. Kweneko tikhakwanisa kukhalambo pansi kuzungulira pikalango pya nyama, pontho na pyakudya pywa mtundu unango pizinji ninga mukhapifunira ife. Mbwenye iwe watidzesa m'thando muno kufuna kwene kutiphesa na njala.”" 
Exodus16:4 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Chinchino ndinafuna kuvumbisa pyakudya kubulukira kuthando pyakukwanira monsenene. Anthu athema kubuluka panja nsiku zonsene mbagumanya pyakudya pyakukwanira nsiku yeneyo. Penepa ndinakwanisa kuayesa, ngakhala iwo anakoya matongero anga." 
Exodus16:5 Pansiku yachitanthatu iwo athema kugumanya pyakudya pyakukwanira nsiku ziwiri mbapisasanya.” 
Exodus16:6 Tenepo Mose na Aroni adalonga kuna Aisraele onsene mbati, “Mawulo ano munati mupidziwe kuti MBUYA ndiye adakubulusani mu Iguputo." 
Exodus16:7 Na machibese munaona demelero ya MBUYA. Iye ava kudungunya kwanu kuna iye. Ndife animbo ife kuti mudungunye kuna ife.” 
Exodus16:8 Tenepo Mose adalonga mbati, “Ndi MBUYA anakupasani nyama yakuti mudye na mawulo, pontho na machibese mikate mizinji ninga munapifunira imwe, thangwi iye ava kudungunya kudachita imwe kuna iye. Ndife animbo ife. Ndzidzi unadungunya imwe kuna ife, penepo mukudungunya kuna MBUYA.”" 
Exodus16:9 Mose adalonga kuna Aroni mbati, “Panga anthu onsene a dzinza ya Israele kudza dzaimira pamaso pa MBUYA, thangwi iye ava kudungunya kwawo.”" 
Exodus16:10 Mukhalonga Aroni kuna Aisraele onsene, iwo adazungunuka mbayang'ana kuthando yatchetcha, vumbu-vumbu demelero ya MBUYA idaoneka m'makole." 
Exodus16:11 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Exodus16:12 “Ndava kudungunya kwa Aisraele. Apange kuti pakuthobila dzuwa, iwo anakhala na nyama zakuti adye, pontho na machibese onsene anati akhale na mikate inafuna iwo. Tenepo anapidziwa kuti ine, MBUYA, ndine Mulungu wawo.”" 
Exodus16:13 Na mawulo mkumbi ukulu wa akambuma udambuluka-mbuluka mwenemo mbadzaza msasa onsene ule, pontho na machibese pansi pakhali bume kuzungulira msasa onsene ule." 
Exodus16:14 Pikhakungunuka bume ile pansi m'thando mule padasala pinthu pinango ping'ono-ping'ono pyakufinuka ninga mataka a munyu. 
Exodus16:15 Pidapiona Aisraele, hadapidziwe kuti pikhalinji tayu mbavunzana unango na mwanzache mbati, “Ninji penepi?” Mose adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Kweneku nkhudya kudalonga MBUYA kuti anakupasani kuti mudye kule." 
Exodus16:16 MBUYA alonga kuti munthu onsene athema kugumanya ninga munapifunira iye, konta yachikhumi ya ndowa kada munthu m'khumbi mwache.”" 
Exodus16:17 Aisraele adachita penepi, anango adagumanya pizinji, anango pang'ono." 
Exodus16:18 Pidapiyeza iwo, ale adagumanya pizinji hakhali na pizinjiletu tayu, alembo adagumanya pyakuchepa hakhali na pyakuchepaletu tayu. Munthu onsene akhadagumanya ninga mukhapifunira iye." 
Exodus16:19 Mose adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Nee mbodzi athema kukoya pyakuti adye mangwana tayu.”" 
Exodus16:20 Mbwenye anango a iwo hadaikhe konta pidalonga Mose pile tayu mbakoya pyawo pinango. Mangwana mwache pidadzala na mfunye mbapinunkha, tenepo Mose adazhangali nawo." 
Exodus16:21 Machibese onsene munthu onsene akhagumanya ninga mukhapifunira iye, tenepo pikhapisa dzuwa, pyonsene pidasalira pansi pile pikhanyunguluka." 
Exodus16:22 Pansiku yachitanthatu adagumanya pyakudya pyakukwanira nsiku ziwiri, konta yachishanu ya ndowa kada munthu. Akadamu onsene a Aisraele adadza dzapanga Mose pya pinthu penepi," 
Exodus16:23 tenepo iye adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “MBUYA atonga kuti mangwana ndi Nsiku Yakupuma, yakupambulika kuna MBUYA. Phikani lero pinthu pinafuna imwe kuphika, pontho terekani pinthu pinafuna imwe kutereka. Pyonsene pyakusalira pikoyerwe mangwana.”" 
Exodus16:24 Ninga mudaatongera Mose, iwo adakoya pyonsene pidasalira pile mpakana mangwana mwache; ipyo hapidavungike, penu kuphatwa na mfunye tayu." 
Exodus16:25 Mose adalonga mbati, “Idyani penepi lero, thangwi lero ndi Nsiku Yakupuma, nsiku yakupambulika kuna MBUYA; imwe nkhabe gumana pyakudya panja tayu." 
Exodus16:26 Imwe mwathema kugumanya pyakudya nsiku zitanthatu, mbwenye pansiku yachinomwe, Nsiku Yakupuma, panakhala nkhabe na chinthu chene tayu.”" 
Exodus16:27 Pansiku yachinomwe anango a iwo adenda kagumanya kudya, kwache hadakugumane na pang'ono pene tayu." 
Exodus16:28 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Anthumwe, munaleka lini kukhonda vera matongero anga?" 
Exodus16:29 Kumbukani kuti, ine MBUYA, ndakupasani nsiku yakuti mupume; ndi thangwi yache pansiku yachitanthatu ndzidzi onsene ndinakupasani pyakudya pyakukwanira nsiku ziwiri. Pansiku yachinomwe munthu onsene athema kukhala panyumba pache, nee kubuluka tayu.”" 
Exodus16:30 Natenepo anthu hakhaphata basa tayu pansiku yachinomwe. 
Exodus16:31 Aisraele adathula pyakudya penepi mana. Pikhakhala ninga mbewu zing'ono-zing'ono zakuchena mbapitapira ninga pimikate pyakuikhwa uchi. 
Exodus16:32 Mose adalonga mbati, “MBUYA atipanga kuti tikoye mana anango, kukoyera pidzukulu pyathu, towera pikwanise kuona pyakudya pidatipasa MBUYA m'thando yatchetcha, ndzidzi udatibulusa iye mu Iguputo.”" 
Exodus16:33 Mose adalonga kuna Aroni mbati, “Kwata chitomba, uikhemo mana akukwana konta yachikhumi ya ndowa, mbuchiikhe pamaso pa MBUYA, kukoyerwa pidzukulu pyathu.”" 
Exodus16:34 Ninga mudaapangira MBUYA, Mose na Aroni adachiikha kutsogolo kwa Bokosi ya Chiverano, towera chikwanise kukoyeka." 
Exodus16:35 Aisraele adadya pyaka makumanayi, mpakana adafika kudziko ya Kanani, kudakhazikika iwo kule." 
Exodus16:36 (Ndowa ikhali mdida ukhaphatiswa basa ndzidzi wenewo kuyeza nawo pinthu pyakuuma.) 
Exodus17:1 Anthu onsene a dzinza ya Israele adabuluka kuthando yatchetcha ya Sini mbaenda mbuto na mbuto ninga mukhaatongera MBUYA. Iwo adamanga msasa pa Refidimu, mbwenye kweneko kudasowa madzi akumwa." 
Exodus17:2 Iwo adadungunya kuna Mose mbati, “Ngatipase madzi akumwa.” Mose adatawira mbati, “Mwatani munadungunya? Mwatani munayesa MBUYA?”" 
Exodus17:3 Mbwenye anthu akhali na nyota pyakwanga mbathimiza kudungunya kuna Mose mbati, “Udatibulusiranji ku Iguputo? Kadi ukufuna ife, anathu, pabodzi pene na pifuyo pyathu kuti tife na nyota?”" 
Exodus17:4 Mose adalira kuna MBUYA mbati, “Ndinachita tani na anthuwa? Iwo ali chifupi kundiponyera miyala.”" 
Exodus17:5 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Kwata akadamu anango a Aisraele, uende nawo patsogolo pang'ono pa anthu. Kwata ndodo idamenya na iwe madzi mumkulo wa Nailo ku Iguputo ile." 
Exodus17:6 Ndinaimira pamaso pako pamwala paphiri ya Sinai. Umenye pamwala, tenepo madzi anabuluka m'mwalamo kuti anthu amwe.” Mose adachita tenepo pamaso pa akadamu a Aisraele." 
Exodus17:7 Mbuto yeneyo idathulwa Masa pontho Meriba, thangwi Aisraele adadungunya mbayesa MBUYA na pidavunza iwo kuti, “Ayi MBUYA ali nafe penu tayu?”" 
Exodus17:8 Aamaleki adadza dzasosa Aisraele pa Refidimu. 
Exodus17:9 Mose adalonga kuna Yoswa mbati, “Sankhula amuna anango kuti mangwana akamenye nkhondo na Aamaleki. Ine ndinaimira pansonga ya phiri kuphatira ndodo idandipanga Mulungu kuti ndikwate ile.”" 
Exodus17:10 Yoswa adachita ninga mudampangira Mose mbaenda kamenya nkhondo na Aamaleki, uku Mose, Aroni na Huri adenda pansonga ya phiri." 
Exodus17:11 Ndzidzi ukhaphatira Mose ndodo yache m'dzulu, Aisraele akhakunda anyamalwawo, mbwenye pikhatchithisa iye mikono yache pansi, Aisraele akhakundwa na Aamaleki." 
Exodus17:12 Pidatopa mikono ya Mose, Aroni na Huri adamdzesera mwala kuti iye akhalepo, uku iwo akhaimira m'khundu mwache mbaphatira m'dzulu mikono yache, kuiphatira mpakana kunja kudadoka." 
Exodus17:13 Penepa Yoswa adakundiratu Aamaleki. 
Exodus17:14 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Lemba pya kukunda kweneku, towera kukumbukwe. Panga Yoswa kuti ine ndinavungiratu Aamaleki.”" 
Exodus17:15 Mose adamangapo guwa yansembe mbaithula kuti, “MBUYA ndi Banderanga.”" 
Exodus17:16 Iye adalonga mbati, “Kwizani m'dzulu bandera ya MBUYA! MBUYA anathimiza kutimenyera nkhondo kuna Aamaleki ndzidzi onsene!”" 
Exodus18:1 Yetero, tebzalache Mose, nyansembe wa ku Midiani, adava pyonsene pikhadachita Mulungu kuna Mose, pontho na kuna Aisraele ndzidzi udaabulusa iye mu Iguputo." 
Exodus18:2 Tenepo iye pabodzi na Zipora, mkazache Mose, ule akhadasalira, adadza kuna Mose," 
Exodus18:3 pontho na Gereshomu na Eliezere, ana awiri achimuna a Zipora. Mose akhadalonga mbati, “Ine ndikhali mlendo m'dziko yachilendo”; tenepo akhadathula mbodzi wa anache Gereshomu." 
Exodus18:4 Iye akhadalonga pontho mbati, “Mulungu wa babanga adandiphedza, pontho adandipulumusa kubulukira kuna mfumu wa ku Iguputo akhafuna kundipha ule”; tenepo adathula mwana unango ule Eliezere." 
Exodus18:5 Yetero adadza na mkazache Mose na anache achimuna awiri ale m'thando yatchetcha, kule kukhadamanga Mose msasa paphiri ya Mulungu." 
Exodus18:6 Iye akhadatumiza mphangwa kuna Mose kumpanga kuti iwo akhabwera," 
Exodus18:7 tenepo Mose adenda kagumanikana nawo, adamulambira mbampsompsona. Iwo adapasana mwenyikiro unango na mwanzache mbaenda kukhumbi ya Mose." 
Exodus18:8 Mose adapanga Yetero pyonsene pikhadachita MBUYA kuna mfumu na kuna anthu a ku Iguputo, towera apulumuse Aisraele. Iye adampanga pontho pya nyatwa zikhadaona anthu paulendo wawo, pontho pya mule mudaapulumusira MBUYA." 
Exodus18:9 Pidapiva Yetero pyonsenepi, adakomerwa" 
Exodus18:10 mbalonga mbati, “Kuzani MBUYA, ule adakupulumusani kuna mfumu, pontho na kuna anthu a ku Iguputo! Kuzani MBUYA, ule adapulumusa anthu ache paubitchu!" 
Exodus18:11 Chinchino ndapidziwa kuti MBUYA ngwamkulu kupiringana milungu yonsene, thangwi iye adachita penepi kuna anthu a ku Iguputo akhavuya Aisraele ale.”" 
Exodus18:12 Yetero adadza na nsembe zakupyerera pontho na nsembe zinango kuti ziperekwe kuna Mulungu; tenepo Aroni na akadamu onsene a Aisraele adenda na tebzalache kadya pyakudya pyakupambulika kupembedza Mulungu. 
Exodus18:13 Mangwana mwache Mose akhatonga miseru pakati pa anthu, tenepo akhali pakaliki-liki kutomera machibese mpakana mosiku." 
Exodus18:14 Pidaona Yetero basa yonsene ikhaphata Mose ile, iye adavunza mbati, “Pyonsenepi ninji pinachitira iwe anthuwa? Watani unachita pyonsenepi wekha ene, uku anthu akukuimirira kubulukira machibese mpakana mosiku kufuna iwepo?”" 
Exodus18:15 Mose adatawira mbati, “Ndathema kuchita penepi, thangwi anthu ambadza kuna ine dzavunza nzeru kuna Mulungu." 
Exodus18:16 Ngakhala anthu awiri ana mseru unango na mwanzache mbadza kuna ine, inembo ndimbapitonga kuti wadidi mbani pakati pa awiriwo, tenepo ndimbaapanga pya matongero na mwambo wa Mulungu.”" 
Exodus18:17 Tenepo Yetero adalonga mbati, “Iwe hukupichita m'njira yadidi tayu." 
Exodus18:18 Iwe pabodzi pene na anthu ana iwewa munatopa. Penepi mphyakunensa pyakwanga pyakuti iwe upichite wekha ene. 
Exodus18:19 Chinchino vesera ndikupangize kupichita kwache mwadidi, tenepo Mulungu anakhala nawe. Mphyadidi kuti iwe uimirire anthu pamaso pa Mulungu mbudza na miseru yawo kuna iye." 
Exodus18:20 Iwe uafunzise matongero a Mulungu, pontho uapange mule mwathema iwo kuchita." 
Exodus18:21 Mbwenye kuthimiza penepa, iwe usankhule amuna pakati pa anthu onsene akukwanisa kudziwa pyakuchita mbuaikhe kukhala akadamu a Aisraele: akadamu a anthu a magulu pikwi, madzana, makumashanu na khumi. Iwo athema kukhala anthu akugopa Mulungu, ale anakwanisa kunyindirika, pontho nkhabe kwanisa kudyekerwa tayu." 
Exodus18:22 Iwo aphate basa ninga anyakutonga miseru ndzidzi onsene kuna anthu. Iwo anakwanisa kudza na miseru yakunensa ya anthu kuna iwe, kwache iwo okha ene anakwanisa kutonga miseru ing'ono-ing'ono. Penepi pinachitisa kuti basa ikhonde nensa kuna iwe, thangwi iwo anakuphedza." 
Exodus18:23 Ungachita tenepo, ninga munalongera Mulungu, iwe nkhabe topa tayu, pontho anthu onsenewa anabwerera m'misa mwawo na miseru yakutongwa.”" 
Exodus18:24 Mose adavera pidampanga Yetero pile," 
Exodus18:25 mbasankhula amuna akukwanisa kudziwa pyakuchita pakati pa Aisraele. Iye adaaikha kukhala akadamu a magulu-magulu a anthu chikwi, dzana, makumashanu na khumi." 
Exodus18:26 Iwo adaphata basa ninga atongi kuna anthu ndzidzi onsene, mbadza na miseru yakunensa kuna Mose, mbwenye mbakwanisa kupitongera okha ene miseru ing'ono-ing'ono." 
Exodus18:27 Tenepo Mose adagonekana na Yetero, natenepo Yetero adabwerera pyache kwawo." 
Exodus19:1 Aisraele adabuluka ku Refidimu, tenepo pansiku yakutoma ya mwezi wachitatu pidabuluka iwo mu Iguputo, adafika kuthando yatchetcha ya Sinai. Kweneko adamanga msasawo m'tchinde mwa phiri ya Sinai," 
Exodus19:2  
Exodus19:3 tenepo Mose adakwira paphiripo kagumanikana na Mulungu. MBUYA adamchemera paphiripo mbampanga pyakuti akalonge kuna Aisraele, pidzukulu pya Yakobo pile, kuti:" 
Exodus19:4 “Imwe mudaona pile pidachita ine, MBUYA, kuna anthu a ku Iguputo, pontho mudakuyang'anirani ine mwadidi ninga mumbachitira mphamba kuthukula anache pamaphaphido ache, mbandikudzesani kuna ine kuno." 
Exodus19:5 Chinchino imwe mungandivera mbamukoya chiverano changa, munati mukhale anthu anga ene. Dziko yonsene yapansi njanga, mbwenye imwe munakhala anthu anga akusankhulika," 
Exodus19:6 anthu akupambulika kuna ine ndekha basi, tenepo imwe munanditumikira ninga anyansembe.”" 
Exodus19:7 Mose adatchitha paphiripo mbakagumanyisa akadamu onsene a anthu pabodzi mbaapanga pyonsene pikhadampanga MBUYA. 
Exodus19:8 Tenepo anthu onsene ale adatawira pabodzi mbati, “Tinati tichite pyonsene pyalonga MBUYA.” Mose adenda kalonga penepi kuna MBUYA." 
Exodus19:9 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Ndinabwera kuna iwe m'makole akuswipa, towera anthu andive ndikulonga nawe, tenepo iwo anakukhulupira kubulukira chinchino kwenda m'tsogolo.” Mose adapanga MBUYA mafala akhadatawira anthu ale," 
Exodus19:10 tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ndoko kuna anthu kaapange kuti akapichitise okha ene kukhala akupambulika kuna ine lero na mangwana kusasanyika kuti apembedze. Iwo athema kufula nguwo zawo," 
Exodus19:11 pontho kuti nkuchono mwache asasanyike, thangwi pansiku yeneyo ndinatchithira paphiri ya Sinai, pale anthu onsene anakwanisa kundiona." 
Exodus19:12 Gwanda madire kuzungulira phiri kuti anthu aleke numpha madirewo, pontho uapange kuti aleke kwira paphiripo, penu kufendeza chifupi na phiriyo. Ngakhala munthu anaphata phiriyo, iye anati aphiwe;" 
Exodus19:13 iye athema kuponyerwa miyala, penu kulaswa na matswimo okhonda munthu na mbodzi ene kumkhuya. Penepi pikulonga pya anthu na pifuyo pene; ipyo pinati piphiwe. Mbwenye ngoma ingaveka, penepo anthu onsene athema kwenda kuphiriko.”" 
Exodus19:14 Tenepo Mose adatchitha paphiripo mbachitisa anthu kukhala akupambulika, tenepo iwo adafula nguwo zawo," 
Exodus19:15 Mose adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Nkuchono na masikati sasanyikani, pontho lekani pita m'bonde ndzidzi wenewo.”" 
Exodus19:16 Na machibese a nsiku yachitatuyo kukhali chiphaliwali na njazi, makole akuswipa adaoneka paphiripo, tenepo kulira kukulu kwa ngoma kudaveka. Anthu onsene pamsasa pale adatetemera na mantha." 
Exodus19:17 Mose adatsogolera anthu ale kubuluka kumsasako mbaenda nawo kagumana na Mulungu, tenepo iwo adaimira m'tchinde mwa phiriyo." 
Exodus19:18 Phiri yonsene idagudumirwa na utsi, thangwi MBUYA akhadatchithira penepo m'moto. Utsi udakwira m'dzulu ninga utsi wa m'dzenje ya moto, tenepo anthu onsene adatetemera pikulu." 
Exodus19:19 Dungu ya ngoma ikhathimiza kulira pikulu pene. Mose adalonga, tenepo Mulungu adamtawira na chiphaliwali." 
Exodus19:20 MBUYA adatchithira paphiri ya Sinai mbachemera Mose kukwira pansonga paphiripo. Mose adakwira," 
Exodus19:21 tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Tchitha ukacheuze anthu kuti aleke numpha madire kudza kuna ine dzandiona; angachita kwene tenepo, azinji a iwo anati afe." 
Exodus19:22 Podi kwene anyansembe akudza chifupi athema kupichenesa okha ene, gopesera ndinaatchunyusa.”" 
Exodus19:23 Mose adalonga kuna MBUYA mbati, “Anthu nkhabe kwanisa kukwira pano tayu, thangwi imwe mudatitonga kuyesa phiriyi yakupambulika, pontho kugwanda madire kuizungulira.”" 
Exodus19:24 MBUYA adatawira mbati, “Tchitha ukakwate Aroni, udze naye kuno. Mbwenye anyansembe na anthu athema nee numpha madire kudza kuna ine tayu, gopesera ndinaatchunyusa.”" 
Exodus19:25 Mose adatchitha kuna anthu mbaapanga pinthu pikhadalonga MBUYA pile. 
Exodus20:1 Mulungu adalonga, tenepo mafalache onsene mbawa:" 
Exodus20:2 “Ine ndine MBUYA, Mulungu wako, ule adakubulusa m'dziko ya Iguputo, kukhali iwe paubitchu kule." 
Exodus20:3 “Leka pembedza milungu inango, mbwenye ine ene basi." 
Exodus20:4 “Leka kupisasanyira wekha ene mifanikizo ya chinthu chonsene cha kudzulu, penu cha pansi pano, penu cha m'madzi a pansi pa mataka." 
Exodus20:5 Leka lambira mifanikizo penu kuipembedza, thangwi ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wako pontho ndine wantchanje. Ndimbatchunyusa ana thangwi ya pyakudawa pya makolo awo ambandizonda ale, kuatchunyusa mpakana mfendu wachitatu na wachinayi." 
Exodus20:6 Mbwenye ndimbaonesa kuafuna kwanga kokhonda mala kuna mifendu pikwi-pikwi pya ale ambandifuna mbavera matongero anga. 
Exodus20:7 “Leka thula dzinanga papezi, thangwi ine, MBUYA Mulungu wako, ndinatchunyusa munthu onsene anaphatisa basa dzinanga papezi." 
Exodus20:8 “Koya Nsiku Yakupuma pakuichitisa kukhala yakupambulika. 
Exodus20:9 Pana nsiku zitanthatu zinakwanisa iwe kuphata mabasako," 
Exodus20:10 mbwenye nsiku yachinomwe ndi Nsiku Yakupuma yakupambulika kuna ine. Pansiku yeneyo nee munthu na mbodzi ene athema kuphata basa tayu, nee iwe penu anako, nee mabitchu ako penu pifuyo pyako, penu mlendo ali m'dziko mwakomo tayu." 
Exodus20:11 Pansiku zitanthatu, ine MBUYA, ndidasasanya dziko yapansi, thambo, bara na pyonsene pili mwenemo, mbwenye ndidapuma pansiku yachinomwe. Ndi thangwi yache, ine MBUYA, ndidatsanzayisa Nsiku Yakupuma mbandiichitisa kukhala yakupambulika." 
Exodus20:12 “Lemedza babako na mako, towera nsiku za moyo wako pansi pano ziinjipe m'dziko inafuna ine, MBUYA Mulungu wanu, kukupasa." 
Exodus20:13 “Leka chita upandu. 
Exodus20:14 “Leka chita uputa. 
Exodus20:15 “Leka kuba. 
Exodus20:16 “Leka pambizira mwanzako. 
Exodus20:17 “Leka sirira nyumba ya mwanzako; leka sirira mkazache, mabitchu ache, ng'ombe zache, mabulu ache, penu chinthu chonsene cha mwanzako.”" 
Exodus20:18 Pidava anthu chiphaliwali na kulira kwa ngoma, pontho pidaona iwo njazi na utsi paphiri pale adatetemera na mantha mbaimira kutali na phiri." 
Exodus20:19 Iwo adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Iwe ungalonga kuna ife, tinati tive, mbwenye tikuchita mantha, thangwi ngakhala Mulungu analonga kuna ife, tinati tife.”" 
Exodus20:20 Mose adatawira mbati, “Lekani chita mantha; Mulungu atchitha kukuyesani, pontho kukuchitisani kuti muthimize kumgopa, towera muleke dawa.”" 
Exodus20:21 Mbwenye anthu adathimiza kukhala kutali basi. Mose ene basi adenda chifupi na makole akuswipa kule kukhali Mulungu. 
Exodus20:22 MBUYA adapanga Mose kuti alonge kuna Aisraele kuti, “Imwe mwapiona mule ine, MBUYA, ndalonga kuna imwe kubulukira kudzulu." 
Exodus20:23 Lekani kupisasanyira mwekha ene milungu yasiliva penu yagolidi kuti mupipembedze padzulu pakupembedza ine. 
Exodus20:24 Ndisasanyireni guwa yansembe ya mataka, tenepo muperekepo nsembe za mabiranu na ng'ombe zanu kukhala nsembe zakupyerera, pontho nsembe zachiphatizano. Pambuto ponsene padapambula ine kuti ndipembedzwepo, ine ndinabwera pana imwepo mbandikutsanzayisani." 
Exodus20:25 Ngakhala munandisasanyira guwa yamiyala, lekani phatisa basa miyala yakusema, thangwi mungaphatisa basa ntchemu kusema nayo miyalayo, munaichitisa kukhala yokhonda thema na basanga." 
Exodus20:26 Lekani kundimangira guwa yakukhala na nsikada zakukwirira penepo, thangwi mungachita tenepo, munaoneka pezi pakukwira penepo." 
Exodus21:1 “Pereka mwambo ufu kuna Aisraele: 
Exodus21:2 Ngakhala imwe munagula bitchu wa Chiheberi, iye akuphatireni basa pyaka pitanthatu. Chaka chachinomwecho iye athema kusudzulwa okhonda pagali na chinthu chene tayu." 
Exodus21:3 Ngakhala iye hakhadasemba tayu pidasanduka iye bitchu wanu, iye athema nee kukwata mkazi tayu ndzidzi unaenda iye; mbwenye ngakhala akhadasemba ndzidzi udasanduka iye bitchu wanu, iye athema kwenda na mkazache." 
Exodus21:4 Ngakhala mbuyache adampasa mkazi mbabala naye ana achimuna penu achikazi, mkazi na anawo ngambuyache, tenepo mamuna athema kwenda yekha ene." 
Exodus21:5 Mbwenye ngakhala bitchu anatawira kuti iye ambamfuna mbuyache, mkazache, na anache mbakhonda funa kusudzulwa," 
Exodus21:6 tenepo mbuyache aende naye kumbuto yakupembedzera Mulungu. Kweneko amtsamirise kumsuwo, penu kuthabwa ya msuwo mbamphola khutu na tchamfondo. Natenepo iye anakhala bitchu wache mpakana moyo wache onsene." 
Exodus21:7 “Ngakhala mamuna anagulisa mwanache wamkazi ninga bitchu, iye hadatheme kusudzulwa ninga mumbachitirwa mabitchu achimuna tayu." 
Exodus21:8 Ngakhala iye aguliswa kuna munthu unango ule anamsankhula kukhala mkazache, mbwenye munthuyo nkhabe kumfuna tayu, penepo iye athema kuombolwa na babache; mbuyacheyo nkhabe utongi wa kumgulisa kuna alendo tayu, thangwi iye achita pyakukhonda khulupirika." 
Exodus21:9 Ngakhala munthu anagula bitchu wachikazi kuti apase mwanache wamamuna, iye athema kumpasa utongi kukhala mwanache wamkazi."
