Exodus21:10 Ngakhala munthu anakwata mkazi wachiwiri, iye athema kuthimiza kupasa mkazache wakutoma phoso na nguwo, pontho utongi wakukhala mkazache sasawa ninga mukhachitira iye pakutoma." 
Exodus21:11 Ngakhala hanakwanisa kupereka pinthu penepi kuna mkaziyo tayu, iye athema kumsudzula pyache okhonda pagali na chinthu chene." 
Exodus21:12 “Munthu anamenya mwanzache mbampha, iyembo athema kuphiwa." 
Exodus21:13 Kwache ngakhala iye adapichita mwasusudewu, pontho kuti Mulungu adapitawirisa kuti pichitike, iye anakwanisa kuthawa kwenda pyache kumbuto kwinango kunakusankhulirani ine, kweneko iye anakhala pakupata." 
Exodus21:14 Mbwenye munthu angazhangali mbapha mwanzache chadala, iyembo athema kuphiwa, podi kwene kuti athawire kuguwa yansembe kuti akakhale pakupata." 
Exodus21:15 “Munthu anamenya babache penu mache weneyo athema kuphiwa. 
Exodus21:16 “Munthu anaba munthu mnzache, penu kumgulisa, penu kumkoya ninga bitchu weneyo athema kuphiwa." 
Exodus21:17 “Munthu anatemberera babache penu mache weneyo athema kuphiwa. 
Exodus21:18 “Ngakhala pana nthonga, tenepo mbodzi atema mwanzache na mwala, penu na shoko, kwache mbakhonda kumpha, iye nkhabe thema kutchunyuswa tayu. Mbwenye ngakhala munthu adatemwayo anagona patalimba, mbwenye m'nduli mwache mbakwanisa kulamuka mbafamba panja na mthondodzo, munthu adamtema ule, athema kupagali mwanzache, thangwi ya ndzidzi udavunga iye mbali gone ule, pontho mbamuyang'anire mwadidi mpakana iye awange." 
Exodus21:19  
Exodus21:20 “Ngakhala munthu anakwata ndodo mbamenya nayo bitchu wache wamamuna penu wamkazi, bitchuyo mbaferatu ponthopo, munthuyo athema kutchunyuswa." 
Exodus21:21 Mbwenye bitchuyo angakhala nsiku ibodzi penu ziwiri okhonda kufa, mbuyache hadatheme kutchunyuswa tayu. Kuvungika kwa pinthu pyache kwakwana." 
Exodus21:22 “Ngakhala amuna anango anamenyana mbakuwaza mkazi wamimba, towera ataye mwanache, mbwenye mkaziyo mbakhonda kuwazika pikulu pene, munthu amkuwaza ule athema kupagali konta yonsene inalonga mamunacheyo mwakutsikimizirwa na anyakutonga miseru." 
Exodus21:23 Mbwenye ngakhala mkazi yekha ene akuwazika kutchunyuswa, kwache ndi moyo kupagali moyo," 
Exodus21:24 diso kupagali diso, dzino kupagali dzino, dzanja kupagali dzanja, dzinyalo kupagali dzinyalo," 
Exodus21:25 kuotcha na moto kupagali kuotchambo na moto, chironda kupagali chironda, pontho mibzimbiri kupagali mibzimbiri." 
Exodus21:26 “Ngakhala munthu anamenya diso ya bitchu wache wachimuna penu wachikazi mbisweka, iye athema kusudzula bitchuyo ninga kumpagali diso yacheyo." 
Exodus21:27 Ngakhala iye amkhutcha dzino, iye athema kusudzula bitchuyo ninga kumpagali dzino yache." 
Exodus21:28 “Ngakhala ng'ombe yapha munthu na kumdima, ng'ombeyo yathema kuphiwa na miyala, pontho nyamache ileke dyiwa; mbwenye mwenechiroache hadatheme kutchunyuswa tayu." 
Exodus21:29 Mbwenye ngakhala ng'ombeyo ikhali na chisimo chakudima anthu, pontho kuti mwenechiro adacheuzwa mbakhonda kupiikha konta, tenepo ngakhala yapha munthu na kumdima, iyo yathema kuphiwa na miyala, pontho mwenechiroache athema kuphiwambo." 
Exodus21:30 Kwache ngakhala mwenechiro ng'ombeyo atawiriswa kupagali mseruwu kuombola moyo wache, iye athema kupagali konta yonsene inafunikayo." 
Exodus21:31 Ngakhala ng'ombe yapha mphale penu mtsikana, matongero ache ambakhala sasawa." 
Exodus21:32 Ngakhala ng'ombe yapha bitchu wachimuna penu wachikazi, mwenechiro ng'ombe athema kupagali mwenechiro bitchuyo kobiri zasiliva makumatatu, pontho ng'ombeyo yathema kuphiwa na miyala." 
Exodus21:33 “Ngakhala munthu anabulusa mphampha padzenje penu angakumba dzenje mbakhonda kuiphopha, tenepo ng'ombe penu bulu angagweramo," 
Exodus21:34 nyakukumba dzenjeyo athema kupasa kobiri mwenechiro chifuyocho, pontho nyama yakufayo yathema kukhala yache." 
Exodus21:35 Ngakhala ng'ombe ya munthu yapha ng'ombe ya munthu unango, awiriwa athema kugulisa ng'ombe yamoyoyo mbagawana kobirizo; iwo athema pontho kugawana sasawa nyama yakufa ile." 
Exodus21:36 Mbwenye ngakhala pikhadziwika kuti ng'ombeyo ikhali na chisimo chakudima, mwenechiro mbakhonda kuifungira m'thanga, iye athema kupagali ng'ombe inango yamoyo, mbwenye iye athema kukwata nyama yakufa iye." 
Exodus22:1 “Ngakhala munthu anaba ng'ombe, penu bira mbampha penu kumgulisa, iye athema kupagali ng'ombe zishanu pa ng'ombe ibodzi, pontho mabira mashanu pa bira mbodzi." 
Exodus22:2 Iye athema kupagali pinthu pidaba iye pile. Ngakhala iye nkhabe pinthu pyakuti anakwanisa kupagali napyo, iye athema kuguliswa ninga bitchu kupagali pinthu pyaba iye pile. Ngakhala nyama yakubiwayo ndi ng'ombe, bulu, penu bira yagumanwa yamoyo m'manja mwache, iye athema kupagali ng'ombe ziwiri pa ng'ombe ibodzi. “Ngakhala mbava aphatwa akuswa nyumba na mosiku mbaphiwa, nyakumphayo hadadawe tayu. Mbwenye ngakhala pinachitika na masikati nyakumphayo adawa." 
Exodus22:3  
Exodus22:4  
Exodus22:5 “Ngakhala munthu anadyesa pifuyo pyache m'munda, penu m'munda wamfesa mbazitayika pyazo mbapidya mbewu zonsene za m'munda mwa mwanzache, iye athema kupagali nyakudyerwa pyacheyo." 
Exodus22:6 “Ngakhala munthu anagasa moto mbuphata tsanga, tenepo motowo ungatanthawira m'munda mwa mwanzache mbapisa mbewu zakuimira, penu zakufa kale, nyakugasa motoyo athema kupagali pyakuvungikapyo." 
Exodus22:7 “Ngakhala munthu anatawira kukoya kobiri za munthu unango, penu pinthu pyakufunika mbapibiwa m'nyumba mwache, mbava angaphatwa athema kupagali kawiri." 
Exodus22:8 Mbwenye mbava angakhonda phatwa, nyakukoya pinthuyo athema kudzeswa kumbuto yakupembedzera Mulungu, tenepo kweneko iye athema kudumbira kuti hadabe ndiye tayu pinthu pya mwanzacheyo." 
Exodus22:9 “Ngakhala pana mseru wakukanganirana pinthu, penu ng'ombe, mabulu, mabira, chakuvala, penu mitolo inango ene yakutayika, anthu awiri athema kudzeswa kumbuto yakupembedzera Mulungu. Munthu analongwa na Mulungu miseru kuti adawa, weneyo athema kupagali mwanzacheyo kawiri." 
Exodus22:10 “Ngakhala munthu anatawira kukoya bulu, ng'ombe, bira, penu chifuyo chinango cha munthu unango, tenepo chifuyocho mbachifa, penu kukuwazika, penu chabiwa, mbapasowa umboni," 
Exodus22:11 munthuyo athema kwenda kumbuto yakupembedzera MBUYA kadumbira kuti iye hadabe chifuyo cha mwanzacheyo tayu. Ngakhala chifuyocho nee chidabiwa tayu, mwenechiro athema kutawira, tenepo mwanzacheyo aleke kumpagali;" 
Exodus22:12 mbwenye ngakhala chifuyocho chidabiwa, munthuyo athema kumpagali mwenechiro." 
Exodus22:13 Ngakhala chidachita kuphiwa na chirombo, munthuyo athema kudzesa manyenyeswa kuna mwenechiro ninga umboni; tenepo iye nkhabe thema pagali chinthu chakudyiwa na chirombo tayu." 
Exodus22:14 “Ngakhala unabwereka chifuyo kuna munthu unango mbichikuwazika, penu kufa, mwenemo mwenechiro nkhabepo, munthuyo athema kupagali." 
Exodus22:15 Mbwenye ngakhala penepyo pinachitika mwenechiro mbali penepo, munthuyo nkhabe thema kupagali tayu. Ngakhala chifuyocho chidachitwa kubwerekwa kuvungika kwa chifuyocho kwakwana na kobiri zidapereka iye pakubwereka." 
Exodus22:16 “Ngakhala munthu ananyengerera mbagona na mkazi okhonda dziwa mamuna, ule hadavunzirwe tayu, iye athema kupagali chuma, pontho akhaleletu mkazache." 
Exodus22:17 Mbwenye ngakhala babache anakhonda kuti iye ansembe, iye athema kupagali babache chuma chakuthemerana na mwali." 
Exodus22:18 “Iphani akazi onsene akuchita pyamatsenga. 
Exodus22:19 “Iphani munthu onsene anachita pyakuzuda na nyama. 
Exodus22:20 “Iphani munthu onsene anapereka nsembe kuna milungu inango, kupambula kuna ine ene MBUYA." 
Exodus22:21 “Lekani vuya, penu kupondereza mlendo; kumbukani kuti imwe mukhalimbo alendo m'dziko ya Iguputo." 
Exodus22:22 Lekani dyera nkope-kope mamfelwa, penu mwana masiye na mbodzi ene." 
Exodus22:23 Mungachita tenepo, ine MBUYA, ndinaava angalira kuna ine kuti ndiaphedze," 
Exodus22:24 tenepo ndinazhangali mbandikuphani pankhondo. Akazanu anasanduka amamfelwa, ananumbo anakhala amasiye." 
Exodus22:25 “Ngakhala mwafiyalisa kobiri anthu anga akutcherenga, lekani khala ninga nyakufiyalisa kobiri mbamumpanga kuti apagali na pinango pyakuthimizira penepo." 
Exodus22:26 Ngakhala munakwata pinyolo chakufinika cha munthu unango mwathema kumbwezera dzuwa mbidzati thobila," 
Exodus22:27 thangwi chakufinika chache ntchokha chenecho basi kuti akhumbirwe. Iye anagonera papi? Iye angalira kuna ine kuti ndimphedze, ndinamva, thangwi ndine wansisi." 
Exodus22:28 “Lekani shola Mulungu, pontho lekani temberera akadamu a anthu anu." 
Exodus22:29 “Perekani kuna ine nsembe za mbewu, vinyu na nsapo zaolivi zanu pandzidzi wache wakuthema. “Perekani kuna ine ananu achimuna autombo." 
Exodus22:30 Perekani kuna ine ana autombo a pifuyo pyanu, ng'ombe na mabira. Mwana wautombo wachimuna angabalwa athema kukhala na mache nsiku zinomwe, mbaperekwa nsembe kuna ine nsiku yachisere." 
Exodus22:31 “Imwe ndimwe anthu anga, tenepo lekani kudya nyama yakuphiwa na chirombo; mbwenye muipasire anambwa." 
Exodus23:1 “Lekani falisa mbiri yakunama, pontho lekani kuikhira kunduli munthu wakudawa pakumchitira umboni wakunama." 
Exodus23:2 Lekani tsanzira mwinji ungachita pyakudawika, penu ungapereka umboni wakupotoza chilungamo pamseru." 
Exodus23:3 Lekani kutonga mwakuyang'ana nkhope munthu wakutcherenga pamseru wache. 
Exodus23:4 “Ngakhala pyachitika kuti imwe mwaona ng'ombe penu bulu wa anyamalwanu chatayika, imwe mwathema kuchibweza kuna iye." 
Exodus23:5 Ngakhala bulu wa nyakukuzondani agwera pamtolo wache, mphedzeni kulamusa buluyo, lekani gwanda kwene." 
Exodus23:6 “Lekani pondereza chilungamo pamseru wa munthu wakutcherenga. 
Exodus23:7 Lekani pambizira mwanzanu, pontho lekani phesa munthu okhonda dawa, thangwi ine ndinatchunyusa munthu onsene wakuchita pinthu pyakuipa ninga penepi." 
Exodus23:8 Lekani tawira kudyekerwa, thangwi kudyekera kumbachitisa anthu akuona ene kukhala maboli-boli, pontho kumbapotoza mafala a munthu wakulonga pyakuona." 
Exodus23:9 “Lekani vuya alendo; imwe mukupidziwa kuti munthu ambapiva tani kukhala mlendo, thangwi imwe mukhalimbo alendo m'dziko ya Iguputo." 
Exodus23:10 “Pyaka pitanthatu mubzale mbewu m'minda mwanu mbamuvune mbewuzo. 
Exodus23:11 Mbwenye chaka chachinomwe ulekeni mundawo ugone, pontho lekani vuna magoko onsene m'mundamo. Anyakutcherenga adye pyamera mwenemo, pontho nyama zam'tsanga zinakwanisa kudya pyasalapyo. Chitani chibodzi-bodzi m'minda yanu yamfesa na miti yaolivi." 
Exodus23:12 “Phatani basanu nsiku zitanthatu, mbwenye lekani phata basa pansiku yachinomwe, towera mabitchu anu, alendo akukuphatirani basa na pifuyo pyanu pene pimbakuphatirani basa pikwanise kupumambo." 
Exodus23:13 “Veserani pyonsene pyakupangani ine, MBUYA. Lekani pemphera kuna milungu inango, lekani na kuthula kwene madzinawo." 
Exodus23:14 “Sekerani maphwando matatu pa chaka kulemedza nawo ine. 
Exodus23:15 M'mwezi wa Abibu, mwezi udabuluka imwe mu Iguputo, sekerani Phwando ya Mikate yakusowa Chakufufumisira ninga montho mudakupangirani ine. Lekani kudya na mkate ene wakukhala na chakufufumisira nsiku zinomwe pandzidzi wa phwandowo. Lekani kundipembedza okhonda bwera na chakupereka." 
Exodus23:16 “Sekerani Phwando ya Pyakuvuna pakupereka mbewu zanu zakutoma kutokota. “Sekerani Phwando ya Misasa pakumala kwa chaka, ndzidzi umbatchola imwe mfesa zanu na nsapo zinango." 
Exodus23:17 Chaka na chaka pamaphwando matatuwa, amuna onsene athema kundipembedza, ine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Exodus23:18 “Lekani pereka pabodzi pene na mkate wakukhala na chakufufumisira chiropa cha nyama inapereka imwe nsembe kuna ine. Mafuta a nyama adaperekwa kuna ine ale pamaphwando enewa mbaleke koyiwa kufikirana mangwana mwache. 
Exodus23:19 “Chaka na chaka idzani kunyumba ya MBUYA Mulungu wanu na mbewu zanu zadidiletu zakutoma kutokota zimbavuna imwe zile. “Lekani tereka mwanabira penu mwanambuzi kubodzi kwene na mkaka wa mache. 
Exodus23:20 “Yang'ana, ndinatuma mngelo patsogolo panu kuti akutchinjirizeni ndzidzi unaenda imwe paulendo wanu, pontho kukufikisani kumbuto idasasanya ine ile." 
Exodus23:21 Mvesereni, pontho mvereni iye. Lekani kumpandukira, thangwi ndine ndamtuma, tenepo iye hanalekerera kupandukira kweneku tayu." 
Exodus23:22 Mbwenye imwe mungamvera mbamuchita pyonsene pinalonga ine, ndinamenyana na anyamalwanu onsene." 
Exodus23:23 Mngelo wanga anaenda patsogolo panu mbakufikisani kudziko ya Aamori, Ahiti, Aperizi, Akanani, Ahivi na Ayebusi mbandiavunga." 
Exodus23:24 Lekani lambira milungu yawo penu kuipembedza, pontho lekani tsanzira pipembedzo pyawo. Vungani milungu yawo, pontho gomolani piguwa pyawo pyakupambulika." 
Exodus23:25 Ngakhala imwe munandipembedza, ine MBUYA Mulungu wanu, ndinakutsanzayisani na phoso pontho madzi mbandikubulusirani utenda onsene." 
Exodus23:26 M'dziko mwanu nkhabe mkazi wamimba anataya penu kukhala ngomwa tayu. Ndinakupasani moyo wakulapha. 
Exodus23:27 “Ndinachitisa anthu ambakupokanyani ale kundigopa; ndinachitisa anthu anamenyana na imwe ale kukhonda vana, pontho ndinachitisa kuti anyamalwanu onsene akuthaweni." 
Exodus23:28 Ndinaikha pampani-pani anyamalwanu; ndinathamangisa Ahivi, Akanani na Ahiti pinamenya imwe nawo nkhondo." 
Exodus23:29 Sinaathamangisa chaka chibodzi chokha tayu, gopesera dziko inasanduka msitu, pontho nyama zam'tsanga zinainjipa pyakwanga." 
Exodus23:30 Mbwenye ndinaathamangisa pang'ono na pang'ono mpakana imwe muinjipe kuti mukwanise kukwata dziko yawoyo kukhala yanu ene. 
Exodus23:31 Ndinathimiza madire anu mpakana ku Bara ya Mediterania kubulukira ku Akwaba pontho mpakana kumkulo wa Yufurate kubulukira kuthando yatchetcha. Ndinakupasani mphamvu zakukunda nazo enechiro dzikoyo, tenepo imwe munathamangisa pinamenyana imwe nkhondo nawo." 
Exodus23:32 Lekani chita chiverano na iwo, penu na milungu yawo." 
Exodus23:33 Lekani tawirisa anthu kukhala m'dziko mwanu; ngakhala munachita tenepo, iwo anakuchitisani kuti mundidawire. Ngakhala imwe munapembedza milungu yawo, penepyo pinakhala msampha kuna imwe.”" 
Exodus24:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Kwira paphiri pano kuna ine, iwe na Aroni, Nadabu, Abihu pontho na akadamu a Aisraele makumanomwe, pontho ndzidzi una imwe kutali pang'ono na phiriyi mulambe pansi kundipembedza." 
Exodus24:2 Iwe wekha, nee na anango tayu, wathema kudza chifupi na ine. Anthu aleke na kukwira kwene paphiri pano.”" 
Exodus24:3 Mose adenda kapanga anthu pyonsene pidalonga MBUYA na matongero onsene, tenepo anthu onsene adatawira pabodzi pene mbati, “Tinachita pyonsene pyalonga MBUYA.”" 
Exodus24:4 Mose adalemba matongero onsene a MBUYA. Mangwana mwache na machibese iye adamanga guwa mbaimirisa miyala khumi na miwiri kuimirira madzinza khumi na awiri a Aisraele. 
Exodus24:5 Kubuluka penepo iye adatuma aphale, tenepo iwo adapereka nsembe zakupyerera kuna MBUYA mbapereka nsembe ng'ombe zinango kukhala nsembe yachiphatizano." 
Exodus24:6 Mose adakwata theka ya chiropa cha nyama mbachiikha m'ndilo mbakwata theka inango mbachiwazira paguwa yansembe. 
Exodus24:7 Tenepo iye adakwata bukhu ya chiverano, mudalembwa matongero a Mulungu mule mbaiwerenga mwakugaluza fala kuna anthu. Iwo adalonga mbati, “Tinamvera MBUYA pontho tinachita pyonsene pyatipanga iye.”" 
Exodus24:8 Mose adakwata chiropa chikhali m'ndilo chile mbachiwazira pana anthu. Iye adalonga mbati, “Chenechi ntchiropa chakutsikimiza chiverano, chile chidachita MBUYA na imwe ndzidzi udakupasani iye matongero onsenewa.”" 
Exodus24:9 Mose, Aroni, Nadabu, Abihu na akadamu makumanomwe a Aisraele ale adakwira paphiri" 
Exodus24:10 mbaona Mulungu wa Israele. Pansi pa manyalo ache pakhaoneka ninga njira yamiyala yakudula ya safire yachoza ninga thambo. 
Exodus24:11 Mulungu hadathuswe akadamu enewa tayu; iwo adamuona Mulungu, natenepo adadya na kumwa." 
Exodus24:12 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Kwira paphiri pano kuna ine. Ndzidzi una iwe pano, ndinakupasa pyakulemberapo piwiri pyamiyala pale palembwa mwambo na matongero onsene pyalembera ine anthu kuti uafunzise napyo.”" 
Exodus24:13 Mose adalamuka mbaenda na Yoswa, nyakumphedzerache, tenepo Mose adatoma kukwira paphiri ya Mulungu ile." 
Exodus24:14 Mose adalonga kuna akadamu ale mbati, “Tidikhireni pamsasa pano kufikirana ife tibwerere. Aroni na Huri ali namwe pabodzi pano; tenepo munthu ana mseruyo anakwanisa kwenda kuna iwo.”" 
Exodus24:15 Mose adakwira paphiri ya Sinai, tenepo makole adaigudumira." 
Exodus24:16 Demelero ya MBUYA idadza paphiripo. Kuna Aisraele demelero ikhaoneka ninga moto wakugaka paphiri. Nsiku zitanthatu makole ale adabisa phiri ile, tenepo pansiku yachinomwe MBUYA adachemera Mose kubulukira m'makole mule." 
Exodus24:17  
Exodus24:18 Mose adathimiza kukwira phiri m'makole mule kweneko iye adakhalako nsiku makumanayi mosiku na masikati. 
Exodus25:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Exodus25:2 “Panga Aisraele adze kuna ine na pyakupereka. Tambira chakupereka chonsene chinakhumba munthu kundipasacho. 
Exodus25:3 Pyakupereka penepi pyathema kukhala pya golidi, siliva na nkuwa;" 
Exodus25:4 usalu wachoza, msuzi wanyemba na wakufira; nguwo yakufewa; nguwo yakusasanywa na ubweya wa mbuzi;" 
Exodus25:5 nthembe za mabira amuna zakuikhwa tinta yakufira; nthembe zakufewa; matabwa akesha; 
Exodus25:6 mafuta a m'nyale; pyakununkhira pya mafuta akudzoza nawo na pyakufukiza pyakununkhira; 
Exodus25:7 miyala ya onikisi na miyala yakudula inango yakuthemesera nguwo ya efodi pya Nyansembe Wamkulu, pontho na chapagangafuwa chache." 
Exodus25:8 Anthu athema kundisasanyira Chikhumbi chakupambulika, towera ine ndikhale pakati pawo." 
Exodus25:9 Muchisasanye na kuikha pyonsene pya mwenemo malingana na munafuna kukuoneserani ine. 
Exodus25:10 “Sasanya bokosi na matabwa akesha, ulaphiache ukhale khono ibodzi na dzanja, umimbache ukhale wakulapha kufika ntchafu, pontho chengo chache chikhale chakulapha kufika ntchafu." 
Exodus25:11 Uikukutize na golidi chadi-chadi kuzungulira m'bwalo na kunja kwene, pontho muikhe chigundiro chagolidi kuizungulira." 
Exodus25:12 Sasanya mphete zinayi zagolidi zakuthukulira, mbuzifeke kumiyendo yache minayi mphete ziwiri kukhundu zonsene ziwiri." 
Exodus25:13 Sasanya miti miwiri yakuthukulira yakesha, pontho mbuikukutize na golidi," 
Exodus25:14 pontho uipitise mphete kukhundu zonsene ziwiri za bokosi. 
Exodus25:15 Mitiyo yathema kukhala m'mphetemo, iyo yathema nee kubuluswave m'mphetemo tayu." 
Exodus25:16 Tenepo ikhani m'bokosimo pyakulemberapo piwiri pyamiyala pinafuna ine kukupasa pile, pale palembwa matongero." 
Exodus25:17 “Sasanya mphampha yagolidi chadi-chadi, ulaphiache ukhale khono ibodzi na dzanja, pontho umimbache ukhale wakulapha kufika ntchafu." 
Exodus25:18 Sasanya pyakulengwa piwiri pyakukhala na maphaphido pyagolidi wakuchita kufulwa na nyundo," 
Exodus25:19 mbodzi kukhundu ibodzi, unangombo kukhundu inango. Pisasanyeni kuti makhundu mawiri akumalisirawo akhale phindi ibodzi ene na mphampha." 
Exodus25:20 Pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphidopyo piyang'anisane, pontho pifuthule maphaphido awo kuphimbira mphamphayo." 
Exodus25:21 Ikhani m'bwalo mwa bokosimo pyakulemberapo piwiri pyamiyala mbamuigudumire na mphampha. 
Exodus25:22 Ine ndinagumana nawe penepo, pontho kubulukira pa mphampha pakati pa pyakulengwa piwiri pyakukhala na maphaphido ndinakupasa matongero anga onsene kuti uapange Aisraele." 
Exodus25:23 “Sasanya thebulu na matabwa akesha, ulaphiache ukhale khono ibodzi, umimbache ukhale kati ya khono, pontho chengo chache chikhale chakufika ntchafu." 
Exodus25:24 Uikukutize na golidi chadi-chadi, pontho uikhe chigundiro chagolidi m'nkhomo zache kuzungulira thebulu yonsene." 
Exodus25:25 Sasanya chigundiro chakukhala na magulupiya, chakulapha ninga chala chapakati cha m'manja, kuzungulira thebuluyo na kuikha mthimba wagolidi kuzungulira chigundirocho." 
Exodus25:26 Sasanya mphete zinayi zakuthukulira zagolidi mbuziikhe kunkhomo zinayi kumiyendo. 
Exodus25:27 Mphete zakuphatisa miti yakuthukulira thebuluyo zathema kuikhwa chifupi na chigundiro cha magulupiya. 
Exodus25:28 Sasanya miti yakuithukulira yakesha, pontho uikukutize na golidi." 
Exodus25:29 Sasanya mapalato, na piwaya pyakufukizira pyakununkhira, pontho pitomba na ndilo kuti piphatiswe basa kupereka nsembe ya chakumwa. Pyonsenepi pyathema kusasanywa na golidi chadi-chadi." 
Exodus25:30 Thebulu yathema kuikhwa kutsogolo kwa Bokosi ya Chiverano, tenepo pathebulu ndzidzi onsene pathema kukhala mkate wakupambulika wakuperekwa kuna ine." 
Exodus25:31 “Sasanya chakuikhirapo nyale chagolidi chadi-chadi. Thako na manungo ache pikhale golidi wakufulwa na nyundo, maluwache akuthemesera nawo, kuthimizapo mphukira na maluwa asasanye phindi ibodzi ene na chakuikhirapo nyale." 
Exodus25:32 Nthambi zitanthatu zathema kuphutchukira khundu zache, nthambi zitatu kukhundu ibodzi, nthambi zinango zitatu kukhundu inangoyo." 
Exodus25:33 Nthambi zonsene zitanthatu zathema kukhala na maluwa matatu akuthemesera akuoneka ninga maluwa a muti wamfula akukhala na mphukira na maluwa. 
Exodus25:34 Manungo a chakuikhirapo nyale athema kukhala na maluwa akuthemesera manayi akuoneka ninga maluwa a muti wamfula akukhala na mphukira na maluwa. 
Exodus25:35 Pathema kukhala mphukira ibodzi pansi pa nthambi ziwiri zonsene. 
Exodus25:36 Mphukirazo, nthambi zache, pontho chakuikhirapo nyale pyathema kukhala phindi ibodzi pyagolidi chadi-chadi wakuchitwa kufulwa." 
Exodus25:37 Sasanya nyale zinomwe pachakuikhirapo nyale chibodzi, pontho zigaseni towera zimwinikire kutsogoloko." 
Exodus25:38 Sasanya pyakukwizira tsakalache na pyakuwolera dotha pyache pyagolidi chadi-chadi. 
Exodus25:39 Phatisa basa golidi chadi-chadi wakulemera makilogramu makumatatu na mashanu kusasanyira chakuikhirapo nyalecho na pinthu pyache pyonsene. 
Exodus25:40 Onesesa kuti pyonsene upisasanye malingana na mule mwakuonesera ine paphiri pano. 
Exodus26:1 “Sasanya Chikhumbi cha Mulungu na mapindi khumi a chinguwo chakufewa chakulukwa mwaluso na usalu wachoza, msuzi wanyemba na wakufira, pontho uchiluke mwakuthemesera pabodzi pene na pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido." 
Exodus26:2 Mapindi onsene akhale sasawa, ulaphiache makhono khumi na mawiri, pontho umimbache makhono mawiri." 
Exodus26:3 Sonera mapindi mashanu pabodzi pene kukhala chinguwo chibodzi chikulu, pontho uchite chibodzi-bodzi na mapindi mashanu anangowo." 
Exodus26:4 Sasanya magango na nguwo yachoza mbuaikhe m'khundu mwa phindi yakumalisa ya chinguwo chibodzi chikulu, pontho chita chibodzi-bodzi kuna chinguwo chinango chikulucho." 
Exodus26:5 Magangowo athema kukhala makumashanu paphindi yakutoma ya chinguwo chibodzi chikulu, pontho magango makumashanu paphindi yakumalisa ya chinguwo chinango chikulucho, towera magangowo ayang'anisane." 
Exodus26:6 Sasanya ngoloweko zagolidi makumashanu zakuphatanizira nazo nguwo ziwiri zikulu zile, towera Chikhumbi cha Mulungu chikhale chibodzi chamumphu." 
Exodus26:7 “Sasanya chinguwo chakuphimba nacho Chikhumbicho kubulukira pa mapindi khumi na ibodzi a nguwo yakusasanywa na ubweya wa mbuzi. 
Exodus26:8 Pyonsenepyo thungache ikhale sasawa, ulaphiache makhono khumi na atatu, pontho umimbache makhono mawiri." 
Exodus26:9 Sonera mapindi onsene mashanu pabodzi kukhala chinguwo chibodzi chikulu, pontho mapindi anango atanthatu asonerwe kukhalambo chinguwo chibodzi chikulu. Funya kawiri phindi yachitanthatu, ile ikhali kunkhope kwa Chikhumbi." 
Exodus26:10 Ikha magango makumashanu m'khundu mwa phindi yakumalisa ya chinguwo chibodzi chikulu, pontho chita chibodzi-bodzi kuna chinguwo chinango chikulucho." 
Exodus26:11 Sasanya ngoloweko zankuwa makumashanu mbauziikhe m'magango, towera ziphatanize nguwo ziwiri zikulu zile kukhala chinguwo chibodzi chamumphu." 
Exodus26:12 Leka kati na kati ya phindi yakusalira kulemberera pyayo kunduli kwa Chikhumbi. 
Exodus26:13 Mapindi anango ulaphiache wakukwana kati ya khono akusalirawo kukhundu yonsene ya ulaphi wa chinguwo chikulu athema kulemberera pyayo kukhundu ya Chikhumbicho. 
Exodus26:14 “Sasanya pyakuphimba napyo pinango piwiri, chibodzi chakusasanywa na nthembe za mabira amuna zakuikhwa tinta yakufira, chinango chikhale chakusasanywa na nthembe zakufewa kukhala chakuphimba nacho chakunja." 
Exodus26:15 “Matabwa akuimirisa Chikhumbicho akhale akesha. 
Exodus26:16 Thabwa yonsene ikhale makhono manayi ulaphiache, pontho umimbache ukhale wakulapha kufika ntchafu." 
Exodus26:17 Pathabwa yonsene sasanya mitsomeko miwiri kumakhundu mawiri a thabwa, towera matabwa akwanise kuphatanizwa." 
Exodus26:18 Sasanya matabwa makumawiri a kukhundu yakumwera," 
Exodus26:19 pontho mathako makumanayi a siliva kupita pansi pa matabwawo, mathako mawiri pathabwa ibodzi pansi pa mitsomeko miwiri." 
Exodus26:20 Sasanya matabwa makumawiri a kukhundu yakumpoto ya Chikhumbi," 
Exodus26:21 na mathako asiliva makumanayi, mawiri pansi pa thabwa ibodzi." 
Exodus26:22 Sasanya matabwa matanthatu kunduli kwa Chikhumbi, kumadokero dzuwa kwache," 
Exodus26:23 pontho matabwa mawiri a m'nkhomo. 
Exodus26:24 Matabwa a m'nkhomozi athema kuphatanizwa kubulukira pansi mpakana padzulu. Matabwa mawiri asasanya m'nkhomo ziwiri ale athema kusasanywa ninga tenepa. 
Exodus26:25 Tenepo panakhala matabwa masere akukhala na mathako asiliva khumi na atanthatu, awiri pansi pa thabwa ibodzi." 
Exodus26:26 “Sasanya mitandaliko khumi na mishanu yakesha, mishanu ya matabwa kukhundu ibodzi ya Chikhumbi," 
Exodus26:27 mishanu ya matabwa a kukhundu yakumadokero dzuwa, kunduli kwa Chikhumbi." 
Exodus26:28 Mitandaliko ya pakati pa phembo ya matabwa ifike kubulukira kukhundu ibodzi mpakana khundu inango ya Chikhumbi. 
Exodus26:29 Kukutiza matabwawo na golidi mbuikhemo m'mphete zagolidi kuphatisa mitandaliko, ile pontho yathema kukukutizwa na golidi." 
Exodus26:30 Sasanya Chikhumbi kuteweza na mudakuonesera ine mule paphiri pale. 
Exodus26:31 “Sasanya chinguwo chakufewa chakulukwa mwaluso na usalu wachoza, msuzi wanyemba na wakufira. Uchiluke mwakuchithemesera pabodzi pene na pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido." 
Exodus26:32 Chimanike pamizati minayi ya matabwa akesha akukukutizwa na golidi, pontho akukhala na ngoloweko mbachiikhwa pamatfako manayi asiliva." 
Exodus26:33 Ikha chinguwocho mumzera pansi pa ngoloweko makumashanu kunsoyi m'bwalo mwa Chikhumbi, pontho kunduli kwa chinguwocho ikhako Bokosi ya Chiverano yakukhala na pyakulemberapo piwiri pyamiyala. Chinguwocho chinasiyanisa Mbuto Yakuchena na Mbuto Yakuchenesesa." 
Exodus26:34 Ikha mphampha pa Bokosi ya Chiverano. 
Exodus26:35 Kunja kwa Mbuto Yakuchenesesa ikhako thebulu kutsamiza kufufu yakumpoto ya Chikhumbicho, pontho chakuikhirapo nyale kutsamiza kufufu yakumwera." 
Exodus26:36 “Sasanya chinguwo chakufewa chakulukwa mwaluso na usalu wachoza, msuzi wanyemba na wakufira chakuthemeserwa mwadidi kuti chikhale pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi." 
Exodus26:37 Sasanya mizati mishanu yakesha yakukukutizwa na golidi, pontho yakuikhwa ngoloweko zagolidi kuphatisa chinguwocho. Sasanya mathako mashanu ankuwa, towera aikhwe pansi pa mizatiyo." 
Exodus27:1 “Sasanya guwa yansembe na matabwa akesha. Nkhomo zache zikhale zonsene sasawa, ulaphiache ukhale makhono mawiri na kati ya khono, umimbache ukhale makhono mawiri na kati ya khono, pontho chengo chache chikhale khono ibodzi na kati ya khono." 
Exodus27:2 Sasanya nyanga padzulu pa nkhomo zinayi. Pyonsene na guwayo pikhale phindi ibodzi, pontho yonseneyo ikukutizwe na nkuwa." 
Exodus27:3 Sasanya supulia wakugweramo dotha, mafosholo, ndilo, pyakujobolera nyama na chiwaya chakugasirapo moto. Pinthu pyonsenepi pisasanywe na nkuwa." 
Exodus27:4 Sasanya waya wa mangalade ankuwa mbuikhe mphete zinayi zakuthukulira nazo zankuwa m'nkhomo zache. 
Exodus27:5 Ikha mangalade pansi pa magulupiya a guwa yansembe, towera abwerere pakati m'bwalo mwa guwayo." 
Exodus27:6 Sasanya miti yakuithukulira yakesha mbuikukutize na nkuwa," 
Exodus27:7 mbuziikhe m'mphete kukhundu ziwiri zonsene za guwa ingathukulwa. 
Exodus27:8 Sasanya guwayo na mapembo a matabwa mbusiye benga m'bwalo, kuteweza na mudakuonesera ine paphiri pale." 
Exodus27:9 “Sasanya mpanda wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu na chinguwo chakufewa. Kukhundu yakumwera chinguwocho chikhale ulaphiache makhono makumanayi na manayi," 
Exodus27:10 chakuphatiswa na mizati makumawiri yankuwa m'mathako makumawiri ankuwa, na ngoloweko pontho na mitandaliko pyasiliva." 
Exodus27:11 Pyontho-pyonthopyo pyathema kuchitwa kukhundu yakumpoto ya mpandawo. 
Exodus27:12 Kukhundu yakumadokero dzuwa kwathema kukhala chinguwo chakulapha makhono makumawiri na mawiri, chakukhala na mizati khumi, pontho na mathako khumi." 
Exodus27:13 Kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa kuna msuwo kule, mpandawo wathema kukhala makhono makumawiri na mawiri." 
Exodus27:14 Kukhundu yonsene ya msuwo kwathema kukhala makhono matanthatu na kati ya khono a nguwo, akukhala na mizati mitatu, pontho na mathako matatu." 
Exodus27:15  
Exodus27:16 Chinguwo chakufewa chakufunga nacho pamsuwo chathema kukhala makhono mafemba ulaphiache chakulukwa na usalu wachoza, msuzi wanyemba na wakufira, pontho wakuthemesera mwadidi. Chathema kuphatiswa na mizati minayi m'mathako manayi." 
Exodus27:17 Mizati yonsene ya mpanda yathema kuphatanizwa na mitandaliko yasiliva, pontho ngoloweko zathema kukhala zasiliva, mathako awo mbakhala ankuwa." 
Exodus27:18 Mpanda wakuzungulira Chikhumbi wathema kukhala ulaphiache makhono makumanayi na manayi, umimbache makhono makumawiri na mawiri, pontho chengo chache makhono mawiri na kati ya khono. Chinguwo chathema kukhala chakufewa mbachikhala na mathako ankuwa." 
Exodus27:19 Pinthu pyonsene pyakuphatisirwa basa m'Chikhumbi, pontho na ntchiri zonsene zakuphatisa nkhambala za Chikhumbi na mpandache ene pyathema kukhala pyankuwa." 
Exodus27:20 “Panga Aisraele kukudzesera mafuta aolivi adidiletu, towera aphatiswe basa m'nyale kuti ikwanise kugaswa mawulo onsene." 
Exodus27:21 Aroni na anache achimuna athema kuikha nyale m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu kunja kwa chinguwo chakutchinga nacho Bokosi ya Chiverano. Mwenemo pamaso panga yathema kugaka kubulukira mawulo mpakana machibese. Matongero enewa athema kukoyiwa na Aisraele na pidzukulu pyawo kwenda na kwenda. 
Exodus28:1 “Chemeresa mbaleako Aroni na anache achimuna, Nadabu, Abihu, Eleazara na Itamara. Apambule pakati pa Aisraele, towera akwanise kundiphatira basa ya unyansembe." 
Exodus28:2 Sasanyira mbaleako, Aroni, nguwo za unyansembe, towera akhale wachilemedzo, pontho wakubalika." 
Exodus28:3 Chemera anyabasa onsene, ale apasa ine nzeru pabasa yeneyi, pontho uapange kuti asasanyire Aroni nguwo, towera akhale nyansembe wakupambulika wakundiphatira basa." 
Exodus28:4 Uapange kuti asasanye chapagangafuwa, efodi, mkhanjo, mayala akuthemeserwa mwadidi, nduwira na mthimbalimba. Iwo athema kusasanyira mbaleako, Aroni, na anache achimuna, towera iwo akwanise kundiphatira basa ninga anyansembe." 
Exodus28:5 Anyaluso athema phatisa basa usalu wachoza, msuzi wanyemba na wakufira, usalu wagolidi na nguwo yakufewa." 
Exodus28:6 “Iwo athema kusasanya efodi na usalu wachoza, msuzi wanyemba na wakufira, usalu wagolidi, pontho na nguwo yakufewa yakuthemeserwa mwadidi." 
Exodus28:7 Nthambi ziwiri za m'mapewa, zile zinakwanisa kumangisa efodi, zathema kusonerwa m'khundu mwache." 
Exodus28:8 Bande yakufewa yakusasanywa na pinthu pyontho-pyonthopyo yathema kusonerwa ku efodi, towera bande na efodi pikhale phindi ibodzi." 
Exodus28:9 Kwata miyala miwiri ya onikisi ulembepo madzina khumi na mawiri a ana achimuna a Yakobo," 
Exodus28:10 nyandandanda kutoma na wautombo kufikirana chimalisira bele, ulembe madzina matanthatu pamwala ubodzi, matanthatumbo pamwala unangowo." 
Exodus28:11 Kwata nyaluso pakusasanya pidindo kuti alembe madzina a ana achimuna a Yakobo pamiyala miwiriyi mbamuikhemo m'pyakuikhiramo pyagolidi. 
Exodus28:12 Piikhe nthambo za m'mapewa za efodi kuimirira madzinza khumi na awiri a Israele. Penepa Aroni anakwata madzinawo pamapewa pache, towera chikhale chikumbuso pamaso pa ine, MBUYA." 
Exodus28:13 Sasanya pyakuthemesera piwiri pyagolidi pyakuoneka ninga kaluwa," 
Exodus28:14 pontho na njema ziwiri zagolidi chadi-chadi zakupotwa ninga nkhambala mbaziphatanizwa na pyakuthemeserapi. 
Exodus28:15 “Sasanyira Nyansembe Wamkulu chapagangafuwa pache chakudziwisa pinafuna Mulungu. Icho chathema kusasanywa na pinthu pyontho-pyonthopyo sasawa ninga efodi, pontho na pyakuthemesera pyache." 
Exodus28:16 Chathema kukhala nkhomo zache zonsene sasawa, pontho chakufunywa kawiri. Ulaphiache ukhale dzanja ibodzi, pontho umimbache ukhalembo dzanja ibodzi." 
Exodus28:17 Ikhapo miyala yakudula m'mizera minayi; mzera wakutoma uikhe rubi, topazi na garaneti;" 
Exodus28:18 mzera wachiwiri, emeradi, safire na daimondi;" 
Exodus28:19 mzera wachitatu, yasinti, agate na ametisiti;" 
Exodus28:20 pontho mzera wachinayi berili, onikisi na yasipere. Miyala yeneyi yathema kuikhwa m'pyakuikhiramo pyagolidi pile." 
Exodus28:21 Mwala onsene mwa miyala khumi na miwiriyi wathema kulembapo dzina ibodzi ya ana achimuna a Yakobo kuimirira madzinza a Israele. 
Exodus28:22 Pya chapagangafuwa, sasanya njema zagolidi chadi-chadi zakupotwa ninga nkhambala." 
Exodus28:23 Sasanya mphete ziwiri zagolidi mbuziphatanize kunkhomo zakudzulu za chapagangafuwa," 
Exodus28:24 pontho mangirira kumphete ziwiri nkhambala ziwiri zagolidi. 
Exodus28:25 Mangirira nkhomo ziwiri za nkhambalazo kupyakuthemesera piwiri pyakuoneka ninga kaluwa, tenepo piphatanize kutsogolo kwa nthambo za m'mapewa za efodi." 
Exodus28:26 Tenepo sasanya mphete ziwiri zagolidi mbupiphatanize kunkhomo zapansi kwa chapagangafuwa m'khundu-khundu m'bwalo chifupi na efodi. 
Exodus28:27 Sasanya mphete zinango ziwiri zagolidi mbuziikhe kupansi kutsogolo kwa nthambo ziwiri za efodi chifupi na msono, pontho padzulu pa bande yakuchita kulukwa." 
Exodus28:28 Mangirira mphete za chapagangafuwa kumphete za efodi na nkhambala yachoza, towera chapagangafuwa chikhale padzulu pa bande, pontho kuti chikhonde lera." 
Exodus28:29 “Aroni angapita m'Mbuto Yakuchena, iye avale chapagangafuwa chenechi pamtima pache chakulembwa madzina a madzinza a Israele, towera chikhale chikumbuso pamaso pa ine, MBUYA." 
Exodus28:30 Muchapagangafuwa ikhamo Urimu na Tumimu, towera pikhale pamtima pa Aroni ndzidzi onsene unadza iye pamaso panga. Natenepo Aroni athema ndzidzi onsene kuvala chapagangafuwachi pamtima pache, chile chakukwanisa kumdziwisa kufuna kwanga kuna Aisraele." 
Exodus28:31 “Mkhanjo ule umbakhala pansi pa efodi wathema kusasanywa na nguwo yachoza. 
Exodus28:32 Wathema kukhala na benga kuti msolo ukwanise kupitamo, benga yeneyi yathema kukhala na chigundiro chakuchita kulukwa kuti ileke ng'ambika." 
Exodus28:33 Kuzungulira pansi pa chikhwayeti cha mkhanjo ikha mavulere akulukwa na usalu wachoza, msuzi wanyemba na wakufira pyakuoneka ninga ntheme, pontho pakati pa ntheme na ntheme pakhale belo yagolidi kuzungulira chikhwayeti." 
Exodus28:34  
Exodus28:35 Aroni athema kuvala mkhanjo wenewu angaphata basa ninga nyansembe. Iye angadza pamaso panga m'Mbuto Yakuchena, penu angabulukamo, kulira kwa belo kunaveka basi, tenepo iye nkhabe phiwa tayu." 
Exodus28:36 “Sasanya chinthu chakuphaphathika chagolidi chadi-chadi, pontho uchilembe ninga chidindo kuti, ‘Kupambulika kuna MBUYA.’" 
Exodus28:37 Uchimangirire kutsogolo kwa nduwira na nkhambala yachoza. 
Exodus28:38 Aroni athema kuchivala pachipumu pache, pontho pyakupereka pyonsene pyakuperekwa na Aisraele mwakukhonda thema, pinakhala pamsolo pa Aroni. Iye athema ndzidzi onsene kuchivala pachipumu pache, towera ine, MBUYA, nditambire anthu." 
Exodus28:39 “Luka mayala a Aroni a nguwo yakufewa, pontho usasanye nduwira ya nguwo yakufewa, pontho na mthimbalimba wakuthemeserwa mwaluso na usalu." 
Exodus28:40 “Sasanya mayala, mithimbalimba, na nduwira pya ana a Aroni kuti akhale achilemedzo pontho akubalika." 
Exodus28:41 Mvazike mbaleako Aroni na anache achimuna nguwo zenezi. Tenepo uadzoze unyansembe, pontho uapambule pakuadzoza na mafuta aolivi, towera andiphatire basa ya unyansembe." 
Exodus28:42 Uasasanyire akapundu a nguwo yakufewa akulapha kubulukira m'chuno kufika ntchafu, towera akhonde oneka pezi." 
Exodus28:43 Aroni na anache ndzidzi onsene athema kupivala ndzidzi unapita iwo m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, penu kufika chifupi na guwa yansembe kuphata basawo ya unyansembe m'Mbuto Yakuchena, towera iwo akhonde kuphiwa thangwi ya kuoneka kwawo pezi. Matongero enewa ngakukhala na kukhala kuna Aroni na pidzukulu pyache." 
Exodus29:1 “Pyathema iwe kuchita kuna Aroni na anache achimuna kuapambula kukhala anyansembe kundiphatira basa mphipi: Kwata mwanamphulu wamamuna na mabira mawiri achimuna akusowa chilema. 
Exodus29:2 Phatisa basa ufa wa tirigu wakunerika, kwache wakusowa chakufufumisira, uphike mikate pang'ono na mafuta aolivi, inango yokhonda phikwa na mafuta, inango ikhale ninga pitumbuwa pyakukhwazwa mafuta." 
Exodus29:3 Uiikhe m'chitundu, mbuipereke kuna ine ndzidzi unapereka iwe nsembe ng'ombe imuna na mabira mawiri achimuna ale." 
Exodus29:4 “Udze na Aroni na anache achimuna kumsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, pontho uasambise na madzi." 
Exodus29:5 Tenepo mvazike Aroni nguwo za unyansembe; mayala, mkhanjo umbaenda pansi pa efodi ule, efodi, chapagangafuwa, na bande." 
Exodus29:6 Mvazike nduwira, pontho umangirirepo chidzindikiro chakulembwa kuti, ‘Kupambulika kuna MBUYA.’" 
Exodus29:7 Tenepo kwata mafuta akudzoza nawo mbumdzoza pakuakhuthulira mumsolo mwache. 
Exodus29:8 “Idza na anache achimuna mbuavazike mayala; 
Exodus29:9 uamange mithimbalimba m'chuno mwawo, pontho uamange nduwira m'misolo mwawo. Mwenemo ndiye mwathema iwe kudzoza Aroni na anache achimuna unyansembe. Iwo na pidzukulu pyawo athema kundiphatira basa ya unyansembe ndzidzi onsene." 
Exodus29:10 “Idza na ng'ombe imuna kunkhope kwa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, pontho panga Aroni na anache kuti asanjike manjawo pamsolo pa ng'ombeyo." 
Exodus29:11 Cheka ng'ombeyo penepo pamaso panga pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi. 
Exodus29:12 Kwata chiropa cha ng'ombe mbuchitswinge panyanga ya guwa yansembe na chala chako. Tenepo tchanyula chiropa chakusaliracho pathako ya guwayo. 
Exodus29:13 Kubuluka penepo ukwate mafuta onsene akukukutiza pya m'mimba ale, khundu yadidiletu ya fafa na nswikira ziwiri na mafutache ene mbupiotche paguwapo kupipereka nsembe kuna ine." 
Exodus29:14 Mbwenye mupise nyamacheyo, nthembe yache na matumbo ache ene kunja kwa msasa. Yeneyi ndi nsembe yakubulusira pyakudawa pya anyansembe." 
Exodus29:15 “Kwata mbodzi wa mabira amuna, pontho upange Aroni na anache kuikha manjawo pamsolo pa birayo." 
Exodus29:16 Mcheke, tenepo ukwate chiropa chache uchiwazire kumakhundu manayi onsene a guwa." 
Exodus29:17 Gwanda gwanda birayo m'mapindi; tsuka pya m'mimba pyache na miyendo yache ya m'nduli, tenepo piikhe pabodzi na msolo na mapindi anangowo." 
Exodus29:18 Pisa nyama yonseneyo paguwa ninga chakupereka kuna MBUYA chakusasanywa na moto. Khwema ya chakupereka chenechi imbandikomera. 
Exodus29:19 “Kwata bira unango wamamuna, pontho panga Aroni na anache kuikha manjawo pamsolo pabirayo." 
Exodus29:20 Mcheke, tenepo kwata chiropa chache pang'ono mbuchitswinge pansi kukhutu ya madyo ya Aroni na anache, pachikhatho cha dzanjawo yamadyo, pontho na pachala chawo chikulu cha dzinyalo yawo yamadyo. Tayira chiropa chakusaliracho kumafufu manayi a guwayo." 
Exodus29:21 Kwata chiropa pang'ono chili paguwa chile, pontho na mafuta akudzoza nawo, tenepo uchiwazire pamanungo a Aroni na nguwo zache, pontho pana anache na nguwo zawo zene. Iye na anache na nguwo zawo pinakhala pyakupambulika kuna ine." 
Exodus29:22 “Gwanda gwanda mafuta a nyamache, mafuta a kumchira, mafuta akukukutiza pya m'mimba, khundu yadidiletu ya fafa, nswikira ziwiri na mafutache, na ntchafu yamadyo." 
Exodus29:23 Kwata kubulukira m'chitundu cha mikate yakuperekwa kuna ine, mkate ubodzi wa mtundu onsene; ubodzi wakuphikwa na mafuta aolivi, ubodzi okhonda phikwa na mafuta pontho na chitumbuwa chibodzi." 
Exodus29:24 Ikha pyakudya pyonsenepyo m'manja mwa Aroni na anache, tenepo apange kuti apipereke kuna ine kukhala mtukwa wakupambulika." 
Exodus29:25 Tenepo pikwate, mbupiotche paguwa padzulu pa nsembe zakupyererazo kukhala chakupereka kuna ine chakusasanywa na moto. Khwema ya chakupereka chenechi imbandikomera." 
Exodus29:26 “Kwata chidali cha bira weneyu uchipambule kuna ine ninga mtukwa wakupambulika. Phindi yeneyi ya nyama inakhala yako. 
Exodus29:27 “Nyansembe angadzozwa, chidali na ntchafu pya bira pyakuphatiswa basa kudzoza napyo pyathema kupambulwa kuna ine ninga mtukwa wakupambulika, pontho wakupambulirwa anyansembe." 
Exodus29:28 Kweneku nkhukhonda sanduza kwanga manyerezero kuti ndzidzi unapereka anthu anga nsembe zachiphatizano, chidali na ntchafu pya nyama pikhale pya anyansembe. Penepi ndi mtukwa wa anthu wakuperekwa kuna ine, MBUYA." 
Exodus29:29 “Nguwo za Aroni za unyansembe zathema kusiyirwa anache, iye angafa, towera iwo avale angadzozwa unyansembe." 
Exodus29:30 Mwana Aroni anapita m'mbuto mwache kukhala nyansembe, pontho ule anapita m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu kaphata basa m'Mbuto Yakuchena athema kuvala nguwo zenezi nsiku zinomwe." 
Exodus29:31 “Kwata nyama ya bira yakuphatiswa basa kudzoza nayo Aroni na anache uitereke m'mbuto yakupambulika. 
Exodus29:32 Pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi Aroni na anache athema kudya nyamayo na mikate idasalira m'chitundu ile. 
Exodus29:33 Iwo anadya nsembe zile zidaphatiswa basa kulekerera pyakudawa pandzidzi udadzozwa iwo unyansembe na kupambulirwa kuna MBUYA. Anyansembe okha basi ndiye athema kudya pyakudya penepi, thangwi mphyakupambulika." 
Exodus29:34 Ngakhala nyama inango, penu mikate inango hinadyiwa tayu kumachibese, pyakusalirapyo pyathema kupiswa mbapileke kudyiwa, thangwi mphyakupambulika." 
Exodus29:35 “Chita penepi nsiku zinomwe kudzoza Aroni na anache ninga montho mwakupangira ine. 
Exodus29:36 Nsiku yonsene iwe wathema kupereka nsembe ng'ombe imuna, towera pyakudawa pilekererwe. Penepi pinachenesa guwa yansembe. Tenepo ikhwaze mafuta aolivi kuti ikhale yakupambulika." 
Exodus29:37 Chita penepi nsiku zinomwe zonsene. Penepo guwa inakhala yakuchena monsene mwene, tenepo munthu onsene penu chinthu chonsene chinakhuya guwayi chinavungwa na mphamvu za kuchena kwache." 
Exodus29:38 “Nsiku zonsene kutomera lero kwenda m'tsogolo idza upereke nsembe paguwa anabira awiri akukwanisa chaka chibodzi. 
Exodus29:39 Pereka mbodzi wa mabirawo na machibese, unangomboyo umpereke na mawulo." 
Exodus29:40 Pereka pabodzi na bira wakutomayo ufa wakunerika wa tirigu wakukwana kilogramu ibodzi wakuvunganizwa na tugwe mbodzi wa mafuta aolivi. Khuthula tugwe mbodzi wa vinyu ninga nsembe. 
Exodus29:41 Pereka nsembe wachiwiriyo na mawulo, pontho upereke na mdida wa ufa, mafuta aolivi na vinyu sasawa na bira wakuperekwa na machibeseyo. Chenechi ntchakupereka kuna ine, MBUYA, chakusasanywa na moto, pontho khwemache imbandikomera." 
Exodus29:42 Mifendu yonsene inadzayo nsembe yeneyi yathema kuperekwa pamaso panga pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu. Penepo ndiye panafuna ine kugumana na anthu anga mbandilonga kuna iwe. 
Exodus29:43 Penepo ndinagumanikana na Aisraele, pontho demelero yanga inachitisa mbutoyo kukhala yakuchena." 
Exodus29:44 Ndinachitisa Chikhumbicho na guwa kukhala pyakupambulika, pontho ndinapambula Aroni na anache kuti andiphatire basa ya unyansembe." 
Exodus29:45 Ndinakhala pakati pa Aisraele, pontho ndinakhala Mulungu wawo." 
Exodus29:46 Iwo anapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA, Mulungu wawo, ule adaabulusa m'dziko ya Iguputo, towera ine ndikwanise kukhala pakati pawo. Ndine MBUYA, Mulungu wawo." 
Exodus30:1 “Sasanya na matabwa akesha guwa yakufukizirapo pyakununkhira. 
Exodus30:2 Nkhomo zache zonsene zathema kukhala sasawa, ulaphiache ukhale kati ya khono, umimbache kati ya khono, pontho chengo chache chikhale khono ibodzi. Nyanga zache m'nkhomo zinayi zathema kukhala phindi ibodzi na guwayo." 
Exodus30:3 Ukukutize mphampha na golidi chadi-chadi khundu zache zinayi, pontho uikhe chigundiro chagolidi m'nkhomo zache kuzungulira." 
Exodus30:4 Sasanya mphete zakuthukulira ziwiri zagolidi mbuziphatanize pansi pa chigundiro kumakhundu mawiri kuphatisa miti yakuthukulira guwayo. 
Exodus30:5 Sasanya miti yakuithukulira yakesha mbuikukutize na golidi. 
Exodus30:6 Ikha guwayi kunja kwa chinguwo chakumanikwa kutsogolo kwa Bokosi ya Chiverano. Yeneyi ndi mbuto inafuna kugumanikana ine na iwe. 
Exodus30:7 Machibese onsene Aroni angadza dzapukuta nyale, iye athema kufukiza pyakununkhira penepo." 
Exodus30:8 Iye athema kuchita chibodzi-bodzi ndzidzi unagasa iye nyale dzuwa ingathobila. Nsembe yeneyi yakufukiza pyakununkhira yathema kuthimiza kwenda m'tsogolo okhonda lekeza mifendu yonsene inadzayo. 
Exodus30:9 Leka pereka nsembe paguwa penepa pyakufukiza pyakununkhira pyakukhondeswa, nsembe za nyama, penu nsembe za mapira, pontho leka thira nsembe yachakumwa paguwapa." 
Exodus30:10 Kabodzi pachaka Aroni athema kuchita mwambo wakuchenesa guwa pakutswinga chiropa cha nyama yakuperekwa nsembe kulekerera pyakudawa panyanga zache zinayi. Penepi pyathema kuchitwa chaka na chaka mifendu yonsene inadzayo. Guwa yeneyi njakuchena monsene mwene, yakupambulika kuna ine, MBUYA.”" 
Exodus30:11 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Exodus30:12 “Ungachita kalembera wa Aisraele kudziwa kuinjipa kwawo, mamuna onsene athema kundipagali kuombola moyo wache, towera kuvungika kuleke kudza pana iye ndzidzi unalembera iwe anthu." 
Exodus30:13 Munthu onsene wakwenda kuna anthu akulembwa kale athema kupagali kobiri yakukwana theka ya sekeli malingana na mdida wa sekeli wakuphatiswa basa nsiku na nsiku. Munthu onsene athema kupagali penepi ninga chakupereka kuna ine. 
Exodus30:14 Munthu onsene wakwenda kuna anthu akulembwa kale, kweneku nkhulonga kuti munthu wa pyaka makumawiri pyakubalwa, penu kupiringana penepo, athema kundipagali konta yeneyi." 
Exodus30:15 Nyakufuma aleke kundipagali kupiringana theka ya sekeli, pontho nyakutcherenga aleke kupereka pyakuchepa kupiringana kobiri yakukwana theka ya sekeli ndzidzi unandipagali iye konta yeneyi kuombola moyo wache." 
Exodus30:16 Gumanya kobiri zenezi kubulukira kuna Aisraele, tenepo uphatise basa kobirizo kuyang'anira mwadidi Chikhumbi cha Mulungu. Msonkho wenewu unakhala wakupagalira kuombola moyo wawo, tenepo ine ndinakumbuka kuatchinjiriza.”" 
Exodus30:17 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Exodus30:18 “Sasanya mphale yakusambira yankuwa yakukhala na thako yankuwa. Uiikhe pakati pa Chikhumbi na guwa yansembe, tenepo uikhemo madzi mwenemo." 
Exodus30:19 Aroni na anache achimuna athema kuphatisa basa madzi a m'mwenemo kusamba manja na kutsuka manyalo awo," 
Exodus30:20 mbadzati kupita m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, penu kufika chifupi na guwa kupisa nsembe na moto zakuperekwa kuna MBUYA. Tenepo iwo hanaphiwa tayu." 
Exodus30:21 Iwo athema kusamba manja na kutsuka manyalo awo, towera aleke kufa. Enewa ndi matongero, ale iwo na pidzukulu pyawo athema kuteweza mifendu yonsene inadzayo.”" 
Exodus30:22 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Exodus30:23 “Kwata pyakununkhira pyadidiletu: Matugwe matanthatu a madzi a mure, makilogramu matatu a kinamoni wakununkhira, makilogramu matatu a kane wakununkhira," 
Exodus30:24 na makilogramu matanthatu a kasiya wakununkhira. Thimiza matugwe manayi a mafuta aolivi," 
Exodus30:25 pontho na penepi usasanye mafuta akupambulika akudzoza nawo akuvungazwa na nyaluso pakuvungaza pyakununkhira. 
Exodus30:26 Aphatise basa kudzoza nawo Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, Bokosi ya Chiverano," 
Exodus30:27 thebulu na pyombo pyache pyonsene, chakuikhirapo nyale na pinthu pyache pyonsene, guwa yakufukizirapo pyakununkhira," 
Exodus30:28 guwa yakuperekapo nsembe zakupyerera, pabodzi pene na pinthu pyache pyonsene na mphale na thako yache." 
Exodus30:29 Pambulira kuna ine pinthu penepi na njira yeneyi, tenepo pinakhala pyakuchena monsene mwene, pontho munthu onsene penu chinthu chonsene chinakhuya penepi chinavungwa na mphamvu za kuchena kwache." 
Exodus30:30 Tenepo dzoza unyansembe Aroni na anache, pontho apambulire kuna ine towera akhale anyansembe anga." 
Exodus30:31 Longa kuna Aisraele kuti, ‘Mafuta akudzoza nawo akupambulikawa athema kuphatiswa basa pa basa yanga mifendu yonsene inadzayo." 
Exodus30:32 Athema nee kudzolwa pamanungo a anthu tayu, pontho iwe wathema nee kusasanya mafuta anango ninga tenepa tayu. Ngakupambulika, tenepo uayese ninga akupambulika." 
Exodus30:33 Munthu onsene anasasanya mafuta ninga enewa, penu kuphatisa basa mafutawa kudzoza munthu, ule nee si nyansembe tayu, hanayeswave ninga mbodzi wa anthu anga tayu.’ ”" 
Exodus30:34 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Kwata sasawa pyakununkhira pyadidi ipi: Sitakati, onika, galibanumu na libano chadi-chadi." 
Exodus30:35 Upiphatise basa kusasanya pyakufukiza pyakununkhira pyakuvungazwa na nyaluso pakuvungaza pyakununkhira. Piikhe munyu kuti pikhale pyangwiro, pontho pyakuchena." 
Exodus30:36 Peya pinango pya ipyo kukhala ufa, tenepo pikwate uende napyo mbupiikhe m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu kutsogolo kwa Bokosi ya Chiverano. Pyakufukiza pyakununkhira penepi pikhale pyakuchena monsene mwene." 
Exodus30:37 Leka phatisa basa njira zakuvunganizira pyakufukiza pyakununkhira sasawa ninga penepi kupidzoza wekha ene. Pikhale pinthu pyakuchena, pontho pyakupambulika kuna ine." 
Exodus30:38 Ngakhala munthu anasasanya pinthu ninga penepi kuti apiphatise basache, iye hanayeswave ninga mbodzi wa anthu anga tayu.”" 
Exodus31:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Exodus31:2 “Yang'ana, ine ndasankhula Bezalele, mwana wamamuna wa Uri, ule ndi mdzukuluache Huri, wa dzinza ya Yuda," 
Exodus31:3 pontho ndamdzaza na Mzimu wa Mulungu. Ine ndampasa nzeru kuvesa pinthu, luso pontho kukwanisa kuphata basa yamtundu onsene yamanja," 
Exodus31:4 kukwanisa kutanda makhaliro a pinthu mwaluso, pontho kupisasanya na siliva, golidi na nkuwa;" 
Exodus31:5 kugwanda miyala na kuiikha m'pyakuthemesera; kusema miti; pontho na basa yamtundu onsene yamanja. 
Exodus31:6 Ndasankhula pontho Oholiabu, mwana wamamuna wa Ahisamaki, wa dzinza ya Dani kuti aphate naye pabodzi basa. Ndapereka pontho luso kuna anango onsene akuphata basa yamtundu onsene yamanja, towera akwanise kusasanya pyonsene pyaatonga ine kuti pisasanywe:" 
Exodus31:7 Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, Bokosi ya Chiverano na mphamphache, pinthu pinango pyonsene pya m'Chikhumbi," 
Exodus31:8 thebulu na pinthu pyache pyonsene, chakuikhirapo nyale chagolidi chadi-chadi na pinthu pyache pyonsene, guwa yakufukizirapo pyakununkhira," 
Exodus31:9 guwa yakuperekerapo nsembe zakupyerera na pinthu pyache pyonsene, mphale na thako yache," 
Exodus31:10 nguwo zakuthemeserwa na usalu zakupambulika za Aroni na anache zakuphatisa basa ndzidzi unaphata iwo basa ya unyansembe," 
Exodus31:11 mafuta akudzoza nawo, na pyakufukiza pyakununkhira pya Mbuto Yakuchena. Ndzidzi unasasanywa pinthu penepi, pyathema kusasanywa sasawa ninga mwakupangira ine.”" 
Exodus31:12 MBUYA adatonga Mose 
Exodus31:13 kulonga kuna Aisraele kuti, “Koyani Sabudu, Nsiku Yakupuma, thangwi ntchidzindikiro pakati pa imwe na ine mifendu yonsene inadzayo, kuonesa kuti ine, MBUYA, ndakusanduzani imwe kukhala anthu anga." 
Exodus31:14 Imwe mwathema kukoya Nsiku Yakupuma, thangwi njakupambulika. Munthu anakhonda kuikoya mbaphata pyache basa pansikuyi, athema kuphiwa." 
Exodus31:15 Imwe muna nsiku zitanthatu zakuphata mabasanu, mbwenye nsiku yachinomwe ndi Nsiku Yakupuma yakupambulika kuna ine. Munthu anaphata basa pansiku yeneyo, athema kuphiwa." 
Exodus31:16 Aisraele a mifendu yonsene athema kukoya nsikuyi ninga chidzindikiro cha chiverano kwenda na kwenda. 
Exodus31:17 Chenechi ntchidzindikiro chakukhazikika pakati pa Aisraele na ine, thangwi MBUYA adasasanya kudzulu na dziko yapansi nsiku zitanthatu, tenepo adalekeza basache kupuma pansiku yachinomwe.”" 
Exodus31:18 Pikhadamala Mulungu kulonga kuna Mose paphiri ya Sinai, adampasa pyakulemberapo piwiri pyamiyala, pale pakhadalembapo Mulungu mwenechiro matongero." 
Exodus32:1 Pidaona anthu kuti Mose akhadembuka kutchitha paphiri pale, iwo adagumanyikana kuzungulira Aroni mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ife nkhabe dziwa pyachitikira munthu weneyu, Mose, ule adatitsogolera kutibulusa m'dziko ya Iguputo; tisasanyiretu pyathu milungu kuti ititsogolere.”" 
Exodus32:2 Aroni adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Dulani mphete za m'khutu zagolidi zimbavala akazanu, ananu achimuna na achikazi zile, mudze nazo kuna ine.”" 
Exodus32:3 Tenepo anthu onsene adadula mphete zawo zagolidi mbadza nazo kuna Aroni. 
Exodus32:4 Iye adakwata mphetezo mbazinyungulusa mbakhuthulira m'chikombole kusasanya mfanikizo wa mwanamphulu wagolidi. Anthu adalonga mbati, “Aisraele, yeneyi ndi milungu yathu, idatibulusa m'dziko ya Iguputo ile.”" 
Exodus32:5 Pidaona Aroni penepi adamanga guwa patsogolo pa mfanikizo wa mwanamphulu wagolidi mbalalika mbati, “Mangwana kunakhala phwando yakulemedza nayo MBUYA.”" 
Exodus32:6 Bzobzo mangwana mwache iwo adadza na nyama dzaotcha ninga nsembe zakupyerera, pontho na pinango kudya ninga nsembe zachiphatizano. Anthu adachita phwando, kudya na kumwa kwene, pile pidasanduka kuchita pyakuzuda." 
Exodus32:7 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Tchitha ubwerere kabodzi kene, thangwi anthu ako adatsogolera iwe kubuluka mu Iguputo ale, adawa mbandikhonda." 
Exodus32:8 Iwo aleka kale kuteweza matongero adaapanga ine kuti ateweze; iwo asasanya mfanikizo wa mwanamphulu na golidi wakunyunguluswa, pontho akuchipembedza na kupereka nsembe kuna icho. Iwo akulonga kuti yeneyi ndi milungu yawo, idaabulusa mu Iguputo ile." 
Exodus32:9 Ine ndadziwa kuuma mtima kwa anthu enewa. 
Exodus32:10 Tenepo, leka yesa kundikhondesa. Ine ndazhangali nawo, tenepo ndinati ndiavunge. Kubuluka penepo ndinachitisa iwe na pidzukulu pyako kukhala dzinza ikulu.”" 
Exodus32:11 Mbwenye Mose adadembetera MBUYA Mulungu wache mbati, “MBUYA, mwatani munazhangalira anthu anu tenepa, ale adapulumusa imwe kudziko ya Iguputo na mphamvu zikulu?" 
Exodus32:12 Thangwi yache ninji Aiguputo akwanise kulonga kuti imwe mudabulusa anthu anu mu Iguputo kufuna kuachitira pyakuipa pakuapha m'mapiri na kuavungiratu? Lekani zhangali; mbombowesani ukali wanu, pontho lekani dzesa nyatwa pana anthu anu." 
Exodus32:13 Kumbukani anyabasanu, Abrahamu, Isake na Israele. Kumbukani kudumbira kudachita imwe kuna iwo na dzinanu kuti munaapasa pidzukulu pyakuinjipa ninga nyenyezi za kuthambo, pontho kupasa pidzukulu pyawo dziko idadumbira imwe kuti inakhala yawo ene ndzidzi onsene.”" 
Exodus32:14 Tenepo MBUYA adambombowesa ukali wache mbakhonda dzesa nyatwa pana anthu ache, nyatwa idaathuswa na iye kuti anaidzesa ile." 
Exodus32:15 Mose adatchitha paphiri pale kubwerera uku athukula pyakulemberapo piwiri pyamiyala pyakulembapo matongero khundu yonsene. 
Exodus32:16 Mulungu mwenechiroache ndiye adalembapo matongerowo. 
Exodus32:17 Yoswa adava anthu akukhuwa mbalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Ndikuva ninga nkhondo mumsasamu.”" 
Exodus32:18 Mose adalonga mbati, “Penepi nee pikuveka ninga kukunda, penu kukundwa tayu, mbwenye ndikuva kuimba.”" 
Exodus32:19 Pidafika Mose chifupiletu na msasa ule, adaona mfanikizo wa mwanamphulu wamamuna mbaona anthu akuvina, tenepo iye adazhangali. Penepo m'tchinde mwa phiri, adaponya pansi pyakulemberapo pyamiyala pikhathukula iye pile mbipisweka." 
Exodus32:20 Iye adakwata mfanikizo wa mwanamphulu akhadasasanya iwo ule mbamnyungulusa, pontho adachipeya mbichikhala dotha mbachivungaza na madzi. Tenepo adachitisa Aisraele kuti amwe madziwo." 
Exodus32:21 Iye adalonga kuna Aroni mbati, “Anthuwa adachitanji kuna iwe mwakuti waadawisa pikulu ninga tenepa?”" 
Exodus32:22 Aroni adatawira mbati, “Leka kundizhangalira; iwe ukudziwa phinga ina anthu enewa pakuchita pyakudawika." 
Exodus32:23 Iwo adalonga kuna ine mbati, ‘Ife nkhabe dziwa pyachitikira munthu weneyu, Mose, ule adatidzesa kuno kubulukira ku Iguputo; tenepo tisasanyire pyathu milungu kuti ititsogolere.’" 
Exodus32:24 Ine ndidaapanga kudza na mphete zawo zagolidi za m'makutu, tenepo ale akhali napyo adazidula mbandipasira. Ine ndidapiponya pamoto, penepo pene pidasanduka mwanamphulu wamamunayi!”" 
Exodus32:25 Mose adaona kuti Aroni akhadachitisa anthu kusanduka ching'au-ng'au pontho kupichitisa okha ene kukhala anthu akupupwa pamaso pa anyamalwawo. 
Exodus32:26 Tenepo iye adaimira pamsuwo ukulu wakupitira mumsasamo mbakhuwa mbati, “Munthu onsene ule ali kukhundu ya MBUYA mbadze kuna ine kuno!” Tenepo Alevi onsene adagumanyikana pana iye," 
Exodus32:27 iyembo adaapanga mbati, “MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele akulonga kuti munthu onsene pakati panu akwate talasadache mbaende mumsasa onsenewu kubulukira kumsuwo uno kwenda kumsuwo unango wa msasawu na kupha mbaleache, shamwaliache na atsanthembache.”" 
Exodus32:28 Anthu a dzinza ya Levi adavera mbapha anthu ninga pikwi pitatu nsiku yeneyo. 
Exodus32:29 Mose adalonga kuna Alevi mbati, “Lero mwapipambula mwekha ene kuphatira basa MBUYA ninga a nyansembe pakupha ananu achimuna, abale anu, tenepo MBUYA akupasani mtsanzayiso wache.”" 
Exodus32:30 Mangwana mwache Mose adalonga kuna anthu mbati, “Imwe mwadawa pikulu. Mbwenye chinchino ndinati ndiende pontho kuphiri kuna MBUYA, mwinango ndinakwanisa kapempha kuti pyakudawa pyanu pilekererwe.”" 
Exodus32:31 Tenepo Mose adabwerera kuna MBUYA mbati, “Anthuwa adawa pikulu. Iwo adasasanya milungu yagolidi mbaipembedza." 
Exodus32:32 Ndaphata miyendo alekerereni pyakudawa pyawo; mbwenye ngakhala imwe munaalekerera tayu, apo fudzani dzinanga m'bukhu idalemba imwe madzina a anthu anu ile.”" 
Exodus32:33 MBUYA adatawira mbati, “Madzina anafuna fudzwa m'bukhumu ngale ene andidawira ale." 
Exodus32:34 Chinchino, ndoko katsogolere anthu kumbuto idakupanga ine ile. Tenepo dziwa kuti mngelo wanga ndiye anakutsogolerani, mbwenye ndzidzi ukudza, ule unafuna ine tchunyusa anthu enewa thangwi ya pyakudawa pyawo.”" 
Exodus32:35 MBUYA adagwisa utenda pakati pa anthu, thangwi iwo adachitisa kuti Aroni asasanye mfanikizo wa mwanamphulu wamamuna wagolidi." 
Exodus33:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Bulukani pambuto pano, iwe na anthu adabulusa ine mu Iguputo, muende kudziko idadumbira ine kuna Abrahamu, Isake na Yakobo na kuna pidzukulu pyawo." 
Exodus33:2 Ndinatuma mngelo kukutsogolerani, pontho ndinathamangisa Akanani, Aamori, Ahiti, Aperizi, Ahivi na Ayebusi." 
Exodus33:3 Imwe mukwenda kudziko yamphonje. Mbwenye ine sinati ndiende namwe tayu, gopesera ndinakuvungani panjira thangwi ndimwe anthu akuuma mtima.”" 
Exodus33:4 Pidava anthu penepi, adatoma kulira, tenepo hadavaleve pyakuthemesera manungo awo tayu." 
Exodus33:5 Thangwi MBUYA akhadatonga Mose kulonga kuna iwo kuti, “Imwe ndimwe anthu ukuuma mtima. Ngakhala ine ndikhafuna kwenda namwe, penu ndzidzi ung'ono ene, mbidakuvunganiletu. Chinchino dulani pyakuthemesera manungo anu, inembo ndinadziwa pyakuti ndichite namwe.”" 
Exodus33:6 Tenepo pidabuluka iwo paphiri ya Sinai Aisraele hadavaleve pyakuthemesera manungo tayu. 
Exodus33:7 Ndzidzi onsene ukhamanga Aisraele msasa, Mose akhakwata Chikhumbi cha Mulungu mbakachiikha kutali pang'ono na msasawo. Iye adachithula Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, tenepo munthu onsene ule akhafuna kuvunza nzeru kuna MBUYA akhaenda kweneko." 
Exodus33:8 Ndzidzi onsene ukhaenda Mose kweneko, anthu akhaimira pamsuwo wa makumbi awo mbayang'ana Mose mpakana iye apite m'Chikhumbimo." 
Exodus33:9 Mose angapita m'Chikhumbimo, makole akuoneka ninga mzati akhatchitha mbakhala pamsuwo wa Chikhumbicho, tenepo MBUYA akhalonga kuna Mose kubulukira m'makolemo." 
Exodus33:10 Sindzidzi anthu nkhuona makole akuoneka ninga mzati pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi akhalamba pansi munthu onsene pamsuwo wa khumbi yache. 
Exodus33:11 MBUYA akhalonga na Mose maso na maso, ninga mumbalongera munthu na shamwaliache. Kubuluka penepo Mose akhabwerera kumsasa kule, mbwenye mphale akhamphedza ule, Yoswa, mwana Nuni, adasalira m'Chikhumbimo." 
Exodus33:12 Mose adalonga kuna MBUYA mbati, “Ndimomwene imwe mwandipanga kuti nditsogolere anthuwa kuaendesa kudziko yeneyo, mbwenye hamudandipange tayu mbani anafuna kundituma na imwe. Imwe mwalonga kuti mumbandidziwa mwadidi mwene, pontho mwakukomerwa nane." 
Exodus33:13 Chinchino imwe ngakhala mwakomerwa nane, ngandipangeni pinthu pinafuna imwe kuchita, towera ndikuphatireni basa mbamuthimiza kukomerwa nane. Kumbukani pontho kuti imwe mwasankhula dzinzayi kukhala yanu ene.”" 
Exodus33:14 MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Ndinati ndiende namwe mbandikuchitisani kukunda.”" 
Exodus33:15 Mose adatawira mbati, “Ngakhala imwe nee munaenda nafe tayu, lekani kutibulusa pano." 
Exodus33:16 Munthu onsene anadziwa tani kuti imwe mwakukomerwa na anthu anu, pontho na ine ngakhala imwe munaenda nafe tayu? Kukhala kwanu nafe kunasiyanisa pakati pa ife na anthu anango a padziko yapansi pano.”" 
Exodus33:17 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Ndinati ndichite ninga mwapemphera iwe, thangwi ndimbakudziwa mwadidi mwene pontho ndakomerwa nawe.”" 
Exodus33:18 Tenepo Mose adapempha MBUYA mbati, “Ndaphata miyendo, nganditawirisenimbo kuona demelero yanu.”" 
Exodus33:19 MBUYA adatawira mbati, “Ndinachitisa kuti uone udidi wanga onsene ukugwanda pamaso pako, pontho pamaso pako ndinalalika dzinanga yakupambulika yakuti MBUYA. Ine ndinava nsisi na anthu anafuna ine kuvera nsisi; ndinava nyambalo na anthu anafuna ine kuvera nyambalo." 
Exodus33:20 Ine nkhabe kukutawirisa kuti uone nkhope yanga tayu, thangwi nkhabe munthu anakwanisa kundiona mbakhala na moyo," 
Exodus33:21 mbwenye pano pana mbuto chifupi na ine pale panakwanisa iwe kuimira pamwala. 
Exodus33:22 Demelero yanga ingagwanda pano, ndinakuikha m'nkhwimba yamwalawo mbandikubisa na dzanjanga mpakana ndigwande." 
Exodus33:23 Tenepo ndinabulusa dzanjanga, penepo iwe unaona kunduli kwanga nee nkhope yanga tayu.”" 
Exodus34:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Sema miyala miwiri ninga ya pakutoma ile, tenepo ine ndinalembapo mafala, ale akhali pa pyakulemberapo pyakutoma pidaswa iwe pile." 
Exodus34:2 Mangwana na machibese usasanyike kudza pansonga ya phiri ya Sinai dzagumanikana na ine pano. 
Exodus34:3 Nee mbodzi athema kukwira pabodzi na iwe, penu kuoneka chifupi paphiri pano tayu, pontho nee mabira, penu ng'ombe pyathema kudya m'tchinde mwa phirimo.”" 
Exodus34:4 Tenepo Mose adasema pyakulemberapo pinango piwiri pyamiyala ninga pyontho pyakutoma pile, tenepo bzobzo mangwana mwache adapithukula m'manja mwache mbakwira napyo paphiri pale ninga montho mukhadampangira MBUYA." 
Exodus34:5 MBUYA adatchitha m'makole mbaimira naye penepo, tenepo adalalika dzinache yakupambulika yakuti MBUYA." 
Exodus34:6 Penepo MBUYA adagwanda pamaso pache mbalalika kuti, “MBUYA, MBUYA, ine ndine Mulungu wakuva nyambalo na nsisi, wakusowa chipsu, wakuonesa kuafuna anthu kokhonda mala, pontho wakukhulupirika." 
Exodus34:7 Ndimbaonesa kuafuna kwanga kokhonda mala kuna mifendu pikwi-pikwi mbandilekerera umambala, kupandukira na pyakudawa; mbwenye nkhabe leka kutchunyusa munthu wakuchita pyakuipa; ine ndimbatchunyusa ana na pidzukulu pya mifendu mpakana mfendu wachitatu na wachinayi thangwi ya pyakudawa pya makolo awo.”" 
Exodus34:8 Msanga-msanga Mose adalamba pansi mbampembedza. 
Exodus34:9 Iye adalonga mbati, “Mbuya, ngakhala mwakomerwadi nane, ndikukupemphani kuti muende nafe. Anthuwa ngakuuma mtima, mbwenye lekererani pyakuipa na pyakudawa pyathu, pontho titawiriseni kuti tikhale anthu anu ene.”" 
Exodus34:10 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Chinchino ndasasanya chiverano chitswa na Aisraele. Ndinachita pinthu pikulu pamaso pawo pyakuti chipo nee ndidzati ndapichitabi konsene pansi pano pakati pa madzinza anango ene. Anthu onsene anaona pinthu pikulu pinakwanisa ine, MBUYA, kuchita, thangwi ndinati ndikuchitireni chinthu chakugoswa." 
Exodus34:11 Verani matongero anakupasani ine lerowa. Ndinathamangisa Aamori, Akanani, Ahiti, Aperizi, Ahivi na Ayebusi pinamenya imwe nkhondo." 
Exodus34:12 Lekani chita chiverano na anthu a m'dziko inaenda imweyo, gopesera ipyo pinakhala msampha kuna imwe." 
Exodus34:13 Kwache mugwise maguwawo akupambulika, iswani piguwa pyawo pyakupambulika, pontho mugwise adzimunthu awo a milungu Ashera." 
Exodus34:14 “Lekani pembedza milungu inango na mbodzi ene, thangwi ine, MBUYA, ule dzinanga ndi Ntchanje, ndine Mulungu wa ntchanje." 
Exodus34:15 Lekani chita chiverano na anthu a m'dzikomo, thangwi iwo angapembedza milungu mbapereka nsembe kuna iyo, iwo anakuchemerani kuti muphatizane nawo, tenepo imwe munayeswa kudya pinthu pyakuperekwa kuna milungu yawoyo." 
Exodus34:16 Imwe mungasembera ananu achimuna anawo achikazi, iwo anaachitisa kukhala okhonda khulupirika kuna ine mbapembedza milungu yawoyo." 
Exodus34:17 “Lekani sasanya mifanikizo na ntove kukhala milungu. 
Exodus34:18 “Sekerani Phwando ya Mikate yakusowa Chakufufumisira. Nsiku zinomwe mwezi wa Abibu, idyani mikate yakusowa chakufufumisira ninga mudakupangirani ine, thangwi ndi mwezi wenewo udabuluka na imwe m'dziko ya Iguputo." 
Exodus34:19 “Mwana onsene wamamuna wautombo, pontho chifuyo chonsene chimuna chakutoma kubalwa mphyanga," 
Exodus34:20 kwache imwe mwathema kundipagali kuombola bulu onsene wakutoma kubalwa pakupereka mwanabira m'mbuto mwache. Ngakhala imwe hamunandipagali kupiombola tayu, khumulani khosi yache. Ndipagalini kuombola mwana wamamuna onsene wautombo. “Nee munthu mbodzi athema kudza pamaso panga okhonda chakupereka tayu." 
Exodus34:21 “Imwe muna nsiku zitanthatu zakuti muphate mabasanu, mbwenye lekani phata basa pansiku yachinomwe, podi kwene kuti ukhale ndzidzi wakutipula, penu wakuvuna." 
Exodus34:22 “Sekerani Phwando ya Pyakuvuna pakupereka mbewu zanu zakutoma kutokota za tirigu, pontho sekerani Phwando ya Misasa ndzidzi unatchola imwe nsapo zanu." 
Exodus34:23 “Amuna onsene athema kundipembedza, ine MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele, katatu pa chaka." 
Exodus34:24 Ndingamala kuthamangisa madzinza pamaso panu, pontho kuthimiza madire a dziko yanu, nkhabe mbodzi anafuna yesa kukupokoserani dziko yanu pandzidzi wa maphwando matatuwa tayu." 
Exodus34:25 “Lekani pereka pabodzi na mikate yakukhala na chakufufumisira chiropa cha nyama inapereka imwe nsembe kuna ine. Lekani koya nyama yakuphiwa pa Phwando ya Paska kufikirana mangwana mwache. 
Exodus34:26 “Chaka na chaka idzani kunyumba ya MBUYA Mulungu wanu na mbewu zadidiletu zakutoma kutokota zimbavuna imwe zile. “Lekani tereka mwanabira penu mwanambuzi kubodzi kwene na mkaka wa mache.” 
Exodus34:27 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Lemba mafala enewa, thangwi chiverano chinasasanya ine na iwe, pontho na Aisraele chagona pa mafala enewa.”" 
Exodus34:28 Mose adakhala penepo na MBUYA nsiku makumanayi, mosiku na masikati, nee kudya na kumwa pinthu tayu. Tenepo iye adalemba pa pyakulemberapo pyamiyala pile mafala a chiverano, ale ndi Matongero Khumi." 
Exodus34:29 Pidatchitha Mose paphiri ya Sinai uku athukula Matongero Khumi, iye hadapidziwe tayu kuti nkhope yache ikhayetimira, thangwi akhadalonga na MBUYA." 
Exodus34:30 Aroni na anthu onsene adayang'ana Mose mbaona nkhope yache ikuyetimira, tenepo iwo adachita mantha kufedza chifupi naye." 
Exodus34:31 Mbwenye Mose adaachemera, tenepo Aroni na akadamu onsene adenda kuna iye, tenepo Mose adalonga kuna iwo." 
Exodus34:32 Kubuluka penepo Aisraele onsene adagumanyikana mwakumzungulira, tenepo Mose adaapanga matongero onsene akhadampasa MBUYA paphiri ya Sinai." 
Exodus34:33 Pikhadamala Mose kulonga nawo, iye adampsampsira nkhope yache na chakumpsampsikira." 
Exodus34:34 Ndzidzi onsene ukhapita Mose m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, iye akhakunundula chakupsampsikira chile. Iye angabulukamo, akhapanga Aisraele pyonsene pikhadampanga MBUYA kuti alonge," 
Exodus34:35 tenepo anthu akhaona kuti nkhope yache ikhayetimira. Penepo iye akhavala pontho chakumpsampsikira chile mpakana ndzidzi unango udenda iye kalonga na MBUYA. 
Exodus35:1 Mose adachemeresa dzinza yonsene ya Aisraele mbalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Penepi ndiye pyakutongani MBUYA kuti imwe mupichite:" 
Exodus35:2 Imwe muna nsiku zitanthatu zakuti munakwanisa kuphata mabasanu, mbwenye nsiku yachinomwe njakuchena, Nsiku Yakupuma yakupambulika kuna ine, MBUYA. Munthu anaphata basa pansiku yeneyo athema kuphiwa." 
Exodus35:3 Lekani kuphatisa na moto ene m'misa mwanu pa Nsiku Yakupuma.” 
Exodus35:4 Mose adalonga kuna Aisraele onsene mbati, “Penepi ndiye pyatonga MBUYA:" 
Exodus35:5 Perekani pyakupereka kuna MBUYA. Munthu onsene anakhumba kuchita tenepo athema kudza na pyakupereka pya golidi, siliva na nkuwa;" 
Exodus35:6 nguwo yakufewa, usalu wa choza, msuzi wanyemba na yakufira; nguwo yakusasanywa na ubweya wa mbuzi;" 
Exodus35:7 nthembe za mabira amuna zakuikhwa tinta yakufira; nthembe zakufewa; matabwa akesha; 
Exodus35:8 mafuta aolivi a m'nyale; pyakununkhira pya mafuta akudzoza nawo, pontho na pyakufukiza pyakununkhira;" 
Exodus35:9 miyala ya onikisi na miyala yakudula inango yakuthemesera nguwo ya efodi pya Nyansembe Wamkulu, pontho na chapagangafuwa pache." 
Exodus35:10 “Anyaluso onsene pakati panu athema kudza dzasasanya pyonsene pyatonga MBUYA: 
Exodus35:11 Chikhumbi na chinguwo chache chakuphimba nacho pansoyi na chakuphimba nacho chakunja, ngoloweko zache na matabwa, mitandaliko yache, miti yache na mathako ache;" 
Exodus35:12 Bokosi ya Chiverano, miti yache, mphamphache, chinguwo chakutchinga nacho;" 
Exodus35:13 thebulu, miti yache, na pyombo pyache pyonsene; mkate wakuperekwa kuna Mulungu;" 
Exodus35:14 chakuikhirapo nyale na pinthu pyache, nyale na mafutawo;" 
Exodus35:15 guwa yakufukizirapo pyakununkhira na miti yache, mafuta akudzoza nawo; pyakufukiza pyakununkhira; nguwo yakutchinga nayo msuwo wa Chikhumbi;" 
Exodus35:16 guwa yakuperekerapo nsembe zakupyerera, mangalade ankuwa, miti yache na pinthu pyache pyonsene; mphale na thako yache;" 
Exodus35:17 chinguwo chakutchinga nacho mpanda; mizati yache na mathako ache; nguwo yakutchinga nayo pamsuwo wa mpanda; 
Exodus35:18 ntchiri zakuphatisa nkhambala za Chikhumbi na mpandache; 
Exodus35:19 pontho nguwo zakukoma m'maso zathema kuvala anyansembe ndzidzi unaphata iwo basa m'Mbuto Yakuchena, zenezi ndi nguwo zakupambulika za Aroni, nyansembe na anache achimuna.”" 
Exodus35:20 Aisraele onsene adabuluka pana Mose," 
Exodus35:21 tenepo munthu onsene akhafuna kupereka akhadza na pyakupereka kuna MBUYA kuti asasanyire Chikhumbi cha Mulungu. Iwo adadza na pyonsene pikhafunika pyakuphatiswa basa pakupembedza na pakusasanya nguwo za anyansembe. 
Exodus35:22 Anthu onsene akhafuna kuchita tenepo ale, amuna penu akazi akhadza na nthona, mphete za m'khutu, mphete za m'pyala, mikufu, pyakuthemesera pya mtundu onsene pyagolidi mbapipereka kuna MBUYA." 
Exodus35:23 Munthu onsene, ule akhali na nguwo yakufewa; usalu wachoza, msuzi wanyemba penu wakufira; nguwo yakusasanywa na ubweya wa mbuzi, nthembe za mabira amuna zakuikhwa tinta yakufira, penu nthembe zakufewa akhadza napyo." 
Exodus35:24 Onsene ale adakwanisa kupereka siliva, penu nkuwa adadza napyo mbapipereka ninga pyakupereka pyawo kuna MBUYA, onsenembo, ale akhali na matabwa akesha, pile mbipidakwanisa kuphatiswa basa yonsene adadza nawo." 
Exodus35:25 Akazi onsene aluso pakusasanya usalu adadza na usalu wakufewa, pontho na usalu wachoza, msuzi wanyemba na wakufira, ukhadasasanya iwo." 
Exodus35:26 Akazi onsene ale akhali na luso pontho akhapifuna adasasanya usalu wa ubweya wa mbuzi. 
Exodus35:27 Akadamu adadza na miyala ya onikisi, pontho na miyala inango yakudula yakufuna kuikhwa muefodi na chapagangafuwa," 
Exodus35:28 na pyakununkhira pya mafuta aolivi a m'nyale, mafuta akudzoza nawo, pontho na pyakufukiza pyakununkhira." 
Exodus35:29 Anthu onsene ale akhapifuna kuchita tenepo adadza na pyakupereka pyawo kuna MBUYA dzaphatira napyo basa ikhadatonga MBUYA kuti Mose aiphate ile. 
Exodus35:30 Mose adalonga kuna Aisraele mbati, “Yang'ana, MBUYA asankhula Bezalele, mwana wamamuna wa Uri, ule ndi mdzukuluache Huri, wa dzinza ya Yuda." 
Exodus35:31 Mulungu adamdzaza na Mzimu wache pontho na luso, kukwanisa kuphata basa, pontho nzeru kuvesa basa ya manja ya mtundu onsene," 
Exodus35:32 luso kudziwa kutanda makhaliro a pinthu, pontho kupisasanya na siliva, golidi na nkuwa;" 
Exodus35:33 kugwanda miyala na kuiikha m'pyakuthemesera; kusema miti; pontho na basa yamtundu onsene yamanja. 
Exodus35:34 MBUYA apereka kuna iye pontho na Oholiabu, mwana wamamuna wa Ahisamaki, wa dzinza ya Dani, nzeru zakukwanisa kufunzisa basawo kuna anango." 
Exodus35:35 Iye aapasa luso pamabasa onsene akuphatwa na anyakulemba, anyakutanda pinthu, na anyakuluka nguwo zakufewa; zachoza, msuzi wanyemba na yakufira, na nguwo zinango. Iwo anakwanisa kuphata basa yamtundu onsene mwaluso." 
Exodus36:1 “Bezalele, Oholiabu, na amuna anango aluso, ale MBUYA aapasa luso na nzeru yakuvesa pinthu, ale ambadziwa kusasanya pyonsene pyakufunika kumangirira Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, athema kusasanya pyonsene ninga montho mwatongera MBUYA.”" 
Exodus36:2 Mose adachemera Bezalele, Oholiabu na anyaluso anango, ale akhadapaswa na MBUYA kukwanisa kuphata basa, pontho na ale akhafuna pyakuphedza, tenepo Mose adaapanga kutoma phata basa." 
Exodus36:3 Iwo adatambira kubulukira kuna iye pyakupereka pyonsene pikhadadza na Aisraele kuti piphatiswe basa kumangira Chikhumbi cha Mulungu. Mbwenye Aisraele adathimiza kudza kuna Mose na pyakupereka pyawo machibese onsene. 
Exodus36:4 Tenepo anyaluso akhaphata basa ale adenda 
Exodus36:5 mbakalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Anthu akudza na pinthu pizinji kupiringana pinthu pinafunika pabasa idatonga MBUYA kuti iphatwe ile.”" 
Exodus36:6 Tenepo Mose adatumiza mphangwa mumsasa monsene mule kuti paleke khalave munthu na mbodzi ene wakuthimiza kudza na pyakupereka pya pa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu; tenepo anthu adaleka kupereka. 
Exodus36:7 Pikhadadzeswa kale pile pikhali pizinji pyakwanga kupiringana pinthu pyakufunika kuphatira napyo basa yonsene. 
Exodus36:8 Amuna anyalusoletu pakati pa ale akhaphata basa adasasanya Chikhumbi cha Mulungu. Iwo adachisasanya na mapindi khumi a chinguwo chakufewa chakulukwa mwaluso na usalu wachoza, msuzi wanyemba na wakufira, mbachithemesera na pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido." 
Exodus36:9 Mapindi a chinguwocho akhali sasawa, ulaphiache makhono khumi na awiri, pontho umimbache makhono mawiri." 
Exodus36:10 Iwo adasona mapindi mashanu kukhala chinguwo chibodzi chikulu mbachita chibodzi-bodzi na mapindi anango ashanu ale. 
Exodus36:11 Iwo adasasanya magango na nguwo yachoza mbaaikha m'khundu mwa phindi yakumalisa ya chinguwo chibodzi chikulu mbachita chibodzi-bodzi kuna chinguwo chinango chikulucho. 
Exodus36:12 Iwo adaikha magango makumashanu paphindi yakutoma ya chinguwo chibodzi chikulu, pontho magango makumashanu paphindi yakumalisa ya chinguwo chinango chikulucho, towera magangowo ayang'anisane." 
Exodus36:13 Iwo adasasanya ngoloweko zankuwa makumashanu zidaphatisira iwo basa kuphataniza nguwo ziwiri zikulu zile, mwakuti Chikhumbi cha Mulungu chikhali chibodzi chamumphu." 
Exodus36:14 Tenepo iwo adasasanya chinguwo chakuphimbira nacho Chikhumbicho kubulukira pa mapindi khumi na ibodzi a nguwo yakusasanywa na ubweya wa mbuzi. 
Exodus36:15 Iwo adapisasanya pyonsene sasawa, ulaphiache makhono khumi na atatu, pontho umimbache makhono mawiri." 
Exodus36:16 Iwo adasonera mapindi mashanu pabodzi pene mbapikhala chinguwo chibodzi chikulu, pontho mapindi anango atanthatu adapisonera pabodzi kukhalambo chinguwo chibodzi chikulu." 
Exodus36:17 Iwo adaikha magango makumashanu m'khundu mwa phindi yakumalisa ya chinguwo chibodzi chikulu, pontho adaikha magango makumashanu paphindi yakumalisa chinguwo chinango chikulucho." 
Exodus36:18 Iwo adasasanya ngoloweko zankuwa makumashanu zakuphatanizira nazo nguwo ziwiri zikulu zile, towera chikhale chinguwo chibodzi chamumphu." 
Exodus36:19 Iwo adasasanya pyakuphimba napyo pinango piwiri, chibodzi chakusasanywa na nthembe za mabira amuna zakuikhwa tinta yakufira, chinango cha nthembe zakufewa chakuphatiswa basa kuphimba nacho chakunja." 
Exodus36:20 Iwo adasasanya matabwa akuimirisa akesha kuphatiswa basa pa Chikhumbicho. 
Exodus36:21 Thabwa yonsene ulaphiache ukhali makhono manayi, pontho umimbache ukhali wakulapha kufika m'ntchafu," 
Exodus36:22 na mitsomeko miwiri kumakhundu mawiri a thabwa, towera matabwa akwanise kuphatanizwa. Matabwa onsene akhali na mitsomeko yeneyi." 
Exodus36:23 Iwo adasasanya matabwa makumawiri kuti akhale kukhundu yakumwera," 
Exodus36:24 pontho mathako makumanayi asiliva kuti apite pansi pa matabwawo, mathako mawiri pathabwa ibodzi pansi pa mitsomeko yache miwiri." 
Exodus36:25 Iwo adasasanya matabwa makumawiri kuti akhale kukhundu yakumpoto ya Chikhumbi," 
Exodus36:26 na mathako asiliva makumanayi, mawiri pansi pa thabwa ibodzi." 
Exodus36:27 Iwo adasasanya matabwa matanthatu kuikhwa kunduli kwa Chikhumbi, kumadokero dzuwa kwache," 
Exodus36:28 pontho matabwa mawiri a m'nkhomo. 
Exodus36:29 Matabwa a m'nkhomozi adaphatanizwa kubulukira pansi mpakana padzulu. Matabwa mawiri, ale adasasanya m'nkhomo ziwiri, adasasanywa sasawa." 
Exodus36:30 Tenepo pakhali matabwa masere akukhala na mathako asiliva khumi na atanthatu, mawiri pansi pa thabwa ibodzi." 
Exodus36:31 Iwo adasasanya mitandaliko khumi na mishanu yakesha, mishanu ya matabwa kukhundu ibodzi ya Chikhumbi," 
Exodus36:32 mishanu ya matabwa kukhundu yakumadokero dzuwa, kunduli kwa Chikhumbi." 
Exodus36:33 Mtandaliko wa pakati ufike pakati na kati pa phembo ya matabwa kubulukira kukhundu ibodzi ya Chikhumbi kufikiratu khundu inango ya Chikhumbi. 
Exodus36:34 Iwo adakukutiza matabwawo na golidi mbafekamo mphete zagolidi kuphatisa mitandaliko, ile pontho idakukutizwa na golidi." 
Exodus36:35 Iwo adasasanya chinguwo chakufewa chakulukwa mwaluso na usalu wachoza, msuzi wanyemba na wakufira mbaithemesera na pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido." 
Exodus36:36 Iwo adasasanya mizati minayi ya matabwa akesha akukukutizwa na golidi, kuphatisa chinguwocho. Iwo adafekamo ngoloweko zagolidi mbasasanya mathako manayi asiliva kuphatisa mizatiyo." 
Exodus36:37 Iwo adasasanya chinguwo chakufewa chakulukwa mwaluso na usalu wachoza, msuzi wanyemba na wakufira chakuthemeserwa mwadidi kutchinga nacho msuwo wa Chikhumbi." 
Exodus36:38 Kuphatisira chinguwochi iwo adasasanya mizati mishanu yakukhala na ngoloweko, padzulu pawo, na mitandaliko yawo yakukukutizwa na golidi. Iwo adasasanya mathako mashanu ankuwa, towera aikhwe pansi pa mizatiyo." 
Exodus37:1 Bezalele adasasanya Bokosi ya Chiverano na matabwa akesha, ulaphiache khono ibodzi na dzanja, umimbache ukhali wakulapha kufika m'ntchafu, pontho chengo chache chakulapha kufika m'ntchafu." 
Exodus37:2 Iye adaikukutiza na golidi chadi-chadi kuzungulira m'bwalo na kunja kwene mbaikha chigundiro chagolidi kuizungulira. 
Exodus37:3 Iye adasasanya mphete zinayi zagolidi zakuthukulira, mbazifeka kumiyendo yache minayi yakukhala na mphete ziwiri kukhundu zonsene ziwiri." 
Exodus37:4 Iye adasasanya miti yakuthukulira minayi yakesha mbaikukutiza na golidi," 
Exodus37:5 pontho adapitisa mphete kukhundu zonsene ziwiri za bokosi. 
Exodus37:6 Iye adasasanya mphampha yagolidi chadi-chadi, ulaphiache khono ibodzi na dzanja, pontho umimbache ukhali wakulapha kufika m'ntchafu." 
Exodus37:7 Iye adasasanya pyakulengwa piwiri pyakukhala na maphaphido pyagolidi wakuchita kufulwa na nyundo kukhundu ziwiri za mphampha," 
Exodus37:8 chibodzi kukhundu ibodzi, chinangombo kukhundu inango. Iye adapisasanya kuti pikhale phindi ibodzi ene na mphampha." 
Exodus37:9 Pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphidopyo pidayang'anisana, pontho pidafuthula maphaphido awo kuphimbira mphamphayo." 
Exodus37:10 Iye adasasanya thebulu na matabwa akesha, ulaphiache khono ibodzi, umimbache kati ya khono, pontho chengo chache chakulapha kufika m'ntchafu." 
Exodus37:11 Iye adaikukutiza na golidi chadi-chadi mbaikha chigundiro chagolidi m'nkhomo zache kuzungulira thebulu yonsene. 
Exodus37:12 Iye adasasanya chigundiro chakukhala na mapembo, akulapha ninga chala chapakati cha m'manja, kuzungulira thebuluyo na kuikha mthimba wagolidi kuzungulira chigundirocho." 
Exodus37:13 Iye adasasanya mphete zinayi zakuthukulira zagolidi mbaziikha kunkhomo zinayi kumiyendo. 
Exodus37:14 Mphete zakuphatisa miti yakuthukulira thebuluyo zidaikhwa chifupi na chigundiro cha mapembocho. 
Exodus37:15 Iye adasasanya miti yakuithukulira yakesha, mbaikukutiza na golidi." 
Exodus37:16 Iye adasasanya pyombo pya thebuluyo na golidi chadi-chadi: mapalato na piwaya pyakufukizira pyakununkhira, pontho pitomba na ndilo pyakuphatisira basa kupereka nsembe ya chakumwa." 
Exodus37:17 Iye adasasanya chakuikhirapo nyale chagolidi chadi-chadi, thako na manungo ache pidachitwa kufulwa na nyundo; maluwache akuthemesera nawo, kuthimizapo mphukira na maluwa kusasanya phindi ibodzi ene na chakuikhirapo nyale."
