Exodus37:18 Nthambi zitanthatu zidaphutchukira khundu zache, nthambi zitatu kukhundu ibodzi, nthambi zinango zitatu kukhundu inangoyo." 
Exodus37:19 Nthambi zonsene zitanthatu zikhali na maluwa matatu akuthemesera akuoneka ninga maluwa a muti wamfula akukhala na mphukira na maluwa. 
Exodus37:20 Manungo a chakuikhirapo nyale akhali na maluwa akuthemesera manayi akuoneka ninga maluwa a muti wamfula akukhala na mphukira na maluwa. 
Exodus37:21 Pakhali mphukira ibodzi pansi pa nthambi ziwiri zonsene. 
Exodus37:22 Mphukirazo, nthambi zache, pontho chakuikhirapo nyale pikhali phindi ibodzi pyagolidi chadi-chadi wakuchitwa kufulwa." 
Exodus37:23 Iye adasasanya nyale zinomwe pachakuikhirapo nyale chibodzi, pontho na chakukwizira tsakalache na pyakuwolera dotha pyache pyagolidi chadi-chadi." 
Exodus37:24 Iye adaphatisa basa golidi chadi-chadi wakulemera makilogramu makumatatu na mashanu kusasanyira chakuikhirapo nyalecho na pinthu pyache pyonsene. 
Exodus37:25 Iye adasasanya guwa na matabwa akesha yakufukizirapo pyakununkhira. Nkhomo zache zonsene zikhali sasawa, ulaphiache ukhali kati ya khono, umimbache kati ya khono, pontho chengo chache chikhali khono ibodzi. Nyanga zache nkhomo zinayi zathema kukhala phindi ibodzi na guwayo." 
Exodus37:26 Iye adakukutiza padzulu pache, makhundu ache onsene manayi, na nyanga zache zene na golidi chadi-chadi, pontho adaikha chigundiro chagolidi m'nkhomo zache zinayi kuzungulira." 
Exodus37:27 Iye adasasanya mphete zakuthukulira ziwiri zagolidi mbaziphatisa pansi pa chigundiro kumakhundu mawiri kuphatisa miti yakuthukulira guwayo. 
Exodus37:28 Iye adasasanya miti yakuthukulira yakesha mbaikukutiza na golidi. 
Exodus37:29 Iye adasasanya pontho mafuta akupambulika akudzoza nawo, pontho na pyakununkhira pyakufukiza pyakusasanywa na nyaluso pakuvungaza pyakununkhira." 
Exodus38:1 Iye adasasanya guwa yakuperekerapo nsembe zakupyerera na matabwa akesha. Nkhomo zache zikhali zonsene sasawa, ulaphiache ukhali makhono mawiri na kati ya khono, umimbache ukhali makhono mawiri na kati ya khono, pontho chengo chache chikhali khono ibodzi na kati ya khono." 
Exodus38:2 Iye adasasanya nyanga padzulu pa nkhomo zinayi, towera pyonsene na guwayo pikhali phindi ibodzi ene. Iye adapikukutiza na nkuwa pyonsenepyo." 
Exodus38:3 Iye adasasanya pinthu pya paguwa: supulia akugweramo dotha, mafosholo, ndilo, pyakujobolera nyama na chiwaya chakugasirapo moto. Pinthu pyonsenepi pidasasanywa na nkuwa." 
Exodus38:4 Iye adasasanya waya wa mangalade wankuwa mbaaikha pansi magulupiya a paguwayo, towera abwerere pakati m'bwalo mwa guwayo." 
Exodus38:5 Iye adasasanya mphete zinayi zakuthukulira mbaziikha m'nkhomo zache. 
Exodus38:6 Iye adasasanya miti yakuithukulira yakesha mbaikukutiza na nkuwa," 
Exodus38:7 pontho adaikha m'mphete kukhundu ziwiri zonsene za guwa. Guwayo idasasanywa na matabwa mbikhala na benga m'bwalo mwache. 
Exodus38:8 Iye adasasanya mphale yakukhala na thako yankuwa, kubulukira kugilazi yankuwa yakuperekwa na akazi, ale akhaphata basa pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu." 
Exodus38:9 Iye adasasanya mpanda wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu na chinguwo chakufewa. Kukhundu yakumwera chinguwocho chikhali ulaphiache makhono makumanayi na anayi," 
Exodus38:10 chakuphatiswa na mizati makumawiri ankuwa m'mathako makumawiri ankuwa, akukhala na ngoloweko pontho na mitandaliko pyasiliva." 
Exodus38:11 Pyontho-pyonthopyo pidachitwa kukhundu yakumpoto ya mpandawo. 
Exodus38:12 Kukhundu yakumadokero dzuwa chinguwo chikhali ulaphiache makhono makumawiri na mawiri, chakukhala na mizati khumi, pontho na mathako khumi, na ngoloweko pontho na mitandaliko yasiliva." 
Exodus38:13 Kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa, kuna msuwo kule, mpandawo ukhali ulaphiache makhono makumawiri na mawiri." 
Exodus38:14 Kukhundu yonsene ya msuwo kukhali ulaphiache makhono matanthatu na kati ya khono a chinguwo, akukhala na mizati mitatu, pontho na mathako matatu." 
Exodus38:15  
Exodus38:16 Chinguwo chonsene chakuzungulira mpandawo chidasasanywa na nguwo yakufewa. 
Exodus38:17 Mathako a mizati yonsene adasasanywa na nkuwa, pontho ngoloweko na mitandaliko, na chapadzulu cha mizati pidasasanywa na siliva. Mizati yonsene yakuzungulira padzulu idaphatanizwa na mitandaliko yasiliva." 
Exodus38:18 Chinguwo cha pamsuwo wa mpanda chikhali chakusasanywa na nguwo yakufewa ya usalu wa choza, msuzi wanyemba na wakufira chakuthemesera mwadidi. Icho chikhali ulaphiache makhono mafemba, chengo chache makhono mawiri ninga chinguwo cha mpanda." 
Exodus38:19 Icho chidaphatiswa na mizati minayi m'mathako manayi ankuwa. Ngoloweko zawo, pya padzulu na mitandaliko yawo pidasasanywa na siliva." 
Exodus38:20 Ntchiri zonsene zakuphatisa nkhambala za Chikhumbi na mpandache ene pidasasanywa na nkuwa. 
Exodus38:21 Ufu ndi nyandandanda wa utale wakuphatiswa basa m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, mule mukhakoyiwa pyakulemberapo piwiri pyamiyala pale pakhadalembwa Matongero Khumi. Nyandandanda udatongwa na Mose mbulembwa na anthu a dzinza ya Levi, ale adaphata basa mwakuyang'anirwa na Itamara, mwana Aroni nyansembe." 
Exodus38:22 Bezalele, mwana Uri, pontho mdzukuluache Huri, wa dzinza ya Yuda adasasanya pyonsene pikhatonga MBUYA pile." 
Exodus38:23 Nyakumphedzerache, Oholiabu, mwana Ahisamaki, wa dzinza ya Dani, akhali nyakulemba ninga nyakulemba chidindo nyakutanda makhaliro a chinthu, pontho nyakuluka nguwo zakufewa zachoza, msuzi wanyemba na zakufira." 
Exodus38:24 Golidi onsene, ule akhadaperekwa kuna MBUYA kuphatisirwa basa pa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, kulemera kwache kudakwana makilogramu chikwi malingana na mdida ukhaphatiswa basa ndzidzi wenewo." 
Exodus38:25 Siliva kubulukira kuna anthu, adalembwa ale, adalemera makilogramu pikwi pitatu na madzana manayi na makumatatu, malingana na mdida wa ndzidzi wenewo." 
Exodus38:26 Penepi pidandendemera na pyonsene pidapagalwi na munthu onsene pandzidzi wa kulembera, munthu onsene kupagali pikhafunikapyo, malingana na mdida wa ndzidzi wenewo. Penepo pakhali amuna pikwi pitanthatu na pitatu na madzana ashanu na makumashanu akukwanisa pyaka makumawiri pyakubalwa penu kupiringana penepo adalembwa ale." 
Exodus38:27 Kulemera kwa siliva kukhali makilogramu pikwi pitatu na madzana manayi adaphatisirwa basa kusasanyira mathako dzana a Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, pontho na nguwo, kulemera kwache kukhali makilogramu makumatatu na anayi pa thako ibodzi." 
Exodus38:28 Na kulemera makilogramu makumatatu kwakusalira kwa siliva, Bezalele adasasanya mitandaliko, ngoloweko za pamizati na pya padzulu pawo." 
Exodus38:29 Nkuwa wakuperekwa kuna MBUYA udalemera makilogramu pikwi piwiri na madzana manayi na makumawiri na ashanu. 
Exodus38:30 Na nkuwa iye adasasanya mathako a pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, guwa yankuwa yakukhala na mangalade ankuwa, pinthu pyonsene pya guwa yansembe," 
Exodus38:31 mathako akuzungulira mpanda na a msuwo pampanda, pontho ntchiri zonsene zakuphatisa nkhambala zakuzungulira mpanda onsene." 
Exodus39:1 Na usalu wachoza, msuzi wanyemba na wakufira iwo adasasanya nguwo zakukoma m'maso, zile zidathema kuvala anyansembe ndzidzi ukhaenda iwo kaphata basa m'Mbuto Yakuchena. Iwo adasasanyira Aroni nguwo za unyansembe, ninga mukhadatongera MBUYA kuna Mose." 
Exodus39:2 Iwo adasasanya efodi wa nguwo yakufewa; usalu wachoza, msuzi wanyemba na wakufira; pontho na usalu wagolidi." 
Exodus39:3 Iwo adakhoma maphaphi akutetepa agolidi mbaulenjalenja, towera piphatiswe basa panguwo zakufewa, pontho na usalu wachoza, msuzi wanyemba na wakufira." 
Exodus39:4 Iwo adasasanya nthambo ziwiri za m'mapewa za efodi mbazimangirira kukhundu zache, towera chileke kugwa." 
Exodus39:5 Bande yakufewa yakuchita kulukwa mwaluso idasasanywa na pinthu pyontho-pyonthopyo idaphatiswa kuefodi, towera bande na efodi pikhale phindi ibodzi ninga mukhadatongera MBUYA kuna Mose." 
Exodus39:6 Iwo adasasanya miyala miwiri ya onikisi mbaiikha m'pyakuikhiramo pyagolidi mbachilembapo ninga chidindo chakukhala na madzina a ana khumi na awiri achimuna a Yakobo. 
Exodus39:7 Iye adapiikha m'nthambo za m'mapewa za efodi kuimirira madzinza khumi na awiri a Israele, ninga montho mukhadatongera MBUYA kuna Mose." 
Exodus39:8 Iwo adasasanya chapagangafuwa pakuphatisa basa pinthu pyontho-pyonthopyo pya pa efodi, pontho chakuthemeserwa sasawa." 
Exodus39:9 Nkhomo zache zonsene zikhali sasawa, pontho chakufunywa kawiri. Ulaphiache ukhali dzanja ibodzi, pontho umimbache ukhalimbo dzanja ibodzi." 
Exodus39:10 Iwo adaikha miyala yakudula m'mizera minayi; mzera wakutoma adaikha rubi, topazi na garaneti;" 
Exodus39:11 mzera wachiwiri, emeradi, safire na daimondi;" 
Exodus39:12 mzera wachitatu, yasinti, agate na ametisiti;" 
Exodus39:13 pontho mzera wachinayi berili, onikisi na yasipere. Miyala yeneyi idaikhwa m'pyakuikhiramo pyagolidi pile." 
Exodus39:14 Mwala onsene mwa miyala khumi na awiriyi padalembwapo dzina ibodzi ya ana achimuna a Yakobo, kuimirira madzinza khumi na awiri a Israele." 
Exodus39:15 Pya chapagangafuwa iwo adasasanya njema zagolidi chadi-chadi zakupotwa ninga nkhambala. 
Exodus39:16 Iwo adasasanya mphete ziwiri zagolidi pontho na pyakuthemesera piwiri pyagolidi pyakuoneka ninga kaluwa mbaziphataniza kunkhomo za kudzulu za chapagangafuwa. 
Exodus39:17 Iwo adaikha kumphete ziwiri nkhambala ziwiri zagolidi zile 
Exodus39:18 mbaikha nkhambala ziwiri zinango kupyakuthemesera piwiri pyagolidi pile mbaziphataniza kutsogolo kwa nthambo za m'mapewa za efodi. 
Exodus39:19 Iwo adasasanya mphete ziwiri zagolidi mbaziphataniza kunkhomo zapansi kwa chapagangafuwa m'khundu-khundu m'bwalo chifupi na efodi. 
Exodus39:20 Iwo adasasanya mphete zinango ziwiri zagolidi mbaziikha kupansi kutsogolo kwa nthambo ziwiri za efodi chifupi na msono, pontho padzulu pa bande yakuchita kulukwa." 
Exodus39:21 Ninga montho mukhadatongera MBUYA kuna Mose, iwo adamangirira mphete za chapagangafuwa kumphete za efodi na nkhambala yachoza, towera chapagangafuwa chikhale padzulu pa bande, pontho kuti chikhonde lera." 
Exodus39:22 Mkhanjo ule umbakhala pansi pa efodi udasasanywa onsene na nguwo yachoza. 
Exodus39:23 Benga yakupitisira msolo idaikhwa chigundiro chakuchita kulukwa m'bwalo mwache kuti ileke ng'ambika. 
Exodus39:24 Kuzungulira pansi pa chikhwayeti cha mkhanjo adaikha mavulere akulukwa na nguwo yakufewa pontho na usalu wachoza, msuzi wanyemba na wakufira wakuoneka ninga ntheme, pontho pakati pa ntheme na ntheme pakhali belo yagolidi chadi-chadi kuzungulira chikhwayeti, ninga montho mukhadatongera MBUYA kuna Mose." 
Exodus39:25  
Exodus39:26  
Exodus39:27 Iwo adasasanyira Aroni na anache mayala," 
Exodus39:28 nduwira, akamdedzi, makapundu," 
Exodus39:29 pontho na mthimbalimba na nguwo yakufewa, pontho na usalu wachoza, msuzi wanyemba na wakufira wakuthemeserwa mwaluso, ninga montho mukhadatongera MBUYA kuna Mose." 
Exodus39:30 Iwo adasasanya chinthu chakuphaphathika chagolidi chadi-chadi kukhala chidzindikiro chakupambulika mbalemba ninga chidindo kuti, “Kupambulika kuna MBUYA.”" 
Exodus39:31 Iwo adachimangirira kutsogolo kwa nduwira na nkhambala yachoza, ninga montho mukhadatongera MBUYA kuna Mose." 
Exodus39:32 Basa yonsene pa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu idaphatika monsene mwene. Aisraele adasasanya pyonsene ninga montho mukhadatongera MBUYA kuna Mose. 
Exodus39:33 Iwo adadza na Chikhumbicho kuna Mose, pontho na pinthu pyache pyonsene: ngoloweko zache na matabwa, mitandaliko yache, mizati yache na mathako ache ene;" 
Exodus39:34 chinguwo chache chakuphimba nacho pansoyi cha nthembe za mabira amuna zakuikhwa tinta yakufira, chinguwo chakuphimba nacho cha nthembe zakufewa, pontho na chinguwo chakuphimba nacho chakunja;" 
Exodus39:35 Bokosi ya Chiverano, miti yache, mphamphache;" 
Exodus39:36 thebulu, na pyombo pyache pyonsene, pontho mkate wakuperekwa kuna MBUYA;" 
Exodus39:37 chakuikhirapo nyale chagolidi chadi-chadi, nyale zache, pinthu pyache pyonsene na mafuta a nyale;" 
Exodus39:38 guwa yansembe yagolidi; mafuta akudzoza nawo; pyakufukiza pyakununkhira; chinguwo chakutchinga nacho pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi; 
Exodus39:39 guwa yankuwa yakukhala na mangalade, miti yache yakuthukulira, na pinthu pyache pyonsene; mphale na thako yache;" 
Exodus39:40 chinguwo chakutchinga nacho mpanda; mizati yache na mathako ache; nguwo yakutchinga nayo pamsuwo wa mpanda na nkhambala zache; ntchiri zache; pinthu pyache pyonsene pya m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu; 
Exodus39:41 pontho nguwo zakukoma m'maso zathema kuvala anyansembe ndzidzi unaphata iwo basa m'Mbuto Yakuchena, zenezi nguwo zakupambulika za Aroni, nyansembe na anache achimuna." 
Exodus39:42 Aisraele adaphata basa yonsene ninga mudatongera MBUYA kuna Mose. 
Exodus39:43 Mose adayang'ana mwadidi pyonsene mbaona kuti iwo akhadasasanya pyonsenepyo ninga mukhadatongera MBUYA. Natenepo Mose adaatsanzayisa. 
Exodus40:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Exodus40:2 “Pansiku yakutoma ya mwezi wakutoma imisa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu. 
Exodus40:3 Uikhemo Bokosi ya Chiverano yakukhala na Matongero Khumi, pontho utchinge na chinguwo kutsogolo kwache." 
Exodus40:4 Ikhamo thebulu, pontho pathebulu uikhepo pyombo. Pontho uikhemo chakuikhirapo nyale, tenepo uikhe nyale padzulu pachepo." 
Exodus40:5 Ikhamo guwa yagolidi yakufukizirapo pyakununkhira kutsogolo kwa Bokosi ya Chiverano, pontho umanike chinguwo pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi." 
Exodus40:6 Ikha guwa yakuperekerapo nsembe zakupyerera kunkhope kwa Chikhumbi. 
Exodus40:7 Ikha mphale yankuwa pakati pa Chikhumbi na guwa yansembe mbuidzaze na madzi. 
Exodus40:8 Umange mpanda kuzungulira Chikhumbicho, pontho umanike chakutchinga nacho pamsuwo pache." 
Exodus40:9 “Tenepo pambula Chikhumbi na pinthu pyache pyonsene pakuidzoza na mafuta akupambulika, tenepo inakhala yakuchena." 
Exodus40:10 Kubuluka penepo pambula guwa yansembe na pinthu pyache pyonsene, natenepo inakhala yakuchena." 
Exodus40:11 Pambula mphale na thako yache ninga monthomo. 
Exodus40:12 “Idza na Aroni na anache achimuna pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, pontho uasambise na madzi." 
Exodus40:13 Vazika Aroni nguwo za unyansembe, mdzoze, pontho umpambule, towera akwanise kundiphatira basa ya unyansembe." 
Exodus40:14 Idza na anache, tenepo uavazike mayala." 
Exodus40:15 Tenepo uadzoze ninga montho mudadzozera iwe babawo, towera akwanise kundiphatira basa ya unyansembe. Kudzoza kweneku kunapambulira pidzukulu pyawo kuphata basa ya unyansembe mifendu yonsene inadzayo.”" 
Exodus40:16 Mose adachita pyonsene ninga montho mukhadatongera MBUYA. 
Exodus40:17 Tenepo pansiku yakutoma ya mwezi wakutoma wa chaka chachiwiri pidabuluka iwo m'dziko ya Iguputo, Chikhumbi cha Mulungu chidamangwa." 
Exodus40:18 Mose adaikha pansi mathako ache, adaimisa matabwa, adaikha mitandaliko ache mbaimisa mizati yache." 
Exodus40:19 Iye adafuthula chinguwo chakuphimba nacho Chikhumbi mbaikha chakuphimba nacho chakunja, ninga montho mukhadatongera MBUYA." 
Exodus40:20 Tenepo adakwata pyakulemberapo piwiri pyamiyala mbapiikha m'Bokosi ya Chiverano. Iye adaikha miti m'mphete za bokosiyo mbaikha mphampha padzulu pache. 
Exodus40:21 Tenepo adamanika chinguwo chakutchinga nacho bokosiyo m'Chikhumbi. Penepa iye adatchinga Bokosi ya Chiverano, ninga montho mukhadatongera MBUYA." 
Exodus40:22 Iye adaikha thebulu m'Chikhumbi kukhundu yakumpoto kunja kwa chinguwo," 
Exodus40:23 pontho adaikha pathebulu mkate wakuperekwa kuna MBUYA, ninga montho mukhadatongera MBUYA." 
Exodus40:24 Iye adaikha m'Chikhumbimo chakuikhirapo nyale kukhundu yakumwera kuyang'anisana na thebulu," 
Exodus40:25 tenepo adagasa nyale pamaso pa MBUYA, ninga montho mukhadatongera MBUYA." 
Exodus40:26 Iye adaikha guwa yagolidi m'Chikhumbimo, kutsogolo kwa chinguwo," 
Exodus40:27 mbafukizapo pyakununkhira, ninga montho mukhadatongera MBUYA." 
Exodus40:28 Iye adamanika chinguwo pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi," 
Exodus40:29 pontho kutsogolo kwa chinguwocho iye adaikha guwa yakuperekerapo nsembe zakupyerera mbaperekapo nsembe zakupyerera na nsembe za mapira ninga montho mukhadatongera MBUYA. 
Exodus40:30 Iye adaikha mphale pakati pa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu na guwa yansembe mbaidzaza na madzi. 
Exodus40:31 Mose, Aroni na anache adasamba manjawo mbatsuka manyalo awo penepo" 
Exodus40:32 ndzidzi onsene ukhapita iwo m'Chikhumbi penu kuguwa yansembe, ninga montho mukhadatongera MBUYA." 
Exodus40:33 Mose adamanga mpanda kuzungulira Chikhumbi na guwa yansembe mbaikha chinguwo chakutchinga nacho pamsuwo wa mpanda. Tenepo iye adamalisa basa yonsene. 
Exodus40:34 Tenepo makole adaphimba Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, pontho demelero ya MBUYA idadzala m'Chikhumbicho." 
Exodus40:35 Na thangwi yakuti makole adatchitha pa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, pontho kuti demelero ya MBUYA ikhadadzala m'Chikhumbimo, Mose hadakwanise tayu kupita m'Chikhumbi mule." 
Exodus40:36 Aisraele akhafulusa msasa kwenda mbuto inango ngakhala makole anathukuka kubuluka pa Chikhumbipo. 
Exodus40:37 Ndzidzi ukhakhala makole penepo, iwo hakhafulusa msasawo kamanga mbuto inango tayu." 
Exodus40:38 Ndzidzi onsene wa ulendo wawo, Aisraele onsene adakwanisa kuona makole akuonesa kuti MBUYA alipo padzulu pa Chikhumbi na masikati, pontho na moto wakugaka padzulu pache na mosiku." 
Leviticus1:1 MBUYA adachemera Mose kubulukira m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu mbampanga 
Leviticus1:2 kulonga kuna Aisraele kuti: Munthu onsene wa imwe angadza na chakupereka chache kuna MBUYA, chakuperekacho chathema kukhala nyama yakubulukira pa mkumbi wache wa ng'ombe, mabira penu mbuzi." 
Leviticus1:3 Ngakhala chakuperekacho ndi ng'ombe kuti ikhale nsembe yakupyerera, iye apereke ng'ombe imuna yakusowa chilema. Iye adze nayo pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu kuipereka, towera itawirwe na MBUYA." 
Leviticus1:4 Iye asanjike manjache pamsolo wa nyama inafuna perekwa nsembe yakupyererayo, tenepo nyama inatawirwa m'mbuto mwache kukhala nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa pyache." 
Leviticus1:5 Iye acheke mwanamphulu wamamuna pamaso pa MBUYA, kubuluka penepo, ana a Aroni, anyansembe ale, adze na chiropa cha nyama ile kuchiwazira m'makhundu onsene a guwa yansembe pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu." 
Leviticus1:6 Iye athema kuisuwa nyamayo na kuigwanda mapindi-mapindi. 
Leviticus1:7 Anyansembe athema kusanjika nkhuni mwadidi paguwapo mbaphatisa moto. 
Leviticus1:8 Iwo athema kusanjika mwadidi mapindi a nyama ale kuthimizapo msolo, pontho na mafutache ene pankhuni za moto zili paguwa yansembe ile." 
Leviticus1:9 Iye athema kutsuka na madzi pya m'mimba na miyendo yache ene ya m'nduli, kubuluka penepo nyansembe athema kuotcha nyama yonsene yamumphuyo paguwa. Yeneyo ndiye nsembe yakupyerera yakusasanywa na moto. Khwemache imbamkomera MBUYA." 
Leviticus1:10 Ngakhala chakuperekacho ndi bira, penu mbuzi kuti chikhale nsembe yakupyerera, iye athema kupereka imuna yakusowa chilema." 
Leviticus1:11 Iye athema kuichekera kukhundu yakumpoto kwa guwa yansembe pamaso pa MBUYA, kubuluka penepo ana a Aroni, anyansembe, athema kukwata chiropa cha nyamayo kuchiwazira m'makhundu onsene a guwayo." 
Leviticus1:12 Iye athema kuigwanda mapindi-mapindi, tenepo nyansembe athema kuisanjika mwadidi pabodzi pene na msolo ene, pontho mafutache, pankhuni za moto paguwa yansembeyo." 
Leviticus1:13 Iye athema kutsuka na madzi pya m'mimba pyonsene na miyendo ache ene ya m'nduli, kubuluka penepo, nyansembe athema kudza nayo nyama yonseneyo mbaipisa paguwa yansembe. Yeneyo ndiye nsembe yakupyerera yakusasanywa na moto. Khwemache imbamkomera MBUYA." 
Leviticus1:14 Ngakhala chakuperekacho ndi mbalame kuti ikhale nsembe yakupyerera, iye athema kupereka jiwa penu nkhangaiwa." 
Leviticus1:15 Nyansembe athema kudza nayo paguwa yansembe, aipotokole kubulusa msolo wache mbauotcha paguwapo; chiropa chache athema kuchichuchisira m'khundu-khundu mwa guwayo." 
Leviticus1:16 Iye athema kubulusa chidokhomiro na pya mwenemo mbapitaya kukhundu yakumachibese kwa guwayo, kule kuna dotha." 
Leviticus1:17 Iye athema kuing'amba pakati pa kuchita kukweya maphaphido, mbwenye mbikhonda khwadzuka, tenepo aipyereze paguwa yansembe. Yeneyo ndi nsembe yakupyerera yakusasanywa na moto. Khwemache imbamkomera MBUYA." 
Leviticus2:1 Munthu onsene angafuna kudza na chakupereka cha mapira kuna MBUYA, iye athema chakutoma kuchipeya, towera chikhale ufa. Iye athema kuikha mafuta aolivi na pyakufukiza pyakununkhira padzulu pachepo." 
Leviticus2:2 Kubuluka penepo adze napyo kuna ana a Aroni, anyansembe. Nyansembe anakwata kwene ufa pang'ono wakukwana m'manja na mafuta pang'ono pabodzi pene na pyakununkhirisa pyonsene mbapipisa paguwa ninga chidzindikiro kuti pyonsene pyaperekwa kuna MBUYA. Yeneyi ndi nsembe yakusasanywa na moto; khwemache imbamkomera MBUYA." 
Leviticus2:3 Pyakusalira pyonsene pya chakupereka cha mapira chile ntcha Aroni na anache achimuna; icho ntchakupambulika pyakwanga, thangwi chakwatwa kubulukira pa chakuperekwa kuna MBUYA chakusasanywa na moto." 
Leviticus2:4 Ngakhala chakuperekacho ntcha mkate wakuchita kuphikwa muuvuni, mkatewo wathema kukhala wakusowa chakufufumisira. Unakwanisa kukhala mkate wa ntchindu ikulu wakusasanywa na ufa wakuvungazwa na mafuta aolivi, penu pitumbuwa pyakusowa pyakufufumisira, pontho pakukhwazwa mafuta aolivi." 
Leviticus2:5 Ngakhala chakupereka cha mapira ntchakuchita kukazingwa m'chiwaya, chathema kusasanywa na ufa wakuvungazwa na mafuta aolivi, mbwenye wakusowa chakufufumisira." 
Leviticus2:6 Unyedze-nyedze na kukhuthulirapo mafuta; chenecho ndiye chakupereka cha mapira. 
Leviticus2:7 Ngakhala chakuperekacho chachita kuphikwa m'supulia, chathema kusasanywa na ufa, pontho na mafuta aolivi." 
Leviticus2:8 Idzani nacho ninga chakupereka kuna MBUYA mbuchipereke kuna nyansembe, ule anachikwata kwenda nacho paguwa yansembe." 
Leviticus2:9 Nyansembe anakwata khundu pang'ono ya chakuperekacho ninga chidzindikiro kuti pyonsene pyaperekwa kuna MBUYA, tenepo iye anachipyereza paguwa yansembe. Yeneyi ndi nsembe yakusasanywa na moto; khwemache imbamkomera MBUYA." 
Leviticus2:10 Pyakusalira pyonsene pya chakupereka cha mapira ntcha Aroni na anache; icho ntchakupambulika pyakwanga, thangwi chakwatwa kubulukira pa chakuperekwa kuna MBUYA chakusasanywa na moto." 
Leviticus2:11 Pyakupereka pyonsene pya mapira pyakuperekwa kuna MBUYA pileke khala na chakufufumisira; lekani phatisa basa chakufufumisira, penu uchi kupiikha muchakudya chakuperekwa kuna MBUYA chakusasanywa na moto." 
Leviticus2:12 Mwathema kudza na pyakutoma kutokota chaka na chaka mbamupisimisa kuna MBUYA, kwache mbapileke piswa paguwa yansembe ninga khwema yakukomera MBUYA." 
Leviticus2:13 Pa pyakupereka pyanu pyonsene pya mapira mwathema kupiikha munyu, thangwi munyu umbaimirira chiverano cha pakati pa imwe na Mulungu. Imwe mwathema kuikha munyu pa pyakupereka pyanu pyonsene." 
Leviticus2:14 Mungasimisa kuna MBUYA pyakutoma kutokota ipyo pyathema kukhala pyakuchita kupeya, penu piwisi pyakuchita kuotcha." 
Leviticus2:15 Thimizani mafuta aolivi na pyakufukiza pyakununkhira padzulu pachepo. 
Leviticus2:16 Nyansembe anapyereza paguwa khundu ya mapira awisi akupeya na mafuta enewo kuti ikhale ninga chidzindikiro kuti pyonsene pyaperekwa kuna iye, pontho na pyakufukiza pyakununkhirapyo pyonsene ninga nsembe yakusasanywa na moto yakuperekwa kuna MBUYA." 
Leviticus3:1 Munthu onsene angapereka ng'ombe kuti ikhale nsembe yachiphatizano, iyo yathema kukhala ng'ombe imuna penu ikazi yakusowa chilema." 
Leviticus3:2 Munthuyo athema kusanjika manjache pamsolo wa nyamayo mbaicheka pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu. Tenepo ana a Aroni, anyansembe, awazire chiropa m'makhundu onsene a guwayo," 
Leviticus3:3 pontho apereke mapindi anango kuna MBUYA ninga nsembe yakusasanywa na moto. Mapindiwo mbawa: mafuta onsene akukukutiza pya m'mimba," 
Leviticus3:4 nswikira na mafutache ene, na khundu yadidiletu ya fafa." 
Leviticus3:5 Anyansembe anapyereza pyonsenepi paguwa yansembe pabodzi pene na nsembe yakupyerera yakusasanywa na moto. Khwemache imbamkomera MBUYA. 
Leviticus3:6 Ngakhala bira penu mbuzi inaperekwa ninga nsembe yachiphatizano, inakwanisa kukhala ikazi, penu imuna, mbwenye ikhale yakusowa chilema." 
Leviticus3:7 Ngakhala munthu anapereka mwanabira, iye athema kumpereka pamaso pa MBUYA," 
Leviticus3:8 iye asanjike manjache pamsolo wa nyamayo mbaicheka kunkhope kwa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu. Anyansembe awazire chiropa cha nyamayo m'makhundu onsene a guwa yansembe," 
Leviticus3:9 pontho apereke mapindi anango kuna MBUYA ninga nsembe yakusasanywa na moto. Mapindiwo mbawa: mafutache, mafuta onsene akumchira kwache achifupi na golokolo, mafuta onsene akukukutiza pya m'mimba," 
Leviticus3:10 nswikira na mafutache ene pontho na khundu yadidiletu ya fafa. 
Leviticus3:11 Nyansembe apyereze pyonsenepyo ninga nsembe yakusasanywa na moto yakuperekwa kuna MBUYA. 
Leviticus3:12 Ngakhala munthu anapereka mbuzi, iye athema kuipereka pamaso pa MBUYA." 
Leviticus3:13 Iye athema kusanjika manjache pamsolo wa nyamayo mbaichekera kunkhope kwa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu. Anyansembe awazire chiropacho m'makhundu onsene a guwayo," 
Leviticus3:14 na kupereka kuna MBUYA mapindi awa ninga nsembe yakusasanywa na moto: mafuta onsene akukukutiza pya m'mimba," 
Leviticus3:15 nswikira na mafutache ene, pontho na khundu yadidiletu ya fafa." 
Leviticus3:16 Nyansembe anapipyereza pyonsenepi paguwa ninga nsembe yakusasanywa na moto. Khwemache imbamkomera MBUYA. Mafuta onsene nga MBUYA. 
Leviticus3:17 Munthu onsene wa dzinza ya Israele athema nee kudya mafuta penu chiropa tayu; kuna anthu onsene a dzinza ya Israele wenewu ukhali mwambo wawo kuti aukoye kwenda na kwenda konsene kunakhala iwo. 
Leviticus4:1 MBUYA adapanga Mose 
Leviticus4:2 kulonga kuna Aisraele kuti munthu onsene anadawa na kuswa matongero a MBUYA mwasusudewuyo athema kuteweza matongero awa: 
Leviticus4:3 Ngakhala adawa ndi Nyansembe Wamkulu kudzesa kudawa pakati pa anthu, iye athema kupereka nsembe mwanamphulu wamamuna wakusowa chilema kuna MBUYA, thangwi ya kudawa kwache." 
Leviticus4:4 Iye athema kudza na ng'ombeyo kumsuwo kwa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, asanjike manjache pamsolo wa nyamayo na kuicheka penepo pamaso pa MBUYA." 
Leviticus4:5 Kubuluka penepo Nyansembe Wamkulu akwate chiropa pang'ono cha ng'ombe imuna kwenda nacho m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu. 
Leviticus4:6 Iye athema kuvika chala chache m'chiropamo mbawazira chiropacho kanomwe kunkhope kwa chinguwo chakutchinga nacho Mbuto Yakuchenesesa. 
Leviticus4:7 Kubuluka penepo akwate chiropa pang'ono mbachitswinga panyanga za guwa yakufukizirapo pyakununkhira ile ili m'Chikhumbimo. Iye athema kukwata chiropa chakusaliracho mbakachikhuthulira pansi pa guwa yakuperekapo nsembe zakupyerera, ile ili pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi chile." 
Leviticus4:8 Iye abuluse mafuta onsene a nyama yakulekerera nayo pyakudawa kutomera mafuta a pya m'mimba," 
Leviticus4:9 nswikira na mafutache ene na khundu yadidiletu ya fafa. 
Leviticus4:10 Nyansembe akwate mafutawa mbaapyereza paguwa yansembe zakupyerera ninga mumbachitira iye na mafuta a nyama yakuperekwa nsembe yachiphatizano. 
Leviticus4:11 Mbwenye iye akwate nthembe, nyama, msolo, miyendo, matumbo na pinango pyonsene pya m'mimba." 
Leviticus4:12 Kwenda napyo kunja kwa msasa kumbuto yakuchena pamaso pa Mulungu kule kumbatayirwa dotha. Kweneko iye anakapipisa pamoto wa nkhuni. 
Leviticus4:13 Ngakhala ndi dzinza yonsene ya Israele yadawa mwasusudewu pakuswa matongero abodzi a MBUYA mbapikhonda dziwika," 
Leviticus4:14 tenepo sindzidzi kudawa kule nkhudziwika, dzinza yonsene yathema kudza na mwanamphulu wamamuna kukhala nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa. Iwo adze nayo ku Chikhumbi cha Mulungu;" 
Leviticus4:15 akadamu a Aisraele asanjike manjawo pamsolo wa mwanamphuluyo mbamcheka pamaso pa MBUYA. 
Leviticus4:16 Nyansembe Wamkulu athema kukwata chiropa pang'ono cha ng'ombe ile kwenda nacho m'Chikhumbi mule," 
Leviticus4:17 avike chala chache m'chiropamo mbachiwaza kanomwe pamaso pa MBUYA kunkhope kwa chinguwo chakutchinga nacho Mbuto Yakuchena. 
Leviticus4:18 Iye atswinge pontho chiropa pang'ono panyanga zakukhala m'nkhomo mwa guwa yakufukizirapo pyakununkhira m'bwalo mwa Chikhumbicho. Pontho chiropa chakusalira chonsene achikhuthulire pansi pa guwa yakuperekapo nsembe zakupyerera, ile ili pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu." 
Leviticus4:19 Kubuluka penepo akwate mafuta onsene a nyama ile mbaapisa paguwa yansembe. 
Leviticus4:20 Iye athema kuchita chibodzi-bodzi na ng'ombe yeneyi ninga mumbachitira iye na ng'ombe yakuperekwa nsembe kulekerera pyakudawa, pontho na njira yeneyi iye anasasanya nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa pya anthu, tenepo anthuwo analekererwa pyakudawa pyawo." 
Leviticus4:21 Kubuluka penepo iye akwate nyama ile mbaenda nayo kunja kwa msasa mbakaipisa ninga mumbapisira iye ng'ombe yakuperekwa thangwi ya kudawa kwache. Yeneyi ndi nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa pya dzinza yonsene. 
Leviticus4:22 Ngakhala anadawa ndi mkadamu pakuswa matongero abodzi a MBUYA mwasusudewu," 
Leviticus4:23 sindzidzi kudawa kule nkhudziwika, iye athema kudza na mbuzi imuna yakusowa chilema kukhala nsembe." 
Leviticus4:24 Iye athema kusanjika manjache pamsolo wa mbuziyo mbaicheka kukhundu yakumpoto kwa guwa, kumbachikerwa nsembe zakupyerera kule. Yeneyi ndi nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa." 
Leviticus4:25 Nyansembe avike chala chache m'chiropa cha nyamayo mbachitswinga panyanga zankhomo za guwa yakuperekapo nsembe zakupyerera na kukhuthulira chiropa chonsene chakusaliracho pansi pa guwa yansembe. 
Leviticus4:26 Kubuluka penepo iye apyereze mafuta onsene paguwapo ninga mumbapyerezera iye mafuta a nyama zakupherwa nsembe yachiphatizano. Na njira yeneyi nyansembe anapereka nsembe thangwi ya kudawa kwa mkadamuyo, tenepo iye analekererwa." 
Leviticus4:27 Ngakhala anadawa ndi mbodzi wa anthu ene pyawo pakuswa matongero abodzi a MBUYA mwasusudewu," 
Leviticus4:28 sindzidzi kudawako nkhudziwika, iye athema kudza na mbuzi ikazi yakusowa chilema kukhala nsembe thangwi ya kudawa kwache." 
Leviticus4:29 Iye athema kuikha manjache pamsolo wa mbuziyo mbaicheka kukhundu yakumpoto kwa guwayo, kumbachekerwa nsembe zakupyerera kule." 
Leviticus4:30 Nyansembe athema kuvika chala chache m'chiropa cha nyama ile mbachitswinga panyanga zankhomo za guwa yansembe mbakhuthulira chiropa chonsene chakusaliracho pansi pa guwayo. 
Leviticus4:31 Kubuluka penepo iye abuluse mafuta onsene ninga mumbachitira iye na nyama zonsene zakupherwa nsembe yachiphatizano, tenepo iye athema kuipyereza paguwa, towera khwemache ikomere MBUYA. Na njira yeneyi nyansembe anapereka nsembe thangwi ya kudawa kwa munthu, tenepo iye analekererwa." 
Leviticus4:32 Ngakhala munthu anadza na bira kuti akhale nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa, birayo athema kukhala wamkazi wakusowa chilema." 
Leviticus4:33 Iye athema kusanjika manjache pamsolo wa birayo mbamcheka kukhundu yakumpoto kwa guwa, kumbachekerwa nsembe zakupyerera kule." 
Leviticus4:34 Nyansembe athema kuvika chala chache m'chiropa cha nyamayo mbachitswinga panyanga zankhomo za guwa mbakhuthulira pansi pa guwa chiropa chonsene chakusaliracho. 
Leviticus4:35 Kubuluka penepo iye athema kubulusa mafuta onsene a nyamayo ninga mumbabulusirwa mafuta a bira wakupherwa kukhala nsembe yachiphatizano, tenepo iye athema kuipyereza paguwa pabodzi pene na pyakupereka pya mapira pyakuperekwa kuna MBUYA. Na njira yeneyi nyansembeyo anapereka nsembe thangwi ya kudawa kwa munthu, tenepo munthuyo analekererwa." 
Leviticus5:1 Nsembe zakulekerera pyakudawa zimbafunwa pamiseru ninga ishi: Ngakhala munthu achemerwa na nyakutonga kuthando ya miseru kuti akapereke umboni, mbwenye mbakhonda longa pya pinthu pidaona iye, penu kupiva, munthu weneyo athema kuoneswa nyatwa." 
Leviticus5:2 Ngakhala munthu anakhuya mwasusudewu chinthu chokhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu ninga nyama yakufa yokha, weneyo ngokhonda chena, pontho ngwakudawa sindzidzi iye nkhudzindikira pyachita iyepyo." 
Leviticus5:3 Ngakhala munthu anaphata mwasusudewu chinthu chonsene chakukhonda chena cha munthu, penu ntchinthu chanji, iye ngwakudawa sindzidzi nkhudzindikira pyachita iyepyo." 
Leviticus5:4 Ngakhala munthu anadumbira kwene pyache mwamsobwe, penu chikhale chadidi penu chakuipa, iye ngwakudawa sindzidzi iye nkhudzindikira pyachita iyepyo." 
Leviticus5:5 Munthu angadawa athema kubweka pyakudawa pyache," 
Leviticus5:6 tenepo kuti apagali pyakudawa pyachepyo, iye athema kudza na bira wamkazi, pontho mbuzi kuna MBUYA kukhala nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa. Nyansembe athema kupereka nsembe ile, thangwi ya kudawa kwa munthuyo." 
Leviticus5:7 Ngakhala munthuyo ndi mtcherengi mwakuti hanakwanisa tayu kugumana bira, penu mbuzi, iye athema kudza na majiwa mawiri, penu nkhangaiwa ziwiri dzapereka kuna MBUYA kupagali kudawa kwacheko. Mbalame ibodziyo inaperekwa ninga nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa, inangomboyo inaperekwa ninga nsembe yakupyerera." 
Leviticus5:8 Iye athema kudza nazo kuna nyansembe, ule chakutoma anapereka ibodzi ninga nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa. Iye anapotokola khosi ya mbalameyo, kwache aleke kuigwanda msolo." 
Leviticus5:9 Pontho anawazira chiropa chache pang'ono m'khundu mwa guwa. Chiropa chonsene chakusalira chinakhuthulirwa pansi pa guwa yansembe. Yeneyi ndi nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa. 
Leviticus5:10 Kubuluka penepo iye athema kupereka mbalame yachiwiri ile ninga nsembe yakupyerera malingana na mwambo wache. Na njira yeneyi nyansembe anapereka nsembe thangwi ya kudawa kwa munthu, tenepo munthuyo analekererwa." 
Leviticus5:11 Ngakhala munthu ndi mtcherengi mwakuti hanakwanisa kugumana majiwa mawiri, penu nkhangaiwa ziwiri tayu, iye athema kudza na ufa wakulemera kilogramu ibodzi dzapereka kuna MBUYA ninga nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa. Iye aleke kuikhamo mafuta aolivi, penu pyakununkhira, thangwi ndi nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa, nee kuti ndi chakupereka cha mapira tayu." 
Leviticus5:12 Iye athema kudza napyo kuna nyansembe, ule anautapa kwene wakudzala m'manja ninga chidzindikiro kuti pyonsene pyaperekwa kuna MBUYA, tenepo iye anapipisa paguwa padzulu pa nsembe zakusasanywa na moto. Yeneyi ndi nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa." 
Leviticus5:13 Na njira yeneyi nyansembe anapereka nsembe thangwi ya kudawa kwa munthu, tenepo iye analekererwa. Ufa onsene wakusalira ukhale wa nyansembe ninga mumbachitirwa chakupereka cha mapira." 
Leviticus5:14 MBUYA adathimiza kulonga kuna Mose: 
Leviticus5:15 Ngakhala munthu anadawa mwasusudewu pakukhonda pereka pinthu pyakupambulika pya MBUYA, iye athema kudza na bira wamkazi penu mbuzi yakusowa chilema ninga nsembe yakupagali MBUYA. Kontache yathema kukhala yakuthemerana na mdida ukhaphatiswa basa ndzidzi wenewo." 
Leviticus5:16 Iye athema kupagali pinthu pidachimwana iye kupereka pontho apagali chachishanu cha kontache chakuthimizirapo. Iye athema kupereka kuna nyansembe, nyansembembo anapereka nyama ile ninga nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa pya munthu, tenepo munthuyo analekererwa." 
Leviticus5:17 Ngakhala munthu adawa mwasusudewu pakuswa matongero abodzi a MBUYA, iye ngwakudawa, pontho athema kupagali kudawa kwacheko." 
Leviticus5:18 Iye athema kudza na bira wamamuna penu mbuzi yakusowa chilema kuna nyansembe ninga nsembe yakupagalira pyakudawa. Kontache yathema kukhala yakuthemerana na mdida ukhaphatiswa basa ndzidzi wenewo. Nyansembe athema kupereka nsembe ile thangwi ya kudawa mwasusudewu kwa munthuyo, tenepo iye analekererwa." 
Leviticus5:19 Yeneyi ndi nsembe yakupagalira pyakudawa pidachita munthu kuna MBUYA. 
Leviticus6:1 MBUYA adathimiza kulonga kuna Mose: 
Leviticus6:2 Munthu athema kupagali ngakhala anadawira MBUYA pakukhonda kubwezera chinthu chidampinyolesa Muisraele mnzache, penu pakumbera chinthu mwanzache, penu pakumnyengeza," 
Leviticus6:3 penu pakumnamiza pya chinthu chakutayika kudumbira kuti iye hadachilokote tayu. 
Leviticus6:4 Ngakhala munthu adawa munjira zenezi, iye apagali chinthu chidakwata iye mwakukhonda kuona mtima chile. Pansiku inagumanwa iye kuti adawa, iye ampagali mwenechiro ule chinthu chonsene chidakwata iyecho, pontho na chachishanu cha kontache chakuthimizirapo." 
Leviticus6:5  
Leviticus6:6 Iye athema kudza na bira wamamuna penu mbuzi wakusowa chilema kuna nyansembe ninga nsembe yakupagalira kudawa kwache kuna MBUYA. Kontache yathema kukhala yakuthemerana na mdida ukhaphatiswa basa ndzidzi wenewo. 
Leviticus6:7 Nyansembe athema kupereka nsembe thangwi ya kudawa kwa munthu, tenepo munthuyo analekererwa." 
Leviticus6:8 MBUYA adatonga Mose 
Leviticus6:9 kupanga Aroni na anache pya mwambo wa nsembe zakupyerera. Mwambo wache ngufu: Nsembe zakupyerera zathema kusiyiwa paguwa yansembe mosiku onsene. 
Leviticus6:10 Tenepo nyansembe athema kubulusa dotha paguwapo mbaiikha m'khundu mwa guwayo uku avala mkhanjo na kapundu wache. 
Leviticus6:11 Kubuluka penepo iye athema kudula nguwo zachezo kuvala zinango, pontho athukule dotha ile kwenda nayo kunja kwa msasa kumbuto yakuchena pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Leviticus6:12 Moto wa paguwapo wathema kuthimiza kugaka basi mbuleke thimiswa. Na machibese onsene nyansembe athema kuikha nkhuni paguwapo, kusanjika mwadidi nsembe yakupyerera ile, na kuotcha mafuta a nsembe yachiphatizano ile." 
Leviticus6:13 Ndzidzi onsene moto wathema kuthimiza kugaka basi paguwa yansembeyo, pontho mbuleke kuthimiswa." 
Leviticus6:14 Ufu ndi mwambo wa pyakupereka pya mapira. Ana a Aroni anyansembe athema kudza na chakupereka cha mapira kuna MBUYA kutsogolo kwa guwayo. 
Leviticus6:15 Kubuluka penepo athema kukwata ufa wakudzala m'manja, mafuta pang'ono, na pyakufukiza pyakununkhira pyache mwenemo. Angamala penepo apiotche paguwa yansembe ninga chidzindikiro kuti pyonsene pyaperekwa kuna MBUYA. Khwemache imbamkomera MBUYA." 
Leviticus6:16 Anyansembe athema kudya pyonsene pyakusalirapyo. Ipyo pyathema kuphikwa ninga mkate wakusowa chakufufumisira, pontho pyathema kudyerwa m'mbuto yakupambulika, muchintalo cha Chikhumbi cha Mulungu. MBUYA apipereka kuna anyansembe ninga khundu yawo ya nsembe yakusasanywa na moto. Mphyakuchena pyakwanga ninga nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa na nsembe yakupagalira pyakudawa." 
Leviticus6:17  
Leviticus6:18 Mifendu yonsene inadzayo pidzukulu pyonsene pyachimuna pya Aroni anadya penepi ninga khundu yawo ya nsembe zakusasanywa na moto zakuperekwa kuna MBUYA. Munthu unango onsene anakhuya chakupereka chakusasanywa na moto anavungwa na mphamvu za kuchena kwache. 
Leviticus6:19 MBUYA adathimiza kulonga kuna Mose. 
Leviticus6:20 Pansiku inadzozwa Aroni na anache achimuna kukhala anyansembe, athema kupereka pyakupereka pya ufa kuna MBUYA wakukwana kilogramu ibodzi (mdida onthowo wa nsiku na nsiku wa pyakupereka pya mapira), augawe pakati na kati; khundu inango na machibese, khundu inangoyo na mawulo." 
Leviticus6:21 Pyathema kuvungazwa na mafuta akuphikira mbapikazingwa m'chiwaya. Kubuluka penepo athema kunyedza-nyedza na kuupereka ninga chakupereka cha mapira. Khwemache imbamkomera MBUYA. 
Leviticus6:22 Mifendu yonsene inadzayo nsembe yeneyi yathema dzasasanywa na chidzukulu chonsene cha Aroni, anatumikira ninga Nyansembe Wamkulu ule. Yeneyi yathema kupyerezwa monsene mwene ninga nsembe yakuperekwa kuna MBUYA." 
Leviticus6:23 Nkhabe khundu ya chakupereka cha mapira chakuperekwa na nyansembe yathema kudyiwa tayu; yonsene yathema kupiswa. 
Leviticus6:24 MBUYA adatonga Mose 
Leviticus6:25 kupanga Aroni na anache pya mwambo wa nsembe zakulekerera pyakudawa. Nyama yakuperekwa kubulusira napyo pyakudawa yathema kuchekerwa kukhundu yakumpoto kwa guwa, kumbachekerwa nyama za nsembe yakupyerera kule. Nsembe zenezi nsakuchena pyakwanga." 
Leviticus6:26 Nyansembe anapereka nsembe nyamayo athema kuidyera m'mbuto yakupambulika, muchintalo cha Chikhumbi cha Mulungu." 
Leviticus6:27 Munthu penu chinthu, angakhuya kwene nyama yeneyi anavungwa na mphamvu za kuchena kwache. Ngakhala nguwo penu chinthu cha panguwo panu chadoderwa na chiropa cha nyama, nguwoyo yathema kufulirwa m'mbuto yakupambulika." 
Leviticus6:28 Chikalango chinaphikirwa nyama yeneyi chathema kuswiwa, pontho ngakhala aphatiswa basa ndi supulia athema kukwechiwa mwadidi na kutsukwa na madzi." 
Leviticus6:29 Mamuna onsene wa m'banja ya unyansembe anakwanisa kudya nyama yeneyi; njakuchena pyakwanga. 
Leviticus6:30 Mbwenye ngakhala chiropa cha nyama yakubulusira nayo pyakudawa chadzeswa m'Chikhumbi mbachikhala nsembe yakubulusira nayo pyakudawa m'Mbuto Yakuchena, yeneyi nee yathema kudyiwa tayu, yonsene ipiswe." 
Leviticus7:1 Ufu ndi mwambo wa nsembe zakupagalira pyakudawa; zile nsakuchena pyakwanga. 
Leviticus7:2 Nyama yakuperekwa kupagalira pyakudawa yathema kuchekerwa kukhundu yakumpoto kwa guwa, kumbachekerwa nyama zakuperekwa nsembe yakupyerera kule. Chiropa chache chathema kuwazirwa m'makhundu onsene a guwayo." 
Leviticus7:3 Mafutache onsene athema kubuluswa na kuperekwa paguwa yansembe: mafuta a kumchira, mafuta a pya m'mimba," 
Leviticus7:4 nswikira na mafutache ene, pontho na khundu yadidiletu ya fafa." 
Leviticus7:5 Nyansembe athema kuotcha mafuta onsene paguwa ninga nsembe yakusasanywa na moto kuna MBUYA. Yeneyi ndi nsembe yakupagalira pyakudawa. 
Leviticus7:6 Mamuna onsene wa m'banja ya unyansembe anakwanisa kuidya, kwache yathema kudyerwa m'mbuto yakupambulika thangwi njakuchenesesa." 
Leviticus7:7 Mwambo ontho-onthowo umbalonga pya nsembe zakulekerera pyakudawa na nsembe zakupagalira pyakudawa: Nyamayo imbakhala ya nyansembe anapereka nsembeyo. 
Leviticus7:8 Nthembe ya nyama yakuperekwa ninga nsembe yakupyerera nja nyansembe anapereka nsembeyo. 
Leviticus7:9 Chakupereka cha mapira chonsene chakuphikirwa muuvuni, m'mphendekali, penu m'chiwaya, chenecho ntcha nyansembe anachipereka kuna Mulungu ule." 
Leviticus7:10 Mbwenye chakupereka chonsene cha mapira, penu chavungazwa kale na mafuta, penu njakuuma, penepyo mphya ana onsene a Aroni nyansembe, pontho athema kupigawana sasawa." 
Leviticus7:11 Ufu ndi mwambo wa nsembe zachiphatizano zinakwanisa munthu kupereka kuna MBUYA: 
Leviticus7:12 Ngakhala munthu anapereka nsembe yachiphatizano ninga nsembe yakupereka takhuta kuna Mulungu, iye athema kupereka pabodzi pene na nyama yakuperekwa nsembe, chakupereka cha mkate wakusowa chakufufumisira: penu mkate wakukhala na ntchindu ikulu wakusasanywa na ufa wakuvungazwa na mafuta aolivi, penu pitumbuwa pyakukhwazwa mafuta aolivi, penu mikate yakutapira pyakwanga yakusasanywa na ufa wadidiletu wakumunywa mwadidi na mafuta aolivi." 
Leviticus7:13 Kuthimizira pa nsembe yache yachiphatizano, iye athema kupereka mikate yakukhala na chakufufumisira." 
Leviticus7:14 Iye athema kupereka khundu ibodzi ya mtundu onsene wa mikate ninga chakupereka chakupambulika kuna MBUYA. Nsembe yeneyo nja nyansembe, ule anakwata chiropa cha nyama mbachiwazira kuguwa yansembe." 
Leviticus7:15 Nyama yakuperekwa nsembe yathema kudyiwa nsiku yontho inaperekwa iyo, pontho ileke siyiwa na pang'ono pene kuti ifike mangwana mwache na machibese." 
Leviticus7:16 Ngakhala munthu unango anadza na nsembe yachiphatizano kuchitisa kuti kudumbira kwache kukwane-kwane, penu ndi nsembe ene yakupereka na kufuna kwache, yonseneyo munakwanisa kuidya nsiku yontho inaperekwa nsembeyo, kwache ingasalira munakwanisa kuidya pontho mangwana mwache." 
Leviticus7:17 Nyama yonsene yakusalira pa nsembeyo kufikirana nsiku yachitatu, yeneyo yathema kupiswa pamoto." 
Leviticus7:18 Ngakhala nyamayo inadyiwa pansiku yachitatu, Mulungu nkhabe tawira munthu apereka nsembeyo tayu. Nsembeyo hinawerengerwa tayu, pontho inayeswa yokhonda chena mwakuti munthu onsene wakudya nyama yeneyo athema kuoneswa nyatwa." 
Leviticus7:19 Ngakhala nyama yakhuyana na chinthu chinango chakukhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu, nyama yeneyo mbileke dyiwa, mbwenye yathema kupiswa pamoto. Munthu onsene wakuchena pamaso pa Mulungu anakwanisa kudya nyamayo," 
Leviticus7:20 mbwenye ngakhala munthu okhonda chena anadya nyama yeneyi, iye nkhabeve dzayeswa mbodzi wa anthu a Mulungu tayu." 
Leviticus7:21 Pontho, ngakhala munthu anadya nyama ya nsembe yeneyi uku abuluka pakuphata pinthu pyakukhonda chena pya munthu penu pya nyama, iye nkhabeve dzayeswa mbodzi wa anthu a Mulungu tayu." 
Leviticus7:22 MBUYA adapanga Mose 
Leviticus7:23 kulonga kuna Aisraele kuti mafuta a ng'ombe, bira penu mbuzi aleke kudyiwa." 
Leviticus7:24 Mafuta a nyama yakufa yokha penu yakuchita kuphiwa na nyama zam'tsanga aleke kudyiwa, mbwenye munakwanisa kuaphatisa basa inango ene inafuna imwe." 
Leviticus7:25 Ngakhala munthu anadya mafuta a nyama yakuperekwa nsembe kuna MBUYA yakusasanywa na moto, iye nkhabe kuyeswa mbodzi wa anthu a Mulungu tayu." 
Leviticus7:26 Munthu wa dzinza ya Israele, penu akhale pyache kupi, aleke kudya chiropa cha nyama penu mbalame." 
Leviticus7:27 Munthu onsene anaswa mwambo wenewu, iye nkhabeve dzayeswa mbodzi wa anthu a Mulungu tayu." 
Leviticus7:28 MBUYA adapanga Mose 
Leviticus7:29 kulonga kuna Aisraele kuti munthu onsene anapereka nsembe yachiphatizano athema kudza na khundu ibodzi ya nsembeyo ninga mtukwa wakupambulika kuna MBUYA," 
Leviticus7:30 kudza nayo yekha ene m'manja mwache ninga nsembe yakusasanywa na moto. Iye athema kudza na mafuta a nyamayo pabodzi pene na chidali, tenepo apipereke ninga mtukwa wakupambulika pyakwanga kuna MBUYA." 
Leviticus7:31 Nyansembe athema kupyererza mafutache paguwa yansembe, mbwenye chidali chikhale cha nyansembe." 
Leviticus7:32 Mwendo wakunduli wa kumadyo wa nyama uperekwe ninga msonkha-msonkha 
Leviticus7:33 kuna nyansembe, anapereka chiropa na mafuta a nsembe yachiphatizano ile." 
Leviticus7:34 Chidali cha nyamayo ndi mtukwa wakupambulika, pontho mwendo wakunduli wa kumadyo wa nyamayo ndi msonkha-msonkha wakupambulika ule wakwata MBUYA kubulukira kuna Aisraele na kupipereka kuna anyansembe. Penepi ndiye pinafuna kupereka Aisraele kuna anyansembe mifendu yonsene inadzayo." 
Leviticus7:35 Yeneyi ndi khundu ibodzi ya nsembe yakusasanywa na moto yakuperekwa kuna MBUYA, chile chidapaswa Aroni na anache pansiku idadzozwa iwo unyansembe." 
Leviticus7:36 Pansiku yeneyo MBUYA adapanga Aisraele kuti iwo athema kupasa anyansembewa khundu yeneyi ya nsembe. Wenewu ndi mwambo kuti Aisraele auvere mifendu yonsene inadzayo. 
Leviticus7:37 Tenepo wenewu ndi mwambo wa nsembe zakupyerera, pyakupereka pya mapira, nsembe zakulekerera pyakudawa, nsembe zakupagalira pyakudawa, nsembe zakudzoza nazo, na nsembe zachiphatizano." 
Leviticus7:38 Paphiri ya Sinai m'thando yatchetcha mule, MBUYA adapereka mwambo wenewu kuna Mose pansiku idapanga iye Aisraele kupereka nsembe zawo." 
Leviticus8:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Leviticus8:2 “Ukwate Aroni na anache achimuna udze nawo pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi changa, udze pontho na nguwo za unyansembe, mafuta akudzoza nawo, mwanamphulu wamamuna kukhala nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa, mabira amuna awiri na chitundu cha mikate yakusowa chakufufumisira." 
Leviticus8:3 Kubuluka penepo uchemere dzinza yonsene ya Israele kugumanyikana penepo.” 
Leviticus8:4 Mose adachitadi ninga mudampangira MBUYA, tenepo pidagumanyikana anthu ale," 
Leviticus8:5 Mose adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Chinthu chinafuna ine kuchita pano, ntchinthu chidandipanga MBUYA kuti ndichichite.”" 
Leviticus8:6 Mose adadza na Aroni na anache achimuna patsogolo mbaasambisa. 
Leviticus8:7 Iye adakwata mayala na mkhanjo mbavazika Aroni, pontho na kummanga mthimbalimba m'chuno mwache. Adamvazika pontho efodi mbachimangirira m'chuno mwache na bande yakuchita kulukwa mwaluso." 
Leviticus8:8 Iye adamvazika pontho chapagangafuwa mbaikha m'bwalo mwachemo Urimu na Tumimu. 
Leviticus8:9 Iye adamvazika nduwira mumsolo mwache, mbaifekereza kutsogolo kwa nduwira chinthu chagolidi, chidzindikiro chakuonesa kupambulika kwache, ninga mudampangira MBUYA." 
Leviticus8:10 Tenepo Mose adakwata mafuta akudzoza nawo Aroni, mbaikha pa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu na pyonsene pikhali mwenemo, tenepo na njira yeneyi adachitisa pyonsene kukhala pyakupambulika kuna MBUYA." 
Leviticus8:11 Iye adakwata mafuta pang'ono mbaawaza kanomwe paguwa yansembe na pyombo pyache pyonsene, paphande na thako yache ene, towera pikhale pyakupambulika kuna MBUYA." 
Leviticus8:12 Iye adadzoza Aroni pakuchita kumkhuthulira mafuta pang'ono mumsolo mwache. 
Leviticus8:13 Kubuluka penepo Mose adadza na ana achimuna a Aroni patsogolo mbaavazika mayala na mthimbalimba m'chuno mwawo mbaavazika pontho kamdedzi mumsolo mwawo ninga mudampangira MBUYA. 
Leviticus8:14 Kubuluka penepo Mose adadza na mwanamphulu wamamuna kuti akhale nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa, tenepo Aroni na anache adasanjika manjawo pamsolo wa nyamayo." 
Leviticus8:15 Mose adaicheka nyamayo mbakwata chiropa pang'ono mbachitswinga panyanga za guwa yansembe na chala chache kuti ikhale yakupambulika. Kubuluka penepo adakwata chiropa chonsene chakusaliracho mbachikhuthulira pansi pa guwa yansembe. Na njira yeneyi adaichenesa na kuipambula. 
Leviticus8:16 Mose adakwata mafuta akukukutiza pya m'mimba, khundu yadidiletu ya fafa na nswikira ziwiri na mafutache ene mbapipyereza pyonsene paguwa yansembe." 
Leviticus8:17 Iye adakwata nyama yonsene yakusalira ile, kuthimizapo nthembe, mnofu na matumbo ache ene kunja kwa msasa ninga mukhadampangira MBUYA." 
Leviticus8:18 Kubuluka penepo Mose adadza na bira wamamuna kuti akhale nsembe yakupyerera, tenepo Aroni na anache adasanjika manjawo pamsolo pa birayo." 
Leviticus8:19 Mose adaicheka mbakwata chiropa chache mbachiwaza m'makhundu onsene manayi a guwa. 
Leviticus8:20 Iye adakwata birayo mbaigwanda-gwanda m'mapindi; adatsuka pya m'mimba pyache na miyendo yache yakunduli na madzi, mbapisa msolo, mafuta na pyonsene pyakusalira pya nyama ile ninga mudatongera MBUYA. Yeneyi ndi nsembe yakupyerera yakusasanywa na moto yakuperekwa kuna MBUYA; khwemache imbamkomera." 
Leviticus8:21  
Leviticus8:22 Kubuluka penepo Mose adadza pontho na bira unango wamamuna kuti akhale nsembe yakudzoza nayo unyansembe. Tenepo Aroni na anache achimuna adasanjika manjawo pamsolo pabirayo. 
Leviticus8:23 Mose adaicheka mbakwata chiropa chache pang'ono mbachitswinga pansi kukhutu ya madyo ya Aroni, pachikhatho cha manjache yamadyo, pontho na pachala chache chikulu cha dzinyalo yache yamadyo." 
Leviticus8:24 Tenepo iye adadza na ana a Aroni patsogolo mbaatswinga chiropa chile pansi kukhutu yawo ya madyo, pachikhatho cha dzanjawo yamadyo, pontho na pachala chawo chikulu cha dzinyalo yawo yamadyo. Tenepo Mose adakwata chiropa chakusalira chile mbachiwazira m'makhundu manayi a guwa yansembe." 
Leviticus8:25 Iye adakwata mafuta a nyamache, mafuta a kumchira, mafuta akukukutiza pya m'mimba, khundu yadidiletu ya fafa, nswikira ziwiri na mafutache, na mwendo wakunduli wamadyo." 
Leviticus8:26 Tenepo iye adakwata mkate kubulukira m'chitundu cha mikate yakusowa chakufufumisira yakuperekwa kuna MBUYA, mkate ubodzi wakuphikwa na mafuta, pontho na chitumbuwa chibodzi mbapisanjika padzulu pa mafuta na mwendo wakunduli ule." 
Leviticus8:27 Iye adaikha pyakudyapi m'manja mwa Aroni na anache, tenepo iwo adapipereka kuna MBUYA ninga mtukwa wakupambulika." 
Leviticus8:28 Kubuluka penepo Mose adakwata pyakudya pikhali na iwo pile mbapipisa paguwa yansembe padzulu pa nsembe yakupyererayo thangwi iyo ikhali nsembe yakudzoza nayo. Yeneyi ndi nsembe yakusasanywa na moto, pontho khwemache imbamkomera MBUYA." 
Leviticus8:29 Kubuluka penepo Mose adakwata chidali cha bira weneyu mbachipereka ninga mtukwa wakupambulika kuna MBUYA. Phindi yeneyi ya bira wakuchita naye mwambo wakudzoza nja Mose. Mose adachita pyonsene ninga mudampangira MBUYA. 
Leviticus8:30 Mose adakwata mafuta akudzoza nawo pang'ono na chiropa pang'ono chikhali paguwa chile mbachiwazira pana Aroni na anache achimuna na panguwo zawo zene. Na njira yeneyi adachitisa Aroni na anache na nguwo zawo zene kukhala pyakupambulika. 
Leviticus8:31 Mose adalonga kuna Aroni na anache mbati, “Kwatani nyamayi muende nayo pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu mukaitereke mbuidyere ponthopo pabodzi na mikate ili m'chitundu cha nsembe yakudzoza nayo ile ninga mwalongera MBUYA." 
Leviticus8:32 Pingasala, penu mkate penu ndi nyama mupipise pamoto." 
Leviticus8:33 Lekani kubuluka pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu nsiku zinomwe mpakana nsiku za kudzozwa kwanu zimale. 
Leviticus8:34 MBUYA adatipanga kuti tichite pyachita ife leropi, towera abuluse pyakudawa pyanu." 
Leviticus8:35 Imwe mwathema kukhala pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu nsiku zinomwe mosiku na masikati kuchita pidakupangani MBUYA. Mungakhonda kupichita munati mufe. Penepi ndiye pyandipanga MBUYA.” 
Leviticus8:36 Natenepo Aroni na anache adaphata pyonsene pidaapanga MBUYA kudzera muna Mose. 
Leviticus9:1 Pidamala nsiku zakudzozwa kwa Aroni na anache achimuna, mangwana mwache, Mose adachemera Aroni na anache pontho na akadamu a Aisraele." 
Leviticus9:2 Iye adalonga kuna Aroni mbati, “Kwata mwanamphulu wamamuna na bira wamamuna wakusowa chilema, upereke nsembe kuna MBUYA. Mwanamphuluyo akhale nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa, pontho birayo akhale nsembe yakupyerera." 
Leviticus9:3 Tenepo upange Aisraele kuti apikwatire okha ene mbuzi imuna kuti ikhale nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa, mwanamphulu wakukwanisa chaka chibodzi, na mwanabira wakukwanisa chaka chibodzi. Onsenewa akhale akusowa chilema kuti akhale nsembe yakupyerera;" 
Leviticus9:4 pontho ng'ombe imuna na bira wamamuna kuti pikhale nsembe yachiphatizano. Iwo apereke nsembe kuna MBUYA pabodzi pene na chakupereka cha mapira akuvungazwa na mafuta. Iwo achite tenepo, thangwi MBUYA anati aonekere kuna iwo lero.”" 
Leviticus9:5 Iwo adadza patsogolo pa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu na pinthu pyonsene pidaapanga Mose, tenepo dzinza yonsene idagumanyikana kweneko kupembedza MBUYA." 
Leviticus9:6 Mose adalonga mbati, “MBUYA akupangani kuti muchite pyonsenepi towera demelero ya MBUYA ionekere kuna imwe.”" 
Leviticus9:7 Tenepo iye adalonga kuna Aroni mbati, “Ndokoni paguwa yansembeyo mupereke nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa na nsembe yakupyerera kuti zibuluse pyakudawa pyako na pya anthu. Perekani nsembe yeneyi kulekerera pyakudawa pya anthu ninga mudalongera MBUYA.”" 
Leviticus9:8 Aroni adenda paguwa pale mbacheka mwanamphulu wamamuna, ule akhali nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa pyache." 
Leviticus9:9 Anache adamdzesera chiropa, iye adavika chala chache m'chiropa mule mbatswinga nyanga za guwa yansembe. Chiropa chonsene chakusalira chile adachikhuthulira pansi pa guwayo." 
Leviticus9:10 Tenepo iye adapyereza paguwa pale mafuta, nswikira na khundu yadidiletu ya fafa ninga montho mudalongera MBUYA kuna Mose." 
Leviticus9:11 Mbwenye nyamache na nthembe yache adapipisira kunja kwa msasa. 
Leviticus9:12 Iye adacheka nyama, ile ikhali yache kuti apereke nsembe yakupyerera. Anache adamdzesera chiropa, iye mbachiwaza m'makhundu onsene anayi a guwa." 
Leviticus9:13 Iwo adampasira msolo na mapindi anango a nyama ile, mbapyereza pyonsene pile paguwa yansembe." 
Leviticus9:14 Kubuluka penepo adatsuka pya m'mimba pyonsene na miyendo yakunduli mbapyereza paguwa yansembe padzulu pa nsembe yonsene yakupyerera. 
Leviticus9:15 Pidamala iye penepyo, adaperekambo pyakupereka pya anthu. Iye adakwata mbuzi ikhafuna perekwa thangwi ya pyakudawa pya anthu ile. Iye adaicheka mbaipereka nsembe ninga mudachitira iye na nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa pyache." 
Leviticus9:16 Iye adadza pontho na nyama kuti ikhale nsembe yakupyerera, tenepo adaiperekadi mwakuteweza mwambo." 
Leviticus9:17 Iye adapereka chakupereka cha mapira mbakwata ufa wakudzala m'manja mbaupisa paguwa. Penepi pikhali pyakuthimizira nsembe zakupyerera za nsiku na nsiku. 
Leviticus9:18 Iye adacheka ng'ombe na bira wamamuna wakuperekwa na anthu kukhala nsembe yachiphatizano. Anache adamdzesera chiropa iye mbachiwaza m'makhundu onsene anayi a guwa. 
Leviticus9:19 Aroni adakwata mafuta a nyama ya ng'ombe na bira ule," 
Leviticus9:20 mbapiikha padzulu pa pidali pya nyama zile mbapithukula pyonsene kwenda napyo paguwa yansembe. Iye adapyereza mafuta ale paguwapo 
Leviticus9:21 mbapereka pidali na mwendo wakunduli wamadyo ule ninga mtukwa wakupambulika kuna MBUYA kuti ukhale wa anyansembe, ninga mudalongera Mose." 
Leviticus9:22 Pidamala Aroni kupereka nsembe zonsene, adaimira mbakwiza manjache m'dzulu mbaatsanzayisa anthu, tenepo iye adatchitha pansikada za guwa." 
Leviticus9:23 Mose na Aroni adapita m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu. Pidabuluka iwo panja, adatsanzayisa anthu ale, tenepo demelero ya MBUYA idaonekera kuna anthu onsene." 
Leviticus9:24 Penepo MBUYA adatumiza moto kunyekesa nsembe yakupyerera na mafuta ene paguwayo. Pidaona anthu penepi, onsene adakhuwa mbalamba." 
Leviticus10:1 Ana achimuna a Aroni, Nadabu na Abihu, adakwata kada munthu chiwaya chache mbaikhamo makala a moto, na kuthimizamo pyakufukiza pyakununkhira mbapipereka kuna MBUYA, mbwenye motowo hukhali wakuchena tayu, thangwi adaatonga kuchita tenepo si MBUYA tayu." 
Leviticus10:2 Penepo MBUYA adatumiza moto mbuapisa pamaso pa MBUYA, tenepo iwo adafa." 
Leviticus10:3 Tenepo Mose adalonga kuna Aroni mbati, “Penepi ndiye pikhalonga MBUYA pya penepi kuti, ‘Onsene anyakunditumikira athema kulemedza kuchena kwanga; ine ndinati ndionese demelero yanga kuna anthu anga.’ ” Mbwenye Aroni adakhala pyache mulomo phoo." 
Leviticus10:4 Mose adachemera Mishaele na Elizafani ana a Uziele, mbuyache Aroni mbalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Idzani kuno muthukule mitembo ya abale anu kuabulusa pa Chikumbi chakuchena cha MBUYA, pontho mukaaikhe kunja kwa msasa.”" 
Leviticus10:5 Tenepo iwo adadza mbaathukula uku avala mikhanjo yawo, kwenda nawo kunja kwa msasa ninga montho mukhadaapangira Mose." 
Leviticus10:6 Mose adalonga kuna Aroni na anache Eleazara na Itamara mbati, “Lekani khala okhonda sapula tsisi yanu, penu kung'amba nguwo zanu kuonesa kusintili kwanu. Mungapichita penepi, munati mufe, pontho MBUYA anazhangalira dzinza yonsene. Mbwenye Aisraele anzanu onsene akutawiriswa kulira imfa yeneyi yakuchitika na thangwi ya moto udatumiza MBUYA ule." 
Leviticus10:7 Lekani kubuluka pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu gopesera munafa, thangwi imwe mwapambulwa pakuchita kudzozwa na mafuta a MBUYA.” Tenepo iwo adachita ninga mudalongera Mose." 
Leviticus10:8 MBUYA adalonga kuna Aroni mbati," 
Leviticus10:9 “Iwe na anako nee mukutawiriswa kumwa vinyu penu bwadwa tayu, mungapita m'Chikhumbi changa; mungachita tenepo munati mufe. Mwambo wenewu wathema kukoyiwa na pidzukulu pyako mifendu yonsene inadzayo." 
Leviticus10:10 Iwe wathema kusiyanisa pakati pa chinthu cha Mulungu na chinthu cha anthu onsene, pakati pa chinthu chakuchena na chinthu chokhonda chena." 
Leviticus10:11 Iwe wathema kufunzisa Aisraele mwambo onsene wakupasa ine kudzera muna Mose.” 
Leviticus10:12 Mose adalonga kuna Aroni na anache adasalira awiri ale Eleazara na Itamara mbati, “Kwata chakupereka cha mapira chidasalira pa nsembe yakusasanywa na moto yakuperekwa kuna MBUYA ile, sasanyani mkate wakusowa chakufufumisira na ufa wenewo mbumuudyera chifupi na guwa yansembe, thangwi nsembe yeneyi njakuchena pyakwanga." 
Leviticus10:13 Muudyere m'mbuto yakupambulika; yeneyi ndi khundu yanumbo pabodzi na ananu kubulukira pa nsembe yakusasanywa na moto yakuperekwa kuna MBUYA. Penepi ndiye pidandipanga MBUYA. 
Leviticus10:14 Mbwenye imwe na mabanjanu munakwanisa kudya chidali na mwendo wakunduli, ule mudaperekwa ninga mtukwa wakupambulika kuna MBUYA kuti ukhale wa anyansembe. Munakwanisa kupidya pambuto yonsene yakupambulika. Penepi mphyakuperekwa kuna imwe na ananu ninga khundu yanu pa nsembe zachiphatizano zidapereka Aisraele." 
Leviticus10:15 Iwo athema kudza na mwendo wakunduli na chidali pandzidzi unaperekwa mafuta ninga nsembe yakusasanywa na moto yakuperekwa kuna MBUYA. Makhundu enewa nganu na ananu ndzidzi onsene ninga mudalongera MBUYA.” 
Leviticus10:16 Mose adavunza pya mbuzi ya nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa mbagumana kuti ikhadaotchiwa kale. Penepi pidamchitisa Mose kuzhangalira Eleazara na Itamara, natenepo iye adavunza mbati," 
Leviticus10:17 “Thangwi yache ninji mwakhonda kudyera nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawayo pambuto yakupambulika? Yeneyo njakuchena pyakwanga, pontho MBUYA aipereka kuna imwe, towera abuluse pyakudawa pya dzinza yonsene." 
Leviticus10:18 Podi chiropa chache nee chidadzeswe m'mbuto yakupambulika tayu, nyamayo mbamudaidyera pyanu monthomo ninga mudakupangirani ine.”" 
Leviticus10:19 Aroni adatawira mbati, “Ayi mbidadya nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa lero, MBUYA mbadaitawira? Anthu apereka nsembe zakulekerera pyakudawa, pontho na nsembe zakupyerera lero, kwache pinthu ninga penepi pyandichitikira.”" 
Leviticus10:20 Pidava Mose penepi, adakhutira napyo." 
Leviticus11:1 MBUYA adapanga Mose na Aroni kulonga kuna Aisraele kuti: 
Leviticus11:2 Imwe munakwanisa kudya nyama zonsene za pamtunda 
Leviticus11:3 zakugawanikana njondo, pontho na zakulukula," 
Leviticus11:4 mbwenye lekani kudya ngamila, mbira na sulo. Nyama zenezi mwathema kuziyesa zokhonda chena; izo zimbalukula, mbwenye njondo zawo nsokhonda gawanikana." 
Leviticus11:5  
Leviticus11:6  
Leviticus11:7 Lekani kudya nkhumba. Mwathema kuziyesa zokhonda chena; izo nsakugawanikana njondo, mbwenye nee zimbalukulabi." 
Leviticus11:8 Lekani kudya nyama zenezi, penu kukhuya manungo awo ene zingafa, thangwi nsokhonda chena." 
Leviticus11:9 Nsomba zonsene zakukhala na chitoto pontho na mabade, imwe munakwanisa kudya," 
Leviticus11:10 mbwenye nyama zonsene za m'madzi zokhonda khala na chitoto na mabade, lekani kuzidya." 
Leviticus11:11 Nyama ninga zenezi mwathema kuziyesa zokhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu. Lekani kuzidya penu kukhuya manungo awo ene zingafa. 
Leviticus11:12 Lekani kudya chinthu chonsene cha m'madzi chokhonda khala na chitoto na mabade. 
Leviticus11:13 Lekani kudya mbalame izi: mphamba, dzidzi, gokomola, nyakasenera, matangwe, malezi, khungubwe, mphuwani, nkhukumadzi, magoti, chidokowe, vuwo-vuwo, mphipi, nyachigoti penu anyakalemwalemwa." 
Leviticus11:14  
Leviticus11:15  
Leviticus11:16  
Leviticus11:17  
Leviticus11:18  
Leviticus11:19  
Leviticus11:20 Pirombo ping'ono-ping'ono pyakukhala na manthenga pyakukambadza mphyokhonda chena," 
Leviticus11:21 kupambula pile pyakuchita kunumpha. 
Leviticus11:22 Imwe munakwanisa kudya nyadzombe, ntchonjolokoto na ntchobwa." 
Leviticus11:23 Mbwenye pirombo pinango ping'ono-ping'ono pyonsene pyakukhala na manthenga, pontho pyakuchita kukambadza mwathema kupiyesa pyokhonda chena." 
Leviticus11:24 Munthu onsene anakhuya manungo a nyama zakufa zili m'tchindemu anakhala okhonda chena mpakana mawulo: nyama zonsene zakukhala na njondo, kupambula zile zina njondo zakugawanikana, pontho zakulukula pabodzi pene na nyama zonsene za miyendo minayi zakukhala na ngole. Munthu onsene anathukula manungo a nyama zakufazo afule nguwo zache, kwache iye anakhala okhonda chena mpakana mawulo." 
Leviticus11:25  
Leviticus11:26  
Leviticus11:27  
Leviticus11:28  
Leviticus11:29 Kalikongwe, mbewa, godwa, tokhwe, mphenembe, nyankalibunyu, chiligwankhwa na nyakatendewa mwathema kupiyesa pyokhonda chena." 
Leviticus11:30  
Leviticus11:31 Munthu onsene anakhuya manungo awo akufa anakhala okhonda chena basi mpakana mawulo. 
Leviticus11:32 Pontho ngakhala manungo akufawo agwera pachinthu chinango, chinthucho chinakhala chokhonda chena. Penu ndi muti, nguwo, nthembe, sakha, nkhabe pinthu kuti chikuphatiswa basa yanji, chenecho chinatsukwa na madzi, mbwenye chinakhala chokhonda chena basi mpakana mawulo." 
Leviticus11:33 Ngakhala manungo awo anagwera m'chikalango, pinthu pyonsene pili m'chikalangomo mphyokhonda chena; tenepo chikalangocho mwathema kuchiswa." 
Leviticus11:34 Ngakhala madzi a m'chikalangocho agwera pachinthu chonsene chakuthema kudyiwa, chinthucho ntchokhonda chena; pontho chinthu chonsene chakumwiwa m'chikalango ninga chenechi chiyeswe chokhonda chena." 
Leviticus11:35 Chinthu chonsene chakugwerwa na manungo akufa a nyama zenezi ntchokhonda chena, penu ndi chitofu cha dongo, penu mphendekali; pyonsenepyo pyathema kuswiwa. Ipyo mphyokhonda chena, tenepo imwe mwathema kupiyesa pyokhonda chena." 
Leviticus11:36 Mbwenye mphuno ya madzi, penu pyakukoyeramo madzi pikulu-pikulu pinathimiza kukhala pyakuchena, podi kwene kuti onsene anakhuya manungo enewo anakhala okhonda chena." 
Leviticus11:37 Ngakhala manungo abodzi agwera pa mbewu yakufuna kubzaliwa, mbewu yeneyo inathimiza kukhala yakuchena." 
Leviticus11:38 Mbwenye ngakhala mbewuyo yavikwa m'madzi, tenepo manungo abodzi agwera mwenemo, mbewuyo inakhala yokhonda chena." 
Leviticus11:39 Ngakhala nyama yakuthema kudyiwa inafa yokha, munthu onsene anaikhuyayo anakhala okhonda chena mpakana mawulo." 
Leviticus11:40 Ngakhala munthu anadya phindi ya nyama yeneyi, iye afule nguwo zache, mbwenye anakhala okhonda chena basi mpakana mawulo; munthu onsene anathukula chakufayo athema kufula nguwo zache, kwache anakhala okhonda chena basi mpakana mawulo." 
Leviticus11:41 Lekani kudya pyakulengwa pyonsene ping'ono-ping'ono pyakukambadza," 
Leviticus11:42 penu pyakuchita kupsenda na mimba, penu kufamba na miyendo minayi penu mizinji." 
Leviticus11:43 Lekani kupiswipisa mwekha ene pakudya penepi. 
Leviticus11:44 Ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu, natenepo imwe mwathema kupikoya mwekha ene akuchena, thangwi ine ndine wakuchena." 
Leviticus11:45 Ine ndine MBUYA, adakubulusani m'dziko ya Iguputo ule, towera ndikhale Mulungu wanu. Mukhale akuchena thangwi ine ndine wakuchena." 
Leviticus11:46 Wenewu ndiye mwambo wa pya nyama, mbalame, na pyonsene pyakukhala m'madzi na kumtunda kwene." 
Leviticus11:47 Mwathema kusiyanisa pakati pa kuchena na kukhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu, pontho na pakati pa nyama zakuthema kudyiwa na nyama zokhonda thema kudyiwa." 
Leviticus12:1 MBUYA adatonga Mose kupanga Aisraele kuti: 
Leviticus12:2 Ngakhala mkazi anakwata mimba mbabala mwana wamamuna, iye ngokhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu nsiku zinomwe ninga mumbakhalira iye nsiku zache zakumwezi." 
Leviticus12:3 Pansiku yachisere, mwanayo athema kugwandwa nsonga yachimuna." 
Leviticus12:4 Kubuluka penepo mkaziyo anadikhira nsiku zinango makumatatu na zitatu kuti acheneswe, thangwi ya kutaya kwache chiropa. Iye aleke khuya chinthu chakuchena, penu kupita m' Chikhumbi cha Mulungu mpakana nsiku za kucheneswe kwache zimale." 
Leviticus12:5 Ngakhala mkazi anabala mwana wamkazi, iye ngokhonda chena nsiku khumi na zinayi ninga mumbachitira iye pansiku zache zakumwezi. Kubuluka penepo mkaziyo anadikhira pontho nsiku zinango makumatanthatu na zitanthatu kuti acheneswe, thangwi ya kutaya kwache chiropa." 
Leviticus12:6 Ndzidzi wakucheneswa kwa mkaziyo ungamala, penu mwanayo ngwa mamuna penu ngwa mkazi, nyakubalayo adze kuna nyansembe pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu na mwanabira wakukwanisa chaka chibodzi kuti akhale nsembe yakupyerera, pontho na nkhangaiwa penu jiwa kuti akhale nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa." 
Leviticus12:7 Nyansembe anapereka nsembe za mkaziyo kuna MBUYA kuchita mwambo wakupichenesa nawo kumbulusira kukhonda chena kwache konsene, thangwi ya kutaya kwache chiropa, tenepo anakhala wakuchena pamaso pa Mulungu. Penepi ndiye pyathema kuchita mkazi angabala." 
Leviticus12:8 Ngakhala mkaziyo ndi mtcherengi mwakuti hanakwanisa kugumana mwanabira tayu, iye adze na majiwa mawiri, penu nkhangaiwa ziwiri, ibodziyo kuti ikhale nsembe yakupyerera, inangoyo kuti ikhale nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa. Nyansembe anachita mwambo wakumchenesa kumbulusira kukhonda chena kwache konsene, tenepo iye anakhala wakuchena pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Leviticus13:1 MBUYA adapanga Mose na Aroni penepi: 
Leviticus13:2 Ngakhala munthu ana chitupira, nyakadumu, penu chisungu pamanungo pache, chile chinakwanisa kusanduka utenda wakugoswa pamanungo, adzeswe kuna Aroni, penu mbodzi wa anyansembe." 
Leviticus13:3 Nyansembe aone mwadidi pabuluka utendawo. Ngakhala ubweya wa penepo wasanduka wakuchena, pontho chironda chazwika kupiringana khanda yakuzungulira penepo, wenewo ngutenda wakugoswa, tenepo nyansembe alonge kuti munthuyo ngokhonda chena." 
Leviticus13:4 Mbwenye ngakhala chirondacho chikuoneka kutuwa, pontho nee zwika kupiringana khanda yakuzungulira penepo tayu, pontho kuti ujoya wa penepo hudasanduke wakuchena tayu, nyansembe ampambule munthu weneyo kumuikha payekha ene nsiku zinomwe." 
Leviticus13:5 Pansiku yachinomweyo nyansembe anamuona pontho mwadidi, tenepo ngakhala iye anaona kuti chironda chile nee chakula tayu, kwache chikuoneka sasawa ninga montho mwakale, iye ampambule pontho kumuikha payekha ene nsiku zinango zinomwe." 
Leviticus13:6 Nyansembe anamuona pontho mwadidi pansiku yachinomwe, tenepo ngakhala chironda chile chikupola, kwache nee kukulabi, iye athema kulonga kuti munthuyo ngwakuchena pamaso pa Mulungu; ntchironda chene pyacho. Munthuyo afule nguwo zache mbakhaladi wakuchena." 
Leviticus13:7 Mbwenye ngakhala chironda chile chikufukusira uku nyansembe amuona kale mwadidi, pontho iye alonga kale kuti ngwakuchena, iye athema aonekera pontho pamaso pa nyansembe." 
Leviticus13:8 Nyansembe anamuona pontho mwadidi, tenepo ngakhala chironda chakuladi, nyansembe alonge kuti ngokhonda chena. Wenewo ngutenda wakugoswa." 
Leviticus13:9 Ngakhala unango ana utenda wakugoswa wa pamanungo athema kudzeswa kuna nyansembe; 
Leviticus13:10 nyansembeyo amuone mwadidi munthuyo. Ngakhala pamanungo pache pana chironda chakutuwa pontho chachitisa kuti ujoya wa penepo usanduke wakuchena, pontho pachirondapo padzala na mafinya," 
Leviticus13:11 wenewo ngutenda wakufalikira wa pamanungo. Nyansembe alonge kuti munthuyo ngokhonda chena; pontho aleke kupambulwa mbaikhwa payekha ene thangwi iye ngokhonda chena na kale ene. 
Leviticus13:12 Ngakhala utenda wa pamanungowo unafalikira manungo onsene kutomera kumiyendo kufikirana kumsolo," 
Leviticus13:13 nyansembe amuone pontho mwadidi munthu ule. Angagumana kuti utenda ale wafalikiradi manungo onsene, iye alonge kuti munthuyo ngwakuchena pamaso pa Mulungu. Ngakhala manungo ache onsene asanduka akutuwa, iye ngwakuchena basi." 
Leviticus13:14 Mbwenye sindzidzi pironda nkhuoneka iye ngokhonda chena. 
Leviticus13:15 Nyansembe amuone pontho mwadidi, tenepo ngakhala iye anapionadi pirondapyo alonge kuti ngokhonda chena. Chirondacho nkhuonesa kuti munthuyo ana utenda wakugoswa wa pamanungo, natenepo ngokhonda chena." 
Leviticus13:16 Mbwenye pironda pile pingapola mbipikhala pontho pyakutuwa, munthu weneyo aende kuna nyansembe," 
Leviticus13:17 towera akamuone pontho mwadidi. Ngakhala chirondacho chasanduka chakutuwa, iye ngwakuchena, pontho nyansembe amulonge kuti ngwakuchena." 
Leviticus13:18 Ngakhala unango ana chisungu chakupola kale," 
Leviticus13:19 pontho ngakhala m'nduli mwache chironda chakutuwa, penu chakufira chaoneka pakhali chisungu pale, iye aende kuna nyansembe." 
Leviticus13:20 Nyansembe amuone mwadidi, tenepo ngakhala chironda ntchikulu, penu chazwika kupiringana khanda yakuzungulira ya penepo, pontho ujoyache wasanduka wakuchena, weneyo amulonge kuti ngokhonda chena. Wenewo ngutenda wakugoswa wa pamanungo watoma pachisungu pale." 
Leviticus13:21 Mbwenye nyansembe angamuona mwadidi mbagumana kuti ujoya nee wasanduka wakuchena tayu, pontho kuti chironda nee chazwika kupiringana khanda yakuzungulira penepo tayu, mbwenye ntchakuchenerera, nyansembe ampambule kumuikha payekha ene nsiku zinomwe." 
Leviticus13:22 Ngakhala chironda chinathimizika, nyansembe alonge kuti munthuyo ngokhonda chena; ana utenda." 
Leviticus13:23 Mbwenye chingakhala tenepo ene nee kukulabi, yasalira ndi dazwi ene basi ya chisungucho, nyansembe alonge kuti ngwakuchena pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Leviticus13:24 Ngakhala munthu apisika na moto, chironda chachewo chingasanduka chakutuwa, penu chakufirira," 
Leviticus13:25 nyansembe amuone mwadidi. Ngakhala ujoya wa pachirondapo wasanduka wakuchena, pontho chazwika kupiringana khanda yakuzungulira penepo, wenewo ngutenda wakugoswa wa pamanungo watoma padapya pale, natenepo nyansembe alonge kuti munthuyo ngokhonda chena." 
Leviticus13:26 Mbwenye ngakhala ujoya wa pachirondapo hudasanduke wakuchena tayu, pontho kuti chirondacho nee chazwika kupiringana khanda yakuzungulira penepo tayu, mbwenye kuti ntchakuchenerera, nyansembe ampambule kumuikha payekha ene nsiku zinomwe." 
Leviticus13:27 Pansiku yachinomweyo nyansembe amuone pontho mwadidi munthu ule, tenepo angagumana kuti chikuthimiza kukula, wenewo ngutenda wakugoswa wa pamanungo, natenepo nyansembe alonge kuti munthuyo ngokhonda chena." 
Leviticus13:28 Mbwenye chingakhala tenepo ene nee kukulabi, pontho ujoyache ngwakuchenerera, wenewo nee ngutenda wakugoswa wa pamanungo tayu. Nyansembe alonge kuti munthuyo ngwakuchena, thangwi ndi madazwi ene a moto." 
Leviticus13:29 Ngakhala mamuna penu mkazi ana chironda mumsolo, penu pachidevu," 
Leviticus13:30 nyansembe amuone mwadidi. Ngakhala chinaoneka chakuzwika kupiringana khanda yakuzungulira penepo, pontho tsisi ya penepo ikuoneka yakhare, pontho yakunyangutika, wenewo ngutenda wakugoswa wa pamanungo, natenepo nyansembe alonge kuti munthuyo ngokhonda chena." 
Leviticus13:31 Ngakhala nyansembeyo anamuona mwadidi mbagumana kuti chironda nee chazwika kupiringana khanda yakuzungulira penepo tayu, mbwenye ngakhala tsisi ya penepo njakunyangutika basi, iye ampambule akhale pachembo nsiku zinomwe." 
Leviticus13:32 Pansiku yachinomwe nyansembe amuone pontho mwadidi, tenepo ngakhala chirondacho chidakule tayu, pontho nkhabepo tsisi yakhare, pontho nkhabe oneka kuti chazwika kupiringana khanda yakuzungulira penepo tayu," 
Leviticus13:33 munthuyo achinge yache yonsene kupambula pana chirondapo. Nyansembe ampambule pontho nsiku zinango zinomwe. 
Leviticus13:34 Pansiku yachinomwe nyansembe achione pontho mwadidi chirondacho, tenepo ngakhala chidakule tayu, pontho chidazwika kupiringana khanda yakuzungulira penepo tayu, nyansembe alonge kuti munthuyo ngwakuchena pamaso pa Mulungu. Munthuyo afule nguwo zache, natenepo anakhala wakuchena." 
Leviticus13:35 Mbwenye ngakhala chirondacho chinakula uku alongwa kale kuti ngwakuchena," 
Leviticus13:36 nyansembe amuone pontho mwadidi, tenepo ngakhala chirondacho chinakula, iye nkhabe funika pontho kuti aone mwadidi tsisi ngakhala njakhare tayu; munthuyo ngokhonda chena." 
Leviticus13:37 Mbwenye ngakhala nyansembe aone kuti chirondacho nee chakula tayu, pontho kuti tsisi yadidi ikukula penepo, chirondacho chapola, tenepo nyansembe alonge kuti munthuyo ngwakuchena." 
Leviticus13:38 Ngakhala mkazi penu mamuna ana chipere pakhandache," 
Leviticus13:39 nyansembe amuone mwadidi. Ngakhala chiperecho ntchakuchenerera, yeneyo ndi thukuzwa ene yabuluka penepoyo; munthuyo ngwakuchena pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Leviticus13:40 Ngakhala munthu anamera mphanja kunkhodolo penu kuchipumu, penepyo nkhabe kumchitisa kuti akhale okhonda chena tayu." 
Leviticus13:41  
Leviticus13:42 Mbwenye ngakhala chironda chakufirira chinaoneka pamphanjapo, wenewo ngutenda wakugoswa wa pamanungo." 
Leviticus13:43 Nyansembe amuone mwadidi, tenepo ngakhala ntchironda chakufirira," 
Leviticus13:44 nyansembe alonge kuti munthuyo ngokhonda chena, thangwi ya utenda wakugoswa uli mumsolo mwachewo." 
Leviticus13:45 Munthu wakukhala na utenda wakugoswa wa pamanungo athema kuvala nguwo zakung'ambika-ng'ambika, aleke sapula tsisiache, abise pansi nkhope yache, pontho alonge mwakugaluza fala mbati, “Nyakukhonda chena, nyakukhonda chena!”" 
Leviticus13:46 Iye akhale okhonda chena ndzidzi onsene unakhala iye na utendawo, pontho athema kukhala kwa yekha ene kunja kwa msasa." 
Leviticus13:47 Ngakhala chikukuyi chaphata chakuvala, penu ntchaubweya penu ntchathonje," 
Leviticus13:48 penu kaphindi kene ka nguwo yathonje penu yaubweya penu yanthembe, penu chinthu chonsene chakusasanywa na nthembe," 
Leviticus13:49 ngakhala ntcha tsamba yamfigu, penu ntchakufirira, chenecho ntchikukuyi, natenepo chathema kuoneswa kuna nyansembe." 
Leviticus13:50 Nyansembe anachiona mwadidi mbachiikha pachokha chene nsiku zinomwe. 
Leviticus13:51 Pansiku yachinomwe iye anachiona pontho mwadidi, tenepo ngakhala chikukuyi chile chafalikira, chinthucho ntchokhonda chena." 
Leviticus13:52 Nyansembe achipise pamoto, thangwi ntchakuchitisa kuti chikukuyi chifalikire, tenepo icho chathema kuvungwa na moto." 
Leviticus13:53 Mbwenye angachiona pontho mwadidi mbagumana kuti chikukuyi chile nee chafalikira panguwo ile tayu," 
Leviticus13:54 anatonga kuti ifuliwe, kubuluka penepo anachiikha pontho pachokha chene nsiku zinango zinomwe." 
Leviticus13:55 Tenepo pansiku yachinomwe anachiona pontho mwadidi, tenepo ngakhala chikukuyi nee chidaoneka na makhaliro anango tayu, podi kwene kuti nee chikufalikirabi, chinthucho ntchokhonda chena basi, imwe mwathema kuchipisa penu pavungikapo nkhunduli penu nkhunkhope." 
Leviticus13:56 Mbwenye nyansembe angachiona pontho mwadidi mbagumana kuti chikukuyi chile chamala, iye athema kung'amba penepo, penu mphanguwo, penu mphanthembe." 
Leviticus13:57 Tenepo ngakhala chikukuyi chile chinaoneka chikufalikira pontho, tenepo mwenechiro chinthucho achipise." 
Leviticus13:58 Ngakhala anachifula chinthucho, chikukuyi mbichikhonda oneka pontho, iye athema kuchifula pontho, penepo chinakhala chakuchena pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Leviticus13:59 Wenewu ndiye mwambo wa chikukuyi chakukhala pachakuvala, penu ntchaubweya penu ntchathonje, penu paphidzo ya nguwo yaubweya penu yathonje, penu chinthu chonsene chakusasanywa na nthembe. Mwenemu ndiye mumbatongerwa ipyo ngakhala chinthu ntchakuchena, penu ntchokhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Leviticus14:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Leviticus14:2 “Ufu ndi mwambo wakucheneswa kwa munthu angawanga utendache wakugoswa wa pamanungo. Pansiku inalongwa iye kuti ngwakuchena, anthu adze naye kuna nyansembe." 
Leviticus14:3 Tenepo nyansembe anamkwata mbaenda naye kunja kwa msasa kamuona mwadidi. Ngakhala utendawo wawangadi," 
Leviticus14:4 nyansembe anatonga kuti mbalame ziwiri zakuchena pamaso pa Mulungu zidzeswe pabodzi pene na nkhuni zamkungudza, nkhambala yakufira na hisope." 
Leviticus14:5 Tenepo nyansembe atonge kuti mbalame ibodzi ichekerwe m'chikalango chakukhala na madzi adidi a pamphuno ya madzi. 
Leviticus14:6 Nyansembeyo akwate mbalame inangoyo na nkhuni zamkungudza, nkhambala yakufira na hisope, apivike pabodzi na mbalame yamoyo ile m'chiropa cha mbalame idachekwa ile padzulu pa madzi adidi a pamphuno ya madzi ile." 
Leviticus14:7 Tenepo nyansembeyo awaze chiropa kanomwe kuna munthu athema kucheneswa kuna utenda wakugoswa wa pamanungo ule, tenepo analongwa kuti ngwakuchena. Kubuluka penepo iye aleke mbalame yamoyo ile kwenda pyayo kumbulukira kuminda." 
Leviticus14:8 Munthu wakufuna kucheneswayo ufule nguwo zache, achinge tsisi yache, asambe manungo ache, tenepo iye anakhala wakuchena pamaso pa Mulungu. Iye aende mumsasa, kwache akagone kunja kwa khumbi yacheyo nsiku zinomwe." 
Leviticus14:9 Pansiku yachinomwe achinge pontho tsisi yache, ndevu zache, ntchiye zache na tsisi yonsene ya m'manungo mwache. Iye afule pontho nguwo zache, asambe manungo ache, natenepo iye anakhala wakuchena pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Leviticus14:10 “Pansiku yachisere iye adze na mabira awiri achimuna na bira wamkazi akukwanisa chaka chibodzi pontho akusowa chilema, ufa wakuvungazwa na mafuta aolivi, na theka ya tugwe wa mafuta aolivi." 
Leviticus14:11 Nyansembe akwate munthu ule pabodzi pene na pyakupereka pyache kwenda naye pamsuwo pa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu. 
Leviticus14:12 Tenepo nyansembe anakwata bira mbodzi wamamuna pabodzi pene na theka ya tugwe ya mafuta ale mbapipereka ninga nsembe yakupagalira pyakudawa. Iye anapipereka ninga mtukwa wakupambulika pyakwanga kuna MBUYA kuti pikhale pya nyansembeyo. 
Leviticus14:13 Birayo anamchekera pambuto yakupambulika, kule kumbachekerwa nyama za nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa, pontho na nsembe yakupyerera, pyonsene pimbakhala pya nyansembe, pontho mphyakuchena pyakwanga." 
Leviticus14:14 Nyansembe anakwata chiropa pang'ono cha nsembe yakupagalira pyakudawa mbachitswinga kukhutu yamadyo ya munthu anafuna kucheneswa ule, pachala chikulu cha dzanjache yamadyo na pachala chache chikulu cha dzinyalo yache yamadyo." 
Leviticus14:15 Nyansembe anakwata mafuta aolivi pang'ono mbaaikha pathavu yache ene yamabzere," 
Leviticus14:16 mbavika mwenemo na chala chache chamadyo mbawaza pang'ono penepo mafuta ale kanomwe pamaso pa MBUYA. 
Leviticus14:17 Iye anakwata pontho mafuta ali pathavu pache pale na chiropa cha nyama ile mbapitswinga kukhutu yamadyo ya munthu ule, pachala chikulu cha dzanjache yamadyo, na pachala chache chikulu cha dzinyalo yache yamadyo ya munthu anafuna kucheneswa ule." 
Leviticus14:18 Mafuta akusalira m'thavu ya nyansembe ale athema kuikhwa mumsolo wa munthu wakufuna kucheneswa ule. Na njira yeneyi anachita mwambo wakumchenesa nawo. 
Leviticus14:19 “Nyansembe athema kupereka nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa pontho kuchita mwambo wakupichenesa. Angamala penepo aphe nyama kukhala nsembe yakupyerera,"
