Leviticus14:20 pontho aipereke pabodzi na chakupereka cha mapira paguwa yansembe. Na njira yeneyi nyansembe anachita mwambo wakumchenesa, natenepo munthuyo anakhala wakuchenadi pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Leviticus14:21 “Ngakhala munthu ngwakutcherenga mwakuti hanakwanisa kugumana pinthu penepi tayu, iye adze na bira mbodzi wamamuna kuchitira mwambo wakumchenesa nawo. Birayo anakhala ninga nsembe yakupagalira pyakudawa, mtukwa wakupambulika kuna MBUYA kuti pikhale pya nyansembe. Iye adze na ufa wakulemera kilogramu ibodzi wakuvungazwa na mafuta aolivi kuti ikhale chakupereka cha mapira, pontho na theka ya tugwe ya mafuta." 
Leviticus14:22 Iye adze pontho na majiwa mawiri, penu nkhangaiwa ziwiri, ibodzi kuti ikhale nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa, inango kuti ikhale nsembe yakupyerera." 
Leviticus14:23 Pansiku yachisere ya kucheneswa kwache iye adze napyo penepi kuna nyansembe pamaso pa MBUYA pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu. 
Leviticus14:24 Nyansembe akwate bira ule na mafuta aolivi ale mbapipereka ninga mtukwa wakupambulika kuna MBUYA kuti pikhale pya nyansembe. 
Leviticus14:25 Iye acheke bira ule, pontho akwate chiropa pang'ono kuchitswinga kukhutu yamadyo ya munthu ule, pachala chikulu cha dzanjache yamadyo, na pachala chache chikulu cha dzinyalo yache yamadyo." 
Leviticus14:26 Nyansembe aikhe pathavu pache yamabzere mafuta aolivi ale pang'ono," 
Leviticus14:27 tenepo na chala chache chamadyo, iye aawaze kanomwe pamaso pa MBUYA," 
Leviticus14:28 Iye aikhe pontho mafuta aolivi m'mbuto zontho zidaikha iye kale chiropa zile; kukhutu yamadyo ya munthu ule, pachala chikulu cha dzanjache yamadyo, na pachala chache chikulu cha dzinyalo yache yamadyo." 
Leviticus14:29 Iye athema kuikha mafuta onsene akusalira m'thavu mwache mumsolo wa munthu ule, tenepo na njira yeneyi achite mwambo wakumchenesa." 
Leviticus14:30 Kubuluka penepo anakwanisa kupereka ibodzi pakati pa nkhangaiwa penu jiwa 
Leviticus14:31 kukhala nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa, inangoyo kukhala nsembe yakupyerera pabodzi pene na chakupereka cha mapira. Na njira yeneyi nyansembe anachita mwambo wakumchenesa pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Leviticus14:32 Wenewu ndiye mwambo wakucheneswa kwa munthu wakukhala na utenda wakugoswa wa pamanungo, ule ngwakutcherenga mwakuti hanakwanisa kupereka pyakundendemera na kucheneswa kwache.”" 
Leviticus14:33 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose na Aroni mbati," 
Leviticus14:34 “Mungafika m'dziko ya Kanani inafuna ine kukupasani kuti ikhale yanu ene, mbamugumana kuti m'nyumbamo ndaikhamo chikukuyi," 
Leviticus14:35 mwenechiro nyumbayo athema kapanga nyansembe pya chikukuyicho. 
Leviticus14:36 Tenepo nyansembe ampange munthuyo kuti pyonsene pya m'nyumbamo pibuluswe, iye mbadzati pitamo kaona mwadidi chikukuyi, gopesera pyonsene pya m'nyumbamo pinalongwa kuti mphyokhonda chena. Angachita tenepo nyansembe apite m'nyumbamo kaiona mwadidi;" 
Leviticus14:37 tenepo angagumana kuti muna madamba akufira na tsamba amfigu, pontho kuti madambawo akunyenyena mafufu a nyumbayo;" 
Leviticus14:38 nyansembe abulukemo m'nyumbamo mbafunga mwadidi msuwo wa nyumbayo mpakana nsiku zinomwe. 
Leviticus14:39 Pansiku yachinomwe nyansembe adze dzaiona pontho mwadidi nyumbayo. Angagumana kuti chikukuyi chikwenda mbichikula pafufu pale," 
Leviticus14:40 atonge anthu kuti miyala yakuphatwa na chikukuyi ile igomolwe mbikatayirwa kumbuto yokhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu kunja kwa mzindawo. 
Leviticus14:41 Mafufu onsene a m'bwalo mwa nyumbayo athema kupalwa, tenepo mataka akupalwawo akatayiwe kumbuto yokhonda chena kunja kwa mzindawo." 
Leviticus14:42 Kubuluka penepo akwate miyala inango kupita m'mbuto mwa miyala idabuluswa ile, pontho aphatise basa mataka anango achinchino kuzirima nawo mafufu ale." 
Leviticus14:43 Mbwenye chikukuyi chingagundika pontho uku abulusa kale miyala ya m'nyumbamo, pontho kupala matakache, adazirimwa na iyo ale," 
Leviticus14:44 nyansembe athema kupita mwenemo. Iye angagumana kuti chikukuyi chafalikira m'nyumbamo, chenecho ntchakuvunga, tenepo nyumbayo njokhonda chena." 
Leviticus14:45 Nyumbayo yathema kugomolwa, pontho akwate miti yache, miyala yache, matakache, adazirimwa na miyala ale aende napyo kapitayira kunja kwa mzinda kumbuto yokhonda chena." 
Leviticus14:46 Munthu onsene wakupita m'nyumbamo nsiku zache zakufungulwa zidzati kwana, weneyo anakhala okhonda chena mpakana mawulo." 
Leviticus14:47 Munthu onsene wakugona m'nyumbamo, penu kudyeramo afule nguwo zache." 
Leviticus14:48 “Mbwenye ngakhala nyansembe apita m'nyumbamo mbagumana kuti chikukuyi chile nee chikuonekave tayu mwenemo yamala zirimwa, nyansembe ailonge nyumbayo kuti njakuchena thangwi chikukuyi chamala." 
Leviticus14:49 Penepo iye akwate mbalame ziwiri, muti wamkungudza, nkhambala yakufira na hisope kuti achenese napyo nyumbayo." 
Leviticus14:50 Acheke mbalame ibodzi padzulu pa chikalango chakudzala na madzi adidi akubulukira pa mphuno ya madzi. 
Leviticus14:51 Akwate muti wamkungudza, hisope, nkhambala yakufira na mbalame yamoyo mbapivika m'chiropa cha mbalame idachekwa padzulu pa chikalango chakukhala na madzi adidi akubulukira pa mphuno ya madzi ile. Kubuluka penepo achiwaze m'nyumbamo kanomwe." 
Leviticus14:52 Na njira yeneyi anachenesa nyumbayo na chiropa cha mbalame, madzi adidi, mbalame yamoyo, muti wamkungudza, hisope, na nkhambala yakufira." 
Leviticus14:53 Kubuluka penepo aleke mbalame yamoyo ile kwenda pyayo kumbulukira kunja kwa mzindawo kuminda. Na njira yeneyi anachita mwambo wakuchenesa nyumba, natenepo inakhala yakuchenadi pamaso pa Mulungu.”" 
Leviticus14:54 Wenewu ndiye mwambo wa utenda wakugoswa wa pamanungo," 
Leviticus14:55 pironda, pitupira, penu pipere; pontho pya chikukuyi pachakuvala, pontho panyumba." 
Leviticus14:56  
Leviticus14:57 Mwambo wenewu ndiye umbadziwisa kukhonda chena kwa chinthu na kuchena kwa chinthu. 
Leviticus15:1 MBUYA adapanga Mose na Aroni kulonga kuna Aisraele kuti: 
Leviticus15:2 Ngakhala mamuna anabuluka mafinya kumaso kwache, munthuyo ngokhonda chena," 
Leviticus15:3 podi kwene kuti athimize kubuluka, penu aleke iye ngokhonda chena basi." 
Leviticus15:4 Patalimba panagonera penu pakhalira iye mphyakukhonda chena. 
Leviticus15:5 Munthu onsene anakhuya talimbache," 
Leviticus15:6 penu kukhalira chinthu chidakhalira munthu ule, weneyo athema kufula nguwo zache na kusamba, pontho iye anakhala okhonda chena basi mpakana mawulo." 
Leviticus15:7 Munthu onsene wakukhuya kwene mtenda weneyu, athema kafula nguwo zache mbasamba; iye anakhala okhonda chena basi mpakana mawulo." 
Leviticus15:8 Ngakhala munthu wakuchuchayi anaphulira mata munthu wakuchena, nyakuchenayo afule nguwo zache na kusamba kwene pontho anakhala okhonda chena mpakana mawulo." 
Leviticus15:9 Chonsene chinakhalira munthu ule, penu mphamsana pa bulu, penu ndi mpando, chinthucho ntchokhonda chena." 
Leviticus15:10 Munthu onsene wakuphata chinthu chonsene chidakhalira mtendayo akhale okhonda chena mpakana mawulo. Munthu onsene wakuthukula chinthu chidakhalira mtenda ule, afule nguwo ache na kusamba kwene, pontho anakhala okhonda chena basi mpakana mawulo." 
Leviticus15:11 Ngakhala munthu wakubuluka mafinya aphata munthu unango mbadzati samba manjache, nyakuphatwayo asambe na kufula nguwo zache, pontho anakhala okhonda chena basi mpakana mawulo." 
Leviticus15:12 Chikalango chonsene chinaphata munthu weneyu chathema kuswiwa; ngakhala aphata ndilo yathema kutsukwa mwadidi. 
Leviticus15:13 Munthu ule angawanga utendache wakubuluka mafinya, adikhire mpakana nsiku zinomwe, angamala penepo afule nguwo zache na kusamba madzi adidi akubulukira pa mphuno ya madzi, natenepo anakhala wakuchena pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Leviticus15:14 Pansiku yachisere akwate majiwa mawiri penu nkhangaiwa ziwiri kwenda napyo kumsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu mbapipereka kuna nyansembe. 
Leviticus15:15 Nyansembe anapereka ibodziyo ninga nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa, inangomboyo ninga nsembe yakupyerera. Na njira yeneyi anachita mwambo wakuchenesa munthu weneyu." 
Leviticus15:16 Mamuna anabuluka umuna, iye asambe manungo ache onsene, pontho ambakhala okhonda chena mpakana mawulo." 
Leviticus15:17 Ponsene pagwera umunapo, penu mphanguwo penu mphanthembe, chinthucho chifulwe, pontho chinakhala chokhonda chena mpakana mawulo." 
Leviticus15:18 Mkazi na mamuna angamala kupita m'bonde, onsene uwiriawo athema kusamba, pontho onsene awiri anakhala okhonda chena mpakana mawulo." 
Leviticus15:19 Mkazi pandzidzi wache wakumwezi, ambakhala okhonda chena nsiku zinomwe. Munthu anakhuya mkaziyo anakhala okhonda chena mpakana mawulo." 
Leviticus15:20 Chonsene chinakhalira iye penu nkhugonera, pandzidzi wache wakumwezi, chinthucho ntchokhonda chena." 
Leviticus15:21 Munthu onsene wakuphata talimba ya mkaziyu, penu ntchakukhalira, munthuyo afule nguwo zache mbasamba, pontho anakhala okhonda chena mpakana mawulo." 
Leviticus15:22  
Leviticus15:23  
Leviticus15:24 Ngakhala mamuna anapita m'bonde na mkazi pandzidzi wache wakumwezi, anakhala okhonda chena nsiku zinomwe, pontho patalimba ponsene panagonera iye mphokhonda chena." 
Leviticus15:25 Ngakhala mkazi anachucha chiropa nsiku zizinji kupambula nsiku zache zakumwezi, penu ngakhala mkaziyo nsiku zache zakumwezi zathimizirika, ambakhala okhonda chena ninga mumbachitira iye pandzidzi wache wakumwezi." 
Leviticus15:26 Chinthu chinagonera iye na chinthu chinakhalira iye pandzidzi wenewu ntchokhonda chena. 
Leviticus15:27 Munthu anaphata penepiyo ngwakukhonda chena, pontho afule nguwo zache na kusamba kwene; anakhala okhonda chena basi mpakana mawulo." 
Leviticus15:28 Kuchucha kwa chiropa kwa mkaziyo kungaleka, adikhire nsiku zinomwe, tenepo anakhala wakuchena pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Leviticus15:29 Pansiku yachisere iye adze na majiwa mawiri penu nkhangaiwa ziwiri kuna nyansembe pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu. 
Leviticus15:30 Nyansembeyo anapereka ibodziyo ninga nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa, inangomboyo ninga nsembe yakupyerera, tenepo na njira yeneyi iye anachita mwambo wakumchenesa mkaziyo." 
Leviticus15:31 MBUYA adapanga Mose kuti acheuze Aisraele pya kukhonda chena kwawo, towera aleke swipisa Chikhumbi chache, chile chikhali pakati pa msasa, kugopesera anaphiwa." 
Leviticus15:32 Wenewu ndiye mwambo wache wakulonga pya mamuna wakubuluka mafinya kumaso kwache penu kubuluka umuna," 
Leviticus15:33 pontho pya mkazi pandzidzi wache wakumwezi, pontho na pya mamuna wakugona na mkazi okhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Leviticus16:1 Pidafa ana achimuna a Aroni, thangwi ya kuphatisa moto mwakukhonda pangwa na MBUYA, MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose." 
Leviticus16:2 Iye adalonga mbati, “Panga mbaleako Aroni kuti adze pandzidzi wakuthema ene basi kunduli kwa chinguwo chakutchinga nacho Mbuto Yakuchenesesa, thangwi kweneko ndiye kumbaonekera ine m'makole padzulu pa mphampha ya Bokosi ya Chiverano. Angakhonda kuvera anati aphiwe." 
Leviticus16:3 Umu ndi mule mwathema Aroni kupita m'Mbuto Yakuchenesesa: Iye athema kudza na mwanamphulu wamamuna dzapereka nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa na bira wamamuna dzapereka nsembe yakupyerera.” 
Leviticus16:4 Aroni mbadzati pita ku Mbuto Yakuchenesesa, asambe na kuvala nguwo za unyansembe: mkhanjo, kapundu, mcheka na nduwira, pyonsene pyakusasanywa na nguwo yakufewa." 
Leviticus16:5 Dzinza yonsene ya Israele ipereke kuna Aroni mabokho mawiri kuti akhale nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa na bira wamamuna kuti akhale nsembe yakupyerera. 
Leviticus16:6 Iye athema kupereka ng'ombe imuna ninga nsembe yakubulusa pyakudawa pyache na banjache ene. 
Leviticus16:7 Kubuluka penepo akwate mabokho mawiri ale kwenda nawo pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu. 
Leviticus16:8 Penepo achite ntsango pakuphatisa basa miyala miwiri, mwala ubodzi kuimirira “MBUYA,” unangombo kuimirira “Azazele.”" 
Leviticus16:9 Aroni apereke nsembe ya mbuzi yakusankhulwa pakuchita ntsango kuti nja MBUYA, tenepo aipereka ninga nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa." 
Leviticus16:10 Mbuzi yakusankhulwa kuti nja Azazele ile, iperekwe yamoyo kuna MBUYA, pontho muithamangise kuti iende pyawo m'thando yatchetcha kuna Azazele, towera kubulusa pyakudawa pya anthu." 
Leviticus16:11 Aroni angapereka nsembe ya ng'ombe imuna kuti ikhale nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa pyache na banjache ene," 
Leviticus16:12 iye akwate chiwaya chakudzala na makala a moto kubulukira pa guwa yansembe, na pyakufukiza pyakununkhira pyakudzala m'manja, tenepo apite napyo m'Mbuto Yakuchenesesa." 
Leviticus16:13 Mwenemo pamaso pa MBUYA anaikha pyakufukiza pyakununkhira pile pamoto, tenepo utsi wa pyakufukiza pyakununkhira ule unabisa mphampha ya Bokosi ya Chiverano chile, towera aleke kuchiona gopesera anafa." 
Leviticus16:14 Iye akwate chiropa pang'ono cha nyama ile, mbachiwaze na chala chache pamphampha. Kubuluka penepo awaze chiropacho pontho kanomwe kunkhope kwa Bokosi ya Chiverano." 
Leviticus16:15 Angamala penepo, acheke bokho mbodzi wakusankhulwa kukhala nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa pya anthu ule, adze na chiropa chache m'Mbuto Yakuchenesesa na kuchiwaza pamphampha, pontho na kunkhope kwa Bokosi ya Chiverano ninga mudachitira iye na chiropa cha ng'ombe." 
Leviticus16:16 Na njira yeneyi anachita mwambo wakuchenesa Mbuto Yakuchenesesa kuna kukhonda chena kwa Aisraele na kuna pyakudawa pyawo. Achite penepi kuna Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, thangwi chili pakati na kati pa msasa, ule ngwakukhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Leviticus16:17 Kubulukira ndzidzi unapita Aroni ku Mbuto Yakuchenesesa kachita mwambo wakuchenesa, mpakana abulukemo, m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu muleke khala munthu unango. Angamala chita mwambo wakupichenesa yekha ene, banjache, na dzinza yonsene ya Israele," 
Leviticus16:18 athema kubuluka panja kuna guwa yakupereka nsembe yakupyerera kuti aichenese. Iye akwate chiropa cha ng'ombe na chiropa cha bokho chile, achitswinge panyanga za nkhomo za guwa ile." 
Leviticus16:19 Na chala chache iye awaze chiropa chile kanomwe paguwa yansembe. Na njira yeneyi anaichenesa kuna pyakudawa pya Aisraele mbaichitisa kukhala yakuchena. 
Leviticus16:20 Aroni angamala kuchita mwambo wakuchenesa Mbuto Yakuchenesesa, Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, na guwa yansembe, apereke kuna MBUYA bokho wamoyo adasankhulwa kuti ikhale wa Azazele ule." 
Leviticus16:21 Iye asanjike manjache onsene awiri pamsolo wa bokhoyo, tenepo abweke pyakuipa pyonsene, pyakudawa na kupandukira kwa Aisraele kupiendesa mumsolo mwa bokho ule. Kubuluka penepo bokho ule athamangisirwe kuthando yatchetcha na munthu wakusankhulwa kuchita tenepo ule." 
Leviticus16:22 Bokho ule anathukula yekha ene pyakudawa pyawo pyonsene kuthawira napyo kutali kumbuto yakusowa chakumera; kweneko munthuyo anamsudzula kwenda pyache. 
Leviticus16:23 Angamala penepo Aroni apite m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, adule nguwo ya unyansembe ikhadavala iye mbadzati pita m'Mbuto Yakuchenesesa, pontho apisiye monthomo." 
Leviticus16:24 Iye asambire m'mbuto yakupambulika na kuvala nguwo zache zene. Kubuluka penepo abuluke panja kapereka nsembe yakupyerera kubulusa pyakudawa pyache na pya anthu pene. 
Leviticus16:25 Mafuta a nyama yakuperekwa kukhala nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa aaotche paguwa yansembe. 
Leviticus16:26 Munthu wakuthamangisira bokho kuthando yatchetcha kuna Azazele ule, afule nguwo zache na kusamba kwene mbadzati bwerera kumsasa kule." 
Leviticus16:27 Ng'ombe na bokho pyaphatiswa basa kukhala nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa ile, chiropa chawo chidapiswa m'Mbuto Yakuchenesesa kubulusa pyakudawa pya anthu zile, zinathukulwa kwenda nazo kunja kwa msasa kuti zikapiswe. Nthembe, nyama, matumbo pyonsene pimale piswa." 
Leviticus16:28 Nyakupisayo afule nguwo zache na kusamba mbadzati bwerera kumsasa kule. 
Leviticus16:29 Mwambo ufu utewezwe mifendu yonsene inadzayo. Pansiku yachikhumi ya mwezi wachinomwe Aisraele na alendo akukhala pakati pawo athema kupimana kudya, pontho aleke phata basa na pang'ono pene." 
Leviticus16:30 Pansiku yeneyo mwambo wakupichenesa uchitike kuti iwo achene kuabulusira pyakudawa pyawo, towera akhale akuchena pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Leviticus16:31 Nsiku yeneyo ikhale yakuchena pyakwanga, ndi nsiku yakuti iwo apimane kudya na kukhonda phata basa na pang'ono pene. Mwambo wenewu utewezwe mifendu yonsene inadzayo." 
Leviticus16:32 Nyansembe Wamkulu wakudzozwadi na wakupambuliwadi kuti apite mbuto ya babache, achite mwambo wakupichenesa. Iye athema kuvala chakuvala cha unyansembe" 
Leviticus16:33 mbachita mwambo wakuchenesa Mbuto Yakuchenesesa, Chikhumbi cha Mulungu chonsene, guwa yansembe, anyansembe na anthu onsene a dzinza ya Israele." 
Leviticus16:34 Mwambo wenewu utewezwe mifendu yonsene inadzayo. Mwambo wenewu wakupichenesa uchitike kabodzi pa chaka kuchenesa Aisraele kuna pyakudawa pyawo pyonsene. Natenepo Mose adachitadi ninga mudalongera MBUYA. 
Leviticus17:1 MBUYA adapanga Mose 
Leviticus17:2 kulonga kuna Aroni, anache na Aisraele onsene kuti:" 
Leviticus17:3 Mbodzi wa Aisraele angapha mbuzi, ng'ombe penu bira kuti ikhale mtukwa kuna MBUYA mbaichekera pyache pambuto inango ene, nee pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu tayu, weneyo aswa mwambo. Iye achuchisa chiropa, natenepo nkhabeve dzayeswa mbodzi wa anthu a Mulungu tayu." 
Leviticus17:4  
Leviticus17:5 Mwambo wenewu ukulonga kuti Aisraele abwere kuna MBUYA na nyama zikhaphera iwo pakwecha zile. Iwo abwere nazo nyama zawozo kuna nyansembe pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu na kuzicheka ponthopo ninga nsembe yachiphatizano. 
Leviticus17:6 Nyansembe awaze chiropacho m'makhundu a guwa yansembeyo pamsuwo pa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, pontho apise mafuta a nyamayo kuti abuluse khwema yadidi yakukomera MBUYA." 
Leviticus17:7 Aisraele mbaleke khalave okhonda khulupirika kuna MBUYA pakukwata nyama zawo kaziphera m'tsanga ninga nsembe kuna mizimu yakuipa. Aisraele athema kuteweza mwambo wenewu kutomera chinchino mpakana mifendu yonsene inadzayo. 
Leviticus17:8 Mbodzi wa Aisraele, penu mlendo wakukhala pakati pa Aisraele, angapereka nsembe yakupyerera penu nsembe ya mtundu unango kuna MBUYA, kubuluka penepo," 
Leviticus17:9 mbaiperekera pyache pambuto inango ene nee kuti ikhale nsembe ya MBUYA tayu, weneyo nkhabeve dzayeswa mbodzi wa anthu a Mulungu tayu." 
Leviticus17:10 Ngakhala mbodzi wa Aisraele, penu mlendo wakukhala pakati pa Aisraele, anadya nyama uku chiropa chache chikhali montho m'manungo mwachemo, MBUYA anampasa nkhodolo pontho hanayeswave mbodzi wa anthu ache tayu." 
Leviticus17:11 Moyo wa nyama zonsene uli m'chiropa, ndi thangwi yache MBUYA adatonga kuti chiropa chonsene chathema kukhuthulirwa paguwa yansembe kubulusa pyakudawa pya anthu. Chiropa chile ndi moyo chimbabulusa pyakudawa pya anthu." 
Leviticus17:12 Ndi thangwi yache MBUYA adaapanga Aisraele kuti iwo pabodzi na alendo akukhala pakati pawo aleke kudya nyama yakukhala na chiropa m'bwalo mwache. 
Leviticus17:13 Ngakhala mbodzi wa Aisraele, penu mlendo wakukhala pakati pa Aisraele, anakhulisa nyama penu mbalame, chile ntchakuchena pamaso pa Mulungu, iye athema kukhuthulira chiropa cha nyamayo pansi mbachifikhira na mataka." 
Leviticus17:14 Moyo wa nyama zonsene uli m'chiropa, ndi thangwi yache MBUYA adapanga Aisraele kuti aleke kudya nyama yakukhala na chiropa m'manungo mwache, pontho kuti munthu onsene angachita penepyo hanayeswave mbodzi wa anthu a Mulungu tayu." 
Leviticus17:15 Munthu onsene, mbodzi wa Aisraele penu mlendo, angadya nyama yakufa yokha penu yakuchita kuphiwa na nyama zam'tsanga, iye athema kufula nguwo zache, kusamba pontho kudikhira mpakana mawulo mbadzati khala wakuchena pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Leviticus17:16 Iye angakhonda kupichita penepi, athema kuoneswa nyatwa." 
Leviticus18:1 MBUYA adapanga Mose 
Leviticus18:2 kulonga kuna Aisraele mbati, “Ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu." 
Leviticus18:3 Lekani kwatira makhaliro a anthu a ku Iguputo, kukhakhala imwe pakutoma kule, penu makhaliro a anthu a m'dziko ya Kanani kunakuendesani ineku." 
Leviticus18:4 Verani mwambo wanga pontho chitani pinakutongani inepi. Ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu. 
Leviticus18:5 Tewezani mwambo na matongero pinakupasani inepi; pakuchita tenepo imwe munati mupulumuse moyo wanu. Ine ndine MBUYA.” 
Leviticus18:6 Tenepo MBUYA adapereka mwambo ufu: Leka gonana na mbaleako na mbodzi ene. 
Leviticus18:7 Leka lulupisa babako pakugonana na mako. Leka lulupisa mako nyakukubala. 
Leviticus18:8 Leka lulupisa babako pakugonana na mkazache. 
Leviticus18:9 Leka gonana na nyamaingako, penu nyamaingako wakunjira, penu wakukulira naye m'nyumba ibodzi penu tayu." 
Leviticus18:10 Leka gonana na mdzukuluako wamkazi; kweneko nkhupilulupisa wekha ene. 
Leviticus18:11 Leka gonana na nyamaingako wa bele inango, thangwi weneyombo ndi nyamaingako." 
Leviticus18:12 Leka gonana na nyamaingache babako, thangwi iye ntchiropa chibodzi na babako." 
Leviticus18:13 Leka gonana na mbaleache mako, thangwi iye ntchiropa chibodzi na mako." 
Leviticus18:14 Leka gonana na mkazi mbaleache babako, thangwi weneyombo ndi mako." 
Leviticus18:15 Leka gonana na mkwenyako, weneyo ndi mkazache mwanako," 
Leviticus18:16 penu na mkazi mbaleako. 
Leviticus18:17 Leka gonana na mkazi pabodzi pene na mwanache wamkazi, penu na mdzukuluache wachikazi; mwinango iwo mbabale ako, penepyo mphyakudawika." 
Leviticus18:18 Leka kwata nthena. 
Leviticus18:19 Leka gonana na mkazi pandzidzi wache wakumwezi, thangwi iye ngokhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Leviticus18:20 Leka gonana na mkazi mwanzako; penepyo pinakuchitisa kukhala okhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu. 
Leviticus18:21 Leka pereka anako kuti akaperekwe nsembe kuna milungu Moleki, thangwi kweneko nkhululupisa dzina ya Mulungu wako. Ine ndine MBUYA." 
Leviticus18:22 Leka gonana na mamuna mnzako ninga ukugonana na mkazi; Mulungu ambanyansirwa napyo. 
Leviticus18:23 Mamuna penu mkazi aleke gonana na nyama; kweneku nkhuzuda kukulu. 
Leviticus18:24 Lekani kupiswipisa mwekha ene pakuchita pinthu penepi, thangwi mwenemo ndiye mudapichitisa anthu okhonda dziwa Mulungu kukhala okhonda chena pamaso pache, ale akhakhala m'dziko muno imwe mbamudzati fikamo, pontho anafuna MBUYA kuathamangisa ale, towera imwe mukapitemo." 
Leviticus18:25 Makhaliro awo adachitisa dziko kuti ikhale yokhonda chena, natenepo MBUYA akutchunyusa dziko na kuichitisa kuti itapike anthu akhakhala mwenemo ale." 
Leviticus18:26 Iwo adachita pinthu pyonsene pyakunyansapi mbachitisa dziko kukhala yokhonda chena, mbwenye imwe lekani kupichita penepi. Monsenene, penu ndimwe Aisraele, penu alendo anakhala pakati panu mwathema kukoya mwambo wanga na matongero a MBUYA," 
Leviticus18:27  
Leviticus18:28 natenepo dziko nkhabe dzakutapikani ninga mudatapikira iyo anthu okhonda dziwa Mulungu akhakhala mwenemo pakutoma imwe mbamudzati fikamo ale. 
Leviticus18:29 Imwe mukupidziwa kuti munthu onsene anaphata pinthu pyakunyansapi nkhabe dzayeswave mbodzi wa anthu a Mulungu tayu. 
Leviticus18:30 Natenepo MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Verani matongero anakupasani inewa, pontho lekani kuteweza makhaliro a anthu akhakhala mwenemo imwe mbamudzati fikamo ale, pontho lekani kupiswipisa mwekha ene pakuchita pinthu penepi. Ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu.”" 
Leviticus19:1 MBUYA adapanga Mose 
Leviticus19:2 kulonga kuna dzinza yonsene ya Israele mbati, “Khalani akuchena, thangwi ine, MBUYA Mulungu wanu, ndine wakuchena." 
Leviticus19:3 Munthu onsene athema kulemedza babache na mache, pontho athema kukoya nsiku zakupuma ninga mudakupangirani ine. Ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu." 
Leviticus19:4 “Lekani kundikhonda mbamupembedza mifanikizo. Lekani kupisasanyira milungu yantove na kuipembedza. Ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu. 
Leviticus19:5 “Mungapha nyama kuti ikhale nsembe yachiphatizano, tewezani mwambo wakupasani ine ule, towera nsembeyo itambirwe." 
Leviticus19:6 Nyama ya nsembeyo ingaphiwa yathema kudyiwa nsiku yonthoyo penu mangwana mwache. Nyama yonsene yakusala kufikirana nsiku yachitatu, yathema kupiswa," 
Leviticus19:7 thangwi iyo njokhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu, tenepo ngakhala munthu anaidya, ine nkhabe tambira nsembeyo tayu." 
Leviticus19:8 Munthu onsene wakuidyayo anakhala wakudawa, thangwi ya kuyesa chinthu chakupambulika kuna ine ninga chinthu chene pyacho, pontho ine nkhabeve dzamuyesa mbodzi wa anthu anga tayu." 
Leviticus19:9 “Mungavuna mbewu zanu za kumunda, lekani vuna na kufikiratu m'madire, pontho lekani bwererako kaphakalatira." 
Leviticus19:10 Lekani bwerera pontho m'nduli m'mundanu wamfesa kasaka-saka mfesa zakusalira penu kulokotera mfesa zakugwa; penepyo mupilekere anthu akutcherenga pontho na alendo. Ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu. 
Leviticus19:11 “Lekani kuba, kunama, penu kunyengeza mwanzanu." 
Leviticus19:12 Lekani kudumbira mwakunama na dzinanga; penepi pimbalulupisa dzinanga. Ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu. 
Leviticus19:13 “Lekani kudyera mwanzanu nkope-kope, penu kumbera. Nsiku yakupagali nyakuphata basa ingakwana, lekani dokerwa napyo pyakupagali pyachepyo kukhonda kumpasa." 
Leviticus19:14 Lekani temberera dodo, penu kuikha chinthu kutsogolo kwa boli-boli kuti chinamgwegweduse. Ndigopeni, ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu." 
Leviticus19:15 “Lekani potoza chilungamo pakutonga mwakuyang'ana nkhope anyakutcherenga, penu kugopa anyakufuma." 
Leviticus19:16 Lekani famba-famba na kulonga tsweda, pontho ngakhala munthu ana mseru wakuphiwa nawo, longani umboni wanu ule unakwanisa kumphedza munthu. Ine ndine MBUYA." 
Leviticus19:17 “Lekani kuzonda mwanzanu, mbwenye ngakhala mwasosana chinthu chinango, khaliranani pansi, towera iwe uleke dawa thangwi ya iye." 
Leviticus19:18 Lekani bwezera chakuipa kuna mwanzanu, penu kuthimiza kumzonda. Mbwenye mfuneni mwanzanu ninga mumbapifunira imwe mwekha ene. Ine ndine MBUYA." 
Leviticus19:19 “Verani matongero anga. Lekani chitisa nyama za mtundu unango kuti zibebese nyama za mtundu unango. Lekani bzala mbewu za mtundu uwiri m'munda ubodzi ene. Lekani vala nguwo zakusasanywa na nguwo ya mitundu iwiri. 
Leviticus19:20 “Ngakhala bitchu wamkazi avunzirwa na munthu unango, pontho kuti nee hadaombolwe penu kusudzulwabi, penepo ngakhala mamuna unango anadza mbagonana naye, onsene awiri atchunyuswe, mbwenye aleke phiwa, thangwi iye ndi bitchu." 
Leviticus19:21 Mamunayo athema kudza na bira wamamuna pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu kukhala nsembe yakupagalira pyakudawa pyache," 
Leviticus19:22 tenepo na nsembeyo nyansembe anachita mwambo wakuchenesa nawo munthu ule kumbulusira pyakudawa pyache, natenepo MBUYA anamulekerera." 
Leviticus19:23 “Mungafika m'dziko ya Kanani mbamubzala nsapo za mtundu na mtundu pyaka pitatu pyakutomapyo, nsapo muziyese zokhonda chena. Pandzidzi wenewu muleke kudya nsapo zache." 
Leviticus19:24 Chaka chachinayicho nsapozo ziperekwe ninga nsembe yakukuza nayo ine, MBUYA." 
Leviticus19:25 Mbwenye chaka chachishanucho munakwanisa kudya nsapozo. Mungachita pyonsenepi miti yanu inabala nsapo zakuinjipa. Ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu. 
Leviticus19:26 “Lekani kudya nyama uku chiropa chili mwenemo. Lekani kuombedza, penu kuchita pyaufiti." 
Leviticus19:27 Lekani kujemera, penu kuchinga ndevu zanu." 
Leviticus19:28 Lekani kupicheka-cheka kusintili anyakufa, penu kupilemba nembo mwekha ene. Ine ndine MBUYA." 
Leviticus19:29 “Lekani lulupisa ananu achikazi pakuachitisa kukhala maputa; mungapichita, imwe munazungunukira kuna milungu inango, pontho dziko inadzala na pyakuzuda." 
Leviticus19:30 Koyani Nsiku Yakupuma, pontho lemedzani mbuto zimbapembedzwa ine. Ine ndine MBUYA." 
Leviticus19:31 “Lekani vunza nzeru kuna anyakuombedza na anyakukhumira. Mungapichita, munakhala anthu okhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu. Ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu." 
Leviticus19:32 “Godamani pamaso pa anyaimvi, pontho lemedzani akulu. Ndigopeni, ine ndine MBUYA." 
Leviticus19:33 “Lekani kuavuya alendo anakhala na imwe pabodzi m'dziko mwanu. 
Leviticus19:34 Achitireni pinthu ninga mukupichita kuna Aisraele anzanu, pontho afuneni ninga mumbapifunira imwe mwekha ene. Kumbukani kuti imwe nsiku inango mukhalimbo alendo m'dziko ya Iguputo. Ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu." 
Leviticus19:35 “Lekani phatisa basa mdida wakunama kuyeza nawo ulaphi, kulemera penu kuinjipa kwa chinthu." 
Leviticus19:36 Phatisani basa masikelo akuona, pontho na midida yakuona. Ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu, pontho ndidakubulusani ndine m'dziko ya Iguputo." 
Leviticus19:37 Verani mwambo wanga na matongero anga onsene. Ine ndine MBUYA.” 
Leviticus20:1 MBUYA adapanga Mose 
Leviticus20:2 kulonga kuna Aisraele mbati, “Munthu onsene pakati panupa, penu ndi mlendo wakukhala pakati panu, angapereka anache kuti aphatiswe basa pachipembedzo cha milungu Moleki, weneyo athema kuphiwa pakuponyerwa miyala na dzinza yonsene ya Israele." 
Leviticus20:3 Ngakhala munthu anapereka mwanache mbodzi kuna Moleki mbachitisa Chikhumbi changa chakuchenachi kukhala chakuswipa na kululupisa dzinanga yakuchenayi, ine ndinati ndimpase nkhodolo, pontho iye nkhabeve dzayeswa mbodzi wa anthu anga tayu." 
Leviticus20:4 Mbwenye ngakhala dzinza yonsene ya Israele inayang'ana kwene pinapereka munthu ule mwanache kuna Moleki, pontho mbakhonda kumponyera miyala," 
Leviticus20:5 ine ene ndekha ndinampasa nkhodolo munthuyo pabodzi na banjache yonsene, pontho pabodzi pene na anthu onsene ambamtewera kuchita pinthu pyokhonda khulupirika kuna ine pakupembedza Moleki ale. Anthu enewo ine nkhabe kuayesave ninga anthu anga tayu." 
Leviticus20:6 “Ngakhala munthu anavunza nzeru kuna anyakuombedza na anyakukhumira, ine ndinampasa nkhodolo, pontho ine nkhabeve dzamuyesa mbodzi wa anthu anga tayu." 
Leviticus20:7 Pikoyeni mwekha ene akuchena, thangwi ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu." 
Leviticus20:8 Verani mwambo wanga thangwi ine ndine MBUYA, pontho ine ndimbakuchitisani kukhala akuchena." 
Leviticus20:9 “Ngakhala munthu anatemberera babache na mache, weneyo athema kuphiwa; iye apiphesa yekha ene." 
Leviticus20:10 Ngakhala munthu achita uputa na mkazi wa Muisraele mnzache, onsene uwiriawo, mkazi na mamuna ene, athema kuphiwa." 
Leviticus20:11 Mamuna anagonana na mkazi babache alulupisa babache, natenepo onsene uwiriawo, mkazi na mamuna ene, athema kuphiwa; iwo apiphesa okha ene." 
Leviticus20:12 Ngakhala mamuna agonana na mkwenyache, onsene uwiriawo athema kuphiwa, thangwi pyachita iwopyo mphinthu pyakuzuda; iwo apiphesa okha ene." 
Leviticus20:13 Ngakhala mamuna agonana na mamuna mnzache, iwo achita pinthu pyakunyansa pyakwanga, natenepo onsene uwiriawo athema kuphiwa; iwo apiphesa okha ene." 
Leviticus20:14 Ngakhala mamuna anasemba mkazi pabodzi na mache mkazi ule, onsene utatuawo athema kuphiwa thangwi ya pinthu pyakuchitisa manyadzo pyachita iwopyo; pinthu ninga penepi pileke tawiriswa pakati panupa." 
Leviticus20:15 Ngakhala mamuna agonana na nyama, iye na nyamayo athema kuphiwa." 
Leviticus20:16 Ngakhala mkazi anapiyesera kugonana na nyama, iye na nyamayo athema kuphiwa; iwo apiphesa okha ene." 
Leviticus20:17 “Ngakhala munthu anasemba nyamaingache, penu nyamaingache wa bele inango, iwo alulupiswe pakwecha, pontho athamangiswe m'dzinza ya Israele. Iye agonana na nyamaingache, natenepo iye athema kuoneswa nyatwa." 
Leviticus20:18 Ngakhala mamuna agonana na mkazi pandzidzi wache wakumwezi, onsene uwiriawo athamangiswe m'dzinzamo, thangwi aswa mwambo wakulonga pya kukhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Leviticus20:19 “Ngakhala mamuna agonana na mkazi mbaleache mache, penu nyamaingache babache, weneyo na mkaziyo aoneswe nyatwa thangwi ya kugonana ubaleawo okhokha." 
Leviticus20:20 Ngakhala mamuna anagonana na mkazi mbaleache babache, mamunayo alulupisa mbaleache babache, natenepo mamuna na mkaziyo anati apagali pyachita iwopyo; nkhabe mbodzi wa iwo anakhala na mwana tayu." 
Leviticus20:21 Ngakhala mamuna anasemba mkazi mbaleache, uwiriawo onsene anakhala akusowa mwana. Mamunayo achita chinthu chokhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu, pontho alulupisa mbaleache.”" 
Leviticus20:22 MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Koyani mwambo na matongero anga onsene, towera muleke tapikwa na dziko ya Kanani kunakuendesani ineku." 
Leviticus20:23 Lekani tsanzira mitemo ya madzinza anakhala mwenemo; ine ndikuathamangisamo towera mukapite m'dzikomo. Ine ndanyansirwa nawo thangwi ya makhaliro awo akuipa. 
Leviticus20:24 Mbwenye ine ndidadumbira kuti ndinakupasani dziko yamphonje kuti ikhale yanu ene, natenepo ndinati ndiipereke kuna imwe. Ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu, pontho ndakupambulani pakati pa madzinza anango." 
Leviticus20:25 Natenepo mwathema kusiyanisa mwadidi pakati pa nyama na mbalame zakuchena na zokhonda chena. Lekani kudya nyama penu mbalame zokhonda chena. Ine ndazilonga kuti nsokhonda chena, tenepo mungazidya zinakuchitisani kukhala okhonda chena." 
Leviticus20:26 Imwe munakhala akuchena, pontho munakhala anthu anga ene, thangwi ine ndine MBUYA, pontho ndine wakuchena. Ine ndakupambulani pakati pa madzinza anango, towera mukhale anga ene." 
Leviticus20:27 “Mamuna penu mkazi wakukhumira athema kuphiwa pakuponyerwa miyala; munthu onsene wakuchita penepi apiphesa yekha ene.” 
Leviticus21:1 MBUYA adapanga Mose kulonga kuna anyansembe, ana a Aroni, kuti, “Nyansembe mbaleke kupichitisa yekha ene munthu okhonda chena pakukwata nawo khundu pa mwambo wa maliro mbaleache angafa," 
Leviticus21:2 mbwenye angakhala mbaleache chadi-chadi ninga mache, babache, mwanache wamamuna, mwanache wamkazi, mbaleache wa mimba ibodzi ene," 
Leviticus21:3 penu nyamaingache okhonda sembwa wakukhala naye pabodzi m'nyumba mwachemo. 
Leviticus21:4 Iye mbaleke kupichitisa yekha ene kukhala okhonda chena thangwi ya imfa ya abale ache akusemberana nawo. 
Leviticus21:5 “Nyansembe mbaleke kuchinga tsisi yache, penu kuchinga ndevu zache, penu kupicheka-cheka m'manungo mwache kuonesa kusintili." 
Leviticus21:6 Iye athema kukhala wakupambulika kuna Mulungu wache, pontho aleke lulupisa dzina ya Mulungu wache. Na thangwi yakuti iye ambapereka nsembe yakusasanywa na moto kuna MBUYA, pyakudya pya Mulungu wache, iye athema kukhala wakuchena." 
Leviticus21:7 Nyansembe mbaleke semba puta, penu mkazi wakudziwa kale mamuna, penu wakulekana na mamunache, thangwi iye ngwakupambulika kuna Mulungu wache." 
Leviticus21:8 Anthu athema kuyesa nyansembe munthu wakuchena, thangwi iye ambapereka nsembe zakudya kuna ine. Ine ndine MBUYA; ine ndine wakuchena pontho ndimbachitisa anthu anga kukhala akuchena." 
Leviticus21:9 Ngakhala mwana wamkazi wa nyansembe asanduka puta, mwanayo achitisa babache manyadzo; natenepo iye athema kuphiwa na moto." 
Leviticus21:10 “Nyansembe Wamkulu achita kudzozwa pakuchita kukhuthulira mafuta mumsolo, pontho iye apambulwa kuti avale nguwo za unyansembe, natenepo mbaleke siya kwene tsisi tundulu, penu kung'amba nguwo zache kuonesa kusintili." 
Leviticus21:11 Iye aperekwa kuna ine natenepo iye nkhabe kupichitisa yekha ene okhonda chena, penu kuswipisa nyumbanga yakuchena tayu pakuisiya mbakapita m'nyumba muna munthu wakufa mule, podi akhale kwene babache penu mache." 
Leviticus21:12  
Leviticus21:13 Iye athema kusemba mkazi okhonda dziwa mamuna; 
Leviticus21:14 mbaleke semba mamfelwa, mkazi wakulekana na mamunache penu puta. Iye mbasembe mkazi okhonda dziwa mamuna wa dzinzache," 
Leviticus21:15 gopesera kuti anache, ale athema kukhala akuchena, anakhala okhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu. Ine ndine MBUYA, pontho ndampambula iye kuti akhale Nyansembe Wamkulu.”" 
Leviticus21:16 MBUYA adapanga Mose 
Leviticus21:17 kulonga kuna Aroni kuti: “Nkhabe mbodzi wa pidzukulu pyako wakukhala na chilema athema kudza na nsembe yakusasanywa na moto pamaso panga. Penepi pichitike podi na mifendu inadzayo. 
Leviticus21:18 Munthu wakukhala na chilema mbaleke pereka nsembe; nee boli-boli, nyamfutete, nyakulamala, penu nyakupenaliki;" 
Leviticus21:19 nee munthu wakulamala dzanja penu dzinyalo; 
Leviticus21:20 nee nyanthuku penu kavira mphindo tayu, nee munthu wakukhala na utenda wa maso penu wa pamanungo pache tayu; pontho nee nyakukapalwi tayu." 
Leviticus21:21 Nkhabe mbodzi wa pidzukulu pya Aroni nyansembe wakukhala na chilema apereke nsembe zakusasanywa na moto kuna ine tayu. Iye ana chilema, tenepo hadatheme kudza chifupi na guwa yansembe dzapereka pyakudya pya Mulungu wache tayu." 
Leviticus21:22 Kwache munthu ninga weneyo anakwanisa kudya pyakudya pyakuperekwa kuna Mulungu wache, pyakudya pyakuchena pontho na pyakudya pyakuchenesesa." 
Leviticus21:23 Mbwenye na thangwi yakuti iye ana chilema mbaleke fika chifupi na chinguwo chakupambulika cha Chikhumbi penu kufedzera kuguwa yansembe. Iye mbaleke swipisa pinthu pyakuchenapi, thangwi ine ndine MBUYA, pontho ndimbapichitisa pinthupyo kuti pikhale pyakuchena.”" 
Leviticus21:24 Penepi ndiye pidalonga Mose kuna Aroni nyansembe na anache ene pontho na kuna Aisraele onsene. 
Leviticus22:1 MBUYA adapanga Mose 
Leviticus22:2 kulonga kuna Aroni na anache kuti, “Mwathema kulemedza pyakupereka pyakuchena pimbapambulira Aisraele kuna ine, towera muleke lulupisa dzinanga yakuchena. Ine ndine MBUYA." 
Leviticus22:3 Ngakhala mbodzi wa pidzukulu pyako afedzera chifupi na pyakupereka pyakuchena pimbapambulira Aisraele kuna ine uku ngokhonda chena pamaso panga, weneyo nkhabe kwanisave kutumikira paguwa yansembe tayu. Penepi pyathema kuchitika mifendu yonsene inadzayo. Ine ndine MBUYA." 
Leviticus22:4 “Ngakhala mbodzi wa pidzukulu pya Aroni ana utenda wa pamanungo penu kubuluka mafinya, weneyo mbaleke kudya pyakupereka pyakupambulika mpakana munthuyo akhale wakuchena pamaso panga. Nyansembe onsene ngokhonda chena ngakhala anakhuya chinthu chokhonda chena ninga mtembo, penu ngakhala anabuluka umuna," 
Leviticus22:5 penu ngakhala aphata nyama, penu munthu okhonda chena, podi kukhonda chenako kukhale pyako kwa mtundu wanji." 
Leviticus22:6 Nyansembe onsene angasanduka okhonda chena ambakhala okhonda chena basi mpakana mawulo, pontho angamala penepo mbaleke kudya na chinthu chene cha pyakupereka pyakupambulika mpakana asambe." 
Leviticus22:7 Kubuluka penepo dzuwa ingadoka, iye asanduka wakuchena, natenepo anakwanisa kudya pyakupereka pyakupambulika, ile ndi phoso yache." 
Leviticus22:8 Iye mbaleke kudya nyama yakufa yokha, penu yakuchita kuphiwa na nyama zam'tsanga; penepi pinamchitisa kukhala munthu okhonda chena. Ine ndine MBUYA." 
Leviticus22:9 “Anyansembe onsene athema kukoya mwambo onsene waapasa ine, gopesera iwo anadawa mbafa thangwi ya kululupisa mwambo wanga. Ine ndine MBUYA, pontho ine ndimbaachitisa kukhala akuchena." 
Leviticus22:10 “Munthu ene wa m'banja ya unyansembe anakwanisa kudya pyakupereka pyakupambulika; munthu ene pyache aleke kudya, podi na munthu ene wakukhala naye pabodzi nyansembeyo penu nyaganyo wache." 
Leviticus22:11 Mbwenye bitchu wa nyansembeyo wakuchita kugula na kobiri zache zene penu wakubalwa m'nyumba mwachemo anakwanisa kudya phoso imbatambira nyansembeyo. 
Leviticus22:12 Mwana wa nyansembe wamkazi angasembwa na mamuna okhonda khala nyansembe, mwana mkaziyo mbaleke kudya pyakupereka pyakupambulika." 
Leviticus22:13 Mbwenye mamfelwa penu mwanache wamkazi wakulekana na mamunache wakusowa ana angabwerera kuna babache nyansembe kuti akhale naye m'nyumba mwache ninga wakudyeswa, weneyo anakwanisa kudya phoso imbatambira babache ninga nyansembe. Munthu wakubalwa m'banja ya unyansembe ndiye anakwanisa kudya pyakuperekapi." 
Leviticus22:14 “Ngakhala munthu ene pyache okhonda balwa m'banja ya unyansembe anadya pyakupereka pyakupambulika mwasusudewu, iye athema kupagali kontache yakufunikayo, pontho athimizepo chachishanu cha kontache." 
Leviticus22:15 Anyansembe mbaleke lulupisa pyakupereka pyakupambulika pimbapereka Aisraele kuna MBUYA 
Leviticus22:16 pakutawirisa anthu ene pyawo kudya nawo pyakuperekapyo; penepi pinadzesa kudawa na kutchunyuswa pana munthu ninga weneyo. Ine ndine MBUYA, pontho ine ndimbachitisa kuti pyakupereka pikhale pyakupambulika.”" 
Leviticus22:17 MBUYA adapanga Mose 
Leviticus22:18 kulonga kuna Aroni na anache pontho na Aisraele onsene kuti, “Ngakhala mbodzi wa Aisraele penu mlendo wakukhala pakati pawo anadza na mtukwa kuti ukhale nsembe yakupyerera, penu nkhufuna kuchitisa kudumbira kudachita iye kukwana-kwana, penu nkhupereka na kufuna kwache, nyamayo mbileke khala na chilema." 
Leviticus22:19 Kuti nsembeyo itambirwe, nyamayo yathema kukhala ng'ombe, bira penu mbuzi yakusowa chilema." 
Leviticus22:20 Mungapereka nyama yakukhala na chilema MBUYA nkhabe kuitambira tayu. 
Leviticus22:21 Ngakhala munthu anapereka nsembe yachiphatizano kuna MBUYA penu nkhufuna kuchitisa kudumbira kudachita iye kukwana-kwana, penu nkhupereka na kufuna kwache, nyamayo ikhale yakusowa chilema ngakhala munafuna kuti itambirwe." 
Leviticus22:22 Lekani pereka kuna MBUYA nyama yakusweka diso, penu yakukuwazika, penu yakulamala miyendo, penu yakukhala na chironda chakuchucha mafinya, ya chikulukuta, penu chikhokho cha pachironda. Lekani pereka nyama ninga yeneyo paguwa yansembe kuti ikhale nsembe yakusasanywa na moto kuna MBUYA." 
Leviticus22:23 Ngakhala nkhufuna kwache, munthu anakwanisa kupereka nyama yokhonda balwa mwadidi, penu yakungungumira, mbwenye yeneyi njokhonda tawiriswa ngakhala nsembe yache nkhufuna kuchitisa kuti kudumbira kudachita iye kukwane-kwane." 
Leviticus22:24 Lekani pereka kuna MBUYA nyama yakuti kumaso kwache kwakuvandika, kwapeyeka, kwachita kukhwadzulwa, penu kwatemeka. Penepi mphyokhonda tawiriswa m'dziko mwanu." 
Leviticus22:25 “Lekani pereka ninga nsembe yakusasanywa na moto kuna MBUYA nyama yakukwatwa kubulukira kuna alendo. Nyama zenezo nkhabe tambirwa m'mbuto mwanu, thangwi zimbayeswa ninga zakupenaliki pontho za chilema." 
Leviticus22:26 “Ngakhala mwanamphulu, mwanabira, penu mwanambuzi abalwa, nkhabe kumbulusa pana mache tayu kufikirana nsiku zinomwe. Nsiku zenezo zingamala anakwanisa kutawiriswa kukhala nsembe yakusasanywa na moto kuna MBUYA." 
Leviticus22:27  
Leviticus22:28 Lekani kupereka nsembe ng'ombe na mwanache ene, bira na mwanache ene, penu mbuzi na mwanache ene pansiku ibodzi ene." 
Leviticus22:29 Mungapereka nsembe yakupereka takhuta kuna MBUYA, tewezani mwambo wache towera itambirwe m'mbuto mwanu." 
Leviticus22:30 Nsembe yathema kudyiwa nsiku yonthoyo, pontho lekani kusiya na pang'ono pene kuti ifike mangwana mwache. Ine ndine MBUYA.”" 
Leviticus22:31 MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Verani matongero anga. Ine ndine MBUYA." 
Leviticus22:32 Lekani lulupisa dzinanga yakuchena; Aisraele onsene athema kudziwa kuti ine ndine wakuchena. Ine ndine MBUYA, pontho ndimbakuchitisani kukhala akuchena;" 
Leviticus22:33 pontho ndidakubulusani m'dziko ya Iguputo kuti ndikhale Mulungu wanu. Ine ndine MBUYA.” 
Leviticus23:1 MBUYA adapanga Mose 
Leviticus23:2 kulonga kuna Aisraele kuti: Enewa ndi maphwando akusankhulika a MBUYA, pontho imwe mwathema kualonga kuti ndi migumano yakupambulika:" 
Leviticus23:3 Muna nsiku zitanthatu zakuphata basa, mbwenye kumbukani kuti nsiku yachinomwe ndi Nsiku Yakupuma. Pansiku yeneyo lekani phata basa, mbwenye gumanyikanani kupembedza basi. Nsiku Yakupuma nja MBUYA, podi na konsene kunakhala imwe." 
Leviticus23:4 Lalika pya maphwando akusankhulika a MBUYA kuti achitike pandzidzi wakusankhulika. 
Leviticus23:5 Phwando ya Paska yakulemedza nayo MBUYA imbatoma pinathobila dzuwa pansiku yakhumi na chinayi ya mwezi wakutoma wa chaka. 
Leviticus23:6 Pansiku yakhumi na chishanu Phwando ya Mikate yakusowa Chakufufumisira imbatoma, natenepo nsiku zinomwe lekani kudya mkate wakukhala na chakufufumisira." 
Leviticus23:7 Pansiku yakutoma ya nsiku zenezi mwathema kugumanyikana kuti mupembedze, pontho lekani phata mabasanu a nsiku na nsiku." 
Leviticus23:8 Perekani nsembe zakusasanywa na moto kuna MBUYA nsiku zinomwe. Pansiku yachinomwe mwathema kugumanyikana kuti mupembedze, mbwenye lekani phata mabasanu a nsiku na nsiku." 
Leviticus23:9 Mungafika m'dziko inafuna kukupasani MBUYA mbamukavuna phoso yanu, kwatani mitolo ya mbewu zakutoma tokotazo kwenda nazo kuna nyansembe." 
Leviticus23:10  
Leviticus23:11 Nyansembeyo anaipereka kuna MBUYA ninga chakupereka chakupambulika, towera itambirwe m'mbuto mwanu. Nyansembe aipereke kuna MBUYA mangwana mwache Nsiku Yakupuma ingagwanda." 
Leviticus23:12 Pansiku inapereka imwe mbewu zanu ninga chakupereka, muphe pontho mwanabira wamamuna wakukwana chaka chibodzi, pontho wakusowa chilema ninga nsembe yakupyerera." 
Leviticus23:13 Pabodzi pene na nyamayo mupereke ufa pang'ono wakuvungazwa mafuta aolivi ninga nsembe yakusasanywa na moto kuna MBUYA. Khwema ya nsembe yeneyi imbamkomera MBUYA. Mupereke pontho pabodzi na penepi chakupereka cha vinyu wakudzala buyawu ibodzi. 
Leviticus23:14 Lekani kudya na chibodzi chene cha phoso yachinchino penu ntchiwisi penu ntchakuotcha penu mkate wache mbamudzati pereka nsembe yeneyi kuna Mulungu wanu. Mwambo wenewu wathema kukoyiwa na pidzukulu pyanu pyonsene mifendu yonsene inadzayo. 
Leviticus23:15 Lengesani madimingu amumphu manomwe kutomera kumala kwa Nsiku zinomwe Zakupuma, nsiku imbadza imwe na mphunja ya pyakuvuna pyanu dzapereka kuna MBUYA." 
Leviticus23:16 Lengesani nsiku makumashanu mpakana kumala kwa Nsiku zinomwe Zakupuma. Tenepo perekani kuna MBUYA mapira ninga chakupereka chitswa. 
Leviticus23:17 Banja yonsene yathema kudza na mikate miwiri kuipereka kuna MBUYA ninga mtukwa wakupambulika. Mikate yonsene isasanywe na ufa wakulemera makilogramu mawiri yakuphikwa mwakuvungazwa na chakufufumisira mkate, natenepo iperekwe kuna MBUYA ninga chakupereka cha pyakuvuna pyakutoma kutokota." 
Leviticus23:18 Natenepo pabodzi pene na mikate ile, dzinza yonsene ipereke mabira manomwe akukwana chaka chibodzi, ng'ombe imuna ibodzi, na mabira amuna awiri, onsenewa mbaleke khala na chilema. Pyonsenepyo pinaperekwa ninga nsembe yakupyerera pabodzi pene na chakupereka cha mapira, pontho na chakupereka cha vinyu. Khwemache imbamkomera MBUYA." 
Leviticus23:19 Pontho mupereke bokho mbodzi ninga nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa, pontho na mabira amuna awiri a chaka chibodzi ninga nsembe yachiphatizano." 
Leviticus23:20 Nyansembe anapereka mikate na mabira mawiri ale ninga mtukwa wakupambulika kuna MBUYA kuti pikhale pya anyansembe. Pyakupereka penepi mphyakupambulika. 
Leviticus23:21 Pansiku yeneyo lekani dzaphata mabasanu a nsiku na nsiku, mbwenye gumanyikanani kuti mupembedze. Pidzukulu pyanu pikoye mwambo onsene mifendu yonsene inadzayo konsene kunakhala iwo." 
Leviticus23:22 Mungavuna mbewu zanu lekani kufikiratu m'madire a mundanu, pontho lekani bwererako kaphalakatira; penepyo mupilekere anyakutcherenga na alendo. Ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu." 
Leviticus23:23 Nsiku yakutoma ya mwezi wachinomwe yathema kukhala nsiku yakupuma yakupambulika, pontho mwathema kugumanyikana pabodzi mungava kulira kwa ngoma." 
Leviticus23:24  
Leviticus23:25 Perekani nsembe yakusasanywa na moto kuna MBUYA, pontho lekani phata mabasanu a nsiku na nsiku." 
Leviticus23:26 Nsiku yachikhumi ya mwezi wachinomwe ndi nsiku yakuchita mwambo wakupichenesa kubulusa pyakudawa pya anthu. Pansiku yeneyo lekani kudya chinthu na chibodzi chene. Gumanyikanani pabodzi kuti mupembedze, pontho perekani kuna MBUYA nsembe yakusasanywa na moto." 
Leviticus23:27  
Leviticus23:28 Nsiku yeneyo lekani dzaphata basa thangwi ndi nsiku yakuchita mwambo wakupichenesa kubulusa pyakudawa. 
Leviticus23:29 Munthu anadya kwene chinthu pansiku yeneyo hanayeswave mbodzi wa anthu a Mulungu tayu. 
Leviticus23:30 Ngakhala munthu aphata basa pansiku yeneyo, MBUYA yekha ene anampha munthu weneyu." 
Leviticus23:31 Mwambo wenewu ukulonga kuna pidzukulu pyanu pene konsene kunakhala iwoko. 
Leviticus23:32 Kutomera kuthobila kwa dzuwa pansiku yachifemba ya mwezi kufikirana kuthobila kwa dzuwa pansiku yachikhumi mukoye nsiku yeneyi ninga nsiku yakupambulika yakupuma, pontho nkhabe kudya chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu." 
Leviticus23:33 Phwando ya Misasa yathema kutoma pansiku yakhumi na chishanu ya mwezi wachinomwe, tenepo ithimize mpakana nsiku zinomwe." 
Leviticus23:34  
Leviticus23:35 Pansiku yakutoma ya nsiku zenezi gumanyikanani pabodzi kuti mupembedze, pontho lekani phata mabasanu a nsiku na nsiku." 
Leviticus23:36 Nsiku zonsene pansiku zinomwezi mupereke kuna MBUYA nsembe zakusasanywa na moto. Pansiku yachisere gumanyikanani pabodzi pontho kuti mupembedze, pontho perekani kuna MBUYA nsembe zakusasanywa na moto. Yeneyi ndi nsiku yakupembedza natenepo lekani phata mabasanu a nsiku na nsiku." 
Leviticus23:37 (Enewa ndi maphwando akusankhulika a MBUYA, ale athema imwe kualonga kuti ndi migumano yakupambulika, towera mupereke nsembe zakusasanywa na moto kuna MBUYA, nsembe zakupyerera, pyakupereka pya mapira, nsembe, na pyakupereka pya vinyu ninga munafunirwa ipyo nsiku na nsiku." 
Leviticus23:38 Maphwando enewa mwathema kuathimizira pa Nsiku Zakupuma dimingu na dimingu, pontho pyakupereka penepi mupithimizire pa mitukwa imbapereka imwe ile. Pyakupereka pyanu pyakuchitisa kuti kudumbira kudachita imwe pikwane-kwane, pyakupereka pimbapereka imwe kuna MBUYA na kufuna kwanu.)" 
Leviticus23:39 Mungavuna mbewu zanu, sekerani phwando yeneyi nsiku zinomwe, kutomera pansiku yakhumi na chishanu ya mwezi wachinomwe. Nsiku yakutomayo inakhala nsiku yakupuma yakupambulika." 
Leviticus23:40 Pansiku yeneyo kwatani nsapo zadidiletu pang'ono kubulukira m'miti mwanu, kwatani matsamvu amdikhwa na matsamvu a mikotamu, kubuluka penepo tomani phwando yanu ya chipembedzo kulemedza MBUYA Mulungu wanu." 
Leviticus23:41 Sekerani phwando yeneyi nsiku zinomwe. Mwambo wenewu wathema kutewezwa na pidzukulu pyanu pyene mpakana mifendu yonsene inadzayo. 
Leviticus23:42 Aisraele onsene anakhala m'misasa nsiku zinomwe," 
Leviticus23:43 towera pidzukulu pyanu pidziwe kuti MBUYA adaachitisa Aisraele kukhala m'misasa pikhaabulusa iye m'dziko ya Iguputo. Iye ndi MBUYA Mulungu wanu. 
Leviticus23:44 Natenepo na njira yeneyi Mose adapereka kuna Aisraele mwambo wakukoya nawo maphwando akusankhulika a MBUYA. 
Leviticus24:1 MBUYA adapanga Mose 
Leviticus24:2 kulonga kuna Aisraele kuti: Dzani na mafuta adidi aolivi kuti aikhwe m'nyale m' Chikhumbi cha Mulungu towera nyale zigake nsiku zonsene. 
Leviticus24:3 Mawulo onsene Aroni mbazigase mbaleke kuzithimisa mpakana mangwana mwache na machibese pamaso pa MBUYA kunja kwa chinguwo chakutchinga nacho Bokosi ya Chiverano. Mwambo wenewu wathema kutewezwa mpakana mifendu yonsene inadzayo. 
Leviticus24:4 Aroni ayang'anire mwadidi nyale zenezi pachakuikhirapo nyale chagolidi chadi-chadi, pontho athema kuonesesa kuti nyale zikugaka ndzidzi onsene pamaso pa MBUYA." 
Leviticus24:5 Kwatani ufa wakulemera makilogramu khumi na awiri mbamuphika mikate khumi na miwiri. 
Leviticus24:6 Ikhani mikateyo m'mizera miwiri, mzera ubodzi ukhale na mikate mitanthatu pathebulu yakukukutizwa na golidi chadi-chadi, ile ili pamaso pa MBUYA." 
Leviticus24:7 Ikhani pyakufukiza pyakununkhira chadi-chadi m'mizera yonsene ninga chidzindikiro cha nsembe yakusasanywa na moto kuna MBUYA m'mbuto mwa mikate. 
Leviticus24:8 Nsiku zonsene Zakupuma mikate yathema kuikhwa pamaso pa MBUYA mpakana mifendu yonsene inadzayo. Yeneyi ndiye basa ya Aisraele kwenda na kwenda. 
Leviticus24:9 Mikateyo nja Aroni na anache na pidzukulu pyache, pontho athema kuidyera m'mbuto yakupambulika, thangwi yeneyi ndi khundu yakuchena pyakwanga ya nsembe yakusasanywa na moto yakuperekwa kuna MBUYA kuti ikhale ya anyansembe." 
Leviticus24:10 Pakhali mamuna unango, ule babache akhali Muiguputo, mbwenye mache akhali Muisraele. Dzinache macheyo ikhali Shelomiti, mwana wamkazi wa Dibri wa dzinza ya Dani. Munthu weneyu mumsasa mule adasosana na Muisraele. Ndzidzi ukhathimbana iwo, iye adatemberera Mulungu, natenepo anthu adamuendesa kuna Mose." 
Leviticus24:11  
Leviticus24:12 Iwo adamulondali mwadidi gopesera anathawa kudikhira kuti MBUYA aapange pyakuchita naye munthu weneyu. 
Leviticus24:13 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Leviticus24:14 “Mkwate munthuyi uende kunja kwa msasa. Munthu onsene adava kudembetera kudachita iyeyo asanjike manjache pamsolo pa munthuyi kuchitira umboni kuti iye adawadi, tenepo dzinza yonsene imponyere miyala kuti afe." 
Leviticus24:15 Uapange Aisraele kuti munthu onsene anatemberera Mulungu wache athema kuoneswa nyatwa," 
Leviticus24:16 pontho kuphiwa. Munthu onsene penu ndi Muisraele penu mlendo wakukhala mu Israele, anatemberera MBUYA anaponyerwa miyala na anthu onsene kuti afe." 
Leviticus24:17 “Munthu onsene wakupha mwanzache athema kuphiwambo," 
Leviticus24:18 pontho munthu onsene wakupha chifuyo cha munthu unango athema kuchibwezera chinthu chenecho. Njirache njakuti moyo kupagali moyo. 
Leviticus24:19 “Ngakhala munthu anakuwaza mwanzache, pyonsene pyachita iye kuna mwanzache pichitikembo kuna iye." 
Leviticus24:20 Ngakhala aswa gogodo ya mwanzache, gogodo yache inaswiwambo; ngakhala anaswa mwanzache diso, diso yache inaswiwambo; ngakhala anakhutcha mwanzache dzino, dzino yache inakhutchambo. Chonsene chinakuwaza iye mwanzacheyo, iye anakuwaziwambo chonthocho kumbwezera." 
Leviticus24:21 Munthu angapha nyama, aibweze, mbwenye munthu angapha mwanzache, aphiwembo." 
Leviticus24:22 Mwambo wenewu ukulonga kuna imwe Aisraele na alendo ene akukhala pakati panu, thangwi ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu.”" 
Leviticus24:23 Pidalonga Mose penepi kuna Aisraele, iwo adenda na munthu wakutemberera ule kunja kwa msasa mbamponyera miyala mbafa. Na njira yeneyi Aisraele adachita pidalonga MBUYA kuna Mose." 
Leviticus25:1 MBUYA adapanga Mose paphiri ya Sinai 
Leviticus25:2 kulonga kuna Aisraele kuti: Mungapita m'dziko inafuna kukupasani MBUYA, mukamulemedze MBUYA pakukhonda kulima mindanu chaka chachinomwe chonsene." 
Leviticus25:3 Pyaka pitanthatu munakwanisa kabzala mindanu, kasadzulira mindanu yamfesa, na kugumanyisa phoso yanu." 
Leviticus25:4 Mbwenye chaka chachinomwe, chaka chakupambulika kuna MBUYA, chikhale chaka chakupuma monsene mwene kuna munda. Lekani kabzala mbewu m'minda mwanu penu kusadzulira mindanu yamfesa." 
Leviticus25:5 Lekani kavuna magoko, pontho lekani katchola mfesa zokhonda sadzulira; chenechi ntchaka chakupuma monsene mwene kuna dziko." 
Leviticus25:6 Podi kwene kuti minda nee yalimwa chaka chenechobi, inapereka phoso basi yakuti imwe, pidzukulu pyanu, mabitchu, anyaganyo, alendo akukhala pakati panu," 
Leviticus25:7 pifuyo pyanu na nyama zam'tsanga m'minda mwanu munakwanisa kudya. Chonsene chinabala mwenemo chinakwanisa kudyiwa. 
Leviticus25:8 Lengesani kanomwe pyaka pinomwe, pyonsene kuvungaza ndi pyaka makumanayi na pifemba." 
Leviticus25:9 Tenepo pansiku yachikhumi ya mwezi wachinomwe, Nsiku yakupereka nsembe zakulekerera pyakudawa, tumani munthu kuti alize ngoma m'dziko monsene." 
Leviticus25:10 Na njira yeneyi chaka cha makumashanu chikhale chakupambulika, pontho mulalike ufulu kuna onsene akukhala m'dzikomo. Pandzidzi wa chaka chenechi chinthu chonsene chakuguliswa chibwezerwe kuna mwenechiroache wakutomayo, penu kuna pidzukulu pyache, pontho munthu wakuguliswa kukhala bitchu, abwezerwe kubanja kwache." 
Leviticus25:11 Lekani bzala mbewu m'minda mwanu, penu kuvuna magoko, penu kutchola nsapo yokhonda sadzulirwa." 
Leviticus25:12 Chaka chamumphu chikhale chakupambulika kuna imwe. Chinafuna kudya imwe ntchenecho chene chakumera chokha m'minda mwanu basi. 
Leviticus25:13 Chaka chenechi pyonsene pya munthu pyakuguliswa pinabwezerwa kuna mwenechiroache wakutomayo. 
Leviticus25:14 Natenepo mungagulisa munda kuna Muisraele mnzanu penu kugula munda kubulukira kuna iye, lekani dyerana nkope-kope." 
Leviticus25:15 Kontache ikhale yakuthemerana na pyaka pinafuna kulima munthu mbachidzati fika chaka chakubwezera. 
Leviticus25:16 Ngakhala pasala pyaka pizinji, kontache ikhale yakudula, mbwenye ngakhala kwasala pyaka pyakuchepa, kontache ikhale yakuchepa, thangwi chinaguliswacho ndi phoso inabuluka m'mundamo." 
Leviticus25:17 Lekani kudyera nkope-kope Muisraele mnzanu, mbwenye gopani MBUYA Mulungu wanu." 
Leviticus25:18 Verani mwambo na matongero a MBUYA, towera mukhale mwakutchinjirizwa m'dziko." 
Leviticus25:19 Dziko inabala phoso yache, tenepo munakhala napyo pyonsene pinafuna imwe kudya, pontho munakhala mwakutchinjirizwa." 
Leviticus25:20 Mbwenye unango anakwanisa kuvunza kuti apo chaka chachinomwe chinafuna ife kudya ninji podi kubzala mbewu m'minda mwathu nee tidabzala tayu, pontho nkhabe kugumanya phoso yathu?" 
Leviticus25:21 M'chaka chachitanthatu MBUYA anatsanzayisa dziko towera iphe phoso yakukwana pyaka pitatu. 
Leviticus25:22 Mungabzala chaka chachiserechi munathimiza basi kudya phoso yanu yonthoyo idavuna imwe chaka chachitanthatu ile. Phoso munakhala nayo yakukwana mpakana mbewu zidabzala imwe zitokote. 
Leviticus25:23 Nkhabe mbuto yathema kuguliswa kuna munthu kuti ikhale yacheletu tayu, thangwi imwembo si yanu tayu, nja Mulungu, natenepo imwe mwakhala ninga alendo pontho anyantchoche anga." 
Leviticus25:24 Ngakhala mbuto inaguliswa, mwenechiro mbutoyo athema kukhala na utongi wakuiombola." 
Leviticus25:25 Ngakhala Muisraele asanduka nyakutcherenga, pontho akukhakhamizwa kuti agulise mbuto yache, mbaleache munthuyo wakukhala naye chifupi aombole mbutoyo." 
Leviticus25:26 Ngakhala munthu nkhabe mbaleache wakuombola mbutoyo, nsiku zinango anakwanisa kukhala nyakufuma mbakhala na kobiri zakukwana kuombola nazo mbuto yache ile yekha ene." 
Leviticus25:27 Papinthu ninga penepi iye athema kumpagali munthu adaigula ule na konta yakuthemerana na pyaka pyasalira mbachidzati fika chaka chakumbwezera; kubuluka penepo iye anakwanisa kuikwata mbuto yacheyo. 
Leviticus25:28 Mbwenye ngakhala iye nkhabe kobiri zakukwana kuombola nazo mbuto yache, mbutoyo ithimize kukhala m'manja mwa munthu adaigula ule mpakana chaka chakubwezera. Chaka chenecho mbutoyo inabwezerwa kuna mwenechiroache wakutoma ule." 
Leviticus25:29 Ngakhala munthu anagulisa nyumbache m'bwalo mwa mpanda wa mzinda, iye ali nawo utongi wakuombola nyumbache pandzidzi wa chaka chakutoma, kutomera nsiku idaguliswa nyumbayo." 
Leviticus25:30 Mbwenye ngakhala iye hanaiombola tayu, pandzidzi wenewu wa chaka chakutoma basi ataya mwayi wakuombola nyumbacheyo, natenepo nyumbayo inakhaliratu yache munthu idaigula ule pabodzi na pidzukulu pyache; chaka chakubwezera nyumbayo hinabwezerwave kuna mwenechiro wakutoma ule tayu." 
Leviticus25:31 Mbwenye nyumba za midzi yokhonda zungulirwa na mpanda zathema kuyeswa ninga minda; mwenechiro wakutoma ana utongi wakuombola nyumbacheyo, pontho chingafika chaka chakubwezera, nyumbayo ipaswe mwenechiroache." 
Leviticus25:32 Kwache ana a Levi ana utongi wakuombola pinthu pyawo pidapaswa iwo mizinda yawo pandzidzi onsene unafuna iwo. 
Leviticus25:33 Ngakhala ibodzi mwa nyumba za Alevi ya m'mizinda yeneyi yaguliswa na mwenechiroache, pontho nee ikuombola tayu, yathema kubwezerwa m'manja mwa mwenechiro chaka chakubwezera, thangwi nyumba zinakhala Alevi m'mizinda mwawo pakati pa Aisraele nsawo zene." 
Leviticus25:34 Mbwenye mbuto ya mpovu yakuzungulira mizinda ya Alevi mbileke kuguliswa, yeneyo ndi mbuto yawo ene kwenda na kwenda." 
Leviticus25:35 Ngakhala Muisraele mnzako wakukhala chifupi na imwe asanduka nyakutcherenga mwakuti nkhabe kwanisa kupiphedza yekha ene, imwe mwathema kumpasa pinthu pinasowa iye ninga mumbachitira imwe na nyaganyo, towera iye athimize kukhala na imwe chifupi." 
Leviticus25:36 Lekani kumpanga kuti apagali na kuthimizirapo kobiri zinango zapapezi, mbwenye gopani Mulungu wanu, pontho mtawiriseni Muisraele mnzako kukhala chifupi na imwe." 
Leviticus25:37 Lekani kumpagalisa kobiri zinango zapapezi kupambula zidamfiyalisa imwe zile, pontho lekani kuganyali na phoso inamgulisa imwe." 
Leviticus25:38 Ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu, adakubulusani m'dziko ya Iguputo ule, towera akupaseni dziko ya Kanani, pontho kuti ndikhale Mulungu wanu." 
Leviticus25:39 Ngakhala Muisraele mnzanu wakukhala chifupi naye atcherengeratu mwakuti apigulisa yekha ene kuna imwe ninga bitchu, lekani kumphatisa basa ninga bitchu." 
Leviticus25:40 Iye athema kukhala pabodzi na imwe m'nyumba mwanu ninga nyaganyo; iye anakuphatirani basa mpakana chaka chakubwezera. 
Leviticus25:41 Pandzidzi wenewu iye na anache athema kusudzulwa mbabwerera kumusa kwawo na kuna pinthu pya makolo awo. 
Leviticus25:42 Aisraele ndi mabitchu a MBUYA, pontho adaabulusa ndiye m'dziko ya Iguputo; natenepo iwo mbaleke guliswa ninga mabitchu." 
Leviticus25:43 Lekani kuachitira vinga, mbwenye gopani Mulungu wanu." 
Leviticus25:44 Ngakhala munafuna mabitchu munakwanisa kuagula kubulukira kumadzinza akuzunguliraniwa. 
Leviticus25:45 Pontho imwe munakwanisa kugula ana a alendo akukhala pakati panupa. Ana ninga enewa akubalwa m'dziko mwanu anakwanisa kusanduka anu ene," 
Leviticus25:46 pontho munakwanisa kualeka ninga chinthu chakuti muchisiyire ananu imwe mungafa, ale anaaphatira basa ndzidzi unakhala iwo na moyo. Mbwenye Muisraele mnzanu lekani kumchitira chinthu mwavinga." 
Leviticus25:47 Ngakhala mlendo wakukhala pakati panu anasanduka nyakufuma, uku Muisraele mnzanu asanduka nyakutcherenga mbapigulisa yekha ene ninga bitchu kuna mlendo ule, penu kuna munthu mbodzi wa m'banja wache mule," 
Leviticus25:48 iye ana utongi basi wakuombolwa kuti akhale mtumbe. Mbodzi wa abale ache," 
Leviticus25:49 penu mbaleache babache, penu mwana nyamaingache babache, penu mbaleache unango chadi-chadi, anakwanisa kumuombola; penu ngakhala iye agumana kobiri zakukwana anakwanisa kupiombola yekha ene kuti akhale mtumbe." 
Leviticus25:50 Iye alonge na munthu adamgulayo, tenepo iwo alengese pyaka kutomera ndzidzi udapigulisa iye mpakana chaka chakubwezera, kubuluka penepo alonge kontache pakumsudzula nayo mwakuteweza kupagalwi mumbachita nyaganyo." 
Leviticus25:51 Iye abwezere kobiri zidagulirwa na iye zile malingana na pyaka pyasalapyo," 
Leviticus25:52  
Leviticus25:53 khala ninga akhali nyaganyo wa pachaka na chaka. Mbuyache aleke kumchitira mwavinga. 
Leviticus25:54 Ngakhala iye nee akusudzulwa tayu kuti akhale mtumbe na ibodzi mwa njira zenezi, iye pabodzi na anache asudzulwe chaka chakubwezera chingafika," 
Leviticus25:55 thangwi Aisraele ndi mabitchu a MBUYA. Ine ndaabulusa m'dziko ya Iguputo, ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu." 
Leviticus26:1 MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Lekani kupisasanyira milungu, penu mifanikizo ya mtundu onsene, piguwa pyakupambulika, penu miyala yakuchita kusemwa kuti muipembedze. Ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu." 
Leviticus26:2 Koyani maphwando achipembedzo, pontho lemedzani mbuto zimbapembedzwa ine. Ine ndine MBUYA." 
Leviticus26:3 “Ngakhala munateweza mwambo wanga na kuvera matongero," 
Leviticus26:4 ine ndinati ndikutumizireni mvula pandzidzi wache towera dziko ibalise phoso na miti ibale nsapo zache. 
Leviticus26:5 Pyakuvuna pyanu pinakhala pizinji mwakuti munapivuna basi mpakana ndzidzi wakutchola nsapo, pontho munatchola nsapozo mpakana ndzidzi wakubzala mbewu. Munakhala napyo pyonsene pinafuna imwe kuti mudye, pontho munakhala mwakutchinjirizwa m'dziko mwanu." 
Leviticus26:6 “Ndinati ndikupaseni mtendere m'dziko mwanu mbamugona okhonda gopa munthu. Ndinati ndibuluse nyama zakugoswa zonsene m'dzikomo, pontho mwenemo nkhabe dzakhala nkhondo tayu." 
Leviticus26:7 Imwe munakunda anyamalwanu. 
Leviticus26:8 Anthu anu ashanu anakwanisa dzakunda anyamalwa dzana, pontho anthu anu dzana anakwanisa dzakunda anyamalwa pikwi khumi." 
Leviticus26:9 Ndinati ndikutsanzayiseni na kukupasani ana azinji. Ndinati ndikoye chiverano changa chidasasanya ine na imwe. 
Leviticus26:10 Pyakuvuna pyanu pinakhala pizinji pyakwana mwakuti pinamala chaka chamumphu pikalipo basi, pontho mwinango munachita kuphaphula phoso yakaleyo kuti muikhemo yachinchino." 
Leviticus26:11 Ndinati ndikhale pakati panu m'Chikhumbi changa, pontho sinakukhondani tayu." 
Leviticus26:12 Ndinati ndikhale namwe; ine ndinati ndikhale Mulungu wanu, imwembo munakhala anthu anga." 
Leviticus26:13 Ine MBUYA Mulungu wanu ndidakubulusani m'dziko ya Iguputo, towera muleke khala pontho mabitchu. Ine ndidaswa goli-goli ya m'khosi mwanu ile mbandikuchitisani kuti mufambe na nthuku phaa.”" 
Leviticus26:14 MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Ngakhala munakhonda kuvera matongero anga munati mutchunyuswe." 
Leviticus26:15 Ngakhala munakhonda kuvera matongero anga mbamuswa chiverano chidasasanya ine na imwe chile," 
Leviticus26:16 ndinati ndikutchunyuseni. Ndinati ndidzese nyatwa pana imwe; utenda okhonda wangisika na kuva manungo ene, ule unakuchitisani kuti musanduke maboli-boli na kumala manungo anu. Munabzala mbewu zanu, mbwenye nee munaganyali nazobi, thangwi anyamalwanu anakukundani mbadya pidabzala imwepyo." 
Leviticus26:17 Ine ndinati ndikupaseni nkhodolo towera mukundwe, pontho anthu ambakuzondani ale anakutongani; munakhala na mantha mwakuti munathawa mwekha ene okhonda thamangiswa na munthu unango." 
Leviticus26:18 “Podi na kumala kwa penepo ngakhala imwe munathimiza basi kukhonda kundivera, ndinati ndithimize na kanomwe kukutchunyusani." 
Leviticus26:19 Ndinati ndiswe kuuma kwanu mtima mwakunyadaku; nee panakhala mvulabi, pontho mataka anakhala akuwanga pyakwanga ninga simbi." 
Leviticus26:20 Kuphata kwanu basa mwakuwangisa kule nee kunakuganyalisani tayu, thangwi mataka nkhabe bala nsapo zache tayu." 
Leviticus26:21 “Ngakhala munathimiza basi kuchita mwakupokanyisana na ine, ndinati ndithimize pontho na kanomwe kukutchunyusani." 
Leviticus26:22 Ndinatumiza nyama zakugoswa pakati panu, tenepo zinapha ananu na pifuyo pyanu mbasiya kwene anthu pang'ono basi mwakuti njira zinaphopha na tsanga." 
Leviticus26:23 “Ndingamala kukutchunyusani ninga tenepo ngakhala imwe munathimiza basi kukhonda tchunyuka mbamuchita mwakupokanyisana na ine," 
Leviticus26:24 inembo ndinachita mwakupokanyisana namwe kukutchunyusani kanomwe pyakwanga pene kupiringana pakutoma. 
Leviticus26:25 Ndinati ndidzese nkhondo pakati panu kukutchunyusani thangwi ya kuswa chiverano chathu, pontho ngakhala munagumanyikana m'mizinda mwanu kuti mubisale, ndinati nditumize utenda okhonda wangisika pakati panu, pontho munaperekwa m'manja mwa anyamalwanu." 
Leviticus26:26 Pinakudzeserani kudyapyo ndinapigwanda kupibulusa mwakuti akazi khumi anaphatisa basa uvuni ubodzi kuphika mikate yonsene ina iwo. Iwo anagawana yeneyo, tenepo mungamala kudya yonseneyo, munakhala na njala basi." 
Leviticus26:27 “Pyonsenepi pingamala, ngakhala imwe munathimiza kukhonda kundivera mbamuchita mwakupokanyisana na ine," 
Leviticus26:28 penepo ndinachitambo mwakupokanyisana namwe mwakuzhangali, pontho ndinakutchunyusani kanomwe mwakunyanya kupiringana pakutoma." 
Leviticus26:29 Munasanyika pyakwanga na njala mwakuti munadya ananu ene akubala imwe. 
Leviticus26:30 Ndinati ndigomole mbuto zanu zakupembedzerapo milungu, kugwisa maguwanu onsene akufukizirapo pyakununkhira, na kuaponya anyakufanu pana mifanikizo yanu yakugwayo. Mwakunyansirwa namwe" 
Leviticus26:31 ndinati ndisanduze mizindanu kukhala madembe, kuvunga mbuto zanu zakupembedzera, pontho kukhonda kutambira nsembe zanu." 
Leviticus26:32 Dziko yanu ndinaivunga monsene mwene mwakuti anyamalwanu anafuna dzakhalamo anadodoma na kuvungika kweneku. 
Leviticus26:33 Ndinadzesa nkhondo pakati panu, pontho kukubalalisani kwenda kumadziko anango. Dziko yanu inasanduka msitu, pontho mizinda yanu inasanduka madembe." 
Leviticus26:34 Natenepo dziko inatsanzaya pyayo pa pyaka pyakupuma pyakuti imwe nee mudapifuna kuipumisa tayu. Iyo inagona pyayo yokha ene kupuma uku imwe muli m'dziko yantomi, dziko ya anyamalwanu." 
Leviticus26:35  
Leviticus26:36 “Ndinati ndikuchitiseni kukhala na mantha pyakwanga imwe anthu akukhala m'dziko ya anyamalwanu mwakuti dungu ene yamasamba akutekenyeka na mphepo inakuchitisani kuthawa. Munathamanga khala ninga mukhathamangiswa pankhondo, pontho munagwa uku anyamalwanu nee ali chifupive tayu." 
Leviticus26:37 Munagwegwedusana mwekha ene okhonda nyakukuthamangisani, pontho imwe nkhabe kwanisa kumenyana na anyamalwanu tayu." 
Leviticus26:38 Imwe munafa m'dziko yantomi; dziko ya anyamalwanu inakukhudyulani. 
Leviticus26:39 Anango pang'ono a imwe, ale anafuna dzasalira na moyo m'dziko ya anyamalwanu anatayika, thangwi ya pyakudawa pyanu na pya makolo anu." 
Leviticus26:40 “Mbwenye pidzukulu pyanu pinabweka pyakudawa pyawo na pyakudawa pya makolo awo, ale adandikhonda mbandipandukira," 
Leviticus26:41 pontho mbandichitisa kuti inembo ndiapase nkhodolo na kuatumiza kudziko yantomi, dziko ya anyamalwawo. M'nduli mwache pidzukulu pyanu na mtima wakuuma pingapichepesa na kupagali konta ya pyakudawa na kupandukira," 
Leviticus26:42 ndinati ndikumbuke chiverano chidachita ine na Yakobo, Isake na Abrahamu, pontho kudumbira kudachita ine kuna anthu anga kuti ndinaapasa dziko," 
Leviticus26:43 mbwenye chakutoma dziko ibuluse anthu onsene towera ikomerwe na kupumambo monsene mwene, pontho anthuwo apagali pyakudawa pyawo thangwi ya kukhonda mwambo wanga na matongero anga." 
Leviticus26:44 Mbwenye podi pikhale tenepo, pinakhala iwo m'dziko ya anyamalwawo basi, ine nkhabe dzaakhonderatu penu kuavungiratu monsene mwene tayu. Kweneko kunakhala kumala kwa chiverano chidachita ine na iwo. Ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wawo." 
Leviticus26:45 Kwache na thangwi ya iwo ndinati ndikumbuke chiverano chidachita ine na makolo awo pandzidzi udaonesa ine madzinza onsene mphamvu zanga pakuabulusa m'dziko ya Iguputo, towera ine MBUYA ndikhale Mulungu wawo.”" 
Leviticus26:46 Penepi pikhali mwambo na matongero pidapereka MBUYA kuna Mose paphiri ya Sinai kuti Aisraele apiteweze. 
Leviticus27:1 MBUYA adapanga Mose 
Leviticus27:2 kulonga kuna Aisraele kuti: Ngakhala munapereka munthu kuna MBUYA kuchitisa kudumbira kwakupambulika kudachita imwe kukwane-kwane, munthu weneyo anakwanisa kusudzulwa mungapagali konta ya kobiri ili m'tchindemu," 
Leviticus27:3 malingana na mdida ukhaphatiswa basa ndzidzi wenewo: Mamunamkulu wa pyaka makumawiri pyakubalwa kwenda m'tsogolo mpakana makumatanthatu: Kobiri zasiliva zakukwana makumashanu; mkazimkulu: Kobiri zasiliva makumatatu; Mphale wa pyaka pishanu mpakana makumawiri pyakubalwa: Kobiri zasiliva makumawiri; mtsikana: Kobiri zasiliva khumi; khombwani wamamuna wa mwezi ubodzi mpakana pyaka pishanu: Kobiri zasiliva zishanu; khombwani wamkazi: Kobiri zasiliva zitatu; mkazi wakupiringana pyaka makumatanthatu pyakubalwa: Kobiri zasiliva khumi. 
Leviticus27:4  
Leviticus27:5  
Leviticus27:6  
Leviticus27:7  
Leviticus27:8 Ngakhala munthu adadumbirayo ngwakutcherenga pyakwanga mwakuti hanakwanisa tayu kupagali konta ya nsiku na nsiku adzeswe kuna nyansembe, tenepo nyansembeyo anatchithisa kontayo malingana na pinakwanisa kupipagali munthuyo." 
Leviticus27:9 Ngakhala kudumbirako nkhwa nyama yakutambirwa kukhala nsembe kuna MBUYA, tenepo mitukwa yonsene yaperekwa kuna MBUYA njakupambulika." 
Leviticus27:10 Munthu adadumbirayo mbaleke chinjisa nyamayo na inango. Angachita tenepo nyama zonsene ziwiri nsa MBUYA. 
Leviticus27:11 Mbwenye ngakhala kudumbirako nkhwa nyama yokhonda chena, pontho yokhonda tawiriswa kukhala nsembe kuna MBUYA, munthuyo akwate nyamayo kwenda nayo kuna nyansembe." 
Leviticus27:12 Nyansembe alonge konta ya nyamayo malingana na udidi, penu kuipa m'maso kwa nyamayo, tenepo kontache inakhala yonthoyo." 
Leviticus27:13 Ngakhala mwenechiroyo anafuna kuiombola, iye athema kupereka konta yonthoyo pontho chachishanu cha kontache kuthimizirapo." 
Leviticus27:14 Ngakhala munthu anapambulira nyumbache kuna MBUYA, nyansembe ailonge kontache malingana na udidi penu kuipa kwa nyumbayo. Konta inafuna kulonga nyansembe ikhale yonthoyo." 
Leviticus27:15 Ngakhala nyakupambulira nyumbayo kuna MBUYA anafuna kuti aiombole, iye athema kupagali konta yalonga nyansembeyo pontho chachishanu cha kontache kuthimizirapo." 
Leviticus27:16 Ngakhala munthu anapambulira munda ubodzi pa mindache kuna MBUYA, kontache ilongwe malingana na kuinjipa kwa mbewu zidabzala iye m'mundamo pakuchita kulengesa kuti: barele wakulemera makilogramu makumawiri ndi sasawa na kobiri zasiliva khumi." 
Leviticus27:17 Ngakhala iye aupambulira sindzidzi nkhumala chaka chakubwezera, munda wenewu upagali kontache yonsene yamumphu." 
Leviticus27:18 Ngakhala iye aupambulira uku chaka chakubwezera chagwanda kale, pontho papita pyaka pingasi, nyansembe alonge kontache malingana na pyaka pyasalira mbachidzati fika chaka chakubwezera, tenepo kontache inakhala yakutchitha." 
Leviticus27:19 Ngakhala munthu adapambulira mundayo anafuna kuti auombole, iye athema kupagali kontache pontho chachishanu cha kontache kuthimizirapo." 
Leviticus27:20 Ngakhala anaugulisa na munthu unango mbakhonda chakutoma kuuombola m'manja mwa MBUYA, iye ataya mwayi wakuuombola." 
Leviticus27:21 Chaka chakubwezera chingafika mundawo unakhala wakupambulirwa monsene mwene kuna MBUYA; tenepo unakhala wa anyansembe. 
Leviticus27:22 Ngakhala munthu apambulira kuna MBUYA munda udachita iye kugula," 
Leviticus27:23 nyansembe aulonge kontache malingana na pyaka pyasalirapyo mbachidzati fika chaka chakubwezera, pontho munthuyo apereke kobirizo nsiku yonthoyo; kobirizo zinakhala za MBUYA." 
Leviticus27:24 Chaka chakubwezera chingafika, mundawo unabwerera kuna mwenechiro wakutoma, penu kuna pidzukulu pyache." 
Leviticus27:25 Konta yonsene yathema kukhala malingana na mdida ukhaphatiswa basa ndzidzi wenewo. 
Leviticus27:26 Mwana wautombo wa nyama ngwa MBUYA na kale ene, natenepo munthu aleke pambulira yeneyi kuna MBUYA ninga chakupereka chakuperekwa na kufuna kwache. Mwanamphulu, mwanabira na mwanambuzi mphya MBUYA," 
Leviticus27:27 mbwenye mwana wautombo wa nyama yokhonda chena mwenechiro anakwanisa kuiombola malingana na konta ya nyamayo, pontho chachishanu cha kontache kuthimizirapo. Ngakhala mwenechiro nee anafuna kuiombola tayu, iguliswe kuna anthu anango pakonta ikhaphatiswa basa ndzidzi wenewo." 
Leviticus27:28 Ngakhala munthu anafuna kupambulira monsene mwene chinthu chache kuna MBUYA, penu munthu, nyama, munda udamsiyira makolo ache, chathema nee kuguliswa penu kuombolwa tayu; chonsene chakupambulirwa kuna MBUYA ntchakuchena pyakwanga pamaso pache." 
Leviticus27:29 Nkhabe munthu wakupambulirwa kuna MBUYA athema kuombolwa tayu; iye athema kuphiwa basi. 
Leviticus27:30 Chakhumi chonsene cha pya munda, penu ndi mapira penu nsapo mphya MBUYA. Ipyo mphyakuchena kuna MBUYA." 
Leviticus27:31 Ngakhala mwenechiroyo anafuna kuombola chinthu chachecho, iye athema kupereka kobiri malingana na konta ya chinthucho pontho chachishanu cha kontache kuthimizirapo." 
Leviticus27:32 Chachikhumi cha pifuyo pyonsene ntcha MBUYA. Nyama zingalengeswa, yachikhumi yonsene nja MBUYA." 
Leviticus27:33 Mwenechiro pifuyo mbaleke kusankhula zadidi kusiya zakupupwa, pontho mbaleke kuchinjisa tayu. Ngakhala iye anazichinjisa nyama inango na inango, nyama zonsene ziwirizo zinakhala za MBUYA, pontho mbaleke kuziombola." 
Leviticus27:34 Enewa ndi matongero adapereka MBUYA kuna Mose paphiri ya Sinai kuti Aisraele aateweze. 
Numbers1:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, m'thando yatchetcha ya Sinai pansiku yakutoma ya mwezi wachiwiri wa chaka chachiwiri pidabuluka Aisraele m'dziko ya Iguputo. Iye adalonga mbati," 
Numbers1:2 “Iwe na Aroni chitani kalembera wa Aisraele onsene malingana na madzinzawo pontho mabanjawo. Mulembe dzina ya mamuna onsene 
Numbers1:3 wakukwanisa pyaka makumawiri pyakubalwa penu kupiringana penepo, ale anakwanisa kupita unyankhondo. Mualembe madzinawo malingana na gulu ina iwo." 
Numbers1:4 Munthu mbodzi kada dzinza, ule ndi mkadamu wa banja, athema kukuphedzani.”" 
Numbers1:5 Madzina a anthu ale athema kuphata basa yeneyi mbawa: 
Numbers1:6 Elizuri mwana Shedeuri wa dzinza ya Rubeni; Shelumiele mwana Zurishadai wa dzinza ya Simioni; Nashoni mwana Aminadabu wa dzinza ya Yuda; Netanele mwana Zuari wa dzinza ya Isakara; Eliabu mwana Heloni wa dzinza ya Zebuloni; kubulukira kuna ana achimuna a Yosefe mbawa: Elishama mwana Amihudi wa dzinza ya Eferemu; Gamaliele mwana Pedazuri wa dzinza ya Manase; Abidani mwana Gideoni wa dzinza ya Benjemani; Ahiezere mwana Amishadai wa dzinza ya Dani; Pagiele mwana Okarani wa dzinza ya Asheri; Eliasafu mwana Deuele wa dzinza ya Gadi; Ahira mwana Enani wa dzinza ya Nafitali. 
Numbers1:7 Enewa mbamuna ale adasankhulwa kubulukira kuna anthu onsene a Israele. Iwo akhali akadamu m'madzinza mwawo. 
Numbers1:8 Mose na Aroni pabodzi na amuna, ale madzinawo akhadaperekwa," 
Numbers1:9 adachemeresa anthu onsene a Israele kugumanyikana pabodzi pansiku yakutoma ya mwezi wachiwiri mbaalemba anthu onsene malingana na mbumba, pontho mabanjawo. Madzina a amuna onsene a pyaka makumawiri pyakubalwa, penu kupiringana penepo adamala lembwa na kulengeswa kwene," 
Numbers1:10 ninga mudalongera MBUYA. M'thando yatchetcha ya Sinai Mose adalemba anthu onsene. 
Numbers2:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose na Aroni mbati," 
Numbers2:2 “Aisraele athema kumanga makumbi awo mwakuzungulira Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, kwache amange kutali pang'ono na Chikhumbichi. Munthu onsene athema kukhala pansi pa bandera ya banjache.”" 
Numbers2:3 Kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa kunakhala magulu a dzinza ya Yuda pansi pa banderawo. Mkadamu wa dzinza ya Yuda ndi Nashoni mwana wamamuna wa Aminadabu. 
Numbers2:4 Konta ya gulu yache ikhali pikwi makumanomwe na pinayi na madzana matanthatu. 
Numbers2:5 Dzinza ya Isakara imange makumbi awo chifupi na dzinza ya Yuda. Mkadamu wa dzinza ya Isakara ndi Netanele mwana wamamuna wa Zuari. 
Numbers2:6 Konta ya gulu yache ikhali pikwi makumashanu na pinayi na madzana manayi. 
Numbers2:7 Dzinza ya Zebuloni imange makumbi awo chifupi na dzinza ya Isakara. Mkadamu wa dzinza ya Zebuloni ndi Eliabu mwana wamamuna wa Heloni. 
Numbers2:8 Konta ya gulu yache ikhali pikwi makumashanu na pinomwe na madzana manayi. 
Numbers2:9 Konta ya anthu onsene akhali pansi pa bandera ya Yuda malingana na magulu awo ale, akhalipo pikwi dzana na makumasere na pitanthatu na madzana manayi. Anthu enewa athema kutoma kutsogola pamulikiti." 
Numbers2:10 Kukhundu yakumwera kunakhala magulu pansi pa bandera ya Rubeni. Mkadamu wa dzinza ya Rubeni ndi Elizuri mwana wamamuna wa Shedeuri. 
Numbers2:11 Konta ya gulu yache ikhali pikwi makumanayi na pitanthatu na madzana mashanu. 
Numbers2:12 Dzinza ya Simioni imange makumbi awo chifupi na dzinza ya Rubeni. Mkadamu wa dzinza ya Simioni ndi Shelumiele mwana wamamuna wa Zurishadai. 
Numbers2:13 Konta ya gulu yache ikhali pikwi makumashanu na pifemba na madzana matatu. 
Numbers2:14 Dzinza ya Gadi imange makumbi awo chifupi na dzinza ya Simioni. Mkadamu wa dzinza ya Gadi ndi Eliasafu mwana wamamuna wa Deuele. 
Numbers2:15 Konta ya gulu yache ikhali pikwi makumanayi na pishanu na madzana makumatanthatu na makumashanu. 
Numbers2:16 Konta ya anthu onsene akhali pansi pa bandera ya Rubeni malingana na magulu awo ikhali pikwi dzana na makumashanu na chibodzi na madzana makumanayi na makumashanu. Gulu yeneyi inakhala yachiwiri kwenda pamulikiti m'nduli mwa gulu yakutoma. 
Numbers2:17 Alevi athema kuthukula Chikhumbi cha Mulungu mbafamba pakati pa magulu onsene. Gulu yonsene inaenda panyandandandache pamulikiti sasawa ninga mumbachitira iwo angamanga makumbi awo pambuto pache pansi pa banderawo. 
Numbers2:18 Kukhundu yakumadokero dzuwa kunakhala magulu pansi pa bandera ya Eferemu. Mkadamu wa dzinza ya Eferemu ndi Elishama mwana wamamuna wa Amihudi. 
Numbers2:19 Konta ya gulu yache ikhali pikwi makumanayi na madzana mashanu. 
Numbers2:20 Dzinza ya Manase imange makumbi awo chifupi na dzinza ya Eferemu. Mkadamu wa dzinza ya Manase ndi Gamaliele mwana wamamuna wa Pedazuri. 
Numbers2:21 Konta ya gulu yache ikhali pikwi makumatatu na piwiri na madzana mawiri. 
Numbers2:22 Dzinza ya Benjemani imange makumbi awo chifupi na dzinza ya Manase. Mkadamu wa dzinza ya Benjemani ndi Abidani mwana wamamuna wa Gideoni. 
Numbers2:23 Konta ya gulu yache ikhali pikwi makumatatu na pishanu na madzana manayi. 
Numbers2:24 Konta ya anthu onsene akhali pansi pa bandera ya Eferemu malingana na magulu awo ikhali pikwi dzana na pisere na dzana ibodzi. Gulu yeneyi inakhala yachitatu kwenda pamulikiti. 
Numbers2:25 Kukhundu yakumpoto kunakhala magulu pansi pa bandera ya Dani. Mkadamu wa dzinza ya Dani ndi Ahiezere mwana wamamuna wa Amishadai. 
Numbers2:26 Konta ya gulu yache ikhali pikwi makumatanthatu na piwiri na madzana manomwe. 
Numbers2:27 Dzinza ya Asheri imange makumbi awo chifupi na dzinza ya Dani. Mkadamu wa dzinza ya Asheri ndi Pagiele mwana wamamuna wa Okarani. 
Numbers2:28 Konta ya gulu yache ikhali pikwi makumanayi na chibodzi na madzana mashanu. 
Numbers2:29 Dzinza ya Nafitali imange makumbi awo chifupi na dzinza ya Asheri. Mkadamu wa dzinza ya Nafitali ndi Ahira mwana wamamuna wa Enani. 
Numbers2:30 Konta ya gulu yache ikhali pikwi makumashanu na pitatu na madzana manayi. 
Numbers2:31 Konta ya anthu onsene akhali pansi pa bandera ya Dani malingana na magulu awo ikhali pikwi dzana na makumashanu na pinomwe na madzana matanthatu. Gulu yeneyi inakhala yakumalisira kwenda pamulikiti.
