Numbers2:32 Enewa mba Aisraele, ale adalengeswa malingana na mabanjawo. Anthu onsene, ale akhali mumsasa malingana na magulu awo akhali pikwi madzana matanthatu na pitatu na madzana mashanu na makumashanu." 
Numbers2:33 Kwache dzinza ya Levi hidalengeswe pabodzi na Aisraele anango onsene tayu ninga montho mudalongera MBUYA kuna Mose. 
Numbers2:34 Tenepo Aisraele adachita pyonsene pidalonga MBUYA kuna Mose; mwenemu ndi mule mudamangira iwo makumbi awo pansi pa banderawo, pontho na mule mukhabuluka iwo kwenda kamanga msasa, munthu onsene mbumbache na banjache." 
Numbers3:1 Ishi ndi banja ya Aroni na Mose pandzidzi udalonga MBUYA kuna Mose paphiri ya Sinai. 
Numbers3:2 Aroni akhali na ana anayi achimuna: Nadabu, wautombo, Abihu, Eleazara na Itamara." 
Numbers3:3 Iwo adasankhulwa mbadzozwa kukhala anyansembe," 
Numbers3:4 mbwenye Nadabu na Abihu adaphiwa pandzidzi udapereka iwo chakupereka chakusasanywa na moto okhonda chena kuna MBUYA m'thando yatchetcha ya Sinai. Iwo hakhadabala ana tayu, natenepo Eleazara na Itamara adaphata basa ya unyansembe pandzidzi ukhali Aroni na moyo." 
Numbers3:5 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Numbers3:6 “Idza na dzinza ya Levi pamaso pa Aroni mbuasankhule kukhala anyakumtumikira. 
Numbers3:7 Iwo anaphata basa yonsene yakufunika pa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, pontho anaphatira basa anyansembe na dzinza yonsene ya Aisraele." 
Numbers3:8 Iwo anakhala anyakuyang'anira pinthu pyonsene pya m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu mbaphata basa m'mbuto mwa dzinza yonsene ya Aisraele. 
Numbers3:9 Basa ya dzinza ya Levi nkhutumikira kwene Aroni na anache basi. 
Numbers3:10 Sankhula kwene Aroni na anache basi kuti aphate basa ya unyansembe; munthu ene pyache onsene anapiyesera kuchita tenepoyo athema kuphiwa.” 
Numbers3:11 MBUYA adalonga pontho kuna Mose mbati," 
Numbers3:12 “Dzinza ya Levi lero njanga. Ndzidzi udapha ine ana autombo onsene a mu Iguputo, ndidapambula ana autombo onsene a m'mabanja a Aisraele na a pifuyo pyawo pyonsene kukhala anga ene. Tenepo m'mbuto mwa kukwata ana onsene autombo a mabanja a Aisraele kukhala anga ene, ndakwata dzinza ya Levi; iwo anakhala anga. Ine ndine MBUYA.”" 
Numbers3:13  
Numbers3:14 M'thando yatchetcha ya Sinai MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose 
Numbers3:15 kuti achite kalembera dzinza yonsene ya Levi malingana na mbumba na mabanjawo, kulemba munthu onsene wamamuna wakukwanisa mwezi ubodzi wakubalwa penu kupiringana penepo." 
Numbers3:16 Mose adachitadi tenepo ninga montho mudampangira MBUYA. 
Numbers3:17 Levi akhali na ana atatu achimuna: Gereshoni, Kohati na Merari, enewa ndiye akhali makolo a mbumba imbadziwika na madzinawo. Gereshoni akhali na ana awiri achimuna: Libini na Shimei; Kohati akhali na ana anayi achimuna: Amuramu, Izihara, Hebroni na Uziele; pontho Merari akhali na ana awiri achimuna: Mahili na Mushi. Enewa ndiye akhali makolo a mabanja ambadziwika na madzinawo ale." 
Numbers3:18  
Numbers3:19  
Numbers3:20  
Numbers3:21 Mbumba ya Gereshoni ikhadadzala na mabanja a Libini na Shimei. 
Numbers3:22 Konta ya amuna onsene akukwanisa mwezi ubodzi wakubalwa penu kupiringana penepo akhadalembwa ale akhali pikwi pinomwe na madzana mashanu. 
Numbers3:23 Mbumba yeneyi idapangwa kamanga makumbi awo kutcheru kwa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu kukhundu yakumadokero dzuwa. 
Numbers3:24 Eliasafu mwana Laele mbakhala mkadamu wa mbumba yeneyi. 
Numbers3:25 Iwo basawo ikhali kuyang'anira Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, chinguwo chakuphimba nacho m'bwalo na kunja, chinguwo cha pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi," 
Numbers3:26 chinguwo cha pampanda wakuzungulira Chikhumbi chonsene na guwa yansembe, na chinguwo chakufunga nacho msuwo wa mpanda. Iwo ndiye enechiro ache akuphata basa yonsene ya pinthu penepi." 
Numbers3:27 Mbumba ya Kohati idadzala na mabanja a Amuramu, Izihara, Hebroni na Uziele." 
Numbers3:28 Konta ya amuna akukwanisa mwezi ubodzi penu kupiringana penepo adalembwa ale, akhalipo pikwi pisere na madzana matanthatu." 
Numbers3:29 Mbumba yeneyi idapangwa kumanga makumbi awo kukhundu yakumwera kwa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu. 
Numbers3:30 Mkadamu wa mbumba yeneyi akhali Elizafani mwana wamamuna wa Uziele. 
Numbers3:31 Iwo basawo ikhali yakuyang'anira Bokosi ya Chiverano, thebulu, chakuikhira nyale, guwa yansembe, pinthu pimbaphatisa basa anyansembe m'Mbuto Yakuchena, na chinguwo cha pamsuwo wa Mbuto Yakuchenesesa. Iwo ndiye akhali enechiro ache akuphata basa yonsene papinthu penepi." 
Numbers3:32 Mkadamu wa dzinza yonsene ya Levi akhali Eleazara mwana Aroni nyansembe. Iye akhali nyakuyang'anira anthu akhaphata basawo ya unyansembe m'Mbuto Yakuchena ale. 
Numbers3:33 Mbumba ya Merari idadzala na mabanja a Mahili na Mushi. 
Numbers3:34 Konta ya amuna onsene akukwanisa mwezi ubodzi wakubalwa penu kupiringana penepo adalembwa ale, akhalipo pikwi pitanthatu na madzana mawiri." 
Numbers3:35 Mbumba yeneyi idapangwa kumanga makumbi awo kukhundu yakumpoto kwa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, Zuriele mwana Abihaili ndiye akhali mkadamu wawo." 
Numbers3:36 Iwo basawo ikhali yakuyang'anira miti yonsene yakumangira nayo Chikhumbi cha Mulungu: mitandaliko yache, mizati yache, matako ache na pyonsene pyakufunikira pabasa yeneyi. Iwo ndiye akhali enechiro ache akuphata basa yonsene ya pinthu penepi." 
Numbers3:37 Iwo akhali pontho na basa yakuyang'anira mizati, matako, ntchiri na nkhambala. Pyonsenepi pikhali pya pampanda." 
Numbers3:38 Mose, Aroni na anache adamanga msasawo kunkhope kwa Chikhumbicho kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa. Iwo basawo ikhali yakupereka nsembe m'Mbuto Yakuchena thangwi ya anthu a Israele. Munthu unango ene pyache adapiyesera kuchita tenepo adathema kuphiwa." 
Numbers3:39 Konta ya amuna onsene a dzinza ya Levi a mwezi ubodzi wakubalwa penu kupiringana penepo, ale adamala lembwa na Mose kada munthu mbumbache ninga mudalongera MBUYA akhalipo pikwi makumawiri na piwiri." 
Numbers3:40 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Ana onsene autombo a Aisraele mbanga. Natenepo chita kalembera wa ana amuna onsene autombo a Aisraele kutomera wakukwanisa mwezi ubodzi wakubalwa penu kupiringana penepo. Mbwenye m'mbuto mwa ana onsenewo, ndasankhula dzinza ya Levi kukhala anga ene! Ine ndine MBUYA! Pontho ndasankhula pifuyo pya dzinza ya Levi kukhala pyanga pyene m'mbuto mwa pifuyo pyakutoma kubalwa pyonsene pya Aisraele.”" 
Numbers3:41  
Numbers3:42 Mose adaveradi mbachita kalembera ana onsene achimuna autombo 
Numbers3:43 akukwanisa mwezi ubodzi wakubalwa penu kupiringana penepo. Konta ya anthu onsene akhali pikwi makumawiri na piwiri na madzana mawiri na makumanomwe na atatu. 
Numbers3:44 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Numbers3:45 upereke dzinza ya Levi kuna ine kukhala yanga ene m'mbuto mwa ana autombo onsene a Israele, pontho upereke pifuyo pyonsene pya dzinza ya Levi m'mbuto mwa pifuyo pyonsene pyakutoma kubalwa pya Aisraele onsene." 
Numbers3:46 Na thangwi yakuti dzinza ya Levi yabuluka mukonta ya ana onsene a Israele na konta ya madzana mawiri na manomwe na atatu kupita m'mbuto mwa ana autombo a Israele, iwe wathema kuombola ana akuthimizirapowa" 
Numbers3:47 na kobiri zasiliva zishanu, munthu onsene malingana na mdida ukhaphatiswa basa ndzidzi wenewo," 
Numbers3:48 mbupereke kobiri zenezi kuna Aroni na anache. 
Numbers3:49 Mose adaveradi mbakwata 
Numbers3:50 kobiri zasiliva zakukwana chikwi chibodzi na madzana matatu na makumatanthatu na zishanu 
Numbers3:51 mbazipereka kuna Aroni na anache. 
Numbers4:1 MBUYA adapanga Mose na Aroni 
Numbers4:2 kuti achite kalembera wa anthu onsene a mbumba ya Kohati. Iye aalembe madzina malingana na mtupo awo pontho mabanjawo. 
Numbers4:3 Alembe pontho amuna onsene a pyaka pya pakati pa makumatatu na makumashanu, ale athema kuphata basa m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu." 
Numbers4:4 Basawo njakuyang'anira mwadidi pinthu pyakuchena pyakwanga. 
Numbers4:5 MBUYA adapereka kuna Mose matongero akuti: Ndzidzi ungafika wakuti anthu afuluse msasa. Aroni na anache apite m'Chikhumbimo atchithise chinguwo chakutchinga nacho Bokosi ya Chiverano mbampsampsika bokosiyo na chinguwocho. 
Numbers4:6 Kubuluka penepo aikhe pontho nthembe yadidi padzulu pachepo. Angamala penepo athasike nguwo yachoza padzulu pachepo. Kubuluka penepo atandalike miti yakuthukulira. 
Numbers4:7 Iwo athasike nguwo yachoza pathebulu yakuikhapo mkate wakuperekwa kuna MBUYA, pontho aikhepo mapalato na piwaya pyakufukizira pyakununkhira, pontho pitomba na ndilo pyakuphatisira basa kupereka nsembe ya pyakumwa; ndzidzi onsene pathebulu pathema kukhala mkate." 
Numbers4:8 Iwo athasike nguwo yakufira padzulu pa pyonsenepi, aikhe nthembe yadidi padzulu pachepo, angamala penepo atandalike miti yakuthukulira." 
Numbers4:9 Iwo akwate nguwo yachoza mbaimpsampsika chakuikhirapo nyale na nyale yache ene, pyakukwizira tsakalache, chakugweramo dotha na pyonsene pyakuikhiramo mafuta aolivi." 
Numbers4:10 Aikukutize mwadidi pabodzi na pinthu pyache pyakufunika pyonsene uku chili m'bwalo mwa nthembe yadidi na kuikha pambuto yakuthukulira. 
Numbers4:11 Kubuluka penepo athasike nguwo yachoza paguwa yansembe yagolidi. Padzulu pachepo ampsampsikepo nthembe yadidi. Angamala penepo atandalike miti yakuthukulira. 
Numbers4:12 Iwo akwate pyombo pyache pyonsene pimbaphatisa iwo basa pakutumikira m'Mbuto Yakuchena. Apikukutize na nguwo yachoza apimpsampsike na nthembe yadidi pontho apiikhe pamiti yakuthukulira. 
Numbers4:13 Iwo abuluse dotha ya mafuta paguwa yansembe. Angamala penepo athasike nguwo yamsuzi wanyemba paguwapo. 
Numbers4:14 Iwo aikhe pyombo pimbatumikira iwo napyo paguwa yansembe. Pinthu pyache mphipi: pyakupalira moto, pyakujobolera nyama, mafosholo, na maphande. Angamala penepo apimpsampsike mwadidi na nthembe yadidi pontho atandalike miti yakuthukulira." 
Numbers4:15 Ndzidzi wakufulusa msasa ungakwana, pontho Aroni na anache angamala kumpsampsika pinthu pyakuchena pyonsene, mbumba ya Kohati idze dzathukula. Kwache mbumba ya Kohatiyo mbaleke khuya pinthu pyakuchenapyo gopesera anafa. Yeneyi ndiye basa ya mbumba Kohati ndzidzi onsene unafuluswa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu." 
Numbers4:16 Basa ya Eleazara mwana wa Aroni nkhuyang'anira mafuta a nyale, pyakufukiza pyakununkhira, chakupereka cha mapira, mafuta akudzoza nawo, pontho na Chikhumbi chonsene cha Mulungu na pyonsene pili mwenemo, pile mphyakupambulika kuna MBUYA." 
Numbers4:17 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose na Aroni mbati," 
Numbers4:18 “Lekani tawirisa kuti mbumba ya Kohati 
Numbers4:19 imale kufa na thangwi ya kufika chifupi na pinthu pyakupambulikapi. Kuti penepi pileke chitika, Aroni na anache apite m'Chikhumbimo mbapasa munthu onsene basa, pontho na kumpanga chathema iye thukula." 
Numbers4:20 Mbumba ya Kohati mbileke pita m'Chikhumbimo mbakaponya maso pana pinthu pyakuchenapi podi na pang'ono pene tayu, gopesera anafa.”" 
Numbers4:21 MBUYA adapanga Mose 
Numbers4:22 kuti achite kalembera wa anthu onsene a mbumba ya Gereshoni malingana na mtupo wawo pontho na mabanjawo. 
Numbers4:23 Pontho kuti alembe amuna onsene a pyaka pya pakati pa makumatatu na makumashanu, ale ngakuthema kuphata basa m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu." 
Numbers4:24 Iwo basawo inakhala yakuthukula pinthu ipi: 
Numbers4:25 Chikhumbicho, chinguwo chache chakuphimba nacho m'bwalo na kunja kwene, nthembe yadidi yakuphimba padzulu pachepo, chinguwo chakufunga nacho msuwo," 
Numbers4:26 nguwo na nkhambala za mpanda wakuzungulira Chikhumbi na guwa yansembe, nguwo yakufunga nayo msuwo wa mpanda pontho na pinthu pyache pyonsene pyakuphatisira basa. Mbumba ya Gereshoni yathema kuphata basa yonsene yakufuna pinthu penepi." 
Numbers4:27 Mose na Aroni ndiye anafuna dzaonesesa kuti mbumba ya Gereshoni aphatadi basa yonsene na kuthukula pinthu pyonsene pidaapanga Aroni na anache. 
Numbers4:28 Yeneyi ndiye basa ya mbumba ya Gereshoni m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu; mkadamu awo pabasa yeneyi akhali Itamara mwana wamamuna wa Aroni nyansembe. 
Numbers4:29 MBUYA adapanga Mose kuti achite kalembera wa mbumba ya Merari yonsene malingana na mtupo awo pontho mabanjawo," 
Numbers4:30 pontho kuti alembe madzina a amuna onsene a pyaka pya pakati pa makumatatu na makumashanu pyakubalwa, ale akhali akuthema kuphata basa m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu." 
Numbers4:31 Iwo basawo inakhala yakuthukula matabwa, mitandaliko, mizati, matako a Chikhumbi cha Mulungu," 
Numbers4:32 pontho na mizati, matako, ntchiri na nkhambala za mpanda zakuzungulira Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, na pyonsene pyakuphatisira basa. Munthu onsene umpase chinthu chathema iye kathukula." 
Numbers4:33 Yeneyi ndiye basa inafuna phata mbumba ya Merari m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu: mkadamu wawo pabasa yeneyi akhali Itamara mwana wamamuna wa Aroni nyansembe. 
Numbers4:34 Pakuteweza matongero a MBUYA, Mose, Aroni na akadamu a dzinza yonsene ya Israele adalengesa magulu matatu anthu a Levi. Maguluwo mbawa: mbumba ya Kohati, mbumba ya Gereshoni na mbumba ya Merari. Iwo adaalengesa malingana na mitupo yawo pontho mabanjawo mbalemba amuna onsene a pyaka pya pakati pa makumatatu na makumashanu pyakubalwa, ale akhali akuthema kuphata basa m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu. Konta ya magulu enewa ikhali tenepa:" 
Numbers4:35 Mbumba ya Kohati onsene akhalipo pikwi piwiri na madzana manomwe na makumashanu. Mbumba ya Gereshoni onsene akhalipo pikwi piwiri na madzana matanthatu na makumatatu. Mbumba ya Merari onsene akhalipo pikwi pitatu na madzana mawiri. Onsene pabodzi akhalipo pikwi pisere na madzana mashanu na makumasere. 
Numbers4:36 Munthu onsene adamala lembwa ninga mudalongera MBUYA kuna Mose; Tenepo ninga mudalongera MBUYA kudzera muna Mose, munthu onsene adapaswa basache kuti aphate penu chinthu chakuti athukule." 
Numbers5:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Numbers5:2 “Panga Aisraele kuti abuluse mumsasa mwawo munthu onsene wakukhala na matanya, penu wakuchucha chinthu cha m'manungo mwache, pontho na munthu onsene okhonda chena thangwi ya kukhuya mtembo." 
Numbers5:3 Iwe wathema kuabulusa anthu ninga enewa okhonda chena mumsasa, towera aleke kuswipisa msasa umbakhala ine pakati pa anthu anga ule.”" 
Numbers5:4 Aisraele adavera MBUYA mbaabulusa onsene ale mumsasa mule. Iwo adachita ninga montho mudalongera MBUYA kuna Mose. 
Numbers5:5 MBUYA adapanga Mose 
Numbers5:6 kulonga kuna Aisraele kuti ngakhala munthu anakhonda khulupirika kuna MBUYA mbadawira mwanzache, weneyu ngwakudawa." 
Numbers5:7 Iye athema kubweka pyakudawa pyache na kubwezera pyonsene kuna munthu adawira iyeyo, pontho athimizirepo chachishanu cha kontache." 
Numbers5:8 Mbwenye ngakhala munthu wakufuna kubwezerwayo afa, pontho nkhabe mbaleache chadi-chadi wakuti anakwanisa kutambira pyakubwezwapyo, penepo pinthu pyakubwezwapyo pabodzi pene na mwanabira wamamuna wakuchitira nsembe yakubulusa pyakudawa pya munthu ule piperekwe kuna MBUYA kuti pikhale pya nyansembe." 
Numbers5:9 Pyakusonkheswa pyonsene pyakupambulika pinapereka Aisraele kuna MBUYA pikhale pya nyansembe anapasa iwo pyakupereka ule. 
Numbers5:10 Nyansembe onsene akwate mitukwa yakupambulika inapereka munthu kuna iye kuti pikhale pyache. 
Numbers5:11 MBUYA adapanga Mose 
Numbers5:12 kulonga kuna Aisraele kuti ngakhala mamuna akupenuka na mkazache kuti akuchita pinthu pyokhonda khulupirika kuna iye, pontho apiswipisa yekha ene pakugona na mamuna unango, mbwenye mamunayo hakupidziwisisa tayu, pontho kuti nkhabe umboni thangwi mkazi ambapichita mwakubisa pontho kuti nkhabe munthu unango adamphata akuchita tayu; penu ngakhala mamunayo nkhumchitira kwene ntchanje pontho akupenuka naye podi kwene kuti mkaziyo hakuchita pinthu pyokhonda khulupirika tayu," 
Numbers5:13  
Numbers5:14  
Numbers5:15 penepo mamunayo aende na mkazacheyo kuna nyansembe. Iye akwate pontho chakupereka chinafunikacho cha ufa wa barele wakukwana kilogramu ibodzi, mbwenye aleke ikha mafuta muufamo penu pyakufukiza pyakununkhira thangwi chenecho ntchakupereka cha mapira thangwi ya ntchanje, chile chaperekwa towera pyakuonadi pidziwike." 
Numbers5:16 Nyansembe abwere na mkaziyo mbamuimisa pamaso pa MBUYA. 
Numbers5:17 Iye akwate madzi akuchena mbaaikha m'ndilo. Akwate pontho mataka pang'ono a pansi pa m' Chikhumbi cha Mulungu mbaaikha m'madzi mule. 
Numbers5:18 Kubuluka penepo nyansembeyo asudzule tsisi ya mkazi ule, pontho ampase m'manja mwache chakupereka cha mapira thangwi ya ntchanje chile, uku nyansembeyo aphatira ndilo ya madzi akunyung'unya akudzesa dzedze ile, m'manja mwache." 
Numbers5:19 Kubuluka penepo nyansembe adumbirise mkaziyo papinthu pinalonga iyepyo kuti, “Ngakhala iwe hudachite uputa tayu, iwe nee unakuwazika nawo madzi akudzesa dzedzewa tayu." 
Numbers5:20 Mbwenye ngakhala iwe udachitadi uputa," 
Numbers5:21 MBUYA mbachitise dzinako kukhala ya dzedze pakati pa anthu a dzinzako. Iye achitise pontho mimbako kufufuma na kuchitisa nthumbo yako kuuma. 
Numbers5:22 Madzi awa apite m'manungo mwako kuti mimbako ifufume pontho nthumbo yako iume.” Mkaziyo atawire kuti, “Ande, mbipichitike tenepo.”" 
Numbers5:23 Kubuluka penepo nyansembe ule alembe pya dzedze yeneyi mumpukutu, angamala penepo apitsuke na madzi akunyung'unya ali m'ndilo mule." 
Numbers5:24 Mkazi ule mbadzati kumwa madzi, ale anafuna kumchitisa kuti ave kupha pyakwanga," 
Numbers5:25 nyansembe akwate chakupereka cha mapira thangwi ya ntchanje chili m'manja mwa mkazi ule, mbachipereka kuna MBUYA ninga mtukwa wakupambulika. Kubuluka penepo adze nacho kuguwa yansembe." 
Numbers5:26 Tenepo nyansembe akwate ufa wakudzala m'manja mwache, ninga chakupereka cha chitsikimizo kuti pyonsene pyaperekwa kuna MBUYA mbapipyereza paguwa yansembe. Pakumalisa ampase madziwo mkazi ule kuti amwe." 
Numbers5:27 Ngakhala mkaziyo achitadi uputa madzi anamchitisa kuti ave kupha pyakwanga pene; mimbache inafufuma pontho nthumbo yache inakuuma. Iye anakhala nyadzedze pakati pa anthu ache. 
Numbers5:28 Mbwenye ngakhala iye hadachite uputa tayu, madziwo hanakuwazika nawo tayu, pontho anakwanisa kubala." 
Numbers5:29 Wenewu ndiye mwambo wache ngakhala mamuna akuchitira ntchanje mkazache mbapenuka kuti mwinango mkaziyo akuchita uputa. Mkaziyo aimiriswe pamaso pa MBUYA tenepo nyansembe achite mtemo wenewu. 
Numbers5:30  
Numbers5:31 Mamuna ayeswe okhonda dawa, mbwenye ngakhala mkazi adawa, athema kuoneswa nyatwa thangwi ya kudawa kwacheko." 
Numbers6:1 MBUYA adapanga Mose 
Numbers6:2 kulonga kuna Aisraele kuti mamuna penu mkazi anadumbira kukhala Mnaziri mbapipereka yekha ene kuna MBUYA," 
Numbers6:3 athunde vinyu penu chakumwa chinango chonsene chakuledzeresa. Iye aleke kumwa madzi a mfesa, penu kudya nsapo zamfesa ziwisi penu zakuuma." 
Numbers6:4 Ndzidzi unakhala iye Mnaziri aleke kudya chinthu chonsene cha mfesa; podi na nthanga ene penu makoko ache. 
Numbers6:5 Ndzidzi unakhala iye Mnaziri aleke chinga tsisi yache penu ndevu zache. Iye athema kukhala wakuchena mpakana ndzidzi ache udadumbirira iye pamaso pa MBUYA umale; iye athema kuleka tsisi na ndevu zache kukula pyazo. 
Numbers6:6 Tsisi yache ntchidzindikiro chakuonesa kupambulika kwache kuna MBUYA, natenepo iye aleke kupiswipisa yekha ene pakufedzera chifupi na mtembo, podi kwene kuti afayo ndi babache, mache, mbaleache penu nyamaingache." 
Numbers6:7  
Numbers6:8 Ndzidzi onsene unakhala iye Mnaziri iye apipambulira monsene mwene kuna MBUYA. 
Numbers6:9 Ngakhala unango afa mwakututumusa pamaso pache, penepa ndiye kuti tsisi yache yakupambulika ile yaswipiswa, natenepo iye athema kuchinga tsisi yache pansiku yache yakupichenesa nsiku yachinomwe." 
Numbers6:10 Tenepo pansiku yachisere iye adze na nkhangaiwa ziwiri penu majiwa mawiri kuna nyansembe pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu. 
Numbers6:11 Nyansembe apereke nsembe ibodzi kuna MBUYA ninga chakupereka chabulusira pyakudawa. Pontho inango ile aipereke kuna MBUYA ninga nsembe zakupyerera kuchita mwambo wakuchenesa nawo munthu ule thangwi iye adadawa pakukhala chifupi pikhafa munthu ule. Nsiku yonthoyo iye athema kuchitisa tsisi yache kukhala pontho yakupambulika. 
Numbers6:12 Iye athema kupipambulira pontho yekha ene kuna MBUYA thangwi ndzidzi wa nduli nkhabe werengerwa tayu, thangwi tsisi yache yakupambulika idaswipiswa. Natenepo iye athema kudza na mwanabira wa chaka chibodzi kuti akhale nsembe yakupagalira pyakudawa." 
Numbers6:13 Ndzidzi udadumbira iye kukhala Mnaziri ungamala, iye athema kuchita mwambo ufu: iye aende pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu" 
Numbers6:14 kapereka pamaso pa MBUYA nyama zitatu zakusowa chilema: bira wamamuna wa chaka chibodzi kuti akhale nsembe yakupyerera, bira wamkazi wa chaka chibodzi kuti akhale nsembe yakubulusira pyakudawa, na bira wamamuna kuti akhale nsembe yachiphatizano." 
Numbers6:15 Iye akwate pontho chakupereka cha mapira na chakupereka cha pyakumwa pontho na chitundu cha mikate yakusowa chakufufumisira, mikate yakutapira yakusasanywa na ufa wakunyodoka wakuvungazwa na mafuta aolivi, pontho na pitumbuwa pyakukhwazwa mafuta." 
Numbers6:16 Nyansembe apereke pinthu pyonsene kuna MBUYA kukhala nsembe yakubulusira pyakudawa na nsembe yakupyerera. 
Numbers6:17 Apereke chitundu chile pamaso pa MBUYA mbapereka nsembe ya bira wamamuna kukhala nsembe yachiphatizano; apereke pontho chakupereka cha mapira na chakupereka cha pyakumwa. 
Numbers6:18 Pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu Mnaziriyo athema kuchinga tsisi yache yakupambulika ile. Kubuluka penepo akwate tsisiyo akaiponye pamoto, ule ukupyereza chakupereka cha chiphatizano." 
Numbers6:19 Mnaziriyo angamala chinga tsisi yakuonesa kupambulika kwache ile, nyansembe akwate mwendo ubodzi wakumsolo wa bira wakuphikwa kale, pabodzi pene na mkate na pitumbuwa pyakusowa chakufufumisira kubulukira m'chitundu mule mbapiikha m'manja mwache Mnaziriyo." 
Numbers6:20 Kubuluka penepo apipereke kuna MBUYA ninga mtukwa wakupambulika; ipyo mphyakuchena pontho mphya anyansembe pabodzi pene na bele, pontho na mwendo wakuthako wa bira pidaperekwa kuna MBUYA pile. Penepi pingamala chitika Mnaziri anakwanisa kumwa vinyu." 
Numbers6:21 Wenewu ndiye mwambo wa Mnaziri; mbwenye ngakhala Mnaziri anadumbira kuti anapereka pizinji kupiringana munafunikira ipyo kuti piperekwe malingana na Unaziri wachewo, iye athema kuchita ninga monthomo malingana na kudumbira kwacheko." 
Numbers6:22 MBUYA adapanga Mose 
Numbers6:23 kulonga kuna Aroni na anache kuti iwo angafuna kutsanzayisa Aisraele athema kuphatisa basa mafala awa: 
Numbers6:24 MBUYA mbakutsanzayiseni na kukuyang'anirani mwadidi; 
Numbers6:25 MBUYA mbakukomereni mtima na kukuverani nsisi; 
Numbers6:26 MBUYA mbachitise pinthu pyanu kufamba mwadidi na kukupasani mtendere. 
Numbers6:27 Natenepo MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Ngakhala iwo anathula dzinanga kutsanzayisa Aisraele, ndinati ndiatsanzayisedi.”" 
Numbers7:1 Pansiku idamalisa Mose kuimisa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu chile, iye adadzoza na kupambulira kuna MBUYA Chikhumbicho na pinthu pyache pyonsene, pontho na guwa yansembe pabodzi pene na pinthu pyache pyonsene." 
Numbers7:2 Tenepo akadamu a mbumba, ale akhali akadamu a madzinza a Israele, anthu onthowo ale akhayang'anira pya kalembera," 
Numbers7:3 adadza na pyakupereka pyawo kuna MBUYA: pingolo pitanthatu na ng'ombe zache zakukweya pingolopyo khumi na ziwiri. Chingolo chibodzi chikhaimirira akadamu awiri; ng'ombe ibodzi yakukweya chingolo ikhaimirirambo mkadamu mbodzi. Pidadza iwo napyo ku Chikhumbi chile," 
Numbers7:4 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Numbers7:5 “Tambira mitukwayi kuti iphatiswe basa pa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu. Uipereke kuna Alevi malingana na basa yathema iwo kuphata.” 
Numbers7:6 Natenepo Mose adapereka pingolo na ng'ombe zache zene zile kuna dzinza ya Levi. 
Numbers7:7 Iye adapereka pingolo piwiri na ng'ombe zache zene zinayi kuna mbumba ya Gereshoni malingana na basa yathema iwo kuphata," 
Numbers7:8 na pingolo pinayi na ng'ombe zache zene zisere kuna mbumba ya Merari, malingana na basa yathema iwo kuphata. Iwo onsene akhali pansi pa utongi wa Itamara mwana Aroni nyansembe." 
Numbers7:9 Mbwenye Mose hadapereke ngolo penu ng'ombe kuna mbumba ya Kohati tayu, thangwi basawo ikhali yakuthukula paphewa pinthu pyonsene pyakupambulika pamaso pa MBUYA pikhayang'anira iwo pile." 
Numbers7:10 Akadamumbo adadza na pyakupereka pyawo kusekera kupambulirwa kwa guwa yansembe. Pidamala iwo sasanyika kuti apereke mitukwawo paguwa yansembe," 
Numbers7:11 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Uapange kuti nsiku na nsiku mpakana nsiku khumi na ziwiri zimale, mkadamu onsene athema kupereka mitukwache kusekera kupambulirwa kwa guwa yansembe.”" 
Numbers8:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Numbers8:2 “Mpange Aroni kuti aikhe nyale zinomwe pachakuikhirapo chache, towera cheza chache chimwinikire kutsogoloko.”" 
Numbers8:3 Aroni adaveradi mbaikha nyalezo kuziyang'anisa kutsogolo kwa chakuikhirapo nyale. 
Numbers8:4 Kutomera padzulu mpakana pansi chakuikhirapo nyalechi chidasasanywa na golidi wakuchita kufulwa na nyundo malingana na msasanyiro wache ukhadaoneswa Mose na MBUYA. 
Numbers8:5 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Numbers8:6 “Pambula dzinza ya Alevi pakati pa Aisraele onsene, pontho uchite mwambo wakuachenesa" 
Numbers8:7 pakuchita tenepa: uawazire madzi akuachitisa kuti iwo akhale akuchena, pontho uapange kuti apale tsisi na ujoya onsene wa m'manungo, pontho na kufula nguwo zawo. Tenepo iwo anakhala akuchena pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Numbers8:8 Kubuluka penepo iwo athema kukwata mwanamphulu wamamuna pabodzi pene na chakupereka cha mapira cha ufa wakunyodoka wakuvungazwa na mafuta aolivi; pontho athema kukwata ng'ombe inango imuna kuti ikhale nsembe yakubulusira pyakudawa. 
Numbers8:9 Kubuluka penepo gumanyisani dzinza yonsene ya Aisraele. Tenepo kwatani dzinza ya Alevi kuaimisa patsogolo pa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu. 
Numbers8:10 Aisraele asanjike manjawo pamsolo pa Alevi," 
Numbers8:11 natenepo Aroni apereke kuna ine Alevi ninga mtukwa wakupambulika kuna ine kubulukira pakati pa Aisraele towera andiphatire basa. 
Numbers8:12 Alevi asanjike manjawo pana ng'ombe zimuna ziwiri; ibodzi yathema kuperekwa ninga nsembe yakubulusira pyakudawa, inangomboyo ninga nsembe yakupyerera, towera achite mwambo wakuchenesa nawo Alevi." 
Numbers8:13 “Imirisa Alevi pamaso pa Aroni na anache mbuapereke kuna MBUYA ninga mtukwa wakupambulika pakati pa Aisraele. Aroni na anache anakhala anyakuyang'anira Alevi. 
Numbers8:14 Apambule na njira yeneyi pakati pa Aisraele onsene towera iwo akhale anga ene. 
Numbers8:15 Ungamala kuichenesa na kuipambula dzinza ya Alevi kuna ine, iyo inakhala yakuthema kuphata basa m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu." 
Numbers8:16 Enewa mba Israele ale athema kuperekwa kuna ine. Ine ndaakwata kukhala anga ene m'mbuto mwa ana autombo onsene a Aisraele. 
Numbers8:17 Mwana wautombo wachimuna onsene wa Aisraele, wa munthu penu wa nyama, ngwanga. Pidapha ine ana autombo achimuna onsene a mu Iguputo, ana autombo onsene a Aisraele ndidaapambula kuti akhale anga ene." 
Numbers8:18 Chinchino ndakwata dzinza ya Alevi m'mbuto mwa ana autombo achimuna onsene a Aisraele. 
Numbers8:19 Ndapereka Alevi ninga mtukwa kuna Aroni na anache achimuna kubulukira kuna Aisraele onsene, towera iwo aphate basa ya m'Chikhumbi cha kugumanikana na ine m'mbuto mwa Aisraele onsene, pontho kupereka nsembe zakulekerera pyakudawa pa Aisraele onsene, gopesera muliri unaagwera angafika chifupi na Mbuto Yakuchena.”" 
Numbers8:20 Tenepo Mose, Aroni na Aisraele onsene adapambulira dzinza ya Alevi kuna Mulungu ninga mudapilongera MBUYA kuna Mose." 
Numbers8:21 Alevi adachita mwambo wakupichenesa okha ene mbafula nguwo zawo. Tenepo Aroni adaapereka kuna MBUYA ninga mtukwa wakupambulika pyakwanga kuna iye mbachita pontho mwambo wakuachenesa. 
Numbers8:22 Aisraele adachita pyonsene pidalonga MBUYA kuna Mose pya dzinza ya Alevi. Natenepo Alevi akhadachitiswa kukhala anthu akuthema kuphata basa m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu mwakuyang'anirwa na Aroni na anache. 
Numbers8:23 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Numbers8:24 “Mamuna onsene wa dzinza ya Alevi angakwanisa pyaka makumawiri na pishanu, weneyo athema kuphata basa m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu," 
Numbers8:25 mbwenye angakwanisa pyaka makumashanu, weneyo apume pabasacheyo." 
Numbers8:26 Pandzidzi wenewu iye anakwanisa kuphedza Alevi anzache, mbwenye iye aleke phata basa ya unyansembe nsiku na nsiku. Iwe wathema dzachita ninga mwenemu kupereka basa kuna Alevi onsene.”" 
Numbers9:1 MBUYA adalonga na Mose m'thando yatchetcha ya Sinai mwezi wakutoma wa chaka chachiwiri pikhadabuluka Aisraele m'dziko ya Iguputo. Iye adalonga mbati," 
Numbers9:2 “Pansiku yakhumi na chinayi ya mwezi uno, kutomera pakuthobila dzuwa Aisraele achite Phwando ya Paska malingana na matongero pontho mwambo wache onsene.”" 
Numbers9:3  
Numbers9:4 Tenepo Mose adapanga Aisraele kuti achite Phwando ya Paska. 
Numbers9:5 Natenepo pansiku yakhumi na chinayi ya mwezi wakutoma pakuthobila dzuwa adachitadi tenepo m'thando yatchetcha ya Sinai. Aisraele adachitadi pyonsene pidatonga MBUYA kuna Mose. 
Numbers9:6 Mbwenye penepo pakhali anthu anango ale akhali okhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu thangwi ya kukhuya mtembo. Iwo hadakwanise kusekera nawo Phwando ya Paska ile tayu pansiku yeneyo. Natenepo iwo adenda kuna Mose na Aroni 
Numbers9:7 mbalonga mbati, “Ife ndife okhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu thangwi takhuya mtembo, mphapo ife tinakhondeserwanji kupereka chakupereka cha MBUYA pabodzi pene na Aisraele anzathu onsene pandzidzi wakusankhulikawu?”" 
Numbers9:8 Mose adaatawira mbati, “Dikhirani mpakana ndive chinafuna kulonga MBUYA pya imwe.”" 
Numbers9:9 Natenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Numbers9:10 “Apange Aisraele kuti ngakhala anango a imwe penu pidzukulu pyanu ngokhonda chena pamaso pa MBUYA thangwi ya kukhuya mtembo, penu iwo aenda kutali paulendo, iwo anakwanisa basi kusekera nawo Phwando ya Paska." 
Numbers9:11 Kwache iwo akutawiriswa kuchita tenepo pangagwanda mwezi ubodzi pansiku yakhumi na chinayi pakuthobila dzuwa. Iwo athema kudya nyama ya mwanabira pabodzi pene na mkate wakusowa pyakufufumisira pontho na masamba akuwawasa. 
Numbers9:12 Iwo aleke koya pyakudyapyo mpakana mangwana mwache, pontho aleke kuswa magogodo a nyamayo. Iwo athema kusekera nawo Phwando ya Paska malingana na mwambo wache." 
Numbers9:13 Mbwenye ngakhala munthu, ule ngwakuchena pontho hadabulukepo kwenda ulendo tayu mbakhonda kusekera nsiku ya Phwando ya Paska, munthu weneyo hanayeswave mbodzi wa anthu anga tayu, thangwi iye hadapereke chakupereka kuna ine pandzidzi wakusankhulika. Iye athema kuoneswa nyatwa thangwi ya kudawa kwacheko." 
Numbers9:14 “Ngakhala pana mlendo pakati panu wakufuna kusekerambo namwe pabodzi Phwando ya Paska, iye athema kuchita tenepo mwakuteweza matongero na mwambo onsene. Mwambo wache ngontho, ule wathema kutewezwa na munthu onsene, mlendo penu mbalwa ya Israele.”" 
Numbers9:15 Pansiku idaimiswa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, makole adadza mbagudumira Chikhumbicho. Na mosiku makolewo akhaoneka ninga moto." 
Numbers9:16  
Numbers9:17 Ndzidzi ukhakwira makole m'dzulu kubuluka pa Chikhumbi chile, Aisraele akhafulusa msasawo mbakamanga pontho pambuto pakhatchitha makolepo." 
Numbers9:18 Anthu akhafulusa msasawo ngakhala akhaapanga ndi MBUYA kuchita tenepo. Ngakhala makole akhathimiza kukhala padzulu pa Chikhumbi, Aisraele akhathimizambo kukhala pamsasa pontho-ponthopo." 
Numbers9:19 Ngakhala makole anakhala padzulu pa Chikhumbi ndzidzi ukulu ene, Aisraele akhavera MBUYA natenepo iwo nee akhafulukapo tayu." 
Numbers9:20 Ndzidzi unango makole akhakhala padzulu pa Chikhumbi nsiku zache pang'ono basi; MBUYA angaapanga kuti afuluke, iwo akhafulukadi, mbwenye MBUYA angaapanga kuti akhale, iwo akhakhaladi." 
Numbers9:21 Ndzidzi unango makole akhakhala kwene kutomera mosiku kufikirana mangwana mwache na kumachibese. Natenepo iwo akhafuluka sindzidzi nkhuona kuti makole ale akwira m'dzulu. Ndzidzi onsene ukhakwira makole m'dzulu penu mosiku na masikati ene, iwo akhafuluka." 
Numbers9:22 Podi makole akhale kwene nsiku ziwiri penu mwezi, penu chaka, penu kupiringana penepo, Aisraele hakhafuluka tayu ngakhala makole akhathimiza kukhala padzulu pa Chikhumbicho; mbwenye makole angakwira, iwo akhafulukapo." 
Numbers9:23 Iwo akhamanga na kufulusa msasawo pakuvera matongero a MBUYA adapereka iye kudzera muna Mose. 
Numbers10:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Numbers10:2 “Sasanya ngoma ziwiri zasiliva zakufulwa na nyundo kuti ziphatiswe basa kuchemera anthu kudza pabodzi, pontho kuapanga pya kufulusa msasa." 
Numbers10:3 Ngoma zonsene ziwiri zingalira mwakukhonda lekeza anthu onsene a Israele athema kugumanyikana pabodzi pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu. 
Numbers10:4 Mbwenye ingalira ndi ngoma ibodzi, penepo agumanyikane mbakadamu a mbumba okha basi." 
Numbers10:5 Ngoma ingalira mwakulekeza-lekeza, madzinza ale ali mumsasa kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa athema kufuluka." 
Numbers10:6 Ngomayo ingalira pontho mwakulekeza-lekeza, madzinza ale ali mumsasa kukhundu yakumwera athema kufuluka. Ngoma ingalira mwakulekeza-lekeza ndiye kuti anthu afuluse msasawo." 
Numbers10:7 Mbwenye ngakhala nkhufuna kwene kuchemera anthu kuti agumanyikane pabodzi, ngoma mbileke lizwa mwakulekeza-lekeza." 
Numbers10:8 Ngomazi zathema kulizwa na ana a Aroni anyansembe. “Matongero ali m'tchindewa athema kutewezwa na mifendu yonsene inadzayo. 
Numbers10:9 Ngakhala muli pankhondo m'dziko mwanu, kufuna kupitchinjiriza mwekha mwene kuna anyamalwanu, lizani ngoma zenezi ninga chidziwiso chakuti kuna nkhondo. Ine MBUYA Mulungu wanu ndinati ndikuphedzeni pontho kukupulumusani kuna anyamalwanu." 
Numbers10:10 Pontho pandzidzi wakusekera, pa Maphwando akusekera Kubalwa kwa mwezi na maphwando anango akusankhulika, lizani ngomazo pandzidzi unapereka imwe nsembe zakupyerera na nsembe zachiphatizano. Tenepo ine ndinati ndikuphedzeni. Ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu.”" 
Numbers10:11 Pansiku yamakumawiri ya mwezi wachiwiri wa chaka chachiwiri pikhadabuluka Aisraele m'dziko ya Iguputo, makole akukhala padzulu pa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu adakwira m'dzulu," 
Numbers10:12 natenepo Aisraele adautoma ulendo wawo kubuluka m'thando yatchetcha ya Sinai. Makole ale adadza mbaimira m'thando yatchetcha ya Parani. 
Numbers10:13 Natenepo iwo adautoma ulendo wawo ninga mudaatongera MBUYA kudzera muna Mose. 
Numbers10:14 Adatoma kwenda akhali magulu a dzinza ya Yuda pansi pa banderawo. Nashoni mwana Aminadabu ndiye akhali mkadamu wa dzinza ya Yuda. 
Numbers10:15 Netanele mwana Zuari ndiye akhali mkadamu wa dzinza ya Isakara," 
Numbers10:16 pontho Eliabu mwana Heloni ndiye akhali mkadamu wa dzinza ya Zebuloni. 
Numbers10:17 Kubuluka penepo Chikhumbi cha Mulungu chidakhutchiwa, tenepo mbumba ya Gereshoni na mbumba ya Merari, ale adathukula Chikhumbi, adalamuka kwenda." 
Numbers10:18 Achiwiri kwenda akhali magulu a dzinza ya Rubeni pansi pa banderawo. Elizuri mwana Shedeuri ndiye akhali mkadamu wa dzinza ya Rubeni. 
Numbers10:19 Shelumiele mwana Zurishadai ndiye akhali mkadamu wa dzinza ya Simioni," 
Numbers10:20 pontho Eliasafu mwana Deuele ndiye akhali mkadamu wa dzinza ya Gadi. 
Numbers10:21 Tenepo mbumba ya Kohati ya m'dzinza ya Levi adalamukambo kwenda uku athukula pinthu pyakupambulika pya m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu. Anthu enewa mbadzati fika pambuto pakhafuna iwo kumanga msasa pale, Chikhumbi cha Mulungu chikhadamala kale kuimiswa." 
Numbers10:22 Achitatu kwenda ndiye akhali magulu a dzinza ya Eferemu pansi pa banderawo. Elishama mwana Amihudi akhali mkadamu wa dzinza ya Eferemu. 
Numbers10:23 Gamaliele mwana Pedazuri ndiye akhali mkadamu wa dzinza ya Manase," 
Numbers10:24 pontho Abidani mwana Gideoni ndiye akhali mkadamu wa dzinza ya Benjemani. 
Numbers10:25 Akumalisira kwenda ndiye akhali magulu a dzinza ya Dani pansi pa banderawo, ale akhaphata basa kutchinjiriza magulu onsene m'nduli. Ahizera mwana Amishadai ndiye akhali mkadamu wa dzinza ya Dani." 
Numbers10:26 Pagiele mwana Okarani ndiye akhali mkadamu wa dzinza ya Asheri," 
Numbers10:27 pontho Ahira mwana Enani ndiye akhali mkadamu wa dzinza ya Nafitali. 
Numbers10:28 Ndzidzi onsene ukhafuluka Aisraele kwenda kunango mwenemu ndiye mukhafambira iwo panyandandanda gulu na gulu. 
Numbers10:29 Mose adalonga kuna Hobabu mwana wamamuna wa Yetero tebzalache wa ku Midiani mbati, “Ife tili chifupi kwenda kumbuto kule kudalonga MBUYA kuti anatipasa. Iye adalonga pontho kuti Aisraele pinthu pyawo pinaafambira mwadidi, natenepo tende pabodzi, pontho tinagawana nawe mfumathuyo.”" 
Numbers10:30 Mbwenye Hobabu adatawira mbati, “Nkhabe, ine ndinabwerera m'nduli kudziko ya kwathu na kuna anthu a kwathu.”" 
Numbers10:31 Mose adalonga mbati, “Ndaphata miyendo, leka kutisiya. Iwe ukudziwa kule kunafuna ife kamanga msasathu m'thandomo, natenepo iwe unakwanisa kukhala maso athu." 
Numbers10:32 Iwe ungaenda nafe pabodzi tinati tikagawane nawembo mtsanzayiso unafuna katipasa MBUYA.” 
Numbers10:33 Pidabuluka anthu paphiri ya Sinai, phiri yakuchena, adafamba nsiku zitatu. Ndzidzi onsene ukhafamba iwo Bokosi ya Chiverano cha MBUYA ikhakhala patsogolo towera igumane mbuto yakuti iwo amangepo msasa." 
Numbers10:34 Pikhafamba iwo kubuluka msasa kwenda msasa unango makole a MBUYA akhali padzulu pawo na masikati. 
Numbers10:35 Ndzidzi onsene ukhafuna kwenda Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA kunango, Mose akhalonga mbati, “Lamukani, MBUYA, mbamubalalise anyamalwanu pontho anyakukuzondani mbathawe pamaso panu.”" 
Numbers10:36 Ndzidzi onsene ukhaimira Bokosiyi, Mose akhalonga mbati, “Bwererani, MBUYA, kuna pikwi-pikwi pyokhonda lengeseka pya mabanja a Aisraele.”" 
Numbers11:1 Anthu adatoma kudungunya kuna MBUYA pya nyatwa zawo. Pidava MBUYA kudungunya kwawoko, adazhangali nawo mbagwisa moto pakati pawo mbunyekesa anthu a kukhundu yakumadolomero a msasawo." 
Numbers11:2 Anthu adalira kuna Mose kuti aaphedze, tenepo Mose adapemphera kuna MBUYA, natenepo moto udathimiratu." 
Numbers11:3 Natenepo mbutoyo idathulwa Tabera, thangwi moto wakubulukira kuna MBUYA udagaka pakati pawo." 
Numbers11:4 Pakati pa Aisraele pakhali alendo ale akhaendambo nawo pabodzi ulendo wawo. Alendo ale akhali na usa pyakwanga, tenepo na Aisraele enembo adatoma kudungunya mbati, “Ngakhala tikudyambo kwene nyama yokha mbwenye!" 
Numbers11:5 Mu Iguputo mule tikhadya pyathu nsomba yonsene inafuna ife, pontho nee tikhachita kugula tayu. Kumbukani pikhadya ife pile: makaka, mavembe pontho anyezi na pyakukomesera muliwo pinango?" 
Numbers11:6 Mbwenye chinchino ife nkhabe na maba ene tayu. Nkhabe chinthu na chibodzi chene chakuti tinakwanisa kudya tayu, mbwenye manawa basi nsiku na nsiku.”" 
Numbers11:7 Mana akhali ninga pimbewu ping'ono-ping'ono pya mtundu wakhale wakuchenerera. 
Numbers11:8 Manawa akhachita kugwa na mosiku pakati pa msasa wa Aisraele pabodzi pene na bume. Na machibese ene anthu akhazungulira kulokota manawa mbakaatibula m'banda penu kuapeya na libwe kuti adze ufa. Angamala penepo akhaaphika mbasasanya pitumbuwa. Pikhakoma ninga mkate wakuphikwa na mafuta aolivi. 
Numbers11:9  
Numbers11:10 Mose adava pyonsene pikhadungunya anthu pikhakhala iwo m'mabanja mwawo m'misuwo ya makumbi awo. Mose adasanyika pyakwanga mumtima thangwi MBUYA adazhangalira pyakwanga anthu enewa. 
Numbers11:11 Tenepo Mose adavunza MBUYA mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji mwadzesa nyatwa yeneyi pana nyabasanu? Ninji chachita ine chokhonda kukukomerani kuti mundipase nyatwa kuyang'anira anthu onsenewa?" 
Numbers11:12 Si ine ndidaalenga penu kuabala tayu! Apo thangwi yache ninji mukundipanga kuti ndiathukule anthuwa m'manja mwanga ninga mumbachitira makayaya kuthukula mwana, kwenda nawo kudziko idadumbira imwe kuna makolo awo?" 
Numbers11:13 Nyama yakukwana mwinji onsenewu ndinaikwata kupi? Iwo ambandilirira ndzidzi onsene kuti ndiapase nyama. 
Numbers11:14 Ine ndekha ene nkhabe kwanisa kuyang'anira anthu onsenewa tayu; ndi nyatwa ikulu pyakwanga kuna ine. 
Numbers11:15 Ngakhala mwenemu ndiye munafunira imwe kuti pikhale tenepo kuna ine, ndivereni nsisi, pontho ndipheni pyanu chinchino pano, towera ndileke ona nyatwa inandinensayi.”" 
Numbers11:16 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Chemeresa amuna makumanomwe ale ambadziwika kuna iwe kuti mbakadamu pontho akulu-akulu a Aisraele, adze kuna ine pa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, pontho uapange kuti aimire penepo pabodzi pene na iwe." 
Numbers11:17 Ine ndinatchitha mbandilonga nawe penepo, pontho ndinakwata khundu ibodzi ya mzimu udakupasa ine ule mbandiupereka kuna iwo. Natenepo iwo anakwanisa kukuphedza kuthukula nyatwa za anthu enewa, towera uleke thukula wekha nyatwazi." 
Numbers11:18 Chinchino pano, apange anthu kuti picheneseni mwekha mwene kusasanyikira pya mangwana; nsiku inafuna imwe kudya nyama. MBUYA ava kulira kwanu kuti, ‘Ngakhala tikudyambo nyama yokha mbwenye! Mu Iguputove mbwenye!’ Chinchino MBUYA anati akupasani nyama, tenepo munati muidyedi." 
Numbers11:19 Munati muidyedi nee nsiku ziwiri zokha penu zishanu, penu khumi, penu makumawiri tayu," 
Numbers11:20 mbwenye mwezi wamumphu mpakana ichite kubulukira m'mphuno mwanumo, pontho mpakana muchite kutapika nayo. Penepi pinati pichitike thangwi imwe mudamkhonda MBUYA ule ali pano pakati panu, pontho mukhadungunya pamaso pache kuti, ‘Ife tidabulukiranji m'dziko ya Iguputo?’ ”" 
Numbers11:21 Mose adalonga kuna MBUYA mbati, “Anthu anatsogolera ine pano ndi pikwi madzana matanthatu, ndiye mukulonga kuti munaapasa nyama yakukwana kudya mwezi wamumphu?" 
Numbers11:22 Podi ng'ombe na mabira onsene mbadaphiwa, ayi mukunyerezera kuti mbadakwana nayo nyamache? Podi nsomba zonsene za nyanza mbazidaphiwa, ayi mukunyerezera kuti mbazidaakwana?”" 
Numbers11:23 MBUYA adatawira mbati, “Kani mphamvu zanga zina madire? Chinchino pano unati uone ngakhala pyalonga inepi pinachitika penu tayu?”" 
Numbers11:24 Natenepo Mose adabuluka panja mbakapanga anthu pikhadalonga MBUYA pile. Iye adagumanyisa akadamu makumanomwe ale mbaaikha mwakuzungulira Chikhumbi cha Mulungu. 
Numbers11:25 Tenepo MBUYA adatchithira m'makole mbalonga kuna Mose. Iye adakwata khundu inango ya mzimu udapereka iye kuna Mose mbaupereka kuna akadamu makumanomwe ale. Pidafika mzimu ule pana iwo, onsene adatoma kulonga ninga maprofeti, mbwenye hadakwate ndzidzi ukulu tayu." 
Numbers11:26 Awiri mwa akadamu makumanomwe ale, Elidadi na Medadi akhadasala pyawo mumsasa mule, nee kwenda ku Chikhumbi cha Mulungu tayu. Mwenemo mukhali iwomo mzimu adadza pana iwo mbatomambo kulonga ninga maprofeti." 
Numbers11:27 Mphale unango adathamanga kapanga Mose pikhachita Elidadi na Medadi pile. 
Numbers11:28 Tenepo Yoswa mwana Nuni, ule akhali nyakuphedza Mose kutomera uphaleache adalonga mbati, “Mose, mbuyanga, akhondeseni!”" 
Numbers11:29 Mose adatawira mbati, “Kani iwe ukuchita nawo bivu thangwi ya ine? Ine ndimbapifuna pyakwanga kuti anthu a MBUYA onsene akhale maprofeti, pontho kuti MBUYA aikhe Mzimu wache muna iwo.”" 
Numbers11:30 Tenepo Mose na akadamu makumanomwe ale adabwerera kumsasa kule. 
Numbers11:31 Mwakututumusa MBUYA adatumiza mphepo mbiikwata makambuma kubulukira kunyanza kudza nawo kumsasa wa Aisraele. Makambuma adaphama mumsasa mbaphopha pansi ponsene pene na mulu wakufika m'ntchafu kuzungulira msasawo nsinzo wache ninga ulendo wa nsiku ibodzi kukhundu zonsene. 
Numbers11:32 Natenepo mosiku na masikati a nsiku yeneyo, pontho na mangwana mwache, anthu adagundika kuphata makambuma; nkhabe munthu adaphata pyakuchepa kupiringana makilogramu chikwi kulemera kwache tayu. Aisraele adaathasika mumsasa onsene ule kuti aume." 
Numbers11:33 Nyama ile pidafika iyo kati na kati kudyiwa, MBUYA adazhangali nawo anthu ale mbagwisa muliri wakugoswa pakati pawo." 
Numbers11:34 Mbuto yeneyo idathulwa Kibiroti-Hataava, thangwi penepo ndiye padaikhwa anthu akufa ale akhali na usa." 
Numbers11:35 Kubuluka penepo anthu adafulukira ku Hazeroti, kweneko ndiye kudamanga iwo msasawo." 
Numbers12:1 Mose akhadasemba mkazi wa dzinza ya Kushi, natenepo Miriamu na Aroni adasumulula Mose thangwi ya Penepyo." 
Numbers12:2 Iwo adalonga mbati, “Kadi MBUYA ambalonga kudzera muna Mose yekha basi? Kadi iye hambalongambo kudzera muna ife tayu?” MBUYA adava pidalonga iwo pile." 
Numbers12:3 Mose akhali munthu wakupichepesa pyakwanga kupiringana munthu unango onsene padziko yapansi. 
Numbers12:4 Vumbu-vumbu MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose, Aroni na Miriamu mbati, “Ndinafuna imwe utatuanu mudze kuno ku Chikhumbi cha Mulungu.” Iwo adendadi." 
Numbers12:5 MBUYA adatchitha mumzati wa makole mbaimira pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi chile mbachemera mbati, “Aroni! Miriamu!” Anthu awiriwo adenda patsogolo," 
Numbers12:6 tenepo MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Veserani pinafuna ine kulongapi! Pakati panu pangakhala pana mprofeti, ine ndimbapionesera kuna iye kumasomphenya, pontho kulonga naye kundoto." 
Numbers12:7 Mbwenye mphyakusiyana ndingafuna kulonga na nyabasanga Mose ine nkhabe chita tenepo tayu; weneyu ndamuikha kukhala mkadamu wakuyang'anira Aisraele onsene. 
Numbers12:8 Natenepo ine ndimbalonga naye maso na maso mwakuveka mwadidi nee mwanthanthi tayu; pontho iye aona na makhaliro anga ene! Ninji chakuchitisani kuwanga mtima tenepo kulonga mwakupokanyisana na nyabasanga Mose?” 
Numbers12:9 MBUYA adazhangali nawo mbabulukapo pyache," 
Numbers12:10 pontho makole adabuluka pa Chikhumbi chile. Vumbulukutu khanda ya Miriamu idaphatwa na matanya mbisanduka yakuchena ninga matalala. Pidaona Aroni kuti Miriamu aphatwa na matanya," 
Numbers12:11 iye adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Ndaphata miyendo, mbuyanga, lekani kuchitisa kuti titchunyuke ninga tenepa thangwi ya pyakudawa pyathu pyachita ife mwakupupwapi." 
Numbers12:12 Lekani tawirisa kuti iye asanduke ninga munthu wakubalwa wakufa kale na khanda yakudyiwa khundu ibodzi.” 
Numbers12:13 Natenepo Mose adadembetera MBUYA mwakugaluza fala mbati, “Mulungu, ndaphata miyendo muwangiseni.”" 
Numbers12:14 MBUYA adatawira mbati, “Mbadakhala kuti babache adamphulira mata kunkhope, ayi iye mbadakhala okhonda chena tayu nsiku zinomwe? Natenepo mbuluseni kuti akhale kunja kwa msasa nsiku zinomwe. Angamala penepo anakwanisa kubwerera.”" 
Numbers12:15 Miriamu adafungirwa kunja kwa msasa nsiku zinomwe. Natenepo anthu hadafuluke kuthimiza ulendo wawo tayu kufikirana iye adabwerera mumsasa mule. 
Numbers12:16 Kubuluka penepo iwo adafuluka pa Hazeroti mbakamanga msasawo m'thando yatchetcha ya Parani. 
Numbers13:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Numbers13:2 “Sankhula amuna angasi kuti akazonde dziko ya Kanani, ile inafuna ine kuipereka kuna Aisraele; kada dzinza usankhulepo mkadamu mbodzi.”" 
Numbers13:3 Mose adaveradi MBUYA natenepo kubulukira m'thando yatchetcha ya Parani iye adatuma akadamu awa: 
Numbers13:4 Shamua mwana Zakuri wa dzinza ya Rubeni; Shafati mwana Hori wa dzinza ya Simioni; Kalebu mwana Yefune wa dzinza ya Yuda; Igali mwana Yosefe wa dzinza ya Isakara; Hoshea mwana Nuni wa dzinza ya Eferemu; Paliti mwana Rafu wa dzinza ya Benjemani; Gadiele mwana Sodi wa dzinza ya Zebuloni; Gadi mwana Susi wa dzinza ya Manase; Amiele mwana Gemali wa dzinza ya Dani; Setura mwana Mikaele wa dzinza ya Asheri; Nahibi mwana Vofusi wa dzinza ya Nafitali; Geuele mwana Maki wa dzinza ya Gadi. 
Numbers13:5  
Numbers13:6  
Numbers13:7  
Numbers13:8  
Numbers13:9  
Numbers13:10  
Numbers13:11  
Numbers13:12  
Numbers13:13  
Numbers13:14  
Numbers13:15  
Numbers13:16 Enewa mbanthu adatuma Mose kuti akazonde dziko ya Kanani. Mose adatchandula dzina Hoshea mwana Nuni kukhala Yoswa. 
Numbers13:17 Pidaatumiza Mose kuti akazonde dziko ile, iye adalonga mbati, “Kubulukira pano ndokoni kumpoto kudzera kuthando yatchetcha ya Negebu mpakana kunthemba ya mapiri." 
Numbers13:18 Kaoneni kuti yeneyi ndi dziko ya mtundu wanji? Anakhala mwenemowo mbanthu angasi? Anthu enewa ngamphamvu zawo penu tayu? 
Numbers13:19 Kaoneni ngakhala mataka a m'dzikoyo ngadidi penu tayu, pontho ngakhala anthu akukhala maluwani akutchingwa na mpanda penu tayu." 
Numbers13:20 Kaoneni ngakhala matakache ngakubalisa pinthu, pontho ngakhala ndi dziko ya miti mizinji. Onesesani kuti pakubwera kubulukira kweneko mudze na nsapo zingasi za m'dzikomo.” (Wenewu ukhali ndzidzi wakutoma kufira kwa mfesa.)" 
Numbers13:21 Natenepo amuna ale adenda kumpoto kwa dziko ile mbakaizonda kubulukira m'thando yatchetcha ya Zini kumwera mpakana ku Rehobu chifupi na makata a Hamati kumpoto. 
Numbers13:22 Iwo chakutoma adenda kudzera kuthando yatchetcha ya Negebu ile mbafika ku Hebroni, kule kumbakhala nkhonda Ahimani, Sheshai na Talimai, pidzukulu pya Anaki. Mzinda wa Hebroni udamangwa pyaka pinomwe, mzinda wa Zoani mu Iguputo mbadzati mangwa." 
Numbers13:23 Iwo adafika kuphedi ya Eshikolo, tenepo kweneko iwo adagwandako tsamvu ile ikhali na tsaputu ya nsapo zamfesa. Iyo ikhalemera pyakwanga mwakuti idachita kuthukuliwa pa mtembero. Iwo adadza pontho na mtheme na mkuyu." 
Numbers13:24 Mbuto yeneyo idathulwa phedi ya Eshikolo, thangwi tsaputu yamfesa zile idagwandwa penepo." 
Numbers13:25 Pidamala iwo zonda dziko ile nsiku makumanayi, anthu ale adabwerera" 
Numbers13:26 kuna Mose, Aroni na dzinza yonsene ya Israele, ale akhali pa Kadeshi m'thando yatchetcha ya Parani. Iwo adalonga kuna adaatuma ale pontho na kuna dzinza yonsene pinthu pidaona iwo pontho adaaonesa nsapo zikhadadza na iwo zile." 
Numbers13:27 Iwo adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Ife taizonda dziko ile, tenepo taiona kuti njamphonje; nsapo zache zinango zabwera na ifezi nsizi." 
Numbers13:28 Mbwenye anthu ache anakhala mwenemo ngamphamvu, pontho mizindawo njikulu-ikulu yakutchingwa na mpanda. Kuthimiza penepo tidaonamo pidzukulu pya Anaki." 
Numbers13:29 Aamaleki ambakhala m'thando yatchetcha ya Negebu; Ahiti, Ayebusi, na Aamori ambakhala m'mapiri; pontho Akanani ambakhala chifupi na Bara ya Mediterania pontho m'khundu-khundu mwa mkulo wa Yorodani.”" 
Numbers13:30 Kalebu adamatamisa anthu akhadagumanyikana mwakuzungulira Mose ale mbalonga mbati, “Ife tendeni kweneko tikaikwate dziko yathuyo. Ife tina mphamvu pyakwanga zakukwanisa kuakunda nazo.”" 
Numbers13:31 Mbwenye anthu akhadenda pabodzi na Kalebu ale adalonga mbati, “Ife nkhabe mphamvu zakukwanisa kusosa nazo anthu enewa tayu; anthu a kweneko ana mphamvu pyakwanga kupiringana ife.”" 
Numbers13:32 Natenepo iwo adalonga pyakunama pakati pa Aisraele pya dziko ikhadazonda iwo ile. Iwo adalonga mbati, “Dzikoyo nkhabe mataka akubalisa pinthu pyakukwana kudyesa anthu onsene anakhala mwenemowo tayu. Munthu onsene adaona ife akhali wakulapha," 
Numbers13:33 pontho tidaonamo amuna amphamvu akujintcha, pidzukulu pya Anaki. Ife tikhaoneka kwene ninga nthete pamaso pawo, pontho ife tikhapionambo tenepo.”" 
Numbers14:1 Mosiku onsene anthu adalira pyakwanga mwakugaluza fala. 
Numbers14:2 Iwo akhadungunya kuna Mose pontho Aroni mbalonga mbati, “Mphyadidi ife mbatidafera pyathu ku Iguputo kule, penu m'thando yatchetcha muno." 
Numbers14:3 MBUYA anatikwatiranji kwenda nafe m'dziko yeneyo. Ife tinati timale puluzika pankhondo, pontho akazathu na anathu anati aphatwe. Ayi si pyadidi tayu kuti ife tibwerere pyathu ku Iguputo?”" 
Numbers14:4 Natenepo iwo adalonga kuna unango na mwanzache mbati, “Tendeni tisankhule nyakutitsogolera kuti tibwerere pyathu ku Iguputo!”" 
Numbers14:5 Tenepo Mose na Aroni adapigwisa na fufumimba pamaso pa anthu onsene. 
Numbers14:6 Yoswa mwana Nuni na Kalebu mwana Yefune, ale akhali abodzi mwa anyakuzonda dziko adatsukwala pyakwanga mbang'amba nguwo zawo." 
Numbers14:7 Natenepo iwo adalonga kuna anthu mbati, “Dziko idenda ife kazonda ile njadidi pyakwanga." 
Numbers14:8 Ngakhala MBUYA anatikomera mtima, anati atikwate kwenda nafe kweneko katipasa dziko yamphonje." 
Numbers14:9 Lekani kumpandukira MBUYA, pontho lekani gopa anthu anakhala mwenemowo. Tinati tikaakunde mwakukhonda bulusa kaluma. Pyonsene pyakuatchinjiriza pyamala, mbwenye Mulungu ali nafe. Natenepo lekani chita mantha na anthu enewa.”" 
Numbers14:10 Mbwenye gulu yonsene ya Aisraele ikhaganagana pyakuaponyera miyala kuti aaphe. Vumbu-vumbu demelero ya MBUYA idaoneka padzulu pa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu pamaso pa Aisraele onsene. 
Numbers14:11 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Anthu enewa analeka lini kundikhonda? Iwo analeka lini kukhonda kundinyindira, podi kwene kuti ndachita pinthu pyakudodomesa pizinji pakati pawo?" 
Numbers14:12 Ine ndinati ndigwise muliri pakati pawo kuti onsene amale vungika, mbwenye iwe wekha ndinakuchitisa kukhala baba wa dzinza ikulu pontho yamphamvu kupiringana iwo.”" 
Numbers14:13 Mbwenye Mose adalonga kuna MBUYA mbati, “Anthuwa mudaadzesa ndimwe na mphamvu zanu kuabulusa m'dziko ya Iguputo. Tenepo anthu a ku Iguputo angava pinthu pinafuna imwe chitira anthu anupi," 
Numbers14:14 anati apilonge kuna anthu a muno. Anthu enewa adava kale kuti imwe MBUYA muli pakati pathu, mumbaoneka pakwecha makole anu angaimira padzulu pathu, pontho kuti ife tingafamba na masikati imwe mumbakhala patsogolo pathu mumzati wa makole, pontho tingafamba na mosiku imwe mumbakhala patsogolo pathu mumzati wa moto." 
Numbers14:15 Tenepo imwe mungaapha anthu anu onsenewa, madzinza ale adava pya mbiri yanu yadidi analonga" 
Numbers14:16 kuti imwe mudaapha anthu anuwo m'thando yatchetcha thangwi mudapichimwana kuadzesa anthuwa m'dziko idadumbira imwe kuna iwo ile. 
Numbers14:17 Natenepo, MBUYA, ndikupempha kuti mutionese mphamvu zanu, pontho mutichitire pinthu pidadumbira imwe kuna ife, pidalonga imwe kuti," 
Numbers14:18 ‘Ine, MBUYA, si ine wachitswu tayu; ine ndimbaonesa munthu kumfuna kwanga kokhonda mala, kukhulupirika kwanga, kulekerera kwanga nyakudawa na nyakupandukira. Kwache ine nkhabe leka kutchunyusa munthu angadawa; ine ndimbatchunyusa mwana thangwi ya kudawa kwa makolo ache mpakana mfendu wachitatu na wachinayi ene.’" 
Numbers14:19 Natenepo MBUYA malingana na kukula kwa kuafuna kwanu kokhonda mala, ndikupempha kuti mulekerere kudawa kwa anthu enewa ninga mukhachitira imwe kutomera pakutoma pidabuluka iwo m'dziko ya Iguputo.”" 
Numbers14:20 MBUYA adatawira mbati, “Ndiaalekerera ninga mwapemphera iwe." 
Numbers14:21 Mbwenye ine ninga wamoyo, pontho ninga demelero yanga imbadzala m'dziko yonsene yapansi, ndikudumbira" 
Numbers14:22 kuti nkhabe mbodzi wa anthu enewa anati apite m'dzikomo tayu. Iwo aona demelero yanga na pyakudodomesa pidachita ine mu Iguputo na m'thando yatchetcha mwene. Ndzidzi uno wayesa iwo kupirira kwangawu ngwachikhumi mbakhonda kundivera. 
Numbers14:23 Natenepo anthu enewa hanafika tayu m'dziko idadumbira ine kuna makolo awo ile. Nkhabe na mbodzi ene wa anthu, andikhonda ale, anapitave m'dzikomo." 
Numbers14:24 Nyabasanga Kalebu na thangwi yakuti ana mtima wakusiyana na anzache, pontho kuti ambandivera na mtima onsene, ine ndinati ndimdzese kudziko idazonda iye ile, pontho pidzukulu pyache pinakwata dzikoyo." 
Numbers14:25 Podi Aamaleki na Akanani akukhala m'maphedi a mwenemo, mangwana mubwerere m'nduli mbamuende kuthando yatchetcha na njira yakwendera ku Nyanza Yakufira.”" 
Numbers14:26 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose na Aroni mbati," 
Numbers14:27 “Anthu akudawikawa analeka lini kudungunya kuna ine? Kudungunya kwawo ndakwana nako! 
Numbers14:28 Natenepo uapange kuti, ‘Ine ninga wamoyo ndikudumbira kuti ndinati ndikuchitireni pinthu pyapempha imwe. Ndalonga tenepo ndine pano, MBUYA." 
Numbers14:29 Imwe munati mufe, pontho mitembo yanu inati ikhale nadza-nadza m'thando yatchetcha muno. Na thangwi yakuti imwe mwadungunya kuna ine, nkhabe mbodzi wa imwe wakupiringana pyaka makumawiri pyakubalwa" 
Numbers14:30 anati akafike m'dziko idadumbira ine kuti ndinati ndikutawiriseni kuti mukhale kweneko, mbwenye chinchino nkhabe mbodzi pakati panu anati akakhalemo kupambula Kalebu na Yoswa." 
Numbers14:31 Imwe mwalonga kuti ananu anakaphatwamo, mbwenye ine ndinati ndiende nawo m'dziko yakhonda imwe ile, pontho iwo anakhalamo mwakukomerwa." 
Numbers14:32 Imwe munafera m'thando yatchetcha muno. 
Numbers14:33 Ananu anatsalakatika pyaka makumanayi kusanyika thangwi ya kukhonda khulupirika kwanu, kufikirana munthu wakumalisira wa imwe afe." 
Numbers14:34 Munati muoneswe nyatwa pyaka makumanayi thangwi ya pyakudawa pyanu. Chaka chibodzi chikuimirira nsiku ibodzi ya nsiku makumanayi pikhazonda imwe dziko ile. Imwe munati mupidziwe kuti kukhonda komerwa kwanga namwe ninji! 
Numbers14:35 Ndinadumbira kuti penepi ndinapichita kuna imwe anthu akudawika, imwe ale mudagumanyikana pabodzi kupokanyisana na ine. Muno m'thando yatchetcha monsene munati mufe. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.’ ”" 
Numbers14:36 Amuna akhadatuma Mose kazonda dziko ale adadza na mbiri yakunama ile, adachitisa anthu kuti adungunye kuna MBUYA. Natenepo MBUYA adaagwisira muliri mbafa." 
Numbers14:37  
Numbers14:38 Gulu ya anthu khumi na awiri adenda kazonda dziko ale, adasala na moyo mbanthu awiri basi, Yoswa na Kalebu." 
Numbers14:39 Pidapanga Mose Aisraele pinthu pikhadalonga MBUYA pile, anthuwo adasintili pyakwanga." 
Numbers14:40 Bzobzo mangwana mwache na machibese iwo adatoma ulendo kwenda kunthemba ya mapiri ile, uku akulonga kuti, “Chinchino tasasanyika kwenda kudziko idadumbira MBUYA kuna ife ile. Ndimomwene kuti ife tadawa.”" 
Numbers14:41 Mbwenye Mose adalonga mbati, “Apo thangwi yache ninji mukuthimiza kukhonda kumvera MBUYA. Pinachita imwepyo nee munaganyali napyobi!" 
Numbers14:42 Lekani kwenda thangwi MBUYA hali namwe tayu, tenepo anyamalwanu anati akukundeni." 
Numbers14:43 Kweneko mungamenyana na Aamaleki pontho Akanani, munati mukafe pankhondo; MBUYA hanakhala pakati panu tayu thangwi imwe mwabauka kubuluka kuna iye.”" 
Numbers14:44 Mbwenye iwo adapithemba kwenda kunthemba ya mapiri, podi kwene kuti Bokosi ya Chiverano cha MBUYA pontho na Mose ene adasala kumsasa kule." 
Numbers14:45 Natenepo Aamaleki na Akanani akhakhala kweneko ale adaamenya mbaakunda pontho adaathamangisa mpakana ku Horima. 
Numbers15:1 MBUYA adapanga Mose 
Numbers15:2 kulonga kuna Aisraele kuti: mungafika m'dziko inafuna ine kukupasani ile," 
Numbers15:3 imwe mwathema kupereka kuna MBUYA ng'ombe imuna, bira wamamuna, bira wamkazi penu mbuzi ninga pyakupereka pyakusasanywa na moto, zile ndi nsembe zakupyerera, penu nsembe zakuchitisa kuti pidadumbira imwe pikwane-kwane, penu ninga chakupereka chakufuna kwa munthu, penu ninga chakupereka pa maphwando anu achipembedzo; khwema ya nsembe zenezi yakusasanywa na moto imbamkomera MBUYA." 
Numbers15:4 Munthu onsene wakupereka kuna MBUYA bira, penu mbuzi kuti ikhale nsembe yakupyerera, athema kudza pontho na ufa wakukwana kilogramu ibodzi wakuvungazwa na mafuta aolivi akukwana tugwe mbodzi ninga chakupereka cha mapira pabodzi pene na vinyu wakukwana tugwe mbodzi padzulu pa nyama yonsene inadza na iye." 
Numbers15:5  
Numbers15:6 Angaperekwa ndi bira wamamuna, ufa wakulemera makilogramu awiri wakuvungazwa na mafuta aolivi akukwana tugwe na theka piperekwe kuna MBUYA ninga chakupereka cha mapira" 
Numbers15:7 pabodzi pene na vinyu wakukwana tugwe mbodzi na theka. Khwema ya nsembe zenezi imbamkomera MBUYA. 
Numbers15:8 Ngakhala inaperekwa kuna MBUYA ndi ng'ombe imuna ninga nsembe yakupyerera, penu nsembe kuti ikhale chakupereka chakuchitisa kuti pidadumbira imwe pikwane-kwane, penu nsembe yachiphatizano," 
Numbers15:9 chakupereka cha mapira chakukwana ufa wakunyodoka wakulemera makilogramu matatu wakuvungazwa na matugwe mawiri a mafuta aolivi iperekwa pontho kuna MBUYA 
Numbers15:10 pabodzi pene na vinyu wakukwana matugwe mawiri. Chenechi chinakhala chakupereka chakusasanywa na moto kuna MBUYA, khwemache imbamkomera MBUYA." 
Numbers15:11 Penepi ndiye pyathema kuperekwa pabodzi pene na ng'ombe imuna yonsene, bira wamamuna, bira wamkazi, penu mbuzi." 
Numbers15:12 Podi nyama zakufuna kuperekwa nsembe ziinjipe tani, mbwenye chakupereka chenechi chiperekwe padzulu pa nyama yonsene." 
Numbers15:13 Munthu onsene wakubalwa dzinza ya Israele athema kuchita penepi ngakhala iye akupereka chakupereka chakusasanywa na moto kuna MBUYA chile, khwemache imbamkomera MBUYA." 
Numbers15:14 Pontho ngakhala pakati panu pana mlendo ule abwera dzachedza kwene nsiku zingasi penu dzakhaliratu namwe anapereka chakupereka chakusasanywa na moto kuna MBUYA chile, khwemache imbamkomera MBUYA, iye athema kuchita ninga montho munachitira imwemo." 
Numbers15:15 Thangwi kutomera lero mpakana mifendu yonsene inadzayo matongero ngonthowo ali pana imwe na alendo akukhala pakati panu. Imwe na iwo ndi sasawa pamaso pa MBUYA; 
Numbers15:16 mwambo na matongero ontho-onthowo athema kukoyiwa na imwe pontho na alendo ali pakati panu ale. 
Numbers15:17 MBUYA adapanga Mose 
Numbers15:18 kulonga kuna Aisraele kuti: mungafika m'dziko inafuna ine kukupasani," 
Numbers15:19 ndzidzi onsene unadya imwe phoso ya m'dzikomo imwe mwathema kupambula pang'ono phoso yeneyo kuti ikhale chakupereka chakupambulika kuna MBUYA. 
Numbers15:20 Mungaphika mikate yanu, mkate wakutoma kuumbwa wa mapira achinchino uperekwe kuna MBUYA ninga chakupereka chakubulukira pa mapira abubuda imwe." 
Numbers15:21 Mifendu yonsene inadzayo mtukwa wenewu wakufunika wathema kuperekwa kuna MBUYA kubulukira pa mkate imbaphika imwe ile. 
Numbers15:22 Mbwenye ngakhala munthu unango apichimwana mwasusudewu kuteweza anango mwa matongero adapereka MBUYA kudzera muna Mose," 
Numbers15:23 pontho ngakhala m'tsogolo muno dzinza yonsene ya Israele inachimwana kuchita pidatonga MBUYA kudzera muna Mose," 
Numbers15:24 pontho ngakhala penepi pyachitika mwasusudewu mbapikhonda dziwika kuna dzinza yonsene ile, penepo iwo athema kupereka ng'ombe imuna kuti ikhale nsembe yakupyerera, chile khwemache imbamkomera MBUYA, pabodzi pene na chakupereka cha mapira, pontho chakupereka cha vinyu pyakuthemerana na cha ng'ombe chile. Kuthimizirapo bokho aperekwe kuti akhale nsembe yakubulusira pyakudawa." 
Numbers15:25 Nyansembe achite mwambo wakuchenesa dzinza yonsene ya Israele, natenepo iwo anati alekerwe pyakudawa pyawopyo, thangwi adapichite mwasusudewu, pontho kuti adadza na chakupereka chakusasanywa na moto kuna MBUYA, pontho na nsembe yakubulusira pyakudawa." 
Numbers15:26 Dzinza yonsene ya Israele na alendo ene akukhala pakati pawo anati alekererwe pyakudawa pyawo thangwi munthu onsene adapichita mwasusudewu. 
Numbers15:27 Ngakhala munthu mbodzi adawa mwasusudewu, iye athema kupereka mbuzi ikazi ibodzi ya chaka chibodzi kuti ikhale nsembe yakubulusira pyakudawa." 
Numbers15:28 Nyansembe achite mwambo paguwa yansembe wakuchenesa nawo munthu wakudawa mwasusudewu ule, natenepo munthuyo anati alekererwe pyakudawa pyachepyo." 
Numbers15:29 Matongero enewa akulonga kuna munthu onsene, mlendo penu Muisraele, ule adawa mwasusudewu." 
Numbers15:30 Mbwenye munthu onsene Muisraele penu mlendo anadawa chadala, munthu weneyo ashola MBUYA, natenepo iye athema kuphiwa," 
Numbers15:31 thangwi iye akhonda kuchita pidalonga MBUYA mbadawa chadala matongero ache; kudawa kwache kunagwera iye ene mwenechiro. 
Numbers15:32 Pandzidzi ukhali Aisraele m'thando yatchetcha mule, munthu unango adagumanizwa akusaka nkhuni pa Nsiku Yakupuma." 
Numbers15:33 Iye adaendeswa kuna Mose, Aroni na kuna dzinza yonsene ya Israele;" 
Numbers15:34 natenepo iye adakoyiwa mwadidi mwakuyang'anirwa thangwi chinthu chakuchita naye munthu weneyu nee chikhadziwika tayu. 
Numbers15:35 Natenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Munthu weneyo athema kuphiwa; dzinza yonsene ikamphe na miyala kunja kwa msasa.”" 
Numbers15:36 Natenepo dzinza yonsene idamkwata munthu ule mbaenda naye kunja kwa msasa. Kweneko adamponyera miyala mbafa ninga mukhadalongera MBUYA. 
Numbers15:37 MBUYA adapanga Mose 
Numbers15:38 kulonga kuna Aisraele kuti: “Sasanyani mavulere pankhomo za nguwo zanu pontho ikhanimo nkhambala yachoza pavulere yonsene. Penepi mupichite mifendu yonsene inadzayo. 
Numbers15:39 Mavulerewa anakhala ninga chikumbuso, tenepo ndzidzi onsene unaona imwe mavulere, munati mukumbuke matongero anga onsene na kuavera kwene, natenepo nee munabauka kubuluka kuna ine tayu kuteweza manyerezero anu na pikhumbo pyanu tayu." 
Numbers15:40 Mavulerewa anakukumbusani kukoya matongero anga onsene, pontho munakhaladi akupambulika kuna Mulungu wanu." 
Numbers15:41 Ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu. Ine ndidakubulusani m'dziko ya Iguputo kuti ndikhale Mulungu wanu. Ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu.” 
Numbers16:1 Kora mwana wamamuna wa Izihara wa nkhonda Kohati wa dzinza ya Levi pabodzi pene na anthu atatu a m'dzinza ya Rubeni ale ndi Datani na Abiramu, ale akhali ana achimuna a Eliabu, pontho na Oni, mwana wamamuna wa Peleti; pontho pabodzi pene na Aisraele anango madzana mawiri na makumashanu, akadamu akudziwika adasankhulwa na dzinza yonsene ale, adapandukira Mose." 
Numbers16:2  
Numbers16:3 Iwo adagumanyikana pamaso pa Mose na Aroni mbalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Imwe onsenewa ngakupambuswa kuna MBUYA, pontho MBUYA ambakhala pakati pa ife tonsene. Mphapo thangwi yache ninji mumbapiikha mwekha ene padzulu pa anthu a MBUYA onsenewa?”" 
Numbers16:4 Pidava Mose penepi adapigwisa na fufumimba mbapemphera. 
Numbers16:5 Tenepo adalonga kuna Kora na kuna anyakumtewerache mbati, “Mangwana na machibese MBUYA anati ationese munthu wache, pontho wakupambulika mbani; iye anatawirisa munthu adasankhula iye ule, kuti afike chifupi na iye paguwache ya nsembe." 
Numbers16:6 Mangwana na machibese iwe na anyakutewerako mukwate chakupalira moto, mwenemo muikhemo makala a moto na pyakufukiza pyakununkhira pamotowo. Kubuluka penepo mupikwate muende napyo paguwa yansembe. Munthu wasankhulwa na MBUYA, weneyo ndiye wakupambulika kuna MBUYA. Imwe Alevi ndiye mwapiikha maka padzulu.”" 
Numbers16:7  
Numbers16:8 Mose adathimiza kulonga kuna Kora mbati, “Ngavani imwe Alevi!" 
Numbers16:9 Kani imwe mukuchiyesa chakuchepa kuti Mulungu wa Israele adakupambulani pakati pa Aisraele anango onsene, towera imwe mufike naye chifupi kuphata basanu m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, pontho kuimira pamaso pa dzinza yonsene kuatumikira?" 
Numbers16:10 Iye akutawirisani kuti imwe pabodzi pene na Alevi anzanu onsene mukhale na chilemedzo chenechi. Kwache lero imwe munafuna kukwata pontho na unyansembe ene! 
Numbers16:11 Pinachita iwe pabodzi pene na anyakutewerako nkhupandukira MBUYA. Aroni mbanimbo kuti imwe mudungunye kuna iye?” 
Numbers16:12 Tenepo Mose adachemeresa Datani na Abiramu ana achimuna a Eliabu. Mbwenye iwo adatawira mbati, “Ife sinadzako tayu!" 
Numbers16:13 Ayi kutibulusa kwachita iwe m'dziko yamphonje ya Iguputo kudza nafe kuno kuti utiphe m'thando yatchetcha muno pidakwane tayu? Apo ukufuna pontho kuti ukhale mbuyathu basi? 
Numbers16:14 Pontho iwe nee watifikisa m'dziko yamphonje, penu kutipasa minda na minda yamfesa kukhala yathu ene tayu. Apo lero ukufuna kutinyengeza? Nkhabe, ife nee tinadzakobi!”" 
Numbers16:15 Mose adazhangali mbalonga kuna MBUYA mbati, “Lekani tawira na pyakupereka pyene pinadza na anthu enewa. Ine nee ndadawira munthu na mbodzi ene wa iwo tayu, pontho nee ndaakwatira mabulu awo na mbodzi ene tayu.”" 
Numbers16:16 Mose adalonga kuna Kora mbati, “Mangwana iwe pabodzi pene na anyakutewerako madzana mawiri na makumashanuwa mwathema kudza pamaso pa MBUYA; Aroni anakhalambo penepo." 
Numbers16:17 Munthu onsene wa imwe anakwata chakupalira moto mbaikha pyakufukiza pyakununkhira padzulu pachepo kwenda kapipereka paguwa yansembe.” 
Numbers16:18 Natenepo munthu onsene adakwata chakupalira moto chache mbaikhamo makala a moto pontho pyakufukiza pyakununkhira pamotowo. Kubuluka penepo adaimira pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu chile pabodzi pene na Mose pontho Aroni. 
Numbers16:19 Tenepo Kora adagumanyisa dzinza yonsene ya Israele mbaimira pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu kuyang'ana Mose pontho Aroni. Vumbu-vumbu demelero ya MBUYA idaoneka pana dzinza yonsene ile," 
Numbers16:20 tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose na Aroni mbati," 
Numbers16:21 “Fundukirani m'nduli kubuluka kuna anthu enewa, towera onsenewa ndiamaliletu kuavunga kabodzi na kabodzi.”" 
Numbers16:22 Mbwenye Mose na Aroni adapigwisa na fufumimba mbalonga mbati, “Sha, Mulungu imwe ndimwe phata ya moyo wa anthu onsene. Kadi munthu mbodzi angadawa mumbazhangalira dzinza yonsene ya anthu?”" 
Numbers16:23 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Numbers16:24 “Apange anthu kuti afundukire kutali na makumbi a Kora, Datani na Abiramu.”" 
Numbers16:25 Tenepo Mose pabodzi pene na akadamu a Aisraele adenda kuna Datani na Abiramu. 
Numbers16:26 Iye adalonga kuna anthu mbati, “Fundukirani kutali na makumbi a anthu akudawikawa, pontho lekani khuya chinthu na chibodzi chene cha anthu enewa, gopesera munatswairwa kubodzi na anthu enewa thangwi ya pyakudawa pyawo pyonsene.”" 
Numbers16:27 Natenepo anthu adafundukiradi kutali na makumbi a Kora, Datani na Abiramu. Datani na Abiramu akhadabuluka panja mbaimira pamsuwo wa makumbi awo pabodzi pene na anawo pontho akazawo." 
Numbers16:28 Mose adalonga kuna anthu onsene mbati, “Mwenemu ndiye munafunira imwe kudziwa kuti MBUYA ndiye adandituma kudzaphata mabasa onsenewa, pontho kuti si kufuna kwanga kuchita penepyo tayu." 
Numbers16:29 Ngakhala anthu enewa anafa ninga mumbaferambo anthu onsene, nee mwakuchita kutchunyuswa na Mulungu tayu, penepo si MBUYA adandituma tayu." 
Numbers16:30 Mbwenye ngakhala MBUYA anachita chinthu chitswa chakuti chipo nee chidzati vekabi, pontho mataka angang'ambika mbaakhudyula onsene pabodzi pene na pinthu pyawo pyonsene, towera aende amoyo kudziko ya anyakufa, penepo munati mudziwe kuti anthu enewa akhonda MBUYA.”" 
Numbers16:31 Sindzidzi pikhadamala iye kulonga, pamataka pale pakhadaponda Datani na Abiramu padang'ambika." 
Numbers16:32 Dziko idayashamula mbikhudyula amuna onsene ale pabodzi pene na mabanjawo pontho na onsene anyakutewera Kora na pinthu pyawo pene. 
Numbers16:33 Natenepo iwo adatchithira m'dziko ya anyakufa pabodzi pene na pinthu pyawo pyonsene uku ana moyo. Mataka ale adaafungira kubwerera m'mbuto mwache, tenepo iwo hadaonekeve tayu." 
Numbers16:34 Aisraele onsene akhali penepo ale, adathawa pidava iwo kulira kwa anthu ale. Iwo adakhuwa mbati, “Thawani gopesera dziko inatikhudyulira kubodzi nawo.”" 
Numbers16:35 Tenepo MBUYA adatumiza moto mbupisa na kupyereza amuna madzana mawiri na makumashanu akhadapereka pyakufukiza pyakununkhira kuna MBUYA ale. 
Numbers16:36 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Numbers16:37 “Panga Eleazara mwana Aroni nyansembe kuti abuluse pyakupalira moto pyankuwa kubulukira pa pinthu pyakusalira pya amuna adamala pyerera ale, pontho ukwate makalawo uende nawo kaataya kutali mwakuchita kuawaza, thangwi pyakupalira motopyo mphyakupambulika." 
Numbers16:38 Ipyo pidasanduka pyakupambulika mudaperekwa ipyo paguwa yansembe ya MBUYA. Natenepo ukwate pyakupalira moto pya amuna adafa thangwi ya kudawa kwawo ale mbupifule kuti pikhale pyakuphaphathika pyakugudumira napyo paguwa yansembe. Penepi pikhali chidziwiso kucheuza Aisraele.” 
Numbers16:39 Natenepo Eleazara nyansembe adakwata pyakupalira moto pile mbapifula kukhala pyakuphaphathika pyakugudumira napyo paguwa yansembe. 
Numbers16:40 Penepi pikhali chidziwiso kucheuza Aisraele kuti munthu okhonda khala chidzukulu cha Aroni aleke kudza chifupi na guwa yansembe kudzapereka pyakufukiza pyakununkhira kuna MBUYA, gopesera kuti iye anavungika ninga mudachitira Kora na anyakumtewerache. Pyonsenepi pidachitika ninga montho mudalongera MBUYA kuna Eleazara kudzera muna Mose." 
Numbers16:41 Mangwana mwache dzinza yonsene ya Israele adadungunya kuna Mose, pontho Aroni mbalonga mbati, “Imwe mwapha anthu a Mulungu.”" 
Numbers16:42 Pidamala iwo gumanyikana pabodzi kupokanyisana na Mose pontho Aroni, iwo adazungunuka kuyang'ana ku Chikhumbi cha Mulungu mbaona kuti Chikhumbicho chikhadagudumirwa na makole, pontho kuti demelero ya MBUYA ikhadaonekera." 
Numbers16:43 Mose na Aroni adenda kweneko mbakaimira kumsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu chile. 
Numbers16:44 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Numbers16:45 “Imira kutali na anthu enewa, towera onsenewa ndimale kuavunga kabodzi na kabodzi.” Onsene uwiriawo adapigwisa na fufumimba," 
Numbers16:46 tenepo Mose adalonga kuna Aroni mbati, “Kwata chakupalira moto chako, uikhemo makala a moto akubulukira pa guwa yansembe, pontho pamakalapo uikhepo pyakufukiza pyakununkhira. Ungamala penepo uchimbize kwenda napyo kuna Aisraele kuti ukachite mwambo wakuachenesa. Chimbiza thangwi kuzhangali kwa MBUYA kwafika kale, pontho muliri watoma kale pakati pa anthu.”" 
Numbers16:47 Aroni adavera mbakwata chakupalira moto chache mbathamanga kwenda nacho pakati pa anthu adagumanyikana ale. Pidaona iye kuti muliri watoma kale adaikha pyakufukiza pyakununkhira pile pamakala a moto ale mbachita mwambo wakuchenesa nawo anthu ale. 
Numbers16:48 Iwo adaimira pakati pa anyakufa na amoyo. Penepi pidachitisa kuti muliri ule umale. 
Numbers16:49 Konta ya anthu adafa na muliri wenewu ikhali pikwi khumi na pinayi pontho na madzana manomwe. Kupambula ale adafa thangwi ya kupandukira kwa Kora. 
Numbers16:50 Pikhadamala muliri ule, Aroni adabwerera kuna Mose pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu." 
Numbers17:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Numbers17:2 “Panga Aisraele kuti akupase ndodo khumi na ziwiri, mkadamu onsene wa dzinza ndodo yache. Pandodo yonsene ya munthu ulembepo dzinache," 
Numbers17:3 pontho pandodo ya dzinza ya Levi ulembepo dzina ya Aroni thangwi mkadamu onsene wa dzinza athema kukhala na ndodo ibodzi. 
Numbers17:4 Zikwate kwenda nazo ku Chikhumbi changa mbukaziikhe patsogolo pa Bokosi ya Chiverano kumbagumanikana iwe na ine kule. 
Numbers17:5 Tenepo ndodo ya munthu asankhula ine inaphwitha. Na njira yeneyi ndinachitisa kuti kudungunya kokhonda mala kwa Aisraele mwakupokanyisana na iwe kumale.” 
Numbers17:6 Natenepo Mose adapilonga kuna Aisraele, tenepo akadamu awo onsene adapereka ndodo zawo kuna Mose, kada dzinza ndodo ibodzi mwakuti ndodo zonsene pabodzi zikhali khumi na ziwiri. Ndodo ya Aroni ikhalimbo pabodzi na zinango zile." 
Numbers17:7 Kubuluka penepo Mose adakwata ndodo zonsene zile mbakaziikha m' Chikhumbi cha Mulungu patsogolo pa Bokosi ya Chiverano. 
Numbers17:8 Mangwana mwache pidapita Mose m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu chile, adaona kuti ndodo ya Aroni yakuimirira dzinza ya Levi ikhadaphwitha mbionesa maluwa mbibala nsapo zamfula zakutokota kale." 
Numbers17:9 Mose adakwata ndodo zonsene zile mbazionesa kuna Aisraele. Iwo adaona pinthu pikhadachitikapyo, tenepo mkadamu onsene adakwata ndodo yache." 
Numbers17:10 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Bwezera ndodo ya Aroni patsogolo pa Bokosi ya Chiverano. Yeneyi yathema kukoyiwa kuti icheuze anyakupandukira kuti iwo angakhonda kuleka kudungunya mwakupokanyisana na iwe, anati afe.”" 
Numbers17:11 Mose adachitadi ninga montho mudampangira MBUYA. 
Numbers17:12 Aisraele adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Tinati tife! Tinati tivungike, tonsene tinamala vungika." 
Numbers17:13 Podi munthu onsene ule anafika chifupi na Chikhumbi cha Mulungu anati afe. Ayi tonsene tinamala kufa?” 
Numbers18:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna Aroni mbati, “Kudawa konsene kunafuna dzachitwa pakutumikira m' Chikhumbi cha Mulungu kunagwera iwe, anako na Alevi. Mbwenye kudawa konsene kunafuna dzachitwa pakutumikira kwanu ninga nyansembe kunagwera iwe pabodzi pene na anako." 
Numbers18:2 Dza nawo muno abale ako dzinza ya Levi kuti uphate nawo pabodzi basa pontho kuti akuphedze ndzidzi unatumikira iwe na anako m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu. 
Numbers18:3 Iwo athema kukuphedza pontho kuphata mabasa onsene a m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu. Kwache iwo aleke khuya chinthu na chibodzi chene m'Mbuto Yakuchena penu paguwa yansembe. Ngakhala iwo anapichita, monsenene iwo na imwe ene munati mufe." 
Numbers18:4 Iwo athema kuphata basa pabodzi na iwe pontho aphate mabasawo onsene a m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu. Kwache leka kuphata basa na munthu okhonda thema pabasa yeneyi. 
Numbers18:5 Iwe wekha pabodzi na anako mwathema kuyang'anira Mbuto Yakuchena na guwa yansembe, towera kuzhangali kwanga kuleka dzaafikira pontho Aisraele." 
Numbers18:6 Ine ene pano ndidasankhula abale ako dzinza ya Alevi pakati pa Aisraele onsene kukhala mtukwako. Iwo ngakupambulika kuna ine towera akwanise kuphata mabasawo m'Chikhumbi changa. 
Numbers18:7 Mbwenye iwe wekha pabodzi na anako ene basi mwathema kuphata basa yonsene ya unyansembe, ile nkhuyang'anira guwa yansembe na pinthu pya m'Mbuto Yakuchenesesa. Penepi ndiye pyanu pinafuna imwe kuyang'anira, thangwi ine ndakupasani mtukwa wa unyansembe. Munthu onsene okhonda thema pabasa yeneyi angafika kwene chifupi na pinthu pyakupambulika anati aphiwe.”" 
Numbers18:8 MBUYA adalonga kuna Aroni mbati, “Ine ndakupasa utongi papinthu pyakuperekwa kuna ine; pyakupereka pyakupambulika pyonsene pimbandipasa Aisraele ndikupiperekambo kuna iwe na anako ninga khundu yako ndzidzi onsene." 
Numbers18:9 Iwe wathema kukwata khundu yako pa pyakupereka pyakupambulikaletu penu mphyakupereka pya mapira, penu nsembe zakupagalira pyakudawa, penu nsembe zakubulusira pyakudawa. Khundu yeneyo nja iwe na anako." 
Numbers18:10 Upidyere m'mbuto yakupambulika; mamuna onsene anakwanisa kupidya. Iwe wathema kupiyesa pyakupambulika. 
Numbers18:11 “Chinthu chonsene chakupambuliwa kubulukira pa mitukwa ya Aisraele yakuperekwa kuna ine mphyako. Penepi ndikupipereka kuna iwe na anako achimuna na achikazi ndzidzi onsene unadzawo. Munthu onsene wa pabanja pako wakuchena pamaso pa MBUYA anakwanisa kudya penepi. 
Numbers18:12 “Ine ndikukupasa mbewu zonsene zadidiletu zakutoma kutokota zimbadza na iwo ku Chikhumbi cha Mulungu kudzapereka kuna ine chaka na chaka zile. Penepi ndi: mafuta aolivi, vinyu na mapira." 
Numbers18:13 Pyonsenepi mphyako. Munthu onsene wa pabanja pako wakuchena pamaso pa MBUYA anakwanisa kudya. 
Numbers18:14 “Pinthu pyonsene m'dziko ya Israele, pile pyaperekwa kuna ine mphyako." 
Numbers18:15 “Munthu onsene wautombo penu ndi nyama, ule apereka Aisraele kuna ine ngwako. Kwache mwanache wautombo na nyamache yakutoma kubalwa, ile njokhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu pyathema kuombolwa." 
Numbers18:16 Mwana wakukwanisa mwezi ubodzi anakwanisa kuombolwa na konta yakukhazikika ya mapindi mashanu asiliva malingana na mdidache wa nsiku na nsiku," 
Numbers18:17 mbwenye mwana wakutoma kubalwa wa ng'ombe, mabira na mbuzi mbapileke kupiombola. Penepi mphyanga basi, pontho pyathema kuperekwa nsembe. Chiropa chawo uchitayire paguwa yansembe. Mafuta a nyamazo uapyereze ninga chakupereka chakusasanywa na moto; khwemacheyo imbamkomera MBUYA." 
Numbers18:18 Mbwenye nyama ya pabele, ya pamwendo wakuthako wamadyo yakubulukira pa chakupereka chakupambulika chile mphyako." 
Numbers18:19 “Ndikupereka kuna iwe, anako achimuna na achikazi mifendu yonsene inadzayo, pinthu pyonsene pyakupambulika pyakuperekwa na Aisraele kuna ine. Chenechi ntchiverano chokhonda mala chachita ine na iwe pontho na pidzukulu pyakochi.”" 
Numbers18:20 MBUYA adalonga kuna Aroni mbati, “Iwe nkhabe dzakhala na chinthu chako chene tayu, pontho nkhabe khundu ibodzi ya dziko inafuna dzaperekwa kuna iwe tayu. Ine MBUYA ndine pyakusowa pyako pyonsene.”" 
Numbers18:21 MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Chakhumi chonsene chinapereka Aisraele kuna ine ndachiperekambo kuna Alevi. Chenechi ndiye chinafuna dzapagalwi iwo thangwi ya kuphata basa yakuyang'anira Chikhumbi cha Mulungu." 
Numbers18:22 Aisraele anangowo aleke fika chifupi na Chikhumbi cha Mulungu gopesera anapidzesera okha ene imfa thangwi ya pyakudawa pyawo. 
Numbers18:23 Kutomera lero kwenda m'tsogolo Alevi okha basi ndiye anafuna kuyang'anira Chikhumbi cha Mulungu na kuphatamo basa yonsene, pontho chinthu chonsene chinafuna dzachitika mwenemo anafuna dzavunzwa ndiwo. Enewa ndi matongero akukhazikika kuna iwe na pidzukulu pyako pene. Alevi nkhabe dzakhala na chinthu chawo chene mu Israele tayu," 
Numbers18:24 thangwi ndaapasa chakhumi chonsene chimbapereka Aisraele kuna ine ninga chakupereka chakupambulika kuti chikhale chawo. Ndi thangwi yache ndidaapanga kuti iwo hanakhala na chinthu chawo chene mu Israele tayu.” 
Numbers18:25 MBUYA adapanga Mose 
Numbers18:26 kulonga kuna Alevi mbati, “Mungatambira chakhumi chidakupasani ine kuti chikhale chanu kubulukira kuna Aisraele mwathema kuperekambo chakhumi chache kuna MBUYA ninga chakupereka chakupambulika kuna MBUYA." 
Numbers18:27 Chakupereka chakupambulikachi chinayeswa sasawa na chakupereka chimbapereka nyakulima pa mapira a chinchino na vinyu wachinchino. 
Numbers18:28 Na njira yeneyi imwe munaperekambo chakupereka chakupambulika kuti chikhale cha MBUYA kubulukira pa chakhumi chonsene chinatambira imwe kubulukira kuna Aisraele. Imwe mwathema kupereka penepi kuna Aroni nyansembe kuti pikhale pya MBUYA. 
Numbers18:29 Perekani pyadidiletu pinatambira imwepyo. 
Numbers18:30 Mungapereka khundu yadidiletuyo, pyonsene pinasalapyo munakwanisa kupikoya ninga mumbachitira nyakulima kukoya pyonsene pyakusalira angamala pereka chakupereka chache kuna MBUYA." 
Numbers18:31 Imwe na mabanjanu munakwanisa kudyera pyakusalira pyonsene ponsene panafuna imwe thangwi kweneko nkhupagalwi kwanu thangwi ya kuphata basa m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu.
