Numbers18:32 Ngakhala imwe munaperekambo khundu yadidiletu pyakwanga kuna Mulungu imwe nee munadawa tayu mungapidya. Kwache onesesani kuti nee mwaswipisa mtukwa wakupambulika wa Aisraele pakudya mitukwayo mbamudzati pereka kuna MBUYA khundu yadidiletu. Ngakhala munapichita munati muphiwe.” 
Numbers19:1 MBUYA adapanga Mose na Aroni 
Numbers19:2 kuti apereke matongero awa kuna Aisraele: Dzani na ng'ombe ikazi yakufira kuna Mose na Aroni yakusowa chilema, pontho yakuti chipo nee idzati thukula goli tayu." 
Numbers19:3 Tenepo iwo anaipereka kuna Eleazara nyansembe; ng'ombe mbiendeswe kunja kwa msasa mbichekwa pamaso pache. 
Numbers19:4 Kubuluka penepo Eleazara akwate chiropa cha ng'ombeyo pang'ono mbachiwaza na chala chache chakunkhope kwa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu kanomwe. 
Numbers19:5 Nyama yonsene yamumphu, penu nthembe, mnofu, chiropa na matumbo pipiswe pamaso pa nyansembe." 
Numbers19:6 Kubuluka penepo akwate pang'ono muti wamkungudza, hisope na nkhambala yakufira mbapiponya pamoto." 
Numbers19:7 Angamala penepo afule nguwo zache, asambe manungo ache onsene, natenepo iye anakwanisa kapita mumsasa mule; kwache iye anakhala okhonda chena basi pamaso pa Mulungu mpakana mawulo." 
Numbers19:8 Nyakupisa ng'ombeyo athema kufulambo nguwo zache na kusamba manungo ache onsene, kwache iye anakhala okhonda chena mpakana mawulo." 
Numbers19:9 Natenepo munthu wakuchena pamaso pa Mulungu atswaire dotha ya ng'ombe ile, pontho akaiikhe pambuto yakupambulika kunja kwa msasa, kule kwathema iyo kukoyiwa kuti Aisraele aphatise basa kusasanya madzi akubulusira nawo pinthu pyokhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu. Wenewu ndi mwambo wakupichenesa wakubulusira pyakudawa." 
Numbers19:10 Nyakutswaira dothayo athema kufula nguwo zache, kwache anakhala munthu okhonda chena basi mpakana mawulo. Mwambo wenewu ngwakukhala na kukhala kuna Aisraele na kuna alendo akukhala pakati pawo." 
Numbers19:11 Munthu onsene anakhuya mtembo anakhala okhonda chena nsiku zinomwe. 
Numbers19:12 Iye athema kupichenesa yekha ene na madzi akuchenesa munthu pansiku yachitatu na yachinomwe, angamala penepo iye anakhala wakuchena. Mbwenye ngakhala hanapichenesa yekha ene tayu pansiku yachitatu na yachinomwe iye nkhabe dzakhala wakuchena pamaso pa Mulungu tayu." 
Numbers19:13 Munthu onsene wakukhuya mtembo mbakhonda kupichenesa yekha ene anakhala okhonda chena basi, thangwi iye hadasambiswe tayu na madzi akuchenesa munthu. Iye ambaswipisa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, natenepo iye nkhabe dzayeswave ninga mbodzi wa anthu a Mulungu tayu." 
Numbers19:14 Munthu angafera m'khumbi, munthu onsene ali m'khumbimo pandzidzi unafa munthuyo penu anapita m'khumbiyo pandzidzi wenewu, ambasanduka okhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu nsiku zinomwe." 
Numbers19:15 Pyombo pyonsene pya m'khumbimo pyakusowa mphampha pimbasandukambo pyakukhonda chena. 
Numbers19:16 Ngakhala munthu anakhuya munthu wakuchita kuphiwa penu wakufa ninga mumbaferambo anthu anango onsene penu kukhuya gogodo a munthu penu nthumbi, iye anasanduka okhonda chena nsiku zinomwe." 
Numbers19:17 Kuti kukhonda chena kubuluke, dotha pang'ono ya ng'ombe ikazi idapiswa kuti ibuluse pyakudawa ile, ikwatwe mbiikhwa m'chitomba. M'chitombamo muikhwe pontho madzi adidi." 
Numbers19:18 Kubuluka penepo munthu onsene wakuchena pamaso pa Mulungu, akwate hisope pang'ono, amvike madzi mbawazira m'khumbimo na pyonsene pili mwenemo, pontho na anthu ene akhali mwenemo ale. Iye athema kuwazira pontho munthu onsene wakukhuya gogodo ya munthu wakufa penu nthumbi penu munthu wakuchita kuphiwa, penu wakufa ninga mumbaferambo anthu anango onsene." 
Numbers19:19 Pansiku yachitatu na yachinomwe munthu wakuchena awazire madzi ale pana munthu okhonda chena ule. Pansiku yachinomwe achite mwambo wakumchenesa. Munthu wakucheneswayo athema kufula nguwo zache na kusamba manungo ache onsene, tenepo nsiku yeneyo dzuwa ingathobila anakhala wakuchena." 
Numbers19:20 Mbwenye ngakhala munthu okhonda chenayo anakhonda kupichenesa yekha ene, weneyo anakhala okhonda chena basi, thangwi iye hadasambiswe tayu na madzi akuchenesa munthu. Iye ambaswipisa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, natenepo iye nkhabe dzayeswave ninga mbodzi wa anthu a Mulungu tayu." 
Numbers19:21 Imwe mwathema kukoya matongero enewa kutomera lero kwenda m'tsogolo. Nyakuwaza madzi akuchenesa munthu athema kufula nguwo zache; munthu onsene wakuphata madzi enewo anakhala okhonda chena mpakana mawulo. 
Numbers19:22 Chinthu chonsene chinaphata munthu okhonda chena chinasanduka chokhonda chenambo pontho na munthu onsene wakuphata chokhonda chenecho, anakhalambo okhonda chena mpakana mawulo." 
Numbers20:1 Mwezi wakutoma dzinza yonsene ya Israele idadza pathando yatchetcha ya Zini mbamanga msasawo pa Kadeshi. Miriamu adafera kweneko mbaikhwa m'masiye. 
Numbers20:2 Pakhadamanga iwo msasa pale pakhali nkhabe madzi, natenepo anthu adagumanyikana mwakumzungulira Mose na Aroni" 
Numbers20:3 mbatoma kudungunya mbati, “Mphyadidi mbatidafa pyathu pabodzi na Aisraele anzathu, ale adafa chifupi na Chikhumbi cha Mulungu." 
Numbers20:4 Chatikwatira iwe kudza nafe m'thando yatchetcha muno ninji? Ayi chikhafuna iwe ntchakuti ife tifere muno pabodzi pene na nyama zathuzi basi? 
Numbers20:5 Chidatibulusira iwe mu Iguputo mule ninji mbudza nafe pambuto yakusowa basayi yakuti nkhabe chinthu na chibodzi chene chinakwanisa kumerapo tayu? Mapira nkhabepo, makuyu nkhabepo, mipesa nkhabepo, pontho mtheme nkhabepo. Na madzi ene akumwa nkhabe pontho!”" 
Numbers20:6 Mose na Aroni adabuluka pakhali anthu pale mbakaimira pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu. Iwo adalamba, tenepo demelero ya MBUYA idaonekera kuna iwo." 
Numbers20:7 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Numbers20:8 “Kwata ndodo ili patsogolo pa Bokosi ya Chiveranoyo, kubuluka penepo iwe na Aroni mugumanyise dzinza yonsene ya Israele. Longa kuna mwalawo pamaso pa anthu onsene, tenepo m'mwalamo munabuluka madzi. Kubulukira m'mwala wenewu iwe unadzesa madzi kudzesera dzinza yonsene ya Israele kuti iwo na pifuyo pyawo amwe.”" 
Numbers20:9 Natenepo Mose adenda kakwata ndodo ile ninga montho mukhadalongera MBUYA. 
Numbers20:10 Iye na Aroni adagumanyisa dzinza yonsene ya Israele patsogolo pa mwala. Tenepo Mose adalonga mbati, “Ngavani kuno imwe anthu akupandukira! Kadi munafuna tikubulusireni madzi m'mwalamu?”" 
Numbers20:11 Tenepo Mose adathukula ndodo ile mbamenya nayo mwala ule kawiri. Tenepo madzi mazinji adabuluka m'mwala mule, anthu onsene pabodzi na pifuyo pyawo adamwa." 
Numbers20:12 Mbwenye MBUYA adalongera Mose na Aroni mbati, “Na thangwi yakuti hamudandikhulupire pontho hamudandilemedza pamaso pa anthu a Israele tayu kuti ndine wakuchena, imwe nkhabe dzatsogolera anthuwa kupita nawo m'dziko idadumbira ine kuti ndinaapasa.”" 
Numbers20:13 Penepi pidachitika pa Meriba, pale pakhadungunya Aisraele mwakupokanyisana na MBUYA, pontho pale padaonesa MBUYA kuti iye ngwakuchena." 
Numbers20:14 Mose adatuma anyamphangwa kubulukira ku Kadeshi kwenda kuna mfumu wa ku Edomu. Iwo adalonga kuna mfumu ule mbati, “Mphangwa izi zakubulukira kuna abale anu madzinza a Israele. Imwe mukudziwa nyatwa zonsene zaona ife;" 
Numbers20:15 mule mudenda makolo athu ku Iguputo kule kudakhala ife pyaka pizinji. Aiguputo adavuya makolo athu pabodzi pene na ife," 
Numbers20:16 natenepo ife tidalira kuna MBUYA kuti atiphedze. Iye adavadi kulira kwathu mbatuma mngelo kudzatibulusa m'dziko ya Iguputo. Chinchino tili pano pa Kadeshi luwani ya kunkhomo kwa madire a nthembanu. 
Numbers20:17 Taphata miyendo titawirisenimbo ife kugwanda na m'dziko mwanumu. Ife na pifuyo pyathu nkhabe dzasiya msewu, penu kupita m'minda mwanu, penu m'minda yanu yamfesa, pontho nee tinamwa madzi a m'michera wanu tayu. Ife tinateweza kwene msewu ukulu basi mpakana tiwambuke madire anu.”" 
Numbers20:18 Mbwenye anthu a ku Edomu adatawira mbati, “Ife takhonda kukutawirisani kugwanda na m'dziko mwathu muno! Mungapiyesera kwene ife tinadza mbatichita namwe nkhondo.”" 
Numbers20:19 Aisraele adalonga mbati, “Ife tinatewera kwene msewu ukuluwu basi. Ngakhala ife penu pifuyo pyathu pinamwa madzi anu, tinati tikupagalini. Chinafuna ife nkhugwanda kwene basi m'dziko mwanumu.”" 
Numbers20:20 Anthu a ku Edomu adalonga kachiwiri mbati, “Ife nyonyo, takhonda!” Tenepo iwo adadza na gulu ikulu pontho yamphamvu ya anyankhondo mbamenya nkhondo na Aisraele." 
Numbers20:21 Na thangwi yakuti anthu a ku Edomu hadatawirise anthu a Israele kugwanda na m'dziko mwawo, Aisraele adabwerera mbaenda na njira inango." 
Numbers20:22 Dzinza yonsene ya Israele idabuluka pa Kadeshi mbakafika paphiri ya Hori," 
Numbers20:23 m'madire a Edomu. Kweneko MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose na Aroni mbati," 
Numbers20:24 “Aroni hanakapita m'dziko idadumbira ine kuna Aisraele; iye anati afe, thangwi imwe uwirianu mudandipandukira pakukhonda kuvera matongero anga pa Meriba." 
Numbers20:25 Kwata Aroni na mwanache Eleazara ukwire nawo phiri ya Horiyi. 
Numbers20:26 Dula nguwo za Aroni mbuzivazike mwanache Eleazara thangwi Aroni anakafera kweneko.” 
Numbers20:27 Mose adachita pidampanga MBUYA pile. Iwo adakwira paphiri ya Hori ile anthu onsene a Israele akuona," 
Numbers20:28 tenepo Mose adamdulisa Aroni nguwo za unyansembe zile mbazivazika Eleazara. Aroni adafera paphiri ponthopo, tenepo Mose na Eleazara adatchitha kubwerera." 
Numbers20:29 Dzinza yonsene ya Israele idadziwa kuti Aroni akhadafa, natenepo iwo adamsintili nsiku makumatatu." 
Numbers21:1 Pidapiva mfumu wa Chikanani wa ku Aradi, ule akhakhala m'thando yatchetcha ya Negebu, kuti Aisraele akhadza na njira ya ku Atarimu, iye adadza mbachita nawo nkhondo mbaphatapo anthu anango Aisraele." 
Numbers21:2 Tenepo Aisraele adadumbira pikulu pene pamaso pa MBUYA mbati, “Ngakhala munatipasa mphamvu zakukunda nazo anthu enewa, ife tinavungiratu monsene mwene mizindawo yonsene.”" 
Numbers21:3 MBUYA adava kupempha kwa Aisraele mbapereka Akanani m'manja mwawo. Iwo adaavungiratu monsene mwene pabodzi pene na maluwani awo ene; natenepo mbuto ile adaithula Horima. 
Numbers21:4 Aisraele adabuluka paphiri ya Hori mbaenda na njira yakwendera ku Nyanza Yakufira towera achalire nthemba ya Edomu. Mbwenye m'njira mwawomo anthu adataya kupirira kwawo 
Numbers21:5 mbalonga mwakupokanyisana na Mulungu pontho Mose. Iwo adadungunya mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji mudatibulusa m'dziko ya Iguputo kuti tidzafe m'thando yatchetcha muno mwakusowa pyakudya na madzi ene? Ife nkhabe kwanisa kupirira na pyakudya pyapezipi tayu.”" 
Numbers21:6 Natenepo MBUYA adatumiza nyoka zakupha pakati pa anthu, tenepo Aisraele azinji adalumwa nazo mbafa." 
Numbers21:7 Anthu adadza kuna Mose mbalonga mbati, “Ife tadawa pidalonga ife mwakupokanyisana na MBUYA pontho na imwe. Mpempheni MBUYA kuti atibulusirembo nyokazi.” Natenepo Mose adaapempherera anthu ale." 
Numbers21:8 MBUYA adapanga Mose kuti asasanye nyoka yankuwa pontho kuti aimanike pamuti, towera munthu onsene analumwayo akwanise kuyang'ana penepo mbapulumuka." 
Numbers21:9 Tenepo Mose adasasanya nyoka yankuwa mbaimanika pamuti. Tenepo munthu onsene wakulumwa na nyokayo pidayang'ana iye penepo adapulumuka. 
Numbers21:10 Aisraele adafuluka mbakamanga msasawo pa Oboti. 
Numbers21:11 Pidabuluka iwo pambuto yeneyi adenda kamanga msasa pamadembe a Abarimu m'thando yatchetcha kumabulukiro dzuwa a madire a Amoabu. 
Numbers21:12 Kubuluka penepo iwo adamanga msasawo m'phedi ya Zeredi. 
Numbers21:13 Kubuluka penepo adafuluka pontho mbakamanga msasa kukhundu yakumpoto kwa mkulo ya Arinoni m'thando yatchetcha, ule udenderatu mpakana m'madire a Aamori. Arinoni ndiye akhali madire pakati pa Amoabu na Aamori." 
Numbers21:14 Ndi thangwi yache Bukhu ya Nkhondo za MBUYA imbalonga pya “Luwani ya Wahebu m'nthemba ya Sufa na m'maphedi; mkulo wa Arinoni," 
Numbers21:15 na mtelero wa maphedi ale adenderatu mpakana kuluwani ya Ari kwendera ku madire a Moabu.” 
Numbers21:16 Kubuluka penepo adenda kumbuto yakuchemerwa Michera, kule kudalonga MBUYA kuna Mose mbati, “Gumanyisa anthuwo pabodzi. Ndikufuna kuapasa madzi.”" 
Numbers21:17 Pandzidzi wenewu Aisraele adaimba nyimbo ishi: “Michera bulusani madzi anu; tenepo ife tinati tikupaseni mwenyikiro na nyimbo. 
Numbers21:18 Mchera wakukumbwa na atongi, pontho na akadamu a anthu, wakukumbwa na ndodo yachifumu, pontho na miswimbo yawo.” Iwo adafuluka kubuluka m'thando yatchetcha mule kwenda ku Matana." 
Numbers21:19 Kubuluka penepo adenda ku Nahaliele. Kubuluka ku Nahaliele adenda ku Bamoti. 
Numbers21:20 Kubuluka pa Bamoti adenda kuphedi m'nthemba ya Amoabu m'tchinde mwa phiri ya Pisiga, pale thando yatchetcha yonsene imbakwanisa kuoneka." 
Numbers21:21 Kubuluka penepo Aisraele adatuma anyamphangwa kuna Mfumu Sihoni wa Aamori kampanga kuti: 
Numbers21:22 “Titawiriseni kuti tigwande na m'dziko mwanumu. Ife nkhabe dzasiya msewu kwenda m'minda mwanu, penu m'minda yamfesa tayu, pontho ife nkhabe dzamwa madzi a m'michera mwanu tayu. Ife tinateweza kwene msewu ukulu basi mpakana tiwambuke madire anu.”" 
Numbers21:23 Mbwenye Sihoni hadatawirise Aisraele kuti agwande na m'dziko mwachemo tayu. Iye adagumanyisa anyankhondo ache mbaenda ku Yahazi m'thando yatchetcha mbachita nkhondo na Aisraele. 
Numbers21:24 Mbwenye Aisraele adapha anyamalwawo azinji pankhondo yeneyi mbapokosera dziko yawo kubulukira kumkulo wa Arinoni kumpoto kwache mpakana ku Yaboki. Kweneku nkhu dziko ya Aamoni, thangwi madire a Aamoni akhali akutchinjirizwa pyakwanga." 
Numbers21:25 Natenepo Aisraele adakwata mizinda yonsene ya Aamori kuthimizapo Heshiboni na maluwani onsene akuzungulira mbakhazikika mwenemo. 
Numbers21:26 Heshiboni ukhali mzinda ukulu wa Sihoni mfumu wa Aamori, ule akhadachita nkhondo na mfumu wakale wa ku Moabu mbakwata dziko yache yonsene mpakana kumkulo wa Arinoni." 
Numbers21:27 Ndi thangwi yache nyakupeka nyimbo adaimba kuti: “Bwerani ku Heshiboni, kumzinda wa Mfumu Sihoni! Tinafuna kuona ukumangwa pontho na kukhazikiswa pontho." 
Numbers21:28 Anyankhondo a Sihoni adenda patsogolo kabodzi ninga moto kubulukira mumzinda uno wa Heshiboni. Iwo adavunga mzinda wa Ari m'dziko ya Moabu, mbavunga pontho mapiri a kumtunda kwa mkulo wa Arinoni." 
Numbers21:29 Dzedze kuna imwe anthu a ku Moabu. Imwe anthu akupembedza Kemoshi munati muvungwe. Mulungu wanu mbachitise amuna kukhala anthu akuthawa kwawo thangwi ya nkhondo. Pontho akazi akhale anthu a mfumu wa Aamori anyakuphatwa pankhondo. 
Numbers21:30 Mbwenye chinchino pidzukulu pyawo pyavunga, m'njira monsene kubulukira ku Heshiboni nkhwenderatu ku Diboni. Kubulukira ku Nashimu nkhwenderatu ku Nofa chifupi na Medeba.”" 
Numbers21:31 Natenepo Aisraele adakhazikika m'dziko ya Aamori," 
Numbers21:32 tenepo Mose adatuma amuna anango kuti akagumane njira yadidi yakusosera nayo mzinda wa Yazere. Aisraele adaukwata mzinda ule pabodzi pene na maluwani akuzungulira mzindawo mbathamangisa Aamori onsene akhakhala mwenemo ale. 
Numbers21:33 Kubuluka penepo Aisraele adazungunuka mbakwata njira yakwendera ku Bashani. Tenepo Mfumu Ogi wa ku Bashani adagumanyisa anyankhondo ache mbaenda kachita nawo nkhondo pa Edrei. 
Numbers21:34 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Leka chita naye mantha weneyo. Ine ndinakupasa mphamvu zakukunda nazo iye, anthu ache onsene na dziko yache ene. Chita kuna iye pinthu pidachita imwe kuna Sihoni mfumu wa Aamori ule akhatonga pa Heshiboni.”" 
Numbers21:35 Natenepo Aisraele adapha Ogi, anache na anthu ache onsene. Nee na mbodzi ene adapulumuka. Natenepo iwo adakhazikika m'dziko mwachemo." 
Numbers22:1 Aisraele adathimiza ulendo awo mbakamanga msasawo pamaphedi a Moabu kumabulukiro dzuwa a Yorodani pontho mwakuyang'anisana na Yeriko. 
Numbers22:2 Balaki, mfumu wa ku Moabu, mwana wamamuna wa Zipora, pidava iye pinthu pyonsene pidachita Aisraele kuna Aamori, pontho na kuinjipa kudachita Aisraele," 
Numbers22:3 iye pabodzi pene na anthu ache onsene adachita mantha. 
Numbers22:4 Anthu a ku Moabu adalonga kuna akadamu a ku Midiani mbati, “Gulu yeneyi chinchino inati imale vunga pyonsene pyatizungulirapi, ninga ng'ombe imuna ingadya mpovu m'minda.” Natenepo Mfumu Balaki" 
Numbers22:5 adatuma anthu kuti akachemere Balamu mwana Beori, ule akhakhala ku Petori chifupi na mkulo wa Yufurate m'dziko ya Amawu. Iwo adamdzesera mphangwa izi kubulukira kuna Mfumu Balaki: “Ndinafuna kuti imwe mudziwe kuti dzinza yonsene ya anthu adza kubulukira ku Iguputo; anthu ache amala balalika konsene kwene, pontho iwo akhala chifupiletu na ine." 
Numbers22:6 Tenepo ndaphata miyendo, dzani kuno kuti muatemberere anthu enewa, thangwi iwo ngamphamvu pyakwanga mwakuti ine nkhabe kwanisa phatana nawo tayu. Mungaatemberera mwinango ndinakwanisa kuakunda na kuathamangisa m'dziko muno. Ine ndimbapidziwa kuti imwe mungatsanzayisa munthu, munthuyo ambatsanzayiswadi, mungamtemberera, iye ambatembererwadi.”" 
Numbers22:7 Natenepo akadamu a Moabu na Midiani adakwata pyakufuna kupagali napyo Balamu angalonga mafala akutemberera. Tenepo iwo adenda kuna Balamu mbakampanga mphangwa zidabulukira kuna Balaki. 
Numbers22:8 Balamu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Lero mugone kuno, tenepo mangwana ndinati ndikupangeni pyonsene pinafuna kundipanga MBUYA.” Natenepo akadamu a ku Moabu adakhala naye pabodzi." 
Numbers22:9 Mulungu adadza kuna Balamu mbamvunza mbati, “Amuna anakhala na iwewa mbani?”" 
Numbers22:10 Iye adatawira mbati, “Mfumu Balaki wa ku Moabu ndiye adatuma anthu enewa kudzandipanga kuti" 
Numbers22:11 anthu adabulukira ku Iguputo ale amala falikira m'dziko monsenemo. Iye anafuna kuti ine ndiatemberere, towera akwanise kuamenya na kuathamangisa.”" 
Numbers22:12 Mulungu adalonga kuna Balamu mbati, “Leka kwenda nawo pabodzi anthuwo, pontho leka temberera Aisraele thangwi iwo ngakutsanzayiswa.”" 
Numbers22:13 Mangwana mwache na machibese Balamu adenda kuna anyamphangwa a Balaki mbalonga mbati, “Bwererani pyanu kwanu; MBUYA akhonda kuti ndiende namwe pabodzi.”" 
Numbers22:14 Natenepo iwo adabwerera kuna Balaki mbampanga kuti Balamu akhonda kuti abwere nafe pabodzi. 
Numbers22:15 Kubuluka penepo Balaki adatuma akadamu azinji ene, ale akhali akufunika pyakwanga kupiringana akutoma ale." 
Numbers22:16 Iwo adenda kuna Balamu mbakampanga mphangwa zidabulukira kuna Balaki zile zakuti: “Ndaphata miyendo, paleke khala chinthu na chibodzi chene chikutchinga kuti uleke kudza kuna ine kuno!" 
Numbers22:17 Ine ndinati ndikufupe pikulu pene pontho ndinachita chinthu chonsene chinafuna iwe dzalonga. Ndaphata miyendo, bwera kuti udzatemberere anthuwa m'mbuto mwanga.”" 
Numbers22:18 Mbwenye Balamu adatawira mbati, “Podi kwene kuti Balaki andipase siliva na golidi onsene ali m'nyumbache yachifumu, ine nkhabe kwanisa kukhonda vera matongero a MBUYA Mulungu wanga, podi na pang'ono pene, nkhabe tayu." 
Numbers22:19 Kwache ndaphata miyendo, imwe mugone kuno lero ninga mudachitira anzanu, towera ndidziwe ngakhala MBUYA ana chinango chakuti andipange penu tayu.”" 
Numbers22:20 Mosiku wenewo Mulungu adadza kuna Balamu mbalonga mbati, “Ngakhala amuna enewa adza dzakupempha kuti uende nawo pabodzi, sasanyika uende nawo pabodzi, mbwenye wathema kuchita pinthu pinakupanga ine pene basi.”" 
Numbers22:21 Natenepo mangwana mwache na machibese Balamu adapakira pabulu wache mbaenda pabodzi pene na akadamu a ku Moabu ale. 
Numbers22:22 Mulungu adazhangali pyakwanga pidaona iye kuti Balamu akhaenda. Tenepo pikhaenda Balamu uku akwira bulu wache mwakutsagana na anyabasache awiri, mngelo wa MBUYA adaimira kutchinga njiracheyo." 
Numbers22:23 Pidaona bulu ule kuti mngelo aimira kutsogolo kwache uku aphatira talasada m'manja mwache, adabauka mbaenda na m'tsanga. Balamu adamenya bulu wache mbambwezera m'njira." 
Numbers22:24 Natenepo mngelo adaimira pakhadapapanula njira pakati pa minda yamfesa miwiri, pontho khundu zonsene ziwiri kukhali mpanda yakumangwa na miyala." 
Numbers22:25 Pidaona bulu ule mngelo wa MBUYA adakhukhumba na kufufu kule mbakhujisa dzinyalo ya Balamu kufufuko. Natenepo iye adammenya pontho bulu wache ule. 
Numbers22:26 Tenepo mngelo wa MBUYA ule adafedzera pontho patsogolo mbaimira pambuto yakupapanula pakusowa na mbuto ene yakuti mbadakwanisa kugwanda nayo kukhundu zonsene. 
Numbers22:27 Pandzidzi wenewu pidaona buluyo mngelo ule, adagona pansi. Balamu adazhangali pyakwanga mbatoma kumenya bulu ule na nswimbo wache." 
Numbers22:28 Natenepo MBUYA adachitisa kuti bulu ule akwanise kubulusa fala, tenepo buluyo adalonga kuna Balamu mbati, “Ine ndasosanji kuna imwe kuti mundimenye ninga tenepa katatu?”" 
Numbers22:29 Balamu adatawira mbati, “Thangwi yakuti wandilulupisa! Mbidakhala na talasada mbidakupha nayo.”" 
Numbers22:30 Bulu ule adatawira mbati, “Kadi bulu wache si ine ontho ule akwira imwe kutomera moyo wanu onsene tayu? Ayi ine chipo ndidatoma kale kukuchitirani pinthu ninga penepi?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Nkhabe.”" 
Numbers22:31 Tenepo MBUYA adafungula maso a Balamu mbaona mngelo wa MBUYA ali chiliri m'njira, talasadache ili m'manja; tenepo Balamu adapigwisa yekha ene pansi mbalamba." 
Numbers22:32 Mngelo wa MBUYA adavunza mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji wamenya bulu wako katatu ninga tenepa? Ine ndadza kuti nditchinge njirako thangwi iwe nee wathema kwenda ulendo wenewu tayu." 
Numbers22:33 Mbwenye bulu wako adandiona mbapambuka katatu. Mbadakhala kuti iye hadapambuke tayu, ine mbidakupha, mbwenye buluyo mbidamsiya na moyo wache.”" 
Numbers22:34 Balamu adatawira mbati, “Ande, ine ndadawa. Ine nee ndikhapidziwa tayu kuti imwe mukhaimira m'njiramu kundikhondesa; mbwenye ngakhala imwe mukunyerezera kuti kwenda ulendo wenewu nkhudawa kuna ine, ndinati ndibwerere kumusa kwanga.”" 
Numbers22:35 Mbwenye mngelo ule adalonga mbati, “Ndoko nawo pabodzi anthu ana iwewa, kwache ungafika kweneko ukalonge pinafuna kakupanga ine.” Natenepo Balamu adathimiza kwenda pabodzi na anthu ale." 
Numbers22:36 Pidava Balaki kuti Balamu akubwera adenda kagumanikana naye pa Ari, mzinda wa chifupi na mkulo wa Arinoni m'madire a Moabu." 
Numbers22:37 Balaki adalonga kuna Balamu mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji mudakhonda kubwera pidakuchemerani ine pakutoma pale? Imwe mudanyerezera kuti sinakwanisa tayu kukufupani pizinji?”" 
Numbers22:38 Balamu adatawira mbati, “Kudza nkhweneku kwachita ineku, kwache ine nkhabe mphamvu. Pinafuna kundipanga Mulungu kuti ndipilonge penepyo pene basi ndiye pinafunambo ine kulonga.”" 
Numbers22:39 Natenepo Balamu adenda pabodzi pene na Balaki kuluwani ya Huzoti," 
Numbers22:40 kudacheka Balaki ng'ombe na mabira kule mbapereka nyama inango kuna Balamu na akadamu akhali na iye ale. 
Numbers22:41 Mangwana mwache na machibese Balaki adakwata Balamu mbakwira naye ku Bamoti Baala, kule kudakwanisa Balamu kuona khundu ibodzi ya Aisraele." 
Numbers23:1 Iye adalonga kuna Balaki mbati, “Ndimangire maguwa ansembe anomwe mbubwere na ng'ombe zimuna zinomwe, pontho na mabira amuna anomwe.”" 
Numbers23:2 Balaki adachita ninga mudapangirwa iye. Tenepo iye na Balamu adapereka ng'ombe ibodzi na bira mbodzi paguwa yonsene ya nsembe. 
Numbers23:3 Tenepo Balamu adalonga kuna Balaki mbati, “Imira pano m'khundu mwa nsembe yako yakupyererayi, pinaenda ine uko kaona ngakhala MBUYA ndinagumanikana naye penu tayu. Ndinati ndikupange pyonsene pinakandionesa iye.” Natenepo iye adenda yekha ene pansonga ya phiri," 
Numbers23:4 Mulungumbo adadza dzagumanikana naye. Balamu adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ndamanga maguwa anomwe ansembe mbandipereka nsembe ng'ombe na bira paguwa yonsene.”" 
Numbers23:5 MBUYA adapanga Balamu chakuti akalonge. Tenepo adamgwinya mbabwerera kuna Balaki kuti akalonge pyalonga MBUYA. 
Numbers23:6 Natenepo iye adabwereradi kuna Balaki mbagumana Balaki ali chiliri basi m'khundu mwa nsembe yache yakupyerera pabodzi pene na akadamu a Moabu. 
Numbers23:7 Izi ndi mphangwa zauprofeti zidalonga Balamu kuti: “Balaki mfumu wa ku Moabu andidzesa kubulukira ku Aramu, kubulukira kumapiri akumabulukiro dzuwa. Iye adalonga mbati, ‘Bwerani mundilongerembo kuna anthuwa. Atemberereni anthu a ku Israelewa.’" 
Numbers23:8 Ine ndinakwanisa tani kutemberera chinthu chakhonda temberera Mulungu, penu kulonga pya kuvungika, uku MBUYA hadalonge pyakuvungika tayu?" 
Numbers23:9 Kubulukira pa miyala yakulapha ine ndikukwanisa kuaona; ndikukwanisa kuaona na pamapiri. Iwo ndi dzinza yakukhala pa yokha ene; iwo ambapidziwa kuti ngakutsanzayiswa kupiringana madzinza anango. 
Numbers23:10 Pidzukulu pya Israele pyakhala ninga fumbi, iwo ngazinji pyakwanga mwakuti hanalengeseka tayu. Ine na nsiku zanga zakukhala moyo mbizikhale ninga za anthu a Mulungu. Ine mbindife pyanga mumtendere ninga mumbachitira anthu akulungama.”" 
Numbers23:11 Tenepo Balaki adalonga kuna Balamu mbati, “Chachita iwe kuna ine ninji? Ine ndidakuchemera kuti utemberere anyamalwanga, mbwenye pyonsene pyachita iwe pano nkhuatsanzayisa.”" 
Numbers23:12 Iye adatawira mbati, “Chinakwanisa ine kulonga ntchontho chandipanga MBUYA kuti ndichilonge.”" 
Numbers23:13 Kubuluka penepo Balaki adalonga kuna Balamu mbati, “Tende kumbuto inango kule kunakwanisa iwe kuona anthu anango a Aisraele. Iwe ukaatemberere na penepo m'mbuto mwanga.”" 
Numbers23:14 Iye adenda na Balamu kumunda wa Zofimu pansonga paphiri ya Pisiga. Kweneko adamangako pontho maguwa anomwe ansembe mbapereka pontho ng'ombe na bira paguwa yonsene. 
Numbers23:15 Balamu adalonga kuna Balaki mbati, “Imira pano m'khundu mwa nsembe yako yakupyererayi, ine ndikwenda kagumanikana na Mulungu uko!”" 
Numbers23:16 MBUYA adagumanikana nayedi Balamu mbampanga pyakuti akalonge. Natenepo adamgwinya kubwerera kuna Balaki kuti akampange pyalonga MBUYA. 
Numbers23:17 Natenepo adabwereradi kuna Balaki mbamgumana ali chiliri m'khundu mwa nsembe yache yakupyerera ile, pabodzi pene na akadamu a Moabu. Balaki adavunza kuti MBUYA adalonganji," 
Numbers23:18 tenepo Balamu adatoma kulonga mphangwa zache zauprofeti kuti: “Bwera kuno Balaki mwana Zipora, pontho uvesere pinafuna ine kukupanga." 
Numbers23:19 Mulungu si munthu tayu kuti anakwanisa kunama; iye si munthu tayu kuti anakwanisa kusanduza manyerezero ache. Pyonsene pidadumbira iye kupichita, ambapichitadi. Iye ambalonga, tenepo ipyo pimbachitikadi." 
Numbers23:20 Ine ndapangwa kuti nditsanzayise, tenepo ngakhala Mulungu atsanzayisa, ine nkhabe kwanisa kupikhonda tayu." 
Numbers23:21 Ine ndaoneratu kuti tsogolo ya Aisraele, nkhabe kuadzesera dzedze penu nyatwa tayu. MBUYA Mulungu wawo ali nawo; iwo ambalonga kuti Mulungu ndi mfumu wawo." 
Numbers23:22 Mulungu aabulusa m'dziko ya Iguputo; iye aamenyera nkhondo ninga nyati. 
Numbers23:23 Kweneko nkhabe matsenga penu ufiti, pile pinakwanisa kuphatiswa basa kupokanyisana na dzinza ya Israele. Chinchino anthu anati alonge pya Israele kuti, ‘Ngayang'anani pyachita Mulungu!’" 
Numbers23:24 Dzinza ya Israele yakhala ninga nkhalamu ikazi. Iyo nkhabe puma kufikirana ikhwadzule na kukhudyula, kufikirana isute chiropa cha chinthu chapha iye.”" 
Numbers23:25 Tenepo Balaki adalonga kuna Balamu mbati, “Iwe wakhonda kuatemberera Aisraele, kwache leka kuatsanzayisa!”" 
Numbers23:26 Balamu adatawira mbati, “Ayi ine sidakupange tayu kuti ndathema kuchita pyonsene pyandipanga MBUYA?”" 
Numbers23:27 Balaki adalonga mbati, “Tendeni kuno kumbuto inango. Mwinango Mulungu anatawira kuti uatemberere na kweneko.”" 
Numbers23:28 Natenepo iye adenda na Balamu pansonga paphiri ya Peori kuyang'ana pansi m'thando yatchetcha. 
Numbers23:29 Balamu adalonga kuna Balaki mbati, “Ndimangire maguwa anomwe ansembe pano mbubwere na ng'ombe zimuna zinomwe pontho na mabira amuna anomwe.”" 
Numbers23:30 Balaki adachitadi ninga mudapangirwa iye, mbapereka ng'ombe ibodzi na bira mbodzi paguwa yonsene ya nsembe." 
Numbers24:1 Pidadziwa Balamu kuti MBUYA akhafuna kuti iye atsanzayise Aisraele hadendeve kuyang'ana matsengache ninga mukhachitira iye pakutoma pale tayu. M'mbuto mwache adazungunuka mbayang'ana kuthando yatchetcha. 
Numbers24:2 Iye adaonako Aisraele akhala m'magulu-magulu malingana na madzinzawo. Mzimu wa Mulungu adamgudumira," 
Numbers24:3 tenepo iye adalonga mphangwa zauprofeti izi: “Mphangwa za Balamu mwana Beori, mafala a munthu, ule anakwanisa kuona mwadidi." 
Numbers24:4 Ule anakwanisa kuva pinalonga Mulungu. Ule na maso akuthwa anakwanisa kuona mayezi-yezi, masomphenya akubulukira kuna Nyamphamvu zonsene." 
Numbers24:5 Makumbi a Israele ngakubalika pyakwanga. 
Numbers24:6 Iwo akhala ninga mizere yakulapha yamichewu penu minda yakukhala m'khundu-khundu mwa mkulo, ninga gavi wakubzalwa na MBUYA, penu mkungudza m'khundu-khundu mwa madzi." 
Numbers24:7 Iwo anakhala na mvula izinji, pontho anabzala mbewu zawo m'minda yakuthirirwa mwadidi. Mafumu awo anakhala akulu kupiringana Agagi, pontho ufumu wache unafumuka umimba na ulaphi ene." 
Numbers24:8 Mulungu adadza nawo kubulukira m'dziko ya Iguputo; iye ambaamenyera nkhondo ninga nyati. Iwo ambakhudyula anyamalwawo, ambapeya magogodo awo na kubonyola matswimo awo." 
Numbers24:9 Dzinza yeneyi yakhala ninga nkhalamu ikazi; ingagona, nkhabe munthu anawanga mtima kuilamusa tayu. Munthu onsene wakutsanzayisa Israele anatsanzayiswambo, pontho munthu onsene wakutemberera Israele anatembererwambo.”" 
Numbers24:10 Na thangwi ya penepi Balaki adamzhangalira Balamu mbaimba m'manja kuti phuu mbalonga mbati, “Ine ndidakuchemera kuti utemberere anyamalwanga, mbwenye m'mbuto mwache iwe waatsanzayisa katatu." 
Numbers24:11 Natenepo ndoko pyako kumusa kwako! Ine ndidadumbira kuti ndinakufupa, mbwenye MBUYA akukhondesa kuti uleke kwata mfupowo.”" 
Numbers24:12 Balamu adatawira mbati, “Ndidaapanga kale anyamphangwa adatuma iwe kuna ine ale kuti" 
Numbers24:13 podi kwene kuti mundipase siliva onsene na golidi onsene wa m'nyumbanu yachifumu, ine nkhabe dzakwanisa kukhonda vera matongero a MBUYA pakuchita pinafuna ine tayu. Ndinalonga pyonthopyo pinandipanga MBUYA kuti ndipilonge.”" 
Numbers24:14 Balamu adalonga kuna Balaki mbati, “Chinchino ndikubwerera kwathu kuna anthu anga, mbwenye mbandidzati kwenda, ndinafuna kukucheuza pinthu pinafuna dzachita Aisraele m'tsogolo muno kuna anthu ako.”" 
Numbers24:15 Natenepo adatoma kulonga mphangwa zauprofeti izi: “Mphangwa za Balamu mwana Beori, mafala a munthu ule anakwanisa kuona mwadidi," 
Numbers24:16 ule anakwanisa kuva pinalonga Mulungu mbatambira nzeru zakubulukira kuna Nyakudzulu-dzulu, ule na maso akuthwa anakwanisa kuona masomphenya akubulukira kuna Nyamphamvu zonsene." 
Numbers24:17 Ndimbayang'ana pya m'tsogolo, tenepo ndimbaona dzinza ya Israele. Mfumu wakukhala ninga nyenyezi yakuyetima inabulukira muna Yakobo, ndodo yachifumu inaoneka mu Israele. Iye anakhamwadza akadamu a Moabu mbamenya anthu onsene a Seti." 
Numbers24:18 Iye anakunda anyamalwache Aedomu mbachitisa dziko yawo kukhala yache uku Israele akuthimiza basi kukunda. 
Numbers24:19 Dziko ya Israele inaapondedza pansi mbatswairiratu anyakusalira na moyo onsene.” 
Numbers24:20 Kubuluka penepo Balamu kumasomphenyache adaona Aamaleki mbalonga mphangwa zauprofeti izi: “Aamaleki ikhali dzinza yamphamvu pyakwanga kupiringana madzinza anango onsene, mbwenye pakumalisira pache iyo inamaliratu, pontho nee anaonekave tayu.”" 
Numbers24:21 Kumasomphenya enewa adaonamo pontho Akeni mbalonga mphangwa zauprofeti izi: “Podi kwene kuti mbuto inakhala imweyo njakutchinjirizwa mwadidi ninga chisa chakumangwa pamatelero akulapha a phiri," 
Numbers24:22 imwe, Akeni, munati muvungwe, Ashuri angabwera dzakukwatani ninga anyaperezo.”" 
Numbers24:23 Balamu adalonga pontho mphangwa zauprofeti izi: “Anthu anagumanyikana kumpotowa mbani? 
Numbers24:24 Anyankhondo anabwera na pamadzi kubulukira ku Kipro, iwo anakunda Asiria na Eberi. Mbwenye pakumalisira pache iwombo anamaliratu, pontho nee anaonekave tayu.”" 
Numbers24:25 Kubuluka penepo Balamu adalamuka mbabwerera kwawo, Balaki mbaendambo na njirache." 
Numbers25:1 Pidamanga Aisraele msasawo m'Phedi ya Kesha, amuna adatoma kuchita uputa na akazi a ku Moabu akhali penepo ale." 
Numbers25:2 Akazi enewa adachemerera amunawa kuphwando yawo ya nsembe, kule kukhapembedzwa milungu yawo. Aisraele achimuna adadya pyakudya pile mbapembedza milungu yawo" 
Numbers25:3 yakuchemerwa Baala wa Peori. Natenepo MBUYA adazhangali nawo 
Numbers25:4 mbalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Kwata akadamu a Aisraele onsenewa uaphe pakwecha pamaso panga, towera ukali wanga wakugoswa ubuluke pana Aisraelewa.”" 
Numbers25:5 Mose adapanga akadamu mbati, “Munthu onsene aphe munthu wa dzinzache ule adavungazikana na Amoabu kupembedza Baala wa Peori.”" 
Numbers25:6 Mbodzi wa Aisraele adakwata mkazi wa ku Midiani mbapita naye m'khumbi mwache uku Mose na dzinza yonsene ya Israele akuona, mwenemo iwo onsene akusintili pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu." 
Numbers25:7 Pidaona Finiasi mwana Eleazara mdzukuluache Aroni nyansembe penepi, adalamuka mbasiya gulu yonsene ile. Iye adakwata dipa," 
Numbers25:8 mbatewera mamuna na mkazi m'khumbi mule mbaaphutchula na dipayo onsene uwiriawo pabodzi pene. Na njira yeneyi muliri ukhapha Aisraele udaleka," 
Numbers25:9 mbwenye pandzidzi wenewu muliri ukhadapha kale anthu pikwi makumawiri na pinayi. 
Numbers25:10 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Numbers25:11 “Na thangwi ya pinthu pyachita Finiasi, ine nkhabeve zhangali nawo Aisraele tayu. Iye adazhangali pyakwanga ninga mudachitira ine towera ine ndilemedzwe pakati pawo. Ndi thangwi yache ine sidaamale onsene kuavunga tayu." 
Numbers25:12 Natenepo mpange kuti ine ndikuchita naye chiverano chile chinakhala chakukhazikika ndzidzi onsene unadzawu. 
Numbers25:13 Iye pabodzi pene na pidzukulu pyache ndaakhazikisa kukhala anyansembe anga kwenda na kwenda, thangwi iye adachita phinga kuti ine ndilemedzwe pakati pawo, pontho kuti adachitisa kuti pyakudawa pya Aisraele pilekererwe.”" 
Numbers25:14 Mamuna wa Chiisraele ule adaphiwa pabodzi na mkazi wa ku Midiani akhali Zimri mwana Salu, ule akhali mkadamu wa banja m'dzinza ya Simioni." 
Numbers25:15 Dzina ya mkaziyo ikhali Kozibi. Babache akhali Zuri mkadamu wa mbumba za Amidiani. 
Numbers25:16 MBUYA adapanga Mose mbati," 
Numbers25:17 “Ndoko kamenyane na Amidiani, pontho uavunge," 
Numbers25:18 thangwi ya pyakuipa pidachita iwo kuna imwe pidakunyengezani iwo pa Peori, pontho thangwi ya Kozibi ule adafa pandzidzi wa muliri udachitika pa Peori ule.”" 
Numbers26:1 Pidamala muliri ule MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose na Eleazara mwana Aroni mbati," 
Numbers26:2 “Chitani kalembera wa dzinza yonsene malingana na mabanjawo, maka amuna a pyaka makumawiri pyakubalwa penu akupiringana penepo, ale anakwanisa kuphata basa ya unyankhondo.”" 
Numbers26:3 Mose na Eleazara adaveradi MBUYA mbachemeresa pabodzi amuna onsene a pyaka penepi. Iwo adagumanyiswa m'maphedi a Moabu kukhundu inango ya mkulo wa Yorodani kubulukira ku Yeriko. Aisraele ale adabuluka m'dziko ya Iguputo mbawa. 
Numbers26:4  
Numbers26:5 Dzinza ya Rubeni, ule akhali mwana wautombo wa Yakobo: nkhonda Hanoki, Palu," 
Numbers26:6 Hezironi na Karimi. 
Numbers26:7 Onsene pabodzi pene akhalipo pikwi makumanayi na pitatu, pontho na madzana manomwe na makumatatu." 
Numbers26:8 Pidzukulu pya Palu pikhali Eliabu 
Numbers26:9 na anache achimuna Nemuele, Datani na Abiramu. Datani na Abiramu ngontho ale adasankhulwa na dzinza yonsene ya Israele. Iwo adapandukira Mose na Aroni mbakhala gulu ibodzi na anyakutewera Kora, pidapandukira iwo MBUYA." 
Numbers26:10 Mataka adafunguka mbaakhudyula onsene. Tenepo iwo adafa pabodzi pene Kora na anyakutewerache pidadza moto kuvunga amuna madzana mawiri na makumashanu; iwo adakhala ninga chinthu chakucheuza nacho anthu. 
Numbers26:11 Mbwenye ana achimuna a Kora hadaphiwe tayu. 
Numbers26:12 Dzinza ya Simioni: nkhonda Nemuele, Yamini, Yakini," 
Numbers26:13 Zera na Shauli. 
Numbers26:14 Onsene pabodzi pene akhalipo amuna pikwi makumawiri na piwiri na madzana mawiri. 
Numbers26:15 Dzinza ya Gadi: nkhonda Zefoni, Hagi, Shuni," 
Numbers26:16 Ozini, Eri," 
Numbers26:17 Arodi na Areli. 
Numbers26:18 Onsene pabodzi pene akhalipo amuna pikwi makumanayi na madzana mashanu. 
Numbers26:19 Dzinza ya Yuda: nkhonda Shela, Perezi, Zera, Hezironi na Hamuli. Ana achimuna awiri a Yuda, Eri na Onani akhadafera m'dziko ya Kanani." 
Numbers26:20  
Numbers26:21  
Numbers26:22 Onsenewa pabodzi pene akhalipo amuna pikwi makumanomwe na pitanthatu pontho na madzana mashanu. 
Numbers26:23 Dzinza ya Isakara: nkhonda Tola, Pua," 
Numbers26:24 Yashubu na Shimironi. 
Numbers26:25 Onsene pabodzi pene akhalipo amuna pikwi makumatanthatu na pinayi pontho na madzana matatu. 
Numbers26:26 Dzinza ya Zebuloni: nkhonda Seredi, Eloni na Yaheleele." 
Numbers26:27 Onsene pabodzi pene akhalipo amuna pikwi makumatanthatu na madzana mashanu. 
Numbers26:28 Madzinza a Yosefe ule akhali na ana awiri achimuna, Manase na Eferemu." 
Numbers26:29 Dzinza ya Manase: Makiri mwana manase adabala Gileadi. Tenepo anthu onsene ali m'tchindewa mphidzukulu pya Gileadi: 
Numbers26:30 nkhonda Izere, Heleki," 
Numbers26:31 Asriele, Shekemu," 
Numbers26:32 Shemida na Hefere. 
Numbers26:33 Zelofehadi mwana wamamuna wa Hefere akhali nkhabe ana achimuna mbwenye achikazi okhokha. Anawo madzinawo mbawa: Mala, Nowa, Hogila, Milika na Tiriza." 
Numbers26:34 Onsene pabodzi pene akhalipo amuna pikwi makumashanu na piwiri pontho na madzana manomwe. 
Numbers26:35 Dzinza ya Eferemu: nkhonda Shutela, Bekeri na Tahani." 
Numbers26:36 Nkhonda Erani mphidzukulu pya Shutela. 
Numbers26:37 Onsene pabodzi pene akhalipo amuna pikwi makumatatu na piwiri pontho na madzana mashanu. Mbumba yonseneyi ikhali pidzukulu pya Yosefe. 
Numbers26:38 Dzinza ya Benjemani: nkhonda Bela, Ashibele, Ahiramu," 
Numbers26:39 Shefufamu na Hufamu. 
Numbers26:40 Nkhonda Aridi na Naamani mphidzukulu pya Bela. 
Numbers26:41 Onsene pabodzi pene akhalipo amuna pikwi makumanayi na pishanu pontho na madzana makumatanthatu. 
Numbers26:42 Dzinza ya Dani: nkhonda Shuhamu. 
Numbers26:43 Iwo onsene pabodzi pene akhalipo amuna pikwi makumatanthatu na pinayi pontho na madzana manayi. 
Numbers26:44 Dzinza ya Asheri: nkhonda Imina, Ishivi na Beria." 
Numbers26:45 Nkhonda Heberi na Malikiele mphidzukulu pya Beria. 
Numbers26:46 Asheri akhadabala mwana wamkazi dzinache Sera. 
Numbers26:47 Onsene pabodzi pene akhalipo amuna pikwi makumashanu na pitatu pontho na madzana manayi. 
Numbers26:48 Dzinza ya Nafitali: nkhonda Yazeele, Guni," 
Numbers26:49 Yezeri na Shilemu. 
Numbers26:50 Onsene pabodzi pene akhalipo amuna pikwi makumanayi na pishanu pontho na madzana manayi. 
Numbers26:51 Konta yonsene ya amuna a mu Israele idakwana pikwi madzana matanthatu na chibodzi pontho na madzana manomwe na makumatatu. 
Numbers26:52 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Numbers26:53 “Gawa dzikoyo pakati pa madzinza malingana na kuinjipa kwa anthu adalembwa ale. 
Numbers26:54 Ungafuna kuigawa uphatise basa ntsango, pontho upereke mbuto ikulu kuna dzinza ikulumbo, mbuto ing'ono kuna dzinzambo ing'ono.”" 
Numbers26:55  
Numbers26:56  
Numbers26:57 Dzinza ya Levi idadzala na nkhonda Gereshoni, Kohati na Merari." 
Numbers26:58 Pidzukulu pyache pidavungazikana na nkhonda Libini, Hebroni, Mahili, Mushi na Kora. Kohati adabala Amuramu," 
Numbers26:59 ule adasemba mwana wamkazi wa Levi dzinzache Yokebedi, ule adabalwa mu Iguputo. Iye adambalira Amuramu ana awiri achimuna, Aroni na Mose, pontho na nyamaingawo Miriamu." 
Numbers26:60 Aroni adabala ana anayi achimuna Nadabu, Abihu, Eleazara na Itamara." 
Numbers26:61 Nadabu na Abihu adafa pidapereka iwo moto okhonda tawiriswa pamaso pa Mulungu. 
Numbers26:62 Ana achimuna a Levi, ale akhali na mwezi ubodzi wakubalwa penu kupiringana penepo akhalipo pikwi makumawiri na pitatu. Iwo adalembwa paokha enembo nee kuavungaza kubodzi na Aisraele anzawo tayu, thangwi iwo hadapaswe mbuto mu Israele tayu." 
Numbers26:63 Anthu onsenewa adalembwa na Mose pontho Eleazara pikhachita iwo kalembera kukhundu inango ya mkulo wa Yorodani kubulukira ku Yeriko. 
Numbers26:64 Nkhabe mamuna mbodzi akhadasala tayu pakati pa anthu ale adalembwa na Mose pontho Aroni pandzidzi udachita iwo kalembera wakutoma m'thando yatchetcha ya Sinai. 
Numbers26:65 MBUYA akhadalonga kuti onsene anamala kufa m'thando yatchetcha. Nee mbodzi wa iwo adasala na moyo tayu, kupambula Kalebu mwana Yefune na Yoswa mwana Nuni." 
Numbers27:1 Mala, Nowa, Hogila, Milika na Tiriza akhali ana achikazi a Zelofehadi ule babache akhali Hefere, Hefere babache akhali Gileadi, Gileadi babache akhali Makiri, Makiri babache akhali Manase, mwana Yosefe." 
Numbers27:2 Iwo adenda mbakaimira pamaso pa Mose, Eleazara nyansembe, akadamu na dzinza yonsene ya Israele pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu mbalonga mbati," 
Numbers27:3 “Babathu adafa m'thando yatchetcha okhonda kusiya na mwana ene wamamuna. Iye nee akhali mbodzi wa anyakutewera a Kora adapandukira MBUYA ale tayu; iye adafa thangwi ya kudawa kwache. 
Numbers27:4 Ayi mphyadidi kuti dzina ya babathu ifeletu, thangwi iye akhali nkhabe ana achimuna basi? Tipaseni mbutoyo pakati pa abale a babathu.”" 
Numbers27:5 Mose adaupereka mseru wenewu kuna MBUYA," 
Numbers27:6 tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Numbers27:7 “Pinapempha ana achikazi a Zelofehadi mphyakuthema; apaseni mbutoyo pakati pa abale a babawo. Pontho uapase pinthu pyasiya defuntuyo. 
Numbers27:8 Panga Aisraele kuti ngakhala mamuna anafa okhonda kusiya ana achimuna, anache achikaziwo apaswe pinthu pyasiya babawo pile." 
Numbers27:9 Ngakhala iye nkhabe na mwana ene wamkazi, mbaleache atambire pinthu pyakusiyiwapyo." 
Numbers27:10 Ngakhala iye nkhabe na mbale ene, mbaleache babache atambire pinthu pyakusiyiwapyo." 
Numbers27:11 Ngakhala babache nkhabe mbale, penepo mbaleache unango wakukhala naye chifupi atambire pinthu pyakusiyiwapyo, pontho apikwate ninga pyache pyene. Anthu a ku Israele athema kuteweza pinthu pinalonga mwambo wenewu ninga mwalongera ine MBUYA.”" 
Numbers27:12 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Kwira phiri ya Abarimu mbuyang'ane dziko inafuna ine kupasa Aisraele." 
Numbers27:13 Ungamala kuiona unati ufe ninga mudachitira mbaleako Aroni," 
Numbers27:14 thangwi monsene uwirianu mudapandukira matongero anga m'thando yatchetcha ya Zini. Pidadungunya anthu mwakupokanyisana na ine pa Meriba, iwe udakhonda kundilemedza pamaso pawo kuti ndine wakuchena.” (Meriba ndi mphuno ya madzi ya pa Kadeshi m'thando yatchetcha ya Zini.)" 
Numbers27:15 Mose adapemphera mbati," 
Numbers27:16 “MBUYA Mulungu, phata ya moyo wa anthu onsene, ndikupemphera kuti musankhule munthu ule anakwanisa kutsogolera anthu anu," 
Numbers27:17 pontho ule anakwanisa kukhala mkadamu wawo pankhondo, towera anthu anu aleke khala ninga mabira akusowa makabuswa.”" 
Numbers27:18 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Kwata Yoswa mwana Nuni, munthu wakudzala na nzeru, mbumsanjike manja." 
Numbers27:19 Muimirise pamaso pa Eleazara nyansembe na pa anthu onsene a Israele mbulonge pamaso pa iwo onsene kuti iye ndiye nyakupita m'mbuto mwako. 
Numbers27:20 Mpase khundu ya utongi una iwe towera anthu onsene a Israele amvere. 
Numbers27:21 Iye aimire pamaso pa Eleazara nyansembe, ule anampanga kufuna kwanga pakuphatisa basa Urimu na Tumimu. Na njira yeneyi Eleazara ndiye anatsogolera Yoswa pabodzi pene na anthu onsene a Israele papyonsene pinaphata iwo.”" 
Numbers27:22 Mose adachitadi pyonsene ninga mudampangira MBUYA. Iye adaimirisa Yoswa pamaso pa Eleazara nyansembe na pa anthu onsene a Israele. 
Numbers27:23 Ninga montho mudalongera MBUYA, Mose adamsanjika manja Yoswa mbalonga kuti Yoswa ndiye nyakupita m'mbuto mwache." 
Numbers28:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose 
Numbers28:2 kuti apange Aisraele kuti iwo athema kupereka pandzidzi wache wakusankhulika pyakupereka pyakusasanywa na moto kuna MBUYA ninga khwema yakumkomera MBUYA. 
Numbers28:3 Pyakupereka pyakusasanywa na moto pile pyathema kuperekwa kuna MBUYA mphipi: anabira amuna awiri a chaka chibodzi akusowa chilema ninga nsembe yakupyerera ya nsiku na nsiku. 
Numbers28:4 Bira mbodzi aperekwe nsembe na machibese, nyachiwiriacheyi aperekwe nsembe pakuthobila dzuwa." 
Numbers28:5 Pa mabira awiri paperekwe chakupereka cha mapira chakulemera kilogramu ibodzi chakuvungazwa na mafuta adidiletu aolivi akukwana tugwe mbodzi. 
Numbers28:6 Chenechi ntchakupereka cha nsiku na nsiku chile chimbapiswa chonsenene. Chenechi ntchile chidakhazikiswa paphiri ya Sinai kukhala chakupereka chakusasanywa na moto kuna MBUYA, chile khwemache MBUYA ambakomerwa nayo." 
Numbers28:7 Chakupereka chakumwa cha vinyu chakukwana tugwe mbodzi chikhuthulirwe pana mabira awiri ale paguwa yansembe. 
Numbers28:8 Pakuthobila dzuwa perekani bira wachiwiriyo ninga montho mwachitira imwe na chakupereka cha machibese chile pabodzi pene na chakupereka chakumwa. Chenechi pontho ntchakupereka chakusasanywa na moto kuna MBUYA, chile khwemache imbamkomera MBUYA." 
Numbers28:9 Pa Nsiku Yakupuma perekani anabira amuna awiri a chaka chibodzi akusowa chilema, ufa wakulemera makilogramu mawiri wakuvungazwa na mafuta aolivi kukhala chakupereka chakumwa, pontho na chakupereka cha mapira." 
Numbers28:10 Nsembe yakupyererayi yathema kuperekwa pa Nsiku yonsene Yakupuma kuthimizira pa nsembe yakupyerera ya nsiku na nsiku pabodzi pene na chakupereka chache chakumwa. 
Numbers28:11 Perekani nsembe yakupyerera kuna MBUYA pakutoma pamwezi onsene: ng'ombe zimuna zing'ono-zing'ono ziwiri, bira wamamuna mbodzi, na anabira anomwe a chaka chibodzi, onsenewa akhale akusowa chilema." 
Numbers28:12 Pontho mupereke ufa wakuvungazwa na mafuta aolivi kukhala chakupereka cha mapira. Pabodzi pene na ng'ombe yonsene perekani ufa wakulemera makilogramu matatu; pabodzi pene na bira wamamuna perekani ufa wakulemera makilogramu mawiri; 
Numbers28:13 pontho pabodzi pene na bira onsene perekani ufa wakulemera kilogramu ibodzi. Nsembe zakupyerera nsakupereka zakusasanywa na moto, zile khwemache MBUYA ambakomerwa nayo." 
Numbers28:14 Na ng'ombe yonsene paperekwe chakupereka chakumwa cha vinyu chakukwana matugwe mawiri, na bira wamamuna tugwe mbodzi na theka, pontho na mwanabira onsene tugwe mbodzi. Wenewu ndi mwambo wa nsembe zakupyerera zakuperekwa pansiku yakutoma ya mwezi onsene pa chaka." 
Numbers28:15 Kuthimizira pa nsembe zakupyerera za nsiku na nsiku pabodzi pene na chakupereka chakumwa, perekani bokho mbodzi kukhala nsembe yakubulusira pyakudawa." 
Numbers28:16 Phwando ya Paska yakulemedza nayo MBUYA yathema kuchitika pansiku yakhumi na chinayi ya mwezi wakutoma. 
Numbers28:17 Pansiku yakhumi na chishanu phwando ya chipembedzo itome. Tenepo pangamala nsiku zinomwe phwandoyo imale. Pandzidzi wa phwandowu idyani mikate yakusowa chakufufumisira. 
Numbers28:18 Pansiku yakutoma ya phwandoyi mwathema kugumanyikana kupembedza, tenepo lekani phata basa pansiku yeneyo." 
Numbers28:19 Perekani nsembe yakupyerera kuna MBUYA kukhala chakupereka chakusasanywa na moto: ng'ombe zimuna ziwiri, bira wamamuna mbodzi, na anabira amuna anomwe a chaka chibodzi, onsenewa akhale akusowa chilema." 
Numbers28:20 Perekani chakupereka cha mapira cha ufa wakunyodoka wakuvungazwa na mafuta aolivi akukwana makilogramu matatu pabodzi na ng'ombe yonsene, makilogramu mawiri pabodzi pene na bira," 
Numbers28:21 pontho na kilogramu ibodzi pabodzi pene na bira onsene. 
Numbers28:22 Mupereke pontho bokho mbodzi kukhala nsembe yakubulusira pyakudawa. Na njira yeneyi chitani mwambo wakuchenesa anthu onsene. 
Numbers28:23 Perekani penepi kuthimizira pa nsembe zakupyerera zimbapereka imwe na machibese onsene zile. 
Numbers28:24 Montho-monthomo perekani nsiku na nsiku mpakana nsiku zinomwe chakupereka chakusasanywa na moto kuna MBUYA, khwemache imbamkomera MBUYA. Perekani pyakuperekapi kuthimizira pa nsembe yakupyerera ya nsiku na nsiku pabodzi na chakupereka chache chakumwa." 
Numbers28:25 Pansiku yachinomwe mwathema kugumanyikana pabodzi kuti mupembedze, mbamuleke phata mabasanu a nsiku na nsiku." 
Numbers28:26 Pansiku yakutoma ya Phwando ya Pyakuvuna, mungapereka pyakupereka pyanu pya mapira achinchino kuna MBUYA, imwe mwathema kugumanyikana kuti mupembedze mbamuleke phata mabasanu a nsiku na nsiku." 
Numbers28:27 Perekani nsembe zakupyerera kuti zikhale khwema yakukomera MBUYA: anamphulu amuna awiri, bira mbodzi na mabira anomwe a chaka chibodzi, onsenewa akhale akusowa chilema." 
Numbers28:28 Perekani chakupereka cha mapira cha ufa wakunyodoka wakuvungazwa na mafuta aolivi: makilogramu matatu aperekwe pabodzi na ng'ombe yonsene, makilogramu mawiri aperekwe pabodzi na bira wamamuna," 
Numbers28:29 pontho kilogramu ibodzi iperekwe pabodzi na mwanabira onsene. 
Numbers28:30 Perekani pontho bokho mbodzi kukhala nsembe yakubulusira pyakudawa. Na njira yeneyi chitani mwambo wakuchenesa anthu onsene. 
Numbers28:31 Perekani penepi na chakupereka chakumwa kuthimizira pa nsembe yakupyerera ya nsiku na nsiku pabodzi na chakupereka chache cha mapira. 
Numbers29:1 Pansiku yakutoma ya mwezi wachinomwe mugumanyikane kuti mupembedze mbamuleke phata mabasanu a nsiku na nsiku. Pansiku yeneyo ngoma zathema kulizwa. 
Numbers29:2 Perekani nsembe yakupyerera kuna MBUYA, khwemache imbamkomera MBUYA: mwanamphulu mbodzi wamamuna, bira wamamuna mbodzi na anabira anomwe a chaka chibodzi, onsenewa akhale akusowa chilema." 
Numbers29:3 Perekani chakupereka cha mapira cha ufa wakunyodoka wakuvungazwa na mafuta aolivi: ufa wakulemera makilogramu matatu aperekwe pabodzi pene na ng'ombe; makilogramu mawiri aperekwe pabodzi pene na bira; 
Numbers29:4 pontho kilogramu ibodzi iperekwe pabodzi pene na mwanabira onsene. 
Numbers29:5 Pontho perekani bokho mbodzi kukhala nsembe yakubulusira pyakudawa; na njira yeneyi chitani mwambo wakuchenesa anthu onsene. 
Numbers29:6 Perekani penepi kuthimizira pa nsembe yakupyerera imbapereka imwe pansiku yakutoma ya mwezi onsene pabodzi pene na chakupereka chache cha mapira, pontho na nsembe yakupyerera imbapereka imwe nsiku na nsiku pabodzi pene na chakupereka chache chakumwa, khwemache ya pyakupereka penepi MBUYA ambakomerwa napyo." 
Numbers29:7 Pansiku yachikhumi ya mwezi wachinomwe gumanyikanani kuti mupembedze; lekani kudya chinthu na chibodzi chene mbamuleke phata mabasanu a nsiku na nsiku. 
Numbers29:8 Perekani nsembe yakupyerera kuna MBUYA, ile khwemache imbamkomera MBUYA: mwanamphulu wamamuna mbodzi, pontho na anabira anomwe a pyaka pinomwe, onsenewa akhale akusowa chilema." 
Numbers29:9 Perekani chakupereka cha mapira cha ufa wakunyodoka wakuvungazwa na mafuta aolivi: makilogramu matatu a ufa aperekwe pabodzi pene na mwanamphulu wamamuna, makilogramu mawiri aperekwe pabodzi pene na bira wamamuna," 
Numbers29:10 kilogramu ibodzi iperekwe pabodzi pene na mwanabira onsene. 
Numbers29:11 Perekani pontho bokho mbodzi kukhala nsembe yakubulusira pyakudawa. Kuthimizira pa bokho adaperekwa kuchita mwambo wakuchenesa anthu ule, pontho na nsembe yakupyerera ya nsiku na nsiku pabodzi pene na chakupereka chache cha mapira pontho chakupereka chache chakumwa." 
Numbers29:12 Pansiku yakhumi na chishanu ya mwezi wachinomwe gumanyikanani kuti mupembedze. Chitani phwando yakulemedza nayo MBUYA nsiku zinomwe mbamuleke phata mabasanu a nsiku na nsiku. 
Numbers29:13 Pansiku yakutomayi perekani kuna MBUYA chakupereka chakusasanywa na moto, chile khwemache imbamkomera MBUYA: anamphulu amuna khumi na atatu, mabira amuna awiri, anabira achimuna khumi na anayi a chaka chibodzi, onsenewa akhale akusowa chilema." 
Numbers29:14 Perekani chakupereka cha mapira cha ufa wakunyodoka wakuvungazwa na mafuta aolivi: makilogramu matatu aperekwe pabodzi pene na ng'ombe yonsene, makilogramu mawiri aperekwe pabodzi pene na bira onsene," 
Numbers29:15 kilogramu ibodzi iperekwe pabodzi pene na mwanabira onsene. 
Numbers29:16 Mupereke pontho bokho mbodzi kukhala nsembe yakubulusira pyakudawa. Perekani penepi kuthimizira pa nsembe yakupyerera imbapereka imwe nsiku na nsiku pabodzi pene na chakupereka chache cha mapira pontho chakupereka chache chakumwa. 
Numbers29:17 Pansiku yachiwiri perekani anamphulu amuna khumi na awiri, mabira amuna awiri, pontho na anabira amuna khumi na anayi a chaka chibodzi, onsenewa akhale akusowa chilema." 
Numbers29:18 Penepi mupipereke pabodzi pene na pyakupereka pya mapira na pyakupereka pyakumwa malingana na munafunikira ipyo pansiku yakutoma. 
Numbers29:19  
Numbers29:20 Pansiku yachitatu perekani anamphulu amuna khumi na mbodzi, mabira amuna awiri, na anabira amuna khumi na anayi a chaka chibodzi, onsenewa akhale akusowa chilema." 
Numbers29:21 Penepi mupipereke pabodzi pene na pyakupereka pya mapira na pyakupereka pyakumwa malingana na munafunikira ipyo pansiku yakutoma. 
Numbers29:22  
Numbers29:23 Pansiku yachinayi perekani anamphulu amuna khumi, mabira amuna awiri, pontho na anabira amuna khumi na anayi a chaka chibodzi, onsenewa akhale akusowa chilema." 
Numbers29:24 Penepi mupipereke pabodzi pene na pyakupereka pya mapira na pyakupereka pyakumwa malingana na munafunikira ipyo pansiku yakutoma. 
Numbers29:25  
Numbers29:26 Pansiku yachishanu perekani anamphulu amuna afemba, mabira amuna awiri, pontho na anabira amuna khumi na anayi a chaka chibodzi, onsenewa akhale akusowa chilema." 
Numbers29:27 Penepi mupipereke pabodzi pene na pyakupereka pya mapira na pyakupereka pyakumwa malingana na munafunikira ipyo pansiku yakutoma. 
Numbers29:28  
Numbers29:29 Pansiku yachitanthatu perekani anamphulu asere, mabira amuna awiri, pontho na anabira amuna khumi na anayi a chaka chibodzi, onsenewa akhale akusowa chilema." 
Numbers29:30 Penepi mupipereke pabodzi pene na pyakupereka pya mapira na pyakupereka pyakumwa malingana na munafunikira ipyo pansiku yakutoma. 
Numbers29:31  
Numbers29:32 Pansiku yachinomwe perekani anamphulu amuna anomwe, mabira amuna awiri, pontho na anabira khumi na anayi a chaka chibodzi, onsenewa akhale akusowa chilema." 
Numbers29:33 Penepi mupipereke pabodzi pene na pyakupereka pya mapira na pyakupereka pyakumwa malingana na munafunikira ipyo pansiku yakutoma. 
Numbers29:34  
Numbers29:35 Pansiku yachisere gumanyikanani kuti mupembedze mbamuleke phata mabasanu a nsiku na nsiku. 
Numbers29:36 Perekani nsembe yakupyerera kukhala chakupereka chakusasanywa na moto kuna MBUYA, chile khwemache imbamkomera MBUYA: mwanamphulu wamamuna mbodzi, bira wamamuna mbodzi, pontho na anabira amuna anomwe a chaka chibodzi, onsenewa akhale akusowa chilema." 
Numbers29:37 Penepi mupereke pabodzi pene na pyakupereka pya mapira na pyakupereka pyakumwa malingana na munafunikira ipyo pansiku yakutoma. 
Numbers29:38  
Numbers29:39 Wenewu ndiye mwambo wa nsembe zakupyerera, pyakupereka pya mapira, pyakupereka pyakumwa na nsembe zachiphatizano, pile pyathema imwe kupipereka kuna MBUYA pandzidzi wa maphwando anu akusankhulika. Penepi nkhuthimizira pa pyakupereka pimbapereka imwe kuchitisa kuti pidadumbira imwe pikwane-kwane penu pyakupereka na kufuna kwache munthu." 
Numbers29:40 Natenepo Mose adapanga Aisraele pyonsene pikhadalonga MBUYA pile. 
Numbers30:1 Mose adapereka matongero ali m'tchindewa kuna akadamu a madzinza a Israele. 
Numbers30:2 Munthu angadumbira kupereka chinthu kuna MBUYA, penu kudumbira kuti iye hanachita chinthu chinango tayu, iye aleke kuswa kudumbira kudachita iye kule, kwache iye athema kuchita pyonsene pidalonga iye." 
Numbers30:3 Ngakhala mwali wakukhala m'nyumba mwa makolo ache anadumbira kuna MBUYA kupereka chinthu chinango, penu kudumbira kuti iye hanachita chinthu chinango tayu," 
Numbers30:4 iye athema kuchita pyonsene pyadumbira iye, ngakhala babache hanalongapo pinthu tayu angava pya penepi." 
Numbers30:5 Mbwenye ngakhala babache pakuva pya penepi anamkhondesa kuchita pidadumbira iye pile, penepo iye ngwakusudzulwa pa pidadumbira iye. MBUYA anati amulekerere, thangwi babache ndiye adamkhondesa kuchita pidadumbira iye pile." 
Numbers30:6 Ngakhala mkazi anasembwa mwenemo adumbira kale chadala penu mwakukhonda dziwa pachinthu chinango," 
Numbers30:7 iye athema kuchita pyonsene pidadumbira iye ngakhala mamunache hanalongapo pinthu tayu angava pya penepi. 
Numbers30:8 Mbwenye ngakhala mamunache pakuva pya penepi anamkhondesa kuchita pidadumbira iye, penepo anakhala wakusudzuka pa pidadumbira iye pile, MBUYA anati amulekerere." 
Numbers30:9 Mamfelwa penu mkazi wakumwalana na mamunache hanasudzuka tayu papyonsene pidadumbira iye pile. 
Numbers30:10 Ngakhala mkazi wakusembwa anadumbira pachinthu chinango," 
Numbers30:11 iye athema kuchita pyonsene pyadumbira iye ngakhala mamunache pakuva pya penepi hanalongapo pinthu tayu, penu kumkhondesa kuchita pyadumbira iye." 
Numbers30:12 Mbwenye ngakhala mamunache pakuva pya penepi anamkhondesa kuchita pidadumbira iye, penepo ngwakusudzuka pa pidadumbira iye pile. MBUYA anati amulekerere thangwi mamunache ndiye amkhomdesa kuchita pidadumbira iye." 
Numbers30:13 Mamunache ndiye ana mphamvu zakumanga penu kusudzula kudumbira kudachita iye kule. 
Numbers30:14 Mbwenye ngakhala panagwanda nsiku kubulukira nsiku idava mamunayo pya penepi mbakhonda longapo pinthu, mkaziyo athema kuchita pyonsene pidadumbira iye. Mamunayo adatsikimizira pyakudumbirako pansiku idava iye pya penepyo." 
Numbers30:15 Mbwenye ngakhala mamunayo anafudza kudumbirako pangagwanda nsiku zinango, mamunayo ndiye athema kuoneswa nyatwa thangwi ya kuchitisa mkaziyo kuchimwana kuchita pinthu pidadumbira iye pile." 
Numbers30:16 Enewa ndiye matongero a MBUYA adapereka iye kuna Mose akulonga pyakudumbira kumbachita mkazi okhonda sembwa wakukhala m'nyumba mwa babache penu mkazi wakusembwa. 
Numbers31:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Numbers31:2 “Atchunyuse Amidiani thangwi ya pinthu pidachita iwo kuna Aisraele. Ungamala chita Penepyo, unafa.”" 
Numbers31:3 Natenepo Mose adalonga kuna anthu mbati, “Sasanyika kwenda kunkhondo towera mukamenyane na Amidiani na kuatchunyusa thangwi ya pinthu pidachita iwo kuna MBUYA." 
Numbers31:4 Padzinza yonsene ya Aisraele pabuluke amuna chikwi chibodzi kwenda kunkhondo.” 
Numbers31:5 Natenepo amuna chikwi adasankhulwa kubulukira m'dzinza yonsene. Konta ya amuna onsene ikhali pikwi khumi na piwiri kusasanyikira nkhondo. 
Numbers31:6 Mose adagwinya amuna enewa kunkhondo mwakutsogolerwa na Finiasi mwana Eleazara nyansembe, ule akhali nyakuyang'anira pinthu pyakupambulika pya MBUYA na ngoma zakupereka chidziwiso kuna anthu." 
Numbers31:7 Iwo adamenyana nawo Amidiani ninga mudalongera MBUYA kuna Mose mbapha amuna onsene," 
Numbers31:8 pabodzi pene na mafumu mashanu a Amidiani: Evi, Rekemu, Zuri, Huri na Reba. Iwo adapha pontho Balamu, mwana Beori." 
Numbers31:9 Aisraele adaphata akazi a Chimidiani na ana ene mbapokosera ng'ombe, mabira na mfumawo yonsene," 
Numbers31:10 pontho mbapisa mizindawo yonsene na misasawo ene. 
Numbers31:11 Iwo adakwata pyonsene pidapokosera iwo pabodzi pene na anyaperezo pontho pifuyo," 
Numbers31:12 mbadza pamaso pa Mose, Eleazara na dzinza yonsene ya Israele, ale akhadamanga msasawo pamaphedi a Moabu kukhundu inango ya mkulo wa Yorodani kubulukira ku Yeriko." 
Numbers31:13 Mose, Eleazara na akadamu anango a m'dzinza ya Israele adabuluka mumsasa mule kagumanikana na anyankhondo." 
Numbers31:14 Mose akhadazhangalira akulu-akulu, akadamu a anyankhondo pikwi na akadamu a anyankhondo dzana, ale akhadadza kubulukira kunkhondo." 
Numbers31:15 Iye adavunza mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji mwaaleka na moyo akazi onsenewa?" 
Numbers31:16 Kumbukani kuti akhali akazi, ale adateweza pidalonga Balamu, pontho pa Peori adachitisa kuti anthu akhale okhonda khulupirika kuna MBUYA. Penepi ndiye pidadzesa muliri pakati pa anthu a MBUYA." 
Numbers31:17 Natenepo ndzidzi ontho uno iphani mphale onsene na mkazi onsene wakudziwa kale mamuna," 
Numbers31:18 mbamuleke na moyo akazi okhonda dziwa mamuna onsene kuti akhale anu. 
Numbers31:19 Tenepo munthu onsene, ule apha munthu penu kukhuya mtembo athema kukhala kunja kwa msasa kufikirana nsiku zinomwe zimale. Pansiku yachitatu na yachinomwe mupichenese mwekha mwene pabodzi pene na akazi aphata imwewa." 
Numbers31:20 Pontho mwathema kuchenesa nguwo zonsene, pontho chinthu chonsene chakusasanywa kubulukira kunthembe, ubweya wa mbuzi na miti.”" 
Numbers31:21 Eleazara nyansembe adalonga kuna amuna akhadabwera kubulukira kunkhondo ale mbati, “Matongero apereka MBUYA kuna Mose mbawa:" 
Numbers31:22 Pinthu pyonsene pyokhonda kupya na moto ninga golidi, siliva, nkuwa, simbi, utale, penu ntove, pyathema kucheneswa pakuchita kupivula na moto. Mbwenye pinango pyonsene picheneswe na madzi." 
Numbers31:23  
Numbers31:24 Pansiku yachinomwe mwathema kufula nguwo zanu; mungamala penepo munakhala akuchena pamaso pa Mulungu pontho munatawiriswa kupita mumsasa.” 
Numbers31:25 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Numbers31:26 “Iwe na Eleazara pabodzi pene na akadamu anango a dzinza ya Israele mulengese pyonsene pidapokosera imwe kuna Amidiani pabodzi pene na anyaperezo pontho pifuyo. 
Numbers31:27 Penepi upigawe kati na kati khundu ibodzi ikhale ya ale adenda kamenya nkhondo, khundu inangomboyo ikhale ya anthu anango onsene a Israele." 
Numbers31:28 Kubulukira pa khundu yakwata anyankhondo ukwatepo msonkho wa MBUYA; pa anyaperezo, ng'ombe, mabira na mbuzi msonkho wache ndi chibodzi pa madzana mashanu onsene." 
Numbers31:29 Penepi upipereke kuna Eleazara nyansembe kuti chikhale chakupereka chakupambulika kuna MBUYA. 
Numbers31:30 Kubulukira pa khundu yakwata anthu anango onsene a Israele, ukwatepo chibodzi pa anyaperezo, ng'ombe, mabulu, mabira na mbuzi makumashanu onsene. Penepi upipereke kuna Alevi, ale akuyang'anira Chikhumbi cha Mulungu.”" 
Numbers31:31 Mose na Eleazara adachitadi pyonsene pidalonga MBUYA kuna Mose. 
Numbers31:32 Pili m'tchindemu ndi konta ya pinthu pidapokosera anyankhondo kuthimiza pinthu pidakoya iwo kuti pikhale pyawo: mabira na mbuzi pikwi madzana matanthatu na makumanomwe na pishanu ng'ombe pikwi makumanomwe na piwiri mabulu pikwi makumatanthatu na chibodzi akazi okhonda dziwa mamuna pikwi makumatatu na piwiri. 
Numbers31:33  
Numbers31:34  
Numbers31:35  
Numbers31:36 Khundu ibodzi idapaswa anyankhondo ndi: Mabira na mbuzi pikwi madzana matatu na makumatatu na pinomwe na madzana mashanu; pa konta yeneyi mabira na mbuzi madzana matanthatu na makumanomwe na ashanu ukhali msonkho wakuperekwa kuna MBUYA ng'ombe pikwi makumatatu na pitanthatu; pa konta yeneyi ng'ombe makumanomwe na ziwiri ukhali msonkho wakuperekwa kuna MBUYA mabulu pikwi makumatatu na madzana mashanu; pa konta yeneyi mabulu makumatanthatu na mbodzi ukhali msonkho wakuperekwa kuna MBUYA akazi okhonda dziwa mamuna pikwi khumi na pitanthatu; pa konta yeneyi akazi makumatatu na awiri ukhali msonkho wakuperekwa kuna MBUYA. 
Numbers31:37  
Numbers31:38  
Numbers31:39  
Numbers31:40  
Numbers31:41 Natenepo Mose adapereka kuna Eleazara msonkho kukhala chakupereka chakupambulika kuna MBUYA ninga montho mudalongera MBUYA. 
Numbers31:42 Pinthu pidapaswa Aisraele onsene pikhali sasawa na pinthu pidapaswa anyankhondo: mbuzi na mabira pikwi madzana matatu na makumatatu na pinomwe na madzana mashanu; ng'ombe pikwi makumatatu na matanthatu; mabulu pikwi makumatatu na madzana mashanu; pontho akazi okhonda dziwa mamuna pikwi khumi na pitanthatu. 
Numbers31:43  
Numbers31:44  
Numbers31:45  
Numbers31:46  
Numbers31:47 Kubulukira pa pinthu penepi Mose adakwata chibodzi pa makumashanu onsene a anyaperezo na a pifuyo pene mbapipereka kuna Alevi, ale basawo ikhali yakuyang'anira Chikhumbi cha Mulungu ninga montho mudalongera MBUYA." 
Numbers31:48 Kubuluka penepo akadamu a anyankhondo adenda kuna Mose 
Numbers31:49 mbakalonga mbati, “Anyabasanufe tamala lengesa anyankhondo ambayang'anira ife ale, pontho nkhabe mbodzi asowapo tayu." 
Numbers31:50 Natenepo ife tikudza na pyakuthemesera manungo pyagolidi, magoza, pibangili, mphete za m'pyala, mphete za m'khutu, na mikufu pile pidakwata ife kukhala pyathu. Penepi ife tikupipereka kuna MBUYA ninga pyakupagali napyo moyo wathu towera iye atitchinjirize.”" 
Numbers31:51 Mose na Eleazara adatambira golidi, pyonsene pyakuthemesera manungo." 
Numbers31:52 Pyonsene pidapereka akadamu kulemera kwache kukhali nenene makilogramu madzana mawiri. 
Numbers31:53 Ale akuti hakhali akadamu tayu adakoya pinthu pidakwata iwo pile. 
Numbers31:54 Natenepo Mose na Eleazara adakwata golidi ule kwenda naye m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu towera MBUYA atchinjirize Aisraele. 
Numbers32:1 Madzinza a Rubeni na Gadi akhali na pifuyo pizinji. Tenepo pidaona iwo kuti nthemba za Yazere na Gileadi ikhali yadidi pyakwanga kudyeserapo pifuyo," 
Numbers32:2 adenda kuna Mose, Eleazara na akadamu anango a dzinza yonsene mbalonga mbati," 
Numbers32:3 “Maluwani a Ataroti, Diboni, Yazere, Nimira, Heshiboni, Eleale, Sibima, Nebo na Beoni," 
Numbers32:4 nthemba ile MBUYA adaphedza Aisraele kuikunda ndi nthemba yadidi pyakwanga na pifuyo, pontho anyabasanufe pifuyo tili napyo." 
Numbers32:5 Natenepo ife taphata miyendo ngatipasenimbo dziko yeneyi kuti ikhale yathu ene, pontho lekani kutiwambusa mkulo wa Yorodani kuti tikakhazikike kweneko.”" 
Numbers32:6 Mose adaatawira mbati, “Kadi pinafuna imwe mphyakuti musale pano uku Aisraele anzanu akwenda kamenya nkhondo?" 
Numbers32:7 Imwe mwawanga tani mtima tenepa kufuna kugwisa mfuwa Aisraele anzanu m'dziko yaapasa MBUYA? 
Numbers32:8 Penepo ndiye pidachita ababanu pidaatuma ine kubulukira ku Kadeshi Barinea kazonda dziko yeneyi. 
Numbers32:9 Iwo adenda mpakana kuphedi ya Eshikolo mbaiona dzikoyo, mbwenye pidabwerera iwo adagwisa mfuwa anzawo kupita m'dziko ikhadaapasa MBUYA ile." 
Numbers32:10 MBUYA adazhangali pyakwanga pansiku yeneyo mbadumbira mbati," 
Numbers32:11 ‘Na thangwi ya kuthimiza kukhonda kundivera kwachita iwoku, amuna a pyaka makumawiri pyakubalwa penu kupiringana penepo, ale adabulukira m'dziko ya Iguputo nkhabe mbodzi wa iwo anafuna dzapita m'dziko idadumbira ine kuna Abrahamu, Isake na Yakobo tayu.’" 
Numbers32:12 Penepi pidasiye munthu tayu kupambula Kalebu mwana Yefune wa dzinza ya Akenizi na Yoswa mwana Nuni; enewa adathimiza kuvera MBUYA. 
Numbers32:13 MBUYA adazhangalira anthu mbaachitisa kutsalakatika m'thando yatchetcha pyaka makumanayi kufikirana mfendu onsene udachita pyokhonda komera MBUYA ule udamala. 
Numbers32:14 Natenepo imwe lero mwapita m'mbuto mwa ababanu, mfendu wachinchino wakudzala na amuna akudawika akusasanyika kudzesa pontho ukali wakugoswa wa MBUYA pana Aisraele." 
Numbers32:15 Ngakhala imwe anthu a madzinza a Rubeni na Gadi munakhonda kumtewera chinchino pano, iye anati aasiye pontho okha anthuwa m'thando yatchetcha muno, natenepo anthu angavungika munafuna dzaona nyatwa ndimwe thangwi ndimwe mwapichitisa.”" 
Numbers32:16 Iwo adenda kalonga na Mose mbati, “Chakutoma titawiriseni kuti timange mathanga a pifuyo pyathu na maluwani a akazathu na anathu." 
Numbers32:17 Tingamala penepo ife tinasasanyika kwenda pabodzi na Aisraele anzathu kamenya nkhondo, pontho tinaatsogolera kufikirana tikaakhazikise m'dziko inafuna iwo kakwata kukhala yawo ene. Ndzidzi uno akazathu na anathu ene anabanga khala muno m'maluwani akutchingwa na mpanda gopesera anthu a m'dziko muno." 
Numbers32:18 Ife sinabwerera tayu kumisa kwathu kufikirana Aisraele anzathu onsene amale kwata dziko idalongwa kuti inakhala yawo ile. 
Numbers32:19 Ife nkhabe kwata chinthu na chibodzi chene pakati pawo kukhundu yeneyo ya Yorodani tayu, thangwi ife tatambira kale pinthu pyathu kukhundu ino yakumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani.”" 
Numbers32:20 Mose adatawira mbati, “Ngakhala pinalonga imwepi munapichitadi, chinchino pano pamaso pa MBUYA sasanyikani kwenda kamenya nkhondo." 
Numbers32:21 Anyakumenya nkhondo anu onsene awambuke Yorodani, tenepo pansi pa utongi wa MBUYA iwo atome kamenya nkhondo na anyamalwathu kufikirana MBUYA aakunde" 
Numbers32:22 mbakwata dzikoyo kukhala ya Aisraele. Mungamala penepo munakwanisa kubwerera pyanu, thangwi mwachitisa kukwana-kwana pinthu pidadumbira imwe kuna MBUYA na kuna Aisraele anzanu. Tenepo MBUYA anatawirisa kuti dziko yakumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodaniyi ikhale yanu." 
Numbers32:23 Mbwenye ngakhala pyadumbira imwepi nee munapichita tayu, ndikukucheuzani kuti munati mumdawire MBUYA. Lekani phophonya pakuchita pinthu penepi gopesera munatchunyuswa thangwi ya pyakudawa pyanu." 
Numbers32:24 Natenepo imwe mangani maluwani anu na mathanga a pifuyo pyanu, kwache chitani malingana na kudumbira kudachita imwe!”" 
Numbers32:25 Amuna a Gadi na Rubeni adalonga mbati, “Anyabasanufe tinati tichite ninga mwatipangira imwe." 
Numbers32:26 Akazathu, anathu na pifuyo pyathu anasalira m'maluwani a muno mu Gileadi." 
Numbers32:27 Mbwenye tonsenefe tasasanyika kwenda kamenya nkhondo pansi pa utongi wa MBUYA. Ife tinati tiwambuke mkulo wa Yorodani kamenya nkhondo ninga montho mwalongera imwe.” 
Numbers32:28 Natenepo Mose adapereka matongero awa kuna Eleazara, Yoswa na akadamu anango a Israele:" 
Numbers32:29 “Ngakhala amuna a Gadi na Rubeni anawambuka Yorodani kamenya nkhondo pansi pa utongi wa MBUYA, pontho ngakhala na chiphedzo chawo imwe munakwanisa kukunda anyamalwanu mbamukwata dzikoyo, apasenimbo nthemba ya Gileadi kukhala yawo ene." 
Numbers32:30 Mbwenye ngakhala iwo hanawambuka Yorodani tayu kamenya nkhondo pabodzi na imwe, iwo atambire khundu yawo m'dziko yonthoyo ya Kanani ninga munafuna kachitira imwe.”" 
Numbers32:31 Amuna a Gadi na Rubeni adatawira mbati, “Anyabasanufe tinachita ninga montho mwatipangira MBUYA." 
Numbers32:32 Pansi pa utongi wache ife tinati tiwambuke kupita m'dziko ya Kanani kamenya nkhondo towera khundu yathu yakuti titambire ikhale kuno kumabulukiro dzuwa a Yorodani.” 
Numbers32:33 Natenepo Mose adapereka kuna madzinza a Gadi, Rubeni na Manase wakumabulukiro dzuwa dziko yonsene ya Mfumu Sihoni wa Aamori na ya Mfumu Ogi wa ku Bashani, dziko yonsene, mizinda na midzi yakuzungulira." 
Numbers32:34 Dzinza ya Gadi adamanga pontho maluwani a Diboni, Ataroti, Aroeri," 
Numbers32:35 Atiroti-Shofani, Yazere, Yogobeha," 
Numbers32:36 Beti-Nimira na Beti-Harani, onsene maluwani akutchingwa na mpanda, pontho akukhala na mathanga." 
Numbers32:37 Dzinza ya Rubeni idamanga pontho maluwani a Heshiboni, Eleale, Kiriataimu," 
Numbers32:38 Nebo, Baala-Meoni (dzina yeneyi idatchandulwa mwinango), na Sibima. Maluwani akhamanga iwo pontho akhaathula madzina achinchino." 
Numbers32:39 Mbumba ya Makiri, mwana Manase adachita nkhondo na nthemba ya Gileadi mbaipokosera kuthamangisa Aamori onsene akhali mwenemo ale." 
Numbers32:40 Natenepo Mose adapereka Gileadi kuna mbumba ya Makiri, tenepo iwo akhakhaladi kweneko." 
Numbers32:41 Yairi, wa dzinza ya Manase, adamenya nkhondo mbapokosera midzi inango mbaithula “Midzi ya Yairi.”" 
Numbers32:42 Noba adamenya nkhondo mbapokosera Kenati na midzi yache ene mbaithula na dzinache Noba. 
Numbers33:1 Uli m'tchindewu ndi nyandandanda wa mbuto zikhamanga Aisraele msasa pikhabuluka iwo m'dziko ya Iguputo m'magulu-magulu pansi pa utongi wa Mose na Aroni. 
Numbers33:2 Na kutongwa na MBUYA, Mose akhalemba madzina a mbuto zonsene zikhadamangapo iwo msasa." 
Numbers33:3 Aisraele adabuluka m'dziko ya Iguputo pansiku yakhumi na chishanu ya mwezi wakutoma wa chaka. Yeneyi ikhali mangwana mwache pidamala Phwando ya Paska yakutoma. Na kuyang'anirwa na MBUYA iwo adabuluka mumzinda wa Ramese pamaso pa Aiguputo onsene," 
Numbers33:4 ale akhaikha anawo autombo m'masiye akhadaphiwa na MBUYA ale. Pakuchita penepi MBUYA adaonesadi kuti iye ngwamphamvu pyakwanga kupiringana milungu ya Iguputo. 
Numbers33:5 Aisraele adabuluka mu Ramese mbakamanga msasa pa Sukoti. 
Numbers33:6 Kubuluka penepo adamanga msasa pa Etamu kunkhomo kwa thando yatchetcha. 
Numbers33:7 Kubuluka penepo adabwerera m'nduli ku Pihahiroti kumabulukiro dzuwa a Baala-Zefoni mbakamanga msasa chifupi na Migidoli. 
Numbers33:8 Iwo adabuluka pa Pihahiroti mbagwanda na pa Nyanza Yakufira kupita m'thando yatchetcha ya Shuri; pidafamba iwo nsiku zitatu adafika pa Mara mbamanga msasa penepo. 
Numbers33:9 Kubuluka penepo adenda ku Elimu, kule kudamanga iwo msasa thangwi kweneko kukhali mphuno za madzi khumi na ziwiri, pontho na miti yamidikhwa makumanomwe." 
Numbers33:10 Iwo adabuluka pa Elimu mbakamanga msasa chifupi na Nyanza Yakufira. 
Numbers33:11 Kubuluka penepo adamanga msasa m'thando yatchetcha ya Sini. 
Numbers33:12 Kubuluka penepo adamanga msasa pa Dofika. 
Numbers33:13 Kubuluka penepo adamanga msasa pa Alushi. 
Numbers33:14 Kubuluka penepo adamanga msasa pa Refidimu, pale pakhali nkhabe madzi akumwa." 
Numbers34:1 MBUYA adapanga Mose 
Numbers34:2 kulonga kuna Aisraele kuti: “Mungapita m'dziko ya Kanani, dziko inafuna ine kukupasani, madire ache anakakhala tenepa." 
Numbers34:3 Madire akumwera anafumuka mpakana kuthando yatchetcha ya Zini nkhwenderatu kumadire a Edomu. Kumabulukiro dzuwa, madire anu anatomera pale padadolomera Nyanza Yakufa kumwera." 
Numbers34:4 Kubuluka kweneko anaenda kumwera kwendera kumakata a Akarabimu mbathimiza kugwanda na mu Zini mpakana kumwera kwa Kadeshi Barinea. Kubuluka kweneko anagonyera kumpoto kumadokero dzuwa kwache kwendera ku Hazari-Adari mbaenderatu ku Azimoni," 
Numbers34:5 kule kunafuna iwo kwendera kuphedi kumadire a Iguputo mbadza kumadolomero a Bara ya Mediterania. 
Numbers34:6 “Madire akumadokero dzuwa anakhala Bara ya Mediterania. 
Numbers34:7 “Madire akumpoto anaenderatu kubulukira ku Bara ya Mediterania mpakana ku Phiri ya Hori," 
Numbers34:8 pontho kubulukira kweneko kwenda kumakata a Hamati. Anathimizirika kwenda ku Zedadi," 
Numbers34:9 pontho ku Zifironi mbakadolomera pa Hazari-Enani. 
Numbers34:10 “Madire akumabulukiro dzuwa anaenderatu kubulukira ku Hazari-Enani mpakana ku Shefamu. 
Numbers34:11 Kubuluka kweneko anaenda ku Haribele, kumabulukiro dzuwa a Aini mpakana kumapiri akumabulukiro dzuwa a m'khundu-khundu mwa nyanza ya Galilea," 
Numbers34:12 kubuluka kweneko anapita m'khundu-khundu mwa mkulo wa Yorodani mpakana ku Nyanza Yakufa. “Madire a makhundu manayi a dziko yanuyo ngenewa.” 
Numbers34:13 Natenepo Mose adalonga kuna Aisraele mbati, “Dziko inafuna imwe kutambira pakuchita ntsango ile yapereka MBUYA kuna madzinza mafemba na Manase wakumadokero dzuwa njeneyi." 
Numbers34:14 Madzinza a Rubeni na Gadi pontho na Manase wakumabulukiro dzuwa atambira kale dziko yawo, ile idagawiwa malingana na mabanjawo," 
Numbers34:15 kumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani kuyang'anisana na Yeriko.” 
Numbers34:16 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Numbers34:17 “Eleazara nyansembe na Yoswa mwana Nuni ndiye anati agawe dzikoyi pakati pa Aisraele. 
Numbers34:18 Ukwate pontho mkadamu mbodzi padzinza yonsene kuti aphedzane nawo kugawa dzikoyi.” 
Numbers34:19 Amuna adasankhula MBUYA kukhala akadamu mbawa: Dzinza ya Yuda: Kalebu mwana Yefune Dzinza ya Simioni: Shelumiele mwana Amihudi Dzinza ya Benjemani: Elidadi mwana Kisiloni Dzinza ya Dani: Buki mwana Yogili Dzinza ya Manase: Haniele mwana Efodi Dzinza ya Eferemu: Kemuele mwana Shifitani Dzinza ya Zebuloni: Elizafani mwana Parinaki Dzinza ya Isakara: Palatiele mwana Azani Dzinza ya Asheri: Ahihudi mwana Shelomi Dzinza ya Nafitali: Pedahele mwana Amihudi. 
Numbers34:20  
Numbers34:21  
Numbers34:22  
Numbers34:23  
Numbers34:24  
Numbers34:25  
Numbers34:26  
Numbers34:27  
Numbers34:28  
Numbers34:29 Amuna enewa mbale adasankhula MBUYA kuti agawe dziko pakati pa Aisraele m'dziko ya Kanani. 
Numbers35:1 Pamaphedi a Moabu kumtunda unango wa mkulo wa Yorodani kuyang'anisana na Yeriko, MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Numbers35:2 “Panga Aisraele kuti kubulukira pa nthemba inafuna iwo dzatambira, athema kupereka mizinda inango kuna Alevi kuti akhalemo, pontho aapase mbuto yampovu kudyesera pifuyo pyawo kuzungulira mizindayo." 
Numbers35:3 Mizinda yeneyi inakhala ya Alevi, pontho iwo anakhala mwenemo. Mbuto yampovuyo inakhala yakudyeserapo pifuyo pyawo." 
Numbers35:4 Kukula kwa mbuto yampovuyi kukhale mathanyo madzana manayi na makumashanu khundu zonsene kubulukira pa mpanda wakuzungulira mizindawo," 
Numbers35:5 towera mbutoyo ikhale sasawa khundu zonsene yakukwana mathanyo madzana mafemba kukhundu ibodzi, mzinda mbukhala pakati na kati." 
Numbers35:6 Imwe mwathema kuapasa pontho Alevi mizinda mitanthatu yakuthawirako ngakhala munthu anapha mwanzache mwasusudewu. Kuthimizira penepo muapase mizinda inango makumanayi na iwiri 
Numbers35:7 pabodzi pene na mbuto zache zampovu zakudyeserapo pifuyo. Mizinda yonsene pabodzi pene idakwana makumanayi na misere. 
Numbers35:8 Konta ya mizinda inapasa imwe Alevi kubulukira m'dzinza yonsene ya Israele yathema kuperekwa malingana na kukula kwa dzinzayo. Dzinza ina mbuto ikulu mukwatembo mizinda mizinji, ina mbuto yakuchepa mukwatembo yakuchepa.”" 
Numbers35:9 MBUYA adapanga Mose 
Numbers35:10 kulonga kuna Aisraele kuti: “Mungawambuka mkulo wa Yorodani mbamupita m'dziko ya Kanani," 
Numbers35:11 mukasankhule mizinda yakuthawirako kuti ngakhala munthu anapha mwanzache mwasusudewu akwanise kuthawirako. 
Numbers35:12 Kweneko iye anapulumuka m'manja mwa abale ache munthu wakufa ule, ale anafuna pyakubwezera. Munthu wakulongwa kuti apha mwanzache aleke phiwa mbadzati tongwa mseru pamaso pa thando." 
Numbers35:13 Sankhulani mizinda mitanthatu," 
Numbers35:14 mitatu ikhale kumabulukiro dzuwa a Yorodani, itatu inangomboyi ikhale m'dziko ya Kanani." 
Numbers35:15 Mizinda yeneyi basache inakhala mizinda yakuthawirako Aisraele, pontho na alendo akukhazikika na okhonda khazikika ene. Munthu onsene anapha mwanzache mwasusudewu anakwanisa kuthawira kumzinda ubodzi wa mizinda yeneyi." 
Numbers35:16 “Ngakhala munthu anamenya mwanzache na chida chasimbi, miyala, penu muti mbampha mwanzacheyo, weneyo apolomola mseru wakupha munthu, natenepo iye athema kuphiwambo." 
Numbers35:17  
Numbers35:18  
Numbers35:19 Mbaleache nyakufayo wakukhala naye chifupi ndiye athema kumpha mphandu apha mbaleacheyo; iye angamgumana athema kumpha. 
Numbers35:20 “Ngakhala munthu anazonda mwanzache mbampha pakuchita kumgwinya pansi penu kumponyera chinthu chinango," 
Numbers35:21 penu pakuchita kummenya na shoko, weneyo apolomola mseru wakupha, natenepo iye athema kuphiwambo. Mbaleache nyakufayo wakukhala naye chifupi ndiye athema kumpha mphanduyo; iye angamgumana athema kumpha." 
Numbers35:22 “Mbwenye ngakhala munthu apha mwanzache okhonda zondana naye mwasusudewu pakuchita kumgwinya pansi, penu kumponyera chinthu chinango chene," 
Numbers35:23 penu ngakhala munthu anaponya mwala mwakukhonda dziwa kuti kunaponyera iyeko kuna munthu mbampha, munthu wakuti nee akhali nyamalwache," 
Numbers35:24 pamiseru ninga yeneyi dzinza ya Israele atonge mseru mwakukomera munthu apha mwanzache ule, nee mbaleache nyakufa tayu, ule ambayesa-yesa kufuna pyakubwezera." 
Numbers35:25 Dzinza ya Israele yathema kupulumusa munthu apha mwanzache ule m'manja mwa mbaleache nyakufa ule, pontho athema kumbwezera kumzinda wakuthawirako kukhadathawira iye kule. Iye akhale kweneko kufikirana Nyansembe Wamkulu pandzidzi wenewo afe." 
Numbers35:26 Ngakhala munthu wakupha mwanzache ule anabuluka mumzinda wakuthawirako kule," 
Numbers35:27 pontho ngakhala mbaleache nyakufa ule anamgumana mbampha kubwezera, nyakubwezerayu hadapolomole tayu." 
Numbers35:28 Munthu onsene wakupha mwanzache athema kukhala mumzinda wakuthawirako kufikirana Nyansembe Wamkulu afe. Kubuluka penepo iye anakwanisa kubwerera kwawo. 
Numbers35:29 Matongero enewa akulonga kuna imwe na pidzukulu pyanu pyene konsene kwene kunakhala imwe. 
Numbers35:30 “Munthu wakulongwa kuti apha mwanzache anakwanisa kukonwa mbaphiwa ngakhala mboni ziwiri zaphatizana kulonga pya kudawa kwa munthuyo; mbwenye bibibi umboni wa munthu mbodzi nkhabe phata basa tayu kumchitisa munthu kukonwa pamseru wakupha munthu. 
Numbers35:31 Mphandu athema kuphiwa. Iye nkhabe kwanisa kuthawa kutchunyuswa tayu pakuchita kupagali mseru wache. 
Numbers35:32 Ngakhala munthu athawira kumzinda wakuthawirako, lekani kumtawirisa kupagali kobiri towera abwerere kwawo Nyansembe Wamkulu mbadzati kufa." 
Numbers35:33 Lekani swipisa dziko inakhala imwe. Upandu umbaswipisa dziko, pontho nkhabe njira inango yakuchitira mwambo wakuchenesa dziko yakufera munthu wakuchita kuphiwa ule, mbwenye kuphambo nyakupha mwanzacheyo." 
Numbers35:34 Lekani swipisa dziko inakhala imwe, thangwi ndine MBUYA pontho ndimbakhala pakati pa Aisraele.”" 
Numbers36:1 Akadamu a mabanja a mbumba ya Gileadi mwana Makiri, pontho mdzukuluache Manase mwana Yosefe adenda kuna Mose na kuna akadamu anango" 
Numbers36:2 mbalonga mbati, “MBUYA adakupangani kuti dzikoyi muigawire Aisraele pakuchita ntsango. Pontho adakupangani kuti mupereke pinthu pikhafuna tambira mbaleathu Zelofehadi kuna anache achikazi." 
Numbers36:3 Kwache dziwani kuti ngakhala iwo anasembwa na amuna a dzinza inango, penepo pinthu pyawo pinakhala pya dzinza inangoyo, pontho pinthu pyonsene pile pikhafuna khala pyathu pinachepa."
