Numbers36:4 Chaka chakubwezera, pandzidzi wakubwezera chinthu chonsene chikhadaguliswa kuna enechiro akutoma, pinthu pya ana achikazi a Zelofehadi pinathimizirwa kuna dzinza yasembwa iwo ile, tenepo pinthu penepi nkhabeve dzakhala pya dzinzathu tayu.”" 
Numbers36:5 Natenepo Mose adapereka mwambo kuna Aisraele wakubulukira kuna MBUYA. Iye adalonga mbati, “Pyalonga dzinza ya Manase mphyakuona," 
Numbers36:6 natenepo MBUYA alonga kuti ana achikazi a Zelofehadi anakwanisa kusembwa na munthu onsene anafuna iwo, kwache akhale wakubulukira m'dzinza mwawo monthomo." 
Numbers36:7 Mfuma ya Aisraele nkhabe dzabuluka m'dzinza inango kwenda kudzinza inango, thangwi Muisraele onsene anakoya mfuma ya m'dzinza mwache idasiyirwa iye na makolo ache." 
Numbers36:8 Mkazi onsene ule anatambira pinthu pyasiyirwa iye na munthu wa dzinza ya Israele athema kusembwa na munthu wa dzinza yonthoyo. Na njira yeneyi Muisraele onsene anakwanisa kukwata mfuma ya makolo ache," 
Numbers36:9 pontho mfuma nkhabe dzabuluka m'dzinza inango kwenda kudzinza inango tayu. Dzinza yonsene inathimiza kukhala na pinthu pyache pyatambira iyo.” 
Numbers36:10 Natenepo Mala, Tiriza, Hogila, Milika na Nowa, ana achikazi a Zelofehadi, adachitadi ninga montho mukhadalongera MBUYA kuna Mose mbasembwa na pidzukulu pya ababawo." 
Numbers36:11  
Numbers36:12 Iwo adasembwa na amuna a m'dzinza mwawo monthomo dzinza ya Manase mwana Yosefe, tenepo pinthu pyawo pidathimiza kukhala m'dzinza ya babawo." 
Numbers36:13 Wenewu ndiye mwambo na matongero adapereka MBUYA kuna Aisraele kudzera muna Mose m'maphedi a Moabu kumtunda unango wa mkulo wa Yorodani kuyang'anisana na Yeriko. 
Deuteronomy1:1 Enewa ndi mafala adalonga Mose kuna Aisraele pikhali iwo m'thando yatchetcha kumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani. Iwo akhali m'phedi ya Yorodani chifupi na Sufu pakati pa luwani ya Parani khundu inango pontho maluwani a Tofele, Labani, Hazeroti, pontho Dizahabi kukhundu inango." 
Deuteronomy1:2 Ngulendo wa nsiku khumi na ibodzi kubuluka kuphiri ya Sinai kwenda ku Kadeshi Barinea kudzera na njira ya kunthemba ya mapiri ya Edomu. 
Deuteronomy1:3 Pansiku yakutoma ya mwezi wakhumi na ubodzi wa pyaka makumanayi pikhadabuluka iwo m'dziko ya Iguputo, Mose adapanga Aisraele pyonsene pikhadampanga MBUYA kuti iye aapange." 
Deuteronomy1:4 Ndzidzi wenewu ukhali ule ukhadakunda MBUYA Sihoni, mfumu wa Aamori, ule akhatonga muluwani ya Heshiboni, pontho Mfumu Ogi wa ku Bashani, ule akhatonga m'maluwani a Ashitaroti na Edrei." 
Deuteronomy1:5 Pikhali anthu kumabulukiro dzuwa a Yorodani m'nthemba ya Moabu, Mose adatoma kulonga pya mwambo na pifunziso pya Mulungu. Iye adalonga mbati:" 
Deuteronomy1:6 “Pikhali ife paphiri ya Sinai MBUYA Mulungu wathu adalonga kuna ife mbati, ‘Imwe mwakhala ndzidzi ukulu ene paphiri pano." 
Deuteronomy1:7 Fulusani msasa mbamuende m'tsogolo. Ndokoni kunthemba ya mapiri ya Aamori na kunthemba zonsene zakuzungulira, kuphedi ya Yorodani, kunthemba ya mapiri, kuthando yatchetcha ya Negebu, na m'khundu-khundu mwa Bara ya Mediterania. Ndokoni kudziko ya Kanani pontho kupiringana mapiri a Lebanoni mpakana kumkulo ukulu wa Yufurate." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Yang'ana, dziko yonseneyi njile idadumbira ine MBUYA kuna makolo anu, Abrahamu, Isake na Yakobo na kuna pidzukulu pyawo. Ndokoni mukakhale m'dzikomo.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy1:9 Mose adalonga kuna anthu mbati, “Ndzidzi ukhathimiza ife kukhala paphiri ya Sinai ndidakupangani kuti, ‘Basa yakutsogolera imwe yandikulira pyakwanga. Ine nkhabe kwanisa kuiphata ndekha ene tayu." 
Deuteronomy1:10 MBUYA Mulungu wanu akuchitisani kukhala akuinjipa pyakwanga ninga nyenyezi za kuthambo. 
Deuteronomy1:11 MBUYA Mulungu wa makolo anu mbakuchitiseni kuthimizirika kachikwi pontho kuchitisa pinthu pyanu kufamba mwadidi ninga mudadumbira iye! 
Deuteronomy1:12 Kwache ine ndekha ene ndinakwanisa tani kuphata basa yakunensa ninga yeneyi yakutonga miseru pakati panu? 
Deuteronomy1:13 Sankhulani amuna anango anzeru, akuvesa pinthu pontho anyakudziwisa pinthu kubulukira m'dzinza yonsene, tenepo ine ndinaapasa basa yakuyang'anira imwepo.’" 
Deuteronomy1:14 Imwembo mudatawira kuti penepi pikhali pyadidi kupichita. 
Deuteronomy1:15 Natenepo ndidakwata amuna anzeru na anyakudziwisa pinthu adasankhula imwe kubulukira m'madzinza mwanu ale mbandiaikha kukhala anyakukuyang'anirani. Anango basawo ikhali kuyang'anira anthu chikwi, anango kuyang'anira anthu dzana, anango kuyang'anira anthu makumashanu, anangombowo khumi. Ndidasankhula pontho mathubu anango m'madzinza onsene." 
Deuteronomy1:16 “Ndzidzi wenewo ndidaapanga kuti, ‘Veserani kuna miseru inalamuka pakati pa anthu anu. Tongani miseru yonsene mwachilungamo podi kwene kuti miseruyo nja pakati pa anthu anu ene basi penu alendo ambakhala pakati panu ale." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Lekani tonga mseru mwakuyang'ana nkhope; tongani munthu onsene sasawa, penu munthuyo akhale pyache ani. Lekani chita mantha na munthu na mbodzi ene, thangwi kutonga kumbachita imweko kumbabulukira kuna Mulungu. Ngakhala mseru wakunensani pyakwanga, mudze nawo kuna ine, inembo ndinautonga.’" 
Deuteronomy1:18 Na ndzidzi onthowo ndidakupasani matongero a pinthu pyonsene pidathema imwe kupichita. 
Deuteronomy1:19 “Ife tidachita pinthu pidatitonga MBUYA Mulungu wathu. Ife tidabuluka paphiri ya Sinai mbatienda na m'thando ikulu yatchetcha, pontho yakugoswa paulendo wathu wakwenda kunthemba ya mapiri ya Aamori. Pidafika ife ku Kadeshi Barinea," 
Deuteronomy1:20 ndidalonga kuti, ‘Chinchino mwafika kunthemba ya mapiri ya Aamori, dziko inatipasa MBUYA Mulungu wathu, Mulungu wa makolo athu. Yang'anani, njeneyi dziko ile. Ndokoni mukaikwate ninga mudatongera iye. Lekani chita mantha penu kutaya mtima.’" 
Deuteronomy1:21  
Deuteronomy1:22 “Mbwenye imwe mudadza kuna ine mbamulonga kuti, ‘Tendeni titume amuna atsogole kuti akazonde dzikoyo, towera akwanise kutipanga njira yadidiletu yakuti tiende nayo, pontho mizinda ili mwenemo njakutani.’" 
Deuteronomy1:23 “Yeneyo idaoneka ninga nzeru yadidi, tenepo ndidasankhula amuna khumi na awiri, munthu mbodzi kubulukira m'dzinza yonsene." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Iwo adenda m'nthemba ya mapiri mpakana kuphedi ya Eshikolo mbakaiona. 
Deuteronomy1:25 Iwo adatidzesera nsapo zikhadagumana iwo, mbalonga kuti dziko ikhatipasa MBUYA Mulungu wathu ikhali ya mataka akubalisa pinthu pyakwanga." 
Deuteronomy1:26 “Kwache imwe mudapandukira matongero a MBUYA Mulungu wanu, tenepo imwe mudakhonda kupita m'dzikomo." 
Deuteronomy1:27 Imwe mudadungunya kuna unango na mwanzache m'makumbi mwanu kuti, ‘MBUYA ambatizonda. Iye adatibulusa m'dziko ya Iguputo kufuna kutipereka m'manja mwa Aamori, towera atiphe." 
Deuteronomy1:28 Thangwi yache njanji kuti tiende kweneko? Ife tikuchita mantha. Amuna adatuma ife atipanga kuti anthu a kweneko ngamphamvu pyakwanga pontho akulapha kupiringana ife pano, pontho kuti iwo ambakhala m'mizinda ya kuzungulirwa na mafufu akufika kuthambo. Iwo adaona anyakujintcha kweneko!’" 
Deuteronomy1:29 “Mbwenye ndidalonga kuti, ‘Lekani chita mantha na anthu enewo." 
Deuteronomy1:30 MBUYA Mulungu wanu anakutsogolerani, pontho iye anakumenyerani nkhondo, ninga mudamuonera imwe akupichita m'dziko ya Iguputo," 
Deuteronomy1:31 pontho m'thando yatchetcha. Imwe mudaona mule mudakuthukulirani iye mwadidi m'njira yonsene kufikirana mbuto ino ninga mbamudachita baba kuthukula mwanache!’ 
Deuteronomy1:32 Kwache podi kwene kuti ine ndidalonga, imwe mudathimiza basi kukhonda nyindira MBUYA," 
Deuteronomy1:33 podi kwene kuti iye adenda patsogolo panu ndzidzi onsene kukugumanirani mbuto kuti mumangepo msasa. Kufuna kukuonesani njira, iye adapita patsogolo panu na mzati wa moto na mosiku pontho mzati wa makole na masikati." 
Deuteronomy1:34 “MBUYA adava kudungunya kwanu mbazhangali natenepo adadumbira mbati," 
Deuteronomy1:35 ‘Nee mbodzi wa imwe kubulukira mfendu wakuipawu anapita m'dziko ya mataka akubalisa pinthu idadumbira ine kuna makolo anu ile. 
Deuteronomy1:36 Mbwenye Kalebu mwana wamamuna wa Yefune ene basi ndiye anaipita. Iye athimiza kukhala wakukhulupirika kuna ine, tenepo ine ndinampasa iye na pidzukulu pyache dziko idenda iye kazonda ile.’" 
Deuteronomy1:37 Na thangwi ya imwepo MBUYA adandizhangalira mbalonga mbati, ‘Iwe ene, Mose, nkhabe dzapita tayu m'dzikoyi." 
Deuteronomy1:38 Kwache wangisa mtima nyakukuphedzera Yoswa mwana Nuni. Iye anatsogolera Aisraele kakwata dziko yeneyi.’ 
Deuteronomy1:39 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna ife tonsene mbati, ‘Ananu, ale mbanang'ono kudziwa chadidi na chakuipa anapita dzikoyi, ana adalonga imwe kuti anaphatwa na anyamalwanu ale. Ine ndinaipereka dzikoyo kuna iwo, tenepo iwo anaikwata kukhala yawo ene." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Mbwenye kulonga pya imwe anthu, zungunukani mbamubwerere m'thando yatchetcha na njira yakwendera ku Nyanza Yakufira.’" 
Deuteronomy1:41 “Imwe mudatawira kuti, ‘Mose ife tadawira MBUYA. Mbwenye chinchino tinaenda kamenya nkhondo ninga mudatongera MBUYA Mulungu wathu.’ Tenepo munthu onsene asasanyike kamenya nkhondo, kunyerezera kuti pinakhala pyakukhonda nensa kupokosera dziko ya m'mapiri." 
Deuteronomy1:42 “Mbwenye MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, ‘Acheuze kuti aleke kasosa, thangwi ine nkhabe dzakhala nawo tayu, tenepo anyamalwa anaakunda.’" 
Deuteronomy1:43 Ine ndidakupangani pinthu pikhadalonga MBUYA, kwache imwe hamudapiikhe konta tayu. Imwe mudampandukira tenepo na kupithemba kwanu, mudenda kudziko ya m'mapiri." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Tenepo Aamori akhakhala m'mapiri enewo ale, adakugomokerani ninga nyuchi kudza kuna imwe. Iwo adakuthamangisani mpakana kuluwani ya Horima, pontho adakukundani kweneko kudziko ya m'mapiri ya Edomu." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Natenepo imwe mudalira kuna MBUYA kuti akuphedzeni, kwache iye hadakuvesereni penu kupiikha konta tayu." 
Deuteronomy1:46 “Tenepo tidakhala pa Kadeshi ndzidzi ukulu ene. 
Deuteronomy2:1 “Pakumalisira pache, tidazungunuka mbatienda kuthando yatchetcha na njira yakwendera ku Nyanza Yakufira ninga mukhadatipangira MBUYA, tenepo tidamala ndzidzi ukulu ene kutsalakatika m'nthemba ya mapiri ya Edomu." 
Deuteronomy2:2 “Tenepo MBUYA adatipanga," 
Deuteronomy2:3 kuti tikhadamala ndzidzi ukulu ene na kutsalakatika m'mapiri enewo pontho kuti tidathema kwenda kumpoto. 
Deuteronomy2:4 Iye adandipanga kuti ndikupaseni matongero awa: ‘Imwe mwasala chifupi kugwanda na m'nthemba ya mapiri ya Edomu, m'nthemba ya abale anu, pidzukulu pya Esau. Iwo anachita namwe mantha," 
Deuteronomy2:5 kwache lekani chita nawo nkhondo, thangwi ine sinakupasani na thanyo ene ya mbuto yawo tayu. Ine ndapereka Edomu kuna pidzukulu pya Esau." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Imwe munakwanisa kugula phoso na madzi kuna iwo.’ 
Deuteronomy2:7 “Kumbukani mule mwakutsanzayisirani MBUYA Mulungu wanu papyonsene pyachita imwe. Iye akuyang'anirani mwadidi ndzidzi ukhatsalakatika imwe m'thando ikulu yatchetchayi. Iye akhala namwe pyaka makumanayi, pontho pyonsene pikhasowa imwe mukhali napyo." 
Deuteronomy2:8 “Tenepo tidathimiza kwenda m'tsogolo kugwanda na muluwani ya Seiri mukhakhala abale athu, pidzukulu pya Esau, mbatizungunuka kusiya njira yakwendera ku Nyanza ya Munyu kubulukira ku Elati na Ezioni-Geberi kwenda ku Moabu." 
Deuteronomy2:9 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, ‘Lekani nensa anthu a ku Moabu penu kuchita nawo nkhondo. Ine ndaapasa mzinda wa Ari, pontho ine sinakupasani khundu na ibodzi ene ya dziko yawoyo tayu.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy2:10 Mtundu wa kujintcha wakuthulwa Aemimu ukhakhala ku Ari. Onsene akhali akulapha ninga Aanakimu, mtundu unango wa anthu akujintcha." 
Deuteronomy2:11 Ninga Aanakimu, iwo adadziwika pontho na dzina yakuti Arefaimu; mbwenye anthu a ku Moabu akhaathula Aemimu." 
Deuteronomy2:12 Ahori akhakhala ku Edomu, kwache pidzukulu pya Esau adaathamangisa, adavunga dzinzawo mbakhazikika okha ene kweneko ninga mudachitira Aisraele kuthamangisa anyamalwawo m'dziko idaapasa MBUYA ile." 
Deuteronomy2:13 Kubuluka penepo tidawambuka mkhwawa wa Zeredi ninga mukhadatipangira MBUYA kuti tichite. 
Deuteronomy2:14 Penepi pidachitika pyaka makumatatu na pisere pidabuluka ife ku Kadeshi Barinea. Anyakumenya nkhondo onsene a mfendu wenewo adamala kufa ninga mudapilongera MBUYA. 
Deuteronomy2:15 MBUYA adathimiza kuapokanya kufikirana adamala kuavunga onsene. 
Deuteronomy2:16 “Pidamala iwo onsene kufa," 
Deuteronomy2:17 MBUYA adalonga kuna ife mbati," 
Deuteronomy2:18 ‘Lero imwe mwathema kugwanda na m'nthemba ya Moabu na njira yakwendera ku Ari. 
Deuteronomy2:19 Natenepo imwe munakhala chifupi na dziko ya Aamoni, pidzukulu pya Loti. Lekani kuanensa penu kuchita nawo nkhondo, thangwi sinakupasani mbuto na ibodzi ene ya dziko yawo yaapasa ine ile tayu.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy2:20 Nthemba yeneyi ikudziwika pontho na dzina yakuti dziko ya Arefaimu, dzinza ya anthu akukhala kweneko ale; Aamoni akhaathula na dzina yakuti Azamzumimu." 
Deuteronomy2:21 Iwo akhali anthu akulapha ninga Aanakimu. Iwo akhali azinji pyakwanga pontho akhali mtundu wamphamvu. Kwache MBUYA adaavunga, towera Aamoni akwate dziko yawo mbakhazikikamo." 
Deuteronomy2:22 MBUYA adachitira chibodzi-bodzi Aedomu, pidzukulu pya Esau, ambakhala m'nthemba ya mapiri ya Edomu ale. Iye adavunga Ahori, towera Aedomu akwate dziko yawo mbakhazikikamo, m'dziko inathimiza iwo kukhala ile." 
Deuteronomy2:23 Mbwenye kulonga pya Aavi adakhazikika m'midzi mpakana ku Gaza ale, Akrete akubulukira kuntchuwa ya Krete adaavunga mbakhazikika m'mbuto zawo." 
Deuteronomy2:24 “Pidamala ife kugwanda na m'nthemba ya Moabu, MBUYA adalonga kuna ife mbati, ‘Chinchino utomeni ulendo wakuwambuka mkulo wa Arinoni. Yang'anani, ndikuikha m'manja mwanu Mfumu Sihoni wa ku Heshiboni pabodzi pene na dziko yache. Menyani naye nkhondo mbamukwate dziko yacheyo." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Kutomera lero kwenda m'tsogolo ndinachitisa anthu onsene konsene kwene kukugopani. Munthu onsene anatetemera na mantha angathula dzinanu.’ 
Deuteronomy2:26 “Kubuluka penepo ine ndidatuma anyamphangwa kubulukira kuthando yatchetcha ya Kedemoti kwenda kuna Mfumu Sihoni wa ku Heshiboni na mafala a mtendere akuti: 
Deuteronomy2:27 ‘Titawiriseni kugwanda na m'dziko mwanu muno. Ife tinaenda pyathu na njira mbatikhonda na kubauka kwene kumadyo penu kumabzere. 
Deuteronomy2:28 Ife tinakupagalini phoso na madzi pinafuna ife phatisa basa. Chinafuna ife nkhugwanda kwene na m'dziko mwanu muno basi," 
Deuteronomy2:29 kufikirana tiwambuke mkulo wa Yorodani kwenda kudziko yatipasa MBUYA Mulungu wathu. Pidzukulu pya Esau pimbakhala mu Edomu pile, na Amoabu ambakhala mu Ari ale, adatitawirisa kugwanda na m'nthemba mwawo.’" 
Deuteronomy2:30 “Mbwenye Mfumu Sihoni hadatitawirise tayu kugwanda na m'dziko mwache. MBUYA Mulungu wanu akhadamchitisa kuumisa mtimache, pontho kukhala nyakupandukira, towera tikwanise kumkunda mbatikwata nthembache, inathimiza ife kukhalamo." 
Deuteronomy2:31 “Kubuluka penepo MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, ‘Yang'ana, ndachitisa Mfumu Sihoni na dziko yache ene kukhala yakusowa mphamvu pamaso panu; tenepo ikwateni dzikoyo kuti ikhale yanu ene.’" 
Deuteronomy2:32 Sihoni adabuluka na amunache onsene dzachita nafe nkhondo chifupi na luwani ya Yahazi," 
Deuteronomy2:33 kwache MBUYA Mulungu wathu adamuikha m'manja mwathu mbatimpha, anache achimuna na amunache onsene." 
Deuteronomy2:34 Na ndzidzi onthowo tidakwata maluwani ache onsene mbatipha munthu onsene, amuna, akazi na ana ene. Nkhabe munthu adasiya ife na moyo tayu." 
Deuteronomy2:35 Tidakwata pifuyo pyawo na pyonsene pikhali m'maluwani mwawomo. 
Deuteronomy2:36 MBUYA Mulungu wathu adatitawirisa kupokosera maluwani onsene kutomera ku Aroeri, nkhomole ya phedi ya Arinoni, na mzinda wa pakati pa phediyo, kwenderatu ku Gileadi. Nkhabe luwani ikhali na mafufu akuwanga pyakwanga kuna ife tayu." 
Deuteronomy2:37 Kwache hatidende tayu chifupi na nthemba ya Aamoni penu m'magombe a mkulo wa Yaboki penu kumaluwani a m'nthemba ya mapiri penu na mbuto na ibodzi ene idatipanga MBUYA kuti tileke kwendako. 
Deuteronomy3:1 “Kubuluka penepo, tidathimiza kwenda kumpoto kunthemba ya Bashani, tenepo Mfumu Ogi adabuluka na amunache onsene dzachita nafe nkhondo chifupi na luwani ya Edrei." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Mbwenye MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, ‘Leka chita naye mantha. Ndinati ndimpereke iye na amunache na dziko yache yonsene kuna imwe. Chitani sasawa kuna iye ninga pidachita imwe kuna Sihoni mfumu wa Aamori akhatonga ku Heshiboni ule.’" 
Deuteronomy3:3 “Natenepo MBUYA adaikha pontho Mfumu Ogi na anthu ache ene m'manja mwathu, tenepo ife tidaacheka onsene." 
Deuteronomy3:4 Na ndzidzi onthowo tidapokosera maluwani ache onsene. Pakhali nkhabe mzinda na ubodzi ene udasiya ife okhonda kuukwata tayu. Pyonsene pidapokosera ife ndi maluwani makumatanthatu; nthemba yonsene ya Arigobu, kukhatonga Mfumu Ogi wa ku Bashani ule." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Maluwani onsenewa adatchingwa mwadidi na mipanda yakulapha yakukhala na misuwo na mphinga zasimbi, pontho mukhali midzi mizinji yakusowa mipanda." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Tidavunga maluwani onsene mbatipha amuna onsene, akazi na ana ene ninga montho mudachitira ife m'maluwani a Mfumu Sihoni wa ku Heshiboni." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Tidakwata pifuyo pyonsene mbatipokosera pinthu pyonsene pya m'maluwanimo. 
Deuteronomy3:8 “Pandzidzi wenewo tidapokosera kuna mafumu mawiri a Aamori dziko yakumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani, kubulukira kumkulo wa Arinoni mpakana kuphiri ya Herimoni." 
Deuteronomy3:9 Phiri ya Herimoni imbachemerwa na Asidoni na dzina yakuti Sirioni, mbwenye Aamori ambaichemera Seniri." 
Deuteronomy3:10 Ife tidapokosera nthemba yonsene ya Mfumu Ogi wa ku Bashani: mizinda yonsene ya pamapiri, nthemba ya Gileadi na za Bashani, mpakana kumabulukiro dzuwa kumaluwani a Saleka na Edrei.”" 
Deuteronomy3:11 Mfumu Ogi akhali wakumalisira wa mafumu a Arefaimu. Baulu yache yakusasanywa na miyala ulaphiache ukhali makhono manayi; umimba ukhali ninga makhono mawiri malingana na mdida ukhaphatiswa basa ndzidzi wenewo. Baulu ilipo basi na lero mu Raba mzinda wa Aamoni. 
Deuteronomy3:12 “Pidapokosera ife dzikoyo ndidapereka kuna madzinza a Rubeni na Gadi nthemba yakumpoto kwa luwani ya Aroeri chifupi na mkulo wa Arinoni pontho khundu ya nthemba ya mapiri ya Gileadi pabodzi pene na maluwani ache. 
Deuteronomy3:13 Manase wakumabulukiro dzuwa ndidaipasa mbuto yonsene yakusalira ya Gileadi, pontho na Bashani onsene, kukhatonga Ogi kule. Yeneyi ndi nthemba yonsene ya Arigobu.” Bashani kale ikhadziwika na dzina ya dziko ya Arefaimu." 
Deuteronomy3:14 Yairi wa dzinza ya Manase adakwata nthemba yonsene ya Arigobu, yeneyi ndi, Bashani, mpakana kumadire a Geshuri na Maaka. Midziyo adaithula na dzinache, tenepo iyo ikhadziwika basi ninga ya Yairi." 
Deuteronomy3:15 “Ndidapereka Gileadi kuna mbumba ya Makiri wa dzinza ya Manase. 
Deuteronomy3:16 Kuna madzinza a Rubeni na Gadi ndidapereka nthemba kubulukira ku Gileadi kwenda kumkulo wa Arinoni. Kati na kati ya mkulo ndiye ikhali madire awo akumwera, pontho madire awo akumpoto akhali mkulo wa Yaboki. Khundu idachita madire na Aamoni." 
Deuteronomy3:17 Kumadokero dzuwa nthembawo idenda mpakana kumkulo wa Yorodani, kubulukira kunyanza ya Galilea kumpoto kutchithira ku Nyanza ya Munyu kumwera, pontho m'tchinde mwa phiri ya Pisiga kumabulukiro dzuwa." 
Deuteronomy3:18 “Na ndzidzi onthowo, ine ndidaapasa matongero awa: MBUYA Mulungu wathu akupasani dzikoyi yakumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani kuti ikhale yanu ene. Chinchino sasanyani amunanu ankhondo mbuatumize kuwambuka mkulo wa Yorodani patsogolo pa madzinza anango a Israele kuaphedza kukwata dzikoyo." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Akazanu, ananu na pifuyo pyanu pyene basi (ndikupidziwa kuti muna pifuyo pizinji) pinasalira m'nduli m'maluwani akupasani ine ale." 
Deuteronomy3:20 Phedzani Aisraele anzanu kufikirana iwo akwata dziko inaapasa MBUYA kumadokero dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani, pontho kufikirana MBUYA aatawirise kukhala kweneko na mtendere, ninga mwapichitira iye kale kuno kuna imwepo. Kubuluka penepo munakwanisa kubwerera kudziko yakupasani ineyi." 
Deuteronomy3:21 “Tenepo ndidampanga Yoswa kuti: ‘Iwe waona pyonsene pyachita MBUYA Mulungu wako kuna mafumu awiri ale, Sihoni na Ogi: tenepo iye anachita chibodzi-bodzi kuna mafumu onsene anaendera imwe ale." 
Deuteronomy3:22 Lekani chita nawo mantha, thangwi MBUYA Mulungu wanu akukumenyerani nkhondo.’" 
Deuteronomy3:23 “Pandzidzi wenewo ndidapemphera pikulu pene kuti," 
Deuteronomy3:24 ‘MBUYA Mulungu ndikupidziwa imwe mwandionesa kwene nthomatoma ya pinthu pikulu pontho pyakudodomesa pifuna imwe dzachita. Nkhabe mulungu unango kudzulu penu padziko yapansi anakwanisa kuchita pinthu pyamphamvu ninga pyachita imwepi tayu! 
Deuteronomy3:25 Nditawiriseni kuwambuka kwene mkulo wa Yorodani MBUYA, mbandiona dziko ya mataka akubalisa pinthu khundu inangoyo, dziko yakubalika ya mapiri, pontho na mapiri a Lebanoni.’" 
Deuteronomy3:26 “Mbwenye na thangwi ya imwe MBUYA adandizhangalira mbakhonda kundivesera. M'mbuto mwache, iye adalonga mbati, ‘Pyakwana! Leka longave pontho penepi!" 
Deuteronomy3:27 Ndoko kuphiri yakusongoka ya Pisiga mbukayang'ane kumpoto na kumwera, kumabulukiro dzuwa na kumadokero dzuwa. Kayang'ane mwadidi pinthu pinakaona iwe, thangwi iwe hunawambuka Yorodani tayu." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Mpase Yoswa matongero ache. Muwangise mtima, thangwi ndiye anafuna dzatsogolera anthu kuwambuka mkulo kakwata dziko inaona imweyo.’" 
Deuteronomy3:29 “Tenepo ife tidasalira paphedi yakuyang'anisana na luwani ya Beti-Peori.” 
Deuteronomy4:1 Tenepo Mose adalonga kuna anthu mbati, “Verani matongero onsene anakufunzisani ine, tenepo imwe munakhala na moyo mbamupokosera dziko inakupasani MBUYA Mulungu wa makolo anuyi." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Lekani thimizira chinthu na chibodzi chene pana mwambo wakupasani inewu, pontho lekani kubulusapo chinthu na chibodzi chene. Verani matongero a MBUYA Mulungu wanu akupasani inewa." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Imwe ene mudaona pinthu pikulu pidachita MBUYA pa Baala-Peori. Iye adavunga munthu onsene akhapembedza Baala penepo," 
Deuteronomy4:4 mbwenye anango a imwe ale akhali akukhulupirika kuna MBUYA Mulungu wanu ana moyo na lero. 
Deuteronomy4:5 “Yang'anani, ine ndakufunzisani matongero onsene ninga montho mudandipangirambo MBUYA Mulungu wanga kuti ndipichite. Avereni matongerowo m'dziko ina imwe chifupi kuikwata na kukhalamoyi." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Verani mwambowu mwakukhulupirika, tenepo penepi pinaonesa anthu a madzinza anango kuti imwe muna nzeru pyakwanga. Iwo angava pya matongero onsenewa, analonga mbati, ‘Dzinza ikuluyi njanzeru, pontho yakuvesa pinthu pyakwanga!’" 
Deuteronomy4:7 “Nkhabe dzinza inango, podi ikule pyayo tani, ina mulungu ule ali chifupi pyakwanga ndzidzi unamfuna iwo ninga MBUYA Mulungu wathu kuna ife. Iye ambatitawira ndzidzi onsene unamchemera ife kuti atiphedzewo." 
Deuteronomy4:8 Nkhabe dzinza inango tayu, podi ikule pyayo tani, ina mwambo wakulungama pyakwanga ninga mwambo wakupasani ine lerowu." 
Deuteronomy4:9 Khalani m'maso! Onesesani ndzidzi onsene unakhala imwe na moyo kuti muleke duwalira pinthu pyaona imwe na maso anu. Pangani ananu na pidzukulu pyanu 
Deuteronomy4:10 pya nsiku idaimira imwe pamaso pa MBUYA Mulungu wanu paphiri ya Sinai, pidalonga iye kuna ine mbati, ‘Gumanyisa anthu. Ine ndinafuna ave pinafuna ine kulonga, towera adziwe kundivera ndzidzi onsene unakhala iwo na moyo pontho kuti iwo afunzisembo anawo kuchita chibodzi-bodzi.’" 
Deuteronomy4:11 “Pangani ananu pya mule mudendera imwe kaimira m'tchinde mwa phiri idagudumirwa na moto wakuyerima, pontho na mdima wakugoswa wa makole akuswipa akufika mpakana kuthambo." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Apangeni mudalongera MBUYA kuna imwe kubulukira m'moto mule, pontho na mule mudamvera imwe akulonga, kwache mbamukhonda kumuona na pang'ono pene tayu." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Iye adakupangani pinthu pyathema imwe kuchita kuti mukoye chiverano chidasasanya iye na imwe. Imwe mwathema kuvera Matongero Khumi, adalemba iye pamiyala miwiri ile." 
Deuteronomy4:14 MBUYA adandipanga kuti ndikufunziseni matongero athema imwe kuavera m'dziko ina imwe chifupi kuikwata, pontho na kukhalamoyi." 
Deuteronomy4:15 “Pidalonga MBUYA kuna imwe m'moto paphiri ya Sinai, imwe nee mudamuona na pang'ono pene tayu. Na thangwi ya kukufunirani udidi, onesesani" 
Deuteronomy4:16 kuti nee mukudawa tayu pakupisasanyira mwekha ene mfanikizo wa mtundu onsene, penu mamuna penu mkazi," 
Deuteronomy4:17 nyama penu mbalame," 
Deuteronomy4:18 pyakukambadza penu nsomba. 
Deuteronomy4:19 Lekani yeswa pakupembedza na kutumikira pinthu pinaona imwe kuthambopi, penu dzuwa, mwezi na nyenyezi. MBUYA Mulungu wanu apereka penepi kuna madzinza anango onsene kuti apipembedze." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Mbwenye imwe ndimwe anthu adaombola iye kudziko ya Iguputo, dzenje yakuyerima moto ile. Iye adakubulusani mbakuchitisani kukhala anthu ache ninga muna imwe leromu." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Na thangwi ya imwe MBUYA Mulungu wanu adandizhangalira mbadumbira kuti ine sinawambuka mkulo wa Yorodani tayu kupita m'dziko ya mataka akubalisa pinthu inakupasani iyeyi. 
Deuteronomy4:22 Ine ndinati ndife m'dziko muno mbandikhonda kuwambuka mkulo, mbwenye imwe muli chifupi kuwambuka mkulo kakwata dziko ya mataka akubalisa pinthu." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Onesesani kuti muleke duwalira chiverano chidasasanya MBUYA Mulungu wanu na imwe. Verani matongero ache nee kupisasanyira mwekha ene mifanikizo ya mtundu onsene tayu kuti muipembedze," 
Deuteronomy4:24 thangwi MBUYA Mulungu wanu akhala ninga malulume a moto; iye ngwantchanje. 
Deuteronomy4:25 “Podi kwene kuti imwe mwakhala ndzidzi ukulu ene, pontho kuti muna ana na pidzukulu, lekani kudawa pakupisasanyira mfanikizo wa mtundu onsene kuti muupembedze. Penepi mphyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA, tenepo pinamchitisa kuzhangali." 
Deuteronomy4:26 Kudzulu na dziko yapansi ndi mboni yanga wakupokanyisana namwe lero kuti ngakhala imwe munakhonda kundivera chinchino pano munamala vungika. Imwe nkhabe dzakhala na moyo wakulapha tayu m'dziko ili kumtunda unango wa mkulo wa Yorodani, pontho ina imwe chifupi kuikwata. Imwe munavungwa monsene mwene." 
Deuteronomy4:27 MBUYA anakubalalisani pakati pa madzinza anango, kule kunafuna dzasalira na moyo anthu akuchepa a imwe." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Kweneko munatumikira milungu yakusasanywa na manja a anthu, milungu yamiti na yamiyala, ile nkhabe kwanisa kuona penu kuva, kudya penu kununkhiza tayu." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Kweneko munasaka-saka MBUYA Mulungu wanu, tenepo ngakhala imwe munamsaka-saka na mtimanu onsene, munamgumana." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Ndzidzi unaona imwe nyatwa, pontho pinthu pyonsenepi pingakuchitikirani, penepo pakumalisira pache imwe munati muzungunukire kuna MBUYA mbamumvera." 
Deuteronomy4:31 Iye ndi Mulungu wa nsisi. Iye nkhabe dzakukhondani penu kukuvungani tayu, pontho iye nkhabe dzaduwalira chiverano chidasasanya iye mwenechiro na makolo anu chile tayu." 
Deuteronomy4:32 “Chinchino vunza-vunzani pya kale, ndzidzi ule mudzati balwa, m'nduliletu ndzidzi udalenga Mulungu munthu padziko yapansi ule. Vunzani pya dziko yonsene yapansi. Ayi chipo chinthu chikulu ninga chenechi chidatoma chachitikapo? Ayi chipo munthu adatoma kuva pinthu ninga penepi?" 
Deuteronomy4:33 Ayi anthu anango adakhalapo na moyo pidava iwo Mulungu akulonga kuna iwo kubulukira m'moto ninga mwachitira imwemu? 
Deuteronomy4:34 Ayi pana mulungu unango ule adawanga mtima kwenda kakwata anthu kubulukira kuna dzinza inango mbaachitisa kukhala anthu ache, ninga pidakuchitirani MBUYA Mulungu wanu m'dziko ya Iguputo? Pamaso panu iye adaphatisa basa mphamvu zache zikulu; iye adagwisa miliri na nkhondo, adachita pidzindikiro na pyakudodomesa, mbachitisa pinthu pyakugoswa kuchitika." 
Deuteronomy4:35 MBUYA akuonesani penepi, kutsikimizira kuti iye ene basi ndi Mulungu, pontho kuti nkhabeve unango tayu." 
Deuteronomy4:36 Iye adakutawirisani kuva falache kubulukira kudzulu towera akufunziseni; pontho padziko yapansi pano adakutawirisani kuona moto ukulu mbalonga kuna imwe kubulukira m'motomo. 
Deuteronomy4:37 Na thangwi yakuti iye adaafuna makolo anu, iye adakusankhulani, tenepo na mphamvu zache zikulu iye adakubulusani m'dziko ya Iguputo." 
Deuteronomy4:38 Pikhaenda imwe, iye adathamangisa madzinza akulu-akulu, pontho amphamvu kupiringana imwepo, towera akudzeseni mwenemo mbakupasani dziko yawoyo, dziko ile njanu na lero." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Tenepo lero kumbukani mbamuleka kuduwalira: MBUYA ndi Mulungu kudzulu na padziko yapansi ene. Nkhabeve unango tayu. 
Deuteronomy4:40 Verani mwambo onsene wakupasani ine lerowu, tenepo pyonsene pinakufambirani mwadidi imwe na pidzukulu pyanu pene. Imwe munathimiza kukhala na moyo m'dziko inakupasani MBUYA Mulungu wanu kukhala yanu ene kwenda na kwendayi.”" 
Deuteronomy4:41 Tenepo Mose adapambula mizinda mitatu kumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani," 
Deuteronomy4:42 kule mbakudakwanisa munthu kuthawirako kuti akakhale pakupata ngakhala adapha munthu unango mwasusudewu, munthu wakuti si nyamalwache tayu. Iye mbadakwanisa kuthawira ku ubodzi mwa mizinda yeneyi mbakhonda phiwa." 
Deuteronomy4:43 Kudzinza ya Rubeni kukhali mzinda wa Bezeri m'thando yatchetcha ya pamapiri, kudzinza ya Gadi kukhali mzinda wa Ramoti m'nthemba ya Gileadi; pontho kudzinza ya Manase kukhali mzinda wa Golani m'nthemba ya Bashani." 
Deuteronomy4:44 Ufu ndi mwambo wa Mose udapasa iye Aisraele, pontho na pifunziso pene." 
Deuteronomy4:45 Ndzidzi wenewu ngule udabuluka iwo m'dziko ya Iguputo mbakhala paphedi kumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani, kuyang'anisana na luwani ya Beti-Peori pikhaapasa iye mwambo wenewu. Yeneyo ikhali nthemba ya Mfumu Sihoni wa Aamori, akhadatonga kuluwani ya Heshiboni ule. Mose na Aisraele adamkunda ndzidzi udabuluka iwo m'dziko ya Iguputo ule." 
Deuteronomy4:46  
Deuteronomy4:47 Iwo adakwata dziko yache na dziko ya Mfumu Ogi wa ku Bashani, mfumu unango wa Aamori akhakhala kumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani ule." 
Deuteronomy4:48 Dziko yeneyi idafumuka mpakana kuphiri ya Sirioni, yeneyi ndi, phiri ya Herimoni, kubulukira kuluwani ya Aroeri pankhomole ya mkulo wa Arinoni." 
Deuteronomy4:49 Iyo idathimiza pontho nthemba yonsene yakumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani kwenderatu ku Nyanza Yakufa, pontho kumabulukiro dzuwa a Nyanza Yakufa m'tchinde mwa phiri ya Pisiga." 
Deuteronomy5:1 Mose adachemera pabodzi Aisraele onsene mbalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Aisraele anzanga ngaveserani mwambo wa Mulungu unakupasani ine lerowu. Ufunzeni pontho onesesani kuti mukuuvera." 
Deuteronomy5:2 Paphiri ya Sinai MBUYA Mulungu adasasanya chiverano," 
Deuteronomy5:3 nee na makolo anu okha tayu mbwenye na ife tonsene tina moyo lerofe. 
Deuteronomy5:4 Paphiripo MBUYA adalonga kuna imwe maso na maso kubulukira m'moto. 
Deuteronomy5:5 Ine ndidaimira pakati pa imwe na MBUYA ndzidzi wenewo kukupangani pikhalonga iye, thangwi imwe mukhachita mantha na moto, pontho nee mbamudenda paphiripo tayu. “MBUYA adalonga mbati," 
Deuteronomy5:6 ‘Ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wako, ule adakubulusa m'dziko ya Iguputo, kukhali iwe paubitchu kule." 
Deuteronomy5:7 “‘Leka pembedza milungu inango, mbwenye ine ene basi." 
Deuteronomy5:8 “‘Leka kupisasanyira wekha ene mfanikizo wa chinthu chonsene cha kudzulu penu wa padziko yapansi penu m'madzi penu pansi pa mataka. 
Deuteronomy5:9 Leka lambira mifanikizo penu kuipembedza, thangwi ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wako pontho ndine wantchanje. Ine ndimbatchunyusa anthu ambandizonda ale pontho pidzukulu pyawo mpakana mfendu wachitatu na chinayi." 
Deuteronomy5:10 Mbwenye ndimbaonesa kuafuna kwanga kokhonda mala kuna pikwi-pikwi pya mifendu ya anthu ambandifuna mbavera mwambo wanga ale. 
Deuteronomy5:11 “‘Leka thula dzinanga papezi, thangwi ine, MBUYA Mulungu wako, ndinatchunyusa munthu onsene anaphatisa basa dzinanga papezi." 
Deuteronomy5:12 “‘Koya Nsiku Yakupuma, kuichitisa kukhala yakupambulika ninga mwakutongera ine, MBUYA Mulungu wako." 
Deuteronomy5:13 Pana nsiku zitanthatu zinakwanisa iwe kuphata mabasako," 
Deuteronomy5:14 mbwenye nsiku yachinomwe ndi Nsiku Yakupuma yakupambulika kuna ine. Pansiku yeneyo nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene athema kuphata basa tayu, nee iwe penu anako, nee mabitchu ako, penu pifuyo pyako, penu mlendo ali m'dziko mwakomo tayu. Mabitchu ako athemambo kupuma ninga mumbachitira iwe." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Kumbuka kuti iwe ukhalimbo bitchu m'dziko ya Iguputo, pontho ine MBUYA Mulungu wako ndidakupulumusa na mphamvu zanga zikulu. Ndi thangwi yache ndidakutonga kuti ukoye Nsiku Yakupuma." 
Deuteronomy5:16 “‘Lemedza babako na mako, ninga mumbakutongera ine MBUYA Mulungu wako, towera pyonsene pikufambire mwadidi pontho kuti ukhale na moyo wakulapha m'dziko inafuna kukupasa ineyi." 
Deuteronomy5:17 “‘Leka chita upandu. 
Deuteronomy5:18 “‘Leka chita uputa. 
Deuteronomy5:19 “‘Leka kuba. 
Deuteronomy5:20 “‘Leka pambizira mwanzako. 
Deuteronomy5:21 “‘Leka sirira mkazi wa mwanzako, leka sirira nyumbache, leka sirira mbuto yache, mabitchu ache, ng'ombe zache, mabulu ache penu chinthu chonsene cha mwanzako.’" 
Deuteronomy5:22 “Enewa ndi matongero adapereka MBUYA kuna imwe monsene ndzidzi udagumanyikana imwe paphiri pale. Pidalonga iye na fala yamphamvu kubulukira m'moto pontho m'makole akuswipa, iye adapereka matongero enewa nee anango tayu. Kubuluka penepo iye adalemba papyakulemberapo pyamiyala piwiri mbapipereka kuna ine pano." 
Deuteronomy5:23 “Pidakalangira moto paphiri yonsene, imwe mbamuva fala kubulukira mumdima, akadamu na akulu-akulu a dzinzanu adadza kuna ine" 
Deuteronomy5:24 mbalonga mbati, ‘MBUYA Mulungu wathu ationesa ukulu na demelero yache pidamva ife akulonga kubulukira m'moto! Lero tapiona tekha kuti mphyakukwanisika kuna munthu kuthimiza kukhala na moyo, podi kwene kuti Mulungu alonga kuna iye." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Apo chinafuna kufera ife ninji? Moto wakugoswa ule unativunga. Ife tinati tife tingava pontho MBUYA Mulungu wathu akulonga kuna ife. 
Deuteronomy5:26 Ayi munthu unango adakhalapo na moyo pidava iye Mulungu wa moyo akulonga kubulukira m'moto? 
Deuteronomy5:27 Mose, bwerera ukave pyonsene pyalonga MBUYA Mulungu wathu. Ungamala ubwere udzatipange pidalonga iye kuna iwe. Ifembo tinapivesera mbatidzapivera.’" 
Deuteronomy5:28 “Pidava MBUYA penepi, adalonga kuna ine mbati, ‘Ine ndava pyalonga anthuwa; iwo alonga pyakuona." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Sha! Mbapidakhala pyadidi iwo mbadapifuna ndzidzi onsene kundilemedza na kuvera matongero anga onsene, towera pinthu pyawo pyonsene piafambire mwadidi, iwo na pidzukulu pyawo pene kwenda na kwenda." 
Deuteronomy5:30 Ndoko kaapange kuti abwerere kumakumbi kwawo. 
Deuteronomy5:31 Mbwenye, iwe Mose, salira kuno na ine, tenepo ndinakupasa mwambo na matongero anga onsene. Pifunzise kuna anthu, towera iwo apivere m'dziko inafuna kuapasa ineyi.’" 
Deuteronomy5:32 “Imwe Aisraele onesesani kuti mukuchita pyonsene pyakutongani MBUYA Mulungu wanu. Lekani khonda vera mwambo wache na ubodzi ene. 
Deuteronomy5:33 Verani Mwambo onsene wa MBUYA Mulungu wanu, towera pyonsene pikufambireni mwadidi pontho kuti muthimize kukhala m'dziko inafuna kakwata imwe kukhala yanu ene ile." 
Deuteronomy6:1 “Enewa ndi matongero onsene adandipanga MBUYA Mulungu wanu kuti ndikufunziseni. Avereni m'dziko inafuna imwe kakwata kukhala yanu ene chinchinoyi. 
Deuteronomy6:2 Ndzidzi unakhala imwe na moyo, imwe na pidzukulu pyanu mwathema kulemedza MBUYA Mulungu wanu pontho kuvera mwambo wache onsene unakupasani inewu, towera mukhale na moyo wakulapha m'dzikoyo." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Avesereni, imwe Aisraele mbamuavera! Tenepo pyonsene pinakufambirani mwadidi mbamukhala dzinza yamphamvu, pontho munakhala m'dziko yamphonje, ninga montho mudadumbirira MBUYA, Mulungu wa makolo athu." 
Deuteronomy6:4 “Aisraele, kumbukani ipi! MBUYA ndi Mulungu wathu, iye ndi MBUYA mbodzi ene basi." 
Deuteronomy6:5 Mfune MBUYA Mulungu wako na mtimako onsene, na moyo wako onsene, pontho na mphamvu zako zonsene." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Lekani duwalira na pang'ono pene matongero anakupasani ine lerowa. 
Deuteronomy6:7 Afunziseni kuna ananu. Alongeni ndzidzi una imwe kumusa kwanu, ndzidzi una imwe kutali, ndzidzi unapuma imwe, pontho ndzidzi unaphata imwe basa." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Amangirireni pamkono panu mbamuavala papipumu panu ninga chikumbuso. 
Deuteronomy6:9 Alembeni pamisuwo ya nyumba zanu pontho pamisuwo ya mipandanu. 
Deuteronomy6:10 “Ninga mudadumbirira MBUYA Mulungu wanu kuna makolo anu Abrahamu, Isake na Yakobo, iye anakupasani dziko na mizinda mikulu-mikulu idakhonda imwe manga ile." 
Deuteronomy6:11 Nyumba zinadzala na pinthu pyadidi pidakhonda imwe kupiikhamo, pontho mwenemo munakhala michera idakhonda imwe kumba, pontho mfesa na miti yaolivi pidakhonda imwe bzala pile. MBUYA angakudzesani m'dziko yeneyi mbamugumana pyonsene pinafuna imwe kudya," 
Deuteronomy6:12 onesesani kuti muleke duwalira MBUYA adakupulumusani kudziko ya Iguputo, kukhali imwe mabitchu kule." 
Deuteronomy6:13 Lemedzani MBUYA Mulungu wanu, mpembedzeni iye ene basi, mbamudumbira na dzinache ene basi." 
Deuteronomy6:14 Lekani pembedza milungu inango, milungu ya anthu akuzunguliraniwa." 
Deuteronomy6:15 Ngakhala munapembedza milungu inango, kuzhangali kwa MBUYA kunadza pana imwe ninga moto mbakukuvungani monsene mwene, thangwi MBUYA Mulungu wanu, ali pakati panu ule, ngwantchanje." 
Deuteronomy6:16 “Lekani yesa MBUYA Mulungu wanu ninga mudachitira imwe pa Masa pale. 
Deuteronomy6:17 Onesesani kuti mwavera mwambo onsene wakupasani iye ule. 
Deuteronomy6:18 Chitani pinthu pyakulungama pontho pyadidi pamaso pa MBUYA, tenepo pinthu pyanu pyonsene pinakufambirani mwadidi. Imwe munakwanisa kukwata dziko ya mataka akubalisa pinthu idadumbira MBUYA kuna makolo anu ile," 
Deuteronomy6:19 tenepo imwe munathamangisa anyamalwanu ninga mudadumbira iye. 
Deuteronomy6:20 “Ndzidzi unadzawo ananu angakuvunzani kuti, ‘Ninji MBUYA Mulungu wathu adatitonga kuti tivere matongero onsenewa?’" 
Deuteronomy6:21 Dzaapangeni kuti, ‘Ife tikhali mabitchu a mfumu wa dziko ya Iguputo, tenepo MBUYA adatipulumusa na mphamvu zache zikulu." 
Deuteronomy6:22 Na maso athu tidamuona akuchita pyakudodomesa pontho pinthu pyakugoswa kuna anthu a ku Iguputo na kuna mfumu wawo, pontho na kuna mathubu ache onsene." 
Deuteronomy6:23 Iye adatisudzula kutibulusa ku Iguputo. Tenepo adatidzesa kuno mbatipasa dziko yeneyi ninga mudadumbira iye kuna makolo athu. 
Deuteronomy6:24 Natenepo MBUYA Mulungu wathu adatitonga kuti tivere matongero onsenewa pontho kumulemedza. Ngakhala tinachita tenepo, iye ndzidzi onsene anatchinjiriza dzinzathu mbaichitisa kwenda m'tsogolo." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Ngakhala tinavera mwakukhulupirika pyonsene pyatitonga MBUYA, iye anakomerwa nafe.’" 
Deuteronomy7:1 “MBUYA Mulungu wanu anakudzesani m'dziko inafuna imwe dzakwata kukhala yanu ene ile mbathamangisa madzinza mazinji. Ndzidzi unaenda imwe m'tsogolo, iye anathamangisa madzinza akulu-akulu manomwe pontho amphamvu kupiringana imwepo: Ahiti, Agirigashi, Aamori, Akanani, Aperizi, Ahivi na Ayebusi." 
Deuteronomy7:2 MBUYA Mulungu wanu angaikha anthu enewa m'manja mwanu mbamuakunda, imwe mwathema kuapha onsene. Lekani phatizana nawo penu kuavera nsisi na pang'ono pene." 
Deuteronomy7:3 Lekani semberana nawo, pontho lekani tawirisa ananu achimuna kusemba anawo na mbodzi ene, penu ana achikazi kusembwa na anawo," 
Deuteronomy7:4 thangwi iwo anachitisa ananu kubauka kubuluka kuna ine MBUYA kupembedza milungu inango. Ngakhala penepi pinachitika, MBUYA anakuzhangalirani mbakuvungani kabodzi kene." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Tenepo gomolani maguwawo, swani piguwa pyawo pyakupambulika, gwanda-gwandani adzimunthu awo a milungu Ashera, pontho pisani mifanikizo imbapembedza iwo." 
Deuteronomy7:6 Chitani penepi thangwi imwe ndimwe ache a MBUYA Mulungu wanu. Kubulukira kuna anthu onsene a pansi pano iye adakusankhulani imwe kukhala anthu ache akupambulika. 
Deuteronomy7:7 “MBUYA hadakufuneni mbakusankhulani thangwi imwe mukhali akuinjipa kupiringana madzinza anangowa tayu; imwe mukhali dzinza ing'onoletu padziko yapansi. 
Deuteronomy7:8 Mbwenye MBUYA adakufunani mbafuna kukoya kudumbira kudachita iye kuna makolo anu. Ndi thangwi yache iye adakupulumusani na mphamvu zache zikulu mbakusudzulani paubitchu wa mfumu wa ku Iguputo. 
Deuteronomy7:9 Kumbukani kuti MBUYA Mulungu wanu ndi Mulungu yekha ene basi, pontho iye ngwakukhulupirika. Iye anakoya chiverano mbaonesa kuafuna kwache kokhonda mala mifendu pikwi ya anthu ale ambamfuna mbavera matongero ache," 
Deuteronomy7:10 mbwenye iye nkhabe dzadembuka kutchunyusa anthu ambamzonda ale tayu. 
Deuteronomy7:11 Tenepo chinchino verani pyonsene pyafunziswa imwe pile; verani matongero onsene akupasani ine lerowa. 
Deuteronomy7:12 “Ngakhala imwe munavesera matongero enewa mbamuavera mwakukhulupirika, penepo MBUYA Mulungu wanu anathimiza kukoya chiverano chache na imwe mbakuonesani kukufunani kwache kokhonda mala ninga mudachitira iye kuna makolo anu." 
Deuteronomy7:13 Iye anakufunani mbakutsanzayisani mwakuti munainjipa mbamukhala na ana azinji; iye anatsanzayisa mindanu mbidzabala mapira, vinyu, pontho na mafuta aolivi; iye anakutsanzayisani pakukupasani pifuyo pizinji. Iye anakupasani mtsanzayiso onsenewu m'dziko idadumbira iye kuna makolo anu ile." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Nkhabe anthu anango anatsanzayiswa pikulu ninga imwe tayu. Nkhabe mbodzi wa imwe anasowa ana tayu, pontho nkhabe chifuyo chanu na chibodzi chene chinasowa ana tayu." 
Deuteronomy7:15 MBUYA anakutchinjirizani kuna utenda, pontho iye nkhabe dzagwisa pana imwe utenda wakupha udaona imwe m'dziko ya Iguputo ule tayu, m'mbuto mwache iye anaugwisa pana anyamalwanu." 
Deuteronomy7:16 Vungani dzinza yonsene inaikha MBUYA m'manja mwanu, pontho lekani kuavera nsisi. Lekani pembedza milungu yawo, thangwi penepyo pinakhala msampha kuna imwe." 
Deuteronomy7:17 “Lekani kulonga mwekha ene kuti, ‘Madzinza enewa ngamphamvu kupiringana ife pano mwakuti ife nkhabe kwanisa kuathamangisa tayu.’" 
Deuteronomy7:18 Lekani chita nawo mantha; kumbukani pinthu pidachita MBUYA Mulungu wanu kuna mfumu wa ku Iguputo na anthu ache onsene. 
Deuteronomy7:19 Na maso anu imwe mudaona miliri yakugoswa, pyakudodomesa na pidzindikiro, pontho mphamvu zikulu zidakupulumusani na MBUYA Mulungu wanu zile. Ninga montho mudachitira iye kuvunga Aiguputo, iye anachita chibodzi-bodzi kuvunga anthu onsene anagopa imwe chinchinowa." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Iye pontho anaachitisa kukhala pampani-pani mbavunga onsene akuthawa kuti akabisale ale. 
Deuteronomy7:21 Tenepo lekani chita nawo mantha anthu enewa. MBUYA Mulungu wanu ali namwe; iye ndi Mulungu wamkulu, pontho ule athema kugopiwa." 
Deuteronomy7:22 MBUYA Mulungu wanu anathamangisa madzinza enewa patsogolo panu pang'ono na pang'ono. Imwe nkhabe dzatawiriswa kuavunga kabodzi kene tayu gopesera nyama zam'tsanga zinainjipa kukuzungulirani. 
Deuteronomy7:23 MBUYA anaikha anyamalwanu m'manja mwanu mbaachitisa kukhala pampani-pani kufikirana amale vungwa. 
Deuteronomy7:24 Iye anaikha mafumu awo m'manja mwanu. Imwe munaapha, tenepo anaduwalika. Nkhabe na mbodzi ene anafuna kwanisa kuthimbana namwe tayu; imwe munavunga munthu onsene." 
Deuteronomy7:25 Pisani mifanikizo imbapembedza iwo. Lekani sirira siliva penu golidi pina iwopyo, pontho lekani kupikwata. Ngakhala imwe munachita tenepo, ipyo pinakhala msampha kuna imwe, thangwi MBUYA ambazonda kupembedza milungu inango." 
Deuteronomy7:26 Lekani pitisa na ubodzi ene wa mifanikizo yeneyi m'nyumba mwanu, gopesera dzedze ina iwoyo inagwera pana imwepo. Imwe mwathema kukhonda pontho kuizonda mifanikizo yeneyi, thangwi iyo njakutembererwa na MBUYA." 
Deuteronomy8:1 “Verani mwakukhulupirika matongero onsene akupasani ine lerowa, towera mukhale na moyo, pontho muinjipe mbamukwata dziko idadumbira MBUYA kuna makolo anu ile." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Kumbukani mule mudakutsogolerani MBUYA Mulungu wanu paulendo wakulaphawu wakugwanda na m'thando yatchetcha pyaka makumanayi pyagwandapyo, kutumiza pinthu pyakunensa kukuyesani, towera iye adziwe pya mumtima mwanu ngakhala imwe munavera matongero ache penu tayu." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Iye adakuchitisani kukhala na njala mbakupasani mana kuti mudye, pyakudya pile pyakuti imwe na makolo anu ene chipo nee mudzati mwapidya tayu. Iye adachita tenepo kukuonesani kuti munthu nkhabe khala na moyo na mkate okha tayu, mbwenye na mafala onsene analonga MBUYA." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Ndzidzi wa pyaka makumanayiwu nguwo zanu nee zidasakale penu manyalo anu kubzimba tayu. 
Deuteronomy8:5 Kumbukani kuti MBUYA Mulungu wanu ambakulangani ninga montho mumbachitira baba kulanga anache. 
Deuteronomy8:6 Tenepo chitani ninga mudakutongerani MBUYA kukhala mwakuteweza matongero ache mbamumgopa. 
Deuteronomy8:7 MBUYA Mulungu wanu akukudzesani m'dziko ya mataka akubalisa pinthu, dziko ya mikulo na mphuno za madzi, migelo ya madzi akufamba pansi pa mataka akutumbukira m'maphedi na m'pitunda ile;" 
Deuteronomy8:8 dziko ile imbabala tirigu na barele, mfesa, makuyu, ntheme, nsapo zaolivi na uchi." 
Deuteronomy8:9 Kweneko imwe nkhabe dzakhalave na njala penu dzasowa pinthu tayu. M'miyalache muna simbi pontho m'mapiri mwache munakwanisa kukumbamo nkuwa. 
Deuteronomy8:10 Imwe munakhala na pyonsene pinafuna imwe kuti mudye, tenepo munapereka takhuta kuna MBUYA Mulungu wanu thangwi ya dziko ya mataka akubalisa pinthu yakupasani iyeyi." 
Deuteronomy8:11 “Onesesani kuti mukhonde duwalira MBUYA Mulungu wanu; lekani chimwana kuvera mwambo wache na ubodzi ene unakupasani ine lerowu. 
Deuteronomy8:12 Mungakhala na pyonsene pinafuna imwe kudya na kumanga nyumba zanu zadidi kukhalamo," 
Deuteronomy8:13 pontho ng'ombe na mabiranu, siliva na golidi wanu na pinthu pyonsene pina imwe pingathimizirika," 
Deuteronomy8:14 onesesani kuti muleke sanduka akutumbama mbamuduwalira MBUYA Mulungu wanu, adakupulumusani kudziko ya Iguputo ule kukhali imwe mabitchu." 
Deuteronomy8:15 Iye adakutsogolerani m'thando ikulu yatchetcha pontho yakugoswa, mule mukhali nyoka za ukali na akong'a. M'dziko yeneyi yakuuma pontho yakusowa madzi, iye adachitisa madzi kukuka kubulukira m'mwala kuti imwe mumwe." 
Deuteronomy8:16 M'thandomo iye adakupasani mana kuti mudye, pyakudya pyakuti nee makolo anu adapidya tayu. Iye adatumiza pinthu pyakunensa pana imwe kukuyesani, towera pakumalisira pache akutsanzayiseni na pinthu pyadidi." 
Deuteronomy8:17 Tenepo lekani nyerezera kuti mwapichita mwekha ene kukhala akufuma na mphamvu pontho nzeru zanu. 
Deuteronomy8:18 Kumbukani kuti ndi MBUYA Mulungu wanu ambakupasani mphamvu zakuti mufume ule. Iye ambachita penepi thangwi iye athimiza kukhala wakukhulupirika na lero kuna chiverano chidachita iye na makolo anu chile. 
Deuteronomy8:19 Lekani duwalira MBUYA Mulungu wanu na pang'ono pene penu kuzungunukira kuna milungu inango mbamuipembedza. Ngakhala munachita tenepo, lero ndikukucheuzani kuti imwe munati muvungwe." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Ngakhala imwe munakhonda kuvera MBUYA, penepo munati muvungwe ninga madzinza anafuna iye dzavunga pinaenda imwe m'tsogolo ale." 
Deuteronomy9:1 “Veserani kuno Aisraele! Lero imwe muli chifupi kuwambuka mkulo wa Yorodani pontho kakwata dziko ya madzinza akulu pontho amphamvu kupiringana imwepo. Mizindawo njikulu yakutchingwa na mpanda wakuphata kuthambo. 
Deuteronomy9:2 Anthu achewo ngakulapha pontho amphamvu; iwo mphidzukulu pya Aanakimu, anyakujintcha, pontho imwe mwapiva pikulongwa kuti nkhabe na mbodzi ene anakwanisa kuimisana nawo tayu." 
Deuteronomy9:3 Mbwenye chinchino munati mupione mwekha ene kuti MBUYA Mulungu wanu anati aende patsogolo panu ninga moto wakugaka. Iye anati akunde ndzidzi unaenda imwe, towera imwe muathamangise mbamuakunda kabodzi kene ninga mudadumbira iye." 
Deuteronomy9:4 MBUYA Mulungu wanu angamala kuathamangisa lekani longa mwekha ene kuti iye adakuchitisani kukwata dzikoyi, thangwi iyo idathema kukhala yanu ene. Nkhabe, MBUYA anati athamangise anthu enewa m'mbuto mwanu thangwi iwo mbanthu akudawika." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Si thangwi ndimwe anthu adidi penu akulungama tayu kuti MBUYA akukutawirisani kukwata dziko yawoyo. Iye anati aathamangise thangwi iwo mbanthu akudawika pontho kuti iye anafuna kukoya kudumbira kudachita iye kuna makolo anu, Abrahamu, Isake na Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy9:6 Penepa munakwanisa kupidziwadi kuti MBUYA hakukupasani dziko ya mataka akubalisa pinthu tayu na thangwi yakuti imwe mwathema kuitambira. Nkhabe tayu, imwe ndimwe anthu akuuma mtima." 
Deuteronomy9:7 “Lekani duwalira kuzhangalisa kudachita imwe MBUYA Mulungu wanu m'thando yatchetcha mule. Kutomera pansiku idabuluka imwe m'dziko ya Iguputo kufikirana nsiku idafika imwe kuno, imwe mwampandukira." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Podi na paphiri ya Sinai pene imwe mudamzhangalisa MBUYA, tenepo iye adazhangali pyakwanga mwakuti mbadakwanisa kukuvungani." 
Deuteronomy9:9 Ine ndidakwira paphiri katambira miyala padalembwa chiverano chidasasanya MBUYA na imwe chile. Ine ndidakhala kweneko nsiku makumanayi mosiku na masikati mbandikhonda kudya na kumwa na chinthu chene. 
Deuteronomy9:10 Tenepo MBUYA adandipasa pyakulemberapo pyamiyala piwiri pakhadalemba iye ene na manjache pinthu pikhadalonga iye kuna imwe kubulukira m'moto nsiku idagumanyikana imwe paphiri pale. 
Deuteronomy9:11 Pidamala nsiku makumanayi mosiku na masikati MBUYA adandipasa pyakulemberapo pyamiyala piwiri pakhadalemba iye chiverano pale. 
Deuteronomy9:12 “Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, ‘Tchitha kabodzi kene, thangwi anthu ako adatsogolera iwe kubuluka ku Iguputo ale, amala vungika pontho akuchita pyakuipa. Iwo abauka kale kusiya pinthu pidaapanga ine kuti apichite pile, tenepo apisasanyira okha ene mfanikizo wasimbi kuupembedza.’" 
Deuteronomy9:13 “MBUYA adalonga pontho kuna ine mbati, ‘Ndadziwa kuuma mtima kwachita anthu enewa." 
Deuteronomy9:14 Leka yesa kuakhondesa kuchita pinachita iwopyo. Ndinafuna kuavunga, towera nee na mbodzi ene akumbukweve tayu. Penepo ndinakuchitisa iwe kukhala baba wa dzinza ikulu pontho yamphamvu kupiringana muna iwomu.’" 
Deuteronomy9:15 “Tenepo ndidazungunuka mbanditchitha paphiri uku ndathukula pyakulemberapo pyamiyala piwiri pakhadalembwa chiverano pale. Malulume a moto akhabulukira paphiri pale. 
Deuteronomy9:16 Ine ndidaona kuti mudatoma kale kukhonda vera matongero adakupasani MBUYA Mulungu wanu ale, pontho kuti mudamdawira pakupisasanyira mwekha ene mfanikizo wa mwanamphulu wasimbi kuti muupembedze." 
Deuteronomy9:17 Tenepo pamaso panu ndidaponya pansi pyakulemberapo pyamiyala pile mbapisweka m'mapindi-mapindi. 
Deuteronomy9:18 Ndidalamba pamaso pa MBUYA nsiku makumanayi mosiku na masikati mbandikhonda kumwa penu kudya na chinthu chene. Ine ndidachita tenepo thangwi imwe mudadawira MBUYA, pontho mudamzhangalisa." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Ine ndikhachita mantha na ukali wa MBUYA, thangwi iye adazhangali pyakwanga mwakuti mbadakuvungani; kwache MBUYA adandivesera pontho." 
Deuteronomy9:20 MBUYA adazhangalira pontho pyakwanga Aroni mwakuti mbadampha, natenepo ndidampempherera Aroni na ndzidzi onthowo." 
Deuteronomy9:21 Ine ndidakwata chinthu chakudawika chidasasanya imwe chile, mwanamphulu wasimbi ule mbandichiponya pamoto. Ndidachinyedza-nyedza, ndidachipeya peya mbandiponya fumbi yache mumkhwawa umbakuka kubulukira m'phiri ule." 
Deuteronomy9:22 “Imwe mudazhangalisa pontho MBUYA Mulungu wanu pikhali imwe ku Tabera, Masa na Kibiroti Hataava." 
Deuteronomy9:23 Pontho pidakugwinyani iye kubuluka ku Kadeshi Barinea mbakupangani kwenda kakwata dziko ikhakupasani iye ile kukhala yanu ene, imwe mudampandukira mbamukhonda kumnyindira penu kumvera." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Kutomera ndzidzi udakudziwani ine, imwe mwapandukira MBUYA." 
Deuteronomy9:25 “Natenepo ndidalamba pansi pamaso pa MBUYA nsiku makumanayi mosiku na masikati, thangwi ndidapidziwa kuti iye akhachita phinga kukuvungani." 
Deuteronomy9:26 Tenepo ndidapemphera kuti, ‘MBUYA Mulungu, lekani vunga anthu anu, anthu adapulumusa imwe na kuabulusa m'dziko ya Iguputo na mphamvu zanu zikulu ale." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Kumbukani anyabasanu, Abrahamu, Isake na Yakobo, pontho lekani ikha konta kuuma mtima, kudawika, pontho na pyakudawa pya anthu enewa," 
Deuteronomy9:28 gopesera anthu a ku Iguputo anati alonge kuti imwe mudachimwana kuaendesa anthu anu kudziko idadumbira imwe kuna iwo ile. Iwo anati alonge kuti imwe mudakwata anthu anu kuti mukaaphe m'thando yatchetcha thangwi imwe mukhaazonda. 
Deuteronomy9:29 Mbwenye anthu enewa mbale adasankhula imwe kukhala anthu anu, anthu adabulusa imwe m'dziko ya Iguputo na mphamvu zanu zikulu ale.’" 
Deuteronomy10:1 “Kubuluka penepo MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, ‘Sema miyala miwiri ninga yakutoma ile, pontho sasanya bokosi ya matabwa towera uiikhemo. Kwira kuna ine paphiri pano," 
Deuteronomy10:2 tenepo ine ndinalemba pamiyala yeneyi pinthu pidalemba ine pamiyala idaswa iwe ile, natenepo iwe wathema kuiikha m'bokosimo.’" 
Deuteronomy10:3 “Tenepo ine ndidasasanya bokosi na matabwa akesha mbandisema miyala miwiri ninga yontho yakutoma ile mbandienda nayo paphiri pale. 
Deuteronomy10:4 MBUYA adalemba pamiyalapo mafala ontho ninga akhadalemba iye pakutoma ale, Matongero Khumi adakupasani iye ndzidzi udalonga iye kuna imwe kubulukira m'moto nsiku idagumanyikana imwe paphiri pale. MBUYA adandipasa pyakulemberapo pyamiyala pile," 
Deuteronomy10:5 tenepo ine ndidatchitha paphiripo. Natenepo ninga montho mudandipangira MBUYA, ine ndidaaikha m'bokosi idasasanya ine ile; iwo ali mwenemo kutomera kale ene.”" 
Deuteronomy10:6 Aisraele adafuluka pamichera ya anthu a ku Yaakani ile mbaenda ku Mosera. Kweneko Aroni adafa mbaikhwa m'masiye, tenepo mwanache wamamuna Eleazara adapita m'mbuto mwache ninga nyansembe." 
Deuteronomy10:7 Kubuluka penepo iwo adenda ku Gudugoda mbaenda pontho ku Yotibata, mbuto ya mikulo ya madzi mizinji." 
Deuteronomy10:8 Paphiripo MBUYA adasankhula amuna a m'dzinza ya Levi kukhala anyakuyang'anira Bokosi ya Chiverano, kumtumikira ninga anyansembe, pontho kutsanzayisa anthu na dzinache. Yeneyi ndi basawo na lero." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Ndi thangwi yache dzinza ya Levi hidatambire khundu ya dziko ninga mudachitira madzinza anango ale tayu; chidatambira iwo ntchidzo chakukhala anyansembe a MBUYA, ninga kudumbira kudachita MBUYA Mulungu wanu." 
Deuteronomy10:10 “Ine ndidathimiza kukhala paphiripo nsiku makumanayi mosiku na masikati, ninga montho mudachitira ine pakutoma pale. MBUYA adandivesera pontho mbatawira kukhonda kukuvungani." 
Deuteronomy10:11 Tenepo iye adandipanga kwenda kakutsogolerani, towera mukwanise kakwata dziko ikhadadumbira iye kuna makolo anu ile." 
Deuteronomy10:12 “Chinchino Aisraele, veserani pinthu pinafuna MBUYA Mulungu wanu kuti mupichite: pembedzani MBUYA mbamuchite pyonsene pinakutongani iye. Mfuneni mbamumtumikire na mtimanu onsene," 
Deuteronomy10:13 pontho verani mwambo na matongero akupasani ine lerowa kukhala chinthu chakuganyalisa kuna imwe. 
Deuteronomy10:14 Podi na kudzululetu nkhwa MBUYA basi; dziko yapansi pontho njache na pyonsene pili mwenemo. 
Deuteronomy10:15 Kwache kuafuna kwa MBUYA makolo anu kukhali kwamphamvu pyakwanga mwakuti adasankhula imwe m'mbuto mwa anthu anango onsene, tenepo na lero ndimwe anthu ache akusankhulika." 
Deuteronomy10:16 Kubulukira lero kwenda m'tsogolo khalani akuvera kuna MBUYA mbamuleka kuumisa mtima. 
Deuteronomy10:17 MBUYA Mulungu wanu ana utongi pana milungu yonsene na pana anyamphamvu onsene. Iye ngwamkulu pontho wamphamvu, tenepo iye athema kugopiwa. Iye nkhabe chita pinthu mwakuyang'ana nkhope pontho iye nkhabe tawira kudyekerwa tayu." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Iye ambaonesesa kuti ana masiye na amamfelwa akuchitirwa chilungamo; iye ambaafuna alendo ambakhala pakati pa anthu athu ale mbaapasa phoso na nguwo. 
Deuteronomy10:19 Natenepo afunenimbo alendo thangwi imwe mukhalimbo alendo m'dziko ya Iguputo. 
Deuteronomy10:20 Verani MBUYA Mulungu wanu mbamumpembedze iye ene basi. Khulupirikani kuna iye mbamudumbira na dzinache ene basi. 
Deuteronomy10:21 Mkuzeni iye! Iye ndi Mulungu wanu, pontho imwe mwaona mwekha na maso anu pinthu pikulu pontho pyakudodomesa pyachita iye kuna imwe." 
Deuteronomy10:22 Pidenda makolo anu kudziko ya Iguputo akhalipo kwene makumanomwe basi. Mbwenye chinchino MBUYA Mulungu wanu akuchitisani kukhala akuinjipa ninga nyenyezi za kuthambo. 
Deuteronomy11:1 “Mfuneni MBUYA Mulungu wanu pontho ndzidzi onsene verani mwambo wache onsene. 
Deuteronomy11:2 Kumbukani lero pyafunza imwe pya MBUYA kudzera muna kukutchunyusani kudachita iye. Ndimwepo, si ananu tayu, ale adaona pinthu penepi. Imwe mudaona ukulu wa MBUYA, mphamvu zache zikulu," 
Deuteronomy11:3 pontho pyakudodomesa pidachita iye kuna mfumu wa ku Iguputo pontho na kuna dziko yache yonsene. 
Deuteronomy11:4 Imwe mudaona mule mudatswairira MBUYA monsene mwene anyankhondo a ku Iguputo, pabodzi na akavalo na pingolo pyawo pene pakuabiza m'Nyanza Yakufira pikhakutewerani iwo pile." 
Deuteronomy11:5 Imwe mukupidziwa pinthu pidakuchitirani MBUYA m'thando yatchetcha, imwe mbamudzati fika kuno." 
Deuteronomy11:6 Kumbukani pinthu pidachita iye kuna Datani na Abiramu ana achimuna a Eliabu wa dzinza ya Rubeni. Pamaso pa anthu onsene dziko yapansi idafunguka mbiakhudyula pabodzi pene na mabanjawo, makumbi awo, anyabasawo onsene na pifuyo pyawo pyonsene." 
Deuteronomy11:7 Ande, anthu ache ndimwe mudaona na maso anu ene pinthu pikulu pyonsene pidachita MBUYA." 
Deuteronomy11:8 “Verani mwambo onsene wakupasani ine lerowu. Tenepo imwe munakwanisa kuwambuka mkulo mbamukakwata dziko ili imwe chifupi kuikwata ile. 
Deuteronomy11:9 Imwe munakhala na moyo wakulapha m'dziko yamphonje idadumbira MBUYA kuna makolo anu na pidzukulu pyawo ile. 
Deuteronomy11:10 Dziko inafuna imwe kakwata chinchinoyi nee yakhala ninga dziko ya Iguputo, ikhakhala imwe pakutoma ile tayu. Kweneko ndzidzi udabzala imwe mbewu mudathema kuphata basa mwakuwangisa kuthirira minda;" 
Deuteronomy11:11 kwache dziko inafuna imwe kukwata chinchino, ile ndi dziko ya mapiri na maphedi, dziko yakuvumba mvula." 
Deuteronomy11:12 MBUYA Mulungu wanu ambayang'anira dziko yeneyi mbailondali chaka chamumphu. 
Deuteronomy11:13 “Natenepo verani matongero anakupasani ine lerowa: mfuneni MBUYA Mulungu wanu mbamumtumikire na mtimanu onsene. 
Deuteronomy11:14 Ngakhala munachita tenepo iye anavumbisa mvula m'dziko mwanu pandzidzi unafunika iyo, ndzidzi wakutonthola na ndzidzi wa mainja, towera pakhale mapira, vinyu na mafuta aolivi," 
Deuteronomy11:15 pontho maudzu a pifuyo pyanu. Imwe munakhala na pyakudya pyonsene pinafuna imwe. 
Deuteronomy11:16 Lekani kupitawirisa mwekha ene kubauka kubuluka kuna MBUYA kupembedza milungu inango mbamuitumikira. 
Deuteronomy11:17 Ngakhala munachita tenepo, MBUYA anakuzhangalirani. Iye nkhabe dzavumbisa mvula tayu, tenepo mataka anauma pyakwanga mwakuti mbewu nkhabe kwanisa kumera tayu. Penepo pene imwe munafa podi kwene kuti dziko inakupasani iyeyi njadidi." 
Deuteronomy11:18 “Kumbukani matongero enewa mbamuaikha m'mtima mwanu. Amangirireni m'mikono mwanu pontho avaleni papipumu panu ninga chikumbuso. 
Deuteronomy11:19 Afunziseni kuna ananu. Alongeni ndzidzi una imwe m'misa mwanu penu ndzidzi una imwe kutali, ndzidzi unapuma imwe penu ndzidzi unaphata imwe basa." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Alembeni m'mafufu a misuwo ya nyumba zanu na pamisuwo ya mipandanu. 
Deuteronomy11:21 Penepo imwe na ananu munakhala na moyo wakulapha m'dziko idadumbira MBUYA Mulungu wanu kuna makolo anu ile. Imwe munakhala mwenemo ndzidzi unakhalapo thambo yakudzulu. 
Deuteronomy11:22 “Verani mwakukhulupirika mwambo onsene wakupasani ine lerowu: mfuneni MBUYA Mulungu wanu, chitani pyonsene pinatonga iye mbamukhulupirike kuna iye." 
Deuteronomy11:23 Iye anathamangisa madzinza enewo ndzidzi unaenda imwe, tenepo imwe munakwata dziko, ile nja madzinza amphamvu pontho akulu pyakwanga kupiringana imwepo." 
Deuteronomy11:24 Mataka onsene anaponda imwe anakhala anu. Nthembanu inafumuka mpakana kumpoto kwa phiri ya Lebanoni kubulukira kuthando yatchetcha kumwera, pontho anafumuka mpakana ku Bara ya Mediterania kubulukira kumkulo wa Yufurate kumadokero dzuwa." 
Deuteronomy11:25 Konsene kunaenda imwe m'dziko yeneyi, MBUYA Mulungu wanu anachitisa anthu kukugopani, ninga kudumbira kudachita iye, pontho nkhabe na mbodzi ene anakwanisa kuimisana namwe tayu." 
Deuteronomy11:26 “Yang'anani, lero ndikuikha pakati panu mtsanzayiso na dzedze kuti musankhule chibodzi:" 
Deuteronomy11:27 Mtsanzayiso ngakhala munavera matongero a MBUYA Mulungu wanu anakupasani ine lerowa," 
Deuteronomy11:28 mbwenye dzedze ngakhala munakhonda vera matongero enewa mbamubaukira kuna milungu inango yakuti chipo imwe mudzati kuipembedza tayu. 
Deuteronomy11:29 MBUYA angakudzesani m'dziko inafuna imwe dzaikwata kukhala yanu ene ile imwe mwathema kulonga pya mtsanzayiso paphiri ya Gerizimu, pontho pya dzedze paphiri ya Ebali." 
Deuteronomy11:30 Mapiri enewa ali kumadokero dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani m'nthemba ya Akanani ambakhala m'phedi ya Yorodani ale. Iwo ali chakwendera kumadokero dzuwa, nee kutali na miti yakupambulika yamthundu ya ku More chifupi na luwani ya Giligala." 
Deuteronomy11:31 Imwe muli chifupi kuwambuka mkulo wa Yorodani kukwata dziko inafuna kukupasani MBUYA Mulungu wanu ile. Mungaikwata mbamukhazikikamo," 
Deuteronomy11:32 onesesani kuti mwavera matongero onsene anakupasani ine lerowa. 
Deuteronomy12:1 “Pano pana mwambo na matongero pyathema imwe kuvera ndzidzi onsene unakhala imwe na moyo m'dziko inakupasani MBUYA Mulungu wa makolo anu ile. Avereni matongerowo. 
Deuteronomy12:2 M'dziko inakwata imweyi, gomolani mbuto zonsene zimbapembedzera anthu milungu yawo pamapiri akulapha, m'pitunda pontho pansi pa miti iwisi." 
Deuteronomy12:3 Gomolani maguwawo ansembe, iswani piguwa pyawo pyakupambulika, pontho pisani adzimunthu awo a milungu Ashera. Pandulani mifanikizo yawo, towera iwo aleke pembedzave pambuto zenezi." 
Deuteronomy12:4 “Lekani pembedza MBUYA Mulungu wanu ninga mumbapembedzera anthu enewa milungu yawo. 
Deuteronomy12:5 Kubulukira m'nthemba za madzinzanu onsene MBUYA anasankhula mbuto ibodzi, kule kwathema anthu kudza pamaso pache kumpembedza." 
Deuteronomy12:6 Penepo imwe mwathema kupereka nsembe zanu zile zathema kupyerezwa pontho na nsembe zanu zinango, chakhumi na mitukwanu yakupambulika, pyakupereka pidadumbira imwe kuna MBUYA pile, pyakupereka pimbapereka imwe na kufuna kwanu, pontho mwana wakutoma kubalwa wa ng'ombe pontho bira." 
Deuteronomy12:7 Penepo, pamaso pa MBUYA Mulungu wanu akutsanzayisani ule, imwe na mabanja anu munadya mbamukomerwa na kufamba mwadidi kwa pinthu pyaphatira imwe basa." 
Deuteronomy12:8 “Ndzidzi wenewo ungakwana lekani chita ninga mukhachitira imwe m'ndulimu. Kufikira chinchino imwe monsene mwapembedza ninga mumbafunira imwe," 
Deuteronomy12:9 thangwi imwe mudzati fika tayu m'dziko inakupasani MBUYA Mulungu wanu ile, kule kunakwanisa imwe kukhala na mtendere." 
Deuteronomy12:10 Mungawambuka mkulo wa Yorodani, MBUYA anakutawirisani kukwata dzikoyo mbamukhala mwenemo. Iye anakuyang'anirani mwadidi gopesera anyamalwanu pontho munakhala mwenemo na mtendere." 
Deuteronomy12:11 MBUYA anasankhula mbuto ibodzi pathema iye kupembedzwa pale, penepo imwe mwathema kudza na pinthu pyonsene pidakutongani ine; nsembe zanu zathema kupyerezwa pabodzi na nsembe zanu zinango, chakhumi chanu na mitukwanu yakupambulika, pontho pyakupereka pyanu pidadumbira imwe kuna MBUYA pile." 
Deuteronomy12:12 Penepo komerwani pamaso pache pabodzi pene na ananu, anyabasanu, na Alevi ambakhala muluwani mwanu ale; kumbukani kuti Alevi nkhabe dzakhala na mbuto yawo ene tayu." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Lekani pereka nsembe ponsene pene panafuna imwe; 
Deuteronomy12:14 kwache mwathema kuzipereka pambuto ibodzi ene basi inafuna sankhula MBUYA m'nthemba ibodzi ya m'madzinza mwanu. Kweneko mwathema kupyereza nsembe zanu pontho kuchita pinango pyonsene pyakutongani ine. 
Deuteronomy12:15 “Kwache imwe munakwanisa kupha na kudya nyama zanu ninga munapifunira imwe konsene kwene kunakhala imweko. Imwe munakwanisa kudya pyakuinjipa ninga munakupasirani MBUYA. Munthu onsene wa imwe wakuchena penu okhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu anakwanisa kudya ninga montho mbamudadyera imwe nyama ya nyasa penu mbala. 
Deuteronomy12:16 Kwache imwe mukukhondeswa kudya chiropa; imwe mwathema kuchichuchisira pansi ninga madzi. 
Deuteronomy12:17 Nkhabe chinthu na chibodzi chene chimbapereka imwe kuna MBUYA chathema kudyiwa mbuto zinakhala imwe: nee chakhumi cha mapiranu, vinyu wanu penu mafutanu aolivi, nee ana akutoma kubalwa a ng'ombe zanu penu mabiranu tayu, mitukwanu imbadumbira imwe kuna MBUYA, pyakupereka pimbapereka imwe na kufuna kwanu, penu pyakupereka pinango tayu." 
Deuteronomy12:18 Imwe na ananu pabodzi pene na anyabasanu na Alevi ambakhala muluwani mwanu ale, mwathema kudya pyakupereka penepi pamaso pa MBUYA Mulungu wanu pokha basi, pambuto ibodzi yakupembedzerapo idasankhula MBUYA Mulungu wanu ile. Penepo imwe munakomerwa na pyonsene pyachita imwe." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Pontho onesesani kuti muleke kuataya Alevi ndzidzi onsene unakhala iwo m'dziko mwanu. 
Deuteronomy12:20 “MBUYA Mulungu wanu angakuza nthemba yanu ninga mudadumbira iye, imwe munakwanisa kudya nyama ndzidzi onsene unafuna imwe." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Ngakhala mbuto ibodzi yakupembedzerapo ili kutali pyakwanga, penepo ndzidzi onsene unafuna imwe munakwanisa kupha ng'ombe, penu mabira pyakupasani MBUYA pile, pontho munakwanisa kudya nyama m'misa mwanu ninga mwakupangirani ine." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Munthu onsene wakuchena penu okhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu anakwanisa kudya nyama yeneyo ninga mbamudadyera iye nyama ya nyasa penu mbala. 
Deuteronomy12:23 Kwache imwe mukukhondeswa kudya nyama yakukhala na chiropa, thangwi moyo umbakhala m'chiropa, tenepo lekani kudya moyo pabodzi pene na nyamache." 
Deuteronomy12:24 Lekani kuyesa chiropa ninga chinthu chakudyiwa, m'mbuto mwache chichuchisireni pansi ninga madzi." 
Deuteronomy12:25 Ngakhala imwe munavera matongero enewa MBUYA anakomerwa, tenepo pinthu pyanu pyonsene, imwe na pidzukulu pyanu, pinakufambirani mwadidi." 
Deuteronomy12:26 Ndokoni na mitukwanu na pyakupereka pidadumbira imwe kuna MBUYA pambuto ibodzi yakupembedzera ile. 
Deuteronomy12:27 Penepo perekani nsembe zile zapyerezwa monsene mwene paguwa ya MBUYA. Pontho perekani nsembe nyamache imbadya imwe ile mbamukhuthulira chiropa chache paguwa. 
Deuteronomy12:28 Verani mwakukhulupirika pyonsene pinakutongani ine, tenepo pinthu pyanu pyonsene, imwe na pidzukulu pyanu, pinakufambirani mwadidi kwenda na kwenda, thangwi imwe munaphata pinthu pyakulungama pontho pyakukomera MBUYA Mulungu wanu." 
Deuteronomy12:29 “MBUYA Mulungu wanu anavunga madzinza ndzidzi unazungulira imwe dziko yawo kuipokosera, tenepo munaikwata mbamukhazikika mwenemo." 
Deuteronomy12:30 MBUYA angamala vunga madzinza enewa chitani mphole-mphole kuti muleke kuteweza pipembedzo pyawo thangwi pinakhala msampha kuna imwe. Lekani yesa kufuna dziwa mumbapembedzera iwo milungu yawo mule, towera imwembo muchite chibodzi-bodzi." 
Deuteronomy12:31 Lekani pembedza MBUYA Mulungu wanu ninga montho mumbapembedzera iwo milungu yawo, thangwi iwo angapembedza milungu yawo ambachita pinthu pyakunyansa pimbazonda MBUYA pile. Iwo ambapereka nsembe na anawo ene pamoto pamaguwawo ansembe." 
Deuteronomy12:32 “Chitani pyonsene pyakutongani inepi; lekani thimizirapo chinthu na chibodzi chene penu kubulusapo chinthu na chibodzi chene. 
Deuteronomy13:1 “Mprofeti penu nyakuthumbusula ndoto anakwanisa kudumbira kuchita chakudodomesa penu chidzindikiro," 
Deuteronomy13:2 towera kukubausani kuti mupembedze milungu inango yakuti chipo nee mudzati mwaipembedza tayu. Podi kwene kuti pinthu pyadumbira iyepyo pikwane-kwane," 
Deuteronomy13:3 lekani kumvesera na pang'ono pene. MBUYA Mulungu wanu akumphatisa basa kukuyesani ngakhala imwe mumbamfuna MBUYA na mtimanu onsene. 
Deuteronomy13:4 Tewerani MBUYA mbamumgopa; mvereni mbamukoya matongero ache; mpembedzeni mbamukhulupirike kuna iye. 
Deuteronomy13:5 Kwache iphani nyakuthumbusula ndoto penu maprofeti onsene ambakupangani pyakupandukira MBUYA, ule adakupulumusani kudziko ya Iguputo kukhali imwe mabitchu kule. Munthu ninga weneyu ngwakuipa, pontho akuyesa kukubausani kuna makhaliro adakupangani MBUYA kuti mukhale nawo ale. Imwe mwathema kubulusa chakuipa ninga chenechi pakati panu." 
Deuteronomy13:6 “Podi mbaleanu penu mwananu wamamuna penu wamkazi, penu mkazanu wapamtima, penu shamwalianu ponda ndipondembo ene anakwanisa kukunyengererani chibiso-biso kupembedza milungu inango, milungu yakuti chipo imwe nee makolo anu mudzati kuipembedza tayu," 
Deuteronomy13:7 penu ikhale pyayo milungu ya anthu ambakhala chifupi na imwe, penu ya anthu ambakhala kutali na imwe ale." 
Deuteronomy13:8 Lekani kuatawirisa kukunyengezani, penu kuavesera na pang'ono pene. Lekani kuakomera mtima penu kuavera nsisi, pontho lekani kuatchinjiriza." 
Deuteronomy13:9 Apheni! Khalani akutoma kuaponyera miyala, kubuluka penepo anthu anango aaponyere miyala." 
Deuteronomy13:10 Apheni na miyala! Iwo adayesa kukubausani kubuluka kuna MBUYA Mulungu wanu, adakupulumusani kudziko ya Iguputo kukhali imwe mabitchu kule." 
Deuteronomy13:11 Tenepo anthu a ku Aisraele onsene anapiva pidachitikapyo; natenepo iwo anachita mantha pontho nkhabeve mbodzi anachita chinthu chakuipa ninga chenechi tayu. 
Deuteronomy13:12 “Ndzidzi unakhala imwe m'maluwani anakupasani MBUYA Mulungu wanu munakwanisa kuva 
Deuteronomy13:13 kuti amuna anango akusowa basa a m'dzinza mwanu abausa anthu a muluwani mwawo kupembedza milungu inango yakuti chipo nee mudzati mwaipembedza tayu. 
Deuteronomy13:14 Ngakhala imwe munava mbiri ninga yeneyi pivunzeni mwadidi mwene, tenepo ngakhala mphyakuona kuti chakuipachi chachitikadi," 
Deuteronomy13:15 penepo apheni anthu onsene a muluwani yeneyo na pifuyo pyawo pene. Ivungeni luwaniyo monsene mwene. 
Deuteronomy13:16 Gumanyisani pinthu pyonsene pya anthu ambakhala mwenemowo mbamupimuluke pakwecha kati na kati pa chintalo cha muluwaniyo. Tenepo pisani luwani na pyonsene ninga chakupereka kuna MBUYA Mulungu wanu. Iyo yathema kusanduka madembe kwenda na kwenda pontho mbikhonda dzamangwa pontho. 
Deuteronomy13:17 Lekani kupikoyera chinthu na chibodzi chene chile chidathema kuvungika, penepo MBUYA analeka kukuzhangalirani mbakuverani nsisi. Iye anakukomerani mtima mbakuchitisani kukhala akuinjipa ninga mudadumbira iye kuna makolo anu," 
Deuteronomy13:18 ngakhala munavera matongero ache onsene akupasani ine lerowa, mbamuchita pinafuna iye." 
Deuteronomy14:1 “Imwe ndimwe anthu a MBUYA Mulungu wanu. Tenepo mungasintili anyakufa, lekani kupitema mwekha ene penu kuchinga tsisi ninga mumbachitira anthu anango." 
Deuteronomy14:2 Imwe ndimwe anthu a MBUYA Mulungu wanu; iye akusankhulani kuti mukhale anthu ache pakati pa anthu onsene a padziko yapansi ale. 
Deuteronomy14:3 “Lekani kudya chinthu chonsene chokhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu. 
Deuteronomy14:4 Imwe munakwanisa kudya ng'ombe, mabira, mbuzi," 
Deuteronomy14:5 mphoyo, ngoma, mbala, nyasa, mbidzi, penu mphalapala." 
Deuteronomy14:6 Nyama zonsene zile zina njondo zakugawikana pontho zile zimbalukula. 
Deuteronomy14:7 Lekani kudya nyama zokhonda khala na njondo zakugawikana na zokhonda kulukula. Imwe mukukhondeswa kudya nyama za ngamila, sulo, penu mbira. Izo zathema kuyeswa zokhonda chena; izo zimbalukula kwache nkhabe njondo zakugawikana." 
Deuteronomy14:8 Lekani kudya nkhumba. Izo zathema kuyeswa zokhonda chena; izo zina njondo zakugawikana kwache nkhabe lukula tayu. Lekani kudya nyama zenezi penu na kukhuya kwene manungo awo zingafa. 
Deuteronomy14:9 “Imwe munakwanisa kudya nsomba za mtundu onsene zakukhala na chitoto pontho mabade," 
Deuteronomy14:10 mbwenye muleke kudya chinthu chonsene chakukhala m'madzi chakukhonda khala na chitoto pontho mabade; ipyo pyathema kuyeswa pyakukhonda chena. 
Deuteronomy14:11 “Imwe munakwanisa kudya mbalame zonsene zakuchena. 
Deuteronomy14:12 Mbwenye imwe mukukhondeswa kudya mbalame za mtundu ufu: mphamba, dzidzi, gokomola, nyakasenera; tangwe, lezi, khungubwe; mphuwani; nkhukumadzi, magoti, chidokowe, vuwo-vuwo, mphipi; nyachigoti pontho nyakalemwa-lemwa." 
Deuteronomy14:13  
Deuteronomy14:14  
Deuteronomy14:15  
Deuteronomy14:16  
Deuteronomy14:17  
Deuteronomy14:18  
Deuteronomy14:19 “Pirombo ping'ono-ping'ono pyonsene pyakukhala na manthenga mphyokhonda chena; lekani kupidya. 
Deuteronomy14:20 Imwe munakwanisa kudya pyakumbuluka ping'ono-ping'ono pyakuchita kunumpha, thangwi mphyakuchena." 
Deuteronomy14:21 “Lekani kudya nyama yakufa yokha. Alekeni alendo ambakhala pakati panu adye, penu munakwanisa kuzigulisa kuna alendo anango ene. Imwe ndimwe anthu a MBUYA Mulungu wanu; imwe ndimwe anthu ache. “Lekani kuphika mwanabira penu mwanambuzi kubodzi kwene na mkaka wa mache." 
Deuteronomy14:22 “Pambulani chakhumi cha pinthu pya kuminda kwanu chaka na chaka. 
Deuteronomy14:23 Tenepo ndokoni kumbuto ibodzi idasankhula MBUYA Mulungu wanu kuti ikhale yakupembedzerapo ile; penepo pamaso pa MBUYA idyani chakhumi cha mapiranu, vinyu na mafuta aolivi, ana akutoma kubalwa a ng'ombe na mabiranu. Chitani penepi towera imwe mukwanise kudziwa kugopa MBUYA Mulungu wanu ndzidzi onsene." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Ngakhala mbuto yakupembedzerapo ili kutali pyakwanga na misanu kuti imwe muthukule chakhumi cha pinthu pyanu pyakutsanzayisani na MBUYA kwenda kweneko, penepo chitani ipi:" 
Deuteronomy14:25 Gulisani pinthupyo mbamuende na kobirizo kumbuto ibodzi yakupembedzerapo. 
Deuteronomy14:26 Ziphatiseni basa kobirizo papyonsene pinafuna imwe; nyama ya ng'ombe, mwana bira, vinyu na bwadwa. Tenepo imwe na mabanjanu mwathema kudya na kukomerwa pamaso pa MBUYA Mulungu wanu." 
Deuteronomy14:27 “Lekani taya Alevi ambakhala m'maluwani mwanu ale; iwo nkhabe pinthu pyawo pene tayu. 
Deuteronomy14:28 Kumala kwa chaka chachitatu chonsene mudze na chakhumi cha mbewu zanu zonsene mbamupikoye m'maluwani mwanu. 
Deuteronomy14:29 Phoso yeneyi nja Alevi podi iwo nkhabe pinthu pyawo pene tayu, pontho nja alendo, ana masiye na amamfelwa ambakhala m'maluwani mwanu ale. Iwo athema dzakwata pyonsene pinasowa iwo. Chitani penepi, tenepo MBUYA anakutsanzayisani papyonsene pinachita imwe." 
Deuteronomy15:1 “Kumala kwa chaka chachinomwe chonsene, imwe mwathema kufudza mangawa a anthu akufiyalini kobiri." 
Deuteronomy15:2 Ipyo pyathema kuchitwa tenepa. Munthu onsene ule afiyali Muisraele mnzache iye athema kufudza mangawawo; iye hadatheme kumbwezesa kobirizo tayu; MBUYA mwenechiroache alonga kuti mangawa enewa afudzwe. 
Deuteronomy15:3 Imwe munakwanisa kubwezesa mlendo akufiyalini pinthu ule, kwache lekani bwezesa pinthu pyakufiyalini munthu wa dzinzanu." 
Deuteronomy15:4 “MBUYA Mulungu wanu anakutsanzayisani m'dziko inakupasani iyeyi. Nee na mbodzi ene wa imwe anatcherenga tayu 
Deuteronomy15:5 ngakhala imwe munamvera mbamuchita mphole-mphole kuteweza pyonsene pinakupangani ine leropi. 
Deuteronomy15:6 MBUYA anakutsanzayisani ninga mudadumbirira iye. Imwe munafiyalisa kobiri kuna madzinza azinji, kwache imwe nkhabe dzafiyali munthu na mbodzi ene tayu; imwe munakhala na utongi pana madzinza azinji, kwache nkhabe dzinza inafuna dzakhala na utongi pana imwe tayu." 
Deuteronomy15:7 “Ngakhala ibodzi mwa maluwani m'dziko inakupasani MBUYA Mulungu wanu muna Muisraele mnzanu akusowa pinthu, penepo lekani khala anthu akupifuna mwekha ene mbamukhonda kumphedza." 
Deuteronomy15:8 M'mbuto mwache khalani akufewa manja mbamufiyalisa pyonsene pinasowa iye. 
Deuteronomy15:9 Lekani kumkhondera kumfiyalisa pinthu pyanu thangwi chaka chakufudza mangawa chili chifupi. Lekani khala na manyerezero akuipa ninga enewa mumtima mwanu. Ngakhala munakhonda kumfiyalisa iye analira kuna MBUYA, tenepo imwe munayeswa akudawa." 
Deuteronomy15:10 Mpaseni mwakukhonda kumpagalisa pontho mwakukhonda kupifuna mwekha ene, tenepo MBUYA anakutsanzayisani papyonsene pinachita imwe." 
Deuteronomy15:11 Ndzidzi onsene panakhala Aisraele akutcherenga na akusowa, natenepo imwe ndikukutongani kuti muapase mwakufewa manja." 
Deuteronomy15:12 “Ngakhala Muisraele mnzanu wamamuna penu wamkazi anapigulisa yekha ene kuna imwe ninga bitchu mbakuphatirani basa pyaka pitanthatu, imwe mwathema kumsudzula chaka chachinomwe chingakwana kuti aende pyache." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Kwache mungamsudzula, lekani kumgwinya kwawo chimanja-manja." 
Deuteronomy15:14 Mpaseni mwakufewa manja kubulukira pa pinthu pyakutsanzayisani na MBUYA pile; mabira, mapira na vinyu." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Kumbukani kuti imwe mukhalimbo mabitchu m'dziko ya Iguputo, tenepo MBUYA Mulungu wanu, adakusudzulani; ndi thangwi yache ndikukupasani matongerowa." 
Deuteronomy15:16 “Kwache ngakhala bitchu wanu hanafuna pyakwenda tayu; thangwi ambakufunani, imwe na banjanu ene, pontho kuti pikumkomera kukhala namwe." 
Deuteronomy15:17 Mtsamiriseni kumsuwo wa nyumbanu mbamumphola khutu na tchamfondo. Natenepo iye anakhala bitchu wanu ene moyo wache onsene. Chitani chibodzi-bodzi kuna bitchu wamkazi. 
Deuteronomy15:18 Lekani kuona ninga chinthu chakupha kusudzula bitchu; mwenemo iye akuphatirani basa pyaka pitanthatu mbamumpagali theka ya kupagalwi kwa nyaganyo. Chitani penepi, tenepo MBUYA anakutsanzayisani papyonsene pinachita imwe." 
Deuteronomy15:19 “Mpambulireni MBUYA Mulungu wanu anamphulu na anabira onsene akutoma kubalwa; lekani kuziphatisa basa ng'ombe zenezi pontho lekani chinga ubweya wa mabira enewa. 
Deuteronomy15:20 Chaka na chaka imwe na mabanjanu mwathema kupidya pamaso pa MBUYA pambuto ibodzi yakupembedzerapo ile. 
Deuteronomy15:21 Kwache ngakhala pana chinango chakudawika na nyamazo, ngakhala nsakulamala, penu nsakukhonda ona, penu zina chilema, imwe mukukhondeswa kuzipereka nsembe kuna MBUYA Mulungu wanu." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Imwe munakwanisa kudya nyama ninga zenezi m'misa mwanu. Munthu onsene wa imwe wakuchena, penu okhonda chena pamaso pa MBUYA, anakwanisa kudya nyama zenezi, ninga montho mumbadyera iye nyasa penu mphalapala." 
Deuteronomy15:23 Kwache lekani phatisa basa chiropa chawo ninga chakudya; m'mbuto mwache imwe mwathema kuchichusira pansi ninga madzi. 
Deuteronomy16:1 “Mulemedzeni MBUYA Mulungu wanu pakusekera Phwando ya Paska mwezi wa Abibu; ukhali mwezi wenewo udakubulusani iye m'dziko ya Iguputo na mosiku. 
Deuteronomy16:2 Ndokoni kumbuto ibodzi yakupembedzerapo mbamucheke bira penu ng'ombe ya pa Phwando ya Paska kulemedza MBUYA Mulungu wanu. 
Deuteronomy16:3 Ndzidzi unadya imwe pyakudya penepi, lekani kudya na mkate wakukhala na chakufufumisira. Thangwi nsiku zinomwe mukukhondeswa kudya mikate yakukhala na chakufufumisira ninga pidachitira imwe ndzidzi ukhabuluka imwe m'dziko ya Iguputo mwakuchimbiza. Idyani mikate yeneyi; iyo inachemerwa mikate yakusanyika, towera ndzidzi onsene unakhala imwe na moyo mukumbuke nsiku idabuluka imwe m'dziko ya Iguputo, m'dziko ya kusanyika." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Thangwi nsiku zinomwe nee mbodzi wa imwe m'dziko mwanu athema kukhala na chakufufumisira mkate m'nyumba mwache tayu; pontho nyama yakuphiwa na mawulo a nsiku yakutoma yathema kudyiwa mosiku onthowo. 
Deuteronomy16:5 “Iphani nyama za pa Phwando ya Paska pambuto ibodzi yakupembedzerapo, pontho nkhabe panango pene m'dzikomo panafuna kukupasani MBUYA Mulungu wanu tayu. Pichiteni pakuthobila dzuwa, ndzidzi wa nsiku idabuluka imwe m'dziko ya Iguputo ile." 
Deuteronomy16:6  
Deuteronomy16:7 Terekani nyama mbamuidyere pambuto ibodzi yakupembedzerapo; tenepo mangwana mwache na machibese bwererani m'misa mwanu. 
Deuteronomy16:8 Thangwi nsiku zinango zitanthatu imwe mwathema kudya mikate yakusowa chakufufumisira, tenepo pansiku yachinomwe gumanyikanani kupembedza MBUYA Mulungu wanu, pontho lekani phata basa pansiku yeneyo." 
Deuteronomy16:9 “Lengesani madimingu manomwe kubulukira ndzidzi udatoma imwe kuvuna mapiranu," 
Deuteronomy16:10 tenepo musekere Phwando ya Pyakuvuna kulemedza MBUYA Mulungu wanu pakumdzesera pyakupereka na kufuna kwanu malingana na kuinjipa kwa pinthu pyakutsanzasayisani iye napyo. 
Deuteronomy16:11 Komerwani pamaso pa MBUYA, pabodzi pene na ananu, anyabasanu, Alevi, alendo, ana masiye na amamfelwa ambakhala m'maluwani anu ale. Chitani penepi pambuto ibodzi yakupembedzerapo ile." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Onesesani kuti mwavera matongero enewa; lekani duwalira kuti imwe mukhali mabitchu m'dziko ya Iguputo. 
Deuteronomy16:13 “Mungamala kububuda mapira onsene, pontho kutchitchitha vinyu wanu, musekere Phwando ya Misasa nsiku zinomwe." 
Deuteronomy16:14 Komerwani imwe pabodzi pene na ananu, anyabasanu, Alevi, alendo, ana masiye, na amamfelwa ene ambakhala m'maluwani mwanu ale." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Mulemedzeni MBUYA Mulungu wanu pakusekera Phwando ya Misasayi nsiku zinomwe pambuto ibodzi yakupembedzerapo ile. Komerwani thangwi MBUYA atsanzayisa pyakuvuna pyanu na mabasanu ene. 
Deuteronomy16:16 “Amuna onsene a dzinzanu athema kudzapembedza MBUYA katatu pachaka pambuto ibodzi yakupembedzerapoyi; pa Phwando ya Paska, Phwando ya Pyakuvuna na Phwando ya Misasa. Mamuna onsene athema kudza na mitukwa,"
