Deuteronomy16:17 ninga munakwanisira iye malingana na kuinjipa kwa pinthu pidamtsanzayisa na MBUYA Mulungu wanu. 
Deuteronomy16:18 “Sankhulani anyakutonga miseru na mathubu muluwani yonsene inakupasani MBUYA Mulungu wanu. Anthu enewa athema kutonga miseru ya anthu mwakukhonda kuyang'ana nkhope. 
Deuteronomy16:19 Iwo athema khala na chilungamo pontho aleke tonga mwakuyang'ana nkhope, aleke tawira kudyekerwa, thangwi mitukwa imbapha maso na nzeru za munthu pontho anthu akuona mtima ambachitiswa kutonga mwakusowa chilungamo." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Ndzidzi onsene khalani adidi pontho achilungamo, towera mukakwate dziko inakupasani MBUYA Mulungu wanuyi pontho kuti muthimize kukhala mwenemo." 
Deuteronomy16:21 Mungasasanyira MBUYA Mulungu wanu guwa yansembe, lekani ikha m'khundu mwache dzimunthu wamuti wa milungu Ashera." 
Deuteronomy16:22 Pontho lekani kuimisa mwala kuupembedza ninga milungu inango; thangwi ine MBUYA Mulungu wanu ndimbazondana napyo. 
Deuteronomy17:1 “Lekani kupereka nsembe kuna MBUYA Mulungu wanu ng'ombe penu bira wakukhala na chilema; MBUYA ambazondana napyo penepi. 
Deuteronomy17:2 “Tisangize kuti imwe mwava kuti muluwani yanu ibodzi mamuna penu mkazi unango adawira MBUYA pakuswa chiverano cha MBUYA 
Deuteronomy17:3 pakupembedza na kutumikira milungu inango, penu dzuwa, mwezi, penu nyenyezi, pinthu pile mphyakupokanyisana na matongero a MBUYA." 
Deuteronomy17:4 Ngakhala munava pinthu ninga penepi vunza-vunzani mwadidi. Ngakhala mphyakuona kuti chakuipa chenechi chachitikadi mu Israele," 
Deuteronomy17:5 penepo ndokoni na munthuyo kunja kwa luwani mbamumphe na miyala. 
Deuteronomy17:6 Kwache iye athema kuphiwa ngakhala pana mboni ziwiri penu zizinji zakupokanyisana naye; iye hadatheme kuphiwa tayu ngakhala pana mboni ibodzi ene basi. 
Deuteronomy17:7 Mbonizo ndiye zathema kutoma kuponya miyala, kubuluka penepo anthu anangombowo anakwanisa kumponyera miyala; na njira yeneyi imwe munabulusa chakuipa pakati panu." 
Deuteronomy17:8 “Pinakwanisika kuti muluwani mwanu panakhala miseru inango yakunensa kutonga ninga miseru yakukanganirana pinthu, penu kukuwazana, penu miseru yakusiyanisa pakati pa kupha munthu chadala penu mwasusudewu. Penepi pingachitika ndokoni kumbuto ibodzi yakupembedzerako idasankhula MBUYA Mulungu wanu ile," 
Deuteronomy17:9 mbamulonga miseru yanuyo kuna anyansembe a Chilevi pontho na kuna nyakutonga mseru ule akuphata basa pandzidzi wenewo tenepo iwo anatonga mseruwo. 
Deuteronomy17:10 Iwo anatonga mseruwo, penepo imwe mwathema kuchita ninga montho munakupangirani iwomo." 
Deuteronomy17:11 Tawirani kutonga kwawoko, pontho tewezani mwadidi mwene pinakupangani iwo kuti mupichite." 
Deuteronomy17:12 Munthu onsene anawanga mtima kukhonda vera nyakutonga mseru penu nyansembe ali pabuswa ndzidzi wenewoyo athema kuphiwa; na njira yeneyi imwe munabulusa chakuipa ninga chenechi mu Israele. 
Deuteronomy17:13 Penepo munthu onsene anava pya penepi mbachita mantha, tenepo nkhabeve munthu na mbodzi ene anawanga mtima kuchita pinthu ninga penepi tayu." 
Deuteronomy17:14 “Mungamala kupokosera dziko pontho kukhazikika m'dziko inafuna kukupasani MBUYA Mulungu wanu mbamunyerezera kuti munafuna mfumu ninga mumbachitira madzinza onsene akuzungulirani ale," 
Deuteronomy17:15 onesesani kuti munthu anasankhula imwe kukhala mfumu akhale munthu wakusankhulwa na MBUYA. Iye athema kukhala mbodzi wa anthu anu, lekani kuikha mlendo kukhala mfumu wanu." 
Deuteronomy17:16 Mfumu aleke khala na akavalo azinji a nkhondo, pontho iye aleke tuma anthu kwenda ku Iguputo kagula akavalo, thangwi MBUYA alonga kuti anthu ache aleke bwerera ku Iguputo." 
Deuteronomy17:17 Mfumu aleke khala na akazi azinji, thangwi penepi pinamchitisa kubauka kubuluka kuna MBUYA; pontho iye aleke kupifumisa yekha ene na golidi na siliva." 
Deuteronomy17:18 Iye angapita ufumu athema kulemba mwambowu mumpukutu wache ene kubulukira mumpukutu wakukoyiwa na anyansembe a Chilevi. 
Deuteronomy17:19 Iye athema kukoya mpukutuwo chifupi na iye mbauwerenga moyo wache onsene; towera adziwe kulemedza MBUYA pontho kuvera mwakukhulupirika pyonsene pinalonga mwambo na matongerowo. 
Deuteronomy17:20 Penepi pinamchitisa kukhondesa kupinyerezera kuti iye ngwakufunika kupiringana Aisraele anzache, pontho kumchitisa kuvera matongero a MBUYA monsene mwene. Penepo iye anakhala mfumu pyaka pizinji pene pontho pidzukulu pyache pinatonga Israele mifendu mizinji." 
Deuteronomy18:1 “Dzinza ya Alevi, anyansembe ale, akhondeswa kutambira na khundu na ibodzi ene ya dziko ya Israele; m'mbuto mwache iwo athema kudya pyakuperekwa pontho nsembe zinango zakuperekwa kuna MBUYA." 
Deuteronomy18:2 Iwo aleke khala na mbuto yawo ene ninga mumbachitira madzinza anango tayu; khundu yawo ntchidzo chakukhala anyansembe a MBUYA, ninga mudadumbira MBUYA kuna iwo." 
Deuteronomy18:3 “Ndzidzi onsene unaperekwa nsembe za ng'ombe penu mabira, anyansembe athema kupaswa mwendo wakutsogolo, ntchabwada pontho chifu." 
Deuteronomy18:4 Iwo athema kutambira khundu yakutoma ya mapira, vinyu, mafuta aolivi na ubweya wa mabira." 
Deuteronomy18:5 MBUYA adasankhula kubulukira pa madzinzanu onsene dzinza ya Alevi kumtumikira ninga anyansembe kwenda na kwenda. 
Deuteronomy18:6 “Mlevi onsene podi akhale pyache kupi mu Israele anakwanisa kudza kumbuto ibodzi yakupembedzerapo," 
Deuteronomy18:7 penepo anakwanisa kutumikira ninga nyansembe wa MBUYA Mulungu wache, ninga mumbachitira Alevi anango ambatumikira penepo ale." 
Deuteronomy18:8 Iye athema kutambira pyakudya sasawa ninga mumbachitira anyansembe, pontho anakwanisa kukoya pyonsene pinamtumizira banjache." 
Deuteronomy18:9 “Mungadza m'dziko inakupasani MBUYA Mulungu wanuyi, lekani teweza makhaliro akunyansa a madzinza ambakhala mwenemo ale." 
Deuteronomy18:10 Lekani pyereza ananu ninga nsembe; pontho anthu aleke kuombedza, penu kuloteswa, penu kukhumira, penu kuchita pyaufiti," 
Deuteronomy18:11 penu kulodza, pontho lekani kuatawirisa kuchita matsenga, penu kukhumira." 
Deuteronomy18:12 MBUYA Mulungu wanu ambanyansirwa na anthu akuchita pinthu pyakuipa ninga penepi ale. Ndi thangwi yache iye akuthamangisa madzinza enewa m'dzikomo ndzidzi unaenda imwe. 
Deuteronomy18:13 Khalani akukhulupirika monsene mwene kuna MBUYA.” 
Deuteronomy18:14 Kubuluka penepo Mose adalonga mbati, “Anthu a m'dziko ina imwe chifupi kuipokoserayi ambaombedza pontho ambakhumira. Mbwenye MBUYA Mulungu wanu nkhabe tawirisa kuti muchite penepi tayu." 
Deuteronomy18:15 M'mbuto mwache iye anakutumizirani mprofeti ninga ine wakubulukira pakati pa anthu anu onthowa, tenepo imwe mwathema kumvera." 
Deuteronomy18:16 “Nsiku idagumanyikana imwe paphiri ya Sinai, imwe mudapempha kuti muleke kuva pontho fala ya MBUYA Mulungu wanu penu kuona pontho moto ukulu thangwi mukhagopesera kufa." 
Deuteronomy18:17 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, ‘Pyalonga iwo mphyadidi." 
Deuteronomy18:18 Ine ndinaatumizira mprofeti ninga iwe wakubulukira pakati pa anthu awo onthowo; ine ndinampanga pyakuti alonge, tenepo iye anapanga anthu pyonsene pinatonga ine." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Iye analonga na dzinanga, tenepo ine ndinatchunyusa munthu onsene okhonda kumvera." 
Deuteronomy18:20 Mbwenye ngakhala mprofeti anawanga mtima kulonga mphangwa na dzinanga ine ndingakhonda kumpanga kuti achite tenepo, iye athema kufa thangwi ya kuchita tenepo. Ntchibodzi-bodzi kuna mprofeti onsene ule ambalonga na dzina ya milungu inango.’" 
Deuteronomy18:21 “Munakwanisa kulonga mwekha ene kuti tinakwanisa tani kuzidziwa ngakhala mphangwa zinalonga mprofetizi nsakubulukira kuna MBUYA. 
Deuteronomy18:22 Ngakhala mprofeti analonga na dzina ya MBUYA pontho pinalonga iyepyo nkhabe kwana-kwana tayu, zenezo si mphangwa za MBUYA tayu. Mprofeti weneyo alonga na utongi wache ene, tenepo lekani kumgopa." 
Deuteronomy19:1 “MBUYA Mulungu angamala vunga anthu ale mbanachiro dziko inakupasani iye pontho mungamala kwata mizinda na nyumba pontho na kukhazikika mwenemo 
Deuteronomy19:2 gawani dzikoyi khundu zitatu, khundu yonsene yakukhala na mzinda okhonda nensa kuufika. Tenepo munthu anapha mwanzacheyo anakwanisa kuthawira kuubodzi mwa mizinda yeneyo." 
Deuteronomy19:3  
Deuteronomy19:4 Ngakhala munthu apha mwanzache mwasusudewu ule nee si nyamalwache tayu, anakwanisa kuthawira kumzinda ubodzi wa mizinda yeneyi mbakakhala pakupata." 
Deuteronomy19:5 Tisangize tenepa, amuna awiri aenda mumsitu pabodzi pene katema miti; tenepo ngakhala mbodzi wa iwo akutema muti penepo mbadzo yangwirika mbipha munthu unango ule, iye anakwanisa kuthawira ku ubodzi wa mizinda itatuyi towera apulumuse moyo wache." 
Deuteronomy19:6 Ngakhala pana mzinda ubodzi basi pontho nsinzo wakwenda kweneko ngukulu pyakwanga, tenepo mbaleache nyakuphiwayo, ule anafuna pyakubwezera anakwanisa kumphata mbapha munthu okhonda dawa na kuzhangali kwacheko; uku munthu adachita mwasusudewu kupha mwanzache ule si nyamalwache tayu." 
Deuteronomy19:7 Ndi thangwi yache ndikukupangani kuti mupambule mizinda mitatu. 
Deuteronomy19:8 “MBUYA Mulungu wanu angakulisa dziko yanu ninga mudapangira iye makolo anu mbakupasani dziko yonseneyo ninga mudadumbira iye 
Deuteronomy19:9 penepo imwe mwathema kusankhula mizinda inango mitatu. Iye anakupasani dziko yeneyi ngakhala imwe munavera pyonsene pinakutongani ine leropi pontho ngakhala munamfuna MBUYA Mulungu wanu na kuteweza pifunziso pyache. 
Deuteronomy19:10 Chitani penepi towera anthu okhonda dawa aleke kufa pontho kuti muleke konwa thangwi ya kuapha m'dziko inakupasani Mulunguyi. 
Deuteronomy19:11 “Mbwenye tisangize munthu achita pyaupandu kuna nyamalwache mbampha chadala, mbathawira kuubodzi wa mizinda ile," 
Deuteronomy19:12 penepo akadamu a muluwani ya kwawo athema kumtumira mphangwa mbampereka kuna abale ache munthu adaphiwa ule, towera amphembo kubwezera kuphiwa kwa mbaleawo ule." 
Deuteronomy19:13 Lekani kumvera nsisi. Bulusani mu Israele mphandu ninga zenezi towera pyonsene pikufambireni mwadidi. 
Deuteronomy19:14 “Lekani kubulusa chidzindikiro cha madire a tsanthembanu chidakhazikiswa kale ene m'dziko inakupasani MBUYA Mulungu wanuyi. 
Deuteronomy19:15 “Mboni ibodzi si yakukwana kuchitisa munthu wakuchita pyaupandu kukonwa tayu; mbwenye mboni ziwiri penu zitatu ndiye zathema kutsikimizira kuti munthu adawadi. 
Deuteronomy19:16 Ngakhala munthu anayesa kukuwaza mwanzache kumpambizira kuti achita pyaupandu," 
Deuteronomy19:17 uwiriawo athema kwenda kumbuto ibodzi yakupembedzerako kuti akatongwe mseru na anyansembe pontho na atongi akuphata basa pandzidzi wenewo. 
Deuteronomy19:18 Atongi anauona mwadidi mseru wenewo; pontho ngakhala munthu apambizira Muisraele mnzache," 
Deuteronomy19:19 iye athema kutchunyuswa ninga montho mukhafuna kutchunyusirwa nyakupambizirwayo. Na njira yeneyi imwe munabulusa chakuipa ninga chenechi. 
Deuteronomy19:20 Tenepo munthu unango onsene anava pyonsene pyachitikapyo, anachita mantha, tenepo nkhabeve mbodzi anachita chakuipa ninga chenechi tayu." 
Deuteronomy19:21 Pinthu ninga penepi lekani kuva napyo nsisi; kutchunyuswa kwache kwathema kukhala moyo kubweza moyo, diso kubweza diso, dzino kubweza dzino, dzanja kubweza dzanja, dzinyalo kubweza dzinyalo." 
Deuteronomy20:1 “Ngakhala munaenda kamenya nkhondo na anyamalwanu mbamuona pingolo na akavalo pontho anyankhondo akuinjipa kupiringana anu, lekani chita nawo mantha. MBUYA Mulungu wanu ule adakupulumusani kukubulusani m'dziko ya Iguputo anakhala namwe." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Imwe mbamudzati kumenya nkhondo, nyansembe athema kupita patsogolo mbalonga kuna anyankhondo mbati," 
Deuteronomy20:3 ‘Amuna a ku Israele veserani kuno! Lero mukwenda kamenya nkhondo. Lekani chita mantha na anyamalwanu penu kutaya mtima penu kukhala pampani-pani. 
Deuteronomy20:4 MBUYA Mulungu wanu anakhala namwe tenepo iye anakuchitisani kukunda.’ 
Deuteronomy20:5 “Tenepo akadamu analonga kuna amuna kuti, ‘Ayi pana mamuna unango pano ule amalisa kwene kumanga nyumba mbakhonda kuichitisa kukhala yakupambulika? Ngakhala pili tenepo iye athema kwenda pyache m'mudzi gopesera iye angaphiwa pankhondo munthu unango anaichitisa nyumbacheyo kukhala yakupambulika." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Ayi pana unango pano ule abzala kwene munda wamfesa mbakhonda tchola mfesazo? Ngakhala pili tenepo iye athema kwenda pyache m'mudzi, gopesera iye angaphiwa pankhondo munthu unango anasala mbakomerwa na mfesazo." 
Deuteronomy20:7 Ayi pana unango pano ule avunzira kwene? Ngakhala pili tenepo iye athema kwenda pyache m'mudzi, gopesera iye anaphiwa pankhondo munthu unango mbasemba mkazi adavunzira iye kwene ule.’" 
Deuteronomy20:8 “Penepo akadamu ale analonga pontho kuna amuna ale kuti, ‘Ayi pana unango pano ataya mtima pontho akuchita mantha? Ngakhala pili tenepo iye athema kwenda pyache m'mudzi, gopesera anachitisambo anangowo kutaya mtima.’" 
Deuteronomy20:9 Akadamu angamala kulonga kuna anyankhondo ale, pagulu yonsene mkadamu athema kusankhulwa." 
Deuteronomy20:10 Mungaenda kasosa mzinda, chakutoma pasani mwayi anthu a mumzindamo kuimisa manja." 
Deuteronomy20:11 Ngakhala iwo anafungula misuwo ya mpanda mbaimisa manja, penepo iwo athema kukhala mabitchu anu mbakhakhamizwa kukuphatirani basa." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Mbwenye ngakhala anthu a mumzindawo hanaimisa manja tayu, mbasankhula kumenyana namwe, penepo zungulirani mzindawo na anyankhondo anu." 
Deuteronomy20:13 Tenepo MBUYA Mulungu wanu angakutawirisani kukwata mzindawo, iphani amuna onsene mwenemo." 
Deuteronomy20:14 Kwache imwe munakwanisa kupikwatira mwekha ene ana, akazi, pifuyo, na pinthu pyonsene mumzindamo. Imwe munakwanisa kuphatisa basa pinthu pyonsene pya anyamalwanu. MBUYA Mulungu wanu ndiye akupasani penepi." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Mwenemo ndiye mwathema imwe kuchita na mizinda ili kutali na dziko inafuna imwe khazikikamo ile. 
Deuteronomy20:16 “Kwache mungasosa mizinda ya m'dziko inakupasani MBUYA Mulungu wanuyi, iphani munthu onsene." 
Deuteronomy20:17 Vungani anthu onsene monsene mwene: Ahiti, Aamori, Akanani, Aperizi, Ahivi, na Ayebusi ninga mudakupangirani MBUYA." 
Deuteronomy20:18 Apheni towera aleke kukuchitisani kudawira MBUYA pakukufunzisani kuchita pinthu pyonsene pyakuchitisa manyadzo pimbachita iwo pandzidzi umbapembedza iwo milungu yawo pile. 
Deuteronomy20:19 “Mungafuna kupokosera mzinda lekani kugwanda miti ya nsapo, podi kwene kuti nkhondo ikwate ndzidzi ukulu ene. Idyani nsapo, kwache lekani vunga miti yache; mitiyo si anyamalwanu tayu." 
Deuteronomy20:20 Imwe munakwanisa kugwisa miti inango mbamuiphatisa basa kugomolera mpanda kufikirana mzindawo wapokoswa. 
Deuteronomy21:1 “Tisangize kuti munthu agumanwa aphiwa m'munda m'dziko inafuna kukupasani MBUYA Mulungu wanu, mwenemo imwe nkhabe dziwa munthu adamphayo tayu," 
Deuteronomy21:2 akadamu na anyakutonga miseru anu athema kwenda kweneko kapima nsinzo wa pakati pa mbuto idagumanwa mtembo na luwani yonsene ili chifupi. 
Deuteronomy21:3 Tenepo akadamu a muluwani ya chifupiletu na mbuto idagumanwa mtembowo athema kusankhula mwanamphulu ule chipo hadzati phatiswa basa tayu. 
Deuteronomy21:4 Iwo athema kutchithira naye kumbuto ya chifupi na mkulo ule chipo hudzati kupwa tayu pontho kule chipo kudzati limwa penu kubzalwa tayu, penepo iwo athema kwenda kamkhumula khosi." 
Deuteronomy21:5 Anyansembe a Chilevi athema kwendambo kweneko, thangwi iwo athema kutonga mseru onsene wa upandu. MBUYA Mulungu wanu aasankhula kumtumikira pontho kutsanzayisa anthu na dzinache." 
Deuteronomy21:6 Kubuluka penepo akadamu onsene a muluwani ya chifupiletu na mbuto idagumanwa mtembo ule athema kusamba m'manja pana ng'ombe ile mbalonga mbati," 
Deuteronomy21:7 ‘Ife hatidaphe munthuyu tayu, pontho ife nkhabe dziwa munthu adachita penepi tayu." 
Deuteronomy21:8 MBUYA lekererani anthu anu a Israele, adapulumusa imwe kuabulusa ku Iguputo ale. Tilekerereni pontho lekani kutionesa nyatwa thangwi ya kufa kwa munthu okhonda dawa ule.’" 
Deuteronomy21:9 Tenepo pakuchita pinthu pinafuna MBUYA, imwe nkhabe dzaona nyatwa thangwi ya kuphiwa kwa munthuyo tayu." 
Deuteronomy21:10 “MBUYA Mulungu wanu angakuchitisani kukunda pankhondo mbamukwata anyaperezo," 
Deuteronomy21:11 ngakhala munaona pakati pawo mkazi wakubalika mwakuti mwamfuna kuti akhale mkazanu munakwanisa kumkwata. 
Deuteronomy21:12 Idzani naye kumusa kwanu, mpaleni mpala pontho mmengeni ngole zache," 
Deuteronomy21:13 pontho achinje nguwo zache zidavala iye ndzidzi udaphatwa iye. Angamala mwezi wa mumphu m'nyumba mwanu akusintili babache na mache, penepo imwe mwathema kwenda kuna iye kakhala mamunache iyembo mbakhala mkazanu." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Ngakhala imwe munamfunave tayu, imwe mwathema kumsudzula mbaenda pyache konsene kwene kunafuna iye. Lekani kumgulisa penu kumphatisa basa ninga bitchu, thangwi imwe mudamululupisa." 
Deuteronomy21:15 “Tisangize mamuna ana akazi awiri, tenepo onsene uwiriawo abala naye ana achimuna, kwache mwana wautombo si mwana wa mkazache wapamtima pache tayu." 
Deuteronomy21:16 Iye anganyerezera pya kugawa mfumache pakati pa anache, iye aleke siyanisa na mwana wa mkazache wapamtima pache ule pakumpasa khundu idathema mwanache wautombo kutambira." 
Deuteronomy21:17 Iye athema kupereka khundu yakuinjipa kawiri ya mfumache kuna mwanache wautombo podi kwene kuti si mwana wa mkazache wapamtima pache ule tayu. Iye athema kudzindikira chidzo cha mwanache wautombo pakumpasa khundu yathema iye kutambira. 
Deuteronomy21:18 “Tisangize munthu ana mwana wamamuna ule ngwakukula mtima pontho wakupandukira ule nkhabe vera makolo ache podi kwene kuti makolo ache ambamtchunyusa," 
Deuteronomy21:19 makolo ache athema kwenda naye kuna akadamu a luwani imbakhala iyeyo kuti akatongwe mseru. 
Deuteronomy21:20 Iwo athema kulonga kuna iwo mbati, ‘Mwanathuyi ngwakukula mtima pontho wakupandukira, iye nkhabe kutivera tayu; iye ambavunga kobiri pontho ndi dombe.’" 
Deuteronomy21:21 Amuna a muluwani athema kumpha na miyala tenepo imwe munabulusa chinthu chakuipa ninga chenechi. Munthu onsene mu Israele anava pinthu pyachitikapi mbachita mantha. 
Deuteronomy21:22 “Ngakhala munthu aphiwa thangwi ya kuchita pyaupandu pontho mtembo wache wamanikwa pamuti," 
Deuteronomy21:23 mtembo wache nee wathema kugona penepo tayu. Iwo wathema kuikhwa m'masiye nsiku yonthoyo thangwi mtembo wakumanikwa pa muti umbachitisa dziko kutembererwa na Mulungu. Fikhirani mtembowo towera muleke swipisa dziko inakupasani MBUYA Mulungu wanuyi. 
Deuteronomy22:1 “Ngakhala munaona ng'ombe penu bira wa Muisraele mnzanu atayika lekani kumsiya kwene, mbwezeni kuna mwenechiro." 
Deuteronomy22:2 Mbwenye ngakhala mwenechiroache ambakhala kutali pyakwanga penu ngakhala imwe nkhabe kumdziwa mwenechiroache, penepo ndokoni naye pyanu kumusa kwanu. Mwenechiroache angabwera kumsaka, imwe mwathema kumpasa." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Chitani chibodzi-bodzi mungagumana bulu, nguwo penu chinthu chonsene chinataya mwanzanu." 
Deuteronomy22:4 “Ngakhala ng'ombe penu bulu wa mwanzanu agwa, lekani kumuleka kwene, mphedzeni kulamusa biracheyo." 
Deuteronomy22:5 “Akazi mbaleke kuvala nguwo zachimuna, amunambo mbaleke kuvala nguwo zachikazi; MBUYA Mulungu wanu ambanyansirwa na anthu akuchita pinthu ninga penepi." 
Deuteronomy22:6 “Ngakhala munagumana chisa cha mbalame m'muti penu pansi muna mbalame yakhalira mazayi ache penu ina anache penepo lekani kukwata mawoyo. 
Deuteronomy22:7 Imwe munakwanisa kukwata anawo mbamuleka mawoyo kwenda pyache, towera mukhale na moyo wakulapha pontho kuti pinthu pyanu pikufambireni mwadidi." 
Deuteronomy22:8 “Mungamanga nyumba itswa onesesani kuti mwaikha chakutchingira m'khundu-khundu mwa nsoyi, towera muleke dzaona nyatwa munthu unango angagwa mbafa." 
Deuteronomy22:9 “Lekani bzala mbewu za mitundu miwiri m'mundanu wamfesa; ngakhala munachita tenepo pyakuvuna pyakubulukira kuna mbewu zidabzala imwe na mfesa zene pinakhala pyakukhondeswa kuna imwe. 
Deuteronomy22:10 “Lekani limisa ng'ombe yakumangirwa goli pabodzi pene na bulu. 
Deuteronomy22:11 “Lekani vala nguwo yakulukwa na ubweya wa bira pabodzi pene na thonje. 
Deuteronomy22:12 “Sonerani mavulere pankhomo zinayi za nguwo zanu. 
Deuteronomy22:13 “Tisangize mamuna asemba mtsikana, m'nduli mwache iye anyerezera kuti hanamfunave mkazi ule tayu," 
Deuteronomy22:14 penepo iye akupambizira mkaziyo kuti iye akhali mkazi wakudziwa kale mamuna ndzidzi ukhadamsemba iye. 
Deuteronomy22:15 “Ngakhala penepi pinachitika, makolo a mkaziyo athema kukwata nguwo yamathotho a chiropa ikhadavala mkaziyo pansiku yakukazhali kuonesa kuti iye akhali mwali okhonda dziwa mamuna, pontho iwo athema kapionesa akadamu a muluwani m'thando ya miseru." 
Deuteronomy22:16 Babache mkaziyo analonga kuna iwo kuti, ‘Ine ndidasembesa mwananga kuna mamunayi, tenepo iye chinchino nkhabe kumfunave tayu." 
Deuteronomy22:17 Iye ampambizira pakulonga kuti iye akhali mkazi wakudziwa kale mamuna ndzidzi ukhamsemba iye. Apo ngayang'anani chitsikimizo chakuti iye akhali mwali okhonda dziwa mamuna; ngayang'anani mathotho a chiropa panguwo zikhadagonera iwo pansiku idakazhali iwo.’ 
Deuteronomy22:18 Penepo akadamu a muluwaniyo athema kukwata mamunayo mbammenya. 
Deuteronomy22:19 Iwo athema kumpagalisa kobiri zasiliva dzana ibodzi mbapereka kobirizo kuna babache mkaziyo thangwi mamunayo alulupisa mkazi wa Chiisraele. Kuthimiza penepo iye anathimiza basi kukhala mkazache, tenepo iye nkhabe kumuleka tayu moyo wache onsene." 
Deuteronomy22:20 “Kwache ngakhala pinalonga mamunayo mphyakuona, pontho nkhabe chitsikimizo chakuti mkaziyo akhali mwali okhonda dziwa mamuna," 
Deuteronomy22:21 penepo iwo athema kwenda naye kumsuwo wa nyumba ya babache kule kwathema amuna a mumzindawo kumpha na miyala. Iye achita chinthu chakuchitisa manyadzo pakati pa anthu athu pakugonana na mamuna iye mbadzati sembwa, mwenemo iye mbali m'nyumba ya babache. Na njira yeneyi imwe munabulusa chakuipa ninga chenechi." 
Deuteronomy22:22 “Ngakhala mamuna anaphatwa akuchita uputa na mkazi wa munthu unango, onsene uwiriawo athema kuphiwa. Na njira yeneyi imwe munabulusa chakuipa ninga chenechi." 
Deuteronomy22:23 “Tisangize mamuna aphatwa muluwani akuchita uputa na mtsikana ule avunzirwa kale na munthu unango," 
Deuteronomy22:24 penepo imwe mwathema kuabulusira kunja kwa luwani onsene uwiriawo mbamuaphe na miyala. Mtsikanayo athema kuphiwa thangwi iye hadakhuwe tayu kuti anthu amphedze, podi kwene kuti iye akhali muluwani mwakuti mbadakwanisa kuviwa. Tenepo mamuna athema kuphiwa thangwi adachita uputa na mkazi wakuvunzirwa kale. Na njira yeneyi imwe munabulusa chakuipa ninga chenechi." 
Deuteronomy22:25 “Tisangize mamuna aphatirira mtsikana wakuvunzirwa kale na munthu unango, kunja kuminda, mamuna yekha ndiye athema kuphiwa;" 
Deuteronomy22:26 penepo nkhabe chinafuna kuchitwa kuna mtsikana ule, thangwi iye hadachite chinthu chakuthema kuphiwa nacho tayu. Mbwenye mamunayo athema kuphiwa. Mseru wenewu ndi sasawa na munthu wakuphata mwanzache mbampha," 
Deuteronomy22:27 thangwi munthu adaphatirira mtsikana wakuvunzirwa ule, kunja kuminda, pontho podi kwene kuti mtsikanayo adakhuwa kuti anthu amphedze, mbwenye pakhali nkhabe munthu unango wakumpulumusa tayu." 
Deuteronomy22:28 “Tisangize munthu aphatwa akuphatirira mtsikana ule hadavunzirwe tayu. 
Deuteronomy22:29 Penepo mamunayo athema kupagali babache mkazi champhete, kobiri zasiliva makumashanu, pontho iye athema kukhala mkazache thangwi iye adamkhakhamiza kugona naye. Iye nkhabe kwanisa kumwalana naye tayu moyo wache onsene." 
Deuteronomy22:30 “Nkhabe munthu athema kululupisa babache pakuchita uputa na mbodzi wa akazi a babache tayu. 
Deuteronomy23:1 “Nee mamuna wakukapalwi penu wakugwandwa chimuna chonsene athema kukhala nawo pakati pa anthu a Mulungu tayu. 
Deuteronomy23:2 “Nee munthu wakubalwa kudzera mu uputa penu chidzukulu cha munthu ninga weneyu podi na mfendu wachikhumi ene athema kukhala nawo pakati pa anthu a Mulungu tayu. 
Deuteronomy23:3 “Nee munthu wa Chiamoni penu wa Chimoabu, penu na pidzukulu pyawo pene podi na mfendu wachikhumi ene, athema kukhala pakati pa anthu a Mulungu tayu." 
Deuteronomy23:4 Iwo adakhonda kukupasani pyakudya na madzi ndzidzi ukhabuluka imwe kudziko ya Iguputo, tenepo iwo adalemba ganyo Balamu mwana Beori wa kumzinda wa Petori kudziko ya Mesopotamia kukutembererani." 
Deuteronomy23:5 Kwache MBUYA Mulungu wanu hadamvesere Balamu tayu, m'mbuto mwache adasanduza kutemberera kukhala mtsanzayiso thangwi iye adakufunani." 
Deuteronomy23:6 Ndzidzi onsene unakhala imwe na moyo, lekani chita chinthu na chibodzi chene kuphedza madzinza enewa penu kuchitisa pinthu pyawo kuafambira mwadidi." 
Deuteronomy23:7 “Lekani khonda Aedomu, iwo mbabale anu, pontho lekani khonda Aiguputo thangwi ndzidzi unango imwe mudakhala m'dziko mwawo." 
Deuteronomy23:8 Kubulukira mfendu wachitatu kwenda m'tsogolo pidzukulu pyawo pyathema kukhala nawo pakati pa anthu a MBUYA. 
Deuteronomy23:9 “Ngakhala mukukhala mumsasa pandzidzi wa nkhondo imwe mwathema kuthunda chinthu chonsene chile chinakwanisa kukuswipisani pamaso pa MBUYA. 
Deuteronomy23:10 Ngakhala munthu anapiswipisa thangwi mosiku pidalota iye adabuluka umuna, iye athema kwenda kunja kwa mzinda mbakakhala kweneko." 
Deuteronomy23:11 Mawulo angakwana iye athema kusamba tenepo dzuwa ingathobila anakwanisa kubwerera kumsasako. 
Deuteronomy23:12 “Imwe mwathema kukhala na mbuto kunja kwa msasa kule kunakwanisa imwe kwenda kachita chumbudzu. 
Deuteronomy23:13 Kwatani ndodo ninga chibodzi cha pida pyanu, towera mukwanise kutchokhola dzenje ngakhala m'mimba mwavunduka, mungamala penepo fikhirani." 
Deuteronomy23:14 Chitisani msasanu kukhala wakuchena thangwi MBUYA Mulungu wanu ali namwe pamsasapo kukutchinjirizani pontho kukuchitisani kukunda anyamalwanu. Lekani chita chinthu chakunyansa chile chinakwanisa kuchitisa MBUYA kukupasani nkhodolo. 
Deuteronomy23:15 “Ngakhala bitchu anathawa mbuyache mbadza kuna imwe kuti atchinjirizwe, lekani kumpereka kuna mbuyache." 
Deuteronomy23:16 Iye anakwanisa kukhala luwani yonsene inasankhula iye, tenepo lekani kumchitira vinga." 
Deuteronomy23:17 “Nee Muisraele, mamuna penu mkazi athema kusanduka puta wa m'nyumba yakupembedzeramo milungu inango tayu." 
Deuteronomy23:18 Pontho kobiri zakugumanwa kudzera na njira yeneyi nee zathema kudzeswa kunyumba ya MBUYA Mulungu wanu kuchitisa kudumbira kukwana-kwana tayu, MBUYA Mulungu wanu ambanyansirwa napyo." 
Deuteronomy23:19 “Mungafiyalisa kobiri penu pyakudya penu chinthu chinango chene kuna Muisraele mnzanu lekani kumpagalisa na pyakuthimizirapo. 
Deuteronomy23:20 Imwe munakwanisa kupagalisa pyakuthimizirapo mlendo, kwache nee pidafiyalisa imwe Muisraele mnzanu tayu. Verani matongero enewa, tenepo MBUYA Mulungu wanu anatsanzayisa pyonsene pinachita imwe m'dziko inafuna imwe dzapokosera ile." 
Deuteronomy23:21 “Mungadumbira kuna MBUYA Mulungu wanu, lekani dembuka kuchita pidadumbira imwe pile MBUYA anakuvunzani pya kudumbira kwanuko, nkhudawa kukhonda chita pidadumbira imwepyo." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Kukhonda dumbira kuna MBUYA si kudawa tayu; 
Deuteronomy23:23 kwache ngakhala unadumbira kuna MBUYA Mulungu wako na kufuna kwako, onesesa kuti wachita pidalonga iwe na mulomo wako." 
Deuteronomy23:24 “Mungagwanda na njira ya m'munda wamfesa wa munthu unango, imwe munakwanisa kudya mfesazo ninga munafunira imwe kwache lekani kuikha zinango m'budu." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Mungagwanda na njira ya m'munda wa mapira wa munthu unango, imwe munakwanisa kunununa, kwache lekani gwanda mapira na chikwakwa." 
Deuteronomy24:1 “Tisangize mamuna asemba mkazi m'nduli mwache anyerezera kuti hanamfunave tayu, thangwi agumana chinthu chinango muna iye chakukhonda kumkomera, penepo iye akulemba kalata yakumwalana ninga msiku mbampasa, kubuluka penepo mbamgwinya kwawo." 
Deuteronomy24:2 Tenepo tisangize mkazi ule asembwa na mamuna unango 
Deuteronomy24:3 mamuna weneyo mbanyerezerambo kuti hanamfunave tayu mkazi ule, tenepo iye alemba kalata yakumwalanako mbampasa, kubuluka penepo mbamgwinya kwawo. Penu tisangize kuti mamunache wachiwiri ule afa." 
Deuteronomy24:4 Penu na kutani kwene mamunache wakutoma ule aleke kumsemba pontho; kuna iye mkazi ule asanduka okhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu. Ngakhala anamsemba pontho, penepo akudawira MBUYA. Lekani chita chakudawa chakugoswa ninga chenechi m'dziko inafuna kukupasani MBUYA Mulungu wanu." 
Deuteronomy24:5 “Ngakhala mamuna asemba kwene chinchino iye aleke kupita basa ya unyankhondo, penu kupaswa basa inango ene; iye athema khala kwene chaka chamumphu nee kupaswa basa inango tayu, towera akwanise kukhala pamsuwo pache mbachitisa mkazache kukomerwa." 
Deuteronomy24:6 “Ngakhala munabwerekesa munthu unango chinthu imwe nee mwathema kukwata pinyolo libwe yache tayu. Kweneku nkhukwata chinthu chakumphedza pa moyo wache. 
Deuteronomy24:7 “Ngakhala munthu anaba Muisraele mnzache mbamchitisa kukhala bitchu penu kumgulisa ninga bitchu, munthuyo athema kuphiwa. Na njira yeneyi imwe munabulusa chakuipa ninga chenechi." 
Deuteronomy24:8 “Ngakhala muna matanya onesesani kuti mukuchita pyonsene pinakupangani anyansembe a Chilevi; imwe mwathema kuchita mphole-mphole kuteweza pinthu pyakupangani inepi. 
Deuteronomy24:9 Kumbukani pidachita MBUYA Mulungu wanu kuna Miriamu pikhabulukira imwe ku Iguputo. 
Deuteronomy24:10 “Mungabwerekesa chinthu munthu unango, lekani pita m'nyumba mwache kakwata pinyolo chakufinika chache chikhafuna iye kukupasani;" 
Deuteronomy24:11 dikhirani panja kuti iye abwere nacho yekha ene. 
Deuteronomy24:12 Ngakhala iye ngwakutcherenga lekani kagona nacho kwanu. 
Deuteronomy24:13 Kachibwezereni kuna mwenechiroache mawulo onsene, towera akwanise kuona chakufinika. Penepo iye anapereka takhuta kuna imwe, pontho MBUYA Mulungu wanu anakomerwa namwe." 
Deuteronomy24:14 “Lekani dyera nkope-kope nyaganyo wakutcherenga penu wakusowa, penu iye akhale Muisraele penu mlendo wakukhala muluwani ibodzi ya maluwani anu." 
Deuteronomy24:15 Nsiku yonsene dzuwa mbidzati thobila mpagalini pyaphatira iye basa nsiku yeneyo, thangwi iye ngwakutcherenga pontho pananyindira iye mphenepo pene. Ngakhala nee munampagali tayu, iye anakulirirani kuna MBUYA, penepo imwe munadawa." 
Deuteronomy24:16 “Makolo aleke kuphiwa thangwi ya kudawa kumbachita anawo, penu ana kuphiwa thangwi ya kudawa kumbachita makolo awo; munthu athema kuphiwa thangwi ya kudawa kumbachita iye yekha ene." 
Deuteronomy24:17 “Lekani bera alendo pontho ana masiye chidzo chawo; lekani kwata pinyolo chakufinika cha mamfelwa wa pinthu pidafiyali iye kuna imwe. 
Deuteronomy24:18 Kumbukani kuti imwe mukhali mabitchu ku Iguputo pontho kuti MBUYA Mulungu wanu adakusudzulani pa ubitchu; ndi thangwi yache ndakupasani matongero enewa. 
Deuteronomy24:19 “Ngakhala munavuna mbewu zanu mbamuchimwana kututa zonsene lekani bwerera kakwata pontho pyakusalirapyo; ipyo pyathema kukhala pya alendo, ana masiye na amamfelwa, towera MBUYA Mulungu wanu akutsanzayiseni papyonsene pimbachita imwe." 
Deuteronomy24:20 Mungatchola nsapo zanu zaolivi kabodzi; lekani kachita nyabwereza kuvuna zidasalira zile, ipyo pyathema kusiyirwa alendo, ana masiye na amamfelwa." 
Deuteronomy24:21 Mungatuta mfesa zanu kabodzi lekani kwendako pontho kuchita nyambwereza, izo zathema kukhala za alendo, ana masiye na amamfelwa." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Lekani duwalira kuti imwe mukhali mabitchu m'dziko ya Iguputo; ndi thangwi yache ndakupasani matongero enewa. 
Deuteronomy25:1 “Tisangize Aisraele awiri aenda kuna atongi katongwa mseru, mbodzi ayeswa munthu okhonda dawa unangomboyo wakukonwa." 
Deuteronomy25:2 Penepa munthu wakukonwayi athema kutongwa kumenywa; mtongi athema kumgonesa na fufumimba mbapanga anthu kuti amkwapule. Kuinjipa kwa mitswamu kukhale malingana na kudawa kwachita iye. 
Deuteronomy25:3 Iye anakwanisa kukwapulwa na mitswamu makumanayi, kwache ileke piringana penepo; ngakhala inapiringana penepo kweneko nkhumululupisa pakwecha." 
Deuteronomy25:4 “Lekani manga ng'ombe kumulomo ngakhala ikububuda mapira. 
Deuteronomy25:5 “Ngakhala abale awiri akukhala pabodzi pene tenepo mbodzi anafa wakusowa mwana, mamfelwayo aleke sembwa na munthu unango wakumbali. Mbaleache defuntuyo ampite panyumba mkaziyo." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Mwana wautombo anabala mkaziyo athema kuyeswa mwana defuntuyo, towera dzinache ithimize kukhalapo mu Israele." 
Deuteronomy25:7 Kwache ngakhala mbaleache defuntuyo hanafuna pyakumpita panyumba tayu, mkaziyo athema kwenda kuna akadamu a mumzindamo mbalonga mbati, ‘Kunyadoanga akukhonda pyakundipita panyumba, iye akukhonda kupasa mbaleache chidzukulu pakati pa Israele.’" 
Deuteronomy25:8 Penepo akadamuwo anamchemeresa mbalonga naye. Ngakhala iye anathimiza basi kukhonda kumpita panyumba mkaziyo," 
Deuteronomy25:9 mamfelwayo athema kwenda kuna iye pamaso pa akadamu a muluwanimo mbadula nkhwairache ibodzi, kubuluka penepo amphulire mata kunkhope mbalonga mbati, ‘Penepi ndiye pimbachitika kuna munthu okhonda kupasa mbaleache chidzukulu.’" 
Deuteronomy25:10 Banjache inadziwika mu Israele ninga banja ya munthu akhadaduliswa nkhwairache ule. 
Deuteronomy25:11 “Ngakhala amuna awiri akumenyana, penepo mkazi mbodzi angayesa kuphedza mamunache pakuthulula kumaso kwa mamuna unangoyo," 
Deuteronomy25:12 penepo lekani kumvera nsisi; gwandani mkono wache. 
Deuteronomy25:13 “Lekani kubera mwanzanu pakuphatisa basa midida yakunama. 
Deuteronomy25:14  
Deuteronomy25:15 Phatisani basa midida yakuona, towera mukhale na moyo wakulapha m'dziko inakupasani MBUYA Mulungu wanu." 
Deuteronomy25:16 MBUYA Mulungu wanu ambanyansirwa na munthu wakuba na njira yeneyi. 
Deuteronomy25:17 “Kumbukani pidachita Aamaleki kuna imwe pikhali imwe m'dziko ya Iguputo. 
Deuteronomy25:18 Iwo hakhagopa Mulungu tayu, tenepo iwo adakusosani ndzidzi udatopa imwe na kusowa mphamvu ule, mbapha onsene akhadzedzereka m'nduli ale." 
Deuteronomy25:19 Natenepo MBUYA Mulungu wanu angakupasani dziko mbakutchinjirizani kuna anyamalwanu onsene akuzunguliraniwa onesesani kuti mwapha Aamaleki onsene, towera paleke khala munthu na mbodzi ene wakuakumbuka. Lekani duwalira!" 
Deuteronomy26:1 “Mungamala kwata dzikoyi kukhala yanu ene, dziko inakupasani MBUYA Mulungu wanuyi mbamukhala m'dzikomo," 
Deuteronomy26:2 munthu onsene wa imwe athema kukwatira m'chitundu khundu yakutoma ya mbewu yonsene inavuna imwe mbamuende nayo kumbuto ibodzi yakupembedzerapo ile. 
Deuteronomy26:3 Ndokoni kuna nyansembe ali pabasa ndzidzi wenewo mbamulonga kuna iye kuti, ‘Lero ndikutawira kuna MBUYA Mulungu wanga kuti ndapita m'dziko idadumbira MBUYA kuna makolo athu ile.’" 
Deuteronomy26:4 “Nyansembe ule anakwata chitundu kuna iwe mbachiikha patsogolo pa guwa yansembe ya MBUYA Mulungu wako. 
Deuteronomy26:5 Penepo pamaso pa MBUYA ulonge mafala awa: ‘Kholo yanga akhali Muaramu manzenza, ule adakwata banjache mbakakhala kudziko ya Iguputo. Iwo akhali akuchepa ndzidzi ukhaenda iwo kweneko, kwache iwo adasanduka dzinza ikulu pontho ya mphamvu." 
Deuteronomy26:6 Aiguputo adatichitira vinga mbatikhakhamiza kuphata basa ninga mabitchu. 
Deuteronomy26:7 Tenepo ife tidalira kuna MBUYA Mulungu wa makolo athu kuti atiphedze. Iye adativa mbaona kusanyika kwathu, nyatwa zathu na kutsukwala kwathu." 
Deuteronomy26:8 Na mphamvu zache zikulu iye adatipulumusa kubuluka mu Iguputo. Iye adachita pidzindikiro na pyakudodomesa mbachitisa kuti pinthu pyakugoswa pichitike. 
Deuteronomy26:9 Iye adatidzesa kuno mbatipasa dziko yamphonjeyi. 
Deuteronomy26:10 Natenepo chinchino ndikudza kuna MBUYA na khundu yakutoma ya pyakuvuna pyandipasa iye.’ “Kubuluka penepo tchithisa chitundu pamaso pa MBUYA mbamumpembedze penepo. 
Deuteronomy26:11 Komerwani thangwi ya pinthu pyakupasani MBUYA Mulungu wanu imwe na banjanu; pontho Alevi na alendo ambakhala pakati panu ale asekerembo namwe pabodzi. 
Deuteronomy26:12 “Chaka chachitatu chonsene perekani chakhumi cha mbewu zanu kuna Alevi, alendo, ana masiye na amamfelwa, towera m'banja monsene iwo akhale na pyakudya pinasowa iwo. Imwe mungachita penepi" 
Deuteronomy26:13 longani kuna MBUYA kuti, ‘Nkhabe chakhumi na chibodzi chene chasalira m'nyumba mwanga tayu. Ine ndachipereka kuna Alevi, alendo, ana masiye na amamfelwa ninga mudanditongera imwe kuchita. Ine sidakhonde kuvera penu kuduwalira matongero anu akulonga pya chakhumi tayu." 
Deuteronomy26:14 Ine sidadye na chibodzi chene tayu ndzidzi ukhasintili ine. Ine sidapambule chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu ndzidzi ukhali ine okhonda chena; nee sidapereke khundu inango kuna anyakufa tayu. Ine ndakuverani MBUYA; ine ndachita pyonsene pya chakhumi pidanditonga imwe pile. 
Deuteronomy26:15 Yang'anani pansi kubulukira kumbuto yanu yakuchena kudzulu mbamutsanzayise anthu anu a Israele; tsanzayisani dziko yamphonjeyi ninga mudadumbira imwe kuna makolo athu.’ 
Deuteronomy26:16 “Lero MBUYA Mulungu wanu akukupangani kuti muvere mwambo wache onsene; tenepo uvereni mwakukhulupirika na mtimanu onsene. 
Deuteronomy26:17 Lero mwamtawira MBUYA kukhala Mulungu wanu; imwe mwadumbira kumvera, kukoya mwambo wache onsene pontho na kuchita pyonsene pimbatonga iye." 
Deuteronomy26:18 Lero MBUYA akutawirani kukhala anthu ache ene ninga mudadumbira iye kuna imwe; tenepo iye akukutongani kuvera mwambo wache onsene. 
Deuteronomy26:19 Iye anakuchitisani kukhala dzinza ikulu kupiringana dzinza inango yonsene yalenga iye, natenepo imwe munadzesa ukulu, mbiri na chilemedzo kuna dzinache. Imwe munakhala anthu ache ninga mudadumbira iye.”" 
Deuteronomy27:1 Mose pabodzi pene na akadamu a ku Israele adalonga kuna anthu mbati, “Verani matongero onsene anakupasani ine lerowa." 
Deuteronomy27:2 Nsiku idawambuka imwe mkulo wa Yorodani mbamupita m'dziko inakupasani MBUYA Mulungu wanu ile imwe mwathema kuikha mulu wa miyala, muuzirime" 
Deuteronomy27:3 mbamulembepo mwambo onsene na pifunzisopi. Mungapita m'dziko yamphonje idadumbira MBUYA Mulungu wa makolo anu kuna imwe ile," 
Deuteronomy27:4 mwenemo imwe muli kumtunda unango wa mkulo wa Yorodani, ikhani mulu wa miyala paphiri ya Ebali, ninga munakupangirani ine lero mbamuuzirima." 
Deuteronomy27:5 Mangani penepo guwa yansembe yamiyala yokhonda semwa na simbi," 
Deuteronomy27:6 thangwi guwa yonsene ya nsembe inamangira imwe MBUYA Mulungu wanu yathema kumangwa na miyala yokhonda semwa mbamupereka nsembe zakupyerera kuna MBUYA Mulungu wanu. 
Deuteronomy27:7 Penepo perekani nsembe zanu, pontho idyani nsembe zanu zachiphatizano mbamukomerwe pamaso pa MBUYA Mulungu wanu." 
Deuteronomy27:8 Pamiyala yazirima imwe ile lembani mwakuoneka mwadidi mafala onsene a mwambo wa Mulungu.” 
Deuteronomy27:9 Tenepo Mose pabodzi pene na anyansembe a Chilevi adalonga kuna Aisraele onsene mbati, “Ikhani makutu anu kuno, imwe Aisraele mbamundivesere. Lero mwasanduka anthu a MBUYA Mulungu wanu;" 
Deuteronomy27:10 natenepo mvereni mbamukoya mwambo wache onsene unakupasani ine lerowu.” 
Deuteronomy27:11 Tenepo Mose adalonga kuna Aisraele mbati," 
Deuteronomy27:12 “Mungawambuka mkulo wa Yorodani madzinza a Simioni, Levi, Yuda, Isakara, Yosefe, na Benjemani athema kuimira paphiri ya Gerizimu kutsanzayisa anthu." 
Deuteronomy27:13 Madzinza a Rubeni, Gadi, Asheri, Zebuloni, Dani na Nafitali athema kuimira paphiri ya Ebali kulalika dzedze." 
Deuteronomy27:14 Alevi analonga mafalawa mwakugaluza fala: 
Deuteronomy27:15 “‘Dzedze kuna munthu onsene anasasanya mfanikizo wamwala, wamuti penu wantove mbapipembedza chibiso-biso. MBUYA ambazonda kupembedza mifanikizo.’ “Natenepo anthu onsene anatawira kuti, ‘Ande, mbapikhale tenepo!’" 
Deuteronomy27:16 “‘Dzedze kuna munthu onsene anakhonda lemedza babache na mache.’ “Natenepo anthu onsene anatawira kuti, ‘Ande, mbapikhale tenepo!’" 
Deuteronomy27:17 “‘Dzedze kuna munthu onsene anafudza chidzindikiro cha madire a tsanthembache.’ “Natenepo anthu onsene anatawira kuti, ‘Ande, mbapikhale tenepo!’" 
Deuteronomy27:18 “‘Dzedze kuna munthu onsene anaphata boli-boli nsenji mbamuendesa m'tsanga.’ “Natenepo anthu onsene anatawira kuti, ‘Ande, mbapikhale tenepo!’" 
Deuteronomy27:19 “‘Dzedze kuna munthu onsene anadyera nkope-kope mlendo, ana masiye na amamfelwa.’ “Natenepo anthu onsene anatawira kuti, ‘Ande, mbapikhale tenepo!’" 
Deuteronomy27:20 “‘Dzedze kuna munthu onsene analulupisa babache pakugonana na mbodzi wa akazi a babache.’ “Natenepo anthu onsene anatawira kuti, ‘Ande, mbapikhale tenepo!’" 
Deuteronomy27:21 “‘Dzedze kuna munthu onsene anachita pyakuzuda na nyama.’ “Natenepo anthu onsene anatawira kuti, ‘Ande, mbapikhale tenepo!’" 
Deuteronomy27:22 “‘Dzedze kuna munthu onsene anagonana na nyamaingache penu nyamaingache wakunjira.’ “Natenepo anthu onsene anatawira kuti, ‘Ande, mbapikhale tenepo!’" 
Deuteronomy27:23 “‘Dzedze kuna munthu onsene anagonana na mebzalache.’ “Natenepo anthu onsene anatawira kuti, ‘Ande, mbapikhale tenepo!’" 
Deuteronomy27:24 “‘Dzedze kuna munthu onsene anachita pyaupandu chibiso-biso.’ “Natenepo anthu onsene anatawira kuti, ‘Ande, mbapikhale tenepo!’" 
Deuteronomy27:25 “‘Dzedze kuna munthu onsene anatambira kobiri kuti aphe munthu okhonda dawa.’ “Natenepo anthu onsene anatawira kuti, ‘Ande, mbapikhale tenepo!’" 
Deuteronomy27:26 “‘Dzedze kuna munthu onsene anakhonda vera mwambo onsene wa Mulungu na pifunziso pyache pene.’ “Natenepo anthu anatawira kuti, ‘Ande, mbapikhale tenepo!’" 
Deuteronomy28:1 “Ngakhala munavera MBUYA Mulungu wanu mbamukoya mwakukhulupirika matongero ache onsene anakupasani ine lerowa, iye anakuchitisani kukhala dzinza ikulu pyakwanga kupiringana dzinza inango yonsene padziko yapansi." 
Deuteronomy28:2 Verani MBUYA Mulungu wanu natenepo mtsanzayiso onsenewu unakhala wanu: 
Deuteronomy28:3 “MBUYA anatsanzayisa maluwani anu na mindanu ene. 
Deuteronomy28:4 “MBUYA anakutsanzayisani na ana azinji, mbewu zizinji pontho na ng'ombe na mabira azinji." 
Deuteronomy28:5 “MBUYA anatsanzayisa pyakuvuna pyanu pontho na pyakudya pinasasanya imwe kubulukira kupyakuvunapyo. 
Deuteronomy28:6 “MBUYA anatsanzayisa pyonsene pene pimbachita imwe. 
Deuteronomy28:7 “MBUYA anakunda anyamalwanu angakusosani. Iwo anakusosani kubulukira kukhundu ibodzi, kwache anakuthawani kukhundu zonsene." 
Deuteronomy28:8 “MBUYA Mulungu wanu anatsanzayisa basanu mbachitisa pikwa pyanu kudzala na phoso. Iye anakutsanzayisani m'dziko inakupasani iyeyi. 
Deuteronomy28:9 “Ngakhala munavera MBUYA Mulungu wanu mbamuchita pyonsene pinakutongani iye, anakuchitisani kukhala anthu ache ninga mudadumbira iye." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Tenepo madzinza onsene a padziko yapansi anadziwa kuti MBUYA akusankhulani kuti mukhale anthu ache, natenepo iwo anachita namwe mantha." 
Deuteronomy28:11 MBUYA anakupasani ana azinji, ng'ombe zizinji pontho mbewu zizinji m'dziko idadumbira iye kuna makolo anu ile." 
Deuteronomy28:12 Iye anavumbisa mvula pandzidzi wache kubulukira m'nyumba zimbakoyeramo iye mfumache kudzulu mbatsanzayisa basanu yonsene, towera mufiyalise kuna madzinza azinji, kwache imwe nkhabe dzafiyali kuna iwo tayu." 
Deuteronomy28:13 MBUYA Mulungu wanu anakuchitisani kukhala mkadamu pakati pa madzinza nee nyakutewera tayu; ndzidzi onsene pinthu pyanu pinakufambirani mwadidi pontho nee munapichimwana tayu ngakhala munavera mwakukhulupirika matongero ache onsene anakupasani ine lerowa. 
Deuteronomy28:14 Imwe mwathema kuavera monsene mwene pontho lekani kupembedza penu kutumikira milungu inango. 
Deuteronomy28:15 “Mbwenye mungakhonda vera MBUYA Mulungu wanu mbamukhonda koya matongero ache na mwambo wache onsene mwakukhulupirika pinakupasani ine leropi, pyakuipa pyonsene pili m'tchindemu pinakugwerani:" 
Deuteronomy28:16 “MBUYA anatemberera maluwani anu na mindanu ene. 
Deuteronomy28:17 “MBUYA anatemberera mapiranu pontho na pyakudya pyonsene pyakusasanywa kubulukira kumapirawo. 
Deuteronomy28:18 “MBUYA anakutembererani pakukupasani ana akuchepa, mbewu zakupupwa pontho ng'ombe na mabira pyakuchepa." 
Deuteronomy28:19 “MBUYA anatemberera pyonsene pene pimbachita imwe. 
Deuteronomy28:20 “Ngakhala munachita pyakuipa mbamukhonda MBUYA, iye anadzesa nyatwa pana imwe pontho kuzunguzika pana pyonsene pimbachita imwe kufikirana imwe mwavungika kabodzi kene pontho monsene mwene." 
Deuteronomy28:21 Iye anadzesa utenda pana imwe mwakundondolozana kufikirana paleke sala munthu na mbodzi ene m'dziko ili imwe chifupi kuipokosera ile. 
Deuteronomy28:22 MBUYA anakusanyisani na utenda wakupasirana, pitupira pontho na anyampwanda, na kupisa thangwi ya kusowa kwa mvula pontho mphepo yambalu, na utenda wa mbewu, pile pinakunensani kufikirana mupuluzikiretu." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Mvula nkhabe dzavumba na pang'ono pene tayu, pontho mataka anasanduka akuwanga ninga simbi." 
Deuteronomy28:24 M'mbuto mwa mvula MBUYA anavumbisa chonzi cha fumbi na tchetcha kufikirana imwe monsene mumale vungika. 
Deuteronomy28:25 “MBUYA anachitisa anyamalwanu kukukundani. Imwe munaasosa kubulukira kukhundu ibodzi, kwache imwe munaathawa kukhundu zonsene, tenepo anthu onsene a padziko yapansi anachita mantha angaona pinthu pyakuchitikiranipyo." 
Deuteronomy28:26 Mungafa mbalame na nyama zam'tsanga zinadya manungo anu, tenepo panakhala nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene wakuzizwinga tayu." 
Deuteronomy28:27 MBUYA anadzesa anyakadumu pana imwe ninga mudachitira iye kuna Aiguputo. Iye anachitisa manungo anu kubuluka pisungu. Anadzala na mphere mbamuva kufika kule kunakhonda imwe kukwanisa kukuwangisa. 
Deuteronomy28:28 MBUYA anakuchitisani kukhala na nsala, uboli-boli pontho na kuzunguza manyerezero anu." 
Deuteronomy28:29 Dzuwa mwenemo ikuswa miti imwe munamphamphasa ninga boli-boli, tenepo imwe nkhabe dzakwanisa kugumana njira tayu. Pinthu pyanu pyonsene pinachita imwe nkhabe kukufambirani mwadidi tayu. Imwe munaponderezwa pontho kuberwa pinthu pyanu nsiku na nsiku mbamusowa munthu na mbodzi ene wakukuphedzani." 
Deuteronomy28:30 “Imwe munavunzira mkazi, kwache munthu unango ndiye anafuna dzamsemba. Imwe munamanga nyumba, kwache nkhabe dzakhalamo tayu. Imwe munalima mfesa, kwache imwe nkhabe dzadya nsapo zachezo tayu." 
Deuteronomy28:31 Ng'ombe zanu zinachekwa imwe mukuona maso, kwache imwe nkhabe dzadya nyamayo tayu. Mabulu anu anakwekwetwa imwe mukuona maso, kwache iwo nkhabe dzabwezerwa tayu. Mabiranu anaperekwa kuna anyamalwanu mbapasowa munthu na mbodzi ene wakukuphedzani." 
Deuteronomy28:32 Ananu achimuna na achikazi anaperekwa kuna alendo ninga mabitchu imwe mukuona maso. Nsiku na nsiku maso anu anakhala kunjira kulira kuyang'ana kwene kuti mwinango ananuwo anabwerera. 
Deuteronomy28:33 Dzinza yachilendo inakwata mbewu zanu zonsene zaphatira imwe basa mwakuwangisa kuzilima mbamukhonda dzatambira chinthu na chibodzi chene, mbwenye kuponderezwa na kuchitirwa vinga nsiku na nsiku." 
Deuteronomy28:34 Kusanyika kwanu kunakuyalusani. 
Deuteronomy28:35 MBUYA anachitisa miyendo yanu kudzala na anyakadumu okhonda kuva mtombwe, kubulukira kumsolo mpakana kumanyalo." 
Deuteronomy28:36 “MBUYA anakuendesani imwe na mafumu anu kudziko yachilendo yakuti chipo nee imwe penu makolo anu adzati khalako tayu. Kweneko munatumikira milungu yakusasanywa na muti pontho mwala. 
Deuteronomy28:37 Kumadziko kunafuna kukubalalisani MBUYA ale, anthu a kweneko anatutumuka na pinthu pyakuchitikiranipyo, mwakuti anakusekani na kukusedegulani." 
Deuteronomy28:38 “Imwe munabzala mbewu zizinji kwache munavuna pyakuchepa, thangwi nyadzombe anadya mbewuzo." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Imwe munabzala minda yamfesa, kwache nkhabe gumanya mfesazo, penu kumwa vinyu wakubulukira mfesazo tayu, thangwi mfunye zinadya mfesazo." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Miti yaolivi inamera ponsene pene m'dziko, kwache imwe nkhabe dzaphatisa basa mafutache tayu, thangwi nsapozo zinambwera pansi." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Imwe munakhala na ana achimuna na achikazi, kwache nkhabe dzakhala nawo tayu, thangwi iwo anakwatwa ninga mabitchu pankhondo." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Miti yanu yonsene na mbewu zanu zonsene zinadyiwa na nyadzombe. 
Deuteronomy28:43 “Alendo ambakhala m'dziko mwanu ale anathimiza kukhala na mphamvu, mwenemo imwe mukuthimiza kukhala akusowa mphamvu." 
Deuteronomy28:44 Iwo anakhala na kobiri zakukufiyalisani, kwache imwe munasowa kobiri yakuti muafiyalisembo. Pakumalisira pache imwe munakhala pansi pa utongi wawo." 
Deuteronomy28:45 “Muliri onsenewu unagwa pana imwe kufikirana mwamala vungwa, thangwi imwe nee mwavera MBUYA Mulungu wanu, pontho mwambo wache onsene udakupasani iye ule tayu." 
Deuteronomy28:46 Ipyo pinakhala umboni yakukutongani kunafuna dzachita Mulungu pana imwe na pidzukulu pyanu kwenda na kwenda. 
Deuteronomy28:47 MBUYA adakutsanzayisani monsene mwene, kwache imwe nee mwamtumikira na mtima wakusekera pontho wakukomerwa tayu." 
Deuteronomy28:48 Natenepo imwe munatumikira anyamalwanu anafuna kukutumizirani MBUYA ale. Imwe munakhala na njala, nyota, usiwa mbamusowa pinthu pyonsene. MBUYA anakuboneresani mwavinga kufikirana imwe mwamala vungwa." 
Deuteronomy28:49 MBUYA anakudzeserani dzinza kubulukira kumadolomero a dziko yapansi, anthu akuti chilongero chawo imwe nkhabe kuchidziwa tayu. Iwo anaphama pana imwe ninga mphamba." 
Deuteronomy28:50 Iwo anakhala amtima mbakhonda dzavera nsisi munthu na mbodzi ene, mkulu penu mwana." 
Deuteronomy28:51 Iwo anadya pifuyo pyanu na mbewu zanu, tenepo imwe munafa na njala. Iwo nkhabe dzasiya mapira, vinyu, mafuta aolivi, pifuyo penu mabira na pang'ono pene tayu; imwe munafa." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Iwo anasosa luwani yonsene m'dziko inakupasani MBUYA Mulungu wanuyi, pontho mipanda yonsene yakulapha yakuzungulira inanyindira imweyi inagomolwa." 
Deuteronomy28:53 “Anyamalwanu angazungulira m'maluwani anu, imwe munanenseka pyakwanga kusowa pyakudya mwakuti munadya ana akupasani MBUYA ale." 
Deuteronomy28:54 Podi na munthu wakufunika ene pontho wanzeru ananenseka pyakwanga ndzidzi wenewu mwakuti anadya anache ene, thangwi ya kusowa pyakudya. Iye nkhabe dzapereka na pang'ono pene kuna mbaleache, mkazache ambafuna iye ule, penu kuna anache akusalira na moyo ale tayu." 
Deuteronomy28:55  
Deuteronomy28:56 Podi na mkazi ene wakufulika pontho wanzeru; wanzeru pontho wakufulika pyakwanga wakuti chipo hadzati famba na manyalo ache tayu, ananenseka pyakwanga pandzidzi wa nyatwawu mwakuti anadya chibiso-biso mwanache wa m'chikuta na anache akukula kale. Iye nkhabe dzagawana na mamunache ambafuna iye ule, penu na mbodzi ene wa anache anango tayu." 
Deuteronomy28:57  
Deuteronomy28:58 “Ngakhala munakhonda vera mwakukhulupirika pifunziso pyonsene pya Mulungu pyalembwa m'bukhuyi pontho ngakhala munakhonda lemedza dzina yakudodomesa pontho yakugopeka ya MBUYA Mulungu wanu," 
Deuteronomy28:59 iye anagwisa pana imwe pontho na pana pidzukulu pyanu utenda okhonda kuva mtombwe, pontho na miliri yakugoswa yokhonda mala." 
Deuteronomy28:60 Iye anadzesa pontho pana imwe utenda wakupha ninga udaona imwe ku Iguputo ule, tenepo imwe nkhabe dzawanga tayu." 
Deuteronomy28:61 Iye anatumiza pontho mtundu onsene wa utenda na miliri pile nee pyalembwa m'bukhu ya pifunziso na mwambo wa Mulungu tayu, tenepo imwe munamala vungwa." 
Deuteronomy28:62 Podi kwene kuti imwe muinjipe ninga nyenyezi zakuthambo, akuchepa a imwe ndiye anafuna dzasalira na moyo, thangwi imwe hamudavere MBUYA Mulungu wanu tayu." 
Deuteronomy28:63 Pidamkomera MBUYA kuchitisa pinthu pyanu kufamba mwadidi pontho kukuchitisani kuinjipa, sasawambo pinamkomera kukuvungani pontho kukupuluzani. Imwe munabuluswa m'dziko inafuna imwe kwata kukhala yanu ene ile." 
Deuteronomy28:64 “MBUYA anakubalalisani pakati pa madzinza onsene kubulukira kumadolomero mpakana kumadolomero anango a dziko yapansi, kweneko munatumikira milungu yakusasanywa na muti pontho mwala, milungu yakuti chipo nee imwe penu makolo anu mudzati mwaipembedza tayu." 
Deuteronomy28:65 Pakati pa madzinza anango imwe nkhabe dzagumana mtendere tayu. Nkhabe mbuto inafuna imwe dzalonga kuti njanu ene tayu; MBUYA anakuchitisani kukhala akusanyika mumtima, akusowa chidikhiro pontho akutaya mtima." 
Deuteronomy28:66 Moyo wanu ndzidzi onsene unakhala panyatwa zakugoswa. Mosiku na masikati munachita mantha pikulu pene, pontho munachita mantha na imfa kwenda na kwenda." 
Deuteronomy28:67 Mtimanu unadzala na mantha thangwi ya pinthu pyonsene pinaona imwe; machibese onsene munakhumba kuti kunja kudoke; na mawulombo munakhumba kuti kunja kuchene. 
Deuteronomy28:68 MBUYA anakubwezerani pontho kudziko ya Iguputo m'miyadiya mikulu-mikulu, podi kwene kuti iye adalonga kuti nkhabe dzabwererave pontho kweneko tayu. Kweneko munapipereka mwekha ene kupigulisa ninga mabitchu a anyamalwa anu, kwache nkhabe mbodzi anafuna kukugulani tayu.”" 
Deuteronomy29:1 Penepi mphinthu pya chiverano pidatonga MBUYA kuti Mose achichite na Aisraele m'dziko ya Moabu; pyonsenepi pikhali kuthimizira pachiverano chidasasanya MBUYA na iwo paphiri ya Sinai chile. 
Deuteronomy29:2 Mose adachemeresa anthu onsene pabodzi pene mbalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Imwe mudapiona mwekha ene pinthu pidachita MBUYA kuna mfumu wa ku Iguputo, mathubu ache na kuna dziko yache yonsene." 
Deuteronomy29:3 Imwe mudaona miliri yakugoswa, pidzindikiro na pyakudodomesa pikulu pidachita MBUYA pile." 
Deuteronomy29:4 Kwache na lero ene iye hadakutawiriseni kuvesa pinthu pidakuchitikirani pile tayu. 
Deuteronomy29:5 Pyaka makumanayi MBUYA adakutsogolerani kugwanda na m'thando yatchetcha, tenepo nguwo zanu pontho nkhwaira zanu hapidasakale tayu." 
Deuteronomy29:6 Imwe mudasowa mkate kuti mudye penu vinyu kuti mumwe penu bwadwa kuti mumwe, kwache MBUYA adakupasani pyakusowa pyanu towera akufunziseni kuti iye ndi Mulungu wanu." 
Deuteronomy29:7 Pidafika ife kumbuto yeneyi, Mfumu Sihoni wa ku Heshiboni, pontho Mfumu Ogi wa ku Bashani adadza dzachita nafe nkhondo kwache ife tidaakunda," 
Deuteronomy29:8 ife tidakwata dziko yawo mbatigawira madzinza a Rubeni na Gadi pontho khundu ibodzi ya dzinza ya Manase. 
Deuteronomy29:9 Verani mwakukhulupirika pinthu pyonsene pya m'chiveranochi, towera mukhale anthu akupikwanisa papinthu pyonsene pinachita imwe." 
Deuteronomy29:10 “Lero imwe mukuimira pamaso pa MBUYA Mulungu wanu, imwe monsene; akadamu anu, mathubu anu, amunanu," 
Deuteronomy29:11 akazanu, ananu na alendo ambakhala pakati panu kukutemerani nkhuni na kukutungirani madzi ale." 
Deuteronomy29:12 Imwe muli pano lero kuchita chiverano chinasasanya MBUYA Mulungu wanu na imwechi na kutawira matongero ache," 
Deuteronomy29:13 towera MBUYA apitsikimizire kuti chinchino imwe ndimwe anthu ache, pontho iye mbakhala Mulungu wanu, ninga mudadumbira iye kuna makolo anu Abrahamu, Isake, na Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Imwe si imwe mwekha ale anasasanya na MBUYA chiverano chenechi pontho na matongero ache tayu. 
Deuteronomy29:15 Iye akuchisasanya na tonsene ife tikuimira pano pamaso pache lerofe, pontho na pidzukulu pyathu pile pidzati balwa tayu." 
Deuteronomy29:16 “Imwe mukupidziwa mule mukhakhalira ife m'dziko ya Iguputo, pontho na mule mudagwanda ife na m'madziko anango." 
Deuteronomy29:17 Imwe mudaona pakati pawo mifanikizo yakuchitisa manyadzo yakusasanya na muti, mwala, siliva na golidi." 
Deuteronomy29:18 Onesesani kuti nee mamuna, mkazi, banja penu dzinza tayu anaimira pano lero abauka kubuluka kuna MBUYA Mulungu wanu kupembedza milungu ya madzinza anango. Penepi pinakhala ninga mtsitsi wakumera mbukhala mbewu yakuwawa pontho yakupha." 
Deuteronomy29:19 Paleke khala munthu ule anava pinthu pyadumbirwa m'chiveranochi mbatumbama mumtima mwache kuti pinthu pyonsene pinamfambira mwadidi podi kwene kuti athimize kuchita pinthu pinafuna iye na kuuma kwache mtimako. Penepi pinadzesa kuvungika kukulu kuna adidi na akuipa ene. 
Deuteronomy29:20 MBUYA nkhabe dzalekerera munthu ninga weneyu tayu. M'mbuto mwache ukali na shungu pya MBUYA pinagaka pana iye, tenepo dzedze yonsene yalembwa m'bukhumu ile inamgwera kufikirana MBUYA amvungiratu monsene mwene." 
Deuteronomy29:21 MBUYA anamchitisa kukhala upangizi pamaso pa madzinza onsene a Israele mbagwisa nyatwa pana iye malingana na dzedze yonsene ya m'chiverano chidalembwe m'bukhu ya mwamboyi. 
Deuteronomy29:22 “M'tsogolo muno, mifendu ya pidzukulu pyanu na alendo akubulukira kumadziko akutali anaona nyatwa na kusanyika pinafuna dzadzesa MBUYA m'dziko mwanu." 
Deuteronomy29:23 Minda nkhabe dzabalisa pinthu mbapaphopha miyala ya moto ya sulufule na mataka amunyu; nkhabe mbewu na ibodzi ene inafuna dzamera tayu, nkhabe na tsanga ene inameramo tayu. Dziko yanu inakhala ninga mizinda ya Sodomu na Gomora, Adima na Zeboimu, idavunga MBUYA ndzidzi udazhangali iye pikulu ule." 
Deuteronomy29:24 Penepo dziko yonsene yapansi inavunza kuti, ‘MBUYA adachitiranji penepi kuna dziko yawo? Ninji chidamchitisa kuti akhale na ukali na shungu tenepa?’" 
Deuteronomy29:25 Thangwi yache njakuti anthu a MBUYA adaswa chiverano chidasasanya iye na iwo, Mulungu wa makolo awo, ndzidzi udaabulusa iye m'dziko ya Iguputo ule." 
Deuteronomy29:26 Iwo adatumikira milungu inango ile chipo nee hadzati kuipembedza tayu, milungu idaakhondesa MBUYA kuipembedza ile." 
Deuteronomy29:27 Natenepo MBUYA adazhangalira anthu ache mbadzesa kudziko yawo nyatwa zidalembwa m'bukhuyi zile. 
Deuteronomy29:28 MBUYA adazhangali pyakwanga pene mwakuti na ukali wache pontho shungu iye adaabulusa m'dziko mwawo mbakaaponya m'dziko yachilendo, kule kuna iwo lero." 
Deuteronomy29:29 “Pana pinthu pinango pile MBUYA Mulungu wathu apikoya pyakubisika; kwache iye atchulula mwambo wache, tenepo ife pabodzi pene na pidzukulu pyathu tathema kuavera kwenda na kwenda." 
Deuteronomy30:1 “Ndakupasani mwayi wakusankhula pakati pa mtsanzayiso na dzedze. Tenepo pyonsenepi pingakuchitikirani, pontho iye angakubalalisirani pakati pa madzinza anango, penepo imwe munakumbuka mwayi wakusankhula udakupasani ine, MBUYA Mulungu wanu." 
Deuteronomy30:2 Ngakhala imwe na pidzukulu pyanu munabwerera kuna MBUYA mbamuvera na mtimanu onsene matongero ache onsene anakupasani iye lerowa," 
Deuteronomy30:3 penepo MBUYA Mulungu wanu anakuverani nsisi. Iye anakudzesani kubulukira kumadziko adakubalalisani iye kule mbachitisa pontho pinthu pyanu kukufambirani mwadidi. 
Deuteronomy30:4 Podi kwene kuti imwe mwabalaliswa kunkhomo zakutaliletu za dziko yapansi, MBUYA Mulungu wanu anakugumanyisani mbakudzesani kukubwezani," 
Deuteronomy30:5 towera mukwate pontho dziko ikhakhala makolo anu ile. Tenepo iye anachitisa pinthu pyanu kukufambirani mwadidi pikulu pene mbakuchitisani kukhala akuinjipa pyakwanga kupiringana mukhakhalira makolo anu. 
Deuteronomy30:6 MBUYA Mulungu wanu anapasa imwe na pidzukulu pyanu mtima wakuvera, towera mumfune na mtima onsene, tenepo munathimiza kukhala m'dziko yeneyi." 
Deuteronomy30:7 Iye anasanduza dzedze yonsene ina imweyi kukhala ya anyamalwanu, adakuzondani mbakuponderezani ale," 
Deuteronomy30:8 tenepo imwe munavera pontho kukoya matongero ache onsene akupasani ine lerowa. 
Deuteronomy30:9 MBUYA anakuchitisani kukhala anthu akupikwanisa papinthu pyonsene pimbachita imwe; imwe munakhala na ana azinji na pifuyo pizinji pontho mindanu inabulusa pyakuvuna pyakuinjipa. Pinamkomera kukuchitisani kukhala anthu akupikwanisa ninga mukhapifunira iye kuchitisa makolo anu," 
Deuteronomy30:10 kwache imwe mwathema kumvera mbamukoya matongero ache onsene na chifunziso chache pyalembwa m'bukhuyi. Imwe mwathema kuzungunukira kuna iye na mtima onsene. 
Deuteronomy30:11 “Matongero anakupasani ine lerowa si akunensa pyakwanga kuavera tayu, pontho hali kutali tayu kuti muchimwane kuafikira." 
Deuteronomy30:12 Iwo hali kuthambo tayu. Tenepo lekani kuvunza kuti, ‘Mbani anafuna kwenda kudzulu katikwatira matongerowo, towera ife tikwanise kuava na kuavera?’" 
Deuteronomy30:13 Nee ali khundu inango ya nyanza tayu. Tenepo imwe nee mwathema kuvunza kuti, ‘Mbani anawambuka nyanza katikwatira towera tikwanise kuava na kuavera?’" 
Deuteronomy30:14 Nkhabe, iwo ali pano pakati panu; ali m'kanwa mwanu pontho mumtima mwanu kuti muavere." 
Deuteronomy30:15 “Yang'anani, lero ndikukupasani mwayi wakusankhula pakati pa moyo na kufamba pyadidi kwa pinthu pyanu, penu imfa na kuvungika." 
Deuteronomy30:16 Ngakhala munavera matongero a MBUYA Mulungu wanu anakupasani ine lerowa, ngakhala munamfuna mbamumvera pontho kukoya matongero ache onsene, penepo pinthu pyanu pinakufambirani mwadidi mbamusanduka dzinza ya anthu azinji. MBUYA Mulungu wanu anakutsanzayisani m'dziko inafuna imwe dzapokosera kukhala yanu ene ile." 
Deuteronomy30:17 Mbwenye ngakhala munakhonda vera, pontho kuvesera mbamubauka kupembedza milungu inango," 
Deuteronomy30:18 ndikukucheuzani chinchino pano kuti imwe munati muvungwe. Imwe nkhabe dzakhala na moyo wakulapha tayu m'dziko ya kumtunda unango wa mkulo wa Yorodani, dziko inafuna imwe pokosera kukhala yanu ene ile." 
Deuteronomy30:19 “Lero kudzulu na dziko yapansi ndinapiyesa mboni yanga yakuti ndakupasani mwayi wakusankhula pakati pa moyo na imfa, pakati pa mtsanzayiso na dzedze. Chinchino sankhulani moyo towera imwe na pidzukulu pyanu mukhale na moyo." 
Deuteronomy30:20 Mfuneni MBUYA Mulungu wanu, mvereni pontho khulupirikani kuna iye, natenepo imwe na pidzukulu pyanu munakhala na moyo wakulapha m'dziko ile idadumbira iye kuna makolo anu Abrahamu, Isake, na Yakobo.”" 
Deuteronomy31:1 Mose adathimiza kulonga na Aisraele mbati," 
Deuteronomy31:2 “Ine pano ndina pyaka dzana na makumawiri pyakubalwa, tenepo ine nkhabe kwanisa khalave mkadamu wanu tayu. Padzulu pache MBUYA andipanga kuti sinawambuka mkulo wa Yorodani tayu." 
Deuteronomy31:3 MBUYA Mulungu wanu anaenda patsogolo panu mbavunga madzinza anakhala mwenemo ale, towera mukwate dziko yawoyo kuti ikhale yanu ene; tenepo Yoswa anakhala mkadamu wanu ninga mwandipangira MBUYA." 
Deuteronomy31:4 MBUYA anavunga anthu enewo ninga montho mudavungira iye Sihoni na Ogi, mafumu a Aamori mbavunga pontho dziko yawo." 
Deuteronomy31:5 MBUYA anakuchitisani kuakunda, tenepo imwe mwathema dzaavunga ninga montho mwakupangirani ine." 
Deuteronomy31:6 Khalani na chipapu pontho wangani mtima. Lekani chita nawo mantha. Mulungu wanu MBUYA mwenechiro anakhala namwe. Iye nkhabe kukuchimwanisani penu kukusiyani mwekha tayu.” 
Deuteronomy31:7 Tenepo Mose adachemera Yoswa mbalonga naye pamaso pa Aisraele onsene mbati, “Khala na chipapu pontho wanga mtima; ndiwe anafuna dzatsogolera anthuwa kakwata dziko idadumbira MBUYA kuna makolo anu ile." 
Deuteronomy31:8 MBUYA mwenechiro anakutsogolerani pontho anakhala namwe. Iye nkhabe kukuchimwanisani penu kukusiyani mwekha tayu, natenepo lekani taya mtima penu kuchita mantha.”" 
Deuteronomy31:9 Tenepo Mose adalemba mwambo wa Mulungu mbaupereka kuna anyansembe a Chilevi, ale akhathukula Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA, na kuna akadamu a Aisraele." 
Deuteronomy31:10 Iye adaatonga mbati, “Kumala kwa chaka chachinomwe chonsene, chaka chakufudza mangawa chingafika, werengani mwambowu pa Phwando ya Misasa." 
Deuteronomy31:11 Muuwerenge kuna Aisraele angadza dzapembedza MBUYA Mulungu wawo pambuto ibodzi yakupembedzerapo. 
Deuteronomy31:12 Chemeresani amuna onsene, akazi, ana na alendo ambakhala m'maluwani mwanu ale, towera avesere pontho adziwe kulemedza MBUYA Mulungu wanu na kuvera pifunziso pyache pyonsene mwakukhulupirika." 
Deuteronomy31:13 Na njira yeneyi, pidzukulu pyanu pile pyadzati pyava mwambo wa MBUYA Mulungu wanu tayu anauva. Natenepo iwo anadziwa kuvera MBUYA Mulungu wanu ndzidzi onsene unakhala imwe na moyo m'dziko inafuna imwe kaipokosera chinchino ya kumtunda unango ya mkulo wa Yorodani ile.”" 
Deuteronomy31:14 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Iwe hunakhalave na moyo ndzidzi ukulu ene tayu. Kwata Yoswa udze naye ku Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, towera ndimpange pyakuchita.” Tenepo Mose na Yoswa adendadi ku Chikhumbi chile," 
Deuteronomy31:15 penepo MBUYA adaonekera kuna iwo m'makole adaimira pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi chile. 
Deuteronomy31:16 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Chinchino unati ufe, tenepo ungafa anthu anasanduka okhonda khulupirika kuna ine mbaswa chiverano chidasasanya ine nawo chile. Iwo anandikhonda mbapembedza milungu yachilendo m'dziko ina iwo chifupi kuipitayi." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Penepi pingachitika, ine ndinaazhangalira; ine ndinaapasa nkhodolo mbavungwa. Nyatwa zizinji zakugoswa zinadza pana iwo, penepo iwo anadzindikira kuti penepi pikuchitika, thangwi ine, Mulungu wawo, nkhabe dzakhala nawove tayu." 
Deuteronomy31:18 Tenepo sinaaphedza tayu, thangwi iwo achita pyakuipa mbapembedza milungu inango." 
Deuteronomy31:19 “Chichino lemba nyimbo ishi. Ifunzise kuna Aisraele, towera ikhale umboni yakupokanyisana nawo." 
Deuteronomy31:20 Ine ndinaaendesa m'dziko yamphonje ninga mudadumbira ine kuna makolo awo. Kweneko anakhala na pyakudya pyonsene pinafuna iwo mbakhala mwadidi. Kwache iwo anabauka kupembedza milungu inango. Iwo anandikhonda mbaswa chiverano chathu," 
Deuteronomy31:21 tenepo nyatwa zizinji zakugoswa zinagwa pana iwo. Mbwenye nyimbo yeneyi inathimizwa kuimbwa, tenepo inakhala umboni wakupokanyisana nawo. Podi chinchino ene pano, ine mbandidzati kuaendesa kudziko idadumbira ine kuna iwo ile, ine ndikudziwa manyerezero awo.”" 
Deuteronomy31:22 Nsiku yonthoyo Mose adalemba nyimboyo mbaifunzisa Aisraele. 
Deuteronomy31:23 Natenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Yoswa mwana Nuni mbati, “Khala na chipapu pontho wanga mtima. Ndiwe anafuna dzatsogolera Aisraele kwenda kudziko idadumbira ine kuna iwo ile, tenepo ine ndinakhala nawe.”" 
Deuteronomy31:24 Mose adalemba mwambo wa Mulungu m'bukhu mbachita mphole-mphole kukhonda siya chinthu na chibodzi chene. 
Deuteronomy31:25 Pidamala iye, adalonga kuna anyansembe a Chilevi, ale akhathukula Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA mbati," 
Deuteronomy31:26 “Kwatani bukhu ya mwambo wa Mulungu muiikhe m'khundu mwa Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA Mulungu wanu, towera ikhale penepo ninga umboni wakupokanyisana na anthu ache." 
Deuteronomy31:27 Ine ndikudziwa kuuma mtima pontho kupandukira kwachita iwo. Iwo adapandukira MBUYA mwenemo ndikali moyo, tenepo anati athimize kunyanya kupandukira ine ndingafa." 
Deuteronomy31:28 Gumanyisa anthu, akadamu a madzinza onsene na mathubu pamaso panga, towera ndiapange pinthu ipi; kudzulu na dziko yapansi ndinapiyesa mboni zanga kupokanyisana nawo." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Ndikupidziwa kuti ine ndingafa anthu anasanduka akudawika, pontho anakhonda pinthu pyaafunzisa inepi. Tenepo ndzidzi unadzawo anaona nyatwa, thangwi anazhangalisa MBUYA pakuchita pinthu pyakukhondeswa.”" 
Deuteronomy31:30 Tenepo Mose adaimba nyimbo yonseneyo uku anthu onsene Aisraele akuvesera. 
Deuteronomy32:1 “Dziko yapansi na thambo, veserani mafalanga, ikhani makutu kuna pinalonga inepi." 
Deuteronomy32:2 Chifunziso changa chinagwa ninga madontho a mvula mbichidzachita mapovu padziko yapansi ninga bume. Mafalanga anagwa ninga mafazi pana mbewu zing'ono-zing'ono, ninga madontho akugwera pa pyakumera piwisi." 
Deuteronomy32:3 Ndinakuza dzina ya MBUYA, tenepo anthu ache analonga pya ukulu wache." 
Deuteronomy32:4 “MBUYA ndi Phanzwi, mabasache ngakuthema monsene mwene, pontho iye ngwachilungamo. Mulungu wako ngwakukhulupirika pontho wakuona; iye ambachita pyakulungama pontho pyakuthema." 
Deuteronomy32:5 Mbwenye iwe ndiwe nyakukhonda kukhulupirika, pontho nyakukhonda thema kukhala anthu ache, dzinza yakudawika na yakunama." 
Deuteronomy32:6 Ayi mwenemu ndiye munabwezera imwe MBUYA, imwe anthu akupupwa, pontho akusowa nzeru? Iye ndi babanu, nyakukulengani, iye adakusanduzani kukhala dzinza." 
Deuteronomy32:7 “Nyerezerani pya m'nduli, pya mifendu yakaleletu; vunzani makolo anu kuti akupangeni pinthu pidachitika, vunzani nkhalamba kuti zikupangeni pinthu pyakale," 
Deuteronomy32:8 Pidapasa Nyakudzulu-dzulu madzinza pidathema iwo dzatambira; ndzidzi udagawa iye anthu onsene, iye adaikha madire a madzinza mbapereka mngelo kada dzina kuayang'anira." 
Deuteronomy32:9 Thangwi khundu ya MBUYA ndi anthu ache, Yakobo adasankhula iye ule." 
Deuteronomy32:10 “M'thando yatchetcha iye adagumana anthu ache, mbuto yakusowa pyakumera pontho ya chonzi. Iye adaatchinjiriza na kuayang'anira mwadidi, ninga munthu kutchinjiriza mboni ya diso yache." 
Deuteronomy32:11 Ninga mphamba kufunzisa anache kumbuluka, kuathukula mwadidi pamaphaphido ache, MBUYA adakoya mwadidi Aisraele kuti aleke kugwa." 
Deuteronomy32:12 MBUYA ene basi adaatsogolera, nee milungu yachilendo hidamphedze tayu." 
Deuteronomy32:13 “Iye adaatawirisa kutonga pitunda, tenepo iwo akhadya pikhamera m'minda. Iwo adagumana uchi m'miyala; miti yawo yaolivi idavata pamataka a m'miyala." 
Deuteronomy32:14 Ng'ombe na mbuzi zawo zidaapasa mkaka na mafuta amkaka. Iwo akhali na mabira, mbuzi na ng'ombe zakunenepa, tirigu wadidiletu, pontho vinyu wakudzipaletu." 
Deuteronomy32:15 “Anthu a MBUYA adasanduka akufuma, kwache akhali akupandukira; iwo akhali akukula manungo mbabzimbirwa na kudya. Iwo adakhonda Mulungu, Nyakualenga, mbasedegula Phanzwi, Nyankhombo wawo ule." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Kupembedza kwawo milungu inango kudachitisa MBUYA kukhala na ntchanje; pyakuipa pidaphata iwo pidamzhangalisa. 
Deuteronomy32:17 Iwo adapereka nsembe kuna mizimu yakuipa, nee kuna Mulungu tayu, kuna milungu, ile ikhali yachilendo kuna iwo, yakuti chipo makolo awo hadaidziwe tayu, milungu yakuti chipo makolo awo hadaivere tayu." 
Deuteronomy32:18 Iwo adaduwalira Mulungu, Phanzwi yawo, mbakhonda tsalakana pya iye, Nyakupasa moyo." 
Deuteronomy32:19 “Pidaona MBUYA penepi adazhangali mbakhonda anache achimuna na chikazi 
Deuteronomy32:20 mbalonga mbati, ‘Ine nkhabe dzaaphedzave tayu; penepo tinaona pinafuna kuachitikira anthu akuuma mtima pontho okhonda khulupirikawa." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Na mifanikizo idasasanya iwo adandizhangalisa nayo, na milungu yawo, ile njakusowa basa, andichitisa kukhala wantchanje; natenepo ndinaphatisa basa anthu ale, si dzinza tayu, kuazhangalisa; ndinaachitisa kukhala abivu na dzinza ya anthu akupupwa." 
Deuteronomy32:22 Kuzhangali kwanga kunayerima ninga moto mbupisa dziko yapansi na pinthu pili mwenemo; unafika mpakana kudziko ya anyakufa mbupisa maziko a mapiri. 
Deuteronomy32:23 “‘Ndinagwisa pana iwo nyatwa zokhonda mala mbandiphatisa basa matswimo anga onsene kuamenya. 
Deuteronomy32:24 Iwo anafa na njala pontho anyampwanda; iwo anafa na utenda wakugoswa. Ine ndinatumiza nyama zam'tsanga kuaphata, pontho nyoka zakugoswa zinaaluma." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Nkhondo inaadzesa imfa m'njira; pyakugoswa pinaakang'antha m'misa mwawo. Aphale na atsikana anafa; nee akachiya penu nkhalamba anafuna dzasiyiwa na moyo tayu. 
Deuteronomy32:26 Mbandidaavunga monsene mwene towera munthu na mbodzi ene aleke kuakumbukave. 
Deuteronomy32:27 Kwache ine nkhabe dzatawirisa anyamalwawo kuti iwo agaye kuti akunda anthu anga na mphamvu zawo tayu, mwenemo ndine ene ndikhadapichita kuna iwo.’" 
Deuteronomy32:28 “Israele ndi dzinza yakusowa nzeru; iwo nkhabe kuvesa pinthu tayu. 
Deuteronomy32:29 Iwo akuchimwana kuona thangwi yache idaakundira anyamalwawo; iwo nkhabe kwanisa kuvesa pidachitika pile tayu. 
Deuteronomy32:30 Apo ninji anthu chikwi kukundwa na munthu mbodzi, pontho anthu pikwi khumi kukundwa na anthu awiri? Ndi thangwi yakuti Mulungu, Phanzwi yawo akhadaapasa nkhodolo; MBUYA adaapereka m'manja mwa anyamalwawo." 
Deuteronomy32:31 Anyamalwawo ambapidziwa kuti milungu yawo ene njakusowa mphamvu. Nkhabe mphamvu tayu ninga mphamvu za Phanzwi ya Israele. 
Deuteronomy32:32 Anyamalwawo ngakuipa ninga Sodomu na Gomora, akhala ninga mtawi wamfesa zakuwawa pontho zakupha," 
Deuteronomy32:33 ninga vinyu wakusasanywa na nyongo ya mbobo. 
Deuteronomy32:34 “MBUYA aikha mumtima pidachita anyamalwawo, iye akudikhira ndzidzi wakuthema kuti aatchunyuse." 
Deuteronomy32:35 Kubwezera nkhwanga ndinati ndibwezere, ndzidzi unadzawo manyalo awo anati atherizike; nsiku yawo ya nyatwa pontho yakuvungwa ili chifupi." 
Deuteronomy32:36 MBUYA anapulumusa anthu ache angaona kuti mphamvu zawo zikumala. Iye anavera nsisi anyakumtumikira, angaona kuti iwo, bitchu na mtumbe ene, ngakusowa chiphedzo." 
Deuteronomy32:37 Tenepo MBUYA anavunza anthu ache mbati, ‘Ili kupi milungu ikhanyindira imwe kukutchinjirizani ile?" 
Deuteronomy32:38 Imwe mudaidyesa na mafuta a nsembe zanu mbamuipasa pyakupereka pya vinyu kuti amwe. Ilekeni idze ikuphedzeni chinchino pano, ilekeni idze ikupulumuseni." 
Deuteronomy32:39 “‘Ine ene pano ndine Mulungu, nkhabe mulungu unango chadi-chadi tayu. Ndimbapha mbandipereka moyo, ndimbakuwaza pontho kuwangisa. Nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene anakwanisa kupokanyisa pimbachita ine tayu." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Podi ine ndine Mulungu wamoyo kwenda na kwenda, ndimbakwiza dzanjanga m'dzulu mbandidumbira," 
Deuteronomy32:41 kuti ndinanozwa talasadanga yakuyetimira mbandidzesa chilungamo. Ine ndinabwezera anyamalwanga mbanditchunyusa anyakundizonda. 
Deuteronomy32:42 Matswimo anga anachuchisa chiropa chawo, talasadanga inapha anyakundipokanya onsene. Ine nkhabe dzasiya na moyo munthu na mbodzi ene wakumenyana na ine tayu; podi anyakukuwazwa na anyaperezo ene anafa.’" 
Deuteronomy32:43 “Madzinza, imwe mwathema kukuza anthu a MBUYA, iye ambatchunyusa anyakuapha onsene. Iye ambabwezera anyamalwache mbalekerera anthu ache pyakudawa pyawo.”" 
Deuteronomy32:44 Mose na Yoswa mwana Nuni adaimba nyimbo yeneyi towera anthu a ku Israele akwanise kuivesera. 
Deuteronomy32:45 Pikhadamala Mose kupereka pifunziso pya Mulungu kuna anthu 
Deuteronomy32:46 adalonga mbati, “Onesesani kuti mukuvera matongero onsene anakupasani ine lerowa. Alongenimbo kuna ananu towera iwo avere pifunziso pyonsene pya Mulungu mwakukhulupirika." 
Deuteronomy32:47 Pifunziso penepi si mafala apezi tayu; ipyo ndi moyo wanu makawo. Pivereni tenepo munakhala na moyo wakulapha m'dziko yakumtunda unango wa mkulo wa Yorodani inafuna imwe pokosera chinchino panoyi.” 
Deuteronomy32:48 Nsiku yonthoyo MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati," 
Deuteronomy32:49 “Ndoko kumapiri a Abarimu m'dziko ya Moabu kuyang'anisani na mzinda wa Yeriko; kwira pa Phiri ya Nebo mbukayang'ane dziko ya Kanani inafuna ine pasa Aisraele ile. 
Deuteronomy32:50 Iwe unafa paphiri yeneyo ninga mudafera mbaleako Aroni paphiri ya Hori," 
Deuteronomy32:51 thangwi monsene uwirianu mukhali okhonda khulupirika kuna ine pamaso pa Aisraele. Pikhali iwe kumadzi a Meriba chifupi na luwani ya Kadeshi m'thando yatchetcha ya Zini, iwe hudandilemedze tayu pamaso pa anthu." 
Deuteronomy32:52 Iwe unaona dzikoyi na pakansinzo, kwache iwe nkhabe dzapita m'dziko inapasa ine Aisraele ile tayu.”" 
Deuteronomy33:1 Ufu ndi mtsanzayiso udapereka Mose, munthu wa Mulungu, pana Aisraele iye mbadzati kufa." 
Deuteronomy33:2 MBUYA adadza kubulukira pa phiri ya Sinai; mbalamuka ninga kubuluka kwa dzuwa mu Edomu mbamwinikira anthu ache kubulukira pa phiri ya Parani. Angelo pikwi khumi akhali naye, moto wakuyerima kumadyo kwache." 
Deuteronomy33:3 MBUYA ambafuna anthu ache mbatchinjiriza anthu ale ngache. Natenepo timbalamba pamanyalo pache mbateweza matongero ache. 
Deuteronomy33:4 Ife timbavera mwambo udatipasa Mose ule mfuma yakunyindirika ya dzinzathu. 
Deuteronomy33:5 MBUYA akhali mfumu wa anthu ache, Aisraele, ndzidzi udagumanyikana pabodzi madzinzawo na akadamu awo." 
Deuteronomy33:6 Mose adalonga pya dzinza ya Rubeni: “Rubeni mbakhale na moyo mbaleke kufa, Podi kwene kuti anthu ache ngakuchepa tani.”" 
Deuteronomy33:7 Pya dzinza ya Yuda iye adalonga tenepa: “MBUYA veserani kulira kwawo kufuna chiphedzo. Aphatanizeni pontho na madzinza anango. Amenyereni nkhondo, MBUYA, pontho aphedzeni kuna anyamalwawo.”" 
Deuteronomy33:8 Pya dzinza ya Levi iye adalonga tenepa: “MBUYA, tchululani kufuna kwanu kudzera muna Urimu na Tumimu, kudzera muna anyabasanu akukhulupirika, Alevi; imwe mudaayesera pa Masa mbamutsikimizira kuti ngakuona kumadzi a Meriba." 
Deuteronomy33:9 Iwo adaonesa kukhulupirika kukulu kuna imwe kupiringana kuna makolo, abale, penu ana. Iwo adavera matongero anu, pontho adakhulupirika kuna chiverano chanu." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Iwo anafunzisa anthu anu kuvera mwambo wanu; iwo anapereka nsembe paguwanu yansembe. 
Deuteronomy33:11 MBUYA phedzani dzinzawo kuti ikule na mphamvu; komerwani na pimbachita iwo. Peyani anyamalwawo onsene; lekani kuatawirisa kuti alamuke pontho.” 
Deuteronomy33:12 Pya dzinza ya Benjemani iye adalonga tenepa: “Yeneyi ndi dzinza yapamtima pa MBUYA imbatchinjiriza iye ile; iye ambaayang'anira nsiku yonsene, pontho iye ambakhala pakati pawo.”" 
Deuteronomy33:13 Pya dzinza ya Yosefe iye adalonga tenepa: “MBUYA mbatsanzayise dziko yawo na mvula, pontho na madzi akubulukira pansi pa mataka." 
Deuteronomy33:14 Dziko yawo mbitsanzayiswe na nsapo zakutokota na dzuwa. Ifume na nsapo zadidiletu mwezi na mwezi. 
Deuteronomy33:15 Mapiri akale mbaphophe na nsapo zadidiletu. 
Deuteronomy33:16 Dziko yawo mbitsanzayiswe na pinthu pyonsene pyadidi, pontho na udidi wa ule adalonga m'thenthere yakugaka moto. Pyonsenepi pikhale pamsolo wa Yosefe thangwi iye akhali mfumu pakati pa abale ache." 
Deuteronomy33:17 Yosefe ana mphamvu ninga ng'ombe imuna, nyanga zache zakhala ninga za nyati. Na nyanga zache, zile ndi anthu pikwi pya Manase, pontho pikwi khumi pya Eferemu, iye anadima nazo madzinza podi na ale ene ali kumadolomero a dziko yapansi.”" 
Deuteronomy33:18 Pya dzinza ya Zebuloni iye adalonga tenepa: “Komerwa Zebuloni, na maulendo ambachita iwe. Iwembo Isakara komerwa na kukhala kwako pamsuwo." 
Deuteronomy33:19 Iwo anachemera alendo kwenda paphiri yawo mbapereka nsembe zakuthema penepo. Iwo anachita phwando na mfuma ya pabara, pontho na mfuma yakubisika m'khundu-khundu mwa bara.”" 
Deuteronomy33:20 Pya dzinza ya Gadi iye adalonga tenepa: “Kuza Mulungu, nyakuchitisa nthembache kukula ule. Gadi ambabwathama mwenemo ninga nkhalamu kukhwadzula mkono na msolo." 
Deuteronomy33:21 Iwo adapisankhulira mbuto zadidiletu za dzikoyo; khundu ya mkadamu idaperekwa kuna iwo, pidagumanyikana pabodzi akadamu a Aisraele. Iwo adachita pyakulungama pinafuna MBUYA pile, mbavera matongero ache.”" 
Deuteronomy33:22 Pya dzinza ya Dani iye adalonga tenepa: “Dani akhala ninga mwana nkhalamu Iye ambanumpha kubulukira ku Bashani.” 
Deuteronomy33:23 Pya dzinza ya Nafitali iye adalonga tenepa: “Nafitali atsanzayiswa pikulu pene na kukoma mtima kwa MBUYA. Dziko yache yafika mpakana kumwera kwa nyanza ya Galilea.” 
Deuteronomy33:24 Pya dzinza ya Asheri adalonga tenepa: “Asheri ngwakutsanzayiswa pikulu pene kupiringana madzinza anango. Iye mbakhale wakufunikaletu pakati pa abale ache mbasambisa manyalo ache na mafuta aolivi. 
Deuteronomy33:25 Maluwani ache mbatchinjirizwe na misuwo yasimbi, pontho iye mbakhale pakupata moyo wache onsene.”" 
Deuteronomy33:26 Nkhabe mbodzi unango ninga Mulungu wa Israele, ule ambapakira pamakole a kuthambo, mbagwanda na demelero m'makole kukuphedzani." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Mulungu ndzidzi onsene ndi nyakukutchinjirizani; mphamvu zache zakukhala na kukhala zimbakuikhirani kunduli. Iye athamangisa anyamalwanu pamaso panu mbakupangani kuti muavunge onsene. 
Deuteronomy33:28 Natenepo Israele yekha ene ali pamtendere. Pidzukulu pya Yakobo pili pakupata m'dziko ya mapira na vinyu wachinchino, kule kumbagwa bume kubulukira kudzulu." 
Deuteronomy33:29 Nyakutsanzaya pikulu ndiwe Israele! Mbani pontho sasawa na iwe, anthu akupulumuswa na MBUYA? Iye ntchakugedera matswimo chanu kukutchinjirizani, pontho talasadanu yakukunda nayo. Anyamalwanu anabwera kukupemphani kuti muavere nsisi, tenepo imwe munapondedza pansi." 
Deuteronomy34:1 Mose adakwira phiri ya Nebo kubulukira kumaphedi a Moabu, mbaenda pansonga ya phiri ya Pisiga kumabulukiro dzuwa a mzinda wa Yeriko. Kweneko MBUYA adamuonesa dziko yonsene: nthemba ya Gileadi mpakana kumpoto kwa luwani ya Dani;" 
Deuteronomy34:2 nthemba yonsene ya Nafitali; nthemba ya Eferemu na Manase; nthemba yonsene ya Yuda kufikirana kumadokero dzuwa a Bara ya Mediterania; 
Deuteronomy34:3 thando yatchetcha ya Negebu; pontho na phedi yakufika ku Yeriko, mzinda wa miti yamdikhwa, kubulukira ku Zoari." 
Deuteronomy34:4 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Yeneyi ndi dziko idadumbira ine kuna Abrahamu, Isake na Yakobo kuti ndinaipereka kuna pidzukulu pyawo. Ine ndakutawirisa kuiona kwene, kwache hunaipita tayu.”" 
Deuteronomy34:5 Penepo Mose, nyabasa wa MBUYA, adafa m'dziko ya Moabu ninga mukhadapilongera MBUYA." 
Deuteronomy34:6 MBUYA adamfikhira m'phedi ya Moabu yakuyang'anisana na luwani ya Beti-Peori, kwache na lero nkhabe munthu anadziwa mbuto chadi-chadi idafikhirwa iye tayu." 
Deuteronomy34:7 Mose akhali na pyaka dzana na makumawiri pidafa iye; iye akhali munthu wamphamvu basi mpakana kufa kwache, pontho maso ache akhali mwadidi basi." 
Deuteronomy34:8 Aisraele adamsintili nsiku makumatatu m'phedi ya Moabu. 
Deuteronomy34:9 Yoswa mwana Nuni adadzazwa na nzeru, thangwi Mose akhadamsankhula kupita mbuto yache. Aisraele adavera Yoswa mbakoya matongero onsene adaapasa MBUYA kudzera muna Mose." 
Deuteronomy34:10 Chipo nee mukhali mprofeti mu Israele ninga Mose tayu; MBUYA adalonga naye maso na maso.
