Deuteronomy34:11 Chipo nee mprofeti achita pidzindikiro na pyakudodomesa ninga pile pidamtuma MBUYA Mose kupichita kuna mfumu wa ku Iguputo, mathubu ache na kuna dziko yonseneyo tayu." 
Deuteronomy34:12 Chipo nee mprofeti unango adachita pinthu pikulu pontho pyakuchitisa mantha ninga pile pidachita Mose pamaso pa Aisraele onsene tayu. 
Joshua1:1 Pidafa Mose nyabasa wa MBUYA, MBUYA adalonga kuna Yoswa mwana Nuni nyakuphedzerache Mose mbati," 
Joshua1:2 “Nyabasanga Mose afa. Natenepo sasanyikani chinchino iwe pabodzi pene na Aisraele kuwambuka mkulo wa Yorodani kupita m'dziko inafuna ine kuapasa ile. 
Joshua1:3 Ninga montho mudapangira ine Mose, ine ndapereka kuna iwe na kuna anthu anga onsene mbuto yonsene inafuna imwe kupondayo." 
Joshua1:4 Madire anu anabulukira m'thando yatchetcha kumwera kwenda kumapiri a Lebanoni kumpoto, kubulukira kumkulo ukulu wa Yufurate kumabulukiro dzuwa kugwanda na m'nthemba ya Ahiti mpakana ku Bara ya Mediterania kumadokero dzuwa." 
Joshua1:5 Yoswa, nkhabe mbodzi anafuna dzakwanisa kukukunda tayu pandzidzi unakhala iwe na moyo. Ine ndinati ndikhale nawe ninga mudachitira ine na Mose. Ndzidzi onsene ndinakhala nawe; ine nkhabe kukusiya wekha tayu." 
Joshua1:6 Khala na chipapu pontho wanga mtima, thangwi iwe unakhala mkadamu wa anthu enewa pinaenda iwo kakhala m'dziko idadumbira ine kuna makolo awo ile." 
Joshua1:7 Khala na chipapu pontho wanga mtima mbuonesese kuti mwambo onsene udakupasa nyabasanga Mose wauvera. Leka kuukhonda penu na khundu ene ibodzi ya mwambowo, tenepo unakhala munthu wakupikwanisa konsene kwene kunaenda iwe." 
Joshua1:8 Onesesa kuti bukhu ya mwambo yawerengwa pandzidzi wa chipembedzo. Inyerezere pikulu mumtima mwako mosiku na masikati pontho uonesese kuti ukuchita pyonsene pyalembwa mwenemo. Tenepo pyonsene pinaphata iwe pinakufambira mwadidi mbukhala munthu wakupikwanisa. 
Joshua1:9 Kumbuka, ndakupanga kuti ukhale na chipapu pontho wakuwanga mtima! Leka chita mantha penu kutaya mtima, thangwi ine MBUYA Mulungu wako ndinakhala nawe konsene kwene kunaenda iwe.”" 
Joshua1:10 Tenepo Yoswa adapanga akadamu 
Joshua1:11 kwenda mumsasa monsene kupanga anthu kuti, “Sasanyani pyakudya pinango pyapapezi thangwi pansiku yachitatu tikwenda kawambuka mkulo wa Yorodani kupokosera dziko inafuna kukupasani MBUYA Mulungu wanu.”" 
Joshua1:12 Yoswa adalonga kuna madzinza a Rubeni na Gadi pontho na kuna Manase wakumabulukiro dzuwa mbati," 
Joshua1:13 “Kumbukani mule mudakupangirani Mose nyabasa wa MBUYA ule kuti MBUYA Mulungu wanu anakupasani dziko yakumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani kukhala dziko yanu ene. 
Joshua1:14 Akazanu, ananu na pifuyo pyanu pinasala pano, mbwenye anyankhondo anu, ale asasanyika kamenya nkhondo, athema kuwambuka mkulo wa Yorodani patsogolo pa anzawo, towera aaphedze" 
Joshua1:15 kufikirana iwo apokosera dziko yakumadokero dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani, ile yaapasa MBUYA Mulungu wanu. Iye angamala kukhazikisa anthu onsene Aisraele pakupata, imwe munakwanisa kubwerera pyanu mbamukhazikika muno m'dziko yanu ene yakumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani, idakupasani Mose nyabasa wa MBUYA ile.”" 
Joshua1:16 Iwo adamtawira Yoswa mbati, “Ife tinati tichite pyonsene pinatipanga iwe, pontho tinati tiende konsene kwene kunatigwinya iwe." 
Joshua1:17 Ife tinakuvera ndzidzi onsene ninga montho mukhavera ife Mose. MBUYA Mulungu wako mbakhale nawe ninga mudachitira iye na Mose! 
Joshua1:18 Munthu onsene wakuvunza pya utongi wako penu kukhonda vera pinalonga iwe, weneyo athema kuphiwa. Khala na chipapu, pontho wanga mtima.”" 
Joshua2:1 Tenepo Yoswa mwana Nuni adagwinya amuna awiri kubulukira mumsasa pa Kesha kazonda chibiso-biso mzinda wa Yeriko. Iye adalonga mbati, “Ndokoni mukazonde m'dziko yonsene maka-maka mzinda wa Yeriko.” Natenepo iwo adenda mbakafika kunyumba ya puta unango dzinache Rahabi mbakhala kweneko." 
Joshua2:2 Mfumu wa ku Yeriko adapangwa mbati, “Ngayang'anani! Amuna anango a Chiisraele afika muno mosikuwa dzazonda dzikoyi.”" 
Joshua2:3 Natenepo mfumu adatumiza mphangwa kuna Rahabi kuti: “Bulusa amuna adadza kuna iwe mbapita m'nyumba mwako ale, thangwi iwo adza dzazonda dziko yonseneyi!”" 
Joshua2:4 Mbwenye mkazi ule akhadabisa amuna awiri ale. Iye adalonga mbati, “Ande, amunawo akhadadzadi kuna ine, kwache ine sidadziwe kudabulukira iwo tayu." 
Joshua2:5 Pakuthobila dzuwa, pidakwana ndzidzi wakufunga msuwo wa mzinda, amuna ale adabuluka mbaenda. Njira yaenda na iwo ine sinaidziwa tayu. Chimbizani muatewere, mwinango munaaphata m'njiramu.”" 
Joshua2:6 Mbwenye mkaziyo akhadakwira na amuna ale pansoyi yakuthasama ya nyumbache mbaabisa pansi pa misumbu ya bwazi ikhadathasika iye penepo ile. 
Joshua2:7 Natenepo anyamphangwa ale adalamuka mbasaka-saka anyakuzonda ale mpakana kumbuto yakuwambukira mkulo wa Yorodani. Sindzidzi iwo nkhwenda, msuwo wa mpanda udafungwa." 
Joshua2:8 Anyakuzonda ale mbadzati gona, mkazi ule adakwira pansoyi pale" 
Joshua2:9 mbalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ndikupidziwa kuti MBUYA akupasani dzikoyi pontho kuti ife taphatwa na mantha makulu mwakuti onsene anakhala m'dziko muno akunyunguluka na mantha thangwi ya imwepo." 
Joshua2:10 Ife tava mule mudaumisira MBUYA madzi a pa Nyanza ya Kufira kuti imwe muwambuke mwadidi pikhabuluka imwe m'dziko ya Iguputo, pontho na pile pidachita imwe kuna Sihoni na Ogi, mafumu awiri a Aamori kumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani, ale adavunga imwe mwakumalisikiratu." 
Joshua2:11 Pidava ife penepi, mitimathu idanyunguluka na mantha makulu thangwi ya imwepo, pontho nkhabe mbodzi adawanga mtima, thangwi MBUYA Mulungu wanu ndi Mulungu wa kudzulu pontho wa dziko yapansi pano." 
Joshua2:12 Natenepo dumbirani na dzina ya MBUYA kuti munachitira udidi banjanga ninga udidi wakuchitirani inembo. Ndipaseni chitsikimizo chadi-chadi 
Joshua2:13 kuti munapulumusa baba na mama, nkhoswe zanga na anananga, pontho na mabanjawo ene. Lekani tawirisa kuti tiphiwe!”" 
Joshua2:14 Amuna ale adamtsikimizira mkazi ule mbati, “Moyo wathu ndiye moyo wanu. Iwe ungakhonda panga munthu na mbodzi ene pinthu pinachita ife, penepo tinakuchitirani udidi, pontho tinakhala akukhulupirika kuna iwe MBUYA angatipasa dzikoyi.”" 
Joshua2:15 Rahabi akhakhala nyumba ile fufu inango ya nyumbayo ikhali fufu ibodzi ene na mpanda wa mzindawo. Natenepo iye adatchithisira amuna ale na pazhanera pakuphatisa basa nkhambala. 
Joshua2:16 Tenepo adalonga kuna amuna ale mbati, “Ndokoni kumapiriko, towera anyakukutewerani aleke kukugumanani. Mubisale kweneko nsiku zitatu mpakana iwo abwerereko. Kubuluka penepo munakwanisa kwenda pyanu.”" 
Joshua2:17 Amuna ale adalonga kuna mkazi ule mbati, “Kudumbira kwatichitisa iweku kunaphata basa" 
Joshua2:18 ngakhala iwe unachita pinthu ipi tingapita m'dziko muno: unakwata nkhambala yakufirayi mbuimangirira pazhanera patitchithisira na iwepo, pontho unakwata babako, mako na banjako yonsene mbuapitisa m'nyumbamu." 
Joshua2:19 Ngakhala munthu adabuluka kunja kwa nyumbakoyi mbaenda mumsewu, angafa kweneko mphyache penepyo; chiropa chache nkhabe dzagwera pamsolo pathu tayu. Mbwenye ngakhala munthu wakukhala pabodzi na iwe m'nyumbamo anaphiwa, chiropa chache chinagwera pamsolo pathu." 
Joshua2:20 Kwache iwe ungapanga kwene munthu pinthu pyachita ife, penepo ife tinakhala akusudzuka kuna kudumbira kwatichitisa iweku.”" 
Joshua2:21 Mkaziyo adatawira mbati, “Ande, ndatawira, pikhale ninga mwapilongera imwe.” Natenepo iye adaagwinya mbaenda pyawo. Tenepo iye adamangira nkhambala yakufira pazhanera pale." 
Joshua2:22 Pidabuluka iwo, adenda kakhala kumapiri nsiku zitatu mpakana anyakutewera ale akhadasaka-saka m'njira monsene mbakhonda kuagumana, tenepo adabwerera ku Yeriko." 
Joshua2:23 Penepo amuna awiri ale adatchitha paphiri pale mbawambuka mkulo kubwerera kuna Yoswa mwana Nuni mbampanga pyonsene pidaachitikira pile. 
Joshua2:24 Iwo adalonga kuna Yoswa mbati, “Ndimomwene MBUYA atipasa dziko yonseneyi; anthu onsene kweneko anyunguluka na mantha thangwi ya ife.”" 
Joshua3:1 Bzobzo mangwana mwache Yoswa na Aisraele onsene adabuluka mumsasa pa Kesha mbaenda kamanga msasawo kukhundu inango ya mkulo wa Yorodani kudikhira kuwambuka. 
Joshua3:2 Pidagwanda nsiku zitatu akadamu a Aisraele adenda mumsasa monsene mule," 
Joshua3:3 mbapanga anthu mbati, “Mungaona Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA Mulungu wanu yathukulwa na anyansembe a Chilevi, imwe mwathema kulamuka pana imwepo mbamuitewere." 
Joshua3:4 Tenepo munadziwa njira inafuna dzaenda na ife, thangwi chipo imwe nee mudzati pita na njira yeneyi tayu. Kwache pakati pa imwe na Bokosiyo pakhale mpata wakukwana mathanyo madzana mafemba; lekani kuifikira chifupi.”" 
Joshua3:5 Yoswa adapanga anthu ale mbati, “Picheneseni mwekha ene pamaso pa MBUYA, thangwi iye anachita pyakudodomesa mangwana pakati panu.”" 
Joshua3:6 Yoswa adalonga kuna anyansembe mbati, “Thukulani Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA mbamuende patsogolo pa anthu.” Natenepo iwo adaithukula mbapita patsogolo pawo." 
Joshua3:7 MBUYA adalonga kuna Yoswa mbati, “Lero ndinatoma kukukwiza pamaso pa Aisraele onsene, towera iwo adziwe kuti ine ndili nawe ninga mudakhalira ine na Mose." 
Joshua3:8 Panga anyansembe athukula Bokosi ya Chiveranowo kuti angafika m'khundu-khundu mwa mkulo wa Yorodani, akagwere m'madzimo.”" 
Joshua3:9 Yoswa adalonga kuna Aisraele mbati, “Bwerani kuno muve mafala a MBUYA Mulungu wanu." 
Joshua3:10 Umu ndi mule munafunira imwe kudziwa kuti Mulungu wa moyo ali pakati panu pontho kuti anathamangisa Akanani, Ahiti, Ahivi, Aperizi, Agirigashi, a Aamori na Ayebusi uku mukuona maso." 
Joshua3:11 Bokosi ya Chiverano ya Mbuya wa dziko yonsene yapansi yathema kupita patsogolo panu pinawambuka imwe mkulo wa Yorodani. 
Joshua3:12 Tenepo sankhula amuna khumi na awiri akubulukira m'dzinza ya Israele, munthu mbodzi kada dzinza." 
Joshua3:13 Tenepo sindzidzi anyansembe ale adathukula Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA, Mbuya wa dziko yonsene yapansi nkhuponda m'madzimo, mkulo unaleka kufamba, tenepo madzi akubulukira kumtunda anamulukana pabodzi-bodzi.”" 
Joshua3:14 Natenepo pidafuluka anthu pamsasa pale kuwambuka mkulo wa Yorodani anyansembe, ale adathukula Bokosi ya Chiverano adapita patsogolo pawo." 
Joshua3:15 Mkulo wa Yorodani umbakuka ndzidzi onsene wa wakuvuna, kwache sindzidzi anyansembe adathukula Bokosi ile nkhufika pamkulo wa Yorodani mbapondesa manyalo awo m'khundu-khundu mwa madzi mule," 
Joshua3:16 madzi akubulukira kumtunda adaleka kufamba. Iwo adamulukana kutali pyakwanga pa Adamu kumtunda kwa mkulo, mzinda wa chifupi na Zaretani. Mwenemo madzi akuphedi kwa mkulo akhagwera m'Nyanza Yakufa ale adagwandikiratu. Natenepo anthu adakwanisa kuwambuka mkulowo chifupi na Yeriko." 
Joshua3:17 Anyansembe, ale adathukula Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA adaimira dzololo pakuuma kati na kati ya mkulo wa Yorodani uku Aisraele akugwanda mpakana dzinza yonsene ya Israele idamala kuwambuka na pakuuma." 
Joshua4:1 Pikhadamala dzinza yonsene kuwambuka mkulo wa Yorodani ule, MBUYA adalonga kuna Yoswa mbati," 
Joshua4:2 “Sankhula amuna khumi na awiri pakati pa anthuwo, munthu mbodzi kada dzinza" 
Joshua4:3 mbuapange kuti alokote miyala khumi na miwiri kubulukira pa kati na kati ya mkulo wa Yorodani kukhundu yakumadyo paimira anyansembepo, pontho aithukule kwenda nayo pabodzi mbakaiikhe pambuto panafuna imwe kagona mosiku uno.”" 
Joshua4:4 Natenepo Yoswa adachemeresa pabodzi amuna akhadasankhula iye pakati pa Aisraele ale, munthu mbodzi kada dzinza," 
Joshua4:5 mbalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ndokoni pana Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA Mulungu wanu kati na kati ya mkulo wa Yorodani. Munthu onsene akathukule mwala ubodzi paphewa pache malingana na konta ya madzinza a Israele," 
Joshua4:6 kuti ikhale chikumbuso pakati panu. M'tsogolo muno ananu angakuvunzani kuti, ‘Ayi miyala yeneyi ikufuna kulonganji?’" 
Joshua4:7 Apangeni kuti madzi a mkulo wa Yorodani adaleka kufamba pamaso pa Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA; pidawambuka iyo Yorodani, madzi a mumkulomo adagwandika. Miyala yeneyi ntchikumbuso kuna Aisraele kwenda na kwenda.”" 
Joshua4:8 Tenepo Aisraele ale adachitadi ninga montho mudaapangira Mose. Iwo adalokota miyala khumi na iwiri ile kubulukira pa kati na kati ya mkulo wa Yorodani malingana na konta ya madzinza a Aisraele ninga montho mukhadalongera MBUYA kupanga Yoswa; mbaithukula kwenda nayo kumsasa kwawo, kule kudaitula iwo pansi." 
Joshua4:9 Yoswa adamuluka miyala ile kati na kati ya Yorodani pambuto chadi-chadi pakhadaimira anyansembe adathukula Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA ale. Miyala yeneyo ili penepo basi na lero. 
Joshua4:10 Anyansembe adathukula Bokosi ale adaimira dzololo kati na kati ya Yorodani mpakana pyonsene pidalonga MBUYA kuna Yoswa pidachitwa ninga montho mudachitira Mose kufunzisa Yoswa. 
Joshua4:11 Anthu adachimbiza kuwambuka, tenepo sindzidzi anthu nkhupandira, anyansembe pabodzi pene na Bokosi ya MBUYA adadza kukhundu inango ya Yorodani uku gulu yonsene ikuyang'ana." 
Joshua4:12 Amuna a madzinza a Rubeni, Gadi na Manase wakumabulukiro dzuwa akusasanyika kamenya nkhondo adawambukambo mbakhala patsogolo pa Aisraele ninga mudaapangira Mose." 
Joshua4:13 Chifupi-fupi amuna pikwi makumanayi adawambuka pamaso pa MBUYA kwenda kumaphedi a Yeriko akusasanyika kamenya nkhondo. 
Joshua4:14 Pansiku yeneyo MBUYA adakwiza Yoswa pamaso pa Aisraele onsene; tenepo iwo adamulemedza Yoswa nsiku zonsene za moyo wache ninga montho mudalemedzera iwo Mose. 
Joshua4:15 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Yoswa mbati," 
Joshua4:16 “Panga anyansembe akuthukula Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA kuti abulukemo mumkulomo.” 
Joshua4:17 Natenepo Yoswa adapanga anyansembe ale mbati, “Bulukanimo mumkulomo.”" 
Joshua4:18 Anyansembe adabulukamo mumkulo uku athukula Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA. Sindzidzi manyalo a anyansembe nkhuponda pamtunda madzi ale adabwerera m'mbuto mwache mbatoma kufamba ninga mwakale mwakutayikira. 
Joshua4:19 Pansiku yachikhumi ya mwezi wakutoma anthu adabuluka pa Yorodani mbakamanga msasawo pa Giligala kumabulukiro dzuwa a Yeriko. 
Joshua4:20 Tenepo pa Giligala Yoswa adamuluka miyala khumi na miwiri idakwata iwo mumkulo mule. 
Joshua4:21 Iye adalonga kuna Aisraele mbati, “M'tsogolo muno pidzukulu pyanu pingavunza makolo awo kuti penepi pikulonganji" 
Joshua4:22 apangeni pya ndzidzi udawambuka Aisraele mkulo wa Yorodani pakuuma. 
Joshua4:23 Thangwi MBUYA Mulungu wanu adaumisa mkulo wa Yorodani pamaso panu mpakana imwe mudawambuka. MBUYA Mulungu wanu adachita kuna mkulo wa Yorodani ninga montho mukhadachitira iye kuna Nyanza Yakufira pidaiumisa iye pamaso pathu mpakana ife tidawambuka. 
Joshua4:24 Na thangwi ya penepi anthu onsene a padziko yapansi anapidziwa kuti mkono wa MBUYA ngwamphamvu. Tenepo imwe ndzidzi onsene munagopa MBUYA Mulungu wanu.” 
Joshua5:1 Mafumu onsene a Aamori akukhala kumadokero dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani na mafumu onsene a Akanani akukhala m'khundu-khundu mwa Bara ya Mediterania adava kuti MBUYA akhadaumisa mkulo wa Yorodani mpakana anthu onsene Aisraele adawambuka. Iwo adanyunguluka na mantha pikulu mbataya mtima thangwi ya Aisraele. 
Joshua5:2 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Yoswa mbati, “Sasanya mipeni yamiyala mbuchite pontho mwambo wakugwanda Aisraele nsonga yachimuna.”" 
Joshua5:3 Natenepo Yoswa adachitadi ninga montho mukhadampangira MBUYA mbagwanda nsonga zachimuna za Aisraele, pambuto yakuchemerwa “Phiri yakugwandwa nsonga yachimuna.”" 
Joshua5:4 Pikhabuluka Aisraele m'dziko ya Iguputo amuna onsene akhali akugwandwa kale nsonga yachimuna. Mbwenye pyaka makumanayi pikhafamba Aisraele kugwanda na m'thando yatchetcha mule, nkhabe ana achimuna adabalwa mwenemo adagwandwa nsonga yachimuna tayu, pontho kumamalisiro a ndzidzi wenewo amuna onsene, ale akhafika thunga yakumenya nkhondo pikhabuluka iwo mu Iguputo, akhadafa thangwi iwo hadamvere MBUYA tayu. Ninga montho mukhadadumbira MBUYA, iwo hadatawiriswe kupita tayu m'dziko yamphonje, ikhadadumbira MBUYA kuna makolo awo ile." 
Joshua5:5  
Joshua5:6  
Joshua5:7 Ana a anthu enewa hakhadagwandwa tayu, tenepo Yoswa adagwanda mfendu wenewu." 
Joshua5:8 Pidamalisa iye kuagwanda, dzinza yonsene ya Israele idakhala m'makumbi mwawo mpakana pironda pya amuna ale pidapola." 
Joshua5:9 MBUYA adalonga kuna Yoswa mbati, “Lero ndakubulusirani manyadzo akukhala mabitchu m'dziko ya Iguputo.” Ndi thangwi yache mbuto ile idathulwa Giligala, mwakuti na lero dzina yeneyi ilipo." 
Joshua5:10 Pikhali Aisraele mumsasa pa Giligala paphedi inango chifupi na Yeriko, iwo adadya phwando ya Paska na mawulo a nsiku yakhumi na chinayi ya mwezi wenewo." 
Joshua5:11 Mangwana mwache, pidagwanda Paska, ikhali nsiku yawo yakutoma kudya phoso yakulimwa mu Kanani: mapiramanga akuotcha na mikate yakusowa chakufufumisira." 
Joshua5:12 Kubulukira nsiku yonthoyo mana adaleka kugwa, natenepo Aisraele hadadyeve mana tayu. Kutomera ndzidzi wenewo kwenda m'tsogolo iwo akhadya phoso yakulimwa mu Kanani." 
Joshua5:13 Pikhali Yoswa chifupi na Yeriko vumbu-vumbu adaona munthu ali dzololo kutsogolo kwache uku aphatira talasada m'manja mwache. Yoswa adenda kuna iye mbamvunza mbati, “Ayi iwe ndiwe mbodzi wa ife penu ndiwe nyamalwathu?”" 
Joshua5:14 Munthu ule adatawira mbati, “Nkhabe, ine ndine mkadamu wa anyankhondo a MBUYA.” Yoswa adapigwisa na fufumimba kumpembedza mbalonga mbati, “Ine ndine nyabasanu Mbuya, mwadza na mphangwa zanji kuna ine?”" 
Joshua5:15 Mkadamu wa anyankhondo a MBUYA adamtawira mbati, “Dula nkhwaira zako, thangwi mbuto yaimira iweyo njakuchena.” Tenepo Yoswa adachitadi pidapangwa iyepyo." 
Joshua6:1 Misuwo ya mpanda wa Yeriko ikhakhala mbifungwa pontho yakulondalwi mwadidi, towera Aisraele aleke kupitamo. Nkhabe mbodzi akhakwanisa kupita penu kubuluka mumzindamo tayu." 
Joshua6:2 MBUYA adalonga kuna Yoswa mbati, “Yang'ana, ndikuikha m'manja mwako Yeriko, mfumu wa mwenemo, pabodzi pene na anyankhondo ache akuwanga mtima ale." 
Joshua6:3 Iwe pabodzi pene na anyankhondo ako mwathema kufamba pamulikiti kuzungulira mzindawu nsiku zitanthatu kabodzi pansiku. 
Joshua6:4 Anyansembe anomwe, kada munthu athukule ngomache athema kwenda patsogolo pa Bokosi ya Chiverano. Pansiku yachinomwe iwe pabodzi pene na anyankhondo ako mwathema kuzungulira mzindawo pamulikiti kanomwe uku anyansembe akuliza ngoma zawo." 
Joshua6:5 Kubuluka penepo iwo alize ngomazo pabodzi pene mwakugaluza pontho mwakukhonda lekeza. Sindzidzi iwe nkhuva penepi, anthu onsene athema kukhuwa, penepo pene mafufu a mzindawo anagwa. Tenepo anyankhondo onsene anapitiratu mumzindamo.”" 
Joshua6:6 Yoswa adachemera anyansembe mbalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Thukulani Bokosi ya Chiveranoyi, pontho anomwe a imwe aende patsogolo uku athukula ngoma.”" 
Joshua6:7 Kubuluka penepo iye adapanga amunache ale kuti atome kuzungulira mzindawo pamulikiti uku anyankhondo akusasanyika mwadidi ali patsogolo pa Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA. 
Joshua6:8 Natenepo ninga mukhadatongera Yoswa, anyankhondo akusasanyika mwadidi ndiye adatoma mbakhala patsogolo pa anyansembe akuliza ngoma zawo ale; m'nduli mwawo mukhali anyansembe akuthukula Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA ale; m'nduli mwawo mukhali anyankhondo anango. Ndzidzi onsenewu ngoma zikhalizwa." 
Joshua6:9  
Joshua6:10 Mbwenye Yoswa akhadapanga amunache kuti aleke khuwa penu kubulusa fala mpakana iye aapange kuchita tenepo. 
Joshua6:11 Natenepo iye adapanga gulu ya amuna ale kuthukula Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA kuti azungulire nayo mzindawo kabodzi basi. Kubuluka penepo iwo adabwerera kumsasa kwawo mbagona kweneko. 
Joshua6:12 Bzobzo mangwana mwache Yoswa adalamuka mbazungulira kachiwiri mzindawo pabodzi pene na anyansembe ninga montho mudachitira iwo dzulo mwache: chakutoma anyankhondo akusasanyika mwadidi; kubuluka penepo anyansembe anomwe akuliza ngoma; kubuluka penepo anyansembe akuthukula Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA; pontho pakumalisira pache anyankhondo anango. Ndzidzi onsenewu ngoma zikhalizwa. 
Joshua6:13  
Joshua6:14 Pansiku yachiwiri iwo adazungulira pamulikiti pontho mzindawo kabodzi basi mbabwerera kumsasa kwawo. Iwo adachita penepyo nsiku zitanthatu. 
Joshua6:15 Pansiku yachinomwe iwo adalamuka na machibese mbazungulira pamulikiti mzindawo kanomwe na njira yontho-yonthoyo; ikhali nsiku yonthoyi basi idazungulira iwo kanomwe pamulikiti. 
Joshua6:16 Kachinomweka, pidaliza anyansembe ngoma zawo, Yoswa adapanga anthu ache mbati, “Khuwani! Thangwi MBUYA akupasani mzindawu." 
Joshua6:17 Mzindawu na pyonsene pili mwenemo pyathema kuvungwa monsene mwene kukhala nsembe kuna MBUYA. Mbwenye puta Rahabi ene basi na onsene ali m'nyumba mwache ale athema kukhonda phiwa, thangwi iye adabisa anyakuzondathu." 
Joshua6:18 Mbwenye pinthu pyathema kuvungwa pile, lekani kupikwata; ngakhala munapikwata munapidzesera nyatwa na kuvungika kwene kuna Aisraele onsene mumsasa mule." 
Joshua6:19 Pyonsene pyakusasanywa na siliva penu golidi penu nkuwa penu simbi pikhale pyakupambulika kuna MBUYA. Penepyo piikhwe mumbakoyerwa pinthu pya MBUYA mule.” 
Joshua6:20 Natenepo anyansembe adaliza ngoma. Sindzidzi amuna anango ale nkhuva ngomazo, iwo adakhuwa pikulu pene. Penepo mpanda udagwa. Kubuluka penepo anyankhondo adapitiratu mumzinda mule mbaukunda." 
Joshua6:21 Iwo adapha amuna, akazi, ana na nkhalamba zene pakuphatisa basa matalasadawo. Iwo adapha pontho ng'ombe, mabira na mabulu." 
Joshua6:22 Kubuluka penepo Yoswa adapanga amuna awiri adenda kazonda dziko ale mbati, “Pitani m'nyumba ya putayi mbamukabulusemo iye pabodzi pene na banjache ninga mudadumbira imwe kuna iye.”" 
Joshua6:23 Natenepo iwo adenda mbabulusira kunja Rahabi, pabodzi pene na babache, mache, nkhoswe zache pontho na onsene a pabanja pache. Iwo adakwata onsene a pabanja pache mbakaaikha chifupi na msasa wa Aisraele kuti atchinjirizwe." 
Joshua6:24 Kubuluka penepo adaupisa mzinda onsene ule pabodzi pene na pyonsene pikhali mwenemo, kupambula pinthu pyakusasanywa na siliva, golidi, nkuwa na simbi pile pidakwata iwo mbapiikha mumbakoyerwa pinthu pya MBUYA pile." 
Joshua6:25 Mbwenye Yoswa adaleka na moyo Rahabi, puta ule pabodzi pene na onsene a pabanja pache, thangwi iye adabisa anyakuzonda awiri ale akhadatuma Yoswa ku Yeriko ale. (Pidzukulu pyache mu Israele pilipo na lero.)" 
Joshua6:26 Pandzidzi wenewo Yoswa adacheuza anthu pakuchita kudumbira mbati, “Munthu onsene anayesera kumanga pontho mzinda wa Yeriko anakhala wakutembererwa pamaso pa MBUYA. Munthu onsene anaikha maziko a mzindawu, mwanache wautombo anafa. Munthu onsene anamanga pontho misuwo ya mzinda wenewu, chimalisira bele chache chinafa.”" 
Joshua6:27 Natenepo MBUYA akhali na Yoswa, pontho kuveka kwache kudafalikira m'dziko monsene mule." 
Joshua7:1 Aisraele adachita mwakukhonda khulupirika pakukwata pinthu pya mu Yeriko pidatonga MBUYA kuti pyathema kuvungwa. Akani mwana Karimi, ule babachembo akhali wa dzinza ya Zabidi mwana Zera wa dzinza ya Yuda, adakwata pinthu pinango pyakukhondeswapi. Natenepo MBUYA adazhangalira Aisraele." 
Joshua7:2 Yoswa adagwinya amuna kubulukira ku Yeriko kwenda ku Ai, mzinda ule ukhali chifupi na Beti-Aveni kumabulukiro dzuwa a Betele mbaapanga mbati, “Ndokoni mukazonde nthemba.” Natenepo amuna ale adalamuka mbakazonda mzinda wa Ai." 
Joshua7:3 Pidabwera iwo kuna Yoswa kubulukira kumzinda kule adalonga kuna Yoswa mbati, “Si anthu onsene anafunika kamenya nkhondo na Ai tayu. Gwinyani kwene amuna pikwi piwiri penu pitatu basi. Lekani gwinyako anyankhondo onsene; thangwi si mzinda ukulu ene tayu.”" 
Joshua7:4 Natenepo chifupi-fupi anyankhondo pikwi pitatu adenda kweneko; kwache adathamangiswako na amuna a ku Ai. 
Joshua7:5 Amuna a ku Ai ale adapha anyankhondo a Aisraele makumatatu na atanthatu mbathamangisa anango a iwo kubulukira kumsuwo wa mpanda wa mzindawo mpakana ku Sheberimu mbaaphera pamtelero. Na thangwi ya penepi Aisraele adaswipa mtima mbachita mantha. 
Joshua7:6 Natenepo Yoswa adang'amba nguwo zache mbapigwisa na fufumimba patsogolo pa Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA, mbakhala penepo kufikirana mawulo. Akadamu a Aisraele adachita chibodzi-bodzi mbapiwaza fumbi mumsolo mwawo kuonesa kutsukwala." 
Joshua7:7 Natenepo Yoswa adalonga mbati, “Sha! MBUYA Mulungu. Thangwi yache ninji mudatiwambusa mkulo wa Yorodani? Ayi mudachita tenepo kuti mutipereke m'manja mwa Aamori? Penu mutivunge. Mudatani kutikhazika pyathu kumtunda unango wa Yorodani ule?" 
Joshua7:8 Mbuya, apo ndinalonga tani podi Aisraele athamangiswako na anyamalwawo?" 
Joshua7:9 Akanani na anthu anango m'dzikomo anati ave penepi. Iwo anati atizungulire mbatipha tonsenene! Apo chinafuna imwe dzachita ninji kuti mukoye chilemedzo cha dzinanu ikulu?” 
Joshua7:10 MBUYA adalonga kuna Yoswa mbati, “Lamuka! Wapigwisiranji na fufumimba tenepa?" 
Joshua7:11 Aisraele adawa! Iwo aswa chiverano chidasasanya ine nawo chile. Iwo adakwata pinthu pyatongwa kuti pivungwe; iwo apiba, iwo anama pontho apiikha pabodzi pene na pinthu pyawo." 
Joshua7:12 Ndi thangwi yache Aisraele hadakwanise kukunda anyamalwawo tayu. Iwo adazungunuka mbathawa thangwi iwo ene asanduka chakuthema kuvungwa. Ine nkhabeve dzakhala namwe tayu mungakhonda vunga pinthu pili pakati panupo, pile pyatongwa kuti pivungwe." 
Joshua7:13 Lamuka! Ndoko ukaachenese anthu pamaso pa MBUYA mbuapange kuti apichenese okha ene kusasanyikira nsiku ya mangwana, thangwi pyalonga MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele mphipi: pinthu pile pidatonga ine kuti pivungwe pili pakati panu. Natenepo imwe nkhabe kwanisa kuimisana na anyamalwanu tayu mungakhonda kupibulusa penepi." 
Joshua7:14 Mangwana na machibese mudze dzinza na dzinza dzapichenesa mwekha ene pamaso pa MBUYA. Dzinza inafuna MBUYA dzaphata ile inabwera kutsogolo mbumba na mbumba. Mbumba inafuna MBUYA dzaphata inabwera kutsogolo banja na banja. Banja inafuna MBUYA dzaphatayo inabwera patsogolo munthu na munthu. 
Joshua7:15 Munthu anafuna dzaphatwa na pinthu pidatonga ine kuvungwa pile, iye pabodzi pene na pinthu pyache pyonsene pina iye pinavungwa na moto. Thangwi iye aswa chiverano cha MBUYA pontho iye achita chakuchitisa manyadzo pakati pa Aisraele.”" 
Joshua7:16 Bzobzo mangwana mwache Yoswa adadza na Aisraele onsene mbaachitisa kudza patsogolo dzinza na dzinza. Natenepo dzinza ya Yuda idaphatwa. 
Joshua7:17 Kubuluka penepo dzinza ya Yuda idadza patsogolo mbumba na mbumba mbiphatwa ndi mbumba ya Zera. Kubuluka penepo mbumba ya Zera idadza patsogolo banja na banja mbiphatwa ndi banja ya Zabidi. 
Joshua7:18 Yoswa adadza na banja yeneyi patsogolo munthu na munthu mbaphatwa ndi Akani mwana Karimi, mdzukuluache Zabidi, ulembo babache akhali Zera wa dzinza ya Yuda." 
Joshua7:19 Tenepo Yoswa adalonga kuna Akani mbati, “Mwananga longa pyakuona pano pamaso pa MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele, pontho ubweke. Ngandipange chinchino pano chachita iwe. Leka kundibisira na chibodzi chene.”" 
Joshua7:20 Akani adatawira mbati, “Ndimomwene ine ndamdawiradi MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele. Tenepo pyachita ine mphipi:" 
Joshua7:21 Pakati pa pinthu pyonsene pidapokosera ife, ine ndidaonapo chakufinika chakubalika pyakwanga cha ku Babiloni, siliva wakulemera makilogramu mawiri, pontho msaya wagolidi wakulemera theka ya kilogramu. Tenepo ine ndidapisirira pyakwanga mbandipikwata. Penepi ndapibisa m'khumbi mwanga mwakuchita kupifikhira, pansi pache mbandiikhapo siliva.”" 
Joshua7:22 Natenepo Yoswa adatuma amuna anango, ale adathamanga mbakapita m'khumbi mule mbagumanamo pinthu pile pyafikhirwadi, pansi pache mbapakhala siliva." 
Joshua7:23 Iwo adapibulusa m'khumbi mule mbadza napyo kuna Yoswa na kuna Aisraele onsene mbapiikha pansi pamaso pa MBUYA. 
Joshua7:24 Yoswa pabodzi pene na Aisraele onsene adakwata Akani, siliva, chakufinika, msaya wagolidi pabodzi pene na anache achimuna na achikazi ene, ng'ombe zache, mabulu ache na mabirache, khumbi yache na pinthu pyache pyonsene mbaenda ku Phedi ya Nyatwa." 
Joshua7:25 Tenepo Yoswa adalonga mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji udatidzesera nyatwa ninga yeneyi. MBUYA anati adzese nyatwa pana iwe!” Anthu onsene adamponyera miyala mpakana kufa. Iwo adaponyera miyala, pontho kupisa banjache na pinthu pyache pyonsene." 
Joshua7:26 Iwo adamuluka miyala mizinji pakhali iye pale. Miyala yeneyi ili penepo basi na lero. Ndi thangwi yache mbutoyo na lero imbachemerwa Phedi ya Nyatwa. Tenepo MBUYA hadazhangalirave anthu ale tayu. 
Joshua8:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna Yoswa mbati, “Kwata anyankhondo onsene mbuende nawo pabodzi ku Ai. Leka chita mantha penu kuswipa mtima, thangwi ndinati ndikuchitise kukunda mfumu wa ku Ai, anthu ache, mzindache; pontho dziko yache inakhala yanu." 
Joshua8:2 Imwe muchite kuna Ai na mfumu wache ninga pidachita imwe kuna Yeriko na mfumu wache, mbwenye ulendo uno munakwanisa kukwata pida na pifuyo pyawo kukhala pyanu. Sasanyikani kusosa mzinda mwakuchita kututumusa kubulukira kunduli.”" 
Joshua8:3 Natenepo Yoswa adalamuka kwenda ku Ai pabodzi pene na anyankhondo ache onsene. Iye adasankhula amuna akudziwa kumenya nkhondo mwadidi pikwi makumatatu mbaagwinya na mosiku; 
Joshua8:4 pontho adaapanga mbati, “Kabisaleni kukhundu inango ya mzindawo, kwache lekani kabisala kutali na mzindawo; monsenene sasanyikani pontho khalani m'maso." 
Joshua8:5 Ine pabodzi pene na amuna ana inewa tinapita mumzindamo kaasosa. Tenepo amuna a mu Ai angadza dzamenyana nafe, ife tinazungunuka mbatithawa ninga montho mudachitira ife pakutoma." 
Joshua8:6 Iwo anatithamangisa mpakana tiachitise kwenda kutali na mzindawo. Iwo ananyerezera kuti tikuathawa ninga mudachitira ife pakutoma pale. 
Joshua8:7 Kubuluka penepo imwe muvumbuke mudabisala imwe mule mbamupokosera mzindawo. MBUYA Mulungu wanu anaupereka m'manja mwanu. 
Joshua8:8 Mungaupokosera mzindawo upiseni na moto ninga montho mwakupangirani MBUYA. Matongero anga ngenewa.” 
Joshua8:9 Natenepo Yoswa adaagwinya iwombo adenderatu kabisala m'mbuto zawo. Iwo adadikhira kweneko kumadokero dzuwa a Ai. Mbuto ya pakati pa Ai na Betele. Mosiku wenewo Yoswa adagona mumsasa pabodzi na anthu onsene. 
Joshua8:10 Bzobzo na machibese Yoswa adalamuka mbagumanyisa anyankhondo. Kubuluka penepo iye pabodzi pene na akadamu a Aisraele adaatsogolera kwenda nawo ku Ai. 
Joshua8:11 Anyankhondo pabodzi pene na iye adenda chakumsuwo ukulu wa mpanda wa mzindawo mbamanga msasawo kumpoto kwa Ai; pakati pa iwo na Ai pakhali phedi. 
Joshua8:12 Iye adakwata amuna chifupi-fupi pikwi pishanu mbaabisa kumabulukiro dzuwa a Ai, pakati pa Ai na Betele." 
Joshua8:13 Anyankhondo akhadasasanyika mwadidi mbakhala m'mbuto mwawo, ale akhali mumsasa akhali kumpoto kwa mzinda ule, alembo akhali pakubisala akhali kumabulukiro dzuwa a mzinda ule. Mosiku wenewo Yoswa adagona m'phedi." 
Joshua8:14 Pidaona mfumu wa ku Ai ule amuna a Yoswa, iye pabodzi pene na amunache a mumzinda mule adabuluka mwakuchimbiza kwenda chakuphedi ya Yorodani kamenya nkhondo na Aisraele pambuto yontho-yonthoyo pakhali iwo ulendo wakutoma ule. Iye hakhapidziwa tayu kuti amuna anango adabisala kale kunduli kwa mzindawo kuti amenyane naye." 
Joshua8:15 Yoswa na Aisraele onsene adathawa pyawo chadala pamaso pawo, tenepo Aisraele adathawa kwendera kuthando yatchetcha." 
Joshua8:16 Amuna onsene a mumzindamo adachemerwa kuti athamangise Aisraele ale. Iwo adamthamangisadi Yoswa mpakana kwenderatu kutali na mzinda ule. 
Joshua8:17 Nkhabe mbodzi adasalira mu Ai penu mu Betele tayu kukhonda thamangisa Aisraele. Iwo adasiya pyawo msuwo wa mzinda bwanju mbathamangisa Aisraele. 
Joshua8:18 Kubuluka penepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Yoswa mbati, “Thonyeza dipako ku Ai, ine ndikuikha mzindawu m'manja mwako.” Yoswa adachitadi ninga mudapangirwa iye," 
Joshua8:19 tenepo sindzidzi Yoswa nkhukwiza dzanjache, amuna akhadabisala ale adabuluka mwakuchimbiza kuthamangira mumzinda mule mbaupokosera. Kabodzi kene iwo adaupisa moto mzindawo." 
Joshua8:20 Pidayang'ana amuna a ku Ai m'nduli, adaona utsi uli tolo. Pakhali nkhabeve njira inango yakuti iwo athawire tayu thangwi Aisraele, ale akhadathawira kuthando yatchetcha, akhadazungunuka kumenyana nawo." 
Joshua8:21 Pidaona Yoswa pabodzi pene na amunache onsene kuti anzawo akhadabisala ale adaupokosera mzinda ule pontho kuti aupisa moto, adazungunuka mbatoma kupha amuna a ku Ai." 
Joshua8:22 Amuna akhadabisala ale adabuluka mumzinda mule mbamenyana na amuna a ku Ai. Natenepo amuna a ku Ai akhali pakati, akuzungulirwa na Aisraele khundu zonsene. Aisraele adapha amuna onsene ale mbapakhonda khala munthu na mbodzi ene wakuthawa." 
Joshua8:23 Mbwenye iwo adakwata mfumu wa ku Ai mbadza naye wa moyo kuna Yoswa. 
Joshua8:24 Pikhadamala Aisraele kupha amuna onsene a ku Ai m'minda na m'thando yatchetcha kukhadathamangisa iwo Aisraele kule pontho pidaonesesa iwo kuti onsene amaliratu, Aisraele onsene adabwerera kumzinda wa Ai mbakapha onsene akhali mwenemo ale." 
Joshua8:25 Yoswa adathimiza basi kuthonyeza dipache kuna Ai pontho hadaitule pansi tayu kufikirana anthu onsene a mwenemo adamala phiwa. Anthu onsene akukhala mu Ai adaphiwa nsiku yeneyo. Amuna na akazi ene akhalipo pikwi khumi na piwiri. 
Joshua8:26  
Joshua8:27 Aisraele adakwata pifuyo na pinthu pikhadapokosera iwo mumzinda mule kukhala pyawo ninga montho mukhadalongera MBUYA kuna Yoswa. 
Joshua8:28 Yoswa adapisa mzinda wa Ai mbauvungiratu. Na lero uli tenepo. 
Joshua8:29 Iye adamanika pamuti mfumu wa ku Ai ule mbasiya manungo ache pamuti pale mpakana mawulo. Pidathobila dzuwa Yoswa adatonga kuti mtembo ule ubuluswepo. Natenepo mtembowo udaponywa pansi pa msuwo wa mzindawo. Iwo adaufikhira na mulu wa miyala. Muliwo ulipo na lero. 
Joshua8:30 Kubuluka penepo Yoswa adamangira MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele, guwa yansembe paphiri ya Ebali." 
Joshua8:31 Iye adaisasanya pakutewezana na mudalongera Mose, nyabasa wa MBUYA, kupanga Aisraele, ninga montho mwalemberwa ipyo m'mwambo wa Mose kuti: guwa yakusasanywa na miyala ile chipo hidabenthulwe na pida pyasimbi tayu. Paguwapo adaperekapo nsembe yakupyerera kuna MBUYA, adapereka pontho pyakupereka pyawo pyachiphatizano." 
Joshua8:32 Penepo pamaso pa Aisraele Yoswa adalemba kachiwiri kache pamiyala pale mwambo wa Mose ule. 
Joshua8:33 Aisraele onsene na akulu-akulu awo, mathubu awo na atongi awo pontho pabodzi pene na alendo akukhala pakati pawo adaimira kumakhundu mawiri a Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA kuyang'ana kuna anyansembe a Chilevi adaithukula ale. Khundu ibodzi ya anthu adaimira mwakupasa nkhodolo phiri ya Gerizimu, khundu inangomboyo adaimira mwakupasa nkhodolo phiri ya Ebali. Mose, nyabasa wa MBUYA, ndiye akhadaatonga kuchita tenepo ndzidzi ungafika wakuti atambire mtsanzayiso." 
Joshua8:34 Natenepo Yoswa adawerenga mwakuveka mwambo onsene, mtsanzayiso na dzedze ene, ninga montho mwalemberwa ipyo m'bukhu ya mwambo." 
Joshua8:35 Matongero onsene a Mose adawerengwa na Yoswa kuna gulu yonsene ikhadagumanyikana penepoyo; ana, akazi, pabodzi pene na alendo onsene akukhala pakati pawo." 
Joshua9:1 Kukunda kwa Aisraele kudaveka kuna mafumu onsene akumadokero dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani m'mapiri na m'tchinde mwa mapiri na kuna onsene akukhala m'khundu-khundu mwa Bara ya Mediterania mpakana kumpoto kwa Lebanoni; enewa ndi mafumu a Ahiti, Aamori, Akanani, Aperizi, Ahivi na Ayebusi." 
Joshua9:2 Onsenewa adagumanyikana kusasanya gulu ibodzi ya nkhondo kumenyana na Yoswa pabodzi pene na Aisraele onsene. 
Joshua9:3 Mbwenye anthu a ku Gibeoni, ale akhali Ahivi, adava pinthu pikhadachita Yoswa kuna Yeriko na Ai," 
Joshua9:4 natenepo iwo adanyerezera pyakunyengeza Yoswa. Iwo adakwata pyakudya mbapiikha m'masakha akusakala na mabudu akuikhiramo vinyu apigamba-pigamba mbapipakiza pamabulu awo. 
Joshua9:5 Iwo adavala nguwo zamasakala na nkhwaira zakung'ambika-ng'ambika zakuchita kusonwa pontho. Mikate idakwata iwo ikhali yakuuma pontho yachikukuyi. 
Joshua9:6 Tenepo iwo adenda kumsasa pa Giligala mbakalonga kuna Yoswa na kuna amuna a Chiisraele mbati, “Ife tabulukira dziko yakutali. Chinafuna ife ntchakuti imwe na ife tichite chiverano.”" 
Joshua9:7 Mbwenye amuna a Chiisraele adalonga mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji kuti imwe na ife tichite chiverano? Mwinango imwe mumbakhala chifupi na ife?”" 
Joshua9:8 Iwo adalonga kuna Yoswa mbati, “Ife ndife anyabasanu.” Yoswa adaavunza mbati, “Imwe ndimwe ani? Apo mwabulukira kupi?”" 
Joshua9:9 Penepo iwo adatawira mbati, “Mbuya, ife tabulukira kudziko yakutali, thangwi tava pya MBUYA Mulungu wanu. Ife tava pyonsene pyachita iye m'dziko ya Iguputo," 
Joshua9:10 pontho na pidachita iye kuna mafumu mawiri a Aamori akumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani: Mfumu Sihoni wa ku Heshiboni na Mfumu Ogi wa ku Bashani, ambakhala m'dziko ya Ashitaroti ule." 
Joshua9:11 Akadamu athu pabodzi pene na anthu athu onsene ambakhala m'dziko mwathu ndiye adatipanga kuti tikwate pyakudya kusasanyikira ulendo wakudza kuno dzagumanikana namwe. Ife tidapangwa dzalonga kuna imwe kuti, ‘Ife ndife anyabasanu. Tendeni imwe na ife tichite chiverano.’" 
Joshua9:12 Yang'anani mikate yathuyi. Pidautoma ife ulendo wakudza kuno dzagumanikana namwe mikateyi ikhali yakupisa. Apo lero ngayang'anani! Yauma pontho ina chikukuyi. 
Joshua9:13 Mabudu anthembewa akhali atswa ene ndzidzi ukhaikha ife vinyu. Apo lero ngayang'anani! Amala ng'ambika pyawo. Nguwo zathu na nkhwaira zathu zamalira m'njiramu thangwi ya kulapha kwa nsinzo.” 
Joshua9:14 Amuna a Chiisraele adatambira pyakudya pyawo pile, kwache iwo hadavunze nzeru kuna MBUYA tayu." 
Joshua9:15 Yoswa adachita nawo chiverano cha mtendere anthu a ku Gibeoni mbatawira kukhonda kuapha. Akadamu a Aisraele adatsikimizira chiveranocho pakuchita kudumbira. 
Joshua9:16 Pidagwanda nsiku zitatu kutomera nsiku idachita iwo chiverano chile, Aisraele adadzindikira kuti anthu ale akhali atsanthembawo." 
Joshua9:17 Natenepo Aisraele adatoma kuatewera, tenepo pidagwanda nsiku zitatu adafika kumizinda kukhali anthu ale; Gibeoni, Kefira, Beeroti na Kiriati-Yearimu." 
Joshua9:18 Kwache Aisraele hadaaphe anthu ale tayu, thangwi ya kudumbira kudachita iwo na dzina ya MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele. Anthu adadungunya kuna akadamu pya penepi," 
Joshua9:19 mbwenye iwo adatawira mbati, “Ife tadumbira kuna iwo na dzina ya MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele, natenepo ife nkhabe kuakuwaza tayu." 
Joshua9:20 Na thangwi ya kudumbira kwathu ife tathema kualeka na moyo; ngakhala tinakhonda kuchita tenepo, Mulungu anatitchunyusa." 
Joshua9:21 Tendeni tialeke akhale na moyo, kwache basawo inakhala yakutisakira nkhuni na kutitungira madzi.” Anthu adaphatizana napyo pidalonga akadamu awo pile." 
Joshua9:22 Yoswa adachemeresa anthu a ku Gibeoni ale kuti adze kuna iye. Tenepo iye adaavunza mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji mudatinyengeza kuti mukubulukira dziko yakutali mwenemo imwe mumbakhala chifupi na ife?" 
Joshua9:23 Na thangwi yakuti imwe mwachita penepi, imwe ndimwe akutembererwa. Anthu anu ndzidzi onsene anakhala mabitchu akusaka nkhuni pontho akutunga madzi m'nyumba ya Mulungu wanga.”" 
Joshua9:24 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Mbuya, ife tidachita penepi thangwi tidapidziwa kuti mphyakuonadi kuti MBUYA Mulungu wanu akhadapanga nyabasache Mose kupereka kuna imwe dziko yonseneyi pontho kuti aphe anthu onsene anakhala mwenemowo pamaso panu. Natenepo tidachita mantha pikulu; tikhagopa kufa." 
Joshua9:25 Tenepo ife tili m'manja mwanu. Chitani kuna ife pyonsene pinaona imwe kuti mphyakuthema.” 
Joshua9:26 Natenepo Yoswa adachita ipi: iye adaatchinjiriza, pontho hadatawirise kuti Aisraele aaphe tayu." 
Joshua9:27 Mbwenye pandzidzi onthowo iye adaachitisa kukhala mabitchu akusaka nkhuni pontho akutungira madzi anthu a ku Israele pontho na guwa yansembe ya MBUYA. Na lero anthu enewa basawo njeneyi m'mbuto zonsene zidasankhula MBUYA kuti apembedzerwemo zile. 
Joshua10:1 Adonizedeki, mfumu wa ku Yerusalemu, adava kuti Yoswa akhadapokosera na kuvungiratu mzinda onsene wa Ai na kupha anthu, pontho mfumu wa mwenemo, ninga montho mudachitira iye kuna Yeriko na mfumu wache. Iye adava pontho kuti anthu a ku Gibeoni achita chiverano cha mtendere na Aisraele, pontho iwo akukhala pakati pa Aisraele." 
Joshua10:2 Iye na anthu ache adachita mantha pikulu na pinthu penepi, thangwi Gibeoni ukhali mzinda ukulu pyakwanga kupiringana mizinda inango yonsene yakukhala na mfumu, ukhali ukulu pyakwanga kupiringana Ai, pontho amunache akhali akudziwa kumenya nkhondo mwadidi." 
Joshua10:3 Natenepo Adonizedeki adatumiza mphangwa kuna Mfumu Hohamu wa ku Hebroni, Mfumu Piramu wa ku Yarimuti, Mfumu Yafia wa ku Lakishi na Mfumu Debiri wa ku Egiloni" 
Joshua10:4 mbalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Idzani dzandiphedza kumenyana na Gibeoni thangwi anthu ache achita chiverano cha mtendere na Yoswa pabodzi pene na Aisraele onsene.”" 
Joshua10:5 Mafumu mashanu a Chiamori, mfumu wa ku Yerusalemu, mfumu wa ku Hebroni, mfumu wa ku Yarimuti, mfumu wa ku Lakishi na mfumu wa ku Egiloni adagumanyikana kusasanya gulu ibodzi ene ya nkhondo. Natenepo iwo adenda na anyankhondo awo onsene mbazungulira Gibeoni kuti amenyane naye." 
Joshua10:6 Amuna a ku Gibeoni adatumiza mphangwa kuna Yoswa ku Giligala, kumsasa kukhakhala iye kule mbati, “Lekani kutisiya tekha, Mbuya! Chimbizani mutiphedze! Mafumu onsene a Chiamori a m'nthemba ya mapiri asasanya gulu ibodzi ya nkhondo kuti amenyane nafe.”" 
Joshua10:7 Natenepo Yoswa na anyankhondo ache onsene kuthimizapo amuna akudziwa kumenya nkhondo mwadidi ale, adautoma ulendo kubulukira pa Giligala." 
Joshua10:8 MBUYA adalonga kuna Yoswa mbati, “Leka chita nawo mantha, thangwi ine ndaaikha kale m'manja mwako. Nkhabe na mbodzi ene wa iwo anafuna dzaimisana nawe tayu.”" 
Joshua10:9 Mosiku onsenewo Yoswa na anyankhondo ache adafamba pamulikiti kubulukira ku Giligala kwenda ku Gibeoni. Natenepo iwo adamenyana na Aamori mwakuchita kuatutumusa. 
Joshua10:10 MBUYA adachitisa Aamori kukhala pampani-pani pamaso pa anyankhondo a Aisraele. Aisraele adacheka pakhosi anthu a ku Gibeoni mbaathamangisa na njira yakwendera ku Beti-Horoni mbathimiza basi kwenda na kuapha mpakana ku Azeka na Makeda. 
Joshua10:11 Pikhathawa Aamori pamaso pa Aisraele na njira yakubulukira ku Beti-Horoni kutchithira ku Azeka, MBUYA adaagwisira miyala mikulu-mikulu ya matalala kubulukira kudzulu, tenepo anthu azinji adaphiwa na miyala yeneyi kupiringana adaphiwa na matalasada a Aisraele ale." 
Joshua10:12 Pansiku idapereka MBUYA Aamori m'manja mwa Aisraele, Yoswa adalonga kuna MBUYA pamaso pa Aisraele onsene mbati, “Dzuwa, imira pyako pana Gibeoni; Mwezi, leka famba pana phedi ya Aialoni.”" 
Joshua10:13 Natenepo dzuwa idaimira, pontho mwezi udaleka kufamba kufikirana dzinza idakunda anyamalwache, ninga montho mudalemberwa ipyo m'bukhu ya Yashara. Dzuwa idaimira kati na kati pa thambo mbidembuka na nsiku ya mumphu kuti idoke pansiku yeneyo." 
Joshua10:14 Chipo nee padzati khala nsiku ninga yeneyo, pontho nee na kale ene tayu, nsiku yakuti MBUYA adaverambo munthu. Ndimomwene kuti MBUYA akhadamenyera nkhondo Aisraele." 
Joshua10:15 Pidamala penepi Yoswa pabodzi pene na Aisraele onsene adabwerera kumsasa kwawo pa Giligala. 
Joshua10:16 Mafumu mashanu a Chiamori ale adathawa mbabisala m'nkhwimba pa Makeda. 
Joshua10:17 Pidapangwa Yoswa kuti mafumu mashanu ale adagumanizwa m'nkhwimba pa Makeda," 
Joshua10:18 iye adalonga mbati, “Gulung'undisani mwala ukulu mufunge nawo msuwo wa nkhwimbayo, pontho gwinyani amuna anango kuti akalondaliko." 
Joshua10:19 Kwache imwe ene lekani imira kwene. Thimizani kuthamangisa anyamalwanu; kuasosa kubulukira kunduli, pontho lekani kuatawirisa kufika kumizinda kwawo, thangwi MBUYA Mulungu wanu aaikha m'manja mwanu.”" 
Joshua10:20 Natenepo Yoswa pabodzi pene na Aisraele adapha chifupi-fupi amuna onsene, mbwenye akuchepa ale adathamanga mbapita m'mizinda mwawo yakutchingwa na mipanda hadaphiwe tayu." 
Joshua10:21 Gulu yonsene ya nkhondo idabwerera mwadidi mwene kuna Yoswa kumsasa pa Makeda. Natenepo nkhabe na mbodzi ene adalongera pyakuipa kuna Aisraele tayu. 
Joshua10:22 Yoswa adalonga mbati, “Fungulani msuwo wa nkhwimba, pontho bulusanimo mafumu mashanuwo mudze nawo kuna ine.”" 
Joshua10:23 Natenepo iwo adabulusa kunja mafumu mashanu ale; mfumu wa ku Yerusalemu, Hebroni, Yarimuti, Lakishi na Egiloni." 
Joshua10:24 Pidadzeswa mafumu enewa kuna Yoswa, iye adachemeresa amuna onsene a mu Israele mbalonga kuna akadamu a nkhondo akhadadza na iye ale mbati, “Bwerani kuno muaponde m'khosi mafumuwa.” Natenepo iwo adadzadi patsogolo mbaaponda m'khosi mafumu ale." 
Joshua10:25 Kubuluka penepo Yoswa adalonga kuna akadamu ale mbati, “Lekani chita mantha penu kutaya mtima. Khalani na chipapu pontho wangani mtima. Penepi ndiye pinafuna dzachita MBUYA kuna anyamalwanu onsene anafuna imwe dzamenyana nawo.”" 
Joshua10:26 Yoswa adaalasa mbapha mafumu onsenewo. Kubuluka penepo iye adaamanika pamiti mishanu, tenepo adakhala pamiti pale kufikirana mawulo." 
Joshua10:27 Pidadoka kunja Yoswa adatonga kuti mitembo ya mafumu ale ibuluswepo pamiti pale mbiponywa m'nkhwimba mukhadabisala iwo mule. Pamsuwo wa nkhwimbayo adaikhapo mwala ukulu, ule uli ponthopo na lero." 
Joshua10:28 Pansiku yeneyo Yoswa adapokosera mzinda wa Makeda. Iye adapha anthu onsene mumzindamo pabodzi pene na mfumu wawo ene mbakhonda kusiya na moyo munthu onsene wakukhala mwenemo. Iye adachita kuna mfumu wa ku Makeda ninga montho mudachitira iye na mfumu wa ku Yeriko. 
Joshua10:29 Kubuluka penepo Yoswa na anyankhondo ache adathimiza kubuluka pa Makeda kwenda ku Libina mbakamenya nawo nkhondo. 
Joshua10:30 MBUYA adaikha pontho mzindawo pabodzi pene na mfumu wawo m'manja mwa Aisraele. Yoswa adavunga mzindawo mbapha anthu onsene mwenemo. Nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene adasala na moyo tayu. Iye adachita kuna mfumu wa mwenemo ninga montho mudachitira iye na mfumu wa ku Yeriko. 
Joshua10:31 Kubuluka penepo Yoswa na anyankhondo ache adathimiza kubuluka pa Libina kwenda ku Lakishi. Iye adazungulira mbatoma kumenya nawo nkhondo. 
Joshua10:32 MBUYA adaikha pontho Lakishi m'manja mwa Aisraele, tenepo Yoswa adapokosera mzindawo pansiku yachiwiri ya nkhondo. Iye adavunga mzindawo mbapha anthu onsene mwenemo ninga mukhadachitira iye na mzinda wa Libina." 
Joshua10:33 Pandzidzi wenewu Horamu mfumu wa ku Gezeri akhadadza dzaphedza Lakishi, mbwenye Yoswa adampha pabodzi pene na anyankhondo ache onsene mwakuti nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene adasala na moyo tayu." 
Joshua10:34 Kubuluka penepo Yoswa na anyankhondo ache adathimiza kubuluka ku Lakishi kwenda ku Egiloni. Iye adazungulira mbatoma kumenya nawo nkhondo. 
Joshua10:35 Mzindawo adaupokosera na nsiku yonthoyo mbauvunga na kupha anthu onsene a mwenemo ninga montho mudachitira iye mzinda wa Lakishi. 
Joshua10:36 Kubuluka penepo Yoswa na anyankhondo ache adathimiza kubuluka pa Egiloni kwenda ku Hebroni mbatoma kumenya nawo nkhondo. 
Joshua10:37 Iye adapokosera mzindawo mbauvunga, Iye adapha mfumu, pontho munthu onsene wakukhala mumzinda pabodzi pene na maluwani achifupi. Yoswa adavunga mzindawo monsene mwene ninga montho mukhadachita iye na mzinda wa Egiloni mwakuti nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene adasala na moyo tayu." 
Joshua10:38 Kubuluka penepo Yoswa na anyankhondo ache adabwerera ku Debiri mbatoma kumenya nawo nkhondo. 
Joshua10:39 Iye adaupokosera mbapha mfumu, pontho munthu onsene mumzinda pabodzi pene na maluwani achifupi. Iwo adapha munthu onsene mwenemo. Yoswa adachita kuna Debiri na kuna mfumu wache ninga montho mukhadachita iye kuna Hebroni na kuna Libina na kuna mfumu wache." 
Joshua10:40 Yoswa adapokosera nthemba yonseneyo; nthemba ya mapiri, thando yatchetcha ya Negebu, kumadokero dzuwa a mapiri ang'ono-ang'ono, kumtelero pabodzi pene na mafumu awo ene. Nkhabe na mbodzi ene adasala na moyo tayu. Anthu onsene amoyo adamala phiwa ninga montho mukhadaapangira MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele." 
Joshua10:41 Tenepo Yoswa adaakunda onsene kubulukira ku Kadeshi Barinea kumwera mpakana ku Gaza, pontho kubulukira kunthemba yonsene ya Gosheni mpakana ku Gibeoni." 
Joshua10:42 Mafumu onsenewa pabodzi pene na nthemba zawo Yoswa adaakunda pandzidzi ubodzi wa nkhondo, thangwi MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele ndiye akhaamenyera nkhondo." 
Joshua10:43 Pidamala penepo Yoswa pabodzi pene na Aisraele onsene adabwerera kumsasa kwawo pa Giligala. 
Joshua11:1 Pidava Yabini mfumu wa ku Hazori pya kukunda kuduchita Israele, adatumiza mphangwa kuna Yobabu mfumu wa ku Madoni; kuna mafumu a ku Shimironi na Akishafu;" 
Joshua11:2 kuna mafumu m'dziko ya mapiri kumpoto kwa phedi ya Yorodani kumwera kwa nyanza ya Galilea, m'tchinde mwa mapiri kumadokero dzuwa, na a ku Nafoti-Dori kumadokero dzuwa;" 
Joshua11:3 kuna Akanani akumabulukiro dzuwa na akumadokero dzuwa; kuna Aamori, Ahiti, Aperizi, na Ayebusi akukhala m'mapiri ale; pontho na kuna Ahivi ale ali m'tchinde mwa phiri ya Herimoni m'dziko ya Mizipa." 
Joshua11:4 Iwo adadza pabodzi pene na magulu awo a nkhondo pontho na akavalo azinji pontho pingolo pizinji. Ikhali gulu ikulu ya nkhondo mwakuti kuinjipa kwawo kukhali ninga tchetcha ya pagombe. 
Joshua11:5 Mafumu onsenewa adaphatizana kukhala gulu ibodzi ya nkhondo, tenepo iwo adamanga misasa yawo pa mkulo a Meromu, kumenyana na Aisraele." 
Joshua11:6 MBUYA adalonga kuna Yoswa mbati, “Leka chita nawo mantha thangwi mangwana ndzidzi ninga uno, onsenewa ndinaapereka m'manja mwa Aisraele kuti aaphe. Akavalo awo umale kualamaza; pingolo pyawo upipise na moto.”" 
Joshua11:7 Natenepo Yoswa pabodzi pene na anyankhondo ache adadza mwakututumusa pamkulo wa Meromu mbamenyana nawo," 
Joshua11:8 tenepo MBUYA adapereka onsene ale m'manja mwa Aisraele. Aisraele adakunda anyamalwawo ale mbaathamangisa mpakana ku Sidoni wamkulu, Misirefoti-Maimu pontho na kuphedi ya Mizipa kumabulukiro dzuwa kufikirana onsene adamaliratu, nee munthu na mbodzi ene wakusala na moyo tayu." 
Joshua11:9 Yoswa adachita kuna iwo ninga montho mukhadalongera MBUYA. Iye adalamaza akavalo awo mbapisa moto pingolo pyawo. 
Joshua11:10 Kubuluka penepo Yoswa adazungunukira m'nduli mbapokosera Hazori na kupha mfumu wa mwenemo. (Hazori akhali wamphamvu pyakwanga kupiringana mafumu enewa.) Munthu onsene wakukhala mwenemo adaphiwa. 
Joshua11:11 Onsene adamala kuapha; nkhabe siya na chinthu cha moyo chene tayu. Mzinda onsene wa Hazori adaupisa moto. 
Joshua11:12 Yoswa adapokosera mizinda mikulu-mikulu yonseneyi mbapha anthu onsene a mwenemo pabodzi pene na mafumu awo. Onsene adamaliratu ninga montho mukhadalongera Mose nyabasa wa MBUYA. 
Joshua11:13 Mbwenye Aisraele hadapise tayu mizinda yonsene yakumangwa papitunda pawo, kupambula Hazori udapisa Yoswa ule." 
Joshua11:14 Aisraele adakwata pinthu pyakufunikira na pifuyo pya m'mizinda yeneyi kukhala pyawo. Mbwenye anthu onsene adamala kuapha, nee mbodzi adasalira na moyo." 
Joshua11:15 Ninga mudalongera Mulungu kupanga Mose, Mosembo adapanga Yoswa, tenepo Yoswa adachitadi; hadasiye chinthu okhonda kuchichita tayu papyonsene pidatonga MBUYA kuna Mose." 
Joshua11:16 Natenepo Yoswa adapokosera dziko yonseneyi: nthemba ya mapiri, thando yatchetcha ya Negebu yonsene, nthemba yonsene ya Gosheni, m'tchinde mwa mapiri kumabulukiro dzuwa, phedi ya Yorodani na mapiri a Israele pontho na m'tchinde mwache," 
Joshua11:17 kubulukira kuphiri ya Halaki, ile idatsamira Seiri mpakana ku Baala-Gadi m'phedi ya Lebanoni m'tchinde mwa phiri ya Herimoni. Iye adakunda mafumu onsene mbaapha." 
Joshua11:18 Yoswa adamenya nkhondo na mafumu enewa ndzidzi ukulu ene mbaapha onsenene. 
Joshua11:19 Mzinda udachita chiverano cha mtendere na Israele ngule ene wa Gibeoni, kule kukhakhala Ahivi. Mbwenye mizinda inango yonsene idakundwa pankhondo." 
Joshua11:20 Thangwi MBUYA ndiye adachitisa anthu a mizinda inango ile kuumisa mtima kuti amenye nkhondo na Aisraele, towera onsene amale kuavunga, kuapuluziratu onsene mwakukhonda kuva nawo nsisi ninga montho mudalongera MBUYA kuna Mose." 
Joshua11:21 Pandzidzi wenewo Yoswa adenda kavunga dzinza ya anthu akujintcha yakuchemerwa Aanakimu, ale akhakhala m'nthemba ya mapiri; mu Hebroni, Debiri, Anabu, na a m'nthemba yonsene ya mapiri a Yuda na Israele. Yoswa adaavunga onsenewo pabodzi pene na mizindawo ene." 
Joshua11:22 Nkhabe pontho mbodzi wa dzinza ya Aanakimu akhadasala na moyo mu Israele tayu; mbwenye akuchepa ndiye akhadasala mu Gaza, Gati na Ashidodi." 
Joshua11:23 Yoswa adapokosera dziko yonsene ninga montho mukhadalongera MBUYA kuna Mose. Yoswa akhadapereka dziko ile kuna Aisraele onsene kukhala yawo ene mbaigawa kada dzinza khundu yache. Natenepo anthu adapuma kumenya nkhondo. 
Joshua12:1 Aisraele akhadakunda kale na kukwata dziko yonsene yakumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani kubulukira kuphedi ya Arinoni mpakana kuphedi ya mkulo wa Yorodani kumpoto kwa phiri ya Herimoni. Iwo adakunda mafumu mawiri. 
Joshua12:2 Mbodzi akhali Sihoni mfumu wa Aamori ule akhatonga dziko ya Heshiboni. Pa ufumu wache adathimizapo khundu inango ya Gileadi: kubulukira ku Aroeri (m'khundu-khundu mwa phedi ya Arinoni) na mzinda wa pakati na kati pa phedi mpakana kumkulo wa Yaboki, madire a Amoni;" 
Joshua12:3 kuthimizapo phedi ya mkulo wa Yorodani kubulukira kunyanza ya Galilea kwenda kumwera ku Beti-Yeshimoti (kumabulukiro dzuwa a Nyanza Yakufa), pontho kwenderatu m'tchinde mwa phiri ya Pisiga." 
Joshua12:4 Iwo adakunda pontho Mfumu Ogi wa ku Bashani, ule akhali mbodzi wa anthu akumalisira a Arefaimu; iye adatonga ku Ashitaroti na Edrei." 
Joshua12:5 Pa ufumu wachewo adathimizapo phiri ya Herimoni, Saleka na nthemba yonsene ya Bashani mpakana kumadire a Geshuri na Maaka, pontho na khundu inango ya nthemba ya Gileadi kufikiratu kudziko ya Mfumu Sihoni wa ku Heshiboni." 
Joshua12:6 Mafumu mawiri enewa adakundwa na Mose, pontho na anthu onsene a ku Israele. Mose nyabasa wa MBUYA adapereka dziko ya mafumu enewa kuna madzinza a Gadi na Rubeni, pontho na Manase wakumabulukiro dzuwa kukhala yawo ene." 
Joshua12:7 Yoswa pabodzi pene na Aisraele adakunda mafumu onsene a nthemba yakumadokero dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani kubulukira ku Baala-Gadi m'phedi ya Lebanoni mpakana kuphiri ya Halaki kumwera chifupi na Edomu. Yoswa adagawa dziko yonsene ile pakati pa madzinza adasala ale mbaipereka kukhala yawo ene. 
Joshua12:8 Khundu yonsene nkhuthimizapo nthemba ya mapiri, m'tchinde mwa mapiri akumadokero dzuwa, phedi ya Yorodani na m'tchinde mwa mapiri ache, mbuto zakubidira zakumadokero dzuwa, nthemba zakuuma pontho na thando yatchetcha ya Negebu. Dziko yeneyi ikhali ya Ahiti, Aamori, Akanani, Aperizi, Ahivi na Ayebusi." 
Joshua12:9 Aisraele adakunda mafumu a m'mizinda ishi; Yeriko, Ai, (chifupi na Betele)," 
Joshua12:10 Yerusalemu, Hebroni," 
Joshua12:11 Yarimuti, Lakishi," 
Joshua12:12 Egiloni, Gezeri," 
Joshua12:13 Debiri, Gederi," 
Joshua12:14 Horima, Aradi," 
Joshua12:15 Libina, Adulamu," 
Joshua12:16 Makeda, Betele," 
Joshua12:17 Tapua, Hefere," 
Joshua12:18 Afeki, Lasharoni," 
Joshua12:19 Madoni, Hazori," 
Joshua12:20 Shimironi Meroni, Akishafu," 
Joshua12:21 Taanaki, Megido," 
Joshua12:22 Kedeshi, Yokoneamu (mu Karimele)" 
Joshua12:23 Dori, (m'gombe-gombe), Goimu (m'Galilea)," 
Joshua12:24 na Tiriza. Mafumu onsene akhali makumatatu na mbodzi. 
Joshua13:1 Pidakalamba Yoswa mbakhala na pyaka pizinji pyakubalwa. MBUYA adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Iwe wakalamba mbwenye pasala dziko ikulu kuti iwe upokose." 
Joshua13:2 Nthemba yasalayo njishi: Nthemba zonsene za Afilisti na za Ageshuri 
Joshua13:3 (nthemba zakubulukira kumkulo wa Shihori kumabulukiro dzuwa a Iguputo mpakana kumadire a Ekroni kumpoto kwache zikhayeswa ninga za Akanani mbatongwa na mafumu mashanu a Chifilisti mu Gaza, Ashidodi, Ashikeloni, Gati na Ekroni); pontho na nthemba za Aavi" 
Joshua13:4 kumwera; dziko yonsene ya Akanani kubulukira ku Ara wa Asidonia mpakana ku Afeki, nthemba ya Aamori," 
Joshua13:5 dziko ya Gebali; pontho na Lebanoni onsene mpakana kumabulukiro dzuwa kwache, kubulukira ku Baala-Gadi m'tchinde mwa phiri ya Herimoni mpakana kumakata a Hamati." 
Joshua13:6 “Mbwenye kulonga pya anthu akukhala m'dziko ya m'mapiri kubulukira ku Lebanoni kwenda ku Misirefoti-Maimu, yeneyi ndi dziko yonsene ya Asidoni, ine ene mwenechiro ndinati ndiathamangise pamaso pa Aisraele. Onesesa kuti dziko yeneyi waigawa kuna Aisraele kuti ikhale yawo ene ninga mudakupangira ine," 
Joshua13:7 pontho uigawe pakati pa madzinza mafemba na Manase wakumadokero dzuwa kuti ikhale yawo ene.” 
Joshua13:8 Manase wakumabulukiro dzuwa, dzinza ya Rubeni, na ya Gadi akhadatambira kale dziko yakumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani, ile ikhadaapasa Mose nyabasa wa MBUYA kukhala yawo ene." 
Joshua13:9 Dzikoyo idafumuka kubulukira ku Aroeri madire a phedi ya Arinoni, pontho kubulukira kuluwani ya pakati pa phedi ya Arinoni kuthimizapo mbuto zonsene zakukwira za Medeba mpakana ku Diboni," 
Joshua13:10 na kumaluwani onsene a Mfumu Sihoni wa Aamori, ule akhatonga Heshiboni mpakana ku madire a Aamoni." 
Joshua13:11 Kubuluka penepo idathimiza Gileadi, pontho nthemba za anthu a ku Geshuri na Maaka, phiri yonsene ya Herimoni, nthemba yonsene ya Bashani mpakana ku Saleka," 
Joshua13:12 pontho na nthemba yonsene ya ufumu wa Ogi m'Bashani, ule akhatonga dziko ya Ashitaroti na Edrei, pontho ule akhali nyakusala mbodzi wa anthu akumalisira a Arefaimu. Mose akhadaakunda mbakwata dziko yawo." 
Joshua13:13 Kwache Aisraele hadathamangise anthu a ku Geshuri na Maaka tayu. Natenepo iwo akuthimiza kukhala pakati pa Aisraele na lero. 
Joshua13:14 Mbwenye dzinza ya Levi hidapaswa pinthu kukhala pyawo pene tayu, thangwi nsembe yakupyerera imbaperekwa kuna MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele ile, ndiye ikhali pinthu pyawo ninga montho mukhadadumbira iye kuna iwo." 
Joshua13:15 Mose akhadapereka khundu inango ya dziko ile kuna mabanja a dzinza ya Rubeni kukhala yawo ene. 
Joshua13:16 Madire awo adafumuka mpakana ku Aroeri (m'khundu khundu mwa phedi ya Arinoni) na mzinda wakukhala pakati pa phedi yeneyi kuthimizapo mbuto zonsene zakukwira zakuzungulira Medeba," 
Joshua13:17 kuthimiza pontho na Heshiboni pontho maluwani onsene a pamapiri: Diboni, Bamoti Baala, Beti-Baalameoni," 
Joshua13:18 Yahazi, Kedemoti, Mefaati," 
Joshua13:19 Kiriataimu, Sibima, Zereti-Shahari paphiri ya m'phedi," 
Joshua13:20 Beti-Peori, pakubidira pa phiri ya Pisiga, pontho Beti-Yeshimoti," 
Joshua13:21 kuthimiza pontho na maluwani onsene a pamapiri pabodzi pene na ufumu onsene wa Mfumu Sihoni wa Chiamori ule akhadatonga dziko ya Heshiboni. Mose adakunda mfumu weneyu pabodzi pene na atongi a ku Midiani: Evi, Rekemu, Zuri, Huri, na Reba. Onsenenewa akhadatonga nthemba ile m'mbuto mwa Mfumu Sihoni." 
Joshua13:22 Mbodzi wa anthu adaphiwa na anthu a ku Israele ndi Balamu nyakuombedza, mwana Beori." 
Joshua13:23 Mkulo wa Yorodani ndiye akhali madire akumadokero dzuwa a dzinza ya Rubeni. Yeneyi ndiye ikhali maluwani na midzi adapaswa mabanja a dzinza ya Rubeni kuti ikhale yawo ene. 
Joshua13:24 Mose adapereka pontho khundu inango ya dziko ile kuna mabanja a dzinza ya Gadi kuti ikhale yawo ene. 
Joshua13:25 Nthemba yawoyo ikhali Yazere, na maluwani onsene a Gileadi, khundu inango ya dziko ya Aamoni mpakana ku Aroeri, kule nkhumabulukiro dzuwa a Raba." 
Joshua13:26 Nthembawo idathimizirika kubulukira ku Heshiboni kwenda ku Ramati-Mizipa, pontho na Betonimu, kubulukira ku Mahanaimu kwenderatu kumadire a Lodebara." 
Joshua13:27 M'phedi ya Yorodani, madire adathimizapo Beti-Haramu, Beti-Nimera, Sukoti, na Zafoni, ufumu unango onsene wa Mfumu Sihoni wa ku Heshiboni. Madire awo akumadokero dzuwa akhali mkulo wa Yorodani mpakana kumpoto kwa nyanza ya Galilea." 
Joshua13:28 Yeneyi ndiye ikhali maluwani na midzi adapaswa mabanja a dzinza ya Gadi kukhala yawo ene. 
Joshua13:29 Mose akhadapereka khundu inango ya dziko ile kuna Manase wakumabulukiro dzuwa kada banja kukhala yawo ene. 
Joshua13:30 Madire awo adathimizirika mpakana ku Mahanaimu, pontho na nthemba yonsene ya Bashani, ufumu onsene wa Ogi, Mfumu Bashani, pabodzi pene na midzi yonsene makumatanthatu ya Yairi m'Bashani," 
Joshua13:31 kuthimizapo khundu inango ya Gileadi, pontho na Ashitaroti na Edrei, mizinda mikulu ya Ogi m'Bashani. Nthemba yonseneyi idaperekwa kuna khundu ibodzi ya pidzukulu pya Makiri, mwana Manase kada banja." 
Joshua13:32 Mwenemu ndiye mudagawira Mose dziko yakumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani na Yeriko pikhali iye pa phedi ya Moabu. 
Joshua13:33 Mbwenye Mose hadapereke dziko na ibodzi ene tayu kuna dzinza ya Levi. Iye adaapanga kuti khundu yawo inakhala nsembe zakuperekwa kuna MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele. 
Joshua14:1 Mbuto zidapaswa Aisraele kukhala zawo zene m'dziko ya Kanani, zile zidaagawira Eleazara nyansembe, Yoswa mwana Nuni na akadamu a m'madzinza a Israele nsenezi. Mbuto zenezi zidaperekwa kuna madzinza mafemba na theka" 
Joshua14:2 pakuchita ntsango ninga montho mudalongera MBUYA kudzera muna Mose. 
Joshua14:3 Mose akhadapereka kale dziko yakumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani kuna madzinza mawiri na Manase wakumabulukiro dzuwa kukhala yawo ene, mbwenye dzinza ya Levi hadaipase dziko na pang'ono pene tayu," 
Joshua14:4 thangwi ana achimuna a Yosefe akhadasanduka madzinza mawiri, Manase na Eferemu. Alevi hadatambire khundu yawo pa dziko ile tayu, kwache adapaswa kwene luwani kuti akhalemo na mbuto yakudyeserapo pifuyo pyawo." 
Joshua14:5 Natenepo Aisraele adagawana dziko ile ninga montho mukhadalongera MBUYA kudzera muna Mose. 
Joshua14:6 Kubuluka penepo anthu a dzinza ya Yuda adadza kuna Yoswa pa Giligala, tenepo Kalebu mwana Yefune, Mkenezi, adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ukupidziwa pidalonga MBUYA pa Kadeshi Barinea pya iwe na ine kuna Mose, munthu wa Mulungu ule." 
Joshua14:7 Ndzidzi ukhadanditumiza Mose nyabasa wa MBUYA kubulukira ku Kadeshi Barinea dzazonda dziko ino, ndikhali pyaka makumanayi pyakubalwa. Tenepo ine ndidadza na mphangwa malingana na kuona kwanga," 
Joshua14:8 mbwenye abale anga adenda na ine adachitisa anthu kukhala na mantha. Mbwenye podi kwene kuti pikhali tenepo, ine ndidathimiza kuvera MBUYA Mulungu wanga na mtima onsene." 
Joshua14:9 Natenepo pansiku yeneyo Mose adadumbira kuna ine mbati, ‘Dziko idaponda iwe mbufambamo ile inakhala yako na anako ene kwenda na kwenda, thangwi wavera MBUYA Mulungu wanga na mtima onsene.’" 
Joshua14:10 Natenepo ninga montho mudadumbira MBUYA kuna ine, iye andikoya na moyo pyaka makumanayi na pishanu kutomera pansiku idalonga iye penepi kuna Mose, uku Aisraele akutsalakatika m'thando yatchetcha. Natenepo lero ndina pyaka makumasere na pishanu pyakubalwa." 
Joshua14:11 Na lero mphamvu ndikhali nazo basi ninga zontho zikhali na ine pandzidzi idandituma Mose. Mphamvu ndili nazo basi zakukwanisa kumenya nazo nkhondo penu kuchita chinthu chinango chene. 
Joshua14:12 Tenepo lero ndipase nthemba ya mapiri idadumbira MBUYA pansiku ile kuna ine. Iwe ene udava kuti Aanakimu akhali kweneko pontho kuti maluwani awo akhali akulu-akulu pontho akutchingwa na mpanda, mbwenye na chiphedzo cha MBUYA ine ndinati ndiathamangisemo ninga montho mudalongera MBUYA.”" 
Joshua14:13 Kubuluka penepo Yoswa adatsanzayisa Kalebu mwana Yefune mbampasa mzinda wa Hebroni kukhala wache ene. 
Joshua14:14 Natenepo mzinda wa Hebroni na lero ngwa Kalebu mwana Yefune, Mkenezi, thangwi iye adavera MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele na mtimache onsene." 
Joshua14:15 Mzinda wa Hebroni pakutoma ukhachemerwa na dzina ya Kiriati-Ariba. Aribayo akhali munthu wamkulu pyakwanga pakati pa Aanakimu. Kubuluka penepo dziko idapuma kumenya nkhondo. 
Joshua15:1 Dzinza ya Yuda kada banja adatambira khundu ibodzi ya dziko ile ninga tenepa: Dziko ile idafika kumwera chadi-chadi kwa thando yatchetcha ya Zini pamadire a Edomu," 
Joshua15:2 Madire enewa akumwera adatomera kumadolomero akumwera kwa Nyanza Yakufa 
Joshua15:3 kwendera kumwera kubulukira kunjira ya pamtelero ya Akarabimu mpakana ku Zini. Adenda na kumwera kwa Kadeshi Barinea, kugwanda na pa Hezironi mpakana ku Adari mbazungunuka kuyang'ana ku Karika," 
Joshua15:4 mbathimiza kwenda ku Azimoni, pontho adagwanda na mumkulo okhokha m'madire a Iguputo mpakana ku Bara ya Mediterania, kule kudadolomera madire awo. Enewa ndiye akhali madire akumwera a Yuda." 
Joshua15:5 Madire ache akumabulukiro dzuwa akhali Nyanza Yakufa mpakana padadolomera mkulo wa Yorodani kugwera m'Nyanza Yakufayi. Madire ache akumpoto adatomera penepo," 
Joshua15:6 mbafumuka mpakana ku Beti-Hogila mbaenda kumpoto kwa madire a mkulo wa Yorodani. Kubuluka penepo adenda mpakana ku Mwala wa Bohani (Bohani akhali mwana Rubeni)," 
Joshua15:7 kubulukira ku Phedi ya Nyatwa mpakana ku Debiri, kubuluka penepo adazungunukira kumpoto kuyang'ana ku Giligala, ale adayang'ana njira ya pamakata a Adumimu kukhundu yakumwera kwa phedi ile. Kubuluka penepo adathimiza kwenda ku mphuno za madzi za Enishemeshi kunja kwa Enirogele," 
Joshua15:8 mbagwanda na pa phedi ya Beni-Hinomu kukhundu yakumwera kwa phiri, kule kukhali mzinda wa Yerusalemu wa Ayebusi. Kubuluka penepo madire awo adathimizika basi mpakana pansonga ya phiri ya kukhundu yakumadokero dzuwa a phedi ya Hinomu kunkhomo yakumpoto kwa phedi ya Refaimu." 
Joshua15:9 Kubuluka penepo madirewo adathimiza kwenda kumphuno za madzi za Nefitoa na kunja kwa mizinda ya chifupi na phiri ya Eferoni. Kubuluka penepo adazungunuka kwendera ku Baala (penu Kiriati-Yearimu)," 
Joshua15:10 kule kudazungulira iwo kwenda kumadokero dzuwa a Baala kwendera kunthemba ya mapiri a Seiri, adathimiza kwenda kukhundu yakumpoto kwa phiri ya Yearimu, (penu Kesaloni) kubidira ku Beti-Shemeshi pontho kugwanda na pa Timina." 
Joshua15:11 Madirewo adathimiza basi kufumukira kuphiri kumpoto kwa Ekroni mbazungulira ku Shikeroni kugwanda na phiri ya Baala mpakana ku Yaminia mbakadolomera pa Bara ya Mediterania," 
Joshua15:12 madire akumadokero dzuwa. M'madire enewa mukhakhala mabanja a dzinza ya Yuda. 
Joshua15:13 Ninga montho mudalongera MBUYA kuna Yoswa, khundu ibodzi ya nthemba ya Yuda idaperekwa kuna Kalebu mwana Yefune wa dzinza ya Yuda. Iye adapaswa Hebroni mzinda ule ukhali wa Ariba, babache Anaki." 
Joshua15:14 Kalebu adathamangisa pidzukulu pya Anaki mumzindamo. Enewa ndi nkhonda Sheshai, Ahimani na Talimai." 
Joshua15:15 Kubuluka penepo iye adenda kasosa anthu a mu Debiri. Mzinda wenewu ukhachemerwa na dzina yakuti Kiriati-Seferi. 
Joshua15:16 Kalebu adalonga mbati, “Munthu anapikwanisa kukunda Kiriati-Seferi ndinampasa Akisa, mwananga wamkazi kuti akhale mkazache.”" 
Joshua15:17 Oteniele, mwana wamamuna wa Kenazi, mbaleache Kalebu adaukunda mzinda ule, natenepo Kalebu adapereka Akisa mwanache wamkazi ule kuna Oteniele kuti akhale mkazache." 
Joshua15:18 Pansiku yakukazhali Oteniele adadembetera mankhadziache ule kupempha babache pya munda. Natenepo mkazi ule adatchitha pabulu wache, tenepo Kalebu adamvunza chikhafuna iye." 
Joshua15:19 Iye adatawira mbati, “Mbuto yatipasa imweyi ili m'thando yatchetcha ya Negebu, tenepo tinafuna mbuto inango ene yakukhala na madzi.” Natenepo Kalebu adapereka kuna iye mbuto yadidi yakukhala na mphuno za madzi, kumtunda na kuphedi kwene." 
Joshua15:20 Ishi ndi nthemba idatambira dzinza ya Yuda kada banja kukhala yawo ene. 
Joshua15:21 Maluwani akutali kumwera ale akhali awo, ale adachita madire na Edomu akhali; Kabizeele, Ederi, Yaguri," 
Joshua15:22 Kina, Dimona, Adada," 
Joshua15:23 Kedeshi, Hazori, Ithinani," 
Joshua15:24 Zifi, Telemu, Bealoti," 
Joshua15:25 Hazori-Hadata, Kerioti Hezironi (penu Hazori)," 
Joshua15:26 Amamu, Shema, Molada," 
Joshua15:27 Hazari-Gada, Heshimoni, Beti-Peleti," 
Joshua15:28 Hazari-Shuali, Beeresheba, Biziotia," 
Joshua15:29 Baala, Iimu, Ezemu," 
Joshua15:30 Elitoladi, Kesili, Horima," 
Joshua15:31 Zikilagi, Madimana, Sanisana," 
Joshua15:32 Lebaoti, Shilihimu, Aini, na Rimoni, onsene pabodzi pene akhalipo maluwani makumawiri na mafemba na midzi yache ene." 
Joshua15:33 Maluwani a m'tchinde mwa phiri kumabulukiro dzuwa akhali Eshitaoli, Zora, Ashina," 
Joshua15:34 Zanoa, Eni-Ganimu, Tapua, Enami," 
Joshua15:35 Yarimuti, Adulamu, Soko, Azeka," 
Joshua15:36 Shaaraimu, Aditaimu, Gedera na Gederotaimu, maluwani khumi na manayi na midzi yache ene." 
Joshua15:37 Pakhali pontho Zenani, Hadasha, Migidali-Gadi," 
Joshua15:38 Dileani, Mizipa, Yokoteele," 
Joshua15:39 Lakishi, Bozikati, Egiloni," 
Joshua15:40 Kaboni, Lahimasi, Kitilishi" 
Joshua15:41 Gederoti, Beti-Dagoni, Naama na Makeda, maluwani khumi na matanthatu na midzi yache." 
Joshua15:42 Pakhali pontho Libina, Etheri, Ashani," 
Joshua15:43 Ifita, Ashina, Nezibi," 
Joshua15:44 Keila, Akizibu na Maresha, maluwani mafemba na midzi yache." 
Joshua15:45 Pakhali Ekroni na maluwani pontho na midzi yache yakuzungulira; 
Joshua15:46 kumadokero dzuwa a Ekroni, maluwani onsene ale akhali pansi pa utongi wa Ashidodi, pabodzi pene na midzi yawo." 
Joshua15:47 Pakhali pontho Ashidodi na Gaza, pabodzi pene na maluwani na midzi yawo yakuzungulira, kwenderatu ku madire a Iguputo na m'khundu-khundu mwa Bara ya Mediterania." 
Joshua15:48 M'nthemba ya mapiri pakhali Shamiri, Yatiri, Soko," 
Joshua15:49 Dana, Kiriati-Sana, (weneyu ndi Debiri)," 
Joshua15:50 Anabu, Eshitemo, Animu," 
Joshua15:51 Gosheni, Holoni na Gilo, maluwani khumi na ibodzi na midzi yawo." 
Joshua15:52 Pakhali Arabu, Duma, Eshani," 
Joshua15:53 Yanimu, Beti-Tapua, Afeka," 
Joshua15:54 Humita, Kiriati-Ariba (weneyu ndi Hebroni) na Ziori, maluwani mafemba na midzi yawo." 
Joshua15:55 Pakhali Maoni, Karimele, Zifi, Yuta," 
Joshua15:56 Yezereele, Yokideama, Zanoa," 
Joshua15:57 Kaini, Gibea na Timina, maluwani khumi na midzi yache." 
Joshua15:58 Pakhali Halihuli, Beti-Zuri, Gedori," 
Joshua15:59 Maarati, Beti-Anoti na Elitekoni, maluwani matanthatu na midzi yache." 
Joshua15:60 Pakhali Kiriati-Baala (weneyu ndi Kiriati-Yearimu) na Raba, maluwani khumi na midzi yache." 
Joshua15:61 M'thando yatchetcha mukhali Beti-Araba, Midini, Sekaka," 
Joshua15:62 Nibishani, Mzinda wa Munyu, pontho na Engedi, maluwani matanthatu na midzi yache." 
Joshua15:63 Mbwenye anthu a dzinza ya Yuda hadakwanise kuthamangisa Ayebusi akhakhala mu Yerusalemu ale tayu. Ayebusi akuthimiza kukhala mwenemo pabodzi pene na anthu a dzinza ya Yuda. 
Joshua16:1 Madire akumwera kwa nthemba idapaswa pidzukulu pya Yosefe idatomera kumkulo wa Yorodani chifupi na Yeriko, kumabulukiro dzuwa a pamphuno za madzi za ku Yeriko mbapita na m'thando yatchetcha. Iwo adakwira kunthemba ya mapiri ya Betele kubulukira ku Yeriko." 
Joshua16:2 Kubulukira ku Betele adenda ku Luzi kugwanda na m'nthemba ya Aariki mu Ataroti. 
Joshua16:3 Kubuluka penepo adathimiza kwenda kumadokero dzuwa kunthemba ya Yafuleti mpakana nthemba ya ku Beti-Horoni pontho Gezeri mbakamalizira pa Bara ya Mediterania. 
Joshua16:4 Pidzukulu pya Yosefe, dzinza ya Eferemu na Manase yakumadokero dzuwa idatambira nthemba yeneyi kukhala yawo ene." 
Joshua16:5 Nthemba ya Eferemu kada banja njishi: madire awo adatomera ku Ataroti-Adara kwendera kumabulukiro dzuwa mbakwira ku Beti-Horoni," 
Joshua16:6 kubuluka penepo adafika ku Bara ya Mediterania. Mikimetati akhali kumpoto kwawo. Kumabulukiro dzuwa a kweneku madire awo adagonya mbayang'ana Taanati Shilo mbapiringana penepa mpakana kumabulukiro dzuwa a Yanoa. 
Joshua16:7 Kubuluka penepo adabidira ku Ataroti na Naara kubulukira ku Yanoa kwenda ku Yeriko mbakadolomera pamkulo wa Yorodani. 
Joshua16:8 Kubulukira pa Tapua madire ale adenda kumadokero dzuwa mpakana kumkhwawa wa Kana mbakadolomera ku Bara ya Mediterania. Yeneyi ndiye ikhali dziko idapaswa dzinza ya Eferemu kada banja kuti ikhale yawo ene," 
Joshua16:9 pabodzi pene na maluwani pontho na midzi ile ikhali m'bwalo mwa madire a Manase, mbwenye mbuto zenezi zidaperekwa kuna Eferemu." 
Joshua16:10 Dzinza ya Eferemu hidathamangisa Akanani, ale akhakhala mu Gezeri tayu. Tenepo na lero Akanani akukhala pakati pa anthu a dzinza ya Eferemu. Kwache iwo adakhakhamizwa kuphata basa ninga mabitchu." 
Joshua17:1 Khundu inango yakumadokero dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani idaperekwa kuna pidzukulu pya Manase mwana wautombo wa Yosefe. Manase mwanache wautombo akhali Makiri, nyakudziwa kumenya nkhondo, ule akhali kholo ya anthu a ku Gileadi mbatambira nthemba ya Gileadi na Bashani." 
Joshua17:2 Dziko yonsene yakumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani idaperekwa kuna mabanja a Manase adasalira ale: Abiezere, Heleki, Asriele, Shekemu, Hefere na Shemida. Enewa akhali pidzukulu pyachimuna pya Manase mwana Yosefe, pontho enewa akhali akadamu a mabanja." 
Joshua17:3 Zelofehadi mwana wamamuna wa Hefere, mdzukuluache Gileadi mwana Makiri ulembo ntchidzukulu cha Manase akhali nkhabe ana achimuna. Ana akhali na iye akhali achikazi ene basi. Madzinawo mbawa; Mala, Nowa, Hogila, Milika na Tiriza." 
Joshua17:4 Iwo adenda kuna Eleazara nyansembe, Yoswa mwana Nuni na kuna akadamu a Aisraele mbalonga mbati, “MBUYA adapanga Mose kuti apereke kuna ife na abale athu achimunawa khundu ibodzi ya dzikoyi kuti ikhale yathu ene.” Natenepo ninga mukhadalongera MBUYA iwo adapaswa dziko pabodzi pene na abale awo achimuna ale kukhala yawo ene." 
Joshua17:5 Ndi thangwi yache Manase adatambira mbuto khumi kupambula Gileadi na Bashani kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani," 
Joshua17:6 thangwi pidzukulu pyache pyachimuna na pyachikazi pidatambirambo dzikoyo. Dziko ya Gileadi idaperekwa kuna pidzukulu pya Manase pidasalira pile. 
Joshua17:7 Nthemba ya Manase idafika mpakana ku Mikimetati kubulukira ku Asheri, kumabulukiro dzuwa a Shekemu. Kubuluka penepo madire ache adenda kumwera kuthimizapo anthu a kukhala mu Entapua." 
Joshua17:8 Dziko yakuzungulira Tapua ikhali ya Manase, mbwenye mzinda wa Tapua, ule ukhali m'madire a Manase, ukhali wa pidzukulu pya Eferemu." 
Joshua17:9 Kubuluka penepo madire adabidira kumkhwawa wa Kana. Maluwani akumwera kwa mkhwawa wa Kana akhali a Eferemu podi kwene kuti akhali nthemba ya Manase. Madire a Manase adathimiza kwenda kukhundu yakumpoto kwa mkhwawa ule mbakadolomera ku Bara ya Mediterania. 
Joshua17:10 Eferemu akhali kukhundu yakumwera, Manasembo akhali kukhundu yakumpoto. Madire awo akukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa akhali Bara ya Mediterania. Asheri akhali kukhundu yakumpoto kumadokero dzuwa. Isakara akhali kukhundu yakumpoto kumabulukiro dzuwa." 
Joshua17:11 M'bwalo mwa madire a Isakara na Asheri. Manase adapokosera nthemba ya Beti-Shani na Ibuleamu pabodzi pene na maluwani akuzungulira, pontho na Dori (nyakukhala pagombe), Endori, Taanaki, Megido na maluwani akuzungulira." 
Joshua17:12 Anthu a dzinza ya Manase hadakwanise kuathamangisa anthu akhakhala m'maluwani ale tayu, natenepo Akanani adathimiza kukhala mwenemo." 
Joshua17:13 Podi na ndzidzi udasanduka Aisraele kukhala amphamvu pyakwanga, iwo hadathamangise Akanani onsene tayu, mbwenye iwo adakhakhamizwa kuphatira basa Aisraele." 
Joshua17:14 Pidzukulu pya Yosefe pidalonga kuna Yoswa mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji mwatipasa kwene khundu ibodzi ene basi ya dziko kuti ikhale yathu ene? Ife tilipo azinji thangwi MBUYA atitsanzayisa.”" 
Joshua17:15 Yoswa adatawira mbati, “Ngakhala imwe ndimwe azinji pontho kuti nthemba ya mapiri ya Eferemu yakucheperani, ndokoni mumsitu m'dziko ya Aperizi na Arefaimu mukagwise mitiyo mbamuchenesemo kuti ikhale dziko yanu ene.”" 
Joshua17:16 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Dziko ya mapiri si yakukwana tayu kuna ife, mbwenye Akanani m'maphedi ana pingolo pyasimbi, onsene ale ambakhala ku Beti-Shani na maluwani akuzungulira, pontho na ale ambakhala paphedi ya Yezereele.”" 
Joshua17:17 Yoswa adalonga kuna madzinza a Eferemu na Manase yakumadokero dzuwa mbati, “Ndimomwene kuti imwe mulipo azinji, pontho kuti ndimwe anthu amphamvu pyakwanga. Imwe munati mutambire khundu inango yakuthimizira." 
Joshua17:18 Dziko ya mapiri inakhala yanu. Podi kwene kuti ntchimsitusitu imwe munati muichenese mbamuikwata kukhala yanu ene kubulukira nkhomo mpakana nkhomo inangoyo. Kulonga pya Akanani, imwe muathamangise, podi kwene kuti iwo ana pingolo pyawo pyasimbi, pontho kuti mbanthu amphamvu pyakwanga.”" 
Joshua18:1 Pidamala Aisraele kukunda dziko yonsene, adagumanyikana pabodzi pene pa Shilo mbamangapo Chikhumbi cha Mulungu. Dziko yonsene ikhali m'manja mwawo," 
Joshua18:2 mbwenye pakhali madzinza manomwe ale hakhadadzati tambira dziko yawo tayu. 
Joshua18:3 Tenepo Yoswa adalonga kuna Aisraele mbati, “Munadikhira mpakana lini kuti mukwate dziko idakupasani MBUYA Mulungu wa makolo anu ile?" 
Joshua18:4 Sankhulani amuna atatu, munthu mbodzi kada dzinza. Anthu enewa ndinaatuma kwenda kazonda dziko yonsene, pontho kalemba pya dziko inafuna iwo kuti ikhale yawo ile malingana na madzinzawo. Angamala penepo athema dzabwera kuna ine." 
Joshua18:5 Dzikoyo muigawe makhundu manomwe. Yuda anakhala konthoko kunthemba yakumwera, pontho dzinza ya Yosefe inakhala nthemba yakumpoto." 
Joshua18:6 Mungamala jambula mapindi manomwe a dziko ile, dzani nawo kuna ine, tenepo ine ndinachita ntsango pamaso pa MBUYA Mulungu wanu." 
Joshua18:7 Dzinza ya Levi mbileke kwata khundu pakati panu thangwi chinthu chidapaswa iwo nkhukhala anyansembe akutumikira MBUYA. Gadi, Rubeni na Manase wakumabulukiro dzuwa adatambira nthembawo kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani. Mose nyabasa wa MBUYA ndiye adaapasa.”" 
Joshua18:8 Pikhautoma anthu ulendo wakwenda kajambula dziko ile, Yoswa adalonga mbati, “Ndokoni mukajambule dziko yonseneyo mbamulembe mbuto zinomwe zinafuna imwe kuti zikhale zanu zile. Mungamala penepo dzani pontho kuna ine, tenepo ine ndinakuchitirani ntsango pamaso pa MBUYA pano pa Shilo.”" 
Joshua18:9 Natenepo amuna ale adalamuka kwenda m'dziko yonsene ile. Iwo adalemba mbuto zikhafuna iwo zile, mzinda na mzinda, mapindi manomwe mbabwerera kuna Yoswa kumsasa ku Shilo." 
Joshua18:10 Natenepo Yoswa adaachitira ntsango pa Shilo pamaso pa MBUYA mbagawa nthemba ile kuna Aisraele malingana na madzinzawo. 
Joshua18:11 Dzinza ya Benjemani ndiye ikhali yakutoma kutambira nthemba kada banja. Nthembawo ikhali pakati pa dzinza ya Yuda na Yosefe. 
Joshua18:12 Kukhundu yakumpoto madire awo adatomera pamkulo wa Yorodani mbakwira kumpoto kwa Yeriko kwenda kumadokero dzuwa mbagwanda na m'nthemba ya mapiri mbadolomera kuthando yatchetcha ya Beti-Aveni. 
Joshua18:13 Kubuluka penepo madire ale adagwanda na kumwera pamtelero wa Luzi (wenewu ndi Betele) mbabidira ku Ataroti-Adara kunthemba ya mapiri yakumwera kwa Beti-Horoni. 
Joshua18:14 Kubulukira kuphiri yakuyang'anisana na Beti-Horoni, ile kumwera kwache, madire ale azungunukira kumwera mbaenda na m'khundu-khundu mwa phiri yeneyi kumadokero dzuwa mbafika pa Kiriati-Baala (penu Kiriati-Yearimu) luwani ya anthu a dzinza ya Yuda. Enewa ndi madire akumadokero dzuwa." 
Joshua18:15 Madire akumwera adatomera pankhomo ya Kiriati-Yearimu mbafika pamphuno ya madzi a ku Nefitoa. 
Joshua18:16 Madirewo adabidira m'tchinde mwa phiri kuyang'anisana na phedi ya Beni-Hinomu, kumpoto kwa phedi ya Refaimu. Madire ale adathimiza kubidira kuphedi ya Hinomu mbaenda na m'khundu-khundu mwa mtelero wakumwera kwa mzinda wa Ayebusi mpakana ku Enirogele." 
Joshua18:17 Kubuluka penepo adagwanda na kumpoto kwenda ku Enishemeshi mbathimiza kwenda ku Geliloti, ile ikhali njira ya pamtelero ya Adumimu, pontho mbabidira kumwala wa Bohani mwana Rubeni." 
Joshua18:18 Madirewo adathimiza kwenda kumpoto pamtelero kuyang'ana Beti-Araba mbafika kuphedi ya Yorodani. 
Joshua18:19 Kubuluka penepo adabidira kumpoto pamtelero wa Beti-Hogila mbadolomera pagombe yakumpoto kwa Nyanza Yakufa, kumadolomero a mkulo wa Yorodani kumwera kwache. Enewa ndi madire akumwera." 
Joshua18:20 Mkulo wa Yorodani ndi madire akumabulukiro dzuwa. Enewa ndiye akhali madire awo kuonesa mbuto za mabanja a dzinza ya Benjemani kukhundu zonsene. 
Joshua18:21 Maluwani a mabanja a dzinza ya Benjemani akhali Yeriko, Beti-Hogila, Emeki-Kezizi," 
Joshua18:22 Beti-Araba, Zemaraimu, Betele," 
Joshua18:23 Avimu, Para, Ofara," 
Joshua18:24 Kefara-Amoni, Ofini na Geba, maluwani khumi na mawiri onsene pabodzi na midzi yawo yakuzungulira." 
Joshua18:25 Pakhali pontho Gibeoni, Rama, Beeroti," 
Joshua18:26 Mizipa, Kefira, Moza," 
Joshua18:27 Rekemu, Iripeele, Tarala," 
Joshua18:28 Zela, Haelefu, Yebusi (penu Yerusalemu), Gibea na Kiriati-Yearimu, maluwani khumi na anayi onsene pabodzi pene na midzi yawo yakuzungulira. Yeneyi ndiye ikhali nthemba idapaswa mabanja a Benjemani kuti ikhale yawo ene." 
Joshua19:1 Ntsango yachiwiri idachitika mbigwera mabanja a Simioni. Dziko yawo idafumuka mpakana kudziko idapaswa dzinza ya Yuda. 
Joshua19:2 Idathimizapo Beeresheba (penu Sheba), Molada," 
Joshua19:3 Hazari-Shuali, Bala, Ezemu," 
Joshua19:4 Elitoladi, Betuli, Horima," 
Joshua19:5 Zikilagi, Beti-Marikaboti, Hazari-Susa," 
Joshua19:6 Beti-Lebaoti na Sharuheni, maluwani khumi na atatu onsene pabodzi na midzi yache yakuzungulira." 
Joshua19:7 Pakhali pontho Aini, Rimoni, Etheri na Ashani, maluwani manayi pabodzi pene na midzi yache yakuzungulira," 
Joshua19:8 pabodzi pene na midzi yonsene yakuzungulira maluwani enewa mpakana ku Baalati-Beeri (Rama m'thando yatchetcha ya Negebu). Yeneyi ndiye ikhali nthemba idapaswa dzinza ya Simioni kada banja kukhala yawo ene. 
Joshua19:9 Dziko idapaswa mabanja a dzinza ya Simioni ikhali khundu ibodzi ya dzinza ya Yuda.
