Dzikoyi idakwatwa kubuluka m'manja mwa dzinza ya Yuda, thangwi dziko ya Yudayo ikhali ikulu pyakwanga mwakuti khundu inango hakhaiphatisa basa tayu. Natenepo dzinza ya Simioni idatambira dziko yawo m'bwalo mwa dziko ya Yuda." 
Joshua19:10 Ntsango yachitatu idachitika mbigwera mabanja a Zebuloni. Madire a dziko yawo adenderatu mpakana ku Saridi. 
Joshua19:11 Kubuluka penepo adadza ku Mareala kumabulukiro dzuwa mbafika ku Dabesheti na kumkhwawa chifupi na Yokoneamu. 
Joshua19:12 Kubuluka ku Saridi adazungunukira kumadokero dzuwa a dziko ya Kisiloti-Tabori mbathimiza kwenda ku Daberati na ku Yafia. 
Joshua19:13 Kubuluka penepo adathimiza pontho kwendera ku kumabulukiro dzuwa ku Gati Hefere na Etikazini mbafika pa Rimoni mbazungunuka pontho kuyang'ana Nea. 
Joshua19:14 Kubuluka penepo madire akumpoto adazungunukira ku Hanatoni mbamalisira paphedi ya Ifitaele. 
Joshua19:15 Adathimizapo Katati, Nahalali, Shimironi, Idala na Betelehemu. Onsene pabodzi akhali maluwani khumi na mawiri pontho na midzi yawo." 
Joshua19:16 Maluwani enewa pabodzi pene na midzi yawo ndiye idapaswa dzinza ya Zebuloni kada banja kukhala yawo ene. 
Joshua19:17 Ntsango yachinayi idachitika mbigwera mabanja a dzinza ya Isakara. 
Joshua19:18 Nthemba yawo idathimizirapo; Yezereele, Kesuloti, Shunemu," 
Joshua19:19 Hafaraimu, Shioni, Anaharati," 
Joshua19:20 Rabiti, Kishioni, Ebezi," 
Joshua19:21 Remeti, Eni-Ganimu, Enihada na Beti-Pazezi." 
Joshua19:22 Madire awo adafika ku Tabori, Shahazuma na Beti-Shemeshi mbadolomera pamkulo wa Yorodani. Pakhali maluwani khumi na matanthatu pabodzi pene na midzi yawo." 
Joshua19:23 Maluwani na midzi yeneyi ndiye idapaswa dzinza ya Isakara kada banja kukhala yawo ene. 
Joshua19:24 Ntsango yachishanu idachitika mbigwera mabanja a dzinza ya Asheri. 
Joshua19:25 Nthemba yawo idathimizapo; Helekati, Hali, Beteni, Akishafu," 
Joshua19:26 Alameleki, Amadi na Mishali. Madire awo akumadokero dzuwa adafika ku Karimele na Shihori-Libinati." 
Joshua19:27 Kubuluka penepo adazungunukira kumabulukiro dzuwa kwendera ku Beti-Dagoni mbafika ku Zebuloni na phedi ya Ifitaele. Kubuluka penepo adenda kumpoto ku Beti-Emeki na Neilo, mbagwanda na ku Kabulu kumabzere kwache." 
Joshua19:28 Kubuluka penepo adenda ku Ebroni, Rehobu, Hamoni na Kana mpakana ku Sidoni Wamkulu." 
Joshua19:29 Kubuluka penepo madire adazungunukira m'nduli kuyang'ana ku Rama mbaenda kumzinda wa Turo wakutchingwa na mpanda; kubuluka penepo madire adazungunuka kuyang'ana ku Hosa mbafika ku Bara ya Mediterania. Madirewo adathimizapo Mahalabu, Akizibu," 
Joshua19:30 Uma, Afeki, na Rehobu. Onsene pabodzi akhalipo maluwani makumawiri na mawiri pabodzi pene na midzi yawo yakuzungulira." 
Joshua19:31 Maluwani na midzi yeneyi ndiye idapaswa dzinza ya Asheri kada banja kukhala yawo ene. 
Joshua19:32 Ntsango yachitanthatu idachitika mbigwera mabanja a dzinza ya Nafitali. 
Joshua19:33 Madire awo adatomera ku Helefu na kumuti ukulu mu Zaananimu mbagwanda na pa Adaminekebu na Yaminia mpakana ku Lukumu mbadolomera pamkulo wa Yorodani. 
Joshua19:34 Kubuluka penepo madire ale adenda kumadokero dzuwa kupita na pa Azinoti-Tabori mbafika pa Hukoki. Madirewo adatsamira pontho nthemba ya Zebuloni kumwera kwache, nthemba ya Asheri kumadokero dzuwa, pontho na mkulo wa Yorodani kumabulukiro dzuwa." 
Joshua19:35 Maluwani akutchingwa na mpanda akhali Zidimu, Zeri, Hamati, Rakati, Kinereti," 
Joshua19:36 Adama, Rama, Hazori," 
Joshua19:37 Kedeshi, Edrei, Enihazori," 
Joshua19:38 Yironi, Migidalele, Horemu, Beti-Anati na Beti-Shemeshi. Pakhali maluwani khumi na mafemba pabodzi pene na midzi yawo." 
Joshua19:39 Maluwani na midzi yeneyi ndiye idapaswa dzinza ya Nafitali kada banja kukhala yawo ene. 
Joshua19:40 Ntsango yachinomwe idachitika mbigwera mabanja a dzinza ya Dani. 
Joshua19:41 Nthemba yawo idathimizirapo: Zora, Eshitaoli, Irishemeshi," 
Joshua19:42 Shaalibimu, Aialoni, Itila," 
Joshua19:43 Eloni, Timina, Ekroni," 
Joshua19:44 Eliteke, Gibetoni, Baalati," 
Joshua19:45 Yehudi, Bene-Beraki, Gati-Rimoni," 
Joshua19:46 Meyarikoni na Rakoni pabodzi pene na nthemba yakuyang'anisana na Yopa. 
Joshua19:47 Mbwenye anthu a dzinza ya Dani adaona nyatwa ikulu kuti apokosere nthemba zawo. Natenepo iwo adenda ku Leshemu kapokosera mudzi onsene ule. Iwo adapha anthu onsene a mwenemo mbakhalamo ndiwo. Iwo adakhazikika mu Leshemu mbatchandula dzina ya mzindawo mbauthula Dani, dzina ya kholo wawo." 
Joshua19:48 Maluwani na midzi yeneyi ndiye idapaswa dzinza ya Dani kada banja kukhala yawo ene. 
Joshua19:49 Pidamala iwo gwandirana dziko ile, Aisraele adapereka khundu inango ya dziko yawo kuna Yoswa mwana Nuni kuti ikhale yache ene," 
Joshua19:50 Ninga montho mudalongera MBUYA. Iwo adampasa luwani idapempha iye, luwani ya Timinati Sera m'nthemba ya mapiri a Eferemu. Natenepo iye adamanga luwani yache mbakhazikika kweneko." 
Joshua19:51 Zenezi ndiye zikhali mbuto zidaperekwa na Eleazara nyansembe, Yoswa mwana Nuni na akulu-akulu a Israele kuna madzinza a Israele pakuchita ntsango pamaso pa MBUYA pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu mu Shilo. Tenepo iwo adamalisa kugawa dziko ile." 
Joshua20:1 Kubuluka penepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Yoswa mbati," 
Joshua20:2 “Panga Aisraele kuti asankhule mizinda yakuthawirako ninga montho mudakupangirani ine kudzera muna Mose," 
Joshua20:3 towera munthu onsene anapha mwanzache mwasusudewu akwanise kuthawira kweneko kuti apitchinjirize yekha ene gopesera kubwezerwambo thangwi ya pinthu pidachita iyepyo. 
Joshua20:4 Iye angathawira kumzinda ubodzi mwa mizinda yeneyi, athema kuimira pamsuwo wa mzinda kulonga mseru wache kuna akulu-akulu a mumzindawo mbadzati pita mumzindamo. Natenepo iwo amtawirise munthuyo kupita mumzindamo, pontho ampase mbuto kuti akhale pakati pawo." 
Joshua20:5 Ngakhala nyakufuna kubwezera kuphiwa kwa munthu ule anamthamangisa, iwo aleke kumpereka nyakuthawa ule kuna nyakumthamangisa. Iwo athema kumtchinjiriza munthu ule thangwi iye hadaphe mwanzache chadala penu akhali nyamalwache tayu." 
Joshua20:6 Iye athema kukhala mumzindamo mpakana mseru wache utongwe pamaso pa Aisraele onsene, pontho mpakana Nyansembe Wamkulu anaphata basa ndzidzi wenewo afe. Penepo anakwanisa kubwerera kwawo kuluwani kudathawa iye kule.”" 
Joshua20:7 Natenepo adasankhula mizinda ya Kedeshi m'Galilea m'nthemba ya mapiri ya Nafitali, Shekemu m'nthemba ya mapiri ya Eferemu na Kiriati-Ariba (wenewu ndi Hebroni) m'nthemba ya mapiri ya Yuda." 
Joshua20:8 Kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani kubulukira ku Yeriko adasankhulako mzinda wa Bezeri m'thando yatchetcha pamapiri m'nthemba ya dzinza ya Rubeni, Ramoti m'Gileadi m'nthemba ya dzinza ya Gadi na Golani m'Bashani m'nthemba ya dzinza ya Manase." 
Joshua20:9 Munthu onsene wa mu Israele penu ndi mlendo wakukhala pakati panu anakwanisa kuthawira kumizinda yasankhula imweyi ngakhala iye anapha mwanzache mwasusudewu gopesera anyakufuna kubwezera anamphambo mbadzati tongwa mseru wache pamaso pa msoka. 
Joshua21:1 Kubuluka penepo akadamu a mabanja a Alevi adadza pamaso pa Eleazara nyansembe, Yoswa mwana Nuni na akadamu anango a mabanja a madzinza anango a Aisraele" 
Joshua21:2 pa Shilo mu Kanani mbalonga kuna iwo mbati, “MBUYA adalonga kudzera muna Mose kuti imwe mutipase maluwani kuti tikhalemo, pontho na mbuto za mpovu zakudyesera pifuyo pyathu.”" 
Joshua21:3 Natenepo, ninga montho mudalongera MBUYA Aisraele kubulukira pa nthemba zawo adapereka kuna Alevi maluwani na mbuto za mpovu zakudyesera pifuyo pyawo. Maluwani na mbutozi mphipi:" 
Joshua21:4 Ntsango yakutoma idachitika mbigwera mabanja a nkhonda Kohati. Alevi akhali pidzukulu pya Aroni ale adapaswa maluwani khumi na matatu kubulukira kuna madzinza a Yuda, Simioni na Benjemani ule." 
Joshua21:5 Anango onsene a nkhonda Kohati adapaswa maluwani khumi kubulukira kuna mabanja a madzinza a Dani, Eferemu na Manase wakumadokero dzuwa." 
Joshua21:6 Nkhondo Gereshoni idapaswa maluwani khumi na matatu kubulukira kuna mabanja a madzinza a Isakara, Asheri, Nafitali, na Manase wakumabulukiro dzuwa mu Bashani." 
Joshua21:7 Nkhondo Merari idatambira maluwani khumi na awiri kubulukira kuna mabanja a madzinza a Rubeni, Gadi, na Zebuloni." 
Joshua21:8 Natenepo enewa ndiye akhali maluwani na mbuto za mpovu zakudyeserapo pifuyo pidapereka Aisraele pakuchita ntsango kuna dzinza ya Levi ninga montho mudalongera Mulungu kudzera muna Mose. 
Joshua21:9 Maluwani adapereka Aisraele kubulukira kuna madzinza a Yuda na Simioni 
Joshua21:10 kuna pidzukulu pya Aroni, ale mbankhonda Kohati a m'dzinza ya Levi, podi ntsango yakutoma idagwera iwo mbawa:" 
Joshua21:11 luwani ya Kiriati-Ariba (Ariba akhali baba wa Anaki), luwani ile chinchino imbadziwika na Hebroni, m'nthemba ya mapiri ya Yuda pabodzi pene na mbuto za mpovu zakuzungulira luwaniyo." 
Joshua21:12 Kwache minda ya luwaniyo na midzi yakuizungulira ikhadaperekwa kale kuna Kalebu mwana Yefune kukhala yache ene. 
Joshua21:13 Kuthimizira pa Hebroni (ule ukhali ubodzi mwa mizinda yakuthawirako), pidzukulu pya Aroni nyansembe pidapaswa pontho mizinda ishi: Libina," 
Joshua21:14 Yatiri, Eshitemoa," 
Joshua21:15 Holoni, Debiri," 
Joshua21:16 Aini, Yuta, na Beti-Shemeshi, pabodzi pene na mbuto zawo za mpovu: maluwani onsene pabodzi akhalipo afemba kubulukira kuna madzinza a Yuda na Simioni." 
Joshua21:17 Kubulukira m'nthemba ya dzinza ya Benjemani, iwo adapaswa maluwani manayi: Gibeoni, Geba," 
Joshua21:18 Anatoti, na Alimoni pabodzi pene na mbuto zawo za mpovu." 
Joshua21:19 Maluwani enewa khumi na atatu pabodzi pene na mbuto zawo za mpovu zidaperekwa kuna anyansembe, pidzukulu pya Aroni." 
Joshua21:20 Mabanja anango a nkhonda Kohati a m'dzinza ya Levi adapaswa maluwani kubulukira kuna dzinza ya Eferemu. 
Joshua21:21 Iwo adapaswa Shekemu na mbuto zache za mpovu m'nthemba ya mapiri ya Eferemu (ubodzi mwa mizinda yakuthawirako), Gezeri," 
Joshua21:22 Kibzaimu na Beti-Horoni pabodzi pene na mbuto zawo za mpovu. Onsene pabodzi akhalipo maluwani manayi. 
Joshua21:23 Kubulukira m'dziko ya Dani adapaswa mizinda minayi: Eliteke, Gibetoni," 
Joshua21:24 Aialoni na Gati-Rimoni, pabodzi pene na mbuto zawo zampovu." 
Joshua21:25 Kubulukira kudzinza ya Manase yakumadokero dzuwa idapaswa maluwani mawiri: Taanaki na Gati-Rimoni pabodzi pene na mbuto zawo za mpovu. 
Joshua21:26 Mabanja enewa a nkhonda Kohati, onsene pabodzi pene adatambira maluwani khumi pabodzi pene na mbuto zawo za mpovu." 
Joshua21:27 Gulu inango ya dzinza ya Levi ale mbankhondo Gereshoni adatambira mizinda miwiri kubulukira kudzinza ya Manase wakumabulukiro dzuwa: Golani m'Bashani, ubodzi mwa mizinda yakuthawirako, na Beeshitera, pabodzi pene na mbuto zawo za mpovu." 
Joshua21:28 Kubulukira kuna dzinza ya Isakara iwo adatambira maluwani manayi: Kishioni, Daberati," 
Joshua21:29 Yarimuti, na Eni-Ganimu, pabodzi pene na mbuto zawo za mpovu." 
Joshua21:30 Kubulukira kuna dzinza ya Asheri iwo adatambira maluwani manayi: Mishali, Abidoni," 
Joshua21:31 Helekati na Rehobu, pabodzi pene na mbuto zawo za mpovu." 
Joshua21:32 Kubulukira kuna dzinza ya Nafitali iwo adatambira maluwani matatu: Kedeshi m'Galilea (ubodzi mwa mizinda yakuthawirako), pabodzi pene na mbuto zawo za mpovu, Hamoti-Dori, Karitani, pabodzi pene na mbuto zawo za mpovu." 
Joshua21:33 Mabanja onsene a nkhondo Gereshoni, onsene pabodzi pene adatambira maluwani khumi na matatu pabodzi pene na mbuto zawo za mpovu." 
Joshua21:34 Anthu anango onsene a dzinza ya Levi, ale akhali nkhonda Merari, adatambira maluwani manayi kubulukira kuna dzinza ya Zebuloni. Maluwani ache mbawa; Yokoneamu, Karita," 
Joshua21:35 Dimina na Nahalali pabodzi pene na mbuto zawo za mpovu. 
Joshua21:36 Kubulukira kuna dzinza ya Rubeni iwo adatambira maluwani manayi; Bezeri, Yahazi," 
Joshua21:37 Kedemoti na Mefaati pabodzi pene na mbuto zawo za mpovu. 
Joshua21:38 Kubulukira kuna dzinza ya Gadi, iwo adatambira maluwani manayi: Ramoti m'Gileadi (ubodzi mwa mizinda yakuthawirako) pabodzi pene na mbuto zawo za mpovu, Mahanaimu," 
Joshua21:39 Heshiboni na Yazere pabodzi pene na mbuto zawo za mpovu. 
Joshua21:40 Natenepo mabanja a nkhonda Merari, onsene pabodzi pene adatambira maluwani khumi na mawiri." 
Joshua21:41 Kubulukira nthemba yonsene idapaswa Aisraele maluwani makumanayi na asere, pabodzi pene na mbuto zawo za mpovu kuzungulira maluwani enewa adaperekwa kuna dzinza ya Levi." 
Joshua21:42  
Joshua21:43 Natenepo MBUYA adapereka dziko yonsene, ile ikhadadumbira iye kuna makolo awo. Pidaikwata iwo, adakhazikika mwenemo." 
Joshua21:44 MBUYA adaapasa mtendere m'dziko monsenemo ninga montho mukhadadumbira iye kuna makolo awo. Nee mbodzi wa anyamalwawo adapiyesera kuthimbana nawo tayu, thangwi MBUYA adapereka mphamvu kuna Aisraele zakukunda nazo anyamalwawo." 
Joshua21:45 MBUYA adachita pyonsene pikhadadumbira iye kuna Aisraele. 
Joshua22:1 Kubuluka penepo Yoswa adachemera anthu onsene a madzinza a Rubeni, Gadi na Manase wakumabulukiro dzuwa" 
Joshua22:2 mbalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Imwe mwachita pyonsene pidakupangani Mose nyabasa wa MBUYA, pontho mwavera matongero anga onsene." 
Joshua22:3 Kutomera ndzidzi wenewo kufikirana lero imwe nee mwaasiya okha ene Aisraele anzanuwa tayu. Imwe mwakhulupirika kuphata basa yonsene idakupasani MBUYA Mulungu wanu. 
Joshua22:4 Tenepo podi MBUYA Mulungu wanu apereka kuna abale anu mbuto yakukhazikika ninga montho mudadumbira iye, imwe munakwanisa kubwerera pyanu kumisa kwanu kunthemba idakupasani Mose nyabasa wa MBUYA kumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani ule." 
Joshua22:5 Kwache chitani mphole-mphole kukoya matongero na mwambo pidakupasani Mose nyabasa wa MBUYA ule: kumfuna MBUYA Mulungu wanu, kuchita pyonsene pinafuna iye, kuvera matongero ache, kukakamira pana iye na kumtumikira na mtimanu onsene pontho na moyo wanu onsene.”" 
Joshua22:6 Kubuluka penepo Yoswa adaatsanzayisa mbaagwinya kwawo. Tenepo iwo adenda kwawo. 
Joshua22:7 Kuna dzinza ya Manase wakumabulukiro dzuwa Mose akhadapereka nthemba mu Bashani. Pontho kuna khundu inango ya dzinza ya Manase Yoswa adapereka nthemba kumadokero dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani pabodzi pene na Aisraele anzawo. Pandzidzi ukhaapanga Yoswa kubwerera kwawo, iye adaatsanzayisa" 
Joshua22:8 mbalonga mbati, “Bwererani kunthemba kwanu na mfumanu ene; pifuyo pizinji, siliva, golidi, nkuwa na simbi, pontho na nguwo zizinji. Kagawaneni na abale anu pinthu pidapokosera imwe anyamalwanu.”" 
Joshua22:9 Tenepo madzinza a Rubeni, Gadi na Manase wakumabulukiro dzuwa adalamuka mbaasiya Aisraele anzawo pa Shilo m'dziko ya Kanani kubwerera ku Gileadi nthemba yawo ene, idakwata iwo malingana na matongero a MBUYA kudzera muna Mose ile." 
Joshua22:10 Pidafika madzinza a Rubeni, Gadi na Manase wakumabulukiro dzuwa pa Geliloti, kumadokero dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani, adamanga guwa yansembe ikulu pyakwanga chifupi na mkulo wa Yorodani." 
Joshua22:11 Pikhadapiva Aisraele kuti iwo akhadamanga guwa yansembe m'madire a Kanani pa Geliloti chifupi na mkulo wa Yorodani kukhundu ya Aisraele," 
Joshua22:12 Aisraele onsene adagumanyikana pa Shilo kuti akachite nawo nkhondo. 
Joshua22:13 Natenepo Aisraele adatuma Finiasi mwana Eleazara, nyansembe kwenda kunthemba ya Gileadi kuna madzinza a Rubeni, Gadi na Manase wakumabulukiro dzuwa." 
Joshua22:14 Iye adatumizwa pabodzi pene na akulu-akulu khumi, munthu mbodzi kada dzinza, pontho iwo onsene akhali akadamu a mabanja pakati pa madzinza a Aisraele." 
Joshua22:15 Pidafika iwo ku Gileadi kuna madzinza a Rubeni, Gadi na Manase wakumabulukiro dzuwa, adalonga kuna iwo mbati," 
Joshua22:16 “Gulu yonsene ya anthu a MBUYA yalonga kuti, ‘Mwachitiranji chinthu chakuipa ninga chenechi kupokanyisana na Mulungu wa Israele? Imwe mwapandukira MBUYA pakupimangira mwekha ene guwa yansembe! Imwe mwabauka kubuluka kuna iye." 
Joshua22:17 Kumbukani kudawa kudachita ife pa Peori, pidatchunyusa MBUYA anthu ache na muliri? Na lero ife tikubonera basi thangwi ya pinthu pene pile. Ayi kudawa kwene kule hakudakwane tayu?" 
Joshua22:18 Kani imwe lero munafuna kubauka kubuluka kuna iye? Ngakhala imwe lero munampandukira MBUYA, mangwana iye anati azhangalire anthu onsene mu Israele." 
Joshua22:19 Ngakhala dziko yanu si yakuthema tayu kupembedzeramo MBUYA, apo idzani m'dziko ya MBUYA, mule mumbakhala Chikhumbi cha Mulungu. Idzani tidzagawane mbuto zinango pakati pathu. Kwache lekani kupandukira MBUYA penu kupandukira ife pakupimangira mwekha ene guwa inango ya nsembe padzulu pa guwa yansembe ya MBUYA Mulungu wathu." 
Joshua22:20 Kumbukani pidachitika pile ndzidzi udakhonda Akani mwana Zera kuvera matongero a pya pinthu pidathema kuvungwa pile; gulu yonsene ya Israele idatchunyuswa thangwi ya penepyo. Si Akani yekha adafa thangwi ya kudawa kwacheko tayu.’ ” 
Joshua22:21 Anthu a madzinza a Rubeni, Gadi na Manase wakumabulukiro dzuwa adaatawira akulu-akulu adabulukira kuna madzinza a Israele akumadokero dzuwa ale mbati," 
Joshua22:22 “Nyamphamvu zonsene ndi Mulungu! Iye ndi MBUYA! Nyamphamvu zonsene ndi Mulungu! Iye ndi MBUYA. Iye ambadziwa thangwi yache idachitira ife penepi, pontho ife tafuna kuti imwe muidziwembo thangwi yache! Ngakhala ife tidapandukira MBUYA mbatikhonda kumvera, lero tipheni pyanu mbatilekeve khala na moyo." 
Joshua22:23 Ngakhala ife tidakhonda vera MBUYA mbatimanga guwa yathu ene yakuperekerapo pyakupereka pyakupyerera, penu pya mapira penu pyachiphatizano, MBUYA mwenechiroache mbatitchunyuse." 
Joshua22:24 Nkhabe tayu! Ife tidachita tenepo thangwi tikhagopa kuti mwinango m'tsogolo muno pidzukulu pyanu pinakwanisa dzalonga kuna pidzukulu pyathu kuti, ‘Ayi imwe, MBUYA, Mulungu wa Israele munaenji?" 
Joshua22:25 Iye adachitisa mkulo wa Yorodani kukhala madire a pakati pa ife na anthu a madzinza a Rubeni na Gadi. Imwe nkhabe pinthu na MBUYA tayu!’ Penepo pidzukulu pyanu pinachitisa pidzukulu pyathu kuleka kupembedza MBUYA. 
Joshua22:26 Natenepo ife tidamangapo guwa nee na mtima wakufuna kuperekerapo pyakupereka pyakupyerera penu pyakupereka pinango tayu," 
Joshua22:27 mbwenye na mtima wakufuna kuti guwayo ikhale chidzindikiro kuna anthu athu na kuna anthu anu, pontho kuna mifendu yonsene inadzayo kuti ife timbapembedza MBUYA pa Chikhumbi chache chakupambulika na kuperekapo pyakupereka pyakupyerera, nsembe na pyakupereka pyachiphatizano. Tenepo m'tsogolo muno pidzukulu pyathu nee pinalonga tayu kuti, ‘Imwe nkhabe pinthu na MBUYA.’" 
Joshua22:28 Manyerezero athu akhali akuti ngakhala penepi pinachitika, pidzukulu pyathu pinakwanisa kulonga kuti, ‘Ngayang'anani! Makolo athu adasasanya guwa yansembe sasawa ninga guwa ya MBUYA. Yeneyi nee ikhali guwa yakuperekerapo pyakupereka pyakupyerera penu nsembe zinango tayu, mbwenye ikhali chidzindikiro kuna anthu athu na kuna anthu anu ene.’" 
Joshua22:29 Ife nkhabe kwanisa kupandukira MBUYA penu kubauka kubuluka kuna iye pakumanga guwa yathu ene yakuperekerapo pyakupereka pyakupyerera, pyakupereka pya mapira na nsembe zinango tayu. Ife nkhabe manga guwa inango ya nsembe padzulu pa guwa yansembe ya MBUYA Mulungu wathu ile ili patsogolo pa Chikhumbi chache tayu.”" 
Joshua22:30 Pidapiva Finiasi nyansembe na akulu-akulu khumi a Israele, ale akhali akadamu a mabanja a Aisraele, pidalonga anthu a madzinza a Rubeni, Gadi na Manase wakumabulukiro dzuwa, adakomerwa napyo pyakwanga." 
Joshua22:31 Tenepo Finiasi mwana Eleazara nyansembe adalonga kuna madzinza a Rubeni, Gadi na Manase wakumabulukiro dzuwa mbati, “Lero tapidziwadi kuti MBUYA ali nafe, thangwi pyachita imwepi nee mwapichita na manyerezero akufuna kupandukira MBUYA tayu. Natenepo mwapulumusa anthu onsene Aisraele kuna kutchunyuswa kukhafuna kuachita MBUYA.”" 
Joshua22:32 Kubuluka penepo Finiasi mwana Eleazara nyansembe pabodzi pene na akadamu a Aisraele ale, adabwerera ku Kanani pidamala iwo chita mgumano na madzinza a Rubeni, Gadi na Manase wakumabulukiro dzuwa mbakalonga pyonsene pile kuna Aisraele anzawo." 
Joshua22:33 Pidava Aisraele anzawo ale penepi adakomerwa pyakwanga mbakuza Mulungu. Iwo hadalongeve pyakwenda kamenya nawo nkhondo kuvunga dziko ikhadakhazikika madzinza a Rubeni, Gadi na Manase wakumabulukiro dzuwa ile tayu." 
Joshua22:34 Natenepo madzinza a Rubeni na Gadi adaithula guwa yansembe ile kuti: Umboni pakati pathu kuti MBUYA ndi Mulungu wathu. 
Joshua23:1 Pidagwanda ndzidzi ukulu ene MBUYA adachitisa Aisraele kupuma kumenya nkhondo na anyamalwawo akuazungulira ale. Pandzidzi wenewo Yoswa akhadakalamba pyakwanga," 
Joshua23:2 natenepo adachemeresa akadamu onsene Aisraele, akulu-akulu, atongi a miseru na mathubu awo mu Israele mbalonga mbati, “Ine ndakalamba pyakwanga." 
Joshua23:3 Imwe mwaona pinthu pyonsene pyachita MBUYA Mulungu wanu kuna madzinza anangowa thangwi ya imwepo. MBUYA Mulungu wanu akukumenyerani nkhondo. 
Joshua23:4 Ine ndapereka kuna imwe mbuto yakusalira ya madzinza anangowa, ile idzati kundwa tayu kuti ikhale yanu ene pabodzi pene na mbuto za anthu anango, zile zakundwa kale, kutomera kumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani mpakana ku Bara ya Mediterania kumadokero dzuwa." 
Joshua23:5 MBUYA Mulungu wanu anaathamangisa pamaso panu. Iye anaagwinyira kunja pamaso panu. Tenepo imwe munakwata mbuto zawozo ninga montho mudalongera MBUYA Mulungu wanu. 
Joshua23:6 Natenepo chitani mphole-mphole kuvera pyonsene pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mwambo wa Mose pile. Lekani kuukhonda penu na khundu ene ibodzi ya mwambowo. 
Joshua23:7 Lekani phatizana na madzinza anango asalira pakati panuwa; lekani thula madzina a milungu yawo penu kuphatisa basa madzinawo kudumbira nawo. Lekani kuatumikira penu kualambira. 
Joshua23:8 Kwache imwe mwathema kukakamira pana MBUYA Mulungu wanu ninga munachitira imwe chinchinomu. 
Joshua23:9 MBUYA athamangisa madzinza akulu-akulu na amphamvu pamaso panu; pontho kufikirana lero nkhabe mbodzi akwanisa kuimisana namwe tayu. 
Joshua23:10 Munthu onsene wa imwe anakwanisa kuchitisa anthu pikwi kuthawa thangwi MBUYA Mulungu wanu ndiye akukumenyerani nkhondo ninga montho mudadumbira iye mule. 
Joshua23:11 Kwache chitani mphole-mphole kumfuna MBUYA Mulungu wanu. 
Joshua23:12 Ngakhala imwe munakhonda kumvera mbamuphatizana na madzinza asalira pakati panu ale, papinthu pinachita iwo na kusemberana nawo," 
Joshua23:13 penepo munaona kuti MBUYA Mulungu wanu hanaathamangisave pamaso panu tayu. M'mbuto mwache iwo anasanduka akugoswa kuna imwe ninga msampha penu mlindi, pontho munava nawo kupha ninga mtswamu mungakwapulwa kunduli kwanu penu ninga minga kulasa m'maso mwanu. Penepi pinathimiza kuchitika mpakana monsenene mumale puluzika m'dziko yadidi yakupasani MBUYA Mulungu wanuyi." 
Joshua23:14 “Ndzidzi wanga wakuti ndife uli chifupi. Munthu onsene pakati panupa akudziwa mumtima mwache pontho m'moyo mwache kuti MBUYA Mulungu wanu akupasani pinthu pyonsene pyadidi pikhadadumbira iye pile. Pyonsene pidadumbira iye apichita; nkhabe chibodzi chachimwana iye tayu. 
Joshua23:15 Kwache ninga montho mwakwanisira iye kuchita pyonsene pidadumbira iye kuna imwe, natenepo iye anadzesa pyakuipa pyonsene kuna imwe pidathuswa iye pile mpakana monsenene amale kukuvungani m'dziko yadidi yakupasani iyeyi." 
Joshua23:16 Ngakhala imwe munakhonda kukoya chiverano chidakupangani MBUYA Mulungu wanu chile, pontho ngakhala imwe munatumikira na kupembedza milungu inango, iye anakuzhangalirani mbakutchunyusani, tenepo nee panasala munthu na mbodzi tayu m'dziko yadidi idakupasani iyeyi.”" 
Joshua24:1 Yoswa adagumanyisa pabodzi pene madzinza onsene a Aisraele a ku Shekemu. Iye adachemeresa akulu-akulu, akadamu, atongi a miseru na mathubu a mu Israele, tenepo iwo adadza pabodzi pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Joshua24:2 Yoswa adalonga kuna anthu onsene mbati, “Ipi ndiye pyalonga MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele kuti: ‘Kale ene makolo anu akhakhala kumtunda unango wa mkulo wa Yufurate mbapembedza milungu inango kweneko. Mbodzi wa makolo enewa akhali Tera, babache Abrahamu na Nahori." 
Joshua24:3 Kubuluka penepo ndidakwata Abrahamu kholo wanu kumbulusa m'dziko ya Yufurate mbandimtsogolera m'dziko yonsene ya Kanani. Ine ndidampasa pidzukulu pizinji. Ndidampasa Isake; 
Joshua24:4 tenepo Isake ndidampasambo Yakobo na Esau. Esau ndidampasa nthemba ya mapiri ya Edomu kuti ikhale yache ene, mbwenye Yakobo na anache adenda kudziko ya Iguputo." 
Joshua24:5 Kubuluka penepo ndidatuma Mose na Aroni mbandidzesa nyatwa zikulu pana anthu a ku Iguputo. Kwache ine ndidakubulusani basi. 
Joshua24:6 Ine ndidabulusa makolo anu m'dziko ya Iguputo, mbwenye anthu a ku Iguputo adaathamangira uku apakira pingolo pyawo pya nkhondo, pontho na pa akavalo awo. Mbwenye pidafika makolo anu panyanza Yakufira" 
Joshua24:7 adalira kuna ine kuti ndiaphedze, tenepo ine ndidaikha makole akuswipa pakati pa iwo na anthu a ku Iguputo. Ine ndidachitisa nyanza ile kuabizika anthu a ku Iguputo. Imwe mukupidziwa pidachita ine kuna anthu a ku Iguputo. “‘Imwe mudakhala m'thando yatchetcha ndzidzi ukulu ene." 
Joshua24:8 Kubuluka penepo ndidakudzesani kudziko ya Aamori, akhakhala kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani ale. Iwo adamenyana namwe, mbwenye ine ndidakuchitisani kuakunda. Imwe mudakwata dziko yawo, tenepo pikhapita imwe m'dzikomo ine ndidaavunga pyakwanga pene." 
Joshua24:9 Tenepo Mfumu wa ku Moabu, Balaki mwana Zipora adamenyana namwe. Iye adatumiza mphangwa kuna Balamu mwana Beori mbampempha kuti akutemberereni." 
Joshua24:10 Ine sidavesere pyakulonga pya Balamu tayu, m'mbuto mwache iye adakutsanzayisani. Na njira yeneyi ine ndidakupulumusani m'manja mwa Balamu." 
Joshua24:11 Imwe mudawambuka mkulo wa Yorodani mbamufika ku Yeriko. Amuna a mu Yeriko pabodzi pene na Aamori, Aperizi, Akanani, Ahiti, Agirigashi, Ahivi na Ayebusi adamenyana namwe, mbwenye ine ndidakuchitisani kuakunda anthu onsenenewa." 
Joshua24:12 Pikhapita imwe m'dzikomo, anthu a mwenemo ndidaachitisa kukhala pampani-pani, towera ndithamangise mafumu mawiri a Aamori. Penepi nee mudapichita na matalasadanu penu mautanu tayu." 
Joshua24:13 Ine ndidakupasani mbuto yakuti si imwe mwailima, pontho mizinda yakuti si imwe mwaimanga tayu. Lero mukukhala mwenemo, pontho mukudya nsapo zamfesa zakuti si imwe mudazibzala tayu, pontho na nsapo zaolivi zakuti si imwe mudazibzala tayu.’ ”" 
Joshua24:14 Yoswa adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Natenepo mulemedzeni MBUYA mbamumtumikire mwakukhulupirika na mtimanu onsene. Lekani pembedza milungu ikhapembedza makolo anu m'dziko ya Mesopotamia na Iguputo ile mbamutumikira MBUYA ene basi." 
Joshua24:15 Ngakhala imwe nkhabe funa tayu kutumikira MBUYA, lero sankhulani anafuna imwe kutumikira, milungu ikhapembedza makolo anu m'dziko ya Mesopotamia, penu milungu ya Aamori, ale mbanachiroache dziko inakhala imweyi. Mbwenye kulonga pya ine na banjanga tinati titumikire MBUYA.”" 
Joshua24:16 Anthu adatawira mbati, “Pili kutali pyakwanga na ife kusiya kutumikira MBUYA mbatitumikira milungu inango." 
Joshua24:17 MBUYA Mulungu wathu adabulusa makolo athu pabodzi na ife ene paubitchu m'dziko ya Iguputo, pontho ife tidaona pyakudodomesa pidachita iye. Iye adatikoya mwadidi konsene kudafamba ife pakati pa madzinza anango mukhagwanda na ife mule." 
Joshua24:18 Pikhapita ife m'dziko muno MBUYA adathamangisa Aamori na anthu onsene akhakhala muno ale, tenepo na ife enembo tinatumikira MBUYA; thangwi iye ndi Mulungu wathu.”" 
Joshua24:19 Yoswa adalonga kuna anthu ale mbati, “Mwinango nee munakwanisa kumtumikira MBUYA tayu, iye ndi MBUYA wakuchena pontho wantchanje. Iye nkhabe dzalekerera kupandukira pontho kudawa kwanu tayu." 
Joshua24:20 Ngakhala munamsiya mbamutumikira milungu yachilendo, iye anakupasani nkhodolo mbakutchunyusani. Iye anakuvungani podi kwene akhali wadidi kuna imwe pakutoma.”" 
Joshua24:21 Anthu ale adatawira mbati, “Nkhabe! Ife tinatumikira MBUYA.”" 
Joshua24:22 Yoswa adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Imwe ene enechiroache ndimwe mboni zakuti mwasankhula kutumikira MBUYA.” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Ande, ndife mboni!”" 
Joshua24:23 Yoswa adaapanga mbati, “Bulusani mphapo milungu yachilendo ina imweyi pontho piperekeni na mtima onsene kuna MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele.”" 
Joshua24:24 Kubuluka penepo anthu ale adalonga kuna Yoswa mbati, “Ife tinatumikira MBUYA Mulungu wanu. Ife tinavera matongero ache.”" 
Joshua24:25 Natenepo Yoswa adasasanya chiverano na anthu ale pansiku yeneyo, pontho pa Shekemu pale iye adapereka mwambo na matongero kuna anthu kuti apiteweze." 
Joshua24:26 Yoswa adalemba matongero enewa m'bukhu ya mwambo wa Mulungu. Kubuluka penepo adakwata mwala ukulu mbauimisa patchinde pamuti wamthundu chifupi na mbuto yakuchena ya MBUYA. 
Joshua24:27 Iye adalonga kuna anthu onsene mbati, “Mwala wenewu unakhala umboni pakati pa imwe na ine. Mwalawu wava pyonsene pyalonga MBUYA kuna ife. Natenepo unakhala mboni yakupokanyisana namwe kuti muleke pandukira Mulungu.”" 
Joshua24:28 Tenepo Yoswa ule adagwinya anthu ale kumbuto zawo, kada munthu kubwerera kumbuto yache." 
Joshua24:29 Kubuluka penepo nyabasa wa MBUYA, Yoswa mwana Nuni adafa uku ana pyaka dzana na khumi." 
Joshua24:30 Anthu ale adamuikha m'masiye pambuto yache ene ku Timinati Sera m'nthemba ya mapiri ya Eferemu kumpoto kwa phiri ya Gaashi. 
Joshua24:31 Aisraele adatumikira MBUYA pandzidzi onsene ukhali Yoswa na moyo pontho na pandzidzi onsene ukhali akadamu a Aisraele na moyo, ale akhadaona pyonsene pidachita MBUYA kuna Aisraele." 
Joshua24:32 Mtembo wa Yosefe, ule ukhadabwerera na Aisraele kubulukira ku Iguputo adauikha m'masiye a pa Shekemu, mbuto ikhadagula Yakobo kuna ana Hamori babache Shekemu na kobiri zasiliva dzana ibodzi. Mbuto yeneyi idaperekwa kuna pidzukulu pya Yosefe kukhala yawo ene." 
Joshua24:33 Eleazara mwana Aroni adafa mbaikhwa m'masiye pa Gibea, luwani ya mu Eferemu m'nthemba ya mapiri, ikhadaperekwa kuna mwanache Finiasi ile." 
Judges1:1 Pidafa Yoswa Aisraele adavunza MBUYA mbati, “Njipi dzinza pakati pa madzinzathu yathema kutoma kwenda kasosa Akanani.”" 
Judges1:2 MBUYA adatawira mbati, “Dzinza ya Yuda ndiye inafuna dzatoma kwenda, ine ndinaapasa utongi onsene pana dzikoyo.”" 
Judges1:3 Anthu a dzinza ya Yuda adalonga kuna anthu a dzinza ya Simioni mbati, “Tendeni pabodzi nafe kunthemba idapaswa ife ile, towera pabodzi pene tikamenye nkhondo na Akanani. Tenepo tinaenda namwe pabodzi kunthemba idapaswa imwe ile.” Natenepo madzinza a Simioni" 
Judges1:4 na Yuda adenda kamenya nkhondo pabodzi pene. MBUYA adaachitisa kukunda Akanani na Aperizi mbapha amuna pikwi khumi pa bizeke. 
Judges1:5 Kweneko iwo adagumana Adonibizeke mbamenyana naye. 
Judges1:6 Iye adathawa, kwache iwo adamthamangisa, tenepo adamphata mbamgwanda pyala pikulu pya m'manja na pyala pikulu pya kumanyalo." 
Judges1:7 Adonibizeke adalonga mbati, “Mafumu makumanomwe akugwandika pyala pikulu pya m'manja na pyala pikulu pya kumanyalo alokota mambwera-mbwera pansi pa thebulu yanga. Chinchino Mulungu achitambo kuna ine pidachita ine kuna iwo.” Iye adendeswa kumzinda wa Yerusalemu kudafera iye kule." 
Judges1:8 Amuna a dzinza ya Yuda adasosa Yerusalemu mbaukunda. Iwo adapha anthu ache mbapisa mzindawo na moto. 
Judges1:9 Pidamala penepi, iwo adathimiza kumenyana na Akanani akhakhala m'nthemba ya mapiri, m'tchinde mwa mapiri na m'thando yatchetcha ya Negebu ile." 
Judges1:10 Iwo adenda kachita nkhondo na Akanani akhakhala mumzinda wa Hebroni, kale ukhadziwika na dzina yakuti Kiriati-Ariba ule. Kweneko iwo adakunda nkhonda Sheshai, Ahimani na Talimai." 
Judges1:11 Kubuluka penepo amuna a dzinza ya Yuda adenda kachita nkhondo na mzinda wa Debiri, ule ndzidzi wenewo ukhadziwika na dzina yakuti Kiriati-Seferi." 
Judges1:12 Mbodzi mwa iwo dzinache Kalebu adalonga mbati, “Ndinapereka mwananga wamkazi Akisa kuna munthu anapikwanisa kusosa na kukunda Kiriati-Seferi kuti akhale mkazache.”" 
Judges1:13 Tenepo Oteniele mwana wamamuna wa Kenazi, mphwache Kalebu, adakunda mzindawo, natenepo Kalebu adampasa mwanache wamkazi Akisa kuti akhale mkazache." 
Judges1:14 Pansiku yakukazhali Oteniele adadembetera mkazache kuti apemphe babache munda. Akisa adatchitha pabulu pache, tenepo Kalebu babache adamvunza pikhafuna iye pile." 
Judges1:15 Mwana wamkazi ule adatawira mbati, “Ndinafuna mathawale a madzi, thangwi mbuto yandipasa imweyi ili m'thando yatchetcha ya Negebu.” Natenepo Kalebu adampasa mphuno za madzi zakumtunda na zakuphedi zene." 
Judges1:16 Pidzukulu pya tebzalache Mose, Mkeni, pidathimiza kwenda na anthu a ku Yuda kuthando yatchetcha ya Negebu chifupi na Aradi kubulukira kumzinda wa Yeriko mzinda wa miti yamdikhwa. Kweneko adakhazikika pakati pa Aamaleki." 
Judges1:17 Anthu a dzinza ya Yuda na a dzinza ya Simioni adenda pabodzi pene, tenepo adakunda Akanani akhakhala mumzinda wa Zefati ale. Iwo adatemberera mzindawo, natenepo adauvunga mbauthula na dzina yakuti Horima." 
Judges1:18 MBUYA adaphedza Yuda natenepo iwo adapokosera nthemba ya mapiri kukhala yawo ene. Kwache iwo hadapokosere mzinda wa Gaza, Ashikeloni penu Ekroni na nthemba zawo zakuzungulira tayu. Anthu akhakhala m'khundu mwa nyanzawa akhali na pingolo pyawo pyasimbi, natenepo anthu a ku Yuda hadakwanise kuathamangisa tayu." 
Judges1:19  
Judges1:20 Ninga montho mudalongera Mose, Hebroni adaperekwa kuna Kalebu, ule adathamangisa mumzindamo madzinza matatu a pidzukulu pya Anaki." 
Judges1:21 Mbwenye anthu a dzinza ya Benjemani hadathamangise Ayebusi akhakhala mu Yerusalemu ale tayu. Tenepo Ayebusi adathimiza kukhala kweneko na anthu a dzinza ya Benjemani na lero. 
Judges1:22 Madzinza a Eferemu na Manase adenda kasosa mzinda wa Betele, ule pandzidzi wenewo ukhachemerwa Luzi. MBUYA adaaphedza." 
Judges1:23 Iwo adatuma amuna kazonda mzindawo," 
Judges1:24 ale adaona munthu akubulukira mumzindamo mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Tionesembo mule munakwanisira ife kupita mumzinda, tenepo ife nkhabe kukukuwaza tayu.”" 
Judges1:25 Munthu ule adaaonesa, tenepo anthu a madzinza a Eferemu na Manase adapha munthu onsene mumzindamo, kupambula munthu adaaonesa njira ule na banjache ene basi." 
Judges1:26 Kubuluka penepo iye adenda kudziko ya Ahiti mbamanga mzinda kweneko mbauthula na dzina yakuti Luzi, ile ndi dzinache na lero." 
Judges1:27 Anthu a dzinza ya Manase hadathamangise anthu akhakhala mizinda ya Beti-Shani, Taanaki, Dori, Ibuleamu. Megido na maluwani anango a chifupi tayu; Akanani adathimiza kukhala kweneko." 
Judges1:28 Pidasanduka Aisraele kukhala dzinza yamphamvu adakhakhamiza Akanani kuaphatira basa, kwache hadamale kuathamangisa onsene tayu." 
Judges1:29 Anthu a dzinza ya Eferemu hadathamangise anthu Akanani akhakhala mumzinda wa Gezeri, natenepo Akanani adathimiza kukhala kweneko nawo pabodzi." 
Judges1:30 Anthu a dzinza ya Zebuloni hadathamangise tayu anthu akhakhala m'mizinda ya Kitironi na Nahalali, tenepo Akanani adathimiza kukhala kweneko, pontho iwo adakhakhamizwa kuaphatira basa." 
Judges1:31 Anthu a dzinza ya Asheri hadathamangise tayu anthu akhakhala m'mizinda ya Ako, Sidoni, Ahilabu, Akizibu, Heliba, Afeki na Rehobu." 
Judges1:32 Dzinza ya Asheri adathimiza kukhala na Akanani, podi iwo hadaathamangise tayu." 
Judges1:33 Anthu a dzinza ya Nafitali hadathamangise tayu anthu akhakhala m'mizinda ya Beti-Shemeshi na Beti-Anati. Anthu adathimiza kukhala na Akanani, ale adakhakhamizwa kuaphatira basa." 
Judges1:34 Aamori adakhakhamiza anthu a dzinza ya Dani kwenda kunthemba ya mapiri mbaakhondesa kutchitha kuphedi. 
Judges1:35 Aamori adathimiza kukhala ku Aialoni, Shaalibimu na kuphiri ya Heresi. Kwache iwo akhali pansi pa utongi wa madzinza a Eferemu na Manase mbaakhakhamiza kuaphatira basa." 
Judges1:36 Madire a Edomu adagwanda na pamakata a Akarabimu panthunda kubulukira ku Sela. 
Judges2:1 Mngelo wa MBUYA adenda ku Bokimu kubulukira ku Giligala mbalonga kuna Aisraele mbati, “Ine ndidakubulusani kudziko ya Iguputo mbandikudzesani kudziko idadumbira ine kuna makolo anu ile, mbandilonga kuti ine nkhabe dzaswa chiverano chidasasanya ine na imwe chile tayu." 
Judges2:2 Imwe mwathema kuleka chita chiverano na anthu ambakhala m'dziko yeneyi ale. Imwe mwathema kugomola maguwawo ansembe. Kwache imwe nee mudachita pidakupangani ine pile tayu. M'mbuto mwache imwe mwachita pyakusiyana na pinthu pidakupangani ine pile. 
Judges2:3 Natenepo ine ndikukupangani kuti ine sinathamangisa anthu enewa tayu ndzidzi unaenda imwe. Iwo anakhala anyamalwanu natenepo imwe munakweshwa na kupembedza kwawo milungu yawo.” 
Judges2:4 Pikhadalonga mngelo penepi anthu onsene Aisraele adatoma kulira. 
Judges2:5 Ndi thangwi yache mbuto yeneyi imbachemerwa Bokimu. Penepo iwo adapereka nsembe kuna MBUYA. 
Judges2:6 Yoswa adagwinya Aisraele. Tenepo munthu onsene adenda kakwata khundu yache ya dzikoyo. 
Judges2:7 Ndzidzi onsene ukhali Yoswa na moyo Aisraele adatumikira MBUYA, tenepo pidafa iye iwo adathimiza kuchita tenepo ndzidzi onsene udakhala akadamu awo na moyo, ale akhadaona okha ene pinthu pyonsene pikulu pikhadachitira MBUYA Aisraele." 
Judges2:8 Nyabasa wa MBUYA, Yoswa mwana Nuni adafa ana pyaka dzana ibodzi na khumi." 
Judges2:9 Iye adaikhwa m'masiye kukhundu yache ene ya dziko pa Timinati Sera m'nthemba ya mapiri ya Eferemu kumpoto kwa phiri ya Gaashi. 
Judges2:10 Mfendu onsene udafambo, tenepo mfendu udadzawo udaduwalira MBUYA, pontho na pinthu pyonsene pikhadachitira iye Aisraele pile." 
Judges2:11 Tenepo Aisraele adachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA mbatoma kutumikira milungu Baala. 
Judges2:12 Iwo adaleka kupembedza MBUYA, Mulungu wa makolo awo, Mulungu adaabulusa m'dziko ya Iguputo ule mbatoma kupembedza milungu inango ya anthu adaazungulira ale. Iwo adailambira mbachitisa MBUYA kuzhangali." 
Judges2:13 Tenepo Aisraele adaleka kupembedza MBUYA mbatoma kutumikira milungu Baala na Asitarite. 
Judges2:14 Natenepo MBUYA adazhangalira Aisraele mbatawirisa mapanga kuasosa na kuabera pinthu pyawo. Iye adatawirisa anyamalwache onsene akumzungulira kuakunda, tenepo Aisraele hadakwaniseve kupitchinjiriza okha ene tayu." 
Judges2:15 Ndzidzi onsene ukhaenda Aisraele kamenya nkhondo, MBUYA hakhali kukhundu kwawo tayu, ninga montho mudapilongera iye kuti anapichita. Iwo akhali panyatwa zikulu." 
Judges2:16 Tenepo MBUYA adapasa Aisraele atongi, ale adaapulumusa kuna anyamalwawo." 
Judges2:17 Kwache Aisraele hadaikhe konta tayu akadamu awo ale. Aisraele akhali okhonda khulupirika kuna MBUYA mbapembedza milungu inango. Makolo awo akhadavera matongero a MBUYA, mbwenye mfendu wachinchinowu udachimbiza kuleka chitambo chibodzi-bodzi." 
Judges2:18 Ndzidzi onsene ukhaapasa MBUYA Aisraele mtongi, MBUYA akhamphedza mbapulumusa anthu kuna anyamalwawo ndzidzi onsene ukhakhala mtongiyo na moyo. MBUYA akhaavera nsisi thangwi iwo akhabulira na kusanyiswa, pontho na kubonereswa kwawoko." 
Judges2:19 Sindzidzi mtongiyo nkhufa, anthu akhabauka kubwerera kuna makhaliro awo akale ale, tenepo makhaliro awo akhandendeyaletu kuipa kupiringana mfendu wakale ule. Iwo akhatumikira na kupembedza milungu inango mbakhonda kuleka makhaliro awo akudawika na akuuma mtima ale." 
Judges2:20 Penepo MBUYA adazhangalira Aisraele pyakwanga mbalonga mbati, “Dzinza yeneyi yaswa chiverano chidasasanya ine na makolo awo mbandiatonga kuti achikoye chile. Na thangwi yakuti iwo hadandivere tayu" 
Judges2:21 ine sinathamangisave tayu dzinza na ibodzi ene, ile ikuthimiza kukhala m'dziko mwanu pidafa Yoswa." 
Judges2:22 Ine ndinaaphatisa basa kuona ngakhala Aisraele anavera matongero anga ninga mudachitira makolo awo.” 
Judges2:23 Tenepo MBUYA adatawirisa madzinza ale kuthimiza kukhala m'dzikomo; iye hadachitise Yoswa kuakunda penu kuathamangisa kabodzi kene pidafa Yoswa tayu. 
Judges3:1 MBUYA adasiya madzinza anangowo m'dzikomo kuyesera Aisraele onsene ale hadamenye nawo nkhondo m'dziko ya Kanani. 
Judges3:2 Iye adachita tenepo maka-maka towera afunzise kumenya nkhondo mfendu onsene wa Israele maka-maka ale chipo hadaone nkhondo tayu. 
Judges3:3 Mizinda ikhadasalira m'dzikomo ikhali mizinda mishanu ya Afilisti, Akanani, Asidoni na Ahivi onsene akhakhala m'mapiri a Lebanoni ale kubulukira pa phiri ya Baala-Herimoni mpakana pamakata a Hamati." 
Judges3:4 Iwo adathema kukhala mayesero kuna Aisraele kufuna kuona ngakhala iwo anavera penu tayu matongero adapereka MBUYA kuna makolo awo kudzera muna Mose ale. 
Judges3:5 Natenepo Aisraele adakhazikika pakati pa Akanani, Ahiti, Aamori, Aperizi, Ahivi na Ayebusi." 
Judges3:6 Iwo adasemberana nawo mbapembedza milungu yawo. 
Judges3:7 Aisraele adachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA Mulungu wawo; iwo adamduwalira mbapembedza milungu Baala na Ashera. 
Judges3:8 Tenepo MBUYA adazhangalira pyakwanga Aisraele mbatawirisa Mfumu Kushani-Rishataimu wa ku Mesopotamia kuakunda mbaatonga pyaka pisere. 
Judges3:9 Penepo Aisraele adalira kuna MBUYA, tenepo iye adatuma munthu kuasudzula panyatwa zawozo. Munthu weneyu akhali Oteniele mwana wamamuna wa Kenazi mphwache Kalebu." 
Judges3:10 Mzimu wa MBUYA adamgudumira, tenepo iye adakhala mkadamu wa Israele. Oteniele adenda kunkhondo, tenepo MBUYA adamchitisa kukunda mfumu wa ku Mesopotamia." 
Judges3:11 Pyaka makumanayi m'dzikomo mukhali mtendere. Kubuluka penepo Oteniele adafa. 
Judges3:12 Aisraele adachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA. Na thangwi yeneyi MBUYA adachitisa Egiloni mfumu wa Moabu kukhala wamphamvu pyakwanga kupiringana Israele. 
Judges3:13 Egiloni adaphatana kukhala gulu ibodzi na Aamoni na Aamaleki; iwo adakunda Israele mbapokosera Yeriko, mzinda wa miti yamdikhwa." 
Judges3:14 Aisraele akhali pansi pa utongi wa Egiloni pyaka khumi na pisere. 
Judges3:15 Penepo Aisraele adalira kuna MBUYA, tenepo iye adatuma munthu kuasudzula panyatwa zawozo. Munthu weneyu akhali Ehudi nyamabzere, iye akhali mwana wamamuna wa Gera wa dzinza ya Benjemani. Aisraele adatuma Ehudi kuna Egiloni mfumu wa Moabu na mitukwa." 
Judges3:16 Ehudi adapisasanyira yekha ene talasada yakutwa uku na uku yakulapha chifupi-fupi ninga kati ya khono. Iye adaimangirira kumadyo kwache mbaibisa na nguwo zache. 
Judges3:17 Tenepo adakwata mitukwa ile kwenda nayo kuna Egiloni, ule akhali wakukula manungo pyakwanga." 
Judges3:18 Pikhadapereka Ehudi mitukwa ile kuna Egiloni adapanga amunache akhadathukula mitukwa ale kubwerera kwawo. 
Judges3:19 Mbwenye iye yekha ene adabwerera panjira pamiyala yakusemwa chifupi na Giligala kwenda kuna Egiloni mbalonga mbati, “Nyakulemedzwa Mfumu, ndina mphangwa zachibiso-biso.” Tenepo mfumu adapanga anyabasache mbati, “Tisiyeni tekha muno!” Natenepo anyabasa onsene ale adabuluka panja." 
Judges3:20 Tenepo pikhakhala mfumu yekha ene m'subi yache yapadzulu mwakutonthola, Ehudi adenda kuna iye mbalonga mbati, “Ndili namwe mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu.” Mfumu adaimira," 
Judges3:21 penepo pene na mkono wache wamabzere Ehudi adacholola talasadache kubulukira kumadyo kwache mbaitchokomeza m'mimba mwa mfumu. 
Judges3:22 Talasada yonsene na chikumbu chene idapitiratu, tenepo talasada yonsene ikhali na mafuta okhokha. Ehudi hadaicholole tayu, thangwi idaphatirira pakati pa miyendo yache." 
Judges3:23 Kubuluka penepo Ehudi adabuluka panja mbafunga mwadidi misuwoyo," 
Judges3:24 tenepo adenda pyache. Anyabasa adadza mbagumana misuwo yamalwa fungwa mwadidi, tenepo adanyerezera kuti mfumu akhali m'bwalomo kuchita chumbudzu." 
Judges3:25 Tenepo iwo adadikhira ninga mudafunira iwo. Kwache mfumu hadafungule msuwo tayu basi, penepo iwo adakwata mfungulo mbafungula msuwo mbaona mbuyawo ali thasa afa." 
Judges3:26 Ehudi adenda pyache ndzidzi ukhadikhira iwo ule. Pidapiringana iye pamiyala ya kusemwa adathawira ku Seira. 
Judges3:27 Pidafika iye kweneko kudziko ya m'mapiri ya Eferemu adaliza ngoma kuchemera Aisraele kamenya nkhondo, tenepo adaatsogolera kutchitha nawo mapiri." 
Judges3:28 Iye adalonga mbati, “Nditewereni, MBUYA akuchitisani kuti mukunde anyamalwanu Amoabu.” Iwo adatewera Ehudi mbapamantha Amoabu pikhali iwo chifupi kuwambuka mkulo wa Yorodani; iwo hadatawirise munthu na mbodzi ene kuwambuka mkulowo tayu." 
Judges3:29 Nsiku yeneyo adapha amuna ninga pikwi khumi pya anyankhondo amphamvu a ku Moabu. Nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene adathawa tayu. 
Judges3:30 Nsiku yeneyo Aisraele adakunda Amoabu, tenepo pyaka makumasere m'dzikomo mukhali mtendere." 
Judges3:31 Kubuluka penepo adakhala mkadamu ndi Shamagara mwana Anati. Iyembo adapulumusa Aisraele pakupha Afilisti madzana matanthatu na ndodo yakuphatiswa basa kufambisa nayo ng'ombe za pachingolo. 
Judges4:1 Pidafa Ehudi Aisraele adachita pontho pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA. 
Judges4:2 Tenepo MBUYA adatawirisa Mfumu Yabini wa ku Kanani akhatonga mumzinda wa Hazori ule kuakunda. Mkadamu wa anyankhondo akhali Sisera, akhakhala pa Harosheti-Hagoimu ule." 
Judges4:3 Yabini akhali na pingolo pyasimbi madzana mafemba mbatonga Aisraele mwavinga pontho na mungu pyaka makumawiri. Tenepo Aisraele adalira kuna MBUYA kuti aaphedze. 
Judges4:4 Debora mkazi Lapidoti akhali mprofeti mbaphata basa ninga mtongi wa miseru wa Aisraele pandzidzi wenewo. 
Judges4:5 Debora adakhala pansi pa muti unango wamdikhwa pakati pa Rama na Betele m'nthemba ya mapiri ya Eferemu, tenepo Aisraele akhaenda kweneko katongwa miseru." 
Judges4:6 Nsiku inango iye adatuma mphangwa kuna Baraki mwana Abinoamu wa kumzinda wa Kedeshi kunthemba ya Nafitali mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele akupasa matongero awa: kwata amuna pikwi khumi a madzinza a Nafitali na Zebuloni mbuatsogolere kuphiri ya Tabori," 
Judges4:7 ine ndinachitisa Sisera, mkadamu wa anyankhondo a Yabini kudzamenyana nawe nkhondo pamkulo wa Kishoni. Iye anadza na pingolo na anyankhondo ache, kwache ine ndinakuchitisa kumkunda.”" 
Judges4:8 Tenepo Baraki adatawira mbati, “Ndinaenda ngakhala imwe munaenda nane, mbwenye ngakhala imwe nkhabe kwenda nane tayu, ine sinaendambo tayu.”" 
Judges4:9 Iye adatawira mbati, “Pyakoma, ndinati ndiende nawe, kwache iwe nkhabe dzasimbwa tayu, thangwi MBUYA anachitisa mkazi kukunda Sisera.” Tenepo Debora adalamuka kwenda ku Kedeshi pabodzi pene na Baraki." 
Judges4:10 Baraki adachemera madzinza a Nafitali na Zebuloni ku Kedeshi, pontho amuna pikwi khumi adamtewera. Debora adenda naye pabodzi." 
Judges4:11 Pandzidzi wenewo Heberi, Mkeni, adamanga khumbi yache chifupi na Kedeshi, pontho na pamuti wamthundu pa Zaananimu. Iye adafedzera kutali na Akeni anango ale, pidzukulu pya Habobu, mkamwiniache Mose." 
Judges4:12 Pidava Sisera kuti Baraki adenda kuphiri ya Tabori," 
Judges4:13 adagumanyisa pingolo pyache pyasimbi madzana mafemba na amunache onsene mbaagwinya kumkulo wa Kishoni kubulukira ku Harosheti-Hagoimu. 
Judges4:14 Tenepo Debora adalonga kuna Baraki mbati, “Ndoko! MBUYA anakutsogolera! Lero anakuchitisa kukunda Sisera.” Natenepo Baraki adatchitha kuphiri ya Tabori na amunache pikwi khumi ale." 
Judges4:15 Pidasosa Baraki anyankhondo a Sisera, MBUYA adamchitisa Sisera kukhala pampani-pani pabodzi pene na pingolo pyache pyonsene na amunache ene. Penepo Sisera adatchitha pachingolo chache mbathawa na miyendo." 
Judges4:16 Baraki adathamangisa pingolo na anyankhondo mpakana ku Harosheti-Hagoimu, tenepo anyankhondo onsene a Sisera adamala phiwa. Nkhabe mamuna na mbodzi ene adasala okhonda phiwa tayu." 
Judges4:17 Sisera adathawira kukhumbi ya Yaele, mkazi Heberi, Mkeni, thangwi Mfumu Yabini wa ku Hazori akhakhala na mtendere na banja ya Heberi." 
Judges4:18 Yaele adabuluka kagumanikana na Sisera mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Pitani m'khumbi mwanga muno, Mbuya. Lekani chita mantha.” Tenepo iye adapita, natenepo mkazi ule adampsampsira na chinguwo." 
Judges4:19 Iye adalonga kuna mkazi ule mbati, “Ndaphata miyendo ngandipasembo madzi akumwa; ndina nyota.” Mkazi ule adafungula dudu ya mkaka mbampasa kuti amwe, tenepo adambisa pontho." 
Judges4:20 Sisera adampanga mkazi ule mbati, “Imira pamsuwopo, ngakhala panadza munthu unango mbakuvunza kuti pana munthu unangombo adza pano, longa kuti nkhabe.”" 
Judges4:21 Sisera adatopa pyakwanga mwakuti adagona mbachita mkhonono. Penepo Yaele adakwata nyundo na ntchiri ya chisimbi mbaenda kukhali iye kule mwakumatama mbapha Sisera pakumkhomera ntchiri ya chisimbi mumsolo mwache kufikirana pansi kukhundu inango. 
Judges4:22 Pidafika Baraki kusaka Sisera, Yaele adagumanikana naye mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Tendeni kuno, ndinakuonesani munthu anasaka imwe ule.” Tenepo Baraki adenda pabodzi pene na Yaele mbakagumana Sisera ali thasa ninga na apo uku ntchiri ya chisimbi ili totopi mumsolo mwache." 
Judges4:23 Nsiku yeneyo Mulungu adachitisa Aisraele kukunda Yabini, mfumu wa ku Kanani," 
Judges4:24 tenepo iwo adathimiza pyakwanga pene kuchita naye nkhondo kufikirana adamvunga. 
Judges5:1 Pansiku yeneyo Debora na Baraki mwana Abinoamu adaimba nyimbo ishi: 
Judges5:2 MBUYA mbakuzwe! Akadamu a Aisraele adachita phinga kumenya nkhondo; anthu adapipereka mwakukomerwa. 
Judges5:3 Veserani, imwe mafumu! Ikhani makutu anu kuno, imwe atongi! Ndinati ndiimbe, ndinati ndiimbe nyimbo kuna MBUYA, ndinati ndipeke nyimbo za MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele." 
Judges5:4 MBUYA, pidabuluka imwe ku Seiri, pidabuluka imwe m'dziko ya Edomu, dziko idatekenyeka. Mvula mbivumba kubulukira kuthambo, ande, madzi adagwa m'makole." 
Judges5:5 Mapiri adatekenyeka pamaso pa MBUYA wa Sinai ule, pamaso pa MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele." 
Judges5:6 Nsiku za Shamagara mwana Anati, nsiku za Yaele, anyakupakira pingolo nee akhagwandave na m'dzikomu tayu, pontho anyaulendo akhapita na njira zakufa thangwi ya kugoswa." 
Judges5:7 Midzi ya Israele idasanduka madembe, kufikirana iwe, Debora, udadza mbukhala mama wa Israele." 
Judges5:8 Pidasankhula Aisraele kutumikira milungu yachilendo, m'dziko mukhali nkhondo. Kwache pakati pa amuna pikwi makumanayi a Aisraele, nkhabe chakugedera matswimo penu dipa pidaoneka tayu." 
Judges5:9 Mtimanga uli pana akadamu a nkhondo a Israele, pana imwe ale adapipereka mwakukomerwa pakati pa anthu. MBUYA mbakuzwe!" 
Judges5:10 Pilongeni, imwe anyakupakira pamabulu akuchena uku mwakhalira nguwo pamsana pawo, pontho imwe ale mumbafamba-famba konsene kwene." 
Judges5:11 Veserani kusokosa kwa mwinji m'michera. Iwo akulonga pya kukunda konsene kwa MBUYA, kukunda konsene kwa Aisraele! Tenepo anthu a MBUYA adafamba pamulikiti kutchithira kubulukira m'mizinda mwawo." 
Judges5:12 Tsogolera, Debora, ndoko na kutsogolera! Tsogolera! Imba nyimbo! Ndoko na kutsogolera! Ndoko patsogolo, Baraki mwana Abinoamu, tsogolera anyakuphatwa kunkhondo!" 
Judges5:13 Tenepo anyakukhulupirika adatchithira pamulikiti kuna akadamu awo; anthu a MBUYA adadza kuna iye pamulikiti akusasanyika kamenya nkhondo. 
Judges5:14 Iwo adadza kuphedi kubulukira ku Eferemu, m'nduli mwako, Benjemani, na anthu ako. Akadamu adatchithira pamulikiti kubulukira ku Makiri, mathubu kubulukira ku Zebuloni." 
Judges5:15 Akadamu a dzinza ya Isakara adadza na Debora; ande, dzinza ya Isakara adadza na Baraki ene, pontho iwo adamtewera mpakana kuphedi. Mbwenye dzinza ya Rubeni adagawanikana; iwo adapenuka pyawo pyakwenda." 
Judges5:16 Thangwi yache ninji iwo adasala pyawo kuthanga kuvesera amakabuswa kuchemera mabira? Ande, dzinza ya Rubeni adagawanikana; iwo adapenuka pyawo pyakwenda." 
Judges5:17 Dzinza ya Gadi adakhala kumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani, dzinza ya Dani adasalira pyawo chifupi na miyadiya mikulu-mikulu. Dzinza ya Asheri idasalira pagombe ya bara; iwo adasalira pyawo m'khundu-khundu mwa bara." 
Judges5:18 Mbwenye anthu a madzinza a Zebuloni na Nafitali, adasasanyika kutaya moyo wawo kunkhondo." 
Judges5:19 Pa Taanaki m'khundu mwa mkulo ya Megido mafumu adadza dzamenya nkhondo; mafumu a ku Kanani adamenya nkhondo, kwache iwo hadapokosere siliva tayu." 
Judges5:20 Kubulukira kuthambo nyenyezi zidamenya nkhondo; pikhafamba izo kugwanda na kuthambo, izo zidamenya nkhondo na Sisera." 
Judges5:21 Madzi makulu a mumkulo wa Kishoni adaakukulula, madzi akuthamanga a mumkulo wa Kishoni. Likitika, moyo wanga; khala wamphamvu!" 
Judges5:22 Tenepo akavalo adaguduka, kujondola pansi na njondo zawo kuthawa." 
Judges5:23 Mngelo wa MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Dzedze kuna Merozi. Dzedze ikulu ene kuna anthu ache, thangwi iwo hadadze dzaphedza MBUYA tayu; dzamphedza kumenyana na anyankhondo tayu.”" 
Judges5:24 Yaele mbakhale mkazi wakutsanzayiswa pikulu pakati pa akazi onsene, mkazi Heberi, Mkeni ule, mkazi wakutsanzayiswa pikulu pakati pa akazi onsene akukhala m'makumbi." 
Judges5:25 Sisera adapempha madzi, mbwenye iye adampasa mkaka; iye adampasa mafuta amkaka m'khomitcho yakukoma m'maso." 
Judges5:26 Kumkono ubodzi iye adakwata ntchiri yasimbi, kumkono unango iye adakwata nyundo ya misiri; iye adakhomera nayo Sisera mbaswa chibade cha msolo wache; iye adaikhomera mpakana kubulukira kukhundu inango ya msolo." 
Judges5:27 Iye adabzongonyoka mbagwa pansi thasa pamanyalo pa mkaziyo; iye adabzongonyoka mbagwa pamanyalo pache; penepo pene iye adagwa pansi mbafa. 
Judges5:28 Mache Sisera adasuzumira pazhanera; iyeyo adakhuwa kunduli kwa mangalade. Iye adavunza mbati, “Thangwi yache njanji chingolo chache chikudembuka kudza? Thangwi yache njanji akavalo ache akukhonda kudza mwakuchimbiza?”" 
Judges5:29 Anyabasache achikazi anzeruletu adamtawira, mbalonga yekha ene mwakubwereza-bwereza mbati," 
Judges5:30 “Mwinango iwo akugumanyisa na kugawa pinthu pyapokosera iwo, mtsikana mbodzi, penu awiri kada nyankhondo, nguwo zadidiletu kuna Sisera, nguwo zakukhala na pirezi pyakubalika kuikha m'khosi mwa matsano.”" 
Judges5:31 Anyamalwanu onsene mbamale kufa ninga tenepo, MBUYA, mbwenye ashamwali anu mbakhale ninga dzuwa pimbabuluka iyo mwamphamvu! Tenepo mukhali mtendere m'dzikomo pyaka makumanayi." 
Judges6:1 Aisraele adachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA, natenepo iye adatawirisa Amidiani kuatonga pyaka pinomwe." 
Judges6:2 Amidiani akhali amphamvu pyakwanga kupiringana Aisraele mwakuti iwo adabisala m'nkhwimba na m'mbuto zinango zakupata m'mapiri. 
Judges6:3 Ndzidzi onsene ukhabzala Aisraele mbewu, Amidiani akhadza pabodzi pene na Aamaleki na madzinza anango a m'thando yatchetcha dzaasosa." 
Judges6:4 Iwo akhamanga msasa m'dzikomo mbavunga mbewuzo mpakana kumbuto zakuzungulira Gaza kumwera. Iwo akhakwata mabira, ng'ombe na mabulu onsene mbakhonda siya chinthu na chibodzi chene kuti Aisraele adye." 
Judges6:5 Iwo akhadza na pifuyo pyawo na makumbi awo ninga nyadzombe. Iwo na ngamila zawo akhali okhonda lengeseka. Iwo adadza mbasakaza dzikoyo," 
Judges6:6 mwakuti Aisraele akhasowa nyakuaphedza. 
Judges6:7 Tenepo Aisraele adalira kuna MBUYA kuti aaphedze kuna Amidiani," 
Judges6:8 tenepo iye adaatumizira mprofeti ule adadza kuna iwo na mphangwa zakubulukira kuna MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele kuti: “Ine ndidakubulusani paubitchu m'dziko ya Iguputo. 
Judges6:9 Ine ndidakupulumusani m'manja mwa Aiguputo, pontho m'manja mwa anthu adamenyana na imwe m'dziko muno ale. Ine ndidaathamangisa ndzidzi ukhaenda imwe, tenepo ine ndidakupasani dziko yawoyo." 
Judges6:10 Ine ndidakupangani kuti ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu pontho kuti muleke pembedza milungu ya Aamori, m'dziko inakhala imwe chinchinoyi. Kwache imwe nee mudandivesere tayu.”" 
Judges6:11 Natenepo mngelo wa MBUYA adadza kumudzi wa Ofara mbakhala pansi pa muti wamthundu ule mwenechiroache akhali Yoasi wa mbumba ya Abiezere. Mwanache wamamuna, Gideoni akhabubuda tirigu m'dzenje yakutchitchithira vinyu, towera Amidiani aleke kumuona." 
Judges6:12 Mngelo wa MBUYA adaonekera kuna iye penepo mbalonga mbati, “MBUYA ali nawe, iwe munthu wakuwanga mtima pontho wamphamvu!”" 
Judges6:13 Gideoni adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Mbuya, ndikuvunzenimbo, thangwi yache ninji pyonsenepi pyachitika ngakhala MBUYA ali nafe? Apombo pya pinthu pyakudodomesa pikhachitika pidatipanga makolo athu pile, pya mule mudaabulusira iye m'dziko ya Iguputo? MBUYA atisiya tekha, pontho atisiya m'manja mwa Amidiani.”" 
Judges6:14 Tenepo MBUYA adampanga mbati, “Ndoko na mphamvu zako zonsene ukapulumuse Aisraele kuna Amidiani. Ndakutuma ndine pano.”" 
Judges6:15 Gideoni adatawira mbati, “Apo Mbuya, ine ndinakwanisa tani kuapulumusa Aisraele? Mbumbanga njakusowa mphamvu pakati pa dzinza ya Manase, pontho ine ndine wamng'onoletu m'banja mwathu.”" 
Judges6:16 MBUYA adatawira mbati, “Iwe unakwanisa kupichita, thangwi ndinakuphedza. Iwe unakang'antha Amidiani mwakukhonda nensa khala ninga akhali munthu mbodziyo.”" 
Judges6:17 Gideoni adatawira mbati, “Ngakhala mwakomerwa nane, ndipaseni chitsikimizo kuti ndimwedi MBUYA." 
Judges6:18 Ndaphata miyendo, lekani kwenda kufikirana ndadza na pyakupereka pyanga kuna imwe mbandipiikha pamaso panu.” MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Ine ndinati ndidikhire kufikirana iwe wadza.”" 
Judges6:19 Tenepo Gideoni adapita m'nyumba mwache mbaphika mwanambuzi mbaphatisa basa ndowa ya ufa kuphika mkate wakusowa chakufufumisira. Iye adaikha nyama m'chitundu mbaikha msuzi m'ndilo, tenepo adadza napyo kuna mngelo wa MBUYA pansi pa muti wamthundu ule, mbapipereka kuna iye." 
Judges6:20 Mngelo wa MBUYA ule adampanga mbati, “Ikha nyama na mkate pamwalapa mbukhuthulirepo msuzi.” Gideoni adachita tenepo." 
Judges6:21 Penepo mngelo wa MBUYA adafuthula dzanjache mbakhuya nyama na mkate na ndodo ikhadaphatira iye m'manja mwache. Moto udabuluka m'mwala mule mbupyereza nyama na mkate ule. Natenepo mngelo ule adabisika. 
Judges6:22 Gideoni adadzindikira kuti mngelo wa MBUYA akhadamuonekera, tenepo adalonga mwamantha mbati, “MBUYA Mulungu! Ndaona mngelo wanu maso na maso!”" 
Judges6:23 Mbwenye MBUYA adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Mtendere. Leka chita mantha. Iwe hunafa tayu.”" 
Judges6:24 Gideoni adamangira MBUYA guwa yansembe penepo mbaithula na dzina yakuti, “MBUYA ndi mtendere.” Na lero guwayo ilipo basi pa Ofara, ile nja mbumba ya Abiezere." 
Judges6:25 Mosiku onthowo MBUYA adapanga Gideoni mbati, “Kwata ng'ombe imuna ibodzi ya babako, ng'ombe imuna ya pyaka pinomwe mbugwise guwa ya babako idamangira iye milungu Baala, pontho ubuluse dzimunthu wa milungu Ashera, ali m'khundu mwache ule." 
Judges6:26 Umangire mwadidi MBUYA Mulungu wako guwa yansembe pamuluwu. Tenepo kwata ng'ombe ile mbuipyereze nsembe pakuphatisa basa dzimunthu wamuti wa Ashera, milungu yawo udabulusa iwe ule ninga nkhuni.”" 
Judges6:27 Natenepo Gideoni adakwata khumi a anyabasache mbachita pikhadampanga MBUYA pile. Na thangwi yakuti iye akhagopa a pabanja pache, pontho na anthu a muluwanimo, iye hadapichite na masikati tayu, mbwenye adapichita pyache na mosiku." 
Judges6:28 Mangwana mwache na machibese pidalamuka anthu a muluwanimo adagumana kuti guwa yansembe ya Baala na dzimunthu wa Ashera, milungu yawo pyagwiswapo, pontho ng'ombe imuna yachiwiri yapyerezwa nsembe paguwa ikhadamangwa penepo ile." 
Judges6:29 Iwo adavunzana unango na mwanzache mbati, “Mbani adachita penepiyu?” Iwo adapivunzisa mwadidi mwene mbagumana kuti adapichita ndi Gideoni mwana Yoasi." 
Judges6:30 Iwo adalonga kuna Yoasi mbati, “Mbuluse panja pano mwanako, towera timphe! Iye adagwisa guwa yansembe ya Baala mbabulusa dzimunthu wa milungu Ashera akhali m'khundu mwache ule.”" 
Judges6:31 Mbwenye Yoasi adalonga kuna anthu onsene akhadamfikira ale mbati, “Ayi, imwe muli kukhundu kwa Baala? Kani imwe mukuyesa kumuikhira kunduli? Munthu onsene anaikhira kunduli Baala anati aphiwe pinafuna fika machibese. Ngakhala Baala ndi mulungu mulekeni apitchinjirize yekha ene; idagwiswa ndi guwache.”" 
Judges6:32 Kubuluka ndzidzi wenewo kwenda m'tsogolo Gideoni akhadziwika na dzina yakuti Yerubaala, thangwi Yoasi akhadalonga mbati, “Mulekeni Baala apitchinjirize yekha ene; idagwiswa ndi guwache.”" 
Judges6:33 Kubuluka penepo Amidiani, Aamaleki onsene na madzinza anango akumabulukiro dzuwa adagumanyikana kumtunda unango wa mkulo wa Yorodani mbamanga msasawo paphedi ya Yezereele." 
Judges6:34 Mzimu wa MBUYA adamgudumira Gideoni, tenepo adaliza ngoma kuchemera mbumba ya Abiezere kumtewera." 
Judges6:35 Iye adatuma anyamphangwa kukhundu zonsene ziwiri za Manase kuachemera kuti amtewere. Iye adatuma pontho anyamphangwa kuna madzinza onsene a Asheri, Zebuloni na Nafitali, tenepo iwo adadza kuna iye." 
Judges6:36 Penepo Gideoni adalonga kuna Mulungu mbati, “Imwe mukulonga kuti mwanyerezera kuphatisa basa ine pano kupulumusa Israele," 
Judges6:37 ngayang'anani ndikuikha ubweya wa bira pansi pa mbuwa pambabubudira ine tirigu pale. Ngakhala mangwana na machibese ndinagumanapo bume yokha pa ubweyapo uku pambuwa ponsenepo mphakuuma, penepo ndinapidziwa kuti munaphatisa basa ine pano kupulumusa Israele.”" 
Judges6:38 Penepyo pidachitikadi ninga monthomo. Mangwana mwache na machibese pidalamuka Gideoni adakamula ubweya ule mbujoja madzi akukwana kudzala chitomba. 
Judges6:39 Tenepo Gideoni adalonga kuna Mulungu mbati, “Lekeni kundizhangalira; ndilekeni ndilonge pontho kabodzi basi. Ndaphata miyendo nditawiriseni ndiyese pontho kabodzi basi na ubweyawu. Ndzidzi uno ubweya ukhale wakuuma pambuwapo pakhale mtota.”" 
Judges6:40 Mosiku wenewo Mulungu adachitadi ninga monthomo. Mangwana mwache na machibese ubweya ukhali wakuuma mwenemo pambuwapo padatota na bume. 
Judges7:1 Nsiku inango Gideoni na amunache onsene adalamuka na machibese mbamanga msasa m'khundu-khundu mwa mphuno ya madzi ya Harodi. Msasa wa Amidiani ukhali paphedi kumpoto kwawo chifupi na phiri ya More. 
Judges7:2 MBUYA adalonga kuna Gideoni mbati, “Amuna ana iwewa ngazinji pyakwanga kuti ine ndiachitise kukunda Amidiani. Iwo anakwanisa kunyerezera kuti akunda na mphamvu zawo mbakhonda kundikuza." 
Judges7:3 Tenepo lalika kuna anthu kuti, ‘Munthu anachita manthayo abwerere pyache m'mudzi, ife mbatikhala pyathu paphiri ya Gileadi pano.’ ” Natenepo amuna pikwi makumawiri na piwiri adabwerera pyawo mbasalapo amuna pikwi khumi." 
Judges7:4 Penepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Gideoni mbati, “Anthu ana iwe ngazinji pyakwanga basi. Akwate uende nawo kumadzi, tenepo ine ndinakaakhetha m'mbuto mwako. Ngakhala ndinalonga kuti mamuna ushu athema kwenda nawe, iye anati aende nawedi. Mbwenye ngakhala ndinalonga kuti mamuna ushu aleke kwenda nawe, iye hanaenda nawedi tayu.”" 
Judges7:5 Gideoni adatchithira na amuna ale kumadzi, tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Gideoni mbati, “Pambula mamuna onsene ule anakhaphwira madzi ninga mwanambwa pakati pa anthu onsene anagodama kuti amwe madziwa.”" 
Judges7:6 Pakhali amuna madzana matatu ale adatunga madzi na manjawo mbakhaphwira; anango onsene adagodama kuti amwe. 
Judges7:7 MBUYA adalonga kuna Gideoni mbati, “Ine ndinakupulumusa pontho ndinakuchitisa kukunda Amidiani pakuphatisa basa amuna madzana matatu adamwa madzi mwakukhaphwira ale. Panga anango onsene kuti aende pyawo m'mudzi.”" 
Judges7:8 Tenepo Gideoni adagwinya Aisraele onsene pyawo m'mudzi kupambula amuna madzana matatu, ale adakwata pitomba na ngoma za amuna anango ale. Msasa wa Amidiani ukhali paphedi m'tchinde mwa phiri." 
Judges7:9 Mosiku onthowo MBUYA adapanga Gideoni mbati, “Lamuka mbukasose msasawo; ndinakuchitisa kukunda." 
Judges7:10 Kwache ngakhala unachita mantha, ndoko kumsasako pabodzi pene na nyabasako Pura." 
Judges7:11 Iwe unati ukave pinafuna iwo kalonga; penepo unawanga mtima kuasosa.” Tenepo Gideoni pabodzi pene na nyabasache Pura adatchithira kunkhomo kwa msasa wa anyamalwawo. 
Judges7:12 Amidiani, Aamaleki na madzinza anango onsene akumabulukiro dzuwa adafalikira paphedi pale ninga nyadzombe, pontho iwo akhali na ngamila zakuinjipa pyakwanga ninga tchetcha ya pagombe ya bara." 
Judges7:13 Pidafika Gideoni adava munthu unango akupanga mwanzache pya ndoto zache. Iye adalonga mbati, “Ndalota mkate wakuphikwa na ufa wa barele udagulung'undira mumsasa mwathu muno mbumenya khumbi. Khumbiyo idagweratu pansi phwatha.”" 
Judges7:14 Mwanzache ule adamtawira mbati, “Penepi nkhabe khala chinthu chinango tayu, mbwenye talasada ya Gideoni mwana Yoasi, Muisraele. Mulungu aikha m'manja mwache msasa onsenewu pabodzi pene na anyankhondo athu ene.”" 
Judges7:15 Pidava Gideoni ndoto za munthu ule mbadziwa kuti ipyo pikhalonganji, adagodama mbapembedza MBUYA. Kubuluka penepo adabwerera kumsasa wa Aisraele kule mbalonga mbati, “Lamukani, MBUYA atichitisa kukunda anyankhondo a Amidiani!”" 
Judges7:16 Iye adagawa amuna madzana matatu ale m'magulu matatu mbapereka ngoma kuna munthu onsene na chitomba chakukhala na nsakali m'bwalo mwache. 
Judges7:17 Iye adaapanga mbati, “Ndingafika kunkhomo kwa msasa mundiyang'ane mbamuchita pinachita ine." 
Judges7:18 Gulu yanga na ine tingaliza ngoma zathu, penepo imwe mulizembo zanu konsene kuzungulira msasawo mbamukhuwa kuti, ‘Kuna MBUYA na kuna Gideoni.’ ”" 
Judges7:19 Gideoni na gulu yache ya anthu dzana ibodzi adatchithira kunkhomo kwa msasa kule mbakudzati fika chiti-chiti pidamala chinjana anyakulondali. Iwo adaliza ngoma mbaswa pitomba pidaphatira iwo pile. 
Judges7:20 Tenepo magulu anango awiri ale adachitambo chibodzi-bodzi. Onsene adaphatira nsakali zile kumabzere kwawo, ngoma kumadyo kwawo mbakhuwa mbati, “Talasada ya MBUYA na ya Gideoni!”" 
Judges7:21 Munthu onsene adaimira pambuto pache kuzungulira msasawo, tenepo anyankhondo onsene adathawa akukhuwa," 
Judges7:22 Mwenemo Gideoni na amunache akhaliza ngoma zawo, MBUYA adachitisa anyamalwawo kumenyana okhokha na matalasadawo. Iwo adathawira ku Zarenati mpakana ku Beti-Shita, mbafika kuluwani ya Abele-Mehola chifupi na Tabati." 
Judges7:23 Tenepo amuna a madzinza a Nafitali, Asheri pabodzi pene na makhundu onsene awiri a Manase adachemerwa, tenepo iwo adathamangisa Amidiani." 
Judges7:24 Gideoni adatuma anyamphangwa kudziko yonsene ya m'mapiri ya Eferemu kalonga mbati, “Idzani dzamenya nkhondo na Amidiani. Khalirani pamkulo wa Yorodani na m'mikhwawa mpakana ku Beti-Bara towera Amidiani aleke wambuka.” Amuna a dzinza ya Eferemu adachemereswa onsene pabodzi mbakhalira pamkulo wa Yorodani na m'mikhwawa mpakana ku Beti-Bara." 
Judges7:25 Iwo adaphata mafumu awiri a ku Midiani, Mfumu Orebu na Zeebu; iwo adaphera Orebu pa Phanzwi ya Orebu, adaphambo Zeebu pambuto yakutchitchithira vinyu ya Zeebu. Iwo adathimiza kuthamangisa Amidiani mbadza na misolo ya Orebu na Zeebu kuna Gideoni ule ndzidzi wenewo akhali kumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani." 
Judges8:1 Kubuluka penepo amuna a dzinza ya Eferemu adalonga kuna Gideoni mbati, “Thangwi yache njanji mudakhonda kutichemerambo pikhamenya imwe nkhondo na Amidiani? Wachitiranji pinthu ninga penepi kuna ife?” Iwo adampokanyisa pyakwanga pene." 
Judges8:2 Mbwenye Gideoni adalonga mbati, “Pinthu pidakwanisa ine kuchita nee si pinthu tayu kusangiza na pinthu pyachita imwepo. Podi na ping'ono pene pidachita imwe amuna a ku Eferemu mphyamaso pyakwanga kupiringana pinthu pyachita mbumbanga yonsene." 
Judges8:3 Na mphamvu za MBUYA imwe mudapha mafumu mawiri a ku Midiani, Orebu na Zeebu. Ninji chachita ine kusangiza na chenechi?” Pidalonga iye penepi, iwo hadamzhangalirave pikulu pene tayu." 
Judges8:4 Gideoni na amunache madzana matatu ndzidzi wenewo akhadafika kumkulo wa Yorodani mbawambuka. Iwo adamala topa, kwache adathimiza kuthamangisa anyamalwawo." 
Judges8:5 Pidafika iwo ku Sukoti, iye adalonga kuna amuna a muluwanimo mbati, “Ndaphata miyendo, apasenimbo amunangawa mikate pang'ono. Iwo amala topa, pontho ndikuthamangisa Zeba na Zalimuna mafumu awiri a ku Midiani.”" 
Judges8:6 Mbwenye akadamu a ku Sukoti adalonga mbati, “Thangwi yache njanji inafunira ife pasa anyankhondo kudya? Imwe nee mudzati phata Zeba na Zalimuna tayu.”" 
Judges8:7 Gideoni adalonga mbati, “Thangwi ya penepi, MBUYA angaikha Zeba na Zalimuna m'manja mwathu ndinakumenyani na matsanjo a minga, pontho na gogodo yathika pya m'thando yatchetcha muno.”" 
Judges8:8 Gideoni adathimiza kwenda kuna Penuele mbapempha pibodzi-bodzipi kuna anthu a kweneko, kwache amuna a kweneko adatawira chibodzi-bodzi ninga amuna a ku Sukoti." 
Judges8:9 Natenepo Gideoni adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ndingakunda kunaenda ineku pakubwerera panga ndinagwisa nsanjayi.”" 
Judges8:10 Zeba na Zalimuna akhali pa Karikori na anyankhondo awo. Pakati pa anyankhondo onsene a madzinza akumabulukiro dzuwa adasalira okha akhalipo pikwi khumi na pishanu; anyankhondo pikwi dzana na makumawiri adaphiwa. 
Judges8:11 Gideoni adenda na njira yakuphatiswa basa na anyakukhala m'makumbi, kumabulukiro dzuwa a Noba na Yogibeha mbasosa anyankhondo mwakuatutumusa." 
Judges8:12 Mafumu awiri, Zeba na Zalimuna a ku Midiani adathawa, kwache iye adaathamangisa basi mbaaphata mbachitisa anyankhondo awo onsene kukhala pampani-pani." 
Judges8:13 Pikhabwera Gideoni kubulukira kunkhondo na pamakata a Heresi," 
Judges8:14 adaphata mphale mbodzi wa ku Sukoti mbamvunza. Mphale ule adalembera pansi Gideoni madzina makumanomwe na manomwe a mu Sukoti. 
Judges8:15 Tenepo Gideoni adenda kuna amuna a ku Sukoti mbalonga mbati, “Kumbukani kuti pidakhonda imwe kundiphedza. Imwe mudalonga kuti nkhabe kwanisa tayu kupasa pyakudya anyankhondo anga adamala topa ale, thangwi ndikhadadzati kunda tayu Zeba na Zalimuna. Apo lero ndaaphatatu!”" 
Judges8:16 Iye adakwata minga na matsanjo a gogodo yathika pya m'thando yatchetcha mbatchunyusa napyo akadamu a ku Sukoti. 
Judges8:17 Iye adagwisa nsanja ya ku Penuele mbapha amuna a mumzindamo. 
Judges8:18 Kubuluka penepo Gideoni adavunza Zeba na Zalimuna mbati, “Amuna adapha imwe ku Tabori akhali akutani?” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Iwo akhaoneka ninga iwepo, onsene a iwo akhaoneka ninga mwana wa mfumu.”" 
Judges8:19 Gideoni adalonga mbati, “Iwo akhali abale anga, ana a mama nyakundibala. Ine ndinadumbira kuti ngakhala imwe nee mudaapha tayu, inembo mbidakuphani tayu.”" 
Judges8:20 Tenepo iye adalonga kuna Yetere mwanache wautombo mbati, “Lamuka mbuaphe!” Kwache Yetere hadacholole talasadache tayu, thangwi akhali mphale, pontho akhachita mantha." 
Judges8:21 Penepo Zeba na Zalimuna adalonga kuna Gideoni mbati, “Lamuka mbutiphe ndiwe ene pyako, thangwi iwe unachita chamuna.” Natenepo Gideoni adaapha mbakwata mikufu yakubalika ikhali mkhosi mwa ngamila zawo zile." 
Judges8:22 Kubuluka penepo Aisraele adalonga kuna Gideoni mbati, “Khala mtongi wathu, iwe, mwanako na chidzukulu chako. Iwe watipulumusa m'manja mwa Amidiani.”" 
Judges8:23 Gideoni adatawira mbati, “Ine nkhabe khala mtongi wanu, nee mwananga tayu. MBUYA mbakhale mtongi wanu.”" 
Judges8:24 Mbwenye iye adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Ndinakupemphani chinthu chibodzi. Munthu onsene wa imwe andipase mphete za m'khutu zidakwata iye.” (Amidiani ninga Aishimaele akhavala mphete zagolidi m'khutu.)" 
Judges8:25 Anthu adatawira mbati, “Tinakomerwa kuzipereka kuna iwe.” Iwo adathasika nguwo, tenepo munthu onsene adaikha mphete za m'khutu zidakwata iye zile." 
Judges8:26 Mphete za m'makutu zagolidi zidatambira Gideoni zidalemera chifupi-fupi makilogramu makumawiri kupambula mikufu yakubalika, pyakuthemesera manungo, na nguwo zamsuzi wanyemba zikhavala mafumu a ku Midiani, pontho bande yakumangirirwa m'khosi mwa ngamila zawo zidatambira iye zile." 
Judges8:27 Gideoni adasasanya mfanikizo wagolidi mbauikha muluwani mwache ya Ofara. Aisraele onsene adakhonda Mulungu mbaenda kweneko kapembedza mfanikizo ule. Tenepo icho chidasanduka msampha kuna Gideoni na kuna banjache. 
Judges8:28 Tenepo Amidiani adakundwa na Aisraele, pontho pakhali nkhabeve chakugoswa tayu. Dzikoyo ikhali pamtendere pyaka makumanayi kufikirana Gideoni adafa." 
Judges8:29 Gideoni adabwerera kwawo mbakakhala kweneko. 
Judges8:30 Iye akhali na ana makumanomwe, thangwi iye akhali na akazi azinji ene." 
Judges8:31 Iye akhali pontho na mkazi wachibitchu mu Shekemu, ule akhadambalira mwana wamamuna mbamthula Abimeleki." 
Judges8:32 Gideoni mwana Yoasi adafa uku akalamba mwadidi mbaikhwa m'masiye a babache pa Ofara, luwani ya mbumba ya Abiazeri." 
Judges8:33 Sindzidzi Gideoni nkhufa Aisraele hadakhulupirike kuna Mulungu tayu mbapembedza milungu Baala. Iwo adaikha Baala-Beriti kukhala mulungu wawo 
Judges8:34 mbaduwalira MBUYA Mulungu wawo, akhadaapulumusa m'manja mwa anyamalwawo onsene akuazungulira ule." 
Judges8:35 Iwo hadakomere mtima tayu banja ya Yerubaala, ule ndi Gideoni, podi kwene kuti iye adachitira Aisraele pinthu pyadidi." 
Judges9:1 Abimeleki mwana wamamuna wa Gideoni adenda kuluwani ya Shekemu, kule kukhakhala abale ache mache onsene mbalonga kuna iwo na kuna mbumba yonsene ya mache ule mbati," 
Judges9:2 “Vunzani mzika za ku Shekemu kuti, ‘Chadidi ninji kuna imwe; kutongwa na ana achimuna onsene makumanomwe a Gideoni, penu kutongwa na munthu mbodzi ene basi? Kumbukani kuti inembo ndine mbaleanu chadi-chadi.’ ”" 
Judges9:3 Abale ache mache adalonga kuna amuna a ku Shekemu pya pinthu penepi, tenepo iwo adanyerezera kutewera Abimeleki, thangwi iye akhali mbaleawo." 
Judges9:4 Iwo adampasa kobiri zasiliva makumanomwe zakubulukira m'nyumba yakupembedzeramo ya Baala-Beriti, tenepo na kobiri zenezi iye adalemba ganyo malova kukhala kunduli kwache." 
Judges9:5 Tenepo iye adenda kumusa kwa babache ku Ofara, tenepo na nsonga ya mwala ubodzi iye adapha nawo abale ache makumanomwe, ale akhali ana a Gideoni. Kwache Yotamu, mwana wamng'onoletu wa Gideoni adabisala, tenepo hadaphiwe tayu." 
Judges9:6 Kubuluka penepo amuna a ku Shekemu na ku Beti-Milo adagumanyikana pabodzi pansi pa muti wakupambulika wamthundu mu Shekemu mbadzoza Abimeleki ufumu. 
Judges9:7 Pidapiva Yotamu, adenda kaimira pansonga ya phiri ya Gerizimu mbakhuwa kuna iwo mbati, “Veserani kuno, imwe amuna a ku Shekemu, tenepo Mulungu anati akuveserenimbo." 
Judges9:8 Pidachitwa na miti, ile idagumanyikana pabodzi kupisankhulira okha ene mfumu. Mitiyo idalonga kuna muti waolivi kuti, ‘Khala mfumu wathu.’" 
Judges9:9 Muti waolivi ule udatawira kuti, ‘Kuti ine ndikhale mfumu wanu ine ndathema kusiya kubulusa mafutanga, ale ambaphatiswa basa kulemedza nawo milungu pontho anthu.’" 
Judges9:10 Miti ile idalonga kuna muti wamkuyu ule kuti, ‘Idza ukhale mfumu wathu.’" 
Judges9:11 Mbwenye muti wamkuyu ule udatawira kuti, ‘Kuti ine ndikhale mfumu wanu ine ndathema kusiya kubala nsapo zanga zadidi pontho zakutapirazi.’" 
Judges9:12 Miti ile idalonga kuna mtawi wamfesa kuti, ‘Idza ukhale mfumu wathu.’" 
Judges9:13 Mbwenye mtawi wamfesa ule udatawira kuti, ‘Kuti ine ndikhale mfumu wanu ine ndathema kusiya kubulusa vinyu ambachitisa milungu na anthu kukomerwa ule.’" 
Judges9:14 Kubuluka penepo miti yonsene idalonga kuna thundudzi ya minga mbati, ‘Iwe idza ukhale mfumu wathu.’" 
Judges9:15 Thundudzi ya minga idatawira kuti, ‘Ngakhala munafunadi kuti ine ndikhale mfumu wanu idzani mukhale pamthunzi m'tchinde mwangamu. Ngakhala munakhonda kuchita tenepo moto unagaka kubulukira m'minga mwangamu mbupisa mikungudza ya ku Lebanoni.’ ”" 
Judges9:16 Penepo Yotamu adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Ayi imwe mukhachitadi penepi na mtima wakuona, pontho na mtima onsene pikhadzoza imwe Abimeleki kukhala mfumu wanu? Ayi imwe mudachita pinthu pyadidi kuna Gideoni na banjache pyakuthemerana na pidachita iye?" 
Judges9:17 Kumbukani kuti babanga adakumenyerani nkhondo. Iye adasasanyika kufa kufuna kupulumusa imwepo kuna Amidiani. 
Judges9:18 Kwache lero mwasandukira banja ya babanga. Imwe mudapha anache, amuna makumanomwe pamwala ubodzi mbamudzoza Abimeleki, mwana wamamuna adambalira bitchu wache ule, kukhala mfumu wa ku Shekemu, thangwi ndi mbaleanu." 
Judges9:19 Apo chinchino pidachita imwe kuna Gideoni na kuna banjache ngakhala mudapichita na mtima wakuona, pontho na mtima onsene, penepo komerwani na Abimeleki iyembo akomerwe namwe." 
Judges9:20 Mbwenye ngakhala si tenepo tayu, moto mbugake kubulukira muna Abimeleki kupisa mzika za Shekemu, na za Betimilo; moto mbugake pontho kubulukira muna mzika za Shekemu, Betimilo kupisa Abimeleki.”" 
Judges9:21 Podi Yotamu akhachita mantha na Abimeleki nanache, iye adathawa mbaenda pyache kakhala ku Beeri." 
Judges9:22 Abimeleki adatonga Israele pyaka pitatu. 
Judges9:23 Mulungu adagwisa mzimu okhonda vana pakati pa Abimeleki na amuna a mu Shekemu, tenepo iwo adapandukira Abimeleki." 
Judges9:24 Penepi pidachitika kuti Abimeleki na amuna a mu Shekemu, ale adamuwangisa mtima kupha ana Gideoni makumanomwe, abwezerwe upandu udachita iwo ule." 
Judges9:25 Amuna a mu Shekemu adabisalira Abimeleki m'tsanga pansonga ya phiri, tenepo iwo adaphata munthu onsene wakugwanda na njira yeneyo. Mbwenye Abimeleki adapangwa pya penepi." 
Judges9:26 Kubuluka penepo Gaala mwana wamamuna wa Ebedi adadza ku Shekemu na abale ache, tenepo amuna a mu Shekemu adamnyindira." 
Judges9:27 Onsene adenda kumunda wamfesa katchola mfesa mbasasanya vinyu mbachita phwando. Iwo adapita m'nyumba yakupembedzeramo milungu yawo, mule mudadya iwo na kumwa kwene mbasedegula Abimeleki." 
Judges9:28 Gaala adalonga mbati, “Ayi amuna a mu Shekemu muno ndife akutani? Thangwi yache ninji tikutumikira Abimeleki? Abimeleki mbani? Mwana Gideoni! Kadi Zebulu si nyachiwiriache tayu. Apo ninji ife tikumtumikira? Verani kholo wanu Hamori phata ya mbumbanuyi!" 
Judges9:29 Mtongi wa anthu enewa mbidakhala ine, Abimeleki mbidamkhutcha mano basi. Ine mbidalonga kuna Abimeleki kuti, ‘Buluka na anyankhondo ako onsene mbatichite nkhondo!’ ”" 
Judges9:30 Zebulu, mtongi wa mzinda ule adazhangali pidava iye Gaala akulonga pinthu ninga penepi." 
Judges9:31 Iye adatumiza mphangwa kuna Abimeleki ku Aruma kalonga kuti, “Gaala mwana Ebedi pabodzi pene na abale ache adza ku Shekemu, tenepo iwo nkhabe kukutawirisa kupita mumzindamo tayu." 
Judges9:32 Tenepo iwe na amuna ana iwe mwathema kwenda na mosiku kaabisalira m'minda. 
Judges9:33 Mangwana na machibese pakubuluka dzuwa mulamuke mbamukasose mzindawo mwakututumusa. Tenepo Gaala na amunache angabuluka dzamenyana namwe, akang'antheni pikulu pene ninga munakwanisira imwe.”" 
Judges9:34 Tenepo Abimeleki na amunache onsene adenda na mosiku mbakaabisalira m'magulu manayi kunja kwa Shekemu. 
Judges9:35 Pidaona Abimeleki na amunache kuti Gaala na amunachembo akubuluka kunja mbaimira pamsuwo wa mzindawo, adalamuka m'mbuto zikhabisala iwo zile." 
Judges9:36 Gaala adaaona mbalonga kuna Zebulu mbati, “Ngayang'anani amuna akutchitha pansonga ya phiri!” Zebulu adatawira mbati, “Enewo si anthu tayu mphithunzi-thunzi pyawo kwene paphiri.”" 
Judges9:37 Gaala adalonga pontho mbati, “Ngayang'anani mbamuna akutchitha pamsana wa phiri, pontho gulu ibodzi ikhadza na njira yokhokha kubulukira kumuti wamthundu wa anyakuombedza!”" 
Judges9:38 Tenepo Zebulu adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Apo kupithanda kwako konsene kule kuli kupi? Ndiwe ene ukhavunza thangwi inatumikira ife munthu weneyu Abimeleki. Enewo mbamuna akhalulupisa iwe ale. Apo, ndoko chinchino ukamenyane nawo.”" 
Judges9:39 Gaala adatsogolera amuna a ku Shekemu kamenyana na Abimeleki. 
Judges9:40 Abimeleki adathamangisa Gaala, tenepo iye adathawa. Amuna azinji adakuwazwa, podi na ale akhali pamsuwo wa mzinda ene." 
Judges9:41 Abimeleki adakhala ku Aruma, tenepo Zebulu adathamangisa Gaala na abale ache ene kubuluka mu Shekemu, towera aleke khalave mwenemo." 
Judges9:42 Mangwana mwache Abimeleki adapidziwa kuti anthu a mu Shekemu akhasasanya pyakwenda kuminda. 
Judges9:43 Natenepo iye adakwata amunache mbaagawa m'magulu matatu mbaabisalira m'minda. Pidaona iye anthu akubuluka mumzinda mule, adavumbuka mukhabisala iwo mule mbaasosa." 
Judges9:44 Pikhachimbiza Abimeleki na gulu yache kwenda kalondali pamsuwo wa mzinda ule, magulu anango awiri ale adasosa anthu mumzinda mule mbaapha onsene." 
Judges9:45 Kumenyana kudakwata nsiku yonsene, tenepo Abimeleki adapokosera mzinda ule mbapha anthu a mwenemo. Iye adagwisa mzindawo mbawaza munyu ponsene pene mwenemo." 
Judges9:46 Pidava akadamu onsene akukhala munsanja mu Shekemu penepi, adapita m'subi yakutchinjirizwa ya nyumba yakupembedzera ya Eli-Beriti." 
Judges9:47 Abimeleki adapangwa kuti iwo akhagumanyikana kweneko," 
Judges9:48 natenepo iye adakwira phiri ya Zalimoni na amunache. Tenepo iye adakwata mbadzo mbagwanda matsamvu a muti mbaathukula paphewa pache. Iye adapanga amunache kuti achimbize kachita chibodzi-bodzi. 
Judges9:49 Natenepo mamuna onsene adatema matsamvu mbatewera Abimeleki, tenepo adamuluka matsamvu ale pasubi yakutchinjirizwa ile. Iwo adagasa moto mbapisa anthu onsene m'bwalo mule. Anthu onsene pansanja ya Shekemu adafa; amuna na akazi akukwana ninga chikwi chibodzi." 
Judges9:50 Kubuluka penepo Abimeleki adenda ku Tebezi mbazungulira mzindawo, tenepo iwo adaupokosera." 
Judges9:51 Kweneko kukhali nsanja yamphamvu, tenepo amuna, akazi na akadamu ene adathawira mwenemo. Iwo adapifungira mwenemo mbaenda kakhala pansoyi." 
Judges9:52 Abimeleki adadza kusosa nsanja ile. Pidenda iye kumsuwo kuipisa," 
Judges9:53 mkazi unango adaponya libwe mbimgwera mumsolo mwache mbiswa chibade cha msolo wache. 
Judges9:54 Penepo pene iye adachemera mphale akhaphatira pida pyache ule mbampanga mbati, “Kwata talasadako undiphe, towera iwo aleke longa kuti mkazi ndiye andipha.” Tenepo mphale ule adamulasa mbafa." 
Judges9:55 Pidava Aisraele kuti Abimeleki afa, adabwerera m'misa mwawo." 
Judges9:56 Na njira yeneyi Mulungu adabwezera Abimeleki upandu udachita iye kuna babache pakupha abale ache makumanomwe ale.
