Judges9:57 Mulungu adachitisambo anthu a mu Shekemu kubonera thangwi ya kudawika kwawo ninga mudalongera Yotamu, mwana Gideoni, kuti pinaachitikira ndzidzi udaatemberera iye." 
Judges10:1 Pidafa Abimeleki, Tola mwana Pua, pontho chidzukulu cha Dodo adadza kupulumusa Aisraele. Iye akhali wa dzinza ya Isakara mbakhala ku Shamiri m'nthemba ya mapiri ya Eferemu." 
Judges10:2 Iye adakhala mtongi wa Israele pyaka makumawiri na pitatu. Tenepo iye adafa mbaikhwa m'masiye a ku Shamiri. 
Judges10:3 Pidafa Tola padadza Yairi wa ku Gileadi. Iye adakhala mtongi wa Israele pyaka makumawiri na piwiri. 
Judges10:4 Iye akhali na ana achimuna makumatatu ale akhapakira mabulu makumatatumbo. Iwo akhatonga mizinda makumatatu m'nthemba ya Gileadi, ile ikuthimiza kuchemerwa midzi ya Yairi." 
Judges10:5 Tenepo iye adafa mbaikhwa m'masiye a ku Kamoni. 
Judges10:6 Pidachitika pontho kuti Aisraele adachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA pakupembedza milungu Baala na Asitarite, pontho na milungu ya Aaramu, Asidoni, Amoabu, Aamoni na ya Afilisti. Iwo adakhonda MBUYA mbaleka kumpembedza." 
Judges10:7 Natenepo MBUYA adazhangalira Aisraele mbachitisa Afilisti na Aamoni kuakunda. 
Judges10:8 Pyaka khumi na pisere iwo adaboneresa na kupondereza Aisraele onsene akhakhala m'dziko ya Aamori kumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani m'nthemba ya Gileadi ale. 
Judges10:9 Aamoni adawambuka mkulo wa Yorodani kamenya nkhondo na madzinza a Yuda, Benjemani na Eferemu. Israele akhali panyatwa ikulu." 
Judges10:10 Penepo Israele adalira kuna MBUYA mbati, “Ife takudawirani pakukukhondani, imwe MBUYA Mulungu wathu, mbatipembedza Baala.”" 
Judges10:11 MBUYA adatawira mbati, “Aiguputo, Aamori, Aamoni, Afilisti," 
Judges10:12 Asidoni, Aamaleki na Amaoni adakuponderezani m'nduli mule imwe mbamulira kuna ine. Ayi ine sidakupulumusani tayu m'manja mwawo." 
Judges10:13 Kwache imwe mudathimiza basi kundikhonda mbamupembedza milungu inango. Tenepo ine nkhabe dzakupulumusanive tayu. 
Judges10:14 Ndokoni mukalirire milungu yasankhula imweyo. Ilekeni ikupulumuseni mungakhala panyatwa.” 
Judges10:15 Mbwenye Aisraele adalonga kuna MBUYA mbati, “Ife tadawa, tenepo chitani pyonsene pinafuna imwe, kwache taphata miyendo tipulumuseni lero ene pano.”" 
Judges10:16 Penepo iwo adataya milungu yachilendo ile mbapembedza MBUYA; tenepo iye adava nsisi thangwi ya nyatwa zawo. 
Judges10:17 Anyankhondo a ku Amoni adasasanyika kumenya nkhondo mbamanga msasa m'nthemba ya Gileadi. Aisraele adadza pabodzi mbamanga msasa pa Mizipa mu Gileadi monthomo. 
Judges10:18 Penepo anthu na akadamu a madzinza a Aisraele adavunzana unango na mwanzache mbati, “Mbani anafuna kutsogolera kamenya nkhondo na Aamoni? Munthu anapiperekayo anakhala mkadamu wa anthu onsene a m'nthemba ya Gileadi.”" 
Judges11:1 Yefita nyankhondo wakuwanga mtima wakubulukira ku Gileadi akhali mwana puta. Babache, ule dzinache ndi Gileadi," 
Judges11:2 akhali na ana anango achimuna adabala iye na mkazache, tenepo pidakula iwo adakhakhamiza Yefita kubuluka pamsuwopo. Iwo adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Iwe nkhabe dzakwata khundu tayu pamfuma inafuna dzatisiyira babathu, thangwi iwe ndiwe mwana wa bere inango.”" 
Judges11:3 Yefita adathawa kubuluka kuna abale ache mbakakhala m'dziko ya Tobu. Kweneko iye adagumanyisa gulu ya malova tenepo iwo adamtewera. 
Judges11:4 M'nduli mwache Aamoni adenda kamenya nkhondo na Aisraele. 
Judges11:5 Pidachitika penepi akadamu a ku Gileadi adenda kakwata Yefita ku Tobu. 
Judges11:6 Iwo adalonga mbati, “Idza utitsogolere towera tikwanise kumenyana na Aamoni.”" 
Judges11:7 Mbwenye Yefita adatawira mbati, “Imwe mudandizonda pikulu pene mwakuti mudandikhakhamiza kubuluka m'nyumba mwa babanga. Mphapo mwatani munadza kuna ine? Ayi ndi thangwi yakuti lero muli pa nyatwa?”" 
Judges11:8 Iwo adalonga kuna Yefita mbati, “Ife tikudza kuna iwe chinchino thangwi tinafuna kuti uende nafe kamenyana na Aamoni mbukhala mkadamu wa anthu onsene a ku Gileadi.”" 
Judges11:9 Penepo Yefita adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ngakhala munandibwezera kwathu, pontho MBUYA mbandichitisa kukunda Aamoni ndinati ndikhale mkadamu wanu.”" 
Judges11:10 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Ande, tatawirizana napyo. MBUYA ndi mboni yathu.”" 
Judges11:11 Natenepo Yefita adenda na akadamu a ku Gileadi, tenepo anthu adamuikha kukhala mtongi pontho mkadamu. Yefita adalonga pontho mafalache onsene ale pamaso pa MBUYA pa Mizipa." 
Judges11:12 Kubuluka penepo Yefita adatuma anyamphangwa kuna mfumu wa ku Amoni kulonga mbati, “Chakusosani ife ninji? Thangwi yache ninji imwe mwazungulira dziko yathu kufuna kumenyana nafe?”" 
Judges11:13 Mfumu wa Aamoni adatawira anyamphangwa a Yefita mbati, “Pidabuluka Aisraele m'dziko ya Iguputo, adakwata dziko yanga kubulukira kumkulo wa Arinoni mpakana ku Mkulo wa Yaboki na Yorodani. Tenepo imwe chinchino mwathema kuibwezera mwamtendere.”" 
Judges11:14 Yefita adatuma pontho anyamphangwa ale kuna mfumu wa ku Amoni 
Judges11:15 na kutawira kwakuti: “Si pyakuona tayu kuti Aisraele adakwata dziko ya Moabu penu dziko ya Amoni. 
Judges11:16 Pidachitika mphipi: ndzidzi udabuluka Aisraele m'dziko ya Iguputo, iwo adagwanda na m'thando yatchetcha kwenda ku Nyanza Yakufira mbafika ku Kadeshi." 
Judges11:17 Penepo iwo adatuma anyamphangwa kuna mfumu wa ku Edomu kumpempha kuti aatawirise kugwanda na m'dziko mwache, mbwenye iye hadaatawirise tayu. Iwo adapempha pontho mfumu wa ku Moabu, mbwenye mfumu wa ku Moabu hadaatawirise tayu kugwanda na m'dziko mwachemo. Natenepo Aisraele adakhala pa Kadeshi." 
Judges11:18 Kubuluka penepo iwo adenda na m'thando yatchetcha kuzungulira dziko ya Edomu na ya Moabu mbafika kumabulukiro dzuwa a dziko ya Moabu, kukhundu inango ya mkulo wa Arinoni. Iwo adamanga msasa penepo, kwache iwo hadawambuke mkulo wa Arinoni tayu, thangwi udachita madire na Moabu." 
Judges11:19 Tenepo Aisraele adatuma anyamphangwa kuna Sihoni mfumu wa Aamori wa ku Heshiboni kumpempha kuti aatawirise kugwanda na m'dziko mwache kwenda kudziko yawo ene. 
Judges11:20 Kwache Sihoni hadaatawirise tayu. M'mbuto mwache iye adagumanyisa anyankhondo ache onsene mbamanga msasa pa Yahazi mbamenyana na Aisraele. 
Judges11:21 Kwache MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele adachitisa Aisraele kukunda Sihoni na anyankhondo ache. Natenepo Aisraele adakwata nthemba yonsene ya Aamori, akhala mwenemo ale, kukhala yawo ene." 
Judges11:22 Iwo adapokosera nthemba yonsene ya Aamori kubulukira kumkulo wa Arinoni kumwera mpakana kumkulo wa Yaboki kumpoto, pontho kubulukira kuthando yatchetcha kumabulukiro dzuwa mpakana kumkulo wa Yorodani kumadokero dzuwa." 
Judges11:23 Tenepo MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele ndiye adathamangisa Aamori pamaso pa anthu ache Aisraele. Una mphamvu zanji iwe zakukwata nazo pontho dzikoyi. 
Judges11:24 Iwe unakwanisa kukoya chinthu chonsene chakupasa Kemoshi, milungu yako. Kwache ife tinakoya pyonsene pyatipasa MBUYA Mulungu wathu." 
Judges11:25 Ayi iwe ukupinyerezera kuti ndiwe wakufunika pyakwanga kupiringana Balaki mwana Zipora mfumu wa Moabu? Ayi iye adathimbana na Aisraele na pang'ono pene, penu kuchita nawo nkhondo?" 
Judges11:26 Pyaka madzana matatu Aisraele akhakhala mu Heshiboni na Aroeri na maluwani akuazungulira, pontho na mizinda yonsene m'khundu-khundu mwa mkulo wa Arinoni. Apo ndzidzi onsenewu iwe udatani kukwata mizindako?" 
Judges11:27 Nkhabe, ine sidakudawire tayu. Iwe ukudawa pakuchita nkhondo na ine. MBUYA, Mtongi ule, anati apitonge lero pakati pa Aisraele na Aamoni.”" 
Judges11:28 Kwache mfumu wa ku Amoni hadaikhe konta mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Yefita zile tayu. 
Judges11:29 Tenepo Mzimu wa MBUYA adagudumira Yefita. Iye adenda nthemba zonsene za Gileadi na Manase mbabwerera ku Mizipa m'nthemba ya Gileadi mbathimiza kwenda ku Amoni. 
Judges11:30 Yefita adadumbira kuna MBUYA mbati, “Ngakhala munandichitisa kukunda Aamoni," 
Judges11:31 ndinati ndipereke nsembe zakupyerera munthu wakutoma kubuluka pa msuwo wa nyumbanga dzagumanikana nane ndzidzi unabulukira ine ku nkhondo. Ine ndinampereka nsembe munthuyo kuna imwe.” 
Judges11:32 Natenepo Yefita adawambuka mkulo kamenya nkhondo na Aamoni, tenepo MBUYA adamchitisa kukunda." 
Judges11:33 Iye adaamenya kubulukira ku Aroeri kwenda ku Miniti, kupokosera mizinda makumawiri pabodzi pene mpakana ku Abele Keramimi. Kukhali kucheka kukulu, tenepo Aamoni adakundwa na Aisraele." 
Judges11:34 Pidabwerera Yefita kumusa kwache ku Mizipa, mwanache wamkazi adabuluka m'nyumba mwache kagumanikana naye, uku akuvina na kuimba chisekese. Weneyu akhali mwanache yekha ene basi." 
Judges11:35 Pidamuona Yefita adang'amba nguwo zache na kutsukwala mbalonga mbati, “Waa, mwananga. Iwe wanditsukwalisa pikulu! Pyakhala tani kuti undivese kupha? Ine ndadumbira kuna MBUYA, natenepo ine ndathema kuchita pidadumbira ine pile!”" 
Judges11:36 Mwanache ule adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ngakhala imwe mudadumbira kuna MBUYA chitani kuna ine pidadumbira imwepyo thangwi MBUYA akuchitisani kukunda anyamalwanu, Aamoni.”" 
Judges11:37 Kwache iye adapempha babache mbati, “Ndichitirenimbo chinthu chibodzi ichi. Ndilekeni miyezi miwiri, towera ndikwanise kwenda na anzanga kafamba kumapiri mbandikasintili kuti ndathema kufa okhonda sembwa pontho wakusowa ana.”" 
Judges11:38 Iye adampanga kuti aende pyache miyezi miwiri. Iye na ashamwali ache adenda kumapiri mbakasintili, thangwi akhadikhira kufa okhonda sembwa pontho wakusowa ana." 
Judges11:39 Pidagwanda miyezi miwiri iye adabwerera kuna babache, tenepo babache adachita pidadumbira iye kuna MBUYA, natenepo iye adafa mbali mwali okhonda dziwa mamuna. Wenewu udasanduka mtemo wa Aisraele" 
Judges11:40 wakuti atsikana akhaenda kunja nsiku zinayi chaka na chaka kusintili mwana wamkazi wa Yefita wa ku Gileadi. 
Judges12:1 Amuna a ku Eferemu adasasanyikira pya nkhondo, iwo adawambuka mkulo wa Yorodani kwenda ku Zafoni mbalonga kuna Yefita mbati, “Thangwi yache njanji iwe wawambuka madire dzamenya nkhondo na Aamoni okhonda kutichemerambo kuti tiende nawe pabodzi pene? Tinati tikupisire m'nyumba mwako.”" 
Judges12:2 Mbwenye Yefita adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ine na anthu anga tidapokanyisana pikulu pene na Aamoni. Ine ndidakuchemerani kwache imwe nee mudandipulumusa m'manja mwawo tayu." 
Judges12:3 Pidaona ine kuti imwe nkhabe funa pyakundiphedza, ndidapereka moyo wanga kufa mbandiwambuka madire kumenyana na Aamoni. Tenepo MBUYA adandichitisa kuakunda. Apo thangwi yache ninji munadza dzamenyana na ine pano?”" 
Judges12:4 Penepo Yefita adagumanyisa pabodzi amuna onsene a mu Gileadi kumenyana na amuna a ku Eferemu mbaakunda. Anthu a ku Gileadi adamenya anthu a ku Eferemu, thangwi iwo akhadalonga mbati, “Imwe Agileadi, ale mukhakhala pakati pa Eferemu na Manase, ndimwe anyakupanduka kuna Eferemu.”" 
Judges12:5 Agileadi adatchinga mbuto zakuwambukirapo mkulo wa Yorodani, towera Aeferemu aleke kwanisa kuthawa. Munthu onsene wa Eferemu angayesera kuthawa, akhapempha kuti atawiriswe kuwambuka, penepo amuna a ku Gileadi akhamvunza mbati, “Ayi iwe ndiwe wa Eferemu?” Ngakhala iye akhalonga kuti, “Tayu,”" 
Judges12:6 iwo akhampanga kuti athule fala yakuti “Shiboleti.” Kwache iye akhaithula “Siboleti,” thangwi iye nee mbadakwanisa kuithula mwadidi mwache tayu. Penepo iwo akhamphata munthuyo mbampha pambuto ibodzi ya mbuto zakuwambukirapo zile. Ndzidzi wenewo anthu pikwi makumanayi na piwiri a ku Eferemu adaphiwa." 
Judges12:7 Yefita adatonga Israele pyaka pitanthatu. Iye adafa mbaikhwa m'masiye kuluwani ya kwawo mu Gileadi. 
Judges12:8 Pidafa Yefita, Ibizani wa ku Betelehemu adatonga Israele." 
Judges12:9 Iye akhali na ana achimuna makumatatu pontho na ana achikazi makumatatu. Iye adasembesa anache achikazi kuna mbumba inango mbasembera anache achimuna atsikana makumatatu akubulukira kumbumba inango. Ibizani adatonga Israele pyaka pinomwe. 
Judges12:10 Tenepo iye adafa mbaikhwa m'masiye ku Betelehemu. 
Judges12:11 Pidafa Ibizani, Eloni wa ku Zebuloni adatonga Israele pyaka khumi." 
Judges12:12 Tenepo iye adafa mbaikhwa m'masiye ku Aialoni nthemba ya Zebuloni. 
Judges12:13 Pidafa Eloni, Abidoni mwana wamamuna wa Hilele wa ku Piratoni adatonga Israele." 
Judges12:14 Iye akhali na ana achimuna makumanayi na pidzukulu pyachimuna makumatatu, ale akhali anyakupakira mabulu makumanomwe. Abidoni adatonga Israele pyaka pisere." 
Judges12:15 Tenepo iye adafa mbaikhwa m'masiye ku Piratoni m'nthemba ya Eferemu m'nthemba ya mapiri ya Aamaleki. 
Judges13:1 Aisraele adachita pontho pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA, tenepo MBUYA adachitisa Afilisti kuatonga pyaka makumanayi." 
Judges13:2 Pandzidzi wenewo pakhali munthu unango dzinache Manoa wa kuluwani ya Zora. Iye akhali wa dzinza ya Dani. Mkazache akhali wakuuma nthumbo. 
Judges13:3 Mngelo wa MBUYA adaonekera kuna iye mbalonga mbati, “Iwe ndiwe wakuuma nthumbo, mbwenye chinchino unati ukwate mimba mbubala mwana wamamuna." 
Judges13:4 Chita mphole-mphole kuti uleke kumwa vinyu penu pyakuledzeresa pinango, penu kudya pyakudya pyokhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Judges13:5 Mwanayo angabalwa leka dzachinga tsisi yache, thangwi kubulukira nsiku inabalwa iye athema dzakhala Mnaziri wakupambulika kuna Mulungu. Iye anatoma basa yakupulumusa Aisraele kuna Afilisti.”" 
Judges13:6 Tenepo mkazi ule adenda mbakapipangambo mamunache mbati, “Munthu wa Mulungu adadza kuna ine, iye akhaoneka wakugoswa pyakwanga ninga mngelo wa Mulungu. Ine sidamvunze tayu kudabulukira iye, pontho iye hadandipange tayu dzinache." 
Judges13:7 Mbwenye iye andipanga kuti ndinakwata mimba mbandibala mwana wamamuna. Iye andikhondesa kumwa vinyu penu pyakuledzeresa pinango; penu kudya pyakudya pyakukhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu, thangwi mwanayo anakhala Mnaziri wakupambulika kuna Mulungu kubulukira nsiku ya kubalwa kwache.”" 
Judges13:8 Penepo Manoa adapemphera kuna MBUYA mbati, “Ndaphata miyendo MBUYA, tawirisani munthu wa Mulungu adatuma imwe ule, kudza pontho kuna ife dzatipanga pyathema ife kupichita na mwanayo angabalwa.”" 
Judges13:9 Mulungu adachita pidampempha Manoa pile tenepo mngelo wache ule adadza pontho kuna mkazache ule mwenemo iye mbali kumunda. Mamunache Manoa hakhali naye pabodzi kweneko tayu," 
Judges13:10 tenepo iye adathamanga kabodzi kene mbakalonga kuna mamunacheyo mbati, “Ngayang'ana munthu adadza kuna ine pakutoma ule aonekera pontho kuna ine.”" 
Judges13:11 Manoa adalamuka mbatewera mkazache ule. Iye adenda kuna munthu ule mbakamvunza mbati, “Ayi munthu wache ndiwe akhalonga kuna mkazanga ule?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ande, ndine pano.”" 
Judges13:12 Tenepo Manoa adavunza mbati, “Pyalonga imwepi pingakwana-kwana, apo mphaleyu athema dzachitanji? Apo moyo unafuna iye dzakhala nawo wathema dzakhala wakutani?”" 
Judges13:13 Mngelo wa MBUYA ule adatawira mbati, “Mkazi athema kuchita pyonsene pyampanga ine." 
Judges13:14 Iye aleke kudya pyonsene pyakubulukira mfesa; aleke kumwa vinyu penu pyakuledzeresa pinango; penu kudya pyakudya pyokhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu. Iye athema kuchita pyonsene pyampanga inepi.” 
Judges13:15 Manoa hadapidziwe tayu kuti munthu ule akhali mngelo wa MBUYA, tenepo iye adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ndaphata miyendo lekani kwendaletu. Tawirisani kuti ndikuphereni mwanambuzi.” Mbwenye mngelo adatawira mbati, podi ndileke kwenda ine sinadya tayu basi pyakudya pyakopyo. Mbwenye ngakhala unapifuna sasanya pyakudyapyo mbupipereke kuna MBUYA ninga nsembe yakupyerera." 
Judges13:16  
Judges13:17 Tenepo Manoa adatawira mbati, “Ngatipangeni dzinanu, towera tikulemedzeni pyalonga imwepi pingakwana-kwana.”" 
Judges13:18 Mngelo ule adavunza mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji munafuna kudziwa dzinanga? Dzinanga ndi dzina yakudodomesa.”" 
Judges13:19 Tenepo Manoa adakwata mwanambuzi na mapira pang'ono mbapipereka nsembe paguwa yamwala kuna MBUYA ule ambachita pyakudodomesa. 
Judges13:20 Pikhayerima malulume a moto kwenda kudzulu kubulukira pa guwa pale, Manoa na mkazache adaona mngelo ule akwenda kudzulu na m'malulume a moto ale. Penepo Manoa adadzindikira kuti munthu ule akhali mngelo wa MBUYA, tenepo iye na mkazache adagwa na fufumimba. Iwo hadamuoneve pontho mngelo ule tayu." 
Judges13:21  
Judges13:22 Manoa adalonga kuna mkazache mbati, “Ife tinati tife thangwi taona Mulungu!”" 
Judges13:23 Mbwenye mkazache adatawira mbati, “MBUYA mbadafuna pyakutipha, iye nee mbadatambira nsembe yathu tayu; iye nee mbadationesa pinthu pyonsenepi penu kutipanga pinthu ninga penepi chinchino pano tayu.”" 
Judges13:24 Mkazi ule adabala mwana wamamuna mbamthula Samisoni. Mwana ule adakula pontho MBUYA adamtsanzayisa. 
Judges13:25 Tenepo Mzimu wa MBUYA adatoma kumpasa mphamvu pikhali iye pamsasa wa Dani pakati pa Zora na Eshitaoli. 
Judges14:1 Nsiku inango Samisoni adatchithira ku Timina mbaonako mtsikana unango wa Chifilisti. 
Judges14:2 Iye adabwerera kwawo kapanga babache na mache mbati, “Ku Timina ndaonako mkazi wa Chifilisti; chinchino kandikwatireni ndinamfuna ndimsembe.”" 
Judges14:3 Kwache babache na mache adamvunza mbati, “Thangwi yache njanji unachita kwenda kuna Afilisti, anthu okhonda dziwa Mulunguwa, kuti ukasembe mkazi. Ayi iwe nkhabe kwanisa kusaka mkazi m'mbumba mwathu montho muno, penu pakati pa anthu athu onsenewa?” Mbwenye Samisoni adalonga kuna babache mbati, “Weneyo ngweneyo ene basi anafuna ine kuti mukandikwatire, thangwi ndakomerwa naye.”" 
Judges14:4 Makolo ache hakhapidziwa tayu kuti MBUYA ndiye akhatsogolera Samisoni kuchita tenepo, thangwi MBUYA akhasaka danga yakumenya nkhondo na Afilisti. Pandzidzi wenewo Afilisti akhatonga Israele." 
Judges14:5 Tenepo Samisoni adatchithira ku Timina pabodzi pene na babache pontho mache. Pikhagwanda iwo na m'minda yamfesa, iye adava nkhalamu ing'ono ikubangula." 
Judges14:6 Kabodzi na kabodzi Mzimu wa MBUYA adagudumira Samisoni mbampasa mphamvu mwakuti iye adakhwadzula nkhalamu na manjache basi khala ninga nkhalamu ile ikhali mwanambuzi. Kwache iye hadapange makolo ache pikhadachita iye pile tayu. 
Judges14:7 Tenepo iye adenda mbakalonga na mtsikana mbakomerwa naye. 
Judges14:8 Pidagwanda nsiku pang'ono Samisoni adenda kasemba mtsikana ule. Pikhaenda iye adabauka kuti akaone nkhalamu idapha iye ile, tenepo iye adadodoma pyakwanga kugumana nyuchi na uchi ache ene uli m'bwalo mwa nkhalamu yakufa ile." 
Judges14:9 Iye adakhophola uchi ule mbaenda mbadya na njira. Tenepo iye adenda kuna babache na mache mbaapasambo pang'ono. Iwo adadya kwache Samisoni hadaapange tayu kuti iye akhadakwata uchi ule muna nkhalamu yakufa tayu. 
Judges14:10 Babache adenda kumusa kwa mtsikana ule, tenepo Samisoni adachita phwando kweneko. Wenewu ukhali mtemo wache pakati pa aphale." 
Judges14:11 Pidamuona Afilisti adatuma aphale makumatatu kuti akakhale naye. 
Judges14:12 Samisoni adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ndikuvunzeni nthanthi. Ngakhala imwe munaipha nthanthi yeneyi nsiku zinomwe za phwando zidzati mala, ndinati ndikupaseni pyakufinika makumatatu pyakuchena na nguwo makumatatu." 
Judges14:13 Mbwenye imwe mungakhonda kuipha nthanthi yeneyi, munati mundipase pyakufinika makumatatu pyakuchena na nguwo makumatatu.” Iwo adalonga mbati, “Ngatipange nthanthi yakoyi tiive.”" 
Judges14:14 Iye adalonga mbati, “Kubulukira muna nyakudya mudabuluka chakudyiwa. Kubulukira muna chinthu champhamvu mudabuluka chinthu chakutapira.” Pidagwanda nsiku zitatu akhayesa-yesa basi kufuna kupha nthanthi ule." 
Judges14:15 Pansiku yachinayi iwo adalonga kuna mkazache Samisoni mbati, “Nyengerera mamunako atipange kuti nthanthi yeneyi ikulonganji. Ngakhala hunatipanga tayu ife tinaenda kapisa moto nyumba ya babako mbatikupisira pabodzi pene na iwepo mwenemo. Ayi imwe uwirianu mudatichemera kuno kuti mutibere pinthu pyathu?”" 
Judges14:16 Tenepo mkazi ule adenda kuna Samisoni mamunache na kulira mbalonga mbati, “Iwe hunandifuna tayu, kunachita iweku nkhundizonda. Iwe wapanga anthu anga nthanthi mbukhonda kundipanga kuti nthanthiyi ikulonganji.” Iye adalonga mbati, “Yang'ana, podi baba na mama ene sidaapange tayu. Apo thangwi yache njanji kuti ndipange iwepo?”" 
Judges14:17 Iye adalira nsiku zonsene mpakana kumala kwa nsiku zinomwe za phwando zile. Mbwenye pakumalisira pache pansiku yachinomwe iye adampanga kuti nthanthi ile ikhalonganji, thangwi iye adamnyangula pyakwanga thangwi ya nthanthi ile. Tenepo iye adenda kapanga Afilisti." 
Judges14:18 Pansiku yachinomwe dzuwa mbidzati thobila amuna a mumzinda mule adalonga kuna Samisoni mbati, “Ninji chakutapira pyakwanga kupiringana uchi? Ninji champhamvu pyakwanga kupiringana nkhalamu?” Samisoni adatawira mbati, “Imwe mbamudakhonda phatisa basa ng'ombe yanga kutipula nayo, imwe nee mbamudakwanisa kuipha nthanthiyi tayu.”" 
Judges14:19 Mzimu wa MBUYA adamgudumira mbampasa mphamvu, tenepo iye adatchithira ku Ashikeloni, kule kudapha iye amuna makumatatu, iye adaadula mbakapereka nguwo zawo zadidi zile kuna amuna ale akhadapha nthanthi ile. Kubuluka penepo iye adabwerera kwawo na kuzhangali pyakwanga thangwi ya pikhadachitika pile." 
Judges14:20 Tenepo mkazache akhadaperekwa kuna nyakukhala m'khundu mwache pansiku ya kukazhali kwache ile. 
Judges15:1 Pidagwanda ndzidzi pang'ono Samisoni adenda kachezera mkazache ndzidzi wakuvuna tirigu mbaenda kampasa mwanambuzi. Iye adalonga kuna babache mkazi ule mbati, “Ndikwenda kusubi kwa mkazanga.” Kwache babache mkazi ule hadamtawirise tayu kupitamo." 
Judges15:2 Iye adalonga kuna Samisoni mbati, “Ine ndikhanyerezera kuti hunamfunave tayu, tenepo ndidampasa shamwaliako. Kwache mng'onoache ngwakubalika pyakwanga, tenepo iwe unakwanisa kukwata weneyo m'mbuto mwache.”" 
Judges15:3 Samisoni adalonga mbati, “Ndzidzi uno ine nkhabe pinthu na pinafuna ine chitira Afilisti; ine ndinati ndiakuwaze pyakwanga.”" 
Judges15:4 Natenepo iye adenda kaphata mibinzi madzana matatu mbaimangirira michira miwiri pabodzi pene, pontho mbafekereza nsakali m'mifundomo." 
Judges15:5 Kubuluka penepo iye adagasa moto kunsakalizo mbaleka mibinziyo, tenepo iyo idenda kuminda ya mapira ya Afilisti. Na njira yeneyi iye hadapise mapira okha akhadavunwa kale ale tayu, mbwenye pontho na mapira ene akhadasalira m'minda ale, pontho na minda yamfesa na yaolivi ene." 
Judges15:6 Pidavunza Afilisti kuti mbani akhadachita penepi, iwo adapidziwa kuti Samisoni ndiye adapichita, thangwi tebzalache wa ku Timina akhadapereka mkazi Samisoni kuna shamwaliache. Natenepo Afilisti adenda kapha mkazache na babache ene pakuapisa moto." 
Judges15:7 Samisoni adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Podi imwe mwachita tenepa, ndinadumbira kuti ine nkhabe puma tayu mpakana ndabwezera pyachita imwe!”" 
Judges15:8 Iye adaasosa mwakugoswa mbapha azinji a iwo. Tenepo iye adenda kakhala m'nkhwimba m'Phanzwi ya Etamu. 
Judges15:9 Afilisti adadza mbamanga msasa mu Yuda mbasosa luwani ya Lehi. 
Judges15:10 Amuna a ku Yuda adaavunza mbati, “Mwatani munatisosa?” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Ife tadza dzakwata Samisoni kuti akhale nyaperezo mbatimchitirambo pyakuthemerana na pidatichita iye pile.”" 
Judges15:11 Tenepo amuna pikwi matatu a ku Yuda adenda kunkhwimba m'Phanzwi ya Etamu mbalonga kuna Samisoni mbati, “Kadi iwe nkhabe kupidziwa tayu kuti Afilisti mbatongi athu. Ninji pyachita iwe kuna ifepi?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ine ndachita kuna iwo pinthu pyakuthemerana na pidandichitira iwombo.”" 
Judges15:12 Iwo adalonga mbati, “Ife tadza kuno dzakumanga towera tikupereke m'manja mwawo.” Samisoni adalonga mbati, “Dumbirani kuti imwe ene nee munandipha tayu.”" 
Judges15:13 Iwo adalonga mbati, “Tatawira. Ife sinakupha tayu. Tinakumanga kwene basi mbatikakupereka m'manja mwawo.” Tenepo iwo adammanga na nkhambala zitswa ziwiri mbabuluka naye m'nkhwimba mule." 
Judges15:14 Pidafika Samisoni ku Lehi, Afilisti adadza kuna iye na kuthamanga pontho na kukhuwa. Mzimu wa MBUYA adamgudumira mbampasa mphamvu, tenepo iye adathumula nkhambala zikhali m'mikono na m'manja mwache mule khala ninga usalu wakupiswa moto." 
Judges15:15 Tenepo iye adaona gogodo ya nsabwada za bulu ule akhadafa kwene chinchino. Iye adakotama mbalokota gogodo ile mbapha nayo amuna chikwi chibodzi. 
Judges15:16 Natenepo Samisoni adaimba nyimbo mbati, “Na gogodo ya nsabwada za bulu, ine ndidapha nayo amuna chikwi. Na gogodo ya nsabwada za bulu, ine ndidaamuluka m'milu.”" 
Judges15:17 Kubuluka penepo iye adataya pyache gogodo ile. Pambuto pakhadachitika penepi padathulwa Ramati-Lehi. 
Judges15:18 Kubuluka penepo Samisoni adava nyota pyakwanga, tenepo iye adachemera MBUYA mbati, “Imwe mwandichitisa kukunda, apo chinchino ndinati ndife na nyota pontho kuphatwa na Afilisti, anthu okhonda dziwa Mulungu ale.”" 
Judges15:19 Tenepo MBUYA adabaula benga kweneko ku Lehi madzi mbabuluka mwenemo. Samisoni adamwa mbatoma kuva pontho mwadidi. Tenepo mphuno ya madziyo idathulwa Hakore, na lero ilipo ku Lehi." 
Judges15:20 Samisoni akhali mtongi wa Israele pyaka makumawiri, ndzidzi ukhali dzikoyo m'manja mwa Afilisti." 
Judges16:1 Nsiku inango Samisoni adenda ku Gaza mzinda wa Afilisti kule kudagumana iye puta mbapita naye m'bonde. 
Judges16:2 Anthu a ku Gaza adapidziwa kuti Samisoni akhali kweneko, tenepo iwo adazungulira mbutoyo mbamdikhirira mosiku onsene pamsuwo wa mpanda wakuzungulira mzinda. Iwo adamatama mosiku onsenewo mbanyerezera okha ene mbati, “Tinati tidikhire mpakana makalakwecha, tenepo tinati timphe basi.”" 
Judges16:3 Mbwenye Samisoni adakhala kweneko mpakana chiti-chiti. Tenepo iye adalamuka mbaphata msuwo wa mpandawo, mbaukhutcha pabodzi pene na pisimbi pyakuphatisa napyo, mpiringanyo na pyonsene. Iye adapithukula paphewa pache mbaenda napyo pansonga ya phiri yakuyang'anisana na Hebroni." 
Judges16:4 Pidamala penepi Samisoni adamfuna pyakwanga mkazi unango dzinache Delila ule akhakhala paphedi ya Soreki. 
Judges16:5 Mafumu mashanu a Chifilisti adenda kuna iye mbalonga mbati, “Mnyengerere Samisoni kuti akupange ninji chinamchitisa kukhala wamphamvu pyakwanga, pontho kuti tinakwanisa tani kummala mphamvu, towera tikwanise kummanga mbakhala wakusowa mphamvu. Munthu onsene pakati pathu anakupasa kobiri za siliva madzana khumi na ibodzi.”" 
Judges16:6 Natenepo Delila adalonga kuna Samisoni mbati, “Ngandipange ninji chimbakuchitisa kukhala wamphamvu pyakwanga ninga tenepa. Ngakhala munthu unango anafuna kukumanga kuti akumalise mphamvu anachita tani?”" 
Judges16:7 Samisoni adatawira mbati, “Ngakhala ndinamangwa na nkhambala zinomwe ziwisi zile zidaume tayu, ndinati ndisanduke wakusowa mphamvu ninga munthu unango onsene.”" 
Judges16:8 Natenepo mafumu a Chifilisti adadza na nkhambala zinomwe ziwisi zile zidaume tayu kuna Delila, tenepo iye adamanga nazo Samisoni." 
Judges16:9 Iye adadza pontho na amuna anango ale akhadikhirira m'subi inango, tenepo Delila adakhuwa mbati, “Samisoni Afilisti akudza.” Mbwenye iye adathumula nkhambala zile khala ninga mumbagwandikira usalu ungapiswa moto. Tenepo iwo hadadziwe tayu basi pakhabulukira mphamvu zache." 
Judges16:10 Delila adalonga kuna Samisoni mbati, “Ngayang'ana iwe wandiphatisa fuwa ya moto mbukhonda kundipanga pyakuona. Chinchino ngandipange munakwanisira munthu kukumanga.”" 
Judges16:11 Iye adatawira mbati, “Ngakhala iwo anandimanga na nkhambala zitswa zile zidzati phatiswa basa tayu, penepo ndinati ndikhale wakusowa mphamvu ninga munthu unango onsene.”" 
Judges16:12 Tenepo Delila adakwata nkhambala zitswa mbammanga nazo. Tenepo iye adakhuwa mbati, “Samisoni, Afilisti akudza!” Amuna akhadikhirira kusubi inango. Mbwenye iye adathumula nkhambala zile ninga usalu." 
Judges16:13 Delila adalonga kuna Samisoni mbati, “Ukuthimiza basi kundiphatisa fuwa ya moto mbukhonda kundipanga pyakuona. Ngandipange munakwanisira munthu kukumanga.” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ngakhala unaluka tsisi yanga yakupotana-potana inomwe pabodzi na usalu mbuipana pamtanda wakulukirapo nguwo, penepo ndinakhala wakusowa mphamvu ninga munthu unango onsene.” Samisoni mbali m'chitulo, Delila adaluka tsisi yache yakupotana-potana inomwe pabodzi na usalu," 
Judges16:14 mbaipana, tenepo adakhuwa mbati, “Samisoni, Afilisti akudza!” Mbwenye iye adalamuka mbakweya chakupanira tsisi yache kuibulusa kumtanda wakulukirapo nguwo." 
Judges16:15 Tenepo Delila adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Penepa unalonga kuti umbandifunadi mbukhonda kuonesa kundifuna kwako? Iwe wandiphatisa fuwa ya moto katatu mbuthimiza basi kukhonda kundipanga chimbakuchitisa kukhala na mphamvu pyakwanga ninga tenepa.”" 
Judges16:16 Iye adathimiza basi kumnyangula na mafala enewa nsiku na nsiku mbamkhakhamiza mwakuti adamtopesa pyakwanga. 
Judges16:17 Pakumalisira pache adampanga pyakuona mbati, “Tsisi yangayi chipo hidachingwe tayu. Ine ndine Mnaziri wakupambulika kuna Mulungu chibalirwe changa. Ngakhala tsisi yanga inachingwa mphamvu zanga zinamala mbandikhala wakusowa mphamvu ninga unango onsene.”" 
Judges16:18 Pidadzindikira Delila kuti ndzidzi wenewu akhadampanga pyakuona adatuma mphangwa kuna mafumu a Chifilisti kuti, “Idzani pontho kabodzi basi. Iye andipanga pyakuona.” Tenepo iwo adadza na kobiri kuna iye." 
Judges16:19 Delila adamnyengerera kugona pamiyendo pache mbachemera munthu kuchinga tsisi yache yakupotana-potana inomwe. Tenepo Delila adatoma kumboneresa, penepo mphamvu zache zidamaliratu." 
Judges16:20 Tenepo Delila adakhuwa mbati, “Samisoni, Afilisti akudza!” Iye adalamuka mbanyerezera kuti anakwanisa kuchita ninga mukhachitira iye ndzidzi onsene kupisudzula yekha ene. Iye hadapidziwe tayu kuti MBUYA adamsiya yekha." 
Judges16:21 Afilisti adamphata mbamkonombola maso. Iwo adamkwata kwenda naye ku Gaza mbammanga na njema zankuwa, tenepo adamuikha kuphata basa yakupeya pa libwe." 
Judges16:22 Kwache tsisi yache idatoma pontho kumera. 
Judges16:23 Mafumu a Chifilisti adagumanyikana pabodzi kusekera pontho kupereka nsembe kuna Dagoni, milungu yawo. Iwo adaimba mbati, “Milungu yathu yatichitisa kukunda nyamalwathu Samisoni!”" 
Judges16:24 Iwo akhakomerwa mbalonga mbati, “Mchemereni Samisoni atisekese pano!” Pidambulusa iwo Samisoni m'perezo, iwo adamchitisa kukhala chakusekesa chawo mbamchitisa kuimira pakati pa mizati miwiri. Pidamuona anthu adaimba nyimbo zakukuza nazo milungu yawo mbati, “Milungu yathu yatichitisa kukunda nyamalwathu, ule akhavunga dziko yathu mbapha anthu azinji ule!”" 
Judges16:25  
Judges16:26 Samisoni adalonga kuna mphale akhamphata nsenji ule mbati, “Ngandiphatisembo mizati ya nyumbayi; ndinafuna nditsamire.”" 
Judges16:27 Panyumbapo padadzala amuna na akazi. Mafumu onsene a Chifilisti akhali penepo, pontho pakhali amuna na akazi akukwana ninga pikwi pitatu pansoyi kuyang'ana Samisoni ninga chakusekesa chawo." 
Judges16:28 Tenepo Samisoni adapemphera mbati, “MBUYA Mulungu, ndaphata miyendo ndikumbukeni. Mulungu, ndipaseni pontho mphamvu kabodzi kene basi mbamunditawirise kubwezera na shoko ibodzi ene basi Afilistiwa, thangwi ya kundikonombola maso anga mawiriwa.”" 
Judges16:29 Tenepo Samisoni adaphata pamizati miwiri yapakati yakuphatisa nyumbayo. Iye adatsamira mizati ile uku aikha mkono wache pa mzati ubodzi, mkono unangombowo pa mzati unangowo," 
Judges16:30 mbakhuwa mbati, “Mbandifere kubodzi na Afilistiwa.” Iye adagwinya na mphamvu zache zonsene tenepo nyumba ile idagwera mafumu ale na munthu unango onsene akhali penepoyo. Samisoni adapha anthu azinji pakufa pache kupiringana anthu adapha iye ndzidzi ukhali iye na moyo." 
Judges16:31 Abale ache pabodzi pene na banjache yonsene adadza dzakwata mtembo wache. Iwo adabwerera naye mbakamuikha m'masiye pakati pa Zora na Eshitaoli nthumbi ya babache Manoa. Iye akhali mtongi wa Israele pyaka makumawiri. 
Judges17:1 Pakhali munthu unango dzinache Mika, ule akhakhala m'nthemba ya mapiri a Eferemu." 
Judges17:2 Iye adalonga kuna mache mbati, “Pidaba munthu unango kobiri zasiliva chikwi na dzana ibodzi kuna imwe, imwe mudamtemberera mbavayo. Ine ndidakuvani mukulonga penepi. Apo yang'anani kobirizo ndili nazo, munthu wache adachita penepyo ndine pano.” Mache ule adalonga mbati, “MBUYA mbakutsanzayise mwananga!”" 
Judges17:3 Iye adabwezera kobiri zile kuna mache, tenepo mache ule adalonga mbati, “Kuti dzedze ileke kukugwera mwananga, ine ene mako ndikuzipambulira kobiri zasilivazi kuna MBUYA. Zinati ziphatiswe basa yakusasanyira mfanikizo wakukukutizwa na siliva. Tenepo chinchino ndinakupasa kobirizo.”" 
Judges17:4 Tenepo iye adazibweza kuna mache. Penepo mache ule adakwata kobiri zasiliva zakukwana madzana mawiri mbazipasa nyakufula siliva ule adasasanya mfanikizo kubulukira kumuti wakukukutizwa na siliva. Tenepo udaikhwa m'nyumba mwa Mika. 
Judges17:5 Mika ule akhali na mbuto yache ene yakupembedzera. Iye adasasanya mifanikizo inango pontho na efodi mbasankhula mbodzi wa anache achimuna kukhala nyansembeache. 
Judges17:6 Pandzidzi wenewo mu Israele mukhali nkhabe mfumu, munthu onsene akhachita pyache pinamkomerapyo." 
Judges17:7 Pandzidzi onthowo pakhali mphale unango wa Chilevi, ule akhakhala ku Betelehemu m'nthemba ya Yuda." 
Judges17:8 Iye adabuluka ku Betelehemu mbaenda pyache kunango kwene kasaka mbuto kuti akakhale. Pikhaenda iye tenepo adafika kumusa kwa Mika m'nthemba ya mapiri ya Eferemu. 
Judges17:9 Mika adamvunza mbati, “Ukubulukira kupi?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ine ndine Mlevi wa ku Betelehemu m'nthemba ya Yuda. Ndikusaka-saka mbuto yakuti ndikhale.”" 
Judges17:10 Mika adalonga mbati, “Khala na ine pano. Ukhale nyakundipanga nzeru, pontho nyansembe wanga. Ine ndinati ndikupagali kobiri zasiliva khumi chaka chonsene, nguwo na phoso.”" 
Judges17:11 Mphale wa Chilevi ule adatawira kukhala naye mbasanduka ninga mwanache. 
Judges17:12 Mika adamsankhula kukhala nyansembeache mbakhala pamsuwo wa Mika. 
Judges17:13 Mika adalonga mbati, “Chinchino podi ndikukhala na Mlevi m'nyumba mwanga ninga nyansembe wanga, ndikupidziwa kuti MBUYA anachitisa pinthu pyanga kufamba mwadidi.”" 
Judges18:1 Pandzidzi wenewu mu Israele mukhali nkhabe mfumu. Nsiku zenezo dzinza ya Dani ikhasaka-saka mbuto kule kunakwanisa iwo kukhazikikako, thangwi akhadadzati tambira dziko yawo ene tayu pakati pa madzinza a Israele." 
Judges18:2 Tenepo anthu a ku Dani adasankhula amuna ashanu aluso kubulukira m'mabanja a dzinzayo mbaatuma kubulukira kumaluwani a Zora na Eshitaoli kazonda dziko. Pidafika iwo m'nthemba ya mapiri ya Eferemu, iwo adakhala kunyumba ya Mika." 
Judges18:3 Pikhali iwo kweneko, iwo adadzindikira lulume ya mphale wa Chilevi, tenepo adenda kuna iye mbalonga mbati, “Ukuchitanji kuno? Mbani akudzesa kuno?”" 
Judges18:4 Iye adaapanga mbati, “Mika adaverana na ine kundipagali, thangwi ya kumphatira kwanga basa ninga nyansembeache.”" 
Judges18:5 Iwo adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Taphata miyendo vunza Mulungu ngakhala ulendo wathu unakwanisika.”" 
Judges18:6 Nyansembe ule adatawira mbati, “Ndokoni mumtendere. Lekani swipa mtima, MBUYA akutsalakana pya ulendo wanu.”" 
Judges18:7 Tenepo amuna ashanu ale adalamuka mbaenda kuluwani ya Laishi mbaona kuti anthu a kweneko akhali pakupata ninga anthu a ku Sidoni. Iwo akhali anthu amtendere pontho akufulika okhonda pokanyana unango na mwanzache; iwo hakhasowa pinthu tayu. Iwo adakhala kutali na Asidoni, pontho hakhafambirana na anthu anango onsene tayu." 
Judges18:8 Pidabwerera amuna ashanu ale ku Zora na Eshitaoli, anzawo adaavunza pidagumana iwo." 
Judges18:9 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Tendeni tikasose Laishi. Tidaona kuti dzikoyo njadidi pyakwanga. Ayi imwe nkhabe chitapo pinthu tayu? Chimbizani kwenda kweneko mbamukaipokosere." 
Judges18:10 Mungafika kweneko munagumana kuti anthu ache nkhabe kunyingwa na chinthu chene tayu. Ndi dziko ikulu pontho ina chinthu chonsene chinafuna munthucho, tenepo Mulungu akupasani dzikoyo.”" 
Judges18:11 Amuna madzana matanthatu a dzinza ya Dani adabuluka ku Zora na Eshitaoli mbasasanyikira pya nkhondo. 
Judges18:12 Pikhali iwo kunjira adamanga msasa kumadokero dzuwa a Kiriati-Yearimu m'nthemba ya Yuda. Ndi thangwi yache mbutoyo na lero ikuchemerwa msasa wa Dani. 
Judges18:13 Iwo adathimiza kwenda kubuluka kweneko kwenda kunyumba ya Mika m'nthemba ya mapiri ya Eferemu. 
Judges18:14 Tenepo amuna ashanu, ale akhadenda kazonda dziko yakuzungulira Laishi, adalonga kuna anzawo mbati, “Kadi imwe mukupidziwa kuti ibodzi mwa nyumba zili panozi muna mfanikizo wa muti wakukukutizwa na siliva? Muna mifanikizo inango, pontho na efodi? Apo tathema kuchitaponji?”" 
Judges18:15 Tenepo iwo adapita m'nyumba mwa Mika mukhakhala mphale wa Chilevi ule mbamvunza mukhakhalira iye. 
Judges18:16 Ndzidzi wenewo amuna madzana matanthatu a ku Dani, ale akhadasasanyikira pya nkhondo adaimira pamsuwo wa mpanda." 
Judges18:17 Anyakuzonda ashanu ale adapitiratu m'nyumba mule mbakwata mfanikizo wa muti wakukukutizwa na siliva ule, mifanikizo inango pontho na efodi mwenemo nyansembe aimira pamsuwo na anyankhondo madzana matanthatu ale." 
Judges18:18 Pidapita amuna ale m'nyumba mwa Mika mbakwata pinthu pyakupambulika pile, nyansembe ule adaavunza mbati, “Kadi chinachita imwechi ninji?”" 
Judges18:19 Iwo adalonga mbati, “Matama, leka longa chinthu na chibodzi chene. Tende ukakhale nyansembe wathu pontho nyakutipanga nzeru. Ayi iwe nkhabe komerwa kukhala nyansembe wa dzinza yonsene ya Israele tayu, kusiyana na kukhala nyansembe wa banja ya munthu mbodzi ene basi?”" 
Judges18:20 Penepi pidamchitisa nyansembe ule kukomerwa pyakwanga, tenepo iye adakwata mifanikizo yakupambulika ile mbaenda nawo pabodzi." 
Judges18:21 Iwo adazungunuka mbaenda pyawo pabodzi pene na anawo, pifuyo pyawo, na pinthu pyawo pyonsene patsogolo pawo." 
Judges18:22 Pidachemera Mika atsanthembache kuti akamenye nawo nkhondo, iwo akhadamala kale nsinzo ukulu ene kubulukira kunyumbache; tenepo iwo adaphatana nawo amuna a dzinza ya Dani ale" 
Judges18:23 mbakhuwa kuna iwo, tenepo amuna a dzinza ya Dani ale adazungunuka mbaavunza mbati, “Ninji penepi? Mwinji ninga wenewu ngwanji nawo?”" 
Judges18:24 Mika adatawira mbati, “Penepa ndiye munafuna kulonganji pinalonga imwe kuti ‘Ninji penepi?’ Imwe mudakwata nyansembeanga na mifanikizo idasasanya ine mbamuenda pyanu. Apo chasala na ine ninji pontho?”" 
Judges18:25 Amuna a dzinza ya Dani ale adatawira mbati, “Mphyadidi mbudamatama pyako gopesera amuna anazhangali mbakuphata. Penepo iwe na banjako yonsene munafa.”" 
Judges18:26 Tenepo Adani adathimiza kwenda pyawo. Mika adapiona kuti iwo akhali na mphamvu pyakwanga kupiringana iye, natenepo adazungunuka mbabwerera kumusa kwache." 
Judges18:27 Pikhadakwata amuna a dzinza ya Dani nyansembe ule na pinthu pya Mika pikhadasasanya iye pile, iwo adenda mbakasosa luwani ya Laishi, luwani yamtendere ya anthu akumatama, ile ikhali m'phedi ibodzi ene na Beterehobu. Iwo adapha anthu a mwenemo mbapisa luwani ile. Pakhali nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene wakuapulumusa, thangwi Laishi akhali kutali na mzinda wa Sidoni, pontho iwo hakhafambirana na anthu anango tayu. Amuna a dzinza ya Dani adamanga pontho luwaniyo mbakhazikikamo." 
Judges18:28  
Judges18:29 Iwo adautchandula dzina kukhala Dani, dzina ya kholo wawo Dani mwana Yakobo." 
Judges18:30 Amuna a dzinza ya Dani ale adaikhamo mfanikizo kuti upembedzwe, tenepo Yonatani mwana wamamuna wa Gereshomu, ule akhali mwana wamamuna wa Mose na anache akhali anyansembe kuphatira basa dzinza ya Dani kufikirana anthu adatamiswa ku madziko akunja." 
Judges18:31 Mfanikizo wa Mika udakhala kweneko ndzidzi onsene ukhali Chikhumbi cha Mulungu chile ku Shilo. 
Judges19:1 Nsiku zenezo mwenemo Israele mbadzati khala na mfumu, pakhali Mlevi unango wakukhala kutali kumidzi m'nthemba ya mapiri a Eferemu, ule adakwata bitchu wa ku Betelehemu m'nthemba ya Yuda kukhala mkazache." 
Judges19:2 Kwache mkazi ule adapinda mbabuluka kwenda pyache kuna babache ku Betelehemu mbakakhala kweneko miyezi minayi. 
Judges19:3 Tenepo mamuna ule adenda kweneko kamnyengerera mkazi ule kuti abwerezane naye. Iye adakwata nyabasa na mabulu mawiri kwenda naye pabodzi. Mkazi ule adapitisa Mlevi m'nyumba, tenepo pidamuona babache adamtambira mwadidi." 
Judges19:4 Babache mkazi ule adakhakhamiza Mlevi ule kuti akhale, tenepo adakhaladi kweneko nsiku zitatu kudya, kumwa na kugona kweneko." 
Judges19:5 Machibese a nsiku yachinayi iwo adalamuka mbasasanyika kwenda. Mbwenye tebzalache Mlevi ule adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Mutome kudya mungamala munaenda mphole.”" 
Judges19:6 Tenepo awiri ale adakhala pansi mbadya na kumwa pabodzi. Kubuluka penepo tebzalache ule adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ndaphata miyendo gonani pontho kuno kuti mukomerwe.”" 
Judges19:7 Mlevi ule adasasanyika kuti aende, mbwenye tebzalache adamkhakhamiza kuti akhale, natenepo iye adagona mosiku unango kweneko." 
Judges19:8 Mangwana mwache na machibese a nsiku yachishanu adautoma ulendo, mbwenye tebzalache adalonga mbati, “Idyani pontho dikhirani muende mawulo ano.” Tenepo amuna awiri ale adadya pabodzi." 
Judges19:9 Pikhadatekenyeka mamuna, mkazache wachibitchu ule na nyabasache ule kwenda, tebzalache ule adalonga mbati, “Yang'anani, kunja kwadoka kale munakwanisa kugona pontho kuno kuti mukomerwe. Kunja kunati kuswipe chinchino pano; mangwana munakwanisa kubesera pyakwanga kuti muende ulendo wanu.”" 
Judges19:10 Mbwenye munthu ule hadafune pyakugona pontho kweneko tayu, tenepo iye na mkazache wachibitchu ule adalamuka kwenda pabodzi pene na nyabasawo pontho mabulu awo mawiri uku apakiza mitolo pamsana pawo. Kunja kukhadadoka pyakwanga pidafika iwo kumzinda wa Yebusi (wenewu ndi Yerusalemu), tenepo nyabasa ule adalonga kuna mbuyache ule mbati, “Tatani tinakhonda imira kuti tigone pyathu mosiku uno mumzinda wa Ayebusiwu?”" 
Judges19:11  
Judges19:12 Mbwenye mbuyache ule adalonga mbati, “Ife nkhabe imira kwene mumzinda mule anthu ache si Aisraele tayu. Tinati tigwande pang'ono mbatikagona ku Gibea penu Rama.”" 
Judges19:13  
Judges19:14 Tenepo iwo adagwanda kwene pyawo na mu Yebusi mbathimiza kwenda pyawo. Dzuwa ikhadathobila pikhafika iwo ku Gibea m'nthemba ya dzinza ya Benjemani. 
Judges19:15 Iwo adabauka kuti akagone kweneko. Iwo adapita mumzinda mbakhala pachintalo cha mumzinda, kwache nkhabe na mbodzi ene adapipereka kuakwata kwenda nawo kumusa kwawo kuti akagone mosiku wenewo tayu." 
Judges19:16 M'chidodo nkhalamba inango yachimuna idadza kubulukira kubasache kumunda. Kwawo kukhali kunthemba ya mapiri a Eferemu, mbwenye akhakhala ku Gibea. Anthu a muluwani mwenemo akhali a dzinza ya Benjemani." 
Judges19:17 Nkhalamba ule adaona mlendo ule pachintalo cha mumzinda, mbamvunza mbati, “Mukubulukira kupi? Apo mukwenda kupi?”" 
Judges19:18 Mlevi ule adatawira mbati, “Ife tikubulukira ku Betelehemu m'nthemba ya Yuda, tenepo ife tikwenda kumudzi kwathu kutsanga kwa nthemba ya mapiri a Eferemu. Nkhabe na mbodzi ene aenda nafe kumusa kwache," 
Judges19:19 podi kwene kuti ife tina maudzu na pyakudya pya mabulu athu, pontho mkate na vinyu pya mkazanga wachibitchu, ine na nyabasangayi. Tina pyonsene pinafuna ife.”" 
Judges19:20 Nkhalamba ule adalonga mbati, “Tendeni kumusa kwanga. Ndinati ndikakuyang'anireni mwadidi. Imwe si kuti muchite kugona pachintalo pano tayu.”" 
Judges19:21 Natenepo iye adenda nawo kumusa kwache mbadyesa mabulu ache. Alendo ache ale adaasambisa manyalo awo mbadya na kumwa. 
Judges19:22 Iwo akhakomerwa pyakwanga, tenepo vumbu-vumbu amuna anango anyakuchita pyakuzuda m'mzinda mule adazungulira nyumba ile mbatoma kumenya msuwo. Iwo adalonga kuna nkhalamba ule mbati, “Bulusa panja pano mamuna adza na iwe kumusa kwako kuno! Tinafuna kuchita naye pyakuzuda.”" 
Judges19:23 Mbwenye nkhalamba ule adabuluka panja mbalonga mbati, “Tayu, ashamwali, lekani chita pinthu pyakuzuda ninga penepi. Iye ndi mlendo wanga; lekani kumchitira pyakuipa." 
Judges19:24 Yang'anani mkazache wachibitchu pontho mwananga okhonda dziwa mamuna alipo. Ndinati ndiabuluse panja pano chinchino. Imwe munakwanisa kuchita nawo pyonsene pinafuna imwe. Mbwenye lekani chita chinthu chakuchitisa manyadzo kuna mamuna weneyu!” 
Judges19:25 Kwache anthu ale hadamvesere tayu. Tenepo Mlevi ule adabulusa panja mkazi wachibitchu ule. Iwo adamphatirira mbachita naye pyauputa mosiku onsene mpakana machibese. 
Judges19:26 M'makalakwecha mkazi ule adadza mbagwa pansi pa msuwo wa nyumba ya nkhalamba mukhali mamunache mule. Iye adakhala pyache penepo basi mpakana kunja ngwiro. 
Judges19:27 Mamunache adalamuka machibese enewo, tenepo pidafungula iye msuwo kuti aende ulendo wache adagumana mkazache wachibitchu ule ali tambzala kumsuwo wa nyumba ile uku mkono wache adathambidzira kumsuwoko." 
Judges19:28 Iye adalonga mbati, “Ngalamuka, tiende.” Mbwenye mkazi ule hadatawire tayu. Tenepo adakwata manungo a mkazi ule mbaagwangwanyisa pabulu pache pale mbautoma ulendo wache kwenda kwawo." 
Judges19:29 Pidafika iye, adapita m'nyumba mwache mbakwata mpeni mbagwanda-gwanda m'mapindi khumi na mawiri manungo a mkazache ule. Tenepo iye adatumiza phindi ibodzi ibodzi kuna madzinza khumi na awiri a Israele." 
Judges19:30 Munthu onsene adapivayo adalonga mbati, “Chipo ife tidzati kuva pinthu ninga penepi tayu. Chipo pinthu ninga penepi pidzati chitika tayu, kutomera ndzidzi udabuluka Aisraele ku Iguputo! Ife tathema kuchitapo pinthu! Apo tinachitanji?”" 
Judges20:1 Anthu onsene a Israele a m'dzinza ya Dani mpakana ku Beeresheba pontho a kunthemba ya Gileadi adadza ninga munthu mbodzi mbagumanyikana pamaso pa MBUYA pa Mizipa. 
Judges20:2 Akadamu onsene a anthu a madzinza a Israele akhalimbo penepo pamgumano wa anthu a Mulungu. Penepo pakhali pontho anyankhondo pikwi madzana manayi akuphatira matalasada. 
Judges20:3 Pandzidzi wenewo anthu anango a dzinza ya Benjemani adapiva kuti Aisraele onsene agumanyikana pa Mizipa. Aisraele adavunza mbati, “Ngatipangeni, upandu wenewu wachitika tani?”" 
Judges20:4 Mlevi ule mkazache akhadachitirwa pyaupandu ule adatawira mbati, “Mkazangayi na ine tidenda ku Gibea m'nthemba ya Benjemani kagona kweneko." 
Judges20:5 Amuna a kweneko adadza mbazungulira nyumba ile na mosiku. Iwo akhafuna pyakundipha m'mbuto mwache iwo adaphatirira mkazanga wachibitchu, tenepo iye adafa." 
Judges20:6 Ine ndidakwata manungo ache mbandiagwanda-gwanda m'mapindi mbanditumiza kada dzinza phindi yache kuna madzinza onsene khumi na awiri a Israele, thangwi anthu enewa achita chinthu chakuipa pontho chakuchitisa manyadzo pakati pa Aisraele." 
Judges20:7 Monsene muli pano ndimwe Aisraele, apo tinachitanji na penepi.”" 
Judges20:8 Anthu onsene adalamuka pabodzi pene mbalonga mbati, “Nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene wa ife, penu akhale pyache m'khumbi penu m'nyumba anaenda kumusa kwache tayu." 
Judges20:9 Ife tinachita tenepa: tinagwa ntsango mbatisankhula amuna anango kuti akasose Gibea. 
Judges20:10 Khundu ibodzi ya makhundu khumi ya amuna a Israele anapereka pyakudya kuna anyankhondo, anango akusalirawo anati aende katchunyusa Gibea, thangwi ya chinthu chakuipa pyakwanga chachita iwo kuna Israele.”" 
Judges20:11 Natenepo amuna onsene a ku Israele adagumanyikana na manyerezero abodzi ene kufuna kusosa luwani ile. 
Judges20:12 Madzinza a Israele adatuma anyamphangwa kunthemba zonsene za dzinza ya Benjemani kulonga kuti, “Upandu wakugoswa ninga wenewo ngwanji wachita imwewu?" 
Judges20:13 Chinchino dzani nawo kuna ife anthu akuchita pyakuzuda, towera tiaphe mbatibulusa chakuipachi mu Israele.” Mbwenye anthu a dzinza ya Benjemani hadapiikhe konta tayu pikhalonga Aisraele anzawo pile." 
Judges20:14 Kubulukira kumizinda yonsene ya Benjemani iwo adadza dzamenya nkhondo ku Gibea na anthu anango a Israele. 
Judges20:15 Anthu a dzinza ya Benjemani adagumanyisa anyankhondo pikwi makumawiri na pitanthatu kubulukira kumizinda yawo. Kuthimizira papenepi mbalwa za mu Gibea zidagumanyisa amuna madzana manomwe 
Judges20:16 aluso pakuponyera mabzere. Munthu onsene wa iwo akhaponya mwala na mbemba mbakhonda kukhwitcha kwene na pang'ono pene. 
Judges20:17 Madzinza anango a Israele adagumanyisambo amuna pikwi madzana manayi anyankhondo akuphatira talasada, onsenewa akhali aluso pankhondo." 
Judges20:18 Aisraele adenda kumbuto yakupembedzerapo ku Betele mbavunza Mulungu mbati, “Dzinzache njipi yathema kutoma kwenda kamenyana na dzinza ya Benjemani?” MBUYA adatawira mbati, “Dzinza ya Yuda.”" 
Judges20:19 Natenepo mangwana mwache na machibese Aisraele adautoma ulendo wa kunkhondo mbamanga msasa chifupi na mzinda wa Gibea. 
Judges20:20 Iwo adenda kasosa anyankhondo a dzinza ya Benjemani mbaikha anyankhondo m'mbuto zawo kuyang'anisana na mzindawo. 
Judges20:21 Anyankhondo a dzinza ya Benjemani adabuluka mumzindamo, tenepo dzuwa mbidzati thobila iwo adapha anyankhondo pikwi makumawiri na piwiri a ku Israele." 
Judges20:22 Kubuluka penepo Aisraele adenda kumbuto yakupembedzerako mbasintili pamaso pa MBUYA mpakana mawulo. Iwo adavunza mbati, “Ayi ife tathema kwenda pontho kachita nkhondo na abale athu a dzinza ya Benjemani?” MBUYA adatawira mbati, “Ande.” Natenepo anyankhondo Aisraele adawangiswa mtima. Iwo adaikha anyankhondo awo sasawa ninga adaikha iwo pakutoma pale." 
Judges20:23  
Judges20:24 Iwo adenda kuna anyankhondo a dzinza ya Benjemani kachiwiri. 
Judges20:25 Ndzidzi wenewu anthu a dzinza ya Benjemani adabuluka mumzindamo mbapha anyankhondo pikwi khumi na pisere pya anyankhondo aluso a ku Israele. 
Judges20:26 Kubuluka penepo Aisraele onsene adenda kasintili ku Betele. Iwo adakhala kweneko pamaso pa MBUYA, pontho hadadye tayu kufikirana mawulo. Iwo adapereka nsembe zachiphatizano mbapyereza nsembe yamumphu. Iwo adachita pyonsenepi pamaso pa MBUYA." 
Judges20:27 Bokosi ya Chiverano cha Mulungu ikhali ku Beteleko ndzidzi wenewo, pontho Finiasi mwana wa Eleazara chidzukulu cha Aroni ndiye akhayang'anira Bokosi ya Chiveranoyo. Anthu adavunza mbati, “Ayi tathema kwenda pontho kamenyana na abale athu a dzinza ya Benjemani, penu tileke pyathu?” MBUYA adatawira mbati, “Kamenyeni mangwana ndinati ndikuchitiseni kuakunda.”" 
Judges20:28  
Judges20:29 Tenepo Aisraele adenda kaikha amuna anango pakubisika kuzungulira Gibea. 
Judges20:30 Kachitatu kache nsiku zakutsagazana adenda kuna anthu a dzinza ya Benjemani mbaikha anyankhondo awo m'mbuto zawo kuyang'anisana na Gibea ninga mukhadachitira iwo pakutoma pale. 
Judges20:31 Anthu a dzinza ya Benjemani adabuluka dzamenya nkhondo mbachitiswa kwenda kutali kwene kubulukira kumzinda. Ninga pakutoma iwo adatoma kupha Aisraele anango kunja kwa mzinda pamsewu wakwendera ku Betele pontho unango wakwendera ku Gibea. Iwo adapha Aisraele akukwana ninga makumatatu. 
Judges20:32 Anthu a dzinza ya Benjemani adalonga mbati, “Ife taapamantha ninga mukhadachitira ife pakutoma pale.” Mbwenye Aisraele akhadapisasanya kubwerera chinduli-nduli mbaachitisa kwenda kutali na mzindawo kumisewuyo." 
Judges20:33 Pidabuluka gulu ikulu ya Israele m'mbuto zawo mbagumanyikana pa Baala-Tamara, amuna adabisala kuzungulira mzindawo adabuluka m'mbuto za miyala zikhadabisala iwo zile." 
Judges20:34 Tenepo pakati pa amuna pikwi khumi aluso adasankhulwa pakati pa Aisraele ale, adasosa Gibea tenepo nkhondo idakaka. Anthu a dzinza ya Benjemani hadadzindikire tayu kuti iwo akhali chifupi kuvungwa." 
Judges20:35 Tenepo MBUYA adachitisa anyankhondo a ku Israele kukunda anyankhondo a dzinza ya Benjemani mbapha pikwi makumawiri na pishanu na dzana ibodzi pya iwo nsiku yeneyo. 
Judges20:36 Penepo anthu a dzinza ya Benjemani adadzindikira kuti akundwa. Gulu ikulu ya anyankhondo a ku Israele akhadakunda anthu a dzinza ya Benjemani, thangwi akhanyindira amuna akhadabisala kuzungulira Gibea ale." 
Judges20:37 Amuna enewa adachimbiza kuthamangira ku Gibea, iwo adabalalika mumzinda mule mbapha munthu onsene mwenemo." 
Judges20:38 Gulu ikulu ya anyankhondo a ku Israele pontho na amuna akhadabisala ale adasasanya chidziwiso chakuti angaona makole akulu a utsi tolo-tolo m'dzulu kubulukira mumzindamo," 
Judges20:39 gulu ikulu ile idathema kuzungunuka kumenya nkhondo. Pandzidzi wenewu anthu a dzinza ya Benjemani akhadapha kale Aisraele makumatatu. Tenepo iwo adapilonga okha ene mbati, “Tiamenye ninga montho mudachitira ife pakutoma pale.”" 
Judges20:40 Penepo chidziwiso chile chidaoneka, makole a utsi adaoneka phwira-phwira kubulukira mumzinda mule. Anthu a dzinza ya Benjemani adazungunuka mbadodoma kuona kuti mzindawo onsene ukugaka moto." 
Judges20:41 Tenepo Aisraele adazungunukambo, penepo anthu a ku Benjemani akhali pa mpani-pani, thangwi iwo adadzindikira kuti ali chifupi kukundwa." 
Judges20:42 Iwo adapiyesera kuthawa Aisraele kuthawira kuminda, kwache iwo hadakwanise kuthawa tayu, thangwi iwo adaphatwa pakati na kati pa gulu ikulu ya anyankhondo a ku Israele na amuna akhadabuluka mumzinda ale, tenepo iwo adamala vungwa." 
Judges20:43 Aisraele adazungulira anyamalwawo mbaathamangisa mwakukhonda leka mpakana chakumabulukiro dzuwa a Gibea uku akuapha pikhaathamangisa iwo. 
Judges20:44 Pikwi khumi na pisere pya anyankhondo aluso a dzinza ya Benjemani adaphiwa. 
Judges20:45 Pikhazungunuka amuna akusalira kuthawira kuthando yatchetcha kwenda ku Phanzwi ya Rimoni, Aisraele adapha amuna pikwi pishanu m'misewu. Aisraele adathimiza kuathamangisa amuna akusalira ale, mpakana ku Gidomu mbapha amuna pikwi piwiri." 
Judges20:46 Pabodzi pene onsene anthu a dzinza ya Benjemani adaphiwa nsiku yeneyo akhalipo pikwi makumawiri na pishanu, onsenewo akhali anyankhondo akuwanga mtima." 
Judges20:47 Kwache amuna madzana matanthatu adakwanisa kuthawira kuthando yatchetcha ku Phanzwi ya Rimoni mbakhala kweneko miyezi minayi. 
Judges20:48 Aisraele adabwerera pontho kudziko ya Benjemani mbapha pyonsene pene, amuna, akazi na ana ene, pontho na pifuyo pyene. Iwo adapisa moto luwani yonsene m'nthemba yeneyo." 
Judges21:1 Pikhadagumanyikana Aisraele pa Mizipa, iwo adadumbira mbati, “Nee mbodzi pakati pathupa anasembesa mwanache wamkazi na munthu wa dzinza ya Benjemani tayu.”" 
Judges21:2 Natenepo anthu a ku Israele adenda ku Betele mbakhala pansi pamaso pa Mulungu mpakana mawulo mbasintili mwakugaluza fala, pontho pikulu pene. Iwo adalonga mbati," 
Judges21:3 “MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele penepi pyachitikiranji? Thangwi yache ninji kuti dzinza ya Benjemani imale pakati pa Israele?” 
Judges21:4 Mangwana mwache na machibese anthu adamanga guwa yansembe penepo, mbapereka nsembe zachiphatizano mbapyereza nsembe yonsene yamumphu." 
Judges21:5 Iwo adavunza ngakhala pakhali gulu inango kunja ile hidagumanyikane nawo pabodzi na madzinza a Israele pamaso pa MBUYA tayu. Thangwi iwo akhadadumbira kuti munthu onsene anakhonda dzagumanyikana pabodzi na anzache pamaso pa MBUYA ku Mizipa, weneyo athemadi kuphiwa." 
Judges21:6 Aisraele adaphatwa na nsisi pyakwanga na abale awo a dzinza ya Benjemani mbalonga mbati, “Lero dzinza ibodzi pakati pa madzinza a Israele yatayika." 
Judges21:7 Tinachita tani kuti tipase akazi kuna amuna a dzinza ya Benjemani adasalira kukhonda phiwa ale? Ife tidadumbira kuna MBUYA kuti na kutani kwene ife sinaapasa anathu achikazi tayu.” 
Judges21:8 Tenepo iwo adavunza ngakhala pakhali dzinza inango pakati pa Israele ile hidagumanyikane na anthu tayu pamaso pa MBUYA pa Mizipa. Tenepo iwo adapidziwa kuti nkhabe na ibodzi ene wa ku Yabeshi-Gileadi akhadadza penepo tayu; 
Judges21:9 pakuchemera kufuna kuona mbani nyankhondo akhalipo penu nkhabepo, nkhabe na mbodzi ene wa ku Yabeshi-Gileadi adatawira tayu." 
Judges21:10 Anthu adagumanyikana penepo ale adatuma amuna akuwanga mtima pikwi khumi na piwiri na utongi wakuti, “Ndokoni mukaphe amuna onsene a ku Yabeshi-Gileadi kuthimizapo akazi na ana ene." 
Judges21:11 Kapheni amuna onsene pontho akazi ale si amiyali okhonda dziwa mamuna tayu.” 
Judges21:12 Pakati pa anthu a mu Yabeshi adagumana amiyali okhonda dziwa mamuna madzana manayi, tenepo adadza nawo kumsasa kwawo ku Shilo, kule nkhunthemba ya Kanani." 
Judges21:13 Tenepo anthu adagumanyikana penepo ale adatuma mphangwa kuna amuna a dzinza ya Benjemani akhabisala ku Phanzwi ya Rimoni ale kuapanga pya mtendere. 
Judges21:14 Amuna a dzinza ya Benjemani ale, adabwerera m'mudzi, tenepo adapaswa akazi a ku Yabeshi-Gileadi akhadasiyiwa okhonda phiwa ale. Kwache akazi ale hadakwane-kwane kuna onsene a iwo ale tayu." 
Judges21:15 Anthu adaphatwa na nsisi na dzinza ya Benjemani thangwi MBUYA adabulusa dzinza ibodzi pakati pa madzinza a Israele. 
Judges21:16 Tenepo anthu adagumanyikana mbalonga mbati, “Nkhabeve tayu akazi m'dzinza ya Benjemani. Tinachita tani kuti tipase akazi kuna amuna a dzinza ya Benjemani adasalira kukhonda phiwa ale?" 
Judges21:17 Israele hadatheme kutaya ibodzi pakati pa madzinza khumi na awiriwa tayu. Ife tathema kugumana njira yakuti dzinza ya Benjemani ithimize kukhalapo," 
Judges21:18 Kwache ife nkhabe kuatawirisa kusemba anathu achikazi tayu, thangwi ife Aisraele tadumbira kuti, ‘Dzedze kuna munthu onsene anasembesa mwanache wamkazi kuna dzinza ya Benjemani.’" 
Judges21:19 Mbwenye yang'anani kunakhala phwando ya chaka na chaka ya MBUYA ku Shilo kumpoto kwa Betele, pontho kumabulukiro dzuwa a njira yakwendera ku Shekemu kubulukira ku Betele, pontho kumwera kwa Lebona.”" 
Judges21:20 Tenepo iwo adalonga kuna anthu a dzinza ya Benjemani mbati, “Ndokoni mukabisale kuminda yamfesa" 
Judges21:21 mbamuone ngakhala atsikana a ku Shilo anadza penepo dzavina nawo, imwe mubuluke m'mfesa mwabisala imwemo mbamuphate kada munthu mkazi pakati pa akazi a ku Shilo mbamuende nawo kwanu kunthemba ya Benjemani." 
Judges21:22 Ngakhala ababawo na nkhoswe zawo anadza kuna ife mbatidungunyira kuti muleke anawo, ife tinaapanga kuti, ‘Tikomerenimbo mtima, thangwi ife nee tidaakwata kubulukira kunkhondo akazi mbatiapasa kuti akhale akazawo tayu. Tenepo imwe hamudadawe tayu, thangwi hamudatipase ananu achikazi tayu.’ ”" 
Judges21:23 Penepi ndiye pidachita amuna a dzinza ya Benjemani. Pikhavina atsikana ale, mamuna onsene adenda mbakaphata mtsikana mbaenda naye kakhala mkazache. Kubuluka penepo iwo adabwerera kunthemba kwawo mbamanga pontho luwani yawo mbakhazikikamo." 
Judges21:24 Natenepo Aisraele adabuluka pambutopo mbaenda munthu onsene kudzinza kwache, banjache na kuna pinthu pyache." 
Judges21:25 Pandzidzi wenewo mu Israele mukhali nkhabe mfumu. Munthu onsene akhachita pyache pinamkomerapyo. 
Ruth1:1 Kale ene mwenemo Israele mbadzati khala na mfumu, m'dzikomo mukhali njala ikulu. Tenepo Elimeleki wa mbumba ya Efurata, pontho ule akhakhala ku Betelehemu m'nthemba ya Yuda pabodzi pene na mkazache Naomi na anawo achimuna awiri, Mahiloni na Kilioni adenda kabanga khala m'dziko ya Moabu. Pikhakhala iwo kweneko," 
Ruth1:2  
Ruth1:3 Elimeleki adafa, tenepo Naomi adasala yekha na anache awiri," 
Ruth1:4 ale adasemba Oripa na Rute, akazi a ku Moabu. Pidagwanda pyaka ninga khumi" 
Ruth1:5 Mahiloni na Kilioni adafambo, tenepo Naomi adasaliratu yekha ene wakusowa mamuna penu ana achimuna." 
Ruth1:6 Pidagwanda ndzidzi pang'ono Naomi adava kuti MBUYA akhadatsanzayisa anthu ache pakuapasa pyakuvuna pyadidi, natenepo iye adasasanyika kubuluka ku Moabu pabodzi pene na akwenyache ale." 
Ruth1:7 Iwo adautoma ulendo wawo wakubwerera kunthemba ya Yuda kubulukira kukhakhala iwo kule na njira yakuafikisa kwawo. Mbali panjira," 
Ruth1:8 iye adalonga kuna akwenyache ale mbati, “Bwererani pyanu mukakhale na amanu. MBUYA mbakukomereni mtima ninga mukhadachitira iye kuna ine na adefuntu ale." 
Ruth1:9 MBUYA mbapichitise kukwanisika kuti munthu onsene wa imwe asembwe pontho mbamukhala na mabanja anu ene.” Tenepo Naomi adaampsompsona kugonekana nawo. Mbwenye iwo adatoma kulira 
Ruth1:10 mbalonga mbati, “Nkhabe ife tinati tiende namwe pabodzi kuna anthu anu.”" 
Ruth1:11 Naomi adalonga mbati, “Ananga, imwe mwathema kubwerera pyanu. Mwatani munafuna kwenda nane pabodzi? Ayi mukunyerezera kuti ine ndinakwanisa kukhala pontho na ana achimuna kuti akusembeni?" 
Ruth1:12 Bwererani pyanu kwanu, thangwi ine ndakalamba pyakwanga kuti ndisembwe pontho. Podi ndinyerezere pyanga kuti chidikhiro chilipo basi mbandikhala na mamuna mosiku ene uno penepo mbandibala ana achimuna." 
Ruth1:13 Ayi imwe mungaadikhire kuti anawo agolosali? Ayi penepi pingakuchitiseni kuti muleke sembwa na mamuna unango? Nkhabe, ananga, imwe ene mukupidziwa kuti penepi si pyakukwanisika tayu. Chinthu chakuchitikiranichi ntchakundivesa kupha pyakwanga, thangwi MBUYA andipasa nkhodolo.”" 
Ruth1:14 Penepo iwo adatoma kulira pontho. Oripa adampsompsona mebzalache ule kugonekana naye mbabwerera pyache kwawo, mbwenye Rute adamkakamira." 
Ruth1:15 Naomi adalonga kuna Rute mbati, “Nanako abwerera pyache kwawo kuna anthu ache na kuna milungu yache, ndoko naye pabodzi.”" 
Ruth1:16 Mbwenye Rute adamtawira mbati, “Lekani kuchita kundidembetera kuti ndikusiyeni. Ndilekeni ndiende namwe. Konsene kwene kunaenda imwe, ndinaendambo konthoko. Konsene kwene kunakakhala imwe, ndinakakhalambo konthoko; anthu anu anakhalambo anthu anga, pontho Mulungu wanu anakhalambo Mulungu wanga." 
Ruth1:17 Konsene kwene kunafera imwe, ndinaferambo konthoko; kweneko ndiye kunafuna ine ikhwa m'masiye. MBUYA mbanditchunyuse pikulu pene, ngakhala panakhala chinthu chinango chene chakutilekanisa imwe na ine kupambula imfa!”" 
Ruth1:18 Pidaona Naomi kuti Rute adachita phinga kwenda naye pabodzi, iye hadalongeve pinthu tayu." 
Ruth1:19 Iwo adathimiza kwenda mpakana ku Betelehemu. Pidafika iwo anthu onsene a muluwanimo adakomerwa pyakwanga, pontho akazi adalonga mwakugaluza fala mbati, “Ayi weneyu angakhaledi Naomi?”" 
Ruth1:20 Iye adatawira mbati, “Lekani kundichemera Naomi mbwenye Mara, thangwi Nyamphamvu zonsene achitisa moyo wanga kukhala ninga chinthu chakuwawa." 
Ruth1:21 Ndzidzi udabuluka ine kuno ndikhali na pizinji, mbwenye MBUYA andibweza chimanja-manja. Mwatani munandichemera Naomi, podi MBUYA anditchunyusa, pontho Nyamphamvu zonsene andichitisa kusanyika?”" 
Ruth1:22 Mwenemu ndi mule mudabwerera Naomi ku Betelehemu pabodzi pene na Rute mkwenyache wa ku Moabu mbafika ku Betelehemu ndzidzi wakuvuna barele ukutoma kwene. 
Ruth2:1 Naomi akhali na mbaleache wa kuchimuna dzinache Boazi. Iye akhali wa mbumba ya Elimeleki, pontho akhali munthu wakufuma." 
Ruth2:2 Nsiku inango Rute wa Chimoabu adalonga kuna Naomi mbati, “Nditawiriseni kwenda kaphalakatira mapira anasiya anyakuvuna m'mindawa, ale ndikupidziwa kuti mbodzi anati andikomere mtima basi kuphata naye basa pabodzi.” Naomi adatawira mbati, “Ndoko pyako mwananga.”" 
Ruth2:3 Tenepo Rute adenda kuminda mbatoma kuphalakatira mapira m'nduli mwa anyakuvuna ale. Pidachitika kuti iye akhali m'munda mwa Boazi wa mbumba ya Elimeleki. 
Ruth2:4 M'nduli mwache Boazi ene mwenechiroache adafika kubulukira ku Betelehemu mbamwenyika anyakuvuna ale mbati, “MBUYA mbakhale namwe.” Iwo adatawira mbati, “MBUYA mbakutsanzayiseni.”" 
Ruth2:5 Boazi adavunza mkadamu wa anyakuvuna ale mbati, “Mtsikana weneyu mbani?”" 
Ruth2:6 Mkadamu ule adatawira mbati, “Iye ndi mkazi wa ku Moabu adadza pabodzi na Naomi ule." 
Ruth2:7 Iye adandipempha kuti ndimtawirise kuphalakatira pyache mapira m'nduli mwa anyakuvunawa. Iye atoma machibese kuphata basa, tenepo akhala pamthunzi kuti apume ndzidzi pang'ono basi.”" 
Ruth2:8 Tenepo Boazi adalonga kuna Rute mbati, “Mwananga vesera kuno. Leka kwenda kaphalakatira m'munda mwa munthu unango, mbwenye m'munda muno mwene basi. Khala kuno na anyabasanga achitsikanawa." 
Ruth2:9 Ikha maso pamunda unavuna amunawa, pontho khala m'nduli mwawo. Ine ndaapanga kuti aleke kukukhuya. Ungava nyota ndoko kamwe madzi adza na iwo m'pitombamo.”" 
Ruth2:10 Rute adalamba mbalonga kuna Boazi mbati, “Mwatani munatsalakana pya ine pano? Thangwi yache ninji kuti mukomere mtima mlendo pyache ninga ine?”" 
Ruth2:11 Boazi adatawira mbati, “Ine ndava pyonsene pyachitira iwe mebzalako kutomera pidafa mamunako. Ine ndadziwa mule mudasiyira iwe dziko yako, pontho mule mudadzera iwe dzakhala pakati pa anthu ale chipo hudzati kuadziwa tayu." 
Ruth2:12 MBUYA mbakufupe thangwi ya pinthu pyachita iwepi. MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele mbakufupe na mfupo wamumphu, kuna iye kule kwadza iwe kuti utchinjirizwe.”" 
Ruth2:13 Rute adatawira mbati, “Imwe mwandikomera mtima pyakwanga. Mbuya, imwe mwandichitisa kukomerwa pakulonga mwakukoma mtima kuna ine, podi kwene kuti ine na anyabasanuwa ndife akusiyana.”" 
Ruth2:14 Pandzidzi wakudya Boazi adalonga kuna Rute mbati, “Bwera ukwate mkate mbufonde muvinyu.” Tenepo iye adakhala pansi na anyakuvuna ale, Boazi adakwata barele wakukazinga mbampasira. Iye adadya mbakhuta mbasiya basi pyakudya pinango." 
Ruth2:15 Pidalamuka iye kwenda kaphalakatira barele, Boazi adatonga anyabasa ale mbati, “Mulekeni pyache kuphalakatira podi na mwagona misumbu mwenemo. Lekani longa chinthu na chibodzi chene kumkhondesa. M'mbuto mwache sololani pang'ono barele m'misumbumo kuti iye alokote, pontho lekani kumsumulula.”" 
Ruth2:16  
Ruth2:17 Rute adathimiza kuphalakatira mpakana mawulo. Tenepo adabubuda barele akhadaphalakatira iye ule mbaona kuti akhadadzaza chifupi-fupi makilogramu khumi. 
Ruth2:18 Iye adakwata barele ule mbabwerera muluwani mbakaaonesa mebzalache mbampasa pontho pyakudya pyakusalira pikhadasiya iye ndzidzi wakudya ule. 
Ruth2:19 Naomi adamvunza mbati, “Pyonsenepi wapiphalakatira kupi? Mundache ngwa ani waphata iwe basa? Mulungu mbatsanzayise munthu adakukomera mtima ule!” Tenepo Rute adalonga kuti iye akhadaphalakatira m'munda mwa munthu unango dzinache Boazi." 
Ruth2:20 Naomi adalonga mbati, “MBUYA mbatsanzayise Boazi.” Iye adathimiza kulonga mbati, “MBUYA ambachita pidadumbira iye kuna anyamoyo na anyakufa ene. Munthu weneyu ndi mbaleathu chadi-chadi, mbodzi wa anthu ambatsalakana pya ife ule.”" 
Ruth2:21 Tenepo Rute adalonga mbati, “Padzulu pa penepi iye adandipanga kuti ndithimize kukhala pabodzi pene na anyabasache mpakana kumala kwa kuvuna.”" 
Ruth2:22 Naomi adalonga kuna Rute mbati, “Mwananga mphyadidi kuti iwe uphate basa pabodzi na anyabasa achitsikana m'munda mwa Boazi, gopesera unakuwazwa ngakhala unaenda m'munda mwa munthu unango ene.”" 
Ruth2:23 Tenepo Rute adaphata nawo basa mbaphalakatira mpakana barele na tirigu onsene adamala vunwa. Tenepo iye adathimiza kukhala na mebzalache. 
Ruth3:1 Pidagwanda ndzidzi pang'ono Naomi adalonga kuna Rute mbati, “Ine ndathema kukusakira mamuna, towera ukhale na nyumba yako ene." 
Ruth3:2 Kumbuka kuti Boazi ule anyabasache aphata na iwe pabodzi basa, ndi mbaleathu. Vesera kuno, mawulo ano iye anati abubude barele pambuwa." 
Ruth3:3 Tenepo ndoko kasambe mbudzole mafuta akununkhira, pontho uvale nguwo zadidiletu. Ungamala penepo uende kunabubuda iyeko. Kwache leka kaonekera msanga kufikirana iye amala kudya na kumwa." 
Ruth3:4 Kaonesese kuti iwe wadziwa pambuto pambagona iye, tenepo iye angagona chitulo, kakunundule chakufinika chache mbukagone kumiyendo kwache. Iye anakupanga pyakuti uchite.”" 
Ruth3:5 Rute adatawira mbati, “Ndinati ndichite pyonsene pyandipanga imwe.”" 
Ruth3:6 Natenepo Rute adenda pambuwa mbachita pyonsene pikhadampanga mebzalache pile. 
Ruth3:7 Pidamala Boazi kudya na kumwa adapiva mwadidi m'manungo mwache. Tenepo iye adenda pamulu wakunkhomo wa barele mbagona chitulo. Rute adadza mwakumyamira mbakunundula chakufinika cha Boazi mbagona kumiyendo kwa Boazi ule. 
Ruth3:8 Pachiti-chiti chinthu chinango chidamtutumusa, tenepo iye adazungunuka mbadodoma kugumana kuti mkazi agona kumiyendo kwache." 
Ruth3:9 Tenepo iye adavunza mbati, “Ndiwe ani?” Rute adatawira mbati, “Ndine pano Rute, nyabasanu. Ndifinikizeni chakufinika chanu podi ndimwe mwathema kundipita panyumba, thangwi imwe ndimwe mbale chadi-chadi.”" 
Ruth3:10 Iye adalonga mbati, “MBUYA mbakutsanzayise mkaziwe. Kukoma mtima kweneku nkhukulu pyakwanga kupiringana kudaonesa iwe pakutoma pale kuna mebzalako: Iwe hudatundukire aphale penu anyamfuma na anyakutcherenga tayu." 
Ruth3:11 Chinchino leka swipa mtima. Ine ndinati ndichite pyonsene pyapempha iwe. Anthu onsene muluwani muno akupidziwa kuti iwe ndiwe mkazi wa makhaliro adidi. 
Ruth3:12 Mphyakuona kuti ine ndine mbale chadi-chadi, pontho ndathema kukupita panyumba, Kwache pana mamuna unango ule ndi mbaleathu chadi-chadi kupiringana ine pano." 
Ruth3:13 Thimiza kukhala pano mosiku onsenenewu, tenepo mangwana na machibese tinati tione ngakhala iye anafuna pyakukupita panyumba penu tayu. Ngakhala iye anapifuna kuti pikhale tenepo mphyadidi. Mbwenye ngakhala iye hanapifuna tayu, ine ndinadumbira na dzina ya MBUYA kuti ine ndinati ndikupite panyumba. Tenepo gona pano mpakana machibese.”" 
Ruth3:14 Natenepo iye adagona kweneko kumiyendo kwa Boazi, kwache iye adalamuka kunja mbukudzati chena towera aleke kuoniwa na anthu thangwi Boazi hakhapifuna tayu kuti munthu na mbodzi ene apidziwe kuti Rute adadza pambuwa pachepo." 
Ruth3:15 Boazi adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Dula chakufinika chako mbuchithasike pansi.” Iye adachitadi tenepo, Boazi adakhuthulirapo barele wakukwana ninga makilogramu makumawiri mbamphedza kumthukula paphewa pache. Iye adabwerera muluwani na barele ule." 
Ruth3:16 Pidafika iye kwawo, mebzalache adamvunza mbati, “Mwananga wafambako tani?” Rute adampanga pyonsene pikhadamchitira Boazi." 
Ruth3:17 Iye adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Iye adandipanga kuti ndileke kubwerera kuna imwe chimanja-manja, tenepo andipasa barele onseneyi.”" 
Ruth3:18 Naomi adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Mwananga fulika mpakana uone kuti penepi pinamala tani. Boazi hanakhala pansi tayu mpakana andendemeze pyonsenepi.”" 
Ruth4:1 Boazi adenda kumsuwo wa luwaniyo kumbuto yakugumanikirako mbakhala pansi penepo. Tenepo mbaleache Elimeleki chadi-chadi mamuna akhadalonga Boazi ule, adadza penepo. Tenepo Boazi adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Shamwali ngadza kuno mbukhale pansi.” Tenepo iye adenda mbakakhala pansi." 
Ruth4:2 Boazi adachemeresa akadamu khumi a muluwani mule mbaapempha kuti akhalembo pansi. Pidakhala iwo pansi," 
Ruth4:3 iye adalonga kuna mbaleache Elimeleki ule mbati, “Podi Naomi abwerako kubulukira ku Moabu, iye anafuna kugulisa munda wa mbaleathu Elimeleki." 
Ruth4:4 Ine ndapinyerezera kuti iwe wathema kudziwa penepi. Tenepo ngakhala iwe unafuna kuugula wathema kuugula pamaso pa amuna akhala pansi panowa, pontho pamaso pa akadamu a anthu anga. Mbwenye ngakhala hunapifuna tayu longa, thangwi utongi wakugula munda chakutoma una iwepo, kubuluka penepo ndinembo.” Mamuna ule adalonga mbati, “Ndinati ndiugule.”" 
Ruth4:5 Boazi adalonga mbati, “Mphyadidi, kwache ngakhala unagula mundawo kuna Naomi wathema kugula pontho na Rute ene, mamfelwa wa ku Moabu ule, towera mundawo ukhale m'banja ya defuntu ule.”" 
Ruth4:6 Mamuna ule adatawira mbati, “Ngakhala pili tenepo, ine sinakwanisa kuugula tayu, thangwi ananga nkhabe dzasiyirwa mundawo. Ugule pyako ndiwe, ine sinakwanisa tayu kuugula.”" 
Ruth4:7 Nsiku zenezo kugulisa chinthu penu kuchinjisana chinthu, ukhali mtemo kuna nyakugulisayo kudula nkhwairache mbaipereka kuna nyakugula. Pakuchita tenepo Aisraele akhaonesa kuti mseru wandendemera." 
Ruth4:8 Mamuna ule adalonga kuna Boazi mbati, “Iwe wathema kuugula pyako.” Tenepo iye adadula nkhwairache mbaipereka kuna Boazi." 
Ruth4:9 Tenepo Boazi adalonga kuna akadamu ale na kuna anthu anango onsene penepo mbati, “Monsenene pano ndimwe mboni lero kuti ndagula kuna Naomi pyonsene pya Elimeleki, na pya anache achimuna Kilioni na Mahiloni." 
Ruth4:10 Kuthimiza penepo Rute wa Chimoabu, mamfelwa wa Mahiloni, lero asanduka mkazanga. Penepi pinakoya mfumayo m'banja ya defuntuyo, pontho mbumbache inathimiza kukhalapo pakati pa anthu ache na muluwani mwache; imwe ndimwe mboni lero.”" 
Ruth4:11 Akadamu na anthu anango ale adalonga mbati, “Ande, ndife mboni. MBUYA mbachitise mkazako kukhala ninga Rakele na Lea ale adabalira Yakobo ana azinji. Iwe mbukhale wakufuma m'mbumba ya Efurata pontho wakuveka m'Betelehemu." 
Ruth4:12 Ana anafuna kukupasa MBUYA na mkazi weneyu mbachitise banjako kukhala ninga banja ya Perezi mwana wamamuna wa Yuda na Tamara.” 
Ruth4:13 Tenepo Boazi adakwata Rute kukhala mkazache. MBUYA adamtsanzayisa Rute mbakwata mimba, tenepo adabala mwana wamamuna." 
Ruth4:14 Akazi adalonga kuna Naomi mbati, “MBUYA mbakuzwe! Iye akupasani chidzukulu lero chakuti chikuyang'anireni mwadidi. Mwanayu mbakhale wakuveka mu Israele!" 
Ruth4:15 Mkwenyanu ambakufunani, pontho akuchitirani pikulu kupiringana ana anomwe achimuna. Iye akupasani chidzukulu chile chinadzesa moyo wachinchino kuna imwe, pontho ule anakhala nyakukuphata pamkono na kukalamba kwanu kweneku.”" 
Ruth4:16 Naomi adakwata mwana ule mbamuikha pa miyendo pache mbakhala makayayache. 
Ruth4:17 Atsanthembache achikazi ale adalonga mbati, “Naomi ana mwana wamamuna!” Tenepo mwana ule adamthula Obedi. Kubuluka penepo Obedi adabala Yese. Yese adabalambo Davite." 
Ruth4:18 Yeneyi ikhali mbumba ya Perezi: Perezi adabala Hezironi," 
Ruth4:19 Hezironi adabala Ramu, Ramu adabala Aminadabu," 
Ruth4:20 Aminadabu adabala Nashoni, Nashoni adabala Salimoni," 
Ruth4:21 Salimoni adabala Boazi, Boazi adabala Obedi," 
Ruth4:22 Obedi adabala Yese, Yese adabala Davite." 
1Samuel1:1 Pakhali munthu unango dzinache Elikana wa dzinza ya Eferemu, ule akhakhala muluwani ya Rama m'nthemba ya mapiri ya Eferemu. Iye akhali mwana Yerohamu pontho mdzukuluache Elihu wa m'banja ya Tohu, pontho wa m'mbumba ya Zufu." 
1Samuel1:2 Elikana akhali na akazi awiri Hana na Penina. Penina akhali na ana, mbwenye Hana akhali nkhabe ana." 
1Samuel1:3 Chaka na chaka Elikana akhabuluka ku Rama kwenda ku Shilo kapembedza na kupereka nsembe kuna MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, kule kukhali ana awiri achimuna a Eli, Hofini na Finiasi kuphatira basa MBUYA ninga anyansembe." 
1Samuel1:4 Ndzidzi onsene ukhapereka Elikana nsembe yache, iye akhapereka khundu ibodzi ya nyama kuna Penina, khundu inangomboyo akhaipereka kuna ana a Penina onsene ale." 
1Samuel1:5 Podi kwene kuti iye akhamfuna pikulu Hana, iye akhampasa khundu ibodzi ene basi, thangwi MBUYA adamchitisa kuuma nthumbo." 
1Samuel1:6 Penina nyakumsedegula ule akhamsingirira Hana mbamululupisa thangwi MBUYA adamchitisa kuuma nthumbo. 
1Samuel1:7 Penina adathimiza kuchita tenepo chaka na chaka; ndzidzi onsene ukhaenda iwo ku Nyumba ya Mulungu, Penina akhamsingirira pyakwanga Hana mwakuti iye akhalira mbakhonda kudya na chinthu chene." 
1Samuel1:8 Mamunache Elikana akhamvunza mbati, “Hana, watani unalira? Watani unakhonda kudya? Watani unatsukwala ndzidzi onsene? Kadi ine kuna iwe si ine wakufunika pikulu tayu kupiringana ana khumi achimuna?”" 
1Samuel1:9 Nsiku inango pikhadamalisa iwo kudya m'Nyumba ya Mulungu ku Shilo, Hana adalamuka. Iye akhasanyika pyakwanga mumtima mwache, tenepo adalira pikulu pene pikhapemphera iye kuna MBUYA. Ndzidzi wenewu Eli, nyansembe ule akhakhala pambuto pache chifupi na msuwo wa Nyumba ya MBUYA." 
1Samuel1:10  
1Samuel1:11 Hana adadumbira pikulu pene mbati, “MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, ndionenimbo ine, nyabasanu! Yang'anani nyatwa zanga mbamundikumbuke. Lekani duwalira nyabasanu. Ngakhala munandipasa mwana ndinadumbira kuti ndinampambulira kuna imwe moyo wache onsene, pontho kuti iye hanachingwa tsisi yache tayu.”" 
1Samuel1:12 Hana adathimiza kupemphera kuna MBUYA ndzidzi ukulu ene, Eli akhayang'ana mulomo wache." 
1Samuel1:13 Iye akhapemphera chibwalo-bwalo uku milomo yache mbiyapula mbakhonda bulusa fala. Tenepo Eli adanyerezera kuti iye akhadaledzera 
1Samuel1:14 mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ayi unakhala wakuledzera kufikirana lini? Leka kumwa vinyuyo.”" 
1Samuel1:15 Iye adatawira mbati, “Ine sidaledzere tayu, mbuyanga. Ine sidamwe vinyu penu bwadwa tayu. Ine ndine pyache mkazi wakusanyika mumtima, pontho pano ndikupemphera kutula nyatwa zanga kuna MBUYA." 
1Samuel1:16 Lekani nyerezera kuti ndine mkazi wakuipa. Ine ndikhapemphera ninga tenepa thangwi ndine wakutsukwala, pontho wakusanyika pyakwanga mumtima.”" 
1Samuel1:17 Eli adatawira mbati, “Ndoko na mtendere, pontho Mulungu wa Israele mbakupase pyampempha iwepyo.”" 
1Samuel1:18 Hana adalonga mbati, “Nyabasanu mbagumane kukoma mtima pamaso panu.” Tenepo adenda pyache, iye adadya na kumwa mbakhonda tsukwala pontho." 
1Samuel1:19 Bzobzo mangwana mwache Elikana na banjache adalamuka, tenepo pidamala iwo kupembedza pamaso pa MBUYA, adabwerera kwawo ku Rama. Elikana adapita m'bonde na Hana mkazache, tenepo MBUYA adava kupemphera kwache." 
1Samuel1:20 Tenepo iye adakwata mimba mbabala mwana wamamuna mbamthula Samuele. Iye adalonga mbati, “Ine ndidachita kumpempha kuna MBUYA.”" 
1Samuel1:21 Ndzidzi udafika pontho wakuti Elikana na banjache aende ku Shilo kapereka nsembe ya chaka na chaka kuna MBUYA pontho nsembe yakupambulika idadumbira iye ile. 
1Samuel1:22 Ndzidzi wenewu Hana hadendeko tayu. Iye adalonga kuna mamunache mbati, “Sindzidzi mwanayi nkhuleka bele ndinati ndiende naye ku Nyumba ya MBUYA, kunafuna kakhala iye moyo wache onsene kule.”" 
1Samuel1:23 Elikana adatawira mbati, “Chita pyonsene pinaona iwe kuti mphyakuthema kuna iwepyo; khala pyako kuno kufikirana mwanayo aleka bele. MBUYA mbachitise kudumbira kwako kukwana-kwana.” Tenepo Hana adakhala pyache kumusa mbamyamwisa mwanache mpakana adaleka bele." 
1Samuel1:24 Pidamulekesa iye bele, adamkwata mbaenda naye ku Nyumba ya MBUYA ku Shilo podi kwene kuti akhali wamng'ono pyakwanga. Iye adakwata pontho ng'ombe imuna ya pyaka pitatu, ufa wakulemera makilogramu khumi, pontho na budu ya nthembe yakudzala na vinyu mbaenda naye." 
1Samuel1:25 Pidamala iwo cheka ng'ombe ile, adenda na mwana ule kuna Eli" 
1Samuel1:26 mbalonga mbati, “Dikhirani pang'ono, mbuyanga. Ayi mukukumbuka kuti ndine mkazi adaimira pamaso panu ule, kupemphera kuna MBUYA?" 
1Samuel1:27 Ine ndidampempha mwanayu, tenepo iye adandipasa chidampempha ine chile." 
1Samuel1:28 Natenepo ndikumpambulira kuna MBUYA. Ndzidzi onsene wa moyo wache anakhala wa MBUYA.” Penepo iwo adapembedza MBUYA. 
1Samuel2:1 Hana adapemphera mbati, “MBUYA adzaza mtimanga na kukomerwa; ndakomerwa pyakwanga thangwi ya pinthu pyachita iye! Mulomo wanga ukugaya pana anyamalwanga; ndakomerwa pyakwanga na kundipulumusa kwachita Mulungu!" 
1Samuel2:2 “Nkhabe unango wakuchena ninga MBUYA; nkhabe unango ninga iye tayu, nkhabe Phanzwi inango ninga Mulungu wathu tayu." 
1Samuel2:3 Lekani kulonga mwakulunkuma kunachita imweko; matamisani milomo yanu yakugayayo. Thangwi MBUYA ndi Mulungu ule ambadziwa, pontho iye ambatonga pyonsene pimbachita anthu pile." 
1Samuel2:4 Mauta a anyankhondo amphamvu amala tchoka-tchoka, mbwenye anyakusowa mphamvu apaswa mphamvu." 
1Samuel2:5 Anthu akhakhuta ale, lero akuchita ganyo towera agumane phoso, mbwenye anyakukhala na njala akhuta. Mkazi wakuuma nthumbo ule, lero abala ana anomwe, mbwenye mama wa ana azinji ule, lero akukhumata." 
1Samuel2:6 MBUYA ambapha mbabwezera pontho moyo; iye ambagwinya anthu kudziko ya anyakufa mbaabwezako pontho. 
1Samuel2:7 Iye ambachitisa anthu anango kukhala akutcherenga, anango mbaachitisa kukhala akufuma; iye ambachepesa anango, anangombo iye ambaakuza." 
1Samuel2:8 Iye ambalamusa anyakutcherenga kufumbi mbabulusa anyakusowa pamulu wa dotha. Iye ambaachitisa kukhala pabodzi na mafumu mbaapasa mpando wachilemedzo. Maziko a dziko yapansi nga MBUYA; penepo iye amangapo dziko yonsene yapansi. 
1Samuel2:9 “Iye ambayang'anira mwadidi moyo wa anthu ache akukhulupirika, mbwenye anyakudawika ambamaliratu mumdima; si mphamvu zache zene munthu zimbamchitisa kukunda tayu." 
1Samuel2:10 Anyamalwa a MBUYA ananyedzwa-nyedzwa; iye anagwisa chiphaliwali pana iwo kubulukira kudzulu. MBUYA anatonga mseru anthu a dziko yonsene yapansi; iye anapereka mphamvu kuna mfumu wache mbachitisa mfumu wache wakusankhulika kukunda.” 
1Samuel2:11 Tenepo Elikana adabwerera kwawo ku Rama, mbwenye mwana Samuele adasalira ku Shilo mbatumikira MBUYA pansi pa Eli nyansembe." 
1Samuel2:12 Ana achimuna a Eli akhali akudawika mbakhonda tsalakana pya MBUYA," 
1Samuel2:13 penu matongero ache akulonga pya pinthu pidathema anyansembe kutambira kuna anthu. M'mbuto mwache munthu angapereka nsembe nyabasa wa anyansembe akhadza na chakujobolera nyama chakukhala na nsonga zitatu. Mwenemo nyama ikuterekwa, iye" 
1Samuel2:14 akhapitisa chakujoboleracho m'phale, m'chiwaya penu m'chikalango, tenepo chinthu chonsene chikhajobolwacho chikhali cha nyansembe. Aisraele onsene ale akhadza ku Shilo dzapereka nsembe akhachitwambo basi ninga tenepo." 
1Samuel2:15 Pontho mafuta mbadzati otchiwa, nyabasa wa nyansembe akhadza kuna munthu anapereka nsembe ule mbalonga mbati, “Ngandipaseni kuno nyama kuti nyansembe aiotche; iye nkhabe tawira nyama yakutereka tayu mbwenye iwisi ene basi.”" 
1Samuel2:16 Ngakhala munthuyo anatawira mbati, “Chakutoma aotche mafutawa, kubuluka penepo munakwata pyanu pyonsene pinafunikapyo.” Nyabasa wa nyansembeyo akhalonga mbati, “Tayu, ndipase chinchino pano. Mungakhonda kuipereka ndinati ndiikwate mwakukhakhamiza.”" 
1Samuel2:17 Kudawa kwa ana a Eli kukhali kwakuipa pyakwanga pamaso pa MBUYA, thangwi iwo akhalulupisa nsembe ya MBUYA." 
1Samuel2:18 Pandzidzi wenewo mphale Samuele adathimiza kutumikira MBUYA uku avala efodi wa nguwo yakuchena. 
1Samuel2:19 Chaka na chaka mache akhamsasanyira mkhanjo kampasa pikhaenda iye pabodzi pene na mamunache kapereka nsembe ya chaka na chaka.
