1Samuel2:20 Penepo Eli akhatsanzayisa Elikana na mkazache mbalonga kuna Elikana mbati, “MBUYA mbakupase ana anango na mkazi weneyu, towera akwate mbuto ya mwana apambulira iwe kuna MBUYA.” Kubuluka penepo iwo akhabwerera kwawo." 
1Samuel2:21 MBUYA adatsanzayisadi Hana, tenepo iye adabala ana anango achimuna atatu na achikazi awiri. Mphale Samuele adakula akuphatira basa MBUYA." 
1Samuel2:22 Ndzidzi wenewu Eli adakalamba pyakwanga. Iye akhava basi pikhachita anache kuna Aisraele pontho kuti akhachita pyauputa na akazi akuphata basa pamsuwo wa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu chile. 
1Samuel2:23 Tenepo iye adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ayi munachitiranji pinthu ninga penepi? Munthu onsene akundipanga pyakuipa pinachita imwepi." 
1Samuel2:24 Ananga, lekani pinachita imwepi. Mbiri inaveka pakati pa anthu a MBUYA si yadidi tayu." 
1Samuel2:25 Ngakhala munthu adawira mwanzache Mulungu anakwanisa kumuikhira kunduli; apo mbani anakwanisa kuikhira kunduli munthu wakudawira MBUYA?” Kwache iwo hadavesere babawo tayu, thangwi MBUYA adanyerezera pyakuapha." 
1Samuel2:26 Mphale Samuele adathimiza kukula na makhaliro akukomera MBUYA na anthu ene. 
1Samuel2:27 Mprofeti adadza kuna Eli na mphangwa zakubulukira kuna MBUYA mbati, “Pikhali kholo yako Aroni na banjache mabitchu a mfumu wa ku Iguputo, ine ndidapionesera ndekha ene kuna Aroni." 
1Samuel2:28 Ine ndidasankhula makolo ako pakati pa madzinza khumi na awiri a Israele kukhala nyansembe wanga kuti andiphatire basa paguwa yansembe, kupyereza pyakufukiza pyakununkhira, pontho kuvala efodi pamaso panga. Inembo ndidaapasa utongi kukwata khundu inango ya nsembe zidapyereza Aisraele zile." 
1Samuel2:29 Thangwi ninji munalulupisa nsembe na pyakupereka pidatonga ine kuti anthu anga andipase? Thangwi ninji iwe Eli ukulemedza anako piringana ine pakuatawirisa kupinenepesa okha ene na khundu zadidiletu za nsembe zonsene zinapereka anthu anga kuna inezi? 
1Samuel2:30 Ine, MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele, ndidadumbira m'nduli mule kuti banjako na mbumbako munanditumikira ninga anyansembe ndzidzi onsene. Mbwenye chinchino ndikulonga kuti ine nkhabeve napyo pinthu tayu. M'mbuto mwache ine ndinalemedza anyakundilemedzambo, pontho ndinalulupisa anyakundilulupisa onsene." 
1Samuel2:31 Ndzidzi ukudza unafuna ine dzapha aphale onsene m'banja mwako, pontho na m'mbumba mwako, towera paleke khala mwana na mbodzi ene m'banja mwako wakukhala na moyo mpakana kukalamba tayu." 
1Samuel2:32 Iwe unaipirwa na mtsanzayiso onsene unafuna ine dzaupereka kuna anthu anga anango onsene mu Israele, kwache nkhabe na mbodzi ene m'banja mwako anakhala na moyo mpakana kukalamba tayu." 
1Samuel2:33 Kwache ndingakoya na moyo chidzukulu chako chibodzi, iye anakhala nyansembe wanga, mbwenye iye anasanduka boli-boli thangwi ya kulira mbatayiratu chidikhiro chache chonsene, pontho pidzukulu pyache pyonsene pinaphiwa na talasada." 
1Samuel2:34 Anako awiri achimuna ale, Hofini na Finiasi, angafa pansiku ibodzi ene, penepi pinakuonesa kuti pyonsene pyalonga ine pinakwana-kwana." 
1Samuel2:35 Ndinasankhula nyansembe ule anakhala wakukhulupirika kuna ine mbachita pyonsene pinafuna ine kuti apichite pile. Ine ndinampasa pidzukulu, pile ndzidzi onsene pinatumikira pamaso pa mfumu wanga wakusankhulika." 
1Samuel2:36 Chidzukulu chako chonsene chile chinasala na moyo chathema dzaenda kuna nyansembe mbakapempha kobiri na phoso, pontho kuti amtawirise kuphedza nyansembe, towera akwanise kugumana chinthu chakuti adye.”" 
1Samuel3:1 Nsiku zenezo pikhatumikira mphale Samuele pamaso pa MBUYA pansi pa Eli, pakhali mphangwa zakuchepa za MBUYA pontho pakhali nkhabe masomphenya azinji tayu." 
1Samuel3:2 Mosiku unango Eli ule chinchino maso ache akhachita nkhunguwisi akhagona kusubi kwache; 
1Samuel3:3 Samuele akhagonambo m'Nyumba ya MBUYA mukhali Bokosi ya Chiverano mule. Makalakwecha mbadzati fika, mwenemo nyale ikugaka," 
1Samuel3:4 MBUYA adachemera Samuele. Tenepo Samuele adatawira mbati, “Ndawo, ndili pano!”" 
1Samuel3:5 Iye adathamangira kukhali Eli kule mbalonga mbati, “Imwe mudandichemera, tenepo ndadza.” Mbwenye Eli adalonga mbati, “Ine sidakuchemere tayu, bwerera pyako ukagone.” Tenepo Samuele adenda mbakagona pyache." 
1Samuel3:6 MBUYA adachemera pontho Samuele. Tenepo Samuele adalamuka mbaenda kukhali Eli kule mbalonga mbati, “Imwe mudandichemera, tenepo ndadza.” Eli adatawira mbati, “Mwananga ine sidakuchemere tayu, bwerera pyako ukagone.”" 
1Samuel3:7 Ndzidzi wenewu Samuele akhadadzati kumdziwa MBUYA tayu, thangwi MBUYA akhadadzati longa naye tayu." 
1Samuel3:8 MBUYA adamchemera pontho kachitatu kache. Tenepo Samuele adalamuka mbaenda kukhali Eli kule mbalonga mbati, “Imwe mudandichemera, tenepo ndadza.” Penepo Eli adadzindikira kuti MBUYA ndiye akhamchemera mphale ule." 
1Samuel3:9 Tenepo iye adalonga mbati, “Ndoko pyako ukagone, ngakhala anakuchemera pontho kalonge kuti, ‘Longani, MBUYA, nyabasanu akuvesera.’ ” Tenepo Samuele adenda mbakagona pyache." 
1Samuel3:10 MBUYA adadza mbaimira penepo mbachemera ninga pakutoma pale mbati, “Samuele, Samuele!” Samuele adatawira mbati, “Longani nyabasanu akuvesera.”" 
1Samuel3:11 MBUYA adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Yang'ana, ndinafuna ndichite chinthu chakugoswa pyakwanga pene kuna Aisraele mwakuti munthu onsene anachivayo anatutumuka nacho." 
1Samuel3:12 Pansiku yeneyo ndinachita pyakugoswa pyanga pyonsene pidalonga ine kuna banja ya Eli kutomera pakutoma mpakana pakumalisa. 
1Samuel3:13 Ine ndampanga kale kuti ndinati nditchunyuse banjache kwenda na kwenda, thangwi anache achimuna andishola. Eli akhapidziwa kuti iwo akhachita penepi, mbwenye iye hadafune kuasumulula tayu." 
1Samuel3:14 Natenepo ndinadumbira pikulu pene kuna banja ya Eli kuti na kutani kwene iwo nkhabeve dzalekererwa tayu na nsembe penu pyakupereka, thangwi ya kudawa kwawo.”" 
1Samuel3:15 Samuele adagona patalimba mpakana machibese; tenepo adalamuka mbafungula misuwo ya Nyumba ya MBUYA. Iye akhachita mantha pyakwanga kupanga Eli pya masomphenya ale. 
1Samuel3:16 Eli adamchemera mbati, “Samuele mwananga!” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ndawo, ndili pano.”" 
1Samuel3:17 Eli adamvunza mbati, “MBUYA akupanganji? Leka kundibisira na chibodzi chene, thangwi Mulungu anakutchunyusa pikulu pene ngakhala unandibisira pyonsene pyakupanga iye.”" 
1Samuel3:18 Tenepo Samuele adampanga pyonsene pidampanga MBUYA pile; iye hadabise chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu. Eli adalonga mbati, “Iye ndi MBUYA; mbachite pyonsene pinaona iye kuti mphyakuthema pamaso pache.”" 
1Samuel3:19 Pikhakula Samuele MBUYA akhakhala naye mbachitisa kukwana-kwana pyonsene pidalonga Samuele. 
1Samuel3:20 Tenepo Aisraele onsene kubulukira nkhomo mpakana nkhomo inango ya dziko adapidziwa kuti Samuele akhalidi mprofeti wa MBUYA. 
1Samuel3:21 MBUYA adathimiza kupitchulula yekha ene kuna Samuele ku Shilo kukhadaoneka iye kuna Samuele, pontho mbalonga naye kule. Natenepo ndzidzi ukhalonga Samuele, Aisraele onsene akhavesera." 
1Samuel4:1 Pandzidzi wenewo Afilisti adagumanyikana kamenya nkhondo na Aisraele, tenepo Aisraele adenda kamenyana nawo. Iwo adamanga msasawo pa Ebenezeri, Afilisti adamangambo msasawo pa Afeki." 
1Samuel4:2 Afilisti adenda kasosa, tenepo pakumala nkhondo yakugoswa iwo adakunda Aisraele mbapha amuna pikwi pinayi kuthando yankhondo." 
1Samuel4:3 Anyakusalira kukhonda phiwa kunkhondo ale adabwerera kumsasa, tenepo akadamu a Aisraele adalonga mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji MBUYA atawirisa Afilisti kutikunda lero? Tendeni tikwate Bokosi ya Chiverano ku Shilo, towera MBUYA aende nafe pabodzi pene, pontho kuti atipulumuse kuna anyamalwathu.”" 
1Samuel4:4 Natenepo iwo adatuma anthu kwenda ku Shilo mbakwata Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ule akhala pakati pa pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido. Ana awiri achimuna a Eli, Hofini na Finiasi adadza pabodzi pene na Bokosi ya Chiverano ile." 
1Samuel4:5 Pidafika Bokosi ya Chiverano kumsasako, Aisraele onsene adakhuwa pyakwanga mwakukomerwa mwakuti dziko idatekenyeka." 
1Samuel4:6 Afilisti adava kukhuwa kweneku mbalonga mbati, “Veserani kukhuwa konsene kunaveka kumsasa wa Aheberi! Penepi pikufuna kulonganji?” Pidapidziwa iwo kuti Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA ikhadafika kumsasa wa Aheberi," 
1Samuel4:7 iwo adachita mantha mbalonga mbati, “Milungu yatchitha kumsasa kwawo! Ife takundwa. Chipo chinthu ninga chenechi nee chidzati chachitika kuna ife tayu." 
1Samuel4:8 Mbani anakwanisa kutipulumusa m'manja mwa milungu ya mphamvuyi? Milungu yache njontho ile idacheka anthu a ku Iguputo m'thando yatchetcha mule. 
1Samuel4:9 Wangani mtima, Afilisti! Chitani chamuna, gopesera tinakhala mabitchu a Aheberi, ninga montho mukhali iwo mabitchu athu. Tenepo menyani nkhondo ninga amuna.”" 
1Samuel4:10 Afilisti adawangisa kumenya nkhondo mbakunda Aisraele ale adabwerera kwawo akuthamanga. Anthu adafa azinji ene; anyankhondo pikwi makumatatu adaphiwa. 
1Samuel4:11 Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA idapokoserwa, pontho ana awiri achimuna a Eli, Hofini na Finiasi adaphiwa." 
1Samuel4:12 Pansiku yontho-yonthoyo mamuna unango wa dzinza ya Benjemani adabuluka kumbuto yakumenyera nkhondo mbaenda ku Shilo uku nguwo zache zang'ambika, pontho fumbi mumsolo mwache kuonesa kutsukwala." 
1Samuel4:13 Pidafika iye, Eli akhakhala pampando chifupi na njira maso mbali kunjira, thangwi iye akhaswipa mtima na Bokosi ya Chiverano ile. Munthu ule adavekesa muluwani monsene mule pinthu pidachitika pile, natenepo munthu onsene adakalala na mantha." 
1Samuel4:14 Eli adava chiliro chile mbavunza mbati, “Chiliro chonsenechi ntchanji nacho?” Munthu ule adathamangira kuna Eli mbampanga pyonsene pidachitika pile." 
1Samuel4:15 Eli akhali na pyaka makumafemba na pisere, pontho iye adasanduka zimola." 
1Samuel4:16 Munthu ule adalonga mbati, “Ine ndathawa kunkhondo mbandifika kuno lero ene pano.” Eli adamvunza mbati, “Chachitika ninji mwananga?”" 
1Samuel4:17 Munthu ule adatawira mbati, “Aisraele adathawa Afilisti, pontho takundwa pyakwanga pene. Padzulu pache ananu achimuna Hofini na Finiasi aphiwa, pontho Bokosi ya Chiverano ya Mulungu yapokoserwa!”" 
1Samuel4:18 Pidathula munthu ule Bokosi ya Chiverano, Eli adagwa namadede kubulukira pa mpando padakhala iye pale chifupi na msuwo wa mpanda. Iye akhali wakukalamba pontho wakukula manungo mwakuti adatchoka khosi mbafa. Iye akhali mtongi wa Israele pyaka makumanayi." 
1Samuel4:19 Mkwenyache, mkazi mwanache Finiasi akhali na mimba mbasala chifupi kubala. Tenepo pidava iye kuti Bokosi ya Chiverano ya Mulungu yapokoserwa, pontho kuti tebzalache na mamunache ene afa, iye adakhukhunyika mbabala." 
1Samuel4:20 Pikhafa iye nyakumbazika ule adalonga mbati, “Wangisa! Wabala mwana wamamuna!” Mbwenye iye hadapiikhe konta tayu mbakhonda pyache kutawira." 
1Samuel4:21 Iye adamthula mwana ule Ikabodi kulonga kuti, “Demelero ya Mulungu yabuluka pakati pa Aisraele!” thangwi kupokoserwa kwa Bokosi ya Chiverano ya Mulungu, kufa kwa tebzalache, pontho na mamunache." 
1Samuel4:22 Iye adalonga mbati, “Demelero ya Mulungu yabuluka pakati pa Aisraele, thangwi ya kupokoserwa kwa Bokosi ya Chiverano ya Mulungu.”" 
1Samuel5:1 Pidapokosera Afilisti Bokosi ya Chiverano ya Mulungu, adaithukula kubuluka nayo ku Ebenezeri mbaenda nayo kumzinda wa Ashidodi," 
1Samuel5:2 mbaiikha m'nyumba yakupembedzeramo Dagoni, milungu yawo, chifupi na mfanikizo wache." 
1Samuel5:3 Mangwana mwache na machibese anthu a ku Ashidodi adaona kuti dzimunthu wa Dagoni ule agwa nafufumimba kutsogolo kwa Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA. Tenepo iwo adachilamusa mbachiikha pambuto pache pontho pale. 
1Samuel5:4 Mkuchono mwache na machibese iwo adaona pontho dzimunthu ule agwa kutsogolo kwa Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA. Msolo wache na manjache pidatchoka mbapikhala gwenjere kumsuwo; manungo ache ene basi ndiye adasalira. 
1Samuel5:5 Ndi thangwi yache podi na lero ene anyansembe a Dagoni na anyakumpembedzache onsene a mu Ashidodi ambanumpha mbuto yeneyo mbakhonda pondapo. 
1Samuel5:6 MBUYA adatchunyusa anthu a ku Ashidodi na atsanthembawo ene pikulu pene mbaaonesa nyatwa zikulu na mabuka m'manungo mwawo, thangwi ya utenda wa matchiru." 
1Samuel5:7 Pidaona iwo pinthu pikhachitika pile, iwo adalonga mbati, “Mulungu wa Israele akutitchunyusa ife na Dagoni ene, milungu yathu. Ife nkhabe thema koyave Bokosi ya Chiverano ya Mulungu wa Israele tayu.”" 
1Samuel5:8 Tenepo adachemeresa mafumu onsene mashanu a Afilisti pabodzi pene mbavunza mbati, “Tichitenji na Bokosi ya Chiverano ya Mulungu wa Israeleyi?” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Bokosi ya Chiveranoyi yathema kwenda ku Gati.” Penepo iwo adenda na Bokosi ya Chiverano ile ku Gati." 
1Samuel5:9 Mbwenye pidafika Bokosi ya Chiverano kweneko, MBUYA adatchunyusa mzindawo mbauchitisa kukhala pampani-pani. Iye adasanyisa anthu a mumzindawo, ana na akulu ene, na mabuka m'manungo mwawo." 
1Samuel5:10 Tenepo iwo adendesa Bokosi ya Chiverano ile ku Ekroni mzinda unango wa Afilisti, mbwenye pidafika iyo kweneko anthu adakalala mbalonga mbati, “Iwo adadza na Bokosi ya Chiverano ya Mulungu wa Israele kuno kufuna kutipha tonsenefe.”" 
1Samuel5:11 Iwo adachemeresa pontho pabodzi pene mafumu onsene a Afilisti mbalonga mbati, “Bwezerani Bokosi ya Chiverano ya Mulungu wa Israele kwawo, towera tikhonde phiwa ife na mabanjathu ene.” Anthu akhali pampani-pani mumzinda monsenemo, thangwi MBUYA akhaatchunyusa pikulu pene." 
1Samuel5:12 Anthu ale hadafe tayu adasanyika na mabuka m'manungo mwawo. Tenepo anthu adalira kuna milungu yawo kuti iaphedze. 
1Samuel6:1 Pidamala Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA miyezi minomwe m'dziko ya Afilisti," 
1Samuel6:2 anthu adachemeresa anyansembe na anyamatsenga mbaavunza mbati, “Tichitenji nayo Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA? Ngakhala tinafuna pyakuibwezera kwawo, tinaitumiza nanji?”" 
1Samuel6:3 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Ngakhala munabwezera kwawo Bokosi ya Chiverano ya Mulungu wa Israele imwe nee mwathema kuitumiza chimanja-manja tayu, mbwenye mwathema kuitumiza na mtukwa wakupagali pyakudawa pyanu. Penepo imwe munawangiswa pontho munadziwa thangwi ikhakutchunyusirani iye ninga tenepa.”" 
1Samuel6:4 Anthu adavunza mbati, “Mtukwache unafuna ife kumtumizira ngwanji?” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Mifanikizo mishanu ya mabuka pontho matchiru mashanu pyagolidi kada mfumu onsene a Afilisti, thangwi muliri wenewu udagwiswa kuna monsenene pontho na kuna mafumu monsenene mashanu." 
1Samuel6:5 Imwe mwathema kusasanya mifanikizo ya mabuka pontho matchiru imbavunga dziko yanu ile, pontho imwe mwathema kupereka chilemedzo kuna Mulungu wa Israele. Mwinango iye analeka kukutchunyusani, imwe na milungu yanu, pontho na dziko yanu." 
1Samuel6:6 Mwatani munaumisa mtima ninga mfumu wa ku Iguputo na anthu ache? Lekani duwalira mudaapupwisira Mulungu kufikirana adatawirisa Aisraele kubuluka mu Iguputo. 
1Samuel6:7 Tenepo kwatani chingolo chitswa na ng'ombe ziwiri zamkaka zile chipo zidzati kweya chingolo tayu. Mangirirani ng'ombezo kuchingolocho, abuluseni anawo kubwerera nawo kuthanga." 
1Samuel6:8 Kwatani Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA mbamuikwizike m'chingolomo, pontho ikhani bokosi inango pakhundu mbamuikhamo mifanikizo yagolidi inatumiza imwe kuna iye ninga mtukwa kupagali pyakudawa pyanu. Gwinyani chingolocho mbamuchileke chifambe chokha chene." 
1Samuel6:9 Tenepo chiyang'aneni, ngakhala icho chinaendera kuluwani ya Beti-Shemeshi penepo ndiye kuti Mulungu wa Israele ndiye adagwisa nyatwa yakugoswayi pana ife. Mbwenye ngakhala nee chinaenda kweneko tayu penepo ife tinapidziwa kuti si iye adagwisa muliri wenewu tayu, pidalira kwene chitika kuna ife mwasusudewu.”" 
1Samuel6:10 Iwo adachita pidapangwa iwo pile. Tenepo adakwata ng'ombe ziwiri zamkaka mbazimangirira pachingolocho mbabweza anawo, tenepo adaafungira m'thanga." 
1Samuel6:11 Iwo adakwizika Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA m'chingolomo pabodzi pene na bokosi mukhali mifanikizo yagolidi ya mabuka na matchiru ile. 
1Samuel6:12 Ng'ombezo zidatoma kwendera kunjira ya ku Beti-Shemeshi mbazienderatu kweneko okhonda bauka. Ng'ombezo zikhaenda mbazilira njira yonsene. Mafumu mashanu a Chifilisti adazitewera m'nduli mwazo mpakana kumadire a Beti-Shemeshi. 
1Samuel6:13 Anthu a ku Beti-Shemeshi akhavuna tirigu wawo paphedi. Tenepo pidakwiza iwo maso adaona Bokosi ya Chiverano mbakomerwa pyakwanga na pidaiona iwo. 
1Samuel6:14 Chingolo chile chidafika m'munda mwa munthu unango dzinache Yoswa wa kuluwani ya Beti-Shemeshi mbichiimira chifupi na mwala ukulu. Anthu adapandula-pandula chingolo chile mbapereka nsembe yakupyerera ng'ombe zile kuna MBUYA. 
1Samuel6:15 Alevi adatchithisa Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA pabodzi pene na bokosi muna mifanikizo yagolidi ile mbaiikhazika pamwala ukulu. Tenepo anthu a ku Beti-Shemeshi adapereka nsembe zakupyerera na pyakupereka pinango kuna MBUYA. 
1Samuel6:16 Mafumu mashanu a Chifilisti ale akhayang'ana ndzidzi ukhachita iwo pyonsenepi. Tenepo pidamala iwo kuchita penepi adabwerera kwawo nsiku yonthoyo. 
1Samuel6:17 Afilisti adatumiza kuna MBUYA mifanikizo mishanu ya mabuka yagolidi ninga mtukwa wakupagali pyakudawa pyawo, kuimirira mizinda ya Ashidodi, Gaza, Ashikeloni, Gati na Ekroni." 
1Samuel6:18 Iwo adatumiza pontho mifanikizo mishanu ya matchiru yagolidi kuimirira mizinda mishanu yakutongwa na mafumu mashanu, pontho maluwani akutchingwa na mpanda pabodzi pene na akusowa mpanda. Mwala ukulu m'munda mwa Yoswa munthu wa kuluwani ya Beti-Shemeshi padakhazikwa Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA pale, ulimo basi na lero ninga umboni wa pinthu pidachitika pile." 
1Samuel6:19 Mbwenye MBUYA adapha anthu makumanomwe a ku Beti-Shemeshi, thangwi adafungula Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA mbasuzumira m'bwalo mwache. Tenepo anthu adasintili, thangwi ya shoko yamphamvu ya MBUYA pana iwo." 
1Samuel6:20 Tenepo amuna a ku Beti-Shemeshi adavunza mbati, “Mbani anakwanisa kuimira pamaso pa MBUYA, Mulungu Wakuchenayu? Nkhwa ani pontho kunafuna kwenda Bokosi ya Chiverano kubulukira kuna ife?”" 
1Samuel6:21 Iwo adatuma anyamphangwa kwenda kuna anthu a ku Kiriati-Yearimu kalonga mbati, “Afilisti abwezera Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA. Tendeni mukaikwate.”" 
1Samuel7:1 Tenepo anthu a ku Kiriati-Yearimu adenda kakwata Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA mbaenda nayo kunyumba ya munthu unango dzinache Abinadabu, akhakhala m'mapiri ule. Iwo adapambulira mwanache wamamuna Eleazara kuiyang'anira." 
1Samuel7:2 Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA idakhala ku Kiriati-Yearimu ndzidzi ukulu ene ninga pyaka makumawiri, tenepo Aisraele onsene adalira kuna MBUYA kuti aaphedze." 
1Samuel7:3 Samuele adalonga kuna Aisraele mbati, “Ngakhala munazungunukira kuna MBUYA na mtimanu onsene, imwe mwathema kubulusa milungu yachilendo yonsene na adzimunthu a milungu Asitarite. Pipambuleni mwekha ene monsene mwene kuna MBUYA mbamupembedze iye ene basi, tenepo anakupulumusani m'manja mwa Afilisti.”" 
1Samuel7:4 Natenepo Aisraele adabulusa mifanikizo ya milungu Baala na Asitarite mbapembedza MBUYA yekha basi. 
1Samuel7:5 Tenepo Samuele adalonga kuna Aisraele mbati, “Gumanyikanani pa Mizipa tenepo ine ndinakupemphererani kuna MBUYA.”" 
1Samuel7:6 Pidamala iwo gumanyikana pa Mizipa, iwo adatunga madzi mbaakhuthula pamaso pa MBUYA, pontho iwo adapimana kudya nsiku yonseneyo. Iwo adalonga mbati, “Ife tadawira MBUYA.” Mpha Mizipa padasanduka Samuele kukhala mtongi wa Israele." 
1Samuel7:7 Pidava Afilisti kuti Aisraele akhadagumanyikana pa Mizipa, mafumu mashanu a Chifilisti adenda kweneko kaasosa. Aisraele adapiva mbachita mantha," 
1Samuel7:8 tenepo adalonga kuna Samuele mbati, “Thimiza kupemphera kuna MBUYA Mulungu wathu kuti atipulumuse m'manja mwa Afilisti.”" 
1Samuel7:9 Samuele adapha mwanabira mbampereka wamumphu nsembe yakupyerera kuna MBUYA mbapemphera kuna MBUYA kuti aphedze Aisraele. MBUYA adava kupemphera kwache. 
1Samuel7:10 Pikhapereka Samuele nsembe zakupyerera, Afilisti adadza dzasosa Aisraele; mbwenye penepo pene MBUYA adaguma m'chiphaliwali mbaikha Afilisti pampani-pani mwakuti adathawa pamaso pa Aisraele." 
1Samuel7:11 Aisraele adabuluka pa Mizipa mbathamangisa Afilisti mpakana ku Beti-Kari mbaapha na njira yonseneyo. 
1Samuel7:12 Tenepo Samuele adakwata mwala mbauimirisa pakati pa Mizipa na Sheni mbathula mwalawo Ebenezeri mbalonga mbati, “MBUYA atiphedza njira yonseneyi.”" 
1Samuel7:13 Natenepo Afilisti adakundwa, MBUYA mbaachitisa kuti aleke pokosera dziko ya Israele ndzidzi onsene ukhali Samuele na moyo." 
1Samuel7:14 Mizinda yonsene ikhadapokosera Afilisti pakati pa Ekroni na Gati idabwerera kuna Israele. Tenepo Aisraele adakwata nthembawo yonsene, pontho pakhali mtendere pakati pa Aisraele na Akanani." 
1Samuel7:15 Samuele akhali mtongi wa Israele ndzidzi onsene ukhali iye na moyo. 
1Samuel7:16 Chaka na chaka iye akhaenda mbazungulira Betele, Giligala na Mizipa kutonga miseru ya Aisraele m'mbuto zonsenezi." 
1Samuel7:17 Kubuluka penepo iye akhabwerera kwawo ku Rama, pontho kukhaphata iye basa yakutonga miseru kule. Kweneko iye adamangira MBUYA guwa yansembe." 
1Samuel8:1 Pidakalamba Samuele, iye adasankhula anache achimuna kukhala atongi mu Israele." 
1Samuel8:2 Mwanache wautombo akhali Yowele, wamng'onomboyo akhali Abia; iwo akhali atongi mu Beeresheba." 
1Samuel8:3 Kwache anachewo hadakwate makhaliro a babawo tayu. Iwo adabauka mbaikha mtima pakobiri, pontho akhatawira kudyekerwa mbatonga miseru mwakusowa chilungamo." 
1Samuel8:4 Tenepo akadamu onsene a Aisraele adagumanyikana pabodzi mbadza ku Rama kukhali Samuele kule. 
1Samuel8:5 Iwo adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Iwe wakalamba, pontho anakowa hadakwate makhaliro ako tayu. Tenepo tisankhulire pyathu mfumu kuti atitsogolere ninga munachitira madzinza anangowa.”" 
1Samuel8:6 Mbwenye pidalonga iwo kuti, “Tisankhulire pyathu mfumu kuti atitsogolere,” penepi Samuele hadakomerwe napyo tayu; tenepo iye adapemphera kuna MBUYA." 
1Samuel8:7 MBUYA adampanga mbati, “Vesera pyonsene pinalonga anthupi kuna iwe; si iwe anakhonda iwo tayu, mbwenye akhonda ine pano ninga mfumu wawo." 
1Samuel8:8 Kutomera ndzidzi udaabulusa ine m'dziko ya Iguputo iwo abauka kubuluka kuna ine mbapembedza milungu inango, tenepo chinchino iwo akuchita kuna iwe pinthu pyachita iwo kuna ine ndzidzi onsene." 
1Samuel8:9 Natenepo vesera pinalonga iwopyo; kwache acheuze pikulu pene, pontho apange kuti adziwe pinthu pinafuna dzachita mfumu anafuna dzaatonga ule.”" 
1Samuel8:10 Samuele adapanga anthu, ale adampempha kuti aasankhulire mfumu, pyonsene pikhadampanga MBUYA." 
1Samuel8:11 Iye adalonga mbati, “Ipi ndiye pinafuna dzachita mfumu anafuna kukutongani ule: Iye anachitisa ananu achimuna kukhala anyankhondo; anango a iwo anafambisa pingolo na akavalo ache mbathamanga patsogolo pa pingolo pyache." 
1Samuel8:12 Anango a iwo anapaswa basa ya ukadamu wa anyankhondo pikwi, anangombo anyankhondo makumashanu. Anango anatipula mindache, kuvuna mapira, kusasanya pida pyankhondo pontho kusasanya pinthu pya pingolo pyache." 
1Samuel8:13 Ananu achikazi anakhala anyakumsasanyira mafuta akununkhira, anyakumphikira, pontho anyakuphika mikate." 
1Samuel8:14 Iye anakwata pyadidiletu pya mindanu, mindanu yamfesa na miti yanu yaolivi, mbapipereka kuna mathubu ache." 
1Samuel8:15 Iye anakwata chakhumi cha mapiranu na nsapo zanu zamfesa mbapipereka kuna mathubu ache na anyakumtumikirache. 
1Samuel8:16 Iye anakwata anyabasanu na ng'ombe zanu zadidiletu na mabulu mbapimphatira basa. 
1Samuel8:17 Iye anakwata chakhumi cha mikumbi yanu, pontho imwe ene munakhala mabitchu ache." 
1Samuel8:18 Ndzidzi wenewo ungafika munadungunya pikulu pene thangwi ya mfumu wanu asankhula imwe mwekha ene ule. Kwache MBUYA hanavesera tayu kudungunya kwanuko.” 
1Samuel8:19 Anthu hadaikhe konta pidalonga Samuele pile tayu mbalonga mbati, “Nkhabe! Ife tinafuna mfumu basi kuti atitsogolere," 
1Samuel8:20 towera tikhalembo ninga madzinza anangowa kukhala na mfumu wakutitonga, wakutitsogolera, pontho wakutimenyera nkhondo.”" 
1Samuel8:21 Samuele adavesera pyonsene pidalonga anthu pile mbaendambo kapipanga MBUYA. 
1Samuel8:22 MBUYA adatawira mbati, “Chita pinafuna iwo, pontho asankhulire mfumu.” Tenepo Samuele adapanga Aisraele onsene ale kubwerera kwawo." 
1Samuel9:1 Pakhali munthu unango wakufuma dzinache Kishi wa dzinza ya Benjemani. Iye akhali mwana wamamuna wa Abiele, pontho mdzukuluache Zerori, mwana Bekorati wa mbumba ya Afia." 
1Samuel9:2 Kishi akhali na mwana wa mamuna dzinache Sauli. Iye akhali mphale wakubalika wakusowa mwanzache pakati pa Aisraele, pontho akhali wakulapha mwakuti munthu unango onsene akhamulekeza m'mapewa." 
1Samuel9:3 Mabulu anango a Kishi babache Sauli akhadatayika, tenepo iye adalonga kuna Sauli mbati, “Kwata nyabasa mbodzi uende naye pabodzi kasaka mabulu athu.”" 
1Samuel9:4 Iwo adagwanda na m'nthemba yonsene ya m'mapiri a Eferemu, pontho na m'nthemba ya Shalisha, kwache hadaagumane tayu; tenepo adathimiza kugwanda na m'nthemba yonsene ya Shaalimu, kwache mabuluwo hadaagumane kweneko tayu. Kubuluka penepo iwo adagwanda na m'nthemba yonsene ya Benjemani, kwache hadaagumane tayu basi kweneko." 
1Samuel9:5 Pidafika iwo kunthemba ya Zufu, Sauli adalonga kuna nyabasache ule mbati, “Tende tibwerere pyathu, mwinango babathu analeka kunyerezera pya mabulu mbatoma kuswipa mtima na ife.”" 
1Samuel9:6 Nyabasa ule adatawira mbati, “Dikhirani muluwani muno muna munthu unango wa Mulungu wakulemedzwa pikulu, pontho pyonsene pimbalonga iye pimbachitika. Tendeni kuna iyeko mwinango anakatipanga kunakwanisa ife kagumana mabulu athu.”" 
1Samuel9:7 Sauli adavunza nyabasa ule mbati, “Ngakhala ife tinaendako, ninji chinakwanisa ife kampasa? Ife nee tasala na pyakudya m'budu mwathu tayu, apo tinakampasa mtukwa wanji munthu wa Mulungu. Ninji china ife?”" 
1Samuel9:8 Nyabasa ule adamtawira pontho mbati, “Ine ndina kobiri ibodzi yasiliva. Ine ndinakwanisa kampasa penepi, tenepo iye anakatipanga kunakwanisa ife kagumana mabulu athu.”" 
1Samuel9:9 Sauli adatawira mbati, “Ndi manyerezero adidi! Tendeko.” Tenepo iwo adenda kuluwani kukhakhala munthu wa Mulungu kule. Pikhakwira iwo phiri kwenda kuluwani kule adagumanikana na atsikana akudza dzatunga madzi. Iwo adavunza atsikana ale mbati, “Ayi nyakulotera ali muluwanimu?” Pandzidzi wenewo mprofeti akhachemerwa na dzina ya nyakulotera, tenepo munthu onsene angafuna kuvunza nzeru kuna Mulungu akhalonga mbati, “Tendeni kuna nyakulotera.”" 
1Samuel9:10  
1Samuel9:11  
1Samuel9:12 Atsikana ale adatawira mbati, “Alipo! Iye ali patsogolo panupo. Chimbizani kuti muphatane naye, thangwi lero anthu akupereka nsembe pambuto yakupembedzerapo." 
1Samuel9:13 Sindzidzi nkhupita muluwanimo munati mumgumane adzati kwira pambuto yakupembedzerapo kadya. Anyakuchemerwa kweneko nkhabe toma kudya tayu mpakana iye afike kweneko, thangwi iye athema chakutoma kutsanzayisa nsembeyo. Mungaenda chinchino pano munati mumgumane adzati kwira paphiri kadya.”" 
1Samuel9:14 Tenepo Sauli na nyabasache ule adenda muluwanimo, natenepo pidapita iwo muluwanimo adaona Samuele akubuluka muluwanimo kwenda kumbuto yakupembedzerapo." 
1Samuel9:15 Dzana mwache MBUYA akhadalonga kuna Samuele mbati," 
1Samuel9:16 “Mangwana ndzidzi ninga ontho uno ndinatuma munthu unango wa dzinza ya Benjemani kuna iwe, tenepo iwe umdzoze kukhala mfumu wa anthu anga, natenepo iye anapulumusa anthu anga m'manja mwa Afilisti. Ine ndaona kusanyika kunachita anthu anga, pontho ndava kulira kwawo kufuna chiphedzo.”" 
1Samuel9:17 Pidachita Samuele maso phaa pana Sauli, MBUYA adalonga kuna Samuele mbati, “Munthu akhalonga ine pya iye ule, ngweneyo. Iye anatonga anthu anga.”" 
1Samuel9:18 Penepo Sauli adenda kuna Samuele, ule akhali chifupi na msuwo wa luwani mbavunza mbati, “Ayi mungatipangizembo nyumba ya nyakulotera?”" 
1Samuel9:19 Samuele adatawira mbati, “Nyakulotera ndine ene pano. Banga ndoko kumbuto yakupembedzerapo, thangwi imwe mwathema kudya pabodzi pene na ine pano lero. Mangwana na machibese ndinakupangani pyonsene pinafunika, kubuluka penepo munaenda pyanu kwanu." 
1Samuel9:20 Lekani swipa mtima na mabulu anu adatayika nsiku zitatu zagwanda zile; mabuluwo agumanwa kale. Apo mbani munthu wache anafunwa pikulu na anthu a ku Israele? Munthu wache ndiwepo; iwe na banja yonsene ya babako.” 
1Samuel9:21 Sauli adatawira mbati, “Ine ndine wa dzinza ya Benjemani dzinza ing'onoletu mu Israele, pontho banjathu njakukhonda funika. Apo thangwi yache ninji munalonga tenepa kuna ine?”" 
1Samuel9:22 Tenepo Samuele adenda na Sauli pabodzi pene na nyabasache m'subi ikulu mbaapasa mbuto ya chilemedzo pakati pa anyakuchemerwa, ale pabodzi pene akhalipo makumatatu." 
1Samuel9:23 Samuele adalonga kuna nyakuphika mbati, “Idza na phindi ya nyama idakupasa ine ile, pontho idakupanga ine kuti uipambule ile.”" 
1Samuel9:24 Tenepo nyakuphika adakwata khundu yadidiletu ya mwendo mbaiikha pamaso pa Sauli. Samuele adalonga mbati, “Yang'ana, nyamayi idakoyerwa iwepo. Idya, thangwi idakoyerwa iwepo kuti udye ndzidzi uno pabodzi na anyakuchemerwa.” Tenepo Samuele adadya pabodzi na Sauli nsiku yeneyo." 
1Samuel9:25 Pidatchitha iwo kubulukira kumbuto yakupembedzerapo kwenda kuluwani, adasasanyira Sauli mbuto yakugona pansoyi ya nyumba." 
1Samuel9:26 Tenepo iye adagona penepo. M'makalakwecha Samuele adachemera Sauli ule akhagona pansoyi pale mbati, “Lamuka, thangwi ndinakugwinya kwanu.” Sauli adalamukadi, tenepo pabodzi pene na Samuele adabuluka mbaenda kunjira." 
1Samuel9:27 Pidafika iwo pankhomo ya luwani Samuele adalonga kuna Sauli mbati, “Panga nyabasako abange tsogola pyache.” Tenepo nyabasa ule adenda pyache. Samuele adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Khala na ine ndzidzi pang'ono, tenepo ine ndinakupanga pyalonga Mulungu.”" 
1Samuel10:1 Kubuluka penepo Samuele adakwata ntchupa ya mafuta aolivi, tenepo adakhuthulira mumsolo mwa Sauli mbampsompsona. Iye adalonga mbati, “MBUYA akudzoza kukhala mfumu wa anthu ache Aisraele. Iwe unaatonga, pontho unaatchinjiriza kuna anyamalwawo onsene. Chitsikimizo chakuti MBUYA akusankhula kukhala mfumu wa anthu ache ntchichi:" 
1Samuel10:2 ungabuluka pamaso panga lero unagumanikana na amuna awiri chifupi na nthumbi ya Rakele pa Zeliza m'nthemba ya Benjemani. Iwo anakakupanga kuti mabulu akhasaka imwe ale agumanwa mwakuti babako hakhaswipave mtima na mabuluwo tayu, mbwenye akuswipa mtima na imwepo, natenepo akhakhala mbavunza-vunza basi mbati, ‘Ndinachita tani ine pya mwananga?’" 
1Samuel10:3 Kubuluka penepo unati uthimize mpakana ukafike pamuti wakupambulika pa Tabori. Kweneko unakagumanikana na amuna atatu panjira pawo kwenda kapereka nsembe kuna Mulungu ku Betele. Mbodzi wa iwo anaphatira ana mbuzi atatu, mbodzi anathukula mikate mitatu, unango wachitatuyo anaphatira budu ya nthembe yakudzala na vinyu." 
1Samuel10:4 Iwo anakumwenyika mbakupasa mikate miwiri, ile yathema iwe dzatambira." 
1Samuel10:5 Kubuluka penepo iwe unaenda kuphiri ya Mulungu ku Gibea kule kuna msasa wa Afilisti. Pamsuwo wakupitira muluwanimo unagumanikana na gulu ya maprofeti kutchitha pambuto yakupembedzerapo, uku akuimba anyakatangale, ng'oma, pitoliro na malimba. Iwo anakhuwa mafala auprofeti." 
1Samuel10:6 Vumbu-vumbu Mzimu wa MBUYA anakugudumira, tenepo iwe unaphatizana nawo kukhuwa mafala auprofeti mbusanduzika kukhala munthu unango wakusiyana na kale." 
1Samuel10:7 Pinthu penepi pingachitika, chita pyonsene pyathema kuchitwapyo, thangwi Mulungu ali nawe." 
1Samuel10:8 Iwe unatsogola ku Giligala kunafuna dzagumanikana ine na iwe kule mbupereke nsembe yakupyerera, pontho nsembe yachiphatizano. Kadikhire kweneko nsiku zinomwe kufikirana ine ndidze mbandikupanga chakuti uchite.”" 
1Samuel10:9 Pidazungunuka Sauli kuti asiyane na Samuele, Mulungu adasanduza Sauli kukhala na makhaliro matswa. Tenepo pinthu pyonsene pidampanga Samuele pidachitika nsiku yonthoyo." 
1Samuel10:10 Pidafika Sauli na nyabasache ku Gibea adagumanikana na gulu ya maprofeti. Vumbu-vumbu Mzimu wa MBUYA udamgudumira, tenepo iye adaphatizana nawo kukhuwa mafala auprofeti." 
1Samuel10:11 Anthu akhamdziwa na kale ene ale adamuona akuchita penepi mbavunzana unango na mwanzache mbati, “Ninji chachitika kuna mwana Kishi? Kadi Sauli asanduka mprofeti?”" 
1Samuel10:12 Munthu unango akhakhala kweneko adavunza mbati, “Apombo maprofeti anangowa? Mukunyerezera kuti babawo mbani?” Penepa ndiye padabulukira kulonga kwakuti “Kadi Sauli asandukambo mprofeti?”" 
1Samuel10:13 Pidamala Sauli kulonga mafalache auprofeti adenda kumbuto yakupembedzerapo. 
1Samuel10:14 Mbuyache Sauli adamuona iye na nyabasache ene mbaavunza mbati, “Mukhali kupi?” Sauli adatawira mbati, “Tidenda kasaka mabulu, tenepo pidachimwana ife kuagumana tidenda kaonana na Samuele.”" 
1Samuel10:15 Mbuyache Sauli adavunza mbati, “Apo iye adakupanganinji?”" 
1Samuel10:16 Sauli adatawira mbati, “Mabulu agumanwa.” Kwache iye hadampange mbuyache ule tayu pidalonga Samuele pya kupitiswa kwache ufumu pile." 
1Samuel10:17 Samuele adachemeresa anthu kugumanyikana ku chipembedzo ku Mizipa 
1Samuel10:18 mbalonga kuna iwo mbati, “MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele akulonga kuti, ‘Ine ndidakubulusani m'dziko ya Iguputo mbandikupulumusani m'manja mwa anthu a ku Iguputo na anthu anango akhakuponderezani ale." 
1Samuel10:19 Ine ndine Mulungu wanu, adakupulumusani panyatwa zanu zonsene na pyakunensa pyanu ule, kwache lero mukundikhonda mbamundipempha kuti ndikupaseni mfumu. Tenepo gumanyikanani pabodzi pene pamaso pa MBUYA kada dzinza pontho kada mbumba.’ ”" 
1Samuel10:20 Tenepo Samuele adachitisa dzinza yonsene kudza patsogolo, tenepo dzinza ya Benjemani ndiye idasankhulwa." 
1Samuel10:21 Kubuluka penepo Samuele adachitisa mabanja onsene m'dzinza ya Benjemani kudza patsogolo, natenepo mbumba ya Matiri ndiye idasankhulwa. Penepo amuna a m'banja ya Matiri adadza patsogolo mbasankhulwa ndi Sauli mwana wa mamuna wa Kishi. Iwo adamsaka-saka penepo kwache hadamgumanepo tayu." 
1Samuel10:22 Tenepo iwo adavunza MBUYA mbati, “Ayi munthu weneyu anadza kuno?” MBUYA adatawira mbati, “Yang'anani, Sauli abisala pakati pa mitolo.”" 
1Samuel10:23 Tenepo anthu adathamanga mbadza na Sauli kuna anthu. Iwo adakwanisa kuona kuti iye akhali wakulapha mwakuti anango onsene akhamulekeza m'mapewa. 
1Samuel10:24 Samuele adalonga kuna anthu mbati, “Munthu asankhulwa na MBUYA ule ngweneyu. Pakati pathupa nkhabepo munthu unango ninga weneyu.” Anthu onsene adakhuwa mbati, “Dondowe mfumu!”" 
1Samuel10:25 Samuele adalonga kuna anthu mwakuveka pya chidzo na basa ya mfumu mbapilemba mumpukutu ule udaikha iye pambuto yakupambulika pamaso pa MBUYA. Kubuluka penepo iye adagwinya anthu onsene ale kwawo. 
1Samuel10:26 Sauli adabwererambo kwawo ku Gibea. Amuna anango amphamvu ale Mulungu adaapasa chipapu adenda naye pabodzi pene. 
1Samuel10:27 Mbwenye amuna anango akuzunguzika adalonga mbati, “Ayi munthu mnzathumbo pyache ninga weneyu, angatipulumuse weneyu?” Iwo adamululupisa Sauli mbakhonda kudza na mtukwa ene kuna iye, mbwenye iye hadapiikhe konta tayu." 
1Samuel11:1 Pidagwanda mwezi ubodzi Nahashi mfumu wa Aamoni adenda na anyankhondo ache mbakazungulira luwani ya Yabeshi m'nthemba ya Gileadi. Amuna a ku Yabeshi adalonga kuna Nahashi mbati, “Khalani gulu ibodzi ya nkhondo na ife, tenepo ife tinakhala pansi pa utongi wanu.”" 
1Samuel11:2 Nahashi adatawira mbati, “Ine ndinakhala gulu ibodzi ya nkhondo na imwe munganditawirisa kuchita chinthu chibodzi chene basi kuti ndikonombole diso yakumadyo ya munthu onsene wa imwe towera ndilulupise Israele onsene.”" 
1Samuel11:3 Akadamu a ku Yabeshi adalonga mbati, “Tipaseni nsiku zinomwe towera tikwanise kutumiza mphangwa mu Israele monsene. Ngakhala panasowa munthu na mbodzi ene wakutiphedza penepo tinati tiimise manja kuna imwe.”" 
1Samuel11:4 Anyamphangwa adafika ku Gibea kukhali Sauli kule, tenepo pidatula iwo mphangwa zile anthu adagundika kulira mwakusanyika pikulu." 
1Samuel11:5 Sauli akhafika kwene muluwani kubulukira kuminda na ng'ombe zache zakulima mbavunza mbati, “Chachitika ninji? Thangwi yache ninji munthu onsene akulira?” Iwo adampanga mphangwa zidadza kubulukira kuna Yabeshi zile." 
1Samuel11:6 Pidava Sauli penepi Mzimu wa Mulungu udamgudumira, tenepo iye adazhangali pyakwanga." 
1Samuel11:7 Iye adagwanda mapindi-mapindi ng'ombe zache zakulima ziwiri zile mbatumiza mapindi ale mu Israele monsene na kuacheuza kuti: “Munthu onsene anakhonda tewera Sauli na Samuele kunkhondo, ng'ombe zache zakulima zinachitwambo ninga tenepo!” Aisraele adachita mantha na pinthu pikhafuna kuchita MBUYA, tenepo munthu onsene okhonda kusiyapo na mbodzi ene adagumanyikana pabodzi pene." 
1Samuel11:8 Sauli adaagumanyisa pa Bizeke. Penepo pakhali anthu pikwi madzana matatu akubulukira ku Israele, pontho anthu pikwi makumatatu akubulukira ku Yuda." 
1Samuel11:9 Iwo adalonga kuna anyamphangwa akubulukira kuna Yabeshi ale mbati, “Kapangeni anthu anu kuti mangwana mbadzati kwana masikati imwe munapulumuswa.” Pidava anthu a ku Yabeshi mphangwa zile, iwo adakomerwa pyakwanga," 
1Samuel11:10 mbalonga kuna Nahashi mbati, “Mangwana tinati tiimise manja kuna imwe, tenepo munakwanisa kuchita nafe pyonsene pinafuna imwe." 
1Samuel11:11 Usiku wenewo Sauli adagawa amunache m'magulu matatu, tenepo m'makalakwecha adathamangira kumsasa wa anyamalwawo mbasosa Aamoni. Pikhakwana masikati iwo adaacheka, tenepo akusala na moyowo adabalalika munthu onsene kuthawa pache yekha.”" 
1Samuel11:12 Tenepo Aisraele adalonga kuna Samuele mbati, “Ali kupi anthu ale akhalonga kuti Sauli aleke khala mfumu wathu? Adzeseni kuna ife kuti tiaphe!”" 
1Samuel11:13 Mbwenye Sauli adalonga mbati, “Nee mbodzi anafuna kuphiwa lero tayu, thangwi lero ndi nsiku yapulumusa MBUYA Aisraele.”" 
1Samuel11:14 Tenepo Samuele adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Tendeni pontho ku Giligala tikatsikimizire kuti Sauli ndi mfumu.”" 
1Samuel11:15 Onsene adenda ku Giligala, tenepo kweneko pambuto yakupambulika adatsikimizira kuti Sauli ndi mfumu. Iwo adapereka nsembe zachiphatizano, pontho Sauli na Aisraele onsene adasekera pikulu pene thangwi ya pidachitika pile." 
1Samuel12:1 Samuele adalonga kuna Aisraele mbati, “Ine ndachita pyonsene pidandipempha imwe. Ine ndakupasani mfumu kuti akutongeni," 
1Samuel12:2 tenepo chinchino muli naye mfumu kuti akutongeni. Kulonga pya ine ndakalamba pontho ndina imvi, pontho ananga achimuna ali namwe pabodzi pene. Ine ndakhala mkadamu wanu kutomera uphaleanga kufikirana lero." 
1Samuel12:3 Ine ndili pano, ngakhala ndachita pinthu pyakudawika pilongeni chinchino pano pamaso pa MBUYA, pontho pamaso pa mfumu asankhula iyeyi. Ayi ine ndakwata ng'ombe ya munthu, penu kumkwatira bulu wache? Mbani munthu abera ine pinthu pyache? Mbani munthu apondereza ine? Ngupi munthu atawira ine kundidyekera? Ngakhala ine ndachita chibodzi mwa pinthu penepi ndinati ndibwezere chinthu chakwata inecho.”" 
1Samuel12:4 Anthu adatawira mbati, “Nkhabe, imwe nee mudatibera pinthu pyathu, penu kutipondereza tayu; imwe nee mwakwata pinthu pyathu na chibodzi chene tayu.”" 
1Samuel12:5 Samuele adatawira mbati, “MBUYA pontho mfumu asankhula iye leroyi ndi mboni kuti imwe mwandigumana okhonda dawa monsene mwene.” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Ande, MBUYA ndi mboni yathu.”" 
1Samuel12:6 Samuele adathimiza kulonga mbati, “MBUYA ndiye adasankhula Mose na Aroni, pontho adabulusa makolo anu m'dziko ya Iguputo ule." 
1Samuel12:7 Tenepo imwe imirani pana imwepo thangwi ndinati ndikupokanyeni pamaso pa MBUYA pa kukukumbusani mabasa onsene amphamvu adachita MBUYA kupulumusa imwepo na makolo anu. 
1Samuel12:8 Pidenda Yakobo na banjache kakhala ku Iguputo, kule Aiguputo adapondereza, makolo anu adalira pikulu kuna MBUYA kufuna chiphedzo, tenepo MBUYA adatuma Mose na Aroni mbabulusa makolo anu m'dziko ya Iguputo mbaakhazikisa m'dziko yeneyi." 
1Samuel12:9 Kwache anthu adaduwalira MBUYA Mulungu wawo, natenepo iye adatawirisa Afilisti, mfumu wa ku Moabu, pontho na Sisera, mkadamu wa anyankhondo wa ku mzinda wa Hazori, kumenyana na makolo anu mbaakunda." 
1Samuel12:10 Iwo adalira kuna MBUYA kufuna chiphedzo mbalonga mbati, ‘Ife tadawa thangwi tabauka kubuluka kuna imwe MBUYA mbatipembedza mifanikizo ya milungu Baala na Asitarite. Tipulumuseni m'manja mwa anyamalwathu tenepo ife tinati tikupembedzeni!’" 
1Samuel12:11 Tenepo MBUYA adatumiza Gideoni na Baraki, Yefita pakumalisira pache ine pano. Munthu onsene wa ife adakupulumusani kuna anyamalwanu mbamukhala pakupata." 
1Samuel12:12 Mbwenye pidaona imwe Nahashi, mfumu wa Aamoni kuti akhali chifupi kukusosani imwe mudamkhonda MBUYA ninga mfumu wanu mbamulonga kuna ine kuti, ‘Tinafuna mfumu atitonge.’" 
1Samuel12:13 “Apo mfumu ngweneyu adasankhula imwe ule; imwe mudapempha mfumu, tenepo MBUYA akupasani." 
1Samuel12:14 Pinthu pyanu pyonsene pinakufambirani mwadidi ngakhala munalemedza MBUYA Mulungu wanu, kumtumikira, kumvesera, pontho kuvera matongero ache, pontho ngakhala imwe na mfumu wanuyi munakhulupirika kuna MBUYA Mulungu anu." 
1Samuel12:15 Mbwenye ngakhala munakhonda kuvera matongero ache, iye anakupasani nkhodolo imwe na mfumu wanu ene." 
1Samuel12:16 Tenepo chinchino imirani pana imwepo, towera muone chinthu chikulu chinafuna kuchita MBUYA." 
1Samuel12:17 Uno ndi ndzidzi wa malimwe, si tenepo tayu? Mbwenye ndinati ndipemphere, tenepo MBUYA anatumiza njazi na mvula. Penepi pingachitika munadzindikira kuti mwachita pyakudawika kuna MBUYA pakumpempha kuti akupaseni mfumu.”" 
1Samuel12:18 Tenepo Samuele adapemphera natenepo pansiku yonthoyo MBUYA adatumiza njazi na mvula. Aisraele onsene adaphatwa na mantha thangwi ya MBUYA na Samuele ene," 
1Samuel12:19 mbalonga kuna Samuele mbati, “Pemphererani ife, anyabasanu, kuna MBUYA towera tileke kufa. Chinchino tadzindikira kuti padzulu pa pyakudawa pyathu pyonsene tathimizapo kudawa kunango pakumpempha MBUYA kuti atipase mfumu.”" 
1Samuel12:20 Samuele adatawira mbati, “Lekani chita mantha, podi kwene kuti imwe mwachita chakuipa ninga chenechi. Lekani kubauka kubuluka kuna MBUYA, mbwenye mumtumikire na mtimanu onsene." 
1Samuel12:21 Lekani kubaukira kuna milungu yapezi. Iyo nkhabe kukuphedzani penu kukupulumusani tayu, thangwi ipyo mphyakusowa basa." 
1Samuel12:22 Thangwi ya dzinache ikulu MBUYA hanasiya anthu ache tayu; iye apinyerezera kuti akuchitiseni kukhala anthu ache ene. 
1Samuel12:23 Kulonga pya ine MBUYA mbandikhondese kumdawira pakukhonda kukupemphererani pontho. M'mbuto mwache ndinakufunzisani kuchita pinthu pyadidi pontho pyakuthema. 
1Samuel12:24 Verani MBUYA mbamumtumikire mwakukhulupirika na mtimanu onsene. Kumbukani pinthu pikulu pyakuchitirani iye. 
1Samuel12:25 Mbwenye ngakhala munathimiza kudawa, imwe na mfumu wanu ene munavungwa.”" 
1Samuel13:1 Sauli akhali na pyaka pitatu pikhapita iye ufumu, tenepo iye adatonga Israele pyaka makumanayi na piwiri." 
1Samuel13:2 Sauli adasankhula amuna pikwi pitatu pakati pa Aisraele, tenepo adakwata amuna pikwi piwiri mbakhala na iye ku Mikimashi m'nthemba ya mapiri ya Betele, mbwenye adatuma amuna anango chikwi chibodzi kakhala na mwanache Yonatani ku Gibea nthemba ya Benjemani. Anango akusalirawo adaagwinya m'misa mwawo." 
1Samuel13:3 Yonatani adasosa anyankhondo mumsasa wa Afilisti ku Geba, tenepo Afilisti onsene adapiva penepi. Sauli adatuma anyamphangwa kachemera Aheberi kwenda kunkhondo pakuliza ngoma m'dziko yonseneyo." 
1Samuel13:4 Aisraele onsene adapangwa kuti Sauli adapha anyankhondo mumpanda wa Afilisti pontho kuti Afilisti adaazonda. Tenepo anthu adatawira kwenda pabodzi pene na Sauli ku Giligala. 
1Samuel13:5 Afilisti adagumanyikana kumenya nkhondo na Aisraele; iwo akhali na pingolo pya nkhondo pikwi makumatatu, amuna pikwi pitanthatu akutekenya akavalo, pontho na anyankhondo azinji pyakwanga ninga tchetcha ya pagombe. Iwo adenda mbakamanga msasa pa Mikimashi kumabulukiro dzuwa a Beti-Aveni." 
1Samuel13:6 Afilisti adaotosa nkhondo, natenepo pidaona Aisraele kuti akhali pampani-pani adabisala m'nkhwimba na m'misitu, pakati pa miyala pontho m'madzenje na m'michera;" 
1Samuel13:7 anango adawambuka mkulo wa Yorodani mbaenda ku nthemba ya Gadi na Gileadi. Sauli adathimiza kukhala mu Giligala, pontho anyankhondo akhakhala na iye ale akhatetemera na mantha." 
1Samuel13:8 Iye akhadikhira Samuele nsiku zinomwe ninga montho mukhadampangira Samuele, kwache Samuele akhadadzati fika tayu ku Giligala. Anthu adatoma kumthawira Sauli." 
1Samuel13:9 Tenepo iye adalonga mbati, “Ndidzesereni nsembe zakupyerera na nsembe zachiphatizano.” Iye adapereka nsembe zakupyerera," 
1Samuel13:10 tenepo pikhamalisa iye, penepo pene Samuele adafika. Sauli adabuluka kagumanikana naye mbampasa mwenyikiro," 
1Samuel13:11 mbwenye Samuele adamvunza mbati, “Ayi ninji pyachita iwepi?” Sauli adatawira mbati, “Anthu akhandithawira, pontho imwe nee mudadza ndzidzi udalonga imwe ule tayu, pontho kuti Afilisti adagumanyikana ku Mikimashi" 
1Samuel13:12 kuti andisose ku Giligala kwache ine sidampemphe kuti MBUYA andikomere mtima tayu, tenepo ine ndapiona kuti mphyadidi kuti ndipereke nsembe.”" 
1Samuel13:13 Samuele adatawira mbati, “Iwe udachita pinthu pyakupupwa. Iwe hudavere matongero adakupasa MBUYA Mulungu wako tayu. Iwe mbudavera, iye mbadatawirisa iwe na pidzukulu pyako kutonga Israele kwenda na kwenda." 
1Samuel13:14 Mbwenye chinchino ufumu wako nkhabe dzathimiza kukhalapo tayu. Na thangwi yakuti iwe hudamvere tayu, MBUYA anasankhula munthu anafuna iye mbamuikha kukhala mfumu wa anthu ache.”" 
1Samuel13:15 Samuele adabuluka ku Giligala mbaenda pyache. Amuna akusalirawo adatewera Sauli pikhabuluka iye ku Giligala kwenda ku Gibea, m'nthemba ya Benjemani. Sauli adalengesa amuna akhali na iye ale. Iwo adakwana ninga madzana matanthatu." 
1Samuel13:16 Sauli na mwanache Yonatani pontho na amunawo adamanga msasa ku Geba m'nthemba ya Benjemani; Afilisti adamangambo msasawo ku Mikimashi. 
1Samuel13:17 Anyankhondo a Chifilisti adabuluka mumsasa mwawo mule m'magulu matatu; gulu ibodzi idenda ku Ofara m'nthemba ya Shuali," 
1Samuel13:18 gulu inango idenda ku Beti-Horoni, gulu inangoyo idenda kumadire kuyang'anisana na phedi ya Zeboimu na thando yatchetcha." 
1Samuel13:19 Mu Israele nee mbodzi akhalimo wakufula simbi tayu, thangwi Afilisti akhachita phinga kukhondesa Aheberi kusasanya matalasada pontho madipa." 
1Samuel13:20 Aisraele akhaenda kuna Afilisti kanozwesa mapaza awo akukweyiwa na ng'ombe, mapaza ene pyawo, mbadzo na pikwakwa;" 
1Samuel13:21 kupagali kwache kukhali kobiri ibodzi ing'ono kunozwesa kokha mbadzo na kusasanyisa mitswamu yakumenyera ng'ombe za pachingolo; kobiri ziwiri kunozwesa kokha mapaza akukweyiwa na ng'ombe pontho na mapaza ene pyawo. 
1Samuel13:22 Natenepo pansiku ya nkhondo nee nyankhondo mbodzi akhali na talasada pontho dipa kupambula Sauli na mwanache Yonatani. 
1Samuel13:23 Afilisti adatuma gulu ya anyankhondo kutchinjiriza njira yakuwambukira pa Mikimashi. 
1Samuel14:1 Nsiku inango Yonatani adalonga kuna mphale unango ule akhathukula pida pyache mbati, “Tende tiwambukire kumsasa wa Afilisti.” Kwache Yonatani hadampange babache tayu," 
1Samuel14:2 ule akhakhala mumsasa mwache pansi pa muti wantheme ku Migironi chifupi na Gibea. Sauli akhali na amuna ninga madzana matanthatu. 
1Samuel14:3 Pakati pawo pakhali Ahia nyansembe wakuthukula efodi ule. Iye akhali mwana wamamuna wa Ahitubu mbaleache Ikabodi ule akhali mwana wamamuna wa Finiasi pontho chidzukulu cha Eli nyansembe wa MBUYA ku Shilo. Anthu hadadziwe tayu kuti Yonatani adabulukapo. 
1Samuel14:4 Pa Makata a Mikimashi, pale padathema Yonatani kugwanda napo kwenda kumsasa wa Afilisti, pakhali maphanzwi mawiri kukhundu zonsene za njirayo; ibodzi ikhachemerwa Bozezi, inangombo ikhachemerwa Sene." 
1Samuel14:5 Phanzwi ibodzi ikhali kukhundu yakumpoto kwa njirayo, inangombo ikhali kukhundu yakumwera kuyang'anisana na Geba." 
1Samuel14:6 Yonatani adalonga kuna mphale ule mbati, “Tende tiwambukire kumsasa wa Afilisti, anthu okhonda dziwa Mulungu ale, mwinango MBUYA anatiphedza. Nkhabe chingachimwanise MBUYA tayu kutichitisa kukunda podi ife tikhale pyathu akuchepa tani.”" 
1Samuel14:7 Mphale ule adatawira mbati, “Chinthu chonsene chinafuna imwe kuchitacho ine ndili namwe.”" 
1Samuel14:8 Yonatani adatawira mbati, “Tende tiwambuke kuna anthuko, pontho mbatialeke kuti atione pyawo." 
1Samuel14:9 Ngakhala iwo anatipanga kuti tiadikhire kudza kuna ife, penepo ife tinakhala pana ifepo." 
1Samuel14:10 Mbwenye ngakhala iwo anatipanga kuti tiende kuna iwoko, ife tinati tiendeko thangwi chenechi ntchitsikimizo chakuti MBUYA anatichitisa kuakunda.”" 
1Samuel14:11 Tenepo adachitisa kuti Afilisti aaone pyawo; penepo Afilisti adalonga mbati, “Yang'anani, Aheberi anango akudza kuna ife kubulukira m'dzenje mukhadabisala iwo mule.”" 
1Samuel14:12 Iwo adachemera Yonatani na mphale ule mbati, “Idzani kuno, muone chinafuna kubuluka m'mabondo mwanu!” Yonatani adalonga kuna mphale ule mbati, “Nditewere MBUYA achitisa Aisraele kuakunda.”" 
1Samuel14:13 Yonatani adakwira mwakuchita kukambadza, tenepo mphale ule adamtewera. Yonatani adasosa Afilisti ale mbaamenya kuagwisiratu pansi, tenepo mphale ule adaapha." 
1Samuel14:14 Kupha kwakutomaku Yonatani na mphale ule adapha amuna ninga makumawiri pambuto yakukwana ninga mathanyo makumanomwe ulaphi na umimbache. 
1Samuel14:15 Afilisti onsene a kumidzi adachita mantha, pontho anyankhondo mumsasamo adatetemera na mantha; dziko idatekenyeka, pontho iwo akhali pampani-pani ukulu." 
1Samuel14:16 Amuna akhali na Sauli ale ku Gibea m'nthemba ya Benjemani adaona Afilisti akuthawa mwakuzunguzika. 
1Samuel14:17 Tenepo Sauli adalonga kuna amunache ale mbati, “Lengesani anyankhondo mbamuone kuti mbani nkhabepo.” Iwo adachitadi tenepo mbagumana kuti Yonatani na mphale ule akhathukula pida pyache nkhabepo." 
1Samuel14:18 Sauli adalonga kuna Ahia nyansembe mbati, “Idza kuno na efodi.” Pansiku yeneyo Ahia akhathukula efodi patsogolo pa anthu a ku Israele." 
1Samuel14:19 Pikhalonga Sauli kuna anyansembe ale chimpiningu chidanyanyiratu mumsasa wa Afilisti, tenepo Sauli adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Nkhabe ndzidzi wakuvunza nzeru kuna MBUYA tayu.”" 
1Samuel14:20 Penepo iye na amunache ale adenda kamenya nkhondo na Afilisti, ale akhamenyana pyawo okhokha thangwi ya kuzunguzika." 
1Samuel14:21 Aheberi anango ale akhali kukhundu ya Afilisti, pontho ale akhadenda nawo pabodzi kumsasa kwawo, adabuluka khundu yeneyo mbaenda kakhala kukhundu ya Sauli na Yonatani." 
1Samuel14:22 Anango ale akhabisala m'mapiri m'dziko ya Eferemu adava kuti Afilisti akhathawa, tenepo iwombo adakhala gulu ibodzi kumenyana na Afilisti." 
1Samuel14:23 Iwo adaamenya njira yonsene kupiringana Beti-Aveni. MBUYA adapulumusa Aisraele nsiku yeneyo. 
1Samuel14:24 Aisraele adalenduka pyakwanga na njala, thangwi Sauli akhadatonga na kudumbira pikulu pene kuti, “Dzedze kuna munthu onsene anadya chinthu chamtundu onsene lero ine mbandidzati kubwezera anyamalwanga.” Tenepo nkhabe munthu adadya chinthu nsiku yeneyo." 
1Samuel14:25 Onsene adafika mumsitu mbagumana uchi ponsene pene. 
1Samuel14:26 Msituwo udadzala na uchi kwache nkhabe na mbodzi ene adadya tayu, thangwi onsenewa akhachita mantha na kutemberera kudachita Sauli kule." 
1Samuel14:27 Mbwenye Yonatani hadave tayu pya kutemberera kudachita babache kule; tenepo na ndodo ikhaphatira iye m'manja mwache ile adakhophola pang'ono uchi ule mbadya. Kabodzi kene mphamvu zidabwerera m'manungo mwache. 
1Samuel14:28 Mbwenye mbodzi penepo adalonga mbati, “Ife talenduka na njala, thangwi babako atikhondesa pakutithuswa kuti, ‘Dzedze kuna munthu onsene anadya chinthu cha mtundu onsene lero.’ ”" 
1Samuel14:29 Yonatani adatawira mbati, “Chinthu chachita babanga kuna anthu athu ntchakugoswa pyakwanga. Ngayang'anani inetu ndina mphamvu pyakwanga, thangwi ndadya uchi pang'ono." 
1Samuel14:30 Anyankhondo mbadadya pinthu pyapokosera iwo anyamalwawo, mbapidakhala pyadidi pyakwanga, pontho mbadapha Afilisti akuinjipa pyakwanga.”" 
1Samuel14:31 Nsiku yeneyo Aisraele adakunda Afilisti, kumenyana nawo njira yonsene kubulukira ku Mikimashi mpakana ku Aialoni. Kufikirana ndzidzi wenewu Aisraele adalenduka pyakwanga pene na njala," 
1Samuel14:32 natenepo adathamangira kuna pinthu pikhadapokosera iwo anyamalwawo mbakwata mabira, na ng'ombe mbapicheka ponthopo, tenepo adadya nyamacheyo uku chiropa chache chikali monthomo." 
1Samuel14:33 Sauli adapangwa mbati, “Anthu akudawira MBUYA pakudya nyama uku chiropa chache chikali monthomo.” Sauli adalonga mbati, “Imwe mwadawa pikulu! Ndigulung'undisireni mwala ukulu kuna ine kuno.”" 
1Samuel14:34 Tenepo iye adalonga pontho mbati, “Ndokoni kuna anthu mbamukaapange kuti adze na ng'ombe pontho na mabirawo kuno. Iwo athema kupichekera pano mbapidyera pontho pano; iwo mbaleke dawa pamaso pa MBUYA pakudya nyama uku chiropa chache chikali monthomo tayu.” Tenepo mosiku wenewo onsenewo adadza na ng'ombe pontho mabira mbazicheka ponthopo." 
1Samuel14:35 Sauli adamangira MBUYA guwa yansembe, guwa idatomambo iye kuimanga ile." 
1Samuel14:36 Sauli adalonga kuna amunache mbati, “Tendeni tikasose Afilisti mosiku uno mbatipokosera pinthu pyawo mpakana makalakwecha mbatikaapha onsenenewo.” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Chitani pyonsene pinanyerezera imwe kuti mphyadidipyo.” Mbwenye nyansembe adalonga mbati, “Tendeni chakutoma tivunze nzeru kuna Mulungu.”" 
1Samuel14:37 Natenepo Sauli adavunza Mulungu mbati, “Ayi tiende kasosa Afilisti? Ayi imwe munatichitisa kukunda?” Kwache Mulungu hadatawire tayu nsiku yeneyo." 
1Samuel14:38 Penepo Sauli adalonga kuna akadamu a Aisraele mbati, “Idzani kuno towera tione ninji chadawa ife lero.”" 
1Samuel14:39 Ndinadumbira na dzina ya MBUYA wa moyo ule ambachitisa Aisraele kukunda kuti nyakugumanwa adawayo anati aphiwe, podi kwene kuti akhale mwananga Yonatani. Kwache nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene adalongapo chinthu tayu." 
1Samuel14:40 Tenepo Sauli adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Monsenene imirani apo, ine na Yonatani tinaimirambo pano.” Anthu ale adatawira mbati, “Chitani pyonsene pinaona imwe kuti mphyadidipyo.”" 
1Samuel14:41 Sauli adalonga kuna MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele mbati, “MBUYA mwatani mwakhonda kunditawira lero? MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele nditawireni na miyala yakupambulika. Ngakhala adawa ndine pano penu Yonatani titawireni na Urimu, mbwenye ngakhala adawa mba Aisraele titawireni na Tumimu.” Kutawira kudathonya Yonatani na Sauli; tenepo anthu adapidziwa." 
1Samuel14:42 Sauli adalonga mbati, “Mbani adawa pakati pa mwananga Yonatani na ine pano?” Penepo Yonatani adathonywa." 
1Samuel14:43 Sauli adamvunza mbati, “Ninji chachita iwe?” Yonatani adatawira mbati, “Ndidadya uchi pang'ono na ndodo yanga ikhaphatira ine m'manja mwanga ile. Ndili pano; ine ndasasanyika kuphiwa.”" 
1Samuel14:44 Sauli adalonga kuna Yonatani mbati, “Mulungu mbandiphe pyache iwe ungakhonda kuphiwa lero.”" 
1Samuel14:45 Mbwenye anthu adalonga kuna Sauli mbati, “Ayi Yonatani adachitisa kuti Aisraele akunde ule aphiwe? Nkhabe! Ife tinadumbira na dzina ya MBUYA kuti iye hanataya tayu tsisi na ibodzi ene ya mumsolo mwache. Pyachita iye leropi apichita na chiphedzo cha Mulungu.” Tenepo anthu adapulumusa Yonatani kuti aleke phiwa." 
1Samuel14:46 Kubuluka penepo Sauli adaleka kuthamangisa Afilisti, tenepo Afilisti adabwerera kunthemba zawo." 
1Samuel14:47 Pidapita Sauli ufumu wa Israele iye adamenyana na anyamalwache konsene kwene. Enewa mbanthu a ku Moabu, Amoni, na Edomu, mafumu a ku Zoba, pontho na Afilisti. Konsene kwene kukhamenya iye nkhondo, iye akhakunda." 
1Samuel14:48 Iye adamenya nkhondo mwamphamvu mbakunda Aamaleki. Tenepo iye adapulumusa Aisraele kuna anyamalwawo onsene ale. 
1Samuel14:49 Ana achimuna a Sauli akhali Yonatani, Ishivi na Malikishua. Mwanache wamkulu wamkazi akhali Merabi, pontho wamng'ono akhali Mikaela." 
1Samuel14:50 Mkazache akhali Ahinoamu mwana Ahimaazi; mkadamu wa anyankhondo ache akhali Abineri mwana wamamuna wa mbuyache Neri. 
1Samuel14:51 Kishi babache Sauli na Neri babache Abineri akhali ana a Abiele. 
1Samuel14:52 Ndzidzi onsene wa moyo wache Sauli adamenya nkhondo zakugoswa na Afilisti, pontho ndzidzi onsene ukhagumana Sauli munthu wamphamvu penu wakuwanga mtima iye akhamuikha kukhala mbodzi wa anyankhondo ache." 
1Samuel15:1 Samuele adalonga kuna Sauli mbati, “Ine ndine ule adatumwa na Mulungu kuti ndikudzoze ufumu pakati pa Aisraele. Tenepo vesera pinalonga MBUYA." 
1Samuel15:2 Penepi ndiye pinalonga MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene kuti iye anati atchunyuse Aamaleki, thangwi makolo awo adapokanya Aisraele pikhabuluka iwo m'dziko ya Iguputo." 
1Samuel15:3 Ndoko ukasose Aamaleki mbukavungiretu pyonsene pene pina iwo. Leka siya chinthu na chibodzi chene. Iphani amuna onsene, akazi, ana na akachiya ene; ng'ombe, mabira, ngamila na mabulu ene.”" 
1Samuel15:4 Sauli adachemeresa anyankhondo ache mbaaona mwadidi pa Telemu: pakhali anyankhondo pikwi madzana mawiri a ku Israele na anyankhondo pikwi khumi a ku Yuda. 
1Samuel15:5 Penepo iye na amunache ale adenda kumzinda wa Amaleki mbadikhirira m'tsanga mumkulo wakusowa madzi. 
1Samuel15:6 Iye adatumiza mphangwa kuna Akeni, anthu ale makolo awo adakomera mtima Aisraele pikhabuluka iwo ku Iguputo kuacheuza kuti abuluke pakati pa Aamaleki, towera aleke kuaphera kubodzi kwene na iwo. Tenepo Akeni adabulukadi." 
1Samuel15:7 Sauli adakunda Aamaleki kuamenya njira yonsene kubulukira ku Havila mpakana ku Shuri kumabulukiro dzuwa a Iguputo. 
1Samuel15:8 Iye adakoya na moyo Agagi mfumu wa Aamaleki mbapha anthu ache onsene na talasada. 
1Samuel15:9 Mbwenye Sauli na anyankhondo ache hadaphe tayu Agagi mbakhonda pontho kupha mabira na ng'ombe pyadidiletu, pontho anabira na anamphulu adidiletu, penu chinthu chonsene chadidiletu; iwo adavunga kwene pinthu pile pikhali pyakupupwa pontho pyakusowa basa." 
1Samuel15:10 MBUYA adalonga kuna Samuele mbati," 
1Samuel15:11 “Ine ndikutsamala pyakwanga kuti ndidamuikha Sauli kukhala mfumu, iye abauka kubuluka kuna ine mbakhonda kuvera matongero anga.” Samuele adazhangali pyakwanga, tenepo mosiku onsenewo adadembetera MBUYA." 
1Samuel15:12 Mangwana mwache na machibese adenda kagumanika na Sauli. Iye adapangwa kuti Sauli akhadenda kuluwani ya Karimele kukhadapimangira iye guwa ya chikumbuso chache kule. Kubulukira penepo adenda ku Giligala. 
1Samuel15:13 Samuele adenda kuna Sauli mbampasa mwenyikiro mbati, “MBUYA mbakutsanzayiseni imwe Samuele, ine ndavera matongero a MBUYA.”" 
1Samuel15:14 Samuele adamvunza mbati, “Apo ninji ndikuva kulira kwa mabira na ng'ombe?”" 
1Samuel15:15 Sauli adatawira mbati, “Amunanga apikwata kuna Aamaleki. Iwo adakoya mabira na ng'ombe zadidiletu towera tikapipereke nsembe kuna MBUYA Mulungu wanu; pyakusalirapyo tamala kupivunga.”" 
1Samuel15:16 Samuele adalonga mbati, “Matama ndikupange pyandipanga MBUYA mosiku wagwandawu.” Sauli adalonga mbati, “Ndipangeni.”" 
1Samuel15:17 Samuele adatawira mbati, “Kale iwe udapiona pyako ninga munthu wakusowa basa, mbwenye iwe wasanduka mkadamu wa madzinza a Israele. MBUYA adakudzoza kukhala mfumu wa ku Israele," 
1Samuel15:18 tenepo iye adakutonga kuti uende kavunga Aamaleki, anthu akudawika ale. Iye adakupanga kuti ukamenye nawo nkhondo mpakana wamala kuapha onsene." 
1Samuel15:19 Apo thangwi yache ninji iwe hudavere MBUYA tayu? Thangwi yache ninji udathamangira kukwata pinthu pidapokosera imwe mbuchita chinthu chokhonda komera MBUYA?” 
1Samuel15:20 Sauli adatawira mbati, “Ine ndidavera MBUYA, ine ndidachita pyonsene pyandipanga MBUYA. Ine ndavunga monsene mwene Aamaleki mbandidza na mfumu wawo Agagi." 
1Samuel15:21 Anyankhondo anga akwata mabira na ng'ombe kubulukira pa pinthu pidapokosera ife, pinthu pyadidiletu pidapambulirwa kuna MBUYA, towera apipereke nsembe kuna MBUYA Mulungu wanu kuno ku Giligala.”" 
1Samuel15:22 Samuele adalonga mbati, “Chinafuna MBUYA ninji, kuvera, penu kupereka nsembe zakupyerera na pyakupereka pinango? Mphyadidi kuvera MBUYA kusiyana na kupereka nsembe kuna iye mabira adidiletu." 
1Samuel15:23 Kupandukira MBUYA nkhwakuipa pyakwanga ninga ufiti, pontho kutumbama nkhwakuipa pyakwanga ninga kupembedza mifanikizo. Na thangwi yakuti iwe wakhonda kuvera matongero a MBUYA, iyembo akukhonda kuti ukhale mfumu.”" 
1Samuel15:24 Sauli adatawira mbati, “Ande, ine ndadawa. Ine ndaswa matongero a MBUYA mbandikhonda kuchita pidandipanga imwe pile. Ine ndikhachita mantha na anyankhondo anga tenepo ndidachita ninga mukhapifunira iwo." 
1Samuel15:25 Chinchino ndikukupemphani kuti mundilekerere kudawa kwanga mbatibwerere pabodzi pene, towera ndikwanise kapembedza MBUYA.”" 
1Samuel15:26 Samuele adatawira mbati, “Ine nkhabe kwenda nawe pabodzi tayu, thangwi iwe wakhonda kuvera matongero a MBUYA, tenepo iye akukhondambo kukhala mfumu wa ku Israele.”" 
1Samuel15:27 Penepo Samuele adazungunuka kuti aende pyache, mbwenye Sauli adaphata chakufinika chache mbuching'amba." 
1Samuel15:28 Samuele adalonga kuna iye mbati, “MBUYA ang'amba ufumu wa Israele lero kubulukira kuna iwe mbaupereka kuna munthu unango wadidi kupiringana iwepo." 
1Samuel15:29 Mulungu, ule ndi Mphamvu za Israele nkhabe nama, penu kusanduza manyerezero ache tayu. Iye si munthu tayu kuti asanduze manyerezero ache.”" 
1Samuel15:30 Sauli adatawira mbati, “Ine ndadawa, kwache ndaphata miyendo, ndilemedzenimbo pamaso pa akulu-akulu a anthu anga pontho Aisraele onsene. Bwererani pabodzi pene na ine, towera ndikakwanise kupembedza MBUYA Mulungu wanu.”" 
1Samuel15:31 Natenepo Samuele adabwerera naye pabodzi pene, Sauli mbakapembedza MBUYA." 
1Samuel15:32 Tenepo Samuele adalonga mbati, “Idza naye kuno Mfumu Agagi. Tenepo Agagi adadza kuna iye uku akutetemera na mantha, kunyerezera mumtima mwache kuti kufa ntchinthu chakupha pyakwanga." 
1Samuel15:33 Ninga mudachitira talasadako kuchitisa akazi azinji kukhala akusowa ana, tenepombo mako anakhala wakusowa ana.” Penepo iye adagwanda Agagi mapindi-mapindi patsogolo pa guwa yansembe ku Giligala." 
1Samuel15:34 Kubuluka penepo Samuele adenda ku Rama, tenepo Mfumu Sauli adenda kwawo ku Gibea." 
1Samuel15:35 Ndzidzi onsene ukhali Samuele na moyo hadamuone pontho mfumu tayu, mbwenye iye adasintili thangwi ya Sauli. MBUYA adatsamala, thangwi adaikha Sauli kukhala mfumu wa ku Israele." 
1Samuel16:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna Samuele mbati, “Unafika mpakana lini ukusintili thangwi ya Sauli? Ine ndamkhonda ninga mfumu wa Israele. Chinchino kwata mafuta aolivi mbuende ku Betelehemu kuna mamuna unango dzinache Yese, thangwi ndasankhula mbodzi wa anache kuti akhale mfumu.”" 
1Samuel16:2 Mbwenye Samuele adalonga mbati, “Apo ndinachita tani? Sauli anati ave penepi, tenepo anati andiphe.” MBUYA adatawira mbati, “Kwata mwanamphulu mbukalonge kuti iwe waenda kweneko kapereka nsembe kuna MBUYA." 
1Samuel16:3 Chemeresa Yese kunafuna iwe kapereka nsembeko, tenepo ine ndinakupanga pyakuti uchite. Iwe unakadzoza munthu anafuna ine kukupangayo kuti akhale mfumu.”" 
1Samuel16:4 Samuele adachita ninga montho mudampangira MBUYA mbaenda ku Betelehemu, kule kudadza akadamu a mumzinda mule mwakutetemera na mantha dzagumanikana naye mbamvunza mbati, “Mwatani mwadza kuno? Ayi nkhwadidi kwene?”" 
1Samuel16:5 Iye adatawira mbati, “Nkhwadidi kwene. Ine ndadza dzapereka nsembe kuna MBUYA. Picheneseni mwekha ene pamaso pa MBUYA mbamuende nane pabodzi.” Iye adapanga pontho Yese na anache achimuna kuti apichenese okha ene mbaachemera kwenda kapereka nsembe." 
1Samuel16:6 Pidafika iwo Samuele adaona Eliabu mwana Yese mbalonga yekha ene mbati, “Ndimomwene munthu anafuna sankhula MBUYA kumdzoza ufumu ngweneyu aimira pamaso pacheyi.”" 
1Samuel16:7 Mbwenye MBUYA adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Leka kuyang'ana kulapha penu kubalika kwachita iyeko. Ine sinamfuna tayu, thangwi ine nkhabe kupiona ninga mumbapionera anthu. Munthu ambayang'ana makhaliro akunja, mbwenye ine ndimbayang'ana mumtima.”" 
1Samuel16:8 Tenepo Yese adadza na mwanache unango Abinadabu kuna Samuele. Mbwenye Samuele adalonga mbati, “MBUYA hadamsankhule weneyu tayu.”" 
1Samuel16:9 Kubuluka penepo Yese adadza na Shama. Samuele adalonga mbati, “MBUYA hadamsankhule weneyu tayu.”" 
1Samuel16:10 Na njira yeneyi Yese adadza na anache onsene achimuna anomwe kuna Samuele. Tenepo Samuele adalonga mbati, “MBUYA hadasankhule na mbodzi ene tayu pakati pa enewa.”" 
1Samuel16:11 Penepo iye adamvunza mbati, “Ayi imwe nkhabe pontho ana anango achimuna tayu?” Yese adatawira mbati, “Alipo wamng'onoletu, kwache iye aenda kadyesa mabira.” Samuele adalonga mbati, “Kampangeni kuti adze kuno. Ife nkhabe pereka nsembe tayu mpakana iye adza.”" 
1Samuel16:12 Tenepo Yese adamtumira mphangwa kuti adze. Iye akhali wakubalika, wa manungo adidi pontho maso ache akhali akubalika. MBUYA adalonga kuna Samuele mbati, “Ngweneyu ene mdzoze ufumu.”" 
1Samuel16:13 Samuele adakwata mafuta aolivi mbamdzoza Davite pamaso pa abale ache. Kabodzi kene Mzimu wa MBUYA adagudumira Davite mbakhala naye kutomera nsiku yeneyo kwenda m'tsogolo. Kubuluka penepo Samuele adabwerera ku Rama. 
1Samuel16:14 Mzimu wa MBUYA adabuluka muna Sauli, tenepo mzimu wakuipa wakutumizwa na MBUYA udamsanyisa pyakwanga Sauli." 
1Samuel16:15 Anyabasache adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Yang'anani, ife tikupidziwa kuti ndi mzimu wakuipa wakutumizwa na Mulungu unakusanyisaniwu." 
1Samuel16:16 Tipangeni kuti tikusakireni munthu ule ambadziwa mwadidi kuimba nyakatangale. Tenepo mzimu wakuipa angakugudumirani iye anakwanisa kuimba nyakatangale, penepo imwe munakhala pontho mwadidi.”" 
1Samuel16:17 Sauli adatonga kuti iwo akasake munthu wakudziwa kuimba mwadidi nyakatangale. 
1Samuel16:18 Mbodzi wa anyabasache adalonga mbati, “Yese wa kuluwani ya Betelehemu ana mwana wamamuna, ule ambadziwa kuimba mwadidi nyakatangale. Iye ndi munthu wakuwanga mtima pontho wakubalika, nyankhondo wadidi pontho nyakudziwa kulonga. MBUYA ali naye.”" 
1Samuel16:19 Tenepo Sauli adatuma mphangwa kuna Yese kumpanga kuti atumize kuna iye Davite ambadyesa mabira ule. 
1Samuel16:20 Yese adatumiza Davite kuna Sauli na mwanambuzi, bulu wakuthukula mikate na budu ya nthembe yakudzala na vinyu." 
1Samuel16:21 Davite adadza kuna Sauli mbatoma kumtumikira. Sauli adamfuna pyakwanga pene, pontho adamsankhula kukhala nyakuthukula pida pyache." 
1Samuel16:22 Tenepo Sauli adatuma mphangwa kuna Yese mbati, “Ine ndamfuna pyakwanga Davite. Mbakhale kuno kuti anditumikire.”" 
1Samuel16:23 Kubuluka ndzidzi wenewo kwenda m'tsogolo, mzimu wakuipa wakutumizwa na MBUYA ungagudumira Sauli, Davite akhakwata nyakatangale wache mbaimba. Penepo mzimu wakuipa ule ukhamsiya Sauli, iye mbatoma kukhala pontho mwadidi." 
1Samuel17:1 Afilisti adagumanyikana ku Soko luwani ya Yuda kuti achite nkhondo; iwo adamanga msasa pa Efesi-Damimu pakati pa Soko na Azeka. 
1Samuel17:2 Sauli na Aisraele adagumanyikana mbamanga msasawo paphedi ya Ela kule kudasasanyika iwo kumenyana na Afilisti. 
1Samuel17:3 Afilisti adandandalika paphiri ibodzi, pontho Aisraele paphiri inango, pakati pawo pakhali phedi." 
1Samuel17:4 Munthu unango dzinache Goliati wa kumzinda wa Gati adabuluka mumsasa wa Afilisti mbapikira Aisraele. Iye akhali wakulapha chifupi-fupi makhono matatu," 
1Samuel17:5 pontho adavala pida pyankuwa pyakulemera ninga makilogramu makumashanu na manomwe, pontho na chipewu chankuwa." 
1Samuel17:6 M'miyendo mwache mukhali pyakutchingira pyankuwa, pontho iye adathukula dipa yankuwa paphewa pache." 
1Samuel17:7 Dipache ikhali na ntchindu pyakwanga ninga mtanda wakulukira nguwo, msolo wa dipayo ukhalemera makilogramu manomwe. Nyakuthukula chakugedera matswimo chache adadza patsogolo pache." 
1Samuel17:8 Goliati adaimira mbakhuwa kuna anyankhondo a Aisraele mbati, “Kadi imwe mukuchitanji kweneko kumala ndandalika kufuna nkhondo? Ine ndine Mfilisti, imwe ndimwe mabitchu a Sauli! Sankhulani munthu mbodzi wa imwe kuti amenyane na ine pano." 
1Samuel17:9 Ngakhala iye anandikunda mbandipha, ife tinasanduka mabitchu anu; mbwenye ngakhala ine ndinamkunda mbandimpha, imwe munasanduka mabitchu athu." 
1Samuel17:10 Chinchino pano ndikupikira anyankhondo a Aisraele. Ndipaseni munthu mbodzi wakuti ndimenyane naye.” 
1Samuel17:11 Pidava Sauli na amunache penepi adagoswerwa pyakwanga pene. 
1Samuel17:12 Davite akhali mwana wa mamuna wa Yese wa dzinza ya Eferemu wa kumzinda wa Betelehemu, m'nthemba ya Yuda. Yese akhali na ana asere achimuna, tenepo pandzidzi ukhali Sauli mfumu, iye adakalamba pyakwanga pene mbakhala na pyaka pizinji pyakubalwa." 
1Samuel17:13 Anache achimuna akulu-akulu atatu akhaenda kunkhondo na Sauli. Eliabu mwanache wamkululetu, wachiwiri akhali Abinadabu, wachitatu akhali Shama." 
1Samuel17:14 Davite akhali wamng'onoletu, tenepo pikhakhala abale ache atatu ale na Sauli," 
1Samuel17:15 Davite akhabwerera ku Betelehemu kazinji kene kayang'anira mabira a babache. 
1Samuel17:16 Goliati adapikira Aisraele machibese na mawulo onsene nsiku makumanayi. 
1Samuel17:17 Nsiku inango Yese adalonga kuna Davite mbati, “Kwata makilogramu khumi a mapira akuotcha na mikate khumi mbuchimbize kwenda napyo kuna abale ako kumsasa." 
1Samuel17:18 Kwata pabodzi pene na mafuta amkaka ukapereke kuna mkadamu wa gulu yawo. Ndoko ukaone ngakhala abale ako ali pyadidi, pontho udze na chinthu chakutsikimizira kuti iwo ali pyadidi, pontho kuti iwe waaonadi." 
1Samuel17:19 Mfumu Sauli, abale ako pabodzi pene na Aisraele anango onsene ali kuphedi ya Ela kumenyana na Afilisti.”" 
1Samuel17:20 Mangwana mwache na machibese Davite adalamuka mbasiyira munthu unango kuyang'anira mabira. Tenepo adakwata pyakudya pile mbaenda ninga montho mudampangira Yese. Iye adafika kumsasa kule pikhaenda Aisraele kakhala m'mbuto zawo kusasanyikira nkhondo uku akukhuwa mafala ankhondo. 
1Samuel17:21 Anyankhondo a Aisraele na Afilisti adakhala m'mbuto zawo zankhondo mwakuyang'anisana. 
1Samuel17:22 Davite adasiyira pyakudya pile nyakuyang'anira mitolo, tenepo adathamangira kukhadandandalika anyankhondo kule mbaenda kuna abale ache. Iye adaavunza kuti iwo akhali tani." 
1Samuel17:23 Pikhalonga iye nawo, Goliati adabuluka pakwecha mbapikira Aisraele ninga mukhachitira iye pakutoma. Tenepo Davite adapiva." 
1Samuel17:24 Pidaona Aisraele Goliati adathawa na mantha. 
1Samuel17:25 Iwo akhalonga unango na mwanzache mbati, “Ngamuyang'aneni! Ngavani kupikira kunachita iyeku! Mfumu Sauli adumbira kupereka mfupo ukulu kuna munthu anamphayo; pontho mfumu anampasa mwanache wamkazi kuti akhale mkazache, pontho kuti banjache nkhabe dzafunika kukhoma msonkho tayu.”" 
1Samuel17:26 Davite adavunza amuna akhali chifupi na iye ale mbati, “Kadi munthu anafuna kupha Mfilisti mbabulusira Aisraele chinthu chakuchitisa manyadzochi anapaswanji? Mfilistiyu, munthu okhonda dziwa Mulungu ule mbani kuti alulupise anyankhondo a Mulungu wamoyo?”" 
1Samuel17:27 Iwo adampanga pinthu pinafuna dzachitika kuna munthu wakupha Goliati. 
1Samuel17:28 Eliabu, nanache Davite wamkululetu adamva akulonga na anthu, natenepo iye adazhangalira Davite mbamvunza mbati, “Kadi iwe ukuchitanji kuno? Mbani akuyang'anira mabirako kuthando? Iwe mwana wakulunkuma, pontho wakuipa mtima! Ayi iwe wadza kwene dzaona nkhondo kuno?”" 
1Samuel17:29 Davite adavunza mbati, “Kadi ine ndatani? Ayi ndileke na kuvunza kwene?”" 
1Samuel17:30 Iye adazungunukira kuna amuna anango mbavunza chibodzi-bodzi, tenepo ndzidzi onsene ukhavunza iye, akhatawirwa chibodzi-bodzi." 
1Samuel17:31 Amuna anango adava pikhalonga Davite pile mbakapilonga kuna Sauli, ule adamchemeresa." 
1Samuel17:32 Davite adalonga kuna Sauli mbati, “Mfumu, paleke khala munthu wakugopa Mfilistiyu. Ine ndinati ndiende kamenyana naye.”" 
1Samuel17:33 Sauli adatawira mbati, “Tayu, unakwanisa tani kamenyana naye weneyu? Iwe ndiwe mphale pyako, pontho iye akhala nyankhondo moyo wache onsene!”" 
1Samuel17:34 Davite adalonga mbati, “Mfumu, ine ndimbayang'anira mabira ababanga. Tenepo ndzidzi onsene nkhalamu penu thika angaphata mwanabira," 
1Samuel17:35 ine ndimbaenda kampulumusa mwanabira kukanwa kwache. Pontho ngakhala nkhalamu penu thika anandipomokera, ine ndimbamshipa pakhosi mbandimmenya mpakana kumpha." 
1Samuel17:36 Ine ndapha nkhalamu pontho matika, tenepo ndinati ndichite chibodzi-bodzi kuna Mfilisti okhonda dziwa Mulungu ule akululupisa anyankhondo a Mulungu wamoyo." 
1Samuel17:37 MBUYA adandipulumusa kuna nkhalamu na matika, tenepo iye anati andipulumuse kuna Mfilistiyu.” Sauli adatawira mbati, “Ndoko, MBUYA mbakhale nawe.”" 
1Samuel17:38 Iye adapasa Davite mayala ache; chipewu chankuwa, pontho chakuvala chakutchinga nacho manungo ache kuti avale." 
1Samuel17:39 Davite adamangirira talasada ya Sauli mbayesera kufamba, kwache iye adachimwana kufamba napyo, thangwi iye hadazerewere kupivala tayu. Iye adalonga kuna Sauli mbati, “Ine nkhabe kwanisa kumenya na pyonsenepi tayu. Ine sidapizerewere tayu.” Tenepo iye adadula pyonsenene pile." 
1Samuel17:40 Iye adakwata ndodo ya umakabuswache mbalokota miyala mishanu yakubulungira mumkulo mbaiikha m'thumba mwache pontho na mbemba m'manja mwache mbaenda kukhali Mfilisti ule. 
1Samuel17:41 Mfilisti ule adatoma kufamba kwendera kuna Davite uku patsogolo pache pakhali nyakuthukula chakugedera matswimo chache. Iye adathimiza kudza chifupi na Davite. 
1Samuel17:42 Tenepo pidamuona iye mwadidi Davite ule, iye adamululupisa, thangwi iye akhali mphale ene pyache wa manungo adidi pontho wakubalika." 
1Samuel17:43 Iye adalonga kuna Davite mbati, “Ayi ndodo ina iweyo njanji nayo? Kadi ukunyerezera kuti ndine mwanambwa?” Natenepo Mfilisti ule adatemberera Davite na dzina ya milungu yache." 
1Samuel17:44 Iye adapikira Davite mbati, “Idza kuno, ine ndinati ndipereke manungo ako kuna mbalame na nyama zam'tsanga kuti aadye.”" 
1Samuel17:45 Davite adatawira mbati, “Iwe ukudza kuna ine na talasada, dipa na momba, mbwenye ine ndikudza kuna iwe na dzina ya MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, Mulungu wa anyankhondo a Israele analulupisa iwe ule." 
1Samuel17:46 Lero ene pano MBUYA anati akuikhe m'manja mwanga, ndinati ndikukunde mbandikugwanda msolo wako. Pontho ndinapereka mitembo ya anyankhondo a Chifilisti kuna mbalame na kuna nyama zam'tsanga kuti zidye. Tenepo dziko yonsene yapansi inati idziwe kuti Israele ana Mulungu." 
1Samuel17:47 Pontho munthu onsene pano anati aone kuti MBUYA nkhabe funa talasada penu dipa kupulumusa napyo anthu ache. Iye ngwakukunda pankhondo, tenepo Iye anati akuikheni monsenene m'manja mwathu.”" 
1Samuel17:48 Goliati adatoma pontho kwendera kukhali Davite kule, tenepo Davite adathamangira kabodzi kene kukhadandandalika anyankhondo a Chifilisti kule kuti amenyane naye." 
1Samuel17:49 Iye adapitisa m'thumba mwache mbakwata mwala kuikha pambemba pache, tenepo adaiponya kuna Goliati. Mwala ule udammenya pachipumu chache mbupita mumsolo mwache, penepo Goliati adagwa na fufumimba." 
1Samuel17:50 Natenepo Davite mwakukhonda phatisa basa talasada, adakunda na kupha Goliati na mwala pontho mbemba." 
1Samuel17:51 Iye adathamanga kuna iye mbamponderera. Iye adasolola talasada ya Goliati mbagwanda nayo msolo wache mbampha. Pidaona Afilisti kuti dombo wawo afa, iwo adathawa." 
1Samuel17:52 Amuna a ku Israele na Yuda adakhuwa mbaathamangisa njira yonsene mpakana ku Gati na kumsuwo wa mzinda wa Ekroni. Afilisti akukuwazwa adagwa kufa njira yonsene mpakana ku Shaaraimu, Gati na Ekroni." 
1Samuel17:53 Pidabwerera Aisraele kubulukira kathamangisa Afilisti, iwo adakwata pinthu mumsasa mwawo mule." 
1Samuel17:54 Davite adalokota msolo wa Goliati mbaenda nawo ku Yerusalemu, kwache iye adakoya pida pya Goliati m'khumbi mwache." 
1Samuel17:55 Pidaona Sauli kuti Davite akhaenda kamenyana na Goliati, iye adavunza Abineri mkadamu wa anyankhondo ache mbati, “Ayi Abineri, weneyu ndi mwana ani?” Abineri adatawira mbati, “Ine nkhabe kupidziwa tayu, Mfumu.”" 
1Samuel17:56 Sauli adalonga mbati, “Ndoko ukavunze mwadidi.”" 
1Samuel17:57 Tenepo pidabwerera Davite kumsasa pidapha iye Goliati, Abineri adenda na Davite kuna Sauli, mwenemo Davite aphatirira msolo wa Goliati m'manja mwache." 
1Samuel17:58 Sauli adamvunza mbati, “Ayi mphalewe ndiwe mwana ani?” Davite adatawira mbati, “Ndine mwana nyabasanu Yese wa ku Betelehemu.”" 
1Samuel18:1 Sauli na Davite adamala kulongesana kukhachita iwo kule. Kubuluka penepo, Yonatani mwana wa mamuna wa Sauli adatenuka mtima na Davite mbamfuna pyakwanga pene ninga mukhapifunira iye yekha ene." 
1Samuel18:2 Kubulukira nsiku yeneyo Sauli adakoya Davite m'nyumba mwache, pontho hadamtawirise kubwerera kwawo tayu." 
1Samuel18:3 Yonatani adadumbira kuchita ushamwali na Davite kwenda na kwenda, thangwi ya kumfuna kwache kukulu." 
1Samuel18:4 Iye adadula mkhanjo na mayala pikhavala iye pile mbampasa Davite, pabodzi pene na talasadache, uta na bande." 
1Samuel18:5 Davite akhali munthu wakupikwanisa pabasa yonsene ikhamtuma Sauli. Natenepo Sauli adauikha kukhala mkadamu wa anyankhondo ache. Penepi pidakomera akadamu na amuna onsene a Sauli. 
1Samuel18:6 Pikhabwerera Davite na anyankhondo kwawo kubulukira kudapha iye Mfilisti kule, akazi akhabuluka m'maluwani onsene mu Israele kagumana na Mfumu Sauli. Iwo akhaimba nyimbo zakuonesa kukomerwa kwawo, kuvina pontho na kuimba pisekese na malimba." 
1Samuel18:7 Mwakukomerwa kwawo akazi akhaimba mbati, “Mfumu Sauli apha anthu pikwi, mbwenye Davite apha pikwi khumi na kumanyalo.”" 
1Samuel18:8 Sauli adaswirizwa napyo mbazhangali pyakwanga mbalonga mbati, “Pya Davite iwo akulonga kuti apha pikwi khumi na kumanyalo, mbwenye pya ine iwo akulonga pikwi basi. Kwasala anati ampitise ufumu!”" 
1Samuel18:9 Natenepo iye adachita bivu mbapenuka naye Davite kubulukira nsiku yeneyo kwenda m'tsogolo. 
1Samuel18:10 Mangwana mwache mzimu wakuipa wakutumizwa na Mulungu udamgudumira Sauli kabodzi kene, natenepo adatsanda-tsanda pyache m'nyumba mwache ninga nyansala. Davite akhaimba nyakatangale ninga mukhachitira iye nsiku zonsene. Sauli akhaphatira dipa m'manja mwache." 
1Samuel18:11 Iye adalonga yekha ene mbati, “Ndinati ndimkhomere kufufu.” Tenepo iye adamponyera dipa ile kawiri, kwache Davite adaimzwenga ndzidzi onsene uwiriwo." 
1Samuel18:12 Sauli akhachita mantha na Davite, thangwi MBUYA akhadamkhonda, mbwenye akhali na Davite." 
1Samuel18:13 Natenepo Sauli adambulusa m'nyumba mwache mbamuikha kukhala mkadamu wa anyankhondo chikwi. Davite adatsogolera amunache ale pankhondo," 
1Samuel18:14 pontho akhali wakupikwanisa papinthu pyonsene pikhachita iye, thangwi MBUYA akhali naye." 
1Samuel18:15 Sauli adadzindikira pya kupikwanisa kwa Davite mbanyanyiratu kuchita naye mantha. 
1Samuel18:16 Mbwenye munthu onsene mu Israele na Yuda adamfuna Davite, thangwi akhali mkadamu wakupikwanisa." 
1Samuel18:17 Kubuluka penepo Sauli adalonga kuna Davite mbati, “Ushu Merabi mwananga wamkazi wamkulu. Ndinakupasa kuti akhale mkazako, kwache wathema kunditumikira mwakuwanga mtima pontho mwakukhulupirika mbumenya nkhondo ya MBUYA.” Sauli akhanyerezera kuti na njira yeneyi Afilisti anati aphe Davite mbakhonda kupichita ndiye ene." 
1Samuel18:18 Davite adatawira mbati, “Ndine animbo ine, pontho banjanga ninji penu mbumba ya babanga mu Israele kuti ndikhale mkamweneache mfumu.”" 
1Samuel18:19 Mbwenye pidafika ndzidzi wakuti Merabi aperekwe kuna Davite, m'mbuto mwache iye adaperekwa kuna mamuna unango dzinache Adriele wa ku Mehola." 
1Samuel18:20 Kwache Mikaela mwana unango wa Sauli adamfuna Davite, tenepo pidapiva Sauli adakomerwa napyo pyakwanga." 
1Samuel18:21 Iye adalonga yekha ene mbati, “Ndinati ndipereke Mikaela kuna Davite. Ine ndinamphatisa basa ninga msampha, tenepo iye anamphesa na Afilisti.” Tenepo Sauli adalonga kachiwiri kache kuna Davite mbati, “Iwe unati ukhale mkamweneanga.”" 
1Samuel18:22 Sauli adapanga mathubu ache kulonga kuna Davite chibiso-biso mbati, “Mfumu akomerwa nawe pontho mathubu ache onsene ambakufuna; uno ndi ndzidzi wadidi wakuti iwe usembe mwanache.”" 
1Samuel18:23 Iwo adampanga Davite penepi, tenepo iye adatawira mbati, “Chenechi ntchilemedzo chikulu pyakwanga kukhala mkamweneache mfumu, chikulu pyakwanga kuna munthu wakutcherenga pontho okhonda funika ninga ine.”" 
1Samuel18:24 Mathubu adapanga Sauli pidalonga Davite pile," 
1Samuel18:25 natenepo Sauli adaatonga kupanga Davite kuti, “Pinafuna mfumu pene ninga chuma kupagali mwanache ndi nsonga zakumaso zachimuna dzana za Afilisti kubwezera anyamalwache.” (Yeneyi ndi njira ikhadasasanya Sauli kuti Davite aphiwe na Afilisti.)" 
1Samuel18:26 Mathubu adapanga Davite pidalonga Sauli pile, tenepo Davite adakomerwa pyakwanga na kukhala mkamweneache mfumu. Nsiku yakukazhali mbidzati khazikiswa" 
1Samuel18:27 Davite na amunache adenda mbakapha amuna madzana mawiri a Afilisti. Iye adagwanda nsonga zawo zakumaso kwenda nazo kuna mfumu mbakamulengesera zonsenezo, towera akhale mkamweneache mfumu. Penepo Sauli adathema kupereka Mikaela mwanache kuti asembwe na Davite." 
1Samuel18:28 Sauli adadzindikira mwadidi mwene kuti MBUYA akhali na Davite, pontho kuti Mikaela mwanache akhamfuna Davite." 
1Samuel18:29 Tenepo iye adachita mantha pyakwanga pene na Davite mbakhala nyamalwache ndzidzi onsene ukhali iye na moyo.
