1Samuel18:30 Anyankhondo a Chifilisti akhadza mbachita naye nkhondo, kwache nkhondo yonsene Davite akhakunda kupiringana akadamu anango a nkhondo a Sauli. Natenepo Davite adasanduka wakuveka pyakwanga." 
1Samuel19:1 Sauli adapanga mwanache Yonatani na mathubu ache onsene kuti iye akhasasanya pyakupha Davite. Mbwenye Yonatani akhamfuna pyakwanga Davite," 
1Samuel19:2 natenepo adamcheuza mbati, “Babanga akuyesa-yesa kuti akuphe. Tenepo chita mphole-mphole mangwana na machibese, ndoko kabisale mbukhale pyako kweneko." 
1Samuel19:3 Ine ndinati ndiende kuminda kaimira pabodzi pene na baba pambuto panabisala iwepo. Ine ndinalonga naye pya iwepo mbandikupanga pinafuna iye kalonga.” 
1Samuel19:4 Yonatani adasimba Davite pamaso pa Sauli babache mbati, “Baba, lekani kuchita pyakuipa kuna nyabasanu Davite. Iye hadakudawireni tayu. M'mbuto mwache iye achita pinthu pyakukuganyalisani pyakwanga." 
1Samuel19:5 Iye adasasanyika kufa ndzidzi udapha iye Goliati, tenepo MBUYA adzesa kukunda kukulu kuna Israele. Pidapiona imwe, mudakomerwa napyo. Apo mwatani munafuna kuchita chinthu chakudawika kuna munthu okhonda dawa ninga Davite pakumpha wakusowa na thangwi ene?”" 
1Samuel19:6 Sauli adaphatwa mtima na mafala adalonga Yonatani ale mbadumbira na dzina ya MBUYA kuti iye hanapha Davite tayu. 
1Samuel19:7 Tenepo Yonatani adachemera Davite mbampanga pyonsene; kubuluka penepo adenda naye kuna Sauli, natenepo Davite adatumikira mfumu ninga pakutoma pale." 
1Samuel19:8 Nkhondo na Afilisti idalamuka pontho. Davite adamenyana nawo mbaakunda mwakuti iwo adathawa. 
1Samuel19:9 Nsiku inango mzimu wakuipa wakutumizwa na Mulungu udamgudumira Sauli. Iye akhakhala m'nyumba mwache uku aphatira dipa m'manja mwache, mwenemo Davite akhaimba nyakatangale wache." 
1Samuel19:10 Sauli adayesera kumkhomera kufufu na dipache ile, kwache Davite adaimzwenga, tenepo dipayo idalasa fufu mbikakamira. Davite adathawa mbapulumuka." 
1Samuel19:11 Mosiku onthowo Sauli adatuma amuna anango kazonda nyumba ya Davite kuti amphe mangwana mwache na machibese. Mikaela mkazi Davite adamcheuza mbati, “Mosiku uno ungakhonda thawa, mangwana unati ufe.”" 
1Samuel19:12 Iye adamtchithisira na pazhanera. Davite adathawa mbapulumuka. 
1Samuel19:13 Tenepo Mikaela adakwata mfanikizo wa m'nyumbamo mbaugonesa patalimba mbauikhira nsago wa nthembe ya mbuzi mbaufinikiza. 
1Samuel19:14 Pidadza amuna a Sauli kuti akwate Davite, Mikaela adaapanga kuti Davite afeluka." 
1Samuel19:15 Mbwenye Sauli adaabweza kuti akaone Davite na maso awo. Iye adatonga mbati, “Ndokoni mukamthukule na talimbache eneyo mbamudze naye kuno, tenepo ine ndinampha.”" 
1Samuel19:16 Iwo adapita m'bwalomo mbagumana mfanikizo wa m'nyumbamo uli patalimba pontho na nsago wa nthembe ya mbuzi kumsolo kwache. 
1Samuel19:17 Sauli adavunza Mikaela mbati, “Wandinyengezeranji tenepa mbutawirisa nyamalwanga kuthawa?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Iye adalonga kuti anandipha ndingakhonda kumphedza kuthawa.”" 
1Samuel19:18 Davite adathawira kuna Samuele ku Rama mbakampanga pyonsene pikhadachita Sauli kuna iye. Penepo Samuele na iye adenda ku Naioti mbakakhala kweneko. 
1Samuel19:19 Sauli adapiva kuti Davite akhali ku Naioti mu Rama," 
1Samuel19:20 natenepo adatuma amuna kamphata. Mbwenye iwo adaona gulu ya maprofeti akukhuwa mafala auprofeti, mkadamu wawo mbakhala Samuele. Penepo Mzimu wa MBUYA adagudumira amuna adatumwa na Sauli ale. Tenepo iwo adatoma kukhuwa mafala auprofeti." 
1Samuel19:21 Pidava Sauli penepi, adatuma amuna anango azinji ene, iwombo adatoma kukhuwa mafala auprofeti. Iye adatuma pontho amuna anango kachitatu kache, enewo pontho adachita chibodzi-bodzi." 
1Samuel19:22 Tenepo Sauli ene makayo adalamuka kwenda ku Rama. Pidafika iye pamchera ukulu mu Seku, adavunza pya kule kukhali Samuele na Davite, natenepo iye adapangwa kuti iwo akhali ku Naioti." 
1Samuel19:23 Pikhaenda iye kweneko, Mzimu wa MBUYA adamgudumirambo, tenepo iwo adatoma kukhuwa mafala auprofeti mpakana ku Naioti." 
1Samuel19:24 Iye adadula nguwo mbatoma kukhuwa mafala auprofeti pamaso pa Samuele, mbagona chipezi-pezi masikati onsene na mosiku wenewo onsene. Yeneyi ndi thangwi yache anthu ambalonga kuti, “Kani Sauli asanduka mprofeti?”" 
1Samuel20:1 Tenepo Davite adathawira ku Naioti ku Rama mbaenda kuna Yonatani. Iye adamvunza mbati, “Ayi chadawa ine ninji? Mseru wache wasosa ine ngwanji? Chadawira ine babako ninji chakuti afune pyakundipha?”" 
1Samuel20:2 Yonatani adatawira mbati, “Mulungu akhonda kuti iwe ufe! Babanga ambandipanga pyonsene pimbachita iye chakufunika penu tayu, pontho iye nkhabe kundibisira penepi tayu. Penepyo si pyakuona tayu.”" 
1Samuel20:3 Mbwenye Davite adatawira mbati, “Babako akudziwa mwadidi mwene kundifuna kumbachita iwe, tenepo iye anyerezera kukubisira pinafuna iye kuchita, thangwi pinakuchitisa kutsukwala pyakwanga pene. Ndinadumbira kuna iwe na dzina ya MBUYA kuti ndili kwene thanyo ibodzi basi na imfa!”" 
1Samuel20:4 Yonatani adatawira mbati, “Ine ndinati ndichite pyonsene pinafuna iwepyo.”" 
1Samuel20:5 Mbwenye Davite adatawira mbati, “Mangwana ndi Phwando yakusekera Kubalwa kwa mwezi, tenepo ine ndathema kudya pabodzi pene na mfumu. Mbwenye ngakhala pyonsene mphyadidi kuna iwe, ine ndinati ndiende kabisala kuminda mpakana mkuchono na mawulo." 
1Samuel20:6 Ngakhala babako anakandisowa pathebulupo kampange kuti iwe wanditawirisa kwenda kwathu ku Betelehemu kapereka nsembe za pachaka pabodzi pene na banjathu yonsene. 
1Samuel20:7 Ngakhala iye analonga kuti, ‘Pyakoma,’ penepo ine ndapulumuka. Mbwenye ngakhala anazhangali napyo, penepo unapidziwa kuti ana phinga kufuna kundikuwaza." 
1Samuel20:8 Ndaphata miyendo ndikomerembo mtima pakukoya kudumbira kudachita iwe kuna ine kule. Mbwenye ngakhala ine ndadawa, iwe ene undiphe pyako! Thangwi yache njanji kuti uende nane kuna babako kuti akandiphe?”" 
1Samuel20:9 Yonatani adatawira mbati, “Leka nyerezera pinthu ninga penepyo! Ngakhala ine ndikhapidziwa mwadidi kuti babanga akuchita phinga kufuna kukupha, ine mbidakupanga.”" 
1Samuel20:10 Penepo Davite adavunza mbati, “Mbani anafuna kundidziwisa kuti babako akutawira mwakuzhangali?”" 
1Samuel20:11 Yonatani adatawira mbati, “Tende kuminda.” Tenepo iwo adenda," 
1Samuel20:12 Yonatani adalonga kuna Davite mbati, “MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele mbakhale mboni yathu! Pandzidzi ninga uno mangwana ndinamvunza babanga, tenepo ngakhala manyerezero ache kuna iwe ngadidi, ndinati ndikutumire mphangwa." 
1Samuel20:13 Mbwenye ngakhala iye anafuna pyakukupha, MBUYA mbandiphe pyache ngakhala sinakudziwisa penu kukuthawisa kukutchinjiriza tayu. MBUYA mbakhale nawe ninga mukhachitira iye kuna babanga!" 
1Samuel20:14 Ngakhala ndinakhala na moyo koya chiverano chakupambulika chachita iwe chile mbukhulupirike kuna ine; mbwenye ngakhala ndinafa," 
1Samuel20:15 onesa sasawa kuna banjanga yonsene kwenda na kwenda kukhulupirika kwako. Tenepo MBUYA angavunga monsene mwene anyamalwako onsene," 
1Samuel20:16 chiverano chathu chachita ifechi chithimize kukhalapo. Ngakhala chinasweka, MBUYA anati akutchunyuse.”" 
1Samuel20:17 Yonatani adachitisa Davite kudumbira pontho kutsikimizira kumfuna kwache, thangwi Yonatani akhamfuna pyakwanga Davite ninga mukhapifunira iye yekha ene." 
1Samuel20:18 Tenepo Yonatani adalonga kuna Davite mbati, “Podi Mangwana ndi Phwando yakusekera Kubalwa kwa mwezi, pinati pidziwike kuti iwe nkhabepo paphwandopo." 
1Samuel20:19 Mkuchono kusowa kwako paphwandopo ndiye kunanyanya kudziwika; tenepo ndoko kumbuto kudabisala iwe pakutoma kule mbukabisale kunsi kwa mulu wa miyala. 
1Samuel20:20 Ine ndinati ndiponye matswimo matatu penepo ninga kuti ndiye pikhanyerezera ine. 
1Samuel20:21 Ndinatuma nyabasanga kaalokota. Tenepo ngakhala ndinampanga kuti, ‘Yang'ana matswimo ali kukhundu kwako uko alokote, penepo nkhulonga kuti wapulumuka, pontho unakwanisa kubulukapo. Ndinadumbira na dzina ya Mulungu wa moyo kuti nkhabe chinthu na chibodzi chene chinafuna kukugoswa tayu.’" 
1Samuel20:22 Mbwenye ngakhala ndinampanga kuti, ‘Matswimo ali kukhundu kwako uko,’ penepo thawa, thangwi MBUYA akukuthawisa." 
1Samuel20:23 Kulonga pya chiverano chachita ife kuna unango na mwanzache, MBUYA anaonesesa kuti tikuchikoya kwenda na kwenda.”" 
1Samuel20:24 Tenepo Davite adabisala kuminda. Pidafika Phwando yakusekera Kubalwa kwa Mwezi Mfumu Sauli adakhala pansi kudya," 
1Samuel20:25 mbakhala pambuto pache pandzidzi onsene chifupi na fufu. Abineri adakhala chifupi naye, Yonatani adakhala mwakuyang'anisana naye. Pambuto ya Davite pakhali nkhabe munthu." 
1Samuel20:26 Kwache Sauli hadalonge pinthu tayu nsiku yeneyo thangwi akhanyerezera kuti chinthu chinango chidachitika kuna iye tenepo iye hakhali wakuchena tayu. 
1Samuel20:27 Mangwana mwache pidagwanda Phwando yakusekera Kubalwa kwa Mwezi pampando wa Davite pakhali nkhabe munthu basi, tenepo Sauli adavunza Yonatani mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji Davite hadakhale nafe tayu pa phwando pano dzulo na lero?”" 
1Samuel20:28 Yonatani adatawira mbati, “Iye adandipempha kuti ndimtawirise kwenda ku Betelehemu mbati," 
1Samuel20:29 ‘Ndaphata miyendo nditawirise kwenda thangwi banjanga akuchita mwambo wakupereka nsembe mu luwanimo, tenepo nananga andipanga kuti ndikakhale nawo kweneko. Tenepo ngakhala ndiwedi shamwalianga nditawirise ndiende kaona abale.’ Ndi thangwi yache iye hali pambuto pachepa tayu.”" 
1Samuel20:30 Sauli adamtuzulira maso Yonatani mbalonga mbati, “Mako akhali wakupandukira pontho wakusowa chikhulupiro! Chinchino ndikupidziwa kuti iwe uli kukhundu ya Davite, pontho ukupilulupisa wekha ene na mako ene ule!" 
1Samuel20:31 Ayi iwe nkhabe kupidziwa tayu kuti Davite angakhala na moyo iwe nkhabe dzapita ufumu wa dzikoyi. Ndoko ukamkwate udze naye kuno chinchino pano. Iye athema kuphiwa.” 
1Samuel20:32 Yonatani adatawira mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji kuti iye athema kuphiwa, chachita iye ninji?”" 
1Samuel20:33 Na mafala enewo Sauli adaponyera dipa Yonatani kuti amphe, penepo Yonatani adadzindikira kuti babache akhachitadi phinga kufuna kupha Davite." 
1Samuel20:34 Yonatani adalamuka pathebulu pale mwakuzhangali pyakwanga, pontho okhonda kudya na chinthu chene nsiku yeneyo, nsiku yachiwiri yache ya Phwando yakusekera Kubalwa kwa Mwezi. Iye adasanyika pyakwanga mumtima mwache thangwi ya Davite, thangwi Sauli akhadamselusa." 
1Samuel20:35 Mangwana mwache Yonatani adabuluka kwenda ku minda kagumanikana na Davite ninga mukhadapanganirana iwo mule. Iye adakwata mphale 
1Samuel20:36 mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Thamanga ukalokote matswimo anafuna ine kuponyawa.” Mphale ule adathamanga, tenepo Yonatani adaponya tswimo mbimpiringana mphale ule." 
1Samuel20:37 Pidafika padagwera tswimo pale, Yonatani adakhuwa mbati, “Tswimo ili kutsogolo kwakoko!" 
1Samuel20:38 Leka imira kwene penepo chimbiza!” Mphale ule adalokota tswimo ile mbaipereka kuna mbuyache 
1Samuel20:39 okhonda dziwa kuti ninji chikhachitika; akhapidziwa ndi Yonatani na Davite ene basi. 
1Samuel20:40 Yonatani adapereka pida pyache pile kuna mphale ule mbampanga kuti abwerere napyo ku luwani. 
1Samuel20:41 Pidenda mphale ule Davite adabuluka pamulu wa miyala pakhadabisala iye pale mbagodama mbalamba katatu. Iye pabodzi pene na Yonatani onsene akhalira uku akupsompsonana unango na mwanzache. Kwache kutsukwala kwa Davite kukhali kukulu pyakwanga kupiringana kwa Yonatani. 
1Samuel20:42 Tenepo Yonatani adalonga kuna Davite mbati, “Mulungu mbakhale nawe. MBUYA anaonesesa kuti iwe na ine, pidzukulu pyako na pidzukulu pyanga pinakoya chiverano chakupambulika chachita iwe na inechi kwenda na kwenda.” Kubuluka penepo Davite adenda, Yonatani adabwerera kuluwani." 
1Samuel21:1 Davite adenda ku Nobu kuna Ahimeleki nyansembe. Ahimeleki adatetemera na mantha pidagumanikana iye naye mbamvunza mbati, “Watani wadza kuno wekha ene?”" 
1Samuel21:2 Davite adatawira mbati, “Ndadza kuno dzachita pyanditonga mfumu, pontho andipanga kuti ndileke panga munthu na mbodzi ene pya basa yadzera ine kuno. Amunanga ndaapanga kuti ndikagumanikane nawo pambuto panango pontho." 
1Samuel21:3 Apo china imwe ninji? Ngandipaseni mikate mishanu penu chinthu chonsene china imwe.” 
1Samuel21:4 Nyansembe ule adalonga mbati, “Ine nkhabe na mkate ene tayu, mbwenye mikate yakupambulika; iwe unakwanisa kuikwata ngakhala amunako hana manungo akupisa tayu.”" 
1Samuel21:5 Davite adatawira mbati, “Nkhabe tayu. Amunanga ndzidzi onsene ambapichitisa kukhala akuchena podi kwene kuti tikufambira pinango pene, ndiye ndi tani na ndzidzi uno unafambira ife basa yakufunikayi!”" 
1Samuel21:6 Tenepo nyansembe ule adampasa Davite mikate yakupambulika ile, thangwi mikate ikhali na iye ene ikhali ile ikhadaperekwa kuna MBUYA, pontho ile ikhadabuluswa kwene pathebulu yakupambulika kuti paikhwe inango yadidi." 
1Samuel21:7 Pidachitika kuti tsamgudu wa amakabuswa a Sauli, dzinache Doegi wa ku Edomu, akhali penepo nsiku yeneyo, thangwi iye adathema kuchita mwambo wachipembedzo pamaso pa MBUYA." 
1Samuel21:8 Davite adamvunza Ahimeleki mbati, “Ayi imwe muna dipa penu talasada pyakuti munakwanisa kundipasa? Matongero a mfumu ndiye adandichitisa kuti ndichimbize mwakuti ndidasowa na ndzidzi ene wakuti ndikwate talasada penu chida changa.”" 
1Samuel21:9 Ahimeleki adatawira mbati, “Ine ndina talasada ya Goliati Mfilisti adapha iwe m'phedi ya Ela ule; ili kunsi kwa efodi, yakukutizwa na nguwo. Ikwate ngakhala unaifuna chida chili kuno ntchenecho chene basi.” Davite adalonga mbati, “Ngandipaseni, thangwi nkhabe kunango pontho kuna talasada yadidi kupiringana yeneyi!”" 
1Samuel21:10 Tenepo Davite adenda pyache kuthawa Mfumu Sauli mbaenda kuna Akisi mfumu wa ku Gati. 
1Samuel21:11 Mathubu a mfumu adalonga kuna Akisi mbati, “Ayi weneyu si Davite tayu, mfumu wa dziko yachembo? Weneyu si ule tayu akazi akhaimba pya iye uku akuvina mbati, ‘Sauli apha pikwi pya anthu mbwenye Davite apha anthu pikwi khumi na kumanyalo?’ ”" 
1Samuel21:12 Davite adaikha mafala enewo mumtima mwache, tenepo adachita mantha pikulu pene na Mfumu Akisi." 
1Samuel21:13 Tenepo pamaso pawo iye adasanduza makhaliro ache mbakhala ninga nyansala pakulemba-lemba pyache pamsuwo ukulu wa kupitira mumzindamo, pontho mbayuya pyache masilili pandevu pache." 
1Samuel21:14 Akisi adalonga kuna mathubu ache mbati, “Yang'anani, munthuyu ndi nyansala. Mwadzeranji naye kuno?" 
1Samuel21:15 Ine ndatopa nawo anyansala. Mwadzeranji na unango wakuchita pyache pyakupupwa m'nyumba mwanga muno?” 
1Samuel22:1 Davite adathawa kumzinda wa Gati mbaenda kakhala kunkhwimba chifupi na luwani ya Adulamu. Pidapiva abale ache na anango onsene kuti iye akhali kweneko, iwo adenda kaphatana naye." 
1Samuel22:2 Anthu onsene ale akhaponderezwa penu a mangawa na okhonda komerwa na pyakuchita pya Sauli adenda kuna iye, amuna onsene pabodzi pene adakwana ninga madzana manayi, Davite mbakhala mkadamu wawo." 
1Samuel22:3 Davite adenda ku Mizipa wa ku Moabu mbalonga kuna mfumu wa kweneko mbati, “Ndaphata miyendo tawirisani babanga na mama dzakhalambo kuno kufikirana ndadziwa ninji pinafuna kundichitira Mulungu.”" 
1Samuel22:4 Tenepo adasiya makolo ache kweneko na mfumu wa ku Moabu mbakhala kweneko mwenemo Davite akhabisala m'nkhwimba. 
1Samuel22:5 Tenepo mprofeti Gadi adadza kuna Davite mbalonga mbati, “Leka khala kuno, ndoko kabodzi kene kudziko ya Yuda.” Tenepo Davite adabuluka kweneko mbaenda kumsitu wa Hereti." 
1Samuel22:6 Nsiku inango Sauli akhali ku Gibea. Iye adakhala pansi pa muti wambwemba paphiri na dipache m'manja mwache, pontho mathubu ache adamzungulira. Iye adapangwa, kuti Davite na amunache akhadagumanwa." 
1Samuel22:7 Tenepo adalonga kuna mathubu ache mbati, “Veserani amuna a dzinza ya Benjemani! Kani mukunyerezera kuti Davite anakupasani minda na minda yamfesa kuna monsenene mbakuchitisani kukhala akadamu ache a nkhondo?" 
1Samuel22:8 Ayi ndi thangwi ache monsenene mukusasanya pyakundipha? Nee mbodzi wa imwe adandipanga kuti mwananga makayo akhadasasanya chiverano na Davite. Nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene akutsalakana pya ine kundipanga kwene kuti Davite, mbodzi wa amunanga, ndzidzi uno akusaka-saka mpata kuti andiphe pontho kuti mwananga ndiye adampasa chipapu chenechi!”" 
1Samuel22:9 Doegi akhaimira penepo pabodzi pene na mathubu a Sauli mbalonga mbati, “Ine ndidamuona Davite ndzidzi udenda iye kuna Ahimeleki mwana Ahitubu wa ku Nobu." 
1Samuel22:10 Ahimeleki adavunza MBUYA pinthu pidathema Davite kuchita, tenepo adampasa pyakudya na talasada ya Goliati Mfilisti ule.”" 
1Samuel22:11 Natenepo Mfumu Sauli adachemeresa nyansembe Ahimeleki na abale ache onsene, ale akhalimbo anyansembe ku Nobu, tenepo iwo adadza kuna iye." 
1Samuel22:12 Sauli adalonga kuna Ahimeleki mbati, “Vesera kuno, Ahimeleki!” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ndawo, Mbuya,”" 
1Samuel22:13 Sauli adamvunza mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji iwe na Davite mukusasanya pyakundipha? Thangwi yache ninji iwe udampasa pyakudya pontho talasada mbuvunza kuna Mulungu pyathema iye kuchita? Chinchino iye andipandukira pontho akusaka-saka danga yakuti andiphe!”" 
1Samuel22:14 Ahimeleki adatawira mbati, “Davite ndi munthu wakukhulupirika pyakwanga pakati pa anyakukutumikirani onsene. Iye ndi mkamweneanu mkadamu wa anyakukuyang'anirani, pontho wakulemedzwa na munthu onsene m'nyumba mwanu." 
1Samuel22:15 Ande, ndidavunza Mulungu m'mbuto mwache pontho keneko nee kakhali kakutoma tayu kuchita tenepo. Mbwenye kulonga pyakusasanya pyakufuna kukuphani Mfumu, lekani thonya chala ine penu mbodzi wa m'banja mwanga. Ine sinadziwa chinthu na chibodzi chene papinthu penepi tayu!”" 
1Samuel22:16 Mfumu adalonga mbati, “Ahimeleki, iwe na abale ako onsene mwathema kuphiwa.”" 
1Samuel22:17 Penepo iye adalonga kuna anyakumuyang'anira akhaimira chifupi na iye ale mbati, “Iphani anyansembe a MBUYA ale! Iwo adaverana na Davite pyakundipha pontho hadandipange tayu kuti iye adathawa podi kwene kuti iwo akhapidziwa mwadidi mwene.” Kwache anyakumuyang'anira ale adakhonda kuthukula dzanjawo kupha anyansembe a MBUYA ale." 
1Samuel22:18 Tenepo Sauli adalonga kuna Doegi mbati, “Iwe ipha anyansembe ale!” Penepo Doegi wa Chiedomu adaapha onsenewo. Pansiku yeneyo iye adapha anyansembe akukwana makumasere na ashanu akuthema pabasa ya unyansembe yakuthukula efodi." 
1Samuel22:19 Sauli adalonga pontho kuti anyakukhala mu Nobu onsene aphiwe, mzinda wa anyansembe: amuna na akazi, ana na akachiya ene, ng'ombe, mabulu na mabira, pyonsene pidamala phiwa." 
1Samuel22:20 Mbwenye Abiatara mbodzi wa ana achimuna a Ahimeleki, ulembo babache akhali Ahitubu, adathawa mbaenda kaphatana na Davite." 
1Samuel22:21 Iye adampanga mule mukhadachekera Sauli anyansembe a MBUYA. 
1Samuel22:22 Davite adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Pidaona ine Doegi wa Chiedomu penepo nsiku yeneyo ndidapidziwa kuti iye anati akapilonge kuna Sauli. Tenepo ndine ndaaphesa abale ako onsenewo." 
1Samuel22:23 Khala na ine pontho leka chita mantha. Sauli anafuna pyakupha tonsene uwiriathu, kwache iwe unati ukhale pakupata na ine.”" 
1Samuel23:1 Davite adapiva kuti Afilisti akhamenya luwani ya Keila, pontho akhaba mapira akhadavunwa kwene chinchino ale." 
1Samuel23:2 Natenepo Davite adavunza MBUYA mbati, “Ayi ndiende kamenyana nawo Afilistiwa?” MBUYA adamtawira mbati, “Ndoko ukamenyane nawo mbupulumuse luwani ya Keila.”" 
1Samuel23:3 Mbwenye amuna a Davite adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ngakhala muno mu Yuda tikuchita mantha. Apo nditani tingaenda ku Keila kamenyana na anyankhondo a Chifilisti?”" 
1Samuel23:4 Natenepo Davite adavunza pontho nzeru kuna MBUYA, tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ndoko kachite nkhondo ku Keila thangwi ndinakuchitisa kukunda Afilisti.”" 
1Samuel23:5 Tenepo Davite na amunache adenda kachita nkhondo na Afilisti. Iwo adapha anthu azinji a iwo mbakwata pifuyo pyawo. Mwenemu ndi mule mudapulumusira Davite luwani ile. 
1Samuel23:6 Pidathawa Abiatara mwana Ahimeleki mbaphatana na Davite adakwata efodi. 
1Samuel23:7 Sauli adapangwa kuti Davite adenda ku Keila mbalonga mbati, “Mulungu amuikha m'manja mwanga. Davite apiteyera yekha ene msampha pakupita mumzinda wakutchingwa na mpanda yakukhala na misuwo na mphinga zasimbi.”" 
1Samuel23:8 Tenepo Sauli adachemeresa anyankhondo ache kamenya naye nkhondo kwendera ku Keila kuti akazungulire Davite na amunache ene. 
1Samuel23:9 Pidapiva Davite kuti Sauli akhasasanya pyakumpha, iye adalonga kuna Abiatara nyansembe mbati, “Idza kuno na efodi.”" 
1Samuel23:10 Penepo Davite adalonga mbati, “MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele, ine ndava kuti Sauli akusasanya pyakudza kuno ku Keila dzavunga luwaniyi thangwi ya ine pano nyabasanu." 
1Samuel23:11 Ayi anthu a muluwani anandipereka m'manja mwa Sauli? Ayi Sauli anadzadi kuno ninga mwapivera ine? MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele ndikukupemphani kuti munditawire!” MBUYA adamtawira mbati, “Sauli anati adzedi.”" 
1Samuel23:12 Davite adavunza pontho mbati, “Ayi mzika za muluwani muno zinati zipereke ine na amunanga m'manja mwa Sauli?” MBUYA adatawira mbati, “Ande, anati akupereke.”" 
1Samuel23:13 Tenepo Davite na amunache, ale akhalipo ninga madzana matanthatu onsene pabodzi, adabuluka ku Keila kabodzi kene mbaenda mbuto na mbuto. Pidapiva Sauli kuti Davite akhadathawako ku Keila, iye adasanduza manyerezero ache mbakhonda kwendakove." 
1Samuel23:14 Davite adabisala pyache m'nthemba ya mapiri m'thando yatchetcha chifupi na Zifi. Sauli akhayesa-yesa basi ndzidzi onsene kufuna kumgumana, mbwenye Mulungu hadapereke Davite m'manja mwa Sauli tayu." 
1Samuel23:15 Pikhali Davite pa Horeshi m'thando yatchetcha chifupi na Zifi iye adapidziwa kuti Sauli akhadadza kuti amphe. 
1Samuel23:16 Yonatani mwana Sauli adenda kweneko kamuwangisa mtima kuti Mulungu anamtchinjiriza 
1Samuel23:17 mbalonga mbati, “Leka chita mantha. Babanga Sauli nkhabe kwanisa kukuchita pinthu tayu. Iye akupidziwa mwadidi mwene kuti ndiwe anafuna dzakhala mfumu wa ku Israele ine mbandikhala wachiwiri wako.”" 
1Samuel23:18 Uwiriawo adachita pontho chiverano cha ushamwali pamaso pa MBUYA. Davite adakhala ku Horeshi, Yonatani adabwerera kwawo." 
1Samuel23:19 Anthu anango a ku Zifi adenda kuna Sauli ku Gibea mbakalonga mbati, “Davite akubisala kunthemba kwathu ku Horeshi paphiri ya Hakila kumwera kwa thando yatchetcha ya Yudea." 
1Samuel23:20 Ife tikupidziwa kuti imwe mfumu mukumfuna pyakwanga kuti mumphate. Natenepo idzani kunthemba kwathu ife tinaonesesa kuti imwe mwamphata.” 
1Samuel23:21 Sauli adatawira mbati, “MBUYA mbakutsanzayiseni thangwi ya kundikomera kwanu mtima!" 
1Samuel23:22 Ndokoni pontho mukasake-sake mwadidi mwene kunabisala iyeko, pontho mudziwe mbani adamuona kwenekoyo. Ndava kuti iye ndi mpheswe pyakwanga." 
1Samuel23:23 Kavunze-vunzeni mwadidi mbuto yache chadi-chadi inabisala iyeyo mbamuonesesa kuti mwadza dzandipanga chinchino pano. Tenepo ine ndinaenda namwe pabodzi, natenepo ngakhala iye akuthimiza kubisala kunthemba kweneko, ine ndinati ndimphe podi na kumsaka-saka kwene dziko yonsene ya Yuda.”" 
1Samuel23:24 Iwo adabwerera ku Zifi patsogolo pa Sauli. Davite na amunache akhali m'thando yatchetcha ya Maoni, phedi ya payokha kumwera kwa thando yatchetcha ya Yudea." 
1Samuel23:25 Sauli na amunache adautoma ulendo wa kusaka Davite. Pidapiva Davite iye adenda kuphiri yamiyala m'thando yatchetcha ya Maoni mbakhala kweneko. Pidava Sauli penepi iye adenda kasaka Davite kuthandoko. 
1Samuel23:26 Sauli na amunache akhali kukhundu inango ya phiri kulekanisa na Davite na amunache, ale akhali kukhundu inango ya phiriyo. Iwo akhachimbiza kuti athawe Sauli na amunache, ale akhali chifupi na iwo, pontho kuti akhali chifupi kuaphata." 
1Samuel23:27 Penepo pene nyamphangwa adafika kuna Sauli mbati, “Bwererani kabodzi kene! Afilisti akupokosera dziko!”" 
1Samuel23:28 Tenepo Sauli adaleka kutewera Davite mbaenda kamenyana na Afilisti. Ndi thangwi yache mbuto yeneyi imbachemera phiri ya Kulekanisa. 
1Samuel23:29 Davite adenda kunthemba ya Engedi, kudabisala iye kule." 
1Samuel24:1 Pidabwerera Sauli kamenyana na Afilisti, adapangwa kuti Davite akhali m'thando yatchetcha chifupi na Engedi." 
1Samuel24:2 Sauli adakwata pikwi pitatu pya anyankhondo aluso pyakwanga mu Israele mbaenda kasaka Davite na amunache chakumabulukiro dzuwa a Phanzwi yakuchemerwa Mbuzi Zam'tsanga. 
1Samuel24:3 Iye adafika padzimba chifupi na mathanga a mabira m'khundu mwa njira mbapita kuti akachite chimbudzu. Pidachitika kuti dzimba yontho-yonthoyo kuchingolokodyo kwache ndiye kudabisala Davite na amunache. 
1Samuel24:4 Amunache ale adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Uno ndi mwayi wanu. MBUYA adakupangani kuti anaikha nyamalwanu m'manja mwanu, pontho imwe munakwanisa kuchita naye pyonsene pene pinafuna imwe.” Davite adakambadza mbagwanda phidzo ya mkhanjo wa Sauli, iye mbakhonda kupidziwa." 
1Samuel24:5 Mbwenye chikumbu mtima cha Davite chidatoma kumsanyisa mumtima mwache 
1Samuel24:6 mbalonga kuna amunache mbati, “MBUYA mbandikhondese kuchita chakuipa kuna mbuyanga, ule adasankhulwa na MBUYA kukhala mfumu. Ine sidatheme kumchita chakuipa na pang'ono pene tayu, thangwi iye ndi mfumu adasankhulwa na MBUYA ule!”" 
1Samuel24:7 Tenepo amuna a Davite ale adaphatwa mtima na mafala adalonga Davite ale kuti aleke kuchita chakuipa kuna Sauli. Sauli adalamuka kubuluka m'dzimba mule mbatoma ulendo wache. 
1Samuel24:8 Tenepo Davite adabulukambo kumtewera mbachemera mbati, “Mbuyanga mfumu!” Pidazungunuka Sauli, Davite adalamba pansi kumulemedza" 
1Samuel24:9 mbalonga mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji mukuvesera anthu analonga kuti ine ndikufuna kukuchitani pyakuipa?" 
1Samuel24:10 Munakwanisa kuona mwekha ene kuti chinchino pano m'dzimbamu MBUYA adakuikhani m'manja mwanga. Anango a amunanga adandipanga kuti ndikupheni, mbwenye ine ndidakuverani nsisi mbandilonga kuti ine sinachita chakuipa na pang'ono pene kuna imwe tayu, thangwi imwe ndimwe mfumu adasankhulwa na MBUYA ule!" 
1Samuel24:11 Babanga, yang'anani phidzo ya mkhanjo wanu inaphatira ine m'manja mwangayi. Ine mbidakwanisa kukuphani, mbwenye ndidagwanda kwene phidzoyi basi. Penepi pikutsikimizira kuti ine nkhabe manyerezero akukupandukirani penu kukuchitani chakuipa tayu. Imwe ndiye munafuna pyakundipha podi kwene kuti ine sidakudawireni tayu." 
1Samuel24:12 MBUYA mbapitonge kuti wakudawa mbani pakati pathupa! Iye mbakutchunyuseni thangwi ya pinandichitira imwepi, thangwi ine sinachita chakuipa na pang'ono pene kuna imwe tayu." 
1Samuel24:13 Imwe mumbadziwa kulonga kwakale kule kwakuti, ‘Pyakuipa pimbachitwa na anyakuipa.’ Tenepo sinachita chakuipa na pang'ono pene kuna imwe tayu." 
1Samuel24:14 Yang'anani chinthu chinafuna mfumu wa ku Israele kuchipha! Yang'anani chinthu chinathamangisa iye! Mwanambwa wakufa pyache, nkhukupa pyayo." 
1Samuel24:15 MBUYA mbapitonge kuti wakudawa mbani pakati pathupa. Iye mbanditchinjirize pontho mbandipulumuse m'manja mwanu.” 
1Samuel24:16 Pikhadamalisa Davite kulonga, Sauli adalonga mbati, “Kani ndiwedi mwananga Davite?” Penepo pene iye adagwisa msozi" 
1Samuel24:17 mbalonga kuna Davite mbati, “Iwe ndiwe wakulungama kupiringana ine. Iwe wandichitira pinthu pyadidi mbwenye ine ndakuchitira pyakuipa." 
1Samuel24:18 Chinchino pano iwe wandionesa kundikomera kwako mtima, thangwi hudandiphe tayu podi kwene kuti MBUYA adandiikha m'manja mwako." 
1Samuel24:19 Kangasi munthu angaphata nyamalwache mbamsiya kwene kuti aende pyache okhonda kumchita chinthu chakuipa? MBUYA mbakutsanzayise thangwi ya pinthu pyandichitira iwe leropi. 
1Samuel24:20 Chinchino ndikupidziwa kuti unakhala mfumu wa ku Israele, pontho kuti ufumu wako unathimiza kukhala pansi pa utongi wako." 
1Samuel24:21 Kwache dumbira kuna ine na dzina ya MBUYA kuti hunapha pidzukulu pyanga tayu, towera dzinanga na banjanga pileke duwalika monsene mwene.”" 
1Samuel24:22 Tenepo Davite adadumbira kuna Sauli. Kubuluka penepo Davite na amunache adabwerera kukhabisala iwo kule. 
1Samuel25:1 Samuele adafa, tenepo Aisraele adagumanyikana mbamsintili. Iwo adamuikha m'masiye a kuluwani ya kwawo ku Rama. Pidamala penepi Davite adenda kuthando yatchetcha ya Parani." 
1Samuel25:2 Kweneko kukhali munthu unango wa mbumba ya Kalebu dzinache Nabali. Iye akhali wa kuluwani ya Maoni, pontho akhali na mbuto yache ene chifupi na luwani ya Karimele. Iye akhali wakufuma pyakwanga, pontho akhali na mabira pikwi pitatu na mbuzi chikwi chibodzi. Abigaile mkazache akhali wakubalika pyakwanga pontho wanzeru, kwache mamunayo akhali wachipsu pontho wavinga. Nabali akhachinga mabirache ku Karimele," 
1Samuel25:3  
1Samuel25:4 tenepo Davite, ule ndzidzi wenewu akhali m'thando yatchetcha, adava penepi" 
1Samuel25:5 mbatuma aphale akhali na iye ale khumi na awiri kwenda ku Karimele mbaapanga mbati, “Ndokoni kuna Nabali ku Karimele mbamukampase mwenyikiro na dzinanga." 
1Samuel25:6 Imwe mwathema kalonga kuna iye kuti: ‘Mtendere, pontho pyadidi pyonsene kuna iwe na banjako, pontho na pinthu pyako pyonsene pina iwe." 
1Samuel25:7 Ine ndapiva kuti imwe mukuchinga mabiranu tenepo ine ndafuna kuti mupidziwe kuti amakabuswanu akhakhala na ife, pontho ife hatidaachitire chinthu chakuipa tayu. Nee chinthu na chibodzi chene chawo chidabiwa tayu ndzidzi ukhali iwo ku Karimele." 
1Samuel25:8 Avunzeni iwo anati akupangeni. Ife tadza pansiku ya phwando, tenepo Davite apempha kuti mutikomere mtima. Tipaseni pinakwanisa imwe kupasa ife anyabasanu pontho na kuna shamwalianu wapamtima Davite.’ ”" 
1Samuel25:9 Amuna a Davite adapereka mphangwa zenezi kuna Nabali na dzina ya Davite. Tenepo iwo adadikhira penepo," 
1Samuel25:10 pakumalisira pache Nabali adatawira mbati, “Davite? Iye mbani? Chipo ine sidave pya munthu weneyu tayu! Ndzidzi uno m'dziko muno mwadzala na mabitchu akuthawa ambuyawo!" 
1Samuel25:11 Ine nkhabe kukwata mikate yanga na madzi anga pontho na nyama zaphera ine anyakuchinga mabirawa mbandipipasa amuna ale kudabulukira iwo sinadziwako tayu!” 
1Samuel25:12 Amuna a Davite adabwerera kuna Davite mbampanga pyonsene pikhadalonga Nabali pile. 
1Samuel25:13 Davite adapanga amunache ale mbati, “Mangirirani matalasadanu.” Tenepo onsene adachitadi. Davite adamangirirambo talasadache mbalamuka pabodzi na madzana manayi a amunache mbasiya m'nduli amuna madzana mawiri kuyang'anira pyakudya." 
1Samuel25:14 Mbodzi wa anyabasa a Nabali adalonga kuna Abigaile mkazache Nabali mbati, “Ayi mwapiva imwe? Davite adatuma anyamphangwa kubulukira m'thando yatchetcha na mwenyikiro kuna mbuyathu, kwache iye adaatikana." 
1Samuel25:15 Mbwenye iwo adatikomera mtima, pontho iwo hadatinense tayu. Ndzidzi onsene ukhakhala ife nawo m'minda, nkhabe chinthu chathu na chibodzi chene chidabiwa tayu." 
1Samuel25:16 Iwo adatitchinjiriza mosiku na masikati ndzidzi onsene ukhayang'anira ife mikumbi ya mabirathu. 
1Samuel25:17 Pinyerezereni mwadidi mbamudziwa chakuchita. Penepi pinakwanisa kudzesa nyatwa kuna mbuyathu na kuna banjache yonsene. Iye ngwakuipa pyakwanga mwakuti iye nkhabe kuva pyakulonga pya munthu na mbodzi ene tayu.” 
1Samuel25:18 Msanga-msanga Abigaile adagumanyisa mikate madzana mawiri, mabudu anthembe mawiri akudzala na vinyu, mabira akuotcha mashanu, makilogramu khumi na manomwe a mapira akukazinga, matsaputu dzana ibodzi amphesa zakuuma, pontho na pitumbuwa pyakuvungazwa na nkhuyu zakuuma mbapipakiza pamabulu." 
1Samuel25:19 Tenepo iye adalonga kuna anyabasa ale mbati, “Tsogolani, ine ndikubwera.” Kwache iye hadalonge pinthu tayu kuna mamunache." 
1Samuel25:20 Iye akhaenda pabulu wache, tenepo pidafika iye pagulaye ya phiri, vumbu-vumbu adagumanikana na Davite na amunache akudza kuna iye." 
1Samuel25:21 Davite akhalonga mumtima mwache mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji ine ndidatchinjiriza pinthu pya munthu weneyu m'thando muno? Nee chinthu chache na chibodzi chene chabiwa tayu. Apo kweneku ndiye kupagali kwache kuphedza kudamchita ine kule!" 
1Samuel25:22 Mulungu mbandiphe pyache ngakhala ndinakhonda kupha amunache onsene kufika mangwana na machibese.” 
1Samuel25:23 Pidachita Abigaile maso phaa pana Davite adachimbiza kutchitha pabulu pache mbapiponya pansi 
1Samuel25:24 pamanyalo a Davite mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ndaphata miyendo mbuya, ngandiveserenimbo! Nyakudawa mbakhale pyache ine pano." 
1Samuel25:25 Lekani ikha konta mafala alonga Nabali ale, munthu wakupupwa ule tayu. Iye ambachitadi pinthu ninga mwa dzinache pupwe. Mbuya ine ndikhali nkhabepo ndzidzi udafika anyabasanu." 
1Samuel25:26 MBUYA ndiye akukhondesani kubwezera mbamupha anyamalwanu. Tenepo chinchino ndinadumbira na dzina ya MBUYA wamoyo kuti anyamalwanu pontho na onsene ambafuna pyakukuchitirani pyakuipa ale anati atchunyuswe ninga Nabali. 
1Samuel25:27 Ndaphata miyendo, mbuya, tambirani mitukwa yadza na ineyi mbamuipereke kuna amunanuwa." 
1Samuel25:28 Ndilekereni chakudawa chonsene chachita ine. MBUYA anakuchitisani kukhala mfumu imwe na pidzukulu pyanu pene, thangwi imwe mukummenyera nkhondo zache; pontho imwe nkhabe dzachita chakuipa tayu ndzidzi onsene wa moyo wanu." 
1Samuel25:29 Ngakhala munthu unango akusosani mbayesa kuti akupheni, MBUYA Mulungu wanu anakutchinjirizani ninga mumbachitira munthu kulondali mfuma yakufunika. Mbwenye kulonga pya anyamalwanu iye anaaponyera kunja khala ninga munthu akuponya mwala na mbemba." 
1Samuel25:30 Tenepo MBUYA angamala chita pyonsene pidadumbira iye kuna imwe pontho kukuikhani kukhala mfumu wa ku Israele," 
1Samuel25:31 penepo imwe nkhabe dzachita mantha penu kuswipa mtima thangwi ya kupha munthu okhonda dawa, penu thangwi ya kubwezera kwanu. Tenepo MBUYA angakutsanzayisani, mundikumbukembo.”" 
1Samuel25:32 Davite adalonga kuna iye mbati, “MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele ule akutuma kuti ugumane na ine lero, mbakuzwe." 
1Samuel25:33 Takhuta kuna Mulungu thangwi ya nzeru zako pontho thangwi ya pinthu pyachita iwe leropi kundikhondesa kuchita pya upandu pontho kubwezera. 
1Samuel25:34 MBUYA andikhondesa kuchita chinthu chakuipa, kwache ndinadumbira na dzina ya Mulungu wamoyo wa Israele kuti mbudakhonda chimbiza dzagumanikana nane, amuna a Nabali onsene mbadamala kufa kufika mangwana na machibese!”" 
1Samuel25:35 Tenepo Davite adatambira pidamdzesera iye pile mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Bwerera kwanu, pontho leka swipa mtima. Ine ndinati ndichite pinafuna iwe.”" 
1Samuel25:36 Abigaile adabwerera kuna Nabali, ule akhali kumusa kwache paphwando yakuthemerana na mfumu. Iye adaledzera pyakwanga, tenepo iye hadampange na chinthu chene tayu mpakana mangwana mwache." 
1Samuel25:37 Na machibese pidakungunuka iye, adampanga pyonsenene. Iye adadwala mtima, manungo ache onsene mbafa piwalo." 
1Samuel25:38 Pidagwanda nsiku khumi MBUYA adampamantha Nabali mbafa. 
1Samuel25:39 Pidapiva Davite kuti Nabali afa, iye adalonga mbati, “MBUYA mbakuzwe. Iye abwezera Nabali thangwi ya kunditikana kudachita iye, pontho iye andikhondesa nyabasache kuchita chinthu chakudawika. MBUYA amtchunyusa Nabali thangwi ya chakuipa chidachita iye.” Tenepo Davite adatuma mphangwa kuvunzira nazo Abigaile." 
1Samuel25:40 Anyabasache adenda kuna iye ku Karimele mbalonga mbati, “Davite atituma kuti tikukwateni tiende namwe kuna iye kuti mukakhale mkazache.”" 
1Samuel25:41 Abigaile adalamba mbalonga mbati, “Ine ndine nyabasache, pontho ndasasanyika kutsuka manyalo a anyabasache.”" 
1Samuel25:42 Abigaile adalamuka kabodzi kene mbapakira pabulu pache. Iye adenda pabodzi pene na anyabasache achikazi ashanu, tenepo adenda pabodzi pene na anyabasache a Davite mbakakhala mkazache." 
1Samuel25:43 Davite akhadasemba pontho Ahinoamu wa ku Yezereele, tenepo onsene uwiriawo adakhala akazache." 
1Samuel25:44 Ndzidzi wenewo Sauli akhadapereka mwanache wa mkazi Mikaela ule akhali mkazache Davite kuna Paliti mwana Laishi wa kuluwani ya Galimu. 
1Samuel26:1 Amuna anango a ku Zifi adadza kuna Sauli ku Gibea mbampanga kuti Davite akhabisala paphiri ya Hakila pankhomo ya thando yatchetcha ya Yudea. 
1Samuel26:2 Kabodzi kene Sauli adenda na pikwi pitatu pya anyankhondo akusankhulika mu Israele kuthando yatchetcha ya Zifi kasaka Davite. 
1Samuel26:3 Iye adamanga msasa m'khundu mwa njira paphiri ya Hakila. Davite akhathimiza kukhala m'thando yatchetcha mule, tenepo pidapidziwa iye kuti Sauli adadza dzamsaka," 
1Samuel26:4 iye adatuma anyakuzonda mbakagumana kuti Sauli akhalidi kweneko. 
1Samuel26:5 Kabodzi kene Davite adenda kumsasa kwa Sauli mbaona mbuto ikhagona Sauli na Abineri mwana Neri, mkadamu wa anyankhondo a Sauli. Sauli adagona m'bwalo pakatiletu pamsasawo mwakuzungulirwa na amunache." 
1Samuel26:6 Tenepo Davite adavunza Ahimeleki Mhiti ule na Abishai mbaleache Yoabu (mawo akhali Zeruia) mbati, “Mbani uwirianu anafuna kwenda nane kumsasa wa Sauli?” Abishai adatawira mbati, “Ine ndinaenda namwe.”" 
1Samuel26:7 Tenepo mosiku enewo Davite na Abishai adapita mumsasa wa Sauli mbagumana Sauli adagona pakatiletu pamsasa uku dipache aitchimika kumisolo kwache. Abineri na anyankhondo akhagona mwakumzungulira. 
1Samuel26:8 Abishai adalonga kuna Davite mbati, “Mulungu aikha nyamalwanu m'manja mwanu mosiku uno. Lekani ndimtungulire na dipa mbandimkhomera pansi kabodzi kene basi. Ine nkhabe kupichita kawiri tayu!”" 
1Samuel26:9 Mbwenye Davite adalonga mbati, “Iwe hudatheme kumchita chakuipa tayu! MBUYA anati atchunyuse munthu onsene wakuchita chakuipa kuna mfumu wache wakusankhulika.”" 
1Samuel26:10 Davite adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Na dzina ya MBUYA wamoyo, ndikupidziwa kuti MBUYA mwenechiroache ndiye anafuna dzapha Sauli penu ndzidzi wache ungakwana wakuti afe ninga mumbaferambo anthu onsene penu afe pankhondo." 
1Samuel26:11 MBUYA andikhondesa kuti ndiyese kuchita chakuipa kuna munthu adaikha iye kukhala mfumu ule! Ndileke ndikwate kwene nyakadudu wache wa madzi na dipache mbatienda pyathu.” 
1Samuel26:12 Tenepo Davite adakwata nyakadudu wa madzi na dipa pikhali kumisolo kwa Sauli pile, natenepo iye na Abishai adenda pyawo. Nee munthu na mbodzi ene adapiona penu kudziwa pidachitikapyo penu kulamuka tayu; iwo onsene akhaliza mkhonono, thangwi MBUYA akhadaagonesa onsene chitulo chakufa nacho." 
1Samuel26:13 Tenepo Davite adawambuka mtunda unango wa phedi mbaimira pansonga paphiri, pambuto yakupata kutali," 
1Samuel26:14 mbachemera mwakugaluza fala kuna anyankhondo a Sauli na Abineri mbati, “Abineri! Ayi ukundiva?” Abineri adavunza mbati, “Mbani anakhuwa tenepo kulamusa mfumu?”" 
1Samuel26:15 Davite adatawira mbati, “Ayi Abineri, si iwe munthu wamkulu mu Israele tayu? Apo watani unakhonda kutchinjiriza mbuyako, mfumu? Chinchino pano munthu unango adapita mumsasamo kufuna kupha mbuyako." 
1Samuel26:16 Abineri, iwe wachimwana basako! Ndinadumbira na dzina ya MBUYA wamoyo kuti monsenemwe mwathema kuphiwa, thangwi imwe nee mwatchinjiriza tayu, mbuyanu adasankhulwa na MBUYA kukhala mfumu ule. Yang'anani! Dipa ya mfumu ili kupi? Nyakadudu wa madzi akhali kumisolo kwache ule ali kupi!”" 
1Samuel26:17 Sauli adadzindikira fala ya Davite mbavunza mbati, “Kani ndiwe mwananga Davite?” Davite adatawira mbati, “Ande, mfumu.”" 
1Samuel26:18 Pontho adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji mbuyanga mukuthimiza kundisaka-saka ine nyabasanu? Chachita ine ninji? Chadawa ine ninji?" 
1Samuel26:19 Mfumu, veserani pinafuna ine kulonga. Ngakhala ndi MBUYA akuchitisani kuti mundisandukire kupereka nsembe kuna iye kungamchitise kusanduza manyerezero ache; mbwenye ngakhala akuchitisani ndi anthu, MBUYA mbaatemberere. Thangwi iwo andibulusisa m'dziko ya MBUYA kwenda kudziko kule kwakuti ndinakwanisa kutumikira milungu inango!" 
1Samuel26:20 Lekani kundichitisa kuti ndifere m'dziko yachilendo kutali na MBUYA. Thangwi yache ninji kuti mfumu wa ku Israele adze kuna ine nkhulukupambo ninga ine pano kufuna kundipha? Thangwi yache njanji akundikhulisa kufuna kundipha ninga mbalame?” 
1Samuel26:21 Sauli adatawira mbati, “Bwerera mwananga Davite ine ndachita chakudawa. Ine nkhabeve kukuchita chakuipa thangwi iwe wakhonda kupha moyo wanga mosiku pano. Ine ndakhala ninga pupwe pontho ndachita chinthu chakuipa.”" 
1Samuel26:22 Davite adatawira mbati, “Mfumu dipanu ishi. Mbodzi wa amunanu mbadze kuno dzapikwata." 
1Samuel26:23 MBUYA mbapase mfupo kuna anyakukhulupirika pontho kuna anyakulungama. Lero iye adakuikhani m'manja mwanga, kwache ine sidakuchiteni chakuipa tayu, imwe adasankhulwa na MBUYA kukhala mfumu ule." 
1Samuel26:24 Ninga montho mwachitira ine lero kukhonda kukuphani, MBUYA mbachitembo chibodzi-bodzi kuna ine mbandipulumusa panyatwa zonsene.”" 
1Samuel26:25 Tenepo Sauli adalonga kuna Davite mbati, “Mulungu mbakutsanzayise mwananga; iwe unachita pinthu pikulu pontho mbukhala wakupikwanisa papyonsene pinachita iwe.” Natenepo Davite adenda pyache, Sauli adabwerera kwawo." 
1Samuel27:1 Davite adalonga yekha ene mbati, “Nsiku inango Sauli anati andiphe. Chadidi chache ntchakuti ndithawire kudziko ya Afilisti. Tenepo Sauli anatopa kundisaka mu Israele muno, natenepo ndinakhala pakupata.”" 
1Samuel27:2 Natenepo Davite na amunache madzana matanthatu adenda kabodzi kene kuna Akisi mwana wamamuna wa Maoki, mfumu wa ku Gati." 
1Samuel27:3 Davite na anache adakhazikika ku Gati pabodzi pene na mabanjawo. Davite akhali na akazache awiri, Ahinoamu wa ku Yezereele na Abigaile mamfelwa wa Nabali wa ku Karimele." 
1Samuel27:4 Pidava Sauli kuti Davite adathawira ku Gati, iye adaleka kumsaka-saka." 
1Samuel27:5 Davite adalonga kuna Akisi mbati, “Ngakhala ndiwedi shamwalianga, nditawirise kuti ndikhale na luwani yanga ene ing'ono kuti ndikhalemo. Mbuyanga, ine nkhabe funika kuti ndikhale na imwe pabodzi pene mumzinda ukuluwu tayu.”" 
1Samuel27:6 Tenepo Akisi adampasa luwani ya Zikilagi, natenepo na thangwi yeneyi luwani ya Zikilagi ili m'manja mwa mafumu a Yuda kutomera kale ene." 
1Samuel27:7 Davite adakhala m'dziko ya Afilisti miyezi khumi na mitanthatu. 
1Samuel27:8 Ndzidzi wenewo Davite na amunache akhamenya nkhondo na anthu a ku Geshuri, Girizi na Aamaleki ale na kale ene akhakhala m'nthemba mwawo kutomera ku Shuri mpakana ku Iguputo." 
1Samuel27:9 Ndzidzi onsene ukhachita nkhondo Davite panthemba, iye hakhasiya na moyo mamuna penu mkazi tayu, mbwenye akhakwata mabira na ng'ombe, mabulu, ngamila na nguwo. Tenepo iye akhabwerera ku Akisi." 
1Samuel27:10 Akisi angamvunza mbati, “Ai udendera kupi lero kamenya nkhondo?” Davite akhatawira mbati, “Ndidenda kuthando yatchetcha ya Negebu mu Yuda” penu “Ndidenda kunthemba ya Ayerameeli” penu “Ndidenda kunthemba ya Akeni.”" 
1Samuel27:11 Iye hakhasiya na moyo mamuna penu mkazi tayu kuti adze nawo ku Gati, thangwi akhanyerezera kuti iwo anakalonga kuti pinthu pikhachita Davite na amunache mphipi. Ipi mphinthu pyachita Davite ndzidzi onsene ukhakhala iye na moyo m'dziko ya Afilisti." 
1Samuel27:12 Mbwenye Akisi adanyindira Davite mbalonga yekha ene mbati, “Iye akuzondiwa pyakwanga na anthu a kwawo ku Israele. Tenepo iye anakhala nyabasanga kwenda na kwenda.”" 
1Samuel28:1 Ndzidzi unango pidamala penepi, Afilisti adagumanyisa magulu a anyankhondo awo kuti akamenyane na Aisraele. Tenepo Akisi adalonga kuna Davite mbati, “Ndimomwene kuti iwe ukupidziwa kuti iwe na amunako mwathema kakhala kukhundu kwanga kumenya nkhondo.”" 
1Samuel28:2 Davite adatawira mbati, “Ande, ine ndine nyabasanu, tenepo imwe munati mupione mwekha ene pinafuna ine kuchita.” Akisi adatawira mbati, “Pyakhala pyadidi. Ndinati ndikuikhe kukhala nyakunditchinjiriza kwenda na kwenda.”" 
1Samuel28:3 Pandzidzi wenewo Samuele akhadafa kale, tenepo Aisraele onsene adamsintili pontho adamuikha m'masiye a kumzinda wa kwawo ku Rama. Sauli adathamangisa anyakuombedza na anyakukhumira onsene mu Israele." 
1Samuel28:4 Magulu ankhondo a Afilisti adagumanyikana pa Shunemu mbamanga msasa. Sauli adagumanyisa Aisraele mbamanga msasa paphiri ya Giliboa. 
1Samuel28:5 Pidaona Sauli anyankhondo a Afilisti adachita mantha," 
1Samuel28:6 natenepo iye adavunza MBUYA chakuti achite. Kwache MBUYA hadamtawire na pang'ono pene tayu, nee kundoto penu pakuphatisa basa Urimu na Tumimu penu kudzera muna maprofeti tayu." 
1Samuel28:7 Tenepo Sauli adatonga mathubu ache mbati, “Kasakeni mkazi ule ambakhumira, tenepo ine ndinati ndivunze nzeru kuna iye.” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Muno mu Endori alimo mbodzi ene basi.”" 
1Samuel28:8 Natenepo Sauli adapizimbaisa yekha ene; iye adachinja nguwo zache, tenepo pidagwa mdima iye adenda pabodzi pene na amunache awiri kaonana na mkazi ule mbalonga mbati, “Ngandivunzirembo kuna mizimu mbundipange ninji chinafuna chitika, pontho chemera mzimu wa munthu anakuthulira ineyi.”" 
1Samuel28:9 Mkazi ule adatawira mbati, “Ndimomwene imwe mukupidziwa pinthu pyachita Mfumu Sauli, mule mudathamangisira iye mu Israele anyakuombedza na anyakukhumira onsene. Apo thangwi yache ninji mukuyesa kunditeyera msampha kuti ndiphiwe?”" 
1Samuel28:10 Penepo Sauli adadumbira pikulu pene mbati, “Na dzina ya MBUYA wamoyo ndinadumbira kuti iwe hunatchunyuswa tayu thangwi ya kuchita tenepo.”" 
1Samuel28:11 Mkazi ule adavunza mbati, “Munafuna ndikuchemerereni ani?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Samuele.”" 
1Samuel28:12 Pidaona mkazi ule Samuele adakhuwa mbalonga mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji mwandinyengeza? Imwe ndimwe Mfumu Sauli.”" 
1Samuel28:13 Mfumu adalonga mbati, “Leka chita mantha. Ayi ukuona ani?” Mkazi ule adatawira mbati, “Ndikuona mzukwa ukubulukira pansi.”" 
1Samuel28:14 Sauli adavunza mbati, “Ukuoneka ninganji?” Mkazi ule adatawira mbati, “Ukuoneka ninga nkhalamba akubuluka pansi pontho avala chakufinika.” Penepo Sauli adapidziwa kuti weneyo akhali Samuele, tenepo iye adalamba kumulemedza." 
1Samuel28:15 Samuele adalonga kuna Sauli mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji mwandizunguza? Thangwi yache ninji mwandichitisa kuti ndibwerere?” Sauli adatawira mbati, “Ine ndili panyatwa ikulu pyakwanga. Afilisti akuchita nane nkhondo, pontho MBUYA andipasa nkhodolo. Iye nkhabeve kunditawira tayu, penu kudzera muna maprofeti penu kundoto tayu. Natenepo ndakuchemerani kuti mundipange chathema ine kuchita.”" 
1Samuel28:16 Samuele adalonga kuna Sauli mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji unandichemera mwenemo MBUYA akupasa nkhodolo mbasanduka nyamalwako?" 
1Samuel28:17 MBUYA achita kuna iwe pidalonga iye kudzera muna ine. Iye akupokosera ufumu mbaupereka kuna Davite. 
1Samuel28:18 Iwe udaswa matongero a MBUYA mbukhonda kuvunga monsene mwene Aamaleki na pyonsene pikhali na iwo. Ndi thangwi yache MBUYA akuchita penepi kuna iwe. 
1Samuel28:19 Iye anaikha iwe na Aisraele m'manja mwa Afilisti. Mangwana iwe na anako munati mudzembo kuno, pontho MBUYA anapereka anyankhondo a Israele m'manja mwa Afilisti.”" 
1Samuel28:20 Kabodzi kene Sauli adagwa mbagona pansi kwala thangwi ya mantha na pidalonga Samuele. Iye adasowa mphamvu thangwi hadadye na chinthu chene tayu nsiku yonseneyo mosiku na masikati. 
1Samuel28:21 Mkazi ule adenda kuna Sauli mbaona kuti iye akhachita mantha, tenepo iye adalonga kuna Sauli mbati, “Yang'anani, nyabasanu akuverani. Ine ndidasasanyika kufa pakuchita pidapempha imwe." 
1Samuel28:22 Chinchino ndaphata miyendo veserani pinalonga nyabasanu, mbamumtawirise kuti akusasanyireni pyakudya thangwi mwathema kudya, towera mukhale na mphamvu kuti mukwanise kufamba.”" 
1Samuel28:23 Iye adakhonda mbalonga mbati, “Ine sinadya tayu.” Mbwenye mathubu ache adamdembetera kuti adye. Pakumalisira pache iye adatawira, mbalamuka tenepo adakhala pakadera." 
1Samuel28:24 Msanga-msanga mkazi ule adapha mwanamphulu wakunenepa ule. Kubuluka penepo iye adakwata ufa mbausasanya mikate yakusowa chakufufumisira. 
1Samuel28:25 Iye adaikha pyakudya pile pamaso pa Sauli na mathubu ache, iwo mbadya. Tenepo mosiku onthowo iwo adalamuka mbaenda pyawo." 
1Samuel29:1 Afilisti adagumanyisa magulu awo ankhondo onsene pa Afeki, mwenemo Aisraele amanga msasawo pamphuno za madzi m'phedi ya Yezereele." 
1Samuel29:2 Mafumu mashanu a Chifilisti adabuluka m'magulu-magulu a amuna madzana na a amuna chikwi; Davite na amunache adabulukambo m'nduli mwawo pabodzi pene na Mfumu Akisi. 
1Samuel29:3 Akadamu a nkhondo a Chifilisti adaaona mbavunza mbati, “Aheberiwa akuchitakonjimbo kuno?” Akisi adatawira mbati, “Uyu ndi Davite thubu wa Sauli mfumu wa ku Israele. Iye akhala na ine ndzidzi ukulu ene. Iye hadachite chinthu chakuti ndinakwanisa kumdawisa nacho tayu kutomera nsiku idadza iye dzakhala na ine.”" 
1Samuel29:4 Mbwenye akadamu a nkhondo a Chifilisti adazhangali na Akisi mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Bweza munthu weneyu kuluwani idampasa iwe. Mbaleke kwenda nafe pabodzi kunkhondo; iye anakwanisa kitisandukira uku tikumenya nkhondo. Chadidi kuna iye ninji? Ayi si kupha amunathuwa tayu kuti mbuyache akomerwe naye?" 
1Samuel29:5 Pontho weneyu ndi Davite ule akazi akhaimba pya iye uku akuvina mbati, ‘Sauli apha anthu pikwi, mbwenye Davite apha anthu pikwi khumi na kumanyalo.’ ”" 
1Samuel29:6 Akisi adachemera Davite mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ndinadumbira na dzina ya Mulungu wamoyo wa Israele kuti iwe wakhulupirika kuna ine, mbapidandikomera kukupanga kuti uende nane kamenya nkhondo yeneyi. Ine sidakugumane na chinthu chakuti ndinakwanisa kukudawisa nacho tayu kutomera nsiku idadza iwe dzakhala na ine. Mbwenye mafumu anangowa hakukukhulupira tayu." 
1Samuel29:7 Natenepo bwerera pyako m'mudzi na mtendere pontho leka kachita pinthu pyokhonda komera mafumu a Chifilisti.” 
1Samuel29:8 Davite adatawira mbati, “Ayi mbuya chadawa ine ninji? Ngakhala imwe hamudandigumane na chinthu chakuti munakwanisa kundidawisa nacho ine nyabasanu tayu kutomera nsiku idadza ine dzakhala namwe, ninga munapilongera imwe, apo thangwi yache ninji kuti ine sinaenda namwe tayu, imwe mbuyanga mfumu, mbandikamenyana na anyamalwanu?”" 
1Samuel29:9 Akisi adatawira mbati, “Ndimomwene kuti kuna ine ndiwe okhonda dawa ninga mngelo wa Mulungu. Mbwenye mafumu anango alonga kuti iwe hunakwanisa kwenda nafe ku nkhondo tayu." 
1Samuel29:10 Natenepo Davite, mangwana na machibese, monsenene ale mudasiya Mfumu Sauli mbamudza kuna ine kuno, mwathema kulamuka kubwerera sindzidzi kunja nkhuchena.”" 
1Samuel29:11 Tenepo mangwana mwache na machibese Davite na amunache adautoma ulendo wawo kubwerera kudziko ya Afilisti, tenepo Afilisti adathimiza kwenda ku Yezereele." 
1Samuel30:1 Pidagwanda nsiku ziwiri Davite na amunache adafika ku Zikilagi. Aamaleki adasosa anthu a m'thando yatchetcha ya Negebu mbasosa pontho Zikilagi. Iwo adapisa luwaniyo," 
1Samuel30:2 mbaphata akazi onsene; iwo hadaphe munthu na mbodzi ene tayu, mbwenye adakwata anthu onsene mbaenda nawo." 
1Samuel30:3 Pidafika Davite na amunache, adagumana kuti luwani yawo yapiswa pontho kuti akazawo, anawo achimuna na achikazi ene amala phatwa." 
1Samuel30:4 Davite na amunache adatoma kulira mpakana mphamvu zawo zidamaliratu. 
1Samuel30:5 Podi na akazi ene awiri a Davite, Ahinoamu wa ku Yezereele, na Abigaile, adaphatwambo." 
1Samuel30:6 Davite akhali panyatwa ikulu na amunache, ale akhaganagana pyakumponyera miyala thangwi akhava napyo kupha pyakwanga kutaya anawo; mbwenye MBUYA Mulungu wache adampasa kuwanga mtima." 
1Samuel30:7 Davite adalonga kuna Abiatara nyansembe, mwana Ahimeleki, mbati, “Pase kuno efodi,” Tenepo Abiatara adampasa." 
1Samuel30:8 Davite adavunza MBUYA mbati, “Ayi ndiatewere mapangawa? Apo ndinaaphata?” MBUYA adatawira mbati, “Atewere, iwe unati uphate mbupulumusa anyakuphatwawo.”" 
1Samuel30:9 Natenepo Davite na amunache madzana matanthatu adalamuka. Pidafika iwo pamkhwawa wa Besori anango a iwo adasala penepo. 
1Samuel30:10 Davite adathimiza kwenda na amuna madzana manayi; amuna anango madzana mawiri adatopa pyakwanga kuwambuka mkhwawawo, natenepo adasalira pyawo m'nduli." 
1Samuel30:11 Amuna akhali na Davite ale adagumana mphale wa ku Iguputo kuminda mbadza naye kuna Davite. Iwo adampasa pyakudya na madzi 
1Samuel30:12 nkhuyu zakuuma na matsaputu awiri amfesa zakuuma. Pidamala iye kudya mphamvu zache zidabwerera. Nsiku zitatu zamumphu iye hadadye na kumwa na chinthu chene tayu. 
1Samuel30:13 Davite adamvunza mbati, “Mbuyako mbani, pontho ukubulukira kupi?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ine ndine wa ku Iguputo bitchu wa Muamaleki. Mbuyanga adandisiya m'nduli nsiku zitatu zapitazo thangwi ndikhava manungo kupha." 
1Samuel30:14 Ife tapokosera nthemba ya Akereti kuthando yatchetcha ya Negebu mu Yuda, pontho na nthemba ya mbumba ya Kalebu, pontho tapisa luwani ya Zikilagi.”" 
1Samuel30:15 Davite adavunza mbati, “Ayi unatipangiza kuna mapanga enewa?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ndinakupangizani ngakhala munadumbira na dzina ya Mulungu kuti nee munandipha tayu, pontho kuti nee munandipereka m'manja mwa mbuyanga tayu.”" 
1Samuel30:16 Tenepo iye adathonyeza Davite kukhali iwo. Mapanga ale akhali ponsene pene kudya, kumwa, na kusekera thangwi ya kuinjipa kwa pinthu pidapokosera iwo kudziko ya Afilisti na Yuda." 
1Samuel30:17 Mangwana mwache m'makalakwecha Davite adaasosa mbachita nawo nkhondo mpakana mawulo. Nee padapulumuka munthu na mbodzi ene tayu kupambula aphale madzana manayi ale adapakira ngamila mbathawa. 
1Samuel30:18 Davite adapulumusa munthu onsene na pyonsene pidapokosera Aamaleki kuthimizapo akazi awiri a Davite; 
1Samuel30:19 nee chinthu na chibodzi chene chidasowa tayu. Davite adabweza ana achimuna na achikazi ene pontho na pyonsene pidapokosera Aamaleki. 
1Samuel30:20 Iye adabweza pontho mikumbi yonsene ya mabira na ng'ombe zene; amunache adafambisa pifuyo pyonsene patsogolo pawo mbalonga mbati, “Penepi mphya Davite!”" 
1Samuel30:21 Tenepo Davite adabwerera kukhali amuna madzana mawiri ale adasowa mphamvu zakuwambuka nazo mkhwawa wa Besori. Iwo adadza dzagumanikana na Davite na amunache, tenepo Davite adenda kuna iwo mbaapasa mwenyikiro." 
1Samuel30:22 Mbwenye amuna anango akuipa na amungu akhadenda na Davite ale adalonga mbati, “Iwo hadende nafe tayu, tenepo nee tinaapasabi pinthu pyapokosera ifepi. Iwo anakwanisa kukwata akazawo na anawo mbaenda pyawo.”" 
1Samuel30:23 Mbwenye Davite adatawira mbati, “Abale anga imwe nkhabe chita tenepo na pinthu pyatipasa MBUYA pile tayu. Iye atitchinjiriza mbatichitisa kukunda mapanga ale." 
1Samuel30:24 Nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene anatawirizana na pinthu pinalonga imwepi tayu. Tonsene tathema kugawana sasawa: onsene ale adasalira m'nduli kuyang'anira pyakudya anagawana sasawa na onsene ale adenda kunkhondo.” 
1Samuel30:25 Davite adalonga kuti pikhale tenepo, natenepo matongero enewa akutewezwa mu Israele kutomera ndzidzi wenewo na lero." 
1Samuel30:26 Pidabwerera Davite ku Zikilagi adatumiza pyakupokoserapyo kuna ashamwaliache, akadamu a ku Yuda na mphangwa zakuti: Tambirani mtukwa kubulukira kuna ine wa pinthu pidapokosera ife anyamalwa a MBUYA." 
1Samuel30:27 Iye adatumiza kuna anthu a ku Betele, kuna anthu a ku Rama kuthando yatchetcha ya Negebu na kuna anthu a kumaluwani a Yatiri," 
1Samuel30:28 Aroeri, Sifimoti, Eshitemoa na" 
1Samuel30:29 Rakali, kuna mbumba ya Yerameele, kuna Akeni;" 
1Samuel30:30 kuna anthu a m'maluwani a Horima, Borashani, Athaki," 
1Samuel30:31 na Hebroni. Iye adautumiza kuna mbuto zonsene kule kukhadafambira iye na amunache. 
1Samuel31:1 Afilisti adachita nkhondo na Aisraele paphiri ya Giliboa. Aisraele azinji adaphiwa penepo, tenepo anango onsene adasalira ale kuthimizapo Mfumu Sauli na anache adathawa." 
1Samuel31:2 Mbwenye Afilisti adaphatana nawo mbaphapo ana atatu achimuna a Sauli ale ndi Yonatani, Abinadabu, na Malikishua." 
1Samuel31:3 Nkhondo idakaka pyakwanga kuzungulira Sauli, tenepo iye makayo adalaswa pikulu pene na matswimo a anyamalwache mbakuwazika pyakwanga." 
1Samuel31:4 Iye adalonga kuna mphale akuthukula pida pyache ule mbati, “Cholola talasadako undiphe, towera Afilisti okhonda dziwa Mulunguwaaleke kundilulupisa kuti andipha ndiwo.” Mbwenye mphale ule adachita mantha pyakwanga kuti achite tenepo. Natenepo Sauli adakwata yekha ene talasadache mbaigwera." 
1Samuel31:5 Pidaona mphale ule kuti Sauli afa, iye adapiponyambo patalasadache mbafa pabodzi pene na Sauli." 
1Samuel31:6 Tenepo mwenemo ndi mule mudafera Sauli, anache achimuna atatu na mphale ule; amuna onsene a Sauli adafa nsiku yeneyo." 
1Samuel31:7 Pidapiva Aisraele ale akhali kumtunda unango wa phedi ya Yezereele pontho kumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani kuti anyankhondo a Israele adathawa pontho kuti Sauli na anache achimuna adaphiwa, iwo adasiya maluwani awo mbathawa. Natenepo Afilisti adadza mbakwata maluwaniwo." 
1Samuel31:8 Mangwana mwache pidamala nkhondo ile, Afilisti adenda kadulisa nguwo mitemboyo, tenepo iwo adagumanapo mitembo ya Sauli na anache achimuna atatu ale, ili thasa-thasa paphiri ya Giliboa." 
1Samuel31:9 Iwo adagwanda msolo wa Sauli mbamdula pida pyache, tenepo adatuma anyamphangwa m'dziko yonsene ya Afilisti kalonga mphangwa zakukomazi kuna mifanikizo yawo m'nyumba zakupemphereramo na kuna anthu awo." 
1Samuel31:10 Iwo adaikha pida pyachepyo m'nyumba yakupembedzera milungu Asitarite, pontho adakhomera mtembo wache kufufu wa mzinda wa Beti-Shani." 
1Samuel31:11 Pidava anthu a ku Yabeshi-Gileadi pinthu pidachita Afilisti kuna Sauli," 
1Samuel31:12 amuna akuwanga mtima pyakwanga adafamba mosiku onsene kwenda ku Beti-Shani. Iwo adakwata mitembo ya Sauli na ya anache atatu ale kuabulusa pafufu pale mbadza nawo ku Yabeshi, tenepo iwo adaipisa kweneko." 
1Samuel31:13 Kubuluka penepo iwo adakwata magogodo mbaafikhira pansi pa muti wambwemba muluwani. Tenepo iwo adapimana kudya nsiku zinomwe. 
2Samuel1:1 Pidafa Sauli, Davite adabwerera kudakunda iye Aamaleki kule mbakhala ku Zikilagi nsiku ziwiri." 
2Samuel1:2 Mangwana mwache mphale unango adadza kubulukira kumsasa wa Sauli. Iye adang'amba nguwo zache na kuwaza fumbi mumsolo mwache kuonesa kutsukwala. Iye adenda kuna Davite mbalamba kupereka chilemedzo. 
2Samuel1:3 Davite adamvunza mbati, “Wabulukira kupi?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ndachita kuthawa kumsasa wa Aisraele.”" 
2Samuel1:4 Davite adalonga mbati, “Ngandipange chachitika ninji?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Anyankhondo athu athawa kunkhondo, pontho amuna athu azinji aphiwa. Sauli na mwanache ene Yonatani afa.”" 
2Samuel1:5 Davite adamvunza mbati, “Ukupidziwa tani kuti Sauli na mwanache ene Yonatani afa?”" 
2Samuel1:6 Iye adatawira mbati, “Pidachitika kuti ndikhali paphiri ya Giliboa, tenepo ndidaona Sauli atsamira dipache pontho pingolo na anyakupakira akavalo a anyamalwa akumzungulira." 
2Samuel1:7 Tenepo iye adacheuka mbandiona, tenepo iye adandichemera. Ine ndidatawira kuti, ‘Ndichitenji, Mbuya?’" 
2Samuel1:8 Iye adandivunza mbati, ‘Ndiwe ani?’ Ine ndidatawira kuti, ‘Ndine Muamaleki.’" 
2Samuel1:9 Tenepo iye adalonga kuna ine mbati, ‘Idza kuno undiphe! Ine ndakuwazwa pikulu pene tenepo ndili chifupi kufa.’" 
2Samuel1:10 Tenepo ndidenda kuna iye mbandimpha thangwi ndikhadapidziwa kuti sindzidzi nkhugwa iye mbadafa basi. Tenepo ndidakwata chipewu chache chachifumu mumsolo mwache na goza ikhali mumkono mwache mbandidza napyo kuno kuna imwe, mbuyanga.”" 
2Samuel1:11 Davite adang'amba nguwo zache na kutsukwala, pontho amunache adachitambo chibodzi-bodzi." 
2Samuel1:12 Iwo adatsukwala, kusintili na kupimana kudya mpakana mawulo, thangwi ya Sauli na Yonatani, pontho na Aisraele, anthu a Mulungu, thangwi azinji akhadaphiwa pankhondo." 
2Samuel1:13 Davite adavunza mphale adadza na mphangwa ule mbati, “Wabulukira kupi?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ndine Muamaleki. Kwache ndimbakhala m'dziko mwanu muno.”" 
2Samuel1:14 Davite adamvunza mbati, “Udawanga tani mtima kupha mfumu wakusankhulwa na MBUYA?”" 
2Samuel1:15 Tenepo Davite adachemera mamuna mbodzi mbampanga mbati, “Imphe.” Munthu ule adampha mphaleyo pakumkhamwadza." 
2Samuel1:16 Thangwi Davite akhadalonga kuna iye mbati, “Chiropa chako chigwere pamsolo pako. Mulomo wako uchitire umboni wakupokanyisana nawe pidalonga iwe kuti, ‘Ine ndidapha mfumu wakusankhulwa na MBUYA?’ ”" 
2Samuel1:17 Davite adaimba nyimbo ya maliro kuimbira Sauli na mwanache Yonatani," 
2Samuel1:18 mbatonga kuti nyimbo yeneyi ifunziswe anthu a ku Yuda. (Nyimbo yeneyi idalembwa m'bukhu ya Yashara.) 
2Samuel1:19 “Pamapiri a Israele akadamu athu afapo! Anyankhondo athu akuwanga mtimaletu amala kugwa! 
2Samuel1:20 Leka kupilonga mu Gati, penu kupilalika njira za mu Ashikeloni. Leka kuchitisa akazi a Chifilisti kukomerwa; Leka kuchitisa akazi a anthu okhonda dziwa Mulungu ale kusekera." 
2Samuel1:21 “Mbapaleke kuvumba mvula penu kugwa bume pamapiri a Giliboa; mindache mbileke bala pinthu! Thangwi chakugedera matswimo cha anyakuwanga mtima, chili gwenjere mwakuchitisa manyadzo; chakugedera matswimo cha Sauli nkhabeve musiriswa na mafuta tayu." 
2Samuel1:22 Kuna mnofu wa anyamphamvu, kuna chiropa cha anyakulaswa, uta wa Yonatani hukhakhwitcha tayu, pontho talasada ya Sauli ikhali yakusowa nsisi." 
2Samuel1:23 “Sauli na Yonatani akhali anthu akufunwa na anthu ndzidzi wa moyo wawo pontho akukoma mtima; pabodzi pene m'moyo uno, pabodzi pene na pakufa; akudziwa kuthamanga kupiringana mphamba, akhali amphamvu kupiringana nkhalamu." 
2Samuel1:24 “Akazi a mu Israele, sintilini Sauli! Iye adakuvazikani nguwo zakufira zakubalika mbakuchitisani kuoneka akubalika na pyakuthemesera pyagolidi." 
2Samuel1:25 “Anyankhondo akuwanga mtima agwa, iwo adaphiwa pankhondo. Yonatani ali tambza afa m'mapiri." 
2Samuel1:26 “Ndikulirira iwe mbaleanga Yonatani; iwe ukhali wa pamtima panga! Kundifuna kwako kukhali kwakudodomesa pyakwanga kuna ine, nkhwadidi kupiringana kufuna kumbachita akazi." 
2Samuel1:27 “Anyankhondo akuwanga mtima agwa, pida pyawo pyasiyiwa, pontho nkhabe basa tayu.”" 
2Samuel2:1 Pidamala penepi, Davite adavunza MBUYA mbati, “Ayi ndiende katonga luwani ibodzi mu Yuda?” MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Ndoko.” Davite adavunza mbati, “Apo luwani yacheyo njipi?” MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Hebroni.”" 
2Samuel2:2 Natenepo Davite adenda ku Hebroni mbakwata akazache awiri, Ahinoamu wa ku Yezereele na Abigaile mamfelwa wa Nabali wa ku Karimele." 
2Samuel2:3 Iye adakwata pontho amunache na mabanjawo ene mbakakhazikika m'maluwani akuzungulira Hebroni. 
2Samuel2:4 Tenepo amuna a ku Yuda adadza ku Hebroni mbamdzoza Davite kukhala mfumu wa Yuda. Pidava Davite kuti anthu a ku Yabeshi-Gileadi adaikha m'masiye Sauli," 
2Samuel2:5 adatuma amuna anango kwenda kweneko na mphangwa izi: “MBUYA mbakutsanzayiseni pakuonesa kukhulupirika kwanu kuna mfumu pakumuikha m'masiye. 
2Samuel2:6 Natenepo MBUYA mbakuoneseni kukufunani kwache kokhonda mala na kukhulupirika kuna imwe. Inembo ndinakhala namwe mwadidi thangwi ya pinthu pyachita imwepi. 
2Samuel2:7 Chinchino wangisani pontho wangani mtima! Sauli mfumu wanu afa, tenepo anthu a ku Yuda andidzoza kukhala mfumu wawo.”" 
2Samuel2:8 Mkadamu wa anyankhondo a Sauli, Abineri mwana Neri adathawira kumtunda unango wa Yorodani kwenda ku Mahanaimu pabodzi pene na Ishiboseti." 
2Samuel2:9 Kweneko Abineri adapitisa Ishiboseti ufumu wa nthemba za Gileadi, Asheri, Yezereele, Eferemu na Benjemani, pontho na Israele onsene." 
2Samuel2:10 Iye akhali na pyaka makumanayi pyakubalwa pidapita iye ufumu wa Israele, tenepo iye adatonga pyaka piwiri. Mbwenye dzinza ya Yuda idakhulupirika kuna Davite," 
2Samuel2:11 tenepo iye adatonga Hebroni mu Yuda pyaka pinomwe na theka. 
2Samuel2:12 Abineri na mathubu a Ishiboseti adenda kumzinda wa Gibeoni kubulukira ku Mahanaimu. 
2Samuel2:13 Yoabu ule mache akhali Zeruia pabodzi pene na mathubu anango a Davite adagumanikana nawo pathawale, pale padakhala iwo pansi onsene, gulu ibodzi kukhundu inango ya thawale, gulu inango kukhundu inangombo ya thawaleyo." 
2Samuel2:14 Abineri adalonga kuna Yoabu mbati, “Tendeni tisankhule aphale kubulukira kukhundu zonsene ziwiri kuti amenyane pamaso pathu.” Yoabu adatawira mbati, “Pyakoma.”" 
2Samuel2:15 Natenepo amuna khumi na awiri akuimirira Ishiboseti na dzinza ya Benjemani adamenyana na amuna khumi na awiri a Davite. 
2Samuel2:16 Munthu onsene adaphata msolo wa mwanzache akhamenyana na iye mbamtchokomeza talasada m'mbavu mwakuti onsene makumawiri na anayi adagwa pansi mbafa pabodzi pene. Natenepo mbuto yeneyo mu Gibeoni imbachemerwa “Munda wa talasada.” 
2Samuel2:17 Kubuluka penepo nkhondo yakugoswa idalamuka, tenepo Abineri na Aisraele adakundwa na amuna a Davite." 
2Samuel2:18 Ana achimuna atatu a Zeruia akhali penepo: Yoabu, Abishai na Asahele. Asahele, ule akhathamanga pyakwanga ninga nyasa," 
2Samuel2:19 adathamangisa Abineri mbakhonda baukira kumadyo penu kumabzere. 
2Samuel2:20 Abineri adacheuka m'nduli mbavunza mbati, “Ayi ndiwe Asahele?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ande, ndine pano.”" 
2Samuel2:21 Abineri adalonga mbati, “Leka kundithamangisa! M'mbuto mwache thamangisa mbodzi wa anyankhondo mbukwata pina iyepyo.” Mbwenye Asahele adathimiza kumthamangisa basi." 
2Samuel2:22 Abineri adalonga pontho mbati, “Leka kundithamangisa! Thangwi yache ninji unafuna kundichitisa kuti ndikuphe? Ayi ndinakwanisa tani kufika pamaso pa mbaleako Yoabu?”" 
2Samuel2:23 Mbwenye Asahele hadaleke tayu kumthamangisa, tenepo Abineri na kuchikumbu kwa dipache adamenya m'mimba mwa Asahele mbiphutchukira kunduli kwache. Asahele adagwa pansi mbafa, tenepo munthu onsene akhadza pambuto pakhali iye tambza pale, akhaimira." 
2Samuel2:24 Mbwenye Yoabu na Abishai adalamuka kasaka Abineri, tenepo pakuthobila dzuwa iwo adafika paphiri ya Ama ile ili kumabulukiro dzuwa a Gia panjira yakwendera m'thando yatchetcha ya Gibeoni." 
2Samuel2:25 Amuna a dzinza ya Benjemani adagumanyikana pontho mwakuzungulira Abineri mbaimira pansonga ya phiri. 
2Samuel2:26 Abineri adachemera Yoabu mbati, “Ayi ife tathema kumenyana kwenda na kwenda? Kadi iwe nkhabe dzindikira kuti penepi mamalisiro ache nkhutsukwala? Amunako analeka lini kuthamangisa abale awo?”" 
2Samuel2:27 Yoabu adatawira mbati, “Ndinadumbira na dzina ya Mulungu wamoyo kuti mbudakhonda kwene kulonga amunanga mbadathimiza kukuthamangisa mpakana mangwana na machibese.”" 
2Samuel2:28 Tenepo Yoabu adaliza ngoma ya chidziwiso, natenepo amunache onsene adasiya kuthamangisa Aisraele, tenepo nkhondoyo idamaliratu." 
2Samuel2:29 Abineri na amunache adafamba mosiku onsenewo m'phedi yonsene ya Yorodani. Iwo adawambuka mkulo wa Yorodani, tenepo pidamala iwo famba pamulikiti mangwana mwache na machibese iwo onsene adabwerera mbafika ku Mahanaimu." 
2Samuel2:30 Pidaleka Yoabu kuathamangisa, iye adagumanyisa amunache onsene mbagumana kuti amuna khumi na afemba akhasowapo kuthimizapo Asahele." 
2Samuel2:31 Amuna a Davite adapha amuna madzana matatu na makumatanthatu a Abineri kubulukira m'dzinza ya Benjemani. 
2Samuel2:32 Yoabu na amunache adakwata mtembo wa Asahele mbamuikha m'masiye a m'banja mwawo ku Betelehemu. Tenepo iwo adafamba pamulikiti mosiku onsenewo, tenepo m'makalakwecha adabwerera mbafika ku Hebroni." 
2Samuel3:1 Nkhondo pakati pa anyakutewera a Sauli na anyakutewera a Davite idathimiza kumenyeka ndzidzi ukulu ene. Pikhasanduka Davite kukhala na mphamvu pyakwanga, anyamalwache akhaenda mbasowa mphamvu." 
2Samuel3:2 Awa mbana achimuna a Davite adabala iye ku Hebroni: Mwanache wautombo akhali Aminoni, mwana adabala iye na Ahinoamu wa ku Yezereele;" 
2Samuel3:3 wachiwiri akhali Kileabu ule mache akhali Abigaile, mamfelwa wa Nabali wa ku Karimele; wachitatu akhali Abisalomu, ule mache akhali Maaka mwana wamkazi wa Mfumu Talimai wa ku Geshuri;" 
2Samuel3:4 wachinayi akhali Adonia ule mache akhali Hagiti; wachishanu akhali Shefatia ule mache akhali Abitali 
2Samuel3:5 wachitanthatu akhali Itireamu ule mache akhali Egila. Onsenewa akhali ana a Davite adabala iye ku Hebroni. 
2Samuel3:6 Pikhathimiza kumenyeka nkhondo pakati pa anyakutewera a Sauli na anyakutewera a Davite, Abineri adapichitisa yekha ene kukhala wamphamvu pakati pa anyakutewera a Sauli." 
2Samuel3:7 Nsiku inango Ishiboseti mwana Sauli adapambizira Abineri kuti akhagona na Rizipa mkazi wachibitchu wa babache, ule akhali mwana wamkazi wa Aia." 
2Samuel3:8 Penepi pidazhangalisa pyakwanga Abineri mbalonga mbati, “Ayi ukunyerezera kuti ndine ndidapereka Sauli m'manja mwa anyamalwa? Kani ukunyerezera kuti ndikutumikira Yuda?” Iye adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Kutomera ndzidzi wakutoma ine ndakhulupirika kuna babako Sauli, abale ache na ashamwali ache, pontho ndakutchinjirizani kuti muleke kundwa na Davite; apo lero ukundipambizira pya mkazi weneyu?" 
2Samuel3:9 MBUYA adadumbira kuna Davite kuti iye anakwata ufumu wa Sauli na pidzukulu pyache, pontho anachitisa Davite kukhala mfumu wa Israele na Yuda ene, kubulukira kumadolomero a dziko mpakana kumadolomero a dziko. Chinchino Mulungu mbandiphe pyache ngakhala sinachitisa penepi kukwana-kwana tayu!”" 
2Samuel3:10  
2Samuel3:11 Ishiboseti adachita mantha pyakwanga na Abineri mwakuti hadalonge na chinthu chene tayu. 
2Samuel3:12 Abineri adatuma anyamphangwa kuna Davite ule ndzidzi wenewu akhali ku Hebroni kalonga mbati, “Mbani anafuna dzatonga dzikoyi. Tende iwe na ine tichite chiverano, tenepo ine ndinakuphedza kuti Israele onsene akhale m'manja mwako.”" 
2Samuel3:13 Davite adatawira mbati, “Pyakoma, ine ndinati ndichite nawe chiverano ngakhala unachita pinthu ipi: iwe wathema kudza na Mikaela mwana wamkazi wa Sauli ndzidzi unadza iwe kuno dzandiona.”" 
2Samuel3:14 Davite adatumambo anyamphangwa kuna Ishiboseti kumpanga kuti, “Ndibwezere mkazanga Mikaela, ine ndidampagalira nsonga dzana za chimuna za Afilisti kuti ndimsembe.”" 
2Samuel3:15 Tenepo Ishiboseti adamkwata m'manja mwa mamunache Palitiele mwana Laishi. 
2Samuel3:16 Palitiele adatewera Mikaela mpakana kuluwani ya Bahurumu uku akwenda mbalira. Mbwenye Abineri adampanga mbati, “Bwerera kwanu.” Tenepo iye adabwereradi." 
2Samuel3:17 Abineri adenda kuna akadamu a Aisraele mbalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ndzidzi ukulu ene ndapifuna kuti Davite akhale mfumu wanu." 
2Samuel3:18 Tenepo uno ndi mwayi wanu. Kumbukani pidalonga MBUYA kuti, ‘Ine ndinaphatisa basa nyabasanga Davite kupulumusa anthu anga Aisraele m'manja mwa Afilisti, pontho kuna anyamalwawo anango onsene.’ ”" 
2Samuel3:19 Abineri adalonga pontho kuna anthu a dzinza ya Benjemani. Kubuluka penepo adenda ku Hebroni kapanga Davite pinthu pikhadaphatizana anthu a dzinza ya Benjemani na Aisraele onsene. 
2Samuel3:20 Pidadza Abineri kuna Davite ku Hebroni pabodzi pene a amuna makumawiri, Davite adaasasanyira phwando." 
2Samuel3:21 Abineri adapanga Davite mbati, “Chinchino ndinati ndiende kakwata dziko yonsene ya Israele kuti ikhale m'manja mwanu, Imwe Mfumu. Iwo anatawira kuti mukhale mfumu penepo imwe munakhala na pinthu pikhafuna imwe, pontho munatonga dziko yonseneyi.” Davite adatsikimizira Abineri kuti anatchinjirizwa, natenepo adamgwinya." 
2Samuel3:22 Kubuluka penepo Yoabu na mathubu anango a Davite adabwerera kudenda iwo kachita nkhondo kule mbadza na pinthu pizinji pidapokosera iwo pile. Kwache Abineri hakhali ku Hebroni pabodzi pene na Davite tayu, thangwi Davite akhadamgwinya mbamtsikimizira kuti anatchinjirizwa." 
2Samuel3:23 Pidafika Yoabu na amunache adapangwa kuti Abineri akhadadza kuna Mfumu Davite, tenepo Davite adamgwinya mbamtsikimizira kuti anatchinjirizwa." 
2Samuel3:24 Penepo Yoabu adenda kuna mfumu mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Chachita imwe ninji? Abineri adadza kuna imwe. Thangwi yache ninji imwe mudamtawirisa kwenda?" 
2Samuel3:25 Iye adadza dzakunyengezani pontho dzazonda pyonsene pene pimbachita imwe na konsene kwene kumbaenda imwe. Ndimomwene kuti imwe mukupidziwa penepi.” 
2Samuel3:26 Pidabuluka iye pakhali Davite pale, Yoabu adatuma anyamphangwa kuti akachemere Abineri, natenepo iwo adadza naye kubulukira pa mchera wa Sira. Kwache Davite hadadziwe na chinthu chene tayu pya penepi." 
2Samuel3:27 Pidafika Abineri ku Hebroni, Yoabu adenda naye pakhundu khala ninga akhafuna kulonga naye chibiso-biso, tenepo adamulasa m'mimba. Natenepo Abineri adaphiwa thangwi iye adapha Asahele mbaleache Yoabu." 
2Samuel3:28 Pidapiva Davite adalonga mbati, “Ine na ufumu wanga nkhabe mseru pamaso pa MBUYA tayu thangwi ya kuphiwa kwa Abineri mwana Neri." 
2Samuel3:29 Chiropa chache chigwere pamsolo pa Yoabu na banjache yonsene. Pamifendu yonsene mbapakhale munthu m'banja mwache wakuchucha chiropa, penu wamatanya, penu wakuchimwana kuphata mabasa achimuna, penu wakuphiwa pankhondo, penu wakusowa pyakudya.”" 
2Samuel3:30 Tenepo Yoabu na mbaleache Abishai adabwezera Abineri thangwi ya kuphiwa kwa Asahele mbaleawo pankhondo ku Gibeoni. 
2Samuel3:31 Kubuluka penepo Davite adalonga kuna Yoabu na kuna anthu onsene akhali na iye ale mbati, “Ng'ambani nguwo zanu mbamuvala masakha kusintili Abineri.” Pandzidzi wa malirowo Mfumu Davite ene adafamba m'nduli mwa baulu." 
2Samuel3:32 Abineri adaikhwa m'masiye ku Hebroni, tenepo mfumu adalira mwakugaluza fala panthumbipo. Anthu onsene adachitambo chibodzi-bodzi." 
2Samuel3:33 Davite adaimba nyimbo ishi pamaliro a Abineri: “Thangwi yache ninji Abineri afe ninga pupwe? 
2Samuel3:34 Manjache hadamangwe tayu, pontho miyendo yache hidamangwe tayu; iye adafa ninga munthu wakuphiwa na mapanga!” Anthu onsene adamulira pontho." 
2Samuel3:35 Nsiku yonseneyo anthu adayesera kumkhakhamiza Davite kuti adye. Mbwenye iye adadumbira pikulu pene mbati, “Mulungu mbandiphe pyache ngakhala ndinadya chinthu dzuwa mbidzati thobila!”" 
2Samuel3:36 Iwo adaikha penepi mumtima mwamo mbakomerwa. Ndimomwene pyonsene pidachita mfumu pidakomera anthu. 
2Samuel3:37 Nsiku yeneyo anthu onsene a Davite na a ku Israele adavesadi kuti mfumu hadakwatepo khundu pakuphiwa kwa Abineri tayu. 
2Samuel3:38 Mfumu adalonga kuna mathubu ache mbati, “Kadi imwe nkhabe dzindikira tayu kuti mkadamu wamkulu mu Israele lero afa?" 
2Samuel3:39 Podi na ine ene mfumu wakusankhulwa na Mulungu, manungo anga nkhabe mphamvu lero tayu. Ana achimuna atatu a Zeruia akundichitira pyaupandu. MBUYA mbatchunyuse mphandu zenezi mwakuthemerana na pyachita iwo.”" 
2Samuel4:1 Pidava Ishiboseti mwana Sauli kuti Abineri akhadaphiwa ku Hebroni, adachita mantha, pontho anthu onsene a mu Israele adagoswera napyo." 
2Samuel4:2 Ishiboseti akhali na akadamu a magulu a nkhondo awiri, Baana na Rekabu, ana achimuna a Rimoni wa ku Beeroti a m'dzinza ya Benjemani. Beeroti ambawerengerwa ninga khundu ya Benjemani," 
2Samuel4:3 mbwenye Abeeroti akhakhala mwenemo pakutoma adathawira ku Gitaimu kukhakhala iwo na kale ene kule. 
2Samuel4:4 Chidzukulu chinango cha Sauli chikhali Mefiboseti mwana Yonatani ule akhali na pyaka pishanu pyakubalwa pidaphiwa Sauli na Yonatani. Pidava iye kubulukira ku Yezereele pya kuphiwa kwa Sauli na Yonatani makayayache adamthukula mbathawa naye. Kwache iye akhachimbiza pyakwanga mwakuti adamgwisa mbalamala miyendo. 
2Samuel4:5 Baana na Rekabu adautoma ulendo wakwenda kunyumba ya Ishiboseti mbafika kweneko masikati mwenemo iye akupuma. 
2Samuel4:6 Mkazi wakuyang'anira pamsuwo akhaodzira pikhabubuda iye tirigu, tenepo adagona chitulo. Baana na Rekabu adamyamira mbapita m'bwalo." 
2Samuel4:7 Kabodzi kene adenda kusubi kwa Ishiboseti mukhaliza iye mkhonono patalimba pache mbampha. Tenepo iwo adagwanda msolo wache mbaenda nawo mosiku onsene kugwanda na m'phedi ya Yorodani. 
2Samuel4:8 Iwo adapereka msolowo kuna Mfumu Davite ku Hebroni mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ufu msolo wa Ishiboseti mwana wa nyamalwanu Sauli akhayesa kukuphani ule. Lero MBUYA atawirisa kuti mfumu mubwezere Sauli na pidzukulu pyache.”" 
2Samuel4:9 Davite adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ndinadumbira na dzina ya MBUYA ule adandipulumusa kuna pyakugoswa pyonsene." 
2Samuel4:10 Nyamphangwa ule adadza kuna ine ku Zikilagi dzandipanga pya imfa ya Sauli, adanyerezera kuti adadza na mphangwa zadidi. Ine ndidamphata mbandimphesa. Wenewu ndiye ukhali mfupo udatambira iye thangwi ya mphangwa zache zadidizo." 
2Samuel4:11 Pinakhala pyakugoswa pyakwanga kuna munthu wakuchita upandu kuna munthu okhonda dawa wakugona pyache m'nyumba mwache! Ine ndinati ndikubwezereni thangwi ya upandu wachita imwe, pontho ndinati ndikutswaireni padziko yonsene yapansi.”" 
2Samuel4:12 Davite adatonga kuti anyankhondo ache aphe Baana na Rekabu mbaagwanda manja na manyalo. Tenepo adaamanika pamuti chifupi na thawale mu Hebroni. Iwo adakwata msolo wa Ishiboseti mbaufikhira m'masiye a Abineri mu Hebroni. 
2Samuel5:1 Kubuluka penepo madzinza onsene a ku Israele adadza kuna Davite ku Hebroni mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ife ndife manungo anu pontho chiropa chanu." 
2Samuel5:2 M'ndulimu podi na pikhali Sauli mfumu wathu, imwe mukhatsogolera Aisraele kunkhondo, pontho MBUYA adadumbira kuti imwe munatsogolera anthu ache ninga makabuswa, pontho munakhala mtongi wawo.”" 
2Samuel5:3 Natenepo akadamu onsene a Aisraele adadza kuna Mfumu Davite ku Hebroni. Iye adachita nawo chiverano chakupambulika, iwombo adamdzoza kukhala mfumu wa Israele." 
2Samuel5:4 Davite akhali na pyaka makumatatu pyakubalwa mukhapita iye ufumu, tenepo iye adatonga pyaka makumanayi." 
2Samuel5:5 Iye adatonga dzinza ya Yuda mu Hebroni pyaka pinomwe na theka pontho mu Yerusalemu, madzinza anango onsene a Israele na Yuda pyaka makumatatu na pitatu." 
2Samuel5:6 Ndzidzi udafika wakuti Davite na amunache adenda kasosa Yerusalemu. Ayebusi akhakhala kweneko ale adanyerezera kuti Davite hanakwanisa kukunda mzindawo tayu. Tenepo iwo adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Iwe nkhabe kwanisa kupita muno na pang'ono pene tayu; anafuna kukukhondesa ndi maboli-boli na anyakulamala.”" 
2Samuel5:7 Mbwenye Davite adapokosera Zioni, mbuto yakutchingwa na mpanda, ule mbudziwikaletu na dzina yakuti “Mzinda wa Davite.”" 
2Samuel5:8 Nsiku yeneyo Davite adalonga kuna amunache mbati, “Ayi pana munthu unango pano ambazonda pyakwanga Ayebusi ninga mumbaazondera ine. Tathema kuapha. Tenepo ndokoni na m'mikhwawa ya madzi mbamukasose maboli-boli na anyakulamalawo.” Ndi thangwi ache pikulongwa kuti, “Maboli-boli na anyakulamala nkhabe kwanisa kupita m'nyumba ya MBUYA tayu.”" 
2Samuel5:9 Pidamala iye pokosera mbuto yakutchingwa na mpanda ile, Davite adakhalamo mbauthula kuti ndi mzinda wa Davite. Iye adamanga mzinda kuzungulira kubulukira kule kukhali mitumbira mpakana m'bwalo." 
2Samuel5:10 Iye adasanduka wamphamvu pyakwanga ndzidzi onsene, thangwi MBUYA Wamphamvu Zonsene akhali naye." 
2Samuel5:11 Kubuluka penepo Mfumu Hiramu wa kumzinda wa Turo adatuma anyamphangwa kuna Davite pabodzi pene na mitanda yamkungudza, anyampala matabwa na amisiri akumanga nyumba zamiyala kuti akamange nyumba yachifumu." 
2Samuel5:12 Natenepo Davite adadzindikira kuti MBUYA ndiye akhadamkhazikisa kukhala mfumu wa Israele, pontho kuti akhachitisa ufumu wache kufamba mwadidi thangwi ya udidi wa anthu ache." 
2Samuel5:13 Pidamala iye fuluka ku Hebroni kwenda ku Yerusalemu, Davite adakwata akazi azinji achibitchu mbabala ana azinji achimuna na achikazi ene." 
2Samuel5:14 Ana adabala iye ku Yerusalemu mbawa; Shamua, Shobabu, Natani, Solomoni," 
2Samuel5:15 Ibihari, Elishua, Nefegi, Yafia," 
2Samuel5:16 Elishama, Eliada na Elifeleti." 
2Samuel5:17 Afilisti adapangwa kuti Davite apitiswa ufumu mu Israele, tenepo anyankhondo awo adabuluka kachita naye nkhondo. Pidava Davite penepi, iye adatchithira kumbuto yakutchingwa na mpanda ile." 
2Samuel5:18 Afilisti adafika paphedi ya Refaimu mbaipokosera. 
2Samuel5:19 Davite adavunza MBUYA mbati, “Ayi, ndichite nawo nkhondo Afilistiwa? Ayi munandichitisa kuakunda?” MBUYA adatawira mbati, “Ndoko kachite nawo nkhondo pontho ndinakuchitisa kuakunda.”" 
2Samuel5:20 Tenepo Davite adenda ku Baala-Perazimu kudakunda iye Afilisti kule. Iye adalonga mbati, “MBUYA aswa anyamalwanga ninga madzi makulu.” Natenepo mbuto yeneyo imbachemerwa Baala-Perazimu." 
2Samuel5:21 Pidathawa Afilisti, iwo adasiya m'nduli milungu yawo, tenepo Davite na amunache ale adaikwata." 
2Samuel5:22 Kubuluka penepo Afilisti adabwerera kuphedi ya Refaimu mbakhalamo pontho. 
2Samuel5:23 Davite adavunza pontho nzeru kuna MBUYA, tenepo MBUYA adamtawira mbati, “Leka kuasosa na kuno, mbwenye zungulira mbusasanyike kaasosa na kukhundu inangoyo chifupi na miti ya balisamu." 
2Samuel5:24 Sindzidzi nkhuva upekete-pekete pansonga pamiti ya balisamu, penepo asose, thangwi ine ndinaenda patsogolo pako kakunda anyankhondo a Afilisti.”" 
2Samuel5:25 Davite adachita pidampanga MBUYA, tenepo iye adakwanisa kuthamangisa Afilisti kubulukira ku Geba kwenderatu ku Gezeri." 
2Samuel6:1 Davite adachemeresa pontho pabodzi anyankhondo aluso a ku Israele, onsene adakwana pikwi makumatatu" 
2Samuel6:2 mbaatsogolera kwenda ku Baala mu Yuda, towera akwate kubulukira kweneko Bokosi ya Chiverano ya Mulungu, ile ikhadziwika na dzina yakuti MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ule akhala pampando wachifumu padzulu pa pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido." 
2Samuel6:3 Iwo adakwata Bokosi ya Chiverano ya Mulungu kubuluka nayo kunyumba ya Abinadabu ile ikhali paphiri mbaikwiza m'chingolo chitswa. Uza na Ahio ana achimuna a Abinadabu akhafambisa chingolocho 
2Samuel6:4 uku Ahio akhafamba patsogolo. 
2Samuel6:5 Davite na Aisraele onsene akhavina na kuimba na mphamvu zawo zonsene kulemedza MBUYA pakuphatisa basa anyakatangale, malimba, ng'oma, pisekese na nkhotcho." 
2Samuel6:6 Pikhafika iwo pambuwa ya Nakoni, ng'ombe zidagwegweduka tenepo Uza adafuthula dzanjache mbaphata Bokosi ya Chiverano ya Mulungu ile."
