2Samuel6:7 Kabodzi kene MBUYA adazhangalira Uza mbampha thangwi ya kusowa kwache mantha. Uza adafera ponthopo m'khundu mwa Bokosi ya Chiverano ile," 
2Samuel6:8 tenepo na lero mbuto yeneyo imbachemerwa Perezi-Uza. Davite pidampha mtima thangwi MBUYA adamtchunyusa Uza mwakuzhangali. 
2Samuel6:9 Tenepo Davite adachita mantha na MBUYA mbalonga mbati, “Apo ndinakwanisa tani kukwata Bokosi ya Chiverano?”" 
2Samuel6:10 Natenepo iye adanyerezera kuleka kuikwata kwenda nayo kumzinda wa Yerusalemu; m'mbuto mwache adabauka mbaenda nayo kunyumba ya Obedi-Edomu mzika ya mzinda wa Gati. 
2Samuel6:11 Bokosi ya Chiverano ile idakhala kweneko miyezi mitatu, tenepo MBUYA adatsanzayisa Obedi-Edomu na banjache." 
2Samuel6:12 Mfumu Davite adapiva kuti MBUYA adatsanzayisa Obedi-Edomu na pinthu pyache pyonsene pikhali na iye thangwi ya Bokosi ya Chiverano. Natenepo iye adenda kakwata Bokosi ya Chiverano kubulukira kunyumba ya Obedi-Edomu kudza nayo kumzinda wa Davite na kusekera kukulu. 
2Samuel6:13 Pidafamba amuna akhathukula Bokosi ya Chiverano ale mathanyo matanthatu, Davite adaapanga kuti aimire, tenepo iye adapereka nsembe ng'ombe imuna na mwanamphulu wakunenepa." 
2Samuel6:14 Davite adavala kwene kapundu basi mbavina na mphamvu zache zonsene kulemedza MBUYA. 
2Samuel6:15 Iye na Aisraele onsene adakwata Bokosi ya Chiverano kwenda nayo ku Yerusalemu uku akukhuwa mwakukomerwa na kuliza ngoma. 
2Samuel6:16 Pikhapitiswa Bokosi ya Chiverano mumzinda wa Davite mule, Mikaela mwana wamkazi wa Sauli adasuzumira pazhanera mbaona Mfumu Davite akuvina na kunumpha-numpha pamaso pa MBUYA, tenepo penepi pidamchitisa manyadzo." 
2Samuel6:17 Iwo adadza na Bokosi ya Chiverano ile mbaiikha pambuto pache m'chikhumbi chikhadamanga Davite chile. Tenepo iye adapereka nsembe na pyakupereka pyachiphatizano kuna MBUYA. 
2Samuel6:18 Pidamalisa iye kupereka nsembe zakupyerera na pyakupereka pyachiphatizano, iye adatsanzayisa anthu na dzina ya MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene." 
2Samuel6:19 Kubuluka penepo iye adagawa pyakudya kuna anthu onsene. Iye adapasa mamuna na mkazi onsene mu Israele mkate ubodzi na phindi ya nyama yakuotcha, na pitumbuwa pya mfesa zakuuma. Pidamala penepi munthu onsene adenda kwawo." 
2Samuel6:20 Tenepo Davite adenda kamwenyika banjache. Mikaela adabuluka panja kagumanikana naye mbalonga mbati, “Mfumu wa Israele kupilulupisa yekha ene lero, iye adula nguwo zache ninga pupwe pamaso pa atsikana achibitchu a mathubu ache.”" 
2Samuel6:21 Davite adatawira mbati, “Ine ndikhavina kulemedza MBUYA, ule adandisankhula m'mbuto mwa babako na banjache mbandipitisa kukhala nyakutsogolera anthu ache Aisraele. Tenepo ine ndinati ndithimize kuvina kulemedza MBUYA," 
2Samuel6:22 pontho ndinati ndinyanye kupilulupisa ndekha ene. Ine ndinati ndioneke wakupupwa pamaso pako mbwenye nyakulemedzwa pamaso pa atsikana achibitchu ale.” 
2Samuel6:23 Mikaela, mwana wamkazi wa Sauli, akhali wakusowa ana mpakana kufa kwache." 
2Samuel7:1 Mfumu Davite adakhazikika m'nyumba mwache yachifumu, tenepo MBUYA adamtchinjiriza kuna anyamalwache onsene." 
2Samuel7:2 Tenepo mfumu adalonga kuna Natani mprofeti mbati, “Ine ndikukhala m'nyumba yakumangwa na matabwa amkungudza mbwenye Bokosi ya Chiverano ya Mulungu ikukhala m'chikhumbi!”" 
2Samuel7:3 Natani adatawira mbati, “Chitani pyonsene pinanyerezera imwe thangwi MBUYA ali namwe.”" 
2Samuel7:4 Mbwenye na mosiku mweche MBUYA adalonga kuna Natani mbati," 
2Samuel7:5 “Ndoko kampange nyabasanga Davite kuti ine ndikulonga kuna iye kuti, ‘Si iwe anafuna dzandimangira nyumba yakuti ine ndikhalemo tayu." 
2Samuel7:6 Kubulukira ndzidzi udapulumusa ine Aisraele kuna anthu a ku Iguputo mpakana lero ine sidakhale m'nyumba tayu. Ine ndaenda mbuto na mbuto mbandikhala m'chikhumbi. 
2Samuel7:7 Kufamba-famba kwanga konsene na Aisraele ine sidalonge tayu na kuna mbodzi ene wa akadamu adasankhula ine kutsogolera anthu anga kuti, “Thangwi yache ninji mwakhonda kundimangira nyumba ya matabwa amkungudza?” ’" 
2Samuel7:8 “Chinchino panga nyabasanga Davite kuti, ‘Ine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndikulonga kuti: Ine ndidakukwata kumpovu kukhadyesa iwe mabira kule kuti ukhale mtongi wa anthu anga Aisraele." 
2Samuel7:9 Ine ndakhala nawe konsene kwene kwaenda iwe, pontho ndakunda anyamalwako onsene pamaso pako. Ine ndinakuchitisa kukhala munthu wakuveka pyakwanga ninga akadamu akuveka pyakwanga padziko yapansi." 
2Samuel7:10 Ine ndasankhulira anthu anga Aisraele mbuto mbandiachitisa kukhazikikamo, kule kunafuna iwo khala okhonda ponderezwa na pang'ono pene. Kutomera ndzidzi udapita iwo m'dziko yeneyi, iwo asoswa na anthu akuzunguzika, kwache penepi nkhabe dzachitika pontho tayu. Ine ndinadumbira kukutchinjiriza kuna anyamalwako onsene pontho kukupasa pidzukulu." 
2Samuel7:11  
2Samuel7:12 Ungafa mbuikhwa m'masiye a makolo ako, ndinachitisa mbodzi wa anako achimuna kukhala mfumu mbandichitisa ufumu wache kukhala wamphamvu." 
2Samuel7:13 Iye ndiye anafuna dzandimangira nyumba, pontho ndinaonesesa kuti ufumu wache ukhale wakwenda na kwenda." 
2Samuel7:14 Ine ndinakhala babache, iye mbakhala mwananga. Iye angachita chakudawika ine ndinamtchunyusa ninga mumbachitira baba kutchunyusa mwanache." 
2Samuel7:15 Kwache ine nkhabe dzaleka kumuonesa kumfuna kwanga kokhonda mala ninga mudachitira ine kuna Sauli, adabulusa ine ule kuti iwe ukhale mfumu." 
2Samuel7:16 Ndzidzi onsene iwe unakhala na pidzukulu pontho ndinachitisa ufumu wako kukhala wakwenda na kwenda pamaso panga. Ufumu wako nkhabe dzamala tayu.’ ” 
2Samuel7:17 Natani adapanga Davite pyonsene pidatchulula Mulungu kuna iye. 
2Samuel7:18 Tenepo Mfumu Davite adenda pamaso pa MBUYA m'Chikhumbi. Iye adakhala pansi mbapemphera mbati, “MBUYA Mulungu, ndine animbo ine, pontho banjangambo ninji kuti munditsanzayise ninga tenepa?" 
2Samuel7:19 Kwache chinchino imwe mukuchita pikululetu, MBUYA Mulungu; imwe mwadumbiraletu pya pidzukulu pyanga pinafuna kudza m'tsogolo muno. Tenepo imwe MBUYA Mulungu, mumbachitisa munthu kuti aone pinthu penepi!" 
2Samuel7:20 Ninji pontho chinafuna ine kulonga kuna imwe MBUYA Mulungu! Imwe mumbandidziwa ine nyabasanu. 
2Samuel7:21 Imwe mudapichita mwakufuna kwanu; imwe mwachita pinthu pyonsene pikulupi kuti mundifunzise. 
2Samuel7:22 Imwe ndimwe wamkulu MBUYA Mulungu! Nkhabe unango ninga imwe; ndzidzi onsene ife tapidziwa kuti imwe ene ndimwe Mulungu. 
2Samuel7:23 Nkhabe dzinza inango padziko yapansi ninga Israele, dzinza idapulumusa imwe paubitchu kuti akhale anthu anu ale. Pinthu pikulu pontho pyakudodomesa pidaachitira imwe pyachitisa kuti muveke padziko yapansi. Imwe mudathamangisa madzinza anango na milungu yawo ndzidzi ukhaenda anthu anu, anthu adasudzula imwe paubitchu kudziko ya Iguputo kuti akhale anthu anu ale." 
2Samuel7:24 Imwe mudachitisa Israele kukhala anthu anu kwenda na kwenda, pontho imwe MBUYA mwasanduka Mulungu wawo." 
2Samuel7:25 “Tenepo chinchino MBUYA Mulungu chitisani kudumbira kwanu kuna ine na kuna pidzukulu pyanga kukwana-kwana, pontho chitani pidadumbira imwe pile." 
2Samuel7:26 Tenepo kuveka kwanu kunakhala kukulu kwenda na kwenda, pontho ndzidzi onsene anthu anati alonge kuti, ‘MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndi Mulungu wa Israele!’ Pontho munachitisa ufumu wanga kukhala wakukhazikika pamaso panu!" 
2Samuel7:27 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, Mulungu wa Israele, ine ndawanga mtima kupemphera tenepa kuna imwe, thangwi imwe mwatchulula pinthu pyonsenepi kuna ine nyabasanu, pontho mwandipanga kuti munachitisa pidzukulu pyanga kukhala mafumu." 
2Samuel7:28 “Tenepo chinchino MBUYA Mulungu imwe ndimwe Mulungu; ndzidzi onsene imwe mumbachita pinthu pimbadumbira imwe, pontho chinchino mwadumbira pinthu pyadidipi kuna ine, nyabasanu." 
2Samuel7:29 Ndikupemphera kuti mutsanzayise pidzukulu pyanga, towera iwo athimize kukomerwa na kuakomera kwanu mtima. Imwe MBUYA Mulungu mwadumbira penepi, tenepo mtsanzayiso wanu unakhala pana pidzukulu pyanga kwenda na kwenda.”" 
2Samuel8:1 Pidagwanda ndzidzi pang'ono, Mfumu Davite adasosa pontho Afilist mbaakunda. Iye mbapokosera Metegi-Ama m'manja mwa Afilisti." 
2Samuel8:2 Kubuluka penepo, iye adakunda Amoabu. Iye adaagonesa pansi mbaapima na nkhambala. Tenepo iye adapha anthu awiri pa atatu onsene. Natenepo Amoabu adakhala pansi pa utongi wache mbakhoma msonkho kuna iye." 
2Samuel8:3 Kubuluka penepo iye adakunda mfumu wa ku Zoba, Hadadezere mwana Rehobu, pikhali Hadadezere panjira kamenya nkhondo kuti akwate pontho nthembache ya chifupi na mkulo wa Yufurate." 
2Samuel8:4 Davite adaphata amuna akupakira akavalo chikwi chibodzi na madzana manomwe, pontho amuna akufamba pansi pikwi makumawiri. Iye adakoya akavalo kukweya pingolo akukwana dzana ibodzi mbagwanda uzingo wa ntchafu ya anyakusalirawo." 
2Samuel8:5 Pidatuma Aaramu a ku Damasiko anyankhondo kaphedza Mfumu Hadadezere, Davite adachita nawo nkhondo mbapha amuna pikwi makumawiri na piwiri." 
2Samuel8:6 Kubuluka penepo iye adamanga misasa ya nkhondo m'nthemba yawoyo, tenepo Aaramu adakhala pansi pa utongi wache mbakhoma msonkho kuna iye. MBUYA adachitisa Davite kukunda konsene kwene kukhaenda iye." 
2Samuel8:7 Davite adapokosera pyakugedera matswimo pyagolidi pidathukula mathubu a Hadadezere mbaenda napyo ku Yerusalemu. 
2Samuel8:8 Iye adakwata pontho nkuwa uzinji ene kubulukira ku Beta na Berotai, mizinda ikhatongwa na Hadadezere ile." 
2Samuel8:9 Mfumu Toi wa ku Hamati adava kuti Davite akhadakunda anyankhondo onsene a Hadadezere. 
2Samuel8:10 Natenepo iye adatuma mwanache Yoramu kapasa mwenyikiro na kuchita makolokoto Mfumu Davite, thangwi ya kukunda kwache Hadadezere, ule akhadachitambo nkhondo na Toi kazinji kene. Yoramu adenda kuna Davite na mitukwa ya golidi, siliva na nkuwa." 
2Samuel8:11 Mfumu Davite adaipambulira kuna MBUYA kuti iphatiswe basa pachipembedzo, pabodzi pene na siliva pontho golidi pikhadakwata iye kuna madzinza adakunda iye ale:" 
2Samuel8:12 Aedomu, Amoabu, Aamoni, Afilisti na Aamaleki, kuthimizapo khundu ya pinthu pidapokosera iye Hadadezere." 
2Samuel8:13 Davite adanyanya kuveka pidabwerera iye kapha amuna pikwi khumi na pisere a ku Edomu m'phedi ya Munyu. 
2Samuel8:14 Kubuluka penepo iye adamanga misasa ya nkhondo m'nthemba yonsene ya Edomu, tenepo Aedomu onsene adakhala pansi pa utongi wache. MBUYA adachitisa Davite kukunda konsene kwene kukhaenda iye." 
2Samuel8:15 Davite adatonga dziko yonsene ya Israele mbaonesesa kuti ndzidzi onsene anthu ache akuchitirwa chilungamo pontho pyakuthema. 
2Samuel8:16 Yoabu ule mache akhali Zeruia akhali mkadamu wa anyankhondo; Yehosafati mwana Ahiludi ndiye akhali nyakulemba pya m'dziko; 
2Samuel8:17 Zadoki mwana Ahitubu na Ahimeleki mwana Abiatara akhali anyansembe; Seraia akhali nyakulemba m'thando ya miseru; 
2Samuel8:18 Benaia mwana Yehoiada akhali mkadamu wa anyakulondali a Chikereti na a Chipeleti a Davite; ana achimuna a Davite akhali anyansembe. 
2Samuel9:1 Nsiku inango Davite adavunza mbati, “Ayi pana unango asalira na moyo m'banja ya Sauli. Ngakhala alipo, ndinafuna ndimkomere mtima thangwi ya Yonatani.”" 
2Samuel9:2 Pakhali nyabasa m'banja ya Sauli dzinache Ziba, tenepo iye adapangwa kwenda kuna Davite. Mfumu adamvunza mbati, “Ayi iwe ndiwe Ziba?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ndine pano nyabasanu.”" 
2Samuel9:3 Mfumu adamvunza mbati, “Ayi alipo unango nyakusalira na moyo m'banja ya Sauli anafuna ine kumkomera mtima ninga mudadumbira ine kuna Mulungu.” Ziba adatawira mbati, “Alipo mbodzi basi wa ana achimuna a Yonatani; iye ngwakulamala miyendo yonsene miwiri.”" 
2Samuel9:4 Mfumu adavunza mbati, “Ali kupi iye?” Ziba adatawira mbati, “Ali kumsuwo wa Makiri mwana Amiele wa ku Lodebara.”" 
2Samuel9:5 Natenepo Mfumu Davite adamtumira mphangwa mbadzeswa pamaso pache kubulukira ku Lodebara kumusa kwa Makiri mwana Amiele. 
2Samuel9:6 Pidafika Mefiboseti mwana Yonatani pontho chidzukulu cha Sauli pamaso pa Davite, adalamba kumulemedza. Davite adalonga mbati, “Mefiboseti.” Tenepo iye adatawira mbati, “Ndine pano nyabasanu.”" 
2Samuel9:7 Davite adalonga mbati, “Leka chita mantha. Ine ndinafuna kukukomera mtima thangwi ya babako Yonatani. Ine ndinati ndibwezere kuna iwe minda yonsene ya mbuyako Sauli, pontho ndzidzi onsene iwe unadya pathebulu panga.”" 
2Samuel9:8 Mefiboseti adalamba pontho mbalonga mbati, “Mwanambwa ene wakufa ali pyadidi kupiringana ine pano. Apo thangwi yache ninji kuti mundichitire udidi ninga wenewu?”" 
2Samuel9:9 Tenepo mfumu adachemera Ziba nyabasa wa Sauli mbalonga mbati, “Ndikupasa Mefiboseti mwana mbuyako pinthu pyonsene pikhali pya Sauli na banjache pile." 
2Samuel9:10 Iwe, anako na anyabasako munalimira banja ya mbuyako Sauli mbamudza na pyakuvunapyo kuna iwo kuti pikhale pyawo. Mbwenye Mefiboseti makayo ndzidzi onsene anadya pathebulu panga.” Ziba akhali na ana khumi na anomwe achimuna na anyabasa makumawiri." 
2Samuel9:11 Ziba adatawira mbati, “Ine ndinachita pyonsene pene pinanditonga imwe mfumu.” Tenepo Mefiboseti adadya pathebulu ya mfumu ningambo mbodzi wa ana a mfumu." 
2Samuel9:12 Mefiboseti akhali na mwana wamamuna dzinache Mika. A m'banja yonsene ya Ziba adasanduka anyabasa a Mefiboseti. 
2Samuel9:13 Natenepo Mefiboseti, ule akhali wakulamala miyendo yonsene miwiri, adakhala mu Yerusalemu kudya pathebulu ya mfumu." 
2Samuel10:1 Pidagwanda ndzidzi pang'ono Mfumu Nahashi wa Amoni adafa, tenepo mwanache Hanuni adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache." 
2Samuel10:2 Davite adalonga mbati, “Ine ndinati ndikomere mtima Hanuni mwana Nahashi ningambo mudandikomera mtima babache.” Tenepo Davite adatuma anyamphangwa kuonesa nsisi zache. Pidafika iwo ku Amoni," 
2Samuel10:3 akadamu a ku Amoni adalonga kuna mfumu mbati, “Ayi mukunyerezera kuti Davite atuma anyamphangwa kuna imwe kuonesa nsisi zache thangwi ya kufuna kulemedza babanu? Nkhabe, tayu! Iye adaatuma kuno ninga anyakuzonda mzinda towera aupokosere!”" 
2Samuel10:4 Hanuni adaphata anyamphangwa adatumwa na Davite ale mbaachinga khundu ibodzi ya ndevu zawo mbang'amba nguwo zawo mpakana m'matako mbaagwinya kuti aende pyawo. 
2Samuel10:5 Iwo akhachita manyadzo pyakwanga kuti abwerere kwawo. Pidava Davite pinthu pidachitika pile, iye adatuma mphangwa kaapanga kuti abange khala pyawo ku Yeriko mbabwerera mwenemo ndevu zawo zamera pontho." 
2Samuel10:6 Aamoni adadzindikira kuti iwo akhadachitisa Davite kukhala nyamalwawo, tenepo iwo adalemba anyankhondo aganyo a Chiaramu pikwi makumawiri a ku Beterehobu na Zoba, amuna pikwi khumi na piwiri a ku Tobu, pontho na mfumu wa ku Maaka na amuna chikwi chibodzi." 
2Samuel10:7 Pidapiva Davite, adatuma Yoabu pabodzi pene na anyankhondo onsene kamenya nkhondo." 
2Samuel10:8 Aamoni adabuluka mbakakhala m'mbuto zawo zankhondo pamsuwo wa mzindawo ukulu wa Raba, mwenemo anango, pabodzi pene na Aaramu na amuna a ku Tobu na Maaka adakhala m'mbuto zawo m'minda." 
2Samuel10:9 Yoabu adaona kuti patsogolo pache na m'nduli mwache pakhali magulu anyankhondo, tenepo iye adasankhula magulu ankhondo akunyindirika mu Israele mbaaikha m'mbuto zawo zankhondo mwakuyang'anisana na Aaramu." 
2Samuel10:10 Iye adaikha anyankhondoche anango akusalirawo pansi pa utongi wa Abishai mbaleache, ulembo adaaikha m'mbuto zawo zankhondo mwakuyang'anisana na Aamoni." 
2Samuel10:11 Yoabu adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ngakhala unaona Aaramu akundikunda, idza undiphedze, tenepo inembo ndingaona Aamoni akukukunda, ndinati ndidze dzakuphedza." 
2Samuel10:12 Wangisa pontho wanga mtima! Tende timenyere nkhondo anthu athu, pontho na mizinda ya Mulungu wathu mwakuwangisa. Kufuna kwa MBUYA mbakuchitike!”" 
2Samuel10:13 Yoabu na amunache adenda kasosa, tenepo Aaramu adathawa." 
2Samuel10:14 Pidaona Aamoni kuti Aaramu akuthawa, iwombo adathawa pamaso pa Abishai mbaenda kumzindawo. Tenepo Yoabu adabwerera kubulukira kamenyana na Aamoni mbaenda ku Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel10:15 Pidadzindikira Aaramu kuti iwo adakundwa na Aisraele, adagumanyisa magulu awo onsene ankhondo kudza pabodzi pene." 
2Samuel10:16 Mfumu Hadadezere adatumira mphangwa Aaramu, ale akhali kukhundu inango ya mkulo wa Yufurate, tenepo iwo adadza ku Helamu pansi pa utongi wa Shobaki, mkadamu wa anyankhondo a Mfumu Hadadezere wa ku Zoba." 
2Samuel10:17 Pidava Davite penepi, adagumanyisa pabodzi magulu ankhondo a Aisraele. Iwo adawambuka mkulo wa Yorodani mbaenda ku Helamu, kule kudakhala Aaramu m'mbuto zawo zankhondo mwakuyang'anisana naye. Nkhondo idaotoka," 
2Samuel10:18 tenepo Aisraele adathamangisa anyankhondo a Aaramu kuabwezera m'nduli. Davite na amunache adapha anyakufambisa pingolo madzana manomwe na amuna akupakira akavalo pikwi makumanayi, pontho adakuwaza Shobaki, mkadamu wa anyankhondo mbaferatu ponthopo." 
2Samuel10:19 Pidadzindikira mafumu, ale akhali pansi pa utongi wa Hadadezere kuti iwo akhadakundwa na Aisraele, adachita mtendere na Aisraele mbakhala pansi pa utongi wawo. Tenepo Aaramu adachita mantha kuphedza pontho Aamoni." 
2Samuel11:1 Pandzidzi wakuphwitha miti, ndzidzi ukhaenda mafumu kunkhondo, Davite adatuma Yoabu na mathubu ache pabodzi pene na anyankhondo a Chiisraele; iwo adakunda Aamoni mbazungulira mzinda wa Raba na anyankhondo awo. Mbwenye Davite adasalira mu Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel11:2 Nsiku inango na mawulo, Davite adalamuka pakadera pache mbathamula miyendo pansoyi ya nyumbache ya chifumu. Na penepo iye adaona mkazi akusamba, ule akhali wakubalika pyakwanga." 
2Samuel11:3 Tenepo iye adatuma munthu kukaona kuti mkaziyo akhali ani mbapidziwa kuti akhali Batesheba mwana wamkazi wa Eliamu, pontho mkazache Uria Mhiti." 
2Samuel11:4 Tenepo Davite adatuma munthu kuti akachemere mkaziyo; iye adadzeswa kuna iye mbapita naye m'bonde. Mkaziyo akhadamalisa kwene kupichenesa yekha ene kuteweza mwambo thangwi ya kusamba kwache. Kubuluka penepo iye adabwerera kwawo. 
2Samuel11:5 M'nduli mwache mkazi ule adadzindikira kuti adakwata mimba, tenepo adatuma mphangwa kuna Davite kumpanga penepi." 
2Samuel11:6 Davite adatuma mphangwa kuna Yoabu mbati, “Tumiza kuno Uria Mhiti.” Natenepo Yoabu adamtumizadi kuna Davite." 
2Samuel11:7 Pidafika Uria, Davite adamvunza ngakhala Yoabu na anyankhondo akhali mwadidi, pontho kuti nkhondo ikhafamba tani." 
2Samuel11:8 Iye adalonga kuna Uria mbati, “Ndoko kumusa kwako ukabange kapuma.” Tenepo Uria adenda, m'nduli mwache mfumu adamtumira mtukwa." 
2Samuel11:9 Kwache Uria hadende kumusa kwache tayu. M'mbuto mwache iye adagona pyache pamsuwo wa nyumba ya mfumu pabodzi pene na anyakulondali a mfumu. 
2Samuel11:10 Pidapiva Davite kuti Uria hadende kumusa kwache tayu, adamvunza mbati, “Iwe wafamba nsinzo wakulapha pyakwanga, apo watani wakhonda kwenda kumusa kwako?”" 
2Samuel11:11 Uria adatawira mbati, “Amuna a ku Israele na Yuda ali kunkhondo pontho Bokosi ya Chiverano ina iwo, mkadamu wanga Yoabu na mathubu ache amanga msasa pamtetete. Apo ndinakwanisa tani kwenda kumusa kwanga kadya, kamwa na kugona na mkazanga. Ine ndinadumbira na kutani kwene kuti ine nkhabe chita chinthu ninga chenechi tayu!”" 
2Samuel11:12 Tenepo Davite adalonga mbati, “Khala na ine lero tenepo mangwana ndinati ndikutumize kubwerera.” Natenepo Uria adakhala ku Yerusalemu nsiku yeneyo na mangwana mwache." 
2Samuel11:13 Davite adamchemera kuti akadye pyakudya pya mawulo mbamuledzeresa. Kwache mosiku wenewo pontho Uria hadende kumusa kwache tayu, m'mbuto mwache iye adagonera pachakufindika chache m'subi ya anyakulondali nyumba ya mfumu." 
2Samuel11:14 Mangwana mwache na machibese Davite adalembera Yoabu kalata mbaitumiza na Uria. 
2Samuel11:15 Iye adalemba tenepa: “Ikha Uria pamzera wakutsogolo kule kumbakaka nkhondo, tenepo msiyeni yekha ene towera aphiwe.”" 
2Samuel11:16 Tenepo pikhazungulira Yoabu mzinda na nkhondo, adatumiza Uria pambuto pale padakakisa anyamalwawo nkhondo." 
2Samuel11:17 Anyamalwa adabuluka mumzinda mbamenyana na anyankhondo a Yoabu, anango mwa anyankhondo a Davite adaphiwa, na Uria Mhiti enembo adaphiwa." 
2Samuel11:18 Yoabu adatuma mphangwa kuna Davite kumpanga pya nkhondo; 
2Samuel11:19 mbampanga munthu adenda na mphangwayo mbati, “Ungamala kumpanga mfumu pyonsene pya nkhondo," 
2Samuel11:20 iye anakwanisa kuzhangali mbakuvunza kuti, ‘Thangwi yache ninji imwe mudenda chifupi na mzinda kamenya nawo nkhondo?" 
2Samuel11:21 Ayi imwe mudadzindikire tayu kuti iwo anaponya matswimo na m'mafufu a mpanda? Imwe mudakumbuke tayu mudaphera iwo Abimeleki mwana Gideoni? Kukhali ku Tebezi kule kudaponya mkazi libwe na pampanda mbampha nayo. Apo thangwi yache ninji imwe mudenda chifupi na mpanda ninga tenepa?’ Ngakhala mfumu anakavunza penepi kampange kuti, ‘Uria nyabasanu aphiwambo basi.’ ”" 
2Samuel11:22 Tenepo nyamphangwa adenda kuna Davite mbampanga pyonsene pidampanga Yoabu. 
2Samuel11:23 Iye adalonga mbati, “Anyamalwathu akhali na mphamvu pyakwanga kupiringana ife; iwo adabuluka mumzinda mwawo mbamenyana nafe pamtetete. Kwache ife tidaathamangisira kumsuwo wa mzinda." 
2Samuel11:24 Tenepo iwo adatiponyera matswimo na pampanda, natenepo anyankhondo anu anango aphiwa. Uria nyabasanu aphiwambo basi.”" 
2Samuel11:25 Davite adalonga kuna nyamphangwa ule mbati, “Kawangise mtima Yoabu pontho kampange kuti aleke sanyika napyo mtima, podi iwe nkhabe dziwa tayu kuti mbani anafuna kufa kunkhondo. Mpange kuti akakise nkhondo mbapokosera mzindawo.”" 
2Samuel11:26 Pidapiva Batesheba kuti mamunache akhadaphiwa kunkhondo, iye adamsintili." 
2Samuel11:27 Pidamala ndzidzi wakusintili, Davite adamchemeresa kunyumba kwache; iye adasanduka mkazache mbabala naye mwana wa mamuna. Kwache pidachita Davite pile MBUYA pidamuipirwa." 
2Samuel12:1 MBUYA adatuma mprofeti Natani kuna Davite. Tenepo pidadza iye kuna Davite adalonga mbati, “Pidachitwa na amuna anango awiri muluwani inango; mbodzi akhali nyakufuma, unangomboyu akhali nyakutcherenga." 
2Samuel12:2 Nyakufumayi akhali na ng'ombe na mabira mazinji. 
2Samuel12:3 Mbwenye nyakutcherenga akhali na mwanabirache mbodzi ene basi, akhadagula iye ule. Iye adamuyang'anira mwadidi mbakula pamsuwo pache na anache. Mwanabirayo akhadya pyakudya pikhadya iye mbamwesera na m'khomitcho mwache, pontho akhamuikha pamiyendo pache. Kuna iye mwanabirayo akhakhala ninga mwanache wachikazi." 
2Samuel12:4 Nsiku inango kumsuwo wa nyakufuma kudafika mlendo. Nyakufuma ule hadafune pyakupha chibodzi mwa pifuyo pyache tayu kuti asasanyire mlendo wache ule. M'mbuto mwache iye adakwata mwanabira wa nyakutcherenga ule mbamphikira mlendo wache ule.” 
2Samuel12:5 Davite adazhangali pyakwanga na nyamfuma ule mbalonga mbati, “Ndinadumbira na dzina ya MBUYA wamoyo kuti munthu adachita penepiyi athema kufa." 
2Samuel12:6 Na thangwi ya pinthu pyakukala mtima pidachita iyepi, athema kupagali kanayi kupiringana pidakwata iye pile.”" 
2Samuel12:7 Natani adalonga kuna Davite mbati, “Munthu wache ndiwe ene.” Tenepo MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele akulonga kuti: “Ine ndidakupitisa ufumu wa Israele mbandikupulumusa m'manja mwa Sauli." 
2Samuel12:8 Ine ndidakupasa ufumu wache na akazache ene; ndidakuikha kukhala mfumu wa Israele na Yuda ene. Ngakhala penepi pidakukwane tayu ine mbidakupasa pyakuinjipa kupiringana penepi. 
2Samuel12:9 Apo thangwi yache ninji wakhonda kuvera matongero anga? Iwe wachitiranji chinthu chakuipa ninga chenechi? Iwe waphesa Uria pankhondo na talasada ya Aamoni mbukwata mkazache. 
2Samuel12:10 Tenepo chinchino anango mwa pidzukulu pyako anafa na imfa yakugoswa thangwi iwe wakhonda kundivera mbukwata mkazi wa Uria. 
2Samuel12:11 Ndinadumbira kuna iwe kuti ndinachitisa mbodzi wa m'banja mwako kudzesa nyatwa pana iwe. Iwe unapiona ndingapokosera akazako mbandiapasa munthu unango, tenepo iye anagona nawo pakwecha dzuwa ikuswa miti." 
2Samuel12:12 Iwe wachita penepi chibiso-biso, kwache ine ndinapichitisa penepi kuchitika pakwecha dzuwa ikuswa miti kuti Aisraele onsene aone.”" 
2Samuel12:13 Davite adalonga mbati, “Ine ndadawira MBUYA.” Natani adatawira mbati, “MBUYA akulekerera; iwe hunafa tayu." 
2Samuel12:14 Kwache na thangwi yakuti iwe waonesa kukhonda gopa MBUYA na pyachita iwepi mwanayo anati afe.” 
2Samuel12:15 Kubuluka penepo Natani adabwerera kwawo. MBUYA adachitisa mwana Davite, ule adabala iye na mkazi Uria kudwala pyakwanga." 
2Samuel12:16 Davite adapemphera kuna Mulungu kuti mwanayo awange. Iye adakhonda kudya na chinthu chene pontho mosiku onsene iye akhaenda kusubi kwache mbagona pyache pansi. 
2Samuel12:17 Mathubu ache adenda kuna iye mbayesa kumulamusa, kwache iye adakhonda kudya na chinthu chene pabodzi nawo." 
2Samuel12:18 Pidagwanda dimingu ibodzi mwana ule adafa, tenepo mathubu a Davite adachita mantha kumpanga pidachitika pile. Iwo adalonga mbati, “Mwanayu mbali moyo, Davite hakhatitawira tayu tingalonga naye. Apo tinampanga tani kuti mwanache afa? Iye anakwanisa kupikuwaza yekha ene!”" 
2Samuel12:19 Pidadzindikira Davite kuti iwo akhalonga chipansi-pansi kuna unango na mwanzache adadzindikira kuti mwanayo adafa. Tenepo iye adavunza mbati, “Kani mwana afa?” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Ande, afa.”" 
2Samuel12:20 Davite adalamuka pansi padagona iye pale, adasamba, adasapula tsisi yache mbavala nguwo zinango. Natenepo adapembedza m'nyumba ya MBUYA. Pidabwerera iye kunyumba kwache iye adapempha kuti adye, tenepo iye adadya na ndzidzi onthowo udapaswa iye pyakudyawo." 
2Samuel12:21 Mathubu ache adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ife nkhabe kuvesa pinachitikapi tayu. Ndzidzi ukhali mwanayi na moyo imwe mukhalira mbamukhonda kudya; mbwenye lero sindzidzi mwanayo nkhufa mwalamuka mbamudya!”" 
2Samuel12:22 Davite adatawira mbati, “Ande, ine ndidapimana kudya na kulira ndzidzi ukhali mwanayo na moyo. Ine ndidanyerezera kuti MBUYA anandivera nsisi kuti mwana aleke kufa." 
2Samuel12:23 Chinchino podi iye afa, thangwi yache ninji kuti ndipimane kudya? Apo ine ndinakwanisa kumulamusa kuimfa? Ine ndikupidziwa kuti nsiku inango ndinati ndiende kuna iyeko, kwache iye nkhabe kwanisa kubwerera kuna ine tayu.”" 
2Samuel12:24 Tenepo Davite adathondoza mkazache Batesheba. Iye adapita naye m'bonde mbabala naye mwana wamamuna mbamthula Solomoni. MBUYA adamfuna pyakwanga mphaleyo 
2Samuel12:25 mbapanga mprofeti Natani kuti amthule mphaleyo dzina yakuti Yedidia, thangwi MBUYA adamfuna." 
2Samuel12:26 Pandzidzi wenewu Yoabu adathimiza kumenyana na Raba mzinda ukulu wa Aamoni mbasala chifupi kuupokosera. 
2Samuel12:27 Iye adatuma mphangwa kuna Davite kumpanga kuti: “Ine ndasosa mzinda wa Raba mbandipokosera mbuto zonsene zakuudzesera madzi. 
2Samuel12:28 Tenepo gumanyisani magulu anu ankhondo anango onsene akausose mbaupokosera kuti ukhale wanu gopesera ine ndinaupokosera mbuthulwa na dzinanga.” 
2Samuel12:29 Davite adagumanyisa anyankhondo ache mbaenda ku Raba, tenepo adausosa mbaupokosera." 
2Samuel12:30 Kubulukira pa msolo wa mfanikizo wa milungu Moleki, Davite adakwata chipewu chachifumu chagolidi chile chidalemera makilogramu makumashanu na mashanu mbachikhala pontho na mwala wakudula mwenemo. Davite adachikwata mbachivala mumsolo mwache. Iye adakwata pontho pinthu pizinji pidapokoserwa mumzindamo" 
2Samuel12:31 mbakwata anthu akhali mwenemowo mbaapasa kuti aphate basa ya macheka, mapaza na mbadzo mbaakhakhamiza kuumba njerwa. Iye adachita chibodzi-bodzi kuna anthu a m'maluwani onsene a Amoni. Kubuluka penepo iye na amunache adabwerera ku Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel13:1 Abisalomu mwana Davite akhali na nyamaingache wakubalika pyakwanga dzinache Tamara. Aminoni akhali mwana unango wa Davite, tenepo iye adamfuna pyakwanga mtsikanayo." 
2Samuel13:2 Iye adamfuna pyakwanga pene mwakuti iye adafeluka thangwi pikhaoneka pyakukhonda kwanisika kuti achite naye pikhafuna iye, podi mtsikanayo akhali mwali okhonda dziwa mamuna." 
2Samuel13:3 Mbwenye iye akhali na shamwaliache dzinache Yonadabu mwana wamamuna wa Shimea, mbaleache Davite. Yonadabu akhali munthu wakushashalika pyakwanga." 
2Samuel13:4 Yonadabu adalonga kuna Aminoni mbati, “Iwe ndiwe mwana wa mfumu, kwache nsiku na nsiku iwe umbaoneka wakutsukwala. Ninji chinakunensa?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ine ndamfuna pyakwanga Tamara nyamaingache mbaleanga Abisalomu.”" 
2Samuel13:5 Yonadabu adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Usangizire kufeluka mbuende kagona patalimba. Tenepo babako angadza dzakuona, ulonge kuna iye kuti, ‘Ndaphata miyendo ndipangireni nyamainganga Tamara kuti andipase pyakudya. Ndinafuna kuti asasanye pyakudyapyo pamaso panga, angamala penepo iye ene andifiliviri.’ ”" 
2Samuel13:6 Natenepo Aminoni adasangizira kufeluka mbaenda kagona patalimba. Mfumu Davite adenda kamuona, tenepo Aminoni adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ndaphata miyendo mtawiriseni nyamainganga Tamara kudzandisasanyira pitumbuwa pamaso panga, angamala penepo iye ene andifiliviri yekha ene.”" 
2Samuel13:7 Natenepo Davite adatuma mphangwa kuna Tamara kunyumbache yachifumu zakuti: “Ndoko kugelo kwa Aminoni ukamsasanyire pyakudya.” 
2Samuel13:8 Tamara adendadi kweneko mbamgumana agona patalimba. Iye adamunya mpambo mbasasanya pitumbuwa mwenemo, iye mbali kuona. Kubuluka penepo iye adaphika pitumbuwa." 
2Samuel13:9 Iye adakwata chiwaya mbapakula pitumbuwa pile pamaso pache kuti adye, kwache Aminoni adakhonda kudya. Iye adalonga mbati, “Bulusa munthu onsene panja.” Tenepo onsene adamala buluka panja." 
2Samuel13:10 Aminoni adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Idza na pitumbuwapyo patalimba panga pano mbundifiliviri.” Iye adakwata pitumbuwa pile mbaenda napyo chifupi na talimbacheyo." 
2Samuel13:11 Sindzidzi nkhumpasa pitumbuwa pile, iye adamphata mbalonga mbati, “Tende ndigone nawe.”" 
2Samuel13:12 Tamara adalonga mbati, “Tayu, nkhoswe yanga. Leka kundikhakhamiza kuchita chinthu ninga chenechi, chinthu chokhonda tawiriswa mu Israele muno. Leka chita chinthu chakuipa ninga chenechi." 
2Samuel13:13 Apo ine, ndinaenda kupi kuthawa pinthu pyakuchitisa manyadzopi? Mphapo iwembo, unakhala ninga mbodzi wa mapupwe akudawika mu Israele muno. Ndaphata miyendo, ndoko ukalonge na mfumu iye nkhabe kukukhondesa tayu kuti undisembe.”" 
2Samuel13:14 Kwache iye hadamvesere tayu. Podi iye akhali wamphamvu kupiringana Tamara, iye adamkunda mbamphatirira." 
2Samuel13:15 Kubuluka penepo Aminoni adamzonda pyakwanga pene Tamara; ndzidzi wenewu iye adamzonda pyakwanga pene kupiringana kumfuna kudachita iye pakutoma. Tenepo adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Lamuka ubuluke panja.”" 
2Samuel13:16 Iye adatawira mbati, “Nyonyo pyanga! Kundibulusa panja ninga tenepa ngupandu ukulu pyakwanga kupita pyandichita iwe chinchinopi!” Kwache Aminoni hadamvesere tayu." 
2Samuel13:17 Tenepo iye adachemeresa nyabasache mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Bulusa mkaziyu pamaso panga. Mponyere kunja mbufunge msuwo na mphinga!”" 
2Samuel13:18 Nyabasa ule adambulusa panja mbafunga msuwo. Tamara adavala mkhanjo wache wamikono, nguwo zakuvala mwana mfumu okhonda dziwa mamuna nsiku zonsenezo." 
2Samuel13:19 Iye adapiwaza dotha mumsolo mwache mbang'amba mkhanjo wache, pontho adabisa nkhope na manjache mbaenda pyache uku akulira." 
2Samuel13:20 Pidamuona nkhoswe yache Abisalomu adamvunza mbati, “Kani Aminoni akuchitira pyakuzuda? Matama nyamainganga. Leka sanyika napyo mtima, iye ndi nkhoswe yako. Tenepo Tamara adakhala m'nyumba mwa Abisalomu wakutsukwala pontho yekha ene.”" 
2Samuel13:21 Pidapiva Mfumu Davite pidachitika pile adazhangali napyo pyakwanga. 
2Samuel13:22 Tenepo Abisalomu adamzonda pyakwanga pene Aminoni thangwi ya kuphatirira Tamara nyamaingache mwakuti hadalonge naye tayu. 
2Samuel13:23 Pidagwanda pyaka piwiri Abisalomu akhachingisa mabirache ku Baala-Hazori chifupi na luwani ya Eferemu, tenepo iye adachemera ana onsene a mfumu kukhala penepo." 
2Samuel13:24 Iye adenda kuna Mfumu Davite mbalonga mbati, “Mfumu, ine ndikuchingisa mabiranga. Imwe na mathubu anu munakwanisa dzakhala nawo paphwandopo.”" 
2Samuel13:25 Mfumu adatawira mbati, “Nkhabe, mwananga, tonsenefe nkhabe kwendako tayu gopesera tinakunensa.” Podi kwene kuti Abisalomu adamkhakhamiza, iye adakhonda kwendako, kwache iye adamtsanzayisa." 
2Samuel13:26 Abisalomu adalonga mbati, “Ngakhala imwe munaendako tayu, ndaphata miyendo mtawiriseni mbaleanga Aminoni kwendako.” Mfumu adavunza mbati, “Thangwi yanji?”" 
2Samuel13:27 Mbwenye Abisalomu adakakamira kupempha mpakana mfumu adatawirisa Aminoni na anache onsene achimuna kwenda na Abisalomu. Abisalomu adasasanya phwando yakuthemerana na mfumu 
2Samuel13:28 mbapanga anyabasache pyakuchita mbati, “Ngavani kuno, Aminoni angaledzera na vinyu, pontho ine ndingakupangani kuti mumphe, mpheni. Lekani chita mantha. Pilekeni pigwere ine pano. Wangani mtima pontho lekani chita chidodo.”" 
2Samuel13:29 Tenepo anyabasa adachita ninga montho mudaapangira Abisalomu mbapha Aminoni. Penepo pene ana anango a mfumu adapakira mabulu awo mbathawa. 
2Samuel13:30 Mukhaenda iwo kwawo, Davite adapangwa mbati, “Abisalomu amala kupha anako onsene, pontho nkhabe na mbodzi ene asala na moyo tayu!”" 
2Samuel13:31 Mfumu adalamuka mbang'amba nguwo zache na kutsukwala mbapigwisa pansi. Anyabasa akhali na iye penepo adang'ambambo nguwo zawo. 
2Samuel13:32 Mbwenye Yonadabu mwana Shimea mbaleache Davite adalonga mbati, “Mfumu, iye hadaphe ananu onsene tayu, aphiwa ndi Aminoni ene basi. Munthu onsene anakwanisa kudziwa pakuuona nkhope yache kuti Abisalomu adasasanya kuchita penepi kubulukira ndzidzi udaphatirira Aminoni nyamaingache Tamara." 
2Samuel13:33 Natenepo pyakuti ananu onsene amala phiwa mphyakunama; aphiwa ndi Aminoni ene basi.” 
2Samuel13:34 Ndzidzi wenewo Abisalomu adathawa. Penepo pene nyakuyang'anira pamsuwo adaona anthu azinji akutchitha phiri na njira kubulukira ku Horonaimu. Tenepo iye adenda kapanga mfumu pidaona iye pile. 
2Samuel13:35 Yonadabu adalonga kuna Davite mbati, “Yang'ana, enewo mbananu akudza ninga montho mudakupangirani ine mule kuti anabwera.”" 
2Samuel13:36 Sindzidzi iye nkhulonga, ana a Davite adafika; iwo adatoma kulira tenepo mathubu ache adalirambo pikulu pene." 
2Samuel13:37 Abisalomu adathawa mbaenda kuna mfumu wa ku Geshuri, dzinache Talimai mwana Amihudi mbakhala kweneko pyaka pitatu. Davite adasintili mwanache Aminoni ndzidzi ukulu ene." 
2Samuel13:38  
2Samuel13:39 Mbwenye pidaduwalira iye pya imfa ya Aminoni, Davite adamtchuwa pyakwanga mwanache Abisalomu." 
2Samuel14:1 Yoabu adapidziwa kuti Davite akhadamtchuwa pyakwanga mwanache Abisalomu," 
2Samuel14:2 tenepo iye adatuma mphangwa kuna mkazi unango wa ku Tekoa ule akhali tchenjede pyakwanga. Pidafika iye, Yoabu adalonga kuna mkazi ule mbati, “Usangize kusintili, vala nguwo zako zakusintili nazo pontho leka sapula tsisiako. Ukhale ninga mkazi ule asintili ndzidzi ukulu ene." 
2Samuel14:3 Kubuluka penepo, ndoko kuna mfumu ukalonge pinafuna ine kukupangapi.” Tenepo Yoabu adampanga pikhafuna iye kalonga pile." 
2Samuel14:4 Mkazi ule adenda kuna mfumu mbalamba kumulemedza mbalonga mbati, “Mfumu, ndiphedzenimbo ine.”" 
2Samuel14:5 Mfumu adamvunza mbati, “Unafunanji?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ine ndine mamfelwa wakutcherenga. Mamunanga afa." 
2Samuel14:6 Mbuya, ine ndikhali na ana awiri achimuna, tenepo nsiku inango iwo adamenyana kuminda mbapasowa munthu unango wakuavunulira, natenepo mbodzi adaphiwa na mwanzache." 
2Samuel14:7 Abale anga onsene adandisandukira mbandipanga kuti ndipereke mwana adasala na moyo ule kuna iwo, towera amphe thangwi ya upandu udachitira iye mbaleache ule. Ngakhala iwo anandichita penepi, ine sinasalave na mwana tayu. Iwo anati avunge chidikhiro changa chasala na ine mbakhonda kundisiyira mbewu ya mamunanga.”" 
2Samuel14:8 Mfumu adatawira mbati, “Ndoko bwerera ndinati ndione mwadidi pyalonga iwepi.”" 
2Samuel14:9 Iye adalonga mbati, “Mfumu pyonsene pinafuna imwe kuchita pigwere pyapyo pamsolo panga na banjanga; imwe na banjanu ndimwe anthu akhonda dawa.”" 
2Samuel14:10 Mfumu adatawira mbati, “Ngakhala munthu unango anakuthuswa-thuswa idza naye kuno, tenepo iye nkhabe dzakunensa pontho tayu.”" 
2Samuel14:11 Mkazi ule adalonga mbati, “Mfumu, ndaphata miyendo, pempherani kuna MBUYA Mulungu wanu, towera mbaleanga, ule anafuna pyakubwezera imfa ya mwananga, aleke chita upandu pakupha mwananga unangoyi.” Davite adatawira mbati, “Ndinadumbira na dzina ya MBUYA wamoyo kuti mwanako nkhabe kuwazwa na pang'ono pene tayu.”" 
2Samuel14:12 Mkazi ule adalonga mbati, “Ndaphata miyendo, Mfumu, nditawiriseni ndilonge chinthu chibodzi chene basi.” Iye adatawira mbati, “Longa.”" 
2Samuel14:13 Iye adalonga kuna Davite mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji mwachita chinthu chakudawa ninga chenechi kuna anthu a Mulungu? Imwe nee mwatawirisa tayu mwananu kubwerera kubulukira kudathawira iye kule, tenepo imwe mwapikonwesa mwekha ene na mafala alonga imwe chinchinowa." 
2Samuel14:14 Tonsenefe tinati tife; ife takhala ninga madzi akutayika pansi ale nkhabe kwanisika kupyerwa pontho tayu. Mbwenye Mulungu anakoya mwadidi moyo wa munthu ule ambagumana njira, towera nyakuthawira kunango kabisala abwerere." 
2Samuel14:15 Mfumu, thangwi yandilongesa penepi njakuti anthu adandithuswa, natenepo ine ndidalonga ndekha ene kuti ndinalonga namwe na chidikhiro chakuti imwe munachita pinakupemphani ine." 
2Samuel14:16 Ine ndidanyerezera kuti munandivesera mbamundipulumusa kuna munthu anafuna kupha mwananga pabodzi pene na ineyi pontho kutibulusa m'dziko muno, idapereka Mulungu kuna anthu ache." 
2Samuel14:17 Ine ndidalonga mumtima mwanga kuti kudumbira kwanu mbakudandichitisa kukhala pakupata thangwi mfumu akhala ninga mngelo wa Mulungu mbakwanisa kusiyanisa pakati pa chadidi na chakuipa. MBUYA Mulungu wanu mbakhale namwe.” 
2Samuel14:18 Mfumu adatawira mbati, “Ndinati ndikuvunze chinango, tenepo iwe wathema kundipanga pyakuona pyonsene.” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ndivunzeni mfumu.”" 
2Samuel14:19 Davite adavunza mbati, “Si Yoabu akuchitisa kuti ulonge pyonsenepi tayu?” Mkazi ule adatawira mbati, “Ndinadumbira na kutani kwene, Mfumu, kuti nkhabe munthu anakwanisa kubaukira kumadyo penu kumabzere tayu papinthu pyonsene pinalonga mfumu. Ndimomwene thubu wanu Yoabu ndiye andipanga pyakuti ndichite pontho pyakuti ndilonge." 
2Samuel14:20 Nyabasanu Yoabu achita penepi towera asanduze pinthu kukhala mwadidi. Mfumu, muna nzeru ninga mngelo wa Mulungu, pontho mumbadziwa pyonsene pimbachitika m'dziko muno.”" 
2Samuel14:21 Kubuluka penepo mfumu adalonga kuna Yoabu mbati, “Ndanyerezera kuchita pyapempha iwe. Ndoko ukamkwate mphale weneyu Abisalomu kubwera naye.”" 
2Samuel14:22 Yoabu adapiponya pansi pamaso pa Davite kumulemedza mbalonga mbati, “Mulungu mbakutsanzayiseni mfumu! Ndikupidziwa kuti mwakomerwa nane thangwi mwava kupempha kwanga.”" 
2Samuel14:23 Tenepo iye adalamuka mbaenda ku Geshuri kakwata Abisalomu mbadza naye ku Yerusalemu. 
2Samuel14:24 Kwache mfumu adatonga kuti Abisalomu mbaleke khala m'nyumba yachifumu mbalonga mbati, “Ine nkhabe funa kumuona tayu.” Natenepo Abisalomu adakhala m'nyumba mwache mbakhonda kuonekera pamaso pa mfumu." 
2Samuel14:25 Mu Israele monsene mukhali nkhabe munthu wakubalika ninga Abisalomu. Iye akhali nkhabe chilema kubulukira kumanyalo mpakana kumsolo. 
2Samuel14:26 Tsisi yache ikhali yakuphophana, tenepo iye akhaichinga kabodzi pachaka, ingakula maka na kulemera. Angaipima ikhakwana ninga makilogramu mawiri." 
2Samuel14:27 Abisalomu akhali na ana atatu achimuna na mwana wamkazi mbodzi wakubalika pyakwanga dzinache Tamara. 
2Samuel14:28 Abisalomu adakhala mu Yerusalemu pyaka piwiri okhonda kuonana na mfumu. 
2Samuel14:29 Tenepo iye adatuma mphangwa kuna Yoabu kumpempha kuti aende kuna mfumu m'mbuto mwache; kwache Yoabu hadabwere tayu. Abisalomu adamtumira pontho Yoabu mphangwa, tenepo Yoabu adakhonda pontho kubwera." 
2Samuel14:30 Tenepo Abisalomu adalonga kuna anyabasache mbati, “Munda wa Yoabu wachita madire na wanga, pontho una barele. Ndokoni mukaupise moto.” Tenepo iwo adendadi mbakaupisa moto." 
2Samuel14:31 Yoabu adenda kunyumba ya Abisalomu mbakalonga mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji anyabasako apisa mundanga?”" 
2Samuel14:32 Abisalomu adatawira mbati, “Na thangwi yakuti hudadze tayu ndzidzi udakuchemeresa ine ule. Ine ndikhafuna kuti uende kuna mfumu ukampemphe m'mbuto mwanga kuti, ‘Thangwi yache ninji ndidabuluka ku Geshuri kudza kuno. Mbapidakhala pyadidi mbidakhala pyanga kweneko.’ ” Abisalomu adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Ndikufuna kuti iwe usasanye njira yakuti ndionane na mfumu, tenepo ngakhala ine ndadawa mbandiphe pyache.”" 
2Samuel14:33 Tenepo Yoabu adenda kuna Mfumu Davite mbampanga mafala adalonga Abisalomu. Mfumu adatumira mphangwa Abisalomu, ule adenda kuna iye mbalamba pamaso pache. Mfumu adamtambira pakumpsompsona." 
2Samuel15:1 Pidagwanda ndzidzi Abisalomu adapigumanira yekha ene chingolo na akavalo na amuna makumashanu anyakufamba naye. 
2Samuel15:2 Iye akhalamuka na machibese mbaimira pamsuwo wa mzinda. Munthu onsene angadza na mseru kuti mfumu autonge, Abisalomu akhamchemera kuti adze kuna iye mbamvunza kudabulukira iye. Tenepo munthu angamala kumpanga dzinache na kudabulukira iye," 
2Samuel15:3 Abisalomu akhalonga mbati, “Yang'ana, mseru wako ngwamaso, pontho wakuveka, kwache nkhabe nyakuimirira wa mfumu kuti ave mseru wenewu tayu.”" 
2Samuel15:4 Iye adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Ndikhapifuna pyakwanga kuti ndikhale mtongi! Tenepo munthu onsene ule ana mseru penu kufuna kudungunya adze kuna ine, inembo mbidamtongera mwachilungamo.”" 
2Samuel15:5 Munthu angadza kuna Abisalomu kulamba pamaso pache, Iye akhafuthula dzanjache mbamphata, pontho kumpsompsona." 
2Samuel15:6 Abisalomu adachita penepi kuna Aisraele onsene ale akhadza kuna mfumu kufuna chilungamo mwakuti iye adatendeusa mtima a Aisraele. 
2Samuel15:7 Pidagwanda pyaka pinayi Abisalomu adalonga kuna Mfumu Davite mbati, “Mbuya, nditawiriseni ndiende ku Hebroni kuti ndikachite kudumbira kudachita ine kuna MBUYA kukwana-kwana." 
2Samuel15:8 Ndzidzi ukhali ine ku Geshuri m'dziko ya Aaramu ndidadumbira kuna MBUYA kuti ngakhala anandibwezera ku Yerusalemu, ndinampembedza mu Hebroni.”" 
2Samuel15:9 Mfumu adalonga mbati, “Ndoko na mtendere.” Tenepo Abisalomu adenda ku Hebroni." 
2Samuel15:10 Kwache iye adatuma anyamphangwa kuna madzinza a ku Israele kalonga kuti, “Mungava kulira kwa ngoma, longani kuti, ‘Abisalomu apita ufumu ku Hebroni!’ ”" 
2Samuel15:11 Pakhali amuna madzana mawiri, ale akhadachemerwa na Abisalomu kuti aende naye pabodzi ku Yerusalemu; iwo hadadziwe na chinthu chene tayu pya pinthu pikhafuna chita iye pile mbaenda chimpune-mpune." 
2Samuel15:12 Tenepo pikhapereka iye nsembe, Abisalomu adachemeresa Ahitofelo wa kuluwani ya Gilo, ule akhali mbodzi wa mapungu a Davite. Manyerezero akufuna kupha mfumu adawanga-wanga, pontho anyakutewera Abisalomu adainjipa." 
2Samuel15:13 Nyamphangwa adadza kuna Davite mbalonga mbati, “Mitima ya amuna a Israele ikutewera Abisalomu.”" 
2Samuel15:14 Tenepo Davite adalonga kuna mathubu ache onsene akhakhala mu Yerusalemu ale mbati, “Tathema kuthawa, gopesera nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene anakwanisa kupulumuka m'manja mwa Abisalomu tayu. Ife tathema kuthawa kabodzi kene, gopesera anafika chinchino pano mbatikunda pontho mbapha munthu onsene mumzinda muno!”" 
2Samuel15:15 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Ande, Mfumu, ife tasasanyika kuchita pyonsene pinalonga imwe.”" 
2Samuel15:16 Natenepo mfumu adabuluka mwakutsagana na banjache yonsene pontho na mathubu ache khumi kupambulapo akazi ache achibitchu khumi, ale adasalira m'nduli kuyang'anira nyumba ya mfumu." 
2Samuel15:17 Pikhabuluka mfumu na amunache onsene mumzinda mule adaimira panyumba yakumalisira. 
2Samuel15:18 Mathubu ache onsene adaimira chifupi pabodzi pene na iye, uku anyakulondali a Chikereti na a Chipeleti, pontho na Agiti; onsene madzana matanthatu, ale akhali naye kubulukira ku Gati, adafamba patsogolo pa mfumu." 
2Samuel15:19 Tenepo mfumu adalonga kuna mkadamu wawo Itai mbati, “Watani unaenda na ife pabodzi? Bwerera ukakhale na mfumu wachinchinoyi. Iwe ndiwe mlendo, pontho munthu wakuthawa kwawo." 
2Samuel15:20 Iwe wakhala kwene kuno ndzidzi ene pang'ono basi. Apo watani ndikuchitise kunzenza-nzenza na ine? Ine nkhabe dziwa na pang'ono pene tayu kunaenda ine. Ndoko ukakhale na abale ako, pontho MBUYA mbakuonese kukufuna kwache kokhonda mala, pontho mbakhulupirike kuna iwe.”" 
2Samuel15:21 Mbwenye Itai adatawira mbati, “Mfumu ndinadumbira na dzina ya MBUYA kuti ndinaenda namwe konsene kwene kunaenda imwe podi na kufa kwene.”" 
2Samuel15:22 Davite adalonga mbati, “Pyakoma tende.” Tenepo Itai adenda pabodzi pene na amunache onsene pontho na mabanja ale akhali na iye." 
2Samuel15:23 Anthu adalira mwakugaluza fala mukhaenda anyakutewera a Davite. Mfumu adawambuka mkhwawa wa Kidroni, m'nduli mwache mukhali amunache, tenepo onsene pabodzi pene adendera kuthando yatchetcha." 
2Samuel15:24 Zadoki nyansembe akhali penepo pabodzi pene na Alevi akhathukula Bokosi ya Chiverano. Iwo adaitula pansi kudikhira kuti anthu onsene amale buluka mumzindamo. Abiatara nyansembe akhali penepombo. 
2Samuel15:25 Tenepo mfumu adalonga kuna Zadoki mbati, “Kwatani Bokosi ya Chiverano mubwerere nayo mumzinda. Ngakhala MBUYA akomerwa nane anandichitisa kubwerera kuiona, pontho na mbuto pakhala iyopo." 
2Samuel15:26 Mbwenye angakhonda komerwa nane, penepo achite pyonsene pinafuna iye kuna ine.”" 
2Samuel15:27 Tenepo iye adenda kuna Zadoki mbalonga mbati, “Yang'ana, kwata mwanako Ahimaazi na Abiatara mwana Yonatani mbamubwerere kumzinda na mtendere." 
2Samuel15:28 Ine ndinadikhira pakuwambukira mkulo m'thando yatchetcha mpakana ndive kubulukira kuna iwe.” 
2Samuel15:29 Tenepo Zadoki na Abiatara adakwata Bokosi ya Chiverano mbabwerera nayo ku Yerusalemu mbakhala kweneko. 
2Samuel15:30 Davite adathimiza kukwira paphiri ya Olivi uku akulira; iye akhafamba wakusowa nkhwaira mbampsampsika kumsolo kwache thangwi ya kutsukwala. Onsene akhamtewera adampsampsikambo kumsolo kwawo mbalira. 
2Samuel15:31 Davite adapangwa kuti Ahitofelo adaphatizana na Abisalomu. Tenepo iye adapemphera mbati, “MBUYA pupwisani uphungu wa Ahitofelo kuna Abisalomu.”" 
2Samuel15:32 Pidafika Davite pansonga ya phiri, pale pakhali mbuto yakupembedzerapo Mulungu, Hushai wa Chiariki akhali penepo dzagumanikana naye uku avala mkhanjo wakung'ambika pontho fumbi mumsolo mwache kuonesa kutsukwala." 
2Samuel15:33 Davite adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ngakhala iwe unaenda nane unati undinense." 
2Samuel15:34 Mbwenye ungabwerera ku Yerusalemu unati undiphedze pakupanga Abisalomu kuti iwe unamtumikira mwakukhulupirika ninga mukhatumikira iwe babache. Tenepo chita pyonsene pyakukwanisika kupupwisa uphungu wa Ahitofelo. 
2Samuel15:35 Zadoki nyansembe na Abiatara anakhala penepo; apange pyonsene pinava iwe m'nyumba ya mfumu. 
2Samuel15:36 Iwo ana anawo achimuna Ahimaazi na Yonatani, tenepo iwe unakwanisa kuatuma kuna ine na pyonsene pinava iwe.”" 
2Samuel15:37 Tenepo Hushai, shamwaliache Davite adabwerera kumzinda na ndzidzi onthowo ukhafika Abisalomu." 
2Samuel16:1 Pikhadapiringana Davite nsonga ya phiri pang'ono vumbu-vumbu adagumanika na Ziba, nyabasa Mefiboseti, ule akhali na mabulu akuthukula mikate madzana mawiri, matsaputu dzana ibodzi a mfesa zakuuma, matsaputu dzana ibodzi a nsapo, na budu ya nthembe yakudzala na vinyu." 
2Samuel16:2 Mfumu Davite adavunza mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji iwe wadza na pyonsenepi?” Ziba adatawira mbati, “Mabuluwa ngakuti mabanjanu mfumu apakirepo, mikate na nsapo mphyakuti amuna adye, vinyu ngwakuti iwo amwe angatopa m'thando yatchetcha muno.”" 
2Samuel16:3 Mfumu adavunza mbati, “Chidzukulu cha mbuyako chili kupi?” Ziba adatawira mbati, “Iye akukhala ku Yerusalemu thangwi iye akunyerezera kuti lero Aisraele anabwezera ufumu wa mbuyache.”" 
2Samuel16:4 Tenepo mfumu adalonga kuna Ziba mbati, “Pyonsene pya Mefiboseti chinchino mphyako.” Ziba adalonga mbati, “Ine ndine nyabasanu; ndzidzi onsene, Mfumu mbuyanga, mbandikomere mtima.”" 
2Samuel16:5 Pikhafika Mfumu Davite ku Bahurimu mbodzi wa abale ache Sauli dzinache Shimei mwana Gera adabuluka kagumanikana naye mbamtemberera pikhadza iye. 
2Samuel16:6 Shimei adatoma kuponyera miyala Davite na mathubu ache, podi kwene kuti Davite adazungulirwa na amunache na anyakumuyang'anira." 
2Samuel16:7 Shimei adamtemberera mbati, “Buluka, buluka nyachiropewe, pontho mphandu!" 
2Samuel16:8 MBUYA akukubwezera thangwi ya chiropa chonsene chachuchisa iwe m'banja ya Sauli ule m'mbuto mwache iwe ukutonga. MBUYA apereka ufumu kuna mwanako Abisalomu. Iwe ukuvungika, thangwi ndiwe mphandu!”" 
2Samuel16:9 Abishai ule mache akhali Zeruia adalonga kuna mfumu mbati, “Mfumu, thangwi yache ninji mukutawirisa mwanambwa wakufayu kukutembererani. Nditawiriseni kuti ndiende kagwanda msolo wache!”" 
2Samuel16:10 Mfumu adalonga kuna Abishai na mbaleache Yoabu mbati, “Iwe nkhabe pinthu na penepi tayu. Ngakhala iye akunditemberera na thangwi yakuti ampanga ndi MBUYA kuchita tenepo, mbani ana utongi kuvunza kuti anachitiranji penepi?”" 
2Samuel16:11 Davite adalonga pontho kuna Abishai na kuna mathubu ache onsene mbati, “Mwananga ene anafuna pyakundipha, apo watani unadodoma na munthu wa dzinza ya Benjemani? Ngakhala ampanga ndi MBUYA kuti anditemberere tenepa, mulekeni pyache apichite." 
2Samuel16:12 Mwinango MBUYA anaona kusanyika kwanga mbandipagali na pyadidi m'mbuto mwa kunditemberera kunachita iye leroku.” 
2Samuel16:13 Tenepo Davite na amunache adathimiza kwenda na njira, mwenemo Shimei akhafamba ngwangwangwa m'khundu-khundu mwa phiri. Iye akhamtemberera, mbamponyera miyala na kumuwazira fumbi pikhaenda iye." 
2Samuel16:14 Mfumu na anthu ache onsene adamala topa pidafika iwo pa Yorodani, tenepo adakhala penepo mbapuma." 
2Samuel16:15 Abisalomu na Aisraele onsene akhali na iye adapita mu Yerusalemu. Penepo pakhali pontho Ahitofelo. 
2Samuel16:16 Hushai shamwaliache Davite wakunyindirika adagumanikana na Abisalomu mbakhuwa mbati, “Dondowe Mfumu! Dondowe Mfumu!”" 
2Samuel16:17 Abisalomu adavunza mbati, “Ayi kukhulupirika kwako kuna shamwaliako Davite nkhweneku? Watani wakhonda kwenda naye pabodzi?”" 
2Samuel16:18 Hushai adatawira mbati, “Ndichitirenji tenepo? Ine ndili kukhundu kwa nyakusankhulwa na MBUYA, na anthu enewa, pontho na Aisraele onsene. Ine ndinati ndikhale nawe." 
2Samuel16:19 Padzulu pache mbani pontho anatumikira ine kupambula mwana mbuyanga? Ine ndinakutumikira ninga montho mudatumikira ine babako.” 
2Samuel16:20 Tenepo Abisalomu adazungunukira kuna Ahitofelo mbalonga mbati, “Podi chinchino ife tili pano ngatipangeni, mphapo pyathema ife kuchita.”" 
2Samuel16:21 Ahitofelo adatawira mbati, “Ndoko ukagone na akazi achibitchu a babako adasiya iye m'nduli kuyang'anira nyumbache ale. Penepo Aisraele onsene anapidziwa kuti babako ambakuyesa ninga nyamalwache, pontho anyakukutewera anawangiswa mtima pyakwanga pene.”" 
2Samuel16:22 Tenepo iwo adamangira khumbi Abisalomu pansoyi panyumba ya chifumu. Natenepo pamaso pa anthu onsene Abisalomu adapita m'khumbimo mbakagona na akazi achibitchu a babache. 
2Samuel16:23 Uphungu ukhapereka Ahitofelo nsiku zenezo ukhayeswa ninga mafala chadi-chadi a Mulungu mwakuti Davite na Abisalomu akhapivera. 
2Samuel17:1 Ahitofelo adalonga kuna Abisalomu mbati, “Nditawiriseni kusankhula amuna pikwi khumi na piwiri mbatisaka-saka Davite mosiku uno." 
2Samuel17:2 Ine ndinati ndimsose mwenemo iye atopa pontho ataya mtima. Iye anachita mantha, tenepo amunache onsene anathawa. Ine ndinati ndiphe mfumu ene basi" 
2Samuel17:3 mbandidza na amunache onsene kuna imwe ninga nyakukazhali wamkazi kubwerera kuna mamunache. Kufa kwa munthu mbodzi ene basi kunafuna imweko, kunachitisa kuti anthu onsene abwerere mbukhonda kuwaza anthu anango onsene akusalirawo.”" 
2Samuel17:4 Wenewu ukhaoneka ninga uphungu wadidi kuna Abisalomu na kuna akadamu a Aisraele. 
2Samuel17:5 Abisalomu adalonga mbati, “Chemerani Hushai kuti tive pinafuna iye kulonga.”" 
2Samuel17:6 Pidafika Hushai, Abisalomu adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ahitofelo alonga tenepa kuna ife: Ayi ife tathema kuchita pyalonga iyepi? Ngakhala tinaleka kupichita, apo ngatipangenitu pyakuchita?”" 
2Samuel17:7 Hushai adatawira mbati, “Pyakupangani Ahitofelo akupangani pandzidzi wakuipa." 
2Samuel17:8 Imwe mukupidziwa kuti babanu na amunache mbanyankhondo aluso pontho akugoswa ninga mbinzi ukazi wakuberwa mwanache; babako ndi nyankhondo waluso, tenepo iye nkhabe khala na anyankhondo ache mosiku uno tayu." 
2Samuel17:9 Pinalonga inepi mwinango iye akubisala kunkhwimba penu ali kumbuto zinango. Sindzidzi Davite nkhusosa amunanu, munthu onsene anapivayo analonga kuti amunanu akundwa." 
2Samuel17:10 Penepo podi na anyankhondo akuwanga mtima ene, ale mitimawo yakhala ninga nkhalamu ananyunguluka na mantha thangwi Aisraele onsene akudziwa kuti babanu ndi nyankhondo waluso pontho amunache ngakuwanga mtima." 
2Samuel17:11 Uphungu unafuna ine kukupasani ngwakuti mudzese pabodzi Aisraele onsene kubulukira kumadolomero a dziko mpakana kumadolomero anango a dziko akuinjipa ninga tchetcha ya pagombe, tenepo iwe ene wekha uatsogolere kunkhondo." 
2Samuel17:12 Ife tinati timenyane na Davite ponsene pene panamgumana ifepo mbatimfitikiza ninga kugwa kwa bume. Nee iye penu mbodzi wa amunache anafuna sala na moyo tayu. 
2Samuel17:13 Tenepo ngakhala iye anathawira kumzinda penepo, onsene anadza na nkhambala mbatikweyera mzindawo kuphedi mwakuti paleke salirave na mwala ene penepo tayu.”" 
2Samuel17:14 Abisalomu na amuna onsene Aisraele adalonga mbati, “Uphungu wa Hushai ngwadidi kusiyana na wa Ahitofelo.” MBUYA adanyerezera kuti uphungu wa Ahitofelo uleke phatiswa basa towera kuvungika kudze pana Abisalomu." 
2Samuel17:15 Hushai adapanga anyansembe Zadoki na Abiatara uphungu udapereka iye kuna Abisalomu na kuna akadamu a Aisraele pontho na uphungu wa Ahitofelo ule. 
2Samuel17:16 Hushai adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Chinchino chimbizani, tumani mphangwa kuna Davite kuti aleke gona pakuwambukira mkulo m'thando yatchetcha mosiku uno, mbwenye awambuke mkulo wa Yorodani kabodzi kene, towera iye na amunache aleke phatwa mbaphiwa onsenene.”" 
2Samuel17:17 Yonatani mwana Abiatara na Zadoki mwana Ahimaazi akhadikhira pamphuno ya madzi pa Enirogele kunja kwa Yerusalemu, thangwi iwo hadawange mtima kupita mumzinda mwakuoniwa na anthu tayu. Nyabasa wachitsikana ndzidzi onsene akhaenda kaapanga pinthu pikhachitikapyo, tenepo iwo akhaenda kapangambo Mfumu Davite." 
2Samuel17:18 Kwache nsiku inango pidachitika kuti mphale adaaona mbapanga Abisalomu, tenepo iwo adachimbiza kabisala m'nyumba ya munthu unango dzinache Bahurimu. Iye akhali na mchera chifupi na nyumbache tenepo iwo adabisala mumcheramo." 
2Samuel17:19 Mkazache Baruhimu adaphopha mcherawo na mphampha mbawaza tchetcha padzulu pache, towera munthu na mbodzi ene aleke dzindikirapo." 
2Samuel17:20 Mathubu a Abisalomu adafika kunyumbako mbavunza mkaziyo mbati, “Ayi Ahimaazi na Yonatani ali kupi?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Iwo awambuka kale mkhwawa.” Amuna ale adaasaka, kwache hadaaone tayu. Tenepo adabwerera ku Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel17:21 Pikhaenda iwo, Ahimaazi na Yonatani adabuluka mumchera mule mbaenda kapilonga kuna Davite. Iwo adalonga pinthu pyaupandu pidasasanya Ahitofelo kupichita kuna iye mbati, “Chimbizani, wambukani mkulo.”" 
2Samuel17:22 Tenepo Davite na amunache adautoma ulendo wakuwambuka mkulo wa Yorodani. Pidachena kunja, onsene akhadamala wambuka." 
2Samuel17:23 Pidaona Ahitofelo kuti anthu hadaphatise basa uphungu wache tayu, iye adapakira pabulu pache mbaenda kumzinda kwache. Pidamala iye kusasanya mwadidi pinthu pyache adapimangirira yekha ene mbafa, tenepo adaikhwa m'masiye a kubanjache." 
2Samuel17:24 Davite adafika kuluwani ya Mahanaimu ndzidzi udawambuka Abisalomu na Aisraele mkulo wa Yorodani. 
2Samuel17:25 Abisalomu adaikha Amasa kukhala mkadamu wa anyankhondo m'mbuto mwa Yoabu. Amasa akhali mwana wamamuna wa Yetere Muishimaele, mache akhali Abigaile mwana wa mkazi wa Nahashi pontho nanache mache Yoabu dzinache Zeruia." 
2Samuel17:26 Abisalomu na amunache adamanga msasa m'nthemba ya Gileadi. 
2Samuel17:27 Pidafika Davite pa Mahanaimu, adagumanikana na Shobi mwana wamamuna wa Nahashi wa kumzinda wa Raba m'nthemba ya Amoni. Iye adagumanikana pontho na Makiri mwana wamamuna wa Amiele wa ku Lodebara mbagumanikana pontho na Barizilai wa ku Rogelimu mu Gileadi." 
2Samuel17:28 Iwo adadza na ndilo, pitomba na pyakugonera pontho na pyakudya pya Davite na amunache; tirigu, barele, ufa, mapiramanga akuotcha, nyemba, nyimo, manyuchi na mayana, pontho mabira na mafuta amkaka wa ng'ombe. Iwo adapidziwa kuti Davite na amunache akhali na njala, nyota pontho adatopa m'thando yatchetcha." 
2Samuel17:29  
2Samuel18:1 Mfumu Davite adagumanyisa amunache onsene pabodzi mbaagawa m'magulu-magulu a pikwi na a dzana mbaikhamo akadamu kuyang'anira magulu enewa. 
2Samuel18:2 Davite adatuma anyankhondo ache m'magulu atatu; Yoabu adatsogolera gulu ibodzi; Abishai mbaleache Yoabu adatsogolera gulu ibodzi; Itai wa ku Gati adatsogolerambo gulu inangomboyo. Tenepo mfumu adalonga kuna amunache mbati, “Ine ene ndinati ndiende namwe.”" 
2Samuel18:3 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Lekani kwenda nafe, thangwi nkhabe dzaoneka kusiyana tayu kuna anyamalwathu ngakhala anango tonsenefe tinathawa penu anango a ife anaphiwa; mbwenye imwepo ndimwe anthu pikwi khumi pya ife pano. Mbapidakhala pyadidi mbamudasala pyanu mumzinda mbamutitumizira pinthu pyakuti pitiphedze.”" 
2Samuel18:4 Mfumu adatawira mbati, “Ine ndinati ndichite chinaona imwe kuti ntchadidicho.” Tenepo iye adaimira m'khundu mwa msuwo wa mpanda pikhabuluka amunache pamulikiti m'magulu-magulu a chikwi na a dzana." 
2Samuel18:5 Iye adapanga Yoabu, Abishai na Itai mbati, “Na thangwi ya ine lekani kumkuwaza mphale Abisalomu.” Tenepo magulu onsene adamva Davite akupereka matongero enewa kuna mathubu ache." 
2Samuel18:6 Anyankhondo a Davite adabuluka kunja kwa mzinda mbamenya nkhondo na Aisraele mumsitu wa Eferemu. 
2Samuel18:7 Aisraele adakundwa na amuna a Davite. Nkhondo idakaka pyakwanga mwakuti amuna pikwi makumawiri adaphiwa nsiku yeneyo. 
2Samuel18:8 Nkhondo idafalikira kumidzi yonsene, tenepo anthu azinji adafa m'misitu kupiringana ale adaphiwa pankhondo." 
2Samuel18:9 Pidachitika kuti Abisalomu adagumanikana na amuna a Davite. Iye akhali pamwana bulu, tenepo pikhafamba mwanabulu ule pansi pa muti wakupata wamkungudza msolo wa Abisalomu udakoloweka pamuti. Tenepo iye adadedzuka pabulu pache mbakhala lenga-lenga mwenemo bulu ule akwenda pyache." 
2Samuel18:10 Pidaona mbodzi wa amuna ale adapanga Yoabu mbati, “Ndaona Abisalomu akoloweka m'muti wamkungudza.”" 
2Samuel18:11 Yoabu adalonga mbati, “Ngakhala wamuonadi, apo watani kumpheratu ponthopo? Ine mbidakupasa kobiri zasiliva khumi na bande.”" 
2Samuel18:12 Mbwenye munthu ule adatawira mbati, “Podi kwene kuti mbamudandipasa kobiri zasiliva chikwi chibodzi ine nee mbidakwanisa kukhuya mwana mfumu tayu. Tonsenefe tidapiva kuti mfumu adakutongani imwe, Abishai na Itai mbati, ‘Na thangwi ya ine lekani kupha mphaleyu Abisalomu.’" 
2Samuel18:13 Mbwenye ine mbidachita chinthu chakugoswa kuna iye (nkhabe chinthu chakubisika kuna mfumu tayu), penepo imwe nee mbamudanditchinjiriza tayu.”" 
2Samuel18:14 Yoabu adalonga mbati, “Ine nkhabe taya ndzidzi wanga na iwe tayu.” Tenepo iye adakwata madipa matatu mbalasa nawo pagangafuwa pa Abisalomu mwenemo iye mbali moyo pontho ali lenga-lenga m'muti." 
2Samuel18:15 Penepo khumi mwa anyankhondo a Yoabu adazungulira Abisalomu mbammaliza kumpha. 
2Samuel18:16 Yoabu adalonga kuti ngoma ilizwe kuti nkhondo imale, tenepo anyankhondo ache adaleka kuthamangisa Aisraele." 
2Samuel18:17 Iwo adakwata manungo a Abisalomu mbaaponyera m'dzenje yakuzwika mumsitu mbauikha pansi pa mulu wa miyala. Aisraele onsene adathawa munthu onsene kumusa kwache. 
2Samuel18:18 Pandzidzi wa moyo wache Abisalomu adamanga chiguwa ninga chikumbuso chache m'phedi ya mfumu, thangwi iye akhali nkhabe mwana wamamuna ninga mbewu yache. Natenepo adachithula chiguwacho na dzinache, tenepo na lero chiguwachi chikudziwika na dzina yakuti chiguwa cha Abisalomu." 
2Samuel18:19 Ahimaazi mwana Zadoki adalonga kuna Yoabu mbati, “Ndithamange kuna mfumu ndikampange mphangwa zadidizi kuti MBUYA ampulumusa kuna anyamalwache.”" 
2Samuel18:20 Yoabu adalonga mbati, “Tayu, si iwe anafuna kwenda na mphangwa zadidizi lero tayu. Iwe unakwanisa kuchita tenepo nsiku inango ene, mbwenye lero tayu thangwi mwana mfumu afa.”" 
2Samuel18:21 Tenepo iye adalonga kuna bitchu wache wa ku Kushi mbati, “Ndoko ukapange mfumu pyaona iwe.” Bitchu ule adalamba mbathamanga kwenda." 
2Samuel18:22 Ahimaazi adakakamira kulonga mbati, “Ine nkhabe pinthu na pinafuna dzachitikapyo tayu; ndilekeni ndiendembo ndikasiye mphangwazi.” Yoabu adavunza mbati, “Mwananga thangwi yache ninji ukufuna kwendambo? Iwe nkhabe dzatambira mfupo pakuchita tenepo tayu.”" 
2Samuel18:23 Ahimaazi adalonga pontho mbati, “Podi chichitike pyacho ninji, ine ndikufuna kwenda basi.” Yoabu adalonga mbati, “Ndoko.” Tenepo Ahimaazi adathamanga mbagwanda na m'phedi ya Yorodani mbampiringana bitchu ule." 
2Samuel18:24 Davite akhakhala pakati pa msuwo wa m'bwalo na msuwo wa kunja wa mpanda. Nyakulondali adenda mpakana pansonga yafufu mbaimira pansoyi ya nyumba ya pa msuwo wa mpanda. Tenepo iye adayang'ana kunja mbaona munthu akudza mbathamanga yekha ene. 
2Samuel18:25 Nyakulondali ule adachemera mfumu mbalonga pidaona iyepyo. Mfumu adalonga mbati, “Ngakhala iye ali yekha penepo akudza na mphangwa zadidi.” Munthu akhathamanga ule adafika chifupiletu." 
2Samuel18:26 Tenepo nyakulondali ule adaona munthu unango akudza mbathamanga pontho yekha ene, tenepo iye adachemera nyakuyang'anira pamsuwo wa mpanda mbampanga mbati, “Yang'ana, munthu unango akudza pontho mbathamanga yekha ene.” Mfumu adalonga mbati, “Weneyu pontho akudza na mphangwa zadidi.”" 
2Samuel18:27 Nyakulondali ule adalonga mbati, “Ndikuona munthu wakutoma kuthamangayi akuoneka ninga Ahimaazi.” Mfumu adalonga mbati, “Iye ndi munthu wadidi pontho akudza na mphangwa zadidi.”" 
2Samuel18:28 Ahimaazi adakhuwa kummwenyika mfumu, adapiponya pansi pamaso pache mbalonga mbati, “Kuzani MBUYA Mulungu wanu ule akuchitisani kukunda amuna adakupandukirani mfumu ale.”" 
2Samuel18:29 Mfumu adavunza mbati, “Ayi mphale Abisalomu hadakuwazwe tayu?” Ahimaazi adatawira mbati, “Mbuya, pikhandituma thubu wanu Yoabu, ine ndidaona chimpiningu chikulu, kwache ine sidadziwa kuti chikhachitika ninji tayu.”" 
2Samuel18:30 Mfumu adalonga mbati, “Imira apo.” Tenepo adenda mbaimira penepo." 
2Samuel18:31 Penepo bitchu wa ku Kushiule adafika mbalonga kuna mfumu mbati, “Mfumu ndadza na mphangwa zadidi. Lero MBUYA akuchitisani kukunda anyamalwanu onsene adakupandukirani ale!”" 
2Samuel18:32 Mfumu adavunza mbati, “Ayi, mphale Abisalomu hadakuwazwe tayu?” Bitchu ule adatawira mbati, “Ndikhapifuna pyakwanga kuti pyachitika kuna iyepyo mbapidachitikambo kuna anyamalwanu onsene na kuna onsene akupandukirani ale.”" 
2Samuel18:33 Mfumu adaphatwa na nsisi pyakwanga. Iye adakwira subi ya padzulu ya nyumba ya pamsuwo wa mpanda mbalira. Iye akhalira mukhakwira iye mbati, “Mwananga! Mwananga Abisalomu! Abisalomu mwananga! Mbandidafa ndine m'mbuto mwako mbapidakhala pyadidi mwananga! Abisalomu mwananga!”" 
2Samuel19:1 Yoabu adapangwa kuti Davite akulira na kusintili Abisalomu. 
2Samuel19:2 Natenepo kukomerwa kwa anyankhondo onsene thangwi ya kukunda kudasanduka kutsukwala nsiku yeneyo, thangwi iwo adapiva kuti mfumu akusintili mwanache." 
2Samuel19:3 Iwo adabwerera kumzinda mwakumatama ninga anyankhondo akuchita manyadzo thangwi ya kuthawa kunkhondo. 
2Samuel19:4 Mfumu adapsampsika nkhope yache mbalira mbati, “Mwananga! Mwananga Abisalomu! Abisalomu mwananga!”" 
2Samuel19:5 Tenepo Yoabu adenda kunyumba ya mfumu mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Lero mwalulupisa amunanu, amuna adapulumusa moyo wanu na moyo wa ananu achimuna na achikazi ene na moyo wa akazanu na akazanu achibitchu." 
2Samuel19:6 Imwe mukupokanyisa ale ambakufunani mbamuikhira kunduli anyakukuzondani. Imwe mwapichita kukhala pyakuveka mwadidi mwene kuti mathubu anu na amuna anu kuna imwe si pinthu tayu. Ine ndinakwanisa kuona kuti imwe mbamudakomerwa pyakwanga pene Abisalomu mbadakhala na moyo lero ife tonsenefe mbatidafa. 
2Samuel19:7 Chinchino ndokoni muwangise mtima amunanu. Ndinadumbira na dzina ya MBUYA kuti imwe mungakhonda kwenda nee munasala na munthu na mbodzi ene kufikirana mangwana na machibese tayu. Yeneyi inakhala nyatwa yakugoswa pyakwanga kupiringana nyatwa zonsene zaona imwe moyo wanu onsene.” 
2Samuel19:8 Tenepo mfumu adalamuka mbaenda kakhala chifupi na msuwo wa mpanda wa mzinda. Amunache adapiva kuti iye akhali penepo, tenepo iwo adagumanyikana mwakumzungulira. Ndzidzi wenewu Aisraele onsene adathawa, munthu onsene kumsuwo kwache." 
2Samuel19:9 M'dziko monsenemo iwo adatoma kukangana okha ene mbalonga kuna unango na mwanzache mbati, “Mfumu Davite adatipulumusa kuna anyamalwathu. Iye adatiombola m'manja mwa Afilisti, kwache iye adathawa m'dziko muno kuthawa Abisalomu." 
2Samuel19:10 Ife tidadzoza Abisalomu kuti akhale mfumu wathu, kwache iye aphiwa pankhondo. Apo thangwi yache ninji nkhabe munthu unango wakubwezera Davite kuno?”" 
2Samuel19:11 Pinthu pidalongwa mu Israele monsenepi pidafika m'makutu mwa Mfumu Davite, tenepo iye adatuma Zadoki na Abiatara anyansembe kavunza akadamu a Yuda mbati, “Mwatani munakhala akumalisa kufuna kudzesa mfumu kunyumba kwache?" 
2Samuel19:12 Imwe ndimwe abale anga; manungo anga pontho chiropa changa. Apo mwatani munakhala akumalisa kundibwezera kuna imwe?” 
2Samuel19:13 Davite adaapanga pontho kulonga kuna Amasa kuti, “Iwe ndiwe mbaleanga. Tenepo kutomera lero kwenda m'tsogolo ndakuikha kukhala mkadamu wa anyankhondo m'mbuto mwa Yoabu. Mulungu mbandiphe pyache ngakhala sinachita tenepo tayu!”" 
2Samuel19:14 Natenepo Davite adatenula mtima amuna onsene a mu Yuda, tenepo iwo adatuma mphangwa kumpanga kuti abwerere mumzinda pabodzi pene na mathubu ache onsene." 
2Samuel19:15 Pikhabwerera mfumu mbafika kumkulo wa Yorodani, adagumanikana na amuna a ku Yuda pa njira, ale adadza dzamtambira pa Giligala mbawambuka naye kukhundu inango ya mkulo." 
2Samuel19:16 Na ndzidzi onthowo Shimei mwana Gera wa ku Bahurimu adachimbiza kwenda kumkulo wa Yorodani kagumanikana na Mfumu Davite. 
2Samuel19:17 Iye akhali pabodzi na amuna chikwi chibodzi cha dzinza ya Benjemani. Tenepo Ziba nyabasa wa kubanja ya Sauli adadzambo na anache achimuna khumi na ashanu na anyabasa makumawiri, tenepo iwo adafika pa Yorodani mfumu mbadzati fikapo." 
2Samuel19:18 Iwo adawambuka mkulo kakwata pyonsene pya mfumu kupiwambusa na kuchita pyonsene pene pikhafuna mfumu. Pikhasasanyika mfumu kuti awambuke mkulo, Shimei adapigwisa yekha ene pamaso pa mfumu," 
2Samuel19:19 mbalonga mbati, “Mbuyanga mfumu, lekererani kudawa kudachita ine pansiku idabuluka imwe mu Yerusalemu. Lekani kupikoyera mangawa pontho lekani kupikumbukave." 
2Samuel19:20 Ndikupidziwa kuti ine ndadawa, tenepo ndi thangwi yache lero ine ndine nyakutoma kubulukira kumadzinza a Yosefe kudza dzagumanikana namwe, mbuyanga mfumu.”" 
2Samuel19:21 Abishai, ule mache akhali Zeruia, adalonga mbati, “Shimei athema kuphiwa thangwi iye adatemberera munthu adasankhulwa na MBUYA kukhala mfumu ule.”" 
2Samuel19:22 Mbwenye Davite adalonga kuna Abishai na kuna mbaleache Yoabu mbati, “Ayi imwe ana Zeruia pananji pakati pa imwe na ine? Ayi lero mwandisandukira? Chinchino mfumu mu Israele ndine pano, tenepo nkhabe munthu anafuna kuphiwa lero tayu.”" 
2Samuel19:23 Tenepo mfumu adalonga kuna Shimei mbati, “Ndinadumbira kuti iwe hunaphiwa tayu.”" 
2Samuel19:24 Mefiboseti chidzukulu cha Sauli adadzambo dzagumanikana na mfumu. Iye hakhadatsuka manyalo ache penu kuchinga ndevu zache penu kufula nguwo zache tayu kubulukira ndzidzi udabuluka mfumu mu Yerusalemu mpakana adabwerera mwadidi mwene. 
2Samuel19:25 Pidafika Mefiboseti kubulukira ku Yerusalemu dzagumanikana na mfumu, mfumuyo adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Mefiboseti, iwe hudende nane pabodzi tayu, thangwi yache ninji?”" 
2Samuel19:26 Iye adatawira mbati, “Ine ndine nyakulamala ninga munapidziwira imwe mfumu. Ine ndidapanga nyabasanga kuti aikhe chakukhalira pabulu panga towera ndikwanise kwenda namwe pabodzi pene. Kwache Ziba nyabasanga adandisandukira." 
2Samuel19:27 Iye adalonga pyakunama pya ine kuna imwe mfumu, kwache imwe mwakhala ninga mngelo wa Mulungu; tenepo chitani pyonsene pinakukomeranipyo." 
2Samuel19:28 Onsene a m'banja ya babanga adathema kuphiwa na imwe mfumu, kwache imwe mudandipasa utumbe wakudya pathebulu panu. Ine nkhabe pontho utongi wakupempha kuti imwe mundikomere pontho mtima tayu.”" 
2Samuel19:29 Mfumu adatawira mbati, “Iwe nkhabe funika kulonga na chinthu chene tayu. Ine ndanyerezera kuti iwe na Ziba mugawane mfuma ya Mfumu Sauli.”" 
2Samuel19:30 Mefiboseti adalonga mbati, “Mulekeni pyache Ziba akwate pyonsenepyo. Mfumu, ine ndakwana napyo kuti mwadza kumusa kwanu na mtendere.”" 
2Samuel19:31 Barizilai wa ku Gileadi akhadadzambo kubulukira ku Rogelimu dzaperekeza mfumu kumuwambusa mkulo wa Yorodani. 
2Samuel19:32 Barizilai adakalamba pyakwanga pontho akhali na pyaka makumasere pyakubalwa. Iye akhali nyakufuma pyakwanga pontho akhadapasa mfumu pyakudya ndzidzi ukhakhala iye ku Mahanaimu. 
2Samuel19:33 Mfumu adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Tende pabodzi pene na ine ku Yerusalemu. Ine ndinati ndikuyang'anire mwadidi.”" 
2Samuel19:34 Mbwenye Barizilai adatawira mbati, “Ine sinakhalave na moyo ndzidzi ukulu ene tayu. Apo thangwi yache ninji kuti ndiende namwe pabodzi mfumu ku Yerusalemu?" 
2Samuel19:35 Ine ndina kale pyaka makumasere pyakubalwa, pontho ine nkhabe kwanisa kusiyanisa pakati pa chadidi na chakuipa tayu. Ine nkhabe kwanisa kudzipirwa na chinthu chinadya ine na kumwa ine tayu. Ine nkhabe kwanisa kuva fala ya anyakuimba tayu. Apo thangwi yache ninji ndithimize kukunensani imwe, mbuyanga mfumu." 
2Samuel19:36 Nyabasanu anawambuka mkulo wa Yorodani pabodzi pene na mfumu nsinzo wakuchepa basi. Apo thangwi yache ninji mfumu anafuna pyakundifupa na njira yeneyi? 
2Samuel19:37 Mulekeni pyache nyabasanu abwerere kuti akafere kuluwani ya kwawo chifupi na masiye a kwawo a babache na mache. Mbwenye mwananga Kimuhamu ali pano. Mtawiriseni kuwambuka pabodzi pene na mbuyanga mfumu, iye anakakutumikirani pontho mchitireni pile mphyadidi pamaso panu.”" 
2Samuel19:38 Mfumu adatawira mbati, “Ine ndinati ndiende naye mbandimchitira pyonsene pinafuna iwe. Ine ndinakuchitira pyonsene pene pinapempha iwepyo.”" 
2Samuel19:39 Tenepo Davite na amunache onsene adawambuka mkulo wa Yorodani. Iye adampsompsona Barizilai mbamtsanzayisa, natenepo Barizilai adabwerera kwawo." 
2Samuel19:40 Pidawambuka mfumu mkulo wa Yorodani mwakuperekezwa na amuna onsene a ku Yuda na amuna anango pang'ono a ku Israele, iye adenda ku Giligala, tenepo Kimuhamu adenda naye pabodzi." 
2Samuel19:41 Kubuluka penepo Aisraele onsene adenda kuna mfumu mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Mfumu, thangwi yache njanji abale athu a ku Yuda adanyerezera kuti iwo akhali akuthema kwenda namwe kakuperekerani chibiso-biso imwe, banjanu na amunanu ene kuwambuka mkulo wa Yorodani?”" 
2Samuel19:42 Amuna a ku Yuda adatawira mbati, “Ife tidachita tenepo thangwi mfumu ndi mbaleathu chadi-chadi. Apo thangwi yache ninji penepi pyakuzhangalisani? Ife nee tidadye pya mfumu tayu, pontho iye hadatipagali na chinthu chene tayu pyakudya pidampasa ife pile.”" 
2Samuel19:43 Aisraele adatawira mbati, “Ife ndife akufunika kakhumi kuna mfumu kupiringana imwe podi kwene kuti akhale pyache mbaleanu chadi-chadi tani. Apo thangwi yache njanji imwe mukutilulupisa tenepa? Lekani duwalira kuti ife ndiye tikhali akutoma kulonga pyakubwezera mfumu kuno.” Kwache amuna a ku Yuda akhadapichita mwavinga pikulu pene kupiringana Aisraele." 
2Samuel20:1 Pidachitika kuti ku Giligala kukhali munthu unango wakusowa basa dzinache Sheba mwana Bikiri. Iye akhali wa dzinza ya Benjemani. Iye adaliza ngoma mbachemera mbati, “Ife nkhabe khundu na Davite tayu, pontho ife nkhabe dzatambira chinthu pa mfuma ya mwana Yese tayu. Munthu onsene wa ku Israele aende kumusa kwache!”" 
2Samuel20:2 Tenepo Aisraele adathawa Davite mbaenda kuna Sheba, mbwenye amuna a ku Yuda adakhala na mfumu wawo njira yonsene kubulukira ku Yorodani mpakana ku Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel20:3 Pidafika Davite kunyumbache yachifumu mu Yerusalemu, iye adakwata akazi achibitchu khumi adasiya iye m'nduli kuyang'anira nyumbache ale mbaaikha mwakuyang'anirwa m'nyumba mule. Iye adaapasa pyonsene pikhasowa iwo, kwache iye hadagone nawo tayu. Iwo adakoyiwa pakubisala moyo wawo onsene mbakhala ninga amamfelwa." 
2Samuel20:4 Mfumu adalonga kuna Amasa mbati, “Gumanyisa pabodzi pene amuna a ku Yuda mbudze nawo kuno mkuchono pano.”" 
2Samuel20:5 Amasa adenda kaagumanyisa kwache hadadze nawo pansiku idalonga mfumu ile tayu. 
2Samuel20:6 Tenepo mfumu adalonga kuna Abishai mbati, “Sheba anati atinense pikulu pene kupiringana Abisalomu. Tenepo kwata amunangawa mbatimsake-sake, gopesera anatipokosera mizinda yakutchingwa na mpanda mbatithawa.”" 
2Samuel20:7 Tenepo amuna a Yoabu na anyakulondali a Chikereti na a Chipeleti pontho na anyankhondo amphamvu onsene adenda pansi pa utongi wa Abishai. Iwo adabuluka ku Yerusalemu kasaka-saka Sheba mwana Bikiri. 
2Samuel20:8 Pidafika iwo paphanzwi mu Gibeoni, Amasa adagumanikana nawo. Yoabu adavala nguwo zankhondo pontho adamangirira talasada kubande yache. Pidenda iye patsogolo talasada idagwa pansi." 
2Samuel20:9 Yoabu adavunza Amasa mbati, “Uli tani shamwalianga?” Tenepo Yoabu adaphata ndevu za Amasa na mkono wache wamadyo kuti ampsompsone." 
2Samuel20:10 Amasa nee akhayang'ana talasada idaphatira Yoabu m'manja mwache ile tayu, tenepo Yoabu adamulasa m'mimba, matumbo mbaphutchukira. Iye adaferatu kabodzi kene, tenepo Yoabu hadamulaseve kachiwiri kache tayu. Yoabu na mbaleache Abishai adenda kasaka-saka Sheba." 
2Samuel20:11 Mbodzi wa amuna a Yoabu adaimira m'khundu mwa mtembo wa Amasa mbakhuwa mbati, “Munthu onsene ali kukhundu ya Yoabu na Davite atewere Yoabu!”" 
2Samuel20:12 Mtembo wa Amasa ukhali gunundu pakati pa njira uku wasamba chiropa. Pidaona munthu ule kuti munthu onsene akhaimira penepo, iye adagwinyira mtembowo m'munda mbaufinikiza na chakufindika." 
2Samuel20:13 Pidabuluswa mtembo ule m'njira mule munthu onsene adatewera Yoabu kusaka-saka Sheba. 
2Samuel20:14 Sheba adagwanda na m'nthemba yonsene ya madzinza a Israele mbafika kumzinda wa Abele-Beti-Maaka, tenepo mbumba yonsene ya Bikiri adagumanyikana mbamtewera kupita mumzinda." 
2Samuel20:15 Amuna a Yoabu adava kuti Sheba akhali mwenemo, tenepo iwo adenda kazungulira mzindawo. Iwo adamuluka mataka kutsamira mpanda mbatoma kugomola mpanda na pyakugomolera." 
2Samuel20:16 Pakhali mkazi unango wanzeru mumzindamo, tenepo iye adakhuwa na pafufu ya mpanda mbati, “Veserani, veserani! Pangani Yoabu kuti adze kuno, ndinafuna ndilonge naye.”" 
2Samuel20:17 Yoabu adenda kuna iye, tenepo adavunza mbati, “Ayi ndimwe Yoabu?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ndine pano.” Iye adalonga mbati, “Veserani pinafuna longa nyabasanu.” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ndikuvesera.”" 
2Samuel20:18 Mkazi ule adalonga mbati, “Kale ene iwo akhalonga kuti, ‘Ndoko ukave pinafuna iwo katawirwa kumzinda wa Abele’; penepyo ndiye pyontho pidachita iwo." 
2Samuel20:19 Mzindathu ngukulu, ubodzi mwa mizinda ya mtendere pontho wakukhulupirika mu Israele. Imwe mukuyesa kuvunga mzinda. Thangwi yache ninji munafuna kusakaza mzinda wa MBUYA?”" 
2Samuel20:20 Yoabu adatawira mbati, “Nkhabe tayu! Ine sinasakaza penu kuvunga mzinda wa MBUYA tayu." 
2Samuel20:21 Pinasasanya ife kupichita si penepyo tayu. Munthu unango dzinache Sheba mwana Bikiri wa kudziko ya mapiri ya Eferemu adapandukira Mfumu Davite. Mperekeni kuna ife munthu weneyu, penepo ife tinabuluka mumzinda muno.” Mkazi ule adalonga kuna Yoabu mbati, “Ife tinati tiponyere msolo wache na pafufu ya mpanda kuna imwe.”" 
2Samuel20:22 Kubuluka penepo iye adenda kuna anthu a mumzinda na pidanyerezera iye kuchita pile. Tenepo iwo adagwanda msolo wa Sheba mbauponyera na pafufu ya mpanda kuna Yoabu. Iye adaliza ngoma ninga chidziwiso kuna amunache kuti abuluke mumzinda mule, tenepo iwo adabwerera kwawo. Yoabu adabwerera ku Yerusalemu kuna mfumu." 
2Samuel20:23 Yoabu akhali mkadamu wa anyankhondo onsene a Israele; Benaia mwana Yehoiada akhali mkadamu wa anyakulondali a Chikereti na a Chipeleti; 
2Samuel20:24 Adoniramu akhali mkadamu wa anyabasa akukhakhamizwa; Yehosafati mwana Ahiludi akhali nyakulemba pya m'dziko; 
2Samuel20:25 Sheva akhali nyakulemba m'thando ya miseru; Zadoki na Abiatara akhali anyansembe; 
2Samuel20:26 Ira wa kuluwani ya Yairi akhalimbo mbodzi wa anyansembe a Davite. 
2Samuel21:1 Pandzidzi ukhatonga Davite pakhali njala ikulu, ile idamala pyaka pitatu pyamumphu. Davite adavunza nzeru kuna MBUYA pya njala yeneyi, tenepo MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Sauli na banjache ene ngakudawa, thangwi ya kuchita pyaupandu; iye adapha anthu a ku Gibeoni.”" 
2Samuel21:2 Anthu a ku Gibeoni hakhali Aisraele tayu; iwo akhali gulu ing'ono ya Aamori, anthu ale adadumbira Aisraele kuti anaatchinjiriza, kwache Sauli adayesa kuavunga thangwi ya chipapu chikhali na iye pa Israele na Yuda." 
2Samuel21:3 Natenepo Davite adachemeresa Agibeoni mbaavunza mbati, “Ndikuchitireninji? Ine ndinafuna ndisasanye pyakudawa pidachitwa kuna imwe, towera mutsanzayise anthu a MBUYA.”" 
2Samuel21:4 Anthu a ku Gibeoni adatawira mbati, “Kukhonda vana kwathu na banja ya Sauli nkhabe kwanisa kumala tayu na siliva penu golidi, penu tinafuna kupha munthu na mbodzi ene wa ku Israele tayu.” Davite adavunza mbati, “Apo ninji chinanyerezera imwe kuti ndikuchitireni?”" 
2Samuel21:5 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Sauli akhafuna pyakutipha mbakhonda funa pyakusiya munthu na mbodzi ene wa ife na moyo konsene kwene mu Israele muno." 
2Samuel21:6 Tenepo perekani kuna ife pinomwe mwa pidzukulu pyache pyachimuna, towera tiaphe pakuamanika pamaso pa MBUYA pa Gibea, luwani ya Sauli, mfumu adasankhulwa na MBUYA ule.” Mfumu adatawira mbati, “Ndinati ndiapereke kuna imwe.”" 
2Samuel21:7 Davite adasiya na moyo Mefiboseti mwana Yonatani, mdzukuluache Sauli thangwi ya kudumbira kwakupambulika kudachitwa pamaso pa MBUYA pakati pa iye na Yonatani mwana Sauli." 
2Samuel21:8 Kwache iye adakwata Arimoni na Mefiboseti, anache achimuna awiri adabala iye na Rizipa mwana wamkazi wa Aia; iye adakwata pontho ana ashanu achimuna a Meriba mwana wamkazi wa Sauli, adambalira Adriele mwana wamamuna wa Barizilai wa ku Mehola." 
2Samuel21:9 Davite adaapereka m'manja mwa anthu a ku Gibeoni, ale adaamanika paphiri pamaso pa MBUYA, tenepo onsene anomwe adamala phiwa. Ndzidzi udaphiwa iwowu ukhali kumala kwa mainja, ndzidzi wakutoma kuvuna barele." 
2Samuel21:10 Mkazi wachibitchu wa Sauli, Rizipa mwana wamkazi wa Aia adathasika sakha kugonerapo paphanzwi. Tenepo iye adakhala penepo kubulukira kutoma kwa kuvuna mpakana kuvumba kwa mvula. Na kumasikati iye akhazwinga mbalame pamitembopo, pontho na mosiku iye akhaitchinjiriza kuna nyama zam'tsanga." 
2Samuel21:11 Pidava Davite pinthu pidachita Rizipa pile," 
2Samuel21:12 iye adenda kakwata magogodo a Sauli na a mwanache Yonatani kuna anthu a ku Yabeshi-Gileadi. Iwo akhadaaba kuthando ya mzinda ya Beti-Shani, kudamanika pamtanda Afilisti manungo awo kule, pansiku idaphiwa Sauli paphiri ya Giliboa." 
2Samuel21:13 Davite adakwata magogodo a Sauli na a mwanache Yonatani, pontho adagumanyisa magogodo a amuna anomwe adaphiwa ale." 
2Samuel21:14 Tenepo iwo adafikhira magogodo a Sauli na a mwanache Yonatani m'masiye a Kishi babache Sauli ku Zela m'nthemba ya Benjemani kuchita pyonsene pidatonga mfumu. Kubuluka penepo MBUYA adava kupemphera kwa dziko. 
2Samuel21:15 Padalamuka pontho nkhondo pakati pa Afilisti na Aisraele, tenepo Davite na amunache adenda kamenya nkhondo na Afilisti mwakuti iye adatopa pyakwanga." 
2Samuel21:16 Tenepo Ishibi-Benobu mbodzi wa pidzukulu pya Arefaimu, ule dipache ikhalemera makilogramu matatu na theka, pontho ule akhali na talasada itswa adanyerezera kuti iye anakwanisa kupha Davite." 
2Samuel21:17 Mbwenye Abishai mwana Zeruia adapulumusa Davite; iye adamenya Mfilisti wakukhuma ule mbampha. Tenepo amuna a Davite adadumbira kuna iye mbati, “Imwe nee munaendave nafe kunkhondo tayu, thangwi imwe ndimwe chidikhiro cha Israele pontho ife nkhabe funa kukusowani tayu.”" 
2Samuel21:18 Pidamala penepi pakhali pontho nkhondo na Afilisti pa Gobu. Wenewu ukhali ndzidzi udapha Sibekai wa ku Husha nyakukhuma unango dzinache Safu, chidzukulu cha Arefaimu." 
2Samuel21:19 Kubuluka penepo pakhali pontho nkhondo na Afilisti pa Gobu. Penepo Elihanani mwana wamamuna wa Yaare-Oregimu wa ku Betelehemu adapha Goliati wa ku Gati, ule akhali na dipache ya ntchindu ninga mtanda wakuphatiswa basa kuluka nguwo." 
2Samuel21:20 Kubuluka penepo pakhali pontho nkhondo inango pa Gati pale pakhali munthu unango wakukhuma wakufuna pyankhondo. Iye akhali na pyala pitanthatu kudzanjache yonsene, pontho pyala pitanthatu kudzinyalo yache yonsene; pabodzi pene akhali na pyala makumawiri na pinayi, pontho iye akhali chidzukulu cha Arefaimu."
