2Samuel21:21 Iye adalulupisa Aisraele, tenepo Yonatani mwana Shama mbaleache Davite adampha." 
2Samuel21:22 Amuna akukhuma anayi ale akhali pidzukulu pya Arefaimu wa ku Gati, tenepo onsene adaphiwa na Davite pontho na amunache." 
2Samuel22:1 Pidapulumusa MBUYA Davite kuna Sauli, pontho na kuna anyamalwache anango; Davite adaimbira MBUYA nyimbo:" 
2Samuel22:2 MBUYA ndi nyakunditchinjiriza, mpandanga wamphamvu, pontho dombo wanga," 
2Samuel22:3 Mulungu wanga ndi nyakunditchinjiriza, pakubisala panga, pontho chakugedera changa matswimo. Iye ambanditchinjiriza mbandikoya pakupata. Iye ndi Nyankhombo wanga; iye ambanditchinjiriza mbandipulumusa kuna anyamalwanga." 
2Samuel22:4 Ine ndimbachemera kuna MBUYA, tenepo iye ambandipulumusa kuna anyamalwanga. MBUYA mbakuzwe." 
2Samuel22:5 Mabimbi a imfa andigabikira; mabimbi a kugoswa adandibiza. 
2Samuel22:6 Nyatwa za dziko ya anyakufa zidandizungulira, pontho masiye adandikumbira mulindi." 
2Samuel22:7 Na nyatwa zanga zene ine ndidachemera MBUYA, ndidachemera Mulungu wanga kuti andiphedze. Kubulukira m'nyumba mwache iye adava falanga, chiliro changa chidafika m'makutu mwache." 
2Samuel22:8 Penepo dziko yapansi idatetemera mbitekenyeka, maziko a thambo adatekenyeka, iwo adatetemera thangwi MBUYA adazhangali." 
2Samuel22:9 Toloo! Utsi udabuluka m'mphuno mwache, moto wakuvunga pontho makala akuyerima adabuluka m'kanwa mwache." 
2Samuel22:10 Iye adathalura kati na kati thambo mbatchitha pansi, na makole akuswipa pansi pa manyalo ache." 
2Samuel22:11 Iye akhambuluka nwii papyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido mbapakira pamaphaphido a mphepo. 
2Samuel22:12 Iye adapimpsampsika na mdima kuzungulira manungo ache, makole akuswipa akudzala na madontho a mvula," 
2Samuel22:13 makala a moto adayerima kubulukira m'njazi pamaso pache. 
2Samuel22:14 Tenepo MBUYA adaguma kuthambo, fala ya Nyakudzulu-dzulu idaveka." 
2Samuel22:15 Iye adaponya matswimo mbabalalisa anyamalwache, na ntchasi iye adaathamangisa." 
2Samuel22:16 Maphedi a bara adauma kakata, pontho maziko a dziko yapansi adasala pamtunda nyimwa pidasumulula MBUYA anyamalwache, pontho pidaabangulira iye thangwi ya kuzhangali kwache." 
2Samuel22:17 Iye adathambidzira mkono wache kubulukira kudzulu mbandiphata; iye adandinula m'madzi akuzwika. 
2Samuel22:18 Iye adandipulumusa kuna nyamalwanga wamphamvu, kuna nyakundizonda, ule akhali na mphamvu pyakwanga kupiringana ine pano." 
2Samuel22:19 Ndzidzi ukhali ine panyatwa, iwo adandiphata, kwache MBUYA adanditchinjiriza." 
2Samuel22:20 Iye adandiwambusa panyatwa; adandipulumusa thangwi adakomerwa nane. 
2Samuel22:21 MBUYA ambandifupa thangwi ine ndimbachita pyakulungama; iye ambanditsanzayisa thangwi ndine munthu okhonda dawa. 
2Samuel22:22 Na thangwi yakuti ine ndavera mwambo wa MBUYA; ine sidampandukire tayu Mulungu wanga. 
2Samuel22:23 Ine ndateweza matongero ache onsene; ine sidakhonde vera matongero ache tayu. 
2Samuel22:24 Iye ambapidziwa kuti ine nkhabe chinango chakundipokanyisa tayu; kuti ine ndathunda pinthu pyakudawika. 
2Samuel22:25 Natenepo iye ambandifupa thangwi ndimbachita pyakulungama; thangwi ambapidziwa kuti ndine munthu okhonda dawa. 
2Samuel22:26 Kuna anyakukhulupirika, imwe mumbaaonesa kukhulupirika kwanu, mumbamuonesa udidi wanu onsene kuna anthu akusowa chakuapokanyisa." 
2Samuel22:27 Imwe ndimwe wangwiro kuna angwirombo; mbwenye ndimwe wakukala mtima kuna mpheswe. 
2Samuel22:28 Imwe mumbapulumusa anyakupichepesa; kwache mumbatchithisa anyakupithemba. 
2Samuel22:29 Imwe, MBUYA ndimwe nyale yanga. Sandusani mdima wandizungulirawu kukhala cheza." 
2Samuel22:30 Na chiphedzo chanu, ine ndinakwanisa kusosa anyamalwanga. Na Mulungu wanga, ine ndinakwanisa kunumpha mipandawo." 
2Samuel22:31 Mulungu weneyu, mabasache ngakuthema monsene mwene, mafalache ngakunyindirika. Iye akhala ninga chakugedera matswimo kuna onsene ambabisala muna iye kuti aatchinjirize ale." 
2Samuel22:32 MBUYA ene basi ndiye Mulungu; Mulungu ene basi ndiye Phanzwi yathu. 
2Samuel22:33 Mulungu weneyu ndi mpandanga wamphamvu; iye ambachitisa njiranga kukhala yakuchena. 
2Samuel22:34 Iye ambachitisa manyalo anga kukhala ninga njondo za nyasa; iye ambanditchinjiriza pamapiri. 
2Samuel22:35 Iye ambandifunzisa mamenyero a nkhondo, towera ndikwanise kuphatisa basa uta wamphamvuletu." 
2Samuel22:36 MBUYA, imwe mumbanditchinjiriza mbamundipulumusa; chiphedzo chanu chandichitisa kukhala wamkulu." 
2Samuel22:37 Imwe mwachitisa kuti ndileke phatwa, chipo ine sidagwe tayu." 
2Samuel22:38 Ine ndimbathamangisa anyamalwanga mbandiakunda; ine nkhabe kualeka tayu mpakana ndamala kuavunga. 
2Samuel22:39 Ine ndaavunga monsene mwene mwakuti nkhabe kwanisa kulamuka tayu; iwo ali thasa pamanyalo panga. 
2Samuel22:40 Imwe mumbandipasa mphamvu pankhondo, pontho mumbandichitisa kukunda anyamalwanga." 
2Samuel22:41 Imwe mumbachitisa anyamalwanga kundithawa; ine ndimbakunda anyakundizonda. 
2Samuel22:42 Iwo ambalirira chiphedzo kwache nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene anaapulumusa tayu; iwo ambachemera kuna MBUYA, kwache hambaatawira tayu." 
2Samuel22:43 Ine ndaapeya, tenepo iwo asanduka fumbi; ine ndimbaapondedza ninga matope m'njira." 
2Samuel22:44 Imwe mudandipulumusa kuna anthu akupandukira; imwe mwakoya chidzo changa ninga mfumu wawo; anthu akhakhonda ine dziwa lero ali pansi pa utongi wanga. 
2Samuel22:45 Alendo akundilambira; sindzidzi iwo nkhundiona, iwo ambandivera." 
2Samuel22:46 Iwo onsene ambataya mtima; iwo ambabuluka na kutetemera m'mipando mwawo yamphamvu. 
2Samuel22:47 MBUYA ana moyo! Kuzani Phanzwi yanga! Lalikani pya ukulu wache wa Mulungu, Phanzwi pontho Nyankhombo wanga." 
2Samuel22:48 Iye ambandichitisa kukunda anyamalwanga; iye ambaikha madzinza pansi pa utongi wanga," 
2Samuel22:49 mbandipulumusa kuna anyakundizonda. MBUYA imwe mumbandichitisa kukunda anyamalwanga mbamunditchinjiriza kuna anthu akuzunguzika. 
2Samuel22:50 Natenepo ine ndimbakukuzani MBUYA pakati pa madzinza; ine ndimbaimba nyimbo zakukukuzani nazo. 
2Samuel22:51 Mulungu ambachitisa mfumu wache kukunda; iye ambamuonesa kumfuna kwache kokhonda mala mfumu adasankhula iye ule, kuna Davite na pidzukulu pyache kwenda na kwenda." 
2Samuel23:1 Awa ndi mafala akumalisa a Davite mwana wamamuna wa Yese, munthu adasankhulwa na Nyakudzulu-dzulu ule, munthu adadzozwa na Mulungu wa Yakobo ule, pontho nyakuimba nyimbo wa Israele ule:" 
2Samuel23:2 Mzimu wa MBUYA adalonga kudzera muna ine; mafalache akhali m'kanwa mwanga. 
2Samuel23:3 Mulungu wa Israele adalonga; Phanzwi ya Israele adalonga kuna ine mbati: “Mfumu wakutonga na chilungamo, ule ambatonga mwakugopa Mulungu," 
2Samuel23:4 iye akhala ninga kubuluka kwa dzuwa na machibese akusowa makole, ninga cheza pakumala kuvumba kwa mvula, chile chimbameresa maudzu.”" 
2Samuel23:5 Mwenemu ndi mule munafuna Mulungu dzatsanzayisa pidzukulu pyanga, thangwi iye achita nane chiverano chokhonda mala, chiverano chile nkhabe dzaswiwa tayu. Penepi ndiye pinafuna ine ene pene basi; kweneko ndiye kunakhala kupulumuka kwanga; Mulungu ndiye anafuna dzachita penepi." 
2Samuel23:6 Mbwenye anthu okhonda tsalakana pya Mulungu akhala ninga minga yakutayiwa; nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene anakwanisa kuiphata na manja tayu. 
2Samuel23:7 Imwe mwathema kuphatisa basa chiphano chanu chasimbi penu dipa kuigwanda; penepo ipyo pinapiswa monsene mwene. 
2Samuel23:8 Awa mbanyankhondo akuveka a Davite: wakutoma akhali Yoshebi-Bashebeti wa ku Takemoni, ule akhali mkadamu wa “Atatu” iye adaphatisa basa dipache kumenyana na amuna madzana masere mbamala kuapha onsene ndzidzi ubodzi pankhondo." 
2Samuel23:9 Wachiwiriache akhali Eleazara mwana Dodo wa mbumba ya Ahohi. Ninga mbodzi wa anthu atatu amphamvu, iye akhali na Davite ndzidzi ukhadafitikiza iwo Afilisti pidamenya iwo nkhondo nawo. Penepo amuna a Israele adathawa," 
2Samuel23:10 kwache iye adaimira dzololo mbamenyana na Afilisti mpakana adatoperatu mwakuti dzanjache idaumirira patalasadache. MBUYA adakunda pikulu pene nsiku yeneyo. Pidamala nkhondoyo, Aisraele adabwerera kudulisa pida anyamalwawo pambuto pakhali Eleazara pale." 
2Samuel23:11 Wachitatuache akhali Shama mwana Age wa ku Harari. Afilisti akhadagumanyikana ku Lehi kule kukhali munda wa nyimo. Anyankhondo Aisraele adathawa Afilisti 
2Samuel23:12 mbwenye Shama adaimira dzololo m'mundamo mbautchinjiriza mbapha Afilisti. MBUYA adakunda pikulu pene nsiku yeneyo. 
2Samuel23:13 Pikhali chifupi ndzidzi wakuvuna atatu mwa akadamu “Makumatatu” adatchithira kunkhwimba ya Adulamu kukhali Davite kule, mwenemo gulu ya Afilisti idamanga msasa m'phedi ya Refaimu." 
2Samuel23:14 Pandzidzi wenewo Davite akhali pambuto yakutchingwa na mpanda paphiri, pontho gulu ya Afilisti ikhadapokosera mzinda wa Betelehemu." 
2Samuel23:15 Davite adatchuwa kumusa, tenepo adalonga mbati, “Ndikhafunadi kwene kuti munthu unango andidzesere madzi a mumchera wa chifupi na msuwo wampanda Betelehemu!”" 
2Samuel23:16 Anyankhondo atatu akuveka ale, adapapanula na mumsasa wa Afilisti, iwo adatunga madzi mumcheramo mbadza nawo kuna Davite. Kwache iye hadaamwe tayu; m'mbuto mwache adaakhuthulira pansi ninga chakupereka kuna MBUYA" 
2Samuel23:17 mbalonga mbati, “MBUYA, ine nee mbidakwanisa kumwa madzi enewa tayu! Thangwi kumwa madziwa kunakhala ninga kumwa chiropa cha amuna ale, adapipereka kutaya moyo wawo katunga madzi enewa!” Natenepo iye adakhonda kumwa madzi ale. Penepi ndiye pinthu pidachita amuna atatu akuveka ale mwakuwanga mtima." 
2Samuel23:18 Abishai mbaleache Yoabu, ale mawo akhali Zeruia akhali mkadamu wa amuna “Anyakuveka Makumatatu.” Iye adaphatisa basa dipache kumenyana na amuna madzana matatu mbaapha. Natenepo iye adasanduka wakuveka pyakwanga pakati pa “Makumatatu” ale." 
2Samuel23:19 Iye akhali wakuveka pyakwanga pene pakati pa “Makumatatu” mbakhala mkadamu wawo, kwache iye hakhali wakuveka pyakwanga kupiringana “Atatu” ale tayu." 
2Samuel23:20 Benaia mwana Yehoiada wa ku Kabizeele akhalimbo nyankhondo wakuveka; iye adachita pinthu pikulu mwakuwanga mtima, kuthimizapo kupha anyankhondo amphamvu awiri a ku Moabu. Pansiku inango yakutonthola kwakuumisa madzi iye adagwera m'dzenje mbaphamo nkhalamu." 
2Samuel23:21 Iye adapha pontho munthu wa ku Iguputo, munthu wamkulu pyakwanga, ule adaphatira dipache. Benaia adammenya na chigomba Muiguputo ule mbampokosera dipache. Tenepo iye adampha na dipache yonthoyo." 
2Samuel23:22 Penepi mphinthu pidachita Benaia mwakuwanga mtima, ule akhali mbodzi mwa “Makumatatu.”" 
2Samuel23:23 Iye akhali wakuveka pyakwanga pene pakati pawo, kwache iye hakhali wakuveka pyakwanga pene tayu kupiringana “Atatu” ale. Tenepo Davite adamuikha kukhala mkadamu wa anyakumuyang'anirache." 
2Samuel23:24 Ali m'tchindemu mbanyankhondo anango “Makumatatu” akuveka: Asahele mbaleache Yoabu, Elihanani mwana Dodo wa ku Betelehemu," 
2Samuel23:25 Shama wa ku Harodi, Elika wa ku Harodi," 
2Samuel23:26 Helezi wa ku Peleti, Ira mwana Ikeshi wa ku Tekoa," 
2Samuel23:27 Abiezere wa ku Anatoti, Mebunai wa ku Husha," 
2Samuel23:28 Zalimoni wa ku Ahohi, Maharai wa ku Netofa," 
2Samuel23:29 Helebu mwana Baana wa ku Netofa, Itai mwana Ribai wa ku Gibea m'nthemba ya Benjemani," 
2Samuel23:30 Benaia wa ku Piratoni, Hidai wa ku maphedi a chifupi na Gaashi," 
2Samuel23:31 Abialiboni wa ku Aribati, Azimaveti wa ku Bahurimu," 
2Samuel23:32 Eliaba wa ku Shaaliboni, Ana a Yasheni, Yonatani," 
2Samuel23:33 Shama wa ku Harari, Ahiamu mwana Sharari wa ku Harari," 
2Samuel23:34 Elifeleti mwana Ahasibai wa ku Maaka, Eliamu mwana Ahitofelo wa ku Gilo," 
2Samuel23:35 Hezero wa ku Karimele, Paarai wa ku Aribi," 
2Samuel23:36 Igali mwana Natani wa ku Zoba, Bani wa ku Gadi," 
2Samuel23:37 Zeleki wa ku Amoni, Naharai wa ku Beeroti nyakuthukula pida pya Yoabu mwana Zeruia," 
2Samuel23:38 Ira wa ku Itiri, Garebu wa ku Itiri," 
2Samuel23:39 na Uria Mhiti. Onsene pabodzi pene akhalipo makumatatu na anomwe. 
2Samuel24:1 MBUYA adazhangali pontho na Aisraele mbachitisa kuti Davite adzese nyatwa pana iwo. MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Ndoko ukachitise kalembera wa Israele na anthu a ku Yuda.”" 
2Samuel24:2 Tenepo Davite adapanga Yoabu mkadamu wa anyankhondo ache mbati, “Ndoko kuna madzinza onsene kubulukira kunthemba ya Dani mpakana ku Beeresheba na kulembera anthu onsene towera ine ndidziwe kuinjipa kwa anthu anga.”" 
2Samuel24:3 Mbwenye Yoabu adatawira mbati, “Mfumu, MBUYA Mulungu wanu mbachitise Aisraele kuinjipa kadzana kupiringana muna iwo chinchino pano, pontho kuti imwe maso anu aone penepi pikuchitika. Apo thangwi yache ninji mbuyanga anafuna kuchita chinthu ninga chenechi?”" 
2Samuel24:4 Mbwenye mfumu adachitisa Yoabu na mathubu ache kuvera pidalonga mfumu pile; iwo adabuluka pamaso pa mfumu mbaenda kachita kalembera wa Aisraele. 
2Samuel24:5 Iwo adawambuka mkulo wa Yorodani mbamanga msasa kumwera kwa Aroeri mzinda wa pakati pa phedi m'nthemba ya Gadi. Kubuluka penepo adenda kumpoto ku Yazere. 
2Samuel24:6 Kubuluka penepo adenda ku Gileadi mpakana ku Kadeshi m'nthemba ya Ahiti. Kubuluka penepo adenda ku Dani mpakana kumadokero dzuwa a Sidoni. 
2Samuel24:7 Kubuluka penepo iwo adenda kumwera kumzinda wa Turo wakutchingwa na mpanda mpakana kumizinda yonsene ya ku Hivi na Kanani mbamalisira ku Beeresheba m'thando yatchetcha ya Negebu mu Yuda. 
2Samuel24:8 Tenepo pidamala iwo kwenda nthemba yonsene miyezi mifemba na nsiku makumawiri iwo adabwerera ku Yerusalemu. 
2Samuel24:9 Yoabu adalonga konta yonsene ya amuna akukwanisa kuphata basa ya unyankhondo: Mu Israele akhalipo pikwi madzana masere, ku Yuda akhalipo pikwi madzana mashanu." 
2Samuel24:10 Mbwenye pidamala Davite kuchitisa kalembera chikumbu mtima chache chidatoma kumnensa mbalonga kuna MBUYA mbati, “Ine ndadawa pikulu pene thangwi ya kuchita penepi! Ndaphata miyendo ndilekerereni. Ine ndachita pinthu pyakupupwa.”" 
2Samuel24:11 MBUYA adalonga kuna Gadi mprofeti wa Davite mbati, “Ndoko kampange Davite kuti ine ndikumpasa pinthu pitatu kuti asankhule chibodzi. Ine ndinati ndimpase chinthu chinasankhula iyecho.” Mangwana mwache na machibese pidalamuka Davite," 
2Samuel24:12  
2Samuel24:13 Gadi adenda kuna Davite mbampanga mafala akhadalonga MBUYA ale. Iye adalonga mbati, “Ntchipi chinafuna imwe? Pyaka pitatu pya njala ikulu m'dziko mwanu, penu miyezi mitatu ya kuthawa anyamalwanu, penu nsiku zitatu za muliri m'dziko mwanu muno. Tenepo nyerezerani, mungamala penepo mundipange chinafuna ine kapanga MBUYA.”" 
2Samuel24:14 Davite adatawira mbati, “Ine ndikusanyika pikulu pene mumtima mwanga! Kwache ine nkhabe funa kutchunyuswa na anthu tayu. MBUYA mwenechiroache ndiye ananditchunyusa podi iye ngwansisi.”" 
2Samuel24:15 Tenepo MBUYA adagwisa muliri mu Israele, ule udakhala kubulukira machibese mpakana pansiku ikhadasankhula iye ile. Kubulukira nkhomo mpakana nkhomo inango ya dziko, anthu pikwi makumanomwe adafa." 
2Samuel24:16 Pikhali chifupi mngelo wa MBUYA kuvunga Yerusalemu, MBUYA adasanduza manyerezero ache akufuna kutchunyusa anthu mbalonga kuna mngelo akhaapha ule mbati, “Leka pyakwana!” Mngelo akhali pambuwa ya Arauna Myebusi." 
2Samuel24:17 Davite adaona mngelo akhapha anthu ule tenepo adalonga kuna MBUYA mbati, “Ine ndine nyakudawa. Ndine pano ndidachita pyakudawa. Anthu enembo pyawowa adawanji? Imwe mwathema kuvunga ine pano na banjanga.”" 
2Samuel24:18 Nsiku yeneyo Gadi adenda kuna Davite mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ndoko pambuwa ya Arauna ukamangire MBUYA guwa yansembe.”" 
2Samuel24:19 Davite adavera pidampanga MBUYA pile mbachita ninga montho mudampangira Gadi mule. 
2Samuel24:20 Arauna adayang'ana mbaona mfumu na mathubu ache akudza kuna iye. Iye adalamba pamaso pa mfumu 
2Samuel24:21 mbalonga mbati, “Mfumu mwatani mwadza kuno?” Davite adatawira mbati, “Ndadza dzagula mbuwako towera ndimangire MBUYA guwa yansembe, towera muliri umale.”" 
2Samuel24:22 Arauna adalonga mbati, “Ikwateni mbamupereke pyonsene pinafuna imwe. Kwatani ng'ombe zimuna zakukweya chingolo mbamuzipereke nsembe paguwapo; magoli-goli na miti yakububudira mupiyese nkhuni.”" 
2Samuel24:23 Arauna adapereka pyonsene kuna mfumu mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “MBUYA Mulungu wanu mbatambire pyakupereka pyanu.”" 
2Samuel24:24 Mbwenye mfumu adatawira mbati, “Tayu, ndinati ndikupagali. Ine nkhabe pereka nsembe kuna MBUYA Mulungu wanga okhonda kuzipagalira chinthu tayu.” Tenepo iye adagula mbuwa ile na ng'ombe zene na kobiri zasiliva makumashanu." 
2Samuel24:25 Natenepo iye adamangira MBUYA guwa yansembe mbaperekapo nsembe zakupyerera na nsembe zachiphatizano. MBUYA adava kupemphera kwache, tenepo muliri mu Israele udamala." 
1Kings1:1 Pidakalamba Mfumu Davite mbakhala na pyaka pizinji pyakubalwa, hadakwanise pontho kuva kukhumbirwa tayu, podi kwene kuti anyabasache amfinikize pyawo magombeza tani." 
1Kings1:2 Natenepo mathubu ache adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Tendeni tisake-sake mwali kuti ayang'anire mfumu na kumtsalakana mwadidi. Mwana mwaliyo anakwanisa kugona m'khundu mwache, towera Mbuya mfumu wathu ave kukhumbirwa.”" 
1Kings1:3 Kubuluka penepo anyabasa adasaka-saka mu Israele monsene mtsikana wakubalika pyakwanga, tenepo adamgumana Abishagi wa Chishunemu mbadza naye kuna mfumu." 
1Kings1:4 Mtsikanayu akhali wakubalika pyakwanga; iye adayang'anira mfumu mwadidi mwene mbamtumikira, mbwenye mfumu hadapite naye m'bonde tayu mtsikana ule." 
1Kings1:5 Natenepo Adonia, ule mache akhali Hagiti adapithemba yekha ene mbalonga mbati, “Ndinakhala mfumu ndine!” Natenepo iye adakwata pingolo na akavalo mbapanga amuna makumashanu kwenda patsogolo pache." 
1Kings1:6 Chipo babache nee hakhadadzati kumsumulula tayu penu kumvunza pya makhaliro ache. Adonia akhali wakubalika pyakwanga, pontho akhali wachiwiri kubalwa; iye akhali nyamsolo wache Abisalomu." 
1Kings1:7 Adonia adaverana na Yoabu, ule mache akhali Zeruia, pontho na Abiatara nyansembe, tenepo iwo adatawira kuti anamphedza." 
1Kings1:8 Mbwenye Zadoki nyansembe, Benaia mwana Yehoiada, Natani mprofeti, Shimei na Rei pontho na anyakulondali Davite hakhali gulu ibodzi na Adonia tayu." 
1Kings1:9 Kubuluka penepo Adonia adapereka nsembe ya mabira, ng'ombe na anamphulu akunenepa pa Phanzwi ya Zoheleti chifupi na Enirogele. Iye adachemera abale ache onsene, ale mbana achimuna a mfumu, na mathubu onsene a ku Yuda, ale akhali akadamu," 
1Kings1:10 mbwenye iye hadachemere Natani mprofeti, penu Benaia penu anyakulondali a mfumu penu mbaleache Solomoni tayu." 
1Kings1:11 Kubuluka penepo Natani adavunza Batesheba mache Solomoni mbati, “Kadi mwapiva tayu kuti Adonia mwana Hagiti apipitisa yekha ene ufumu mwakukhonda dziwa Mfumu Davite?" 
1Kings1:12 Dikhirani, ndikupangeni mule munakwanisa imwe kupulumusa moyo wa mwananu Solomoni." 
1Kings1:13 Ndokoni kunyumba ya Mfumu Davite mbamukampange kuti, ‘Mbuyanga mfumu, si imwe mudadumbira kuna ine, nyabasanu, kuti mwananga Solomoni anakhala mfumu imwe mungafa mbakhala pampando wanu wachifumu? Apo pyatani pontho kuti Adonia akhale mfumu?’" 
1Kings1:14 Tenepo ine ndinapita m'nyumbamo uku ukulonga naye mbanditsikimizira pyalonga iwepyo.” 
1Kings1:15 Natenepo Batesheba adenda kaonana na mfumu kusubi kwache. Iye akhali wakukalamba pyakwanga, tenepo Abishagi wa Chishunemu akhakhala mwenemo kuyang'anira mfumu." 
1Kings1:16 Batesheba adalamba pamaso pa mfumu. Tenepo mfumu adamvunza mbati, “Ayi nkhwadidi kwene?”" 
1Kings1:17 Mkazi ule adatawira mbati, “Mbuyanga mfumu, si imwe mudadumbira kuna ine, nyabasanu, tayu na dzina ya MBUYA Mulungu wanu kuti, ‘Solomoni mwanako anakhala mfumu ine ndingafa mbakhala pampando wanga wachifumu?’" 
1Kings1:18 Mbwenye lero Adonia apita ufumu, kwache imwe mbuyanga mfumu nee mukupidziwa penepi tayu." 
1Kings1:19 Iye apereka nsembe ng'ombe zizinji, anamphulu akunenepa azinji na mabira ene. Iye pontho achemera ana onsene achimuna a mfumu, Abiatara nyansembe na Yoabu mkadamu wa anyankhondo, mbwenye iye hadachemere Solomoni mwananu tayu." 
1Kings1:20 Mbuyanga mfumu, maso a Aisraele onsene ali pana imwe kufuna kudziwa kuti mbani anafuna dzakhala pampando wanu wachifumu m'mbuto mwanu." 
1Kings1:21 Mbwenye bibibi, sindzidzi imwe nkhugonera mkono, ine na mwananga Solomoni tinasanyiswa ninga mphandu.”" 
1Kings1:22 Mwenemo mbali m'kati kulonga na mfumu, Natani mprofeti adafika." 
1Kings1:23 Tenepo iwo adapanga mfumu mbati, “Natani mprofeti ali pano.” Natenepo Natani adafedza chifupi mbalamba pamaso pa mfumu." 
1Kings1:24 Natani adalonga mbati, “Mbuyanga mfumu, ayi mwalonga ndimwe kuti Adonia akhale mfumu imwe mungafa mbakhala pampando wanu wachifumu?" 
1Kings1:25 Lero ene ndzidzi unalonga inewu aenda kapereka nsembe ng'ombe zizinji, anamphulu akunenepa azinji na mabira ene. Iye achemera ana achimuna onsene a mfumu, Yoabu mkadamu wa anyankhondo, na Abiatara nyansembe. Ndzidzi unalonga ine panowu, iwo akudya na kumwa pabodzi na iye pontho akulonga kuti: ‘Dondowe Mfumu Adonia!’" 
1Kings1:26 Mbwenye ine nyabasanu, Zadoki nyansembe, Benaia mwana Yehoiada na nyabasanu Solomoni hatidachemerwe tayu." 
1Kings1:27 Kadi penepi ndiye pyachita imwe, mbuyanga mfumu, kukhonda na kudziwisa kwene mathubu anu kuti anafuna dzakhala pampando wanu wachifumu m'mbuto mwanu nguyu?”" 
1Kings1:28 Kubuluka penepo Mfumu Davite adalonga mbati, “Kachemere Batesheba apite muno.” Natenepo mkaziyo adadza mbaimira pamaso pa mfumu." 
1Kings1:29 Tenepo mfumu adadumbira mbati, “Ine ndinadumbira na dzina ya MBUYA wa moyo, ule adandipulumusa panyatwa zanga zonsene," 
1Kings1:30 kuti lero ndinati ndichite pidadumbira ine kuna iwe na dzina ya MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele, kuti mwanako Solomoni anakhala mfumu ine ndingafa pontho anakhala pampando wanga wachifumu m'mbuto mwanga.”" 
1Kings1:31 Batesheba adagodama mbalamba pamaso pa mfumu mbalonga mbati, “Mbuyanga Mfumu Davite mbakhale na moyo kwenda na kwenda.”" 
1Kings1:32 Mfumu Davite adalonga mbati, “Chemera Zadoki nyansembe, Natani mprofeti na Benaia mwana Yehoiada kuti apite muno.” Pidadza iwo pamaso pa mfumu," 
1Kings1:33 iye adalonga mbati, “Kwatani anyabasangawa pabodzi pene na imwe mbamukwizike mwananga Solomoni pabulu wanga ule, mbamumperekeze ku Gihoni." 
1Kings1:34 Kweneko Zadoki nyansembe na Natani mprofeti amdzoze kukhala mfumu wa Israele. Tenepo lizani ngoma pontho khuwani kuti, ‘Dondowe Mfumu Solomoni.’" 
1Kings1:35 Mungamala penepo dzani naye kuno kuti akhale pampando wanga wachifumu pontho atonge m'mbuto mwanga. Ine ndamsankhula kuti atonge Israele na Yuda ene.” 
1Kings1:36 Benaia mwana Yehoiada adatawira mfumu mbati, “Pinachitika. MBUYA Mulungu wa mbuyanga mfumu, mbapichitise kukwana-kwana penepi." 
1Kings1:37 Ninga montho mudachitira MBUYA kukhala na mbuyanga mfumu, mbakhalembo na Solomoni kuchitisa ufumu wache kukhala ukulu kupiringana ufumu wa mbuyanga Mfumu Davite.”" 
1Kings1:38 Natenepo Zadoki nyansembe, Natani mprofeti, Benaia mwana Yehoiada, anyakulondali a Chikereti na Chipeleti adakwizika Solomoni pabulu wa Mfumu Davite mbamperekeza ku Gihoni." 
1Kings1:39 Zadoki nyansembe adakwata ntchupa ya mafuta kubulukira m' Chikhumbi cha Mulungu mbadzoza nawo Solomoni. Kubuluka penepo adaliza ngoma, tenepo anthu onsene adakhuwa mbati, “Dondowe Mfumu Solomoni!”" 
1Kings1:40 Tenepo anthu onsene adamperekeza kwawo pamulikiti uku akuimba pitoliro na kusekera kukulu. Natenepo mataka adadidimuka na kukhuwa kwa anthu ale. 
1Kings1:41 Adonia pabodzi pene na anyakuchemerwa kuphwando onsene adava penepi pikhamalisa iwo phwando yawo ile. Pidava Yoabu mkadamu wa anyankhondo kulira kwa ngoma adavunza mbati, “Kadi kusokosa konsene kunaveka mumzindamu mkhwanji?”" 
1Kings1:42 Pikhalonga iye tenepo, Yonatani mwana Abiatara nyansembe adafika. Adonia adalonga mbati, “Pita muno, munthu wakulemedzwa ninga iwe athema kudza na mphangwa zadidi.”" 
1Kings1:43 Yonatani adatawira mbati, “Nkhabe na pang'ono pene tayu. Mbuyathu Mfumu Davite apitisa Solomoni ufumu." 
1Kings1:44 Mfumu amtuma pabodzi pene na Zadoki nyansembe, Natani mprofeti, Benaia mwana Yehoiada, anyakulondali a Chikereti na Chipeleti, pontho iwo amkwizika pabulu wa mfumu," 
1Kings1:45 pontho Zadoki nyansembe na Natani mprofeti adamdzoza pa Gihoni kukhala mfumu. Kubulukira kweneko adamperekeza kwawo uku akusekera, natenepo mzinda onsene watekenyeka. Kweneku nkhusokosa kunava imweku." 
1Kings1:46 Kuthimiza penepa Solomoni akhala pampando wachifumu. 
1Kings1:47 Pontho mathubu akulemedzwa adadza kudzachita makolokoto kuna mbuyathu Mfumu Davite, kulonga mbati, ‘Mulungu wanu mbachitise dzina ya Solomoni kuveka pikulu pene kupiringana yanu, pontho ufumu wache mbukhale ukulu pyakwanga kupiringana wanu!’ Tenepo Mfumu Davite adalamba uku ali patalimba pache" 
1Kings1:48 mbalonga mbati, ‘Mbalemedzwe MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele, ule anditawirisa lero kuona na maso anga nyakukhala pampando wanga wachifumu kupita m'mbuto mwanga.’ ”" 
1Kings1:49 Na thangwi ya penepi anyakuchemerwa kuphwando onsene ya Adonia adachita mantha mbabalalika pyawo. 
1Kings1:50 Mbwenye Adonia na thangwi ya kuchita mantha na Solomoni, adenda ku Chikhumbi cha Mulungu mbakaphata nyanga za guwa yansembe." 
1Kings1:51 Natenepo Solomoni adapangwa mbati, “Adonia akuchita mantha na mfumu, natenepo iye ali kakaka kunyanga za guwa yansembe. Iye alonga kuti, ‘Mbadumbire Mfumu Solomoni kuti lero hanandipha tayu na talasada ine nyabasache.’ ”" 
1Kings1:52 Solomoni adatawira mbati, “Ngakhala iye ndi munthu wakundilemedza podi na tsisi ene ya mumsolo mwache nkhabe dzagwa pansi tayu, mbwenye ngakhala anagumanwa kuti ngwakudawika anati afe.”" 
1Kings1:53 Natenepo Mfumu Solomoni adatuma amuna kweneko mbadza naye kumbulusa paguwa yansembepo. Adonia adadza mbalamba pamaso pa mfumu, tenepo mfumu adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Unakwanisa kwenda kumusa kwako.”" 
1Kings2:1 Pikhali Davite chifupi kufa, adachemera mwanache Solomoni mbampanga pyonsene pidathema iye kuchita mbati," 
1Kings2:2 “Ine ndili chifupi kufa, natenepo wanga mtima pionese wekha ene kuti ndiwedi mamuna." 
1Kings2:3 Chita pyonsene pinafuna MBUYA Mulungu wako: teweza njira za MBUYA, pontho vera upangizi wache, matongero ache na pifunziso pyache pyonsene ninga montho mwalemberwa ipyo m'mwambo wa Mose, towera pyonsene pinaphata iwe pikufambire mwadidi konsene kunaenda iwe." 
1Kings2:4 Ngakhala unavera MBUYA, iye anachita pidadumbira iye kuna ine kuti: ‘Ngakhala pidzukulu pyako pinachita mphole-mphole na makhaliro awo, pontho ngakhala iwo anakhulupirika pamaso panga na mtimawo onsene pontho moyo wawo onsene, iwe nkhabe dzasowa munthu wakukhala pampando wachifumu wa Israele tayu.’" 
1Kings2:5 “Kuthimiza penepa iwe ene ukupidziwa pidandichita Yoabu mwana Zeruia, pontho pidachita iye kuna Abineri mwana Neri na Amasa mwana Yetere, akadamu awiri a nkhondo a Israele. Iye adaapha, kuchuchisa chiropa chawo pandzidzi wa mtendere khala ninga mphankhondo, tenepo na chiropa chenechi adodesera bande ya m'chuno mwache na nkhwaira kumanyalo kwache." 
1Kings2:6 Chita kuna iye malingana na nzeru zako, mbwenye iwe nee wathema kumuleka kuti atchithire kudziko ya anyakufa mumtendere tayu." 
1Kings2:7 “Kwache akomere mtima ana achimuna a Barizilai wa ku Gileadi pontho atawirise kukhala abodzi akudya na iwe pathebulu pako. Iwo adandiphedza pandzidzi ukhathawa ine mbaleako Abisalomu. 
1Kings2:8 “Pontho kumbuka Shimei mwana Gera wa ku Bahurimu wa dzinza ya Benjemani. Iye adanditemberera pyakwanga pansiku ikhaenda ine ku Mahanaimu. Pidabwera iye kudzagumanikana nane pa mkulo wa Yorodani, ndidadumbira kuna iye na dzina ya MBUYA kuti, ‘Ine nkhabe dzakupha na talasada tayu.’" 
1Kings2:9 Mbwenye chinchino leka kumuyesa okhonda dawa. Iwe ndiwe munthu wanzeru, unapidziwa wekha ene pyakuchita naye weneyu. Iwe wathema kumuendesa kudziko ya anyakufa nyaimvi weneyu.”" 
1Kings2:10 Pidamala penepi Davite adagonera mkono mbaikhwa m'masiye mumzinda wa Davite. 
1Kings2:11 Iye adakhala mfumu wa Israele pyaka makumanayi: kutonga mu Hebroni pyaka pinomwe, pontho mu Yerusalemu pyaka makumatatu na pitatu." 
1Kings2:12 Natenepo Solomoni adakhala pampando wachifumu wa Davite babache, pontho ufumu wache udakhazikika pyakwanga." 
1Kings2:13 Kubuluka penepo Adonia ule mache akhali Hagiti adenda kuna Batesheba mache Solomoni. Batesheba adamvunza mbati, “Ayi nkhwadidi kwene?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ande, nkhwadidi.”" 
1Kings2:14 Iye adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Ine ndina chinthu chinango chakuti ndilonge namwe.” Mkazi ule adatawira mbati, “Unakwanisa kulonga.”" 
1Kings2:15 Iye adatoma kulonga mbati, “Ninga munapidziwira imwe kale kuti ufumuwu ukhali wanga. Anthu onsene Aisraele akhayang'ana pana ine pano ninga mfumu wawo. Mbwenye lero pinthu pyasanduzika, ufumu waenda kuna mbaleanga; ufumuwo waenda kuna iye thangwi ampasa ndi MBUYA." 
1Kings2:16 Natenepo ndinafuna kukupemphani chinthu chibodzi basi. Ndaphata miyendo, lekani kundikhondera.” Mkazi ule adatawira mbati, “Ninji chinafuna iwe kulonga?”" 
1Kings2:17 Natenepo iye adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Ndaphata miyendo ndipempherenimbo kuna Mfumu Solomoni kuti andipase Abishagi wa Chishunemu kuti akhale mkazanga. Ndikupidziwa kuti iye hanakukhonderani tayu.”" 
1Kings2:18 Batesheba adatawira mbati, “Ande, ndatawira, ndinati ndikalonge na mfumu m'mbuto mwako.”" 
1Kings2:19 Pidenda Batesheba kuna Mfumu Solomoni kalonga pya Adonia, mfumu adalamuka kagumanikana naye, adamulambira mbakhala na matako pa mpando wache wachifumu. Iye adachemeresa mpando unango kuti mache mfumu akhalirepo, tenepo macheyo adakhala kumadyo kwa mfumu ule." 
1Kings2:20 Mkaziyo adalonga mbati, “Ndina chinthu ching'ono ng'ono kuti ndikupempheni, lekani kundikhondera.” Mfumu adatawira mbati, “Ninji chinafuna imwe, mama; ine sinakukhonderani tayu.”" 
1Kings2:21 Natenepo iye adalonga mbati, “Mtawirise Abishagi wa Chishunemu kuti asembwe na mbaleako Adonia.”" 
1Kings2:22 Mfumu Solomoni adamtawira mache ule mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji mama mukupempha Abishagi wa Chishunemu kuti asembwe na Adonia? Ayi imwe nkhabe kupidziwa tayu kuti kupempha kweneku nkhumpemphera ufumu. Padzulu pa penepi iye ndi mbaleanga wamkulu, pontho Abiatara nyansembe pabodzi pene na Yoabu mwana Zeruia ali kukhundu kwache?”" 
1Kings2:23 Tenepo Mfumu Solomoni adadumbira na dzina ya MBUYA mbati, “Mulungu mbanditchunyuse pyakwanga ngakhala Adonia hanaphiwa tayu thangwi ya chinthu chapempha iyechi." 
1Kings2:24 Natenepo ndinadumbira pamaso pa MBUYA, ule adandikhazikisa mwadidi pampando wachifumu wa babanga Davite, mbandipasa ufumu ninga montho mudadumbirira iye, kuti lero pano Adonia anati aphiwe!”" 
1Kings2:25 Natenepo Mfumu Solomoni adenda kapanga Benaia mwana Yehoiada kuti aende kapha Adonia, tenepo iye adendadi mbampha." 
1Kings2:26 Tenepo Mfumu Solomoni adalonga kuna Abiatara nyansembe mbati, “Bwerera kumusa kwako mu Anatoti. Iwe wathema kuphiwa, mbwenye sinakupha chinchino tayu, thangwi iwe udathukula Bokosi ya Chiverano cha MBUYA Mulungu pamaso pa babanga Davite, pontho udakwata khundu panyatwa zonsene za babanga.”" 
1Kings2:27 Natenepo Solomoni adabulusa Abiatara pa basa ya unyansembe wa MBUYA kuchitisa pinthu pikhadalonga MBUYA pa Shilo pya banja ya Eli kukwana-kwana. 
1Kings2:28 Pidava Yoabu, ule akhali kukhundu ya Adonia, nee kwa Abisalomu tayu, pya pyonsenepi iye adathawira ku Chikhumbi cha Mulungu mbakaphata nyanga za guwa yansembe." 
1Kings2:29 Mfumu Solomoni adapangwa kuti Yoabu athawira ku Chikhumbi cha MBUYA pontho kuti ali kuguwa yansembe. Tenepo Solomoni adapanga Benaia mwana Yehoiada mbati, “Ndoko kamkhamwadze.”" 
1Kings2:30 Natenepo Benaia adapita m'Chikhumbi cha MBUYA mbalonga kuna Yoabu mbati, “Mfumu alonga kuti ubuluke muno.” Iye adatawira mbati, “Nkhabe, ine ndinati ndifere muno.” Benaia adalonga kuna mfumu mbati, “Mwenemu ndiye mwanditawirira Yoabu.”" 
1Kings2:31 Kubuluka penepo mfumu adapanga Benaia mbati, “Chita ninga mwalongera iye. Mkhamwadze pontho umuikhe m'masiye, towera pidachita Yoabu pakupha anthu okhonda dawa pileke gwera pamsolo panga na pa banja ya babanga." 
1Kings2:32 MBUYA anati ambwezere thangwi ya upandu udachita iye. Iye adapha amuna awiri na talasada mwakukhonda dziwa babanga Davite. Amuna onsene awiriwa, Abineri mwana Neri mkadamu wa anyankhondo a Israele na Amasa mwana Yetere mkadamu wa anyankhondo a Yuda, akhali anthu adidi pontho akulungama kupiringana iye." 
1Kings2:33 Kutchunyuswa thangwi ya kuphiwa kwa anthu enewa mbakugwere Yoabu na pidzukulu pyache kwenda na kwenda. Mbwenye kuna Davite MBUYA anatsanzayisa pidzukulu pyache, banjache, na ufumu wache mbapakhala mtendere kwenda na kwenda.”" 
1Kings2:34 Natenepo Benaia mwana Yehoiada adenda ku Chikhumbi cha Mulungu chile mbakhamwadza Yoabu, iyembo mbaferatu ponthopo, tenepo adaikhwa m'masiye a pamsuwo pache m'thando yatchetcha." 
1Kings2:35 Mfumu adaikha Benaia mwana Yehoiada kukhala mkadamu wa anyankhondo onsene m'mbuto mwa Yoabu mbaikha pontho Zadoki kukhala nyansembe m'mbuto mwa Abiatara. 
1Kings2:36 Kubuluka penepo mfumu adachemeresa Shimei mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Pimangire nyumba mu Yerusalemu mbukhale mwenemo, kwache leka buluka mumzindamo kwenda kwinango." 
1Kings2:37 Nsiku inabuluka iwe mbuwambuka phedi ya Kidroni, upidziwiretu kuti unafa, pontho chiropa chako chinakhala pamsolo pako.”" 
1Kings2:38 Shemei adatawira mbati, “Pyalonga imwepi mfumu mphyadidi. Ine nyabasanu ndinachita ninga mwalongera imwe mbuyanga mfumu.” Tenepo Shimei adakhala mu Yerusalemu ndzidzi ukulu ene." 
1Kings2:39 Mbwenye pidagwanda pyaka pitatu mabitchu awiri a Shimei adathawa kwenda kuna Akishi mwana Maaka, mfumu wa ku Gati. Tenepo pidapangwa Shimei kuti mabitchu ache akhali ku Gati," 
1Kings2:40 iye adapakira bulu wache mbaenda kuna Mfumu Akishi ku Gati kasaka-saka mabitchu ache. Natenepo Shimei adaagumana kweneko mbadza nawo kumusa kwache. 
1Kings2:41 Pidapangwa Solomoni kuti Shimei akhadenda ku Gati kubulukira mu Yerusalemu pontho kuti abwerako," 
1Kings2:42 mfumu adachemeresa Shimei mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ayi ine sidakudumbirise tayu pamaso pa MBUYA mbandikucheuza kuti, ‘Nsiku inabuluka iwe muno mbuenda kwinango, upidziweletu kuti unafa?’ Nsiku yeneyo iwe udalonga kuti, ‘Pyalonga imwepi mphyadidi. Ndinati ndipivere.’" 
1Kings2:43 Apo thangwi yache ninji udakhonda chita pidadumbira iwe kuna MBUYA mbukhonda kuvera matongero adakupasa ine?” 
1Kings2:44 Mfumu adalonga pontho kuna Shimei mbati, “Iwe ukupidziwa mumtima mwako pyonsene pyakudawika pidachitira iwe babanga Davite. Natenepo MBUYA anati akubwezere thangwi ya pyakudawika pyonsene pyachita iwe." 
1Kings2:45 Mbwenye Mfumu Solomoni anatsanzayiswa pontho ufumu wa Davite unakhala wakutchinjirizwa mwadidi pamaso pa MBUYA kwenda na kwenda.” 
1Kings2:46 Kubuluka penepo mfumu adapanga Benaia mwana Yehoiada ule adenda mbakapha Shimei. Kubuluka penepo ufumu udakhazikika pyakwanga m'manja mwa Solomoni. 
1Kings3:1 Solomoni adaphatizana na mfumu wa ku Iguputo kukhala gulu ibodzi mbasemba mwanache wamkazi. Solomoni adadza naye mkaziyo mumzinda wa Davite mpakana iye adamalisa kumanga nyumbache yachifumu, Nyumba ya Mulungu, pontho na mpanda wakuzungulira Yerusalemu." 
1Kings3:2 Kwache anthu akhathimiza basi kupereka nsembe pambuto zakupembedzerapo zakusiyana-siyana, podi kwene kuti pandzidzi wenewo Nyumba ya Mulungu yakupembedzeramo MBUYA ikhadadzati mangwa tayu." 
1Kings3:3 Solomoni adaonesa kumfuna kwache MBUYA pakuteweza matongero adampanga babache Davite ale, kupambula kuti iye akhapereka nsembe na kufukiza pyakununkhira pambuto zakupembedzerapo zakusiyana-siyana." 
1Kings3:4 Nsiku inango Mfumu Solomoni adenda ku Gibeoni kapereka nsembe, thangwi kweneko ndiye kukhali mbuto yakupambulikaletu yakupembedzerapo, natenepo Mfumu Solomoni adapereka nsembe zakupyerera chikwi paguwa yansembe." 
1Kings3:5 Pa Gibeonipo MBUYA adaonekera Solomoni na mosiku kundoto, tenepo Mulungu adalonga mbati, “Pempha chinthu chonsene chinafuna iwe kuti ndikupase.”" 
1Kings3:6 Solomoni adatawira mbati, “Ndzidzi onsene imwe mwaonesa kumfuna kwanu kukulu nyabasanu, babanga Davite, thangwi iye akhali wadidi, wakukhulupirika pontho wakuona mtima kuna imwe. Tenepo imwe mwathimiza basi kumuonesa kumfuna kwanu kukulu pontho kokhonda mala pakumpasa mwana, ule lero akutonga ninga mfumu m'mbuto mwache." 
1Kings3:7 MBUYA Mulungu wanga, imwe mwandichitisa ine nyabasanu kukhala mfumu kupita m'mbuto mwa babanga Davite. Mbwenye ine ndine mwana ene pyanga, pontho nkhabe kupidziwa mule munafuna ine phata basanga tayu." 
1Kings3:8 Ine nyabasanu ndili pano pakati pa anthu anu asankhula imwe, dzinza ikulu, anthu akuinjipa pyakwanga okhonda lengeseka." 
1Kings3:9 Natenepo mpaseni nyabasanu nzeru kuti nditonge mwadidi anthu anuwa pontho kuti ndikwanise kusiyanisa pakati pa chadidi na chakuipa. Thangwi mbani anakwanisa kutonga dzinzanu ikuluyi?” 
1Kings3:10 Mbuya adakomerwa pyakwanga kuti Solomoni akhadapempha chinthu chenechi. 
1Kings3:11 Natenepo Mulungu adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Na thangwi yakuti iwe wapempha chinthu chenechi, nee kupipemphera moyo wakulapha penu mfuma penu kupempha kuti anyamalwako afe tayu, mbwenye wapempha nzeru pabasa yakutonga anthu anga mwachilungamo," 
1Kings3:12 ine ndinati ndichite pyapempha iwepyo. Ndinakupasa nzeru pontho udziwisi, towera paleke khala munthu unango wakukhala ninga iwepo, penu dzakhalave unango ninga iwepo." 
1Kings3:13 Padzulu pa penepi ndinakupasa na pinthu pene pyakhonda iwe pempha; mfuma na chilemedzo chene, towera ndzidzi onsene wakukhala kwako na moyo uleke dzakhala sasawa na unango pakati pa mafumu." 
1Kings3:14 Pontho ngakhala iwe unachita pinafuna ine mbuvera pinakupanga ine na matongero anga ene ninga montho mudakupangira babako Davite, ine ndinati ndikupase moyo wakulapha.”" 
1Kings3:15 Kubuluka penepo Solomoni adalamuka mbadzindikira kuti Mulungu akhadalonga naye kundoto. Tenepo adabwerera ku Yerusalemu. Kweneko iye adaimira patsogolo pa Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA mbapereka nsembe zakupyerera na nsembe zachiphatizano kuna MBUYA. Kubuluka penepo adachita phwando kuchitira mathubu ache onsene. 
1Kings3:16 Nsiku inango maputa mawiri adadza pamaso pa Mfumu Solomoni. 
1Kings3:17 Mbodzi wa iwo adalonga mbati, “Mbuyanga, mkaziyu na ine timbakhala nyumba ibodzi ene. Ine ndidabala mwana wamamuna mwenemo ndili naye pabodzi." 
1Kings3:18 Pansiku yachitatu pidabalwa mwananga, mkazi mwanzangayu adabalambo wache mwana. M'nyumbamo tikhali tekha ene, mukhali nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene tayu, mbwenye tikhalimo uwiriathu ene basi." 
1Kings3:19 “Na mosiku mwache mwanzangayu mwanache adafa thangwi adamgonera. 
1Kings3:20 Natenepo pachiti-chiti iye adalamuka mbakwata mwananga m'khundu mwanga mwenemo ine nyabasanu ndili m'chitulo. Iye adakwata mwanangayo mbamuikha kumabele kwache mbakwata mwanache wakufayo mbamuikha kumabele kwanga. 
1Kings3:21 Mangwana mwache na machibese ndidalamuka kuti ndimuyamwise mwananga mbandigumana kuti mwanayo akhali wakufa. Mbwenye pidachena kunja ndidamuyang'anisisa mwanayo mbandigumana kuti hakhali wanga tayu.” 
1Kings3:22 Tenepo mkazi unango ule adalonga mbati, “Nkhabe! Mwana wamoyoyi ngwanga; wakufayo ngwako.” Mbwenye mkazi wakutoma ule adakakamira kulonga mbati, “Nkhabe! Mwana wakufayi ndiye wako; wamoyoyi ngwanga.” Natenepo iwo adapokosana pamaso pa mfumu." 
1Kings3:23 Tenepo mfumu adalonga mbati, “Uyu akulonga kuti mwana wamoyoyi ngwanga; wakufayo ngwako, uku unangombo akulonga kuti, ‘Nkhabe! Wakufayi ngwako; wamoyoyi ngwanga.’ ”" 
1Kings3:24 Tenepo mfumu adalonga mbati, “Ngandipasireni talasada kuno.” Natenepo iwo adadzadi na talasada kuna mfumu." 
1Kings3:25 Mfumu adatonga mbati, “Mgwandeni mwana wamoyo kati na kati; kwatani phindi ibodzi muipereke kuna mbodziyo mbamupereke phindi inangomboyo kuna unangoyo.”" 
1Kings3:26 Mache chadi-chadi mwana wamoyo ule adava naye nyambalo pyakwanga mwanache mbalonga mbati, “Mbuyanga, ndaphata miyendo mpaseni pyache mwanzanga mwana wamoyoyo! Lekani kumpha!” Mbwenye mkazi unango ule adalonga mbati, “Tayu! Mgwandeni basi kati na kati, towera tinyalire pabodzi.”" 
1Kings3:27 Natenepo mfumu adatonga mseruwo mbati, “Lekani kumpha mwanayo. Perekani mwana wamoyo kuna mkazi wakutomayo mache ngweneyo.”" 
1Kings3:28 Pidava Aisraele onsene kutonga mseru kudachita mfumu pamseru wenewu, adamulemedza pikulu pene mfumu ule, thangwi adaona kuti akhali na nzeru zakubulukira kuna Mulungu zakukwanisa kutonga miseru mwachilungamo." 
1Kings4:1 Solomoni ndiye akhali mfumu wa dziko yonsene ya Israele," 
1Kings4:2 tenepo awa ndiye akhali mathubu ache: Nyansembe akhali Azaria mwana Zadoki; 
1Kings4:3 anyakulemba akhali Elihorefi na Ahia ana achimuna a Shisha; mkulu wakuyang'ana mabukhu akhali Yehosafati mwana wamamuna wa Ahiludi; 
1Kings4:4 mkadamu wa anyankhondo akhali Benaia mwana wamamuna wa Yehoiada; anyansembe akhali Zadoki na Abiatara; 
1Kings4:5 mkadamu wa atsanthemba akhali Azaria mwana Natani; phungu wa mfumu akhali Zabudu nyansembe mwana Natani; 
1Kings4:6 mkadamu wa anyabasa a ku nyumba ya mfumu akhali Ahishari; mkadamu wakuyang'anira mabitchu akhali Adoniramu mwana wamamuna wa Abida. 
1Kings4:7 Solomoni adasankhula amuna khumi na awiri kukhala atsanthemba mu Israele. Iwo basawo ikhali yakudza na phoso kubulukira kunthemba zawo kudzapasa mfumu pabodzi pene na anthu a kunyumba kwache. Munthu onsene akhapereka kuna mfumu pyakudya pyakukwanira mwezi wamumphu kabodzi pachaka. 
1Kings4:8 Ali m'tchindewa ndi madzina akulu-akulu khumi na awiri na nthemba zikhayang'anira iwo: Beni-Huri akhayang'anira dziko ya mapiri ya Eferemu. 
1Kings4:9 Bendekere akhayang'anira mizinda ya Makazi, Shaalibimu, Beti-Shemeshi, Eloni na Beti-Hanani." 
1Kings4:10 Beni-Hesedi akhayang'anira mizinda ya Aruboti na Soko pabodzi pene na nthemba yonsene za Hefere. 
1Kings4:11 Benabinadabu, ule akhadasemba Tafati mwana wamkazi wa Solomoni akhayang'anira nthemba yonsene ya Dori." 
1Kings4:12 Baana mwana Ahiludi akhayang'anira mizinda ya Taanaki, Megido na nthemba yonsene ya Beti-Shani ya chifupi na luwani ya Zaretani kumwera kwa mzinda wa Yezereele mpakana kumzinda wa Abele-Mehola na mzinda wa Yokomeamu." 
1Kings4:13 Bengeberi akhayang'anira mzinda wa Ramoti mu Gileadi na midzi ya nkhonda Yairi mu Gileadi chidzukulu cha Manase na nthemba ya Arigobu m'Bashani. Onsene pabodzi pene akhalipo maluwani makumatanthatu akutchingwa na mpanda yakukhala na misuwo na mphinga zasimbi. 
1Kings4:14 Ahinadabu mwana wamamuna wa Ido akhayang'anira nthemba ya Mahanaimu. 
1Kings4:15 Ahimaazi ule akhadasemba Basemati mwana unango wa Solomoni akhayang'anira nthemba ya Nafitali. 
1Kings4:16 Baana mwana wamamuna wa Hushai akhayang'anira nthemba ya Asheri pontho luwani ya Bealoti. 
1Kings4:17 Yehosafati mwana wamamuna wa Parua akhayang'anira nthemba ya Isakara. 
1Kings4:18 Shimei mwana wamamuna wa Ela akhayang'anira nthemba ya Benjemani. 
1Kings4:19 Geberi mwana wamamuna wa Uri akhayang'anira nthemba ya Gileadi, ile ikhatongwa na Mfumu Sihoni wa Aamori na Mfumu Ogi wa Bashani. Kupambula anthu khumi na awiriwa pakhali mkulu wa boma mbodzi wakuyang'anira dziko yonsene." 
1Kings4:20 Anthu a ku Yuda na Aisraele akhali azinji pyakwanga ninga tchetcha ya bara; iwo akhadya na kumwa mbakomerwa pyakwanga. 
1Kings4:21 Ufumu wa Solomoni udathimizirika na mitundu yonsene kubulukira kumkulo wa Yufurate kwenda kudziko ya Afilisti mpakana kumadire a Iguputo. Iwo akhakhoma msonkho kuna iye, pontho akhali pansi pa utongi wache ndzidzi onsene wa moyo wache." 
1Kings4:22 Pinthu pikhafuna Solomoni pansiku ndi ufa wadidi wa tirigu wakukwana mabekete madzana mawiri na makumashanu na ufa wa mapiramanga wakukwana mabekete madzana mashanu; 
1Kings4:23 ng'ombe khumi zakudyeswa m'thanga, ng'ombe makumawiri zakudyeswa kutsanga, pontho na mabira dzana ibodzi; kuthimizapo ngoma, mbala, nyasa, na nkhanga zakunenepa." 
1Kings4:24 Solomoni adatonga dziko yonsene yakumadokero dzuwa a mkulo wa Yufurate kubulukira ku Tifisa pa Yufurate nkhwenderatu kumadokero dzuwa a mzinda wa Gaza. Mafumu onsene akumadokero dzuwa kwa Yufurate akhali pansi pa utongi wa Solomoni, pontho iye akhakhala mwa mtendere na madziko akuzungulira dziko yache." 
1Kings4:25 Pikhali iye na moyo anthu onsene a ku Yuda na Israele kutomera ku Dani mpakana ku Beeresheba akhali pa mtendere, mwakuti munthu onsene akhakhala pansi kuchedza pamitawi yache yamfesa na miti yamkuyu." 
1Kings4:26 Solomoni akhali na nyumba zakukoyeramo akavalo apingolo pyankhondo pikwi makumanayi na anyakupakira akavalowo pikwi khumi na piwiri. 
1Kings4:27 Atsanthembache khumi na awiri adasankhula iye kada munthu mwezi ubodzi akhadza na phoso kudzapasa mfumu na anthu onsene akhadya m'nyumba ya chifumu ale. Iwo akhaonesesa kuti mfumu aleke sowa chinthu na chibodzi chene. 
1Kings4:28 Atsanthemba onsene kada munthu akhadza pontho na khundu yache ya barele na maudzu kudyesa akavalo akukhweya pingolo na akavalo anango ale akhali kumbuto kukhafunika ipyo. 
1Kings4:29 Mulungu adapereka nzeru, udziwisi, na kuvesa pinthu kuna Solomoni mwakuinjipa pyakwanga ninga tchetcha ya pagombe." 
1Kings4:30 Solomoni akhali na nzeru pyakwanga kupiringana nzeru za anthu onsene akumabulukiro dzuwa pontho kupiringana nzeru za anthu onsene a mu Iguputo. 
1Kings4:31 Iye akhali na nzeru pyakwanga kupiringana munthu onsene: wanzeru kupiringana Etani wa Chiezara, Hemani, Kalikoli na Darida ana achimuna a Maholi. Natenepo kuveka kwache kudadziwika m'madziko onsene akumzungulira." 
1Kings4:32 Iye adapeka miyambi pikwi pitatu pontho nyimbo zizinji zakukwana chikwi chibodzi na zishanu. 
1Kings4:33 Iye adalonga mwakuveka pya pinthu pyakumera kutomera kumuti wamkungudza wa ku Lebanoni kufikirana kumtawi wakhwasakwasa ule umbamera mbutanthawira mafufu. Iye adalonga pontho pya nyama na mbalame, nyama zakukambadza na nsomba." 
1Kings4:34 Anthu a kumadziko onsene adadza kudzavesera nzeru za Solomoni. Enewa akhachita kutumwa na mafumu onsene a dziko yapansi, ale akhadava pya nzeru zache." 
1Kings5:1 Pidava Hiramu mfumu wa Turo kuti Solomoni apitiswa ufumu m'mbuto mwa babache Davite, iye adatuma aimiriri a dziko kuna Solomoni; thangwi ndzidzi ukulu ene iye akhali shamwaliache Davite." 
1Kings5:2 Tenepo mphangwa zidabwezera Mfumu Solomoni kuna Mfumu Hiramu nsizi: 
1Kings5:3 “Imwe mukupidziwa kuti na thangwi ya nkhondo idamenya babanga Davite kumenyana na anthu akukhundu zonsene, iye hadakwanise kumangira MBUYA Mulungu wache Nyumba tayu, kufikirana MBUYA adaikha anyamalwache pansi pa manyalo ache." 
1Kings5:4 Mbwenye lero MBUYA Mulungu wanga andichitisa kukhala pamtendere kukhundu zonsene mwakuti nkhabe pontho anyamalwa, penu unango wakundisokosa tayu." 
1Kings5:5 Natenepo ine ndanyerezera kumangira Nyumba MBUYA Mulungu wanga ninga montho mudalongera MBUYA kupanga babanga Davite kuti, ‘Mwanako ule anafuna ine dzamuikha pampando wachifumu m'mbuto mwako weneyo ndiye anafuna dzandimangira Nyumba.’" 
1Kings5:6 “Natenepo tonga kuti miti yamkungudza mu Lebanoni igwandwe kuti ndiiphatise basa. Amunanga anati aphate basa pabodzi pene na amunako, pontho ndinati ndikupagali konta yonsene inalonga iweyo thangwi ya amunako anafuna dzaphata basawo. Iwe ukupidziwa kuti ife kuno nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene wa luso kucheka matabwa ninga anthu a ku Sidoni tayu.”" 
1Kings5:7 Pidava Mfumu Hiramu mphangwa zidatumiza Mfumu Solomoni kuna iye, adakomerwa pyakwanga mbalonga mbati, “Mbakuzwe MBUYA lero, thangwi iye apereka kuna Davite mwana wa nzeru pyakwanga kutonga dzinza ikuluyi.”" 
1Kings5:8 Tenepo Hiramu adatumiza mphangwa kuna Solomoni zakuti: “Ndatambira mphangwa zanditumizira iwe, pontho ndinati ndichite pyonsene pinafuna iwe pakukupasa miti yamkungudza na mitanda yapaina." 
1Kings5:9 Amunanga anaithukula kubulukira ku Lebanoni kwenda nayo ku bara, tenepo anaimanga m'mitolo mbandiichitisa kubeluka na madzi mpakana ifike pambuto pasankhula iwepo. Kweneko anaisudzula tenepo amunako anaikwata kubulukira penepo. Tenepo iwembo wathema kuchita pinafuna ine pakupereka phoso kuna anthu anga.”" 
1Kings5:10 Na njira yeneyi Hiramu akhapereka kuna Solomoni miti yamkungudza na mitanda yapaina ikhafuna iye ile. 
1Kings5:11 Solomoni akhaperekambo kuna Hiramu tirigu wakudzala pingolo pikwi makumanayi pontho na pigubu pya mafuta aolivi chadi-chadi pikwi makumawiri chaka na chaka kudyesa amunache kubwezera pikhamchitira iye pile. 
1Kings5:12 MBUYA adapereka nzeru kuna Solomoni ninga montho mukhadadumbira iye. Tenepo pakhali mtendere pakati pa Hiramu na Solomoni, pontho uwiriawo adachita chiverano." 
1Kings5:13 Mfumu Solomoni adatonga amuna kuti aphate basa mwakukhakhamizwa kubulukira m'dziko yonsene ya Israele akukwana pikwi makumatatu. 
1Kings5:14 Tenepo iye adaagawa m'magulu atatu a amuna pikwi khumi mbaatuma ku Lebanoni kaphata basa mwakuchita buswa-buswa mwezi ubodzi. Angamala penepo aende mudzi mbakakhala miyezi miwiri, uku gulu inango ikuphata basa. Adoniramu ndiye akhali nyakuyang'anira basa yeneyi." 
1Kings5:15 Solomoni akhali na anyakucheketeza miyala m'phiri pikwi makumasere na amuna akuthukula mitolo pikwi makumanomwe," 
1Kings5:16 pontho na anyakuyang'anira basa yeneyi kupanga anyakuphata basa ale pyakuchita akhalipo pikwi pitatu na madzana matatu. 
1Kings5:17 Mfumu Solomoni adaapanga kuti aseme miyala mikulu-mikulu yadidi kuti ikhale yakumangira nayo maziko a Nyumba ya Mulungu. 
1Kings5:18 Amisiri a matabwa a Mfumu Solomoni na a Mfumu Hiramu na amuna a ku Gebali adagwanda miti mbacheka matabwa na kusema miyala kuti pikhale pyakumangira Nyumba ya Mulungu. 
1Kings6:1 Chaka chamadzana manayi na makumasere pidabuluka Aisraele m'dziko ya Iguputo, chaka chachinayi cha utongi wa Mfumu Solomoni, mwezi wa Zivi, ule ukhali mwezi wachiwiri, Solomoni adatoma kumanga Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
1Kings6:2 Nyumba idamangira Solomoni MBUYA ulaphiache wa m'bwalo ukhali makhono makumawiri na manomwe, umimbache ukhali makhono mafemba, chengo chache chikhali makhono khumi na matatu na kati ya khono." 
1Kings6:3 Subi ya kumsuwo wa Nyumba, ulaphiache ukhali makhono manayi na kati ya khono, umimbache ukhali makhono mafemba, umimbache ukhali sasawa na umimba wa Nyumba." 
1Kings6:4 Mafufu a Nyumba ya Mulungu akhali na mazhanera, ale akhali akupsipsidika kunja kupiringana m'bwalo." 
1Kings6:5 Kutsamira kunja kwa mafufu a Nyumba ya Mulungu ile, kukhundu ziwiri na kunduli kwache kwene kudamangwa nyumba zitatu mwakuchita kusanjikizana." 
1Kings6:6 Masubi onsene a nyumba yapansiletu umimbache ukhali makhono mawiri na kati ya khono kada subi; masubi onsene a nyumba yapakati umimbache ukhali makhono matatu kada subi; masubi onsene a nyumba ya padzululetu umimbache ukhali makhono matatu na kati ya khono kada subi, thangwi kunja kwa mafufu a Nyumba ya Mulungu adamangwa ninga nsikada zikulu zitatu mwakuti mitandache ya nyumba zitatu zakusanjikizana zile zidatsamira pansikadazo, towera ileke pita m'mafufu a Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
1Kings6:7 Pikhamanga iwo Nyumba yeneyi akhaphatisa basa miyala yadidi yakusemwa kale mwakuti nee kugogoda kwa nyundo, mbadzo, penu talasada kudaveka tayu pikhamangwa Nyumba ya Mulungu ile." 
1Kings6:8 Msuwo wa nyumba yapansiletu ukhali kukhundu yakumwera kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu; m'nyumba yapansiletuyo mukhali nsikada zakukwira nazo m'nyumba yachiwiri na yachitatu. 
1Kings6:9 Natenepo Solomoni adamanga Nyumba ya Mulungu ile mbaimalisa, kuikha mitanda na kuiphimbira na matabwa amkungudza." 
1Kings6:10 Nyumba zitatu zakusanjikizana zile, kada nyumba chengo chache chikhali makhono mawiri na dzanja ibodzi, zidamangwa mwakutsamira mafufu akunja kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu, mbachita kuiphataniza kuna mafufuwo pakuphatisa basa mitanda yamkungudza." 
1Kings6:11 MBUYA adalonga kuna Solomoni mbati," 
1Kings6:12 “Kulonga pya Nyumba yandimangira iweyi, ngakhala unavera pifunziso, mwambo na matongero anga ndinati ndikuchitire pinthu pidadumbira ine kuna babako Davite," 
1Kings6:13 ndinati ndikhale pakati pa anthu anga Aisraele m'Nyumba inamanga iweyi pontho ine nkhabe dzaakhonda pontho tayu.” 
1Kings6:14 Natenepo Solomoni adamalisa kumanga Nyumba ya Mulungu ile. 
1Kings6:15 Mafufu a Nyumba ya Mulungu ale, m'bwalo mwachemo adaikhwa mapembo a matabwa amkungudza kutomera pansi mpakana kunsoyi. Pansipa padaphophwa na matabwa apaina." 
1Kings6:16 Subi ya m'bwaloletu yakuchemerwa Mbuto Yakuchenesesa idagwandwa kunduli m'bwalo mwa Nyumba ya Mulungu ile. Ulaphiache ukhali makhono mafemba pontho ikhali yakusasanywa na mapembo amkungudza kutomera pansi mpakana kunsoyi. 
1Kings6:17 Subi ikulu kunkhope kwa subi ya m'bwaloletu ulaphiache ukhali makhono khumi na masere. 
1Kings6:18 M'bwalo mwache mukhali mapembo a matabwa amkungudza akuthemeserwa na pyakusema-sema pya ndiko pontho maluwa. Mafufu onsene m'bwalomo adaphophwa na mkungudza mwakuti nkhabe mwala na ubodzi ene udaoneka mwenemo tayu. 
1Kings6:19 M'bwalo mwa Nyumba ya Mulungu iye adasasanya Mbuto Yakuchenesesa kuti Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA ikhale mwenemo. 
1Kings6:20 Mbuto Yakuchenesesa ya m'bwalomo ulaphiache ukhali makhono mafemba, umimbache ukhali makhono mafemba, pontho chengo chache chikhali makhono mafemba; iye adaphopha m'bwalo monsene na golidi chadi-chadi, mbakukutiza na golidi guwa yakufukizirapo pyakununkhira yakusasanywa na matabwa amkungudza ya m'Mbuto Yakuchena." 
1Kings6:21 Solomoni adaphopha m'bwalo monsene mwa Nyumba ya Mulungu ile na golidi chadi-chadi pontho iye adagwangwanyisa nkhambala yagolidi pamsuwo wakupitira m'Mbuto Yakuchenesesa, ile ikhali pontho yakuphophwa na golidi." 
1Kings6:22 M'bwalo monsene mwa Nyumba ya Mulungu ile mukhadaphophwa na golidi, pontho guwa yonsene yakufukizirapo pyakununkhira ya m'Mbuto Yakuchenesesa ikhadakukutizwa na golidi." 
1Kings6:23 Pyakulengwa piwiri pyakukhala na maphaphido pidasasanywa kubulukira kumuti waolivi mbapiikhwa m'Mbuto Yakuchenesesa. Chibodzi thungache ikhali makhono manayi na manja mawiri. 
1Kings6:24 Pyonsene piwiri pikhaoneka sasawa, pontho thungawo ikhali ibodzi ene. Ipyo pikhali na maphaphido awiri awiri; phaphido ibodzi ulaphiache ukhali makhono mawiri na dzanja ibodzi mwakuti ulaphi wa maphaphido onsene awiri akufuthulwa ukhali makhono manayi na manja mawiri." 
1Kings6:25  
1Kings6:26  
1Kings6:27 Ipyo pikhadaikhwa pakati na kati m'Mbuto Yakuchenesesa na maphaphido awo akufuthuka mwakuti phaphido ya chibodzi idadima fufu, chinangocho idadimambo kufufu inango, pontho maphaphido awiri anango adagumana pakati." 
1Kings6:28 Pyakulengwa piwiri pyakukhala na maphaphido pidakukutizwa na golidi. 
1Kings6:29 Mafufu onsene a m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, subi ikulu na subi ya m'bwaloletu, mudamala themeserwa na pyakusema-sema pya pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido, pontho na miti yamchindu na maluwa." 
1Kings6:30 Iye adaphopha pontho pansi subi ikulu na subi ya m'bwaloletu ya Nyumba ya Mulungu na golidi. 
1Kings6:31 Msuwo wakukhala na misuwo miwiri yakusasanywa na matabwa aolivi idaikhwa pamsuwo wakupitira ku Mbuto Yakuchenesesa; padzulu pa msuwo pakhaoneka ninga uta. 
1Kings6:32 Misuwo miwiriyo idathemeserwa na pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido, miti wamchindu na maluwa. Misuwo pontho na pyakukhala na maphaphido pontho miti yamchindu idakukutizwa na golidi." 
1Kings6:33 Msuwo wakupitira m'subi ikulu udasasanywa na matabwa aolivi nkhomo zache zonsene zinayi. 
1Kings6:34 Pamsuwo pakhali misuwo miwiri yakuchitwa kufunya kati na kati yakusasanywa na matabwa apaina. 
1Kings6:35 Pontho pyakuthemesera na pyakusema-sema pya pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido, miti yamchindu na maluwa, pyonsenepi pikhali pyakukukutizwa na golidi." 
1Kings6:36 Chintalo cham'bwalo kunkhope kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu ile, ikhadazungulirwa na mpanda wakukhala na matabwa amkungudza pamzera onsene wachitatu wa miyala." 
1Kings6:37 Maziko a Nyumba ya Mulungu adamangwa mwezi wa Zivi, chaka chachinayi Solomoni mbali mfumu." 
1Kings6:38 Mwezi wa Buli, ule ukhali mwezi wachisere, chaka chakhumi na chibodzi Solomoni mbali mfumu, Nyumba ya Mulungu idamala mangwa monsene mwene mwakuti idabuluka ninga montho mukhadapisasanyira iwo. Basayi idamkwatira Solomoni pyaka pinomwe kuti Nyumba ile imaliswe kumangwa yonsene." 
1Kings7:1 Solomoni adamangambo nyumbache yachifumu. Nyumbayo idakwata pyaka khumi na pitatu kuti imale kumangwa. 
1Kings7:2 Iye adamanga Chinyumba chakuchemerwa Msitu wa Lebanoni ulaphiache ukhali makhono makumanayi na manayi, umimbache ukhali makhono makumawiri na awiri, chengo chache chikhali makhono khumi na atatu na kati ya khono. Ikhali na mizere mitatu ya mizati yamkungudza. Pamzera ponsene pakhali na mizati khumi na mishanu na mphalupalu zamkungudza kutsamira mizati yeneyi. Nsoyi yache idamangwa na matabwa amkungudza; chenechi chidafika mpakana kumasubi akukoyeramo pyombo na pinthu pinango, ale akhawangiswa na mizati yeneyi." 
1Kings7:3  
1Kings7:4 Kukhundu zonsene ziwiri za mafufu kukhali mizere mitatu ya mazhanera. 
1Kings7:5 Misuwo na mazhanera ikhali na nkhomo zinayi pontho mizere mitatu ya mazhanera m'mafufu kukhundu ziwiri zonsene ikhayang'anisana. 
1Kings7:6 Iye adamanga Chinyumba cha Nsanamira ulaphiache ukhali makhono makumawiri na mawiri, umimbache makhono khumi na matatu na kati ya khono. Kunkhope kwache kukhali balanda ile ikhali na nsanamira." 
1Kings7:7 Iye adamanga Chinyumba cha Mpando Wachifumu, chakuchemerwa pontho Chinyumba cha Kutongeramo Miseru, mule mukhatongera Solomoni miseru, tenepo pansi pache kufikirana kunsoyi pakhali mapembo amkungudza." 
1Kings7:8 Nyumba zache zene za Solomoni, zile zidamangwa kunduli kwa Chinyumba cha Kutongeramo Miseru, zikhali sasawa na nyumba zinango. Iye adamanga pontho nyumba yakukhala ninga zontho zile kuti ikhale ya mkazache, ule akhali mwana wamkazi wa mfumu wa ku Iguputo." 
1Kings7:9 Nyumba zonsenezi na chintalo chikulu chene zikhali zakumangwa na miyala yadidiletu kutomera maziko mpakana kunsoyi. Miyalayo ikhali yakusemwa yakusiyana-siyana mathungawo mbichitwa kucheketezwa mwadidi uku na uku pakuphatisa basa lima. 
1Kings7:10 Maziko a nyumbazo adamangwa na miyala mikulu-mikulu yadidi yakusemwaletu. Miyala inango kulapha kwache kukhali makhono matatu na kati ya khono, inango makhono manayi." 
1Kings7:11 Padzulu pa miyala yeneyi pakhali pontho miyala inango yakusiyana-siyana mathungache pontho na matabwa amkungudza. 
1Kings7:12 Chintalo chikulu chidazungulirwa na mpanda wakukhala na mzera ubodzi wakuikhwa matabwa pamzera wachitatu onsene wa miyala; ninga mudachitirwambo mpanda wakuzungulira chintalo cha Nyumba ya Mulungu, pontho na balanda ya nyumba yachifumu." 
1Kings7:13 Mfumu Solomoni adachemeresa munthu unango dzinache Hiramu. Iye akhali misiri wankuwa wakukhala kumzinda wa Turo, pontho akhali nyaluso pyakwanga pabasa yankuwa." 
1Kings7:14 Babache ule adafa kale ene akhali wakubulukira ku Turo, iyembo akhali misiri waluso pyakwanga wankuwa; mache Hiramu akhali wa dzinza ya Nafitali. Hiramu akhali wanzeru pyakwanga pontho wakuidziwa mwadidi mwene basache. Iye adatawira kuchemerwa kudachita iye na Mfumu Solomoni kuti iye akhale nyakuyang'anira basa yonsene yankuwa." 
1Kings7:15 Hiramu adasasanya nsanamira ziwiri zankuwa. Ibodzi ulaphiache ukhali makhono masere. Kukula kwache manungo kukhali makhono mashanu na dzanja, pontho ntchindu yache ikhali pyala pinayi mbazitchimika pamsuwo wakupitira m'Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
1Kings7:16 Iye adasasanya pontho mphanda zankuwa padzulu pa nsanamira; ubodzi ulaphiache ukhali makhono mawiri na dzanja ibodzi. 
1Kings7:17 Padzulu pa nsanamira zile iye adazithemesera mwadidi na mangalade asimbi. 
1Kings7:18 Tenepo iye adasasanya pinango pyakuoneka ninga ntheme mbapiikha m'mizera miwiri kuzungulira mangaladewo. 
1Kings7:19 Mphanda zile zikhali padzulu pa nsanamira zile zidasasanywa kuoneka ninga maluwa a m'madzi; thungache ukhali khono ibodzi na manja manayi. 
1Kings7:20 Pansanamira, padzulu pa mangalade akhadazungulira nsanamira zile, iye adaikha nkhata. Tenepo padzulu pa nkhata padaikhwa ntheme madzana mawiri m'mizera pamphanda ziwiri zile." 
1Kings7:21 Hiramu adaikha nsanamira ziwiri zankuwa kunkhope kwa msuwo wakupitira m'Nyumba ya Mulungu. Nsanamira yakumwera idathula Yakini, inangombo yakumpoto adaithula Boazi." 
1Kings7:22 Mphanda yankuwa ile ikhakhala ninga maluwa a m'madzi idaikhwa padzulu pa nsanamira zile. Natenepo basa yakusasanya nsanamira idamala. 
1Kings7:23 Hiramu adasasanya phiso ikulu yankuwa yakukoyeramo madzi. Kuzwika kwache kukhali makhono mawiri na dzanja ibodzi; milomo yache ikhali makhono manayi; manungo ache akhali makhono khumi na matatu na dzanja ibodzi. 
1Kings7:24 Kuzungulira minenwa ya phisoyo kunsi adaikhako mizere miwiri ya pinango pyakuoneka ninga ndiko zankuwa, pile pidaumbirwa kubodzi kwene na phiso ile." 
1Kings7:25 Phisoyo adaithikitiza pamsana pa ng'ombe zimuna zankuwa khumi na ziwiri, zile zikhayang'ana kunja, zitatu kuyang'ana kumpoto, zitatu kuyang'ana kumadokero dzuwa, zitatu kuyang'ana kumwera, pontho zitatu kuyang'ana kumabulukiro dzuwa." 
1Kings7:26 Ntchindu ya phiso ikuluyo ikhali ninga pyala pinayi. Milomo yache ikhali ninga milomo ya khomitcho, yakufuthukira kunja ninga masamba a maluwa a m'madzi. Chinthu chenechi chikhakoya madzi akukwana nkhali pikwi piwiri." 
1Kings7:27 Hiramu adasasanya pontho pigudumu pyankuwa khumi. Chigudumu chibodzi ulaphiache ukhali khono ibodzi na manja manayi, umimbache ukhali khono ibodzi na manja manayi, pontho thungache ikhali khono ibodzi na manja mawiri." 
1Kings7:28 Masasanyiro ache akhali tenepa: akhali na magulupiya, ale adaphatiswa na masimbi m'nkhomo mwawo." 
1Kings7:29 Pamagulupiya pakati pa masimbi pakhadathemeserwa na pinthu pyakuoneka ninga nkhalamu, ng'ombe na pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido; penepi pikhali pontho pamasimbi akuphatisira m'nkhomo mwawo ale. Padzulu na pansi pene pa nkhalamu, ng'ombe na pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido pikhali pontho na pyakuthemesera pya nkhata." 
1Kings7:30 Pigudumu pyonsene pikhali na magaleta manayi ankuwa pontho pakati pa magaleta mawiri onsene pakhali mtanda wankuwa wakuphataniza magaleta. M'khomo zonsene zinayi zikhali na mafuwa, ale akhaphatiswa basa kukhazika phiso. Mafuwa onsene akhathemeserwa mwadidi na nkhata." 
1Kings7:31 Pakati pa nkhomo zinayi zile zidabulukira kunja padzulu pakhali magulupiya ale chengo chawo chikhali kati ya khono. Kuzwika kwa chakuphatisira phiso chile chikhadazungulirwa na magulupiya kukhali manja manayi, pontho milomo yache ikhadathemeserwa mwadidi na mangalade." 
1Kings7:32 Magaletawo ulaphiache ukhali manja manayi; magaletawo akhali m'tchinde mwa magulupiya, pontho mitanda ikhadaphataniza magaleta akhadasasanywa kukhala phindi ibodzi ene na pigudumu." 
1Kings7:33 Magaletawo akhadasansanywa ninga a chingolo; mitandache yakuphataniza magaleta mawiri ale, maviri, masipoko na mahabu ache pikhali pyankuwa." 
1Kings7:34 Pansi pa pigudumu pyonsene m'nkhomo zache mukhali pyakuimisiramo pinayi pile pikhadasasanywa kukhala phindi ibodzi na pigudumu. 
1Kings7:35 Pakhali bande yakulapha yakukwana dzanja ibodzi kuzungulira padzulu pa chigudumu chonsene; pyakuimisira pyache na magulupiya ache pikhadasasanywa kukhala phindi ibodzi na chigudumu. 
1Kings7:36 Pyakuimisira na magulupiya pikhali pyakuthemeserwa mwadidi na pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido, nkhalamu, na miti yamchindu, ponsene pene pakhali mbuto yakuikhapo pinthu penepi, pontho na mangalade kuzungulira konsene kwene." 
1Kings7:37 Mwenemu ndiye mule mudasasanyirwa pigudumu; pyonsene pikhaoneka sasawa; thungawo ikhali ibodzi ene, pontho masasanyiro ache akhali abodzi ene." 
1Kings7:38 Hiramu adasasanya pontho maphiso khumi. Phiso ibodzi pachigudumu chibodzi. Phiso ibodzi milomo yache ikhali khono ibodzi na manja manayi, pontho mukhapita madzi akukwana mabekete makumanayi." 
1Kings7:39 Iye adaikha pigudumu pishanu kukhundu yakumwera kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu mbakwata pontho pigudumu pinango pishanu pile mbapiikha kukhundu yakumpoto kwa Nyumba ile; phiso ikulu yakukoyeramo madzi ile adaiikha pankhomo yakumwera kumabulukiro dzuwa. 
1Kings7:40 Hiramu adasasanya pontho pikalango, mafosholo na ndilo. Iye adamalisa basa yonsene idampasa Mfumu Solomoni yakumanga Nyumba ya MBUYA. Pidasasanywa mphipi: Nsanamira ziwiri Mphanda ziwiri zakuoneka ninga ndilo padzulu pa nsanamira Pyakuthemesera piwiri pyakuoneka ninga mangalade pamphanda ziwiri Pyakuthemesera pyakuoneka ninga ntheme madzana manayi, kuikha madzana mawiri m'mizera miwiri kada mphanda ibodzi padzulu pa mangalade Pigudumu khumi Pyakusambiramo khumi Phiso ikulu yakukoyeramo madzi Ng'ombe zimuna khumi na ziwiri padakhazikwa phiso ikului Pikalango, mafosholo na ndilo. Pinthu pyonsene pya m'Nyumba ya MBUYA pidasasanya Hiramu kusasanyira Mfumu Solomoni pikhali pyankuwa wakuyetimira." 
1Kings7:41  
1Kings7:42  
1Kings7:43  
1Kings7:44  
1Kings7:45  
1Kings7:46 Mfumu adasasanyisa pyonsenepi pakunyungulusa nkuwa mbapiikha m'pikombole pya dongo m'phedi ya Yorodani pakati pa Sukoti na Zaretani. 
1Kings7:47 Solomoni hadayese kulemera kwa pinthupyo tayu, thangwi pikhalipo pizinji pyakwanga, natenepo kulemera kwapyo hadakudziwe tayu." 
1Kings7:48 Solomoni adasasanya pinthu pyonsene pyagolidi pya m'Nyumba ya Mulungu: guwa yansembe, thebulu yakuikhirapo mikate yakuperekwa kuna Mulungu;" 
1Kings7:49 pyakuikhirapo nyale khumi pile pidaikhwa patsogolo pa Mbuto Yakuchenesesa, pishanu kukhundu yakumwera, pishanumbo kukhundu yakumpoto; maluwa, nyale na chakukwizira tsakala;" 
1Kings7:50 makhomitcho, pyakukwizira tsakala ya nyale, ndilo, piwaya pyakufukizira pyakununkhira, na piwaya pyakupalira makala amoto; na pyakuphatisa msuwo wa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu na wa m'Mbuto Yakuchenesesa. Pyonsenepi pidasasanywa na golidi." 
1Kings7:51 Pidamalisa Mfumu Solomoni basa yonsene ya pa Nyumba ya Mulungu, adaikha m'masubi akukoyeramo pinthu pya m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, pinthu pyonsene pidapambulira babache Davite kuna MBUYA; siliva, golidi na pyombo pinango." 
1Kings8:1 Kubuluka penepo Mfumu Solomoni adachemeresa akadamu onsene a Israele, akadamu a madzinza na a mabanja onsene, kuti adze kuna iye mu Yerusalemu, towera akwate Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA kubulukira ku Zioni, mzinda wa Davite, kudza nayo ku Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
1Kings8:2 Aisraele onsene adagumanyikana pabodzi pene pandzidzi wa Phwando ya Misasa, mwezi wa Etanimu, ule akhali mwezi wachinomwe." 
1Kings8:3 Pidagumanyikana akadamu onsene a Israele, anyansembe adathukula Bokosi ya Chiverano," 
1Kings8:4 mbadza nayo ku Nyumba ya Mulungu. Alevi na anyansembe adathukula pontho Chikhumbi cha MBUYA pabodzi pene na pyombo pyonsene kwenda napyo ku Nyumba ya Mulungu. 
1Kings8:5 Mfumu Solomoni pabodzi pene na Aisraele onsene adagumanyikana patsogolo pa Bokosi ya Chiverano mbapereka nsembe mabira na ng'ombe zizinji zene zokhonda lengeseka. 
1Kings8:6 Kubuluka penepo anyansembe adapitisa Bokosi ya Chiverano ile m'Nyumba ya Mulungu mbakaiikha m'Mbuto Yakuchenesesa pansi pa pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido. 
1Kings8:7 Maphaphido awo akufuthuka ale adaphimbira Bokosiyo na miti yache yakuthukulira. 
1Kings8:8 Miti ile ikhali yakulapha pyakwanga mwakuti nkhomo zache zikhakwanisa kuoniwa na m'Mbuto Yakuchenesesa patsogolo pa mbuto yakuchena ile, kwache nee zikhakwanisa kuoniwa na kunja kwa Mbuto Yakuchenesesa tayu; mitiyo na lero ili ponthopo." 
1Kings8:9 M'bwalo mwa Bokosi ya Chiverano ile, mukhali nkhabe chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu kupambula miyala miwiri padalembwa matongero pale, ile idaikha Mose paphiri ya Sinai ndzidzi udachita MBUYA chiverano na Aisraele pidabuluka iwo m'dziko ya Iguputo." 
1Kings8:10 Pikhabuluka anyansembe m'Nyumba ya Mulungu ile, kabodzi kene Nyumbayo idadzala na makole," 
1Kings8:11 mwakuti anyansembe ale hadakwanise tayu kupitamo pontho kuti akaphate basawo thangwi demelero ya MBUYA idadzala m'Nyumbacheyo. 
1Kings8:12 Tenepo Solomoni adapemphera mbati, “Imwe MBUYA mwaikha dzuwa kuthambo, kwache imwe mudasankhula kukhala m'makole na mumdima." 
1Kings8:13 Lero ndakumangirani nyumba ya demelero, mbuto yakuti mukhalemo kwenda na kwenda.”" 
1Kings8:14 Mwenemo Aisraele onsene mbali chiliri-chiliri penepo, Mfumu Solomoni adazungunukira kuna iwo mbapempha Mulungu kuti atsanzayise." 
1Kings8:15 Iye adalonga mbati, “Mbakuzwe MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele! Iye akoya pidadumbira iye kuna babanga Davite pidalonga iye kuna iye kuti," 
1Kings8:16 ‘Kutomera ndzidzi udabulusa ine anthu anga m'dziko ya Iguputo, ine sidasankhule mzinda na ubodzi ene tayu m'dziko yonsene ya Israele kuti mumangwe Nyumba towera ine ndipembedzwemo. Mbwenye ndidasankhula iwe, Davite kukhala mtongi wa anthu anga.’ ”" 
1Kings8:17 Solomoni adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Babanga Davite akhali na chipapu kufuna kumanga nyumba kuti MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele apembedzwemo." 
1Kings8:18 Mbwenye MBUYA adalonga kuna iye mbati, ‘Ande, mphyadidi kuti iwe udanyerezera pyakundimangira nyumba," 
1Kings8:19 kwache anafuna kundimangira nyumbayo si iwe tayu, mbwenye mwanako, ule ndi manungo ako pontho chiropa chako, ndiye anati andimangire nyumba.’" 
1Kings8:20 “Chinchino MBUYA achita pidumbira iye pile: Ine ndapita m'mbuto mwa babanga ninga mfumu wa Israele, pontho ndamanga Nyumba yakupambedzerwamo MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele." 
1Kings8:21 Ndasasanya mbuto yakukhala Bokosi ya Chiverano, mule muna miyala miwiri yakulembwapo chiverano chidachita MBUYA na makolo athu pidaabulusa iye m'dziko ya Iguputo.”" 
1Kings8:22 Kubuluka penepo Solomoni adaimira patsogolo paguwa yansembe ya MBUYA pamaso pa anthu mbakwiza manjache m'dzulu 
1Kings8:23 mbapemphera mbati, “MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele, nkhabe Mulungu unango ninga imwe kudzulu penu pansi pano. Imwe mumbachita kuna anthu anu pinthu pimbadumbira imwe mbamuonesa kuafuna kwanu iwo angathimiza kuchita pinafuna imwe na mtima onsene." 
1Kings8:24 Imwe mwachita pidadumbira imwe kuna babanga Davite; lero mafalanu onsene akwana-kwana. 
1Kings8:25 “Tenepo MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele, ndikupemphera kuti munachita pinango pidadumbira imwe kuna babanga pidampanga imwe kuti ndzidzi onsene mbodzi wa pidzukulu pyache anatonga ufumu wa Israele, ngakhala iwo anachita mphole-mphole kukuverani ninga mudachitirambo iye." 
1Kings8:26 Natenepo MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele, chitisani pyonsene pidadumbira imwe kuna nyabasanu Davite babanga kukwana-kwana." 
1Kings8:27 “Ayi imwe Mulungu nkhukhaladi pansi pano? Podi na kudzulu kwene nkhabe mbuto yakukwana imwe tayu. Apo ndi tani na nyumba ing'ono yakumangirani ineyi! 
1Kings8:28 MBUYA Mulungu wanga, ine ndine nyabasanu. Veserani kupemphera kwanga mbamundichitire pinthu pinakupemphani ine leropi." 
1Kings8:29 Yang'anirani Nyumbayi mosiku na masikati, mbuto yasankhula imwe kuti mupembedzerwemo ile. Ndivesereni pinapemphera ine mwakuyang'ana Nyumbayi." 
1Kings8:30 Vani kupemphera kwa nyabasanu na kwa anthu anu Israele pa nyumba yeneyi. Vani kweneko kudzulu kumbakhala imweko mbamutilekerere. 
1Kings8:31 Munthu angadawira tsanthembache mbapafunika kudumbira kuti iye hadadawe tayu, tenepo iye mbadza patsogolo pa guwanu yansembe m'Nyumba mwanu muno kudumbira," 
1Kings8:32 MBUYA, mvesereni kudzuluko mbamuchitapo pinthu. Nyakudawayo mbatchunyuswe malingana na pinthu pyachita iye, pontho nyakukhonda dawayo mulongeni kuti iye hadadawe tayu." 
1Kings8:33 “Anthu anu Aisraele angakundwa kunkhondo na anyamalwawo thangwi yakukudawirani, iwo mbabwerera kuna imwe mbatawira na mulomo wawo kuti ndimwe Mulungu wawo mbapemphera kuna imwe m'Nyumba mwanu muno," 
1Kings8:34 avesereni kudzuluko mbamulekerera pyakudawa pya anthu anu Aisraele mbamuabweze kudziko idapereka imwe kuna makolo awo ile. 
1Kings8:35 “Ngakhala kudzulu kunafungika mbakukhonda kuvumbisa mvula thangwi anthu anu akudawirani, tenepo iwo angapemphera mwakuyang'ana Nyumbayi mbatawira na mulomo wawo kuti ndimwe Mulungu wawo mbaleka pyakudawa pyawo na thangwi yakuti mwaatchunyusa," 
1Kings8:36 avesereni kudzuluko mbamulekerera pyakudawa pya anyabasanu anthu anu Aisraele, pontho afunziseni makhaliro akulungama. Tenepo MBUYA, vumbisani mvula m'dziko mwanu, idapasa imwe anthu anu kuti ikhale yawo ene ile." 
1Kings8:37 “Ngakhala m'dziko munagwa njala penu muliri, penu mbewu zavungika na mphepo penu na nyadzombe, penu anthu anu anasoswa na anyamalwa awo, penu pakati pawo pagwa muliri penu utenda wa mtundu onsene," 
1Kings8:38 veserani kupemphera kwawo. Ngakhala munthu unango ene wa Aisraele anadzidzwa mumtima mwache na penepi, iye mbakwiza manjache m'dzulu kupemphera mwakuyang'ana Nyumbayi," 
1Kings8:39 vani kupemphera kwawo. Avesereni kudzulu kumbuto kumbakhala imweko. Lekererani pyakudawa pyawo mbamuaphedze. Podi ndimwe ene basi ule ambadziwa pyamumtima mwa munthu, tenepo chitani kuna munthu onsene mwakuthemerana na pinthu pyaphata iye," 
1Kings8:40 towera anthu anu akugopeni ndzidzi onsene unakhala iwo m'dziko idapereka imwe kuna makolo athu ile. 
1Kings8:41 “Ngakhala mlendo pyache wakukhala kudziko yakutali anava pya ukulu wanu pontho pinthu pikulu pyachitira imwe anthu anu Aisraele, tenepo adza dzakupembedzani, pontho kupemphera kuna imwe m'Nyumbayi," 
1Kings8:42  
1Kings8:43 mvesereni kupemphera kwache. Kudzulu kumbuto kunakhala imweko, mvesereni mbamuchite pinakupemphani iyepyo, towera madzinza onsene a padziko yapansi akudziweni mbakuverani, ninga mumbachitira anthu anu Aisraele. Penepo iwo anadziwa kuti Nyumba yakumangirani ineyi ndi mbuto yathema imwe kupembedzerwamo." 
1Kings8:44 “Ngakhala anthu anu aenda kunkhondo kamenyana na anyamalwawo konsene kwene kunaatuma imweko mbapemphera kuna imwe MBUYA mwakuyang'ana mzinda udasankhula imwewu pontho Nyumba yakumangirani ineyi," 
1Kings8:45 avesereni kupemphera kwawo. Kudzuluko avesereni mbamuachitise kukunda. 
1Kings8:46 “Ngakhala iwo anakudawirani (thangwi nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene okhonda dawa tayu) imwe mbamuazhangalira na kuapereka m'manja mwa anyamalwawo, ale anaakwata ninga anyaperezo mbaenda nawo kudziko yakutali penu chifupi," 
1Kings8:47 veserani kupemphera kwa anthu anu. Ngakhala m'dziko iwo anatchunyuka mbapemphera kuna imwe kutawira na mulomo wawo kuti iwo adawadi pontho kuti achitadi pyakudawika, avesereni kupemphera kwawo MBUYA." 
1Kings8:48 Ngakhala m'dzikomo anatawiradi kudawa kwawo na mtima wakuona pontho mwakukhulupirika mbapemphera kuna imwe mwakuyang'ana dziko idapereka imwe kuna makolo athu ile, mzinda wasankhula imwewu, pontho na Nyumba yakumangirani ineyi," 
1Kings8:49 tenepo veserani kupemphera kwawo. Kudzulu kumbuto kumbakhala imweko, vesereni mbamuavere nsisi." 
1Kings8:50 Lekererani pyakudawa pyawo pyonsene, pontho na kukupandukirani kudachita iwo mbamuchitise anyamalwawo kuakomera mtima." 
1Kings8:51 Iwo mbanthu anu ene, ale adabulusa imwe m'dziko ya Iguputo dzenje yakunyungulusiramo utale." 
1Kings8:52 “Mbuya Mulungu, ndzidzi onsene yang'anani mwakuakomera mtima anthu anu Aisraele pontho na mfumu wawo, pontho veserani kupemphera kwawo ndzidzi onsene unalira iwo kuna imwe kuti muaphedze." 
1Kings8:53 Thangwi imwe mudaasankhula pakati pa madzinza a dziko yonsene yapansi kuti akhale anthu anu ene ninga mudalongera imwe kudzera muna nyabasanu Mose ndzidzi udabulusa imwe MBUYA Mulungu makolo athu m'dziko ya Iguputo.” 
1Kings8:54 Pidamala Solomoni kupemphera pontho kudembetera kuna MBUYA, adalamuka kubuluka patsogolo pa guwa yansembe ya MBUYA, pakhadagodama iye mbakwiza manjache m'dzulu pale." 
1Kings8:55 Iye adaimira mbatsanzayisa gulu yonsene ya anthu a ku Israele mwakugaluza fala mbalonga mbati," 
1Kings8:56 “Mbakuzwe MBUYA ule apereka kupuma kuna anthu ache Israele ninga montho mukhadadumbira iye mule. Nkhabe chibodzi chidakhonda iye kuchichita papinthu pyonsene pidadumbira iye kudzera muna nyabasache Mose tayu. 
1Kings8:57 MBUYA Mulungu wathu mbakhale nafe ninga mudachitira iye na makolo athu; iye mbaleke kutisiya tekha ene penu kutikhonda. 
1Kings8:58 Iye mbachitise mitimathu kuzungunukira kuna iye, kuchita pinafuna iye, kukoya matongero ache, upangizi na mwambo pidapereka iye kuna makolo athu pile." 
1Kings8:59 Pontho mafalanga apemphera ine kuna MBUYA ale mbakhale chifupi na MBUYA Mulungu wathu mosiku na masikati kuti iye avere nsisi nyabasache, pontho anthu ache Aisraele na pinthu pinafuna iwo nsiku na nsiku," 
1Kings8:60 towera anthu a madzinza onsene a padziko yapansi adziwe kuti MBUYA ndi Mulungu, pontho kuti nkhabe unango ninga iye." 
1Kings8:61 Mbwenye imwe mwathema kupereka mtimanu onsene kuna MBUYA Mulungu wathu, kuvera mwambo wache na matongero ache ene ninga muna ipyo leromu.”" 
1Kings8:62 Kubuluka penepo Mfumu Solomoni pabodzi pene na anthu onsene akhali penepo ale, adapereka nsembe kuna MBUYA." 
1Kings8:63 Iye adapereka ng'ombe pikwi makumawiri na piwiri, pontho mabira pikwi dzana na makumawiri ninga nsembe zachiphatizano. Natenepo mfumu pabodzi na anthu onsene adapambulira Nyumba ile kuna Mulungu." 
1Kings8:64 Pansiku yonthoyo mfumu adachitisa mbuto ya pakatiletu pa chintalo kutsogolo kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu kukhala yakupambulika, tenepo adaperekapo nsembe zamumphu zakupyerera, pyakupereka pya mapira na mafuta a nyama za nsembe zachiphatizano zile. Iye adachita tenepo thangwi guwa yansembe yankuwa ile, ikhali ing'ono pyakwanga kukwanapo nsembe zonsenezi." 
1Kings8:65 Penepo pa Nyumba ya Mulungu, Solomoni pabodzi pene na Aisraele onsene adasekera Phwando ya Misasa nsiku zinomwe. Pakhali mgumano ukulu wa anthu akubulukira kumakata a Hamati kumpoto mpakana kumwera kumadire a dziko ya Iguputo." 
1Kings8:66 Pansiku yachisere Solomoni adagwinya anthu ale kwenda m'misa mwawo. Iwo onsene adamsimba mbaenda m'misa mwawo na kukomerwa, thangwi ya mtsanzayiso onsene ukhadapereka MBUYA kuna nyabasache Davite na kuna anthu ache Aisraele." 
1Kings9:1 Pidamalisa Mfumu Solomoni kumanga Nyumba ya Mulungu, pontho kumanga nyumba yachifumu, pontho na pinango pyonsene pikhafuna iye kumanga," 
1Kings9:2 MBUYA adamuonekera pontho ninga mukhadamuonekera iye ku Gibeoni. 
1Kings9:3 MBUYA adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ine ndava kupemphera kwako. Ine ndinachitisa Nyumba yandimangira iwe kuti ndipembedzwemoyi kukhala yakupambulika kwenda na kwenda. Ndinaiyang'anira pontho kuitchinjiriza ndzidzi onsene." 
1Kings9:4 Ngakhala iwe unanditumikira na mtima wakuona pontho chakukupokanyisa ninga mudachitira babako, pontho ngakhala unavera matongero anga mbuchita pyonsene pyakutonga ine," 
1Kings9:5 ndinachita pidadumbira ine kuna babako Davite, pidampanga ine kuti ndzidzi onsene pidzukulu pyache pinatonga mu Israele." 
1Kings9:6 Mbwenye ngakhala iwe penu pidzukulu pyako munabauka kubuluka kuna ine mbamukhonda vera mwambo na matongero akupasani inewa mbapembedza milungu inango," 
1Kings9:7 penepo ine ndinaabulusa Aisraele m'dziko idaapasa ineyi, pontho ndinaikhonda Nyumba yapambula ineyi kukhala mbuto yanga yakupembedzerwamo. Konsene kwene anthu Israele anamuesa chinthu chakusekesa mbamchitira pyakuseluka." 
1Kings9:8 Nyumbayi inasanduka madembe mwakuti munthu onsene wakugwanda na njira anatutumuka na kusedegula mbavunza mbati, ‘Thangwi yache ninji MBUYA achita penepi kuna dzikoyi, pontho kuna Nyumbayi?’" 
1Kings9:9 Anthu anatawira kuti, ‘Ndi thangwi yakuti iwo adamkhonda MBUYA Mulungu wawo, ule adabulusa makolo awo m'dziko ya Iguputo. Iwo apipereka okha ene kuna milungu inango mbaipembedza. Ndi thangwi yache MBUYA adzesa kuvungikaku pakati pawo.’ ”" 
1Kings9:10 Solomoni kumanga Nyumba ya Mulungu na nyumba yachifumu kudamkwatira pyaka makumawiri. 
1Kings9:11 Mfumu Hiramu wa ku Turo akhadapereka kuna Solomoni matabwa amkungudza na paina pontho na golidi onsene akhafuna iye pabasa yeneyi. Pidamala iye basa yonseneyi, Mfumu Solomoni adapereka kuna Mfumu Hiramu maluwani makumawiri a m'nthemba ya Galilea." 
1Kings9:12 Mfumu Hiramu adenda kaona maluwaniwo kwache iye hadakomerwe nawo tayu. 
1Kings9:13 Natenepo iye adalonga kuna Solomoni mbati, “Mbaleanga ayi maluwani andipasa iwe mbenewa?” Na thangwi yeneyi na lero nthemba yeneyi imbachemerwa Kabulu." 
1Kings9:14 Mfumu Hiramu akhadatumiza kuna Solomoni golidi wakulemera kupiringana makilogramu pikwi pinayi. 
1Kings9:15 Mfumu Solomoni adaphatisa basa anyakuphata basa mwakukhakhamizwa kumanga Nyumba ya Mulungu pontho na nyumba yachifumu, kundendemeza khundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa ya mzinda, kumanga mafufu a mzinda wa Yerusalemu, pontho kumanga mizinda ya Hazori, Megido na Gezeri." 
1Kings9:16 Mfumu wa ku Iguputo adasosa mzinda wa Gezeri mbaukunda. Iye adapha onsene akukhala mwenemo mbaupisa moto. Kubuluka penepo mzinda wenewu adaupereka kuna mwanache wamkazi ninga mtukwa pandzidzi ukhakazhali iye na Solomoni," 
1Kings9:17 tenepo Solomoni adaumanga pontho. Pakuphatisa basa anyakuphata basa mwakukhakhamizwa Solomoni adamanga pontho Beti-Horoni wa ku phedi," 
1Kings9:18 Baalati, Tamara m'thando yatchetcha ya Yuda," 
1Kings9:19 mizinda yakukoyeramo pinthu pyache, mizinda ya akavalo ache na pingolo pyache, pontho na pyonsene pikhafuna iye kumanga mu Yerusalemu, Lebanoni na konsene kwene m'nthemba mwachemo."
