1Kings9:20 Anyakuphata basa mwakukhakhamizwa a Solomoni akhali pidzukulu pya Akanani, ale Aisraele haadaaphe tayu pandzidzi ukhakwata iwo dziko yawo ile. Enewa akhali Aamori, Ahiti, Aperizi, Ahivi, na Ayebusi, ale pidzukulu pyawo na lero ndi mabitchu basi." 
1Kings9:21  
1Kings9:22 Solomoni hadakwate Aisraele kukhala mabitchu tayu. Iwo akhaphata basa ninga anyankhondo ache, mathubu, akadamu a nkhondo, anyakufambisa pingolo na anyakupakira akavalo." 
1Kings9:23 Pakhali akadamu madzana mashanu na makumashanu kuyang'anira anthu, akhaphata basa yakumanga-manga ya Solomoni ale." 
1Kings9:24 Solomoni adakwata mkazache, mwana wamkazi wa mfumu wa ku Iguputo ule, kumbulusa mumzinda wa Davite kwenda naye kunyumba yachifumu ikhadammangira Solomoni ile. Kubuluka penepo iye adandendemeza khundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa a mzinda wa Yerusalemu." 
1Kings9:25 Solomoni akhapereka nsembe zakupyerera na nsembe zachiphatizano paguwa yansembe ikhadamangira iye MBUYA ile, katatu pachaka mbafukiza pontho pyakununkhira kuna MBUYA. Natenepo iye adamalisa basa yonsene yakumanga Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
1Kings9:26 Solomoni adasasanya pontho miyadiya mikulu-mikulu pa Ezioni-Geberi chifupi na Elati mu Edomu pagombe ya Nyanza Yakufira. 
1Kings9:27 Natenepo Mfumu Hiramu adatuma amunache, anyakufambisa miyadiya, ale adazolowera kufamba panyanza kaphata basa pabodzi na amuna a Solomoni." 
1Kings9:28 Iwo adadza na miyadiyayi kunthunda ya Ofiri, mbadza pontho na golidi wakulemera makilogramu pikwi khumi na pinayi kupipereka kuna Solomoni." 
1Kings10:1 Mfumukazi wa ku Sheba adava mbiri ya Mfumu Solomoni malingana na dzina ya MBUYA, tenepo iye adenda ku Yerusalemu kamuyesa na mivunzo yakunensa." 
1Kings10:2 Iye adadza na mwinji ukulu wa anyabasache pabodzi pene na ngamila zakuthukula pyakukomesera muliwo, miyala yakudula na golidi mzinji ene. Pikhachedza iye na Solomoni, iye adamvunza mivunzo yonsene ikhali na iye kumtima kwache." 
1Kings10:3 Solomoni adatawira mivunzo yache yonsene ile; nkhabe mvunzo na ubodzi ene ukhali wakunensa kuna iye kuufuthula tayu. 
1Kings10:4 Mfumukazi wa ku Sheba adava nzeru za Solomoni mbaona nyumba yachifumu ikhadamanga iye. 
1Kings10:5 Iye adaona pyakudya pidaikhirwa iye pathebulu, nyumba zakugona mathubu ache, kudziwa basa kwa anyakuphata basa m'nyumbache yachifumu na pyakuvala pya pabasa pya mtundu ubodzi ene pikhavala iwo, pyakuvala pya anyabasa akhamtumikira pamaphwando ale, pontho na nsembe zidapereka iye m'Nyumba ya Mulungu. Pyonsene pidamchitisa mkazi ule kusowa chakulonga pontho kudodoma." 
1Kings10:6 Iye adalonga kuna Mfumu Solomoni mbati, “Pidava ine m'dziko mwanga pya imwe na nzeru zina imwe, mphyakuonadi!" 
1Kings10:7 Kwache ine nee ndikhapikhulupira tayu kufikirana ndadza dzapiona ndekha ene na maso anga. Mphyakuonadi kuti pidapangwa inepyo nee theka pidakwana tayu; nzeru na mfuma pina imwepi pyapiringana pinthu pidava ine. 
1Kings10:8 Ngamwayi pyakwanga akazanu. Ngamwayi pyakwanga anyabasanu, ale ndzidzi onsene ambakhala chifupi na imwe kuvesera mafalanu anzeru!" 
1Kings10:9 Mbakuzwe MBUYA Mulungu wanu! Iye aonesa kuti ambakomerwa namwe pakukuchitisani kukhala mfumu kutonga na dzinache. Na thangwi yakuti MBUYA kumfuna kwache Israele nkhokhonda mala, iye akuchitisani kukhala mfumu kuti pakhale kukoya mwambo pontho chilungamo.”" 
1Kings10:10 Kubuluka penepo mfumukazi ule, adapereka kuna Mfumu Solomoni mitukwa idadza na iye kuna Mfumu Solomoni: golidi wakulemera kupiringana makilogramu pikwi pinayi, pyakukomesera muliwo pizinji pontho na miyala yakudula. Pyakukomesera muliwo pidadza na mfumukazi wa ku Sheba ule, pikhali pizinji pyakwanga kupiringana pyonsene pidatambira iye m'ndulimu." 
1Kings10:11 Miyadiya mikulu-mikulu ya Mfumu Hiramu idadza na golidi kubulukira ku Ofiri; pontho kubulukira kweneko adadza na mitolo yamphingwe na yamiyala yakudula. 
1Kings10:12 Solomoni adaphatisa basa miti ile kukhala nsanamira za Nyumba ya Mulungu na nyumba yachifumu, kusasanya anyakatangale na malimba pya anyakuimba. Kutomera penepo na lero miti yamphingweyi hidzati oneka pontho mu Israele penu kuchemereswa kubulukira kudziko inango tayu." 
1Kings10:13 Mfumu Solomoni adapereka kuna mfumukazi wa ku Sheba ule pyonsene pidapempha iye, kupambula mitukwa yonsene ikhadapereka iye kuna mkazi ule mwakufuna kwache. Kubuluka penepo mfumukazi ule pabodzi pene na anyabasache adabwerera kudziko ya Sheba." 
1Kings10:14 Chaka na chaka Mfumu Solomoni akhatambira golidi wakulemera makilogramu pikwi makumawiri na pitatu," 
1Kings10:15 kuthimizira pamsonkho ukhakhoma anyamalonda akufamba-famba, kobiri kubulukira kumalonda, pontho kobiri zakubulukira kuna mafumu onsene a Arabia, pontho na akulu a boma a m'nthemba ya Israele." 
1Kings10:16 Solomoni adasasanya pyakugedera matswimo pikulu-pikulu pyakukwana madzana mawiri, chonsene chidakukutizwa na golidi wakulemera makilogramu anomwe." 
1Kings10:17 Iye adasasanya pontho pyakugedera matswimo ping'ono-ping'ono madzana matatu chonsene chidakukutizwa na golidi wakulemera makilogramu awiri. Iye adaikha pyakugedera matswimo pyonsenepi m'Chinyumba chakuchemerwa Msitu wa Lebanoni. 
1Kings10:18 Iye adasasanyisa pontho mpando wachifumu. Khundu ibodzi ya mpandowo idakukutizwa na nyanga za nzowu, pontho khundu inango yakusalirayo idakukutizwa na golidi chadi-chadi." 
1Kings10:19 Kafika pampandowo pakhali nsikada zitanthatu, wakukhala na mfanikizo wa nkhalamu pa nsikada yonsene, yonsene ikhalipo mifanikizo khumi na miwiri. Kunduli kwa mpandowo kukhali mfanikizo wa msolo wa ng'ombe imuna, pontho m'khundu mwa pyakutsamizira mikono pyonsene piwiri mukhali mfanikizo wa nkhalamu. Chipo nee padzati oneka mpando unango wachifumu ninga wenewu ufumu unango tayu." 
1Kings10:20  
1Kings10:21 Makhomitcho onsene a Mfumu Solomoni akhali akusasanywa na golidi, pontho pyombo pyonsene pya m'Chinyumba cha Msitu wa Lebanoni pikhali pyakusasanywa na golidi chadi-chadi. Nee na chibodzi chene chidasasanywa na siliva tayu, thangwi pandzidzi wa Solomoni, siliva akhayeswa ninga ntchinthu chakukhonda funika." 
1Kings10:22 Iye akhali pontho na miyadiya mikulu-mikulu yakufamba pa bara pabodzi pene na miyadiya ya Hiramu. Tenepo pachaka chachitatu chonsene miyadiyacheyo ikhabwerera, uku yathukula golidi na siliva, nyanga za nzowu, mabongwe na makolo." 
1Kings10:23 Mfumu Solomoni akhali wakufuma pontho wanzeru pyakwanga kupiringana mafumu anango onsene," 
1Kings10:24 tenepo anthu a padziko yonsene yapansi akhafuna kudza dzavesera nzeru zidampasa Mulungu zile. 
1Kings10:25 Munthu onsene wakudza kuna iye, akhadza na mtukwache kuna iye; pinthu pyakusasanywa na siliva pontho golidi, mikhanjo, pyakukomesera muliwo, pontho akavalo na mabulu. Penepi pikhachitika chaka na chaka." 
1Kings10:26 Solomoni akhali na pingolo pya nkhondo chikwi chibodzi na pinayi, pontho akavalo pikwi khumi na piwiri. Iye adapikoya pinango mu Yerusalemu, pontho pinango pyonsene adapiikha m'mizinda yakusiyana-siyana." 
1Kings10:27 Pandzidzi ukhatonga Solomoni, siliva akhali nadza-nadza mu Yerusalemu ninga miyala, pontho miti yamkungudza ikhali dala-dala ninga miti enembo pyayo ya mkuyu yakumera m'tchinde mwa phiri ya Yuda." 
1Kings10:28 Solomoni akhagula akavalo kubulukira kudziko ya Iguputo na Kue; anyamalonda a mfumu akhachita kuagula kubulukira ku Kue. 
1Kings10:29 Iwo adagula pingolo na akavalo kubulukira kudziko ya Iguputo, chingolo chibodzi na kobiri zasiliva madzana matanthatu, pontho kavalo mbodzi na kobiri zasiliva dzana na makumashanu. Iwombo akhagulisa akavalo na pingolo pyankhondo kuna mafumu anango onsene Ahiti na Aaramu." 
1Kings11:1 Solomoni adasemba akazi azinji achilendo, padzulu pa mwana wamkazi wa mfumu wa ku Iguputo. Iye adasemba akazi a Chihiti, akazi a ku Moabu, Amoni, Edomu na Sidoni." 
1Kings11:2 Iye adasemba akazi enewa podi kwene kuti MBUYA akhadalonga kuna Aisraele kuti aleke semberana nawo anthu enewa gopesera Aisraele anakwatika mbatoma kupembedza milungu yawo. Kwache Solomoni adaafuna pikulu akazi enewa. 
1Kings11:3 Solomoni adasemba ana achikazi a mafumu madzana manomwe pontho akhali na akazi achibitchu madzana matatu. Akazi enewa adamchitisa kuti abauke kubuluka kuna Mulungu. 
1Kings11:4 Natenepo pidakalamba iye iwo adamchitisa kupembedza milungu ya chilendo. Iye hakhalive wakukhulupirika kuna MBUYA Mulungu wache ninga mukhadachitira iye pakutoma tayu. 
1Kings11:5 Iye adapembedza Asitarite, milungu ya Asidoni, pontho Moleki milungu yakuchitisa manyadzo wa Aamoni." 
1Kings11:6 Iye adachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA, pontho hakhachitave pyakulungama pamaso pache ninga mukhachitira Davite babache tayu." 
1Kings11:7 Paphiri yakumabulukiro dzuwa kwa Yerusalemu adasasanyako mbuto yakupembedzerapo Kemoshi, milungu yakuchitisa manyadzo ya Amoabu, na mbuto yakupembedzerapo Moleki, milungu yakuchitisa manyadzo ya Aamoni." 
1Kings11:8 Iye adasasanya pontho mbuto zakupembedzerapo kuti akazache achilendo onsene akwanise kafukizako pyakununkhira na kupereka nsembe kuna milungu yawo. 
1Kings11:9 Podi kwene kuti MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele, akhadaonekera Solomoni kawiri mbampanga kuti aleke pembedza milungu inango yachilendo, Solomoni hadavere MBUYA tayu, mbwenye adabauka kubuluka kuna MBUYA. Tenepo MBUYA adazhangali naye," 
1Kings11:10  
1Kings11:11 mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Na thangwi yakuti iwe wachita dala kuswa chiverano chasasanya ine na iwe mbukhonda kuvera matongero anga, ndinadumbira kuti ufumu ndinaubulusa pana iwe mbandiupereka kuna mbodzi wa mathubu ako." 
1Kings11:12 Kwache na thangwi ya Davite babako, ine sinachita penepi mbuli moyo tayu, mbwenye pandzidzi unafuna dzatonga mwanako." 
1Kings11:13 Kwache si kuti ndinampokosera ufumu onsenewo tayu; m'mbuto mwache ndinamsiyira dzinza ibodzi thangwi ya nyabasanga Davite, pontho thangwi ya Yerusalemu, mzinda wasankhula ine kukhala wanga ene ule.”" 
1Kings11:14 Natenepo MBUYA adachitisa Hadadi wa m'banja yachifumu ya Edomu kupandukira Solomoni. 
1Kings11:15 Na kale ene penepi pidzati chitika tayu, pandzidzi udakunda Davite anthu a ku Edomu, Yoabu mkadamu wa anyankhondo ache akhadenda kweneko kukaikha anthu akufa m'masiye. Iye pabodzi pene na anthu ache adakhala mu Edomu miyezi mitanthatu, tenepo pandzidzi wenewo iwo adapha amuna onsene a mu Edomu," 
1Kings11:16  
1Kings11:17 kupambula Hadadi na amuna anango a Chiedomu anyabasa a babache, ale akhadathawira ku Yerusalemu. Pandzidzi wenewo Hadadi akhali mphale." 
1Kings11:18 Iwo adabuluka ku Midiani mbaenda ku Parani. Kweneko amuna anango adapita m'gulu mwawo. Kubuluka penepo iwo adenda ku Iguputo mbafika kuna mfumu, mfumuyo adapereka mbuto, nyumba na phoso kuna Hadadi." 
1Kings11:19 Hadadi adasanduka shamwaliache mfumu wa Iguputo, tenepo mfumu adapereka Tapenesi kunyadoache, ule akhali mbaleache mfumukazi, kuna Hadadi kuti akhale mkazache." 
1Kings11:20 Natenepo mkaziyo adambalira Hadadi mwana wamamuna dzinache Genubati, ule akhadalelwa na mfumukazi m'nyumba yachifumu, kule kukhakhala iye pabodzi pene na ana a mfumu." 
1Kings11:21 Pidava Hadadi uku mbali mu Iguputo kuti Davite adagonera mkono, pontho kuti Yoabu mkadamu wa anyankhondo adafambo, adalonga kuna mfumu mbati, “Nditawiriseni kubwerera kudziko ya kwathu.”" 
1Kings11:22 Mfumu adavunza mbati, “Watani unafuna kubwerera kudziko ya kwanu? Chasowa iwe pano ninji?” Hadadi adatawira mbati, “Nkhabe chasowa ine tayu, mbwenye nditawiriseni kwene kwenda kwathu.”" 
1Kings11:23 Mulungu adalamusa pontho nyamalwa unango kuti apandukire Solomoni. Munthu weneyu akhali Rezoni mwana wamamuna wa Eliada, ule akhadathawa pamaso pa mbuyache Hadadezere mfumu wa ku Zoba," 
1Kings11:24 mbasanduka mkadamu wa gulu yakupandukira boma. Penepi pidachitika pandzidzi udakunda Davite Hadadezere mbapha amuna onsene a ku Zoba, ale akhadasasanya gulu ibodzi ya nkhondo. Rezoni na amunache adenda kakhala ku Damasiko, kule kudapitiswa iye na amunache kukhala mfumu wa Aramu. Iye akhali nyamalwa wa Israele ndzidzi onsene ukhali Solomoni na moyo." 
1Kings11:25  
1Kings11:26 Munthu unango ule adapandukira Mfumu Solomoni akhali Yeroboamu mwana Nebati wa ku Zereda mbodzi wa mathubu ache m'nthemba ya Eferemu. Mache akhali mamfelwa pontho dzinache akhali Zerua. 
1Kings11:27 Mbiri yakupandukira ikhali tenepa: Solomoni akhandendemeza khundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa kwa Yerusalemu na kumanga pontho mbuto zakugomoka za mpanda wa mzinda wa babache Davitewo. 
1Kings11:28 Yeroboamu akhali mphale wakudziwa basache, tenepo pidaona Solomoni kuti Yeroboamu akhaphata basa mwakuwangisa, adamuikha kukhala nyakuyang'anira anyakuphata basa mwakukhakhamizwa m'nthemba ya madzinza a Manase na Eferemu." 
1Kings11:29 Pansiku inango pikhali Yeroboamu paulendo wakubulukira ku Yerusalemu, adagumanikana na mprofeti wa ku Shilo dzinache Ahia ule akhadavala mkhanjo utswa. Iwo akhali okha uwiriawo kuminda." 
1Kings11:30 Ahia adadula mkhanjo utswa ukhadavala iye ule mbaung'amba mapindi khumi na mawiri," 
1Kings11:31 mbalonga kuna Yeroboamu mbati, “Kwata mapindi khumi kukhala ako, thangwi MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele, alonga kuna iwe kuti, ‘Yang'ana, ndinati ndipokose ufumu kuna Solomoni mbandiupereka kuna iwe madzinza khumi." 
1Kings11:32 Solomoni anasala na dzinza ibodzi, thangwi ya nyabasanga Davite, pontho na thangwi ya Yerusalemu mzinda udasankhula ine kukhala wanga ule pakati pa dziko yonsene ya Israele." 
1Kings11:33 Ine ndinati ndichite penepi thangwi Solomoni andikhonda pontho apembedza milungu yachilendo: Asitarite, milungu ya Asidoni; Kemoshi, milungu ya Amoabu; na Moleki, milungu ya Aamoni. Solomoni hadandivere tayu; iye achita pinthu pyakudawika, pontho hadakoye mwambo na matongero anga tayu ninga mukhachitira Davite babache." 
1Kings11:34 Kwache ine sinampokosera Solomoni ufumu onsene tayu, pontho ndinathimiza basi kumchitisa kukhala na utongi pandzidzi unakhala iye na moyo. Penepi ndinapichita thangwi ya nyabasanga Davite adasankhula ine mbavera mwambo na matongero anga ule." 
1Kings11:35 Ufumuwu ndinaukwata kuna mwana Solomoni mbandikupasa madzinza khumi," 
1Kings11:36 mbwenye mwana Solomoni ndinamtawirisa kusala na dzinza ibodzi, towera ndzidzi onsene chidzukulu cha nyabasanga Davite ndiye chitonge mu Yerusalemu, mzinda udasankhula ine kuti ndipembedzwemo ule." 
1Kings11:37 Iwembo, Yeroboamu, ndinakuchitisa kukhala mfumu wa Israele, pontho unatonga m'nthemba zonsene zinafuna iwe." 
1Kings11:38 Ngakhala unandivera monsene mwene mbukoya mwambo wanga pontho mbundichitisa kukomerwa nawe pakuchita pinakutonga ine ninga mudachitira nyabasanga Davite, ndzidzi onsene ndinakhala nawe. Ndinakuchitisa kukhala mfumu wa Israele, pontho ndinaonesesa kuti pidzukulu pyako ndiye pidzatonge iwe ungafa, ninga montho mwachitira ine na Davite." 
1Kings11:39 Na thangwi ya kudawa kwa Solomoni ndinati nditchunyuse pidzukulu pya Davite, kwache si kwenda na kwenda tayu.’ ”" 
1Kings11:40 Natenepo Solomoni adayesa-yesa kupha Yeroboamu, mbwenye iye athawira kuna Mfumu Shishaki wa ku Iguputo mbakhala kweneko mpakana kufa kwa Solomoni." 
1Kings11:41 Pinango pyonsene pidachitika Solomoni mbali mfumu, pyonsene pidachita iye, pontho na nzeru zache pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya Solomoni." 
1Kings11:42 Iye akhali mfumu wa Israele onsene pyaka makumanayi. 
1Kings11:43 Iye adagonera mkono mbaikhwa m'masiye a makolo ache mumzinda wa Davite, tenepo Rehoboamu mwanache adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache." 
1Kings12:1 Rehoboamu adenda ku Shekemu thangwi Aisraele onsene akhadenda kweneko kampitisa ufumu. 
1Kings12:2 Pidapiva Yeroboamu mwana Nebati, ule akhadenda ku Iguputo kuthawa Mfumu Solomoni, adabwerera kwawo" 
1Kings12:3 Anthu a kumadzinza akumpoto adachemeresa Yeroboamu, tenepo onsene pabodzi pene adenda kuna Rehoboamu mbalonga kuna iye mbati," 
1Kings12:4 “Babako adatichitira pyavinga mbatimangirira goli-goli yakulemera pyakwanga m'khosi mwathu. Natenepo ngakhala iwe unachepesa basa imbaphata ife mwavinga, pontho mbulupisa goli-goli ili m'khosi mwathuyi, if tinati tikutumikire.”" 
1Kings12:5 Rehoboamu adatawira mbati, “Ndapiva, kwache banga ndokoni. Mbwenye pangagwanda nsiku zitatu mudze pontho.” Natenepo anthu ale adenda pyawo." 
1Kings12:6 Mfumu Rehoboamu adavunza nzeru kuna akulu-akulu, ale akhadatumikira babache Solomoni pandzidzi ukhali iye na moyo. Iye adavunza mbati, “Kadi penepa anthu ale angadza ndiatawire tani?”" 
1Kings12:7 Akulu-akulu ale adatawira mbati, “Ngakhala iwe unafuna kuti iwo akutumikire pontho kukuvera, penepo iwe wathema kuachitira pinakupempha iwo lero. Apange kuti unachitisa basawo kukhala yakukhonda nensa.”" 
1Kings12:8 Mbwenye Rehoboamu adakhonda kuvera pidampanga akulu-akulu pile mbavunza nzeru aphale anzache akhadakulirana iye pabodzi, pontho ale chinchino akhamtumikira." 
1Kings12:9 Iye adaavunza mbati, “Ndipangenimbo, ndiatawire tani anthu ale adandipempha kuti, ‘Tibulusire goli-goli m'khosi mwathu idatimangirira babakoyi?’ ”" 
1Kings12:10 Aphale anzache ale adatawira mbati, “Iwe wathema kuapanga tenepa: ‘Chala changa ching'onochi ntchikulu manungo pyakwanga kupiringana chuno cha babanga!’" 
1Kings12:11 Apange kuti, ‘Babanga adakuthukulisani goli-goli yakulemera, mbwenye ine ndinaichitisa kukhala yakulemera pyakwanga. Babanga adakukwapulani na mitswamu, mbwenye ine ndinakumenyani na mbalamatodya.’ ”" 
1Kings12:12 Pidagwanda nsiku zitatu Yeroboamu pabodzi pene na anthu onsene adenda pontho kuna Mfumu Rehoboamu ninga montho mukhadaapangira iye mule. 
1Kings12:13 Mfumu adatawira anthu ale mwaukali. Iye adakhonda kuvera nzeru zidampanga akulu-akulu zile," 
1Kings12:14 mbavera nzeru zidampanga aphale anzache zile mbalonga mbati, “Babanga adakuthukulisani goli-goli yakulemera, mbwenye ine ndinaichitisa kukhala yakulemera pyakwanga. Babanga adakukwapulani na mitswamu, mbwenye ine ndinakumenyani na mbalamatodya.”" 
1Kings12:15 Natenepo hadaikhe konta tayu pyakulonga pya anthu, thangwi penepi pidachitika na kufuna kwa MBUYA kuchitisa mafala adalonga iye kuna Yeroboamu mwana Nebati kudzera muna mprofeti Ahia wa ku Shilo kukwana-kwana." 
1Kings12:16 Pidaona Aisraele onsene kuti mfumu akhonda kuikha konta pidalonga iwo pile, adakhuwa mbati, “Ayi Davite tili nayenji ife? Ayi muna mwana Yese tinagumanamonji? Aisraele tonsene tendeni pyathu m'misa mwathu. Mulekeni Rehoboamu apiyang'anire yekha ene.” Natenepo Aisraele adapandukira," 
1Kings12:17 mbamsiya Rehoboamu kukhala mfumu wa anthu akhakhala m'nthemba ya Yuda ene ale basi. 
1Kings12:18 Mfumu Rehoboamu adatumiza Adoniramu, ule akhali mkadamu wakuyang'anira basa yakuphatwa mwakukhakhamiza, kwenda kuna Aisraele, mbwenye Aisraele adamponyera miyala mbafa. Kwache Mfumu Rehoboamu adachimbiza kukwira chingolo chache mbathawira ku Yerusalemu." 
1Kings12:19 Natenepo dzinza ya Israele njakupandukira kuna banja ya Davite mpakana lero. 
1Kings12:20 Pidava Aisraele kuti Yeroboamu akhadabwerera, adamtumira mphangwa kumchemeresa kumgumano, tenepo iwo adamuikha kukhala mfumu wa Israele. Mbwenye dzinza ya Yuda ene basi ndiye idasalira yakukhulupirika kuna banja ya Davite." 
1Kings12:21 Pidafika Rehoboamu mu Yerusalemu adachemeresa amuna a madzinza a Yuda na Benjemani. Onsene pabodzi pene akhalipo pikwi dzana na makumasere kuti akamenye nkhondo na Aisraele, towera ufumuwo ubwerere kuna Rehoboamu mwana Solomoni." 
1Kings12:22 Mbwenye Mulungu adapanga Shemaia, munthu wa Mulungu," 
1Kings12:23 kulonga kuna Rehoboamu mwana Solomoni mfumu wa Yuda na kuna dzinza yonsene ya Yuda na Benjemani pontho na kuna anthu onsene kuti," 
1Kings12:24 “Pyalonga MBUYA mphipi: Lekani kwenda kamenyana na abale anu Aisraele. Monsene ndokoni m'misa, thangwi penepi pyachitika na kufuna kwanga.” Natenepo iwo adavera mafala a MBUYA mbabwerera kumisa kwawo, ninga montho mukhadaapangira MBUYA." 
1Kings12:25 Mfumu Yeroboamu wa Israele adamanga pontho Shekemu, luwani m'dziko ya mapiri ya Eferemu mbakhala kweneko ndzidzi pang'ono basi. Kubuluka penepo adamanga pontho luwani ya Penuele." 
1Kings12:26 Iye adalonga yekha ene mbati, “Ninga mwakhalira pinthu chinchinomu, ngakhala anthu anga anaenda ku Yerusalemu mbakapereka nsembe kweneko kuna MBUYA, m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, anati abuluse mtimawo pana ine mbazungunukira kuna Mfumu Rehoboamu wa Yuda, tenepo iwo anandipha.”" 
1Kings12:27  
1Kings12:28 Pidamala iye vunza nzeru kuna mapungu ache, mfumuyo adasasanya na golidi mfanikizo wa ng'ombe zimuna ziwiri. Iye adalonga kuna anthu mbati, “Ntchinthu chakutopesa pyakwanga kuti imwe muende kafika ku Yerusalemu. Aisraele monsene yang'anani milungu yanu njishi, ile idakutsogolerani kubuluka m'dziko ya Iguputo.”" 
1Kings12:29 Mfanikizo wa mwanamphulu mbodzi adauikha mu Betele, unangombo adauikha mu Dani." 
1Kings12:30 Tenepo chinthu chidachitikachi chidasanduka pyakudawa; anthu akhaenda mpakana ku Dani kapembedza chinthu chidaimiswa chile. 
1Kings12:31 Yeroboamu adamanga nyumba zizinji pambuto zakupembedzerapo mbasankhula anyansembe kubulukira kuna anthu akusiyana-siyana, podi kwene kuti iwo hadabulukire m'banja ya unyansembe ya Levi tayu." 
1Kings12:32 Mfumu Yeroboamu adakhazikisa phwando pansiku yakhumi na chishanu ya mwezi wachisere, ninga phwando idachitika mu Yuda ile mbapereka nsembe paguwa yansembe. Penepi adapichita mu Betele kupereka nsembe kuna pinthu pyakusemwa pidasasanya iye pile. Iye adaikha anyansembe mu Betele m'mbuto zakupembedzerapo zikhadasasanya iye zile." 
1Kings12:33 Pansiku yakhumi na chishanu ya mwezi wachisere, mwezi udasankhula iye yekha ene ule, adapereka nsembe paguwa yansembe ikhadamanga iye mu Betele ile. Natenepo iye adakhazikisa phwando kuti Aisraele aichite mbaenda paguwa yansembe kapereka nsembe." 
1Kings13:1 Na kupangwa na MBUYA munthu wa Mulungu adadza ku Betele kubulukira ku Yuda pandzidzi ukhaimira Yeroboamu chifupi na guwa yansembe kupereka nsembe. 
1Kings13:2 Iye adakhuwa pikulu kupokanyisana na guwa yansembe mbalonga mafala akubulukira kuna MBUYA mbati, “Guwa yansembe! Guwa yansembe! Pyalonga MBUYA mphipi: mwana wamamuna dzinache Yosia anati abalwe m'banja ya Davite. Iye anapereka nsembe pana iwe anyansembe onsene akukhala m'mbuto zakupembedzerapo milungu, ale anapereka nsembe panowa, pontho magogodo a anthu anati apiswe pana iwe.”" 
1Kings13:3 Pansiku yeneyo munthu wa Mulungu adapereka chidzindikiro mbalonga mbati, “Chidzindikiro chalonga MBUYA kuti chinachitika ntchichi: guwa yansembeyo inati ididimuke kati na kati, pontho madothache anati akhuthukire pansi.”" 
1Kings13:4 Pidava Mfumu Yeroboamu pidalonga munthu wa Mulungu mwakupokanyisana na guwa yansembe ya pa Betele, adafuthulira dzanjache kubulukira pa guwa yansembe pale mbalonga mbati, “Mphateni!” Kwache dzanja ikhadafuthula iye ile kuthonya nayo munthu wa Mulungu, idalamaliratu mwakuti adachimwana kuibweza." 
1Kings13:5 Guwambo yansembe idadidimuka kati na kati, pontho dotha idakhuthukira pansi malingana na chidzindikiro chikhadapereka munthu wa Mulungu chile kuteweza mafala a MBUYA." 
1Kings13:6 Tenepo mfumu adalonga kuna munthu wa Mulungu ule mbati, “Ndipemphererembo kuna MBUYA Mulungu wako kuti dzanjanga ikhale ninga montho mwakale.” Natenepo munthu wa Mulungu ule adampempherera kuna MBUYA, tenepo dzanja ya mfumu idabwerera mbikhala ninga montho mwakale." 
1Kings13:7 Tenepo mfumu adalonga kuna munthu wa Mulungu ule mbati, “Tende pabodzi pene kumusa kwanga kuti ndikakupase pyakudya mbandikakupasa mfupo.”" 
1Kings13:8 Mbwenye munthu wa Mulungu ule adatawira mbati, “Podi kwene kuti mbudandipasa pyako theka ya pinthu pyako ine nee mbidatawira tayu basi kwenda nawe kumusa kwako, penu kadya, penu kamwa chinthu na chibodzi chene." 
1Kings13:9 Thangwi MBUYA adandipanga mbati, ‘Leka kadya penu kamwa chinthu na chibodzi chene, penu kubwerera na njira yontho idapita na iwe ile.’ ”" 
1Kings13:10 Natenepo iye adenda na njira inango mbakhonda kubwerera na njira yontho ikhadapita na iye kwenda ku Betele ile tayu. 
1Kings13:11 Pakhali mprofeti wakukalamba ule akhakhala ku Betele. Anache akhali na anthu kweneko ale, adadza dzampanga babawo pyonsene pidachita munthu wa Mulungu nsiku yeneyo. Iwo adampanga pontho babawo pinthu pidalonga munthu ule kuna mfumu." 
1Kings13:12 Babawo adavunza mbati, “Aenda na njira ipi?” Ana ale adamthonyeza njira ikhadakwata munthu wa Mulungu wakubulukira ku Yuda ule." 
1Kings13:13 Natenepo iye adalonga kuna anache ale mbati, “Ndiikhireni chakukhalira pabulu pangapo.” Pidamuikhira anawo chakukhalira pabulupo, iye adapakirapo" 
1Kings13:14 mbathamangira munthu wa Mulungu ule. Iye adamgumana ali khale pansi pa muti wamthundu mbavunza mbati, “Ayi munthu wa Mulungu akhadakubulukira ku Yuda ule ndiwepo?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ande, ndine pano.”" 
1Kings13:15 Natenepo mprofeti ule adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Tende pabodzi pene kumusa kwanga ukadye.”" 
1Kings13:16 Munthu wa Mulungu wa ku Yuda ule adatawira mbati, “Ine nkhabe bwerera m'nduli pabodzi pene nawe, penu kadya penu kamwa pabodzi pene na iwe pambuto pano tayu." 
1Kings13:17 Ine ndapangwa na MBUYA kuti, ‘Leka kadya penu kumwa kweneko penu kubwerera na njira yonthoyo idadza na iweyo.’ ”" 
1Kings13:18 Mprofeti wakukalamba wa ku Betele ule adatawira mbati, “Inembo ndine mprofeti ninga iwepo. Mngelo adadza kuna ine na mphangwa zakubulukira kuna MBUYA zakuti, ‘Ndoko ukambweze mbudze naye pabodzi kumusa kwako towera adye mkate na kumwa madzi.’ ” Kwache iye akhamnamiza." 
1Kings13:19 Natenepo munthu wa Mulungu wa ku Yuda adabwerera pabodzi na mprofeti ule mbakadya na kumwa m'nyumba mwache. 
1Kings13:20 Pikhali iwo pathebulu pale, MBUYA adalonga kuna mprofeti wakukalamba akhadabweza munthu wa Mulungu ule." 
1Kings13:21 Iye adakhuwa kuna munthu wa Mulungu wa ku Yuda ule mbati, “Pyalonga MBUYA mphipi: ‘Iwe wakhonda kuvera MBUYA pontho hudakoye matongero adakupasa MBUYA Mulungu wako tayu." 
1Kings13:22 Iwe udabwerera mbudya na kumwa pambuto idapangwa iwe kuti uleke kudya penu kumwa. Natenepo mtembo wako nkhabe ikhwa m'masiye a makolo ako tayu.’ ” 
1Kings13:23 Pidamala munthu wa Mulungu ule kudya na kumwa, mprofeti akhadambweza ule adakwata chakukhalira mbachimangirira pabulu kuti munthu wa Mulungu ule apakirepo." 
1Kings13:24 Pikhaenda munthu wa Mulungu ule, nkhalamu idagumanikana naye panjira mbimpha, tenepo mtembo wache udaponywa mumsewu uku bulu wache na nkhalamu pikhali dzololo m'khundu mwachemo." 
1Kings13:25 Anthu anango ale akhagwanda kwene pyawo adaona mtembowo uli gwenjere penepo, uku nkhalamu yaimira m'khundu mwache. Tenepo iwo adenda kapilonga mumzinda mukhakhala mprofeti wakukalamba ule." 
1Kings13:26 Pidava mprofeti akhadambweza paulendo wache ule penepi, adalonga mbati, “Weneyo ndi munthu wa Mulungu, ule adakhonda kuvera mafala a MBUYA, natenepo MBUYA ampereka kuna nkhalamu, ile idamphata mbimpha ninga montho mukhadamcheuzira MBUYA.”" 
1Kings13:27 Mprofeti ule adalonga kuna anache mbati, “Ndimangirirenimbo chakukhalira pabulupo.” Iwo adachitadi tenepo." 
1Kings13:28 Iye adalamuka kwenda mbakagumana mtembowo uli gwenjere mumsewu uku bulu na nkhalamu pyaimira m'khundu mwachemo. Nkhalamuyo hidadye mtembowo penu kukuwaza bulu ule tayu. 
1Kings13:29 Natenepo mprofeti ule adathukula mtembo wa munthu wa Mulungu ule mbabwerera nawo mumzinda kukhakhala iye kule, towera akamulire mbamuikha m'masiye." 
1Kings13:30 Kubuluka penepo iye adaikha mtembowo m'masiye ache ene, tenepo iwo adamulira mbati, “Mama ine, mbaleanga!”" 
1Kings13:31 Pidamala iwo kumuikha m'masiye, mprofeti ule adalonga kuna anache mbati, “Ndingafa, dzandiikheni m'masiye aikhwa munthu wa Mulunguyi; magogodo anga agone chifupi na magogodo ache." 
1Kings13:32 Thangwi mphangwa zidalonga iye kubulukira kuna MBUYA zakupokanyisana na guwa yansembe mu Betele, pontho nyumba za pambuto zakupembedzerapo mumzinda wa Samaria pinachitikadi.”" 
1Kings13:33 Podi kwene kuti pinthu penepi pidachitika Yeroboamu hadaleke makhaliro ache akuipa tayu, mbwenye adathimiza basi kusankhula anyansembe kuphata basa m'mbuto zakupembedzerapo kubulukira kuna anthu akusiyana-siyana. Munthu onsene wakufuna unyansembe akhamchitisa kukhala wakupambulika kuphata basa m'mbuto zakupembedzerapo." 
1Kings13:34 Kweneko ndiye kukhali kudawa kwa Yeroboamu, kule kudachitisa banjache na ufumu wache kugwa na kuvungika." 
1Kings14:1 Pandzidzi wenewo Abia mwana Yeroboamu adafeluka," 
1Kings14:2 tenepo Yeroboamu adalonga kuna mkazache mbati, “Upizimbaise wekha ene towera anthu aleke kukudzindikira kuti ndiwe mkazache Yeroboamu. Ungamala penepo uende ku Shilo. Ahia mprofeti ali kweneko, ule adandipanga kuti unakhala mfumu wa anthu enewa." 
1Kings14:3 Kwata mikate khumi, pitumbuwa pyakutapira na chitomba cha uchi mbuende napyo kuna iye. Iye anakupanga pinafuna dzachitikira mwanayi.”" 
1Kings14:4 Natenepo mkazache Yeroboamu adachitadi pidampanga mamunache mbaenda ku Shilo kunyumba kwa Ahia. Mbwenye Ahia hakhaona tayu thangwi ya kukalamba. 
1Kings14:5 Kwache MBUYA akhadapanga Ahia mbati, “Mkazache Yeroboamu akubwera kuna iwe kukuvunza pya mwanache, thangwi iye afeluka. Tenepo iwe wathema kumpanga pino-pino-pino. Mkaziyo angafika anapisangiza ninga munthu unango ene pyache.”" 
1Kings14:6 Tenepo sindzidzi Ahia nkhuva mdidi wa mkaziyo pamsuwo, adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Pitani muno mkazi Yeroboamu. Mwatani munapisangiza ninga munthu unango ene pyache? Ine ndina mphangwa zakutsukwalisa kuti ndikupangeni." 
1Kings14:7 Ndokoni mukampange Yeroboamu kuti pyalonga MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele mphipi: ‘Ine ndidakusankhula pakati pa anthu mbandikupitisa ufumu kutonga anthu anga Aisraele. 
1Kings14:8 Ine ndidapandula ufumu kuubulusa kuna banja ya Davite mbandiupereka kuna iwe, mbwenye iwe nee wakhala ninga nyabasanga Davite tayu, ule adakoya matongero anga mbaavera na mtimache onsene, kuchita pinthu pile pikhali pyakulungama pamaso panga." 
1Kings14:9 Iwe ndiye wanyanya kuchita pyakuipa kupiringana onsene ale akhalipo iwe mbudzati. Iwe wapisasanyira wekha ene milungu inango, na mifanikizo yakusasanywa na ntove. Iwe wandipasa nkhodolo mbundichitisa kukuzhangalira." 
1Kings14:10 “‘Na thangwi yeneyi ine ndinati ndidzese nyatwa m'banja ya Yeroboamu. Ndinati ndiphe mamuna onsene mpakana chimalisira bele, bitchu penu mtumbe. Ndinati ndivunge banja ya Yeroboamu ninga munthu akutswaira ulowa mpakana onsene amaliletu." 
1Kings14:11 Anambwa anati adye anthu a Yeroboamu, ale anafuna dzafera mumzindamu, pontho mbalame zinadya ale anafuna dzafera kumidzi. Ndalonga ndine, MBUYA!’" 
1Kings14:12 “Mbwenye kulonga pya iwe bwerera kumusa kwako. Kwache sindzidzi nkhuponda mumzindamo, mwanayo anati afe." 
1Kings14:13 Aisraele onsene anati amulire mbakamuikha m'masiye. Iye ndiye ene basi pakati pa anthu a m'banja ya Yeroboamu anafuna ikhwa m'masiye, thangwi ndiye ene basi m'banja ya Yeroboamu, ule MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele, akomerwa naye." 
1Kings14:14 MBUYA apisankhulira yekha ene mfumu kutonga Aisraele, ule anavunga banja yonsene ya Yeroboamu kutomera lero ene pano kwenda m'tsogolo." 
1Kings14:15 Tenepo MBUYA anati apamanthe Israele kumchitisa kutekenyeka ninga mtete mumkulo. Iye anati adule Aisraele kuabulusa m'dziko yadidi, idapereka iye kuna makolo awo mbaabalalisa kwenda kutali kupiringana mkulo wa Yufurate, thangwi iwo azhangalisa MBUYA pakusasanya adzimunthu a milungu Ashera." 
1Kings14:16 Natenepo iye anakhonda Israele thangwi ya kudawa kwachita Yeroboamu, pontho na kwachitisa iye Aisraele kudawa.”" 
1Kings14:17 Kubuluka penepo mkazache Yeroboamu adalamuka kubwerera ku Tiriza. Sindzidzi iye nkhuponda pamsuwo wa nyumbache, mphale ule adamalisika." 
1Kings14:18 Iwo adamuikha m'masiye, tenepo Aisraele onsene adamulira ninga montho mukhalongera MBUYA kudzera muna nyabasache mprofeti Ahia." 
1Kings14:19 Pinthu pinango pidachitika pandzidzi wakutonga kwa Yeroboamu, nkhondo zidamenya iye, na mule mukhatongera iye anthu, pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Israele." 
1Kings14:20 Yeroboamu adatonga Israele pyaka makumawiri na piwiri mbagonera mkono na kuikhwa m'masiye a makolo ache. Tenepo Nadabu mwanache ndiye adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache. 
1Kings14:21 Tenepo Rehoboamu mwana Solomoni akhali mfumu wa Yuda. Pikhapita iye ufumuwo akhali na pyaka makumanayi na chibodzi pyakubalwa. Iye adatonga pyaka khumi na pinomwe mu Yerusalemu, mzinda ukhadasankhula MBUYA pakati pa madzinza onsene a Israele kuti iye apembedzwemo ule. Mache akhali Naama wa Chiamoni." 
1Kings14:22 Anthu a ku Yuda adachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA. Na kudawa kudachita iwoko adalamusa ukali wa ntchanje wa MBUYA kupiringana kumzhangalisa kudachita makolo awo. 
1Kings14:23 Iwombo adapimangira okha ene mbuto zakupembedzerapo milungu, piguwa pyakupambulika, na adzimunthu a milungu Ashera pansonga ya phiri yonsene na patchinde pamuti onsene wakuvata." 
1Kings14:24 Chinthu chakunyansa pyakwanga ntchakuti pakhali akazi na amuna ene, ale akhaphata basa yauputa pambuto zakupembedzerapo milunguzi. Anthu a ku Yuda adachita pinthu pyonsene pyakuchitisa manyadzo, pinthu pikhachitwa na anthu ale akhadathamangiswa na MBUYA kuabulusa m'dzikomo, pikhapita Aisraele mwenemo ale." 
1Kings14:25 Chaka chachishanu Rehoboamu mbali mfumu, Mfumu Shishaki wa ku Iguputo adasosa Yerusalemu." 
1Kings14:26 Iye adakwata mfuma yonsene ya m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, pontho na ya m'nyumba yachifumu ene, kuthimizapo pyakugedera matswimo pyagolidi pikhadasasanya Solomoni pile." 
1Kings14:27 Kufuna kubwezera pinthu pidakwatwa pile, Mfumu Rehoboamu adasasanya pyakugedera matswimo pyankuwa mbapipereka m'manja mwa akadamu a anyakulondali misuwo ya nyumba yachifumu kuti apiyang'anire." 
1Kings14:28 Ndzidzi onsene ukhaenda mfumu ku Nyumba ya Mulungu, anyakulondali akhathukula pyakugedera matswimo pile; kubuluka penepo akhapibwezera kusubi ya anyakulondali." 
1Kings14:29 Pinango pyonsene pidachitika Rehoboamu mbali mfumu na pyonsene pidachita iye pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Yuda. 
1Kings14:30 Pandzidzi onsenewu Rehoboamu na Yeroboamu akhali pankhondo yakukhonda lekeza kumenyana unango na mwanzache. 
1Kings14:31 Rehoboamu, ule mache akhali Naama wa Chiamoni, adagonera mkono mbaikhwa m'masiye a makolo ache mumzinda wa Davite. Tenepo mwanache Abia adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache." 
1Kings15:1 Chaka chachikhumi na chisere Yeroboamu mwana Nebati mbali mfumu wa Israele, Abia adapita ufumu wa Yuda" 
1Kings15:2 mbatonga pyaka pitatu mu Yerusalemu. Mache akhali Maaka mwana wamkazi wa Abisalomu. 
1Kings15:3 Iye adachita pontho pyakudawa ninga pyontho pikhachita babache. Iye hadapereke mtimache onsene kuna MBUYA Mulungu ninga mudachitira kholo yache Davite tayu. 
1Kings15:4 Kwache na thangwi ya Davite, MBUYA Mulungu wache adapereka kuna Abia mwana wamamuna kupita m'mbuto mwache iye angafa, towera atonge Yerusalemu na kuutchinjiriza mwadidi." 
1Kings15:5 MBUYA adachita penepi thangwi Davite adachita pyakumkomera, pontho nkhabe matongero na abodzi ene adakhonda iye vera tayu, kupambula pidachita iye kuna Uria Mhiti." 
1Kings15:6 Nkhondo ile idatoma pakati pa Rehoboamu na Yeroboamu idathimiza kumenyeka mpakana moyo onsene wa Abia. 
1Kings15:7 Pinango pyonsene pidachitika Abia mbali mfumu na pyonsene pidachita iye pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Yuda. Pakhali nkhondo pakati pa Abia na Yeroboamu. 
1Kings15:8 Abia adagonera mkono mbaikhwa m'masiye a makolo ache mumzinda wa Davite. Tenepo mwanache Asa adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache. 
1Kings15:9 Chaka chamakumawiri, Mfumu Yeroboamu mwana Nebati mbali mfumu wa Israele, Asa adapita ufumu wa Yuda" 
1Kings15:10 mbatonga pyaka makumanayi na chibodzi mu Yerusalemu. Mbuyache akhali Maaka mwana wamkazi wa Abisalomu. 
1Kings15:11 Asa adachita pyakukomera MBUYA ninga montho mukhadachita kholo yache Davite. 
1Kings15:12 Iye adabulusa akazi na amuna ale akhaphata basa yauputa m'mbuto zakupembedzeramo milungu. Iye adabulusa pontho m'dzikomo mifanikizo yonsene yakusasanywa na makolo ache. 
1Kings15:13 Iye adabulusa pa chidzo chache cha ufumukazi mbuyache wamkazi Maaka, thangwi iye adachita chinthu chakudawika chikulu pakusasanya mfanikizo wa milungu Ashera. Asa adagwisa mfanikizo ule mbamala kuupandula, tenepo adaupisa moto m'phedi ya Kidroni." 
1Kings15:14 Podi kwene kuti Asa hadavunge mbuto zonsene zakupembedzerapo milungu tayu, iye adathimiza basi kukhala wakukhulupirika pamaso pa MBUYA moyo wache onsene." 
1Kings15:15 Iye adaikha m'Nyumba ya Mulungu pinthu pyonsene pidapambulira babache kuna Mulungu pabodzi pene na pyombo pyagolidi na siliva pidapambulirambo iye mwenechiro kuna Mulungu. 
1Kings15:16 Pakhali nkhondo pakati pa Mfumu Asa wa Yuda na Baasha mfumu wa Israele ndzidzi onsene wa kutonga kwawo. 
1Kings15:17 Baasha mfumu wa Israele adachita nkhondo na Yuda mbamanga mpanda kuzungulira Rama kukhondesa anthu kupita penu kubuluka mu Yuda. 
1Kings15:18 Tenepo Asa adakwata siliva na golidi onsene akhadasalira m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, pontho m'nyumba ya chifumu ule mbapitumira mathubu ache anango kwenda napyo kuna Damasiko kuna Mfumu Beni-Hadadi mfumu wa Aaramu mwana Tabirimoni, mdzukuluache Hezioni na mphangwa zakuti:" 
1Kings15:19 “Mbapakhale ushamwali pakati pa iwe na ine ninga mukhali ipyo pakati pa babanga na babako. Yang'ana, ndinatumiza kuna iwe siliva na golidi. Natenepo malisa ushamwaliako na Baasha mfumu wa ku Israele, towera iye aleke kumenyana nane.”" 
1Kings15:20 Beni-Hadadi adaphatizana na manyerezero a Mfumu Asa wa Yuda ale. Tenepo iye adatuma akadamu ankhondo na anyankhondo awo kachita nkhondo m'maluwani a Israele. Iwo adakunda Iyoni, Dani, Abele-Beti-Maaka, na nthemba ya chifupi na Nyanza ya Galilea, kuthimizapo nthemba yonsene ya Nafitali." 
1Kings15:21 Pidava Baasha pidachitika pile, adaleka kumanga mpanda kuzungulira Rama mbaenda ku Tiriza." 
1Kings15:22 Tenepo Mfumu Asa adatonga anthu onsene a Yuda, nee kupambulapo unango tayu kuti aende kathukula miyala na matabwa pikhaphatisa basa Baasha kumangira Rama pile. Mfumu Asa adaphatisambo basa pyonthopyo kumangira Geba m'nthemba ya Benjemani pontho na Mizipa." 
1Kings15:23 Pinango pyonsene pidachitika Asa mbali mfumu, na pyonsene pidachita iye mwakuwanga mtima, pontho na maluwani adamanga iye pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Yuda. Mbwenye dzinyalo yache idalamala mbali nkhalamba." 
1Kings15:24 Asa adagonera mkono mbaikhwa m'masiye a makolo ache mumzinda wa Davite. Tenepo mwanache Yehosafati adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache. 
1Kings15:25 Chaka chachiwiri, Asa mbali mfumu wa Yuda, Nadabu mwana Yeroboamu adapita ufumu wa Israele mbatonga pyaka piwiri." 
1Kings15:26 Ninga mudachitira babache, iyembo adachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA mbatsogolera Aisraele kuchita pyakudawa." 
1Kings15:27 Baasha mwana Ahia wa dzinza ya Isakara, adasasanya pyakupha Nadabu, tenepo adampha pa Gibetoni, luwani ya Afilisti, pandzidzi ukhaizungulira Nadabu na anyankhondo ache onsene kamenyana nayo." 
1Kings15:28 Baasha adapha Nadabu chaka chachitatu Asa mbali mfumu wa Yuda. Tenepo Baasha adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache. 
1Kings15:29 Sindzidzi iye nkhutoma kutonga, adapha banja yonsene ya Yeroboamu. Iye hadasiye na moyo munthu na mbodzi ene wa m'banja ya Yeroboamu tayu, mbwenye onsene adamaliratu kuavunga ninga montho mudalongera MBUYA kudzera muna nyabasache Ahia wa ku Shilo." 
1Kings15:30 Penepi pidachitika thangwi Yeroboamu adalamusa ukali wa MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele, na kudawa kwache pontho kuti iye adachitisa Aisraele onsene kudawambo." 
1Kings15:31 Pinango pyonsene pidachitika Nadabu mbali mfumu na pyonsene pidachita iye pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Israele. 
1Kings15:32 Pakati pa Asa mfumu wa Yuda na Baasha mfumu wa Israele pakhali nkhondo ndzidzi onsene wa kutonga kwawo. 
1Kings15:33 Chaka chachitatu Asa mbali mfumu wa Yuda, Baasha adapita ufumu wa Israele. Iye adatonga pyaka makumawiri na pinayi mbakhala mu Tiriza." 
1Kings15:34 Ninga mudachitira Mfumu Yeroboamu, iye adachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA mbachitisa Aisraele onsene kuchita pyakudawa." 
1Kings16:1 Kubuluka penepo MBUYA adalonga kudzera muna mprofeti Yehu mwana Hanani mphangwa zakupokanyisana na Baasha kuti," 
1Kings16:2 “Ine ndidakusankhula kukubulusa kufumbi mbandikuikha kukhala mfumu wa Israele, mbwenye iwe ukhateweza pontho pikhachita Yeroboamu mbuchitisa Aisraele kudawa, pontho udandizhangalisa thangwi ya pyakudawa pyawo." 
1Kings16:3 Natenepo ine ndili chifupi kuvunga iwepo, Baasha, na banjako ene, pontho ndinachitisa banjako kukhala ninga banja ya Yeroboamu mwana Nebati." 
1Kings16:4 Anambwa anadya mitembo ya anthu a Baasha ale anafuna dzafera mumzinda, pontho mbalame zinadya mitembo ya anafuna dzafera kumidzi ale.”" 
1Kings16:5 Pinango pyonsene pidachitika Baasha mbali mfumu na pyonsene pidachita iye mwakuwanga mtima pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Israele. 
1Kings16:6 Baasha adagonera mkono mbaikhwa m'masiye a makolo ache mu Tiriza. Tenepo mwanache Ela adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache. 
1Kings16:7 Kwache MBUYA adalonga kudzera muna mprofeti Yehu mwana Hanani kuna Baasha na banjache, thangwi ya pyakuipa pyonsene pikhadachita iye pamaso pa MBUYA kulamusa ukali wache na pinthu pidachita iye ninga montho mudachitira Mfumu Yeroboamu, pontho na thangwi yakuti banja yonsene ya Yeroboamu adamala kuivunga." 
1Kings16:8 Chaka chamakumawiri na chitanthatu Asa mbali mfumu wa Yuda, Ela mwana Baasha adapita ufumu wa Israele. Iye adatonga pyaka piwiri mbakhala mu Tiriza." 
1Kings16:9 Zimri, mbodzi wa mathubu ache, ule akhali mkadamu wa khundu inango ya anyakufambisa pingolo pyankhondo, adasasanya pyakumpha. Pandzidzi wenewo Ela akhali mu Tiriza kumwa m'nyumba ya Ariza nyakuyang'anira nyumba yachifumu mwakuti adaledzera." 
1Kings16:10 Tenepo Zimri adapita mwenemo mbampha. Chenecho chikhali chaka chamakumawiri na chinomwe Asa mbali mfumu wa Yuda. Zimri adapitisa yekha ene ufumu m'mbuto mwa Ela. 
1Kings16:11 Sindzidzi iye nkhukhala pampando wachifumu kutonga, adapha anthu onsene a m'banja ya Baasha. Iye hadasiye mamuna na mbodzi ene tayu, mbaleache penu shamwali ache tayu." 
1Kings16:12 Natenepo Zimri adapha anthu onsene a m'banja ya Baasha malingana na mafala adalonga MBUYA kupokanyisana na Baasha kudzera muna mprofeti Yehu. 
1Kings16:13 Na thangwi ya kupembedza kwawo milungu pontho thangwi ya pyakudawa pidachita Baasha na mwanache Ela mbachitisambo Israele kudawa, iwo adalamusa ukali wa MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele." 
1Kings16:14 Pinango pyonsene pidachitika Ela mbali mfumu na pyonsene pidachita iye pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Israele. 
1Kings16:15 Chaka chamakumawiri na chinomwe Asa mbali mfumu wa Yuda, Zimri adapita ufumu wa Israele mbatonga nsiku zinomwe mu Tiriza. Anyankhondo akhadamanga misasa chifupi na Gibetoni luwani ya Afilisti," 
1Kings16:16 tenepo pidava iwo kuti Zimri akhadapandukira mfumu mbampha, adasankhula Omri mkadamu wawo wa nkhondo kukhala mfumu wa Israele nsiku yonthoyo mumsasa mwawomo." 
1Kings16:17 Kubuluka penepo Omri pabodzi pene na anyankhondo ache onsene adabuluka ku Gibetoni mbaizungulira kamenyana na Tiriza. 
1Kings16:18 Pidaona Zimri kuti mzinda ule wapokoserwa, adapita m'subi ya m'bwaloletu ya nyumbache yachifumu mbapisa moto nyumbayo iye mbali mwenemo, natenepo adafa." 
1Kings16:19 Penepi pidachitika thangwi ya pyakuipa pidachita iye. Ninga mudachitira Yeroboamu iyembo adachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA mbachitisa Aisraele kudawa. 
1Kings16:20 Pinango pyonsene pidachitika Zimri mbali mfumu na kupandukira kudachita iye kule pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Israele. 
1Kings16:21 Kubuluka penepo Aisraele adagawanikana pawiri; khundu inango ikhafuna Tibini mwana Ginati kuti akhale mfumu, khundu inangomboyo ikhafuna Omri kuti akhale mfumu." 
1Kings16:22 Mbwenye anthu akhatewera Omri ale adakunda anthu akhatewera Tibini mwana Ginati ale mwakuti Tibini adafa, Omri mbapita ufumu." 
1Kings16:23 Chaka chamakumatatu na chibodzi Asa mbali mfumu wa Yuda, Omri adapita ufumu wa Israele mbatonga pyaka khumi na piwiri. Pyaka pitanthatu pya ipyo adatonga mu Tiriza." 
1Kings16:24 Tenepo iye adagula phiri ya Samaria kubulukira kuna munthu unango dzinache Shemeri na kobiri zasiliva pikwa pitanthatu mbamangapo mzinda paphiripo, tenepo adauthula Samaria kukumbuka Shemeri dzina ya mwenechiro phiri wakutoma." 
1Kings16:25 Mbwenye Omri adachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA mbadawa pikulu pene kupiringana onsene adatonga iye mbadzati ale. 
1Kings16:26 Ninga mudachitira Yeroboamu mwana Nebati iye adadawa mbachitisa Aisraele kudawambo mwakuti iwo adalamusa ukali wa MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele, thangwi ya kupembedza kwawo milungu." 
1Kings16:27 Pinango pyonsene pidachitika Omri mbali mfumu, na kupikwanisa kwache pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Israele." 
1Kings16:28 Omri adagonera mkono mbaikhwa m'masiye a makolo ache mu Samaria. Tenepo Ahabu mwanache adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache. 
1Kings16:29 Chaka chamakumatatu na pisere Asa mbali mfumu wa Yuda, Ahabu mwana Omri adapita ufumu wa Israele mbatonga mu Samaria pyaka makumawiri na piwiri." 
1Kings16:30 Ahabu mwana Omri adachita pyakuipa pyakwanga pamaso pa MBUYA kupiringana onsene akhatonga iye mbadzati ale. 
1Kings16:31 Kuna iye, kudawa ninga kudachita Mfumu Yeroboamu kukhali kwakukwana tayu, mbwenye adathimiza basi mbasemba Yezebele mwana wamkazi wa Mfumu Etabaala wa ku Sidoni mbapembedza milungu Baala." 
1Kings16:32 Iye adamanga nyumba yakupembedzeramo Baala mu Samaria mbasasanya guwa yansembe m'nyumbamo. 
1Kings16:33 Iye adasasanya pontho dzimunthu wa milungu Ashera, mbachita pizinji kulamusa ukali wa MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele, kupiringana mafumu anango onsene a Israele, ale akhalipo iye mbadzati." 
1Kings16:34 Pandzidzi ukhatonga iye Hiele wa ku Betele adamanga pontho mzinda wa Yeriko. Tenepo kutewezana na pinthu pidalongerwatu na MBUYA kudzera muna Yoswa mwana Nuni, mwana wautombo wa Hiele dzinache Abiramu adafa pandzidzi udamanga iye maziko a Yeriko, pontho mwanache wakumalisira dzinache Segubu adafa pandzidzi udaikha iye misuwo ya mpanda." 
1Kings17:1 Mprofeti unango dzinache Elia wa Chitishibi m'nthemba ya Gileadi adalonga kuna Mfumu Ahabu mbati, “Ndinadumbira na dzina ya MBUYA, Mulungu wamoyo wa Israele, ambatumikira ine ule, kuti pyaka piwiri penu pitatu pinadzapi nee panakhala mvula penu bume tayu kufikirana nditonge kuti pigwe.”" 
1Kings17:2 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Elia mbati," 
1Kings17:3 “Buluka pambuto pano mbuende kumabulukiro dzuwa mbukabisale kweneko chifupi na mkulo wa Keriti, ule uli kumabulukiro dzuwa a Yorodani." 
1Kings17:4 Mkulo wenewo unakupasa madzi akumwa pontho ndatonga makhungubwe kuti adze kuti akupase pyakudya kweneko.” 
1Kings17:5 Elia adavera pidampanga MBUYA mbaenda kakhala kumkulo wa Keriti kumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani. 
1Kings17:6 Tenepo iye akhamwa mumkulo mule, makhungubwembo akhamdzesera mikate pontho nyama machibese na mawulo onsene." 
1Kings17:7 Pidagwanda ndzidzi ene mkulo ule udauma thangwi ya kusowa kwa mvula. 
1Kings17:8 Kubuluka penepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Elia mbati," 
1Kings17:9 “Lamuka kabodzi kene mbuende kuluwani ya Zarefati chifupi na Sidoni mbukakhale kweneko. Ine ndatonga mamfelwa, ule ambakhala mwenemo kakudyesa.”" 
1Kings17:10 Natenepo Elia adenda ku Zarefati; pikhadza iye chifupi na msuwo wa luwani ile adaona mamfelwa akulokotera nkhuni. Iye adalonga kuna mkaziyo mbati, “Ngandipasembo madzi akumwa.”" 
1Kings17:11 Tenepo pikhaenda mkazi ule katunga madzi akumwa, Elia adakhuwa mbati, “Ngandipase pontho mikate pang'ono.”" 
1Kings17:12 Mkazi ule adatawira mbati, “Ine ndinadumbira pamaso pa MBUYA Mulungu wanu wa moyo kuti nkhabe mkate na ubodzi ene tayu. Pina ine m'thenthe mphiufa pang'ono pyakukwana kwene m'manjamu basi na dontho ibodzi ya mafuta m'buyawo. Ine ndadza kuno kuti ndilokotere nkhuni kwenda nazo kumusa kuti ndikaphike pyakuchepa pina inepyo, towera ine na mwananga tidye mbatifa pyathu na njala thangwi mphyakudya pyakumalisa.”" 
1Kings17:13 Elia adalonga kuna mkaziyo mbati, “Leka swipa mtima, ndoko kasasanye pyakudya pyaako, kwache chakutoma ndisasanyire kamkate mbudze nako kuna ine kuno. Kubuluka penepo uphike pyakusalapyo kuti mudye iwe na mwanako." 
1Kings17:14 Thangwi MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele alonga kuti, ‘Ufa nkhabe dzamala tayu m'thenthe, pontho mafuta nkhabe dzamala tayu m'buyawo kufikirana nsiku inafuna MBUYA dzavumbisa mvula m'dziko muno.’ ”" 
1Kings17:15 Kubuluka penepo mkazi ule adenda mbakachita pidampanga Elia pile, tenepo onsene utatuawo akhali na phoso yakukwana kudya nsiku zizinji." 
1Kings17:16 Ninga montho mukhadalongera MBUYA kudzera muna Elia, ufa hudamaledi tayu m'thenthe mule, pontho mafuta hadamalemo tayu m'buyawo mule." 
1Kings17:17 Pidagwanda ndzidzi ene mwana mamfelwa ule adafeluka, tenepo kufeluka kule kudanyanya pakumalisira pache mbafa." 
1Kings17:18 Mkaziyo adalonga kuna Elia mbati, “Imwe munthu wa Mulungu mphyanji pyachita imwe kuna inepi? Ayi mwadza kuno dzabulusa pakwecha kudawa kwanga mbamuchitisa mwananga kufa?”" 
1Kings17:19 Elia adalonga mbati, “Ndipase kuno mwanakoyo.” Iye adathukula mwanayo m'manja mwache mbaenda naye kusubi yapadzulu kukhakhala iye kule mbamgonesa patalimba." 
1Kings17:20 Iye adalira mwakugaluza fala mbati, “MBUYA Mulungu wanga, thangwi yache ninji mwachita pinthu pyakugoswapi kuna mamfelwayi. Iye ngwakukoma mtima pyakwanga mwakuti akundidyesa, apo lero mukumphera basi mwanache?”" 
1Kings17:21 Tenepo Elia adapumira mwana ule katatu mbapemphera mbati, “MBUYA Mulungu wanga bwezerani moyo wa mwanayi.”" 
1Kings17:22 MBUYA adava kulira kwa Elia; mwanayo adatoma pontho kupuma mbakhala pyadidi. 
1Kings17:23 Elia adakwata mwanayo kutchitha naye pansi mbambwezera kuna mache mbalonga mbati, “Ngayang'ana mwanako ana moyo.”" 
1Kings17:24 Mkaziyo adatawira mbati, “Chinchino ndapidziwadi kuti ndimwe munthu wa Mulungu, pontho kuti MBUYA ambalongadi kudzera muna imwe!”" 
1Kings18:1 Pidagwanda ndzidzi ukulu ene chaka chachitatu cha njala ikulu, MBUYA adalonga kuna Elia mbati, “Ndoko ukaonekere pamaso pa Mfumu Ahabu, tenepo ine ndinavumbisa mvula m'dzikomo.”" 
1Kings18:2 Tenepo Elia adautoma ulendo wakwenda kuna Mfumu Ahabu. Njala mu Samaria idafika pakundendeya," 
1Kings18:3 natenepo Ahabu adachemeresa Obadia, ule akhali nyakuyang'anira nyumba yachifumu. Obadia akhali munthu wakupipereka kupembedza MBUYA," 
1Kings18:4 pontho pandzidzi udapha Yezebele maprofeti a MBUYA, Obadia adakwata maprofeti dzana mbaabisa kunkhwimba ziwiri, anthu makumashanu kada nkhwimba, mbaapasa pyakudya na madzi." 
1Kings18:5 Ahabu adalonga kuna Obadia mbati, “Tende tikayang'ane mphuno za madzi na m'maphedi monsene, tikaone ngakhala tinagumanamo maudzu akukwana kudyesa akavalo na mabulu athu towera aleke kufa. Mwinango tinakwanisa kupulumusa nyama zathu zonsene.”" 
1Kings18:6 Tenepo iwo adaphatizana makhundu a dziko adathema iwo kufambira; Ahabu adendera kukhundu kwache, Obadia kukhundu inango." 
1Kings18:7 Pikhali Obadia panjira, Elia adagumanikana naye. Obadia adamdzindikira mbalamba pamaso pache mbalonga mbati, “Ayi ndimwedi Elia mbuyanga ule?”" 
1Kings18:8 Iye adatawira mbati, “Ande, ndine pano. Ndoko kampange mbuyako mfumu kuti Elia ali kuno.”" 
1Kings18:9 Obadia adatawira mbati, “Kadi ine ndadawanji kuti imwe mupereke nyabasanune m'manja mwa Ahabu kuti andiphe?" 
1Kings18:10 Ndinadumbira na dzina ya MBUYA Mulungu wanu wamoyo kuti nkhabe nthemba penu dziko yasiya mfumu okhonda tumizako munthu kakusaka-sakani tayu. Tenepo ndzidzi onsene nthemba penu dziko ingalonga kuti hidakuoneni tayu, Mfumu Ahabu akhaadumbirisa ngakhala mphyakuonadi kuti hidakuoneni tayu." 
1Kings18:11 Apo lero mukundipanga kuti ndiende kuna mbuyanga kampanga kuti, ‘Elia ali kuno?’" 
1Kings18:12 Kunafuna kukuendesani Mzimu wa MBUYA ine sinadziwako tayu ine ndingakusiyani pano. Tenepo ngakhala ine ndinaenda kuna Ahabu kampanga mbakhonda kukugumanani pano, iye anati andiphe. Kwache ine nyabasanu ndimbapembedza MBUYA kutomera uphaleanga." 
1Kings18:13 Ayi imwe mbuyanga mudapive tayu pidachita ine ndzidzi ukhapha Yezebele maprofeti a MBUYA? Ine ndidabisa maprofeti a MBUYA dzana kunkhwimba ziwiri, anthu makumashanu kada nkhwimba, mbandiapasa pyakudya na madzi?" 
1Kings18:14 Tenepo lero mukundipanga kuti ndiende kuna mfumu kalonga kuti, ‘Elia ali kuno.’ Iye anati andiphe!”" 
1Kings18:15 Elia adalonga mbati, “Ndinadumbira na dzina ya MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ambatumikira ine ule kuti, ‘Lero ndinati ndikaonekere pamaso pa Ahabu.’ ”" 
1Kings18:16 Natenepo Obadia adenda kaonana na Mfumu Ahabu mbampanga pya Elia, tenepo Ahabu adenda kagumanikana naye." 
1Kings18:17 Pidaona Ahabu Elia, adalonga mbati, “Ayi iwe ndiwe Elia nyakuonesa nyatwa Israele ule?”" 
1Kings18:18 Elia adatawira mbati, “Ine sidaonesa nyatwa Israele tayu; mbwenye imwe na banjanu ndiye mwaonesa nyatwa Israele. Imwe mwakhonda kuvera matongero a MBUYA mbamupembedza milungu Baala." 
1Kings18:19 Natenepo chemeresani anthu a kunthemba zonsene za Israele kuti akagumanikane nane paphiri ya Karimele. Pontho mudze na maprofeti a Baala madzana manayi na makumashanu, pontho maprofeti madzana manayi a milungu Ashera, ambadya pathebulu ya Yezebele ale.”" 
1Kings18:20 Natenepo Ahabu adatumiza mphangwa mu Israele monsene kuti maprofeti onsene agumanyikane paphiri ya Karimele. 
1Kings18:21 Elia adenda pamaso pa anthu mbalonga mbati, “Kadi imwe munaleka lini kupenuka-penuka? Ngakhala MBUYA ndi Mulungu mtewereni; mbwenye ngakhala Baala ndiye mulungu mtewereni.” Mbwenye anthu hadalonge chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu." 
1Kings18:22 Tenepo Elia adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Mprofeti wa MBUYA asala ndine ene basi, mbwenye Baala ana maprofeti madzana manayi na makumashanu." 
1Kings18:23 Tidzesereni ng'ombe zimuna ziwiri. Apaseni mwayi wakusankhula ng'ombe inafuna iwo, pontho aigwande-gwande m'mapindi mbaiikha pankhuni, kwache aleke phatisapo moto wakuotchera nyamayo. Ine ndinapha ng'ombe inangoyo mbandisanjika pankhuni mbandikhonda phatisapo moto." 
1Kings18:24 Kubuluka penepo maprofeti a Baala apemphere kuna milungu yawo, inembo ndinati ndipemphere kuna MBUYA, tenepo ule anafuna kutawira pakutumiza moto, weneyo ndiye Mulungu.” Anthu onsene adalonga mbati, “Pyalonga iwepi mphyadidi.”" 
1Kings18:25 Elia adalonga kuna maprofeti a Baala mbati, “Sankhulani ng'ombe inafuna imwe mbamutome ndimwe kupha na kuisasanya thangwi mulipo azinji. Mungamala penepo mupemphere kuna milungu yanu, kwache lekani phatisapo moto.”" 
1Kings18:26 Natenepo iwo adakwata ng'ombe mbaipha kuisasanya mwadidi. Kubuluka penepo iwo adapemphera kuna Baala, milungu yawo, kutomera machibese mpakana masikati mbakhuwa mbati, “Baala! Ngatitawirembo ife.” Mbwenye kukhali lukutu noo, nee mbodzi adatawira tayu. Iwo adavina-vina mwakuzungulira guwa yansembe idasasanya iwo ile." 
1Kings18:27 Tenepo na masikati Elia adatoma kuasedegula mbati, “Wangisani kukhuwako! Iye ndi milungu! Mwinango akunyerezera pinthu pinango, penu akupambuka, penu ali paulendo. Mwinango ali m'chitulo, tenepo athema kulamuswa.”" 
1Kings18:28 Natenepo iwo adakhuwa mwakugaluza fala mbapicheka-cheka na matalasada pontho madipa ninga mwa mtemo wawo mpakana chiropa kubuluka. 
1Kings18:29 Masikati a nsiku yeneyo adagwanda, tenepo iwo adathimiza basi kubwebweta kufikirana ndzidzi wakupereka nsembe na mawulo. Kwache kukhali lukutu noo basi, nee mbodzi adatawira tayu, nee mbodzi adaiikha konta tayu." 
1Kings18:30 Kubuluka penepo Elia adalonga kuna anthu onsene ale mbati, “Bwerani kuna ine kuno.” Iwo adadzadi kukhali iye kule, tenepo iye adasasanya pontho guwa yansembe ya MBUYA ikhadagomolwa ile." 
1Kings18:31 Elia adakwata miyala khumi na miwiri, ubodzi kada dzinza malingana na ana a Yakobo, ule akhadalongwa na MBUYA kuti, “Dzinako inakhala Israele.”" 
1Kings18:32 Iye adamanga guwa yansembe ya MBUYA pakuphatisa basa miyala ile mbakumba mgelo kuzungulira guwa wakukwanisa kupita madzi akukwana bekete ibodzi. 
1Kings18:33 Iye adasanjikiza mwadidi nkhuni paguwapo. Kubuluka penepo adapha ng'ombe inango ile mbaigwanda m'mapindi-mapindi, tenepo adaisanjika pankhuni pale. Iye adalonga kuna anthu ale mbati, “Dzazani madzi pitomba pyanu pikulu-pikulupi mbamuakhuthule pansembe na nkhuni zenezo.” Iwo adachitadi tenepo." 
1Kings18:34 Tenepo iye adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Chitani pontho kachiwiri.” Iwo adachitadi kachiwiri. Iye adalonga pontho kachitatu mbati, “Khuthuliranipo kachitatu.” Tenepo iwo adakhuthuliradi kachitatu." 
1Kings18:35 Madzi adatayikira paguwa ponsene pale mbadzaza na mumgelo mwene mule. 
1Kings18:36 Pidakwana ndzidzi wakupereka nsembe mprofeti Elia adenda kutsogolo mbapemphera mbati, “MBUYA, Mulungu wa Abrahamu, Isake, Israele, lero pichitiseni mwekha ene kudziwika kuti ndimwe Mulungu wa Israele, pontho kuti ine ndine nyabasanu, pontho kuti ndachita pyonsenepi na utongi wanu." 
1Kings18:37 Nditawireni MBUYA, nditawireni towera anthuwa apidziwe kuti imwe, MBUYA, ndimwe Mulungu, pontho kuti imwe mukuabweza kudza pontho kuna imwe.”" 
1Kings18:38 Tenepo moto wa MBUYA udagwa kudzulu mbupisa nsembe ile, nkhuni, miyala, mataka na kuumisa madzi akhali mumgelo ale." 
1Kings18:39 Pidaona anthu ale penepi adalamba mbakhuwa mbati, “MBUYA ndi Mulungu! MBUYA ndi Mulungu!”" 
1Kings18:40 Tenepo Elia adapanga anthu ale mbati, “Phatani maprofeti onsene a Baala. Lekani lekerera mbodzi wa iwo kuthawa!” Tenepo iwo adaphatadi maprofeti a Baala ale. Elia adaakwata mbadza nawo ku phedi ya Kishoni mbaapha onsene pakuchita kuagwanda makhosi." 
1Kings18:41 Natenepo Elia adalonga kuna Mfumu Ahabu mbati, “Ndokoni mukadye na kumwa thangwi ndikuva kuula kwa mvula ikulu.”" 
1Kings18:42 Tenepo Ahabu adenda kadya na kumwa kwene, mbwenye Elia adakwira pansonga ya phiri ya Karimele. Iye adatchulima mbaikha msolo wache pakati pa mabondo ache." 
1Kings18:43 Elia adalonga kuna nyabasache mbati, “Ndoko kayang'ane kubara.” Nyabasa ule adenda kayang'ana; tenepo iye adalonga mbati, “Nkhabeko chinthu na chibodzi chene.” Elia adatuma nyabasache ule kanomwe kuti aende kayang'ana basi." 
1Kings18:44 Tenepo ulendo wachinomwewo nyabasa wa Elia adalonga mbati, “Ndaona kwene pimakole ninga dzanja ya munthu pikupuchira kubulukira m'nyanza.” Natenepo Elia adalonga mbati, “Ndoko kapange Ahabu kuti, ‘Chimbizani kumanga chingolo chanu mutchithe gopesera mvula inakufungirani.’ ”" 
1Kings18:45 Sindzidzi, thambo idagudumirwa na makole akuswipa, mphepo idagundika tenepo mvula yakugoswa idadza. Ahabu adathamanga kwenda ku Yezereele." 
1Kings18:46 Mphamvu za MBUYA zidadza pana Elia, tenepo iye adapitisira mwadidi mayalache kumanga bande mbathamanga pyakwanga kupiringana Ahabu mpakana ku Yezereele." 
1Kings19:1 Kubuluka penepo Mfumu Ahabu adenda kampanga mkazache Yezebele pyonsene pikhadachita Elia pontho na mule mukhadaphera iye maprofeti onsene a Baala na talasada. 
1Kings19:2 Natenepo Yezebele adatumiza mphangwa kuna Elia kumpanga kuti, “Milungu mbindiphe pyayo, ngakhala mangwana ndzidzi ninga uno sinakuphambo tayu ninga montho mwaphera iwe maprofeti ale.”" 
1Kings19:3 Elia adachita mantha mbathawisa moyo wache. Pidafika iye pa Beeresheba mu Yuda, adasiya nyabasache kweneko," 
1Kings19:4 iye mbaenda pyache m'thando yatchetcha ulendo wa nsiku ibodzi. Iye adafika pamuti wabwazi mbakhala patchinde pachepo mbapemphera kuti afe pyache. Iye adalonga mbati, “MBUYA, pyanyanya! Kwatani moyo wanga; ine si wadidi maka kupiringana makolo anga tayu.”" 
1Kings19:5 Tenepo pansi pa mutiwo iye adagona pansi mbagoneratu chitulo. Kabodzi kene mngelo adamphata mbalonga mbati, “Lamuka udye.”" 
1Kings19:6 Iye adamwaza maso mbaona mkate kumisolo kwache wakuchita kuotchiwa pamakala, pontho na mulinga wa madzi. Iye adadya na kumwa, kubuluka penepo adagona pontho chitulo." 
1Kings19:7 Mngelo wa MBUYA adadza pontho mbamulamusa kachiwiri kache mbalonga mbati, “Lamuka udye thangwi ulendo unafuna iwe kwenda unakhala wakunensa kuna iwe.”" 
1Kings19:8 Natenepo iye adalamuka mbadya na kumwa. Tenepo na mphamvu zikhali na iye thangwi ya kudya na kumwa kule, adafamba nsiku makumanayi mosiku na masikati mpakana adafika ku Sinai phiri ya Mulungu." 
1Kings19:9 Kweneko iye adapita m'dzimba mbagonamo mosiku enewo. Vumbu-vumbu MBUYA adalonga kuna Elia mbati, “Ayi Elia ukutani kuno?”" 
1Kings19:10 Elia adatawira mbati, “Ine ndina phinga pyakwanga kutumikira imwe MBUYA, Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene, mbwenye Aisraele adakhonda chiverano chidasasanya imwe nawo. Iwo adagomola maguwa ansembe mbapha maprofeti anu na talasada mwakuti ndasala ndine ene basi, pontho iwo akuyesa-yesa basi kuti andiphe.”" 
1Kings19:11 MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Buluka kunja mbukaimire paphiri pamaso pa MBUYA thangwi MBUYA ali chifupi kugwanda na penepo.” Kubuluka penepo mphepo ikulu pontho yakugoswa idagwa mbing'amba mapiri na kugulung'undisa miyala pamaso pa MBUYA, kwache MBUYA hakhali mwenemo tayu. Pidagwanda mphepoyo padadza chiteke-teke kwache MBUYA hakhali m'chiteke-tekemo tayu." 
1Kings19:12 Pidagwanda chiteke-teke padadza moto, kwache MBUYA hakhali m'motomo tayu. Pidagwanda moto padaveka fala yakulonga chapansipansi." 
1Kings19:13 Pidava Elia falayo adampsampsika nkhope yache na chakufinika chache, tenepo adabuluka panja mbakaimira pamsuwo wa dzimba ile. Tenepo fala idamvunza kuti, “Ayi Elia ukutani kuno?”" 
1Kings19:14 Iye adatawira mbati, “Ine ndina phinga pyakwanga kutumikira imwe MBUYA Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene, mbwenye Aisraele adakhonda chiverano chidasasanya imwe nawo. Iwo adagomola maguwa ansembe mbapha maprofeti anu na talasada mwakuti ndasala ndine ene basi, kwache iwo akuyesa-yesa basi kuti andiphe.”" 
1Kings19:15 MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Bwerera m'nduli na njira yontho idadza na iwe mbuende kuthando yatchetcha chifupi na Damasiko. Ungafika kweneko dzoza Hazaele kukhala mfumu wa Aramu." 
1Kings19:16 Dzoza pontho Yehu mwana Nimishi kukhala mfumu wa Israele. Dzoza pontho Elisha mwana Shafati wa ku Abele-Mehola kukhala mprofeti m'mbuto mwako. 
1Kings19:17 Yehu anapha munthu onsene wakupulumuka m'manja mwa Hazaele, pontho Elisha anapha munthu onsene wakupulumuka m'manja mwa Yehu." 
1Kings19:18 Kwache ndinakoya anthu pikwi pinomwe mu Israele, ale akuti mabondo awo hadagodamire milungu Baala penu milomo yawo kumpsompsona mfanikizo wache tayu.”" 
1Kings19:19 Tenepo Elia adabuluka pambutopo mbagumanikana na Elisha mwana Shafati. Iye akhatipula munda na phaza yakukweyiwa na ng'ombe makumawiri na zinayi, pagoli ibodzi pakhali ng'ombe ziwiri, tenepo Elisha akhafambisa ng'ombe ziwiri zakumalisa. Elia adenda kuna iye mbaponya chakufinika chache pana iye." 
1Kings19:20 Elisha adasiya ng'ombe zile mbathamangira Elia mbalonga mbati, “Ndidikhireni pang'ono nditome kampsompsona baba na mama kugonekana nawo; ndingamala penepo tinati tiende pabodzi pene.” Elia adatawira mbati, “Ande, bwerera! Ine sinakukhondesa tayu.”" 
1Kings19:21 Tenepo Elisha adabuluka pakhali Elia pale mbabwerera. Iye adakwata ng'ombe zache zikhalima na iye zile mbazipha. Iye adayesa nkhuni magoli-goli ale kuphikira nyamayo, tenepo adaipereka kuna anthu mbadya. Kubuluka penepo adenda pyache kutewera Elia mbasanduka mwanamuvi wache." 
1Kings20:1 Beni-Hadadi mfumu wa Aramu adagumanyisa anyankhondo ache onsene pabodzi pene na mafumu makumatatu na awiri, pontho na akavalo awo na pingolo pyawo pene. Iye adenda mbakazungulira Samaria mbamenya naye nkhondo." 
1Kings20:2 Iye adatuma anyamphangwa mumzinda kuna Ahabu mfumu wa Israele mbalonga mbati, “Beni-Hadadi alonga kuti," 
1Kings20:3 ‘Siliva na golidi pina iwepyo mphyanga; akazako na anako ene akubalika makawo mbanga.’ ” 
1Kings20:4 Mfumu wa Israele adatawira mbati, “Ande, ninga montho mwalongera imwe mbuyanga mfumu, ine na pyonsene pina ine mphyanudi.”" 
1Kings20:5 Anyamphangwa ale adadza pontho mbalonga mbati, “Beni-Hadadi alonga kuti, ‘Pakutoma ine ndidatumiza mphangwa kuti undipase siliva, golidi, akazako na anako ene." 
1Kings20:6 Mbwenye mangwana ndzidzi ninga ontho uno ndinatuma mathubu anga kudzayang'ana m'nyumba ya chifumu pontho na nyumba za mathubu ako ene. Tenepo chinthu chonsene chakufunika kuna iwe, iwo anachikwata.’ ”" 
1Kings20:7 Mfumu wa Israele adachemeresa akulu-akulu a m'dzikomo mbalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ngayang'anani pinachita munthuyi kufuna kutionesa nyatwa! Ndzidzi udatumiza iye mphangwa kundipokosera akazanga, ananga, siliva na golidi wanga, ine sidamkhondese tayu.”" 
1Kings20:8 Akulu-akulu pabodzi pene na anthu onsene adatawira mbati, “Lekani kumvera weneyu penu kuphatizana na pinafuna iyepyo.”" 
1Kings20:9 Natenepo Ahabu adatawira pidalonga Beni-Hadadi pile mbati, “Ndokoni mukampange mbuyanga mfumu kuti, ‘Ine nyabasanu ndinachita pyonsene pidalonga imwe pakutoma, mbwenye pyalonga imwe chinchinopi ine nkhabe dzakwanisa kupichita tayu.’ ” Anyamphangwa ale adalamuka mbaenda kalonga pidatawira mfumu ule kuna Beni-Hadadi." 
1Kings20:10 Tenepo Beni-Hadadi adatumiza mphangwa zinango kuna Ahabu mbati, “Milungu mbindiphe pyawo ngakhala ine sinadza na amunanga onsene dzavunga Samaria mwakuti dothache nkhabe dzala na m'manja mwene mwa amunanga tayu.”" 
1Kings20:11 Mfumu Ahabu adatawira mbati, “Kampangeni Beni-Hadadi kuti nyankhondo chadi-chadi hambagaya nkhondo idzati mala tayu, mbwenye ingamala.”" 
1Kings20:12 Beni-Hadadi adava mphangwa zenezi mwenemo iye na mafumu anango adaphatizana na iye kukhala gulu ibodzi ale, akumwa m'makumbi mwawo, tenepo adatonga anyankhondo ache mbati, “Sasanyikani kamenya nkhondo.” Natenepo iwo adasasanyika kasosa mzinda ule." 
1Kings20:13 Na ndzidzi onthowo mprofeti adadza kuna Ahabu mfumu wa Israele mbalonga mbati, “MBUYA alonga kuti, ‘Ayi gulu yonsene ya anyankhondo ukuiona? Gulu yonseneyi ndinati ndiikhe m'manja mwako lero, tenepo unapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA.’ ”" 
1Kings20:14 Ahabu adavunza mbati, “Apo mbani anafuna kutsogolera nkhondo yeneyi?” Mprofeti ule adatawira mbati, “MBUYA alonga kuti, ‘Aphale akuphatira basa atsanthemba ndiye anafuna dzatsogolera.’ ” Mfumu adavunza pontho mbati, “Apo mbani anafuna kutoma kamenya pankhondo yeneyi?” Mprofeti ule adatawira mbati, “Iwe ene ndiye unafuna kutoma.”" 
1Kings20:15 Natenepo mfumu adachemeresa aphale akuphatira basa atsanthemba, onsene akhalipo madzana mawiri na makumatatu na awiri. Kubuluka penepo adagumanyisa amuna anango a Aisraele; onsene pabodzi pene akhalipo pikwi pinomwe." 
1Kings20:16 Tenepo iwo adalamuka na masikati dzuwa ikuswa miti uku Beni-Hadadi pabodzi pene na mafumu makumatatu na awiri, ale akhadaphatizana na iye kukhala gulu ibodzi ali m'makumbi mwawo kuledzera." 
1Kings20:17 Aphale akuphatira basa atsanthemba ndiye adatoma kwenda. Tenepo anyakuzonda akhadatumiza Beni-Hadadi ale adampanga mbati, “Amuna akudza kubulukira ku Samaria.”" 
1Kings20:18 Tenepo Beni-Hadadi adatawira mbati, “Ngakhala iwo adzera mtendere, aphateni amoyo; podi ngakhala adzera nkhondo aphateni amoyo basi.”" 
1Kings20:19 Aphale akuphatira basa atsanthemba ale adabuluka mumzinda mule mbatsogolera gulu ya anyankhondo," 
1Kings20:20 tenepo munthu onsene adapha munthu adamenyana na iyeyo. Pandzidzi wenewo Aaramu adathawa, tenepo Aisraele adaathamangisa. Mbwenye Beni-Hadadi mfumu wa Aramu adathawa pakavalo pabodzi pene na amunache anango akupakira akavalo." 
1Kings20:21 Mfumu wa Israele adathimiza kumenya nkhondo mbaphata anyakupakira akavalo na pingolo, pontho adavunga pikulu pene Aaramu." 
1Kings20:22 Pidamala nkhondoyo mprofeti adadza kuna mfumu wa Israele mbalonga mbati, “Kasasanye mwadidi gulu yako ya nkhondo, towera ikhale yamphamvu, pontho uone chinthu chakuthema kuchita thangwi chaka chamangwana ndzidzi wakuphwitha kwa miti mfumu wa Aramu anati adze pontho dzakusosa.”" 
1Kings20:23 Akadamu a mfumu wa Aramu adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Milungu ya Israele ndi milungu ya mapiri. Ndi thangwi yache adatikunda. Mbwenye ngakhala tinamenyana nawo paphedi pambuto yakusowa mapiri, tinati tiakunde. Chitani ipi:" 
1Kings20:24 Bulusani utongi onsene m'manja mwa mafumu onsene mbamuuikhe m'manja mwa akadamu a nkhondo. 
1Kings20:25 Musasanye pontho gulu ya nkhondo kukhala ninga yontho idavungika ile, towera nyakavalo amenyane na nyakavalo mnzache, nyachingolo amenyane na nyachingolo mnzache. Natenepo tinakwanisa kumenyana na Aisraele pambuto zakusowa mapiri kuti tikwanise kuakunda.” Mfumu adatawira pidalonga iwo pile mbachita ninga montho mudapangirwa iye." 
1Kings20:26 Ndzidzi wakuphwitha miti Beni-Hadadi adagumanyisa Aaramu mbaenda ku Afeki kasosa Aisraele. 
1Kings20:27 Pidagumanyiswa Aisraele mbapaswa pyakufunikira adalamuka kwenda kamenyana na Aaramu. Aisraele adamanga misasawo mwakuyang'anisana nawo mbakhala ninga mikumbi miwiri ing'ono-ing'ono ya mbuzi, mwenemo Aaramu adzaza mbuto yonseneyo." 
1Kings20:28 Mprofeti adadza mbalonga kuna mfumu wa Israele mbati, “MBUYA alonga kuti, ‘Na thangwi yakuti Aaramu akunyerezera kuti ine ndine Mulungu wa mapiri okha basi nee Mulungu wa maphedi ene tayu, ndinati ndiikhe gulu yonsene m'manja mwako, tenepo unadziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA.’ ”" 
1Kings20:29 Iwo adakhala pamisasa yawo nsiku zinomwe kuyang'anizana unango na mwanzache, tenepo pansiku yachinomwe nkhondo idaotoka. Aisraele adapha anyankhondo a Chiaramu akufamba na miyendo pikwi dzana ibodzi nsiku yeneyo." 
1Kings20:30 Anango onsene adathawira mumzinda wa Afeki, kule kudagwa fufu ya mpanda wa mzinda kugwera anango a iwo pikwi makumawiri na anomwe. Tenepo Mfumu Beni-Hadadi adathawira mumzinda mule mbakabisala m'nyumba m'subi ya m'bwaloletu." 
1Kings20:31 Akadamu a Beni-Hadadi adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ife tava kuti mafumu a Israele ngansisi pyakwanga. Apo tendeni kuna Mfumu wa Israele uku tavala masakha m'chuno mwathu na nkhambala kupyangirira m'khosi mwathu. Mwinango anakulekani khonda kukuphani.”" 
1Kings20:32 Kubuluka penepo iwo adavala masakha m'chuno mwawo na kupyangirira nkhambala m'khosi mwawo mbaenda kuna mfumu wa Israele mbakalonga mbati, “Nyabasanu Beni-Hadadi alonga kuti: ‘Ndaphata miyendo lekani kundipha.’ ” Mfumu wa Israele adatawira mbati, “Ayi iye na lero ana moyo basi? Iye ndi mbaleanga!”" 
1Kings20:33 Tenepo amuna ale adachiyesa chinthu cha mwayi mbatawira kabodzi kene kuphatisa basa mafalache onthowo mbalonga mbati, “Ande, mbaleanu Beni-Hadadi.” Tenepo Mfumu Ahabu adalonga mbati, “Ndokoni mukamkwate.” Pidadza Beni-Hadadi, Ahabu adamkwizika m'chingolo mwache." 
1Kings20:34 Beni-Hadadi adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ndinati ndibwezere kuna imwe mizinda idakwata babanga m'manja mwa babanu. Imwe munakwanisa kukhazikisa misikanu mu Damasiko ninga mudachitira babanga mu Samaria.” Ahabu adalonga mbati, “Thangwi ya pinthu pyalonga iwepi, ndinati ndikusudzule.” Natenepo uwiriawo adachita chiverano, tenepo Ahabu adamuleka kwenda pyache." 
1Kings20:35 Na kupangwa na MBUYA mbodzi wa m'gulu ya maprofeti adalonga kuna mwanzache mbati, “Ndikhamwadze.” Mbwenye mwanzache ule adakhonda." 
1Kings20:36 Tenepo mprofeti ule adalonga mbati, “Na thangwi yakuti iwe wakhonda kuvera MBUYA, sindzidzi iwe nkhundisiya pano, nkhalamu inakupha.” Pidenda munthu ule nkhalamu idagumanikana naye mbimpha." 
1Kings20:37 Mprofeti ule adagumanikana na munthu unango mbampanga mbati, “Ndaphata miyendo, ndikhamwadze.” Natenepo iye adamkhamwadza mbamkuwaza." 
1Kings20:38 Kubuluka penepo mprofeti ule adabuluka mbakaimira m'nkhwerekwete mwa njira kudikhira mfumu. Iye adapibisa yekha ene pakumanga chitambayi kunkhope kwache. 
1Kings20:39 Pikhagwanda mfumu ule, mprofeti adakhuwa kuna iye mbati, “Ine nyabasanu ndikhadenda kunkhondo yakugoswa, tenepo nyankhondo unango adadza kuna ine na munthu wakuphatwa mbalonga mbati, ‘Londali munthuyu. Ngakhala iye anathawa, unapagali moyo wako penu kobiri zakukwana masiliva pikwi pitatu.’" 
1Kings20:40 Tenepo pikhali ine nyabasanu yakali-yakali, munthuyo adathawa.” Mfumu adatawira mbati, “Iwe wakonwa pyako, pontho wathema kupagali pyathema iwe kupagalipyo.”" 
1Kings20:41 Mprofeti ule adachimbiza kukunundula chitambayi chikhadamanga iye kunkhope kwache chile, tenepo mfumu wa Israele adamdzindikira kuti akhali mbodzi wa maprofeti." 
1Kings20:42 Mprofetiyo adalonga kuna mfumu mbati, “MBUYA alonga kuti, ‘Iwe wasudzula munthu ule akhadatonga ine kuti athema kuphiwa. Natenepo iwe wathema kupagali moyo wako thangwi ya moyo wache, pontho anthu ako thangwi ya anthu ache.’ ”" 
1Kings20:43 Mwakupinda pontho mwakuzhangali mfumu wa Israele adenda kunyumba kwache ku Samaria. 
1Kings21:1 Pidagwanda ndzidzi ukulu ene chinthu chinango chidachitika. Naboti wa ku Yezereele akhali na munda wamfesa mu Yezereele chifupi na nyumba yachifumu ya Ahabu wa ku Samaria. 
1Kings21:2 Ahabu adalonga kuna Naboti mbati, “Nditawirisembo kukwata mundako kuti ukhale dimbanga ya masamba thangwi uli chifupi na nyumbanga yachifumu. Ine ndinati ndikupase munda unango wadidi kuchinjisana na munda wenewu, penu ngakhala unafuna kobiri ndinati ndikupase kontache yonsene ya munda wenewu.”" 
1Kings21:3 Mbwenye Naboti adatawira mbati, “Ninga MBUYA wamoyo ine nkhabe kukupasani tayu chinthu chidandisiyira makolo anga.”" 
1Kings21:4 Natenepo Ahabu adenda kumusa kwache wakupinda pontho wakuzhangali thangwi Naboti wa ku Yezereele adalonga mbati, “Sinakupasa tayu chinthu chidandisiyira makolo anga.” Iye adagona patalimba pache mbayang'ana kufufu pontho mbakhonda pyakudya." 
1Kings21:5 Yezebele mkazache adapita kusubiko mbamvunza mbati, “Mwatani mwapinda? Mwatani munakhonda kudya?”" 
1Kings21:6 Iye adamtawira mbati, “Ine ndidalonga kuna Naboti kuti, ‘Ndigulisembo mundako penu ngakhala unafuna ndikupase munda unango kuchinjisana na wenewu!’ Mbwenye iye adanditawira mbati, ‘Ine sinakupasa tayu mundanga.’ ”" 
1Kings21:7 Yezebele mkazache adalonga mbati, “Ayi mwenemu ndiye mwathema kuchitira mfumu wa Israele? Lamukani mudye! Galamukani. Ine ndinati ndikukwatireni munda wa Naboti.”" 
1Kings21:8 Natenepo iye adalemba makalata na dzina ya Ahabu mbadindapo chidindo cha Ahabu, tenepo adaatumiza kuna akulu-akulu na anyakulemedzwa, ale akhakhala mumzinda mukhakhala Naboti mule." 
1Kings21:9 M'makalatamo iye adalembamo kuti: “Lalikirani pya nsiku yakupimana kudya mbamugumanyise anthu pabodzi pene, tenepo Naboti mumkhazike pampando wachilemedzo." 
1Kings21:10 Khazikani mwakuyang'anisana naye anthu awiri akuipa kuti ampambizire kuti iye atemberera Mulungu na mfumu ene. Kubuluka penepo mumkwate kwenda naye kunja kwa mzinda. Kweneko mumphe na miyala.” 
1Kings21:11 Natenepo akulu-akulu na anyakulemedzwa ale akhakhala mumzinda wa Naboti adachita ninga montho mukhadaapangira Yezebele m'kalata ikhadaalembera iye. 
1Kings21:12 Kubuluka penepo iwo adalalika pya nsiku yakupimana kudya mbakhazika Naboti pampando wachilemedzo. 
1Kings21:13 Tenepo anthu awiri akuipa adadza mbakhala mwakuyang'anisana na Naboti mbalonga mafala akumpambizira pamaso pa anthu mbati, “Naboti atemberera Mulungu pontho na mfumu ene.” Natenepo adamkwata mbaenda naye kunja kwa mzinda. Kweneko adampha na miyala." 
1Kings21:14 Kubuluka penepo akulu-akulu adatumiza mphangwa kuna Yezebele mbati, “Naboti aphiwa na miyala.”" 
1Kings21:15 Sindzidzi Yezebele nkhuva kuti Naboti aphiwa, adalonga kuna Ahabu mbati, “Lamukani mukakwate munda wamfesa wa Naboti, ule udakukhondesani iye kuugula. Iye hana moyove tayu, mbwenye afa.”" 
1Kings21:16 Pidava Ahabu kuti Naboti afa adalamuka mbakwata munda wamfesa wa Naboti kukhala wache ene. 
1Kings21:17 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Elia wa Chitishibi mbati," 
1Kings21:18 “Ndoko kagumanikane na Ahabu mfumu wa Israele ule ambakhala mu Samaria. Chinchino pano iye ali m'munda wa Naboti kule kwaenda iye kuti akaukwate. 
1Kings21:19 Kampange kuti pyalonga ine MBUYA mphipi: ‘Iwe wapha munthu, apo unafuna pontho ukwate chinthu chache?’ Ulonge pontho kuna iye kuti, ‘Pyalonga MBUYA mphipi: Pambuto padanyanguta anambwa chiropa cha Naboti, pontho-ponthopo anambwa anati anyangutembo chiropa chako.’ ”" 
1Kings21:20 Ahabu adalonga kuna Elia mbati, “Iwe, nyamalwanga, wandigumana!” Elia adatawira mbati, “Ande, ndakugumanani, thangwi imwe mwapipereka mwekha ene kuchita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA." 
1Kings21:21 MBUYA alonga kuti, ‘Ndinati ndidzese muliri pana iwe. Ndinati nditswaire pidzukulu pyako na kupha chimalisira bele chachimuna chonsene mu Israele, bitchu penu mtumbe." 
1Kings21:22 Ndinati ndichitise anthu a pabanja pako kukhala ninga ale a pabanja ya Yeroboamu mwana Nebati, pontho na ale a pabanja ya Baasha mwana Ahia, thangwi iwe wandichitisa kuzhangali pontho wachitisa Israele kudawa.’" 
1Kings21:23 Kulonga pya Yezebele MBUYA alonga kuti anambwa anati adye mtembo wa Yezebele chifupi na mpanda ya Yezereele. 
1Kings21:24 Anambwa anati adye anthu a Ahabu ale anafuna dzafera mumzinda pontho mbalame zinati zidye anafuna dzafera m'minda ale.” 
1Kings21:25 Chipo nee padzati khala munthu ninga Ahabu tayu wakupipereka yekha ene kuchita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA mwakuchita kupangwa na Yezebele mkazache. 
1Kings21:26 Iye adachita pinthu pyakunyansa pyakwanga pakupembedza milungu ninga ya Aamori, ale adathamangisa MBUYA pamaso pa Aisraele." 
1Kings21:27 Pidava Ahabu mafala enewa, adang'amba nguwo zache mbavala masakha pontho adapimana kudya. Iye akhagonera masakha mbafamba-famba mwakukhumata." 
1Kings21:28 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Elia wa Chitishibi mbati," 
1Kings21:29 “Ayi iwe wadziwa mule mwapichepesera Ahabu pamaso panga? Na thangwi yakuti iye apichepesa yekha ene, ine sinadzesa muliri walonga ine ule pandzidzi una iye na moyo tayu, mbwenye ndinati ndiudzese kubanja kwache pandzidzi unafuna dzatonga mwanache.”" 
1Kings22:1 Pakati pa Aisraele na Aaramu pakhali mtendere pyaka pitatu. 
1Kings22:2 Mbwenye chaka chachitatu Yehosafati mfumu wa Yuda adenda kaona Ahabu mfumu wa Israele. 
1Kings22:3 Mfumu wa Ahabu adavunza mathubu ache mbati, “Ayi imwe nkhabe dziwa tayu kuti nthemba ya Ramoti-Gileadi njathu? Mbwenye ife tikulira khala kwene nee funa kuikwata pontho tayu kubulukira m'manja mwa mfumu wa Aramu.”" 
1Kings22:4 Natenepo Ahabu adavunza Yehosafati mbati, “Ayi mfumu, munaenda nane kamenya nkhondo na nthemba ya Ramoti-Gileadi?” Yehosafati adatawira mbati, “Ngakhala iwe wasasanyika na ine enembo ndasasanyika; chibodzi-bodzi anyankhondo anga, na akavalo anga ene." 
1Kings22:5 Mbwenye chakutoma tende tivunze nzeru kuna MBUYA.” 
1Kings22:6 Tenepo Ahabu adachemeresa maprofeti nenene madzana manayi mbaavunza mbati, “Ayi ine ndiende kamenyana na Ramoti-Gileadi penu tayu?” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Ndokoni, thangwi Mbuya anakuchitisani kukunda.”" 
1Kings22:7 Mbwenye Yehosafati adavunza mbati, “Ayi pano nkhabe mprofeti unango tayu kuti tinakwanisa kuvunza nzeru kuna MBUYA kudzera muna iye?”" 
1Kings22:8 Ahabu adatawira mbati, “Pasala mbodzi, weneyu ndi Mikaia mwana Imila. Kwache ine ndimbamzonda thangwi chipo iye hadzati kundipangambo chinthu chadidi tayu, mbwenye chakuipa ndzidzi onsene.” Yehosafati adatawira mbati, “Mfumu nee athema kulonga mafala ninga enewa tayu.”" 
1Kings22:9 Natenepo Ahabu adachemeresa mbodzi wa mathubu ache mbampanga kuti akwate Mikaia mwana Imila kabodzi kene. 
1Kings22:10 Uku avala mikhanjo yawo yachifumu, mafumu awiri ale adakhala pamipando yawo yachifumu pambuwa chifupiletu na msuwo wa mpanda wa Samaria, tenepo maprofeti onsene ale akhalonga mphangwa zauprofeti pamaso pawo." 
1Kings22:11 Tenepo Zedekia mwana Kenaana akhadasasanya nyanga zasimbi mbalonga mbati, “MBUYA alonga mbati, ‘Na ipi munati mumenyane na Aaramu mpakana kuakunda.’ ”" 
1Kings22:12 Maprofeti onsene akhalonga chibodzi-bodzi. Iwo akhalonga mbati, “Ndokoni mukasose mzinda wa Ramoti-Gileadi, pontho munaukunda, thangwi MBUYA anakuchitisani kukunda.”" 
1Kings22:13 Munthu akhadatumwa kakwata Mikaia ule adalonga kuna Mikaia mbati, “Ngayang'ana maprofeti anango onsene alonga kuti mfumu anati akakunde, tenepo iwe mafalako akaphatizane na pyalonga iwopyo mbukalonge mwakukomera mfumu.”" 
1Kings22:14 Mbwenye Mikaia adalonga mbati, “Ine ndinadumbira pamaso pa MBUYA wamoyo kuti ndinakampanga chinthu chinafuna kundipanga MBUYA.”" 
1Kings22:15 Pidafika Mikaia, mfumu adamvunza mbati, “Mikaia, ayi ife tiende kamenya nkhondo na Ramoti-Gileadi, penu tayu?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ndokoni pontho munati mukakunde, thangwi MBUYA anaupereka m'manja mwanu.”" 
1Kings22:16 Mfumu adalonga kuna Mikaia mbati, “Ndikudumbirise kangasi, kuti undipange pyakuonadi pyokhokha pyalonga MBUYA?”" 
1Kings22:17 Mikaia adatawira mbati, “Ndidaona Aisraele onsene akubalalika paphiri ninga mabira akusowa makabuswa, tenepo MBUYA adalonga mbati, ‘Anthu awa nkhabe mbuyawo. Munthu onsene mulekeni pyache aende kwawo na mtendere.’ ”" 
1Kings22:18 Mfumu wa Israele adalonga kuna Yehosafati mbati, “Ayi sidakupangeni tayu kuti munthu weneyu chipo adzati kundipanga pinthu pyadidi tayu, mbwenye pyakuipa pyokhokha?”" 
1Kings22:19 Mikaia adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Ngaveserani pinalonga MBUYA! Ine ndidaona MBUYA akhala pampando wache wachifumu kudzulu, mwenemo angelo ache onsene aimira nkhundu mwache." 
1Kings22:20 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga mbati, ‘Mbani anafuna pyakunyengeza Ahabu kuti aende kamenya nkhondo na Ramoti-Gileadi kuti afere konthoko?’ Mngelo unango adalonga pyachembo, unango adalongambo pyachembo."
