1Kings22:21 Pakumalisira pache mzimu udadza pamaso pa MBUYA mbalonga kuti, ‘Ine ndinati ndikamnyengeze Ahabu.’" 
1Kings22:22 MBUYA adavunza mbati, ‘Unakamnyengeza tani?’ Mzimuwo udatawira kuti, ‘Ine ndinati ndiende kweneko mbandikakhala mzimu wakunama m'kanwa mwa maprofeti ache onsene.’ MBUYA adalonga mbati, ‘Ande, iwe unati ukamnyengezedi. Tenepo ndoko ukachite penepyo.’ ”" 
1Kings22:23 Tenepo Mikaia adamalisa kulonga mbati, “Penepi pyachitikadi. MBUYA adaikha mzimu wakunama m'kanwa mwa maprofeti anu onsenewa, thangwi MBUYA akhazikisa kuvungika pana imwe.”" 
1Kings22:24 Penepo Zedekia mwana Kenaana adenda pakhali Mikaia pale mbamgasa mbama. Iye adavunza mbati, “Mzimu wa MBUYA wabuluka tani muna ine mbukalonga na iwe?”" 
1Kings22:25 Mikaia adatawira mbati, “Iwe unapidziwa pansiku inafuna iwe dzabisala m'subi ya m'bwaloletu.”" 
1Kings22:26 Mfumu wa Israele adalonga mbati, “Mkwateni Mikaia mumbweze kuna Amoni, mkulu wa boma mumzinda, na kuna Yoasi mwana mfumu" 
1Kings22:27 mbamukalonge kuti, ‘Mfumu alonga kuti aikhwe m'perezo, pontho lekani kumpasa chinthu chinango, mbwenye mkate na madzi ene basi kufikirana ndibwereko mwadidi.’ ”" 
1Kings22:28 Mikaia adalonga mbati, “Ngakhala munabwerako mwadidi, penepo MBUYA hadalonge kudzera muna ine tayu.” Tenepo iye adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Anthu monsene muli pano phatani pyalonga inepi.”" 
1Kings22:29 Tenepo mfumu wa Israele na Yehosafati mfumu wa Yuda adalamuka kwenda kasosa Ramoti-Gileadi. 
1Kings22:30 Ahabu adalonga kuna Yehosafati mbati, “Ine ndinapizimbaisa mbandimenya nkhondo ninga mbodzi wa anyankhondo, mbwenye iwe wathema kuvala mkhanjo wako wachifumu.” Natenepo mfumu wa Israele adapizimbaisa mbaenda kamenya nkhondo." 
1Kings22:31 Mfumu wa Aaramu akhadatonga akadamu ache ankhondo makumatatu na awiri akufambisa pingolo nee kamenyana na munthu ene pyache tayu, mbwenye mfumu wa Israele ene basi." 
1Kings22:32 Akadamu a pingolo pile pidaona iwo Yehosafati adanyerezera kuti akhali mfumu wa Israele. Natenepo adazungunuka kuti amenyane naye. Mbwenye pidakhuwa Yehosafati," 
1Kings22:33 akadamu a pingolo ale adaona kuti iye hakhali mfumu wa Israele tayu, tenepo adaleka kumthamangisa." 
1Kings22:34 Mbwenye munthu unango adaponya tswimo yache nyamponye-mponye mbalasa mfumu Ahabu m'phindopindo mwa nguwo zache za nkhondo. Mfumu adapanga nyakufambisa chingolo chache mbati, “Zungunusa chingolo kundibulusa kunkhondoyi thangwi ndalaswa!”" 
1Kings22:35 Pansiku yeneyo nkhondo idakaka pyakwanga, tenepo mfumu adakhazikwa m'chingolo mwache kuyang'anisana na Aaramu. Chiropa chikhabuluka padalaswa iye pale chikhachucha mpakana pansi pa chingolo chile mwakuti mosiku wenewo adafa." 
1Kings22:36 Pikhadoka kunja mphangwa zidaveka pakati pa anyankhondo onsene kuti, “Munthu onsene mbaende kuluwani kwache; munthu onsene mbabwerere m'mudzi.”" 
1Kings22:37 Natenepo mfumu adafa. Mtembo wache udadzeswa ku Samaria, pontho adaikhwa m'masiye kweneko." 
1Kings22:38 Iwo adatsuka chingolo chache na madzi pathawale mu Samaria, kule kukhasamba maputa, tenepo anambwa adanyanguta chiropa chache ninga montho mukhadalongera MBUYA." 
1Kings22:39 Kulonga pya pinthu pinango pidachitika Ahabu mbali mfumu, pyonsene pidachita iye, nyumba yachifumu idamanga iye yakuthemeserwa na nyanga za nzowu, pontho na mizinda idamanga iye pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Israele." 
1Kings22:40 Ahabu adagonera mkono, tenepo Ahazia mwanache adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache." 
1Kings22:41 Yehosafati mwana Asa adapita ufumu wa Yuda, chaka chachinayi Ahabu mbali mfumu wa Israele." 
1Kings22:42 Yehosafati akhali na pyaka makumatatu na pishanu pyakubalwa mukhapita iye ufumu. Tenepo iye adatonga mu Yerusalemu pyaka makumawiri na pishanu. Mache akhali Azuba mwana Shilihi. 
1Kings22:43 Ninga mudachitira Asa babache, iye adachitambo pinthu pyakulungama pamaso pa MBUYA; kwache mbuto zakupembedzerapo milungu nee zidavungwe tayu, tenepo anthu adathimiza basi kwenda kweneko kapereka nsembe na kafukiza pyakununkhira." 
1Kings22:44 Yehosafati akhalimbo pamtendere na mfumu wa Israele. 
1Kings22:45 Pinango pyonsene pidachita Yehosafati, kuwanga kwache mtima pontho nkhondo zidamenya iye, pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Yuda." 
1Kings22:46 Iye adabulusa m'dziko monsene maputa achimuna na achikazi ene akuphata basa m'mbuto zakupembedzeramo milungu, ale adasalira basi pandzidzi udafa Asa babache." 
1Kings22:47 Mu Edomu mukhali nkhabe mfumu tayu, mbwenye ikhatongwa na thubu wakuchita kusankhulwa na mfumu wa Yuda." 
1Kings22:48 Yehosafati adasasanya miyadiya mikulu-mikulu kwenda pabara ku Tarisisi kuti ikathukule golidi ku Ofiri. Mbwenye hidafikeko tayu thangwi idamala panduka na mabimbi pa Ezioni-Geberi. 
1Kings22:49 Penepo Ahazia mwana Ahabu adalonga kuna Yehosafati kuti amunache aende pabodzi na amuna a Yehosafati pamiyadiya mikulu-mikulu yakoyi, mbwenye Yehosafati adakhonda." 
1Kings22:50 Tenepo Yehosafati adagonera mkono mbaikhwa m'masiye a makolo ache mumzinda wa Davite babache. Natenepo Yehoramu mwanache adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache. 
1Kings22:51 Ahazia mwana Ahabu adapita ufumu wa Israele chaka chakhumi na chinomwe Yehosafati mbali mfumu wa Yuda mbakhala mu Samaria; iye adatonga kwene Israele pyaka piwiri basi. 
1Kings22:52 Iye adachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA, thangwi iye akhateweza pikhachita babache na mache, pontho na pikhachita Yeroboamu mwana Nebati, ule adachitisa Aisraele kudawa." 
1Kings22:53 Iye adatumikira na kupembedza milungu Baala, natenepo adazhangalisa MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele ninga montho mudachitira babache." 
2Kings1:1 Pidafa Mfumu Ahabu, dziko ya Moabu idapandukira Israele." 
2Kings1:2 Mfumu Ahazia adagwa kubulukira pa khonde ya nyumbache yapadzulu mu Samaria mbakuwazika pikulu pene, natenepo iye adatuma anyamphangwa kavunza nzeru kuna Baala-Zebubu, milungu ya mzinda wa Ekroni, towera akaone ngakhala kukuwazika kweneku anawanga nako penu tayu." 
2Kings1:3 Mbwenye mngelo wa MBUYA adalonga kuna Elia wa Chitishibi mbati, “Ndoko ukagumanikane na anyamphangwa a mfumu wa Samaria mbukaavunze kuti, ‘Ayi mu Israele nkhabemo Mulungu kuti imwe mukavunze nzeru kuna Baala-Zebubu, milungu ya Ekroni?’" 
2Kings1:4 Natenepo pyalonga MBUYA kuna mfumu mphipi: ‘Iwe hunalamukave patalimba panagona iwepo tayu. Iwe unati ufedi!’ ” Tenepo Elia adalamuka mbaenda pyache. 
2Kings1:5 Pidabwerera anyamphangwa ale kuna mfumu, mfumuyo adavunza mbati, “Mwatani mwabwerera?”" 
2Kings1:6 Iwo adatawira kuti, “Munthu unango adadza dzagumanikana nafe mbatipanga kuti, ‘Bwererani kuna mfumu akhadakutumani ule na kumpanga kuti, “MBUYA alonga kuti: Ayi mu Israele nkhabemo Mulungu tayu kuti imwe mukavunze nzeru kuna Baala-Zebubu, milungu ya Ekroni? Natenepo imwe nkhabe dzalamuka patalimba panagona imwepo tayu. Imwe munati mufe!” ’ ”" 
2Kings1:7 Mfumu adavunza mbati, “Munthu wache adadza dzagumanikana namwe mbakupangani pinthu penepiyo ngwakuoneka tani?”" 
2Kings1:8 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Iye adavala chakufinika cha ubweya, na bande ya nthembe m'chuno mwache.” Mfumu adatawira mbati, “Weneyo ndi Elia wa Chitishibi.”" 
2Kings1:9 Kubuluka penepo mfumu adatuma mkadamu na anthu ache makumashanu kuna Elia. Mkadamu ule adenda kuna Elia ule akhakhala pansonga ya phiri. Tenepo pidamgumana iwo, adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Munthu wa Mulungu, mfumu alonga kuti utchithe.”" 
2Kings1:10 Elia adatawira mkadamu ule mbati, “Ngakhala ndinedi munthu wa Mulungu moto mbugwe kubulukira kudzulu pontho mbuvunge iwe pabodzi pene na amunako makumashunuwo!” Natenepo moto udagwadi kubulukira kudzulu mbuvunga mkadamu na amunache makumashanu ene ale." 
2Kings1:11 Kubuluka penepo mfumu adatuma pontho mkadamu na amunache makumashanu kuna Elia. Mkadamu ule adalonga kuna Elia mbati, “Munthu wa Mulungu, mfumu alonga kuti uchimbize kutchitha!”" 
2Kings1:12 Elia adatawira mbati, “Ngakhala ndinedi munthu wa Mulungu, moto mbugwe kubulukira kudzulu pontho mbuvunge iwe pabodzi pene na amunako makumashanuwo!” Tenepo moto wa Mulungu udagwadi kubulukira kudzulu mbuvunga mkadamu ule pabodzi pene na amunache makumashanu ale." 
2Kings1:13 Kubuluka penepo mfumu adatuma mkadamu wachitatu pabodzi pene na amunache makumashanu. Mkadamu wachitatuyi adenda mbakagodama pamaso pa Elia. Iye adapempha mbati, “Munthu wa Mulungu, ndaphata miyendo, tivereni nsisi, pontho koyani moyo wanga na wa amuna makumashanu, anyabasanuwa!" 
2Kings1:14 Moto udagwa kudzulu mbuvunga akadamu akutoma awiri ale pabodzi pene na amunawo onsene. Mbwenye chinchino ndivereni nsisi.” 
2Kings1:15 Mngelo wa MBUYA adalonga kuna Elia mbati, “Ndoko naye, leka gopa.” Natenepo Elia adalamuka mbaenda pabodzi na mkadamu ule kuna mfumu." 
2Kings1:16 Elia adalonga kuna mfumu mbati, “MBUYA akulonga tenepa: Imwe mwatuma anyamphangwa kavunza nzeru Baala-Zebubu, milungu ya Ekroni. Ayi mu Israele nkhabemo Mulungu wakuti imwe munakwanisa kumvunza nzeru? Na thangwi yakuti mwachita penepi, imwe nkhabe dzalamuka patalimba panagona imwepo tayu. Imwe munati mufe!”" 
2Kings1:17 Natenepo iye adafadi malingana na mafala a MBUYA akhadalonga Elia ale. Na thangwi yakuti Ahazia akhali nkhabe mwana mamuna, Yoramu mbaleache adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache chaka chachiwiri Yehoramu mwana Yehosafati mbali mfumu wa Yuda." 
2Kings1:18 Pinango pyonsene pidachitika Ahazia mbali mfumu na pidachita iye pyalembwa m'mabukhu a mbiri ya mafumu a Israele. 
2Kings2:1 Pikhali MBUYA chifupi kukwata Elia kwenda kudzulu m'chivumbulu, Elia na Elisha akhali pa ulendo awo kubulukira ku Giligala." 
2Kings2:2 Elia adalonga kuna Elisha mbati, “Banga khala pano; MBUYA andituma ku Betele.” Mbwenye Elisha adatawira mbati, “Ndinadumbira pamaso pa MBUYA wamoyo na pamaso panu kuti ine nkhabe kukusiyani tayu.” Natenepo onsene uwiriawo adenda ku Betele." 
2Kings2:3 Gulu ya maprofeti a ku Betele adadza kuna Elisha mbamvunza mbati, “Ayi iwe ukupidziwa kuti MBUYA anati akukwatire mbuyako lero?” Elisha adatawira mbati, “Ande, ndikupidziwa, kwache lekani longa pya penepi.”" 
2Kings2:4 Kubuluka penepo Elia adalonga kuna Elisha mbati, “Banga khala pano; MBUYA andituma ku Yeriko.” Elisha adatawira mbati, “Ndinadumbira pamaso pa MBUYA wamoyo na pamaso panu kuti ine nkhabe kukusiyani tayu.” Natenepo onsene uwiriawo adenda ku Yeriko." 
2Kings2:5 Gulu ya maprofeti a ku Yeriko adadza kuna Elisha mbalonga mbati, “Ayi iwe ukupidziwa kuti MBUYA anati akukwatire mbuyako lero?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ande, ndikupidziwa, kwache lekani longa pya penepi.”" 
2Kings2:6 Kubuluka penepo Elia adalonga kuna Elisha mbati, “Banga khala pano; MBUYA andituma kumkulo wa Yorodani.” Elisha adatawira mbati, “Ndinadumbira pamaso pa MBUYA wamoyo na pamaso panu kuti ine nkhabe kukusiyani tayu.” Natenepo onsene uwiriawo adathimiza kwenda." 
2Kings2:7 Amuna makumashanu a m'gulu ya maprofeti adenda mbakaimira patali pang'ono kuyang'ana pakhadaimira Elia na Elisha pa Yorodani. 
2Kings2:8 Elia adakwata chakufinika chache, kuchifunya-funya mbamenya nacho madzi ale. Madzi adagawanikana pakati, anango kumadyo anangombo kumabzere. Tenepo uwiriawo adawambuka na pakuuma." 
2Kings2:9 Pikhadawambuka iwo, Elia adalonga kuna Elisha mbati, “Ngandipange chinafuna iwe kuti ndikuchitire mbindidzati buluswa pamaso pako?” Elisha adatawira mbati, “Ndipaseni kawiri khundu ya mzimu wanu.”" 
2Kings2:10 Elia adalonga mbati, “Wapempha chinthu chakunensa pyakwanga, kwache ngakhala iwe unandiyang'ana pinabuluswa ine pamaso pako, unakhala wako; mbwenye bibibi hunautambira tayu.”" 
2Kings2:11 Pikhafamba iwo uku akulongesana, vumbu-vumbu chingolo cha moto na akavalo a moto pidaonekera mbapilekanisa awiri ale, tenepo Elia adakwatwa kwenda kudzulu m'chivumbulu." 
2Kings2:12 Pidaona Elisha penepi adakhuwa mbati, “Baba, Baba! Nyakutchinjiriza wamphamvu wa Israele! Mwaenda!” Tenepo Elisha hadamuoneve tayu Elia. Penepo iye adang'amba chakufinika chache chile m'mapindi mawiri kuonesa kutsukwala kwache." 
2Kings2:13 Kubuluka penepo Elisha adalokota chakufinika chidagwa kubulukira pana Elia chile mbabwerera m'nduli, tenepo adenda mbakaimira m'khundu-khundu mwa mkulo wa Yorodani." 
2Kings2:14 Tenepo iye adakwata chakufinika chidagwa kubulukira pana Elia chile mbamenya nacho madzi. Iye adavunza mbati, “Ali kupi mphapo MBUYA Mulungu wa Elia?” Pidamenya iye madzi ale, madzi adagawikana, anango kumadyo anangombo kumabzere, iye mbawambuka." 
2Kings2:15 Pidamuona gulu ya maprofeti a ku Yeriko ale, adalonga mbati, “Mzimu wa Elia waphama pana Elisha.” Tenepo iwo adenda kagumanikana naye mbalamba pamaso pache." 
2Kings2:16 Iwo adalonga mbati, “Ngayang'anani ife tina amuna makumashanu. Atawiriseni kwenda kasaka-saka mbuyanu, thangwi mwinango Mzimu wa MBUYA wamthukula mbumgwisa m'mapiri penu m'maphedi.” Elisha adatawira mbati, “Nkhabe, lekani kuatuma.”" 
2Kings2:17 Mbwenye iwo adakakamira basi kufikirana Elisha adachita manyadzo kuti athimize kuakhondera. Natenepo iye adalonga mbati, “Atumeni.” Iwo adaatumadi amuna makumashanu ale, mbasaka-saka nsiku zitatu, mbwenye hadamgumane tayu." 
2Kings2:18 Pidabwerera iwo kuna Elisha, ule akhakhala mu Yeriko, iye adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ayi ine sidakupangeni tayu kuti muleke kwenda?”" 
2Kings2:19 Amuna a mumzinda mule adalonga kuna Elisha mbati, “Ngayang'anani, mbuya, luwani ino njadidi pyakwanga ninga munaionera imwemu, mbwenye madzi ache ngakuipa pontho matakache ngakukhonda balisa pinthu.”" 
2Kings2:20 Iye adalonga mbati, “Ndikwatireni ndilo yachinchino pontho muikhemo munyu.” Tenepo iwo adadza napyo kuna iye." 
2Kings2:21 Kubuluka penepo iye adenda pakhali mphuno ya madzi pale mbaponyapo munyu ule, tenepo adalonga mbati, “Pyalonga MBUYA mphipi: Ine ndachitisa madziwa kukhala adidi, pontho nkhabeve dzachitisa anthu kufa penu mataka kukhala okhonda balisa pinthu tayu.”" 
2Kings2:22 Madziwo na lero ngadidi malingana na mafala adalonga Elisha ale. 
2Kings2:23 Kubuluka kweneko Elisha adenda ku Betele. Pikhafamba iye m'njira, aphale anango adabuluka muluwani mule mbamsingirira Elisha. Iwo adalonga mbati, “Ndoko nyamphanjawe!”" 
2Kings2:24 Elisha adazungunuka kuyang'ana pana iwo mbaatemberera na dzina ya MBUYA. Natenepo matika mawiri adabuluka mumsitu mbanyedza-nyedza aphale makumanayi na awiri ale. 
2Kings2:25 Tenepo iye adenda kuphiri ya Karimele. Kubuluka kweneko adabwerera ku Samaria. 
2Kings3:1 Yoramu mwana Ahabu adapita ufumu wa Israele chaka chakhumi na chisere Yehosafati mbali mfumu wa Yuda mbakhala mu Samaria. Tenepo Yoramu adatonga pyaka khumi na piwiri. 
2Kings3:2 Iye adachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA, kwache nee pidapiringana pile pikhadachita babache na mache tayu. Iye adabulusa guwa yakupambulika ya milungu Baala ikhadasasanya babache ile." 
2Kings3:3 Kwache iye adakakamira kuchita pyakudawa ninga pikhachita Yeroboamu mwana Nebati, pile pidachitisa Aisraele kuchita pyakudawa. Iye hadaleke kuchita pinthu penepi tayu." 
2Kings3:4 Mesha mfumu wa Moabu akhafuya mabira. Tenepo iye akhapereka msonkho chaka na chaka kuna mfumu wa Israele anabira pikwi dzana ibodzi na ubweya wa mabira amuna pikwi dzana ibodzi. 
2Kings3:5 Mbwenye pidafa Ahabu mfumu wa Israele, mfumu wa Moabu adapandukira mfumu wa Israele." 
2Kings3:6 Natenepo pandzidzi wenewo Mfumu Yoramu adabuluka ku Samaria mbagumanyisa Aisraele onsene. 
2Kings3:7 Iye adatumiza mphangwa kuna Yehosafati mfumu wa Yuda mbati, “Mfumu wa Moabu andipandukira, ayi munakwanisa kundiphedzambo kumenyana na Amoabu?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ande, ndinati ndiende nawe, ine ndiye iwe, anthu anga mbanthu ako; akavalo anga mbakavalo ako.”" 
2Kings3:8 Iye adavunza mbati, “Njirache inafuna kaasosa na ife njipi?” Yoramu adatawira mbati, “Tinapita na m'thando yatchetcha ya Edomu.”" 
2Kings3:9 Natenepo mfumu wa Israele adalamuka kwenda pabodzi pene na mfumu wa Yuda pontho mfumu wa Edomu. Pidamala iwo nsiku zinomwe akufamba pamulikiti, anyankhondo ale, madzi awo akumwa na akumwesa nyama zikhali na iwo zile akhadaamalira." 
2Kings3:10 Mfumu wa Israele adakhuwa mbati, “Ninji pontho! Ayi MBUYA atigumanyisa tonsenefe mafumu matatu towera atipereke m'manja mwa Amoabu?”" 
2Kings3:11 Mbwenye Yehosafati adavunza mbati, “Ayi kuno nkhabeko mprofeti wa MBUYA wakuti tinakwanisa kuvunza nzeru MBUYA kudzera muna iye.” Thubu wa mfumu wa Israele adatawira mbati, “Elisha mwana Shafati ali kuno, ule akhali mwanamuvi wa Elia.”" 
2Kings3:12 Yehosafati adalonga mbati, “Mafala a MBUYA ali na iye.” Natenepo mfumu wa Israele, Yehosafati, na mfumu wa Edomu adenda kuna Elisha." 
2Kings3:13 Elisha adalonga kuna mfumu wa Israele mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji kuti ine ndikuphedzeni? Ndokoni kavunze nzeru kuna maprofeti a babanu na amanu.” Mfumu wa Israele adatawira mbati, “Nkhabe, tayu! Thangwi ndi MBUYA ule adatigumanyisa tonsenefe pabodzi, towera atipereke m'manja mwa Amoabu.”" 
2Kings3:14 Elisha adatawira mbati, “Ndinadumbira pamaso pa MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene wamoyo ambatumikira ine ule kuti mbapadakhala kuti ine nkhabe lemedza Yehosafati mfumu wa Yuda, ine nee mbidakuona kuti kwadza munthu penu kupiikha konta tayu." 
2Kings3:15 Mbwenye chinchino ndidzesereni nyakuimba nyakatangale.” Pikhaimba munthu ule nyakatangale, mphamvu za MBUYA zidagudumira Elisha," 
2Kings3:16 tenepo iye adalonga mbati, “MBUYA alonga kuti mukumbe madzenje m'phedi yonseneyi." 
2Kings3:17 Thangwi MBUYA alonga kuti imwe nkhabe dzaona nee mphepo penu mvula tayu, kwache phediyi inati idzale na madzi. Tenepo imwe na ng'ombe zanu na pifuyo pinango pina imwe munati mumwe madziwo." 
2Kings3:18 Penepi mphyakukhonda nensa pamaso pa MBUYA; iye anati apereke pontho Amoabu m'manja mwanu. 
2Kings3:19 Imwe munakunda mizinda yawo yonsene yakutchingwa na mpanda, pontho na maluwani awo akulu-akulu onsene. Imwe munagwanda miti yawo yonsene yadidi, munaphopha mphuno zawo zonsene za madzi mbamuvunga mindawo yonsene yadidi pakuiphopha na miyala.”" 
2Kings3:20 Mangwana mwache na machibese pandzidzi wakupereka nsembe, madzi adadza kubulukira kukhundu ya Edomu. Tenepo mbuto yonsene idadzala na madzi." 
2Kings3:21 Kubuluka penepo Amoabu onsene adava kuti mafumu akubwera dzachita nawo nkhondo; mamuna onsene, mkulu penu mwana, wakukwanisa kuphata chida cha nkhondo adachemereswa mbakagumanyikana m'madire." 
2Kings3:22 Mangwana mwache na machibese pidalamuka iwo, dzuwa ikhayetimira m'madzi mule, tenepo kuna Amoabu madzi ale akhaoneka akufira ninga chiropa." 
2Kings3:23 Iwo adalonga mbati, “Ngayang'anani chenechi ntchiropa basi! Mafumu ale amenyana na kuphana pyawo okhokha. Tendeni, Amoabu, tikaapokesere pinthu pyawo.”" 
2Kings3:24 Mbwenye pidafika Amoabu pamsasa wa Aisraele, Aisraele adalamuka mbaakhamwadza kufikirana iwo adamala thawa. Tenepo Aisraele adapita m'dziko mwawo mbaphamo Amoabu." 
2Kings3:25 Iwo adavunga mizinda, pontho munthu onsene adaponya mwala pamunda onsene wadidi kufikirana minda yonsene idaphophwa na miyala. Iwo adaphopha mphuno za madzi mbagwanda miti yonsene yadidi. Mzinda wa Kiri-Hareseti okha ndiye ukhadasalira pabodzi pene na miyalache m'mbuto mwache, kwache amuna akukhala na mbemba adauzungulira mbauvunga." 
2Kings3:26 Pidaona mfumu wa Moabu kuti iye akhakundwa pankhondo ile, adakwata amuna madzana manomwe akukhala na matalasada kwenda kuna mfumu wa Aramu, mbwenye adachimwana." 
2Kings3:27 Kubuluka penepo iye adakwata mwanache wautombo akhafuna dzapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache ule, mbampereka nsembe pafufu ya mzinda kuna milungu ya Amoabu. Natenepo Aisraele adagoswerwa pyakwanga mbabwerera kubuluka mumzinda mule kwenda m'dziko mwawo." 
2Kings4:1 Mamfelwa unango ule mamunache akhali mbodzi wa m'gulu ya maprofeti adalonga kuna Elisha mbati, “Mamunanga, nyabasanu, afa, pontho imwe mukupidziwa kuti iye akhali munthu wakugopa Mulungu. Mbwenye munthu adafiyali iye ule, akudza dzakwata ananga awiri achimunawa kukhala mabitchu ache kupagali mangawa ale.”" 
2Kings4:2 Elisha adatawira mbati, “Unafuna ndikuchitirenji? Ngandipange m'nyumba mwako unanji?” Mkazi ule adatawira mbati, “Ine nkhabe chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu; china ine chene ndi mtete wa mafuta aolivi basi.”" 
2Kings4:3 Elisha adalonga mbati, “Ndoko kuna atsanthembako onsene mbukapemphe mabuyawu akusowa pinthu, kwache ukapemphe azinji ene." 
2Kings4:4 Kubuluka penepo uende kapifungirika m'nyumba mwako iwe na anako achimunawo. Tenepo ukhuthulire mafuta m'mabuyawu onsenewo kubulukira mumtete. Sindzidzi buyawu nkhudzala uiikhe pakhundu.” 
2Kings4:5 Mkazi ule adenda mbakapifungira m'nyumba pabodzi pene na anache. Ana ale adadza na mabuyawo kuna mawo, tenepo iye adaikha mafuta m'mabuyawu." 
2Kings4:6 Pidadzala mabuyawu onsene ale, adalonga kuna mbodzi wa anache mbati, “Ngandipase buyawu inango.” Mwana ule adatawira mbati, “Nkhabe buyawu inango yasala tayu.” Na ndzidzi onthowo mafuta adaleka kubuluka mumtetemo." 
2Kings4:7 Kubuluka penepo mkazi ule adenda mbakampanga munthu wa Mulungu ule, tenepo iye adalonga kuna mkazi ule mbati, “Ndoko kagulise mafutawo mbukabwezere mangawa adakwata mamunako. Iwe na anako munakwanisa kuphatisa basa kobiri zakusalazo.”" 
2Kings4:8 Nsiku inango Elisha adenda ku Shunemu. Kweneko kukhali mkazi unango wakufuma, ule adampempha kuti adye naye pabodzi. Natenepo ndzidzi onsene ukhagwanda iye na penepo, akhaimira kutoma kudya." 
2Kings4:9 Mkazi ule adalonga kuna mamunache mbati, “Ine ndikupidziwa kuti munthu ambagwanda na pano ndzidzi onseneyi ndi munthu wakuchena wa Mulungu." 
2Kings4:10 Mbatimmangireni kasubi padzulu pa nyumbathuyi, pontho tiikhemo talimba, thebulu, mpando na nyale, towera ndzidzi onsene unadza iye kuna ife, akwanise kukhala pyache mwenemo.”" 
2Kings4:11 Nsiku inango pidafika Elisha ku Shunemu adakwira m'dzulu kusubi kwache mbagona mwenemo. 
2Kings4:12 Iye adalonga kuna nyabasache Gehazi mbati, “Chemera mkazi wa Chishunemu kudza kuno.” Natenepo iye adamchemera; mkaziyo adadza mbaimira pamaso pa Elisha." 
2Kings4:13 Elisha adalonga kuna Gehazi mbati, “Mpange kuti iwe watibonerera pyakwanga. Apo unafuna ndikuchitirenji? Ayi tikalonge pyadidi pya iwe kuna mfumu penu kuna mkadamu wa anyankhondo?” Mkazi ule adatawira mbati, “Ine ndina pyonsene pinafuna ine pano pakati pa anthu anga.”" 
2Kings4:14 Elisha adavunza Gehazi mbati, “Apo mkaziyu athema kuchitirwanji?” Gehazi adatawira mbati, “Mkazi weneyu nkhabe mwana pontho mamunache ndi nkhalamba.”" 
2Kings4:15 Kubuluka penepo Elisha adalonga mbati, “Mchemere adze kuno.” Natenepo Gehazi adachemera mkazi ule, tenepo iye adadza mbaimira pamsuwo." 
2Kings4:16 Elisha adalonga mbati, “Chaka chamangwana ndzidzi ninga ontho uno iwe unati ukhumbatire mwana wamamuna.” Mkazi ule adalonga mbati, “Tayu, mbuyanga, lekani kundinyengeza, imwe ndimwe munthu wa Mulungu.”" 
2Kings4:17 Mbwenye mkazi ule adakwatadi mimba, tenepo chaka chinangocho ndzidzi ninga onthowo iye adabala mwana wamamuna ninga montho mukhadampangira Elisha." 
2Kings4:18 Mwanamphale ule adakula, tenepo nsiku inango adenda kuna babache, ule akhali pabodzi pene na anyakuvuna." 
2Kings4:19 Mphale ule adalonga kuna babache mbati, “Msolo wanga! Mama msolo wanga!” Babache adalonga kuna nyabasache mbati, “Mthukule uende naye kuna mache.”" 
2Kings4:20 Nyabasa adamthukula mbaenda naye kuna mache. Mphale ule adakhala pamiyendo pa mache kufikirana masikati, tenepo adafa." 
2Kings4:21 Mkazi ule adamkwata mphale ule mbakwira naye kusubi ya padzulu mbakamgonesa patalimba ya munthu wa Mulungu ule, tenepo adabulukamo mbafunga msuwo." 
2Kings4:22 Kubuluka penepo iye adachemera mamunache mbalonga mbati, “Ndaphata miyendo munditumizirembo nyabasanu mbodzi na bulu, towera ndikwanise kuthamanga kuna munthu wa Mulungu ule, tenepo ndinati ndibwereko chinchino pano.”" 
2Kings4:23 Mamuna adavunza mbati, “Chinafuna kukuendesa kuna iye nsiku ya leroyi ninji? Lero si nsiku yakusekera kubalwa kwa mwezi penu Nsiku Yakupuma tayu.” Mkazi ule adatawira mbati, “Nkhabe pinthu tayu.”" 
2Kings4:24 Pidamangirira iye chakukhalira pabulu pache adapakira mbapanga nyabasache mbati, “Fambisa pyakwanga buluyu. Leka thethesa kufikirana ndikupange kuchita tenepo.”" 
2Kings4:25 Natenepo iye adenda mbafika kuna munthu wa Mulungu paphiri ya Karimele. Pidaona Elisha mkazi ule na pakansinzo adalonga kuna nyabasache Gehazi mbati, “Ngayang'ana mkazi wa Chishunemu uyo anadzayo!" 
2Kings4:26 Thamanga ugumanikane naye pontho umvunze kuti, ‘Ayi nkhwadidi kwene? Ayi mamunako ngwakuwanga ene? Apombo mphaleanu ngwakuwanga ene?’ ” Mkazi ule adatawira mbati, “Onsene ngakuwanga ene.”" 
2Kings4:27 Pidafika mkazi ule kuna munthu wa Mulungu, iye adaphata manyalo a Elisha. Gehazi adadza mbafuna kumgwinya, mbwenye munthu wa Mulungu ule adalonga mbati, “Msiye pyache! Iye akusanyika pikulu mumtima mwache, mbwenye MBUYA andibisira pya penepi mbakhonda kundipanga.”" 
2Kings4:28 Mkazi ule adalonga mbati, “Ayi mbuya, ine ndidachita kukupemphani kuti mundipase mwana? Ayi ine sidakupangeni tayu kuti, ‘Lekani kulamusa chikhumbo changa.’ ”" 
2Kings4:29 Elisha adalonga kuna Gehazi mbati, “Mangirira chakufinika chako m'chuno mwako, pontho ukwate ndodo yangayi mbuthamange kwenda kumusa kwa mkaziyu. Ngakhala panjira unagumanikana na munthu leka kummwenyika, penu ngakhala unagumanikana na munthu unango leka kumtawira. Ukaikhe ndodo yangayi kunkhope kwa mphaleyo.”" 
2Kings4:30 Mbwenye mache mphale ule adalonga kuna Elisha mbati, “Ine ndinadumbira pamaso pa MBUYA wamoyo na pamaso panu kuti sinakusiyani tayu.” Natenepo Elisha adenda pabodzi naye." 
2Kings4:31 Gehazi adatsogola mbakaikha ndodo ile kunkhope kwa mphaleyo, mbwenye nkhabe chinthu na chibodzi chene chidachitika tayu. Natenepo Gehazi adabwerera mbakagumanikana na Elisha mbampanga mbati, “Mphale hadalamuke tayu.”" 
2Kings4:32 Pidafika Elisha kumusa kule adaona mphale wakufa ule ali lamba patalimba pache. 
2Kings4:33 Iye adapita m'subimo, uwiriawo mbapifungira mwenemo, natenepo adapemphera kuna MBUYA." 
2Kings4:34 Kubuluka penepo adakwira patalimba pale mbamgonera mphale ule uku mulomo, maso na manjache pyagumanizana mulomo, maso na manja a mphale ule. Tenepo pikhali Elisha thasa pamphaleyo, manungo a mphaleyo adatoma kupisa." 
2Kings4:35 Kubuluka penepo Elisha adalamuka mbafamba-famba uku na uko m'subi mule mbabwerera patalimba pale mbagonera pontho pamphaleyo, ule adaotsira kanomwe mbafungula maso ache." 
2Kings4:36 Elisha adachemera Gehazi mbati, “Kachemere mkazi wa Chishunemu ule.” Iye adachitadi tenepo. Pidafika mkazi ule, Elisha adalonga mbati, “Kwata mwanako.”" 
2Kings4:37 Tenepo mkazi ule adapita mwenemo mbapigwisa pamanyalo pa Elisha, tenepo adalamba pamaso pache. Kubuluka penepo adakwata mwanache mbabuluka panja." 
2Kings4:38 Elisha adabwerera ku Giligala, kule kukhali njala ikulu. Pikhafunzisa Elisha gulu ya maprofeti, Elisha adapanga nyabasache mbati, “Sanjika chikalango chikulu pamoto mbutereke muliwo kuti anthuwa adye.”" 
2Kings4:39 Mbodzi wa amuna ale adenda kumunda kasaka masamba mbakagumana mtawi wakuoneka ninga ndiko. Tenepo iye adatchola nsapo zache mbadzaza m'khanzwa mwache. Pidabwerera iye adapicheka-cheka mbapiikha m'chikalango mule. Nkhabe na mbodzi ene pakati pawo adadziwa kuti pikhalinji tayu. 
2Kings4:40 Muliwo udapakulwa kuti anthu adye, mbwenye pidaulawa iwo, adakhuwa mbati, “Munthu wa Mulungu muna imfa m'chikalango.” Tenepo iwo hadakwanise kuudya tayu." 
2Kings4:41 Elisha adalonga mbati, “Ndikwatireni ufa pang'ono.” Iye adaponya ufa ule m'chikalango mule mbalonga mbati, “Apakulireni anthu kuti adye.” M'chikalango mukhali nkhabe pontho chinthu chakupha tayu." 
2Kings4:42 Munthu unango wa ku Baala-Shalisha adadza kuna munthu wa Mulungu na mikate makumawiri ya barele wakutoma kutokota, pabodzi pene na ngala za mapira achinchino. Elisha adalonga mbati, “Pipereke kuna anthu kuti adye.”" 
2Kings4:43 Nyabasache Elisha adamtawira mbati, “Ayi penepimbo na anthu dzana pinaaphatanji?” Mbwenye Elisha adatawira mbati, “Pipereke kuna anthu kuti adye, thangwi MBUYA alonga kuti, ‘Iwo anati adye mbapasala pinango.’ ”" 
2Kings4:44 Natenepo iye adapereka mikate ile kuna anthu ale, tenepo anthu adadya mbakhuta mbapasala basi pinango malingana na mafala adalonga MBUYA ale." 
2Kings5:1 Naamani akhali mkadamu wa anyankhondo wa mfumu wa ku Aramu. Iye akhali munthu wamkulu pyakwanga pamaso pa mfumu, pontho akhalemedzwa thangwi kudzera muna iye MBUYA akhadachitisa Aaramu kukunda pankhondo. Iye akhali nyankhondo wamphamvu, kwache akhali nyamatanya." 
2Kings5:2 Ndzidzi unango magulu a nkhondo a ku Aramu adenda kachita nkhondo na Aisraele mbaphatako mwana mtsikana wa Chiisraele, ule adasanduka nyabasa wa mkazache Naamani." 
2Kings5:3 Mtsikana ule adalonga kuna mbuyache wamkazi mbati, “Mbuyangayu mbadakhala aonana na mprofeti ule ali ku Samaria mbadawangiswa matanyache.”" 
2Kings5:4 Naamani adenda kuna mfumu kampanga pikhadalonga mtsikana wa ku Israele pile. 
2Kings5:5 Mfumu wa Aramu adatawira mbati, “Unakwanisa kwenda. Ine ndinati nditumize kalata kuna mfumu wa Israele.” Natenepo Naamani adalamuka kwenda mbakwata mitukwa ya kobiri zasiliva pikwi makumatatu, na golidi pikwi pitanthatu, pontho na pyakuvala pyadidi khumi." 
2Kings5:6 Kalata idakwata iye kwenda nayo kuna mfumu wa Israele idalembwa tenepa: “Ndikutuma nyabasanga Naamani na kalatayi kuna imwe, towera mumuwangise matanya ana iyewo.”" 
2Kings5:7 Sindzidzi mfumu wa Israele nkhuwerenga kalata ile, adang'amba mkhanjo wache thangwi ya mantha mbalonga mbati, “Kadi ine ndine Mulungu? Kadi ine ndinakwanisa kupha na kubwezera moyo wa munthu? Thangwi yache ninji iye atuma munthu weneyu kuna ine kuti ndimuwangise matanyache? Ngayang'anani yeneyi ndi njira yakufuna kulamusa nayo nthonga pakati pa ine na iye.”" 
2Kings5:8 Pidava Elisha, munthu wa Mulungu ule, kuti mfumu wa Israele ang'amba mkhanjo wache, adatumiza mphangwa kuna iye mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji mwang'amba mkhanjo wanu? Mpangeni munthuyo adze kuna ine, tenepo iye anadziwadi kuti mu Israele muna mprofeti.”" 
2Kings5:9 Natenepo Naamani adenda pabodzi pene na akavalo ache pontho na pingolo pyache mbakaimira pamsuwo pa Elisha. 
2Kings5:10 Elisha adatuma nyamphangwa kuna Naamani kampanga kuti, “Ndoko kasambe mumkulo wa Yorodani kanomwe, tenepo manungo ako anawanga mbukhala wakuchena.”" 
2Kings5:11 Mbwenye Naamani adazhangali pyakwanga mbaenda pyache uku akulonga kuti, “Ndikhanyerezera kuti iye anabuluka panja kuna ine mbaimira kupemphera kuna MBUYA Mulungu wache mbayambasa dzanjache pamatanyanga mbandiwangisa." 
2Kings5:12 Ayi mikulo ya Abana na Faripara ya kwathu ku Damasiko, si yadidi tayu kupiringana madzi a mu Israele? Ayi ine mbidakwanisa tayu kusamba mwenemo mbandicheneswa?” Natenepo adazungunuka mbaenda pyache mwakuzhangali." 
2Kings5:13 Anyabasa a Naamani adenda kuna iye mbalonga mbati, “Ayi mbuya, mprofetiyo mbadakupangani kuchita chinthu chikulu chene, imwe mbamudachichita tayu? Apo nditani na pyakupangani iye kuti, ‘Kasambe, tenepo unacheneswa!’ ”" 
2Kings5:14 Natenepo Naamani adabidira kumkulo mbapivika yekha ene mumkulo wa Yorodani kanomwe ninga montho mukhadampangira munthu wa Mulungu, tenepo iye adacheneswadi, khandache idabwerera ninga mwakale mbikhala ninga yamphale." 
2Kings5:15 Naamani na anthu ache onsene ale adabwerera kuna munthu wa Mulungu ule. Iye adaimira pamaso pache mbalonga mbati, “Lero ndapidziwa kuti padziko yonsene yapansi nkhabepo milungu inango kupambula Mulungu wa Israele. Ndaphata miyendo tambirani mitukwa yadza na ine kuna imweyi.”" 
2Kings5:16 Mprofeti ule adatawira mbati, “Ine ndinadumbira pamaso pa MBUYA wamoyo ambatumikira ineyi kuti ine nkhabe dzatambira chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu.” Natenepo iye adakhonda podi kwene kuti Naamani adamkhakhamiza." 
2Kings5:17 Naamani adalonga mbati, “Ngakhala munatambira tayu mitukwangayi, ndipaseni tchetcha ya kuno ninga munakwanisira mabulu mawiri kuthukula kwenda nayo kwathu. Thangwi kutomera lero kwenda m'tsogolo sinaperekave nsembe penu nsembe zakupyerera kuna mulungu unango tayu, mbwenye kuna MBUYA ene basi." 
2Kings5:18 Kwache ndikupempha MBUYA kuti andilekerere chinthu ichi: Pimbapita mbuyanga mfumu m'nyumba yakupembedzeramo milungu Rimoni kamulambira, iye ambatsamira mkono wanga, natenepo ine ndimbalambambo, thangwi ya kulambira kumbachita ine Rimoni, MBUYA mbandilekerere.”" 
2Kings5:19 Elisha adalonga mbati, “Ndoko na mtendere.” Pidafamba Naamani kansinzo kene," 
2Kings5:20 Gehazi nyabasa wa Elisha, munthu wa Mulungu ule, adalonga yekha ene mbati, “Mbuyanga amuleka pyache Naamani Muaramu nee kumpagalisa chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu. Iye adathema kutambira mitukwa idadza na iye ile. Ndinadumbira pamaso pa MBUYA wamoyo kuti ine ndinati ndimthamangire ndikakwateko pinthu pang'ono.”" 
2Kings5:21 Natenepo Gehazi adamthamangira Naamani. Pidaona Naamani kuti munthu unango akumthamangira, iye adatchitha m'chingolo mwache mule kagumanikana na munthu ule. Iye adavunza mbati, “Ayi nkhwadidi kwene?”" 
2Kings5:22 Gehazi adatawira mbati, “Ande, nkhwadidi kwene. Mbwenye mbuyanga andituma ndikupangeni kuti, ‘Aphale awiri a m'gulu ya maprofeti andifikira kwene chinchino pano kubulukira kudziko ya mapiri ya Eferemu. Ndaphata miyendo apaseni kobiri zasiliva pikwi pitatu na pyakuvala piwiri.’ ”" 
2Kings5:23 Naamani adalonga mbati, “Ndaphata miyendo kwatani kobiri zasiliva pikwi pitanthatu.” Iye adamkhakhamiza Gehazi kuti atambire penepi. Natenepo adamanga siliva ule m'mabudu mawiri pabodzi pene na pyakuvala pile. Iye adapipereka kuna anyabasache awiri mbapithukula kwenda patsogolo pache." 
2Kings5:24 Pidafika Gehazi paphiri, adakwata pinthu pikhadathukula anyabasache pile mbapipitisa m'bwalo mwa nyumba. Kubuluka penepo adapanga anyabasa ale kwenda pyawo, tenepo iwo adalamuka mbaenda pyawo." 
2Kings5:25 Gehazi adapita m'nyumba mbakaimira pamaso pa Elisha mbuyache. Elisha adamvunza mbati, “Gehazi ukhali kupi?” Gehazi adatawira mbati, “Ine nyabasanu sidafambe kwenda kunango tayu.”" 
2Kings5:26 Mbwenye Elisha adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Kani ukunyerezera kuti mzimu wanga hukhali nawe tayu pikhatchitha munthu ule m'chingolo mwache dzagumanikana nawe? Kadi uno ndi ndzidzi wakukwata kobiri, penu kutambira nguwo, minda yaolivi, minda yamfesa, mabira, ng'ombe, penu anyabasa achimuna na achikazi?" 
2Kings5:27 Matanya a Naamani anakakamira pana iwepo na pana pidzukulu pyako kwenda na kwenda.” Natenepo Gehazi adabuluka pamaso pa Elisha mbakhala na matanya akuchena ninga matalala. 
2Kings6:1 Gulu ya maprofeti adalonga kuna Elisha mbati, “Ngayang'anani mbuto inakhala ife namweyi yatichepera pyakwanga." 
2Kings6:2 Natenepo titawiriseni kwenda kumkulo wa Yorodani kule munthu onsene anakwanisa kugwanda muti wache; pontho mutitawirise kumanga nyumba kweneko, towera ife tikhalemo.” Elisha adatawira mbati, “Ndokoni.”" 
2Kings6:3 Mbodzi wa iwo adalonga mbati, “Ndaphata miyendo muende nafe, ife anyabasanu.” Elisha adatawira mbati, “Ndinati ndiende namwe.”" 
2Kings6:4 Tenepo iye adenda nawodi pabodzi. Iwo adenda ku Yorodani mbatoma kutema miti. 
2Kings6:5 Mbodzi wa iwo pidatoma iye kutema muti mbadzo idangwirika mbigwera m'madzi. Iye adalira mbati, “Mama ine, mbuyanga, mbadzoyi njakubwereka!”" 
2Kings6:6 Munthu wa Mulungu ule adavunza mbati, “Yagwera papi?” Iye adamuonesa padagwera iyo, tenepo Elisha adatchola kamuti mbakaponya penepo, mbachitisa mbadzo ile kuluthuka." 
2Kings6:7 Iye adalonga kuna munthu ule mbati, “Inule!” Natenepo iye adafuthula mkono wache mbailokota." 
2Kings6:8 Mfumu wa Aramu akhali pankhondo na Israele. Pidamala iye kuverana na akadamu ache iye adalonga mbati, “Ndinati ndikamange msasanga pangana na pangana.”" 
2Kings6:9 Munthu wa Mulungu adatumiza mphangwa kuna mfumu wa Israele mbati, “Chitani mphole-mphole kuti muleke gwanda na njira yeneyo tayu thangwi Aaramu aendera kontho-konthoko kukubisalirani.”" 
2Kings6:10 Natenepo mfumu wa Israele adacheuzambo anthu akhakhala kumbuto, ile idampanga munthu wa Mulungu. Kazinji kene Elisha akhacheuza mfumu wa Israele towera akhale m'maso kumbuto ninga zenezi." 
2Kings6:11 Penepi pidazhangalisa mfumu wa Aaramu. Iye adachemeresa mathubu ache mbaavunza mbati, “Ngandipangeni, mbani pakati pathupa ali kukhundu kwa mfumu wa Israele?”" 
2Kings6:12 Mbodzi wa mathubu ache adalonga mbati, “Mbuyanga mfumu, nkhabe na mbodzi ene wa ife akuchita tenepo tayu. Mbwenye Elisha mprofeti ule ali m'Israele, ambampanga mfumu wa Israele pyonsene pene pinalonga imwe, Mfumu, podi na pimbalonga imwe na kusubi kwanu kwene.”" 
2Kings6:13 Mfumu adalonga mbati. “Ndokoni mukamsake-sake kuna iye towera nditumeko amuna kamphata.” Tenepo iwo adabwerako mbalonga mbati, “Iye ali ku Dotani.”" 
2Kings6:14 Natenepo mfumu adatumiza akavalo ankhondo na pingolo pontho na anyankhondo amphamvu. Iwo adenda na mosiku mbazungulira mzindawo. 
2Kings6:15 Bzobzo mangwana mwache pidalamuka nyabasa wa munthu wa Mulungu kwenda panja, adaona anyankhondo akukhala na akavalo pontho pingolo azungulira mzinda. Iye adavunza mbati, “Zhi! Tinachitanji, mbuyanga?”" 
2Kings6:16 Mprofeti ule adatawira mbati, “Leka chita mantha, ale ali kukhundu kwathu ngazinji kupiringana ale ali kukhundu kwawo.”" 
2Kings6:17 Tenepo Elisha adapemphera mbati, “MBUYA fungulani maso a nyabasayi towera aone.” MBUYA adafungula maso a nyabasa ule, tenepo iye adayang'ana mbaona mapiri adzala na akavalo na pingolo pya moto kuzungulira Elisha." 
2Kings6:18 Pikhadza anyamalwa ale kuna Elisha, iye adapemphera kuna MBUYA mbati, “MBUYA achitiseni anthuwa kukhala maboli-boli.” Natenepo MBUYA adaachitisadi kukhala maboli-boli ninga montho mukhadapemphera Elisha." 
2Kings6:19 Elisha adaapanga mbati, “Njira si yeneyi tayu, pontho mzinda unafuna imwe si wenewu tayu. Nditewereni kuti ndikuperekezeni kuna munthu anasaka imwe.” Tenepo Elisha adendesa anthu ale ku Samaria." 
2Kings6:20 Pidafika iwo mumzinda wa Samaria, Elisha adapempherera mbati, “MBUYA fungulani maso a anthuwa, towera akwanise kuona.” Tenepo MBUYA adafungula maso awo mbaona kuti iwo akhali m'bwalo mwa Samaria." 
2Kings6:21 Pidaaona mfumu wa ku Israele adavunza Elisha mbati, “Ayi, baba, ndiaphe? Ayi ndiaphe?”" 
2Kings6:22 Elisha adatawira mbati, “Lekani kuapha. Ayi mungaphe anthu akuti mwachita kuaphata pankhondo? Apaseni pyakudya na pyakumwa kuti adye towera angamala alamuke kubwerera kuna mfumu wawo.”" 
2Kings6:23 Natenepo mfumu adaasasanyira phwando ikulu. Pidamala iwo kudya na kumwa, mfumu adaagwinya kubwerera kuna mfumu wa Aramu. Natenepo anyankhondo a ku Aramu adaleka chita nkhondo m'dziko ya Israele." 
2Kings6:24 Pandzidzi unango, Beni-Hadadi mfumu wa Aramu adagumanyisa anyankhondo ache onsene mbaenda kazungulira Samaria." 
2Kings6:25 Na thangwi yakuti mzinda wa Samaria ukhadazungulirwa na anyankhondo, mumzindamo mukhali njala ikulu mwakuti msolo wa bulu ukhagulwa kobiri zasiliva makumasere, pontho theka ya kilogramu ibodzi ya matoswi a nkhangaiwa akhagulwa na mapindi mashanu a siliva." 
2Kings6:26 Pikhagwanda mfumu wa Israele na pafufu mkazi adakhuwa kuna iye mbati, “Ndiphedzenimbo ine, mbuyanga mfumu.”" 
2Kings6:27 Mfumu adatawira mbati, “Ngakhala MBUYA hakukuphedza tayu, inembo chinthucho ndinakachikwata kupi kuti ndikuphedze nacho? Kubulukira pa mbuwa, penu kubulukira m'dzenje yakutchitchithira vinyu?”" 
2Kings6:28 Tenepo iye adamvunza mkazi ule mbati, “Watani?” Mkaziyo adatawira mbati, “Mkazi ushu adalonga kuna ine mbati, ‘Pereka mwanako towera timdye lero, mangwana tinadyambo wangayi.’" 
2Kings6:29 Natenepo tidaphika mwananga mbitimdya. Mangwana mwache ndidampanga kuti, ‘Pereka mwanako towera timdye,’ mbwenye iye akhadambisa.”" 
2Kings6:30 Pidava mfumu mafala a mkazi ule, adang'amba mkhanjo wache. Pikhafamba iye na m'khundu-khundu mwa fufu, anthu adamuona kuti iye avala masakha kunsi pa nguwo zache." 
2Kings6:31 Iye adalonga mbati, “Mulungu mbanditchunyuse, pontho kukhale kukulu kwene, ngakhala msolo wa Elisha mwana Shafati hunagwandwa lero tayu.”" 
2Kings6:32 Elisha akhakhala m'nyumba mwache pabodzi pene na akulu-akulu. Mfumu adatuma nyamphangwa patsogolo pache, mbwenye nyamphangwa mbadzati fika, Elisha adalonga kuna akulu-akulu ale mbati, “Ngayang'anani, mphanduyi atuma munthu kuno kuti andigwande msolo. Ngavani kuno, nyamphangwayo angafika lekani kumtawirisa kupita muno. Mfumu makayo akudza m'nduli mwache.”" 
2Kings6:33 Elisha mbali m'kati kulonga kuna iwo, mfumu ule adafika mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Muliri wenewu wabulukira kuna MBUYA. Apo thangwi yache ninji kuti ndidikhire MBUYA kuchitapo pinthu.”" 
2Kings7:1 Elisha adatawira mbati, “Ngavani mafala a MBUYA! Mangwana ndzidzi ninga uno munakwanisa dzagula mu Samaria makilogramu atatu a tirigu wadidiletu penu makilogramu atanthatu a barele na kobiri ibodzi yasiliva.”" 
2Kings7:2 Mkadamu wa anyankhondo wakunyindirika wa mfumu adalonga kuna munthu wa Mulungu mbati, “Podi kwene kuti MBUYA afungule misuwo ya madzi ya kudzulu, ayi penepi pingachitikedi?” Elisha adalonga mbati, “Iwe unati upione na maso ako, mbwenye hunadyapo chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu.”" 
2Kings7:3 Pamsuwo wakupitira mumzinda wa Samaria pakhali amuna anayi, ale akhali na matanya. Iwo adalonga kuna unango na mwanzache mbati, “Kadi ife tinakhaliranji pano kufikirana kufa?" 
2Kings7:4 Tingalonga kuti, ‘Tendeni mumzindamu’ mumzindamu muna njala, tenepo tinati tikafe na njala mwenemo. Tingakhala pano tinati tife basi. Natenepo tendeni pyathu kumsasa wa Aaramu mbatikapipereke tekha ene kweneko. Ngakhala iwo anakhonda kutipha, tinakhala na moyo; mbwenye ngakhala anatipha ife tinafa pyathu.”" 
2Kings7:5 Tenepo m'chidodo iwo adenda kumsasa wa Aaramu. Pidafika iwo m'khundu-khundu mwa msasa ule, pakhali nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene," 
2Kings7:6 thangwi MBUYA akhadachitisa Aaramu kuva ninga mulikiti wa pingolo, akavalo na nkhondo ikulu mwakuti adalonga kuna unango na mwanzache mbati, “Ngayang'anani mfumu wa Israele akwata anyankhondo aganyo akubulukira kuna mafumu a Ahiti na Iguputo kuti adze dzamenyana nafe.”" 
2Kings7:7 Natenepo iwo adalamuka m'chidodo mbathawa kusiya makumbi awo, akavalo awo na pingolo pyawo. Iwo adasiya msasa ninga montho mukhali iwo mule mbathawa kupulumusa moyo wawo." 
2Kings7:8 Anyamatanya anayi ale adafika m'khundu-khundu mwa msasa mule mbapita m'khumbi ibodzi. Iwo adadya na kumwa mbathukula siliva na golidi na nguwo kwenda napyo kapibisa. Iwo adabwerera mbapita m'khumbi inango mbathukula pinthu pinango mwenemo mbakapibisa pontho. 
2Kings7:9 Kubuluka penepo adalonga kuna unango na mwanzache mbati, “Pinachita ifepi si pyadidi tayu. Lero ndi nsiku ya mphangwa zadidi mbwenye ife tikupikoyera tekha ene. Ngakhala tinadikhira mpakana mangwana tinatchunyuswa. Tendeni chinchino pano tikapilonge kunyumba ya mfumu.”" 
2Kings7:10 Natenepo iwo adenda mbakachemera anyakulondali pamsuwo wa mpanda mbaapanga mbati, “Ife tidenda kumsasa wa Aaramu mbatikagumana nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene kweneko, penu kuva fala ya munthu tayu; mbwenye akavalo na mabulu awo amangirirwa pontho mbasiya makumbi awo ninga montho mukhali iwo.”" 
2Kings7:11 Anyakulondali pamsuwo ale adalalika mphangwa zile, tenepo penepi pidalongwa kuna anthu akukhala m'nyumba ya chifumu." 
2Kings7:12 Mfumu adalamuka na mosiku mbalonga kuna mathubu ache mbati, “Ndinati ndikupangeni pyachita Aaramu kuna ife. Iwo akudziwa kuti ife tikufa na njala; natenepo iwo abuluka chadala mumsasa mwawo mbakabisala m'tsanga na manyerezero akuti ife tinabuluka kasaka pyakudya towera iwo atiphe amoyo mbapokosera mzindathuwu.”" 
2Kings7:13 Mbodzi wa mathubu ache adatawira mbati, “Pangani anthu anango kukwata akavalo ashanu asalira mumzindawo. Iwo anakhala ninga Aisraele asala panyatwa mumzindamo, penu anakhala ninga Aisraele anango onsene afa kale ale. Natenepo tendeni tiagwinye kuti akaone pyachitikapyo.”" 
2Kings7:14 Iwo adasankhula pingolo piwiri, akavalo na anyakutekenya ache; mfumu adaagwinya katewera anyankhondo a Aramu. Iye adaapanga mbati, “Ndokoni mukaone pyachitikapyo.”" 
2Kings7:15 Iwo adaatewera mpakana ku Yorodani, mbagumana kuti m'njira monsene mwamala ipa na nguwo, pontho pida pinango pikhadataya Aaramu thangwi ya kuthawa kukhachita iwo. Natenepo anyamphangwa ale adabwerera mbakapilonga kuna mfumu." 
2Kings7:16 Tenepo Aisraele adenda kumsasa wa Aaramu mbakakwata pyonsene mwakuti makilogramu a tirigu adidiletu penu makilogramu atanthatu a barele wadidiletu pikhagulwa na kobiri ibodzi yasiliva ninga montho mukhadalongera MBUYA. 
2Kings7:17 Pidachitika kuti mfumu wa Israele akhadaikha mkadamu wa anyankhondo wakunyindirika wa mfumu kuyang'anira pamsuwo wakupitira mumzindawo. Mkadamu ule adapondedzwa na anthu pamsuwo pale mbafa ninga montho mukhadalongera Elisha pikhadenda mfumu kaonana naye kunyumba kwache. 
2Kings7:18 Elisha akhadalonga kuna mfumu mbati, “Mangwana ndzidzi ninga uno munakwanisa dzagula mu Samaria makilogramu atatu a tirigu wadidiletu penu makilogramu atanthatu a barele na kobiri ibodzi yasiliva.”" 
2Kings7:19 Mkadamu wa mfumu ule akhadatawira munthu wa Mulungu ule mbati, “Ngayang'ana, podi kwene kuti MBUYA afungule misuwo ya madzi ya kudzulu, ayi penepi pingachitikedi?” Munthu wa Mulungu adatawira mbati, “Iwe unati upione na maso ako, mbwenye hunadyapo chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu.”" 
2Kings7:20 Penepi mphyonthopyo pidamchitikira; anthu adampondedza pamsuwo wa mpanda mbaferatu. 
2Kings8:1 Pandzidzi unango Elisha akhadalonga kuna mkazi ule mwanache akhadalamuswa kuimfa mbati, “Ndoko pyako na banjako mbukabange khala konsene kunafuna iwe, thangwi MBUYA alonga kuti m'dziko muno munakhala njala pyaka pinomwe.”" 
2Kings8:2 Mkazi ule adavera pidampanga munthu wa Mulungu pile. Iye na banjache adenda pyache mbakakhala m'dziko ya Afilisti pyaka pinomwe. 
2Kings8:3 Kumamalisiro a chaka chachinomwe mkazi ule adabwerera kubulukira kudziko ya Afilisti mbaenda kuna mfumu kapempha kuti nyumba na mundache pibwezerwe kuna iye. 
2Kings8:4 Pidafika iye, adagumana mfumu akulonga na Gehazi nyabasa wa munthu wa Mulungu mbati, “Ngandipange pya pinthu pikulu pyachita Elisha.”" 
2Kings8:5 Ndzidzi onthowo ukhalonga Gehazi kupanga mfumu pya mule mudalamusira Elisha nyakufa kukhala pontho na moyo, mkazi ule mwanache akhadalamuswa kuimfa na Elisha, adapita mbapempha mfumu kuti nyumba na mundache pibwezerwe kuna iye. Gehazi adalonga mbati, “Mfumu mbuyanga, mkazi analonga ine ule ngweneyu; mwanache akhadalamuswa kuimfa na Elisha, ngweneyu.”" 
2Kings8:6 Mfumu adavunza mkazi ule pya penepi, tenepo iye adampangadi. Kubuluka penepo mfumu adachemeresa thubu wache mbodzi mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Onesesa kuti pyonsene pya mkaziyu pyabwezerwa kuna iye; kuthimizapo kobiri zonsene zagumanwa pakugulisa pyakuvuna pya m'munda mwache kutomera nsiku idabuluka iye m'dziko muno kufikirana lero.”" 
2Kings8:7 Elisha adenda ku Damasiko, tenepo Beni-Hadadi mfumu wa Aramu akhadwala. Pidapangwa mfumu kuti munthu wa Mulungu adza kweneko," 
2Kings8:8 iye adalonga kuna Hazaele mbati, “Kwata mitukwayi mbukagumanikane na munthu wa Mulunguyo kavunza nzeru kuna MBUYA kudzera muna iye kuti, ‘Ayi utenda wenewu ndinawanga nawo penu tayu?’ ”" 
2Kings8:9 Hazaele adenda kagumanikana na Elisha uku akwata mitukwa ya pinthu pyadidiletu pya mu Damasiko pyakuthukulwa na ngamila makumanayi. Iye adapita mukhali Elisha mule mbaimira pamaso pache mbalonga mbati, “Mwana Beni-Hadadi mfumu wa Aramu andituma kuti ndikuvunzeni kuti, ‘Ayi utenda wenewu ndinawanga nawo penu tayu?’ ”" 
2Kings8:10 Elisha adatawira mbati, “Ndoko mbukalonge kuna iye kuti, ‘Munati muwange,’ kwache MBUYA anditchululira kuti anati afe.”" 
2Kings8:11 Elisha adayang'anisisa pana Hazaele mwakuti Hazaele adagwisa nkhope pansi. Tenepo munthu wa Mulungu adatoma kulira. 
2Kings8:12 Hazaele adavunza mbati, “Mwatani munalira, mbuyanga?” Elisha adatawira mbati, “Thangwi ndikupidziwa pyakuipa pinafuna iwe dzachitira Aisraele. Iwe unapisa mbuto zawo zakutchingwa na mipanda, aphale awo unaapha na talasada, anawo ang'ono-ang'ono unaapondereza pansi, pontho akazawo akukhala na mimba unaatumbulisa.”" 
2Kings8:13 Hazaele adalonga mbati, “Inembo nyabasanu, okhonda funika ninga mwanambwa, ayi ndingakwanise kuchita pinthu pikulu ninga penepi?” Elisha adatawira mbati, “MBUYA andionesa kuti iwe unakhala mfumu wa Aramu.”" 
2Kings8:14 Kubuluka penepo Hazaele adamsiya Elisha mbabwerera kuna mbuyache. Pidavunza Beni-Hadadi kuti, “Ayi Elisha alonga kuti tani kuna iwe?” Hazaele adatawira mbati, “Iye andipanga kuti munati muwange.”" 
2Kings8:15 Mbwenye mangwana mwache Hazaele adakwata gombeza, kuchivika m'madzi, mbachithasika kunkhope kwa mfumu ule, natenepo mfumu adafa. Kubuluka penepo Hazaele adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwa Beni-Hadadi." 
2Kings8:16 Chaka chachishanu cha Yoramu, mwana Ahabu mfumu wa Israele, mwenemo Yehosafati mbali mfumu wa Yuda, Yehoramu mwana Yehosafati adapita ufumu wa Yuda." 
2Kings8:17 Iye akhali na pyaka makumatatu na piwiri pikhapita iye ufumu, tenepo iye adatonga mu Yerusalemu pyaka pisere." 
2Kings8:18 Iye adateweza pikhachita mafumu a Israele ninga montho mukhachitira banja ya Ahabu, thangwi iye adasemba mwana wamkazi wa Ahabu. Iye adachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA," 
2Kings8:19 kwache MBUYA hadapifune tayu pyakuvunga Yuda, thangwi iye akhadadumbira kuna Davite kuti pidzukulu pyache pinatonga kwenda na kwenda." 
2Kings8:20 Pandzidzi ukhatonga Yehoramu, Edomu adapandukira Yuda mbapiimira pa yekha ene." 
2Kings8:21 Natenepo Yehoramu adenda ku Zairi na pingolo pyache pyonsene. Aedomu adaazungulira, mbwenye na mosiku iye pabodzi pene na akadamu a pingolo pyache adakwanisa kugumana njira mbathawa. Kwache anyankhondo ache adamsiya mbabwerera kumisa kwawo." 
2Kings8:22 Na lero Aedomu ngakupandukira kuna Ayuda. Pandzidzi ontho-onthowo mzinda wa Libina udapandukirambo. 
2Kings8:23 Pinango pyonsene pidachitika Yehoramu mbali mfumu na pyonsene pidachita iye pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Yuda. 
2Kings8:24 Yehoramu adagonera mkono mbakaikhwa m'masiye a makolo ache mumzinda wa Davite. Kubuluka penepo Ahazia adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache. 
2Kings8:25 Chaka chakhumi na piwiri Yoramu mwana Ahabu, mbali mfumu wa Israele, Ahazia mwana Yehoramu adapita ufumu wa Yuda," 
2Kings8:26 uku ana pyaka makumawiri na piwiri, tenepo adatonga mu Yerusalemu chaka chibodzi. Mache akhali Atalia mwana Mfumu Ahabu, chidzukulu cha Omri mfumu wa Israele." 
2Kings8:27 Iye adateweza pikhachita banja ya Ahabu mbachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA ninga montho mudachitira banja ya Ahabu, thangwi iwo ukhali ubaleawo pakuchita kusemberana." 
2Kings8:28 Mfumu Ahazia adakhala gulu ibodzi ene yankhondo na Yoramu mwana Ahabu kumenya nkhondo na Hazaele mfumu wa Aramu. Iwo adamenyena mu Ramoti-Gileadi, tenepo Yoramu adakuwazwa pankhondo yeneyi." 
2Kings8:29 Natenepo Mfumu Yoramu adabwerera ku Yezereele, towera chironda chikapole, chile chidampasa Aaramu pa Ramoti pikhachita iwo nkhondo na Hazaele mfumu wa Aramu. Kubuluka penepo Ahazia mwana Yehoramu mfumu wa Yuda adenda ku Yezereele kaona Yoramu mwana Ahabu, thangwi iye akhadakuwazwa." 
2Kings9:1 Mprofeti Elisha adachemeresa munthu wa m'gulu ya maprofeti mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Sasanyika kwenda ku Ramoti-Gileadi. Ukwate mtete wa mafutawa." 
2Kings9:2 Ungafika kweneko usake-sake Yehu, mwana Yehosafati, mdzukulu wa Nimishi. Ungamgumana ndoko naye pakhundu kutali na anzache mbupite naye m'subi ya m'bwaloletu." 
2Kings9:3 Kubuluka penepo ukwate mtete wa mafutawa mbuukhuthulire mumsolo mwache, pontho ulonge kuti, ‘Pyalonga MBUYA mphipi: Ndikukudzoza kukhala mfumu wa Israele,’ Ungamala penepo, fungula msuwo mbuthawe; leka dembuka.”" 
2Kings9:4 Natenepo mprofeti wachiphale ule, adenda ku Ramoti-Gileadi." 
2Kings9:5 Pidafika iye adagumana akadamu a anyankhondo ali khale-khale pabodzi pene. Iye adalonga mbati, “Ndina mafala akuti ndikupangeni mkadamu.” Yehu adavunza mbati, “Analonga na iwe mbani pakati pathupa?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ndikulonga na imwe mkadamu.”" 
2Kings9:6 Yehu adalamuka mbapita m'nyumba. Natenepo mprofeti ule adakhuthula mafuta mumsolo mwa Yehu mbalonga mbati, “Pyalonga MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele mphipi: Ndikukudzoza kukhala mfumu wa Israele anthu anga." 
2Kings9:7 Pontho iwe wathema kuvunga banja ya Ahabu mbuyako, pontho ine ndinati ndibwezere chiropa cha anyabasanga, maprofeti, na chiropa cha anyabasa a MBUYA chidachuchisa Yezebele chile." 
2Kings9:8 Banja yonsene ya Ahabu inavungika. Ndinati ndiphe mu Israele mamuna onsene wa m'banja ya Ahabu, bitchu penu mtumbe." 
2Kings9:9 Ndinachitisa banja ya Ahabu kukhala ninga banja ya Yeroboamu mwana Nebati, pontho ninga banja ya Baasha mwana Ahia." 
2Kings9:10 Kulonga pya Yezebele, anambwa anadya manungo ache pambuto ya Yezereele, pontho nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene anafuna dzamuikha m'masiye tayu.” Pidamala iye, adafungula msuwo mbathawa." 
2Kings9:11 Pidabuluka Yehu panja kuna akadamu anzache, mbodzi wa iwo adavunza mbati, “Ayi nkhwadidi kwene? Nyansalayimbo adadza dzatani kuna imwe?” Imwe mukumdziwa kale munthu wacheyu na pinthu pimbalonga iye?" 
2Kings9:12 Anzache adatawira mbati, “Nkhabe tayu, ngatipange pyalonga iye?” Yehu adalonga mbati, “Andipanga mafala alonga MBUYA kuti, ‘Ndikukudzoza kukhala mfumu wa Israele.’ ”" 
2Kings9:13 Msanga-msanga iwo adadula pyakufinika pyawo mbapithasika pansikada kuti iye aimirepo. Kubuluka penepo adaliza ngoma mbakhuwa mbati, “Yehu ndi mfumu!”" 
2Kings9:14 Natenepo Yehu, mwana Yehosafati, mdzukuluache Nimishi adasasanya kuchita pyakuipa kuna Yoramu. Pandzidzi wenewu Yoramu na Aisraele onsene akhatchinjiriza Ramoti-Gileadi gopesera Hazaele mfumu wa Aramu," 
2Kings9:15 mbwenye Mfumu Yoramu akhadabwerera ku Yezereele kudikhira kuti chironda chache chitome pola, chile chidampasa Aaramu pandzidzi ukhachita iwo nkhondo na Hazaele mfumu wa Aramu. Yehu adalonga kuna akadamu anzache ale mbati, “Ngakhala imwe mulidi kukhundu kwanga paleke khala munthu wakupyanga kubuluka mumzinda muno kwenda ku Yezereele kalonga pya mphangwazi tayu.”" 
2Kings9:16 Kubuluka penepo adakwira pachingolo chache mbaenda ku Yezereele, thangwi Yoramu akhapuma kweneko, pontho Ahazia mfumu wa Yuda akhadabwera kudzamuona." 
2Kings9:17 Nyakulondali wakukhala pansanja mu Yezereele adaona Yehu na amunache akufika chifupi. Iye adakhuwa mbati, “Ndikuona magulu anango ankhondo akubwera.” Yoramu adatawira mbati, “Panga nyakupakira kavalo mbodzi kuti aende kagumanikana nawo, pontho akavunze ngakhala iwo mbashamwali penu anyamalwa.”" 
2Kings9:18 Nyakupakira kavalo adathamanga kagumanikana nawo mbalonga mbati, “Mfumu akuvunza kuti ndimwe ashamwali penu anyamalwa?” Yehu adatawira mbati, “Iwe uli napyonji? Pita m'nduli mwangamu.” Nyakulondali ule adalonga mbati, “Nyamphangwa ule aafikira, mbwenye hakubwerako tayu.”" 
2Kings9:19 Natenepo mfumu adatumizako nyakupakira kavalo wachiwiri. Pidafika iye kuna Yehu adalonga mbati, “Mfumu akuvunza kuti ayi ndimwe ashamwali penu anyamalwa.” Yehu adatawira mbati, “Iwe uli napyonji? Pita m'nduli mwangamu.”" 
2Kings9:20 Nyakulondali ule adalonga pontho mbati, “Nyamphangwa ule aafikira, mbwenye hakubwerako tayu. Kufambisa kwache chingolo kukukhala ninga kwa Yehu mdzukuluache Nimishi, thangwi iye ambafambisa ninga nyansala.”" 
2Kings9:21 Yoramu adatawira mbati, “Chitisa chingolo changa kukhala chakusasanyika.” Tenepo pidasasanyika icho, Yoramu mfumu wa Israele na Ahazia mfumu wa Yuda adapakira kada munthu chingolo chache kagumanikana na Yehu. Iwo adagumanikana pamunda, ule ukhali wa Naboti wa ku Yezereele." 
2Kings9:22 Yoramu pidaona iye Yehu adamvunza mbati, “Ayi Yehu wadzera mtendere?” Yehu adatawira mbati, “Panakhala tani mtendere uku ufiti na kupembedza milungu inango pyakuinjipa pidatomesa mako Yezebele tikhali napyo?”" 
2Kings9:23 Pidazungunuka Yoramu kuthawa, adakhuwa kuna Ahazia mbati, “Anthu atipandukira, Ahazia!”" 
2Kings9:24 Tenepo Yehu adakweya utache mbalasa nawo Yoramu pakati pa mapewache. Tswimo ile idapitiratu mbikalasa mtima, natenepo iye adagwera m'chingolo mwache mule mbaferatu." 
2Kings9:25 Yehu adalonga kuna Bidikari thubu wache mbati, “Mthukule umponye m'munda mwa Naboti wa ku Yezereele. Kumbuka kuti pikhafamba ife pabodzi m'pingolo pyathu m'nduli mwa Ahabu, babache Yoramu, MBUYA adalongeratu pinthu pyakupokanyisana naye kuti:" 
2Kings9:26 ‘Dzulo ndidaona chiropa cha Naboti na cha anache. Ine MBUYA ndinadumbira kuti iwe unati upagali chiropa chenecho pamunda ontho uno.’ Natenepo mthukuleni mumponye m'munda mwa Naboti ninga montho mukhadalongera MBUYA.” 
2Kings9:27 Pidaona Ahazia mfumu wa Yuda pinthu pidachitika pile, adathawa na njira yakwendera ku Beti-Hagani. Yehu adamthamangisa mbakhuwa mbati, “Weneyo pontho mpheni!” Iwo adamkuwaza uku mbali m'chingolo mwache panjira yakwendera ku Guri chifupi na luwani ya Ibuleamu, kwache iye adathawira kumzinda wa Megido mbafera kweneko." 
2Kings9:28 Mathubu ache adakwata mtembo wache pachingolo kwenda naye ku Yerusalemu mbakamuikha m'masiye a makolo ache mumzinda wa Davite. 
2Kings9:29 Chaka chakhumi na chibodzi cha Yoramu mwana Ahabu, mbali mfumu wa Israele, Ahazia akhadapita ufumu wa Yuda." 
2Kings9:30 Kubuluka penepo Yehu adenda ku Yezereele. Pidava Yezebele pinthu pikhadachitika pile adakhwaza tinta m'tchiye zache na kusasanya mwadidi tsisi yache kupithemesera. Tenepo adaimira pazhanera ya nyumba yachifumu mbayang'ana pansi kunjira. 
2Kings9:31 Pikhadza Yehu na pamsuwo wa mpanda pale, Yezebele adakhuwa mbati, “Iwe Zimri, mphandu wakupha mbuyache, ayi wadzera mtendere kuno?”" 
2Kings9:32 Yehu adakwiza maso ache m'dzulu mbakhuwa mbati, “Ali kukhundu kwanga mbani?” Mathubu awiri penu atatu a ku nyumba yachifumu adayang'ana pansi na pazhanera pakhali Yehu pale," 
2Kings9:33 tenepo Yehu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Mponyeni pansi!” Iwo adamponyeradi pansi, tenepo chiropa chache chidawazira mafufu na akavalo. Yehu adapondedza-pondedza mtembo wa Yezebele pakufambisapo akavalo na chingolo." 
2Kings9:34 Kubuluka penepo Yehu adapita m'nyumba yachifumu ile mbadya na kumwa mwenemo. Iye adalonga mbati, “Mkwateni mkazi wakutembererwayo mbamukamuikhe m'masiye thangwi iye ndi mwana mfumu.”" 
2Kings9:35 Mbwenye amuna akhadatumwa kaikha mkazi ule m'masiye, adagumanapo kwene chibade cha msolo wache na magogodo a manja na manyalo ache basi." 
2Kings9:36 Pidakapilonga iwo kuna Yehu, Yehu adalonga mbati, “Penepi ndiye pidalonga MBUYA kuti pinachitika kudzera muna nyabasache Elia kuti, ‘Anambwa anadya mtembo wa Yezebele m'nthemba ya Yezereele." 
2Kings9:37 Manyenyeswa a mtembo wache anamwazikana ninga ulowa mwakuti nkhabe munthu unango anakwanisa dzalonga kuti: Yezebele ngushu.’ ” 
2Kings10:1 Pakhali pidzukulu makumanomwe pya Mfumu Ahabu, pile pikhakhala mumzinda wa Samaria. Yehu adalemba kalata mbaitumiza kuna mathubu a mumzindamo, akulu-akulu na kuna anyakuyang'anira pidzukulu pya Ahabu. Kalatayo idalembwa tenepa:" 
2Kings10:2 “Imwe ndimwe anyakuyang'anira pidzukulu pya mfumu, pontho kweneko muna pingolo, akavalo, pida pya nkhondo, pontho mizinda yakutchingwa na mpanda. Natenepo sindzidzi imwe nkhutambira kalatayo," 
2Kings10:3 imwe mwathema kusankhula munthu wadidiletu pontho wakuthemaletu kubulukira pa pidzukulu pya mfumu mbamumpitise ufumu; mungamala kuchita tenepo mumenye nkhondo kumtchinjiriza.” 
2Kings10:4 Mathubu a mumzinda mule adachita mantha mbalonga mbati, “Ngakhala mafumu awiri adachimwana kumenyana naye, apo ifembo ndiye tani?”" 
2Kings10:5 Natenepo mkadamu wa kunyumba ya mfumu, mkulu wa boma mumzindamo, akulu-akulu na anyakuyang'anira pidzukulu pya mfumu adatumiza mphangwa izi kuna Yehu: “Ife ndife anyabasanu, pontho tinati tichite pyonsene pinatipanga imwe. Kwache ife nkhabe funa kusankhula munthu na mbodzi ene tayu kukhala mfumu. Imwe mwathema kuchita pinanyerezera imwe kuti mphyadidipyo.”" 
2Kings10:6 Kubuluka penepo Yehu adalemba kalata inango mbati, “Ngakhala imwe muli kukhundu kwanga pontho kuti munandivera, mangwana ndzidzi ninga ontho uno mundidzesere misolo ya pidzukulu pya Mfumu Ahabu kuno ku Yezereele.” Pidzukulu makumanomwe pya Ahabu pikhakhala na akulu-akulu a mumzindamo, akhaalera ale." 
2Kings10:7 Pidafika kalata ile, amuna ale adapha pidzukulu pya Ahabu makumanomwe pile. Iwo adakwata misolo ya anyakufa ale mbaiikha m'pitundu mbaitumiza kuna Yehu ku Yezereele." 
2Kings10:8 Pidafika nyamphangwa kuna Yehu adalonga mbati, “Iwo adza na misolo ya pidzukulu pya Mfumu Ahabu.” Tenepo Yehu adalonga mbati, “Iikheni pamilu miwiri pamsuwo wa mpanda wa mzinda kufikirana mangwana na machibese.”" 
2Kings10:9 Mangwana mwache na machibese, Yehu adabuluka panja. Iye adaimira pamaso pa anthu onsene mbalonga mbati, “Imwe ndimwe anthu okhonda dawa. Ine ndine ndidasandukira mbuyanga mbandimpha, apo mbani apha anthu onsene ali panowa?" 
2Kings10:10 Lero pidziweni kuti pinthu pyonsene pidalonga MBUYA kupokanyisana na Ahabu pinati pikwane-kwane, pontho MBUYA achita pinthu pidadumbira iye kudzera muna nyabasache Elia.”" 
2Kings10:11 Natenepo Yehu adapha munthu onsene wa m'banja ya Ahabu, ule akhadasalira mu Yezereele pabodzi pene na mathubu ache onsene, ashamwali ache aponda-pondembo, pontho na anyansembe ache ene; nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene wa iwo adasalira na moyo tayu." 
2Kings10:12 Kubuluka penepo Yehu adasasanyika mbaenda ku Samaria. Pidafika iye pambuto yakuchemerwa “Msasa wa Makabuswa,”" 
2Kings10:13 iye adagumanikana na abale anango a Mfumu Ahazia wa ku Yuda mbaavunza mbati, “Ayi ndimwe ani?” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Ndife abale ache Mfumu Ahazia, tenepo tadza kuno kuti tipereke mwenyikiro kuna ana a mfumu na kuna ana a matsano.”" 
2Kings10:14 Yehu adatonga amunache mbati, “Aphateni amoyo.” Tenepo iwo adaaphatadi amoyo mbakaapha chifupi na mchera wa mu Msasa wa Makabuswa; anyakufawo akhalipo amuna makumanayi na awiri. Nkhabe mbodzi wa iwo adasiyiwa na moyo tayu." 
2Kings10:15 Pidabuluka Yehu penepo, panjira adagumanikana na Yehonadabu mwana Rekabu, ule akhabwera dzagumanikana na Yehu. Yehu adampasa mwenyikiro mbalonga mbati, “Iwe na ine chathu ntchibodzi chene, ayi iwe unakwanisa kundiphedza?” Yehonadabu adatawira mbati, “Ande, ndinakuphedza.” Yehu adalonga mbati, “Ngakhala ndi tenepo ndipase dzanjako.” Iwo adakhethesana manjawo, tenepo Yehu adamkwizika m'chingolo." 
2Kings10:16 Yehu adalonga mbati, “Tende pabodzi pene ukaone phinganga pabasa ya MBUYA.” Natenepo iye adafamba naye pabodzi m'chingolo mwache mule." 
2Kings10:17 Pidafika Yehu ku Samaria, adapha onsene a m'banja ya Ahabu, akhadasalira kweneko ale; iye adavunga onsene ninga montho mukhadalongera MBUYA kuna Elia." 
2Kings10:18 Kubuluka penepo Yehu adachemeresa anthu onsene mu Samaria mbalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ahabu adatumikira milungu Baala mwakuchepa, mbwenye Yehu anati anyanye kumtumikira." 
2Kings10:19 Natenepo chemeresani maprofeti onsene a Baala, anyakumpembedza onsene na anyansembe ache onsene. Onesesani kuti paleke khala mbodzi okhonda kudza thangwi ndinafuna kuchita mwambo ukulu wakupereka nsembe kuna Baala. Munthu onsene okhonda kudza anati aphiwe.” Yehu akhachita penepi mwakuanyengeza ninga msampha towera avunge anyakupembedza Baala onsene." 
2Kings10:20 Yehu adalonga mbati, “Chemeresani mgumano kuti tilemedze Baala.” Natenepo anthu adachemeresa mgumano ule." 
2Kings10:21 Kubuluka penepo iye adatumiza mphangwa mu Israele monsene, tenepo anyakupembedza Baala onsene adadza; nkhabe na mbodzi ene adakhonda kwendako tayu. Iwo onsene adagumanyikana m'nyumba yakupembedzeramo Baala mpakana nyumba yonsene idadzala kutomera nkhomo kufikirana nkhomo." 
2Kings10:22 Natenepo Yehu adalonga kuna nyakukoya mikhanjo mbati, “Bwera na mikhanjo yakupambulika mbuipereke kuna anyakupembedza Baala onsene.” Tenepo iye adadza nayodi mikhanjo ile mbaipereka kuna iwo." 
2Kings10:23 Kubuluka penepo Yehu na Yehonadabu mwana Rekabu adapita m'nyumba yakupembedzamo Baala ile. Yehu adalonga kuna anyakupembedza Baala ale mbati, “Muyang'ane yang'ane pakati panupo, pontho muonesese kuti paleke khala anyakupembedza MBUYA pabodzi pene na imwe muno tayu. Muno mukhale anyakupembedza Baala ene basi.”" 
2Kings10:24 Natenepo uwiriawo adapita m'nyumba mule kupereka nsembe na pyakupereka pyakupyerera. Pandzidzi wenewo Yehu akhadaikha kale amuna makumasere kukhala kunja kwa nyumbayo mbaacheuza mbati, “Ngakhala munthu analekerera mbodzi wa amuna anakupasani ine m'manja mwanu lerowa, kuthawa anapagali moyo wache ndiye.”" 
2Kings10:25 Sindzidzi Yehu nkhumalisa pereka nsembe ile, adatonga anyakulondali na akadamu mbati, “Pitani m'nyumbamu mukaaphe; lekani thawisa munthu na mbodzi ene.” Natenepo iwo adaapha onsene na talasada. Anyakulondali na akadamu ale adataya mitembo ya anthu ale kunja. Kubuluka penepo iwo adapita m'subi yakupambulika ya m'bwaloletu ya nyumba yakupembedzeramo Baala," 
2Kings10:26 mbabulusa panja chiguwa chakupambulika mbachipisa moto. 
2Kings10:27 Iwo adagomola chiguwa chakupambulikachi mbafudza-fudza nyumba yakupembedzeramo Baala mbaisanduza mbuto yakupambukirako. 
2Kings10:28 Natenepo Yehu adavunga chipembedzo cha Baala mu Israele. 
2Kings10:29 Kwache iye hadaleke tayu kudawa kukulu kukhachita Yeroboamu mwana Nebati kule kukhachitisa Aisraele kudawa pakupembedza mifanikizo ya anamphulu yagolidi pa Betele na Dani. 
2Kings10:30 MBUYA adalonga kuna Yehu mbati, “Na thangwi yakuti iwe wachita pinthu pyakulungama pontho pyakuthema pamaso panga, pontho kuti wachita kuna banja ya Ahabu pinthu pikhanyerezera ine kupichita pile, pidzukulu pyako pinakhala pampando wachifumu mu Israele kufikirana mifendu inayi inadzayo.”" 
2Kings10:31 Kwache Yehu hakhachita mphole-mphole tayu kukoya mwambo wa MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele na mtimache onsene. M'mbuto mwache iye hadafune kuleka pyakudawa pikhachita Yeroboamu pile pidachitisa Aisraele kudawa. 
2Kings10:32 Nsiku zenezo MBUYA adatoma kuchepesa madire a dziko ya Israele. Hazaele adakunda Aisraele m'nthemba yonsene 
2Kings10:33 wakumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani mpakana kuluwani ya Aroeri chifupi na mkulo wa Arinoni, penepa nkhuthimiza nthemba ya Gileadi na Bashani kule kukhakhala madzinza a Gadi, Rubeni na Manase yakumabulukiro dzuwa." 
2Kings10:34 Pinango pyonsene pidachitika Yehu mbali mfumu na pyonsene pidachita iye mwakuwanga mtima pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Israele. 
2Kings10:35 Yehu adagonera mkono mbaikhwa m'masiye a makolo ache mu Samaria. Tenepo Yehoahazi mwanache adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache. 
2Kings10:36 Yehu adakhala mu Samaria mbatonga Israele pyaka makumawiri na pisere. 
2Kings11:1 Sindzidzi Atalia mache Mfumu Ahazia nkhudziwa pya kuphiwa kwa mwanache, iye adatonga kuti anthu onsene a m'banja ya chifumu aphiwe." 
2Kings11:2 Mbwenye Yoasi mwanache Ahazia adapulumuka. Iye akhali chifupi kuphiwa kubodzi kwene na ana anango ale, mbwenye Yehosheba mwana Mfumu Yehoramu pontho nyamaingache Ahazia ndiye adampulumusa. Iye adakwata pabodzi pene na makayayache mbaambisa m'subi yakugona m'Nyumba ya Mulungu kuabulusa pamaso pa Atalia, towera iye aleke phiwa." 
2Kings11:3 Pyaka pitanthatu Yehosheba adayang'anira mwadidi mwana ule mbathimiza basi kumbisa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, uku Atalia akutonga dziko." 
2Kings11:4 Mbwenye chaka chachinomwe Yehoiada adachemeresa akadamu a anyakulondali mfumu na a anyakulondali nyumba ya chifumu kudza kuna iye ku Nyumba ya MBUYA, kule kudaadumbirisa iye kuvera pinthu pikhasasanya iye kupichita pile. Kubuluka penepo iye adaaonesa Yoasi, mwana Mfumu Ahazia." 
2Kings11:5 Iye adaapanga mbati, “Imwe mwathema kuchita ipi: imwe ale buswanu ili pa Nsiku Yakupuma mwathema kupigawa m'magulu matatu: gulu ibodzi yathema kulondali nyumba ya chifumu;" 
2Kings11:6 gulu yachiwiri yathema kulondali pamsuwo wa Suri, pontho gulu yachitatu yathema kulondali pamsuwo wa mpanda kunduli kwa anyakulondali anango ale." 
2Kings11:7 Tenepo magulu anango awiri, ale si buswawo tayu pa Nsiku Yakupuma, athema kulondali pa Nyumba ya Mulungu kutchinjiriza mfumu." 
2Kings11:8 Imirani mwakuzungulira mfumu kada munthu aphatira chida cha nkhondo m'manja mwache. Munthu onsene anafika chifupi na imweyo athema kuphiwa. Khalani chifupiletu na mfumu konsene kwene kunaenda iye.” 
2Kings11:9 Akadamu ale adachita ninga montho mudaapangira Yehoiada nyansembe. Mkadamu onsene akhakwata amunache, ale akhakotoka na ale akhatoma buswawo pa Nsiku Yakupuma mbadza nawo kuna Yehoiada nyansembe." 
2Kings11:10 Kubuluka penepo nyansembe ule adapereka kuna akadamu madipa na pyakugedera matswimo, pile pikhali pya Mfumu Davite mbapikoyiwa m'Nyumba ya MBUYA." 
2Kings11:11 Iye adaikha amuna akuphatira matalasada m'manja mwawo kuzungulira kutsogolo kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu, kutchinjiriza mfumu." 
2Kings11:12 Yehoiada adabulusa panja Yoasi mbamvazika chipewu chachifumu. Iye adapaswa pontho bukhu ya matongero a dziko mbadzozwa ufumu. Tenepo anthu adaimba m'manja mbakhuwa mbati, “Dondowe mfumu!”" 
2Kings11:13 Pidava Atalia kusokosera kukhachita anthu na anyakulondali kule, adenda kukhali anthu kule ku Nyumba ya MBUYA." 
2Kings11:14 Penepo iye adaona mfumu wachinchino ule, aimira chifupi na mzati pamsuwo wa Nyumba ya Mulungu ninga mwa mtemo wawo. Iye adazungulirwa na mathubu, pontho na anyakuliza ngoma. Anthu onsene akhakhuwa mbaliza ngoma thangwi yakukomerwa. Natenepo Atalia adang'amba nguwo zache mwakuzhangali mbakhuwa mbati, “Ngupandu, ngupandu!”" 
2Kings11:15 Yehoiada hadafune tayu kuti Atalia apherwe chifupi na Nyumba ya Mulungu, natenepo adatonga akadamu ankhondo mbati, “Mkwatireni kunja mkaziyu pakati pa mizere ya anyakulondali, pontho phani munthu onsene wakufuna pyakumvunulirayo.”" 
2Kings11:16 Iwo adamphata mbamkwekwetera kunyumba yachifumu, tenepo pidafika iwo pamsuwo wa mpanda wa Kavalo, adampha." 
2Kings11:17 Kubuluka penepo Yehoiada adachita chiverano pakati pa MBUYA na Mfumu Yoasi, pontho na anthu kuti iwo anakhala anthu a MBUYA. Iye adachita pontho chiverano pakati pa mfumu na anthu." 
2Kings11:18 Tenepo anthu adenda kunyumba yakupembedzeramo milungu Baala mbaigomola. Iwo adaswa maguwa ansembe na mifanikizo mbapha Matani nyansembe wa Baala patsogolo pa maguwa ansembe. Tenepo Yehoiada adaikha pabuswa anyakulondali pa Nyumba ya MBUYA. 
2Kings11:19 Iye adakwata akadamu ankhondo, anyakulondali mfumu na anyakulondali nyumba yachifumu, pontho na anthu onsene; tenepo onsene pabodzi pene adakwata mfumu kubulukira ku Nyumba ya Mulungu kwenda naye kunyumba yachifumu mbapita na pamsuwo wa anyakulondali. Kubuluka penepo mfumu adakhala pampando wache wachifumu." 
2Kings11:20 Anthu onsene adakomerwa pyakwanga. Tenepo mumzindamo mukhali mtendere, thangwi Atalia akhadaphiwa panyumba yachifumu." 
2Kings11:21 Yoasi akhali na pyaka pinomwe pidapita iye ufumu wa Yuda. 
2Kings12:1 Chaka chachinomwe Yehu mbali mfumu wa Israele, Yoasi adapita ufumu wa Yuda mbatonga mu Yerusalemu pyaka makumanayi. Mache akhali Zibia, ule akhali wa kumzinda wa Beeresheba." 
2Kings12:2 Yoasi adachita pyakulungama pamaso pa MBUYA moyo wache onsene, thangwi Yehoiada nyansembe ndiye akhali phungu wache." 
2Kings12:3 Kwache mbuto zakupembedzerapo milungu nee zidavungwa tayu, tenepo anthu akhathimiza basi kwenda kweneko kapereka nsembe na kufukiza pyakununkhira." 
2Kings12:4 Yoasi adalonga kuna anyansembe mbati, “Gumanyisani kobiri zonsene zile zikhadza ninga pyakupereka pyakupambulika ku Nyumba ya MBUYA; kobiri za msonkho wa munthu onsene, kobiri zakuperekwa thangwi ya kudumbira kwa munthu, na kobiri zakuperekwa mwakufuna kwa munthu ku Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
2Kings12:5 Nyansembe onsene atambire kobiri kubulukira kuna mbodzi wa anyakukoya kobiri, tenepo muziphatise basa yakusasanyira mwakugumuka na pyonsene pyakuvungika pa Nyumba ya Mulungu.”" 
2Kings12:6 Mbwenye chaka chamakumawiri na chitatu Yoasi mbali mfumu anyansembe hakhadadzati kusasanya pontho Nyumba ya Mulungu ile tayu. 
2Kings12:7 Natenepo Mfumu Yoasi adachemeresa Yehoiada nyansembe na anyansembe anango mbaavunza mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji mwakhonda kusasanya pontho Nyumba ya Mulungu? Natenepo lekani kwata pontho kobiri kubulukira kuna anyakukoya kobiri zanu, kwache muzipereke kuti ziphate basa yakusasanya pontho Nyumba ya Mulungu.”" 
2Kings12:8 Anyansembe adatawirizana napyo kuti iwo hanatambirave kobiri kubulukira kuna anthu, pontho kuti hanasasanya pontho Nyumba ya Mulungu okha ene tayu." 
2Kings12:9 Yehoiada nyansembe adakwata bokosi mbaphola mphamphacheyo. Iye adaiikha m'khundu mwa guwa yansembe kukhundu ya kumadyo pinapita munthu Nyumba ya MBUYA. Anyansembe, ale ambalondali pamsuwo wa Nyumba ile, adaikha m'bokosi mule kobiri zonsene zikhadzeswa ku Nyumba ya Mulungu ile." 
2Kings12:10 Ndzidzi onsene ukhaona iwo kuti kobiri zadzalamo m'bokosi mule nyakulemba wa mfumu na Nyansembe Wamkulu akhadza mbalengesa kobiri zile zikhadzeswa ku Nyumba ya Mulungu mbaziikha m'mabudu. 
2Kings12:11 Kobirizo zingamala lengeswa mbizilembwa, iwo akhazipereka kuna amuna adasankhulwa kuyang'anira basa pa Nyumba ya Mulungu ale. Iwo akhapagali anthu akhaphata basa pa Nyumba ya MBUYA, anyakupala matabwa na anyakumanga nyumba," 
2Kings12:12 anyaluso pakumanga na miyala, pontho na anyakusema miyala. Iwo adagula pontho matabwa na miyala yakusemwa mwadidi yakusasanyira nayo nyumba ya MBUYA, pontho na pinthu pyonsene pyakufunika pa kusasanya pontho Nyumba ya MBUYA." 
2Kings12:13 Kobiri, zile zikhadzeswa ku Nyumba ya Mulungu nee zikhaphatave basa yakusasanya pontho makhomitcho asiliva, pyakukwizira tsakala ya nyale, ndilo zakuwazira nazo chiropa, ngoma penu chinthu chinango chene chagolidi penu siliva cha m'Nyumba ya Mulungu tayu." 
2Kings12:14 Kobirizo basache ikhali yakupagalira amuna akhaphata basa pakusasanya pontho Nyumba ya Mulungu ale. 
2Kings12:15 Iwo hadafune kudziwa kuti kobirizo zikhaphatiswa tani basa na anyakutambirisa anyabasa, thangwi iwo adaziphatisa basa mwakukhulupirika monsene mwene." 
2Kings12:16 Kobiri zakuperekwa nsembe kupagalira pyakudawa, pontho kobiri zakuperekwa nsembe kulekerera pyakudawa nee zikhaikhwa tayu m'bokosi m'Nyumba ya MBUYA, thangwi zenezo zikhali za anyansembe." 
2Kings12:17 Pandzidzi ninga wenewu Hazaele mfumu wa Aramu akhadenda kamenya nkhondo na mzinda wa Gati mbaukunda. Kubuluka penepo iye adanyerezera pyakusosa Yerusalemu. 
2Kings12:18 Mbwenye Yoasi mfumu wa Yuda adakwata mitukwa yonsene yakupambulika idapereka makolo ache, Yehosafati, Yehoramu, na Ahazia, mafumu a Yuda kuna MBUYA, pontho na mitukwa ikhadapereka iye ene kuna MBUYA pabodzi pene na golidi onsene adagumanwa m'pyakukoyeramo m'Nyumba ya MBUYA pontho na m'nyumba ya chifumu. Iye adaitumiza kuna Hazaele mfumu wa Aramu. Natenepo Hazaele adaleka pyakufuna kumenyana na Yerusalemu." 
2Kings12:19 Pinango pyonsene pidachitika Yoasi mbali mfumu na pyonsene pidachita iye pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Yuda. 
2Kings12:20 Mathubu ache adamsandukira mbampha pambuto yakundendemezwa yakumabulukiro dzuwa a mzinda wa Yerusalemu panjira yakwendera ku Sila. 
2Kings12:21 Mathubu adampha ale akhali Yozakari mwana Shimeati na Yehozabadi mwana Shomeri. Iye adafa mbaikhwa m'masiye a makolo ache mumzinda wa Davite. Tenepo Amazia mwanache adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache. 
2Kings13:1 Chaka chamakumawiri na chitatu Yoasi mwana Ahazia mbali mfumu wa Yuda, Yehoahazi mwana Yehu adapita ufumu wa Israele mbatonga mu Samaria pyaka khumi na pinomwe." 
2Kings13:2 Iye adachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA mbateweza pyakudawa pidachita Yeroboamu mwana Nebati, pile pidachitisa Aisraele onsene kudawa, pontho iye hadaleke pyakudawa pyache pile tayu." 
2Kings13:3 Natenepo MBUYA adazhangalira Aisraele mbaachitisa ndzidzi ukulu ene kukhala pansi pa utongi wa Hazaele mfumu wa Aramu na Beni-Hadadi mwanache. 
2Kings13:4 Tenepo Yehoahazi adapemphera kuna MBUYA, natenepo MBUYA adava kupemphera kwache, pontho iye adaona kuti mfumu wa Aramu akhapondereza pyakwanga Aisraele." 
2Kings13:5 MBUYA adapereka dombo kuna Aisraele ule adaabulusa pansi pa utongi wa Aaramu. Natenepo Aisraele adakhala m'misa mwawo mwene ninga mukhachitira iwo pakutoma. 
2Kings13:6 Mbwenye iwo hadaleke pyakudawa pya banja ya Yeroboamu, pile pidachitisa Aisraele kudawa; iwo adathimiza kuchita penepyo. Dzimunthu wa milungu Ashera adathimiza basi kukhala mu Samaria." 
2Kings13:7 Kulonga pya anyankhondo a Yehoahazi nkhabe chinthu na chibodzi chene chikhadasalira kupambula amuna makumashanu akupakira akavalo, pingolo khumi, pontho na anyankhondo akufamba pansi pikwi khumi; thangwi mfumu wa Aramu akhadavunga pinango pyonsene mwakuti adakhala ninga fumbi pandzidzi wa kububuda." 
2Kings13:8 Pinango pyonsene pidachitika Yehoahazi mbali mfumu na pyonsene pidachita iye mwakuwanga mtima pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Israele. 
2Kings13:9 Yehoahazi adagonera mkono mbaikhwa m'masiye a makolo ache mu Samaria. Tenepo Yehoasi mwanache adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache. 
2Kings13:10 Chaka chamakumatatu na chinomwe Yoasi mbali mfumu wa Yuda, Yehoasi mwana Yehoahazi adapita ufumu wa Israele mbatonga mu Samaria pyaka khumi na pitanthatu." 
2Kings13:11 Iye adachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA mbateweza pyakudawa pidachita Yeroboamu mwana Nebati, pile pidachitisa Aisraele onsene kudawa, pontho iye hadaleke pyakudawa pyache pile tayu." 
2Kings13:12 Pinango pyonsene pidachitika Yehoasi mbali mfumu, pyonsene pidachita iye, na kuwanga kwache mtima pankhondo kumenyana na Amazia mfumu wa Yuda pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Israele." 
2Kings13:13 Yehoasi adagonera mkono mbaikhwa m'masiye a makolo ache, mafumu a Israele, mu Samaria. Tenepo Yeroboamu mwanache adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache." 
2Kings13:14 Na ndzidzi wenewu Elisha akhasanyika pyakwanga na utenda, ule pakumalisira pache adafa nawo. Yehoasi mfumu wa Israele adenda kamuona mbamulira mbati, “Baba, baba! Pingolo na anyakupakira akavalo a Israele.”" 
2Kings13:15 Elisha adalonga mbati, “Kwata uta na matswimo.” Iye adachitadi tenepo." 
2Kings13:16 Elisha adalonga kuna mfumu wa Israele ule mbati, “Phatira utawu m'manja mwako.” Pikhauphatira iye, Elisha adasanjika manjache pamanja a mfumu ule," 
2Kings13:17 mbalonga mbati, “Fungula zhanera yakumabulukiro dzuwa.” Iye adafunguladi, tenepo Elisha adalonga mbati, “Iponye.” Iye adaponyadi. Kubuluka penepo Elisha adalonga mbati, “Tswimo ya MBUYA yakukunda nayo, tswimo yakukunda nayo Aramu. Iwe unavunga monsene mwene Aaramu pa Afeki.”" 
2Kings13:18 Kubuluka penepo iye adalonga kuna mfumu ule mbati, “Kwata matswimo ako.” Mfumu ule adakwatadi, tenepo Elisha adalonga mbati, “Lasa pansi.” Mfumu ule adalasa pansi katatu mbaleka pyache." 
2Kings13:19 Munthu wa Mulungu adazhangali naye munthu ule mbalonga mbati, “Iwe udathema kumenya pansi kashanu penu katanthatu; iwe mbudamenya Aaramu na kuavunga monsene mwene. Mbwenye lero unaavunga kwene katatu basi.”" 
2Kings13:20 Kubuluka penepo Elisha adafa mbaikhwa m'masiye. Chaka na chaka magulu a mapanga a ku Moabu akhali na chisimo chakupita m'dzikomo kapokosera pinthu. 
2Kings13:21 Nsiku inango pikhaikha Aisraele munthu unango m'masiye, mwakututumusa adaona gulu ya Amoabu. Natenepo iwo adamponya munthu ule m'nthumbi ya Elisha mbathawa. Pidakhuya mtembo ule magogodo a Elisha, munthu ule adalamuka mbakhala pontho na moyo, tenepo iye adaimira dzololo." 
2Kings13:22 Hazaele mfumu wa Aramu akhapondereza Aisraele ndzidzi onsene ukhali Yehoahazi mfumu. 
2Kings13:23 Mbwenye MBUYA adaakomera mtima mbava nawo nyambalo, tenepo adaaonesa kuatsalakana kwache thangwi ya chiverano chidachita iye na Abrahamu, Isake na Yakobo. Na lero iye nkhabe funa pyakuavunga penu kuabulusa pamaso pache tayu." 
2Kings13:24 Hazaele mfumu wa Aramu adafa, tenepo Beni-Hadadi mwanache adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache." 
2Kings13:25 Kubuluka penepo Yehoasi mwana Yehoahazi akhadapokosera pontho kubuluka m'manja mwa Beni-Hadadi mwana Hazaele maluwani, ale akhadakwata iye pankhondo kubulukira m'manja mwa Yehoahazi babache. Katatu kene Yehoasi adamkunda, natenepo iye adakwata pontho maluwani a Aisraele." 
2Kings14:1 Chaka chachiwiri Yehoasi mwana Yehoahazi mbali mfumu wa Israele, Amazia mwana Yoasi adapita ufumu wa Yuda." 
2Kings14:2 Iye adapita ufumu uku ana pyaka makumawiri na pishanu mbatonga mu Yerusalemu pyaka makumawiri na pifemba. Mache akhali Yehoadini wa ku Yerusalemu. 
2Kings14:3 Yehoasi adachita pyakulungama pamaso pa MBUYA. Kwache nkhabe kufikira pinthu pidachita Davite kholo wache tayu. Papyonsene pikhachita iye, adateweza pikhadachita Yoasi babache." 
2Kings14:4 Mbwenye mbuto zakupembedzerapo milungu nee zidabuluswa tayu, tenepo anthu adathimiza basi kwenda kweneko kapereka nsembe na kufukiza pyakununkhira." 
2Kings14:5 Sindzidzi Amazia nkhukhazikika pa ufumu wache, adapha mathubu ale adaphambo babache ale." 
2Kings14:6 Kwache iye hadaphe anawo tayu, mbwenye adateweza pidatonga MBUYA m' Mwambo wa Mose kuti: “Makolo mbaleke phiwa thangwi ya kudawa kwa anawo; anambo mbaleke phiwa thangwi ya kudawa kwa ababawo. Munthu athema kuphiwa thangwi ya kudawa kwache.”" 
2Kings14:7 Amazia adapha anyankhondo a Chiedomu pikwi khumi paphedi ya Munyu; iye adapokosera mzinda wa Sela na nkhondo mbauthula Yokoteele, dzina yeneyi ikhalipo basi na lero." 
2Kings14:8 Tenepo Amazia adatuma anyamphangwa kuna Yehoasi mfumu wa Israele kampanga kuti, “Idza kuno, tilemberane mzera!”"
