2Kings14:9 Mbwenye Mfumu Yehoasi adamtawira na mphangwa zakuti, “Pidachitwa na dawe mu Lebanoni, ule adatumiza mphangwa kuna muti wamkungudza mu Lebanoni kuti, ‘Sembesa mwanako wamkazi kuna mwananga wamamuna.’ Nyama yam'tsanga idagwanda na penepo mbipondedza dawe ule." 
2Kings14:10 Chinchino iwe Amazia wakunda Aedomu mbutoma kutumbama. Kuveka kuna iweko udakwane nako tayu mbukhala pyako kumusa kwako. Thangwi yache ninji unafuna kusosa nyatwa, ile inafuna kudzesa kuvungika kuna iwe na anthu ako ene?”" 
2Kings14:11 Mbwenye Amazia hadapiikhe konta penepyo tayu. Natenepo Mfumu Yehoasi adenda pabodzi pene na amunache mbakamenyana naye nkhondo pa Beti-Shemeshi mu Yuda. 
2Kings14:12 Anyankhondo a Amazia adakundwa, tenepo onsene adathawira kumisa kwawo." 
2Kings14:13 Yehoasi adaphata Amazia ninga nyaperezo. Kubuluka penepo Yehoasi adapita mu Yerusalemu mbagwisa mpanda wa mzindawo kutomera pamsuwo wa Eferemu mpakana ku Msuwo Wapankhomo, nsinzo wache ukhali nenene mathanyo madzana mawiri." 
2Kings14:14 Iye adakwata siliva na golidi onsene adagumana iye, pyonsene pya m'Nyumba ya MBUYA na pyonsene m'pyakukoyeramo mfuma m'nyumba yachifumu. Iye adakwata pontho anthu ninga anyaperezo kwenda nawo ku Samaria." 
2Kings14:15 Pinango pyonsene pidachitika Yehoasi mbali mfumu, pyonsene pidachita iye, na kuwanga kwache mtima pankhondo kumenyana na Amazia, pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Israele." 
2Kings14:16 Yehoasi adagonera mkono mbaikhwa m'masiye a makolo ache, mafumu a Israele, mu Samaria. Tenepo Yeroboamu mwanache adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache." 
2Kings14:17 Amazia mfumu wa Yuda adakhala na moyo pyaka khumi na pishanu, pidafa Yehoasi mwana Yehoahazi mfumu wa Israele." 
2Kings14:18 Pinango pyonsene pidachitika Amazia mbali mfumu pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Yuda. 
2Kings14:19 Mu Yerusalemu anthu anango akhadasasanya pyakupha Amazia, natenepo iye adathawira kumzinda wa Lakishi, kwache anyamalwache adamtewera mbakamphera konthoko." 
2Kings14:20 Mtembo wache udathukulwa pakavalo kubwerera nawo ku Yerusalemu. Tenepo adaikhwa m'masiye achifumu mumzinda wa Davite. 
2Kings14:21 Anthu a mu Yuda adapitisa ufumu Uzia wa pyaka khumi na pitanthatu m'mbuto mwa babache Amazia. 
2Kings14:22 Uzia adakunda mbamanga pontho Elati pidagonera mkono babache. 
2Kings14:23 Chaka chakhumi na chishanu Amazia mwana Yoasi mbali mfumu wa Yuda, Yeroboamu mwana Yehoasi adapita ufumu wa Israele mbatonga mu Samaria pyaka makumanayi na chibodzi." 
2Kings14:24 Iye adachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA pakuteweza pyakuipa pidachita Mfumu Yeroboamu mwana Nebati, ule adachitisa Aisraele kudawa." 
2Kings14:25 Iye adakunda pontho nthemba zonsene zile zikhali za Aisraele pakutoma, kutomera kunjira yamakata ku Hamati kumpoto mpakana ku Nyanza Yakufa kumwera. Penepi ndiye pidadumbira MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele kudzera muna nyabasache mprofeti Yona mwana Amitai wa ku Gati Hefere." 
2Kings14:26 MBUYA adaona kusanyika konsene kwa Aisraele onsene, bitchu penu mtumbe, mwakuti pakhali nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene wakuaphedza tayu." 
2Kings14:27 Mbwenye kweneku nee kukhali kufuna kwa MBUYA tayu kuti avunge Israele monsene mwene. Natenepo iye adaapulumusa kudzera muna Mfumu Yeroboamu mwana Yehoasi. 
2Kings14:28 Pinango pyonsene pidachitika Yeroboamu mbali mfumu, pyonsene pidachita iye, na kuwanga kwache mtima pankhondo na mule mukhadabwezera iye kuna Israele maluwani a Damasiko na Hamati, ale akhali m'manja mwa Yuda, pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Israele." 
2Kings14:29 Yeroboamu adagonera mkono mbaikhwa m'masiye a makolo ache, mafumu a Israele. Tenepo Zekaria mwanache adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache." 
2Kings15:1 Chaka chamakumawiri na chinomwe Yeroboamu wachiwiri mbali mfumu wa Israele, Uzia mwana Amazia adapita ufumu wa Yuda" 
2Kings15:2 uku ana pyaka khumi na pitanthatu pyakubalwa mbatonga mu Yerusalemu pyaka makumashanu na piwiri. Mache akhali Yekolia wa ku Yerusalemu. 
2Kings15:3 Iye adachita pinthu pyakulungama pamaso pa MBUYA ninga montho mudachitira Amazia babache. 
2Kings15:4 Mbwenye mbuto zakupembedzerapo milungu nee zidavungwe tayu, tenepo anthu adathimiza basi kwenda kweneko kapereka nsembe na kufukiza pyakununkhira." 
2Kings15:5 MBUYA adasanyisa Uzia na matanya, ale adakhala nawo mpakana nsiku idafa iye. Iye akhakhala m'nyumba ya yekha ene mbapuma kuphata mabasa onsene, tenepo Yotamu mwanache ndiye akhayang'anira nyumba ya mfumu mbatonga m'dzikomo m'mbuto mwache." 
2Kings15:6 Pinango pyonsene pidachitika Uzia mbali mfumu na pyonsene pidachita iye pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Yuda. 
2Kings15:7 Uzia adagonera mkono mbaikhwa m'masiye a makolo ache, mumzinda wa Davite. Tenepo Yotamu mwanache adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache." 
2Kings15:8 Chaka chamakumatatu na chisere Uzia mbali mfumu wa Yuda, Zekaria mwana Yeroboamu wachiwiri adapita ufumu wa Israele mbatonga mu Samaria miyezi mitanthatu." 
2Kings15:9 Ninga mudachitira mafumu anzache m'nduli mule, iyembo adachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA. Iye adateweza pyakuipa pikhachita Mfumu Yeroboamu mwana Nebati, ule adachitisa Aisraele kudawa." 
2Kings15:10 Shalumu mwana Yabeshi adasasanya pyakupha Mfumu Zekaria mbamphadi pa Ibuleamu, tenepo iye adapita ufumuwo m'mbuto mwache." 
2Kings15:11 Kulonga pya pinthu pinango pidachitika Zekaria mbali mfumu pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Israele. 
2Kings15:12 Natenepo mafala adakwana-kwana adalonga MBUYA kuna Yehu ale akuti: “Pidzukulu pyako pinati pikhale pampando wachifumu wa Israele mpakana mfendu wachinayi.” 
2Kings15:13 Chaka chamakumatatu na chifemba Uzia mbali mfumu wa Yuda, Shalumu mwana Yabeshi adapita ufumu wa Israele mbatonga mu Samaria mwezi ubodzi ene basi." 
2Kings15:14 Menahemu mwana Gadi adenda ku Samaria kubulukira ku Tiriza kapha Shalumu, tenepo iye adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache." 
2Kings15:15 Kulonga pya pinthu pinango pidachitika Shalumu mbali mfumu na upandu udachita iye pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Israele. 
2Kings15:16 Pikhaenda Menahemu ku Tiriza m'njira adavunga mzinda wa Tapua, anthu a mwenemo na a m'nthemba zonsene zakuzungulira thangwi iwo hadafune kufungula misuwo ya mzindawo kuna iye tayu. Iye adatumbula podi na akazi ene a mimba." 
2Kings15:17 Chaka chamakumatatu na chifemba Uzia mbali mfumu wa Yuda, Menahemu mwana Gadi adapita ufumu wa Israele mbatonga mu Samaria pyaka khumi." 
2Kings15:18 Iye adachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA ndzidzi wache onsene udakhala iye mfumu mbateweza pyakuipa pikhadachita Yeroboamu mwana Nebati, ule adachitisa Aisraele kudawa." 
2Kings15:19 Kubuluka penepo Tigilati-Pilesere mfumu wa Asiria adadza kumenyana na Aisraele. Mbwenye Mfumu Menahemu adapereka kuna Tigilati-Pilesere siliva wakukwana makilogramu pikwi makumatatu na pinayi, towera aphedze Menahemu kukhazikisa ufumu wache m'dzikomo." 
2Kings15:20 Kobiri zidapereka Menahemu kuna Tigilati-Pilesere adazikwata kubulukira kuna anthu akufuma mu Israele pakuchita kuakhakhamiza kukhoma msonkho kobiri zasiliva makumashanu kada munthu. Natenepo Tigilati-Pilesere adabwerera kudziko ya kwawo. 
2Kings15:21 Pinango pyonsene pidachitika Menahemu mbali mfumu na pyonsene pidachita iye pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Israele. 
2Kings15:22 Menahemu adagonera mkono mbaikhwa m'masiye. Tenepo Pekahia mwanache adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache. 
2Kings15:23 Chaka chamakumashanu Uzia mbali mfumu wa Yuda, Pekahia mwana Menahemu adapita ufumu wa Israele mbatonga mu Samaria pyaka piwiri." 
2Kings15:24 Iye adachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA pakuteweza pyakuipa pikhachita Yeroboamu mwana Nebati, ule adachitisa Aisraele kudawa." 
2Kings15:25 Peka mwana Remalia, mkadamu wa anyankhondo wa Pekahia, pabodzi pene na amunache makumashanu a ku Gileadi adaverana mbapha Pekahia mumpanda wa nyumba yachifumu mu Samaria. Tenepo iye adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache." 
2Kings15:26 Kulonga pya pinthu pinango pidachitika Pekahia mbali mfumu na pyonsene pidachita iye pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Israele. 
2Kings15:27 Chaka chamakumashanu na chiwiri Uzia mbali mfumu wa Yuda, Peka mwana Remalia adapita ufumu wa Israele mbatonga mu Samaria pyaka makumawiri." 
2Kings15:28 Iye adachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA pakuteweza pyakuipa pidachita Yeroboamu mwana Nebati, ule adachitisa Aisraele kudawa." 
2Kings15:29 Pandzidzi ukhali Peka mfumu wa Israele, Tigilati-Pilesere mfumu wa Asiria adamenya nkhondo mbakwata mizinda ya Iyoni, Abele-Beti-Maaka, Yanoa, Kedeshi na Hazori, pontho na nthemba za Gileadi, Galilea na nthemba yonsene ya Nafitali mbakwata anthu a mwenemo kwenda nawo ku Asiria ninga anyaperezo." 
2Kings15:30 Chaka chamakumawiri na chiwiri Yotamu mwana Uzia mbali mfumu wa Yuda, Hoshea mwana Ela adaverana mbapha Peka mwana Remalia. Tenepo iye adapita ufumu wa Israele m'mbuto mwache." 
2Kings15:31 Kulonga pya pinthu pinango pidachitika Peka mbali mfumu wa Israele na pyonsene pidachita iye pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Israele. 
2Kings15:32 Chaka chachiwiri Peka mwana Remalia mbali mfumu wa Israele, Yotamu mwana Uzia adapita ufumu wa Yuda" 
2Kings15:33 uku ana pyaka makumawiri na pishanu pyakubalwa mbatonga mu Yerusalemu pyaka khumi na pitanthatu. Mache akhali Yerusha mwana wamkazi wa Zadoki. 
2Kings15:34 Yotamu adachita pinthu pyakulungama pamaso pa MBUYA ninga montho mudachitira babache Uzia. 
2Kings15:35 Kwache mbuto zakupembedzerapo milungu nee zidabuluswa tayu, tenepo anthu adathimiza basi kwenda kweneko kapereka nsembe na kufukiza pyakununkhira. Msuwo wa Kumpoto kwa mpanda wa Nyumba ya Mulungu udamangwa na Yotamu." 
2Kings15:36 Pinango pyonsene pidachita Yotamu mbali mfumu wa Yuda na pyonsene pidachita iye pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Yuda. 
2Kings15:37 Ndzidzi ukhali iye mfumu MBUYA adatoma kutumiza Rezini mfumu wa Aramu na Peka mwana Remalia kamenyana na Yuda. 
2Kings15:38 Yotamu adagonera mkono mbaikhwa m'masiye a makolo ache mumzinda wa Davite. Tenepo Ahazi mwanache adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache. 
2Kings16:1 Chaka chakhumi na chinomwe Peka mwana Remalia mbali mfumu wa Israele, Ahazi mwana Yotamu adapita ufumu wa Yuda" 
2Kings16:2 uku ana pyaka makumawiri mbatonga mu Yerusalemu pyaka khumi na pitanthatu. Iye hadateweze tayu njira zadidi za kholo yache Mfumu Davite; m'mbuto mwache iye adachita pinthu pyakukhonda komera MBUYA Mulungu wache 
2Kings16:3 mbateweza njira zakuipa za mafumu a Israele. Iye enembo adapereka kuna mifanikizo mwanache ene wamamuna ninga nsembe yakupyerera, kutsanzira mitemo yakunyansa ya anthu, ale adathamangiswa na MBUYA pikhapita Aisraele m'dzikomo." 
2Kings16:4 Pambuto zakupembedzerapo milungu, pamapiri ang'ono-ang'ono pontho na pansi pa muti onsene wakuvata, Ahazia akhaperekapo nsembe na kufukiza pyakununkhira." 
2Kings16:5 Mfumu Rezini wa Aramu na Mfumu Peka wa Israele adachita nkhondo na Yerusalemu mbauzungulira, mbwenye adachimwana kumkunda Ahazi." 
2Kings16:6 Pandzidzi onthowo Rezini mfumu wa Aramu adabwezera Elati kuna Aedomu pakuthamangisa anthu a ku Yuda onsene akhali mwenemo ale. Aedomu adenda mbakakhala mu Elatimo. Nalero iwo ali mwenemo. 
2Kings16:7 Ahazi adatumiza mphangwa kuna Tigilati-Pilesere mfumu wa Asiria mbati, “Ine ndine nyabasanu wakukhulupirika, pontho mwananu. Dzani mundipulumuse m'manja mwa mafumu a Aramu na Israele.”" 
2Kings16:8 Ahazi adakwata siliva na golidi kubulukira m'Nyumba ya MBUYA na m'pyakukoyeramo mfuma ya nyumba yachifumu mbapitumiza kuna Tigilati-Pilesere ninga mtukwa kuna iye. 
2Kings16:9 Tigilati-Pilesere adatawira kupempha kudachita Ahazi pakwenda na anyankhondo ache ku Damasiko kachita nawo nkhondo mbaakunda na kupha mfumu wawo Rezini. Kubuluka penepo adakwata anthu ale kwenda nawo ku Kiri ninga anyaperezo. 
2Kings16:10 Pidenda Mfumu Ahazi ku Damasiko kagumanikana na Mfumu Tigilati-Pilesere, kweneko adaonako guwa yansembe mbatumiza kuna Uria nyansembe moda na masasanyiro onsene a guwa ile." 
2Kings16:11 Natenepo Uria adamanga guwa yansembe ninga yonthoyo mbaimalisa Ahazi mbadzati bwerera kwawo. 
2Kings16:12 Pikhabwerera iye kubulukira ku Damasiko, Ahazi adaona kuti guwa yansembe ile yamala," 
2Kings16:13 natenepo iye adapereka penepo nsembe yakupyerera ya nyama na chakupereka cha mapira mbakhuthulirapo chakupereka cha vinyu na kuwaza chiropa ninga chakupereka chachiphatizano. 
2Kings16:14 Ahazi adabulusa guwa yansembe yankuwa ile ikhadapambulirwa kuna MBUYA, pontho ile ikhali pakati na kati pa guwache ya chinchino na Nyumba ya MBUYA. Tenepo Ahazi adaifedzera kumpoto kwa guwache ya nsembe ile." 
2Kings16:15 Kubuluka penepo iye adalonga kuna Uria mbati, “Guwanga ikuluyi uiphatise basa kupereka nsembe zakupyerera na machibese, pontho na chakupereka cha mapira na kumawulo, pyakupereka pyakupyerera na pyakupereka pya mapira pya mfumu na pya anthu, pontho na pyakupereka pya vinyu pya anthu. Chiropa cha nyama zonsene zakuperekwa nsembe uchikhuthulire paguwapo. Mbwenye guwa yankuwayo uisiye kuti ndiiphatise basa ninga chinthu chakuombedzera.”" 
2Kings16:16 Uria adachitadi ninga montho mudampangira mfumu. 
2Kings16:17 Mfumu Ahazi adabulusa magulupiya a pigudumu pyankuwa, pile pikhaphatiswa basa m'Nyumba ya MBUYA, mbabulusa na maphiso ache ene. Iye adabulusa pontho phiso ikulu yankuwa yakukoyeramo madzi ile ikhali pamsana pa ng'ombe zankuwa khumi na ziwiri zile, mbaikhazika pa maziko amiyala." 
2Kings16:18 Pontho na thangwi ya kufuna kuti mfumu wa Asiria akomerwe. Ahazi adabulusa pontho chiguwa chikhaphatiswa basa pa Nsiku Yakupuma m'Nyumba ya MBUYA mbafunga msuwo wakupita na mfumu kwenda m'Nyumba ya MBUYA ile. 
2Kings16:19 Pinango pyonsene pidachitika Ahazi mbali mfumu na pidachita iye pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Yuda. 
2Kings16:20 Ahazi adagonera mkono mbaikhwa m'masiye a makolo ache mu mzinda wa Davite. Tenepo Hezekia mwanache adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache. 
2Kings17:1 Chaka chakhumi na chiwiri Ahazi mbali mfumu wa Yuda, Hoshea mwana Ela adapita ufumu wa Israele mbatonga mu Samaria pyaka pifemba." 
2Kings17:2 Iye adachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA, kwache si ninga montho mudachitira mafumu anzache m'ndulimu tayu." 
2Kings17:3 Shalimanesere mfumu wa Asiria adachita naye nkhondo; Hoshea adaimisa manja kuna iye, tenepo chaka na chaka akhakhoma msonkho kuna iye." 
2Kings17:4 Mbwenye nsiku inango Hoshea adatuma aimiriri a dziko kwenda kuna So, mfumu wa Iguputo, kumpempha kuti amphedzembo, pontho iye adaleka kukhoma msonkho wa chaka na chaka kuna mfumu wa Asiria. Pidadziwa Shalimanesere pya penepi adamanga Hoshea mbamponya m'perezo." 
2Kings17:5 Kubuluka penepo Shalimanesere adachita nkhondo na dziko yonsene ya Israele mbazungulira mzinda wa Samaria na anyankhondo ache pyaka pitatu. 
2Kings17:6 Chaka chachifemba cha ufumu wa Hoshea, mfumu wa Asiria, adapokosera Samaria mbakwata Aisraele kwenda nawo ku Asiria ninga anyaperezo. Anango adaakhazika mumzinda wa Hala, anango chifupi na mkulo wa Habori m'nthemba ya Gozani pontho anango mumzinda wa Media." 
2Kings17:7 Samaria adakundwa, thangwi Aisraele adadawa pamaso pa MBUYA Mulungu wawo, ule adaapulumusa m'manja mwa mfumu wa ku Iguputo mbaabulusa m'dzikomo. Iwo akhapembedza milungu inango," 
2Kings17:8 kuteweza mitemo ikhachita anthu ale adathamangiswa na MBUYA pandzidzi ukhadza anthu ache mwenemo. Iwo adatsanzira pontho mitemo idatomesa mfumu wa Israele. 
2Kings17:9 Aisraele adachita pinthu pyokhonda komera Mulungu wawo. Iwo adasasanya mbuto zakupembedzerapo milungu m'maluwani awo onsene, kutomera kunsanja za anyakulondali mpakana mumzinda ukululetu." 
2Kings17:10 Pamapiri onsene na pansi pa miti yonsene yakuvata adamangapo piguwa pyakupambulika na adzimunthu a milungu Ashera," 
2Kings17:11 mbafukiza pyakununkhira pambuto zonsenezi zakupembedzerapo milungu kuteweza pinthu pikhachita anthu adathamangiswa na MBUYA, ale akhali m'dziko mule. Iwo adalamusa ukali wa MBUYA thangwi ya mabasawo akuipa" 
2Kings17:12 mbakhonda kuvera matongero a MBUYA kuti aleke pembedza mifanikizo. 
2Kings17:13 MBUYA akhadatuma anyamphangwa na maprofeti kudzacheuza Aisraele na Yuda mbalonga mbati, “Lekani njira zanu zakuipazo mbamuvere matongero anga onsene, ale ali m'bukhu ya mwambo udapereka ine kuna makolo anu mbindikupasani kudzera muna anyabasanga maprofeti.”" 
2Kings17:14 Kwache iwo hadavere tayu, iwo ngakuuma mtima ninga makolo awo, ale hadanyindire MBUYA Mulungu wawo tayu," 
2Kings17:15 Iwo adakhonda kuvera matongero ache; iwo hadakoye tayu chiverano chidasasanya iye na makolo awo, pontho kuacheuza kwache hadakuikhe konta tayu. Iwo adapembedza milungu yakusowa basa, iwo mbakhalambo akusowa basa, pontho iwo adateweza mitemo ya madzinza anango akuazungulira mbakhonda vera matongero a MBUYA kuti aleke tsanzira penepi." 
2Kings17:16 Iwo adaswa mwambo onsene wa MBUYA Mulungu wawo, mbasasanya ana ng'ombe asimbi awiri kupipembedza; iwo adasasanya pontho dzimunthu wa milungu Ashera, adapembedza nyenyezi mbatumikira milungu Baala." 
2Kings17:17 Iwo adapereka anawo achikazi na achimuna ene kukhala nsembe zakupyerera kuna milungu; iwo adavunza nzeru kuna anyakukhumira na anyakuombedza, pontho adapipereka okha ene monsene mwene kuchita pinthu pyakudawika pamaso pa MBUYA, natenepo iwo adalamusa ukali wa MBUYA." 
2Kings17:18 MBUYA adazhangali nawo Aisraele mbaabulusa onsene pamaso pache mbasiya dzinza ya Yuda ene basi. 
2Kings17:19 Mbwenye podi na anthu a ku Yuda enembo hadavere mwambo wa MBUYA Mulungu wawo tayu. Iwo adatsanzira mitemo idatomesa Aisraele ile. 
2Kings17:20 MBUYA adakhonda Aisraele onsene, iye adaatchunyusa mbaapereka m'manja mwa anyamalwawo avinga kufikirana onsene adaamaliratu kuabulusa pamaso pache." 
2Kings17:21 Pidalekanisa MBUYA Israele na Yuda, Aisraele adapitisa Yeroboamu mwana Nebati kukhala mfumu wawo. Yeroboamu adachitisa anthu ale kukhonda MBUYA, mbaabausa kuchita pyakudawa pyakugoswa." 
2Kings17:22 Iwo adatewera Yeroboamu mbakakamira kuchita pyakudawa pyonsene pidachita iye," 
2Kings17:23 kufikirana MBUYA adaamala onsene kuabulusa pamaso pache ninga montho mukhadaacheuza iye kudzera muna anyabasache onsene maprofeti kuti anapichita. Natenepo Aisraele adakwatwa ninga anyaperezo kwenda kudziko ya Asiria, kule kunakhala iwo na lero." 
2Kings17:24 Mfumu wa Asiria adakwata anthu kubulukira kumizinda ya Babiloni, Kuta, Iva, Hamati na Sefaravaimu mbakaakhazika mumzinda wa Samaria kupita m'mbuto mwa Aisraele ale adakwatwa kwenda ku dziko ya Asiria ninga anyaperezo. Iwo adakwata mizinda yeneyi mbakhala mwenemo." 
2Kings17:25 Pidatoma iwo kukhazikika mwenemo; iwo hadapembedze MBUYA tayu, natenepo iye adatumiza nkhalamu zile zidapha anango a iwo." 
2Kings17:26 Mfumu wa Asiria adapangwa kuti anthu akhadakhazikisa iye m'mizinda ya Samaria ale, hadadziwe tayu mwambo wa Mulungu wa m'dzikomo, natenepo Mulunguyo atumiza nkhalamu mbazipha anthu mwenemo." 
2Kings17:27 Natenepo mfumu adatonga mbati, “Bwezani kwawo mbodzi wa anyansembe adakwata ife ninga nyaperezo ule; mchitiseni kubwerera kwawo kuti akakhale kweneko, towera akafunzise anthu mwambo wa Mulungu wa m'dzikomo.”" 
2Kings17:28 Natenepo nyansembe wa Chiisraele ule akhadakwatwa ninga nyaperezo kubulukira ku Samaria adenda mbakakhala ku Betele mbakafunzisa anthu mule mudakwanisira iwo kupembedza MBUYA. 
2Kings17:29 Mbwenye madzinza akhadakhazikika mu Samaria ale, adathimiza kusasanya mifanikizo ya milungu yawo mbaiikha pambuto zakupembedzerapo milungu zikhadamanga Aisraele zile. Gulu yonsene idapisasanyira mifanikizo yawo ene m'mizinda mukhakhala iwomo." 
2Kings17:30 Anthu a ku Babiloni adasasanya mifanikizo ya Sukoti Benoti, milungu yawo; anthu a ku Kuta adasasanya mifanikizo ya Nerigali, milungu yawo; anthu a ku Hamati adasasanya mifanikizo ya Ashima, milungu yawo;" 
2Kings17:31 anthu a ku Iva adasasanya mifanikizo Nibihazi na Taritaki, milungu yawo; anthu a ku Sefaravaimu akhapereka anawo ninga nsembe yakupyerera kuna Adrameleki na Anameleki, milungu yawo." 
2Kings17:32 Anthu enewa pontho adapembedza MBUYA mbasankhula anthu akusiyana-siyana pakati pa anthu awo kutumikira ninga anyansembe pambuto zakupembedzerapo milungu mbapereka nsembe penepo m'mbuto mwawo. 
2Kings17:33 Natenepo iwo akhapembedza MBUYA, kwache akhapembedza pontho milungu yawo ene malingana na mitemo ya m'dziko mukhadabulukira iwo." 
2Kings17:34 Iwo nalero akuthimiza basi kuteweza mitemo yawo yakale. Iwo nkhabe pembedza MBUYA tayu, penu kuvera matongero ache adapereka iye kuna pidzukulu pya Yakobo, adatchandula iye kukhala Israele ule." 
2Kings17:35 MBUYA akhadachita chiverano na iwo pontho akhadatonga mbati, “Lekani pembedza milungu inango; lekani kuigodamira penu kuitumikira, penu kupereka nsembe kuna iyo." 
2Kings17:36 Imwe mwathema kundivera ine MBUYA, adakubulusani m'dziko ya Iguputo na mphamvu zikulu pontho na dzanjanga yamphamvu ule; imwe mwathema kundigodamira mbamupereka nsembe kuna ine." 
2Kings17:37 Imwe mwathema ndzidzi onsene kuvera mwambo na matongero adakulemberani ine ale. Imwe mwathema nee pembedza milungu inango tayu," 
2Kings17:38 pontho imwe mwathema nee kuduwalira chiverano chidasasanya ine na imwe chile tayu. 
2Kings17:39 Imwe mwathema kundivera ine MBUYA Mulungu wanu, tenepo ine ndinakupulumusani m'manja mwa anyamalwanu.”" 
2Kings17:40 Mbwenye anthu enewa nkhabe kuva tayu, pontho akuthimiza kuteweza mitemo yawo yakale ile." 
2Kings17:41 Natenepo anthu enewa ambapembedza MBUYA, kwache ambapembedza pontho mifanikizo; na lero pidzukulu pyawo pimbathimiza kuchita chibodzi-bodzi." 
2Kings18:1 Chaka chachitatu Hoshea mwana Ela mbali mfumu wa Israele, Hezekia mwana Ahazi adapita ufumu wa Yuda." 
2Kings18:2 Iye akhali na pyaka makumawiri na pishanu mbatonga mu Yerusalemu pyaka makumawiri na pifemba. Mache akhali Abia mwana wamkazi wa Zekaria. 
2Kings18:3 Iye adachita pyakulungama pamaso pa MBUYA ninga montho mudachitirambo Mfumu Davite kholo wache. 
2Kings18:4 Iye adavunga mbuto zakupembedzerapo milungu; adaswa piguwa pyonsene pyakupambulika mbagwanda adzimunthu onsene a milungu Ashera. Iye adazwanya-zwanya pontho nyoka yankuwa idasasanya Mose ikhachemerwa Nehushitani ile. Kufikirana ndzidzi wenewo Aisraele akhathimiza basi kufukiza pyakununkhira kulemedza nyokayo. 
2Kings18:5 Hezekia adanyindira MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele mwakuti Yuda akhali nkhabe mfumu unango wadidi ninga weneyu tayu, podi na pakutoma pene iye mbadzati, na pidafa iye pene, nkhabe." 
2Kings18:6 Iye akhali wakukhulupirika pyakwanga kuna MBUYA, pontho wakuvera MBUYA na kukoya mwadidi matongero adapereka MBUYA kuna Mose ale." 
2Kings18:7 Natenepo MBUYA akhali naye mwakuti pinthu pyache pyonsene pikhachita iye pikhamfambira mwadidi. Iye adapandukira mfumu wa Asiria mbakhonda kukhala pansi pa utongi wache. 
2Kings18:8 Iye adakunda Afilisti mbapokosera mbuto zikhakhala iwo kutomera kunsanja ya anyakulondali mpakana mumzinda ukululetu, kuthimizapo Gaza na nthemba zonsene zakuzungulira." 
2Kings18:9 Chaka chachinayi Hezekia mbali mfumu, chile chikhali chaka chachinomwe Hoshea mbali mfumu wa Israele, Shalimanesere mfumu wa Asiria adachita nkhondo na Israele mbazungulira Samaria." 
2Kings18:10 Chaka chachitatu cha nkhondo yeneyi Samaria adakundwa. Chenechi chikhali chaka chachitanthatu Hezekia mbali mfumu, pontho chikhali chaka chachifemba Hoshea mbali mfumu." 
2Kings18:11 Mfumu wa Asiria adakwata Aisraele kwenda nawo ku Asiria ninga anyaperezo mbakhazika anango a iwo mumzinda wa Hala, anango chifupi na mkulo wa Habori m'nthemba ya Gozani, pontho anango m'mizinda ya Media." 
2Kings18:12 Samaria adakundwa thangwi Aisraele hadavere MBUYA Mulungu wawo tayu. Iwo adaswa chiverano chidachita iye nawo chile mbakhonda kuvera matongero onsene adapaswa iwo na Mose nyabasa wa MBUYA ule. Iwo hadaikhe konta penu kupivera tayu. 
2Kings18:13 Chaka chakhumi na chinayi Hezekia mbali mfumu wa Yuda, Senakeribu mfumu wa Asiria adasosa mizinda yakutchingwa na mpanda ya Yuda mbaipokosera." 
2Kings18:14 Hezekia adatumiza mphangwa kuna Senakeribu ule akhali ku Lakishi mbalonga mbati, “Ndatchunyuka pontho ndaphata miyendo, lekani kundimenya; ine ndinati ndikupagalini chonsene chinalonga imwecho.” Kutawira kwa mfumu wa Asiria kukhali kwakuti Hezekia amtumizire siliva wakukwana makilogramu pikwi khumi na golidi wakukwana makilogramu chikwi chibodzi." 
2Kings18:15 Hezekia adamtumizira siliva wa m'Nyumba ya MBUYA na m'pyakukoyeramo mfuma m'nyumba yachifumu. 
2Kings18:16 Na ndzidzi onthowo Hezekia adakanandula golidi ule akhali pamsuwo wa Nyumba ya Mulungu na ule ene akhadaikha iye pamakhundu ache a msuwo mbatumiza pyonsenepi kuna Senakeribu. 
2Kings18:17 Kubuluka penepo mfumu wa Asiria adatuma anyankhondo azinji kubulukira ku Lakishi kwenda kamenyana na Hezekia mu Yerusalemu; gulu yeneyi ikhatsogolerwa na akadamu akulu-akulu atatu a mfumu. Pidafika iwo ku Yerusalemu, adaimira panjira yakwendera ku Munda wa Nyakufula nguwo, chifupi na mgelo wakudzesa madzi kubulukira kuthawale yakumtunda." 
2Kings18:18 Natenepo iwo adachemeresa Mfumu Hezekia, tenepo mathubu atatu a mfumu adenda kagumanikana nawo. Mathubu ache mbawa: Eliakimu mwana Hilikia, ule akhali nyakuyang'anira nyumba yachifumu; Shebina nyakulemba m'thando ya miseru; Yoa mwana Asafu, ule akhali nyakulemba pya m'dziko." 
2Kings18:19 Mbodzi wa mathubu a ku Asiria adaapanga kuti Mfumu Senakeribu akhafuna kudziwa thangwi ikhachitisa Hezekia kuwanga mtima. 
2Kings18:20 Iye adalonga mbati, “Ayi imwe mukunyerezera kuti mafala okha basi anakwanisa kuphata basa m'mbuto mwa mphamvu na luso pya anyankhondo anu? Ayi mbani ananyerezera imwe kuti anakwanisa kukuphedzani kupandukira mfumu wa Asiria?" 
2Kings18:21 Imwe mukunyindira Iguputo kukuphedzani, kwache penepyo pinakhala ninga kuphatisa basa phesi m'mbuto mwa mthondodzo; iyo inatchoka mbikutchonkhani m'manja. Mfumu wa Iguputo akhala ninga tenepo kuna munthu onsene anamnyindirayo.”" 
2Kings18:22 Thubu wa ku Asiria ule adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Ayi mukundipanga kuti ananyindira imwe ndi MBUYA Mulungu wanu? Iye ngule mbuto zache zakupembedzerapo na maguwache ansembe zidavungwa na Hezekia, pidapanga iye anthu a ku Yuda na Yerusalemu kupembedza paguwa yansembe mu Yerusalemu mwene basi." 
2Kings18:23 Ndinachita namwe betchi na dzina ya mbuyanga, mfumu wa Asiria. Ine ndinakupasani akavalo pikwi piwiri, ngakhala munagumana amuna akukwana kuapakira!" 
2Kings18:24 Imwe munakwanisa tani kuimisana na mathubu a mfumu wa Asiria, podi na wamng'onoletu pakati pawo, podi kwene kuti mukunyindira basi kuti Aiguputo anakutumizirani pingolo na amuna akupakira akavalo?" 
2Kings18:25 Ayi mukunyerezera kuti ine ndasosa na kuvunga dziko yanu mwakukhonda phedzwa na MBUYA? MBUYA makayo ndiye andipanga kuti ndiisose na kuivunga.” 
2Kings18:26 Tenepo Eliakimu, Shebina pontho Yoa adalonga kuna mkadamuyo mbati, “Taphata miyendo, longani pyanu m'Chiaramu, thangwi ife timbachiva. Lekani longa m'Chiheberi thangwi anthu onsene akhala m'mafufuwa akuvesera.”" 
2Kings18:27 Iye adatawira mbati, “Ayi mukunyerezera kuti mfumu wa ku Asiria andituma kulonga mphangwa kuna imwe na kuna mfumu yekha basi? Nkhabe, ine ndikulonga pontho kuna anthu akhala m'mafufuwa, ale athema kudya matubzi awo, pontho kumwa mitindo yawo ninga montho munafuna dzachitirambo imwepo.”" 
2Kings18:28 Tenepo thubu ule adaimira mbalonga m'Chiheberi mwakugaluza fala mbati, “Veserani kuno pinakupangani mfumu wa Asiria!" 
2Kings18:29 Iye akukucheuzani kuti muleke nyengezwa na Hezekia. Hezekia nkhabe kwanisa kukupulumusani tayu. 
2Kings18:30 Pontho lekani kumtawira kukunyengererani kuti munyindire MBUYA. Lekani nyerezera kuti MBUYA anakupulumusani pontho kuti iye anakhondesa Asiria kupokosera mzindanu. 
2Kings18:31 Lekani vesera pinalonga Hezekia! Mfumu wa Asiria akukutongani kuti mubuluke mumzindamo mbamuimise manja. Tenepo monsene munatawiriswa kudya mfesa na makuyu a m'miti mwanu, pontho kumwa madzi a m'michera yanu ene" 
2Kings18:32 kufikirana mfumu akukhazikiseni m'dziko sasawa ninga yanuyi, kule kuna minda ya mfesa kuti ikupaseni vinyu, pontho kuna mapira kuti mukwanise kuphika mikate. Yeneyi ndi dziko ya mafuta aolivi na uchi. Ngakhala imwe munachita pinakutongani iye, imwe nee munafa tayu, mbwenye munakhala na moyo. Hezekia mbaleke kukunyengezani pakunyerezera kuti MBUYA anakupulumusani." 
2Kings18:33 Ayi ilipo milungu ya anthu anango, ile idapulumusambo madziko awo m'manja mwa mfumu wa Asiria?" 
2Kings18:34 Chinchino ili kupi milungu ya Hamati na Aripadi? Ili kupi milungu ya Sefaravaimu? Ayi alipo unango adapulumusa Samaria? 
2Kings18:35 Ndi lini milungu ya madziko onseneyi idatoma kupulumusa madziko awo kuna mfumu wa Asiria. Apo ninji chinakuchitisani kunyerezera kuti MBUYA anakwanisa kupulumusa Yerusalemu?” 
2Kings18:36 Anthu adamatama ninga montho mukhadaapangira Mfumu Hezekia; iwo hadabuluse na fala ene tayu. 
2Kings18:37 Tenepo Eliakimu, Shebina na Yoa adang'amba nguwo zawo thangwi ya kutsukwala mbaenda kapanga mfumu pikhadalonga thubu wa Asiria ule." 
2Kings19:1 Sindzidzi Mfumu Hezekia nkhuva penepi, adang'amba nguwo zache thangwi ya kutsukwala. Iye adavala masakha mbaenda ku Nyumba ya MBUYA." 
2Kings19:2 Iye adatuma Eliakimu thubu wamkulu wa kunyumba ya mfumu, Shebina nyakulemba m'thando ya miseru na anyansembe akulu kwenda kuna mprofeti Yesaya mwana Amozi. Iwo adavalambo masakha." 
2Kings19:3 Iwo adatumwa kuna Yesaya na mphangwa zakuti: “Lero ndi nsiku ya nyatwa; tikutchunyuswa pontho tikuchitiswa manyadzo. Takhala ninga mkazi wa mimba, ule asasanyika kulekwa kwache nkhabe mphamvu." 
2Kings19:4 Mfumu wa Asiria atuma thubu wache wamkululetu dzatikana Mulungu wamoyo. MBUYA Mulungu wanu mbave kutikana kweneku, pontho mbatchunyuse anthu adalonga penepi ale. Natenepo pemphererani kuna Mulungu anthu asalira na moyo ale.”" 
2Kings19:5 Pidava Yesaya mphangwa zidatumiza Mfumu Hezekia kuna iye zile," 
2Kings19:6 adatawira mbati, “MBUYA akukupangani kuti muleke tawirisa Aasiria kukuthuswani na pinalonga iwo kuti MBUYA nkhabe kwanisa kukupulumusani tayu." 
2Kings19:7 MBUYA anachitisa mfumu wa Asiria kuva mbiri, ile inafuna kumchitisa kubwerera kudziko kwache, natenepo MBUYA anamchitisa kuti aphiwe kweneko.”" 
2Kings19:8 Thubu ule adava kuti mfumu wa Asiria akhadabuluka mu Lakishi, pontho kuti akuchita nkhondo na mzinda wachifupi na Libina; natenepo adenda kweneko kamvunza." 
2Kings19:9 Mbiri idaveka pakati pa Aasiria kuti gulu ya anyankhondo a ku Iguputo yakutsogolerwa na Mfumu Tirihaka wa ku Kushiikhadza dzamenyana nawo. Pidava mfumu wa Asiria penepi, adatumiza kalata kuna Hezekia mfumu wa Yuda" 
2Kings19:10 kulonga kuna iye kuti, “Mulungu ananyindira iweyo akupanga kuti ine sinakwanisa kukukunda tayu, kwache penepi pileke kukunyengeza." 
2Kings19:11 Iwe wava pimbachita mfumu wa Asiria kuna madziko onsene anafuna iye kuavungawo. Ayi ukunyerezera kuti unakwanisa kupulumuka? 
2Kings19:12 Makolo anga adavunga mizinda ya Gozani, Harani na Rezefi mbapha anthu a ku Betedeni, akhakhala mu Telasara ale, tenepo nkhabe na mbodzi ene wa milungu yawo adakwanisa kuapulumusa tayu." 
2Kings19:13 Ali kupi mafumu a ku Hamati, Aripadi, Sefaravaimu, Hena, penu Iva?”" 
2Kings19:14 Mfumu Hezekia adakwata kalata idadza na anyamphangwa ile mbaiwerenga. Tenepo iye adenda ku Nyumba ya Mulungu mbaikha kalata ile pamaso pa MBUYA 
2Kings19:15 mbapemphera mbati, “MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele, nyakukhala pampando wanu wachifumu padzulu pa pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido, imwe ene basi ndimwe Mulungu, nyakutonga maufumu onsene a padziko yapansi. Imwe mudalenga dziko yapansi na thambo." 
2Kings19:16 Chinchino MBUYA, yang'anani pinthu pinatichitikirapi. Ngaveserani pinthu pyonsene pinalonga Senakeribu kutikana imwe, Mulungu wamoyo." 
2Kings19:17 Ife tonsene timbadziwa, MBUYA, mafumu a Asiria adavunga madzinza mazinji mbachitisa madziko awo kusanduka madembe," 
2Kings19:18 mbapisa milungu yawo, ile si milungu chadi-chadi tayu, mbwenye mifanikizo ene pyawo yamiti na yamiyala yakusasanywa na manja a anthu." 
2Kings19:19 Chinchino MBUYA Mulungu wathu, tipulumuseni kuna Asiria, towera madzinza onsene a padziko yapansi apidziwe kuti imwe ene basi MBUYA ndimwe Mulungu.”" 
2Kings19:20 Kubuluka penepo Yesaya adatumiza mphangwa kuna Mfumu Hezekia kumpanga kuti MBUYA ava kupemphera kwache," 
2Kings19:21 mbamtawira kuti, “Mzinda wa Yerusalemu ukukuseka iwe, Senakeribu, pontho ukukululupisa." 
2Kings19:22 Mbani akhanyerezera iwe kuti ukumtikana pontho kumsedegula ule? Iwe wandiselusa ine Mulungu, Nyakuchena wa Israele." 
2Kings19:23 Iwe udatuma anyamphangwa dzagaya kuna ine kuti na pingolo pyako pyonsene pyankhondo iwe udakunda mapiri akulaphaletu a Lebanoni. Iwe udatumbama kuti kwene udagwandako miti yakulaphaletu yamkungudza pontho na miti yadidiletu yapaina mbufika pakatiletu pa misitu yakuphopha. 
2Kings19:24 Iwe udagaya kuti udakumba michera mbumwa madzi m'madziko achilendo, pontho manyalo a anyankhondo ako adaponda mbaumisiratu mikulo ya mu Iguputo." 
2Kings19:25 “Ayi chipo iwe hudapive tayu kuti kale ene ine ndidanyerezera kuchita pyonsenepi? Tenepo chinchino ndapichitadi. Ine ndidakupasa mphamvu kuchitisa mizinda yakutchingwa na mpanda kusanduka milu ya madongolomwa. 
2Kings19:26 Anthu akhakhala mwenemo ale, akhali adamala khutchwa mano; iwo adaswipa mtima mbachita mantha pikulu. Iwo akhali ninga mbewu m'munda, ninga mphukira zitete pontho ziwisi, penu ninga maudzu akumera pansoyi, ale ambaunyala mbadzati kula." 
2Kings19:27 “Mbwenye pyonsene pya iwe ndimbapidziwa, pimbachita iwe na konsene kwene kumbaenda iwe. Ine ndimbadziwa na ukali umbachita iwe kupokanyisana na ine." 
2Kings19:28 Ine ndava pya ukali wako na kugaya kumbachita iwe, natenepo chinchino ndinati ndiikhe ngoloweko m'mphuno mwako mbandiikha simbi m'kanwa mwako ninga kavalo mbandikubweza na njira yontho idadza na iwe ile.”" 
2Kings19:29 Tenepo Yesaya adalonga kuna Mfumu Hezekia mbati, “Ichi ntchidzindikiro cha pinthu pinafuna dzachitika pile. Chaka chino na chamangwana munadya magoko, mbwenye chaka chamkuchono munakwanisa kubzala mbewu zanu zene mbamuvuna, pontho munabzala mbewu zamfesa mbamudya nsapo zache." 
2Kings19:30 Anyakusalira na moyo mu Yuda ale, anavata ninga miti, ile imbazikisa mitsitsi yache pansiletu m'mataka mbibala nsapo." 
2Kings19:31 Panakhala anthu mu Yerusalemu na paphiri ya Zioni anyakusalira na moyo ale, thangwi chipapu cha MBUYA chinachitisa kuti penepi pichitike." 
2Kings19:32 “Penepi ndiye pyalonga MBUYA pya mfumu wa Asiria: Iye nkhabe dzapita mumzinda muno, penu dzaponya tswimo na ibodzi ene tayu. Nkhabe anyankhondo akuphatira pyakugedera matswimo anabwera chifupi na mzindawu, penu kumuluka mataka kutsamira mpandawu tayu." 
2Kings19:33 Iye anabwerera kwawo na njira yontho idadza na iye ile mbachimwana kupita mumzindamo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA. 
2Kings19:34 Ine ndinatchinjiriza mzindawu mbandiupulumusa, na thangwi ya chilemedzo changa pontho na kudumbira kudachita ine kuna nyabasanga Davite.”" 
2Kings19:35 Na mosiku mwache mngelo wa MBUYA adenda kumsasa wa Aasiria mbapha anyankhondo pikwi dzana na makumasere na ashanu. Mangwana mwache m'makalakwecha iwo akhali thasa-thasa, onsene amala kufa!" 
2Kings19:36 Tenepo Senakeribu mfumu wa Asiria adafudza msasache mbabwerera mumzinda wa Ninevi. 
2Kings19:37 Nsiku inango pikhapembedza iye m'nyumba ya milungu yache Nisiroki, anache awiri achimuna, Adrameleki na Sharezere adampha na matalasadawo mbathawira kudziko ya Ararati. Tenepo unango mwa anache, dzinache Esarihadoni adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache." 
2Kings20:1 Pandzidzi wenewo Mfumu Hezekia adadwala mbasala nenene kufa. Mprofeti Yesaya mwana Amozi adenda kamuona mbalonga mbati, “MBUYA akukupangani kuti mwathema kusasanyiratu pinthu pyonsene mwadidi, thangwi nee munawanga tayu, munati mufe.”" 
2Kings20:2 Hezekia adazungunukira kufufu mbapemphera mbati," 
2Kings20:3 “Kumbukani MBUYA kuti ine ndidakutumikirani mwakukhulupirika, pontho na mtima onsene, pontho ndzidzi onsene ndayesa-yesa kuchita pinthu pinafuna imwe.” Natenepo iye adatoma kulira mwakusisima." 
2Kings20:4 Yesaya adabuluka pamaso pa mfumu, tenepo iye mbadzati gwanda chintalo cha nyumba yachifumu ile, MBUYA adampanga" 
2Kings20:5 kuti abwerere kuna Hezekia mtongi wa anthu a MBUYA mbakalonga kuna iye kuti, “Ine MBUYA wa kholoako Davite ndava kupemphera kwako pontho ndaona misozi yako. Ndinati ndikuwangise, tenepo pangagwanda nsiku zitatu unati uende ku Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
2Kings20:6 Ine ndinakutawirisa kuti uthimize kukhala na moyo pyaka pinango khumi na pishanu. Ine ndinapulumusa iwe na mzinda wa Yerusalemu m'manja mwa mfumu wa Asiria. Ndinatchinjiriza mzindawu, towera ine ndilemedzwe, pontho na thangwi ya kudumbira kudachita ine kuna nyabasanga Davite.”" 
2Kings20:7 Yesaya adapanga anyabasa a mfumu kuti aikhe mtombwe wakusasanywa na makuyu pa anyakadumu, natenepo iye anawanga." 
2Kings20:8 Mfumu Hezekia adavunza mbati, “Apo chidzindikiro chache ntchanji chakutsikimizira kuti MBUYA anandiwangisa, pontho kuti pangagwanda nsiku zitatu ndinakwanisa kwenda ku Nyumba ya Mulungu?”" 
2Kings20:9 Yesaya adatawira mbati, “MBUYA anakupasa chidzindikiro chakutsikimizira kuti anachita pyadumbira iye kuna imwe. Natenepo sankhula chinafuna iwe: mthunzi kwenda patsogolo mathanyo khumi penu kubwerera m'nduli mathanyo khumi.”" 
2Kings20:10 Hezekia adatawira mbati, “Ntchinthu chokhonda nensa mthunzi kwenda m'tsogolo mathanyo khumi! Natenepo chitisani mthunzi kubwerera m'nduli mathanyo khumi.”" 
2Kings20:11 Yesaya adapemphera kuna MBUYA, tenepo MBUYA adachitisadi mthunzi kubwerera m'nduli mathanyo khumi pa nsikada zile zidasasanya Mfumu Ahazi." 
2Kings20:12 Pandzidzi ninga ontho-onthowo mfumu wa ku Babiloni, Merodaki-Baladani, mwana Baladani adava kuti Mfumu Hezekia akhadwala, natenepo adatumiza kalata na mtukwa kuna iye." 
2Kings20:13 Hezekia adatambira mwadidi anyamphangwa ale mbaaonesa mfumache yonsene; siliva na golidi pyakukomesera muliwo na mafuta akununkhira, pontho na pida pyache pyonsene pya nkhondo. Nkhabe na chibodzi chene m'masubi ache akukoyeramo pinthu penu konsene kwene muufumu mwache chidasiya iye okhonda kuaonesa tayu." 
2Kings20:14 Tenepo mprofeti Yesaya adenda kuna Mfumu Hezekia mbamvunza mbati, “Ayi amuna enewa abulukira kupi, pontho alonganji kuna imwe?” Hezekia adatawira mbati, “Iwo abulukira kudziko yakutali pyakwanga, ku Babiloni.”" 
2Kings20:15 Yesaya adavunza mbati, “Ayi chaona iwo ninji m'nyumba yachifumu?” Hezekia adatawira mbati, “Iwo aona chinthu chonsene. Nkhabe na chibodzi chene m'masubi akukoyeramo pinthu chidasiya ine okhonda kuaonesa tayu.”" 
2Kings20:16 Tenepo Yesaya adampanga mfumu mbati, “MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga kuti" 
2Kings20:17 ndzidzi unafika wakuti pyonsene pya m'nyumbanu yachifumu, pinthu pyonsene pyakoya makolo anu kufikirana lero, pinakwatwa kwenda kudziko ya Babiloni. Nkhabe na chibodzi chene chinasiyiwa tayu." 
2Kings20:18 Pinango pya pidzukulu pyanu chadi-chadi pinakwatwa mbapikakapalwi katumikira m'nyumba ya mfumu wa ku Babiloni.” 
2Kings20:19 Mfumu Hezekia adanyerezera pikulonga kuti pandzidzi wakukhala kwache na moyo panakhala mtendere na kutchinjirizwa mwadidi; natenepo iye adatawira kuti, “Mphangwa zandipanga imwe kubulukira kuna MBUYA nsadidi.”" 
2Kings20:20 Pinango pyonsene pidachitika Hezekia mbali mfumu, pyonsene pidachita iye mwakuwanga mtima, na mule mudakwanisira iye kusasanya thawale na mgelo wakudzesa madzi mumzindawo pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Yuda." 
2Kings20:21 Hezekia adagonera mkono, tenepo Manase mwanache adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache." 
2Kings21:1 Manase akhali na pyaka khumi na piwiri pikhapita iye ufumu wa Yuda, tenepo adatonga mu Yerusalemu pyaka makumashanu na pishanu. Mache akhali Hefiziba." 
2Kings21:2 Manase adadawa pamaso pa MBUYA pakuchita pyakunyansa pikhachita madzinza anango, ale adathamangiswa na MBUYA m'dzikomo ndzidzi ukhapita anthu ache mwenemo." 
2Kings21:3 Iye adasasanya pontho mbuto zakupembedzerapo milungu, zile zikhadavunga babache Hezekia; iye adamanga maguwa ansembe kupembedzerapo milungu Baala mbasasanya mfanikizo wa milungu Ashera ninga mudachitirambo Ahabu mfumu wa Israele. Manase adapembedza pontho nyenyezi." 
2Kings21:4 Iye adamanga maguwa ansembe a milungu inango m'nyumba ya Mulungu, pambuto pale padalonga MBUYA kuti penepo ndiye pathema iye kupembedzerwapo." 
2Kings21:5 Mupintalo piwiri pya Nyumba ya Mulungu, iye adamangamo maguwa ansembe akupembedzerapo nyenyezi." 
2Kings21:6 Iye adapereka mwanache wamamuna ninga nsembe yakupyerera. Iye adachita pyaufiti na matsenga mbavunza nzeru kuna anyakuombedza na anyakukhumira. Iye adadawa pikulu pamaso pa MBUYA mbalamusa ukali wache. 
2Kings21:7 Iye adaikha mfanikizo wa milungu Ashera m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, pambuto pale padalonga MBUYA kuna Davite na mwanache Solomoni kuti, “Muno mu Yerusalemu m'Nyumba yeneyi, ndi mbuto yasankhula ine pakati pa nthemba zonsene za madzinza khumi na mawiri a Israele kukhala mbuto ile yathema ine kupembedzerwapo." 
2Kings21:8 Tenepo ngakhala Aisraele anavera matongero anga onsene mbakoya Mwambo onsene udaapasa nyabasanga Mose ule, penepo ine nkhabe dzatawirisa tayu kuti iwo athamangiswe m'dziko idapereka ine kuna makolo awo ile.”" 
2Kings21:9 Mbwenye anthu a ku Yuda hadavere MBUYA tayu, pontho Manase adaachitisa kudawa pikulu kupiringana kudawa kudachita madzinza adathamangisa MBUYA m'dziko ale pandzidzi ukhapita anthu ache mwenemo." 
2Kings21:10 Kudzera muna anyabasache maprofeti, MBUYA adalonga mbati," 
2Kings21:11 “Mfumu Manase achita pinthu pyakuchitisa manyadzo ninga penepi; pinthu pyakuipa pyakwanga kupiringana pinthu pidachita Akanani; iye achitisa anthu a ku Yuda kudawa thangwi ya milungu idasasanya iye ile. 
2Kings21:12 Natenepo ine, MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele, ndinadzesa muliri ukulu pana Yerusalemu na Yuda mwakuti munthu onsene anapivayo anava napyo mache khutu." 
2Kings21:13 Ine ndinati ndivunge Yerusalemu ninga mudachitira ine kuna Samaria, pontho ninga mudachitira ine kuna Ahabu mfumu wa Israele na pidzukulu pyache. Ndinapukuta Yerusalemu kumchenesa ninga mumbachitirwa mbale kupukutwa na kugudumirwa." 
2Kings21:14 Ndinakhonda anthu anafuna dzasalira na moyowo mbandiapereka m'manja mwa anyamalwawo, ale anaakunda mbapokosera dziko yawo." 
2Kings21:15 Ndinati ndichite penepi kuna anthu anga, thangwi iwo andidawira mbalamusa ukali wanga kutomera pandzidzi udabuluka makolo awo m'dziko ya Iguputo na lero.”" 
2Kings21:16 Manase adapha anthu azinji okhonda dawa mwakuti mu Yerusalemumo ponsene pene pakhali chiropa chokhokha; iye adachita penepi kuthimizira papinthu pidachita iye kutsogolera anthu a ku Yuda kupembedza milungu inango; natenepo iwo adachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA. 
2Kings21:17 Pinango pyonsene pidachitika Manase mbali mfumu wa Yuda, pyonsene pidachita iye, pontho na kudawa kwache pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Yuda." 
2Kings21:18 Manase adagonera mkono mbaikhwa m'masiye a munda wa Uza, wakuzungulira nyumba yachifumu ule. Tenepo Amoni mwanache adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache." 
2Kings21:19 Amoni akhali na pyaka makumawiri na piwiri pyakubalwa pidapita iye ufumu wa Yuda mbatonga mu Yerusalemu pyaka piwiri. Mache akhali Meshulemeti mwana wamkazi wa Haruzi wa kuluwani ya Yotiba. 
2Kings21:20 Ninga mudachitirambo Manase babache, iye adadawa pamaso pa MBUYA." 
2Kings21:21 Iye adatsanzira makhaliro a babache mbapembedzambo milungu inango, ikhadapembedza babache ile." 
2Kings21:22 Iye adamkhonda MBUYA, Mulungu wa makolo ache mbakhonda kuvera matongero a MBUYA." 
2Kings21:23 Mathubu a Amoni adamsandukira mbamphera m'nyumba yachifumu. 
2Kings21:24 Anthu a ku Yuda adaphambo amuna akhadapha mfumu ale, tenepo iwo adapitisa Yosia mwanache kukhala mfumu m'mbuto mwache." 
2Kings21:25 Pinango pyonsene pidachitika Amoni mbali mfumu wa Yuda na pidachita iye pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Yuda. 
2Kings21:26 Iye adaikhwa m'masiye m'munda mwa Uza. Tenepo Yosia mwanache adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache. 
2Kings22:1 Yosia akhali na pyaka pisere pyakubalwa pikhapita iye ufumu wa Yuda mbatonga mu Yerusalemu pyaka makumatatu na chibodzi. Mache akhali Yedida mwana Adaia wa kuluwani ya Bozikati. 
2Kings22:2 Yosia adachita pinthu pyakukomera MBUYA; iye adateweza upangizi wa kholoache Mfumu Davite mbachita mphole-mphole kuvera matongero onsene a Mulungu. 
2Kings22:3 Chaka chakhumi na chisere Yosia mbali mfumu, adatuma Shafani, nyakulemba m'thando ya miseru, mwana Azalia mdzukuluache Meshulamu kwenda ku Nyumba ya Mulungu na matongero akuti:" 
2Kings22:4 “Ndoko kuna Nyansembe Wamkulu Hilikia mbakakupange konta ya kobiri zatambira anyansembe, ambalondali pamsuwo wa Nyumba ya Mulungu ale, kubulukira kuna anthu." 
2Kings22:5 Apange kuti apereke kobirizo kuna amuna ale ambayang'anira basa yakusasanya pontho Nyumba ya MBUYA. Iwombo athema kupagali 
2Kings22:6 anyakupala matabwa, anyakumanga nyumba na anyaluso pakumanga na miyala; pontho agule matabwa na miyala kuti piphatiswe basa yakusasanya pontho nyumba." 
2Kings22:7 Amuna adapaswa kuyang'anira basa yeneyi ale, akhali akukhulupirika pyakwanga, tenepo nee pakhafunikave kuti alonge pya mule mukhaphatiswirwa basa kobirizo tayu.”" 
2Kings22:8 Shafani adapereka mphangwa zile kuna Hilikia, tenepo Hilikia adampanga kuti iye akhadagumana bukhu ya Mwambo m'Nyumba ya MBUYA. Hilikia adapereka bukhu ile kuna Shafani, ule adaiwerenga." 
2Kings22:9 Kubuluka penepo adabwerera kuna mfumu mbakampanga mbati, “Anyabasanu akwata kobiri zikhadagumanwa m'Nyumba ya MBUYA zile mbazipereka kuna amuna akuyang'anira basa yakusasanya pontho Nyumba ya Mulungu ale.”" 
2Kings22:10 Natenepo iye adalonga mbati, “Pano ndina bukhu yandipasa Hilikia.” Natenepo iye adaiwerenga mwakugaluza fala kuna mfumu." 
2Kings22:11 Pidava mfumu kuwerengwa kwa bukhu ile, adang'amba nguwo zache mwakutsukwala" 
2Kings22:12 mbalonga kuna Hilikia nyansembe, Ahikamu mwana Shafani, Akibori mwana Mikaia, Shafani nyakulemba m'thando ya miseru, na Asaia nyakufiliviri mfumu mbati," 
2Kings22:13 “Ndokoni mukavunze nzeru kuna MBUYA m'mbuto mwanga, pontho na anthu onsene a Yuda pya pifunziso pya m'bukhu yeneyi. MBUYA atizhangalira thangwi makolo athu hadachite tayu ninga munalongera bukhuyi kuti pyathema kuchitwa.”" 
2Kings22:14 Hilikia, Ahikamu, Akibori, Shafani na Asaia adenda kavunza nzeru kuna mprofeti unango wachikazi dzinache Hulida, ule akhakhala kukhundu yachinchino ya Yerusalemu. Mamunache akhali Shalumu mwana Tikiva, mdzukuluache Harihasi, ule akhali nyakukoya mikhanjo ya m'Nyumba ya Mulungu. Iwo adampanga pyonsene pikhadachitika pile." 
2Kings22:15 Tenepo Hulida adaapanga kuti abwerere kuna mfumu mbakampanga 
2Kings22:16 mphangwa zakubulukira kuna MBUYA zakuti: “Ine ndinafuna nditchunyuse Yerusalemu pabodzi pene na anthu ache onsene ninga mwalemberwa ipyo m'bukhu yawerenga mfumu wa Yuda. 
2Kings22:17 Iwo andikhonda mbapereka nsembe kuna milungu inango, natenepo iwo alamusa ukali wanga na pinthu pyonsene pyachita iwo. Ukali wanga ukugaka pana Yerusalemu pontho nkhabe dzambombowa tayu." 
2Kings22:18 Mbwenye kulonga pya mfumu, ine MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele ndikulonga kuti: Iwe udavera pyalembwa m'bukhumo," 
2Kings22:19 mbuleka pyakudawa pyako, pontho udapichepesa wekha ene pamaso panga, kung'amba nguwo zako na kulira pidava iwe mule mudathuswira ine kutchunyusa Yerusalemu na anthu ache ene. Ndinaichitisa kukhala mbuto yakugoswa pyakwanga, pontho anthu anaphatisa basa dzinache kutemberera nayo. Kwache ine ndava kupemphera kwako," 
2Kings22:20 tenepo kutchunyusa Yerusalemu kunafuna ine dzachita nee kunadza chinchino tayu kufikirana iwe ufe. Ine ndinakutawirisa kuti ufe na mtendere.” Amuna ale adabwerera kuna Mfumu Yosia na mphangwa zenezi. 
2Kings23:1 Mfumu Yosia adachemeresa akadamu onsene a mu Yuda na Yerusalemu," 
2Kings23:2 mbaenda onsene pabodzi pene ku Nyumba ya Mulungu mbatsagana na anyansembe, maprofeti na anthu onsene, anyakufuma na anyakutcherenga ene. Pamaso pa anthu onsene ale, mfumu adawerenga bukhu yonsene ya chiverano, ikhadagumanwa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu ile." 
2Kings23:3 Iye adaimira chifupi na mzati mbachita chiverano na MBUYA kuti anamvera, anateweza mwambo na matongero ache na mtimache onsene, na moyo wache onsene, pontho kuti anachita pinthu pinalongwa m'chiverano ninga mwalemberwa ipyo m'bukhumo. Natenepo anthu onsene adadumbira kukoya chiverano chenechi." 
2Kings23:4 Kubuluka penepo Yosia adapanga Nyansembe Wamkulu Hilikia, anyansembe anango akumphedzera na akulondali pamsuwo wa Nyumba ya Mulungu akhaphata basa pandzidzi wenewo ale kuti abuluse m'Nyumba ya MBUYA pinthu pyonsene pikhaphatiswa basa kupembedzera napyo milungu Baala, Ashera na nyenyezi. Mfumu adapipisa pyonsene pile kunja kwa Yerusalemu m'phedi ya Kidroni mbakwata dothache kwenda nayo ku Betele." 
2Kings23:5 Iye adabulusa anyansembe anango pabasa, ale akhadadzozwa na mafumu a Yuda kuti apereke nsembe pambuto zakupembedzerapo milungu m'mizinda ya Yuda na mbuto za chifupi na Yerusalemu, anyansembe onsene ale adapereka nsembe kuna Baala, dzuwa, mwezi, thambo na nyenyezi." 
2Kings23:6 Iye adabulusa m'Nyumba ya MBUYA dzimunthu wa milungu Ashera kwenda nawo kunja kwa mzinda kuphedi ya Kidroni. Kweneko iye adaupisa mbaupeya kuti usanduke dotha mbakawaza dothayo kumasiye a mwinji. 
2Kings23:7 Iye adavunga nyumba zikhakhala maputa achimuna na achikazi ene za ku Nyumba ya MBUYA. Mwenemo ndiye mukhaluka akazi mikhanjo yakuphatiswa basa pakupembedza Ashera. 
2Kings23:8 Iye adadza ku Yerusalemu na anyansembe onsene, ale akhali m'mizinda ya Yuda mbavunga mbuto zakupembedzerapo milungu pakhapereka iwo nsembe pale kubulukira ku Geba mpakana ku Beeresheba. Iye adagomola pontho mbuto zakupembedzerapo milungu chifupi na msuwo wa mpanda udamanga Yoswa mkulu wa mumzindamo, ule ukhali kukhundu yakumabzere kwa msuwo ukulu wakupitira mumzindamo." 
2Kings23:9 Anyansembe enewa hadatawiriswe tayu kutumikira m'Nyumba ya MBUYA, mbwenye adakwanisa kudya mikate yakusowa chakufufumisira, ile ikhaperekwa kuna anyansembe anzawo." 
2Kings23:10 Mfumu Yosia adavunga pontho Tofeti mbuto yakupembedzerapo milungu inango m'phedi ya Beni-Hinomu, towera paleke khala munthu na mbodzi ene wakupereka mwanache wamamuna penu wachikazi ninga nsembe yakupyerera kuna milungu Moleki." 
2Kings23:11 Iye adabulusa pontho akavalo ale akhadapambulwa na mafumu a Yuda pa chipembedzo cha dzuwa, mbapisa pingolo pile pikhaphatisa iwo basa pa chipembedzochi. Penepi pidakoyiwa chifupi na msuwo wa Nyumba ya Mulungu chifupi na nyumba ikhakhala Natani-Meleki thubu wamkulu." 
2Kings23:12 Maguwa ansembe akhadamanga mafumu a Yuda pansoyi pa nyumba ya chifumu chifupi na subi ya Ahazi. Mfumu Yosia adagwisa pabodzi pene na maguwa ansembe adaikha Mfumu Manase mupintalo piwiri pya Nyumba ya MBUYA. Iye adamala kuswa maguwa onsene mbakhala mapindi-mapindi pontho mbapiponya m'phedi ya Kidroni. 
2Kings23:13 Yosia adavunga mbuto zakupembedzerapo milungu adamanga Mfumu Solomoni kumabulukiro dzuwa a Yerusalemu kumwera kwa Phiri ya Olivi, ale akhaphatiswa basa kupembedza milungu inango yakuchitisa manyadzo ninga Asitarite, milungu ya Asidoni, Kemoshi, milungu ya Amoabu, na Moleki, milungu ya Aamoni." 
2Kings23:14 Mfumu Yosia adagomola piguwa pyakupambulika mbagwisa adzimunthu onsene a milungu Ashera, pontho pambuto pakhadaimira iwo akhadamala kupadzaza na magogodo a anthu." 
2Kings23:15 Yosia adagwisa pontho guwa pambuto yakupembedzerapo m'Betele, ile ikhadamangwa na Mfumu Yeroboamu mwana Nebati, ule adachitisa Aisraele kudawa. Yosia adagwisa guwa yansembe mbaswa miyala yache mapindi-mapindi mbaipeya kusanduka fumbi; iye adapisa pontho dzimunthu wa milungu Ashera." 
2Kings23:16 Kubuluka penepo Yosia adayang'ana-yang'ana mbaona nthumbi zinango paphiri pale. Iye adabulusamo magogodo onsene mbakaapisa paguwa yansembe. Na njira yeneyi iye adalulupisa guwa yansembe kuchitisa pinthu pidalongwa kale ene kukwana-kwana pandzidzi wa phwando pikhadaimira Mfumu Yeroboamu chifupi na guwa yansembe. Mfumu Yosia adayang'ana-yang'ana mbaona nthumbi ya munthu wa Mulungu, ule akhadalonga pya penepi." 
2Kings23:17 Mfumu adavunza mbati, “Nthumbi ile nja ani?” Anthu a ku Betele adatawira mbati, “Ndi nthumbi ya munthu wa Mulungu ule akhadabulukira ku Yuda mbalonga pya pinthu pyachita imwe leropi kuna guwa yansembeyi.”" 
2Kings23:18 Yosia adalonga mbati, “Ilekeni tenepo; magogodo ache mbaleke buluswamo.” Natenepo magogodo ache na magogodo a mprofeti akhadabulukira ku Samaria ule hadabuluswemo tayu." 
2Kings23:19 M'mizinda yonsene ya Israele Mfumu Yosia adavunga nyumba zonsene za pambuto zakupembedzerapo milungu, zile zikhadamangwa na mafumu a Israele, ale pakuchita tenepo adalamusa ukali wa MBUYA. Iye adachita chibodzi-bodzi ninga mudapichitira iye m'Betele." 
2Kings23:20 Iye adapha anyansembe onsene pamaguwa ansembe pambuto zakupembedzerapo milungu pakhaphata iwo basa pale mbapisa magogodo a anthu pamaguwa enewa. Kubuluka penepo adabwerera ku Yerusalemu. 
2Kings23:21 Mfumu Yosia adatonga anthu kusekera Phwando ya Paska kulemedza nayo MBUYA Mulungu wawo ninga mwalemberwa ipyo m'bukhu ya chiverano. 
2Kings23:22 Chipo nkhabe mfumu na mbodzi ene wa Israele penu wa Yuda adzati chita phwando ya Paska ninga yeneyi tayu kutomera pandzidzi wa Atongi mpakana ndzidzi wa mafumu a Israele na Yuda. 
2Kings23:23 Pakumalisira pache chaka chakhumi na chisere cha ufumu wa Yosia, phwando ya Paska idachitika mu Yerusalemu." 
2Kings23:24 Na thangwi ya kufuna kuvera mwambo, ule udalembwa m'bukhu idagumana Nyansembe Wamkulu Hilikia m'nyumba ya Mulungu ile, Mfumu Yosia adabulusa mu Yerusalemu na mu Yuda monsene anyakukhumira na anyakuombedza onsene na milungu pontho mifanikizo yonsene ya m'nyumba na pinango pyonsene pimbanyansira Mulungu." 
2Kings23:25 Chipo nee padzati khala mfumu ninga weneyu tayu, ule adatumikira MBUYA na mtimache onsene, nzeru zache zonsene pontho na mphamvu zache zonsene, kuvera mwambo onsene wa Mose; podi na pidafa iye pene pakhali nkhabe pontho mfumu unango ninga iye." 
2Kings23:26 Mbwenye ukali wakugoswa wa MBUYA ukhadalamukira Yuda thangwi ya pinthu pidachita Manase, podi na lero udzati mbombowa tayu." 
2Kings23:27 MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Ndinati ndichite kuna Yuda pinthu pidachita ine kuna Israele. Ndinati ndiamaliretu anthu a ku Yuda mwakuti iwo nkhabe dzaoneka pontho pamaso panga tayu. Ine ndinakhonda Yerusalemu, mzinda udasankhula ine ule, pontho na nyumbanga, mbuto ile idalonga ine kuti ndathema kupembedzwamo.”" 
2Kings23:28 Pinango pyonsene pidachitika Yosia mbali mfumu wa Yuda na pyonsene pidachita iye pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Yuda. 
2Kings23:29 Pikhali Yosia mfumu, Neko mfumu wa Iguputo adadza na anyankhondo ache kumkulo wa Yufurate kudzaphedza mfumu wa Asiria. Mfumu Yosia adenda kuti akamenyane na Neko, mfumu wa ku Iguputo, pa Megido tenepo iye adampha ponthopo." 
2Kings23:30 Mathubu ache adakwata mtembo wache ule mbauikha m'chingolo, kubwerera nawo kwenda ku Yerusalemu kule kudaikhwa iye m'masiye achifumu. Anthu a ku Yuda adasankhula Yoahazi mwana Yosia mbamdzoza kukhala mfumu." 
2Kings23:31 Yoahazi akhali na pyaka makumawiri na pitatu pidapita iye ufumu wa Yuda. Tenepo iye adatonga mu Yerusalemu miyezi mitatu. Mache akhali Hamutala mwana wamkazi wa Yeremia wa kumzinda wa Libina. 
2Kings23:32 Iye adachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA pakuteweza pikhachita makolo ache. 
2Kings23:33 Ufumu wache udamala pandzidzi udakwatwa iye ninga nyaperezo na Neko mfumu wa Iguputo kwenda ku Ribila m'dziko ya Hamati mbachitisa Yuda kupagali siliva wakukwana makilogramu pikwi pitatu na madzana manayi pontho na golidi wakukwana makilogramu makumatatu na manayi kukhala ninga msonkho. 
2Kings23:34 Mfumu Neko adaikha Eliakimu mwana Yosia kupita ufumu wa Yuda m'mbuto mwa Yosia mbamtchandula dzinache Yehoiakimu. Yehoahazi adakwatwa na Mfumu Neko kwenda ku Iguputo. Iye adafera konthoko. 
2Kings23:35 Mfumu Yehoiakimu adakhomesa anthu msonkho malingana na mfuma ikhali na iwoyo, towera akwanise kupereka kuna mfumu wa ku Iguputo kobiri zidatonga iye kumpasa." 
2Kings23:36 Yehoiakimu akhali na pyaka makumawiri na pishanu pidapita iye ufumu wa Yuda mbatonga mu Yerusalemu pyaka khumi na chibodzi. Mache akhali Zebida mwana wamkazi wa Pedaia wa kuluwani ya Ruma. 
2Kings23:37 Yehoiakimu adachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA pakuteweza pikhachita makolo ache. 
2Kings24:1 Pikhali Yehoiakimu mfumu wa Yuda, Mfumu Nebukadinezara wa ku Babiloni adenda ku Yuda kachita nkhondo, tenepo pyaka pitatu Yehoiakimu adakhakhamizwa kukhala pansi pa utongi wa Nebukadinezara; kubuluka penepo iye adampandukira." 
2Kings24:2 MBUYA adatuma magulu a anyankhondo a ku Babiloni, Aramu, Moabu na Amoni kudzamenyana na Yehoiakimu kuvunga Yuda ninga montho mukhadalongera MBUYA kudzera muna maprofeti ache." 
2Kings24:3 Penepi pidachitika thangwi MBUYA adatonga kuti pikhale tenepo, towera Yuda amaliretu mbaleke onekave, thangwi pyakudawa pyonsene pidachita Mfumu Manase," 
2Kings24:4 pontho maka-maka thangwi ya anthu okhonda dawa adapha iye ale. MBUYA nee mbadalekerera Manase tayu thangwi ya kudawa kweneku. 
2Kings24:5 Pinango pyonsene pidachitika Yehoiakimu mbali mfumu na pyonsene pidachita iye pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Yuda. 
2Kings24:6 Yehoiakimu adagonera mkono, tenepo Yehoiakini mwanache adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache." 
2Kings24:7 Mfumu wa Iguputo na anyankhondo ache hakhabulukave tayu kunja kwa Iguputo kamenya nkhondo tayu, thangwi mfumu wa ku Babiloni ndzidzi wenewu ndiye akhatonga nthemba zonsene zile zikhali za Iguputo, kutomera kumkulo wa Yufurate mpakana kumadire kumpoto kwa Iguputo." 
2Kings24:8 Yehoiakini akhali na pyaka khumi na pisere pyakubalwa pikhapita iye ufumu wa Yuda mbatonga mu Yerusalemu miyezi mitatu. Mache akhali Nehushita mwana wamkazi wa Elinatani wa ku Yerusalemu. 
2Kings24:9 Yehoiakini adachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA pakuteweza pinthu pikhachita babache. 
2Kings24:10 Ukhali ndzidzi wakutonga kwache ule udadza anyankhondo a ku Babiloni pakuchita kutongwa na mathubu a Mfumu Nebukadinezara kakuzungulira Yerusalemu. 
2Kings24:11 Pandzidzi ukhazungulira iwo mzindawo, Nebukadinezara mwenechiroache ndiye adadza ku Yerusalemu," 
2Kings24:12 tenepo Mfumu Yehoiakini pabodzi pene na mache, anache, akadamu ache, pontho na mathubu a kunyumba yachifumu adaimisa manja kuna anthu a ku Babiloni. Chaka chachisere Nebukadinezara mbali mfumu adakwata Yehoiakini kukhala nyaperezo" 
2Kings24:13 mbapokosera pyonsene pya m'Nyumba ya MBUYA na pya m'nyumba yachifumu kwenda napyo ku Babiloni. Ninga mudalongera MBUYA, Nebukadinezara adaswa pyombo pyonsene pyagolidi pidasasanya Mfumu Solomoni kuti piphatiswe basa m'Nyumba ya MBUYA." 
2Kings24:14 Mfumu Nebukadinezara adakwata anthu a mu Yerusalemu ninga anyaperezo, ana onsene a m'banja yachifumu, na anthu onsene akuveka mwenemo, onsene pabodzi pene akhalipo pikwi khumi. Iye adakwata anyaluso onsene pamabasa akusiyana-siyana pabodzi pene na amisiri akufula siliva mbasiya kwene anthu akutcherenga okha basi mu Yuda." 
2Kings24:15 Nebukadinezara adakwata Yehoiakini kwenda naye ku Babiloni ninga nyaperezo pabodzi pene na mache, akazache, mathubu ache na amunache onsene akuveka a mu Yuda." 
2Kings24:16 Nebukadinezara adakwata amuna akuveka kwenda nawo ku Babiloni, onsene pabodzi pene akhalipo pikwi pinomwe, pontho na anyaluso chikwi chibodzi pabasa yakusiyana-siyana kuthimizapo amisiri akufula siliva. Onsenewa akhali amuna akujintcha akuthema kuphata basa ya nkhondo." 
2Kings24:17 Nebukadinezara adachitisa mbuyache Yehoiakini, Matania, kukhala mfumu wa Yuda mbamtchandula dzina kukhala Zedekia." 
2Kings24:18 Zedekia akhali na pyaka makumawiri na chibodzi pikhapita iye ufumu wa Yuda mbatonga mu Yerusalemu pyaka khumi na chibodzi. Mache akhali Hamutala mwana Yeremia wa kumzinda wa Libina. 
2Kings24:19 Mfumu Zedekia adachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA ninga montho mudachitira Mfumu Yehoiakimu. 
2Kings24:20 MBUYA adazhangalira pyakwanga anthu a ku Yerusalemu na Yuda mwakuti adaabulusa pamaso pache. 
2Kings25:1 Zedekia adapandukira Mfumu Nebukadinezara wa ku Babiloni. Natenepo Nebukadinezara adadza pabodzi pene na anyankhondo ache onsene dzachita nkhondo na Yerusalemu pansiku yachikhumi ya mwezi wakhumi wa chaka chachifemba Zedekia mbali mfumu. Iwo adamanga misasa kuzungulira mzinda mbasasanya pyakugomolera mpanda. 
2Kings25:2 Mzindawo udazungulirwa na anyankhondo mpakana chaka chakhumi na chibodzi Zedekia mbali mfumu. 
2Kings25:3 Pansiku yachifemba ya mwezi wachinayi wa chaka chonthocho, pidakaka njala mwakuti anthu adasowaletu chakuti adye," 
2Kings25:4 mafufu a mpanda adaswiwa. Podi kwene kuti Ababiloni akhazungulira mzindawo, anyankhondo onsene adamala thawa mumzindamo na mosiku. Iwo adathawa na njira ya kumunda wachifumu mbapita na pamsuwo wa pakati pa mafufu mawiri, kuthawira kuphedi ya Yorodani." 
2Kings25:5 Kwache anyankhondo a ku Babiloni adathamangisa mfumu Zedekia mbamphatira m'phedi chifupi na Yeriko. Tenepo anyankhondo ache onsene adamala thawa mbamsiya yekha. 
2Kings25:6 Zedekia adaphatwa mbaendeswa kuna Mfumu Nebukadinezara, ule akhali mumzinda wa Ribila, natenepo kweneko Nebukadinezara adamtonga mseru." 
2Kings25:7 Ana a Zedekia adaphiwa uku Zedekia akuona na maso ache; kubuluka penepo Zedekia adakonombolwa maso mbammanga na njema kwenda naye ku Babiloni. 
2Kings25:8 Pansiku yachinomwe ya mwezi wachishanu wa chaka chakhumi na chifemba Nebukadinezara mbali mfumu wa ku Babiloni, Nebuzaradani phungu wa mfumu pontho mkadamu wa anyankhondo, adapita mu Yerusalemu." 
2Kings25:9 Iye adapisa moto Nyumba ya Mulungu, nyumba yachifumu na nyumba za anthu onsene akufunika mu Yerusalemu." 
2Kings25:10 Tenepo anyankhondo ache adagomola mpanda wa Yerusalemu. 
2Kings25:11 Kubuluka penepo Nebuzaradani adakwata anthu adasalira mumzindamo ale, amuna aluso pamabasa akusiyana-siyana, pontho na ale akhadapipereka okha ene kuna mfumu wa ku Babiloni kwenda nawo ninga anyaperezo ku Babiloni." 
2Kings25:12 Mbwenye mu Yuda adasiyamo kwene anyakutcherengaletu, ale akhali nkhabe na chinthu chene tayu kuti aphate basa m'minda yamfesa na minda inango." 
2Kings25:13 Anthu a ku Babiloni adagomola m'mapindi-mapindi nsanamira ziwiri zankuwa na pigudumu pikhali m'Nyumba ya Mulungu pile, pabodzi pene na phiso ikulu yankuwa mbakwata nkuwa onsene kwenda nawo ku Babiloni." 
2Kings25:14 Iwo adakwata pontho mafosholo, pontho pyakuwolera dotha paguwa yansembe, pyakukwizira tsakala ya nyale, ndilo zakuchuchisiramo chiropa cha nsembe, ndilo zakufukizira pyakununkhira pontho na pyombo pinango pyonsene pyankuwa pyakuphatiswa basa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
2Kings25:15 Mkadamu wa anyankhondo adakwata pyonsene pyakusasanywa na golidi penu siliva pabodzi pene na ndilo zing'ono-zing'ono pontho na piwaya pyakuphatisirwa basa kupalira makala a moto. 
2Kings25:16 Pinthu pyankuwa pidasasanya Mfumu Solomoni kuti pikhale m'Nyumba ya Mulungu: Nsanamira ziwiri, pigudumu na phiso ikulu, pikhali pyakulemera pyakwanga mwakuti kulemera kwapyo kukhali kokhonda dziwika." 
2Kings25:17 Nsanamira ziwirizo zikhali sasawa; ibodzi kulapha kwayo ikhali makhono masere pontho ikhali na mphanda yankuwa, kulapha kwayo khono ibodzi na kati ya khono. Kuzungulira mphanda yonsene pakhali mangalade ankuwa akuthemeserwa na pinango pyakuoneka ninga ntheme zankuwa." 
2Kings25:18 Kuthimiza penepo Nebuzaradani mkadamu wa anyankhondo adakwata Seraia Nyansembe Wamkulu, Zefania wachiwiri kwa Nyansembe Wamkulu, pontho na akulu-akulu akufunika atatu ku m'Nyumba ya Mulungu mbaenda nawo ninga anyaperezo." 
2Kings25:19 Kubulukira mumzindamo iye adakwata mkadamu wa anyankhondo ule, mapungu ashanu a mfumu akhadasalira mumzindamo ale, wachiwiri kwa mkadamu wa anyankhondo, ule akhayayang'anira mabukhu a nkhondo, pabodzi pene na amuna anango makumatanthatu akufunika." 
2Kings25:20 Nebuzaradani adaakwata kwenda nawo kuna mfumu wa ku Babiloni, ule ndzidzi wenewu akhali mumzinda wa Ribila" 
2Kings25:21 m'nthemba ya Hamati. Kweneko mfumu adatonga kuti anthu ale amenywe mbaphiwa. Natenepo anthu a ku Yuda adakwatwa m'dziko mwawo kwenda kudziko ya unyaperezo. 
2Kings25:22 Mfumu Nebukadinezara wa ku Babiloni adaikha Gedalia mwana Ahikamu mdzukuluache Shafani kukhala mkulu wa boma ya Yuda kuyang'anira anthu adasiya iye mu Yuda ale. 
2Kings25:23 Pidava akadamu na anyankhondo a ku Yuda akhadathawa ale pya penepi, iwo adadza kuna Gedalia pa Mizipa. Akadamu enewa akhali Ishimaele mwana Netania, Yohanani mwana Karea, Seraia mwana Tanihumeti wa kuluwani ya Netofa na Yaazania mwana wa Maakati." 
2Kings25:24 Gedalia adaatsikimizira mbati, “Lekani gopa kutumikira anthu a ku Babiloni. Khazikikani m'dzikomu mbamutumikire mfumu wa ku Babiloni, tenepo pinthu pyanu pyonsene pinakufambirani mwadidi.”" 
2Kings25:25 Mbwenye mwezi wachinomwe wa chaka chenecho, Ishimaele mwana Netania, mdzukuluache Elishama wa banja yachifumu, adenda ku Mizipa pabodzi pene na amuna khumi kasosa Gedalia mbampha. Iye adapha pontho Aisraele na anthu a ku Babiloni akhali pabodzi na iye ale." 
2Kings25:26 Kubuluka penepo Aisraele onsene, mkulu mpakana mwana, na akadamu a nkhondo adathawira ku Iguputo, thangwi akhagopa anthu a ku Babiloni." 
2Kings25:27 Chaka chidapita Evili-Merodaki ufumu wa Babiloni adakomera mtima Mfumu Yehoiakini wa ku Yuda mbambulusa m'perezo. Penepi pidachitika pansiku yamakumawiri na chishanu ya mwezi wakhumi na chiwiri wa chaka chamakumatatu na chinomwe pidakwatwa Yehoiakini ninga nyaperezo. 
2Kings25:28 Evili-Merodaki adamkomera mtima pyakwanga mbampasa chidzo chikulu chene kupiringana mafumu anzache akhadaphatwa pabodzi na iye kwenda ku Babiloni ninga anyaperezo ale. 
2Kings25:29 Natenepo Yehoiakini akhatawiriswa kudula nguwo zache za unyaperezo kuvala zinango zene, pontho kudya pathebulu pa mfumu moyo wache onsene." 
2Kings25:30 Nsiku na nsiku moyo wache onsene, iye akhapaswa na mfumu wa ku Babiloni pikhasowa iye mpakana nsiku idafa iye." 
1Chronicles1:1 Adamu adabala Seti, Seti adabala Enosi, Enosi adabala Kenani," 
1Chronicles1:2 Kenani adabala Mahalalele, Mahalalele adabala Yaredi," 
1Chronicles1:3 Yaredi adabala Enoki, Enoki adabala Metusela, Metusela adabala Lameki," 
1Chronicles1:4 Lameki adabala Nowa, Nowa adabala Semu, Hamu, na Yafeti." 
1Chronicles1:5 Ana a Yafeti mbawa: Gomeri, Magogi, Madai, Yavani, Tubali, Mesheki, na Tirasi." 
1Chronicles1:6 Pidzukulu pya Gomeri pikhali anthu a ku Ashikenazi, Rifati, na Togarima." 
1Chronicles1:7 Pidzukulu pya Yavani pikhali anthu a ku Elisha, Tarisisi, Kipro na Rodanimu." 
1Chronicles1:8 Ana achimuna a Hamu mbawa: Kushi, Iguputo, Puti na Kanani." 
1Chronicles1:9 Pidzukulu pya Kushipikhali anthu a ku Seba, Havila, Sabita, Raama, na Sabiteka. Pidzukulu pya Raama pikhali anthu a ku Sheba na Dedani." 
1Chronicles1:10 Kushi adabala mwana dzinache Nimurodi, ule adasanduka nyakukunda wamkulu wakutoma padziko ya pansi." 
1Chronicles1:11 Pidzukulu pya Iguputo pikhali anthu a ku Ludi, Anamu, Lehabu, Nafitu," 
1Chronicles1:12 Patirusi, Kasilu, pontho na ku Krete (kule kukhadabulukira Afilisti)." 
1Chronicles1:13 Ana achimuna a Kanani mbawa: Sidoni mwanache wautombo na Heti, ale akhali makolo a anthu akhadakwata madzinawo." 
1Chronicles1:14 Kanani akhali pontho kholo wa Ayebusi, Aamori, Agirigashi," 
1Chronicles1:15 Ahivi, Aariki, Asini," 
1Chronicles1:16 Aarividi, Azemari na Ahamati." 
1Chronicles1:17 Ana achimuna a Semu mbawa: Elamu, Ashuri, Aripakisadi, Ludi, Aramu, Uzi, Huli, Geteri, na Mesheki." 
1Chronicles1:18 Aripakisadi adabala Shela, Shela adabalambo Eberi." 
1Chronicles1:19 Eberi adabala ana awiri achimuna; mbodzi adamthula Pelegi, thangwi pandzidzi wenewu anthu a padziko adagawanikana, unangoyo adamthula Yokotani." 
1Chronicles1:20 Pidzukulu pya Yokotani pikhali anthu a ku Alimodadi, Shelefu, Hazaramaveti, Yera," 
1Chronicles1:21 Hadoramu, Uzali, Dikila," 
1Chronicles1:22 Ebali, Abimaele, Sheba," 
1Chronicles1:23 Ofiri, Havila na Yobabu." 
1Chronicles1:24 Nyandandanda wa mabanja kutomera Semu kufikirana Abrahamu ngufu: Semu, Aripakisadi, Shela," 
1Chronicles1:25 Eberi, Pelegi, Reu," 
1Chronicles1:26 Serugi, Nahori, Tera," 
1Chronicles1:27 na Abramu (wakudziwika pontho na dzina yakuti Abrahamu). 
1Chronicles1:28 Abrahamu adabala ana awiri achimuna Isake na Ishimaele. 
1Chronicles1:29 Ishimaele adabala Nebaioti mwanache wautombo pontho Kedara, Adibeele, Mibisamu," 
1Chronicles1:30 Mishima, Duma, Masa, Hadadi, Tema," 
1Chronicles1:31 Yeturi, Nafishi na Kedema." 
1Chronicles1:32 Abrahamu akhali na mkazi wachibitchu dzinache Ketura, ule adambalira ana atanthatu: Zimirani, Yokishani, Medani, Midiani, Ishibaki na Shua. Yokishani adabala ana awiri achimuna: Sheba na Dedani." 
1Chronicles1:33 Midiani adabala ana ashanu achimuna: Efa, Eferi, Hanoki, Abida na Elida." 
1Chronicles1:34 Isake mwana Abrahamu adabala ana awiri achimuna: Esau na Yakobo. 
1Chronicles1:35 Esau adabala Elifazi, Reuele, Yeushi, Yalamu na Kora." 
1Chronicles1:36 Elifazi adabala Temani, Omara, Zefi, Gatamu, Kenazi, Timina na Amaleki." 
1Chronicles1:37 Reuele adabala Nahati, Zera, Shama na Miza." 
1Chronicles1:38 Sieri adabala Lotani, Shobali, Zibeoni, Anahi, Dishoni, Ezeri, na Dishani." 
1Chronicles1:39 Lotani adabala Hori na Hemani. Lotani akhali na nyamainga dzinache Timina. 
1Chronicles1:40 Shobali adabalaana achimuna Alivani, Manahati, Ebali, Shefi na Onamu. Zibeoni adabala ana awiri achimuna Aia na Anahi." 
1Chronicles1:41 Anahi adabala ana achimuna Dishoni; Dishoni adabala Hamurani, Eshibani, Itirani na Kerani." 
1Chronicles1:42 Ezeri adabala Bilihani, Zaavani na Yaakani. Dishani adabala Uzi na Arani." 
1Chronicles1:43 Mafumu ali m'tchindemu adatonga dziko ya Edomu mbodzi mbodzi, m'dziko ya Israele mbamudzati khala mfumu: Bela mwana wamamuna wa Beori wa ku Dinihaba Yobabu mwana wamamuna wa Zera wa ku Bozira Hushamu wa ku nthemba ya Temani Hadadi mwana wamamuna wa Bedadi wa ku Aviti. Iye adakunda Amidiani pankhondo m'dziko ya Moabu Samula wa ku Masireka Shauli wa ku Rehoboti kumkulo wa Yufurate Baala-Hanani mwana wamamuna wa Akibori Hadadi wa ku Pau; mkazache akhali Mehetabele, mwana wamkazi wa Matiredi mdzukuluache Mezahabu."

1Chronicles1:51 Anthu a Edomu adagawanikana m'madzinza awa: Timina, Aliva, Yeteti," 
1Chronicles1:52 Oholibama, Ela, Pinoni," 
1Chronicles1:53 Kenazi, Temani, Mibizari," 
1Chronicles1:54 Magidiele na Iramu. 
1Chronicles2:1 Yakobo adabala ana khumi na awiri achimuna: Rubeni, Simioni, Levi, Yuda, Isakara, Zebuloni," 
1Chronicles2:2 Dani, Yosefe, Benjemani, Nafitali, Gadi na Asheri." 
1Chronicles2:3 Yuda adabala ana ashanu achimuna. Mkazache Batishua wa Chikanani adambalira ana atatu achimuna: Eri, Onani na Shela. Mwanache wautombo Eri akhali wakuipa pyakwanga mwakuti MBUYA adampha." 
1Chronicles2:4 Mkwenyache Yuda, dzinache Tamara, adambalira ana awiri achimuna: Perezi na Zera." 
1Chronicles2:5 Perezi adabala ana awiri achimuna: Hezironi na Hamuli. 
1Chronicles2:6 Zera mphwache adabala ana ashanu achimuna: Zimri, Etani, Hemani, Kalikoli na Darida." 
1Chronicles2:7 Akani mwana Karimi mbodzi wa pidzukulu pya Zera adadzesa nyatwa pakati pa Aisraele pakukwata pinthu pikhadapokoserwa pankhondo mbapiperekwa kuna MBUYA pile. 
1Chronicles2:8 Etani adabala Azaria. 
1Chronicles2:9 Hezironi adabala ana atatu achimuna: Yerameele, Ramu na Kalebu." 
1Chronicles2:10 Nyandandanda wa mabanja kutomera pa Ramu kufikirana Yese ngufu: Ramu, Aminadabu, Nashoni, nyakulemedzwa dzinza ya Yuda ule," 
1Chronicles2:11 Salima, Boazi," 
1Chronicles2:12 Obedi na Yese. 
1Chronicles2:13 Yese adabala ana anomwe achimuna kutomera wautombo kufikirana chimalisira bele mbawa: Eliabu, Abinadabu, Shimea," 
1Chronicles2:14 Netanele, Radai," 
1Chronicles2:15 Ozemu na Davite. 
1Chronicles2:16 Iye adabala pontho ana awiri achikazi: Zeruia na Abigaile. Mwana wamkazi wa Yese dzinache Zeruia adabala ana atatu achimuna: Abishai, Yoabu na Asahele." 
1Chronicles2:17 Mwanache unango wamkazi Abigaile adasembwa na Yetere chidzukulu cha Ishimaele, tenepo iwo adabala mwana wamamuna dzinache Amasa." 
1Chronicles2:18 Kalebu mwana wamamuna wa Hezironi adasemba Azuba mbabala mwana wamkazi dzinache Yerioti, iyembo adabala ana atatu achimuna: Yeseri, Shobabu na Aridoni." 
1Chronicles2:19 Pidafa Azuba, Kalebu adasemba Efirati mbabala naye mwana wamamuna dzinache Huri." 
1Chronicles2:20 Huri adabala Uri, Uri adabala Bezalele." 
1Chronicles2:21 Pikhali Hezironi pyaka makumatanthatu adasemba mwana wamkazi wa Makiri nyamaingache Gileadi. Iwo adabala mwana wamamuna dzinache Segubu. 
1Chronicles2:22 Segubu adabala Yairi. Yairi adatonga mizinda makumawiri na mitatu m'nthemba ya Gileadi. 
1Chronicles2:23 Mbwenye mafumu a Geshuri na Aramu adakunda maluwani makumatanthatu kuthimizapo midzi ya Yairi na Kenati na maluwani a chifupi. Anthu onsene akhakhala kweneko akhali pidzukulu pya Makiri, babache Gileadi." 
1Chronicles2:24 Pidafa Hezironi, mwanache wamamuna Kalebu adasemba Efurata mkazi defuntu babache. Iye adabala naye mwana wamamuna dzinache Ashuri ule adamanga luwani ya Tekoa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Yerameele mwana wautombo wa Hezironi adabala ana ashanu achimuna: Ramu mtombo, Buna, Oreni, Ozemu na Ahia." 
1Chronicles2:26 Ramu adabala ana atatu achimuna: Mazi, Yamini, Ekeri. Yerameele akhali na mkazi unango dzinache Atara. Iwo adabala mwana mbodzi wamamuna dzinache Onamu." 
1Chronicles2:27  
1Chronicles2:28 Onamu adabala ana awiri achimuna. Shamai na Yada, Shamai adabala ana awiri achimuna, Nadabu na Abishuri." 
1Chronicles2:29 Abishuri adasemba mkazi dzinache Abihaili mbabala ana awiri achimuna, Ahibani na Molidi." 
1Chronicles2:30 Nadabu, mbaleache Abishuri, adabala ana awiri achimuna, Seledi na Apaimu, mbwenye Seledi adafa kwene wakusowa ana." 
1Chronicles2:31 Apaimu adabala Ishi, Ishi adabala Sheshani, Sheshani adabala Ahilai." 
1Chronicles2:32 Yada mbaleache Shamai adabala ana awiri achimuna, Yetere na Yonatani, mbwenye Yetere adafa wakusowa mwana." 
1Chronicles2:33 Yonatani adabala ana awiri achimuna, Peleti na Zaza. Onsene uwiriawo akhali pidzukulu pya Yerameele." 
1Chronicles2:34 Sheshani adabala kwene ana achikazi okhokha. Iye akhali na nyabasa wachimuna wa ku Iguputo dzinache Yara. 
1Chronicles2:35 Iye adapereka mwanache wamkazi kuna nyabasayo kuti asembane. Iwo adabala mwana wamamuna dzinache Atai. 
1Chronicles2:36 Nyandandanda wa mabanja kutomera Atai kufikirana Elishama mbawa: Atai, Natani, Zabadu," 
1Chronicles2:37 Efelali, Obedi," 
1Chronicles2:38 Yehu, Azaria," 
1Chronicles2:39 Helezi, Eleasa," 
1Chronicles2:40 Sisimai, Shalumu," 
1Chronicles2:41 Yekamia na Elishama. 
1Chronicles2:42 Mwana wautombo wa Kalebu akhali Mesha mbaleache Yerameele. Mesha adabala Zifi. Tenepo mwana wachiwiri wa Kalebu akhali Maresha, iye adamanga Hebroni." 
1Chronicles2:43 Hebroni adabala ana anayi achimuna: Kora, Tapua, Rekemu na Shema." 
1Chronicles2:44 Shema adabala Rehamu; Rehamu adabala Yorikeamu. Rekemu mbaleache Shema adabala Shamai. 
1Chronicles2:45 Shamai adabala Maoni. Maoni adabala Beti-Zuri. 
1Chronicles2:46 Kalebu akhali na mkazi wachibitchu dzinache Efa mbabala naye ana atatu achimuna: Harani, Moza, Gazezi. Harani adabalambo mwana mbodzi wamamuna dzinache Gazezi." 
1Chronicles2:47 Munthu unango dzinache Yadai adabala ana atanthatu achimuna: Regemu, Yotamu, Geshani, Peleti, Efa na Shaafu." 
1Chronicles2:48 Kalebu akhali na mkazi unango wachibitchu dzinache Maaka mbabala naye ana awiri achimuna: Sheberi na Tirihana. 
1Chronicles2:49 Kubuluka penepo adabala pontho ana anango awiri: Shaafu ule adamanga luwani ya Madimana, na Sheva ule adamanga luwani ya Makibena na Gibea. Kuthimiza penepo Kalebu adabala mwana wamkazi dzinache Akisa." 
1Chronicles2:50 Anthu ali m'tchindemu mphidzukulumbo pya Kalebu: Huri akhali mwana wautombo wa Kalebu na mkazache Efurata. Shobali mwana Huri adabala Kiriati-Yearimu," 
1Chronicles2:51 Mwanache wachiwiri Salima adamanga luwani ya Betelehemu, pontho mwanache wachitatu Harefi adamanga luwani ya Beti-Gaderi." 
1Chronicles2:52 Shobali babache Kiriati-Yearimu akhali kholo ya anthu a Haroe, khundu inango ya anthu a ku Menuhoti" 
1Chronicles2:53 na mbumba zawo zili m'tchindemu, zile zikhakhala mu Kiriati-Yearimu: Aitiri, Aputi, Ashumati, na Amishirai. Anthu a m'mizinda ya Zora na Eshitaoli akhalimbo a m'mbumba zenezi." 
1Chronicles2:54 Pidzukulu pya Salima pikhali Betelehemu, Anetofa, Atiroti-Beti-Yoabu pontho na Azori, ile ikhali ibodzi ya madzinza awiri a Manahati." 
1Chronicles2:55 Mbumba ili m'tchindemu njile ina luso pa kulemba, ile imbakhala muluwani ya Yabezi: Atirati, Ashimeati na Asukati. Iwo akhali Akeni, ale akhadasembana na Arekabi." 
1Chronicles3:1 Madzina ali m'tchindemu mbana achimuna a Davite kutomera wautombo kufikirana chimalisira bere, ale adabalwa pandzidzi ukhali Davite mu Hebroni: Aminoni ule mache akhali Ahinoamu waku Yezereele. Daniele ule mache akhali Abigaile wa ku Karimele. Abisalomu ule mache akhali Maaka mwana wamkazi wa Mfumu Talimai wa ku Geshuri. Adonia ule mache akhali Hagiti. Shefatia, ule mache akhali Abitali. Itireamu, ule mache akhali Egila." 
1Chronicles3:1 Madzina ali m'tchindemu mbana achimuna a Davite kutomera wautombo kufikirana chimalisira bere, ale adabalwa pandzidzi ukhali Davite mu Hebroni: Aminoni ule mache akhali Ahinoamu waku Yezereele. Daniele ule mache akhali Abigaile wa ku Karimele. Abisalomu ule mache akhali Maaka mwana wamkazi wa Mfumu Talimai wa ku Geshuri. Adonia ule mache akhali Hagiti. Shefatia, ule mache akhali Abitali. Itireamu, ule mache akhali Egila." 
1Chronicles3:2  
1Chronicles3:3  
1Chronicles3:4 Onsene atanthatu adabalwa mu Hebroni pandzidzi ukhatonga Davite kweneko pyaka pinomwe na theka. Iye akhali mfumu mu Yerusalemu mbatonga pyaka makumatatu na pitatu," 
1Chronicles3:5 tenepo ana azinji adaabalira kweneko. Batisheba mwana wamkazi wa Amiele adambalira ana anayi achimuna: Shimea, Shobabu, Natani na Solomoni." 
1Chronicles3:6 Iye akhali pontho na ana anango afemba achimuna: Ibihari, Elishua, Elifeleti," 
1Chronicles3:7 Noga, Nefegi, Yafia," 
1Chronicles3:8 Elishama, Eliada na Elifeleti." 
1Chronicles3:9 Kuthimizira pa ana enewa, Davite akhali pontho na ana achimuna adambalira akazache achibitchu. Iye akhali pontho na mwana wamkazi dzinache Tamara." 
1Chronicles3:10 Ipi mphidzukulu pya Mfumu Solomoni kutomera baba munthu kufikirana mwana munthu: Solomoni, Rehoboamu, Abia, Asa, Yehosafati," 
1Chronicles3:11 Yehoramu, Ahazia, Yoasi," 
1Chronicles3:12 Amazia, Uzia, Yotamu," 
1Chronicles3:13 Ahazi, Hezekia, Manase," 
1Chronicles3:14 Amoni, na Yosia." 
1Chronicles3:15 Yosia adabala ana anayi achimuna: Yohanani, Yehoiakimu, Zedekia na Shalumu." 
1Chronicles3:16 Yehoiakimu adabala ana awiri achimuna: Yehoiakini, na Zedekia." 
1Chronicles3:17 Ipi mphidzukulu pya Yehoiakini, ule adakwatwa unyaperezo kwenda ku Babiloni. Yehoiakini, adabala ana anomwe achimuna: Shealatiele," 
1Chronicles3:18 Malikiramu, Pedaia, Shenazara, Yekamia, Hoshama na Nedabia." 
1Chronicles3:19 Pedaia adabala ana awiri achimuna: Zerubabele na Shimei. Zerubabele adabala ana awiri achimuna: Meshulamu na Hanania, pontho na mwana wamkazi mbodzi dzinache Shelomiti." 
1Chronicles3:20 Iye akhali pontho na ana anango ashanu achimuna: Hashuba, Ohele, Berekia, Hasadia na Yushabu-Hesedi." 
1Chronicles3:21 Hanania adabala ana awiri achimuna: Pelatia na Yeshaia. Yeshaia adabala Refaia. Refaia adabala Arinani, Arinani adabala Obadia, Obadia adabala Shekania." 
1Chronicles3:22 Shekania adabala mwana mbodzi wamamuna dzinache Shemaia na pidzukulu pishanu: Hatushi, Igali, Baria, Nearia na Shafati." 
1Chronicles3:23 Nearia adabala ana atatu achimuna: Elioenai, Hizikia na Azirikamu." 
1Chronicles3:24 Elioenai adabala ana anomwe achimuna: Hodavia, Eliashibu, Pelaia, Akubu, Yohanani, Delaia na Anani." 
1Chronicles4:1 Pili m'tchindemu mphidzukulu pya Yuda: Perezi, Hezironi, Karimi, Huri na Shobali." 
1Chronicles4:2 Shobali adabala Reaia, Reaia adabala Yahati, Yahati adabala Ahumai na Lahadi makolo a anthu akhakhala mu Zora." 
1Chronicles4:3 Huri akhali mwana wautombo wa Kalebu na mkazache Efurata, tenepo pidzukulu pyache pidamanga Betelehemu. Huri adabala ana atatu achimuna: Etamu, Penuele na Ezeri. Etamu adabala ana atatu achimuna: Yezereele, Ishima na Idibashi, pontho na mwana wamkazi mbodzi dzinache Hazeleliponi. Penuele ndiye adamanga mzinda wa Gedori, Ezeri adamanga mzinda wa Husha." 
1Chronicles4:4  
1Chronicles4:5 Ashuri, ule adamanga luwani wa Tekoa, akhali na akazi awiri: Hela na Naara." 
1Chronicles4:6 Iye na Naara adabala ana anayi achimuna: Ahuzamu, Hefere, Temeni na Haahashitari." 
1Chronicles4:7 Ashuri na Hela adabala ana atatu achimuna: Zereti, Izihara na Etinani." 
1Chronicles4:8 Kozi adabala Anubu na Zobeba, pontho akhali kholo ya pidzukulu pya Aharihele mwana Harumu." 
1Chronicles4:9 Pakhali munthu unango dzinache Yabezi ule akhali wakulemedzwa pyakwanga pabanjache. Mache adampasa dzina yakuti Yabezi, thangwi kubalwa kwache kukhali kwa kupha pyakwanga."
