1Chronicles4:10 Mbwenye Yabezi adapemphera kuna Mulungu wa Israele mbati, “Mulungu nditsanzayiseni pakundipasa mbuto ikulu ene. Khalani nane mbamundikhazike kutali na pyakuipa pile pinakwanisa kundionesa nyatwa.” Tenepo Mulungu adampasa pidapempha iye pile." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kelubi mbaleache Shuha adabala Mehiri. Mehiri adabala Eshitoni. 
1Chronicles4:12 Eshitoni adabala ana atatu achimuna: Beti-Rafa, Pasea, na Tehina. Tehina adabala Irinahashi. Pidzukulu pya anthu enewa pikhakhala mu Reka." 
1Chronicles4:13 Kenazi adabala ana awiri achimuna Oteniele na Seraia. Oteniele adabalambo ana awiri achimuna Hatati na Meonotai. 
1Chronicles4:14 Meonotai adabala Ofara. Seraia adabala Yoabu, ule adamanga Phedi ya Amisiri, kule anthu onsene akhali anyaluso pamabasa akusiyana-siyana." 
1Chronicles4:15 Kalebu mwana Yefune adabala ana atatu achimuna: Iru, Ela na Naamu. Tenepo Ela adabala Kenazi." 
1Chronicles4:16 Yehalelele adabala ana anayi achimuna: Zifi, Zifa, Tiria na Asarele." 
1Chronicles4:17 Ezara adabala ana anayi achimuna: Yetere, Meredi, Eferi, na Yaloni. Meredi adasemba Bitia mwana wamkazi wa mfumu wa ku Iguputo mbabala naye mwana wamkazi dzinache Miriamu, pontho ana awiri achimuna Shamai na Ishiba. Ishiba ndiye adamanga luwani ya Eshitemoa. Meredi adasembambo mkazi wakubulukira kudzinza ya Yuda mbabala ana atatu achimuna: Yeredi, ule adamanga luwani ya Gedori; Heberi ule adamanga luwani ya Soko na Yekutiele ule adamanga luwani ya Zanoa." 
1Chronicles4:18  
1Chronicles4:19 Hodia adasemba nyamaingache Nahamu. Pidzukulu pyawo ndi nkhonda Garimu, ale akhakhala muluwani ya Keila, pontho nkhonda Maaka ale akhakhala muluwani ya Eshitemoa." 
1Chronicles4:20 Shimoni adabala ana anayi achimuna: Aminoni, Rina, Beni-Hanani, na Tiloni. Ishi adabala ana awiri achimuna: Zoheti na Beni-Zoheti." 
1Chronicles4:21 Shela akhali mbodzi wa ana a Yuda. Pidzukulu pyache pikhali Eri ule adamanga luwani ya Leka; Laada ule adamanga luwani ya Maresha; mbumba zakudziwa pyakuluka-luka, zile zikhakhala muluwani ya Beti-Ashibea," 
1Chronicles4:22 Yokimu na anthu akhakhala muluwani ya Kozeba; na Yoasi na Sarafi, ule adasemba mkazi wa Chimoabu mbakhazikika m'Betelehemu. (Mbiri yeneyi njakale pyakwanga.)" 
1Chronicles4:23 Iwo akhali anyakuumba pyombo, ale akhakhala muluwani ya Netaniamu na Gedera mbaphatira basa mfumu." 
1Chronicles4:24 Simioni adabala ana ashanu achimuna: Nemuele, Yamini, Yaribu, Zera, na Shauli." 
1Chronicles4:25 Shauli adabala Shalumu. Shalumu adabala Mibisamu, Mibisamu adabala Mishima," 
1Chronicles4:26 Mishima adabala ana atatu achimuna: Hamuele, Zakuri, na Shimei." 
1Chronicles4:27 Shimei adabala ana khumi na atanthatu achimuna na atanthatu achikazi, mbwenye abale ache adabala ana akuchepa, pontho dzinza ya Simioni hidakule ninga mudakulira dzinza ya Yuda tayu." 
1Chronicles4:28 Kufikirana ndzidzi wa Mfumu Davite pidzukulu pya Simioni pidakhala m'maluwani awa: Beeresheba, Molada, Hazari-Shuali," 
1Chronicles4:29 Biliha, Ezemu, Toladi," 
1Chronicles4:30 Betuele, Horima, Zikilagi," 
1Chronicles4:31 Beti-Marikaboti, Hazari-Susimu, Beti-Biri na Shaaraimu." 
1Chronicles4:32 Iwo adakhala pontho m'mbuto zinango zishanu Etamu, Aini, Rimoni, Tokeni na Ashani," 
1Chronicles4:33 pontho na midzi yakuzungulira mpakana kufika kumwera kumadokero dzuwa na kuluwani ya Baalati. Yeneyi ndi mbiri idakoya iwo ya mabanjawo na mbuto zikhakhala iwo. 
1Chronicles4:34 Madzina ali m'tchindemu mbamuna ale akhali akadamu m'mabanja mwawo: Meshobabu, Yamileki, Yosha mwana Amazia, Yowele, Yehu (mwana Yoshibia, mwana Seraia, mwana Asiele) Elioenai, Yaakoba, Yeshohaia, Asaia, Adiele, Yesimiele, Benaia, Ziza (mwana Shifi mwana Aloni, chidzukulu cha Yedaia, Shimri na Shemaia) Na thangwi yakuti mabanjawo adathimiza kukula," 
1Chronicles4:35  
1Chronicles4:36  
1Chronicles4:37  
1Chronicles4:38  
1Chronicles4:39 iwo adafalikira kumadokero dzuwa chifupi na Gerari mbadyesa mabirawo kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa ya phedi mule mudakhazikiswa mzindawo. 
1Chronicles4:40 Iwo adagumana mpovu uzinji pontho wadidi, pontho ikhali mbuto yakutambalala, yamtendere na yakumatama. Ahamu ndiye akhakhala kweneko pakutoma." 
1Chronicles4:41 Pandzidzi wa Hezekia mfumu wa Yuda, amuna alongwa padzuluwa adenda ku Gerari mbavunga makumbi a Ahamu na Ameuni akhakhala mwenemo ale. Iwo adapha anthu onsene akhakhala mwenemo ale mbakhazikika mwenemo, thangwi mukhali mpovu uzinji wakudyesera mabirawo." 
1Chronicles4:42 Anthu anango madzana mashanu a m'dzinza ya Simioni adenda kudziko yakumabulukiro dzuwa ya Edomu. Iwo adendeswa na ana achimuna a Ishi: Pelatia, Nearia, Refaia na Uziele." 
1Chronicles4:43 Kweneko iwo adapha Aamaleki adasalira ale, mbakhala kweneko na lero." 
1Chronicles5:1 Ipi mphidzukulu pya Rubeni, mwana wautombo wa Yakobo. (Na thangwi yakuti iye adagona na mkazi unango wachibitchu wa babache, iye adataya chidzo chautombo, chile chidenda kuna Yosefe." 
1Chronicles5:2 Kwache ikhali dzinza ya Yuda ile idasanduka yamphamvu pyakwanga mbikhala yakutonga madzinza anango.) 
1Chronicles5:3 Rubeni, mwana wautombo wa Yakobo, adabala ana anayi achimuna: Hanoki, Palu, Hezironi na Karimi." 
1Chronicles5:4 Yowele adabala Shemaia, Gogi, Shimei, Mika, Reaia, Baala, Beera. Mfumu wa Asiria, Tigilati-Pilesere, adakunda Beera, ule akhali mkadamu wa dzinza yeneyi, mbamkwata unyaperezo." 
1Chronicles5:5  
1Chronicles5:6  
1Chronicles5:7 Mbiri ya banja idalembwa pya nyandandanda wa akadamu a mbumba zili m'tchindemo a m'dzinza ya Rubeni: Yeiele, Zekaria," 
1Chronicles5:8 na Bela, mwana Azazi, mdzukuluache Shema, wa nkhonda Yowele. Mbumba yeneyi ikhakhala mu Aroeri na m'nthemba yakubulukira kweneko, kumpoto mpakana ku Nebo na Baala-Meoni." 
1Chronicles5:9 Iwo akhali na pifuyo pizinji, m'nthemba ya Gileadi, natenepo adafalikira mpakana kuthando yatchetcha kumabulukiro dzuwa ile yafumukira kumkulo wa Yufurate." 
1Chronicles5:10 Pandzidzi wa Mfumu Sauli dzinza ya Rubeni idenda mbikasosa Ahagiri mbaapha pankhondo, tenepo adakwata dziko yawoyo kukhundu yonsene yakumabulukiro dzuwa a Gileadi." 
1Chronicles5:11 Dzinza ya Gadi ikhakhala kumpoto kwa dzinza ya Rubeni m'nthemba ya Bashani mbafikiratu mpakana chakumabulukiro dzuwa ku Saleka. 
1Chronicles5:12 Yowele ndiye akhali mkadamu wamkulu mu Bashani; Shafamu ndiye akhali wachiwiriache, kubuluka penepo Yanai na Shafati." 
1Chronicles5:13 Abale awo, ale akhali akadamu a mbumba zawo, mbawa: Mikaele, Meshulamu, Sheba, Yorai, Yakani, Zia na Eberi, onsene pabodzi akhalipo anomwe." 
1Chronicles5:14 Iwo akhali pidzukulu pya Abihaili mwana Huri, mwana Yaroa, mwana Gileadi, mwana Mikaele, mwana Yeshishai, mwana Yahido, mwana Buzi." 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahi, mwana Abidiele, mdzukuluache Guni, ndiye akhali mkadamu wa mbumba zenezi." 
1Chronicles5:16 Iwo adakhala m'nthemba ya Bashani na Gileadi m'maluwani a kweneko na mbuto zonsene zakudyesera pifuyo za Sharoni. 
1Chronicles5:17 Mbiri yeneyi idalembwa nsiku za Yotamu mfumu wa Yuda na Yeroboamu wachiwiri mfumu wa Israele. 
1Chronicles5:18 M'madzinza a Rubeni, Gadi na Manase wakumabulukiro dzuwa pakhali anyankhondo pikwi makumanayi na anayi pontho na madzana manomwe na makumatanthatu. Iwo akhadafunziswa mwadidi maphatisiro basa a pyakugedera matswimo, matalasada na mauta." 
1Chronicles5:19 Iwo adenda kamenya nkhondo na madzinza a Hagiri, Yeturi, Nafishi na Nodabu." 
1Chronicles5:20 Iwo adanyindira Mulungu mbapempha chiphedzo kuna iye, natenepo Mulungu adava kupemphera kwawo mbaapasa mphamvu zakukunda nazo Ahagiri pabodzi na magulu onsene akhali na iwo gulu ibodzi." 
1Chronicles5:21 Iwo adapokosera anyamalwa ngamila pikwi makumashanu, mabira pikwi madzana mawiri na makumashanu, mabulu pikwi mbakwata pontho anthu unyaperezo pikwi dzana." 
1Chronicles5:22 Iwo adapha anyamalwa azinji, thangwi nkhondoyo kukhali kufuna kwa Mulungu. Tenepo iwo adathimiza kukhala m'nthemba yeneyo kufikirana nsiku idakwatwa iwo kwenda kudziko ya unyaperezo." 
1Chronicles5:23 Dzinza ya Manase yakumabulukiro dzuwa idakhazikika m'nthemba yakumpoto kwa Bashani mbifikiratu ku Baala-Herimoni, Seniri na Phiri ya Herimoni, tenepo iwo adabalana pyakwanga." 
1Chronicles5:24 Ali m'tchindemu akhali akadamu a mbumba zawo: Eferi, Ishi, Eliele, Aziriele, Yeremia, Hodavia na Yahidiele. Onsenewa akhali anyankhondo amphamvu, akuveka pontho akadamu a mabanjawo." 
1Chronicles5:25 Mbwenye anthu akhali okhonda khulupirika kuna Mulungu wa makolo awo mbamsiya kwenda kapembedza milungu ya madzinza akhadathamangisa Mulungu m'dziko mukhakhala iwo mule. 
1Chronicles5:26 Natenepo Mulungu adachitisa Puli mfumu wa Asiria wakudziwika pontho na dzina yakuti Tigilati-Pilesere kukwata dzikoyo. Iye adathamangisa madzinza a Rubeni, Gadi na Manase wakumabulukiro dzuwa mbaaendesa kudziko ya unyaperezo ya Hala, Habori na Hara pontho na chifupi na mkulo wa Gozani." 
1Chronicles6:1 Levi adabala ana atatu achimuna: Gereshomu, Kohati na Merari." 
1Chronicles6:2 Kohati adabala ana anayi achimuna: Amuramu, Izihara, Hebroni na Uziele." 
1Chronicles6:3 Amuramu adabala ana awiri achimuna: Aroni na Mose pontho na mwana mkazawo mbodzi dzinache Miriamu. Aroni adabala ana anayi achimuna: Nadabu, Abihu, Eleazara na Itamara." 
1Chronicles6:4 Eleazara adabala Finiasi, Finiasi adabala Abishua," 
1Chronicles6:5 Abishua adabala Buki, Buki adabala Uzi," 
1Chronicles6:6 Uzi adabala Zerahia, Zerahia adabala Meraioti," 
1Chronicles6:7 Meraioti adabala Amaria, Amaria adabala Ahitubu," 
1Chronicles6:8 Ahitubu adabala Zadoki, Zadoki adabala Ahimaazi," 
1Chronicles6:9 Ahimaazi adabala Azaria, Azaria adabala Yohanani," 
1Chronicles6:10 Yohanani adabala Azaria, (ule akhaphata basa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu idamanga Mfumu Solomoni ile)," 
1Chronicles6:11 Azaria adabala Amaria, Amaria adabala Ahitubu," 
1Chronicles6:12 Ahitubu adabala Zadoki, Zadoki adabala Shalumu," 
1Chronicles6:13 Shalumu adabala Hilikia, Hilikia adabala Azaria," 
1Chronicles6:14 Azaria adabala Seraia, pontho Seraia adabala Yehozadaki." 
1Chronicles6:15 Mfumu Nebukadinezara adathamangisa Yehozadaki pabodzi pene na anthu a ku Yuda pontho na Yerusalemu, ale akhadendeswa na MBUYA kudziko ya unyaperezo." 
1Chronicles6:16 Levi adabala ana atatu achimuna: Gereshomu, Kohati na Merari." 
1Chronicles6:17 Onsene utatuawo adabalambo anawo achimuna. Gereshomu adabala Libini na Shimei. 
1Chronicles6:18 Kohati adabala Amuramu, Izihara, Hebroni na Uziele;" 
1Chronicles6:19 Merari adabala Mahili na Mushi. Ali m'tchindemu ndi mbumba ya Levi malingana na makolo awo: 
1Chronicles6:20 Nkhonda Gereshomu: Gereshomu adabala Libini, Libini adabala Yahati, Yahati adabala Zima," 
1Chronicles6:21 Zima adabala Yoa, Yoa adabala Ido, Ido adabala Zera, pontho Zera adabala Yeaterai." 
1Chronicles6:22 Nkhonda Kohati: Kohati adabala Aminadabu, Aminadabu adabala Kora, Kora adabala Asiri," 
1Chronicles6:23 Asiri adabala Elikana, Elikana adabala Ebiasafu, Ebiasafu adabala Asiri," 
1Chronicles6:24 Asiri adabala Tahati, Tahati adabala Uriele, Uriele adabala Uzia, pontho Uzia adabala Shauli." 
1Chronicles6:25 Elikana akhali na ana awiri achimuna, Amasai na Ahimoti. Ahimoti adabala Elikana." 
1Chronicles6:26 Nkhonda Elikana: Elikana adabala Zofai, Zofai adabala Nahati," 
1Chronicles6:27 Nahati adabala Eliabu, Eliabu adabala Yerohamu, pontho Yerohamu adabala Elikana." 
1Chronicles6:28 Samuele adabala ana awiri achimuna: Yowele wautombo na Abia nyamsolo wache. 
1Chronicles6:29 Nkhonda Merari: Merari adabala Mahili, Mahili adabala Libini, Libini adabala Shimei, Shimei adabala Uza," 
1Chronicles6:30 Uza adabala Shimei, Shimea adabala Hagia, pontho Hagia adabala Asaia." 
1Chronicles6:31 Amuna enewa ngale Mfumu Davite adaaikha kuti akhale anyakuyang'anira pyakuimba-imba pambuto yakupambulika mu Yerusalemu pidadzeswa Bokosi ya Chiverano mwenemo. 
1Chronicles6:32 Iwo akhachita buswa-buswa m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, mwenemo Mfumu Solomoni mbadzati manga Nyumba ya MBUYA." 
1Chronicles6:33 Nyandandanda wa mabanja, ale akhali anyakuyang'anira basa yeneyi mbawa: Nkhonda Kohati: Hemani mwana Yowele, ule akhali mkadamu wa gulu yakutoma ya anyakuimba. Nyandandanda wa banjache udafikiratu mpakana kuna Yakobo ninga tenepa: Hemani, Yowele, Samuele," 
1Chronicles6:34 Elikana, Yerohamu, Eliele, Toa," 
1Chronicles6:35 Zufu, Elikana, Mahati, Amasai," 
1Chronicles6:36 Elikana, Yowele, Azaria, Zefania," 
1Chronicles6:37 Tahati, Asiri, Ebiasafu, Kora," 
1Chronicles6:38 Izihara, Kohati, Levi na Yakobo." 
1Chronicles6:39 Asafu akhali mkadamu wa gulu yachiwiri ya anyakuimba. Nyandandanda wa banjache udafikiratu mpakana kuna Levi ninga tenepa: Asafu, Berekia, Shimea," 
1Chronicles6:40 Mikaele, Baaseia, Malikia," 
1Chronicles6:41 Etini, Zera, Adaia," 
1Chronicles6:42 Etani, Zima, Shimei," 
1Chronicles6:43 Yahati, Gereshomu na Levi." 
1Chronicles6:44 Etani wa nkhonda Merari akhali mkadamu wa gulu yachitatu ya anyakuimba. Nyandandanda wa banjache udafikiratu mpakana kuna Levi ninga tenepa: Etani, Kishi, Abidi, Maluki," 
1Chronicles6:45 Hashabia, Amazia, Hilikia," 
1Chronicles6:46 Amizi, Bani, Shemeri," 
1Chronicles6:47 Mahili, Mushi, Merari na Levi." 
1Chronicles6:48 Alevi anzawo anango adapaswa mabasa anango onsene a pambuto yakupembedzerapo. 
1Chronicles6:49 Aroni na pidzukulu pyache adapereka pyakupereka pyakununkhira mbapereka nsembe zile zikhadapiswa paguwa yansembe. Iwo basawo ikhali yakuyang'anira chipembedzo chonsene chikhachitika pa Mbuto Yakuchenesesa na nsembe zile kudzera muna izo, Mulungu akhalekerera pyakudawa pya anthu a Israele. Iwo adachita pinthu pyonsene malingana na mudapangirwa iwo na Mose nyabasa wa Mulungu." 
1Chronicles6:50 Pili m'tchindemu mphidzukulu pya Aroni: Aroni adabala Eleazara, Eleazara adabala Finiasi, Finiasi adabala Abishua," 
1Chronicles6:51 Abishua adabala Buki, Buki adabala Uzi, Uzi adabala Zeraia," 
1Chronicles6:52 Zerahia adabala Meraioti, Meraioti adabala Amaria, Amaria adabala Ahitubu," 
1Chronicles6:53 Ahitubu adabala Zadoki, pontho Zadoki adabala Ahimaazi." 
1Chronicles6:54 Mbuto idapaswa pidzukulu pya Aroni nkhonda Kohati njishi: Iwo adatambira khundu yakutoma ya dziko idapaswa Alevi ile. 
1Chronicles6:55 Penepa nkhuthimizapo Hebroni m'nthemba ya Yuda na mbuto zache zampovu zakuzungulira. 
1Chronicles6:56 Mbwenye minda na midzi yakuzungulira mzinda ule, idaperekwa kuna Kalebu mwana Yefune." 
1Chronicles6:57 Maluwani ali m'tchindemu adaperekwa kuna pidzukulu pya Aroni: Hebroni mzinda wakuthawirako, Libina, Yatiri, Eshitemoa, Hileni, Debiri, Ashani, na Beti-Shemeshi, pabodzi pene na mbuto zawo zampovu." 
1Chronicles6:58  
1Chronicles6:59  
1Chronicles6:60 M'nthemba ya Benjemani iwo adapaswa maluwani ali m'tchindemu pabodzi pene na mbuto zawo zampovu: Geba, Alemeti, na Anatoti. Maluwani onsene akhakhala mabanjawo adakwana khumi na atatu." 
1Chronicles6:61 Maluwani khumi a dzinza ya Manase yakumadokero dzuwa adaperekwa kuna mabanja anango a nkhonda Kohati adasalira ale pakuchita ntsango. 
1Chronicles6:62 Kuna nkhonda Gereshomu, mabanja onsene adapaswa maluwani khumi na atatu m'nthemba ya Isakara, Asheri, Nafitali na dzinza ya Manase wakumabulukiro dzuwa m'nthemba ya Bashani." 
1Chronicles6:63 Montho-monthomo maluwani khumi na awiri m'nthemba za Rubeni, Gadi na Zebuloni zidaperekwa kuna mabanja onsene a nkhonda Merari." 
1Chronicles6:64 Na njira yeneyi anthu a ku Israele adapereka maluwani kuna Alevi kuti akhalemo pabodzi pene na mbuto zampovu zakuzungulira maluwaniwo. 
1Chronicles6:65 Maluwani a m'nthemba za Yuda, Simioni na Benjemani alongwa padzuluwa adaperekwa pakuchita pontho ntsango." 
1Chronicles6:66 Anango mwa mabanja a nkhonda Kohati adapaswa maluwani na mbuto zawo zampovu m'nthemba ya Eferemu: 
1Chronicles6:67 Shekemu mzinda wakuthawirako ule ukhali m'mapiri a Eferemu, Gezeri," 
1Chronicles6:68 Yokomeamu, Beti-Horoni," 
1Chronicles6:69 Aialoni na Gati-Rimoni. 
1Chronicles6:70 M'nthemba ya dzinza yakumadokero dzuwa ya Manase adapaswa maluwani a Aneri na Bileamu pabodzi pene na mbuto zawo zampovu. 
1Chronicles6:71 Mabanja a nkhonda Gereshomu adapaswa maluwani ali m'tchindemu pabodzi pene na mbuto zawo zampovu: M'nthemba ya dzinza ya Manase yakumabulukiro dzuwa, Golani m'nthemba ya Bashani na Ashitaroti." 
1Chronicles6:72 M'nthemba ya Isakara: Kedeshi, Daberati," 
1Chronicles6:73 Ramoti na Anemu. 
1Chronicles6:74 M'nthemba ya Asheri: Mashali, Abidoni," 
1Chronicles6:75 Hukoki na Rehobu. 
1Chronicles6:76 M'nthemba ya Nafitali: Kedeshi m'Galilea, Hamoni na Kiriataimu." 
1Chronicles6:77 Kuna mabanja anango onsene akusalira a nkhonda Merari adapaswa maluwani ali m'tchindewa pabodzi pene na mbuto zawo zampovu. M'nthemba ya Zebuloni: Rimono na Tabori. 
1Chronicles6:78 M'nthemba ya Rubeni, kumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani kuyang'anisana na Yeriko: Bezeri kuphedi, Yaza," 
1Chronicles6:79 Kedemoti na Mefaati. 
1Chronicles6:80 M'nthemba ya Gadi: Ramoti m'Gileadi, Mahanaimu," 
1Chronicles6:81 Heshiboni na Yazere. 
1Chronicles7:1 Isakara adabala ana anayi achimuna: Tola, Pua, Yashubu na Shimironi." 
1Chronicles7:2 Tola adabala ana atanthatu achimuna: Uzi, Refaia, Yeriele, Yahimai, Ibisamu na Shemuele. Iwo akhali akadamu a mabanja a nkhonda Tola, pontho akhali anyankhondo akuveka pyakwanga. Pandzidzi ukhatonga Mfumu Davite pidzukulu pyawo pidakwana pikwi makumawiri na piwiri pontho na madzana matanthatu." 
1Chronicles7:3 Uzi adabala mwana mbodzi wamamuna dzinache Izirahia. Izirahia adabala ana anayi achimuna: Mikaele, Obadia, Yowele, na Ishia. Onsenewa akhali akadamu a mabanja." 
1Chronicles7:4 Iwo akhali na akazi azinji pontho na ana azinji mwakuti pidzukulu pyawo pidakwanisa kukhala na amuna akuphata basa ya unyankhondo pikwi makumatatu na pitanthatu. 
1Chronicles7:5 Anthu onsene a nkhonda Isakara, ale basawo ikhali kumenya nkhondo, adalembwa malingana na mifendu yawo mbakwana amuna pikwi makumasere na pinomwe." 
1Chronicles7:6 Benjemani adabala ana atatu achimuna: Bela, Bekeri na Yediaele." 
1Chronicles7:7 Bela adabala ana ashanu achimuna: Eziboni, Uzi, Uziele, Yerimoti na Iri. Iwo akhali akadamu a mabanja, pontho anyankhondo akuveka pyakwanga. Pidzukulu pyawo ale akhali akuthema kumenya nkhondo, akhalipo pikwi makumawiri na piwiri pontho na makumatatu na anayi." 
1Chronicles7:8 Bekeri adabala ana afemba achimuna: Zemira, Yoasi, Eliezere, Elioenai, Omri, Yeremoti, Abia, Anatoti na Alemeti." 
1Chronicles7:9 Anthu onsenewa adalemberwa malingana na mabanjawo mbakwana amuna pikwi makumawiri na madzana mawiri akuthema kumenya nkhondo. 
1Chronicles7:10 Yediaele adabala mwana mbodzi wamamuna dzinache Bilihani. Bilihani adabala ana anomwe achimuna: Yeushi, Benjemani, Ehudi, Kenaana, Zetani, Tarisisi na Ahishahari." 
1Chronicles7:11 Iwo akhali akadamu a mabanja, pontho akhali anyankhondo akuveka pyakwanga. Pidzukulu pyawo amuna pikwi khumi na pinomwe pontho na madzana mawiri akhali amuna akuthema kumenya nkhondo." 
1Chronicles7:12 Shupimu na Hupimu akhali a m'dzinza yontho-yonthoyi. Dani adabala mwana mbodzi wamamuna dzinache Hushimu. 
1Chronicles7:13 Nafitali adabala ana anayi achimuna: Yahiziele, Guni, Yezeri na Shalumu. Iwo akhali pidzukulu pya Biliha." 
1Chronicles7:14 Manase na mkazache wachibitchu wa ku Aramu adabalirana naye ana awiri achimuna Asriele na Makiri. Makiri adabala Gileadi. 
1Chronicles7:15 Makiri adagumana akazi awiri, mbodzi kuti asembwe na Hupimu, unangomboyo kuti asembwe na Shupimu. Nyamaingache akhali Maaka. Mwana wachiwiri wa Makiri akhali Zelofehadi, tenepo iye akhali na ana achikazi ene basi." 
1Chronicles7:16 Maaka mkazache Makiri adabala ana awiri achimuna: Pereshi na Shereshi. Pereshi adabala ana awiri achimuna: Ulamu na Rakemu. 
1Chronicles7:17 Ulamu adabala mwana mbodzi wamamuna dzinache Bedani. Pyonsenepi pikhali pidzukulu pya Gileadi mwana Makiri mdzukuluache Manase. 
1Chronicles7:18 Nyamaingache Gileadi Hamoleketi adabala ana atatu achimuna: Ishodi, Abiezere na Mala." 
1Chronicles7:19 Shemida adabala ana anayi achimuna: Ahiana, Shekemu, Liki na Aniamu." 
1Chronicles7:20 Pili m'tchindemu mphidzukulu pya Eferemu: Eferemu adabala Shutela, Shutela adabala Beredi, Beredi adabala Tahati, Tahati adabala Eleada, Eleada adabala Tahati," 
1Chronicles7:21 Tahati adabala Zabadu, pontho Zabadu adabala Shutela. Eferemu akhali na ana anango awiri kupambula Shutela. Enewa akhali Ezeri na Eleada, ale adaphiwa pidayesera iwo kuba pifuyo pya mbalwa za m'dziko ya Gati." 
1Chronicles7:22 Babawo Eferemu adaasintili nsiku zizinji zene, tenepo abale ache adadza kumuombera." 
1Chronicles7:23 Kubuluka penepo iye adapita pontho m'bonde na mkazache mbabala mwana wa mamuna dzinache Beria, thangwi ya nyatwa idaona iwo m'banja mwawo." 
1Chronicles7:24 Eferemu adabala mwana wamkazi dzinache Sheera, ule adamanga maluwani a kumtunda na kuphedi kwa Beti-Horoni pabodzi pene na Uzeni Sheera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Eferemu adabala pontho mwana wamamuna mbamthula Refa, ule pidzukulu pyache mphipi: Refa adabala Reshefi, Reshefi adabala Tela, Tela adabala Tahani," 
1Chronicles7:26 Tahani adabala Ladani, Ladani adabala Amihudi, Amihudi adabala Elishama," 
1Chronicles7:27 Elishama adabala Nuni, pontho Nuni adabala Yoswa." 
1Chronicles7:28 Nthemba idakwata iwo mbakhazikikamo nkhuthimizapo Betele na maluwani akuzungulira mpakana na kumabulukiro dzuwa ku Naarani pontho na kafikiratu kumadokero dzuwa a Gezeri na maluwani akuzungulira. Ikuphataniza pontho na mizinda ya Shekemu na Aya na maluwani akuazungulira. 
1Chronicles7:29 Pidzukulu pya Manase pidatonga maluwani a Beti-Shani, Taanaki, Megido, na Dori pontho na maluwani akuazungulira. Mbuto zonsenezi nsile zikhakhala pidzukulu pya Yosefe mwana Yakobo." 
1Chronicles7:30 Pili m'tchindemu mphidzukulu pya Asheri. Iye adabala ana anayi achimuna: Imina, Ishiva, Ishivi na Beria, pontho na mwana mkazawo mbodzi dzinache Sera." 
1Chronicles7:31 Beria adabala ana awiri achimuna: Heberi na Malikiele. (Malikiele ndiye adamanga mzinda wa Birizaiti.) 
1Chronicles7:32 Heberi adabala ana atatu achimuna: Yafuleti, Shomeri, na Hotamu, pontho na nyamaingawo mbodzi basi, Shua." 
1Chronicles7:33 Yafuleti adabala ana atatu achimuna: Pasaki, Bimuhali na Ashivati." 
1Chronicles7:34 Mbaleache Shomeri adabala ana atatu achimuna: Rohoga, Yehuba na Aramu." 
1Chronicles7:35 Mbaleache Hotamu adabala ana anayi achimuna: Zofa, Imina, Sheleshi na Amali." 
1Chronicles7:36 Ana a Zofa mbawa: Sua, Harineferi, Shuali, Beri, Imura," 
1Chronicles7:37 Bezeri, Hodu, Shama, Shalisha, Itirani na Beera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Ana a Yetere mbawa: Yefune, Pisipa na Ara," 
1Chronicles7:39 pontho ana a Ula mbawa: Ara, Haniele na Rizia." 
1Chronicles7:40 Pyonsenepi pikhali pidzukulu pya Asheri. Iwo akhali akadamu a mabanja, pontho anyankhondo akuveka pyakwanga. Pidzukulu pyonsene pya Asheri pikhalipo pikwi makumawiri na pitanthatu amuna akuthema kumenya nkhondo." 
1Chronicles8:1 Benjemani adabala ana ashanu achimuna, tenepo kutomera wautombo kufikirana chimalisira bele mbawa: Bela, Ashibele, Ahara," 
1Chronicles8:2 Noha na Rafa. 
1Chronicles8:3 Ana a Bela mbawa: Adari, Gera, Abihudi," 
1Chronicles8:4 Abishua Naamani, Ahoa," 
1Chronicles8:5 Gera, Shefufani na Huramu." 
1Chronicles8:6 Ana a Ehudi mbawa: Naamani, Ahia, na Gera. Iwo akhali akadamu a mabanja akukhala ku Geba, mbwenye iwo adathamangiswa m'dziko mwawo mbakakhala mu Manahati. Gera babache Uza na Ahihudi ndiwo adaatsogolera kubuluka m'dzikomo." 
1Chronicles8:7  
1Chronicles8:8 Shaharaimu adamwalana na akazache awiri, Hushimu na Baara. Kubuluka penepo pidakhala iye m'dziko ya Moabu adasemba Hodeshi mbabala naye ana anomwe achimuna: Yobabu, Zibia, Mesha, Malikamu," 
1Chronicles8:9  
1Chronicles8:10 Yeuzi, Sakia, na Mirima. Anache onsene adasanduka akadamu a mabanja." 
1Chronicles8:11 Iye adabala pontho ana awiri achimuna na Hushimu: Abitubu na Elipaali. 
1Chronicles8:12 Elipaali adabala ana atatu achimuna: Eberi, Mishamu na Shemedi. Shemedi ndiye adamanga mizinda ya Ono na Lodi pontho na midzi yakuzungulira." 
1Chronicles8:13 Beria na Shema ndiye akhali akadamu a mabanja ale adakhazikika mumzinda wa Aialoni mbathamangisa anthu akhakhala mwenemo mumzinda wa Gati ale. 
1Chronicles8:14 Ana a Beria mbawa: Ahio, Shashaki, Yeremoti," 
1Chronicles8:15 Zebadia, Aradi, Ederi," 
1Chronicles8:16 Mikaele, Ishipa na Yoha." 
1Chronicles8:17 Pidzukulu pya Elipaali mphipi: Zebadia, Meshulamu, Hiziki, Heberi," 
1Chronicles8:18 Ishimerai, Izilia na Yobabu." 
1Chronicles8:19 Pidzukulu pya Shimei mphipi: Yakimu, Zikiri, Zabidi," 
1Chronicles8:20 Elienai, Ziletai, Eliele," 
1Chronicles8:21 Adaia, Beraia na Shimirati." 
1Chronicles8:22 Pidzukulu pya Shashaki mphipi: Ishipani, Eberi, Eliele," 
1Chronicles8:23 Abidoni, Zikiri, Hanani," 
1Chronicles8:24 Hanania, Elamu, Anitotia," 
1Chronicles8:25 Ifedeia na Penuele. 
1Chronicles8:26 Pidzukulu pya Yerohamu mphipi: Shamusherai, Sheharia, Atalia," 
1Chronicles8:27 Yaareshia, Elia na Zikiri." 
1Chronicles8:28 Wenewu ndiye ukhali nyandandanda wa akadamu a mabanja, mafumu akuveka akhakhala mu Yerusalemu ale." 
1Chronicles8:29 Yeiele ndiye adamanga mzinda wa Gibeoni mbakhazikika mwenemo. Mkazache akhali Maaka," 
1Chronicles8:30 tenepo mwanache wautombo akhali Abidoni. Anache anango akhali: Zuri, Kishi, Baala, Neri, Nadabu," 
1Chronicles8:31 Gedori, Ahio, Zekeri," 
1Chronicles8:32 na Mikiloti babache Shimea. Iwo akhakhala mu Yerusalemu chifupi na mabanja anango a nkhondawo. 
1Chronicles8:33 Neri adabala Kishi, Kishi adabala Mfumu Sauli. Sauli adabala ana anayi achimuna: Yonatani, Malikishua, Abinadabu na Eshibaala." 
1Chronicles8:34 Yonatani adabala Meribaala, pontho Meribaala adabala Mika." 
1Chronicles8:35 Mika adabala ana anayi achimuna: Pitoni, Meleki, Tarea na Ahazi." 
1Chronicles8:36 Ahazi adabala Yehoada, pontho Yehoada adabala ana atatu achimuna: Alemeti, Azimaveti na Zimri. Zimri adabala Moza," 
1Chronicles8:37 Moza adabala Binea, Binea adabala Rafa, Rafa adabala Eleasa, pontho Eleasa adabala Azele." 
1Chronicles8:38 Azele adabala ana atanthatu achimuna: Azirikamu, Bokeru, Ishimaele, Shearia, Obadia na Hanani." 
1Chronicles8:39 Esheki mbaleache Azele adabala ana atatu achimuna: Ulamu, Yeushi na Elifeleti." 
1Chronicles8:40 Ana a Ulamu akhali anyankhondo amphamvu pontho aluso. Anache na pidzukulu pyache pyachimuna onsene akhalipo dzana na makumashanu. Onsene alongwa padzuluwa akhali a m'dzinza ya Benjemani. 
1Chronicles9:1 Aisraele onsene adalembwa malingana na mabanjawo, tenepo pyonsenepi pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Israele. Anthu a Yuda akhadathamangiswa kwenda m'dziko ya Babiloni kuatchunyusa thangwi ya pyakudawa pyawo." 
1Chronicles9:2 Ale adatoma kubwerera mbakakhala m'mizinda ya kwawo akhali Aisraele anango, anyansembe, Alevi na anyakuphata basa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
1Chronicles9:3 Anthu a madzinza a Yuda, Benjemani, Eferemu na Manase adenda kakhala mu Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles9:4 Pakhali mabanja madzana matanthatu na makumafemba a dzinza ya Yuda akhakhala mu Yerusalemu ale. Pidzukulu pya Perezi mwana Yuda adasankhula Utai, mwana Amihudi, mdzukuluache Omri kukhala mkadamu wawo. Makolo ache anango akhali Imri na Bani. Pidzukulu pya Shela mwana Yuda adasankhula Asaia, ule akhali mfumu pabanja pache kukhala mkadamu wawo. Pidzukulu pya Zera mwana Yuda adasankhula Yeuele kukhala mkadamu wawo." 
1Chronicles9:5  
1Chronicles9:6  
1Chronicles9:7 Anthu a m'dzinza ya Benjemani ali m'tchindemu akhakhala mu Yerusalemu: Salu mwana Meshulamu, ule akhali mwana Hadavia, mwana Hasenua; Ibeneia mwana Yerohamu; Ela mwana Uzi, mdzukuluache Mikiri; pontho Meshulamu mwana Shefatia, ule akhali mwana Reuele, mwana Ibinia." 
1Chronicles9:8  
1Chronicles9:9 Onsene pabodzi pene akhalipo mabanja madzana mafemba na makumashanu na atanthatu a m'dzinza yeneyi akhakhala kweneko ale. Amuna onsene alongwa padzuluwa akhali akadamu a mabanjawo. 
1Chronicles9:10 Anyansembe akhakhala mu Yerusalemu mbawa: Yedaia; Yehoiaribu; Yakini; Azaria mwana Hilikia (nyakuyang'anira wamkulu wa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu) ule makolo ache akhali Meshulamu, Zadoki mwana Meraioti, na mwana Ahitubu; Adaia mwana Yerohamu, ule makolo ache akhali Pashuri na Malikia; pontho Maasai mwana Adiele, ule makolo ache akhali Yahizera, Meshulamu, Meshilemiti na Imeri." 
1Chronicles9:11  
1Chronicles9:12  
1Chronicles9:13 Anyansembe ale akhali akadamu a mabanjawo akhalipo chikwi na madzana manomwe na makumatanthatu. Iwo akhali aluso pabasa yonsene ya m'Nyumba ya Mulungu. 
1Chronicles9:14 Alevi akhakhala mu Yerusalemu ale mbawa: Shemaia mwana Hashubu, ule makolo ache akhali Azirikamu na Hashabia wa nkhonda Merari, Bakibakari, Hereshi, Galali, Matania mwana Mika ule makolo ache akhali Zikiri na Asafu; Obadia mwana Shemaia ule makolo ache akhali Galali na Yedutuni; Berekia mwana Asa, mdzukuluache Elikana, ule akhakhala m'nthemba ya chifupi na luwani ya Netofa." 
1Chronicles9:15  
1Chronicles9:16  
1Chronicles9:17 Anyakulondali Nyumba ya Mulungu akhakhala mu Yerusalemu ale mbawa: Shalumu, Akubu, Talimoni na Ahimani. Shalumu mbakhala mkadamu wawo." 
1Chronicles9:18 Pandzidzi wenewo iwo adakhazikwa kumabulukiro dzuwa a Msuwo wa Mpanda wa Mfumu. Pakutoma iwo akhalondali pamsuwo wa mpanda wa msasa wa Alevi. 
1Chronicles9:19 Shalumu mwana Kore, mdzukuluache Ebiasafu pabodzi pene na anzache a nkhonda Kora, basawo ikhali yakulondali pamsuwo wakwendera ku Chikhumbi cha Mulungu ninga montho mukhadachitira makolo awo kulondali Chikhumbi mumsasa wa MBUYA." 
1Chronicles9:20 Finiasi mwana Eleazara akhali mkadamu wawo pandzidzi unango, pontho MBUYA akhali naye." 
1Chronicles9:21 Zekaria mwana Meshelemia akhali pontho nyakulondali pamsuwo wakwendera ku Chikhumbi cha Mulungu. 
1Chronicles9:22 Onsene ale akhadasankhulwa kukhala anyakulondali m'misuwo akhali amuna madzana mawiri na khumi na awiri. Iwo adalembwa malingana na midzi ikhakhala iwo. Mfumu Davite na mprofeti Samuele ndiye adaikha makolo enewa kukhala anyakuphata basa yeneyi. 
1Chronicles9:23 Iwo pabodzi pene na pidzukulu pyawo adathimiza kulondali pamsuwo wa Nyumba ya Mulungu. 
1Chronicles9:24 Pakhali msuwo wa mpanda wakuyang'ana kumakhundu onsene, kumpoto, kumadokero dzuwa, kumwera na kumabulukiro dzuwa, pontho kukhundu yonsene kukhali nyakulondali wamkulu." 
1Chronicles9:25 Anyakulondali enewa akhaphedzwa na abale awo, ale akhakhala m'midzi, pontho akhadathema kuchita buswa-buswa pakada munthu nsiku zinomwe." 
1Chronicles9:26 Anyakulondali akulu akhali Alevi. Iwo basawo ikhali yakuyang'anira masubi a m'Nyumba ya Mulungu na pyonsene pyakukoyiwa mwenemo. 
1Chronicles9:27 Iwo akhakhala chifupi na Nyumba ya Mulungu, thangwi basawo ikhali kuilondali na kufungula misuwo ya mpanda machibese onsene." 
1Chronicles9:28 Alevi anango basawo ikhali yakuyang'anira pyombo pyakuphatisira basa pachipembedzo. Iwo akhapilengesa pingafuna kubuluka kaphatisirwa basa mbapilengesa pontho pingamala phatisirwa basa. 
1Chronicles9:29 Anango basawo ikhali yakuyang'anira pinthu pyakupambulika pabodzi pene na ufa, vinyu, mafuta aolivi, pyakufukiza pyakununkhira na pyakukomesera muliwo." 
1Chronicles9:30 Mbwenye basa yakuvungaza pinthu pyakukomesera muliwo ikhali ya anyansembe. 
1Chronicles9:31 Mlevi unango dzinache Matitia mwana wautombo wa Shalumu wa nkhonda Kora basache ikhali yakusasanya pyakupereka pyakuchita kuterekwa. 
1Chronicles9:32 Anthu a nkhonda Kohati basawo ikhali yakusasanya mikate yakupambulika ya m'Nyumba ya Mulungu pa Nsiku Yakupuma yonsene. 
1Chronicles9:33 Mabanja anango a Alevi basawo ikhali yakuimba m'Nyumba ya Mulungu. Akadamu a mabanja enewa akhakhala m'nyumba zinango chifupi na Nyumba ya Mulungu, pontho iwo nee akhaphata mabasa anango tayu, thangwi akhafunika mosiku na masikati." 
1Chronicles9:34 Amuna alongwa padzuluwa akhali akadamu a mabanja a Alevi malingana na makolo awo. Enewa akhali akadamu akhakhala mu Yerusalemu ale. 
1Chronicles9:35 Yeiele adamanga mzinda wa Gibeoni mbakhazikika mwenemo. Mkazache akhali Maaka. 
1Chronicles9:36 Mwanache wautombo akhali Abidoni, pontho anache anango mbawa: Zuri, Kishi, Baala, Neri, Nadabu," 
1Chronicles9:37 Gedori, Ahio, Zekaria na Mikiloti," 
1Chronicles9:38 babache Shimea. Pidzukulu pyawo pidakhala mu Yerusalemu chifupi na mabanja anango a nkhondawo. 
1Chronicles9:39 Neri adabala Kishi, pontho Kishi adabala Mfumu Sauli. Sauli adabala ana anayi achimuna: Yonatani, Malikishua, Abinadabu na Eshibaala." 
1Chronicles9:40 Yonatani adabala Meribaala, pontho Meribaala adabala Mika." 
1Chronicles9:41 Mika adabala ana anayi achimuna: Pitoni, Meleki, Tarea na Ahazi." 
1Chronicles9:42 Ahazi adabala Yara. Yara adabala ana atatu achimuna: Alemeti, Azimaveti na Zimri. Zimri adabala Moza," 
1Chronicles9:43 Moza adabala Binea, Binea adabala Refaia, Refaia adabala Eleasa, pontho Eleasa adabala Azele." 
1Chronicles9:44 Azele adabala ana atanthatu achimuna: Azirikamu, Bokeru, Ishimaele, Shearia, Obadia na Hanani." 
1Chronicles10:1 Afilisti adachita nkhondo na Aisraele paphiri ya Giliboa. Aisraele azinji adaphiwa penepo, tenepo anango onsene adasalira ale kuthimizapo Mfumu Sauli na anache adathawa." 
1Chronicles10:2 Mbwenye Afilisti adaphatana nawo mbaphapo ana atatu achimuna a Sauli, ale ndi Yonatani, Abinadabu na Malikishua." 
1Chronicles10:3 Nkhondo idakaka pyakwanga kuzungulira Sauli, tenepo iye makayo adalaswa pikulu pene na matswimo a anyamalwache mbakuwazika pyakwanga." 
1Chronicles10:4 Iye adalonga kuna mphale akhathukula pida pyache ule mbati, “Cholola talasadako undiphe, towera Afilisti okhonda dziwa Mulunguwa aleke kundilulupisa kuti andipha ndiwo.” Mbwenye mphale ule akhachita mantha pyakwanga kuti achite tenepo. Natenepo Sauli adakwata yekha ene talasadache mbaigwera." 
1Chronicles10:5 Pidaona mphale ule kuti Sauli afa, iye adapiponyambo patalasadache mbaferatu ponthopo." 
1Chronicles10:6 Sauli na anache onsene adafera mbodzi mwene mwakuti nkhabe chidzukulu chache na chibodzi chene chatonga tayu. 
1Chronicles10:7 Pidapiva Aisraele ale akhakhala m'phedi ya Yezereele kuti anyankhondo akhadathawa pontho kuti Sauli na anache akhadafa, iwo adasiya maluwani awo mbathawa. Natenepo Afilisti adadza mbakwata maluwaniwo." 
1Chronicles10:8 Mangwana mwache pidamala nkhondo ile, Afilisti adenda kadulisa nguwo mitemboyo, tenepo iwo adagumanapo mitembo ya Sauli na anache achimuna ale, ili thasa-thasa paphiri ya Giliboa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Iwo adagwanda msolo wa Sauli mbamdula pida pyache, tenepo adatuma anyamphangwa m'dziko yonsene ya Afilisti kalonga mphangwa zakukomazi kuna mifanikizo yawo m'nyumba zakupemphereramo na kuna anthu awo." 
1Chronicles10:10 Iwo adaikha pida pyachepyo m'nyumba ibodzi mwa nyumba zakupembedzeramo milungu yawo. Iwo adamanika msolo wache m'nyumba yakupembedzeramo Dagoni, milungu yawo." 
1Chronicles10:11 Pidava anthu a ku Yabeshi-Gileadi pinthu pidachita Afilisti kuna Sauli," 
1Chronicles10:12 amuna akuwanga mtima adenda kakwata mitembo ya Sauli na anache kwenda nayo ku Yabeshi. Kweneko iwo adaikha mitemboyo pansi pa muti wamthundu. Tenepo iwo adapimana kudya nsiku zinomwe. 
1Chronicles10:13 Sauli adafa thangwi iye akhali okhonda khulupirika kuna MBUYA. Iye adakhonda kuvera matongero a MBUYA; iye adavunza nzeru kuna mizimu ya anthu akufa pakuchita kuombedza," 
1Chronicles10:14 m'mbuto mwa kuvunza nzeru kuna MBUYA. Natenepo MBUYA adampha mbapereka ufumu onsene kuna Davite mwana Yese kuti akhale mtongi. 
1Chronicles11:1 Aisraele onsene adenda kuna Davite ku Hebroni mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ife ndife manungo anu pontho chiropa chanu." 
1Chronicles11:2 M'ndulimu podi na pikhali Sauli mfumu wathu, imwe mukhatsogolera Aisraele kunkhondo, pontho MBUYA Mulungu wanu adadumbira kuti imwe munatsogolera anthu ache ninga makabuswa, pontho munakhala mtongi wawo.”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Natenepo akadamu onsene a Aisraele adadza kuna Mfumu Davite ku Hebroni. Iye adachita nawo chiverano chakupambulika, iwombo adamdzoza kukhala mfumu wa Israele ninga montho mudadumbira MBUYA kudzera muna Samuele." 
1Chronicles11:4 Mfumu Davite na Aisraele onsene adenda mbakachita nkhondo na mzinda wa Yerusalemu. Pandzidzi wenewo ukhadziwika na dzina yakuti Yebusi, tenepo Ayebusi enechiro ache dziko akhathimiza basi kukhala mwenemo." 
1Chronicles11:5 Ayebusi adapanga Davite kuti iye hanakwanisa tayu kupita mumzindamo, kwache Davite adapokosera Zioni, mzinda wakutchingwa na mpanda, mbusanduka mzinda wa Davite." 
1Chronicles11:6 Davite adalonga mbati, “Munthu wakutoma kupha Myebusi anakhala mkadamu wa anyankhondo!” Yoabu ule mache akhali Zeruia ndiye adatoma mbakhala mkadamu wa anyankhondo." 
1Chronicles11:7 Na thangwi yakuti Davite adenda kakhala mumzinda wakutchingwa na mpanda, iwo udachemerwa “Mzinda wa Davite.”" 
1Chronicles11:8 Iye adauzungulira na mzinda ukulu, kutomera pale padandendemezwa kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa a phiri, tenepo Yoabu adamalisa kumanga khundu yakusalira ya mzindawo." 
1Chronicles11:9 Mphamvu za Davite zikhaenda mbazikula, thangwi MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akhali naye." 
1Chronicles11:10 Anthu ali m'tchindemu mbanyankhondo akuveka a Davite. Iwo pabodzi pene na Aisraele onsene adamphedza kuti iye akhale mfumu ninga montho mudadumbira MBUYA, tenepo ufumu wache ukhali wamphamvu pyakwanga." 
1Chronicles11:11 Wakutoma akhali Yashobeamu wa nkhonda Hakimoni mkadamu wa “Atatu.” Iye adamenyana na amuna madzana matatu pakuphatisa basa dipache mbaapha onsene pandzidzi ubodzi ene wa nkhondo. 
1Chronicles11:12 Wachiwiri pa “Atatu” akuveka ale, akhali Eleazara mwana Dodo wa nkhonda Ahohi." 
1Chronicles11:13 Iye adamenya nkhondo pabodzi pene na Davite kuthimbana na Afilisti pankhondo ya pa Pasi-Damimu. Iye akhali m'munda wa barele pikhathawa Aisraele," 
1Chronicles11:14 natenepo iye na amuna akhali na iye adaimira dzololo kutchinjiriza munda ule mbamenyana na Afilisti. MBUYA adaachitisa kukunda kukulu. 
1Chronicles11:15 Nsiku inango atatu mwa anyankhondo amphamvu makumatatu adenda kuphanzwi, kule kukhali Davite chifupi na nkhwimba ya Adulamu, mwenemo gulu ya Afilisti idamanga msasa m'phedi ya Refaimu." 
1Chronicles11:16 Pandzidzi wenewo Davite akhali pambuto yakutchingwa na mpanda paphiri, pontho gulu inango ya Afilisti ikhadapokosera mzinda wa Betelehemu." 
1Chronicles11:17 Davite adatchuwa kumusa mbalonga mbati, “Ndikhafunadi kwene kuti munthu unango andidzesere madzi a mumchera wa chifupi na msuwo wampanda wa Betelehemu!”" 
1Chronicles11:18 Anyankhondo atatu akuveka ale, adapapanula na mumsasa wa Afilisti, iwo adatunga madzi mumcheramo mbadza nawo kuna Davite. Kwache iye hadaamwe tayu; m'mbuto mwache adaakhuthulira pansi ninga chakupereka kuna MBUYA" 
1Chronicles11:19 mbalonga mbati, “Ine nee mbidakwanisa kumwa madzi enewa tayu! Thangwi kumwa madziwa kunakhala ninga kumwa chiropa cha amuna ale, adapipereka kutaya moyo wawo katunga madzi enewa!” Natenepo iye adakhonda kumwa madzi ale. Penepi ndiye pinthu pidachita amuna atatu akuveka ale mwakuwanga mtima." 
1Chronicles11:20 Abishai mbaleache Yoabu akhali mkadamu wa “Anyakuveka Makumatatu.” Iye adaphatisa basa dipa kumenyana na amuna madzana matatu mbaapha. Natenepo iye adasanduka wakuveka pyakwanga pakati pa “Makumatatu.” 
1Chronicles11:21 Iye akhali wakuveka pyakwanga pene pakati pa “Makumatatu” mbakhala mkadamu wawo, kwache iye hakhali wakuveka pyakwanga kupiringana “Atatu” ale tayu." 
1Chronicles11:22 Benaia mwana Yehoiada wa ku Kabizeele akhalimbo nyankhondo wakuveka; iye adachita pinthu pikulu mwakuwanga mtima kuthimizapo kupha anyankhondo amphamvu awiri a ku Moabu. Pansiku inango yakutonthola kwakuumisa madzi iye adagwera m'dzenje mbaphamo nkhalamu. 
1Chronicles11:23 Iye adapha pontho munthu wa ku Iguputo, munthu wamkulu pyakwanga, ule kulapha kwache kukhali makhono mawiri, pontho ule adaphatira dipa ikulu. Benaia adammenya na chigomba Muiguputo ule mbampokosera dipache. Tenepo iye adampha na dipache yonthoyo." 
1Chronicles11:24 Penepi mphinthu pidachita Benaia mwakuwanga mtima, ule akhali mbodzi mwa “Makumatatu.”" 
1Chronicles11:25 Iye akhali wakuveka pyakwanga pakati pa “Makumatatu,” kwache iye hakhali wakuveka pyakwanga pene tayu kupiringana “Atatu” ale. Tenepo Davite adamuikha kukhala mkadamu wa anyakumuyang'anirache." 
1Chronicles11:26 Ali m'tchindemu mbanyankhondo anango akuveka: Asahele mbaleache Yoabu, Elihanani mwana Dodo wa ku Betelehemu," 
1Chronicles11:27 Shamoti wa ku Harodi, Helezi wa ku Peleti," 
1Chronicles11:28 Ira mwana Ikeshi wa ku Tekoa, Abiezere wa ku Anatoti," 
1Chronicles11:29 Sibekai wa ku Husha, Ilai wa ku Ahohi," 
1Chronicles11:30 Maharai wa ku Netofa, Heledi mwana Baana wa ku Netofa," 
1Chronicles11:31 Itai mwana Ribai wa ku Gibea m'nthemba ya Benjemani, Benaia wa ku Piratoni," 
1Chronicles11:32 Hurai wa kumaphedi a chifupi na Gaashi, Abiele wa ku Aribati," 
1Chronicles11:33 Azimaveti wa ku Baharumi, Eliaba wa ku Shaaliboni," 
1Chronicles11:34 Hashemu wa ku Gizoni, Yonatani mwana Shage wa ku Harari," 
1Chronicles11:35 Ahiamu mwana Sakari wa ku Harari, Elifali mwana Uri," 
1Chronicles11:36 Hefere wa ku Mekera, Ahia wa Peloni," 
1Chronicles11:37 Hezero wa ku Karimele, Naarai mwana Ezibai," 
1Chronicles11:38 Yowele mbaleache Natani, Mibihari mwana Hagiri," 
1Chronicles11:39 Zeleki wa ku Amoni, Naharai wa ku Beeroti, nyakuthukula pida pya Yoabu mwana Zeruia" 
1Chronicles11:40 Ira wa ku Yatiri, Garebu wa ku Itiri," 
1Chronicles11:41 Uria wa ku Hiti, Zabadu mwana Ahilai," 
1Chronicles11:42 Adina mwana Shiza wa dzinza ya Rubeni, ule akhali mkadamu wa dzinza ya Rubeni pabodzi pene na anthu makumatatu akhali na iwo ale," 
1Chronicles11:43 Hanani mwana Maaka, Yoshafati wa ku Mitani," 
1Chronicles11:44 Uzia wa ku Ashiterate, Shama na Yeiele ana Hotamu wa ku Aroeri," 
1Chronicles11:45 Yediaele mwana Shimri na mbaleache Yoha wa ku Tizi," 
1Chronicles11:46 Eliele wa ku Mahavi, Yeribai na Yoshavia ana Elinaamu, Itama wa ku Moabu," 
1Chronicles11:47 pontho Eliele, Obedi na Yaasiele wa ku Zoba." 
1Chronicles12:1 Davite akhakhala ku Zikilagi kule kukhadathawira iye kugopa Mfumu Sauli mwana Kishi. Kweneko iye akhadaphatanizana na anyankhondo akunyindirika pontho akudziwa basawo," 
1Chronicles12:2 anthu a m'dzinza ya Benjemani, mule mudabalwa Sauli. Iwo akhakwanisa kuponya matswimo na mwala na mbemba pakuphatisa basa mkono wamadyo penu wamabzere." 
1Chronicles12:3 Iwo akhali pansi pa utongi wa Ahiezere na Yoasi, ana a Shemaa wa ku Gibea. Anyankhondo ache akhali: Yeziele na Peleti ana achimuna a Azimaveti; Beraka na Yehu a ku Anatoti; Ishimaia wa ku Gibeoni, nyankhondo wakuveka, pontho mbodzi wa akadamu a “Makumatatu” ale; Yeremia, Yahaziele, Yohanani na Yozabadi wa ku Gedera; Eluzai, Yerimoti, Bealia, Shemaria, na Shefatia a ku Harifi; Elikana, Ishia, Azarele, Yoezeri, na Yashobeamu wa nkhonda Kora; pontho na Yoela na Zebadia, ana achimuna a Yerohamu wa ku Gedori." 
1Chronicles12:4  
1Chronicles12:5  
1Chronicles12:6  
1Chronicles12:7  
1Chronicles12:8 Ali m'tchindemu ndi madzina a anyankhondo akuveka pontho akudziwa basawo a m'dzinza ya Gadi, ale adapita m'gulu ya anyankhondo a Davite pikhali iye pambuto yakutchingwa na mpanda m'thando yatchetcha mule. Iwo akhali na luso pyakwanga pakuphatisa basa pyakugedera matswimo na madipa, pontho akhali akugoswa ninga nkhalamu, pontho akuthamanga ninga nyasa m'mapiri." 
1Chronicles12:9 Iwo adapitiswa m'mipando, tenepo kutomera mkadamu wamkulu mpakana wamng'ono njishi: Ezeri, Obadia, Eliabu, Mishimana, Yeremia, Atai, Eliele, Yohanani, Elizabadi, Yeremia, na Makibanai." 
1Chronicles12:10  
1Chronicles12:11  
1Chronicles12:12  
1Chronicles12:13  
1Chronicles12:14 Amuna anango a m'dzinza ya Gadi akhali akadamu akulu akuyang'anira anyankhondo chikwi; anangombo akhali akadamu akuyang'anira anyankhondo dzana. 
1Chronicles12:15 Mwezi wakutoma wa chaka chinango pandzidzi udatayikira madzi a mumkulo wa Yorodani kumakhundu onsene, iwo adawambuka mkulo ule mbabalalisa anthu akhakhala m'maphedi a kukhundu yakumabulukiro na kumadokero dzuwa a mkulo ule." 
1Chronicles12:16 Nsiku inango amuna a m'dzinza ya Benjemani na Yuda adenda kumzinda wakutchingwa na mpanda kule kukhakhala Davite. 
1Chronicles12:17 Davite adenda kagumanikana nawo mbalonga mbati, “Ngakhala imwe mukudza kuna ine ninga ashamwali anga kufuna kundiphedza, mwatambirwa na manja mawiri. Khalani nafe pabodzi. Mbwenye ngakhala munafuna pyakundipereka kuna anyamalwanga, podi kwene kuti sidapiyesere tayu kukukuwazani, Mulungu wa makolo athu anati apidziwe mbakutchunyusani.”" 
1Chronicles12:18 Mzimu wa Mulungu udagudumira Amasai, mbodzi wa iwo, ule pakumalisira pache adasanduka mkadamu wa “Makumatatu.” Tenepo iye adakhuwa mbati, “Davite mwana Yese, ife ndife ako! Mbapikwanisike pyonsene pinachita iwe pabodzi pene na anyakukuphedza! Mulungu ali kukhundu kwako.” Davite adaatambira mbaachitisa kukhala akadamu m'gulu yache ya nkhondo." 
1Chronicles12:19 Anyankhondo anango a m'dzinza ya Manase adenda kukhundu ya Davite pikhadza iye pabodzi pene na Afilisti dzamenyana na Mfumu Sauli. Kwache iye hadaphedze Afilistiwo tayu, thangwi iwo akhachita mantha kuti mwinango Davite anakaapereka m'manja mwa Sauli mbuyache wakutoma, natenepo adambweza kwenda ku Zikilagi." 
1Chronicles12:20 Tenepo anyankhondo a m'dzinza ya Manase ale adenda mbakakhala khundu ibodzi ene na Davite pikhabwerera iye mbawa: Adina, Yozabadi, Yediaele, Mikaele, Yozabadi, Elihu na Ziletai. M'nthemba ya Manase iwo onsene akhali akadamu a amuna chikwi chibodzi." 
1Chronicles12:21 Iwo adatumikira Davite ninga akadamu a gulu yache ya nkhondo thangwi onsene akhali anyankhondo amphamvu. Kubuluka penepo iwo adakhala akadamu a nkhondo mu Israele. 
1Chronicles12:22 Nenene nsiku na nsiku anthu achinchino akhadza kukhala mbodzi wa anyankhondo a Davite, mwakuti gulu yache idakula mbikhala yamphamvu ninga anyankhondo a Mulungu." 
1Chronicles12:23 Pikhali Davite mu Hebroni anyankhondo azinji akufunziswa mwadidi adadza mbapita m'gulu ya nkhondo ya Davite kumphedza kuti akhale mfumu m'mbuto mwa Sauli ninga montho mudadumbira MBUYA. Kontawo ikhali tenepa: 
1Chronicles12:24 Dzinza ya Yuda, amuna amphamvu akukhala na pida pyakugedera napyo matswimo pontho madipa: pikwi pitanthatu na madzana masere;" 
1Chronicles12:25 Dzinza ya Simioni, amuna akufunziswa mwadidi: pikwi pinomwe na dzana ibodzi;" 
1Chronicles12:26 Dzinza ya Levi: amuna pikwi pinayi na madzana matanthatu," 
1Chronicles12:27 kuthimizapo Yehoiada mkadamu wa banja ya Aroni pabodzi pene na amuna pikwi pitatu na madzana manomwe," 
1Chronicles12:28 pontho Zadoki nyankhondo wakuwanga mtima, pabodzi pene na akadamu makumawiri na awiri a m'banjache;" 
1Chronicles12:29 Dzinza ya Benjemani, amuna akubulukira muna Sauli: pikwi pitatu (kwache anthu azinji a m'dzinza ya Benjemani akhathimiza basi kukhala kunduli kwa Sauli);" 
1Chronicles12:30 Dzinza ya Eferemu, amuna akuveka m'madzinza mwawo: amuna pikwi makumawiri na madzana masere;" 
1Chronicles12:31 Dzinza ya Manase wakumabulukiro dzuwa, ale adasankhulwa kwenda kampitisa Davite kukhala mfumu: amuna pikwi khumi na pisere;" 
1Chronicles12:32 Dzinza ya Isakara, amuna ale akhadziwa pyathema Aisraele kuchita, pontho na ndzidzi wache wadidi wakuchitira penepi: akadamu madzana mawiri pabodzi pene na amuna ale akhali pansi pa utongi wawo;" 
1Chronicles12:33 Dzinza ya Zebuloni amuna akuwanga mtima pontho akunyindirika, akusasanyika kumenya nkhondo pontho akufunziswa mwadidi maphatisiro basa a pida pya mtundu onsene: pikwi makumashanu;" 
1Chronicles12:34 Dzinza ya Nafitali: akadamu chikwi chibodzi pabodzi pene na amuna pikwi makumatatu na pinomwe akukhala na pyakugedera matswimo pontho madipa; 
1Chronicles12:35 Dzinza ya Dani, amuna akufunziswa mwadidi: pikwi makumawiri na pisere na madzana matanthatu;" 
1Chronicles12:36 Dzinza ya Asheri, amuna akusasanyika kumenya nkhondo: pikwi makumanayi." 
1Chronicles12:37 Madzinza akumabulukiro dzuwa kwa mkulo wa Yorodani: Rubeni, Gadi, na Manase wakumabulukiro dzuwa, amuna akufunziswa mwadidi kuphatisa basa pida pya mtundu onsene: pikwi dzana na makumawiri." 
1Chronicles12:38 Anyankhondo onsenewa, ale akhali akusasanyika kumenya nkhondo, adenda ku Hebroni na mtima wakufuna kuchitisa Davite kukhala mfumu wa Israele. Anthu anango onsene a Israele adaphatizana pabodzi na manyerezero abodzi kumchitisa kukhala mfumu." 
1Chronicles12:39 Kweneko adakhalako nsiku zitatu pabodzi pene na Davite kudya na kumwa pidaasasanyira abale awo a m'mudzi mule. 
1Chronicles12:40 Anthu adadza kuna Davite na mabulu, ngamila, akavalo, na ng'ombe za pachingolo zakuthukula pyakudya; ufa, makuyu, mfesa zakuuma, vinyu, na mafuta aolivi, kubulukira kutali pyakwanga na kumadzinza akumpoto ene; Isakara, Zebuloni, na Nafitali. Iwo adadza pontho na ng'ombe, na mabira kuti aphe adye. Pyonsenepi pikhaonesa kukomerwa kukhali na anthu onsene m'dzikomo." 
1Chronicles13:1 Mfumu Davite adavunza nzeru kuna akadamu a m'magulu chikwi pontho na a dzana ibodzi. 
1Chronicles13:2 Kubuluka penepo iye adalalika kuna Aisraele mbati, “Ngakhala imwe mwatsikimizadi, pontho ngakhala nkhufuna kwa MBUYA, tendeni titumize anyamphangwa kuna anthu onsene, anyansembe na Alevi ene m'maluwani mwawo kuapanga kuti onsene adze kuna ife kuno." 
1Chronicles13:3 Kubuluka penepo tinadenda kakwata Bokosi ya Chiverano ya Mulungu, idagwinyira ife pakhundu Sauli mbali mfumu ile.”" 
1Chronicles13:4 Anthu onsene adakomerwa na manyerezero enewo mbaphatizana napyo. 
1Chronicles13:5 Natenepo Davite adagumanyisa Aisraele kubulukira kudziko yonsene ya Israele kutomera kumadire a Iguputo kumwera kufikirana kumakata a Hamati kumpoto, towera adze na Bokosi ya Chiverano ku Yerusalemu kubulukira ku Kiriati-Yearimu." 
1Chronicles13:6 Davite pabodzi pene na anthu adenda kumzinda wa Baala, kweneko nkhu Kiriati-Yearimu m'nthemba ya Yuda kakwata Bokosi ya Chiverano ya Mulungu, bokosi ile imbadziwika na dzina ya MBUYA nyakukhala padzulu pa pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido." 
1Chronicles13:7 Panyumba ya Abinadabu adabulusa panja Bokosi ya Chiverano mbaikhazika m'chingolo chitswa. Uza na Ahio ndiye akhafambisa chingolocho," 
1Chronicles13:8 uku Davite na anthu onsene akhavina na mphamvu zawo zonsene kulemedza Mulungu. Iwo adaimba nyimbo na mulomo, pontho na pida pyakuimbira ninga anyakatangale, ng'oma, nkhotcho na ngoma." 
1Chronicles13:9 Pidafika iwo pambuwa ya Kidoni, ng'ombe zidagwegweduka, tenepo Uza adafuthula mkono wache kuphatirira Bokosi ya Chiverano." 
1Chronicles13:10 Kabodzi kene MBUYA adazhangalira Uza mbampha thangwi ya kukhuya Bokosi ya Chiverano. Uza adafera ponthopo pamaso pa Mulungu," 
1Chronicles13:11 tenepo na lero mbuto yeneyo imbachemerwa Perezi-Uza Davite pidampha mtima thangwi MBUYA adamtchunyusa Uza mwakuzhangali. 
1Chronicles13:12 Tenepo Davite adachita mantha na Mulungu mbalonga mbati, “Apo ndinakwanisa tani kukwata Bokosi ya Chiverano?”" 
1Chronicles13:13 Natenepo Davite hadaikwate tayu kwenda nayo kumzinda wa Yerusalemu. M'mbuto mwache adaisiya kumusa kwa munthu unango dzinache Obedi-Edomu mzika ya mumzinda wa Gati. 
1Chronicles13:14 Bokosi ya Chiverano ile idakhala kweneko miyezi mitatu, tenepo MBUYA adatsanzayisa banja ya Obedi-Edomu na pyonsene pikhali na iye." 
1Chronicles14:1 Kubuluka penepo Mfumu Hiramu wa kumzinda wa Turo adatuma anyamphangwa kuna Davite pabodzi pene na mitanda yamkungudza, amisiri akumanga zamiyala na anyampala matabwa kuti akamange nyumba yachifumu." 
1Chronicles14:2 Natenepo Davite adadzindikira kuti MBUYA akhadamkhazikisa kukhala mfumu wa Israele, pontho kuti akhachitisa ufumu wache kufamba mwadidi thangwi ya udidi wa anthu ache." 
1Chronicles14:3 Mu Yerusalemu Davite adasemba akazi anango azinji mbakhala na ana azinji achimuna na achikazi ene. 
1Chronicles14:4 Madzina a ana adabala iye mwenemo mbawa: Shamua, Shobabu, Natani, Solomoni," 
1Chronicles14:5 Ibihari, Elishua, Elipeleti," 
1Chronicles14:6 Noga, Nefegi, Yafia," 
1Chronicles14:7 Elishama, Beeliada na Elifeleti." 
1Chronicles14:8 Pidava Afilisti kuti Davite akhadadzozwa kukhala mfumu wa Israele onsene, iwo adenda na anyankhondo awo onsene kamphata, mbwenye Davite adapiva mbaenda kagumanikana nawo." 
1Chronicles14:9 Afilisti adadza paphedi ya Refaimu mbatoma kuvunga. 
1Chronicles14:10 Davite adavunza Mulungu mbati, “Ayi ndichite nawo nkhondo Afilistiwa? Ayi munandichitisa kuakunda?” MBUYA adatawira mbati, “Ndoko kachite nawo nkhondo pontho ndinakuchitisa kuakunda.”" 
1Chronicles14:11 Tenepo Davite adaasosa pa Baala-Perazimu mbaakunda. Iye adalonga mbati, “Ninga madzi makulu, Mulungu akunda anyamalwanga pakuphatisa basa manjanga.” Natenepo mbutoyo imbachemerwa Baala-Perazimu." 
1Chronicles14:12 Pidathawa Afilisti, iwo adasiya m'nduli milungu yawo, tenepo Davite adatonga kuti ipiswe moto." 
1Chronicles14:13 Kachiwiri kache Afilisti adafika m'phedi mule mbatoma pontho kuvunga. 
1Chronicles14:14 Davite adavunza pontho nzeru Mulungu, tenepo Mulungu adamtawira mbati, “Leka kuasosa na kuno, mbwenye zungulira mbusasanyike kaasosa na kukhundu inangoyo chifupi na miti ya balisamu." 
1Chronicles14:15 Sindzidzi nkhuva upekete-pekete pansonga pamiti ya balisamu, penepo asose, thangwi ine ndinaenda patsogolo pako kakunda anyankhondo a Afilisti.”" 
1Chronicles14:16 Davite adachita pidampanga Mulungu, tenepo iye adakwanisa kuthamangisa Afilisti kubulukira ku Geba kwenderatu ku Gezeri." 
1Chronicles14:17 Kuveka kwa Davite kudafalikira kumadziko onsene, tenepo MBUYA adachitisa madzinza onsene kugopa Davite." 
1Chronicles15:1 Pidamala Davite kumanga nyumbache mumzinda wa Davite, iye adasasanya mbuto kuti Bokosi ya Chiverano ya Mulungu ikhalepo, pontho aimangire chikhumbi." 
1Chronicles15:2 Kubuluka penepo Davite adalonga mbati, “Paleke khala munthu unango wakuthukula Bokosi ya Chiverano ya Mulungu, mbwenye Alevi ene basi, thangwi MBUYA adaasankhula kuti athukule Bokosiyo, pontho kuti iwo amtumikire moyo wawo onsene.”" 
1Chronicles15:3 Davite adachemeresa Aisraele onsene mu Yerusalemu kuti adze na Bokosi ya Chiverano kumbuto idasasanyira iye Bokosiyo. 
1Chronicles15:4 Kubuluka penepo iye adachemeresa pabodzi pene pidzukulu pyonsene pya Aroni na Alevi. 
1Chronicles15:5 Kubulukira kuna pidzukulu pya Kohati: Uriele mkadamu na abale ache dzana na makumawiri; 
1Chronicles15:6 kubulukira kuna pidzukulu pya Merari: Asaia mkadamu na abale ache madzana mawiri na makumawiri; 
1Chronicles15:7 kubulukira kuna pidzukulu pya Gereshomu: Yowele mkadamu na abale ache dzana na makumatatu; 
1Chronicles15:8 kubulukira kuna pidzukulu pya Elizafani: Shemaia mkadamu na abale ache madzana mawiri; 
1Chronicles15:9 kubulukira kuna pidzukulu pya Hebroni: Eliele mkadamu na abale ache makumasere; 
1Chronicles15:10 kubulukira kuna pidzukulu pya Uziele: Aminadabu mkadamu na abale ache dzana na khumi na awiri. 
1Chronicles15:11 Tenepo Davite adachemeresa anyansembe awa: Zadoki na Abiatara; pontho na Alevi awa: Uriele, Asaia, Yowele, Shemaia, Eliele, na Aminadabu." 
1Chronicles15:12 Iye adalonga kuna Alevi mbati, “Imwe ndimwe akadamu a mabanja a Alevi; imwe pabodzi pene na Alevi anzanu mwathema kupichenesa mwekha ene mbamudze na Bokosi ya MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele kumbuto yaisasanyira ine ile." 
1Chronicles15:13 MBUYA adatizhangalira pakutoma pale thangwi si imwe Alevi ale adathukula Bokosi ya MBUYA tayu. Ife nee tidavunza MBUYA tayu pya mule mwathema ife kupichita njira yakuthema.” 
1Chronicles15:14 Kubuluka penepo anyansembe na Alevi adapichenesa okha ene, towera akwate Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele." 
1Chronicles15:15 Alevi adaithukula na miti paphewa pawo ninga montho mukhadalongera MBUYA kudzera muna Mose. 
1Chronicles15:16 Davite adapanga akadamu a Alevi kuti apereke kuna abale awo basa yakuimba pontho kuimba mwakukomerwa pakuphatisa basa bangwe, nyakatangale na nkhotcho." 
1Chronicles15:17 Kubulukira pa magulu a anyakuimba iwo adasankhula amuna ali m'tchindemu kuti aimbe nkhotcho: Hemani mwana Yowele, Asafu mbaleache, ule akhali mwana Berekia, na Etani mwana Kushaia wa nkhonda Merari. Iwo adasankhula Alevi ali m'tchindemu kuti aaphedze kuimba nyakatangale wakukungika mwadidi: Zekaria, Yaaziele, Shemiramoti, Yehiele, Uni, Eliabu, Maaseia, na Benaia. Iwo adasankhula pontho Alevi m'tchindemu kuimba na anyakatangale akuthetha: Matitia, Elifelehu, Mikineia, Azazia na anyakulondali ku Nyumba ya Mulungu, Obedi-Edomu na Yeiele." 
1Chronicles15:18  
1Chronicles15:19  
1Chronicles15:20  
1Chronicles15:21  
1Chronicles15:22 Na thangwi yakuti Kenania akhali munthu waluso pyakwanga pakuimba, iye adasankhulwa kukhala nyakuyang'anira anyakuimba a Chilevi." 
1Chronicles15:23 Berekia na Elikana pabodzi pene na Obedi-Edomu pontho na Yehia adasankhulwa kukhala anyakulondali Bokosi ya Chiverano. Anyansembe Shebania, Yoshafati, Netanele, Amasai, Zekaria, Benaia na Eliezere adasankhulwa kukhala anyakuliza ngoma patsogolo pa Bokosi ya Chiverano." 
1Chronicles15:24  
1Chronicles15:25 Natenepo Mfumu Davite, akadamu a Aisraele na akadamu a anyankhondo chikwi adenda kumusa kwa Obedi-Edomu kakwata Bokosi ya Chiverano kwenda nayo ku Yerusalemu na kukomerwa kukulu." 
1Chronicles15:26 Iwo adapereka nsembe ng'ombe zimuna zinomwe na mabira anomwe thangwi Mulungu akhaphedza Alevi ale kuthukula Bokosi ya Chiverano. 
1Chronicles15:27 Davite adavala mkhanjo wakuchena wakufewa ninga montho mudachitira anyakuimba onsene, Kenania mkadamu wawo, pontho na Alevi ale akhathukula Bokosi ya Chiverano. Davite adavala pontho efodi wakuchena." 
1Chronicles15:28 Natenepo Aisraele onsene adenda pabodzi pene na Bokosi ya Chiverano ku Yerusalemu uku akuimba mwakukomerwa, kuliza ngoma pontho nyanga za ng'ombe, na kuimba nkhotcho, bangwe na anyakatangale." 
1Chronicles15:29 Pikhadza Bokosi ya Chiverano mumzinda wa Davite mule, Mikaela mwana wamkazi wa Sauli adasuzumira na pazhanera mbaona Mfumu Davite akuvina na kunumpha-numpha thangwi ya kukomerwa, tenepo iye adamululupisa mumtima mwache." 
1Chronicles16:1 Iwo adakwata Bokosi ya Chiverano ile mbakaiikha m'chikhumbi, chidasasanyirwa iyo chile. Kubuluka penepo iwo adapereka nsembe na pyakupereka pyachiphatizano kuna Mulungu." 
1Chronicles16:2 Pidamala Davite kupereka nsembe zenezi, adatsanzayisa anthu na dzina ya MBUYA" 
1Chronicles16:3 mbagawa pyakudya kuna iwo onsene. Iye adapereka kuna mamuna na mkazi onsene mu Israele mkate wamumphu, nthuli ya nyama yakuotcha na chinkhodo cha mfesa zakuuma." 
1Chronicles16:4 Davite adasankhula Alevi anango kutumikira pa chipembedzo cha MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele patsogolo pa Bokosi ya Chiverano pakumuimbira nyimbo zakumkuza nazo. 
1Chronicles16:5 Asafu asankhulwa kukhala mkadamu wa gulu yeneyi, Zekaria mbakhala wachiwiriache. Anyakuimba nyakatangale akhali Yeiele, Shemiramoti, Yehiele, Matitia, Eliabu, Benaia, Obedi-Edomu na Yeiele akhaimba nyakatangale. Asafu akhaimba nkhotcho," 
1Chronicles16:6 pontho anyansembe awiri, Benaia na Yahaziele, akhaliza ngoma mwakukhonda lekeza patsogolo pa Bokosi ya Chiverano." 
1Chronicles16:7 Ukhali ndzidzi wenewu udatoma Davite kupereka kuna Asafu na Alevi anzache basa yakuimba nyimbo zakukuza nazo MBUYA. 
1Chronicles16:8 Perekani takhuta kuna MBUYA, lalikani pya ukulu wache; pangani madzinza pinthu pyachita iye." 
1Chronicles16:9 Imbani nyimbo yakukuza nayo MBUYA; longani pya pinthu pyakudodomesa pyachita iye. 
1Chronicles16:10 Komerwani kuti ife ndife ache; anyakumpembedza onsene mbakomerwe! 
1Chronicles16:11 Ndokoni kuna MBUYA kuti mukaphedzwe mbamumpembedze mwakukhonda lekeza. 
1Chronicles16:12 Imwe pidzukulu pya Yakobo, nyabasa wa Mulungu, imwe pidzukulu pya Israele, ale adasankhulwa na Mulungu, kumbukani pinthu pyakudodomesa pyachita Mulungu, pontho na kutonga kudachita iye." 
1Chronicles16:13  
1Chronicles16:14 MBUYA ndi Mulungu wathu; matongero ache ngakuna anthu onsene a padziko yapansi. 
1Chronicles16:15 Iye nkhabe duwalira chiverano chache kwenda na kwenda, kudumbira kudachita iye kuna mifendu pikwi-pikwi." 
1Chronicles16:16 Chiverano chidachita iye na Abrahamu, kudumbira kudachita iye kuna Isake." 
1Chronicles16:17 MBUYA adachita Chiverano na Yakobo, chile ntchakwenda na kwenda." 
1Chronicles16:18 Iye adalonga mbati, “ndinakupasa dziko ya Kanani. Yeneyo inakhala yako ene.”" 
1Chronicles16:19 Anthu a Mulungu akhali akulengeseka, akuchepa, pontho alendo m'dziko ya Kanani." 
1Chronicles16:20 Iwo akhatsalakatika kubulukira dziko kwenda dziko inango, kubulukira ufumu kwenda ufumu unango." 
1Chronicles16:21 Mbwenye Mulungu hadatawirise munthu na mbodzi ene kuapondereza tayu; kufuna kuatchinjiriza, iye adacheuza mafumu mbati," 
1Chronicles16:22 “Lekani kuwaza anyabasanga akusankhulika; lekani khuya maprofeti anga.” 
1Chronicles16:23 Imbirani MBUYA, imwe anthu a padziko yonsene yapansi! Lalikani nsiku na nsiku mphangwa zadidi kuti iye atipulumusa." 
1Chronicles16:24 Lalikani pya demelero yache kuna madzinza, pontho mabasache amphamvu kuna anthu a mtundu onsene." 
1Chronicles16:25 MBUYA ngwamkulu pontho iye athema kulemedzwa pikulu pene; iye athema kulemedzwa pikulu pene kupiringana milungu yonsene. 
1Chronicles16:26 Milungu ya madzinza anango onsene ndi mifanikizo ene pyawo, mbwenye MBUYA adalenga kudzulu." 
1Chronicles16:27 Demelero na chifumu pimbamzungulira, mphamvu na kukomerwa pyadzala m'Nyumba mwache." 
1Chronicles16:28 Kuzani MBUYA imwe anthu onsene a padziko yapansi, kuzani demelero yache na mphamvu zache." 
1Chronicles16:29 Kuzani dzina yademelero ya MBUYA; dzani na pyakupereka pontho pitani m'Nyumba mwache. Lambani pamaso pa MBUYA, Nyakuchena, ndzidzi unaonekera iye." 
1Chronicles16:30 Tetemerani pamaso pache, imwe anthu a padziko yonsene yapansi! Dziko yapansi yakhazikika pambuto pache mwakuti nkhabe tekenyeka tayu." 
1Chronicles16:31 Komerwani imwe dziko yapansi na thambo! Pyonsene mbapilonge kuna madzinza kuti MBUYA ndi mfumu. 
1Chronicles16:32 Khuwani pikulu nyanza na pyakulengwa pyonsene pili mwenemo; imwe minda na pyonsene pili mwenemo, komerwani!" 
1Chronicles16:33 Misitu inakhuwa na kukomerwa pamaso pa MBUYA, iye angabwera dzatonga dziko yapansi." 
1Chronicles16:34 Perekani takhuta kuna MBUYA thangwi iye ngwadidi; kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala. 
1Chronicles16:35 Longani kuna iye kuti, “Tipulumusenimbo ife Mulungu, Nyankhombo wathu; tigumanyiseni pabodzi mbamutipulumusa m'manja mwa madzinza, towera ife tipereke takhuta kuna dzinanu yakuchena, mbatikulemedzani na kukukuzani.”" 
1Chronicles16:36 Kuzani MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele! Mkuzeni chinchino pontho kwenda na kwenda. Kubuluka penepo Aisraele onsene adalonga mbati, “Ameni, mbakuzwe MBUYA!”" 
1Chronicles16:37 Mfumu Davite adaikha Asafu na Alevi anzache kukhala anyakuimba pandzidzi wa chipembedzo chile chidachitika pambuto padakoyiwa Bokosi ya Chiverano ile. Iwo akhaphata basawo penepo nsiku na nsiku. 
1Chronicles16:38 Obedi-Edomu mwana Yedutuni na amuna makumatanthatu na asere a m'dzinza mwache akhaaphedza. Hosa na Obedi-Edomu ndiye akhali anyakulondali misuwo ya mpanda. 
1Chronicles16:39 Zadoki nyansembe na anyansembe anzache ndiye akhayang'anira chipembedzo cha MBUYA pambuto yakupembedzerapo mu Gibeoni. 
1Chronicles16:40 Machibese na mawulo nsiku na nsiku iwo akhapereka nsembe yakupyerera nyama yamumphu paguwa yansembe malingana na mwambo udapereka MBUYA kuna Aisraele. 
1Chronicles16:41 Penepo pabodzi pene na iwo pakhali Hemani na Yedutuni, pontho na anango ale akhadasankhulwa kukhala anyakuimba kwene nyimbo zakukuza nazo MBUYA thangwi ya kutifuna kwache kokhonda mala." 
1Chronicles16:42 Hemani na Yedutuni akhali pontho na basa yakuliza ngoma, na kuimba nkhotcho pontho na pyakuimbira pinango, kuimba nyimbo zakukuza nazo MBUYA. Anthu a m'banja ya Yedutuni basawo ikhali yakulondali misuwo ya mpanda." 
1Chronicles16:43 Kubuluka penepo munthu onsene adenda kumusa kwache, Davite adendambo kumusa kwache katsanzayisa banjache." 
1Chronicles17:1 Mfumu Davite adakhazikika m'nyumbache yachifumu. Nsiku inango adachemeresa Natani mprofeti mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ine ndikukhala m'nyumba yakumangwa na matabwa amkungudza, mbwenye Bokosi ya Chiverano ya Mulungu ikukhala m'chikhumbi!”" 
1Chronicles17:2 Natani adatawira mbati, “Chitani pyonsene pinanyerezera imwe, thangwi MBUYA ali namwe.”" 
1Chronicles17:3 Mbwenye na mosiku mwache Mulungu adalonga kuna Natani mbati," 
1Chronicles17:4 “Ndoko kampange nyabasanga Davite kuti ine ndikulonga kuna iye kuti, ‘Si iwe anafuna dzandimangira nyumba yakuti ine ndikhalemo tayu." 
1Chronicles17:5 Kubulukira ndzidzi udapulumusa ine Aisraele kuna anthu a ku Iguputo mpakana lero ine sidakhale m'nyumba tayu. Ine ndaenda mbuto na mbuto mbandikhala m'chikhumbi. 
1Chronicles17:6 Kufamba-famba kwanga konsene na Aisraele ine sidalonge tayu na kuna mbodzi ene wa akadamu adasankhula ine kutsogolera anthu anga kuti, “Thangwi yache ninji mwakhonda kundimangira nyumba ya matabwa amkungudza?” ’" 
1Chronicles17:7 “Chinchino panga nyabasanga Davite kuti, ‘Ine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndikulonga kuti: Ine ndidakukwata kumpovu kukhadyesa iwe mabira kule kuti ukhale mtongi wa anthu anga Aisraele." 
1Chronicles17:8 Ine ndakhala nawe konsene kwene kwaenda iwe, pontho ndakunda anyamalwako onsene pamaso pako. Ine ndinakuchitisa kukhala munthu wakuveka pyakwanga ninga akadamu akuveka pyakwanga padziko yapansi." 
1Chronicles17:9 Ine ndasankhulira anthu anga Aisraele mbuto mbandiachitisa kukhazikikamo, kule kunafuna iwo khala okhonda ponderezwa na pang'ono pene. Kutomera ndzidzi udapita iwo m'dziko yeneyi, iwo asoswa na anthu akuzunguzika, kwache penepi nkhabe dzachitika pontho tayu. Ine ndinadumbira kukunda anyamalwako onsene pontho kukupasa pidzukulu." 
1Chronicles17:10  
1Chronicles17:11 Ungafa mbuikhwa m'masiye a makolo ako, ndinachitisa mbodzi wa anako achimuna kukhala mfumu mbandichitisa ufumu wache kukhala wamphamvu." 
1Chronicles17:12 Iye ndiye anafuna dzandimangira nyumba, pontho ndinaonesesa kuti ufumu wache ukhale wakwenda na kwenda." 
1Chronicles17:13 Ine ndinakhala babache, iye mbakhala mwananga. Ine nkhabe dzaleka kumuonesa kumfuna kwanga kokhonda mala tayu ninga mudachitira ine kuna Sauli, ule adabulusa ine kuti iwe ukhale mfumu." 
1Chronicles17:14 Ine ndinamuikha kukhala nyakuyang'anira anthu anga na ufumu wanga kwenda na kwenda. Ufumu wache nkhabe dzamala tayu.’ ” 
1Chronicles17:15 Natani adapanga Davite pyonsene pidatchulula Mulungu kuna iye. 
1Chronicles17:16 Tenepo Mfumu Davite adenda pamaso pa MBUYA m'Chikhumbi. Iye adakhala pansi mbapemphera mbati, “MBUYA Mulungu, ndine animbo ine, pontho banjangambo ninji kuti munditsanzayise ninga tenepa?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Kwache chinchino imwe mukuchita pikululetu; imwe mwadumbira kundipasa pidzukulu pile pinafuna kudza m'tsogolo muno, pontho imwe, MBUYA Mulungu, mwandiyesa kale ninga munthu wa pyachembo!" 
1Chronicles17:18 “Ninji pontho chinafuna ine kulonga kuna imwe pya kundilemedza kwachita imwe? Imwe mumbandidziwa ine nyabasanu. 
1Chronicles17:19 MBUYA, thangwi ya ine, nyabasanu, pontho thangwi ya kufuna kwanu imwe mwachita pinthu pikulupi, mbamutchulula pyonsene pinafuna kudza m'tsogolo." 
1Chronicles17:20 Imwe ndimwe wamkulu MBUYA! Nkhabe unango ninga imwe; ndzidzi onsene ife timbapidziwa kuti imwe ene ndimwe Mulungu. 
1Chronicles17:21 Nkhabe dzinza inango padziko yapansi ninga Israele, dzinza idapulumusa imwe paubitchu kuti akhale anthu anu ale. Pinthu pikulu pontho pyakudodomesa pidaachitira imwe pyachitisa kuti muveke padziko yapansi. Imwe mudathamangisa madzinza anango ndzidzi ukhaenda anthu anu, anthu adasudzula imwe paubitchu kudziko ya Iguputo ale." 
1Chronicles17:22 Imwe mudachitisa Israele kukhala anthu anu kwenda na kwenda, pontho imwe MBUYA mwasanduka Mulungu wawo." 
1Chronicles17:23 “Tenepo chinchino MBUYA chitisani kudumbira kwanu kuna ine na kuna pidzukulu pyanga kukwana-kwana, pontho chitani pidadumbira imwe pile." 
1Chronicles17:24 Tenepo kuveka kwanu kunakhala kukulu kwenda na kwenda, pontho ndzidzi onsene anthu anati alonge kuti, ‘MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndi Mulungu wa Israele!’ Pontho munachitisa ufumu wanga kukhala wakukhazikika pamaso panu!" 
1Chronicles17:25 Ine ndawanga mtima kupemphera tenepo kuna imwe, Mulungu wanga, thangwi imwe mwatchulula pinthu pyonsenepi kuna ine nyabasanu, pontho mwandipanga kuti munachitisa pidzukulu pyanga kukhala mafumu." 
1Chronicles17:26 “MBUYA imwe ndimwe Mulungu; imwe mwadumbira pinthu pyadidipi kuna ine, nyabasanu." 
1Chronicles17:27 Ndikupemphera kuti mutsanzayise pidzukulu pyanga, towera iwo athimize kukomerwa na kuakomera kwanu mtima. Imwe MBUYA mwaatsanzayisa, pontho mtsanzayiso wanu unakhala pana iwo kwenda na kwenda.”" 
1Chronicles18:1 Pidagwanda ndzidzi pang'ono, Mfumu Davite adasosa pontho Afilisti mbaakunda. Iye adapokosera mzinda wa Gati na midzi yakuzungulira m'manja mwa Afilisti." 
1Chronicles18:2 Iye adakunda pontho a Moabu mbakhala pansi pa utongi wache mbakhoma msonkho kuna iye. 
1Chronicles18:3 Kubuluka penepo Davite adasosa Mfumu Hadadezere wa ku Zoba chifupi na nthemba ya Hamati, thangwi Hadadezere akhayesa-yesa kukhazikisa utongi wache m'nthemba ya chifupi na mkulo wa Yufurate." 
1Chronicles18:4 Davite adaphata anyankhondo a pachingolo chikwi, amuna a pakavalo pikwi pinomwe na anyankhondo akufamba pansi pikwi makumawiri. Iye adakoya akavalo akukwana kukweya pingolo dzana mbagwanda uzingo anango onsene akusalirawo." 
1Chronicles18:5 Pidatumiza Aaramu a ku Damasiko gulu ya ankhondo kaphedza Mfumu Hadadezere, Davite adaisosa mbapha amuna pikwi makumawiri na piwiri." 
1Chronicles18:6 Kubuluka penepo iye adamanga misasa ya nkhondo m'nthemba yawoyo, tenepo Aaramu adakhala pansi pa utongi wache mbakhoma msonkho kuna iye. MBUYA adachitisa Davite kukunda konsene kwene kukhaenda iye." 
1Chronicles18:7 Davite adapokosera pyakugedera matswimo pyagolidi pikhadathukula mathubu a Hadadezere mbaenda napyo ku Yerusalemu. 
1Chronicles18:8 Iye adakwata pontho nkuwa uzinji ene kubulukira ku Tibihati na Kuni, mizinda ikhatongwa na Hadadezere ile. Solomoni adaphatisa basa nkuwa wenewu kusasanyira phiso ikulu yakukoyera madzi, nsanamira ziwiri, na pyombo pinango pyankuwa m'Nyumba ya MBUYA." 
1Chronicles18:9 Mfumu Toi wa ku Hamati adava kuti Davite akhadakunda anyankhondo onsene a Hadadezere. 
1Chronicles18:10 Natenepo iye adatuma mwanache Yoramu kapasa mwenyikiro na kuchita makolokoto Mfumu Davite, thangwi ya kukunda kwache Hadadezere, ule akhadachitambo nkhondo na Toi kazinji kene. Yoramu adenda kuna Mfumu Davite na mitukwa ya golidi, siliva na nkuwa." 
1Chronicles18:11 Mfumu Davite adaipambulira kuna MBUYA kuti iphatiswe basa pachipembedzo, pabodzi pene na siliva pontho golidi pikhadakwata iye kuna madzinza adakunda iye ale; Aedomu, Amoabu, Aamoni, Afilisti na Aamaleki." 
1Chronicles18:12 Abishai ule mache akhali Zeruia adakunda Aedomu m'phedi ya Munyu mbapha amuna pikwi khumi na pisere. 
1Chronicles18:13 Iye adamanga misasa ya anyankhondo ponsene pene mu Edomu, tenepo anthu onsene kweneko adakhala pansi pa utongi wa Davite. MBUYA adachitisa Davite kukunda konsene kwene kukhaenda iye." 
1Chronicles18:14 Davite adatonga dziko yonsene ya Israele mbaonesesa kuti ndzidzi onsene anthu ache akuchitirwa chilungamo pontho pyakuthema. 
1Chronicles18:15 Yoabu mbaleache Abishai akhali mkadamu wa anyankhondo: Yehosafati mwana Ahiludi akhali nyakulemba pya m'dziko. 
1Chronicles18:16 Zadoki mwana Ahitubu na Ahimeleki mwana Abiatara akhali anyansembe; Shavisha akhali nyakulemba m'thando ya miseru; 
1Chronicles18:17 Benaia mwana Yehoiada akhali wakuyang'anira a anyakulondali a Chikereti na a Chipeleti; ana a Mfumu Davite akhali mathubu akulu mu ufumu wache. 
1Chronicles19:1 Pidagwanda ndzidzi pang'ono Mfumu Nahashi wa ku Amoni adafa, tenepo mwanache Hanuni adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache." 
1Chronicles19:2 Davite adalonga mbati, “Ine ndinati ndikomere mtima Hanuni mwana Nahashi ningambo mudandikomera mtima babache.” Tenepo Davite adatuma anyamphangwa kuna Hanuni kuonesa nsisi zache. Pidafika iwo ku Amoni kuna Mfumu Hanuni kamuombera," 
1Chronicles19:3 akadamu a ku Amoni adalonga kuna mfumu mbati, “Ayi mukunyerezera kuti Davite atuma anyamphangwa kuna imwe kufuna kuonesa nsisi zache thangwi ya kufuna kulemedza babanu? Nkhabe, tayu! Iye adaatuma kuno ninga anyakuzonda dziko, towera aipokosere!”" 
1Chronicles19:4 Hanuni adaphata anyamphangwa adatumwa na Davite ale mbaachinga ndevu. Iye adang'amba nguwo zawo kutomera pansi mpakana m'matako mbaagwinya kuti aende pyawo. 
1Chronicles19:5 Iwo akhachita manyadzo pyakwanga kuti abwerere kwawo. Pidava Davite pinthu pidachitika pile, iye adatuma mphangwa kaapanga kuti abange khala pyawo ku Yeriko mbabwerera mwenemo ndevu zawo zamera pontho." 
1Chronicles19:6 Mfumu Hanuni na Aamoni adadzindikira kuti iwo akhadachitisa Davite kukhala nyamalwawo, natenepo iwo adatumiza siliva wakulemera makilogramu pikwi makumatatu na pinayi kubwereka pingolo na anyakutekenyache kubulukira ku Mesopotamia, Aramaaka na Zoba." 
1Chronicles19:7 Pingolo pikwi makumatatu na piwiri pidabwereka iwo pile pabodzi pene na gulu ya anyankhondo a mfumu wa ku Maaka adadza mbamanga misasawo chifupi na Medeba. Aamoni adabulukambo m'mizinda mwawo mbasasanyika kumenya nkhondo. 
1Chronicles19:8 Pidapiva Davite, adatuma Yoabu pabodzi pene na anyankhondo onsene kamenya nkhondo." 
1Chronicles19:9 Aamoni adabuluka mbakakhala m'mbuto zawo zankhondo pamsuwo wa mzindawo ukulu wa Raba, mwenemo mafumu akhadadza dzamphedza ale, akhala m'mbuto zawo za nkhondo m'minda." 
1Chronicles19:10 Yoabu adaona kuti patsogolo pache na m'nduli mwache pakhali magulu anyankhondo, tenepo iye adasankhula magulu a nkhondo akunyindirika mu Israele mbaaikha m'mbuto zawo zankhondo mwakuyang'anisana na Aaramu." 
1Chronicles19:11 Iye adaikha anyankhondoche anango akusalirawo pansi pa utongi wa Abishai mbaleache, ulembo adaaikha m'mbuto zawo zankhondo mwakuyang'anisana na Aamoni." 
1Chronicles19:12 Yoabu adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ngakhala unaona Aaramu akundikunda, idza undiphedze, tenepo inembo ndingaona Aamoni akukukunda, ndinati ndidze dzakuphedza." 
1Chronicles19:13 Wangisa pontho wanga mtima! Tende timenyere nkhondo anthu athu, pontho na mizinda ya Mulungu wathu mwakuwangisa. Kufuna kwa MBUYA mbakuchitike!”" 
1Chronicles19:14 Yoabu na amunache adenda kasosa, tenepo Aaramu adathawa." 
1Chronicles19:15 Pidaona Aamoni kuti Aaramu akuthawa, iwombo adathawa pamaso pa Abishai mbaenda kapita mumzindamo. Tenepo Yoabu adabwerera ku Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles19:16 Pidadzindikira Aaramu kuti iwo adakundwa na Aisraele, iwo agumanyisa pabodzi pene magulu ankhondo Aaramu akumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yufurate, mbaaikha pansi pa utongi wa Shobaki, mkadamu wa anyankhondo a Mfumu Hadadezere wa ku Zoba." 
1Chronicles19:17 Pidava Davite penepi, adagumanyisa pabodzi magulu ankhondo a Aisraele. Iwo adawambuka mkulo wa Yorodani mbaaikha m'mbuto zawo zankhondo mwakuyang'anisana na Aaramu. Nkhondo idaotoka," 
1Chronicles19:18 tenepo Aisraele adathamangisa anyankhondo a Aaramu kuabwezera m'nduli. Davite na amunache adapha anyakufambisa pingolo pikwi pinomwe pontho na anyankhondo akufamba pansi pikwi makumanayi. Iwo adapha pontho Shobaki, mkadamu wa anyankhondo wa Aaramu." 
1Chronicles19:19 Pidadzindikira mafumu, ale akhali pansi pa utongi wa Hadadezere kuti iwo akhadakundwa na Aisraele, adachita mtendere na Davite. Tenepo iwo adakhala pansi pa utongi wa Davite. Aaramu hadapifuneve pontho tayu kuphedza Aamoni." 
1Chronicles20:1 M'mainja pandzidzi wa chaka ukhaenda mafumu kunkhondo, Yoabu adatsogolera gulu ya anyankhondo mbachita nkhondo na dziko ya Amoni. Iye adadza ku Raba, adauzungulira na anyankhondo ache, adausosa mbauvunga, mbwenye Davite adasalira mu Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles20:2 Mfanikizo wa Aamoni dzinache Moleki ukhali na chipewu chachifumu chagolidi, ule ukhalemera makilogramu makumatatu na mashanu. Mwenemo mukhali miyala yakudula, tenepo Davite adaikwata mbaiikha m'chipewu chache chachifumu. Iye adakwata pontho pinthu pizinji kubulukira mumzindamo." 
1Chronicles20:3 Iye adakwata anthu a mumzindawo mbaakhakhamiza kuphata basa na mipeni ya macheka, mapaza na mbadzo. Iye adachita pontho chibodzi-bodzi kuna anthu onsene a m'maluwani anango a Amoni. Kubuluka penepo iye na amunache adabwerera ku Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles20:4 Pidagwanda ndzidzi padaotoka pontho nkhondo na Afilisti pa Gezeri. Wenewu ukhali ndzidzi ule Sibekai wa ku Husha adapha Sipai munthu wakujintcha, pontho Afilisti adakundwa." 
1Chronicles20:5 Padaotoka pontho nkhondo inango na Afilisti, tenepo Elihanani mwana Yairi adapha Lahimi mbaleache Goliati wa ku Gati, ule dipache ikhali na ntchindu ninga mtanda wakulukira nguwo." 
1Chronicles20:6 Padaotoka pontho nkhondo inango na Afilisti pa Gati, kule kukhali munthu wakujintcha pyakwanga wakukhala na pyala pitanthatu dzanja yonsene, pontho pyala pitanthatu dzinyalo yonsene. Iye akhali chidzukulu cha anthu akujintcha akaleletu." 
1Chronicles20:7 Iye adashola Aisraele, tenepo Yonatani, mwana Shimea, mbaleache Davite, adampha." 
1Chronicles20:8 Anthu atatuwa, ale adaphiwa na Davite, pontho na amunache, akhali pidzukulu pya anthu akujintcha a ku Gati." 
1Chronicles21:1 Satana akhafuna kudzesa nyatwa pana anthu a Israele, natenepo adachitisa Davite kunyerezera pyakuchitisa kalembera." 
1Chronicles21:2 Davite adalonga kuna Yoabu na kuna akadamu anango mbati, “Ndokoni mu Israele monsene kutomera nkhomo mpakana nkhomo inango ya dziko, mbulengese anthu, thangwi ndafuna kudziwa konta ya anthu ali muno.”" 
1Chronicles21:3 Yoabu adatawira mbati, “MBUYA mbachitise Aisraele kuinjipa kadzana kupiringana ninga muna iwo chinchinomu! Mbuya Mfumu, onsene mbanyabasanu, thangwi yache ninji munafuna kuchita penepi mbamuchitisa Aisraele onsene kudawa?”" 
1Chronicles21:4 Mbwenye mfumu adamchitisa Yoabu kuvera matongero ache. Yoabu adafamba-famba m'dziko yonsene ya Israele. Pidamala iye adabwerera ku Yerusalemu. 
1Chronicles21:5 Iye adapanga Mfumu Davite konta ya amuna akukwanisa kumenya nkhondo: Mu Israele mukhali amuna pikwi-pikwi na pikwi dzana; pontho mu Yuda pikwi madzana manayi na makumanomwe. 
1Chronicles21:6 Na thangwi yakuti Yoabu hadakomerwe na pidatonga mfumu pile tayu, iye hadalengese anthu a m'dzinza ya Levi na Benjemani tayu." 
1Chronicles21:7 Pinthu pidachitikapyo Mulungu pidamuipirwa, natenepo adatchunyusa Israele." 
1Chronicles21:8 Davite adalonga kuna Mulungu mbati, “Ine ndadawa pikulu pene thangwi ya kuchita penepi! Ndaphata miyendo ndilekerereni. Ine ndachita pinthu pyakupupwa.”" 
1Chronicles21:9 Tenepo Mulungu adalonga kuna Gadi mprofeti wa Davite mbati," 
1Chronicles21:10 “Ndoko ukampange Davite kuti ndikumpasa mwayi asankhule chinthu chibodzi papinthu pitatupi: chinasankhula iyecho ndiye chinafuna ine kuchichita.” 
1Chronicles21:11 Gadi adenda kuna Davite mbakampanga pyonsene pikhadalonga MBUYA mbamvunza mbati, “Ntchipi chinafuna imwe?" 
1Chronicles21:12 Njala pyaka pitatu? Penu miyezi mitatu mukuthawa anyamalwanu? Penu nsiku zitatu MBUYA akukhamwadzeni na talasadache, pontho adzese muliri m'dziko mwanu pakuphatisa basa mngelo wache kudzesa imfa mu Israele monsene? Longani ndikampangenji nyakundituma ule?”" 
1Chronicles21:13 Davite adatawira kuna Gadi mbati, “Ndili panyatwa ikulu! Mbwenye ine nee ndinafuna kutchunyuswa na anthubi. MBUYA makayo ndiye anditchunyuse thangwi iye ngwakuva nsisi.”" 
1Chronicles21:14 MBUYA adatumiza muliri pakati pa Aisraele, tenepo anthu pikwi makumanomwe adafa." 
1Chronicles21:15 Kubuluka penepo adatuma mngelo wache kwenda kavunga Yerusalemu, mbwenye iye adasanduza manyerezero ache mbalonga kuna mngelo ule mbati, “Pyakwana! Bweza mkono wako.” Mngelo ule akhadaimira chifupi na mbuwa ya Arauna wa Chiyebusi." 
1Chronicles21:16 Davite adaona mngelo aimira chidzulu-dzulu, uku aphatira talasada m'manja mwache kusasanyika kuti avunge Yerusalemu. Davite pabodzi pene na akulu-akulu onsene, ale akhadavala masakha, adalamba." 
1Chronicles21:17 Davite adapemphera mbati, “Mulungu, ndine ndachita pinthu pyakudawika. Ndine ndatonga anthuwa kuti achite kalembera. Apo anthumbo pyawowa achitanji? MBUYA Mulungu wanga tchunyusani ine na banjanga mbamuleke anthu anuwa.”" 
1Chronicles21:18 Mngelo wa MBUYA adapanga Gadi kulonga kuna Davite kuti aende kamangira MBUYA guwa yansembe pambuwa ya Arauna wa Chiyebusi. 
1Chronicles21:19 Davite adavera matongero a MBUYA mbaenda kachita ninga montho mukhadampangira Gadi. 
1Chronicles21:20 Pambuwa pale, Arauna na anache akhabubuda tirigu, tenepo pidaona iwo mngelo ule, anache ale adathawa mbabisala." 
1Chronicles21:21 Sindzidzi Arauna nkhuona Mfumu Davite akufika pambuwa pale, adabuluka pambuwa pale mbalamba pamaso pache." 
1Chronicles21:22 Davite adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ndigulise mbuwakoyi, towera ndimangirepo MBUYA guwa yansembe kuti muliriwu umale. Ndinati ndiigule pa kontache.”"
