1Chronicles21:23 Arauna adatawira mbati, “Ikwateni pyanu, Mfumu, mbumuchitepo chonsene chinafuna imwe. Kwatani ng'ombe kuti zikhale nsembe zakupyerera, pontho na miti yakububudira kuti ikhale nkhuni pabodzi pene na tirigu kuti akhale chakupereka. Pyonsenepi ndikukupasani.”" 
1Chronicles21:24 Mbwenye mfumu adatawira mbati, “Nkhabe, ndinati ndikupagali kontache. Ine nkhabe pereka chinthu chako, penu chinthu chakupaswa pezi kukhala chakupereka kuna MBUYA tayu.”" 
1Chronicles21:25 Tenepo iye adapereka kuna Arauna kobiri zagolidi zakukwana madzana matanthatu, kugula mbuwa ile." 
1Chronicles21:26 Iye adamangira MBUYA guwa yansembe mbaperekapo nsembe zakupyerera na pyakupereka pyachiphatizano. Iye adapemphera, tenepo MBUYA adatawira pakutumiza moto kubulukira kudzulu mbupyereza nsembe zikhali paguwa pale." 
1Chronicles21:27 MBUYA adapanga mngelo ule kuti abuluse talasadache, tenepo mngelo ule adaveradi." 
1Chronicles21:28 Pandzidzi wenewo, pidaona Davite kuti MBUYA ava kupempha kwache, iye adapereka nsembe paguwa pambuwa ya Arauna." 
1Chronicles21:29 Pandzidzi wenewu Chikhumbi cha Mulungu na guwa yansembe, pale pakhaperekwa nsembe zakupyerera, pile pikhadasasanya Mose m'thando yatchetcha, pikhali pambuto yakupembedzerapo mu Gibeoni;" 
1Chronicles21:30 kwache Davite hadakwanise kwendako tayu kapembedza Mulungu, thangwi akhagopa talasada ya mngelo wa MBUYA." 
1Chronicles22:1 Natenepo Davite adalonga mbati, “Penepa ndiye panafuna dzakhala nyumba ya MBUYA Mulungu. Yeneyi ndiye guwa yansembe, pale panafuna Aisraele dzaperekerapo nsembe zakupyerera.”" 
1Chronicles22:2 Mfumu Davite adatonga kuti alendo onsene akukhala m'dziko ya Israele agumanyikane pabodzi, tenepo iye adaapasa basa. Anango basawo ikhali yakucheketeza miyala yakumangira nayo nyumba ya Mulungu." 
1Chronicles22:3 Iye adapereka simbi mzinji ene kuti asasanye mapedego a misuwo ya mpanda na pyakuphatisira pyache, pontho na nkuwa uzinji wakuti nkhabe munthu mbadakwanisa kuupima tayu." 
1Chronicles22:4 Iye adaverana na anthu a ku Turo na Sidoni kuti amdzesere miti mizinji yamkungudza. 
1Chronicles22:5 Davite adalonga mbati, “Mwananga Solomoni ndi mphale pontho okhonda kupidziwisisa, tenepo nyumba inafuna dzamangira iye MBUYA yathema kukhala ikulu pyakwanga, yakuveka pontho yademelero pamaso pa madzinza onsene. Natenepo ine ndinati ndisasanyiretu pyonsene pya nyumbayi.” Tenepo Davite adasasanya pyonsene pyakufunika pa nyumbayo iye mbadzati kufa." 
1Chronicles22:6 Iye adachemeresa mwanache Solomoni mbampanga kuti amangire MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele nyumba. 
1Chronicles22:7 Davite adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Mwananga ine ndikhapifuna kuti ndimangire MBUYA Mulungu wanga nyumba kumulemedza." 
1Chronicles22:8 Mbwenye MBUYA adandipanga kuti ndapha anthu azinji pontho ndamenya nkhondo zizinji, tenepo na thangwi yakuti ndachuchisa chiropa cha anthu azinji, iye hadanditawirise tayu kummangira nyumba." 
1Chronicles22:9 Kwache iye adadumbira mbati, ‘Iwe unakhala na mwana ule anatonga na mtendere, thangwi ine ndinampumisa kuna anyamalwache onsene. Dzinache inakhala Solomoni, thangwi pandzidzi unatonga iye ndinampasa mtendere na kumtchinjiriza." 
1Chronicles22:10 Iye ndiye anati andimangire nyumba, iye anakhala mwananga, inembo ndinakhala babache. Ndinakhazikisa mpando wache wachifumu mu Israele kwenda na kwenda.’ ”" 
1Chronicles22:11 Davite adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Tenepo mwananga, MBUYA Mulungu wako mbakhale nawe, pontho mbachitise pidadumbira iye kukwana-kwana kuti iwe ukwanise kummangira nyumba." 
1Chronicles22:12 Tenepo MBUYA Mulungu wako mbakupase udziwisi na nzeru, towera ukwanise kutonga Aisraele malingana na mwambo ache." 
1Chronicles22:13 Ngakhala iwe unavera upangizi na matongero ache onsene adapereka MBUYA kuna Aisraele kudzera muna Mose, pinthu pyako pyonsene pinakufambira mwadidi. Wangisa pontho wanga mtima. Leka chita mantha penu kutaya mtima." 
1Chronicles22:14 Pabasa yeneyi ya nyumba ine ndaphata basa pyakwanga pakugumanyisa golidi wakukwana pingolo pikwi pitatu na madzana manayi, pontho na siliva wakukwana pingolo pikwi makumatatu na pinayi kuti piphate basa kumanga nyumbayo. Padzulu pa penepi ndapereka pontho nkuwa na simbi pyakuinjipa pyakwanga pyokhonda pimika, pontho pana miti na miyala pyakusasanywa kale, kwache wathema kugumana pizinji." 
1Chronicles22:15 Iwe una amuna azinji akuphata basa. Pana amuna akucheketeza miyala yakumangira, anyaluso pakumanga na miyala, anyakupala matabwa, na amuna azinji akudziwa kusasanya pinthu" 
1Chronicles22:16 na golidi, siliva, nkuwa na simbi. Tenepo itome basa, MBUYA mbakhale nawe.”" 
1Chronicles22:17 Davite adatonga akadamu onsene a Aisraele kuti aphedze Solomoni mwanache. 
1Chronicles22:18 Iye adalonga mbati, “MBUYA Mulungu wanu ambakhala namwe pontho akukupasani mtendere kumakhundu onsene. Iye anditawirisa kukunda anthu onsene akhakhala m'dziko muno ale, tenepo lero ali pansi pa utongi wanu pontho pa MBUYA." 
1Chronicles22:19 Natenepo tumikirani MBUYA Mulungu wanu na mtima wanu onsene pontho na moyo wanu onsene. Tomani kumanga Nyumba ya MBUYA, towera mukhazikemo Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA pabodzi pene na pinthu pyakupambulika pile pimbaphatiswa basa pa chipembedzo.”" 
1Chronicles23:1 Pidakalamba Davite adapitisa Solomoni mwanache ufumu wa Israele m'mbuto mwache. 
1Chronicles23:2 Mfumu Davite adagumanyisa akadamu onsene a Israele pabodzi pene na anyansembe pontho Alevi. 
1Chronicles23:3 Iye adachitisa kalembera wa amuna onsene a Chilevi akukwanisa pyaka makumatatu pyakubalwa. Onsene pabodzi pene adakwana pikwi makumatatu na pisere. 
1Chronicles23:4 Mfumu adaikha amuna pikwi makumawiri na pinayi kuyang'anira basa ya pa Nyumba ya MBUYA, pikwi pitanthatu kukhala mathubu na anyakutonga miseru," 
1Chronicles23:5 pikwi pinayi kukhala anyakulondali, pontho na pikwi pinayi kukhala anyakukuza MBUYA pakuphatisa basa pida pyakuimbira pile pidapereka mfumu kuti piphate basa yeneyi." 
1Chronicles23:6 Davite adagawa Alevi ale m'magulu matatu malingana na mabanjawo: Gereshomu, Kohati na Merari." 
1Chronicles23:7 Gereshoni adabala ana awiri achimuna: Ladani na Shimei. 
1Chronicles23:8 Ladani adabala ana atatu achimuna: Yehiele, Zetamu, na Yowele," 
1Chronicles23:9 ale akhali akadamu a pidzukulu pya nkhonda Ladani. (Shimei adabala ana atatu achimuna Shelomoti, Haziele, na Harani.)" 
1Chronicles23:10 Shimei adabala ana anayi achimuna: Yahati, Ziza, Yeushi, na Beria, kutomera wautombo kufikirana chimalisira bele. Yeushi na Beria hakhali na pidzukulu pizinji tayu, natenepo onsene adalengeswa ninga nkhonda ibodzi." 
1Chronicles23:11  
1Chronicles23:12 Kohati adabala ana anayi achimuna: Amuramu, Izihara, Hebroni, na Uziele." 
1Chronicles23:13 Mwanache wautombo, Amuramu, ndiye akhali babawo Aroni na Mose. Aroni na pidzukulu pyache adapambulwa, towera akhale anyakuyang'anira pinthu pyakupambulika kwenda na kwenda, kufukiza pyakununkhira kupembedza MBUYA, kumtumikira, pontho kutsanzayisa anthu na dzinache." 
1Chronicles23:14 Mbwenye ana a Mose, munthu wa Mulungu, adaikhwa m'gulu ya Alevi." 
1Chronicles23:15 Mose adabala ana awiri achimuna: Gereshomu na Eliezere. 
1Chronicles23:16 Mkadamu wa ana a Gereshomu akhali Shebuele. 
1Chronicles23:17 Eliezere akhali na mwana mbodzi basi dzinache Rehabia, kwache Rehabia akhali na pidzukulu pizinji." 
1Chronicles23:18 Mwana wachiwiri wa Kohati, Izihara adabala mwana wamamuna dzinache Shelomiti mkadamu wa nkhonda yeneyi." 
1Chronicles23:19 Mwana wachitatu wa Kohati, Hebroni adabala ana anayi achimuna: Yeria, Amaria, Yahaziele, na Yekameamu." 
1Chronicles23:20 Mwana wachinayi wa Kohati, Uziele adabala ana awiri achimuna: Mika na Ishia." 
1Chronicles23:21 Merari adabala ana awiri achimuna: Mahili na Mushi. Mahili akhali na ana awiri achimuna: Eleazara na Kishi," 
1Chronicles23:22 mbwenye Eleazara adaferamo nee bala mwana wamamunabi, mbwenye ana achikazi okhokha: Anache achikaziwo adasembwa na abale awo, ana achimuna a Kishi." 
1Chronicles23:23 Mushi adabala ana atatu achimuna: Mahili, Ederi, na Yeremoti." 
1Chronicles23:24 Penepi ndiye pikhali pidzukulu pya Levi malingana na mabanjawo, munthu onsene akhalembesa dzinache. Chidzukulu chonsene chakukwanisa pyaka makumawiri pyakubalwa kwenda m'tsogolo akhali na khundu yache pabasa ya Nyumba ya MBUYA." 
1Chronicles23:25 Davite adalonga mbati, “MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele akhadapereka mtendere kuna anthu ache, natenepo iye ene mwenechiro anakhala mu Yerusalemu kwenda na kwenda." 
1Chronicles23:26 Natenepo nee panafunikave Alevi kuthukula Chikhumbi cha Mulungu na pyonsene pyakuphatiswa basa pa chipembedzo tayu.” 
1Chronicles23:27 Malingana na upangizi wakumalisa udapereka Davite, Alevi onsene akhapaswa basa angafika pyaka makumawiri penu kupiringana penepo." 
1Chronicles23:28 Basa ya Alevi ikhali yakuphedza pidzukulu pya Aroni kutumikira m'Nyumba ya MBUYA, kuyang'anira mwadidi pintalo na masubi ache ene, pontho kuonesesa kuti chinthu chonsene chakupambulika chileke swipiswa;" 
1Chronicles23:29 kuyang'anira mikate yakuperekwa kuna Mulungu, ufa wakuphatiswa basa pa pyakupereka, pitumbuwa pyakusowa chakufufumisira na pyakupereka pyakuchita kuterekwa pontho na ufa wakuvungazwa na mafuta aolivi; kupima na kuyesa pyakupereka pya ku Nyumba ya Mulungu," 
1Chronicles23:30 pontho kukuza na kupereka demelero kuna MBUYA machibese na mawulo onsene," 
1Chronicles23:31 na pandzidzi onsene unaperekwa nsembe kuna MBUYA pa Nsiku Yakupuma, pa Phwando yakusekera Kubalwa kwa mwezi na maphwando anango akusankhulika. Matongero adasasanywa kulonga konta chadi-chadi ya Alevi ale adathema kuphata basa yeneyi pandzidzi wawo wakuthema. Alevi adapaswa basa yakupembedza MBUYA ndzidzi onsene." 
1Chronicles23:32 Alevi adapaswa basa yakuyang'anira Chikhumbi cha Mulungu na Mbuto Yakuchena, pontho na kuphedza abale awo, pidzukulu pya Aroni, m'Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
1Chronicles24:1 Magulu-magulu a pidzukulu pya Aroni mbawa: Aroni adabala ana anayi achimuna: Nadabu, Abihu, Eleazara na Itamara." 
1Chronicles24:2 Nadabu na Abihu adafa babawo mbadzati kufa, tenepo iwo adafa akusowa ana, natenepo abale awo Eleazara na Itamara adakhala anyansembe." 
1Chronicles24:3 Mfumu Davite adagawa pidzukulu pya Aroni kuaikha m'magulu malingana na mabasawo. Iye adaphedzwa kuchita penepi na Zadoki, chidzukulu cha Eleazara, pontho na Ahimeleki, chidzukulu cha Itamara." 
1Chronicles24:4 Pidzukulu pya Eleazara pidaikhwa m'magulu khumi na atanthatu, mwenemo pidzukulu pya Itamara pidaikhwa m'magulu masere. Penepi pidachitika, thangwi pakati pa pidzukulu pya Eleazara pakhali akadamu achimuna azinji a m'mabanja." 
1Chronicles24:5 Na thangwi yakuti pakhali akadamu a Nyumba ya MBUYA, na akadamu a chipembedzo pakati pa pidzukulu pya Eleazara na Itamara, tenepo basa idaperekwa kuna iwo pakuchita ntsango." 
1Chronicles24:6 Pidzukulu pya Eleazara na Itamara pikhachita kupitisirana pakuchita ntsango. Kubuluka penepo iwo adalembwa na Shemaia mwana Netanele, nyakulemba wa Chilevi. Mfumu, mathubu ache, nyansembe Zadoki, Ahimeleki mwana Abiatara, akadamu a mabanja a anyansembe na mabanja a Chilevi, onsene akhali mboni." 
1Chronicles24:7 Uli m'tchindewu ndi nyandandanda wa mule mukhaphatira basa magulu-magulu makumawiri na anayi akubulukira m'mabanja: 
1Chronicles24:8 Ntsango yakutoma idagwera Yehoiaribu yachiwiri idagwera Yedaia yachitatu idagwera Harimu yachinayi idagwera Seorimu yachishanu idagwera Malikia yachitanthatu idagwera Miamini yachinomwe idagwera Hakozi yachisere idagwera Abia yachifemba idagwera Yeshua yachikhumi idagwera Shekania yachikhumi na chibodzi idagwera Eliashibu yachikhumi na chiwiri idagwera Yakimu yachikhumi na chitatu idagwera Hupa yachikhumi na chinayi idagwera Yeshebeabu yachikhumi na chishanu idagwera Biliga yachikhumi na chitanthatu idagwera Imeri yachikhumi na chinomwe idagwera Heziri yachikhumi na chisere idagwera Hapizezi yachikhumi na chifemba idagwera Petahia yachimakumawiri idagwera Yehezikele yamakumawiri na chibodzi idagwera Yakini yamakumawiri na chiwiri idagwera Gamuli yamakumawiri na chitatu idagwera Delaia, yamakumawiri na chinayi idagwera Maazia." 
1Chronicles24:9 Amuna enewa adalembwa malingana na mabasa adapaswa iwo akupita m'Nyumba ya MBUYA kaphata mabasa adakhazikisa kholo yawo Aroni pakuvera pidatonga MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele pile. 
1Chronicles24:10 Ali m'tchindemu mbakadamu anango a mabanja a pidzukulu pya Levi: Yedeia, mwana Shubaele, mdzukuluache Amuramu;" 
1Chronicles24:11 Ishia, chidzukulu cha Rehabia;" 
1Chronicles24:12 Yahati, mwana Shelomoti, mdzukuluache Izihara;" 
1Chronicles24:13 Yeria, Amaria, Yahaziele na Yekameamu ana Hebroni panyandandanda wa kubalwa kwawo;" 
1Chronicles24:14 Shamiri mwana Mika, mdzukuluache Uziele;" 
1Chronicles24:15 Zekaria mwana Ishia mbaleache Mika, mdzukuluache Uziele;" 
1Chronicles24:16 Mahili, Mushi na Yaazia, pidzukulu pya Merari." 
1Chronicles24:17 Yaazia adabala ana atatu achimuna: Shohamu, Zakuri na Ibiri." 
1Chronicles24:18 Mahili adabala ana awiri achimuna: Eleazara na Kishu. Eleazara hadabale mwana wamamuna tayu, mbwenye Kishi adabala mwana mbodzi wamamuna dzinache Yerameele." 
1Chronicles24:19  
1Chronicles24:20 Mushi adabala ana atatu achimuna: Mahili, Ederi na Yerimoti. Enewa ndiye akhali mabanja a Levi." 
1Chronicles24:21 Iwo akhachitambo ntsango ninga mukhachitira abale awo pidzukulu pya Aroni pamaso pa Mfumu Davite, Zadoki, Ahimeleki na pamaso pa mafumu a mabanja a unyansembe na Alevi. Mabanja a mbaleawo autombo akhachitambo sasawa na mabanja a chimalisira bele." 
1Chronicles25:1 Mfumu Davite pabodzi pene na akadamu a Chilevi adasankhula mabanja a Chilevi ali m'tchindemu kuti afambise chipembedzo: Asafu, Hemani na Yedutuni. Iwo basawo ikhali kulalika mphangwa za Mulungu pabodzi pene na anyakuimba anyakatangale, malimba na nkhotcho. Uli m'tchindewu ndi nyandandanda wa anthu ale adasankhulwa kuti afambise chipembedzo pabodzi pene na basa inango ikhaphata kada gulu." 
1Chronicles25:2 Ana anayi achimuna a Asafu akhali Zakuri, Yosefe, Netania na Asharela. Iwo akhali pansi pa utongi wa Asafu, ule akhalalika mphangwa za Mulungu pandzidzi onsene ukhampanga mfumu." 
1Chronicles25:3 Ana atanthatu achimuna a Yedutuni akhali Gedalia, Zeri, Yeshaia, Shimei, Hashabia na Matitia. Iwo akhali pansi pa utongi wa babawo, ule akhalalika mphangwa za Mulungu pabodzi pene na anyakuimba anyakatangale na anyakuimba nyimbo zakukuza nazo na kupereka takhuta kuna MBUYA." 
1Chronicles25:4 Ana achimuna khumi na anayi a Hemani akhali: Bukia, Matania, Uziele, Shebuele, Yerimoti, Hanania, Hanania, Eliata, Gidaliti, Romamiti-Ezeri, Yoshibekasha, Maloti, Hotiri, na Mahazioti." 
1Chronicles25:5 Mulungu adapereka kuna Hemani, mprofeti wa mfumu, ana enewa khumi na anayi pabodzi pene na ana atatu achikazi, ninga mukhadadumbirira iye, towera Hemani akhale na mphamvu." 
1Chronicles25:6 Ana onsene akhaimba nkhotcho na anyakatangale pansi pa utongi wa babawo pa chipembedzo m'Nyumba ya Mulungu. Asafu, Yedutuni, na Hemani akhali pansi pa utongi wa mfumu." 
1Chronicles25:7 Amuna onsene makumawiri na anayi ale akhali anyaluso; Alevi anzawo onsene akhadafunziswa mwadidi kuimba nyimbo za Mulungu. Onsene pabodzi pene akhalipo amuna madzana mawiri na makumasere na asere. 
1Chronicles25:8 Angafuna kudziwa buswa ya munthu, iwo akhachita ntsango, podi kwene akhale pyache mamunamkulu penu mphale, nyaluso penu nyakufunza." 
1Chronicles26:1 Ali m'tchindemu mba Levi ale adapaswa basa ya kulondali Nyumba ya Mulungu. Kubuluka kubanja ya Kora kukhali Meshelemia mwana Kore wa m'banja ya Asafu. 
1Chronicles26:2 Iye adabala ana anomwe achimuna, kutomera wautombo kufikirana chimalisira bere mbawa: Zekaria, Yediaele, Zebadia, Yatiniele," 
1Chronicles26:3 Elamu, Yehohanani, na Eliehoenai." 
1Chronicles26:4 Pakhali pontho munthu unango dzinache Obedi-Edomu, ule adatsanzayiswa na Mulungu pakumpasa ana asere achimuna, kutomera wautombo kufikirana chimalisira bere mbawa: Shemaia, Yehozabadi, Yoa, Sakari, Netanele," 
1Chronicles26:5 Amiele, Isakara, na Peuletai." 
1Chronicles26:6 Shemaia mwana wautombo wa Obedi-Edomu adabala ana atanthatu achimuna: Otini, Refaele, Obedi, Elizabadi, Elihu, na Semakia. Enewa akhali amuna akufunika pyakwanga m'banja mwawomo thangwi ya kupikwanisa kwawo kukulu, maka amuna awiri akumalisirawa akhali aluso pyakwanga." 
1Chronicles26:7  
1Chronicles26:8 Banja ya Obedi-Edomu ikhali na amuna makumatanthatu na awiri anyakudziwisisa mwadidi basa yeneyi. 
1Chronicles26:9 Banja ya Meshelemia ikhali na amuna khumi na asere anyakupidziwisisa mwadidi. 
1Chronicles26:10 Kubulukira kubanja ya Merari, kukhali Hosa, ule adabala ana anayi achimuna: Shimri (babache adamchitisa kukhala mkadamu, podi kwene kuti hakhali mwana wautombo tayu)," 
1Chronicles26:11 Hilikia, Tebalia, na Zekaria. Anthu onsene a m'banja ya Hosa akhalipo khumi na atatu, ale basawo ikhali yakulondali Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
1Chronicles26:12 Anyakulondaliwa adagawiwa m'magulu malingana na mabanjawo pontho akhapaswa basa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu ninga montho mukhachitirwambo Alevi anangowo. 
1Chronicles26:13 Banja yonsene, penu njing'ono penu njikulu, akhachita ntsango basi, towera aone msuwo unafuna iwo kulondali." 
1Chronicles26:14 Shelemia adasankhulwa kulondali msuwo wa mpanda wakumabulukiro dzuwa. Zekaria, mwana Shelemia, phungu wanzeru ule, adasankhulwa kulondali msuwo wa mpanda wakumpoto." 
1Chronicles26:15 Obedi-Edomu adasankhulwa kulondali msuwo wa mpanda wakumwera, pontho anache akhali anyakulondali masubi akukoyeramo pinthu." 
1Chronicles26:16 Shupimu na Hosa adasankhulwa kulondali msuwo wa mpanda wakumadokero dzuwa, pontho na msuwo wa Shaleketi kumtunda. Basa yakulondaliyi ikhaphatika pakuchita buswa-buswa." 
1Chronicles26:17 Kumabulukiro dzuwa anyakulondali atanthatu ndiye akhaphata basa pansiku, kumpoto kukhali anayi, pontho kumwera anayi. Anyakulondali anayi nsiku na nsiku akhaikhwa pamsuwo wa masubi akukoyeramo pinthu, awiri kada msuwo." 
1Chronicles26:18 Kuchintalo kumadokero dzuwa kukhali anyakulondali anayi chifupi na msewu, pontho awiri pachintalo makapo." 
1Chronicles26:19 Enewa ndiye akhali anyakulondali pa misuwo, ale akhali pidzukulu pya Kora na Merari." 
1Chronicles26:20 Alevi anango basawo ikhali kuyang'anira mfuma ya m'Nyumba ya Mulungu na masubi akukoyeramo mitukwa yakuperekwa kuna Mulungu. 
1Chronicles26:21 Ladani, mbodzi wa ana achimuna a Gereshoni, akhali kholo ya magulu a mabanja azinji, kuthimizapo banja ya mwanache Yehiele." 
1Chronicles26:22 Ana anango achimuna a Ladani awiri Zetamu na Yowele basawo ikhali kuyang'anira mfuma ya m'Nyumba ya Mulungu na m'masubi akukoyeramo pinthu. 
1Chronicles26:23 Mabasa anango adaperekwa pontho kuna pidzukulu pya Amuramu, Izihari, Hebroni, na Uziele." 
1Chronicles26:24 Shebuele wa m'banja ya mwana Mose, Gereshomu akhali mkadamu wamkulu pa kuyang'anira mfuma ya m'Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
1Chronicles26:25 Kudzera muna Eliezere mbaleache Gereshomu, pakhali ubale pakati pa iye na Shelomoti. Eliezere adabala Rehabia, Rehabia adabala Yeshaia, Yeshaia adabala Yoramu, Yoramu adabala Zikiri, Zikiri adabala Shelomoti." 
1Chronicles26:26 Shelomoti na anthu a m'banja mwache basawo ikhali yakuyang'anira mitukwa yakuperekwa kuna Mulungu na Mfumu Davite, mafumu a mabanja, akadamu a m'magulu-magulu, na akadamu a anyankhondo." 
1Chronicles26:27 Iwo adakwata pinango pidapokosera iwo pankhondo mbapipereka kuti piphatiswe basa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu. 
1Chronicles26:28 Shelomoti na a m'banja mwache ndiye adapaswa basa yeneyi yakuyang'anira pyonsene pyakuperekwa kuti piphatiswe basa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu kuthimizapo mitukwa idadza na mprofeti Samuele, Mfumu Sauli, Abineri mwana Neri na Yoabu mwana Zeruia." 
1Chronicles26:29 Pakati pa pidzukulu pya Izihara, Kenania na anache adapaswa basa inango ene kunja kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu ninga mathubu a Aisraele pontho anyakutonga miseru pakati pawo." 
1Chronicles26:30 Pakati pa pidzukulu pya Hebroni, Hashabia na abale ache chikwi chibodzi na madzana manomwe, onsene amphamvu zawo, adapaswa basa yakufambisa pinthu pyonsene pya chipembedzo cha MBUYA na kutumikira mfumu pakati pa Aisraele kukhundu yakumadokero dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani." 
1Chronicles26:31 Yeria akhali mkadamu wa pidzukulu pya Hebroni. Chaka chamakumanayi Davite mbali mfumu, pidzukulu pya Hebroni pidasakwa mwadidi mwene panyandandanda wa makolo awo. Tenepo anyankhondo amphamvu a m'banja yeneyi adagumanwa kuti akukhala ku Yazere m'nthemba ya Gileadi." 
1Chronicles26:32 Mfumu Davite adasankhula akadamu amphamvu pikwi piwiri na madzana manomwe a mabanja a mbaleache Yeria mbaaikha kukhala anyakufambisa pinthu pyonsene pya chipembedzo cha MBUYA na kutumikira mfumu pakati pa Aisraele kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani m'nthemba za Rubeni, Gadi na Manase wakumabulukiro dzuwa." 
1Chronicles27:1 Uli m'tchindewu ndi nyandandanda wa akadamu a mabanja a Aisraele na akadamu a madzinza na mathubu awo ale akhafambisa pya ufumu. Mwezi na mwezi gulu inango ya anthu pikwi makumawiri na pinayi ikhapita kaphata basa pansi pa mkadamu wa mwezi wenewo. 
1Chronicles28:1 Mfumu Davite adatonga kuti mathubu onsene a Israele agumanyikane mu Yerusalemu. Natenepo mathubu onsene a m'madzinza, mathubu onsene akufambisa pya ufumu, akadamu a mabanja, anyakuyang'anira pinthu na pifuyo pya mfumu na anache, pabodzi pene na mathubu onsene a kunyumba yachifumu, anyankhondo akuveka, na amuna akufunika adagumanyikana mu Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles28:2 Davite adaimira pamaso pawo mbalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Abale anga ngavani pinalonga inepi. Ine ndikhapifuna pyakwanga kumanga nyumba yakukhazikamo Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA kuti ikhale chakusanjikapo manyalo a MBUYA Mulungu wathu. Ine ndikhadasasanyika kummangira nyumba," 
1Chronicles28:3 mbwenye Mulungu adandikhondesa kuchita tenepo, thangwi ine ndine nyankhondo pontho ndapha anthu azinji." 
1Chronicles28:4 MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele asankhula ine pabodzi pene na pidzukulu pyanga kuti titonge Israele kwenda na kwenda. Iye adasankhula dzinza ya Yuda kuti mwenemo mubuluke mkadamu. Tenepo pakati pa Ayuda onsene adasankhula banja yeneyi, pidamkomera MBUYA kusankhulapo ine mbandiikha kukhala mfumu wa dziko yonsene ya Israele." 
1Chronicles28:5 Iye adandipasa ana azinji, mbwenye adasankhulapo Solomoni kukhala pampando wachifumu wa MBUYA kutonga Israele." 
1Chronicles28:6 “MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, ‘Mwanako Solomoni ndiye anafuna dzandimangira nyumba. Ine ndamsankhula kuti akhale mwananga, inembo kuti ndikhale babache." 
1Chronicles28:7 Ine ndinachitisa ufumu wache kukhala okhonda mala, ngakhala anakakamira kuvera mwambo na matongero anga onsene ninga munachitira iye chinchinomu.’" 
1Chronicles28:8 “Natenepo lero anthu anga pamaso pa Mulungu wathu na mgumano onsene wa Aisraele, anthu a MBUYA, ndinakupemphani kuti muvere mwadidi mwene pyonsene pidatitonga MBUYA Mulungu wathu, towera dziko yamphonjeyi ithimize kukhala yanu ene, pontho kuti muisiyirembo mifendu inango inadzayo kuti ikhale yawo kwenda na kwenda.”" 
1Chronicles28:9 Kuna Solomoni, iye adalonga mbati, “Mwananga, ndikukupempha kuti umdziwe Mulungu wa babako mbumtumikira na mtimako onsene pontho na nzeru zako zonsene. Iye ambadziwa manyerezero na pikhumbo pyathu pyonsene. Ngakhala unaenda kuna iye, iye anakutambira; mbwenye ngakhala unabauka kubuluka kuna iye, iyembo anakusiya wekha ene kwenda na kwenda." 
1Chronicles28:10 Iwe wathema kudzindikira kuti MBUYA asankhula iwepo kuti ummangire Nyumba yakupambulika. Wangisa pontho phata basayo na chipapu.” 
1Chronicles28:11 Davite adapereka kuna Solomoni matandiko a Nyumba ya Mulungu, masubi akukoyeramo pinthu, na masubi anango, pontho na Mbuto Yakuchenesesa kumbalekererwa pyakudawa kule." 
1Chronicles28:12 Iye adampasa pontho matandiko a pyonsene pikhali na iye m'manyerezero mwache pya pintalo na masubi akuzungulira pintalopyo, pontho na masubi akukoyeramo pinthu pya m'Nyumba ya MBUYA, pontho na mitukwa yakuperekwa kuna MBUYA." 
1Chronicles28:13 Davite adampanga pya mule mwathema iye kugawa anyansembe na Alevi m'magulu, pya basa yonsene yakutumikira m'Nyumba ya MBUYA, pontho pya kuyang'anira mwadidi pinthu pyonsene pya m'Nyumba ya MBUYA." 
1Chronicles28:14 Iye adampanga pya mdida wa siliva na golidi pidathema iye kuphatisa basa kusasanyira pinthu pya m'Nyumba ya MBUYA: 
1Chronicles28:15 nyale yonsene na chakuikhira chache; 
1Chronicles28:16 mathebulu onsene asiliva, pontho thebulu yonsene yagolidi, pale pambaperekwa mikate kuna Mulungu." 
1Chronicles28:17 Iye adampanga pontho pya mdida wa golidi chadi-chadi adathema iye kuphatisa basa kusasanya pyakujobolera nyama, ndilo na makhomitcho, pontho pya mdida wa siliva adathema iye kuphatisa basa kusasanya mapalato," 
1Chronicles28:18 pya mdida wa golidi chadi-chadi adathema iye kuphatisa basa kusasanya guwa yansembe yakufukizirapo pyakununkhira, pontho kusasanya chingolo cha pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido pile pimbafuthula maphaphido awo kuphimbira Bokosi ya Chiverano." 
1Chronicles28:19 Mfumu Davite adalonga mbati, “Pyonsenepi pyalembwa malingana na mudandipangira MBUYA mwenechiroache kuti ndipichite.”" 
1Chronicles28:20 Mfumu Davite adalonga kuna mwanache Solomoni mbati, “Wangisa pontho wanga mtima. Itome basa pontho leka tawirisa chinthu na chibodzi chene kukulekesa. MBUYA, Mulungu wanga, ambatumikira ine ule anakhala nawe. Iye hanakusiya wekha tayu, mbwenye anakhala nawe mpakana umalise basa ya kumanga Nyumba ya MBUYA." 
1Chronicles28:21 Anyansembe na Alevi apaswa basa kuti aphate m'Nyumba ya Mulungu. Amuna aluso yakusiyana-siyana asasanyika kukuphedza, pontho anthu na akadamu awo onsene ali pansi pa utongi wako.”" 
1Chronicles29:1 Mfumu Davite adalonga kuna mgumano onsene mbati, “Mulungu ndiye asankhula mwananga Solomoni, kwache iye akhali wamng'ono, pontho iye nkhabe dziwisisa pinthu tayu. Basa inafunika kuti iphatwe njikulu pyakwanga, thangwi si nyumba yakukhala munthu tayu, mbwenye ndi Nyumba ya MBUYA Mulungu." 
1Chronicles29:2 Natenepo ine ndayesa-yesa kusasanyiratu pinthu pyonsene pya pa Nyumba yeneyi; golidi, siliva, nkuwa, simbi, matabwa, miyala ya onikisi na miyala yakudula ya mtundu na mtundu, pontho na miyala ya marabule." 
1Chronicles29:3 Padzulu pa pyonsenepi ine ndapereka pinthu pyanga pene, siliva na golidi, thangwi ya chipapu changa pana Nyumba ya Mulungu wanga." 
1Chronicles29:4 Ine ndapereka golidi wadidiletu wa ku Ofiri wakukwana pingolo madzana mawiri na makumawiri, pontho na siliva chadi-chadi wakukwana pingolo madzana manayi na makumasere wakuphopha naye mafufu a Nyumbayo," 
1Chronicles29:5 pontho na pinthu pyonsene pinafuna kusasanya amisiri aluso. Apo mbani pontho anafuna kupereka mwakufewa manja pyakupereka kuna MBUYA?” 
1Chronicles29:6 Kubuluka penepo akadamu a mabanja, mathubu a m'madzinza, akadamu a anyankhondo na mathubu akuyang'anira pinthu pya mfumu adapipereka okha ene kupereka" 
1Chronicles29:7 pinthu pili m'tchindemu kuti piphate basa pakumanga Nyumba yeneyi: golidi wakukwana pingolo dzana na makumanomwe, siliva wakukwana pingolo madzana matatu na makumanayi, nkuwa wakukwana pingolo madzana matanthatu na makumawiri, pontho na simbi yakukwana pingolo pikwi pitatu na madzana manayi." 
1Chronicles29:8 Ale akhali na miyala yakudula akhaipereka kuthumba ya Nyumbayo, ile ikhayang'anirwa na Yehiele Mlevi wa nkhonda Gereshoni." 
1Chronicles29:9 Anthu adapereka kuna MBUYA mwakufuna kwawo, tenepo iwo adakomerwa pyakwanga pidaona iwo kuti akhadapereka pinthu pizinji pene. Mfumu Davite ndiye adanyanya kukomerwa." 
1Chronicles29:10 Penepo pene pamaso pa mgumano onsene Mfumu Davite adakuza MBUYA mbalonga mbati, “MBUYA Mulungu wa kholo wathu Yakobo mbamukuzwe kwenda na kwenda!" 
1Chronicles29:11 Imwe ndimwe ene wamkulu pontho wamphamvu, wademelero, nyakukunda, pontho mfumu. Pyonsene pya kudzulu na pya padziko yapansi mphyanu, pontho imwe ndimwe mfumu, mtongi wa anthu onsene." 
1Chronicles29:12 Mfuma yonsene imbabulukira kuna imwe; imwe mumbatonga pyonsene na mphamvu zanu; tenepo munakwanisa kumchitisa munthu onsene kukhala wamkulu pontho wamphamvu. 
1Chronicles29:13 Natenepo Mulungu wathu tinapereka takhuta kuna imwe, pontho tinakuza dzinanu yademelero." 
1Chronicles29:14 “Ine na anthu anga ndife animbo kuti tinakwanisa kukupasani pinthu mwakufewa manja ninga tenepa, podi pyonsene pimbabulukira kuna imwe? Chachita ifechi nkhubwezera kwene chinthu chakuti ntchanu kale." 
1Chronicles29:15 Ife ndife alendo pontho anyakugwanda pyawo na njira pamaso panu ninga mudachitira makolo athu. Nsiku za moyo wathu pansi pano wakhala ninga mthunzi; nkhabe khala maka tayu. 
1Chronicles29:16 Tenepo MBUYA Mulungu wathu ife tadza na mfuma yonsene kuti iphatiswe basa kumanga Nyumbanu kuti dzinanu yakuchena ilemedzwemo, kwache pyonsene pyabulukira kuna imwe, pontho pyonsene mphyanu." 
1Chronicles29:17 Ndikupidziwa kuti imwe mumbayesa mtima wa munthu onsene mbamukomerwa na munthu wakulungama. Ine ndapereka pyonsenepi kuna imwe mwakufuna kwanga pontho mwakuona mtima, pontho ndaona anthu anu agumanyikana panowa kuti akomerwa pyakwanga kudza na pyakupereka kuna imwe." 
1Chronicles29:18 MBUYA Mulungu wa makolo athu, Abrahamu, Isake na Yakobo chitisani kupipereka kwachita anthu anuku kukhala kwamphamvu kwenda na kwenda, pontho muachitise kukhala akukhulupirika kuna imwe." 
1Chronicles29:19 Pasani mwananga Solomoni mtima wakufuna kuvera matongero, upangizi na mwambo onsene, pontho kuchita pyonsene kukumangirani Nyumba, ile pizinji pyache ndapisasanya kale.”" 
1Chronicles29:20 Kubuluka penepo Davite adalonga kuna mgumano onsene mbati, “Kuzani MBUYA Mulungu wanu.” Tenepo anthu onsene udakuza MBUYA Mulungu wa makolo awo. Iwo adalamba kulemedza MBUYA pontho Mfumu Davite." 
1Chronicles29:21 Mangwana mwache iwo adapha nyama kukhala nsembe, mbazipereka kuna MBUYA. Kubuluka penepo adazipereka kuna anthu kuti adye. Kuthimiza penepo iwo adapereka nsembe ng'ombe zimuna chikwi chibodzi, mabira achimuna chikwi chibodzi, anabira chikwi, ale adapyerezwa amumphu paguwa yansembe. Iwo adadza pontho na chakupereka cha vinyu." 
1Chronicles29:22 Natenepo pansiku yeneyo iwo adakomerwa pyakwanga pidadya na kumwa iwo pamaso pa MBUYA. Iwo adalonga kachiwiri kuti Solomoni ndi mfumu, tenepo adamdzoza na dzina ya MBUYA kukhala mtongi wawo, pontho Zadoki kukhala nyansembe." 
1Chronicles29:23 Natenepo Solomoni adapita ufumu ukhadakhazikisa MBUYA ule m'mbuto mwa Davite babache, natenepo pinthu pyache pyonsene pidamfambira mwadidi, pontho dzinza yonsene ya Israele idamvera." 
1Chronicles29:24 Mathubu onsene, anyankhondo onsene podi na ana anango a Davite adadumbira kuti anamvera Solomoni ninga mfumu." 
1Chronicles29:25 MBUYA adakwiza Solomoni pyakwanga pamaso pa Aisraele onsene mbamchitisa kukhala wademelero pyakwanga kupiringana mafumu anango onsene akhadatonga Israele ale. 
1Chronicles29:26 Davite mwana Yese adatonga Israele 
1Chronicles29:27 pyaka makumanayi. Iye adatonga mu Hebroni pyaka pinomwe, pontho mu Yerusalemu pyaka makumatatu na pitatu." 
1Chronicles29:28 Iye adafa na unkhalamba wadidi, wakufuma na wakulemedzwa, tenepo mwanache Solomoni adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache." 
1Chronicles29:29 Mbiri ya Mfumu Davite kubulukira pakutoma na kumalisa kwache yalembwa m'mabukhu a maprofeti atatu: Samuele, Natani na Gadi." 
1Chronicles29:30 M'mabukhumo alembamo pya kutonga kwache, mphamvu zache na pyonsene pidachitika kuna iye, kuna Israele na kuna mafumu akuzungulira." 
2Chronicles1:1 Solomoni mwana Mfumu Davite akhadakhazikisa na mphamvu ufumu wache mu Israele, tenepo MBUYA Mulungu wache adamtsanzayisa mbamchitisa kukhala wamphamvu pyakwanga." 
2Chronicles1:2 Mfumu Solomoni adalonga kuna akadamu a anthu chikwi, anthu dzana, mathubu, akadamu a mabanja na anthu anango onsene" 
2Chronicles1:3 kuatonga kuti aende pabodzi na iye kumbuto yakupembedzerapo ku Gibeoni. Iwo adenda kweneko, thangwi kweneko nkhule kudaikhwa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, chile chidasasanya Mose, nyabasa wa MBUYA, m'thando yatchetcha." 
2Chronicles1:4 Kwache Bokosi ya Chiverano ikhali mu Yerusalemu m'chikhumbi chikhadasasanya Mfumu Davite pidadza iye nacho kubulukira ku Kiriati-Yearimu. 
2Chronicles1:5 Guwa yansembe yankuwa ile ikhadasasanya Bezalele mwana Uri mdzukuluache Huri ikhali pontho ku Gibeoni kunkhope kwa Chikhumbi cha Mulungu. Mfumu Solomoni pabodzi pene na anthu onsene adapembedza MBUYA kweneko. 
2Chronicles1:6 Kunkhope kwa chikhumbicho mfumu adapembedza MBUYA pakupereka nsembe paguwa ya yankuwa; iye adapha nyama chikwi chibodzi mbazipyereza zamumphu zonsenezo. 
2Chronicles1:7 Mosiku wenewo Mulungu adaonekera kuna Solomoni mbalonga mbati, “Pempha chinthu chonsene chinafuna iwe kuti ndikupase.”" 
2Chronicles1:8 Solomoni adatawira mbati, “Ndzidzi onsene imwe mwaonesa kumfuna kwanu kukulu pontho kokhonda mala babanga Davite, pontho lero mwanditawirisa kukhala mfumu m'mbuto mwache." 
2Chronicles1:9 Tenepo MBUYA Mulungu, pidadumbira imwe kuna baba, pichitiseni kukwana-kwana. Imwe mwandichitisa kukhala mfumu wa anthu akuinjipa pyakwanga okhonda lengeseka," 
2Chronicles1:10 natenepo ndipaseni nzeru na udziwisi towera ndikwanise kutsogolera anthu enewa, thangwi mbani anakwanisa kutonga anthu anu azinji ninga enewa.”" 
2Chronicles1:11 Mulungu adalonga kuna Solomoni mbati, “Iwe wasankhula chinthu chadidi. M'mbuto mwa kupempha chilemedzo, penu mfuma, kuveka penu imfa ya anyamalwako, penu iwe ukhale na moyo wakulapha, iwe wasankhula nzeru na udziwisi kuti ukwanise kutonga anthu anga, ale adakuchitisa ine kuti ukhale mfumu wawo." 
2Chronicles1:12 Ndinati ndikupase nzeru na udziwisi. Padzulu pa penepi, ndinati ndikupase chilemedzo chikulu, mfuma, na kuveka kupiringana mafumu akhatonga m'ndulimu, pontho kupiringana anafuna dzatonga m'tsogolo muno.”" 
2Chronicles1:13 Natenepo Mfumu Solomoni adabuluka pambuto yakupembedzerapo pale pa Gibeoni, kule kukhali Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, mbabwerera ku Yerusalemu. Kweneko iye adatonga Israele." 
2Chronicles1:14 Solomoni adagumanyisa pingolo chikwi chibodzi na madzana manayi, pontho na akavalo pikwi khumi na piwiri. Anango a iwo adaakoya mu Yerusalemu, anangombo onsene adaaikha m'mizinda yakusiyana-siyana." 
2Chronicles1:15 Pandzidzi ukhatonga Solomoni, siliva na golidi akhali nadza-nadza mu Yerusalemu ninga miyala, pontho miti yamkungudza ikhali dala-dala ninga miti enembo pyayo yamkuyu yakumera m'tchinde mwa phiri ya Yuda." 
2Chronicles1:16 Akavalo a Solomoni adachita kugulwa na anyamalonda a mfumu kubulukira ku Iguputo na ku Kue. 
2Chronicles1:17 Iwo adagula pingolo kubulukira ku Iguputo pa konta ya kobiri zasiliva madzana matanthatu kada chingolo, na akavalo pa konta ya kobiri zasiliva dzana ibodzi na makumashanu kada kavalo. Iwombo akhagulisa pinango kuna mafumu onsene a Ahiti na Aaramu." 
2Chronicles2:1 Mfumu Solomoni adanyerezera kumanga nyumba yakupembedzeramo MBUYA, pontho na kumanga nyumbache ene ya chifumu." 
2Chronicles2:2 Iye adaikha amuna pikwi makumanomwe kukhala anyakuthukula pinthu, amuna pikwi makumasere akhali anyakucheketeza miyala. Pakhali amuna pikwi pitatu na madzana matanthatu ale basawo ikhali yakuyang'anira basa yeneyi." 
2Chronicles2:3 Solomoni adatumiza mphangwa kuna Mfumu Hiramu wa ku Turo mbati, “Tendeni tigulisane pinthu ninga mudachitira imwe na babanga Mfumu Davite pidamgulisa imwe miti yamkungudza kumangira nyumbache yachifumu." 
2Chronicles2:4 Ine ndikumanga nyumba yakupembedzeramo MBUYA, Mulungu wanga. Yeneyi inakhala mbuto yakupambulika pyakwanga kule kunafuna anthu anga na ine ene dzapembedza MBUYA pakufukiza pyakununkhira, kule kunafuna ife dzapereka mikate yakupambulika kuna iye kawiri-kawiri, pontho kule kunafuna ife dzapereka nsembe zakupyerera kumachibese na kumawulo nsiku na nsiku kuthimizapo Nsiku Yakupuma, Phwando yakusekera Kubalwa kwa mwezi, na maphwando anango akusankhulika a MBUYA Mulungu wathu. Iye adatonga Israele kuchita penepi ndzidzi onsene." 
2Chronicles2:5 Ine ndikufuna kumanga nyumba ikulu, thangwi Mulungu wathu ngwamkulu pyakwanga kupiringana milungu inango yonsene." 
2Chronicles2:6 Kwache nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene anakwanisa kummangira nyumba, podi na kudzulu kwene, penu kudzululetu iye nkhabe kwanisa kukwanamo. Apo ine ndine ani kuti ndinakwanisa kummangira nyumba, mbwenye kuti ikhale mbuto ene basi yakuperekerapo nsembe zakupyerera kuna iye." 
2Chronicles2:7 Natenepo nditumizire misiri waluso pakuphatisa basa golidi, siliva, nkuwa na simbi, pakusasanya nguwo zachoza, msuzi wanyemba na kufira, pontho nyaluso pakugoba. Iye anaphata basa pabodzi na amisiri a mu Yuda na Yerusalemu adasankhula babanga Davite ale." 
2Chronicles2:8 Ine ndikupidziwa kuti amunako ana luso pyakwanga pakugwanda miti, natenepo nditumizirembo miti yamkungudza, mbira, na mbawa wa ku Lebanoni. Ine ndasasanyika kukutumizira amunanga kuti aphedzane na amunako" 
2Chronicles2:9 kusasanya matabwa azinji, thangwi nyumba inafuna ine kumanga inakhala ikulu pontho yakubalika." 
2Chronicles2:10 Ine ndinapereka kuna anyabasako, ale akugwanda miti, tirigu wakukwana pingolo pikwi pinayi, barele wakukwana pingolo pikwi pinayi, vinyu wakukwana mabuyawu pikwi makumasere, pontho na mafuta akukwana mabuyawu pikwi makumasere.”" 
2Chronicles2:11 Mfumu Hiramu adatumiza kalata kuna Solomoni kumtawira. Iye adalemba kuti, “Na thangwi yakuti MBUYA ambafuna anthu ache, iye akuchitisa kukhala mfumu wawo." 
2Chronicles2:12 Mbakuzwe MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele, Nyakulenga kudzulu na dziko yonsene yapansi! Iye apereka kuna Mfumu Davite mwana wanzeru, wakuvesa pinthu, pontho waluso, ule chinchino anyerezera pyakumangira MBUYA nyumba pontho na nyumbache yachifumu." 
2Chronicles2:13 Ine ndikukutumizira misiri waluso pyakwanga, ule dzinache ndi Huramu-Abi." 
2Chronicles2:14 Mache akhali wa dzinza ya Dani, mbwenye babache akhali mzika ya Turo. Iye ana luso pakuphatisa basa golidi, siliva, nkuwa, simbi, miyala na miti. Iye anakwanisa kuphatisa basa nguwo yachoza, msuzi wanyemba, na wakufira, pontho na nguwo yakufewa. Iye anakwanisa kuphata mabasa a mtundu onsene akugoba, pontho kuchita chonsene chinampanga imwe malingana na matandiko ache. Iye mbaphate basa pabodzi na amisiri ako, pontho na ale adasankhula babako Mfumu Davite." 
2Chronicles2:15 Natenepo titumizire tirigu, barele, vinyu, na mafuta aolivi pidadumbira imwe kutipasa pile." 
2Chronicles2:16 Ife tinagwanda miti yonsene yamkungudza inafuna imwe m'mapiri a Lebanoni; tenepo tinaimanga ninga khangala mbatiibelusa pa bara mpakana ku Yopa. Kubuluka penepo munakwanisa ikwata kwenda nayo ku Yerusalemu.” 
2Chronicles2:17 Mfumu Solomoni adachita kalembera wa alendo onsene akhakhala m'dziko ya Israele sasawa ninga ontho adachita babache Davite. Alendo akukhazikika m'dzikomo akhalipo pikwi dzana na makumashanu na pitatu pontho na madzana matanthatu. 
2Chronicles2:18 Iye adaikha pikwi makumanomwe a iwo kukhala anyakuthukula pinthu, amuna pikwi makumasere kukhala anyakucheketeza miyala m'mapiri, mbasankhula amuna pikwi pitatu na madzana matanthatu kukhala anyakuyang'anira kuonesesa kuti basa yaphatwa." 
2Chronicles3:1 Mfumu Davite, babache Solomoni, akhadasankhula kale mbuto yakumangapo Nyumba ya Mulungu. Mbuto yache ikhali mu Yerusalemu paphiri ya Moria kule kudaonekera MBUYA kuna Davite, pambuto pale Arauna Myebusi akhaphatisapo basa ninga mbuwa ya tirigu. Mfumu Solomoni adaitoma basa ile" 
2Chronicles3:2 pansiku yachiwiri ya mwezi wachiwiri wa chaka chachinayi iye mbali mfumu. 
2Chronicles3:3 Nyumba ya Mulungu idamanga Mfumu Solomoni ulaphiache ukhali makhono makumawiri na anomwe, umimbache ukhali makhono mafemba." 
2Chronicles3:4 Kukula kwa subi ya pamsuwo kukhali ninga umimba wa nyumbayo makhono khumi, pontho chengo chache chikhali makhono khumi. M'bwalo mwa nyumba mudaphophwa na golidi chadi-chadi." 
2Chronicles3:5 Mafufu a subi ikulu adaphophwa na mapembo amkungudza ale adaphophwa na golidi chadi-chadi mbathemeserapo na pithunzi-thunzi pya miti yamchindu na mangalade. 
2Chronicles3:6 Mfumu adathemesera m'nyumbamo na miyala yakubalika yakudula pontho na golidi wakuchita kugulwa kubulukira m'dziko ya Paravaimu. 
2Chronicles3:7 Iye adaphatisa basa golidi kuphopha mafufu a nyumbayo, mitandache ya pansoyi na ya pamsuwo, pontho na misuwo yache ene. M'mafufu adajembamo pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido." 
2Chronicles3:8 Subi ya m'bwaloletu, ile imbachemerwa Mbuto Yakuchenesesa, ulaphiache ukhali makhono mafemba, umimbache ukhali makhono mafemba, ule ukhali sasawa na umimba wa Nyumba yonseneyo. Golidi wakulemera makilogramu pikwi makumawiri adaphatiswa basa kuphopha mafufu a Mbuto Yakuchenesesa." 
2Chronicles3:9 Mapedego adasasanywa na golidi wakulemera magramu madzana mashanu na makumanomwe kada pedego. Mafufu a masubi a padzulu adaphophwa pontho na golidi. 
2Chronicles3:10 Mfumu adatonga amunache akhaphata basa ale kuti asasanye pyakulengwa piwiri pyakukhala na maphaphido pyasimbi, mbapikukutiza na golidi, na kupiikha m'Mbuto Yakuchenesesa." 
2Chronicles3:11 Kweneko adapiimisa mwakuyang'ana kumsuwo, chibodzi kumabzere chinangocho kumadyo. Pyonsene pikhali na maphaphido awiri awiri. Phaphido ibodzi kulapha kwache kukhali makhono mawiri. Maphaphidowo adafuthulwa towera aphatane pakati pa subiyo, uku anangowa akhuye mafufu ku makhundu onsene awiri. Onsene pidafuthula iwo, ulaphiache udakwana makhono mafemba, kukwaniratu umimba onsene wa nyumbayo." 
2Chronicles3:12  
2Chronicles3:13  
2Chronicles3:14 Chinguwo chakutchinga nacho Mbuto Yakuchenesesa chidasasanywa na usalu wakufewa wakuikhwa tinta yachoza, msuzi wanyemba, na yakufira mbichilukwa mwakuchithemesera na pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido pile." 
2Chronicles3:15 Mfumu adasasanyisa nsanamira ziwiri, ibodzi ulaphiache ukhali makhono khumi na ashanu pontho na kati ya khono, mbaziikha kunkhope kwa nyumbayo. Mphanda zache chengo chache chikhali makhono mawiri kada mphanda." 
2Chronicles3:16 Padzulu pa nsanamirazo padathemeserwa na mangalade, pontho na ntheme zankuwa dzana." 
2Chronicles3:17 Nsanamirazo zidaikhwa pamsuwo wa nyumbayo. Nsanamira yakumwera adaithula Yakini, inangombo yakumpoto adaithula Boazi." 
2Chronicles4:1 Mfumu Solomoni akhadasasanyisa guwa yansembe yankuwa, ile ulaphiache na umimbache ikhali sasawa makhono mafemba, pontho chengo chache chikhali makhono manayi na kati ya khono." 
2Chronicles4:2 Iye adasasanya pontho phiso ikulu yankuwa yakukoyeramo madzi. Kuzwika kwache kukhali makhono mawiri na dzanja ibodzi; milomo yache ikhali makhono manayi; manungo ache akhali makhono khumi na matatu na dzanja ibodzi. 
2Chronicles4:3 Kuzungulira minenwa ya phisoyo kunsi adaikhako mizere miwiri yakuthemesera yakuchita kusanjikizana. Pyakuthemeserapyo pikhaoneka ninga ng'ombe zimuna, zile zikhadaumbirwa kubodzi kwene na phiso ikuluyo." 
2Chronicles4:4 Phisoyo adaithikitiza pamsana pa ng'ombe zimuna zankuwa khumi na ziwiri, zitatu kuyang'ana kumpoto, zitatu kuyang'ana kumadokero dzuwa, zitatu kuyang'ana kumwera, pontho zitatu kuyang'ana kumabulukiro dzuwa." 
2Chronicles4:5 Ntchindu ya phiso ikuluyo ikhali ninga pyala pinayi. Milomo yache ikhali ninga milomo ya khomitcho, yakufuthukira kunja ninga masamba a maluwa a m'madzi. Chinthu chenechi chikhakoya madzi akukwana nkhali pikwi pitatu." 
2Chronicles4:6 Iwo adasasanya pontho pyakusambiramo khumi, pishanu adapiikha kumwera, pinango pishanu adapiikha kumpoto kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu. Penepi basache ikhali kutsukira makhundu anango a nyama ale akhadaperekwa kukhala nsembe yakupyerera. Madzi akhali m'phiso ikulu ale akhali a anyansembe kuti aaphatise basa angafuna kusamba." 
2Chronicles4:7 Iwo adasasanya pyakuikhirapo nyale khumi pyagolidi malingana na msasanyiro wache, mbapiikha m'Nyumba ya Mulungu pishanu kukhundu yakumwera, pinango pishanu kumpoto." 
2Chronicles4:8 Iwo adasasanya mathebulu khumi mbaaikha m'Nyumba ya Mulungu mashanu kukhundu yakumwera, anango mashanu kumpoto. Iwo adasasanya pontho ndilo dzana zagolidi zakuwazira chiropa." 
2Chronicles4:9 Iwo adasasanya chintalo cha m'bwalo cha anyansembe, pontho na chintalo cha kunja. Misuwo ya pintalo pidakhwazwa na nkuwa." 
2Chronicles4:10 Phiso ikulu ile idaikhwa chifupi na nkhomo ya Nyumba ya Mulungu kumwera kumabulukiro dzuwa. 
2Chronicles4:11 Huramu-Abi adasasanya pontho pikalango, mafosholo, na ndilo. Iye adamalisa kusasanya pinthu pyonsene pidadumbira iye kuna Mfumu Solomoni kuti anapisasanya pa Nyumba ya Mulungu pile: Nsanamira ziwiri Mphanda ziwiri zakukhala ninga ndilo padzulu pa nsanamira. Pyakuthemesera piwiri pyakuoneka ninga mangalade pamphanda ziwiri; Pyakuthemesera pyakuoneka ninga ntheme madzana manayi, kuikha madzana mawiri m'mizera miwiri kada mphanda ibodzi padzulu pa mangalade; Pigudumu khumi Pyakusambiramo khumi Phiso ikulu yakukoyeramo madzi Ng'ombe zimuna khumi na ziwiri padakhazikwa phiso ikulu pale Pikalango, mafosholo na pyakujobolera nyama. Huramu misiri wamkulu adasasanya pinthu pyonsenepi na nkuwa wakuyetimira ninga montho mukhadapitongera Mfumu Solomoni, towera piphatiswe basa pa Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
2Chronicles4:12  
2Chronicles4:13  
2Chronicles4:14  
2Chronicles4:15  
2Chronicles4:16  
2Chronicles4:17 Mfumu adasasanyisa pyonsenepi pakunyungulusa nkuwa mbapiikha m'pikombole pya dongo m'phedi ya Yorodani pakati pa Sukoti na Zaretani. 
2Chronicles4:18 Pinthu pizinji pidasasanywa mwakuti nkhabe munthu adakwanisa kudziwa kulemera kwa nkuwa udaphatiswa basa ule tayu. 
2Chronicles4:19 Mfumu Solomoni adasasanya pinthu pyonsene pyagolidi pya m'Nyumba ya Mulungu: guwa yansembe, thebulu yakuikhirapo mikate yakuperekwa kuna Mulungu," 
2Chronicles4:20 pyakuikhirapo nyale na nyale zache zagolidi chadi-chadi, zile zidathema kugaka patsogolo pa Mbuto Yakuchenesesa malingana na mule mudapangirwa iye:" 
2Chronicles4:21 pyakuthemesera pya maluwa, nyale na mbano zagolidi," 
2Chronicles4:22 pyakukwizira tsakala ya nyale, ndilo na piwaya pyakufukizira pyakununkhira, pontho piwaya pyakupalira moto. Pyonsenepi pidasasanywa na golidi chadi-chadi. Misuwo ya kunja ya Nyumba ya Mulungu na misuwo ya ku Mbuto Yakuchenesesa pidakukutizwa na golidi." 
2Chronicles5:1 Pidamalisa Mfumu Solomoni basa yonsene ya pa Nyumba ya Mulungu, adaikha m'masubi akukoyeramo pinthu pya m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, pinthu pyonsene pidapambulira babache Davite kuna MBUYA; siliva, golidi na pyombo pinango." 
2Chronicles5:2 Kubuluka penepo Mfumu Solomoni adachemeresa akadamu onsene a Israele, akadamu a madzinza na a mabanja onsene kuti agumanyikane mu Yerusalemu, towera akakwate Bokosi ya Chiverano ya MBUYA kubulukira ku Zioni, mzinda wa Davite, kudza nayo ku Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
2Chronicles5:3 Aisraele onsene adagumanyikana pabodzi pene ndzidzi wa Phwando ya Misasa mwezi wachinomwe. 
2Chronicles5:4 Pidagumanyikana akadamu onsene a Aisraele, tenepo Alevi adathukula Bokosi ya Chiverano" 
2Chronicles5:5 mbadza nayo ku Nyumba ya Mulungu. Anyansembe na Alevi adathukula pontho Chikhumbi cha MBUYA pabodzi pene na pyombo pyonsene kwenda napyo ku Nyumba ya Mulungu. 
2Chronicles5:6 Mfumu Solomoni pabodzi pene na Aisraele onsene adagumanyikana patsogolo pa Bokosi ya Chiverano mbapereka nsembe mabira na ng'ombe zizinji zene zokhonda lengeseka. 
2Chronicles5:7 Kubuluka penepo anyansembe adapitisa Bokosi ya Chiverano ile m'Nyumba ya Mulungu mbakaiikha m'Mbuto Yakuchenesesa pansi pa pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido. 
2Chronicles5:8 Maphaphido awo akufuthuka ale, adaphimbira Bokosiyo na miti yache yakuthukulira." 
2Chronicles5:9 Miti ile ikhali yakulapha pyakwanga mwakuti nkhomo zache zikhakwanisa kuoniwa na m'Mbuto Yakuchenesesa patsogolo pa mbuto yakuchena ile, kwache nee zikhakwanisa kuoniwa na kunja kwa Mbuto Yakuchenesesa tayu; mitiyo na lero ili ponthopo." 
2Chronicles5:10 M'bwalo mwa Bokosi ya Chiverano ile, mukhali nkhabe chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu kupambula miyala miwiri padalembwa matongero pale, ile idaikha Mose paphiri ya Sinai ndzidzi udachita MBUYA chiverano na Aisraele pidabuluka iwo m'dziko ya Iguputo." 
2Chronicles5:11 Anyansembe onsene akhadafika penepowo nee kuwerengera kuti akhali wa m'gulu yanji tayu, onsene adapichenesa okha ene. Natenepo anyakuimba nyimbo onsene a Chilevi; Asafu, Hemani, Yedutuni na onsene a m'mabanja mwawo, adavala nguwo zakuchena zakufewa. Alevi adaimira kumabulukiro dzuwa chifupi na guwa yansembe uku akhali na nkhotcho na anyakatangale, pontho pabodzi pene na iwo pakhali anyansembe dzana na makumawiri ale akhaliza ngoma. Anyakuimba nyimbo ale akhatawirizana mwadidi mwene pakuphatisa basa ngoma, nkhotcho na pyakuimbira pinango pikhapembedza iwo MBUYA pakuimba kuti: “Kuzani MBUYA thangwi iye ngwadidi, pontho kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala.” Pikhabuluka anyansembe ale pa Nyumba ya Mulungu mwakututumusa makole akuyetimira na demelero ya MBUYA adadzala m'Nyumbamo, tenepo iwo hadathimize pontho tayu kuchita chipembedzo chikhachita iwocho." 
2Chronicles5:12  
2Chronicles5:13  
2Chronicles5:14  
2Chronicles6:1 Kubuluka penepo Mfumu Solomoni adapemphera mbati, “MBUYA imwe mwasankhula kukhala m'makole na mumdima." 
2Chronicles6:2 Lero ndakumangirani Nyumba yademelero, mbuto yanu kuti mukhalemo kwenda na kwenda.”" 
2Chronicles6:3 Aisraele onsene mbali chiliri-chiliri penepo, Mfumu adazungunukira kuna iwo mbapempha Mulungu kuti aatsanzayise." 
2Chronicles6:4 Iye adalonga mbati, “Mbakuzwe MBUYA, Mulungu wa Israele! MBUYA akoya pidadumbira iye kuna babanga Davite pidalonga iye kuna iye kuti," 
2Chronicles6:5 ‘Kutomera ndzidzi udabulusa ine anthu anga m'dziko ya Iguputo kufikirana lero, ine sidasankhule mzinda na ubodzi ene tayu m'dziko ya Israele kuti ikhale mbuto yakumangapo Nyumba towera ine ndipembedzerwemo, pontho ine sidasankhule munthu na mbodzi ene tayu kuti atsogolere anthu anga Aisraele." 
2Chronicles6:6 Mbwenye lero ndasankhula Yerusalemu kuti ikhale mbuto inafuna ine kupembedzerwapo ile, pontho ndasankhula iwe, Davite kukhala mtongi wa anthu anga.’ ”" 
2Chronicles6:7 Solomoni adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Babanga Davite akhali na chipapu kufuna kumanga nyumba kuti MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele apembedzwemo." 
2Chronicles6:8 Mbwenye MBUYA adalonga kuna iye mbati, ‘Ande, mphyadidi kuti iwe udanyerezera pyakundimangira nyumba," 
2Chronicles6:9 kwache anafuna kundimangira nyumbayo si iwe tayu, mbwenye mwanako ule ndi manungo ako pontho chiropa chako, ndiye anati andimangire nyumba.’" 
2Chronicles6:10 “Chinchino MBUYA achita pidadumbira iye pile: Ine ndapita m'mbuto mwa babanga ninga mfumu wa Israele, pontho ndamanga nyumba yakupembedzerwamo MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele." 
2Chronicles6:11 Bokosi ya Chiverano ndaiikha m'Nyumba ya Mulungu. Tenepo m'Bokosimo muna pyakulemberapo piwiri pyamiyala, chiverano chidachita MBUYA na Aisraele chile.”" 
2Chronicles6:12 Kubuluka penepo Solomoni adaimira patsogolo paguwa yansembe pamaso pa anthu mbakwiza manjache m'dzulu kupemphera. 
2Chronicles6:13 Solomoni akhadasasanyisa chiguwa chankuwa mbachiikha kati na kati pa chintalo. Makhundu onsene akhali sasawa, ulaphiache ukhali makhono mawiri, chengo chache chikhali khono ibodzi na kati ya khono. Iye adakwira pachiguwa pale mbagodama pambuto yakukwanisa kuoniwa na munthu onsene, tenepo iye adakwiza manjache m'dzulu." 
2Chronicles6:14 Iye adapemphera mbati, “MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele, nkhabe mulungu unango ninga imwe kudzulu penu padziko yapansi ponsene. Imwe mumbachita kuna anthu anu pinthu pimbadumbira imwe mbamuonesa kuafuna kwanu iwo angathimiza kuchita pinafuna imwe na mtima onsene." 
2Chronicles6:15 Imwe mwachita pidadumbira imwe kuna babanga Davite; lero mafalanu onsene akwana-kwana. 
2Chronicles6:16 Natenepo MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele, chitani pidadumbira imwe kuna babanga pidampanga imwe kutikuti ndzidzi onsene mbodzi wa pidzukulu pyache anatonga ufumu wa Israele, ngakhala iwo anachita mphole-mphole kuvera Mwambo wanu ninga mudachitirambo iye." 
2Chronicles6:17 Natenepo MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele, chitisani pyonsene pidadumbira imwe kuna nyabasanu Davite kukwana-kwana." 
2Chronicles6:18 “Ayi imwe Mulungu nkhukhaladi pansi pano na anthu? Podi na kudzulu kwene nkhabe mbuto yakukwana imwe tayu. Apo ndi tani na nyumba ing'ono yakumangirani ineyi! 
2Chronicles6:19 MBUYA Mulungu wanga, ine ndine nyabasanu. Veserani kupemphera kwanga mbamundichitire pinthu pinakupemphani ine leropi." 
2Chronicles6:20 Yang'anirani Nyumbayi mosiku na masikati. Imwe mudadumbira kuti penepa ndiye panafuna imwe kupembedzerwepo, tenepo ndivesereni pinapemphera ine mwakuyang'ana Nyumbayi." 
2Chronicles6:21 Vani kupemphera kwa nyabasanu na kwa anthu anu Israele pinapemphera iwo kuyang'ana nyumba yeneyi. Kudzulu kumbakhala imweko tivesereni mbamutilekerere. 
2Chronicles6:22 “Munthu angadawira tsanthembache mbapafunika kudumbira kuti iye hadadawe tayu, tenepo iye angadza patsogolo pa guwanu yansembe m'Nyumba mwanu muno kudumbira," 
2Chronicles6:23 MBUYA, mvesereni kudzuluko mbamuchitapo pinthu. Nyakudawayo mbatchunyuswe malingana na pinthu pyachita iye, pontho nyakukhonda dawayo mulongeni kuti iye hadadawe tayu." 
2Chronicles6:24 “Anthu anu Aisraele angakundwa kunkhondo na anyamalwawo thangwi yakukudawirani, iwo mbabwerera kuna imwe mbatawira na mulomo wawo kuti ndiwe Mulungu wawo mbapemphera kuna imwe m'Nyumba mwanu muno," 
2Chronicles6:25 avesereni kudzuluko mbamulekerera pyakudawa pya anthu anu Aisraele mbamuabwezere kudziko idapereka imwe kuna iwo na makolo awo ile. 
2Chronicles6:26 “Ngakhala kudzulu kunafungika mbakukhonda kuvumbisa mvula thangwi anthu anu akudawirani, tenepo iwo angapemphera mwakuyang'ana Nyumbayi mbatawira na mulomo wawo kuti ndimwe Mulungu wawo mbaleka pyakudawa pyawo na thangwi yakuti mwaatchunyusa," 
2Chronicles6:27 MBUYA, avesereni kudzuluko mbamulekerera pyakudawa pya anyabasanu anthu anu Aisraele, pontho afunziseni makhaliro akulungama. Tenepo MBUYA, vumbisani mvula m'dziko mwanu, idapasa imwe anthu anu kuti ikhale yawo ene ile." 
2Chronicles6:28 “Ngakhala m'dziko munagwa njala penu muliri, penu mbewu zavungika na mphepo penu na nyadzombe, penu anthu anu anasoswa na anyamalwa awo, penu pakati pawo pagwa muliri penu utenda wa mtundu onsene," 
2Chronicles6:29 veserani kupempha kwawo. Ngakhala munthu unango ene wa Aisraele anadzidzwa mumtima mwache na penepi, iye mbakwiza manjache m'dzulu kupemphera mwakuyang'ana Nyumbayi," 
2Chronicles6:30 vani kupemphera kwawo. Avesereni kudzuluko kumbuto kumbakhala imwe. Lekererani pyakudawa pyawo mbamuaphedze. Podi ndimwe ene basi ule ambadziwa pyamumtima mwa munthu, tenepo chitani kuna munthu onsene mwakuthemerana na pinthu pyaphata iye," 
2Chronicles6:31 towera anthu anu akugopeni ndzidzi onsene unakhala iwo m'dziko idapereka imwe kuna makolo athu ile. 
2Chronicles6:32 “Ngakhala mlendo pyache wakukhala kudziko yakutali anava pya ukulu wanu pontho mphamvu zanu, pontho kusasanyika kumbachita imwe ndzidzi onsene kuchita pinthu, anadza mbapemphera mwakuyang'ana Nyumbayi," 
2Chronicles6:33 mvesereni kupemphera kwache. Kudzulu kumbuto kunakhala imweko, mvesereni mbamuchite pinakupemphani iyepyo, towera madzinza onsene a padziko yapansi akudziweni mbakuverani, ninga mumbachitira anthu anu Aisraele. Penepo iwo anadziwa kuti Nyumba yakumangirani ineyi ndi mbuto yathema imwe kupembedzerwamo." 
2Chronicles6:34 “Ngakhala anthu anu aenda kunkhondo kamenyana na anyamalwawo konsene kwene kunaatuma imweko mbapemphera kuna imwe mwakuyang'ana mzinda udasankhula imwewu pontho Nyumba yakumangirani ineyi," 
2Chronicles6:35 avesereni kupemphera kwawo. Kudzuluko avesereni mbamuachitise kukunda. 
2Chronicles6:36 “Ngakhala iwo anakudawirani (thangwi nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene okhonda dawa tayu) imwe mbamuazhangalira na kuapereka m'manja mwa anyamalwawo, ale anaaphata ninga anyaperezo mbaenda nawo kudziko yakutali penu chifupi," 
2Chronicles6:37 veserani kupemphera kwa anthu anu. Ngakhala m'dziko iwo anatchunyuka mbapemphera kuna imwe kutawira na mulomo wawo kuti iwo adawadi pontho kuti achitadi pyakudawika, avesereni kupemphera kwawo MBUYA." 
2Chronicles6:38 Ngakhala m'dzikomo anatawiradi kudawa kwawo na mtima wakuona pontho mwakukhulupirika mbapemphera kuna imwe mwakuyang'ana dziko idapereka imwe kuna makolo athu ile, mzinda wasankhula imwewu, pontho na Nyumba yakumangirani ineyi," 
2Chronicles6:39 tenepo veserani kupemphera kwawo. Kudzulu kumbuto kumbakhala imweko, veserani kupemphera kwawo mbamuavere nsisi. Lekererani pyakudawa pyonsene pya anthu anu." 
2Chronicles6:40 “Chinchino Mulungu wanga, tiverenimbo nsisi ife, pontho veserani kupemphera kwachita ife panoku." 
2Chronicles6:41 Lamukani MBUYA Mulungu, pontho pabodzi pene na Bokosi ya Chiverano yakuonesa mphamvu zanu ile, pitani m'Nyumbayi mbamukhale mwenemo kwenda na kwenda. Anyansembe anu mbaphate basawo mwakulungama, pontho anthu anu onsene mbakomerwe thangwi ya udidi umbaachitira imwe." 
2Chronicles6:42 MBUYA Mulungu, lekani khonda mfumu asankhula imwe, kumbukani kumfuna kwanu kokhonda mala kukhachita imwe kuna nyabasanu Davite kule.”" 
2Chronicles7:1 Pidamala Mfumu Solomoni kupemphera, moto udatchitha kudzulu mbupyereza nsembe zikhadaperekwa zile, tenepo demelero ya MBUYA idadzala m'nyumbamo." 
2Chronicles7:2 Na thangwi yakuti m'nyumbamo mudadzala na demelero ya MBUYA anyansembe hadakwanise kupitamo tayu. 
2Chronicles7:3 Pidaona Aisraele moto ukugwa kudzulu pontho demelero ya MBUYA yadzala m'nyumbamo, iwo adagwisa nkhope zawo pansi kupembedza na kukuza MBUYA thangwi ya udidi wache pontho na kuafuna kwache anthu ache kokhonda mala." 
2Chronicles7:4 Kubuluka penepo Solomoni pabodzi pene na anthu onsene ale, adapereka nsembe kuna MBUYA." 
2Chronicles7:5 Iye adapereka ng'ombe pikwi makumawiri na piwiri, pontho mabira pikwi dzana na makumawiri ninga nsembe zachiphatizano. Natenepo iye pabodzi na anthu onsene adapambulira Nyumba ile kuna Mulungu." 
2Chronicles7:6 Anyansembe adaimira m'mbuto zawo zidapaswa iwo, tenepo Alevi adaimirambo mwakuyang'anisana na iwo, kukuza MBUYA na pyakuimbira pidapereka Mfumu Davite pontho na kuimba nyimbo zakumkuza nazo, ninga montho mukhadaapangira Davite kuti, “Kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala!” Anyansembe akhaliza ngoma uku anthu onsene adaimira." 
2Chronicles7:7 Solomoni adachitisa mbuto ya pakatiletu pa chintalo kutsogolo kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu kukhala yakupambulika, tenepo adaperekapo nsembe zamumphu zakupyerera, pyakupereka pya mapira, na mafuta a nyama za nsembe zachiphatizano zile. Iye adachita tenepo thangwi guwa yansembe yankuwa ikhadasasanya iye ile, ikhali ing'ono pyakwanga kukwanapo nsembe zonsenezi." 
2Chronicles7:8 Solomoni na Aisraele onsene adachita Phwando ya Misasa nsiku zinomwe. Penepo pakhali mwinji ukulu wakubulukira kumakata a Hamati kumpoto na kumadire a Iguputo kumwera. 
2Chronicles7:9 Iwo adamala nsiku zinomwe kuchita mwambo wakupambulira guwa yansembe kuna MBUYA, pontho nsiku zinango zinomwe kusekera Phwando ya Misasa. Tenepo pansiku yakumalisa pakhali phwando yakufunga nayo pyonsene." 
2Chronicles7:10 Mangwana mwache pansiku yamakumawiri na chitatu ya mwezi wachinomwe, Solomoni adagwinya anthu ale kwenda m'misa mwawo. Iwo adakomerwa pyakwanga na mtsanzayiso onsene ukhadapereka MBUYA kuna anthu ache Aisraele, kuna Davite na kuna Solomoni." 
2Chronicles7:11 Pidamalisa Mfumu Solomoni kumanga Nyumba ya Mulungu, pontho kumanga nyumba yachifumu, kuimalisa mwadidi mwene ninga montho mukhadapisasanyira iye," 
2Chronicles7:12 MBUYA adamuonekera na mosiku mwache. Iye adalonga kuna Solomoni mbati, “Ine ndava kupemphera kwako, tenepo ndasankhula Nyumba yeneyi kuti ikhale mbuto yakuperekeramo nsembe kuna ine." 
2Chronicles7:13 Ngakhala ine ndinakhondesa mvula, penu kutumiza nyadzombe dzadya mbewu zawo, penu kutumiza muliri pakati pa anthu anga," 
2Chronicles7:14 tenepo ngakhala, anthu ambachemerwa na dzinanga ale, anapichepesa okha ene mbapemphera kuna ine, mbasaka nkhope yanga, mbaleka pyakudawa pyawo, penepo ine ndinavesera kudzulu mbandilekerera pyakudawa pyawo na kuchitisa pinthu pyawo kufamba pontho mwadidi." 
2Chronicles7:15 Maso anga anakhala pa Nyumbayi pontho ndasasanyika kuva kupemphera konsene kunafuna dzachitika pano," 
2Chronicles7:16 thangwi ndaisankhula na kuipambula kuti ikhale mbuto yanga yakupembedzerwamo kwenda na kwenda. Maso anga na mtimanga pinakhala penepo ndzidzi onsene. 
2Chronicles7:17 Ngakhala iwe unanditumikira mwakukhulupirika ninga mudachitira babako Davite, kuvera matongero anga na kuchita pyonsene pyakutonga ine," 
2Chronicles7:18 ndinachita pidadumbira ine kuna babako Davite, pidampanga ine kuti ndzidzi onsene pidzukulu pyache pinatonga mu Israele." 
2Chronicles7:19 Mbwenye ngakhala iwe na anthu ako munakhonda kuvera mwambo na matongero akupasani inewa mbamupembedza milungu inango," 
2Chronicles7:20 penepo ine ndinakubulusani m'dziko idakupasani ineyi pontho ndinaikhonda Nyumba yapambula ine leroyi kukhala mbuto yanga yakupembedzerwamo. Konsene kwene anthu anaiyesa chinthu chakusekesa mbaichitira pyakuseluka. 
2Chronicles7:21 “Nyumbayi lero yalemedzwa pyakwanga, mbwenye pansiku yeneyo munthu onsene wakugwanda na njira anatutumuka mbavunza mbati, ‘Thangwi yache ninji MBUYA achita penepi kuna dzikoyi, pontho kuna Nyumbayi?’" 
2Chronicles7:22 Anthu anatawira kuti, ‘Ndi thangwi yakuti iwo adamkhonda MBUYA Mulungu wawo, ule adabulusa makolo awo m'dziko ya Iguputo. Iwo apipereka okha ene kuna milungu inango mbaipembedza. Ndi thangwi yache MBUYA adzesa kuvungikaku pakati pawo.’ ”" 
2Chronicles8:1 Solomoni pidamkwatira pyaka makumawiri kumanga Nyumba ya Mulungu na nyumba yachifumu. 
2Chronicles8:2 Iye adamanga pontho mizinda ikhadampasa Mfumu Huramu mbakhazikisamo Aisraele. 
2Chronicles8:3 Iye adakunda nthemba ya Hamati na Zoba 
2Chronicles8:4 mbamanga mpanda kutchinga mwadidi mzinda wa Tadimori m'thando yatchetcha. Iye adamanga pontho mizinda yonsene mu Hamati ile ikhali yakukoyeramo pinthu. 
2Chronicles8:5 Solomoni adamanga pontho mizinda ishi: Beti-Horoni wa kumtunda na Beti-Horoni wa kuphedi (Mizinda yakutchingwa na mpanda yakukhala na misuwo na mphinga zasimbi)," 
2Chronicles8:6 mzinda wa Baalati, mizinda yonsene ikhakoyera iye pinthu, pontho na mizinda kule kukhakoya iye akavalo na pingolo pyache. Pyonsene pidasasanya iye kupimanga, adapichitadi mu Yerusalemu, Lebanoni na m'nthemba zonsene zikhatonga iye." 
2Chronicles8:7 Solomoni adaphatisa basa mwakukhakhamiza pidzukulu pyonsene pya anthu a Kanani, ale adasalira khonda phiwa na Aisraele pidapokosera iwo dzikoyo kukhala yawo ene. Enewa mba: Ahiti, Aamori, Aperizi, Ahivi, na Ayebusi, ale pidzukulu pyawo ndi mabitchu na lero." 
2Chronicles8:8  
2Chronicles8:9 Mbwenye Solomoni hadaphatise Aisraele ninga mabitchu pa basache tayu; basawo ikhali ya unyankhondo, akadamu a nkhondo, akadamu a anyakutekenya pingolo pya nkhondo, pontho akadamu a anyakupakira akavalo a nkhondo." 
2Chronicles8:10 Pakhali akulu-akulu madzana mawiri na makumashanu, ale akhayang'anira anthu akhaphata basa ya mtundu na mtundu yakumanga-manga ale." 
2Chronicles8:11 Solomoni adabulusa mkazache, mwana wamkazi wa mfumu wa ku Iguputo mumzinda wa Davite kamuikha m'nyumba idammangira iye. Iye adalonga mbati, “Iye hadatheme tayu kukhala m'nyumba yachifumu ya Mfumu Davite wa Israele, thangwi mbuto yonsene yakhala Bokosi ya Chiverano njakupambulika.”" 
2Chronicles8:12 Solomoni adapereka nsembe kuna MBUYA paguwa yansembe ikhadamanga iye kunkhope kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu. 
2Chronicles8:13 Iye adapereka nsembe zakupyerera malingana na pinafuna mwambo wa Mose pansiku yonsene yakupambulika: Nsiku Yakupuma, Phwando yakusekera Kubalwa kwa Mwezi, na maphwando a chaka na chaka atatu: Phwando ya Mikate yakusowa chakufufumisira, Phwando ya Kuvuna na Phwando ya Misasa." 
2Chronicles8:14 Kuteweza matongero ali m'tchindewa, ale adaikhwa na babache Davite, iye adasasanya basa ya nsiku na nsiku ya anyansembe pontho na ya Alevi ene, ale akhaphedza anyansembe pakuimba nyimbo na pabasawo. Iye adaikha pontho anyakulondali m'misuwo ya mpanda mbapasa basa ya nsiku na nsiku pakuchita buswa-buswa pamsuwo ubodzi malingana na montho mudatongera Davite munthu wa Mulungu." 
2Chronicles8:15 Upangizi udapereka Davite kuna anyansembe na Alevi pya nyumba yakukoyeramo pinthu na pinthu pinango pikhachitwadi ninga montho mudapangirwa iwo. 
2Chronicles8:16 Pandzidzi wenewo basa yonsene ya Solomoni ikhadamala phatwa, kutomera pamaziko a Nyumba ya Mulungu mpakana kumala kwayo; basa yonsene idaphatika mwadidi mwene." 
2Chronicles8:17 Kubuluka penepo Solomoni adenda ku Ezioni-Geberi na Elati, magombe m'dziko ya Edomu." 
2Chronicles8:18 Mfumu Hiramu adamtumizira miyadiya mikulu-mikulu pansi pa utongi wa mathubu ache pontho na anyaluso pakuifambisa. Iwo adenda pabodzi pene na mathubu a Solomoni kudziko ya Ofiri mbabwerera kuna Solomoni na golidi wakukwana makilogramu pikwi khumi na pishanu. 
2Chronicles9:1 Mfumukazi wa ku Sheba adava pya kuveka kwa Mfumu Solomoni, tenepo iye adenda ku Yerusalemu kuti akamuyese pakuvunza mivunzo yakunensa. Iye adadza na mwinji ukulu wa anyabasache pabodzi pene na ngamila zakuthukula pyakukomesera muliwo, miyala yakudula na golidi mzinji ene. Pikhachedza iye na Solomoni, iye adamvunza mivunzo yonsene ikhali na iye kumtima kwache." 
2Chronicles9:2 Solomoni adatawira mivunzo yache yonsene ile; nkhabe mvunzo na ibodzi ene ukhali wakunensa kuna kuufuthula tayu. 
2Chronicles9:3 Mfumukazi wa ku Sheba adava nzeru za Solomoni mbaona nyumba yachifumu ikhadamanga iye. 
2Chronicles9:4 Iye adaona pyakudya pidaikhirwa iye pathebulu, nyumba zakugona mathubu ache, kudziwa basa kwa anyakuphata basa m'nyumbache yachifumu na pyakuvala pya pabasa pya mtundu ubodzi ene pikhavala iwo, pyakuvala pya anyabasa akhamtumikira pamaphwando ale, pontho na nsembe zidapereka iye m'Nyumba ya Mulungu. Pyonsene pidamchitisa mkazi ule kusowa chakulonga pontho kudodoma." 
2Chronicles9:5 Iye adalonga kuna mfumu mbati, “Pidava ine m'dziko mwanga pya imwe na nzeru zina imwe, mphyakuonadi!" 
2Chronicles9:6 Pidalonga iwo nee ndikhapikhulupira tayu kufikirana lero ndadza ndekha mbandiona na maso anga. Pidava inepyo nee pidakwana theka ya nzeru zanuzi tayu. Imwe ndimwe wanzeru pyakwanga kupiringana pimbalonga anthu. 
2Chronicles9:7 Ngamwayi pyakwanga amuna ambakuphatirani basa, ale ndzidzi onsene ambakhala chifupi na imwe kuvesera mafalanu anzeru!" 
2Chronicles9:8 Mbakuzwe MBUYA Mulungu wanu! Iye aonesa kuti ambakomerwa namwe pakukuchitisani kukhala mfumu kutonga na dzinache. Na thangwi yakuti iye ambafuna anthu ache Israele pontho nakuti anafuna kuakoya kwenda na kwenda, iye akuchitisani kukhala mfumu wawo towera pakhale kukoya mwambo pontho chilungamo.”" 
2Chronicles9:9 Kubuluka penepo mfumukazi ule, adapereka kuna Mfumu Solomoni mitukwa idadza na iye ile: golidi wakulemera kupiringana makilogramu pikwi pinayi, pyakukomesera muliwo pizinji pontho na miyala yakudula. Chipo nee pakhali pyakukomesera muliwo pyadidi tayu ninga pidapereka mfumukazi wa ku Sheba kuna Mfumu Solomoni." 
2Chronicles9:10 Amuna a Mfumu Hiramu na Mfumu Solomoni, ale adadza na golidi kubulukira ku Ofiri, adadza pontho na miti yamphingwe na miyala yakudula." 
2Chronicles9:11 Solomoni adaphatisa basa miti ile kusasanya nsikada za pa Nyumba ya Mulungu na panyumbache yachifumu, pontho kusasanya anyakatangale na malimba pya anyakuimba. Pinthu ninga penepi chipo nee pikhadadzati oneka tayu m'dziko ya Yuda." 
2Chronicles9:12 Mfumu Solomoni adapereka kuna mfumukazi wa ku Sheba ule pyonsene pidapempha iye. Kweneku kukhali kuthimizira papinthu pidapereka iye kuna mkazi ule ninga mitukwa yakuchinjisana na mitukwa idadza na mfumukazi ule. Kubuluka penepo mfumukazi pabodzi pene na anyabasache adabwerera kudziko ya Sheba. 
2Chronicles9:13 Chaka na chaka Mfumu Solomoni akhatambira golidi wakulemera makilogramu pikwi makumawiri na pitatu," 
2Chronicles9:14 kuthimizira pamsonkho ukhakhoma anyamalonda akufamba-famba. Mafumu a Arabia, na akulu-akulu a m'nthemba za Israele akhadza pontho na siliva pontho golidi kuna iye." 
2Chronicles9:15 Solomoni adasasanya pyakugedera matswimo pikulu-pikulu pyakukwana madzana mawiri, chonsene chidakukutizwa na golidi wakuchita kufula wakulemera makilogramu anomwe," 
2Chronicles9:16 na pyakugedera matswimo ping'ono-ping'ono madzana matatu, chonsene chidakukutizwa na golidi wakuchita kufula wakulemera makilogramu matatu. Iye adaikha pyonsenepyo m'Chinyumba chakuchemerwa Msitu wa Lebanoni." 
2Chronicles9:17 Mfumu adasasanyisa pontho mpando wachifumu. Khundu ibodzi ya mpandowo idakukutizwa na nyanga za nzowu, pontho khundu inango yakusalirayo idakukutizwa na golidi chadi-chadi." 
2Chronicles9:18 Pakhali nsikada zitanthatu kafika pampandopo, pontho pakhali chakutsamizirapo manyalo chakukukutizwa na golidi, chile chidaphatanizwa kubodzi kwene na mpandowo. Kukhundu zonsene ziwiri za mpandowo kukhali pyakusanjikira mikono, kada khundu mbakukhala mfanikizo wa nkhalamu." 
2Chronicles9:19 Pansikada pale pakhali mifanikizo ya nkhalamu khumi na miwiri, ubodzi pankhomo yonsene ya nsikada, ibodzi khundu inango, ibodzimbo khundu inangoyo. Chipo nee padzati oneka mpando unango wachifumu ninga wenewu ufumu unango tayu." 
2Chronicles9:20 Makhomitcho onsene a Mfumu Solomoni akhali akusasanywa na golidi, pontho pyombo pyonsene pya m'Chinyumba chakuchemerwa Msitu wa Lebanoni pikhali pyakusasanywa na golidi chadi-chadi. Pandzidzi wa Solomoni siliva akhayeswa ninga ntchinthu chakukhonda funika." 
2Chronicles9:21 Iye akhali pontho na miyadiya mikulu-mikulu yakufamba pa bara pabodzi pene na miyadiya ya Mfumu Hiramu. Tenepo pachaka chachitatu chonsene miyadiyacheyo ikhabwerera, uku yathukula golidi, siliva, nyanga za nzowu, mabongwe na makolo." 
2Chronicles9:22 Mfumu Solomoni akhali wakufuma pontho wanzeru pyakwanga kupiringana mafumu anango onsene padziko yapansi. 
2Chronicles9:23 Iwo onsene akhavunza nzeru kuna iye kuti ave nzeru zidampasa Mulungu zile. 
2Chronicles9:24 Munthu onsene wa iwo akhadza na mitukwa kuna Solomoni; pinthu pyakusasanywa na siliva pontho golidi, mikhanjo, pida pya nkhondo, pyakukomesera muliwo, akavalo na mabulu. Penepi pikhachitika chaka na chaka." 
2Chronicles9:25 Mfumu Solomoni akhali na masubi pikwi pinayi akukoyeramo pingolo na akavalo, pontho akhali na akavalo pikwi khumi na piwiri. Iye adapikoya pinango mu Yerusalemu, pontho pinango pyonsene adapiikha m'mizinda yakusiyana-siyana." 
2Chronicles9:26 Iye akhali na utongi pana mafumu onsene a nthemba zakubulukira kumkulo wa Yufurate, nkhwenderatu kudziko ya Afilisti mpakana ku madire a Iguputo." 
2Chronicles9:27 Pandzidzi ukhatonga Solomoni, siliva akhali nadza-nadza mu Yerusalemu ninga miyala, pontho miti yamkungudza ikhali dala-dala ninga miti enembo pyayo ya mkuyu yakumera m'tchinde mwa phiri ya Yuda." 
2Chronicles9:28 Solomoni akhagula akavalo kubulukira ku Iguputo na kubulukira kumadziko anango onsene. 
2Chronicles9:29 Mbiri yonsene ya kutonga kwa Solomoni, kutomera pakutoma kufikirana pakumalisira, idalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mprofeti Natani, m'bukhu yauprofeti wa Ahia wa ku Shilo, pontho m'bukhu ya masomphenya a mprofeti Ido, ile adalonga pontho pya kutonga kwa Mfumu Yeroboamu mwana Nebati." 
2Chronicles9:30 Solomoni adakhala mu Yerusalemu kutonga Aisraele onsene pyaka makumanayi. 
2Chronicles9:31 Iye adagonera mkono mbaikhwa m'masiye a makolo ache mumzinda wa Davite, tenepo Rehoboamu mwanache adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache." 
2Chronicles10:1 Rehoboamu adenda ku Shekemu thangwi Aisraele onsene akhadenda kweneko kampitisa ufumu. 
2Chronicles10:2 Pidapiva Yeroboamu mwana Nebati, ule akhadenda ku Iguputo kuthawa Mfumu Solomoni kule, adabwerera kwawo." 
2Chronicles10:3 Anthu a kumadzinza akumpoto adachemeresa Yeroboamu, tenepo onsene pabodzi pene adenda kuna Rehoboamu mbalonga kuna iye mbati," 
2Chronicles10:4 “Babako adatichitira pyavinga mbatimangirira goli-goli yakulemera pyakwanga m'khosi mwathu. Natenepo ngakhala iwe unachepesa basa imbaphata ife mwavinga, pontho mbulupisa goli-goli ili m'khosi mwathuyi, if tinati tikutumikire.”" 
2Chronicles10:5 Rehoboamu adatawira mbati, “Ndapiva, kwache ndokoni, mbwenye pangagwanda nsiku zitatu mudze pontho.” Natenepo anthu ale adenda pyawo." 
2Chronicles10:6 Mfumu Rehoboamu adavunza nzeru kuna akulu-akulu, ale akhadatumikira babache Solomoni pandzidzi ukhali iye na moyo. Iye adavunza mbati, “Kadi penepa anthu ale angadza ndiatawire tani?”" 
2Chronicles10:7 Akulu-akulu ale adatawira mbati, “Ngakhala iwe unakoma mtima kuna anthu enewa mbuchita pyakuakomera pakuatawira na mafala adidi, iwo anati akutumikire mwakukulemedzani ndzidzi onsene.”" 
2Chronicles10:8 Mbwenye Rehoboamu adakhonda kuvera pidampanga akulu-akulu pile mbavunza nzeru aphale anzache akhadakulira na iye pabodzi, pontho ale chinchino akhamtumikira." 
2Chronicles10:9 Iye adaavunza mbati, “Ndipangenimbo, ndiatawire tani anthu ale adandipempha kuti, ‘Tibulusire goli-goli m'khosi mwathu idatimangirira babakoyi?’ ”" 
2Chronicles10:10 Aphale anzache ale adatawira mbati, “Iwe wathema kuapanga tenepa: ‘Chala changa ching'onochi ntchikulu manungo pyakwanga kupiringana chuno cha babanga!’" 
2Chronicles10:11 Apange kuti, ‘Babanga adakuthukulisani goli-goli yakulemera, mbwenye ine ndinaichitisa kukhala yakulemera pyakwanga. Babanga adakukwapulani na mitswamu, mbwenye ine ndinakumenyani na mbalamatodya.’ ”" 
2Chronicles10:12 Pidagwanda nsiku zitatu Yeroboamu pabodzi pene na anthu onsene adenda pontho kuna Mfumu Rehoboamu ninga montho mukhadaapangira iye mule. 
2Chronicles10:13 Mfumu adatawira anthu ale mwaukali. Iye adakhonda kuvera nzeru zidampanga akulu-akulu zile," 
2Chronicles10:14 mbavera nzeru zidampanga aphale anzache zile mbalonga mbati, “Babanga adakuthukulisani goli-goli yakulemera, mbwenye ine ndinaichitisa kukhala yakulemera pyakwanga. Babanga adakukwapulani na mitswamu, mbwenye ine ndinakumenyani na mbalamatodya.”" 
2Chronicles10:15 Natenepo hadaikhe konta tayu pyakulonga pya anthu, thangwi penepi pidachitika na kufuna kwa MBUYA kuchitisa mafala adalonga iye kuna Yeroboamu mwana Nebati kudzera muna mprofeti Ahia wa ku Shilo kukwana-kwana." 
2Chronicles10:16 Pidaona Aisraele onsene kuti mfumu akhonda kuikha konta pidalonga iwo pile, adakhuwa mbati, “Ayi Davite tili nayenji ife? Ayi muna mwana Yese tinagumanamonji? Aisraele tonsene tendeni pyathu m'misa mwathu. Mulekeni Rehoboamu apiyang'anire yekha ene.” Natenepo Aisraele adapandukira," 
2Chronicles10:17 mbamsiya Rehoboamu kukhala mfumu wa anthu akhakhala m'nthemba ya Yuda ene ale basi. 
2Chronicles10:18 Mfumu Rehoboamu adatumiza Adoniramu, ule akhali mkadamu wakuyang'anira basa yakuphatwa mwakukhakhamiza kwenda kuna Aisraele, mbwenye Aisraele adamponyera miyala mbafa. Kwache Mfumu Rehoboamu adachimbiza kukwira chingolo chache mbathawira ku Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles10:19 Natenepo dzinza ya Israele njakupandukira kuna banja ya Davite mpakana lero. 
2Chronicles11:1 Pidafika Rehoboamu mu Yerusalemu adachemeresa amuna a madzinza a Yuda na Benjemani, pikwi dzana na makumasere onsene pabodzi pene, kuti akamenye nkhondo na Israele, towera ufumuwo ubwerere kuna Rehoboamu mwana Solomoni." 
2Chronicles11:2 Mbwenye MBUYA adapanga Shemaia, munthu wa Mulungu," 
2Chronicles11:3 kulonga kuna Rehoboamu mwana Solomoni mfumu wa Yuda na kuna dzinza yonsene ya Yuda na Benjemani pontho na kuna anthu onsene kuti," 
2Chronicles11:4 “Pyalonga MBUYA mphipi: Lekani kwenda kamenyana na abale anu Aisraele. Monsene ndokoni m'misa mwanu, thangwi penepi pyachitika na kufuna kwanga.” Natenepo iwo hadamenyane na Yeroboamu ninga montho mukhadaapangira MBUYA." 
2Chronicles11:5 Rehoboamu adakhala mu Yerusalemu mbamanga mipanda kuzungulira mizinda ya mu Yuda na Benjemani: 
2Chronicles11:6 Betelehemu, Etamu, Tekoa," 
2Chronicles11:7 Beti-Zuri, Soko, Adulamu," 
2Chronicles11:8 Gati, Maresha, Zifi," 
2Chronicles11:9 Adoraimu, Lakishi, Azeka," 
2Chronicles11:10 Zora, Aialoni na Hebroni." 
2Chronicles11:11 Mipandayo adaimanga mwamphamvu. Mumzinda onsene adasankhulamo mkadamu kuuyang'anira pontho mumzinda onsene adasasanya mbuto yakukoyerapo kudya, mafuta aolivi, na vinyu," 
2Chronicles11:12 pontho na pyakugedera matswimo na madipa. Na njira yeneyi iye adachitisa Yuda na Benjemani kukhala pansi pa utongi wache. 
2Chronicles11:13 Kubulukira kunthemba zonsene za Israele, anyansembe adadza kumwera ku Yuda." 
2Chronicles11:14 Alevi adasiya mbuto zawo zakudyesera pifuyo na mbuto zawo zinango mbaenda ku Yuda na Yerusalemu, thangwi Mfumu Yeroboamu na anyakupita m'mbuto mwache hadaatawirise tayu kuphata basa ninga anyansembe a MBUYA." 
2Chronicles11:15 Yeroboamu adasankhula anyansembe ache ene kuti atumikire pambuto zakupembedzerapo milungu, na kupembedzerapo mizimu yakuipa na mifanikizo ya anamphulu." 
2Chronicles11:16 Kubulukira kumadzinza onsene a Israele, anthu ale akhapifunadi na mtimawo onsene kupembedza MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele, adatewera Alevi kwenda ku Yerusalemu, towera iwo akakwanise kupereka nsembe kuna MBUYA Mulungu wa makolo awo." 
2Chronicles11:17 Penepi pidachitika kuti ufumu wa Yuda ukhale na mphamvu, tenepo pyaka pitatu iwo adakhala kunduli kwa Rehoboamu mwana Solomoni mbakhala ninga montho mukhakhalira iwo pansi pa utongi wa Mfumu Davite na Mfumu Solomoni." 
2Chronicles11:18 Rehoboamu adasemba Mahalati, ule babache akhali Yerimoti mwana Davite, pontho ule mache akhali Abihaili mwana wamkazi wa Eliabu mdzukuluache Yese." 
2Chronicles11:19 Rehoboamu na Mahalati adabala ana atatu achimuna Yeushi, Shemaria na Zahamu." 
2Chronicles11:20 Kubuluka penepo Rehoboamu adasemba pontho Maaka mwana wamkazi wa Abisalomu mbabala naye ana anayi achimuna: Abia, Atai, Ziza na Shelomiti." 
2Chronicles11:21 Kulengesa onsene pabodzi pene, Rehoboamu akhali na akazi khumi na asere, pontho akazache achibitchu makumatanthatu mbabala ana achimuna makumawiri na asere, pontho na ana achikazi makumatanthatu. Pakati pa akazache na akazache achibitchu onsene, Maaka ndiye akhali wapamtima pache." 
2Chronicles11:22 Pakati pa anache onsene Abia ndiye akhakomerwa na iye mbamsankhula kukhala nyakupita ufumu m'mbuto mwache iye angafa. 
2Chronicles11:23 Rehoboamu mwanzeru adapereka basa kuna anache achimuna mbaakhazikisa mu Yuda na Benjemani monsene; mizinda yonsene yakutchingwa na mpanda. Iye akhapereka kuna anache pyonsene pikhasowa iwo mwakufewa manja mbaasembera akazi azinji. 
2Chronicles12:1 Sindzidzi Rehoboamu nkhukhazikika ninga mfumu mbakhala na mphamvu na utongi, iye pabodzi pene na anthu ache onsene adaleka kuteweza mwambo wa MBUYA." 
2Chronicles12:2 Chaka chachishanu Rehoboamu mbali mfumu, MBUYA adaatchunyuswa thangwi ya kukhonda khulupirika kwawo kuna iye. Mfumu Shishaki wa ku Iguputo adasosa Yerusalemu" 
2Chronicles12:3 pabodzi pene na anyankhondo ache akufambisa pingolo madzana khumi na awiri, akupakira akavalo pikwi makumatanthatu pabodzi pene na anyankhondo okhonda lengeseka a ku Libia, Suku na Kushi." 
2Chronicles12:4 Iye adapokosera mizinda yakutchingwa na mpanda mu Yuda mbafika mpakana ku Yerusalemu. 
2Chronicles12:5 Mprofeti Shemaia adenda kuna Mfumu Rehoboamu na kuna akadamu a ku Yuda, ale akhadagumanyikana mu Yerusalemu kuthawa Shishaki. Iye adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Mphangwa zakubulukira kuna MBUYA nsizi: ‘Imwe mwandikhonda, inembo lero ndakukhondani mbandikuperekani m'manja mwa Shishaki.’ ”" 
2Chronicles12:6 Mfumu na akadamu ale adatawira kuti iwo adadawadi mbalonga mbati, “Pinachita MBUYA mphyakulungama.”" 
2Chronicles12:7 Pidaona Mulungu penepi adalonga pontho kuna Shemaia mbati, “Na thangwi yakuti iwo adatawira kudawa kwawo, ine sinaavungave tayu. Kwache Shishaki angadza dzamenya nawo nkhondo, anango a iwo anapulumuka. Yerusalemu nkhabe dzava maka kupha tayu na kuzhangali kwanga." 
2Chronicles12:8 Mbwenye Shishaki anati aakunde basi, towera adziwe kusiyanisa pakati pa kutumikira ine na kutumikira atongi a dziko yapansi.”" 
2Chronicles12:9 Mfumu Shishaki adadza ku Yerusalemu mbakwata mfuma yonsene ya m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, pontho na ya m'nyumba yachifumu ene. Iye adakwata pinthu pyonsene kuthimizapo pyakugedera matswimo pyagolidi pikhadasasanya Mfumu Solomoni pile." 
2Chronicles12:10 Kufuna kubwezera pinthu pidakwatwa pile, Mfumu Rehoboamu adasasanya pyakugedera matswimo pyankuwa mbapipereka m'manja mwa akadamu a anyakulondali misuwo ya nyumba yachifumu kuti apiyang'anire." 
2Chronicles12:11 Ndzidzi onsene ukhaenda mfumu ku Nyumba ya Mulungu, anyakulondali akhathukula pyakugedera matswimo pile; kubuluka penepo akhapibwezera kusubi ya anyakulondali." 
2Chronicles12:12 Na thangwi yakuti iye adavera MBUYA, tenepo MBUYA hadamtchunyuse monsene mwene tayu, natenepo pinthu pya Yuda pidafamba mwadidi." 
2Chronicles12:13 Rehoboamu adakhazikika namphamvu mu Yerusalemu ninga mfumu. Iye akhali na pyaka makumanayi na chibodzi pyakubalwa pikhapita iye ufumu wache mbatonga pyaka khumi na pinomwe mumzinda ukhadasankhula MBUYA pakati pa nthemba zonsene za Israele kuti iye apembedzwemo mule.
