Mache Rehoboamu akhali Naama wa kudziko ya Amoni," 
2Chronicles12:14 Iye adachita pinthu pyakuipa thangwi iye hadafune tayu kuchita pinthu pikhafuna MBUYA. 
2Chronicles12:15 Kulonga pya pinthu pinango pidachitika Rehoboamu mbali mfumu kutomera pakutoma kufikirana pakumalisira, pyonsene pyalembwa m'mabukhu a mprofeti Shemaia na Ido, mprofeti ule basache ikhali yakuyang'ana pya mifendu ya anthu. Pakhali nkhondo yokhonda mala pakati pa Rehoboamu na Yeroboamu." 
2Chronicles12:16 Rehoboamu adagonera mkono mbaikhwa m'masiye achifumu mumzinda wa Davite. Tenepo Abia mwanache adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache. 
2Chronicles13:1 Chaka chakhumi na chisere Yeroboamu mwana Nebati mbali mfumu wa Israele, Abia adapita ufumu wa Yuda," 
2Chronicles13:2 mbatonga mu Yerusalemu pyaka pitatu. Mache akhali Mikaia mwana wamkazi wa Uriele wa kumzinda wa Gibea. Nkhondo idaotoka pakati pa Abia na Yeroboamu. 
2Chronicles13:3 Abia adapigumanyira anyankhondo aluso pikwi madzana manayi kamenyana na Yeroboamu, ule adapigumanyirambo anyankhondo aluso pikwi madzana masere kamenyana naye." 
2Chronicles13:4 Anyankhondowa adagumanyikana m'dziko ya mapiri ya Eferemu. Mfumu Abia adakwira phiri ya Zemaraimu mbalonga mwakugaluza fala kuna Yeroboamu na Aisraele mbati, “Ngavani kuno!" 
2Chronicles13:5 Ayi imwe nkhabe kupidziwa tayu kuti MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele adachita chiverano chokhonda mala na Davite, kupereka kuna iye na pidzukulu pyache ufumu wa Israele kwenda na kwenda?" 
2Chronicles13:6 Yeroboamu mwana Nebati adasandukira Solomoni mfumu wache. 
2Chronicles13:7 Kubuluka penepo iye adagumanyisa malova akusowa basa mbakhakhamiza Rehoboamu mwana Solomoni kuchita pikhafuna iwo, ule akhali mphale, pontho okhonda kupidziwa mwadidi kuakhondera kwache." 
2Chronicles13:8 Lero mwanyerezera kumenyana na ufumu udapereka MBUYA kuna pidzukulu pya Davite ule. Imwe muna gulu ikulu ya anyankhondo, pontho muna mifanikizo ya ng'ombe yagolidi, zidasasanya Yeroboamu kuti zikhale milungu yanu zile." 
2Chronicles13:9 Imwe mudathamangisa anyansembe a MBUYA, pidzukulu pya Aroni, pontho mudathamangisa Alevi. M'mbuto mwawo imwe mudasankhulapo anyansembe anu ninga montho mumbachitira madzinza anango. Munthu onsene wakudza na ng'ombe penu mabira manomwe anakwanisa kudzozwa ninga nyansembe wa milungu yanu yakufa ile." 
2Chronicles13:10 “Mbwenye na lero ife tikutumikira basi MBUYA Mulungu wathu, pontho hatidamkhonde tayu. Anyansembe ale mphidzukulu pya Aroni akuphata mabasawo, Alevi mbaaphedza." 
2Chronicles13:11 Mosiku na machibese onsene ambapereka kuna MBUYA nsembe zakupyerera na pyakununkhira pyakufukiza. Iwo ambapereka mikate yakuchena pathebulu, pontho mosiku onsene ambagasa nyale papyakuikhirapo nyale pyagolidi. Ife timbachita pyatitonga MBUYA, mbwenye imwe mumbamkhonda." 
2Chronicles13:12 Mulungu mwenechiroache ndiye mkadamu wathu, pontho anyansembe ache ali pano na ngoma zawo kusasanyika kuziliza, pontho kutipanga kuti titome kumenya nkhondo namwe. Anthu a ku Aisraele, lekani kumenyana na MBUYA Mulungu wa makolo anu! Imwe nkhabe kwanisa kumkunda tayu.”" 
2Chronicles13:13 Pandzidzi wenewo Yeroboamu akhadatuma anyankhondo ache anango kuti akabisalire kunduli kwa anyankhondo a Yuda, towera aazungulire kuaikha pakati, uku anango ayang'anisane nawo." 
2Chronicles13:14 Anthu a ku Yuda adayang'ana-yang'ana mbaona kuti iwo adazungulirwa na anyamalwawo. Iwo adakhuwa kuna MBUYA kuti aaphedze, tenepo anyansembe adaliza ngoma." 
2Chronicles13:15 Anthu a ku Yuda adakhuwa pyakwanga, tenepo mwakutsogolerwa na Abia, iwo adatoma kumenyana nawo; Mulungu adakunda Yeroboamu na anyankhondo a Chiisraele." 
2Chronicles13:16 Aisraele adathawa pamaso pa anthu a ku Yuda, tenepo Mulungu adachitisa anthu a ku Yuda kukunda Aisraele." 
2Chronicles13:17 Abia na anyankhondo ache adakunda Aisraele mwakuchita ninga kuapeya; pikwi madzana mashanu anyankhondo akunyindirika a Israele adaphiwa nsiku yeneyo. 
2Chronicles13:18 Natenepo anthu a ku Yuda adakunda Aisraele thangwi iwo adanyindira MBUYA Mulungu wa makolo awo. 
2Chronicles13:19 Abia adathamangisa anyankhondo a Yeroboamu mbakwata mizinda yawo: Betele, Yeshana, Eferoni na midzi yakuzungulira mizinda yeneyi." 
2Chronicles13:20 Yeroboamu hadakhale pontho na mphamvu tayu pandzidzi ukhatonga Abia. Pakumalisira pache MBUYA adamkhamwadza mbafa. 
2Chronicles13:21 Kwache Abia adathimiza kukhala na mphamvu pyakwanga. Iye akhali na akazi khumi na anayi mbabala ana achimuna makumawiri na awiri, pontho na ana khumi na atanthatu achikazi." 
2Chronicles13:22 Mbiri inango yonsene ya Abia na pinthu pidalonga na pidachita iye pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mprofeti Ido. 
2Chronicles14:1 Mfumu Abia adagonera mkono mbaikhwa m'masiye achifumu mumzinda wa Davite. Mwanache Asa ndiye adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache. Tenepo pansi pa utongi wa Asa, dziko ikhali pamtendere pyaka khumi." 
2Chronicles14:2 Asa adachitisa MBUYA Mulungu wache kukomerwa pakuchita pinthu pyakulungama pontho pyadidi. 
2Chronicles14:3 Iye adabulusa maguwa ansembe achilendo na mbuto zakupembedzerapo milungu mbagomola piguwa pyakupambulika, pontho adagwisa adzimunthu a milungu Ashera." 
2Chronicles14:4 Iye adatonga anthu a ku Yuda kuchita pinthu pikhafuna MBUYA Mulungu wa makolo awo na kuvera pifunziso pyache pontho na matongero ache. 
2Chronicles14:5 Na thangwi yakuti iye adavunga mbuto zakupembedzerapo milungu na maguwa akufukizirapo pyakununkhira m'mizinda yonsene ya Yuda, ufumu ukhali pamtendere pansi pa utongi wache." 
2Chronicles14:6 Pandzidzi wenewo iye adamanga mipanda yakutchinga nayo mizinda ya Yuda, pontho padamala pyaka pizinji okhonda khala nkhondo, thangwi MBUYA adaachitisa kukhala pamtendere." 
2Chronicles14:7 Iye adalonga kuna anthu a ku Yuda mbati, “Tendeni timange mipanda kutchinga nayo mizinda, nsanja pontho na misuwo na mphinga zasimbi. Ife tina utongi padziko yathu, thangwi tachita pinthu pyakukomera MBUYA Mulungu wathu. Iye atitchinjiriza na kutiyang'anira mwadidi kukhundu zonsene.” Natenepo iwo adamanga, pontho pinthu pyawo pidaafambira mwadidi." 
2Chronicles14:8 Mfumu Asa akhali na anyankhondo pikwi madzana matatu akubulukira kudzinza ya Yuda akukhala na pyakugedera matswimo na madipa, pontho na anyankhondo pikwi madzana mawiri na makumasere akubulukira kudzinza ya Benjemani akukhala na pyakugedera matswimo na mauta. Onsene akhali amuna akuwanga mtima pontho akufunziswa mwadidi basawo." 
2Chronicles14:9 Munthu unango wa Chikushi dzinache Zera adenda kachita nkhondo na Yuda mbafika mpakana ku Maresha. Iye akhali ana anyankhondo ache pikwi-pikwi na pingolo pya nkhondo madzana matatu. 
2Chronicles14:10 Asa adalamuka kamenyana nawo, tenepo iwo adakhala m'mbuto zawo zankhondo m'phedi ya Zefata chifupi na Maresha." 
2Chronicles14:11 Asa adapemphera kuna MBUYA Mulungu wache mbati, “MBUYA, nkhabe pontho unango ninga imwe tayu wakuphedza anyankhondo akusowa mphamvu kumenyana na anyankhondo amphamvu. Tiphedzeni MBUYA Mulungu wathu thangwi ife tikunyindira imwepo, tenepo ife tadza na dzinanu dzachita nkhondo na chimwinji cha anyankhondochi. MBUYA imwe ndimwe Mulungu wathu; nkhabe munthu pyache anakwanisa kukundani tayu.”" 
2Chronicles14:12 MBUYA adakunda Akushi pamaso pa Asa na anthu a ku Yuda. Anthu a ku Kushi adathawa," 
2Chronicles14:13 tenepo Asa na anyankhondo ache adaathamangisa mpakana ku Gerari. Anyankhondo azinji a ku Kushi adaphiwa nsiku yeneyo. Iwo adakundwa pamaso pa MBUYA na anyankhondo ache. Amuna a ku Yuda adathukula pinthu pizinji pidapokosera iwo pile. 
2Chronicles14:14 Iwo adavunga maluwani onsene akuzungulira Gerari, thangwi ukali wa MBUYA ukhadaagwera. Iwo adapokosera maluwani ale mbakwata pinthu pizinji pya mwenemo." 
2Chronicles14:15 Iwo adasosa pontho msasa wa makabuswa mbakwata mikumbi ya mabira, mbuzi na ngamila. Kubuluka penepo adabwerera ku Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles15:1 Mzimu wa Mulungu adagudumira Azaria mwana Odedi," 
2Chronicles15:2 tenepo iye adenda kagumanikana na Mfumu Asa. Iye adachemera mbati, “Ngavani kuno Mfumu Asa na anthu onsene a ku Yuda na Benjemani! MBUYA ali namwe ndzidzi onsene unakhala imwe na iye. Ngakhala munamsaka, munamgumana, kwache mungabauka kubuluka kuna ife, iye anakusiyani mwekha." 
2Chronicles15:3 Ndzidzi ukulu ene Israele hakhapembedza Mulungu wakuonadi tayu. Iwo akhali nkhabe anyansembe akuafunzisa, pontho akhali akusowa mwambo." 
2Chronicles15:4 Mbwenye pidadza nyatwa, iwo adazungunukira kuna MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele. Iwo adamsaka-saka mbamgumana." 
2Chronicles15:5 Nsiku zenezo nkhabe munthu akhakwanisa kudza mbaenda mumtendere tayu, thangwi m'dziko monsene mukhali nyatwa na kukhonda vana." 
2Chronicles15:6 Dziko kupondereza dziko inango; mzinda kupondereza mzinda unango, thangwi Mulungu ndiye akhadadzesa nyatwa na kusanyika kuna iwo," 
2Chronicles15:7 mbwenye imwe mwathema kukhala akuwangisa pontho lekani taya mtima. Basa inaphata imweyi munafupwa nayo.” 
2Chronicles15:8 Pidava Asa mphangwa za uprofeti zidalonga Azaria mwana Odedi, adawangiswa nazo mtima. Iye adabulusa mifanikizo yonsene m'dzikomo ya Yuda na Benjemani, pontho na mifanikizo yonsene ya m'mizinda idapokosera iwo kudziko ya m'mapiri ya Eferemu. Iye adasasanya pontho guwa yansembe ya MBUYA, ile ikhali muchintalo cha Nyumba ya MBUYA." 
2Chronicles15:9 Anthu azinji akubulukira kumadzinza a Eferemu, Manase na Simioni adadza kukhala kukhundu ibodzi na Asa mbakhala muufumu wache, thangwi iwo adaona kuti MBUYA Mulungu wache akhali naye. Asa adachemeresa anthu onsenewo pabodzi pene na anthu a ku Yuda na Benjemani." 
2Chronicles15:10 Iwo adagumanyikana mu Yerusalemu mwezi wachitatu chaka chakhumi na chishanu Asa mbali mfumu. 
2Chronicles15:11 Pansiku yeneyo iwo adapereka nsembe kuna MBUYA kubulukira pa pinthu pidapokosera iwo kunkhondo; ng'ombe madzana manomwe na mabira pikwi pinomwe. 
2Chronicles15:12 Iwo adasasanya chiverano mbatawirizana kupembedza MBUYA Mulungu wa makolo awo na mtimawo onsene pontho na moyo wawo onsene. 
2Chronicles15:13 Munthu onsene, mwana penu mkulu, mkazi penu mamuna, ule hadapembedze MBUYA tayu athema kuphiwa." 
2Chronicles15:14 Iwo adadumbira mwakugaluza fala na dzina ya MBUYA kuti iwo anakoya chiveranocho. Kubuluka penepo iwo adakhuwa mbaliza ngoma. 
2Chronicles15:15 Anthu onsene a ku Yuda adakomerwa pyakwanga thangwi iwo adasasanya chiveranochi na mtimawo onsene. Iwo pidaakomera kupembedza MBUYA, tenepo iye adaatawira mbaachitisa kukhala pamtendere kumakhundu onsene." 
2Chronicles15:16 Mfumu Asa adabulusa pa chidzo chache cha ufumukazi mbuyache wamkazi Maaka, thangwi iye adachita chinthu chakudawika chikulu pakusasanya mfanikizo wa milungu Ashera. Asa adagwisa mfanikizo ule mbamala kuupandula, tenepo adaupisa moto m'phedi ya Kidroni." 
2Chronicles15:17 Podi kwene kuti Asa hadavunge mbuto zonsene zakupembedzerapo milungu tayu, iye adathimiza basi kukhala wakukhulupirika pamaso pa MBUYA moyo wache onsene." 
2Chronicles15:18 Iye adaikha m'Nyumba ya Mulungu pinthu pyonsene pikhadapambulira Abia babache kuna Mulungu, pabodzi pene na pyombo pyagolidi na siliva pidapambulirambo iye mwenechiro kuna Mulungu." 
2Chronicles15:19 Pakhali nkhabe pontho nkhondo mpakana chaka chamakumatatu na chishanu Asa mbali mfumu. 
2Chronicles16:1 Chaka chamakumatatu na chitanthatu Asa mbali mfumu wa Yuda, Mfumu Baasha wa Israele adachita nkhondo na Yuda mbamanga mpanda kuzungulira Rama kukhondesa anthu kupita penu kubuluka mu Yuda." 
2Chronicles16:2 Natenepo Asa adakwata siliva na golidi m'masubi mukhokoyiwa mfuma m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, pontho na m'nyumba yachifumu ene mbapitumiza ku Damasiko kuna Beni-Hadadi mfumu wa Aramu na mphangwa zakuti:" 
2Chronicles16:3 “Mbapakhale ushamwali pakati pa iwe na ine ninga mukhali ipyo pakati pa babanga na babako. Yang'ana, ndinatumiza kuna iwe siliva na golidi. Natenepo malisa ushamwaliako na Baasha mfumu wa Israele, towera iye aleke kumenyana nane.”" 
2Chronicles16:4 Mfumu Beni-Hadadi adaphatizana na manyerezero a Mfumu Asa wa Yuda ale. Tenepo iye adatuma akadamu ankhondo na anyankhondo awo kachita nkhondo m'maluwani a Israele. Iwo adakunda Iyoni, Dani, Abele-Beti-Maaka na mizinda yonsene mukhakoyera pinthu pya Nafitali ile." 
2Chronicles16:5 Pidava Baasha pikhachitika pile, adaleka kumanga mpanda kuzungulira Rama mbaisiyira panjira basacheyo." 
2Chronicles16:6 Kubuluka penepo Mfumu Asa adadza na amuna onsene a ku Yuda mbakwata miyala na matabwa kubulukira ku Rama, pinthu pikhaphatisa basa Baasha pile. Na pinthu penepyo Asa adamangirambo mizinda ya Geba na Mizipa." 
2Chronicles16:7 Ndzidzi wenewo mprofeti Hanani adadza kuna Asa mfumu wa Yuda mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Na thangwi yakuti imwe mwanyindira mfumu wa Aramu m'mbuto mwa kunyindira MBUYA Mulungu wanu, anyankhondo a mfumu wa Aramu akuthawirani." 
2Chronicles16:8 Ayi Akushi na Alibia hakhali anyankhondo amphamvu pontho hakhali na pingolo pyakuinjipa, pontho na anyakupakira akavalo azinji ene tayu? Kwache na thangwi yakuti mudanyindira MBUYA, iye adaapereka m'manja mwanu." 
2Chronicles16:9 Thangwi maso a MBUYA ambakhala ponsene pene m'dziko yonsene yapansi kuwangisa mtima anthu, ale apereka mtimawo kwamumphu kuna iye. Imwe mwachita chinthu chakupupwa pyakwanga. Kutomera lero kwenda m'tsogolo munati mukhale pankhondo.”" 
2Chronicles16:10 Asa adamzhangalira pyakwanga mprofeti ule thangwi ya penepi; iye adamponya m'perezo. Na ndzidzi onthowo Asa adatoma kuboneresa anthu anango mwavinga. 
2Chronicles16:11 Pyonsene pidachitika Asa mbali mfumu kutomera pakutoma mpakana kumamalisiro pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Yuda na Israele. 
2Chronicles16:12 Chaka chamakumatatu na chifemba Asa mbali mfumu, iye adalamazwa na utenda wa padzinyalo; podi kwene kuti pikhali tenepo, iye hadazungunukire kuna MBUYA kuti amphedze tayu, mbwenye adenda pyache mwa ng'anga." 
2Chronicles16:13 Pidagwanda pyaka piwiri iye adagonera mkono 
2Chronicles16:14 mbaikhwa m'masiye amwala adapisemera iye yekha ene mumzinda wa Davite. Iwo adaphatisa basa mafuta na pyakununkhira kusasanya napyo mtembo wache pikhauikha iwo m'masiye. Iwo adaphatisa moto wa nkhuni zizinji kulira thangwi ya kufa kwache. 
2Chronicles17:1 Yehosafati adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwa babache Asa mbawangisa ufumu wache kupokanyisana na Israele. 
2Chronicles17:2 Iye adaikha magulu anyankhondo m'mizinda yakutchingwa na mpanda ya Yuda, m'midzi ya Yuda, pontho na m'mizinda ikhadapokosera Asa babache m'nthemba ya Eferemu." 
2Chronicles17:3 MBUYA adatsanzayisa Yehosafati thangwi papyaka pyache pyakutoma iye adateweza makhaliro a babache; iye hadapembedze milungu Baala tayu. 
2Chronicles17:4 Iye adatumikira Mulungu wa babache mbavera matongero a Mulungu, pontho iye hadachite ninga mudachitira mafumu anango a Israele tayu." 
2Chronicles17:5 MBUYA adapasa Yehosafati utongi wamphamvu pana ufumu wa Yuda, tenepo anthu onsene adadza kuna iye na mtukwa mwakuti adafuma pyakwanga pontho adalemedzwa pikulu." 
2Chronicles17:6 Iye akhateweza njira za MBUYA mwakupipereka. Kuthimiza penepo iye adavunga mbuto zakupembedzerapo milungu na adzimunthu a milungu Ashera mu Yuda. 
2Chronicles17:7 Chaka chachitatu iye mbali mfumu adatuma mathubu ache ali m'tchindemu kwenda kafunzisa anthu m'maluwani a Yuda: Beni-Haili, Obadia, Zekaria, Netanele na Mikaia." 
2Chronicles17:8 Iwo adenda pabodzi pene na Alevi afemba na anyansembe awiri. Alevi ale akhali: Shemaia, Netania, Zebadia, Asahele, Shemiramoti, Yehonatani, Adonia, Tobia na Tobadonia, pontho na anyansembe ale akhali: Elishama na Yehoramu." 
2Chronicles17:9 Iwo adakwata bukhu ya mwambo wa MBUYA mbaenda nayo m'maluwani onsene a Yuda kuufunzisa anthu. 
2Chronicles17:10 MBUYA adachitisa mafumu onsene akuzungulira kukhala na mantha kuchita nkhondo na Mfumu Yehosafati. 
2Chronicles17:11 Afilisti anango adadza kuna Yehosafati na siliva mzinji ene, pontho na mitukwa inango; Aarabu anango adadza kuna iye na mabira pikwi pinomwe na madzana manomwe, pontho na mbuzi pikwi pinomwe na madzana manomwe." 
2Chronicles17:12 Natenepo Yehosafati adathimiza kukhala wamphamvu pyakwanga. Mu Yuda monsene iye adamanga mipanda na mizinda yakukoyeramo pinthu," 
2Chronicles17:13 kule kukhakoyiwa pinthu pizinji. Mu Yerusalemu adaikhamo anyankhondo aluso 
2Chronicles17:14 malingana na mabanjawo. Adina akhali mkadamu wa magulu a nkhondo a m'mabanja a Yuda, pontho iye akhali na anyankhondo pikwi madzana matatu pansi pache." 
2Chronicles17:15 Wachiwiriache akhali Yehohanani ule akhali na anyankhondo ache pikwi madzana mawiri na makumasere; 
2Chronicles17:16 wachitatuache akhali Amasia mwana Zikiri ule akhali na anyankhondo ache pikwi madzana mawiri. Amasia adapipereka yekha ene kutumikira MBUYA. 
2Chronicles17:17 Mkadamu wa magulu a nkhondo a m'mabanja a Benjemani akhali Eliada nyankhondo wamphamvu ule akhali mkadamu wa anyankhondo pikwi madzana mawiri akukhala na pyakugedera matswimo pontho na mauta. 
2Chronicles17:18 Wachiwiriache akhali Yehozabadi, ule akhali na anyankhondo pikwi dzana na makumasere akufunziswa mwadidi basawo." 
2Chronicles17:19 Amuna enewa akhatumikira mfumu mu Yerusalemu kuthimiza penepo iye adaikha anyankhondo anango m'mizinda inango ya Yuda yakutchingwa na mpanda. 
2Chronicles18:1 Pidafuma na kuveka Mfumu Yehosafati wa Yuda, adasemberana na banja ya Mfumu Ahabu wa ku Israele." 
2Chronicles18:2 Pidagwanda pyaka pizinji Yehosafati adenda kumzinda wa Samaria kafambira Mfumu Ahabu. Kufuna kulemedza Yehosafati pabodzi pene na anthu akhali na iye ale, Ahabu adapha mabira na ng'ombe zizinji kuchita phwando. Iye adayesa-yesa kukhakhamiza Yehosafati kuti akhale naye gulu ibodzi pikhaenda iye kasosa Ramoti-Gileadi." 
2Chronicles18:3 Iye adavunza mbati, “Ayi mfumu, munaenda nane kamenya nkhondo na nthemba ya Ramoti-Gileadi?” Yehosafati adatawira mbati, “Ngakhala iwe wasasanyika na ine enembo ndasasanyika; chibodzi-bodzi anyankhondo anga. Tinati tiende nawe pabodzi kunkhondo.”" 
2Chronicles18:4 Iye adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Mbwenye chakutoma tende tivunze nzeru kuna MBUYA.”" 
2Chronicles18:5 Tenepo Ahabu adachemeresa maprofeti nenene madzana manayi mbaavunza mbati, “Ayi, ndiende kamenyana na Ramoti-Gileadi penu tayu?” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Ndokoni, thangwi Mulungu anakuchitisani kukunda.”" 
2Chronicles18:6 Mbwenye Yehosafati adavunza mbati, “Ayi pano nkhabe mprofeti unango tayu kuti tinakwanisa kuvunza nzeru kuna MBUYA kudzera muna iye?”" 
2Chronicles18:7 Ahabu adatawira mbati, “Pasala mbodzi, weneyu ndi Mikaia mwana Imila. Kwache ine ndimbamzonda thangwi chipo iye hadzati kundipangambo chinthu chadidi tayu, mbwenye chakuipa ndzidzi onsene.” Yehosafati adatawira mbati, “Mfumu nee athema kulonga mafala ninga enewa tayu.”" 
2Chronicles18:8 Natenepo Mfumu Ahabu adachemeresa mbodzi wa mathubu ache mbampanga kuti akwate Mikaia mwana Imila kabodzi kene. 
2Chronicles18:9 Uku avala mikhanjo yawo yachifumu, mafumu awiri ale adakhala pamipando yawo yachifumu pambuwa chifupiletu na msuwo wa mpanda wa Samaria, tenepo maprofeti onsene ale akhalonga mphangwa zauprofeti pamaso pawo." 
2Chronicles18:10 Tenepo Zedekia mwana Kenaana akhadasasanya nyanga zasimbi mbalonga mbati, “MBUYA alonga mbati, ‘Na ipi munati mumenyane na Aaramu mpakana kuakunda.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:11 Maprofeti onsene akhalonga chibodzi-bodzi. Iwo akhalonga mbati, “Ndokoni mukasose mzinda wa Ramoti-Gileadi, pontho munaukunda, thangwi MBUYA anakuchitisani kukunda.”" 
2Chronicles18:12 Munthu akhadatumwa kakwata Mikaia ule adalonga kuna Mikaia mbati, “Ngayang'ana maprofeti anango onsene alonga kuti mfumu anati akakunde, tenepo iwe mafalako akaphatizane na pyalonga iwopyo mbukalonge mwakukomera mfumu.”" 
2Chronicles18:13 Mbwenye Mikaia adalonga mbati, “Ine ndinadumbira pamaso pa MBUYA wamoyo kuti ndinakampanga chinthu chinafuna kundipanga MBUYA.”" 
2Chronicles18:14 Pidafika Mikaia, mfumu adamvunza mbati, “Mikaia, ayi ife tiende kamenya nkhondo na Ramoti-Gileadi, penu tayu?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ndokoni pontho munati mukakunde, thangwi MBUYA anaupereka m'manja mwanu.”" 
2Chronicles18:15 Mfumu adalonga kuna Mikaia mbati, “Ndikudumbirise kangasi, kuti undipange pyakuonadi pyokhokha pyalonga MBUYA?”" 
2Chronicles18:16 Mikaia adatawira mbati, “Ndidaona Aisraele onsene akubalalika paphiri ninga mabira akusowa makabuswa, tenepo MBUYA adalonga mbati, ‘Anthu awa nkhabe mbuyawo. Munthu onsene mulekeni pyache aende kwawo mumtendere.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:17 Mfumu wa Israele adalonga kuna Yehosafati mbati, “Ayi sidakupangeni tayu kuti munthu weneyu chipo adzati kundipanga pinthu pyadidi tayu, mbwenye pyakuipa pyokhokha?”" 
2Chronicles18:18 Mikaia adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Ngaveserani pinalonga MBUYA! Ine ndidaona MBUYA akhala pampando wache wachifumu kudzulu, mwenemo angelo ache onsene aimira nkhundu mwache." 
2Chronicles18:19 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga mbati, ‘Mbani anafuna pyakunyengeza Ahabu kuti aende kamenya nkhondo na Ramoti-Gileadi kuti afere konthoko?’ Mngelo unango adalonga pyachembo, unango adalongambo pyachembo." 
2Chronicles18:20 Pakumalisira pache mzimu udadza pamaso pa MBUYA mbalonga kuti, ‘Ine ndinati ndikamnyengeze Ahabu.’" 
2Chronicles18:21 MBUYA adavunza mbati, ‘Unakamnyengeza tani?’ Mzimuwo udatawira kuti, ‘Ine ndinati ndiende kweneko mbandikakhala mzimu wakunama m'kanwa mwa maprofeti ache onsene.’ MBUYA adalonga mbati, ‘Ande, iwe unati ukamnyengezedi. Tenepo ndoko ukachite penepyo.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:22 Tenepo Mikaia adamalisa kulonga mbati, “Penepi pyachitikadi. MBUYA adaikha mzimu wakunama m'kanwa mwa maprofeti anu onsenewa, thangwi MBUYA akhazikisa kuvungika pana imwe.”" 
2Chronicles18:23 Penepo Zedekia mwana Kenaana adenda pakhali Mikaia pale mbamgasa mbama. Iye adavunza mbati, “Mzimu wa MBUYA wabuluka tani muna ine mbukalonga na iwe.”" 
2Chronicles18:24 Mikaia adatawira mbati, “Iwe unapidziwa pansiku inafuna iwe dzabisala m'subi ya m'bwaloletu.”" 
2Chronicles18:25 Mfumu wa Israele adalonga mbati, “Mkwateni Mikaia mumbweze kuna Amoni, mkulu wa boma mumzinda, na kuna Yoasi mwana mfumu" 
2Chronicles18:26 mbamukalonge kuti, ‘Mfumu alonga kuti aikhwe m'perezo, pontho lekani kumpasa chinthu chinango, mbwenye mkate na madzi ene basi kufikirana ndibwereko mwadidi.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:27 Mikaia adalonga mbati, “Ngakhala munabwerako mwadidi, penepo MBUYA hadalonge kudzera muna ine tayu.” Tenepo iye adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Anthu monsene muli pano phatani pyalonga inepi.”" 
2Chronicles18:28 Tenepo mfumu wa Israele na Yehosafati mfumu wa Yuda adalamuka kwenda kasosa Ramoti-Gileadi. 
2Chronicles18:29 Ahabu adalonga kuna Yehosafati mbati, “Ine ndinapizimbaisa mbandimenya nkhondo ninga mbodzi wa anyankhondo, mbwenye iwe wathema kuvala mkhanjo wako wachifumu.” Natenepo mfumu wa Israele adapizimbaisa mbaenda kamenya nkhondo." 
2Chronicles18:30 Mfumu wa Aaramu akhadatonga akadamu ache a nkhondo akufambisa pingolo nee kamenyana na munthu ene pyache tayu, mbwenye mfumu wa Israele ene basi." 
2Chronicles18:31 Akadamu a pingolo pile pidaona iwo Yehosafati adanyerezera kuti akhali mfumu wa Israele. Natenepo adazungunuka kuti amenyane naye. Mbwenye pidakhuwa Yehosafati, MBUYA Mulungu adampulumusa mbabweza m'nduli anyakumsosa ale." 
2Chronicles18:32 Akadamu a pingolo ale adaona kuti iye hakhali mfumu wa Israele tayu, tenepo adaleka kumthamangisa." 
2Chronicles18:33 Mbwenye munthu unango adaponya tswimo yache nyamponye-ponye mbalasa mfumu Ahabu m'phindopindo mwa nguwo zache za nkhondo. Mfumu adapanga nyakufambisa chingolo chache mbati, “Zungunusa chingolo kundibulusa kunkhondoyi thangwi ndalaswa!”" 
2Chronicles18:34 Pansiku yeneyo nkhondo idakaka pyakwanga, tenepo mfumuyo adakhazikwa m'chingolo mwache kuyang'anisana na Aaramu. Tenepo pidathobila dzuwa mfumuyo adafa." 
2Chronicles19:1 Pidabwererako Mfumu Yehosafati mwadidi mwene mbafika mu Yuda kunyumbache yachifumu mu Yerusalemu. 
2Chronicles19:2 Mprofeti Yehu mwana Hanani, adenda kagumanikana naye mbalonga kuna mfumu mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji imwe mukuphedzadi anthu akudawika mbamuafuna anthu ambazonda MBUYA ale? Na thangwi ya penepi kuzhangali kwa MBUYA kunakhala pana imwe." 
2Chronicles19:3 Kwache imwe muna chinthu chakukoma nacho, thangwi imwe mudabulusa adzimunthu a milungu Ashera akhapembedza anthu anu ale, natenepo imwe mwapiyesera kuteweza pinthu pinafuna Mulungu.”" 
2Chronicles19:4 Podi kwene kuti Mfumu Yehosafati adakhala mu Yerusalemu, kazinji kene iye akhafamba-famba pakati pa anthu kutomera ku Beeresheba kumwera mpakana m'tchinde mwa mapiri a Eferemu kumpoto kupanga anthu kuti abwerere kuna MBUYA Mulungu wa makolo awo." 
2Chronicles19:5 Yehosafati adasankhula anyakutonga miseru m'mizinda yonsene yakutchingwa na mpanda mu Yuda 
2Chronicles19:6 mbaapanga mbati, “Chitani mphole-mphole pinatonga imwe anthu miseru; imwe nee mukutonga na utongi wa anthu tayu, mbwenye na utongi wa MBUYA. Tenepo ndzidzi onsene unatonga imwe mseru MBUYA ali namwe." 
2Chronicles19:7 Gopani MBUYA pontho chitani mphole-mphole thangwi MBUYA Mulungu wathu nkhabe funa kutonga mwakusowa chilungamo, penu kutonga mwakuyang'ana nkhope, penu kutawira kudyekerwa tayu.”" 
2Chronicles19:8 Mu Yerusalemu Mfumu Yehosafati adasankhula Alevi, anyansembe na anthu anango akuveka kukhala anyakutonga miseru ya kuswa mwambo wa MBUYA, penu makangano pakati pa anthu akukhala mumzinda." 
2Chronicles19:9 Iye adaapanga pinthu pidathema iwo kuchita mbati, “Imwe mwathema kuphata mabasanu mwakugopa MBUYA, pontho imwe mwathema kumvera na kukhulupirika papyonsene pinachita imwe." 
2Chronicles19:10 Ngakhala Muisraele mnzanu wakubulukira kumzinda unango ene anadza na mseru wakupha munthu, penu wakuswa mwambo, penu matongero, imwe mwathema kumpangiza mwadidi mwathema iye dzachita pandzidzi unatongwa mseru wachewo, towera iye aleke konwa pakudawira MBUYA. Ngakhala imwe munapichita tayu, imwe pabodzi pene na Muisraele mnzanu MBUYA anakuzhangalirani. Mbwenye ngakhala basanu munaiphata, imwe nkhabe dzakonwa tayu." 
2Chronicles19:11 Amaria, Nyansembe Wamkulu ndiye anafuna dzakhala na utongi onsene pamiseru yonsene yachipembedzo; Zebadia mwana Ishimaele, mkulu wa boma ya Yuda ndiye anafuna dzakhala na utongi onsene pamiseru yonsene ya pakati pa munthu na munthu mnzache. Alevi basawo nkhuonesesa kuti pyalonga anyakutonga miseru pikutewezwa. Wangani mtima pontho chitani pyakupangani inepi, pontho MBUYA mbakhale na ale ambachita pyakulungama.”" 
2Chronicles20:1 Pidagwanda ndzidzi ukulu ene anyankhondo a ku Moabu na Amoni pabodzi pene na Ameuni anango adasasanya gulu ibodzi kachita nkhondo na Yuda. 
2Chronicles20:2 Anyamphangwa anango adadza mbalonga kuna Mfumu Yehosafati mbati, “Gulu ikulu ya anyankhondo yakubulukira ku Edomu yapita muno na khundu inango ya Nyanza Yakufa dzachita namwe nkhondo. Iwo akunda kale Hazazoni Tamara.” Yeneyi ndi dzina inango ya Engedi." 
2Chronicles20:3 Yehosafati adagoswera pyakwanga mbapemphera kuna MBUYA kuti amphedze. Natenepo iye adatonga kuti munthu onsene m'dzikomo apimane kudya. 
2Chronicles20:4 Kubulukira kumizinda yonsene ya Yuda anthu adathamangira ku Yerusalemu kavunza nzeru MBUYA. 
2Chronicles20:5 Tenepo iwo pabodzi pene na anthu onsene a mu Yerusalemu adagumanyikana muchintalo cha Nyumba ya Mulungu. Mfumu Yehosafati adenda mbakaimira pamaso pa anthu," 
2Chronicles20:6 mbapemphera mwakugaluza fala mbati, “MBUYA Mulungu wa makolo athu, imwe kudzuluko mumbatonga madzinza onsene a padziko yapansi. Imwe ndimwe nyamphamvu pontho nyamboko; nkhabe unango anakwanisa kuimisana namwe tayu." 
2Chronicles20:7 Imwe ndimwe Mulungu wathu. Pidapita anthu anu Israele m'dziko muno, imwe mudathamangisa anthu akhakhala mwenemu ale mbamupereka dzikoyo kuna pidzukulu pya Abrahamu, shamwalianu ule, kuti ikhale yawo ene kwenda na kwenda." 
2Chronicles20:8 Iwo ambakhala muno pontho akumangirani Nyumba kukulemedzani pakudzindikira 
2Chronicles20:9 kuti ngakhala nyatwa inaafikira kuatchunyusa, penu nkhondo, muliri na njala, penepo adze kuno dzaimira pamaso pa Nyumbanu kumbapembedzwa imwe kule mbapemphera kuna imwe thangwi ya nyatwa zawo, towera muave mbamuapulumusa panyatwa zawozo." 
2Chronicles20:10 “Lero Amoabu, Aamoni na Aedomu anafuna kuchita nafe nkhondo. Pidabuluka makolo athu m'dziko ya Iguputo, imwe nee mudaatawirisa kugwanda na m'madziko enewa tayu, natenepo makolo athu adaachalira, kwache makolo athu hadaavunge tayu." 
2Chronicles20:11 Ngayang'anani mwenemu ndiye munafuna kutibwezera iwo. Iwo adza dzatithamangisa m'dziko idatipasa imweyi. 
2Chronicles20:12 Imwe ndimwe Mulungu wathu! Atchunyuseni thangwi ife nkhabe mphamvu tayu pamaso pamwinji ukulu wa anyankhondo ule unafuna kuchita nafe nkhondowu. Ife tasowa chakuphata, kwache tikuyang'ana kuna imwe kuti mutiphedze.”" 
2Chronicles20:13 Amuna onsene a Yuda pabodzi pene na akazawo pontho anawo akhaimira penepo pa Nyumba ya MBUYA. 
2Chronicles20:14 Mzimu wa MBUYA adagudumira Mlevi unango, ule akhali nawo m'mwinji mule. Iye akhali Yahaziele mwana Zekaria. Iye akhali wa nkhonda Asafu, pontho akhali chidzukulu cha Asafu kudzera muna Matania, Yeiele na Benaia." 
2Chronicles20:15 Yahaziele adalonga mbati, “Mfumu pabodzi pene na anthu a ku Yuda pontho Yerusalemu, MBUYA alonga kuti, ‘Lekani taya mtima penu kuchita mantha na anyankhondo azinjiwa. Nkhondoyi nja Mulungu, si yanu tayu!" 
2Chronicles20:16 Mangwana amenyeni pinadza iwo kugwanda na pamakata a Zizi. Imwe munagumanikana nawo pankhomo ya phedi yakwendera kumudzi wa msitu chifupi na thando yatchetcha ya Yeruele. 
2Chronicles20:17 Pankhondo yeneyi si kuti ndimwe munafuna dzamenya nkhondo tayu. Khazikikani kwene basi mbamudikhire. Imwe munati muone MBUYA akukuchitisani kukunda. Anthu a ku Yuda na Yerusalemu lekani chita mantha penu kutaya mtima. Ndokoni kunkhondo, MBUYA anakhala namwe!’ ”" 
2Chronicles20:18 Tenepo Mfumu Yehosafati adalamba nkhope yache mbifikiratu pansi, anthumbo onsene adalambambo mbapembedza MBUYA." 
2Chronicles20:19 Kubuluka penepo anthu a dzinza ya Levi a nkhonda Kohati na Kora adaimira mbakhuwa kukuza MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele. 
2Chronicles20:20 Mangwana mwache na machibese anthu adenda kuthando yatchetcha ya Tekoa. Pikhautoma iwo ulendo, Yehosafati adaapanga mbati, “Amuna a Yuda na Yerusalemu! Nyindirani MBUYA Mulungu wanu, penepo munaimira dzololo. Khulupirani pinakupangani maprofeti ache, tenepo imwe munati mukunde.”" 
2Chronicles20:21 Pidamala mfumu kulonga na anthu, adapanga anyakuimba kuvala mikhanjo yawo ikhavala iwo pandzidzi wa maphwando akupambulika kuti akhale patsogolo pa anyankhondo, uku akuimba mbati, “MBUYA mbakuzwe! Kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala!”" 
2Chronicles20:22 Pidatoma iwo kuimba, MBUYA adachitisa anyankhondo a ku Moabu, Amoni na Edomu ale kukhala pampani-pani." 
2Chronicles20:23 Amoabu na Aamoni adasosa anyankhondo a ku Edomu mbaavungiratu monsene mwene. Kubuluka penepo adazungunukirana mbamenyana pyawo okhokha. 
2Chronicles20:24 Pidafika anyankhondo a ku Yuda pansanja ya anyakulondali ile ikhali m'thando yatchetcha, adayang'ana kukhali anyamalwawo kule mbaona kuti onsene akhali thasa-thasa amala kufa. Nkhabe na mbodzi ene wa iwo akhadathawa tayu." 
2Chronicles20:25 Yehosafati na magulu ache ankhondo adenda kakwata pinthu pyawo. Iwo adagumana ng'ombe zizinji, phoso, nguwo na pinthu pinango pyakufunika. Iwo adamala nsiku zitatu akugumanya pidapokosera iwo pile, kwache pikhali pizinji pyakwanga mwakuti hadakwanise tayu kukwata pyonsenene." 
2Chronicles20:26 Pansiku yachinayi iwo adagumanyikana m'phedi ya Beraka mbakuza MBUYA thangwi ya pyonsene pidachita iye. Ndi thangwi yache phedi yeneyi imbachemerwa Beraka. 
2Chronicles20:27 Yehosafati adabwerera ku Yerusalemu mwakukomerwa pabodzi pene na anyankhondo ache thangwi MBUYA adakunda anyamalwawo. 
2Chronicles20:28 Pidafika iwo mumzinda mule, iwo adenda ku Nyumba ya Mulungu uku akuimba nyimbo na anyakatangale pontho kuliza ngoma." 
2Chronicles20:29 Dziko yonsene, ile idava pya mule mudakundira MBUYA anyamalwa a Israele, idachita mantha." 
2Chronicles20:30 Natenepo Yehosafati adatonga mumtendere, pontho Mulungu adamtchinjiriza khundu zonsene." 
2Chronicles20:31 Yehosafati adapita ufumu wa Yuda uku ana pyaka makumatatu na pishanu mbatonga mu Yerusalemu pyaka makumawiri na pishanu. Mache akhali Azuba, mwana Shilihi." 
2Chronicles20:32 Ninga mudachitira Asa babache, iye adachitambo pinthu pyakulungama pamaso pa MBUYA;" 
2Chronicles20:33 kwache mbuto zakupembedzerapo milungu nee zidavungwe tayu. Anthu hadazungunuke tayu na mtimawo onsene kupembedza Mulungu wa makolo awo. 
2Chronicles20:34 Pinango pyonsene pidachita Yehosafati, kutomera pakutoma pa ufumu wache kufikirana kumala kwa ufumu wache, pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya Yehu mwana Hanani, ile ndi khundu ibodzi ya mbiri ya mafumu a Israele." 
2Chronicles20:35 Pandzidzi unango Mfumu Yehosafati wa Yuda adaphatana ushamwali na Mfumu Ahazia wa Israele, ule adachita pinthu pyakudawika pizinji." 
2Chronicles20:36 Pagombe ya Ezioni-Geberi, iwo adasasanya miyadiya mikulu-mikulu yakwenda kubara ya Tarisisi." 
2Chronicles20:37 Mbwenye Eliezere mwana Dodavahu wa kuluwani ya Maresha adacheuza Yehosafati mbati, “Na thangwi yakuti mwaphatana ushamwali na Ahazia, MBUYA anavunga pinthu pyasasanya imwepi.” Natenepo miyadiya ile idamala panduka mbichimwana kufamba." 
2Chronicles21:1 Yehosafati adagonera mkono mbaikhwa m'masiye mumzinda wa Davite, tenepo mwanache Yehoramu adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache." 
2Chronicles21:2 Yehoramu mwana Yehosafati mfumu wa Yuda akhali na abale ache atanthatu amimba ibodzi ene: Azaria, Yehiele, Zekaria, Azariahu, Mikaele na Shefatia." 
2Chronicles21:3 Babawo adaapasa golidi mzinji pabodzi pene na siliva pontho na pinthu pinango pyakudula. Kada munthu adampasa mzinda wakutchingwa na mpanda mu Yuda kuti auyang'anire. Mbwenye na thangwi yakuti Yehoramu akhali mwana wautombo, Yehosafati adamuikha kukhala nyakupita m'mbuto mwache." 
2Chronicles21:4 Pidakhazikika Yehoramu mbatonga chadi-chadi ninga mfumu, adapha abale ache onsene pabodzi pene na mathubu ache anango a Chiisraele." 
2Chronicles21:5 Yehoramu adapita ufumuwo uku ana pyaka makumatatu na piwiri pyakubalwa mbatonga mu Yerusalemu pyaka pisere. 
2Chronicles21:6 Iye adateweza makhaliro akuipa a Mfumu Ahabu na mafumu anango a Israele, thangwi iye akhadasemba mbodzi mwa ana achikazi a Ahabu. Iye adachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA," 
2Chronicles21:7 kwache MBUYA hadafune pyakuvungu ufumu wa Davite tayu, thangwi iye akhadachita chiverano na Davite mbadumbira kuti pidzukulu pyache pinatonga kwenda na kwenda." 
2Chronicles21:8 Pandzidzi ukhatonga Yehoramu, Edomu adapandukira Yuda mbapiimira pa yekha ene." 
2Chronicles21:9 Natenepo Yehoramu na mathubu ache adalamuka pabodzi pene na pingolo pyawo mbapita mu Edomu kachita nkhondo. Kweneko anyankhondo a Edomu adaazungulira mbwenye na mosiku iwo adakwanisa kugumana njira mbathawa. 
2Chronicles21:10 Kutomera penepo na lero Edomu ngwakupandukira kuna Yuda. Pandzidzi onthowo mzinda wa Libina udapandukirambo, thangwi Yehoramu akhadakhonda MBUYA Mulungu wa makolo ache." 
2Chronicles21:11 Iye pontho adasasanya mbuto zakupembedzerapo milungu m'dziko ya mapiri ya Yuda mbachitisa anthu a ku Yerusalemu na Yuda kudawira MBUYA. 
2Chronicles21:12 Mprofeti Elia adatumiza kalata kuna Yehoramu. Kalatayo idalembwa tenepa: “MBUYA Mulungu wa kholo yanu Davite akulonga kuti, ‘Imwe nee mudateweza njira za babanu Mfumu Yehosafati penu mbuyanu Mfumu Asa tayu;" 
2Chronicles21:13 m'mbuto mwache imwe mwateweza njira za mafumu a Israele pontho mwabausa anthu a Yuda na Yerusalemu kukhala anthu akhonda khulupirika kuna Mulungu ninga mudachitira banja ya Ahabu kubausa Aisraele kukhala anthu okhonda khulupirika, pontho mudapha abale anu, ale akhali adidi kupiringana imwepo." 
2Chronicles21:14 Na thangwi yeneyi, MBUYA anatchunyusa pyakwanga anthu anu, ananu na akazanu, pontho mfuma yonsene anaivunga," 
2Chronicles21:15 Imwe ene munasanyika na utenda wakupha wa m'mimba, ule unandendeya nsiku na nsiku kufikirana unabuluka mkolomola.’ ”" 
2Chronicles21:16 Afilisti na Aarabu anango akhakhala chifupi na Akushi m'khundu-khundu mwa gombe. MBUYA adaaswiswirisa kuti akachite nkhondo na Yehoramu. 
2Chronicles21:17 Iwo adachita nkhondo na Yuda mbapokosera pyonsene pya m'nyumba yachifumu mbakwata akazi na ana achimuna ene kupambula Ahazia chimalisira bele chache. 
2Chronicles21:18 Kubuluka penepo MBUYA adagwisa pana mfumu utenda wakupha wa m'mimba. 
2Chronicles21:19 Pyaka piwiri utenda ule ukhadandendeya pyakwanga mwakuti pakumalisira pache mfumu adafa thangwi ya kuva kupha pyakwanga. Anthu ache hadagase moto kuonesa kumulira tayu ninga mudachitira iwo na makolo ache. 
2Chronicles21:20 Yehoramu adapita ufumu uku ana pyaka makumatatu na piwiri pyakubalwa mbatonga mu Yerusalemu pyaka pisere. Nkhabe mbodzi adatsukwala tayu, thangwi ya kufa kwache kule. Iwo adamuikha mumzinda wa Davite, kwache si masiye achifumu tayu." 
2Chronicles22:1 Mapanga ale akhadadza pabodzi na Aarabu akhadapita mumsasa mbapha ana achimuna onsene a Mfumu Yehoramu kupambula Ahazia mwanache wakumalisira. Natenepo anthu a mu Yerusalemu adapitisa Ahazia kukhala mfumu m'mbuto mwa babache. 
2Chronicles22:2 Ahazia adapita ufumuwo uku ana pyaka makumawiri na piwiri, tenepo adatonga mu Yerusalemu chaka chibodzi. Ahazia adateweza makhaliro a banja ya Mfumu Ahabu, podi mache Atalia, ule akhali mwana Mfumu Ahabu, chidzukulu cha Omri mfumu wa Israele ndiye adampasa upangizi, ule udamchitisa kuchita pinthu pyakuipa." 
2Chronicles22:3  
2Chronicles22:4 Iye adachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA, thangwi pidafa babache anthu anango a m'banja ya Mfumu Ahabu adasanduka mapungu ache mbamchitisa kugwa." 
2Chronicles22:5 Na kuteweza uphungu wawo, iye adakhala gulu ibodzi ene yankhondo na Mfumu Yoramu wa ku Israele pamenya nkhondo na Mfumu Hazaele wa ku Aramu. Iwo adamenyana mu Ramoti-Gileadi, tenepo Yoramu adakuwazwa pankhondo yeneyi." 
2Chronicles22:6 Iye adabwerera kumzinda wa Yezereele kuti atome wanga pironda pyache pile, tenepo Ahazia adenda kamuona Yoramu." 
2Chronicles22:7 Mulungu adaphatisa basa kucheza kweneko kuti Ahazia avungwe. Pikhali Ahazia kweneko, iye pabodzi pene na Yoramu adenda mbakagumana na Yehu mwana Nimishi, ule adasankhulwa na MBUYA kuti avunge banja yonsene ya Ahabu." 
2Chronicles22:8 Pikhapha Yehu banja ya Ahabu, adagumaniza mathubu a Yuda na ana achimuna a abale ache Ahazia ale akhali na iye pabodzi, mbaapha." 
2Chronicles22:9 Kubuluka penepo iye adasaka-saka Ahazia, mbwenye amunache adamphata ku Samaria kule kukhabisala iye. Iwo adadza naye kuna Yehu mbampha. Kwache adamuikha m'masiye thangwi ya kufuna kulemedza mbuyache Yehosafati, ule adachita pyonsene ninga mukhadapikwanisira iye kutumikira MBUYA. Natenepo nee padasalave munthu na mbodzi ene wa m'banja ya Ahazia ule mbadakwanisa kukoya ufumu tayu." 
2Chronicles22:10 Sindzidzi Atalia mache Mfumu Ahazia nkhudziwa pya kuphiwa kwa mwanache, iye adatonga kuti anthu onsene a m'banja yachifumu ya Yuda aphiwe." 
2Chronicles22:11 Ahazia akhali na nyamaingache wa bele inango dzinache Yehosheba, ule adasembwa na nyansembe dzinache Yehoiada. Iye adapulumusa Yoasi mbodzi wa ana a Ahazia chibiso-biso mbamthawisa pana ana achifumu, ale akhadikhira kuti aphiwe mbambisa pabodzi na makayayache m'subi yakugona m'Nyumba ya Mulungu. Iye adapulumusa Yoasi m'manja mwa Atalia, akhafuna kumpha ule." 
2Chronicles22:12 Pyaka pitanthatu Yoasi adakhala mwenemo basi kubisala, uku Atalia akutonga ninga mfumu." 
2Chronicles23:1 Pidamala pyaka pitanthatu Yehoiada nyansembe adanyerezera kuti ndzidzi wakwana wakuchitapo pinthu. Iye adachita chiverano na akadamu a nkhondo ashanu: Azaria mwana Yerohamu, Ishimaele mwana Yehohanani, Azaria mwana Obedi, Maaseia mwana Adaia na Elishafati mwana Zikiri." 
2Chronicles23:2 Iwo adenda kumizinda yonsene ya Yuda mbabwerera ku Yerusalemu pabodzi pene na Alevi pontho na akulu-akulu a m'mabanja. 
2Chronicles23:3 Onsene pabodzi pene adagumanyikana m'Nyumba ya MBUYA mbachita chiverano na Yoasi mwana mfumu. Yehoiada adalonga kuna anthu ale mbati, “Mfumu adafa ule mwanache ngushu! Chinchino iye athema kupita ufumu ninga montho mudadumbira MBUYA kuna Mfumu Davite kuti pidzukulu pyako ndiye pinafuna dzatonga kwenda na kwenda." 
2Chronicles23:4 Pinafuna ife kuchita mphipi: Anyansembe na Alevi angadza dzaphata basawo pa Nsiku Yakupuma, gulu yakutoma ya iwo analondali pamisuwo ya m'Nyumba ya MBUYA," 
2Chronicles23:5 gulu inango yachiwiri inalondali nyumba yachifumu. Gulu yakumalisirayo inakhazikwa pamsuwo wa Maziko. Anthu anango onsene anagumanyikana pachintalo cha Nyumba ya MBUYA. 
2Chronicles23:6 Munthu onsene mbaleke tawiriswa kupita m'Nyumba ya MBUYA kupambula anyansembe na Alevi ale anakhala pa buswa ndzidzi wenewo. Iwo anakwanisa kupita mwenemo thangwi iwo ngakupambulika, mbwenye anthu anango onsene athema kuvera matongero a MBUYA, tenepo iwo akhale panja." 
2Chronicles23:7 Alevi athema kulondali mfumu mwakumzungulira uku matalasadawo asasanyika kale, pontho iwo athema kukhala chifupi na mfumu konsene kwene kunaenda iye. Munthu onsene wakuyesa-yesa kupita m'Nyumba ya MBUYA aphiwe.”" 
2Chronicles23:8 Alevi na anthu a ku Yuda adachitadi pidaapanga Yehoiada. Munthu onsene adakwata amunache, ale akhaenda katoma buswawo pa Nsiku Yakupuma pontho na ale ene akhakotoka pabuswawo, thangwi Yehoiada nyansembe nsiku yeneyo hadakotose gulu na ibodzi ene tayu." 
2Chronicles23:9 Kubuluka penepo iye adapereka kuna akadamu ale madipa, pontho pyakugedera matswimo ping'ono-ping'ono na pikulu-pikulu pene, pile pikhali pya Mfumu Davite mbapikoyiwa m'Nyumba ya MBUYA." 
2Chronicles23:10 Iye adaikha amuna akuphatira matalasada m'manja mwawo kuzungulira kutsogolo kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu, kutchinjiriza mfumu." 
2Chronicles23:11 Tenepo Yehoiada adabulusa panja Yoasi mbamvazika chipewu chachifumu. Iye adapaswa bukhu ya matongero, tenepo adampitisa ufumu. Yehoiada nyansembe pabodzi pene na anache achimuna adamdzoza ufumu, penepo anthu onsene adakhuwa mbati, “Dondowe mfumu!”" 
2Chronicles23:12 Pidava Atalia mkhuwo wa anthu pontho kuthamanga na kusekera mfumu, adenda kukhali iwo ku Nyumba ya Mulungu kule." 
2Chronicles23:13 Penepo iye adaona mfumu wachinchino ule, aimira pamsuwo wa Nyumba ya Mulungu, chifupi na mzati wachifumu, uku azungulirwa na akadamu ankhondo, pontho na anyakuliza ngoma. Anthu onsene akhakhuwa mbaliza ngoma thangwi yakukomerwa, mwenemo anyakuimba na pyakuimbira ndiye akhatsogolera. Natenepo Atalia adang'amba nguwo zache mwakuzhangali mbakhuwa mbati, “Ngupandu, ngupandu!”" 
2Chronicles23:14 Yehoiada hadafune tayu kuti Atalia apherwe chifupi na Nyumba ya Mulungu, natenepo iye adachemeresa akadamu ankhondo mbalonga mbati, “Mkwatireni kunja mkaziyu pakati pa mizere ya anyakulondal, pontho phani munthu onsene wakufuna pyakumvundulirayo.”" 
2Chronicles23:15 Iwo adamphata mbamkwekwetera kunyumba yachifumu, tenepo pidafika iwo pamsuwo wa mpanda wa Kavalo, adampha." 
2Chronicles23:16 Yehoiada nyansembe adakwata Mfumu Yoasi na anthu kuti akhale naye pabodzi pakuchita chiverano kuti iwo anakhala anthu a MBUYA. 
2Chronicles23:17 Tenepo onsene adenda kunyumba yakupembedzeramo milungu Baala mbaigomola. Iwo adaswa maguwa ansembe na mifanikizo ikhali mwenemo ile mbapha Matani nyansembe wa Baala patsogolo pamaguwa ansembe. 
2Chronicles23:18 Yehoiada adaikha anyansembe na Alevi kuti akhale anyakuyang'anira basa ya m'Nyumba ya Mulungu. Iwo adathema kuthimiza kuphata mabasawo adapaswa iwo na Mfumu Davite pontho kuperekwa nsembe zakupyerera kuna MBUYA mwakuteweza mwambo wa Mose uku akuimba nyimbo na kusekera ninga mudaafunzisira Davite. 
2Chronicles23:19 Yehoiada adaikha pontho pabuswa anyakulondali pamisuwo ya Nyumba ya Mulungu kuti munthu onsene okhonda chena pamaso pa MBUYA aleke pita m'Nyumbamo. 
2Chronicles23:20 Akadamu a nkhondo, mzika zakuveka, mathubu na anthu anango akhali pabodzi na Yehoiada pamulikiti kudza na mfumu kunyumba yachifumu kubulukira ku Nyumba ya MBUYA. Iwo adapita na Msuwo wa Kumpoto wa mpanda, tenepo adakhala pampando wache wachifumu." 
2Chronicles23:21 Anthu onsene adakomerwa pyakwanga. Tenepo mumzindamo mukhali mtendere, thangwi Atalia akhadaphiwa." 
2Chronicles24:1 Yoasi adapita ufumu wa Yuda uku ana pyaka pinomwe, tenepo iye adatonga mu Yerusalemu pyaka makumanayi. Mache akhali Zibia wa kumzinda wa Beeresheba." 
2Chronicles24:2 Pikhali Yehoiada Nyansembe Wamkulu na moyo, mfumu akhachita pinthu pyakulungama pamaso pa MBUYA." 
2Chronicles24:3 Yehoiada adasankhula akazi awiri kuti akhale a Mfumu Yoasi mbabala nawo ana achimuna na achikazi ene. 
2Chronicles24:4 Pidakhala iye pa ufumu pyaka pingasi, Yoasi adanyerezera pyakusasanya pontho Nyumba ya MBUYA." 
2Chronicles24:5 Iye adapanga anyansembe na Alevi kwenda kumizinda ya Yuda kasonkhesa kobiri zakukwana kusasanyira pontho Nyumba ya Mulungu chaka na chaka. Iye adaapanga kuti achimbize kupichita, mbwenye Alevi adadembuka kupichita." 
2Chronicles24:6 Natenepo iye adachemeresa Yehoiada Nyansembe Wamkulu mbampempha mbati, “Mwatani munakhonda kuapanga Alevi kuti akhomese msonkho kuna anthu a mu Yuda na Yerusalemu, ule udatonga Mose nyabasa wa MBUYA kuti anthu apereke kuphedzera napyo basa ya m'Chikhumbi cha Mulungu?”" 
2Chronicles24:7 Anyakutewera Atalia mkazi wakuipa ule, akhadavunga Nyumba ya Mulungu mbaphatisa basa pinthu pizinji pyakupambulika kupembedza napyo milungu Baala." 
2Chronicles24:8 Mfumu adapanga Alevi kuti asasanye bokosi yakuikhiramo pyakupereka, pontho kuti achiikhe pamsuwo wa mpanda wa Nyumba ya MBUYA." 
2Chronicles24:9 Iwo adatumiza mphangwa ku Yerusalemu konsene na ku Yuda kuti munthu onsene adze ku Nyumba ya MBUYA na msonkho ule udasonkhesa Mose, nyabasa wa Mulungu, kubulukira kuna Aisraele m'thando yatchetcha mule." 
2Chronicles24:10 Penepi anthu pidaakomera pabodzi pene na akadamu awo ene, tenepo iwo adadza na kobiri zawo za msonkho mbadzaza bokosi ile na kobirizo." 
2Chronicles24:11 Nsiku na nsiku Alevi akhakwata bokosi ile kwenda nayo kuna thubu wa mfumu ule akhali wakuyang'anira penepi. Bokosiyo ingadzala, nyakulemba wa mfumu pontho thubu wa Nyansembe Wamkulu akhazibulusamo kobirizo mbabwezera bokosiyo pambuto pache. Natenepo iwo adagumanyisa kobiri zizinji." 
2Chronicles24:12 Mfumu na Yehoiada akhapereka kobiri zile kuna anyakuyang'anira basa yakusasanya pontho Nyumba ya MBUYA. Natenepo iwo adalemba anyaluso pakumanga na miyala, anyampala matabwa, pontho na anyakufula misimbi kuti asasanye pontho Nyumba ya MBUYA." 
2Chronicles24:13 Anyakuphata basa onsene adaphata mwakuwangisa mbasasanya pontho Nyumba ya Mulungu mbikhala ninga montho mwakale yakuwanga monsene mwene. 
2Chronicles24:14 Pidamala iwo kusasanya Nyumba ya MBUYA, golidi na siliva pidasala pile pidaperekwa kuna mfumu na kuna Yehoiada, ale adapiphatisa basa kusasanyira pinthu pya m'Nyumba ya MBUYA, pile pikhaphatiswa basa pachipembedzo pontho kupereka napyo nsembe, pontho piwaya pyakufukizira pyakununkhira na pyombo pinango pyagolidi na pyasiliva. Pikhali Yehoiada na moyo, nsembe zikhapyerezwa kawiri-kawiri m'Nyumba ya MBUYA." 
2Chronicles24:15 Pidakalamba iye pyakwanga mbakwanisa pyaka dzana na makumatatu, adafa." 
2Chronicles24:16 Iwo adamuikha m'masiye achifumu mumzinda wa Davite kumpasa chilemedzo thangwi ya basa idaphata iye kuna Aisraele, kuna Mulungu na kuna Nyumba ya MBUYA." 
2Chronicles24:17 Sindzidzi Yehoiada nkhufa akadamu a Yuda adakhakhamiza Yoasi kuti m'mbuto mwache iye avere iwo. 
2Chronicles24:18 Natenepo anthu adaleka kupembedza m'Nyumba ya MBUYA, Mulungu wa makolo awo, mbatoma kupembedza mifanikizo na adzimunthu a milungu Ashera. Kudawa kweneku kudadzesa ukali wa MBUYA pana Yuda na Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles24:19 MBUYA adatuma maprofeti kuacheuza kuti abwerere kuna iye, mbwenye anthu hadaavesere tayu." 
2Chronicles24:20 Kubuluka penepo Mzimu wa Mulungu adagudumira Zekaria mwana Yehoiada nyansembe. Iye adaimira pale padakwanisa anthu kumuona mbakhuwa mbati, “MBUYA Mulungu akuvunza kuti, ‘Mwatani mwaleka kuvera matongero anga mbamupidzesera mwekha ene kuvungika? Imwe mudandikhonda, tenepo ine ndidakukhondanimbo.’ ”" 
2Chronicles24:21 Mfumu Yoasi akhali mbodzi wa anthu adasasanya pyakupha Zekaria ale, tenepo na utongi wa mfumu, anthu adamponyera miyala muchintalo cha Nyumba ya MBUYA." 
2Chronicles24:22 Mfumu adaduwalira udidi onsene wakuthemerana na mfumu udachita Yehoiada babache Zekaria kuna iye, tenepo iye adachitisa Zekaria kuphiwa. Pikhafa Zekaria adakhuwa mbati, “MBUYA mbaone pinachitikapi pontho mbabwezere.”" 
2Chronicles24:23 Pidafika ndzidzi wakuphwitha miti wa chaka chenecho, anyankhondo a Aramu adasosa Yuda na Yerusalemu. Iwo adapha akadamu onsene mbapokosera pinthu pizinji kwenda napyo ku Damasiko." 
2Chronicles24:24 Anyankhondo a Aaramu akhali akuchepa, kwache MBUYA adaachitisa kukunda gulu ikulu ya anyankhondo a ku Yuda, thangwi anthu akhadamkhonda MBUYA Mulungu wa makolo awo. Na njira yeneyi Mfumu Yoasi adatchunyuswa." 
2Chronicles24:25 Iye adakuwazwa pyakwanga, tenepo pidabuluka anyamalwawo ale, awiri mwa mathubu ache adamsandukira mbamphambo pikhali iye patalimba pache kubwezera chiropa cha mwana Yehoiada nyansembe chidachuchisa iye chile. Iye adaikhwa m'masiye mumzinda wa Davite, kwache hadaikhwe m'masiye achifumu tayu." 
2Chronicles24:26 Ale adamsandukira mbampha akhali Zabadu mwana Shimeati, mkazi wa Chiamoni na Yehozabadi mwana Shimiriti, mkazi wa Chimoabu." 
2Chronicles24:27 Kulonga pya anache, mphangwa zauprofeti zile zidalongwa mwakupokanyisana naye, pontho na mule mudamangira iye pontho Nyumba ya Mulungu pyalembwa m'bukhu yakulonga pizinji pya mafumu. Mwanache Amazia adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache." 
2Chronicles25:1 Amazia adapita ufumu uku ana pyaka makumawiri na pishanu mbatonga mu Yerusalemu pyaka makumawiri na pifemba. Mache akhali Yehoadini wa ku Yerusalemu. 
2Chronicles25:2 Iye adachita pinthu pyakulungama pamaso pa MBUYA, kwache hadapichite na mtimache onsene tayu." 
2Chronicles25:3 Sindzidzi iye nkhukhala na mphamvu zonsene za ufumu, adapha mathubu ale adaphambo babache." 
2Chronicles25:4 Kwache iye hadaphe anawo tayu, mbwenye adateweza pidatonga MBUYA m'Mwambo wa Mose kuti: “Makolo mbaleke phiwa thangwi ya kudawa kwa anawo, pontho ana mbaleke phiwa thangwi ya kudawa kwa makolo awo; munthu onsene athema kuphiwa thangwi ya kudawa kwache.”" 
2Chronicles25:5 Mfumu Amazia adagumanyisa amuna onsene a m'madzinza a Yuda na Benjemani mbaaikha m'magulu-magulu a nkhondo malingana na mabanjawo. Iye adaikha akadamu kuyang'anira gulu ya anyankhondo chikwi na gulu ya anyankhondo dzana. Penepa nkhuthimizapo amuna onsene akukwanisa pyaka makumawiri penu kupiringana penepo. Onsene pabodzi pene akhalipo pikwi madzana matatu. Iwo akhali magulu akusankhulika, akusasanyika kumenya nkhondo, pontho aluso pakuphatisa basa madipa na pyakugedera matswimo." 
2Chronicles25:6 Kuthimiza penepo iwo adalemba anyankhondo a ganyo pikwi dzana a ku Israele pakonta ya siliva wakulemera makilogramu pikwi pitatu na madzana manayi. 
2Chronicles25:7 Mbwenye mprofeti adenda kuna mfumu mbati, “Lekani kwata anyankhondo a ku Israele kuti muende nawo pabodzi. MBUYA hali kukhundu kwa amuna akubulukira kumpotowa tayu." 
2Chronicles25:8 Imwe munakwanisa kunyerezera kuti iwo anakuchitisani kukhala amphamvu pankhondo, kwache ndi Mulungu ule ana mphamvu zakukuchitisani kukunda nazo. Iye anatawirisa anyamalwanu kukukundani.”" 
2Chronicles25:9 Amazia adavunza mprofeti ule mbati, “Apo tinachita tani na siliva onsene aapagali ine kale ule?” Mprofeti adatawira mbati, “MBUYA anakwanisa kukubwezerani pizinji kupiringana penepyo!”" 
2Chronicles25:10 Natenepo Amazia adagwinya anyankhondo a ganyo ale mbaapanga kuti abwerere kwawo. Na thangwi yeneyi iwo adabwerera kumisa kwawo mwakuzhangali pyakwanga na anthu a ku Yuda. 
2Chronicles25:11 Amazia adaphanisira mbatsogolera anyankhondo ache kwenda phedi ya Munyu. Kweneko iwo adamenya nkhondo mbapha anyankhondo a Chiedomu pikwi khumi 
2Chronicles25:12 mbaphata anthu anango pikwi khumi unyaperezo. Iwo adaakwata mbakwira nawo pansonga ya phiri mumzinda wa Sela. Tenepo adaaponyera kuchiphedi mbanyedzeka-nyedzeka na miyala. 
2Chronicles25:13 Pandzidzi wenewu anyankhondo a Aisraele akhadakhondeswa na Amazia kwenda kunkhondo pabodzi pene naye, adasosa mizinda ya Yuda ya pakati pa Samaria na Beti-Horoni mbapha amuna pikwi pitatu pontho adapokosera pinthu pizinji." 
2Chronicles25:14 Pidabwerera Amazia kunkhondo kukhadakunda iye Aedomu kule, adadza na mifanikizo yawo ene, adaitchimika mbaipembedza na kupereka nsembe zakupyerera kuna iyo." 
2Chronicles25:15 Penepi pidachitisa MBUYA kuzhangali pyakwanga, natenepo iye adatuma mprofeti kuna Amazia kalonga kuna iye mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji mwapembedza milungu yachilendo, ile hidakwanise tayu kupulumusa anthu awo m'manja mwawo?”" 
2Chronicles25:16 Amazia adamgwandizira mbalonga mbati, “Ayi tidakuikha ndife kukhala phungu wa mfumu? Matama gopesera ndinakupha!” Mprofeti adamatama pyache. Mbwenye iye mbadzati matama adalonga kuna mfumu mbati, “Chinchino ndapidziwa kuti Mulungu anyerezera pya kukuvungani thangwi ya pinthu pyonsene pyachita imwe, pontho thangwi ya kukhonda kwanu uphungu wanga.”" 
2Chronicles25:17 Amazia mfumu wa Yuda na mapungu ache adasasanya pyakuchita nkhondo na Aisraele. Tenepo iye adatumiza mphangwa kuna Yehoasi mwana Yehoahazi mfumu wa Israele, ule akhali mdzukuluache Yehu kumpanga kuti, “Idza kuno, tilemberane mzera!”" 
2Chronicles25:18 Yehoasi adamtawira Amazia na mphangwa zakuti: “Pidachitwa na dawe mu Lebanoni, ule adatumiza mphangwa kuna muti wamkungudza mu Lebanoni kuti, ‘Sembesa mwanako wamkazi kuna mwananga wamamuna!’ Nyama yam'tsanga idagwanda na penepo mbipondedza dawe ule." 
2Chronicles25:19 Chinchino iwe Amazia ukugaya kuti udakunda Aedomu, mbwenye ine ndikukupanga kuti ukhale pyako kumusa kwako. Thangwi yache ninji unafuna kusosa nyatwa, ile inafuna kudzesa kuvungika pana iwe na anthu ako ene?”" 
2Chronicles25:20 Kwache Amazia hadavere tayu penepi. Kukhali kufuna kwa Mulungu kuti Amazia akundwe thangwi akhadapembedza mifanikizo a Aedomu. 
2Chronicles25:21 Natenepo Mfumu Yehoasi wa Israele adenda kachita nkhondo na Amazia mfumu wa Yuda. Iwo adagumana pa Beti-Shemeshi mu Yuda. 
2Chronicles25:22 Anyankhondo a ku Yuda adakundwa, tenepo munthu onsene adathawira kumusa kwache." 
2Chronicles25:23 Yehoasi adaphata Amazia mbaenda naye ku Yerusalemu. Kweneko iye adagwisa mpanda wa mzindawo kutomera pamsuwo wa Eferemu mpakana ku Msuwo Wapankhomo, nsinzo wache ukhali nenene mathanyo madzana mawiri." 
2Chronicles25:24 Iye adapokosera golidi na siliva onsene, pontho pyombo pyonsene pya m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, pile pikhayang'anirwa na pidzukulu pya Obedi-Edomu. Iye adakwata pontho mfuma yonsene ya m'nyumba yachifumu pabodzi pene na anthu ninga anyaperezo mbaenda napyo ku Samaria." 
2Chronicles25:25 Amazia mfumu wa Yuda adathimiza basi kukhala na moyo pyaka pinango khumi na pishanu pidafa Yehoasi mfumu wa Israele. 
2Chronicles25:26 Pinango pyonsene pidachitika Amazia mbali mfumu, kutoma na kumalisa kwa ufumu wache, pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Yuda na Israele." 
2Chronicles25:27 Kutomera ndzidzi udabauka Amazia kubuluka kuna MBUYA, anthu akhadasasanya pyakumpha mu Yerusalemu. Pakumalisira pache iye adathawira kumzinda wa Lakishi, kwache anyamalwache adamtewera mbakamphera konthoko." 
2Chronicles25:28 Mtembo wache udathukulwa pakavalo kwenda nawo ku Yerusalemu. Tenepo adaikhwa m'masiye achifumu mumzinda wa Davite. 
2Chronicles26:1 Anthu onsene a mu Yuda adasankhula mbodzi wa ana achimuna a Amazia wa pyaka khumi na pitanthatu, ule dzinache ikhali Uzia, kupita ufumu m'mbuto mwa babache." 
2Chronicles26:2 Ukhali ndzidzi udagonera mkono Amazia pidapokoserwa mzinda wa Elati na Uzia mbaumanga pontho. 
2Chronicles26:3 Uzia adakhala mfumu uku ana pyaka khumi na pitanthatu pyakubalwa mbatonga mu Yerusalemu pyaka makumashanu na piwiri. Mache akhali Yekolia wa ku Yerusalemu. 
2Chronicles26:4 Iye adachita pyakulungama pamaso pa MBUYA ninga montho mudachitira Amazia babache. 
2Chronicles26:5 Ndzidzi onsene ukhali Zekaria na moyo, ule akhali phungu wa mfumu pachipembedzo, mfumu adatumikira MBUYA mwakukhulupirika, tenepo Mulungu adamtsanzayisa." 
2Chronicles26:6 Uzia adenda kachita nkhondo na Afilisti. Iye adagwisa mpanda wa Gati, Yaminia na Ashidodi mbamanga mizinda yakutchingwa na mpanda chifupi na Ashidodi, pontho na m'dziko yonsene ya Afilisti." 
2Chronicles26:7 Mulungu adamphedza kukunda Afilisti, Aarabu akhakhala ku Guribaala na Ameuni ale." 
2Chronicles26:8 Aamoni akhakhoma msonkho kuna Uzia, natenepo iye adakhala na mphamvu pyakwanga mwakuti adaveka mpakana ku Iguputo." 
2Chronicles26:9 Uzia adachitisa mpanda wakuzungulira Yerusalemu kukhala wamphamvu pakumanga nsanja pa Msuwo Wapankhomo wa mpanda, Msuwo wa Kuphedi wa mpanda, na padagonya fufu ya mpanda." 
2Chronicles26:10 Iye adamanga pontho nsanja kuthando yatchetcha mbakumbako michera thangwi iye akhali na mikumbi mizinji ya pifuyo m'tchindetchinde mwa mapiri na m'maphedi kumadokero dzuwa. Podi kulima ndiye ikhali basache, adapanga anthu kuti abzale mfesa m'minda ya m'mapiri pontho kulima pamataka adidi akubalisa pinthu." 
2Chronicles26:11 Iye akhali na gulu ikulu ya anyankhondo akusasanyika kale kamenya nkhondo m'magulu-magulu. Iwo adagumanyiswa mbalengeswa na anyakulemba a mfumu, Yeiele na Maaseia, mwakuyang'anirwa na Hanania mbodzi wa anyakuphatira mfumu basa." 
2Chronicles26:12 Gulu ya nkhondo ile ikhatongwa na akadamu pikwi piwiri na madzana matanthatu. 
2Chronicles26:13 Pansi pa akadamu enewa pakhali anyankhondo pikwi madzana matatu na pinomwe na madzana mashanu, ale akhali akukwanisa mwadidi kumenya nkhondo na anyamalwa a mfumu." 
2Chronicles26:14 Uzia adapereka kuna anyankhondo ache pyakugedera matswimo, madipa, pipewa pyasimbi, pyakuvala pankhondo, mauta na matswimo, pontho na miyala ya mbemba." 
2Chronicles26:15 Mu Yerusalemu anyaluso adamsasanyira makina akuponyera matswimo na miyala mikulu-mikulu kubulukira pa nsanja na pankhomo za mpanda. Iye adaveka konsene kwene, pontho adasanduka wamphamvu pyakwanga, thangwi ya kuphedzwa kukhadachitwa iye na Mulungu." 
2Chronicles26:16 Kwache pidasanduka Mfumu Uzia kukhala wamphamvu pyakwanga, adatoma kutumbama, kule kudamchitisa kuti agwe. Iye akhali okhonda khulupirika kuna MBUYA Mulungu wache pakupita m'Nyumba ya Mulungu kafukiza pyakununkhira paguwa." 
2Chronicles26:17 Azaria nyansembe pabodzi pene na anyansembe makumasere akuwanga mtima pontho amphamvu adatewera mfumu 
2Chronicles26:18 kuti amkhondese. Iwo adalonga mbati, “Uzia, iwe nkhabe utongi wakufukiza pyakununkhira kuna MBUYA tayu. Anyansembe ene basi, ale mphidzukulu pya Aroni ndiye adapambulwa kuti aphate basa yeneyi. Buluka pambuto yakuchenayi. Iwe wadawira MBUYA Mulungu, natenepo iye nkhabeve kukutsanzayisa tayu.”" 
2Chronicles26:19 Uzia akhadaimira penepo m'Nyumba ya MBUYA chifupi na guwa yakufukizirapo pyakununkhira uku m'manja mwache aphatira chiwaya cha pyakununkhira. Iye adazhangalira anyansembe ale. Kabodzi kene utenda wa pamanungo udaoneka pachipumu pa mfumu. 
2Chronicles26:20 Azaria na anyansembe anango ale adayang'ana pachipumu pa mfumu mbamkhakhamiza kubuluka m'nyumbamo. Iye adachimbiza kubulukamo, thangwi MBUYA akhadamtchunyusa." 
2Chronicles26:21 Kutomera penepo mpakana moyo wache onsene Mfumu Uzia akhali munthu okhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu, thangwi ya utenda ukhali na iye ule. Na thangwi yakuti iye hadakwanise pontho tayu kupita m'Nyumba ya MBUYA, adakhala m'nyumba yache ene mbapuma pabasa yonsene ikhaphata iye, natenepo Yotamu mwanache adatonga dziko ile." 
2Chronicles26:22 Mprofeti Yesaya mwana Amozi adalemba pinango pyonsene pidachita Uzia mwenemo mbali mfumu. 
2Chronicles26:23 Uzia adagonera mkono mbaikhwa chifupi na masiye achifumu. Iye hadaikhwe m'masiye achifumu tayu thangwi ya utenda ukhali na iye ule. Yotamu Mwanache adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache. 
2Chronicles27:1 Yotamu adapita ufumu uku ana pyaka makumawiri na pishanu pyakubalwa mbatonga mu Yerusalemu pyaka khumi na pitanthatu. Mache akhali Yerusha mwana Zadoki. 
2Chronicles27:2 Iye adachita pyakulungama pamaso pa MBUYA ninga montho mudachitira babache. Kwache iye hadadawe tayu pakufukiza pyakununkhira m'Nyumba ya MBUYA ninga mudachitira babache. Mbwenye anthu adathimiza basi kudawa. 
2Chronicles27:3 Yotamu ndiye adamanga msuwo wakumpoto kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu mbaphata basa ikulu pampanda wa mzinda wa Yerusalemu kuphiri ya Ofele. 
2Chronicles27:4 Iye adamanga mizinda m'mapiri a Yuda mbamanga mipanda na nsanja m'misitu. 
2Chronicles27:5 Iye pabodzi pene na anyankhondo ache adamenyana na Aamoni mbaakunda. Natenepo pyaka pitatu iye adakhakhamiza Aamoni kukhoma msonkho chaka na chaka pinthu ipi: siliva wakulemera makilogramu pikwi pitatu na madzana manayi; tirigu wakukwana pingolo pikwi piwiri; barele wakukwana pingolo pikwi piwiri. 
2Chronicles27:6 Yotamu adakhala wamphamvu pyakwanga thangwi iye adavera MBUYA Mulungu wache mwakukhulupirika. 
2Chronicles27:7 Pinthu pinango pile pidachitika mwenemo Yotamu mbali mfumu, nkhondo zidamenya iye, na njira zikhafambisira iye ufumu wache, pyonsenepi pyalembwa m'mabukhu a mbiri ya mafumu a Israele na Yuda." 
2Chronicles27:8 Pikhapita Yotamu ufumu akhali na pyaka makumawiri na pishanu mbatonga mu Yerusalemu pyaka khumi na pitanthatu. 
2Chronicles27:9 Iye adagonera mkono mbaikhwa m'masiye a mumzinda wa Davite, tenepo Ahazi mwanache adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache." 
2Chronicles28:1 Ahazi adapita ufumu uku ana pyaka makumawiri mbatonga mu Yerusalemu pyaka khumi na pitanthatu. Iye hadateweze tayu njira zadidi za kholo yache Mfumu Davite; m'mbuto mwache iye adachita pinthu pyakukhonda komera MBUYA 
2Chronicles28:2 mbateweza njira zakuipa za mafumu a Israele. Iye adasasanyisa mfanikizo wasimbi wa milungu Baala. 
2Chronicles28:3 Iye akhafukiza pyakununkhira m'phedi ya Beni-Hinomu mbapereka podi na anache ene ninga nsembe yakupyerera kuna mifanikizo, kutsanzira mitemo ya yakunyansa ya anthu, ale akhadathamangiswa na MBUYA pikhapita Aisraele m'dzikomo." 
2Chronicles28:4 Pambuto zakupembedzerapo milungu, pamapiri ang'ono-ang'ono pontho na pansi pa muti onsene wakuvata, Ahazi akhaperekapo nsembe na kufukiza pyakununkhira." 
2Chronicles28:5 Na thangwi yakuti Mfumu Ahazi adadawa, MBUYA Mulungu wache adatawirisa mfumu wa Aramu kumkunda mbakwata anthu ache a ku Yuda azinji ninga anyaperezo kwenda nawo ku Damasiko. MBUYA adatawirisa pontho mfumu wa Israele, Peka mwana Remalia kukunda Ahazi mbapha anyankhondo akuwanga mtima a ku Yuda pikwi dzana na makumawiri pansiku ibodzi ene. Mulungu wa makolo awo adatawirisa penepi kuchitika thangwi anthu a ku Yuda akhadakhonda MBUYA." 
2Chronicles28:6  
2Chronicles28:7 Nyankhondo unango wa Chiisraele dzinache Zikiri ndiye adapha Maaseia mwana Mfumu Ahazi, Azirikamu nyakufambisa pinthu pya kunyumba yachifumu na Elikana ule akhali wachiwiri wa mfumu." 
2Chronicles28:8 Podi kwene kuti anthu a ku Yuda akhali abale awo, anyankhondo a ku Israele adaphata akazi na anawo ene pikwi madzana mawiri kwenda nawo ku Samaria kakhala anyaperezo mbapokosera pontho na pinthu pyawo pizinji." 
2Chronicles28:9 Munthu unango dzinache Odedi, mprofeti wa MBUYA akhakhala mumzinda wa Samaria. Iye adagumanikana na anyankhondo a Chiisraele, ale akhali pabodzi pene na anyaperezo a ku Yuda. Pikhali iwo chifupi kupita mumzinda mule, iye adalonga mbati, “MBUYA Mulungu wa makolo anu adazhangalira anthu a ku Yuda mbakutawirisani kuakunda, kwache iye aona kuacheka mwavinga kwaachita imweko." 
2Chronicles28:10 Lero munafuna kuti amuna na akazi a mu Yerusalemu na Yuda akhale mabitchu anu. Kadi imwe nkhabe dziwa tayu kuti mwachita pyakudawika pamaso pa MBUYA Mulungu wanu? 
2Chronicles28:11 Ngavani kuno! Anyaperezowa mbabale anu pontho anyamainganu. Alekeni aende pyawo gopesera MBUYA anakutchunyusani mwakuzhangali!” 
2Chronicles28:12 Amuna anayi akuveka a m'dzinza ya Eferemu: Azaria mwana Yehohanani, Berekia mwana Meshilemoti, Yehizikia mwana Shalumu na Amasa mwana Hadilai adasumululambo pidachita anyankhondo pile." 
2Chronicles28:13 Iwo adalonga mbati, “Lekani kudza nawo kuno anyaperezowo! Ife tadawira kale MBUYA, pontho tamzhangalisa mwakuti anatitchunyusa. Apo lero munafuna kuchita pontho chinthu chinango kuthimizira pakudawa kwachita ife kaleku?”" 
2Chronicles28:14 Natenepo anyankhondo ale adapereka anyaperezo ale pabodzi pene na pinthu pidapokosera iwo m'manja mwa anthu na akadamu awo. 
2Chronicles28:15 Tenepo amuna anayi adasankhulwa kuti agawize anyaperezo ale nguwo zidapokosera iwo zile. Iwo adapereka kuna iwo nguwo na nkhwaira, adaapasa pizinji pyakukwanisa kudya na kumwa, pontho adaikha mafuta aolivi papironda pyawo. Ale akhachimwanaletu kufamba akhapakizwa pamabulu, pontho anyaperezo anango onsene adabwerera nawo ku Yeriko, mzinda wa miti yamdikhwa, m'nthemba ya Yuda. Kubuluka penepo Aisraele adabwerera kwawo ku Samaria." 
2Chronicles28:16 Pandzidzi wenewo Aedomu adapita pontho mu Yuda mbaphata anyaperezo azinji ene. Natenepo Mfumu Ahazi adapempha Tigilati-Pilesere, mfumu wa Asiria kuti amphedze." 
2Chronicles28:17  
2Chronicles28:18 Pandzidzi onthowo Afilisti akhapita m'maluwani akumadokero dzuwa m'tchinde mwa mapiri na m'thando yatchetcha ya Negebu mu Yuda. Iwo adapokosera mizinda ya Beti-Shemeshi, Aialoni na Gederoti, pontho na mizinda ya Soko, Timina na Gimizo, pontho na midzi yawo yakuzungulira mbakhazikika mwenemo." 
2Chronicles28:19 Na thangwi yakuti Mfumu Ahazi wa Yuda adachitisa anthu ache kudawa, pontho kuti iye hadakhulupirike tayu kuna MBUYA, tenepo MBUYA adadzesa nyatwa pana Yuda." 
2Chronicles28:20 Tigilati-Pilesere, mfumu wa Asiria, m'mbuto mwa kumphedza Ahazi, iye adamuonesa nyatwa." 
2Chronicles28:21 Natenepo Ahazi adakwata golidi wa m'Nyumba ya MBUYA, wa m'nyumba yachifumu na m'nyumba za akadamu a anthu mbapipereka kuna mfumu wa Asiria. Podi kwene kuti adachita tenepo, kwache ipyo nee pidamphedze tayu." 
2Chronicles28:22 Pidandendeya nyatwa za Ahazi, iye adanyanyiratu kudawa pamaso pa MBUYA kupiringana pakutoma." 
2Chronicles28:23 Iye adapereka nsembe kuna milungu ya Damasiko, ikhadamkunda ile. Iye adalonga mbati, “Milungu ya Aaramu imbaphedza mafumu a Aramu, natenepo ngakhala ine ndinapereka nsembe kuna iyo, inati indiphedze.” Penepi pidadzesa nyatwa zikulu pana iye na dziko yache ene." 
2Chronicles28:24 Kuthimiza penepo iye adakwata pinthu pyonsene pya m'Nyumba ya MBUYA mbamala kupiswa. Iye adafunga Nyumba ya Mulungu mbamanga maguwa ansembe ponsene pene mu Yerusalemu. 
2Chronicles28:25 Mumzinda onsene na luwani yonsene mu Yuda, iye adasasanya mbuto zakupembedzerapo, kule kukhafukizirwa pyakununkhira kuna milungu yachilendo. Na njira yeneyi iye adazhangalisa MBUYA, Mulungu wa makolo ache." 
2Chronicles28:26 Pinango pyonsene pile pidachitika mwenemo iye mbali mfumu, kutomera pakutoma kufikirana pakumalisira pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Yuda na Israele." 
2Chronicles28:27 Mfumu Ahazi adagonera mkono mbaikhwa mu Yerusalemu, kwache iye hadaikhwe m'masiye achifumu tayu. Hezekia mwanache adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache." 
2Chronicles29:1 Hezekia adapita ufumu wa Yuda uku ana pyaka makumawiri na pishanu mbatonga mu Yerusalemu pyaka makumawiri na pifemba. Mache akhali Abia mwana Zekaria. 
2Chronicles29:2 Iye adachita pyakulungama pamaso pa MBUYA ninga montho mudachitirambo Mfumu Davite kholo wache. 
2Chronicles29:3 Mwezi wakutoma wa chaka, Hezekia mbali mfumu kale, adafungula misuwo ya Nyumba ya Mulungu mbaisasanyisa pontho." 
2Chronicles29:4 Iye adagumanyisa gulu ya anyansembe na Alevi pachintalo cha Nyumba ya Mulungu kumabulukiro dzuwa 
2Chronicles29:5 mbalonga nawo kweneko. Iye adalonga mbati, “Imwe Alevi mwathema kupipambula mwekha mwene mbamuchenesa Nyumba ya Mulungu wa makolo anu. Bulusani m'Nyumba ya MBUYA chinthu chonsene chakukhonda chena." 
2Chronicles29:6 Makolo athu akhali okhonda khulupirika kuna MBUYA Mulungu wathu mbachita pinthu pyakukhonda kumkomera. Iwo adamkhonda mbampasa nkhodolo pambuto pakhala iye pale. 
2Chronicles29:7 Iwo adafunga misuwo ya Nyumba ya MBUYA, pontho adathimisa nyale mbachimwana kufukiza pyakununkhira penu kupereka nsembe zakupyerera m'Nyumba ya MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele." 
2Chronicles29:8 Na thangwi ya penepi MBUYA azhangalira Yuda na Yerusalemu; iye adaasanduza kukhala chinthu chakugumisa manungo, chakuchitisa mantha na chakusekesa. Imwe mukupidziwa penepi mwadidi mwene." 
2Chronicles29:9 Makolo athu adaphiwa pankhondo, pontho akazathu na anathu adaphatwa kakhala anyaperezo." 
2Chronicles29:10 “Lero ndanyerezera pyakuchita chiverano na MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele, towera ukali wache wakugoswa ubuluke pana ife." 
2Chronicles29:11 Ananga, lekani dembuka. Imwe ngale adasankhulwa na MBUYA kuti mufukize pyakununkhira kuna iye na kutsogolera anthu pachipembedzo chache.”" 
2Chronicles29:12 Alevi ali m'tchindemu akhali penepo: Kubulukira kuna nkhonda Kohati pakhali Mahati mwana Amasai na Yowele mwana Azaria Kubulukira kuna nkhonda Merari pakhali Kishi mwana Abidi na Azaria mwana Yehalelele Kubulukira kuna nkhonda Gereshoni pakhali Yoa mwana Zima na Edeni mwana Yoa Kubulukira kuna nkhonda Elizafani pakhali Shimri na Yeuele Kubulukira kuna nkhonda Asafu pakhali Zekaria na Matania Kubulukira kuna nkhonda Hemani pakhali Yehuele na Shimei. Kubulukira kuna nkhonda Yedutuni pakhali Shemaia na Uziele. 
2Chronicles29:13  
2Chronicles29:14  
2Chronicles29:15 Amuna enewa adagumanyisa Alevi anzawo mbapichitisa okha ene kukhala akuchena pamaso pa Mulungu. Tenepo ninga montho mukhadaapangira mfumu kuti achite, iwo adatoma kuchenesa Nyumba ya Mulungu malingana na mwambo wa MBUYA." 
2Chronicles29:16 Anyansembe adapita m'bwalo mule kaichenesa pontho adabulusa pyonsene pya m'Nyumba ya MBUYA na muchintalo chache, pile pikhali pyokhonda chena. Kubuluka penepo Alevi adathukula pyonsene kupibulusa mumzinda mule kwenda napyo kuphedi ya Kidroni." 
2Chronicles29:17 Basa idatoma pansiku yakutoma ya mwezi wakutoma, tenepo pidafika iyo pansiku yachisere basa yonsene ikhadamaliswa, kuthimizapo msuwo wakupitira m'Nyumba ya MBUYA. Kubuluka penepo adaphata pontho nsiku zinango zisere mpakana pansiku yakhumi na chitanthatu ya mwezi wenewo, kusasanya Nyumba ya Mulungu kuti anthu apembedzemo." 
2Chronicles29:18 Alevi adalonga kuna Mfumu Hezekia pinthu pidachita iwo mbati, “Ife tamala kuchita mwambo wakuchenesa Nyumba yonsene ya MBUYA, kuthimizapo guwa yakuperekerapo nsembe zakupyerera na pyombo pyache pene, pontho na thebulu yakuperekerapo mikate yakupambulika na pyombo pyache pene." 
2Chronicles29:19 Ife tabwezera m'mbuto mwache pinthu pyonsene pikhadabulusa Mfumu Ahazi pandzidzi ukhali iye okhonda khulupirika kuna MBUYA ule, pontho tapambulira pyonsene kuna Mulungu. Pyonsene pili patsogolo pa guwa yansembe ya MBUYA.”" 
2Chronicles29:20 Mangwana mwache na machibese Mfumu Hezekia adagumanyisa amuna akuveka a mumzinda mule, tenepo onsene pabodzi pene adenda ku Nyumba ya MBUYA." 
2Chronicles29:21 Iwo adapereka ng'ombe zimuna zinomwe, mabira anomwe, anabira anomwe na mbuzi zinomwe kukhala pyakupereka pyakubulusira pyakudawa pya banja yachifumu na pya anthu a ku Yuda pontho na pyakuchenesera Nyumba ya MBUYA. Mfumu adapanga anyansembe ale akhali pidzukulu pya Aroni kuti apereke nyama zile ninga nsembe paguwa ya MBUYA." 
2Chronicles29:22 Anyansembe chakutoma adapha ng'ombe zimuna zile, kubuluka penepo adapha mabira, kachitatu kache adapha anabira, kubuluka penepo adawaza chiropa cha nyama yonsene paguwa yansembe." 
2Chronicles29:23 Pakumalisira pache iwo adakwata mbuzi zile kwenda nazo kuna mfumu na kuna anthu onsene anango ale akhasanjika manjawo pana mbuzizo. 
2Chronicles29:24 Kubuluka penepo anyansembe adapha mbuzi zile mbakhuthulira chiropa chache paguwa yansembe kukhala nsembe yakubulusira pyakudawa pya anthu onsene, thangwi mfumu akhadatonga kuti nsembe zakupyerera na nsembe yakubulusira pyakudawa piperekwe thangwi ya Aisraele onsene." 
2Chronicles29:25 Mfumu adateweza kuchita pyonsene pidalonga MBUYA kuna Mfumu Davite kudzera muna Gadi mprofeti wa mfumu, pontho kudzera muna mprofeti Natani. Iye adaikha Alevi m'Nyumba ya MBUYA mbaapasa anyakatangale na nkhotcho," 
2Chronicles29:26 pyakuimbira ninga pikhaphatisa basa Mfumu Davite. Anyansembe adaimirambo penepo na ngoma. 
2Chronicles29:27 Hezekia adatonga kuti nsembe zakupyerera ziperekwe; tenepo pidatoma kuperekwa nsembe ile, anthu adaimba nyimbo zakukuza nazo MBUYA, pontho anyakuimba adatoma kuliza ngoma pontho na kuimba pyakuimbira pinango pyonsene." 
2Chronicles29:28 Munthu onsene akhali penepo, adapembedza pontho kuimba nawo pabodzi, tenepo nyimbo zinango zonsene zidathimiza basi kuimbwa kufikirana nsembe zonsene zakupyerera zidamala perekwa." 
2Chronicles29:29 Kubuluka penepo Mfumu Hezekia na anthu onsene adagodama mbapembedza Mulungu. 
2Chronicles29:30 Mfumu na akadamu a dzinza yonsene adapanga Alevi kuti aimbe nyimbo zakukuza nazo MBUYA, zile zidalembwa na Davite pontho Asafu mprofeti. Natenepo munthu onsene adaimba na kukomerwa kukulu pikhagodama iwo kupembedza Mulungu." 
2Chronicles29:31 Hezekia adalonga kuna anthu mbati, “Podi chinchino imwe mwachena pamaso pa MBUYA, idzani na nsembe zanu kukhala chakupereka, kupereka takhuta kuna Mulungu.” Iwo adavera, tenepo anango a iwo adadza mwakufuna kwawo na nyama kuti ziperekwe nsembe zakupyerera kuna MBUYA." 
2Chronicles29:32 Iwo adadza pontho na ng'ombe zimuna makumanomwe, mabira dzana na anabira madzana mawiri kukhala pyakupereka pyakupyerera kuna MBUYA." 
2Chronicles29:33 Iwo adadza pontho na ng'ombe zimuna madzana matanthatu na mabira pikwi pitatu kukhala nsembe kuti anthu adye. 
2Chronicles29:34 Na thangwi yakuti pakhali nkhabe anyansembe azinji kuti mbadakwanisa kupha nyama zonsenezi, Alevi adaaphedza kufikirana basa yonsene idamala. Pandzidzi wenewo anyansembe azinji adapichenesa okha ene pamaso pa Mulungu. Alevi adachita chipapu pakupichenesa okha ene pamaso pa Mulungu kupiringana anyansembe." 
2Chronicles29:35 Kuthimizira pa nsembe zile zikhaotchiwa zamumphu, anyansembe adapaswa basa yakuotcha mafuta, ale adaperekwa kubulukira kunsembe zikhadya anthu, pontho na kupereka nsembe pyakumwa, pile pikhaperekwa kubodzi kwene na nsembe zakupyerera zile. Natenepo chipembedzo cha m'Nyumba ya MBUYA chidatoma pontho." 
2Chronicles29:36 Mfumu Hezekia na anthu adakomerwa pyakwanga thangwi Mulungu adaaphedza kuchita pyonsenepi mwakuchimbiza. 
2Chronicles30:1 Anthu hakhakwanisa tayu kusekera Phwando ya Paska pandzidzi wakuthema wa mwezi wakutoma, thangwi si anyansembe azinji akhali akuchena pamaso pa Mulungu, pontho si anthu azinji akhadagumanyikana mu Yerusalemu tayu. Natenepo Mfumu Hezekia, mathubu ache na anthu a mu Yerusalemu adaphatizana kuchita phwando yeneyi mwezi wachiwiri, tenepo mfumu adatumiza mphangwa kuna anthu onsene a mu Israele na Yuda. Iye adaonesesa kuti atumiza makalata kuna madzinza a Eferemu na Manase kuachemera ku Nyumba ya Mulungu mu Yerusalemu dzasekera Phwando ya Paska kulemedza MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele." 
2Chronicles30:2  
2Chronicles30:3  
2Chronicles30:4 Mfumu na anthu akhadakomerwa pyakwanga na pidanyerezera iwo kuchita pile. 
2Chronicles30:5 Tenepo iwo adachemeresa Aisraele onsene, kubulukira ku Dani kumpoto mpakana ku Beeresheba kumwera, kuti agumanyikane pabodzi pene mu Yerusalemu mwinji ukulu ene kupiringana pakutoma pale mbasekera Phwando ya Paska malingana na mwambo wache." 
2Chronicles30:6 Anyamphangwa adatumwa na mfumu pontho mathubu ache mbaenda ku Yuda konsene na Israele onsene na mphangwa zakulonga kuti: “Imwe Aisraele, mudapulumuka m'manja mwa Aasiria ale akhafuna kukunda dziko yathu. Natenepo zungunukani kuna MBUYA Mulungu wa Abrahamu, Isake na Yakobo, iye anabwerambo kuna imwe." 
2Chronicles30:7 Lekani khala ninga makolo anu na Aisraele anzanu ale akhali okhonda kukhulupirika kuna MBUYA Mulungu wawo. Imwe munakwanisa kuona mwekha ene kuti iye adaatchunyusa pikulu pene. 
2Chronicles30:8 Lekani umisa mtima ninga mudachitira iwo. Mbwenye verani MBUYA. Dzani ku Nyumba ya Mulungu mu Yerusalemu, ile MBUYA Mulungu wanu aichitisa kukhala yakuchena ndzidzi onsene mbamumpembedze, towera ukali wache wakugoswa ubuluke pana imwe." 
2Chronicles30:9 Ngakhala imwe munabwerera kuna MBUYA, tenepo ale adakwata abale anu ninga anyaperezo anaavera nsisi mbaatawirisa kubwerera kumusa kwawo. MBUYA Mulungu wanu ngwakukoma mtima pontho wansisi, tenepo ngakhala imwe munabwerera kuna iye, iyembo anati akutambireni.”" 
2Chronicles30:10 Anyamphangwa ale adenda kumizinda yonsene m'nthemba za madzinza a Eferemu na Manase, pontho mpakana kumpoto kuna dzinza ya Zebuloni, mbwenye anthu adaaseka mbaasedegula." 
2Chronicles30:11 Kwache pakhali anango akubulukira kuna madzinza a Asheri, Manase na Zebuloni ale akhapifuna kwenda ku Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles30:12 Mulungu akhaphata basache mu Yuda mbachitisa anthu kukhala akuphatizana paphinga yawo kufuna kuvera pinafuna iye pakuteweza matongero a mfumu na mathubu ache. 
2Chronicles30:13 Mwinji ukulu wa anthu udagumanyikana mu Yerusalemu mwezi wachiwiri kuchita Phwando ya Mikate yakusowa chakufufumisira. 
2Chronicles30:14 Iwo adabulusa maguwa onsene ale akhadaphatiswa basa mu Yerusalemu kuperekerapo nsembe zakupyerera na kufukiza pyakununkhira kuna milungu mbapitaya m'phedi ya Kidroni. 
2Chronicles30:15 Tenepo pansiku yakhumi na chinayi ya mwezi, iwo adapha anabira kuti aperekwe nsembe pa Phwando ya Paska. Anyansembe na Alevi ale akhali okhonda chena pamaso pa MBUYA akhali na manyadzo pyakwanga mwakuti iwombo adapichenesa okha ene pamaso pa MBUYA, tenepo iwo adakwanisa kupereka nsembe zakupyerera m'Nyumba ya MBUYA." 
2Chronicles30:16 Iwo adakwata chidzo chikhali na iwo m'Nyumba ya MBUYA malingana na mwambo wa Mose, munthu wa Mulungu ule. Alevi adapereka chiropa cha nsembe kuna anyansembe, ale adachiwazira paguwa yansembe." 
2Chronicles30:17 Na thangwi yakuti anthu azinji akhali okhonda chena pamaso pa MBUYA, iwo mbadapha tayu mabira akuperekwa nsembe pa Phwando ya Paska, natenepo Alevi ndiye adaaphera mbapereka anabira ale m'manja mwa MBUYA." 
2Chronicles30:18 Kuthimiza penepo ale akhadadza kubulukira kumadzinza a Eferemu, Manase, Isakara na Zebuloni hakhadachita tayu mwambo wakupichenesa, natenepo iwo adadya na anthu Phwando ya Paska mwakuswa mwambo. Mfumu Hezekia adaapempherera mbati," 
2Chronicles30:19 “MBUYA Mulungu wa makolo athu, na udidi wanu lekererani pyakudawa pya anthu ambakupembedzani na mtima onsene ale, podi kwene kuti iwo ngokhonda chena pamaso panu.”" 
2Chronicles30:20 MBUYA adava kupemphera kwa Hezekia; iye adalekerera anthu ache mbakhonda kuakuwaza. 
2Chronicles30:21 Nsiku zinomwe anthu akhadagumanyikana mu Yerusalemu ale adasekera Phwando ya Mikate yakusowa chakufufumisira na kukomerwa kukulu, tenepo nsiku na nsiku Alevi na anyansembe adakuza MBUYA na mphamvu zawo zonsene." 
2Chronicles30:22 Hezekia adapereka takhuta kuna Alevi, thangwi ya kupidziwisa kwawo kuchita mwambo wakupembedza MBUYA. Pidagwanda nsiku zinomwe zile zikhapereka iwo nsembe kukuza MBUYA Mulungu wa makolo awo," 
2Chronicles30:23 onsene adaphatizana kusekera pontho nsiku zinango zinomwe. Natenepo iwo adasekera na kukomerwa. 
2Chronicles30:24 Mfumu Hezekia adapereka ng'ombe zimuna chikwi, mabira pikwi pinomwe kuti anthu aphe mbadya, tenepo mathubu adaperekambo ng'ombe zimuna chikwi na mabira pikwi khumi. Anyansembe azinji adachita mwambo wakupichenesa nsiku yeneyo." 
2Chronicles30:25 Natenepo munthu onsene adakomerwa; anthu a ku Yuda, anyansembe, Alevi, anthu akhadabulukira kumpoto ale, na alendo akhadakhazikika mu Israele na Yuda ale." 
2Chronicles30:26 Mzinda onsene wa Yerusalemu udadzala na kukomerwa, thangwi pinthu ninga penepi chipo pidzati chitika tayu kutomera pansiku za Mfumu Solomoni mwana Davite." 
2Chronicles30:27 Anyansembe na Alevi adapempha MBUYA kuti atsanzayise anthu. M'Nyumba mwache kudzulu Mulungu adava kupemphera kwawo mbaatawira. 
2Chronicles31:1 Pidamala phwando ile, anthu onsene Aisraele adenda kumaluwani onsene a Yuda mbagomola piguwa pyakupambulika, kugwisa adzimunthu a milungu Ashera mbagomola maguwa onsene ansembe na kuvunga mbuto zonsene zakupembedzerapo milungu. Adachita chibodzi-bodzi kuna nthemba zinango zonsene za Yuda, Benjemani, Eferemu na Manase; kubuluka penepo onsene adabwerera kumisa kwawo." 
2Chronicles31:2 Mfumu Hezekia adakhazikisa pontho gulu ya anyansembe na Alevi, ale kada gulu ikhali na basache. Mabasa enewa nkhuthimizapo kupereka nsembe zakupyerera na nsembe zachiphatizano, kukwata khundu pachipembedzo m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, kukuza na kupereka takhuta pambuto zakulekana lekana m'Nyumba ya MBUYA."
