2Chronicles31:3 Kubulukira pa mkumbi wa pifuyo pyache iye adapereka nyama kuti zikhale nsembe zakupyerera machibese onsene na mawulo onsene, pontho na zile zikhaperekwa pa Nsiku Yakupuma, pa Phwando yakusekera Kubalwa kwa mwezi na maphwando anango akusankhulika ale adathema kuchitika malingana na mwambo wa MBUYA." 
2Chronicles31:4 Kuthimiza penepo mfumu adapanga anthu a ku Yerusalemu kudza na pyakupereka kuna anyansembe na Alevi, pile pidathema iwo kutambira, towera ndzidzi wawo onsene apipereke kuna pinafuna mwambo wa MBUYA." 
2Chronicles31:5 Sindzidzi Aisraele nkhuva penepi, adadza na mitukwa ya mapira akutoma kutokota, vinyu, mafuta aolivi, uchi na pinango pya m'munda, mbadza pontho na chakhumi cha pyonsene pikhali na iwo." 
2Chronicles31:6 Anthu onsene akhakhala m'mizinda ya Yuda adadza na chakhumi cha ng'ombe zawo na mabira mbadza pontho na mitukwa izinji, ile idapambulira iwo kuna MBUYA Mulungu wawo, mbaimuluka." 
2Chronicles31:7 Mitukwa idatoma kudza pamwezi wachitatu mbithimiza kudza basi mpakana miyezi inango minayi. 
2Chronicles31:8 Mfumu Hezekia na mathubu ache pidaona iwo pinthu pikhadaperekwa pile, adakuza MBUYA mbakuza pontho anthu ache." 
2Chronicles31:9 Mfumu adalonga kuna anyansembe na Alevi pya mitukwa yeneyi," 
2Chronicles31:10 tenepo Azaria Nyansembe Wamkulu, chidzukulu cha Zadoki ule, adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Kutomera nsiku idatoma anthu kudza na mitukwa ku Nyumba ya Mulungu, pana pyakudya pyakukwanira, pinango mbapisala pontho. Ife tina pyonsene thangwi MBUYA atsanzayisa anthu ache.”" 
2Chronicles31:11 Mfumu adatonga kuti masubi akukoyeramo pinthu asasanywe m'Nyumba ya Mulungu. 
2Chronicles31:12 Tenepo iwo adaikhamo mitukwa na chakhumi chonsene kuti pikoyeke mwadidi. Iwo adaikha Mlevi unango dzinache Konania kukhala nyakuyang'anira penepyo mbaikha pontho mbaleache Shimei kukhala nyachiwiriache. 
2Chronicles31:13 Alevi khumi adapangwa kuphata basa pansi pa utongi wawo: Yehiele, Azazia, Nahati, Asahele, Yerimoti, Yozabadi, Eliele, Isimakia, Mahati na Benaia. Pyonsenepi pidachitwa pansi pa utongi wa Mfumu Hezekia na Azaria Nyansembe Wamkulu." 
2Chronicles31:14 Kore mwana Imina, Mlevi ule akhali nyakulondali wamkulu pa msuwo wa mpanda kumabulukiro dzuwa a Nyumba ya Mulungu, ndiye akhali mkadamu wakutambira mitukwa yakuperekwa kuna MBUYA na kuigawiza anthu." 
2Chronicles31:15 Kumizinda inango kukhakhala anyansembe kule, iye akhaphedzwa mwakukhulupirika na Alevi anango: Edeni, Miniamini, Yeshua, Shemaia, Amaria, na Shekania. Iwo adagawa pyakudya pile sasawa kuna Alevi anzawo malingana na basa ikhaphata iwo," 
2Chronicles31:16 nee malingana na mbumba ikhadabulukira iwo tayu. Iwo akhadapereka pinthu pile kuna amuna onsene akukwanisa pyaka makumatatu penu kupiringana penepo ale akhaphata basa nsiku na nsiku m'Nyumba ya Mulungu malingana na chidzo chawo. 
2Chronicles31:17 Anyansembe akhapaswa basa malingana na mabanjawo, Alevimbo akukwanisa pyaka makumawiri pyakubalwa, penu kupiringana penepo akhapaswa basa malingana na gulu yawo." 
2Chronicles31:18 Onsene akhadalembwa pabodzi pene na akazawo, anawo, na anango akhakoya iwo ale, thangwi pikhafunika kuti ndzidzi onsene akhale akusasanyika kuphata basawo yakupambulika." 
2Chronicles31:19 Anyansembe ale akhakhala m'mizinda idaperekwa kuna pidzukulu pya Aroni na mbuto zawo zene zakudyeserapo pifuyo, basawo ikhali yakugawa pyakudya pile kuna amuna onsene a m'mabanja a unyansembe pontho na kuna munthu onsene wakukhala nawo panyandandanda wa mabanja a Alevi." 
2Chronicles31:20 Mu Yuda monsene, Mfumu Hezekia ndiye adachita pinthu pyakulungama pontho pyakukomera MBUYA Mulungu wache." 
2Chronicles31:21 Iye adapikwanisa thangwi pyonsene pidachita iye pa Nyumba ya Mulungu penu kuteweza mwambo kudachita iye, adapichita mwakukhulupirika pontho na mtima wakupipereka kuna Mulungu wache." 
2Chronicles32:1 Pidamala chitika penepi pandzidzi ule udatumikira Hezekia mwakukhulupirika, Senakeribu mfumu wa Asiria adachita nkhondo na Yuda. Iye adazungulira mizinda yakutchingwa na mpanda na anyankhondo ache mbatonga amunache kuti agomole mafufuwo towera apitemo." 
2Chronicles32:2 Pidapiona Hezekia kuti Senakeribu anafunambo pyakuchita naye nkhondo," 
2Chronicles32:3 iye pabodzi pene na mathubu ache adanyerezera pyakufunga mphuno za madzi kunja kwa mzinda, towera Aasiria aleke gumana madzi angafika chifupi na Yerusalemu. Mathubu ale adatsogolera mwinji ukulu mbafunga mphuno zonsene za madzi na mikulo ene ing'ono-ing'ono, towera paleke khalave madzi akwenda kunja kwa mzindawo." 
2Chronicles32:4  
2Chronicles32:5 Mfumu adatchinjiriza mzinda ule mwamphamvu pakumanga pontho mpanda ukhadagomoka ule, kumanga nsanja padzulu pache, na kumanga pontho mafufu akunja. Iye adawangisa mbuto yakundendemezwa kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa a mzinda wa Davite. Iye adasasanya pontho pida pizinji pya nkhondo na pyakugedera matswimo." 
2Chronicles32:6 Iye adasankhula akadamu a nkhondo pakati pa anthu mbaagumanyisa onsenewo pamaso pache pachintalo cha mzinda chifupi na msuwo wa mpanda mbaawangisa mtima na mafala awa: 
2Chronicles32:7 “Wangisani pontho wangani mtima! Lekani chita mantha penu kutaya mtima, thangwi ya mfumu wa Asiria na gulu yache ikulu ya nkhondoyi, podi kukhundu kwathu kuna mphamvu zikulu kupiringana kukhundu kwawo." 
2Chronicles32:8 Una iye ndi mkono wa munthu, mbwenye ana ife ndi MBUYA Mulungu wathu kutiphedza na kutimenyera nkhondo.” Natenepo anthu adawanga mtima na mafala adalonga Hezekia mfumu wa Yuda." 
2Chronicles32:9 Pidagwanda ndzidzi pang'ono mwenemo Senakeribu na anyankhondo ache akhali pa Lakishi, atumiza mphangwa izi kuna Hezekia na anthu a Yuda ale akhali na iye pabodzi mu Yerusalemu:" 
2Chronicles32:10 “Ine Senakeribu mfumu wa Asiria ndikukuvunzani imwe anthu ninji chinakuwangisani mtima kuti muthimize kukhala mu Yerusalemu uku mwazungulirwa na anyankhondo? 
2Chronicles32:11 Hezekia akukupangani kuti MBUYA Mulungu wanu anakupulumusani m'manja mwanga, kwache Hezekia akukunyengezani. Imwe munafa na nyota pontho njala." 
2Chronicles32:12 Iye ngule adavunga mbuto zakupembedzerapo milungu na maguwa ansembe a milungu yeneyi mbapanga anthu a ku Yuda na Yerusalemu kupembedza na kupyereza nsembe paguwa ibodzi ene basi. 
2Chronicles32:13 Ayi imwe nkhabe dziwa tayu pile pidachita makolo anga na ine kuna anthu a madzinza anango? Ayi ilipo milungu ya dzinza inango idapulumusa anthu awo m'manja mwa mfumu wa Asiria? 
2Chronicles32:14 Ndi lini mudapulumusa milungu yeneyo anthu a m'madziko enewo m'manja mwathu? Apo chinakuchitisani ninji kunyerezera kuti milungu yanu anakwanisa kukupulumusani kuna ife. 
2Chronicles32:15 Natenepo lekani tawirisa Hezekia kukunyengezani penu kukubausani. Lekani kumkhulupira! Nkhabe mulungu na mbodzi ene wa madzinza adapulumusa anthu ache m'manja mwanga penu mwa mfumu unango wa Asiria tayu. Natenepo milungu yeneyi nkhabe kwanisa kukupulumusani tayu!” 
2Chronicles32:16 Mathubu a ku Asiria adalongera MBUYA Mulungu pontho Hezekia, nyabasa wa MBUYA, pinthu pyakuipa pizinji." 
2Chronicles32:17 Kalata idalemba mfumu wa Asiria ikhali yakululupisa MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele. Iyo idalembwa kuti, “Milungu ya madzinza chipo hidzati pulumusa anthu awo m'manja mwanga tayu, natenepo mulungu wa Hezekia nkhabe pontho kwanisa kupulumusa anthu ache m'manja mwanga.”" 
2Chronicles32:18 Mathubu ale adalonga penepi m'Chiheberi kufuna kuthuswa na kutayisa mtima anthu a mu Yerusalemu ale akhali pamafufu a mzinda, towera pikhale pyokhonda nensa kupokosera mzinda ule." 
2Chronicles32:19 Iwo adalonga pya Mulungu wa Yerusalemu m'njira yontho-yonthoyo ninga mumbalongera iye pya milungu ya madzinza anango, mifanikizo yakusasanywa na manja a anthu." 
2Chronicles32:20 Tenepo Mfumu Hezekia na mprofeti Yesaya mwana Amozi adapemphera kuna Mulungu mbamulirira kuti aaphedze. 
2Chronicles32:21 MBUYA adatuma mngelo wache, ule adapha anyankhondo na akadamu a gulu ya nkhondo ya Aasiria. Natenepo mfumu adabwerera kwawo ku Asiria na manyadzo. Nsiku inango pikhali iye m'nyumba yakupembedzeramo milungu yache, anango mwa anache adampha na talasada." 
2Chronicles32:22 Na njira yeneyi MBUYA adapulumusa Mfumu Hezekia na anthu a ku Yerusalemu m'manja mwa Senakeribu mfumu wa Asiria pontho m'manja mwa anyamalwawo onsene. Iye adachitisa kuti anthu akhale na mtendere na madziko onsene achifupi na iwo. 
2Chronicles32:23 Anthu azinji adadza ku Yerusalemu na pyakupereka pyawo kuna MBUYA pontho na mitukwa kuna Hezekia; natenepo kutomera penepo kwenda m'tsogolo madzinza anango onsene adapereka chilemedzo kuna Hezekia. 
2Chronicles32:24 Pandzidzi wenewu Hezekia adadwala mbasala chifupi kufa. Iye adapemphera, tenepo MBUYA adampasa chidzindikiro chakuti iye anawanga." 
2Chronicles32:25 Mbwenye Hezekia adatumbama pyakwanga mbakhonda kupereka takhuta thangwi ya kukoma mtima kudamuonesa MBUYA kule, natenepo ukali wa MBUYA ukhali pana Yuda na Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles32:26 Pakumalisira pache Hezekia na anthu ache adapichepesa okha ene, natenepo MBUYA hadaatchunyuse tayu kufikirana ndzidzi udafa Hezekia." 
2Chronicles32:27 Mfumu Hezekia adafuma pyakwanga pontho munthu onsene akhamulemedza. Iye adamangisa masubi akukoyeramo golidi, siliva, miyala yakudula, pyakukomesera muliwo, pyakugedera matswimo, na pinthu pinango pyakufunika." 
2Chronicles32:28 Kuthimiza penepo adamangisa pontho nyumba zakukoyeramo mapirache, vinyu na mafuta aolivi; mathanga a ng'ombe zache pontho na mabirache." 
2Chronicles32:29 Padzulu pa penepi Mulungu adampasa mabira na ng'ombe zizinji pontho na mfuma inango yakuinjipa mwakuti iye adamanga mizinda mizinji. 
2Chronicles32:30 Akhali Mfumu Hezekia ule adafunga mgelo wa madzi kubulukira kumphuno ya Gihoni mbapambusira kumadokero dzuwa a mzinda wa Davite. Pinthu pyonsene pidachita Hezekia pidamfambira mwadidi. 
2Chronicles32:31 Kwache pidadza aimiriri a dziko a ku Babiloni kudzavunza pya chidzindikiro chakudodomesa chidachitika m'dziko mule, Mulungu adatawirisa Hezekia kubauka kwenda njirachembo, towera kumuyesa na kudziwa pyonsene pikhali mumtima mwache." 
2Chronicles32:32 Pyonsene pinango pidachita Mfumu Hezekia na kupipereka kwache kuna MBUYA pyalembwa m'bukhu yakulonga pya masomphenya a mprofeti Yesaya mwana Amozi na m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Yuda na Israele. 
2Chronicles32:33 Hezekia adagonera mkono mbaikhwa paphiri pale pana masiye a pidzukulu pya Davite. Anthu onsene a ku Yuda na Yerusalemu adamulemedza pikulu pamaliro pache. Manase mwanache adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache. 
2Chronicles33:1 Manase akhali na pyaka khumi na piwiri pikhapita iye ufumu wa Yuda, tenepo adatonga mu Yerusalemu pyaka makumashanu na pishanu." 
2Chronicles33:2 Manase adadawa pamaso pa MBUYA pakuchita pyakunyansa pikhachita madzinza anango, ale adathamangiswa na MBUYA m'dzikomo ndzidzi ukhapita anthu ache mwenemo." 
2Chronicles33:3 Iye adasasanya pontho mbuto zakupembedzerapo milungu, zile zikhadavunga babache Hezekia. Iye adamanga maguwa ansembe akupembedzerapo milungu Baala. Iye adasasanya mfanikizo wa milungu Ashera, pontho adapembedza nyenyezi." 
2Chronicles33:4 Iye adamanga maguwa ansembe a milungu inango m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, pambuto pale padalonga MBUYA kuti penepo ndiye pathema iye kupembedzerwapo kwenda na kwenda." 
2Chronicles33:5 Mupintalo piwiri pya Nyumba ya Mulungu, iye adamangamo maguwa ansembe akupembedzerapo nyenyezi." 
2Chronicles33:6 Iye adapereka anache achimuna m'phedi ya Beni-Hinomu ninga nsembe yakupyerera. Iye akhachita pyaufiti na matsenga mbavunza nzeru kuna anyakuombedza na anyakukhumira. Iye adadawa pikulu pamaso pa MBUYA mbalamusa ukali wache. 
2Chronicles33:7 Iye adaikha mfanikizo m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, pambuto pale padalonga Mulungu kuna Davite na mwanache Solomoni kuti, “Muno mu Yerusalemu m'Nyumba yeneyi, ndi mbuto yasankhula ine pakati pa nthemba zonsene za madzinza khumi na mawiri a Israele kukhala mbuto ile yathema ine kupembedzerwapo." 
2Chronicles33:8 Tenepo ngakhala Aisraele anavera matongero anga onsene mbakoya Mwambo onsene udaapasa nyabasanga Mose ule, penepo ine nkhabe dzatawirisa tayu kuti iwo athamangiswe m'dziko idapereka ine kuna makolo awo ile.”" 
2Chronicles33:9 Manase adatsogolera anthu a Yuda kuchita pyakuipa pikulu pene kupiringana pyakuipa pidachita madzinza ale akhadathamangiswa na MBUYA pikhapita Aisraele m'dzikomo. 
2Chronicles33:10 Podi kwene kuti MBUYA akhadacheuza Manase na anthu ache, iwo hadapivere tayu." 
2Chronicles33:11 Natenepo MBUYA adatawirisa anyankhondo a Aasiria kupita mu Yuda. Iwo adaphata Manase, kumulasa na ngoloweko, kummanga na njema, mbaenda naye ku Babiloni." 
2Chronicles33:12 Na thangwi ya kusanyika kukhachita iye, iye adapichepesa, mbazungunukira kuna MBUYA Mulungu wache mbapempha Mulungu wa makolo ache kuti amphedze." 
2Chronicles33:13 Mulungu adava kupempha kwa Manase mbamtawirisa kubwerera mu Yerusalemu katonga pontho. Penepi pidamchitisa Manase kukhulupira mumtima mwache kuti MBUYA ndi Mulungu. 
2Chronicles33:14 Kubuluka penepo Manase adathimizira chengo cha mafufu akunja a mpanda kumabulukiro dzuwa a mzinda wa Davite, kubulukira kuphedi chifupi na mphuno za madzi a ku Gihoni kumpoto mpakana ku Msuwo wa Nsomba pontho na kuzungulira phiri ya Ofele. Iye adaikha pontho akadamu a nkhondo m'mizinda yonsene yakutchingwa na mpanda mu Yuda." 
2Chronicles33:15 Iye adabulusa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu milungu yachilendo na mifanikizo idaikha iye mwenemo, pontho na maguwawo ansembe ale akhali paphiri, pale pakhali Nyumba ya Mulungu pontho na mbuto zinango zonsene mu Yerusalemu; iye adakwata pinthu pyonsenepi kwenda napyo kunja kwa mzinda mbapitaya." 
2Chronicles33:16 Iye adasasanyisa pontho guwa yansembe pale pakhapembedzwa MBUYA, penepo iye adapereka nsembe zachiphatizano na nsembe zakupereka nazo takhuta. Iye adatonga anthu onsene mu Yuda kupembedza MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele." 
2Chronicles33:17 Podi kwene kuti anthu anango adathimiza kupereka nsembe pambuto zakupembedzerapo milungu, kwache akhazipereka kuna MBUYA yekha basi." 
2Chronicles33:18 Pinango pyonsene pidachita Manase, kupemphera kudachita iye kuna Mulungu, pontho na mphangwa za maprofeti ale adalonga kuna iye na dzina ya MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele, pyonsene pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Israele." 
2Chronicles33:19 Kupemphera kwa mfumu na kumtawira kudachita Mulungu, pabodzi pene na pyakudawa pyonsene pidachita iye, kukhonda khulupirika kwache, mbuto zakupembedzerapo milungu na adzimunthu a milungu Ashera adasasanya iye, pontho na kupembedza mifanikizo kudachita iye, iye mbadzati kupileka; pyonsenene pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya maprofeti." 
2Chronicles33:20 Manase adagonera mkono mbaikhwa m'masiye a panyumbache yachifumu, tenepo Amoni mwanache adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache." 
2Chronicles33:21 Amoni akhali na pyaka makumawiri na piwiri pidapita iye ufumu wa Yuda, mbatonga mu Yerusalemu pyaka piwiri." 
2Chronicles33:22 Ninga mudachitirambo Manase babache, iye adadawa pamaso pa MBUYA mbapembedza mifanikizo ikhapembedzambo babache ile." 
2Chronicles33:23 Kwache iye hadapichepese na kuzungunukira kuna MBUYA tayu ninga mudachitira babache. Iye akhali munthu wakudawika pyakwanga kupiringana babache. 
2Chronicles33:24 Mathubu a Amoni adamsandukira mbamphera m'nyumba yachifumu. 
2Chronicles33:25 Anthu a ku Yuda adaphambo amuna akhadapha mfumu ale, tenepo iwo adapitisa Yosia mwanache kukhala mfumu m'mbuto mwache." 
2Chronicles34:1 Yosia akhali na pyaka pisere pyakubalwa pikhapita iye ufumu wa Yuda mbatonga mu Yerusalemu pyaka makumatatu na chibodzi. 
2Chronicles34:2 Yosia adachita pinthu pyakukomera MBUYA; iye adateweza upangizi wa kholoache Mfumu Davite mbachita mphole-mphole kuvera matongero onsene a Mulungu. 
2Chronicles34:3 Chaka chachisere Yosia mbali mfumu, mwenemo iye mbali wamng'onoletu, Iye adatoma kupembedza Mulungu wa kholo ache Davite. Pidagwanda pyaka pinayi iye adatoma kuvunga mbuto zakupembedzerapo milungu inango, adzimunthu a milungu Ashera na mifanikizo inango." 
2Chronicles34:4 Na utongi wache amunache adagomola maguwa ansembe akupembedzerapo milungu Baala mbagwisa maguwa akufukizirapo pyakununkhira chifupi nawo. Iwo adapeya adzimunthu a milungu Ashera na mifanikizo inango ile, mbakaponya dothache ile panthumbi za anthu akhadapereka nsembe kuna iye ale." 
2Chronicles34:5 Iye adapisa magogodo a anyansembe pamaguwa pale pakhapembedza iwo milungu inango. Pakuchita penepi iye adachitisa Yuda na Yerusalemu kukhala wakuchena pontho pamaso pa Mulungu. 
2Chronicles34:6 Iye adachita chibodzi-bodzi kuna mizinda na nthemba zinango za Manase, Eferemu, Simioni mpakana kumpoto m'nthemba ya Nafitali." 
2Chronicles34:7 Muufumu onsene wakumpoto wa Israele iye adagomola maguwa onsene ansembe na adzimunthu onsene a Ashera mbapipeya, pontho adaswa m'mapindi-mapindi maguwa onsene akufukizirapo pyakununkhira. Kubuluka penepo adabwerera ku Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles34:8 Chaka chakhumi na chisere Yosia mbali mfumu, pidamala iye chenesa dziko na Nyumba ya Mulungu pakumalisa chipembedzo cha milungu inango, iye adatuma anthu atatu kasasanya pontho Nyumba ya MBUYA Mulungu: Shafani mwana Azalia, Maaseia mkulu wa boma ya Yerusalemu na Yoa mwana Yoahazi, ule akhali nyakulemba pya m'dziko." 
2Chronicles34:9 Kobiri zile zikhadasonkhesa anyakulondali a Chilevi m'Nyumba ya Mulungu zidaperekwa kuna Hilikia Nyansembe Wamkulu. Kobirizo zidasonkheswa kubulukira kuna dzinza ya Eferemu, Manase na muufumu wakumpoto, pontho na madzinza a Yuda na Benjemani na anthu a mu Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles34:10 Kubuluka penepo kobirizo zidaperekwa kuna amuna atatu, ale akhali anyakuyang'anira basa yakusasanya pontho Nyumba ya Mulungu; iwo adazipereka kuna" 
2Chronicles34:11 anyakupala matabwa na kuna amisiri akumanga nyumba kuti akagule miyala yakucheketeza kale na matabwa kuti piphatiswe basa kusasanya pontho nyumba, zile zidaleka mafumu a Yuda kuti zivunde pyazo." 
2Chronicles34:12 Amuna akhaphata basa yeneyi ale, akhali akukhulupirika pyakwanga. Iwo akhayang'anirwa na Alevi anayi: Yahati na Obadia a m'banja ya Merari, pontho Zekaria na Meshulamu a m'banja ya Kohati. Alevi onsene akhali achesa pakuimba." 
2Chronicles34:13 Alevi anango basawo ikhali kuyang'anira basa yakuthukulathukula, pontho na kuyang'anira anyakuphata mabasa akulekana lekana. Alevi anango akhali anyakulemba, mathubu na anyakulondali." 
2Chronicles34:14 Pikhabuluswa kobiri kubulukira m'subi yakukoyeramo pinthu m'Nyumba ya MBUYA, Hilikia adagumana bukhu ya mwambo wa MBUYA, mwambo ule udapereka Mulungu kudzera muna Mose." 
2Chronicles34:15 Iye adalonga kuna Shafani, nyakulemba m'thando ya miseru mbati, “M'Nyumba ya MBUYA ndagumanamo bukhu ya mwambo.” Iye adapereka bukhu ile kuna Shafani." 
2Chronicles34:16 Shafanimbo adaikwata mbaenda nayo kuna mfumu. Iye adalonga mbati, “Ife tachita pyonsene pyatipanga imwe." 
2Chronicles34:17 Ife takwata kobiri zile zikhadakoyiwa m'Nyumba ya MBUYA mbitizipereka kuna anyakuphata basa na anyakuayang'anirawo.” 
2Chronicles34:18 Tenepo iye adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Pano ndina bukhu yandipasa Hilikia.” Natenepo iye adaiwerenga mwakugaluza fala kuna mfumu." 
2Chronicles34:19 Pidava mfumu kuwerengwa kwa bukhu ile, adang'amba nguwo zache mwakutsukwala" 
2Chronicles34:20 mbalonga kuna Hilikia nyansembe, Ahikamu mwana Shafani, Abidoni mwana Mikaia, Shafani nyakulemba m'thando ya miseru, na Asaia nyakufiriviri mfumu mbati," 
2Chronicles34:21 “Ndokoni mukavunze nzeru kuna MBUYA m'mbuto mwanga pontho na anthu, ale asalira mu Israele na Yuda. Kavunzeni pya pifunziso pya bukhu yeneyi. MBUYA atizhangalira thangwi makolo athu hadavere tayu mafala a MBUYA, pontho hadachite tayu ninga munalongera bukhuyi kuti pyathema kuchitwa.”" 
2Chronicles34:22 Na kutongwa na mfumu, Hilikia na anango ale, adenda kavunza nzeru kuna mprofeti unango wachikazi dzinache Hulida, ule akhakhala kukhundu yachinchino ya Yerusalemu. Mamunache akhali Shalumu mwana Tikiva, mdzukuluache Harihasi, ule akhali nyakukoya mikhanjo ya m'Nyumba ya Mulungu. Iwo adampanga pyonsene pikhadachitika pile." 
2Chronicles34:23 Tenepo Hulida adaapanga kuti abwerere kuna mfumu mbakampanga 
2Chronicles34:24 mphangwa zakubulukira kuna MBUYA zakuti: “Ine ndinafuna nditchunyuse Yerusalemu pabodzi pene na anthu ache onsene pakuphatisa basa dzedze yalembwa m'bukhu, yawerengwa kuna mfumu ile." 
2Chronicles34:25 Iwo andikhonda mbapereka nsembe kuna milungu inango, natenepo iwo alamusa ukali wanga na pinthu pyonsene pyachita iwo. Ukali wanga ukugaka pana Yerusalemu pontho nkhabe dzambombowa tayu." 
2Chronicles34:26 Mbwenye kulonga pya mfumu, ine MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele ndikulonga kuti: Iwe udavera pyalembwa m'bukhumo," 
2Chronicles34:27 mbuleka pyakudawa pyako, pontho udapichepesa wekha ene pamaso panga, kung'amba nguwo zako na kulira pidava iwe mule mudathuswira ine kutchunyusa Yerusalemu na anthu ache ene. Ine ndava kupemphera kwako," 
2Chronicles34:28 tenepo kutchunyusa Yerusalemu kunafuna ine dzachita nee kunadza chinchino tayu kufikirana iwe ufe. Ine ndinakutawirisa kuti ufe na mtendere.” Amuna ale adabwerera kuna Mfumu Yosia na mphangwa zenezi. 
2Chronicles34:29 Mfumu Yosia adachemeresa akadamu onsene a mu Yuda na Yerusalemu," 
2Chronicles34:30 mbaenda onsene pabodzi pene ku Nyumba ya Mulungu mbatsagana na anyansembe, pontho Alevi, pabodzi pene na anthu anango onsene, anyakufuma na anyakutcherenga ene. Pamaso pa anthu onsene ale, mfumu adawerenga bukhu yonsene ya chiverano, ikhadagumanwa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu ile." 
2Chronicles34:31 Iye adaimira chifupi na mzati mbachita chiverano na MBUYA kuti anamvera, anateweza mwambo na matongero ache na mtimache onsene, na moyo wache onsene, pontho kuti anachita pinthu pinalongwa m'chiverano ninga mwalemberwa ipyo m'bukhumo." 
2Chronicles34:32 Iye adachitisa anthu a dzinza ya Benjemani na anthu anango onsene ale akhali mu Yerusalemu kudumbira kuti anakoya chiveranocho. Natenepo anthu a mu Yerusalemu adavera pinthu pikhafunika pachiverano chidachita iwo na Mulungu wa makolo awo chile. 
2Chronicles34:33 Mfumu Yosia adavunga mifanikizo yonsene yakunyansa ile ikhali m'dziko yonsene ya Israele. Pikhali Yosia na moyo anthu adathimiza kutumikira MBUYA, Mulungu wa makolo awo." 
2Chronicles35:1 Mfumu Yosia adasekera Phwando ya Paska mu Yerusalemu kulemedza nayo MBUYA; pansiku yakhumi na chinayi ya mwezi wakutoma adapha nyama kuchita nazo phwando ile. 
2Chronicles35:2 Iye adapereka basa idathema anyansembe kuiphata m'Nyumba ya MBUYA mbaawangisa mtima kuti aiphate mwadidi. 
2Chronicles35:3 Iye adalonga pontho kuna Alevi, afunzisi a Israele ale, akhadapipereka kuna MBUYA mbati, “Ikhani Bokosi ya Chiverano yakupambulikayo m'Nyumba ya MBUYA, ile idamangwa na Mfumu Solomoni mwana Davite. Imwe nkhabeve funika kuithukula kubuluka pambuto kwenda pambuto inango tayu, mbwenye mwathema kutumikira MBUYA Mulungu wanu na anthu ache Israele." 
2Chronicles35:4 Mupigawe mwekha ene m'magulu malingana na mabanjanu ninga montho mudapilembera Mfumu Davite pontho na mwanache Mfumu Solomoni. 
2Chronicles35:5 Khalani m'magulu-magulu pambuto yakuchena kuimirira Aisraele anzanu, okhonda khala anyansembe ale, malingana na magulu a mabanjawo. Gulu ibodzi ya Alevi kuimirirambo gulu ibodzi." 
2Chronicles35:6 Imwe mwathema kupha anabira na mbuzi kuchitira Phwando ya Paska. Natenepo picheneseni mwekha ene mbamusasanye nsembe, towera Aisraele anzanu atewezembo pinthu pidalonga MBUYA kudzera muna Mose.”" 
2Chronicles35:7 Pa Phwando ya Paska, Mfumu Yosia adapereka pifuyo pyache; mabira, anabira na anambuzi ene pyakukwana pikwi makumatatu, pontho na ng'ombe zimuna pikwi pitatu kuti anthu adye." 
2Chronicles35:8 Mathubu ache adaperekambo mwakufuna kwawo kuna anthu, anyansembe na Alevi. Pontho akadamu ale akhayang'anira Nyumba ya Mulungu, Hilikia Nyansembe Wamkulu, Zekaria na Yehiele, adapereka kuna anyansembe anabira na mbuzi zakukwana pikwi piwiri na madzana matanthatu, pontho na ng'ombe zimuna madzana matatu kuti ziperekwe nsembe pansiku ya phwandoyo." 
2Chronicles35:9 Akadamu a Chilevi; Konania, Shemaia, na mbaleache Netanele, Hashabia, Yeiele na Yozabadi, adapereka anabira na mbuzi pikwi pishanu na ng'ombe zimuna madzana mashanu kuti Alevi azipereke nsembe." 
2Chronicles35:10 Pidamala sasanywa pinthu pyonsene pya phwandoyo, anyansembe na Alevi adakhala m'magulu mwawo ninga montho mudatongera mfumu." 
2Chronicles35:11 Pidamala phiwa anabira na mbuzi, Alevi adazisuwa. Anyansembe adakwata chiropa chile mbachiwazira paguwa yansembe." 
2Chronicles35:12 Natenepo iwo adagawa nyama zile malingana na mabanjawo kuti ziperekwe nsembe yakupyerera, towera akwanise kuzipereka mwakuteweza mwambo wa Mose." 
2Chronicles35:13 Alevi adaotcha nsembe za paphwando ile pamoto malingana na mwambo wache mbatereka m'chikalango, m'supulia, na m'piwaya pyakupereka pyakupambulika pile, mbachimbiza kupigawiza kuna anthu onsene penepo." 
2Chronicles35:14 Kubuluka penepo iwo adapisasanyira okha ene pyakudya pyawo na pya anyansembe ene, thangwi pandzidzi wenewo anyansembe pidzukulu pya Aroni akhapereka nsembe zakupyerera na khundu ya mafuta kufikirana mosiku. Natenepo Alevi adasasanya pyakudya pyawo na pya anyansembe ene, pidzukulu pya Aroni." 
2Chronicles35:15 Anyakuimba nyimbo pidzukulu pya Asafu, akhali pambuto zile zidapaswa iwo na Davite: Asafu, Hemani na Yedutuni, mprofeti wa mfumu. Anyakulondali m'misuwo hadabulukemo tayu, thangwi Alevi anzawo adaasasanyira pyakudya pile." 
2Chronicles35:16 Natenepo pandzidzi wenewo basa yonsene ya MBUYA, kuchita Phwando ya Paska na kupereka paguwa ya MBUYA nsembe zakupyerera, idachitika ninga montho mukhadatongera Mfumu Yosia." 
2Chronicles35:17 Nsiku zinomwe anthu onsene a Israele akhali penepo ale, adasekera Phwando ya Paska na Phwando ya Mikate yakusowa chakufufumisira." 
2Chronicles35:18 Kutomera nsiku zikhali mprofeti Samuele na moyo, chipo Phwando ya Paska hidzati yachitika ninga tenepo tayu. Nkhabe mbodzi wa mafumu akhadachitisa Phwando ya Paska ninga ile idachita Mfumu Yosia, anyansembe, Alevi, na anthu a ku Yuda, Israele na Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles35:19 Phwando yeneyi idachitika chaka chakhumi na chisere cha ufumu wa Yosia. 
2Chronicles35:20 Pidamala Mfumu Yosia kuchita pyonsenepi pa Nyumba ya Mulungu, Mfumu Neko wa ku Iguputo adatsogolera anyankhondo ache kamenyana na Karikemishi pamkulo wa Yufurate. Kwache Yosia adayesa kuakhondesa," 
2Chronicles35:21 mbwenye Mfumu Neko adatumiza mphangwa kuna Yosia mbati, “Nkhondo inachita ineyi nkhabe tayu pinthu na iwe Yosia mfumu wa Yuda. Ine sidadze dzamenyana na iwe tayu, mbwenye na anyamalwanga, pontho Mulungu andipanga kuti ndichimbize. Mulungu ali kukhundu kwanga. Natenepo leka kundikhondesa gopesera iye anakuvunga.”" 
2Chronicles35:22 Mbwenye Yosia adachita phinga kuti amenyane naye. Iye adakhonda kuva pile pidalonga Mulungu kudzera muna Mfumu Neko, natenepo iye adapizimbaisa yekha ene mbakamenya nawo nkhondo paphedi ya Megido." 
2Chronicles35:23 Ndzidzi wa nkhondo ule, Mfumu Yosia adalaswa na matswimo a Aiguputo. Iye adatonga nyabasache mbati, “Ndibuluse; ine ndakuwazwa pyakwanga!”" 
2Chronicles35:24 Iwo adamthukula kumbulusa m'chingolo mwache mbakamuikha pachingolo chachiwiri chikhali na iye penepo chile mbaenda naye ku Yerusalemu. Kweneko iye adafa mbaikhwa m'masiye achifumu. Anthu onsene a ku Yuda na Yerusalemu adasintili thangwi ya imfache. 
2Chronicles35:25 Mprofeti Yeremia adaipeka nyimbo ya maliro thangwi ya Mfumu Yosia. Lero wasanduka ninga nsambo wawo ene mu Israele kuna anyakuimba nyimbo amuna na akazi ene kuphatisa basa nyimbo yeneyi kusintili Mfumu Yosia. Nyimbo yeneyi ili m'bukhu ya nyimbo ya maliro. 
2Chronicles35:26 Pyonsene pidachita Yosia, kupipereka kwache kuna MBUYA, kuvera kwache mwambo," 
2Chronicles35:27 na mbiri yache kutomera pakutoma mpakana kumamalisiro; pyonsene pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Israele na Yuda. 
2Chronicles36:1 Anthu a ku Yuda adasankhula Yoahazi mwana Yosia mbamdzoza ufumu mu Yerusalemu. 
2Chronicles36:2 Yoahazi akhali na pyaka makumawiri na pitatu pidapita iye ufumu wa Yuda. Tenepo iye adatonga mu Yerusalemu miyezi mitatu. 
2Chronicles36:3 Neko mfumu wa Iguputo adamkwata ninga nyaperezo mbachitisa Yuda kupagali siliva wakukwana makilogramu pikwi pitatu na madzana manayi pontho na golidi wakukwana makilogramu makumatatu na manayi ninga msonkho. 
2Chronicles36:4 Mfumu Neko adaikha Eliakimu mbaleache Yoahazi kupita ufumu wa Yuda mbamtchandula kukhala Yehoiakimu. Yoahazi adakwatwa na Mfumu Neko kwenda ku Iguputo. 
2Chronicles36:5 Yehoiakimu akhali na pyaka makumawiri na pishanu pidapita iye ufumu wa Yuda mbatonga mu Yerusalemu pyaka khumi na chibodzi. Iye adachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA Mulungu wache. 
2Chronicles36:6 Mfumu Nebukadinezara wa ku Babiloni adenda ku Yuda kachita nkhondo, mbaphata Yehoiakimu mbaenda naye ninga nyaperezo ku Babiloni." 
2Chronicles36:7 Mfumu Nebukadinezara adakwata mfuma inango ya m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, mbakaiikha m'nyumbache yachifumu mu Babiloni." 
2Chronicles36:8 Kulonga pya pinthu pinango pyonsene pidachitika Yehoiakimu mbali mfumu wa Yuda na pinthu pyakunyansa na pyakuipa pidachita iye pyalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri ya mafumu a Yuda. Yehoiakini mwanache adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache. 
2Chronicles36:9 Yehoiakini akhali na pyaka khumi na pisere pyakubalwa pikhapita iye ufumu wa Yuda mbatonga mu Yerusalemu miyezi mitatu na nsiku khumi. Iye adachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA. 
2Chronicles36:10 Ndzidzi wakuphwitha miti Mfumu Nebukadinezara mbali mfumu adakwata Yehoiakini kukhala nyaperezo ku Babiloni mbapokosera mfuma yonsene ya m'Nyumba ya MBUYA. Tenepo Nebukadinezara adachitisa Zedekia, mbuyache Yehoiakini, kukhala mfumu wa Yuda na Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles36:11 Zedekia akhali na pyaka makumawiri na chibodzi pikhapita iye ufumu wa Yuda mbatonga mu Yerusalemu pyaka khumi na chibodzi. 
2Chronicles36:12 Iye adachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA, pontho adakhonda kupichepesa yekha ene kuvesera mprofeti Yeremia, ule adalonga mafala a MBUYA." 
2Chronicles36:13 Mfumu Zedekia adapandukira Mfumu Nebukadinezara, ule adamchitisa kudumbira na dzina ya MBUYA kukhala wakukhulupirika kuna iye. Iye adakhala wakuuma mtima mbakhonda zungunukira kuna MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele." 
2Chronicles36:14 Kuthimizapo akadamu a Yuda na anyansembe na anthu onsene adatewera pyakudawika pya madzinza akuazungulira ale, pakupembedza mifanikizo, natenepo adaswipisa Nyumba ya MBUYA, ile idapipambulira MBUYA mu Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles36:15 MBUYA Mulungu wa makolo awo adathimiza kuatumizira maprofeti kucheuza anthu ache, thangwi iye akhavera nsisi anthu ache na Nyumba ya MBUYA." 
2Chronicles36:16 Mbwenye iwo adaseka anyamphangwa a Mulungu, pontho adalulupisa mafalache mbasedegula maprofeti ache mwakuti iwo adalamusa ukali wa MBUYA mbachimwana kuuthawa." 
2Chronicles36:17 Natenepo MBUYA adadzesa mfumu wa ku Babiloni dzaasosa. Mfumu adapha aphale awo na talasada m'Nyumba ya MBUYA. Iye hadavere nsisi na mbodzi ene tayu, mphale penu nkhalamba, mkazi penu mamuna, mtenda penu wakuwanga. Mulungu adaapereka onsene m'manja mwache." 
2Chronicles36:18 Mfumu wa ku Babiloni adapokosera pinthu pyonsene pya m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, mfuma ya m'Nyumbamo, pontho na mfuma yonsene ya mfumu na mathubu ache, pontho adakwata pyonsene mbaenda napyo ku Babiloni." 
2Chronicles36:19 Iye adapisa Nyumba ya Mulungu na mzinda ule, pabodzi pene na nyumba zache zonsene zachifumu na mfumache ene mbagwisa mpanda wa mzindawo." 
2Chronicles36:20 Onsene adasalira na moyo ale adaakwata kwenda nawo ku Babiloni. Kweneko iwo adatumikira mfumu na pidzukulu pyache ninga mabitchu kufikirana mfumu wa adasanduka wamphamvu pyakwanga. 
2Chronicles36:21 Natenepo pile pidalonga MBUYA kudzera muna mprofeti Yeremia pidakwana-kwana kuti: “Dziko inasanduka madembe pyaka makumanomwe, towera akwichize Nsiku Zakupuma zidakhonda anthu kuziteweza zile.”" 
2Chronicles36:22 Chaka chakutoma cha Kirusi mfumu wa ku Peresia, MBUYA adachitisa kukwana-kwana pinthu pidalonga iye kudzera muna mprofeti Yeremia. MBUYA adachitisa Kirusi kuti apereke matongero ali m'tchindewa mwakuchita kualemba mbaatumiza kuna anthu kuti awerengwe mwakugaluza fala konsene kwene muufumu wache:" 
2Chronicles36:23 “Ufu ngutongi wa Kirusi mfumu wa ku Peresia. MBUYA Mulungu wa kudzulu andichitisa kukhala mfumu wa dziko yonsene yapansi, pontho iye andipasa basa kuti ndimmangire nyumba mu Yerusalemu m'nthemba ya Yuda. Natenepo imwe monsene, ale ndimwe anthu a Mulungu, ndokoni kweneko pontho MBUYA Mulungu wanu mbakhale namwe.”" 
Ezra1:1 Chaka chakutoma cha Kirusi mfumu wa ku Peresia, MBUYA adachitisa mafala adalonga iye kudzera muna mprofeti Yeremia kukwana-kwana. MBUYA adampasa chipapu Kirusi kuti apereke matongero akuchita kulembwa, pontho kuti akawerengwe mwakugaluza fala konsene kwene muufumu wache. Iye adalonga mbati," 
Ezra1:2 “Kirusi, mfumu wa ku Peresia, akulonga tenepa: MBUYA Mulungu wa kudzulu andiikha kukhala mtongi wa dziko yonsene yapansi, pontho andipasa basa yakummangira Nyumba mu Yerusalemu, m'dziko ya Yuda." 
Ezra1:3 Mulungu mbakhale namwe monsenene ale ndimwe anthu ache. Imwe mwathema kwenda ku Yerusalemu mbamukamanga pontho Nyumba ya MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele, Mulungu ambapembedzwa mu Yerusalemu ule." 
Ezra1:4 Ngakhala anthu ache anango ale ali m'dziko ya unyaperezo anafuna chiphedzo kuti abwerere, atsanthembawo athema kuaphedza. Iwo athema kuapasa siliva, golidi, phoso na pifuyo; aapase pontho mitukwa yakuti akaipereke ku Nyumba ya Mulungu ku Yerusalemu.”" 
Ezra1:5 Akadamu a madzinza a Yuda na Benjemani, a nyansembe na Alevi pontho na munthu onsene Mulungu adampasa chipapu ule, adasasanyika kwenda kamanga pontho Nyumba ya Mulungu mu Yerusalemu." 
Ezra1:6 Atsanthembawo onsene adaaphedza pakuapasa pinthu pizinji: siliva, pyombo, golidi, phoso na pifuyo, pinthu pinango pyakufunika pontho na mitukwa yakuti akaipereke ku Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
Ezra1:7 Kirusi adaabwezera ndilo na makhomitcho, pile pikhadakwata Mfumu Nebukadinezara m'Nyumba ya MBUYA ku Yerusalemu mbapiikhambo m'nyumba ya milungu yache." 
Ezra1:8 Iye adapipereka kuna Mitiredati nyakukoya kobiri, ule adapilengesera kuna Sheshibazari, mkulu wa boma ya Yuda." 
Ezra1:9 Kulengesa kukhali tenepa: mabakuli agolidi makumatatu, mabakuli asiliva chikwi chibodzi, piwaya pyakufukizira makumawiri na pifemba," 
Ezra1:10 mapalato agolidi makumatatu, mapalato asiliva madzana manayi na khumi, pontho pyombo pinango pene chikwi chibodzi." 
Ezra1:11 Pyonsene pabodzi pene pikhali pinthu pikwi pishanu na madzana manayi pyagolidi na pyasiliva. Sheshibazari adadza napyo pinthu penepi ku Yerusalemu ndzidzi ukhabwerera iwo kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo, ku Babiloni." 
Ezra2:1 Anthu azinji, akhadakwatwa unyaperezo na Mfumu Nebukadinezara ale, adabuluka kudziko ya Babiloni mbabwerera ku Yerusalemu na Yuda, kada munthu mbaenda kumzinda kwache kwene. Mabanjawo adakhala kudziko ya unyaperezo ku Babiloni kutomera ndzidzi udaakwata Mfumu Nebukadinezara ninga anyaperezo." 
Ezra2:2 Akadamu awo akhali: Zerubabele, Yoswa, Nehemia, Seraia, Reelaia, Moredekai, Bilishani, Misipari, Bigivai, Rehumu na Baana. Ufu ndi nyandandanda wa mbumba ya Israele pabodzi pene na konta yonsene ya mbumba idabwerera kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo:" 
Ezra2:3 Pidzukulu pya Paroshi; pikwi piwiri na dzana ibodzi na makumanomwe na piwiri 
Ezra2:4 pidzukulu pya Shefatia; madzana matatu na makumanomwe na awiri 
Ezra2:5 pidzukulu pya Ara; madzana manomwe na makumanomwe na ashanu 
Ezra2:6 pidzukulu pya Pahati-Moabu, wakudziwika pontho na dzina yakuti Yeshua na Yoabu; pikwi piwiri na madzana masere na khumi na awiri" 
Ezra2:7 pidzukulu pya Elamu; chikwi na madzana mawiri na makumashanu na anayi 
Ezra2:8 pidzukulu pya Zatu; madzana mafemba na makumanayi na ashanu 
Ezra2:9 pidzukulu pya Zakai; madzana manomwe na makumatanthatu 
Ezra2:10 pidzukulu pya Bani; madzana matanthatu na makumanayi na awiri 
Ezra2:11 pidzukulu pya Bebai; madzana matanthatu na makumawiri na atatu 
Ezra2:12 pidzukulu pya Azigadi; chikwi chibodzi na madzana mawiri na makumawiri na awiri 
Ezra2:13 pidzukulu pya Adonikamu; madzana matanthatu na makumatanthatu na atanthatu 
Ezra2:14 pidzukulu pya Bigivai; pikwi piwiri na makumashanu na atanthatu 
Ezra2:15 pidzukulu pya Adini; madzana manayi na makumashanu na anayi 
Ezra2:16 pidzukulu pya Ateri (wakuchemerwa pontho Hezekia) makumafemba na asere 
Ezra2:17 pidzukulu pya Bezai; madzana matatu na makumawiri na atatu 
Ezra2:18 pidzukulu pya Yora; dzana ibodzi na khumi na awiri 
Ezra2:19 pidzukulu pya Hashumu; madzana mawiri na makumawiri na atatu 
Ezra2:20 pidzukulu pya Gibari; makumafemba na ashanu. 
Ezra2:21 Anthu ale makolo awo akhakhala m'maluwani ali m'tchindewa adabwererambo: Amuna a ku Betelehemu; dzana na makumawiri na atatu 
Ezra2:22 amuna a ku Netofa; makumashanu na atanthatu 
Ezra2:23 amuna a ku Anatoti; dzana na makumawiri na asere 
Ezra2:24 amuna a ku Azimaveti; makumanayi na awiri 
Ezra2:25 amuna a ku Kiriati-Yearimu, Kefira na Beeroti; madzana manomwe na makumanayi na atatu" 
Ezra2:26 amuna a ku Rama na Geba; madzana matanthatu na makumawiri na mbodzi 
Ezra2:27 amuna a ku Mikimashi; dzana na makumawiri na awiri 
Ezra2:28 amuna a ku Betele na Ai; madzana mawiri na makumawiri na atatu 
Ezra2:29 amuna a ku Nebo; makumashanu na awiri 
Ezra2:30 amuna a ku Magibishi; dzana na makumashanu na atanthatu 
Ezra2:31 amuna a ku Elamu unango; chikwi na madzana mawiri na makumashanu na anayi 
Ezra2:32 amuna a ku Harimu; madzana matatu na makumawiri 
Ezra2:33 amuna a ku Lodi, Hadidi na Ono; madzana manomwe na makumawiri na ashanu" 
Ezra2:34 amuna a ku Yeriko; madzana matatu na makumanayi na ashanu 
Ezra2:35 amuna a ku Sena; pikwi pitatu na madzana matanthatu na makumatatu 
Ezra2:36 Uwu ndi nyandandanda wa anyansembe ale adabwererambo kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo: pidzukulu pya Yedaia, wakudziwika pontho na dzina yakuti Yeshua; madzana mafemba na makumanomwe na atatu" 
Ezra2:37 pidzukulu pya Imeri; chikwi chibodzi na makumashanu na awiri 
Ezra2:38 pidzukulu pya Pashuri; chikwi na madzana mawiri na makumanayi na anomwe 
Ezra2:39 pidzukulu pya Harimu; chikwi chibodzi na khumi na anomwe 
Ezra2:40 Alevi: adabwerambo kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo: Pidzukulu pya Yeshua na Kadimiele (pidzukulu pya Hodavia); makumanomwe na anayi 
Ezra2:41 Anyakuimba nyimbo Nyumba ya Mulungu: Pidzukulu pya Asafu; dzana na makumawiri na asere. 
Ezra2:42 Anyakulondali misuwo ya Nyumba ya Mulungu: Pidzukulu pya Shalumu, Ateri, Talimoni, Akubu, Hatita na Shobai; dzana na makumatatu na afemba." 
Ezra2:43 Anyakuphata basa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu ale adabwerambo kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo: Pidzukulu pya Ziha, Hasufa na Tabaoti," 
Ezra2:44 Kerosi, Siaha, Padoni," 
Ezra2:45 Lebana, Hagaba, Akubu," 
Ezra2:46 Hagabi, Shalimai, Hanani," 
Ezra2:47 Gidele, Gahari, Reaia" 
Ezra2:48 Rezini, Nekoda, Gazamu," 
Ezra2:49 Uza, Pasea, Besai," 
Ezra2:50 Asina, Meunimu, Nefisimu," 
Ezra2:51 Bakibuki, Hakufa, Harihuri," 
Ezra2:52 Baziluti, Mehida, Harisha," 
Ezra2:53 Barikosi, Sisera, Tema," 
Ezra2:54 Nezia na Hatifa. 
Ezra2:55 Pidzukulu pya anyabasa a Solomoni pile pidabwerambo kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo: Pidzukulu pya Sotai, Hasofereti na Peruda." 
Ezra2:56 Pidzukulu pya Yaala, Darikoni na Gidele." 
Ezra2:57 Pidzukulu pya Shefatia, Hatili, Pokereti-Hazebaimu na Ami." 
Ezra2:58 Konta yonsene ya pidzukulu pya anyakuphata basa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu na pidzukulu pya anyabasa a Solomoni, ale akhadabwerera kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo, ikhali madzana matatu na makumafemba na awiri." 
Ezra2:59 Anthu ali m'tchindewa adabulukira kumaluwani a Telemela, Teleharisha, Kerubi, Adani na Imeri; kwache iwo hadakwanise kupitsikimizira tayu kuti iwo akhali pidzukulu pya Israele." 
Ezra2:60 Iwo akhali pidzukulu pya Delaia, Tobia na Nekoda; madzana matanthatu na makumashanu na awiri." 
Ezra2:61 Tenepo kubulukira pakati pa anyansembe: Pidzukulu pya Hobaia, Hakozi na Barizilai, adasemba mwana Barizilai wa ku Gileadi mbachemerwa na dzina yonthoyo ule." 
Ezra2:62 Anthu enewa adasakanyula-sakanyula pale padalembwa pya mabanjawo, kwache hadakwanise kupigumana tayu, tenepo iwo adakhethiwa pakati pa anyansembe thangwi akhayeswa ninga anthu okhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Ezra2:63 Mkulu wa boma ya Chiyuda adaatonga kuti aleke kudya na pang'ono pene pyakudya pyakupambulirwa kuna Mulungu mpakana pakhale nyansembe wakutumikira pakuphatisa basa Urimu na Tumimu. 
Ezra2:64 Konta yonsene ya anthu akhadabwerera kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo ale, idakwana pikwi makumanayi na piwiri na madzana matatu na makumatanthatu" 
Ezra2:65 kuthimizirapo anyabasa achimuna na achikazi pikwi pinomwe na madzana matatu na makumatatu na anomwe; iwo akhali pontho na anyakuimba nyimbo achimuna na achikazi ene madzana mawiri. 
Ezra2:66 Iwo akhali na akavalo madzana manomwe na makumatatu na atanthatu, nyulu madzana mawiri na makumanayi na zishanu;" 
Ezra2:67 ngamila madzana manayi na makumatatu na zishanu, pontho na mabulu pikwi pitanthatu na madzana manomwe na makumawiri." 
Ezra2:68 Pidafika iwo ku Nyumba ya Mulungu ku Yerusalemu, anango mwa akadamu a mabanja adapereka mwakufuna kwawo pyakupereka kuti piphatiswe basa kumanga pontho Nyumba ya Mulungu pambuto pakhali iyo kale pale." 
Ezra2:69 Iwo adapereka ninga mudakwanisira iwo pinthu pyakufunika pabasa yeneyi, tenepo pyonsenepyo pidakwana makilogramu madzana mashanu pya golidi, makilogramu pikwi piwiri na madzana masere pya siliva, pontho na mikhanjo ya anyansembe dzana ibodzi." 
Ezra2:70 Anyansembe, Alevi na anthu anango adakhazikika mu Yerusalemu pontho chifupi na Yerusalemu; anyakuimba nyimbo, anyakulondali ku Nyumba ya Mulungu na anyakuphata basa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu adakhazikika m'maluwani achifupi, tenepo Aisraele anango onsene adakhazikika m'maluwani mukhakhala makolo awo mule." 
Ezra3:1 Pakufika mwezi wachinomwe Aisraele onsene adamala khazikika m'maluwani mwawo. Tenepo onsene adagumanyikana mu Yerusalemu," 
Ezra3:2 Yoswa mwana Yozadaki, anyansembe anzache na Zerubabele mwana Shealatiele, pabodzi pene na abale ache, adamanga pontho guwa yansembe ya Mulungu wa Israele, towera apyerezepo nsembe malingana na matongero ache m'mwambo wa Mose, munthu wa Mulungu ule." 
Ezra3:3 Podi kwene kuti anthu akhadabwerera ale akhachita mantha na anthu akhakhala mwenemo, iwo adamanga pontho guwa yansembe pambuto pakhali iyo kale pale, mbatoma kupyereza nsembe kuna MBUYA machibese na mawulo onsene." 
Ezra3:4 Iwo adasekera Phwando ya Misasa malingana na matongero ache; nsiku yonsene iwo akhapereka nsembe zikhafunika pansiku yeneyo; 
Ezra3:5 kuthimiza penepo iwo akhapereka nsembe za nsiku na nsiku kuti ziperekwe zamumphu zene, pontho na nsembe zakuti ziperekwe pa Phwando yakusekera Kubalwa kwa mwezi, pontho na pamigumano yakupambulika kupembedza nayo MBUYA. Iwo akhapereka pontho nsembe zile zikhadza na anthu kuna MBUYA mwakufuna kwawo." 
Ezra3:6 Pansiku yakutoma ya mwezi wachinomwe, iwo adatoma kupereka nsembe zakupyerera kuna MBUYA, podi kwene kuti anthu akhadadzati toma kumanga pontho Nyumba ya Mulungu tayu." 
Ezra3:7 Anthu adapereka kobiri zakupagalira amisiri akumanga nyumba pakuphatisa basa miyala na anyakupala matabwa mbapereka phoso, pyakumwa na mafuta aolivi kuti pitumizwe kumizinda ya Turo na Sidoni kuchinjisana na miti yamkungudza kubulukira ku Lebanoni kuti idze kumzinda wa Yopa pabara. Pyonsenepyo pidachitika na utongi wa Kirusi mfumu wa ku Peresia." 
Ezra3:8 Mwezi wachiwiri wa chaka chachiwiri pidafika iwo ku Nyumba ya Mulungu ku Yerusalemu, Zerubabele mwana Shealatiele na Yeshua mwana Yozadaki adatoma kuphata basa pabodzi pene na Aisraele anzawo onsene, anyansembe na Alevi, na onsene ale akhadabwerera ku Yerusalemu kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo ale. Iwo adasankhula Alevi a pyaka makumawiri pyakubalwa penu kupiringana penepo kukhala anyakuyang'anira kumangwa pontho kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
Ezra3:9 Yeshua Mlevi, anache achimuna na abale ache, pontho Kadimiele na abale ache achimuna (mbumba ya Hodavia) akhalimbo anyakuyang'anira kumangwa pontho kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu. (Iwo akhaphedzwa na Alevi a mbumba ya Henadadi.)" 
Ezra3:10 Pidamanga amisiri maziko a Nyumba ya Mulungu, anyansembe uku avala mikhanjo yawo pontho uku aphatira ngoma zawo, pabodzi pene na Alevi a mbumba ya Asafu, adaimira penepo na nkhotcho pyawo mbakuza MBUYA malingana na matongero adapaswa iwo ndzidzi wa Mfumu Davite." 
Ezra3:11 Iwo adaimba nyimbo zakukuza nazo MBUYA mwakubwereza-bwereza mbati, “MBUYA ngwadidi, kumfuna kwache Israele nkhokhonda mala.” Munthu onsene adakhuwa na mphamvu zache zonsene kukuza MBUYA, thangwi basa yakumangwa pontho kwa maziko a Nyumba ya Mulungu idatoma." 
Ezra3:12 Azinji a anyansembe, Alevi na akadamu a mabanja, ale akhadakalamba mwakuti adaona Nyumba ya Mulungu yakutoma ile, adalira mwakukalala pikhaona iwo kumangwa kwa maziko a Nyumba ya Mulungu. Mwenemo anango ale akhali penepo adakhuwa thangwi ya kukomerwa." 
Ezra3:13 Nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene adakwanisa kusiyanisa mkhuwo wa kukomerwa na mkhuwo wa chiliro tayu, thangwi iwo akhapichita mwakugaluza fala pyakwanga mwakuti pikhaveka na kutali pyakwanga pene." 
Ezra4:1 Pidava anyamalwa a Yuda na Benjemani kuti anthu akhadabwerera kudziko ya unyaperezo ale, akumanga pontho Nyumba ya MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele," 
Ezra4:2 iwo adadza kuna Zerubabele na kuna akadamu a mabanja mbalonga mbati, “Tinafuna tikhalembo namwe pabodzi pabasa yakumanga Nyumba ya Mulungu. Ife timbapembedza Mulungu ontho ambapembedza imwe ule, pontho ife timbapereka nsembe kuna iye kutomera ndzidzi wa Esarihadoni mfumu wa Asiria, adatidzesa kuno ule.”" 
Ezra4:3 Mbwenye Zerubabele, Yeshua na akadamu a mabanja onsene adalonga mbati, “Ife nkhabe funa kuti imwe mutiphedze kumanga Nyumba ya Mulungu wathu tayu. Ife tinaimanga tekha ene Nyumba ya MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele ninga montho mudatipangira Kirusi mfumu wa ku Peresia.”" 
Ezra4:4 Tenepo anthu akhakhala m'dzikomo ale adayesa kuagwisa mfuwa Ayuda mbaathuswa kuti aleke kuphata basayo. 
Ezra4:5 Iwo adadyekera mathubu a ku Peresia kuti achite mwakupokanyisana nawo. Iwo adachita penepi ndzidzi onsene wa kutonga kwa Kirusi mpakana ndzidzi wa kutonga kwa Dariusi. 
Ezra4:6 Ndzidzi wakutoma kutonga kwa Ahasuwero, anyamalwawo akukhala ku Yuda na Yerusalemu adalemba pinthu pyakuapambizira." 
Ezra4:7 Ndzidzi wakutonga kwa Aritaserisese mfumu wa ku Peresia, Bishilamu, Mitiredati, Tabele na anzawo anango adalembera mfumu kalata. Kalatayo idalembwa m'Chiaramu, tenepo idathema kuthumbusulwa ndzidzi ukhawerengwa iyo." 
Ezra4:8 Rehumu, mkulu wa boma na Shimishai mlembi wa nthemba adalemba kalata ili m'tchindemu kuna Aritaserisese kupokanyisana na Yerusalemu:" 
Ezra4:9 “Kubulukira kuna Rehumu, mkulu wa boma, na Shimishai, mlembi wa nthemba na kuna anzawo anango, anyakutonga miseru, pontho kubulukira kuna mathubu anango onsene a ku Ereke, Babiloni na Susa m'nthemba ya Elamu" 
Ezra4:10 pabodzi pene na anthu anango, ale adabuluswa m'misa mwawo na Ashuribanipali, munthu wamkulu pontho wamphamvu, mbakhazikika mumzinda wa Samaria na konsene kwene m'nthemba yakumadokero dzuwa a mkulo wa Yufurate.”" 
Ezra4:11 Kalatayo idalembwa tenepa: “Kubulukira kuna anyabasanu, amuna a kunthemba yakumadokero dzuwa a mkulo wa Yufurate, kwenda kuna Mfumu Aritaserisese." 
Ezra4:12 “Ife tinafuna, imwe Mfumu, mupidziwe kuti Ayuda ale adadza kubulukira kunthemba zanu zinango akhazikika mu Yerusalemu, tenepo iwo akumanga pontho mzinda wakupandukira na wakudawika ule. Iwo atoma kumanga pontho mafufu ache na kusasanya maziko a Nyumba ya Mulungu mwakuti chinchino pano anati amalise." 
Ezra4:13 Mfumu, ngakhala mzinda wenewu unamangwa pontho mafufu ache mbamaliswa, anthu anati aleke kukhoma msonkho, natenepo konta ya kobiri imbagumana imwe ile inati itchithe." 
Ezra4:14 Chinchino podi ife tili kunduli kwanu, Mfumu, tenepo ife nkhabe funa kuona mfumu kuchitiswa manyadzo na njira yeneyi tayu, tenepo ife tanyerezera kuti" 
Ezra4:15 mupereke utongi wakuti pile pidalembwa pya makolo anu pisakanyulwe. Ngakhala imwe munachita tenepo, munagumana kuti mzinda wenewu ndzidzi onsene ngwakupandukira, pontho kutomera kale ene waonesa mafumu na atsanthembawo nyatwa zikulu. Anthu ache ndzidzi onsene ngakunensa kutonga; ndi thangwi yache mzindawu udavungwa." 
Ezra4:16 Natenepo ife tikukudziwisani kuti ngakhala mzindawu unamangwa pontho mafufu ache mbamaliswa, penepo imwe Mfumu nkhabe dzakhalave na utongi pana nthemba yakumadokero dzuwa a mkulo wa Yufurate tayu.”" 
Ezra4:17 Mfumu adatawira mbati, “Mwenyikiro kuna Rehumu, mkulu wa boma, Shimishai mlembi wa nthemba na anzawo onsene ambakhala mu Samaria na konsene kwene kunthemba yakumadokero dzuwa a mkulo wa Yufurate." 
Ezra4:18 “Kalata idatilembera imwe ile idathumbusulwa mbiwerengwa kuna ine. 
Ezra4:19 Ine ndidapereka utongi, tenepo kusakanyulwa kudachitwa mbapigumanwa kuti kubulukira kale ene Yerusalemu apandukiradi atongi, pontho ngwakudzala na anthu akupandukira pontho na akunensa kutonga." 
Ezra4:20 Mafumu amphamvu atonga kweneko, pontho atonga kunthemba yonsene yakumadokero dzuwa a mkulo wa Yufurate kukhomesa msonkho na kusonkhesa kobiri m'misika." 
Ezra4:21 Natenepo imwe mwathema kutonga kuti amunawo aleke kumanga pontho mzindawo mpakana ndichite kutonga kuti achite tenepo. 
Ezra4:22 Chitani penepi kabodzi kene towera paleke khala chinthu chinango chakupasa Mfumu kaluma.” 
Ezra4:23 Sindzidzi kalata yakubulukira kuna Aritaserisese ile nkhuwerengwa kuna Rehumu, Shimishai na kuna anzawo, iwo adachimbiza kwenda ku Yerusalemu mbakhakhamiza Ayuda kuleka kumanga pontho mzindawo." 
Ezra4:24 Basa yakumanga Nyumba ya Mulungu mu Yerusalemu idalekera panjira mpakana chaka chachiwiri cha utongi wa Dariusi mfumu wa ku Peresia. 
Ezra5:1 Pandzidzi wenewo maprofeti awiri Hagai na Zekaria, mwana Ido, adatoma kulonga mphangwa zauprofeti na dzina ya Mulungu wa Israele kuna Ayuda akukhala mu Yuda na Yerusalemu." 
Ezra5:2 Pidava Zerubabele mwana Shealatiele na Yeshua mwana Yozadaki mphangwa zawo, adatoma kumanga pontho Nyumba ya Mulungu mu Yerusalemu, tenepo maprofeti awiri ale adaaphedza." 
Ezra5:3 Pandzidzi wenewo Tatenai mkulu wa boma ya kunthemba yakumadokero dzuwa a mkulo wa Yufurate na Shetari-Bozenai pabodzi pene na mathubu anzawo adadza ku Yerusalemu mbavunza mbati, “Mbani adakupasani utongi wakumanga pontho Nyumbayi na kusasanya mafufu ache?”" 
Ezra5:4 Iwo adavunza pontho madzina onsene a anthu akhaaphedza kumanga Nyumba ya Mulungu ale. 
Ezra5:5 Mbwenye Mulungu akhayang'anira akadamu a Chiyuda, natenepo mathubu a ku Peresia hadachite pinthu tayu mpakana iwo adalembera kalata Dariusi kuva pikhafuna iye kulonga." 
Ezra5:6 Kalata ishi ndiye idatumiza iwo kuna mfumu: 
Ezra5:7 “Kwenda kuna Mfumu Dariusi. Mfumu mbamutonge na mtendere! 
Ezra5:8 “Mfumu imwe mwathema kupidziwa kuti ife tidenda kunthemba ya Yuda mbatigumana kuti Nyumba ya Mulungu wamkululetu ikumangwa pontho na miyala mikulu-mikulu, pontho na matabwa m'mafufu. Basayo ikuphatika mphole-mphole pyakwanga pontho ikwenda m'tsogolo mwadidi mwene." 
Ezra5:9 “Penepo ife tidapempha akadamu awo kuti atipange munthu adaapasa utongi wakumanga pontho Nyumba ya Mulungu na kusasanya mafufu ache. 
Ezra5:10 Tidaavunza pontho madzinawo, towera tikudziwiseni anthu anayang'anira basa yeneyi." 
Ezra5:11 “Iwo adatawira mbati, ‘Ife ndife anyabasa a Mulungu wa kudzulu na dziko yapansi, tenepo ife tikumanga pontho Nyumba ya Mulungu, ile idasasanywa na mfumu wamphamvu wa Israele pyaka pizinji pyagwandapyo." 
Ezra5:12 Podi makolo athu adazhangalisa Mulungu wa kudzulu, iye adaaleka pyache kuti akundwe na Nebukadinezara wa Chikaladea, mfumu wa ku Babiloni. Nyumba ya Mulungu idavungwa, pontho anthu akhadakwatwa unyaperezo kudziko ya Babiloni." 
Ezra5:13 Tenepo chaka chakutoma cha utongi wa Kirusi, mfumu wa ku Babiloni, adatonga kuti Nyumba ya Mulungu imangwe pontho." 
Ezra5:14 Iye adabwezera pyombo pyasiliva na pyagolidi pikhadakwata Mfumu Nebukadinezara m'Nyumba ya Mulungu ku Yerusalemu pile mbakapiikhambo m'nyumba yakupembedzeramo milungu yache ku Babiloni. Kirusi adapereka pyombo penepi kuna munthu unango dzinache Sheshibazari, adasankhula iye kukhala mkulu wa boma ya Yuda ule." 
Ezra5:15 Mfumu adampanga kupikwata kubwerera napyo ku Nyumba ya Mulungu ku Yerusalemu, na kwenda kamanga pontho Nyumba ya Mulungu pambuto pakhali iyo kale pale." 
Ezra5:16 Tenepo Sheshibazari adadza mbaikha maziko; basayo yaphatika kutomera ndzidzi wenewo mpakana lero pano, kwache Nyumba ya Mulungu hidzati maliswa kumangwa tayu.’" 
Ezra5:17 “Mphapo ngakhala pinakukomerani mfumu mbapachitike kusakanyula ngakhala Kirusi adaperekadi utongi wakuti Nyumba ya Mulungu imangwe pontho mu Yerusalemu penu tayu, mbamutipange manyerezero anu papenepi.”" 
Ezra6:1 Tenepo Mfumu Dariusi adapereka utongi wakuti pyakulembwa pyonsene pyakulonga pyachifumu pyakukoyiwa mu Babiloni pisakanyulwe. 
Ezra6:2 Mbwenye mpukutu udagumanwa mumzinda wa Ekibatana m'nthemba ya Media wakulonga pya pinthu pyakuti: 
Ezra6:3 “Chaka chakutoma cha utongi wa Kirusi adatonga kuti Nyumba ya Mulungu mu Yerusalemu imangwe pontho ninga mbuto yakuperekerapo nsembe. Nyumbayo yathema umimbache kukhala makhono makumawiri na manomwe pontho chengo chache makhono makumawiri na manomwe. 
Ezra6:4 Mafufu ache athema kumangwa na matabwa padzulu pa mizere yonsene mitatu ya miyala. Pyonsene pyakufunika pabasayo pinapagalwi na thumba yachifumu. 
Ezra6:5 Pontho pyombo pyagolidi na pyasiliva pidadza na Mfumu Nebukadinezara kuno ku Babiloni kubulukira napyo ku Nyumba ya Mulungu ku Yerusalemu pyathema kubwezerwa m'mbuto mwapyo m'Nyumba ya Mulungu mu Yerusalemu.” 
Ezra6:6 Tenepo Dariusi adatawira tenepa: “Kuna Tetanai, mkulu wa nthemba yakumadokero dzuwa a mkulo wa Yufurate, Shetari-Bozenai na mathubu anzanu m'nthemba yakumadokero dzuwa a mkulo wa Yufurate. “Fedzani kutali na Nyumba ya Mulungu," 
Ezra6:7 pontho lekani dzudzumisa basayo. Alekeni mkulu wa boma ya Yuda na akadamu a Chiyuda kuti amange pontho Nyumba ya Mulungu pambuto pakhali iyo kale pale. 
Ezra6:8 Natenepo ine pano ndikukutongani kuti muaphedze basayo. Pyonsene pyakufunika pabasayo pinapagalwi kabodzi kene monsene mwene na kobiri zakubulukira kuthumba yachifumu, kumsonkho wa kunthemba yakumadokero dzuwa a mkulo wa Yufurate, towera basa ileke dzudzumiswa." 
Ezra6:9 Nsiku na nsiku okhonda tchotchesa imwe mwathema kuapasa anyansembe mu Yerusalemu pyonsene pene pinasowa iwo: anamphulu achimuna, mabira penu anabira kuti zikhale nsembe zakupyerera kuna Mulungu wa kudzulu, penu tirigu, vinyu, munyu, penu mafuta aolivi." 
Ezra6:10 Penepi pyathema kuchitika towera iwo apereke nsembe zakukomera Mulungu wa kudzulu, pontho kuti iwo apemphere kuti mtsanzayiso wache ukhale pana ine na ananga." 
Ezra6:11 Ndikuthimiza kutonga kuti ngakhala munthu unango anakhonda vera utongi wenewu, mphalupalu ya panyumba pache mbichololwe, isongolwe pontho mbitungulirwe nayo mimbache, pontho nyumbache inasanduka mulu wa khuku." 
Ezra6:12 Mulungu ule adasankhula Yerusalemu kukhala mbuto yache yakupembedzerwapo mbavunge mfumu onsene penu anthu anaswipisa utongi wenewu, pontho kuyesera kuvunga Nyumba ya Mulungu. Ndine Dariusi apereka utongi wenewu. Iwo wathema kuverwa monsene mwene.”" 
Ezra6:13 Penepo Tatenai, mkulu wa boma, Shetari-Bozenai na mathubu anzawo adachita ninga montho mudatongera mfumu." 
Ezra6:14 Akadamu a Chiyuda adachitisa basa yakumanga pontho Nyumba ya Mulungu kwenda m'tsogolo mwadidi. Iwo adawangiswa mtima na mphangwa za Hagai na Zekaria mwana Ido, maprofeti. Iwo adamalisa kumanga Nyumba ya Mulungu ninga montho mudaatongera Mulungu wa Israele, pontho na utongi wa Kirusi, Dariusi na Aritaserisese, mafumu a ku Peresia." 
Ezra6:15 Iwo adamalisa basayo pansiku yachitatu ya mwezi wa Adara, chaka chachitanthatu cha utongi wa Mfumu Dariusi." 
Ezra6:16 Tenepo Aisraele, anyansembe na Alevi pontho na anthu anango onsene ale akhadabwerera kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo, adapambulira Nyumba ya Mulungu mwakukomerwa." 
Ezra6:17 Pamwambo wakupambulira Nyumbayo kuna Mulungu, iwo adapereka ng'ombe zimuna dzana ibodzi, mabira madzana mawiri, anabira madzana manayi kukhala nsembe. Iwo adapereka pontho mbuzi khumi na ziwiri ninga chakupereka chakubulusira pyakudawa, mbuzi ibodzi kuimirira dzinza ibodzi ya Israele." 
Ezra6:18 Iwo adabwezera pontho m'mbuto mwawo anyansembe na Alevi malingana na magulu awo, kuphata basa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu mu Yerusalemu pakuteweza matongero adalembwa m'bukhu ya Mose ale." 
Ezra6:19 Anthu akhadabwerera kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo ale, adasekera Phwando ya Paska pansiku yakhumi na chinayi ya mwezi wakutoma wa chaka." 
Ezra6:20 Anyansembe na Alevi onsene akhadapichenesa okha ene, tenepo akhali akuchena pamaso pa Mulungu. Alevi adapha nyama kuti zikhale nsembe za Phwando ya Paska za anthu onsene akhadabwerera ale; za anyansembe na za iwo." 
Ezra6:21 Nsembe zidadyiwa na Aisraele onsene ale akhadabwerera kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo ale, pontho na anthu anango onsene ale adaleka njira zakuipa za anthu anango ale akhakhala m'dzikomo pontho akhadadza dzapembedza MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele." 
Ezra6:22 Nsiku zinomwe, iwo adasekera Phwando ya mikate yakusowa chakufufumisira mwakukomerwa. Iwo adakomerwa pyakwanga pene thangwi MBUYA adachitisa mfumu wa Asiria kuakomera mtima mwakuti iye adaaphedza basawo yakumanga pontho Nyumba ya Mulungu wa Israele." 
Ezra7:1 Pidagwanda pyaka pizinji pene, pikhali Aritaserisese mfumu wa ku Peresia, pakhali munthu unango dzinache Ezara, mwana Seraia, mwana Azaria, mwana Hilikia," 
Ezra7:2 mwana Shalumu, mwana Zadoki, mwana Ahitubu," 
Ezra7:3 mwana Amaria, mwana Azaria, mwana Meraioti," 
Ezra7:4 mwana Zerahia, mwana Uzi, mwana Buki," 
Ezra7:5 mwana Abishua, mwana Finiasi, mwana Eleazara, mwana Aroni Nyansembe Wamkulu." 
Ezra7:6 Ezara weneyu ngule adabulukira ku Babiloni. Iye akhali mfunzisi wakudziwisa mwadidi mwambo wa Mose, udapereka MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele ule. Mfumu adampasa pyonsene pidapempha iye, thangwi MBUYA Mulungu wache akhali naye." 
Ezra7:7 Anango mwa Aisraele, kuthimizapo anyansembe, Alevi, anyakuimba nyimbo, anyakulondali pamsuwo na anyakuphata basa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu adadzambo ku Yerusalemu chaka chachinomwe cha Mfumu Aritaserisese." 
Ezra7:8 Ezara adafika mu Yerusalemu mwezi wachishanu wa chaka chache chachinomwe. 
Ezra7:9 Ulendo wache adautomera ku Babiloni pansiku yakutoma ya mwezi wakutoma mbafika ku Yerusalemu pansiku yakutoma ya mwezi wachishanu thangwi Mulungu wache adamkomera mtima. 
Ezra7:10 Ezara adapipereka moyo wache onsene kuti adziwe matongero na mwambo wa MBUYA, pontho kufunzisa matongero ache pontho na pifunziso pyache kuna Aisraele." 
Ezra7:11 Mfumu Aritaserisese adalembera Ezara nyansembe pontho nyakudziwisa mwambo, ule adafunza pizinji pya matongero na mwambo wa MBUYA kuna Aisraele kalata ishi:" 
Ezra7:12 “Kubulukira kuna Aritaserisese, mfumu wa mafumu, kwenda kuna Ezara nyansembe pontho nyakudziwisa mwambo wa MBUYA wa kudzulu." 
Ezra7:13 “Ine ndikutonga kuti muufumu wanga, Aisraele onsene, anyansembe na Alevi ale anafuna pyakwenda namwe ku Yerusalemu anakwanisa kwenda." 
Ezra7:14 Ine pabodzi pene na mapungu anga manomwe ndikukutumani kuti mukavunze-vunze pya mule munafambira pinthu mu Yerusalemu na Yuda, towera kuona ngakhala mwambo, udakupasani Mulungu wanu ule, ukuverwadi." 
Ezra7:15 Imwe mwathema kukwata mitukwa ya golidi na siliva inafuna ine na mapungu anga kupasa Mulungu wa Israele ile, ule Nyumbache ili ku Yerusalemu." 
Ezra7:16 Imwe mwathema kukwata golidi na siliva adasonkhesa imwe m'nthemba yonsene ya Babiloni na pyakupereka pidapereka Aisraele na anyansembe mwakufuna kwawo kuti pikhale pya ku Nyumba ya Mulungu wawo ku Yerusalemu. 
Ezra7:17 “Iwe wathema kuchita mphole-mphole pakuphatisa basa kobiri zenezi, tenepo ugule ng'ombe zimuna, mabira achimuna, mapira na vinyu mbupipereke nsembe paguwa yansembe m'Nyumba ya Mulungu ku Yerusalemu." 
Ezra7:18 Iwe na amunako munakwanisa kuphatisa basa golidi na siliva wakusalira pabasa yonsene malingana na kufuna kwa Mulungu wanu. 
Ezra7:19 Iwe wathema kupereka kuna Mulungu ku Yerusalemu pyombo pyonsene pyapaswa imwe kuti piphatiswe basa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu pile. 
Ezra7:20 Chinthu chonsene chinafuna imwe kuti chiphate basa pa Nyumba ya Mulungu mukachikwate kubulukira kuthumba yachifumu. 
Ezra7:21 “Ndikutonga mathubu onsene ale anakoya kobiri ya kunthemba yakumadokero dzuwa a mkulo wa Yufurate kupereka mwakukomerwa kuna Ezara nyakudziwisa mwambo wa Mulungu wa kudzulu pinthu pyonsene pinapempha iye; 
Ezra7:22 mpakana mdidache ukwane: siliva makilogramu pikwi pitatu na madzana manayi, tirigu makilogramu pikwi khumi, vinyu m'mabuyawo madzana manayi, mafuta aolivi m'mabuyawo madzana manayi, pontho na munyu uzinji ene ninga munafunikira ipyo." 
Ezra7:23 Imwe mwathema kuonesesa kuti mwapereka pyonsene pinafuna Mulungu wa kudzulu kuti piphatiswe basa pa Nyumbache, gopesera anandizhangalira ine na ale ene anafuna kudza m'nduli mwangamu." 
Ezra7:24 Imwe mwakhondeswa kukhomesa msonkho anyansembe, Alevi, anyakuimba nyimbo na anyakulondali misuwo ya Nyumba ya Mulungu penu anthu onsene akuphata basa m'Nyumba ya Mulunguyi." 
Ezra7:25 “Iwe Ezara, pakuphatisa basa nzeru zidakupasa Mulungu wako, wathema kusankhula amuna akudziwa mafambisiro a pinthu pontho na anyakutonga miseru kuti atonge anthu a kunthemba yakumadokero dzuwa a mkulo wa Yufurate, ale ambateweza mwambo wa Mulungu. Iwe wathema kufunzisa mwambowo kuna munthu onsene okhonda kuudziwa." 
Ezra7:26 Ngakhala munthu unango anakhonda kuvera mwambo wa Mulungu wanu penu matongero a mfumu, weneyo athema kutchunyuswa pikulu pene na imfa penu kuthamangiswa m'dziko, penu kupokoserwa pinthu pyache, penu kuikhwa m'perezo.”" 
Ezra7:27 Ezara adalonga mbati, “Kuzani MBUYA Mulungu wa makolo athu. Iye achitisa mfumu kulemedza Nyumba ya Mulungu mu Yerusalemu na njira yeneyi." 
Ezra7:28 Tenepo na kundifuna kwache kokhonda mala kwandionesa iye, Mulungu achitisa mfumu na mapungu ache pontho na mathubu ache onsene amphamvu kundikomera mtima. Ndidawanga mtima thangwi MBUYA Mulungu wanga akhali na ine, natenepo ine ndakwanisa kunyengerera akadamu a mabanja azinji kubwerera nane pabodzi.”" 
Ezra8:1 Awa mbakadamu a mabanja na anthu akhadalembwa pabodzi pene nawo, pontho ale adadza pabodzi pene na ine kubulukira kudziko ya Babiloni pandzidzi wa Mfumu Aritaserisese:" 
Ezra8:2 Gereshomu wa mbumba ya Finiasi Daniele wa mbumba ya Itamara 
Ezra8:2 Gereshomu wa mbumba ya Finiasi Daniele wa mbumba ya Itamara 
Ezra8:3 Hatushi mwana Shekania wa mbumba ya Davite Zekaria wa mbumba ya Paroshi pabodzi pene na amuna dzana na makumashanu a mbumbache (pile pidalembwa pya makolo awo pikhalipo) 
Ezra8:4 Eliehoenai mwana Zerahia wa mbumba ya Pahati-Moabu pabodzi pene na amuna madzana mawiri. 
Ezra8:5 Shekania mwana Yahaziele wa mbumba ya Zatu pabodzi pene na amuna madzana matatu. 
Ezra8:6 Ebedi mwana Yonatani wa mbumba ya Adini pabodzi pene na amuna makumashanu. 
Ezra8:7 Yeshaia mwana Atalia wa mbumba ya Elamu pabodzi pene na amuna makumanomwe. 
Ezra8:8 Zebadia mwana Mikaele wa mbumba ya Shefatia pabodzi pene na amuna makumasere. 
Ezra8:9 Obadia mwana Yehiele wa mbumba ya Yoabu pabodzi pene na amuna madzana mawiri na khumi na asere. 
Ezra8:10 Shelomiti mwana Yosifia wa mbumba ya Bani pabodzi pene na amuna dzana na makumatanthatu. 
Ezra8:11 Zekaria mwana Bebai wa mbumba ya Bebai pabodzi pene na amuna makumawiri na asere. 
Ezra8:12 Yohanani mwana Hakatani wa mbumba ya Azigadi pabodzi pene na amuna dzana ibodzi na khumi. 
Ezra8:13 Elifeleti, Yeuele na Shemaia wa mbumba ya Adonikamu pabodzi pene na amuna makumatanthatu (enewa adabwerera m'nduli mwache)." 
Ezra8:14 Utai na Zakuri a mbumba ya Bigivai pabodzi pene na amuna makumanomwe. 
Ezra8:15 Ine ndagumanyisa gulu yonsene ya anthu pamgelo wakwendera ku Ahava mbatimanga msasa nsiku zitatu penepo. Ine ndidagumana kuti pagulupo pakhali anyansembe, kwache iwo hakhali Alevi tayu." 
Ezra8:16 Ine ndidachemeresa akadamu afemba ale akhali: Eliezere, Ariele, Shemaia, Elinatani, Yaribu, Elinatani, Natani, Zekaria na Meshulamu, pontho na afunzisi awiri Yoiaribu na Elinatani." 
Ezra8:17 Ine ndidaatuma kuna Ido, mkadamu wa ku Kasifia, kampempha iye pabodzi pene na anyakuphata basa anzache a m'Nyumba ya Mulungu akukhala kweneko ale kuti atitumizire anthu kuti atumikire m'Nyumba wa Mulungu wathu mu Yerusalemu." 
Ezra8:18 Na kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu, iwo adatitumizira Sherebia pabodzi pene na anache na abale ache, onsene pabodzi akhalipo amuna khumi na asere. Iye akhali munthu wakukwanisa pinthu, Mlevi wa mbumba ya Mahili." 
Ezra8:19 Iwo adatuma pontho Hashabia na Yeshaia a mbumba ya Merari pabodzi pene na abale awo makumawiri. 
Ezra8:20 Kuthimiza penepo pakhali pontho amuna madzana mawiri na makumawiri akuphata basa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu ale, gulu idakhazikisa Davite na mathubu ache kuti iphedze Alevi. Onsenewo adamala lembwa na madzinawo." 
Ezra8:21 Penepo chifupi na Mgelo wa Ahava, ine ndidapereka matongero akuti tonsenefe tipimane kudya, towera tipichepese pamaso pa Mulungu wathu kumpempha kuti ulendo wathu ife, anathu na pinthu pyathu pyonsene pene ukhale wadidi." 
Ezra8:22 Ndikhachita manyadzo kupempha mfumu kuti atipase anyankhondo na anyakutekenya akavalo kuti atitchinjirize kuna anyamalwathu panjira thangwi tikhadampanga mfumu kuti Mulungu wathu ambatsanzayisa munthu onsene ambamnyindira ule, kwache iye nkhabe komerwa tayu na anyakubauka kubuluka kuna iye, tenepo iye ambaatchunyusa." 
Ezra8:23 Natenepo ife tidapimana kudya na kupemphera kuna Mulungu wathu kuti atitchinjirize, iye adava kupemphera kwathu." 
Ezra8:24 Kubuluka penepo ndidapambulira kuna Mulungu anyansembe akulu khumi na awiri: Sherebia, Hashabia na anango khumi ale." 
Ezra8:25 Ine ndidapima siliva, golidi na pyombo pile pidapereka mfumu, mapungu ache na mathubu ache pontho na anthu a ku Israele kuti piphatiswe basa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, tenepo ndidapipereka kuna anyansembe." 
Ezra8:26 Pidaapasa ine mphipi: siliva wakukwana makilogramu pikwi makumawiri na awiri pyombo pyasiliva dzana ibodzi, pyakulemera makilogramu makumanomwe, golidi makilogramu pikwi pitatu na madzana manayi ndilo zagolidi makumanayi, zakulemera makilogramu masere na theka pyombo piwiri pyankuwa pyakuyetimira, pya mtengo sasawa na golidi." 
Ezra8:27  
Ezra8:28 Ine ndidalonga kuna iwo kuti, “Imwe ndimwe akupambulika kuna MBUYA Mulungu wa makolo anu, tenepo golidi, siliva na pyombo pyonsene pyagolidi pyadzeswa kuna iye ninga mitukwa yakuperekwa mwakufuna kwawo anthu mphyakupambulikambo." 
Ezra8:29 Piyang'anireni mwadidi mpakana pikafike ku Nyumba ya Mulungu. Kweneko m'masubi a anyansembe pipimeni mbamupipereke kuna anyansembe akulu na Alevi na kuna akadamu a Aisraele ku Yerusalemu.” 
Ezra8:30 Tenepo anyansembe na Alevi adakwata siliva, golidi na pyombo kuti aende napyo ku Nyumba ya Mulungu ku Yerusalemu." 
Ezra8:31 Pansiku yakhumi na chiwiri ya mwezi wakutoma, tidabuluka pa Mgelo wa Ahava kwenda ku Yerusalemu. Mulungu wathu akhali nafe mbatitchinjiriza kuna anyamalwa na anyakutibisalira pikhafamba ife." 
Ezra8:32 Pidafika ife ku Yerusalemu tidapuma nsiku zitatu. 
Ezra8:33 Kubuluka penepo pansiku yachinayi tidenda ku Nyumba ya Mulungu mbatipima golidi, siliva na pyombo mbatipipereka kuna nyansembe, Meremoti, mwana Uria. Iye akhali pabodzi pene na Eleazara mwana Finiasi pontho Alevi awiri, Yozabadi mwana Yeshua na Naodia mwana Binui." 
Ezra8:34 Pyonsene pidalengeswa mbipipimwa mwadidi mwene mbipilembwa na ndzidzi onthowo. 
Ezra8:35 Onsene ale akhadabwerera kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo adadza mbapereka nsembe zakupyerera kuna Mulungu wa Israele, ng'ombe zimuna khumi na ziwiri kuimirira Aisraele onsene, mabira amuna makumafemba na atanthatu, pontho anabira makumanomwe na anomwe. Iwo adapereka pontho nsembe mbuzi khumi na ziwiri kuti zikhale nsembe zakubulusira pyakudawa. Nyama zonsenezi zidaperekwa kuna MBUYA kuti zikhale nsembe zakupyerera." 
Ezra8:36 Iwo adakwata pontho kalata idaapasa mfumu mbakaipereka kuna akulu a boma na kuna mathubu a m'nthemba yakumadokero dzuwa a mkulo wa Yufurate, alembo adadza dzaphedza anthu, pontho na basa ya pa Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
Ezra9:1 Pikhadamala penepi kuchitika, akadamu a Aisraele adadza mbandipanga kuti anthu, anyansembe na Alevi hadapipambule okha ene kuna madziko adachita na iwo madire ale tayu; Aamoni, Amoabu na Aiguputo penu Akanani, Ahiti, Aperizi, Ayebusi na Aamori. Iwo akhachitambo pyakunyansa ninga pyontho pikhachita anthu ale." 
Ezra9:2 Ayuda na anawo ene akhasemba akazi a madziko enewa, tenepo anthu akuchena a Mulungu adaswipiswa. Akadamu na mathubu ndiye adanyanya kudawa." 
Ezra9:3 Pidava ine penepi ndidang'amba nguwo zanga na kutsukwala, ndidakwedzula tsisi yanga na ndevu zanga mbandikhala pansi wakusanyika pyakwanga pene mumtima mwanga." 
Ezra9:4 Ine ndidakhala penepo wakusanyika mumtima mpakana ndzidzi wakupereka nsembe zakumawulo udakwana, tenepo anthu adatoma kugumanyikana mwakundizungulira, onsene ale akhachita mantha na pinthu pidalonga Mulungu wa Israele pya kudawa kwa anthu akhadabwerera kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo." 
Ezra9:5 Pidafika ndzidzi wakupereka nsembe zakumawulo, ine ndidalamuka pakhalira ine pale, uku ndavala nguwo zanga zakung'ambika zile, ndidagodama kupemphera. Tenepo ndidafuthula manjanga kuna MBUYA Mulungu wanga" 
Ezra9:6 mbandipemphera kuti, “Mulungu, ine ndina manyadzo kuti ndiyenuse nkhope yanga kuna imwe thangwi pyakudawa pyathu pyapiringana pyimo pyathu, pontho pyakuipa pyathu pyaphata thambo." 
Ezra9:7 Kubulukira ndzidzi wa makolo athu mpakana lero, ife anthu anu tadawa pikulu pene. Na thangwi ya pyakudawa pyathu, ife, mafumu athu, na anyansembe athu, tagwa m'manja mwa mafumu achilendo, pontho tachekwa, taberwa pinthu pyathu, pontho taphatwa ninga anyaperezo. Ife tachitiswa manyadzo pikulu pene ninga muna ipyo lero." 
Ezra9:8 Chinchino ndzidzi pang'ono, MBUYA Mulungu wathu mwatikomera mtima, pontho mwatawirisa anango a ife kupulumuka ku ubitchu mbatikhala pakupata m'mbuto yakuchenayi. Imwe mwatisudzula pa ubitchu mbamutipasa moyo wachinchino." 
Ezra9:9 Ife tikhali mabitchu, kwache imwe hamudatisiye mu ubitchumo tayu. Iye ationesa kutifuna kwache kokhonda mala pamaso pa mafumu a ku Peresia kutikomera mtima. Iye atipasa moyo wachinchino, towera tikamange pontho Nyumba ya Mulungu, ile ikhadasanduka madembe, pontho kuti tikhale pakupata muno mu Yuda na Yerusalemu." 
Ezra9:10 “Kwache chinchino Mulungu, tinalonganji papinthu pyonsene pyachitikapi? Ife taswa pontho matongero anu" 
Ezra9:11 adatipasa imwe kudzera muna anyabasanu maprofeti ale. Iwo adatipanga kuti dziko ikhaenda ife kapokosera ile, idadzala na pyakuipa thangwi anthu ache adamala kuiswipisa na mabasawo akunyansa akhaphata iwo kubulukira nkhomo mpakana nkhomo inango ya dzikoyo." 
Ezra9:12 Iwo adatipanga kuti tileke semberana nawo, pontho tileke kuaphedza kuti pinthu pyawo piafambire mwadidi, ngakhala tikhafuna kuti tidye pyadidi pya dzikoyo mbatipisiyirambo pidzukulu pyathu kwenda na kwenda." 
Ezra9:13 Podi kwene kuti pinthu pyonsenepi pikhachitika kuna ife kutitchunyusa thangwi ya pyakudawa na pyakuipa pyathu, tapidziwa kuti imwe Mulungu wathu mwatitchunyusa pang'ono nee ninga mudathemera ife kutchunyuswa tayu, pontho mwatitawirisa kuti tikhale na moyo." 
Ezra9:14 Apo tenepambo tinakwanisa tani pontho kukhonda matongero anu mbatisemberana na anthu akudawikawa? Ngakhala ife tinachita tenepo, imwe munatizhangalira pyakwanga pene mwakuti imwe munativungiratu monsene mwene mbamukhonda tawirisa kuti pasale munthu na mbodzi ene na moyo." 
Ezra9:15 MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele, ndimwe wakulungama, tenepo imwe mwatitawirisa kuti tikhale na moyo. Ife tatawira kukudawirani kwathu, podi kwene kuti na thangwi ya pyakudawa pyathu ife nee tathema kudza pamaso panu tayu.”" 
Ezra10:1 Ndzidzi ukhapemphera Ezara na kubweka kudawa, kulira na kupigwisa yekha ene patsogolo pa Nyumba ya Mulungu, mwinji wa Aisraele; amuna, akazi, na ana ene, adagumanyikana mwakumzungulira. Iwombo akhalira pikulu pene." 
Ezra10:2 Tenepo Shekania mwana Yehiele wa mbumba ya Elamu adalonga kuna Ezara mbati, “Ife taleka kukhala akukhulupirika kuna Mulungu thangwi ya kusemba akazi achilendo, kwache podi kwene kuti pili tenepo, Aisraele ana chidikhiro basi." 
Ezra10:3 Chinchino ife tathema kudumbira pikulu pene kuna Mulungu wathu kuti ife tinati tigwinye kwawo akazi achilendowa na anawo ene. Ife tinati tichite pinthu pinatipanga iwe na anthu ale ambagopa matongero a Mulungu wathu. Penepi mbapichitwe malingana na mwambo wa Mulungu. 
Ezra10:4 Lamuka Ezara, penepi pili m'manja mwako. Ife tili kunduli kwako, natenepo wangisa mbupichite.”" 
Ezra10:5 Tenepo Ezara adatoma na kudumbirisa anyansembe akulu, Alevi na Aisraele anango onsene kuti iwo anachita pinthu pidanyerezera Shekania kuti pichitwe pile." 
Ezra10:6 Tenepo iye adabuluka patsogolo pa Nyumba ya Mulungu pale mbaenda kusubi a Yehohanani mwana Eliashibu mbakhalapo mosiku onsene uku akulira thangwi ya kukhonda khulupirika kwa anthu akhadabulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo ale. Iye hadadye penu kumwa na chinthu chene tayu. 
Ezra10:7 Mphangwa zidatumizwa mu Yerusalemu na mu Yuda monsene kuti anthu akhadabulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo ale athema kugumanyikana mu Yerusalemu. 
Ezra10:8 Mathubu na akadamu adatonga kuti, “Ngakhala munthu unango anachimwana kudza pansiku zitatu, pinthu pyache pyonsene pyathema kupokoserwa, pontho athema kutaya chidzo chache chakukhala mbodzi wa dzinzayi.”" 
Ezra10:9 Nsiku zenezi pansiku yachimakumawiri ya mwezi wachifemba, amuna onsene akukhala m'nthemba ya Yuda na Benjemani adadza ku Yerusalemu mbagumanyikana pachintalo cha Nyumba ya Mulungu. Kunja kukhavumba mvula pyakwanga, tenepo na thangwi ya kunja pontho na kufunika kwa mgumanowo, munthu onsene akhatetemera." 
Ezra10:10 Ezara nyansembe adaimira mbalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Imwe mwakhonda kukhulupirika pakusemba akazi achilendo, kuthimizira kudawa pa Israele." 
Ezra10:11 Chinchino mphapo, bwekani pyakudawa pyanu kuna MBUYA, Mulungu wa makolo anu mbamuchite pyakumkomera. Lekanani na alendo ambakhala m'dziko mwathu muno ale, pontho na akazi achilendowo.”" 
Ezra10:12 Anthu adatawira mwakukhuwa mbati, “Ife tinachita pyonsene pene pinalonga iwe." 
Ezra10:13 Kwache pano pana anthu azinji, pontho kunjaku kuna mvula, tenepo ife nkhabe kwanisa kuimira pakwecha tayu. Kuthimiza penepo penepi nkhabe kupimalisa nsiku ibodzi penu ziwiri tayu, thangwi ife tadawa pikulu pene." 
Ezra10:14 Aleke akadamu apichite m'mbuto mwa Aisraele onsene. Tenepo munthu onsene m'maluwani mwathu ule adasemba mkazi wachilendo mbadze pandzidzi wakusankhulika pabodzi pene na akadamu na anyakutonga miseru a mumzinda mwawo, mpakana ukali wa Mulungu pana ife umbombowe.”" 
Ezra10:15 Nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene adapokanyisa penepi tayu kupambula Yonatani mwana Asahele na Yahizeia mwana Tikiva, ale akhali khundu ibodzi ene na Meshulamu na Shabetai Mlevi." 
Ezra10:16 Anyakubwerera kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo ale, adaphatizana nawo manyerezero enewo, tenepo Ezara adasankhula amuna pakati pa mbumba mbaalemba madzinawo. Pansiku yakutoma ya mwezi wakhumi, iwo adatoma kuvunza-vunza," 
Ezra10:17 tenepo kumala kwa miyezi mitatu, iwo adamalisa miseru yonsene ya amuna akukhala na akazi achilendo ale." 
Ezra10:18 Pakati pa pidzukulu pya anyansembe amuna awa ndiye akhadasemba akazi achilendo: Kubulukira kuna pidzukulu pya Yeshua mwana Yozadaki na abale ache: Maaseia, Eliezere, Yaribu na Gedalia." 
Ezra10:19 Iwo onsene adadumbira kusiya akazawo, pontho munthu onsene adapereka bira wamamuna kubulukira pa mkumbi wache kuti akhale nsembe yakubulusira pyakudawa." 
Ezra10:20 Kubulukira kuna pidzukulu pya Imeri akhali Hanani na Zebadia. 
Ezra10:21 Kubulukira kuna pidzukulu pya Harimu akhali Maaseia, Elia, Shemaia, Yehiele na Uzia." 
Ezra10:22 Kubulukira kuna pidzukulu pya Pashuri akhali Elioenai, Maaseia, Ishimaele, Netanele, Yozabadi na Elasa." 
Ezra10:23 Pakati pa Alevi akhali Yozabadi, Shimei, Kelaia, (weneyu ndi Kelita), Petahia, Yuda na Eliezere." 
Ezra10:24 Kubulukira pakati pa anyakuimba nyimbo akhali Eliashibu. Kubulukira pakati pa anyakuyang'anira Nyumba ya Mulungu akhali Shalumu, Telemu na Uri." 
Ezra10:25 Pontho kubulukira pakati pa Aisraele anango: Kubulukira kuna pidzukulu pya Paroshi akhali Ramia, Izia, Malikia, Miamini, Eleazara, Malikia na Benaia." 
Ezra10:26 Kubulukira kuna pidzukulu pya Elamu akhali Matania, Zekaria, Yehiele, Abidi, Yeremoti na Elia." 
Ezra10:27 Kubulukira kuna pidzukulu pya Zatu akhali Elioenai, Eliashibu, Matania, Yeremoti, Zabadu na Aziza." 
Ezra10:28 Kubulukira kuna pidzukulu pya Bebai akhali Yehohanani, Hanania, Zabai na Atilai." 
Ezra10:29 Kubulukira kuna pidzukulu pya Bani akhali Meshulamu, Maluki, Adaia, Yashubu, Sheale na Yeremoti." 
Ezra10:30 Kubulukira kuna pidzukulu pya Pahati-Moabu akhali Adina, Kelali, Benaia, Maaseia, Matania, Bezalele, Binui na Manase." 
Ezra10:31 Kubulukira kuna pidzukulu pya Harimu akhali Eliezere, Ishia, Malikia, Shemaia, Shimeoni," 
Ezra10:32 Benjemani, Maluki na Shemaria." 
Ezra10:33 Kubulukira kuna pidzukulu pya Hashumu akhali Metania, Matata, Zabadu, Elifeleti, Yeremai, Manase na Shimei." 
Ezra10:34 Kubulukira kuna pidzukulu pya Bani akhali Maadai, Amuramu, Uele," 
Ezra10:35 Benaia, Bedaia, Keluhi," 
Ezra10:36 Vania, Meremoti, Eliashibu," 
Ezra10:37 Matania, Matenai na Yaasu." 
Ezra10:38 Kubulukira kuna pidzukulu pya Binui akhali Shimei," 
Ezra10:39 Shelemia, Natani, Adaia," 
Ezra10:40 Makinadebai, Shashai, Sharai" 
Ezra10:41 Azarele, Shelemia, Shemaria," 
Ezra10:42 Shalumu, Amaria na Yosefe." 
Ezra10:43 Kubulukira kuna pidzukulu pya Nebo akhali Yeiele, Matitia, Zabadu, Zebina, Yadai, Yowele na Benaia." 
Ezra10:44 Onsenewa akhadasemba akazi achilendo, tenepo iwo adaagwinya kwawo pabodzi pene na anawo ene." 
Nehemiah1:1 Awa ndi mafala a Nehemia mwana Hakalia: Mwezi wa Kisilevi chaka chamakumawiri ndzidzi ukhatonga Mfumu Aritaserisese, ine Nehemia ndikhali ku Susa mzinda ukulu." 
Nehemiah1:2 Mbaleanga Hanani adadza kubulukira ku Yuda pabodzi pene na amuna anango mbandiavunza pya Yerusalemu na pya Ayuda, ale akhadabwerera kubulukira ku Babiloni m'dziko ya unyaperezo." 
Nehemiah1:3 Iwo adandipanga kuti ale akhadasala na moyo mbabwerera kudziko kwawo akhali panyatwa zikulu pontho kuti alendo akhakhala chifupi na iwo ale, adaalulupisa. Iwo adandipanga kuti mpanda wa Yerusalemu wagwa, pontho misuwo yache yavungwa na moto." 
Nehemiah1:4 Pidava ine pyonsenepi ndidakhala pansi mbandilira. Ine ndidasintili mbandipimana kudya nsiku zizinji zene mbandipemphera pamaso pa Mulungu wa kudzulu. 
Nehemiah1:5 Ine ndidalonga kuti, “MBUYA Mulungu wa kudzulu. Ndimwe wamkulu pontho wakugopeka, ule ambakoya chiverano chache mbaonesa kuafuna kwache kokhonda mala anthu ale ambamfuna mbavera matongero ache." 
Nehemiah1:6 Ikhani khutu na kufungula maso anu kuna kupemphera kwa nyabasanu, ule akupempherera anyabasanu, Aisraele, mosiku na masikati. Ine ndikutawira kuti ife Aisraele tadawa. Makolo anga na ine tadawa." 
Nehemiah1:7 Ife takudawirani, pontho ife sidachite malingana na matongero anu tayu. Ife sidakoye mwambo wanu udatipasa imwe kudzera muna Mose, nyabasanu ule tayu." 
Nehemiah1:8 Chinchino kumbukani pidapanga imwe Mose pile kuti, ‘Ngakhala imwe Aisraele munakhonda kukhulupirika kuna ine, ine ndinakubalalisani pakati pa madzinza anango." 
Nehemiah1:9 Mbwenye ngakhala munabwerera kuna ine mbamuchita pinthu pidakutongani ine pile, ine ndinakubwezerani kumbuto idasankhula ine kuti ndipembedzwemo ile, podi kwene kuti imwe mwabalaliswa kumadolomero a dziko yapansi.’" 
Nehemiah1:10 “Mbuya awa mbanyabasanu, anthu anu adapulumusa imwe na mphamvu zanu zikulu ale." 
Nehemiah1:11 Veserani kupemphera kwanga pontho na kupemphera kwa anyabasanu anango onsene, ambafuna kudzesa chilemedzo kuna dzinanu ale. Chitisani ine, nyabasanu, kukhala wakupikwanisa mbamuchitise Mfumu kundikomera mtima.” Ndzidzi wenewo ine ndikhali nyakufiliviri vinyu kuna mfumu." 
Nehemiah2:1 Nsiku inango pidagwanda miyezi minayi pikhadya Mfumu Aritaserisese ndidamfiliviri vinyu. Chipo iye hadandione wakutsukwala pamaso pache tayu," 
Nehemiah2:2 tenepo iye adandivunza mbati, “Watani unatsukwala tenepa? Iwe nkhabe kuva manungo kupha tayu, mwinango pana chinango chinakuchitisa kutsukwala tenepa.” Ine ndidaphatwa na mantha pyakwanga," 
Nehemiah2:3 kwache ndidalonga kuna mfumu kuti, “Mfumu mbakhale na moyo kwenda na kwenda. Ndinakhonda tani kuoneka wakutsukwala, mwenemo mzinda udaikhwa makolo anga m'masiye lero wasanduka madembe pontho misuwo ya mpandache yamala piswa moto.”" 
Nehemiah2:4 Mfumu adavunza mbati, “Apo chinafuna iwe ninji?” Ine ndidapemphera kuna Mulungu wa kudzulu,"
