Nehemiah2:5 tenepo ndidalonga kuna mfumu kuti, “Ngakhala pinakukomerani imwe mfumu, pontho ngakhala mwakomerwa nane, nditawiriseni kwenda kudziko ya Yuda mumzinda mudaikhwa m'masiye makolo anga mule, towera ndikamange pontho mzindawo.”" 
Nehemiah2:6 Tenepo mfumu, mwenemo matsano akhala m'khundu mwache, adandivunza mbati, “Ulendowo unakwata ndzidzi ukulu tani, pontho unabwerako lini?” Pidamkomera mfumu kundigwinya, tenepo ine ndidampanga ndzidzi wache." 
Nehemiah2:7 Tenepo ndidampempha kuti andipase kalata yakwenda nayo kuna akulu a boma a kunthemba yakumadokero dzuwa a mkulo wa Yufurate kuti anditawirise kugwanda mpakana ku Yuda. 
Nehemiah2:8 Ndidapempha pontho kalata yakwenda nayo kuna Asafu nyakuyang'anira msitu wachifumu, kumpanga kuti andipase matabwa akumangira misuwo ya mpanda wa nyumba ya anyankhondo akulondali Nyumba ya Mulungu ale, akumangira misuwo ya mpanda wa mzinda pontho ya nyumba ikhafuna ine kukhala ile. Mfumu adandipasa pyonsene pidampempha ine, thangwi MBUYA Mulungu akhali nane." 
Nehemiah2:9 Mfumu adatuma akadamu a anyankhondo na anyakupakira akavalo pabodzi pene na ine, tenepo ndidautoma ulendo wakwenda kumadokero dzuwa a mkulo wa Yufurate. Kweneko ine ndidapereka kalata kuna akulu a boma, ile idabulukira kuna mfumu." 
Nehemiah2:10 Mbwenye Sanibalati wa kuluwani ya Beti-Horoni na Tobia, thubu wa nthemba ya Amoni, adava kuti munthu unango adza dzachitira Aisraele udidi, tenepo iwo adaipirwa napyo pikulu pene." 
Nehemiah2:11 Ine ndidenda ku Yerusalemu, mbwenye nsiku zitatu" 
Nehemiah2:12 ine sidapange munthu na mbodzi ene tayu pinthu pidandipepesera Mulungu mumtimamu kuti ndipichite mu Yerusalemu na Yuda. Tenepo pachiti-chiti ndidalamuka mbindibuluka panja pabodzi pene na anzanga anango. Nyama idakwata ife ikhali bulu ene adapakira ine ule. 
Nehemiah2:13 Ukhali mosiku pidabuluka ine mumzinda kutchithira ku Msuwo wa Kuphedi, mbandienda kupiringana Mphuno ya Nyangume mpakana ku Msuwo wa Khuku. Pikhafamba ine, ndidaona mpanda wakugwa ule, pontho na misuwo ikhadavungwa na moto ile." 
Nehemiah2:14 Kubuluka penepo ndidenda ku Msuwo wa Mphuno ya madzi pontho na ku Thawale ya Mfumu. Bulu adapakira ine ule hadakwanise kugumana njira tayu, thangwi ya madongolomwa." 
Nehemiah2:15 Natenepo ndidatchithira kuphedi ya Kidroni mbandifamba m'khundu-khundu mwa mpanda wa mzinda kuuona mwadidi. Kubuluka penepo ndidabwerera kunjira idadza na ine ile, kubwerera mumzinda mbandipita na pa Msuwo wa Kuphedi." 
Nehemiah2:16 Nkhabe thubu na mbodzi ene adadziwa kukhali ine na pikhachita ine pile tayu. Na ndzidzi wenewu ene sidalonge chinthu na chibodzi chene kuna Ayuda anzanga tayu; anyansembe, akadamu, mathubu penu anthu anango ene, ale adathema kukwata khundu pabasa yeneyi." 
Nehemiah2:17 Kwache ndzidzi wenewu ndidalonga kuna iwo kuti, “Yang'anani nyatwa ina ifeyi, thangwi Yerusalemu asanduka madembe, pontho misuwo yache yamala vungwa. Tendeni timange pontho mpanda wa mzinda mbatibulusa manyadzo ana ifewa.”" 
Nehemiah2:18 Pontho ndidaapanga mule mukhali Mulungu na ine mbandiphedza pontho na pinthu pidalonga mfumu kuna ine. Iwo adatawira mbati, “Tendeni titome basa yakumanga.” Tenepo iwo adasasanyika kutoma basayo." 
Nehemiah2:19 Pidava Sanibalati na Tobia pontho Geshemu Muarabu pya pinthu pikhasasanya ife kupichita pile, iwo adatiseka mbalonga mbati, “Ayi chinachita imwechi ninji? Ayi imwe munafuna kupandukira mfumu?”" 
Nehemiah2:20 Ine ndidatawira kuti, “Mulungu wa kudzulu anatichitisa kuti tipikwanise. Ife ndife anyabasache pontho tinati titome pontho mzindawu. Mbwenye kulonga pya imwe, imwe nkhabe khundu na chinthu chonsene mu Yerusalemu, pontho imwe nkhabe khundu na mitemo yache tayu.”" 
Nehemiah3:1 Umu ndi mule mudamangirwa mpanda wa mzinda wa Yerusalemu. Nyansembe Wamkulu Eliashibu pabodzi pene na anyansembe anzache adamanga pontho Msuwo wa Mabira. Iwo adaupambulira kuna MBUYA mbauikha pontho m'mbuto mwache mbukhala Nsanja ya Dzana mbaipambula mpakana mbufika pontho ku Nsanja ya Hananele. 
Nehemiah3:2 Amuna a ku Yeriko adamanga khundu inango, Zakuri mwana Imri adamangambo khundu inango." 
Nehemiah3:3 Mbumba ya Hasena ndiye idamanga Msuwo wa Nsomba. Iwo adaikha matabwa na misuwo yache ene m'mbuto mwache, mbaikha pyakumangira pya mazinga na mphinga zasimbi." 
Nehemiah3:4 Meremoti mwana Uria pontho mdzukuluache Hakozi adamanga khundu inango. Meshulamu mwana Berekia pontho mdzukuluache Meshezabele adamanga khundu inango, Zadoki mwana Baana adamangambo khundu inango." 
Nehemiah3:5 Amuna a ku Tekoa adamanga khundu inango, kwache akulu-akulu a mumzindamo adakhonda kuphata basa idapaswa iwo na anyakuyang'anira basa ale." 
Nehemiah3:6 Yoiada mwana Pasea pabodzi na Meshulamu mwana Besodeia adamanga Msuwo wa Yeshana. Iwo adaikha matabwa na misuwo yache ene m'mbuto mwache, mbaikha pyakumangira pya mazinga na mphinga zasimbi." 
Nehemiah3:7 Melatia wa ku Gibeoni, Yadoni wa ku Meronoti na amuna a ku Gibeoni na ku Mizipa adamanga khundu inango mpakana kunyumba ya mkulu wa boma ya nthemba yakumadokero dzuwa a mkulo wa Yufurate." 
Nehemiah3:8 Uziele mwana Harihaia nyakufula golidi adamanga khundu inango. Hanania nyakusasanya mafuta akununkhira adamangambo khundu inango mpakana ku Fufu ya Ntchindu. 
Nehemiah3:9 Refaia mwana Huri mtongi wa khundu inango ya nthemba ya Yerusalemu adamangambo khundu inango. 
Nehemiah3:10 Yedaia mwana Harumafu adamangambo khundu inango, ikhali chifupi na nyumbache ile. Hatushi mwana Hashabineia adamangambo khundu inango." 
Nehemiah3:11 Malikia mwana Harimu na Hashubu mwana Pahati-Moabu adamangambo khundu inango, pontho na Nsanja ya Mauvuni." 
Nehemiah3:12 Shalumu mwana Haloheshi, mtongi wa khundu inango ya nthemba ya Yerusalemu adamangambo khundu inango. Anache achikazi adamphedza basayo." 
Nehemiah3:13 Hanuni na mzika za mzinda wa Zanoa adamanga pontho Msuwo wa Kuphedi. Iwo adaikha matabwa na misuwo yache ene m'mbuto mwache, mbaikha pyakumangira pya mazinga na mphinga zasimbi. Iwo adasasanya pontho fufu yakulapha makhono madzana manayi na anayi mbafika ku Msuwo wa Khuku." 
Nehemiah3:14 Malikia mwana Rekabu mtongi wa nthemba ya Beti-Hakeremu adamanga pontho Msuwo wa Khuku. Iye adaikha matabwa na misuwo yache ene m'mbuto mwache, mbaikha pyakumangira pya mazinga na mphinga zasimbi." 
Nehemiah3:15 Shalumu mwana Kolihoze mtongi wa nthemba ya Mizipa adamanga pontho Msuwo wa Mphuno ya madzi. Iye adaikha nsoyi padzulu pa msuwo mbaikha matabwa na misuwo yache ene m'mbuto mwache, mbaikha pyakumangira pya mazinga na mphinga zasimbi. Pathawale ya Shela iye adamanga pontho fufu ya chifupi na munda wachifumu mpakana ku nsikada zakutchithira kubulukira kumzinda wa Davite." 
Nehemiah3:16 Nehemia mwana Azibuku mtongi wa nthemba inango ya Beti-Zuri adamangambo khundu inango ya mpanda mpakana kunthumbi ya Davite, kuthawale na ku Nyumba ya Anyankhondo akuveka." 
Nehemiah3:17 Alevi ale adamanga pontho makhundu anango azinji a mpanda mbawa: Rehumu mwana Bani adamangambo khundu inango; Hashabia mtongi wa khundu inango ya nthemba ya Keila adamangambo khundu inango m'mbuto mwa anthu a m'nthemba mwache; 
Nehemiah3:18 Bavai mwana Henadadi mtongi wa nthemba inango ya Keila adamangambo khundu inango; 
Nehemiah3:19 Ezeri mwana Yeshua mtongi wa Mizipa adamanga khundu inango kunkhope kwa nyumba yakukoyeramo pida pyankhondo mpakana pambuto padagonya fufu; 
Nehemiah3:20 Baruki mwana Zabai adamangambo khundu inango mpakana kumsuwo wa nyumba ya Eliashibu, Nyansembe Wamkulu;" 
Nehemiah3:21 Meremoti mwana Uria pontho mdzukuluache Hakozi adamangambo khundu inango mpakana kumadolomero a nyumba ya Eliashibu. 
Nehemiah3:22 Awa mbanyansembe ale adamangambo makhundu anango azinji a mpanda: Anyansembe a kunthemba yakuzungulira Yerusalemu adamangambo khundu inango; 
Nehemiah3:23 Benjemani na Hashubu adamangambo khundu inango ile ikhali mwakuyang'anisana na nyumba zawo; Azaria mwana Maaseia pontho mdzukuluache Anania adamangambo khundu inango ile ikhadayang'anisana na nyumbache. 
Nehemiah3:24 Binui mwana Henadadi adamangambo khundu inango, kubulukira kunyumba ya Azaria mpakana padagonya fufu." 
Nehemiah3:25 Palali mwana Uzai adamangambo khundu inango, kubulukira padagonya mpanda na nsanja ya nyumba yachifumu ya padzulu chifupi na chintalo cha anyakulondali. Pedaia mwana Paroshi adamangambo khundu inango kunkhomo yakumabulukiro dzuwa chifupi na Msuwo wa Madzi pontho na nsanja ya anyakulondali ku Nyumba ya Mulungu. (Yeneyi ikhali khundu ya mzinda yakuchemerwa Ofele, kukhakhala anyakuphata basa pa Nyumba ya Mulungu ale.)" 
Nehemiah3:26  
Nehemiah3:27 Amuna a ku Tekoa adamangambo khundu inango, khundu yawo yachiwiri kuimanga, kubulukira kunkhomo yakuyang'anisana na nsanja ikulu ya anyakulondali ku Nyumba ya Mulungu mpakana kufufu chifupi na Ofele." 
Nehemiah3:28 Gulu ya anyansembe adamangambo khundu inango kwendera kumpoto kubulukira ku Msuwo wa Akavalo kada munthu kumanga mwakuyang'anisana na nyumbache. 
Nehemiah3:29 Zadoki mwana Imeri adamangambo khundu inango ikhadayang'anisana na nyumbache ile. Shemaia mwana Shekania, nyakulondali Msuwo wa Kumabulukiro dzuwa, adamangambo khundu inango." 
Nehemiah3:30 Hanania mwana Shelemia pabodzi pene na Hanuni mwana wachitanthatu wa Zalafu adamangambo khundu inango; yeneyi ikhali khundu yawo yachiwiri kuimanga. Meshulamu mwana Berekia adamangambo khundu inango, ile ikhali mwakuyang'anisana na nyumbache." 
Nehemiah3:31 Malikia nyakufula golidi adamangambo khundu inango mpakana kunyumba ikhakhala anyakuphata basa pa Nyumba ya Mulungu na anyakuchita malonda, ile ikhali chifupi na Msuwo wa Mifikadi chifupi na subi yapadzulu kunkhomo yakumabulukiro dzuwa ya fufu." 
Nehemiah3:32 Anyakufula golidi na anyakuchita malonda adamangambo khundu yakumalisira kubulukira kusubi pankhomo mpakana ku Msuwo wa Mabira. 
Nehemiah4:1 Pidapiva Sanibalati kuti ife tikhamanga pontho mpanda, iye adaswirizwa napyo mbatoma kutisedegula. Iye adatitikana ife Ayuda." 
Nehemiah4:2 Pamaso pa anzache na anyankhondo a ku Samaria adalonga mbati, “Ayuda akusowa mphamvuwa akuchitanji? Ayi iwo anamanga pontho mpanda? Ayi iwo anapereka nsembe, pontho kumalisa basa pansiku ibodzi basi? Ayi iwo angakwanise kusasanya miyala yakumanga nayo kubulukira kumulu wa madongolomwa akupiswa motowa?”" 
Nehemiah4:3 Tobia adaimira penepo m'khundu mwache mbathimiza kulonga mbati, “Ayi mpanda unafuna iwo kumangawo ngwakutani? Podi na mbinzi ene ungakwirapo unakwanisa kuugwisa.”" 
Nehemiah4:4 Ine ndidapemphera kuti, “Mulungu ngavesereni kutisedegula kunachita iwoku. Chitisani kutisedegula kunachita iwoku kugwere pamsolo pawo. Iwo mbaberwe pinthu pyonsene pina iwo, pontho mbakwatwe kukhala anyaperezo kudziko yachilendo." 
Nehemiah4:5 Lekani kualekerera pyakuipa pinachita iwopi, pontho lekani duwalira pyakudawa pyawo, thangwi iwo atitikana ife, ale tikumanga mpanda.”" 
Nehemiah4:6 Ife tidathimiza kumanga mpanda ule. Chengo chache chidafika kati na kati, thangwi anthu akhali na chipapu kufuna kuphata basa." 
Nehemiah4:7 Sanibalati, Tobia na anthu a ku Arabia, Amoni na Ashidodi adava kuti basa yakumanga mpanda wa Yerusalemu ikhaenda m'tsogolo, pontho kuti mipata ikhali m'mafufu ile idafungiswa, tenepo iwo adazhangali napyo pyakwanga." 
Nehemiah4:8 Natenepo iwo onsene adasasanya pya kudza ku Yerusalemu dzasosa anthu, pontho kuadzudzumisa pa basawoyo," 
Nehemiah4:9 mbwenye ife tidapemphera kuna Mulungu wathu, pontho mbatiikha anyakulondali mosiku na masikati gopesera anyamalwathu." 
Nehemiah4:10 Anthu a ku Yuda akhali na nyimbo yawo ikhaimba iwo: “Mphamvu za anyakuphata basa zikumala! Pana madongolomwa azinji kuti tiataye! Apo ife tinakwanisa tani kumanga mafufuwo lero?” 
Nehemiah4:11 Anyamalwathu akhanyerezera kuti ife nee tinaaona, penu kudziwa pinthu pinachita iwo tayu mpakana iwo atigundikiza mbatipha, towera basayi ilekeke." 
Nehemiah4:12 Mbwenye ndzidzi uzinji Ayuda, akhakhala pakati pa anyamalwathu ale, akhadza dzaticheuza pya pinthu pikhasasanya anyamalwathu kuchita." 
Nehemiah4:13 Tenepo ndidapanga anthu kuti aphatire matalasada, madipa na mauta mbandiaikha malingana na mabanjawo kunduli kwa mafufu ponsene pale pakhali pokhonda mala." 
Nehemiah4:14 Ine ndidaona kuti anthu adaswipa mtima, natenepo ndidalonga kuna iwo na kuna akadamu awo kuti, “Lekani chita mantha na anyamalwathuwa. Kumbukani Mbuya, ule ngwamkulu pontho wakugopeka, pontho menyerani nkhondo abale anu, ananu, akazanu pontho na pya m'nyumba mwanu mwene.”" 
Nehemiah4:15 Anyamalwathu adapiva kuti ife tadziwa pinthu pidasasanya iwo kupichita kuna ife, pontho iwo adadzindikira kuti Mulungu adadzudzumisa pidasasanya iwo pile. Natenepo tonsene tidabwerera kumanga pontho mpandawu." 
Nehemiah4:16 Kubuluka ndzidzi wenewo anango a amunanga adaphata basa mwenemo, anangombo uku aphatira madipa, pyakugedera matswimo, mauta pontho kuvala pida pyankhondo gopesera anyamalwathu. Akadamu athu adaphedza monsene mwene anthu a ku Yuda" 
Nehemiah4:17 akhamanga pontho mafufu ale. Podi na ale ene akhathukula pyakumangira, akhaphata basa na mkono ubodzi uku aphatira chida kumkono unango," 
Nehemiah4:18 pontho anyakumanga onsene adamala feka matalasada m'chuno mwawo. Munthu akhaliza ngoma ule, akhali na ine pano." 
Nehemiah4:19 Ine ndidapanga anthu, mathubu awo na akadamu awo kuti, “Basayi ikuphatika pyakwanga pontho yakula pyakwanga mwakuti mpanda wakulapha watilekanisa kuna unango na mwanzache." 
Nehemiah4:20 Ngakhala imwe munava kulira kwa ngoma gumanyikanani mwakundizungulira. Mulungu wathu anatimenyera nkhondo.” 
Nehemiah4:21 Natenepo nsiku zonsene kutomera m'makalakwecha mpakana nyenyezi kubuluka na mosiku, anango a amunanga akhaphata basa mwenemo anangombowo akhaonera uku aphatira madipawo." 
Nehemiah4:22 Ndzidzi wenewu ndidapanga amuna akhayang'anira ale kuti iwo pabodzi pene na anyakuphedzera onsene akhale mu Yerusalemu na mosiku, towera ife tiyang'anire mzinda na mosiku mbatiphata basa na masikati." 
Nehemiah4:23 Podi na mosiku ene ine sidadule nguwo zanga tayu, nee anzanga, anyabasa penu anyakuyang'anira, kugopesera anyamalwa. Tenepo tonsene tidaphatira pida m'manja mwathu." 
Nehemiah5:1 Pidagwanda ndzidzi ene anthu azinji, amuna na akazi ene, adatoma kudungunya thangwi ya Ayuda anzawo." 
Nehemiah5:2 Anango adalonga mbati, “Ife tina mabanja akulu-akulu. Tenepo tinafuna mapira towera tikhale na moyo.”" 
Nehemiah5:3 Anango adalonga mbati, “Ife tikuchitisa pinyolo mindathu, mindathu yamfesa na nyumba zathu zene kuti tigumane mapira akukwana towera tileke kufa na njala.”" 
Nehemiah5:4 Anangombo akhalonga mbati, “Ife tikufiyali kobiri towera tikhomere msonkho mindathu na minda yamfesa kuna mfumu." 
Nehemiah5:5 Ife ndife a dzinza ibodzi ene na Ayuda anzathuwa. Ayi anathu si sasawa na anawo tayu? Ife tikukhakhamizwa kupereka anathu kuti akhale mabitchu mwakuti anathu anango achikazi aguliswa kale ninga mabitchu. Ife nkhabe pakuphata tayu, thangwi mindathu na minda yamfesa yamala pokoserwa.”" 
Nehemiah5:6 Pidava ine kudungunya kwawo ndidazhangali pyakwanga," 
Nehemiah5:7 mbandinyerezera kuchitapo pinthu. Ine ndidalongera mathubu na akadamu kuti, “Imwe mukupondereza abale anu.” Ine ndidagumanyisa mgumano wa anthu onsene kuti ndimalise pinthu penepi," 
Nehemiah5:8 mbandilonga kuti, “Ninga mwapikwanisira ife, taombola Ayuda anzathu, ale adaguliswa ninga mabitchu a anthu achilendo. Apo chinchino mukukhakhamiza abale anu kupigulisa ninga mabitchu kuna imwe Ayuda anzawo!” Akadamu ale adamatama mbasowa chakulonga." 
Nehemiah5:9 Tenepo ine ndidalonga kuti, “Pinachita imwepi mphyakuipa! Imwe mwathema kuvera Mulungu mbamuchita pinthu pyakulungama. Penepo imwe nee mbamudachitisa anyamalwathu, anthu okhonda khala Ayuda, kutiselusa tayu." 
Nehemiah5:10 Ine, abale anga na anyabasanga adafiyalisambo anthu kobiri na mapira, tenepo mbatilekeni kuchitisa katapira." 
Nehemiah5:11 Bwezerani mindawo, mindawo yamfesa na yaolivi, pontho misawo kabodzi kene. Apagalini katapira adatambira imwe kubulukira pa mapira, kobiri, vinyu, na mafuta aolivi.”" 
Nehemiah5:12 Akadamu adatawira mbati, “Ife tinachita ninga munalongera imwe. Ife tinati tibwezere pinthu pidakwata ife. Ife nkhabeve funa kuti atipase chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu.” Ine ndidachemeresa anyansembe mbandichitisa akadamu ale kudumbira pamaso pawo kuti anakoya pikhadapangana ife pile." 
Nehemiah5:13 Tenepo ine ndidadula mthimbalimba ukhadamanga ine m'chuno mwanga ule mbandiugubudza pontho mbandilonga kuti, “Umu ndi mule munafuna Mulungu dzagubudzira munthu onsene wa imwe anaswa pinthu pyapangana ife pile.” Ine ndidalonga kuti, “Mulungu anakupokoserani misanu, pontho na pinthu pyonsene pina imwe mbakusiyani chimanja-manja.” Munthu onsene ule akhali penepo adalonga mbati, “Ameni, pontho MBUYA mbakuzwe.” Akadamu adakoya pidadumbira iwo pile." 
Nehemiah5:14 Ndzidzi onsene wa pyaka khumi na piwiri pikhali ine mkulu wa boma wa dziko ya Yuda, kubulukira chaka chamakumawiri cha utongi wa Aritaserisese mpakana chaka chache chamakumatatu na chiwiri, nee abale anga penu ine tidadya tayu pyakudya pidathema ine kutambira ninga mkulu wa boma." 
Nehemiah5:15 Mbwenye mkulu wa boma onsene, ule akhali pampando ine mbindidzati pitapo, adanensa anthu mbaapanga kuti ampase kobiri zasiliva makumanayi nsiku na nsiku padzulu pa pyakudya na vinyu. Podi na anyabasawo ene adaponderezambo anthu. Kwache ine sidapichite ninga mukhachitira iwo tayu, thangwi ine ndikhali munthu wakugopa Mulungu." 
Nehemiah5:16 Ine ndidaikha mtimanga onsene pabasa yakumanga pontho mafufu. Amunanga onsene ndidaagumanyisa pabodzi kuphata basa. Ine sidagule mbuto ninga yanga ene tayu. 
Nehemiah5:17 Ndzidzi uzinji ene ine ndikhadyesa Ayuda dzana na makumashanu pabodzi pene na akadamu awo padzulu pa onsene akhadza kuna ine kubulukira kumadziko akuzungulira ale. 
Nehemiah5:18 Nsiku na nsiku ine ndikhasasanyirwa ng'ombe imuna, mabira adidiletu atanthatu na nkhuku zizinji, pontho kumala kwa nsiku khumi zonsene ine ndikhapereka vinyu wakuinjipa wa mtundu onsene. Kwache ine sidapemphe tayu pinthu pidathema mkulu wa boma kutambira, thangwi ndikhapidziwa kuti penepi pidanensa anthu pyakwanga pene." 
Nehemiah5:19 Imwe Mulungu wanga, ndikomereni mtima mbamukumbuke pinthu pyonsene pyachitira ine anthuwa." 
Nehemiah6:1 Sanibalati, Tobia, Geshemu, na anyamalwathu onsene adapiva kuti tikhadamalisa basa yakumanga mpanda, pontho pakhali nkhabe panango pakusalira tayu, podi kwene kuti tikhadadzati kuikha misuwo m'mbuto mwache tayu." 
Nehemiah6:2 Natenepo Sanibalati na Geshemu adatuma anyamphangwa kuna ine kundipanga kuti ndikagumanikane nawo pamudzi ubodzi paphedi ya Ono. Penepa iwo akhafuna kandichita pyakuipa. 
Nehemiah6:3 Ine ndidatuma anyamphangwa kalonga kuna iwo kuti, “Ine ndikuphata basa yakufunika, tenepo ine sinakwanisa kwendako tayu. Ine nkhabe tawira kuti basa iimire thangwi ya kudza dzaonana namwe tayu.”" 
Nehemiah6:4 Iwo adanditumira pontho mphangwa ninga zakutoma zile kanayi, kwache ndzidzi onsene ine ndikhatawira chibodzi-bodzi." 
Nehemiah6:5 Tenepo Sanibalati adatuma mbodzi wa anyabasache na mphangwa kuna ine kachishanu. Ndzidzi wenewu adadza na kalata yakukhonda myatira. 
Nehemiah6:6 Kalatayo idalembwa tenepa: “Geshemu andipanga kuti mbiri ikuveka pakati pa atsanthembathu kuti iwe na Ayuda munafuna pyakupandukira, tenepo ndi thangwi yache imwe mukumanga pontho mpanda. Iye akulonga pontho kuti iwepo ukusasanya pyakupiikha wekha ene mfumu," 
Nehemiah6:7 pontho kuti wasankhula maprofeti kulalika mu Yerusalemu kuti, ‘Mu Yuda muna mfumu!’ Mfumu wa ku Peresia anati apive penepi, natenepo idza kuti tikhalirane pansi pa pinthu penepi.”" 
Nehemiah6:8 Ine ndidamtawira kuti, “Nkhabe chakuona na chibodzi chene papinthu pinalonga imwepi. Pinalonga imwepi mphyamumsolo.”" 
Nehemiah6:9 Pyonsene pikhachita iwo nkhufuna kuyesa kutithuswa kunyerezera kuti, “Magogodo awo anati awonzoke kuchimwana kuphata basa, tenepo basayo hinamaliswa tayu.” Mbwenye ine ndidapemphera kuti, “Mulungu, chinchino ene wangisani nkhongono zathu.”" 
Nehemiah6:10 Nsiku inango ndidenda kunyumba kwa Shemaia mwana Delaia mdzukuluache Mehetabele, ule adapifungira m'nyumba mwache. Shemaia adalonga mbati, “Tende tikagumanikane m'Nyumba ya Mulungu m'Mbuto Yakuchena mbatifunga misuwo thangwi anthu akudza dzakupha; mosiku uno pano anati adze dzakupha.”" 
Nehemiah6:11 Mbwenye ndidalonga kuti, “Ayi munthu wache ndine athema kuthawa? Penu athawire m'Nyumba ya Mulungu kupulumusa moyo wache? Ine sinaendako tayu!”" 
Nehemiah6:12 Ine ndidadzindikira kuti Mulungu hadamtume tayu, mbwenye iye adandilongera mphangwa zakunama zauprofeti, thangwi adadyekerwa na Tobia, na Sanibalati." 
Nehemiah6:13 Iwo adadyekera kuna iye, towera andithuswe kuti ndidawe, towera aipise mbiri yanga mbandilulupisa." 
Nehemiah6:14 Ine ndidapemphera kuti, “Mulungu, kumbukani pinthu pyachita Tobia na Sanibalati mbamuatchunyuse. Kumbukani mkazi ule Noadia na maprofeti anango onsene akhandithuswa ale.”" 
Nehemiah6:15 Pidagwanda nsiku makumashanu na ziwiri zakuphata basa, mpanda onsene udamala kumangwa pansiku yamakumawiri na chishanu ya mwezi wa Eluli." 
Nehemiah6:16 Pidava anyamalwathu penepi, madzinza onsene akuzungulira adachita mantha mbanyala, thangwi iwo adadzindikira kuti basa yeneyi idaphatika na chiphedzo cha Mulungu wathu." 
Nehemiah6:17 Pandzidzi wenewu akadamu a Chiyuda akhalemberana makalata na Tobia. 
Nehemiah6:18 Anthu azinji mu Yuda akhali kunduli kwache, thangwi ya tebzalache wa Chiyuda Shekania mwana Ara. Kuthimiza penepo mwanache Yehohanani adasemba mwana Meshulamu mwana Berekia." 
Nehemiah6:19 Anthu akhalonga pamaso panga pinthu pyadidi pidachita Tobia mbampanga pyonsene pikhalonga ine, pontho iye akhathimiza kundilembera makalata kuyesa kundithuswa." 
Nehemiah7:1 Tenepo mpanda udamala mangwa pontho na misuwo ene idamala ikhwa m'mbuto mwache. Anyakulondali Nyumba ya Mulungu, anyakuimba nyimbo na Alevi anango, onsene adamala paswa mabasawo." 
Nehemiah7:2 Ndidasankhula amuna awiri kukhala akulu a mumzinda wa Yerusalemu; mbaleanga Hanani na Hanania, ule akhali mkadamu wa mbuto yakutchingwa na mpanda. Hanania akhali munthu wakunyindirika pontho akhali munthu wakugopa Mulungu, kupiringana amuna anango." 
Nehemiah7:3 Ine ndidalonga kuna iwo kuti, “Misuwo ya Yerusalemu hidatheme kufungulwa tayu mpakana dzuwa yavuka. Anyakulondali ali pabuswa ale mbadzati kotoka, apangeni kuti afunge misuwo mbaipiringidza. Pontho sankhulani anyakulondali kubulukira pakati pa anthu akukhala mu Yerusalemu na kuapasa basa anango a iwo pambuto zawo za basa, anangombo chifupi na m'misa mwawo.”" 
Nehemiah7:4 Yerusalemu ukhali mzinda ukulu pontho mukhali nkhabe anthu azinji ene. Nyumba zizinji zikhali zidzati mangwa pontho tayu. 
Nehemiah7:5 Tenepo Mulungu wanga andipasa mtima wakufuna kugumanyisa akadamu, mathubu na anthu onsene kuti ndichite kalembera wa mabanjawo. Ndidagumana nyandandanda wa anthu akhali akutoma kubwerera kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo ale. Pidagumana ine pyalembwapyo mphipi:" 
Nehemiah7:6 Anthu azinji, akhadakwatwa unyaperezo na Mfumu Nebukadinezara ale, adabuluka kudziko ya Babiloni mbabwerera ku Yerusalemu na Yuda, kada munthu mbaenda kumzinda kwache kwene. Mabanjawo adakhala kudziko ya unyaperezo ku Babiloni kutomera ndzidzi udaakwata Mfumu Nebukadinezara ninga anyaperezo." 
Nehemiah7:7 Akadamu awo akhali: Zerubabele, Yoswa, Nehemia, Azaria, Raamia, Nahamani, Moredekai, Bilishani, Misipereti, Bigivai, Nehumu na Baana. Nyandandanda wa amuna a ku Israele:" 
Nehemiah7:8 pidzukulu pya Paroshi; pikwi piwiri na dzana ibodzi na makumanomwe na piwiri 
Nehemiah7:9 pidzukulu pya Shefatia; madzana matatu na makumanomwe na awiri 
Nehemiah7:10 pidzukulu pya Ara; madzana matanthatu na makumashanu na awiri 
Nehemiah7:11 pidzukulu pya Pahati-Moabu (pidzukulu pya Yeshua na Yoabu); pikwi piwiri na madzana masere na khumi na asere 
Nehemiah7:12 pidzukulu pya Elamu; chikwi na madzana mawiri na makumashanu na anayi 
Nehemiah7:13 pidzukulu pya Zatu; madzana masere na makumanayi na ashanu 
Nehemiah7:14 pidzukulu pya Zakai; madzana manomwe na makumatanthatu 
Nehemiah7:15 pidzukulu pya Binui; madzana matanthatu na makumanayi na asere 
Nehemiah7:16 pidzukulu pya Bebai; madzana matanthatu na makumawiri na asere 
Nehemiah7:17 pidzukulu pya Azigadi; pikwi piwiri na madzana matatu na makumawiri na awiri 
Nehemiah7:18 pidzukulu pya Adonikamu; madzana matanthatu na makumatanthatu na anomwe 
Nehemiah7:19 pidzukulu pya Bigivai; pikwi piwiri na makumatanthatu na anomwe 
Nehemiah7:20 pidzukulu pya Adini; madzana matanthatu na makumashanu na ashanu 
Nehemiah7:21 pidzukulu pya Ateri (wakuchemerwa pontho Hezekia) makumafemba na asere 
Nehemiah7:22 pidzukulu pya Hashumu; madzana matatu na makumawiri na asere 
Nehemiah7:23 pidzukulu pya Bezai; madzana matatu na makumawiri na anayi 
Nehemiah7:24 pidzukulu pya Harifi; dzana ibodzi na khumi na awiri 
Nehemiah7:25 pidzukulu pya Gibeoni; makumafemba na ashanu. Anthu ale pidzukulu pyawo pikhadakhala muluwani ali m'tchindewa adabwerambo kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo: 
Nehemiah7:26 Amuna a ku Betelehemu na Netofa; dzana na makumasere na asere 
Nehemiah7:27 amuna a ku Anatoti; dzana ibodzi na makumawiri na asere 
Nehemiah7:28 amuna a ku Beti-Azimaveti; makumanayi na awiri 
Nehemiah7:29 amuna a ku Kiriati-Yearimu, Kefira na Beeroti; madzana manomwe na makumanayi na atatu" 
Nehemiah7:30 amuna a ku Rama na Geba; madzana matanthatu na makumawiri na mbodzi 
Nehemiah7:31 amuna a ku Mikimashi; dzana na makumawiri na awiri 
Nehemiah7:32 amuna a ku Betele na Ai; dzana ibodzi na makumawiri na atatu 
Nehemiah7:33 amuna a ku Nebo unango; makumashanu na awiri 
Nehemiah7:34 amuna a ku Elamu unango; chikwi na madzana mawiri na makumashanu na anayi 
Nehemiah7:35 amuna a ku Harimu; madzana matatu na makumawiri 
Nehemiah7:36 amuna a ku Yeriko; madzana matatu na makumanayi na ashanu 
Nehemiah7:37 amuna a ku Lodi, Hadidi na Ono; madzana manomwe na makumawiri na mbodzi" 
Nehemiah7:38 amuna a ku Sena; pikwi pitatu na madzana mafemba na makumatatu. 
Nehemiah7:39 Uwu ndi nyandandanda wa anyansembe ale adabwerambo kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo: Pidzukulu pya Yedaia, wakudziwika pontho na dzina yakuti Yeshua; madzana mafemba na makumanomwe na atatu" 
Nehemiah7:40 pidzukulu pya Imeri; chikwi chibodzi na makumashanu na awiri 
Nehemiah7:41 pidzukulu pya Pashuri; chikwi na madzana mawiri na makumanayi na anomwe 
Nehemiah7:42 pidzukulu pya Harimu; chikwi chibodzi na khumi na anomwe. 
Nehemiah7:43 Alevi ale adabwerambo kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo: Pidzukulu pya Yeshua na Kadimiele (pidzukulu pya Hodavia); makumanomwe na anayi 
Nehemiah7:44 Anyakuimba nyimbo Nyumba ya Mulungu: Pidzukulu pya Asafu; dzana na makumanayi na asere 
Nehemiah7:45 Anyakulondali msuwo a Nyumba ya Mulungu: Pidzukulu pya Shalumu, Ateri, Talimoni, Akubu, Hatita, na Shobai; dzana ibodzi na makumatatu na asere." 
Nehemiah7:46 Anyakuphata basa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu ale adabwerambo kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo: Pidzukulu pya Ziha, Hasufa, Tabaoti" 
Nehemiah7:47 Kerosi, Sia na Padoni" 
Nehemiah7:48 Lebana, Hagaba, Shalimai," 
Nehemiah7:49 Hanani, Gidele, Gahari," 
Nehemiah7:50 Reaia, Rezini, Nekoda," 
Nehemiah7:51 Gazamu, Uza, Pasea," 
Nehemiah7:52 Besai, Meunimu, Nefushesimu," 
Nehemiah7:53 Bakibuki, Hakufa, Harihuri," 
Nehemiah7:54 Baziluti, Mehida, Harisha," 
Nehemiah7:55 Barikosi, Sisera, Tema," 
Nehemiah7:56 Nezia, na Hatifa." 
Nehemiah7:57 Pidzukulu pya anyabasa a Solomoni pile pidabwerambo kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo: Pidzukulu pya Sotai, Sofereti, Perida," 
Nehemiah7:58 Yaala, Darikoni, Gidele" 
Nehemiah7:59 Shefatia, Hatili, Pokereti-Hazebaimu na Amoni." 
Nehemiah7:60 Konta yonsene ya pidzukulu pya anyakuphata basa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu na pidzukulu pya anyabasa a Solomoni, ale akhadabwerera kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo, ikhali madzana matatu na makumafemba na awiri." 
Nehemiah7:61 Anthu ali m'tchindewa adabulukira kumaluwani a Telemela, Teleharisha, Kerubi, Adoni na Imeri; kwache iwo hadakwanise kupitsikimizira tayu kuti iwo akhali pidzukulu pya Israele:" 
Nehemiah7:62 pidzukulu pya Delaia, Tobia na Nekoda; madzana matanthatu na makumanayi na awiri." 
Nehemiah7:63 Tenepo kubulukira pakati pa anyansembe: Pidzukulu pya Hobaia, Hakozi na Barizilai, adasemba mwana Barizilai wa ku Gileadi mbachemerwa na dzina yonthoyo ule." 
Nehemiah7:64 Anthu enewa adasakanyula-sakanyula pale padalembwa pya mabanjawo, kwache hadakwanise kupigumane tayu, tenepo iwo adakhethiwa pakati pa anyansembe, thangwi akhayeswa ninga anthu okhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Nehemiah7:65 Mkulu wa boma ya Chiyuda adaatonga kuti aleke kudya na pang'ono pene pyakudya pyakupambulirwa kuna Mulungu mpakana pakhale nyansembe wakutumikira pakuphatisa basa Urimu na Tumimu. 
Nehemiah7:66 Konta yonsene ya anthu akhadabwerera kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo ale, idakwana pikwi makumanayi na piwiri na madzana matatu na makumatanthatu" 
Nehemiah7:67 kuthimizirapo anyabasa achimuna na achikazi pikwi pinomwe na madzana matatu na makumatatu na anomwe; iwo akhali pontho na anyakuimba nyimbo achimuna na achikazi ene madzana mawiri. 
Nehemiah7:68 Iwo akhali na akavalo madzana manomwe na makumatatu na atanthatu, nyulu madzana mawiri na makumanayi na zishanu;" 
Nehemiah7:69 ngamila madzana manayi na makumatatu na zishanu, pontho na mabulu pikwi pitanthatu na madzana manomwe na makumawiri." 
Nehemiah7:70 Anthu azinji adapereka pinthu kuti piphatiswe basa pa basayo. Mkulu wa boma adapereka: golidi wakulemera makilogramu asere ndilo makumashanu nguwo za unyansembe madzana mashanu na makumatatu. Anango mwa akadamu a m'mabanja adapereka: golidi wakulemera makilogramu dzana ibodzi na makumatanthatu na asere siliva wakulemera makilogramu chikwi chibodzi na madzana mawiri na makumashanu. Anthu anango onsene adaperekambo: golidi wakulemera makilogramu dzana ibodzi na makumatanthatu na asere siliva wakulemera makilogramu dzana ibodzi na makumanayi mikhanjo ya unyansembe makumatanthatu na minomwe. 
Nehemiah7:71  
Nehemiah7:72  
Nehemiah7:73 Anyansembe, Alevi, anyakulondali misuwo, anyakuimba nyimbo, na anyakuphata basa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, pabodzi pene na Aisraele anango onsene adakhazikika m'maluwani mwawo mwene. Pamwezi wachinomwe, pidamala Aisraele kukhazikika kada munthu muluwani mwache." 
Nehemiah8:1 Anthu onsene adagumanyikana pabodzi pene pachintalo chifupi na Msuwo wa Madzi. Iwo adavunza Ezara nyakudziwisa mwambo ule kuti abuluse bukhu ya mwambo wa Mose, udatonga MBUYA kuti Aisraele auteweze ule." 
Nehemiah8:2 Tenepo pansiku yakutoma ya mwezi wachinomwe, Ezara nyansembe adadza na bukhu ya mwambo pamaso pa anthu onsene akhadagumanyikana ale, pale padagumanyikana amuna, akazi, na ana ale akhali na nzeru zakuvesa pinthu." 
Nehemiah8:3 Iye adawerenga mwambowo mwakugaluza fala kutomera makalakwecha kufikirana masikati, mwenemo iye mbali pachintalo chifupi na Msuwo wa Madzi pamaso pa amuna, akazi na ana ale akhali na nzeru zakuvesa pinthu. Iwo onsene adaikha makutu awo kuvesera kuwerengwa kwa bukhu ya mwambo." 
Nehemiah8:4 Ezara adaimira pachiguwa chathabwa, chile chidasasanyirwa basa yeneyo. Kumadyo kwache kudaimira Matitia, Shema, Anaia, Uria, Hilikia na Maaseia. Kumabzere kwache kudaimira: Pedaia na Mishaele, Malikia, Hashumu, Hashibadana, Zekaria na Meshulamu." 
Nehemiah8:5 Ezara adafungula bukhu pamaso pa anthu onsene. Iwo adakwanisa kumuona thangwi iye adaimira padzulu. Pikhaifungula iye anthu onsene adaimira. 
Nehemiah8:6 Ezara adakuza MBUYA Mulungu wamkulu, tenepo anthu adakwiza manjawo m'dzulu mbatawira mbati, “Ameni! Ameni!” Penepo iwo adalamba kupembedza MBUYA." 
Nehemiah8:7 Yeshua, Bani, Sherebia, Yamini, Akubu, Shabetai, Hodia, Maaseia, Kelita, Azaria, Yozabadi, Hanani na Pelaia Alevi ale, adaphedza anthu ale akhadaimira m'mbuto zawo kuuvesa mwadidi." 
Nehemiah8:8 Iwo adawerenga bukhu ya mwambo wa Mulungu mwakuveka mbaithumbusula, towera anthu akwanise kuvesa mwadidi pikhawerengwapyo." 
Nehemiah8:9 Pidava anthu pinthu pikhafuna mwambo kuna iwo adatoma kulira. Tenepo Nehemia ule akhali mkulu wa boma, Ezara nyansembe pontho nyakudziwisa mwambo na Alevi, ale akhafunzisa mwambowo, adapanga anthu onsene ale mbati, “Lero ndi nsiku yakupambulika kuna MBUYA Mulungu wanu, natenepo imwe nee mwathema kusintili penu kulira tayu." 
Nehemiah8:10 Chinchino ndokoni m'misa mwanu mukachite phwando. Gawanani pyakudya pyanu pontho vinyu wanu na ale ana pyakuchepa. Lero ndi nsiku yakupambulika kuna Mbuya, tenepo lekani tsukwala. Kukomerwa kwakupasani MBUYA kunakupasani mphamvu.”" 
Nehemiah8:11 Alevi adamatamisa anthu ale mbaapanga mbati, “Matamani, pontho lekani tsukwala thangwi lero ndi nsiku yakupambulika.”" 
Nehemiah8:12 Tenepo anthu adenda m'misa mwawo. Iwo adadya na kumwa mwakukomerwa mbagawana pinthu pikhali na iwo pile unango na mwanzache, thangwi iwo adavesa pikhadawerengwa kuna iwo pile." 
Nehemiah8:13 Mangwana mwache akadamu a mabanja pabodzi pene na anyansembe na Alevi adagumanyikana pamaso pa Ezara kuti iwo afunze pifunziso pya mwambo. 
Nehemiah8:14 Iwo adagumana kuti mwambo udapereka MBUYA kudzera muna Mose ukhatonga anthu a ku Israele kukhala m'makumbi ndzidzi wa Phwando ya Misasa. 
Nehemiah8:15 Tenepo iwo adaagwinya onsenewo ku Yerusalemu na kumizinda, pontho maluwani anango mbaapanga mbati, “Ndokoni kumapiri mukatchole matsamvu apaina, aolivi, akesha, na amdikhwa na miti inango yakuvata kuti mumange makumbi ninga mwalemberwa ipyo m'mwambo.”" 
Nehemiah8:16 Tenepo anthu adatchola matsamvu mbamanga makumbi pansoyi zakuthasama za nyumba zawo, m'mazunde mwawo, pa chintalo cha Nyumba ya Mulungu, na chintalo chifupi na Msuwo wa Madzi pontho na Msuwo wa Eferemu." 
Nehemiah8:17 Anthu onsene ale akhadadza kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo, adamanga makumbi awo mbakhalamo. Wenewu ukhali ndzidzi wakutoma kuchitika pinthu penepi kubulukira ndzidzi wa Yoswa mwana Nuni, tenepo munthu onsene adasekera na kukomerwa." 
Nehemiah8:18 Kubulukira nsiku yakutoma ya phwando mpakana nsiku yakumalisa iwo akhawerenga khundu ibodzi ya mwambo wa MBUYA nsiku na nsiku. Iwo adasekera phwando nsiku zinomwe, tenepo pansiku yachisere padachitika mwambo wakufunga nawo phwandoyo ninga mudapitongera mwambo." 
Nehemiah9:1 Pansiku yamakumawiri na chinayi ya mwezi wache onthowo Aisraele adagumanyikana pabodzi kupimana kudya, towera kuonesa kutsukwala kwawo thangwi ya pyakudawa pyawo. Iwo akhadapipambula kale okha ene kubuluka kuna alendo onsene. Iwo adavala masakha mbapiwaza fumbi mumsolo mwawo kuonesa kutsukwala. Iwo adaimira mbatoma kubweka pyakudawa pidachita iwo na makolo awo ene." 
Nehemiah9:2  
Nehemiah9:3 Mwambo wa MBUYA Mulungu wawo udawerengwa kuna iwo maora matatu, pontho maora anango matatu iwo adabweka pyakudawa mbapembedza MBUYA Mulungu wawo." 
Nehemiah9:4 Yeshua, Bani, Kadimiele, Shebania, Buni, Sherebia, Bani, na Kenani Alevi ale, adaimira pansikada za chiguwa chile. Iwo adapemphera kuna MBUYA Mulungu wawo mwakugaluza fala." 
Nehemiah9:5 Alevi awa adachemera anthu kuti apembedze: Yeshua, Kadimiele Sherebia, Bani, Hashabineia, Hodia, Shebania, na Petahia. Iwo adalonga mbati, “Imirani mbamupembedze MBUYA Mulungu wanu! Mkuzeni kwenda na kwenda! Munthu onsene mbakuze dzinache yademelero, podi kwene kuti munthu nkhabe kwanisa kumkuza ninga mwathemera iye tayu.”" 
Nehemiah9:6 Tenepo Aisraele adapemphera tenepa: “MBUYA imwe ene basi ndimwe MBUYA. Kudzulu na nyenyezi zakuthambo mwapisasanya ndimwe. Ndimwe mudasasanya nthunda, bara na pyonsene pili mwenemo. Pyonsenepyo imwe mudapipasa moyo. Gulu yonsene ya kudzulu imbakulambirani kukupembedzani." 
Nehemiah9:7 MBUYA Mulungu, imwe mudasankhula Abramu, mbamumtsogolera kubuluka mu Uri m'dziko ya Babiloni, pontho mudamtchandula dzinache Abrahamu." 
Nehemiah9:8 “Imwe mudamgumana kuti akhali munthu wakukhulupirika kuna imwe, mbamuchita naye chiverano. Imwe mudadumbira kumpasa dziko ya Akanani, dziko ya Ahiti, ya Aamori, dziko ya Aperizi, Ayebusi, na Agirigashi kukhala dziko ile ikhafuna kukhalamo pidzukulu pyache. Imwe mudachita pinthu pidadumbira imwe thangwi imwe ndimwe wakukhulupirika." 
Nehemiah9:9 Imwe mudaona mule mudasanyikira makolo athu kudziko ya Iguputo, Imwe mudava kuchemera kwawo kuti muaphedze pa Nyanza Yakufira." 
Nehemiah9:10 Imwe mudachita pyakudodomesa kuna mfumu, kuna mathubu ache pontho na kuna anthu a dziko yache, thangwi imwe mudadziwa kupondereza anthu anu kukhachita iwo. Tenepo imwe mudapichitisa mwekha ene kuveka ninga muna ipyo lero." 
Nehemiah9:11 Panyanza imwe mudasasanyira njira anthu anu mbamuawambusa na pakuuma, Anyakuathamangisa adabira m'madzi akuzwika ninga mwala wakubira m'mabimbi akuzhangali." 
Nehemiah9:12 Na masikati imwe mudaatsogolera na makole, pontho na mosiku mudaamwinikira njirawo na moto." 
Nehemiah9:13 Imwe mudatchitha paphiri ya Sinai kubulukira kudzulu. Imwe mudalonga kuna anthu anu mbamuapasa matongero adidi pontho pifunziso pyakuveka. 
Nehemiah9:14 Imwe mudaapanga kukoya Nsiku yanu Yakupuma, pontho kudzera muna nyabasanu Mose, imwe mudaafunzisa matongero anu." 
Nehemiah9:15 “Ndzidzi udava iwo njala imwe mudaapasa pyakudya kubulukira kudzulu, pontho mudaapasa madzi kubulukira m'mwala ndzidzi udava iwo nyota. Imwe mudaapanga kuti apokosere dziko, idadumbira imwe kuna iwo ile." 
Nehemiah9:16 Mbwenye makolo athu adadungudza na kuumisa mtima, mbakhonda kuvera matongero anu." 
Nehemiah9:17 Iwo adakhonda kuvera; iwo adaduwalira pinthu pyonsene pidaachitira imwe. Iwo adaduwalira pyakudodomesa pikhadaachitira imwe. Na kulunkuma kwawo iwo adasankhula mkadamu kuti abwerere naye kudziko ya ubitchu ku Iguputo. Kwache imwe ndimwe Mulungu wakulekerera pyakudawa. Imwe ndimwe nyakukoma mtima, nyakutifuna kokhonda mala pontho nyakusowa chitswu. Imwe ndimwe nyansisi pikulu pontho imwe nee mwaasiya okha tayu." 
Nehemiah9:18 Iwo adasasanya mfanikizo wa mwanamphulu mbalonga kuti yeneyi ikhali milungu idaabulusa ku Iguputo ile. Penepa iwo adakusholani pikulu pene MBUYA. 
Nehemiah9:19 Kwache imwe nee mudaasiye okha tayu m'thando yatchetcha, thangwi imwe muna nsisi pikulu. Imwe nee mudaabulusire tayu makole penu moto, pinthu pikhaaonesa njira na mosiku pontho na masikati pile." 
Nehemiah9:20 Na udidi wanu, imwe mudaapangiza pyakuti achite. Imwe mudaadyesa mana, mbamuapasa madzi kuti amwe." 
Nehemiah9:21 Pyaka makumanayi m'thando yatchetcha imwe mudaapasa pyonsene pikhasowa iwo. Nguwo zawo nee zidasakale tayu, pontho manyalo awo hadabzimbe tayu." 
Nehemiah9:22 “Imwe mudaachitisa kukunda madziko na mafumu, madziko adachita na iwo madire ale. Iwo adakunda dziko ya Heshiboni kukhatonga Sihoni kule, pontho na dziko ya Bashani kukhatonga Ogi kule." 
Nehemiah9:23 Imwe mudaapasa ana azinji ninga nyenyezi za kuthambo, mbamuatawirisa kukunda na kukhala m'dziko idadumbira imwe kuna makolo awo ile." 
Nehemiah9:24 Iwo adapokosera dziko ya Akanani. Imwe mudakunda anthu a mwenemo pamaso pawo. Imwe mudaapasa anthu anu mphamvu zakuchita nazo pinthu pyakuakomera kuna anthu pontho na mafumu a ku Kanani. 
Nehemiah9:25 Anthu anu adakunda mizinda yakutchingwa na mpanda, madziko akukhala na mataka akubalisa pinthu, nyumba zakudzala na mfuma, michera yakukumbwa kale, miti yaolivi, miti ya nsapo, na minda yamfesa. Iwo adadya pyonsene ninga mukhafunira iwo mbakula manungo; iwo adakomerwa na pinthu pyonsene pyadidi pidaapasa imwe pile." 
Nehemiah9:26 “Mbwenye anthu anu adakupandukirani mbakhonda kukuverani. Iwo adapasa nkhodolo mwambo wanu. Iwo adapha maprofeti anu akhaacheuza pya kubwerera kuna imwe ale. Iwo adakusholani kazinji kene. 
Nehemiah9:27 Natenepo imwe mudaapereka m'manja mwa anyamalwawo, adaapondereza ale. Na nyatwa zawo zene iwo adakuchemerani kuti muaphedze. Tenepo imwe mudaava kubulukira kudzulu. Na thangwi ya nsisi zanu zikulu, imwe mudaapasa dombo, ale adaaombola m'manja mwa anyamalwawo." 
Nehemiah9:28 Sindzidzi mtendere nkhubwerera, iwo adadawa pontho. Imwembo mudaaponya m'manja mwa anyamalwawo kuti aatonge. Kwache pidaleka iwo pyakudawa pyawo mbakupemphani kuti muapulumuse, imwe mudaava kubulukira kudzulu, pontho ndzidzi uzinji ene mudaapulumusa thangwi ya nsisi zanu zikulu." 
Nehemiah9:29 Imwe mudaacheuza kuti avere pifunziso pyanu, mbwenye iwo na kulunkuma kwawo adakhonda matongero anu, podi kwene kuti kukoya mwambo wanu ndi njira ibodzi ene basi yakukhala na moyo. Anthu akunensa pontho akuuma mtimawa adakhonda kuvera matongero anu." 
Nehemiah9:30 Pyaka pizinji pene imwe mudapirira nawo. Na Mzimu wanu, imwe mudaacheuza kudzera muna maprofeti, kwache iwo hadapiikhe konta tayu. Natenepo imwe mudaaleka pyanu kuti akundwe na madzinza anango." 
Nehemiah9:31 Mbwenye na thangwi ya nsisi zanu zikulu imwe, nee mudaakhonde penu kuavunga tayu. Imwe ndimwe nyakukoma mtima pontho nyansisi." 
Nehemiah9:32 “Mulungu, Mulungu wathu ndimwe wamkulu pyakwanga! Ndimwe nyakugopeka pontho nyamphamvu zikulu! Imwe mwakoya chiverano chanu mbamutionesa kutifuna kwanu kokhonda mala. Kubulukira pa ndzidzi udatipondereza mafumu a ku Asiria podi na lero ene ife taona nyatwa zikulu! Mafumu athu, akadamu athu, anyansembe athu, maprofeti athu, makolo athu na anthu athu onsene taona nyatwa pikulu pene. Kumbukani pyonsene pyachita ife!" 
Nehemiah9:33 Imwe mwachita pyadidi kutitchunyusa. Imwe ndimwe wakukhulupirika podi kwene kuti ife tadawa. 
Nehemiah9:34 Makolo athu, mafumu athu na anyansembe anthu, nee takoya mwambo wanu tayu. Iwo hadavere matongero anu pontho na kucheuza kukhachita imwe kule tayu" 
Nehemiah9:35 Na udidi wanu imwe mudapasa anthu anu ufumu, kwache pikhali iwo m'dziko ikulu pontho ya mataka akubalisa pinthu idaapasa imwe ile, iwo hadakutumikireni tayu, pontho hadaleke pyakudawa pyawo tayu." 
Nehemiah9:36 Apo lero ndife mabitchu m'dziko idapasa imwe makolo athu ile, towera iwo akomerwe na nsapo zache pontho pinthu pyache pinango pyadidi pile." 
Nehemiah9:37 Pinthu pimbavuna ife pile pimbaenda kuna mafumu adaikha imwe ale, kuti tikhale pansi pa utongi awo, thangwi ife tadawa. Iwo adachita pyonsene pene pinafuna iwo kuna manungo athu na kuna ng'ombe zathu zene. Ife tasanyika pikulu pene.”" 
Nehemiah9:38 Na thangwi ya pyonsene pidachitika pile, ife anthu a ku Israele tikuchita chiverano chokhonda fudzika pakuchita kulemba, pontho akadamu athu, Alevi athu, na anyansembe athu, akuikha pidindo pyawo penepo." 
Nehemiah10:1 Nyakutoma kuikha chidindo akhali mkulu wa boma Nehemia mwana Hakalia. Kubuluka penepo Zedekia nyansembe, pontho na anango ali m'tchindemu adaikhambo pidindo pyawo." 
Nehemiah10:2 Anyansembe: Seraia, Azaria, Yeremia, Pashuri, Amaria, Malikia, Hatushi, Shebania, Maluki, Harimu, Meremoti, Obadia, Daniele, Ginetoni, Baruki, Meshulamu, Abia, Miamini, Maazia, Biligai na Shemaia." 
Nehemiah10:2 Anyansembe: Seraia, Azaria, Yeremia, Pashuri, Amaria, Malikia, Hatushi, Shebania, Maluki, Harimu, Meremoti, Obadia, Daniele, Ginetoni, Baruki, Meshulamu, Abia, Miamini, Maazia, Biligai na Shemaia." 
Nehemiah10:3 Alevi: Yeshua mwana Azania, Binui wa m'mbumba ya Henadadi, Kadimiele, Shebania, Hodia, Kelita, Pelaia, Hanani, Mika, Rehobu, Hashabia, Zakuri, Sherebia, Shebania, Hodia, Bani na Beninu." 
Nehemiah10:4 Akadamu a anthu: Paroshi, Pahati-Moabu, Elamu, Zatu, Bani, Buni, Azigadi, Bebai, Adonia, Bigivai, Adini, Ateri, Hezekia, Azuri, Hodia, Hashumu, Bezai, Harifi, Anatoti, Nebai, Magipiasi, Meshulamu, Heziri, Meshezabele, Zadoki, Yadua, Pelatia, Hanani, Anaia, Hoshea, Hanania, Hashubu, Haloheshi, Piliha, Shobeki, Rehumu, Hashabina, Maaseia, Ahia, Hanani, Anani, Maluki, Harimu na Baana." 
Nehemiah10:5 “Ife anthu a Israele, anyansembe, Alevi, anyakulondali ku Nyumba ya Mulungu, anyakuimba nyimbo, anyabasa a m'Nyumba ya Mulungu na anthu anango onsene, ale thangwi ya kuvera mwambo wa Mulungu apipambula okha ene kuna alendo ambakhala pakati pathu ale, ife pabodzi pene na akazathu, pontho na anathu ene ale ngathunga kuvesa pinthu," 
Nehemiah10:6 tili pano kuphatizana na akadamu athu kudumbira kuti tinateweza pyonsene pinalonga mwambo wa MBUYA udatipasa Mulungu kudzera muna Mose nyabasache: kuti ife tinavera pyonsene pinatitonga MBUYA, Mbuyathu, pontho kuti ife tinakoya matongero ache na kuchita pyonsene pinafuna iye. Munthu onsene okhonda chita tenepo athema kutembererwa." 
Nehemiah10:7 “Ife nkhabe dzasemberana na alendo ambakhala pakati pathu ale tayu. 
Nehemiah10:8 “Ngakhala alendowo anadza na mapira penu chinthu chinango chene dzatigulusira pa Nsiku Yakupuma penu pansiku inango ene yakuchena ife nkhabe dzapigula tayu. “Chaka chachinomwe chonsene ife nkhabe dzalima mindathu tayu, pontho tinafudza mangawa onsene." 
Nehemiah10:9 “Chaka na chaka munthu onsene anasonkha siliva wakulemera magramu mashanu kuphedza basa ya pa Nyumba ya Mulungu. 
Nehemiah10:10 “Ife tinapereka pinthu ipi pachipembedzo cha ku Nyumba ya Mulungu: mikate yakupambulika, chakupereka cha nsiku na nsiku cha mapira, nyama kuti ziperekwe nsembe zakupyerera, pyakupereka pyakupambulika pya pa Nsiku Yakupuma, Phwando yakusekera Kubalwa kwa mwezi, maphwando anango akusankhulika, pyakupereka pinango pyakupambulika, pyakupereka kubulusa pyakudawa pya Israele, na pinthu pinango pyonsene pyakufunika kuphatiswa basa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
Nehemiah10:11 “Ife anthu, anyansembe, na Alevi tinachita ntsango chaka na chaka kuona kuti njipi dzinza inafuna kupereka nkhuni zakupyerezera nsembe zakuperekwa kuna MBUYA Mulungu wathu malingana na pinthu pinafuna mwambo kuti ife tipichitepyo." 
Nehemiah10:12 “Ife tinaenda na pyakupereka chaka na chaka ku Nyumba ya Mulungu na mapira athu akutoma kutokota ambavuna ife pontho na nsapo zakutoma kufira m'miti yonsene. 
Nehemiah10:13 “Anathu achimuna autombo a munthu onsene wa ife tinaenda nawo kuna anyansembe ku Nyumba ya Mulungu. Tenepo kweneko tinaapambulira kuna Mulungu ninga munalongera mwambo. Tinapambula pontho anamphulu akutoma kubalwa, anabira akutoma kubalwa na anambuzi akutoma kubalwa kubulukira kuna pifuyo pyathu pyonsene." 
Nehemiah10:14 “Ife tinaenda kuna anyansembe chaka na chaka na mpambo wa mikate wakusasanywa na mapira akutoma kuvunwa na pyakupereka pyathu pinango pya vinyu, mafuta aolivi pontho na mtundu onsene wa nsapo. “Tinaendesa kuna Alevi, anthu ambasonkhesa chakhumi cha pinthu pya m'mazunde mwathu ale, chakhumi cha mbewu zimbamera m'minda mwathu zile." 
Nehemiah10:15 Anyansembe ale mphidzukulu pya Aroni athema kukhala pabodzi pene na Alevi ndzidzi unasonkheswa chakhumi, pontho Alevi athema kwenda na chakhumi chile ku Nyumba ya Mulungu kumasubi akukoyeramo pinthu kuti pikaphate basa mwenemo." 
Nehemiah10:16 Anthu a ku Israele na Alevi athema kudza na pyakupereka pyawo pya mapira, vinyu na mafuta aolivi ku masubi kule kumbakoyerwa pyombo pya m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, pontho kule kumbakhala anyansembe ali pa buswa ndzidzi wenewo, anyakulondali pamsuwo na anyakuimba nyimbo. “Ife nkhabe dzakhonda Nyumba ya Mulungu wathu tayu.”" 
Nehemiah11:1 Akadamu adakhazikika mu Yerusalemu, tenepo anthu anango onsene adachita ntsango kufuna kusankhula banja ibodzi pamabanja khumi onsene ile idathema kwenda kakhala mumzinda wakupambulika wa Yerusalemu, mwenemo anango adapangwa kakhala kumizinda na kumaluwani anango." 
Nehemiah11:2 Tenepo anthu adasimba anthu anango onsene ale adapipereka mwakufuna kwawo kukhazikika mumzinda wa Yerusalemu. 
Nehemiah11:3 M'maluwani anango a nthemba ya Yuda, Aisraele, anyansembe, Alevi, anyakuphata basa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu na pidzukulu pya anyabasa a Solomoni, adakhala kumisa kwawo m'maluwani mwawo. Madzina ali m'tchindemu mbakadamu a nthemba ya Yuda ale akhakhala mumzinda wa Yerusalemu." 
Nehemiah11:4 Anthu a m'dzinza ya Yuda: Ataia, mwana Uzia pontho mdzukuluache Zekaria. Makolo ache anango nkhuthimizapo Amaria, Shefatia, na Mahalalele, pidzukulu pya Perezi mwana Yuda." 
Nehemiah11:5 Maaseia mwana Baruki pontho mdzukuluache Kolihoze. Makolo ache anango nkhuthimizapo Hazaia, Adaia, Yoiaribu na Zekaria pidzukulu pya Shela mwana Yuda." 
Nehemiah11:6 Pakati pa pidzukulu pya Perezi amuna akuveka madzana manayi na makumatanthatu na asere akhakhala mu Yerusalemu. 
Nehemiah11:7 Anthu a m'dzinza ya Benjemani: Salu mwana Meshulamu pontho mdzukuluache Yoedi. Makolo ache anango nkhuthimizapo Pedaia, Kolaia, Maaseia, Itiele na Yeshaia." 
Nehemiah11:8 Gabai na Salai, abale ache Salu chadi-chadi. Pakati pa anthu onsene, anthu madzana mafemba na makumawiri na asere ndiye adakhala mu Yerusalemu." 
Nehemiah11:9 Yowele mwana Zikiri ndiye akhali mkadamu wawo, pontho Yuda mwana Hasenua akhali mkadamu wachiwiri wa mzindawo." 
Nehemiah11:10 Anyansembe: Yedaia mwana Yoiaribu, na Yakini." 
Nehemiah11:11 Seraia mwana Hilikia pontho mdzukuluache Meshulamu. Makolo ache nkhuthimizapo Zadoki, Meraioti na Ahitubu, ule akhali Nyansembe Wamkulu." 
Nehemiah11:12 Pakati pa anthu onsene anthu madzana masere na makumawiri na awiri ndiye adatumikira m'Nyumba ya Mulungu; Adaia mwana Yerohamu pontho mdzukuluache Pelalia. Makolo ache nkhuthimizapo Amizi, Zekaria, Pashuri na Malikia." 
Nehemiah11:13 Pakati pa anthu onsene anthu madzana mawiri na makumanayi na awiri akhali akadamu a mbumba; Amashisai mwana Azarele pontho mdzukuluache Ahizai. Makolo ache nkhuthimizapo Meshilemoti na Imeri. 
Nehemiah11:14 Pakhali anthu dzana na makumawiri na asere a mbumba yeneyi ale akhali anyankhondo akuveka. Mkadamu wawo akhali Zabidiele mwana Hagedolimu. 
Nehemiah11:15 Alevi: Shemaia mwana Hashubu pontho mdzukuluache Azirikamu. Makolo ache nkhuthimizapo Hashabia na Buni. 
Nehemiah11:16 Shabetai na Yozabadi, Alevi akuveka akuyang'anira basa ya m'Nyumba ya Mulungu;" 
Nehemiah11:17 Matania mwana Mika pontho mdzukuluache Zabidi, chidzukulu cha Asafu. Iye akhatsogolera gulu ya anyakuimba nyimbo kuimba nyimbo zakupereka nazo takhuta kuna Mulungu. Bakibukia ule akhali nyakuphedzera Matania. Abada mwana Shamua pontho mdzukuluache Galali, chidzukulu cha Yedutuni." 
Nehemiah11:18 Pakati pa anthu onsene, Alevi madzana mawiri na makumasere na anayi ndiye adakhala mumzinda wakupambulika wa Yerusalemu." 
Nehemiah11:19 Anyakulondali Nyumba ya Mulungu: Akubu, Talimoni na abale ache, onsene akhalipo dzana na makumanomwe na awiri." 
Nehemiah11:20 Aisraele anango onsene pabodzi pene na anyansembe na Alevi akusalira akhakhala m'maluwani a mu Yuda, kada munthu mbuto idamsiyira makolo ache." 
Nehemiah11:21 Anyakuphata basa ku Nyumba ya Mulungu akhakhala kukhundu inango ya Yerusalemu yakuthulwa Ofele, akadamu awo mbakhala Ziha na Gishipa." 
Nehemiah11:22 Mkadamu wa Alevi akhakhala mu Yerusalemu ule dzinache ikhali Uzi, mwana Bani pontho mdzukuluache Hashabia. Makolo ache nkhuthimizapo Matania na Mika, pontho mbumbawo ikhali ya Asafu; Basa yawo ikhali kuimba nyimbo ndzidzi wa chipembedzo m'Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
Nehemiah11:23 Akhali pansi pa matongero a mfumu akulonga pya buswawo pakutsogolera nyimbo m'Nyumba ya Mulungu nsiku na nsiku. 
Nehemiah11:24 Petahia mwana Meshezabele wa mbumba ya Zera pontho wa dzinza ya Yuda, akhali phungu wa mfumu wa ku Peresia papinthu pyakulonga Aisraele." 
Nehemiah11:25 Anthu azinji adakhala m'maluwani a chifupi na mindawo. Anthu anango a m'dzinza ya Yuda adakhala ku Kiriati-Ariba, Diboni, na Yekabizele, pontho na midzi yakuzungulira mizinda yeneyi." 
Nehemiah11:26 Iwo akhakhala pontho m'mizinda ya Yeshua, Molada, Beti-Peleti," 
Nehemiah11:27 na Hazari-Shuali, pontho mu Beeresheba na midzi yakuzungulira." 
Nehemiah11:28 Iwo akhakhala mumzinda wa Zikilagi, Mekona na midzi yache," 
Nehemiah11:29 mu Enirimoni, mu Zora, mu Yarimuti," 
Nehemiah11:30 mu Zanoa, mu Adulamu, na midzi yachifupi na maluwani enewa. Iwo akhakhala mu Lakishi pontho na m'minda yachifupi, mu Azeka na midzi yache. Penepa nkhulonga kuti anthu a ku Yuda adakhala m'nthemba ya pakati pa Beeresheba na phedi ya Hinomu." 
Nehemiah11:31 Anthu a dzinza ya Benjemani adakhala pa Geba, Mikimashi, Ai, Betele na midzi yachifupi," 
Nehemiah11:32 Anatoti, Nobu, Anania," 
Nehemiah11:33 Hazori, Rama, Gitaimu," 
Nehemiah11:34 Hadidi, Zeboimu, Nebalati," 
Nehemiah11:35 Lodi na Ono, pontho na Phedi ya Amisiri." 
Nehemiah11:36 Magulu anango a Alevi ale adakhala m'nthemba ya Yuda adapangwa kakhala pabodzi pene na anthu a Benjemani. 
Nehemiah12:1 Nyandandanda uli m'tchindemu ngwa anyansembe na Alevi akhadabwerera kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo pabodzi pene na Zerubabele mwana Shealatiele, pontho na Yeshua, Nyansembe Wamkulu." 
Nehemiah12:2 Anyansembe: Seraia, Yeremia, Ezara, Amaria, Maluki, Hatushi, Shekania, Rehumu, Meremoti, Ido, Ginetoni, Abia, Miamini, Maadia, Biliga, Shemaia, Yoiaribu, Yedaia, Salu, Amoki, Hilikia, na Yedaia. Amuna enewa ndiye akhali akadamu pakati pa anyansembe anzawo onsene ndzidzi wa Yeshua." 
Nehemiah12:3  
Nehemiah12:4  
Nehemiah12:5  
Nehemiah12:6  
Nehemiah12:7  
Nehemiah12:8 Alevi: Madzina ali m'tchindewa akhali anyakuyang'anira pya nyimbo zakupereka nazo takhuta kuna Mulungu: Yeshua, Binui, Kadimiele, Sherebia, Yuda na Matania." 
Nehemiah12:9 Bakibukia, Uno, na Alevi anzawo akhali m'gulu ya anyakuimba ale akhatawirizana na anzawo pikhaimba iwo." 
Nehemiah12:10 Yeshua adabala Yoiakimu, Yoiakimu adabala Eliashibu, Eliashibu adabala Yoiada;" 
Nehemiah12:11 Yoiada adabala Yonatani, Yonatani adabala Yadua." 
Nehemiah12:12 Pikhali Yoiakimu Nyansembe Wamkulu, anyansembe ali m'tchindewa akhali akadamu a mabanja a unyansembe: Meraia wa banja ya Seraia, Hanania wa banja ya Yeremia, Meshulamu wa banja ya Ezara, Yehohanani wa banja ya Amaria, Yonatani wa banja ya Maluki, Yosefe wa banja ya Shekania, Adina wa banja ya Harimu, Helikai wa banja ya Meraioti, Zekaria wa banja ya Ido, Meshulamu wa banja ya Ginetoni, Zikiri wa banja ya Abia, Pilitai wa banja ya Miniamini, na ya Moadia, Shamua wa banja ya Biliga, Yehonatani wa banja ya Shemaia, Matenai wa banja ya Yoiaribu, Uzi wa banja ya Yedaia, Kalai wa banja ya Sallai, Eberi wa banja ya Amoki, Hashabia wa banja ya Hilikia, Netanele wa banja ya Yedaia." 
Nehemiah12:13  
Nehemiah12:14  
Nehemiah12:15  
Nehemiah12:16  
Nehemiah12:17  
Nehemiah12:18  
Nehemiah12:19  
Nehemiah12:20  
Nehemiah12:21  
Nehemiah12:22 Nyandandanda wa akadamu a mabanja a Alevi na anyansembe pandzidzi wa Eliashibu, Yoiada, Yonatani na Yadua, ukhalembwa mpakana ndzidzi wakutonga wa Dariusi, mfumu wa ku Peresia." 
Nehemiah12:23 Madzina a akadamu a mabanja a Alevi akhalembwa m'Bukhu ya Mbiri mpakana ndzidzi wa Yohanani mdzukuluache Eliashibu. 
Nehemiah12:24 Akadamu a Alevi akhali Hashabia, Sherebia, Yeshua, Binui mwana Kadimiele, pabodzi pene na anzawo, ale adaimira mwakuyang'anisana nawo mbaimba nyimbo zakukuza nazo na kupereka takhuta kuna Mulungu, gulu ibodzi kutawirizana na inzache, ninga montho mudapitongera Mfumu Davite, munthu wa Mulungu." 
Nehemiah12:25 Matani, Bakibukia, Obadia, Meshulamu, Talimoni, na Akubu akhali anyakulondali ale akhayang'anira masubi akukoyeramo pinthu pamisuwo ya Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
Nehemiah12:26 Anthu enewa akhatumikira pandzidzi wa Yoiakimu mwana Yeshua mdzukuluache Yozadaki, pontho pandzidzi wa Nehemia mkulu wa boma na Ezara nyansembe pontho nyakudziwisa mwambo." 
Nehemiah12:27 Pidapambulirwa mpanda wa Yerusalemu kuna MBUYA, Alevi adadzeswa mumzindamo kubulukira konsene kwene kukhakhala iwo, towera akhale pabodzi na anzawo kusekera kupambulwa kwa mafufuwo na nyimbo zakupereka nazo takhuta, pakuphatisa basa nkhotcho na anyakatangale." 
Nehemiah12:28 Mabanja a Alevi a m'gulu ya anyakuimba nyimbo adagumanyikana kubulukira kunthemba ikhadakhazikika iwo kuzungulira mzinda wa Yerusalemu ule, pontho kubulukira kumaluwani a Netofa," 
Nehemiah12:29 pontho kubulukira ku Beti-Giligala, Geba, na Azimaveti." 
Nehemiah12:30 Anyansembe na Alevi adachita mwambo wakupichenesa okha ene, anthu, pontho misuwo ya mpanda na mafufu ache ene." 
Nehemiah12:31 Ine ndidagumanyisa akadamu a ku Yuda pansonga ya fufu mbandiapanga kuyang'anira magulu mawiri makulu-makulu a anyakuimba nyimbo kufamba kuzungulira mzindawo, kupereka takhuta kuna Mulungu. Gulu yakutoma idenda kumadyo na padzulu pa mpanda kwendera ku Msuwo wa Khuku." 
Nehemiah12:32 Hoshaia akhafamba m'nduli mwa anyakuimba nyimbo. Tenepo m'nduli mwache mukhadza khundu inango ya akadamu a ku Yuda," 
Nehemiah12:33 pontho na Azaria, Ezara, Meshulamu," 
Nehemiah12:34 Yuda, Benjemani, Shemaia na Yeremia," 
Nehemiah12:35 pabodzi pene na anyansembe akuliza ngoma: Zekaria mwana Yonatani pontho mdzukuluache Shemaia. Makolo ache nkhuthimizapo Matania, Mikaia na Zakuri wa mbumba ya Asafu," 
Nehemiah12:36 pabodzi pene na anzache; Shemaia, Azarele, Milalai, Gilalai, Maai, Netanele, Yuda na Hanani, uku aphatira pyakuimbira pya mtundu onthowo ukhaphatisa basa Mfumu Davite, munthu wa Mulungu. Ezara nyakudziwisa mwambo adatsogolera gulu yeneyi pamulikiti." 
Nehemiah12:37 Pa Msuwo wa Mphuno ya madzi iwo adakwira nsikada zakwenda kumzinda wa Davite kupiringana nyumba yachifumu ya Davite mbabwerera kufufu ya Msuwo wa Madzi, kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa a mzindawo." 
Nehemiah12:38 Gulu yachiwiri ya ale akhapereka takhuta kuna Mulungu idenda kumabzere. Tenepo ndidaitewera na padzulu pa mpanda na khundu inango ya anthu kupiringana pa Nsanja ya Mauvuni kwenda ku Fufu ya Ntchindu; 
Nehemiah12:39 kubuluka penepo tidapiringana Msuwo wa Eferemu, Msuwo wa Yeshana, Msuwo wa Nsomba, Nsanja ya Hananele pontho na Nsanja ya Dzana kwenda ku Msuwo wa Mabira mbatimalisira mulikiti wathu chifupi na Msuwo wa Anyakulondali." 
Nehemiah12:40 Tenepo magulu onsene mawiri akhaimba nyimbo kupereka takhuta kuna Mulungu ale, adafika mbakhala pambuto zawo m'Nyumba ya Mulungu. Ine na khundu inango ya akadamu akhali na ine ale tidachitambo chibodzi-bodzi," 
Nehemiah12:41 pabodzi pene na anyansembe akuliza ngoma: Eliakimu, Maaseia, Miniamini, Mikaia, Elioenai, Zekaria na Hanania;" 
Nehemiah12:42 m'nduli mwawo mukhali Maaseia, Shemaia, Eleazara, Uzi, Yehohanani, Malikia, Elamu na Ezeri. Anyakuimba nyimbo akhatsogolerwa na Yezerahia mukhaimba iwo mwakugaluza fala." 
Nehemiah12:43 Nsiku yeneyo nsembe zizinji zidaperekwa, tenepo anthu azinji adakomerwa pyakwanga thangwi Mulungu akhadaachitisa kukomerwa pikulu pene. Akazi na ana ene akhali nawo pabodzi paphwando yeneyi, tenepo mkhuwo ukhali penepowo udakwanisa kuveka na pakansinzo." 
Nehemiah12:44 Pandzidzi wenewo amuna adasankhulwa kuyang'anira masubi akukoyeramo pinthu pikhasonkha anthu kuti piphatiswe basa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu pile, kuthimizapo chakhumi na mbewu zakutoma kutokota chaka na chaka. Amuna enewa adapaswa basa yakusonkhesa pinthu pya minda ya chifupi na maluwani, pinthu pile pidathema kutambira anyansembe na Alevi ninga montho mukhadalongera mwambo. Anthu onsene a ku Yuda adakomerwa nawo anyansembe na Alevi ene," 
Nehemiah12:45 thangwi iwo akhachita mwambo wakuchenesa nawo, pontho na kuchita mitemo inango ikhadatonga Mulungu ile. Anyakuimba nyimbo m'Nyumba ya Mulungu na anyakulondali ku Nyumba ya Mulungu akhaphata basawo malingana na mule mudatongera Mfumu Davite na mwanache Solomoni." 
Nehemiah12:46 Kale ene kubulukira ndzidzi wa Mfumu Davite na nyakuimba nyimbo, Asafu, anyakuimba nyimbo adatsogolera kuimba nyimbo zakukuza nazo na zakupereka takhuta kuna Mulungu." 
Nehemiah12:47 Pandzidzi wa Zerubabele pontho na pandzidzi wa Nehemia, Aisraele onsene akhapereka pyakupereka pya nsiku na nsiku kuphedza napyo anyakuimba nyimbo pontho anyakulondali ku Nyumba ya Mulungu. Anthu adapereka nsembe yakupambulika kuna Alevi, Alevimbo adapereka kuna anyansembe khundu yawo idathema iwo kutambira." 
Nehemiah13:1 Ndzidzi ukhawerengwa mwambo wa Mose mwakugaluza fala kuna anthu, iwo adafika pandima ile ikhalonga kuti nee munthu wa ku Amoni penu wa ku Moabu athema kuphatizana na anthu a Mulungu tayu." 
Nehemiah13:2 Penepi pikhali tenepo thangwi Aamoni na Amoabu hadapase Aisraele pyakudya na madzi tayu, ndzidzi ukhabuluka iwo m'dziko ya Iguputo. M'mbuto mwache iwo adadyekera Balamu na kobiri kuti atemberere Aisraele, mbwenye Mulungu wathu adasanduza dzedzeyo kukhala mtsanzayiso." 
Nehemiah13:3 Pidava Aisraele mwambo wenewu, adabulusa alendo onsene pakati pawo." 
Nehemiah13:4 Eliashibu, nyansembe akhali mkadamu wakuyang'anira masubi akukoyeramo pinthu m'Nyumba ya Mulungu. Iye akhali mbaleache Tobia wakusemberana naye," 
Nehemiah13:5 tenepo adampasa subi ikulu, ile pakutoma ikhaphatiswa basa kukoyeramo pyakupereka pya mapira na pyakufukiza pyakununkhira na pyombo pya m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, pontho na chakhumi na vinyu wachinchino, mafuta aolivi akuperekwa kuna Alevi, anyakuimba nyimbo na anyakulondali ku Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
Nehemiah13:6 Ndzidzi ukhachitika penepi, ine nee ndikhali mu Yerusalemu tayu, thangwi chaka chamakumatatu na chiwiri pikhatonga Mfumu Aritaserisese dziko ya Babiloni ndikhadabwerera kuna iye kampanga pyonsene pikhachitika pile. Pidagwanda ndzidzi pang'ono ndidampempha kuti anditawirise kubwerera," 
Nehemiah13:7 tenepo ndidabwerera ku Yerusalemu. Kweneko ine ndidagumana kuti Eliashibu akhadachita chinthu chakuipa kutawirisa Tobia kuphatisa basa subi ibodzi ya m'Nyumba ya Mulungu. 
Nehemiah13:8 Ine ndidadzidzwa napyo mtima mbanditayira panja pinthu pyonsene pile pikhali pya Tobia. 
Nehemiah13:9 Ine ndidatonga kuti pachitike mwambo wakuchenesa nawo subiyo, pontho kuti pyombo pya m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, pyakupereka pya mapira pontho na pyakufukiza pyakununkhira pibwezerwe m'mbuto mwache." 
Nehemiah13:10 Ndidagumana pontho kuti anyakuimba nyimbo m'Nyumba ya Mulungu na Alevi anango akhadabuluka mu Yerusalemu kubwerera kumazunde kwawo, thangwi anthu hakhadaapasa tayu pinthu pidathema iwo kutambira." 
Nehemiah13:11 Ine ndidasumulula mathubu mbandiavunza kuti, “Thangwi yache ninji mwasiya Nyumba ya Mulungu gwamwa tenepa?” Tenepo ine ndidadzesa pontho Alevi ku Nyumba ya Mulungu na anyakuimba nyimbo ene mbandiachitisa kutoma pontho kuphata basa." 
Nehemiah13:12 Tenepo Aisraele onsene adatoma pontho kudza na pyakupereka kumasubi akukoyeramo pinthu a m'Nyumba ya Mulungu; chakhumi cha mapirawo, vinyu, na mafuta aolivi." 
Nehemiah13:13 Ine ndidaikha amuna awa kukhala anyakuyang'anira masubi enewa: nyansembe Shelemia, Zadoki nyakudziwisa mwambo, na Pedaia Mlevi. Hanani mwana Zakuri pontho mdzukuluache Matania ndiye akhali nyakuaphedzera. Ine ndidaanyindira anthu enewa kuti anagawiza pinthu pakati pa anyabasa anzawo mwakuona mtima." 
Nehemiah13:14 Ndikumbukeni thangwi ya penepi, Imwe Mulungu wanga, pontho lekani duwalira na pang'ono pene pinthu pyonsene pyachitira ine mwakukhulupirika Nyumba ya Mulungu wanga na mabasache ene." 
Nehemiah13:15 Pandzidzi wenewo ndidaona anthu anango mu Yuda akutchitchitha vinyu pa Nsiku Yakupuma. Anango akhapakiza pabulu pawo mapira, vinyu, mfesa, nkhuyu, na pinthu pinango kwenda napyo ku Yerusalemu. Natenepo ndidaasumulula kuti aleke gulisa pinthu pa Nsiku Yakupuma." 
Nehemiah13:16 Anthu anango a kumzinda wa Turo akhakhala mu Yerusalemu, tenepo adadza mumzinda na nsomba pontho na pyakudya pya mtundu onsene mbapigulisa kuna anthu athu pa Nsiku Yakupuma." 
Nehemiah13:17 Ine ndidasumulula akadamu a Chiyuda mbandilonga kuna iwo kuti, “Yang'anani pinthu pyakuipa pinachita imwepi. Imwe mukuchitisa Nsiku Yakupuma kukhala nsiku yokhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu.”" 
Nehemiah13:18 Ndi thangwi yache Mulungu adatchunyusa makolo anu pidavunga iye mzindawu. Kwache imwe mukukakamira basi kuti ukali wa Mulungu udze pana Israele pakuswipisa Nsiku Yakupuma. 
Nehemiah13:19 Natenepo ndidatonga kuti misuwo ya mzinda ikhale yakufungwa pa Nsiku yonsene Yakupuma sindzidzi dzuwa nkhuthobila, mbifungulwa pakumala pa Nsiku Yakupuma. Ine ndidaikha anango a amunanga pamisuwo ya mzindawo kuonesesa kuti nkhabe na chinthu chene chikupita mumzindamo pa Nsiku Yakupuma." 
Nehemiah13:20 Kabodzi penu kawiri anyamalonda akugulisa pinthu pya mtundu onsene akhagona kunja kwa mzinda. 
Nehemiah13:21 Tenepo ine ndidaacheuza kuti, “Nkhabe basa tayu kudikhira kunja kwa mzinda kuti machibese akwane. Ngakhala imwe munayesa pontho kuchita penepi, ine ndinaphatisa basa njira zavinga pana imwe.” Kubuluka ndzidzi wenewo kwenda m'tsogolo nkhabe na mbodzi ene adadza pa Nsiku Yakupuma tayu." 
Nehemiah13:22 Ine ndidatonga Alevi kupichenesa okha ene pontho kuti aende kayang'anira pamisuwo ya mzinda kuonesesa kuti Nsiku Yakupuma ikhale yakuchena. Ndikumbukeni pontho thangwi ya penepi, Imwe Mulungu wanga, mbamukoye moyo wanga, thangwi ya kukula kwa kundifuna kwanu kokhonda mala." 
Nehemiah13:23 Pandzidzi wenewo ndidadzindikira pontho kuti Ayuda azinji akhadasemba akazi a ku Ashidodi, Amoni na ku Moabu." 
Nehemiah13:24 Anawo anango akhalonga Chiashidodi, penu pilongero pinango pene, mbachimwana kudziwa chilongero chathu, ife Ayuda." 
Nehemiah13:25 Ine ndidasumulula amunawa mbandiatemberera. Ndidaamenya mbandiakwedzula tsisi yawo. Kubuluka penepo ndidaapanga kuti adumbire pikulu pene na dzina ya Mulungu kuti na kutani kwene iwo pabodzi pene na anawo hanasemberanave pontho na anthu achilendo tayu. 
Nehemiah13:26 Ine ndidalonga kuti, “Mbakazi achilendo onthowa adachitisa Mfumu Solomoni kudawa. Iye akhali munthu wakuveka pyakwanga kupiringana mafumu anango onsene a padziko yapansi. Mulungu adamfuna mbampitisa ufumu wa anthu ache Aisraele. Kwache iye adachita chakudawa ninga chenechi." 
Nehemiah13:27 Apo ifembo tive pontho basi kuti mwachita chinthu chakuipa ninga chenechi mbamukhonda vera Mulungu wathu pakusemba akazi achilendo?” 
Nehemiah13:28 Yehoiada akhali mwana wamamuna wa Eliashibu, Nyansembe Wamkulu, kwache mbodzi wa ana a Yehoiada adasemba mwana wa Sanibalati wa Chihoroni, tenepo ndidamthamangisa Yehoiada mu Yerusalemu." 
Nehemiah13:29 Kumbukani MBUYA mudaswipisira anthu enewa basa ya unyansembe na chiverano chidasasanya imwe na anyansembe, pontho na Alevi chile." 
Nehemiah13:30 Ine ndidachenesa anthu kuna pinthu pyonsene pyachilendo; ndidasasanyira anyansembe na Alevi matongero, towera munthu onsene adziwe basache;" 
Nehemiah13:31 ndidasasanya nkhuni zakupyerezera pyakupereka kuti zibwere pandzidzi wache, pontho kuti anthu adze na pyakupereka pyawo pya mapira, pontho nsapo zakutoma tokota. Imwe Mulungu wanga, ndikumbukeni mbamundikomere mtima thangwi ya penepi." 
Esther1:1 Kubulukira pa mpando wache wachifumu mu Susa, mzinda ukulu wa Aperesi, Mfumu Ahasuwero adatonga nthemba dzana na makumawiri na zinomwe, kubulukira ku India mpakana ku Sudani." 
Esther1:2  
Esther1:3 M'chaka chachitatu cha ufumu wache, iye adasasanyira phwando mathubu ache na anyakufambisa mfumache. Akadamu ankhondo a Aperesi na Amedi akhalimbo penepo pabodzi pene na akulu a boma na a m'banja yachifumu m'nthemba zikhatonga iye zile." 
Esther1:4 Miyezi yamumphu mitanthatu, iye adaaonesa kukula kudachita mfuma na demelero ya ufumu wache." 
Esther1:5 Kubuluka penepo mfumu adasasanyira phwando anthu onsene a mumzinda ukulu wa Susa, mkulu mpakana mwana. Phwando ile idamala dimingu yamumphu pontho idachitikira pachintalo cha nyumbache yachifumu." 
Esther1:6 Chintalo chache chidatchingwa na nguwo zachoza na zakuchena zakumangirirwa na nkhambala zathonje zamsuzi wanyemba kungoloweko zasiliva pamizati yamiyala yakudula yamarabule. Makadera agolidi na asiliva adaikhwa pachintalo chile chidathemeserwa na miyala yakufira, yamarabule, yakuyetimira na inango yakudula." 
Esther1:7 Pyakumwa pikhaperekerwa m'makhomitcho a mtundu wakusiyana-siyana agolidi, pontho vinyuakhalipo wakuinjipa malingana na kufewa manja kwa mfumu." 
Esther1:8 Pakhali nkhabe madire akumwa; mfumu akhadatonga anyabasache a kunyumba yachifumu kuti munthu onsene anakwanisa kumwa pyache ninga mukhafunira iye. 
Esther1:9 Ndzidzi wenewo m'bwalo mwa nyumba yachifumu, Matsano Vasiti akhachitambo phwando na akazi anzache." 
Esther1:10 Pansiku yachinomwe ya phwando ile, mfumu adakomerwa pyakwanga na vinyu ule. Tenepo adachemera mathubu ache anomwe, ale akhali akukapalwi: Mehumani, Bizita, Haribona, Bigita, Abagita, Zetari na Karikasi" 
Esther1:11 mbaapanga kuti adze na Matsano Vasiti uku avala dunku yaumatsano. Matsano akhali wakubalika pyakwanga, tenepo mfumu akhafuna kuti mathubu ache na alendo ache aone kubalika kudachita mkazache kule." 
Esther1:12 Mbwenye pidampanga anyabasa pidalonga mfumu pile, Matsano Vasiti adakhonda kwenda. Penepi pidamzhangalisa mfumu pyakwanga pene." 
Esther1:13 Podi ukhali mtemo wa mfumu kuvunza nzeru kuna anyakudziwisa mwambo na matongero, iye adachemeresa mapungu ache, ale adathema kudziwa pyakuthema kuchita." 
Esther1:14 Kukhavunza iye nzeru kazinji kene kukhali kwa Karishena, Shetari, Adimatu, Tarisisi, Meresi, Marisena na Memukani, mathubu anomwe a Aperesi na Amedi, ale akhali na chidzo chikulu muufumu ule." 
Esther1:15 Iye adalonga kuna anthu enewa mbati, “Ine Mfumu Ahasuwero ndidatuma mathubu anga kuna Matsano Vasiti kampanga kuti adze kuno, mbwenye iye akhonda kundivera. Apo mwambo ukulonganji? Ninji pyathema ife kuchita naye mkazi weneyu?”" 
Esther1:16 Tenepo Memukani adalonga manyerezero ache kuna mfumu na kuna mathubu anzache mbati, “Matsano Vasiti achita chakuipa nee kuna mfumu kokha tayu, mbwenye pontho kuna mathubu ache na anthu onsene akukhala mu ufumuwu." 
Esther1:17 Mkazi onsene muno anatoma kululupisa mamunache sindzidzi nkhuva pinthu pyachita Matsano Vasiti. Iwo analonga mbati, ‘Mfumu Ahasuwero adatonga kuti Matsano Vasiti adze kuna iye, mbwenye matsano adakhonda kwendako!’" 
Esther1:18 Akazimbo a mathubu a ku Peresia na Media angava pyachita Matsano Vasiti, anapilongambo kuna amunawo na nsiku yonthoyo. Akazi nkhabe dzalemedza amunawo tayu, pontho amuna anazhangalira pyakwanga akazawo." 
Esther1:19 Ngakhala pinamkomera mfumu mbatonge kuti Vasiti aleke dzaonekerave pamaso pa mfumu. Mfumu mbatonge kuti penepi pilembwe m'mabukhu a mwambo a Aperesi na Amedi, towera pileke dzafudzwa. Kubuluka penepo mbuto yache mbiperekwe kuna mkazi unango wadidi kukhala matsano." 
Esther1:20 Penepi pingaveka muufumu ukulu uno, mkazi onsene analemedza mamunache mwadidi, podi kwene mamunayo akhale pyache wakufuma penu wakutcherenga.”" 
Esther1:21 Mfumu na mathubu ache adaphatizana nawo manyerezero enewa, tenepo mfumu adachita pinthu pidalonga Memukani pile." 
Esther1:22 Kunthemba yonsene ya muufumu mwache iye adatumizako mphangwa na chilongero pontho na malembero a nthemba yeneyo kulonga kuti, “Mamuna onsene athema kukhala na utongi onsene wa pabanja pache.”" 
Esther2:1 Kubuluka penepo pikhadambombowa ukali wa mfumu, mfumu adathimiza kunyerezera pya Vasiti na pidachita iye pene, pontho na matongero akhadapereka iye mwakupokanyisana naye ale." 
Esther2:2 Natenepo anango mwa mapungu ache akukhala naye chifupiletu adalonga mbati, “Mfumu mbasakirwe mwali wakubalika." 
Esther2:3 Mfumu mbasankhule akadamu m'nthemba zonsene za ufumuwu mbatonga kuti adze na amiyali onsene akubalika kugelo ya atsikana kunyumba yachifumu muno mumzinda ukulu wa Susa. Amiyali onsenewa mbayang'anirwe na Hegai, thubu wakukapalwi wa mfumu, tenepo apaswe pyakudzola-dzola kuti aoneke akubalika." 
Esther2:4 Kubuluka penepo mfumu anakwanisa kusankhula mtsikana mbodzi anafuna iye kukhala matsano m'mbuto mwa Vasiti.” Mfumu adaona kuti manyerezero enewa akhali adidi, tenepo adachitadi pidapangwa iye pile." 
Esther2:5 Mu Susa monthomo mukhali Myuda unango, dzinache Moredekai mwana wamamuna wa Yairi. Iye akhali wa dzinza ya Benjemani, pontho akhali mdzukuluache Kishi na Shimei." 
Esther2:6 Pidakwata Mfumu Nebukadinezara wa ku Babiloni, Yehoiakini mfumu wa Yuda kwenda naye kudziko ya unyaperezo kubulukira ku Yerusalemu pabodzi pene na anthu anango adaphata iye ale, Moredekai akhali mbodzi wa iwo." 
Esther2:7 Moredekai akhali na mwana wa babache wamng'ono dzinache Estere, ule dzinache pa Chiheberi ndi Hadasa. Iye akhali mtsikana wakubalika pyakwanga, pontho wakuoneka mwadidi. Pidafa makolo ache, Moredekai adamkwata mbamkuza ninga mwanache ene." 
Esther2:8 Pidapereka mfumu matongero ache, atsikana azinji adendeswa ku Susa, tenepo Estere akhali mbodzi wa iwo. Iye adapitiswambo m'nyumba yachifumu mbayang'anirwa na Hegai, ule akhali wakuyang'anira gelo ya atsikana kunyumba yachifumu." 
Esther2:9 Hegai adakomerwa naye Estere mbamkomera mtima. Msanga-msanga iye adapaswa pyakudzola-dzola kuti aoneke wakubalika na pyakudya pyadidi. Iye adapereka kuna Estere anyabasa achikazi akusankhulika anomwe kubulukira kunyumba yachifumu kuti amtumikire. Hegai adampasa pontho mbuto yadidi m'gelo ya atsikana ile. 
Esther2:10 Estere hadalonge tayu pya dziko ikhadabulukira iye, pontho na banja ikhadabulukira iye, thangwi Moredekai adamkhondesa kuchita tenepo." 
Esther2:11 Nsiku na nsiku Moredekai akhafamba-famba chifupi na chintalo cha gelo ya atsikana ile kuti adziwe mule mukhakhalira Estere pontho na pinthu pikhamchitikira. 
Esther2:12 Mtsikana onsene nsiku yache mbidzati fika yakwenda kaonekera pamaso pa Mfumu Ahasuwero, akhathema kumala miyezi khumi na miwiri akutambira basi pyakudzola-dzola; miyezi mitanthatu akutambira mafuta amure, miyezi inango mitanthatu akhatambira mafuta akununkhira na pinango." 
Esther2:13 Ndzidzi ungakwana wakuti mkazi akaonekere pamaso pa mfumu kubulukira kugelo ya atsikana ile, akhavala chinthu chonsene chikhafuna iye kumtima kwache." 
Esther2:14 Iye akhaenda kweneko na mosiku, tenepo mangwana mwache akhaendeswa kunyumba yakukoyeramo akazi achibitchu a mfumu, ile ikhayang'anirwa na Shaashigazi, thubu wakukapalwi wa mfumu ule. Mkaziyo hakhaendako pontho tayu kuna mfumu, mbwenye ngakhala mfumu akhamfuna pyakwanga akhamchemeresa pontho na dzinache." 
Esther2:15 Ndzidzi udafika kuti Estere, mwana wa babache Moredekai wamng'ono dzinache Abihaili, ule Moredekai adamkwata ninga mwanache ene, aende kuna mfumu. Iye adavala pyonthopyo pidampanga Hegai, thubu wa mfumu akhayang'anira gelo ya atsikana ule. Tenepo munthu onsene adaona Estere adamsirira." 
Esther2:16 Chaka chachinomwe cha ufumu wa Ahasuwero, mwezi wakhumi wa Tebeti, Estere adadzeswa pamaso pa Mfumu Ahasuwero m'nyumba yachifumu." 
Esther2:17 Mfumu adamfuna pyakwanga kupiringana akazi anango onsene. Iye adakomerwa naye pyakwanga mbamkomera mtima kupiringana amiyali anango onsene. Tenepo mfumu adamvazika dunku yaumatsano mumsolo mwache mbamchitisa kukhala matsano m'mbuto mwa Vasiti. 
Esther2:18 Kubuluka penepo mfumu adasasanya phwando ikulu kulemedza nayo Estere mbachemera mathubu ache onsene na anyakufambisa mfumache. Nsiku yeneyo iye adaichitisa kukhala nsiku yakupuma pabasa muufumu wache onsene mbagawa mitukwa yakuthemerana na mfumu. 
Esther2:19 Pandzidzi wenewo Moredekai akhali thubu wa kunyumba yachifumu. 
Esther2:20 Estere akhathimiza basi kukhonda panga munthu na mbodzi ene kuti akhali Myuda, thangwi Moredekai akhadampanga kuti aleke chita tenepo. Natenepo Estere adamveradi ninga montho mudavera iye pikhakhala iye naye ninga babache ene." 
Esther2:21 Pandzidzi ukhali Moredekai thubu wa kunyumba yachifumu, Bigitana na Tereshi, mathubu awiri akukapalwi a mfumu, ale akhalondali pamisuwo ya masubi a mfumu, adazhangalira Mfumu Ahasuwero mbasasanya pyakumpha." 
Esther2:22 Moredekai adadziwa pya upandu wenewu mbapanga Matsano Estere, ule adenda kapangambo mfumu pya penepi m'mbuto mwa Moredekai." 
Esther2:23 Pinthu penepi pidatoma kuvunzwa-vunzwa mbapigumanwa kuti pikhalongwa pile pikhali pyakuona, natenepo amuna awiri ale adamanikwa pamuti. Pyonsenepi pidalembwa m'bukhu ya mbiri pamaso pa mfumu." 
Esther3:1 Pidagwanda ndzidzi pang'ono Mfumu Ahasuwero adakwiza Hamani pachidzo mbakhala thubu wamkululetu kupiringana anzache onsene. Hamani akhali mwana Hamedata, chidzukulu cha Agagi." 
Esther3:2 Mfumu adatonga kuti mathubu ache onsene muufumu wache alemedze Hamani pakumgodamira na kulamba pamaso pache. Onsene adachitadi penepyo kupambula Moredekai, ule adakhonda kuchita tenepo." 
Esther3:3 Mathubu anango a muufumu ule adamvunza thangwi idamkhondesa kuvera matongero a mfumu; 
Esther3:4 nsiku na nsiku iwo adamdembetera kuchita pidatonga mfumu pile, mbwenye iye hadaavere tayu. Iye adalonga mbati, “Ine ndine Myuda, pontho ine nkhabe kwanisa kulambira Hamani tayu.” Natenepo iwo adampanga Hamani pya penepi na manyerezero akuti mwinango iye apirire na makhaliro a Moredekai." 
Esther3:5 Hamani adazhangali pyakwanga pidadzindikira iye kuti Moredekai hakhamgodamira pontho kumulambira tayu," 
Esther3:6 pontho pidadziwa iye kuti Moredekai akhali Myuda, iye adanyerezera kuchita pikulu pene kusiyana na kupha Moredekai yekha basi. Iye adanyerezera pyakupha Myuda onsene muufumu wa Aperesi." 
Esther3:7 Chaka chakhumi na chiwiri cha ufumu wa Ahasuwero, mwezi wakutoma wa Nisani, Hamani adatonga kuti ntsango ichitike (iwo akhauthula Purimu) kuti agumane nsiku na mwezi wakuthema kuchita pinthu pikhadasasanya iye pile. Nsiku yakhumi na chitatu ya mwezi wakhumi na chiwiri, mwezi wa Adara, ndiye udasankhulwa." 
Esther3:8 Natenepo Hamani adapanga mfumu mbati, “Pana mtundu unango wa anthu, ule wafalikira konsene kwene muufumu wanuwu. Iwo akukhala m'nthemba zonsene mbakoya mitemo yawo yakusiyana na anango onsene. Padzulu pa penepo iwo nkhabe vera matongero a muufumuwu tayu, natenepo penepi si pyadidi tayu kuna imwe kuti mulile kupiyang'ana kwene." 
Esther3:9 Ngakhala pinakukomerani mfumu, tongani kuti anthu enewa aphiwe. Ngakhala munachita tenepo, ine ndinadumbira kuti ndinaikha siliva wakulemera makilogramu pikwi madzana matatu na makumanayi kuthumba ya mfumu kuti ziphatiswe basa kufambisira ufumuwu.”" 
Esther3:10 Mfumu adadula mphete ya m'chala mwache, ile ikhaphatiswa basa ninga chidindo cha mfumu mbaipereka kuna nyamalwa wa Ayuda, Hamani mwana Hamedata chidzukulu cha Agagi." 
Esther3:11 Mfumu adampanga mbati, “Anthu na kobiri zawo zene nsako. Chita kuna iwo pyonsene pinafuna iwepyo.”" 
Esther3:12 Natenepo pansiku yakhumi na chitatu ya mwezi wakutoma, Hamani adachemeresa anyakulembera onsene a mfumu mbaapanga kuti athumbusule pidatonga mfumu pile na chilongero chonsene pontho na malembero onsene akhaphatiswa basa muufumuwo na kutumizwa kuna atongi onsene, akulu aboma na kuna mathubu onsene. Penepi pidalembwa na dzina ya Mfumu Ahasuwero mbadindapo mphete yache." 
Esther3:13 Anyakutumikira adakwata makalata ale kwenda nawo kunthemba zonsene za muufumuwo. M'makalatamo mudalembwa kuti pansiku ibodzi, pansiku yakhumi na chitatu ya mwezi wa Adara, Ayuda onsene, mwana penu mkulu, mkazi penu mamuna athema kuvungwa, kuphiwa na kupuluzwa, pontho pinthu pyawo pikwatwe." 
Esther3:14 Makalatawa adathema kuwerengwa pakwecha m'nthemba zonsene, towera munthu onsene asasanyike nsiku yeneyo ingafika." 
Esther3:15 Na utongi wa mfumu, pidalembwa pile pidalalikwa mumzinda ukulu wa Susa, pontho anyakutumikira adakwata mphangwa zile mbathamanga nazo kunthemba zonsene. Mfumu na Hamani adakhala pansi kumwa uku mzinda onsene wa Susa wamala zunguzika." 
Esther4:1 Pidapidziwa Moredekai pyonsene pidachitika pile, adang'amba nguwo zache mwakuzhangali. Natenepo iye adavala masakha mbawaza dotha mumsolo mwache kuonesa kutsukwala, tenepo adagwanda na pakati pa mzinda ule uku akukalala na kulira pikulu pene" 
Esther4:2 mpakana adafika pamsuwo wa mpanda wa nyumba yachifumu. Iye hadapite m'bwalomo tayu, thangwi munthu wakuvala masakha hakhatawiriswa kupita m'bwalo tayu." 
Esther4:3 M'nthemba zonsene konsene kwene kudenda utongi wa mfumu kule, kukhali chiliro chikulu pakati pa Ayuda. Iwo adapimana kudya, adalira na kukalala, pontho azinji a iwo adavala masakha mbagona padotha." 
Esther4:4 Pidapangwa Estere na anyabasache achikazi, pontho na anyakukapalwi akhamtumikira ale pya pinthu pidachita Moredekai, iye adasanyika napyo mtima pyakwanga. Natenepo adatumiza nguwo kuti Moredekai akavale m'mbuto mwa kuvala masakha, kwache iye adapikhonda." 
Esther4:5 Kubuluka penepo Estere adachemeresa Hataki mbodzi wa anyakukapalwi a mfumu, ule adasankhulwa kutumikira Estere mbampanga kuti aende kuna Moredekai kuti akave pyachitikapyo, pontho thangwi yache njanji." 
Esther4:6 Hataki adenda kuna Moredekai pachintalo cha mumzinda chifupi na msuwo wa mpanda wa nyumba yachifumu. 
Esther4:7 Moredekai adampanga pyonsene pikhachitika kuna iye pile na konta ya kobiri yadumbira Hamani kuipereka kuufumu ngakhala Ayuda onsene anaphiwa. 
Esther4:8 Iye adapereka kuna Hataki kalata ibodzi, ile idawerengwa mu Susa kutonga kuti Ayuda onsene aphiwe. Moredekai adampempha kuti aende nayo kuna Estere mbalonga mwadidi mwene pyonsenepi kuna iye, pontho kumpempha kuti aende kabulumunda pamaso pa mfumu na kumpempha mfumu kuti avere nsisi anthu a mtundu wache." 
Esther4:9 Hataki adachitadi penepi," 
Esther4:10 tenepo Estere adatumizirambo Hataki kubwerera kuna Moredekai na mphangwa izi: 
Esther4:11 “Ngakhala mkazi penu mamuna anapita m'nyumbamo kaonana na mfumu mwakukhonda chemerwa, munthu weneyo athema kufa. Wenewo ndiye mwambo wache; munthu onsene kutomera mathubu a mfumu mpakana anthu a nthemba zonsene akupidziwa penepi. Kwache pana njira ibodzi ene basi yakupulumuka nayo pa mwambo wenewu: Ngakhala mfumu anathonya munthu na ndodo yache yagolidi, munthu weneyo hanaphiwa tayu.
