Mbwenye kulonga pya ine pagwanda mwezi ubodzi kubulukira pa ndzidzi udandichemera mfumu.”" 
Esther4:12 Pidatambira Moredekai mphangwa za Estere zile," 
Esther4:13 adatumizirambo mafala akumcheuza nawo mbati, “Leka nyerezera kuti uli pakupata kupiringana Ayuda onsene, thangwi ya kukhala m'nyumba yachifumu." 
Esther4:14 Pandzidzi wenewu, ungakhala kwene pyako mulomo phoo, chiphedzo chinati chidze kuna Ayuda kubulukira kudzulu, pontho iwo anati apulumuke, mbwenye iwe unati ufe, pontho banjako yonsene inati imaliletu. Kwache mbani anapidziwa kuti mwinango ukhali ndzidzi ninga wenewu udakuchitisa kukhala matsano!”" 
Esther4:15 Estere adamtawirambo Moredekai mbati," 
Esther4:16 “Ndoko ukagumanyise Ayuda onsene mu Susa; pimaneni kudya mbamundipempherere. Lekani kudya penu kumwa na chinthu chene nsiku zitatu mosiku na masikati. Anyabasanga achikazi na ine enembo tinachita chibodzi-bodzi. Kubuluka penepo ine ndinati ndiende pamaso pa mfumu, podi kwene kuti nkhudawira mwambo. Ngakhala ndathema kufa thangwi ya kuchita tenepo, ndinati ndife pyanga.”" 
Esther4:17 Moredekai adalamuka kwenda mbakachita pyonsene pidampanga Estere pile. 
Esther5:1 Pansiku yachitatu yakupimana kudya, Estere adavala mkhanjo wache wachifumu, mbakaimira pachintalo cha m'bwalo mwa nyumba yachifumu kuyang'ana kusubi kukhali mpando wachifumu kule. Mfumu akhali m'bwalomo, uku akhala pampando wachifumu kuyang'ana kumsuwo." 
Esther5:2 Pidaona mfumu kuti Matsano Estere aimira pamsuwo, adamkomera mtima mbamthonya na ndodo yache yagolidi. Natenepo Estere adadza chifupi mbakhuya nsonga ya ndodo ile." 
Esther5:3 Mfumu adavunza mbati, “Nkhwadidi kwene Matsano Estere? Ngandipange chinafuna iwe; podi kwene ikhale pyayo theka ya ufumu wanga, unati upaswe.”" 
Esther5:4 Estere adatawira mbati, “Ngakhala pinakukomerani, Mfumu, ndikhafuna kuti lero imwe na Hamani mudze kuphwando yakusasanyirani ine.”" 
Esther5:5 Natenepo mfumu adachemeresa Hamani kuti adze kabodzi kene, towera iwo achite pidapempha Estere. Tenepo mfumu na Hamani adenda kuphwando idasasanya Estere ile." 
Esther5:6 Pikhamwa iwo vinyu, mfumu adavunza Estere mbati, “Ngandipange chinafuna iwe, tenepo unati upaswe. Chonsene chinapempha iwe podi kwene chikhale theka ya ufumu wanga, unati upaswe.”" 
Esther5:7 Estere adatawira mbati," 
Esther5:8 “Ngakhala mfumu munandikomera mtima kundipasa chonsene chinapempha ine, ndikhafuna kuti mangwana imwe na Hamani mudze pontho kuphwando inango inafuna ine kukusasanyirani. Penepo ine ndinakupangani chinafuna ine.”" 
Esther5:9 Pikhabuluka Hamani kuphwando kule akhasekera pyakwanga na kukomerwa mumtima mwache. Mbwenye kubuluka penepo adaona Moredekai m'nyumba yachifumu; Moredekai hadaimire tayu kuonesa chilemedzo kuna iye pikhagwanda iye. Natenepo Hamani adazhangali naye pyakwanga. 
Esther5:10 Kwache adauphata mtima mbaenda kumusa kwache. Kubuluka penepo iye adachemeresa ashamwali ache kudza kumusa kwache mbapanga pontho mkazache Zeresi kukhala nawo pabodzi penepo. 
Esther5:11 Iye adagaya pyakwanga kuna iwo pya mfuma ikhali na iye, ana achimuna akhali na iye, chidzo chikulu chidampasa mfumu, pontho na kufunika kukulu kukhali na iye kupiringana anthu anango onsene a mfumu." 
Esther5:12 Hamani adathimiza kugaya mbati, “Chinango ninji? Matsano Estere adachita phwandombachemera mfumu na ine ene basi nee unango tayu, pontho mangwana tachemerwa pontho kontho-konthoko." 
Esther5:13 Kwache pyonsenepi nee pikundikwana tayu sindzidzi nkhuona kwene Moredekai Myuda, thubu wa kunyumba yachifumu.”" 
Esther5:14 Mkazache na ashamwali ache adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Sasanyisani chimuti chakulapha, makhono makumawiri na awiri mbamupemphe mfumu mangwana na machibese kuti Moredekai amanikwe penepo. Mungamala penepo imwe na mfumu munakwanisa kwenda pyanu kuphwando mwakukomerwa.” Manyerezero enewa adamkomera Hamani, tenepo adasasanyisa chimuti chile." 
Esther6:1 Mosiku onthowo mfumu hadachione chitulo tayu, natenepo adachemeresa mabukhu a mbiri mule mudalembwa pya ufumu wache kuti awerengwe pamaso pache." 
Esther6:2 Khundu idawerenga iwo ikhathimizapo mbiri yakulonga pya mule mudatchululira Moredekai pya upandu ukhafuna chitirwa mfumu, ule udasasanya mathubu ache awiri, Bigitana na Tereshi, anyakukapalwi akhalondali masubi a mfumu ale." 
Esther6:3 Mfumu adavunza mbati, “Apo Moredekai tamulemedza tani thangwi ya kuchita penepi?” Anyabasache ale adatawira mbati, “Nkhabe na chibodzi chene tayu chachitirwa iye.”" 
Esther6:4 Mfumu adavunza mbati, “Ayi alipo m'nyumba muno mbodzi wa mathubu anga?” Pandzidzi wenewo Hamani akhapita kwene muchintalo cha nyumba ile; iye akhadza dzapempha mfumu kuti Moredekai amanikwe pamuti ukhadasasanya iye kale ule." 
Esther6:5 Natenepo anyabasache ale adatawira mbati, “Hamani ali muno akudikhira kuonana namwe.” Mfumu adatawira mbati, “Mpitiseni muno.”" 
Esther6:6 Natenepo Hamani adapita, tenepo mfumu adalonga mbati, “Pana munthu unango anafuna ine kuti ndimulemedze pyakwanga. Apo munthu weneyu ndimchitirenji?” Hamani adalonga yekha ene mumtima mwache mbati, “Mbani pontho wakuthema kulemedzwa pyakwanga na mfumu? Ndine ene pano basi.”" 
Esther6:7 Natenepo iye adatawira mfumu mbati, “Tongani kuti mikhanjo yachifumu idzeswe pano kuti munthu weneyu avale, mikhanjo imbavala imwe makayo, pontho apakire kavalo ambapakira imwe wakukhala na chidzindikiro chachifumu mumsolo mwache." 
Esther6:8  
Esther6:9 Kubuluka penepo pangani thubu wamkululetu kuti amvazike munthu weneyu mikhanjoyo, pontho amfambise uku apakira pakavalo kugwanda na pachintalo cha mumzinda. Thubu wamkululetuyo mbalonge mwakugaluza fala pinafamba iwo kuti, ‘Ngayang'anani mule mumbafupira mfumu munthu anafuna iye kumulemedzayo!’ ”" 
Esther6:10 Mfumu adalonga kuna Hamani mbati, “Chimbiza ukwate mikhanjo na kavalo mbupereke chilemedzo chenechi kuna Moredekai Myuda. Mchitire pyonsene pyanyerezera iwe panopi. Iwe unamgumana ali pabasache m'nyumba yachifumu ino.”" 
Esther6:11 Natenepo Hamani adakwata mikhanjo na kavalo ule mbavazika Moredekai. Moredekai adapakira kavalo ule, Hamani adamfambisa kugwanda na pachintalo cha mumzinda uku akhalonga mwakugaluza fala pikhafamba iwo mbati, “Ngayang'anani mule mumbafupira mfumu munthu anafuna iye kumulemedzayo!”" 
Esther6:12 Kubuluka penepo Moredekai adenda kubasache m'nyumba yachifumu, mwenemo Hamani adachimbiza kwenda kumusa kwache uku nkhope yache yamala tota na manyadzo." 
Esther6:13 Iye adapanga Zeresi mkazache na ashamwali ache onsene pyonsene pikhadamchitikira pile. Natenepo mkazi ule pabodzi pene na ashamwali ache a nzeru ale, adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Iwe watoma kuchepa mphamvu kuna Moredekai. Iye ndi Myuda, tenepo hunamkwanisave kumkwira pamsolo tayu. Iwe unati umgodamire basi.”" 
Esther6:14 Anthu ale mbali m'kati kulonga na Hamani, mathubu awiri akukapalwi a mfumu, adafika mbakwata Hamani mwakuchimbiza kwenda naye kuphwando idasasanya Estere ile." 
Esther7:1 Natenepo mfumu na Hamani adenda kadya na Estere. 
Esther7:2 Pansiku yachiwiriyi pikhamwa iwo vinyu ule, mfumu adavunza pontho Estere mbati, “Matsano Estere, chinafuna iwe ninji? Ngandipange chinati chiperekwe kuna iwe. Ndinati ndikupase podi na theka ya ufumu wangawu.”" 
Esther7:3 Matsano Estere adatawira mbati, “Ngakhala pinakukomerani mfumu kuchita chinthu chinafuna ine kukupemphani; chinafuna ine ntchakuti ine ndikhale na moyo, pontho anthu a mtundu wanga akhale na moyo." 
Esther7:4 Anthu a mtundu wanga na ine ene taguliswa kuti tivungwe, tiphiwe na kupuluzwa. Mbapidakhala kuti nkhuguliswa kwene mbatikhala mabitchu, mbidakhala pyanga kwene mulomo phoo, thangwi chenechi mbichidakhala chinthu ching'ono kunensa nacho mfumu.”" 
Esther7:5 Mfumu Ahasuwero adavunza Matsano Estere mbati, “Mbani awanga mtima kuchita pinthu ninga penepi? Ali kupi iye munthu weneyu?”" 
Esther7:6 Matsano Estere adatawira mbati, “Nyamalwathu pontho nyakutisanyisa ngweneyu, Hamani, munthu wakuipa mtima.” Hamani adaphatwa na mantha pamaso pa mfumu na matsano." 
Esther7:7 Mfumu adalamuka mwakuzhangali mbabuluka m'subi mwache mule kwenda panja m'munda wakuzungulira nyumbache yachifumu ile. Hamani adaona kuti mfumu adanyerezera pyakumtchunyusa thangwi ya penepi, tenepo iye adasalira m'subi kupempha Matsano Estere apulumuse moyo wache." 
Esther7:8 Iye akhadapiponya yekha ene pansi pa kadera pakhakhala Estere pale kumpempha kuti amvere nsisi, pikhapita mfumu m'subi mule kubulukira kumunda. Pidaona mfumu penepi adakhuwa mbati, “Kani munthu weneyu anafuna kuphatirira matsano panoletu pamaso panga, pontho m'nyumba mwanga muno?” Sindzidzi mfumu nkhulonga penepi anyabasache adammanga kunkhope." 
Esther7:9 Haribona mbodzi wa mathubu akukapalwi akutumikira mfumu adalonga mbati, “Pana muti wakulapha makhono makumawiri na mawiri chifupi na pamsuwo wa Hamani; iye akhadausasanya kuti amanikepo Moredekai, ule adapulumusa moyo wa mfumu pakutoma pale.” Mfumu adalonga mbati, “Hamani mbamanikwe pamuti wenewo.”" 
Esther7:10 Natenepo Hamani adamanikwa pamuti ukhadasasanya iye kuti amanikepo Moredekai ule. Penepo kuzhangali kwa mfumu kudamala. 
Esther8:1 Nsiku yonthoyo Mfumu Ahasuwero adapereka kuna Matsano Estere pinthu pyonsene pya Hamani, nyamalwa wa Ayuda. Estere adapanga mfumu kuti Moredekai akhali mbaleache, tenepo Moredekai adadzeswa pamaso pa mfumu." 
Esther8:2 Mfumu adadula mphete ya kuchala chache yakukhala na chidindo chache, ile ikhadapokosera iye Hamani, mbaipereka kuna Moredekai. Estere adaikha Moredekai kukhala nyakuyang'anira mfuma ya Hamani." 
Esther8:3 Kubuluka penepo Estere adalonga pontho kuna mfumu mwakupiponya pamanyalo a mfumu mbalira. Iye adapempha mfumu kuti achitepo pinthu kukhondesa upandu udasasanya Hamani, chidzukulu cha Agagi, kusasanyira Ayuda." 
Esther8:4 Mfumu adamthonya na ndodo yache yagolidi, tenepo iye adalamuka mbalonga mbati," 
Esther8:5 “Ngakhala pinakukomerani mfumu pontho ngakhala mumbatsalakana pya ine, pontho ngakhala penepi mphyakuthema pamaso panu, ndaphata miyendo tongani kuti pinthu pidatonga Hamani pileke chitika, matongero ale adapereka Hamani mwana Hamedata, chidzukulu cha Agagi, kuti Ayuda onsene amale vungwa m'nthemba zonsene za ufumu wanu." 
Esther8:6 Ayi ine ndinakwanisa tani kupirira ngakhala kuvungika kweneku kunadza pana anthu a mtundu wanga, pontho kuti abale anga ene amale phiwa?”" 
Esther8:7 Mfumu Ahasuwero adalonga kuna Matsano Estere na Moredekai Myuda ule mbati, “Ngayang'anani ine ndamanika Hamani thangwi ya upandu ukhadasasanyira iye Ayuda, pontho ndapereka mfuma ya Hamani kuna Estere." 
Esther8:8 Mbwenye kulonga pya utongi ule udaperekwa na dzina ya mfumu mbudindwa na chidindo cha mfumu nkhabe sanduzika tayu. Kwache munakwanisa kulembera Ayuda onsene konsene kwene kunakhala iwo pyonsene pinafuna imwe; pontho munakwanisa kuilemba na dzinanga mbamudinda na chidindo changa chachifumu.” 
Esther8:9 Penepi pidachitika pansiku yamakumawiri na chitatu ya mwezi wachitatu wa Sivani. Moredekai adachemeresa anyakulemba onsene a mfumu mbaalembesa makalata akwenda kuna Ayuda, akulu aboma, anyakufambisa boma na kuna mathubu onsene kunthemba zonsene dzana na makumawiri na zinomwe; kutomera ku India mpakana ku Sudani makalata akwenda kunthemba zonsene malingana na chilongero pontho malembero awo, pontho na kuna Ayuda na chilongero pontho malembero awo." 
Esther8:10 Moredekai adalembesa makalata ale na dzina ya Mfumu Ahasuwero mbaadinda na chidindo chachifumu. Makalata ale adatumizwa pakuphatisa basa anyakupakira akavalo akuthamanga pyakwanga a kunyumba yachifumu. 
Esther8:11 Makalata enewa akhalonga kuti: “Mfumu atawirisa Ayuda a m'mizinda yonsene kuti apisasanyikire okha ene kupitchinjiriza. Ngakhala anyankhondo a dzinza inango m'nthemba zonsene anasosa amuna a Chiyuda na anawo, pontho na akazawo, Ayuda anakwanisa kubwezera na kuvunga anyakuasosa. Iwo anakwanisa kuapha onsenewo mbakwata pinthu pyawo." 
Esther8:12 Matongero enewa athema kuphata basa muufumu onsene wa Peresia kutomera pansiku idasasanyirwa kuphiwa kwa Ayuda, nsiku yakhumi na chitatu ya mwezi wa Adara, mwezi wakhumi na chiwiri." 
Esther8:13 Penepi pyathema kulalikwa ninga mwambo mbuvekeswa kuna munthu onsene m'nthemba zonsene, towera Ayuda asasanyike kubwezera anyamalwawo, nsiku yeneyo ingafika.”" 
Esther8:14 Na kutongwa na mfumu, anyakupakira akavalo akuthamanga pyakwanga ale, adautoma ulendo. Utongi ule udavekeswa, pontho mu Susa mumzinda ukulu ule." 
Esther8:15 Moredekai adabuluka kunyumba yachifumu uku avala mkhanjo wachifumu wamsuzi wanyemba pontho wakuchena, chakufinika cha thonje yadidi yakufira, pontho na chipewu chachifumu chagolidi chakuyetimira. Natenepo mzinda onsene wa Susa udadzala na mkhuwo wakusekera na kukomerwa." 
Esther8:16 Pakati pa Ayuda pakhali kukomerwa pontho kutsanzaya, kusekera, pontho na chilemedzo." 
Esther8:17 Konsene kwene kudawerengwa matongero a mfumu ale, mumzinda na m'nthemba, Ayuda adakomerwa, adasekera, adachita phwando mbapuma pa basawo. Na thangwi ya penepi anthu azinji adasanduka Ayuda thangwi ndzidzi wenewo akhachita nawo mantha." 
Esther9:1 Nsiku yakhumi na chitatu ya mwezi wa Adara idafika, nsiku idathema kuchitika matongero a mfumu, nsiku ikhanyerezera anyamalwa a Ayuda kuti anaakunda ile. Mbwenye m'mbuto mwache Ayuda ndiye adaakunda." 
Esther9:2 M'mbuto zikhakhala Ayuda mumzinda onsene muufumu mule, iwo adagumanyikana kusasanyika kubwezera munthu onsene anayesera pyakuakuwazayo. Nkhabe na mbodzi ene adakwanisa kuimisana nawo tayu, thangwi anthu onsene a madzinza anango akhachita nawo mantha." 
Esther9:3 Tenepo mathubu onsene a m'nthemba zonsene, akulu-akulu a boma na anyakufambisa pinthu pya mfumu adaaphedza Ayuda, thangwi akhachita mantha na Moredekai." 
Esther9:4 Pidadziwika muufumu monsene mule kuti Moredekai akhali munthu wakufunika pyakwanga m'nyumba yachifumu; mbiri yache idafalikira konsene kwene, pontho akhathimiza kukula mphamvu." 
Esther9:5 Natenepo Ayuda adakwanisa kuchita pinthu pikhafuna iwo kuna anyamalwawo. Iwo adaamenya na matalasadawo mbaavunga, pontho kuchita pyakuakomera kuna anyakuazonda onsene." 
Esther9:6 Mu Susa, mzinda ukulu, Ayuda adapha amuna madzana mashanu." 
Esther9:7 Pakati pa anyakufawo pakhali ana khumi a Hamani mwana Hemadata, nyamalwa wa Ayuda: Parashandata, Dalifoni, Asipata, Porata, Adalia, Aridata, Parimashita, Arisai, Aridai na Vaizata. Kwache pakhali nkhabe kupokosera pinthu tayu." 
Esther9:8  
Esther9:9  
Esther9:10  
Esther9:11 Nsiku yonthoyo mfumu adapangwa konta ya anthu akhadaphiwa mu Susa ale. 
Esther9:12 Kubuluka penepo mfumu adalonga kuna Matsano Estere mbati, “Mu Susa mokha muno Ayuda apha amuna madzana mashanu kuthimizapo ana khumi a Hamani. Ninji pontho chathema iwo kuchita m'nthemba? Chinafuna iwe pontho ninji? Unati upaswe. Ngandipange, ninji chinafuna iwe pontho? Unati upaswe.”" 
Esther9:13 Estere adatawira mbati, “Ngakhala pinakukomerani mfumu, tawirisani Ayuda a mu Susa kuti mangwana achite pontho pile pidatawiriswa iwo kuchita lero. Pontho tongani kuti mitembo ya ana khumi a Hamani imanikwe pamiti.”" 
Esther9:14 Mfumu adatongadi kuti penepi pichitike, tenepo pidalalikwa mu Susa monsene mule. Mitembo ya ana khumi a Hamani idamanikwa pakwecha." 
Esther9:15 Pansiku yakhumi na chinayi ya mwezi wa Adara, Ayuda a mu Susa adagumanyikana pontho mbapha amuna anango madzana matatu mumzindamo. Kwache pontho pakhali nkhabe kupokosera pinthu tayu." 
Esther9:16 Ayuda a m'nthemba zinango adasasanyikirambo mbapitchinjiriza okha ene. Iwo adatswaira anyamalwawo onsene pakupha pikwi makumanomwe na pishanu akhaazonda ale. Kwache pakhali nkhabe kupokosera pinthu tayu. 
Esther9:17 Yeneyi ikhali nsiku yakhumi na chitatu ya mwezi wa Adara. Pansiku inango yakhumi na chinayi pakhali nkhabe kuphana, tenepo nsiku yeneyo idachitiswa kukhala nsiku yakukomerwa yakuchita phwando." 
Esther9:18 Kwache Ayuda a mu Susa adachitisa nsiku yakhumi na chishanu kukhala nsiku yakupuma pabasa, thangwi iwo akhadapha anyamalwawo pansiku yakhumi na chitatu, pontho na pansiku yakhumi na chinayi mbaleka pansiku yakhumi na chishanu." 
Esther9:19 Ndi thangwi yache Ayuda akukhala m'maluwani ang'ono-ang'ono ambakoya nsiku yeneyo yakhumi na chinayi ya mwezi wa Adara kukhala nsiku yakusekera pontho yakupuma pabasa, ndzidzi wakuchita phwando na kupereka mitukwa kuna unango na mwanzache." 
Esther9:20 Moredekai adalemba pikhadachitika pile mbatumiza makalata kuna Ayuda onsene achifupi na akutali ene muufumu onsene wa Aperesi," 
Esther9:21 kuapanga kuti akoye nsiku yakhumi na chinayi, pontho na nsiku yakhumi na chishanu ya mwezi wa Adara kukhala nsiku yakupuma pabasa chaka na chaka." 
Esther9:22 Zenezi zikhali nsiku zidapuluza Ayuda anyamalwawo; wenewu ndiye ukhali mwezi ule ukhadasanduzika kubuluka ndzidzi wa kulira na kusintili kukhala ndzidzi wakukomerwa na kusekera. Iwo adapangwa kukoya nsiku zenezi pakuchita maphwando, kupereka mitukwa kuna unango na mwanzache, pontho kuna anyakutcherenga." 
Esther9:23 Natenepo Ayuda adateweza pidaapanga Moredekai pile, tenepo phwando ile idasanduka mtemo ene chaka na chaka." 
Esther9:24 Hamani mwana Hamedata, ule akhali chidzukulu cha Agagi pontho nyamalwa wa Ayuda onsene, akhachita ntsango (penu Purimu ninga mukhalongera iwo) towera adziwe nsiku ikhafuna iwo kuvunga Ayuda; iye akhadasasanya pyakuapuluziratu." 
Esther9:25 Mbwenye pidava mfumu pya upandu wenewu, iye adatonga mwakuchita kulemba m'makalata kuti Hamani ndiye adathema kuona nyatwa ikhadasasanyira iye Ayuda ile. Iye na anache adamanikwa pamiti." 
Esther9:26 Ndi thangwi yache nsiku zakupumazi zikhachemerwa Purimu. Na thangwi ya kalata ya Moredekai, pontho na pyonsene pikhadaachitikira pile," 
Esther9:27 Ayuda adapisasanyira okha ene mwambo pabodzi pene na pidzukulu pyawo, pontho na ale ene akhafuna kusanduka Ayuda kuti pandzidzi wakuthema chaka na chaka, nsiku ziwirizi zikoyiwe malingana na pidalonga Moredekai pile." 
Esther9:28 Nsiku zenezi zidathema kukumbukwa na kukoyiwa na mfendu onsene pontho na banja yonsene m'nthemba zonsene na m'mizinda yonsene. Pontho nsiku zenezi za Purimu mbizileke mbombowa pakati pa Ayuda, penu kuduwalirwa na pidzukulu pyawo na pang'ono pene." 
Esther9:29 Natenepo Matsano Estere mwana wamkazi wa Abihaili pabodzi pene na Moredekai Myuda adalemba kalata inango kutsikimizira na utongi wache onsene kalata ikhadalemba Moredekai yakulonga pya Purimu pakutoma ile. 
Esther9:30 Makalata akuafunira pyadidi na achitchinjirizo adatumizwa kuna Ayuda onsene a m'nthemba dzana na makumawiri na zinomwe za ufumu wa Ahasuwero 
Esther9:31 kuti akhazikise nsiku zenezi za Phwando ya Purimu na pandzidzi wache wakuthema, ninga montho mudaatongera Moredekai Myuda na Matsano Estere, pontho ninga montho mukhadakhazikisira iwo okha ene na pidzukulu pyawo ndzidzi wakupimana kudya na kulira." 
Esther9:32 Utongi wa Estere wakutsikimizira matongero akulonga pya Purimu adalembwa mumpukutu. 
Esther10:1 Mfumu Ahasuwero adakhomesa msonkho pakati pa anthu muufumu mwache, ale akhakhala m'khundu-khundu mwa bara, pontho na a m'bwalo ene." 
Esther10:2 Ukulu wache na pyonsene pyamphamvu pidachita iye, pontho na mule mudapasira iye Moredekai chidzo chikulu pyalembwa m'mabukhu a mafumu a ku Media na Peresia." 
Esther10:3 Moredekai Myuda akhali wachiwiri wa Mfumu Ahasuwero. Iye akhalemedzwa pikulu, pontho kufunwa pyakwanga na Ayuda anzache. Iye adaphata basa mwakukomera anthu ache, pontho kutchinjiriza pidzukulu pyawo pyonsene." 
Job1:1 Pakhali munthu unango m'dziko ya Uzi dzinache Yobu. Iye akhapembedza Mulungu pontho akhali wakukhulupirika kuna iye. Iye akhali munthu wadidi pontho wakuchita mphole-mphole gopesera kuchita chakuipa. 
Job1:2 Iye akhali na ana anomwe achimuna pontho ana atatu achikazi 
Job1:3 mbafuya mabira pikwi pinomwe, ngamila pikwi pitatu, ng'ombe chikwi chibodzi na mabulu madzana mashanu. Iye akhali pontho na anyabasa azinji, pontho akhali wakufuma pyakwanga pakati pa anthu onsene akumabulukiro dzuwa." 
Job1:4 Ana achimuna a Yobu akhachita phwando m'misa mwawo mwakuchita kupitisirana. Penepo onsene a iwo akhagumanyikana, pontho ndzidzi onsene akhachemera anyamaingawo atatu ale kuti akhale nawo." 
Job1:5 Bzobzo na machibese onsene, angamala chita phwando yawo, Yobu akhalamuka mbapereka nsembe kuna Mulungu thangwi ya anache onsene kuachenesa pamaso pa Mulungu. Iye akhachita penepi ndzidzi onsene thangwi akhanyerezera kuti mwinango mbodzi wa anachewo adawa pakutikana Mulungu mumtima mwawo." 
Job1:6 Nsiku inango angelo adadza dzaonekera pamaso pa MBUYA, tenepo Satana akhali nawombo penepo." 
Job1:7 MBUYA adamvunza mbati, “Ukubulukira kupi?” Satana adatawira mbati, “Ndikhaponda-ponda pontho kuzunga-zunga pyanga m'dziko yapansi.”" 
Job1:8 MBUYA adamvunza mbati, “Ayi wamuona tani nyabasanga Yobu? Nkhabe pontho padziko yapansi munthu wakukhulupirika ninga iye tayu. Iye ambandipembedza pontho ambachita mphole-mphole gopesera kuchita chakuipa.”" 
Job1:9 Satana adatawira mbati, “Ayi mukunyerezera kuti ambakupembedzani kwene pezi pene?" 
Job1:10 Ndzidzi onsene mumbatchinjiriza iye, banjache na pyonsene pina iye. Imwe mumbatsanzayisa pyonsene pimbachita iye, pontho mwampasa ng'ombe zizinji zakudzala m'dziko monsene." 
Job1:11 Imwe mungambulusira kwene pyonsene pina iye, anati akutikaneni maso na maso!”" 
Job1:12 MBUYA adatawira mbati, “Pyakoma, pyonsene pina iye ndapiikha m'manja mwako, kwache Yobu ene mwenechiro leka kumkuwaza.” Natenepo Satana adenda pyache." 
Job1:13 Nsiku inango pikhachita ana a Yobu phwando m'nyumba ya mbaleawo wautombo," 
Job1:14 nyamphangwa adadza mbathamanga kuna Yobu mbalonga mbati, “Ife tikhatipula kuminda na ng'ombe, pontho mabulu akhadya chifupi na penepo." 
Job1:15 Mwakututumusa Asabea adadza mbaba pyonsene pile mbapha anyabasanu onsene kupambula ine. Ndapulumuka ndine ene basi kuti ndilonge kuna imwe pinthu penepi.” 
Job1:16 Iye mbadzati malisa kulonga, nyabasa unango adadza kuna Yobu mbalonga mbati, “Njazi yapha mabira na amakabuswa onsene. Ndapulumuka ndine ene basi kuti ndilonge kuna imwe pinthu penepi.”" 
Job1:17 Iye mbadzati malisa kulonga, nyabasa unango adadza kuna Yobu mbalonga mbati, “Magulu matatu a Chikaladea adatifikira mbakwata ngamila zanu kwenda nazo, pontho mbapha anyabasanu onsene. Ndapulumuka ndine ene basi kuti ndilonge kuna imwe pinthu penepi.”" 
Job1:18 Iye mbadzati malisa kulonga, nyabasa unango adadza kuna Yobu mbalonga mbati, “Ananu akhachita phwando kumsuwo wa mwananu wautombo." 
Job1:19 Pidagundika chonzi, chidagwisa nyumbayo mbipha onsene akhali mwenemowo. Ndapulumuka ndine ene basi kuti ndilonge kuna imwe pinthu penepi.”" 
Job1:20 Natenepo Yobu adaimira mbang'amba nguwo zache, pontho adachinga mpala kuonesa kusintili kwache. Tenepo adalamba" 
Job1:21 mbalonga mbati, “Ndidabuluka chipezi-pezi m'mimba mwa mama, chimanja-manja ndinaenda kumasiye. MBUYA akhadapereka, mbwenye lero apoka. Dzinache mbilemedzwe!”" 
Job1:22 Podi kwene kuti pyonsenepi pikhadachitika kuna Yobu, iye hadadawe tayu pakuthonya chala Mulungu." 
Job2:1 Nsiku inango pontho angelo adadza dzaonekera pamaso pa MBUYA, tenepo Satana akhali nawombo penepo." 
Job2:2 MBUYA adamvunza mbati, “Ukubulukira kupi?” Satana adatawira mbati, “Ndikhaponda-ponda pontho kuzunga-zunga pyanga m'dziko yapansi.”" 
Job2:3 MBUYA adamvunza mbati, “Ayi waonako nyabasanga Yobu? Nkhabe pontho padziko yapansi munthu wakukhulupirika ninga iye tayu? Iye ambandipembedza pontho ambachita mphole-mphole gopesera kuchita chakuipa. Podi kwene kuti pakutoma iwe udandikhakhamiza kuti ndikutawirise kamchita pyakuipa wakusowa na thangwi ene, iye akuthimiza kukhala wakukhulupirika ninga pakutoma pale.”" 
Job2:4 Satana adatawira mbati, “Munthu anakwanisa kutaya pyache pyonsene towera iye akhale na moyo." 
Job2:5 Mbwenye chinchino pichiteni kumkuwaza manungo ache. Iye anati akutikaneni maso na maso.” 
Job2:6 Natenepo Mulungu adalonga kuna Satana mbati, “Pyakoma, iye ali m'manja mwako, kwache leka kumpha.”" 
Job2:7 Tenepo Satana adabuluka pamaso pa Mulungu mbachitisa manungo onsene a Yobu kubuluka pironda. 
Job2:8 Yobu adenda mbakhala pakhuku mbakwata dzinga kutchera nayo pironda pyache pile. 
Job2:9 Mkazache adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ayi ukuthimiza basi kukhala wakukhulupirika ninga pakutoma pale? Tikana Mulungu, mbufe pyako?”" 
Job2:10 Yobu adatawira mbati, “Pinalonga iwepi mphyapezi-pezi! Mulungu angatitumizira pinthu pyadidi, ife timbapitambira na manja mawiri. Apo tinadungunyiranji iye angatitumizira nyatwa?” Podi kwene kuti Yobu adaona nyatwa yonseneyi, iye hadalonge chinthu na chibodzi chene chakuipa tayu." 
Job2:11 Ashamwali atatu a Yobu akhali: Elifazi wa Chitemani, Bilidadi wa Chishuhi, na Zofari wa Chinaama. Pidava iwo kusanyika kudachita Yobu, iwo adanyerezera pyakwenda kamuombera." 
Job2:12 Pikhali iwo kutali pang'ono na pakhali Yobu pale, iwo adamuona kwache iwo hadamdzindikire tayu. Tenepo pidamdzindikira iwo, adatoma kulira, kung'amba nguwo zawo pontho adawaza fumbi mumsolo mwawo kuonesa kutsukwala." 
Job2:13 Kubuluka penepo iwo adakhala pansi pa mataka pabodzi pene na Yobu, nsiku zinomwe mosiku na masikati okhonda longa chinthu na chibodzi chene, thangwi iwo adaona kusanyika kukulu kudachita Yobu kule." 
Job3:1 Pakumalisira pache Yobu adabulusa fala mbatemberera nsiku idabalwa iye. 
Job3:2 Iye adalonga mbati," 
Job3:3 “Nsiku idabalwa ine mbitembererwe, mbutembererwe mosiku udandikwatira mama mimba!" 
Job3:4 Nsiku yeneyo mbisanduke pyayo mdima; Mulungu wa kudzulu mbaleke kuitsalakanave; cheza mbichileke kuonekave pansiku yeneyo. 
Job3:5 Mdima na mthunzi ukulu mbipiphimbire nsiku yeneyo; makole mbakhale padzulu pache; kuswipa kwache mbukukunde cheza chache. 
Job3:6 Mosiku wenewo, mdima wa ndiwe ani mbukugwere, pontho mbileke werengerwa ninga ibodzi mwa nsiku za chaka, penu kuikhwa pansiku za mwezi." 
Job3:7 Mosiku wenewo mbukhale wakuuma nthumbo; mkhuwo wakusekera mbuleke vekave mosiku wenewo. 
Job3:8 Anyakudziwa kutemberera, ale mbanyaluso kulamusa Leviatani mbatemberere pyawo nsiku yeneyo." 
Job3:9 Nthandache mbisanduke mdima; mbidikhire papezi kuchena kwa kunja, pontho mbakhonde kuona manyika," 
Job3:10 thangwi mosiku wenewo hudafunge tayu misuwo ya nthumbo, towera ndileke ona nyatwa ninga yeneyi." 
Job3:11 “Thangwi yache ninji ndidakhonda kufa pyanga mfutete m'mimba, pontho kufa pyanga pikhabuluka ine m'mimba?" 
Job3:12 Thangwi yache ninji mama adandiikha pamiyendo mbandipasa bele kundiyamwisa? 
Job3:13 Thangwi chinchino mbidagona pyanga mumtendere; ine mbidakhala m'chitulo kupuma pyanga," 
Job3:14 pabodzi pene na mafumu pontho mapungu a dziko yapansi, ale adapimangira okha ene mbuto zile chinchino zasanduka madembe," 
Job3:15 pabodzi pene na atongi ale akhali na golidi, ale adadzaza nyumba zawo na siliva." 
Job3:16 Penu ndidatani khonda ikhwa m'masiye ninga mwana wakubwerera kunjira, ninga kachiya ule chipo hadzati kuona kunja tayu?" 
Job3:17 Kumasiye kule anyakuipa nkhabe onesave anthu nyatwa tayu, pontho anyakutopa ali pyawo gadaa." 
Job3:18 Kweneko podi na anyaperezo ene ali pamtendere, pontho aleka kuva fala ya anyakuayang'anira avinga." 
Job3:19 Anyakuveka na anyakukhonda veka ene ali kweneko, pontho na mabitchu ene ngakusudzuka kuna ambuyawo." 
Job3:20 “Thangwi yache ninji anyakusanyika mukuatawirisa kuona cheza, pontho anyakuva kupha mukuatawirisa kukhala na moyo?" 
Job3:21 Chinadikhira iwo chene nkhufa basi, kwache imfa hikudza tayu; iwo ambasaka-saka imfa pikulu pene kupiringana mfuma yakubisika." 
Job3:22 Iwo ambakomerwa na kusekera pyakwanga angafika m'masiye. 
Job3:23 Mulungu ambaabisira tsogolo yawo mbaatsekereza kukhundu zonsene. 
Job3:24 M'mbuto mwa kudya, ine ndikulira, pontho ine nkhabe kwanisa leka kubulira tayu." 
Job3:25 Chonsene chikhagopa ine, lero chandigwera; chonsene chikhachita na ine mantha, lero chandifikira." 
Job3:26 Mumtima mwanga nkhabemo mtendere, nkhabemo kupuma; nyatwa zanga nkhabeve dzamala tayu.”" 
Job4:1 Tenepo Elifazi wa Chitemani adatawira mbati," 
Job4:2 “Ayi Yobu, unaswirizwa napyo ngakhala ine ndinalongapo? Apo mbani anakwanisa khala kwene mulomo phoo?" 
Job4:3 Nyerezera mule mudafunzisira iwe anthu azinji, pontho mule mudawangisira iwe manja akusowa mphamvu." 
Job4:4 Ngakhala unango adagwegweduka, penu alebwedeka manungo, mafalako akhamuwangisa mtima mbaimira." 
Job4:5 Kwache lero ndiwembo ukuona nyatwa, pontho iwe waswirizwa napyo mbutayiratu mtima." 
Job4:6 Iwe udapembedza Mulungu, pontho moyo wako ukhali nkhabe chinthu chakupokanyisa; apo iwe hudatheme tayu kukhala na chidikhiro pontho chikhulupiro?" 
Job4:7 “Nyerezera pya penepi: mbani munthu okhonda dawa adatoma kuona nyatwa ninga tenepa? Nkhupi munthu wakulungama adatoma kuvungika ninga tenepa? 
Job4:8 Ine ndaona kuti anthu ale ambabzala pyakuipa, pontho kufesa umambala, ambavunambo pyonthopyo." 
Job4:9 Ninga chonzi Mulungu adamala kuatswaira onsenewo; na ukali wache iwo adamala vungika. 
Job4:10 Anyakudawa ambabangula ninga nkhalamu, kwache Mulungu ambaamatamisa mbaakhutcha mano." 
Job4:11 Ninga nkhalamu yakusowa nyama, iwo ambafa, pontho anawo ambamala balalika." 
Job4:12 “Nsiku inango mphangwa zidadza kuna ine chibiso-biso, mwachiwere-were pyakwanga mwakuti ine sidazivesese tayu." 
Job4:13 Ine ndikhasanyika na ndoto zakugoswa, ndzidzi ukhali anthu m'chitulo chakufa nacho," 
Job4:14 ine ndidaphatwa na mantha mbanditetemera; manungo anga onsene adagedemera. 
Job4:15 Kamphepo kanonono kadapepesa kunkhope kwanga, tenepo tsisi yanga yonsene idanyaula na mantha." 
Job4:16 Kamphepo kale kadaleka. Tenepo chinthu chinango chidaimira kutsogolo kwanga, mbwenye sidakwanise kuona mwadidi makhaliro ache; penepo ndidava fala yachiwere-were ikulonga kuti," 
Job4:17 ‘Ayi munthumbo pyache ambafa ule anakwanisa kukhala wakulungama pamaso pa Mulungu? Ayi iye anakwanisa kukhala wangwiro pamaso pa Nyakumulenga? 
Job4:18 Ngakhala Mulungu nkhabe nyindira anyakumtumikira tayu, ngakhala ambagumana kuphophonyeka pakati pa angelo ache," 
Job4:19 apo nditani na munthu ule adasasanywa na dongo, ule adabulukira kufumbi wakuti anakwanisa kubwededzeka ninga uchenje?" 
Job4:20 Munthu anakwanisa kukhala na moyo machibese, na mawulo mwache mbafa; iye nkhabe dziwa tayu kuti atayika kwenda na kwenda." 
Job4:21 Khumbi yache yamala fudzwa; iye ambafa wakusowa nzeru.’ ” 
Job5:1 “Yobu, chemera ngakhala unaona unango wakukutawira? Ayi alipo mngelo unango kule kunakwanisa iwe zungunukirako?" 
Job5:2 Thangwi kuzhangali kumbapha pupwe, pontho bivu imbavunga dzemwa." 
Job5:3 Na maso anga ndaona pupwe akumera mitsitsi, mbwenye vumbu-vumbu musache udatembererwa." 
Job5:4 Anache nkhabe mbuto yakupata tayu, iwo ambaponderezwa m'thando ya miseru mbasowa nyakuavunulira." 
Job5:5 Anthu a njala anadya phoso yache, podi na mapira ene akumera pakati pa ntcheswa, pontho anthu anyota anasirira mfumache." 
Job5:6 Kusanyika nkhabe kumera m'mataka, penu nyatwa kutumbuka kubulukira pansi tayu." 
Job5:7 Andedi! Munthu ambabalirwa kuona nyatwa, ninga mumbachitira ntchasi kuthothomuka pamoto." 
Job5:8 “Ine mbidakhala ndiwepo mbidayang'ana kuna Mulungu, pontho mbidenda na mseru wanga kuna iye." 
Job5:9 Iye ambachita pyakudodomesa, pile ife nkhabe kupivesa tayu, pontho pyakudzudzumisa pyokhonda lengeseka." 
Job5:10 Iye ambavumbisa mvula padziko yapansi mbawazira minda. 
Job5:11 Ande, ndi Mulungu ule ambakwiza anyakupichepesa mbapereka kukomerwa kuna anyakusintili." 
Job5:12 Iye ambapotoza manyerezero aumpheswe mbakwesha anyakuchenjera papinthu pinanyerezera iwo kupichita, towera apichimwane monsene mwene." 
Job5:13  
Job5:14 Mdima umbaagwera na masikati; uku dzuwa ikuswa miti iwo ambamphamphasa-mphamphasa khala ninga mosiku. 
Job5:15 Mbwenye Mulungu ambapulumusa anyakutcherenga kuimfa; iye ambapulumusa anyakusowa kuna kuponderezwa. 
Job5:16 Iye ambapereka chidikhiro kuna anyakutcherenga; iye ambamatamisa anyakusowa chilungamo. 
Job5:17 “Nyakutsanzaya ngule Mulungu angamsumulula! Ungadawa leka khonda kutchunyuswa na Nyamphamvu zonsene. 
Job5:18 Mulungu ambamanga pironda pyachitisa iye; manjache ambakuwaza; manjache onthowo ambapolesa. 
Job5:19 Nyatwa zingakugwera katanthatu, iye anakupulumusa; podi zingakugwera kanomwe kene, iwe nkhabe kuwazika na pang'ono pene tayu." 
Job5:20 Njala ingafika iye anakukoya na moyo, pontho pankhondo anakutchinjiriza towera uleke kufa." 
Job5:21 Mulungu anakutchinjiza kuna lulume yakupha, iye anakupulumusa kuvungika kungadza." 
Job5:22 Pandzidzi wa pyakuzunguzika na njala iwe unaseka, pontho iwe nkhabe dzachita mantha na nyama zam'tsanga tayu." 
Job5:23 Minda inafuna iwe dzalima nkhabe dzakhala na miyala tayu; nyama zam'tsanga nkhabe dzakugoswa tayu. 
Job5:24 Iwe unadziwa kuti panakhala iwepo mphakupata; iwe unalengesa mabirako mbugumana kuti nkhabepo mbodzi akusowapo tayu. 
Job5:25 Iwe unakhala na ana azinji, pontho pidzukulu pyako pinakhala ninga maudzu a padziko yapansi." 
Job5:26 Ninga tirigu ule ambafika mpakana ndzidzi wakuvuna, iwembo unakhala na moyo mpakana unkhalambako." 
Job5:27 Yobu, penepi ife tidapiona mwadidi pandzidzi ukulu ene, pontho mphyakuonadi, natenepo upione ninga pikulonga kuna iwe.”" 
Job6:1 Tenepo Yobu adatawira mbati: 
Job6:2 “Nyatwa zanga mbazidapimwa, pontho kusanyika kwanga konsene mbakudaikhwa pamdida," 
Job6:3 ipyo mbapidalemera pyakwanga kupiringana tchetcha ya pagombe: ndi thangwi yache ndidathamanga na kulonga. 
Job6:4 Matswimo a Nyamphamvu zonsene andilasa, pontho nyongo yache yamala kwana-kwana m'manungo mwangamu. Pyakugoswa pya Mulungu pyandikutira kukhundu zonsene." 
Job6:5 “Ayi bulu ambalira angagwedula maudzu, penu ng'ombe kulira ingadya mpovu?" 
Job6:6 Mbani ambakomerwa na kudya pyadampwa, penu kudya chakuchena cha dzayi chokha?" 
Job6:7 Ine nkhabe maba na kudya ninga kweneko tayu; pyonsene pimbadya ine pimbandisikula kukhosi. 
Job6:8 “Apo thangwi yache ninji Mulungu nkhabe kundipasa chinthu chidampempha ine? Apo atani kuva kupemphera kwanga? 
Job6:9 Mbapidakhala pyadidi Mulungu mbadandipeya pyache; iye mbadandipha kwene pyache mbwenye! 
Job6:10 Penepo ine mbidakomerwa pyakwanga pene, podi ndive pyanga kupha kwa kufa nako tani. Ine sidakhonde matongero a Mulungu, Nyakuchena ule." 
Job6:11 Ndina mphamvu zanji kuti ndithimize basi kukhala na moyo? Thangwi yache ninji kuti ndithimize basi kukhala na moyo, uku ine nkhabe chidikhiro?" 
Job6:12 Kani ine ndine mwala? Ayi manungo anga ndi simbi? 
Job6:13 Ine nkhabe sala na mphamvu tayu kuti ndinakwanisa kupipulumusa ndekha ene tayu; nkhabeve kunango kunakwanisa ine kuzungunukira kuti ndiphedzwe tayu. 
Job6:14 “Munthu wakutaya mtima athema kukhala na ashamwali akunyindirika, gopesera chikhulupiro chache pana Nyamphamvu zonsene chinatayika." 
Job6:15 Kwache imwe ashamwali anga mwandinyengeza ninga mikulo ya madzi akuthamanga, ile imbauma pyawo mvula ingaleka kuvumba," 
Job6:16 mikulo ile yasanduka madzi akuphatana thangwi ya kutonthola, pontho yaphophwa na milu ya matalala." 
Job6:17 Mbwenye kunja kungapisa ipyo pimbamala nyunguluka, pontho m'khundu-khundu mwa mikulo mumbakhala nyimwa pontho mumbauma." 
Job6:18 Anyakupakira ngamila ambatayika thangwi ya kusaka madzi; iwo ambatsalakatika mbafera m'thando yatchetcha. 
Job6:19 Anyakupakira ngamila a ku Tema ambasaka-saka madzi, pontho anyamalonda a ku Sheba ambanyindira madzi enewa." 
Job6:20 Iwo ambataya mtima thangwi ambadikhira kuti anagumana madzi; kwache pidafika iwo kweneko adaphata pakanwa thangwi pakhali kakata. 
Job6:21 Imwe kuna ine mwakhala ninga mikulo yeneyo; imwe mwaona kusanyika kwanga mbamubwerera m'nduli na mantha. 
Job6:22 Ayi ndakupemphani ine kuti mundipase mitukwa, penu na mfumanu mudyekere kuna munthu unango m'mbuto mwanga?" 
Job6:23 Ayi ndakupemphani kuti mundipulumuse m'manja mwa anyamalwanga, penu kundiombola kuna anyakundiboneresa?" 
Job6:24 “Ndifunziseni, tenepo ine ndinati ndikhale mulomo phoo kukuveserani. Ndipangeni pyonsene pyachimwana ine." 
Job6:25 Mafala akuona ambandiphata mtima. Apo pinandipokanya imwepi mphyanji? 
Job6:26 Ngakhala imwe mukunyerezera kuti pinalonga inepi ndi mphepo ene pyayo; apo thangwi yache ninji mukutawira mafala a munthu wakutaya mtima? 
Job6:27 Imwe mumbagwera juga ana masiye mbamugulisa ashamwali anu pamalonda akete-kete. 
Job6:28 Yang'anani kunkhope kwanga. Ine nkhabe nama tayu. 
Job6:29 Imwe mwapita kuchiwisi, lekani khala anthu akusowa chilungamo; lekani kundisumulula, ine ndachita pinthu pyakulungama." 
Job6:30 Ayi imwe mukunyerezera kuti ine ndikunama? Ayi ine nkhabe kwanisa siyanisa pakati pa chadidi na chakuipa tayu?” 
Job7:1 “Moyo wa munthu padziko yapansi ngwakuphata basa mwakubulusa kaluma; nsiku zache zakhala ninga nyaganyo," 
Job7:2 ninga bitchu wakufuna mthunzi wa nonono kutonthola, pontho ninga nyaganyo wakudikhira kupagalwi." 
Job7:3 Mwezi na mwezi ine nkhabe kuona chinakhalira ine na moyo tayu; mosiku onsene kwanga nkhuona nyatwa kwene. 
Job7:4 Ndingati kwene seya ndimbalonga mumtima mwanga kuti, ‘Kunja kunaecha lini kuti ndilamuke?’ Ine ndimbafulukuta-fulukuta mosiku onsene mpakana makalakwecha." 
Job7:5 Manungo anga amala dzala na mfunye zokhokha; ana madazwi okhokha; mafinya akubuluka m'pironda pyanga. 
Job7:6 Nsiku zanga zikumala kwene wakusowa chidikhiro, zikuchita kuthamanga ninga mchere-chere wakuthunkira malitchera." 
Job7:7 “Kumbukani, Mulungu, moyo wanga wakhala ninga muya ene basi; kukomerwa kwanga kwamaliratu." 
Job7:8 Lero mwandiona, kwache mangwana nee munandionave tayu. Imwe munandisaka, kwache nkhabe dzandigumana tayu." 
Job7:9 Ninga mumbachitira makole kukungunuka na kumaliratu, sasawambo na nyakwenda kudziko ya anyakufa nkhabe bwerereko tayu." 
Job7:10 Iye nkhabe dzabwererave kumusa kwache tayu; iye ambaduwalika na anthu onsene ambamdziwa ale. 
Job7:11 Nkhabe, ine nkhabe khala kwene mulomo phoo tayu! Ine ndazhangali pontho mtima ukundipha! Ine ndathema kulongapo pinthu basi." 
Job7:12 “Thangwi yache ninji mukuchita kundilondali? Kani mukunyerezera kuti ndine nyangume? 
Job7:13 Ine ndagona pansi kuti mwinango ndipume. Ine ndikhasaka-saka kululupirwa kuna mtswotswo. 
Job7:14 Kwache imwe mudandithuswa na ndoto mbamundichitisa mantha na masomphenya. 
Job7:15 Mbapidakhala pyadidi kufa pyanga pakuchita kushipwa, kusiyana na kuva kupha m'manungo anga." 
Job7:16 Ndaimisa manja tchii; kukhala na moyo ndatopa nako. Ndisiyeni pyanga, thangwi moyo wanga nkhabeve basa tayu." 
Job7:17 “Munthu mbani kuti imwe mumtsalakane? Iye mbani kuti muiikhe konta pinthu pimbachita iye," 
Job7:18 pontho kuti mumsakanyule mwadidi machibese onsene mbamumuyesa ndzidzi onsene. 
Job7:19 Mwatani munakhonda ponya pyanu maso anu kukhundu, mbamundileka pyanga kuti ndikhudyule mata?" 
Job7:20 Ngakhala ine ndadawa, ine ndakuchitaninji, imwe nyakuyang'ana anthu? Mwandiphatisiranji basa ninga chinthu chakufunzirirapo ponta? Ayi ine ntchakunensa kuna imwe?" 
Job7:21 Mwatani munakhonda kundilekerera pyakudawa pyanga penu kundibulusira umambalanga? Chinchino ndinati ndibwire fumbi. Imwe munandisaka-saka, kwache imwe nkhabe dzandigumana tayu.”" 
Job8:1 Kubuluka penepo Bilidadi wa Chishuhi adatawira mbati: 
Job8:2 “Unaleka lini kulonga mafala ninga enewa? Mafalako ndi mphepo ene pyawo. 
Job8:3 Ayi Mulungu ambapotoza chilungamo? Ayi Nyamphamvu zonsene ambachimwana kuchita pinthu pyakulungama? 
Job8:4 Podi anako adamdawira, natenepo iye adaatchunyusa mwakuthemerana na kudawa kwawo." 
Job8:5 Kwache ngakhala iwe unayang'ana kuna Mulungu mbumdembetera Nyamphamvu zonsene," 
Job8:6 ngakhala iwe ndiwedi wangwiro pontho wakulungama, penepo Mulungu anabwera dzakuphedza, pontho anabwezera pyonsene pya m'nyumba mwako ninga mfupo wako." 
Job8:7 Mfuma yonsene idavungika ile inakhala ninga si pinthu tayu kusangiza na pinthu pinafuna kukupasa Mulungu. 
Job8:8 “Vunza mifendu yakale, unati ugumane pinthu pidagumanikana na makolo awo," 
Job8:9 thangwi ife tabalwa kwene dzulo-dzuloyi; ife nkhabe dziwa chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu, pontho nsiku zathu padziko yapansi pano zakhala ninga chigudu-gudu." 
Job8:10 Ayi iwo nkhabe kukufunzisa penu kukupanga pyakuchita tayu? Ayi iwo nkhabe longa pinthu tayu kubulukira kuna kuvesa kwawo pinthu? 
Job8:11 Ayi chilulu chinakwanisa kumera pakusowa mtota? Ayi mtete unakwanisa kukula pakusowa madzi? 
Job8:12 Madzi angauma, iwo mbali atete, pontho okhonda gwandwa ambachimbiza kuunyala kupiringana pyakumera pinango pyonsene." 
Job8:13 Enewo ndiye mamalisiro ache a munthu onsene wakuduwalira Mulungu; chidikhiro cha munthu okhonda tsalakana pya Mulungu chinatayika. 
Job8:14 Chimbanyindira iye chinathumuka; thangwi chakhala ninga utandaude. 
Job8:15 Iye anatsamira nyumbache, kwache hinawanga tayu; iye anaiphatirira, kwache hinathimiza kukhalapo tayu." 
Job8:16 “Iye akhala ninga mbewu yakuthirirwa mwadidi ndzidzi wa dzuwa, mbitanthawira m'munda monsene." 
Job8:17 Mitsitsi yache imbakolekana-kolekana pakati pa miyala mbiyang'ana-yang'ana mbuto m'miyala. 
Job8:18 Mbwenye ungadulwa pambuto pache, nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene anapidziwa kuti akhali penepo tayu." 
Job8:19 Ndimomwene kuti moyo wache umbaunyala; kubulukira m'mataka mbewu zinango zimbabalwa. 
Job8:20 “Ndimomwene Mulungu nkhabe dzapasa nkhodolo munthu okhonda dawa tayu, penu kuphedza anyakuchita pyakuipa." 
Job8:21 Iye anakuchitisa kusekera, pontho milomo yako inakhuwa na kukomerwa." 
Job8:22 Mbwenye anyamalwako anatota na manyadzo, pontho nyumba za anyakudawika nkhabe dzaonekave tayu.”" 
Job9:1 Kubuluka penepo Yobu adatawira mbati: 
Job9:2 “Ande, ndikupidziwa kuti penepi mphyakuona. Apo munthu ene pyache ambafa ule, anakwanisa tani kukhala wakulungama pamaso pa Mulungu?" 
Job9:3 Podi kwene kuti munthu apifune kuketesana na Mulungu, iye nkhabe kwanisa kutawira mvunzo na ubodzi ene tayu pamivunzo yache chikwi." 
Job9:4 Mulungu ngwanzeru pontho wamphamvu pyakwanga; nkhabe munthu anakwanisa kupokanyisana naye tayu mbakhonda kuwazika. 
Job9:5 Mwakututumusa iye ambafendedza mapiri, pontho na kuzhangali kwache iye ambaagubuduza-gubuduza." 
Job9:6 Mulungu ambatumiza piteke-teke mbatekenya dziko yapansi; iye ambasukhumisa mizati yakuphatisa dziko yapansi. 
Job9:7 Iye anakwanisa kuphata dzuwa kuti ileke buluka; iye ambaphimbira nyenyezi kuti zileke onesa cheza na mosiku. 
Job9:8 Mulungu yekha ndiye adasasanya kudzulu mbaponda pamsana pa nyangume. 
Job9:9 Mulungu adalenga nyenyezi kuthambo, atsikana akugwa mago na mkazi mwezi, pontho mteme ndikutemembo na nyenyezi zakumwera." 
Job9:10 Ife nkhabe kwanisa kuvesa pinthu pikulu pimbachita iye tayu, pontho pyakudodomesa pimbachita iye nkhabe lengeseka tayu." 
Job9:11 “Mulungu angagwanda, ine nkhabe kwanisa kumuona tayu; iye angafika chifupi na ine, ine nkhabe kwanisa kumdzindikira tayu." 
Job9:12 Iye ambagompha chinthu chinafuna iye, tenepo nkhabe munthu anakwanisa kumkhondesa tayu; nkhabe munthu ambawanga mtima tayu kumvunza kuti, ‘Chinachita imwe ninji?’" 
Job9:13 Mulungu nkhabe dzabweza kuzhangali kwache tayu; iye ambapeyeratu anyamalwache, ale adaphedza nyangume Rahabi." 
Job9:14 Kumtawira kwache ndinamtawira tani? Mafala akuti ndiketesane na Mulungu ndinaakwata kupi? 
Job9:15 Podi kwene kuti ine sidadawe tayu, ine nkhabe kwanisa kumtawira tayu; chinakwanisa ine kuchita nkhupempha kwene nsisi kuna Mulungu nyakunditonga mseru." 
Job9:16 Podi kwene kuti ndimchemere mbanditawira, ine nkhabe khulupira tayu kuti anandivesera pinafuna ine kulonga." 
Job9:17 Iye ambatumiza pana ine chonzi mbandipasa pironda wakusowa na thangwi ene. 
Job9:18 Iye nkhabe kufuna pyakundipumisa tayu; achitisa moyo wanga kukhala panyatwa. 
Job9:19 Ayi ndipichite mwakumkhakhamiza, apo ndi Mulungu mphapo? Ayi ndichite kumsumira, apo anafuna kampanga kwenda kumseruko mbani?" 
Job9:20 Ine sidadawe tayu, pontho ndine wakulungama. Mbwenye mafalanga akuveka ninga ine ndadawa, pontho pyonsene pinalonga ine pikundichitisa kukonwa." 
Job9:21 Ine sidadawe tayu, kwache ine nkhabe kupitsalakana ndekha ene tayu; moyo wanga nkhabeve basa tayu." 
Job9:22 Kuna ine ntchibodzi-bodzi, ndi thangwi yache ndimbalonga kuti Mulungu anati atchunyuse anyakudawa na anyakukhonda dawa." 
Job9:23 Munthu okhonda dawa angafa mwakututumusa, Mulungu ambaseka dzedze yache." 
Job9:24 Mulungu adapereka dziko yapansi kuna anyakudawika, iye adachitisa atongi onsene kukhala maboli-boli. Ngakhala si Mulungu tayu achita penepi, apo mbani apichita?" 
Job9:25 “Nsiku zanga zikuthamanga kupiringana nyakuthamanga pabitcha-bitcha; izo zikumbuluka pyakwanga kuchimwana nsiku ibodzi enembo basi yadidi. 
Job9:26 Moyo wanga ukugwanda kwene ninga mwadiya wakamtaye; wakuthamanga pyakwanga ninga mphamba wakugonkha mwanapiye. 
Job9:27 Ine ndimbasekera kuyesa kuduwalira nyatwa zangazi, ndinasanduza nkhope yanga kusangizira kukomerwa." 
Job9:28 Ine ndina mantha na nyatwa zonsene zinafuna kundigwera, ndikupidziwa kuti Mulungu akundiyesa basi ninga nyakudawa." 
Job9:29 Podi ine ndayeswa kale nyakudawa, chinabonerera ine ninji pontho?" 
Job9:30 Podi ndisambe pyanga na mamina a mtondo, podi ndisambe pyanga manjanga na dotha," 
Job9:31 Mulungu ambandiponyera m'dzenje ya pyakunyansa, pontho na nguwo zanga zene zimbachitambo nane manyadzo." 
Job9:32 Mulungu mbadakhala munthu, ine mbidamtawira, mbidenda naye kuthando ya miseru kuti tikaonane maso na maso." 
Job9:33 Kwache nkhabe nyakukhala pakati pathupa tayu, nkhabe munthu wakutonga mseru pakati pa Mulungu na ine tayu." 
Job9:34 Lekani kunditchunyusa Mulungu! Bulusani kugoswa kwanu! 
Job9:35 Ine nkhabe chita naye mantha tayu, ndinati ndilonge thangwi mtimanga ndimbaudziwa." 
Job10:1 “Kukhala na moyo ndatopa nako; natenepo vani kudungunya kunachita ineku, pontho ndinati ndilonge pinthu pyandipha mumtima." 
Job10:2 Lekani kundichitisa kukonwa, Mulungu. Ngandipangeni, mseru wache una ine." 
Job10:3 Ayi mphyakuthemadi kuti mundikalire mtima, kukhonda chinthu chidasasanya imwe na manjanu mbamusekerera pinthu pyakuipa pinafuna chita anyamalwa?" 
Job10:4 Ayi imwe muna maso ninga a anthu? Ayi imwe mumbaonambo pinthu ninga mumbapionera anthu ambafa ale? 
Job10:5 Ayi moyo wanu ngwakuvirambo ninga wa munthu? Ayi pyaka pya moyo wanu mphyakuchepambo ninga pya anthu ambafa ale? 
Job10:6 Apo thangwi yache ninji mukusakanyula umambalanga, mbamufukula pyakudawa pyachita ine?" 
Job10:7 Imwe mukupidziwa kuti ine sidadawe tayu, pontho kuti nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene anakwanisa kundipulumusa m'manja mwanu tayu." 
Job10:8 “Manjanu ndiye adandisasanya mbamundiumba. Lero manjanu onthowo ndiye akundivunga. 
Job10:9 Kumbukani kuti imwe mudandikanya ninga dongo mbamundisasanya. Apo lero mukundibwezera pontho kufumbi? 
Job10:10 Imwe mudapasa babanga mphamvu kuti andibale; imwe mudandichitisa kugunkhula m'mimba mwa mama. 
Job10:11 Imwe mudandivazika khanda na mnofu mbamundiphataniza pabodzi pene magogodo na uzingo. 
Job10:12 Imwe mudandipasa moyo mbamuonesa kundifuna kwanu kokhonda mala, pontho kundiyang'anira kwanu kwandichitisa kukhala na moyo." 
Job10:13 Chinchino ndapidziwa kuti pinthu penepi pikhali mumtima mwanu, pontho kuti mukhasasanya kundichita chilimwawo." 
Job10:14 Imwe mukhandilonda manyalo kuti muone ngakhala ndinadawa, towera mukhonde kundilekerera." 
Job10:15 Sindzidzi ine nkhudawa, penepo ine ndili panyatwa zikulu na imwe. Kwache ine ndingachita pyakulungama, imwe nee mumbandifupa tayu. Ine ndiye ndasanyikiratu, pontho pana ine pano ndi manyadzo okhokha." 
Job10:16 Ngakhala ine ndapikwanisa pyonsene, imwe mumbandisakaza ninga nkhalamu mbamuchita pyakudzudzumisa kupokanyisana na ine." 
Job10:17 Ndzidzi onsene mumbakhala na mboni zakupokanyisana nane kundizhangalira kwanu kukwenda mbakukula; ndzidzi onsene mumbasasanya pyakundisosa. 
Job10:18 “Mulungu, thangwi yache ninji mudanditawirisa kubalwa? Mbapidakhala pyadidi mbidafera pyanga m'chikuta" 
Job10:19 mbandipitirira pyanga kumasiye, khala ninga sidaone kunja tayu." 
Job10:20 Moyo wanga wasala papi? Ndilekeni pyanga. Ndilekeni ndikomerwe na ndzidzi wasala na inewu. 
Job10:21 Chinchino ndikwenda pyanga, kwache sinabwererave tayu; ndikwenda kudziko ya mdima wakugoswa," 
Job10:22 kudziko ya mdima na chimpiningu, kule cheza chachecho ndi mdima ene basi.”" 
Job11:1 Natenepo Zofari wa Chinaama adatawira mbati: 
Job11:2 “Ayi nkhabe munthu wakutawira pinthu pyakupupwa pinalongwapi? Ayi munthu anakwanisa kupilungamisa pakulonga pinthu pizinji? 
Job11:3 Yobu, ayi ukunyerezera kuti ife nkhabe kwanisa tayu kukutawira? Ayi ukunyerezera kuti mafalako akusedegula analonga iwewa nkhabe unango nyakukusumulula?" 
Job11:4 Iwe ukulonga kuti pyalonga iwepi mphyakuona, pontho kuti ndiwe munthu wakusowa chakupokanyisa pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Job11:5 Mbwenye ndikhapifuna pyakwanga Mulungu mbadalongapo chinthu, pontho kufungula mulomo kukutawira." 
Job11:6 Iye mbadakutchululira pagona nzeru, thangwi nzeru za Mulungu nsakuzwika pyakwanga. Mulungu akukutchunyusa pang'ono kusangiza na mule mudathemera iwe." 
Job11:7 “Ayi iwe unakwanisa kudziwa pinthu pyakuzwika pya Mulungu? Ayi iwe unakwanisa kudziwa madire a Nyamphamvu zonsene? 
Job11:8 Nzeru za Mulungu zapiringana kuthambo mwakuti iwe nkhabe kwanisa fikako; izo nsakuzwika pyakwanga kupiringana dziko ya anyakufa mwakuti iwe nkhabe kuzidziwa tayu. 
Job11:9 Nzeru za Mulungu nsakutambalala pyakwanga kupiringana dziko yapansi, pontho nsakutambalala pyakwanga kupiringana bara." 
Job11:10 Ngakhala Mulungu anakumanga mbadza nawe kuti utongwe mseru, mbani anakwanisa kumkhondesa?" 
Job11:11 Anyakusowa basa onsene, Mulungu ambaadziwa; apo angaona pyakuipa pyawo, iye ambalila kupiyang'ana kwene?" 
Job11:12 Anthu akupupwa anatoma kukhala anzeru ngakhala bulu wam'tsanga anabala munthu. 
Job11:13 “Yobu pereka mtimako kuna Mulungu, pontho kwiza manjako m'dzulu kupemphera kuna iye." 
Job11:14 Bulusa pyakuipa pyonsene pili chifupi na iwe; pyakudawa pyonsene leka kupitawirisa kukhala m'nyumba mwako. 
Job11:15 Ungamala penepo unakwanisa kuyenusa nkhope yako mwakusowa manyadzo; unaimira dzololo mwakusowa mantha. 
Job11:16 Kubuluka penepo nyatwa zako zonsene unaziduwalira; zinaduwalika ninga madzi makulu agwanda kale ale. 
Job11:17 Moyo wako unaonesa cheza kupiringana cheza cha dzuwa na masikati, pontho ndzidzi wa mdima wa moyo wako unakhala makalakwecha." 
Job11:18 Iwe unakhala pakupata pontho na chidikhiro chonsene; iwe unatchinjirizwa mbupuma mwadidi. 
Job11:19 Iwe unagona pyako gada okhonda goswerwa; anthu azinji anakupempha kuti uaphedze. 
Job11:20 Anyakuipa anayang'ana-yang'ana uku m'maso muli bii, mbagumana kuti nkhabe pakuthawira; chidikhiro chawo nkhufa kwene basi.”" 
Job12:1 Tenepo Yobu adatawira mbati: 
Job12:2 “Anyanzeru ndimwe ene basi! Mungafa nzeru zanu munati mufe nazo kubodzi! 
Job12:3 Kwache ine ndina nzeru ningambo imwepo; si kuti mwandipiringana tayu. Mbani anakhonda kupidziwa pyonsene pyalonga imwepi? 
Job12:4 Lero ndine chakusekesa kuna ashamwali anga. Munthu adachemera Mulungu mbamtawira ule, ndasanduka chakusekesa podi kwene kuti ndine wakulungama, pontho wakusowa chinthu chakupokanyisa." 
Job12:5 Anthu ale ali pakutonthola ambasedegula ale ali panyatwa; ambamanga ndale ale alimbuka kale. 
Job12:6 Nyumba za anyakuba zili pamtendere, pontho anyakutikana Mulungu ali pakupata, anthu ale mphamvu zawo ndiye milungu yawo." 
Job12:7 “Kwache vunzani nyama, izo zinakufunzisani, penu mbalame, izo zinakupangani," 
Job12:8 penu longani na dziko yapansi, iyo inakufunzisani, penu nsomba za m'bara kuti zikupangeni." 
Job12:9 Ntchipi papinthu pyonsenepi chinakhonda dziwa kuti mkono wa MBUYA ndiye wachita penepi? 
Job12:10 Moyo wa pyakulengwa pyonsene uli m'manja mwache, pontho muya wa munthu onsene uli m'manja mwache." 
Job12:11 Ayi khutu himbasiyanisa mafala tayu ninga mumbachitira lulume kulawira pyakudya? 
Job12:12 “Ayi nkhalamba nkhabe khala na nzeru tayu? Ayi anthu a mvula zakale nkhabe vesa pinthu? 
Job12:13 Mulungu ndiye mwenechiro nzeru na mphamvu; uphungu na kuvesa pinthu mphyache. 
Job12:14 Chinthu chinagwisa iye, nkhabe unango anakwanisa kuchimanga pontho tayu; munthu anaponya iye m'perezo, nkhabe unango anakwanisa kumsudzula tayu." 
Job12:15 Ngakhala iye anaphata mvula, penepo pambakhala njala ikulu; mbwenye ngakhala anaitawirisa kuvumba pyayo, penepo madzi makulu ambadza padziko yapansi." 
Job12:16 “Iye ndiye mwenechiroache mphamvu na kukunda; onsene anyakunyengezwa na anyakunyengeza anzawo mbache. 
Job12:17 Iye ambapupwisa nzeru za mapungu mbachitisa anyakutonga miseru kukhala madzemwa. 
Job12:18 Iye ambatchithisa mafumu pamipando yawo mbaachitisa kukhala anyaperezo. 
Job12:19 Iye ambachitisa manyadzo anyansembe mbapokosera chidzo amuna akukhazikika. 
Job12:20 Iye ambachitisa mapungu akunyindirika kukhala mabewewe mbabulusa udziwisi wa amuna a mvula zakale. 
Job12:21 Iye ambachitisa manyadzo amuna akulemedzwa mbakhutcha mano amuna amphamvu. 
Job12:22 Iye ambatchulula pinthu pikulu pyakubisika mumdima mbasanduza mdima wa ndiwe ani kukhala cheza. 
Job12:23 Iye ambachitisa madzinza kukula mbaavunga pontho; iye ambakuza madzinza mbaabalalisa. 
Job12:24 Iye ambapupwisa nzeru za akadamu mbaachitisa kutsalakatika na kutayika m'thando yatchetcha. 
Job12:25 Iwo ambamphamphasa-mphamphasa mumdima; iye ambaachitisa kudzedzereka ninga anyakuledzera.” 
Job13:1 “Pyonsenepi maso anga apiona, pontho na makutu anga ndapiva mbandipivesa mwadidi mwene." 
Job13:2 Chimbadziwa imwe, ndiye chimbadziwa inembo. Imwe nkhabe piringana ine tayu." 
Job13:3 Mbwenye ndimbapifunadi kulonga na Nyamphamvu zonsene, mbandiketesana na Mulungu pya mseru wanga." 
Job13:4 Kwache na kunama kwanu imwe mukundiphata m'maso; monsenene ndimwe ng'anga zakusowa basa. 
Job13:5 Mbamudakhala kwene pyanu mulomo phoo, kuna imwe, mbidakhala nzeru." 
Job13:6 “Veseranimbo mphokanga; ikhani makutu kuna kudungunya kwa milomo yanga. 
Job13:7 Ayi imwe munalonga pyakudawika m'mbuto mwa Mulungu? Ayi munalonga pyakunama m'mbuto mwache? 
Job13:8 Ayi imwe munafuna kumuikhira kunduli? Ayi imwe munatonga mseru m'mbuto mwa Mulungu? 
Job13:9 Iye mbadakuyesani, ayi mbipidakhala pyadidi? Ayi imwe mbamudakwanisa kumnyengeza khala ninga mukunyengeza anthu?" 
Job13:10 Andedi, iye mbadakusumululani ngakhala mudatonga mseru chibiso-biso mwakuyang'ana nkhope." 
Job13:11 Ayi demelero yache mbidakuchitisani mantha tayu? Ayi kugoswa kwache mbukudakugwerani tayu? 
Job13:12 Miyambi yanu njakusowa basa ninga dotha. Kupitchinjiriza kwanu kwakhala ninga dongo. 
Job13:13 Matamani, ndilonge; pinthu pyonsene pyakundidzera pilekeni pidze." 
Job13:14 “Thangwi yache ninji kuti ndiikhe moyo wanga pamoto; kuti ndipiphese ndekha ene? 
Job13:15 Ine ndidataya chidikhiro, apo Mulungu angandipha pinakhala tani? Ndinati ndilonge mseru wanga kuna iye." 
Job13:16 Mwinango kuwanga kwanga mtima kunandipulumusa, thangwi munthu wakuipa nkhabe wanga mtima kuonana na Mulungu tayu." 
Job13:17 Veserani mafala anafuna ine kulonga. Fungulani makutu anu kuti pinafuna ine kulonga piveke. 
Job13:18 Podi chinchino ndasasanyika kulonga mseru wanga, ndikupidziwa kuti ine nkhabe dzakonwa tayu." 
Job13:19 “Ayi alipo munthu ule anakwanisa kundisumulula? Ngakhala pili tenepo ndinati ndimatame pyanga mbandifa. 
Job13:20 Kwache Mulungu ndinakupemphani kwene pinthu piwiripi, penepo ine nkhabe dzabisala pamaso panu:" 
Job13:21 lekani kunditchunyusa, pontho kundithuswa na kugoswa kwanu." 
Job13:22 “Kubuluka penepo ndichemereni, ine ndinakutawirani, penu nditawiriseni ndilonge, imwe munditawire." 
Job13:23 Ayi ine pyakudawa na umambalanga mphingasi? Ndioneseni pyakuipa na pyakudawa pyachita ine. 
Job13:24 “Thangwi yache ninji mukundibisira nkhope yanu, mbamundiyesa nyamalwanu?" 
Job13:25 Ayi imwe munathuswa tsamba yakupheluka pyayo na mphepo? Ayi munathamangisa dzungu yakumbuluka pyayo? 
Job13:26 “Thangwi imwe mumbalemba pinthu pyakupha pyakupokanyisana na ine, mbamundichitisa kuti ndikwate pyakudawa pya uphaleanga." 
Job13:27 Mumbamanga matandadza miyendo yanga, mbamuikha maso mafambiro anga pakuikha pidzindikiro pana mphondero yanga." 
Job13:28 Natenepo munthu ambapakatika pyache ninga chinthu chakuvunda, ninga nguwo yakudyiwa na maberethe.”" 
Job14:1 “Munthu wakubalwa na mkazi nsiku zache nsakulengeseka, pontho nsakudzala na nyatwa." 
Job14:2 Iye ambaphwitha ninga maluwa mbaunyala. Ninga chigudu-gudu kabodzi kene iye nkhabe onekave tayu. 
Job14:3 Ayi munthu ninga weneyu nkhumuwerengera basi? Ayi nkhumdzesa basi pamaso panu kuti atongwe mseru? 
Job14:4 Mbani anakwanisa kudzesa chinthu chakuchena kubulukira kuchinthu chokhonda chena? Nkhabe na mbodzi ene tayu. 
Job14:5 Nsiku za munthu nsakulembwa kale. Konta ya miyezi yache ili m'manja mwanu; imwe mwamuikhira madire mwakuti iye nkhabe kwanisa kuanumpha tayu. 
Job14:6 Natenepo mulekeni pyache, pontho akomerwe ninga nyaganyo angakotoka." 
Job14:7 “Mutive mbwenye, umbakhala na chidikhiro. Ngakhala iwo unagwandwa, umbaphwitha pontho, mphukira zachembo nkhabe mala tayu." 
Job14:8 Mitsitsi yache inakwanisa kukalamba pansipa, pontho chitsa chache mbichifera m'mataka monthomo," 
Job14:9 kwache sindzidzi nkhulawira madzi unaphwitha, mbukhala na nthambi ninga chakumera." 
Job14:10 Mbwenye munthu ambafa mamalisiro ache mbakhala onthowo; iye ambafa mbakhonda oneka pontho. 
Job14:11 “Ninga mumbachitira mikulo kuleka kufamba, pontho nyanza zile zimbapwa mbiziuma," 
Job14:12 sasawambo munthu ambafa mbakhonda lamuka pontho. Kufikirana thambo ileke oneka pontho, nyakufa nkhabe dzalamuka, nee nyakugonera mkono tayu." 
Job14:13 “Mbamudandibisa pyanu m'dziko ya anyakufa mbwenye, kundibisa kufikirana kuzhangali kwanu kwamala, pontho mbamudandiikhira ndzidzi, m'nduli mwache mbamundikumbuka mbwenye." 
Job14:14 Ngakhala munthu anafa, ayi iye anakhala pontho na moyo? Podi ndiphate pyanga basa mwakubulusa kaluma tani, ndinati ndidikhire basi kudza kwa ndzidzi wanga wadidi." 
Job14:15 Imwe munandichemera, ine mbindikutawirani. Imwe munanditchuwa, ule adasasanya imwe na manjanu." 
Job14:16 Penepo munakwanisa dzandilonda manyalo, mbamukhonda lengesa pyakudawa pyanga." 
Job14:17 Imwe munamangirira umambalanga m'fukusi, mbamufikhira pansi pyakudawa pyachita ine." 
Job14:18 “Mbwenye ninga mumbachitira mapiri kukukuluka, pontho miyala ikulu kugubuduka kubuluka m'mbuto mwawo;" 
Job14:19 ninga mumbachitira madzi kunyenyena miyala, pontho mvula izinji kukukulula mataka, mwenemo ndiye mumbamalisira imwe chidikhiro cha munthu." 
Job14:20 Imwe mumbakunda munthu, iyembo ambabuluka m'maso mwa anthu; nkhope yache imbasanduzikira kuimfa mbamumgwinyira kutali kwenda na kwenda." 
Job14:21 Ngakhala anache anapaswa chilemedzo, iye nkhabe kupidziwa tayu; ngakhala iwo analulupiswa, iye nkhabe kupidzindikira." 
Job14:22 Pimbava iye kupha mphya m'manungo mwache mwene basi, pontho ambapisintili yekha ene basi.”" 
Job15:1 Natenepo Elifazi wa Chitemani adatawira mbati," 
Job15:2 “Ayi munthu wanzeru angatawire na mafala apezi-pezi ninga enewa, penu kudzaza m'kanwa mwache na mafala akusowa basa?" 
Job15:3 Ayi iye anakwanisa kupokanya ninga mwachitira iwemu mbalonga mafala okhonda ganyalisa? 
Job15:4 Ayi iwe ukufuna kuti anthu aleke gopa Mulungu, penu iwo aleke kumpembedza?" 
Job15:5 Kudawa kwako kwaoneka na malongero ako, pontho mafalako adzala na pyakunama." 
Job15:6 Kuna ine nkhabe funika pontho kuti ndikuchitise kukonwa tayu, iwe wakonwa kale na mafala alonga iwewa." 
Job15:7 “Ayi iwe ukunyerezera kuti udatoma kubalwa ndiwe? Ndzidzi udalenga Mulungu mapiri, ayi iwe ukhalipo?" 
Job15:8 Ayi iwe udaveseradi mwadidi mwene pinthu pidasasanya Mulungu kupichita? Ayi una nzeru ndiwe ene basi? 
Job15:9 Ntchipi chinthu chache chinadziwa iwe, ifembo mbitikhonda kuchidziwa? Udziwisi wache ngwanji una iwe, unakhonda ife khala nawombo?" 
Job15:10 Ife nzeru zathu tidazifunza kubulukira kuna anyaimvi, anthu ale adabalwa babako mbadzati balwa." 
Job15:11 “Mulungu akukuthondoza, apo watani unakhonda kuthondozwako? Ayi mafala alongwa mwakufulikawa hadakuphate mtima tayu?" 
Job15:12 Thangwi ache ninji ukuwanga mtima kuti iwe utituzulire maso ninga tenepa," 
Job15:13 pontho kuti uzhangalire Mulungu mbumulongera mafala apezi ninga enewa? 
Job15:14 “Ayi munthu mbani kuti anakwanisa kukhala wangwiro? Penu munthu wakubalwa na mkazi kuti anakwanisa kukhala wakulungama? 
Job15:15 Ngakhala Mulungu nkhabe nyindira angelo ache; ngakhala iwo si angwiro tayu pamaso pache," 
Job15:16 apo nditani na munthu, ule ngwakuipa pontho wakunyansa, munthu ule ambamwa pyakuipa ninga madzi." 
Job15:17 “Natenepo vesera, Yobu, ndikupange; ine ndinati ndikupange pinthu pyaona ine." 
Job15:18 Anthu anzeru andipanga pyakuona pile pidafunziswa iwo na makolo awo, pontho iwo nkhabe bisa chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu." 
Job15:19 M'dziko mwawo mukhali nkhabe nyakudza, mukhali nkhabe munthu wakuabausa kubuluka kuna Mulungu." 
Job15:20 “Munthu wakuipa anati asanyike m'moyo wache onsene; nyakupondereza anzache kwache nkhuva kupha nsiku zonsene. 
Job15:21 Dungu yakugoswa inasokosera m'makutu mwache, pontho ndzidzi unaona iye kuti ali pakupata, anyakuvunga anadza." 
Job15:22 Iye nkhabe chidikhiro kuthawa mdima wa imfa tayu, thangwi panango pontho talasada ikudikhira kuti imphe." 
Job15:23 Malezi akudikhira kudya manungo ache. Iye ambadziwa kuti tsogolo yache ndi mdima. 
Job15:24 Kusanyika mtima na mantha pimbammala manungo, ipyo pimbamsanyisa ninga mfumu wakusasanyika kumenya nkhondo." 
Job15:25 “Yeneyi ndiye dzedze imbakwata munthu ule anakungira Mulungu mashoko, mbalulupisa Nyamphamvu zonsene." 
Job15:26 Munthu weneyo ambathamanga kamenyana na Mulungu mwakukula mtima uku aphatira chakugedera matswimo chache. 
Job15:27 Podi kwene kuti nkhope yache ina chidokhomiro, pontho kuti ana njodo," 
Job15:28 mizinda inakhala iye inasanduka madembe, pontho anakhala m'nyumba zokhonda thema khaliwa, zile zidathema kugomoka mbizisala madongolomwa okhokha." 
Job15:29 Iye nkhabeve dzakhala wakufuma tayu, pontho mfumache inamala kumbuluka, tenepo anasala padzuwa." 
Job15:30 Iye nkhabe dzathawa kubuluka mumdima. Anakhala ninga muti, ule nthambi zache zimbapiswa pamoto, ule maluwache amala gubudzika na mphepo." 
Job15:31 Ngakhala iye anapinyengeza yekha ene kunyindira pyakupupwa, penepo pyakupupwapyo ndiye pinakhala mfupo wache." 
Job15:32 Ndzidzi wache mbudzati fika iye anaunyala, anaunyala ninga nthambi ile nkhabe dzakhala pontho iwisi tayu." 
Job15:33 Iye anakhala ninga mfesa, ule nsapo zache zimbapakatika zikali ziwisi, ninga muti waolivi ule maluwache ambamala na kulakatika." 
Job15:34 Kuna anthu okhonda tsalakana Mulungu anakhala ngomwa, pontho anyakufuma pakuchita kudyekerwa, moto unavunga misawo." 
Job15:35 Enewa mbanthu ale ambasasanya kudzesa nyatwa na kuchita pyakuipa; ndzidzi onsene kunama nkhudya kwawo.” 
Job16:1 Tenepo Yobu adatawira mbati," 
Job16:2 “Mafala ninga enewa ndidatoma kale kuava; kundithondoza kunachita imwe kukundisanyisa kukulu. 
Job16:3 Munaleka lini kulonga mafala apezi-pezi ninga enewa? Mwatani munathimiza basi kundipokanya? 
Job16:4 Mbipidakhala kuti imwe ndine pano, mbidakwanisa kulonga pyonsene pinalonga imwe, mbidakwanisa kukutonjanimbo na mafala azinji, pontho mbidakupusa msolo thangwi ya imwe." 
Job16:5 Kwache mbidakuwangisani mtima na mafalanga, mbidathimiza kulonga mafala akukuthondozani nawo." 
Job16:6 “Mbwenye chonsene chimbalonga ine nkhabe chibodzi chimbaphedza tayu, pontho kukhala kwene mulomo phoo nkhabe matamisa mtswotswo wanga tayu." 
Job16:7 Mulungu mwandimala mphamvu; imwe mwatawirisa kuti banjanga iphiwe. 
Job16:8 Imwe mwandiphata mwakuti ndasala magogodo okhokha, tenepo kuonda kwanga ntchitsikimizo chakuti ine ndadawa." 
Job16:9 “Na kuzhangali kwache Mulungu andisosa mbandinyedza-nyedza, mbandikikitira mano mwakundizonda. Anyamalwanga andituzulira maso," 
Job16:10 iwo ambakhala mano chena-chena mbandigasa mbama kundisedegula. Iwo ambandikutira kupokanyisana nane. 
Job16:11 Mulungu andipereka m'manja mwa anthu akuipa; mbandiponya m'manja mwa anyakudawika. 
Job16:12 Pinthu pyonsene pikhandifambira pyadidi, mbwenye lero Mulungu andigobola, andishipa pakhosi mbandipondedza. Iye athonyeza pana ine kuyeseza ponta," 
Job16:13 mbaponya matswimo ache pana ine, matswimo ale ambandilasa kukhundu zonsene mbandikuwaza. Mwakukhonda kundivera nsisi iye alasa nswikira zanga, mbatayira nyongo yanga pansi." 
Job16:14 Iye ambandikuwaza okhonda lekeza, andipomokera ninga nyankhondo wamphamvu." 
Job16:15 Ine ndikulira pontho kuvala masakha, pontho ndikukhala pano pafumbi wakukundwa." 
Job16:16 Ine ndalira mpakana maso kufira, maso anga ali ngwanda-ngwanda kutupa." 
Job16:17 Kwache ine sidachite chakuzunguzika tayu, pontho kupempha kwanga pamaso pa Mulungu nkhwakuona." 
Job16:18 “Dziko yapansi leka bisa pyakuipa pinandichitikirapi; leka chitisa kulira kwanga kufuna chilungamo kumatame! 
Job16:19 Alipo unango kudzulu ule ndi mboni yanga; nyakundiikhira kunduli ali kudzulu. 
Job16:20 Ashamwali anga akundisedegula; maso anga ambakhuthulira misozi pana Mulungu. 
Job16:21 Ndikhapifuna pyakwanga kuti unango adembetere Mulungu m'mbuto mwanga, ninga mumbachitira munthu kudembeterera shamwaliache." 
Job16:22 Pyaka pyanga pyasala pyakuchepa, chinchino ndinafamba njira yokhonda bwerera." 
Job17:1 “Kumala kwa moyo wanga kuli chifupi. Ine ndataya chidikhiro; nkhabe pontho chasala mbwenye kwenda kwene ku masiye basi. 
Job17:2 Anyakundisedegula andikutira; ndimbalila kuyang'ana kwene kundiselusa kumbandichita iwoku. 
Job17:3 Mulungu, perekani pinyolo m'mbuto mwanga, thangwi nkhabe unango wakufuna pyakundiikhira kunduli." 
Job17:4 Imwe mwafunga misolo yawo kuti aleke vesa pinthu. Lekani kuatawirisa kuti andikunde. 
Job17:5 Ngakhala munthu anasandukira ashamwaliache thangwi ya kobiri, anache anasanyika thangwi ya penepi." 
Job17:6 Mulungu andisanduza chakusekesa kuna anthu, iwo ambadza mbandiphulira mata." 
Job17:7 Kusintili kwanga kwandichitisa kukhala boli-boli; manungo anga asaliratu nkhuu kuonda. 
Job17:8 Anyakupiyesa okha ene akulungama adatutumuka na penepi; onsenewo akundilonga kuti ndine munthu okhonda pembedza Mulungu. 
Job17:9 “Kwache nyakulungama ambathimiza kuponya maso patsogolo, munthu ule manjache nkhabe maphata-phata ambaenda mbakula mphamvu." 
Job17:10 Mbwenye mbapidakhala kuti onsenewo adadza mbaimira chifupi na ine, ine nee mbindidagumana na mbodzi ene wa iwo kuti ngwanzeru tayu." 
Job17:11 “Nsiku zanga zagwanda kale; pikhanyerezera ine kuchita pyachimwanika, pontho chidikhiro changa chamala." 
Job17:12 Mbwenye ashamwali anga akulonga kuti mosiku ndi masikati; iwo akulonga kuti cheza chenecho chili chifupi, kwache ine ndikupidziwa kuti ndinati ndithimize basi kukhala mumdima." 
Job17:13 Chidikhiro china ine pano nkhwenda kwene kudziko ya anyakufa basi, kule kunafuna ine kagona mumdima." 
Job17:14 Masiye ndimbachemera baba, pontho mfunye ndimbazichemera mama penu anyamainganga." 
Job17:15 Nkhupi pontho kuna chidikhiro changa? Mbani akuchiona? 
Job17:16 Chidikhiro nkhabe kwenda nane pabodzi tayu ndingabidira kudziko ya anyakufa; icho nkhabe kwenda nane pabodzi kufumbi tayu.” 
Job18:1 Tenepo Bilidadi wa Chishuhi adatawira mbati," 
Job18:2 “Ayi unaleka lini kulonga mafala ninga enewa? Iwe mbudatoma matama kuti uvesere, ife mbitidalonga nawe." 
Job18:3 Ninji chinakunyerezeresa kuti ife ndife akupupwa ninga ng'ombe? Thangwi yache ninji tikuoneka ninga anthu akusowa nzeru pamaso pako? 
Job18:4 Iwe ukupikuwaza wekha ene na kuzhangali kwako. Ayi dziko yapansi ingasale yokha thangwi iwe wazhangali? Ayi Mulungu angabuluse mapiri towera iwe ukomerwe? 
Job18:5 “Nyale ya munthu wakudawika inathimiswa; malulume a moto wache nkhabe dzayerima pontho tayu. 
Job18:6 Cheza cha m'nyumba mwache chinasanduka mdima; nyale ya chifupi na iye inathima. 
Job18:7 Ule kale akhafamba na mchiti, lero agwegweduka; uphungu wache onthowo wammanga ndale." 
Job18:8 Iye ambafamba mbapita na mumsampha, pontho manyalo ache akwesheka." 
Job18:9 Paka adampana chitende chache mbamphata titibwi. 
Job18:10 Pansi mulindi wakumbwa mwakubisa; gango yateyiwa m'njira mwache. 
Job18:11 “Ponsene panakhala iye pana chakugoswa mbachimtewera ponsene panafamba iye. 
Job18:12 Iye akhali wakufuma, mbwenye lero akugona na njala; mulirimbo waimira kudikhira chifupi na iye." 
Job18:13 Akhali na utenda wakugoswa wa pamanungo, ule udachitisa mikono na miyendo yache kuvunda." 
Job18:14 Iye anabuluswa kunyumba kukhakhala iye pakupata kule; mbamkwekweta kwenda naye kuna imfa, mfumu wa pyakugoswa." 
Job18:15 Chinthu chonsene chabuluswa m'nyumba mwache, mbaponyamo miyala ya moto ya sulufule kuichenesa." 
Job18:16 Mitsitsi ikududumuka, pontho nthambi zache zikuunyala." 
Job18:17 Kuveka kwache padziko ya pansi kwamala; dzinache nkhabe dzakumbukirikave tayu. 
Job18:18 Iye anathamangiswa m'dziko ya anthu amoyo; kubuluswa kubulukira kucheza kwenda kumdima. 
Job18:19 Iye nkhabe pidzukulu pakati pa anthu ache; nkhabe na mbodzi ene anafuna dzasala na moyo tayu kukhakhala iye kule. 
Job18:20 Anthu akumadokero dzuwa ambatutumuka na dzedze idamgwera; anthu akumabulukiro dzuwa ale ambaphatwa na mantha. 
Job18:21 Ande, yeneyo ndi dzedze imbakwata munthu wakuipa, pontho na musa wa munthu okhonda tsalakana Mulungu.”" 
Job19:1 Tenepo Yobu adatawira mbati," 
Job19:2 “Munaleka lini kundisanya na kundinyangula na mafalanu. 
Job19:3 Nkhachikhumi keneka kananditikana imweka; mwakusowa manyadzo imwe mumbandisosa. 
Job19:4 Ngakhala mphyakuona kuti ine ndachita pyakudawa, ndilekeni pyanga, imwe muli napyonji." 
Job19:5 Ngakhala munapikuza mwekha ene padzulu pa ine, mbamuphatisa basa kululupiswa kwanga kunditonja nako," 
Job19:6 penepyo pidziweni kuti Mulungu ndiye andichitira penepi, pontho anditeyera msampha kundizungulira." 
Job19:7 Ndimbakhuwa kuti, ‘Kuno!’ Kw ache ine nkhabe tawirwa tayu; ndimbachemera kufuna chilungamo, kwache icho nkhabe oneka." 
Job19:8 Mulungu anditchingira njira, towera ndileke gwanda; mbaikha mdima njira inafamba ine." 
Job19:9 Iye akunundula demelero yanga, mbabulusa chipewu cha chilemedzo mumsolo mwanga." 
Job19:10 Iye ambandinyedza-nyedza makhundu onsene kufikirana ndamaliratu; chidikhiro changa ambachidula ninga muti. 
Job19:11 Iye agasa ukali wache pana ine, mbandiyesa nyamalwache." 
Job19:12 Anyankhondo ache ambandidzera mwamphamvu; iwo ambandifungira na milu ya mataka khundu zonsene mbamanga misasa kuzungulira nyumbanga. 
Job19:13 “Mulungu achitisa abale anga kundikhonda, pontho anyakudziwana nawo andiyesa mlendo." 
Job19:14 Abale anga chadi-chadi amala kundithawa; ashamwali anga andipasa nkhodolo. 
Job19:15 Anyakuchemerwa kumusa kwanga ambandiduwalira, pontho anyabasanga achikazi ambandiyesa ninga nyakudza; ine ndasanduka mbaliro ya kunja kuna iwo." 
Job19:16 Ine ndimbachemeresa nyabasanga, kwache iye hambatawira tayu; podi kwene kuti ndimpemphe ndine ene kuti andiphedze." 
Job19:17 Muya wanga ene ngwakuchitisa mkazanga kupinda, podi na abale anga ene amimba ibodzi nkhabe kundifikira chifupi tayu." 
Job19:18 Podi na ana ene ambandilulupisa; iwo angandiona ambandisedegula. 
Job19:19 Ashamwali anga ene apamtima ambanyansirwa nane; ashamwali aponde pondembo andisandukira. 
Job19:20 Ine ndasala nkhong'o-nkhong'o; ndapulumukira m'kanwa mwa ng'ona. 
Job19:21 “Ndiverenimbo nsisi ine, ashamwali anga! Ndivereni nsisi ine, thangwi mkono wa Mulungu wandipamantha." 
Job19:22 Thangwi yache ninji mukundilonda-londa ninga mumbachitira Mulungu? Ayi kundisanyisa kunandichita imweku mudakwane nako tayu? 
Job19:23 “Ndikhapifuna pyakwanga kuti mafalanga alembwe, kuti alembwe mumpukutu," 
Job19:24 kuti iwo alembwe pamwala pakuchita kugoba na simbi, mbaikhamo pilemba pyantove kuti pikhalepo kwenda na kwenda." 
Job19:25 Ndikupidziwa kuti Dombo wanga ana moyo, pontho kuti pakumalisira pache anadza dzaimira kukhundu kwanga padziko yapansi." 
Job19:26 Podi kwene kuti manungo anga amale vunda, kwache ine na manungo anga onthowa ndinamuona basi Mulungu." 
Job19:27 Ine ene ndinati ndimuone na maso anga, ine ene nee unango tayu. Mtimanga ukufuna pyakwanga kuti nsikuyo ifike." 
Job19:28 “Ngakhala munalonga kuti, ‘Tinakwanisa tani kumsanya weneyu, podi nyatwazi akuzidzesa yekha ene,’" 
Job19:29 iwe wathema wekha ene kugoswerwa na talasada; thangwi kuzhangali kumbadzesa kutchunyuswa na talasada, penepo unapidziwa kuti kunja kuno kuna nyakutonga miseru.”" 
Job20:1 Kubuluka penepo Zofari wa Chinaama adatawira mbati," 
Job20:2 “Ine ndathema kukutawira kabodzi kene, thangwi ndanenseka napyo mumtimamu." 
Job20:3 Ine ndava kusumulula kwako kule kwandilulupisa, pontho kuvesa kwanga kwandichitisa kutawira." 
Job20:4 “Ayi iwe nkhabe kupidziwa tayu mule mukhali ipyo pakutoma, kutomera ndzidzi udaikhwa munthu padziko yapansi?" 
Job20:5 Kukomerwa kwa nyakudawa nkhwa nsiku zakulengeseka; kusekera kwa nyakukhonda tsalakana pya Mulungu kumbamala kwene ndzidzi pang'ono basi. 
Job20:6 Podi kwene kuti kutumbama kwache kufike kudzulu, msolo wache mbukhuya makole," 
Job20:7 iye anavungika kwenda na kwenda ninga matubzi ache onthowo, ale akhamuona kale anavunza kuti, ‘Iye ali kupi?’" 
Job20:8 Ninga ndoto iye ambawayukiratu mbakhonda oneka pontho, mbabalalika ninga masomphenya na mosiku." 
Job20:9 Diso idamuona ile, nkhabe dzamuona pontho tayu; pambuto pakhakhala iye pale, hanaonekapove tayu." 
Job20:10 Anache athema dzabwezera mfuma, ile idabera iye anyakutcherenga," 
Job20:11 Manungo ache ale akhali amphale pontho amphamvu, chinchino anasanduka fumbi." 
Job20:12 “Podi kwene kuti pyakuipa pimbatapira m'kanwa mwache, mwakuti ambapimulumunya;" 
Job20:13 podi kwene kuti iye ambakomerwa napyo mwakuti iye ambathimiza basi kupivuatira," 
Job20:14 kudya kweneko kungafika m'chifu mwache kumbasanduka kwakuwawa, kuwawa ninga nyongo yakupha." 
Job20:15 Iye analukula mfuma idakhudyula iye; Mulungu anamchitisa kupitapika. 
Job20:16 Iye ananyanguta nyongo ya nyoka yakupha; iye analumwa na nyoka ya chipiri mbafa. 
Job20:17 Iye nkhabeve dzaona mikulo ya mafuta aolivi, penu mikulo yakufamba mkaka na uchi." 
Job20:18 Iye athema kubwezera pyonsene pidagumana iye mwakubulusa kaluma; iye nkhabe dzakhala na mwayi wakukomerwa na pidaganyali iye," 
Job20:19 thangwi iye adapondereza anyakutcherenga mbaasiya padzuwa; iye adakwata nyumba zidamanga anthu anango. 
Job20:20 Mtimache nkhabe khuta tayu, iye nkhabe yang'ana kwene chinthu na maso tayu." 
Job20:21 Angadya nkhabe siya mkhutche na pang'ono pene tayu, tenepo pinthu pyache nkhabe dzamfambira mwadidi tayu." 
Job20:22 Mwenemo pinthu pyache pili nadza-nadza, nyatwa zinamgwera basi; pyakutsukwalisa pizinji pinamkutira." 
Job20:23 Mulekeni pyache akhutise mimbache! Kwache Mulungu anakhuthulira ukali wache wakugoswa mbauvumbisa pana iye ninga mvula ya chaka. 
Job20:24 Iye angayesera kuthawa chida chasimbi, tswimo ya mphethe yankuwa inamulasa." 
Job20:25 Tswimo imbalasa manungo ache mbiphutchukira; nsonga yache yakuyetimira idaipiswa na nyongo yache; tenepo mantha makulu ambamphata. 
Job20:26 Mdima wakugoswa ukumdikhira; moto okhonda lira kupepeswa unampisa mbunyanguta pyonsene pidasalira m'nyumba mwache pile. 
Job20:27 Kudzulu kunabulusa pakwecha pyakudawa pyache, pontho dziko yapansi inaperekera umboni kupokanyisana naye." 
Job20:28 Madzi makulu anakukulula nyumbache; mfumache yonsene inavungika na ukali wa Mulungu. 
Job20:29 “Yeneyi ndi nyatwa yakoyera Mulungu munthu wakuipa; penepi ndiye pidadumbira Mulungu dzapichita kuna iye.” 
Job21:1 Tenepo Yobu adatawira mbati," 
Job21:2 “Veserani mwadidi mafalangawa, kweneku mbukukhale kundithondoza kubulukira kuna imwe." 
Job21:3 Pirirani na pinalonga ine, penepo ndingamala kulonga munakwanisa kundisedegula pyanu." 
Job21:4 “Ayi ine ndikudungunya kuna munthu? Thangwi yache ninji kuti ndileke kukhonda kuuphata mtima? 
Job21:5 Ngandiyang'aneni mbamututumuke; phatani pakanwa. 
Job21:6 Ndinganyerezera pya penepi ndimbaphatwa na mantha; manungo anga onsene ambatetemera na mantha. 
Job21:7 “Thangwi yache ninji anthu akuipa ambathimiza kukhala na moyo, mbakalamba pontho mbathimiza kukhala na mphamvu zizinji?" 
Job21:8 Iwo ambaona anawo akukhazikika pakati pawo, pidzukulu pyawo pamaso pawo." 
Job21:9 M'misa mwawo nkhabe nyatwa penu pyakugoswa; ndodo ya Mulungu nkhabe kuakwapula tayu. 
Job21:10 Ng'ombe zawo zimuna zimbabebesa mbizikhonda chimwana; ng'ombe zawo zikazi zimbakwata bele, pontho nkhabe polozwa tayu." 
Job21:11 Anawo ambasenzeka pachintalo ninga anabira; anawo ambavina-vina na kunumpha-numpha. 
Job21:12 Iwo ambaimba na nkhotcho pontho anyakatangale; mbakomerwa na kuimbwa kwa pitoliro. 
Job21:13 Pinthu pyawo pyonsene pimbaafambira mwadidi nsiku zonsene za moyo wawo; iwo ambaenda kudziko ya anyakufa na mtendere. 
Job21:14 “Kwache iwo ambalonga kuna Mulungu kuti, ‘Tileke pyathu! Ife nkhabe maba kuti tidziwe njira zako tayu." 
Job21:15 Nyamphamvu zonseneyo mbani kuti ife timtumikire? Apo tinaganyalinji tingapemphera kuna iye?’ 
Job21:16 Kwache mfumayo hili m'manja mwawo tayu; natenepo ndimbaimira kutali na uphungu wa anthu akudawikawa. 
Job21:17 “Kwache nyale ya anthu akuipa nkhabe thimiswa kawiri-kawiri tayu; dzedze nkhabe kuagwera kawiri-kawiri, pontho Mulungu nkhabe kuapasa pinthu pyakubulukira mu kuzhangali kwache." 
Job21:18 Iwo nkhabe mbuluka na mphepo ninga mphulu ya maudzu tayu, penu ninga dzungu kupheluka na mphepo ikulu tayu." 
Job21:19 “Pidalongwa kuti Mulungu ambakoya kutchunyuswa kwa munthu kuti kudzagwere anache. Mulekeni abwezere munthu ndiye mwenechiroache towera apidziwe. 
Job21:20 Mulekeni aone yekha na maso ache kuvungika kwache; mulekeni amwe ukali wa Nyamphamvu zonsene. 
Job21:21 Chimbatsalakana iye ninji pya banjache iye angafa, penu pinasala iye na moyo miyezi yakuchepa?" 
Job21:22 Ayi alipo munthu ule anakwanisa kufunzisa Mulungu, podi Mulungu ndiye ambatonga mseru anyakukhala kudzulu." 
Job21:23 “Munthu unango ambafa mwenemo pinthu pyache pikumfambira mwadidi, pontho ali pamtendere na kukomerwa," 
Job21:24 uku manungo ache ali myaa, pontho magogodo ache adzala na unongo-nongo." 
Job21:25 Mbwenye unango ambafa mwakusanyika, okhonda komerwa na chinthu chene chadidi." 
Job21:26 Kwache onsene uwiriawo ambafa mbaikhwa m'masiye, pontho mfunye zimbadya onsene awiri." 
Job21:27 “Ndikudziwa manyerezero anu, pontho pinthu pyasasanya imwe kuti mundidawise napyo." 
Job21:28 Imwe mumbavunza kuti, ‘Nyumba ya baa ale ili kupi, munthu ule ambachita pyakuipa?’" 
Job21:29 Ayi imwe mudatome kuavunza tayu anthu ale ambafamba na njira yeneyi? Ayi imwe nkhabe phatizana na umboni wawo kuti: 
Job21:30 Nsiku za nyatwa ambakoyiwa ndi munthu wakuipa, nsiku imbazhangali Mulungu iye ambapulumuka panyatwa?" 
Job21:31 Mbani munthu anakwanisa kusumulula munthu wakuipa, penu kumbwezera papinthu pyonsene pyachita iye." 
Job21:32 Iye angathukulwa kwenda kumasiye, nthumbi yache imbayang'anirwa mwadidi," 
Job21:33 Anthu pikwi-pikwi ambaenda kumaliroko, podi na mataka ene ambamtambira na manja mawiri." 
Job21:34 “Apo imwe, mukuyesa kundithondoza na mafala akusowa basa; pyonsene pinalonga imwe mphyakunama!”" 
Job22:1 Tenepo Elifazi wa Chitemani adatawira mbati," 
Job22:2 “Ayi munthu nkhukhala wakuganyalisa kuna Mulungu? Ayi nyanzeruletu nkhukhala wakuganyalisa kuna Mulungu? 
Job22:3 Ayi ukunyerezera kuchita kwako pyakulungama kumbaphedza Nyamphamvu zonsene, penu iye kuganyalimbo chinthu na moyo wako wakusowa chakupokanyisa?" 
Job22:4 Si thangwi yakuti iwe umbagopa Mulungu kuti iye ambakusumulula mbakudzesa kuthando ya miseru tayu. 
Job22:5 Nkhabe, ndi thangwi yakuti iwe wadawa pikulu; ndi thangwi ya pyakuipa pyonsene pimbachita iwe." 
Job22:6 Iwe wakwata pinyolo kuna mbaleako wakusowa na mathangwi ene; iwe wamdulisa nguwo zache mbumsiya chipezi-pezi. 
Job22:7 Kuna anyakutopa, iwe udakhonda kuapasa madzi; kuna anyakuva njala, iwe udakhonda kuadyesa." 
Job22:8 Iwe udaphatisa basa mphamvu zako kukwata dziko; mbupikhazikisa wekha ene pakuphatisa basa chidzo chako. 
Job22:9 Amamfelwa udaabera pinthu pyawo, pontho ana masiye udaapondereza." 
Job22:10 Natenepo chinchino pana misampha kukuzungulira, pontho iwe watutumuka na mantha." 
Job22:11 Kunjaku kwachita mdima mwakuti iwe nkhabe kwanisa kuona tayu, pontho madzi makulu akubiza." 
Job22:12 Ayi Mulungu nkhabe khala kudzululetu tayu? Yang'ana nyenyezi kuti izo zili kudzulu pyakwanga. 
Job22:13 Kwache ukuvunza basi kuti, ‘Mulungu ambadziwanji?’ Iye abisalika na makole, apo iye anakwanisa tani kutitonga mseru?" 
Job22:14 Ayi iwe ukunyerezera kuti makole akuswipa ambamchitisa kukhonda oneka, pinafamba iye padzulu pa thambo?" 
Job22:15 “Ayi iwe ukukakamira basi kufamba m'njira za kale, zile zimbatewera anthu akuipa ndzidzi onsene?" 
Job22:16 Podi ndzidzi wawo mbudzati fika, iwo adakukululwa; maziko awo adamala dyiwa na madzi makulu." 
Job22:17 Enewa mbanthu ale adalonga kuna Mulungu mbati, ‘Tilekeni pyathu,’ pontho kuti, ‘Nyamphamvu zonsene anatichitanji?’" 
Job22:18 Kwache ndi Mulungu onthoyo ule adaachitisa kufuma, tenepo ine nkhabe kwanisa kuvesa manyerezero a anthu akuipa tayu."
