Job22:19 Anyakulungama ambakomerwa na kusekera angaona anyakudawika kutchunyuswa, anthu okhonda dawa ambaasedegula mbati," 
Job22:20 ‘Anyamalwathu amala vungika, pontho moto wapyereza mfumawo.’" 
Job22:21 “Natenepo, Yobu, leka thimbana na Mulungu mbukhale pamtendere, tenepo pinthu pyako pyonsene pinakufambira mwadidi." 
Job22:22 Tambira chifunziso chimbapereka iye; koya mafalache m'mtima mwako. 
Job22:23 Ande, wathema kupichepesa mbuzungunukire kuna Nyamphamvu zonsene, mbubasikiletu kuchita pyakuipa m'nyumba mwako." 
Job22:24 Taya kutali golidi wako wa ku Ofiri; golidi wako wadidiletu umtayire mumkulo. 
Job22:25 Nyamphamvu zonsene mbakhale golidi wako, pontho mbakhale silivako wakudula." 
Job22:26 Tenepo ndzidzi onsene unanyindira Nyamphamvu zonsene, mbukwiza maso ako kuna iye." 
Job22:27 Ungapemphera iye anakutawira, pontho unachita pidadumbira iwe kuna iye." 
Job22:28 Pinthu pyonsene pinanyerezera iwe kuchita pinakwanisika, pontho cheza chinamwinikira njirako." 
Job22:29 Mulungu ambatchithisa pansi anyakutumbama, mbapulumusa anyakupichepesa." 
Job22:30 Iye ambapulumusa munthu okhonda dawa, natenepo iye anakupulumusa thangwi ya kulungama kwako.”" 
Job23:1 Tenepo Yobu adatawira mbati: 
Job23:2 “Ine ndikuthimiza basi kudungunya pamaso pa Mulungu; ine ndikubulira thangwi ya kundiboneresa kwache. 
Job23:3 Mbidadziwakove kumbuto kumbakhala iye mbwenye; mbidadziwa njirache yakwendera kweneko mbwenyeve," 
Job23:4 ine mbidalonga mseru wanga pamaso pache mbandipereka mphokanga yonsene kuti atonge mwakundikomera. 
Job23:5 Ine mbidadziwa kuti anakalonganji, pontho kuti anakanditawira tani?" 
Job23:6 Ayi Mulungu angaphatisedi mphamvu zache zonsene kupokanyisana na ine? Nkhabe, iye mbadavesera pinalonga inepi." 
Job23:7 Kweneko nyakulungama anakwanisa kulonga na Mulungu pya mseru wache, tenepo inembo mbidayeswa okhonda dawa kwenda na kwenda na nyakunditonga mseru wanga." 
Job23:8 “Ndasaka-saka kumabulukiro dzuwa, kwache Mulungu hali kweneko tayu; sidamgumane tayu pidamsaka-saka ine kumadokero dzuwa." 
Job23:9 Ndidayang'ana kumpoto, kwache ine sidamuoneko tayu; pidazungunukira ine kumwera na kweneko kwene sidamgumaneko tayu basi." 
Job23:10 Kwache Mulungu ambadziwa mafambiro anga onsene; iye angamala kundiyesa ninga golidi ndinabuluka wakusowa masepu-sepu. 
Job23:11 Ine ndatewera mwakukhulupirika njira idasankhula iye mbandikhonda baukira kumadyo penu kumabzere. 
Job23:12 Ndzidzi onsene ndimbachita chinthu chonsene chimbanditonga Mulungu; ine ndakoya mafalache onsene mumtima mwanga. 
Job23:13 “Iye nkhabe chinja mwakuti nkhabe munthu anakwanisa kuketesana naye; chinthu chinafuna iye kuchichita ambachichitadi. 
Job23:14 Iye anati achitise kukwana-kwana pinthu pidanyerezera iye kupichita kuna ine pile; manyerezero enewo ngabodzi mwa manyerezero ana iye. 
Job23:15 Ndi thangwi yache ine ndimbatetemera na mantha pamaso pache; ine ndinganyerezera pya pyonsenepi ndimbachita naye mantha. 
Job23:16 Mulungu andikomola; Nyamphamvu zonsene andichitisa mantha. 
Job23:17 Ndi Mulungu ene basi ambachita na ine mantha, nee mdima tayu, podi kwene kuti mdima ndiye wandichitisa kukhala boli-boli." 
Job24:1 “Thangwi yache ninji Nyamphamvu zonsene akhonda khazikisa nsiku yakutonga mseru? Thangwi yache ninji anyakumdziwa nkhabe ona nsiku zenezi? 
Job24:2 “Anthu ambabulusa miyala ya madire, towera kukulisa mindawo; iwo ambaba mabira mbaavungaza na pifuyo pyawo." 
Job24:3 Iwo ambapokosera mabulu a ana masiye mbakwata pinyolo ng'ombe zachingolo za amamfelwa achikazi. 
Job24:4 Iwo ambagwinyira kunja anyakutcherenga ambaakhakhamiza kuthawa na kubisala. 
Job24:5 “Ninga bulu wam'tsanga anyakutcherenga ambatsalakatika kusaka pyakudya m'thando yatchetcha; nkhabe kunango kunakwanisa iwo kugumana pyakudya kwakudyesa anawo tayu. 
Job24:6 Iwo ambaphalakatira m'minda ya anango tayu, pontho kulokotera mfesa m'minda ya anyakudawa." 
Job24:7 Na mosiku iwo ambagona nyimwa, kusowa na chakufinika chene; iwo nkhabe na chinthu chene chakufinika kuti akhumbirwe tayu." 
Job24:8 Iwo avumbwa na mvula ya kumapiri, pontho ali bwatha-bwatha kumwala kusowa pakuthawira mvula." 
Job24:9 “Anthu akuipa ambasomphola ana masiye kubere kwa a mawo; iwo ambakwata pinyolo ana a anyakutcherenga. 
Job24:10 Mbwenye anyakutcherenga ambakhala chitakwa-takwa kusowa na chakumpsampsika chene; iwo ambathukuliswa misumbu ya tirigu, kwache kumimba kumbakhala kade-kade na njala." 
Job24:11 Iwo ambasikinya mafuta aolivi, pontho kutchitchitha vinyu, kwache iwo ene kukhosi kumbakhala kakata na nyota." 
Job24:12 Kubulira kwakuthatha na imfa kukuveka mumzindamu; anthu akukuwazwa akulira kufuna chiphedzo. Kwache Mulungu nkhabe ikha konta kupempha kwawoko tayu. 
Job24:13 “Alipo anthu anango ale nkhabe funa cheza tayu; ale nkhabe kuchivesa, penu kwenda kumbamwinikira icho tayu." 
Job24:14 M'makalakwecha mphandu zimbalamuka kwenda kapha anyakutcherenga; na mosiku zimbaenda kaba. 
Job24:15 Puta ambadikhira m'chidodo; iye ambazimbaisa nkhope yache towera aleke dzindikirwa. 
Job24:16 Na mosiku mbava zimbaswa nyumba za anthu, mbwenye na masikati ambabindikira m'nyumba; cheza iwo nkhabe nacho pinthu tayu." 
Job24:17 Thangwi kuna iwo mdima ndi machibese awo; mdima wa ndiwe ani ndiye umbakomerwa na iwo.” 
Job24:18 “Munthu wakuipa ambakukululwa na madzi makulu; mindache yakwata dzedze. Iye hanaendave kuminda yache yamfesa kaphata basa tayu. 
Job24:19 Ninga mumbanyungulukira matalala na kupisa kwa dzuwa, sasawambo anyakudawa anamala endeswa kudziko ya anyakufa." 
Job24:20 Podi na mache ene hanamkumbukave tayu, pontho mfunye zinamchita phwando; iye anavungwa ninga muti wakuvunda." 
Job24:21 Penepi pimbamchitikira thangwi iye adasanyisa amamfelwa, mbakhonda komera mtima akazi akusowa ana." 
Job24:22 Mulungu na mphamvu zache ambavunga anyamphamvu; podi kwene kuti akhazikika tani, iwo nkhabe chidikhiro kukhala na moyo tayu." 
Job24:23 Mulungu anakwanisa kumuleka kukhala pakupata, kwache ndzidzi onsene maso ache ambakhala pana iye." 
Job24:24 Ndzidzi pang'ono munthu wakuipa pinthu pyache pimbamfambira mwadidi, mbwenye ndzidzi pang'ono pimbamaliratu ninga maudzu, penu ninga ngala za mapira zile zagwandwa kale." 
Job24:25 Ayi alipo munthu wakupokanya kuti si pyakuona tayu? Ayi alipo munthu wakutsikimizira kuti mafalangawa si akuona tayu?” 
Job25:1 Tenepo Bilidadi wa Chishuhi adatawira mbati: 
Job25:2 “Mulungu ngwamphamvu, pontho wakugopeka; ufumu wache wakudzulu-dzulu ambauchitisa kukhala na mtendere." 
Job25:3 Mbani anakwanisa kulengesa anyankhondo ache akudzulu? Nkhupi kule cheza cha Mulungu nkhabe mwinikirako? 
Job25:4 Mbani anakwanisa kukhala wakulungama pamaso pa Mulungu? Ayi munthu wakubalwa na mkazi anakwanisa kukhala wangwiro pamaso pache? 
Job25:5 Kuna Mulungu na mwezi ene si wangwiro tayu, podi na nyenyezi zene sizakuyetima tayu." 
Job25:6 Apo ndi tani na munthu, mfunye ule, munthu ambafa ule, unyoka pyache.”" 
Job26:1 Tenepo Yobu adatawira. 
Job26:2 Imwe ndimwedi chiphedzo chikulu kuna ine, kuna munthu wakutcherenga pontho wakusowa mphamvu ninga ine!" 
Job26:3 Imwe mwapereka uphungu kuna ine munthu wakusowa nzeru, pontho kugawira nzeru zanu kuna pupwe ninga ine!" 
Job26:4 Mbani aikha mafala ninga enewa m'kanwa mwanu? Mbani akupepesera kuti mulonge ninga tenepa? 
Job26:5 Mizimu ya anyakufa imbatetemera na mantha m'madzi pansi pa mataka; pyonsene pyakukhala mwenemo pili panyatwa ikulu. 
Job26:6 Dziko ya anyakufa ili nyimwa pamaso pa Mulungu; nkhabe chakumpsampsika chimbaitchinga kuti ileke oniwa. 
Job26:7 Kumbuto yakusowa pinthu Mulungu adafuthula thambo kumpoto; iye adamanika dziko yapansi chidzulu-dzulu. 
Job26:8 Ndi Mulungu ule ambachitisa makole kudzala na madzi, mbaachitisa kumangana pabodzi pene gopesera anatumbuka thangwi ya kulemerwa." 
Job26:9 Iye ambabisa mwezi, mbauphimbira khundu yache inango na makole." 
Job26:10 Iye adaikha madire akukhala ninga uta pakati pa dziko yapansi na thambo mbalekanisa cheza na mdima. 
Job26:11 Mizati yakuphatisa kudzulu imbatekenyeka, iyo imbaphatwa na mantha Mulungu angakalipa." 
Job26:12 Na mphamvu zache iye adamatamisa bara, pontho na udziwisi wache iye adavunga Rahabi." 
Job26:13 Na muyache iye adachitisa kudzulu kukhala ngwiro; na mkono wache iye adalasa nyangume wakuthawa wa m'bara ule. 
Job26:14 Mbwenye penepi mphing'ono kusangiza na mphamvu zache; pyava ife pya iye mphiwere-were pene basi. Mbani anakwanisa kudziwa chadi-chadi pya ukulu wa Mulungu? 
Job27:1 Tenepo Yobu adathimiza kulonga mbati: 
Job27:2 “Ine ndinadumbira pamaso pa Mulungu wamoyo, ule adandikhondera chilungamo, pamaso pa Nyamphamvu zonsene, ule achitisa moyo wanga kusanyika;" 
Job27:3 ndinadumbira mwenemo mbandili na moyo, pontho kuti muya wa Mulungu uli muna ine," 
Job27:4 mulomo wanga nkhabe dzabulusa mafala akuipa tayu, pontho lulume yanga nkhabe dzalonga mafala akunama tayu." 
Job27:5 Ine nkhabe dzalonga tayu kuti imwe mukulonga pyakuona; ine ndinakakamira kuti ndine nyakukhonda dawa kufikirana nsiku ya kufa kwanga. 
Job27:6 Ine nkhabe dzaleka kulonga kuti ndine wakulungama; chikumbu mtima changa nkhabe kundisumulula na pang'ono pene tayu. 
Job27:7 “Anyamalwanga mbatchunyuswe ninga anyakudawika, pontho onsene anyakundipokanya mbaoneswe nyatwa ninga anyakukhonda lungama." 
Job27:8 Ayi panakhala chidikhiro chanji kuna anthu okhonda tsalakana Mulungu iye angagwanda moyo wawo, ndzidzi unafuna Mulungu dzaapokosera moyo wawo?" 
Job27:9 Ayi Mulungu anava kulira kwawo, nyatwa zingaafikira?" 
Job27:10 Ayi iye anagumana kukomerwa muna Nyamphamvu zonsene? Ayi iye anapemphera kuna Mulungu mwakukhonda lekeza? 
Job27:11 “Bwerani ndikufunziseni kukula kwachita mphamvu za Mulungu; ine nkhabe kukubisirani tayu pinthu pyanyerezera Nyamphamvu zonsene kupichita. 
Job27:12 Pyonsenepi imwe mwapiona mwekha ene na maso anu; apo thangwi yache ninji mukulonga pyakusowa basa?” 
Job27:13 “Mwenemu ndiye mumbatchunyusira Mulungu anyakudawika; penepi ndiye pimbatambira anyakuzunguzika kubulukira kuna Nyamphamvu zonsene. 
Job27:14 Iwo anakwanisa kukhala na ana azinji, kwache onsene anamala phiwa kunkhondo; anawo nkhabe dzakhala na kudya kwakukwana tayu." 
Job27:15 Ale adapulumuka anafa na utenda, pontho amamfelwa nkhabe dzasintili anyakufawo tayu." 
Job27:16 Anyakuipa anakwanisa kukhala na siliva wakuinjipa ninga tchetcha, pontho na nguwo zizinji ninga mataka." 
Job27:17 Kwache munthu wadidi ndiye anafuna dzavala nguwo zawozo, pontho munthu wakuona mtima ndiye anafuna dzakwata siliva wawoyo." 
Job27:18 Nyumba imbamanga anyakuipa imbakhala ninga ya nyantandaude, penu ninga khumbi ya nyakuzwingira mbalame m'munda." 
Job27:19 Ndzidzi ubodzi ene wakumalisa iye anagona pansi wakufuma; mbwenye angafungula maso anagumana kuti mfuma yonseneyo yamala mbuluka. 
Job27:20 Pyakugoswa pinamfikira ninga madzi makulu; na mosiku chivumbulu chinambulusa. 
Job27:21 Mphepo yakumabulukiro dzuwa inamkwata mbakhonda onekave; iyo inamtswaira kumbulusa pambuto pache. 
Job27:22 Mphepoyo inammbumbulutha mwakusowa nsisi; iye ambapidigolika mwenemo iye akuyesera kuthawa. 
Job27:23 Mphepoyo inaimba manja; iyo inasekera thangwi iye aenda. 
Job28:1 “Pambakhala mgodi kule kumbakumbwa siliva; pambakhala mbuto kule kumbanyunguluswa golidi. 
Job28:2 Simbi ambakumbwa m'mataka, pontho nkuwa umbanyunguluswa kubulukira kumiyala yankuwa." 
Job28:3 Munthu ambathawisa mdima na nyale, iwo ambasaka-saka kuzwika kwa dziko yapansi, mbakumba mumdima kusaka-saka miyala." 
Job28:4 Kubulukira kutali na kunakhala anthu, pontho kule chipo dzinyalo ya munthu hidzati pondako tayu, anthu ambakumba m'mgodi mwenemo akudelumpha nkhambala m'dzenjemo." 
Job28:5 Pyakudya pile mbamera kubulukira m'mataka; mbwenye pansi pa mataka ontho-onthowa moto umbagaswa kuswa miyala," 
Job28:6 mule mumbagumanwa miyala ya safire, pontho mufumbi yache mumbakhala golidi." 
Job28:7 Mphamba nkhabe dziwa njira yakwendera kumgodi tayu; podi na maso a nkhwazi hadzati onako tayu. 
Job28:8 Chipo nee chirombo chinango cham'tsanga chidzati famba na njira yeneyo; nee nkhalamu idzati gwandirako tayu. 
Job28:9 “Anthu ambakumba miyala yakuwanga mbasiya mitsitsi ya mapiri nyimwa-nyimwa. 
Job28:10 Iwo ambafukula m'miyala mbagumana miyala yakudula yamtundu onsene. 
Job28:11 Iwo ambaphopha mphuno za madzi, mbadzesa pakwecha chinthu chonsene chakubisika." 
Job28:12 Apo nkhupi kumbagumanwa nzeru? Kunakwanisa munthu kafunza udziwisiko nkhupi? 
Job28:13 “Muna munthu nkhabe gumanwa nzeru tayu. Kufunika kwache nkhabe na mbodzi ene anakwanisa kukuvesa tayu. 
Job28:14 Pansi pa bara pambalonga kuti, ‘Nzeru nkhabe gumanwa kuno tayu;’ bara imbalongambo kuti, ‘Muno nzeru nkhabemo.’" 
Job28:15 Golidi wadidiletu nkhabe kwanisa kugula nzeru tayu; kontache nkhabe khala sasawa na siliva tayu. 
Job28:16 Golidi wadidiletu wa ku Ofiri nkhabe kwanisa gula nzeru tayu, nee miyala ya onikisi penu safire nkhabe." 
Job28:17 Nzeru njakufunika pyakwanga kupiringana golidi penu miyala ya krusitali; nkhabe chinjisana na pyakuthemesera pyagolidi. 
Job28:18 Nzeru nkhabe khala sasawa na miyala ya korali penu yasipere; kontache nkhabe khala sasawa na miyala ya rubi. 
Job28:19 Miyala ya topazi ya ku Kushinkhabe khala sasawa na kufunika kwa nzeru tayu, pontho kontache nkhabe khala sasawa na golidi chadi-chadi tayu." 
Job28:20 “Phatache ya nzeruyo njipi apo? Nkhupi kunakwanisa munthu kafunza udziwisi? 
Job28:21 Chinthu chamoyo chakuchita kulengwa nkhabe kuziona tayu, podi na mbalame zene zakutwa maso nkhabe kuziona tayu." 
Job28:22 Podi imfa na kuvungika pimbalonga kuti, ‘Timbalila kuva kwene mbiri basi.’" 
Job28:23 “Mulungu ene basi ndiye ambadziwa njirache, ndiye ene basi ambadziwa mbuto imbagumanwa nzeru," 
Job28:24 thangwi iye maso ache ambafika mpakana kumadolomero a dziko yapansi; iye ambaona pyonsene pya pansi pa thambo. 
Job28:25 Pidapereka Mulungu mphamvu kuna mphepo, mbaikhira bara madire;" 
Job28:26 pidanyerezera Mulungu kule kunafuna dzagwera mvula, pontho na njira inafuna dzagwanda na chiphaliwali;" 
Job28:27 ukhali ndzidzi wenewo udaona iye nzeru, mbayesa kufunika kwache mbazitsikimizira." 
Job28:28 “Mulungu adalonga kuna anthu mbati, ‘Kugopa Mbuya ndi phata ya nzeru, pontho kuleka pyakuipa nkhukhala na udziwisi.’ ”" 
Job29:1 Tenepo Yobu adathimiza kulonga mbati: 
Job29:2 “Ndikhapifunadi kuti moyo wanga mbudakhala ninga montho mwakale, pandzidzi ukhandiyang'anira Mulungu ule." 
Job29:3 Ndzidzi onsene Mulungu akhakhala nane mbandimwinikira pikhafamba ine mumdima. 
Job29:4 Nsiku zenezo pinthu pikhandifambira mwadidi, pontho ushamwali chathu na Mulungu chikhatchinjiriza banjanga." 
Job29:5 Nyamphamvu zonsene akhali nane; ananga akhadandizungulira. 
Job29:6 Ng'ombe zanga zikhandipasa mkaka uzinji, pontho miti yanga yaolivi ikhamera m'mataka amiyala." 
Job29:7 Ndzidzi onsene ukhagumanyikana akulu-akulu pamsuwo wa mzinda, pontho pikhakhala iwo pachintalo cha mzindawo ine ndikhakhalambo pakati pawo." 
Job29:8 Aphale akhandipambukira ndzidzi nkhundiona, pontho akulu-akulu akhaimira kuonesa chilemedzo;" 
Job29:9 atongi a anthu akhakhala mulomo phoo, mbaphopha pakanwa pawo na manjawo;" 
Job29:10 podi na amuna ene akufunika akhamatamambo, pontho lulume yawo ikhamangika m'kanwa mwawo." 
Job29:11 “Makutu onsene adava pya ine ale, akhandichemera nyakutsanzayiswa; maso onsene adandiona ale, akhandichitira umboni," 
Job29:12 thangwi anyakutcherenga angalira, ine ndikhaaphedza; mbandiphedza ana masiye, ale akhasowa na pakutsamira pene." 
Job29:13 Anyakuona nyatwa zikulu akhandisimba, pontho amamfelwa ndikhaachitisa kukomerwa." 
Job29:14 Ndzidzi onsene pyakulungama ndimbapiyesa nguwo zanga; chilungamo ndiye chimbakhala mkhanjo wanga, pontho nduwiranga." 
Job29:15 Kuna maboli-boli ine ndikhali maso awo, pontho kuna anyakulamala ine ndikhali manyalo awo." 
Job29:16 Kuna anyakutcherenga ine ndikhali babawo, mbandiikhira kunduli alendo pamiseru yawo." 
Job29:17 Ine ndidakhutcha mano anthu avinga mbandipulumusa anyakuphatwa m'kanwa mwawo. 
Job29:18 “Ndzidzi onsene ndimbadikhira kukhala na moyo wakulapha, na kufa na mtendere pamsuwo panga." 
Job29:19 Ine ndikhali ninga muti ule mitsitsi yache ikhakhala vuwa m'madzi, pontho ule nthambi zache zikhakhala nyontho na bume." 
Job29:20 Ndzidzi onsene munthu onsene akhandisimba, pontho chipo mphamvu zanga zidzati kundichimwanisa tayu." 
Job29:21 Ndingapereka uphungu, anthu ambakhala fulike mbavesera mwadidi uphungu wanga." 
Job29:22 Ndingamalisa kulonga, iwo nkhabe thimizapo na chinthu chene tayu; mafalanga ambamwerera m'makutu mwawo." 
Job29:23 Iwo akhanditambira na manja mawiri ninga akutambira mvula, ninga mumbachitira nyakulima kusekera phumphuli." 
Job29:24 Iwo angataya mtima, ine ndikhaasekerera; nkhope yanga yakukomerwa ikhaawangisa mtima." 
Job29:25 Ine ndikhaasankhulira njira mbandikhala mfumu wawo. Ine ndidakhala ninga mfumu pakati pa anyankhondo ache, pontho ndikhali nyakuaphata pamkono ndzidzi wa kusintili." 
Job30:1 “Mbwenye amuna ale mbana kuna ine, lero akundiyesa chinthu chakusenzekesa. Ababawo nee akhalive anthu amaso tayu mwakuti ine sidaatawirise tayu kuphedza anambwanga kulondali mabiranga." 
Job30:2 Ayi mphamvu za manjawo mbizidandiganyalisanji, podi mboko zawo zaamalira?" 
Job30:3 Na thangwi yakuti iwo akhali anthu akutcherenga pyakwanga pontho anjala, iwo akhanyenyena mitsitsi ya miti m'thando yatchetcha." 
Job30:4 Iwo akhasaka mtambe na luni mbadya; mbaphatisa basa minyanya ninga nkhuni. 
Job30:5 Iwo akhathamangiswa pakati pa anthu, iwo akhachita kujomerwa ninga mbava." 
Job30:6 Iwo akhakhala m'maphompho, m'madzenje akukumbwa pansi, pontho kunkhwimba." 
Job30:7 Kutali m'tsanga iwo akhalira ninga nyama; iwo akhafinyizana pabodzi pamthunzi wa nyakhanche. 
Job30:8 Akhali anthu akupupwa, pontho a mbiri yakuipa. Iwo adathamangiswa m'dziko." 
Job30:9 “Lero anawo akundiimba nyimbo kundiseka; ine ndasanduka chinthu chakusekesa kuna iwo. 
Job30:10 Iwo ambandizonda mbandichalira; ambawanga mtima kundiphulira mata kunkhope. 
Job30:11 Podi Mulungu athethesa utanga mbandichepesa, iwo nkhabe kundigopave tayu." 
Job30:12 Kukhundu yanga yamadyo dzinza imbandisosa; iwo ambateyera msampha manyalo anga, mbasasanya njira zakundivunga nazo." 
Job30:13 Iwo amala tchinga njiranga mbayesera pyakundivunga wakusowa na mbodzi ene kuakhondesa. 
Job30:14 Kudza kwawo khala ninga akupita na pafufu yakugumuka; pakati pa pyakufudzika iwo ambadza mwamphamvu kuna ine. 
Job30:15 Pyakugoswa pyandiphata pyakwanga pene; chilemedzo changa chambuluka na mphepo, pontho mfumanga yamala wayuka ninga makole." 
Job30:16 “Chinchino ine ndili nenene kufa; nsiku na nsiku nyatwa zili nane kakaidwe. 
Job30:17 Na mosiku magogodo anga ambandiswa pyakwanga, pontho mtswotswo umbandinyenyena ule nkhabe lekave tayu." 
Job30:18 Nguwo zanga zavinyizwa-vinyizwa thangwi ya utenda mwakuti ndashipwa pakhosi. 
Job30:19 Iye adandiponyera m'mathaphwinya; tenepo ndakhala ninga fumbi pontho dotha. 
Job30:20 “Ine ndimbakuchemerani, imwe Mulungu, kwache imwe nkhabe kunditawira tayu; ine ndingapemphera, imwe nkhabe kupiikha konta tayu." 
Job30:21 Imwe mwandikalira mtima; dzanjanu ya mphamvu ikundisanyisa. 
Job30:22 Mumbatawirisa kuti ndimbumbuluthwe na mphepo; mbamundibulumundisa m'chonzi chikulu. 
Job30:23 Ndikupidziwa kuti mukundiendesa kuimfa, pontho kumbuto kunafuna dzaenda anthu onsene a moyo kule." 
Job30:24 Ayi munthu wakuona nyatwa nkhabe dzaphedzwa pinathambidza iye dzanjache? Ayi iye nkhabe dzaverwa nsisi mu kusanyika kwache? 
Job30:25 Ayi anthu akhali panyatwa ale, ine sidalire nawo tayu? Ayi anyakusowa pakuphata, ine sidave nawo nyambalo tayu?" 
Job30:26 Ndzidzi ukhadikhira ine udidi, pyakuipa ndiye pidadza m'mbuto mwache; ndzidzi ukhadikhira ine cheza m'mbuto mwache udadza ndi mdima." 
Job30:27 Ndasanyika pikulu mumtima mwanga, pontho nkhabe puma, pontho nsiku na nsiku kwanga nkhubonera kwene basi." 
Job30:28 Ndimbafamba-famba mwakutsukwala pontho wakusowa chithondozo. Ndimbaimira pamgumano wa anthu kupempha chiphedzo. 
Job30:29 Ine ndasanduka shamwali wa mibinzi, pontho mwanzache dzidzi." 
Job30:30 Khandanga yasanduka yakuswipa bii, pontho yamala suwika-suwika; manungo anga ali jerere kupisa na nyampwanda." 
Job30:31 Nyakatangale wanga asanduka wakulirisa maliro, pontho chitoliro changa chikutawirizana na anyakulira." 
Job31:1 “Ine ndadumbira pikulu pene kuti maso anga nkhabe dzayang'anave mtsikana mwakumsirira tayu. 
Job31:2 “Ayi chinthu chache ntchanji chandikoyera Mulungu? Ayi Nyamphamvu zonsene za kudzulu ambandisasanyira pinthu pyanji? 
Job31:3 Iye ambatumiza nyatwa kuna anthu akuipa, mbatumiza kuvungika kuna anyakuchita pyakudawika." 
Job31:4 Mulungu ambadziwa pyonsene pimbachita ine; mafambiro anga onsene iye ambaaikha maso. 
Job31:5 “Ndinadumbira kuti chipo sidachite chinthu chaufaka-faka tayu; chipo ine nee sidanyengeze munthu na mbodzi ene tayu. 
Job31:6 Mulungu mbandipime na mdida wakuona, tenepo iye anaona kukhonda dawa kwanga." 
Job31:7 Ngakhala ine ndabauka panjira yakuonadi, penu ndakwatika na pyakudawa, ngakhala manjanga aswipiswa na mathotho a pyakudawa," 
Job31:8 penepo mbewu zanga mbizivungike pyazo, pontho anthu anango mbadye pyawo phoso yalima ine ile." 
Job31:9 “Ngakhala ine ndidatunduka na mkazi, penu ndamyamira tsanthembanga kunja kwa msuwo wache," 
Job31:10 penepo mkazanga mbaphikire pyache amuna anango kudya, pontho mbagonwe pyache na amuna anango." 
Job31:11 Kudawa ninga kweneku mbukudakhala kwakugoswa pyakwanga, kwathema kutchunyuswa pikulu pene." 
Job31:12 Mbapidakhala ninga moto wakuvunga mbudanyekesa pyonsene pina ine. 
Job31:13 “Ngakhala ndidapondereza anyabasanga achimuna penu achikazi, ndzidzi udadza iwo dzadungunya kuna ine," 
Job31:14 apo ndinachita tani ndingaonana naye Mulungu? Apo ndinalonganji iye angandivunza pya mseru wanga? 
Job31:15 Mulungu adandilenga ule, ngonthoyo adalengambo anyabasanga; Mulungu wache ngonthoyo adaumba tonsenefe m'mimba mwa amathu." 
Job31:16 “Ine chipo sidaleke kuphedza anyakutcherenga tayu, pontho amamfelwa sidaaleke kwene gwamwa tayu." 
Job31:17 Ana masiye sidaasiye kwene kumimba kadabwi na njala tayu uku ine ndili mimba nganganga kukhuta. 
Job31:18 Kutomera uwananga ine ndaaphedza ninga babawo, pontho moyo wanga onsene ndapereka uphungu wadidi kuna amamfelwa." 
Job31:19 “Ndingagumana munthu wakutcherengera chakuvala penu wakutcherenga pyakwanga mwakuti nkhabe chakufinika," 
Job31:20 ine ndikhampasa nguwo yakusasanywa na ubweya wa bira wa pamkumbi wanga, penepo iye akhandisimba thangwi ya kukhumbirwa kudamchitisa ine kule." 
Job31:21 “Ngakhala ine ndidaphatisa fuwa ya moto mwana masiye mbandipidziwa kuti sinakonwa tayu m'thando ya miseru," 
Job31:22 penepo mikono yanga mbigwandwe pyayo; mbikhwadzuke pyayo m'mapewa mwanga. 
Job31:23 Na thangwi yakuti ndine munthu wakugopa kutchunyuswa kwa Mulungu, ine nkhabe chita chinthu ninga chenecho tayu." 
Job31:24 “Ngakhala ine ndidaikha mtima pamfuma, penu kunyindira golidi," 
Job31:25 penu kugaya na ufumi wanga, penu kutumbama na pinthu pidaphata ine na manjanga;" 
Job31:26 ngakhala ine ndidakwatika na dzuwa, pontho na kuyetima kumbachita iyo, penu mwezi thangwi ya kubalika kwachita iwo;" 
Job31:27 penu kubauswa kupembedza penepi, pakumpsompsona manjanga kuonesa chilemedzo kuna ipyo," 
Job31:28 kudawa ninga kweneku kwathema kutchunyuswa pikulu pene; thangwi penepa nkhulonga kuti ndidakhonda Mulungu wa kudzulu. 
Job31:29 “Ine ndimbadzadzadika mumtima nyamalwanga angasanyika, ine nkhabe kuva kukoma mumtima tayu iwo angaona nyatwa." 
Job31:30 Chipo ine sidatawirise mulomo wanga kudawa tayu pakumtemberera kuti afe. 
Job31:31 Amuna onsene ambandiphatira basa ale, ambapidziwa kuti alendo onsene ndimbaakhutisa na nyama." 
Job31:32 Ndikhachemera anyakufamba pyawo na njira kudza kumsuwo kwanga, mbindikhonda kualeka kugona m'nkhwerekwete mwa njira." 
Job31:33 “Anthu anango ambayesa kubisa pyakudawa pyawo, mbwenye ine chipo sidabise pyakudawa pyanga tayu." 
Job31:34 Ine sidagope kuti anthu analonganji tayu, ine sidakhale kwene mulomo phoo, penu kubindikira m'nyumba tayu, thangwi ya kundithuswa kwawo." 
Job31:35 “Ayi, nkhabe munthu unango wakuvesera pinalonga inepi? Ndinadumbira kuti mafala onsene analonga inewa ngakuona. Nyamphamvu zonsene mbanditawire. “Mbapidakhala kuti mseru unandipambizira nyamalwanga walembwa, towera ine ndiuone," 
Job31:36 ine mbidauvala pagangafuwa panga mwakunyadira, pontho kuuvala mumsolo mwanga ninga chipewu." 
Job31:37 Mulungu mbidampanga pyonsene pyachita ine, mbindifika pamaso pache na chilemedzo ninga mumbachitirwa mfumu." 
Job31:38 “Ngakhala ine ndidachita kuba munda unalima inewu, ngakhala ndidachita kuupokosera kuna mwenechiroache," 
Job31:39 ngakhala ndidadya phoso yakulimwa mwenemo, mbandialeka na njala anyantchoche anga," 
Job31:40 penepo m'mbuto mwa tirigu ntcheswa mbizimere pyazo, pontho m'mbuto mwa mapira dawe mbamere pyache.” Mafala a Yobu adamalira ponthopo." 
Job32:1 Na thangwi yakuti Yobu adakhutira napyo mumtima mwache kuti iye hadadawe tayu, amuna atatu ale adamuleka pyawo okhonda kumtawira." 
Job32:2 Mbwenye munthu unango wakuimira pyache ninga apo, dzinache Elihu, hadakwanise kuuphata mtima tayu, thangwi Yobu akhapilungamisa yekha ene kupiringana Mulungu. (Elihu akhali mwana Barakelo chidzukulu cha Buzi wa m'banja ya Ramu.)" 
Job32:3 Iye adazhangalira pontho ashamwali ache Yobu, amuna atatu ale. Iwo hadagumane mafala akumtawira nawo Yobu tayu. Penepi pidachitisa Mulungu kuoneka ninga wakuphophonya." 
Job32:4 Na thangwi yakuti Elihu akhali wamng'onoletu pakati pawo, iye adadikhira kuti onsene ale amale longa." 
Job32:5 Pidaona iye kuti amuna atatu ale hadakwaniseve kumtawira Yobu tayu, iye adazhangali" 
Job32:6 mbatoma kulonga mbati, “Ine ndine mwana, imwe ndimwe akulu-akulu, natenepo ndikhali na mantha kulonga kuna imwe manyerezero anga." 
Job32:7 Ine ndapinyerezera kuti akulu-akulu ndiye athema kulonga, kuti amuna amvula zakale ndiye athema kugawa nzeru." 
Job32:8 Kwache ndi Mzimu wa Mulungu muna munthu, ndi muya wa Nyamphamvu zonsene, ule ambaapasa nzeru." 
Job32:9 Si kukalamba tayu kumbamchitisa munthu kukhala na nzeru, si kubalwa kale tayu kumbamchitisa munthu kuvesa pinthu." 
Job32:10 Natenepo ndinafuna kuti imwe mundiveserembo, ine ndinati ndikupangenimbo manyerezero anga." 
Job32:11 “Ine ndikhali fulike pikhalonga imwe, ndikhavesera mafalanu akuphata mtima, mbandidikhira pikhasaka-saka imwe mafala a nzeru." 
Job32:12 Ine ndikhavesera mwadidi mwene mbindiva kuchimwana kwanu kumtawira; imwe nee mwampokanya mwakumtsikimizira pinthu pyalonga iye tayu. 
Job32:13 Apo munakwanisa tani kulonga kuti nzeru mwazigumana? Mulungu ndiye athema kuchita naye mphoka Yobu nee munthu tayu. 
Job32:14 Yobu akhalonga na imwe nee na ine tayu, kwache ine sidatawire ninga mwachitira imwe tayu." 
Job32:15 “Yobu, iwo azunguzika mbasowa chakukutawira nacho; mafalawo aamalira." 
Job32:16 Apo ine ndithimize basi kudikhira uku iwo amatama pyawo mwenemo iwo akhala mulomo phoo kusowa chakulonga? 
Job32:17 Nkhabe, ndinati ndikutawire ndine ene, mbandikupanga pinanyerezera ine." 
Job32:18 M'kanwa mwanga mwadzala na mafala; mtimanga ukundikhakhamiza kuti ndilonge. 
Job32:19 Ngakhala ine sinagumana mwayi wakulonga tayu, ndinati nditumbuke ninga budu yanthembe yachinchino kudzala na vinyu." 
Job32:20 Ine ndathema kulonga kuti ndilulupirwe, ndathema kufungula mulomo kutawira." 
Job32:21 Pamseru wenewu ine nkhabe tonga mwakuyang'ana nkhope, pontho sinakomesa munthu tayu." 
Job32:22 Ine kukomesa munthu sinakudziwa tayu, pontho Mulungu ananditchunyusa kabodzi kene ngakhala ndinachita tenepo." 
Job33:1 “Tenepo, Yobu, vesera mafalanga; ikha khutu kuna pinafuna ine kulonga." 
Job33:2 Ndasasanyika kukutawira, ndinakupanga pili mumtima mwanga." 
Job33:3 Mafalanga onsene akutsikimizira kulungama kwanga, pontho pinalonga ine pikuonesa kuona mtima kwanga." 
Job33:4 Mzimu wa Mulungu ndiye andisasanya, muya wa Nyamphamvu zonsene ndiye umbandipasa moyo." 
Job33:5 “Apo nditawire ngakhala unakwanisa, pontho sasanyika kuchita nane mphoka." 
Job33:6 Iwe na ine ntchibodzi-bodzi pamaso pa Mulungu, tonsenefe tasasanywa na dongo." 
Job33:7 Natenepo leka kundigopa; ine nkhabe kukufitikiza tayu. 
Job33:8 “Mafalako apita m'makutu mwanga, pontho ndakuva ukulonga kuti;" 
Job33:9 ‘Ine sidadawe tayu; sidachite chinthu chakudawika tayu. Ndine munthu wangwiro, pontho wakusowa chakundipokanyisa." 
Job33:10 Kwache Mulungu ndiye andigumana na madawo. Iye akundiyesa ninga nyamalwache. 
Job33:11 Iye andimanga matandadza, pontho makhaliro anga onsene ambaaona.’" 
Job33:12 “Kwache ndikukupanga Yobu, kuti penepa iwe wadawa, thangwi Mulungu ngwamkulu kupiringana munthu." 
Job33:13 Thangwi yache ninji iwe ukuketesana na Mulungu kulonga kuti, ‘Iye nkhabe dzatawira mafalanga.’" 
Job33:14 Mulungu ambalonga na njira zakusiyana-siyana, podi kwene kuti munthu nkhabe kupivesa pimbalonga iyepyo tayu." 
Job33:15 Na mosiku anthu angagona pabonde, mwenemo ali m'chitulo chakufa nacho, Mulungu ambalonga na munthu kundoto pontho kumasomphenya." 
Job33:16 Iye ambaachitisa kuvesera pinalonga iye, pontho ambaagoswa mbaacheuza," 
Job33:17 towera aleke pyakudawa pyawo, pontho abasikeletu kutumbama kwawo." 
Job33:18 Iye nkhabe dzaatawirisa kwenda kudziko ya anyakufa tayu; iye ambaapulumusa kuimfa. 
Job33:19 Mulungu ambasumulula munthu pakumdwazika, mbachitisa manungo ache kuti ave kupha," 
Job33:20 towera kukhosi kwache kuswipe nee funa pyakudya tayu, podi pyakudyapyo pikhale pyapyo pyadidi pyakwanga." 
Job33:21 Manungo ache ambamala pakatika; magogodo ache akhabisika kale ale lero ali nkhong'o-nkhong'o. 
Job33:22 Iye ali chifupi kwenda ku Chiphompho chikulu, pontho akutchithira kudziko ya anyakufa." 
Job33:23 “Mwinango mbapadakhala mngelo dzamphedza, nyakumuikhira kunduli pakati pa angelo pikwi-pikwi, ule anadza dzalonga pya kulungama kwache," 
Job33:24 mbalalika mwakumkomera mtima kuti, ‘Mpulumuseni kuti aleke bidira ku Chiphompho chikulu, ndamgumanira dombo kuti asudzulwe.’" 
Job33:25 Penepo manungo ache anasanduka akumyalala ninga a mwana, pontho mphamvu zache zinabwerera ninga mukhali iye mphale." 
Job33:26 Iye angapemphera, Mulungu anava kupempha kwache, mbamtambira pamaso pache mwakukomerwa, mbamuyesa munthu wakulungama." 
Job33:27 Iye analonga pakwecha kuti, ‘Ine ndadawa, sidachite chinthu chakulungama tayu, kwache Mulungu adandilekerera." 
Job33:28 Iye andiombola kuti ndileke kwenda ku Chiphompho chikulu, pontho na lero ndikuona basi cheza cha dzuwa.’" 
Job33:29 “Mulungu ambachita pyonsene kuna munthu, iye ambapichita kawiri, penu mwakubwereza-bwereza," 
Job33:30 kubweza moyo wache ku Chiphompho chikulu, towera aone cheza cha anyakukhala na moyo." 
Job33:31 “Natenepo, Yobu, vesera chinthu chinafuna ine kulonga, matama pontho undileke ndilonge." 
Job33:32 Kwache ngakhala una chinthu kuti ulonge, nditawire, thangwi ndinapifuna kuti iwe uyeswe munthu wakulungama." 
Job33:33 Mbwenye ngakhala iwe nkhabe chakulonga, matama mbundivesere, pontho ndikupange nzeru.”" 
Job34:1 Kubuluka penepo Elihu adathimiza kulonga mbati," 
Job34:2 “Amunamwe, imwe ndimwe anzeru pontho akudziwa pinthu; ngavani kuno pinthu pinafuna ine kulonga." 
Job34:3 Imwe mumbadziwa kuti kudya uku nkhwadidi mungakulawa, kwache si tenepo tayu na mafala anzeru mungaava." 
Job34:4 Tipitonge tekha ene kuti chakulungama ntchipi; tendeni tipidziwe kuti chadidi ntchipi. 
Job34:5 Yobu akupilonga kuti, ‘Ndine munthu wakulungama, mbwenye Mulungu akukhonda kundichitira chilungamo." 
Job34:6 Podi kwene kuti ine ndine wakulungama, ndayeswa nyakunama; podi kwene kuti sidadawe tayu, matswimo andikuwaza pyakwanga.’" 
Job34:7 “Chipo imwe mudzati kuonambo munthu ninga weneyu Yobu? Iye nkhabe lemedza Mulungu tayu. 
Job34:8 Iye basache nkhukhala phathi na anthu akuipa, mbafamba pabodzi na anthu akudawika." 
Job34:9 Iye ambalonga kuti kuchita pimbafuna Mulungu nkhabe kuganyalira munthu tayu. 
Job34:10 “Ngavani kuno imwe anthu akuvesa pinthu! Mulungu nkhabe chita chinthu chakuipa na pang'ono pene tayu, Nyamphamvu zonsene nkhabe dawa na pang'ono pene tayu." 
Job34:11 Iye ambafupa anthu thangwi ya pinthu pyachita iwo, mbaatchunyusa mwakuthemerana na makhaliro awo." 
Job34:12 Ndimomwene Mulungu nkhabe chita chinthu chakuipa, Nyamphamvu zonsene chipo hadzati khala wakusowa chilungamo tayu." 
Job34:13 Ayi mphamvu za Mulungu zidabulukira kuna unango? Ayi adampasa utongi wa dziko yonsene ngunango? 
Job34:14 Mbipidakhala kuti Mulungu adapifuna kupokosera munthu mzimu na muyache wakupasa moyo," 
Job34:15 munthu onsene wa moyo mbadafa, kubwerera pontho kufumbi." 
Job34:16 “Ngakhala imwe ndimwe anzeru; tenepo ndivesereni pinalonga ine. 
Job34:17 Ayi imwe mukunyerezera kuti nyakuzonda chilungamo athema kutonga? Ayi imwe mukusumulula Mulungu, nyakulungama pontho nyamphamvu," 
Job34:18 ule ambalonga kuna mafumu kuti, ‘Ndimwe akusowa basa,’ pontho kuna atongi kuti, ‘Ndimwe akudawika?’" 
Job34:19 Iye nkhabe tonga mseru atongi mwakuyang'ana nkhope tayu, penu kukoma mtima kuna anyamfuma kupiringana anyakutcherenga tayu, thangwi iye ndiye adalenga onsene uwiriawo." 
Job34:20 Munthu anakwanisa kufa mwakututumusa na mosiku. Mulungu ambakhamwadza anthu mbaferatu. Iye ambapha anyamphamvu mwakukhonda bulusa kaluma. 
Job34:21 Maso ache ambakhala ponsene panaenda munthu; iye ambaona mafambiro ache onsene. 
Job34:22 Nkhabe mbuto ya mdima, nkhabe mdima wa ndiwe ani, kule kunakwanisa kubisala nyakudawa." 
Job34:23 Mulungu nkhabe funika kuikha ndzidzi tayu kuti anthu adze pamaso pache dzatongwa mseru. 
Job34:24 Mwakukhonda vunza-vunza iye ambabulusa anyamphamvu pachidzo chawo, mbaikhapo anango m'mbuto mwawo." 
Job34:25 Na thangwi yakuti iye ambadziwa mabasawo, iye ambaasosa na mosiku, tenepo iwo ambamala peyeka." 
Job34:26 Iye ambaatchunyusa pakwecha thangwi ya pyakudawa pyawo," 
Job34:27 thangwi iwo aleka kumtewera mbakhonda tsalakana matongero ache na abodzi ene," 
Job34:28 mwakuti achitisa kulira kwa anyakutcherenga kufika kuna iye, tenepo iye adava kulira kwawo kufuna chiphedzo." 
Job34:29 “Ngakhala Mulungu anakhala kwene mulomo phoo, mbani anakwanisa kumsumulula? Ngakhala iye anabisa nkhope yache mbani anakwanisa kumuona. Kwache Mulungu ali padzulu pa anthu na dziko ene," 
Job34:30 towera akhondese munthu okhonda tsalakana pya iye kutonga, pontho kuti aleke teyera misampha anthu." 
Job34:31 “Tisangize munthu unango alonge kuna Mulungu kuti, ‘Ine ndatchunyuka, pontho sinadawave tayu." 
Job34:32 Ndifunziseni pinthu pinakhonda ine kwanisa kuona; ngakhala ndachita pyakudawika, ine nkhabe dzapichitave tayu.’" 
Job34:33 Ayi Mulungu anakwanisa kukufupa na mafalakowa, mwenemo iwe ukukhonda kuleka pyakudawa pyako? Ndiwe wathema kusankhula nee ine tayu; natenepo ngandipange chinadziwa iwe." 
Job34:34 “Amuna akuvesa pinthu ambalonga, amuna anzeru, ale ambandiva, ambalonga kuti," 
Job34:35 ‘Yobu akulonga kwene mwakusowa udziwisi, pontho pyonsene pinalonga iye nkhabe mphuno tayu." 
Job34:36 Nyerezerani pyonsene pimbalonga Yobu; munakwanisa kuona kuti iye ambalonga ninga munthu wakuipa. 
Job34:37 Padzulu pa pyonsenepi iye ambathimizapo kupandukira; pamaso pa ife tonsene iye ambaketesana na Mulungu.’ ” 
Job35:1 Kubuluka penepo Elihu adathimiza kulonga mbati," 
Job35:2 “Ukunyerezera, Yobu, kuti mphinthu pyamaso kulonga kuti ndiwe wakulungama pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Job35:3 Penu kumvunza Mulungu kuti, ‘Ayi pyakudawa pyanga pyasosanji? Ayi chaganyali ine ninji pakukhonda dawa?’" 
Job35:4 Ine ndinati ndikutawire mivunzo yakoyi, iwe pabodzi pene na ashamwali akowa." 
Job35:5 “Yang'ana kuthambo mbuone; makole ali kudzulu pyakwanga kupiringana iwe! 
Job35:6 Ngakhala iwe unadawa, ayi penepyo nkhabe pinthu na Mulungu tayu? Ngakhala unachita umambala kazinji kene, ayi Mulungu nkhabe kuva napyo kupha tayu?" 
Job35:7 Kukhala nyakulungama kumbamphedzanji Mulungu? Ayi chinakwanisa iye kutambira ninji kuna iwe? 
Job35:8 Ndi munthu mnzako ule ambasanyika thangwi ya kudawa kwako, pontho pyadidi pimbachita iwe pimbamphedza." 
Job35:9 “Anthu angaponderezwa, iwo ambabulira; iwo ambalira chiphedzo thangwi ya kuzunguzika kwa anyamphamvu." 
Job35:10 Kwache iwo hambazungunukira kuna Mulungu nyakualenga tayu, ule ambaapasa chidikhiro mosiku," 
Job35:11 ule ambaachitisa kukhala anzeru, anzeru kupiringana nyama penu mbalame." 
Job35:12 Pimbalira iwo kufuna chiphedzo, Mulungu hambaatawira tayu, thangwi iwo ngakunyada pontho ngakuipa." 
Job35:13 Kuna Mulungu, kulira kwawo nkhupitcherengesa kwene pyawo; Nyamphamvu zonsene nkhabe kupiikha konta tayu." 
Job35:14 “Yobu, ukulonga kuti iwe nkhabe kwanisa kumuona Mulungu; kwache dikhira mwakuuphata mtima, mseru wako auva." 
Job35:15 Ayi iwe ukunyerezera kuti Mulungu nkhabe tchunyusa mwakuzhangali tayu, pontho kuti iye hambaikha maka konta tayu kuna pyakudawa?" 
Job35:16 Iwe, Yobu, pinalonga iwe nkhabe mphuno, mafalako azinji mbapezi-pezi.”" 
Job36:1 Elihu adathimiza kulonga mbati," 
Job36:2 “Fulika mbuvesere ndzidzi pang'ono; kuna pinthu pinafuna ine kulonga m'mbuto mwa Mulungupi. 
Job36:3 Nzeru zanga ndazikwata kutali pyakwanga; ndinati ndiziphatise basa kuonesa kuti nyakundilenga ngwakulungama. 
Job36:4 Papyonsene pinakupanga inepi, nkhabe chakunama tayu; munthu wanzeruletu ali pakati pako." 
Job36:5 “Mulungu ngwamphamvu pyakwanga; iye nkhabe lulupisa munthu tayu. Nkhabe chinthu na chibodzi chene chimbakhonda iye vesesa tayu. 
Job36:6 Iye nkhabe lekerera anyakudawa kuthimiza kukhala na moyo tayu, mbwenye ambachitira chilungamo anyakusanyiswa." 
Job36:7 Iye ambatchinjiriza anthu ale mbakulungama; mbaatawirisa kutonga ninga mafumu, pontho mbaalemedza kwenda na kwenda." 
Job36:8 Mbwenye ngakhala anthu amangwa na njema, na kusanyiswa thangwi ya pinthu pyachita iwo," 
Job36:9 Mulungu ambaonesesa pinthu pyachita iwo, kudawa na kutumbama kwawo." 
Job36:10 Iye ambaachitisa kuva kuasumulula kumbachita iye, mbaatonga kuleka pyakudawa pyawo." 
Job36:11 Ngakhala iwo anavera Mulungu mbamtumikira, anakhala pamtendere m'moyo wawo onsene, pontho pinthu pyawo pyonsene pinaafambira mwadidi." 
Job36:12 Mbwenye ngakhala hanavera tayu anaphiwa na talasada, mbafa pyawo akusowa udziwisi." 
Job36:13 “Kuna anthu ale okhonda tsalakana Mulungu ambathimiza basi kukhala akuzhangali podi kwene kuti atchunyuswe, iwo nkhabe pemphera kuti aphedziwe tayu." 
Job36:14 Iwo ambafa mbali atete ene, pontho moyo wawo mbumala mwakuchitisa manyadzo." 
Job36:15 Kwache Mulungu ambapulumusa anthu kudzera mukusanyika, mbaphatisa basa nyatwa kufungula maso awo." 
Job36:16 “Mulungu akubulusa panyatwa, mbakuchitisa kukomerwa thangwi ya kukhala akutonthola; pyakudya pili mbwee pathebulu pako." 
Job36:17 Mbwenye lero ukutchunyuswa ninga mumbachitirwa anyakuipa; kutongwa mseru mwachilungamo kwakugwera. 
Job36:18 Chita mphole-mphole kuti uleke kwatika na mfuma, penu kunyengezwa pakuchita kudyekerwa." 
Job36:19 Ayi kulira kufuna chiphedzo kungachitise kuti nyatwa zimale? Mphamvu zanu zonsene nkhabe kukuphedzani tayu. 
Job36:20 Leka khumba kuti mosiku udze; wenewo ndi ndzidzi unafuna dzavungwa madzinza. 
Job36:21 Chita mphole-mphole gopesera unazungunukira kuna pyakuipa, thangwi pyakuipa ndiye pidakudzesera kusanyika." 
Job36:22 Kumbuka kukula kwachita mphamvu za Mulungu; iye ndi mfunzisi wamkulu kupiringana onsene. 
Job36:23 Nkhabe na mbodzi ene anakwanisa kupanga Mulungu pyakuchita tayu, penu kumsumulula kuti achita pyakuipa tayu." 
Job36:24 Iye ambakuzwa thangwi ya pinthu pimbachita iye; iwembo pontho wathema kumkuza na nyimbo. 
Job36:25 Munthu onsene apiona pyachita iye; kwache iwo anakwanisa kupiona na pakansinzo. 
Job36:26 Mulungu ngwamkulu pyakwanga; ife nkhabe kwanisa kuvesa ukulu wache onsene tayu; munthu nkhabe kulengesa pyaka pyache tayu. 
Job36:27 “Ndi Mulungu ule ambakwata madzi kubulukira pa dziko yapansi; mbaaphika kukhala madontho a mvula. 
Job36:28 Iye ambavumbisa mvula kubulukira m'makole mbawazira pana anthu onsene. 
Job36:29 Nkhabe na mbodzi ene ambadziwa mule mumbafambira makole, penu mule mumbadimira chiphaliwali m'nyumba mwache kudzulu." 
Job36:30 Iye ambatumiza njazi kuthambo yonsene, pile pimbafika podi na pansi pa bara pene." 
Job36:31 Mwenemu ndiye mumbatonga iye madzinza mbaapasa phoso izinji. 
Job36:32 Iye ambaphata njazi na manjache mbaitonga kuti igwe pambuto panafuna iye. 
Job36:33 Kulira kwa chiphaliwali kumbalonga pya kudza kwa chonzi; podi na ng'ombe zene zimbadziwisa pya kudza kwayo. 
Job37:1 “Penepi pimbachitisa mtimanga kudima pikulu pene; mbupaluka na mantha. 
Job37:2 Veserani kubangula kunachita fala ya Mulungu, kuna kudima kwakubulukira m'kanwa mwache." 
Job37:3 Iye ambachitisa njazi kuchetuma kugwanda na kuthambo, kutomera kumadolomero a dziko kafika pontho kumadolomero a dziko." 
Job37:4 Penepo kutitima kwa falache kumbaveka ninga fala yachifumu, mwenemo ching'ani-ng'ani chikuchetuma." 
Job37:5 Na utongi wa Mulungu pinthu pyakudzudzumisa pimbachitika, pinthu pyakudodomesa pyakuti ife nkhabe kupivesa tayu." 
Job37:6 Iye ambatonga matalala kugwa padziko yapansi, mbatonga mvula kulikitika." 
Job37:7 Iye ambaimisa anthu kuphata mabasawo, mbaaonesa pinthu pinakwanisa iye kuchita." 
Job37:8 Nyama zam'tsanga zimbabisala mbizienda kumadzimba kwawo. 
Job37:9 Chivumbulu chimbadza kubulukira kumbuto yache, pontho mphepo yakutonthola imbadza kubulukira kumpoto." 
Job37:10 Muya wa Mulungu umbachitisa madzi kutonthola, mbachitisa nyanza kuphatana ninga mwala." 
Job37:11 Iye ambadzaza makole akuswipa na madzi; njazi imbachetuma kubulukira m'makole. 
Job37:12 Iwo ambafamba-famba na kutongwa kwa Mulungu. Iwo ambachita pyonsene pimbaatonga Mulungu, konsene kwene padziko yapansi." 
Job37:13 Mulungu ambavumbisa mvula kuthirira dziko yapansi; iye ambakwanisa kuitumiza towera atchunyuse nayo anthu, penu kuonesa kukoma kwache mtima." 
Job37:14 “Dikhira pang'ono Yobu, mbundivesere; nyerezera pinthu pyakudodomesa pimbachita Mulungu." 
Job37:15 Ayi iwe ukudziwa mule mumbaperekera Mulungu matongero ache, mbachitisa njazi kuchetuma kubulukira m'makole?" 
Job37:16 Ayi iwe ukupidziwa mule mumbabelukira makole kuthambo, basache yakudodomesa yakuphatwa mwaluso pyakwanga?" 
Job37:17 Nkhabe, iwe umbava kupisa pyakwanga, mwenemo mphepo yakumwera ikusanyisa dziko." 
Job37:18 Ayi imwe munakwanisa kumphedza Mulungu kufuthula thambo, na kuichitisa kukhala yakuwanga ninga gilazi?" 
Job37:19 Tifunzise chakuti tilonge kuna Mulungu; ife nkhabe chakuti tilonge thangwi takhala mumdima. 
Job37:20 Ayi ndinakwanisa kupempha Mulungu kuti ndilonge; thangwi yache ninji kuti ndimpase mwayi wakundivunga nawo? 
Job37:21 “Tenepo chinchino munthu nkhabe kwanisa kuyang'ana dzuwa thangwi kuyetima kwache nkhwamphamvu pyakwanga, mwenemo makole amala tswairwa mwadidi mwene na mphepo." 
Job37:22 Kubulukira kumpoto kuyetima kukulu kukuoneka, pontho demelero ya Mulungu njakugopeka pyakwanga." 
Job37:23 Nyamphamvu zonsene ngwamkulu pyakwanga mwakuti ife nkhabe kumfikira chifupi tayu. Iye ngwakulungama pontho wachilungamo pakuchita pinthu na anthu. 
Job37:24 Ndi thangwi yache munthu onsene ambamgopa; iye ambakhonda anyakupiyesa okha ene anzeru ale.” 
Job38:1 Kubulukira m'chivumbulu MBUYA adalonga kuna Yobu. 
Job38:2 Ndiwe ani iwe kuti udzudzumise uphungu wanga na mafalako akusowa nzeru pontho apezi-peziwo? 
Job38:3 Imira dzololo khala ninga ndiwedi mamuna; unditawire mivunzo inakuvunza ineyi? 
Job38:4 Ayi iwe ukhalipo pikhaikha ine maziko a dziko yapansi? Ngakhala unadziwadi pinthu, ngandipange." 
Job38:5 Mbani adalemba madire a dzikoyo? Mbani adaipima na nkhambala? Ayi mivunzo yonseneyi kutawira kwache ukukudziwa iwe? 
Job38:6 Ayi ninji chimbaphatisa mizati ya dziko yapansi? Mbani adaikha mwala wa pankhomo wa dziko yapansi," 
Job38:7 ndzidzi ukhaimba nthanda pabodzi pene na nyenyezi zinango, pontho pikhakhuwa angelo mwakukomerwa?" 
Job38:8 Mbani adafunga msuwo kuti bara ileke kuka, ingatumbuka kubulukira m'mimba mwa dziko yapansi?" 
Job38:9 Ndine ndidagudumira bara na makole mbandiiunyiza mumdima. 
Job38:10 Ndidaikha madire a bara mbandifungira misuwo na mphinga. 
Job38:11 Ine ndidaitonga kuti, “Basi wakwana, leka kwenda kutali! Mabimbi ako amphamvuwo mbamalire pano.”" 
Job38:12 Ayi Yobu ilipombo nsiku pa moyo wako onsene idatonga iwe kuti masikati asanduke makalakwecha? 
Job38:13 Ayi ilipombo nsiku idatonga iwe makalakwecha kumwinikira dziko yapansi, mbusokolosa anyakudawa m'mbuto zidabisala iwo?" 
Job38:14 Masikati ambachitisa mapiri na maphedi kuonekera ninga nguwo zakufunya-funya, yakudindika mwadidi ninga chidindo chakudindwa padongo." 
Job38:15 Anyakudawika akukhonda cheza chawo, pontho mkono wawo wamphamvu wakhumuka." 
Job38:16 “Ayi chipo hudzati manga ulendo kwenda kumphuno za madzi a m'bara penu kufamba pansi pa madzi a m'bara? 
Job38:17 Ayi chipo iwe udatoma kuoneswa misuwo ya kuimfa? Ayi chipo iwe udatoma kuona misuwo ya kumbuto ya mdima? 
Job38:18 Ayi unakwanisa kunyerezera kuti dziko yeneyi yakula tani? Nganditawire ngakhala ukupidziwadi. 
Job38:19 “Njirache imbabulukira cheza njipi? Apo nkhupi kumbakhala mdima? 
Job38:20 Apo iwe unakwanisa kupikwata kwenda napyo kumbuto zawo? Ayi njira zakwendera kumbakhala ipyo unazidziwa iwe? 
Job38:21 Ndimomwene, unakwanisa kupidziwa thangwi ndiwe nkhalamba, pontho kuti ukhali penepo mukhasasanywa dziko yapansi!" 
Job38:22 “Ayi hudzati fikako kumasubi kule kumbakoyerwa kutonthola, penu kuona masubi ambakoyerwa matalala?" 
Job38:23 Ndimbapikoya penepi kusasanyikira ndzidzi wa nyatwa, pontho nsiku zakumenyana pontho nkhondo." 
Job38:24 Ayi hudzati fikako iwe kule kumbabulukira dzuwa penu kule kumbabulukira mphepo ya mbalu? 
Job38:25 “Mbani adakumba mgelo wakuvumbisa mvula mbachenesa njira ya chiphaliwali? 
Job38:26 Mbani ambachitisa mvula kuvumba kuthando yatchetcha, kumbuto kule nkhabe khala anthu tayu?" 
Job38:27 Mbani ambathirira thando yatchetcha, towera maudzu amere?" 
Job38:28 Ayi mvula imbakhalambo na baba? Ayi babache bume mbani? 
Job38:29 Apo mache madzi akuphatana mbani, pontho mbani adabala mainja?" 
Job38:30 Ngule ambasanduza madzi kukhala ninga mwala, pontho kuchitisa madzi kuphatana pabara?" 
Job38:31 “Ayi iwe unakwanisa kumanga gulu ya mteme ndikutemembo, penu kusudzula nkhambala za mkazi mwezi?" 
Job38:32 Ayi iwe unakwanisa kubulusa atsikana akugwa mago pandzidzi wache wakuthema, na kutsogolera khwasa na gulu yache ya nyenyezi?" 
Job38:33 Ayi mwambo umbaphatiswa basa kuthambo umbaudziwa, pontho unakwanisa iwe kuuchitisa kuti uphatembo basa pansi pano?" 
Job38:34 “Ayi iwe unakwanisa kukhuwira makole, mbuachitisa kubira m'mabimbi a madzi?" 
Job38:35 Ayi iwe unakwanisa kutonga njazi kuti ichetume, ayi iyo inakwanisa kudza kuna iwe kulonga kuti, ‘Ndasasanyika?’" 
Job38:36 Mbani ambatonga makole, pontho kupereka uphungu kuna mvula?" 
Job38:37 Mbani ana nzeru zakulengesa nazo makole? Mbani anakwanisa kuboma pitomba pyakudzulu 
Job38:38 kusanduza fumbi kukhala matope, pontho kuchitisa mataka kukhala madongolomwa?" 
Job38:39 “Ayi iwe umbakhulisa kuphera nyama nkhalamu ikazi, mbukhutisa ana a nkhalamu," 
Job38:40 zinganjunja m'madzimba mwawo, penu kubisalira chinthu chinango pathenthere?" 
Job38:41 Mbani ambapereka pyakudya kuna makhungubwe anawo angalira na njala kulirira Mulungu, mbadzedzereka thangwi ya kusowa pyakudya?”" 
Job39:1 “Ayi iwe umbadziwa ndzidzi umbateya mbala? Apo udatoma kuona panateya nyasa? 
Job39:2 Ayi umbalengesa miyezi yache imbakhala iyo na bele kufikirana kuteya; ndzidzi umbabala izo ana umbaudziwa? 
Job39:3 Iwo ambanjunja mbabala ana; mtswotswo wawo wakubala umbamala. 
Job39:4 Anawo ambakhala akujintcha mbakula mwamphamvu m'tsangamo; iwo ambabuluka penepo mbakhonda bwerera pontho. 
Job39:5 Mbani ambatawirisa bulu wam'tsanga kwenda pyache? Mbani ambasudzula nkhambala zache? 
Job39:6 Ine ndidampasa thando yatchetcha kukhala nyumbache, pontho maphedi amunyu ninga mbuto yache." 
Job39:7 Iye nkhabe komerwa na chimpiningu cha muluwani. Iye hambava kukhuwa kwa anyakufambisa pingolo tayu. 
Job39:8 Iye ambafamba-famba paphiri kusaka maudzu kuti adye, mbasaka-saka chinthu chonsene chakubiriwira." 
Job39:9 “Ayi nyati inatawira kukutumikira? Ayi na mosiku iyo inakhala m'khola mwako? 
Job39:10 Ayi iwe unakwanisa kumanga nyati na bande kuti ilime, penu kuichitisa kuti ikweye phaza kutipula m'munda mwako?" 
Job39:11 Ayi iwe unakwanisa kumnyindira thangwi ya mphamvu zache zikulu? Ayi unakwanisa kumsiyira mabasako onsene amphamvu? 
Job39:12 Ayi unakwanisa kumkhulupira kuti anakudzesera mapira, penu kuatuta kwenda nawo pambuwa?" 
Job39:13 “Maphaphido a mphuwani ambafuthuka mwakukomerwa pyakwanga, kwache iye nkhabe mbuluka tayu ninga mumbachitira chidokowe?" 
Job39:14 Mphuwani imbateya mazayi ache pamataka, towera mazayiwo apisirwe na m'bebebe wa mataka ule." 
Job39:15 Iye nkhabe dzindikira tayu kuti mazayiwo anakwanisa kupondedzwa, penu nyama za m'tsanga zinaabwededza." 
Job39:16 Iye ambachita ninga anawo si ache tayu, pontho hakupiikha konta tayu kuti mphamvu zache zamalira papezi," 
Job39:17 thangwi Mulungu adamchitisa kukhala pupwe, mbammana nzeru." 
Job39:18 Kwache angatoma kuthamanga, anakwanisa kuseka kavalo na nyakumpakirache." 
Job39:19 “Ayi ndiwe Yobu udapasa akavalo mphamvu, pontho kuachitisa kukhala na chinjerere kumsana?" 
Job39:20 Ayi udaachitisa ndiwe kunumpha ninga nyadzombe, mbathuswa anthu na kulira kwawo?" 
Job39:21 Mwakukomerwa akavalo ambanumpha-numpha m'phedi; iwo ambathamangira kunkhondo na mphamvu zawo. 
Job39:22 Iwo nkhabe dziwa kuti mantha ninji, pontho nkhabe talasada inakwanisa kuabweza tayu." 
Job39:23 Matswimo athukula anyakuapakira ambalira; dipa na momba pimbayetimira na dzuwa. 
Job39:24 Kutetemera thangwi ya kukomerwa, akavalo ambathamanga; ngoma ingalira iwo nkhabe kwanisa kuimira kwene tayu." 
Job39:25 Ndzidzi onsene unalizwa ngoma, iwo ambafwentha. Iwo ambava khwema ya nkhondo mbadzati fika chifupi, mbava mathubu na anyankhondo akukhuwa." 
Job39:26 Ayi nyakasenera adafunziswa na iwe kumbuluka angafuthula maphaphido ache kuyang'ana kumwera. 
Job39:27 Apo mphamba umbadikhira iwe kuti umtonge kumbuluka padzululetu, pontho kumanga chisa chache pansonga ya phiri?" 
Job39:28 Iye ambamanga nyumbache pamiyala, miyala yakusongoka mbikhala mbuto yache yakupata." 
Job39:29 Kubulukira penepo ambaona kutali pyakwanga, kusaka-saka nyama" 
Job39:30 kuti anawo aswute chiropa cha nyamayo; konsene kwene kuna chinthu chakufa iye ambakhala kweneko.” 
Job40:1 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Yobu mbati," 
Job40:2 “Ayi Yobu iwe ukufuna kuchita mphoka na Nyamphamvu zonsene? Apo iwe, nyakufuna kuketesana na Mulungu, tawiratu.”" 
Job40:3 Tenepo Yobu adatawira MBUYA mbati," 
Job40:4 “Ine sidatheme tayu; ndinakutawirani tani? Ine ndinaphopha pyanga mulomo. 
Job40:5 Ndalonga kale pinthu pizinji kupiringana pyathema ine kulonga, natenepo ine nkhabeve chakulonga tayu.”" 
Job40:6 Tenepo kubulukira m'chivumbulu, MBUYA adalonga pontho kuna Yobu mbati," 
Job40:7 “Imira dzololo ngakhala ndiwedi mamuna mbunditawire mivunzo yangayi. 
Job40:8 Ayi iwe ukufuna kundionesa ninga nyakusowa chilungamo? Kundiyesa wakudawa iwe mbukhala wakulungama? 
Job40:9 Ayi iwe una mphamvu ninga za Mulungu? Falako inakwanisa kudima ninga ya Mulungu? 
Job40:10 Ngakhala pili tenepo imira kupilemedza wekha ene pontho utumbame; pivazike wekha ene na pinthu pyachifumu pontho na demelero. 
Job40:11 Na kuzhangali pontho ukali wako, ngayang'ana anthu anatumbamawo mbuachepese." 
Job40:12 Ande, ngaayang'ane anyakutumbama onsenewa mbuatchithise pansi; pondedza anyakudawika ponsene panaimira iwo." 
Job40:13 Onsene afikhire pansi, pontho uaponye m'perezo kudziko ya anyakufa." 
Job40:14 Tenepo ine ndinakhala wakutoma kukusimba, mbindilonga kuti na mkono wako wapipulumusa wekha ene." 
Job40:15 “Ngayang'ana nyangume Behemoti, nyama ikulu, Ndidamulenga ndine mbindilenga pontho iwe. Iye ambadya maudzu ninga ng'ombe." 
Job40:16 Iye ngwamphamvu pikulu pene, manungo ache ngakuwanga." 
Job40:17 Mchirache umbaimira tchii ninga muti wamkungudza, pontho nyama za m'miyendo mwache nsakuphatana." 
Job40:18 Magogodo ache ngakuwanga ninga nkuwa, pontho miyendo yache akhala ninga mitandaliko yasimbi." 
Job40:19 “Pachinthu chakudodomesa chonsene chidalenga ine, weneyumbo ndiye koto, kwache ndi nyakumulenga ene basi ule anakwanisa kumkunda." 
Job40:20 Maudzu akuti iye akwanisa kudya ambamera m'mapiri, kule kumbasenzeka nyama zam'tsanga." 
Job40:21 Iye ambagona tumba pansi pa mathundudzi a minga, mbabisala pakati pa mabande." 
Job40:22 Mathundudzi a mingayo ambampasa mthunzi, pontho mikotamu m'khundu-khundu mwa mkulo imbamphimbira." 
Job40:23 Iye nkhabe chita mantha na kukukuma kwa mkulo; iye ambakhala pyache fule m'madzi a mu Yorodani angakapiza kunkhope kwache. 
Job40:24 Mbani anakwanisa kumdozola maso ache mbamphata, penu kumkwesha mphuno yache na chimedzo." 
Job41:1 “Ayi iwe unakwanisa kumedza Leviatani na chimedzo penu kumanga lulume yache na nkhambala? 
Job41:2 Ayi iwe unakwanisa kupitisa nkhambala na mphuno mwache, penu kumkoloweka nsabwada zache na chimedzo." 
Job41:3 Ayi iye anathimiza kukupempha kuti umsudzule, penu kulonga nawe na mafala adidi?" 
Job41:4 Ayi iye anakwanisa kuchita chiverano na iwe, mbadumbira kuti anakutumikira kwenda na kwenda?" 
Job41:5 Ayi iwe unakwanisa kusenzeka naye ninga mbalame, penu kummangirira na nkhambala kuti atsikanako asenzeke naye?" 
Job41:6 Ayi anyamalonda anamzengeza? Apombo iwo anamgwanda-gwanda kumgulisa? 
Job41:7 Ayi unakwanisa kulasa khandache na dipa, penu kuphola msolo na momba." 
Job41:8 Yesera kwene kumphata kabodzi; iwe unabasikiratu, pontho nkhabe dzaduwalira nthonga yeneyo tayu." 
Job41:9 “Munthu onsene angaona nyama yeneyi, kuwanga mtima kwache kumbamala mbagwa pansi." 
Job41:10 Iye angazhangali ambachitisa mantha mwakuti nkhabe munthu ambawanga mtima kuimisana naye tayu. 
Job41:11 Mbani anakwanisa kumsosa mbakhala na moyo? Nkhabe na mbodzi ene m'dziko yonsene ya pansi anakwanisa kuchita tenepo. 
Job41:12 “Leka ndikupange pya miyendo yache, pontho ndilonge pyakukula kwachita iye na mphamvu zache." 
Job41:13 Nkhabe anakwanisa kusuwa chikhanda chache, penu kulasa khandache thangwi ya ntchindu yache." 
Job41:14 Mbani anakwanisa kukanula kukanwa kwache, thangwi ya mano ache akugoswa?" 
Job41:15 Kunduli kwache kudasasanywa na mizere ya pyakugedera matswimo, pyakulukwa pabodzi pene pontho pyakuwanga ninga mwala." 
Job41:16 Phaphi yonsene yaphatanizwa mwa mphamvu kuna inzache, mwakuti muya nkhabe buluka na mwakuphatanizira mule tayu." 
Job41:17 Onsene amangiswa pabodzi pene mwakuti nkhabe chinthu na chibodzi chene chinakwanisa kualekanisa tayu. 
Job41:18 Iye angaotsira ntchasi zimbachetuma, pontho maso ache ambagaka ninga kubuluka kwa dzuwa." 
Job41:19 Malulume a moto ambayerima m'kanwa mwache, pontho mumbabuluka ntchasi." 
Job41:20 Utsi umbabuluka na m'mphuno mwache ninga utsi wa maudzu akugaka pansi pa chikalango. 
Job41:21 Kupuma kwache kumbagasa makala a moto, malulume a moto ambabuluka m'kanwa mwache." 
Job41:22 Khosi yache njamphamvu pyakwanga mwakuti onsene ambagumanikana na iye ambachita mantha. 
Job41:23 Nyamache njamphanda, yonsene njakuphatana pyadidi pene pontho yokhonda tekenyeka." 
Job41:24 Chiditi chache ntchakuwanga ninga mwala, ntchakuwanga ninga libwe." 
Job41:25 Iye angatichita khakhaphathu, podi na anyamphamvu ene ambachita mantha; iwo ambathawa thangwi ya shungu yache." 
Job41:26 Nkhabe talasada, ile inakwanisa kumkoloza; nee dipa, tswimo penu momba pinakwanisa kumjobola tayu." 
Job41:27 Kuna iye simbi imbakhala ninga phesi, pontho nkuwa umbakhala ninga nkhuni yakutchokoya." 
Job41:28 Nkhabe tswimo inakwanisa kumchitisa kuthawa; kumponyera miyala na mbemba kumbakhala ninga kumponyera masundu-sundu. 
Job41:29 Kuna iye chigomba chimbakhala ninga phesi; iye ambaseka ngakhala munthu anamponyera momba. 
Job41:30 Mabade akumimba kwache ambakhala ninga madzinga; pinakambadza iye ambanyandula mataka. 
Job41:31 Iye ambachitisa nyanza kupeluka ninga madzi pamoto, kukuvula kumbachita iye m'madzi kumbaoneka ninga kuvungazwa kwa mafuta." 
Job41:32 Iye ambachitisa mabimbi kuyetimira m'nduli mwache angafamba, mbasanduza nyanza kukhala na mapovu akuchena." 
Job41:33 Nkhabe pontho chinango chakukhala ninga iye, iye ndi chinthu chakulengwa chile nkhabe mantha tayu." 
Job41:34 Iye ambalulupisa nyama zakutumbama makazo; iye ndi mfumu wa nyama zikulu-zikulu zam'tsanga.” 
Job42:1 Penepo Yobu adatawira MBUYA mbati," 
Job42:2 “Ndikupidziwa MBUYA kuti munakwanisa kuchita pyonsene pinafuna imwe, nkhabe munthu anakwanisa kukukhondesani tayu chinthu na chibodzi chene chinanyerezera imwe." 
Job42:3 Imwe mwandivunza kuti, ‘Ndiwe ani iwe kuti udzudzumise uphungu wanga, munthu ene pyache okhonda dziwa pinthu.’ Ndidalonga pinthu pyakuti ine nkhabe kupivesa tayu, pinthu pyakudodomesa kuna ine mwakuti ine nkhabe kupidziwa tayu." 
Job42:4 Imwe mudandipanga kuti ndivesere mwenemo imwe mukulonga, pontho kuti ndiyese kutawira mivunzo yanu." 
Job42:5 M'ndulimu chikhadziwa ine pya imwe ntchontho chikhandipanga anthu anango, mbwenye lero ndakuonani na maso anga." 
Job42:6 Natenepo ndikuchita manyadzo na pinthu pyalonga ine, pontho ndikupikhwaza fumbi na madotha kuonesa kutchunyuka kwanga.”" 
Job42:7 Pidamala MBUYA kulonga na Yobu, adalongambo kuna Elifazi wa Chitemani mbati, “Ine ndazhangali pyakwanga nawe pabodzi pene na ashamwali ako awiriwa, thangwi nee mwalonga pyakuonadi pya ine tayu, ninga mwachitira nyabasanga Yobu." 
Job42:8 Chinchino kwatani ng'ombe zimuna zinomwe na mabira achimuna anomwe mbamupipereke kuna Yobu pontho mupereke nsembe zakupyerera thangwi ya imwe enechiro ache. Yobu anakupemphererani, tenepo ine ndinava kupemphera kwache, mbandileka kukuchitisani manyadzo malingana na pinthu pidachita imwe. Imwe hamudalonge pyakuonadi ninga mudachitira Yobu tayu.”" 
Job42:9 Elifazi wa Chitemani, Bilidadi wa Chishuhi, na Zofari wa Chinaama adachita pinthu pidaapanga MBUYA; tenepo MBUYA adava kupemphera kwa Yobu." 
Job42:10 Pidamala Yobu kupempherera ashamwali ache atatu ale, MBUYA adachitisa pontho pinthu pya Yobu kufamba mwadidi mbakhala wakufuma pyakwanga kawiri kupiringana pakutoma." 
Job42:11 Abale ache na anyamaingache pabodzi pene na ashamwali ache Yobu onsene akale adadza kuna iye dzachedza naye mbadya naye pabodzi pene phwando m'nyumba mwache. Iwo adamthondoza mbampepesa thangwi ya nyatwa zonsene zikhadamdzesera MBUYA. Munthu onsene wa iwo adamdzesera kobiri na mphete yagolidi. 
Job42:12 MBUYA adamtsanzayisa khundu yakumalisa ya moyo wa Yobu kupiringana kutsanzayiswa kudachitwa iye pakutoma. Yobu akhali na mabira pikwi khumi na pinayi, ngamila pikwi pitanthatu, na ng'ombe za pachingolo pikwi piwiri na mabulu chikwi chibodzi." 
Job42:13 Iye adabala ana anomwe achimuna na ana atatu achikazi. 
Job42:14 Mwanache wamkazi wamkululetu adamthula Yemima, wachiwiriyi Kezia, wakumalizirayi adamthula Kereni-Hapuki." 
Job42:15 M'dziko yonsene pakhali nkhabe akazi akubalika ninga ana achikazi a Yobu tayu. Babawo adaagawaniza mfuma ile pabodzi pene na nkhoswe zawo kuti asale napyo. 
Job42:16 Pidamala penepi Yobu adakhala na moyo pyaka pinango dzana na makumanayi; iye adaona pidzukulu pyache mpakana mfendu wachinayi. 
Job42:17 Tenepo iye adafa wakukalamba pontho wa pyaka pizinji pyakubalwa. 
Psalms1:1 Ngakutsanzaya anthu ale, ambakhonda kuvera uphungu wa anthu akuipa, ale ambakhonda kuteweza njira za anthu akudawika, penu kukhala pabodzi na anthu ale nkhabe basa na Mulungu." 
Psalms1:2 M'mbuto mwache ambagumana kutsanzaya pakuvera mwambo wa MBUYA, pontho ambaanyerezera mosiku na masikati." 
Psalms1:3 Iwo akhala ninga muti wakumera m'khundu-khundu mwa mkulo wakukuka madzi, ule umbabala nsapo pandzidzi wache, pontho ule masambache nkhabe unyala tayu. Pyonsene pimbachita iwo pimbaafambira mwadidi." 
Psalms1:4 Mbwenye anyakuipa nkhabe khala ninga tenepa tayu; iwo akhala ninga makupu-kupu ale ambambuluka na mphepo. 
Psalms1:5 Anyakudawa anakonwa pamaso pa Mulungu mbabuluswa kuna anthu ache. 
Psalms1:6 Anyakulungama ambayang'anirwa, pontho kutchinjirizwa na MBUYA, mbwenye anyakuipa mamalisiro ache nkhutayika." 
Psalms2:1 Ninji madzinza akusasanya pyakupandukira? Ninji anthu akuverana pyapezi-pezi? 
Psalms2:2 Mafumu awo akupikhazikisa okha ene, atongi awo akuverana pabodzi pyakupokanyisana na MBUYA, pontho kupokanyisana na mfumu adasankhula iye ule." 
Psalms2:3 Iwo akulonga tenepa: “Tendeni tibuluke pansi pa utongi wawo, Tendeni titaye njema zawo.”" 
Psalms2:4 Kubulukira pa mpando wache wachifumu kudzulu MBUYA akuseka, pontho akuasedegula." 
Psalms2:5 Tenepo iye akuacheuza mwakuzhangali, pontho akugoswa pikulu na ukali wachewo." 
Psalms2:6 Iye akulonga kuti, “Pa Zioni, phiri yanga yakupambulika, ndadzozekapo mfumu wanga.”" 
Psalms2:7 Mfumu akulonga kuti, “ndinalalika pyalonga MBUYA. Iye adalonga kuna ine mbati: ‘Iwe ndiwe mwananga; lero ndasanduka babako." 
Psalms2:8 Pempha, tenepo ine ndinakupasa madzinza onsene; dziko yonsene yapansi inakhala yako." 
Psalms2:9 Iwe unaaswa na mthondodzo wasimbi; unaapwetedza ninga nkhali.’ ” 
Psalms2:10 Tenepo imwe mafumu, vani kucheuzwaku; dziwani ipi, imwe atongi a padziko yapansi:" 
Psalms2:11 Mtumikereni MBUYA na mantha; komerwani mwakutetemera," 
Psalms2:12 pontho mulambireni; gopesera kuzhangali kwache kunakula kabodzi kene, pontho imwe mungafe kabodzi kene. Ngakutsanzaya ale ambaenda kuna iye, towera atchinjirizwe." 
Psalms3:1 MBUYA, anyamalwanga ngazinji; anyakundipandukira ngazinji ene." 
Psalms3:2 Iwo ambalonga pya ine mbati, “Mulungu hanamphedza tayu.”" 
Psalms3:3 Mbwenye imwe, MBUYA, ndzidzi onsene ndimwe chakugedera matswimo changa; imwe mumbandichitisa kukhala wakulemedzwa, pontho mumbabwezera kuwanga kwanga mtima." 
Psalms3:4 Ine ndimbachemera MBUYA kuti andiphedze, tenepo kubulukira pa phiri yache yakupambulika iye ambanditawira." 
Psalms3:5 Ine ndimbagona pansi mbandigona chitulo, tenepo mosiku onsene MBUYA ambanditchinjiriza." 
Psalms3:6 Ine nkhabe gopa pikwi-pikwi pya anyamalwa tayu, ale andizungulira khundu zonsene." 
Psalms3:7 Bwerani, MBUYA! Ndipulumuseni, Mulungu wanga! Mumbatchunyusa anyamalwanga onsene, pontho mumbaasiye mwaakhutcha mano." 
Psalms3:8 Kukunda kumbabulukira kuna MBUYA. Iye mbatsanzayise anthu ache. 
Psalms4:1 Ndiverenimbo pinapempha ine, Mulungu, nyakunditchinjiriza. Pikhali ine panyatwa, imwe mudandiphedza. Ndikomerenimbo mtima, pontho ndiverenimbo kupempha kwanga." 
Psalms4:2 Munaleka lini, imwe anthu, kunditikana? Munaleka lini kufuna pinthu pyakusowa basa na kutewera milungu yapezi?" 
Psalms4:3 Kumbukani kuti MBUYA apisankhulira munthu wakulungama, tenepo MBUYA ambandiva ndingamchemera." 
Psalms4:4 Tetemerani na mantha mbamuleka kudawa; nyerezerani mwadidi pya penepi, pinagona imwe phee pamatalimbanu." 
Psalms4:5 Perekani nsembe zakuthema kuna MBUYA, pontho mnyindireni iye." 
Psalms4:6 Pana anthu azinji, ale ambapemphera kuti: “MBUYA, titsanzayiseni na pinthu pizinji. Cheza cha nkhope yanu chitimwinikire!”" 
Psalms4:7 Mbwenye kukomerwa kwandipasa imwe nkhukulu pyakwanga kupiringana pyonsene pinakhala na iwo, mapira na vinyu wawo ene." 
Psalms4:8 Ndingagona pansi, ndimbagona chitulo na mtendere; imwe ene MBUYA, ndiye mumbandiyang'anira mwadidiletu." 
Psalms5:1 Ndiverenimbo, MBUYA, pinalonga inepi, pontho onani kusanyika m'manyerezero kunachita ineku." 
Psalms5:2 Vani kulira kwanga kufuna kuphedzwa, Mulungu wanga, pontho mfumu wanga! Ndikupemphera kuna imwe, MBUYA;" 
Psalms5:3 imwe mumbava falanga na machibese; dzuwa ingabuluka ndimbapemphera mbandidikhira kuti imwe munditawire. 
Psalms5:4 Imwe si Mulungu wakukomerwa na pyakudawika tayu; imwe nkhabe tawira chinthu chakuipa pamaso panu tayu. 
Psalms5:5 Anthu akudungudza nkhabe dzaimira pamaso panu tayu; imwe mumbazonda anthu akudawika onsene. 
Psalms5:6 Imwe mumbavunga anyakunama onsene; nyakuchita upandu na nyakunyengeza anzache, MBUYA mumbanyansirwa naye." 
Psalms5:7 Mbwenye thangwi ya kundifuna kwanu kokhonda mala ndinakwanisa kupita m'Nyumba mwanu; ndinakwanisa kupembedza m'Nyumba mwanu yakuchena, pontho kulamba kuna imwe mwakukugopani." 
Psalms5:8 MBUYA, anyamalwanga ngazinji! Nditsogolereni kuchita pinafuna imwe; sasanyani njiranu kuti ikhale yakuoneka, towera ndifambemo." 
Psalms5:9 Pinalonga anyamalwanga, ine nkhabe kupinyindira tayu; chinafuna iwo nkhuvunga kwene basi. Mafalawo ngadidi pontho akukoma kuava, kwache iwo ngakudzala na manyerezero akupha." 
Psalms5:10 Mulungu, iwo akonwe pamaso panu, pontho muatchunyuse; pinanyerezera iwopyo kundichitira piachitise kuvungika. Abuluseni pamaso panu thangwi ya pyakudawa pyawo pizinji, pontho na kukupandukirani kwachita iwo." 
Psalms5:11 Mbwenye onsene anabisala muna imwe ale, anakomerwa; ndzidzi onsene anakwanisa kuimba thangwi ya kukomerwako. Atchinjirizeni anthu ambakufunani ale; thangwi ya imwepo, iwo akomerwadi pikulu." 
Psalms5:12 Imwe MBUYA mumbatsanzayisa anyakukuverani; kuafuna kwanu kumbaatchinjiriza ninga chakugedera matswimo. 
Psalms6:1 MBUYA, lekani kundizhangalira na kundilongera! Lekani kunditchunyusa uku mwazhangali." 
Psalms6:2 MBUYA, ine ndamaliratu pyanga pano; ndiverenimbo nsisi ine! MBUYA, ndipasenimbo mphamvu; ndatoperatu pyakwanga pene," 
Psalms6:3 pontho moyo wanga onsene wasanyika pyakwanga. MBUYA, munadikhira kufikirana lini kuti mundiphedze?" 
Psalms6:4 Bwerani, MBUYA, mundiombole; thangwi ya kundifuna kwanu kokhonda mala ndipulumuseni." 
Psalms6:5 Nkhabe munthu ambakukumbukani angaenda kudziko ya anyakufa; mbani ambakukuzani kweneko. 
Psalms6:6 Ine ndamaliratu na kubulira; mosiku onsene ndimbatotesa patalimba panga thangwi ya kulira; nsago wanga watota na misozi. 
Psalms6:7 Diso yanga ikuona mwanyatwa thangwi ya kutsukwala; iwo atupa na kulira thangwi ya anyamalwanga. 
Psalms6:8 Bulukani pana ine, imwe anthu akuipa! MBUYA akuva kulira kwanga;" 
Psalms6:9 MBUYA ambava kulira kwanga kufuna chiphedzo, tenepo MBUYA anatawira pinampempha ine." 
Psalms6:10 Anyamalwanga anachita manyadzo, pontho anatetemera pikulu na mantha; iwo anathawa mwakuzunguzika kabodzi kene." 
Psalms7:1 MBUYA, Mulungu wanga, ndikudza kuna imwe kuti ndibisale; ndipulumuseni, pontho ndiomboleni m'manja mwa anyakundithamangisa," 
Psalms7:2 gopesera anandikhwathula ninga nkhalamu na kundikhwadzula mapindi-mapindi okhonda munthu unango wakundipulumusa tayu. 
Psalms7:3 MBUYA, Mulungu wanga, ngakhala ndachita ipi, ngakhala ndadawira munthu unango," 
Psalms7:4 ngakhala ndapereka munthu unango m'manja mwa anyamalwache, penu kuchita pyakuzunguzika kuna anyamalwanga okhonda thangwi," 
Psalms7:5 penepo tawirisani anyamalwanga kuti andithamangise mbandiphata. Atawiriseni kundigwanda khosi na kundipha, pontho na kundisiya pansi wakufa pontho wakululupiswa." 
Psalms7:6 MBUYA, lamukani na kuzhangali kwanu! Imirani kumenyana na ukali wa anyamalwanga; lamukani mwekha ene kundiphedza! Chinafuna imwe ntchilungamo," 
Psalms7:7 natenepo gumanyisani anthu onsene kukuzungulirani mbamuatonge kubulukira kudzulu. 
Psalms7:8 Imwe ndimwe nyakutonga mseru wa madzinza onsene. MBUYA, tongani mseru wanga mwakundikomera; thangwi ndachita pyakulungama, pontho ndapichita na mtima wakuona." 
Psalms7:9 Imwe ndimwe Mulungu wakulungama, pontho wakutonga manyerezero na pikhumbo pyathu. Anthu akudawa alekeseni kuchita pyakuipa, pontho anyakuchita pinthu pyadidi afupeni." 
Psalms7:10 Mulungu ndiye nyakunditchinjiriza; anyakukhala na mtima wakuona iye ambaapulumusa. 
Psalms7:11 Mulungu ndi nyakutonga mseru mwakulungama, pontho ndzidzi onsene ambazhangalira anyakudawa." 
Psalms7:12 Ngakhala iwo hanaleka njira zawozo tayu, Mulungu ananozwa talasadache. Iye ambakunga utache kuti ukhale wakusasanyika;" 
Psalms7:13 iye ambakwata pida pyache pyankhondo mbachitisa kusasanyika matswimo ache akugaka moto. 
Psalms7:14 Yang'anani munanyerezera anthu akuipa; iwo ambanyerezera pya kudzesa nyatwa mbachita pinthu pyakunama. 
Psalms7:15 Kwache misampha imbateyera iwo anthu anango, imbakwesha iwo ene enechiro." 
Psalms7:16 Natenepo iwo akutchunyuswa na pinthu pyawo pyakuipa, pontho na kuzunguza kwawoko iwo akupikuwaza." 
Psalms7:17 Ndinapereka takhuta kuna MBUYA, thangwi ya chilungamo chache, ndinaimba nyimbo zakukuza nazo MBUYA Wakudzulu-dzulu." 
Psalms8:1 MBUYA, Mbuyathu, m'dziko yonsene yapansi ukulu wanu waoneka! Mpakana kudzulu, demelero yanu yafika;" 
Psalms8:2 ikuimbwa na ana, pontho akachiya. Imwe muli pakupata thangwi ya anyamalwanu onsene; anyamalwanu mumbaalekesa kukupokanyisani." 
Psalms8:3 Ndingayang'ana kudzulu, kule kudalenga imwe na manjanu, mwezi na nthondowa, zile zidaikha imwe m'mbuto mwache," 
Psalms8:4 munthu mbani wakuti imwe mumbamnyerezera; munthu wakubalwa na munthu wakuti imwe mumbamtsalakana. 
Psalms8:5 Kwache imwe mudamuikha kukhala okhonda funika kuna imwe ene basi. Imwe mwampitisa ufumu na demelero, pontho na chilemedzo." 
Psalms8:6 Imwe mudamsankhula kukhala mtongi wa pyonsene pidasasanya imwe; mudamuikha pinthu pyonsene pansi pa manyalo ache: 
Psalms8:7 mabira, ng'ombe pontho na nyama zam'tsanga zene," 
Psalms8:8 mbalame, nsomba pontho na pyakulengwa pyonsene pya m'bara." 
Psalms8:9 MBUYA, Mbuyathu, m'dziko yonsene yapansi ukulu wanu waoneka!" 
Psalms9:1 Na mtimanga onsene, ndinakukuzani imwe, MBUYA; ndinati ndilonge pyakudodomesa pyonsene pyachita imwe." 
Psalms9:2 Ndinati ndiimbe mwakukomerwa thangwi ya imwe. Ndinati ndiimbe nyimbo zakukuza imwe, Nyakudzulu-dzulu." 
Psalms9:3 Anyamalwanga ambazungunukira m'nduli pimbaonekera imwe; iwo ambagwa pansi mbafa. 
Psalms9:4 Imwe mumbatonga mseru mwadidi, pontho mwakukoma mtima, tenepo mwatonga mseru wanga mwakundikomera." 
Psalms9:5 Imwe mwalongera madzinza onsene mbamuvunga anthu akudawika. Iwo nkhabe kumbukirikave tayu. 
Psalms9:6 Anyamalwathu amaliratu; imwe mwavunga mizindawo, tenepo iwo anaduwalirwa kwenda na kwenda." 
Psalms9:7 Mbwenye MBUYA ndi mfumu wakukhala na kukhala; iye aikha mpando wache wachifumu kuti atonge mseru. 
Psalms9:8 Iye ambatonga dziko yapansi mwakulungama; iye ambatonga mseru madzinza na chilungamo. 
Psalms9:9 MBUYA ndiye pakubisalirapo anthu akusanyika, mbuto yakupata pandzidzi wa nyatwa." 
Psalms9:10 Onsene ambakudziwani imwe MBUYA anati akunyindireni; munthu onsene wakudza kuna imwe, imwe nkhabe kumsiya yekha ene tayu." 
Psalms9:11 Imbani nyimbo zakukuza nazo MBUYA, mfumu wa Zioni! Pangani madzinza onsene pyachita iye!" 
Psalms9:12 Mulungu nyakutchunyusa anyachirope, ambakumbuka anyakubonereswa onsene; iye nkhabe duwalira kulira kwawo tayu. Pontho anyakuadawira, iye ambaatchunyusa." 
Psalms9:13 Ndiverenimbo nsisi ine, MBUYA! Yang'anani nyatwa inandionesa ine anyamalwangayi. Ndipulumuseni kubulukira kuna mphamvu za imfa," 
Psalms9:14 towera ndikwanise kuimira pamaso pa anthu a ku Yerusalemu mbandiapange pinthu pyonsene pinakukuzirani ine. Ndinati ndikomerwe thangwi mudandipulumusa. 
Psalms9:15 Madzinza akumba mulindi, mbagweramo ndiwo ene. Iwo akwesheka na misamphawo yonthoyo." 
Psalms9:16 MBUYA apitchulula yekha ene na kutonga kwache mwakulungama; na mabasawo onthowo anthu akuipa akwesheka. 
Psalms9:17 Anyakudawa anaenda kudziko ya anyakufa; madzinza onsene ambakhonda Mulungu ale. 
Psalms9:18 Ndzidzi onsene anthu akusowa pinthu nkhabe dzaduwalirwa tayu; chidikhiro cha anthu akutcherenga nkhabe dzapondedzwa tayu. 
Psalms9:19 Bwerani MBUYA! Lekani tawirisa munthu kukhala wakukunda. Dzani nawo madzinza pamaso panu mbamuatonge mseru. 
Psalms9:20 Achitiseni kukhala amantha, MBUYA; achitiseni kudziwa kuti iwo mbanthu ene pyawo." 
Psalms10:1 MBUYA munakhaliranji kutali? Apo mumbabisaliranji ndzidzi unakhala ife panyatwa? 
Psalms10:2 Anyakudawika, na kudungudza kwawo, ambaboneresa anyakutcherenga; akwesheni na misampha yateya iwoyo." 
Psalms10:3 Nyakudawika ambadungundza na pikhumbo pyache pyakuipa; iye ambatsanzayisa nyamtima mbakhonda MBUYA. 
Psalms10:4 Nyakudawika nkhabe tsalakana pya MBUYA tayu; iye na kudungudza kwacheko ambanyerezera kuti nkhabeko Mulungu. 
Psalms10:5 Pyonsene pimbachita nyakudawika pimbamfambira mwadidi. Iye nkhabe vesesa pya kutonga mseru kwa Mulungu tayu; iye ambasedegula anyamalwache. 
Psalms10:6 Iye ambalonga yekha ene mbati, “Ine nkhabeve dzatekeseka tayu. Ine nkhabeve dzaona nyatwa tayu.”" 
Psalms10:7 Mafalache ngakudzala na pyakutemberera, pyakunama na pyakugoswa. M'kanwa mwache mumbabuluka mafala akufudza pontho akuipa." 
Psalms10:8 Iye ambabisala m'nkhwerekwete mwa midzi, kudikhirira anthu okhonda dawa kuti aaphe. Iye ambabisalira anyakusowa mphamvu;" 
Psalms10:9 ninga nkhalamu mumsitu, iye ambabisalira m'mbuto yakubisika. Iye ambabwathama kudikhira anyakutcherenga; iye ambaakwesha na misampha yache mbaakwekweta kwenda nawo." 
Psalms10:10 Anyakusowa mphamvu ambapondedzwa; iwo ambagwa pansi pa mphamvu zache. 
Psalms10:11 Nyakudawika ambalonga yekha ene mbati, “Mulungu nkhabe kupitsalakana tayu! Iye abisa nkhope yache, tenepo nkhabe kundiona tayu!”" 
Psalms10:12 MBUYA atchunyuseni anthu akudawika! Anyakuona nyatwa akumbukeni. 
Psalms10:13 Ayi nyakudawika anakwanisa tani kululupisa Mulungu mbalonga yekha ene mbati, “Mulungu nkhabe dzanditchunyusa tayu?”" 
Psalms10:14 Mbwenye imwe mumbaona; mumbadziwa nyatwa na kusanyika konsene, pontho ndzidzi onsene ndimwe wakusasanyika kuphedza. Nyakusowa mphamvu ambapipereka yekha ene kuna imwe, ndzidzi onsene imwe mumbaphedza anyakusowa babawo." 
Psalms10:15 Gobolani mikono ya nyakudawika na nyakuipa, atchunyuseni thangwi ya kudawa kwachita iwo, mpakana iwo abasikeletu." 
Psalms10:16 MBUYA ndi mfumu wakukhala na kukhala; madzinza anyakupembedza milungu anango anavungika m'dziko mwache. 
Psalms10:17 MBUYA, imwe munati muve kupempha kwa anyakubonereswa; munati muawangise mtima." 
Psalms10:18 Munati muve kulira kwa anyakubonereswa, pontho na ana masiye. Imwe munati mutonga mseru mwakuakomera, towera anthu apansi pano aleke dzathuswave." 
Psalms11:1 Ndimbanyindira MBUYA kuti ananditchinjiriza. Ndimwe akupupwa, ale mumbalonga kuna ine kuti, “Mbuluka ninga mbalame kuthawira kumapiri," 
Psalms11:2 thangwi anyakudawika akunga kale mautawo, pontho aikhapo matswimo kuti kubulukira mumdima alase anyakulungama." 
Psalms11:3 Nkhabe chinango chinakwanisa kuchita nyakulungama, ngakhala mizati yonsene yamala vungika.”" 
Psalms11:4 MBUYA ali m'Nyumba yache yakuchena; iye ana mpando wache wachifumu kudzulu. Iye ambayang'ana anthu onsene konsene kwene mbadziwa pinaphata iwo. 
Psalms11:5 MBUYA ambayesa anyakulungama pontho na anyakudawa ene sasawa; na mtimache onsene iye ambazonda anthu, ambafuna pyakuzunguza ale." 
Psalms11:6 Iye ambagwisa makala a moto, pontho miyala ya moto yasulufule pana anyakudawa. Iye ambaatchunyusa na mphepo ikulu yakuvunga." 
Psalms11:7 MBUYA ngwakulungama, pontho iye ambafuna mabasa adidi; ale anaphata mabasa enewo anafika pamaso pache." 
Psalms12:1 MBUYA, tiphedzenimbo ife! Nkhabe nyakulungama asala tayu; anyakukhulupirika hakuonekave tayu." 
Psalms12:2 Onsene ambanamizana pyawo; ambanyengezana pyawo na mafala akukoma kuava. 
Psalms12:3 Matamisani ana m'kanwa mwakutapirawo, MBUYA! Fungani mulomo wakudungudza umbalongawo mbati," 
Psalms12:4 “Na mafalathu timbagumana pimbafuna ife. Tinati tilonge pinafuna ife, tenepo nkhabe mbodzi anakwanisa kutikhondesa tayu.”" 
Psalms12:5 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Mbwenye chinchino ndinati ndibwere, thangwi anyakutcherenga akupondererwa pansi, pontho anyakubonereswa akubulira thangwi ya kuva kupha. Ine ndinati ndiapase chitchinjirizo chinafuna iwo.”" 
Psalms12:6 Pinalonga MBUYA tinakwanisa kupinyindira; ipyo mphyamaso ninga siliva wakunyunguluswa kanomwe m'dzenje ya moto. 
Psalms12:7 Anthu akudawa akugaya konsene kwene, pontho munthu onsene ambakuza pyakuipa. Tiyang'anireni mwadidi MBUYA, pontho tikoyeni kutali na anthu enewa." 
Psalms12:8  
Psalms13:1 MBUYA, munandiduwalira kufikirana lini? Ayi kwenda na kwenda? Imwe munapibisa kuna ine kufikirana lini?" 
Psalms13:2 Ndinapirira nyatwayi kufikirana lini? Ndinatsukwala mosiku na masikati kufikirana lini? Anyamalwanga andikunde kufikirana lini? 
Psalms13:3 MBUYA Mulungu wanga, ndionenimbo mbamunditawira. Bwezerani mphamvu zanga; lekani tawirisa kuti ndigonere mkono." 
Psalms13:4 Lekani tawirisa anyamalwanga kulonga kuti, “Tamkunda.” Lekani tawirisa anyamalwanga kusekera thangwi ya kugwa kwanga." 
Psalms13:5 Ine ndimbanyindira kundifuna kwanu kwa kukhonda malaku; ndinati ndikomerwe thangwi imwe munati mundipulumuse. 
Psalms13:6 Ndinati ndikuimbireni, MBUYA, thangwi mumbandichitira pinthu pyadidi." 
Psalms14:1 Mapupwe ambalonga mumtima mwawo kuti, “Kunja kuno nkhabeko Mulungu.” Onsene manyerezero amala vungika, pontho achita pinthu pyakuipa pyakugoswa; nkhabe na mbodzi ene ambachita pyakulungama tayu." 
Psalms14:2 Na kudzulu MBUYA ambayang'ana pansi pana anthu kuti aone ngakhala pana munthu ene mbodzi wanzeru, munthu ene mbodzi wakusaka-saka Mulungu." 
Psalms14:3 Mbwenye onsene amala bauka kwenda pyawo m'tsanga; onsene ntchibodzi-bodzi ngakuipa. Nkhabe mbodzi ambachita pinthu pyakulungama, nee na mbodzi ene nkhabe." 
Psalms14:4 MBUYA akuvunza mbati, “Kadi iwo nkhabe dziwa tayu? Kadi onsene anaphata pyakuipawa nkhabe dziwa pinthu tayu? Iwo ambakhala na moyo, thangwi ya kubera anthu anga kumbachita iwoko, pontho iwo nkhabe pinthu na kupemphera kuna ine tayu.”" 
Psalms14:5 Mbwenye iwo anati athuswe pikulu pene, thangwi Mulungu ambakhala kukhundu ya anyakulungama." 
Psalms14:6 Anyakuipa ambadzudzumisa manyerezero a atcherengi, mbwenye MBUYA ndiye pakubisala pawo." 
Psalms14:7 Ndimbapemphera pikulu pene kuti chipulumuso cha Israele chibulukire ku Zioni. Anthu a ku Israele anakomerwa pyakwanga, MBUYA angachitisa pontho pinthu pyawo kufamba mwadidi!" 
Psalms15:1 MBUYA, mbani anakwanisa kupita m'mbuto yanu yakuchena? Mbani anakwanisa kakupembedzani pa Zioni, phiri yanu yakupambulika?" 
Psalms15:2 Ngule ambavera Mulungu papyonsene, pontho ndzidzi onsene ambaphata pyakulungama, ule mafalache ngakuonadi pontho akukhulupirika." 
Psalms15:3 Ngule ambakhonda singirira anzache, munthu okhonda dawira anzache, penu kulongera pyakuipa tsanthembache." 
Psalms15:4 Ngule ambalulupisa anyakukhondwa na Mulungu, mbwenye ambalemedza anyakuvera MBUYA; munthu wakuchita pyonsene pidadumbira iye, podi kwene kuti kupagali kwache kukhale kukulu tani." 
Psalms15:5 Ngule ambafiyalisa kobiri mwakukhonda chitisa katapira, mbakhonda kudyekerwa kuti alonge umboni wakunama kupokanyisana na munthu okhonda dawa. Munthu onsene wakuchita pinthu penepi nkhabe dzatekeseka na pang'ono pene tayu." 
Psalms16:1 Mulungu nditchinjirizeni, thangwi pakubisala panga ndimwe." 
Psalms16:2 Ndikulonga kuna imwe, MBUYA kuti, “Imwe ndimwe Mbuyanga; pyonsene pyadidi pina ine pimbabulukira kuna imwe.”" 
Psalms16:3 Ngadidi pyakwanga anthu akukhulupirika a MBUYA! Kukomerwa kwanga kukululetu nkhukhala pabodzi na iwo. 
Psalms16:4 Anthu ambathamangira milungu inango ale ambapidzesera nyatwa zizinji. Ine nkhabe dzakwatapo khundu pansembe za chiropa zimbapereka iwozo tayu; ine nkhabe dzapembedza milungu yawoyo tayu. 
Psalms16:5 Pyonsene pina ine, MBUYA, ndimwe ene basi, pontho imwe mumbandipasa pyonsene pinasowa ine; moyo wanga wa m'tsogolo uli m'manja mwanu." 
Psalms16:6 Mbuto yadidiletu yandisiyira imwe njakudodomesa, ndakomerwa nayo pyakwanga!" 
Psalms16:7 Ndinakuza MBUYA thangwi ya kundipangiza kwache; na mosiku chikumbu mtima changa chimbandicheuza. 
Psalms16:8 Ndzidzi onsene ine ndimbadziwa kuti MBUYA ali pano. Iye ali m'khundu mwanga, tenepo nkhabe chinango chinakwanisa kunditekesa tayu." 
Psalms16:9 Natenepo mtimanga wakomerwa pyakwanga, pontho ndikupereka takhuta; ndikuonadi kuti ndikutchinjirizwa mwadidiletu," 
Psalms16:10 thangwi imwe nkhabe dzandisiya kudziko ya anyakufa tayu, penu kutawirisa nyabasanu wakukhulupirika kuvunda m'masiye." 
Psalms16:11 Imwe munandionesa njira yakwendera kumoyo; kukhala kwanu chifupi na ine kumbadzesa kukomerwa kukulu kuna ine, pontho kumbadzesa kutsanzaya kuna ine kwenda na kwenda." 
Psalms17:1 Vani MBUYA, kudungunyira kwanga chilungamo; veserani kulira kwanga kufuna kuti mundiphedze! Ndiverenimbo pinakupemphani ine mwakuona mtima." 
Psalms17:2 Imwe munati mutonge mseru mwakundikomera, thangwi mumbadziwa kuti pyakulungama ninji." 
Psalms17:3 Mtimanga mukuudziwa. Imwe mwabwera kuna ine na mosiku; imwe mwamphemphesa mwadidi mwene mbamugumana kuti nkhabe pikhumbo pyakuipa muna ine tayu. 
Psalms17:4 Ine nee ndimbalonga pyakuipa ninga mumbachitira anango tayu; ine ndavera matongero anu, pontho nee ndateweza njira za anyanthonga tayu." 
Psalms17:5 Ndzidzi onsene ndafamba m'njira yanu, pontho manyalo anga hadatherezike tayu." 
Psalms17:6 Ndikupempha kuna imwe Mulungu, thangwi munandiva, natenepo zungunukani kuna ine kuno kuti muve kupemphera kwanga." 
Psalms17:7 Onesani pakwecha kundifuna kwanu kokhonda mala, pontho mundipulumuse; m'khundu mwanu ndimbagumanamo kutchinjirizwa kuna anyamalwanga."
