Psalms17:8 Nditchinjirizeni ninga mboni ya diso; ndibiseni m'maphaphido anu," 
Psalms17:9 gopesera anyamalwanga anandiphata, anyamalwa aupandu andizungulirawo." 
Psalms17:10 Iwo nkhabe vera munthu nsisi tayu, pontho ambalonga mwakudungudza." 
Psalms17:11 Iwo andizungulira konsene kwene kunazungunukira ine, kusaka-saka mwayi kuti andigwise." 
Psalms17:12 Iwo akhala ninga nkhalamu yakunjunja m'tsanga kudikhirira ine kufuna kuti andikhwadzule khwadzule. 
Psalms17:13 Bwerani, MBUYA, musumulule anyamalwanga, pontho muakunde. Ndipulumuseni m'manja mwa anthu akuipa na talasadanu;" 
Psalms17:14 ndipulumuseni, MBUYA, m'manja mwa anthu, ale m'moyo uno ana pyonsene pinafuna iwo. Atchunyuseni na nyatwa zidaakoyera imwe, pontho pakhale pinango pyakukwana pya anawo, pontho pinango pyakusalirapyo pikhale pya pidzukulu pyawo." 
Psalms17:15 Mbwenye ine ndinati ndikuoneni, thangwi ine nee ndadawa tayu Pontho ndingalamuka kuchitulo ndinaona nkhope yanu; ndinakomerwa kukuonani maso na maso." 
Psalms18:1 MBUYA ndimbakufunanidi! Imwe ndimwe mphamvu zanga. 
Psalms18:2 MBUYA ndiye phanzwi yanga; iye ndiye mpandanga wamphamvu, pontho dombo wanga. Mulungu wanga nkhumwala kumbabisala ine kule, pontho ndiye mphamvu zanga zakukunda nazo. Iye ambanditchinjiriza ninga chakugedera matswimo." 
Psalms18:3 Ndimbachemera kuna MBUYA, tenepo iye ambandipulumusa m'manja mwa anyamalwanga. Mbakuzwe MBUYA!" 
Psalms18:4 Kugoswa kwa imfa konsene kudandizungulira; mabimbi akuvunga akhandigabikira. 
Psalms18:5 Kugoswa kwa dziko ya anyakufa kudandizungulira, pontho masiye adanditeyera msampha." 
Psalms18:6 Ndzidzi wanga wa nyatwa ndidamchemera MBUYA; ndidamchemera Mulungu wanga kuti andiphedze. Iye adava falanga m'Nyumbache; iye adava kulira kwanga kufuna kuphedzwa. 
Psalms18:7 Tenepo dziko yapansi idatetemera mbitekenyeka; maziko a mapiri adatetemera mbatekenyeka, thangwi Mulungu azhangali." 
Psalms18:8 Utsi udabuluka m'mphuno mwache; malulume a moto na makala akugaka adabuluka m'kanwa mwache. 
Psalms18:9 Iye adang'amba thambo kati na kati mbatchitha pabodzi pene na makole akuswipa pansi kumanyalo kwache. 
Psalms18:10 Iye adambuluka mwadidi mwene pa chakulengwa chakukhala na maphaphido; iye adenda na maphaphido a mphepo. 
Psalms18:11 Iye adapimpsampsira yekha ene na mdima; makole akuswipa akudzala madzi adamzungulira. 
Psalms18:12 Matalala na kuyerima kwa moto kudadza pamaso pache kubulukira kuna ching'ani-ng'ani mbichiswa kubola makole akuswipa. 
Psalms18:13 Tenepo MBUYA adadima kubulukira kudzulu; tenepo fala ya Nyakudzulu-dzulu idaveka. 
Psalms18:14 Iye adaponya matswimo ache mbabalalisa anyamalwache; na kuchetuma kwa ching'ani-ng'ani iye adaagudusa. 
Psalms18:15 Pansi pa bara padaoneka mtunda; maziko a dziko yapansi akhali okhonda gudumirwa, pidaalongera imwe anyamalwanu, MBUYA, na pidaakalapira imwe na kuzhangali." 
Psalms18:16 Iye adafuthula mkono kubulukira kudzulu mbandiphata; iye adandinula m'madzi akuzwika. 
Psalms18:17 Iye adandiombola m'manja mwa anyamalwanga amphamvu, pontho onsene anyakundizonda ngamphamvu pyakwanga mwakuti ine nkhabe kwanisa kuthimbana nawo." 
Psalms18:18 Pikhali ine panyatwa, iwo adandisosa, mbwenye MBUYA adanditchinjiriza." 
Psalms18:19 Iye adandiphedza kundibulusa kwa kugoswa; iye adandipulumusa thangwi adakomerwa nane. 
Psalms18:20 MBUYA ambandifupa thangwi ndimbachita pinthu pyakulungama; iye ambanditsanzayisa thangwi ndine munthu okhonda dawa. 
Psalms18:21 Ine ndavera mwambo wa MBUYA; ine sidadawe pakubauka kubuluka kuna Mulungu wanga tayu. 
Psalms18:22 Ine ndakoya mwambo wache onsene; ine sidakhonde kuvera matongero ache tayu. 
Psalms18:23 Iye ambandidziwa kuti ndikhali wakusowa chinthu chakundipokanyisa, kuti ndapithunda nee chita pyakudawa tayu." 
Psalms18:24 Natenepo MBUYA ambandifupa thangwi ndimbachita pinthu pyakulungama, thangwi iye ambadziwa kuti ndine munthu okhonda dawa." 
Psalms18:25 MBUYA, ndimwe wakukhulupirika kuna anyakukhulupirikambo kuna imwe; ndimwe wakulungama kuna anyakulungamambo." 
Psalms18:26 Ndimwe wakuchena kuna anthu akuchenambo, mbwenye mumbanyansirwa na anyakudawika." 
Psalms18:27 Anyakupichepesa, imwe mumbaapulumusa, mbwenye anyakupikuza mumbaachepesa." 
Psalms18:28 Imwe, MBUYA, mumbandichitisa nyale yanga kuonesa cheza; Mulungu wanga, imwe mumbandisanduzira mdima kukhala cheza." 
Psalms18:29 Mumbandipasa mphamvu zakusosa nazo gulu ya anyankhondo, pontho mphamvu zakunumphira mumpanda mwawo." 
Psalms18:30 Mulungu weneyu, njira zache nsadidiletu pyakwanga! Mafala a MBUYA ngakunyindirika! Iye akhala ninga chakugedera matswimo kuna anthu onsene anabisala kuna iye ale." 
Psalms18:31 MBUYA ene basi ndiye Mulungu; Mulungu ene basi ndiye Phanzwi yanga. 
Psalms18:32 Iye ndi Mulungu ule ambandipasa mphamvu, ule ambachitisa kuti njiranga ikhale yadidi." 
Psalms18:33 Iye ambaachitisa manyalo anga kukhonda khala akuthereza ninga manyalo a nyasa; iye ambandikoya mwadidi pamapiri akulapha. 
Psalms18:34 Iye ambandifunzisa kumenya nkhondo, towera ndikwanise kukweya uta wakuwangaletu." 
Psalms18:35 MBUYA, mwanditchinjiriza, pontho mwandipulumusa; mkono wanu wamadyo wandithikitiza, pontho mphamvu zanu zandichitisa kukhala wamkulu." 
Psalms18:36 Imwe mwandikuzira njiranga, tenepo chipo nee ndidzati gwegwedukabi." 
Psalms18:37 Ndimbathamangisa anyamalwanga kuti ndiaphate; ine nkhabe kualeka mpakana ndaavunga. 
Psalms18:38 Ine ndimbaamenya mbagweratu mwakuti iwo nkhabe kwanisa kulamuka; iwo ambakhala thasa kuonesa kukundwa. 
Psalms18:39 Imwe mumbandipasa mphamvu zakumenyera nkhondo mbandikunda anyamalwanga. 
Psalms18:40 Imwe mumbachitisa anyamalwanga kundithawa; ndimbavunga anyakundizonda ale. 
Psalms18:41 Iwo ambakhuwa kuti unango aaphedze, kwache nkhabe nyakuapulumusa tayu; iwo ambachemera MBUYA, kwache iye nkhabe kuatawira tayu." 
Psalms18:42 Ine ndimbaapeya towera asanduke fumbi, ile imbambuluka pyawo na mphepo. Ndimbaapondedza ninga matope m'njira." 
Psalms18:43 Imwe mudandipulumusa m'manja mwa anyakupandukira mbamundichitisa kukhala mtongi wa madzinza; anthu akuti nee ndikhaadziwa tayu, lero ali pansi pa utongi wanga." 
Psalms18:44 Anthu achilendo akundilambira; sindzidzi nkhundiva kwene, iwo ambandivera." 
Psalms18:45 Onsene ambataya mtima mbadza mwakutetemera kubulukira mumpanda mwawo. 
Psalms18:46 MBUYA ngwamoyo! Mulemedzeni, Phanzwi yanga. Mkuzeni Mulungu, Nyankhombo wanga!" 
Psalms18:47 Iye ambandipasa mphamvu zakukundira nazo anyamalwanga; iye adaikha madzinza pansi pa utongi wanga 
Psalms18:48 mbandipulumusa m'manja mwa anyakundizonda. MBUYA, imwe mumbandikuza pamaso pa anyamalwanga, pontho mumbandiombola kuna anyakuzunguza." 
Psalms18:49 Natenepo ndimbakukuzani, MBUYA, pakati pa madzinza; ndimbakuimbirani nyimbo zakukukuzani nazo." 
Psalms18:50 Mulungu ambachitisa mfumu wache kukunda kukulu; iye ambaonesa kumfuna kwache kokhonda mala kuna nyakudzozwache, kuna Davite na pidzukulu pyache ndzidzi onsene." 
Psalms19:1 Pyakudzulu pimbaonesa pakwecha demelero ya Mulungu! Pimbaoneseratu pakwecha pinthu pyaphata iye! 
Psalms19:2 Nsiku na nsiku ipyo pimbalonga mafalawo; mosiku onsene pimbaonesa nzeru. 
Psalms19:3 Ipyo nkhabe longa, penu kukhala na chilongero, ipyo nkhabe kubulusa fala;" 
Psalms19:4 kwache mphangwa zawo zimbaenda kudziko yonsene; mafalawo ambaveka kumadolomero onsene a dziko yapansi. Mulungu adasasanyira dzuwa mbuto kudzulu; 
Psalms19:5 na machibese iyo imbabuluka ninga mamuna wakusekera kukazhali, pontho ninga nyamphamvu pabitcha-bitcha." 
Psalms19:6 Iyo imbabuluka khundu inango mbikadoka kukhundu inango ya kudzulu; iyo imbagwanda pakati na kati kwenda khundu inango. Nkhabe chinango chinakwanisa kubisalira kupisa kwache. 
Psalms19:7 Mwambo wa MBUYA ngwadidiletu; umbasisimusa moyo. Matongero a MBUYA ngakunyindirika, kupasa nzeru kuna anyakuzisowa." 
Psalms19:8 Pifunziso pya MBUYA mphyakuthema, tenepo onsene ambapiverawo ngakutsanzaya. Matongero a MBUYA mbakuveka, pontho ambapereka kuvesesa kuna manyerezero." 
Psalms19:9 Kugopa MBUYA nkhwadidi; kunathimizika ndzidzi onsene. MBUYA ambatonga mseru mwachilungamo; ndzidzi onsene ambatonga mwadidi. 
Psalms19:10 Matongero ache ngakufunika pikulu kupiringana golidi, ngakufunika pikulu kupiringana golidi chadi-chadi; ngakutapira pyakwanga kupiringana uchi, ngakutapira pyakwanga kupiringana uchi chadi-chadi." 
Psalms19:11 Ambandipasa nzeru ine nyabasanu; ndikufupwa thangwi ya kuavera. 
Psalms19:12 Nkhabe munthu anakwanisa kuona kudawa kwache; ndilekerereni kuna pinthu pyanga pyakuipa pyakubisika! 
Psalms19:13 Mundikhondese kukhala na manyerezero akufuna kuchita pyakudawika; lekani tawirisa kudawa kundiikhe pansi pa utongi wache. Penepo ndinakhala wakusowa chinthu chakundipokanyisa, pontho wakusudzuka kubuluka kuna pyakudawa pyakugoswa." 
Psalms19:14 Mafalanga na manyerezero anga mbatawiriswembo pamaso panu, MBUYA, Phanzwi pontho Dombo wanga!" 
Psalms20:1 MBUYA, mbave kupempha kwako pandzidzi wako wa nyatwa! Mulungu wa Yakobo mbakutchinjirize." 
Psalms20:2 Iye mbatumize chiphedzo kubulukira kumbuto yache yakuchena, pontho mbakupase, kubulukira pa phiri ya Zioni, pinthu pyakuti uphedzeke napyo." 
Psalms20:3 Iye mbatambire nsembe zako zonsene, pontho mbakomerwe na nsembe zako zonsene." 
Psalms20:4 Iye mbakupase pyonsene pinakhumba mtimako, pontho mbachitise kufamba mwadidi pyonsene pinanyerezera iwe." 
Psalms20:5 Tenepo ife tinakhuwa na kukomerwa, thangwi ya kukunda kwako. Na dzina ya Mulungu wathu tinati tikwize mabandera. MBUYA mbave pyonsene pinapempha iwe." 
Psalms20:6 Chinchino ndapidziwa kuti MBUYA ambaphedza mfumu asankhula iye ule; iye ambava kubulukira kudzulu kwache kwakuchena pimbapempha iye, pontho na mphamvu zache ambampasa kukunda kukulu." 
Psalms20:7 Anango ambanyindira pingolo pyawo pyankhondo, anangombo ambanyindira akavalo awo, mbwenye ife timbanyindira mphamvu za MBUYA, Mulungu wathu." 
Psalms20:8 Anthu ninga enewo anagwegweduka mbagwa, mbwenye ife tinalamuka mbatiimiraletu chiriri!" 
Psalms20:9 MBUYA, chitisani mfumu kukunda; titawireni ndzidzi unakuchemerani ife." 
Psalms21:1 Mfumu akomerwa pyakwanga, MBUYA, thangwi mudampasa mphamvu; iye ambakomerwa thangwi mudamchitisa kukunda." 
Psalms21:2 Imwe mwampasa pikhakhumba mtimache; imwe mwamchitira chikhapempha iye. 
Psalms21:3 Imwe mudadza kuna iye na mtsanzayiso ukulu mbamumvazika chipewu chachifumu chagolidi mumsolo mwache. 
Psalms21:4 Iye adapempha moyo, tenepo imwe mudampasa moyo wakulapha, pontho okhonda mala." 
Psalms21:5 Demelero wache njikulu thangwi mudamphedza; imwe mudamchitisa kukhala munthu wakuveka, pontho wakugopeka." 
Psalms21:6 Mtsanzayiso wanu una iye kwenda na kwenda, pontho kukhala kwanu chifupi na iye kumbamchitisa kukomerwa pyakwanga." 
Psalms21:7 Mfumu ambanyindira MBUYA; na thangwi ya kumfuna kwa Nyakudzulu-dzulu kokhonda mala, iye nkhabe dzatekeseka tayu." 
Psalms21:8 Mfumu anaaphata anyamalwache onsene; iye anaphata anthu onsene ambamzonda ale. 
Psalms21:9 Imwe mungaonekera, munaavunga ninga mumbachitira dzenje ya moto. MBUYA anati aakhudyule na kuzhangali kwache, pontho na moto unaapyereza." 
Psalms21:10 Pidzukulu pyawo pinamaliratu padziko yonsene yapansi; nkhabe mbodzi anafuna dzaonekave tayu. 
Psalms21:11 Iwo ambaverana na kusasanya njira zakuipa zakupokanyisana naye, mbwenye iwo hanamkwanisa tayu." 
Psalms21:12 Iye anaponya matswimo ache pana iwo mbaachitisa kuzungunuka mbathawa. 
Psalms21:13 Tinakukuzani, MBUYA, thangwi ya mphamvu zanu zikulu! Tinaimba na kukuza mphamvu zanu." 
Psalms22:1 Mulungu wanga, Mulungu wanga, mwandisiyiranji ndekha ene? Ine ndalira pyakwanga kuti mundiphedze, mbwenye na lero chiphedzo chadzati fika tayu." 
Psalms22:2 Na masikati ndimbakuchemerani, Mulungu wanga, mbwenye imwe nkhabe kunditawira tayu; na mosiku ndimbachemera, pontho nkhabe puma tayu." 
Psalms22:3 Mbwenye imwe ndimwe Nyakuchena, nyakukhala pampando wachifumu, mbakuzwa na Israele ule." 
Psalms22:4 Makolo athu adaikha chikhulupiro pana imwe; iwo akhakunyindirani, natenepo imwe mudaapulumusa." 
Psalms22:5 Iwo adachemera kuna imwe mbathawa chakugoswa; iwo adakunyindirani, tenepo iwo hadataye mtima tayu." 
Psalms22:6 Mbwenye ine nee ndasalave munthubi; ndine mfunye ene pyanga wakutikanwa na wakululupiswa na munthu onsene! 
Psalms22:7 Anthu onsene ambandionawo ambandilulupisa; iwo ambandisedegula mbandipidula. 
Psalms22:8 Iwo ambalonga kuti, “Iwe umbanyindira MBUYA, apo atani kukupulumusa? Ngakhala MBUYA ambakufuna, apo atani kukuphedza?”" 
Psalms22:9 Ndimwe ene mudachitisa kuti ine ndibalwe, pontho pikhali ine kachiya, mudandikoya mwadidi." 
Psalms22:10 Ine ndimbanyindira imwe kutomera nsiku idabalwa ine, pontho ndzidzi onsene imwe ndimwe Mulungu wanga." 
Psalms22:11 Lekani khala kutali na ine! Nyatwa ili chifupi, pontho nkhabe munthu wakundiphedza." 
Psalms22:12 Anyamalwa azinji andizungulira ninga ng'ombe zimuna; onsene andizungulira ninga ng'ombe zimuna zakupenga zakubulukira kudziko ya Bashani. 
Psalms22:13 Iwo adafungula milomo yawo ninga nkhalamu, kubangula na kundikhwadzula." 
Psalms22:14 Mphamvu zanga zamala, zaenda ninga madzi akukhuthulirwa pansi. Mwakuphatanizira magogodo anga monsene mwamala lekana lekana; mtimanga ukunyunguluka ninga upula." 
Psalms22:15 Kukhosi kwanga kuli kakata ninga fumbi, pontho lulume yanga yaphatirira kudzulu kwa mulomo wanga. Mwandisiya ndekha kuti ndifere pafumbi." 
Psalms22:16 Gulu ya amuna akuipa andizungulira ninga mkumbi wa anambwa; iwo abola manjanga na manyalo anga ene. 
Psalms22:17 Magogodo anga onsene ali pamtunda. Anyamalwanga akundiyang'anisisa mbandiseka. 
Psalms22:18 Iwo adachitira ntsango nguwo zanga mbagawana pyawo okhokha. 
Psalms22:19 MBUYA, lekani khala kutali na ine! Nyakundiphedza, chimbizani mundipulumuse!" 
Psalms22:20 Ndipulumuseni gopesera talasada; pulumusani moyo wanga gopesera anambwawa. 
Psalms22:21 Ndipulumuseni m'kanwa mwa nkhalamuzi; nkhabe chakundiphedza pamaso pa ng'ombe zimuna zakupenga zam'tsanga. 
Psalms22:22 Ndinati ndipange abale anga pya ukulu wanu; ndinati ndikukuzeni pandzidzi unagumanyikana iwo kukupembedzani. 
Psalms22:23 Mkuzeni iye, imwe anyabasa a MBUYA! Mulemedzeni imwe pidzukulu pya Yakobo! Mpembedzeni imwe anthu a ku Israele." 
Psalms22:24 Iye hambakhonda anthu anyakusanyiswa tayu, penu akululupiswa tayu; iye hambaathawa tayu, mbwenye ambaatawira angamchemera kufuna chiphedzo." 
Psalms22:25 M'migumano ikulu-ikulu ndinati ndikukuzeni, thangwi ya pyonsene pyachita imwe; pamaso pa anthu, ale ambakupembedzani ndinati ndipereka nsembe zidadumbira ine zile." 
Psalms22:26 Anyakutcherenga anadya munafunira iwo; ale anadza kuna MBUYA anamkuza. Pinthu pyawo mbipiafambira mwadidi kwenda na kwenda! 
Psalms22:27 Madzinza onsene anamkumbuka MBUYA. Kubulukira kukhundu zonsene za dziko iwo anazungunukira kuna iye; mitundu yonsene ya anthu inampembedza. 
Psalms22:28 MBUYA ndi mfumu, tenepo iye ambatonga madzinza." 
Psalms22:29 Anyakudungudza onsene analamba pamaso pache; anthumbo onsene anafa ale, analamba pamaso pache." 
Psalms22:30 Mifendu yam'tsogolo muno inamtumikira; amuna analonga pya Mbuya kuna mifendu inadzayo. 
Psalms22:31 Anthu akuti nee hadzati balwabi anapangwa pya chipulumuso chache kuti, “MBUYA adachitadi!”" 
Psalms23:1 MBUYA ndiye makabuswanga; ine nkhabe dzasowa chinthu na chibodzi chene. 
Psalms23:2 Iye ambandigonesa pampovu wadidi, mbanditsogolera kumadzi adidi akudenkhera." 
Psalms23:3 Iye ambasisimusa moyo wanga, mbandiendesa m'njira zakulungama, thangwi ya dzinache." 
Psalms23:4 Podi ndigwande kwene na m'maphedi amdima a imfa, ine nkhabe dzagopa tayu, thangwi imwe mumbakhala na ine. Chigomba na mthondodzo wanu pimbanditchinjiriza." 
Psalms23:5 Imwe mwandisasanyira phwando pamaso pa anyamalwanga. Imwe mudadzoza msolo wanga na mafuta kunditambira mwadidi ninga mlendo wakufunika; mwadzaza ndiko yanga mwakuti ikutayikira. 
Psalms23:6 Ndikupidziwa kuti udidi wanu na kundifuna kwanu kunakhala na ine nsiku zonsene za moyo wanga, tenepo ndinakhala m'Nyumba ya MBUYA kwenda na kwenda." 
Psalms24:1 Dziko yonsene na pyonsene pili mwenemo mphya MBUYA; dziko yapansi na anthu onsene ambakhala penepo ngache. 
Psalms24:2 Iye adaimanga pabara mbaikha maziko ache pansi pa madzi akuzwika. 
Psalms24:3 Mbani anakwanisa kwenda paphiri ya MBUYA? Mbani anakwanisa kapita kumbuto yache yakuchena? 
Psalms24:4 Ngale ene ana makhaliro na manyerezero akuchena, ale akuti hambapembedza milungu tayu, penu kudumbira pyakunama." 
Psalms24:5 MBUYA anati aatsanzayise; Mulungu, Nyankhombo wawo anaayesa anthu okhonda dawa." 
Psalms24:6 Anthu enewa ngale ambafuna kudza kuna Mulungu, ale ambafuna kudza pamaso pa Mulungu wa Yakobo." 
Psalms24:7 Yenukani imwe misuwo ya mipanda, pontho fungukani imwe misuwo yakale ya nyumba, tenepo mfumu wademelero anapita." 
Psalms24:8 Mfumu wademeleroyi mbani? Iye ndi MBUYA wamphamvu pontho wamboko, MBUYA wakukunda pankhondo." 
Psalms24:9 Yenukani imwe misuwo ya mipanda, fungulani imwe misuwo yakale ya nyumba, tenepo mfumu wa demelero anapita." 
Psalms24:10 Mfumu wa demeleroyi mbani? MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, iye ndiye Mfumu wa demelero." 
Psalms25:1 Kuna imwe, MBUYA, ndinapemphera;" 
Psalms25:2 Mulungu wanga ndimbanyindira imwe. Ndipulumuseni gopesera ndinachita manyadzo ndingakundwa; lekani tawirisa anyamalwanga kuti andiseke! 
Psalms25:3 Anthu akunyindira imwe nkhabe kundwa tayu, mbwenye ambakundwa mbanthu ambachimbiza kukupandukirani ale." 
Psalms25:4 MBUYA ndifunziseni njira zanu; zidziwiseni kuna ine. 
Psalms25:5 Ndifunziseni kukhala na makhaliro akuthemerana na pyakuonadi pyanu, thangwi imwe ndimwe Mulungu, Nyankhombo wanga. Ndzidzi onsene ndimbakunyindirani." 
Psalms25:6 Kumbukani, MBUYA, kukoma mtima na kundifuna kwanu kokhonda mala, kule kwaonesa imwe kutomera pakutomaletu." 
Psalms25:7 Fudzani pyakudawa pya uphaleanga, pontho na kupandukira kwanga konsene. MBUYA, ndikumbukeni na kundifuna kwanu kokhonda mala, pontho na udidi wanu." 
Psalms25:8 Na thangwi yakuti MBUYA ngwadidi, pontho wakulungama, iye ambafunzisa anyakudawa njira zathema iwo kuzitewera." 
Psalms25:9 Iye ambatsogolera anyakupichepesa kunjira zakuthema mbaafunzisa pinafuna iye kuti iwo apichite. 
Psalms25:10 Na kukhulupirika, pontho kuafuna kwache kokhonda mala, MBUYA ambayang'anira anthu onsene ambakoya chiverano chache mbavera matongero ache ale." 
Psalms25:11 MBUYA, na thangwi ya dzinanu, lekererani pyakudawa pyanga, podi kwene kuti mphizinji." 
Psalms25:12 Anyakugopa MBUYA anati afunze kubulukira kuna iye njira yakuthema kuitewera. 
Psalms25:13 Ndzidzi onsene pinthu pyawo pinaafambira mwadidi, pontho dziko inakhala ya anawo." 
Psalms25:14 MBUYA ndi shamwali wa anyakumvera, pontho ambatsikimizira chiverano chache kuna iwo." 
Psalms25:15 Ndzidzi onsene ndimbayang'ana kuna MBUYA kuti andiphedze, pontho iye ambandipulumusa kuna msampha." 
Psalms25:16 Zungunukani kuna ine, pontho ndiverenimbo nsisi, thangwi ndasala ndekha ene, pontho wakusanyika." 
Psalms25:17 Kuswipa kwanga mtima kwandendeya; ndipulumuseni panyatwa zanga. 
Psalms25:18 Yang'anani kusanyika, pontho nyatwa pinaona inepi, pontho lekererani pyakudawa pyanga pyonsene." 
Psalms25:19 Ngayang'anani kuinjipa kwachita anyamalwanga; yang'anani kundizonda kukulu kunachita iwoku. 
Psalms25:20 Nditchinjirizeni, pontho ndipulumuseni; ndikoyeni gopa ndinakundwa. Ndinadza kuna imwe, thangwi ndimwe pakubisala panga." 
Psalms25:21 Kulungama na kuona kwanga mtima pindikoye, thangwi ndimbakunyindirani." 
Psalms25:22 Kubuluka panyatwa zawo zonsene, Mulungu, pulumusani anthu anu a ku Israele!" 
Psalms26:1 MBUYA, ndiyeseni munthu okhonda dawa, thangwi ndimbachita pyakulungama; MBUYA ndimbakunyindirani monsene mwene." 
Psalms26:2 MBUYA, ndioneseseni mwadidi, pontho ndiyeseni; tongani pikhumbo na manyerezero anga." 
Psalms26:3 Kundifuna kwanu kokhonda mala kuli pamaso panga; kukhulupirika kwanu kumbandiphata nsenji ndzidzi onsene. 
Psalms26:4 Ine nkhabe phatizana na anthu akusowa basa tayu; ine nkhabe basa na mfaka-fakazi tayu. 
Psalms26:5 Ndimbazondana nayo gulu ya anthu akuipa, pontho ndimbaathunda anthu akudawika." 
Psalms26:6 MBUYA, ine ndasamba m'manja kuonesa kukhonda dawa kwanga, pontho ndikwenda kakupembedzani kuzungulira guwanu yansembe." 
Psalms26:7 Ndimbaimba nyimbo zakupereka nazo takhuta, pontho ndimbalonga pya mabasanu onsene akudodomesa." 
Psalms26:8 Ndimbaifuna pyakwanga Nyumba imbakhala imwe, MBUYA; mbuto imbakhala demelero yanu ile." 
Psalms26:9 Lekani kundivunga pabodzi pene na anyakudawa, penu kundipha pabodzi na mapanga," 
Psalms26:10 anthu ale ambachita pyakuipa ndzidzi onsene, pontho ndzidzi onsene ngakufuna pyakudyekerwa." 
Psalms26:11 Kulonga pya ine ndimbachita pinthu pyakulungama; ndiverenimbo nsisi mbamundiombole. 
Psalms26:12 Ine ndapulumuka kupinthu pyakugoswa pyonsene; m'magulu a anthu ache ndimbakuza MBUYA. 
Psalms27:1 MBUYA ndiye cheza changa, pontho chipulumuso changa; ine nkhabe dzagopa munthu na mbodzi ene tayu. MBUYA ndi mpanda wa moyo wanga; ine nkhabe dzachitave mantha tayu." 
Psalms27:2 Anthu akuipa angandisosa mbayesa kundipha, iwo anagwegweduka mbagwa." 
Psalms27:3 Podi kwene kuti gulu yonsene ya anyankhondo indizungulire, ine nkhabe gopa tayu; podi kwene kuti anyamalwanga achite nane nkhondo, ine ndinathimiza basi kunyindira Mulungu." 
Psalms27:4 Chinthu chibodzi chimbapempha ine, MBUYA; chinthu chibodzi chinafuna ine: ntchakuti ndikhale m'Nyumba ya MBUYA nsiku zonsene za moyo wanga, kuona kubalika kwa MBUYA, pontho kumsaka m'Nyumba mwache." 
Psalms27:5 Pandzidzi wa nyatwa iye anandibisa m'khumbi mwache; iye ananditchinjiriza m'Nyumba mwache mbandiikha pamwala wakulapha. 
Psalms27:6 Natenepo ndinakunda anyamalwanga andizungulirawa; na mkhuwo wakukomerwa kukulu ndinapereka nsembe m'khumbi mwache. Ndinaimba na kukuza MBUYA. 
Psalms27:7 Ndiverenimbo, MBUYA, ndzidzi unakuchemerani ine! Ndiverenimbo nsisi na kunditawira." 
Psalms27:8 Imwe mungalonga kuti, “Bwera dzandipembedze,” ine ndimbatawira kuti, “Ndinabwera MBUYA;”" 
Psalms27:9 lekani kundibisira nkhope yanu. Lekani kuthamangisa nyabasanu mwakuzhangali. Imwe ndiye nyakundiphedza ndzidzi onsene; lekani kundisiya, penu kundikhonda, Mulungu, Nyankhombo wanga." 
Psalms27:10 Babanga na mamanga anakwanisa kundikhonda, mbwenye MBUYA ambandiyang'anira mwadidi." 
Psalms27:11 Ndifunziseni, MBUYA, pinafuna imwe kuti ndipiphate, pontho munditsogolere kunjira yadidi, thangwi anyamalwanga ngazinji." 
Psalms27:12 Lekani kundipereka m'manja mwa anyamalwanga, ale andipandukira mbandilongera pyakunama, pontho pyakugoswa." 
Psalms27:13 Ndikupidziwa kuti ndinati ndione udidi wa MBUYA pandzidzi uno una ine na moyo. 
Psalms27:14 Nyindirani MBUYA. Khalani na chikhulupiro, lekani taya mtima. Nyindirani MBUYA." 
Psalms28:1 MBUYA, Phanzwi yanga, ndikuchemera imwepo, Vani kulira kwangaku! Ngakhala munanditawira tayu, ndinakakhala pyanga pakati pa anthu, ale adenda ku Chiphompho chikulu." 
Psalms28:2 Ndiverenimbo ine ndingakulirirani kufuna chiphedzo, ndingakwiza manjanga kuyang'anisa kumbuto yanu yakuchenesesa." 
Psalms28:3 Ndileke khala wakukonwa pamaso panu pabodzi na anthu akudawika, pabodzi na anthu akuchita pyakuipa, anthu ale akuti mafalawo ngaushamwali, kwache mitimawo njakuipirwa." 
Psalms28:4 Atchunyuseni thangwi ya pinthu pyachita iwo, thangwi ya pyakuipa pyachita iwo. Atchunyuseni thangwi ya mabasawo onsene; apaseni pyakuathemera." 
Psalms28:5 Iwo nkhabe ikha konta pyachita MBUYA tayu, penu pyasasanya iye na manjache; natenepo anaatchunyusa mbaavunga onsene kwenda na kwenda." 
Psalms28:6 Mbakuzwe, MBUYA; thangwi ava kulira kwanga kufuna chiphedzo." 
Psalms28:7 MBUYA ndi mphamvu zanga, pontho chakugedera nacho matswimo changa; ine ndimbanyindira iye. Iye ambandiphedza, pontho mtimanga umbanumpha-numpha thangwi ya komerwa. Ndimbamkuza na nyimbo zakukomerwa." 
Psalms28:8 MBUYA ambatchinjiriza anthu ache; iye ndi mpanda wamphamvu wakupulumusa mfumu asankhula iye ule. 
Psalms28:9 Pulumusani anthu anu, pontho mutsanzayise anthu ale nganu. Khalani makabuswawo, pontho akoyeni mwadidi kwenda na kwenda." 
Psalms29:1 Kuzani MBUYA imwe pyakulengwa pyakudzulu; kuzani demelero ya MBUYA na mphamvu zache. 
Psalms29:2 Kuzani demelero ya dzina ya MBUYA; mulambireni Nyakuchenayo ndzidzi unaonekera iye. 
Psalms29:3 Fala ya MBUYA ikuveka pabara; Mulungu wademelero akudima, pontho fala ya MBUYA imbatayirira pabara." 
Psalms29:4 Fala ya MBUYA ikuveka na mphamvu zache zonsene; fala ya MBUYA ikuveka chifumu. 
Psalms29:5 Fala ya MBUYA ikung'amba miti yamkungudza, podi na miti ene yamkungudza ya ku Lebanoni." 
Psalms29:6 Iye ambachitisa phiri ya Lebanoni kunumpha-numpha ninga mwanamphulu, pontho ambachitisa phiri ya Herimoni kunumpha-numpha ninga mwanamphulu wamamuna." 
Psalms29:7 Fala ya MBUYA imbachitisa ching'ani-ng'ani kuchetuma. 
Psalms29:8 Fala ya MBUYA imbachitisa thando yatchetcha kutekenyeka; MBUYA ambatekenya thando yatchetcha ya Kadeshi. 
Psalms29:9 Fala ya MBUYA imbabalisa nyama zikazi, pontho imbapuluza masamba a m'miti, uku anthu onsene m'Nyumba mwache ambakhuwa mbati, “Demelero kuna Mulungu!”" 
Psalms29:10 MBUYA ambatonga podi na pa madzi makulu; MBUYA ambatonga ninga mfumu kwenda na kwenda. 
Psalms29:11 MBUYA ambapereka mphamvu kuna anthu ache; MBUYA ambaatsanzayisa na mtendere. 
Psalms30:1 Ndinakukuzani, MBUYA, thangwi mwandipulumusa, pontho nee mwatawira kuti anyamalwanga andiseke tayu." 
Psalms30:2 Ndidakulirirani kuti mundiphedze, MBUYA, Mulungu wanga, pontho imwe mudandiwangisa." 
Psalms30:3 MBUYA, imwe mudandibwezera kumoyo kubulukira kudziko ya anyakufa; mudapulumusa moyo wanga kuti ndileke tchithira ku Chiphompho chikulu." 
Psalms30:4 Muimbireni MBUYA, imwe anthu ache onsene akukhulupirika, pontho kuzani dzinache yakuchena." 
Psalms30:5 Kuzhangali kwache nee kumbadintcha kumalabi, mbwenye udidi wache ngwakukhala na kukhala. Unakwanisa kulira mosiku onsene, mbwenye na machibese kumbadza kukomerwa." 
Psalms30:6 Pidaona ine kuti ndikhali pakupata ndidalonga ndekha ene kuti, “Ine nkhabeve dzatekenyeka tayu.”" 
Psalms30:7 Imwe mukhali wadidi kuna ine, MBUYA; imwe mudandikhazikisa ninga phiri. Mbwenye pidabisa imwe nkhope yanu kuna ine, penepo ndikhachita mantha." 
Psalms30:8 Ndidakuchemerani imwe, MBUYA; ndidakupemphani kuti mundiphedze." 
Psalms30:9 “Kufa kwanga kunakuganyalisaninji? Kwenda kwanga kumasiye kunakuganyalisaninji? Ayi anthu akufa ambakwanisa kukukuzani? Ayi iwo anakwanisa kulalika pya udidi wanu okhonda mala? 
Psalms30:10 Ndiverenimbo ine, MBUYA, pontho mundiverembo nsisi! Ndiphedzenimbo, MBUYA!”" 
Psalms30:11 Imwe mwasanduza kutsukwala kwanga kukhala kuvina; imwe mwabulusa kutsukwala kwanga mbamundiphimbira na kukomerwa. 
Psalms30:12 Natenepo ine nkhabe khala mulomo phoo tayu; ndinati ndiimbe nyimbo zakukukuzani nazo. MBUYA, imwe ndimwe Mulungu wanga; ndinati ndipereke takhuta kuna imwe kwenda na kwenda." 
Psalms31:1 Ndikudza kuna imwe, MBUYA, kuti ndibisale; lekani tawirise kuti ndikundwe. Imwe ndimwe Mulungu wakulungama; ndikupempha kuti mundipulumuse." 
Psalms31:2 Ndiverenimbo ine! Ndipulumuseni chinchino pano! Khalani pakubisala panga kunditchinjiriza; mpandanga wamphamvu kundipulumusa. 
Psalms31:3 Podi imwe ndimwe pakubisala panga, pontho mpandanga wamphamvu; ndiyang'anireni, pontho mundiphate nsenji malingana na kudumbira kwanu." 
Psalms31:4 Ndiyang'anireni mwadidi gopesera msampha wateyerwa inewu, thangwi ndimwe pakubisala panga." 
Psalms31:5 Ndinapereka mzimu wanga m'manja mwanu; ndiomboleni, MBUYA, Mulungu wakukhulupirika." 
Psalms31:6 Ine ndimbazondana na anyakupembedza mifanikizo yapezi-pezi; mbwenye ndimbanyindira imwe ene basi, MBUYA." 
Psalms31:7 Ndinakomerwa, pontho kusekera, thangwi ya kundifuna kwanu kokhonda mala. Thangwi imwe mudaona nyatwa zanga, pontho mudadziwa kusanyika kudachita ine." 
Psalms31:8 Imwe nee mwandipereka m'manja mwa anyamalwanga tayu; mbwenye mudapondesa dzinyalo yanga pambuto ikulu. 
Psalms31:9 Ndiverenimbo nsisi ine, MBUYA, thangwi ndasanyika pyakwanga; maso anga atopa, thangwi ya chiliro chikulu; mzimu wanga na manungo anga pyamaliratu na kutsukwala." 
Psalms31:10 Moyo wanga wasanyika na kutsukwala, pontho pyaka pyanga pyavira na nyatwa. Ndasowa mphamvu thangwi ya nyatwa zanga zonsene; magogodo anga agogobodoka." 
Psalms31:11 Anyamalwanga onsene akunditonja, maka-maka atsanthembanga; anzanga akundinyerezera ninga munthu wakugoswa; anthu angandiona pakwecha ambandithawa." 
Psalms31:12 Ndaduwalika ninga nyakufa; ndakhala ninga mulinga yakusweka. 
Psalms31:13 Thangwi ndava chiwere-were cha anthu azinji, mantha andiphata. Iwo adapangana pyakundiphata mbatsikimiza pya kundipha." 
Psalms31:14 Mbwenye ine ndimbanyindira imwepo, MBUYA; ndimwe Mulungu wanga." 
Psalms31:15 Ndzidzi onsene mumbandiyang'anira ndimwe; ndipulumuseni m'manja mwa anyamalwanga, kuna anyakundikhulisa ale." 
Psalms31:16 Yang'anani nyabasanu mwakumkomera mtima; mundipulumuse thangwi ya kundifuna kwanu kokhonda mala. 
Psalms31:17 Lekani kundichitisa manyadzo, ndingakuchemerani, MBUYA, mbwenye chitisani manyadzo anthu akuipawa mbaenda kachete-chete kudziko ya anyakufa." 
Psalms31:18 Matamisani anyakunama, onsene akudungudza na akutumbama, ale ambalulupisa anthu akulungama." 
Psalms31:19 Udidi wanu ngukulu pyakwanga, ule udakoyera imwe anyakukugopani, pontho anyakubisala muna imwe ale, udidi ule udapereka imwe pamaso pa anthu onsene." 
Psalms31:20 Muna imwe munati muabise gopesera anyakusasanya pyakuipa; munati muabise m'khumbi gopesera kutikanwa na anyamalwawo. 
Psalms31:21 Mbakuzwe MBUYA, thangwi andionesa kundifuna kwache kokhonda mala, ndzidzi ukhadazungulirwa ine na anyamalwanga." 
Psalms31:22 Ine ndikhachita mantha mbandinyerezera kuti iye andithamangisa pamaso pache, kwache adava kulira kwanga pidamchemera ine kufuna chiphedzo." 
Psalms31:23 Funani MBUYA, imwe anthu ache akukhulupirika onsene. MBUYA ambatchinjiriza anthu akukhulupirika, mbwenye ambatchunyusa anyakudungudza mwakuthemerana na pidachita iwo." 
Psalms31:24 Khalani na mphamvu, pontho wangani mtima, imwe monsene ale muna chidikhiro pana MBUYA." 
Psalms32:1 Ngakutsanzaya anyakulekererwa umambalawo, ale pyakudawa pyawo pyafudzwa." 
Psalms32:2 Ngwakutsanzaya munthu ule pyakudawa pyache MBUYA nkhabe kupiikha konta tayu, pontho ule ambakhonda kulonga pinthu pyakunama." 
Psalms32:3 Pikhadakhonda ine kutawira pyakudawa pyanga, magogodo anga adagogobodokeratu thangwi ya kulira nsiku yonsene." 
Psalms32:4 Mosiku na masikati mukhanditchunyusa; mphamvu zanga zidamaliratu ninga mumbaumira ntota na kupisa kwa dzuwa ya malimwe. 
Psalms32:5 Tenepo ndidatawira pyakudawa pyanga kuna imwe, pontho nee ndidabisa pyakudawa pyanga tayu. Ndidanyerezera kuti nditawire umambalanga kuna imwe, pontho mudafudza mangawa a pyakudawa pyanga." 
Psalms32:6 Natenepo anthu anu akukhulupirika onsene athema kupemphera kuna imwe pandzidzi wa nyatwa; madzi makulu akukuka angadza kuthamangira m'bwalo, iwo nkhabe dzandifikira tayu." 
Psalms32:7 Imwe ndimwe mbuto yanga yakubisalirapo; munati mundipulumuse panyatwa. Ndimbaimba mwakugaluza fala pya chipulumuso chanu, thangwi mumbanditchinjiriza." 
Psalms32:8 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ndinakufunzisa njira yadidi kuti ufambemo; ndinati ndikupangize maphatiro ache, pontho ndinati ndikuikhe maso." 
Psalms32:9 Lekani khala akupupwa ninga kavalo, penu bulu, ule nkhabe vesesa tayu, mbwenye athema kupangwa na chisimbi kumulomo kwache chakumangirirwa na nkhambala kumchitisa kuvera.”" 
Psalms32:10 Anyakudawa anati asanyike, mbwenye ale ambanyindira MBUYA ngakutchinjirizwa na kufuna kwache kokhonda mala." 
Psalms32:11 Imwe anyakulungama, komerwani pontho sekerani, thangwi ya pinthu pyachita MBUYA. Imwe anthu akumvera khuwani na kukomerwa!" 
Psalms33:1 Imwe anyakulungama onsene, khuwani na kukomerwa, thangwi ya pinthu pyachita MBUYA; mkuzeni imwe monsene anyakumvera." 
Psalms33:2 Perekani takhuta kuna MBUYA pakumuimbira na anyakatangale; muimbireni na malimba. 
Psalms33:3 Muimbireni nyimbo zitswa; muimbe mwaluso pontho mwakugaluza fala thangwi ya kukomerwa. 
Psalms33:4 Mafala a MBUYA ngakuona, pontho mabasache ngakunyindirika." 
Psalms33:5 MBUYA ambafuna pyakulungama, pontho chilungamo pa miseru; kutifuna kwache kokhonda mala kwadzala dziko yonsene yapansi." 
Psalms33:6 Na mafalache MBUYA adalenga kudzulu, dzuwa, mwezi na nyenyezi pakuchita kulonga." 
Psalms33:7 Iye adagumanyisa bara zonsene mbaaikha m'dudu; iye adafungira kuzwika kwa madzi m'masubi akukoyeramo pinthu. 
Psalms33:8 Gopa MBUYA, iwe dziko yonsene yapansi; mulemedzeni imwe anthu onsene a padziko yapansi." 
Psalms33:9 Pidalonga iye, dziko yapansi idalengwa; na matongero ache pyonsene pidaoneka." 
Psalms33:10 MBUYA azunguza manyerezero a madzinza; iye ambaakhondesa kuchita pinthu pimbanyerezera iwo. 
Psalms33:11 Mbwenye pinthu pimbanyerezera MBUYA kupichita mphyakwenda na kwenda; kufuna kwache nkhwakukhala na kukhala. 
Psalms33:12 Njakutsanzaya dzinza, ile kuna iwo Mulungu ndi MBUYA; ngakutsanzaya anthu adasankhula iye kukhala anthu ache ene ale!" 
Psalms33:13 MBUYA ambayang'ana pansi kubulukira kudzulu, mbaona anthu onsene." 
Psalms33:14 Kubulukira kumbuto kumbakhala iye, ambayang'ana pana anthu onsene ambakhala padziko yapansi ale." 
Psalms33:15 Iye asasanya mitima yawo yonsene mbadziwa pyonsene pinachita iwo. 
Psalms33:16 Mfumu nkhabe kunda thangwi anyankhondo ache ngamphamvu tayu; nyankhondo nkhabe kunda thangwi ya mphamvu zache tayu. 
Psalms33:17 Kunyidira akavalo pankhondo nkhabe phedza tayu; mphamvu zawo zikulu nkhabe kupulumusa tayu. 
Psalms33:18 MBUYA ambayang'ana pana anyakumvera, ale ambanyindira kuafuna kwache kokhonda mala." 
Psalms33:19 Iye ambaapulumusa kuimfa; iye ambaakoya na moyo ndzidzi wa njala ikulu. 
Psalms33:20 Ife timbaikha chidikhiro chathu pana MBUYA; iye ndiye chakugedera matswimo chathu, pontho nyakutiphedza." 
Psalms33:21 Mitimathu yakomerwa thangwi ya iye; timbanyindira dzinache yakuchena. 
Psalms33:22 MBUYA, kutifuna kwanu kokhonda mala kukhale nafe, pinaikha ife chidikhiro chathu pana imwe." 
Psalms34:1 Ndzidzi onsene ndimbalemedza MBUYA; ine nkhabe dzaleka kumkuza tayu. 
Psalms34:2 Ndinati ndinyadire pinthu pyachita MBUYA; onsene anyakusanyiswa ave mbasekera. 
Psalms34:3 Lalikani pabodzi na ine demelero ya MBUYA; tendeni timkuze tonsene pabodzi. 
Psalms34:4 Ndidapemphera kuna MBUYA, tenepo iye adachita pidampempha ine; iye adandibulusira mantha onsene." 
Psalms34:5 Anyakusanyiswa ambayang'ana kuna iye, tenepo iwo akomerwa; iwo nkhabeve dzakhala na nkhope zakutota tayu." 
Psalms34:6 Anthu anafuna kuphedzwa ambamchemera, tenepo MBUYA ambaatawira; iye ambaapulumusa panyatwa zawo zonsene." 
Psalms34:7 Angelo ache ambayang'anira anyakugopa MBUYA mbaapulumusa kuna pyakugoswa. 
Psalms34:8 Muyeseni MBUYA mumuone udidi wache. Ngakutsanzaya ale ambabisala kuna iye. 
Psalms34:9 Mulemedzeni MBUYA imwe anthu ache onsene; ale anyakugopa ana pyonsene pinasowa iwo. 
Psalms34:10 Podi nkhalamu zene zimbasowa kudya nsiku zinango; mbwenye nyakusaka MBUYA nkhabe sowa pinthu pyadidi tayu. 
Psalms34:11 Bwerani, ananga, mbamundivesere, ndinati ndikufunziseni kugopa MBUYA." 
Psalms34:12 Kadi imwe munafuna tayu kukhala na moyo wakutsanzaya? Kadi imwe munafuna tayu kukhala na moyo wakulapha pontho wadidi? 
Psalms34:13 Tenepo lekani kulonga pinthu pyakuipa, pontho kulonga pinthu pyakunama." 
Psalms34:14 Thawani kutali na pyakuipa mbamuchite pinthu pyadidi; chitani phinga kufuna mtendere na kuuteweza na mtimanu onsene. 
Psalms34:15 MBUYA ambayang'ana anyakulungama mbava kulira kwawo. 
Psalms34:16 Mbwenye MBUYA ambapasa nkhodolo anyakuipa, towera iwo angafa, aduwalike msanga." 
Psalms34:17 Anyakulungama ambachemera MBUYA, tenepo iye ambaava; iye ambaapulumusa panyatwa zawo zonsene." 
Psalms34:18 MBUYA ali chifupi na anyakusweka mtima; iye ambapulumusa anyakutaya chidikhiro chawo chonsene. 
Psalms34:19 Munthu wadidi ambaona nyatwa papinthu pizinji, mbwenye MBUYA ambampulumusa kupyonsenepyo;" 
Psalms34:20 iye ambamkoya mwadidiletu; podi na gogodo yache ene ibodzi nkhabe sweka tayu. 
Psalms34:21 Pyakuipa pinapha nyakudawika, ale ambazondana na chilungamo anatchunyuswa." 
Psalms34:22 MBUYA anaombola anthu ache, ale ambaenda kuna iye kuti abisale nkhabe dzakonwa tayu." 
Psalms35:1 MBUYA apokanyeni anyakundipokanya, pontho menyani ambamenyana na ine ale!" 
Psalms35:2 Kwatani chakugedera nacho matswimo na pida pyanu pyankhondo mbamudze kuti mundipulumuse. 
Psalms35:3 Thukulani dipanu na mbadzo yanu kumenyana na anyakundithamangisa. Ndipangeni kuti munandipulumusa. 
Psalms35:4 Anthu ambayesa pyakundipha ale, mbakundwe, pontho achite manyadzo! Ale ambaverana pyakupokanyisana na ine mbathawe, pontho azunguzike!" 
Psalms35:5 Iwo akhale ninga dzungu yakumbuluka na mphepo pinaathamangisa mngelo wa MBUYA! 
Psalms35:6 Njirawo mbikhale yamdima, pontho yamitherezi uku mngelo wa MBUYA akuathamangisa!" 
Psalms35:7 Okhonda na thangwi ene iwo adanditeyera msampha mbakumba mulindi ukulu kuti ndigweremo kundiphata. 
Psalms35:8 Mbwenye kuvunga kunati kuafikire iwo mbadzati kupidziwa; iwo anakwesheka msamphawo onthowo mbagweremo mu kuvungika konthoko. 
Psalms35:9 Tenepo ndinasekera thangwi ya MBUYA; ndinakomerwa thangwi iye adandipulumusa. 
Psalms35:10 Na mtimanga onsene ndinalonga kuna MBUYA kuti, “Nkhabeve unango ninga imwe. Imwe mumbapulumusa anyakusowa mphamvu kuna anyamphamvu, anyakutcherenga kuna anyakuapondereza.”" 
Psalms35:11 Anyakuipa ambandilongera umboni wakunama; iwo ambandinamizira mseru wakuti sinaudziwave tayu. 
Psalms35:12 Iwo ambandibwezera chakuipa pa chadidi; iwo akutcherengesa moyo wanga. 
Psalms35:13 Mbwenye pikhadwala iwo, ndidavala masakha kualirira; ndidapimana kudya; kwache pidakhonda kuviwa kupempha kwanga, ndidaasintili pikulu pene," 
Psalms35:14 khala ninga ndikusintili abale anga penu ashamwali anga. Ndidathimiza basi kubulumunda pikhalira ine ninga munthu wakusintili mache. 
Psalms35:15 Mbwenye pikhali ine panyatwa, onsene adakomerwa; anyakundisosa okhonda dziwika adagumanyikana kundisedegula mbathimiza basi kundimenya." 
Psalms35:16 Ninga mumbachitira anyakukhonda tsalakana Mulungu, iwo adandisedegula mbandikikitira mano." 
Psalms35:17 MBUYA, munandiyang'ana kwene kufikirana lini? Pulumusani moyo wanga kuna kundisosa kwawo; pulumusani moyo wanga gopesera zinkhalamuzi!" 
Psalms35:18 Tenepo ine ndinapereka takhuta pamgumano wa anthu anu; ndinakukuzani pamaso pawo onsene. 
Psalms35:19 Lekani tawirisa anyamalwanga akunama ale kundiseka thangwi ya kukundwa kwanga. Lekani tawirisa anyakundizonda okhonda mathangwi kulonga mwakukunyula maso pya kutsukwala kwanga. 
Psalms35:20 Iwo nkhabe longambo mwaushamwali tayu; m'mbuto mwache ambalonga tsweda yamtundu na mtundu anyakufuna pya mtendere. 
Psalms35:21 Iwo ambandisumulula mbalonga mbati, “Tidapiona pidaphata iwe!”" 
Psalms35:22 Mbwenye imwe, MBUYA, mwapiona penepi; tenepo, MBUYA, lekani khala mulomo phoo; lekani khala kutali!" 
Psalms35:23 Lamukani, Mbuya, munditchinjirize; lamukani, Mulungu wanga, mukhale nyakundivunulira." 
Psalms35:24 Imwe, MBUYA, ndimwe wakulungama, natenepo ndiyeseni okhonda dawa; lekani tawirisa anyamalwanga kundiseka." 
Psalms35:25 Lekani kuatawirisa kulonga mbati, “Tamkotola! Penepi ndiye pikhafuna ife!”" 
Psalms35:26 Anyakundiseka thangwi ya kusanyika kwanga mbamale kundwa, pontho azunguzike monsene mwene; anthu ale ambapiyesa kuti iwo mbwenye kupiringana ine mbachite manyadzo pontho alulupiswe." 
Psalms35:27 Anyakufuna kuona kukhonda dawa kwanga pamseru mbakhuwe na kukomerwa, pontho ndzidzi onsene alonge mbati, “MBUYA ngwamkulu pyakwanga! Iye akomerwa na kupikwanisa kwa nyabasache.”" 
Psalms35:28 Tenepo ndinalalika pya kulungama kwanu; ndinakukuzani nsiku yonsene yamumphu. 
Psalms36:1 Kudawa kumbalonga kuna nyakudawika pansi mumtimache; iye ambakhonda Mulungu, pontho iye nkhabe kumgopa tayu." 
Psalms36:2 Thangwi iye ambapinyerezera kuti ngwakufunika pikulu; mwakuti iye hambadzindikira, penu kuzondana na kudawa kwacheko tayu," 
Psalms36:3 Mafalache ngakudawika, pontho ngakunama; iye nkhabe chita pinthu pyanzeru, pontho pyadidi tayu." 
Psalms36:4 Iye ambanyerezera pyakuipa pinagona iye patalimba pache; nkhabe chibodzi chadidi chimbachita iye tayu, pontho iye nkhabeve khonda pyakuipa." 
Psalms36:5 MBUYA, kutifuna kwanu kokhonda mala kwafika kudzulu; kukhulupirika kwanu kwakula mpakana kuthambo." 
Psalms36:6 Kulungama kwanu kwaimira ninga mapiri; chilungamo chanu chakhala ninga kuzwika kwa bara. Anthu na nyama zene pili m'manja mwanu, MBUYA." 
Psalms36:7 Mulungu, kutifuna kwanu kokhonda mala nkhwakufunika pyakwanga! Ife timbabisala m'maphaphido anu." 
Psalms36:8 Timbachita phwando na pyakudya pizinji pimbatipasa imwe pile; mumbatitawirisa kumwa madzi akubulukira mumkulo wa udidi wanu. 
Psalms36:9 Imwe ndimwe phata ya moyo, pontho timbaona cheza thangwi ya cheza chanu." 
Psalms36:10 Thimizani kuafuna kokhonda mala anyakukudziwani, pontho kuchita pyadidi kuna anyakulungama." 
Psalms36:11 Lekani tawirisa anyakudungudza kundisosa, penu anyakudawika kundichitisa kuti ndithawe." 
Psalms36:12 Onani kwagwera anyakuipa. Iwo ali thasa-thasa, akuchimwana kulamuka." 
Psalms37:1 Lekani swipa mtima na anyakuipawa; lekani kuchita bivu na anyakuchita pyakudawa. 
Psalms37:2 Chinchino iwo hanaonekave tayu ninga maudzu; iwo anadudumuka ninga mbewu ziwisi. 
Psalms37:3 Nyindirani MBUYA, pontho chitani pyadidi; khalani m'dziko, pontho mukhale pakupata." 
Psalms37:4 Saka-sakani kukomerwa kwanu muna MBUYA, pontho iye anakupasani pikhumbo pya mtimanu." 
Psalms37:5 Piperekeni mwekha ene kuna MBUYA; mnyindireni, tenepo iye anakuphedzani;" 
Psalms37:6 iye anachitisa kulungama kwako kuonesa cheza ninga m'makalakwecha, chilungamo chako ninga masikati." 
Psalms37:7 Pirirani, pontho dikhirani MBUYA kuti apichite; lekani swipa mtima na anthu ale pinthu pyawo pimbaafambira mwadidi, pontho ale ambapikwanisa papinthu pakuipa." 
Psalms37:8 Lekani tawirisa kuzhangali, penu ukali kukutongani; lekani pinda; penepi pimbadawisa munthu." 
Psalms37:9 Anyakunyindira MBUYA anatambira dziko, mbwenye anyakudawa anathamangiswa." 
Psalms37:10 Chinchino pano anyakudawika hanaonekave tayu; imwe munaasaka-saka, kwache nee munaagumanabi;" 
Psalms37:11 anyakupichepesa anatambira dziko mbasekera na kufamba mwadidi kwa pinthu pyawo, pontho na kukhala kwawo na mtendere." 
Psalms37:12 Anyakuipa ambasasanya kuchitira pyakuipa anthu adidi, mbaakikitira mano." 
Psalms37:13 Mbwenye MBUYA ambaaseka anyakudawika, thangwi iye ambadziwa kuti chinchino anati avungwe." 
Psalms37:14 Anyakudawika ambacholola matalasadawo mbakunga mautawo kuti aphe anyakutcherenga na anyakusowa pinthu, kuti acheke pakhosi anyakuchita pyakulungama;" 
Psalms37:15 kwache iwo anaphiwa na matalasadawo onthowo, pontho mautawo anatcholwa." 
Psalms37:16 Pyakuchepa pya nyakulungama mphyadidi kupiringana mfuma yonsene ya nyakudawika," 
Psalms37:17 thangwi MBUYA anapokosera mphamvu za anyakudawa onsene, mbwenye anaphedza anthu adidi kuimira dzololo." 
Psalms37:18 MBUYA ambayang'anira mwadidi anyakumvera, tenepo dziko inakhala yawo kwenda na kwenda." 
Psalms37:19 Iwo nkhabe dzabonera pandzidzi wa nyatwa tayu; iwo anakhala na phoso yakukwana pandzidzi wa njala ikulu. 
Psalms37:20 Mbwenye anyakudawika anati afe; anyamalwa a MBUYA anati abisike ninga maluwa am'tsanga; iwo anabisika ninga kumala kwa utsi. 
Psalms37:21 Nyakudawika ambafiyali mbakhonda bwezera, mbwenye munthu wadidi ambapereka mwakufewa manja." 
Psalms37:22 Anyakutsanzayiswa na MBUYA anatambira dziko, mbwenye anyakutembererwa na iye anathamangiswa." 
Psalms37:23 MBUYA ambatsogolera munthu m'njira yakuthema kufambamo, pontho ambatchinjiriza ale ambakomerwa na iye." 
Psalms37:24 Ngakhala iwo anagwegweduka, iwo nkhabe dzagwa tayu, thangwi MBUYA anaaphata pamkono." 
Psalms37:25 Ine ndalila kalambiramo; ndakhala na moyo ndzidzi ukulu ene, kwache nee ndidzati kuona nyakulungama akupaswa nkhodolo na Mulungu tayu, penu anache kupempha phoso nkhabe." 
Psalms37:26 Ndzidzi onsene ambapereka pezi mbafiyalisa kuna anango, pontho anache ntchitsanzayiso." 
Psalms37:27 Thawani pyakuipa mbamuchite pinthu pyadidi, tenepo pidzukulu pyanu pinakhala ndzidzi onsene m'dzikomu." 
Psalms37:28 Thangwi MBUYA ambafuna chilungamo; iye nkhabe kuakhonda anthu ache akukhulupirika tayu. Iye ambaatchinjiriza kwenda na kwenda, mbwenye pidzukulu pya anthu akuipa pinathamangiswa." 
Psalms37:29 Anthu akulungama anatambira dziko mbakhalamo kwenda na kwenda. 
Psalms37:30 Mafala a munthu wadidi nganzeru, pontho ndzidzi onsene lulume yache imbalonga pyakulungama." 
Psalms37:31 Mwambo wa Mulungu wache aukoya mumtima mwache; dzinyalo yache nkhabe therezika tayu. 
Psalms37:32 Anyakudawika ambabisala kudikhirira anyakulungama kufuna kuti abuluse moyo wawo," 
Psalms37:33 mbwenye MBUYA nkhabe dzaaleka m'manja mwa anyamalwawo, penu kuatawirisa kukonwa angadza nawo dzaatonga mseru." 
Psalms37:34 Ikhani chidikhiro chanu pana MBUYA, pontho verani matongero ache; iye anakulemedzani pakukupasani dziko, pontho munaona anyakudawika akuvungwa." 
Psalms37:35 Ine ene pano ndaona nyakuipa, pontho wakugoswa; nyakupiikha yekha ene padzulu pa onsene ninga kuvata kwa muti wamkungudza wa Lebanoni;" 
Psalms37:36 mbwenye pidagwanda nsiku pang'ono ndidagwanda na penepo, mbwenye iye akhali nkhabepo; ndidamsaka-saka, kwache nee ndidamgumanabi." 
Psalms37:37 Muoneseseni munthu wadidi, pontho onani munthu wakulungama; munthu wamtendere ambakhala na pidzukulu," 
Psalms37:38 mbwenye anyakudawa anavungika monsene mwene, pontho pidzukulu pyawo pinamaliratu." 
Psalms37:39 Chipulumuso cha nyakulungama chimbabulukira kuna MBUYA; iye ndiye mpandawo pandzidzi wa nyatwa. 
Psalms37:40 MBUYA ambaaphedza mbaapulumusa; iye ambaapulumusa m'manja mwa anthu akudawika, thangwi ambabisala kuna iye." 
Psalms38:1 MBUYA, lekani kundilongera mwakuzhangali; lekani kunditchunyusa na ukali wanu." 
Psalms38:2 Imwe mwandipasa pironda na matswimo anuwo; mwandimenya ine mbandigweratu pansi. 
Psalms38:3 Thangwi ya kuzhangali kwanu ine ndikuva kupha pyakwanga; manungo anga onsene ana utenda thangwi ya pyakudawa pyanga. 
Psalms38:4 Ine ndikubira m'madzi a pyakudawa pyanga; pyakudawa pyanga pyakula pyakwanga mwakuti ine nkhabe kwanisa kupithukula tayu. 
Psalms38:5 Thangwi ya kupupwa kwanga, pironda pyanga pikununkha pontho pyavunda." 
Psalms38:6 Ine ndikuchitiswa kukotama, pontho kuthasamiswa; ndimbalira masikati onsene." 
Psalms38:7 Manungo anga akusanyika na kuva kupha, pontho ndili chifupi kufa." 
Psalms38:8 Ndamaliratu pano, pontho mzimu wanga wapeyeka; mtimanga ukusanyika pyakwanga, pontho ndimbabulira na akuva kupha." 
Psalms38:9 Mbuya, imwe mukudziwa pinafuna ine; mumbava kubulira kwanga konsene." 
Psalms38:10 Mtimanga ukudima, mphamvu zanga zamala, pontho maso anga athima." 
Psalms38:11 Ashamwali anga na anzanga akundichalira, thangwi ya pironda pyangapi; podi na banjanga ene imbakhala kutali na ine." 
Psalms38:12 Anyakufuna pyakundipha anditeyera msampha, pontho anyakufuna pyakundikuwaza akundigoswa kuti andivunge; iwo nkhabe leka kuverana pyakundichita pyakuipa." 
Psalms38:13 Ine ndakhala ninga dodo, munthu okhonda kwanisa kuva, ninga bewewe, nyakumangika lulume." 
Psalms38:14 Ndakhala ninga munthu okhonda tawira, thangwi ine nkhabe kwanisa kuva tayu." 
Psalms38:15 Mbwenye ndimbanyindira imwe ene, MBUYA, pontho imwe, MBUYA Mulungu wanga, munati munditawire." 
Psalms38:16 Lekani tawirisa anyamalwanga kuseka kusanyika kwanga, penu kuatawirisa kudungudza thangwi ya kutherezika kwanga." 
Psalms38:17 Ine ndili chifupi kugwa, pontho ndikuva kupha kokhonda mala." 
Psalms38:18 Ndikutawira pyakudawa pyanga; ndikuswipa mtima thangwi ya pyakudawa pyanga. 
Psalms38:19 Anyamalwanga ngakuwanga, pontho ngamphamvu; pana anthu azinji ambandizonda okhonda na thangwi ene." 
Psalms38:20 Anyakubwezera chakuipa pa chadidi ambandizonda thangwi ndimbayesa kuchita pinthu pyakulungama. 
Psalms38:21 MBUYA, lekani kundisiya ndekha; Mulungu wanga, lekani kundikhalira kutali." 
Psalms38:22 Ndiphedzeni chinchino pano, Mbuya, Nyankhombo wanga." 
Psalms39:1 Ine ndidalonga kuti, “Ndinati ndichite mphole-mphole na makhaliro anga, pontho ine nkhabe tawirisa lulume yanga kundichitisa kudawa; ine nkhabe dzalonga chinthu na chibodzi chene uku anthu akuipa ali chifupi tayu.”" 
Psalms39:2 Ndidamatama pyanga, nee kubulusa na fala ene tayu, podi na kulonga kwene pya chinthu chadidi nkhabe! Mbwenye kusanyika kwanga ndiye kudandendeya;" 
Psalms39:3 mtimanga udandipha pyakwanga. Pikhapinyerezera ine pikulu, mtimangambo ukhanyanya kugaka moto nee mbandidakwanisa tayu kukhala kwene okhonda vunza kuti:" 
Psalms39:4 “MBUYA, ndinakhala na moyo kufikirana lini? Ndinafa lini? Ndipangeni nsiku zanga zinafuna ine dzafa.”" 
Psalms39:5 Imwe mwandipasa Nsiku zakulengeseka zakukhala moyo! Pamaso panu nsiku za moyo wanga nee si pinthu tayu. Mphyakuona kuti munthu onsene nee ngwakupiringana muyabi," 
Psalms39:6 nkhabe kupiringana mthunzi tayu. Pyonsene pinaphata iye mphyakusowa basa; iye ambagumanyisa mfuma, kwache kupidziwa kuti inakhala ya ani nkhabe." 
Psalms39:7 Apo, Mbuya, chinadikhirira ine ninji? Ndinaikha chidikhiro changa pana imwe." 
Psalms39:8 Ndipulumuseni kuna umambalanga onsene; lekani tawirisa mapupwe kundiseka. 
Psalms39:9 Ndinamatama pyanga, nee kubulusa na fala ene tayu, thangwi ndimwe mwachitisa kuti ndione nyatwa ninga yeneyi." 
Psalms39:10 Lekani kunditchunyusa pontho! Ndili chifupi kufa na mashoko anu. 
Psalms39:11 Imwe mumbalongera munthu na kumtchunyusa thangwi ya pyakudawa pyache, pontho ninga uchenje mumbavunga mfumache. Andedi, munthu nkhabe khala kupiringana muya tayu." 
Psalms39:12 Vani kupempha kwanga, MBUYA, pontho vani kulira kwanga; bwerani mundiphedze pinalira inepi. Ninga makolo anga onsene ine ndine mlendo wanu wakukhala kwene ndzidzi pang'ono basi." 
Psalms39:13 Lekani kuikha maso anu pana ine, towera nditsanzayembo pang'ono mwenemo ndidzati buluka pano, mbandikhonda dzaonekave." 
Psalms40:1 Ndidadikhira mwakupirira kuti MBUYA andiphedze, tenepo iye adavesera mbava kulira kwanga." 
Psalms40:2 Iye adandinula m'dzenje yamitherezi; kundibulusa matope. Iye adandikhazikisa mwadidi pamwala mbandiikha pambuto yakupata. 
Psalms40:3 Iye adandifunzisa nyimbo itswa, nyimbo ya kukuza nayo Mulungu wathu. Anthu azinji anaona penepi ale anati acheuzwe napyo mbanyindira MBUYA." 
Psalms40:4 Ngakutsanzaya anthu ale ambanyindira MBUYA, ale ambakhonda kwatika-kwatika na anyakutumbama, penu kuphatizana nawo anyakupembedza milungu yapezi tayu." 
Psalms40:5 Imwe, MBUYA Mulungu wanga, mwachita pinthu pizinji; nkhabeve unango ninga imwe tayu! Pinthu pidanyerezera imwe kuti mutichitire mphikulu pyakwanga. Ine nkhabeve kwanisa kupilonga tayu; kuinjipa kwache kwanyanya maka!" 
Psalms40:6 Imwe nkhabe funa nsembe penu pyakupereka tayu; imwe nee mumbapempha nyama kuti iotchwe paguwa yansembe tayu, penu nsembe yakubulusa pyakudawa tayu. M'mbuto mwache mwandipasa makutu kuti ndikuveni." 
Psalms40:7 Natenepo ndidatawira kuti, “Ndili pano, matongero anu kuna ine ali mumpukutu wanu wa mwambo." 
Psalms40:8 Mulungu wanga, ndimbapifunadi pyakwanga kuchita pinafuna imwe. Ndimbakoya chifunziso chanu mumtima mwanga.”" 
Psalms40:9 Pamgumano wa anthu anu, MBUYA, ndidalonga mphangwa zadidi kuti imwe mudatipulumusa. Imwe mukupidziwa kuti nee ndinaleka tayu kulonga pya penepi." 
Psalms40:10 Ine nee ndapikoyerera ndekha ene mphangwa zadidi za chipulumuso tayu; ndzidzi onsene ndimbalonga pya kukhulupirika na kutiphedza kwanu. Pamigumano ya anthu anu onsene ine nkhabe khala kwene tayu mulomo phoo, okhonda kulonga pya kutifuna kwanu kokhonda mala, pontho kukhulupirika kwanu." 
Psalms40:11 MBUYA, ndikupidziwa kuti nee munalekabi kundivera nsisi. Kukhulupirika kwanu na kundifuna kwanu kokhonda mala kunanditchinjiriza ndzidzi onsene." 
Psalms40:12 Ine ndazungulirwa na nyatwa zizinji zokhonda lengeseka; kudawa kwanga kwandikunda mwakuti sinakwanisave kuona tayu; nsizinji kupiringana tsisi ya mumsolo mwanga, pontho ndataya mtima." 
Psalms40:13 Ndipulumuseni, MBUYA! MBUYA, ndiphedzeni chinchino pano!" 
Psalms40:14 Anyakuyesa-yesa kufuna kundipha mbakundwe, pontho mbazunguzike monsene mwene. Anyakukomerwa thangwi ya kuona kwanga nyatwa, mbabwerere m'nduli, pontho mbachite manyadzo." 
Psalms40:15 Anthu ambalonga kuna ine mbati, “Hedewu, hedewu!” Mbanyale pontho mbalulupiswe." 
Psalms40:16 Onsene anyakudza kuna imwe mbasekere na kukomerwa. Onsene anyakupereka takhuta kuna imwe thangwi ya kuapulumusa kwanu ndzidzi onsene mbalonge mbati, “MBUYA ngwamkulu pyakwanga!”" 
Psalms40:17 Mbuya, ine nkhabe mphamvu, pontho ndine wakutcherenga, kwache imwe nee mwandiduwalira tayu. Imwe ndimwe nyankhombo wanga, pontho Mulungu wanga; chimbizani dzandiphedza!" 
Psalms41:1 Ngakutsanzaya anthu, ale ambatsalakana atcherengi; MBUYA anaapulumusa pandzidzi wa nyatwa." 
Psalms41:2 MBUYA anaatchinjiriza mbakoya moyo wawo; iye anaachitisa kukomerwa m'dziko; iye nkhabe dzaapereka m'manja mwa anyamalwawo tayu. 
Psalms41:3 MBUYA anaawangisa angadwala, kuapasa pontho mphamvu zikhali na iwo kale." 
Psalms41:4 Ndidalonga kuti, “MBUYA, ndakudawirani; ndiverenimbo nsisi, pontho mundiwangise.”" 
Psalms41:5 Anyamalwa ambandilongera pinthu pyakuipa. Iwo ambafuna kuti ndife, pontho ndiduwaliwe." 
Psalms41:6 Anthu ambadza dzandiona ale hambadza na mtima wakuona tayu iwo ambagumanyisa mphangwa zakuipa zakulonga pya ine, kubuluka penepo ambazivekesa konsene kwene." 
Psalms41:7 Anyakundizonda onsene ambalonga chiwere-were kuna unango na mwanzache pya ine; iwo ambanyerezera pinthu pyakuipaletu kuna ine. 
Psalms41:8 Iwo ambalonga kuti, “Akudwala utenda wapenu-penu, pontho iye nkhabe dzalamukave pagona iyepo.”" 
Psalms41:9 Podi mwanzanga ene ponda-pondembo, ambanyindira ine makayo, ule ambadya na ine pabodzi, andisandukira." 
Psalms41:10 Ndiverenimbo nsisi, MBUYA, na kundibwezera mphamvu zanga zakutoma zile, tenepo ndinaabwezera anyamalwanga." 
Psalms41:11 Ndikupidziwa kuti imwe mumbakomerwa na ine, thangwi anyamalwanga nkhabe kundikunda tayu." 
Psalms41:12 Imwe munandiphedza thangwi ndimbaphata pyakulungama; munandikoya pamaso panu kwenda na kwenda. 
Psalms41:13 Mbakuzwe MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele! Mkuzeni iye chinchino pontho kwenda na kwenda! Ameni! Ameni! 
Psalms42:1 Ninga mumbafunira nyasa madzi akutonthola a mumkulo, inembo ndikufuna imwe Mulungu." 
Psalms42:2 Ndina nyota ya imwe Mulungu wamoyo; ndinaenda lini kakupembedzani pamaso panu? 
Psalms42:3 Mosiku na masikati ndimbalira, misozi ndiye kudya kwanga; ndzidzi onsene anyamalwanga ambandivunza mbati, “Apo Mulungu wako ali kupi?”" 
Psalms42:4 Ndimbasweka mtima ndingakumbuka pya m'nduli, pikhaenda ine pabodzi na mwinji ku Nyumba ya Mulungu, pontho pikhatsogolera ine pikhafamba iwo, mwinji wakukomerwa, kuimba na kukhuwa kukuza Mulungu." 
Psalms42:5 Ndatani ndinatsukwala? Thangwi yache ninji ndinasanyiswa tenepa? Ndinaikha chidikhiro changa pana Mulungu; ndinati ndimkuze pontho, Nyankhombo wanga pontho Mulungu wanga." 
Psalms42:6 Kuno m'dziko ya unyaperezo inakhala ineyi mtimanga wasweka, natenepo ndaikha manyerezero anga onsene pana iye. Iye atumiza kuna moyo wanga mabimbi akutsukwala; kuzunguzika kudadza pana ine ninga kukuka kwa madzi, ninga kutitima kwa madzi kubulukira pa phiri ya Herimoni na Mizara kwenda mumkulo wa Yorodani." 
Psalms42:7  
Psalms42:8 MBUYA mbaonese kundifuna kwache kokhonda mala na masikati, towera na mosiku ndiimbe nyimbo, kupemphera kuna Mulungu wa moyo wanga." 
Psalms42:9 Kuna Mulungu, Phanzwi yanga, ndinalonga kuti, “Thangwi yache ninji mwandiduwalira? Thangwi yache ninji ndathema kuthimiza kuona nyatwa kubulukira kuna vinga ya anyamalwanga?”" 
Psalms42:10 Ine ndapeyiwa na kunditikana kwawo, pinathimiza iwo kundivunza mbati, “Apo, Mulungu wako ali kupi?”" 
Psalms42:11 Thangwi yache ninji ndinatsukwala? Thangwi yache ninji ndinasanyika pikulu pene tenepa? Ndinati ndiikhe chidikhiro changa pana Mulungu, tenepo ndinati ndimkuze pontho, Nyankhombo wanga pontho Mulungu wanga." 
Psalms43:1 Mulungu ndiyeseni munthu okhonda dawa, pontho ndiikhireni kunduli pamseru wanga na anthu okhonda tsalakana pya Mulungu; ndipulumuseni m'manja mwa anthu akunama na akuipa." 
Psalms43:2 Imwe ndimwe Mulungu, mpandanga; thangwi yache ninji mwandikhonda? Thangwi yache ninji ndathema kuona nyatwa kubulukira kuna vinga ya anyamalwanga?" 
Psalms43:3 Tumizani cheza chanu na pyakuonadi pyanu; pindiphate nsenji kubwera na ine pontho ku Zioni, phiri yanu yakupambulika, pontho kumbuto kumbakhala imwe kule." 
Psalms43:4 Tenepo ndinaenda kuguwanu yansembe, Mulungu; imwe ndimwe phata ya kukomerwa kwanga. Ndinati ndiimbe nyakatangale wanga na kuimba nyimbo zakukuza nazo imwepo, Mulungu, Mulungu wanga." 
Psalms43:5 Thangwi yache ninji ndinatsukwala? Thangwi yache ninji ndinaona nyatwa tenepa? Ndinati ndiikhe chidikhiro changa pana Mulungu, ndinati ndimkuze pontho, Nyankhombo wanga pontho Mulungu wanga." 
Psalms44:1 Na makutu athu tapiva, Mulungu; makolo athu adatipanga pya penepi, pya pinthu pikulu pidachita imwe pandzidzi wawo pyaka pya m'ndulimu:" 
Psalms44:2 pya mule mudathamangisira imwe anthu okhonda pembedza Mulungu mbamukhazikisa anthu anu m'dziko mwawomo; mule mudatchunyusira imwe anthu a madzinza anango mbamuchitisa anthu anu pinthu pyawo kuafambira mwadidi. 
Psalms44:3 Anthu anu hadapokesere dziko na matalasadawo tayu; iwo hadakunde thangwi ya mphamvu zawo tayu; zikhali mphamvu zanu na kuawangisa kwanu, pontho cheza cha nkhope yanu kuonesadi kuti imwe mumbaafuna pyakwanga." 
Psalms44:4 Imwe ndimwe mfumu wanga, pontho Mulungu wanga; imwe mumbapasa pidzukulu pya Yakobo mphamvu zakukunda nazo," 
Psalms44:5 pontho na mphamvu za dzinanu, ife tinapondedza anyakutizonda." 
Psalms44:6 Ine nkhabe nyindira utanga penu talasadanga kuti pinandipulumusa tayu; 
Psalms44:7 mbwenye imwe mwatipulumusa m'manja mwa anyamalwathu mbamukunda anyakutizonda. 
Psalms44:8 Ife ndzidzi onsene timbanyadira imwe, Mulungu, pontho kupereka takhuta kuna imwe kwenda na kwenda." 
Psalms44:9 Mbwenye chinchino imwe mwatikhonda, pontho mwatilekera kuti tikundwe; imwe nkhabe tsogolera gulu yathu yankhondo tayu." 
Psalms44:10 Imwe mudatichitisa kuti tiathawe anyamalwathu, tenepo iwo adatipokosera pinthu pyathu." 
Psalms44:11 Imwe mudatawirisa kuti tichekiwe ninga mabira; mudatibalalisa kumadziko achilendo. 
Psalms44:12 Imwe mudagulisa anthu anu na konta yakuchepa khala ninga anthu akusowa basa. 
Psalms44:13 Atsanthembathu adaona pidatichitira imwe; iwo ambatisedegula na kuseka kwene. 
Psalms44:14 Mwatichitisa kukhala akululupa pamaso pa madzinza anango; anthu ambatipidula mbatisedegula. 
Psalms44:15 Ndzidzi onsene kwanga nkhululupiswa basi; ndagudumirwa na manyadzo 
Psalms44:16 thangwi ya kuva kunditonja na kunditikana kunandichita anyamalwanga na anyakundizondawa. 
Psalms44:17 Pyonsenepi pyatichitikira ife pano, podi kwene kuti ife nee takuduwalirani tayu penu kuswa chiverano chidachita imwe na ife nkhabe." 
Psalms44:18 Ife nee tazungunukira kwinango tayu, penu kukhonda kuvera matongero anu tayu." 
Psalms44:19 Mbwenye imwe mwatisiya kwene gwamwa pakati pa nyama zam'tsanga. Imwe mudatigudumira na mdima wakugoswa. 
Psalms44:20 Mbatidaleka kupembedza Mulungu wathu mbatipemphera kuna Mulungu wachilendo," 
Psalms44:21 ndimomwene imwe mbamudapidziwa basi, thangwi mumbadziwa manyerezero onsene akubisika." 
Psalms44:22 Mbwenye ndi thangwi ya imwe kuti ndzidzi onsene tikuphiwa, pontho kuti ife tikutonjwa ninga mabira akufuna kachekwa." 
Psalms44:23 Lamukani, Mbuya! Mwatani munagona? Lamukani! Lekani kutikhonda kwenda na kwenda!" 
Psalms44:24 Munapibisiranji kuna ife? Lekani duwalira nyatwa na kusanyika kwathuku. 
Psalms44:25 Ife tafinyizwa pansi pa fumbi; manungo athu akakamira pamataka. 
Psalms44:26 Lamukani mutiphedze! Tiomboleni thangwi ya kutifuna kwanu kokhonda mala. 
Psalms45:1 Mafala adidi adzala mumtima mwangamu, pinapeka ine nyimbo yakuimbira mfumu. Ninga chakulembera cha nyakulemba mwadidi, lulume yanga yasasanyika kulonga ndakatulo." 
Psalms45:2 Imwe ndimwe mamuna wakubalika pyakwanga kupiringana amuna onsene; mulomo wanu umbalonga mwadidi, pontho mwakuveka. Mulungu akutsanzayisani ndzidzi onsene." 
Psalms45:3 Mangirirani talasadanu m'chuno mwanu, imwe mfumu wamphamvu; ndimwe wademelero, pontho wakugopeka." 
Psalms45:4 Kwirani na ukulu wanu kwenda kakunda, thangwi ya kuikhira kwanu kunduli pyakuonadi na chilungamo! Mphamvu zanu zinakuchitisani kukunda kukulu!" 
Psalms45:5 Matswimo anu ngakutwa pyakwanga, ambalasiratu mitima ya anyamalwanu; madzinza ambagwa pansi pa manyalo anu." 
Psalms45:6 Ufumu wakupasani Mulungu ngwakwenda na kwenda; mumbatonga anthu anu mwachilungamo. 
Psalms45:7 Imwe mumbafuna pyakulungama mbamuzondana na chakudawika. Ndi thangwi yache Mulungu, Mulungu wanu akusankhulani, pontho akukhuthulirani mtsanzayiso ukulu kusiyana na mafumu anango onsene." 
Psalms45:8 Mafuta akununkhira a mure na aloe ali panguwo zanu; anyaluso pa kuimba nyimbo ambadza dzakuchitisani kukomerwa m'nyumba zachifumu zakuthemeserwa na nyanga za nzowu. 
Psalms45:9 Ana achikazi a mafumu ali pakati pa akazi akulemedzwa, pontho kumadyo kwanu kuna nyakufuna kusembwa na imwe, wakuvala pyakuthemesera pyagolidi wadidiletu wa ku Ofiri." 
Psalms45:10 Vani kuno, imwe nyakufuna kusembwa na mfumu, nyerezerani, pontho ikhani khutu: duwalirani anthu a kwanu, pontho a m'nyumba ya babanu." 
Psalms45:11 Mfumu atenuka mtima na kubalika kwanu; mulemedzeni iye, thangwi iye ndi mbuyanu." 
Psalms45:12 Anthu a ku Turo anati adze na mitukwa kuna imwe, amuna amfuma anayesa-yesa kuti muakomere mtima." 
Psalms45:13 Nyakufuna kusembwa na mfumu ali m'nyumba yachifumu; iye ngwakubalika pyakwanga, pontho nguwo zache zidachita kulukwa na golidi." 
Psalms45:14 Uku avala mkhanjo wache wakubalikawo akuendeswa kuna mfumu, m'nduli mwache muna ashamwali amwaliyo, iwombo aendeswa pontho kuna mfumuyo." 
Psalms45:15 Mwakukomerwa pontho kusekera kukulu iwo ambadza mbapitiswa m'nyumba ya mfumu. 
Psalms45:16 Imwe, mfumu wanga, munakhala na ana achimuna azinji kupita mbuto ya makolo anu kukhala mafumu; munaaikha kukhala atongi a dziko yonsene yapansi." 
Psalms45:17 Nyimbo yangayi inagalamusa kuveka kwanu kwenda na kwenda, pontho onsene anakukuzani mpakana ndzidzi onsene unadzawo." 
Psalms46:1 Mulungu ndiye pakubisala pathu, pontho mphamvu zathu; iye ngwakusasanyika kutiphedza pandzidzi wa nyatwa." 
Psalms46:2 Natenepo ife nkhabe dzagopa tayu, podi kwene kuti dziko yapansi itekenyeke, pontho mapiri agwere m'bara yakuzwika;" 
Psalms46:3 podi kwene kuti nyanza ititime na kuchita mabimbi, pontho pitunda kutekenyeka na shungu yache." 
Psalms46:4 Pana mkulo wakudzesa kukomerwa kuna mzinda wa Mulungu, kumbuto yakuchena kumbakhala Nyakudzulu-dzulu." 
Psalms46:5 Mulungu ali mumzinda wenewo, tenepo mzindawo nkhabeve dzavungwa tayu; m'makalakwecha iye anati adze kudzauphedza." 
Psalms46:6 Madzinza akuchita mantha, maufumumbo akutekenyeka; Mulungu akudima, tenepo dziko yapansi ikunyunguluka." 
Psalms46:7 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ali nafe; Mulungu wa Yakobo ndiye pakubisala pathu. 
Psalms46:8 Bwerani muone pyachita MBUYA. Yang'anani pinthu pyakudodomesa pyachita iye padziko yapansi. 
Psalms46:9 Iye ambalekesa nkhondo padziko yonsene; mauta onsene ambaatchola mbavunga madipa, pontho ambapisa pyakugedera matswimo pyawo." 
Psalms46:10 Iye ambalonga kuti, “Matamani, pontho dziwani kuti ine ndine Mulungu; ndinakuzwa pakati pa madzinza, ndinakuzwa m'dziko yonsene yapansi.”" 
Psalms46:11 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ali nafe; Mulungu wa Yakobo ndiye pakubisala pathu. 
Psalms47:1 Imbani m'manja, imwe madzinza onsene, thangwi ya kukomerwa! Muimbireni mwakugaluza fala Mulungu nyimbo zakumkuza nazo." 
Psalms47:2 MBUYA Wakudzulu-dzulu athema kugopiwa; iye ndi mfumu wamkulu wakutonga dziko yonsene yapansi. 
Psalms47:3 Iye adatipasa mphamvu kuti tikunde anthu; iye adatichitisa kutonga madzinza. 
Psalms47:4 Iye ndiye adatisankhulira dziko inakhala ifeyi, dziko ikhanyadira pidzukulu pya Yakobo, akhafuna iye pyakwanga ule." 
Psalms47:5 Mulungu ambaenda kumpando wache wachifumu. Pambakhala kukhuwa thangwi ya kukomerwa, pontho kuliza ngoma pimbaenda MBUYA kudzulu." 
Psalms47:6 Imbani nyimbo zakukuza nazo Mulungu; imbani nyimbo zakukuza nazo mfumu wathu. 
Psalms47:7 Mulungu ndiye mfumu wa dziko yonsene yapansi; muimbireni masalimo akumkuza nawo! 
Psalms47:8 Mulungu ambakhala pampando wache wachifumu wakupambulika; iye ambatonga madzinza onsene. 
Psalms47:9 Mafumu a madzinza ambagumanyikana pabodzi na anthu a Mulungu wa Abrahamu. Nyamphamvu kupiringana anyankhondo onsene ndiye ene basi; iye ngwamkulu pyakwanga pene. 
Psalms48:1 MBUYA ngwamkulu, pontho athema kukuzwa pikulu pene mumzinda wa Mulungu athu, paphiri yache yakupambulika." 
Psalms48:2 Zioni, phiri ya Mulungu njakulapha pontho njakubalika; mzinda wa mfumu wamkulu umbadzesa kukomerwa dziko yonsene yapansi." 
Psalms48:3 Mulungu apionesa kuti ndiye nyakutchinjiriza mzinda, thangwi iye ene ambakhala mwenemo." 
Psalms48:4 Mafumu adagumanyikana pabodzi mbadza dzasosa phiri ya Zioni. 
Psalms48:5 Mbwenye pidaiona iwo, adadodoma; iwo adachita mantha mbathawa." 
Psalms48:6 Kweneko iwo adaphatwa na mantha mbava kupha, ninga mkazi wakufuna kubala," 
Psalms48:7 ninga mphepo yakubulukira kumabulukiro dzuwa imbaswa miyadiya mikulu-mikulu ya ku Tarisisi, imwe mudaavunga." 
Psalms48:8 Ife tava pinthu pyachita Mulungu, pontho chinchino tapiona mumzinda wa Mulungu wathu, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene; iye anakhazikisa mzindawo kwenda na kwenda." 
Psalms48:9 M'bwalo mwa Nyumbanu, Mulungu, timbanyerezera pyakwanga pya kutifuna kwanu kokhonda mala." 
Psalms48:10 Imwe mukukuzwa na anthu konsene kwene, pontho kuveka kwanu kwafalikira kumadolomero a dziko yapansi. Imwe mumbatonga mwachilungamo;" 
Psalms48:11 mbasekere anthu a ku Zioni! Imwe mumbatonga mseru mwakulungama; mbamukhale kusekera m'mizinda ya Yuda! 
Psalms48:12 Anthu a Mulungu fambani kuzungulira Zioni kulengesa nsanja zache; 
Psalms48:13 yang'anani mafufu ache, pontho yang'anani mwadidi mipandache, towera mulonge kuna mfendu unango unadzawo kuti," 
Psalms48:14 “Mulungu weneyu ndi Mulungu wathu kwenda na kwenda; iye anatitsogolera ndzidzi onsene unadzawu.” 
Psalms49:1 Vani ipi, imwe anthu onsene! Veserani, imwe anthu a padziko yonsene yapansi," 
Psalms49:2 mkulu penu mwana, anyakutcherenga na anyakufuma ene." 
Psalms49:3 Manyerezero anga anakhala akuveka; ndinalonga mafala anzeru. 
Psalms49:4 Ndinaikha khutu kuna miyambi; ndinafuthula nthanthi pinaimba ine na nyakatangale wanga. 
Psalms49:5 Ine nkhabe gopa tayu pandzidzi wakugoswa ndingazungulirwa na anyamalwanga," 
Psalms49:6 na anthu akuipa ambanyindira mfuma yawo ale mbadungudza na kuinjipa kwa mfumawo. 
Psalms49:7 Munthu nkhabe kwanisa kupiombola yekha ene tayu; iye nkhabe kwanisa kupagali Mulungu konta ya moyo wache tayu," 
Psalms49:8 thangwi konta ya moyo wa munthu njikulu pyakwanga. Pikhafuna iye kukwanisa kupagali nee mbapidakwana tayu 
Psalms49:9 kuti iye aleke kufa, kuti akhale na moyo okhonda mala." 
Psalms49:10 Munthu onsene anakwanisa kuona kuti podi na anthu ene anzeru zawo ambafa basi, ninga mumbachitirambo anthu akupupwa na akudzedzeduka. Iwo ambasiyira pidzukulu pyawo mfuma zawo zonsene." 
Psalms49:11 Masiye awo ndiye misawo kwenda na kwenda; kweneko ambakhala ndzidzi onsene, podi kwene kuti iwo pakutoma akhali na mbuto yawo ene." 
Psalms49:12 Ukulu wa munthu nkhabe kwanisa kumpulumusa kuimfa tayu; iye anafa basi ninga nyama. 
Psalms49:13 Yang'anani pimbachitikira anthu ambapinyindira okha ene ale, kumala kwa anthu ambakwana nayo mfumawo nee funave pinangobi." 
Psalms49:14 Kumala kwa moyo wawo nkhwenda kudziko ya anyakufa ninga mabira, pontho imfa ndiye inafuna dzakhala makabuswawo. Anyakulungama anaatonga na machibese; manungo awo anavunda kudziko ya anyakufa kutali na misawo." 
Psalms49:15 Mbwenye Mulungu anandiombola; iye anandipulumusa kumphamvu za dziko ya anyakufa; iye anati andiendese kuna iye ene. 
Psalms49:16 Lekani ipirwa napyo munthu angafuma, ngakhala mfumache ikwenda mbikula pikulu pene;" 
Psalms49:17 thangwi iye nkhabe dzakwata mfumache angafa tayu; iye nkhabe dzaenda na chinthu chibodzi chene kumasiye tayu. 
Psalms49:18 Podi munthu apisanzayise tani m'moyo wache, pontho kukuzwa thangwi pinthu pikumfambira mwadidi," 
Psalms49:19 iye anati afe basi ninga mudachitira makolo ache, kule kuna mdima okhonda mala." 
Psalms49:20 Ukulu wa munthu nkhabe kumpulumusa kuimfa tayu; iye anafa basi ninga nyama. 
Psalms50:1 Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene, MBUYA, ambalonga; iye ambachemera dziko yonsene yapansi kubulukira kumabulukiro dzuwa kufikirana kumadokero dzuwa." 
Psalms50:2 Kubulukira ku Zioni, mzinda wadidi wakubalika, Mulungu ambaonesa cheza." 
Psalms50:3 Mulungu wathu akubwera, nee akudza mwakumatama tayu; moto wakuchita kunyeka uli patsogolo pache, chonzi chikulu chamzungulira." 
Psalms50:4 Iye ambachemera kudzulu na pansi ninga mboni kuti aone pinatonga iye mseru anthu ache. 
Psalms50:5 Iye ambalonga kuti, “Gumanyisani chifupi na ine anthu anga akukhulupirika, ale adachita na ine chiverano pakupereka nsembe.”" 
Psalms50:6 Kudzulu kumbalonga kuti Mulungu ngwakulungama, kuti iye ene mwenechiro ndiye nyakutonga miseru." 
Psalms50:7 “Veserani kuno, anthu anga, pontho ndinati ndilonge; ndinati ndichite umboni wakupokanyisana na imwepo, Aisraele. Ine ndine Mulungu, Mulungu wanu." 
Psalms50:8 Ine nee ndikukusumululani tayu thangwi ya nsembe zanu, penu nsembe zanu zakupyerera zimbadza na imwe kuna ine ndzidzi onsene." 
Psalms50:9 Pontho ine nkhabe funa ng'ombe zimuna zakubulukira m'thanga mwanu, penu mbuzi zakubulukira pa mikumbi yanu tayu;" 
Psalms50:10 nyama zonsene za mumsitu nsanga, pontho na ng'ombe zene za pamapiri pikwi-pikwi." 
Psalms50:11 Mbalame zonsene zam'tsanga nsanga, pontho na nyama zonsene zam'tsanga m'maphedi." 
Psalms50:12 “Mbandidakhala na njala, nee mbandidakupemphani kudya tayu, thangwi dziko yapansi na pyonsene pili mwenemo mphyanga." 
Psalms50:13 Kadi ine ndimbadya nyama ya ng'ombe imuna, penu kumwa chiropa cha mbuzi?" 
Psalms50:14 Kupereka takhuta kukhale nsembe yanu kuna Mulungu, pontho perekani kuna Nyakudzulu-dzulu pyonsene pidadumbira imwe kuna iye pile." 
Psalms50:15 Ndichemereni nyatwa zingadza, ndinati ndikupulumuseni, pontho imwe munati mundikuze.”" 
Psalms50:16 Mbwenye Mulungu adalonga kuna anyakudawika mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji mumbalalika mwambo wanga? Thangwi yache ninji mumbalonga pya chiverano changa?" 
Psalms50:17 Imwe mumbakhonda kuti ndikulangeni; mumbakhonda matongero anga. 
Psalms50:18 Imwe mumbasanduka shamwali wa mbava yonsene inaona imwe ile, pontho mumbaphatizana na anyakuchita pyauputa." 
Psalms50:19 “Ndimwe akusasanyika kulonga pinthu pyakuipa; imwe nkhabe dembuka na kulonga pyakunama tayu. 
Psalms50:20 Imwe mumbasasanyika kusumira abale anu ene, pontho na kuasakira mathangwi." 
Psalms50:21 Imwe mwachita pinthu pyonsenepi, kwache sidalonge chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu, natenepo imwe mudanyerezera kuti ine ndikhali ninga imwe. Mbwenye lero ndikukusumululani, pontho kukuonesani pakwecha mseru wanu." 
Psalms50:22 “Nyerezerani ipi imwe anyakundiduwalira, gopesera ndinakuvungani, pontho nkhabe unango anakukupulumusani." 
Psalms50:23 Kupereka takhuta ndiye nsembe ikulu imbandilemedza; ndimomwene kuti ndinaapulumusa anyakundivera onsene.” 
Psalms51:1 Ndiverenimbo nsisi, Mulungu, thangwi ya kundifuna kwanu kokhonda mala. Thangwi ya nsisi zanu zikulu ndifudzireni umambalanga." 
Psalms51:2 Tsukani kubulusa pyakuipa pyanga pyonsene. Ndibulusireni pyakudawa pyanga kuti ndikhale wakuchena. 
Psalms51:3 Ndadziwa umambalanga; kudawa kwanga ndimbakunyerezera mumtima ndzidzi onsene. 
Psalms51:4 Ndakudawirani, ndadawira imwe ene basi. Ndachita pinthu pya kukuipirani. Ndimomwene mwathemadi kunditonga mseru. Ine ndakonwa chione." 
Psalms51:5 Ndidakwatirwa mimba, pontho kubalwa na mama m'pyakudawa." 
Psalms51:6 Mtima wakuona pontho pyakuonadi ndiye pimbafuna imwe; dzazani manyerezero anga na nzeru zanu. 
Psalms51:7 Bulusani pyakudawa pyanga tenepo ndinakhala wakuchena; nditsukeni, ine ndinachena kupiringana matalala." 
Psalms51:8 Nditawiriseni kuva fala ya kukomerwa na kusekera; podi kwene kuti mwandiswa na kundipeya, ndinati ndikomerwe pontho." 
Psalms51:9 Fungani maso anu kuna pyakudawa pyanga, pontho fudzani pyakuipa pyanga pyonsene." 
Psalms51:10 Ikhani mtima wangwiro muna ine, Mulungu, pontho ikhani mzimu wachinchino, wakukhazikika muna ine." 
Psalms51:11 Lekani kundibulusa pamaso panu; lekani kundibulusira Mzimu wanu Wakuchena. 
Psalms51:12 Ndipaseni pontho kukomerwa, kule kumbabulukira ku chipulumuso chanu; ndipaseni mtima wakufuna kukuverani." 
Psalms51:13 Tenepo ndinafunzisa anthu akudawa matongero anu, tenepo iwo anazungunukira kuna imwe." 
Psalms51:14 Ndipulumuseni kuna mseru wa kupha, Mulungu, Nyankhombo wanga, tenepo ndinalalika mwakukomerwa pya kulungama kwanu." 
Psalms51:15 Ndiphedzeni kulonga, Mbuya, tenepo ndinakukuzani." 
Psalms51:16 Imwe nkhabe funa nsembe tayu, podi ndingazipereka kwene nkhabe; imwe nkhabe komerwa na nsembe zakupyerera tayu." 
Psalms51:17 Mulungu, nsembe yanga ndi mzimu wakupichepesa; imwe nkhabe dzakhonda mtima wakupichepesa na wakuleka pyakudawa tayu." 
Psalms51:18 Mulungu komerani mtima mzinda wa Zioni na kuuphedza, mangani pontho mpanda wa Yerusalemu." 
Psalms51:19 Tenepo munakomerwa na nsembe yakuthema, pontho nsembe zathu zakupyerera; ng'ombe zimuna zinati ziperekwe paguwa yanu yansembe." 
Psalms52:1 Umbadungudziranji na kuipa kwakoku, iwe munthu wamphamvu? Kukhulupirika kwa Mulungu nkhokhonda mala." 
Psalms52:2 Imwe mumbanyerezera pinthu pyakuvunga anango, lulume yanu yakhala ninga mpeni walezi; kwanu nkhusasanya pyakunama basi." 
Psalms52:3 Pyakuipa mumbapifuna pyakwanga kupiringana kuchita pyadidi, pontho pyakunama kupiringana pyakuonadi." 
Psalms52:4 Iwe nyakunama! Pimbafuna iwe nkhukuwaza kwene anzako na mafalako. 
Psalms52:5 Natenepo Mulungu anakuvunga mwakumalisikiratu; anakugonkha kukubulusa m'nyumba mwako. Anakubulusa kudziko ya anthu amoyo. 
Psalms52:6 Anyakulungama anapiona penepi mbachita mantha, tenepo anakuseka mbalonga mbati," 
Psalms52:7 “Yang'anani, ngushu munthu akhakhonda Mulungu kuti akhale pakubisala pache ule. Iye akhanyindira kwene mfumache basi mbakula na mphamvu pakuvunga anzache ene.”" 
Psalms52:8 Mbwenye ine ndakhala ninga muti waolivi wakumera m'Nyumba ya Mulungu. Ine ndimbanyindira kundifuna kwache kokhonda mala kwenda na kwenda. 
Psalms52:9 Ndzidzi onsene ndinapereka takhuta kuna imwe, thangwi ya pinthu pyachita imwe. Pamaso pa anthu anu ndinalalika kuti ndimwe wadidi." 
Psalms53:1 Mapupwe ambalonga mumtima mwawo kuti, “Kunja kuno nkhabeko Mulungu.” Onsene manyerezero awo amala vungika, pontho achita pinthu pyakuipa pyakugoswa; nkhabe na mbodzi ene ambachita pinthu pyakulungama tayu." 
Psalms53:2 Mulungu ambayang'ana pansi pana anthu kubulukira kudzulu kuti aone ngakhala pana munthu ene mbodzi wanzeru, munthu ene mbodzi wakusaka-saka Mulungu." 
Psalms53:3 Mbwenye onsene amala bauka kwenda pyawo m'tsanga; onsene ntchibodzi-bodzi ngakuipa. Nkhabe mbodzi ambachita pinthu pyakulungama, nee na mbodzi ene nkhabe." 
Psalms53:4 Mulungu akuvunza mbati, “Kadi iwo nkhabe dziwa tayu? Kadi onsene anaphata pyakuipawa nkhabe dziwa pinthu tayu? Iwo ambakhala na moyo thangwi ya kubera anthu anga, pontho iwo nkhabe pinthu na kupemphera kuna ine tayu.”" 
Psalms53:5 Mbwenye iwo anati athuswe pikulu pene, podi chipo adzati khala tenepo thangwi Mulungu anati amwaze magogodo a anyakuchitira umalwa anthu ache. Mulungu aakhonda anthu enewa natenepo iwo anati akundwe monsene mwene." 
Psalms53:6 Ndimbapemphera pikulu pene kuti chipulumuso cha Israele chibulukire ku Zioni. Anthu a ku Israele anakomerwa pyakwanga, Mulungu anachitisa pontho pinthu pyawo kufamba mwadidi." 
Psalms54:1 Mulungu, ndipulumuseni na mphamvu zanu; ndichitiseni kukhala mtumbe na mphamvu zanu zikulu." 
Psalms54:2 Vani kupempha kwanga, Mulungu, vani mafalanga." 
Psalms54:3 Anyakudungudza akudza kuti andiphate; anyakukala mtima akuyesa-yesa kuti andiphe, anthu ache mbale ambakhonda tsalakana pya Mulungu." 
Psalms54:4 Mbwenye Mulungu ndiye nyakundiphedza. Mbuya ndiye nyakundiphata pamkono. 
Psalms54:5 Mulungu mbaphatise basa pyakuipa pyawo pyonthopyo kutchunyusa napyo anyamalawanga. Iye anati aavunge thangwi iye ngwakukhulupirika. 
Psalms54:6 Mwakukomerwa ndinati ndipereke nsembe kuna imwe, MBUYA; ndinati ndipereke takhuta thangwi ndimwe wadidi." 
Psalms54:7 Imwe mwandipulumusa panyatwa zanga zonsene. Ndaona anyamalwanga kuti akukundwa. 
Psalms55:1 Mulungu, ivani kupempha kwanga; lekani phopha makutu kuna kupemphera kwanga!" 
Psalms55:2 Ndivenimbo ine mbamunditawire; ndamaliratu pano na pyakundisanyisa. 
Psalms55:3 Ndagoswerwa pyakwanga na kundithuswa kwa anyamalwa, ndapeyeka na kundipondedza kwa anyakundizonda. Iwo ambandidzesera nyatwa; iwo andizhangalira pontho akundizonda." 
Psalms55:4 Mtimanga ukusanyika pyakwanga, pontho kugoswa kwa imfa kwandigwera." 
Psalms55:5 Ndikutetemera na mantha, pontho ndakundwa na pyakugoswa." 
Psalms55:6 Ndikhapifuna pyakwanga kukhala na maphaphido ninga jiwa, tenepo mbidambulukira pyanga kutali kuti ndikagumaneko mbuto yakupuma," 
Psalms55:7 mbidambulukira kutali pyakwanga kakhala pyanga m'thando yatchetcha. 
Psalms55:8 Ine mbidachimbiza kusaka mbuto yakubisalapo, gopesera mphepo ikulu na chonzi." 
Psalms55:9 Mbuya, dzudzumisani pinaverana anyamalwanga! Ndaona nthonga na chimpiningu mumzinda;" 
Psalms55:10 kuuzungulira mosiku na masikati; kuudzaza pontho na upandu. 
Psalms55:11 Konsene kwene kwavungika; njira zadzala na kunama, pontho kuponderezana." 
Psalms55:12 Mbadandiseka ndi nyamalwa, mbandidapirira. Anagayayi mbadakhala nyakundizonda, ine mbidambisalira." 
Psalms55:13 Mbwenye ndiwe mwanzanga, wakufamba naye, munthu ninga ine, pontho shamwalianga ponda-pondembo." 
Psalms55:14 Ife tikhachedza pabodzi, pontho tikhaenda tonsene kapembedza m'Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
Psalms55:15 Anyamalwanga mbafe ndzidzi wawo udzati kwana; aende amoyo kudziko ya anyakufa! Pyakuipa pili m'nyumba zawo na mumtima mwawo. 
Psalms55:16 Mbwenye ndimbachemera MBUYA Mulungu kuti andiphedze, iye anati andipulumuse." 
Psalms55:17 Machibese, masikati na mosiku kudungunya na kubulira kwanga pimbafika kuna iye; iye anati ave falanga." 
Psalms55:18 Iye anandibweza mwadidi kubulukira kunkhondo inamenyana ine na anyamalwanga azinjiwa. 
Psalms55:19 Mulungu, ule ambatonga kwenda na kwenda, anandiva mbaakunda; thangwi iwo adakhonda kusanduza makhaliro awo, pontho iwo hambamgopa tayu." 
Psalms55:20 Mwanzanga akhafamba na ine kale adasosa ashamwali ache; iye adaswa chiverano chache. 
Psalms55:21 Malongero ache ngakukoma ninga mkaka, kwache mumtima mwache muna nkhondo. Mafalache ngakufewa kupiringana mafuta, kwache akhala ninga talasada yakutwa." 
Psalms55:22 Nyatwa zako zonsene uzisiye m'manja mwa MBUYA, tenepo iye anakuphata pamkono. Iye nkhabe lekerera amuna akukhulupirika kuti akundwe tayu." 
Psalms55:23 Mbwenye imwe, Mulungu, munati muaendese anyachirope na anyakunamawa kudzenje yakuvungika mbidzati piringana kati ya moyo wawo. Mbwenye kulonga pya ine ndinati ndikunyindireni." 
Psalms56:1 Ndiverenimbo nsisi ine, Mulungu, thangwi anyamalwa andiphata; iwo akundiboneresa ndzidzi onsene." 
Psalms56:2 Nsiku yonsene anyakundipokanya ambandisosa; anamenyana na ine ngazinji. 
Psalms56:3 Ndingachita mantha, ndimbanyindira imwepo." 
Psalms56:4 Ndimbanyindira Mulungu, tenepo ine nkhabe dzachita mantha tayu; ndimbamkuza thangwi ya kudumbira kwache. Munthu enembo pyache anandichitanji?" 
Psalms56:5 Anyamalwanga ambandidzesera nyatwa nsiku yonsene; iwo ambasaka-saka njira yakundikuwaza nayo. 
Psalms56:6 Iwo ambagumanyikana mbuto zakubisika kuyang'ana pyonsene pinachita ine, kudikhira kuti andiphe." 
Psalms56:7 Atchunyuseni Mulungu, thangwi ya pyakuipa pyawo; akundeni anthu enewa na kuzhangali kwanu." 
Psalms56:8 Imwe mukudziwa kusanyika kunachita ineku; imwe mwakoya misozi yanga m'dudu mwanu. Ayi m'bukhu mwanu pyalembwa tayu? 
Psalms56:9 Nsiku inakuchemerani ineyo, anyamalwanga anabwerera m'nduli. Ndikupidziwa kuti Mulungu ali kukhundu kwanga," 
Psalms56:10 Mulungu, ule ambakuza ine thangwi ya kudumbira kwache; MBUYA, ule ndimbamkuza thangwi ya kudumbira kudachita iye." 
Psalms56:11 Ndimbanyindira iye ene basi, tenepo ine nkhabe gopa tayu. Munthu enembo pyache anandichitanji?" 
Psalms56:12 Mulungu, ndinapereka pidadumbira ine kuna imwe pile. Ndinapereka nsembe zanga kuonesa kupereka kwanga takhuta kuna imwe," 
Psalms56:13 thangwi mwandipulumusa kuimfa, pontho mudandichitisa kuti ndileke kugwegweduka. Natenepo ndimbafamba pamaso pa Mulungu, m'cheza chimbamwinikira iye anthu amoyo chile."
