Psalms57:1 Ndiverenimbo nsisi ine, Mulungu, ndiverenimbo nsisi, thangwi ndimbadza kuna imwe, pakubisala panga. Imwe mumbandibisa m'maphaphido anu kufikirana kumala kwa chonzi chakugoswa." 
Psalms57:2 Ndimbachemera Mulungu Wakudzulu-dzulu, Mulungu ule ambandipasa pyakusowa pyanga pyonsene." 
Psalms57:3 Iye anatawira kubulukira kudzulu mbandipulumusa; iye anakunda anyakundisanyisa. Mulungu anaonesa kundifuna kwache kokhonda mala na kukhulupirika kwache. 
Psalms57:4 Ndazungulirwa na anyamalwa, ale akhala ninga nkhalamu zakudya anthu. Mano awo akhala ninga madipa na matswimo; malulume awo akhala ninga matalasada akutwa." 
Psalms57:5 Onesani ukulu wanu kuthambo, Mulungu, pontho demelero yanu padziko yonsene yapansi." 
Psalms57:6 Anyamalwa atandika malitchera awo kuti andikhweshe; mtimanga wakundwa na kuva kupha. Iwo adakumba mulindi m'njira mwanga, kwache enechiro ache ene ndiye adagweramo." 
Psalms57:7 Mtimanga wakhazikika, Mulungu, mtimanga wakhazikika; ndinati ndikuimbireni, pontho kukukuzani!" 
Psalms57:8 Galamuka moyo wanga! Lamukani, nyakatangale wanga na malimbanga! Ndinati ndilamuse dzuwa." 
Psalms57:9 Ndinati ndipereke takhuta kuna imwe, Mbuya, pakati pa madzinza. Ndinati ndikukuzeni pakati pa anthu onsene." 
Psalms57:10 Kundifuna kwanu kokhonda mala kwafika mpakana kudzulu; kukhulupirika kwanu kwaphata thambo. 
Psalms57:11 Mulungu onesani ukulu wanu kuthambo, pontho demelero yanu padziko yonsene yapansi." 
Psalms58:1 Ayi imwe atongi mumbatonga mwachilungamo? Ayi mumbatonga anthu mseru mwakukhonda yang'ana nkhope? 
Psalms58:2 Nkhabe! Imwe mumbasasanya kuchita pyakuipa, pontho pyaupandu m'dziko." 
Psalms58:3 Anyakuipa ambaenda mbadawa moyo wawo onsene; kwawo nkhunama kwene kutomera nsiku idabalwa iwo. 
Psalms58:4 Iwo ana nyongo yakupha ninga ya nyoka; iwo ambafunga makutu awo ninga chipiri chokhonda kuva," 
Psalms58:5 chile nee chimbava kuchemera kwa nyamatsenga, podi kwene achemere mwaluso tani." 
Psalms58:6 Iswani mano a m'kanwa mwawo, Mulungu, khutchani mano a nkhalamu zakugoswazi." 
Psalms58:7 Iwo mbamale pyawo ninga madzi akukuka; apondedzwe pyawo ninga maudzu a m'njira. 
Psalms58:8 Mbakhale pyawo ninga nkhono yakunyunguluka kusanduka mamina; mbakhale pyawo ninga mwana wakufera m'mimba okhonda kuona kunja. 
Psalms58:9 Iwo mbadzati kupidziwa tayu, ambagwandwa ninga maudzu; Mulungu na kuzhangali kwache kukulu anaatswaira kuambulusa uku ana moyo." 
Psalms58:10 Anyakulungama anakomerwa pyakwanga angaona anyakudawa akutchunyuswa kuabwezera; iwo angatsuka manyalo awo m'chiropa cha anyakudawa. 
Psalms58:11 Anthu analonga mbati, “Ndimomwene anyakulungama apaswadi mfupo wawo; kunja kunodi kuna Mulungu, ule ambatonga mseru dziko yapansi.”" 
Psalms59:1 Mulungu wanga, ndipulumuseni m'manja mwa anyamalwanga; nditchinjirizeni kuna anyakufuna kundiphatawa!" 
Psalms59:2 Ndipulumuseni m'manja mwa anthu akuipawa; ndipulumuseni gopesera anyachiropewa! 
Psalms59:3 Yang'anani! Iwo akundidikhirira kuti andiphe; anthu akukala mtima agumanyikana kufuna moyo wanga. Nee na thangwi yakuti ndachita umambala, penu pyakudawika tayu," 
Psalms59:4 penu ndapichimwana, MBUYA, iwo akuchimbiza kumbuto zawo kandibisalira. Lamukani dzandiphedza, mbamupione!" 
Psalms59:5 MBUYA Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene, imwe ndimwe Mulungu wa Israele! Lamukani muatchunyuse madzinza okhonda kukupembedzani; lekani kuvera nsisi anyakupandukira akuipawa!" 
Psalms59:6 Iwo ambabwera pontho na mosiku, kukhumbza ninga anambwa uku akuzunga-zunga mumzinda." 
Psalms59:7 Vani kutikana na kundigoswa kwawo. Malulume awo akhala ninga matalasada m'kanwa mwawo, kwache iwo ambanyerezera kuti nkhabe munthu akuava." 
Psalms59:8 Mbwenye imwe, MBUYA, mumbaaseka; mumbaasedegula madzinza ambakhonda kukupembedzani ale." 
Psalms59:9 Ine ndimbanyindira imwe, Mulungu, mphamvu zanga; thangwi imwe ndimwe mpandanga wamphamvu." 
Psalms59:10 Mulungu wanga na kundifuna kwache kokhonda mala anati adze kuna ine; iye anati andionese kukundwa kwa anyamalwanga. 
Psalms59:11 Lekani kuapha, Mulungu, gopesera anthu anga anaduwalira. Abalaliseni na mphamvu zanu, pontho muakunde, Mbuya, chakugedera nacho matswimo changa." 
Psalms59:12 Kudawa kuli pamilomo yawo; mafalawo onsene ngakudawika; mbakwesheke na kudungudza kumbachita iwoko! Thangwi ambatemberera na kunama kwene," 
Psalms59:13 avungeni mwakuzhangali; avungeni kuti aleke onekave. Tenepo munthu onsene anapidziwa kuti Mulungu ambatonga m'dziko ya Israele, pontho kuti kutonga kwache kwafika kumadolomero a padziko yonsene yapansi." 
Psalms59:14 Anyamalwanga ambabwera pontho na mosiku, kukhumbza ninga anambwa ambazunga-zunga mumzinda," 
Psalms59:15 ninga anambwa ambafamba-famba kusaka kudya mbakhumbza angakhonda kukugumana kwakukwana. 
Psalms59:16 Mbwenye ine ndinati ndiimbe pya mphamvu zanu; machibese onsene ndinati ndiimbe mwakugaluza fala pya kundifuna kwanu kokhonda mala. Imwe ndimwe mpandanga wamphamvu ndzidzi onsene; ndimwe pakubisala panga pandzidzi wa nyatwa. 
Psalms59:17 Ndinati ndikukuzeni imwe, mphamvu zanga. Pakubisala panga ndi Mulungu, Mulungu ambandifuna na kundifuna kokhonda mala ule." 
Psalms60:1 Mulungu mwatikhonda, mwativunga pontho mwatizhangalira, mbwenye chinchino bwererani dzatipasa pontho mphamvu." 
Psalms60:2 Imwe mwaitekenya dziko, pontho mwaing'amba; sasanyani minyanjacheyo, thangwi ikudidimuka." 
Psalms60:3 Anthu anu mwaaonesa nyatwa zikulu; tikudzedzereka khala ninga taledzera. 
Psalms60:4 Mbwenye mwaacheuza anyakukugopani, towera athawe kuvungikako." 
Psalms60:5 Tipulumuseni na mphamvu zanu zikulu; vani kupemphera kwathu, towera anthu anafuna imwe apulumuke." 
Psalms60:6 Kubulukira kumbuto yache yakuchena Mulungu alonga mbati, “thangwi ya kukunda kwanga ndinagawa Shekemu, pontho ndinagawa phedi ya Sukoti kuna anthu anga." 
Psalms60:7 Gileadi na Manase ene nganga; Eferemu ndiye chipewu changa chachisimbi, pontho Yuda ndiye ndodo yanga yachifumu." 
Psalms60:8 Mbwenye ndinaphatisa basa Moabu ninga bitchu kutsuka manyalo anga, pontho ndinaponya nkhwaira zanga pana Edomu kuonesa kuti ndaakunda; ndinakhuwa mwakukomerwa kuti ndakunda Afilisti.”" 
Psalms60:9 Mbani anandipitisa mumzinda wakutchingwa na mpanda? Mbani anandiphata nsenji kwenda ku Edomu? 
Psalms60:10 Ayi Mulungu mwatikhonda? Kadi imwe nkhabe kwenda pabodzi na anyankhondo athu tayu? 
Psalms60:11 Tiphedzenimbo kumenyana na anyamalwathu; chiphedzo cha munthu nkhabe basabi. 
Psalms60:12 Mbwenye Mulungu angakhala kukhundu kwathu tinati tipikwanise; iye anakunda anyamalwathu. 
Psalms61:1 Ivani kulira kwanga, Mulungu; ivani kupempha kwanga." 
Psalms61:2 Kubulukira kumadolomero a dziko ndimbakuchemerani na mtima wakusanyika. Ndiendeseni kumbuto yakupata," 
Psalms61:3 thangwi imwe ndimwe pakubisala panga, imwe ndimwe nsanja yamphamvu kuna anyakundizonda." 
Psalms61:4 Ndilekeni ndikhale pyanga m'mbuto yanu yakuchena nsiku zonsene za moyo wanga; ndilekeni ndibisale pansi pa maphaphido anu. 
Psalms61:5 Imwe mwava pidadumbira ine pile, Mulungu, pontho mwandipasambo pinthu pinafuna dzatambira anyakukulemedzani ale." 
Psalms61:6 Thimizirani pyaka pizinji kuna moyo wa mfumu; mtawiriseni kukhala mifendu na mifendu! 
Psalms61:7 Mulungu, iye mbatonge pamaso panu kwenda na kwenda; mtchinjirizeni na kumfuna kwanu kokhonda mala pontho na kukhulupirika kwanu." 
Psalms61:8 Natenepo ndzidzi onsene ndinaimba nyimbo zakukukuzani nazo, mbandichita nsiku na nsiku pidadumbira ine kuna imwe pile." 
Psalms62:1 Ndimbadikhira mwakupirira kuti Mulungu andipulumuse; ndimbanyindira iye ene basi. 
Psalms62:2 Ndiye ene pakubisala panga, pontho chipulumuso changa; ndiye mpandanga wamphamvu, tenepo ine nkhabe dzatekenyeka tayu." 
Psalms62:3 Monsenene munamenya nyakusowa pyache mphamvu ninga mpanda wakudidimuka, pontho wakupendama kufikirana lini?" 
Psalms62:4 Chinafuna imwe kwene nkhumbulusa pampando wache wachilemedzo; imwe mumbakomerwa nako kunamaku. Imwe mumbalonga mafala akutsanzayisa, kwache mumtima mwanu mumbamtemberera." 
Psalms62:5 Ndimbadikhira mwakupirira Mulungu ene basi; ndimbaikha chidikhiro changa pana iye. 
Psalms62:6 Ndiye ene basi pakubisala panga, pontho chipulumuso changa; iye ndi mpandanga wamphamvu, tenepo ine nkhabe dzatekenyeka tayu." 
Psalms62:7 Chipulumuso na chilemedzo changa chagona pana Mulungu; iye ndiye nyakunditchinjiriza wamphamvu; iye ndiye pakubisala panga. 
Psalms62:8 Nyindirani Mulungu ndzidzi onsene, imwe anthu anga. Mpangeni nyatwa zanu zonsene, thangwi iye ndiye pakubisala pathu." 
Psalms62:9 Anthu onsene akhala ninga muya; mkulu penu mwana onsene ntchibodzi-bodzi nkhabe basabi. Apimeni onsene, munaona kuti iwo nkhabe lemera tayu; iwo ngakululupa ninga muya." 
Psalms62:10 Lekani nyindira kuzunguza; lekani nyerezera kuti munagumana pinthu na umbava; podi kwene mfumanu iinjipe tani, lekani kuinyindira." 
Psalms62:11 Ndamva Mulungu kazinji kene akulonga kuti iye ndi mwenechiro mphamvu," 
Psalms62:12 pontho kuti kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala. Imwe ene, Mbuya, ndiye mumbafupa munthu onsene malingana na mabasache." 
Psalms63:1 Mulungu, imwe ndimwe Mulungu wanga; ine ndakutchuwani. Mtimanga onsene ukukhumba imwepo; ninga dziko yakuuma, yakuguga, pontho yakusowa madzi, moyo wanga una nyota na imwe." 
Psalms63:2 Nditawiriseni kuti ndikuoneni m'mbuto yakuchena; nditawiriseni kuti ndione mphamvu na demelero yanu. 
Psalms63:3 Kundifuna kwanu kokhonda mala nkhwakufunika kupiringana moyo, natenepo mulomo wanga unakukuzani." 
Psalms63:4 Ndzidzi unakhala ine na moyo ndinati ndipereke takhuta kuna imwe; ndinakwiza manjanga kuna imwe kupemphera. 
Psalms63:5 Moyo wanga unadya phwando mbukhuta, mbandiimba nyimbo zakukomerwa kukuza nazo imwepo." 
Psalms63:6 Pinagona ine patalimba, ndimbakukumbukani basi; mosiku onsene ndimbanyerezera pya imwe," 
Psalms63:7 thangwi ndzidzi onsene ndimwe mumbandiphedza. M'maphaphido anu ine ndimbaimba nyimbo zakukomerwa. 
Psalms63:8 Moyo wanga umbakakamira pana imwe, tenepo na dzanjanu mumbandiphata pamkono." 
Psalms63:9 Ale ambayesa-yesa pyakundipha anati atchithe pansi pa mataka pakuzwika. 
Psalms63:10 Iwo anaphiwa pankhondo, pontho manungo awo anasanduka kudya kwa matika." 
Psalms63:11 Na thangwi yakuti Mulungu adamchitisa kukunda, mfumu anakomerwa. Ale ambadumbira na dzina ya Mulungu anamkuza, mbwenye mulomo wa anyakunama unaphophwa." 
Psalms64:1 Ndili panyatwa, Mulungu, ivani kupempha kwangaku! Ndikuchita mantha thangwi ya anyamalwanga, pulumusani moyo wanga!" 
Psalms64:2 Nditchinjirizeni kuna pinaverana anyakudawika, kuna kusokosa kwa mwinji wa anyakuipawa." 
Psalms64:3 Iwo ambanozwa lulume yawo ninga talasada, mbaponya mafalawo ninga matswimo akupha." 
Psalms64:4 Iwo ambaponya matswimo akupha kubulukira pa mbuto yakubisika pana anyakukhonda dawa mbaalasa mwakututumusa pontho mwakusowa mantha. Iwo ambavunga anthu adidi mwakukala mtima. 
Psalms64:5 Ambakakamira kuchita pyakuipa pyaverana iwopyo! Iwo ambaverana mbuto zakuteyeramo misamphawo; iwo ambalonga kuti, “Nkhabe munthu anakwanisa kuiona tayu.”" 
Psalms64:6 Iwo ambaverana kuchita pinthu pyakuipa mbalonga mbati, “Tasasanya mwadidi manyerezero athuwa.” Mtima na manyerezero a munthu ngakuchenjera." 
Psalms64:7 Mbwenye Mulungu ambaponya matswimo ache pana iwo, tenepo kabodzi kene iwo ambakhala na pironda." 
Psalms64:8 Iye anati aavunge thangwi ya malongero awo; anyaakuona onsene anakupusa msolo. 
Psalms64:9 Onsene anachita mantha; iwo ananyerezera pinthu pyachita Mulungu na kulonga pya mabasache. 
Psalms64:10 Anthu akulungama onsene anakomerwa, thangwi ya pinthu pyachita MBUYA. Iwo anabisala muna iye; anthu akulungama onsene anamkuza." 
Psalms65:1 Mulungu, mphyadidi kuti ife tikukuzeni mu Zioni, na kuchita pidadumbira ife kuna imwe pile," 
Psalms65:2 thangwi mumbava kupemphera kwathu. Anthu onsene konsene kwene anabwera kuna imwe," 
Psalms65:3 kutongwa mseru thangwi ya pyakudawa pyawo. Kudawika kwathu kwatikunda, kwache imwe mumbalekerera umambalathu." 
Psalms65:4 Ngakutsanzaya anthu adasankhula imwe ale, ale adadza na imwe kuti akhale pambuto yanu yakuchena. Ife tinakwana napyo pinthu pyadidi pya m'Nyumba mwanu, mtsanzayiso wa Nyumbanu yakupambulika." 
Psalms65:5 Mumbatitawira na mabasa akudodomesa kutipulumusa nawo, Imwe Mulungu, Nyankhombo wathu. Anthu onsene a padziko yapansi na a bara zakutali ambanyindira imwe." 
Psalms65:6 Mumbaikha phiri pambuto yache na mphamvu zanu kuonesadi mphamvu zanu zikulu. 
Psalms65:7 Imwe mumbamatamisa kutitima kwa bara na kukapira kwa mabimbi. Imwe mumbamatamisa pimpiningu pya anthu. 
Psalms65:8 Dziko yonsene yapansi inachita mantha thangwi ya pinthu pikulu pyachita imwe. Mabasanu adzesa mkhuwo wakukomerwa kubulukira nkhomo na nkhomo ya dziko yapansi. 
Psalms65:9 Mumbaonesa kutsalakana kwanu dziko pakuvumbisa mvula; mumbaichitisa kukhala na mataka akubalisa pinthu. Mumbadzaza mikulo na madzi; mumbapasa dziko yapansi umera. Imwe mumbachita tenepa: 
Psalms65:10 mumbavumbisa mvula pana minda yakutipulwa mbamuitotesa na madzi; mumbafewesa mataka na mafazi mbamuchitisa mbewu zing'ono-zing'ono kukula. 
Psalms65:11 Udidi wanu umbatipasa pyakuvuna pizinji! Konsene kunaenda imwe kuna pizinji. 
Psalms65:12 Mpovu wamala dzala na pifuyo; m'khundu-khundu mwa mapiri munakukomerwa pyakwanga. 
Psalms65:13 Mbuto zakudyesera pifuyo yamala bisika na mabira; maphedi adzala na tirigu. Pyonsene pikukhuwa na kuimba mwakukomerwa. 
Psalms66:1 Kuzani Mulungu na mkhuwo wakukomerwa, imwe anthu monsene a padziko yapansi!" 
Psalms66:2 Imbirani demelero ya dzinache; mulemedzeni na kumkuza. 
Psalms66:3 Longani kuna Mulungu kuti, “Pinthu pimbachita imwe mphyakudodomesa pyakwanga! Mphamvu zanu nsikulu pyakwanga mwakuti anyamalwanu ambalamba na mantha pamaso panu." 
Psalms66:4 Onsene padziko yapansi ambakupembedzani; ambaimba nyimbo zakukukuzani nazo, ambaimba nyimbo zakukuza nazo dzinanu.”" 
Psalms66:5 Bwerani muone pyachita Mulungu; mabasache akudodomesa pakati pa anthu. 
Psalms66:6 Iye ambasanduza bara kukhala mtunda; makolo athu adawambuka mkulo na miyendo. Kweneko tidakomerwa pikulu thangwi ya pidachita iye. 
Psalms66:7 Iye ambatonga kwenda na kwenda na mphamvu zache, pontho maso ache ambaikha pana madzinza; nkhabe tawirisa kuti anyakupandukira ampandukire tayu." 
Psalms66:8 Mkuzeni Mulungu wathu, imwe madzinza onsene; kukuza kwanu kuveke." 
Psalms66:9 Iye atikoya na moyo, pontho hadatawirise kuti ife titherezike tayu." 
Psalms66:10 Mulungu, imwe mwatiyesa; mwatichenesa ninga mumbacheneserwa siliva na moto mule." 
Psalms66:11 Imwe mudatileka kuti tikweshwe mumsampha, pontho mudatithukulisa mitolo yakulemera kumsana kwathu." 
Psalms66:12 Mudatawirisa anyamalwathu kutipondedza; ife tidagwanda na pamoto na m'madzi akukuka, mbwenye imwe mudatidzesa kumbuto yakupata." 
Psalms66:13 Ndinati ndidze na nsembe zakupyerera ku Nyumba yanu; ndinachita kuna imwe pinthu pidadumbira ine pile. 
Psalms66:14 Ndinati ndikupaseni pinthu pidadumbira ine kuti ndinakupasani pikhali ine panyatwa. 
Psalms66:15 Ndinapereka bira kuti aotchiwe paguwa yansembe; ndinapereka nsembe ya ng'ombe zimuna na mbuzi, tenepo utsi wache unakwira kwenda kudzulu." 
Psalms66:16 Bwererani muve, monsenene anyakugopa Mulungu, tenepo ndinati ndikupangeni pyandichitira iye." 
Psalms66:17 Ndidamulirira kuti andiphedze; ndidamkuza na nyimbo. 
Psalms66:18 Mbandidabisa pyakudawa mumtima mwangamu, Mbuya nee mbadandivabi." 
Psalms66:19 Mbwenye Mulungu andivadi; iye ava kupempha kwanga. 
Psalms66:20 Mbakuzwe Mulungu, thangwi iye hadakhonde kupemphera kwanga tayu, penu kubweza kundifuna kwache kokhonda mala kule." 
Psalms67:1 Mulungu tiverenimbo nsisi ife mbamutitsanzayise; tiyang'aneni mwakutikomera mtima," 
Psalms67:2 towera manyerezero anu adziwike padziko yonsene yapansi; towera madzinza onsene adziwe chipulumuso chanu. 
Psalms67:3 Anthu mbakukuzeni imwe, Mulungu; anthu onsene mbakukuzeni!" 
Psalms67:4 Madzinza onsene mbasekere na kuimba nyimbo thangwi ya kukomerwa, thangwi mumbatonga mseru anthu na chilungamo mbaatsogolera madzinza onsene padziko yapansi." 
Psalms67:5 Anthu mbakukuzeni imwe, Mulungu: anthu onsene mbakukuzeni!" 
Psalms67:6 Dziko yabulusa pyakuvuna pyache; Mulungu, Mulungu wathu, atitsanzayisa." 
Psalms67:7 Mulungu atitsanzayisa; anthu onsene kumadolomero a dziko yapansi mbamulemedze. 
Psalms68:1 Mulungu ambalamuka mbabalalisa anyamalwache. Anyakumzonda adathawa thangwi ya kukundwa. 
Psalms68:2 Iye ambaathamangisa ninga mumbachitira utsi kumbuluka na mphepo; ninga mumbanyungulukira upula pamoto, anthu akuipambo ambavungika chibodzi-bodzi pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Psalms68:3 Mbwenye anyakulungama akusekera na kukomerwa pamaso pache; iwo akusekera na kukhuwa thangwi ya kukomerwa. 
Psalms68:4 Muimbire Mulungu, muimbireni nyimbo zakukuza dzinache; msasanyireni njira, nyakukwira pamakole. Dzinache ndi MBUYA, komerwani pamaso pache!" 
Psalms68:5 Mulungu, ambakhala m'Nyumbache yakuchena ule, ambayang'anira ana akusowa babawo na mawo, pontho ambatchinjiriza amamfelwa." 
Psalms68:6 Iye ambapereka banja kuna anyakuisowa; iye ambatsogolera anyaperezo kumbuto yaufulu, mbwenye anyakupandukira anakhala kumbuto yakusowa madzi." 
Psalms68:7 Mulungu, ndzidzi udatsogolera imwe anthu anu, pikhafamba imwe pamulikiti kugwanda na m'thando yatchetcha," 
Psalms68:8 dziko yapansi idatekenyeka, pontho thambo idakhuthulira pansi mvula, thangwi ya kudza kwa Mulungu wa phiri ya Sinai, kudza kwa Mulungu wa Israele." 
Psalms68:9 Imwe mudachitisa kuti mvula izinji ivumbe; dziko yanu yakuguga mudachitisa kukhala pontho yakubalisa pinthu; 
Psalms68:10 anthu anu adasasanya mbuto zawo zakukhala kweneko; na udidi wanu imwe mudapereka kuna atcherengi pyakusowa pyawo. 
Psalms68:11 Mbuya adapereka utongi, tenepo akazi azinji adathukula mphangwazo mbati," 
Psalms68:12 “Mafumu na anyankhondo awo akuthawa!” Akazi kumusa adagawana pidapokosera iwo pankhondo: 
Psalms68:13 maphaphido a jiwa akukukutizwa na siliva na manthengache akukukutizwa na golidi chadi-chadi, ndzidzi ukhagona imwe m'mathanga." 
Psalms68:14 Pidabalalisa Nyamphamvu zonsene mafumu paphiri ya Zalimoni, iye adavumbisapo matalala." 
Psalms68:15 Bashani ndi phiri yamphamvu pyakwanga, phiri yakukhala na pimapiri pizinji pyakusongoka padzulu pachepo." 
Psalms68:16 Watani iwe, phiri yakukhala na pimapiri pizinji pyakusongoka, unayang'ana mwakuipirwa phiri idasankhula Mulungu kuti iye akhalepo ile? MBUYA anati akhalepo kwenda na kwenda." 
Psalms68:17 Na pingolo pyache pyankhondo pikwi-pikwi Mbuya ambadza kumbuto yache yakuchena kubulukira kuphiri ya Sinai. 
Psalms68:18 Iye adakwira padzululetu, mbakwata anyaperezo azinji kwenda nawo pabodzi pamulikiti; iye ambatambira mitukwa kubulukira kuna anthu podi na kuna anyakupandukirana ene. MBUYA Mulungu anakhala kweneko." 
Psalms68:19 Mbakuzwe Mbuya, thangwi ya kutithukulira nyatwa zathu nsiku na nsiku; iye ndi Mulungu, Nyankhombo wathu." 
Psalms68:20 Mulungu wathu ndi Mulungu wakupulumusa; iye ndi MBUYA wakutipulumusa kuimfa ule. 
Psalms68:21 Mulungu anati aswedi misolo ya anyamalwache, anyakudawa, ale ambatumbama na tsisi yawo yakulapha." 
Psalms68:22 Mbuya akulonga kuti, “Ndinati ndibwere nawo pontho anyamalwanu kubulukira ku Bashani; ndinati ndidze nawo pontho kubulukira kubara yakuzwika," 
Psalms68:23 towera dzinyalo yako aivike m'chiropa chawo, pontho kuti anambwako anyangutembo munafunira iwo.”" 
Psalms68:24 Mulungu, anthu onsene aona kufamba kwanu kuonesa kukunda, iwo aona mulikiti wa Mulungu, mfumu wanga, kupita m'mbuto yache yakuchena." 
Psalms68:25 Anyakuimba na mulomo ali patsogolo, anyakuimba na pyakuimbira ali m'nduli; pakati pachepo pana atsikana akuimba pisekese." 
Psalms68:26 “Mkuzeni Mulungu pamgumano wa anthu ache; mkuzeni MBUYA imwe pidzukulu pyonsene pya Yakobo!” 
Psalms68:27 Atome kudza ndi Benjemani, dzinza ing'onoletu; kubuluka penepo akadamu a Yuda na gulu yawo; kubuluka enewo abwere mbakadamu a Zebuloni na Nafitali." 
Psalms68:28 Onesani mphamvu zanu, Mulungu; mphamvu zaphatisa imwe basa m'mbuto mwathu" 
Psalms68:29 kubulukira m'Nyumbanu mu Yerusalemu, kule kumbadza mafumu na mitukwawo kukupasani." 
Psalms68:30 Mulongereni Iguputo, nyama yam'tsanga yakukhala m'miteteyi; alongereni madzinza, mkumbi wa mvuu zimuna na anawo ene ale, kufikirana iwo onsene alambe na kupereka silivawo. Abalaliseni madzinza ambafuna kuchita nkhondo ndzidzi onsene ale." 
Psalms68:31 Aimiriri a dziko anabwera kubulukira ku Iguputo; Anthu a ku Kushi anakwiza manjawo kupemphera kuna Mulungu. 
Psalms68:32 Muimbireni nyimbo Mulungu, imwe maufumu a dziko yapansi; imbani nyimbo zakukuza nazo Mbuya," 
Psalms68:33 kuna ule ambakwira kuthambo, thambo yakale na kale, ule ambalonga na kudima kukulu." 
Psalms68:34 Lalikani mphamvu za Mulungu; ukulu wache uli pana Israele, mphamvu zache zili kuthambo." 
Psalms68:35 Imwe Mulungu ndimwe wakugopeka m'mbuto yanu yakuchena. Mulungu wa Israele ambapasa anthu ache mphamvu mbaawangisa mtima. Mbakuzwe Mulungu. 
Psalms69:1 Ndipulumuseni, Mulungu, thangwi madzi afika m'khosi mwanga;" 
Psalms69:2 ndikulilima m'matope akuzwika wakusowa panango pakuponda. Ndabira m'madzi akuzwika, pontho madzi makulu andibiza." 
Psalms69:3 Ndatopa na kulira kwanga kuti mundiphedze, pontho kukhosi kwanga kwaumiratu kakata. M'maso mwanga muli bii kudikhira imwe Mulungu wanga." 
Psalms69:4 Anyakundizonda okhonda thangwi ngazinji ene kupiringana tsisi ya mumsolo mwanga. Anyamalwa akundilongera pyakunama; iwo ngamphamvu, pontho anafuna kundipha. Iwo adandichitisa kubwezera pinthu pyakuti nee ndidaba tayu." 
Psalms69:5 Pyakudawa pyanga, Mulungu, nee mphyakubisika pamaso panu nkhabe; imwe mukudziwa kupupwa kwanga konsene." 
Psalms69:6 Lekani tawirisa kuti ndichitise manyadzo anyakunyindirani, Mbuya, MBUYA Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene! Lekani kunditawirisa kuti ndichitise manyadzo anyakupembedzani, Mulungu wa Israele!" 
Psalms69:7 Ine ndatikanwa thangwi ya kutumikira imwepo mwakuti pano ndina manyadzo pyakwanga. 
Psalms69:8 Ndakhala ninga mlendo kuna abale anga, ninga mlendo kuna banjanga." 
Psalms69:9 Phinganga pana Nyumbanu ikugaka ninga moto muna ine; kutikanwa kumbatikanwa imwe kumbagwera ine pano. 
Psalms69:10 Ndimbapichepesa ndekha ene pakupimana kudya, pontho anthu ambanditikana;" 
Psalms69:11 ndimbavala masakha kulira, kwache iwo ambandiseka." 
Psalms69:12 Iwo ambandilonga angafamba na njirazi, pontho anyakuledzera ambapeka nyimbo zakulonga pya ine." 
Psalms69:13 Kulonga pya ine, ndinapemphera kuna imwe, MBUYA; nditawireni, Mulungu, pandzidzi unasankhula imwe. Nditawireni thangwi ya kundifuna kwanu kokhonda mala, thangwi imwe mudadumbira kundipulumusa." 
Psalms69:14 Ndipulumuseni gopesera ndinalilima m'matope; ndipulumuseni kuna anyamalwanga, ndipulumuseni kuna madzi akuzwika." 
Psalms69:15 Lekani tawirisa madzi makulu kudza pana ine; lekani tawirisa kuti ndibire kwakuzwika, penu kulilima m'masiye." 
Psalms69:16 Nditawireni MBUYA, thangwi ya udidi wanu na kundifuna kwanu kokhonda mala; na kuva kwanu nyambaloku, zungunukirani kuna ine!" 
Psalms69:17 Lekani kupibisa mwekha ene kuna nyabasanu; ndili panyatwa zikulu, chimbizani kunditawira!" 
Psalms69:18 Bwerani kuna ine mbamundiombole; ndipulumuseni m'manja mwa anyamalwanga. 
Psalms69:19 Imwe mukupidziwa kutikanwa kunachitwa ine, kuchitiswa manyadzo na kululupiswa kunachitwa ine; imwe mukuona anyamalwanga onsene." 
Psalms69:20 Kutikanwaku kukundipha mtima, pontho ndataya mtima. Ndikhadikhira kuti unango anandiverambo nsisi, mbwenye nkhabe na mbodzi ene wakundithondoza tayu." 
Psalms69:21 Pikhali ine na njala, iwo adandipasa kudya kwakupha; pikhali ine na nyota, iwo adandipasa vinyu wakushasha." 
Psalms69:22 Maphwando awo avungike nawo; maphwando awo akupambulikawo mbagwe nawo. 
Psalms69:23 Achitiseni kukhala maboli-boli! Achitiseni misanawo kukotama kwenda na kwenda! 
Psalms69:24 Akhuthulireni kuzhangali kwanu, pontho moto wa ukali wanu uagwere." 
Psalms69:25 Misasa inakhala iwo mbaisanduke madembe; paleke sala munthu na mbodzi ene wamoyo m'makumbi mwawo tayu. 
Psalms69:26 Iwo ambaboneresa anthu adatchunyusa imwe ale; iwo ambalonga pya nyatwa za anthu adakuwaza imwe ale. 
Psalms69:27 Ikhani konta pyakudawa pyawo m'mabukhu mwanu; lekani tawirisa kuti iwo akwatepo khundu muchipulumuso chanu. 
Psalms69:28 Mbafudziwe madzinawo m'bukhu ya moyo; aleke lembwave pabodzi na anthu akulungama. 
Psalms69:29 Mbwenye ine ndikuva kupha, pontho ndikusanyika; nditchinjirizeni, Mulungu, pontho ndipulumuseni!" 
Psalms69:30 Ndinati ndikuze Mulungu na nyimbo; ndinati ndilalike ukulu wache pakupereka takhuta kuna iye. 
Psalms69:31 Penepo pinamkomera MBUYA pyakwanga kupiringana kupereka ng'ombe kuna iye, kupiringana kupereka nsembe ya ng'ombe na njondo zache zene." 
Psalms69:32 Anyakusanyiswa angaona penepi anasekera; anyakusaka-saka Mulungu anawangiswa mtima. 
Psalms69:33 MBUYA ambaava anyakusowa pinthu, pontho iye nkhabe duwalira anthu ache m'perezo tayu." 
Psalms69:34 Kuzani Mulungu, imwe kudzulu na dziko yapansi, bara na pyonsene pyakulengwa pili mwenemo." 
Psalms69:35 Iye anapulumusa Yerusalemu na kumanga pontho maluwani a Yuda. Anthu ache anakhala kweneko mbatambira dziko kukhala yawo; 
Psalms69:36 pidzukulu pya anyabasache ndiye pinatambira dzikoyo, pontho ale ambamfuna anakhala kweneko." 
Psalms70:1 Mulungu, ndipulumuseni! MBUYA ndiphedzeni chinchino pano!" 
Psalms70:2 Anyakuyesa-yesa kufuna pyakundipha mbakundwe, pontho mbazunguzike monsene mwene. Anyakukomerwa thangwi ya kuona kwanga nyatwa, mbabwerere m'nduli, pontho mbachite manyadzo." 
Psalms70:3 Anthu ambalonga kuna ine mbati, “Hedewu, hedewu!” Mbanyale pontho mbalulupiswe." 
Psalms70:4 Onsene anyakudza kuna imwe mbasekere na kukomerwa. Onsene anyakupereka takhuta kuna imwe thangwi ya kuapulumusa kwanu, ndzidzi onsene mbalonge mbati, “Mulungu ngwamkulu pyakwanga!”" 
Psalms70:5 Ine nkhabe mphamvu, pontho ndine nyakutcherenga; chimbizani kudza kuna ine, Mulungu. Imwe ndimwe nyankhombo wanga; MBUYA, chimbizani dzandiphedza!" 
Psalms71:1 Muna imwe MBUYA ndimbabisalamo; lekani tawirisa na pang'ono pene kuti ndichitiswe manyadzo! 
Psalms71:2 Na thangwi yakuti imwe ndimwe wakulungama ndiphedzeni, pontho mundipulumuse; ndivenimbo ine na kundipulumusa!" 
Psalms71:3 Khalani phanzwi yanga kuti ndithawirepo, pontho mpanda wakunditchinjiriza; imwe ndimwe pakubisala panga, pontho mpandanga wamphamvu." 
Psalms71:4 Mulungu wanga, ndipulumuseni m'manja mwa anyakudawika, m'manja mwa anthu akukala mtima, pontho akuipa." 
Psalms71:5 MBUYA Mulungu, ine ndimbaikha chidikhiro changa pana imwe; ine ndakunyindirani kutomera uwananga." 
Psalms71:6 Moyo wanga onsene ndanyindira imwe; mwanditchinjiriza kutomera nsiku idabalwa ine. Ndzidzi onsene ndinakuza Mulungu. 
Psalms71:7 Moyo wanga ndi upangizi kuna anthu azinji, thangwi imwe ndimwe mpandanga." 
Psalms71:8 Nsiku yonsene yamumphu ndimbakuza imwe, pontho ndimbalalika pya demelero yanu." 
Psalms71:9 Lekani kundikhonda lero kuti ndakalamba; lekani kundisiya ndekha thangwi mphamvu zanga zamala. 
Psalms71:10 Anyamalwanga anafuna kundipha; iwo ambalonga na kuverana pyakuipa kuchitira ine. 
Psalms71:11 Iwo ambalonga kuti, “Mulungu amsiya yekha; tendeni timthamangise kuti timphate; nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene wakumpulumusa tayu.”" 
Psalms71:12 Lekani khala kutali na ine, Mulungu; Mulungu wanga, chimbizani kuti mundiphedze!" 
Psalms71:13 Anyakundisosa mbakundwe, pontho avungwe. Anyakufuna pyakundikuwaza mbachite manyadzo, pontho alulupiswe." 
Psalms71:14 Ndzidzi onsene ine ndinaikha chidikhiro changa pana imwe; ndinathimiza kukukuzani pikulu pene. 
Psalms71:15 Mulomo wanga unati ulonge pya kulungama kwanu, pontho chipulumuso chanu nsiku yamumphu, podi kwene kuti ntchikulu kupiringana kuvesa kwanga." 
Psalms71:16 Ndinakuza mphamvu zanu imwe MBUYA Mulungu; ndinati ndilalike udidi wanu ene basi. 
Psalms71:17 Imwe, Mulungu, mwandifunzisa kutomera uwananga, pontho ndikuthimiza basi kulonga pya mabasanu akudodomesa." 
Psalms71:18 Lero podi ndakalamba, pontho mumsolo mwanga muna imvi, lekani kundisiya ndekha, Mulungu! Khalani na ine pabodzi pinalalika ine pya mphamvu zanu zikuluzi kuna mifendu yonsene inadzayo." 
Psalms71:19 Kulungama kwanu, Mulungu, kwafika kudzulu. Imwe mwaphata basa ikulu; nkhabeve unango ninga imwe." 
Psalms71:20 Imwe mwatumiza kubonera na nyatwa zikulu pana ine, mbwenye imwe munabwezera moyo wanga kubulukira pansi pa mataka akuzwika; imwe munandilamusa kundibwezako." 
Psalms71:21 Munandichitisa kukhala wamkulu kupiringana kale; munandithondoza pontho. 
Psalms71:22 Ndinati ndikukuzeni na nyakatangale; ndinakuza kukhulupirika kwanu, Mulungu wanga. Na nyakatangaleyo ndinakuimbirani nyimbo, imwe Nyakuchena wa Israele." 
Psalms71:23 Ndinakhuwa thangwi ya kukomerwa pinakuimbirani ine; na moyo wanga onsene ndinati ndiimbe thangwi mwandiombola. 
Psalms71:24 Nsiku yamumphu ndinalonga pya kulungama kwanu, thangwi anyakufuna kundikuwaza akundwa, pontho achitiswa manyadzo." 
Psalms72:1 Mulungu, mfunziseni mfumu kutonga mseru mwakulungama; gawanani naye chilungamo chanu," 
Psalms72:2 towera atonge anthu anu mwachilungamo, pontho na kutonga anyakusanyiswa mwakulungama." 
Psalms72:3 Pinthu pya dziko mbapifambe mwadidi; mbipione chilungamo pakati pawo. 
Psalms72:4 Mfumu mbaatonge atcherengi mwakuakomera; mbaphedze anyakusowa pinthu, pontho mbakunde anyakuapondereza." 
Psalms72:5 Anthu anu ambakupembedzani ndzidzi onsene ninga mumbakhalira dzuwa na mwezi kumwinikira kuna mifendu na mifendu. 
Psalms72:6 Mfumu mbakhale ninga mvula kuminda, ninga mafazi akugwera padziko." 
Psalms72:7 Ndzidzi unakhala iye na moyowu chilungamo mbichikhale konsene kwene, pontho kuafambira mwadidi kwa pinthu kukhala ninga mumbachitira mwezi kupereka cheza ndzidzi onsene." 
Psalms72:8 Ufumu wache unafika kutomera bara mpakana kubara, kubulukira kumkulo wa Yufurate mpakana kumadolomero a dziko." 
Psalms72:9 Madzinza a m'thando yatchetcha analamba pamaso pache; anyamalwache anabwira fumbi. 
Psalms72:10 Mafumu a ku Tarisisi na a pantchuwa anapereka mitukwa kuna iye; mafumu a ku Sheba na Seba anabwera na pyakupereka pyawo kuna iye. 
Psalms72:11 Mafumu onsene analamba pamaso pache; madzinza onsene anamtumikira. 
Psalms72:12 Iye ambapulumusa anyakutcherenga anamchemerawo, pontho na anyakusanyiswa akusowa anyakuaphedza." 
Psalms72:13 Iye ambava nsisi na anyakusowa mphamvu na atcherengi; iye ambapulumusa moyo wa anyakusowa kuti aleke kufa. 
Psalms72:14 Iye ambaapulumusa kuna kuponderezwa na upandu; chiropa chawo ntchakufunika pyakwanga kuna iye. 
Psalms72:15 Dondowe Mfumu! Iye mbapaswe golidi wa kudziko ya Sheba; mbapemphererwe ndzidzi onsene; mtsanzayiso wa Mulungu mbukhale pana iye ndzidzi onsene. 
Psalms72:16 M'dziko monsene mbamukhale mapira; mapiri onsene mbadzale na mbewu, zakubala pyakwanga, ninga za ku Lebanoni. Mizinda mbidzale na anthu ninga minda yakudzala na maudzu." 
Psalms72:17 Dzina ya mfumu mbileke duwalikave; kuveka kwache mbakukhale kwenda na kwenda ninga mumbakhalira dzuwa. Madzinza onsene mbamkuze, mbapemphe Mulungu kuti aatsanzayise ninga mwatsanzayisira iye mfumu." 
Psalms72:18 Mkuzeni MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele! Iye ene basi ambachita pinthu pyakudodomesapi. 
Psalms72:19 Kuzani dzinache yademeleroyo kwenda na kwenda! Demelero yache mbidzale dziko yonsene yapansi. Ameni! Ameni! 
Psalms72:20 Kweneku nkhumala kwa kupemphera kwa Davite, mwana wa Yese." 
Psalms73:1 Ndimomwene Mulungu ngwadidi kuna anthu a ku Israele, kuna ale ana mtima wakuchena." 
Psalms73:2 Mbwenye kulonga pya ine manyalo anga akhali chifupi kutherezika; ndikhali chifupi kulimbuka," 
Psalms73:3 thangwi ine ndikhachita bivu na anthu akudungudza, pidaona ine kuti anthu akudawika pinthu pyawo pikuafambira mwadidi." 
Psalms73:4 Iwo nkhabe ona nyatwa; iwo ngamphamvu pontho ngakuwanga. 
Psalms73:5 Iwo nkhabe ona nyatwa ninga mumbachitira anthu anango; iwo nkhabe sanyika ninga mumbasanyikira anango tayu. 
Psalms73:6 Natenepo kudungudza kwawo kwakhala ninga mkufu, pontho kuzunguza kwawo ninga mkhanjo;" 
Psalms73:7 mumtima mwawo mumbabuluka pyakuipa, pontho manyerezero awo ambakhala kaliki-liki kusasanya pyakudawika." 
Psalms73:8 Iwo ambaseka anthu anango mbaalongera pinthu pyakuipa; iwo ngakudungudza, pontho ambasasanya njira zakupondereza nazo anango." 
Psalms73:9 Iwo ambalonga pyakuipa kuna Mulungu wa kudzulu, pontho ngakutapira m'kanwa konsene kunaenda iwo padziko yonsene yapansi," 
Psalms73:10 towera anthu ene a Mulungu azungunukire kuna iwo, mbakhuta na mafala onsene analonga iwo." 
Psalms73:11 Iwo ambalonga kuti, “Mulungu nkhabe dzapidziwa tayu; Nyakudzulu-dzuluyo nkhabe udziwisi tayu.”" 
Psalms73:12 Mwenemo ndiye mumbakhalira anyakudawika. Ndzidzi onsene yawo ndi tsenzo pontho kupifumisa okha ene. 
Psalms73:13 Kadi ntchinthu chakusowa basa kuti ine ndapikoya ndekha ene wangwiro, okhonda chita chinthu chakudawika?" 
Psalms73:14 Mulungu mwandichitisa kusanyika nsiku yamumphuyi; machibese onsene mwanditchunyusa. 
Psalms73:15 Mbandidalonga pinthu ninga penepi, mbandidakhala nyakunama kuna anthu anu." 
Psalms73:16 Ndidayesa-yesa kuti ndivese penepi, mbwenye kuna ine chikhali chinthu chakunensa pyakwanga" 
Psalms73:17 kufikirana ndidenda kumbuto yanu yakuchena. Penepo ndidavesesa pile pinafuna dzachitikira anyakudawika. 
Psalms73:18 Imwe munaaikha pambuto yamitherezi pyakwanga mbamuachitisa kugwera kumbuto yakuvungika! 
Psalms73:19 Iwo anavungwa kabodzi kene; iwo anamaliratu na pyakugoswa. 
Psalms73:20 Iwo akhala ninga ndoto, zile zimbabalalika kunja kungaecha; imwe mungalamuka mwekha ene, Mbuya, iwo hambaonekavebi." 
Psalms73:21 Pikhandipha mtimanga na kusanyika m'moyo mwanga," 
Psalms73:22 ndidapupwiratu ninga nyama; ine sidakuvesesani tayu. 
Psalms73:23 Kwache ndzidzi onsene ndimbakhala chifupi na imwe, tenepo imwe mumbandiphata pamkono." 
Psalms73:24 Imwe mumbanditsogolera na uphungu wanu, tenepo pakumalisira pache munanditambira na chilemedzo." 
Psalms73:25 China ine m'dzulumo ninji pontho? Nkhabe, mbwenye imwe ene. Podi ine ndina imwe, chinafuna ine ninji pontho padziko yapansi?" 
Psalms73:26 Manyerezero anga na manungo anga anakwanisa kusowa mphamvu, mbwenye Mulungu ndiye mphamvu zanga; iye ndi pyonsene pyakusowa pyanga." 
Psalms73:27 Anyakukhala kutali na imwe, anati avungike; imwe munavunga anyakukhonda khulupirika kuna imwe ale." 
Psalms73:28 Mbwenye kulonga pya ine mphyadididi kwene kukhala chifupi na Mulungu, kuti ndibisale muna MBUYA Mulungu, pontho kulalika pyonsene pyachita iye." 
Psalms74:1 Mwatikhonderanji tenepa, Mulungu? Ayi imwe munazhangalira anthu anu kwenda na kwenda?" 
Psalms74:2 Kumbukani anthu adasankhula imwe kale ene kukhala anu ene; ale adaombola imwe pa ubitchu kuti akhale dzinza yanu ene. Kumbukani phiri ya Zioni kudakhala imwe pakutoma kule. 
Psalms74:3 Famba-fambani pamadembewa; anyamalwathu amala sakaza pyonsene m'mbuto yanu yakuchena. 
Psalms74:4 Anyamalwanu akhuwa pikulu kumbuto ikhagumanikirana imwe na ife; iwo amanika mabanderawo kweneko kuonesa kukunda. 
Psalms74:5 Iwo akhaoneka ninga anyakusaka nkhuni akutema miti na mbadzo zawo. 
Psalms74:6 Iwo adapandula-pandula pyakusema-sema pyonsene na mbadzo zawo pontho nyundo. 
Psalms74:7 Iwo adavunga mbuto yanu yakuchena mbaipisa; iwo adaswipisa mbuto ikhapembedzwa imwe ile. 
Psalms74:8 Iwo akhafuna ativunge tonsene kuti tonsene timaliretu; mbuto yonsene yakupembedzera Mulungu monsene adaipisa. 
Psalms74:9 Pidzindikiro pyanu pyakudodomesa pyonsene pyaenda; nkhabe mprofeti na mbodzi ene asala tayu, pontho nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene akudziwa kuti penepi pinamala lini tayu." 
Psalms74:10 Mulungu, anyamalwathu analeka lini kutiseka? Ayi anatikana dzinanu kwenda na kwenda?" 
Psalms74:11 Mwatani mwakhonda kutiphedza? Mwatani munabalira manja kunduli? 
Psalms74:12 Mbwenye imwe, Mulungu, ndimwe mfumu wathu kubulukira pakutomaletu; kazinji kene imwe mwatipulumusa." 
Psalms74:13 Na mphamvu zanu zonsene mudagawa bara mbamuswa misolo ya anyangume; 
Psalms74:14 mudapondedza msolo wa nyangume Leviatani mbamupereka manungo ache kuna nyama za m'thando yatchetcha kuti aadye. 
Psalms74:15 Imwe mudasasanya mphuno za madzi na mikulo ene; mudapwesa mikulo yokhonda kupwa. 
Psalms74:16 Mudalenga mosiku na masikati; mudaikha dzuwa na mwezi mbuto zawo; 
Psalms74:17 mudaikha madolomero a dziko yapansi; mudasasanya mainja na malimwe. 
Psalms74:18 Kwache kumbukani, MBUYA, kuti anyamalwanu akukusekani; anthu akupupwa alulupisa dzinanu." 
Psalms74:19 Lekani siya anthu anu akusowa chiphedzo m'manja mwa anyamalwawo akukala mtima; lekani duwalira anthu anu ambabonera ale! 
Psalms74:20 Kumbukani chiverano chidachita imwe na ife. Mbuto zonsene zamdima zadzala na upandu. 
Psalms74:21 Lekani tawirisa kuti anyakuponderezwa achitiswe manyadzo; lekani anyakutcherenga na anyakusowa kuti akukuzeni. 
Psalms74:22 Lamukani mwekha ene Mulungu kuti mutchinjirize mseru wanu! Kumbukani kuti mapupwe ambakusekani nsiku yamumphu. 
Psalms74:23 Lekani duwalira kukhuwa kwakuzhangali kwa anyamalwanu, kusokosa kukulu kwa anyakukuzondani." 
Psalms75:1 Timbapereka takhuta kuna imwe, Mulungu, timbapereka takhuta kuna imwe! Timbalalika pya ukulu wanu, pontho kulonga pya pinthu pyakudodomesa pyachita imwe." 
Psalms75:2 Mulungu akulonga kuti, “Ndaikha ndzidzi wakutonga miseru, pontho ndinatonga mwakulungama." 
Psalms75:3 Podi kwene kuti pinthu pyonsene pyamoyo pidalenga ine pitetemere, pontho dziko yapansi itekenyeke ine ndine wakuwangisa maziko ache." 
Psalms75:4 Ndimbaapanga anthu akuipa kuti aleke kutumbama; aleke famba na nthuku phaa! 
Psalms75:5 Ndimbaapanga kuti aleke kudungudza kunachita iwoko; aleke famba khosi gonesee!” 
Psalms75:6 Kutonga mseru nkhabe bulukira kumabulukiro penu kumadokero dzuwa, kumpoto, penu kumwera tayu." 
Psalms75:7 Mulungu ndiye ambatonga miseru, pontho ambachitisa anango kukonwa pamaso pache, anangombo mbaayesa okhonda dawa." 
Psalms75:8 MBUYA ambaphatira khomitcho m'manja mwache, yakudzala na vinyu wakuwawa wa kuzhangali kwache. Iye ambamkhuthulira pansi, tenepo anthu akudawika onsene ambamwa; iwo ambamwa mwakumalisikiratu." 
Psalms75:9 Mbwenye kulonga pya ine ine nkhabe dzaleka kulonga pya Mulungu wa Yakobo, penu kuimba nyimbo zakumkuza nazo." 
Psalms75:10 Iye anakhutcha mano anyakudawika, mbwenye mphamvu za anyakulungama zinathimizirika." 
Psalms76:1 Mulungu ngwakudziwika m'nthemba ya Yudea; dzinache njakulemedzwa m'dziko ya Israele. 
Psalms76:2 Iye ana Nyumba mumzinda wa Yerusalemu; iye ambakhala pa Phiri ya Zioni. 
Psalms76:3 Penepo iye adatchola matswimo a anyamalwa, pyakugedera matswimo pyawo na matalasadawo, ande, pida pyawo pyankhondo pyonsene." 
Psalms76:4 Mulungu, imwe ndimwe wakudemelera! Imwe ndimwe wakugopeka, ndzidzi umbabwerera imwe kubulukira kumapiri, kudakunda imwe anyakukuzondani kule." 
Psalms76:5 Anyankhondo awo akuwanga mtima atapatwa na pyonsene pikhali na iwo, tenepo chinchino akugonera mkono; mphamvu zawo na luso yawo, pyonsene pikhali pyakusowa basa." 
Psalms76:6 Mulungu wa Yakobo, pidaathuswa imwe, akavalo na anyakuafambisawo ene adafa." 
Psalms76:7 Mbwenye imwe mumbagopwa na anthu onsene. Imwe mungazhangali nkhabe na mbodzi ene anakwanisa kuimira pamaso panu tayu. 
Psalms76:8 Imwe mudachitisa kuti kutonga kwanu mseru kudziwike kubulukira kudzulu, tenepo dziko yapansi idachita mantha mbimatama," 
Psalms76:9 ndzidzi udalamuka imwe kutonga anthu mseru, kupulumusa anyakusanyika onsene padziko yapansi." 
Psalms76:10 Kuzhangalira kwanu anthu kumbakudzeserani chilemedzo; anyakupulumuka kuna ukali wanu anakupembedzani. 
Psalms76:11 Perekani kuna MBUYA Mulungu wanu pidadumbira imwe kuna iye pile; idzani kuna iye na mitukwa, imwe madzinza onsene achifupi. Mulungu ambachitisa kuti anthu amgope;" 
Psalms76:12 iye ambachepesa ana mafumu achimuna akudungudza, pontho ambathuswa mafumu akulu-akulu." 
Psalms77:1 Ndimbalira mwakukalala kuna Mulungu; ndimbakalala na kulira, tenepo iye ambandiva." 
Psalms77:2 Pandzidzi wa nyatwa ndimbapemphera kuna Mbuya; mosiku onsene ndimbakwiza manjanga m'dzulu kupemphera, kwache nkhabe kwanisa kugumana chithondozo tayu." 
Psalms77:3 Ndinganyerezera pya Mulungu, ndimbabulira mumtima; ndinganyerezera pyakwanga, ndimbataya mtima." 
Psalms77:4 Iye ambandikhalisa m'maso mosiku onsene; ndaswipa mtima pyakwanga mwakuti ine nkhabe kwanisa longa. 
Psalms77:5 Ndimbanyerezera pya nsiku zagwandazo, pontho ndimbakumbuka pyaka pyakale." 
Psalms77:6 Mosiku wamumphu ndimbanyerezera pikulu; ndimbanyerezera pyakwanga mbandipivunza ndekha ene kuti: 
Psalms77:7 “Ayi Mbuya ndzidzi onsene anandikhonda? Ayi iye hanakomerwave nafe pontho tayu? 
Psalms77:8 Ayi iye aleka kutifuna kokhonda mala? Ayi pinthu pidadumbira iye nkhabe dzapichitave tayu? 
Psalms77:9 Ayi Mulungu aduwalira kukhala wansisi? Ayi kuzhangali kwapita m'mbuto mwa kuva kwache nyambalo?” 
Psalms77:10 Tenepo ndidalonga kuti, “Chinthu chimbandipha maka ntchakuti, mkono wa Nyakudzulu-dzulu nkhabeve mphamvu tayu.”" 
Psalms77:11 Ndinakumbuka mabasanu akulu, MBUYA; ndinakumbuka pyakudodomesa pidachita imwe m'ndulimu." 
Psalms77:12 Ndinanyerezera pinthu pyonsene pyachita imwe; ndinanyerezera pyakwanga pya mabasanu onsene amphamvu. 
Psalms77:13 Pyonsene pimbachita imwe, Mulungu, mphyakuchena. Nkhabe mulungu wamkulu ninga Mulungu wathu tayu." 
Psalms77:14 Imwe ndimwe Mulungu wakuchita pyakudodomesa; imwe mudaonesa mphamvu zanu pakati pa madzinza. 
Psalms77:15 Na mphamvu zanu mudaombola anthu anu, pidzukulu pya Yakobo, pontho pya Yosefe pile." 
Psalms77:16 Ndzidzi udakuonani madzi, Mulungu, ndzidzi udakuonani madzi, madziwo adachita mantha; kuzwika kwa bara kudatetemera na mantha." 
Psalms77:17 Makole adavumbisa mvula; chiphaliwali chidalira kuthambo, pontho njazi idachetuma khundu zonsene." 
Psalms77:18 Kulira kwa chiphaliwali kudaveka m'chivumbulu, pontho kuchetuma kwa njazi kudaonesa cheza padziko yapansi; dziko yapansi idatetemera mbitekenyeka." 
Psalms77:19 Imwe mudagwanda na pamabimbi; mudawambuka nyanza yakuzwika, kwache mphondero yanu hudakwanise kuoneka tayu." 
Psalms77:20 Imwe mudatsogolera anthu anu ninga mumbachitira makabuswa kudzera muna Mose na Aroni. 
Psalms78:1 Veserani, anthu anga, chifunziso changa, pontho ikhani makutu kuna pinalonga inepi." 
Psalms78:2 Ine ndinati ndilonge m'misangani mbandilonga pinthu pyakubisika pidachitika m'ndulimu," 
Psalms78:3 pinthu pyava ife na kupidziwa, pinthu pidatipanga makolo athu." 
Psalms78:4 Ife nkhabe dzabisira anathu tayu; tinapanga mfendu unadzawo pya mphamvu za MBUYA na mabasache akulu, pontho na pinthu pyakudodomesa pyachita iye." 
Psalms78:5 Iye adapereka matongero kuna anthu a Israele, pontho matongero kuna pidzukulu pya Yakobo. Iye adapanga makolo athu kufunzisa anawo matongero ache," 
Psalms78:6 towera mfendu ikhafuna kudzayo idziwe matongerowo, pontho kuti iwo apangembo anawo." 
Psalms78:7 Na njira yeneyi iwo ananyindirambo Mulungu mbakhonda duwalira pinthu pyachita iye, mbwenye ndzidzi onsene kuvera matongero ache." 
Psalms78:8 Iwo nkhabe dzakhala ninga makolo awo tayu, anthu akupandukira, pontho okhonda vera, ale chinyindiro chawo pana Mulungu chikhali chakukhonda khazikika, pontho ale adachimwana kukhala akukhulupirika kuna iye." 
Psalms78:9 Anthu a dzinza ya Eferemu adamenya nkhondo na mauta, pontho matswimo, tenepo adathawa pansiku idamenywa nkhondo." 
Psalms78:10 Iwo hadakoye chiverano chawo na Mulungu tayu; iwo adakhonda kuvera mwambo wache. 
Psalms78:11 Iwo adaduwalira pikhadachita iye, pyakudodomesa pikhadamuona iwo akuchita." 
Psalms78:12 Ndzidzi ukhachita Mulungu pyakudodomesa m'nthemba ya Zoani m'dziko ya Iguputo, makolo awo akhayang'ana." 
Psalms78:13 Iye adagawa nyanza mbaawambusa napo; iye adachitisa madzi kuimira ninga mafufu. 
Psalms78:14 Na masikati iye adaatsogolera na makole, pontho mosiku wamumphu iye adaatsogolera na cheza cha moto." 
Psalms78:15 Iye adadidimula miyala m'thando yatchetcha mbaapasa madzi kubulukira pansi pakuzwika. 
Psalms78:16 Iye adachitisa mikhwawa kubulukira m'mwala mbachitisa madzi kukuka ninga mikulo. 
Psalms78:17 Mbwenye iwo adathimiza kudawira Mulungu, pontho m'thando yatchetcha iwo adapandukira Nyakudzulu-dzulu." 
Psalms78:18 Iwo adayesa Mulungu chadala pakupempha pyakudya pikhafuna iwo. 
Psalms78:19 Iwo adalonga mwakupokanyisana na Mulungu mbati, “Kadi Mulungu anakwanisa kupereka kudya m'thando yatchetcha?" 
Psalms78:20 Mphyakuona kuti iye adamenya pamwala, madzi mbabuluka m'mwalamo na kukuka. Kadi iye anakwanisa pontho kutipasa mikate mbaapasa pontho anthu ache nyama?”" 
Psalms78:21 Natenepo pidapiva MBUYA, adazhangali napyo; iye adapisa anthu na moto, pontho ukali wache pana iwo udakula," 
Psalms78:22 thangwi iwo hadakhulupire Mulungu tayu, pontho iwo hadakhulupire tayu kuti iye anaapulumusa." 
Psalms78:23 Mbwenye iye adalonga kuna thambo ya m'dzulu mbatonga kuti misuwo yache ifunguke; 
Psalms78:24 iye adaapasa mana kuti adye; phoso yakubulukira kudzulu ile. 
Psalms78:25 Tenepo iwo adadya kudya kwa angelo, pontho Mulungu adaapasa pyonsene pikhafuna iwo." 
Psalms78:26 Iye adachitisa pontho mphepo yambalu kudza, pontho na mphamvu zache iye adavundula mphepo yamwera," 
Psalms78:27 pontho kuna anthu ache iye adagwisa nyama ninga fumbi, mbalame zakuinjipa ninga tchetcha pagombe;" 
Psalms78:28 izo zidagwa pakati pa msasa kuzungulira makumbi. 
Psalms78:29 Tenepo anthu adadya mbakhuta; Mulungu adaapasa pikhafuna iwo," 
Psalms78:30 kwache usawo mbudzati mala, podi kwene kuti nyama zikhali m'kanwa mwawo," 
Psalms78:31 Mulungu adaazhangalira mbapha anthu awo amphamvu, aphale akufunika a Israele." 
Psalms78:32 Iwo adathimiza kudawa pyawo, nee kuona penepi tayu; iwo hadanyindire tayu na kuona pyakudodomesa penepi." 
Psalms78:33 Natenepo iye adamalisa nsiku zawo ninga kuimira kwa kupuma, pontho miyoyo yawo na pyakugoswa." 
Psalms78:34 Ndzidzi onsene ukhapha iye anango a iwo, anango akusalawo akhazungunukira kuna iye; iwo akhatchunyuka mbapemphera na mtima onsene." 
Psalms78:35 Iwo adakumbuka kuti Mulungu akhali Phanzwi yawo, kuti Mulungu Wakudzulu-dzulu akhali Dombo wawo." 
Psalms78:36 Mbwenye pyonsene pikhalonga iwo pikhali pyakutapira; nee chibodzi chidalonga iwo chikhali chakuona tayu. 
Psalms78:37 Mitimawo hikhali yakuona tayu kuna iye; iwo hakhali akukhulupirika tayu kuna chiverano chawo na iye. 
Psalms78:38 Mbwenye Mulungu akhava nsisi na anthu ache. Iye adalekerera pyakudawa pyawo; kazinji kene iye akhauphata mtimache mbakhonda kunyanyula ukali wache onsene. 
Psalms78:39 Iye adakumbuka kuti iwo akhali anthu ambafa ale, ninga mphepo, ile imbadza mbimala." 
Psalms78:40 Kazinji kene iwo adampandukira m'thando yatchetcha; kazinji kene iwo adamtsukwalisa m'thando mule! 
Psalms78:41 Ndzidzi uzinji iwo adamuyesa Mulungu mbavesa kupha Mulungu Wakuchena wa Israele. 
Psalms78:42 Iwo adaduwalira mphamvu zache zikulu, pontho nsiku idaaombola iye m'manja mwa anyamalwawo" 
Psalms78:43 mbachita mabasache amphamvu na pyakudodomesa paphedi ya Zoani m'dziko ya Iguputo. 
Psalms78:44 Iye adasanduza mikulo kukhala chiropa, tenepo anthu a ku Iguputo adasowa madzi akumwa." 
Psalms78:45 Iye adatumiza ntchentche zizinji pakati pawo, zile zidaaonesa nyatwa, pontho anyanchidwe, ale adaipisa dziko yawo." 
Psalms78:46 Iye adagwisa mabobo kuti adye mbewu zawo; nyadzombe kuvunga mindawo. 
Psalms78:47 Iye adapha mindawo yamfesa na matalala, pontho miti yawo yamkuyu na kutonthola." 
Psalms78:48 Iye adapha ng'ombe zawo na matalala, pontho mikumbi yawo ya mabira na njazi." 
Psalms78:49 Iye adachitisa kuona nyatwa zikulu pakuakhuthulira kuzhangali na ukali wache wakugoswa, pile pidadza ninga angelo ankhondo akudzesa imfa." 
Psalms78:50 Iye hadabweze ukali wache tayu, penu kukhonda vunga miyoyo yawo, mbwenye adaapha na muliri." 
Psalms78:51 Iye adapha ana achimuna autombo a m'mabanja onsene a anthu a mu Iguputo; ana autombo a ale akhakhala makumbi a Hamu. 
Psalms78:52 Iye adatsogolera anthu ache ninga makabuswa mbaayang'anira m'thando yatchetcha monsene. 
Psalms78:53 Iye adaatsogolera mwadidi, tenepo iwo hadachite mantha tayu; mbwenye nyanza idadza mbibizika anyamalwawo." 
Psalms78:54 Iye adaadzesa kudziko yache yakuchena; dziko ya mapiri idakunda iye ene na mphamvu zache. 
Psalms78:55 Iye adathamangisa enechiro ache pikhaenda anthu ache; mbagawa dziko yawo pakati pa madzinza a Israele, mbapereka midzi yawoyo kuna anthu ache." 
Psalms78:56 Mbwenye iwo adapandukira Mulungu Wakudzulu-dzulu mbamuyesa. Iwo hadavere matongero ache tayu; 
Psalms78:57 ninga makolo awo, iwo akhali akupandukira, pontho okhonda khulupirika; okhonda nyindirika ninga uta wa pitchenkho." 
Psalms78:58 Iwo adamzhangalisa na mbuto zawo zakupembedzerapo milungu, pontho adamzhangalisa pyakwanga na kupembedza kwawo mifanikizo." 
Psalms78:59 Mulungu adazhangali pidaona iye penepi, tenepo iye adapasiratu anthu ache nkhodolo." 
Psalms78:60 Iye adakhonda Chikhumbi chache pambuto ya Shilo, Chikhumbi chidakhazikisa iye pakati pa anthu chile." 
Psalms78:61 Iye adatawirisa anyamalwathu kupokosera Bokosi ya Chiverano, chinthu chakuonesa mphamvu na demelero yache." 
Psalms78:62 Iye adazhangalira anthu ache ene mbatawirisa kuti aphiwe na anyamalwawo. 
Psalms78:63 Aphale adaphiwa na moto, tenepo atsikana adasowa anyakuasemba." 
Psalms78:64 Anyansembe adafa na matalasada, tenepo amamfelwawo hadatawiriswe kusintili tayu." 
Psalms78:65 Pakumalisira pache Mbuya adalamuka khala ninga akhali m'chitulo; iye akhali ninga munthu wamphamvu wakudzipirwa na vinyu. 
Psalms78:66 Iye adathamangisa anyamalwache kuabweza, na kuachitisa manyadzo okhonda mala." 
Psalms78:67 Mbwenye iye adakhonda pidzukulu pya Yosefe; iye hadasankhule dzinza ya Eferemu tayu. 
Psalms78:68 M'mbuto mwache iye adasankhula dzinza ya Yuda na Phiri ya Zioni, phiri ya pamtima pache." 
Psalms78:69 Penepo adasasanyapo mbuto yache yakuchena ninga musache wa kudzulu; iye adaichitisa kukhala yakukhazikika ninga dziko yapansi kwenda na kwenda. 
Psalms78:70 Iye adasankhula Davite nyabasache; iye adamkwata mumpovu," 
Psalms78:71 kukhadyesa iye mkumbi wa pifuyo pyache mbamuikha kukhala mfumu wa Israele, makabuswa wa anthu a Mulungu." 
Psalms78:72 Davite adaayang'anira na mtima onsene mbaatsogolera mwanzeru. 
Psalms79:1 Mulungu, madzinza achita nkhondo na dziko yanu yakuchena; iwo aswipisa Nyumbanu yakuchena mbasiya madembe mzinda wa Yerusalemu." 
Psalms79:2 Iwo asiya mitembo ya anthu anu kuti idyiwe na mbalame, mitembo ya anyabasanu kuti idyiwe na nyama zam'tsanga." 
Psalms79:3 Iwo adachuchisa ninga madzi chiropa cha anthu anu; chiropa kukukambo ninga madzi mu Yerusalemu monsene, pontho nee mbodzi adasala kuti afikhire anyakufawo tayu." 
Psalms79:4 Madzinza akuzungulira ale adatikana; iwo adatiseka mbatiselusa. 
Psalms79:5 MBUYA, kani munafuna pyakutizhangalira kwenda na kwenda? Kani ukali wanu ukuthimiza ninga moto?" 
Psalms79:6 Zhangalirani madzinza, ale ambakhonda kukupembedzani, anthu ale ambakhonda kupemphera kuna imwe." 
Psalms79:7 Thangwi iwo apha anthu anu; iwo achitisa dziko yanu kukhala madembe. 
Psalms79:8 Lekani kutitchunyusa thangwi ya kudawa kudachita makolo athu. Tiverenimbo nsisi ife chinchino; ife tataya chidikhiro chathu chonsene. 
Psalms79:9 Tiphedzenimbo, Mulungu, Nyankhombo wathu, tipulumuseni pontho mutilekerere pyakudawa pyathu, thangwi ya kudzesa demelero kuna dzinanu." 
Psalms79:10 Pyakhala tani kuti madzinza ale ativunze kuti: “Mulungu wanu ali kupi?” Mbatikuoneni mukutchunyusa madzinza thangwi ya kuchuchisa chiropa cha anyabasanu. 
Psalms79:11 Veserani kubulira kunachita anyaperezoku, tenepo asudzuleni pa nyatwa zawo na mphamvu zanu zikulu anyakutongwa kuphiwa ale." 
Psalms79:12 Mbuya, pagalini madzinza anango kanomwe kuabwezera, thangwi ya kukutikanani konsene kwachita iwoku." 
Psalms79:13 Tenepo ife, anthu anu mabira a pamkumbi panu, tinapereka takhuta kuna imwe kwenda na kwenda mbatikukuzani mifendu yonsene inadzayo." 
Psalms80:1 Tiveserenimbo ife, Makabuswa wa Israele; tivenimbo ife, imwe ule mumbatsogolera mkumbi wanu. Ule mumbakhala pampando wanu wachifumu padzulu pa pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido," 
Psalms80:2 pidziwiseni mwekha ene kuna madzinza a Eferemu, Benjemani na Manase. Tioneseni mphamvu zanu; idzani mutipulumuse!" 
Psalms80:3 Tibwezereni kuna imwe, Mulungu! Tioneseni nsisi zanu, tenepo ife tinapulumuka!" 
Psalms80:4 Kufikirana lini, MBUYA Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene, munazhangalira kupemphera kwa anthu anu?" 
Psalms80:5 Imwe mwaadzesera kutsukwala kuti akudye, pontho khomitcho ikulu yakudzala na misozi kuti aimwe." 
Psalms80:6 Imwe mudatawirisa madzinza akuzungulira kuti achite nkhondo thangwi ya dziko yathu; anyamalwathu ambatitikana. 
Psalms80:7 Tibwezereni kuna imwe, Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene! Tioneseni nsisi zanu, tenepo ife tinapulumuka!" 
Psalms80:8 Imwe mudadza na mtawi wamfesa kubulukira kudziko ya Iguputo; imwe mudabulusa madzinza anango mbamubzala mtawi wamfesa m'dziko mwawamo. 
Psalms80:9 Imwe mudausasanyira mbuto kuti iwo umere; mitsitsi yache idapita pansi mwakuzwika, pontho udavata m'dziko yonsene." 
Psalms80:10 Udapasa mthunzi mapiri onsene; nthambi zache zidaphimbira miti yakujintcha ya mikungudza. 
Psalms80:11 Nthambi zache zidatanthawira ku Bara ya Mediterania, pontho mpakana kumkulo wa Yufurate." 
Psalms80:12 Mwatani mudagwisa mipanda yakuzungulira mtawi wamfesawo? Chinchino munthu wakugwanda pyache na penepo anakwanisa kuba mfesazo: 
Psalms80:13 nkhumba zam'tsanga zimbazipondedza, pontho nyama zam'tsanga zimbazidya." 
Psalms80:14 Zungunukirani kuna ife, Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene! Tiyang'aneni pansi pano kubulukira kudzuluko; idzani mutipulumuse!" 
Psalms80:15 Idzani mupulumuse mtawi wamfesa udabzala imwe ule, mtawi wamfesa ung'ono udachitisa imwe kuti ukule na mphamvu ule." 
Psalms80:16 Anyamalwathu aupisa moto pontho autema-tema; azhangalireni, pontho muavunge!" 
Psalms80:17 Koyani, pontho tchinjirizani anthu asankhula imwe ale, dzinza idachitisa imwe kukhala yamphamvu ile." 
Psalms80:18 Ife nkhabe dzabauka pontho kubuluka kuna imwe tayu; tikoyeni na moyo, tenepo ife tinakulemedzani." 
Psalms80:19 Tibwezereni kuna imwe, MBUYA Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene. Tioneseni nsisi, tenepo ife tinapulumuka." 
Psalms81:1 Khuwani na kukomerwa kuna Mulungu nyakutitchinjirizathu; muimbireni Mulungu wa Yakobo nyimbo zakumkuza nazo! 
Psalms81:2 Tchemulani nyimbo mbamuimbe pisekese; imbani nyimbo zakukoma na anyakatangale, pontho malimba." 
Psalms81:3 Lizani ngoma ya paphwando, ndzidzi wakubalwa kwa mwezi, pontho ndzidzi una iwo wamumphu." 
Psalms81:4 Wenewu ndi mwambo m'dziko ya Israele, wakuchita kutongwa na Mulungu wa Yakobo." 
Psalms81:5 Iye adaukhazikisa pakati pa anthu a Israele ndzidzi udasosa iye dziko ya Iguputo. Ndikuva fala yokhonda dziwika kulonga kuti," 
Psalms81:6 “Ine ndidakunundula nyatwa zakunduli kwanu; ine ndidachitisa kuti mutule mitolo ya njerwa ikhathukula imwe. 
Psalms81:7 Ndzidzi ukhali imwe panyatwa, mudandichemera, inembo ndidakupulumusani. Ine ndidakutawirani kubulukira m'chonzi mukhabisala ine mule. Ine ndidakuyesani pamphuno za madzi za Meriba." 
Psalms81:8 Veserani, anthu anga, kukucheuzani kunachita ine; Israele, ine ndikupifunadi kuti iwe mbudandivesera!" 
Psalms81:9 Pakati panu paleke khala milungu yachilendo, penu kupembedza milungu yakubulukira kwinango tayu." 
Psalms81:10 Ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wako, adakubulusa m'dziko ya Iguputo ule. Fungula mulomo wako, inembo ndinakudyesa." 
Psalms81:11 “Mbwenye anthu anga hadafune kundivesera tayu; Israele hadafune pyakundivera tayu. 
Psalms81:12 Tenepo ndaaleka kuti akhale pyawo akuuma mtima, pontho achite pyawo pinthu pyonsene pikhafuna iwo." 
Psalms81:13 “Ndikhapifunadi kwene kuti anthu anga mbadandivesera; ndikhapifunadi kwene kuti iwo mbadandivera. 
Psalms81:14 Ine mbandidakunda kabodzi kene anyamalwawo mbandikunda anyakuazonda onsene. 
Psalms81:15 Anyakundizonda mbadabunyala na mantha pamaso panga; kutchunyuswa kwawo mbakudakhala kwenda na kwenda. 
Psalms81:16 Mbwenye ine mbandidakudyesani na tirigu wadidi mbandikukhutisani na uchi wakubulukira m'mwala.” 
Psalms82:1 Mulungu aimira pathando ya miseru kudzulu; pakati pa milungu kuitonga mseru kuti: 
Psalms82:2 “Imwe mwathema kuleka kutonga mseru mwakusowa chilungamo; imwe mwathema kuleka kuikhira kunduli anyakudawika! 
Psalms82:3 Tchinjirizani ufulu wa anyakusowa mphamvu, pontho ana masiye; tongani mseru mwachilungamo anyakutcherenga, pontho anthu akuponderezwa." 
Psalms82:4 Apulumuseni anyakusowa mphamvu na atcherengi, aomboleni m'manja mwa anyakudawika." 
Psalms82:5 “Anthumwe kukhonda dziwa kweneku nkhwanji? Mwapupwa tani tenepa? Imwe mwamala ipa monsene mwene, pontho chilungamo m'dziko yapansi chamalamo." 
Psalms82:6 Ine ndidalonga kuti, ‘Imwe ndimwe milungu, monsenene ndimwe ana a Nyakudzulu-dzulu.’" 
Psalms82:7 Mbwenye imwe munati mufe ninga mumbafera anthu ene pyawo; moyo wanu unamala ninga pimbachitika kuna mfumu.” 
Psalms82:8 Idzani, Mulungu, mutonge anthu a padziko yapansi; madzinza onsene nganu." 
Psalms83:1 Mulungu, lekani khala mulomo phoo; lekani matama kwene, Mulungu, okhonda longa na chinthu chene!" 
Psalms83:2 Yang'anani! Anyamalwanu akuchita chimpiningu, pontho anthu ambakuzondani ale akupandukira." 
Psalms83:3 Iwo akusasanya njira zachibiso-biso kusosa nazo anthu anu; iwo ambaverana kuchita pyakuipa pana anthu ambatchinjiriza imwe ale. 
Psalms83:4 Iwo akulonga kuti, “Tendeni tivunge madzinzawo, towera Israele aduwalike kwenda na kwenda.”" 
Psalms83:5 Iwo atawirizana papinthu pinafuna iwo chita, pontho aphatizana kukhala abodzi kuti amenye nkhondo namwe;" 
Psalms83:6 anthu a ku Edomu pontho na Aishimaele; anthu a ku Moabu pontho na Ahagiri," 
Psalms83:7 anthu a ku Gebali, Amoni, na Amaleki, pontho a ku Filisti na Turo." 
Psalms83:8 Na Asiria enembo aphatizana nawo kusasanya gulu ibodzi yamphamvu yankhondo kupandukira pidzukulu pya Loti. 
Psalms83:9 Chitani kuna iwo ninga pidachita imwe Amidiani, pontho kuna Sisera na Yabini pamkulo wa Kishoni." 
Psalms83:10 Imwe mudaakunda pa Endori, pontho mitembo yawo idavunda pyayo pamtunda." 
Psalms83:11 Chitani kuna akadamu awo ninga pidachita imwe kuna Orebu na Zeebu; kundani atongi awo onsene ninga mudachita imwe kuna Zeba na Zalimuna," 
Psalms83:12 ule adalonga mbati, “Tinapokosera dziko yonsene yampovu ya Mulungu kukhala yathu.”" 
Psalms83:13 Abalaliseni ninga fumbi, Mulungu, ninga goche yakumbuluka na mphepo." 
Psalms83:14 Ninga moto wakupisa msitu, ninga malulume a moto akupisa mapiri," 
Psalms83:15 athamangiseni na chonzi chanu, pontho muathuswe na mphepo yanu yakugoswa." 
Psalms83:16 Achitiseni kuti akhale na nkhope zakutota, kufikirana iwo atome kusaka-saka imwe, MBUYA." 
Psalms83:17 Mbakundwe, pontho agope kwenda na kwenda; iwo mbafe na kululupiswa kukulu." 
Psalms83:18 Iwo mbadziwe kuti imwe ene mwekha ndimwe MBUYA, Nyakudzulu-dzulu, mtongi wa dziko yonsene yapansi." 
Psalms84:1 Nyumbanu ndimbaifuna pyakwanga, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene!" 
Psalms84:2 Ndikupifunadi kuti ndikhale mwenemo! Ndatchuwa kukhala m'Nyumba ya MBUYA. Na manungo anga onsene ndimbaimba na kukomerwa kuna Mulungu wamoyo. 
Psalms84:3 Podi na ntchenga zene zamanga chisa, pontho anyanzeze ana misawo; iwo ambakoya anawo chifupi na maguwanu ansembe, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, mfumu wanga, pontho Mulungu wanga." 
Psalms84:4 Ngakutsanzaya anthu ale ambakhala m'Nyumba mwanu, ale ndzidzi onsene ambaimba nyimbo zakukuza nazo ukulu wanu." 
Psalms84:5 Ngakutsanzaya anthu ale mphamvu zawo zimbabulukira kuna imwe, ale asasanyika kwenda paulendo kapembedza pa Phiri ya Zioni." 
Psalms84:6 Ndzidzi unagwanda iwo na paphedi yakuuma ya Baka, phediyo imbasanduka mbuto ya mphuno za madzi, pontho mvula ya phumphuli imbaidzaza na mathawale." 
Psalms84:7 Iwo ambathimiza kukhala na mphamvu ndzidzi unaenda iwo; iwo anati aone Mulungu wa milungu pa Phiri ya Zioni. 
Psalms84:8 Ivani kupemphera kwanga, MBUYA Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene. Ndivesereni, Mulungu wa Yakobo!" 
Psalms84:9 Mulungu tsanzayisani mfumu wakutitchinjiriza, mfumu asankhula imwe ule." 
Psalms84:10 Nsiku ibodzi kukhala m'Nyumba mwanu mphyadidi pyakwanga kusiyana na kukhala nsiku chikwi chibodzi kunango kwene; ine mbidakomerwa kukhala nyakulondali msuwo wa mpanda wa Nyumba ya Mulungu wanga, kusiyana na kukhala m'misa ya anthu akuipa." 
Psalms84:11 MBUYA Mulungu ndi mfumu wakutitchinjiriza pontho wakudemelera, wakutitsanzayisa na wakukoma mtima pontho chilemedzo. Iye nkhabe khondera chinthu chadidi tayu kuna ale ambachita pinthu pyakulungama." 
Psalms84:12 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, ngakutsanzaya anthu ambakunyindirani ale." 
Psalms85:1 MBUYA, imwe mwavera nsisi dziko yanu; imwe mwachitisa pinthu pya Israele kuti pifambe pontho mwadidi." 
Psalms85:2 Imwe mwalekerera pyakudawa pya anthu anu, pontho mwafudza pyakudawika pikhadachita iwo pile." 
Psalms85:3 Imwe mudaleka kuazhangalira mbamuleka kuonesa ukali wanu wakugoswa. 
Psalms85:4 Tibwezereni kuna imwe, Mulungu, Nyankhombo wathu, pontho lekani kukhonda komerwa nafe kukhachita imwe kule!" 
Psalms85:5 Kadi imwe munatizhangalira kwenda na kwenda? Kadi kuzhangali kwanu kunakhala mifendu na mifendu? 
Psalms85:6 Tisisimuseni pontho, towera ife, anthu anu, tikukuzeni." 
Psalms85:7 Tioneseni kutifuna kwanu kokhonda mala, MBUYA, pontho tiphedzeni pakutipulumusa." 
Psalms85:8 Ine ndikuvesera pinalonga MBUYA Mulungu; iye ambadumbira kutipasa mtendere, ife anthu ache, ngakhala ife tinakhonda bwerera pontho kuna pinthu pyakupupwa pikhachita ife kale." 
Psalms85:9 Ndimomwene kuti iye asasanyika kupulumusa anthu ambamulemedza ale, towera demelero yache ikhale m'dziko mwathu muno." 
Psalms85:10 Kutifuna kwanu kokhonda mala na kukhulupirika kwanu pinagumanikana pabodzi; kulungama na mtendere pinakhumbatirana. 
Psalms85:11 Kukhulupirika kwa munthu kunatumbuka kubulukira pansi, pontho chilungamo cha Mulungu chinayang'ana pansi pano kubulukira kudzulu." 
Psalms85:12 MBUYA anachitisa pinthu pyathu kufamba mwadidi, pontho dziko yathu kubulusa pyakuvuna pyadidi." 
Psalms85:13 Kulungama kunaenda patsogolo pache mbakumsasanyira njirache. 
Psalms86:1 Ndivesereni, MBUYA, pontho nditawireni, thangwi ndine nyakutcherenga pontho nyakuponderezwa." 
Psalms86:2 Ndipulumuseni kuimfa, thangwi ndine wakukhulupirika kuna imwe; ndipulumuseni, thangwi ndine nyabasanu, pontho ndimbanyindira imwe." 
Psalms86:3 Imwe ndimwe Mulungu wanga, tenepo ndivereni nsisi, Mbuya; ndimbapemphera kuna imwe nsiku yonsene." 
Psalms86:4 Chitisani nyabasanu kukomerwa, Mbuya, thangwi ndimbakupembedzani na mtimanga onsene." 
Psalms86:5 Imwe, Mbuya, ndimwe wadidi kuna ife, pontho nyakulekerera pyakudawa, wakudzala na kuafuna kokhonda mala anthu onsene ambapemphera kuna imwe ale." 
Psalms86:6 Ivani, MBUYA, kupemphera kwanga; ivani chiliro changa, kulira kuti mundiphedze." 
Psalms86:7 Ndimbakuchemerani pandzidzi wa nyatwa, thangwi imwe mumbava kupemphera kwanga." 
Psalms86:8 Pakati pa milungu nkhabepo unango ninga imwe, Mbuya, nee na mbodzi ene achitambo ninga pyachita imwepi tayu." 
Psalms86:9 Madzinza onsene adalenga imwe anati adze kukulambirani imwe, Mbuya; iwo anakuza ukulu wanu." 
Psalms86:10 Imwe ndimwe wamphamvu, pontho mumbachita pinthu pyakudodomesa; imwe ene basi ndimwe Mulungu." 
Psalms86:11 Ndifunziseni, MBUYA, pinafuna imwe kuti ndipichite, tenepo ine ndinakuverani mwakukhulupirika; ndifunziseni kukuphatirani basa mwakupipereka monsene mwene." 
Psalms86:12 Ndinakukuzani na mtimanga onsene, Mbuya Mulungu wanga; ndinakuza dzinanu kwenda na kwenda." 
Psalms86:13 Kundifuna kwanu kokhonda mala nkhukulu pyakwanga! Imwe mwandipulumusa kudziko ya anyakufa. 
Psalms86:14 Amuna akudungudza akundipandukira, Mulungu; gulu ya amuna akukala mtima akusaka-saka moyo wanga, anthu okhonda tsalakana pya imwe ale." 
Psalms86:15 Mbwenye imwe, Mbuya, ndimwe wansisi, pontho wakuva nyambalo, ndzidzi onsene ndimwe wakupirira, ndzidzi onsene ndimwe wakutifuna kokhonda mala, wakukoma mtima, pontho wakukhulupirika." 
Psalms86:16 Zungunukirani kuna ine mbamundivere nsisi; mpaseni nyabasanu mphamvu, pontho mundipulumuse, thangwi ndimbakuphatirani basa, sasawa ninga mukhachitira mamanga." 
Psalms86:17 Ndioneseni pidzindikiro pya udidi wanu, MBUYA, towera anyamalwanga apione mbachita manyadzo, thangwi imwe mwandithondoza pontho mwandiphedza." 
Psalms87:1 MBUYA amanga mzindache paphiri yakupambulika; 
Psalms87:2 kupiringana mbuto zinango zonsene m'dziko ya Israele, iye ambafuna pikulu mzinda wa Yerusalemu." 
Psalms87:3 Vesera, iwe mzinda wa Mulungu, kuna pinthu pyakudodomesa pinalonga iye pya iwepo:" 
Psalms87:4 “Ndinathimizapo madziko a Iguputo na Babiloni panyandandanda wa madzinza ambandivera ale; ndinathimizira pana anyakukhala mumzinda wa Yerusalemu anthu a kudziko ya Filisti, Turo na Kushi.”" 
Psalms87:5 Pinalongwa kuti weneyumbo ngwabele ya Zioni; ushu pontho ule adabalwa kweneko; Nyakudzulu-dzulu mwenechiro anamchitisa kukhala wamphamvu. 
Psalms87:6 MBUYA analemba nyandandanda wa anthu, mbaathimizira onsene ninga mzika za ku Yerusalemu." 
Psalms87:7 Iwo ambavina na kuimba mbati, “Mu Zioni ndi phata ya kutsanzaya kwathu konsene.”" 
Psalms88:1 MBUYA Mulungu, nyankhombo wanga, ndimbalira nsiku yonsene, pontho na mosiku ndimbadza pamaso panu." 
Psalms88:2 Ivani kupemphera kwanga; veserani kulira kwanga kuti mundiphedze! 
Psalms88:3 Tenepo nyatwa zikulu zandigwera mwakuti moyo wanga ukufedza chifupi na dziko ya anyakufa. 
Psalms88:4 Ine ndakhalambo ninga anthu anango onsene ali chifupi kufa ale, mphamvu zanga zonsene zamala kwenda." 
Psalms88:5 Ndine munthu wakusiyiwa pakati pa anyakufa ndakhala ninga munthu wakuchekwa wakugona m'masiye mwawo, anthu aduwaliraletu imwe ale, ale nkhabe kwanisa kuphedzwa na imwe tayu." 
Psalms88:6 Imwe mwandiponya m'chiphompho chakuzwika, m'dzenje yamdima pyakwanga, pontho yakuzwika pyakwanga." 
Psalms88:7 Kuzhangali kwanu pana ine kukuchita kulemerambo, pontho ndapeyiwa pansi pa mabimbi ache." 
Psalms88:8 Imwe mwabulusa pana ine ashamwali anga a chifupiletu; imwe mwandisandusa chakunyansa kuna iwo. Ine ndafungirwa, tenepo nkhabe kwanisa kuthawa tayu;" 
Psalms88:9 maso anga ngakuthima thangwi ya kusanyika. MBUYA, nsiku zonsene ndimbalira kuna imwe mbandikwiza manjanga m'dzulu kupemphera." 
Psalms88:10 Kadi imwe mumbachita pyakudodomesa kuna anyakufa? Kadi iwo ambalamuka mbakukuzani? 
Psalms88:11 Kadi kutifuna kwanu kokhonda mala kumbalongwa m'masiye, penu kukhulupirika kwanu kulongwa kumbuto ya kuvungika?" 
Psalms88:12 Kadi pyakudodomesa pyanu pimbaonekera kumbuto yamdima, penu udidi wanu kuoneka m'dziko ya anyakuduwalika?" 
Psalms88:13 MBUYA, ndikukuchemerani kuti mundiphedze; machibese onsene ndimbapemphera kuna imwe." 
Psalms88:14 Mwatani munandikhonda, MBUYA? Mwatani munandipasa nkhodolo?" 
Psalms88:15 Kutomera uphaleanga ndaona nyatwa mbandisala chifupi kufa; ndatopa nawo mtolo wa kunditchunyusa kwanu. 
Psalms88:16 Kuzhangali kwanu kwakugoswa kwandipeya, pontho kundisosa kwanu kwakugoswa kwandivunga." 
Psalms88:17 Nsiku yamumphu iwo ambandizungulira ninga madzi makulu; iwo andifungira khundu zonsene. 
Psalms88:18 Imwe mwabulusa pana ine anzanga, anthu ambafuna ine ale, pontho mdima ukhale shamwalianga wa chifupiletu." 
Psalms89:1 MBUYA, ndzidzi onsene ndinaimba pya kutifuna kwanu kokhonda mala; na mulomo wanga ndinalonga pya kukhulupirika kwanu mifendu na mifendu." 
Psalms89:2 Ndikupidziwa kuti kundifuna kwanu kokhonda mala kunakhalapo kwenda na kwenda, pontho kuti kukhulupirika kwanu nkhwakukhazikika ninga thambo." 
Psalms89:3 Imwe mudalonga mbati, “Ine ndachita chiverano na munthu adasankhula ine ule; ine ndadumbira kuna nyabasanga Davite kuti," 
Psalms89:4 ‘Chidzukulu chako ndzidzi onsene chinakhala mfumu; ndinakhazikisa ufumu wako kwenda na kwenda.’ ” 
Psalms89:5 Kudzulu kumbaimba pya pinthu pyakudodomesa pimbachita imwe; anyakuchena ambaimba pya kukhulupirika kwanu, MBUYA." 
Psalms89:6 Nkhabe unango na mbodzi ene wa kudzulu sasawa na imwe, MBUYA; nkhabe unango mwa anyakukhala kudzulu akulandani tayu." 
Psalms89:7 Imwe mumbagopiwa pamgumano wa anyakuchena; onsene pamaso panu ambaimira mwamantha. 
Psalms89:8 MBUYA Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene, nkhabe unango wamphamvu ninga imwe; ndimwe wakukhulupirika papinthu pyonsene, MBUYA." 
Psalms89:9 Imwe mumbatonga panyanza yamphamvu, imwe mumbangothesa mabimbi ache aukali." 
Psalms89:10 Imwe mudapeya nyangume, Rahabi, ninga mbodzi wa anthu akuchekwa; na mphamvu zanu zikulu mudakunda anyamalwanu." 
Psalms89:11 Kudzulu nkhwanu, pontho na pansi pano pene; imwe mudalenga dziko yapansi na pyonsene pili mwenemo." 
Psalms89:12 Imwe mudalenga kumpoto na kumwera; Phiri ya Tabori, pontho Phiri ya Herimoni pimbakuimbirani thangwi ya kukomerwa." 
Psalms89:13 Manjanu ngamphamvu pyakwanga! Mphamvu zanu nsikulu pyakwanga! 
Psalms89:14 Kulungama na chilungamo ndi maziko a ufumu wanu; kutifuna kwanu kokhonda mala na kukhulupirika kwanu pimbaenda patsogolo panu. 
Psalms89:15 Ngakutsanzaya anthu ambakupembedzani na nyimbo, ale ambakhala m'cheza cha kukoma kwanu mtima, MBUYA." 
Psalms89:16 Na thangwi ya imwe, iwo ambakomerwa nsiku yamumphu, pontho iwo ambakukuzani thangwi ya udidi wanu." 
Psalms89:17 Imwe mumbatipasa kukunda kukulu; na kutifuna kwanu mumbatichitisa kuti tikunde. 
Psalms89:18 Imwe, MBUYA, mudatisankhulira nyakutchinjiriza; imwe, Mulungu Wakuchena wa Israele, mudatipasa mfumu wathu." 
Psalms89:19 Kale ene kumasomphenya imwe mudalonga kuna anyabasanu akukhulupirika kuti, “Ine ndaphedza nyankhondo wakuveka; ine ndapasa ufumu kuna mbodzi adasankhula ine pakati pa anthu ule." 
Psalms89:20 Ine ndagumana Davite, nyabasanga; ine ndamdzoza na mafuta akuchena." 
Psalms89:21 Ndzidzi onsene mphamvu zanga zinakhala na iye, ndimomwene mkono wanga unamchitisa kukhala wamphamvu." 
Psalms89:22 Anyamalwache nkhabe dzamuikha pansi pa utongi wawo tayu; anyakudawika nkhabe dzamkunda tayu. 
Psalms89:23 Ine ndinapeya anyamalwache pamaso pache mbandipha onsene anyakumzonda. 
Psalms89:24 Kumfuna kwanga kokhonda mala na kukhulupirika kwanga kunakhala na iye; ndzidzi onsene ndinamchitisa kukhala nyakukunda. 
Psalms89:25 Ndinathimiza ufumu wache kubulukira ku Bara ya Mediterania mpakana kumkulo wa Yufurate. 
Psalms89:26 Iye analonga kuna ine kuti, ‘Imwe ndimwe babanga, pontho Mulungu wanga; imwe ndimwe Phanzwi pontho Nyankhombo wanga.’" 
Psalms89:27 Ine ndinamchitisa kukhala mwananga wautombo, wamkulu kupiringana mafumu onsene a padziko yapansi." 
Psalms89:28 Ndzidzi onsene ndinachita pidadumbira ine kuna iye, pontho kumfuna kwanga kokhonda mala kunamkoya kwenda na kwenda." 
Psalms89:29 Ufumu wache unakhazikika ninga thambo; mbodzi wa pidzukulu anatonga kwenda na kwenda. 
Psalms89:30 “Mbwenye ngakhala pidzukulu pyache pinakhonda kuvera mwambo wanga mbapikhonda teweza matongero anga," 
Psalms89:31 ngakhala pinakhonda ikha konta pinaapanga ine kuchita mbakhonda koya matongero anga," 
Psalms89:32 penepo ine ndinaatchunyusa thangwi ya pyakudawa pyawo; ndinaachitisa kuti aone nyatwa thangwi ya kudawika kwawo. 
Psalms89:33 Mbwenye ine nkhabe dzasiya kumfuna kokhonda mala Davite tayu, penu kuchimwana dzachita pidadumbira ine kuna iye pile." 
Psalms89:34 Ine nkhabe dzaswa chiverano chasasanya ine naye tayu, penu kubweza na chinthu chibodzi chidadumbira ine chene tayu." 
Psalms89:35 “Kabodzi pontho ndzidzi onsene ndadumbira na dzinanga yakuchena; ine nkhabe dzanama kuna Davite tayu. 
Psalms89:36 Iye ndzidzi onsene anakhala na pidzukulu, pontho ine ndinayang'anira ufumu wache ndzidzi onsene una ife na dzuwa." 
Psalms89:37 Pinakhala pyakukhazikika kwenda na kwenda ninga mwezi, ule ndi mboni yakukhulupirika kuthambo.”" 
Psalms89:38 Mbwenye imwe mwazhangalira mfumu wanu wakusankhulika; imwe mwamsiya yekha, pontho mwamkhonda." 
Psalms89:39 Imwe mwafudza chiverano chanu na nyabasanu mbamuponya m'matope chipewu chache chachifumu. 
Psalms89:40 Imwe mwagomola mafufu a mzindache mbamusiya mpandache madembe. 
Psalms89:41 Onsene anyakugwanda na penepo ambaba pinthu pyache; atsanthembache onsene ambamseka. 
Psalms89:42 Imwe mwachitisa kuti anyamalwache amkunde; onsene mwaachitisa kuti akomerwe. 
Psalms89:43 Imwe mwachitisa pida pyache kusanduka pyakusowa basa kuti akundwe pankhondo. 
Psalms89:44 Imwe mwabulusa demelero yache mbamufikhira mpando wache wachifumu pansi. 
Psalms89:45 Imwe mwamkalambisa mbali mphale mbamumchitisa manyadzo pakwecha. 
Psalms89:46 MBUYA, kadi munapibisa mwekha kwenda na kwenda? Kuzhangali kwanu kwakugaka ninga moto kunafikirana lini?" 
Psalms89:47 Kumbukani kuvira kwachita moyo wanga. Kadi imwe mwaduwalira kuti mwatilenga tonsenefe anthu akusowa basa? 
Psalms89:48 Mbani anakwanisa kukhala na moyo mbakhonda kufa? Mbani anakwanisa kupipulumusa yekha ene kuna mphamvu za dziko ya anyakufa? 
Psalms89:49 Mbuya, pili kupi pitsikimizo pyakutoma pya kutifuna kwanu kokhonda mala? Kudumbira kudachita imwe kuna Davite kuli kupi?" 
Psalms89:50 Mbuya, lekani duwalira munatikanirwa ine, nyabasanu, munapirira ine kutembererwa konsene kunandichita madzinza onsene." 
Psalms89:51 Anyamalwanu akutikana mfumu wanu wakusankhulika, MBUYA! Iwo ambamtikana konsene kwene kunaenda iye." 
Psalms89:52 Kuzani MBUYA kwenda na kwenda! Ameni! Ameni! 
Psalms90:1 Mbuya, mifendu na mifendu imwe ndimwe musathu." 
Psalms90:2 Imwe mbamudzati lenga mapiri, penu kuchitisa dziko yapansi kukhalapo, imwe mukhali Mulungu wakukhala na kukhala, pontho munakhala Mulungu kwenda na kwenda." 
Psalms90:3 Imwe mumbapanga munthu kubwerera pontho ninga mukhali iye kale; imwe mumbamsanduza kubwerera kufumbi. 
Psalms90:4 Kuna imwe pyaka chikwi chibodzi pyakhala ninga nsiku ibodzi; pyakhala ninga nsiku yagwanda kwene ile ninga ora ya mosiku. 
Psalms90:5 Imwe mumbatikukulula ninga madzi makulu; timbakhala kwene pang'ono basi ninga ndoto. Takhala ninga tsanga yakumera na machibese 
Psalms90:6 ile imbakula na kubulusa maluwa, mbwenye imbakhunyata na kuferatu dzuwa ingagaka." 
Psalms90:7 Ife tavungwa na kuzhangali kwanu; tagoswerwa na ukali wanu. 
Psalms90:8 Imwe mumbaikha pakwecha pyakudawa pyathu pamaso panu, pyakudawa pyathu pyachibiso-biso pambuto panakwanisa imwe kupiona." 
Psalms90:9 Moyo wathu wavira na kuzhangali kwanu; pyaka pyathu pyonsene pimbamala ninga kulonga chiwere-were. 
Psalms90:10 Pyaka makumanomwe ndiye pina ife pene basi, pyaka makumasere ngakhalambo tina mphamvu; kwache pyonsene pimbatidzesera ipyo ndi nyatwa na kutsukwala basi; moyo chinchino unamala, tenepo ife tinadyiwa na madzi." 
Psalms90:11 Mbani ambadziwa mphamvu za kuzhangali kwanu? Mbani ambadziwa mantha pinakwanisa kudzesa ukali wanu? 
Psalms90:12 Tifunziseni kulengesa nsiku za moyo wathu, towera m'moyo wathu tikhale anthu anzeru." 
Psalms90:13 Munafikirana lini mukutizhangalira? MBUYA, verani nsisi anyabasanu!" 
Psalms90:14 Machibese onsene tidzazeni na kutifuna kwanu kokhonda mala, towera tiimbe na kukomerwa moyo wathu onsene." 
Psalms90:15 Chinchino tichitiseni kuti tikomerwe pikulu ninga pidachitisa imwe kuti titsukwale ndzidzi wa pyaka pya kutsukwala kwathu konsene. 
Psalms90:16 Titawiriseni ife, anyabasanu, kuona mabasanu amphamvu; tawirisanimbo pidzukulu pyathu kuona demelero yanu yamphamvu." 
Psalms90:17 Mbuya Mulungu wathu, mtsanzayiso wanu mbukhale nafe. Chitisani pyonsene pinachita ife kukwanisika; ande, pichitiseni kukhala pyakukwanisika!" 
Psalms91:1 Iye ule ambaenda kuna Nyakudzulu-dzulu kuti akatchinjirizwe, pontho ule ambakhala mumthunzi wa Nyamphamvu zonsene" 
Psalms91:2 anakwanisa kulonga kuna iye kuti, “Imwe ndimwe pakubisala panga, pontho mpandanga wamphamvu. Imwe ndimwe Mulungu wanga, ambanyindira ine ule.”" 
Psalms91:3 Iye anakukoya mwadidi kuna nyatwa ya msampha wakugoswa, pontho kuna muliri onsene wakupha." 
Psalms91:4 Iye anakubisa na maphaphido ache; iwe unakhala mwadidi m'manja mwache; kukhulupirika kwache kunakuyang'anira mwadidi, pontho kunakutchinjiriza." 
Psalms91:5 Imwe nkhabe dzagopa chakugoswa chonsene chakudza na mosiku, penu chakugoswa chakututumusa chakudza na masikati tayu," 
Psalms91:6 penu muliri, ule umbadza mumdima, penu anyakuipa ambapha na masikati ale tayu." 
Psalms91:7 Anthu chikwi anakwanisa kufera m'khundu mwanu, pikwi khumi kukuzungulirani, kwache imwe nkhabe kuwazika tayu." 
Psalms91:8 Imwe munayang'ana mbamuona, mule munafuna dzatchunyusirwa anyakudawika." 
Psalms91:9 Imwe mwachitisa MBUYA kukhala pakubisala panu, pontho Nyakudzulu-dzulu kukhala mbuto yanu yakupata," 
Psalms91:10 tenepo nkhabe nyatwa zinakudzerani tayu, nee chakuvunga chinabwera chifupi na musanu tayu." 
Psalms91:11 Mulungu anaikha angelo ache kukuyang'anira kukutchinjiriza konsene kwene kunaenda iwe. 
Psalms91:12 Iwo anakuthukula m'manja mwawo, towera manyalo ako aleke kuwazika na miyala." 
Psalms91:13 Iwe unapondedza nkhalamu na mbadza, nkhalamu zakugoswa na nyoka zakupha." 
Psalms91:14 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ndinapulumusa anthu ambandifuna ale, pontho ndinatchinjiriza ale ambatawira kuti ndine MBUYA." 
Psalms91:15 Iwo angandichemera, ndinaatawira; pandzidzi wa nyatwa ndinakhala nawo, ndinaapulumusa pontho ndinaalemedza." 
Psalms91:16 Ndinaafupa na moyo wakulapha; mbandiaonesa chipulumuso changa.” 
Psalms92:1 Mphyadidi pyakwanga kupereka takhuta kuna imwe, MBUYA, kuimba nyimbo zakukulemedzani nazo, imwe Nyakudzulu-dzulu," 
Psalms92:2 kulalika pya kutifuna kwanu kokhonda mala machibese onsene, pontho pya kukhulupirika kwanu mosiku onsene," 
Psalms92:3 kukuimbirani malimba akukhala na mphayo khumi, pontho na nyakatangale." 
Psalms92:4 Mabasanu amphamvu, MBUYA, ambandichitisa kukomerwa; na thangwi ya pinthu pyachita imwe na manjanu ndikukuimbirani mwakukomerwa." 
Psalms92:5 Pimbachita imwe mphikulu pyakwanga, MBUYA! Manyerezero anu ngakuzwika pyakwanga!" 
Psalms92:6 Penepi mphinthu pyakuti dzemwa pyache nkhabe kwanisa kupidziwa tayu; pupwe pyache nkhabe kupivesa tayu: 
Psalms92:7 podi kwene kuti anyakuipa akule ninga tsanga, anyakuchita pyakudawa pinthu pyawo piafambire mwadidi; kwache onsene anamala kuvungwa" 
Psalms92:8 thangwi imwe, MBUYA, ndimwe mfumu wamkululetu kwenda na kwenda." 
Psalms92:9 Ndimomwene, MBUYA; ndimomwene anyamalwanu anafa, pontho anyakudawika onsene anabalalika." 
Psalms92:10 Imwe mwandichitisa kukhala na mphamvu ninga nyati; mwakhuthulira pana ine mafuta adidi. 
Psalms92:11 Maso anga aona kukunda kwanu anyamalwanga, pontho makutu anga ava kuvungika kwa anyamalwanga akuipa." 
Psalms92:12 Anyakulungama anavata ninga miti yamchindu; iwo anakula ninga miti yamkungudza ya ku Lebanoni. 
Psalms92:13 Iwo akhala ninga miti yakubzalwa m'Nyumba ya MBUYA, ile imbavata m'Nyumba ya Mulungu wathu," 
Psalms92:14 ile imbabala basi nsapo na kukalamba kwayo kwene, pontho ndzidzi onsene njitete, pontho iwisi." 
Psalms92:15 Penepi pikuonesa kuti MBUYA ngwakulungama, pontho kuti muna iye, Phanzwi yanga, nkhabemo chakudawika." 
Psalms93:1 MBUYA ndi mfumu. Iye avala pyachifumu; MBUYA avala mkhanjo pontho iye ngwamphamvu. Dziko yapansi yakhazikika pyakwanga mwakuti nkhabe kwanisika kutekenyeka tayu. 
Psalms93:2 Mpando wanu wachifumu ngwakukhazikika kutomera pakutomaletu, pontho imwe mukhalipo kale ndzidzi mbudzati toma." 
Psalms93:3 Kuzwika kwa bara kukugaluza mafalawo, MBUYA; kumbagaluza fala na kubangula." 
Psalms93:4 MBUYA Wakudzulu-dzulu ndiye wamphamvu pyakwanga kupiringana kukukuma kwa madzi a m'bara, kupiringana ukali wa mabimbi a m'bara." 
Psalms93:5 Matongero anu ngakukhala na kukhala, MBUYA, pontho Nyumbanu njakuchenadi kwenda na kwenda." 
Psalms94:1 MBUYA, imwe ndimwe Mulungu wakutchunyusa; onesani ukali wanu!" 
Psalms94:2 Lamukani, imwe nyakutonga mseru dziko yonsene; bwezerani anyakudungudza pyakuthemerana na iwo!" 
Psalms94:3 Anyakudawika anakomerwa kufikirana lini? Kufikirana lini, MBUYA?" 
Psalms94:4 Mphandu zinadungudza kufikirana lini, kudungudza na upandu unachita iwo?" 
Psalms94:5 Iwo akupeya anthu anu, MBUYA; iwo akupondereza anthu anu." 
Psalms94:6 Iwo ambacheka amamfelwa na ana masiye mbapha alendo ambakhala m'dziko mwathu ale. 
Psalms94:7 Iwo ambalonga kuti, “MBUYA hambationa tayu; Mulungu wa Israele hambapidziwa tayu.”" 
Psalms94:8 Veserani imwe madzemwa pakati pa anthu, mapupwemwe, munadzindikira lini?" 
Psalms94:9 Mulungu ndiye adasasanya makutu athu; kadi iye nkhabe kwanisa kuva? Iye adasasanya maso athu; kadi iye nkhabe kwanisa kuona? 
Psalms94:10 Iye ule ambapanga madzinza pyakuchita; kadi iye nkhabe kwanisa kuatchunyusa? Iye ule ndi mfunzisi wa anthu onsene; kadi iye nkhabe nzeru? 
Psalms94:11 MBUYA ambadziwa manyerezero awo; iye ambadziwa kusowa basa kwachita manyerezero awo. 
Psalms94:12 MBUYA, ngwakutsanzaya munthu ambafunzisa imwe, munthu ambafunzisa imwe mwambo wanu ule!" 
Psalms94:13 Imwe mumbampasa kupuma kuna nyatwa zache za nsiku na nsiku kufikirana anthu akudawika akumbirwe milindi. 
Psalms94:14 MBUYA nkhabe dzakhonda anthu ache tayu; iye nkhabe dzasiya dzinzache yakusankhulika. 
Psalms94:15 Chilungamo chinabwerera kuna anyakulungama, pontho anyakulungama onsene anachiikhira kunduli."
