Psalms94:16 Mbani adandiikhira kunduli kupokanyisana na anyakuipa? Mbani anakhala kukhundu kwanga kupokanyisana na anyakudawika? 
Psalms94:17 MBUYA mbadakhonda kundiphedza, mbandidenda kabodzi kene kudziko ya chete." 
Psalms94:18 Ndidalonga kuti, “Ndatherezika;” mbwenye kundifuna kwanu kokhonda mala, MBUYA, kudandiphata pamkono." 
Psalms94:19 Ndzidzi unasanyika na kutsukwala ine, imwe mumbandithondoza, pontho mumbachitisa moyo wanga kukomerwa." 
Psalms94:20 Atongi akuipa nkhabe phatizana na imwe tayu; ale ambatonga mwakukhonda teweza chilungamo," 
Psalms94:21 ale ambasasanya njira zakuphera nazo anthu adidi mbatonga kuti anthu okhonda dawa aphiwe. 
Psalms94:22 Mbwenye MBUYA ndi mpandanga wamphamvu; Mulungu wanga mphakubisala panga. 
Psalms94:23 Iye anaatchunyusa thangwi ya pyakudawa pyawo mbaavunga thangwi ya kudawika kwawo; MBUYA Mulungu wathu anaavunga. 
Psalms95:1 Idzani, tendeni timkuze MBUYA! Tendeni timuimbire mwakukomerwa Phanzwi, pakubisala pathu!" 
Psalms95:2 Tendeni tidze pamaso pache na kupereka takhuta mbatiimba nyimbo zakumkuza nazo mwakukomerwa. 
Psalms95:3 Thangwi MBUYA ndi Mulungu wamphamvu, mfumu wamphamvu kupiringana milungu yonsene." 
Psalms95:4 Iye ambatonga dziko yonsene yapansi, kubulukira m'madzimba akuzwikaletu mpakana mapiri akulaphaletu." 
Psalms95:5 Iye ambatonga pabara idalenga iye ile; dziko idasasanya iye mwenechiro na manjache. 
Psalms95:6 Idzani, tendeni tilambe mbatimpembedza; mbatigodameni pamaso pa MBUYA, nyakutisasanya!" 
Psalms95:7 Iye ndi Mulungu wathu; ife ndife anthu ambatsalakana iye ale, mkumbi umbapasa iye pyakusowa pyawo. Veserani lero pinalonga iye kuti," 
Psalms95:8 “Lekani umisa mtima ninga mudachita makolo anu pa Meriba, pontho ninga nsiku ikhali iwo pa Masa m'thando yatchetcha mule." 
Psalms95:9 Kweneko iwo adandiyesa; iwo adayesa kupirira kwanga, podi kwene kuti iwo akhaona pinthu pidaachitira ine." 
Psalms95:10 Pyaka makumanayi ine ndidaipirwa na anthu a mfendu wenewu. Ndidalonga kuti, ‘Anthumwe ndimwe okhonda khulupirika! Iwo adakhonda kuvera matongero anga.’" 
Psalms95:11 Ndidaazhangalira mbandidumbira kuti: ‘Imwe nkhabeve dzapita m'dziko ikhafuna ine kukupumisani ile.’ ” 
Psalms96:1 Imbirani MBUYA nyimbo yachinchino! Imbirani MBUYA, imwe anthu a padziko yonsene yapansi!" 
Psalms96:2 Imbirani MBUYA na kumkuza! Nsiku na nsiku lalikani pya chipulumuso chache. 
Psalms96:3 Vekesani demelero yache kuna anthu a madziko onsene, vekesani pya mabasache akudodomesa kuna madzinza onsene." 
Psalms96:4 MBUYA ngwamkulu, pontho athema kulemedzwa pikulu pene; iye athema kugopiwa kupiringana milungu yonsene." 
Psalms96:5 Milungu ya madzinza anango onsene ndi mifanikizo ene basi, mbwenye MBUYA adalenga kudzulu." 
Psalms96:6 Demelero na ufumu pyamzungulira; mphamvu na kubalika pyadzala m'mbuto yache yakuchena. 
Psalms96:7 Kuzani MBUYA, anthu onsene a padziko yapansi; kuzani MBUYA thangwi ya demelero na mphamvu zache." 
Psalms96:8 Kuzani dzina ya MBUYA yakudemelera; idzani na nsembe, pontho idzani ku Nyumbache." 
Psalms96:9 Lambani pamaso pa Nyakuchena ndzidzi unaoneka iye; tetemera na mantha pamaso pache dziko yonsene yapansi! 
Psalms96:10 Longani kuna madzinza onsene kuti, “MBUYA ndi mfumu! Dziko yapansi yakhazikika pyakwanga pene, tenepo nkhabe kwanisika kutekenyeka tayu; iye anatonga mseru madzinza na chilungamo.”" 
Psalms96:11 Komerwani, dziko yapansi na thambo! Bangula, iwe bara na pyonsene pyakulengwa pili muna iwepyo;" 
Psalms96:12 komerwani, minda, na pyonsene pili muna imwe! M'misitu miti yonsene iimbe thangwi ya kukomerwa" 
Psalms96:13 ndzidzi unabwera MBUYA dzatonga padziko yapansi. Iye anatonga madzinza padziko yapansi mwachilungamo, pontho mwakukhonda yang'ana nkhope." 
Psalms97:1 MBUYA ndi mfumu! Dziko yapansi, komerwa! Komerwani imwe ntchuwa za pabara!" 
Psalms97:2 Makole na mdima pyamzungulira; kulungama pontho chilungamo ndi maziko a mpando wache wachifumu. 
Psalms97:3 Moto umbaenda patsogolo pache mbupisa anyamalwache akumzungulira. 
Psalms97:4 Kuchetuma kwache kumbamwinikira dziko yonsene yapansi; dziko yapansi imbakuonani mbitetemera na mantha. 
Psalms97:5 Mapiri ambanyunguluka ninga upula pamaso pa MBUYA, pamaso pa Mbuya wa dziko yonsene yapansi." 
Psalms97:6 Kudzulu kumbalalika pya kulungama kwache, pontho madzinza onsene ambaona demelero yache." 
Psalms97:7 Nyakupembedza mifanikizo onsene ambachitiswa manyadzo; ale ambatumbama na mifanikizo, mpembedzeni imwe milungu yonsene." 
Psalms97:8 Anthu a kumzinda wa Zioni akomerwa, pontho mizinda ya Yuda ikusekera thangwi ya kutonga kwanu mseru, MBUYA." 
Psalms97:9 MBUYA Wakudzulu-dzulu, ndimwe mtongi wa dziko yonsene yapansi; ndimwe wamkululetu kupiringana milungu yonsene." 
Psalms97:10 MBUYA ambaafuna anthu akuzondana na pyakuipa ale; iye ambayang'anira mwadidi moyo wa anthu ache akukhulupirika; iye ambaapulumusa kuna mphamvu za anyakudawika. 
Psalms97:11 Cheza chimbamwinikira pana anyakulungama, pontho kukomerwa kumbakhala pana anyakuchena mtima." 
Psalms97:12 Imwe monsene anyakulungama komerwani, thangwi ya pinthu pyakuchitirani MBUYA! Kuzani dzinache yakuchena." 
Psalms98:1 Imbirani MBUYA nyimbo yachinchino; iye achita pinthu pyakudodomesa! Mphamvu zache, pontho ungwiro wache pyamchitisa kukunda." 
Psalms98:2 MBUYA adalonga pya kukunda kwache; iye aonesa kulungama kwache pamaso pa madzinza. 
Psalms98:3 Iye adachita pidadumbira iye kuna dzinza ya Israele mwakukhulupirika, pontho na kuafuna kokhonda mala. Anthu onsene konsene kwene aona kukunda kwa Mulungu wathu." 
Psalms98:4 Imbirani MBUYA, dziko yapansi, thangwi ya kukomerwa; mkuzeni na nyimbo, pontho na mkhuwo wakukomerwa nawo!" 
Psalms98:5 Imbirani MBUYA nyimbo zakumkuza nazo! Imbani nyimbo na nyakatangale! 
Psalms98:6 Lizani ngoma na nyanga za bira, pontho khuwani kuna MBUYA, mfumu wathu, thangwi ya kukomerwa." 
Psalms98:7 Iwe bara, bangula, pontho na pyonsene pili muna iwe; dziko yapansi, imba, pontho na onsene ambakhala penepo!" 
Psalms98:8 Imbani manja, mikulomwe; imwe mapiri, imbirani pabodzi na kukomerwa," 
Psalms98:9 mbapiimbe pamaso pa MBUYA, thangwi iye akudza dzatonga dziko yapansi. Iye anatonga mseru anthu padziko yapansi mwachilungamo, pontho mwakukhonda yang'ana nkhope." 
Psalms99:1 MBUYA ndi mfumu; anthu mbatetemere na mantha. Iye ambakhala pampando wache wachifumu padzulu pa pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido tenepo dziko yapansi ikutekenyeka. 
Psalms99:2 MBUYA ngwamphamvu mumzinda wa Zioni; iye ndi mfumu wamkululetu pa madzinza onsene. 
Psalms99:3 Munthu onsene anakuza dzinache ikulu, pontho ya kugopeka. Nyakuchena ndiye!" 
Psalms99:4 Mfumu wamphamvu zonsene, imwe mumbafuna pinthu pyakulungama; imwe mwakhazikisa chilungamo m'dziko ya Israele; imwe mwadzesa pyakulungama pontho kutonga mseru mwakukhonda yang'ana nkhope." 
Psalms99:5 Kuzani MBUYA Mulungu wathu; mpembedzeni pamaso pa mpando wache wachifumu! Nyakuchena ndiye! 
Psalms99:6 Mose na Aroni akhali anyansembe ache, pontho Samuele akhali munthu mbodzi ule adapemphera kuna iye; iwo adachemera MBUYA, tenepo iye adaatawira." 
Psalms99:7 Iye adalonga kuna iwo na mumzati wa makole; iwo adavera mwambo na matongero ache adaapasa iye ale. 
Psalms99:8 MBUYA, Mulungu wathu, imwe mudatawira anthu anu; imwe mudaaonesa kuti ndimwe Mulungu, nyakulekerera pyakudawa, podi kwene kuti imwe mudaatchunyusa thangwi ya pyakudawa pyawo." 
Psalms99:9 Kuzani MBUYA, Mulungu wathu, pontho mpembedzeni paphiri yache yakupambulika! MBUYA Mulungu wathu ngwakuchena." 
Psalms100:1 Imbira MBUYA, iwe dziko yonsene yapansi!" 
Psalms100:2 Pembedza MBUYA na kukomerwa; idza pamaso pache na nyimbo zakukomerwa! 
Psalms100:3 Pidziwe kuti MBUYA ndi Mulungu. Iye adatisasanya, tenepo ife ndife ache; ife ndife anthu ache, ndife mkumbi wache." 
Psalms100:4 Pitani m'misuwo ya Nyumba ya Mulungu na kupereka takhuta, pitani mupintalo pya Nyumbache na kumkuza. Perekani takhuta kuna iye, pontho mkuzeni." 
Psalms100:5 MBUYA ngwadidi; kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala, pontho kukhulupirika kwache nkhwakukhala na kukhala." 
Psalms101:1 Ndinaimba kuna imwepo, MBUYA pya kukhulupirika na chilungamo; ndinaimba nyimbo zakukukuzani nazo." 
Psalms101:2 Ndinachita mphole-mphole kuti makhaliro anga akhale akusowa chinthu chakupokanyisa. Munabwera lini kuna ine? Ndinakhala na moyo wangwiro m'nyumba mwanga," 
Psalms101:3 pontho ine nkhabe dzaphatizana na pyakuipa tayu. Ndimbazonda makhaliro a anthu ambakukhondani ale; ine nkhabeve dzachita nawo pinthu tayu. 
Psalms101:4 Sinakhala munthu wa manyerezero akupotoka tayu, nkhabeve pinthu na kuchita pyakuipa tayu." 
Psalms101:5 Munthu onsene wakulonga tsweda tsanthembache ine ndinammatamisa; ine nkhabe dzatawirisa munthu wakudungudza, pontho wakutumbama tayu." 
Psalms101:6 Ndinasankhula anthu akukhulupirika m'dziko muno kukhala pabodzi na ine m'nyumbanga yachifumu. Anyakukhala na makhaliro akusowa chinthu chakupokanyisa anatawiriswa kunditumikira. 
Psalms101:7 Nkhabe nyakunama anakhala m'nyumbanga yachifumu tayu; nkhabe mfaka-faka anaimira pamaso panga tayu. 
Psalms101:8 Nsiku na nsiku ndinavunga anyakudawika m'dziko mwathu; ndinalekesa anyakuipa onsene kukhala mumzinda wa MBUYA. 
Psalms102:1 Ivani kupemphera kwanga, MBUYA, pontho ivani chiliro changa kufuna chiphedzo!" 
Psalms102:2 Ndingakhala panyatwa, lekani kundibisira nkhope yanu! Ndivesereni, pontho chimbizani kunditawira ndingakuchemerani." 
Psalms102:3 Moyo wanga ukumala ninga utsi; magogodo anga akugaka ninga moto. 
Psalms102:4 Mtimanga ukupondedzwa ninga maudzu akuuma pontho akuunyala; ine nkhabe chikhumbo chakufuna kudya tayu. 
Psalms102:5 Na thangwi ya kubulira mwakugaluza fala, ine ndachita sala kwene khanda na magogodo ene basi." 
Psalms102:6 Ndakhala ninga malezi m'thando yatchetcha, ninga dzidzi pamadembe." 
Psalms102:7 Ine nkhabe gona chitulo tayu, ndakhala ninga mbalame yakukhala yokha pansoyi ya nyumba." 
Psalms102:8 Nsiku yonsene anyamalwanga ambanditikana; anyakundiselusa ambaphatisa basa dzinanga kutemberera nayo. 
Psalms102:9 Na thangwi ya kuzhangali, pontho ukali wanu, kudya kwanga ndi dotha, pontho misozi yanga yavunganizikana na pyakumwa pyanga. Imwe mudandilokota mbamunditaya kunja." 
Psalms102:10  
Psalms102:11 Nsiku za moyo wanga zakhala ninga mthunzi wakumawulo; ine ndikuunyala ninga maudzu. 
Psalms102:12 Mbwenye imwe, MBUYA, ndimwe mfumu wakukhala na kukhala; mifendu yonsene inakukumbukani." 
Psalms102:13 Imwe munaonekera mbamuvera nsisi mzinda wa Zioni; thangwi ndzidzi wafika wakuti ndimvere nsisi; ndzidzi wakusankhulika wafika. 
Psalms102:14 Anyabasanu ambamfuna, podi kwene kuti iye avungika; iwo akumvera basi nsisi, podi kwene kuti iye asala madembe." 
Psalms102:15 Madzinza anagopa MBUYA; mafumu onsene a padziko yapansi anagopa demelero yache. 
Psalms102:16 MBUYA angamanga pontho mzinda wa Zioni, iye anaoneka na demelero yache." 
Psalms102:17 Iye anava kupemphera kwa anyakusowaletu pakuphata ale; iye nkhabe dzakhonda kuatawira tayu. 
Psalms102:18 Lembera mfendu unadzawo pinthu pyachita MBUYA, towera anthu adzati balwa ale amkuze." 
Psalms102:19 MBUYA adayang'ana pansi kubulukira pa mbuto yache yakuchena kudzulu, iye adayang'ana padziko yapansi kubulukira kudzulu." 
Psalms102:20 Iye adava kubulira kwa anyaperezo mbasudzula anthu adatongwa kuti aphiwe ale. 
Psalms102:21 Natenepo dzinache inalalikwa mumzinda wa Zioni, pontho iye anakuzwa mumzinda wa Yerusalemu" 
Psalms102:22 madzinza na maufumu angadza pabodzi mbapembedza MBUYA. 
Psalms102:23 Iye andichitisa kuti ndikhonde khala na mphamvu mwenemo ndili mphale; iye avilisa nsiku za moyo wanga. 
Psalms102:24 Mulungu, lekani kundibulusa pansi pano mbandidzati kalamba. Ndimwe wakukhala na kukhala;" 
Psalms102:25 kale ene imwe mudalenga dziko yapansi, pontho na manjanu mudasasanya kudzulu." 
Psalms102:26 Ipyo pinamala, mbwenye imwe munakhalapo; ipyo pinasakala ninga nguwo. Imwe munaakunundula ninga nguwo mbamaliratu." 
Psalms102:27 Mbwenye imwe ndzidzi onsene nkhabe sanduka tayu, pontho moyo wanu nkhabeve mala tayu." 
Psalms102:28 Anathu anakhala mwakuyang'anirwa mwadidi na imwe, pidzukulu pyawo pinakhala pyakukhazikika pamaso panu." 
Psalms103:1 Kuza MBUYA, moyo wanga! Mtimanga onsene kuza dzinache yakuchena!" 
Psalms103:2 Kuza MBUYA, moyo wanga, pontho leka duwalira kukoma kwache mtima." 
Psalms103:3 Iye ambalekerera pyakudawa pyanga pyonsene mbawangisa utendanga onsene. 
Psalms103:4 Iye ambandiombola kuti ndileke pita m'masiye mbanditsanzayisa na kundifuna kwache kokhonda mala pontho na nsisi zache. 
Psalms103:5 Iye ambadzaza moyo wanga na pinthu pyadidi, towera ndithimize kukhala mphale, pontho wamphamvu ninga mphamba." 
Psalms103:6 MBUYA ambatonga miseru ya anyakubonereswa mwakuakomera mbaapasa ufulu wawo papinthu. 
Psalms103:7 Iye adatchululira Mose njira zache mbaonesa anthu a ku Israele mabasache amphamvu. 
Psalms103:8 MBUYA ngwansisi pontho wakukoma mtima, ngwakusowa chipsu, pontho wakudzala na kutifuna kokhonda mala." 
Psalms103:9 Iye ndzidzi onsene hanalongera anthu tayu, penu kukoya kuzhangali kwache kwenda na kwenda." 
Psalms103:10 Iye nkhabe kutitchunyusa mwakuthemerana na kudawa kwathu, penu tibwezera mwakuthemerana na umambalathu tayu." 
Psalms103:11 Ninga kulapha kwachita kuthambo kubulukira pansi pano, ndi sasawambo na kuafuna kwache kokhonda mala pana ambamulemedza ale." 
Psalms103:12 Ninga kulapha kwachita kumabulukiro dzuwa kufikirana kumadokero dzuwa, pili tenepombo na kutibulusira kwache pyakudawa pyathu." 
Psalms103:13 Ninga baba ngwakuva nyambalo na anache, sasawambo MBUYA ngwakuva nyambalo na anthu ambamgopa ale." 
Psalms103:14 Iye ambadziwa mudasasanyirwa ife mule; iye ambakumbuka kuti ndife fumbi. 
Psalms103:15 Kuna ifembo, moyo wathu wakhala ninga maudzu. Timbakula na kuchita maluwa ninga pyakumera;" 
Psalms103:16 tenepo pimbamenywa na mphepo, mbapimala, nkhabe na mbodzi ene ambapiona pontho tayu." 
Psalms103:17 Mbwenye kuna anyakulemedza MBUYA kuafuna kwache nkhokhonda mala, pontho udidi wache umbakhala ndzidzi onsene kuna mifendu" 
Psalms103:18 ya ale ambakoya chiverano chache, pontho ale ambavera pifunziso pyache mwakukhulupirika." 
Psalms103:19 MBUYA adakhazikisa mpando wache wachifumu kudzulu; iye ndi mfumu padziko yonsene yapansi. 
Psalms103:20 Kuzani MBUYA, imwe angelo onsene amphamvu, ambavesa matongero ache ale, ambavesera pinalonga iye ale." 
Psalms103:21 Kuzani MBUYA, imwe anyamphamvu monsene akudzulu, imwe anyabasache, anyakuchita pinafuna iye ale!" 
Psalms103:22 Kuzani MBUYA, imwe pyakulengwa pyache pyonsene kumbuto zonsene zimbatonga iye. Kuzani MBUYA, moyo wanga!" 
Psalms104:1 Kuza MBUYA, moyo wanga! MBUYA Mulungu wanga, ndimwe wamkulu pyakwanga! Imwe mwavala demelero na ufumu;" 
Psalms104:2 imwe mwapifinikiza mwekha ene na cheza ninga chakufinika. Imwe mudafuthula kudzulu ninga khumbi 
Psalms104:3 mbamuikha mitandaliko ya musanu pamadzi. Imwe mumbaphatisa basa makole ninga chingolo chanu mbamupakira pamaphaphido a mphepo. 
Psalms104:4 Imwe mumbaphatisa basa mphepo kukhala anyamphangwanu, pontho malulume a moto kukhala anyabasanu." 
Psalms104:5 Imwe mwachitisa kuti dziko ikhazikike pamaziko ache, tenepo iyo nkhabe dzatekenyeka tayu." 
Psalms104:6 Imwe mudavazika dziko yapansi na madzi makulu ninga mkhanjo, pontho mudaphimbira mapiri." 
Psalms104:7 Ndzidzi udalongera imwe madzi, iwo adathawa; iwo adathawa mwakuchimbiza pidava iwo falanu kuguma ninga chiphaliwali." 
Psalms104:8 Iwo adakuka m'mapiri na m'maphedi, kumbuto zikhadaasasanyira imwe zile." 
Psalms104:9 Imwe mudaagwandira madire kuti aleke kwanisa kuwambukira kukhundu inango, towera aleke phimbira pontho dziko yapansi." 
Psalms104:10 Imwe mumbachitisa mphuno za madzi kutumbuka m'maphedi, pontho mikulo mbikuka pakati pa mapiri," 
Psalms104:11 Iyo idachitisa kuti nyama zam'tsanga zigumane madzi; mwenemo mabulu am'tsanga adamalisa nyota. 
Psalms104:12 Mbalame zimbamanga pisa pyawo m'khundu mwa madzi mbaziimba m'nthambi za miti. 
Psalms104:13 Kubulukira kumusa kwanu imwe mudavumbisa mvula m'mapiri, tenepo dziko yapansi yakhuta na nsapo za mabasache." 
Psalms104:14 Imwe mumbachitisa maudzu kumera kuti ng'ombe zigumane kudya, pontho mbewu kuti munthu alime mbagumana phoso padziko yapansi:" 
Psalms104:15 kuti pakhale vinyu, towera akomerwe, miti yaolivi, towera nkhope yache imusire, mkate, towera umpase mphamvu." 
Psalms104:16 Miti yamkungudza ya ku Lebanoni imbavata, miti ya MBUYA idabzala iye ile." 
Psalms104:17 Mwenemo mbalame zimbamanga pisa pyawo; chidokowe chimbamanga nsanja pansonga pa miti yamkungudza. 
Psalms104:18 Mbala zimbakhala m'mapiri akulapha, pontho mbira zimbabisala m'nkhwimba kumiyala." 
Psalms104:19 Imwe mudalenga mwezi towera pakhale ndzidzi wa miyezi; dzuwa imbadziwa ndzidzi wakuthobila. 
Psalms104:20 Imwe mudasasanya mosiku, pontho mumdima pinyama pyonsene pyam'tsanga pimbafamba-famba." 
Psalms104:21 Nkhalamu zing'ono zimbabangula zingasaka kudya, kusaka pyakudya kumbapereka Mulungu kule." 
Psalms104:22 Dzuwa ingabuluka, izo zimbabwerera mbizikagona kumbuto zawo." 
Psalms104:23 Tenepo anthu ambaenda m'mabasa mwawo mbathimiza kuphata basa kufikirana mawulo. 
Psalms104:24 MBUYA, imwe mwasasanya pinthu pizinji! Imwe mwapisasanya pyonsenepyo mwanzeru! Dziko yapansi yadzala na pyakulengwa pyanu." 
Psalms104:25 Mwenemo muna bara ikulu, pontho yakugabuka, mule mumbakhala pyakulengwa pyakukhonda lengeseka, pikulu na ping'ono pene." 
Psalms104:26 Miyadiya mikulu-mikulu imbafambapo kwenda na kubwera pontho, Leviatani, nyangume adalenga imwe ule ambasenzekamo." 
Psalms104:27 Onsene a iwo ambanyindira imwepo kuti muapase phoso ndzidzi unasowa iwo. 
Psalms104:28 Imwe mumbaapasa, iwombo ambaidya; imwe mumbapereka phoso, tenepo iwo ambakhuta na pinthu pyadidi." 
Psalms104:29 Mungaabisira nkhope yanu, iwo ambachita mantha; imwe mungaabulusira muyanu, iwo ambafa kubwerera kufumbi kudabulukira iwo kule." 
Psalms104:30 Mbwenye mungatuma Mzimu wanu, iwo ambalengwa; imwe mumbapereka moyo wachinchino kuna dziko yapansi." 
Psalms104:31 Demelero ya MBUYA ikhale kwenda na kwenda! MBUYA akomerwe na pinthu pidasasanya iye! 
Psalms104:32 Iye ambayang'ana padziko yapansi, tenepo dziko imbatetemera; iye ambaphata mapiri, tenepo iwo ambabulusa utsi." 
Psalms104:33 Ndinati ndiimbe kuna MBUYA moyo wanga onsene; ndzidzi unakhala ine na moyo ndinati ndiimbe nyimbo zakukuza nazo Mulungu wanga. 
Psalms104:34 Iye mbakomerwe na nyimbo yanga, thangwi MBUYA ndi phata ya kukomerwa kwanga." 
Psalms104:35 Anyakudawika mbabuluswe pansi pano; anthu akuipa mbaleke khalapove tayu. Kuza MBUYA, moyo wanga! MBUYA mbakuzwe!" 
Psalms105:1 Perekani takhuta kuna MBUYA, pembedzani MBUYA; lalikani kuna madzinza pinthu pyachita iye." 
Psalms105:2 Muimbireni nyimbo zakumkuza nazo; longani pinthu pyakudodomesa pyachita iye. 
Psalms105:3 Mpaseni demelero thangwi iye ngwakuchena; mitima ya onsene ale ambasaka-saka MBUYA mbikomerwe. 
Psalms105:4 Ndokoni kuna MBUYA kuti akuphedzeni; mbamuthimize kufuna kukhala pamaso pache. 
Psalms105:5 Imwe pidzukulu pya Abrahamu, nyabasache; imwe pidzukulu pya Yakobo, munthu adasankhula iye ule: kumbukani pyakudodomesa pyachita Mulungu pile, pontho na kutonga mseru kudachita iye kule." 
Psalms105:6  
Psalms105:7 MBUYA ndi Mulungu wathu; matongero ache ali padziko yonsene yapansi. 
Psalms105:8 Iye anakoya chiverano chache kwenda na kwenda; pinthu pidadumbira iye kuna mifendu chikwi pile. 
Psalms105:9 Iye anakoya chiverano chidachita iye na Abrahamu, pontho pidadumbira iye kuna Isake pile." 
Psalms105:10 MBUYA adachita chiverano na Yakobo, chiverano chakwenda na kwenda chile." 
Psalms105:11 Iye adalonga mbati, “Ndinakupasa dziko ya Kanani; iyo inakhala yako ene.”" 
Psalms105:12 Anthu a Mulungu akhali akuchepa, alendo m'dziko ya Kanani." 
Psalms105:13 Iwo adafamba-famba dziko na dziko, pontho ufumu na ufumu." 
Psalms105:14 Mbwenye Mulungu hadatawirise munthu na mbodzi ene kuapondereza tayu, na thangwi ya iwo, iye adalongera mafumu mbati," 
Psalms105:15 “Lekani kukuwaza anyabasanga akusankhulikawa; lekani khuya maprofeti angawa.” 
Psalms105:16 Iye adagwisa njala ikulu m'dziko mwawo mbaapokosera phoso yawo yonsene. 
Psalms105:17 Mbwenye iye adatuma munthu patsogolo pawo, Yosefe, akhadaguliswa ninga bitchu ule." 
Psalms105:18 Miyendo idamangwa na njema, pontho goli-goli yasimbi ikhali m'khosi mwache," 
Psalms105:19 mpakana pyonsene pikhadalonga iye kuti pinachitika pile pidakwana-kwana. Mafala a MBUYA adamtsikimizira kuti iye akhali wakulungama. 
Psalms105:20 Tenepo mfumu wa dziko ya Iguputo adamsudzulisa, mtongi wa madzinza ndiye adamsudzula." 
Psalms105:21 Iye adamuikha kukhala mkadamu wa boma mbamuikha pontho kukhala mtongi wa dziko yonsene 
Psalms105:22 kukhala na utongi pa mathubu a mfumu, pontho kupereka uphungu kuna akulu-akulu ache." 
Psalms105:23 Tenepo Israele adenda ku Iguputo; Yakobo adakhazikika ninga mlendo m'dziko ya Hamu. 
Psalms105:24 MBUYA adapasa ana azinji anthu ache mbaachitisa kukhala amphamvu kupiringana anyakuapondereza. 
Psalms105:25 Iye adachitisa Aiguputo kuzonda anthu ache, pontho kuverana kuchitira pyakuipa anyabasache." 
Psalms105:26 Tenepo iye adatuma Mose, nyabasache, pontho Aroni, adasankhula iye ule." 
Psalms105:27 Iwo adachita pyakudodomesa pakati pawo mbachita pyakudodomesa m'dziko ya Hamu. 
Psalms105:28 Mulungu adagwisa mdima padziko, kwache anthu a ku Iguputo hadavere tayu matongero ache." 
Psalms105:29 Iye adasanduza mikulo yawo kukhala chiropa mbapha nsomba zonsene mwenemo. 
Psalms105:30 Dziko yawo idadzala na anyanchidwe, anyanchidwewo adadzala na m'nyumba za atongi ene." 
Psalms105:31 Mulungu adatonga kuti pagwe mikumbi ya ntchentche na matchunya m'dziko mwawo monsene. 
Psalms105:32 Iye adagwisa matalala na njazi m'dziko mwawo m'mbuto mwa mvula; 
Psalms105:33 iye adavunga mbewu zawo zamfesa na miti yamkuyu mbagwisa miti yonsene ya m'dziko mwawo. 
Psalms105:34 Iye adatonga kuti nyadzombe adze, tenepo adadzadi okhonda lengeseka;" 
Psalms105:35 nyadzombe adadya pyakumera pyonsene piwisi m'dzikomo; adavunga mbewu zonsene. 
Psalms105:36 Iye adapha ana autombo, ana autombo a m'dzikomo akuonesa mphamvu za umamunawo." 
Psalms105:37 Tenepo iye adatsogolera Aisraele kuabulusa m'dzikomo; iwo adakwata siliva na golidi, pontho onsene akhali akuwanga pontho amphamvu." 
Psalms105:38 Aiguputo akhachita nawo mantha, tenepo iwo adakomerwa pidabuluka iwo." 
Psalms105:39 Mulungu adaaphimba na makole; adaapasa pontho moto towera kuapasa cheza na mosiku. 
Psalms105:40 Iwo adapempha, tenepo iye adaagwisira akambuma mbaapasa pontho pyakudya pya kudzulu towera iwo akhute." 
Psalms105:41 Iye adadidimula mwala, madzi mbakuka kubulukira mwenemo, mbakuka na m'thando yatchetcha ninga mkulowo;" 
Psalms105:42 thangwi iye adakumbuka pyonsene pidadumbira iye kuna Abrahamu, nyabasache." 
Psalms105:43 Tenepo iye adatsogolera anthu ache akusankhulika kuabulusa m'dzikomo, iwombo adaimba na kukhuwa thangwi ya kukomerwa." 
Psalms105:44 Iye adaapasa madziko a madzinza anango mbaachitisa kukwata pinthu pidabonerera anthu anango," 
Psalms105:45 towera anthu ache avere pifunziso pyache mbakoya mwambo wache onsene. MBUYA mbakuzwe! 
Psalms106:1 MBUYA mbakuzwe! Perekani takhuta kuna MBUYA, thangwi iye ngwadidi; kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala." 
Psalms106:2 Mbani anakwanisa kulonga pinthu pyamphamvu pyachita MBUYA? Mbani anakwanisa kumkuza mwakukwanadi? 
Psalms106:3 Ngakutsanzaya ale ambavera matongero ache, ale ndzidzi onsene ambachita pyakulungama." 
Psalms106:4 Ndikumbukenimbo, MBUYA, ndzidzi unakomera imwe mtima anthu anu; ndiphedzenimbo ine ndzidzi unaapulumusa imwe." 
Psalms106:5 Ndichitiseni kukomerwa na kufamba mwadidi kwa pinthu pya anthu anu akusankhulika, kuti ndikwate khundu pa kukomerwa kwa dzinzanu, pontho kukhala pabodzi na anthu anu ndzidzi unakukuzani iwo." 
Psalms106:6 Ife tadawa ninga mudachitirambo makolo athu; ife ndife akudawika pontho tachita pyakuipa. 
Psalms106:7 Makolo athu m'dziko ya Iguputo hadavese tayu pyakudodomesa pidachita Mulungu; iwo adaduwalira ndzidzi uzinji udaaonesa iye kuafuna kwache kokhonda mala, pontho iwo adapandukira Nyakudzulu-dzulu pa Nyanza Yakufira." 
Psalms106:8 Mbwenye iye adaapulumusa ninga mukhadadumbira iye, towera kuonesa mphamvu zache zikulu." 
Psalms106:9 Iye adatonga Nyanza Yakufira, tenepo madzi adauma; iye adawambusira anthu na pakuumapo." 
Psalms106:10 Iye adaapulumusa kuna anthu akhaazonda ale; iye adaaombola kuna anyamalwawo. 
Psalms106:11 Mbwenye madzi adabiza anyamalwawo; nkhabe na mbodzi ene adasala okhonda kufa tayu. 
Psalms106:12 Penepo anthu ache adakhulupira pinthu pidadumbira iye pile mbamuimbira nyimbo zakumkuza nazo. 
Psalms106:13 Mbwenye iwo hadadembuke tayu kuduwalira pinthu pikhadachita iye pile mbakhonda dikhira kuti iye aapangize machitiro ache. 
Psalms106:14 M'thando yatchetcha mule iwo adadzazwa na manyerezero akuipa mbayesa Mulungu; 
Psalms106:15 natenepo iye adaapasa pinthu pidapempha iwopyo, kwache adagwisa pakati pawo utenda wakupakatisa manungo." 
Psalms106:16 M'thandomo iwo adachita bivu na Mose pontho Aroni, nyabasa wakupambulika wa MBUYA." 
Psalms106:17 Tenepo dziko yapansi idayashamula mbikhudyula Datani, pontho mbifikhira Abiramu na banjache;" 
Psalms106:18 moto udagwa pana anyakuatewera mbupisa anthu akudawika ale. 
Psalms106:19 Iwo adasasanya na golidi mwanamphulu pa Phiri ya Sinai mbapembedza mfanikizowo; 
Psalms106:20 iwo adachinjisa demelero ya Mulungu na mfanikizo wa nyama yakudya maudzu. 
Psalms106:21 Iwo adaduwalira Mulungu akhadaapulumusa ule pakuchita pinthu pikulu m'dziko ya Iguputo," 
Psalms106:22 pinthu pyakudodomesa pyakwanga m'dziko ya Hamu, pinthu pyakudodomesa pa Nyanza Yakufira!" 
Psalms106:23 Pidalonga Mulungu kuti iye akhafuna kuvunga anthu ache, nyabasache wakusankhulika, Mose, ndiye akhali nyakukhala pakati pa Mulungu na anthu ache mbambombowesa ukali wache ukhafuna iye kuavunga nawo ule." 
Psalms106:24 Tenepo iwo adakhonda dziko yakukoma, thangwi iwo hadakhulupire tayu kudumbira kudachita Mulungu kule." 
Psalms106:25 Iwo adakhala m'makumbi mwawo kudungunya mbakhonda vera MBUYA. 
Psalms106:26 Natenepo iye adaacheuza pikulu pene kuti iye anaachitisa kufa m'thando yatchetcha mule 
Psalms106:27 mbabalalisa pidzukulu pyawo pakati pa madzinza okhonda dziwa Mulungu, mbaachitisa kufera m'madziko achilendo." 
Psalms106:28 Tenepo pambuto ya Peori, anthu a Mulungu adaphatizana nawo kupembedza milungu Baala, mbadya nawo nsembe zakuperekwa kuna milungu yakufa." 
Psalms106:29 Iwo adalamusa ukali wa MBUYA na pinthu pidachita iwopyo, mbapagwa muliri wakugoswa pakati pawo." 
Psalms106:30 Mbwenye Finiasi adalamuka mbaatchunyusa thangwi ya kudawako, tenepo muliriwo udamala." 
Psalms106:31 Penepi pidamchitira umboni kuti iye ngwakulungama, pontho pinakhalapo kwenda na kwenda, mifendu yonsene inafuna kudzayo." 
Psalms106:32 Pamphuno za madzi pa Meriba anthu adazhangalisa MBUYA, tenepo Mose akhali panyatwa thangwi ya iwo." 
Psalms106:33 Iwo adamzhangalisa pyakwanga Mose mwakuti iye adalonga pyache nyamphotcho-photcho. 
Psalms106:34 Iwo hadaphe madzinza okhonda dziwa Mulungu tayu ninga mudapangira MBUYA kuti iwo apichite," 
Psalms106:35 mbwenye iwo adasemberana nawo mbakwata makhaliro awo akuipa. 
Psalms106:36 Anthu a Mulungu adapembedza nawo mifanikizo, pile pidakhala msampha kuna iwo." 
Psalms106:37 Iwo adapereka nsembe anawo achimuna na achikazi kuna mizimu yakuipa ya m'dziko ya Kanani. 
Psalms106:38 Iwo adachuchisa chiropa cha anawo okhonda dawa, chiropa cha anawo achimuna na achikazi, adapereka iwo ninga nsembe kuna milungu ya ku Kanani ale, tenepo dzikoyo idaswipiswa na mphanduzo." 
Psalms106:39 Iwo adapiswipisa okha ene na mabasawo pidachita iwo mbakhala anthu akuchita pyauputa pamaso pa Mulungu. 
Psalms106:40 Tenepo MBUYA adazhangalira anthu ache; iye adanyansirwa na dzinzache yakusankhulika. 
Psalms106:41 Iye adaapereka pyache m'manja mwa madzinza okhonda dziwa Mulungu, pontho anyamalwawo adaatonga." 
Psalms106:42 Iwo adaponderezwa na anyamalwawo mbaikhwa pansi pa utongi wawo. 
Psalms106:43 Kazinji kene iye adapulumusa anthu ache, kwache iwo adasankhula pyawo kumpandukira mbalilima m'pyakudawa pyawo." 
Psalms106:44 Kwache iye akhaava ndzidzi ukhalira iwo mbaona nyatwa zawo. 
Psalms106:45 Thangwi ya iwo iye adakumbuka chiverano chache, pontho thangwi ya kuafuna kwache kokhonda mala iye adambombowesa ukali wache." 
Psalms106:46 Iye adachitisa anyakuapondereza onsene kuavera nsisi. 
Psalms106:47 Tipulumuseni, MBUYA, Mulungu wathu, pontho tibwezeni kutibulusa pakati pa madzinza, towera tipereke takhuta kuna imwe mbatikuza dzinanu yakuchena." 
Psalms106:48 Mkuzeni MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele; mkuzeni chinchino pontho kwenda na kwenda! Munthu onsene alonge mbati, “Ameni!” MBUYA mbakuzwe!" 
Psalms107:1 “Perekani takhuta kuna MBUYA, thangwi iye ngwadidi; kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala.”" 
Psalms107:2 Anyakuombolwa na MBUYA onsene alonge penepi, ale adaombola iye m'manja mwa anyakuazonda," 
Psalms107:3 ale adabweza iye kubulukira kuna madziko achilendo, kubulukira kumabulukiro dzuwa na kumadokero dzuwa, kubulukira kumwera na kumpoto." 
Psalms107:4 Anango akhatsalakatika pyawo m'thando yatchetcha mbachimwana kugumana njira yakwendera kumzinda kukhafuna iwo kukhazikika kule. 
Psalms107:5 Iwo akhali na njala pontho nyota mbatayiratu mtima. 
Psalms107:6 Tenepo pandzidzi wawo wa nyatwa iwo adachemera MBUYA; iyembo adaabulusira pyakutsukwalisa pyawo. 
Psalms107:7 Iye adaatsogolera m'njira yakuongoka, kwenda nawo kumzinda kukhafuna iwo khazikika kule." 
Psalms107:8 Iwo athema kupereka takhuta kuna MBUYA thangwi ya kuafuna kwache kukhonda mala, pontho thangwi ya pyakudodomesa pimbachitira iye anthu." 
Psalms107:9 Iye ambamwesa anyakuva nyota mbakhutisa anyakuva njala na pinthu pyadidi. 
Psalms107:10 Anango akhakhala mumdima pontho akhatsukwala, anyaperezo kusanyika na njema," 
Psalms107:11 thangwi iwo akhadapandukira matongero a Mulungu, pontho akhadakhonda uphungu wa Nyakudzulu-dzulu." 
Psalms107:12 Iwo adakotola mtimawo na mabasa akupha; iwo akhagwa, tenepo nee mbodzi adaaphedza tayu." 
Psalms107:13 Tenepo pandzidzi wawo wa nyatwa iwo adachemera MBUYA; iyembo adaabulusira pyakutsukwalisa pyawo. 
Psalms107:14 Iye adaabulusira mdima, pontho kutsukwala kwawo mbaswa njema zawo." 
Psalms107:15 Iwo athema kupereka takhuta kuna MBUYA thangwi ya kutifuna kwache kokhonda mala, pontho thangwi ya pyakudodomesa pimbachitira iye anthu." 
Psalms107:16 Iye ambaswa misuwo yankuwa mbagwanda-gwanda mphinga yasimbi. 
Psalms107:17 Anango adasanduka akupupwa, kuona nyatwa thangwi ya pyakudawa pyawo, pontho thangwi ya pyakuipa pyawo;" 
Psalms107:18 iwo adasikuka mtima na kuona phoso, pontho akhali chifupi na imfa." 
Psalms107:19 Tenepo pandzidzi wawo wa nyatwa iwo adachemera MBUYA; iyembo adaabulusira pyakutsukwalisa pyawo. 
Psalms107:20 Iye adaawangisa na mafala ache mbaapulumusa kuna masiye. 
Psalms107:21 Iwo athema kupereka takhuta kuna MBUYA thangwi ya kuafuna kwache kokhonda mala, pontho thangwi ya pyakudodomesa pimbachitira iye anthu." 
Psalms107:22 Iwo athema kupereka takhuta kuna iye na nsembe; na nyimbo zakukomerwa nazo iwo athema kulonga pyonsene pyachita iye. 
Psalms107:23 Anango adenda pabara na miyadiya mikulu-mikulu mbakhala anyamalonda pamadzi amphamvu. 
Psalms107:24 Iwo adaona pinthu pinakwanisa MBUYA kuchita, mabasache akudodomesa pabara." 
Psalms107:25 Iye adatonga, tenepo mphepo yakugoswa idagwa mbilamusa mabimbi." 
Psalms107:26 Miyadiya idathukuka m'dzulu mbibizwa pansi mwakuzwika. Pa nyatwa ninga zenezi amuna adataya mtima," 
Psalms107:27 iwo adagwegweduka mbadzedzereka ninga anyakuledzera; luso yawo yonsene ikhali yakusowa basa. 
Psalms107:28 Tenepo pandzidzi wawo wa nyatwa iwo adachemera MBUYA; iyembo adaabulusira pyakutsukwalisa pyawo. 
Psalms107:29 Iye adamatamisa chonzi chakugoswa, tenepo mabimbi adamatama." 
Psalms107:30 Iwo adakomerwa pyakwanga thangwi ya kumatamako, tenepo iye adaadzesa mwadidi mpakana pagombe pakhafuna iwo pale." 
Psalms107:31 Iwo athema kupereka takhuta kuna MBUYA thangwi ya kuafuna kwache kokhonda mala, pontho thangwi ya pyakudodomesa pimbachitira iye anthu." 
Psalms107:32 Iwo athema kulalika pya ukulu wache pambuto panagumanyikana anthu ache, pontho amkuze pamaso pathando ya akulu-akulu." 
Psalms107:33 Iye adachitisa mikulo kuuma kakata mbalekesa mphuno za madzi kubulusa madzi. 
Psalms107:34 Iye adachitisa mataka akubalisa pinthu kusanduka thando yamunyu thangwi ya kudawika kwa anthu akhakhala mwenemo. 
Psalms107:35 Iye adasanduza mathando atchetcha kukhala mathawale a madzi, mbuto zakuuma kukhala mphuno za madzi." 
Psalms107:36 Iye adachitisa anthu anjala kakhazikika mwenemo mbamanga mzinda wakuti akhalemo. 
Psalms107:37 Iwo adalima minda mbabzalamo mfesa, mbavuna pyakuinjipa." 
Psalms107:38 Iye adatsanzayisa anthu ache, tenepo iwo adabala ana azinji; iye adachitisa mikumbi ya ng'ombe zawo kuti ileke punguzika." 
Psalms107:39 Pidakundwa anthu a Mulungu, pontho kuchitiswa manyadzo na kuponderezwa na nyatwa zikulu," 
Psalms107:40 iye adaipirwa na pidachita anyakuapondereza mbaachitisa kutsalakatika pyawo m'thando yatchetcha. 
Psalms107:41 Mbwenye iye adapulumusa anyakusowa pinthu kuna pyakutsukwalisa pyawo mbachitisa mabanjawo kuthimizirika ninga mikumbi. 
Psalms107:42 Anyakulungama ambapiona penepi mbakomerwa, mbwenye anyakudawika onsene ambaphopha mulomo wawo." 
Psalms107:43 Anthu anzeru aikhe mumtima pinthu penepi; iwo anyerezere pya kuafuna kokhonda mala kwa MBUYA. 
Psalms108:1 Mtimanga wakhazikika, Mulungu, mtimanga wakhazikika! Ndinati ndikuimbireni, pontho kukukuzani! Galamuka moyo wanga!" 
Psalms108:2 Lamukani, nyakatangale wanga na malimbanga! Ndinati ndilamuse dzuwa." 
Psalms108:3 Ndinati ndipereke takhuta kuna imwe, MBUYA, pakati pa madzinza. Ndinati ndikukuzeni pakati pa anthu onsene." 
Psalms108:4 Kundifuna kwanu kokhonda mala kwafika mpakana kudzulu; kukhulupirika kwanu kwaphata thambo. 
Psalms108:5 Mulungu onesani ukulu wanu kuthambo, pontho demelero yanu padziko yonsene yapansi." 
Psalms108:6 Tipulumuseni na mphamvu zanu zikulu; ivani kupemphera kwathu, towera anthu anafuna imwe apulumuke." 
Psalms108:7 Kubulukira kumbuto yache yakuchena Mulungu alonga mbati, “thangwi ya kukunda kwanga ndinagawa Shekemu, pontho ndinagawa phedi ya Sukoti kuna anthu anga." 
Psalms108:8 Gileadi na Manase ene nganga; Eferemu ndiye chipewu changa chachisimbi, pontho Yuda ndiye ndodo yanga yachifumu." 
Psalms108:9 Mbwenye ndinaphatisa basa Moabu ninga nkhali yakusambira, pontho ndinaponya nkhwaira zanga pana Edomu, kukhala chidzindikiro kuti ngwanga. Ine ndinakhuwa kuonesa kukunda kwanga Afilisti.”" 
Psalms108:10 Mbani Mulungu anandipitisa mumzinda wakutchingwa na mpanda? Mbani anandiphata nsenji kwenda ku Edomu? 
Psalms108:11 Kadi imwe mwatikhonda? Kadi imwe nkhabe kwenda pabodzi na anyankhondo athu tayu? 
Psalms108:12 Tiphedzenimbo kumenyana na anyamalwathu; chiphedzo cha munthu nkhabe basabi. 
Psalms108:13 Mbwenye Mulungu angakhala kukhundu kwathu tinati tipikwanise; iye anakunda anyamalwathu. 
Psalms109:1 Ndikukukuzani imwe, Mulungu; lekani khala mulomo phoo!" 
Psalms109:2 Anyakudawika na anyakunama ambandilongera pyakuipa; iwo andilongera pyakunama," 
Psalms109:3 pontho ambalonga mafala akuonesa kundizonda kwawo mbandizungulira kundiphata okhonda na thangwi ene. 
Psalms109:4 Iwo akundipokanya, podi kwene kuti ine ndimbaafuna, pontho ine ndaapempherera." 
Psalms109:5 Iwo akubwezera pyakuipa pa chadidi, pontho chizondi pa kuafuna kwanga." 
Psalms109:6 Iwo akulonga kuti, “Sankhulani atongi a manyerezero akupotoka kuti amtonge mseru, pontho tawirisani anyamalwache kumsumira." 
Psalms109:7 Iye angatongwa mseru mbagumanwe wakudawa; kupemphera kwache mbakumchitise kukonwa! 
Psalms109:8 Moyo wache chinchino mbumale; munthu unango mbakwate basache! 
Psalms109:9 Anache mbasanduke akusowa baba, pontho mkazache mbakhale mamfelwa!" 
Psalms109:10 Anache mbasanduke manzenza akupemphesa, iwo mbathamangiswe m'madembe munakhala iwomo!" 
Psalms109:11 Anyamangawache mbakwate mfumache yonsene, pontho alendo mbakwate pyonsene pidaphatira iwo basa." 
Psalms109:12 Munthu unango mbaleke kumkomerave mtima, penu kutsalakana ana akusowa baba ambasiya iye ale." 
Psalms109:13 Pidzukulu pyache pyonsene mbapife, pontho dzinache mbiduwalike kubulukira mfendu unadzawo." 
Psalms109:14 MBUYA mbakumbuke pyakuipa pya makolo ache, pontho mbaleke lekererave pyakudawa pya mache." 
Psalms109:15 MBUYA ndzidzi onsene mbakumbuke pyakudawa pyawo, mbwenye iwo okha ene mbaduwalike monsene mwene!" 
Psalms109:16 “Pyakukomera mtima anthu anango iye nkhabe kupiikha konta tayu; mbwenye iye akhasanyisa mbapha atcherengi, anyakusowa pinthu na anyakukhondwa." 
Psalms109:17 Kutemberera kukhali kudya kwache, iyembo mbatembererwe! Iye akhazonda kutsanzayisa anango, mbapaleke khalambo munthu na mbodzi ene wakumtsanzayisa!" 
Psalms109:18 Iye akhavala kutemberera ninga nguwo; kutemberera kwacheko kumwerera m'manungo mwache ninga madzi, pontho m'magogodo mwache ninga mafuta!" 
Psalms109:19 Ipyo mbapimfinikize ninga nguwo, pontho ndzidzi onsene mbapimzungulire ninga bande!”" 
Psalms109:20 MBUYA, tchunyusani anyamalwanga ninga monthomo, ale ambandilongera pyakuipa ninga penepi!" 
Psalms109:21 Mbwenye MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, ndiphedzeni, towera dzinanu itambire chilemedzo, ndipulumuseni thangwi ya udidi wanu, pontho kundifuna kwanu kokhonda mala." 
Psalms109:22 Ndine mtcherengi pontho nyakusowa pinthu; ndakuwazika mpakana pansi pa mtimanga. 
Psalms109:23 Ninga mthunzi wa kumawulo, ine ndasala chifupi kumala; ine ndagwinywa na mphepo ninga nyadzombe." 
Psalms109:24 Mabondo anga ngakusowa mphamvu thangwi ya kusowa kudya; ndasala kwene khanda na magogodo ene basi. 
Psalms109:25 Anthu angandiona ambandiseka; ambandipidula mbandisedegula. 
Psalms109:26 Ndiphedzeni, MBUYA Mulungu wanga; thangwi ya kundifuna kwanu kokhonda mala, ndipulumusenimbo ine!" 
Psalms109:27 Chitisani anyamalwanga kudziwa kuti imwe, MBUYA, ndimwe nyakundipulumusa." 
Psalms109:28 Iwo anakwanisa kunditemberera, mbwenye imwe munanditsanzayisa. Anyakundisanyisawo mbakundwe, pontho ine, nyabasanu, ndikomerwe." 
Psalms109:29 Anyamalwanga aphimbirwe na kululupiswa; iwo avale manyadzo awo ninga mkhanjo. 
Psalms109:30 Ndinagaluza fala kupereka takhuta kuna MBUYA; ndinamkuza pambuto panagumanyikana anthu azinjipo," 
Psalms109:31 thangwi iye ambatchinjiriza nyakutcherenga mbampulumusa kuna ale ambamtonga kuti aphiwe. 
Psalms110:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mbuyanga mbati, “Khala pano kumadyo kwanga kufikirana ndiikhe anyamalwako pansi pa manyalo ako.”" 
Psalms110:2 Kubulukira ku Zioni MBUYA anakulisa mphamvu za ufumu wanu. Iye alonga mbati, “Khala na utongi pa anyamalwako!”" 
Psalms110:3 Pansiku imbamenya imwe nkhondo na anyamalwanu, anthu anu anakuphedzani mwakupipereka. Ninga bume kumachibese aphale anu anabwera kuna imwe kumapiri akupambulika." 
Psalms110:4 MBUYA adadumbira pikulu pene tenepo iye nkhabe dzaleka chita pidadumbira iyepyo kuti: “Iwe unakhala nyansembe kwenda na kwenda panyandandanda wa unyansembe wa Melekizedeki”. 
Psalms110:5 Mbuya ali kumadyo kwanu; iye angazhangali, anakunda mafumu." 
Psalms110:6 Iye anatonga mseru madzinza mbadzaza mbuto zakumenyera nkhondo zonsene na mitembo; iye anakunda mafumu a padziko yonsene yapansi. 
Psalms110:7 Mfumuyo anamwa madzi mumkulo m'khundu-khundu mwa njira mbawanga mphamvu, tenepo iye anakhala wakukunda." 
Psalms111:1 MBUYA mbakuzwe! Na mtimanga onsene ndinapereka takhuta kuna MBUYA pambuto panagumanyikana anthu achepo. 
Psalms111:2 Ngakudodomesa pyakwanga mabasa a MBUYA! Anyakuavesa onsene ambakomerwa nawo. 
Psalms111:3 Pyonsene pimbachita iye mphyademelero pontho pyachifumu; kulungama kwache nkhokhonda mala. 
Psalms111:4 MBUYA nkhabe kutitawirisa tayu kuduwalira mabasache akudodomesa; iye ngwakukoma mtima pontho wakuva nyambalo. 
Psalms111:5 Iye ambapereka pyakudya kuna anyakumgopa; iye nkhabe duwalira tayu chiverano chache kwenda na kwenda. 
Psalms111:6 Iye aonesa mphamvu zache kuna anthu ache pakuapasa dziko ya madzinza achilendo. 
Psalms111:7 Papyonsene pimbachita iye, iye ngwakukhulupirika pontho wakulungama; pifunziso pyache pyonsene mphyakunyindirika." 
Psalms111:8 Iwo ngakukhazikika kwenda na kwenda; iwo adaperekwa mwakukhulupirika pontho mwakulungama. 
Psalms111:9 Iye ambaombola anthu ache panyatwa mbachita nawo chiverano chokhonda mala. Nyakuchena pontho nyamphamvu ndiye! 
Psalms111:10 Kugopa MBUYA ndi nthomatoma ya kukhala na nzeru; iye ambapasa kuvesa kuna ambateweza pifunziso pyache ale. Iye athema kukuzwa kwenda na kwenda. 
Psalms112:1 MBUYA mbakuzwe! Ngwakutsanzaya munthu ambagopa MBUYA ule, ule ambakomerwa na kuvera matongero ache." 
Psalms112:2 Anache anakhala amphamvu m'dziko; pidzukulu pyache pinatsanzayiswa. 
Psalms112:3 Kufamba mwadidi kwa pinthu, pontho mfuma pinakhala m'nyumba mwache, kulungama kwache kunakhala kwenda na kwenda." 
Psalms112:4 Cheza chimbamwinikira anthu adidi mumdima, ale ngakukoma mtima, akuva nyambalo pontho akulungama." 
Psalms112:5 Ngwakutsanzaya nyakufewa manja pakufiyalisa, wakuchita pinthu pyache mwachilungamo." 
Psalms112:6 Ndimomwene iye nkhabe dzatekeseka tayu; nyakulungama anakumbukwa ndzidzi onsene. 
Psalms112:7 Iye nkhabe chita mantha tayu na kutambira mphangwa zakutsukwalisa; chikhulupiro chache ntchakuwanga, pontho iye ambanyindira MBUYA." 
Psalms112:8 Iye nkhabe swipa mtima tayu penu kuchita mantha; pakumalisira pache anaona anyamalwache akundwa. 
Psalms112:9 Iye ambapereka mwakufewa manja kuna anyakusowa pinthu; kukoma kwache mtima nkhabe mala tayu; iye anakhala wamphamvu pontho wakulemedzwa. 
Psalms112:10 Anyakudawika anaona penepi mbazhangali; anakikita mano mbakhonda onekave; chidikhiro chawo chamaliratu kwenda na kwenda. 
Psalms113:1 MBUYA mbakuzwe! Imwe anyabasa a MBUYA, kuzani dzina ya MBUYA!" 
Psalms113:2 Dzina ya MBUYA mbikuzwe, chinchino pontho kwenda na kwenda." 
Psalms113:3 Kubulukira kumabulukiro dzuwa mpakana kumadokero dzuwa dzina ya MBUYA mbikuzwe. 
Psalms113:4 MBUYA ambakuzwa pakati pa madzinza onsene; demelero yache ili kudzulu. 
Psalms113:5 Mbani unango ninga MBUYA Mulungu wathu. Nyakukhala pampando wache wachifumu kudzulu," 
Psalms113:6 pontho ule ambakotama kuyang'ana thambo na dziko yapansi pano. 
Psalms113:7 Iye ambalamusa atcherengi pafumbi; anyakusowa iye ambaabulusira pyakutsukwalisa pyawo," 
Psalms113:8 mbaachitisa kukhala ashamwali a mafumu, mafumu a anthu ache." 
Psalms113:9 Iye ambalemedza mkazi wakusowa ana pamusa pache mbamchitisa kukomerwa pakumpasa ana. MBUYA mbakuzwe! 
Psalms114:1 Pidabuluka Aisraele m'dziko ya Iguputo, pidabuluka pidzukulu pya Yakobo m'dziko yachilendoyo," 
Psalms114:2 Yuda adasanduka anthu akuchena a Mulungu, Israele adasanduka anthu ache ene." 
Psalms114:3 Nyanza Yakufira idaona mbithawa; mkulo wa Yorodani udaleka kufamba. 
Psalms114:4 Mapiri adavanduka-vanduka ninga mbuzi; pitunda pidanumpha-numpha ninga ana mabira. 
Psalms114:5 Ninji chidakuchitisa iwe, Nyanza, kuti uthawe? Iwembo, Yorodani, udatani udaleka kufamba?" 
Psalms114:6 Imwe mapiri mwatani mudavanduka-vanduka ninga mbuzi? Imwembo pitunda mwatani mudanumpha-numpha ninga ana mabira? 
Psalms114:7 Tetemera, dziko yapansi, pamaso pa Mbuya, pamaso pa Mulungu wa Yakobo," 
Psalms114:8 ule ambasanduza miyala kukhala mathawale, pontho phanzwi kukhala mphuno za madzi." 
Psalms115:1 Kuna imwe ene basi, MBUYA, kuna imwe ene basi, nee kuna ife tayu, kwathema kuperekwa demelero, thangwi ya kutifuna kwanu kokhonda mala na kukhulupirika kwanu." 
Psalms115:2 Thangwi yache ninji madzinza ativunze mbati, “Ali kupi Mulungu wanu?”" 
Psalms115:3 Mulungu wathu ali kudzulu, iye ambachita pyonsene pimbamkomera." 
Psalms115:4 Milungu yawo njakusasanywa na siliva na golidi, pontho yasasanywa na manja a munthu." 
Psalms115:5 Iyo ina kanwa, kwache longa tayu, ina maso, kwache nkhabe ona tayu." 
Psalms115:6 Iyo ina makutu, kwache nkhabe kuva tayu, ina mphuno, kwache nkhabe nunkhiza tayu." 
Psalms115:7 Iyo ina manja, kwache nkhabe kuva kuti akhuyanji tayu, ina manyalo, kwache nkhabe kufamba tayu; iyo nkhabe bulusa na fala ene tayu." 
Psalms115:8 Onsene adapisasanya na ambapinyindira ale mbasanduke ninga mifanikizo idasasanya iwoyo. 
Psalms115:9 Nyindirani MBUYA, imwe Aisraele. Iye ambakuphedzani na kukutchinjirizani." 
Psalms115:10 Nyindirani MBUYA, imwe pidzukulu pya Aroni. Iye ambakuphedzani na kukutchinjirizani." 
Psalms115:11 Nyindirani MBUYA, monsenene anyakumpembedza. Iye ambakuphedzani na kukutchinjirizani." 
Psalms115:12 MBUYA ambatikumbuka pontho anatitsanzayisa; iye anatsanzayisa Aisraele, pontho na pidzukulu pyonsene pya Aroni." 
Psalms115:13 MBUYA anatsanzayisa anyakumulemedza onsene, anyakuveka pontho na anthu ene pyawo sasawa." 
Psalms115:14 MBUYA mbakupaseni ana azinji, imwe na pidzukulu pyanu!" 
Psalms115:15 Mbamutsanzayiswe na MBUYA, ule adasasanya kudzulu na dziko yapansi!" 
Psalms115:16 Kudzulu nkhwa MBUYA ene basi, mbwenye adapereka dziko yapansi kuna munthu." 
Psalms115:17 Si anyakufa ambakuza MBUYA tayu, nee na mbodzi ene wakwenda kudziko ya chete tayu." 
Psalms115:18 Mbwenye ife, anyakukhala na moyo, tinapereka takhuta kuna iye chinchino pontho kwenda na kwenda. MBUYA mbakuzwe!" 
Psalms116:1 Ndimbamfuna MBUYA, thangwi ambandiva ndingalonga; iye ambavesera kulira kwanga kufuna chiphedzo." 
Psalms116:2 Na thangwi yakuti ambandivesera ndinamchemera nsiku zonsene za moyo wanga. 
Psalms116:3 Misampha ya imfa idandizungulira; kugoswa kwa dziko ya anyakufa kudandifungira; ndidakundwa na mantha pontho kutsukwala. 
Psalms116:4 Tenepo ndidachemera MBUYA kuti, “Ndipulumuseni, MBUYA, ndipulumuseni!”" 
Psalms116:5 MBUYA ngwansisi, pontho wakulungama; Mulungu wathu ngwakuva nyambalo." 
Psalms116:6 MBUYA ambatchinjiriza anthu akupichepesa; ndzidzi ukhali ine panyatwa, iye adandipulumusa." 
Psalms116:7 Khazikika pontho, moyo wanga, thangwi MBUYA andikomera mtima." 
Psalms116:8 Thangwi MBUYA adapulumusa moyo wanga kuimfa; maso anga kuna misozi, pontho manyalo anga kuna kugwegweduka," 
Psalms116:9 towera ndifambe pamaso pa MBUYA, m'dziko ya anthu amoyo." 
Psalms116:10 Ine ndinathimiza kukhulupira, podi kwene kuti ndidalonga kuti, “Ndapeyiwa monsene mwene,”" 
Psalms116:11 podi kwene ndikhali na mantha ndidalonga kuti, “Nkhabe na mbodzi ene anakwanisa kunyindirwa.”" 
Psalms116:12 Ndinaperekanji kuna MBUYA thangwi ya udidi wache onsene kuna ine? 
Psalms116:13 Ndinadza na nsembe ya vinyu kuna MBUYA, kupereka takhuta kuna iye thangwi ya kundipulumusa." 
Psalms116:14 Pambuto panagumanyikana anthu ache onsene ndinampasa pinthu pidadumbira ine kuna MBUYA pile. 
Psalms116:15 Imfa ya anthu ache akuchena njakufunika pyakwanga kuna MBUYA. 
Psalms116:16 Ine ndine nyabasanu, MBUYA; ndimbakutumikirani, ninga mudachitira mamanga. Imwe mwandipulumusa kuimfa." 
Psalms116:17 Ndinapereka nsembe yakupereka nayo takhuta mbandipembedza MBUYA. 
Psalms116:18 Pambuto panagumanyikana anthu anu, pambuto yakuchena ya Nyumbanu mumzinda wa Yerusalemu, ndinakupasani pidadumbira ine kuna MBUYA pile. MBUYA mbakuzwe!" 
Psalms116:19  
Psalms117:1 Kuzani MBUYA, imwe anthu a madziko onsene! Mkuzeni, imwe madzinza onsene!" 
Psalms117:2 Thangwi kutifuna kwache kokhonda mala nkhwamphamvu pyawanga, pontho kukhulupirika kwa MBUYA nkhokhonda mala. MBUYA mbakuzwe!" 
Psalms118:1 Perekani takhuta kuna MBUYA, thangwi iye ngwadidi, pontho kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala." 
Psalms118:2 Anthu a ku Israele mbalonge mbati, “Kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala.”" 
Psalms118:3 Pidzukulu pya Aroni mbipilonge kuti, “Kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala.”" 
Psalms118:4 Onsene anyakupembedza MBUYA alonge mbati, “Kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala.”" 
Psalms118:5 Pandzidzi wanga wakusanyika ndidachemera MBUYA; iye adanditawira pakundisudzula panyatwa. 
Psalms118:6 MBUYA ali kukhundu kwanga, ine nkhabe dzachita mantha tayu; munthu anandichitanji?" 
Psalms118:7 MBUYA ali kukhundu kwanga, iye ndi nyakundiphedza, pontho ndinaona anyamalwanga akukundwa." 
Psalms118:8 Mphyadidi kunyindira MBUYA kusiyana na kunyindira munthu. 
Psalms118:9 Mphyadidi kunyindira MBUYA kusiyana na kunyindira mafumu a padziko yapansi. 
Psalms118:10 Anyamalwa azinji adandizungulira; mbwenye ndidaavunga na mphamvu za MBUYA! 
Psalms118:11 Iwo adandizungulira khundu zonsene; mbwenye ndidaavunga na mphamvu za MBUYA! 
Psalms118:12 Iwo akhali wumbi-wumbi ninga nyuchi, mbwenye adapyerera kabodzi kene ninga lupya; na mphamvu za MBUYA ndidaakunda." 
Psalms118:13 Ndidasoswa mwakugoswa pontho ndikhakundwa, mbwenye MBUYA adandiphedza." 
Psalms118:14 MBUYA ambandichitisa kukhala wamphamvu pontho wakuwanga; iye andipulumusa. 
Psalms118:15 Veserani kukhuwa kwakukomerwa kwa kukunda nako m'makumbi mwa anthu a Mulungu kuti: “Apichita ndi mphamvu za MBUYA! 
Psalms118:16 Mphamvu za MBUYA zachita pinthu pikulu; mkono wamadyo wa MBUYA wakunda!” 
Psalms118:17 Ine nkhabe dzafa tayu; mbwenye ndinakhala na moyo mbandilalika pinthu pyandichitira MBUYA. 
Psalms118:18 Iye anditchunyusa pyakwanga pene, mbwenye iye hadatawirise kuti ndife tayu." 
Psalms118:19 Ndifungulireni misuwo ya Nyumba ya Mulungu; ndinapitamo mbandikapereka takhuta kuna MBUYA! 
Psalms118:20 Wenewu ndi msuwo wa MBUYA; anyakulungama okha basi ndiye anakwanisa kupita napo. 
Psalms118:21 Ndikukulemedzani, thangwi mudandiva, imwe mwandichitisa kukunda." 
Psalms118:22 Mwala udakhonda anyakumanga nyumba ninga wakusowa basa lero wasanduka wakufunika kupiringana inango yonsene. 
Psalms118:23 Penepi pidachitwa na MBUYA; tenepo mphyakudodomesa pyakwanga pamaso pathu! 
Psalms118:24 Ino ndi nsiku ya kukunda kwa MBUYA, tendeni tikomerwe, tendeni tisekere!" 
Psalms118:25 Tipulumuseni, MBUYA, tipulumuseni! Tichitiseni kupikwanisa, MBUYA!" 
Psalms118:26 Mulungu mbatsanzayise nyakudza na dzina ya MBUYA! Kubulukira ku Nyumba ya Mulungu tikukutsanzayisani. 
Psalms118:27 MBUYA ndi Mulungu; iye atipasa cheza. Na nthambi m'manja mwanu, tomani phwando mbamufambe kuzungulira guwa yansembe." 
Psalms118:28 Imwe ndimwe Mulungu wanga, tenepo ndinapereka takhuta kuna imwe; imwe ndimwe Mulungu wanga, tenepo ndinalalika pya ukulu wanu." 
Psalms118:29 Perekani takhuta kuna MBUYA, thangwi iye ngwadidi, pontho kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala." 
Psalms119:1 Ngakutsanzaya ale makhaliro awo ngakusowa chinthu chakupokanyisa, pontho ambakhala mwakuteweza mwambo wa MBUYA." 
Psalms119:2 Ngakutsanzaya ale ambavera upangizi wache, ale ambamsaka na mtimawo onsene." 
Psalms119:3 Iwo nkhabe chita pyakudawika tayu; iwo ambafamba m'njira zache. 
Psalms119:4 Imwe mwatipasa pifunziso pyanu mbamutipanga kuti tipivere mwakukhulupirika. 
Psalms119:5 Ndina chidikhiro kuti ndinakhaladi wakukhulupirika pakukoya matongero anu! 
Psalms119:6 Ngakhala ndinafungula khutu kuna matongero anu, penepo nkhabe dzachitiswa manyadzo tayu." 
Psalms119:7 Ndzidzi unafunza ine matongero anu akulungama, ndinakukuzani na mtima wangwiro." 
Psalms119:8 Ndinavera mwambo wanu; lekani kundisiya ndekha! 
Psalms119:9 Mphale angakwanise tani kuchitisa moyo wache kukhala wangwiro? Mphakuvera mafalanu. 
Psalms119:10 Na mtimanga onsene ndimbayesa-yesa kukusaka-sakani; ndichitiseni kuti ndileke bauka kubuluka kuna matongero anu. 
Psalms119:11 Ndimbakoya mafalanu mumtima mwanga, towera ndileke kukudawirani." 
Psalms119:12 Ndikukukuzani, MBUYA; ndifunziseni mwambo wanu." 
Psalms119:13 Ndinakhuwa mwakubwereza-bwereza matongero anu onsene apereka imwe. 
Psalms119:14 Ndimbakomerwa na kuteweza upangizi wanu pyakwanga kusiyana na kukhala na mfuma ikulu. 
Psalms119:15 Ndimbanyerezera pikulu mumtima mwanga pifunziso pyanu; mbandionesesa mwadidi njira zanu. 
Psalms119:16 Ndimbakomerwa na mwambo wanu; mafalanu ine nkhabe dzaaduwalira tayu. 
Psalms119:17 Khalani wadidi kuna ine, nyabasanu, towera ndikhale na moyo mbandivera mafalanu." 
Psalms119:18 Fungulani maso anga, towera ndione pinthu pyakudodomesa pyakugumanwa m'mwambo wanu." 
Psalms119:19 Ine ndine mlendo wakugwanda kwene pyanga; lekani kundibisira matongero anu. 
Psalms119:20 Mtimanga umbapha na chitchuwo; ndinafuna ndidziwe ndzidzi onsene matongero anu. 
Psalms119:21 Imwe mumbasumulula anyakutumbama; ale ngadzedze pontho abauka kubuluka kuna matongero anu. 
Psalms119:22 Achitiseni kuti aleke kundishola pontho kunditikana, thangwi ine ndakoya upangizi wanu." 
Psalms119:23 Podi kwene atongi ambagumanyikana mbaverana pyakupha ine pano, ndinanyerezera pikulu mumtima mwanga mwambo wanu." 
Psalms119:24 Mwambo wanu nkhukomerwa kwanga; iwo ndi nyakundipangiza pyakuchita. 
Psalms119:25 Ndikugona wakukundwa pansi pa fumbi; sisimusani moyo wanga malingana na mafalanu. 
Psalms119:26 Ndidatawira na mulomo wanga pyonsene pyachita ine, tenepo imwe mudanditawira; ndifunziseni mwambo wanu." 
Psalms119:27 Ndiphedzenimbo kuvesa mwadidi pifunziso pyanu, tenepo ndinanyerezera pikulu mumtima mwanga pyakudodomesa pyachita imwe." 
Psalms119:28 Moyo wanga wakundwa na kutsukwala; ndiwangiseni mphamvu, ninga mudadumbira imwe kuna ine." 
Psalms119:29 Ndikhondeseni kwenda m'njira zakunama, pontho na udidi wanu ndifunziseni mwambo wanu." 
Psalms119:30 Kukhala wakuvera ndiye chasankhula ine; ine ndaikha mtimanga pana matongero anu. 
Psalms119:31 Ine ndili nganganga pa upangizi wanu, MBUYA; lekani tawirisa kuti ndichitise manyadzo." 
Psalms119:32 Ine ndinachita phinga kuvera matongero anu, thangwi imwe munandipasa kuavesa kukulu." 
Psalms119:33 Ndifunziseni, MBUYA, kuteweza mwambo wanu, tenepo ndinaavera ndzidzi onsene." 
Psalms119:34 Ndichitiseni kuvesa mwambo wanu, tenepo ndinauvera; ndinaukoya na mtimanga onsene." 
Psalms119:35 Ndichitiseni kukhala wakuvera matongero anu, thangwi ndimbagumanamo kukomerwa." 
Psalms119:36 Ndipaseni chikhumbo chakuvera upangizi wanu kusiyana na kukhala nyamfuma. 
Psalms119:37 Phophani maso anga kuna pinthu pyakusowa basa; koyani moyo wanga malingana na kudumbira kudachita imwe. 
Psalms119:38 Chitani pidadumbira imwe kuna ine, nyabasanu, pidadumbira imwe kuna anyakukugopani." 
Psalms119:39 Ndipulumuseni kuna kutikanwa kumbagopa ineku; thangwi matongero anu ngadidi pyakwanga! 
Psalms119:40 Ndina chitchuwo na pifunziso pyanu; ndipaseni moyo wachinchino, podi imwe ndimwe wakulungama." 
Psalms119:41 Ndioneseni kundifuna kokhonda mala kwachita imwe, MBUYA, pontho mundipulumuse malingana na kudumbira kwachita imwe kuna ine." 
Psalms119:42 Tenepo anyakunditikana ndinakwanisa kuatawira thangwi ndimbanyindira mafalanu. 
Psalms119:43 Ndichitiseni kuti ndilonge pyakuonadi ndzidzi onsene, thangwi chidikhiro changa chili pana matongero anu." 
Psalms119:44 Ndzidzi onsene ndinavera mwambo wanu, pontho kwenda na kwenda." 
Psalms119:45 Ndinafamba-famba pyanga mwakutakasuka, thangwi ndimbayesa kuvera pifunziso pyanu." 
Psalms119:46 Ndinalalika upangizi wanu kuna mafumu, pontho ine nkhabe dzachita manyadzo tayu." 
Psalms119:47 M'matongero mwanu ndimbagumanamo kukomerwa, thangwi ndimbaafuna." 
Psalms119:48 Ndimbalemedza pontho kuafuna matongero anu; ndinanyerezera pikulu mumtima mwanga mwambo wanu. 
Psalms119:49 Kumbukani kudumbira kudachita imwe kuna ine, nyabasanu; ipyo pyandipasa chidikhiro." 
Psalms119:50 Podi pa nyatwa zanga zene ine ndidathondozwa, thangwi kudumbira kudachita imwe kuna ine kwandipasa moyo." 
Psalms119:51 Anyakutumbama ndzidzi onsene ambandishola, mbwenye ine handidabauka kubuluka kuna mwambo wanu tayu." 
Psalms119:52 Ndimbakumbuka mwambo wanu wakale, tenepo ambandipasa chithondozo, MBUYA." 
Psalms119:53 Ndingaona anyakudawa akukhonda mwambo wanu, ine ndimbaswirizwa napyo." 
Psalms119:54 Pandzidzi ukhali ine mlendo wakugwanda kwene padziko yapansi pano, ndimbapeka nyimbo za mwambo wanu." 
Psalms119:55 Na mosiku ndimbakukumbukani, MBUYA, mbandinyerezera pya mwambo wanu." 
Psalms119:56 Ndimbagumana kukomerwa kwanga pakuvera pifunziso pyanu. 
Psalms119:57 Ambafuna ine ndimwe ene basi, MBUYA; ndinadumbira kuti ndinavera mafalanu." 
Psalms119:58 Ndikukupemphani na mtimanga onsene kuti mundikomerembo mtima ninga kudumbira kudachita imwe kuna ine. 
Psalms119:59 Ndanyerezera pya makhaliro anga, tenepo ndimbadumbira kuteweza upangizi wanu." 
Psalms119:60 Mwakukhonda nthontho ndimbachimbiza kuvera matongero anu. 
Psalms119:61 Podi kwene kuti anyakudawa anditeyera msampha, mbwenye ine nkhabe duwalira mwambo wanu tayu." 
Psalms119:62 Pachiti-chiti na mosiku ndimbalamuka kukukuzani, thangwi matongero wanu ngwakulungama." 
Psalms119:63 Ndimwe shamwali wa anyakukugopani onsene, wa onsene anyakuvera pifunziso pyanu ale." 
Psalms119:64 MBUYA, dziko yapansi yadzala na kutifuna kwanu kokhonda mala; ndifunziseni mwambo wanu." 
Psalms119:65 Imwe, MBUYA, ndimwe wadidi kuna ine, nyabasanu, malingana na pidadumbira imwe kuna ine." 
Psalms119:66 Ndipaseni nzeru na udziwisi, thangwi ndimbanyindira matongero anu." 
Psalms119:67 Mbamudzati kunditchunyusa, ine ndikhachita pyakudawa, mbwenye chinchino ndikuvera mafalanu." 
Psalms119:68 Imwe ndimwe wadidi, pontho wakukoma mtima pyakwanga! Ndifunziseni mwambo wanu." 
Psalms119:69 Anyakudungudza alonga pyakunama pya ine, mbwenye ine na mtimanga onsene ndimbavera pifunziso pyanu." 
Psalms119:70 Amuna enewa ngakufa msolo pontho akukala mtima, mbwenye ine ndimbakomerwa na mwambo wanu." 
Psalms119:71 Kunditchunyusa kwanu kukhali kwadidi kuna ine, thangwi kudandichitisa kuti ndifunze mwambo wanu." 
Psalms119:72 Mwambo udandipasa imwe ule ngwakufunika pikulu kuna ine kupiringana kobiri zonsene za padziko yapansi. 
Psalms119:73 Na manjanu imwe mudandilenga na kundiumba; ndipaseni nzeru zakuvesa pinthu, towera ndifunze matongero anu." 
Psalms119:74 Anyakukugopani anakomerwa angandiona, thangwi ndimbanyindira kudumbira kudachita imwe kule." 
Psalms119:75 Ndikupidziwa kuti mwambo wanu ngwakulungama, MBUYA, pontho kuti mudanditchunyusa thangwi ndimwe wakukhulupirika." 
Psalms119:76 Kundifuna kwanu kokhonda mala kundithondoze, ninga kudumbira kudachita imwe kuna ine, nyabasanu." 
Psalms119:77 Ndiverenimbo nsisi, tenepo ndinakhala na moyo thangwi ndimbakomerwa na mwambo wanu." 
Psalms119:78 Anyakutumbama mbachite manyadzo thangwi ya kundipambizira kwawo; inembo ndinanyerezera pikulu mumtima mwanga pifunziso pyanu. 
Psalms119:79 Anyakukugopani mbadze kuna ine, onsene ambadziwa upangizi wanu ale." 
Psalms119:80 Mtimanga mbukhale wakusowa chakupokonyisa pa mwambo wanu mbandichitiswe kuti ndileke chita manyadzo. 
Psalms119:81 Ndamaliratu na chitchuwo, MBUYA, kukudikhirani kuti mundipulumuse; chidikhiro changa ndinachiikha pana mafalanu." 
Psalms119:82 Maso anga atopa na kudikhira pidadumbira imwe kuna ine pile, uku mbandili kuvunza kuti, “Munandiphedza lini kani?”" 
Psalms119:83 Podi kwene ndine wakusowa basa ninga budu ya vinyu yakutayiwa pakhuku; kwache sidaduwalire tayu mwambo wanu. 
Psalms119:84 Ndidikhire kufikirana lini? Munatchunyusa lini anyakundiboneresawa? 
Psalms119:85 Amuna akutumbama, okhonda vera mwambo wanu, akumba milindi kuti ndigweramo." 
Psalms119:86 Matongero anu ene basi ndiye akunyindirika; anthu akundiboneresa na pyakunama; ndiphedzenimbo ine! 
Psalms119:87 Iwo asala chifupi kundipha, mbwenye ine handidakhonde kuteweza pifunziso pyanu tayu." 
Psalms119:88 Na thangwi ya kundifuna kwanu kokhonda mala khalani wadidi kuna ine, towera ndivere upangizi wanu." 
Psalms119:89 Mafalanu, MBUYA, anakhala akwenda na kwenda; ngakukhazikika kudzulu." 
Psalms119:90 Kukhulupirika kwanu kumbapirira mifendu yonsene, imwe mwathikitiza dziko yapansi pambuto pache, tenepo iyo yakhazikika." 
Psalms119:91 Mwambo wanu ngwakukhazikika na lero, thangwi pyonsenepyo pimbakutumikirani." 
Psalms119:92 Mwambo wanu mbadakhonda khala phata ya kukomerwa kwanga, ine mbandidafa na kusanyika." 
Psalms119:93 Ine nkhabe dzaduwalira pifunziso pyanu tayu, thangwi na ipyo imwe mwandichitisa kuti ndikhale na moyo." 
Psalms119:94 Ine ndine wanu, ndipulumuseni! Ine ndachita phinga kuvera pifunziso pyanu." 
Psalms119:95 Amuna akudawa akudikhira kundivunga, kwache ine ndinanyerezera pikulu mumtima mwanga upangizi wanu." 
Psalms119:96 Ine ndaona kuti pinthu pyonsene, podi na pyangwiro pene, pina mamalisiro ache, mbwenye matongero anu ngokhonda mala." 
Psalms119:97 Ndimbaufuna pikulu mwambo wanu! Ndimbaunyerezera pikulu mumtima mwanga nsiku zonsene. 
Psalms119:98 Matongero anu ndimbakhala nawo ndzidzi onsene mbandichitisa kukhala wanzeru kupiringana anyamalwanga. 
Psalms119:99 Ndimbaavesa pikulu pene kupiringana afunzisi anga onsene, thangwi ndimbanyerezera pikulu mumtima mwanga upangizi wanu." 
Psalms119:100 Ndina nzeru pyakwanga kupiringana nkhalamba, thangwi ndimbavera pifunziso pyanu." 
Psalms119:101 Ine ndathunda makhaliro onsene akuipa, thangwi ndikufuna kuvera mafalanu." 
Psalms119:102 Ine sidakhonde matongero anu tayu, thangwi imwe ene basi ndimwe mfunzisi wanga." 
Psalms119:103 Mphyakukoma pyakwanga kulawa mafalanu; kutapira kupiringana uchi! 
Psalms119:104 Ine ndimbaganyali nzeru kubulukira m'pifunziso pyanu, tenepo ndimbazondana na makhaliro onsene akuipa." 
Psalms119:105 Mafalanu ndi nyale ya kumanyalo kwanga, pontho ndi cheza chakundimwinikira panjira panga." 
Psalms119:106 Ine ndadumbira mbanditsikimiza kuvera matongero wanu wakulungama. 
Psalms119:107 Nyatwa zanga, MBUYA, nsakugoswadi; ndichitiseni kukhala na moyo ninga kudumbira kudachita imwe kule." 
Psalms119:108 Ivani kupemphera kwanga kwakupereka nako takhuta, MBUYA, pontho ndifunziseni matongero anu." 
Psalms119:109 Ine ndasasanyika ndzidzi onsene kutaya moyo wanga; ine sidaduwalire mwambo wanu tayu. 
Psalms119:110 Amuna akuipa anditeyera msampha, kwache sidabauke kubuluka kuna pifunziso pyanu tayu." 
Psalms119:111 Upangizi wanu ndi mfuma yakwenda na kwenda; nkhukomerwa kwa mtimanga. 
Psalms119:112 Ndapinyerezera kuvera mwambo wanu mpakana nsiku yakufa kwanga. 
Psalms119:113 Ndimbazondana na anyakukhonda khulupirika monsene mwene kuna imwe, kwache ndimbafuna mwambo wanu." 
Psalms119:114 Imwe ndimwe pakubisala panga pontho nyakunditchinjirizanga; ndimbaikha chidikhiro changa pana kudumbira kudachita imwe. 
Psalms119:115 Bulukani pana ine, anthu akudawamwe. Ndinavera matongero a Mulungu wanga." 
Psalms119:116 Ndipaseni mphamvu ninga mudadumbira imwe, tenepo ndinakhala na moyo; lekani kundichitisa manyadzo pandzidzi una ine na chidikhiro!" 
Psalms119:117 Ndiphateni, tenepo ndinapulumuka, pontho ndzidzi onsene ndinavera mwambo wanu." 
Psalms119:118 Imwe mumbapasa nkhodolo munthu onsene okhonda vera mwambo wanu; umpheswe wawo ngwapezi. 
Psalms119:119 Imwe mudayesa anyakudawa onsene ninga shuzhu ya dziko yapansi, natenepo ine ndinafuna upangizi wanu." 
Psalms119:120 Na thangwi ya imwe ine ndina mantha; ndaphatwa na mantha thangwi ya mwambo wanu. 
Psalms119:121 Ine ndaphata pinthu pyakulungama pontho pyakuthema; lekani kundipereka m'manja mwa anyakundipondereza! 
Psalms119:122 Dumbirani kuti nyabasanu, munamphedza; lekani tawirisa kuti anthu akutumbama andipondereze!" 
Psalms119:123 Maso anga atopa na kudikhira kuti mundipulumuse, pontho kuti pidadumbira imwe pile pikwane-kwane." 
Psalms119:124 Chitani na ine malingana na kundifuna kwanu kokhonda mala, pontho ndifunziseni mwambo wanu." 
Psalms119:125 Ndine nyabasanu, ndipaseni nzeru zakuvesa pinthu, towera ndidziwe upangizi wanu." 
Psalms119:126 MBUYA, ndzidzi wanu nguno wakuti muchitepo pinthu, thangwi anthu akuswa mwambo wanu." 
Psalms119:127 Ine ndimbafuna matongero anu kupiringana golidi, kupiringana golidi chadi-chadi ule." 
Psalms119:128 Natenepo ndikuteweza pifunziso pyanu; mbandizondana na njira zonsene zakudawika. 
Psalms119:129 Upangizi wanu mphyakudodomesa; ndimbapivera na mtimanga onsene. 
Psalms119:130 Kutchululwa kwa mafalanu ambapasa cheza mbadzesa nzeru kuna anthu okhonda dziwa. 
Psalms119:131 Ndimbafungula mulomo wanga mbandipuma na befu kukhumba matongero anu. 
Psalms119:132 Zungunukani kuna ine mbamundivere nsisi ninga mumbachitira imwe kuna onsene ambakufunani ale. 
Psalms119:133 Chitisani manyalo anga kuimira dzololo malingana na kudumbira kwanu; lekani tawirisa kuti pyakuipa pindikunde. 
Psalms119:134 Ndipulumuseni kuna ambandipondereza ale, towera ndivere pifunziso pyanu." 
Psalms119:135 Nditsanzayiseni pamaso panu mbamundifunzise mwambo wanu. 
Psalms119:136 Misozi ikugwa ninga mkulo, thangwi anthu nkhabe vera mwambo wanu tayu." 
Psalms119:137 Ndimwe wakulungama, MBUYA, na mwambo wanu ene ngwakulungama." 
Psalms119:138 Upangizi wapereka imwe ngwakulungama kuna onsene, pontho wakunyindirika monsene mwene." 
Psalms119:139 Phinganga ikugaka muna ine ninga moto, thangwi anyamalwanga nkhabe ikha konta mafalanu tayu." 
Psalms119:140 Kudumbira kudachita imwe nkhwakukhazikika! Ndimbapifuna pyakwanga pene! 
Psalms119:141 Ndine nyakukhonda funika pontho wakukhondwa, kwache ine nkhabe duwalira pifunziso pyanu tayu." 
Psalms119:142 Kulungama kwanu kunakhala na kukhala, pontho mwambo wanu ndzidzi onsene ngwakuona." 
Psalms119:143 Ndaphatwa na nyatwa pontho ndaswipa mtima, mbwenye matongero anu ambadzesa kukomerwa kuna ine." 
Psalms119:144 Upangizi wanu ndzidzi onsene ngwakulungama; ndipaseni nzeru zakuvesa nazo pinthu, tenepo ndinakhala na moyo." 
Psalms119:145 Na mtimanga onsene ndikuchemera kuna imwe; nditawireni, MBUYA, tenepo ndinavera mwambo wanu." 
Psalms119:146 Ndikuchemera kuna imwe; ndipulumuseni, tenepo ndinakoya upangizi wanu." 
Psalms119:147 Dzuwa mbidzati buluka ndimbachemera kuna imwe kuti mundiphedze; ndimbaikha chidikhiro changa pana kudumbira kwanu. 
Psalms119:148 Mosiku onsene ndimbakhala m'maso, kunyerezera pikulu mumtima mwanga kudumbira kwanu." 
Psalms119:149 Na thangwi ya kundifuna kwanu kokhonda mala, ndivesereni, MBUYA; onesani nsisi zanu mbamukoya moyo wanga!" 
Psalms119:150 Anyakundiboneresa akukala mtima akudza chifupi, anthu okhonda na kukoya kwene mwambo wanu." 
Psalms119:151 Mbwenye imwe muli chifupi na ine, MBUYA, pontho matongero anu onsene ngakukhazikika." 
Psalms119:152 Kale-kale ndidafunza upangizi wanu; imwe mwauchitisa kuti ukhale wakwenda na kwenda. 
Psalms119:153 Yang'anani nyatwa zanga mbamundipulumuse, thangwi ine sidaduwalire mwambo wanu tayu." 
Psalms119:154 Ndikhalireni kunduli pontho mundiombole; ndipaseni moyo ninga mudadumbira imwe kuna ine. 
Psalms119:155 Anyakudawa nkhabe dzapulumuswa tayu, podi iwo nkhabe vera mwambo wanu tayu." 
Psalms119:156 Mbwenye kuva kwanu nyambalo, MBUYA, nkhukulu; onesani nsisi zanu mbamundipulumuse!" 
Psalms119:157 Ndina anyamalwa na anyakundipondereza azinji, kwache ine nkhabe chimwana kuvera upangizi wanu tayu." 
Psalms119:158 Ndingayang'ana anyakundisandukirawa ndimbanyansirwa napyo, thangwi iwo nkhabe koya matongero anu tayu." 
Psalms119:159 Yang'anani mumbafunira ine pifunziso pyanu, MBUYA. Kundifuna kwanu kokhonda mala nkhabe sanduka tayu, natenepo ndipulumusenimbo ine." 
Psalms119:160 Mafalanu onsene ngakuona, pontho matongero anu akulungama ngokhonda mala." 
Psalms119:161 Amuna amphamvu andisosa akusowa na thangwi ene, mbwenye ine ndimbalemedza mafalanu." 
Psalms119:162 Ndakomerwa pyakwanga thangwi ya kudumbira kudachita imwe, kukomerwa ninga kwa munthu angagumana mfuma." 
Psalms119:163 Ndimbazonda na kunyansirwa na pyakunama, mbwenye ndimbafuna mwambo wanu." 
Psalms119:164 Kanomwe pansiku ndimbakukuzani, thangwi ya matongero wanu wakulungama." 
Psalms119:165 Ale ambafuna mwambo wanu ana mtendere pikulu, pontho nkhabe chinango chinakwanisa kuagwegwedusa tayu." 
Psalms119:166 Ndimbadikhira imwe kuti mundipulumuse, MBUYA, pontho ndimbachita pimbanditonga imwe." 
Psalms119:167 Ndimbavera upangizi wanu; thangwi ndimbapifuna na mtimanga onsene. 
Psalms119:168 Ndimbavera pifunziso pyanu na upangizi wanu; imwe mumbaona pyonsene pimbachita ine. 
Psalms119:169 Chiliro changa kufuna chiphedzo mbachifike kuna imwe, MBUYA! Ndipaseni nzeru zakuvesa pinthu malingana na kudumbira kudachita imwe." 
Psalms119:170 Ivani kupemphera kwanga mbamundipulumuse malingana na kudumbira kudachita imwe. 
Psalms119:171 Ndzidzi onsene ndinakukuzani, thangwi mumbandifunzisa mwambo wanu." 
Psalms119:172 Lulume yanga inaimba pya mafalanu, thangwi matongero anu ngakulungama" 
Psalms119:173 Sasanyikani ndzidzi onsene kundiphedza, thangwi ndimbateweza pifunziso pyanu." 
Psalms119:174 Ndatchuwadi kwene kundipulumusa kwanu, MBUYA! M'mwambo mwanu ndimbagumanamodi kukomerwa!" 
Psalms119:175 Ndipaseni moyo, towera ndikukuzeni; matongero anu andiphedze." 
Psalms119:176 Ndimbatsalakatika ninga bira wakutayika; tenepo idzani mundisake ine nyabasanu, thangwi ine sidaduwalire matongero anu tayu." 
Psalms120:1 Ndzidzi ukhali ine panyatwa, ndidachemera kuna MBUYA, tenepo iye adanditawira." 
Psalms120:2 Ndipulumuseni, MBUYA, kuna anyakunama na anyakunyengeza anzawo." 
Psalms120:3 Imwe anyakunama, Mulungu anachitanji kuna imwe? Iye anakutchunyusani pikulu pene" 
Psalms120:4 na matswimo akuthwa a nyankhondo, pontho na makala akuyerima moto!" 
Psalms120:5 Kukhala pakati panu nkhwakuipa pyakwanga sasawa ninga kukhala m'nthemba za Misheki, penu pakati pa anthu a ku Kedara!" 
Psalms120:6 Ine ndakhala ndzidzi ukulu ene na anthu akuzondana na mtendere. 
Psalms120:7 Ine ndingalonga pya mtendere, iwo ambalonga pya nkhondo." 
Psalms121:1 Ndimbakwiza maso anga kumapiri; nkhupi kumbabulukira chiphedzo changa? 
Psalms121:2 Chiphedzo changa chimbabulukira kuna MBUYA, adasasanya kudzulu na dziko yapansi ule." 
Psalms121:3 Iye nkhabe dzachitisa manyalo ako kutherezika tayu; nyakukutchinjiriza ndzidzi onsene ambakhala m'maso. 
Psalms121:4 Nyakutchinjiriza wa Israele nkhabe wodzira penu kugona chitulo tayu. 
Psalms121:5 Iye anakuyang'anira; iye ali m'khundu mwako kukutchinjiriza. 
Psalms121:6 Natenepo na masikati dzuwa nkhabe dzakuvunga tayu, nee mwezi na mosiku." 
Psalms121:7 Iye anakutchinjiriza kuna pyakugoswa pyonsene; iye anakukoya mwadidi. 
Psalms121:8 Iye anakuyang'anira mwadidi munadza iwe na munaenda iwe, chinchino pontho kwenda na kwenda." 
Psalms122:1 Ndidakomerwa pidalonga iwo kuna ine mbati, “Tendeni ku Nyumba ya MBUYA.”" 
Psalms122:2 Natenepo chinchino ife tili pano, kuimira m'bwalo mwa misuwo ya mzinda wa Yerusalemu!" 
Psalms122:3 Yerusalemu ndi mzinda wakumangwa mwakubalika, pontho mwakuthithikizana mwadidi." 
Psalms122:4 Kweneku ndiye kumbaenda madzinza a MBUYA kupereka takhuta kuna MBUYA kuteweza na matongero ache. 
Psalms122:5 Penepa mafumu a Israele adakhala pansi kutonga anthu awo mseru. 
Psalms122:6 Pemphererani mtendere wa Yerusalemu kuti: “Anthu ambakufunani ale pinthu pyawo mbapifambe mwadidi.” 
Psalms122:7 Mbamukhale mtendere m'bwalo mwa mpandamu, pontho nyumbanu yachifumu mbikhale pakupata." 
Psalms122:8 Na thangwi ya abale anga na ashamwali anga ndinalonga kuna Yerusalemu kuti, “Mtendere mbukhale namwe!”" 
Psalms122:9 Na thangwi ya Nyumba ya MBUYA Mulungu wathu ndimbapemphera kuti pinthu pyanu pifambe mwadidi. 
Psalms123:1 Ndinakwiza maso anga kuna imwe, kudzulu, kuna mpando wanu wachifumu." 
Psalms123:2 Ninga mumbachitira nyabasa wachimuna kunyindira mbuyache wachimuna, ninga mumbachitira nyabasa wachikazi kunyindira mbuyache wachikazi, sasawambo ife tinathimiza kunyindira imwe, MBUYA Mulungu wathu, kufikirana mutivere nsisi." 
Psalms123:3 Tiverenimbo ife nsisi, MBUYA, tiverenimbo nsisi, thangwi ife tavuyiwa pyakwanga." 
Psalms123:4 Ndzidzi ukulu ene ife taseluswa na anyakufuma mbatitikanwa na anyakutumbama. 
Psalms124:1 MBUYA mbadakhonda khala kukhundu kwathu, mbapidakhala tani? Aisraele mbatawire mbati," 
Psalms124:2 “MBUYA mbadakhonda khala kukhundu kwathu, ndzidzi udatisosa anyamalwathu," 
Psalms124:3 penepo iwo mbadatikhudyula a m'maso ene, mwenemo atizhangalira pyakwanga;" 
Psalms124:4 penepo madzi makulu mbadatikukulula, madzi mbadatidya," 
Psalms124:5 madzi akuula mbadatibiza.” 
Psalms124:6 Tendeni tipereke takhuta kuna MBUYA, ule hadatawirise kuti anyamalwathu ativunge tayu." 
Psalms124:7 Ife tasomphola ninga mbalame pamsampha wa nyakukhulisa, msampha wadumuka, tenepo tathawa!" 
Psalms124:8 Chiphedzo chathu chimbabulukira kuna MBUYA, adasasanya kudzulu na dziko yapansi ule." 
Psalms125:1 Anthu ambanyindira MBUYA ale akhala ninga Phiri ya Zioni, ile nkhabe tekenyeka tayu, mbwenye yakukhazikika kwenda na kwenda." 
Psalms125:2 Ninga mwazungulira mapiri Yerusalemu sasawambo MBUYA azungulira anthu ache chinchino pontho kwenda na kwenda. 
Psalms125:3 Anyakudawa ndzidzi onsene nkhabe dzatonga dziko ya anyakulungama tayu; iwo mbadachita tenepo, anyakulungama makawo mbadachitambo pyakuipa." 
Psalms125:4 MBUYA, chitirani udidi anthu adidi, kuna anthu ale mbakulungama mumtima mwawo." 
Psalms125:5 Mbwenye, MBUYA, ndzidzi unatchunyusa imwe anyakudawa, tchunyusanimbo anyakukhonda vera matongero anu. Mtendere mbukhale na Israele!" 
Psalms126:1 Pandzidzi udatidzesa MBUYA kubwerera ku Yerusalemu, pikhakhala ninga kundoto!" 
Psalms126:2 Tidasekera pyakwanga, tidaimba pyakwanga thangwi ya kukomerwa! Tenepo madzinza anango adalonga pya ife mbati, “MBUYA adaachitira pinthu pikulu.”" 
Psalms126:3 Ndimomwene MBUYA adatichitira pinthu pikulu; tidakomerwadi pyakwanga pene! 
Psalms126:4 MBUYA, chitisani pinthu pyathu kufamba pontho mwadidi, sasawa ninga mumbadzesera mvula madzi kuna mikulo yakuuma." 
Psalms126:5 Chitisani ale akhalira pikhabzala iwo mbewu, kututa pyakuvuna pyawo na nyimbo zakukomerwa." 
Psalms126:6 Ale akhalira pikhaenda iwo athukula mbewu anati abwere akuimba thangwi ya kukomerwa, ndzidzi unadza iwo na pyakuvuna pyawo." 
Psalms127:1 Ngakhala MBUYA hanamanga nyumba tayu, basa ya anyakumanga nyumba njakusowa basa; ngakhala MBUYA nkhabe yang'anira mwadidi mzinda, mphyakusowa basa kuti anyakulondali aphate basawo." 
Psalms127:2 Mphyakusowa basa kuwangisa na kuphata basa kuti tikhale na moyo, kulamuka bzobzo na machibese, pontho kugona mwakudembuka. Thangwi MBUYA ambapasa ambafuna iye ale pimbasowa iwo, mwenemo iwo ali m'chitulo." 
Psalms127:3 Ana ndi mtukwa wakubulukira kuna MBUYA; iwo ndi mtsanzayiso chadi-chadi. 
Psalms127:4 Munthu angakhala na ana achimuna uku mbali mphale, anawo akhala ninga matswimo m'manja mwa anyankhondo." 
Psalms127:5 Ngwakutsanzaya ule ana matswimo mazinji. Iye nkhabe dzakundwa tayu ndzidzi unagumanikana iye na anyamalwache pamsuwo wa mzinda. 
Psalms128:1 Ngakutsanzaya ale ambavera MBUYA, ale ambateweza matongero ache." 
Psalms128:2 Mabasanu anakuchitisani kugumana pinthu pinasowa imwe; imwe munakomerwa, pontho pinthu pyanu pinafamba mwadidi." 
Psalms128:3 Mkazako anakhala ninga mfesa zakubala m'nyumba mwako, pontho anako achimuna anakhala ninga mphukira zaolivi kuzungulira pathebulu pako." 
Psalms128:4 Munthu wakuvera MBUYA anatsanzayiswadi ninga tenepa. 
Psalms128:5 MBUYA mbakutsanzayiseni kubulukira ku Zioni! Mbamuone Yerusalemu pinthu pyache kufamba mwadidi ndzidzi onsene wa moyo wanu! 
Psalms128:6 Mbamukhale na moyo towera muone pidzukulu pyanu! Mtendere mbukhale na Israele. 
Psalms129:1 Iwo andipondereza pikulu pene kutomera uphaleanga. Israele mbalonge mbati," 
Psalms129:2 “Kutomera uphaleanga iwo andipondereza pyakwanga pene, kwache iwo hadandikunde tayu." 
Psalms129:3 Iwo adabola-bola kunduli kwanga mbakukhala ninga munda wakutipulwa. 
Psalms129:4 Mbwenye MBUYA ngwakulungama, adagwanda nkhambala zidandimanga anyakudawa.”" 
Psalms129:5 Munthu onsene ambazondana na Zioni mbakundwe; iye mbathamangiswe mwakuchitiswa manyadzo. 
Psalms129:6 Onsenewo mbakhale ninga maudzu akumera pansoyi ya nyumba, ale ambauma mbadzati mala kukula;" 
Psalms129:7 nkhabe munthu ambaagumanya, penu kuathukula m'mphulu tayu." 
Psalms129:8 Nkhabe na mbodzi wakugwanda na penepo analonga mbati, “MBUYA akutsanzayiseni! Tinakutsanzayisani na dzina ya MBUYA.”" 
Psalms130:1 Kubulukira pansi pa kusanyika kwanga mumtima ndimbachemera kuna imwe, MBUYA." 
Psalms130:2 Ngavani chiliro changa, MBUYA; veserani kulira kwanga kufuna chiphedzo!" 
Psalms130:3 Ngakhala imwe, MBUYA, mukhalemba pyakudawa pyathu, mbani mbadakwanisa kuthawa kukonwa?" 
Psalms130:4 Mbwenye imwe ndimwe nyakulekerera pyakudawa, natenepo imwe mwathema kugopiwa." 
Psalms130:5 Ndimbadikhira na mtimanga onsene kuti MBUYA andiphedze; ine ndimbanyindira mafalache. 
Psalms130:6 Ndikukudikhirani Mbuya pikulu kupiringana anyakulondali kudikhira makalakwecha, kupiringana anyakulondali kudikhira kunja kuchene." 
Psalms130:7 Israele, nyindira MBUYA, thangwi kukufuna kwa MBUYA nkhokhonda mala, pontho ambafuna ndzidzi onsene kukuombola." 
Psalms130:8 Iye anaombola anthu ache a ku Israele kuna pyakudawa pyawo pyonsene. 
Psalms131:1 MBUYA, ndaimisa manja kuna kudungudza kwanga, pontho ndapasa nkhodolo kutumbama kwanga. Ine nkhabe khala kaliki-liki na pinthu pikulu-pikulu tayu, penu na pinthu pyakunensa pyakwanga kuna ine." 
Psalms131:2 M'mbuto mwache ndakwana na pina ine pontho ndina mtendere. Ninga mumbamatamira khombwani m'manja mwa mache, sasawambo mtimanga unamatama m'bwalo mwanga." 
Psalms131:3 Israele, nyindira MBUYA chinchino pontho kwenda na kwenda!" 
Psalms132:1 MBUYA, lekani duwalira Davite na nyatwa zonsene zimbapirira iye." 
Psalms132:2 Kumbukani, MBUYA, kudumbira kudachita iye, kudumbira pikulu kudachita iye kuna imwe, Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene wa Yakobo kuti:" 
Psalms132:3 “Ine nkhabe dzaenda kumusa, penu kugona patalimba tayu;" 
Psalms132:4 ine nkhabe dzapuma, penu kugona chitulo tayu," 
Psalms132:5 kufikirana ndisasanyire mbuto MBUYA, Nyumba yakukhalamo Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene wa Yakobo.”" 
Psalms132:6 Muluwani ya Betelehemu tidava pya Bokosi ya Chiverano, tenepo tidaigumana m'munda mwa Yearimu." 
Psalms132:7 Tidalonga mbati, “Tendeni ku Nyumba ya MBUYA; tendeni timpembedze patsogolo pampando wache wachifumu.”" 
Psalms132:8 Idzani ku Nyumbanu, MBUYA, na Bokosi ya Chiverano, chinthu chakuonesa mphamvu zanu, pontho mbamukhale pano kwenda na kwenda." 
Psalms132:9 Anyansembe anu ndzidzi onsene mbachite pinthu pyakulungama; anthu anu mbakhuwe thangwi ya kukomerwa. 
Psalms132:10 Imwe mudadumbira kuna nyabasanu Davite; lekani khonda mfumu wanu wakusankhulika. 
Psalms132:11 MBUYA adadumbira pikulu kuna Davite, pile pinakhonda iye leka kupichita mbati: “Ndinaikha mbodzi wa anako achimuna kukhala mfumu, pontho iye anatonga m'nduli mwako." 
Psalms132:12 Ngakhala anako achimuna ngakukhulupirika kuna chiverano, pontho kuna matongero anga anapasa ine, anawombo achimuna anapita m'mbuto mwako mbakhala mafumu ndzidzi onsene.”" 
Psalms132:13 MBUYA asankhula Zioni; anafuna ausanduze kukhala mbuto yache yakukhalako: 
Psalms132:14 “Penepa ndiye panafuna ine dzakhala kwenda na kwenda; penepa ndiye panafuna ine dzatonga. 
Psalms132:15 Ndinachitisa Zioni kukhala wakufuma na pinthu pyonsene pinasowa iye; anyakutcherenga a mwenemo ndinaakhutisa na pyakudya. 
Psalms132:16 Ndinatsanzayisa anyansembe ache papyonsene pimbachita iwo, pontho anthu ache akuchena anaimba mwakugaluza fala thangwi ya kukomerwa." 
Psalms132:17 Penepa ndinachitisa mbodzi wa pidzukulu pya Davite kukhala mfumu wamkulu; ndinakulisa utongi wa mfumu wanga wakusankhulika. 
Psalms132:18 Ndinampsampsira anyamalwache na manyadzo, mbwenye ufumu wache unaenda m'tsogolo na demelero.”" 
Psalms133:1 Mphyadidi pontho pyakukoma pyakwanga kuna anthu a Mulungu kukhala pabodzi mwakuphatanizana! 
Psalms133:2 Pyakhala ninga mafuta akununkhira akufunika pyakwanga akukhuthulirwa mumsolo mwa Aroni akugwera pandevu pache pene, akutchithira m'khosi mwa mkhanjo wache." 
Psalms133:3 Pyakhala ninga bume pa Phiri ya Herimoni, kugwera papitunda pya Zioni. Penepa ndiye palonga MBUYA kuti anagwisa mtsanzayiso wache, moyo okhonda mala." 
Psalms134:1 Idzani, kuzani MBUYA, imwe anyabasa onsene a MBUYA, onsene mumbamtumikira m'Nyumba ya MBUYA na mosiku ale." 
Psalms134:2 Kwizani manjanu m'dzulu kupemphera pambuto yache yakuchena, pontho kuzani MBUYA!" 
Psalms134:3 MBUYA adasasanya kudzulu na dziko yapansi ule, mbakutsanzayiseni kubulukira ku Zioni!" 
Psalms135:1 MBUYA mbakuzwe! Kuzani dzina ya MBUYA. Mkuzeni, imwe anyabasa a MBUYA," 
Psalms135:2 mumbatumikira m'Nyumba ya MBUYA ale, m'Nyumba ya Mulungu wathu." 
Psalms135:3 MBUYA mbakuzwe, thangwi MBUYA ngwadidi; imbani nyimbo zakukuza nazo dzinache, thangwi iye ngwakukoma mtima." 
Psalms135:4 MBUYA adapisankhulira yekha ene Yakobo, Israele kukhala anthu ache akufunika." 
Psalms135:5 Ndimbapidziwa kuti MBUYA wathu ngwamkulu; Mbuyathu ngwamkulu kupiringana milungu yonsene. 
Psalms135:6 MBUYA ambachita pimbafuna iye kudzulu pontho pansi pano, pabara, pontho na pansi pa bara." 
Psalms135:7 Iye ambadzesa makole kubulukira kumadolomero a dziko yapansi; mbachitisa kuti pakhale njazi ndzidzi wa chonziwo, pontho ambafungulira mphepo m'masubi mumbaikoya iye." 
Psalms135:8 M'dziko ya Iguputo iye adapha ana autombo a anthu mbachita chibodzi-bodzi kuna pifuyo. 
Psalms135:9 Kweneko iye adachita pidzindikiro na pyakudodomesa kutchunyusa napyo mfumu wa Iguputo na mathubu ache onsene. 
Psalms135:10 Iye adavunga madzinza mazinji mbapha mafumu amphamvu:
