Psalms135:11 Sihoni, mfumu wa Aamori, Ogi, mfumu wa Bashani, pontho mafumu onsene m'dziko ya Kanani." 
Psalms135:12 Iye adapereka dziko yawo kuna anthu ache; iye adaipereka kuna anthu ache Aisraele. 
Psalms135:13 MBUYA, ndzidzi onsene pinavekeswa kuti ndimwe MBUYA; mifendu yonsene inakudziwani." 
Psalms135:14 MBUYA anatchinjiriza anthu ache; iye anavera nsisi anyabasache. 
Psalms135:15 Milungu ya madzinza njakusasanywa na siliva pontho golidi; ipyo pimbasasanywa na manja a anthu. 
Psalms135:16 Iyo ina kanwa, kwache nkhabe longa tayu, ina maso, kwache nkhabe ona tayu." 
Psalms135:17 Iyo ina makutu, kwache nkhabe kuva tayu; iyo nkhabe bulusa na muya ene tayu." 
Psalms135:18 Onsene ambapisasanya na ambapinyindira ale, mbasanduke kukhala ninga mifanikizo idasasanya iwoyo!" 
Psalms135:19 Kuzani MBUYA, imwe anthu a ku Israele; kuzani MBUYA, imwe pidzukulu pya Aroni!" 
Psalms135:20 Kuzani MBUYA, imwe dzinza ya Levi; kuzani MBUYA, monsenene anyakupembedza MBUYA!" 
Psalms135:21 Kuzani MBUYA mu Zioni, mu Yerusalemu, mbuto imbakhala iye ile. MBUYA mbakuzwe!" 
Psalms136:1 Perekani takhuta kuna MBUYA, thangwi iye ngwadidi; kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala." 
Psalms136:2 Perekani takhuta kuna Mulungu wa milungu yonsene; kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala. 
Psalms136:3 Perekani takhuta kuna MBUYA wa ambuya onsene; kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala. 
Psalms136:4 Iye ene yekha ambachita pyakudodomesa pikulu; kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala. 
Psalms136:5 Na nzeru zache iye adasasanya kudzulu; kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala; 
Psalms136:6 iye adamanga dziko yapansi pa madzi akuzwika; kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala. 
Psalms136:7 Iye adasasanya dzuwa na mwezi; kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala; 
Psalms136:8 dzuwa kukhala mtongi wa masikati; kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala; 
Psalms136:9 mwezi na nthondowa kukhala mtongi wa mosiku; kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala. 
Psalms136:10 Iye adapha ana autombo m'dziko ya Iguputo; kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala. 
Psalms136:11 Iye adatsogolera Aisraele kuabulusa m'dziko ya Iguputo; kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala; 
Psalms136:12 na dzanjache yamphamvu, pontho mkono wache wamphamvu; kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala." 
Psalms136:13 Iye adagawa pakati Nyanza Yakufira; kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala; 
Psalms136:14 iye adatsogolera anthu ache kuwambuka na penepo; kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala; 
Psalms136:15 mbwenye adabizika m'madzi mfumu wa ku Iguputo na anyankhondo ache ene; kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala. 
Psalms136:16 Iye adatsogolera anthu ache kugwanda na m'thando yatchetcha; kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala. 
Psalms136:17 Iye adapha mafumu akulu; kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala; 
Psalms136:18 iye adapha mafumu amphamvu; kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala; 
Psalms136:19 Sihoni, mfumu wa Aamori; kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala;" 
Psalms136:20 na Ogi, mfumu wa ku Bashani; kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala." 
Psalms136:21 Iye adapereka dziko yawoyo kuna anthu ache kukhala yawo ene; kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala; 
Psalms136:22 iye adaipereka kuna Israele, nyabasache; kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala." 
Psalms136:23 Iye hadatiduwalire tayu ndzidzi udakundwa ife; kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala; 
Psalms136:24 iye adatipulumusa kuna anyamalwathu; kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala. 
Psalms136:25 Iye ambapereka phoso kuna chakulengwa chamoyo chonsene; kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala. 
Psalms136:26 Perekani takhuta kuna Mulungu wa kudzulu; kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala. 
Psalms137:1 M'khundu-khundu mwa mikulo ya mumzinda wa Babiloni ife tidakhala pansi; penepo tidalira pidakumbuka ife Zioni. 
Psalms137:2 M'mikotamu ya chifupi tidakolowekamo anyakatangale athu. 
Psalms137:3 Anthu adatiphata ale adatipanga kuti tiimbe; anyakutiboneresa adatikhakhamiza kuti tiachitise kukomerwa kuti: “Tiimbireni nyimbo ya Zioni.” 
Psalms137:4 Tinakwanisa tani kuimbira nyimbo MBUYA m'dziko yachilendo? 
Psalms137:5 Mbandileke kwanisave pontho kuimba nyakatangale ngakhala ndinakuduwalira iwe, Yerusalemu!" 
Psalms137:6 Mbandileke kwanisave kuimba pontho nyimbo ngakhala sinakhonda kukukumbuka, ngakhala sinakhonda kunyerezera pya iwe ninga kukomerwa kwanga kukululetu!" 
Psalms137:7 MBUYA, kumbukani pidachita Aedomu pansiku idaphatwa Yerusalemu. Kumbukani mule mukhathimiza iwo kulonga mbati, “Mbugomolwe onsene pansi!”" 
Psalms137:8 Babiloni, chakuvungawe, iwe unavungwa. Ngwakutsanzaya ule anakubwezera thangwi ya pyachita iwe kuna ife," 
Psalms137:9 ule ambakwata anako akachiya mbaamenyesa kumwala. 
Psalms138:1 Ndinapereka takhuta kuna imwe, MBUYA, na mtimanga onsene; ndikukuimbirani nyimbo zakukukuzani nazo pamaso pa milungu." 
Psalms138:2 Ndikuyang'ana ku Nyumbanu yakuchena, kulamba na kukuza dzinanu thangwi ya kundifuna kwanu kokhonda mala pontho na kukhulupirika kwanu, thangwi imwe mwaonesa kuti dzina na mafalanu mphikululetu kupiringana pinthu pyonsene." 
Psalms138:3 Ndzidzi udakuchemerani ine, imwe mudanditawira; na mphamvu zanu imwe mudandiwangisa mtima." 
Psalms138:4 Mafumu onsene padziko yapansi anakukuzani imwe, MBUYA, thangwi iwo ava kudumbira kudachita imwe." 
Psalms138:5 Iwo anaimba pya pinthu pyachita MBUYA, pontho na pya demelero ikulu ya MBUYA." 
Psalms138:6 Podi kwene kuti MBUYA ali kudzululetu, iye ambayang'anira mwadidi anyakupichepesa, pontho anyakutumbama nkhabe kwanisa kumbisalira tayu." 
Psalms138:7 Ndinganenseka na nyatwa, imwe mumbandikoya mwadidi. Imwe mumbapokanya anyamalwanga aukali mbamundipulumusa na mphamvu zanu." 
Psalms138:8 MBUYA anachita pyonsene malingana na kudumbira kudachita iye; MBUYA, kutifuna kwanu nkhokhonda mala. Malisani basa yatoma imwe kale ile." 
Psalms139:1 MBUYA, imwe mwandisakanyula mwadidi mbamundidziwa." 
Psalms139:2 Pyonsene pimbachita ine mumbapidziwa; kubulukira kutali pyakwanga imwe mumbavesa manyerezero anga. 
Psalms139:3 Imwe mumbandiona ndzidzi unaphata ine basa, penu kupuma; imwe mumbapidziwa pyonsene pimbachita ine." 
Psalms139:4 Podi kwene ndidzati bulusa fala, imwe, MBUYA, mumbadziwa kale pinafuna ine longa." 
Psalms139:5 Imwe mwandizungulira khundu zonsene; imwe mumbanditchinjiriza na mphamvu zanu. 
Psalms139:6 Udziwisi wanu pana ine ngwakuzwika pyakwanga, wapiringana kuvesa kwanga pinthu." 
Psalms139:7 Nkhupi kunafuna ine kwenda kuthawa Mzimu wanu Wakuchena? Nkhupi kunafuna ine kuthawira kubuluka pamaso panu? 
Psalms139:8 Ngakhala ndidakwira kwenda kudzulu, imwe muli kweneko; ngakhala ndinagona pansi kudziko ya anyakufa, imwe muli kweneko basi." 
Psalms139:9 Ngakhala ndinambulukira kutali kupiringana kumabulukiro dzuwa, penu kakhala kutaliletu kumadokero dzuwa," 
Psalms139:10 imwe muli kweneko basi kunditsogolera, imwe muli kweneko basi kundiphedza." 
Psalms139:11 Mbandidakwanisa kupempha kuti mdima undibise penu cheza chinandimwinikirachi chisanduke mosiku," 
Psalms139:12 mbwenye na kutani kwene mdima kuna imwe si mdima tayu, pontho mosiku kuna imwe wakhala ninga masikati. Mdima pontho cheza kuna imwe ntchibodzi-bodzi." 
Psalms139:13 Imwe mudalenga phindi yonsene ya m'manungo mwangamu; imwe mudandiphataniza pabodzi m'mimba mwa mamanga. 
Psalms139:14 Ndikukukuzani thangwi imwe mwathema kugopiwa; pyonsene pimbachita imwe mphyachilendo pontho pyakudodomesa. Penepi ndimbapidziwa na mtimanga onsene. 
Psalms139:15 Ndzidzi ukhakula magogodo anga, imwe mudachita mphole-mphole kundiphataniza pabodzi pene m'mimba mwa mamanga, pikhakula ine m'mbuto yakubisika, imwe mudapidziwiratu kuti ine ndikhali mwenemo." 
Psalms139:16 Imwe mudandioneratu mbandidzati balwa. Nsiku zikhadasankhulirwa ine m'moyo mwanga, zonsene zikhadalembwa kale m'bukhu mwanu, iwo mbadzati toma khalapo." 
Psalms139:17 Mulungu, mphyakunensa pyakwanga kudziwa manyerezero anu; kudziwa kuti ngangasi!" 
Psalms139:18 Mbandidachita kuti ndialengese, iwo mbadainjipa kupiringana tchetcha. Ndzidzi umbalamuka ine, ndimbakhala na imwe basi." 
Psalms139:19 Mulungu, ndikupifunadi kwene kuti muphe anyakuipawa! Ndikupifunadi kwene kuti anyachirope andileke pyawo!" 
Psalms139:20 Iwo ambakulongerani pyakuipa; iwo ambalongera dzinanu pinthu pyakuipa. 
Psalms139:21 MBUYA, anthu ambakuzondani ale, inembo ndimbaazondadi kwene! Ndimbanyansirwadi kwene nawo anyakukupandukirani ale!" 
Psalms139:22 Ine ndina chizondi chikulu nawo; ndimbaayesa ninga anyamalwanga. 
Psalms139:23 Sakanyulani mumtima mwanga, Mulungu, mbamudziwe manyerezero anga; ndiyeseni mbamudziwe manyerezero anga." 
Psalms139:24 Onani ngakhala muna ine muna chinango chakuipa, pontho ndiphateni nsenji panjira yakukhala na kukhala." 
Psalms140:1 Ndipulumuseni, MBUYA, kuna anyakuipa; nditchinjirizeni kugopesera amuna akuzunguzika." 
Psalms140:2 Ndzidzi onsene iwo ambasasanya njira za upandu, ndzidzi onsene ambalamusa chimpiningu." 
Psalms140:3 Malulume awo akhala ninga nyoka zakupha; mafala ambabulusa iwo m'kanwa mwawo akhala ninga mata a mbadza. 
Psalms140:4 Nditchinjirizeni, MBUYA, kuna mphamvu za anyakudawika; ndikoyeni mwadidi gopesera anthu akuzunguzika, ambafuna pyakundimanga ndale ale." 
Psalms140:5 Amuna akutumbama anditeyera msampha; iwo ateya misampha, pontho m'khundu-khundu mwa njiranga yonsene ateyamo misampha, towera andikweshe." 
Psalms140:6 Ndimbalonga kuna MBUYA kuti, “Imwe ndimwe Mulungu wanga.” Ngavani kulira kwanga, MBUYA, kufuna chiphedzo!" 
Psalms140:7 MBUYA, Mulungu wanga, pontho nyakunditchinjiriza wamphamvu, imwe mwanditchinjiriza pankhondo." 
Psalms140:8 MBUYA, lekani pasa anyakuipa pinthu pinafuna iwopyo; lekani tawirisa manyerezero awo akuipa pana ine kuchitika." 
Psalms140:9 Lekani tawirisa anyamalwanga kuti andikunde; chitisani pinthu pyakugoswa pinandichitira iwopyo kugwera iwo ene enechiro. 
Psalms140:10 Makala akuyerima amoto mbaagwere; iwombo mbaponywe m'dzenje yakuzwika, pontho mbachimwane kubulukamo." 
Psalms140:11 Anthu ambapambizira anzawo mbaleke khazikika m'dzikomo; pyakuipa mbapikhulise anthu akuzunguzikawa. 
Psalms140:12 MBUYA, ndimbapidziwa kuti imwe mumbachitira chilungamo atcherengi, pontho munaikhira kunduli pamseru anyakuponderezwa." 
Psalms140:13 Anyakulungama anakukuzanidi; iwo anati akhale pamaso panu. 
Psalms141:1 Ndikukuchemerani, MBUYA; ndiphedzeni chinchino! Ndivesereni ndzidzi unakuchemerani ine." 
Psalms141:2 Kupemphera kwanga pamaso panu mbakukhale ninga pyakununkhira; kukwiza kwanga manja m'dzulu mbakukhale ninga nsembe yakumawulo. 
Psalms141:3 MBUYA ikhani nyakuyang'anira wa mulomo wanga; nyakuyang'anira msuwo wa mulomo wanga. 
Psalms141:4 Ndikhondeseni kukwatika na pyakudawa, pontho kuphatizana na anyakuipa kuchita pyakudawika; mbandileke kwata khundu m'maphwando mwawomo." 
Psalms141:5 Nyakulungama anakwanisa kunditchunyusa, pontho kundisumulula mwakukoma mtima, mbwenye ine nkhabe dzatawira chilemedzo kubulukira kuna anthu akuipa tayu, thangwi ndzidzi onsene ndimbapemphera mwakupokanyisana na pyakuipa pimbachita iwopyo." 
Psalms141:6 Atongi awo angaponywa pansi na pamatelero anyakudawika anatawira kuti mafalanga akhali akuona. 
Psalms141:7 Ninga mumbapandulirwa nkhuni m'mapindi-mapindi, sasawambo magogodo awo amwazwa pakanwa padziko ya anyakufa." 
Psalms141:8 Mbwenye ine ndimbaikha maso anga pana imwe, MBUYA Mulungu wanga. Imwe ndimwe pakubisala panga; lekani tawirisa kuti ndife." 
Psalms141:9 Ndichitiseni kuti ndileke kukweshwa na msampha wanditeyera iwo, nditchinjirizeni kuna misampha ya anyakudawika." 
Psalms141:10 Anyakuipa mbakweshwe na misampha yawo yonthoyo, mwenemo ine ndikwenda pyanga okhonda kuwazika." 
Psalms142:1 MBUYA, ndikuchemera kuti mundiphedze; ndikudembetera kuna imwe mwakugaluza fala kuti mundivere nsisi." 
Psalms142:2 Ine ndimbadza kuna iye na kudungunya kwanga konsene; ndimbampanga nyatwa zanga zonsene. 
Psalms142:3 Ndzidzi una ine chifupi kutaya mtima, iye ambadziwa pinthu pyathema ine kuchita. Panjira panafamba ine, anyamalwanga anditeyera msampha." 
Psalms142:4 Ndingayang'ana m'khundu mwanga, ndimbaona kuti nkhabe unango wakundiphedza, nee mbodzi wakunditchinjiriza tayu; nkhabe na mbodzi ene wakundiyang'anira mwadidi." 
Psalms142:5 MBUYA, ndikulira kuna imwe kufuna chiphedzo; imwe ndimwe nyakunditchinjiriza; imwe ndimwe pyonsene pimbafuna ine m'moyo uno." 
Psalms142:6 Ngavani kulira kwanga kufuna chiphedzo, thangwi ndabira m'matope. Ndipulumuseni kuna anyakundithamangisa; thangwi iwo ngamphamvu pikulu kupiringana ine." 
Psalms142:7 Ndisudzuleni pauperezo wanga; towera ndikukuzeni pambuto panagumanyikana anthu anu thangwi ya udidi wanu kuna ine. 
Psalms143:1 MBUYA, ngavani kupemphera kwanga! Veserani kulira kwanga kufuna chiphedzo; nditawireni thangwi ndimwe wakukhulupirika pontho wakulungama!" 
Psalms143:2 Lekani kunditonga mseru ine, nyabasanu; pamaso panu nkhabe na mbodzi ene wakulungama tayu." 
Psalms143:3 Nyamalwanga akundikhulisa, pontho andikunda monsene mwene. Iye andiikha m'perezo mumdima, tenepo ndakhala ninga anthu adafa kale ale." 
Psalms143:4 Ine ndasanyika pyakwanga m'mtima mwanga mwakuti nkhabeve na chidikhiro chene tayu. 
Psalms143:5 Ndikukumbuka nsiku zapita zile; ndikunyerezera pikulu pya pyonsene pyachita imwe pile, mbandinyerezera pya mabasanu." 
Psalms143:6 Ndimbakwiza manjanga m'dzulu kuna imwe kupemphera; ninga mataka a ndolongo moyo wanga una nyota ya imwepo. 
Psalms143:7 Chinchino, MBUYA, nditawireni! Chidikhiro changa chonsene chamaliratu. Lekani kupibisa mwekha ene kuna ine, gopesera ndinakhala ninga mbodzi wa anthu ambaenda ku Chiphompho chikulu ale." 
Psalms143:8 Machibese onsene ndikumbuseni pya kundifuna kwanu kokhonda mala, thangwi imwe ene ndiye ambanyindira ine. Kupemphera kwanga kumbafika kuna imwe; ndioneseni njira yathema ine kufambamo." 
Psalms143:9 Ndimbathawira kuna imwe kuti ndibisale, MBUYA; ndipulumuseni kuna anyamalwanga." 
Psalms143:10 Mulungu wanga ndimwepo; ndifunziseni kuchita kufuna kwanu. Na Mzimu wanu wadidi nditsogolereni mwadidi m'njira zakundendemera. 
Psalms143:11 Ndipulumuseni MBUYA, ninga mwadumbira imwe kuchita; na udidi wanu ndipulumuseni panyatwa zanga!" 
Psalms143:12 Na thangwi ya kundifuna kwanu kokhonda mala, iphani anyamalwanga; vungani anyakundivuya onsene, thangwi ndine nyabasanu." 
Psalms144:1 Mbakuzwe MBUYA, Phanzwi yanga! Iye ambandifunzisa kumenya nkhondo mbandichitisa kusasanyika kumenya nkhondo." 
Psalms144:2 Iye ndi nyakundiyang'anira pontho nyakunditchinjiriza, pakubisala panga pontho dombo wanga, ambanyindira ine kuti anandikoya mwadidi ule. Iye adakunda madzinza onsene mbaaikha pansi pa utongi wanga." 
Psalms144:3 MBUYA, munthu mbani wakuti mumbamtsalakana; munthu ene pyache wakuti imwe mumbamnyerezera?" 
Psalms144:4 Iye akhala ninga mphepo; nsiku zache zakhala ninga chigudu-gudu. 
Psalms144:5 MBUYA, ng'ambani thambo mbamutchitha pansi; khuyani mapiri, tenepo iwo anabulusa utsi." 
Psalms144:6 Tumizani cheza cha njazi mbamubalalise anyamalwanu; aponyereni matswimo kuathamangisa. 
Psalms144:7 Fikisani mkono wanu pano kubulukira kudzulu, ndinuleni m'madzi akuzwika, pontho ndipulumuseni; ndipulumuseni kuna mphamvu za anthu achilendo," 
Psalms144:8 ale nkhabe dziwa kulonga pyakuona tayu mbadumbira pyakunama. 
Psalms144:9 Ndinakuimbirani nyimbo yachinchino, Mulungu; ndinakuimbirani na nyakatangale." 
Psalms144:10 Imwe mumbachitisa kuti mafumu akunde mbamupulumusa nyabasanu Davite kuna talasada yakupha. 
Psalms144:11 Ndipulumuseni kuna anyamalwanga akukala mtima; ndiomboleni kuna mphamvu za anthu achilendo, ale nkhabe dziwa kulonga pyakuona tayu mbadumbira pyakunama." 
Psalms144:12 Anathu achimuna pandzidzi wa uphaleawo mbakhale ninga mbewu yakukula mbikhala na mphamvu. Anathu achikazi mbakhale ninga nsanamira zakusemwa zakuphatisa nkhomo za nyumba yachifumu. 
Psalms144:13 Pikwa pyathu mbapidzale na phoso ya mtundu onsene. Mabira m'minda mwathu mbabale ana pikwi-pikwi. 
Psalms144:14 Ng'ombe zathu mbazibalane mwakuinjipa okhonda polozwa penu kutayika. Paleke khala kulira thangwi ya nyatwa m'misewu mwathumu. 
Psalms144:15 Njakutsanzaya dzinza ile kuna iwo penepi mphyakuona; ngakutsanzaya anthu ale Mulungu wawo ndi MBUYA! 
Psalms145:1 Ndinakuza pya ukulu wanu, Mulungu pontho mfumu wanga; ndinapereka takhuta kuna imwe kwenda na kwenda." 
Psalms145:2 Nsiku na nsiku ndinapereka takhuta kuna imwe; ndinakukuzani kwenda na kwenda. 
Psalms145:3 MBUYA ngwamkulu pontho athema kukuzwa pikulu; nkhabe munthu anakwanisa kuvesa pya ukulu wache tayu. 
Psalms145:4 Pinthu pyachita imwe munalemedzwa napyo kubulukira mfendu kufikirana mfendu unango; iwo analalika pya mabasanu amphamvu. 
Psalms145:5 Iwo analonga pya demelero yanu pontho ufumu wanu, pontho ndinanyerezera pikulu mumtima mwanga pya mabasa akudodomesa achita imwe." 
Psalms145:6 Anthu analonga pya mabasanu amphamvu, pontho ine ndinalalika pya ukulu wanu." 
Psalms145:7 Iwo anapanga anango pya udidi wanu onsene mbaimba pya kulungama kwanu. 
Psalms145:8 MBUYA ngwakukoma mtima pontho wakuva nyambalo, ngwakusowa chipsu pontho wakutifuna kokhonda mala." 
Psalms145:9 MBUYA ngwadidi kuna pyonsene pidalenga iye, pontho ambava nyambalo na pyonsene pidasasanya iye pile." 
Psalms145:10 Pyakulengwa pyanu pyonsene, MBUYA, pinakukuzani, pontho anthu onsene anapereka takhuta kuna imwe." 
Psalms145:11 Iwo analonga pya demelero ya ufumu wanu wamphamvu mbapanga anango pya mphamvu zanu," 
Psalms145:12 towera munthu onsene adziwe pya mabasanu amphamvu, pontho pya demelero ikulu ya ufumu wanu." 
Psalms145:13 Ufumu wanu ngokhonda mala, pontho imwe ndimwe mfumu wakukhala na kukhala. MBUYA ngwakukhulupirika kuna kudumbira kudachita iye, pontho iye ngwakukoma mtima papinthu pyonsene pimbachita iye." 
Psalms145:14 MBUYA ambaphedza kuimira dzololo anyakugwegweduka; iye ambayenusa anyakukotama na mitolo ale. 
Psalms145:15 Pinthu pyamoyo pyonsene pimbayang'ana kuna imwe na chidikhiro, imwembo mumbaapasa phoso ndzidzi unaisowa iwo." 
Psalms145:16 Imwe mumbaapasa pyakukwana mbamuakhutisa na pyonsene pinasowa iwo. 
Psalms145:17 MBUYA ngwakulungama papyonsene pimbachita iye, wansisi papyonsene pimbachita iye." 
Psalms145:18 MBUYA ali chifupi na ambamchemera ale, anthu ambamchemera na mtima onsene ale." 
Psalms145:19 Iye ambapasa anthu ambamgopa ale pyakusowa pyawo; iye ambava kulira kwawo mbaapulumusa. 
Psalms145:20 MBUYA ambakoya mwadidi munthu onsene ambamfuna ule, kwache anavunga anyakudawika." 
Psalms145:21 Ndzidzi onsene ndinakuza MBUYA; pyakulengwa pyache pyonsene mbapikuze dzinache yakuchena kwenda na kwenda. 
Psalms146:1 MBUYA mbakuzwe! Mkuze MBUYA, moyo wanga!" 
Psalms146:2 Ndinakuza MBUYA ndzidzi onsene unakhala ine na moyo; ndinamuimbira nyimbo Mulungu moyo wanga onsene. 
Psalms146:3 Lekani nyindira mafumu, anthu ambafa ale; nkhabe munthu anakwanisa kukupulumusa tayu." 
Psalms146:4 Iwo angafa, ambabwerera kufumbi; pansiku yeneyo pyonsene pimbanyerezera iwo pimbamalira ponthopo." 
Psalms146:5 Ngwakutsanzaya munthu, ule ana Mulungu wa Yakobo kuti amphedze, pontho ule ambanyindira MBUYA Mulungu wache," 
Psalms146:6 nyakulenga kudzulu, dziko yapansi na bara, pontho na pyonsene pili mwenemo. Ndzidzi onsene iye ngwakukhulupirika;" 
Psalms146:7 iye ambatonga mseru mwachilungamo anyakuponderezwa mbapasa phoso anthu anjala. MBUYA ambasudzula anyaperezo; 
Psalms146:8 MBUYA ambachitisa maboli-boli kuona. MBUYA ambayenusa anyakukotama na mitolo; MBUYA ambaafuna anthu ache akulungama. 
Psalms146:9 Iye ambatchinjiriza alendo ambakhala m'dziko mwathu ale; MBUYA ambaphedza akazi akufelwa na ana masiye, mbwenye ambadzudzumisa manyerezero a anyakuipa." 
Psalms146:10 MBUYA ndi mfumu wakukhala na kukhala. Zioni, Mulungu wako anatonga mifendu yonsene. MBUYA mbakuzwe!" 
Psalms147:1 MBUYA mbakuzwe! Mphyadidi kuimbira Mulungu wathu nyimbo zakumkuza nazo; mphyakukomadi pontho pyakuthema pyakwanga kumkuza. 
Psalms147:2 MBUYA akumanga pontho Yerusalemu; iye akudzesa Aisraele kuabweza kubulukira kumadziko akutali kudathawira iwo kule. 
Psalms147:3 Iye ambawangisa anyakusweka mtima mbamanga pironda pyawo. 
Psalms147:4 Iye ambalengesa nthondowa mbazithula zonsene madzina. 
Psalms147:5 Wamkulu pontho wamphamvu ndi Mbuyathu; munthu nkhabe kwanisa kupima nzeru zache tayu. 
Psalms147:6 MBUYA ambakwiza anyakupichepesa, mbwenye ambaponya pansi anyakudawika." 
Psalms147:7 Imbani nyimbo zakukuza nazo MBUYA; phatisa basa anyakatangale kuimbira napyo Mulungu wathu. 
Psalms147:8 Iye ambachitisa kuthambo kukhale makole; iye ambagwisa mvula padziko yapansi mbachitisa kuti maudzu amere m'mapiri. 
Psalms147:9 Nyama ambazipasa phoso mbadyesa ana makhungubwe ndzidzi unachemera iwo. 
Psalms147:10 Iye nkhabe komerwa na akavalo amphamvu, penu anyankhondo akuwanga mtima tayu;" 
Psalms147:11 mbwenye MBUYA ambakomerwa na anyakumgopa, anthu ambanyindira kuafuna kwache kokhonda mala ale." 
Psalms147:12 Yerusalemu, kuza MBUYA! Zioni, kuza Mulungu wako!" 
Psalms147:13 Nyakuchitisa mphinga za misuwo yako kukhala zamphamvu ndiye; anthu ako ambaatsanzayisa ndiye. 
Psalms147:14 Madire ako ambaayang'anira mwadidi mbakukhutisa na tirigu wadidi. 
Psalms147:15 Iye ambapereka matongero kuna dziko yapansi, pontho pimbalonga iye pimbachitika kabodzi kene." 
Psalms147:16 Iye ambaphopha pansi na matalala ninga na chakufinika, mbamwaza bume ninga dotha." 
Psalms147:17 Iye ambagwisa matalala ninga ntchangalabwe; nkhabe mbodzi anakwanisa kupirira tayu kutonthola kumbatumiza iye kule! 
Psalms147:18 Pontho iye ambatonga madzi akuphatana kunyunguluka; iye ambagwisa mphepo, madzimbo mbakuka." 
Psalms147:19 Iye ambapereka mphangwa zache kuna Yakobo, ambapereka matongero na mwambo wache kuna Israele." 
Psalms147:20 Penepi iye hadapichitire madzinza anango tayu; iwo nkhabe dziwa mwambo wache tayu. MBUYA mbakuzwe! 
Psalms148:1 MBUYA mbakuzwe! Kuzani MBUYA kubulukira kudzulu, imwe anyakukhala kudzuluko." 
Psalms148:2 Mkuzeni, imwe angelo ache onsene, imwe anyankhondo ache onsene akudzulu." 
Psalms148:3 Mkuzeni, imwe dzuwa na mwezi; mkuzeni, imwe nthondowa zakuyetima." 
Psalms148:4 Mkuzeni, imwe kudzulu, pontho imwe madzi a padzulu pa thambo." 
Psalms148:5 Onsene mbakuze dzina ya MBUYA! Iye adatonga, tenepo pyonsene pidalengwa;" 
Psalms148:6 na utongi wache iye adapikhazikisa m'mbuto mwapyo kwenda na kwenda, tenepo utongi wache nkhabe dzamala tayu." 
Psalms148:7 Mkuzeni MBUYA kubulukira pa dziko yapansi, imwe anyangume na bara zakuzwika zene;" 
Psalms148:8 njazi na matalala, bume na makole, chonzi pimbavera matongero ache pile." 
Psalms148:9 Mkuzeni, imwe pitunda na mapiri, imwe miti ya nsapo na misitu;" 
Psalms148:10 imwe nyama zonsene zakufuyiwa na zam'tsanga zene, zakukambadza na mbalame zene." 
Psalms148:11 Mkuzeni, imwe mafumu na madzinza onsene, ana mafumu na atongi anango onsene;" 
Psalms148:12 imwe atsikana na aphale, nkhalamba na piana pene." 
Psalms148:13 Onsene mbakuze dzina ya MBUYA! Dzinache njikulu kupiringana madzina anango onsene; demelero yache ili padzulu pa dziko yapansi na kudzulu kwene. 
Psalms148:14 Iye adachitisa dzinzache kukhala na mphamvu, towera anthu ache onsene amkuze, anthu a ku Israele, apamtima pache ale. MBUYA mbakuzwe!" 
Psalms149:1 MBUYA mbakuzwe! Imbirani MBUYA nyimbo yachinchino; mkuzeni pambuto panagumanyikana anthu ache akukhulupirika! 
Psalms149:2 Komerwa, iwe Israele, na Nyakukulengako; sekerani, anthu a ku Zioni, thangwi ya mfumu wanu!" 
Psalms149:3 Kuzani dzinache na kuvina; phatisani basa ng'oma na anyakatangale kumkuza napyo. 
Psalms149:4 MBUYA ambakomerwa na anthu ache; iye ambalemedza anyakupichepesa pakuachitisa kuti akunde. 
Psalms149:5 Alekeni anthu a Mulungu akomerwe pakukunda, pontho aimbe na kukomerwa mosiku onsene." 
Psalms149:6 Alekeni akhuwe ndzidzi unakuza iwo Mulungu, na matalasadawo akutwa m'manja mwawo" 
Psalms149:7 kukunda nawo madziko, pontho kutchunyusa madzinza;" 
Psalms149:8 kumanga mafumu awo na njema, akadamu awo na njema za simbi;" 
Psalms149:9 kutchunyusa madzinza ninga mudatongera Mulungu. Kweneku nkhukunda kwa anthu a Mulungu. MBUYA mbakuzwe! 
Psalms150:1 MBUYA mbakuzwe! Mkuzeni Mulungu m'Nyumbache! Mkuzeni kumbuto zache zamphamvu kudzulu! 
Psalms150:2 Mkuzeni thangwi ya mabasa amphamvu achita iye. Mkuzeni thangwi iye ngwamkululetu kupiringana anango onsene. 
Psalms150:3 Mkuzeni pakuliza ngoma. Mkuzeni na anyakatangale pontho na malimba. 
Psalms150:4 Mkuzeni na ng'oma pontho na kuvina. Mkuzeni na anyakatangale pontho pitoliro. 
Psalms150:5 Mkuzeni na nkhotcho. Mkuzeni na nkhotcho zakuveka. 
Psalms150:6 Mkuzeni MBUYA, imwe pyakulengwa pyamoyo pyonsene! MBUYA mbakuzwe!" 
Proverbs1:1 Yeneyi ndi miyambi ya Solomoni mwana Davite, mfumu wa Israele:" 
Proverbs1:2 kufunzisa nayo anthu nzeru pontho upangizi; kuvesa mafala audziwisi; 
Proverbs1:3 kufunzisa nayo anthu kukhala na makhaliro adidi pontho na kuva mwambo, kukhala akulungama, achilungamo pontho akutonga mwakukhonda yang'ana nkhope;" 
Proverbs1:4 kuchitisa nayo munthu okhonda dziwa pinthu kukhala wakungwala, pontho kufunzisa kuvesa pinthu na kupitonga kwa pinthu mwadidi kuna achiphale." 
Proverbs1:5 Anyanzeru mbavesere miyambi kuti athimizire udziwisi wawo, pontho anyakudziwa pinthu mbakhala na luso," 
Proverbs1:6 towera avese miyambi na misangani, pontho pifunziso na nthanthi pya anyanzeru." 
Proverbs1:7 Kugopa MBUYA ndiye nthomatoma ya nzeru, mbwenye mapupwe ambalulupisa nzeru pontho upangizi." 
Proverbs1:8 Mwananga ikha khutu kuna upangizi wa babako, pontho leka khonda pifunziso pya mako." 
Proverbs1:9 Thangwi pifunziso pyawo ntchipewu chachifumu mumsolo mwako, pontho mkufu wakubalika m'khosi mwako." 
Proverbs1:10 Ngakhala anyakudawa anakunyengerera, mwananga, leka kwatika nawo." 
Proverbs1:11 Ngakhala iwo analonga kuti, “Tende tibisalire munthu kuti timphe! Penu tende tisose chadala anthu adidi!" 
Proverbs1:12 Ninga dziko ya anyakufa, ife tinati tiakhudyule amoyo, pontho ninga masiye, tinati tiakhudyule amumphu." 
Proverbs1:13 Mfuma ya mtundu onsene, tinaigumana mbatidzaza nyumba zathu na pyakupokosera." 
Proverbs1:14 Tendembo nafe pabodzi, tenepo tinagawana pyonsene pinaba ifepyo.”" 
Proverbs1:15 Mwananga, leka tewera anthu ninga enewa, leka fambambo na njira inafamba iwo." 
Proverbs1:16 Iwo nkhabe nthontho na kuchita upandu tayu, pontho ndzidzi onsene iwo kwawo nkhuchuchisa chiropa basi." 
Proverbs1:17 Nkhupupwa kuteyera mbalame msampha mwenemo iyo ili maso soo! 
Proverbs1:18 Kumbachita anthu enewa nkhubisalira chiropa chawo chene, pontho nkhugonera mpeni." 
Proverbs1:19 Enewa ndiye mamalisiro a anthu onsene akuganyali na kuba; umbava umbapokosera moyo wa anyakuuchita. 
Proverbs1:20 Nzeru ikuchemera m'misewu, iyo ikuchemera mwakugaluza fala m'misika;" 
Proverbs1:21 ikuchemera m'misewu mule muna kusokosera; m'misuwo ya mizinda nzeru ikulonga kuti: 
Proverbs1:22 “Anthu akupupwamwe! Munakhala mapupwe kufikirana lini? Anthu akusingiriramwe! Munaleka lini kusingirirako? Munaleka lini kuzonda udziwisi? 
Proverbs1:23 Imwe mbamudavesera kwene kukusumululani kwanga, ine mbidakupangani manyerezero anga, pontho mbidachitisa nzeru zanga kudziwika kuna imwe." 
Proverbs1:24 Ine ndakuchemerani, kwache imwe hamudandivesere tayu; ndakuthambidzirani mkono, kwache imwe hamudapiikhe konta tayu." 
Proverbs1:25 Imwe mwakhonda upangizi wanga onsene, pontho hamudafune tayu kuti ndikusumululeni." 
Proverbs1:26 Natenepo mungaona nyatwa, ndinakusekani, pontho ndinakusingirirani pyakugoswa pingakufikirani," 
Proverbs1:27 pyakugoswa pingabwera pana imwe ninga chonzi, nyatwa zingakutswairani ninga chivumbulu, pontho mungava kupha na kusanyika mumtima." 
Proverbs1:28 “Tenepo iwo anandichemera, kwache ine sinaatawira tayu. Iwo anandisaka-saka konsene kwene, kwache iwo hanandigumana tayu." 
Proverbs1:29 Thangwi iwo adazonda udziwisi, mbasankhula kukhonda gopa MBUYA," 
Proverbs1:30 thangwi iwo hadafune upangizi wanga tayu, mbapasa nkhodolo kuasumulula kwanga," 
Proverbs1:31 iwo anati atambire pyathema iwo kupitambira, anabzimbirwa na pyakuipa pyawo." 
Proverbs1:32 Anthu akupupwa ambafa thangwi ya kukhonda nzeru; anthu akupupwa ambavungika thangwi ya kupithemba. 
Proverbs1:33 Mbwenye munthu anandiveserayo, anakoyiwa mwadidi, pontho anakhala pakupata okhonda chita mantha.”" 
Proverbs2:1 Mwananga, ikha mumtima pifunziso pyanga, pontho leka duwalira pinakupanga ine." 
Proverbs2:2 Vesera mafala anzeru, pontho ikhira mtima udziwisi." 
Proverbs2:3 Ngakhala unapempha kuvesa pinthu, penu kudembetera udziwisi;" 
Proverbs2:4 ngakhala iwe unapisaka-saka ninga siliva, penu ninga mfuma yakubisika," 
Proverbs2:5 penepo unavesa kuti kugopa MBUYA nkhulonganji, pontho iwe unamdziwa Mulungu." 
Proverbs2:6 Ndi MBUYA ule ambapasa nzeru; udziwisi pontho kuvesa pinthu pimbabulukira kuna iye. 
Proverbs2:7 Iye ambaphedza anyakulungama kupikwanisa, pontho ntchakugedera matswimo kuna anyakusowa chakupokanyisa." 
Proverbs2:8 Iye ambaonesesa kuti chilungamo chikuchitika mbayang'anira mwadidi anyakukhulupirikache. 
Proverbs2:9 Penepo iwe unavesa kulungama, chilungamo, pontho kutonga mwakukhonda yang'ana nkhope, unadziwa pyathema iwe kupichita." 
Proverbs2:10 Msolo wako unadzala na nzeru, pontho udziwisi unakuchitisa kukomerwa." 
Proverbs2:11 Kupitonga kwako pinthu mwadidi kunakutchinjiriza, pontho kuvesa pinthu kunakuyang'anira." 
Proverbs2:12 Nzeru zinakupulumusa kuna njira zakuipa, kuna anthu akulonga mafala akufudza," 
Proverbs2:13 ale ambasiya njira zakulungama kubaukira pyawo kunjira zamdima," 
Proverbs2:14 anthu ambakomerwa pyawo na kuchita pyakuipa mbasekera na kuchita pyakupotoka ale," 
Proverbs2:15 anthu ambachita pyaunthawatawa, pontho ale ana mtima wanyoka." 
Proverbs2:16 Nzeru zinakupulumusa kuna mkazi wa makhaliro akudzedzeduka, kuna mkazi wakuchita pyauputa na mafalache akutapira," 
Proverbs2:17 ule asiya mamunache wakukazhali naye, mbaduwalira kudumbira kudachita iye pamaso pa Mulungu kule." 
Proverbs2:18 Ngakhala unaenda kumusa kwache, ukwenda kafa, thangwi kwenda kweneko ndi sasawa na kwenda kudziko ya anyakufa." 
Proverbs2:19 Anyakwenda kuna mkazi weneyu nkhabe na mbodzi ene ambabwererako tayu, iwo nkhabe gumana pontho njira ya kumoyo tayu." 
Proverbs2:20 Natenepo iwe wathema kutewera njira za anthu adidi, pontho kukhala na makhaliro akulungama." 
Proverbs2:21 Anthu akulungama anakhala m'dziko, anthu akusowa chakupokanyisa anathimiza kukhalamo," 
Proverbs2:22 mbwenye Mulungu anabulusa anyakudawika m'dzikomo, mbaatchikhula anyakukhonda khulupirika m'dzikomo." 
Proverbs3:1 Mwananga, leka duwalira pifunziso pyanga, ndzidzi onsene koya mumtima mwako matongero akupasa ine." 
Proverbs3:2 Chifunziso changa chinakuchitisa kukhala na moyo wakulapha; pontho chinachitisa pinthu pyako kufamba mwadidi. 
Proverbs3:3 Leka tawirisa kukhulupirika na kufunana kubuluka muna iwe; pimangirire m'khosi mwako, pilembe mumtima mwako." 
Proverbs3:4 Tenepo unakomerwa mtima mbukhala na mbiri yadidi pamaso pa Mulungu na anthu ene. 
Proverbs3:5 Nyindira MBUYA na mtimako onsene, leka nyindira udziwisi wako ene." 
Proverbs3:6 Pyonsene pinachita iwe kumbuka MBUYA, tenepo iye anakuonesa njira yakuongoka." 
Proverbs3:7 Leka kupiyesa wekha ene nyanzeru; mbwenye gopa MBUYA mbuthunde pyakuipa. 
Proverbs3:8 Ungachita tenepo ipyo pinakhala ninga mtombwe kuwangisa manungo ako, pontho kupasa mphamvu magogodo ako." 
Proverbs3:9 Lemedza MBUYA na mfumako, pereka nsembe kuna iye mbewu zako zakutoma kutokota." 
Proverbs3:10 Penepo pikwa pyako pinadzala phamu-phamu, pontho maphiso ako anagabikira na vinyu." 
Proverbs3:11 Mwananga, MBUYA angakulanga, leka pinda, pontho leka swirizwa iye angakusumulula." 
Proverbs3:12 Thangwi MBUYA ambasumulula anthu ambafuna iye ale, ninga baba kusumulula mwanache wapamtima." 
Proverbs3:13 Ngwakutsanzaya munthu ule ambagumana nzeru, ule ambagumana udziwisi." 
Proverbs3:14 Kukhala na nzeru nkhwakuganyali pyakwanga kupiringana siliva; nkhwakudula pyakwanga kupiringana golidi. 
Proverbs3:15 Nzeru nsakufunika pyakwanga kupiringana miyala yakudula; iwe nkhabe kwanisa kusangiza nzeru na chinthu chinango tayu. 
Proverbs3:16 Nzeru zimbapasa moyo wakulapha na dzanjache ya madyo; pontho na dzanjache ya mabzere zimbapasa mfuma na chilemedzo. 
Proverbs3:17 Nzeru zinakwanisa kuchitisa moyo wako kukomerwa, mbizikutsogolera m'njira zamtendere." 
Proverbs3:18 Nzeru zakhala ninga muti wakupasa moyo kuna anyakuziphatisa; ngakutsanzaya ale ambakhumbatira nzeru. 
Proverbs3:19 MBUYA adaikha maziko a dziko yapansi na nzeru zache; na udziwisi wache iye adaikha thambo m'mbuto mwache. 
Proverbs3:20 Na nzeru zache iye ambachitisa madzi kutumbuka kubulukira pansi, pontho makole kuvumbisa mvula." 
Proverbs3:21 Mwananga, khala nyanzeru pontho nyakutonga pinthu mwadidi; leka tawira kuti pikuthawire." 
Proverbs3:22 Penepi pinakupasa moyo, mbipikhala ninga mkufu wakubalika m'khosi mwako." 
Proverbs3:23 Tenepo unakwanisa kufamba pyako okhonda gopa, pontho iwe nkhabe dzagwegweduka tayu." 
Proverbs3:24 Ndzidzi unaenda iwe kagona hunachita mantha tayu; chitulo chako chinakhala tapi-tapi. 
Proverbs3:25 Leka tekeseka na nyatwa zakugwa mwakututumusa, penu kuvungika kule kumbakunda anyakuipa." 
Proverbs3:26 Thangwi MBUYA anakhala chinyindiro chako; iye nkhabe dzatawirisa tayu kuti manyalo ako akweshwe na msampha. 
Proverbs3:27 Ndzidzi onsene ninga munapikwanisira iwe, chita udidi kuna ale athema kuchitirwa udidiwo." 
Proverbs3:28 Leka panga tsanthembako kuti, “Bwera ndzidzi unango; ndinati ndikupase mangwana,” mwenemo chinthucho uli nacho penepo pene." 
Proverbs3:29 Leka sasanya kuchitira tsanthembako pyakuipa, ule ambakhala m'khundu mwako kunyindira iwepo." 
Proverbs3:30 Leka pokanyisana na munthu unango okhonda na thangwi ene, ngakhala iye hadachite pinthu pyakukuvesa kupha tayu." 
Proverbs3:31 Leka sirira munthu wanthonga, penu kutewerawambo njira zache," 
Proverbs3:32 thangwi MBUYA ambanyansirwa na munthu wa makhaliro akupotoka, mbwenye anyakulungama mbashamwali ache." 
Proverbs3:33 MBUYA ambatemberera misa ya anyakudawa, mbwenye misa ya anyakulungama iye ambaitsanzayisa." 
Proverbs3:34 Anyakusingirira iye ambaasedegula, mbwenye ambakomera mtima anyakupichepesa," 
Proverbs3:35 Anthu anzeru anakhala na mbiri yadidi, mbwenye mapupwe anachitiswa manyadzo." 
Proverbs4:1 Ananga, veserani pifunziso pya babanu; ikhani khutu, tenepo munakhala akuvesa pinthu." 
Proverbs4:2 Pifunziso pinakupasani inepi mphyadidi, natenepo lekani kupikhonda." 
Proverbs4:3 Pikhali ine mphale m'nyumba mwa babanga, mwenemo ndili mwana wapamtima, mwana mbodzi ene basi wa mama," 
Proverbs4:4 babanga akhandifunzisa. Iye akhandipanga kuti, “Phatisa mafalanga na mtimako onsene; chita ninga munakupangira ine, tenepo unakhala na moyo." 
Proverbs4:5 Kwata nzeru na udziwisi! Leka duwalira, penu kukhonda mafalanga." 
Proverbs4:6 Leka pasa nkhodolo nzeru, tenepo zinakutchinjiriza; zifune, tenepo zinakuyang'anira mwadidi." 
Proverbs4:7 Papyonsene nzeru nsakufunikaletu; podi kwene kuti uvunge pyonsene pina iwe, khala na nzeru pontho udziwisi." 
Proverbs4:8 Ikha mtima pana nzeru, tenepo zinakukwiza; khumbatira nzeru, tenepo zinakupasa chilemedzo." 
Proverbs4:9 Izo zinakhala ninga kamdedzi mumsolo mwako, pontho zinakuvazika chipewu chachifumu chademelero.”" 
Proverbs4:10 Ndivesere mwananga. Leka chita mphwayo na pinakupanga inepi, tenepo iwe unakhala na moyo wakulapha." 
Proverbs4:11 Ine ndakufunzisa njira za nzeru, pontho ndakutsogolera kunjira zakuongoka." 
Proverbs4:12 Iwe ungafamba, nkhabe chinthu chinafuna kukutchinga tayu; iwe ungathamanga, nkhabe dzagwegweduka tayu." 
Proverbs4:13 Ndzidzi onsene phatisa upangizi, leka tawirisa kukuthawira; utchinjirize, thangwi moyo wako wagona penepo." 
Proverbs4:14 Leka ponda njira za anyakudawika, penu kufamba na njira za anthu akuipa." 
Proverbs4:15 Zithunde mbuleka famba na njira zawo, buluka kweneko mbulokote njira yakombo." 
Proverbs4:16 Anthu akudawika nkhabe kwanisa kugona angakhonda chita chinthu chakuipa tayu; iwo nkhabe ona chitulo tayu angakhonda gwisa munthu. 
Proverbs4:17 Kuchita pyakudawika nkhudya kwawo, pontho kuchita nthonga nkhumwa kwawo." 
Proverbs4:18 Njira imbafamba na anyakulungama imbakhala ninga kubuluka kwa dzuwa, kumbaenda mbakuchena kufikirana masikati." 
Proverbs4:19 Mbwenye njira ya anyakudawika yakhala ninga mdima wa ndiwe ani, iwo nkhabe dziwa chinthu chaagwegwedusacho tayu." 
Proverbs4:20 Mwananga, ikha khutu kuna pinalonga ine; vesera mwadidi mafalangawa." 
Proverbs4:21 Leka tawirisa kuti penepi pikubulukire, pontho piikhe mumtima mwako." 
Proverbs4:22 Iwo ambapasa moyo kuna anyakuagumana, pontho moyo wamphamvu kuna manungo ako onsene." 
Proverbs4:23 Chita mphole-mphole na kunyerezera kwako; thangwi mtimako ndi phata ya moyo. 
Proverbs4:24 Leka longa mafala akupotoka; leka longa pyakunama. 
Proverbs4:25 Ikha maso ako patsogolo, pontho leka chewuka chewuka." 
Proverbs4:26 Chita mphole-mphole na munaponda iwemo, tenepo pinthu pyako pinakufambira mwadidi." 
Proverbs4:27 Leka baukira kumadyo penu kumabzere; manyalo ako mbathunde njira zakuipa. 
Proverbs5:1 Mwananga, vesera mwadidi nzeru zanga, pontho ikha khutu kuna uphungu," 
Proverbs5:2 towera ukhale nyakutonga pinthu mwadidi, pontho pakanwa pako nkhabe dzasowa mafala anzeru." 
Proverbs5:3 Milomo ya puta imbajoja manyuchi, pontho mafalache ngakufewa ninga mafuta," 
Proverbs5:4 mbwenye mamalisiro ache iye ambawawa ninga nyongo, pontho ambakhala ninga talasada yakutwa." 
Proverbs5:5 Manyalo ache ayang'ana kuimfa; njira imbafamba na iye njakwenda kudziko ya anyakufa. 
Proverbs5:6 Njira yakwendera kumoyo iye nkhabe nayo pinthu tayu; njira zache nsakupotoka potoka, kwache iye nkhabe dzindikira tayu." 
Proverbs5:7 Chinchino ndivesereni ananga, pontho lekani chita mphwayo na pinalonga inepi." 
Proverbs5:8 Thundani mkazi ninga weneyu! Lekani na kwenda kwene chifupi na msuwo wache," 
Proverbs5:9 gopesera munataya chilemedzo kuna anthu anango, pontho kuvunga uphaleanu kuna anthu akukala mtima." 
Proverbs5:10 Ande, alendo anakwata mfumanu yonsene; pyonsene pyabulusira imwe kaluma pinafumisa munthu unango." 
Proverbs5:11 Mamalisiro a moyo wanu anakhala kubulira, uku manungo anu na minofu yanu pyamala pakatika." 
Proverbs5:12 Penepo iwe unalonga kuti, “Ndidakhonderanji ine kuva kulangwa? Ndidakhonderanji ine kuva kusumululwa?" 
Proverbs5:13 Mapungu anga nee ndikhaayesa ninga pinthu tayu, penu kuikha khutu kuna anyakundipanga nzeru tayu." 
Proverbs5:14 Tenepo lero ndikhadasala kwene nenene kuti ndivungike pamaso pa anthu onsene.” 
Proverbs5:15 Imwa madzi akubulukira mumchera mwako mwene, khala wakukhulupirika kuna mkazako." 
Proverbs5:16 Thangwi yache ninji umwe madzi akufamba pyawo m'misewu? Pontho kuti uchite apa unaponda apa unaponda? 
Proverbs5:17 Madzi ako mbakhale onthowo, mbukhonda kumwa madzi a mumchera wa mwinji." 
Proverbs5:18 Mcherako mbutsanzayiswe; komerwa na mkazako adakazhali na iwe," 
Proverbs5:19 wakubalika ninga nyasa, pontho wakukoma m'maso ninga mphalapala. Mabele ache mbakutopole mtima ndzidzi onsene; mbuthimize kumangika na kukufuna kwache." 
Proverbs5:20 Thangwi yache ninji utunduke na puta, mwananga? Watani unakhumbatira mkazi wa munthu unango?" 
Proverbs5:21 Thangwi pamaso pa MBUYA mabasa onsene a munthu ali nyimwa, pontho maso ache ambakhala konsene kunaenda iye." 
Proverbs5:22 Umambala wa nyakudawika ndi msampha kuna mwenechiroache; mabasache akudawika ambamkwidzinga ninga nkhambala. 
Proverbs5:23 Iye anati afe thangwi ya kukhonda kupithunda, pontho na thangwi ya kupupwa kwache kukulu iye anatayika." 
Proverbs6:1 Mwananga, ngakhala unaimirira tsanthembako mangawache, penu ngakhala unapereka pinyolo m'mbuto mwa mlendo;" 
Proverbs6:2 ngakhala unakweshwa na pinthu pidadumbira iwe, penu unaphatwa na mafala akubuluka m'kanwa mwako;" 
Proverbs6:3 penepo, mwananga, iwe uli m'manja mwa munthu unango, mbwenye umu ndiye munafunira iwe kubulukiramo: chimbiza ndoko wekha ene kuna tsanthembakoyo mbumdembetere kuti akusudzule!" 
Proverbs6:4 Maso ako mbaleke ona chitulo, leka na kuodzira kwene." 
Proverbs6:5 Vumbuka ninga mphalapala kuthawa nyakukhulisa, somphola mumsamphamo ninga mbalame." 
Proverbs6:6 Funza kubulukira kuna nyerere, nyakupololawe; nyerezera pya makhaliro ache mbukhale wanzeru." 
Proverbs6:7 Izo nkhabe mfumu tayu, nee mtongi penu mkadamu tayu," 
Proverbs6:8 kwache izo zimbakoyeratu phoso yawo m'malimwe, pontho zimbatutiratu pyakudya pyawo ndzidzi wakuvuna." 
Proverbs6:9 Nyakupololawe, unavesera manungo kufikirana lini? Ayi unalamuka lini patalimbapo?" 
Proverbs6:10 Iwe umbalonga kuti, “Ndichite kwene seya, pontho kuodzira kwene pang'ono basi, ndinafunya manjangawa ndipume pang'ono pene.”" 
Proverbs6:11 Kwache utcherengi unakufikira ninga mbava, pontho usiwa ninga phanga." 
Proverbs6:12 Nyakusowa basa, nyakudawika, ambaenda pyache na kulonga pyakunama," 
Proverbs6:13 ambakunyula maso ache, mbapereka chidziwiso na manyalo ache, pontho mbakodola na pyala pyache." 
Proverbs6:14 Na manyerezero akupotoka iye ambasasanya pyakuipa, pontho ndzidzi onsene kwache nkhumenyanisa anthu misolo." 
Proverbs6:15 Natenepo nyatwa inamgwera kabodzi na kabodzi; vumbu-vumbu iye anavungwa mbasaliratu penu-penu. 
Proverbs6:16 Pana pinthu pitanthatu pile MBUYA ambapizonda, pinthu pinomwe pile mphyakunyansa m'maso mwache:" 
Proverbs6:17 maso akunyada, kunama, manja akuchuchisa chiropa cha anyakukhonda dawa," 
Proverbs6:18 mtima wakusasanya kuchita pyakuipa, manyalo akuchimbiza kuthamanga kachita pyakudawika," 
Proverbs6:19 mboni wakulonga mdungulu wa pyakunama, pontho nyakumenyanisa abale misolo." 
Proverbs6:20 Mwananga, koya matongero a babako, pontho leka khonda pifunziso pya mako." 
Proverbs6:21 Afungire mumtima mwako kwenda na kwenda; apyangirire m'khosi mwako," 
Proverbs6:22 Iwo anakuonesa njira ndzidzi unafamba iwe; kukutchinjiriza ungagona na mosiku; ungalamuka analonga nawe. 
Proverbs6:23 Thangwi matongerowa akhala ninga nyale, chifunzisochi chakhala ninga cheza, pontho kusumululwa na malango ndi njira za kumoyo," 
Proverbs6:24 kukuchitisa kuthunda mkazi wakuzuda, pontho kuna mafala akutapira a mkazi wakudzedzeduka." 
Proverbs6:25 Leka tenuka mtima na kubalika kwacheko; penu kutopoka na maso ache akuyengerera. 
Proverbs6:26 Kugona na puta unakwanisa kuvunga kwene mkate ubodzi basi, mbwenye kugona na mkazi wakusembwa unavunga podi na moyo wako ene." 
Proverbs6:27 Ayi munthu anakwanisa kupalira moto pamiyendo pache, nguwo zache okhonda kupya?" 
Proverbs6:28 Ayi munthu anakwanisa kuponda makala a moto okhonda pisika manyalo ache? 
Proverbs6:29 Ndi sasawa na munthu ule anagona na mkazi wa munthu unango; munthu onsene anamkhuyayo nkhabe dzasiyiwa kwene okhonda tchunyuswa tayu. 
Proverbs6:30 Ayi anthu nkhabe selusa mbava tayu, iye angaba kufuna kukhutisa kwene mimbache." 
Proverbs6:31 Ande, angaphatwa, iye athema kupagali pyakuinjipa kupiringana kanomwe kubwezera pidaba iye pile; iye athema kupereka pyonsene pya m'nyumba mwache." 
Proverbs6:32 Munthu anachita uputayo nkhabe nzeru tayu; kunachita iyeko nkhupivunga kwene yekha ene. 
Proverbs6:33 Pironda na kuseluswa ndiye pimbatambira iye, pontho manyadzo nkhabe dzammalira tayu;" 
Proverbs6:34 thangwi ntchanje ya mamunache imbalamusa ukali, tenepo iye angabwezera, anachita kulumira mano." 
Proverbs6:35 Iye nkhabe dzava kupepeswa tayu; mitukwa izinji ene nkhabe kwanisa kumalisa shungu yacheyo tayu. 
Proverbs7:1 Mwananga, koya mafalanga pontho koya mumtima mwako matongero anga." 
Proverbs7:2 Teweza matongero anga, tenepo unakhala na moyo; yang'anira mwadidi pifunziso pyanga ninga ukuyang'anira mboni ya diso yako." 
Proverbs7:3 Pivale m'chala chako; pilembe mumtima mwako. 
Proverbs7:4 Ulonge kuna nzeru kuti, “Ndiwe nyamainganga,” pontho udziwisi uuyese mbaleako;" 
Proverbs7:5 ipyo pinakuphedza kuthunda maputa, pontho mkazi okhonda khulupirika na mafalache akushashalika." 
Proverbs7:6 Na pazhanera ya nyumbanga, nsiku inango ndikhayang'ana kunja." 
Proverbs7:7 Ndidaona aphale azinji okhonda dziwa pinthu, mbwenye pakati pawo ndidaonapo mbodzi wakupupwa." 
Proverbs7:8 Iye akhafamba mumsewu chifupi na nyumba ya mkaziyo mbathamula miyendo kwendera kumsuwo kwache," 
Proverbs7:9 m'chidodo, kunja kuli bii, mwenemo mdima wagwa." 
Proverbs7:10 Tenepo mkaziyo adabuluka panja kagumanikana naye, wakuvala ninga puta kufuna kumkwesha." 
Proverbs7:11 Iye ngwakulonga-longa ninga tchotcho, wamulomo, pontho matako ache nkhabe khala pansi tayu;" 
Proverbs7:12 lero ali mumsewu, khazi-khazi unamuona pamsika, kudikhira kukwesha amuna m'mphambano zonsene za njira." 
Proverbs7:13 Iye adaphata mphaleyo mbadyesana naye milomo, mwenemo kunkhope kuli puju, iye adalonga mbati," 
Proverbs7:14 “Ndapereka nsembe yachiphatizano kumusa lero; pidadumbira ine pile lero ndapichitisa kukwana-kwana. 
Proverbs7:15 Tenepo ndabuluka panja pano dzagumanikana nawe; ine ndikhakusaka-saka, tenepo ndakugumana!" 
Proverbs7:16 Talimbanga ndamala kithasika kale, na nguwo zakufewa zamaluwa za kudziko ya Iguputo." 
Proverbs7:17 Ndawazirapo mafuta amure, pontho ndawazirapo pyakununkhira pya aloena kinamoni." 
Proverbs7:18 Tende! Tigwe maya mpakana kunja mbee; tikomerwe pyakwanga na mtututu wa kukhumbatirana. 
Proverbs7:19 Kumusaku mamunanga nkhabeko; aenda paulendo kutali pyakwanga. 
Proverbs7:20 Iye adakwata kobiri zizinji; iye anabwererako mwezi ungapita kuchidima.” 
Proverbs7:21 Tenepo iye adatunduka na mafalache akutapira ale; iye adanyengeka na mafalache akushashalika ale. 
Proverbs7:22 Sindzidzi iye adenda naye ninga ng'ombe kwenda kachekwa, ninga mbala kwenda kakweshwa na msampha," 
Proverbs7:23 kule tswimo inalasa matumbo ache. Iye akhala ninga mbalame kwenda mumsampha; nkhabe kupidziwa tayu kuti moyo wache ukhali pamoto. 
Proverbs7:24 Chinchino, mwananga, ndivesere; ikha khutu kuna chifunziso changa." 
Proverbs7:25 Leka kwatika na mkazi ninga weneyu, leka kwenda chimpune-mpune kumtewera." 
Proverbs7:26 Iye avunga mdungulu ene wa amuna; amuna apha iye ngazinji ene. 
Proverbs7:27 Musache ndi msewu ukulu wa kudziko ya anyakufa, wakubidira kumasubi a imfa." 
Proverbs8:1 Ngavesera! Nzeru zikuchemera. Udziwisi ukupichitisa okha ene kuveka. 
Proverbs8:2 Pansonga ya phiri chifupi na njira, pontho na m'mphambano iye akuimira." 
Proverbs8:3 Pamsuwo wakupitira mumzinda, pamsuwo iye akuchemera mbati," 
Proverbs8:4 “Kuna imwe anthu, ndikukuchemerani; ndikuchemera anthu onsene padziko yapansi." 
Proverbs8:5 Imwe okhonda khwima, khalani anyakutonga pinthu mwadidi. Imwe mapupwe, chinchino khalani na nzeru." 
Proverbs8:6 Veserani mafalanga akufunikawa; ine ndafungula mulomo wanga kuti ndilonge pyakulungama. 
Proverbs8:7 Pinalonga inepi mphyakuona; kunama ndimbakuzonda pyakwanga. 
Proverbs8:8 Pyonsene pimbalonga ine mphyakuona, thangwi mulomo wanga nkhabe longa mafala akupotoka tayu." 
Proverbs8:9 Kuna nyakuvesa pinthu mafalanga ngadidi; ngakuthema kuna ale ana udziwisi. 
Proverbs8:10 Sankhulani uphungu wanga m'mbuto mwa siliva; sankhulani nzeru nee golidi chadi-chadi tayu," 
Proverbs8:11 thangwi nzeru njakufunika kupiringana miyala yakudula; chinthu chinakhumba imwecho nkhabe kwanisa kuchisangiza na nzeru tayu. 
Proverbs8:12 “Ine nzeru, ndimbafambirana na kuvesa pinthu; ine ndina udziwisi pontho ndine nyakutonga pinthu mwadidi." 
Proverbs8:13 Kugopa MBUYA nkhuzonda pyakuipa; ndimbazonda kugaya na kutumbama, makhaliro akuipa pontho mafala akupotoka." 
Proverbs8:14 Ine ndimbapereka uphungu, pontho ndine nyakupikwanisa, ndina udziwisi pontho mphamvu." 
Proverbs8:15 Na ine mafumu ambakwanisa kutonga, pontho atongi ambakwanisa kusasanya matongero adidi." 
Proverbs8:16 Na ine akadamu ambakwanisa kutonga; mathubu ambakwanisa kufambisa dziko. 
Proverbs8:17 Ine ndimbafunambo anyakundifuna ale; anyakundisaka-sakawo ambandigumana. 
Proverbs8:18 Mfuma na chilemedzo pili m'manja mwanga, pontho ufumi okhonda mala na kufamba mwadidi kwa pinthu." 
Proverbs8:19 Pinthu pimbagumanwa muna ine mphyadidi kupiringana golidi; mphyakufunika pyakwanga kupiringana siliva. 
Proverbs8:20 Njira zimbafamba ine nsakulungama; njira zimbatewera ine nsa chilungamo. 
Proverbs8:21 Ndimbapereka mfuma kuna anyakundifuna, mbandidzaza pikwa pyawo na ufumi." 
Proverbs8:22 “Pakutoma papyonsene MBUYA adalenga ine pano, nthomatoma ya basache yakale." 
Proverbs8:23 Na kale ene ine ndidasasanywa, pakutomaletu dziko mbidzati lengwa." 
Proverbs8:24 Ine ndidabalwa bara mbidzati lengwa, mbakudzati khala mphuno za madzi;" 
Proverbs8:25 mwenemo mapiri mbadzati ikhwa m'mbuto mwawo, pontho pitunda mbapidzati lengwa ine ndidabalwa kale," 
Proverbs8:26 Mulungu mbadzati lenga dziko yapansi na mindache, podi na mataka ene." 
Proverbs8:27 Ndikhalipo kale ndzidzi udakhazikisa iye thambo m'mbuto mwache, pikhaikha iye madire a bara yakuzwika," 
Proverbs8:28 pidaikha iye makole a kuthambo pidafungula iye mphuno za madzi pansi pa bara," 
Proverbs8:29 pidaikha iye madire a bara mbatonga madzi kuti aleke numpha madirewo, pontho pidaikha iye maziko a dziko yapansi." 
Proverbs8:30 Ndikhali m'khundu mwache ninga misiriache, iye akhakomerwa nane nsiku na nsiku, pontho ine ndikhasekera ndzidzi onsene pamaso pache," 
Proverbs8:31 kusekera na dziko yache yonsene, pontho kukomerwa na anthu adasasanya iye ale." 
Proverbs8:32 “Chinchino, ananga, ndivesereni; ngakutsanzaya anthu ale ambatewera njira zanga." 
Proverbs8:33 Veserani uphungu wanga, tenepo munakhala anzeru; lekani kuukhonda." 
Proverbs8:34 Ngwakutsanzaya munthu ambandivesera ule, ule ambakhala pamsuwo panga nsiku zonsene, kudikhira pamsuwo pamusa panga." 
Proverbs8:35 Thangwi nyakundigumanayo agumana moyo, pontho MBUYA anamkomera mtima." 
Proverbs8:36 Mbwenye anyakukhonda kundigumanayo akupikuwaza okha ene; anyakundizonda onsene ambafuna imfa.” 
Proverbs9:1 Nzeru amanga nyumbache mbaimisa nsanamira zinomwe. 
Proverbs9:2 Iye adapha nyama kuchita phwando, mbavungaza-vungaza vinyu wache; iye amala kuipiikha kale pathebulu." 
Proverbs9:3 Iye atuma anyabasache kachemera anthu, kubulukira na pambuto zakukwira muluwani akuchemera mbati," 
Proverbs9:4 “Anthu okhonda dziwa pinthu bwerani kuno!” Iye akulonga kuna anyakusowa nzeru mbati," 
Proverbs9:5 “Bwerani, idyani pyakudya pyangapi, pontho mwani vinyu avungaza ineyu." 
Proverbs9:6 Bulukani pakati pa anthu okhonda dziwa pinthu, tenepo munakhala na moyo; fambani na njira ya udziwisi." 
Proverbs9:7 “Munthu ule anasumulula nyakusingirira, ambapichemerera yekha ene kutikanwa; ule anasumulula munthu wakuipa, ambapichitisa yekha kukuwazika." 
Proverbs9:8 Leka sumulula nyakusingirira, gopesera anakuzonda, mbwenye sumulula munthu wanzeru, iye anakufuna." 
Proverbs9:9 Pereka uphungu kuna munthu wanzeru, tenepo anathimizira nzeru zache; funzisa munthu wakulungama, tenepo anathimizira udziwisi wache." 
Proverbs9:10 “Nthomatoma ya nzeru nkhugopa MBUYA, pontho kukhala na udziwisi nkhudziwa Nyakuchena ule," 
Proverbs9:11 thangwi kudzera muna ine nsiku za moyo wako zinainjipa pontho pyaka pyako pinathimizirika. 
Proverbs9:12 Ngakhala una nzeru anafuna dzaganyali ndiwepo; mbwenye ngakhala unailulupisa ndiwepo anafuna dzaona nyatwa.” 
Proverbs9:13 Pupwe akhala ninga mkazi wamulomo, okhonda tsalakana pinthu, pontho wakusowa manyadzo." 
Proverbs9:14 Iye ambakhala pamsuwo wa nyumbache, pontho pampando pambuto yakukwira ya luwani," 
Proverbs9:15 kuchemera anthu akugwanda pyawo, ale akufambira mathangwi awo mbati," 
Proverbs9:16 “Imwe anthu okhonda dziwa pinthu, pitani muno!” Kuna anyakusowa nzeru iye ambalonga kuti," 
Proverbs9:17 “Madzi akuba ambakoma pyakwanga; mkate wakudya chibiso-biso umbatapira.” 
Proverbs9:18 Iwo nkhabe kupidziwa tayu kuti anyakwendako ambafa, kuti anyakuchemerwawo apita kale kudzenje yakuzwika ya dziko ya anyakufa." 
Proverbs10:1 Yeneyi ndi miyambi ya Solomoni: Mwana wanzeru ambachitisa babache kufamba na nthuku phaa, mbwenye mwana wakupupwa ambatsukwalisa mache." 
Proverbs10:2 Mfuma yakugumanwa na njira zakuipa nkhabe ganyalisa tayu, mbwenye kulungama kumbapulumusa moyo wa munthu." 
Proverbs10:3 MBUYA nkhabe tawirisa anyakulungama kutcherenga na njala tayu, mbwenye ambachitisa anyakuipa kukhonda gumana pinafuna iwo." 
Proverbs10:4 Kukhala manja mbwee kumbadzesa utcherengi, mbwenye manja a basa ambafumisa munthu." 
Proverbs10:5 Munthu wanzeru ambavuna mbewu zingatokota, mbwenye nyakugona pyache ndzidzi wakuvuna ambachitisa manyadzo." 
Proverbs10:6 Anyakulungama kwawo nkhutambira mtsanzayiso, mbwenye nthonga imbabisala m'kanwa mwa nyakuipa." 
Proverbs10:7 Anyakulungama ambakumbukwa ninga mtsanzayiso, mbwenye dzina ya nyakuipa inafudzika." 
Proverbs10:8 Munthu wanzeru ambavera matongero, mbwenye pupwe wakulonga-longa ambavungika." 
Proverbs10:9 Munthu wangwiro ambakhala pakupata, mbwenye nyakufamba njira zakupotoka ambafitikizwa." 
Proverbs10:10 Kukunyula maso kumbadzesa nyatwa, mbwenye kusumulula mwakuwanga mtima kumbadzesa mtendere." 
Proverbs10:11 Mulomo wa nyakulungama ndi mphuno ya madzi a moyo, mbwenye nthonga imbabisala m'kanwa mwa nyakuipa." 
Proverbs10:12 Chizondi chimbalamusa mapoko-poko, mbwenye kufunana kumbafikhira pyakuipa pyonsene." 
Proverbs10:13 Nzeru zimbagumanwa m'kanwa mwa nyakuvesa pinthu, mbwenye mtswamu umbakhalira kumsana kwa nyakukhonda kuva." 
Proverbs10:14 Munthu wanzeru ambapigumanyira udziwisi, mbwenye mulomo wa pupwe umbadzesa kuvungika." 
Proverbs10:15 Ufumi wa nyakufuma ndi mzinda wakutchingwa na mpanda, mbwenye utcherengi nkhuvungika kwa nyakutcherenga." 
Proverbs10:16 Kupagalwi kwa anyakulungama kumbaadzesera moyo, mbwenye kupagalwi kwa anyakudawika kumbaadzesera pyakuipa." 
Proverbs10:17 Nyakutambira uphungu ambafamba m'njira ya moyo, mbwenye anyakukhonda kusumululwa ambabauka." 
Proverbs10:18 Nyakubisa chizondi chache weneyo ngwakunama, pontho nyakulonga mwanzache tsweda weneyo ndi pupwe." 
Proverbs10:19 Kuinjipisa pyakulonga, pyakudawa nkhabe sowapo tayu, mbwenye nyanzeru ngule ambaphata mulomo wache." 
Proverbs10:20 Lulume ya nyakulungama ndi siliva wadidiletu, mbwenye manyerezero a anyakudawika ngapezi-pezi." 
Proverbs10:21 Pifunziso pya anyakulungama pimbaganyalisa azinji, mbwenye mapupwe ambafa thangwi ya kusowa nzeru." 
Proverbs10:22 Mtsanzayiso wa MBUYA umbadzesa mfuma, pontho MBUYA nkhabe thimizapo pyakutsukwalisa pamfumako tayu." 
Proverbs10:23 Nkhupupwa kukomerwa na kuchita pyakuipa, mbwenye munthu waudziwisi ambakomerwa na nzeru." 
Proverbs10:24 Pinthu pimbagopa nyakudawika ndiye pinafuna dzamgwera, mbwenye nyakulungama ambapaswa pimbakhumba iye," 
Proverbs10:25 Chonzi chingadza chimbatswaira anyakuipa onsene, mbwenye anyakulungama ambaimira dzololo kwenda na kwenda." 
Proverbs10:26 Leka kwata nyakupolola kukuphatira basa; iye anakuchitisa mano ako kuzirizwa mbakupasa nyatwa ninga utsi m'maso mwako. 
Proverbs10:27 Gopa MBUYA, tenepo unakhala na moyo wakulapha, mbwenye nyakudawika ambafa ndzidzi wache mbudzati kwana." 
Proverbs10:28 Chidikhiro cha munthu wadidi chimbamchitisa kukomerwa, mbwenye nyakudawika nkhabe chidikhiro tayu." 
Proverbs10:29 MBUYA ambatchinjiriza nyakulungama, mbwenye ambavunga anyakuchita pyakudawa." 
Proverbs10:30 Ndzidzi onsene munthu wakulungama anakhazikika, mbwenye nyakudawika nkhabe dzakhala m'dziko muno tayu." 
Proverbs10:31 Nyakulungama ambalonga pyanzeru, mbwenye lulume yakulonga pyakupotoka inadedzwa." 
Proverbs10:32 Nyakulungama ambadziwa pinthu pyakuthema, mbwenye nyakudawika ndzidzi onsene ambalonga pyakupotoka." 
Proverbs11:1 MBUYA ambazonda midida yakunama, mbwenye ambakomerwa na midida yakuona." 
Proverbs11:2 Munthu ananyada chinchino, anachitiswa manyadzo, mbwenye ntchinthu chanzeru kukhala wakupichepesa." 
Proverbs11:3 Kuona mtima kwa anyakulungama kumbaatsogolera, mbwenye anthu okhonda nyindirika ambavungwa na kunama kwawo." 
Proverbs11:4 Mfuma nkhabe dzaganyalisa munthu tayu pansiku yakutongwa mseru, mbwenye kulungama kumbapulumusa moyo wa munthu." 
Proverbs11:5 Kulungama kwa anyakusowa chakupokanyisa kumbachitisa njirawo kuongoka, mbwenye anyakudawika ambagwiswa na kudawika kwawo." 
Proverbs11:6 Kulungama kwa anthu adidi kumbaapulumusa, mbwenye anyakukhonda khulupirika ambakweshwa na pikhumbo pyawo pyakuipa." 
Proverbs11:7 Nyakudawika angafa, chidikhiro chache chimbafa naye pabodzi; pyonsene pikhadikhira iye kubulukira kuna mphamvu zache pyamala kwenda m'madzi." 
Proverbs11:8 Nyakulungama ambapulumuswa panyatwa; mbwenye nyatwazo zimbagwera nyakudawika. 
Proverbs11:9 Mafala a nyakukhonda tsalakana pya Mulungu ambavunga tsanthembache, mbwenye nzeru zimbachitisa nyakulungama kupulumuka." 
Proverbs11:10 Mzinda umbakomerwa anyakulungama pinthu pyawo pingaafambira mwadidi, pontho kumbakhala kusekera kukulu anyakudawika angafa." 
Proverbs11:11 Mzinda umbakula anyakulungama angautsanzayisa, mbwenye mafala a anyakudawika ambagomola mzinda." 
Proverbs11:12 Nyakutikana tsanthembacheyo ngwakusowa nzeru, mbwenye munthu wanzeru ambakhala pyache mulomo phoo." 
Proverbs11:13 Nyatsweda ambapitisa pinthu mphepo, mbwenye munthu wakunyindirika ambakoya chinsisi." 
Proverbs11:14 Dzinza imbagwa ngakhala nkhabe msolo wanzeru, mbwenye mapungu azinji ambachitisa kukhala pamtendere." 
Proverbs11:15 Nyakuimirira mlendo mangawache anasanyika ndiye ene, mbwenye nyakuzonda pinyolo ambakhala pamtendere." 
Proverbs11:16 Mkazi wakukoma mtima ambalemedzwa, mbwenye mamuna wa vinga ambaganyali kwene mfuma basi." 
Proverbs11:17 Nyakukoma mtima ambaganyali pinthu pyadidi, mbwenye nyakukala mtima ambapidzesera yekha ene nyatwa." 
Proverbs11:18 Nyakudawika kwache nkhunyengezwa kwene, mbwenye nyakubzala pyakulungama wache ndi mfupo chadi-chadi." 
Proverbs11:19 Nyakukakamira chilungamo anakhala na moyo, mbwenye nyakukakamira kuchita pyakudawayo anafa." 
Proverbs11:20 MBUYA ambanyansirwa na anthu a manyerezero akupotoka, mbwenye ambakomerwa na makhaliro akusowa chakuapokanyisa." 
Proverbs11:21 Iwe wathema kupidziwadi kuti: nyakudawika anati atchunyuswe, mbwenye anyakulungama anati apulumuke." 
Proverbs11:22 Ninga mphete yagolidi m'mphuno mwa nkhumba ndi sasawambo na mkazi wakubalika wakusowa nzeru. 
Proverbs11:23 Pikhumbo pya nyakulungama mamalisiro ache ngudidi, mbwenye chidikhiro cha nyakudawika mamalisiro ache ngukali." 
Proverbs11:24 Unango ngwakufewa pyache manja, kwache ndiye ambanyanya kufuma, unangombo ndi nkhunguni, kwache ndiye ambanyanya kutcherenga." 
Proverbs11:25 Munthu wakufewa manja pinthu pyache pimbamfambira mwadidi; nyakuphedza anthu anango anaphedzwambo. 
Proverbs11:26 Anthu ambatemberera munthu ule ambabisa mapirache kuti aganyali nawo, mbwenye ambatsanzayisa nyakugulisa mapirache pandzidzi wache." 
Proverbs11:27 Nyakusaka-saka udidi, anati akomerwe mtima, mbwenye pyakuipa pimbadzambo kuna nyakupisaka-sakayo." 
Proverbs11:28 Anyakunyindira mfuma anaunyala, mbwenye anyakulungama anabiriwira ninga masamba awisi." 
Proverbs11:29 Nyakudzesa nyatwa kuna banjache anayeswa mbaliro yakunja, pontho pupwe anakhala nyabasa wa munthu wanzeru." 
Proverbs11:30 Makhaliro akulungama akhala ninga muti wakupasa moyo, mbwenye kukhonda vera mwambo kumbapokosera moyo." 
Proverbs11:31 Ngakhala nyakulungama ambatambira pinthu pyakumthemera pansi pano, apo nditani na nyakuipa mtima pontho nyakudawa." 
Proverbs12:1 Nyakutawira kulangwa ambafuna nzeru, mbwenye nkhupupwa kuzondana na kusumululwa." 
Proverbs12:2 MBUYA ambakomerwa na munthu wadidi, mbwenye iye ambachitisa nyakusasanya kuchita pyakuipa kukonwa." 
Proverbs12:3 Munthu nkhabe likha tayu pakuchita pyakuipa, mbwenye nyakulungama akhala ninga muti wakulikha." 
Proverbs12:4 Mkazi wadidi ambakhala ninga chipewu chachifumu kuna mamunache, mbwenye mkazi wakumchitisa manyadzo akhala ninga utenda wa kasipa wa m'magogodo mwache." 
Proverbs12:5 Manyerezero a anyakulungama ngakuona, mbwenye uphungu wa anyakudawika ngwakuphata nawo anthu m'maso." 
Proverbs12:6 Mafala a anyakudawika ngaupandu, mbwenye malongero a nyakulungama ambapulumusa anthu." 
Proverbs12:7 Anyakudawika ambaponyerwa kunja mbakhonda onekave, mbwenye banja ya anyakulungama imbakhazikika." 
Proverbs12:8 Munthu ambasimbwa malingana na nzeru zina iye, mbwenye anthu a manyerezero akupotoka ambalulupiswa." 
Proverbs12:9 Mphyadidi kukhala munthu ene pyako mbupha pinthu pyako na manjako, kusiyana na kupithemba ninga nyapyachembo mwenemo ukugona na njala." 
Proverbs12:10 Munthu wadidi ambatsalakana mwadidi pifuyo pyache, mbwenye kukoma mtima kwa nyakuipa nkhukala mtima basi." 
Proverbs12:11 Nyakulima wakuphata basa m'munda mwache ambakhala na phoso izinji, mbwenye nkhupupwa kutaya ndzidzi na mabasa apezi-pezi." 
Proverbs12:12 Nsanja yamphamvu ya nyakudawika imbavungika, mbwenye maziko a nyakulungama ambakhazikika." 
Proverbs12:13 Nyakudawika ambakweshwa na malongero ache akuipa onthowo, mbwenye nyakulungama ambapulumuka panyatwa." 
Proverbs12:14 Kubulukira pa mafalache adidi munthu ambatambira pinthu pyadidi; ninga mumbachitira manjache kumfupa thangwi ya mabasache. 
Proverbs12:15 Pimbachita pupwe pimbaoneka ninga mphyadidi m'maso mwache, mbwenye munthu wanzeru ambavesera uphungu unapaswa iyewo." 
Proverbs12:16 Pupwe ambaoneseratu kuzhangali kwache kabodzi kene, mbwenye munthu wanzeru angatikanwa nkhabe kupiikha konta tayu." 
Proverbs12:17 Nyakulonga pyakuonadi ambapereka umboni wakuona, mbwenye nyakunama ambaperekambo umboni wakunama." 
Proverbs12:18 Mafala a nyamphotcho-photcho ambalasa ninga talasada, mbwenye lulume ya munthu wanzeru imbawangisa." 
Proverbs12:19 Mafala akuonadi ambakhala kwenda na kwenda, mbwenye kunama nkhabe kwata ndzidzi tayu." 
Proverbs12:20 Mumtima mwa anyakusasanya kuchita pyakuipa mumbakhala chiphamaso, mbwenye kukomerwa kumbakhala kuna anyakufuna mtendere." 
Proverbs12:21 Nkhabe chakugoswa chinafuna dzagwera anyakulungama, mbwenye anyakudawika zawo ndi nyatwa zene basi." 
Proverbs12:22 MBUYA ambanyansirwa na kanwa yakunama, mbwenye ambakomerwa na anyakulonga pyakuonadi." 
Proverbs12:23 Nyakuchenjera nkhabe kupionesera tayu kuti ana udziwisi, mbwenye pupwe ambaonesa pakwecha kupupwa kwache." 
Proverbs12:24 Manja a basa anakhala na utongi, mbwenye kupolola mamalisiro ache nkhukhala bitchu." 
Proverbs12:25 Kutsukwala mumtima mwa munthu kwakhala ninga mtolo kuna iye, mbwenye mafala adidi anakwanisa kumgalamusa." 
Proverbs12:26 Nyakulungama ambaonesa njira shamwaliache, mbwenye njira za anyakudawika zimbaaendesa m'tsanga." 
Proverbs12:27 Nyakukhulisa wakupolola nkhabe na kuotcha kwene nyama yapha iye tayu, mbwenye munthu wa manja a basa ambagumana mfuma ikulu." 
Proverbs12:28 Njira yakulungama imbaendesa kumoyo; mbwenye njira yakudawika imbaendesa kuimfa. 
Proverbs13:1 Mwana wanzeru ambavera uphungu wa babache, mbwenye nyakusingirira nkhabe tawira kusumululwa tayu." 
Proverbs13:2 Kubulukira pa mafalache adidi munthu ambakomerwa na pinthu pyadidi, mbwenye mphandu ambakhala dyokodyoko kufuna kuchita nthonga." 
Proverbs13:3 Nyakuchita mphole-mphole na malongero ache ambatchinjiriza moyo wache, mbwenye nyakulonga nyamphotcho-photcho anavungika." 
Proverbs13:4 Nyakupolola ambakhumba chinthu mbakhonda kuchigumana, mbwenye anthu a manja a basa pinthu pyawo pimbaafambira mwadidi." 
Proverbs13:5 Nyakulungama ambazonda pyakunama, mbwenye makhaliro a nyakudawika ambachitisa manyadzo pontho kululupisa." 
Proverbs13:6 Kulungama kumbatchinjiriza munthu wakuona mtima, mbwenye kudawika kumbavunga anyakudawa." 
Proverbs13:7 Munthu unango ambapisangiza nyamfuma, mwenemo iye nkhabe na chinthu chene tayu; unango ambapisangiza nyakutcherenga, kwache iye ana mfuma izinji." 
Proverbs13:8 Mfuma ya munthu inakwanisa kuombola moyo wache, mbwenye nyakutcherenga nkhabe kuva kuthuswa tayu." 
Proverbs13:9 Cheza cha anyakulungama chimbagaka pyakwanga, mbwenye nyale ya anyakuipa yakhala ninga nsakali yakupuchira." 
Proverbs13:10 Kutumbama kumbabala mapoko-poko, mbwenye nzeru zimbagumanwa muna anyakuva uphungu." 
Proverbs13:11 Kobiri zakukhonda kuzibulusira kaluma zimbamala chiluwiluwi, mbwenye ungachita mwadiya umbadzala na makhonyo unafuma." 
Proverbs13:12 Chidikhiro chingachita nthontho mtima umbapha, mbwenye pikhumbo pingakwana-kwana pimbakhala ninga muti wakupasa moyo." 
Proverbs13:13 Nyakutikana uphungu ambapidzesera yekha ene nyatwa, mbwenye nyakuvera matongero ambafupwa." 
Proverbs13:14 Chifunziso cha munthu wanzeru ndi mphuno ya madzi akupasa moyo, kubulusa munthu pamsampha wa imfa." 
Proverbs13:15 Nzeru zimbachitisa kukomerwa mtima, mbwenye njira ya anyakukhonda khulupirika njamakolong'ondo." 
Proverbs13:16 Nyakuchenjera ambachita pinthu pyonsene mwanzeru, mbwenye pupwe ambaoneseratu pakwecha kupupwa kwache." 
Proverbs13:17 Nyamphangwa wakudawika ambadzesa nyatwa, mbwenye nyamphangwa wakunyindirika ambadzesa mtendere." 
Proverbs13:18 Nyakukhonda kusumululwa wache ngutcherengi na manyadzo basi, mbwenye nyakutawira kusumululwa ambalemedzwa." 
Proverbs13:19 Pikhumbo pingakwana-kwana pimbachitisa moyo kuva kutapira, mbwenye mapupwe nkhabe funa kusiya pyakuipa pyawo tayu." 
Proverbs13:20 Nyakufamba na anthu anzeru ambakhalambo nyanzeru, mbwenye nyakuchita ushamwali na mapupwe anavungika." 
Proverbs13:21 Dzedze imbatewera nyakudawa, mbwenye kufamba mwadidi kwa pinthu ndi mfupo wa anyakulungama." 
Proverbs13:22 Munthu wadidi ambasiyira pidzukulu pyache mfuma, mbwenye mfuma ya anyakuipa inaenda kuna anyakulungama." 
Proverbs13:23 Minda ya anyakutcherenga inakwanisa kupha phoso izinji, mbwenye anyakusowa chilungamo ambadza mbaabera pyonsene." 
Proverbs13:24 Ule ambakhonda kwapula mwanache nkhabe kumfuna tayu, mbwenye nyakumfuna mwanache nkhabe nthontho na kumtchunyusa." 
Proverbs13:25 Anyakulungama ambadya mbakhuta, mbwenye kumimba kwa anyakudawika kumbakhala kade-kade." 
Proverbs14:1 Mkazi wanzeru ambamanga banjache, mbwenye na manjache mkazi wakupupwa ambafudza banjache." 
Proverbs14:2 Nyamakhaliro akulungama ambagopa MBUYA, mbwenye munthu wa mtima wanyoka ambalulupisa MBUYA." 
Proverbs14:3 Malongero a pupwe ambamkwapulisa yekha ene, mbwenye mafala a munthu wanzeru ambamtchinjiriza." 
Proverbs14:4 Kusowa ng'ombe zakulima, pikwa nkhabe dzala tayu, mbwenye zingakhalapo pikwapyo pinati pidzale phamu-phamu na mapira." 
Proverbs14:5 Mboni yakuona nkhabe chiphamaso tayu, mbwenye mboni yakunama, kunama nkhudya kwache." 
Proverbs14:6 Anyakusingirira ambasaka-saka nzeru, kwache nkhabe kuzigumana, mbwenye zimbadza mwakukhonda nensa kuna anyaudziwisi." 
Proverbs14:7 Funduka kutali na pupwe, thangwi iwe nkhabe dzagumana nzeru na pinalonga iyepyo." 
Proverbs14:8 Nzeru za anyakuchenjera zimbafungula maso, mbwenye mapupwe ambanyengezwa na kupupwa kwawo." 
Proverbs14:9 Mapupwe nkhabe pinthu na kutawira kudawa kwawo, mbwenye kufunirana udidi kumbagumanwa muna anyakulungama." 
Proverbs14:10 Mtima onsene umbadziwa kuva kwache kupha, nkhabe munthu anakwanisa kugawana na mwanzache tayu kukomerwa kwa mtimache." 
Proverbs14:11 Nyumba ya nyakuipa inagomolwa, mbwenye khumbi ya nyakulungama inakhazikika." 
Proverbs14:12 Pana njira inango, ile imbaoneka yadidi kuna munthu, kwache mamalisiro ache imbamuendesa kuimfa." 
Proverbs14:13 Podi pale pene pana kuseka mtima unakwanisa basi kutsukwala, pontho kukomerwa mamalisiro ache anakwanisa kukhala kutsukwala." 
Proverbs14:14 Nyakuipa anatambira pyakuthemerana na makhaliro ache, mbwenye munthu wadidi anafupwa thangwi ya mabasache." 
Proverbs14:15 Pupwe ambakhulupira pyache chinthu chonsene, mbwenye munthu wakuchenjera ambayang'ana mafambiro ache." 
Proverbs14:16 Munthu wanzeru ambagopa MBUYA mbathunda pyakuipa, mbwenye pupwe ambatundukira pinthu mbachita mwamphwayo." 
Proverbs14:17 Nyachipsu ambachita pinthu pyakupupwa, pontho mpheswe ambazondiwa." 
Proverbs14:18 Pupwe ambatambirambo pinthu pyakupupwa, mbwenye nyakuchenjera ambavazikwa chipewu cha udziwisi." 
Proverbs14:19 Anyakudawika analamba pamaso pa anthu adidi, pontho anyakudawika anagodama pamsuwo wa anyakulungama." 
Proverbs14:20 Anyakutcherenga ambachalirwa podi na atsanthembawo ene, mbwenye anyakufuma ana ashamwali azinji." 
Proverbs14:21 Nyakululupisa mwanzache adawa, mbwenye nyakutsanzaya ngule ambakomera mtima anyakutcherenga." 
Proverbs14:22 Anyakusasanya kuchita pyakuipa ambabauka kwenda m'tsanga, mbwenye anyakuchita pyadidi ambafunwa pontho ambanyindirwa." 
Proverbs14:23 Kuphata basa mwakuwangisa kumbaganyalisa, mbwenye kukhalira kulonga-longa kwene kumbadzesa utcherengi." 
Proverbs14:24 Mfuma ya anyanzeru ntchipewu chawo chachifumu, mbwenye mapupwe ambadziwika na kupupwa kwawo." 
Proverbs14:25 Mboni yakuona imbapulumusa moyo, mbwenye mboni yakunama njakuphesa." 
Proverbs14:26 Nyakugopa MBUYA ali mumpanda wamphamvu, pontho anache anakhala pakupata." 
Proverbs14:27 Kugopa MBUYA ndi mphuno ya madzi akupasa moyo, kupulumusa munthu kumsampha wa imfa." 
Proverbs14:28 Demelero ya mfumu yagona pa kuinjipa kwa anthu ambatonga iye kusowa anthu iye nkhabe basa tayu. 
Proverbs14:29 Munthu wakuuphata mtima ambakhala na udziwisi ukulu, mbwenye nyachipsu ambaonesa kupupwa kwachita iye." 
Proverbs14:30 Mtendere wa mumtima umbachitisa manungo kukhala na moyo, mbwenye bivu imbakhala ninga utenda wa kasipa." 
Proverbs14:31 Kupondereza anyakutcherenga nkhutikana Nyakualenga, mbwenye kukomera mtima anyakusowa nkhulemedza Mulungu." 
Proverbs14:32 Anyakudawa ambavungika thangwi ya kudawika kwawo, mbwenye anyakulungama ambakhala pakupata thangwi ya kuona mtima kwawo." 
Proverbs14:33 Nzeru zili m'manyerezero a nyaudziwisi, mbwenye muna mapupwe nzeru nkhabe gumanwa tayu." 
Proverbs14:34 Kuchita pyakulungama kumbachitisa dzinza kukhala yakuveka; mbwenye kudawa kumbachitisa anthu manyadzo. 
Proverbs14:35 Mfumu ambakomerwa na nyabasa wanzeru, mbwenye nyabasa wakuchitisa manyadzo ambalamusa ukali wache." 
Proverbs15:1 Kutawira mwakufulika kumbamalisa shungu, mbwenye mafala a mkaka uwawi ambalamusa ukali." 
Proverbs15:2 Nyanzeru angalonga, udidi wa nzeru umbadziwika, mbwenye mulomo wa pupwe umbabwebweta pyakupupwa." 
Proverbs15:3 Maso a MBUYA ali ponsene pene, kuikha maso pana anthu adidi na akuipa ene." 
Proverbs15:4 Mafala adidi ambakhala ninga muti wakupasa moyo, mbwenye mafala akupotoka ambasanyisa mzimu wa munthu." 
Proverbs15:5 Pupwe ambalulupisa upangizi wa babache; mbwenye kutawira kusumululwa kumbaonesa kuchenjera. 
Proverbs15:6 Nyumba ya nyakulungama imbadzala na mfuma, mbwenye mfuma ya nyakudawika imbamdzesera nyatwa." 
Proverbs15:7 Mulomo wa anyanzeru umbavekesa nzeru, mbwenye si tenepo tayu na mapupwe." 
Proverbs15:8 MBUYA ambanyansirwa na nsembe za anyakudawika, mbwenye kupemphera kwa anyakulungama kumbamkomera." 
Proverbs15:9 MBUYA ambanyansirwa na makhaliro a nyakudawika, mbwenye ambafuna nyakuchita pyakulungama." 
Proverbs15:10 Ngakhala unabauka panjira yadidi unatchunyuswa pikulu pene, iwe unati ufe ungakhonda tawira kusumululwa." 
Proverbs15:11 Ngakhala dziko ya anyakufa na masiye pili pakwecha pamaso pa MBUYA, apo ndi tani na mtima wa munthu." 
Proverbs15:12 Nyakusingirira nkhabe funa kusumululwa tayu; iye nkhabe vunza nzeru kuna anyakupidziwa. 
Proverbs15:13 Mtima ungakomerwa na nkhope enembo imbagalamuka, mbwenye kuva kupha mumtima kumbasanyisa mzimu wa munthu." 
Proverbs15:14 Nyakuvesa pinthu ambasaka-saka udziwisi, mbwenye pupwe kudya kwache nkhuchita pyakupupwa basi." 
Proverbs15:15 Nyakuponderezwa moyo wache onsene ngwabenda-benda, mbwenye mtima wakukomerwa ndi sasawa na kuchita phwando ndzidzi onsene." 
Proverbs15:16 Mphyadidi kukhala mtcherengi mbugopa MBUYA, kusiyana na kukhala nyakufuma mbukhala pa nyatwa." 
Proverbs15:17 Mphyadidi kudya therere pale pana kufunana, kusiyana na kudya nyama yakununa pale pana chizondi." 
Proverbs15:18 Nyachipsu ambalamusa mapoko-poko, mbwenye nyakuuphata mtima ambadzesa mtendere." 
Proverbs15:19 Njira ya nyakupolola njakuphopha na ntcheswa, mbwenye njira ya nyakulungama njamyaa." 
Proverbs15:20 Mwana wanzeru ambachitisa babache kukomerwa, mbwenye pupwe ambalulupisa mache." 
Proverbs15:21 Pupwe ambakomerwa na upupwe, mbwenye nyakuvesa pinthu ambachita pyakulungama." 
Proverbs15:22 Kusowa uphungu pinthu nkhabe famba mwadidi tayu, mbwenye mapungu azinji ambachitisa munthu kupikwanisa." 
Proverbs15:23 Munthu ambakomerwa na kutawira kwadidi, mafala akuthema akulongwa pandzidzi wache ngakukoma pyakwanga." 
Proverbs15:24 Anthu anzeru ambafamba na njira yakwendera ku moyo, kuti aleke bidira kudziko ya anyakufa." 
Proverbs15:25 MBUYA ambagomola nyumba za anyakugaya, mbwenye ambatchinjiriza madire a akazi akufelwa." 
Proverbs15:26 MBUYA ambanyansirwa na manyerezero a anyakuipa, mbwenye ambakomerwa na mafala a angwiro." 
Proverbs15:27 Nyamtima ambadzesa nyatwa pabanja pache, mbwenye nyakukhonda kudyekerwa anakhala na moyo wakulapha." 
Proverbs15:28 Nyakulungama ambatoma kunyerezera adzati tawira, mbwenye mulomo wa nyakudawika umbabwebweta pyakuipa." 
Proverbs15:29 MBUYA ambakhala kutali na nyakudawika, mbwenye nyakulungama angapemphera, iye ambavesera," 
Proverbs15:30 Nkhope zakusekera zimbadzesa kukomerwa mumtima, pontho mphangwa zadidi zimbapasa manungo mphamvu." 
Proverbs15:31 Nyakuikha khutu kuna kusumululwa kwakuthema, penepo anakhala pakati pa anyanzeru." 
Proverbs15:32 Nyakukhonda kutchunyuswa akupikuwaza yekha ene, mbwenye nyakutawira kusumululwa, anakhala na udziwisi." 
Proverbs15:33 Kugopa MBUYA kumbafunzisa munthu kukhala na nzeru, pontho chilemedzo chimbadza m'nduli mwa kupichepesa." 
Proverbs16:1 Munthu anakwanisa kunyerezera pinthu mumtima mwache, mbwenye kutawira kwakuthema kumbabulukira kuna MBUYA." 
Proverbs16:2 Makhaliro a munthu ambaoneka ninga akulungama kuna iye, mbwenye MBUYA ndiye ambapima pya mumtima." 
Proverbs16:3 Ikha m'manja mwa MBUYA pyonsene pinachita iwe tenepo pyonsene pinasasanya iwe kupichita pinakwanisika. 
Proverbs16:4 Chinthu chonsene chasasanya MBUYA china mamalisiro ache; tenepo mamalisiro a anyakudawika nkhuvungika. 
Proverbs16:5 MBUYA ambanyansirwa na anyakugaya onsene, ndimomwene, iye nkhabe dzathawa kutchunyuswa tayu." 
Proverbs16:6 Kudzera muna kukhulupirika na kupipereka pyakudawa pinalekererwa, pontho kugopa MBUYA kumbachitisa munthu kuthunda pyakuipa." 
Proverbs16:7 Ngakhala makhaliro a munthu ngakukomera MBUYA, iye anachitisa podi na anyamalwache ene kukhala naye pamtendere." 
Proverbs16:8 Mphyadidi kukhala na pyakuchepa pyakupigumana mwakuona, kusiyana na kukhala na pizinji pyakugumanwa mwakuba." 
Proverbs16:9 Munthu anakwanisa kusasanya pinafuna iye kuchita, mbwenye Mulungu ndiye ambaongolera manyalo ache." 
Proverbs16:10 Mfumu ambalonga na utongi ukulu, tenepo pimbalonga iye mbipileke potoza chilungamo." 
Proverbs16:11 MBUYA ambafuna midida na miyezo yakuona, iye ambafuna kuona mtima pamalonda." 
Proverbs16:12 Mafumu ambanyansirwa na kuchita pyakuipa, thangwi chilungamo ndiye chimbachitisa ufumu kukhazikika." 
Proverbs16:13 Mfumu kwache nkhufuna kulonga pyakuonadi, tenepo anamkomera mtima munthu wakulonga pyakuonadiyo." 
Proverbs16:14 Ukali kwa mfumu wakhala ninga nyamphangwa wa imfa; mbwenye munthu wanzeru anaumbombowesa. 
Proverbs16:15 Nkhope yakusekera ya mfumu imbadzesa moyo; kukoma kwache mtima kwakhala ninga makole a mvula. 
Proverbs16:16 Ntchinthu chadidi kukhala na nzeru kusiyana na golidi; kusankhula udziwisi nkhwakufunika kupiringana siliva. 
Proverbs16:17 Njira yatawa ya nyakulungama imbamchitisa kuthunda pyakuipa; nyakuchita mphole-mphole na mafambiro ache anakhala na moyo. 
Proverbs16:18 Kunyada kumbavungisa munthu, pontho kugaya kumbachitisa munthu kugwa." 
Proverbs16:19 Mphyadidi kupichepesa pontho kukhala pakati pa anyakusowa, kusiyana na kugawana nawo mfuma idapokosera anyakugaya." 
Proverbs16:20 Nyakuikha khutu kuna upangizi pinthu pyache pimbamfambira mwadidi, pontho nyakutsanzaya ngule ambanyindira MBUYA." 
Proverbs16:21 Munthu wanzeru ambadziwika na kuvesa kwache pinthu; mafala akukoma ambathimizira anthu udziwisi. 
Proverbs16:22 Nzeru ndi mphuno ya madzi akupasa moyo kuna nyanzeru, mbwenye kupupwa kumbadzesa kutchunyuswa kuna pupwe." 
Proverbs16:23 Munthu wanzeru ambachita mphole-mphole na malongero ache; pimbalonga iyepyo pimbathimizira anthu udziwisi. 
Proverbs16:24 Mafala akukoma akhala ninga manyuchi, akuchitisa moyo kuva kutapira, pontho kupasa manungo mphamvu." 
Proverbs16:25 Pana njira inango, ile imbaoneka yadidi kuna munthu, kwache mamalisiro ache imbamuendesa kuimfa." 
Proverbs16:26 Maba a nyabasa ambampasa phinga kuphata basa, thangwi ambafuna kupha njala ina iyeyo." 
Proverbs16:27 Munthu wakusowa basa ambasasanya kuchita pyakuipa, pontho malongero ache akhala ninga lupya." 
Proverbs16:28 Nyakupotoka manyerezero ambalamusa mapoko-poko, pontho tsweda imbamenyanisa ashamwali misolo." 
Proverbs16:29 Munthu wakuzunguza ambanyengeza ashamwali mbaachitisa kwenda na njira zakuipa. 
Proverbs16:30 Nyakukunyula maso ambasasanya kuchita pyakupotoka; nyakupidula ambasasanya kuchita pyakuipa. 
Proverbs16:31 Imvi ntchipewu chachifumu cha demelero; ndi mfupo wa munthu wa makhaliro akulungama. 
Proverbs16:32 Mphyadidi kukhala nyakusowa chipsu kusiyana na kukhala nyankhondo; mphyadidi kukhala nyakuuphata mtima kusiyana na nyakupokosera mzinda. 
Proverbs16:33 Anthu ambachita ntsango kufuna kudziwa pyakuchitika, mbwenye MBUYA ene ndiye ambapitchulula." 
Proverbs17:1 Mphyadidi kububuludza mkhutche pale pana mtendere, kusiyana na kudya phwando m'nyumba mule muna mapoko-poko." 
Proverbs17:2 Bitchu wanzeru anakhala na utongi pana mwana wakuchitisa manyadzo wa mbuyache, mbasiyirwa khundu inango ya mfumayo ninga mwana wa m'banjamo." 
Proverbs17:3 Golidi na siliva pimbanyunguluswa na moto kubulusa masepu-sepu; mbwenye mtima wa munthu umbayeswa na MBUYA. 
Proverbs17:4 Munthu wakuipa ambavesera m'kanwa mwakuvunda, pontho nyakunama ambaikha khutu kuna nyampeni walezi." 
Proverbs17:5 Nyakusingirira anyakutcherenga ambatikana Nyakualenga, pontho nyakukomerwa na dzedze ile yakwata munthu unango anati atchunyuswe." 
Proverbs17:6 Pidzukulu ntchipewu chachifumu cha nkhalamba, pontho ana ambanyadira makolo awo." 
Proverbs17:7 Ngakhala mafala adidi nkhabe kuthemera mapupwe, apo ndi tani na mafala akunama akubulukira m'kanwa mwa mfumu." 
Proverbs17:8 Anthu anango ambanyerezera kuti kudyekera kwakhala ninga mchena; kuti ipyo pinakwanisa kuchitisa pyonsene kuafambira mwadidi. 
Proverbs17:9 Nyakulekerera pyakudawa pya mwanzache ambafuna mtendere, mbwenye nyakupikumbusira ambaphadzanisa ashamwali." 
Proverbs17:10 Nyaudziwisi ambatawira kusumululwa kabodzi kusiyana na mitswamu khumi na kumanyalo kukwapula nayo pupwe. 
Proverbs17:11 Nyakudawika ambalamusa pyakupandukira; nyamphangwa wakukala mtima anatumwa kuna iye. 
Proverbs17:12 Mphyadidi kugumanikana na mbidzi wakuberwa anache, kusiyana na pupwe wakudzudzumika na kupupwa kwache." 
Proverbs17:13 Ngakhala munthu anabwezera chakuipa pa chadidi, pyakuipa nkhabe dzabuluka m'nyumba mwache tayu." 
Proverbs17:14 Kulamusa mapoko-poko kwakhala ninga kubaula thawale, matama pyako pinthu mbapidzati ndendeya." 
Proverbs17:15 Kukomesa nyakudawa pamseru, penu kuchitisa nyakukhonda dawa kukonwa, pyonsene piwiripi MBUYA ambanyansirwa napyo." 
Proverbs17:16 Thangwi yache ninji pupwe apaswe kobiri kuti afunze nazo, mwenemo iye nkhabe chikhumbo chakugumana nzeru." 
Proverbs17:17 Ashamwali ndzidzi onsene ambaonesa kufunana kwawo, pontho mbaleako adabalwa kuti akuphedze pandzidzi wa nyatwa." 
Proverbs17:18 Nyakusowa nzeru ambapereka pinyolo, mbaimirira tsanthembache mangawa." 
Proverbs17:19 Kufuna kuchita pyaumambala nkhufuna mapoko-poko, pontho nyakugaya ndzidzi onsene ambapichemerera yekha ene nyatwa." 
Proverbs17:20 Nyakupotoka manyerezero pinthu pyache nkhabe kumfambira mwadidi tayu; nyachiphamaso ambagwa panyatwa. 
Proverbs17:21 Mwana wakupupwa ambatsukwalisa babache; baba ule ana mwana wakupupwa nkhabe komerwa tayu. 
Proverbs17:22 Mtima wakukomerwa wakhala ninga mtombwe wadidi, mbwenye kusanyiswa kwa mzimu wa munthu kumbayamwa chiropa." 
Proverbs17:23 Nyakudawika ambatawira kudyekerwa chibiso-biso, towera apotoze chilungamo." 
Proverbs17:24 Nyaudziwisi ambaikha mtima panzeru, mbwenye pupwe ambamwaza-mwaza maso mpakana kumadolomero a dziko." 
Proverbs17:25 Mwana wakupupwa ambatsukwalisa babache mbaphesa mtima mache nyakumbala. 
Proverbs17:26 Si pyadidi tayu kutchunyusa anthu okhonda dawa, penu kukwapula anthu akuona mtima." 
Proverbs17:27 Munthu wanzeru nkhabe chitcheperepe, pontho nyaudziwisi nkhabe chipsu tayu." 
Proverbs17:28 Podi pupwe ene ambaoneka ninga wanzeru angakhala pyache mulomo phoo; ambaoneka nyaudziwisi iye angamatama pyache. 
Proverbs18:1 Munthu okhonda phatizana na anzache ngwakutsalakana pya yekha ene basi; iye ambapokanyisana na pyonsene pimbayesa anango pyanzeru. 
Proverbs18:2 Pupwe nkhabe komerwa na kuvesa pinthu tayu, mbwenye ambakomerwa na kubwebweta pinanyerezera iye." 
Proverbs18:3 Pale pana kudawika, kululupiswambo kuli ponthopo, pontho kutaya chilemedzo kumbadzesa manyadzo." 
Proverbs18:4 Mafala a munthu wanzeru akhala ninga madzi a mumchera wakuzwika; phata ya nzeru yakhala ninga madzi a mumkulo wakukuka. 
Proverbs18:5 Si pyadidi tayu kuikhira kunduli nyakudawa, penu kukhondesa nyakukhonda dawa kuchitirwa chilungamo."
