Proverbs18:6 Mulomo wa pupwe umbadzesa mapoko-poko, pontho pakanwa pache pambamchemerera kumenywa." 
Proverbs18:7 Pupwe angalonga akupivunga yekha ene, pontho ambakweshwa na mafalache onthowo." 
Proverbs18:8 Tsweda imbakoma pyakwanga ninga chitumbuwa, anthu ambakomerwadi na kuikhudyula." 
Proverbs18:9 Nyakupolola pabasa ndi mbaleache nyakuvunga. 
Proverbs18:10 MBUYA akhala ninga nsanja yamphamvu; anyakulungama anakwanisa kuthawirako mbakhala pakupata. 
Proverbs18:11 Nyakufuma ambayesa mfumacheyo ninga mzinda wamphamvu, pontho ninga mpanda wakulapha kukwanisa kumtchinjiriza." 
Proverbs18:12 Anthu akunyada ali panjira kwenda kavungika, mbwenye anyakupichepesa ali panjira kwenda kalemedzwa." 
Proverbs18:13 Nyakutawira mbadzati toma vesera ambaonesa kupupwa kwache, pontho pinamchitisa manyadzo." 
Proverbs18:14 Mzimu wa munthu umbapirira iye angadwala, mbwenye mzimu wa munthu ungasanyiswa mbani anakwanisa kupirira." 
Proverbs18:15 Nyakuvesa pinthu ambagumana nzeru; makutu a nyanzeru ambasaka-saka udziwisi. 
Proverbs18:16 Mtukwa umbafumbula njira kuna nyakuupereka, pontho umbamfikisa pamaso pa akulu-akulu." 
Proverbs18:17 Nyakutoma kulonga pya mseru wache ambaoneka ninga wadidi, kufikirana mwanzache aimire kumvunza." 
Proverbs18:18 Ntsango imbamalisa mphoka, imbalekesa mphoka ya anthu amphamvu." 
Proverbs18:19 Mphyakunensa kusembedzera mbale wakudawirwa kusiyana na kupokosera mzinda wakutchingwa na mpanda; mapoko-poko ambalekanisa ninga misuwo yakufungwa na mphinga yasimbi. 
Proverbs18:20 Munthu anakwanisa kukhala na moyo kubulukira pa pinthu pimbalonga iye; iye ambakhutiswa na mafala a m'kanwa mwache. 
Proverbs18:21 Lulume ina mphamvu kupulumusa moyo, penu kuuvunga; tenepo ale ambaifuna anadya nsapo zache." 
Proverbs18:22 Ule agumana mkazi agumana chinthu chadidi, pontho atambira kukoma mtima kwa MBUYA." 
Proverbs18:23 Nyakutcherenga ambadembetera nsisi, mbwenye nyakufuma ambatawira pyache nyamphotcho-photcho." 
Proverbs18:24 Pana ashamwali anango achiphamaso; mbwenye pana ashamwali anango ale ambakhala m'khundu kupiringana mbale ene. 
Proverbs19:1 Mphyadidi kukhala nyakutcherenga wakusowa chakupokanyisa kusiyana na kukhala pupwe wakulonga pyakupotoka. 
Proverbs19:2 Phinga yakusowa nayo nzeru si pyadidi tayu, penu kuchita mchunju mbuphonya njira." 
Proverbs19:3 Kupupwa kwa munthu kumbavunga moyo wache, angamala penepo mtimache umbazhangalira MBUYA." 
Proverbs19:4 Mfuma imbachitisa kukhala na ashamwali azinji, mbwenye nyakutcherenga ashamwali ache ambamthawa." 
Proverbs19:5 Mboni yakunama nkhabe dzathawa kutchunyuswa tayu, pontho nyakunama nkhabe dzayang'anwa kwene tayu." 
Proverbs19:6 Azinji ambachita ndikome-ndikome kuna nyakufunika, pontho nyakufewa manja ndi shamwali wa munthu onsene." 
Proverbs19:7 Ngakhala nyakutcherenga ambachalirwa na abale ache onsene, apo ndi tani na ashamwali ache? Podi kwene kuti iye ambaasembedzera, iwo nkhabe dzaoneka tayu." 
Proverbs19:8 Nyakugumana nzeru ambafunadi moyo wache; nyakukomerwa na kuvesa pinthu, pyache pimbamfambira mwadidi." 
Proverbs19:9 Mboni yakunama nkhabe dzathawa kutchunyuswa tayu, pontho nyakunama anavungika." 
Proverbs19:10 Ngakhala si pyakuthema tayu pupwe kukhala pakutonthola, apo ndi tani na bitchu kutonga mafumu?" 
Proverbs19:11 Nzeru zimbapasa munthu kupirira; demelero yache yagona pa kukhonda ikha konta kutikanwa. 
Proverbs19:12 Ukali wa mfumu wakhala ninga kubangula kwa nkhalamu, mbwenye kukoma kwache mtima kwakhala ninga bume m'maudzu." 
Proverbs19:13 Mwana wakupupwa ntchakuvunga kuna babache, pontho mkazi wamulomo akhala ninga nsoyi yakuchucha." 
Proverbs19:14 Nyumba pontho mfuma mphinthu pyakusiyirwa na makolo, mbwenye mkazi wanzeru ambabulukira kuna MBUYA." 
Proverbs19:15 Kupolola kumbachitisa munthu kuliza mkhonono, pontho nyakutonthola makhono ambagona na njala." 
Proverbs19:16 Nyakuvera matongero a MBUYA anakhala na moyo, mbwenye nyakukhonda mwambo wache anati afe." 
Proverbs19:17 Nyakupasa anyakutcherenga ambakoyesa kuna MBUYA, tenepo MBUYA anambwezera thangwi ya mabasache." 
Proverbs19:18 Langa mwanako madzi mbali m'mabondo; ungakhonda kumtchunyusa, iye anavungikiratu." 
Proverbs19:19 Nyachipsu athema kuoneswa nyatwa; ngakhala unampulumusa, iwe unati upichite pontho." 
Proverbs19:20 Ngakhala unavesera uphungu pontho upangizi, pakumalisa pache unati ukhale wanzeru." 
Proverbs19:21 Munthu anakwanisa kunyerezera pinthu pyonsene pinafuna iye kuchita, mbwenye kufuna kwa MBUYA kunati kuchitike." 
Proverbs19:22 Ntchinthu chakukhumbika kuna munthu kukhala wakunyindirika; kukhala nyakutcherenga mphyadidi kusiyana na nyakunama. 
Proverbs19:23 Kugopa MBUYA kumbadzesa moyo, kukhala pakupata, pontho kukhonda gwerwa na chakuipa." 
Proverbs19:24 Mpololi angamenya tchuwa, iye nkhabe kwanisa na kuifikisa kwene pamulomo pache tayu." 
Proverbs19:25 Kwapula nyakusingirira, penepo nyakufa msolo anadziwa kutonga pinthu mwadidi; sumulula nyakuvesa pinthu, tenepo iye anakhala na udziwisi." 
Proverbs19:26 Nyakubera babache, penu nyakuthamangisa mache ndi mwana wakuchitisa manyadzo, pontho wakululupisa." 
Proverbs19:27 Mwananga, ungakhonda vera upangizi, unati ukhale kutali na mafala audziwisi." 
Proverbs19:28 Mboni yakuipa imbapotoza chilungamo, pontho nyakudawika kunama nkhudya kwache." 
Proverbs19:29 Anyakusingirira kwawo nkhutchunyuswa basi, pontho mapupwe kwawo nkhukwapulwa kwene kumsana basi." 
Proverbs20:1 Vinyu ngwakuselusa, pontho bwadwa umbalamusa nthonga; nyakubauswa na pyakuledzeresa nkhabe nzeru tayu." 
Proverbs20:2 Ukali wa mfumu wakhala ninga kubangula kwa nkhalamu; nyakuusosa ambataya moyo wache. 
Proverbs20:3 Kuthunda mapoko-poko ntchilemedzo kuna munthu, mbwenye pupwe ambafuna pyanthonga." 
Proverbs20:4 Mpololi nkhabe lima mundache pandzidzi wache tayu; pandzidzi wakuvuna iye ambasaka-saka chakuvuna, kwache hambachigumana tayu." 
Proverbs20:5 Manyerezero a munthu akhala ninga madzi mumchera wakuzwika, mbwenye nyaudziwisi ambatungamo madziwo." 
Proverbs20:6 Anthu azinji ambapilonga kuti iwo mbanthu akunyindirika; mbwenye nyakukhulupirika mbani anakwanisa kumgumana? 
Proverbs20:7 Nyakulungama ambakhala na moyo wakusowa chakupokanyisa; mbakutsanzaya anache ambatewera makhaliro ache ale. 
Proverbs20:8 Mfumu angakhala pampando wache wakutongera miseru, ambapepeta pyakuipa pyonsene na maso ache." 
Proverbs20:9 Mbani anakwanisa kulonga kuti, “Ine ndina moyo wangwiro; ndine wakuchena pontho wakusowa pyakudawa?”" 
Proverbs20:10 Midida yakunama na miyezo yakukhonda ona, MBUYA ambanyansirwa nayo." 
Proverbs20:11 Podi na mwana ene ambadziwika na mabasache; ngakhala makhaliro ache ngadidi pontho akulungama. 
Proverbs20:12 Makutu ngakuva nawo pontho maso ngakuona nawo, MBUYA ndiye adasasanya pyonsene piwiripi." 
Proverbs20:13 Leka komerwa na kugona kwene, gopesera unatcherenga; galamuka, tenepo unakhala na phoso pyakwanga." 
Proverbs20:14 Nyakugula ambadirira mbati, “Pyaduladi! Pyaduladi!” Mbwenye angabuluka penepo ambaenda mbagaya thangwi ya kete-kete achita iyeyo." 
Proverbs20:15 Golidi alipo, pontho miyala yakudula ili dala-dala, mbwenye milomo yakulonga udziwisi njakusowa pyakwanga." 
Proverbs20:16 Kwata nguwo ya munthu ule adaimirira mlendo mangawache mbuiphatire pinyolo thangwi iye adapichita kuna nyakukhonda dziwika. 
Proverbs20:17 Kudya kwakugumanwa mwakuba kumbatapira kuna munthu, mbwenye mamalisiro ache m'kanwa mwache mumbadzala na ntchangalabwe." 
Proverbs20:18 Khala na upangizi wadidi papinthu pinasasanya iwe kuchita; leka kwenda kachita nkhondo mbudzati vunza mapungu. 
Proverbs20:19 Nyatsweda ambapitisa pinthu mphepo, natenepo leka phatizana na nyachitcheperepe." 
Proverbs20:20 Munthu anatemberera babache na mache, moyo wache unathimiswa ninga nyale mumdima wa ndiwe ani." 
Proverbs20:21 Nyakupifumisa yekha ene mwakuchimbiza, pakumalisira pache nkhabe dzatsanzayiswa tayu." 
Proverbs20:22 Leka kunyerezera pyakubwezera chakuipa. Nyindira MBUYA, iye anati akupulumuse." 
Proverbs20:23 MBUYA ambanyansirwa na midida yakunama, pontho na miyezo yakukhonda ona." 
Proverbs20:24 Mafambiro a munthu ambatsogolerwa na MBUYA, Apo munthu anakwanisa tani kuvesa mafambiro ache?" 
Proverbs20:25 Ntchinthu chakugoswa kuchimbiza na kudumbira pamaso pa MBUYA, mbudzati kupinyerezera mwadidi." 
Proverbs20:26 Mfumu wanzeru ambapepeta anyakudawika, iye ambaapeya na chingolo chache." 
Proverbs20:27 Chikumbu mtima cha munthu chakhala ninga nyale ya MBUYA, chimbasakanyula monsene mwene mumtima wa munthu." 
Proverbs20:28 Kufunana na kukhulupirika kumbamchitisa mfumu kukhala pakupata; na chilungamo ufumu wache umbakhazikika. 
Proverbs20:29 Demelero ya uphale ndi mphamvu zawo; imvi ndiye demelero ya nkhalamba. 
Proverbs20:30 Mashoko na pironda pimbabulusa pyakuipa, pontho kukwapulwa ndiye kumbachenesa pya m'bwaloletu mwa munthu." 
Proverbs21:1 Mtima wa mfumu uli m'manja mwa MBUYA; iye ambautsogolera ninga madzi akukuka konsene kwene kunafuna iye kule. 
Proverbs21:2 Njira zonsene za munthu zimbaoneka ninga zakulungama m'maso mwache, mbwenye MBUYA ndiye ambadziwa mtimache." 
Proverbs21:3 Kuchita pyakulungama pontho chilungamo pimbatambirwa na manja mawiri pamaso pa MBUYA kupiringana nsembe. 
Proverbs21:4 Kuyang'ana na nsonga ya diso, pontho mtima wakugaya, mphyakuipa mbipikhala ninga nyale kuna anyakudawika." 
Proverbs21:5 Pinthu pimbasasanya kuchita munthu wa manja a basa pimbamganyalira, mbwenye kuchita pinthu mwamchunju kumbadzesa utcherengi." 
Proverbs21:6 Mfuma yakugumanwa thangwi ya kulonga pyakunama, ndi mthunji yakutoya m'maso, pontho msampha wakupha." 
Proverbs21:7 Kuzunguzika kwa nyakudawika kunati kumvunge, thangwi iye nkhabe funa kuchita pyakulungama tayu." 
Proverbs21:8 Njira za munthu wakuipa nsakugongonyeka, mbwenye makhaliro a nyakukhonda dawa ngakulungama." 
Proverbs21:9 Mphyadidi kukhala mwakufinyizika kunkhomo kwa nsoyi kusiyana na kukhala m'nyumba na mkazi wamulomo. 
Proverbs21:10 Nyakudawika ambakhala na usa na kuchita pyakuipa; iye nkhabe vera nsisi tsanthembache tayu. 
Proverbs21:11 Nyakusingirira angatchunyuswa, pupwe ambadziwa mfolo; munthu wanzeru angapaswa uphungu, penepo ambakhala na udziwisi." 
Proverbs21:12 Mulungu, Nyakulungama ule, ambadziwa pya m'nyumba ya anyakudawika, mbachitisa anyakudawika kuvungika." 
Proverbs21:13 Ngakhala munthu anafunga makutu ache kuna kulira kwa anyakutcherenga, iyembo analira mbakhonda na kuviwa kwene." 
Proverbs21:14 Mtukwa wakuperekwa chibiso-biso umbamatamisa kuzhangali, pontho kudyekera kumbambombowesa ukali." 
Proverbs21:15 Chilungamo chingatewezwa anyakulungama ambakomerwa, mbwenye anyakudawika mantha ambaaphata." 
Proverbs21:16 Nyakubauka panjira ya udziwisi, mamalisiro ache nkhugwera m'dziko ya anyakufa." 
Proverbs21:17 Nyakukomerwa na tsenzo anati atcherenge; nyakukomerwa na vinyu pontho mafuta nkhabe dzafuma tayu. 
Proverbs21:18 Anyakudawika anakhala chakupagalira anyakulungama, pontho anyakukhonda khulupirika anakhala chakupagalira anthu adidi." 
Proverbs21:19 Mphyadidi kukhala pyako m'thando yatchetcha kusiyana na kukhala na mkazi wamulomo pontho wachipsu. 
Proverbs21:20 M'nyumba ya munthu wanzeru mumbakhala mfuma, mbwenye pupwe ambachita phata dyeratu pyonsene pina iye." 
Proverbs21:21 Nyakukakamira kuchita pyakulungama pontho kukoma mtima, ambagumana moyo, kufamba mwadidi kwa pinthu na chilemedzo." 
Proverbs21:22 Nyanzeru anakwanisa kukunda mzinda wa anyamphamvu, mbagwisa mpanda wamphamvu umbanyindira iwo ule." 
Proverbs21:23 Nyakuyang'anira mulomo pontho lulume yache, nkhabe kupidzesera yekha ene nyatwa tayu." 
Proverbs21:24 Munthu wakugaya pontho kutumbama, nyakusingirira ndiye dzinache; thangwi iye ambachita pinthu mwakulunkuma." 
Proverbs21:25 Usa wa nyakupolola unakhala imfa kuna iye, thangwi manjache nkhabe funa phata basa tayu." 
Proverbs21:26 Nsiku yonsene iye ambakhala na usa kufuna pizinji, mbwenye anyakulungama ambapereka mwakufewa manja." 
Proverbs21:27 Nsembe ya nyakuipa njakunyansa; ndi tani apo angaipereka na manyerezero akuipa. 
Proverbs21:28 Mboni yakunama inagwandwa m'kanwa, mbwenye nyakuvesa pinthu anatawiriswa kupereka umboni." 
Proverbs21:29 Nyakuipa ambafuna kupionesa ninga wakuwanga mtima, mbwenye nyakulungama ambanyerezera mwadidi pinthu pimbachita iye." 
Proverbs21:30 Nee nzeru, kuvesa pinthu, penu uphungu, pile pinakwanisa kupiringana MBUYA." 
Proverbs21:31 Kavalo ambasasanyikira nsiku ya kumenya nkhondo, mbwenye kukunda kwagona m'manja mwa MBUYA." 
Proverbs22:1 Mbiri yadidi njakukhumbika pyakwanga kupiringana mfuma izinji; chilemedzo ntchadidi pyakwanga kupiringana siliva na golidi. 
Proverbs22:2 Nyakufuma na nyakutcherenga ntchibodzi-bodzi: MBUYA ndiye nyakualenga onsenewo. 
Proverbs22:3 Nyakuchenjera angaona chakugoswa ambabisala, mbwenye pupwe ambaenda konthoko, mbakaonako nyatwa." 
Proverbs22:4 Kupichepesa na kugopa MBUYA pimbadzesa mfuma na chilemedzo, pontho moyo." 
Proverbs22:5 Njira ya nyakudawika njakuphopha na minga pontho misampha, mbwenye nyakuyang'anira moyo wache ambachalira pinthu penepi." 
Proverbs22:6 Funzisa mwana njira yathema iye kuteweza, tenepo angathuthuka iye nkhabe dzabauka tayu." 
Proverbs22:7 Anyamfuma ambatonga anyakutcherenga, pontho nyakufiyali ndi bitchu wa nyakumfiyalisa." 
Proverbs22:8 Nyakubzala pyakudawa ambavunambo nyatwa, pontho ndodo ya ukali wache inavungwa." 
Proverbs22:9 Nyakufewa manja anati atsanzayiswe, thangwi iye ambagawana na anyakutcherenga phoso yache." 
Proverbs22:10 Kuthamangisa nyakusingirira nkhubulusa mapoko-poko pamsuwo; nthonga pontho kutikana pimbamalambo. 
Proverbs22:11 Nyakukomerwa na mtima wakuona pontho malongero adidi, anati akhale shamwaliache mfumu." 
Proverbs22:12 MBUYA ambayang'anira mwadidi udziwisi, mbwenye ambadzudzumisa mafala a anyakukhonda khulupirika." 
Proverbs22:13 Mpololi ambalonga kuti, “Kunjaku kuna nkhalamu!” Penu, “Ndikugopesera kuphiwa mumsewu!”" 
Proverbs22:14 M'kanwa mwa puta ndi dzenje yakuzwika; nyakuzhangalirwa na MBUYA anati agweremo. 
Proverbs22:15 Kupupwa kumbakhala mumtima mwa mwana, mbwenye mtswamu wakumtchunyusa nawo unabulusa kupupwako." 
Proverbs22:16 Nyakupondereza anyakutcherenga, towera athimizire mfumacheyo, pontho nyakupereka mitukwa kuna anyakufuma, onsene uwiriawo anasanduka akutcherenga." 
Proverbs22:17 Ikha mtimako pana pinthu pinakufunzisa inepi, pontho vesera mwadidi mafala a anthu a nzeru," 
Proverbs22:18 thangwi ntchinthu chadidi ungapikoya mumtima mwako, pontho mbusasanyika kupilonga pandzidzi wache wakuthema." 
Proverbs22:19 Towera ukwanise kunyindira MBUYA, lero ndakufunzisa pinthu penepi; ande, kuna iwepo." 
Proverbs22:20 Ayi ine sidakulembere tayu pifunziso makumatatu, pifunziso pyauphungu pontho pyanzeru," 
Proverbs22:21 pyakukufunzisa mafala akuona pontho akunyindirika, towera utawire mwadidi anyakukutuma ale?" 
Proverbs22:22 Leka bera nyakutcherenga, thangwi iye ndi nyakutcherenga, pontho leka pondereza anyakusowa pinthu m'thando ya miseru," 
Proverbs22:23 thangwi MBUYA anati aaikhire kunduli, pontho iye anapokosera moyo wa anyakuapokoserambo." 
Proverbs22:24 Leka chita ushamwali na munthu waukali, pontho leka phatizana na nyachipsu," 
Proverbs22:25 gopesera unakwatira makhaliro achewo, mbumalisira kugwera mumsampha." 
Proverbs22:26 Leka pereka pinyolo, penu kuimirira munthu unango mangawache;" 
Proverbs22:27 ngakhala hunakwanisa kupipagali tayu, talimbako makayo inapokoserwa, mwenemo iwe uli dedede penepo." 
Proverbs22:28 Leka bulusa chidzindikiro chakale cha madire chidaikha makolo ako chile. 
Proverbs22:29 Ayi ukumuona munthu waluso pabasache? Iye anati afiliviri mafumu; iye nkhabe dzatumikira anthu ene pyawo tayu. 
Proverbs23:1 Ungakhala pansi kudya na mtongi, yang'ana mwadidi pyakudya pili pamaso pakopo," 
Proverbs23:2 ngakhala ndiwe nyalidyo pikhondese wekha ene kudya mwamtima. 
Proverbs23:3 Leka jojera mata pyakudya pyache pyakupasa mabapyo, thangwi pyakudyapyo ntchiphamaso." 
Proverbs23:4 Leka kupitopesa wekha ene na kusaka mfuma; khala wanzeru pontho wakupithunda. 
Proverbs23:5 Unaiona mfumako ikwenda kabodzi kene, podi iyo inakhala ninga yamera maphaphido, mbimbulukira kuthambo ninga mphamba." 
Proverbs23:6 Leka kudya pyakudya pya nyakuumirwa, leka jojera mata pyakudya pyache pyakupasa mabapyo;" 
Proverbs23:7 thangwi iye ndi mtundu wa munthu, ule ndzidzi onsene ambanyerezera pya pinthu pyavunga iye. Iye ambakutchitcha kuti, “Idya pontho imwa,” kwache iye hakupifuna kuti pikhale tenepo tayu." 
Proverbs23:8 Iwe unatapika na pinkiti pene pyadya iwepyo, pontho mafalako akumkomesa nawo anaenda papezi." 
Proverbs23:9 Leka longa na pupwe, thangwi iye analulupisa mafalako anzeruwo." 
Proverbs23:10 Leka bulusa chidzindikiro chakale cha madire a miyala, penu kunumpha madire kwenda kumunda wa ana masiye," 
Proverbs23:11 thangwi Dombo wawo ngwamphamvu; iye anaatchinjiriza pamseru wawo kupokanyisana nawe. 
Proverbs23:12 Ikha mtimako pana upangizi, pontho ikha makutu kuna mafala audziwisi." 
Proverbs23:13 Leka khonda langa mwanako; ngakhala unamtchunyusa na mtswamu, iye nkhabe dzafa tayu." 
Proverbs23:14 Mtchunyuse na mtswamu, mbupulumuse moyo wache kuimfa." 
Proverbs23:15 Mwananga, ngakhala ndiwe wanzeru penepo mtimanga unakomerwa;" 
Proverbs23:16 moyo wanga unasekera, ngakhala mulomo wako unalonga pyakulungama." 
Proverbs23:17 Mtimako mbuleke sirira anyakudawika, mbwenye ndzidzi onsene chita phinga kugopa MBUYA." 
Proverbs23:18 Tenepo ndimomwene kuti iwe una chidikhiro, pontho chidikhiro chako nkhabe dzamalira panjira tayu." 
Proverbs23:19 Mwananga, vesera, mbukhale wanzeru; fambisa mtimako m'njira yakulungama." 
Proverbs23:20 Leka phatizana na anyakumwa vinyu pyakwanga, penu kukhala pakati pa anyakudya nyama mwauphanga," 
Proverbs23:21 thangwi madombe na anthu alidyo ambasanduka akutcherenga; kuvesera manungo kumbaachitisa kufamba yapiyapi. 
Proverbs23:22 Vesera pinalonga babako, adakuonesa kunja ule, pontho leka lulupisa mako pa unkhalambache." 
Proverbs23:23 Gula pyakuonadi mbukhonde kupigulisa; gumana nzeru, upangizi, pontho kuvesa pinthu." 
Proverbs23:24 Babache nyakulungama ambakomerwa pikulu pene; munthu ule ana mwanache wanzeru ambafamba na nthuku phaa! 
Proverbs23:25 Babako na mako ene mbakomerwe; nyakukubala mbasekere. 
Proverbs23:26 Mwananga, ngandipase mtimako, pontho maso ako mbakhale pana njira zanga," 
Proverbs23:27 thangwi puta akhala ninga mulindi, pontho mkazi wakushashalika akhala ninga dzenje ya matope." 
Proverbs23:28 Iye ambabisala swiswiswi ninga phanga, mbachitisa amuna azinji kusanduka okhonda khulupirika." 
Proverbs23:29 Nyadzedze mbani? Mbani nyakutsukwala? Nyamapoko-poko mbani? Mbani nyakudungunya? Mbani nyapironda pyakukhonda dziwika madzero ache? Nyachirope mbani? 
Proverbs23:30 Enewa ngale ambamera mitsitsi pana vinyu, pontho ale ambamwa vinyu wakuvungazwa-vungazwa." 
Proverbs23:31 Leka kwatika na upiriwiri wa vinyu, leka tunduka na kungondomuka kwache m'khomitchoko, pontho leka nyengeka na kukhudyulika kwache." 
Proverbs23:32 Pakumalisira pache ambaluma ninga nyoka, pontho ngwakupha ninga nyongo ya mbobo." 
Proverbs23:33 Maso ako anaona mayezi-yezi, pontho msolo wako nkhabe dzaphata basa tayu." 
Proverbs23:34 Unakhala ninga munthu, ule ali gadaa pakati na nyanza zikulu-zikulu, ule ali gonee padomu ya mwadiya." 
Proverbs23:35 Iwe unalonga kuti, “Iwo adanditinthimula, kwache ine sidakuwazike tayu! Iwo adandilikita, kwache ine nkhabe kuva kupha tayu! Ayi kunja kunachena lini, towera ndikagumane pyakuledzeresa pinango?”" 
Proverbs24:1 Leka sirira anyakudawika, leka sirira gulu yawo;" 
Proverbs24:2 thangwi kwawo nkhusasanya kuchita nthonga basi, pontho milomo yawo imbalonga pya kudzesa kwene nyatwa basi." 
Proverbs24:3 Nyumba imbamangwa na nzeru, pontho iyo imbakhazikika na udziwisi," 
Proverbs24:4 na udziwisi masubi ache ambadzala phamu-phamu na pinthu pyadidi pontho pyakudula. 
Proverbs24:5 Nzeru zimbapita mphamvu, pontho nyaudziwisi ambathimizira mboko zache;" 
Proverbs24:6 thangwi kamenya nkhondo kumbafunika uphungu wadidi, pontho kukunda kwagona pa mapungu azinji." 
Proverbs24:7 Pupwe nkhabe fikira nzeru tayu; iye nkhabe chakulonga pamgumano pathando. 
Proverbs24:8 Nyakusasanya kuchita pyakuipa, ambathulwa mpeni walezi." 
Proverbs24:9 Pinthu pimbasasanya pupwe kupichita mphyakudawa, pontho nyakusingirira, anthu ambanyansirwa naye." 
Proverbs24:10 Ngakhala unataya mtima ndzidzi wanyatwa, penepo iwe mphamvu zako nsakuchepa." 
Proverbs24:11 Pulumusa anyakukwatwa kwenda kaphiwa; khala dombo wa anyakudzedzereka kwenda kachekwa. 
Proverbs24:12 Ngakhala munalonga kuti, “Ife nkhabe kupidziwa tayu,” ayi iye nyakuyesa mtima penepi nkhabe kupiona tayu? Ayi iye nyakukoya moyo wanu nkhabe kupidziwa tayu? Ayi iye nkhabe dzabwezera munthu onsene malingana na mabasache tayu?" 
Proverbs24:13 Mwananga, idya manyuchi, thangwi ngadidi; manyuchi akubulukira m'dembedza ngakutapira kualawira." 
Proverbs24:14 Wathema kudziwa kuti nzeru nsakutapira kuna moyo wako; ngakhala unazigumana, penepo pinthu pyako pinakufambira mwadidi, pontho chidikhiro chako nkhabe dzamalira panjira tayu." 
Proverbs24:15 Leka bisala swiswiswi ninga phanga kunja kwa nyumba ya nyakulungama; leka chita pyauphanga pamsuwo pache. 
Proverbs24:16 Thangwi nyakulungama podi agwe pyache kanomwe, iye ambalamuka basi ndranji mbwenye nyatwa zimbagwisa yokoto anyakudawika." 
Proverbs24:17 Leka sekera ngakhala nyamalwako analimbuka; iye angagwegweduka, mtimako mbuleke komerwa," 
Proverbs24:18 thangwi MBUYA anapiona mbaipirwa napyo, mbaleka kumzhangalira." 
Proverbs24:19 Leka sanyika mtima na munthu wakuipa, penu kusirira nyakudawika," 
Proverbs24:20 thangwi nyakuipa nkhabe chidikhiro tayu, pontho nyale ya nyakudawika inafyokotoka." 
Proverbs24:21 Mwananga, gopa MBUYA pontho mfumu; leka phatizana na anyakupandukira," 
Proverbs24:22 thangwi MBUYA na mfumu ndiye anafuna dzagwisa nyatwa zakututumusa pana iwo, pontho mbani anadziwa mtundu wa nyatwa unafuna iwo kuagwisira." 
Proverbs24:23 Ipi mphifunziso pinango pya nzeru: Kutonga mwakuyang'ana nkhope si pyadidi tayu: 
Proverbs24:24 Munthu analonga kuna anyakudawa kuti, “Imwe hamudadawe tayu,” weneyo anthu anati amtemberere, pontho madzinza a anthu anati amkhonde." 
Proverbs24:25 Mbwenye kuna anyakutchunyusa anyakudawa pinthu pyawo pinaafambira mwadidi, pontho iwo anatambira mtsanzayiso." 
Proverbs24:26 Munthu wakutawira mwakuona ndiye ambaonesa ushamwali chadi-chadi. 
Proverbs24:27 Malisa mabasako onsene akumunda, ungamala penepo manga nyumbako." 
Proverbs24:28 Leka chitira tsanthembako umboni wapezi, penu kuphatisa basa mulomo wako kulonga nawo pyakunama." 
Proverbs24:29 Leka longa kuti, “Ine ndinati ndichite kuna iye ninga pyontho pyandichita iyembo;” ine ndinati ndimbwezere, thangwi ya pinthu pyandichita iye." 
Proverbs24:30 Ine ndidagwanda na m'munda mwa nyakupolola, na m'munda wamfesa wa nyakukhonda vesa pinthu;" 
Proverbs24:31 minga yamala mera ponsene pene, nyakhanche ali kavu-kavu m'munda monsenemo, pontho mpandache wamiyala wamala gomoka." 
Proverbs24:32 Pidaona ine ndidatoma kupinyerezera, ine ndidafunzapo chinthu chinango:" 
Proverbs24:33 kugona pang'ono, kuodzira pang'ono, kufunya manja pang'ono kupuma," 
Proverbs24:34 penepo utcherengi unakufikira ninga mbava, pontho usiwa unabwera ninga phanga." 
Proverbs25:1 Ishi ndi miyambi inango ya Solomoni, ile idalembwa pontho na amuna a Hezekia mfumu wa Yuda:" 
Proverbs25:2 Timbalemedza Mulungu thangwi ya pinthu pyakubisika; mbwenye timbalemedza mafumu thangwi ya kusakanyula pinthu pyakubisika. 
Proverbs25:3 Ninga kulapha kwachita kudzulu, pontho kuzwika kwachita dziko yapansi sasawambo manyerezero a mafumu nkhabe dziwika tayu." 
Proverbs25:4 Bulusa siliva masepu-sepu, towera misiri akwanise kusasanya naye pyombo;" 
Proverbs25:5 bulusa anyakudawika pamaso pa mfumu, tenepo mpando wache unakhazikika na chilungamo." 
Proverbs25:6 Leka kupikuza wekha ene pamaso pa mfumu, penu kupisakira wekha ene mbuto pakati pa amuna akuveka;" 
Proverbs25:7 mphyadidi akupange kuti, “Dzakhale padidipa,” kusiyana na kuti akululupise pamaso pa anyakulemedzwa. Pinthu pyaona iwe na maso ako," 
Proverbs25:8 leka thamanga napyo kuthando ya miseru; apo pakumalisira pache unachita tani ngakhala tsanthembako anakuchitisa manyadzo? 
Proverbs25:9 Ngakhala una mseru na tsanthembako wathema kukhala naye pansi; leka pitisa mphepo pyakubisika pya munthu unango," 
Proverbs25:10 thangwi nyakuveserayo anakwanisa kukuchitisa manyadzo, tenepo yako inakhala mbiri yakuipa ndzidzi onsene." 
Proverbs25:11 Fala yakuthema yakulongwa pandzidzi wache yakhala ninga pyakuthemesera pyagolidi m'pyakuikhiramo pyasiliva. 
Proverbs25:12 Kuvesera uphungu wa munthu wanzeru kwakhala ninga mphete yagolidi, penu mkufu wagolidi chadi-chadi." 
Proverbs25:13 Kunyindirika kwa nyamphangwa kuna anyakumtuma kwakhala ninga madzi akutonthola ndzidzi wa malimwe; iye ambasisimusa moyo wa ambuyache. 
Proverbs25:14 Nyakugaya pya mitukwa imbakhonda iye pereka ile, akhala ninga makole pontho mphepo yakukhonda dzesa mvula." 
Proverbs25:15 Kupirira ndiye kumbakhuludza mtongi, pontho lulume yakufulika inakwanisa kufewesa mtima wamwala." 
Proverbs25:16 Ngakhala unagumana manyuchi, idya mbukhutise mimbako, kuadya azinji ene unamalisira tapika nawo." 
Proverbs25:17 Leka chita chinyalo kumsuwo kwa tsanthembako, gopesera anamalisira topa nawe mbakuzonda." 
Proverbs25:18 Nyakulongera tsanthembache umboni wakunama akhala ninga chigomba, talasada, penu tswimo ya twetwetwe." 
Proverbs25:19 Kunyindira nyakukhonda khulupirika pandzidzi wa nyatwa kwakhala ninga dzino yakupha, penu mwendo wakulamala." 
Proverbs25:20 Kuimbira nyimbo nyakutsukwala kwakhala ninga kumdula nguwo ndzidzi wakutonthola, penu kuikha chinyayi pachironda pache." 
Proverbs25:21 Ngakhala nyamalwako ana njala, mpase pyakudya kuti abwezembo mata; ngakhala iye akuva nyota mpase madzi kuti afewesembo kukhosi." 
Proverbs25:22 Ungachita tenepo iye anagwa nkhope, pontho MBUYA anakufupa." 
Proverbs25:23 Tsweda imbadzesa ukali ninga mumbachitirambo mbalu kudzesa mvula. 
Proverbs25:24 Mphyadidi kukhala mwakufinyizika kunkhomo kwa nsoyi, kusiyana na kukhala m'nyumba na mkazi wamulomo." 
Proverbs25:25 Mphangwa zadidi zakubulukira kudziko yakutali zakhala ninga madzi anonono kuna munthu wanyota. 
Proverbs25:26 Nyakulungama ule ambafewa kuna munthu wakuipa ndi sasawa na mphuno ya madzi a matope penu mchera wakuipa. 
Proverbs25:27 Si pyadidi tayu kudya manyuchi azinji penu kufuna kusimbwa ndzidzi onsene. 
Proverbs25:28 Nyakukhonda kuuphata mtima akhala ninga mzinda ule mafufu ache amala kugwa. 
Proverbs26:1 Ninga madzi nkhabe phatana ndzidzi wa malimwe, penu mvula kuvumba ndzidzi wakuvuna, sasawambo chilemedzo nkhabe themera pupwe tayu." 
Proverbs26:2 Ninga nyankapa-kapa wakumbuluka-mbuluka, penu nyanzeze okhonda phama kupuma ndi sasawa na kutembererwa kwakusowa nako mathangwi nkhabe kukufikira tayu." 
Proverbs26:3 Mtswamu ngwakukwapula nawo kavalo, pontho chisimbi kukanwa kwa bulu ntchakumuongolera nacho, sasawambo ndodo njakumenya nayo kumsana kwa pupwe." 
Proverbs26:4 Leka tawira pupwe malingana na kupupwa kwache, gopesera unakhalambo pupwe." 
Proverbs26:5 Tawira pupwe kumuonesa kupupwa kwachita iye, gopesera iye anapiyesa wanzeru." 
Proverbs26:6 Kutuma pupwe na mphangwa kwakhala ninga kupigwanda wekha ene manyalo, penu kupichemerera wekha ene nyatwa." 
Proverbs26:7 Miyambi ya m'kanwa mwa pupwe yakhala ninga miyendo ya nyakulamala. 
Proverbs26:8 Kulemedza pupwe kwakhala ninga kumangirira mwala kubishika. 
Proverbs26:9 Miyambi ya m'kanwa mwa pupwe yakhala ninga tsanjo ya minga m'manja mwa nyakuledzera. 
Proverbs26:10 Nyakulemba basa pupwe penu nyakugwanda kwene pyache na njira ndi sasawa na kuponya mivi nyamponya-mponya kulasa anthu onsene. 
Proverbs26:11 Mwanambwa wakudya pontho matapiko ache ndi sasawa na pupwe wakuchita nyambwereza pyakupupwa. 
Proverbs26:12 Pupwe ule ambalongwa kuti ndi pupweletu ana chidikhiro kusiyana na nyakupiikhamo yekha ene kuti ngwanzeru. 
Proverbs26:13 Mpololi ambalonga kuti, “Kumsewuku kuna nkhalamu! Nkhalamu yakugoswa ikuzungulira-zungulira m'njira!”" 
Proverbs26:14 Mpololi ambafukunyuka-fukunyuka patalimba pache ninga montho mumbachitira msuwo kufunyika mwakuphatanizira mwache. 
Proverbs26:15 Mpololi angamenya tchuwa, iye nkhabe kwanisa na kuifikisa kwene pamulomo pache tayu." 
Proverbs26:16 Mpololi ambapiyesa ninga wanzeru kupiringana amuna anomwe ale anakwanisa kutawira mwakuchenjera. 
Proverbs26:17 Nyakugwanda kwene pyache na njira ule ambapitira mphoka ya anango akhala ninga nyakukweya mwanambwa makutu. 
Proverbs26:18 Ninga nyakupenga ule ambaponya pyache kwene nsakali zamoto penu matswimo akugoswa," 
Proverbs26:19 ndi sasawa na nyakunyengeza tsanthembache, m'nduli mwache mbalonga mbati, “Ndikhalonga kwene dzendanga!”" 
Proverbs26:20 Pakusowa nkhuni, moto umbafyokota; pakusowa tsweda, nkhabe lamuka nthonga tayu." 
Proverbs26:21 Ninga makala pamoto wacheeve, penu nkhuni pamoto wanganda-nganda ndi sasawa na munthu wakuzunguzika kulamusa mapoko-poko." 
Proverbs26:22 Tsweda imbakoma pyakwanga ninga chitumbuwa, anthu ambakomerwadi na kuikhudyula." 
Proverbs26:23 Kutapira m'kanwa kunakwanisa kubisa mtima wakuipa ninga montho mumbachitira mphampha kugudumira chikalango. 
Proverbs26:24 Nyakuipirwa ambalonga pyadidi na pakanwa pache mwenemo mumtima mwache chizondi chili phamu-phamu. 
Proverbs26:25 Podi kwene kuti mafalache akhale akutapira tani, leka kumkhulupira, thangwi pyakunyansa pya mtundu onsene pili ndendende mumtima mwache." 
Proverbs26:26 Kuipirwa kwache ambakubisa mwaunthawatawa, kwache kudawika kwache kunaoniwa pakwecha na anthu onsene." 
Proverbs26:27 Ngakhala munthu anakumba dzenje, iye ene maka anati agweremo; ngakhala munthu anagulung'undisa mwala, unati ufinyize iye maka." 
Proverbs26:28 Nyakunama ambazonda anthu adakuwaza iye ale, pontho nyakutapira m'kanwa ngwakuvunga." 
Proverbs27:1 Leka nyadira pya mangwana, podi iwe nkhabe dziwa tayu kuti mangwana kunagwanji tayu." 
Proverbs27:2 Lekera anthu anango pyawo kukusimba, nee kupisimba wekha ene tayu; munthu unango ene pyache wa apo, nee iwe ene mwenechiroache tayu." 
Proverbs27:3 Mwala ngwakulemera, pontho tchetcha ndiye yanyanyiratu, mbwenye makani a pupwe ndiye apita kupiringana pyonsene piwiripi." 
Proverbs27:4 Kuzhangali kumbadzesa kukala mtima, pontho ukali ngwakugoswa, kwache bivu ndiye motoletu." 
Proverbs27:5 Kusumulula munthu maso na maso nkhuonesa kumfuna kwako. 
Proverbs27:6 Mphyadidi kukuwazwa na shamwaliako kusiyana na kumpsompsonwa na nyamalwako. 
Proverbs27:7 Nyakukhuta nkhabe chikhumbo na uchi tayu, mbwenye kuna nyanjala podi na chinthu chakuwawa chene ambachiva kutapira basi." 
Proverbs27:8 Ninga mbalame yakwenda kutali na chisa chache ndi sasawa na nyakwenda kutali na musache. 
Proverbs27:9 Mafuta akununkhira na pyakufukiza pyakununkhira pimbachitisa mtima kukomerwa, mbwenye udidi wa shamwali wagona pa uphungu wache." 
Proverbs27:10 Leka taya shamwaliako penu shamwaliache babako, pontho leka kwenda kumusa kwa mbaleako mwenemo uli panyatwa. Mphyadidi kwenda kuna tsanthembako wachifupiletu kusiyana na mbaleako wakutali na iwe." 
Proverbs27:11 Mwananga khala wanzeru, tenepo unachitisa mtimanga kukomerwa; penepo ndinakwanisa kutawira anyakundilulupisa." 
Proverbs27:12 Nyakuchenjera angaona pyakugoswa ambabisala, mbwenye pupwe ambaenda konthoko mbakaonako nyatwa." 
Proverbs27:13 Kwata mkhanjo wa nyakuimirira mlendo mangawache; mbachikhale pinyolo ngakhala iye anapichitira nyakudza pyache. 
Proverbs27:14 Nyakubesera kamutsa tsanthembache mwakugaluza fala kunja kuli nonono, anayeswa ninga akumtemberera." 
Proverbs27:15 Mkazi wamulomo akhala ninga nsoyi yakuchucha ndzidzi wa mvula; 
Proverbs27:16 kuyesera kummatamisa kwakhala ninga kuyesa kumatamisa mphepo, penu kufumbata mafuta." 
Proverbs27:17 Ninga mumbanozwera simbi kwa simbi, sasawambo munthu ambanozwa manyerezero a mwanzache." 
Proverbs27:18 Nyakutsalakana muti wamkuyu anati adye nsapo zache, nyakuyang'anira mwadidi mbuyache anati atambire chilemedzo." 
Proverbs27:19 Ninga mumbachitira nkhope ya munthu kuonekera m'madzi sasawambo makhaliro a munthu ambaonesa mtimache. 
Proverbs27:20 Dziko ya anyakufa na masiye nkhabe khuta tayu, sasawambo maso a munthu nkhabe khuta tayu." 
Proverbs27:21 Siliva na golidi pimbanyunguluswa na moto kubulusa masepu-sepu, sasawambo munthu ambayeswa na kusimbwa kumbachitwa iye." 
Proverbs27:22 Podi kwene usinje pupwe m'banda kumpeya ninga mapira, iwe nkhabe kwanisa kumtchumbutula upupwe wachewo tayu." 
Proverbs27:23 Onesesa mwadidi kuti wadziwa mabirako akukhala tani, pontho yang'anira mwadidi mikumbi ya pifuyo pyako;" 
Proverbs27:24 thangwi mfuma nkhabe khala kwenda na kwenda tayu, pontho ufumu nkhabe fika mifendu yonsene tayu." 
Proverbs27:25 Maudzu angamala gwandwa, mfuli zimbaphwitha, pontho angamala tuta maudzu kuabulusa m'phiri," 
Proverbs27:26 anabira anakupasa ubweya wakusasanyira nguwo, pontho mbuzi zinakupasa konta ya kobiri zakugula nayo munda." 
Proverbs27:27 Mkaka wa mbuzi unakhala nawo nadza-nadza kudyesa iwepo na banjako ene, pontho kunenepesa anyabasako achitsikana." 
Proverbs28:1 Nyakuipa ambathawa pyache yekha ene na bepe, mbwenye nyakulungama ngwakuwanga mtima ninga nkhalamu." 
Proverbs28:2 Dziko ingapandukira, ndiye kuti ina atongi azinji, mbwenye mtongi wakuvesa pinthu, pontho waudziwisi ambakhazikisa kukoya mwambo." 
Proverbs28:3 Mtongi wakupondereza anyakutcherenga akhala ninga mvula ya mphepo yakuvunga phoso ya m'munda. 
Proverbs28:4 Anyakukhonda mwambo wa Mulungu ambasimba anyakudawika, mbwenye anyakukoya mwambo ambaapokanyisa." 
Proverbs28:5 Anyakuipa nkhabe vesa chilungamo tayu, mbwenye anyakusaka-saka MBUYA ambachivesa mwadidi mwene." 
Proverbs28:6 Nyakutcherenga ule nkhabe chakupokanyisa ngwadidi, kusiyana na nyamfuma ule makhaliro ache ngakupotoka." 
Proverbs28:7 Nyakukoya mwambo wa Mulungu ndi mwana wanzeru mbwenye nyakuchita ushamwali na anthu alidyo ambachitisa babache manyadzo. 
Proverbs28:8 Nyakuthimizira mfumache na katapira ambaigumanyira munthu ule ambaonesa kukoma mtima kuna anyakutcherenga. 
Proverbs28:9 Ngakhala munthu anafunga makutu kuna mwambo wa Mulungu, na kupemphera kwache kwene nkhwakunyansira Mulungu." 
Proverbs28:10 Nyakutsogolera anyakulungama m'njira zakuipa, anati agwere mumsampha mwache montho mbwenye anyakusowa chakupokanyisa anatambira pinthu pyadidi." 
Proverbs28:11 Nyakufuma anakwanisa kupiyesa yekha ene wanzeru, mbwenye nyakutcherenga wakuvesa pinthu ambamuoneratu phenengere." 
Proverbs28:12 Anyakulungama angakunda, pambakhala kukomerwa kukulu; mbwenye anyakudawika angakwata utongi, anthu ambaenda kabisala." 
Proverbs28:13 Nyakubisa pyakudawa pyache pinthu pyache nkhabe kumfambira mwadidi tayu, mbwenye nyakupibweka mbapileka anaverwa nsisi." 
Proverbs28:14 Nyakutsanzaya ngule, ndzidzi onsene ambagopa MBUYA, mbwenye nyakuumisa mtimache anagwa panyatwa." 
Proverbs28:15 Mfumu wakudawika wakuvuya anyakusowa chiphedzo akhala ninga nkhalamu yakubangula penu thika wakupomoka. 
Proverbs28:16 Mtongi okhonda vesa pinthu ngwavinga, mbwenye nyakuzonda kudyekerwa anakhala na moyo wakulapha." 
Proverbs28:17 Munthu wakupolomola mseru wakupha mwanzache anakhala nyakuthawathawa mpakana imfache; mbapaleke khala unango wakumphedza. 
Proverbs28:18 Munthu wakusowa chakupokanyisa ambakhala pakupata, mbwenye munthu wa makhaliro akupotoka anagwera m'dzenje." 
Proverbs28:19 Nyakuphata basa m'munda mwache anakhala na phoso, mbwenye nyakuchita pinthu pyapezi-pezi kwache nkhutcherenga kwene basi." 
Proverbs28:20 Nyakulungama anatsanzayiswa pikulu pene mbwenye nyakukhumba kufuma mwakuchimbiza anati atchunyuswe. 
Proverbs28:21 Kuchita pinthu mwakuyang'ana nkhope si pyadidi tayu; kwache atongi anango anakwanisa kudyekerwa na kamkate. 
Proverbs28:22 Nyakuumirwa ambakhumba kufuma mwakuchimbiza mbafa mphuno kuti utcherengi uli chifupi kudza. 
Proverbs28:23 Nyakusumulula mwanzache, pakumalisira pache anakomerwa mtima kusiyana na munthu wakutapira m'kanwa." 
Proverbs28:24 Nyakubera babache penu mache mbalonga mbati, “Si kudawa kuchita tenepo tayu,” weneyo ndi shamwaliache nyakuvunga." 
Proverbs28:25 Nyamtima ambalamusa mapoko-poko, mbwenye nyakunyindira MBUYA pinthu pyache pinamfambira mwadidi." 
Proverbs28:26 Nyakuva pyache yekha ndi pupwe, mbwenye nyakuva kupangwa anakhala pakupata." 
Proverbs28:27 Nyakupasa anyakutcherenga nkhabe dzasowa na chinthu chene tayu, mbwenye nyakufunga maso ache kuna iwo anatembererwa pyakwanga." 
Proverbs28:28 Anyakudawika angakwata utongi, anthu ambaenda kabisala; mbwenye anyakudawika angavungika, anyakulungama ambabweramo pontho." 
Proverbs29:1 Nyakuumisa mtima angasumululwa kazinji kene anati avungwe mwakututumusa okhonda verwa nsisi. 
Proverbs29:2 Anyakulungama angatonga, anthu ambakomerwambo; mbwenye anyakudawika angatonga, anthu ambabulira." 
Proverbs29:3 Nyakufuna nzeru ambachitisa babache kukomerwa, mbwenye shamwali wa maputa ambasakaza mfumache." 
Proverbs29:4 Chilungamo chimbachitisa dziko kumera mitsitsi, mbwenye nyamtima na kudyekerwa ambaifudza dziko." 
Proverbs29:5 Nyakutapira m'kanwa kuna tsanthembache, kunachita iye nkhumteyera msampha." 
Proverbs29:6 Nyakuipa ambakweshwa na pyakudawa pyache, mbwenye nyakulungama ambaimba mbakomerwa." 
Proverbs29:7 Anyakulungama ambachitira chilungamo anyakutcherenga, mbwenye anyakudawika nkhabe kuatsalakana tayu." 
Proverbs29:8 Anyakusingirira ambalamusa chimpiningu mumzinda, mbwenye anthu anzeru ambamalisa ukali." 
Proverbs29:9 Ngakhala munthu wanzeru zache anasumira pupwe, pupwe ambazhangali mbatikana pyache, tenepo pambutopo pambasowa mtendere." 
Proverbs29:10 Nyachirope ambazonda munthu wakuona mtima; mbwenye anyakulungama ambatchinjiriza moyo wache. 
Proverbs29:11 Pupwe ambaonesa shungu yache yonsene, mbwenye nyakulungama ambauphata mtima." 
Proverbs29:12 Ngakhala mtongi anavesera pyakunama, mathubu ache onsene ambasanduka akuipa." 
Proverbs29:13 Nyakutcherenga na nyakupondereza ntchibodzi-bodzi pachinthu ichi: MBUYA ambapereka maso kuna onsene awiriwa. 
Proverbs29:14 Ngakhala mfumu anatonga anyakutcherenga mwakukhonda yang'ana nkhope, ufumu wache unakhala pakupata kwenda na kwenda." 
Proverbs29:15 Kumtchunyusa na mtswamu kumbamfunzisa nzeru, mbwenye mwana wakukulira pachinena ambachitisa mache manyadzo." 
Proverbs29:16 Nyakudawika angatonga, kudawambo kumbakhala pabasache, kwache anyakulungama anaaona kugwa kwa anthu enewa." 
Proverbs29:17 Langa mwanako, tenepo iye nkhabe dzakupasa kwadoka tayu; iye anachitisa moyo wako kukomerwa." 
Proverbs29:18 Pale nkhabe mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu, anthu ndiye ambasanduka ching'aung'au; mbwenye nyakutsanzaya ngule ambakoya mwambo wa MBUYA." 
Proverbs29:19 Nyabasa nkhabe sumululwa na pakanwa pokha tayu; podi kwene kuti iye apivese, kwache iye nkhabe kupichita tayu." 
Proverbs29:20 Ayi ukumuona munthu wakulonga mwamchunju? Pupwe ana chidikhiro kusiyana na iye. 
Proverbs29:21 Ngakhala munthu anapasa nyabasache utumbe kutomera uwanache, pakumalisira pache iye anasala manja m'khosi nama." 
Proverbs29:22 Munthu wakuzhangali ambalamusa mapoko-poko, pontho anyachipsu ambachita pyaumambala pizinji pene." 
Proverbs29:23 Kutumbama kwa munthu kumbamtchithisa pansi, mbwenye nyakupichepesa ambatambira chilemedzo." 
Proverbs29:24 Nyakufamba na mbava nkhabe funa moyo wache tayu; podi kwene kuti adumbiriswe, iye nkhabe bweka umambalache tayu." 
Proverbs29:25 Kugopa anthu kwakhala ninga msampha, mbwenye nyakunyindira MBUYA ambakhala pakupata." 
Proverbs29:26 Anthu azinji ambapifuna kukomerwa mtima na mtongi, mbwenye munthu ambagumana chilungamo kuna MBUYA kwene basi." 
Proverbs29:27 Anyakulungama ambanyansirwa na anyakusowa chilungamo; anyakuipa ambanyansirwambo na anyakulungama. 
Proverbs30:1 Pifunziso pya Aguri mwana Yake wa ku Masa: Mulungu, ine ndatopa! Mulungu, ine ndatopa, pontho ine ndalenduka." 
Proverbs30:2 Ine ndine pupweletu kupiringana anango onsene, ine nkhabe udziwisi ninga una anthu tayu." 
Proverbs30:3 Ine sidafunze nzeru tayu, penu kukhala na udziwisi wa Nyakuchenayo tayu." 
Proverbs30:4 Aendako kudzuluko mbani mbabwerako pontho? Mbani agumanyisa mphepo m'thavu mwache? Apo mbani adakukutiza madzi m'khambza mwache? Akhazikisa madolomero a dziko yapansi mbani? Ayi dzinache mbani, pontho dzina ya mwanache mbani? Ngandipange ngakhala unapidziwa!" 
Proverbs30:5 Mafala onsene a Mulungu ngakunyindirika; iye ntchakugedera matswimo kuna anyakubisala muna iye ale. 
Proverbs30:6 Leka thimizira pamafalache, gopesera iye anakubwanyula mbuoneka nyakunama." 
Proverbs30:7 MBUYA ndinakupemphani pinthu piwiri; lekani kundikhondera mbandidzati kufa: 
Proverbs30:8 Thamangisani unthawatawa na kunama kutali na ine; lekani kundipasa nee utcherengi, penu mfuma, mbwenye mundipase kwene kudya kwa nsiku na nsiku." 
Proverbs30:9 Thangwi ndingakhala napyo pizinji ndinakwanisa kukuduwalirani mbandilonga kuti, “MBUYA mbani?” Ndingakhala nyakutcherenga ndinaba, penepo ndinalulupisa dzina ya Mulungu wanga." 
Proverbs30:10 Leka pangirira nyabasa kuna mbuyache, gopesera iye anakutemberera mbuoneswa nyatwa." 
Proverbs30:11 Pana anango ambatemberera ababawo mbakhonda tsanzayisa amawo; 
Proverbs30:12 ale ambapiyesa adidi m'maso mwawo, kwache m'bwalo mwawo mwamala dzala na pyakunyansa;" 
Proverbs30:13 ale ambatumbama pyakwanga, mbapiyesa ninga anthu a m'mudzi mwa anthu;" 
Proverbs30:14 anthu ale mano awo ali jentchenene ninga talasada, ale nsabwada zawo zina mipeni pika-pika kuti akhudyule anyakutcherenga padziko yapansi, pontho anyakusowa pakutsamira pakati pa anthu." 
Proverbs30:15 Usundu una ana awiri achikazi. Iwo akulira kuti, “Ngatipaseni changana, ngatipaseni changana.” Pana pinthu pitatu pile nkhabe khuta tayu, pinthu pinayi pile ndzidzi onsene nkhabe longa tayu kuti, “Takhuta!”" 
Proverbs30:16 Dziko ya anyakufa, nthumbo yakuuma, mataka okhonda kwana na madzi, pontho moto ule nkhabe longa tayu kuti, “Ndakhuta!”" 
Proverbs30:17 Nyakuseka babache pontho nyakululupisa mache, anakonombolwa maso na makhungubwe a m'phedi mbadyiwa na malezi." 
Proverbs30:18 Pana pinthu pitatu pile pimbandimala nzeru pyakwanga, pinthu pinayi pile pimbandinensa pyakwanga kupivesa:" 
Proverbs30:19 kumbuluka kwa miphamba kudzuluku, kufamba kwa nyoka pamwala, kubeluka kwa mwadiya ukulu pabara, pontho kufunana kumbachita mphale na mwali." 
Proverbs30:20 Umu ndiye mumbachitira puta: iye ambadya mbakupusa mulomo wache, kubuluka penepo ambalonga kuti, “Ine sidadawe tayu.”" 
Proverbs30:21 Pana pinthu pitatu pile pimbachitisa dziko yapansi kutetemera na mantha, pinthu pinayi pile nkhabe kwanisa kupipirira tayu:" 
Proverbs30:22 bitchu wakusanduka mfumu, pupwe wakukhala na phoso mataka ene," 
Proverbs30:23 mkazi wa makhaliro akuipa angasembwa, pontho nyabasa wachikazi angapokosera mbuyache banja." 
Proverbs30:24 Pana pinthu pinayi ping'ono-ping'ono padziko yapansi, kwache mphyanzeru pyakwanga:" 
Proverbs30:25 nyerere mphyakulengwa pyakuchepa mphamvu, kwache zimbakoyeratu pyakudya pyawo m'malimwe;" 
Proverbs30:26 mbira nkhanyama kakuchepa mphamvu, kwache zimbamanga nyumba zawo m'maphanzwi;" 
Proverbs30:27 nyadzombe nkhabe mfumu tayu, kwache ambafamba pamulikiti m'magulu-magulu;" 
Proverbs30:28 nyankalibunyu anakwanisa kuphatwa na manja, kwache ambagumanwa m'nyumba za mafumu." 
Proverbs30:29 Pana pinthu pitatu pile pimbafamba tang'atang'a; pana pinthu pinayi pile pimbafamba na nthuku phaa: 
Proverbs30:30 nkhalamu ile ina mphamvu pyakwanga pakati pa nyama, pontho ile nkhabe thawa chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu;" 
Proverbs30:31 dzongwe, na bokho, pontho mfumu wakufamba na anyankhondo ache yungaa." 
Proverbs30:32 Ngakhala udatoma khala pupwe, pontho kupisimba wekha ene, penu udatoma wasasanya kuchita pyakuipa, toma khala fulike mbuphate phutu." 
Proverbs30:33 Thangwi mkaka ungadenkhera, mafuta amkaka ambaoneka padzulu pache, pontho ungafinya mphuno chiropa chimbabuluka, sasawambo kulamusa ukali mamalisiro ache ndi nthonga basi." 
Proverbs31:1 Ipi mphifunziso pya Mfumu Lemuele wa ku Masa, pile pidamfunzisambo mache:" 
Proverbs31:2 “Mwananga, mwana wakubuluka m'mimba mwanga, mwananga adapaswa ine thangwi ya kupemphera kwanga, ngandivesere:" 
Proverbs31:3 leka malira akazi mphamvu zako, mboko zako na akazi ambavunga mafumu ale." 
Proverbs31:4 “Lemuele, mfumu hadatheme tayu kupapila pyakuledzeresa, atongi nee pidaathemere tayu kukhala na chikalo cha bwadwa," 
Proverbs31:5 gopesera analedzera mbaduwalira matongero a dziko, mbapotoza ufulu wa anyakuponderezwa onsene." 
Proverbs31:6 Pasa bwadwawo kuna anyakutayika; pereka vinyu kuna nyakusanyika mtima. 
Proverbs31:7 Aleke amwe mbaduwalira utcherengi wawo; nyatwa zawo mbaleke kuzikumbukave. 
Proverbs31:8 “Longa m'mbuto mwa ale nkhabe kwanisa longa okha ene; ikhira kunduli anyakusowa na pakuphata pene kuna anyakuasumira. 
Proverbs31:9 Longa pontho tonga miseru mwachilungamo; ikhira kunduli anthu akutcherenga na anyakusowa ene.” 
Proverbs31:10 Ayi mbani agumana mkazi wa makhaliro adidi? Iye ngwakufunika kupiringana miyala yakudula. 
Proverbs31:11 Mamunache anakwanisa kumnyindira, tenepo mamunayo nkhabe dzasowa pinthu tayu." 
Proverbs31:12 Nsiku zonsene za moyo wache, mkaziyo nkhabe kumdzesera nyatwa tayu, mbwenye pyadidi pene basi." 
Proverbs31:13 Mkaziyo ambaenda mbasaka ubweya wa mabira na thonje, mbawangisa kuphata basa na manjache." 
Proverbs31:14 Iye akhala ninga miyadiya mikulu-mikulu ya anyamalonda wakupidzesera yekha ene phoso kubulukira kumadziko akutali. 
Proverbs31:15 Iye ambalamuka kunja kuli mbuu; iye ambasasanyira banjache pyakudya mbagawira anyabasache achitsikana basa. 
Proverbs31:16 Iye ambanyerezera pya kugula munda mbauguladi; iye ambalima munda wamfesa na kobiri zakupha yekha na manjache. 
Proverbs31:17 Iye ngwakuwangisa pabasa; iye nkhabe khala makhono mburuu tayu angaphata basa. 
Proverbs31:18 Iye ambaonesesa kuti malonda ache akuganyali nawo, pontho nyale yache nkhabe thima tayu na mosiku." 
Proverbs31:19 Iye ambapilukira yekha ene thonje, mbapisasanyira yekha ene nguwo." 
Proverbs31:20 Iye ngwakufewa manja kuna anyakutcherenga mbafuthula manja kuna anyakusowa. 
Proverbs31:21 Kunja kungatonthola, iye nkhabe swipa mtima na banjache tayu, thangwi onsenewo ana pyakuvala pyakukhumba." 
Proverbs31:22 Iye ambasasanya nguwo zakugonera patalimba; iye ambavala nguwo zakufewa pontho zakukoma m'maso. 
Proverbs31:23 Mamunache ambadziwika na anthu azinji, pontho ambalemedzwa pakati pa mathando a anthu." 
Proverbs31:24 Iye ambasasanya nguwo zakufewa mbazigulisa, pontho anyamalonda, iye ambaagulisira pitambaya." 
Proverbs31:25 Mphamvu na chilemedzo pimbakhala ninga pyakuvala pyache, anganyerezera pya m'tsogolo kukhosi kwache kumbakhala mbee." 
Proverbs31:26 Iye ambalonga mwanzeru; mbapereka uphungu wadidi kuna anthu anango. 
Proverbs31:27 Iye ambafambisa pinthu pya panyumba pache, pontho iye nkhabe khala kwene manja mbwee tayu." 
Proverbs31:28 Anache ambamnyadira mbamchemera nyakutsanzaya; mamunache ambachitambo chibodzi-bodzi, mbamsimba mbati:" 
Proverbs31:29 “Alipo akazi azinji, ale ana makhaliro adidi, kwache iwembo waapita onsenewo.”" 
Proverbs31:30 Nkhope yamchena imbaphata anthu m'maso, pontho kubalika kwa nkhope kumbamala; mbwenye mkazi ule ambagopa MBUYA athema kusimbwa." 
Proverbs31:31 Iye athema kutambira mfupo, thangwi ya mabasache, pontho mabasache mbalemedzwe nawo pakwecha." 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Mafala enewa mba Nyakulalika mwanache Davite, ule akhali mfumu mumzinda wa Yerusalemu:" 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Nyakulalika adalonga mbati, “Mphyapezi-pezi! Mphyapezi-pezi! Pyonsene mphyapezi-pezi!”" 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Munthu ambaganyalinji na mabasache onsene, mabasa ambaphata iye mwakuwangisa pansi pa thambo?" 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Mifendu imbadza, mifendu imbamala, mbwenye dziko yapansi imbakhalapo kwenda na kwenda." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Dzuwa imbabuluka, dzuwa imbathobila, mbithamanga kubwerera kudabulukira iyo kule." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Mphepo imbadima kwenda kumwera mbizungunuka kwenda kumpoto, mbizungulira-zungulira kubwerera kudabulukira iyo." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Mikulo yonsene imbakuka kagwera m'bara, kwache bara nkhabe dzala tayu. Madzi ambabwerera kule kudatomera mikulo, mbatoma pontho kukuka." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Pinthu pyonsene mphyakutopesa: munthu nkhabe kwanisa kupilonga kwache. Maso nkhabe kwanisa kupiona pyonsenepyo; makutu nkhabe kwanisa kupiva pyonsenepyo tayu. 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Pinthu pikhalipo kale pinati pikhalepo pontho. Pinthu pyachitika kale pinai pichitike pontho. Pansi pa thambo nkhabepo chinthu na chibodzi chene chachinchino. 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Ayi pana chinthu chinango chile chinakwanisa munthu kulonga kuti, “Yang'ana! Ichi ntchachinchino.” Nkhabe, pyonsene pikhalipo kale ife mbatidzati balwa." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Nkhabe na mbodzi ene ambakumbuka pinthu pidachitika m'nduli tayu; m'tsogolo muno munthu nkhabe dzakumbuka pinthu pimbachitika lero, penu mangwana tayu." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Ine, Nyakulalika, ndikhakhalira mu Yerusalemu kutonga dziko ya Israele." 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Na nzeru zanga zonsene ndidachita phinga kufuna kufunza na kudziwa pinthu pyonsene pimbachitika padziko ya pansi pano. Yeneyi ndi mitolo yakulemera yaikha Mulungu pana anthu. 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Ndaona pyonsene pile pimbachitwa pansi pa thambo: pyonsene mphyapezi-pezi, nkhulemba m'madzi." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Chinthu chakugongonyeka nkhabe kwanisa kudzongolwa tayu; chinthu chakusowapo nkhabe kwanisa kulengeswa tayu. 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Ndidalonga ndekha ene kuti, “Ine ndakula na nzeru kupiringana munthu onsene adatonga Yerusalemu ine mbandidzati. Ine ndimbadziwa chadi-chadi kuti nzeru pontho udziwisi pikulonga kuti tani.”" 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Ndidachita phinga kufuna kuvesa kusiyana kwachita nzeru na kupupwa, kusiyana kwa udziwisi na nsala. Mbwenye ndidagumana kuti penepi pontho nkhulemba m'madzi." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Thangwi kukhala na nzeru zizinji, kumbadzesambo mdungulu wa kutsukwala: kukhala na udziwisi kumbachitisa kusanyika mtima pikulu pene." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Ndidalonga ndekha ene kuti, “Ande, chinchino ndinati ndipiyese ndekha ene na tsenzo, towera ndigumane chinthu chakundikomera.” Mbwenye ndidaona kuti penepi pontho mphyapezi-pezi." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Ndidalonga kuti, “Kuseka nkhupupwa, pontho tsenzo nkhabe ganyalisa tayu.”" 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Na manyerezero akutsogolerwa na nzeru zanga, ine ndidapiyesera kupigalamusa ndekha ene na vinyu, pontho kukomerwa na pyaupupwe. Ine ndikhafuna kuona kuti ninji chinakwanisa munthu kuchita pansi pa thambo pansiku zakuchepa za moyo wache." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Ine ndidachita pinthu pikulu. Ndidapimangira nyumba zizinji mbandilima minda yamfesa. 
Ecclesiastes2:5 Ndidalima minda mbindibzalamo miti ya nsapo zakusiyana-siyana; 
Ecclesiastes2:6 ndidakumba thawale ya madzi, towera ndithirire nawo miti idabzalwa kwene ile." 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Ndidagula mabitchu achimuna na achikazi ene, pontho ndikhali na mabitchu anango akubalwa m'nyumba mwanga. Ndikhali na ng'ombe na mabira pizinji kupiringana munthu onsene akhakhala mu Yerusalemu ine mbindidzati." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Ine ndidapimulukira siliva na golidi kubulukira kuna mfuma yonsene ya mafumu na atsanthemba. Ine ndikhali na anyakuimba achimuna na achikazi ene, pontho na akazi achibitchu, ale ambachitisa mamuna kukomerwa." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Ande, ndikhali wamkulu, wamkulu kupiringana munthu onsene mu Yerusalemu ine mbindidzati. Papinthu pyonsenenepi nzeru zanga nee zidandithawe tayu." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Ine ndikhakwatika na chonsene chikhaona maso anga; tsenzo ndiye ikhali kudya kwanga. Mtimanga ukhakomerwa na mabasa akuwanga akhaphata ine. Wenewu ndi mfupo wa mabasanga onsene akuwanga. 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Pidanyerezera ine pya pinthu pyonsene pidaphata manjanga pontho mabasanga adaphata ine mwakuwangisa, ndadzindikira kuti pyonsene mphyapezi-pezi, nkhulemba m'madzi; nkhabe chidaganyali ine pansi pa thambo tayu." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Kubuluka penepo ndidatoma kunyerezera pya nzeru, nsala pontho kupupwa. Ayi ninji pontho chinakwanisa kuchita nyakupita m'mbuto mwa mfumu kupiringana pinthu pidachitwa kale iye mbadzati?" 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Ndapiona kuti nzeru nsadidi kusiyana na kupupwa, ninga montho mumbachitira cheza kupiringana mdima." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Anthu anzeru ambadziwa kunaenda iwo, mbwenye mapupwe ambafamba mumdima. Kwache ndadzindikira kuti pinthu pinafuna dzagwera unango pyontho-pyonthopyo pinati pigwerembo unango." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Ndidapinyerezera ndekha ene kuti, “Pinthu pinafuna dzagwera pupwe pyonthopyo ndiye pinafuna dzandigwera. Apo chidaganyali ine ninji kukhala wanzeru?” Ine ndidalonga ndekha ene kuti, “Penepi pontho mphyapezi-pezi.”" 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Thangwi nyanzeru sasawambo ninga pupwe nkhabe dzakumbukwa tayu; nsiku zinadzazo onsene uwiriawo anaduwalika. Ninga pupwe ntchibodzi-bodzi nyanzeru anati afembo! 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Natenepo ndidatoma kuzonda moyo, thangwi mabasa onsene ale aphatwa pansi pa thambo ngakudzesa kwene nyatwa kuna ine. Pyonsene mphyapezi-pezi, nkhulemba m'madzi." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Ine ndidazonda mabasa onsene adaphata ine mwakuwangisa pansi pa thambo, podi ndathema kupisiyira nyakufuna dzapita m'mbuto mwanga ule;" 
Ecclesiastes2:19 mbani anapidziwa kuti iye anakhala wanzeru penu pupwe? Kwache iye anakhala na utongi papyonsene pidagumana ine na mabasanga adaphata ine mwakuwangisa pontho mwaluso pansi pa thambo. Penepi pontho mphyapezi-pezi. 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Natenepo ndidatoma kusanyika mumtima thangwi ya mabasa onsene akuwanga adaphata ine mwakubulusa kaluma pansi pa thambo. 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Thangwi munthu anakwanisa kuphata basache na nzeru, udziwisi pontho luso, kubuluka penepo iye athema kupisiyira munthu unango pinthu pyache pyonsene, ule hadapibulusire kaluma tayu. Penepi pontho mphyapezi-pezi pontho ndi dzedze ikulu." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Apo munthu anaganyaliponji thangwi ya mabasache onsene aphata iye mwakuwangisa pontho mwakuva kupha pansi pa thambo? 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Nsiku zache zonsene basa imbaphata iye njakuvesa kupha pontho yakutsukwalisa; podi na mosiku ene msolo wache nkhabe puma tayu. Penepi pontho mphyapezi-pezi. 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Chinthu chadidi chinakwanisa munthu kuchichita nkhudya na kumwa pyache, pontho kukomerwa na mabasa ambaphata iye. Kwache penepi pontho ndidapiona kuti mphyakubulukira kuna Mulungu," 
Ecclesiastes2:25 thangwi kusowa iye, mbani anakwanisa kudya penu kukomerwa?" 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Mulungu ambapereka nzeru, udziwisi pontho kukomerwa kuna anthu ambakomerwa na iye ale. Mbwenye kuna anyakudawa iye ambaapasa basa yakugumanya na kukoya mfuma, towera iwo aipereke kuna anthu ambachitisa Mulungu kukomerwa ale. Penepi pontho mphyapezi-pezi, nkhulemba m'madzi." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Chinthu chonsene chimbachitika pansi pa thambo chile, chimbachitika pandzidzi wache:" 
Ecclesiastes3:2 pana ndzidzi wakubalwa pontho ndzidzi wakufa, pana ndzidzi wakubzala pontho ndzidzi wakudula," 
Ecclesiastes3:3 pana ndzidzi wakupha pontho ndzidzi wakuwangisa, pana ndzidzi wakugwisa pontho ndzidzi wakumanga," 
Ecclesiastes3:4 pana ndzidzi wakulira pontho ndzidzi wakuseka, pana ndzidzi wakusintili pontho ndzidzi wakuvina," 
Ecclesiastes3:5 pana ndzidzi wakumwaza miyala pontho ndzidzi wakuigumanya, pana ndzidzi wakukhumbatirana pontho ndzidzi wakuthundana," 
Ecclesiastes3:6 pana ndzidzi wakugumana pinthu pontho ndzidzi wakutaya pinthu, pana ndzidzi wakukoya pinthu pontho ndzidzi wa bazawaza," 
Ecclesiastes3:7 pana ndzidzi wakung'amba pontho ndzidzi wakusona, pana ndzidzi wakumatama pontho ndzidzi wakulonga," 
Ecclesiastes3:8 pana ndzidzi wakufunana pontho ndzidzi wa chizondi, pana ndzidzi wa nkhondo pontho ndzidzi wa mtendere." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Ayi nyakuphata basa ambaganyaliponji na mabasache onsene akuwanga? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Ndaona mitolo yakulemera yaikha Mulungu pana anthu. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Iye aikha ndzidzi wakuthema papinthu pyonsene. Iye atipasa manyerezero akufuna kudziwa pya m'nduli na pya m'tsogolo, kwache munthu nkhabe kukwanisa kuvesa pinthu pimbachita iye kubulukira pakutoma kufikirana pakumalisira tayu." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Ndimbapidziwa kuti nkhabe chadidi chinakwanisa munthu kuchita kupiringana kusekera na kukomerwa pyache ndzidzi una iye na moyo. 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Ande, munthu onsene athema kudya na kumwa pyache pontho kukomerwa na mabasache onsene akuwanga, thangwi penepi ndi mtukwa wa Mulungu." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Ndimbapidziwa kuti pinthu pimbachita Mulungu pimbakhalapo kwenda na kwenda; nkhabe na chinthu chene chinakwanisa kuthimizirwa penu kubuluswa pana ipyo tayu. Mulungu ambachita tenepo, towera anthu amgope." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Chinthu chonsene chilipo lero chikhalipo kale, pontho chonsene chinafuna dzakhalapo chikhalipo kale; Mulungu ambachitisa pinthu pya m'nduli kuchitika pontho." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Ndidaona pontho chinthu chinango pansi pa thambo: Pale padathema khala chilungamo pana pyakudawika, pontho pale padathema khala pyakulungama pana pyakudawika." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Ine ndidalonga ndekha ene kuti, “Mulungu anati atonge anyakulungama na anyakudawika, thangwi iye aikha ndzidzi wa chonsene chakuchitika, pontho ndzidzi wa basa yonsene.”" 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Ndidalonga mumtima mwanga kuti, “Kulonga pya anthu, Mulungu akuayesa, towera aaonese kuti akhala ninga nyama." 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Mamalisiro a munthu na nyama ngabodzi ene: munthu ambafa, nyama imbafambo. Onsene uwiriawo ana muya ubodzi ene; munthu nkhabe piringana nyama tayu. Pyonsene mphyapezi-pezi." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Onsene uwiriawo ambaenda kumbuto ibodzi ene; onsenewa adabulukira kufumbi; tenepo onsene anabwerera kufumbiko. 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Mbani anapidziwa ngakhala mzimu wa munthu umbaenda kudzulu, pontho ngakhala mzimu wa nyama umbaenda kumataka?”" 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Tenepo ndidapiona kuti nkhabe chinthu chadidi kuna munthu kupiringana kukomerwa pyache na pinthu pyaphatira iye basa, thangwi penepyo ndiye pyakumthemera. Thangwi mbani anakwanisa kudziwa chinthu chinafuna dzamchitikira iye angafa." 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Ndidayang'ana pontho mbandiona kuponderezana konsene kukhachitika pansi pa thambo: Ine ndidaona misozi ya anyakuponderezwa, pontho pakhali nkhabe nyakuathondoza; thangwi anyakuapondereza akhali na mphamvu zizinji, pontho pakhasowa nyakuathondoza." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Ine ndidanyerezera kuti anyakufa, ale aenda kale, ali pyadidi kupiringana ale anapuma, pontho ana moyo na lero." 
Ecclesiastes4:3 Mbwenye wadidi kupiringana awiriwa ngule hadzati balwa tayu, ule hadzati ona pyakuipa pinachitika pansi pa thambo tayu." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Ine ndidaona kuti basa yonsene pontho na kupikwanisa konsene pimbachitika na thangwi ya kuipirwa na atsanthemba. Penepi pontho mphyapezi-pezi, nkhulemba m'madzi." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Pupwe ambakhala kwene manja mbwee mbapivunga yekha ene. 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Mphyadidi kukhala na pinthu pyakudzala dzanja ibodzi mbukhala pamtendere kusiyana na kukhala na pinthu pyakudzala manja mawiri uku mbukungudzika; penepi nkhulemba m'madzi. 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Ine ndidaona pontho chinthu chinango chile ntchapezi-pezi pansi pa thambo: 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Pidachitwa na mamuna unango ule akhali khowa; iye nkhabe mwana pontho mbale. Iye hakhapuma tayu pamabasache akuwanga, kwache iye hakhakwana tayu na mfumache. Iye adapivunza yekha ene mbati, “Anaphatira ine mabasa akuwanga tenepayi mbani? Thangwi yache ninji ndinapimana tsenzo? Penepi pontho mphyapezi-pezi, mphyakutsukwalisa pyakwanga!”" 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Awiri ndi mtombwe kusiyana na kukhala wekha ene, thangwi basa yakuphata anthu awiri imbaoneka:" 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Ngakhala mbodzi anagwa, mwanzacheyo anakwanisa kumulamusa. Ntchinthu chakuvesa nsisi pyakwanga, munthu angakhala yekha ene mbagwa mbapasowa unango wakumphedza." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Ngakhala anthu awiri anagona pabodzi pene anakwanisa kuva kukhumbirwa. Mbwenye munthu angakhala yekha ene anava tani kukhumbirwa? 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Munthu pa yekha ene anakwanisa kukundwa, mbwenye anthu awiri anakwanisa kupitchinjiriza. Nkhambala ya miwasi mitatu nkhabe gwandikirapo tayu." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Mphale wakutcherenga, ule ana nzeru, ngwadidi kupiringana mfumu wakukalamba pontho wakupupwa, ule nkhabe funa uphungu." 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Pinakwanisika kuti mphale kubuluka m'perezo mbakhala mfumu, penu kubalwa pakutcherenga mbakhala mfumu." 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Ine ndidaona kuti onsene ale anafamba mbakhala pansi pa thambo, adatewera mphale adapita m'mbuto mwa mfumu ule." 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Anthu akhatonga iye akhali okhonda lengeseka, mbwenye khuwo inango nkhabe dzakomerwa naye tayu. Penepi pontho mphyapezi-pezi, nkhulemba m'madzi." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Chita mphole-mphole ungaenda ku Nyumba ya Mulungu. Mphyadidi kwenda kweneko kavesera kusiyana na kupereka nsembe ninga mumbachitira mapupwe, ale nkhabe dziwa kuti akuchita pyakuipa tayu." 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Toma nyerezera mbudzati longa, pontho leka chimbiza na kudumbira kuna Mulungu. Mulungu ali kudzulu, iwe uli pansi pano, natenepo leka injipisa pyakulonga." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Ninga mumbachitira ndoto kudza thangwi ya kuinjipa kwa pyakutsalakana sasawambo upupwe umbaoneka thangwi ya kuinjipisa pyakulonga. 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Pinadumbira iwe kuna Mulungu kuchita chinango, chimbiza kuchichita, thangwi iye nkhabe komerwa na mapupwe tayu; chita pidadumbira iwepyo." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Mphyadidi kukhonda dumbira kusiyana na kudumbira mbukhonda kupichita. 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Leka tawirisa mulomo wako kukudawisa, pontho leka longa kuna nyansembe wa Mulungu kuti, “Ndikhalonga dzendanga.” Thangwi yache ninji kuti Mulungu azhangali na mafala alonga iwe, pontho kuti avunge pinthu pyapha iwe na manjako?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Podi ulote pyako tani mbuinjipisa pyalukonga, pyonsenepyo mphyapezi-pezi. Kwache gopa Mulungu." 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Leka dodoma ungaona dziko ikuvuya anyakutcherenga, ikukhonda teweza chilungamo, pontho ikupondereza ufulu wawo; thangwi thubu onsene ana nyakumuyang'anira padzulu pache, pontho onsene awiriwa ana nyakuayang'anira padzulu pawo." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Pyakuvuna pya m'munda pimbakwatwa na onsene; maka-maka mfumu ndiye ambaganyali na pyakuvuna. 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Nyakuikha mtima pa kobiri nkhabe kwana na kobiri tayu; nyakukhumba mfuma nkhabe kwana na pyonsene pinagumana iye tayu. Penepi pontho mphyapezi-pezi. 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Pinthu pingainjipa, milomo imbainjipambo. Apo mwenechiro ambaganyaliponji, kwache nkhupiyang'ana kwene." 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Chitulo cha nyaganyo chimbatapira, podi aperewezwe pyache penu akhute, mbwenye nyapyache nkhabe ona chitulo tayu." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Ine ndaona chinthu chakuipa chakugumisa manungo pansi pa thambo; mfuma kukuwaza enechiro ache. 
Ecclesiastes5:14 Iwo ambataya mfumawo yonsene thangwi ya kugwiwa kufuna pizinji mbasala nkhabe pinthu pyakuti asiyire anawo. 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Chitakwa-takwa munthu ambabuluka m'mimba mwa mache, tenepo ninga montho mudadzera iye, montho-monthomo iye anabuluka pansi pano. Iye nkhabe kwata na chinthu chene tayu papinthu pidapha iye na manjache mwakubulusa kaluma, chakuti aphatire m'manja mwache." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Chenechi pontho ntchinthu chakuipa chakugumisa manungo: Ninga montho mumbadzera munthu, montho-monthomo iye ambabuluka pansi pano. Apo chimbaganyali iye ninji na basache yakuwanga kufuna kufumbata mphepo?" 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Nsiku zonsene za moyo wache iye ambadya mumdima, pontho kusanyika mtima, utenda, na kuzhangali." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Tenepo ine ndidadzindikira kuti mphyadidi pontho mphyakuthema kuna munthu kudya na kumwa pontho na kukomerwa na mabasache onsene akuwanga ambaphata iye mwakubulusa kaluma pansi pa thambo na nsiku zakuchepa zampasa Mulungu; thangwi penepi ndiye pyakumthemera. 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Kuthimiza penepa, ngakhala Mulungu anampasa munthu mfuma na pinthu mbamchitisa kukomerwa napyo, kukomerwa na pinthu pyakumthemera pontho na pinthu pyaphatira iye basa; penepi ndi mtukwa wa Mulungu." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Iye nkhabe dzasanyika mtima na kuchepa kwachita nsiku za moyo, podi Mulungu ambachitisa moyo wache kukhala kaliki-liki kukomerwa." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Ine ndaona chinthu chinango chakuipa pansi pa thambo, chile chakhala ninga mtolo wakulemera pana anthu." 
Ecclesiastes6:2 Mulungu ambapasa munthu mfuma, chilemedzo, pontho pinthu, towera iye aleke sowa chinthu chonsene chinakhumba mtimache, kwache Mulungu nkhabe kumtawirisa tayu kukomerwa napyo, m'mbuto mwache nyaphena ndiye ambakomerwa napyo. Penepi mphyapezi-pezi, pontho mphyakugumisa manungo." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Munthu anakwanisa kukhala na ana dzana mbakhala na moyo pyaka pizinji; kwache kukhala kwache na moyo wakulapha nkhabe pinthu tayu ngakhala iye nkhabe komerwa na ufumi wache mbakhonda ikhwa mwadidi m'masiye, tenepo ndimbalonga kuti mwana ene wakubalwa wakufa kale, ali pyadidi pyakwanga kupiringana iye." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 Kudza kwache nkhwakusowa basa, ambabisika mumdima, pontho dzinache imbafikhirika mumdima." 
Ecclesiastes6:5 Podi kwene kuti iye hadaone kunja tayu, penu kudziwa chinthu na chibodzi chene, iye ali padidi kusiyana na munthu," 
Ecclesiastes6:6 podi kwene akhale pyache na moyo pyaka pikwi piwiri, kwache mbakhonda komerwa. Ayi onsenewa nkhabe kwenda kumbuto ibodzi ene tayu?" 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Munthu ambaphata mabasache onsene akuwanga, towera adyese mulomo wache, kwache mabache nkhabe mala tayu." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Munthu wanzeru ngwadidi tani kupiringana pupwe? Ayi nyakutcherenga kudziwa makhaliro akuthema kumbamganyaliranji? 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Mphyadidi kukwana na pinthu pina iwepyo kusiyana na kutsanza mabako. Penepi pontho mphyapezi-pezi, nkhulemba m'madzi." 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Chinthu chonsene chilipo lero chapaswa kale dzinache, pontho kuti munthu mbani mphyakudziwika kale. Munthu nkhabe thimbana na unango wamphamvu kupiringana iye tayu." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Mafala angainjipa penepo nkhabe oneka mphuno yache tayu. Apo penepyo pinaganyalinji kuna munthu? 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Thangwi mbani anadziwa kuti chadidi ninji kuna munthu pamoyo, pandzidzi wa nsiku zache zakuchepa pontho zapezi-pezi zinagwanda iye kwene pyache ninga chigudu-gudu? Mbani anakwanisa kumpanga pinthu pinafuna dzachitika pansi pa thambo iye angafa?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Mbiri yadidi njadidi kusiyana na mafuta akununkhira, pontho nsiku yakufa njadidi kusiyana na nsiku yakubalwa." 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Mphyadidi kwenda kumsuwo kule kuna kusintili kusiyana na kwenda kumsuwo kule kuna phwando. Podi imfa ndiye mamalisiro ache a munthu onsene, anthu amoyo athema kupidziwa penepi mumtima mwawo." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Kutsukwala nkhwadidi kusiyana na kuseka, thangwi kutsukwala kwa nkhope kumbachitisa mtima kukhala wangwiro." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Mtima wa munthu wanzeru umbanyerezera pya imfa, mbwenye mtima wa pupwe ambauikha patsenzo basi." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Mphyadidi kuva kukusumulula kwa anthu anzeru kusiyana na kusimbwa na mapupwe. 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Ninga kuthomuka kwa minga pamoto, ndi sasawa na kuseka kwa pupwe. Penepi pontho mphyapezi-pezi." 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Kupondereza kumbasanduza munthu wanzeru kukhala pupwe, pontho kudyekera kumbaipisa munthu." 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Mamalisiro a chinthu ngadidi kusiyana na kutoma kwache, pontho kupirira nkhwadidi kusiyana na kugaya." 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Leka chimbiza kupinda, thangwi kuzhangali nkhwa mapupwe." 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Leka vunza kuti, “Thangwi yache ninji kale pinthu pikhafamba mwadidi kusiyana na lero?” Si chinthu chanzeru tayu kuvunza pinthu ninga penepi." 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Ninga kusiyirwa mfuma, sasawambo nzeru nsadidi pyakwanga, mbiziganyalisa munthu onsene pansi pa thambo." 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Ninga kobiri ndi mthunzi, sasawambo nzeru ndi mthunzi, kwache nzeru zimbatchinjiriza moyo wa nyakukhala nazo; wenewu ngudidi wa udziwisi." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Nyerezerani pya pinthu pyachita Mulungu: Mbani anakwanisa kudzongola chinthu chidasasanya Mulungu mwakugongonyeka? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Pinthu pingafamba mwadidi, komerwa; mbwenye nyatwa zingadza kumbuka kuti: Mulungu ndiye asasanya pyonsene piwiripi, towera munthu aleke dziwa pinthu pinafuna dzamgwera m'tsogolo." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Pa moyo wanga wapezi-pezi ndaona pinthu piwiri ipi: Nyakulungama kuvungika na kulungama kwache kwene, pontho nyakudawika kukhala na moyo wakulapha na kudawika kwache kwene." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Leka khaliratu wakulungama penu kukhaliratu wanzeru, thangwi yache ninji upivunge wekha ene!" 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Leka khaliratu nyakudawika, penu kukhaliratu pupwe, thangwi yache ninji ufe ndzidzi mbudzati kwana?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Mphyadidi kukakamira chinthu chibodzi, ndzidzi onthowo mbukhonda pontho kutaya chinthu chinangocho. Nyakugopa Mulungu pyonsenepi pinamfambira mwadidi." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Nzeru zimbachitisa munthu kukhala wamphamvu pyakwanga kupiringana akadamu khumi a mumzinda. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Padziko ya pansi pano nkhabe na mbodzi ene wakulungama, ule ambachita pyakulungama, pontho ule chipo hadadawe tayu." 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Leka ikha khutu kuna pinthu pyonsene pinalonga anthu, gopesera mwinango unava nyabasako akukutikana," 
Ecclesiastes7:22 thangwi ukupidziwa mumtima mwako kuti iwe ene maka kazinji kene watikana anthu anango. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Pyonsene ndidapiyesa na nzeru zanga mbandilonga kuti ine ndidachita phinga kuti ndikhale wanzeru kwache pikhali pyakunensa kupifikira. 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Mbani anakwanisa kugumana nzeru? Izo nsakuzwika pyakwanga pontho nsakunensa kuzivesa. 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Ine ndidaikha mtima kufuna kugumana nzeru, kuzisaka-saka na kuzivesa, pontho kudziwa machitiro a pinthu, kuvesa kupupwa kwachita kudawika, pontho na nsala wa upupwe." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Ine ndidagumana chinthu chakuvesa kupha pyakwanga kupiringana imfa, mkazi ule mtimache wakhala ninga mulindi penu msampha; ule manjache akhala ninga njema. Nyakuchitisa Mulungu kukomerwayo anamthawa, mbwenye nyakudawika anakweshwa naye." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Nyakulalika adalonga mbati, “Ngayang'anani ipi ndiye pidagumana ine: Ndikhasakanyula chibodzi chibodzi, towera ndigumane machitiro a pinthu." 
Ecclesiastes7:28 Podi kwene ndikhasaka-saka ndzidzi ukulu ene, kwache sidagumane chinango tayu kupambula ichi: mamuna mbodzi wakulungama pakati pa anthu chikwi, mbwenye nkhabe mkazi na mbodzi ene wakulungama pakati pawo onsene tayu." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Chagumana ine ntchakuti: Mulungu adasasanya munthu kukhala wakulungama, mbwenye munthu abauka kwenda pyache njirache.”" 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Mbani akhala ninga munthu wanzeru? Mbani ambadziwa kufuthula kwa pinthu? Nzeru zimbagalamusa nkhope ya munthu, pontho zimbabulusa makwinya." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Vera matongero a mfumu, thangwi iwe udadumbira pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Chimbiza kubuluka pamaso pa mfumu ungachita pyakukhonda kumkomera, thangwi iye anakwanisa kuchita pyonsene pinafuna iye." 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Podi mafala a mfumu ngautongi, mbani anakwanisa kulonga kuna iye kuti, “Ninji chinachita imwe?”" 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Munthu onsene wakuvera matongero ache, nkhabe dzakuwazwa tayu, pontho nyanzeru ambadziwa pyathema iye kuchita, pontho pandzidzi wache." 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Thangwi pana ndzidzi wakuthema pontho machitiro adidi a chinthu chonsene, podi kwene kuti nyatwa za munthu zimbamulemera ninga mtolo." 
Ecclesiastes8:7 Nkhabe munthu ambadziwa pya m'tsogolo, apo mbani anakwanisa kumpanga pya pinthu pinafuna kudza?" 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Nkhabe munthu ana mphamvu na moyo wache tayu, nkhabe munthu ana mphamvu na nsiku yakufa kwache tayu. Ninga mumbachitira nyankhondo kukhonda buluswa pandzidzi wa nkhondo, sasawambo kudawika nkhabe dzasudzula anthu ale ambachita pyakudawika tayu." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Pyonsenepi ndidapiona pikhanyerezera ine pya pinthu pinachitika pansi pa thambo pile. Pale anthu anango ana utongi mwenemo anango akubonera thangwi ya utongi una iwo. 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Ande, ndidaona pontho anthu akudawika akuikhwa m'masiye, anthu ale akhali na chisimo chakwenda na kubwera ku Nyumba ya Mulungu mbasimbwa mumzinda monthomo mudachita iwo pyakuipa pyawo pile. Pyonsenepi mphyapezi-pezi." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Mseru wa anyakupolomola ungadembuka kutongwa, mitima ya anthu imbasasanya kuchita pyakudawika." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Podi kwene kuti nyakudawa apolomole pyache kadzana mbathimiza basi kukhala na moyo, ndimbadziwa kuti pyonsene pinafamba mwadidi kuna anyakugopa Mulungu." 
Ecclesiastes8:13 Mbwenye anyakuipa pinthu pyawo nkhabe dzaafambira mwadidi tayu, thangwi iwo nkhabe gopa Mulungu, pontho nsiku za moyo wawo zakhala ninga chigudu-gudu." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Pana chinthu chinango chapezi-pezi chile chimbachitika padziko yapansi pano: anyakulungama kutambira pinthu pyakuthemerana na anyakudawika, pontho anyakudawika kutambira pyakuthemerana na anyakulungama. Penepi pontho ndimbalonga kuti mphyapezi-pezi." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Tenepo ndapidziwadi kuti munthu athema kukomerwa pyache, thangwi nkhabe chadidi chinakwanisa munthu kuchita pansi pa thambo kupiringana kudya na kumwa pontho na kukomerwa pyache. Kukomerwa anakhala nako pamabasache akuwanga ndzidzi onsene wa nsiku za moyo wache zile zampasa Mulungu pansi pa thambo." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Ndzidzi ukhanyerezera ine kuti ndidziwe nzeru, pontho kuona kaliki-liki anachita munthu pansi pano, maso ache mbakhonda ona chitulo mosiku na masikati ene," 
Ecclesiastes8:17 tenepo ndidaona pinthu pyonsene pyachita Mulungu. Nkhabe munthu anakwanisa kupidzindikira mwadidi pinthu pyonsene pinachitika pansi pa thambo. Podi kwene kuti ayesere pyache tani kupivesa, kwache iye nkhabe dzapivesa tayu. Podi nyanzeru apilonge pyache kuti iye ambapidziwa, kwache iye nkhabe kwanisa tayu kupivesa." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Natenepo ine ndidapiona mwadidi mbandigumana kuti anyakulungama na anyanzeru, pontho na pinthu pyonsene pimbachita iwo pili m'manja mwa Mulungu. Nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene anadziwa tayu pinthu pinafuna dzachitika kuna iye m'tsogolo, kufunana penu chizondi." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Onsene mamalisiro awo ngabodzi ene, anyakulungama na anyakukhonda lungama, adidi na akuipa, akuchena na okhonda chena, anyakupereka nsembe na anyakukhonda pereka ene. Ninga muna ipyo kuna munthu wadidi ndi sasawambo kuna nyakuipa; ninga muna ipyo kuna munthu wakudumbira ndi sasawa kuna munthu wakuchita mantha na kudumbira." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Penepi mphyakuipa papinthu pyonsene pimbachitika pansi pa thambo: onsenene mamalisiro awo ngabodzi ene. Ndzidzi unakhala anthu na moyo, manyerezero awo ambadzala na pyakuipa pontho nsala, tenepo iwo ambafa mwakututumusa." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Munthu onsene wakukhala pakati pa anthu amoyo, ana chidikhiro; mwanambwa wa m'maso ali pyadidi pyakwanga kusiyana na nkhalamu yakufa!" 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Thangwi anthu amoyo ambadziwa kuti iwo anafa, mbwenye anyakufa nkhabe dziwa pinthu tayu; iwo nkhabe dzatambirave mfupo tayu; iwo aduwalirwa monsene mwene." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Kuafuna kwawo anthu anango, chizondi chawo, pontho na bivu yawo, pyonsene pimbafa nawo pabodzi; iwo nkhabeve pontho dzakwata khundu pachinthu chonsene chimbachitika pansi pa thambo." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Idya pyako mbukomerwe, pontho imwa vinyu wako na mtima wakukomerwa, thangwi ndzidzi uno ngule umbakomerwa Mulungu na pinthu pimbachita iwepyo." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Ndzidzi onsene vala nguwo zadidi, pontho dzoza msolo wako na mafuta akununkhira." 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Komerwa na moyo pabodzi pene na mkazi ambafuna iwe ule, nsiku zonsene za moyo wako wapezi-pezi wakupasa Mulungu pansi pa thambo. Thangwi penepi ndiye pyakukuthemera, ndzidzi una iwe na moyo, pontho unaphata iwe mabasako akuwanga mwakubulusa kaluma pansi pa thambo." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Pachonsene chinafuna manjako kuphata, chichite na mphamvu zako zonsene, thangwi kudziko ya anyakufa, kunafuna iwe dzaenda kule, nkhabeko kuphata basa penu kunyerezera, nee udziwisi penu nzeru tayu." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Ine ndaona chinthu chinango pontho pansi pa thambo: Bitcha-bitcha si ya anyakudziwa kuthamanga okha, penu nkhondo si ya anyamphamvu tayu, penu phoso kugumanwa na anyanzeru penu mfuma kudza kuna anyakungwala penu anyakufunza kukomerwa mtima; kwache dzedze na mwayi pimbagwera onsenewo." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Kuthimiza penepa munthu nkhabe dziwa tayu kuti nyatwa zinamfikira lini: Ninga mumbamangikira nsomba m'malitchera, penu mbalame mumsampha, sasawambo anthu ambakweshwa na ndzidzi wakuipa, ule umbagwa mwakututumusa." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Pana chinthu chinango chidaona ine pansi pa thambo chakulonga pya kufunika kwa nzeru, chile chidandiphata mtima." 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Pakhali luwani inango ing'ono mule mukhali anthu akuchepa. Mfumu wamphamvu adaisosa pakuizungulira na anyankhondo ache mbasasanya pyakugomolera mpanda. 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Mbwenye munthu wakutcherenga akhakhalambo mwenemo, kwache akhali wanzeru. Iye adakwanisa kupulumusa luwaniyo na nzeru zachezo. Mbwenye nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene adakumbuka nyakutcherengayo tayu." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Natenepo ine ndidalonga kuti nzeru nsadidi kupiringana mphamvu, kwache nzeru za nyakutcherenga zimbalulupiswa, pontho mafalache nkhabe ikhwa konta tayu." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Mafala a munthu wanzeru akulongwa mwakufulika athema kuikhwa konta kusiyana na kuvesera kukhuwa kumbachita atongi akupupwa. 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Nzeru nsadidi pyakwanga kupiringana pida pya nkhondo, kwache nyakudawa mbodzi anakwanisa kuvunga pinthu pyadidi pyachitwa kale pile." 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Ntchentche zakufa zinakwanisa kuchitisa mafuta akununkhira kukhala na khwema yakuipa, pontho chakupupwa ching'ono ng'ono chinakwanisa kuipisa nzeru na chilemedzo." 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Manyerezero a munthu wanzeru ambazungunukira kumadyo, mbwenye manyerezero a pupwe ambazungunukira kumabzere." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Podi kwene iye afambe m'njira, pupwe nkhabe nzeru tayu, mbaonesa kuna munthu onsene kupupwa kwachita iye." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Ngakhala mbuyako akuzhangalira, leka kusiya basako; kufulika kunakwanisa kuchitisa anthu kulekererwa umambala wakugoswa." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Pana chakuipa chinango chaona ine pansi pa thambo, kuphophonya kumbachita atongi:" 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Mapupwe ambapaswa chidzo chikulu, mwenemo anyakufuma ambapaswa chidzo ching'ono." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Ine ndaona mabitchu kupakira akavalo, mwenemo mathubu akufamba pansi ninga mabitchu." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Munthu onsene anakumba mulindi, anati agweremo ndiye ene; munthu onsene anaswa mpanda, nyoka inati imulume." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Munthu ule ana basa yakuswa miyala, miyalayo inakwanisa kumkuwaza; nyakupandula pigo anakwanisa kupheka yekha ene." 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Ngakhala mbadzo yafondoka mbikhonda nozwa, panafunika mphamvu zizinji, mbwenye nyaluso ambadziwa machitiro ache kuti apikwanise." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Ngakhala nyamatsenga analumwa na nyoka zache, penepo iye apita mphepo." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Mafala a m'kanwa mwa nyanzeru ambampasa chilemedzo, mbwenye pupwe ambavungika na mafalache onthowo." 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Pakutoma mafalache ambakhala akupupwa; pakumalisira pache ambakhala aunyansala. 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Pupwe ambainjipisa pyakulonga. Nkhabe munthu ambadziwa pinthu pinafuna kudza, pontho mbani anakwanisa kumpanga pinthu pinafuna dzachitika m'tsogolo." 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Basa imbaphata pupwe imbamtopesa; iye nkhabe dziwa na njira ene yakwendera kumusa kwache tayu. 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Dzedze kuna dziko ile mfumu wache akhali bitchu, pontho ile mathubu ache ambadya phwando machibese onsene." 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Mbwenye njakutsanzaya dziko ile mfumu wache ndi mwana mtumbe, pontho mathubu ache ambadya pandzidzi wache, towera agumane mphamvu nee kuti aledzere tayu." 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Ngakhala munthu ngwakupolola, nsoyi yache inamala bwanyuka; ngakhala iye ambakhala kwene manja mbwee, nyumbache inati ichuche." 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Maphwando ngakuchitisa munthu kukomerwa, pontho vinyu ngwakuchitisa munthu kugalamuka, kwache pyonsene pimbalira kobiri." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Leka tikana mfumu podi na m'manyerezero mwako mwene, penu kutikana nyakufuma kutalimba kwako, thangwi mbalame inakwanisa kukwata mafalako, penu chakumbuluka chinango chene chinakwanisa kalonga pyalonga iwepyo." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Phatisa basa kobiri zako kuchita nazo malonda, thangwi pangagwanda nsiku zizinji zene unaganyali nazo." 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Ikha kobiri zako m'mbuto za malonda zinomwe penu zisere, thangwi iwe nkhabe dziwa kuti ndi dzedze ya mtundu wanji inafuna kukugwera padziko yapansi." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Ngakhala makole adzala madzi, iwo ambavumbisa mvula padziko yapansi. Podi muti ugwere pyawo kumwera penu kumpoto, unati ugonere kukhundu kwagwera iwoko basi." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Nyakuyang'ana mphepo nkhabe dzabzala tayu; nyakuyang'ana makole nkhabe dzavuna tayu. 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Ninga montho mumbakhonda iwe dziwa mule mumbapitira mzimu mwa mwana pinasasanywa iye m'mimba mwa mache, sasawambo iwe nkhabe kwanisa kuvesa tayu mabasa a Mulungu, Nyakusasanya pinthu pyonsene."
