Ecclesiastes11:6 Bzala mbewu zako na machibese, pontho na mawulo leka khala kwene manja mbwee, thangwi iwe nkhabe dziwa tayu kuti njipi inafuna kukuganyalisa, mwinango zonsene ziwirizo unaganyali nazo." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Cheza ntchadidi, pontho maso ambakomerwa na kuona dzuwa." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Podi munthu akhale pyache na moyo pyaka pizinji pene tani, iye mbakomerwe pyache na pyaka pyonsenepyo. Mbwenye mbakumbuke kuti nsiku zache za mdima zinakhala zizinji pyakwanga. Pyonsene pinafuna kudza mphyapezi-pezi." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Imwe achiphale komerwani na uphaleanu; mitimanu mbikomerwe pansiku za uphaleanu. Tewezani pinthu pinakhumba mtimanu, pontho na pyonsene pinaona maso anu, kwache kumbukani kuti Mulungu anakutongani mseru thangwi ya pyonsene pyachita imwe." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Natenepo bulusani pyakutsukwalisa pyonsene mumtima mwanu, pontho thundani pyonsene pinakunensani m'manungo mwanu, thangwi uphale na uwana ngwapezi-pezi." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Kumbukani Nyakukulengani pansiku za uphaleanu, nsiku za nyatwa mbizidzati fika, pontho pyaka mbipidzati fika, pile pinafuna imwe dzalonga kuti, “Ine nkhabe komerwa na moyo tayu;”" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 cheza cha dzuwa, mwezi pontho nyenyezi mbipidzati thima, pontho makole mbadzati bwerera mvula ingamala vumba;" 
Ecclesiastes12:3 ndzidzi ule unafuna mikono yanu yakuwanga dzatetemera, pontho miyendo yanu yamphamvu dzagoboka, ndzidzi unafuna dzaleka majiri anu kutafuna, thangwi iwo ngakuchepa, pontho unafuna dzachita maso anu nkhunguwisi;" 
Ecclesiastes12:4 ndzidzi unafuna dzafungwa misuwo yakuyang'ana kunjira, pontho kumala kwa dungu ya kupeya; ndzidzi ule unafuna imwe dzalamuka bzobzo, thangwi ya kulira kwa mbalame, mbwenye nyimbo zawo zonsene zinambombowa;" 
Ecclesiastes12:5 ndzidzi unafuna imwe dzagopa mbuto zakulapha na kugoswa kwa misewu; ndzidzi unafuna tsisi yanu dzasanduka imvi, pontho kufamba dzasanduka kukambadza mwakuti chikhumbo mbichidzamaliratu. Munthu onsene athema kwenda kumusa kwache kwakukhala na kukhala, tenepo anyakuasintili anazungulira-zungulira m'misewu." 
Ecclesiastes12:6 Mkumbukeni Nyakukulengani, nkhambala yasiliva mbidzati thumbusuka, penu ndilo yagolidi mbidzati sweka; mulinga mbudzati bwededzeka pamchera, penu mthephu mbudzati sweka pamchera," 
Ecclesiastes12:7 pontho fumbi mbidzati bwerera kufumbi kudabulukira iyo, pontho mzimu mbudzati bwerera kuna Mulungu adaupereka ule." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Nyakulalika adalonga mbati, “Mphyapezi-pezi! Pyonsene mphyapezi-pezi!”" 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Na thangwi yakuti Nyakulalika akhali na nzeru pyakwanga iye adafunzisambo nzeruzo anthu anango. Iye akhapinyerezera mwadidi kusaka-saka na kupiikha mwadidi panyandandandache miyambi mizinji. 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Nyakulalika adasankhula mafala akuphata mtima, ale akhali akulungama pontho akuona." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Mafala a munthu wanzeru akhala ninga ndodo yakusongoka pontho miyambi idagumanyisa iye ninga mapedego akukhomerwa pafufu, adapaswa iye na Mulungu, Makabuswa mbodzi ene basi." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Mwananga ndikukucheuza papyonsene pinafuna thimizwa pa penepi. Kulemba mabukhu nkhabe madolomero tayu, pontho kufunza pyakwanga kumbatopesa manungo." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Chinchino pyonsene pyaveka; mafala akumalisa nawo papinthu penepi mbawa: Gopa Mulungu, pontho vera matongero ache, thangwi munthu adalengerwa basa yeneyi." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Thangwi Mulungu anati atonge chinthu chonsene chinachita ife, kuthimizapo pyonsene pimbachitwa chibiso-biso, chadidi penu chakuipa." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Nyimbo za Solomoni, nyimbo zakukoma kupita nyimbo zinango zonsene." 
SongOfSongs1:2 Ngandimpsompsone kazinji kene; kundifuna kwako kumbandikomera kupiringana vinyu. 
SongOfSongs1:3 Wakundikomera ndi mgwadi-gwadi wa mafutako; dzinako yakhala ninga mafuta akununkhira akukhuthuka. Ndi thangwi yache amiyali ambatunduka nawe! 
SongOfSongs1:4 Ngandikwate ndiende nawe pabodzi, ngatende tibanje! Iwe mfumu wanga, ngandidzese m'subi mwako. Ife tinasekera na kukomerwa pabodzi; kufunana kwathu tinakusimba kupiringana vinyu. Iwo hadaphophonye tayu kukufuna!" 
SongOfSongs1:5 Akazimwe a ku Yerusalemu, ndine nyakuswipa pontho nyakubalika, wakuswipa ninga makumbi anthembe a ku Kedara, wakubalika ninga chinguwo chakutchinga nacho m'nyumba ya Solomoni." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Lekani kundilulupisa, thangwi ya kuswipa kwanga, thangwi ya kuvulika na dzuwa kwachita ineku. Nkhoswe zanga zidandizhangalira mbandichitisa kuphata basa m'minda yamfesa; ndi thangwi yache ndidachimwana kutsalakana na mundanga ene." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Ngandipange, iwe nyapamtimanga, nkhupi kumbadyesa iwe mabirako? Kumbapumisa iwe pifuyo pyako masikati nkhupi? Thangwi yache ninji ndichite kukusaka-saka pakati pa mikumbi ya amakabuswa anango?" 
SongOfSongs1:8 Ngakhala hunadziwako tayu, nyakubalikawe pakati pa akazi anango onsene, tewera mkumbi wa mabira mbukadyese anambuzi ako chifupi na makumbi a makabuswa." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Iwe nyapamtimanga, kubalika kwako kwakhala ninga kavalo wa pachingolo cha mfumu wa Iguputo." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Maputu ako ngakubalika na mphete za m'makutu mwako, khosi yako njakubalika na mikufu yamiyala yakudula." 
SongOfSongs1:11 Tinati tikusasanyire pyakuthemesera pyagolidi pyakukhala na usanga wasiliva. 
SongOfSongs1:12 Ndzidzi ukhadya mfumu pathebulu pache, mgwadi-gwadi wa mafutanga udakalangira." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Nyapamtimanga kuna ine akhala ninga kafuthwa ka mafuta amure, kale kambakhala pakati pa mabele anga." 
SongOfSongs1:14 Nyapamtimanga kuna ine akhala ninga tsaputu ya maluwa akufira, ale ambagaka mbetete m'minda yamfesa ya ku Engedi." 
SongOfSongs1:15 Wabalika tani tenepa, nyapamtimanga! Ande, ndiwe wakubalika! Maso ako akhala ninga maso a nkhangaiwa." 
SongOfSongs1:16 Wabalika tani tenepa, nyapamtimanga! Ande, ndiwe wakubalika! Talimbathu ndi mpovu cha iwo." 
SongOfSongs1:17 Nsanamira za nyumbathu nsa miti yamkungudza, pontho mphalupalu zache nsa miti yapaina." 
SongOfSongs2:1 Ndine luwa ya ku Sharoni luwa yakubalika m'phedi. 
SongOfSongs2:2 Ninga luwa yakubalika pakati pa minga ndi sasawa na nyapamtimanga pakati pa amiyali. 
SongOfSongs2:3 Ninga muti wantheme pakati pa miti mumsitu, ndi sasawa na nyapamtimanga pakati pa aphale. Ine ndimbakomerwa na kukhala mumthunzi mwache, pontho nsapo zache nsakutapira pyakwanga kuna ine." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Iye aenda nane kunyumba ya phwando; bandera idatchimika iye pana ine nkhundifuna kwache. 
SongOfSongs2:5 Iye ambandigalamusa na mfesa zakuuma, pontho ambandisisimusa na ntheme, thangwi ndafeluka na chikhumbo." 
SongOfSongs2:6 Mkono wache wamabzere uli kunkhodolo kwanga, uku na mkono wache wamadyo andikhumbatira nawo." 
SongOfSongs2:7 Imwe akazi a ku Yerusalemu, dumbirani kuna ine na mphamvu za mbala na nyasa kuti imwe nkhabe dzalamusa penu kutekenya kufunana kufikirana kuchite kufuna kokha ene." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Ngavesera, ndi fala ya nyapamtimanga! Ngayang'ana, iye akudza mbanumpha-numpha m'mapiri, pontho akuvina-vina m'pitunda." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Nyapamtimanga akhala ninga mbala penu nyasa imuna. Ngayang'ana! Iye aimira dzololo kutcheru kwa fufu yathu, kuyang'ana na pamazhanera, pontho kusuzumira na pamangalade." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Nyapamtimanga adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Ngalamuka, nyapamtimanga, nyakubalikanga, ngatende nane pabodzi." 
SongOfSongs2:11 Ngayang'ana! Mainja amala, mvula yaleka, pontho yamala." 
SongOfSongs2:12 Maluwa akuoneka mbetete padziko yapansi; ndzidzi wakuimba wafika, kulira kwa nkhangaiwa kukuveka m'dziko mwathu." 
SongOfSongs2:13 Makuyu atoma kubala nsapo; maluwa a mfesa akugwadira mwadidi. Ngalamuka tende, nyapamtimanga; nyakubalikanga, tende nane pabodzi.”" 
SongOfSongs2:14 Nkhangaiwanga ili swiswiswi m'minyanja ya mwala, pambuto yakupata m'matelero. Ngandionese nkhope yako, ngandileke ndivesere falako; thangwi falako njakukoma, pontho nkhope yako njakubalika." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Ngatiphatirenimbo mibinziyo, ana a mibinzi, ale ambapwayula kuvunga minda yamfesa, mindathu yamfesa ikuchita kwene maluwa ile." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Nyapamtimanga ngwanga ene basi, pontho inembo ndine wache ene basi; iye ambadyesa mabirache pakati pa maluwa." 
SongOfSongs2:17 Mpakana kunja mbee, pontho mithunzi kuthawa, zungunuka, nyapamtimanga, mbukhale ninga mbala, penu nyasa imuna pamapiri a makolong'ondo." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Mosiku onsene patalimba panga ndidasaka-saka ambafuna mtimanga ule; ine ndidamsaka-saka, kwache sidamgumane tayu." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Chinchino ndinati ndilamuke mbandimphemphesa mumzindamu, kugwanda na m'misewu mwache na mupintalo pya mumzinda. Ndinati ndimsake ambafuna mtimanga ule. Tenepo ndidamsaka-saka, kwache sidamgumane tayu." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Anyakulondali adandigumaniza, ndzidzi ukhafambira iwo mzindawo. Ine ndidaavunza kuti, “Ayi mwandionerambo ambafuna mtimanga ule?”" 
SongOfSongs3:4 Sindzidzi nkhulekana nawo, ndidamgumana ambafuna mtimanga ule. Ndidamfumbata mbandikhonda kumulekeza, mpakana ndidadza naye kumusa kwa mama, kusubi ya nyakundibala." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Imwe akazi a ku Yerusalemu, dumbirani kuna ine na mphamvu za mbala na nyasa kuti imwe nkhabe dzalamusa penu kutekenya kufunana kufikirana kuchite kufuna kokha ene." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Mbani weneyu anabulukira m'thando yatchetchayi? Iye ali phwira-phwira ninga utsi, wakukhala na mgwadi-gwadi wa mafuta amure, na pyakufukiza pyakununkhira pya anyamalonda." 
SongOfSongs3:7 Ngayang'ana! Chenecho ndi mtembero wa Solomoni, wakuperekezwa na anyankhondo makumatanthatu, amuna akufunika pyakwanga a mu Israele." 
SongOfSongs3:8 Onsene a iwo amangirira matalasada, onsenewo mbanyaluso pankhondo, kada munthu talasadache m'chuno mwache, kusasanyikira mapanga na mosiku." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Mfumu Solomoni adasasanyisa mtembero; iwo udasasanywa na matabwa a ku Lebanoni. 
SongOfSongs3:10 Miti yache ya m'nkhomo idakukutizwa na siliva; thako yache idakukutizwa na golidi. Chakukhalira chache chidakukutizwa na nguwo yamsuzi wanyemba, wakulukwa mwadidi na akazi a ku Yerusalemu." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Bulukani panja, imwe akazi a ku Zioni, mbamuyang'ane Mfumu Solomoni. Iye avala chipewu chidamvazika mache chile, pansiku idakazhali iye, nsiku idakomerwa mtimache ile." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Wabalika tani tenepa, nyapamtimanga! Ande, ndiwedi nyakubalika! Maso ako m'chakumpsampsira nkhope yako akhala ninga maso a nkhangaiwa. Tsisi yako ili vulu-vulu ninga mkumbi wa mbuzi wakubidira kubulukira pa phiri ya Gileadi." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Mano ako achena ninga mkumbi wa mabira wakubulukira kwene kachingwa ubweya, pontho kusambiswa. Mano onsene andandalika mwadidi; mbapasowa na makwenje ene." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Milomo yako yakhala ninga teteluke wakufira; mulomo wako wabalika pyakwanga. Maputu ako akhala ninga mapandu antheme m'chakumpsampsira nkhope chavala iwecho. 
SongOfSongs4:4 Khosi yako yakhala ninga nsanja ya Davite, yakutandwa mwadidi, pontho yakumyalala, yakukhala na mikufu yakuoneka ninga pyakugedera matswimo pikwi pya anyankhondo." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Mabele ako akhala ninga ana awiri a mbala, ninga ana mapasa a mbala, akugwedula-gwedula pakati pa maluwa." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Mpakana kunja mbee, pontho mithunzi kuthawa, ndinati ndiende kuphiri kule kwawazwa mure, pontho kupitunda kumbakhala pyakufukiza pyakununkhira kule." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Muna iwe pyonsene mphyakubalika, nyapamtimanga; nkhabe chakuphophonyeka tayu muna iwe." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Tende nane pabodzi kubuluka ku Lebanoni, mankhadzianga, tende nane pabodzi kubuluka ku Lebanoni. Tchitha pansonga ya phiri ya Amana, pansonga ya phiri ya Seniri, pontho na Herimoni, kubulukira dzimba ya nkhalamu, pontho pamapiri akukhala nyalugwe." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Iwe wanditopola mtima, nyapamtimanga pontho mankhadzianga; iwe wanditopola mtima na kundiyang'ana kwa maso ako, na usanga ubodzi wa mkufu wako." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Kundifuna kwako kumbandichitisa kukomerwa, nyapamtimanga pontho mankhadzianga! Kundifuna kwako kumbandichitisa kukomerwa kupiringana vinyu, pontho mgwadi-gwadi wa mafuta ambadzola iwe, wapita pyakununkhira pinango pyonsene." 
SongOfSongs4:11 Milomo yako imbajoja pyakutapira, mankhadzianga, ninga mayana a manyuchi; kunsi kwa lulume yako kuna mkaka na manyuchi. Mgwadi-gwadi wa nguwo zako wakhala ninga wa ku Lebanoni." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Iwe wakhala ninga munda wakutchingwa na mpanda, nyapamtimanga pontho mankhadzianga; iwe wakhala ninga mchera wakufungwa kuna anango, ninga mphuno ya madzi yakuzweremethwa." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Iwe wakhala ninga munda wa nsapo zantheme mbazibala nsapo zadidiletu. Mwenemo nkhabe sowamo maluwa akufira na mbewu ya naridi tayu," 
SongOfSongs4:14 nkhabe sowamo naridi na safroni tayu, kalamusi na kinamoni nkhabe sowamo tayu; muna mbewu zamtundu onsene zakusasanyira pyakufukiza pyakununkhira; muna mure na aloe, pontho na pyakununkhira pya mtundu onsene." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Iwe ndiwe mphuno ya madzi m'munda, mchera wa madzi akufamba, mkulo wakukuka kubulukira ku Lebanoni." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Lamuka, mphepo ya mbalu; idza, m'mwera! Dimira kumunda kwanga, towera mgwadi-gwadi wache ukalangire konsene kwene. Mulekeni nyapamtimanga adze kumunda kwache; mulekeni alawe nsapo zache zadidiletu." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Ndadza m'munda mwanga, nyapamtimanga, pontho mankhadzianga; ine ndagumanyisa mure pabodzi pene na pyakununkhira pyanga. Ine ndadya mayananga pontho na manyuchi; ine ndamwa vinyu wanga pontho mkakanga. Dyani, ashamwali anga, mwani; mwani mpakana mwakhuta, anyapamtimanga." 
SongOfSongs5:2 Ine ndagona kwache mtimanga hudagone tayu. Ngavesera! Nyapamtimanga akudidimiza pamsuwo: Ngandifungulire, nyapamtimanga, pontho mankhadzianga, nkhangaiwanga, nyakusowa panango pakuphophonyeka. Msolo wanga wanyontholerwa na bume, pontho tsisi yanga yanyontholerwa na chinyontho cha mosiku." 
SongOfSongs5:3 Ndadula mkhanjo wanga; ayi ndiuvale pontho? Ine ndatsuka manyalo anga; ayi ndiapondese pontho mataka? 
SongOfSongs5:4 Nyapamtimanga aikha mkono wache pabenga ya msuwo; ine mtimanga palu kudima-dima thangwi ya iye. 
SongOfSongs5:5 Ine ndidalamuka kuti ndimfungulire, uku manjanga ali mememe na mafuta amure, mwenemo mure akukuka m'pyala pyanga kumphinga ya msuwo." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Ndidamfungulira nyapamtimanga, kwache nyapamtimanga akhadenda pyache; mtimanga udasanyika pyakwanga thangwi ya kwenda kwacheko. Ine ndidamsaka-saka kwache sidamgumane tayu. Ndidamchemera kwache iye hadanditawire tayu." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Anyakulondali adandigumaniza pikhafambira iwo mzindawo. Iwo adandilikita mbanditsupula-tsupula, pontho adandidulisa chakufindika changa, anyakulondali akhaonera mpanda wa mzinda ale." 
SongOfSongs5:8 Dumbirani akazi a ku Yerusalemu kuti imwe mungamgumana nyapamtimanga munampanga kuti ine ndalenduka na chitchuwo. 
SongOfSongs5:9 Nyapamtimako abalikanji kupiringana anango onsene, iwe nyakubalika kupiringana akazi anango onsene? Ninji chakufunika chili muna iye chakuti utidumbirise kuchita tenepo?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Nyapamtimanga ngwakubalika, pontho wakusiririka, iye ngwakufunikaletu pakati pa amuna pikwi khumi." 
SongOfSongs5:11 Msolo wache ndi golidi cha iye cha iye; tsisi yache njamasengere, pontho ili bidoo ninga khungubwe." 
SongOfSongs5:12 Maso ache akhala ninga nkhangaiwa m'khundu-khundu mwa thawale, akusambiswa mkaka, pontho akuikhwa mwadidi m'mbuto mwache." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Maputu ache akhala ninga mtumbira wakubzalwa mbewu za pyakununkhira. Milomo yache yakhala ninga maluwa akujoja mure. 
SongOfSongs5:14 Mikono yache yakhala ninga mphinga zagolidi zakuthemeserwa na miyala ya topazi. Manungo ache ali myaa ninga nyanga zakuthemeserwa na miyala ya safire. 
SongOfSongs5:15 Miyendo yache yakhala ninga mizati yamiyala ya alabasta yakukhala pathako yagolidi chadi-chadi. Kuoneka kwache kwakhala ninga mapiri a Lebanoni na miti yache yakusankhulika yamkungudza. 
SongOfSongs5:16 Mulomo wache paokha ene ngwakutapira; pyonsene muna iye mphyakusiririka. Weneyu ndi nyapamtimanga, pontho shamwalianga, akazimwe a ku Yerusalemu." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Ayi iwe mkazi wakubalika pakati pa akazi anango onsene, nyapamtimako aenda kupi? Njirache yalokota iye njipi, towera tiende nawe pabodzi kamsaka?" 
SongOfSongs6:2 Nyapamtimanga aenda kadyesa pifuyo pyache kumunda; katchola maluwa kumitumbira kudabzala iye mbewu za pyakununkhira," 
SongOfSongs6:3 Ine ndine wa nyapamtimanga, pontho nyapamtimanga ngwanga; iye ambadyesa pifuyo pyache pakati pa maluwa." 
SongOfSongs6:4 Ndiwe nyakubalika, nyapamtimanga, ninga mzinda wa Tiriza, wabalika tani tenepa ninga Yerusalemu, wademelero ninga anyankhondo akuthukula bandera." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Bulusa maso ako pana ine, thangwi akunditoya. Tsisi yako ili vulu-vulu ninga mkumbi wa mbuzi kubidira kubulukira kuphiri ya Gileadi." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Mano ako ngakuchena ninga mkumbi wa mabira akubulukira kasambiswa. Mano onsene andandalika mwadidi; mbapasowa na makwenje ene. 
SongOfSongs6:7 Maputu ako m'chakumpsampsika nkhope yako akhala ninga mapandu antheme. 
SongOfSongs6:8 Amatsano akhalepo pyawo makumatanthatu tani, akazi achibitchu makumasere, pontho amiyali okhonda lengeseka;" 
SongOfSongs6:9 kwache iye ndiye ene basi, nkhangaiwanga, pontho nyakusowa panango pakuphophonyeka, mwana mbodzi ene basi wa mache, pontho nyapamtima wa nyakumbala. Amiyali adamuona mbamchemera nyakutsanzaya amatsano na akazi achibitchu adamsimbambo." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Mbani weneyu anaoneka ninga makalakwechayi, wadidi ninga mwezi, wakuyetima ninga dzuwa, wademelero ninga nyenyezi kuthambo?" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Ine ndidatchithira kumiti ya alimondi kayang'ana mphukira paphedi, kayang'ana ngakhala mfesa zaphwitha, penu ngakhala ntheme zaikha maluwa." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Mbandidzati kupidzindikira, pikhumbo pyanga pidandichitisa kulota kuti ndili m'chingolo chachifumu." 
SongOfSongs6:13 Chita fundamtako, bwerera, iwe mwali wa Chishulami; bwerera, chita fundamtako, towera tikuone! Thangwi yache ninji munayang'ana mwali wa Chishulami pinavina iye pakati pa magulu awiri a anyakuvina." 
SongOfSongs7:1 Iwe mwali wachifumu, wabalika tani tenepa, manyalo ako uku avala nkhwaira. Ntchafu zako nsakubulungira ninga miyala yakudula yakusasanywa na manja a nyaluso." 
SongOfSongs7:2 Mchombo wako uli zungulire ninga ndilo, ile nkhabe sowamo vinyu wakudzipa tayu. Chuno chako chili ning'u-ning'u ninga msumbu wa tirigu, wakumangwa na maluwa." 
SongOfSongs7:3 Mabele ako akhala ninga ana awiri a mbala, ninga ana mapasa a mbala." 
SongOfSongs7:4 Khosi yako yakhala ninga nsanja ya nyanga. Maso ako akhala ninga mathawale a mu Heshiboni chifupi na msuwo wa Beti-Rabimu. Mphuno yako yakhala ninga nsanja ya Lebanoni yakuyang'anisana na Damasiko. 
SongOfSongs7:5 Msolo wako uli neng'a ninga phiri ya Karimele. Tsisi yako yakulapha ili vulu-vulu; mfumu atunduka nayo. 
SongOfSongs7:6 Wabalika tani tenepa, pontho wakoma tani m'maso tenepa, nyapamtimangawe, umbandichitisa kukomerwa pyakwanga!" 
SongOfSongs7:7 Chimo chako chili wee ninga muti wamdikhwa; mabele ako akhala ninga matsaputu a nsapo. 
SongOfSongs7:8 Ine ndidalonga kuti, “Ndinati ndikwire m'muti wamdikhwa; ndinati ndikaphate nsapo zache.” Mabele ako mbakhale ninga matsaputu a mfesa, pontho mgwadi-gwadi wa muyako mbukhale ninga ntheme," 
SongOfSongs7:9 pontho mulomo wako mbukhale ninga vinyu wakudzipa. Vinyu mbaendeletu kuna nyapamtimanga, kuchita kukukambo m'milomo na m'mano mwache." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Ine ndine wache wa nyapamtimanga, tenepo chikhumbo chache chili pana ine." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Ngadza kuno nyapamtimanga, tende kuminda, tende tikagone kumidzi." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Tinati tilamuke kunja kuli mbuu kwenda kuminda yamfesa kaona ngakhala mfesa zaphwitha, penu zachita maluwa, pontho ngakhala ntheme zina maluwa, kweneko ndinati ndikakuonese kukufuna kwanga." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Iwe unakwanisa kuva khwema ya mchena, pontho pamsuwo pathu pana nsapo zonsene zakukoma m'maso, zachinchino na zakale zene, zakukoyera ine zile, iwe nyapamtimanga." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Mbudakhala kwene kuti ndiwe nkhoswe yanga, pontho ule adayamwa bele ya mamanga! Ngakhala ndidakugumana panjira, ine mbidakumpsompsona, penepo nkhabe unango mbadandilulupisa tayu." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Ine mbidenda nawe kumsuwo kwa mamanga, ule adandifunzisa. Ine mbidakupasa vinyu wakudzipa kuti umwe, pontho madzi a ntheme." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Mkono wache wabzere uli nama-nama kunkhodolo kwanga, uku mkono wache wamadyo wandikhumbatira." 
SongOfSongs8:4 Imwe akazi a ku Yerusalemu, dumbirani kuna ine kuti imwe nkhabe dzalamusa penu kutekenya kufunana kufikirana kuchite kufuna kokha ene." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Mbani weneyo analuthuka kubulukira m'thando yatchetchayo uku ali tsami-tsami pa nyapamtimache? Pansi pa muti wantheme ndidakulamusa, penepo mako adakubala, penepo iye adathabuka na mtswotswo mbakubala." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Ndiikhe mumtima mwako ninga chidindo, ninga chidindo pamkono pako, thangwi kufunana nkhwamphamvu ninga imfa, pontho ntchanje njakukala mtima ninga masiye. Imbapisa ninga moto wakuyerima, pontho ninga malulume a moto washungu." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Madzi ainjipe pyawo tani nkhabe kwanisa kuthimisa kufunana tayu; podi madzi makulu nkhabe kwanisa kukukukulula tayu. Ngakhala munthu unango anapiyesera kugula kufunana na mfumache yonsene ina iye, pinafuna iye chitapyo analulupiswa napyo monsene mwene." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Ife tina nyamaingathu wamng'ono, kwache iye nkhabe na mabubusa ene tayu. Apo tichitenji naye nyamaingathuyi, iye angavunzirwa?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Iye mbadakhala fufu, ife mbatidamanga nsanja yasiliva pana iye; iye mbadakhala msuwo ife mbatidamfungira na matabwa amkungudza." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Ndine fufu, pontho mabele anga akhala ninga nsanja. Natenepo kuna iye ndasanduka nyakumdzesera kukomerwa." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Solomoni akhali na munda wamfesa mu Baala-Hamoni mbaupereka mundachewo kuna anyantchoche. Kada munthu adathema kudza na kobiri zasiliva chikwi chibodzi zakubulukira kunsapo. 
SongOfSongs8:12 Kwache mundanga wamfesa ngwanga ene kuti ndiupereke; kobiri zako zasiliva chikwi chibodzi, iwe Solomoni, mbukhale nazo pyako, pontho kobiri zasiliva madzana mawiri nsa anyakuyang'anira nsapo." 
SongOfSongs8:13 Iwe nyakukhala m'minda, ashamwali anga anafuna kuvesera falako. Ngandileke ndiiveserembo!" 
SongOfSongs8:14 Chimbiza kudza kuna ine, nyapamtimanga, ninga mbala penu nyasa paphiri yakumera pyakununkhira." 
Isaiah1:1 Bukhu yeneyi ikulonga pya pinthu pidatchulula Mulungu kuna Yesaya mwana Amozi pya Yuda na Yerusalemu pandzidzi wa utongi wa Uzia, Yotamu, Ahazi na Hezekia, ale akhali mafumu a Yuda." 
Isaiah1:2 Ngavesera, iwe kudzulu! Ikha khutu, iwe dziko yapansi! Thangwi MBUYA alonga kuti, “Ine ndidabala ana mbandialera kuakuza, mbwenye lero iwo andipandukira." 
Isaiah1:3 Podi na ng'ombe ene imbadziwa mbuyache, na bulu ene ambadziwa mumbamdyesera mbuyache, mbwenye Israele nkhabe kudziwa tayu, anthu anga nkhabe vesa pinthu tayu.”" 
Isaiah1:4 Sha! Iwe dzinza yakudawika, anthu ale alemerwa na pyakudawa, anthu akubalwa na anthu akuipa, pontho ana akukula na kuchita pyakupotoka. Iwo amkhonda MBUYA; iwo adalulupisa Nyakuchena wa Israele mbampasa pyawo nkhodolo." 
Isaiah1:5 Mwatani munafuna kuti ndikumenyeni pontho? Mwatani munati nganganga kupandukira? Msolo wanu onsene wamala supuka-supuka, pontho mtimanu ukusanyika." 
Isaiah1:6 Kubulukira kumanyalo mpakana kumsolo nkhabe panangombo padidi tayu. Ponsene pene pana mibzimbiri, kutchonkheka na pironda; pironda pyanu mphyokhonda tsuka, penu kumangwa na tsakala, penu kukhwazwa mafuta kuti pifewe tayu." 
Isaiah1:7 Dziko yanu yasala madembe, mizindanu yamalwa piswa moto; mindanu yamala vungwa na alendo mwenemo imwe muli maso mbuu, iyo yasanduka thema, pontho yakundwa na anyakudza pyawo." 
Isaiah1:8 Yerusalemu asala yekha ene ninga nsanja m'munda wamfesa, ninga khumbi m'munda wamavembe, pontho ninga mzinda wakuzungulirwa na anyamalwa." 
Isaiah1:9 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene mbadakhonda kutisiya na moyo anango a ife, mbatidasanduka ninga mzinda wa Sodomu, mbatidakhala ninga mzinda wa Gomora." 
Isaiah1:10 Ngaveserani mafala a MBUYA, imwe atongi, ale mwakhala ninga a ku Sodomu; ikhani khutu kuna mwambo wa Mulungu wathu, imwe anthu, ale mwakhala ninga a ku Gomora!" 
Isaiah1:11 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Nsembe zanu zizinjizo kuna ine ninji? Ine ndakwana nazo nsembe zanu zakupyererazo, nsembe za mabira achimuna na mafuta a nyama zanu zakunenepazo; chiropa cha ng'ombe, ana mabira na mbuzi nkhabe kundikomera tayu." 
Isaiah1:12 Pinadza imwe pamaso panga, mbani akupangani kuti mudze nazo? Lekani ponda-ponda pintalo pyanga?" 
Isaiah1:13 Lekani kudza na pyakupereka pyanu pyapezi-pezipyo. Pyakufukiza pyanu pyakununkhira pimbandinyansira. Ine nkhabe pirira tayu na migumano yanu yakupambulika, kusekera kwanu Kubalwa kwa Mwezi na Nsiku yakupuma; pipembedzo pyanu pyadzala na pyakudawa." 
Isaiah1:14 Kusekera kwanu Kubalwa kwa Mwezi pontho na maphwando anu anango akusankhulikawo ndimbanyansirwa nawo pyakwanga. Ipyo pyasanduka pinthu pyakundivesa kupha; ine ndatopa napyo. 
Isaiah1:15 Imwe mungakwiza manjanu m'dzulu kupemphera, ine ndinakubisirani nkhope yanga; podi kwene mupemphere pyanu tani, ine nkhabe dzapiikha konta tayu, thangwi manjanu amala dzala na chiropa." 
Isaiah1:16 Sambani m'manja, pontho picheneseni mwekha ene. Bulusani mabasanu akuipa pamaso panga. Lekani kuchita pyakudawika," 
Isaiah1:17 funzani kuchita pyakulungama. Saka-sakani chilungamo, anyakuponderezwa imwe muaphedze; tchinjirizani ana masiye, pontho akhalireni kunduli amamfelwa pamseru wawo.”" 
Isaiah1:18 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Tendenitu mphapo titongane mseru: Podi kwene kuti pyakudawa pyanu pikhale pyakufira ninga chiropa, ipyo pinachena ninga matalala; podi kwene pikhale pyakufira ninga mphinimini, ipyo pinachena ninga thonje." 
Isaiah1:19 Ngakhala imwe munasasanyika kundivera, imwe munadya pyadidi pya dziko yeneyi;" 
Isaiah1:20 kwache ngakhala imwe munakhonda mbamupandukira, imwe munavungwa na talasada. Thangwi alonga ndi MBUYA.”" 
Isaiah1:21 Yang'anani kusanduka puta kwachita mzinda wakukhulupirikawu! Kale iye akhali wachilungamo; pyakulungama pikhakhala muna iye, kwache lero asanduka mphandu." 
Isaiah1:22 Silivako asanduka wapezi-pezi, vinyu wako wadidiletu amala sapuka." 
Isaiah1:23 Atongi ako ngakupandukira, iwo mbashamwali a mbava; onsenewo kudyekerwa nkhudya kwawo, ndzidzi onsene kufuna kutambira mitukwa basi. Iwo nkhabe tchinjiriza ana masiye, pontho miseru ya amamfelwa nkhabe fika pamaso pawo tayu." 
Isaiah1:24 Natenepo Mbuya, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, Nyamphamvu wa Israele akulonga kuti, “Ehede! Anthu anathimbana na ine ale, ndinaamala gwebede, anyamalwanga ndinaabwezera ndekha ene." 
Isaiah1:25 Ndinakutchunyusa pikulu pene; ndinakunyungulusa kubulusa pyakuipa pyako mbandibulusa masepu-sepu onsene muna iwe. 
Isaiah1:26 Ndinakubwezera atongi ninga ontho akhali na iwe pakutoma pale, mbandichita chibodzi-bodzi na mapungu ako. Kubuluka penepo iwe unachemerwa Mzinda Wakulungama, pontho Mzinda Wakukhulupirika.”" 
Isaiah1:27 Na thangwi yakuti MBUYA ngwachilungamo, iye anaombola Zioni, na thangwi ya kulungama kwache iye anaombola anyakuleka pyakudawa pyawo." 
Isaiah1:28 Mbwenye anyakupandukira na anyakudawa, onsenewo anamala vungwa, pontho na anyakukhonda MBUYA ene, onsene anamala vungwa." 
Isaiah1:29 “Iwe unachita manyadzo na miti yamthundu imbanyadira iwe ile; nkhope yako inatota na manyadzo, thangwi ya mindako yakupambulika ile." 
Isaiah1:30 Iwe unakhala ninga muti wamthundu wakuunyala masambache, pontho ninga munda wakusowa madzi." 
Isaiah1:31 Mamuna wamphamvu zache anasanduka nkhuni yakutchokoya, pontho mabasache ninga mathotholi; pyonsenepyo pinapyera kubodzi kwene wakusowa munthu na mbodzi ene wakuthimisa motowo.”" 
Isaiah2:1 Pinthu pidatchulula Mulungu kuna Yesaya mwana Amozi pya Yuda na Yerusalemu mphipi: 
Isaiah2:2 Nsiku zinadzazo phiri ya Nyumba ya Mulungu inakhazikiswa ninga phiri yakufunika kupita mapiri onsene; iyo inakhala pansongalonga paphiri, tenepo anthu onsene anagomokera kweneko." 
Isaiah2:3 Madzinza azinji anabwera mbalonga mbati, “Dzani, tendeni kuphiri ya MBUYA, kunyumba ya Mulungu wa Yakobo, kuti iye akatifunzise njira zache, towera titeweze njira zachezo.” Podi nkhu Zioni kunafuna bulukira upangizi wache kule, pontho nkhu Yerusalemu kule kunafuna bulukira mafala a MBUYA." 
Isaiah2:4 Iye anatonga miseru pakati pa madzinza mbamalisa kukhonda vana pakati pa anthu azinji. Iwo anafula matalasadawo a nkhondo kukhala mapaza, pontho madipawo kukhala pikwakwa. Nkhabe dzinza inafuna dzachita nkhondo na dzinza inzache, penu kufunzisa pontho anthu kumenya nkhondo tayu." 
Isaiah2:5 Imwe pidzukulu pya Yakobo, tendeni tifambe m'cheza cha MBUYA." 
Isaiah2:6 Imwe mwakhonda pidzukulu pya Yakobo, anthu anu. Dziko yawo yamala dzala na anyakuombedza akumabulukiro dzuwa; iwo ambakhumira ninga anthu a kudziko ya Afilisti, pontho ambachita ushamwali na anthu a madzinza anango." 
Isaiah2:7 Dziko yawo yamala dzala na siliva na golidi; mfumawo nkhabe madire tayu. M'dziko mwawo muna akavalo okhokha; iwo nkhabe sowa pingolo pyankhondo tayu. 
Isaiah2:8 Dziko yawo yamala dzala na mifanikizo; iwo ambalambira pinthu pidasasanya iwo na manjawo, pinthu pidasasanya iwo na pyala pyawo." 
Isaiah2:9 Natenepo anthu onsene anachepeswa; munthu onsene analulupiswa, MBUYA, lekani kualekerera." 
Isaiah2:10 Pitani m'nkhwimba zamwala, penu bisalani m'madzenje kuthawa ukali wa MBUYA, pontho demelero yache yachifumu." 
Isaiah2:11 Kutumbama kwa anthu kunalulupiswa pontho kugaya kwa anthu kunamaliswa; pansiku yeneyo anafuna dzakuzwa ndi MBUYA ene basi. 
Isaiah2:12 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akoya nsiku inafuna iye lulupisa anyakugaya na anyakutumbama onsene, nsiku inafuna iye dzachepesa anyakupikuza," 
Isaiah2:13 dzavunga miti yamkungudza ya ku Lebanoni, yakulapha pontho yakunthemphuka, pontho na miti yonsene yamthundu ya ku Bashani," 
Isaiah2:14 dzagwisa mapiri onsene akulapha, pitunda pyonsene pikulu-pikulu," 
Isaiah2:15 nsanja zonsene zakulapha, pontho mpanda onsene wamphamvu," 
Isaiah2:16 dzachitisa miyadiya yonsene mikulu-mikulu ya anyamalonda, pontho miyadiya yonsene yakubalika kulobzeka." 
Isaiah2:17 Kutumbama kwa anthu kunamala pontho kugaya kwa anthu kunalulupiswa; pansiku yeneyo anafuna dzakuzwa ndi MBUYA ene basi," 
Isaiah2:18 pontho mifanikizo yonsene nkhabe dzaonekave pontho tayu. 
Isaiah2:19 Pitani m'nkhwimba zamwala penu bisalani m'madzenje kuthawa ukali wa MBUYA, pontho demelero yache yachifumu, iye angadza dzatekenya dziko yapansi." 
Isaiah2:20 Pansiku yeneyo anthu anaponya kuna anyamfuko na anyakalemwalemwa mifanikizo yawo yasiliva na yagolidi, idasasanya iwo kuti aipembedze ile." 
Isaiah2:21 Anthu anathawira kunkhwimba zamwala, pontho kuchingolokodyo m'mapiri kuthawa ukali wa MBUYA, pontho demelero yache yachifumu, iye angadza dzatekenya dziko yapansi." 
Isaiah2:22 Lekani kunyindira munthu, ule ambafa. Apo iye anaphedzanji?" 
Isaiah3:1 Yang'anani, Mbuya, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ali chifupi kubulusa mu Yerusalemu na Yuda chiphedzo cha mtundu onsene chimbanyindira iwo chile: iye anaabulusira phoso yawo na madzi ene," 
Isaiah3:2 anyamphamvu zawo na anyankhondo awo, anyakutonga miseru na maprofeti awo, anyakuombedza na akulu-akulu awo," 
Isaiah3:3 akadamu a anyankhondo makumashanu, pontho anthu a chidzo chawo, mapungu pontho anyamatsenga awo pontho anyakukhumira aluso." 
Isaiah3:4 Ndinachitisa aphale kukhala mathubu awo; iwo anakhala pansi pa utongi wa akachiya. 
Isaiah3:5 Munthu anapondereza munthu mnzache, mamuna na mamuna mnzache, tsanthemba na tsanthemba mnzache. Ana anatikana akulu-akulu pontho mapupwe analulupisa anthu a chilemedzo." 
Isaiah3:6 Munthu anaphata mbodzi wa abale ache pamsuwo pa babache mbalonga mbati, “Iwe una mkhanjo, tenepo khala mkadamu wathu; yang'anira mulu wa madongolomwawu!”" 
Isaiah3:7 Kwache pansiku yeneyo iye anakhuwa mbati, “Ine nyonyo, ndakhonda, thangwi ine nkhabe phoso penu nguwo m'nyumba mwanga tayu; lekani kundiikha kukhala mkadamu wa anthuwa.”" 
Isaiah3:8 Yerusalemu akudzedzereka, pontho Yuda akugwa pyache; na mafala pontho na mabasawo iwo atikana MBUYA wademelero mbampandukira." 
Isaiah3:9 Makhaliro a nkhope zawo akuapokanyisa; iwo akuchita pyakudawa pakwecha okhonda kupibisa, ninga montho mudachitira anthu a ku Sodomu. Dzedze kuna iwo! Iwo apidzesera nyatwa okha ene." 
Isaiah3:10 Apangeni anyakulungamawo kuti pinthu pyawo pinaafambira mwadidi, thangwi iwo anadya nsapo za mabasawo." 
Isaiah3:11 Dzedze kuna anyakuipa! Pinthu pyawo nkhabe dzaafambira mwadidi tayu! Iwo anabwezerwambo pinthu pyachitira iwo anango. 
Isaiah3:12 Aphale akupondereza anthu azinji, anyakuatonga ndi akazi ene. Waa! Anthu anga, anyakukuphatani nsenji, akukuendesani m'tsanga; iwo akukubausani kubuluka m'njira." 
Isaiah3:13 MBUYA akhala pambuto pache m'thando ya miseru; iye asasanyika kutonga mseru anthu ache. 
Isaiah3:14 MBUYA akutonga mseru akulu-akulu na akadamu a anthu ache mbalonga mbati: “Ndimwepo mwavunga mundanga wamfesa; pinthu pyapokosera imwe anyakutcherenga pili m'nyumba mwanu.” 
Isaiah3:15 Mbuya, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene alonga mbati, “Pinachita imwepyo ninji kupondereza anthu anga, pontho kudyera nkope-kope anyakutcherenga?”" 
Isaiah3:16 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Akazi a ku Zioni ngakutumbama pyakwanga, ambafamba khosi gonese, mbayang'ana na maso akuyengerera; iwo ambafamba mwakudewereka, mbaliza mafumba m'miyendo mwawo." 
Isaiah3:17 Natenepo MBUYA anachitisa mumsolo mwa akazi a ku zioni kudzala na pironda; tsisi yawo kumala na kulakatika.” 
Isaiah3:18 Pansiku yeneyo Mbuya anabulusa pakati pawo pinthu pyonsene pyakuthemesera napyo manungo awo: mafumba, mithimbalimba na mikufu," 
Isaiah3:19 mphete za m'khutu, magoza na pitambaya," 
Isaiah3:20 madunku, pibangili, na micheka, mitete ya pyakununkhira, na pitumwa," 
Isaiah3:21 mphete za m'chala, na nthona," 
Isaiah3:22 mikhanjo yadidi, na pipewu, pyakufinika, na pyolwa," 
Isaiah3:23 masipeyo na nguwo zakuchena, akamdedzi, na pyakumpsampsira nkhope." 
Isaiah3:24 M'mbuto mwa mgwadi-gwadi, panakhala ukachi-kachi; m'mbuto mwa pitambaya, nkhambala; m'mbuto mwa tsisi ya bidoo, mpala ngeti-ngeti; m'mbuto mwa nguwo zadidi, kuvala masakha; m'mbuto mwa kubalika, kuipa m'maso." 
Isaiah3:25 Amunako anafa na talasada, pontho anyankhondo amphamvu anafa pankhondo." 
Isaiah3:26 M'misuwo ya zioni panakhala kulira na kusintili; mzindawo unakhala ninga mkazi wakukhala pamataka wakusowa na chakuphata chene. 
Isaiah4:1 Pansiku yeneyo akazi anomwe anaphata mamuna mbodzi mbalonga mbati, “Ife tinapigumanira tekha ene pyakudya na pyakuvala; chinafuna ife kwene nkhuchemerwa na dzinako basi. Ngatibulusirembo manyadzo auziche ana ifewa.”" 
Isaiah4:2 Ndzidzi wenewo MBUYA anachitisa mphukirache, Israele, kuphwitha mbikhala yakukoma m'maso pontho yakudemelera. Nsapo zache zinakhala zakunyadisa pontho zakupereka demelero kuna anyakusalira na moyo ale." 
Isaiah4:3 Anyakusalira mu Zioni, ale Mulungu adaasankhula kuti akhale na moyo mu Yerusalemu, anachemerwa anyakuchena, onsene ale adalembwa pakati pa anthu a moyo mu Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah4:4 Na kutonga kwache kwakugaka ninga moto Mbuya anachenesa pyakunyansa pyonsene pya akazi a ku Zioni; iye anatsuka anthu kubulusa mathotho a chiropa chidachuchiswa mu Yerusalemu chile. 
Isaiah4:5 Kubuluka penepo MBUYA anaikha makole na masikati paphiri yonsene ya Zioni padzulu pa onsene akugumanyikana kweneko, pontho na mosiku anaikha moto wakugaka; demelero ya MBUYA inaphimbira pyonsenepi" 
Isaiah4:6 kukhala mthunzi kuna mkatu-katu wa dzuwa, pontho mbuto yakubisala gopesera chonzi na mvula." 
Isaiah5:1 Ndinati ndimuimbire nyapamtimanga nyimbo ya munda wamfesa: nyapamtimanga akhali na munda wamfesa m'mataka akubalisa pinthu m'tchinde mwa phiri. 
Isaiah5:2 Iye adautipula mbabulusa miyala yonsene tenepo adabzalamo mfesa zadidi maka zile. Iye adamangamo nsanja mbasasanyamo dzenje yakutchitchithira vinyu. Iye akhadikhira kutchola nsapo zadidi pyakwanga, kwache mundawo udabulusa nsapo zakuwawa." 
Isaiah5:3 “Tenepo, imwe anyakukhala mu Yerusalemu na amuna a ku Yuda pitongeni mwekha ene pakati pa ine na mundanga wamfesa." 
Isaiah5:4 Ninji pontho chidathema ine kuchichita kuna mundanga wamfesa kupiringana pyauchitira ine kalepi? Ine ndikhadikhira kutchola nsapo zadidi, apo thangwi yache ninji mundawo udabulusa nsapo zakuwawa?" 
Isaiah5:5 Chinchino ndinati ndikupangeni chinafuna ine kuchita kuna mundanga wamfesa: ndinati ndibuluse gandafutache, tenepo unavungwa; ndinagomola mpandache, tenepo unamala pondedzwa." 
Isaiah5:6 Ndinauchitisa kukhala thema nee kuusadzira penu kuulima pontho tayu; m'mbuto mwache ntcheswa na nyakhanche pinameramo pyawo. Ndinatonga makole kuti aleke vumbisamo mvula.” 
Isaiah5:7 Munda wamfesa wa MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndi dzinza ya Israele, pontho anthu a ku Yuda ndi mfesa zache zakukoma zile. Iye akhadikhira kuona chilungamo, m'mbuto mwache adaona kuchuchisa chiropa; iye akhadikhira kuona pyakulungama, m'mbuto mwache adava kulira kwa anyakuponderezwa." 
Isaiah5:8 Dzedze kuna imwe ale mumbakhalira kuphataniza nyumba na nyumba pontho kuphataniza munda na munda mwaukundi, towera pambuto yonseneyo mukhalepo mwekha." 
Isaiah5:9 Ine ndava MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akudumbira kuti: “Ndimomwene kuti nyumba zikulu-zikulu zinasanduka madembe, nyumba zadidiletu nkhabe dzakhalamo anthu tayu." 
Isaiah5:10 Munda wamfesa wakulapha mathanyo chikwi, umimbache mbukhala mathanyo dzana unabulusa kwene chigubu chibodzi basi cha vinyu, pitundu khumi pya mbewu, pinabulusa kwene chitundu chibodzi chene basi.”" 
Isaiah5:11 Dzedze kuna anyakulamuka bzobzo na machibese, kulamukira pyakumwa pyakuledzeresa, ale ambamwa mpakana chiti-chiti mbaledzera thophi-thophi na vinyu." 
Isaiah5:12 Iwo ambaimba anyakatangale na malimba m'maphwando mwawo, pisekese na pitoliro mbamwa vinyu. Kwache iwo nkhabe ikha konta mabasa a MBUYA tayu, iwo nkhabe tsalakana tayu pinthu pidasasanya iye na manjache." 
Isaiah5:13 Natenepo anthu anga anaenda kudziko ya unyaperezo, thangwi ya kukhonda kwawo vesa pinthu; amuna a chidzo chawo anafa na njala, pontho anthu ene pyawo anafa na nyota." 
Isaiah5:14 Ndi thangwi yache dziko ya anyakufa nkhabe khuta tayu, pontho kukanwa kwache kuli yashaa; kweneko ndiye kunabidira anyakufunika mu Yerusalemu pontho na anthu ene pyawo akuinjipa mwenemo ali poko-poko kunyadira mzindawo." 
Isaiah5:15 Tenepo anthu onsene anatchithiswa pansi mbalulupiswa, anyakugaya anachitiswa manyadzo." 
Isaiah5:16 Kwache MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene anati akuzwe na chilungamo chache, pontho Mulungu wakuchena anaonesa kuchena kwache na kulungama kwachita iye." 
Isaiah5:17 Penepo anabira anadya khala ninga akudya mumpovu wawo ene; anambuzi anagwedula-gwedula pakati pa madembe. 
Isaiah5:18 Dzedze kuna ale ambapikweyera pyakudawa na nkhambala za pyakunama, pontho ale ambachimwana kupisudzula kuna pyakuipa pyawo," 
Isaiah5:19 dzedze kuna ale ambalonga kuti, “Mulekeni Mulungu achimbize, mbachimbize kuphata basache kuti tiione. Pinthu pinafuna kuchita Nyakuchena wa Israele mbapichitiketu mphapo kuti tipidziwe.”" 
Isaiah5:20 Dzedze kuna ale ambayesa pyakuipa ninga pyadidi, pontho ale ambayesa pyadidi ninga pyakuipa, ale ambaikha mdima m'mbuto mwa cheza, pontho cheza m'mbuto mwa mdima, ale ambadzesa kuwawa m'mbuto mwa kutapira, pontho kutapira m'mbuto mwa kuwawa." 
Isaiah5:21 Dzedze kuna ale ambapiyesa ninga anzeru, pontho ale ambapiyesa ninga akungwala." 
Isaiah5:22 Dzedze kuna anyakugaya na kuledzera vinyu, pontho anyaluso pakuvungaza pyakuledzeresa ale," 
Isaiah5:23 ale ambamalisa mseru wa nyakudawa thangwi ya kudyekerwa, mbakhondera anthu okhonda dawa chilungamo chawo." 
Isaiah5:24 Natenepo ninga mumbanyangutira malulume a moto maudzu, pontho ninga mumbalirimira maudzu pamoto, sasawambo mitsitsi yawombo inavunda, pontho maluwawo anambuluka ninga fumbi; thangwi iwo akhonda mwambo wa MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene mbalulupisa mafala a Nyakuchena wa Israele." 
Isaiah5:25 Natenepo ukali wa MBUYA ukugaka pana anthu achewa; mkono wache uli pana iwo kuwakhamwadza. Mapiri akutekenyeka pontho mitembo ili thatcha-thatcha m'misewu ninga matubzi. Podi kwene kuti pikhali tenepo ukali wa Mulungu hudambombowe tayu, mkono wache uli fogo kuatchunyusa basi." 
Isaiah5:26 Iye anakwiza bandera m'dzulu kuchemera madzinza anango akutali, akuimba mkhwiyo kuchemera anthu akumadolomero a dziko ale. Iwo akudzadi mbathamanga pikulu pene." 
Isaiah5:27 Nkhabe na mbodzi ene wa iwo anafuna topa penu kugwegweduka tayu; nkhabe na mbodzi ene wa iwo anafuna wodzira penu kugona tayu; nee bande inafuna lera m'chuno tayu penu nkhwaira kugwandika nthambo tayu. 
Isaiah5:28 Matswimo awo ngakutwa, mautawo onsene ngakukungika; njondo za akavalo awo zili nganganga ninga mwala, magaleta a pingolo pyawo pyakhala ninga chivumbulu." 
Isaiah5:29 Iwo angabangula akhala ninga nkhalamu, iwo ambabangula ninga ana nkhalamu; iwo ambakhumbza angaphata nyama mbaikwekweta kwenda nayo wakusowa winango wakumsomphola." 
Isaiah5:30 Nsiku yeneyo ingafika, iwo anagudumira Israele mbabangula ninga kutitima kwa madzi makulu. Ngakhala unango anayang'ana dziko, anaona mdima na kusanyika kwene basi; podi na cheza chene chinaswipiswa na makole." 
Isaiah6:1 Chaka chidafa Mfumu Uzia, ndidaona MBUYA akhala pampando wache wachifumu wademelero pontho wapadzulu. Mkhanjo wache ukhali wakulapha pyakwanga mwakuti udadzala m'Nyumba ya Mulungu yonseneyo." 
Isaiah6:2 Padzulu pache pakhali pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido, maphaphido matanthatu kada chibodzi: na maphaphido mawiri ipyo pidampsampsika nkhope zawo, na maphaphido mawiri ipyo pidaphimbira miyendo yawo, pontho na maphaphido mawiri ipyo pikhambuluka nawo." 
Isaiah6:3 Tenepo ipyo pikhachemerezana unango na mwanzache kuti: “Nyakuchena, nyakuchena, nyakuchena ndi MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene; dziko yonsene yapansi yadzala na demelero yache.”" 
Isaiah6:4 Na thangwi ya kukhuwa kukhachita ipyo kule, maziko a Nyumba ya Mulungu adatekenyeka, pontho idakalangira utsi." 
Isaiah6:5 Ine ndidalira kuti, “Nyadzedze ndine! Ndavungika ine! Thangwi ndine munthu wa pakanwa pakunyansa, pontho ndimbakhala pakati pa anthu a milomo yakunyansa; kwache na maso anga ndaona Mfumu, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene.”" 
Isaiah6:6 Tenepo chakulengwa chibodzi chakukhala na maphaphido chidambulukira kuna ine na khala ya moto m'manja mwache, idapala iye na chakupalira moto paguwa yansembe ile." 
Isaiah6:7 Iye adakhuya milomo yanga na khalayo mbalonga mbati, “Yang'ana, khalayi yakhuya milomo yako; umambalako wabuluswa, pontho pyakudawa pyako pyalekererwa.”" 
Isaiah6:8 Kubuluka penepo ndidava fala ya Mbuya kulonga kuti, “Ndinatuma ani? Pontho mbani anafuna kwenda m'mbuto mwathu?” Tenepo ine ndidatawira kuti, “Ndili pano. Nditumeni!”" 
Isaiah6:9 Tenepo iye adalonga mbati, “Ndoko kapange anthu enewa kuti: ‘Kuva mukuva, kwache nkhabe vesesa tayu; kuona mukuona, kwache nkhabe onesesa tayu.’" 
Isaiah6:10 Ipha misolo ya anthu enewa; funga makutu awo, pontho phopha maso awo; gopesera anaona na maso awo, mbava na makutu awo, pontho kuvesa na misolo yawo, mbazungunukira kuna ine, inembo mbandiaawangisa.”" 
Isaiah6:11 Penepo ndidavunza kuti, “Penepi mpakana lini, Mbuya?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Kufikirana mizinda yamala sanduka madembe, pontho yakusowa anthu akukhalamo, kufikirana nyumba zasala zokha pontho minda ivungike mbisanduka thema," 
Isaiah6:12 kufikirana MBUYA atamisa munthu onsene kudziko yakutali, pontho dzikoyo isanduke msitu." 
Isaiah6:13 Podi kwene pichitike kuti khundu yachikhumi ya anthu isale m'dzikomo iyombo inavungika basi. Kwache ninga mumbachitira miti yamtondo na yamthundu kusiya chitsa sasawambo mbewu yakuchena ile, inasalira chitsa m'dzikomo.”" 
Isaiah7:1 Ahazi mwana Yotamu mdzukuluache Uzia, mbali mfumu wa Yuda, Rezini mfumu wa Aramu pabodzi na Peka mwana Remalia mfumu wa Israele, adenda kachita nkhondo na Yerusalemu, kwache iwo hadakwanise kuukunda tayu." 
Isaiah7:2 Pidafika mphangwa kuna ufumu wa Yuda kuti dziko ya Aramu yachita mphatizano na dzinza ya Eferemu, Mfumu Ahazi pabodzi pene na anthu ache adatetemera na mantha ninga mumbachitira miti ya mumsitu kutekenyeka na mphepo." 
Isaiah7:3 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Yesaya mbati, “Kwata mwanako Sheari-Yashubu muende kagumanikana na Ahazi kumadolomero a mgelo wa madzi wakubulukira kuthawale yakumtunda pamsewu wakwenda ku Munda wa Nyakufula nguwo." 
Isaiah7:4 Ukalonge kuna iye kuti achite mphole-mphole, amatame, pontho aleke chita mantha. Aleke taya mtima na ukali wakugoswa wa Rezini na Aaramu pontho na Peka mwana Remalia; nkhuni ziwiri zakupuchirazi." 
Isaiah7:5 Aramu, Eferemu na mwana Remalia asasanya pyakukuvunga mbalonga mbati," 
Isaiah7:6 ‘Tendeni tikachite nkhondo na Yuda; tendeni tikaifudze mbatiigawane pyathu, pontho mbatipitisa mwana Tabele kukhala mfumu wache.’" 
Isaiah7:7 Kwache MBUYA Mulungu alonga mbati, ‘Penepi nkhabe dzakhalapo tayu, penepi nkhabe chitika tayu." 
Isaiah7:8 Podi dziko ya Aramu imbanyindira mzindache ukulu wa Damasiko, pontho Damasiko ambanyindirambo Rezini mfumu wache. Ndzidzi wa pyaka makumatanthatu na pishanu Eferemu anavungwa mwakuti nkhabe dzakhalamove dzinza ya anthu tayu." 
Isaiah7:9 Eferemu ambanyindira mzindache ukulu wa Samaria, pontho Samaria ambanyindirambo mwana Remalia. Ngakhala iwe hunaimira nganganga tayu pachikhulupiro chako iwe nkhabe kwanisa kuimisana nawo na pang'ono pene tayu.’ ”" 
Isaiah7:10 MBUYA adalonga pontho kuna Ahazi mbati," 
Isaiah7:11 “Pempha MBUYA Mulungu wako chidzindikiro penu chikhale pyacho chakuzwika ninga dziko ya anyakufa penu chakulapha ninga kuthambo tani.” 
Isaiah7:12 Mbwenye Ahazi adalonga mbati, “Ine sinapempha chidzindikirocho tayu; ine nkhabe funa kuyesa MBUYA tayu.”" 
Isaiah7:13 Tenepo Yesaya adalonga mbati, “Chinchino veserani imwe pidzukulu pya Davite! Ayi kuchitisa anthu kupirira namwe kunachita imweku mudakwane nako tayu? Chinchino munafuna pontho kuchitisa na Mulungu wanga ene kukhonda pirira namwe." 
Isaiah7:14 Natenepo Mbuya ene mwenechiroache anati akupase chidzindikiro: Mwali anakwata mimba mbabala mwana wamamuna, tenepo anamthula Emanuele." 
Isaiah7:15 Iye anadya mafuta amkaka na uchi, podi mbadzati dziwa kukhonda chakuipa mbasankhula chadidi." 
Isaiah7:16 Mbwenye mwanayo mbadzati dziwa kukhonda chakuipa mbasankhula chadidi, dziko ya mafumu awiri anakuthuswaniwo anasanduka madembe." 
Isaiah7:17 “MBUYA anadzesa pana iwe na pana anthu ako na pana banja ya babako ndzidzi ule chipo hudzati khalapo tayu kutomera ndzidzi udapanduka Eferemu kuna Yuda pinadzesa iye mfumu wa ku Asiria. 
Isaiah7:18 “Pansiku yeneyo MBUYA anaimba mkhwiyo kuchemera Aiguputo kumikulo yakutali ya Nailo ninga ntchentche, pontho kuchemera Aasiria kudziko yawo ninga nyuchi." 
Isaiah7:19 Onsenewo anabwera mbakhazikika m'maphedi akulu-akulu, m'nkhwimba zamwala, m'matenthere onsene a minga, pontho na m'michera monsene." 
Isaiah7:20 “Pansiku yeneyo Mbuya anaphatisa basa lezi yakubwerekwa kukhundu inango ya mkulo wa Yufurate, mfumu wa Asiria kuchinga tsisi ya mumsolo mwako, pontho ujoya wa m'miyendo mwako na kupalira ndevu zako." 
Isaiah7:21 “Pansiku yeneyo, munthu anakoya kwene mwanamphulu na mbuzi ziwiri zene basi." 
Isaiah7:22 Na thangwi ya kuinjipa kwa mkaka unafuna dzabulusa iwo, iye anakhala na mafuta amkaka akudya. Onsene anafuna dzasalira m'dzikomo anadya mafuta amkaka na uchi." 
Isaiah7:23 “Pansiku yeneyo, m'mbuto zonsene mule mukhali mfesa chikwi chibodzi za konta ya masiliva chikwi chibodzi, munamera ntcheswa na nyakhanche ene basi." 
Isaiah7:24 Anthu anaenda kweneko kukhulisa na matswimo na mauta, thangwi dziko yonseneyo inamera ntcheswa na nyakhanche." 
Isaiah7:25 Kulonga pya mapiri ale kale mukhalimwa na phaza mule, imwe nkhabe dzaendakove tayu kugopa ntcheswa na nyakhanche; anasanduka mbuto zakudyeserako ng'ombe na mabira basi.”" 
Isaiah8:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Kwata mpukutu ukulu mbulembepo na pilemba pyakuoneka mwadidi kuti: ‘Kusakaza Chamsanga, Kuchimbiza Kuvunga.’" 
Isaiah8:2 Tenepo ndidachemera nyansembe Uria, na Zekaria mwana Yeberekia kukhala mboni zanga zakunyindirika.”" 
Isaiah8:3 Pidagwanda ndzidzi mkazanga adakwata mimba mbabala mwana wamamuna. Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Mthule mwanakoyo Kusakaza Chamsanga Kuchimbiza Kuvunga." 
Isaiah8:4 Mwanayo mbadzati dziwa kuchemera, ‘Baba penu mama,’ mfuma ya Damasiko na pyakupokosera pya Samaria pinakwatwa na mfumu wa ku Asiria.”" 
Isaiah8:5 MBUYA adalonga pontho kuna ine mbati," 
Isaiah8:6 “Na thangwi yakuti anthu enewa akhonda madzi a mumkhwawa wa Shiloa akufamba pyawo wala-wala mbakomerwa na Rezini pontho na mwana Remalia," 
Isaiah8:7 Natenepo Mbuya ali chifupi kudzesa pana iwo madzi makulu a mumkulo wa Yufurate, mfumu wa ku Asiria pabodzi pene na anyankhondo ache onsene. Iwo unatayikira mpakana kumigelo yache yonsene, mbatayikira m'magombe ache onsene" 
Isaiah8:8 mbakakukulula Yuda, kumphimbira, kugwanda na mwenemo, mbamfika mpakana m'khosi. Anafalikira m'dziko monsene ninga kufuthula kwa maphaphido ache kuiphimbira, iwe Emanuele!”" 
Isaiah8:9 Imwe madzinza, vekesani mkhuwo wa nkhondo mbamutetemere na mantha. Veserani imwe madziko akutali. Sasanyikirani pyankhondo mbamuchita mantha! Sasanyikirani pyankhondo mbamuchita mantha!" 
Isaiah8:10 Sasanyani njira zakumenyera nkhondo, kwache nkhabe dzakuganyalirani tayu; panganani pyakuchita, kwache ipyo nkhabe dzachitika tayu, thangwi Mulungu ali nafe." 
Isaiah8:11 MBUYA adandiphata na mkono wache wamphamvu mbandicheuza kuti ndileke famba na njira za anthu enewa. Iye adalonga mbati," 
Isaiah8:12 “Leka kwata khundu papinthu pimbasasanya anthu enewa, pontho leka gopa pinthu pimbagopa iwo pile, pontho leka goswerwa napyo." 
Isaiah8:13 Mbwenye MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndiye athema iwe kumuyesa wakuchena basi, weneyo ndiye athema iwe kumgopa, iye ngule athema iwe kugoswerwa naye." 
Isaiah8:14 Tenepo iye anakhala mbuto yakupata. Kwache kulonga pya anthu a ku Yuda na a ku Israele, iye anakhala ninga mwala wakugwegwedusa anthu, pontho phanzwi yakuachitisa kugwa. Kulonga pya anthu a ku Yerusalemu, iye anakhala ninga msampha pontho mulindi." 
Isaiah8:15 Azinji a iwo anagwegweduka; iwo anagwa mbakuwazika iwo anakweshwa na msampha mbaphatwa.” 
Isaiah8:16 Mangirira mphangwazi mbumyatirire pifunziso penepi pamaso pa anyakufunzanga. 
Isaiah8:17 Ndinati ndidikhire MBUYA akubisa nkhope yache chinchino ule, kubisira pidzukulu pya Yakobo. Ine ndinanyindira iye ene basi." 
Isaiah8:18 Ngayang'anani, ine ndili pano pabodzi pene na ana adandipasa MBUYA ale. Ife ndife chidziwiso chakucheuza nacho Aisraele chakubulukira kuna MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, ambakhala paphiri ya Zioni ule." 
Isaiah8:19 Anthu anakupangani kuti muvunze nzeru kuna anyakuombedza na anyakukhumira, ale ambalonga chiwere-were pontho kubwebweta. Ayi penepa anthu hadatheme tayu kuvunza nzeru kuna Mulungu wawo? Thangwi yache ninji iwo ambavunza nzeru kuna anyakufa pya anyamoyo," 
Isaiah8:20 towera akatambireko matongero penu upangizi? Ndimomwene ale ambalonga mafala enewa, muna iwo nkhabemo cheza na pang'ono pene tayu." 
Isaiah8:21 Anthu anatsalakatika m'dziko monsene kusanyika na njala. Na thangwi ya njalayo, iwo anapopota mbayang'ana kudzulu kutemberera mfumu wawo pontho Mulungu wawo," 
Isaiah8:22 penu anayang'ana padziko yapansi, kwache chinafuna iwo dzaona ndi nyatwa zene basi na mdima, mdima wakugoswa. Iwo anaponywa kumdima wa ndiwe ani." 
Isaiah9:1 Kwache anthu akhaswipa mtima ale, nkhabeve dzataya mtima tayu. Ndzidzi wa mvula zakale Mulungu adalulupisa dziko ya Zebuloni na Nafitali, kwache m'tsogolo muno iye anapasa chilemedzo nthemba yonseneyo, kutomera ku Bara ya Mediterania mpakana kudziko ya kumtunda unango wa Yorodani, penepa nkhulonga dziko ya Galilea, dziko ya anthu okhonda khala Ayuda." 
Isaiah9:2 Anyakufamba mumdima, lero aona cheza chikulu pyakwanga; kuna alembo ambakhala mumthunzi wa imfa, cheza chaamwinikira." 
Isaiah9:3 Imwe MBUYA, mwainjipisa dzinzawo mbamuthimizira kukomerwa kwawo; iwo akusekera pamaso panu ninga anthu kusekera pyakuvuna pyawo, pontho ninga kukomerwa kwa amuna pinagawana iwo pinthu pidapokosera iwo." 
Isaiah9:4 Podi imwe mwatchola goli-goli ikhachitisa kufamba kota-kota ile, ndodo zikhamenya kumsana kwawo zile, mtswamu wa anyakuaboneresa ninga pansiku idakunda imwe Amidiani." 
Isaiah9:5 Ndimomwene kuti nsapato yonsene ikhaphatiswa basa na anyankhondo, pontho pyakuvala pyawo pyonsene, pidamala vinyizwa-vinyizwa m'chiropa pile, pinapiswa ninga nkhuni zakugasira moto." 
Isaiah9:6 Thangwi kuna ife mwana abalwa, kuna ife mwana aperekwa, pontho utongi unakhala m'manja mwache. Iye anachemerwa Phungu wakudodomesa, Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene, Baba wakwenda na kwenda, pontho Mfumu wa mtendere." 
Isaiah9:7 Utongi na mtendere wache pinaenda mbapikula, pontho ipyo nkhabe dzamala tayu. Iye anakhala pampando wachifumu wa Davite, pontho anakhazikisa mbawangisa ufumu wache. Iye anatonga na chilungamo pontho mwakulungama kubulukira ndzidzi wenewo mpakana kwenda na kwenda. Chipapu cha MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene chinachitisa penepi kuchitika." 
Isaiah9:8 MBUYA atumiza mphangwa zakupokanyisana na Yakobo; penepi pinagwera Israele. 
Isaiah9:9 Anthu onsene anati adziwe penepi, Dzinza ya Eferemu anthu ambakhala mu Samaria ale, anthu ambalonga mwakutumbama na mwakulunkuma ale mbati," 
Isaiah9:10 “Njerwa zamala gomoka, kwache ife tinaumanga pontho na miyala yakuchita kucheketezwa; miti yamkuyu yamala gwandwa, kwache ife tinabzalamo miti yamkungudza m'mbuto mwayo.”" 
Isaiah9:11 Mbwenye MBUYA apasa mphamvu anyamalwa a Rezini pontho aalamusira anyamalwawo kuti amenyane nawo. 
Isaiah9:12 Aaramu akumabulukiro dzuwa pontho Afilisti akumadokero dzuwa ali kukanwa yashaa kufuna kukhudyula Israele. Podi kwene pikhale tenepo, ukali wa MBUYA hudambombowe tayu, pontho mkono wache uli fogo kuatchunyusa basi." 
Isaiah9:13 Anthuwo hadabwerere tayu kuna Mulungu, nyakuatinthimula ule, penu kusaka-saka MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Isaiah9:14 Natenepo MBUYA anagwanda msolo wa Israele pabodzi pene na mchirache ene, nthambi zamchindu na mitete pansiku ibodzi ene;" 
Isaiah9:15 msolo ukuimirira akulu-akulu na amuna akuveka; mchira ukuimirira maprofeti ambafunzisa anthu pyakunama ale. 
Isaiah9:16 Anyakutsogolera anthu enewa aabausa kwenda m'tsanga, pontho anyakuphatwa nsenji ataya njira." 
Isaiah9:17 Natenepo Mbuya nkhabe dzakomerwave na aphale tayu, penu kuvera nsisi ana masiye na akazi amamfelwa, thangwi onsenewo nkhabe tsalakana pya Mulungu tayu, pontho ngakudawika, mulomo onsene kwache nkhulonga pyakupupwa basi. Podi kwene kuti pikhale tenepo, ukali wa MBUYA hudambombowe tayu, pontho mkono wache uli fogo kuatchunyusa basi." 
Isaiah9:18 Kudawika kumbagaka ninga moto; kumbapisa ntcheswa na nyakhanche ene, kudawika kumbapisa msitu onsene mwakuti utsi ache umbachita phwira-phwira." 
Isaiah9:19 Na shungu ya MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene dziko yapansi inavulika, pontho anthu anakhala nkhuni zache zakugasira moto; nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene anafuna dzavera mbaleache nsisi tayu." 
Isaiah9:20 Chonsene chakumadyo kwawo iwo anachikhudyula, kwache iwo anava njala basi; chonsene chakumabzere kwawo iwo anachidya, kwache nkhabe dzakhuta tayu. Munthu onsene anadya anache adabala iye;" 
Isaiah9:21 Manase anadya Eferemu, Eferemu anadyambo Manase; onsene pabodzi pene anapandukira Yuda. Podi kwene kuti pikhale tenepo ukali wa MBUYA hudambombowe tayu, pontho mkono wache uli fogo kuatchunyusa basi." 
Isaiah10:1 Dzedze kuna anyakusasanya matongero akusowa chilungamo, kuna ale ambalemba matongero kufuna kupondereza kwene anthu anango basi," 
Isaiah10:2 towera adyere nkope-kope anyakutcherenga pontho kukhondera chilungamo cha anthu anga anaponderezwa ale, kudyera nkope-kope akazi amamfelwa, pontho kubera ana masiye pinthu pyawo." 
Isaiah10:3 Ayi munachita tani pansiku ya kutchunyuswa, nsiku inafuna dzabwera nyatwa kubulukira kudziko yakutali ile? Nkhwa mbani kunafuna imwe dzathawira kuti mukaphedzwe? Nkhupi pontho kunafuna dzasiya imwe mfuma zanu?" 
Isaiah10:4 Nkhabe pontho chinango chinafuna dzasala tayu mbwenye kutchulima kwene pakati pa anyakuphatwa unyaperezo, penu kugwa pakati pa anyakuchekwa. Podi kwene kuti pikhale tenepo, ukali wa MBUYA hudambombowe tayu, pontho mkono wache uli fogo kuatchunyusa basi." 
Isaiah10:5 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Dzedze kuna Asiria, mtswamu wa ukali wanga, pontho ndodo ya shungu yanga!" 
Isaiah10:6 Ine ndamtumizira madzinza okhonda tsalakana pya Mulungu, ndidamgwinyira kuna anthu ambandizhangalisa ale, kuti akavunge na kupokosera mfumawo yonsene, pontho kuapondedza onsenene ninga matope m'njira." 
Isaiah10:7 Kwache penepi si pile pikhafuna iye kupichita tayu, penepi si pile pikhanyerezera iye kupichita tayu; manyerezero ache ngakufuna kuvunga kwene basi, pontho kupuluza madzinza azinji ene." 
Isaiah10:8 Mfumu wa ku Asiria alonga mbati, ‘Ayi akadamu anga onsene ankhondo si mafumu tayu?" 
Isaiah10:9 Ine ndidakunda Kalino ninga mudachitira ine Karikemishi, ndidakunda Hamati ninga mudachitira ine Aripadi, pontho Samaria ninga mudachitira ine Damasiko." 
Isaiah10:10 Ngakhala mkono wanga udaphata maufumu a anthu ambapembedza milungu ale, ale mifanikizo yawo njikulu-ikulu kupita ya ku Yerusalemu na Samaria," 
Isaiah10:11 ayi ine ndingachimwane kuvunga Yerusalemu na mifanikizo yache, ninga mudachitira ine kuna Samaria na mifanikizo yache?’ ”" 
Isaiah10:12 Mbuya angamalisa mabasache onsene akupokanyisana na Phiri ya Zioni na Yerusalemu, analonga mbati, “Ine ndinatchunyusa mfumu wa ku Asiria, thangwi ya pikhumbo pyakunyada pya mtimache, pontho kutumbama kumbachita iye kule." 
Isaiah10:13 Thangwi iye akulonga kuti, ‘Na mphamvu za manjangawa ine ndachita pinthu penepi, pontho na nzeru zanga, thangwi ndine nyakuvesa pinthu, ine ndidafudza madire a madzinza mbandiapokosera mfumawo; ninga nyamphamvu, ine ndidakunda mafumu awo." 
Isaiah10:14 Ninga munthu wakufikisa mkono wache m'chisa, sasawambo ine mkono wanga udafika pana mfuma ya madzinza; ninga mumbachitira anthu kugumanyisa mabulazi, inembo ndidagumanyisa madziko onsene nee na ibodzi ene idaphiphidza penu kuyashamula kulira tayu.’ ”" 
Isaiah10:15 Mbwenye MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ayi mbadzo ingakwanise kupiyesa yokha ene ikulu kupita nyakuiphatisa basa, penu mpeni wa macheka kugaya kupiringana nyakuuphatisa basa? Penepa panakhala ninga mtswamu ukuzunguza munthu wakuphatisa basa, penu chigomba kuthukula munthuyo!”" 
Isaiah10:16 Natenepo Mbuya, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene anatumiza utenda wakanyera pana anyankhondo ache amphamvu, pontho kulunkuma konsene kwa mfumuyo kunapya na moto okhonda thima." 
Isaiah10:17 Cheza cha Israele chinasanduka moto, Nyakuchenayo anasanduka malulume a moto; nsiku ene ibodzi basi unagaka na kupyerezaletu ntcheswa na nyakhanche ene." 
Isaiah10:18 Kukoma m'maso kwa misitu yache pontho mindache yamataka akubalisa pinthu pinavungika monsene mwene ninga kumala na kupakatika kumbachita munthu wakukhala na utenda. 
Isaiah10:19 Tenepo miti yakusalira m'misitu mwachemo inakhala mphalanga-mphalanga mwakuti podi na mwana ene anakwanisa kuilengesa. 
Isaiah10:20 Pansiku yeneyo, anyakusalira mu Israele, anyakusalira na moyo pa pidzukulu pya Yakobo, nkhabeve dzanyindira munthu adaakhamwadza ule tayu, mbwenye anati anyindire MBUYA, Nyakuchena wa Israele monsene mwene." 
Isaiah10:21 Anyakusalira na moyo anabwerera, anyakusalira pa pidzukulu pya Yakobo anabwerera kuna Mulungu Wamphamvu." 
Isaiah10:22 Podi kwene kuti anthu anu Aisraele ainjipe pyawo tani ninga tchetcha ya pagombe, anyakusalira ene basi ndiye anafuna dzabwerera. Kuvungika kwalongwaletu pontho nkhwakuthema monsene mwene." 
Isaiah10:23 Thangwi Mbuya, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene anati avunge dziko yonsene ninga montho mudatongera iye mule." 
Isaiah10:24 Natenepo ipi ndiye pyalonga Mbuya, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene: “Imwe anthu anga ambakhala mu zioni ale, lekani chita mantha na anthu a ku Asiria ambakukwapulani na ndodo ale, pontho ambakulikitani na chigomba ale ninga mudakuchitirani anthu a ku Iguputo." 
Isaiah10:25 Chinchino ene pano ukali wanga pana imwe unati umale, pontho shungu yanga inati igwinyikire kuna iwo kuavunga.”" 
Isaiah10:26 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene anaakwapula na mtswamu, ninga mudakhamwadzira iye Amidiani paphanzwi ya Orebu; anamenyesa ndodo yache panyanza ninga montho mudachitira iye mu Iguputo." 
Isaiah10:27 Pansiku yeneyo ndinakubulusirani mitolo idaikha Asiria m'mapewa mwanu ile, pontho kusudzula goli-goli ili m'khosi mwanu ile; goli-goli inati itchoke thangwi ya kunenepa." 
Isaiah10:28 Anyamalwa apita mu Aiati; iwo agwanda na ku Migironi; iwo akoyesa mitolo yawo mu Mikimashi. 
Isaiah10:29 Iwo awambuka pamakata pontho na mosiku adamanga msasa pa Geba. Anthu a ku Rama akutetemera na mantha; anthu a ku Gibea, mzinda wa Sauli, athawa." 
Isaiah10:30 Lirani imwe anyakukhala mu Galimu! Laisha ngavesera kuno! Tawirani, imwe anthu a mu Anatoti." 
Isaiah10:31 Madimena ali m'kati kuthawa; anthu a ku Gebimu amala bisala. 
Isaiah10:32 Lero ontho anyamalwa anaimira mu Nobu, iwo anaponya mashoko awo kuthuswa anthu a pa phiri ya Zioni, phiri ya mu Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah10:33 Yang'anani, Mbuya, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene anagwanda anyamalwa na mphamvu zikulu ninga nthambi za miti; miti yakulapha inagwiswa, miti yakunthemphuka inagwiswai." 
Isaiah10:34 Iye anasadza-sadza msitu na mbadzo; Lebanoni na miti yache yakufunika inagwa. 
Isaiah11:1 Mphukira inaphwitha pachitsa cha Yese; kubulukira pa mitsitsi yache nthambi inakula. 
Isaiah11:2 Mzimu wa MBUYA unakhala pana iye, mzimu wanzeru pontho wakuvesa pinthu; mzimu wauphungu pontho wamphamvu; mzimu waudziwisi pontho wakugopa MBUYA." 
Isaiah11:3 Iye anakomerwa pyakwanga na kuvera MBUYA. Kutonga kwache mseru nkhabe dzapichita mwakuyang'ana nkhope, penu kuchita kupangwa pyakuchita tayu." 
Isaiah11:4 Iye anatonga mseru anyakutcherenga nachilungamo, mbaikhira kunduli anyakuponderezwa pinatongwa iwo mseru. Mafala akubulukira m'kanwa mwache anakhala ninga ndodo kumenya nayo anyakudawika m'dziko yapansi, pontho na matongero a m'kanwa mwache iye anapha anyakuipa." 
Isaiah11:5 Pyakulungama pinakhala ninga bande m'chuno mwache, pontho kukhulupirika mbakukhala ninga mcheka m'chuno mwache." 
Isaiah11:6 Mbinzi na mabira pinakhala pabodzi pene na mtendere; anyalugwe anagona pansi pabodzi pene na mbuzi. Anamphulu na nkhalamu pinadyera pabodzi pene, pontho ana ang'ono ndiye anafuna dzapiyang'anira." 
Isaiah11:7 Ng'ombe na matika pinadyera pabodzi pene, pontho anawo anagonera pabodzi pene na mtendere. Nkhalamu zinadya maudzu ninga mumbachitirambo ng'ombe." 
Isaiah11:8 Akachiya anasenzeka chifupi na mwida wa mbadza, pontho ana anapitisa manjawo kumwida wa chidyantchana." 
Isaiah11:9 Paphiri yonsene yakupambulika ya Mulungu nkhabe dzakhala chinthu chakugoswa penu chakuvunga tayu. Padziko yonsene yapansi panadzala na udziwisi wa MBUYA ninga mumbachitira nyanza kudzala na madzi. 
Isaiah11:10 Nsiku ikudza inafuna mfumu wachinchino wakubulukira m'dzinza yachifumu ya Davite dzakhala bandera kuna madzinza. Iwo anagumanyikana kuna iye, pontho kumbakhala iye kule kunakhala kwademelero." 
Isaiah11:11 Nsiku yeneyo ingafika, Mbuya anaphatisa pontho mphamvu zache kubweza kwawo anthu ache akhadasalira kumadziko a Asiria na Iguputo, Patirosi, Kushi, Elamu, Shinari, na Hamati, pontho na ntchuwa za pabara." 
Isaiah11:12 Iye anakwiza m'dzulu bandera kudziwisa madzinza kuti iye anagumanyisa anthu adatamiswa a Aisraele mbabwezera anyakubalalika a ku Yuda ale kubulukira kunkhomo zonsene zinayi za dziko yapansi. 
Isaiah11:13 Bivu ya Eferemu inamala, pontho anyamalwa a Yuda anamaliratu. Eferemu nkhabeve dzachita bivu na Yuda tayu, penu Yuda kukhala nyamalwa wa Eferemu tayu." 
Isaiah11:14 Pabodzi pene iwo anawumbikira Afilisti kumadokero dzuwa, mbavunga anthu ambakhala kumabulukiro dzuwa ale. Iwo anakunda Edomu na Moabu, pontho Aamoni anakhala pansi pa utongi wawo." 
Isaiah11:15 MBUYA anaumisa mwendo wa bara ya ku Iguputo, pontho anadzesa mphepo yakupisa kuumisa mkulo wa Yufurate, mbaugawa kukhala pimikulo ping'ono-ping'ono pinomwe, towera munthu onsene akwanise kuwambuka na pakuuma." 
Isaiah11:16 Kuna anthu ache Aisraele akhadasalira kweneko ale kunakhala msewu ukulu kubulukira ku Asiria ninga montho mukhali ipyo kale pikhabuluka makolo awo m'dziko ya Iguputo. 
Isaiah12:1 Ikudza nsiku inafuna anthu imba kuti, “Ndinakukuzani MBUYA! Imwe mudandizhangalira, mbwenye lero mukundithondoza pontho nkhabe kundizhangalirave tayu." 
Isaiah12:2 Ndimomwene Mulungu ndi nyankhombo wanga; ine ndinanyindira mbandikhonda dzachita mantha. MBUYA Mulungu ndi mphamvu zanga pontho nyimbo yanga. Nyankhombo wanga ndiye.” 
Isaiah12:3 Na kukomerwa kukulu imwe munatunga madzi kubulukira mumchera wa chipulumuso. 
Isaiah12:4 Ikudza nsiku inafuna imwe imba kuti, “Perekani takhuta kuna MBUYA! Mchemereni kuti akuphedzeni! Pangani madzinza onsene pinthu pyachita iye! Lalikani kuti dzinache yakuzwa!" 
Isaiah12:5 Imbirani MBUYA thangwi ya pinthu pyademelero pyachita iye. Dziko yonsene yapansi mbive pinthu penepi. 
Isaiah12:6 Munthu onsene wakukhala mu Zioni mbakhuwe na kuimba mwakukomerwa, thangwi Nyakuchena wa Israele, ule ambakhala pakati panu, ngwamkulu.”" 
Isaiah13:1 Izi ndi mphangwa zile zidadza kuna Yesaya mwana Amozi kubulukira kuna Mulungu zakulonga pya Babiloni: 
Isaiah13:2 Pansonga ya phiri yakusowa pyakumera paoneka bandera yankhondo! Khuwani kuna anyankhondo pontho mukwize m'dzulu mkono wanu ninga chidziwiso chakwenda kasosa misuwo ya mzinda. 
Isaiah13:3 MBUYA atonga anyankhondo ache akupambulika, anyankhondo ache amphamvu kudzamenya nkhondo kutchunyusa anthu azhangalira iye ale." 
Isaiah13:4 Veserani kusokosa pamapiri ninga kwa chimwinji chikulu! Veserani chimpiningu cha maufumu, cha madzinza kugumanyikana pabodzi. MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akusasanya anyankhondo ache kwenda kunkhondo." 
Isaiah13:5 Iwo akubulukira kumadziko akutali, kumadolomero a dziko yapansi. Na thangwi ya kuzhangali kwache, MBUYA akudza dzavunga dziko yonsene." 
Isaiah13:6 Lira mwakuva kupha, thangwi nsiku ya MBUYA ili chifupi, nsiku inafuna dzavunga Nyamphamvu zonsene ile." 
Isaiah13:7 Na thangwi ya penepi manja a munthu onsene anachita chiwewa, pontho kuwanga mtima kwa munthu onsene kunamala." 
Isaiah13:8 Onsene anachita mantha, mbakundwa na kuva kupha, ninga kuva kupha kwa mkazi wa mimba pakubala. Iwo anayang'anizana unango na mwanzache mwamantha, pontho nkhope zawo zinaonesa manthawo." 
Isaiah13:9 Yang'anani, nsiku ya MBUYA ikudza, nsiku yakukala mtima, yaukali wakugoswa, pontho ya shungu. Dziko yapansi inasanduka thando yatchetcha, pontho anyakudawa onsene anavungwa." 
Isaiah13:10 Nyenyezi zakuthambo na magulu awo zinathima, dzuwa ingabuluka inaswipa, pontho mwezi hunaonesa cheza tayu." 
Isaiah13:11 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ndinadzesa nyatwa padziko yapansi mbanditchunyusa anyakudawika thangwi ya pyakudawa pyawo. Ndinachepesa munthu onsene wakunyada mbanditchunyusa munthu onsene wakupithemba pontho wakukala mtima." 
Isaiah13:12 Ndinachitisa munthu kukhala okhonda oneka-oneka ninga golidi chadi-chadi, wakusowa pyakwanga ninga golidi wadidiletu wa ku Ofiri." 
Isaiah13:13 Ndinachitisa thambo kutetemera, pontho dziko yapansi inatekenyeka pambuto pache pansiku inafuna ine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene kuonesa ukali wanga wakugoswa na shungu yanga." 
Isaiah13:14 Munthu onsene anabwerera kuna anthu a kwawo, onsene anathawira ku madziko a kwawo, kubalalika ninga nyasa zakuthawa nyakukhulisa, pontho ninga mabira akusowa makabuswa." 
Isaiah13:15 Tenepo nyakufuna dzaphatwayo analaswa, pontho onsene anakweshwayo anaphiwa na talasada." 
Isaiah13:16 Akachiyawo anamenyeswa msolo kumiyala iwo akuona maso; pinthu pya m'nyumba mwawo pinapokoswa pontho akazi awo anaphatirirwa.” 
Isaiah13:17 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Yang'anani, ndinazhangalisa Amedi kusosa Babiloni. Iwo nkhabe tsalakana pya siliva pontho kukomerwa na golidi tayu." 
Isaiah13:18 Na mautawo iwo anapha aphale. Iwo nkhabe dzavera nsisi akachiya, penu dzava nyambalo na ana tayu." 
Isaiah13:19 Babiloni ngufumu wa demelero pyakwanga kupiringana mafumu onsene; anthu ache ambaunyadira. Mbwenye ine MBUYA ndinavunga Babiloni ninga mudachitira ine pakutoma kuna mizinda ya Sodomu na Gomora! 
Isaiah13:20 Nkhabe na mbodzi ene anafuna dzakhalako tayu pamifendu yonsene inadzayo. Nkhabe Muarabu anafuna dzamangamo khumbi yache tayu, pontho nkhabe makabuswa anafuna dzadyesako mabirache tayu." 
Isaiah13:21 Mbwenye inasanduka mbuto yakukhala nyama zam'tsanga pontho kule kunafuna dzamanga madzidzi pisa pyawo. Mphuwani zinakhala kweneko, pontho mbala zinanumpha-numpha pamadembe awo." 
Isaiah13:22 Nsanja pontho nyumba zachifumu zinatairira na kulira kwa matika pontho mibinzi. Ndzidzi wa Babiloni wakwana! Nsiku zache zasala chifupi kumala.” 
Isaiah14:1 MBUYA anavera nsisi pidzukulu pya Yakobo; mbaasankhula pontho kukhala anthu ache ene. Iye anaakhazikisa pontho m'dziko mwawo. Alendo anabwera mbakhala nawo mwenemo pontho mbaphatikana na pidzukulu pya Yakobo. 
Isaiah14:2 Madzinza anaaphedza kubwerera kudziko kwawo, idaapasa MBUYA ile, tenepo madzinza anatumikira Aisraele ninga mabitchu. Ale adakwata Aisraele unyaperezo, chinchino Aisraele anati aakwatembo unyaperezo; iwo anatonga anthu ale ndzidzi unango adaapondereza." 
Isaiah14:3 Pansiku inafuna MBUYA dzapasa Aisraele kululupirwa kuna pyakuva kupha pontho nyatwa pontho na kuna basa yakupha ikhakhakhamizwa iwo kuphata ile," 
Isaiah14:4 imwe munaimba nyimbo yakusingirira mfumu wa ku Babiloni ninga tenepa: Nyakupondereza achitambo tani kuti agwe ninga tenepa? Ayi pyatani kuti ukali wache umale ninga tenepa? 
Isaiah14:5 MBUYA akhobola mtswamu wa anyakuipa, pontho ndodo ya atongi," 
Isaiah14:6 ale na kuzhangali kwawo adamenya anthu na mashoko okhonda lekeza, pontho na ukali wawo adakunda madzinza na shungu yokhonda mbombowa." 
Isaiah14:7 Dziko yonsene yapansi muna kumatama na mtendere, pontho munthu onsene akuimba thangwi ya kukomerwa." 
Isaiah14:8 Podi na miti ene ya paina pontho na mikungudza ya ku Lebanoni ikukusingirira mbilonga kuti, “Na thangwi yakuti chinchino iwe watchithiswa, nkhabeve nyakusaka nkhuni anafuna dzatitema tayu.”" 
Isaiah14:9 Dziko ya anyakufa yasasanyika kugumanikana na mfumu wa ku Babiloni. Mizimu ya anyakufa, ya ale akhali atongi padziko yapansi ikutekeseka kukutambira; mizimuyo ikulamuka m'mipando mwawo yachifumu." 
Isaiah14:10 Yonseneyo inamtawira mbilonga kuna iye kuti, “Chinchino iwe wasandukambo wakusowa mphamvu ninga ife! Iwe wakhalambo sasawa na ife!”" 
Isaiah14:11 Demelero yako yonsene lero wadza nayo kudziko ya anyakufa kuno, pabodzi pene na kulira kwa anyakatangale ene; iwe ukugona pa talimba ya mfunye, chakufinika chako mbichikhala unyoka." 
Isaiah14:12 Iwe nthanda, mwana makalakwecha, wagwa kudzulu! Chinchino iwe waponywa pansi pa mataka, iwe ule ukhakunda madzinza." 
Isaiah14:13 Iwe udalonga wekha ene kuti, “Ine ndinakwira kudzulu; ndinakwiza mpando wanga wachifumu padzulu pa nyenyezi za Mulungu; ndinakhala pampando wanga wachifumu paphiri yakumpoto pale pakhagumanyikana milungu." 
Isaiah14:14 Ndinakwira kudzulu kupiringana makole; mbandipichitisa ndekha ene kukhala ninga Nyakudzulu-dzulu.” 
Isaiah14:15 M'mbuto mwache iwe watchithiswa kudziko ya anyakufa, pansiletu m'Chiphompho chikulu." 
Isaiah14:16 Anyakufa anafuna dzakuonawo anakuyang'anisisa mbalonga pya nyatwa zako mbati: “Ayi weneyu si munthu ule adatekenya dziko yapansi tayu, pontho kuchitisa maufumu kutetemera na mantha ule," 
Isaiah14:17 munthu ule adachitisa dziko yapansi kusanduka thando yatchetcha, pontho kuvunga mizinda yache mbakhonda kutawirisa anyaperezo ache kwenda kwawo?”" 
Isaiah14:18 Mafumu onsene padziko yapansi akuikhwa m'masiye na demelero, kada munthu m'nthumbi yache." 
Isaiah14:19 Kwache iwe nkhabe nthumbi tayu, tenepo mtembo wako wasiyiwa panja kuti uvunde; iwo wapondedzwa-pondedzwa mbuphimbirwa na mitembo ya anyakuphiwa, anthu adalaswa na talasada ale, ale atchithira ku Chiphompho chikulu chamiyala," 
Isaiah14:20 thangwi udasanduza dziko yako kukhala madembe mbupha anthu ako, iwe nkhabe ikhwa m'masiye ninga mafumu anango tayu. Nkhabe na mbodzi ene wa pidzukulu pyako pyakuipa anafuna dzakumbukwave tayu." 
Isaiah14:21 Leka anyakucheka atome basawo! Ana achimuna a mfumu weneyu anafa thangwi ya kudawa kwa makolo awo. Nkhabe na mbodzi ene wa iwo anatonga dziko yapansi penu kudzazamo mizinda tayu. 
Isaiah14:22 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga kuti, “Ndinasosa dziko ya Babiloni mbandiisandusa madembe. Nkhabe chinafuna ine dzasiya tayu, nee mwana nee anyakusalira na moyo tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Isaiah14:23 Ndinasandusa Babiloni kukhala dambo, tenepo madzidzi anakhala mwenemo. Ndinatswaira Babiloni na mtswairo wa kuvunga. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene.”" 
Isaiah14:24 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene adumbira kuti, “Ndimomwene pinthu pyasasanya ine pinati pichitike, pontho pinthu pyanyerezera ine kuchita pinati pichitike." 
Isaiah14:25 Ine ndinavunga Aasiria m'dziko mwanga ya Israele; ndinaapondedza m'mapiri mwanga. Goli-goli idaikha iwo m'khosi mwa anthu anga ndinaibulusa, pontho kubulusa nyatwa m'mapewa mwawo.”" 
Isaiah14:26 Penepi ndiye pyasasanya ine kupichita padziko yapansi; wenewu ndi mkono wanga wafuthula ine kutchunyusa madzinza onsene. 
Isaiah14:27 Thangwi MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene adanyerezera kuchita pyonsenepi, mbani anakwanisa kumkhondesa? Mkono wache wafuthuka kufuna kutchunyusa, tenepo mbani anakwanisa kuufunya?" 
Isaiah14:28 Izi ndi mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu zile zidadza chaka chidafa mfumu Ahazia chile: 
Isaiah14:29 Lekani sekera, imwe Afilisti onsene, thangwi ndodo idakumenyani ile yasweka; kubulukira pa nyoka yeneyo panabuluka mbobo, pontho mbobo unabala chinyoka chakupha." 
Isaiah14:30 Anyakutcherengaletu anagumana mpovu wadidi ninga mabira, pontho anyakusowa anakhala pakupata. Kwache dzinzanu ndinaivunga na njala, mbandipha anyakusalira na moyo ale." 
Isaiah14:31 Lira, iwe msuwo wa mpanda! Kalala, iwe mzinda! Nyungulukani na mantha imwe Afilisti monsene! Makole afumbi akudza kubulukira kumpoto. Yeneyi ndi gulu ya anyankhondo akusowa mantha." 
Isaiah14:32 Tinaatawira tani aimiriri a dziko akubulukira kudziko ya Afilisti? Ife tinaapanga kuti MBUYA akhazikisa Zioni, pontho mwenemo anthu ache akusanyika ale anakhala pakupata." 
Isaiah15:1 Izi ndi mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu zakulonga pya Moabu: Ari wa ku Moabu avungwa, avungwa mosiku ubodzi basi, Kiri wa ku Moabu avungwa, avungwa mosiku ubodzi basi." 
Isaiah15:2 Diboni akwira kunyumba ya milungu yache, kumbuto zache zakupembedzerapo kalira; Moabu akulirira Nebo na Medeba, Tsisi yawo yonsene yamalwa chingwa pontho na ndevu zawo zene." 
Isaiah15:3 M'misewu anthu avala masakha; m'misika pontho pansoyi za nyumba onsene akukalala, fala kufa thangwi ya kulira." 
Isaiah15:4 Heshiboni na Eleale akukalala, kulira kwawo kunakwanisa kuveka na ku Yahazi. Podi na anyankhondo ene akulira; kuwanga kwawo mtima kwamala." 
Isaiah15:5 Mtimanga ukulirira Moabu; anyakuthawache afika mpakana ku Zoari kwenderatu ku Egilati-Shelishia. Anango awambuka msewu kwenda ku Luhiti, uku akulira; panjira ya ku Horonaimu iwo akwenda mbakalala thangwi ya kuvungika kwawo." 
Isaiah15:6 Mkhwawa wa Nimurimu wamala uma kakata, pontho maudzu amala unyala; nkhabeve maudzu penu chakumera chiwisi chasalira tayu." 
Isaiah15:7 Natenepo mfuma idagumanya iwo mbaikoya ile, amala kuikwata kuwambukira ku Phedi ya Mikotamu, kuyesa kuthawisa mfuma zawo." 
Isaiah15:8 Konsene kwene kumadire a Moabu kukuveka kulira; chiliro chafika mpakana kumaluwani a Eglaimu, pontho kukalala kwawo kwafika mpakana ku Beerelimu." 
Isaiah15:9 Mkulo wa mu Diboni wamala fira na chiropa, kwache ndinati ndithimize kuchita chinthu chakuipa pyakwanga kuna anthu a kweneko. Nkhalamu inaphata anyakupulumuka m'manja mwa Amoabu, pontho na anthu onsene anafuna dzasalira m'dzikomo." 
Isaiah16:1 Tumizani anabira ninga mtukwa kuna mtongi wa dzikoyo kubulukira ku Sela kuwambuka thando yatchetcha mpakana kuphiri ya Zioni. 
Isaiah16:2 Ninga mbalame zakumbuluka-mbuluka zingathamangiswa m'pisa mwawo, sasawambo na akazi a ku Moabu pakuwambukira mkulo a Arinoni." 
Isaiah16:3 Iwo akulonga kuna anthu a ku Yuda mbati, “Tipaseni uphungu, tipangeni chakuchita. Mwenemo dzuwa ikuswa miti tipaseni mthunzi wakukhala ninga mosiku; tibiseni ife, anyakuthawa kwawo, lekani kutipereka m'manja mwa anyamalwathu." 
Isaiah16:4 Titawiriseni ife, Amoabu anyakuthawa kwawo kukhala namwe pabodzi m'dziko mwanu; titchinjirizeni kuna anyakufuna pyakutivunga ale.” Anyakupondereza anati amale, pyakuvunga dziko pyonsene pinaleka, pontho anyavinga anamalamo m'dzikomo." 
Isaiah16:5 Na kufunana kokhonda mala mpando wachifumu unakhazikiswa; na kukhulupirika munthu anakhala penepo; iye anakhala chidzukulu cha Davite, iye nkhabe dzadembuka kuchita pinthu pyakulungama tayu, pontho anaonesesa kuti chilungamo chikutewezwa." 
Isaiah16:6 Anthu a ku Yuda akulonga kuti, “Ife tava pya kunyada kumbachita anthu a ku Moabu kuti mbanthu akutumbama pontho akulunkuma, kwache kunyada kwawoko nkhwapezi nako.”" 
Isaiah16:7 Natenepo alekeni Amoabu kulira, onsene pabodzi pene kulirira Moabu. Kukalala na kusintili kukulu thangwi ya pitumbuwa pya mfesa zakuuma pikhadya iwo mumzinda wa Kiri-Hareseti." 
Isaiah16:8 Mazunde a ku Heshiboni amala unyala pontho mfesa za Sibima zaunyalambo; atongi a madzinza amala pondedza mfesa zadidiletu, zile zikhadafika mpakana kumzinda wa Yazere, mbazifalikira mpakana m'thando yatchetcha; mitawi yache idatanthawira kubara." 
Isaiah16:9 Natenepo ndikulirira mfesa za Sibima ninga kulira kudachita Yazere. Misozi yanga ikugwa pana iwe thangwi ya Heshiboni na Eleale, thangwi nkhabe na chinthu chene chakutchola penu chakuvuna chakuti chinachitisa anthu kukomerwa tayu." 
Isaiah16:10 Kusekera na kukomerwa kwamala m'mazunde a nsapo; nkhabe na mbodzi ene akukhuwa penu kuimba m'minda yamfesa tayu. Nkhabe na mbodzi ene akutchitchitha vinyu m'dzenje tayu. 
Isaiah16:11 Natenepo mtimanga ukulira ninga nyakatangale, kulirira Moabu, moyo wanga ukuva kupha thangwi ya Kiri-Hareseti." 
Isaiah16:12 Moabu angadza pambuto yache yakupembedzerapo milungu, kumbachita iye nkhupitopesa yekha ene; iye angaenda kunyumba ya milungu yache kapemphera, ipyo nkhabe kumganyalisa tayu." 
Isaiah16:13 Izi ndi mphangwa zikhadalonga MBUYA pakutoma pale pya Moabu. 
Isaiah16:14 Tenepo chinchino MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Pangagwanda pyaka pitatu, ninga nyaganyo kulengesa ndzidzi wa kumala kwa ganyo yache, demelero ya Moabu inamala, pontho anthu ache azinji onsene analulupiswa. Tenepo anyakufuna dzasalirawo anakhala akuchepa, pontho akusowa mphamvu.”" 
Isaiah17:1 Izi ndi mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu zakulonga pya Damasiko: “Yang'anani, Damasiko nkhabeve dzakhala mzinda tayu; iye anasanduka mulu wa madongolomwa." 
Isaiah17:2 Mizinda ya Aroeri unasala yakusowa anthu; mbisanduka mbuto yakudyeserapo mabira, ale anakhala gunundu-gunundu mbapasowa na mbodzi ene wakuathuswa." 
Isaiah17:3 Mizinda yakutchingwa na mpanda ya Eferemu nkhabe dzaonekave tayu, pontho Damasiko nkhabe dzakhalave wachifumu tayu; anyakusalira na moyo a Aramu ale analulupiswa ninga mudachitirwa Aisraele. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Isaiah17:4 “Pansiku yeneyo demelero ya Yakobo inathima; manungo ache akunenepawo anamala pakatika. 
Isaiah17:5 Ipyo pinakhala ninga nyakuvuna kukulumanya mphesi zakuimira, mbagwanda mapirache na manjache, ninga mumbachitira munthu kugwanda ngala za mapira m'phedi ya Refaimu." 
Isaiah17:6 Anthu akuchepa ene ndiye anafuna dzasalira, ninga mumbachitira muti waolivi ungautekenya, pambasala basi nsapo ziwiri penu zitatu kunsongaletu, zinayi penu zishanu kusalira m'tchinde. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele.”" 
Isaiah17:7 Nsiku yeneyo anthu anaikha maso pana Nyakualenga, pontho anazungunukira kuna Nyakuchena wa Israele." 
Isaiah17:8 Iwo nkhabeve dzanyindira maguwa adasasanya iwo na manjawo tayu, penu kutsalakana adzimunthu a milungu Ashera, pontho na maguwa akufukizirapo pyakununkhira adasasanya iwo na pyala pyawo." 
Isaiah17:9 Nsiku yeneyo ingafika, mizinda yamphamvu idasiya iwo kuthawa Aisraele ile, inasanduka madembe ninga mudachitirambo mizinda ya Ahivi na Aamori." 
Isaiah17:10 Imwe Aisraele, mwaduwalira Mulungu, Nyankhombo wanu; imwe hamudakumbuke tayu Phanzwi, mpandanu wamphamvu. Natenepo podi kwene kuti imwe mulime pyanu minda yakupambulika kulimira milungu yachilendo," 
Isaiah17:11 podi kwene kuti nsiku inabzala imweyo muzichitise kukula, pontho kuti machibese onthowo anabzala imwewo muzichitise kuchita maluwa, kwache pinafuna imwe dzavunapyo nkhabe dzakhala pinthu tayu pansiku ya utenda pontho kuva kupha kokhonda mala." 
Isaiah17:12 Zhi! Upoko-poko wa madzinza azinji; iwo akugulung'unda ninga mabimbi a m'nyanza. Zhi! Chimpiningu cha anthu azinji; iwo akutitima ninga madzi makulu.
