Isaiah17:13 Podi kwene kuti madzinza abwere ninga kukuka kwa madzi makulu, kwache iye angaasumulula iwo ambathawira kutali, kugwinywa ninga dzungu na mphepo pamapiri, pontho ninga maudzu m'chivumbulu." 
Isaiah17:14 Na mawulo iwo ambagoswa, mbwenye na machibese nkhabe onekave tayu. Enewa ndi mamalisiro a anthu ambatithuswa mbapokosera pinthu pyathu ale." 
Isaiah18:1 Dzedze kuna dziko, kule kumbaveka kulira kwa maphaphido, kukhundu inango ya mikulo ya Kushi," 
Isaiah18:2 ule umbatumiza aimiriri a dziko na pamkulo wa Nailo pa miyadiya yakusasanywa na mitete. Ndokoni thamangani imwe anyamphangwa, kuna anthu akulapha pontho akumyalala manungo, kuna anthu akugopeka pikulu pene, dzinza yamphamvu pontho yaukali, ale dziko yawo yagawanikana na mikulo." 
Isaiah18:3 Imwe anthu onsene a padziko yapansi, ale ambakhala padziko yapansi, bandera ingatchimikwa pansonga ya phiri imwe munaiona, pontho ngoma ingalira imwe munati muive." 
Isaiah18:4 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Ine ndinakhala pyanga mulomo phoo mbandiyang'ana kwene na kumbuto kumbakhala ine, ninga kubuluka kwa dzuwa ndzidzi wa malimwe, pontho ninga kugwa kwa bume ndzidzi wakuvuna.”" 
Isaiah18:5 Thangwi anthu mbadzati vuna, mwenemo maluwa amala kumbwera pontho mfesa zamala kufira, iye anagwanda mphukira na mpeni wakusadzulira mbagwanda na kutaya nthambi zonsene zakutanthawira." 
Isaiah18:6 Mitembo ya anyankhondo awo inasiyirwa malezi pontho nyama zam'tsanga; mbalame zinaidya ndzidzi wa malimwe, mbidzadyiwa na nyama za m'tsanga ndzidzi wa mainja." 
Isaiah18:7 Ndzidzi wenewo mitukwa inadzeswa kuna MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene kubulukira kuna anthu akulapha pontho akumyalala manungo, kuna anthu akugopeka pikulu pene, dzinza yamphamvu pontho yaukali, ale dziko yawo yagawanikana na mikulo. Mitukwa inadzeswa ku Phiri ya Zioni, kumbapembedzwa MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene kule." 
Isaiah19:1 Izi ndi mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu zakulonga pya Iguputo: Yang'anani, MBUYA apakira makole akuthamanga pyakwanga, iye akudza ku Iguputo. Mifanikizo ya Iguputo ikutetemera pamaso pache, pontho mitima ya Aiguputo yamala nyunguluka na mantha." 
Isaiah19:2 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ndinalamusa kukhonda vana mu Iguputo, Muiguputo kumenyana Muiguputo mnzache, mbale kumenyana na mbaleache, tsanthemba kumenyana na tsanthembache, mzinda kumenyana na mzinda unango, ufumu kumenyana na ufumu unango." 
Isaiah19:3 Aiguputo anataya mtima, mbandidzudzumisa pinthu pinasasanya iwo kupichita; iwo anavunza nzeru kuna mifanikizo, kuna anyakukhumira, pontho kavunza nzeru kuna mizimu ya anthu akufa." 
Isaiah19:4 Ndinapereka Aiguputo m'manja mwa mtongi wakukala mtima, pontho mfumu waukali anaatonga. Ndalonga ndine Mbuya, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene.”" 
Isaiah19:5 Mkulo wa Nailo unapwa, pakumalisira pache mkulowo unauma kakata." 
Isaiah19:6 Migelo ya madzi inanunkha; mikulo ya Iguputo inafikhirika mbiuma, pontho mitete na mabande pinaunyala." 
Isaiah19:7 Pyakumera pyonsene pya m'khundu-khundu mwa mkulo wa Nailo, pontho mbewu zonsene zakulimwa m'khundu-khundu mwa Nailo zinadudumuka, izo zinambuluka na mphepo mbazikhonda dzaonekave." 
Isaiah19:8 Amisiri a nsomba analira na kukalala, onsene anyakuphatisa basa pimedzo mumkulo wa Nailo; ale ambaponya makokotawo m'madzi analira." 
Isaiah19:9 Anyakusasanya pakuphatisa basa thonje, pontho anyakuluka nguwo zakufewa anataya mtima." 
Isaiah19:10 Anyaluso pakusasanya nguwo anasowa pyakuchita, pontho anyaganyo onsene anasanyika mtima." 
Isaiah19:11 Mathubu a mzinda wa Zoani ndi mapupwe ene pyawo; mapungu a mfumu wa ku Iguputo ambapereka uphungu wapezi-pezi. Ayi munalongeranji kuna mfumu kuti, “Ine ndi mbodzi wa anthu anzeru, pontho nyakufunza wa mafumu akale?”" 
Isaiah19:12 Mfumu wa Iguputo, amunako anzeru ali kupi? Mbaleke akuonese pontho akudziwise pinthu pyasasanya MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene kupichita pana Iguputo." 
Isaiah19:13 Mathubu a ku Zoani asanduka mapupwe, pontho akadamu a ku Memfisi amala phatwa m'maso; ale ndi mizati ya anthu ache aendesa Aiguputo m'tsanga." 
Isaiah19:14 MBUYA adachitisa Aiguputo kuzunguzika; aachitisa kudzedzereka papinthu pyonsene pimbachita iwo, ninga mumbachitira nyakuledzera kutherezika na matapiko ache." 
Isaiah19:15 Nkhabe na mbodzi ene mu Iguputo anakwanisa kuphedza tayu, penu akhale msolo penu mchira, nthambi yamchindu penu mtete." 
Isaiah19:16 Nsiku yeneyo Aiguputo anakhala ninga akazi. Iwo anagedemera pyakwanga na mantha angaona kuti MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene afuthula mkono wache kuatchunyusa. 
Isaiah19:17 Dziko ya Yuda inakhala chakugoswa kuna Aiguputo; munthu onsene angava pya Yuda anagoswerwa, thangwi ya pinthu pyasasanya MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene kudzapichita kuna Iguputo." 
Isaiah19:18 Pansiku yeneyo mizinda mishanu ya Iguputo inalonga chilongero cha Kanani mbadumbira kutumikira MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene. Ubodzi mwa mizindache inachemerwa Mzinda wa Dzuwa. 
Isaiah19:19 Pansiku yeneyo panamangwa guwa yansembe ya MBUYA pakati na kati pa dziko ya Iguputo, pontho chiguwa ya chikumbuso cha MBUYA chinamangwa pa madire a Iguputo." 
Isaiah19:20 Penepi pinakhala chidzindikiro pontho umboni kuna MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene m'dziko ya Iguputo. Iwo angalira kuna MBUYA thangwi ya anyakuapondereza, iye anaatumizira Nyankhombo, ule anaatchinjiriza mbaapulumusa." 
Isaiah19:21 MBUYA anapitchulula yekha ene kuna anthu a ku Iguputo, tenepo pansiku yeneyo iwo anatawira kuti iye ndi MBUYA. Natenepo iwo anampembedza pakupereka nsembe zakupyerera na mitukwa. Iwo anadumbira kuna MBUYA Mulungu mbapichitadi." 
Isaiah19:22 MBUYA anatchunyusa anthu a ku Iguputo na muliri; iye anaatchunyusa, kwache anaawangisa. Iwo anazungunukira kuna iye, iyembo anava kupemphera kwawo mbaawangisa." 
Isaiah19:23 Pansiku yeneyo pakati pa Iguputo na Asiria panakhala msewu ukulu. Anthu a madziko awiriwa anafambirana, pontho madzinza a Iguputo na Asiria anapembedzera pabodzi pene." 
Isaiah19:24 Pansiku yeneyo Israele anakhala wachitatu, tenepo pabodzi pene na Iguputo na Asiria onsene anakhala mtsanzayiso kuna dziko yonsene yapansi." 
Isaiah19:25 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene anaatsanzayisa mbalonga kuti, “Nyakutsanzaya ndiwe Iguputo, iwe Asiria basa ya manjanga, pontho Israele nyakusankhulikanga.”" 
Isaiah20:1 Mwaka udadza nyankhondo wamkulu wakutumizwa na Sarigoni Mfumu wa dziko ya Asiria kumzinda wa Ashidodi kuusosa na kuukunda," 
Isaiah20:2 pandzidzi wenewo MBUYA adalonga kudzera muna Yesaya mwana Amozi mbati, “Dula masakha anavala iwewa pontho na nkhwaira zili kumanyalo kwakozi.” Iye adavera mbafamba pyache chipezi-pezi, pontho wakusowa nkhwaira." 
Isaiah20:3 Kubuluka penepo MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Ninga montho mwachitira nyabasanga Yesaya kufamba pyache chipezi-pezi pontho wakusowa nkhwaira pyaka pitatu ninga chidziwiso chakucheuza nacho anthu papinthu pinafuna dzachitika kuna Iguputo na Kushi," 
Isaiah20:4 natenepo mfumu wa Asiria anakwata anyaperezo a ku Iguputo na Kushi uku ali chipezi-pezi, pontho akusowa nkhwaira. Ana na akulu ene uku matako awo ali nyimwa, kudzesa manyadzo mu Iguputo." 
Isaiah20:5 Ale ambanyindira dziko ya Kushi, pontho ale ambanyadira dziko ya Iguputo anachita mantha mbachitiswa manyadzo." 
Isaiah20:6 Pansiku yeneyo, anthu akukhala pagombe yeneyi analonga kuti, ‘Yang'anani pyachitikira anthu akhanyindira ife, pontho kukhathawira ife kuti titchinjirizwe kuna mfumu wa Asiria ale! Ayi penepa tinakwanisa tani kupulumuka?’ ”" 
Isaiah21:1 Izi ndi mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu zakulonga pya thando yatchetcha ya chifupi na bara: Ninga chivumbulu kutswaira thando yatchetcha ya Negebu, sasawambo nyatwa zinafika kubulukira kuthando yatchetcha, kubulukira kudziko yakuchitisa mantha." 
Isaiah21:2 Masomphenya akugoswa atchululwa kuna ine; phanga akuchita pyauphanga, pontho nyakupokosera pinthu akupokosera. Elamu ndoko kasose! Media manga msasa kuzungulira mizinda kuikunda! Ine ndinamalisa nyatwa zonsene zidadzesa Babiloni zile." 
Isaiah21:3 Na thangwi ya penepi manungo anga akuva kupha; ndidava mtswotswo ninga mkazi wamimba pakulekwa; ine ndapaluka mtima na pinthu pinava ine, pontho ndikuswipa mtima na pinthu pinaona ine." 
Isaiah21:4 Mtimanga uli dididi kudima, pontho mantha akundichitisa kutetemera; chidodo chikhadikhira ine chile chidasanduka chakugoswa kuna ine." 
Isaiah21:5 Iwo asasanya pathebulu, mbathasika masakala, iwo akudya na kumwa kwene! Lamukani imwe mathubu, tswingani mafuta pyakugedera matswimo pyanu!" 
Isaiah21:6 MBUYA akulonga kuna ine kuti, “Ndoko kaikhe nyakulondali, towera alonge kuna iwe pyonsene pinaona iye." 
Isaiah21:7 Iye angaona anyankhondo akupakira akavalo akufamba awiri-awiri, anyakupakira mabulu pontho anyakupakira ngamila, mpange akhale m'maso, ndikulonga kukhala m'maso chadi-chadi.”" 
Isaiah21:8 Tenepo nyakulondali ule adakhuwa mbati, “Nsiku na nsiku, mbuyanga ndimbaimira ngolokoto pansanja; mosiku onsene ndimbakhala m'maso pabasanga." 
Isaiah21:9 Ngayang'anani anyankhondo akupakira akavalo akufamba awiri-awiri akudza. Natenepo iye akutawira kuti, ‘Babiloni agwa, tipi-tipi, mifanikizo yonsene ya milungu yache ili mbwee pansi!’ ”" 
Isaiah21:10 Anthu anga akububudwa pambuwa, ine ndinakupangani pinthu pyava inembo kubulukira kuna MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, kubulukira kuna Mulungu wa Israele." 
Isaiah21:11 Mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu zakulonga pya Edomu: Munthu unango akundichemera kubulukira ku Seiri kuti, “Nyakulondaliwe kunja kunaecha lini kani? Nyakulondaliwe kunja kunachena lini kani?”" 
Isaiah21:12 Nyakulondali akutawira kuti, “Kunja kunati kueche chinchino pano, kwache kunati kudoke pontho chinchino pano. Ngakhala unafuna pyakuvunza, vunzatu mphapo; mbubwere pontho kachiwiri kache.”" 
Isaiah21:13 Izi ndi mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu zakulonga pya Arabia: Imwe anthu a ku Dedani, ale akufamba m'magulu-magulu mbamumanga misasa m'thando yatchetcha ya Arabia," 
Isaiah21:14 dzani na madzi dzapasa anyakuva nyota; imwe anyakukhala ku Tema, dzani na pyakudya dzapasa anyakuthawa kwawo." 
Isaiah21:15 Iwo akuthawa talasada yakusololeka, akuthawa mauta akukungika, pontho mbebe wa nkhondo yakugoswa." 
Isaiah21:16 MBUYA akulonga kuna ine kuti, “Kwasala chaka chibodzi ninga nyaganyo kulengesa ndzidzi wa kumala kwa ganyo yache, chilemedzo chonsene cha anthu a ku Kedara chinamaliratu." 
Isaiah21:17 Anyakusalira na moyo pakati pa amuna akukhala na mauta, anyankhondo amphamvu a ku Kedara ale anakhala akuchepa. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele.”" 
Isaiah22:1 Izi ndi mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu zakulonga pya Phedi ya Masomphenya: Chinakunensani ninji, kuti monsene muchite kukwira pansoyi za nyumba?" 
Isaiah22:2 Mumzinda monsene muna uviya-viya, mzinda wa chimpiningu na kuzunguzika? Anthu adafa ale hadaphiwe na talasada, penu kufa kunkhondo tayu." 
Isaiah22:3 Akadamu anu onsene amala thawa pabodzi pene; iwo amala phatwa okhonda phatisa basa na uta ene. Onsene mudaphatwa ale mudakwatwa unyaperezo pabodzi pene, kuthawa pyawo na bepe mwenemo anyamalwa ali pyawo kutali nawo." 
Isaiah22:4 Natenepo ine ndidalonga kuti, “Bulukani pamaso panga; ndilekeni ndilire pyanga mwakusisima. Lekani yesera kundithondoza thangwi ya kuvungika kwa anthu angaku.”" 
Isaiah22:5 Mbuya, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ana nsiku yache inafuna iye dzakunda pontho kudzudzumisa m'Phedi ya Masomphenya, nsiku inafuna iye dzagomola mpanda, pontho dzatairira mapiri chiliro chakufuna chiphedzo." 
Isaiah22:6 Anyakupakira akavalo pabodzi pene na anyakufambisa pingolo a ku Elamu adadza na mauta pontho matswimo; anyankhondo a ku Kiri adachinjika pyakugedera matswimo pyawo. 
Isaiah22:7 Maphedi ako adidiletu amala dzala na pingolo; anyakupakira akavalo amala khala m'mbuto zawo m'misuwo ya mzinda; 
Isaiah22:8 anyamphamvu onsene a Yuda amala khutchwa mano. Pansiku yeneyo imwe mudayang'ana pida pya nkhondo pile pikhali m'Chinyumba cha Msitu; 
Isaiah22:9 imwe mudaona kuti mpanda wa mzinda wa Davite ukhali na mwakugumuka muzinji mwene; imwe mudakoya madzi pathawale ya kuphedi. 
Isaiah22:10 Imwe mudalengesa nyumba mu Yerusalemu mbamugwisa nyumba, towera mumange pontho mpanda wakuwanga." 
Isaiah22:11 Imwe mudamanga thawale pakati pa mafufu mawiri kukoyeramo madzi akubulukira kuthawale yakale, kwache imwe nee mudayang'ane kuna Mulungu adaimanga ule tayu, penu kutsalakana pya ule adasasanyiratu pya kumangwa kwa thawaleyo tayu." 
Isaiah22:12 Mbuya, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene adakuchemerani nsiku yeneyo kuti mulire na kukalala, kuchinga tsisi yanu pontho kuvala masakha." 
Isaiah22:13 Mbwenye m'mbuto mwache imwe mudakomerwa na kusekera, mudapha ng'ombe na mabira, mudadya nyama na kumwa vinyu! Imwe mudalonga kuti, “Mbatidyeni pyathu na kumwa pyathu, podi mangwana tinafa!”" 
Isaiah22:14 Mbuya, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene atchulula penepi m'khutu mwanga mbati, “Kudawa kweneku nkhabe dzalekererwa tayu mpakana nsiku yakufa kwako. Ndalonga ndine Mbuya, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene.”" 
Isaiah22:15 Mafala awa ndiye alonga Mbuya, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene: “Ndoko kalonge kuna nyakuyang'anira, kuna Shebina, mkadamu wa kunyumba yachifumu:" 
Isaiah22:16 Ninji chinachita iwe pano, pontho mbani akupasa utongi kuti usasanye masiye ako ene pano, kusema masiye paphiri kusasanya mbuto yako yakupumirapo m'mwala?" 
Isaiah22:17 “Chita mphole MBUYA ali chifupi kukumbalakanya kuti akuponye mwamphamvu, iwe munthu wamphamvu zache." 
Isaiah22:18 Iye anakukanya-kanya ninga mpira mbakuponyera m'dziko ikulu. Kweneko iwe unafa pontho kweneko pingolo pyako pyakubalika pinasalira, iwe munthu wakuchitisa manyadzo kunyumba ya mbuyako!" 
Isaiah22:19 Ine ndinakubulusa pampando wako wa ukadamu, mbandikupokosera chidzo chako." 
Isaiah22:20 “Pansiku yeneyo ndinachemeresa nyabasanga Eliakimu mwana Hilikia. 
Isaiah22:21 Ine ndinamvazika mkhanjo wako mbandimmanga na mcheka wako m'chuno mwache, pontho ndinapereka utongi wako kuna iye. Iye anakhala baba wa anthu anyakukhala mu Yerusalemu, pontho kuna banja ya Yuda." 
Isaiah22:22 Pamapewa pache ndinaikhapo mfungulo wa utongi wa banja ya Davite; panafungula iye nkhabe na mbodzi ene anakwanisa kufungapo tayu, pontho panafunga iye nkhabe na mbodzi ene anakwanisa kufungulapo tayu." 
Isaiah22:23 Ine ndinamchitisa kukhazikika ninga ntchiri pa chidzo chache; iye anakhala ninga mpando wachilemedzo kuna banja ya babache. 
Isaiah22:24 Mbwenye anache na pidzukulu pya pa banjache anakhala mitolo yakulemera pana iye. Iye anakhala ninga mphanda yakumanikwa pyombo pyonsene kutomera ndilo mpakana milinga. 
Isaiah22:25 “Pansiku yeneyo mphanda idakhomwa mwamphamvu ile inatekenyeka mbidzagwa, tenepo pyombo pyamanikwa mwenemopyo pinagwambo pansi. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene.”" 
Isaiah23:1 Izi ndi mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu zakulonga pya Turo: Lirani imwe anyakufambisa miyadiya ya ku Tarisisi! Thangwi Turo avungwa mbakhonda siyirwa na nyumba ene penu na gombe ene. Kubulukira kudziko ya Kipro kwadza mphangwa kuna iwo. 
Isaiah23:2 Matamani, imwe anyamntchuwa pontho imwe anyamalonda a ku Sidoni ale mwafuma na maulendo anu a pabara." 
Isaiah23:3 Kugwanda na pabara iwo adadza na tirigu wa ku Shihori, pontho pyakuvuna pya ku Nailo, imwe mudasanduka msika wa madzinza azinji ene." 
Isaiah23:4 Chita manyadzo iwe, Sidoni, mzinda wakutchingwa na mpanda m'khundu-khundu mwa bara ule, thangwi bara yabulusa fala kuti: “Ine chipo sidave mtswotswo wakubala, penu kubala mwana tayu; chipo ine sidalele ana achimuna, penu kukuzambo ana achikazi tayu.”" 
Isaiah23:5 Mphangwa zingadza ku Iguputo, iwo anatutumuka na kuchita mantha thangwi ya pinava iwo pya Turo." 
Isaiah23:6 Wambukirani ku Tarisisi; lirani, imwe anyamntchuwa." 
Isaiah23:7 Ayi wenewu ndiye mzindanu wakuveka ule, mzinda wamvula zakale, ule manyalo ache amuendesa kakhazikika kudziko yakutali?" 
Isaiah23:8 Mbani adasasanya kuti penepi pigwere Turo, mzinda wakupereka chilemedzo kuna anthu, ule anyamalondache mbana mafumu, pontho mbakuveka pyakwanga padziko yonsene yapansi?" 
Isaiah23:9 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndiye adapisasanya, kumalisa kunyada kwa demelero ya onsene, pontho kululupisa anyakulemedzwa onsene padziko yonsene yapansi." 
Isaiah23:10 Mubalalikane m'dziko mwanu ninga mkulo wa Nailo, imwe anthu a ku Tarisisi, thangwi imwe nkhabe dzakhalave na gombe kuchitira malonda tayu." 
Isaiah23:11 MBUYA ayambasa mkono wache pabara mbachitisa maufumu kutetemera na mantha. Iye apereka matongero akulonga pya Fonike kuti mizindache yakutchingwa na mpanda imale vungwa. 
Isaiah23:12 Iye akulonga kuti, “Nkhabe dzakomerwave tayu, imwe anthu a ku Sidoni, chinchino munakhala pampani-pani! “Wambukirani ku Kipro; podi na kweneko kwene imwe nkhabe dzagumanako kupuma tayu.”" 
Isaiah23:13 Yang'anani dziko ya Babiloni, anthu ache chinchino nkhabeve basa tayu! Anthu a ku Asiria asandusa dzikoyo kukhala mbuto ya nyama za m'tsanga; iwo adamanga nsanja za nkhondo, mbagomola mizindache yakutchingwa na mpanda pontho kuisandusa kukhala madembe." 
Isaiah23:14 Lirani, imwe anyakufambisa miyadiya ya ku Tarisisi thangwi mzindanu wakutchingwa na mpanda wamala vungwa!" 
Isaiah23:15 Pandzidzi wenewo Turo anaduwalirwa pyaka makumanomwe, ndzidzi wakukhala mfumu na moyo. Mbwenye pakumala pyaka makumanomwe, pinthu pinachitika kuna Turo ninga montho mudaimbira nyimbo yakulonga pya puta kuti:" 
Isaiah23:16 “Thukula nyakatangale wako mbuzungulire mumzinda, iwe puta wakuduwalika; imba nyakatangale wako mwadidi, imba nyimbo zizinji zene, towera anthu akukumbukembo.”" 
Isaiah23:17 Pakumala pyaka makumanomwe, MBUYA anachita pinthu kuna Turo. Mzindawo unabwerera kubasache yakale mbukhala ninga puta kuchita malondache na maufumu onsene a dziko yapansi." 
Isaiah23:18 Kwache pinthu pimbaganyali iye kubulukira kumalondache pinapambulirwa kuna MBUYA; iye nkhabe dzaumirwa napyo, penu kupikoya kwene tayu, mbwenye anapipereka kuna anyakupembedza MBUYA kuti agulire pyakudya pizinji pontho nguwo zakubalika." 
Isaiah24:1 Yang'anani, MBUYA anavunga dziko yapansi mbaisandusa thando yatchetcha; anaisakaza mbabalalisa anyakukhala mwenemowo." 
Isaiah24:2 Pinakhala chibodzi-bodzi kuna anyansembe na kuna anthu, ambuya na kuna mabitchu, ambuya achikazi na kuna mabitchu achikazi, anyakugulisa na kuna anyakugula, anyakubwereka na kuna anyakubwerekesa, anyamangawa na kuna anyakufiyalisa." 
Isaiah24:3 Dziko yapansi inavungikiratu monsene mwene mbidzamala pokoserwa pinthu pyache pyonsene. MBUYA ndiye alonga mafala enewa. 
Isaiah24:4 Dziko yapansi ikuuma na kuunyala; dziko yonsene ili panyatwa zikulu; thambo na dziko yapansi pinamala. 
Isaiah24:5 Dziko yapansi yamala ipiswa na anthu ache; iwo akhonda kuvera matongero mbaswa mwambo pontho na chiverano chokhonda mala chile. 
Isaiah24:6 Natenepo dziko yapansi ina dzedze; anthu ache akusanyika thangwi ya kudawa kwawo. Ndi thangwi yache anthu a padziko yapansi akupiswa moto, tenepo anyakusalira na moyo ngakuchepa pyakwanga." 
Isaiah24:7 Mfesa zikududumuka pontho vinyu akusowa; munthu onsene ule akhakomerwa, lero akubulira." 
Isaiah24:8 Kulira kwadidi kwa pisekese kuli lukutu noo, kusokosa kwa anthu akukomerwa, lero wamala, pontho anyakatangale akulira mwadidi ale ali ngwindi." 
Isaiah24:9 Kumwa vinyu na nkhetekete pyamala; bwadwa ngwakujuja kuna anyakuumwa. 
Isaiah24:10 Mzinda wakuzunguzika wasala madongolomwa ene basi; msuwo panyumba yonsene wamala piringidzwa mwakuti nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene anakwanisa kupitamo. 
Isaiah24:11 M'misewu iwo akulira vinyu; kukomerwa konsene kwasanduka kulira, kusekera nkhabemove tayu m'dziko yapansi." 
Isaiah24:12 Mzinda wasala madembe, misuwo yache yamala gwandwa-gwandwa." 
Isaiah24:13 Penepi ndiye pinafuna dzachitika kuna dziko yapansi pakati pa madzinza, ninga mumbachitirwa muti waolivi kugubudzwa, pontho ninga kumala kwa kutchola nsapo zamfesa." 
Isaiah24:14 Iwo akugaluza fala, akukhuwa thangwi ya kukomerwa; kubulukira kumadokero dzuwa, iwo akukuza ufumu wa MBUYA." 
Isaiah24:15 Natenepo imwe anthu akumabulukiro dzuwa pontho imwe anyamgombe perekani demelero, kuna MBUYA; kuzani dzina ya MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele." 
Isaiah24:16 Kubulukira kumadolomero a dziko yapansi tikuva kuimba kuti, “Demelero kuna Nyakulungama.” Kwache ine ndikulonga kuti, “Ndamaliratu, ndamaliratu pyanga! Dzedze kuna ine! Mphandu zikusandukira! Na upandu mapanga akusandukira!”" 
Isaiah24:17 Pyakugoswa, mulindi na msampha pikukudikhirani, imwe anthu a padziko yapansi." 
Isaiah24:18 Munthu onsene wakuthawa pyakugoswapyo anagwera m'dzenje; munthu onsene wakubuluka m'dzenjemo anakweshwa na msampha. Misuwo ya madzi makulu kudzulu yamala baulwa, maziko a dziko yapansi akutekenyeka." 
Isaiah24:19 Dziko yapansi yamala panduka-panduka, dziko yapansi yamala didimuka monsene mwene, pontho ikutekenyeka pyakwanga pene." 
Isaiah24:20 Dziko yapansi ikudzedzereka ninga nyakuledzera, ikubwanyuka ninga khumbi kubwanyuka na mphepo; iyo yalemerwa pyakwanga na pyakudawa pya anyakupandukira mwakuti ikugwa, mbichimwana kulamuka pontho." 
Isaiah24:21 Pansiku yeneyo MBUYA anatchunyusa anyamphamvu onsene a kudzulu, pontho mafumu onsene a pansi pano." 
Isaiah24:22 Iwo anagumanyiswa pabodzi pene, ninga anyaperezo akuponywa m'dzenje; iwo anafungirwa m'kadyaboso mbatchunyuswa pangagwanda nsiku zizinji zene." 
Isaiah24:23 Mwezi unanyala, dzuwambo inachita manyadzo; thangwi MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene anatonga paphiri ya Zioni na mu Yerusalemu, mbaonesa demelero yache pamaso pa akulu-akulu a anthu ache." 
Isaiah25:1 Ande, MBUYA, imwe ndimwe Mulungu wanga; ine ndinakulemedzani mbandikuza dzinanu, thangwi imwe mwachita pinthu mwakukhulupirika pontho mwakudodomesa, pinthu pidasasanya imwe kale ene kupichita pile." 
Isaiah25:2 Imwe mwasandusa mzinda kukhala mulu wa madongolomwa, mzinda wakutchingwa na mpanda kukhala madembe, mwasandusa nyumba za anyamalwathu kuti zileke khalapove; iyo nkhabe dzamangwa pontho tayu." 
Isaiah25:3 Na thangwi yeneyi anthu amphamvu zawo anakulemedzani; mizinda ya anthu aukali inakugopani. 
Isaiah25:4 Imwe ndimwe pakubisala pa anyakutcherenga, pakubisala pa anthu akusowaletu pakuphata ndzidzi wa nyatwa, mthunzi wawo kuatchinjiriza kuna chonzi, pontho nsanja kuna mkatu-katu wa dzuwa. Thangwi muya wa anthu aukali wakhala ninga chonzi, chakumenya fufu," 
Isaiah25:5 pontho ninga mbebe wa tchetcha m'thando. Imwe mumbambombowesa chimpiningu cha anyamalwathu; ninga chigudu-gudu kumbombowesa kupisa kwa dzuwa, sasawambo imwe mumbamatamisa nyimbo ya anyakukala mtima." 
Isaiah25:6 Paphiri yeneyi MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene anasasanyira anthu onsene udyi ukulu, phwando ya vinyu wadidiletu, phwando ya nyama yakununa pontho vinyu wakudzipa." 
Isaiah25:7 Paphiri yeneyi iye anabulusa pyakutsukwalisa pile pimbaphimbira anthu onsene chinguwo chile chimbampsampsira anthu a madzinza onsene; 
Isaiah25:8 iye anabulusa imfa kwenda na kwenda. MBUYA Mulungu anapukuta misozi m'maso monsene; iye anakunundula manyadzo a anthu ache padziko yonsene yapansi. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA. 
Isaiah25:9 Pansiku yeneyo iwo analonga kuti, “Ndimomwene iye ndi Mulungu wathu; ife tidamnyindira, tenepo iye adatipulumusa. Iyeyu ndi MBUYA, ife tidamnyindira; tenepo mbatikomerweni na kusekera thangwi ya kutipulumusa kwache.”" 
Isaiah25:10 Mkono wa MBUYA unakhala pana phiri yeneyi; mbwenye Moabu anapondedzwa pansi pa manyalo pache ninga mumbapondedzwerwa maudzu m'dzenje kuti avunde. 
Isaiah25:11 M'dzenjemo iwo anadadamira kufuna kubulukamo ninga mumbachitira nyakusambirira, mbwenye Mulungu anamalisa kudungudza kwawo nee kuwerengera kuchenjera kwachita manjawo kule tayu." 
Isaiah25:12 Iye anagwisa mipandawo yakulapha yakuzungulira mizindawo kuigwisiratu phaphathike; iye anaigwisira pansi pa fumbiletu. 
Isaiah26:1 Pansiku yeneyo nyimbo ishi inaimbwa m'dziko ya Yuda: Ife tina mzinda wamphamvu; Mulungu ambautchinjiriza na mpanda wa mafufu amphamvu. 
Isaiah26:2 Fungulani misuwo towera dzinza yakulungama ipite, dzinza yakukhulupirika." 
Isaiah26:3 Imwe mumbapasa mtendere chadi-chadi kuna munthu ule ali nganganga pana imwe, thangwi ambanyindira muna imwe." 
Isaiah26:4 Nyindirani MBUYA kwenda na kwenda, thangwi MBUYA Mulungu ndi Phanzwi yakukhala na kukhala." 
Isaiah26:5 Iye ambachepesa anyakugaya, mbavunga mzinda wamphamvuwo; iye amala kuugomola mbaumwalaza mpakana fumbi." 
Isaiah26:6 Manyalo akuupondedza-pondedza, manyalo a anyakuponderezwa, mphondero ya anyakutcherenga." 
Isaiah26:7 Njira ya anyakulungama yamala ndendemezwa; ande, imwe Nyakulungama, mumbamwalaza njira ya anyakulungama." 
Isaiah26:8 Ande, MBUYA, ife timbafamba na njira ya matongero anu, ife timbanyindira imwepo; mtimathu onsene umbatchuwa kulemedza dzinanu." 
Isaiah26:9 Mtimanga umbatchuwa imwepo na mosiku; na machibese moyo wanga umbakufunani pyakwanga pene. Ndzidzi wanu ungakwana wakutonga dziko yapansi, anthu a padziko yapansi ambadziwa kuchita chilungamo." 
Isaiah26:10 Podi kwene kuti anyakudawika ambakomerwa mtima, iwo nkhabe dziwa kuchita pyakulungama tayu; podi kwene kuti akhale pyawo m'dziko ya anyakulungama, iwo ambathimiza kuchita pyakuipa basi, mbakhonda tsalakana pya ufumu wa MBUYA." 
Isaiah26:11 MBUYA, imwe mwawizula mkono wanu m'dzulu kwache iwo nkhabe kuuona tayu. Alekeni aone phinga ina imwe pana anthu anu, iwo mbachite manyadzo; moto udakoyera imwe anyamalwanu ule mbuapise." 
Isaiah26:12 MBUYA imwe mumbatipasa mtendere; pinthu pyonsene pyakwanisa ife kupichitapi mwatichitira ndimwepo. 
Isaiah26:13 Ande, MBUYA, Mulungu wathu, podi kwene kuti tikhale pyathu pansi pa atongi anango, kwache dzinanu ene basi ndiye imbalemedza ife." 
Isaiah26:14 Iwo amala kufa, pontho nkhabekove kunja kuno tayu; adefuntu ale nkhabe dzabwerera pontho tayu. Imwe mudaatchunyusa mbamuachitisa kuvungika; iwo nkhabe dzakumbukwave tayu." 
Isaiah26:15 Imwe, MBUYA, mwakuza dzinzathu. Imwe mwakulisa dzinzathu mbamupipasa mwekha ene demelero; imwe mwakulisa madire onsene a dziko." 
Isaiah26:16 MBUYA, iwo adadza kuna imwe mbali khuma-khuma; ndzidzi udaatchunyusa imwe, iwo adapemphera kuna imwe." 
Isaiah26:17 Ninga mkazi wamimba pakubala ambabzongonyoka-bzongonyoka na kulira thangwi ya mtswotswo, sasawa ife tikhali tenepombo pamaso panu, MBUYA." 
Isaiah26:18 Ife tidava mtswotswo mbatisanyika ninga mkazi wamimba kwache ife sidabale munthu na mbodzi ene tayu. Ife sidadzese tayu chipulumuso padziko yapansi pano, pontho sidabale munthu na mbodzi ene kukhala m'dziko yapansi tayu." 
Isaiah26:19 Kwache anyakufanu ale anakhala pontho na moyo; mitembo yawo inalamuka pontho. Imwe ale muli m'mataka lamukani mbamukhuwe thangwi ya kukomerwa. Ninga bume kusisimusa maudzu kumachibese, sasawambo imwe MBUYA munalamusa anyakufa." 
Isaiah26:20 Ndokoni anthu anga, pitani m'masubi mwanu mbamufunge misuwo; pibiseni mwekha ene ndzidzi pang'ono ene basi kufikirana ukali wa MBUYA umale." 
Isaiah26:21 Yang'anani, MBUYA akubuluka kumbuto kwache kudzatchunyusa anthu a padziko yapansi thangwi ya pyakudawa pyawo. Dziko yapansi inabulusa pakwecha chiropa chidachuchiswa pana iyo; iyo nkhabeve dzabisa anyakuphiwa mwenemo ale tayu." 
Isaiah27:1 Pansiku yeneyo MBUYA anatchunyusa, na talasadache yakugoswa, ikulu pontho yamphamvu ile, Leviatani chinyoka chakufamba mwakubzongonyoka-bzongonyoka, pontho chakupiringidzika-piringidzika chile, iye anati aphe nyangume ule." 
Isaiah27:2 Pansiku yeneyo MBUYA anaimba pya mundache wamfesa wakubala nsapo kuti: 
Isaiah27:3 “Ine MBUYA ndine nyakuyang'anira mundawu; ine nkhabe leka kuuthirira madzi tayu. Ine ndimbaulondali mosiku na masikati ene, towera paleke khala na mbodzi ene wakuuvunga." 
Isaiah27:4 Ine nkhabe zhangali napyo tayu. Ngakhala mwenemo mukhali ntcheswa na nyakhanche kundidzudzumisa, ine mbidathimbana napyo; ine mbidapidumika moto pyonsenepyo." 
Isaiah27:5 Mbwenye ngakhala anyamalwanga anafuna pyakudza kuna ine dzabisala; apangeni kuti afune pyamtendere, ande, apangeni achite nane chiverano cha mtendere.”" 
Isaiah27:6 Nsiku zinadzazo Yakobo anamera mitsitsi, Israele anaphwitha mbachita maluwa, pontho anadzaza dziko yonsene yapansi na nsapo." 
Isaiah27:7 Ayi MBUYA aating'inda ninga mudating'indira iye anyamalwa a Aisraele mule? Ayi Aisraele aphiwa ninga montho mudapherwa anthu adaaphambo ale? 
Isaiah27:8 MBUYA adaatchunyusa mbaatumiza kudziko ya unyaperezo; iye adaapisa na muya wa ukali wache, ninga mumbakhalira ipyo pansiku imbadima mphepo yakumabulukiro dzuwa." 
Isaiah27:9 Na thangwi ya penepi pyakudawa pya Yakobo pinalekererwa, pontho kunakhala kubulusa chadi-chadi pyakudawa pyache: iye angamala kuswa miyala yonsene ya maguwa ansembe khala ninga miyala ya ntoto kumala peyiwa, nkhabe adzimunthu a milungu Ashera, penu maguwa akufukizirapo pyakununkhira anasiyiwa tayu." 
Isaiah27:10 Mzinda wakutchingwa na mpanda wasanduka madembe, mbuto yakusowa anthu yakusala yokha ninga thando yatchetcha; kweneko anamphulu ambagwedulako, mbagona pyawo tambzala, pontho kukhwadzula-khwadzula nthambi zache." 
Isaiah27:11 Nthambi za mitiyo zingauma, izo zimbatcholwa pontho akazi ambadza dzazilokota nkhuni. Thangwi enewa mbanthu okhonda vesa pinthu; tenepo Nyakuasasanya nkhabe kuavera nsisi tayu, pontho Nyakualenga nkhabe kuakomera mtima tayu." 
Isaiah27:12 Pansiku yeneyo MBUYA anabubuda dziko ninga mapira kubulukira kumkulo wa Yufurate mpakana kumadire a Iguputo kugumanyisa imwe, Aisraele, mbodzi na mbodzi." 
Isaiah27:13 Pansiku yeneyo ngoma inalizwa. Ale akhadatayika ku Asiria, pontho ale akhali pa unyaperezo ku Iguputo anabwera mbapembedza MBUYA paphiri yakupambulika mu Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah28:1 Dzedze kuna ufumu wakutumbama, madombe a ku Eferemu, kuna demelero yache, ile imbasuluka ninga maluwa, mzinda ule uli panthunda ya phedi ya mataka akubalisa pinthu; dzedze kuna mzinda wakulunkuma pontho kuna anthu akuledzera vinyu ale!" 
Isaiah28:2 Yang'anani, Mbuya ana unango ule ngwamphamvu pontho wamboko zache. Iye, ule akhala ninga matalala pontho chonzi chakugoswa, ule akhala ninga madzi makulu akukukulula pinthu pyonsene, anaataya mwashungu kumaphedi." 
Isaiah28:3 Kudungudza kwa akadamu, madombe a ku Eferemu ale, kunati kupondedzwe pansi." 
Isaiah28:4 Mzinda ule demelero yache imbasuluka ninga maluwa ile, ule uli panthunda ya phedi ya mataka akubalisa pinthu unakhala ninga nkhuyu yakutokota ndzidzi wache mbudzati kwana; sindzidzi munthu unango nkhuiona ambatchola mbaithabiraletu." 
Isaiah28:5 Pansiku yeneyo MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene anakhala ninga chipewu chademelero chachifumu, ninga kamdedzi wakubalika kuna anthu ache akusalira ale." 
Isaiah28:6 Iye anakhala na mzimu wa chilungamo kuna iye nyakukhala pampando wakutongera miseru, iye anakhala mphamvu kuna ale ambamenya nkhondo na anyamalwa pamisuwo ya mzinda." 
Isaiah28:7 Enewambo akudzedzereka thangwi ya vinyu pontho akugwa mbamalamuka thangwi ya pyakumwa pyaukali: Anyansembe na maprofeti akudzedzereka thangwi ya bwadwa, pontho onsenene amala ledzera vinyu; iwo akugwa mbalamuka nawo bwadwa, iwo akudzedzereka thangwi ya mayezi-yezi, iwo akugwegweduka nayo miseru ya anthu." 
Isaiah28:8 Pamathebulu pawo padzala na matapiko; pyakunyansa pili ponsene pene. 
Isaiah28:9 Iwo akulonga kuti, “Mbani anayesa iye kufunzisa? Mbani munthu wache anapanga iye mphangwa zachezo? Ayi kuna akachiya akulekeswa kuyamwa, kuna ana ale alekeswa kwene bele?" 
Isaiah28:10 Iye akuyesa kutifunzisa pang'ono-pang'ono, chilemba na chilemba, mzera na mzera, chifunziso na chifunziso.”" 
Isaiah28:11 Ndimomwene Mulungu analonga kuna anthu enewa kudzera muna anthu akudza pyawo pontho anthu a chilongero chachilendo," 
Isaiah28:12 kuna anthu adalonga na iye ale kuti, “Mbuto ishi njakupumirapo; anyakutopa alekeni apume; ino ndi mbuto yakuwoserapo dzuwa,” kwache iwo hadavesere tayu." 
Isaiah28:13 Ndi thangwi yache MBUYA anakufunzisani pang'ono-pang'ono chilemba na chilemba, mzera na mzera; chifunziso na chifunziso. Penepo munagwa panjira panu kukuwazika, kukweshwa na msampha mbamuphatwa." 
Isaiah28:14 Natenepo veserani mafala a MBUYA, imwe anyakusingirira, ale mumbatonga anthu a mu Yerusalemu," 
Isaiah28:15 Imwe mumbagaya kuti, “Ife tachita chiverano na imfa mbatichita chiphatizano na dziko ya anyakufa. Chonzi chakugoswa chidime tani pyacho, icho nkhabe kutichita pinthu tayu, thangwi kunama kwakhala ninga pakuthawira pathu pontho mbuto yathu yakubisalapo.”" 
Isaiah28:16 Natenepo MBUYA Mulungu akulonga kuti, “Yang'anani, ndikuikha maziko amwala mu Zioni, mwala wakutsikimizirwa, mwala wakudula wapankhomo, towera akhale maziko akukhazikika; munthu onsene ananyindirayo nkhabe dzataya mtima tayu." 
Isaiah28:17 Chilungamo ndiye chinafuna dzakhala mdida wa nkhambala, pontho ungwiro ndiye unafuna dzakhala mdida wa thabwa; matalala anatswaira kunama kule mphakuthawirapo panu, pontho madzi makulu anakukulula mbuto yanu yakubisalirapo ile." 
Isaiah28:18 Chiverano chidasasanya imwe na imfa chile chinamala; chiphatizano chanu na dziko ya anyakufa nkhabe dzaphatave basa tayu. Chonzi chakugoswa chingadima, chinakumenyani mbachikugwisani." 
Isaiah28:19 Icho chingathimiza kudima, chinakutswairani; na machibese onsene, pontho mosiku na masikati icho chinati chidzadime basi.” Anthu angavesa mphangwa zenezi, anachita mantha pyakwanga pene." 
Isaiah28:20 Talimba inachepa pyakwanga kuti mukwanise kuthathamulapo, gombezambo inachepa pyakwanga kuti mukwanise kufinika." 
Isaiah28:21 MBUYA anamenya nkhondo ninga montho mudachitira iye pa Phiri ya Perazimu, iye anazhangali ninga mudachitira iye paphedi ya Gibeoni, kuphata basache, basache yachilendo, pontho kumalisa basache, basache yakudodomesa ile." 
Isaiah28:22 Natenepo lekani kutikana kunachita imweko gopesera njema zina imwezo zinathimbiswa; Mbuya, MBUYA Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene andipanga pya nyatwa zakugoswa zinafuna dzagwera dziko yonsene zile." 
Isaiah28:23 Fungulani makutu mbamuvesere falanga; ikhani khutu kuna pinalonga inepi. 
Isaiah28:24 Nyakulima angatipula kusasanyikira kubzala mbewu, ayi iye ambathimiza kwenda mbatipula basi? Ayi iye ambaenda basi mbatipula na kukumba mataka?" 
Isaiah28:25 Apo iye angamala kusalaza mataka ayi iye hambabzala tayu safarawu, penu chitowe? Ayi iye nkhabe bzala tayu tirigu m'mizera mwache, penu barele pambuto pache? Ayi iye nkhabe bzala tayu mulumbi m'madire a munda?" 
Isaiah28:26 Mulungu wache ambampanga pontho ambamfunzisa njira yadidi. 
Isaiah28:27 Safarawu nkhabe bubudwa pambuwa tayu penu chitowe kumpondedzwa na magaleta; safarawu ambasadzulwa na manja, pontho chitowe chimbabubudwa na ndodo." 
Isaiah28:28 Mapira ambatibulwa kusasanya mkate; tenepo nkhabe munthu ambaenda mbaabubuda kwenda na kwenda tayu. Iye ambaabubuda na magaleta a chingolo chache, kwache akavalo achewo nkhabe kuapeya tayu." 
Isaiah28:29 Nzeru zonsenezi zimbabulukira kuna MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, nyakudziwa kupereka uphungu, pontho mwenechiroache nzeru." 
Isaiah29:1 Dzedze kuna iwe Yerusalemu, mbuto ya guwa yansembe ya Mulungu ile, mzinda mudakhazikika Davite ule! Chaka na chaka wathimiza kusekera maphwando ako achipembedzo," 
Isaiah29:2 kwache ine ndinachita nkhondo na mzindawo, ule umbachemerwa “Guwa yansembe ya Mulungu.” Panakhala kusintili na kukalala pinapisa ine mzindawo ninga nsembe paguwa." 
Isaiah29:3 Ine ndinakuzungulira na anyankhondo anga, mbandimanga nsanja zankhondo kukuzungulira, pontho kusasanya pyakugomolera mpandako." 
Isaiah29:4 Uku watchithiswa pansi, unalonga pansipo; falako inavekera m'mataka, falako inaluthuka pansipo ninga mzukwa, falako inavekera chapansipansi kubulukira m'mataka." 
Isaiah29:5 Kwache anyamalwako azinji ale, anasanduka ninga fumbi, magulu a anyankhondo avinga ale, anasanduka dzungu yakumbuluka na mphepo. Kabodzi kene pontho mwakututumusa" 
Isaiah29:6 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene anabwera na chiphaliwali pontho chiteke-teke pontho na dungu ikulu, na chonzi na chivumbulu pontho na malulume a moto wakuvunga." 
Isaiah29:7 Magulu a anyankhondo a madzinza onsene anamenyana na Yerusalemu, ale ambamsosa mbagwisa mpandache mbamanga msasa kumzungulira, anakhala ninga akulota, pontho ninga akuona masomphenya na mosiku." 
Isaiah29:8 Ninga mumbachitira munthu wa njala kulota akudya, kwache iye angatutumuka njalache ile ambaiva basi; ninga mumbachitira munthu wanyota kulota akumwa, kwache iye angatutumuka, kukhosi kwache kumbakhala kakata basi. Pinakhalambo tenepo kuna magulu a anyankhondo a madzinza onsene, ambamenyana na anthu a paphiri ya Zioni ale." 
Isaiah29:9 Dodomani pontho dzudzumikani, piphopheni kunkhope mbamusanduke maboli-boli; ledzerani, kwache okhonda kumwa na vinyu ene, dzedzerekani, kwache okhonda kumwa na bwadwa ene." 
Isaiah29:10 MBUYA akuchitisani kugona chitulo chakufa nacho: Iye amyedera maso anu, imwe maprofeti; iye apha misolo yanu, imwe anyakulotera pya m'tsogolo." 
Isaiah29:11 Thangwi kuna imwe masomphenya enewa si pinthu tayu mbwenye mafala kumyederwa mumpukutu. Tenepo ngakhala munapasa mpukutuwu munthu unango ule anakwanisa kuuwerenga mbamulonga kuna iye kuti, “Ndaphata miyendo, werenga mpukutuwu,” iye anatawira kuti, “Ine sinakwanisa tayu, thangwi wamyederwa.”" 
Isaiah29:12 Penu ngakhala munaupasa munthu unango pontho ule hanakwanisa kuuwerenga tayu mbamulonga kuti, “Ndaphata miyendo, werenga mpukutuwu,” iye anatawira kuti, “Ine nkhabe dziwa kuwerenga tayu.”" 
Isaiah29:13 Mbuya akulonga kuti, “Anthu enewa akudza chifupi na ine na mulomo wawo mbandilemedza na m'kanwa mwawo, mbwenye mitimawo ili kutaliletu na ine. Kundipembedza kwawo nkhuteweza kwene matongero basi ambafunziswa na anthu ale." 
Isaiah29:14 Natenepo kachiwiri kache ine ndinati ndidzudzumise anthu enewa na chakudodomesa pa chakudodomesa. Anthu anzeru, nzeru zawo zinaamalira, udziwisi wa anyaudziwisi unati umale kwenda.”" 
Isaiah29:15 Dzedze kuna anyakubisira MBUYA pinthu pidasasanya iwo kuchita pile, ale ambachita pinthu pyawo mumdima mbalonga okha ene mbati, “Mbani anationa? Anafuna kupidziwa mbani?”" 
Isaiah29:16 Imwe mumbazunguza pinthu. Ayi chakufunika ntchipi, nyakuumba pyombo penu dongo? Ayi chinthu chakuumbwacho chingapange nyakuchiumbayo kuti, “Hadandiumbe si iye tayu?” Ayi chitomba chingalonge kuna nyakuchiumba kuti, “Iwe nkhabe dziwa chinachita iwe?”" 
Isaiah29:17 Pangagwanda kwene ndzidzi wakuchepa, msitu wa Lebanoni unasanduka munda wa mataka akubalisa pinthu, pontho minda ya mataka akubalisa pinthu inasanduka msitu." 
Isaiah29:18 Pansiku yeneyo madodo anati ave mafala a mumpukutu, pontho kubulukira mumdima wa ndiwe ani maso a maboli-boli anati aone." 
Isaiah29:19 Kachiwiri kache anyakupichepesa anati asekere thangwi ya MBUYA; anyakusowa anati asekere, thangwi ya Nyakuchena wa Israele." 
Isaiah29:20 Anthu avinga nkhabe dzaonekave tayu, anyakusingirira anamaliratu, alembo ana njala kuchita pyakuipa anamala vungwa." 
Isaiah29:21 Mulungu anatchunyusa ale ambapambizira anzawo, pontho ale ambapotoza chilungamo pamiseru. Iye anatchunyusa pontho anyakupereka umboni wakunama, towera anyakukhonda dawa aleke tongwa mwachilungamo." 
Isaiah29:22 Natenepo MBUYA adaombola Abrahamu ule, akulonga tenepa kuna pidzukulu pya Yakobo: “Yakobo, anthu anga, nkhabe dzachitiswave manyadzo tayu, nkhope zawo nkhabe dzatotave na manyadzo tayu." 
Isaiah29:23 Iwo angaona pakati pawo anawo, basa ya manjanga, anachitisa dzinanga kukhala yakuchena; iwo anatawira kuti ine ndine Nyakuchena wa Yakobo; iwo anandilemedza mbandigopa, ine Mulungu wa Israele." 
Isaiah29:24 Mapupwe anasanduka anyakuvesa pinthu; anyakudungunyirambo anatawira kufunziswa.” 
Isaiah30:1 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Dzedze kuna anthu akupandukira, dzedze kuna anyakusasanya kuchita pinthu, pile nee pidabulukire kuna ine tayu, kusasanya chiphatizano okhokha pyawo nee na kufuna kwanga tayu, kupimulukira okha ene pyakudawa." 
Isaiah30:2 Iwo ambaenda kudziko ya Iguputo mbakhonda chakutoma vunza nzeru kuna ine pano; iwo ambapempha chiphedzo kuna mfumu wa Iguputo kuti Iguputo akhale pakubisala pawo. 
Isaiah30:3 Mbwenye kuatchinjiriza kwa mfumu wa Iguputo kunakhala kwakuchitisa manyadzo kuna imwe, mthunzi wa Iguputo unakusiyani padzuwa nyimwa." 
Isaiah30:4 Podi kwene kuti iwo ana mathubu mu Zoani, pontho kuti aimiriri awo afika kale ku Hanesi," 
Isaiah30:5 munthu onsene wa ku Yuda anachitiswa manyadzo, thangwi ya mtundu wa anthu akusowa basa kuna iwo, ale nkhabe dzesa nee chiphedzo penu udidi tayu, mbwenye kudzesa kwene manyadzo na kululupiswa basi.”" 
Isaiah30:6 Izi ndi mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu zakulonga pya nyama za m'thando yatchetcha ya Negebu: Aimiriri a dziko akugwanda na m'dziko ya nyatwa, pontho ya anthu akusanyika; mule muna nkhalamu zimuna na zikazi, pipiri na nyoka zakumbuluka, uku athukula mfuma zawo kumsana kwa mabulu, pinthu pyawo kumsana kwa ngamila zawo kwenda kuna anthu okhonda kuaganyalisa," 
Isaiah30:7 kwenda ku Iguputo kule chiphedzo chache nkhabe basa na pang'ono pene tayu. Natenepo ndidamthula Rahabi, nyangume wakulebwedeka." 
Isaiah30:8 Mulungu adandipanga kuti ndilembe penepi pamwala wakuchita kusema, kuti ndilembe penepi mumpukutu, towera nsiku zinadzazo pikhale umboni wakwenda na kwenda." 
Isaiah30:9 Anthu enewa mbakupandukira, ana akunama, ana okhonda sasanyika kuvesera upangizi wa MBUYA." 
Isaiah30:10 Iwo akulonga kuna anyakulotera pya m'tsogolo mbati, “Lekani kuonave masomphenya!” Mbalonga pontho kuna maprofeti mbati, “Lekani kutipangave masomphenya akuona! Tipangeni kwene pinthu pyakutikomera basi, longani mphangwa zakunama." 
Isaiah30:11 Bulukani m'njira mwathu, fedzani kutali, ife nkhabe funa kuva pontho pya Nyakuchena wa Israele ule tayu!”" 
Isaiah30:12 Natenepo Nyakuchena wa Israele akulonga kuti, “Podi imwe mwakhonda mphangwa zenezi mbamunyindira pyanu kupondereza pontho kunyindira pyanu pinthu pyakunama," 
Isaiah30:13 kuna imwe pyakudawa penepi pinasanduka ninga fufu yakulapha, yakukhala na m'nyanja pontho yakudidimuka, ile imbagwa kabodzi na kabodzi mwakututumusa." 
Isaiah30:14 Iyo inasweka ninga chitomba, chakubwededzeka mwakusowa nsisi; iyo nkhabe dzasala na dzinga ene tayu kuti munakwanisa kupalira makala a moto paguwa yansembe, penu kukupira madzi mumchera.”" 
Isaiah30:15 MBUYA Mulungu, Nyakuchena wa Israele, akulonga kuti, “Imwe mbamudabwerera kuna ine kufuna kupuma, mbamudapulumuka, imwe mbamudamatama na kundinyindira, mbamudakhala anthu a amphamvu. Kwache imwe mudakhonda kuchita tenepo." 
Isaiah30:16 Imwe mudalonga kuti, ‘Nkhabe, ife tinati tithawe pa akavalo.’ Natenepo imwe munati muthawedi! Imwe mudalonga kuti, ‘Ife tinati tipakire akavalo akumbuluka pyakwanga.’ Kwache anyakukuthamangisaniwo anambuluka pyakwanga kupiringana imwepo!" 
Isaiah30:17 Anthu chikwi chibodzi kuthuswa na munthu mbodzi ene basi; na kuthuswa na anthu ashanu monsenemwe munathawa, kufikirana mwasala ninga muti wa bandera pansonga ya phiri.”" 
Isaiah30:18 Kwache MBUYA akufuna pyakwanga kuti akukomereni mtima. Iye ngwakusasanyika kuti akuvereni nsisi, thangwi MBUYA ndi Mulungu wachilungamo. Ngakutsanzaya anthu ambaikha chidikhiro chawo pana iye ale!" 
Isaiah30:19 Imwe anthu a ku Zioni, ambakhala mu Yerusalemu ale, imwe nkhabe dzalirave tayu. Iye anakukomerani mtima pyakwanga ndzidzi unalirira imwe chiphedzo! Sindzidzi iye nkhukuvani, iye anati akutawireni." 
Isaiah30:20 Podi kwene kuti Mbuya ambakuchitisani kuona nyatwa, pontho kukuchitisani kusanyika, afunzisi anu nkhabe dzabisala tayu; imwe munati muaone na maso anu ene." 
Isaiah30:21 Ngakhala imwe munazungunukira kumadyo penu nkhumabzere, makutu anu anava fala ikulonga m'nduli mwanu kuti, “Njira njeneyi, fambani na yeneyi.”" 
Isaiah30:22 Penepo imwe munakhonda mifanikizo yanu yakukutizwa na siliva ile, pontho milungu yanu yakukukutizwa na golidi ile; imwe munaitaya ninga pinthu pyakunyansa mbamulonga kuna ipyo kuti, “Bulukani kutali na ife!”" 
Isaiah30:23 Mbuya pontho anakuvumbisirani mvula thangwi ya mbewu zanu zidabzala imwe zile, pontho phoso imbapha dziko yanu inakhala yadidi pontho yakuinjipa. Ndzidzi wenewo ng'ombe zanu zinakhala na mpovu uzinji." 
Isaiah30:24 Ng'ombe zimuna na mabulu anu pimbalima na imwe pile pinadya goche yadidiletu yakuikhwa munyu. 
Isaiah30:25 Ndzidzi wenewo panakhala kupha pikulu pene, pontho nsanja za anyamalwanu zinagwa. Mikhwawa ya madzi inafamba kubulukira pa phiri yonsene yakulapha pontho ikulu." 
Isaiah30:26 Mwezi unaonesa cheza ninga dzuwa, pontho cheza cha dzuwa chinachena kanomwe kupiringana muna iyomu, ninga cheza cha nsiku zinomwe kuchiphataniza pabodzi pene. Penepi pinachitika MBUYA angamanga pironda pya anthu ache, mbawangisa pironda pidaapasa iye pile." 
Isaiah30:27 Yang'anani, MBUYA akudza kubulukira kutali, akudza na ukali wakugaka pontho makole akukhotha ninga utsi; milomo yache yadzala na ukali, pontho lulume ikugaka moto." 
Isaiah30:28 Muyache wakhala ninga madzi makulu akufika mpakana m'khosi. Iye asefa madzinza kufuna kuavunga mbaadzudzumisa kuna pidanyerezera iwo kupichita. 
Isaiah30:29 Mbwenye imwe, anthu a Mulungu, munaimba ninga mudachitira imwe mosiku adasekera imwe phwando yakupambulika ile; mitimanu inati isekere ninga mumbachitira anthu angaenda mbaimba pitoliro paphiri ya MBUYA, Phanzwi ya Israele ule." 
Isaiah30:30 MBUYA anachitisa anthu kuva falache yachifumu, pontho kuona mkono wache ukutchitha pansi na kuzhangali kukulu pontho na moto wakunyekesa, pabodzi pene na njazi, chiphaliwali na matalala." 
Isaiah30:31 Na falache MBUYA anabalalisa anthu a ku Asiria; na ndodo yache iye anaatinthimula nayo. 
Isaiah30:32 Ndzidzi onsene unafuna MBUYA dzatinthimula anyamalwache na ndodo, panakhala kuimba nyimbo na ng'oma pontho anyakatangale, ndzidzi onsene unafuna iye dzaamenya na mashoko ache." 
Isaiah30:33 Tofeti, mbuto yakupisira pyakuipa ile, yasasanywa kale kupisa mfumu wa Asiria. Dzenje yache ya moto ili zwikoo pontho ili gabu-gabu, mwenemo ili yeri-yeri moto, pontho phamu-phamu na nkhuni; muya wa MBUYA, ule wakhala ninga nthunji ya sulufule, ndiye unafuna dzagasa moto." 
Isaiah31:1 Dzedze kuna anthu ambaenda kudziko ya Iguputo kufuna chiphedzo ale! Iwo ambanyindira akavalo awo ankhondo, kuinjipa kwa pingolo pyawo pyankhondo, pontho na mphamvu za anyakupakira akavalo. Kwache iwo nkhabe nyindira Nyakuchena wa Israele, penu kupempha MBUYA chiphedzo tayu." 
Isaiah31:2 Iye ana nzeru, tenepo anakwanisa kudzesa nyatwa. Iye nkhabe bweza moto tayu angalonga. Iye anatchunyusa anthu akuipa pontho anthu ambaphedza anyakuchita pyakuipa ale." 
Isaiah31:3 Anthu a ku Iguputo mbanthu ene pyawo, si Mulungu tayu; akavalo awo ndi nyama zene pyazo, si mizimu tayu. MBUYA angachita pinthu, dzinza ya mphamvu inasweka nyakuphedza anagwegweduka, pontho nyakuphedzwa anagwambo, tenepo onsene uwiriawo anamala vungwa." 
Isaiah31:4 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Nkhabe pinthu tayu, amakabuswa alire penu kukhuwa pyawo tani, nkhabe kwanisa kuthamangisa nkhalamu kuti ileke nyama yapha iyo kale tayu; ntchibodzi-bodzi, nkhabe na chibodzi chene chile chinakwanisa kundilekesa ine, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene kutchinjiriza phiri ya Zioni." 
Isaiah31:5 Ninga mumbachitira mbalame kumbuluka-mbuluka pachisa pache kutchinjiriza anache, sasawambo ine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndinayang'anira mwadidi na kutchinjiriza mzinda wa Yerusalemu.”" 
Isaiah31:6 MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Anthu a ku Israele imwe mwandidawira pontho mwandipokanya. Mbwenye chinchino bwererani kuna ine." 
Isaiah31:7 Ndzidzi ukudza unafuna dzataya monsenene milungu yasiliva na yagolidi, ile idasasanya imwe na manjanu akudawikawa." 
Isaiah31:8 “Aasiria anavungwa pankhondo, kwache nee na mphamvu za munthu tayu. Iwo anathawa kunkhondo, aphale awo mbakhala mabitchu." 
Isaiah31:9 Mfumu wawo anathawa thangwi ya mantha pontho mathubu anagoswerwa pyakwanga mwakuti anakhonda mabandera awo ankhondo. MBUYA alonga, MBUYA ule moto wache uli mu Zioni, ule dzenje yache ya moto ili mu Yerusalemu.”" 
Isaiah32:1 Nsiku inango panakhala mfumu wachilungamo, pontho mathubu ache anatonga na chilungamo." 
Isaiah32:2 Onsenewa anakhala ninga pakubisaliramo kugopa mphepo, pontho mbuto yakubisaliramo kugopa chonzi. Iwo anakhala ninga mikulo yakukuka m'thando yatchetcha, ninga mthunzi wa chimwala chikulu m'mbuto yakusowa madzi." 
Isaiah32:3 Maso a anthu akuona hanafungikave tayu, pontho makutu a anthu akuva anavesera." 
Isaiah32:4 Iwo nkhabeve dzakhala anthu okhonda pirira tayu, mbwenye anachita pinthu mwakupivesa, pontho lulume yawo ya chibubu inasudzuka mbilonga mwadidi pontho pyakuveka." 
Isaiah32:5 Pupwe nkhabe dzachemerwa nyakulemedzwa, penu nyakuipa kupaswa chilemedzo chikulu tayu." 
Isaiah32:6 Pupwe ambalonga pinthu pyakupupwa mbanyerezera kuchita pinthu pyakuipa. Pinthu pimbachita na pimbalonga iye mphyakutikana kuna Mulungu, pontho nkhabe pasa pyakudya anthu anjala penu kupasa pyakumwa anthu anyota tayu." 
Isaiah32:7 Nyakuipa ambachita pinthu pyakudawika; iye ambanyerezera pyakuvungiratu anyakutcherenga na pyakunama, pontho kuachitisa kukhonda khala na ufulu." 
Isaiah32:8 Mbwenye nyakulemedzwa ambasasanya pinthu pyachilemedzo, pontho na mabasa a chilemedzo iye ambaimira dzololo." 
Isaiah32:9 Imwe akazi akupolola, vani mafalanga, imwe akazi akugaya, vani pinafuna ine kulonga." 
Isaiah32:10 Chinchino imwe muli pakupata, kwache chaka chamangwana ndzidzi ninga uno, munati mukhale panyatwa; panakhala nkhabe mfesa penu nsapo tayu." 
Isaiah32:11 Tetemerani, imwe akazi akukhala pakutonthola; gedemerani na mantha imwe anyakukhala pakupata! Dulani nguwo zanu, mbamuvale masakala m'chuno mwanu." 
Isaiah32:12 Khalani manja m'khosi nama, thangwi mataka akubalisa pinthu, pontho minda yamfesa pyamala vungwa," 
Isaiah32:13 tenepo ntcheswa na nyakhanche pikumera m'minda ya anthu anga. Lirani imwe nyumba zonsene zile zikhadadzala na kukomerwa, pontho lirani mzinda ukhadadzala na moyo ule." 
Isaiah32:14 Podi na nyumba ya mfumu ene inakhondwa pontho mzinda wakufunika unavungikiratu monsene mwene. Nsanja na mipanda pimbaatchinjiriza pile pinasanduka madembe kwenda na kwenda. Mabulu am'tsanga anafamba-famba kweneko pontho mabira anagumana mpovu wadidi. 
Isaiah32:15 Mbwenye Mulungu anatitumizira Mzimu wache kubulukira kudzulu. Thando inasanduka ya mataka adidi, tenepo minda inabala pinthu pizinji." 
Isaiah32:16 Chilungamo chinadzakhala m'thando yatchetcha, pontho pyakulungama pinadzakhala m'minda yonsene yakubalisa pinthu." 
Isaiah32:17 Podi munthu onsene anachita pyakulungama, tenepo panakhala mtendere pontho kukhonda thuswana kwenda na kwenda." 
Isaiah32:18 Anthu anga anakhala na mtendere m'nyumba zawo, pontho pakupata m'misa mwawo, mbakhonda thuswa m'mbuto zawo zakupuma." 
Isaiah32:19 Podi kwene kuti matalala avunge m'misitu, pontho mzinda mbusalazwa," 
Isaiah32:20 munthu onsene anakomerwa pyakwanga na mbewu zidabzala iye m'khundu-khundu mwa mikulo, pontho na mpovu ponsene pene kuti mabulu na ng'ombe pikwanise kudya." 
Isaiah33:1 Dzedze kuna anyamalwathu! Iwo aba pontho asandukira, podi kwene kuti nkhabe na mbodzi ene aabera pinthu pyawo penu kuasandukira tayu. Kwache ndzidzi wawo wakuchita pyaupandu pontho wakusandukira wamala, tenepo iwo makawo anaona nyatwa thangwi ya kuba pontho pyaupandu pidachita iwo." 
Isaiah33:2 MBUYA, tiverenimbo nsisi ife. Ife taikha chidikhiro chathu pana imwe. Nsiku na nsiku titchinjirizeni pontho tipulumuseni ndzidzi wa nyatwa." 
Isaiah33:3 Ndzidzi unatimenyera imwe nkhondo, madzinza ambathawa na mgogogo wa nkhondoyo." 
Isaiah33:4 Pinthu pyawo pyamala pokoserwa ninga mabobo kusakaza mbewu; amuna apipomokera ninga nyadzombe. 
Isaiah33:5 MBUYA ngwamkulu pyakwanga, iye ali padzulu papinthu pyonsene. Iye anadzaza Zioni na chilungamo pontho pyakulungama." 
Isaiah33:6 Iye anakhala maziko akukhazikika pandzidzi wanu. Ndzidzi onsene iye ambatchinjiriza anthu ache mbaapasa nzeru na udziwisi. Mfumawo ikululetu nkhugopa kwawo MBUYA. 
Isaiah33:7 Amuna akuwanga mtima akulira mwakugaluza fala m'misewu. Aimiriri a dziko akhayesa kudzesa pya mtendere ale, lero akulira pikulu pene." 
Isaiah33:8 Njira zikulu-zikulu nsakugoswa pyakwanga, mwakuti nkhabe na mbodzi ene anakwanisa kufambamo tayu. Piverano pontho piphatizano pyafudzika mbapasowa kulemedzana." 
Isaiah33:9 Dziko yasanduka yakuuma pontho yakusowa basa. Msitu wa Lebanoni wamala unyala, phedi yadidi ya Sharoni yakhala ninga thando yatchetcha, pontho mu Bashani na Phiri ya Karimele masamba akumbwera m'miti." 
Isaiah33:10 MBUYA akulonga kuna madzinza kuti, “Chinchino ndinati ndichitepo pinthu. Ndinati ndionese mphamvu zanga." 
Isaiah33:11 Imwe mumbanyerezera pinthu pyapezi pontho chonsene chimbachita imwe ntchapezi. Mzimu wanga wakhala ninga moto unafuna dzakuvungani ule. 
Isaiah33:12 Madzinza anapiswa mbasanduka dotha, anakhala ninga minga yakugwandwa mbiponywa pamoto.”" 
Isaiah33:13 Imwe monsene ale muli kutali, vani pinthu pyachita inepi, pontho imwe ale muli chifupi, tawirani kuti ndine wamphamvu." 
Isaiah33:14 Anyakudawa a ku zioni akugedemera na mantha. Anyakukhonda tsalakana pya Mulungu aphatwa na mantha. Iwo akulonga kuti, “Mbani pakati pathu anakwanisa kukhala chifupi na moto wakuvunga ule? Mbani pakati pathupa anakwanisa kukhala chifupi na malulume a moto okhonda thimawu?”" 
Isaiah33:15 Munthu ule ana makhaliro akulungama mbalonga pyakuonadi ule ambakhonda kupifumisa yekha ene na kupondereza anango, pontho ule ambakhonda kudyekerwa, ule ambaphopha makutu ache kuna anyakusasanya pyaupandu, pontho ule ambafunga maso ache towera aleke kwatika na pyakuipa," 
Isaiah33:16 weneyu ndi munthu ule anafuna dzakhala padzululetu; ule pakuthawira pache panakhala mbuto yakutchingwa na mpanda paphiri. Iye anakhala na phoso izinji pontho madzi azinji akumwa. 
Isaiah33:17 Maso anu anaona mfumu na demelero yache, mbaona pontho dziko ile yatambalala kukhundu zonsene." 
Isaiah33:18 Munanyerezera pya mantha akale mbamulonga kuti: “Ali kupi thubu wamkululetu akhatithuswa ule? Anyamisonkho na anyakuzonda ali kupi?” 
Isaiah33:19 Iwe nkhabeve dzaona alendo akunyada tayu, ale ambalonga chilongero chinakhonda iwe kuvesa." 
Isaiah33:20 Yang'ana pana Zioni, mzinda mukhasekera ife maphwando achipembedzo mule. Maso anu anaona Yerusalemu! Iyo inakhala mbuto ya mtendere pyakwanga kukhalamo; inakhala ninga khumbi yakukhonda thukuswa, ile ntchiri zache nkhabe dzaduliwa tayu pontho nkhambala zache nkhabe dzagwandwa tayu." 
Isaiah33:21 Kweneko MBUYA anakhala Nyamphamvu wathu. Tinakhala m'khundu mwa mikulo na mikhwawa yakuzwika. Miyadiya ing'ono ya anyamalwa nkhabe dzaonekamove tayu; miyadiya yawo mikulu-mikulu nkhabe dzafambamo tayu. 
Isaiah33:22 Thangwi MBUYA makayo ndi nyakutitonga mseru, iye ndi nyakutipasa mwambo; MBUYA ndi mfumu wathu, Iye ndiye nyakufuna dzatipulumusa." 
Isaiah33:23 Nkhambala zakuphatisa nguwo zakuimiswa m'dzulu kufambisa miyadiya ya anyamalwathu zamala lera. Ife tinapokosera mfuma yonsene ya anyamalwathu ale; pinakhala pyakuinjipa pyakwanga mwakuti na anyakulamala ene anatambirambo. 
Isaiah33:24 Nkhabe mzika ya m'dziko mwathu anadungunya kuti, “Manungo akundipha!” Pyakudawa pyonsene pya anyakukhala mwenemo pinalekererwa." 
Isaiah34:1 Idzani chifupi imwe madzinza onsene; veserani imwe anthu onsene! Dziko yapansi mbivesere na pyonsene pimbakhala mwenemo, dziko yapansi yonsene na pyonsene pile pimbabulukira mwenemo!" 
Isaiah34:2 MBUYA azhangalira madzinza onsene; ukali wache uli pana anyankhondo awo onsene. Iye anaavunga monsene mwene mbaapereka m'manja mwa anyakucheka. 
Isaiah34:3 Anyakuphiwa awo onsene anatayiwa, mitembo inakhala thasa-thasa kununkha; tenepo mapiri anamwerera chiropa chawo." 
Isaiah34:4 Nyenyezi zonsene za kuthambo zinanyunguluka; thambo inafunyika ninga mpukutu, Nyenyezimbo zinagwa ninga masamba akuunyala a mfesa, pontho ninga makuyu akubundala." 
Isaiah34:5 MBUYA asasanya talasada kudzulu, tenepo chinchino iye anati akuwaze Edomu, anthu adalonga iye kuti akonwa pontho athema kuvungwa ale." 
Isaiah34:6 Talasadache inasamba chiropa, pontho inakukutizwa na mafuta, chiropa cha anabira na mbuzi, pontho na mafuta a mabira amuna. Thangwi MBUYA anachita nsembe mumzinda wa Bozira; m'dziko ya Edomu munakhala kucheka kukulu." 
Isaiah34:7 Nyati zinaphiwa nawo pabodzi pene na anamphulu achimuna na ng'ombe zimuna zikulu-zikulu, pontho dziko yawo inakhuta chiropa, pontho mataka anamwerera mafuta." 
Isaiah34:8 Thangwi MBUYA akoya nsiku inafuna iye dzabwezera, chaka chinafuna iye dzapulumusa Zioni." 
Isaiah34:9 Mikulo ya Edomu inasanduka upula, pontho mataka anasanduka miyala ya moto ya sulufule. Dziko yonsene inagaka ninga upula." 
Isaiah34:10 Mosiku na masikati motowo nkhabe dzathimiswa tayu; tenepo utsi unaoneka penepo kwenda na kwenda. Dziko inakhala yakusowa basa mfendu mpakana mfendu. Nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene anagwanda na mwenemo tayu. 
Isaiah34:11 Anyakasenera na anyankalibwatha pontho madzidzi na matangwe pinakhala m'dzikomo; MBUYA anaichitisa kukhala thando yatchetcha pontho yakudzala na miyala. 
Isaiah34:12 Panakhala nkhabe mfumu wakutonga dzikoyo. Atongi onsene anamala kwenda. 
Isaiah34:13 Ntcheswa zinaphopha m'nyumba zonsene, dawe na nyakhanche anaphopha m'mipanda, pontho mibinzi na madzidzi pinakhala mwenemo." 
Isaiah34:14 Nyama zam'tsanga zinagumanikana na matika, pontho mbala zinachemerezana unango na mwanzache; pirombo pyakufamba mumdima pinabwerambo kweneko mbapidzagumana mbuto yakupuma." 
Isaiah34:15 Madzidzi anamanga pisa pyawo mbateya mazayi; iwo anaswa mbayang'anira mwadidi anawo m'maphaphido mwawo. Malezi anagumanyikana mwenemo pabodzi pene na akazawo. 
Isaiah34:16 Yang'anani mumpukutu wa MBUYA mbamuwerenge: Nkhabe pya penepi pinafuna dzasowa tayu, pontho nee na chibodzi chene chinakhala chakusowa mankhadzi tayu. Thangwi walonga ndi mulomo wa MBUYA; Mzimu wache anapidzesa pabodzi pene." 
Isaiah34:17 Ndi MBUYA ule anafuna dzagawa dziko pakati pawo mbapasa kada munthu khundu yache. Iwo anakhala m'dzikomo mfendu mpakana mfendu, tenepo inakhala dziko yawo ene kwenda na kwenda." 
Isaiah35:1 Thando na mbuto yakusowa pyakumera inati ikomerwe; pontho thando yatchetcha inati ikomerwe mbidzachita maluwa. 
Isaiah35:2 Thando inaimba na kukhuwa thangwi ya kukomerwa, iyo inakhala yakukoma m'maso pyakwanga ninga mapiri a ku Lebanoni, pontho ya mataka akubalisa pinthu ninga minda ya ku Karimele na Sharoni. Munthu onsene anaona demelero ya MBUYA mbaona ukulu na mphamvu zache." 
Isaiah35:3 Pasani mphamvu manja akutopa, pontho wangisani mabondo akusowa mphamvu." 
Isaiah35:4 Pangani munthu onsene wakutaya mtima kuti, “Wangisa pontho leka chita mantha; Mulungu wako anati adze, iye anati adze kubwezera na kutchunyusa anyamalwako. Iye anadza dzakupulumusa.”" 
Isaiah35:5 Penepo maso a maboli-boli anafunguka, pontho makutu a madodo anatoma kuva." 
Isaiah35:6 Penepo anyakulamala ananumpha-numpha ninga nyasa, alembo anyakumangika lulume anakhuwa thangwi ya kukomerwa. Madzi anatumbuka m'thando yatchetcha, pontho mikulo inakukuma m'thandomo;" 
Isaiah35:7 tchetcha yakugaka moto inasanduka nyanza, pontho mtunda wakuuma unakhala na mphuno za madzi. Mbuto zile zikhakhala mibinzi, maudzu, mitete na ululu pinameramo." 
Isaiah35:8 Mwenemo munakhala msewu ukulu wakuchemerwa Njira Yakuchena. Nkhabe nyakudawa na mbodzi ene anagwanda na njira yeneyi tayu. Panakhala nkhabe mapupwe akudzudzumisa anthu akutewera njira yeneyi tayu. 
Isaiah35:9 Nkhabe nkhalamu zinafuna dzakhala mwenemo tayu, nkhabe nyama zakugoswa zinagwanda na njira yeneyo, pontho nkhabe dzagumanwa mwenemo tayu. Anthu adaombolwa na MBUYA ale, anaenda na njira yeneyi." 
Isaiah35:10 Ale adapulumuswa na MBUYA anabwerera. Iwo anapita mu Zioni na kusekera, kuimba na kukhuwa thangwi ya kukomerwa. Iwo anakomerwa kwenda na kwenda pontho nkhabe dzatsukwala penu kuva kupha tayu kwenda na kwenda." 
Isaiah36:1 Chaka chakhumi na chinayi Hezekia mbali mfumu wa Yuda, Senakeribu mfumu wa Asiria adasosa mizinda yakutchingwa na mpanda ya Yuda mbaipokosera." 
Isaiah36:2 Tenepo iye adatuma mkadamu wa anyankhondo na gulu ikulu ya anyankhondo kwenda ku Yerusalemu kubulukira ku Lakishi kuna Mfumu Hezekia kampanga kuti aimise manja. Mkadamu ule adaimira pamsewu wakwenda ku Munda wa Nyakufula nguwo, chifupi na mgelo wakudzesa madzi kubulukira kuthawale ya kumtunda." 
Isaiah36:3 Eliakimu mwana Hilikia mkadamu wamkulu wa kunyumba yachifumu; Shebina, nyakulemba m'thando ya miseru; pontho Yoa mwana Asafu, ule akhali nyakulemba pya m'dziko adadza dzagumanikana naye." 
Isaiah36:4 Thubu wa ku Asiria ule adaapanga kuti Mfumu Senakeribu akhafuna kudziwa thangwi ikhachitisa Hezekia kuwanga mtima. 
Isaiah36:5 Iye adalonga mbati, “Ayi imwe mukunyerezera kuti mafala okha basi anakwanisa kuphata basa m'mbuto mwa mphamvu na luso pya anyankhondo anu? Ayi mbani ananyerezera imwe kuti anakwanisa kukuphedzani kupandukira mfumu wa Asiria?" 
Isaiah36:6 Imwe mukunyindira Iguputo kukuphedzani, kwache penepyo pinakhala ninga kuphatisa basa phesi m'mbuto mwa mthondodzo; iyo inatchoka mbikutchonkhani m'manja. Mfumu wa Iguputo akhala ninga tenepo kuna munthu onsene anamnyindirayo.”" 
Isaiah36:7 Thubu wa ku Asiria ule adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Ayi mukundipanga kuti ananyindira imwe ndi MBUYA Mulungu wanu? Iye ngule mbuto zache zakupembedzerapo na maguwache ansembe zidavungwa na Hezekia, pidapanga iye anthu a ku Yuda na Yerusalemu kupembedza paguwa yansembe mu Yerusalemu mwene basi." 
Isaiah36:8 “Ndinachita namwe betchi na dzina ya mbuyanga, mfumu wa Asiria. Ine ndinakupasani akavalo pikwi piwiri, ngakhala munagumana amuna akukwana kuapakira." 
Isaiah36:9 Imwe munakwanisa tani kuimisana na mathubu a mfumu wa Asiria, podi na wamng'onoletu pakati pawo, podi kwene kuti mukunyindira basi kuti Aiguputo anakutumizirani pingolo na amuna akupakira akavalo?" 
Isaiah36:10 Ayi mukunyerezera kuti ine ndasosa na kuvunga dziko yanu mwakukhonda phedzwa na MBUYA? MBUYA makayo ndiye andipanga kuti ndiisose na kuivunga.” 
Isaiah36:11 Tenepo Eliakimu, Shebina pontho Yoa adalonga kuna mkadamuyo mbati, “Taphata miyendo, longani pyanu m'Chiaramu, thangwi ife timbachiva. Lekani longa m'Chiheberi thangwi anthu onsene akhala m'mafufuwa akuvesera.”" 
Isaiah36:12 Iye adatawira mbati, “Ayi mukunyerezera kuti mfumu wa ku Asiria andituma kulonga mphangwa kuna imwe na kuna mfumu yekha basi? Nkhabe, ine ndikulonga pontho kuna anthu akhala m'mafufuwa, ale athema kudya matubzi awo, pontho kumwa mitindo yawo ninga montho munafuna dzachitirambo imwepo.”" 
Isaiah36:13 Tenepo thubu ule adaimira mbalonga m'Chiheberi mwakugaluza fala mbati, “Veserani kuno pinakupangani mfumu wa Asiria." 
Isaiah36:14 Iye akukucheuzani kuti muleke nyengezwa na Hezekia. Hezekia nkhabe kwanisa kukupulumusani tayu. 
Isaiah36:15 Pontho lekani kumtawira kukunyengererani kuti munyindire MBUYA. Lekani nyerezera kuti MBUYA anakupulumusani pontho kuti iye anakhondesa Asiria kupokosera mzindanu. 
Isaiah36:16 “Lekani vesera pinalonga Hezekia! Mfumu wa Asiria akukutongani kuti mubuluke mumzindamo mbamuimise manja. Tenepo monsene munatawiriswa kudya mfesa na makuyu a m'miti mwanu, pontho kumumwa madzi a m'michera yanu ene," 
Isaiah36:17 kufikirana mfumu akukhazikiseni m'dziko sasawa ninga yanuyi, kule kuna minda ya mfesa kuti ikupaseni vinyu, pontho kuna mapira kuti mukwanise kuphika mikate." 
Isaiah36:18 “Hezekia mbaleke kukunyengezani pakunyerezera kuti MBUYA anakupulumusani. Ayi ilipo milungu ya anthu anango, ile idapulumusambo madziko awo m'manja mwa mfumu wa Asiria?" 
Isaiah36:19 Chinchino ili kupi milungu ya Hamati na Aripadi? Ili kupi milungu ya Sefaravaimu? Ayi alipo unango adapulumusa Samaria? 
Isaiah36:20 Ndi lini milungu ya madziko onseneyi idatoma kupulumusa madziko awo kuna mfumu wa Asiria. Apo ninji chinakuchitisani kunyerezera kuti MBUYA anakwanisa kupulumusa Yerusalemu?” 
Isaiah36:21 Anthu adamatama ninga montho mukhadaapangira mfumu Hezekia; iwo hadabuluse na fala ene tayu. 
Isaiah36:22 Tenepo Eliakimu, Shebina na Yoa adang'amba nguwo zawo thangwi ya kutsukwala mbaenda kapanga mfumu pikhadalonga thubu wa Asiria ule." 
Isaiah37:1 Sindzidzi Mfumu Hezekia nkhuva penepi adang'amba nguwo zache thangwi ya kutsukwala. Iye adavala masakha mbaenda ku Nyumba ya MBUYA. 
Isaiah37:2 Iye adatuma Eliakimu thubu wamkulu wa kunyumba ya mfumu, Shebina nyakulemba m'thando ya miseru na anyansembe akulu kwenda kuna mprofeti Yesaya mwana Amozi. Iwo adavalambo masakha." 
Isaiah37:3 Iwo adatumwa kuna Yesaya na mphangwa kuna Yesaya zakuti: “Lero ndi nsiku ya nyatwa; tikutchunyuswa pontho tikuchitiswa manyadzo. Takhala ninga mkazi wa mimba, ule asasanyika kulekwa kwache nkhabe mphamvu." 
Isaiah37:4 Mfumu wa Asiria atuma thubu wache wamkululetu dzatikana Mulungu wamoyo. MBUYA Mulungu wanu mbave kutikana kweneku, pontho mbatchunyuse anthu adalonga penepi ale. Natenepo pemphererani kuna Mulungu anthu asalira na moyo ale.”" 
Isaiah37:5 Pidava Yesaya mphangwa zidatumiza Mfumu Hezekia kuna iye zile," 
Isaiah37:6 adatawira mbati, “MBUYA akukupangani kuti muleke tawirisa Aasiria kukuthuswani na pinalonga iwo kuti MBUYA nkhabe kwanisa kukupulumusani tayu." 
Isaiah37:7 MBUYA anachitisa mfumu wa Asiria kuva mbiri, ile inafuna kumchitisa kubwerera kudziko kwache, natenepo MBUYA anamchitisa kuti aphiwe kweneko.”" 
Isaiah37:8 Thubu ule adava kuti mfumu wa Asiria akhadabuluka mu Lakishi, pontho kuti akuchita nkhondo na mzinda wachifupi na Libina; natenepo adenda kweneko kamvunza." 
Isaiah37:9 Mbiri idaveka pakati pa Aasiria kuti gulu ya anyankhondo a ku Iguputo yakutsogolerwa na Mfumu Tirihaka wa ku Kushiikhadza dzamenyana nawo. Pidava mfumu wa Asiria penepi, adatumiza kalata kuna Hezekia" 
Isaiah37:10 mfumu wa Yuda kulonga kuna iye kuti, “Mulungu ananyindira iweyo akupanga kuti ine sinakwanisa kukukunda tayu, kwache penepi pileke kukunyengeza." 
Isaiah37:11 Iwe wava pimbachita mfumu wa Asiria kuna madziko onsene anafuna iye kuavungawo. Ayi ukunyerezera kuti unakwanisa kupulumuka? 
Isaiah37:12 Makolo anga adavunga mizinda ya Gozani, Harani, na Rezefi mbapha anthu a ku Betedeni, akhakhala mu Telasara ale, tenepo nkhabe na mbodzi ene wa milungu yawo adakwanisa kuapulumusa tayu." 
Isaiah37:13 Ali kupi mafumu a ku Hamati, Aripadi, Sefaravaimu, Hena, penu Iva?”" 
Isaiah37:14 Mfumu Hezekia adakwata kalata idadza na anyamphangwa ile mbaiwerenga. Tenepo iye adenda ku Nyumba ya Mulungu mbaikha kalata ile pamaso pa MBUYA 
Isaiah37:15 mbapemphera mbati," 
Isaiah37:16 “MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, Mulungu wa Israele, nyakukhala pampando wanu wachifumu padzulu pa pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido, imwe ene basi ndimwe Mulungu, nyakutonga maufumu onsene a padziko yapansi. Imwe mudalenga dziko yapansi na thambo." 
Isaiah37:17 Chinchino MBUYA ngativesereni, pontho yang'anani pinthu pinatichitikirapi. Ngaveserani pinthu pyonsene pinalonga Senakeribu kutikana imwe, Mulungu wamoyo." 
Isaiah37:18 Ife tonsene timbadziwa, MBUYA, mafumu a Asiria adavunga madzinza mazinji mbachitisa madziko awo kusanduka madembe," 
Isaiah37:19 mbapisa milungu yawo, ile si milungu chadi-chadi tayu, mbwenye mifanikizo ene pyawo yamiti na yamiyala yakusasanywa na manja a anthu." 
Isaiah37:20 Chinchino MBUYA Mulungu wathu, tipulumuseni kuna Asiria, towera madzinza onsene a padziko yapansi apidziwe kuti imwe ene basi MBUYA ndimwe Mulungu.”" 
Isaiah37:21 Kubuluka penepo Yesaya adatumiza mphangwa kuna Mfumu Hezekia kumpanga kuti MBUYA ava kupemphera kwache," 
Isaiah37:22 mbamtawira kuti, “Mzinda wa Yerusalemu ukukuseka iwe, Senakeribu, pontho ukukululupisa." 
Isaiah37:23 Mbani akhanyerezera iwe kuti ukumtikana pontho kumsedegula ule? Iwe wandiselusa ine Mulungu, Nyakuchena wa Israele." 
Isaiah37:24 Iwe udatuma anyabasa dzagaya kuna ine kuti na pingolo pyako pyonsene pyankhondo iwe udakunda mapiri akulaphaletu a Lebanoni. Iwe udatumbama kuti kwene udagwandako miti yakulaphaletu yamkungudza pontho na miti yadidiletu yapaina mbufika pakatiletu pa misitu yakuphopha. 
Isaiah37:25 Iwe udagaya kuti udakumba michera mbumwa madzi m'madziko achilendo, pontho manyalo a anyankhondo ako adaponda mbaumisiratu mikulo ya mu Iguputo." 
Isaiah37:26 “Ayi chipo iwe hudapive tayu kuti kale ene ine ndidanyerezera kuchita pyonsenepi? Tenepo chinchino ndapichitadi. Ine ndidakupasa mphamvu kuchitisa mizinda yakutchingwa na mpanda kusanduka milu ya madongolomwa. 
Isaiah37:27 Anthu akhakhala mwenemo ale, akhali adamala khutchwa mano; iwo adaswipa mtima mbachita mantha pikulu. Iwo akhali ninga mbewu m'munda, ninga mphukira zitete pontho ziwisi, penu ninga maudzu akumera pansoyi, ale ambaunyala mbadzati kula." 
Isaiah37:28 “Mbwenye pyonsene pya iwe ndimbapidziwa, pimbachita iwe na konsene kwene kumbaenda iwe. Ine ndimbadziwa na ukali umbachita iwe kupokanyisana na ine." 
Isaiah37:29 Ine ndava pya ukali wako na kugaya kumbachita iwe, natenepo chinchino ndinati ndiikhe ngoloweko m'mphuno mwako mbandiikha simbi m'kanwa mwako ninga kavalo mbandikubweza na njira yontho idadza na iwe ile.”" 
Isaiah37:30 Tenepo Yesaya adalonga kuna Mfumu Hezekia mbati, “Ichi ntchidzindikiro cha pinthu pinafuna dzachitika pile. Chaka chino na chamangwana munadya magoko, mbwenye chaka chamkuchono munakwanisa kubzala mbewu zanu zene mbamuvuna, pontho munabzala mbewu zamfesa mbamudya nsapo zache." 
Isaiah37:31 Anyakusalira na moyo mu Yuda ale, anavata ninga miti, ile imbazikisa mitsitsi yache pansiletu m'mataka mbibala nsapo." 
Isaiah37:32 Panakhala anthu mu Yerusalemu na paphiri ya zioni anyakusalira na moyo ale, thangwi chipapu cha MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene chinachitisa kuti penepi pichitike." 
Isaiah37:33 “Penepi ndiye pyalonga MBUYA pya mfumu wa Asiria: Iye nkhabe dzapita mumzinda muno, penu dzaponya tswimo na ibodzi ene tayu. Nkhabe anyankhondo akuphatira pyakugedera matswimo anabwera chifupi na mzindawu, penu kumuluka mataka kutsamira mpandawu tayu." 
Isaiah37:34 Iye anabwerera kwawo na njira yontho idadza na iye ile mbachimwana kupita mumzindamo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA. 
Isaiah37:35 Ine ndinatchinjiriza mzindawu mbandiupulumusa, na thangwi ya chilemedzo changa pontho na kudumbira kudachita ine kuna nyabasanga Davite.”" 
Isaiah37:36 Mngelo wa MBUYA adenda kumsasa wa Aasiria mbapha anyankhondo pikwi dzana na makumasere na ashanu. Mangwana mwache m'makalakwecha iwo akhali thasa-thasa, onsene amala kufa!" 
Isaiah37:37 Tenepo Senakeribu mfumu wa Asiria adafudza msasache mbabwerera mumzinda wa Ninevi. 
Isaiah37:38 Nsiku inango pikhapembedza iye m'nyumba ya milungu yache Nisiroki, anache awiri achimuna, Adrameleki na Sharezere adampha na matalasadawo mbathawira kudziko ya Ararati. Tenepo unango mwa anache, dzinache Esarihadoni adapita ufumu m'mbuto mwache." 
Isaiah38:1 Pandzidzi wenewo Mfumu Hezekia adadwala mbasala nenene kufa. Mprofeti Yesaya mwana Amozi adenda kamuona mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “MBUYA akukupangani kuti mwathema kusasanyiratu pinthu pyonsene mwadidi, thangwi nee munawanga tayu, munati mufe.”" 
Isaiah38:2 Hezekia adazungunukira kufufu mbapemphera mbati," 
Isaiah38:3 “Kumbukani MBUYA kuti ine ndidakutumikirani mwakukhulupirika, pontho na mtima onsene, pontho ndzidzi onsene ndayesa-yesa kuchita pinthu pinafuna imwe.” Natenepo iye adatoma kulira mwakusisima." 
Isaiah38:4 Natenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Yesaya mbati," 
Isaiah38:5 kuti abwerere kuna Hezekia mbakalonga kuti, “Ine MBUYA Mulungu wa kholoako Davite ndava kupemphera kwako pontho ndaona misozi yako; ndinatawirisa kuti uthimize kukhala na moyo pyaka pinango khumi na pishanu." 
Isaiah38:6 Ine ndinakupulumusa iwe na mzinda wa Yerusalemu m'manja mwa mfumu wa Asiria, pontho ndinathimiza kutchinjiriza mzindawu.”" 
Isaiah38:7 Yesaya adatawira mbati, “MBUYA anakupasa chidzindikiro chakutsikimizira kuti anachita pidalonga iye kuna imwe." 
Isaiah38:8 Pansikada zakwendera kunjira ya Ahazi, MBUYA anachitisa mthunzi kubwerera m'nduli kakhumi pansikada.” Tenepo mthunziwo udabwereradi m'nduli kakhumi pansikada za Ahazi." 
Isaiah38:9 Pidawanga Hezekia mfumu wa Yuda adalemba nyimbo ishi kulemedza nayo MBUYA: 
Isaiah38:10 Ine ndidanyerezera kuti mbandili mphale ene pyanga, ayi ndathema kugwanda na pamisuwo ya dziko ya anyakufa, mbandikhala konthoko kwenda na kwenda?" 
Isaiah38:11 Ine ndidanyerezera kuti sinamuonave tayu MBUYA, m'dziko ya anthu amoyoyi, pontho nkhabeve dzaona anthu tayu, penu kukhala pabodzi na ale ndzidzi uno ali m'dziko ya pansi ino tayu." 
Isaiah38:12 Ninga khumbi ya makabuswa, nyumbanga yagwiswa mbibuluswa pana ine. Ninga nyakuluka nguwo, ine ndafunya-funya moyo wanga, tenepo iye andithumula pamtanda wakulukira nguwo; mosiku na masikati imwe mwamalisa moyo wanga." 
Isaiah38:13 Ine ndidadikhira mwakupirira mpakana makalakwecha, kwache ninga nkhalamu iye adaswa magogodo anga onsene; mosiku na masikati imwe mwamalisa moyo wanga." 
Isaiah38:14 Falanga idaveka ninga kulira kwa timba; ndidabulira ninga jiwa. Maso anga adatopa na kuyang'ana kudzulu. Ine ndili panyatwa zikulu; Mbuya, dzani dzandiphedza!" 
Isaiah38:15 Apo ndinalonganji? Podi alonga ndiye kuna ine, pontho achita penepi ndiye. Ine ndinafamba pyanga khuma-khuma moyo wanga onsene, thangwi ya kusanyika kunachita moyo wangaku." 
Isaiah38:16 Mbuya, na pinthu ninga penepi anthu ambakhala na moyo, pontho mzimu wanga umbagumana moyo mwenemo. Imwe mudandiwangisa mbamundichitisa kukhala na moyo." 
Isaiah38:17 Kuva kwanga kupha kwandiganyalira. Ndimwe mwapulumusa moyo wanga kuna pyakugoswa pyonsene. Ndimwe mwalekerera pyakudawa pyanga pyonsene. 
Isaiah38:18 Thangwi dziko ya anyakufa nkhabe kwanisa kukukuzani tayu; imfa nkhabe kwanisa kuimbirani nyimbo zakukukuzani nazo tayu, anyakwenda ku Chiphompho chikulu nkhabe nyindira kukhulupirika kwanu tayu." 
Isaiah38:19 Mbanthu amoyo ambakukuzani, ninga munachitira ine lero. Ababa ambapanga anawo pya kukhulupirika kwachita imwe." 
Isaiah38:20 MBUYA anandipulumusa, tenepo ife tinaimba na anyakatangale nsiku zonsene za moyo wathu m'Nyumba ya MBUYA." 
Isaiah38:21 Yesaya adampanga mfumu kuti aikhe pachironda chache masamba amkuyu, tenepo iye anawanga." 
Isaiah38:22 Tenepo Mfumu Hezekia adavunza mbati, “Apo chidzindikiro chache ntchanji chakutsikimizira kuti ndinakwanisa kwenda ku Nyumba ya Mulungu?”" 
Isaiah39:1 Pandzidzi ninga ontho-onthowo mfumu wa ku Babiloni, Merodaki-Baladani, mwana Baladani adava kuti Mfumu Hezekia akhadwala, natenepo adatumiza kalata na mtukwa kuna iye." 
Isaiah39:2 Hezekia adatambira mwadidi anyamphangwa ale mbaaonesa mfumache yonsene; siliva na golidi, pyakukomesera muliwo na mafuta akununkhira, pontho na pida pyache pyonsene pya nkhondo. Nkhabe na chibodzi chene m'masubi ache akukoyeramo pinthu penu konsene kwene muufumu mwache chidasiya iye okhonda kuaonesa tayu." 
Isaiah39:3 Tenepo mprofeti Yesaya adenda kuna Mfumu Hezekia mbamvunza mbati, “Ayi, amuna enewa abulukira kupi, pontho alonganji kuna imwe?” Hezekia adatawira mbati, “Iwo abulukira kudziko yakutali pyakwanga, ku Babiloni.”" 
Isaiah39:4 Mprofeti adavunza mbati, “Ayi chaona iwo ninji m'nyumba yachifumu?” Hezekia adatawira mbati, “Iwo aona chinthu chonsene. Nkhabe na chibodzi chene m'masubi akukoyeramo pinthu chidasiya ine okhonda kuaonesa tayu.”" 
Isaiah39:5 Tenepo Yesaya adampanga mfumu mbati, “MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga kuti" 
Isaiah39:6 ndzidzi unafika wakuti pyonsene pya m'nyumbanu yachifumu, pinthu pyonsene pyakoya makolo anu kufikirana lero, pinakwatwa kwenda kudziko ya Babiloni. Nkhabe na chibodzi chene chinasiyiwa tayu." 
Isaiah39:7 Pinango pya pidzukulu pyanu chadi-chadi pinakwatwa mbapikakapalwi katumikira m'nyumba ya mfumu wa ku Babiloni.” 
Isaiah39:8 Mfumu Hezekia adanyerezera pikulonga kuti pandzidzi wache wakukhala na moyo panakhala mtendere na kutchinjirizwa, tenepo iye adatawira mbati, “Mphangwa zandipanga imwe kubulukira kuna MBUYA nsadidi.”" 
Isaiah40:1 Mulungu wanu akulonga kuti: “Matamani, matamani, anthu anga." 
Isaiah40:2 Wangisani mtima anthu a ku Yerusalemu. Apangeni kuti ndzidzi wawo wa nyatwa wamala, pontho kuti pyakudawa pyawo pyalekererwa. Ine, MBUYA, ndaatchunyusa malingana na kuinjipa kwa pyakudawa pyawo.”" 
Isaiah40:3 Munthu unango akukhuwa m'thando yatchetcha mbati, “Msasanyireni njira MBUYA m'thando yatchetcha; ndendemezani msewu m'thandomo, towera Mulungu wathu afambemo!" 
Isaiah40:4 Maphedi onsene anafikhirwa; mapiri onsene pontho pitunda pyonsene pinasalazwa; madziko onsene amiyala anamyalaliswa. 
Isaiah40:5 Tenepo demelero ya MBUYA inatchululwa, pontho anthu onsene anaiona. Thangwi MBUYA mwenechiro ndiye alonga kuchita penepi!”" 
Isaiah40:6 Fala ikuveka kuti, “Lalika.” Tenepo ine ndidavunza kuti, “Ninji chinafuna ine lalika?” “Anthu onsene akhala ninga maudzu, pontho demelero yawo yakhala ninga maluwa am'tsanga." 
Isaiah40:7 Maudzu ambaunyala, maluwambo ambalakatika, thangwi muya wa MBUYA umbapepesa pana iwo. Andedi, anthu akhala ninga maudzu." 
Isaiah40:8 Maudzu ambaunyala, maluwambo ambalakatika, mbwenye mafala a Mulungu wathu ambakhalapo kwenda na kwenda.”" 
Isaiah40:9 Imwe anyakudza na mphangwa zadidi kuna Zioni, kwirani paphiri yakulapha. Imwe anyakudza na mphangwa zadidi kuna Yerusalemu, chemerani mwakugaluza fala, galuzani fala mbamukhonde chita mantha; longani kuna maluwani a Yuda kuti, “Mulungu wanu akudza!”" 
Isaiah40:10 Yang'anani, MBUYA Mulungu akudza na mphamvu, pontho akutonga na mkono wache. Yang'anani, akudza na mfupo wache, wakuphatana na pyakupagali pyache." 
Isaiah40:11 Ninga makabuswa, iye ambayang'anira mwadidi mkumbi wache: iye ambagumanyisa pabodzi anabira mbaathukula m'manja mwache; iye ambatsogolera abzade mwakufulika." 
Isaiah40:12 Chipo mbani adatoma kupima madzi a m'bara m'thavu mwache, penu kupima thambo na makhono ache? Chipo mbani adatoma kuikha mataka a dziko yonsene yapansi m'chitundu, penu kupima kulemera kwa mapiri pontho pitunda na mdida?" 
Isaiah40:13 Chipo mbani adatoma kumpanga MBUYA pyakuchita, penu munthu kukhala phungu wache?" 
Isaiah40:14 Nkhwa animbo kudatoma MBUYA kuvunza nzeru, mbani adatomambo kumfunzisa kuchita pyakulungama? Mbani adamfunzisa nzeru, penu kumuonesa njira zakuvesa pinthu?" 
Isaiah40:15 Ndimomwene kuti madzinza akhala ninga dontho ya madzi m'chitomba; iwo ambayeswa ninga fumbi pamdida; iye ambapima ntchuwa khala ninga fumbi. 
Isaiah40:16 Lebanoni miti yache njakuchepa pyakwanga kuphatisira moto wa paguwa yansembe, penu nyama zonsene kukwana kuzipereka nsembe zakupyerera." 
Isaiah40:17 Pamaso pache madzinza onsene si pinthu tayu; iye ambaawerengera ninga si pinthu tayu, pontho ngakusowa basa." 
Isaiah40:18 Apo, mbani unango anakwanisa imwe kusangiza na Mulungu? Chinthu chache ntchipi chinakwanisa imwe kumsangiza nacho?" 
Isaiah40:19 Kulonga pya mfanikizo, munthu ambausasanya, nyakufula simbi ambaukukutiza na golidi, mbausasanyira mkufu wasiliva." 
Isaiah40:20 Nyakutcherengaletu wakuti nkhabe kwanisa kupereka nsembe ninga yeneyi, ambasankhula thabwa yakuti imbavunda ile. Iye ambasaka nyakusema waluso kusasanya mfanikizo ule nkhabe limbuka tayu." 
Isaiah40:21 Kadi imwe nkhabe dziwa tayu? Ayi imwe mudapive tayu? Ayi imwe hamupangwe tayu kubulukira pakutoma? Ayi imwe hamudatome kuvesa tayu kutomera pakulengwa kwa dziko yapansi? 
Isaiah40:22 Iye akhala pampando wache wachifumu padzululetu pa dziko yapansi; anthu apansi pano akhala ninga nthete. Iye ambafuthula thambo ninga nguwo yakutchinga nayo, ninga khumbi yakufuna kukhalamo." 
Isaiah40:23 Iye ambachepesa ana mafumu, mbatchithisa pansi mafumu a dziko yapansi." 
Isaiah40:24 Iwo akhala ninga mbewu zing'ono-zing'ono kumera kwene mbazisowa mitsitsi. MBUYA angagwisa mphepo izo zimbauma, pontho chivumbulu chimbazitswaira ninga dzungu." 
Isaiah40:25 Mbani anakwanisa kusangizwa na Mulungu Wakuchena? Ayi pana unango pontho ninga iye? 
Isaiah40:26 Kwizani maso mbamuyang'ane kuthambo: Mbani adalenga pinthu pyonsenepi? Ule ambatsogolera nyenyezi ninga gulu ya anyankhondo, ule ambadziwa kuinjipa kwazo mbazichemera zonsene na madzinawo. Na thangwi ya mphamvu zache zikulu pyakwanga izo nkhabe tayika tayu!" 
Isaiah40:27 Watani unalonga, iwe Yakobo, pontho watani unadungunya, iwe Israele kuti, “Njiranga yabisika kuna MBUYA; mseru wanga Mulungu wanga nkhabe kuuikha konta tayu”?" 
Isaiah40:28 Ayi iwe nkhabe kupidziwa tayu? Ayi hudapive tayu? MBUYA ndi Mulungu wakukhala na kukhala; Nyakulenga dziko yonsene yapansi. Iye nkhabe topa na pang'ono pene, pontho udziwisi wache munthu nkhabe kuuvesa tayu." 
Isaiah40:29 Iye ambapereka mphamvu kuna anyakutopa, mbathimizira mboko kuna anyakusowa mphamvu." 
Isaiah40:30 Podi na aphale ene ambatopambo mbasowa mphamvu, pontho aphale ambagwegweduka mbagwa," 
Isaiah40:31 mbwenye anyakunyindira MBUYA anapaswa mphamvu zitswa. Iwo anambuluka na maphaphido ninga mphamba; iwo anathamanga mbakhonda topa, anafamba mbakhonda komoka." 
Isaiah41:1 Mulungu akulonga kuti, “Matamani pamaso panga, imwe madziko akutali! Madzinza mbachitise mphamvu zawo kukhala pontho zitswa! Mbadze patsogolo mbalonge; tendeni tikagumane kuthando yakutongerako miseru." 
Isaiah41:2 Mbani adzesa nyakukunda wakumabulukiro dzuwa, mbamchitisa kukunda konsene kwene kunaenda iye? Mbani ambamchitisa kukunda mafumu na madzinza? Iye ambaasanduza kukhala fumbi na talasadache, mbaabalalisa ninga dzungu na matswimo ache." 
Isaiah41:3 Iye ambaathamangisa mbafamba mwakukhonda goswiwa, na njira ile manyalo ache chipo adzati pondako tayu."
