Isaiah41:4 Mbani adachitisa penepi kuchitika, kuchemera mifendu yonsene kubulukira pakutoma pale? Ine MBUYA, nyakutoma pakati pawo, pontho nyakumalisira pakati pawo; Ine ndine pano." 
Isaiah41:5 “Anthu a madziko akutali apiona penepi mbachita mantha; dziko yapansi ikutetemera na mantha. Iwo akudza mbafika chifupi na ine; 
Isaiah41:6 kada munthu kuphedza mwanzache mbalonga kuna iye mbati, ‘Wangisa mbaleanga!’" 
Isaiah41:7 Nyampala matabwa ambawangisa mtima nyakufula golidi mbati, ‘Waphata basa!’ Nyakumyalalisa mfanikizo ambawangisa mtima nyakuukhoma pakulonga kuti kuotchererako nkhwadidi pyakwanga. Tenepo iye ambaukhoma na mapedego, towera uleke limbuka." 
Isaiah41:8 “Mbwenye iwe Israele, nyabasanga, iwe dzinza ya Yakobo idasankhula ine ile, pidzukulu pya shamwalianga Abrahamu," 
Isaiah41:9 ndidakukwatani kubulukira kumadolomero a dziko yapansi; ndidakuchemerani kubulukira kunkhomo zakutaliletu mbandilonga kuna iwe kuti, ‘Iwe ndiwe nyabasanga. Ine ndidakusankhula mbandileka kukukhonda.’" 
Isaiah41:10 Tenepo leka chita mantha, thangwi ndili nawe; leka taya mtima, thangwi ine ndine Mulungu wako! Ndinakupasa mphamvu mbandikuphedza; ndinakutchinjiriza na mkono wanga wamphamvu." 
Isaiah41:11 “Onsene anakuzhangalira ale, anati achite manyadzo mbalulupiswa, alembo anachita nawe nkhondo hanakhalave pinthu tayu, mbwenye anavungika." 
Isaiah41:12 Anyamalwako nkhabe dzaonekave tayu, ale ambachita nawe nkhondo anafa." 
Isaiah41:13 Thangwi ndine MBUYA Mulungu wako; ule ambakuphata pamkono mbalonga kuna iwe kuti: ‘Leka chita mantha; ndinakuphedza.’ 
Isaiah41:14 Leka chita mantha iwe unyoka, Yakobo, Iwe Israele wamng'onoletu, thangwi ine ndinakuphedza. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Dombo wako, Nyakuchena wa Israele." 
Isaiah41:15 Yang'ana, ndinakusandusa chakububudira tirigu, chakukhala na mano mazinji atswa pontho akutwa. Iwe unabubuda mapiri mbuaaphumudza; pitundambo unapisanduza fumbi." 
Isaiah41:16 Iwe unapivuluza, mbapidzambuluswa na mphepo, chonzi chinapibalalisa. Tenepo iwe unakomerwa thangwi ya MBUYA mbaupereka demelero kuna Nyakuchena wa Israele." 
Isaiah41:17 “Anyakutcherenga na anyakusowa anasaka-saka madzi, kwache nkhabe dzaagumana tayu; kukhosi kwawo kumbauma kakata na nyota. Mbwenye ine MBUYA ndinava kupemphera kwawo. Ine Mulungu wa Israele, nkhabe dzaapasa nkhodolo tayu." 
Isaiah41:18 Ndinachitisa mikulo kukuka m'mapiri akupupwa, pontho mphuno za madzi kutumbuka m'maphedi. Ndinasandusa thando yatchetcha kukhala mathawale a madzi, pontho mataka akuuma kukhala mphuno za madzi." 
Isaiah41:19 Ndinachitisa miti yamkungudza na kesha kumera m'thando yatchetcha, pontho na miti ya mitule na olivi. Misitu inamera m'mbuto zakusowa mataka adidi, misitu ya paina, yunipari, na njale," 
Isaiah41:20 towera anthu apione mbapidziwa, pontho kupinyerezera na kupivesa, kuti mkono wa MBUYA ndiye wachita penepi, kuti Nyakuchena wa Israele ndiye adalenga penepi.”" 
Isaiah41:21 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Idzani nawo kuno mseru wanu.” Mfumu wa Yakobo akulonga kuti, “Perekani umboni wanu." 
Isaiah41:22 Idzani kuno na mifanikizo yanu kuti itipange pinthu pinafuna dzachitika. Ngatipangeni pinthu pyakale pikhalinji, towera tipinyerezere mbatidziwe kuti pinamala tani penu pinafuna dzachitika m'tsogolo ninji." 
Isaiah41:23 Tipangeni kuti kutsogolo kunanji, towera tipidziwe kuti ndimwe milungu! Chitani chinthu chinango chadidi penu chakuipa, towera titaye mtima mbatichite mantha!" 
Isaiah41:24 Mbwenye imwe, mifanikizo, si imwe pinthu tayu, pontho mabasanu ngapezi-pezi; ule adakupembedzani ngwakunyansa!" 
Isaiah41:25 “Ine ndalamusa munthu wakubulukira kumabulukiro dzuwa; uyo anadzayo. Ndinachitisa munthuyo, ule ambachemera dzinanga, kusosa kutomera kumpoto. Iye ambapondedza atongi khala ninga akupondedza matope, ninga nyakuumba pyombo kukanya dongo." 
Isaiah41:26 Mbani adalonga pya pinthu ninga penepi kubulukira pakutoma, towera ife tikwanise kupidziwa, penu kupilongeratu, towera ife tikwanise kulonga kuti, ‘Iye adalonga pyakuona’? Nkhabe mfanikizo unango udalonga pya penepi tayu, nkhabe unango adalongeratu pya penepi tayu, nkhabe na mbodzi ene adava fala yakubulukira kuna imwe tayu." 
Isaiah41:27 Ine ndikhali nyakutoma kupanga zioni kuti; ‘Ngayang'ana, iwo ali pano!’ Ine ndidatuma nyamphangwa ku Yerusalemu kalonga pya mphangwa zadidizi." 
Isaiah41:28 Ine ndikuyang'ana, kwache nkhabe onako na mbodzi ene tayu, nkhabe na mbodzi ene pakati pa milungu wakukwanisa kupereka uphungu, nee na mbodzi ene wakukwanisa kunditawira pikhaavunza ine." 
Isaiah41:29 Yang'anani, milungu yonsenewo njakunama! Kuinjipa kwa mabasawo nkhwapezi nako; mifanikizo yawo si pinthu tayu, njakusowa basa.”" 
Isaiah42:1 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ngweneyu nyabasa, apasa ine mphamvu ule, nyakusankhulikanga, akomerwa na ine ule; ndinaikha Mzimu wanga muna iye, tenepo iye anadzesa chilungamo kuna madzinza onsene." 
Isaiah42:2 Iye nkhabe dzakhuwa penu kulira, penu kugaluza fala m'njira tayu." 
Isaiah42:3 Mtete wakutchoka, iye nkhabe dzaumalisa, penu dzathimisa nsakali yakupuchira tayu. Mwakukhulupirika iye anadzesa chilungamo kuna anthu onsene." 
Isaiah42:4 Iye anakhala na chidikhiro mbakhonda dzataya mtima, mpakana iye anakhazikisa chilungamo padziko yapansi. Anthu a madziko akutali akudikhira mwambo wache.”" 
Isaiah42:5 MBUYA Mulungu adalenga kudzulu mbakufuthula; iye adasasanya dziko yapansi na pyonsene pili mwenemo. Iye adapasa muya anthu ache, pontho moyo kuna pyonsene pimbafamba mwenemo pile. Tenepo iye akulonga tenepa:" 
Isaiah42:6 “Ine MBUYA ndakuchemera kuti ukhazikise chilungamo; ine ndinakuphata pamkono mbandikukoya. Kudzera muna iwe ndinachita chiverano na anthu onsene, pontho kudzesa cheza kuna anthu a madzinza onsene," 
Isaiah42:7 Unafungula maso a maboli-boli, unasudzula anyaperezo m'kadyaboso na kubulusa anyakumangwa mumdima." 
Isaiah42:8 “Ine ndine MBUYA; yeneyo ndi dzinanga! Demelero yanga nkhabe dzagawana na unango, penu kupasa chilemedzo changa mifanikizo tayu." 
Isaiah42:9 Yang'anani, pinthu pyakale pyachitika, pontho pya pinthu pitswa pinafuna ine kulongapi; ipyo mbapidzati chitika, ine ndinapilongaletu.”" 
Isaiah42:10 Imbirani MBUYA nyimbo itswa, Mkuzeni na nyimbo kubulukira nkhomo mpakana nkhomo ya dziko yapansi, Mkuzeni imwe anyakufamba na miyadiya pabara. Mkuzeni imwe anyamgombe na anyamntchuwa." 
Isaiah42:11 Thando na maluwani ache mbakhuwe; anyakukhala mu Kedara mbasekere. Anyakukhala mu Sela mbaimbe thangwi ya kukomerwa, iwo mbakhuwe pansonga za mapiri." 
Isaiah42:12 Iwo mbapereke demelero kuna MBUYA, pontho mbalalike pya ukulu wache m'madziko akutali." 
Isaiah42:13 MBUYA anaenda kachita nkhondo ninga nyankhondo wamphamvu, ninga nyankhondo iye anaonesa shungu ache; na mkhuwo iye anachitisa nkhondo kuvekera pontho iye anakunda anyamalwache." 
Isaiah42:14 “Ndzidzi ukulu ene ndakhala pyanga mulomo phoo, ine ndamatama pyanga mbandikhonda chitapo pinthu. Mbwenye chinchino ninga mkazi wa mimba pakubala, ndikulira, pontho kupuma na befu." 
Isaiah42:15 Ndinavunga pitunda na mapiri, mbandiumisa maudzu na miti. Ndinasandusa mikulo m'maphedi kukhala mathando atchetcha mbandiumisa mathawale a madzi." 
Isaiah42:16 Ndinaphata nsenji maboli-boli, na njira ile chipo hadzati gwandamo tayu, kuatsogolera na njira inakhonda iwo dziwa, Mdimawo ndinausandusa cheza, mbandiaasalazira dziko ya makolong'ondo. Penepi ndiye pinafuna ine dzachita; ine nkhabe dzaapasa nkhodolo tayu." 
Isaiah42:17 Kwache onsene anyakunyindira mifanikizo, ale ambalonga kuna adzimunthu kuti, ‘Imwe ndimwe milungu yathu,’ anabwezwa na manyadzo pikulu pene.”" 
Isaiah42:18 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Veserani kuno, imwe madodo; yang'anani imwe, maboli-boli mbamuone!" 
Isaiah42:19 Ayi pana munthu unango ule ndi boli-boli kupiringana nyabasanga, ule ndi dodo ninga nyamphangwa adatuma ine ule? Boli-boli mbani ninga munthu ambapipereka kuna ine ule, boli-boli ninga nyabasa wa MBUYA?" 
Isaiah42:20 Israele waona na maso pinthu pizinji pene, kwache iwe nee udapiikhe konta tayu; makutu ako ngakufunguka, kwache iwe nee udave chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu.”" 
Isaiah42:21 Thangwi ya kulungama kwache MBUYA adafuna pyakwanga kuchitisa mwambo wache kukula pontho kudemelera. 
Isaiah42:22 Kwache enewa mbanthu adavungwa, pontho kupokoserwa pinthu ale; onsenewo amala gwera m'mulindi, penu kubiswa m'perezo. Iwo asanduka pinthu pyakupokoserwa, wakusowa munthu na mbodzi ene wakuapulumusa; iwo asanduka pinthu pyakupokoserwa, wakusowa na munthu ene wakulonga kuti, “Abwezeni kwawo.”" 
Isaiah42:23 Mbani wa imwe anavesera penepi, penu dzapiikha konta ndzidzi unadzawo?" 
Isaiah42:24 Mbani adapereka Yakobo m'manja mwa anyamalwa, Israele m'manja mwa anyakupokosera pinthu? Ayi si MBUYA, adadawira ife ule tayu? Iwo hadavere tayu upangizi wache; iwo hadavere tayu matongero ache." 
Isaiah42:25 Natenepo iye adakhuthulira pana iwo ukali wache wakugaka na nyatwa za nkhondo. Udaafinikiza na malulume a moto, kwache iwo hapivese tayu; motowo udaapisa, kwache iwo hadapiikhe konta tayu." 
Isaiah43:1 Mbwenye lero MBUYA akulonga tenepa, ule adalenga iwe, Yakobo, ule adasasanya iwe Israele: “Leka chita mantha, thangwi ndakuombola; ine ndakuchemera na dzinako, iwe ndiwe wanga." 
Isaiah43:2 Iwe ungagwanda na pamadzi, ndinati ndikhale nawe; ungawambuka mikulo, madzi nkhabe dzakukulula tayu. Iwe ungagwanda na pamoto, iwe nkhabe dzapya tayu; malulume a moto nkhabe dzakunyanguta tayu." 
Isaiah43:3 Thangwi ine ndine MBUYA, Mulungu wako, Nyakuchena wa Israele, Nyankhombo wako; ndinapereka Iguputo kufuna kuombola iwe, pontho Kushi na Seba m'mbuto mwako." 
Isaiah43:4 Podi iwe ndiwe wakufunika pontho nyakulemedzwa pamaso panga, pontho na thangwi yakuti ndimbakufuna, ndinapereka anthu kufuna kuombola iwe, pontho amuna kufuna kuombola moyo wako." 
Isaiah43:5 Leka chita mantha, thangwi ine ndili nawe! Ndinadzesa anako kubulukira kumabulukiro dzuwa pontho mbandikugumanyisani kubulukira kumadokero dzuwa." 
Isaiah43:6 Ndinapanga kumpoto kuti, ‘Aleke anthu anga kwenda,’ pontho kupanga kumwera kuti, ‘Leka kuakhondesa kwenda.’ Dzesa ananga achimuna kubulukira kumadziko akutali, pontho ananga achikazi kubulukira kumadolomero a dziko yapansi," 
Isaiah43:7 munthu onsene wakuchemerwa na dzinanga, ule adalenga ine kuti andidzesere demelero, ule adaumba ine mbandimsasanya.”" 
Isaiah43:8 Mulungu akulonga kuti, “Phata nsenji ale ana maso, kwache ndi maboli-boli, ale ana makutu, kwache ndi madodo." 
Isaiah43:9 Madzinza onsene amala gumanyikana pabodzi pontho anthu anga akugumanyikana. Mbani wa iwo adalongeratu pinthu penepi, pontho kulalika kuna ife pinthu pyakale? Alekeni adze na mboni zawo kuonesa kuti iwo ngakuona, towera anthu anango akwanise kuva mbalonga kuti, ‘Mphyakuonadi.’" 
Isaiah43:10 “Imwe anthu a ku Israele, ndimwe mboni zanga, pontho anyabasanga adasankhula ine ale, towera mukwanise kundidziwa mbamundikhulupira pontho kuvesa kuti Ine ndine ene basi. Nkhabe Mulungu unango pontho pambali pa ine tayu, pontho nkhabe dzakhalapo unango m'nduli mwanga tayu." 
Isaiah43:11 Ine, podi ine ene, ndine MBUYA, tenepo pambali pa ine nkhabeve nyankhombo unango tayu." 
Isaiah43:12 Ine ndapitchulula pontho ndapilongeratu, tenepo ndidakupulumusani. Nee milungu inango yachilendo pakati panu idachita penepi tayu. Imwe ndimwe mboni zanga kuti ndine Mulungu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Isaiah43:13 Ande, pontho kubulukira pakutomaletu ine ndine pano. Nkhabe na mbodzi anakwanisa kupokosera m'manja mwanga tayu, ine ndingachita pinthu, mbani anakwanisa kundikhondesa?”" 
Isaiah43:14 MBUYA akulonga tenepa, Nyankhombo wako, Nyakuchena wa Israele: “Na thangwi ya imwe ndinatuma anyankhondo kusosa Babiloni, pontho Ababiloni onsene anathawa kwawo m'miyadiya ikhanyadira iwo ile." 
Isaiah43:15 Ine ndine MBUYA, Nyakuchenako, Adalenga Israele ule, Mfumu wako.”" 
Isaiah43:16 MBUYA akulonga tenepa, ule adasasanya njira pakati pa bara, njira yakugwanda na pamadzi amphamvu," 
Isaiah43:17 ule adabulusa pingolo pya nkhondo na akavalo, gulu ya nkhondo na anyankhondo pabodzi pene, tenepo iwo adagwa mbachimwana kulamuka pontho adathima ninga nsakali." 
Isaiah43:18 Mbwenye MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Duwalirani pinthu pyakale; lekani kakamira pana pinthu pidachitika kale ene." 
Isaiah43:19 Yang'anani, ine ndikuchita chinthu chachinchino! Ipyo pyatoma kale kuchitika; ayi imwe nkhabe kwanisa kupiona. Ndinasasanya njira m'thando yatchetcha, pontho mikulo ya madzi m'mbuto yakusowa pyakumera." 
Isaiah43:20 Podi na nyama zam'tsanga zene zimbandilemedza, mibinzi na mphuwani zene, thangwi ndapereka madzi m'thando yatchetcha, pontho mikhwawa m'mbuto zakusowa pyakumera, kupasa anthu anga pyakumwa, anthu anga akusankhulika," 
Isaiah43:21 anthu adapisasanyira ine ndekha ene, towera iwo alalike pya ukulu wanga.”" 
Isaiah43:22 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Kwache iwe Yakobo hudandichemere tayu, iwe Israele udatopa nane." 
Isaiah43:23 Iwe hudandidzesere tayu mabira kuti akhale nsembe zakupyerera; penu kundilemedze na nsembe zanu tayu. Ine sidakunensani tayu kuti mundipase pyakupereka, penu kukutopesani na kukupemphani pyakufukiza pyakununkhira tayu." 
Isaiah43:24 Imwe hamudandigulira pyakufukiza pyakununkhira tayu, penu kundichitisa kukhuta na mafuta a nyama zanu. M'mbuto mwache mudandinensa ndimwe na pyakudawa pyanu; imwe mudanditopesa na umambalanu." 
Isaiah43:25 “Ine ene MBUYA ndimbafudza pyakudawa pyanu, tenepo ine ndimbachita penepi thangwi ine ndine pano. Ine nkhabe dzakoya mangawa a pyakudawa pyanu tayu." 
Isaiah43:26 Yang'anani m'ndulimu pidachita ine; tendeni tiketesane. Longani pya mseru wanu kuonesa kulungama kwachita imwe. 
Isaiah43:27 Kholo wanu wakutoma ule adadawa; akadamu anu adandidawira. 
Isaiah43:28 Akulu-akulu anu adaswipisa nyumbanga yakupemphereramo; natenepo ndidatawirisa Yakobo kuvungwa monsene mwene, pontho Israele kuchitiswa manyadzo.”" 
Isaiah44:1 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Chinchino vesera Yakobo, nyabasanga, Israele, adasankhula ine ule." 
Isaiah44:2 Ine ndine MBUYA, ule adakusasanya, ule adakuumba m'mimba mwa mako, ule anafuna dzakuphedza: Leka chita mantha iwe Yakobo, nyabasanga, nyapamtima panga, adasankhula ine ule." 
Isaiah44:3 Thangwi ndinatchanyula madzi pana dziko yanyota, pontho kukuka mikulo mbuto zakuuma; ndinatsanyulira mzimu wanga pana ananu, pontho mtsanzayiso wanga pana pidzukulu pyanu." 
Isaiah44:4 Iwo anaphwitha ninga maudzu akuthirirwa mwadidi, ninga mikotamu yakumera m'khundu-khundu mwa mikulo ya madzi akufamba." 
Isaiah44:5 Unango anati alonge kuti, ‘Ine ndine wache wa MBUYA.’ Unango anati apithule yekha ene na dzina ya Yakobo; unango basi anati alembe pamkono pache kuti, ‘Wache wa MBUYA,’ pontho anapithula yekha ene na dzina ya Israele.”" 
Isaiah44:6 MBUYA akulonga tenepa, Mfumu wa Israele pontho Dombo wache, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene: “Ndine nyakutoma, pontho ndine nyakumalisa; nkhabeve Mulungu unango tayu, mbwenye ine ene basi." 
Isaiah44:7 Mbani unango akhala ninga ine pano? Mulekeni apilonge. Ngamulekeni apilalike mbatchulule pamaso panga, pyonsene pile pidachitika kubulukira pidalenga ine anthu a mvula zakale pontho pile pinafuna dzachitika m'tsogolo muno. Ande, mbapilongeletu pya m'tsogolo muno." 
Isaiah44:8 Lekani tetemera, lekani chita mantha! Ayi ine sidalonge penepi mbandipilongeratu kale ene tayu? Imwe ndimwe mboni zanga. Ayi pana Mulungu unango kupambula ine pano? Tayu, nkhabe Phanzwi inango; nkhabe na ibodzi ene inadziwa ine tayu.”" 
Isaiah44:9 Onsene anyakusasanya mifanikizo ngakusowa basa, pontho milungu imbakoya iwo ninga mfuma mphyapezi-pezi. Ale ambapipembedza ndi maboli-boli, pontho kukhonda kwawo dziwa pinthu kumbaadzesera manyadzo." 
Isaiah44:10 Mbani ambatanda kamulungu mbasasanya mifanikizo, ule nkhabe kumganyalisa tayu?" 
Isaiah44:11 Onsene ale ambapipembedza anati achitiswe manyadzo; amisiri mbanthu ene pyawo. Alekeni adze imisane nane; iwo anati agoswerwe mbaona nyatwa zikulu. 
Isaiah44:12 Nyakufula ntove ambakwata simbi mbaitukumiza pamoto wa makala; iye ambaphatisa basa nyundo kumenya nawo simbiyo kuisandusa mliungu. Iye ambachibonyola bonyola na mphamvu zache. Iye ambava njala mbataya mphamvu zache; iye nkhabe kumwa madzi tenepo ambakomoka. 
Isaiah44:13 Nyampala matabwa ambapima thabwa. Iye ambailemba-lemba na ntchiji, mbaigoba na piphano pyache. Iye ambasasanya dzimunthu, chinthu chakuonesa demelero ya munthu, towera chiikhwe m'nyumba yakupembedzeramo." 
Isaiah44:14 Iye ambatema miti yamkungudza penu kusankhula mthundu penu njale. Iye ambauleka kukula pakati pa miti ya mumsitu, penu kubzala miti ya paina mvula mbaikulisa." 
Isaiah44:15 Icho chakhala ninga nkhuni yakugasira moto, khundu inango ambachiyesa nkhuni zakuotha, khundu inango kuphikira mkate. Padzulu pache iye ambasasanya milungu mbaipembedza; iye ambasasanya mfanikizo mbaugodamira." 
Isaiah44:16 Na phindi inango ya thabwa iye ambaipisa pamoto; padzulu pachepo mbaphikapo pyakudya, kuotcha nyama, mbaidya mpakana mimbache nganganga, pontho iye ambaotha moto mbalonga mbati, “Onatu! Ndakhumbirwa; ndikuona moto!”" 
Isaiah44:17 Na matabwa akusalirawo, iye ambasasanya mfanikizo kukhala milungu yache mbailambira. Iye ambapemphera kuna iyo mbati, “Ndipulumuseni; milungu yanga ndimwepo.”" 
Isaiah44:18 Iwo nkhabe dziwa pinthu tayu, na chinthu chene chimbavesa iwo nkhabe; maso awo amala myedereka, towera aleke kwanisa kuona, pontho manyerezero awo afungika, towera aleke kwanisa kuvesa." 
Isaiah44:19 Nkhabe na mbodzi ene ambatomambo kunyerezera, na mbodzi ene ana nzeru nkhabepo, penu wakuvesa pinthu mwakuti alonge kuti, “Matabwa anango ndidayesa nkhuni; mbandiphika mikate na moto onthowo, ndidaotchapo nyama mbandidya. Ayi ndisasanye chinthu chakunyansa na matabwa akusalira? Ayi ine ndilambire thabwa yapezi-pezi?”" 
Isaiah44:20 Iye ambadya dotha, kupupwa kwacheko kwamuendesa m'tsanga; iye nkhabe kwanisa kupipulumusa yekha ene tayu, penu kulonga kuti, “Ayi chinthu chinaphata ine m'dzanjanga yamadyo si chapezi-pezi chenechi tayu?”" 
Isaiah44:21 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Yakobo, kumbuka penepi; thangwi iwe Israele ndiwe nyabasanga. Ndakulenga, iwe nyabasanga Israele; tenepo ine nkhabe dzakuduwalira tayu." 
Isaiah44:22 Umambalako onsene ndamala kuubulusa ninga makole, pontho pyakudawa pyako ninga nkhungu ya kumachibese. Bwerera kuna ine, thangwi ndakuombola ndine.”" 
Isaiah44:23 Iwe kudzulu, imba thangwi ya kukomerwa, thangwi MBUYA ndiye achita penepi; khuwa, iwe dziko yapansi. Imbani nyimbo, imwe mapiri, imwe misitu na miti yonsene, thangwi MBUYA aombola Yakobo, iye aonesa demelero yache kudzera muna Israele." 
Isaiah44:24 MBUYA akulonga tenepa, nyakukuombola ule, adakusasanya m'mimba mwa mako ule: “Ine ndine MBUYA, ule adasasanya pinthu pyonsene. Ndine ene basi adafuthula thambo; ule ndekha ene ndidatanda dziko yapansi," 
Isaiah44:25 Ndimbadzudzumisa pidzindikiro pya anyakuombedza, ndimbapupwisa nzeru za anyakukhumira, udziwisi wa anyanzeru ine nkhabe kuuyesa ninga pinthu tayu, mbandionesa kuti nzeru zawo nsakupupwa." 
Isaiah44:26 Ndimbatsikimizira mafala auprofeti a anyabasanga mbandichitisa kukwana-kwana ndoto za anyamphangwanga. “Ndimbalonga pya Yerusalemu kuti, ‘unakhala pontho na anthu,’ pontho pya maluwani a Yuda kuti, ‘Anamangwa pontho,’ pontho na pya madembe ache kuti, ‘ndinamangamo pontho.’" 
Isaiah44:27 Ndimbalonga kuna madzi akuzwika kuti, ‘Umani, pontho ndinaumisa mikhwawa yako.’" 
Isaiah44:28 Ndimbalonga kuna Kirusi kuti, ‘Iwe unakhala makabuswanga, mbuchita pyonsene pyakundikomera; iwe unalonga pya Yerusalemu kuti: Mzindawo mbumangwe pontho, pontho pya Nyumba ya Mulungu kuti: Maziko ache mbamangwe!’ ”" 
Isaiah45:1 Alonga penepi ndi MBUYA kuna Kirusi nyakusankhulikache, ule amphata na mkono wache wa madyo, kuti akunde madzinza pamaso pache; kudulisa mafumu pida pyawo pyankhondo, kufungula misuwo ya mzinda patsogolo pache, towera misuwo ileke dzafungwa:" 
Isaiah45:2 “Ine ndinaenda patsogolo pako mbandisalaza mapiri; ndinaswa misuwo yankuwa mbandigwanda-gwanda mphinga zasimbi. 
Isaiah45:3 Ndinakupasa mfuma zakubulukira kumdima, mfuma yakukoyiwa m'mbuto zakubisika, towera upidziwe kuti ine ndine MBUYA pontho Mulungu wa Israele, akuchemera na dzinako ule." 
Isaiah45:4 Na thangwi ya Yakobo nyabasanga pontho Israele asankhula ine ule, ine ndinakuchemera na dzinako mbandikupasa chidzo cha chilemedzo, podi kwene kuti iwe nkhabe kundidziwa tayu." 
Isaiah45:5 Ine ndine MBUYA, pontho nkhabeve unango tayu; padzulu pa ine Mulungu nkhabeve unango tayu. Ndinakupasa mphamvu podi kwene kuti iwe nkhabe kundidziwa tayu," 
Isaiah45:6 towera kutomera kumabulukiro dzuwa mpakana kumadokero dzuwa anthu adziwe kuti nkhabe pontho unango padzulu pa ine. Ine ndine MBUYA, pontho nkhabeve unango tayu." 
Isaiah45:7 Ine ndidasasanya cheza mbandilenga mdima, ndimbachitisa pinthu kufamba mwadidi mbandigwisa nyatwa. Ine MBUYA ndimbachita pinthu pyonsenepi." 
Isaiah45:8 “Iwe kudzulu vumbisa chilungamo; makole mbachiwazire padziko yapansi. Dziko yapansi mbiyashamule kuchitambira, towera chipulumuso chitumbuke, pontho chimere pabodzi pene na chilungamo. Ndalenga penepi ndine pano MBUYA.”" 
Isaiah45:9 “Dzedze kuna ule ambathimbana na Nyakumsasanya, kuna ule ndi chikalango chene pyache, pakati pa pikalango pyonsene pyakusasanywa na dongo. Ayi dongo inakwanisa kulonga kuna nyakuiphatisa basa kuti, ‘Chinasasanya iwechi ninji?’ Ayi chakusasanywacho chinakwanisa kulonga kuti, ‘Nyakundisasanyawe nkhabe luso tayu’?" 
Isaiah45:10 Dzedze kuna munthu ule ambalonga kuna babache kuti, ‘Mudandibaliranji ninga tenepa?’ Penu kuna mache kuti, ‘Chabala imwe ninji?’ ”" 
Isaiah45:11 Ipi ndiye pinalonga MBUYA, Nyakuchena wa Israele pontho Nyakumsasanyache: “Kulonga pya pinthu pinafuna kudza, ayi imwe mumbandivunza pya ananga, penu kundipasa matongero pya mabasa a manjanga?" 
Isaiah45:12 Ndine pano adasasanya dziko yapansi mbandilenga munthu kuti akhale mwenemo. Manjangawa adafuthula kudzulu; ndina utongi pana dzuwa, mwezi na nyenyezi." 
Isaiah45:13 Na kulungama kwanga, ine ndinalamusa Kirusi: ndinandendemeza njira zache zonsene. Iye anamanga pontho mzinda wa Yerusalemu mbasudzula pauperezo anthu anga adamangwa ale, kwache iye hanapichita kuti atambire kobiri penu mfupo tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene.”" 
Isaiah45:14 MBUYA akulonga kuna Israele kuti, “Pinthu pyakusasanywa mu Iguputo pontho malonda onsene a ku Kushi, pontho amuna akulapha a ku Saba, anabwera kuna iwe mbakhala anthu ako; iwo anakutewera mdungulu tapa-tapa uku amala mangwa na njema. Iwo anakugodamira mbalonga kuti, ‘Ndimomwene kuti Mulungu ali namwe, nkhabe unango tayu ninga iye.’ ”" 
Isaiah45:15 Ndimomwene imwe ndimwe Mulungu ambapibisa yekha ene ule, Mulungu pontho Nyankhombo wa Israele." 
Isaiah45:16 Anyakusasanya mifanikizo onsene anachitiswa manyadzo mbalulupiswa; onsene anaenda uku amala tota na manyadzo. 
Isaiah45:17 Mbwenye Israele anapulumuswa na MBUYA, pontho kuapulumusa kwache nkhwakukhala na kukhala; iwo nkhabeve dzachitiswa manyadzo penu dzalulupiswa na pang'ono pene tayu." 
Isaiah45:18 Thangwi MBUYA akulonga tenepa, iye ule adalenga kudzulu, iye ene ndi Mulungu; iye ule adaumba mbalenga dziko yapansi, iye ndiye adaisasanya; iye hadaisasanye kuti ikhale kwene yakusowa pinthu tayu, mbwenye kuti anthu akhalemo, weneyu ngule akulonga kuti, “Ine ndine MBUYA, pontho nkhabe unango tayu." 
Isaiah45:19 Ine sidapilonge chibiso-biso tayu, kubulukira kunango pontho m'dziko ya mdima. Ine sidalonge tayu kuna pidzukulu pya Yakobo kuti, ‘Ndisake-sakeni pyanu pezi pene.’ Ine MBUYA ndimbalonga pyakuona; ndimbalonga pinthu pyakulungama.”" 
Isaiah45:20 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Gumanyikanani pabodzi mbamudze; gumanyikanani imwe anyakupulumuka m'manja mwa madzinza anango, Ngakupupwa ale ambadza na mifanikizo yamiti, mbapemphera kuna milungu, ile nkhabe kwanisa kuapulumusa tayu." 
Isaiah45:21 Idzani mulonge pya mseru wanu; alekeni apangane pya nzeru. Mbani adalongeratu penepi kale ene, mbani adapilalika kutomera pakutomaletu? Ayi hakhali ine MBUYA tayu? Tenepo nkhabe Mulungu unango padzulu pa ine, Mulungu wakulungama pontho Nyankhombo; nkhabe unango tayu, mbwenye ine ene basi." 
Isaiah45:22 “Zungunukirani kuna ine mbamupulumuke, imwe anthu onsene a padziko yapansi; thangwi ndine Mulungu pontho nkhabe unango tayu." 
Isaiah45:23 Na dzinanga ine ndadumbira, na mulomo wanga ine ndalonga na mtima onsene wakuona, mafala ale nkhabe dzasanduzika tayu. Pamaso panga bondo yonsene inagodama, na dzinanga lulume yonsene inadumbira." 
Isaiah45:24 Pya ine iwo analonga kuti, ‘Muna MBUYA yekha ene basi muna chilungamo na mphamvu.’ ” Onsene adamzhangalira ale anabwera kuna iye, kwache anachitiswa manyadzo." 
Isaiah45:25 Mbwenye muna MBUYA pidzukulu pyonsene pya Yakobo pinayeswa pyakulungama, pontho pinakuzwa." 
Isaiah46:1 “Beli akukotama, Nebo akufamba kowa-kowa; mifanikizo yawo yathukulwa kumsana kwa mabulu. Mifanikizo yawo imbachita kuthukulwa ile njakulemera, njakulemera pyakwanga kuna mabulu akutopa." 
Isaiah46:2 Iwo ambafamba kowa-kowa mbakotama onsene pabodzi; iwo nkhabe kwanisa kupulumusa mitoloyi, kwache iwo ene ambaphatwa unyaperezo." 
Isaiah46:3 “Ngandiveserani imwe pidzukulu pya Yakobo, imwe anyakusalira na moyo m'dzinza ya Israele, anthu adaphedza ine ale kubulukira pa ndzidzi udakwatirwa imwe mimba, pontho alera ine kubulukira ndzidzi udabalwa imwe." 
Isaiah46:4 Podi na paunkhalambanu ene pontho mwenemo mwamera imvi, ine ndine anafuna dzakupasani moyo ule. Ine ndidakusasanyani, tenepo ndinakutsalakanani; ine ndinakuthukulani mbandikupulumusani." 
Isaiah46:5 “Mbani anafuna imwe kundisangiza naye, penu kundiikha sasawa na iye? Mbani unango anakwanisa kulandana na ine, towera ndisangizwe naye?" 
Isaiah46:6 Anthu ambafungula mabudu awo mbabulusamo golidi; iwo ambapima siliva na mdida mbalemba ganyo anyakufula simbi kusasanya mfanikizo, tenepo iwo adaulambira!" 
Isaiah46:7 Iwo adauthukula paphewa; iwo adautchimika pambuto pache mbachiimira penepo. Kubulukira penepo mfanikizowo nkhabe kwanisa kufamba tayu. Podi kwene kuti munthu alire pyache tani kuna mfanikizowo, iwo nkhabe tawira, pontho nkhabe kwanisa kupulumusa munthu na mbodzi ene panyatwa tayu." 
Isaiah46:8 “Kumbukani ipi mbamupiikhe m'manyerezero mwanu, piikheni mumtima mwanu imwe anyakupandukira." 
Isaiah46:9 Kumbukani pinthu pidachitika kale ene pile; ine ndine Mulungu, nkhabe unango tayu; ine ndine Mulungu, nkhabe unango ninga ine tayu." 
Isaiah46:10 Kubulukira pakutomaletu ndidadziwisa mamalisiro a pinthu, kale ene ndidalongeratu pikhafuna dzachitika. Ndidalonga kuti manyerezero anga nkhabe dzachimwanika tayu, pontho kuti ndinati ndichite chonsene chikhafuna ine kuchichita chile." 
Isaiah46:11 Ndikuchemera mphamba kubulukira kumabulukiro dzuwa; kubulukira kumadziko antomi ndikuchemera munthu, ule anafuna dzachitisa kufuna kwanga kukwana-kwana. Iye anachita pyonsene pidanyerezera ine. Pinthu pyalonga ine, ndinati ndipichitedi, pinthu pidasasanya ine, ndinati ndipichitedi." 
Isaiah46:12 “Ngandivesereni, imwe anthu akuuma mtima, ale muli kutali na chipulumuso." 
Isaiah46:13 Nsiku ya chipulumuso ndikuifedza chifupi, iyo nee ili kutali tayu; chipulumuso changa nkhabe dzadembuka tayu. Ndinapulumusa zioni mbandipereka demelero kuna Israele.”" 
Isaiah47:1 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Tchitha, pontho khala pansi pa fumbi, iwe mwali, Babiloni; khala pafumbi pakusowa mpando wachifumu, iwe mwali, Babiloni. Iwe nkhabeve dzachemerwa mtete-mtete ene pontho wakubalika." 
Isaiah47:2 Kwata libwe mbupeye ufa; kunundula chakumpsampsira nacho nkhope yako. Kwinja nguwo zako mpakana m'ntchafu mbuwambuke mkulo! 
Isaiah47:3 Iwe unakhala chitakwa-takwa mbuchitiswa manyadzo. Ine ndinati ndibwezere mbandikhonda dzasiya na moyo munthu na mbodzi ene.” 
Isaiah47:4 Dombo wathu, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndiye dzinache; ndi Nyakuchena wa Israele." 
Isaiah47:5 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Khala chete m'mbuto yamdima, iwe mwali, Babiloni; iwe nkhabe dzachemerwave matsano wa maufumu tayu." 
Isaiah47:6 Ine ndidazhangalira anthu anga, ine ndidaayesa ninga si anthu anga tayu; ine ndaaikha pansi pa utongi wako, iwembo hudaavere nsisi tayu, podi na nkhalamba zene iwe udazikalira mtima." 
Isaiah47:7 Iwe udalonga kuti, ‘Ine ndinathimiza kukhalapo basi, matsano wakwenda na kwenda!’ Kwache iwe hudaikhe konta pinthu penepi tayu, penu kunyerezera kuti penepi pinamala tani tayu." 
Isaiah47:8 “Chinchino vesera, iwe nyatsenzo, uku uli pakupata mbulonga wekha ene kuti, ‘Ine ene basi, nkhabe unango pontho tayu. Ine nkhabe dzakhala mamfelwa tayu, penu kuva kupha thangwi ya kutayikirwa na ana tayu.’" 
Isaiah47:9 Pyonsene piwiripi pinachitika ndzidzi pang'ono, nsiku ibodzi: kukhala mamfelwa pontho kuva kupha thangwi ya kutayikirwa na ana. Ipyo pinabwera pana iwe na shungu yonsene, podi kwene kuti iwe umbachita matsenga onsene, pontho pyaufiti pyakugoswa." 
Isaiah47:10 Iwe udanyindira kuchita pyakuipa mbulonga kuti, ‘Nkhabe munthu akundiona tayu.’ Nzeru na udziwisi wako, pidakuendesa m'tsanga, pontho udalonga wekha ene kuti, ‘Ndine ene basi, nkhabe unango pontho ninga ine tayu.’" 
Isaiah47:11 Nyatwa zinati zidze pana iwe, tenepo iwe nkhabe dzakwanisa kuzimalisa na matsengako tayu. Kuvungika kunagwa pana iwe kwakuti iwe nkhabe kwanisa kukukhondesa; nyatwa zidakhonda iwe na kuzilota kwene, zinati zikufikire mwakututumusa." 
Isaiah47:12 “Apo, thimiza kuchita pyaufiti na matsengako onsenewo, aphatisa iwe basa kutomera uwanako ale. Mwinango pinakwanisa pang'ono kukuphedza; mwinango unakwanisa kuthuswa napyo anyamalwako." 
Isaiah47:13 Uphungu onsene watambira iwe ule, lero wamala kukutopesa kwene basi! Anyakudziwisa pya nyenyezi mbadzetu akupulumuse, ale ambatchulula pinthu pinafuna dzakugwera pile mwezi na mwezi pakuyang'ana nyenyezi." 
Isaiah47:14 “Ndimomwene iwo akhala ninga mapesi; moto unati uapise. Iwo nkhabe kwanisa kupipulumusa okha ene tayu kuna shungu ya moto. Pano nkhabe makala amoto anakwanisa kuchitisa munthu kukhumbirwa tayu; pano nkhabe moto wakuti munthu anakwanisa kuotha tayu. 
Isaiah47:15 Penepyo ndiye pinakwanisa iwo kukuphedza napyo, anthu ale akhala na iwe kaliki-liki kutomera uwanako onsene. Ndzidzi onsene kwawo nkhuphophonyeka basi; nkhabe na mbodzi ene anakwanisa dzakupulumusa tayu.”" 
Isaiah48:1 Ngaveserani ipi imwe pidzukulu pya Yakobo, imwe ale mumbachemerwa na dzina ya Israele, imwe ale kholo yanu ndi Yuda, imwe ale mumbadumbira na dzina ya MBUYA mbamupemphera kuna Mulungu wa Israele, kwache nee mwakuonadi pontho mwakulungama tayu," 
Isaiah48:2 ale imwe mumbapithula mwekha ene kuti ndimwe mzika za mu Mzinda wakuchena mbamunyindira Mulungu wa Israele, ule dzinache ndi MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Isaiah48:3 MBUYA akulonga kuna Israele kuti, “Kale ene ndidalongeratu pinthu pidachitika kale pile, mulomo wanga udapilalika mbandipichitisa kudziwika, tenepo vumbu-vumbu ndidapichitisa kuchitika." 
Isaiah48:4 Thangwi ndidadziwa kuuma mtima kwachita iwe, uzingo wa khosi yako ukhali ninga simbi, chipumu chako chikhali ninga nkuwa." 
Isaiah48:5 Natenepo ndidakupanga pinthu penepi kale ene; kupilongeratu ipyo mbipidzati chitika, towera ukhonde longa kuti, ‘Milungu yanga ndiye idachita penepi; mfanikizo yanga ndiye adachitisa kuti pichitike.’" 
Isaiah48:6 Pyonsene iwe udapiva; piyang'anenitu mphapo pyonsenepi, Ayi iwe nkhabe kupitawira tayu basi? “Kutomera chinchino kwenda m'tsogolo ndinati ndikupange pinthu pyachinchino, pinthu pyakubisika pinakhonda iwe dziwa." 
Isaiah48:7 Chinchino ene pano pyamala lengwa, nee si kale ene tayu; iwe chipo nee hudzati kupiva tayu. Tenepo iwe nkhabe kwanisa tayu kulonga kuti, ‘Ande, ndikhapidziwa na kale ene.’" 
Isaiah48:8 Chipo iwe hudapive penu kupivesa tayu; kutomera na kale ene iwe hudafungule makutu ako tayu, ndapidziwa kuti iwe ndiwe wakupandukira; iwe umbachemerwa mphandu kutomera uwanako." 
Isaiah48:9 Na thangwi ya kufuna dzinanga kuti ilemedzwe, ine ndatoma thethesa ukali wanga; na thangwi ya kufuna kuonesa demelero yanga, ine ndauphata mtimanga, towera ndileke kukuvunga." 
Isaiah48:10 Yang'ana, ndakubulusa masepu-sepu ninga mumbachitirwa siliva pamoto; ine ndakuyesa m'dzenje ya nyatwa." 
Isaiah48:11 Na thangwi ya dzinanga, na thangwi ya demelero yanga, ine ndachita penepi. Thangwi yache ninji kuti ndilulupiswe? Ine nkhabe dzagawana demelero yanga na unango tayu.”" 
Isaiah48:12 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Veserani kuno iwe Yakobo, iwe Israele, achemera ine ule: Ine ndine Mulungu, nyakutoma pontho nyakumalisa." 
Isaiah48:13 Manjanga adaikha maziko padziko yapansi, pontho mkono wanga wamadyo udafuthula thambo; ine ndingapichemera, ipyo pimbagumanyikana pabodzi." 
Isaiah48:14 “Gumanyikanani imwe monsenene mbamundivesere: Ngupi mfanikizo wache udalongeratu pinthu penepi? Munthu adasankhula ine, MBUYA ule, anachitisa penepi kukwana-kwana pana dziko ya Babiloni; iye anachita pyonsene pinafuna ine pana Babiloni pile." 
Isaiah48:15 Ndine ene pano ndalonga; ande, ndamchemera ndine pano; ndinamdzesa, tenepo iye anapikwanisa pabasache." 
Isaiah48:16 “Fendedzani chifupi na ine mbamuvesere pinalonga inepi: Kubulukira ndzidzi udalonga ine pakutoma ule, ine sidapilonge chibiso-biso tayu; pandzidzi umbachitika ipyo, ine ene ndimbakhala ponthopo.” Chinchino MBUYA Mulungu andipasa Mzimu wache mbandituma." 
Isaiah48:17 MBUYA Nyankhombo wanu, Mulungu wakuchena wa Israele akulonga kuti, “Ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu, ule ambakufunzisani pinthu pyakukuganyalisani, pontho ule ambakutsogolerani kunjira yathema imwe kwenda nayo ile." 
Isaiah48:18 Imwe mbamudavera kwene matongero anga! Penepo mtendere wanu mbudakuka ninga mkulo. Kulungama kwanu mbakudakhala ninga mabimbi a bara. 
Isaiah48:19 Pidzukulu pyanu mbapidainjipa pyakwanga ninga tchetcha, ananu mbadakhala okhonda lengeseka ninga mapira, madzinawo nee mbadamala penu kuvungwa na pang'ono pene pamaso panga tayu.”" 
Isaiah48:20 Bulukani kuno ku Babiloni, thawani Ababiloniwa! Vekesani mbiriyi mwakukomerwa; pilalikeni: Pitumizeni mpakana kumadolomero onsene a dziko ya pansi, longani kuti, “MBUYA apulumusa nyabasache Yakobo!”" 
Isaiah48:21 Pidatsogolera MBUYA anthu ache m'thando yatchetcha, iwo hadave nyota tayu; iye adachitisa madzi kukuka pamwala kuti iwo amwe; iye adapandula mwala, madzi mbakuka kubulukira mwenemo." 
Isaiah48:22 Mbwenye MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Kuna anyakudawa nkhabe mtendere tayu.”" 
Isaiah49:1 Veserani kuno, madziko akutali, imwe anthu madzinza akutali! Ine mbindidzati balwa MBUYA adandisankhula kale, mbindili m'mimba mwa mama iye adandithuliratu dzina." 
Isaiah49:2 Iye adachitisa mulomo wanga kukhala wakutwa ninga talasada. Mumthunzi wa manjache iye adandibisa. Iye andichitisa kukhala ninga tswimo yakutwa, mbandibisa m'chakuikhiramo matswimo chache." 
Isaiah49:3 Iye adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Israele, iwe ndiwe nyabasanga; ule kudzera muna iwe ndinaonesa demelero yanga.”" 
Isaiah49:4 Kwache ine ndidalonga kuti, “Ine ndabulusa kaluma pezi pene; mphamvu zanga ndazimalira papezi pontho okhonda ganyali.” Kwache chidikhiro changa chili m'manja mwa MBUYA, pontho mfupo wanga una Mulungu wanga." 
Isaiah49:5 Natenepo MBUYA akulonga, ule adandisasanya m'mimba mwa mama kuti ndikhale nyabasache kubwezera Yakobo kuna iye pontho kugumanyisa Aisraele kudza kuna iye, thangwi ndine nyakulemedzwa pamaso pa MBUYA, pontho Mulungu ndiye mphamvu zanga." 
Isaiah49:6 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ntchinthu ching'ono pyakwanga kuna iwe kukhala nyabasanga kubwezera pontho madzinza a Yakobo, pontho kubwezera anango a Aisraele adakoya ine ale. Ndinakuchitisa pontho kukhala cheza kuna anthu a madzinza anango, towera ufikise chipulumuso changa kumadolomero a dziko yonsene yapansi.”" 
Isaiah49:7 MBUYA akulonga tenepa, Dombo pontho Nyakuchena wa Israele, kuna ule akhondwa pikulu pene, kuna ule adakhondwa mbalulupiswa na madzinza anango, kuna nyabasa wa atongi kuti: “Mfumu anakuona mbaimira, ana mafumu anakuona mbakulambira, thangwi ya MBUYA, ule ngwakukhulupirika, Nyakuchena wa Israele ule asankhula iwepo.”" 
Isaiah49:8 MBUYA akulonga tenepa: “Ndzidzi ungafika unafuna ine dzaonesa kukoma kwanga mtima, ndinakutawira, pontho nsiku inafuna dzaonesa ine chipulumuso changa, ndinakuphedza. Ndinakukoya mbandichita chiverano na anthu kudzera muna iwepo kusasanya pontho dziko na madembe ene," 
Isaiah49:9 kulonga kuna anyaperezo kuti, ‘Sudzukani pa nyatwa!’ Pontho kuna anyakukhala mumdima kuti, ‘Bulukani mumdimamo!’ Iwo anagwedula-gwedula m'khundu-khundu mwa njira mbagumana mpovu m'mapiri akupupwa." 
Isaiah49:10 Iwo nkhabe dzava njala penu nyota, nee mkatu-katu wa m'thando yatchetcha, penu mbebe wa dzuwa kuanensa tayu. Nyakuva nawo nyambalo ule anaaphata pamkono mbaatsogolera kwenda kumphuno za madzi." 
Isaiah49:11 Mapiri anga onsene ndinaasanduza njira, pontho misewu yanga inasasanywa mwadidi mwene." 
Isaiah49:12 Yang'anani, anthu anga anabulukira kutali pyakwanga, anango kumpoto, anangombo kumadokero dzuwa, anango kunthemba za Asiwani.”" 
Isaiah49:13 Iwe kudzulu, khuwa thangwi ya kukomerwa; sekera, iwe dziko yapansi! Imwembo mapiri gundikani nazo nyimbo! Thangwi MBUYA ambathondoza anthu ache pontho anava nyambalo na anyakusanyiswache." 
Isaiah49:14 Mbwenye zioni adalonga mbati, “MBUYA andipasa nkhodolo, MBUYA andiduwalira.”" 
Isaiah49:15 “Ayi mama angaduwalire mwanache ule ali pabele pache, mbakhonda kuva nyambalo na mwana adavera iye kupha? Podi kwene pichitike kuti aduwalire mwanache, ine nkhabe dzakuduwalira tayu." 
Isaiah49:16 Yang'ana, ine ndalemba dzinako m'manja mwanga; mafufu ako, Yerusalemu, ndzidzi onsene ali pamaso panga." 
Isaiah49:17 Amisiri ako ale anafuna dzakumanga pontho anati adze chinchino pano; anthu adakusakaza ale anati athawe. 
Isaiah49:18 Kwiza pontho mwaza maso ako; anthu ako onsene akugumanyikana kuti abwerere kwawo. Ine ninga Mulungu wamoyo, ndikudumbira kuti anthu ako anakuchitisa kuoneka wakubalika ninga pyakuthemesera pyakuvalwa na nyakukazhali." 
Isaiah49:19 “Podi kwene kuti udasakazwa mbusanduka madembe mwakuti dziko yako idavungwa monsene mwene, mbwenye chinchino iyo inakhala ing'ono pyakwanga kuna anthu ako, pontho adakuvunga ale anathawira kutali pyakwanga." 
Isaiah49:20 Anthu ako adabalwa m'dziko ya unyaperezo ale anati alonge iwe ukuva makutu kuti, ‘Dzikoyi yatichepera pyakwanga; ngatipaseni mbuto ikulu ene kuti tikhalemo.’" 
Isaiah49:21 Penepo unalonga wekha ene kuti, ‘Mbani adandibalira ana onsenewa? Ine ndidataya ananga mbandikhonda kwanisa kukhala na anango. Anthu anga adatamiswa kudziko ya unyaperezo mbapaswa nkhodolo. Mbani adalera mbakuza anawa? Ine ndikhali nyakambombo; apo anambowa adabulukira kupi?’ ”" 
Isaiah49:22 MBUYA Mulungu akulonga kuti, “Yang'anani, ndinakhupha anthu a madzinza anango, ndinaonesa chidziwiso kuna iwo; iwo anabwera na anako achimuna m'manja mwawo, pontho kuthukula anako achikazi paphewa pawo." 
Isaiah49:23 Mafumu kuna iwe anakhala ninga ababa adakulerani ale, amatsano anakhala ninga abzade. Iwo analamba pamaso pako; iwo ananyanguta fumbi kumanyalo kwako. Penepo unapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA; onsene anyakuikha chidikhiro chawo pana ine nkhabe dzataya mtima tayu.”" 
Isaiah49:24 “Ayi mungakwanise kupokosera pinthu m'manja mwa anyankhondo, penu kupulumusa anyaperezo m'manja mwa nyamphamvu zache?”" 
Isaiah49:25 Kwache MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ande, anyaperezo anakwanisa kupokoserwa m'manja mwa anyankhondo, pontho pinthu pinakwanisa kupokoserwa m'manja mwa anyamphamvu zache. Ndinati ndithimbane na anyakuthimbana na iwe ale, pontho anako ndinati ndiapulumuse." 
Isaiah49:26 Anyakukuponderezani ndinaachitisa kupidya okha ene; iwo anamwa chiropa chawo ninga mumbamwera iwo vinyu. Penepo anthu onsene anapidziwa kuti ine MBUYA, ndine Nyankhombo wanu, Dombo wanu, pontho Nyamphamvu wa Yakobo.”" 
Isaiah50:1 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ayi msiku udasudzula ine nawo manu uli kupi? Ayi nyamangawache ngupi kudakugulisani ineko? Na thangwi ya pyakudawa pyanu imwe mudaguliswa; na thangwi ya umambalanu manu adathamangiswa." 
Isaiah50:2 Ndzidzi udadza ine, thangwi yache ninji sidagumane munthu tayu? Ndzidzi udachemera ine, thangwi yache ninji pakhali nkhabe kutawira? Ayi mkono wanga ukhali wakuvira pyakwanga kuti ndichimwane kupulumusa? Ayi ine nkhabe mphamvu kuti ndinakwanisa kuombola nazo? Na fala ene ibodzi basi ndinakwanisa kuumisa nyanza, kusandusa mikulo kukhala thando yatchetcha; nsomba mwenemo kuvunda, thangwi ya kusowa madzi, pontho kufa na nyota." 
Isaiah50:3 Thambo ndimbaikukutiza na mdima, mbandichitisa chakuvala chache kukhala masakha.”" 
Isaiah50:4 MBUYA Mulungu andipasa lulume yakusudzuka, towera ndikwanise kulonga mafala akuwangisa nawo mtima anyakutopa. Machibese onsene iye ambandilamusa, mbafungula makutu anga ninga nyakufunza kufuna kuva pinafunziswa iye." 
Isaiah50:5 MBUYA Mulungu afungula makutu anga, tenepo ine sidapandukire; penu kumpasa nkhodolo tayu." 
Isaiah50:6 Ndidapereka msananga kuna anyakundimenya, chidevu changa kuna anyakundikweya ndevu. Ine sidaphimbe nkhope yanga tayu kuna kundiselusa na kuna kundiphulira mata kukhachita iwo." 
Isaiah50:7 Na thangwi yakuti MBUYA Mulungu ambandiphedza, ine nkhabe dzachitiswa manyadzo tayu. Natenepo ndachitisa nkhope yanga kuwanga ninga mwala, pontho ndikupidziwa kuti nkhabe dzalulupiswa tayu." 
Isaiah50:8 Nyakundiikhira kunduli pamseru ali chifupi. Apo mbani pontho anafuna kundisumira? Mbadzetu mphapo ndionane naye maso na maso! Nyakundisumiracheyo ngupi? Mulekeni alonge mseru una ine nayewo! 
Isaiah50:9 Ndi MBUYA Mulungu ambandiphedza. Mbani pontho anakwanisa kundidawisa? Onsene anati amale kusakala ninga nguwo; maberethe anati amale kuanyenyena. 
Isaiah50:10 Mbani pakati panupa ambagopa MBUYA mbavera mafala a nyabasache? Nyakufamba mumdima, ule nkhabe ona cheza tayu, mbanyindire dzina ya MBUYA pontho anyindire Mulungu wache." 
Isaiah50:11 Mbwenye chinchino, monsenene ale mukugasa moto mbamupimwinikira mwekha ene na nsakali zakugaka, thimizani kufamba m'cheza cha moto wanuwo, pontho cheza cha nsakali zagasa imwezo. Ipi ndiye pinafuna imwe dzatambira kubulukira kuna ine: Imwe munati muve kupha na nyatwa zakugoswa pyakwanga." 
Isaiah51:1 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ngandivesereni kuno, imwe anyakufuna kuchita pyakulungama, pontho ale mumbasaka-saka MBUYA: Yang'anani kuna phanzwi kudasemwa imwe kule, pontho m'tchinde mwa phiri kudakumbwa imwe kule;" 
Isaiah51:2 yang'anani kuna Abrahamu, kholo wanu, pontho kuna Sara nyakukubalani. Ndzidzi udamchemera ine, iye akhali wakusowa mwana; ine ndidamtsanzayisa mbandimchitisa kuinjipa." 
Isaiah51:3 MBUYA anati athondoze Zioni mbava nyambalo thangwi ya madembe ache onsene; mathando ache atchetcha iye anaasandusa ninga munda wa Edeni, mbuto yache yakusowa pyakumera ile ninga munda wa MBUYA. Muna iye munakhala kusekera na kukomerwa kokhokha, kupereka takhuta, pontho mkhuwo wakuimba." 
Isaiah51:4 “Ngandivesereni anthu anga; ikhani makutu kuno, imwe dzinzanga: Mwambo unabulukira kuna ine; chilungamo changa chinasanduka cheza kuna madzinza." 
Isaiah51:5 Chipulumuso changa chikufendedza chifupi mwakuchimbiza, kuombola kwanga anthu anga kuli m'njira; mkono wanga unadzesa chilungamo pana madzinza. Anyamgombe anayang'ana kuna ine mbadikhira chipulumuso changa." 
Isaiah51:6 Kwizani maso anu kudzulu, yang'anani dziko yapansi; thambo inamala wayuka ninga utsi, dziko yapansi inasakala ninga chakuvala, pontho anthu ache anafa ninga ntchentche. Mbwenye chipulumuso changa chinakhala na kukhala, kuombola kwanga nkhabe dzachimwanika tayu." 
Isaiah51:7 “Ngandivesereni imwe, ale mumbadziwa kuchita pyakulungama, anthu ale mumbakoya mwambo wanga mumtima mwanu: Lekani chita mantha na anthu ambakusumululani ale penu kutaya mtima na kukutikanani kunachita iwoko." 
Isaiah51:8 Thangwi uchenje unaadya ninga nguwo; mfunye zinaanyomola ninga thonje. Mbwenye chipulumuso changa chinakhala na kukhala, kuombola kwanga kunakhalapo mpakana mifendu yonsene.”" 
Isaiah51:9 Lamukani, ngalamukani, MBUYA! Mangani matimbira, ngalamukani ninga mukhali ipyo nsiku zagwanda zile, ninga mukhali ipyo mifendu ya mvula zakale. Ayi si imwe tayu ule mudagwanda nyangume Rahabi m'mapindi-mapindi, ule mudalasa na momba chirombo chile?" 
Isaiah51:10 Ayi si imwe tayu, ule adaumisa Nyanza Yakufira, madzi a m'nyanza yakuzwika pyakwanga, ule adasasanya njira panyanza yakuzwika towera anyakuombolwa ale awambuke napo?" 
Isaiah51:11 Anyakuombolwa na MBUYA anabwerera kwawo. Iwo anapita mu Zioni uku nyimbo zili fee; kukomerwa kokhonda mala kunakhala ninga chipewu chachifumu mumsolo mwawo. Iwo anadzazwa na kukomerwa pontho kusekera, pontho kutsukwala na kubulira pinati pibuluke pakati pawo." 
Isaiah51:12 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ine ene pano, ndine nyakukuthondozani. Ndimwe ani kuti mugope munthu ambafa pyache ule, anthu akubalwa na mkazi, ale akhala ninga maudzu ene pyawo." 
Isaiah51:13 Ayi mwaduwalira MBUYA nyakukusasanyani, ule adafuthula thambo mbaikha maziko a dziko yapansi, mwakuti mukhale na mantha nsiku na nsiku thangwi ya ukali wa anyakukuponderezani, ale ana phinga kufuna kukuvungani? Apo ukali wa anyakukuponderezaniwo uli kupi?" 
Isaiah51:14 Anyaperezo anati asudzulwe chinchino pano; iwo nkhabe fera m'kadyaboso, penu kusowa mkate tayu." 
Isaiah51:15 Thangwi ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu, ule ambanyandula bara, towera mabimbi ache amenye, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndiye dzinache." 
Isaiah51:16 Ine ndaikha mafalanga m'kanwa mwako mbandikuphimbira na mthunzi wa dzanjanga. Ine ule ndidaikha kudzulu m'mbuto mwache, ule ndidaikha maziko a dziko yapansi, pontho ule ndimbalonga kuna Zioni kuti ‘Imwe ndimwe anthu anga.’ ”" 
Isaiah51:17 Ngalamuka, chita khakhaphathu! Lamuka, iwe Yerusalemu, iwe ule waledzera na khomitcho ile ili m'manja mwa MBUYA, khomitcho ya ukali wache, iwe ule waikhuthuliratu, khomitcho imbachitisa amuna kudzedzereka ile." 
Isaiah51:18 Mwa anache onsene adabala iye nkhabe na mbodzi ene wakumphata nsenji tayu; mwa anache onsene adalera iye na mbodzi ene nyakumphata pamkono nkhabepo. 
Isaiah51:19 Nyatwa zikuluzi zadza pana iwe, mbani anakwanisa kukuthondoza? Madembe na kusakazika, njala pontho nkhondo; mbani anapiyesera kukupukuta misozi?" 
Isaiah51:20 Anako amala komoka; iwo ali thasa-thasa m'misewu ikulu yonsene, ninga nyasa wakukweshwa na msampha. Iwo amala dzala na ukali wa MBUYA, pontho kusumulula kwa Mulungu wako." 
Isaiah51:21 Natenepo vesera ipi, iwe nyakusanyiswa, ule waledzereswa kwache nee na vinyu tayu." 
Isaiah51:22 MBUYA Mfumu akulonga, Mulungu wako nyakutchinjiriza anthu ache akulonga kuti, “Yang'ana, ine ndakupokosera m'manja mwako khomitcho ikhakudzedzeresa ile; khomitcho ile, ndiko ya ukali wanga, iwe nkhabe imwa pontho tayu." 
Isaiah51:23 Ine ndinaiikha m'manja mwa anyakukusanyisa, adalonga kuna iwe ale mbati, ‘Gona na fufumimba, towera ife tifambe na pamsana pako.’ Pontho iwe udachitisa msanako kukhala ninga mataka, ninga njira yakuti anthu afambemo.”" 
Isaiah52:1 Ngalamuka, lamuka, iwe Zioni, mbumange matimbira! Vala nguwo zako za demelero, iwe Yerusalemu, Mzinda wakuchena. Anthu okhonda gwandwa nsonga yachimuna, pontho anthu okhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu nkhabe dzapitamove pontho tayu." 
Isaiah52:2 Gubudza fumbi yako, iwe Yerusalemu; ngalamuka mbukhale pampando wachifumu, Imwe anyakuphatwa a ku zioni pisudzuleni mwekha ene goli-goli ili m'khosi mwanuyo." 
Isaiah52:3 Thangwi MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Imwe mudaguliswa pezi pene, tenepo mwakukhonda pagali kobiri imwe munati muombolwe.”" 
Isaiah52:4 Thangwi MBUYA Mulungu akulonga kuti, “Pakutoma anthu anga adenda kakhala kudziko ya Iguputo; m'nduli mwache Aasiria adaapondereza.”" 
Isaiah52:5 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Apo ndinachita tani? Podi anthu anga adakwatwa unyaperezo okhonda pagalirwa na chinthu chene, pontho anthu anaatongawo akuaselusa. Nsiku yonsene dzinanga kwayo nkhutikanwa kwene basi. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Isaiah52:6 Natenepo anthu anga anati atawire kuti ndine Mulungu; pansiku yeneyo iwo anadziwa kuti ndine pano, ule adalongeratu pinthu penepi. Ande, ndine pano.”" 
Isaiah52:7 Ngakubalika pyakwanga pamapiri manyalo a anthu ambadza na mphangwa zadidi ale, ale ambalalika pya mtendere, ale ambadzesa kukomerwa, anthu ambalalika pya chipulumuso ale, ale ambalonga kuna Zioni mbati, “Mulungu wako akutonga!”" 
Isaiah52:8 Ngaveserani! Anyakulondali anu akukhuwa; pabodzi pene iwo akukhuwa thangwi ya kukomerwa. MBUYA angabwerera ku Zioni, iwo anati apione na maso awo ene." 
Isaiah52:9 Gundikani pabodzi pene kuimba nyimbo zakukomerwa nazo, imwe madembe a Yerusalemu, thangwi MBUYA apukuta misozi ya anthu ache, iye aombola Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah52:10 MBUYA aphatisa basa mphamvu zache zakuchena pamaso pa anthu a madzinza onsene, pontho dziko yonsene yapansi mpakana kumadolomero inaona chipulumuso cha Mulungu wathu." 
Isaiah52:11 Bulukani, bulukanimo mu Babiloni! Lekani khuya na chinthu chene chokhonda chena! Bulukanimo mbamukhale anthu akuchena pamaso pa Mulungu, imwe ale mukuthukula pyombo pya MBUYA." 
Isaiah52:12 Kwache imwe nkhabe dzabuluka mwakuchimbiza, penu dzabuluka mwakuthamanga tayu; thangwi MBUYA anati aende patsogolo panu, Mulungu wa Israele anakutchinjirizani kunduli kwanu." 
Isaiah52:13 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Yang'anani, nyabasanga anachita pinthu mwanzeru; iye anakwizwa mbalemedzwa, pontho anatambira chilemedzo chikulu chene." 
Isaiah52:14 Ninga montho mukhali ipyo anthu azinji adaphatwa na mantha pidamuona iwo, thangwi nkhope yache idasanduzika na kubonereswa kupiringana munthu onsene pontho makhaliro ache adasanduzika mwakuti nkhabe oneka ninga munthu tayu," 
Isaiah52:15 sasawambo anthu a madzinza anango anadodoma naye, pontho mafumu anaphopha pakanwa pawo thangwi ya iye, thangwi pinthu pidakhonda iwo pangwa anati apione pontho pinthu pidakhonda iwo vesa anati apivesedi.”" 
Isaiah53:1 Mbani adakhulupira mphangwa zathu, pontho nkhwa mbani kudatchululwa mphamvu za MBUYA?" 
Isaiah53:2 Iye adakula pamaso pa MBUYA ninga mphukira, pontho ninga mtsitsi m'mataka akuuma. Iye hakhali wakubalika penu wademelero tayu kuti titunduke naye, nkhope yache hikhali yakusirika kuna ife tayu." 
Isaiah53:3 Iye adakhondwa mbalulupiswa na anthu, nyansisi, pontho nyakukulitiri na pyakusanyika. Ninga munthu ule anthu adampasa nkhodolo, iye adalulupiswambo, na ife enembo tidakhonda kumulemedza." 
Isaiah53:4 Ndimomwene kuti iye adava kupha m'mbuto mwathu mbakwata pyakutsukwalisa pyathu, kwache ife tidanyerezera kuti Mulungu ndiye akumtchunyusa, kumpamantha, pontho kumsanyisa." 
Isaiah53:5 Kwache iye adalaswa thangwi ya umambalathu, pontho adava kupha thangwi ya pyakudawa pyathu; kutchunyuswa kudatidzesera mtendere kule kudagwera iye, pontho na pironda pyache ife tawangiswa." 
Isaiah53:6 Tonsenefe, ninga mabira tamala tayika, munthu onsene wa ife alokota pyache njirache; tenepo MBUYA atula pana iye pyakudawa pya ife tonsene." 
Isaiah53:7 Iye adaponderezwa na kusanyiswa, kwache iye hadabuluse fala tayu; iye adakwatwa ninga mwanabira kwenda kachekwa. Ninga mumbafulikira bira kuna nyakumchinga ubweyache, sasawambo iye hadafungule mulomo wache tayu." 
Isaiah53:8 Adamphata mwavinga mbamtonga mseru, tenepo adenda naye kampha. Apo mbani mbadakwanisa kudziwa pinafuna dzamgwera? Iye adabuluswa m'dziko ya anthu a moyo; na thangwi ya umambala wa anthu anga, iye adaona nyatwa." 
Isaiah53:9 Iye adasasanyirwa masiye pakati pa anyakudawika mbaikhwa m'masiye pabodzi pene na anyamfuma, podi kwene kuti iye hadachite na chakuzunguzika chene, penu m'kanwa mwache kulongambo pyakunama tayu." 
Isaiah53:10 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Kwache kukhali kufuna kwa Mulungu kumsanyisa pontho kumchitisa kuona nyatwa. Podi kwene kuti MBUYA achitisa moyo wache kukhala nsembe yakupagalira pyakudawa, iye anati basi aone pidzukulu pyache mbakhala na moyo wakulapha, pontho kufuna kwa MBUYA kunati kuchitike kudzera muna iye." 
Isaiah53:11 Angamala kuona nyatwa zachezo, iye anati aone cheza. Iye anakhutira na pinthu pidaona iye thangwi nyabasanga wakulungamayo analungamisa anthu azinji mbathukula pyakudawa pyawo." 
Isaiah53:12 Natenepo ine ndinampasa demelero yakuthemerana na akulu-akulu, pontho iye anagawana na anyamphamvu pyakupokoserwa kunkhondo, thangwi iye adapereka moyo wache mpakana kufa. Iye adayeswa ninga mbodzi wa anyakuswa mwambo, thangwi iye adathukula pyakudawa pya anthu azinji; kwache iye adapempherera anyakudawa, towera umambalawo ulekererwe.”" 
Isaiah54:1 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Imba, iwe mkazi wakuuma nthumbo, ule chipo hudabale mwana tayu; gundika nazo nyimbo, khuwa thangwi ya kukomerwa, iwe ule chipo hudave mtswotswo wakubala tayu; podi chinchino iwe unakhala na ana akuinjipa kupita mkazi ule ana mamunache." 
Isaiah54:2 Fumula mbuto yakumangirapo khumbi yako, futhula nguwo zachezo monsene mwene; laphisa nkhambala zako mbuwangise ntchiri zako." 
Isaiah54:3 Thangwi unabalalikana khundu ya kumadyo na kumabzere kwene; pidzukulu pyako pinapokosera mbuto madzinza anango mbapikhazikika m'mizindawo yakusowa anthu ile. 
Isaiah54:4 “Leka chita mantha; iwe nkhabe dzachitiswa manyadzo tayu. Leka taya mtima; iwe nkhabe dzalulupiswa tayu. Iwe unaduwalira manyadzo a uphaleako mbukhonda kumbukave nyatwa zonsene zikhaona iwe pa umamfelwako. 
Isaiah54:5 Thangwi Nyakukusasanya ndiye mamunako, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndiye dzinache, Nyakuchena wa Israele ndiye Dombo wako; iye ambachemerwa Mulungu wa dziko yonsene yapansi." 
Isaiah54:6 MBUYA anakuchemera kukubweza khala ninga mkazi wakusiyiwa na mamunache, pontho wakusanyika mumtima mwache, mkazi wakusembwa mbali mtete-mtete ene mbakhondwa na mamunache.” Mbwenye Mulungu wako akulonga kuti," 
Isaiah54:7 “Ndidakusiya kwene ndzidzi ene pang'ono basi, kwache na kuva nyambalo pikulu ndinati ndikudzese kukubweza." 
Isaiah54:8 Na thangwi ya kuzhangali ine ndidakupasa nkhodolo ndzidzi ung'ono ene basi kwache chinchino ndinakukomera mtima kwenda na kwenda, pontho ine ndinava nawe nyambalo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Dombo wako." 
Isaiah54:9 “Kuna ine penepi pyakhala ninga nsiku za Nowa, ndzidzi udadumbira ine kuti madzi makulu a ndzidzi wa Nowa nkhabe dzadya pontho dziko yapansi tayu. Natenepo chinchino ndadumbira kuti iwe sinakuzhangalira, penu kukusumululave tayu." 
Isaiah54:10 Podi kwene kuti mapiri atekenyeke pyawo, pontho pitunda pibuluke m'mbuto mwawo, kwache kukufuna kwanga kokhonda mala nkhabe dzabuluka pana iwe tayu, pontho chiverano cha mtendere chidasasanya ine nawe nkhabe dzasweka tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA, ambava namwe nyambalo ule.”" 
Isaiah54:11 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Iwe mzinda wakusanyiswa, wakuvinyizika-vinyizika na mphepo, pontho wakuchimwana kuthondozeka, ine ndinati ndikumange pontho na miyala yakudula, pontho maziko ako na miyala yakudula ya safire." 
Isaiah54:12 Ndinamanga nsanja zako na miyala yakufira, misuwo yako ya mpanda na miyala yakuyetimira. Mafufu ako onsene ndinaamanga na miyala yakudula." 
Isaiah54:13 Anako onsene anafunziswa na MBUYA, pontho ndinaatsanzayisa na mtendere ukulu pyakwanga." 
Isaiah54:14 Iwe unakhazikika na chilungamo chadi-chadi: Pyakuzunguzika pyonsene pinakhala kutali na iwe; thangwi nkhabe chinafuna iwe chita nacho mantha tayu. Pyakugoswa unalila dzapiva kwene na njira; ipyo nkhabe fika chifupi na iwe tayu. 
Isaiah54:15 Ngakhala munthu unango anakuthuswa, kweneko si kufuna kwanga tayu; nyakukusosayo anati aimise manja kuna iwe." 
Isaiah54:16 “Yang'ana, ndine pano ule adalenga anyakufula ntove, ule ambavukuta moto wa makala, towera afulire chida cha nkhondo, pontho ndine ule adalenga nyakusakaza, towera avunge;" 
Isaiah54:17 nkhabe chida cha nyamalwa chinafuna kukuwaza tayu, pontho iwe unapokanya nyakukusumira onsene. Penepi ndiye pyathema tambira nyabasa wa MBUYA, pontho anafuna kupichitisa kukwanisika ndine pano. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Isaiah55:1 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ngadzani, imwe monsene anyakuva nyota, idzani madzi alipo kuno; imwembo ale nkhabe kobiri, idzani mugule na kudya! Idzani mugule vinyu na mkaka okhonda pereka kobiri, penu chinthu chinango chene." 
Isaiah55:2 Mwatani munavunga kobiri na pinthu pile si mkate tayu, pontho kubulusa kaluma papinthu pile nkhabe khutisa tayu? Veserani, ngandivesereni, mbamudye pinthu pyadidi, tenepo moyo wanu unakomerwa na kudya pinthu pyakununa." 
Isaiah55:3 Ikhani makutu, mbamudze kuna ine; ngandivesereni, towera mukhale na moyo. Ine ndinati ndisasanye namwe chiverano chokhonda mala, kukufunani kwakukhulupirika pontho kokhonda mala ninga mudachitira ine kuna Davite kule." 
Isaiah55:4 Yang'anani, ine ndamsankhula kukhala mboni wa madzinza, kukhala nyakutsogolera pontho mkadamu wa anthu." 
Isaiah55:5 Imwe munachemeresa madzinza, ale chipo hamudzati kuadziwa tayu, pontho madzinza anakhonda imwe dziwa, anabwera na kuthamanga kuti akhale namwe, thangwi ine, MBUYA Mulungu wanu, Nyakuchena wa Israele, ndakugudumirani na demelero.”" 
Isaiah55:6 Msake-sakeni MBUYA panakwanisika iye kugumanwapo; mchemereni mwenemo iye mbali chifupi. 
Isaiah55:7 Nyakudawa mbasiye njira zache pontho nyakuipa mbataye manyerezero ache. Iye mbazungunukire kuna MBUYA, tenepo iye anamvera nsisi, pontho azungunukire kuna Mulungu, thangwi iye ngwakukoma mtima mbalekerera pyakudawa pyache." 
Isaiah55:8 “Thangwi manyerezero anga si manyerezero anu tayu; njira zanu si njira zanga tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA. 
Isaiah55:9 Ninga mwachitira thambo kukhala padzulu pa dziko yapansi, sasawambo njira zanga nsakulekana na njira zanu, pontho manyerezero anga apiringana manyerezero anu." 
Isaiah55:10 Ninga mumbachitira mvula na matalala kugwa kudzulu, mbapikhonda bwerera pontho kudabulukira ipyo okhonda totesa dziko yapansi, pontho kuichitisa kuphukira na kuchita maluwa, towera ipase mbewu kuna nyakubzala pontho mkate kuna nyakuudya," 
Isaiah55:11 ndi sasawambo na mafala akubuluka m'kanwa mwanga: Iwo nkhabe dzabwerera kuna ine okhonda phata basache tayu, mbwenye anaphata basa inafuna ine ile mbachitisa kukwana-kwana basa idaatumira ine ile." 
Isaiah55:12 Imwe munabuluka mwakukomerwa mbamuenda pyanu na mtendere; mapiri na pitunda pinagundika kuimba nyimbo pamaso panu, pontho miti yonsene inaimba m'manja." 
Isaiah55:13 M'mbuto mwa matenthere a minga minjale ndiye inafuna dzamera, pontho m'mbuto mwa mikandankhuku kesha ndiye inafuna dzamera. Penepi pinakhala chikumbuso cha ine MBUYA ninga chidziwiso chakwenda na kwenda, chile nkhabe dzavungwa tayu.”" 
Isaiah56:1 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Chitani chilungamo, pontho chitani pyakulungama, thangwi chipulumuso changa chili chifupi, pontho kuombola kwanga kunati kuonekere chinchino pano." 
Isaiah56:2 Nyakutsanzaya ngule anachita penepiyi, munthu anapiphatisa nganganga, ule ambachitisa Nsiku Yakupuma kukhala yakuchena, ule nkhabe kuiswipisa, pontho ule ambakhondesa manjache kuchita pinthu pyakuipa.”" 
Isaiah56:3 Mlendo ule aphatikana na MBUYA mbaleke kulonga kuti, “Ndimomwene MBUYA anati andikhethe pakati pa anthu ache.” Pontho munthu wakukapalwi mbaleke dungunya kuti, “Ine ndine kwene pyanga muti wakuuma.”" 
Isaiah56:4 Thangwi MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Kuna anthu akukapalwi, ale ambachitisa Nsiku Yakupuma kukhala yakuchena, ale ambachita pyakundikomera, mbakakamira kukoya chiverano changa," 
Isaiah56:5 enewa ndinaapasa dzina na mbiri yadidi pakati pa anthu anga m'Nyumba mwanga, kupiringana kukhala na ana achimuna na achikazi; ine ndinaapasa dzina yakwenda na kwenda, ile nkhabe fudzika na pang'ono pene tayu." 
Isaiah56:6 Kulonga pya alendo, ale ambakakamira pana MBUYA kumtumikira, kufuna dzina ya MBUYA, pontho kumpembedza, onsene ale ambakoya Nsiku Yakupuma mbakhonda kuiswipisa, pontho ale ambakhala nganganga kuna chiverano changa," 
Isaiah56:7 enewa ndinaadzesa kuphiri yanga yakuchena mbandiapasa kukomerwa m'nyumba mwanga yakupemphereramo. Nsembe zawo zakupyerera pontho na pyakupereka pyawo pinatambirwa paguwa yanga yansembe; thangwi nyumbanga inachemerwa nyumba yakupemphereramo madzinza onsene.” 
Isaiah56:8 MBUYA Mulungu akulonga kuti, kuna iye nyakugumanyisa anyakutamiswa a Israele mbati, “Ine ndinati ndigumanyise basi anthu anango padzulu pa anthu agumanyikana kale ale.”" 
Isaiah56:9 Idzani, imwe monsene pirombo pyam'tsanga, idzani mbamudye, imwe monsene pirombo pya mumsitu!" 
Isaiah56:10 Anyakulondali a Israele ndi maboli-boli, onsenewo nkhabe udziwisi tayu; onsenewo mbanambwa okhonda bulusa na fala ene, iwo nkhabe kwanisa na kuuta kwene tayu; iwo kwawo nkhugona kwene uku ndoto zili tawatawa, pontho kugona nkhudya kwawo." 
Isaiah56:11 Iwo mbanambwa ausa pikulu pene; iwo nkhabe khuta tayu. Iwo mbamakabuswa okhonda vesa pinthu; munthu onsene ambalokota pyache njirache mbachita pyawo pyonsene pyakuakomera. 
Isaiah56:12 Munthu onsene wa iwo akulira kuti, “Idzani, ngandilekeni ndisake vinyu! Mbatimweni pyathu bwadwa mpakana tikhute! Tenepo mangwana anakhala ninga lero, penu mwinango kupiringana penepa.”" 
Isaiah57:1 Anyakulungama ambafa, kwache nkhabe na mbodzi ene ambapiikha konta tayu, anyakunyindirika ambabuluswa pakati pa anthu, kwache nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene ambapivesa tayu kuti iwo abuluswa, towera nyatwa zileke kuagwera." 
Isaiah57:2 Anyakuchita pyakulungama ambakhala na mtendere; iwo angagonera mkono kwawo kumbakhala kupuma. 
Isaiah57:3 Mbwenye imwe, idzani kuno, imwe ana nyamatsenga, maputa na anyakuchita pyakuzuda!" 
Isaiah57:4 Mbani anasingirira imwe? Ayi analonga imwe tenepa mbani? Anatikana imweyi mbani? Ayi si imwe tayu anyakupandukira, ana a anyakunama ale?" 
Isaiah57:5 Imwe mumbapembedza milungu yakubalisa pinthu pakugonana pansi pa miti yamthundu na miti yakuvata; imwe mumbapereka nsembe ananu m'maphedi, pontho kunkhwimba zamwala." 
Isaiah57:6 Mumbakwata miyala yakumyalala m'maphedi mbamuipembedza ninga milungu, mumbapereka pyakupereka pyakumwa kuna iyo, pontho kupereka pyakupereka pya mapira. Ayi penepimbo nkhumbombowesa basi ukali wanga?" 
Isaiah57:7 Imwe mwasasanya talimba pansonga ya phiri yakulapha penepo imwe mudaperekapo nsembe zanu. 
Isaiah57:8 M'nyumba zanu pontho kumisuwo kwanu mwamala ikhamo mifanikizo. Kukhonda ine pano, imwe mudayalula patalimba panu mbamupakira penepo kuibwanyulaletu; imwe mwapakira nawo patalimba panu mbamuapagali kuti mugone nawo, mbamuyang'ana pezi pawo." 
Isaiah57:9 Imwe mudenda kuna Moleki na mafuta aolivi mbamukwata pontho mafuta akugwadira mwadidi azinji. Imwe mudachita kutumiza aimiriri kutali pyakwanga; imwe mudachita kutchithira mpakana kudziko ya anyakufa! 
Isaiah57:10 Nsinzo onsene udafamba imwe mudatopa nawo, kwache imwe nee mudalonge tayu kuti, “Pinachita ifepi mphyakusowa basa.” Imwe mudagumana mphamvu zinango mwakuti nee mudakhomfoke tayu." 
Isaiah57:11 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Milungu yache njipi idaona imwe mbamuchita nayo mantha kuti muname kuna ine ninga tenepa, pontho kuti muleke kundikumbuka penu kupinyerezera mumtima mwanu? Ayi ndi thangwi yakuti ndzidzi ukulu ene ine ndakhala pyanga mulomo phoo kuti mukhonde kundigopa ninga munachitira imwemu?" 
Isaiah57:12 Ayi mukunyerezera kuti pinachita imwepi mphyakulungama? Kwache mabasanu ndinaabulusa pakwecha pontho mifanikizo nkhabe dzakuganyalisani tayu. 
Isaiah57:13 Imwe mungalira kufuna chiphedzo, lekani mifanikizo yanuyo ikupulumuseni! Mphepo inati itswaire yonseneyo, muya ene pyawo unati uambumbuluthe. Mbwenye munthu ule ine mphakubisala pache, anatambira dziko yapansi, pontho phiri yanga yakuchena inakhala yache.”" 
Isaiah57:14 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Sasanyani, fumbulani, sasanyani msewu! Bulusani makolong'ondo m'njira ya anthu anga.”" 
Isaiah57:15 Thangwi penepi ndiye pyalonga Wamkulu pontho Nyakupita pyonsene, ule ndi nyakukhala na kukhala, pontho dzinache ndi Nyakuchena kuti, “Ine ndikukhala pambuto yapadzulu pontho yakuchena, kwache ndimbakhala pontho pakati pa anyakupichepesa na anyakuleka pyakudawa pyawo, kusisimusa moyo wa anyakupichepesa pontho kusisimusa mtima wa anyakuleka pyakudawa pyawo." 
Isaiah57:16 Ine nkhabe dzathimiza kuthimbana na anthu anga kwenda na kwenda, penu kuazhangalira kwenda na kwenda tayu, thangwi ndingachita tenepo mzimu wa munthu unati ukomoke pamaso panga, muya wa munthu adalenga ine ule." 
Isaiah57:17 Na thangwi ya pyakudawa pyache pontho bivu ine ndidamzhangalira; ndidamtchunyusa mbandimpasa nkhodolo thangwi ya kuzhangali, kwache iye adathimiza basi kuchita pyakumkomera." 
Isaiah57:18 “Ine ndaona makhaliro ache, kwache ndinati ndimuwangise; ine ndinamtsogolera mbandimpukuta misozi yache. Anyakusintili anandikuza na milomo yawo." 
Isaiah57:19 Kuna anyakukhala kutali na chifupi ene ine ndinapasa mtendere. Tenepo ine ndinati ndiawangise. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA. 
Isaiah57:20 Mbwenye anyakudawika akhala ninga mabimbi, ale nkhabe kwanisa kumbombowa tayu, ale mathomu-thomu ache ambakapiza usekere na matope ene basi." 
Isaiah57:21 Nkhabe tayu mtendere kuna anyakudawika.” Alonga penepi ndi Mulungu wanga. 
Isaiah58:1 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Pilalike mwakukhuwa, leka khala mulomo phoo. Galuza fala ninga ngoma. Longa kuna anthu anga pya kupandukira kwawo pontho kuna pidzukulu pya Yakobo pya pyakudawa pyawo." 
Isaiah58:2 Thangwi nsiku na nsiku iwo ambandisaka-saka; iwo ambaoneka ninga ambafuna kudziwa njira zanga; iwo ambakhala ninga dzinza ile imbadziwa kuchita pyakulungama, ile hidakhonde kuvera matongero a Mulungu wache tayu. Iwo ambandipempha kuapasa mwambo wakulungama, mbaoneka ninga ngakusasanyika kufuna kudza chifupi na ine, Mulungu wawo.”" 
Isaiah58:3 Iwo ambalonga kuti, “Thangwi yache ninji tapimana kudya, imwe mbamukhonda kupiona? Thangwi yache ninji tapichepesa tekha ene, imwe mbamukhonda kupidzindikira?” MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Kwache pansiku yanu yakupimana kudya, imwe mumbachita pinthu pyakukukomerani mbamuonesa nyatwa anyabasanu onsene." 
Isaiah58:4 Kupimana kwanu kudya mamalisiro ache ambakhala nthonga pontho mapoko-poko, pontho kumenyana unango na mwanzache na mashoko akudawika. Imwe nkhabe kwanisa kupimana kudya ninga munachitira imwe leromu tayu mbamudikhira kuti kupemphera kwanu kuveke kudzulu." 
Isaiah58:5 Ayi kupimana kudya kumbafuna ine nkhweneku, kuti munthu apichepese kwene nsiku ibodzi ene basi? Ayi nkhutchulimisa kwene msolo wache ninga mtete basi, pontho kugona kwene pamasakha na kupikhwaza madotha kwene basi? Ayi kweneku nkhupimana kudya kumbalonga imwe kule, nsiku yakukomera MBUYA ile?" 
Isaiah58:6 “Kupimana kudya chadi-chadi kumbafuna ine nkhuku: kusudzula njema kuna anyakusanyiswa, kusudzula magoli-goli kuna anyakukhonderwa chilungamo, kupasa ufulu anyakuponderezwa mbamugwanda-gwanda magoli-goli onsene." 
Isaiah58:7 Gawanani phoso yanu na onsene akuva njala, mbamupereke kuna amanzenza akutcherenga mbuto yakugona; mungaona anango akufamba chipezi-pezi apaseni pyakuvala, pontho lekani kuapasa nkhodolo abale anu a mimba ibodzi ene." 
Isaiah58:8 Mungachita tenepo imwe munaonesa cheza ninga makalakwecha, pontho munawangiswa kabodzi na kabodzi; tenepo kulungama kwanga kunaenda patsogolo panu, pontho demelero ya MBUYA inakutchinjirizani kunduli kwanu." 
Isaiah58:9 Imwe mungapemphera, ine MBUYA ndinakuvani; mungalira kuti ndikuphedzeni, ine ndinatawira kuti: Ndawo! Ndili pano. “Ngakhala imwe munasudzula magoli-goli kuna anyakuponderezwa, mbamusiya kuthonyana chala, mungaleka kulongana tsweda," 
Isaiah58:10 pontho ngakhala munadyesa anthu a njala, mbamupasa anyakuponderezwa pinthu pinasowa iwo, penepo cheza chanu chinamwinika mumdima, pontho mosiku anasanduka ninga cheza cha masikati." 
Isaiah58:11 Ndzidzi onsene MBUYA anakutsogolerani; iye anakupasani pyakusowa pyanu pyonsene m'dziko yakupisa dzuwayi mbapasa mphamvu manungo anu. Imwe munakhala ninga munda wa madzi azinji, pontho munda wa mphuno ya madzi ile nkhabe kuphwa na pang'ono pene tayu." 
Isaiah58:12 Anthu ako anamanga pontho pamadembe akale ale mbalamusa pontho maziko a mvula zakale ale; iwo anachemerwa anyakusasanya pontho mafufu akukugomoka, pontho anyakusasanya pontho misewu na nyumba, towera anthu akwanise kukhalamo.”" 
Isaiah58:13 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ngakhala imwe munathimiza kukhonda koya Nsiku Yakupuma mbamuthimiza kuchita pyanu pyakukukomerani pansiku yanga yakupumayi, ngakhala imwe munathula Nsiku Yakupuma ninga nsiku yakukomerwa, pontho Nsiku Yakuchena ya MBUYA ninga nsiku ya chilemedzo, pontho ngakhala imwe munailemedza pakukhonda bauka kwenda m'tsanga pontho pakukhonda kuchita pyanu pyakukukomerani penu kulonga mafala akupupwa," 
Isaiah58:14 penepo imwe munagumana kukomerwa muna ine, MBUYA, pontho ine ndinakupasani chilemedzo pakati pa anthu onsene a dziko yapansi. Pontho munakomerwa na dziko idakusiyirani kholo wanu Yakobo ile. Ine MBUYA ndalonga mafala enewa na pakanwa panga.”" 
Isaiah59:1 Ndimomwene kuti mkono wa MBUYA si wakuvira tayu kuti uchimwane kupulumusa, penu makutu ache kugontha kuti achimwane kuva." 
Isaiah59:2 Mbwenye pyakudawa pyanu ndiye pyakulekanisani imwe na Mulungu wanu; iye akupasani nkhodolo thangwi ya pyakuipa pyanu, towera iye aleke kukuvani." 
Isaiah59:3 Manjanu amala fira na mathotho a chiropa, mbamuswipisa pyala pyanu na pyakudawa. Pakanwa panu palonga pyakunama pontho lulume yanu yalonga pinthu pyakudawika." 
Isaiah59:4 Munthu angakhala na mseru na mwanzache; chilungamo nkhabe khalapo tayu. Iwo ambanyindira mphoka zakusowa basa mbalonga pyakunama; iwo ambanyerezera kwene kuchita pyaumambala basi mbachitadi pyakuipa pimbanyerezera iwo pile. 
Isaiah59:5 Pyakuipa pimbasasanya iwo mphyakugoswa ninga mazayi a mbobo; iwo ambasasanya utandaude. Munthu onsene wakudya mazayi awo anati afe, tenepo ibodzi ingasweka, mwana chipiri ndiye ambabulukamo." 
Isaiah59:6 Utandaudewo munthu nkhabe kwanisa kuuvala nguwo tayu; iwo nkhabe kwanisa kupimpsampsira okha ene na pinthu pimbasasanya iwo tayu. Mabasawo mbakuipa, pontho manjawo ambachita pyakuzunguzika." 
Isaiah59:7 Iwo ambathamangira kuchita pyakuipa iwo nkhabe dembuka kuchuchisa chiropa tayu cha anthu okhonda dawa. Manyerezero awo mbakuipa, ponsene panaenda iwo kwawo nkhuvunga na nthonga basi." 
Isaiah59:8 Njira zakudzesera mtendere iwo nkhabe kuzidziwa tayu; pyonsene pimbachita iwo mphyakusowa chilungamo pyokhokha. Iwo ambafamba m'njira zakupotoka-potoka; nkhabe nyakufamba na mwenemo anadziwa mtendere na pang'ono pene tayu. 
Isaiah59:9 Anthu ambalonga kuti, “Ife chilungamo tili nacho kutali pyakwanga, pontho kulungama nkhabe kutifedzera chifupi tayu. Timbasaka-saka cheza, kwache umbaona ife ndi mdima ene basi; timbadikhira kunja kukhala ngwiro, kwache chimbaona ife ntchigudu-gudu chene basi," 
Isaiah59:10 Ninga mumbachitira boli-boli kumphamphasa-mphamphasa pafufu, sasawambo ife takhala ninga anthu akusowa maso. Dzuwa ikuswa miti timbagwegweduka pyathu, kukhala ninga tili m'chidodo; ndimomwene, ife tingasangizwa na aphale amphamvu timbaoneka ninga anyakufa." 
Isaiah59:11 Tonsenefe timbakhumbza ninga anambwa; mbatilira mwakudungunya ninga nkhangaiwa. Timbasaka-saka chilungamo, kwache nkhabe kuchigumana tayu; ife timbadikhira kuombolwa, kwache kuli kutali pyakwanga na ife." 
Isaiah59:12 “Thangwi umambalathu wainjipa pyakwanga pamaso panu, pontho pyakudawa pyathu pikutipokanyisa. Umambalathu nkhabe kutimalira tayu, pontho ife nkhabe kwanisa kukhonda tayu kudawa kwathu:" 
Isaiah59:13 Tapandukira pontho tachitira upandu MBUYA, pontho tapasa nkhodolo Mulungu wathu; tapondereza anzathu pontho tapandukira, talonga pyakunama pile pyadzala mumtima mwathu." 
Isaiah59:14 Chilungamo nkhabe onekave tayu, pontho kulungama kuli pyako dziko yantomi; pyakuonadi nkhabemove m'misewu, kuona mtima nkhabeve gumana mbuto tayu." 
Isaiah59:15 Pyakuonadi nkhabe gumanwave tayu, tenepo munthu onsene wakuthunda pyakuipayo ambasanduka nyama kuna anyakuipa.” MBUYA adaona penepi mbaipirwa napyo, kuona kuti chilungamo nkhabepo." 
Isaiah59:16 Iye adadodoma kuona kuti nkhabe na mbodzi ene kufuna kuphedza anyakuponderezwa; natenepo iye adaapulumusa na mkono wache wamphamvu, mbakunda na kulungama kwache." 
Isaiah59:17 Iye kulungama ambakuvala ninga chapagangafuwa pache, pontho chipulumuso ambachivala ninga chipewu mumsolo mwache; iye ambavala kubwezera ninga nguwo, mbapifinikiza yekha ene na phinga ninga chakufinika." 
Isaiah59:18 Malingana na mabasawo iye anaatchunyusa na ukali wache kubwezera anyamalwache, pontho kuonesa nyatwa anyakumzonda; iye anabwezera anyamgombe pinthu pyakuthemerana na pyachita iwo." 
Isaiah59:19 Anyakukhala kumadokero dzuwa anagopa dzina ya MBUYA, pontho anyakukhala kumabulukiro dzuwa anachita mantha na demelero yache. Thangwi iye anabwera ninga mkulo wakukuka ule wagwinywa na muya wa MBUYA." 
Isaiah59:20 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Dombo anabwera ku Zioni, kuna pidzukulu pya Yakobo, pile pidaleka pyakudawa pyawo." 
Isaiah59:21 Kulonga pya ine, chiverano changa nawo ntchakuti: Mzimu wanga ule ali pana imwe, pontho mafalanga aikha ine m'kanwa mwanu ale nkhabe dzabulukamo tayu, penu kubuluka m'kanwa mwa ananu, penu pidzukulu pyawo tayu kubulukira ndzidzi uno kwenda na kwenda tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Isaiah60:1 Lamuka, mbuonese cheza thangwi cheza chako chaonekera, pontho demelero ya MBUYA yakuonekera pana iwe." 
Isaiah60:2 Yang'ana, mdima wagudumira dziko yapansi, pontho mdima wa ndiwe ani waphimbira anthu a madzinza, kwache MBUYA anaonekera pana iwe, pontho demelero yache inaonekera pana iwe." 
Isaiah60:3 Madzinza anabwera kuna cheza chako, pontho mafumu kuna cheza chako cha makalakwecha." 
Isaiah60:4 Chita maso kwize mbuone pinachitikapi: Onsene akugumanyikana kudza kuna iwe; anako akudza kubulukira kumadziko akutali, pontho anako achikazi anathukulwa m'manja." 
Isaiah60:5 Tenepo iwe unaona penepi mbukomerwa, mtimako unanumpha-numpha mbufufuma thangwi ya kusekera; mfuma yonsene ya pabara inadzeswa kuna iwe, kuna iwe ufumi onsene wa madzinza anango unabwera." 
Isaiah60:6 Mkumbi wa ngamila unakhala ponsene pene m'dziko mwako, ana a ngamila a ku Midiani na a ku Efa. Pontho onsene akubulukira ku Sheba anabwera, kudza na golidi na pyakufukiza pyakununkhira uku akulalika pya ukulu wa MBUYA." 
Isaiah60:7 Mikumbi yonsene ya ku Kedara inagumanyikana kuna iwe, mabira achimuna a ku Nebaioti anakutumikira; ipyo pinatambirwa ninga nsembe paguwanga, tenepo ine ndinapasa nyumbanga demelero ikulu pyakwanga." 
Isaiah60:8 Ninji penepi pinachita kumbuluka ninga makolepi, pinambuluka ninga jiwa kwenda kupisa pyawo?" 
Isaiah60:9 Yeneyi ndi miyadiya yakubulukira kumadziko akutali; patsogolo mbikhala ndi miyadiya ya ku Tarisisi, kudza na anako kubwerera nawo kwawo, pabodzi pene na siliva na golidi wawo kuti MBUYA Mulungu wanu, Nyakuchena wa Israele, alemedzwe thangwi iye adakupasa demelero." 
Isaiah60:10 MBUYA akulonga kuna Yerusalemu kuti, “Alendo anamanga pontho mafufu ako, pontho mafumu awo anakutumikira. Podi kwene kuti ine ndidakutchunyusa thangwi ya kuzhangali, ine ndinakukomera mtima thangwi ya kuva kwanga nyambalo." 
Isaiah60:11 Misuwo yako ndzidzi onsene inakhala khanang'ana, mosiku penu masikati, iyo nkhabe dzafungwa tayu, towera anthu akwanise kukudzesera mfuma ya madzinza anango, mwenemo mafumu awo akwatwa pamulikiti wa kukunda." 
Isaiah60:12 Thangwi dzinza penu ufumu ule nkhabe dzakutumikira tayu, anamala vungika; kunakhala kuvungika kukulu kwene." 
Isaiah60:13 “Miti ya paina, njale na mikungudza, demelero ya mumsitu wa Lebanoni inadzeswa kuna iwe, kudzathemesera nayo mbuto yanga yakuchena; tenepo mbuto imbakhala ine ile inalemedzwa." 
Isaiah60:14 Ana a anyakukupondereza anabwera mbalamba pamaso pako; onsene anakululupisa ale anati akulambire. Iwo anakuchemera mzinda wa MBUYA, Zioni, mzinda wa Nyakuchena wa Israele." 
Isaiah60:15 “Podi kwene iwe wakhondwa mbuzondwa, wakusowa munthu na mbodzi ene wakugwanda na mwenemo, ndinakuchitisa kukhala wamkulu kwenda na kwenda, pontho kukomerwa kwa mifendu yonsene." 
Isaiah60:16 Iwe unamwa mkaka wakubulukira kumadzinza anango mbuyamwa mabele achifumu. Penepo unapidziwa kuti ine MBUYA ndine Nyankhombo wako, Dombo wako, Nyamphamvu zonsene wa Yakobo." 
Isaiah60:17 M'mbuto mwa nkuwa ndinakudzesera golidi, pontho siliva m'mbuto mwa simbi. M'mbuto mwa matabwa ndinakudzesera nkuwa, pontho simbi m'mbuto mwa miyala. Ndinachitisa mtendere kukhala nyakukuyang'anira pontho chilungamo kukhala mtongi wako." 
Isaiah60:18 M'dziko mwako nkhabeve dzaveka pontho pinthu pyakuzunguzika tayu, nee kuvungika penu kusakazika m'madire mwako tayu, mbwenye unachemera mafufu ako chipulumuso, pontho misuwo yako ya mpanda chilemedzo." 
Isaiah60:19 Dzuwa nkhabe dzakhalave cheza chako na masikati tayu, penu mwezi dzakumwinikira pontho na mosiku tayu, thangwi MBUYA ndiye anakhala cheza chako kwenda na kwenda, pontho Mulungu wako ndiye anakhala demelero yako." 
Isaiah60:20 Dzuwako nkhabe dzathobilave pontho tayu, pontho mwezi wako nkhabe dzathimave tayu; MBUYA ndiye anakhala cheza chako kwenda na kwenda, pontho nsiku zako zakutsukwala zinamala." 
Isaiah60:21 Anthu ako onsene anafamba m'njira zakulungama, tenepo dzikoyi inakhala yawo ene kwenda na kwenda. Iwo ndi mphukira idatcheka ine ile, basa idaphata ine na manjanga, towera kuonesa demelero yanga yonsene." 
Isaiah60:22 Banja ing'onoletu inasanduka mbumba, pontho mbumba ing'onoletu inasanduka dzinza ya mphamvu, pandzidzi wache ndinati ndipichite penepi mwakuchimbiza. Ine ndine MBUYA.”" 
Isaiah61:1 Mzimu wa MBUYA Mulungu uli pana ine, thangwi MBUYA andisankhula kuti ndilalike mphangwa zadidi kuna anyakutcherenga. Iye andituma kuti ndiwangise mtima anyakusanyika, pontho kalalika pya ufulu kuna anyakuphatwa, kusudzula kubulukira mumdima anyaperezo," 
Isaiah61:2 kulalika pya ndzidzi unafuna MBUYA kupulumusa anthu ache, pontho nsiku inafuna Mulungu wathu kubwezera anyamalwache. Iye andituma pontho kuthondoza anyakulira onsene," 
Isaiah61:3 pontho kupereka pyakusowa kuna anyakubulira mu Zioni, kuapasa m'mbuto mwa dotha, maluwa akukomerwa nawo, mafuta akugwadira mwadidi m'mbuto mwa kusintili, pontho nguwo zachilemedzo m'mbuto mwa kusanyika mumtima. Iwo anachemerwa miti yamthundu yakulungama, pyakubzalwa na MBUYA, towera kuonesa demelero yache." 
Isaiah61:4 Iwo anamanga pontho pamadembe akale ale, pontho kusasanya pontho mbuto ikhadavungwa kale ene ile; iwo anamanga pontho mizinda yakuvungika, ile yasakazika mifendu izinji ene." 
Isaiah61:5 Alendo anadyesa mabirako; anthu akudza anaphata basa m'mindako na mindako yamfesa. 
Isaiah61:6 Tenepo imwe munachemerwa anyansembe a MBUYA, anthu anakuthulani anyakutumikira a Mulungu wathu. Imwe munadya mfuma ya madzinza anango, pontho munanyada na mfumawo." 
Isaiah61:7 M'mbuto mwa manyadzo, anthu anga anatambira kakuinjipa kawiri khundu yawo, pontho m'mbuto mwa kululupiswa iwo anakomerwa na dziko idatambira iwo ile; natenepo iwo anakwata kakuinjipa kawiri dziko yawo, pontho kukomerwa kokhonda mala kunakhala pana iwo." 
Isaiah61:8 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Thangwi ine MBUYA ndimbafuna chilungamo; ine ndimbazondana na kuba pontho kudawika. Na kukhulupirika kwanga ine ndinati ndiafupe anthu anga, pontho ndinachita nawo chiverano chokhonda mala." 
Isaiah61:9 Pidzukulu pyawo pinadziwika pakati pa madzinza anango, anawombo anadziwika pakati pa anthu azinji ene. Onsene anafuna dzaaonawo anadzindikira kuti iwo ndi mtundu wa anthu atsanzayiswa na MBUYA ale.”" 
Isaiah61:10 Ine ndimbakomerwa pyakwanga pene muna MBUYA; moyo wanga umbasekera muna Mulungu wanga. Thangwi iye andivazika nguwo ninga chipulumuso, pontho andifinikiza mkhanjo wa pyakulungama, ninga mumbapithemesera nyakukazhali na nguwo zadidi, pontho nyakusembwa na pinthu pyakudula." 
Isaiah61:11 Ninga montho mumbachitira mataka kumeresa mbewu, pontho munda kukulisa pyakubzalwa mwenemo, sasawambo MBUYA Mulungu anachitisa kulungama na chilemedzo kumera pamaso pa madzinza onsene." 
Isaiah62:1 Na thangwi ya Zioni, ine nkhabe khala mulomo phoo tayu, na thangwi ya Yerusalemu, ine nkhabe khala kwene okhonda longa pinthu tayu, mpakana kulungama kwache kuonese cheza ninga makalakwecha, pontho chipulumuso chache chiyerime ninga nsakali." 
Isaiah62:2 Madzinza anango anaona kulungama kwako, pontho mafumu onsene anaona demelero yako; iwe unachemerwa na dzina yachinchino dzina ile inafuna kukutchandula mulomo wa MBUYA mwenechiroache." 
Isaiah62:3 Iwe unakhala ninga chipewu chademelero m'manja mwa MBUYA, pontho ninga kamdedzi wachifumu m'manja mwa Mulungu wako." 
Isaiah62:4 Iwe nkhabe kuchemerwave Nyakusiyiwa yekha tayu, penu dziko yako kuthulwa pontho Madembe tayu. Mbwenye unachemerwa “Mulungu akomerwa naye,” dziko yakombo inachemerwa “Nyakusembwa;” thangwi MBUYA anakomerwa nawe, pontho iye anakhala ninga mamuna wa dziko yako." 
Isaiah62:5 Ninga mumbachitira mphale kusemba mwali, sasawambo nyakukusasanya anakusemba; ninga mumbachitira nyakukazhali kukomerwa na mkazi asemba iye, sasawambo Mulungu wako ambakomerwambo nawe." 
Isaiah62:6 Ine ndaikha anyakulondali m'mafufu mwako, iwe Yerusalemu; iwo nkhabe khala kwene mulomo phoo mosiku penu masikati tayu. Imwe, ale mumbachemera MBUYA, lekani khala na ndzidzi wakupuma," 
Isaiah62:7 pontho lekani kumpasa ndzidzi wakupuma mpakana iye akhazikisa Yerusalemu, pontho kuuchitisa kuti dziko yapansi iusimbe."
