Isaiah62:8 MBUYA adumbira na pakhosi pache mbapichita na mphamvu zache zonsene. Iye alonga kuti, “Na kutani kwene, ine nkhabeve pereka mapiranu ninga phoso kuna anyamalwanu tayu, pontho na kutani kwene, anyakudza nkhabe kumwave vinyu wachinchino, abulusira imwe kaluma ule tayu;" 
Isaiah62:9 mbwenye anyakuvuna mapira ndiye anafuna kudya mbakuza MBUYA, pontho anyakutchola mfesa ndiye anafuna kumwa vinyu, mupintalo pya mbuto yanga yakuchena.”" 
Isaiah62:10 Imwe anthu a ku Yerusalemu, bulukani mumzindamo kasasanyireni njira anthu anafuna bwerera ale. Sasanyani, fumbulani msewu ukulu! Bulusani miyala. Imisani bandera m'dzulu ninga chidziwiso kuna madzinza." 
Isaiah62:11 MBUYA alalika mpakana kumadolomero a dziko yapansi kuti, “Longani kuna anthu a ku Zioni kuti, ‘Ngayang'anani, Nyankhombo wanu akudza! Iye akudza na mfupo wache, anthu adapulumusa iye ale.’ ”" 
Isaiah62:12 Iwo anachemerwa anthu akuchena, anyakuombolwa a MBUYA, iwembo unachemerwa mzinda wapamtima pa Mulungu, mzinda ule hudasiyiwe okha ene tayu." 
Isaiah63:1 “Mbani weneyu anadza kubulukira ku Edomu, kubulukira ku Bozira na nguwo zache zakukhala na mathotho akufira? Weneyu mbani avala nguwo za demelero, uku akudza wititi na mphamvu zache zonseneyi?” “Ndine pano nyakulonga pyakulungama, pontho nyamphamvu kukwanisa kupulumusa.”" 
Isaiah63:2 “Thangwi yache ninji nguwo zako zafira, ninga nguwo za nyakutchitchitha vinyu?" 
Isaiah63:3 “Ine ndapondedza madzinza ninga mfesa m'dzenje yakutchitchithira vinyu; kubulukira kuna madzinza nkhabe na mbodzi ene akhali nane tayu. Ine ndidaapondedza thangwi ya kuzhangali kwanga, na ukali wanga ine ndidaaponda-ponda; chiropa chawo chidathomukira nguwo zanga, tenepo pyakuvala pyanga pyonsene pikhali mathotho okhokha." 
Isaiah63:4 Thangwi nsiku ikhafuna ine bwezera ile ikhali mumtima mwanga, pontho chaka chikhafuna ine kuombola, chinchino chafika." 
Isaiah63:5 Ine ndidamwaza maso, kwache pakhali nkhabe nyakufuna kundiphedza, ndidadodoma kuti pakhali nkhabe nyakufuna kundipasa mphamvu; tenepo ine ndidapichita na mphamvu zanga ndekha, ukali wanga ndiye udandipasa mphamvu." 
Isaiah63:6 Na kuzhangali kwanga ine ndidapondereza madzinza; na ukali wanga ine ndidaachitisa kuledzera mbandichuchisa chiropa chawo pansi.” 
Isaiah63:7 Ine ndinalonga pya kutifuna kwache kokhonda mala kwa MBUYA, mabasa athema iye kukuzwa nawo, malingana na pyonsene pyatichitira MBUYA; ande, pinthu pizinji pyadidi pyachitira iye dzinza ya Israele, malingana na kuva kwache nyambalo pontho na kukula kwa kuafuna kwache kokhonda mala." 
Isaiah63:8 MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Ndimomwene iwo mbanthu anga, ana ale nkhabe khala akunama kuna ine tayu.” Natenepo iye adasanduka Nyankhombo wawo." 
Isaiah63:9 Mu kusanyika kwawo konsene iye adasanyikambo nawo pabodzi, tenepo iye ene adaapulumusa, nee mngelo wache tayu. Kudzera mu kuafuna kwache na nsisi zache, iye adaaombola; mbaayang'anira ninga ana kubulukira kale ene." 
Isaiah63:10 Kwache iwo adapandukira mbatsukwalisa Mzimu wache Wakuchena. Tenepo iye adaasandukira mbakhala nyamalwawo, pontho iye ene adathimbana nawo." 
Isaiah63:11 Tenepo anthu ache adakumbuka pya nsiku zakaleletu, nsiku za Mose na anthu ache, ali kupi munthu adaadzesa kuwambuka nyanza, pabodzi na makabuswa wa mkumbi wache? Ali kupi, ule adaikha Mzimu wache Wakuchena pakati pawo?" 
Isaiah63:12 Ali kupi, ule na mphamvu zache zikulu adachita pyakudodomesa kudzera muna nyabasache Mose, ule adagawa madzi pamaso pawo, kuti iye atambire chilemedzo kwenda na kwenda," 
Isaiah63:13 ule adaachitisa kugwanda na pamadzi akuzwika? Ninga kavalo wakufamba m'thando, iwo hadagwegweduke na pang'ono pene tayu;" 
Isaiah63:14 ninga ng'ombe zakubidira kuphedi, iwo adachitiswa kupuma na Mzimu wa MBUYA. Mwenemu ndi mule mudayang'anira imwe anthu anu, towera dzinanu ilemedzwe." 
Isaiah63:15 Yang'anani pansi kubulukira kudzuluko mbamuone, kubulukira pa mpando wanu wakuchena waneng'a pontho wademelero. Phinganu pontho mboko zanu pili kupi? Imwe nkhabe kutionesave kutifuna kwanu pontho kutiverave nsisi tayu." 
Isaiah63:16 Kwache imwe ndimwe Babathu, podi kwene kuti Abrahamu nkhabe kutidziwa tayu, pontho Israele nkhabe kutidzindikira tayu; imwe MBUYA ndimwe Babathu, Dombo wathu kubulukira kale ene ndi dzinanu." 
Isaiah63:17 Mwatani MBUYA, munatichitisa kubauka kubuluka kuna imwe mbatiumisa mtima kakata, towera tileke kukugopani? Bwererani, thangwi ya anyabasanu, madzinza adasankhula imwe ale." 
Isaiah63:18 Ndzidzi pang'ono anthu anu adakwata mbuto yakuchena, mbwenye lero anyamalwathu apondedza mbuto yanu yakuchena." 
Isaiah63:19 Ife tasanduka ninga anthu ale chipo hamudaatonge tayu; ninga ale chipo hadakhale anthu anu tayu. 
Isaiah64:1 MBUYA mwatani munakhonda thalura thambo mbamutchitha pansi pano, towera mapiri atetemere pamaso panu?" 
Isaiah64:2 Ninga mumbachitira moto kupisa matenthere pontho kuchitisa madzi kupeluka, sasawambo idzani pansi pano mbamuchitise dzinanu kudziwika pakati pa anyamalwanu, pontho kuchitisa madzinza kutetemera pamaso panu!" 
Isaiah64:3 Thangwi ndzidzi udachita imwe pyakugoswa ule, pinthu pikhakhonda ife dikhira kuti pinachitika pile, imwe mudatchitha pansi pano, tenepo mapiri adatekenyeka pamaso panu." 
Isaiah64:4 Chipo nee mbodzi adzati kuva, nee khutu idzati vesesa tayu, nee diso idzati ona tayu Mulungu unango ninga imwepo, ule ambachita pinthu ninga penepi kuna anyakumkhulupira." 
Isaiah64:5 Imwe mumbaphedza anthu ale ambakomerwa na kuchita pyakulungama, ale ambatsalakana pinthu pimbafuna imwe pile. Kwache pidathimiza ife kudawa, imwe mudazhangali. Apo tenepambo tinapulumuka tani?" 
Isaiah64:6 Tonsenefe tasanduka ninga munthu mbodzi okhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu, pontho mabasathu onsene akulungama akhala ninga masakala akunyansa; ife taunyala ninga tsamba pontho ninga mphepo pyakudawa pyathu pikutitswaira." 
Isaiah64:7 Nkhabe na mbodzi ene ambachemera dzinanu, penu kuyesera kupempha chiphedzo kuna imwe tayu; thangwi imwe mwatibisira nkhope yanu, mbamutitelegali kukhala mabitchu a pyakudawa pyathu." 
Isaiah64:8 Kwache imwe MBUYA, ndimwe Babathu. Ife ndife dongo, imwembo ndimwe nyakuumba pyombo; ife ndife basa ya manjanu." 
Isaiah64:9 Lekani kuzhangali kupiringana madire MBUYA; lekani kumbuka pyakudawa pyathu kwenda na kwenda. Taphata miyendo, ngatinyerezerenimbo ife, thangwi tonsenefe ndife anthu anu." 
Isaiah64:10 Mizindanu yakusankhulika ile, lero yasanduka thando yatchetcha; podi na zioni ene asandukambo thando yatchetcha basi, Yerusalemu amala vungwa." 
Isaiah64:11 Nyumba ya Mulungu, yakuchena pontho yakudemelera, kukhakukuzani makolo athu kule, yamala piswa moto, pontho pyonsene pikhakoya ife mwenemo pyamala vungika." 
Isaiah64:12 Pyonsenepi, MBUYA ayi imwe nkhabe kuva napyo kupha tayu? Ayi imwe munathimiza kukhala kwene mulomo phoo mbamutitchunyusa mwavinga ninga tenepa?" 
Isaiah65:1 MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Ine ndidapitchulula ndekha ene kuna ale, hadachite kundipempha kuchita tenepo tayu; anthu adandigumana mbale hadandisake-sake ale tayu. Kuna dzinza ile hidachemere tayu dzinanga, ine ndidalonga kuti, ‘Ndili pano, ine ndili pano.’" 
Isaiah65:2 Masikati onsene ndidathambidza manjanga kuna anthu akuuma mtima, ale ambafamba m'njira zakupotoka, kukakamira kuchita pinthu pimbanyerezera iwo." 
Isaiah65:3 Anthu ale ndzidzi onsene kwawo nkhunditikana basi maso na maso, kupereka nsembe m'minda yakupambulika, pontho kufukiza pyakununkhira pamaguwa akumangwa na njerwa." 
Isaiah65:4 Iwo ambakhala pakati pa nthumbi mbaphuphudza kukhala kumbuto zakubisika; iwo ambadya nyama ya nkhumba, pikalango pyawo mbapidzala na nthuli za nyama zile nsokhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Isaiah65:5 Tenepo iwo ambalonga kuti, ‘Bulukani pano; lekani fedza chifupi, thangwi ine ndine wakupambulika pyakwanga kuna iwe!’ Anthu ninga enewa akhala ninga utsi m'mphuno mwanga, pontho ninga moto ule umbadokerwa na kugaka." 
Isaiah65:6 “Yang'anani, mseru wanu walembwa kale: ine nkhabe khala kwene mulomo phoo tayu, mbwenye ndinati ndibwezere monsene mwene; ine ndinati ndiabwezere" 
Isaiah65:7 thangwi ya pyakudawa pyawo pabodzi pene na pyakudawa pya makolo awo ene. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA. Na thangwi yakuti iwo adapyereza nsembe pamapiri mbandiswipisa na mabasawo papitunda, ine ndinaatchunyusa mwakuthemerana na mabasawo akale ale.”" 
Isaiah65:8 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ninga montho mumbachitirwa vinyu kugumanwa kubulukira m'tsaputu yamfesa, ninga mumbalongerwa ipyo kuti, ‘Lekani kuzivunga, pana pinthu pyadidi pinadikhira ife,’ ine ndinachita chibodzi-bodzi thangwi ya anyabasanga; ine nkhabe dzamala kuavunga onsenewo tayu." 
Isaiah65:9 Ine ndinadzesa pidzukulu kubulukira muna Yakobo, pontho kubulukira muna Yuda pile pinafuna tambira dziko ya mapiri; anthu anga akusankhulika ale anati aitambire, mwenemo ndiye munafuna khala anyabasanga." 
Isaiah65:10 Sharoni anasanduka mpovu wa pifuyo, pontho Phedi ya Nyatwa inasanduka mbuto yakupumirapo pifuyo; mbuto zenezi zinakhala za anthu anga ambandisaka-saka ale." 
Isaiah65:11 “Mbwenye kulonga pya imwe, mumbakhonda MBUYA ale, mbamuduwalira phiri yanga ya yakuchena, ale pontho mumbapereka pyakudya na vinyu ninga nsembe kuna milungu ya Gadi na Meni, milungu yakudzesa Mwayi na Dzedze," 
Isaiah65:12 Ine ndinakuphani kunkhondo, monsenene mbamukotamiswa kuti muchekiwe pakhosi; thangwi ine ndidakuchemerani, kwache imwe nee mundanditawira tayu, ine ndidalonga, kwache imwe nee mudandivesere tayu. Pamaso panga imwe mudachita pyakuipa mbamuchita pyanu pinthu pyokhonda kundikomera.”" 
Isaiah65:13 Natenepo MBUYA Mulungu akulonga kuti, “Anyabasanga anadya, kwache imwe munakhala na njala; anyabasanga anamwa, kwache imwe munakhala na nyota; anyabasanga anakomerwa, kwache imwe munachitiswa manyadzo." 
Isaiah65:14 Anyabasanga anaimba nyimbo kuonesa kukomerwa kwa pansi pa mtima, kwache imwe munalira thangwi ya kusanyika mumtima, pontho munakalala thangwi ya kuva kupha mumtima." 
Isaiah65:15 Madzinanuwo, anthu anga akusankhulika, anaaphatisa basa kutemberera nawo; Ine, MBUYA Mulungu ndinati ndikupheni, mbwenye kuna anyabasanga ndinaapasa dzina yachinchino." 
Isaiah65:16 Munthu onsene wakupempha mtsanzayiso m'dziko mwenemu, anati apichite kudzera muna Mulungu wakuonadi, ulembo nyakudumbira m'dziko yeneyi anadumbira na dzina ya Mulungu nyakulonga pyakuonadi ule; thangwi nyatwa zakale zile zinaduwalika mbazikhonda oneka pontho pamaso panga.”" 
Isaiah65:17 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ngayang'anani ndinati ndilenge kudzulu kwachinchino pontho dziko yapansi yachinchino. Pinthu pyakale pile nkhabe kumbukwave tayu, pontho ipyo pinaduwalikaletu." 
Isaiah65:18 Mbwenye komerwani pontho sekerani kwenda na kwenda na pinthu pinafuna dzalenga ine, thangwi Yerusalemu ndinamchitisa kukhala wakukomerwa pyakwanga, pontho anthu ache anasekera pikulu pene." 
Isaiah65:19 Ine ndinakomerwa naye Yerusalemu mbandikomerwa na anthu anga; chiliro na kukalala nkhabe vekamove tayu. 
Isaiah65:20 “Nkhabeve pontho ana kachiya dzafera m'chikuta tayu, penu nkhalamba moyo wache kugwandizira panjira tayu; munthu wakufa uku akwanisa pyaka dzana ibodzi anawerengerwa ninga afa mbali mphale ene pyache; munthu wakufa mbadzati kwanisa pyaka dzana anayeswa ninga nyadzedze." 
Isaiah65:21 Iwo anamanga nyumba mbakhalamo; iwo anabzala mfesa mbadya nsapo zache. 
Isaiah65:22 Iwo nkhabeve kumanga nyumba mbizikhalwa na anthu anango, penu kubzala mbewu mbizidyiwa na anthu anango tayu. Ninga mumbachitira muti kukhala na moyo wakulapha sasawambo na nsiku za moyo wa anthu anga; kwenda na kwenda anthu anga anakomerwa na pinthu pyaphatira iwo basa na manjawo." 
Isaiah65:23 Iwo nkhabe bulusa kwene kaluma pezi pene, penu kubala ana kuti akhalire kuona nyatwa tayu; thangwi iwo anakhala anyakutsanzayiswa na MBUYA, iwo na pidzukulu pyawo pene pina iwopyo." 
Isaiah65:24 Ine ndinaatawira mbadzati na kundichemera kwene, mwenemo iwo mbali m'kati kulonga, ine ndinava." 
Isaiah65:25 Mibinzi na anabira pinagwedula-gwedula pabodzi pene, pontho nkhalamu zinadya maudzu ninga ng'ombe, kwache nyoka ndiye inafuna khala nyakudya fumbi. Ipyo nkhabe goswa penu kuvunga tayu paphiri panga yakuchena. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Isaiah66:1 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Kudzulu ndi mpando wanga wachifumu, pontho dziko yapansi mphakusanjikirapo manyalo anga. Ili kupi nyumbache inafuna imwe kundimangirayo? Mbuto yanga yakupumirako inakhala kupi?" 
Isaiah66:2 Manjangawa asasanya pinthu pyonsenepi, natenepo ipyo mphyanga. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA. Munthu wache ambakomerwa na ine ngule: nyakupichepesa pontho nyakundigopa, nyakutetemera angava falanga." 
Isaiah66:3 “Mbwenye munthu onsene anapereka nsembe ng'ombe imuna akhala ninga nyakupha munthu mnzache, pontho munthu onsene anapereka nsembe mwanabira akhala ninga nyakukhumula khosi mwanambwa; munthu onsene anapereka pyakupereka pya mapira akhala ninga nyakupereka chiropa cha nkhumba, pontho munthu onsene anafukiza pyakununkhira akhala ninga nyakupembedza mfanikizo. Iwo asankhula kuchita pyawo pyakuakomera, mitimawo ikukomerwa na pyakuipa pinachita iwopyo." 
Isaiah66:4 Inembo ndinaphatisa basa njira zavinga pana iwo, ine ndinagwisa pana iwo pinthu pimbagopa iwo. Thangwi ndzidzi udachemera ine, nee mbodzi adanditawira, pontho ndzidzi udalonga ine, nkhabe mbodzi adaikha khutu tayu. Iwo adachita pyakuipa pamaso panga mbasankhula pyawo kuchita pinthu pyokhonda kundikomera.”" 
Isaiah66:5 Veserani mafala a MBUYA, imwe anyakutetemera na mafalache: “Abale anu ambakuzondani mbakukhethani thangwi ya dzinanga ale, alonga kuti, ‘Demelero mbikhale kuna MBUYA, towera tione kukomerwa kwachita imwe!’ Kwache enewa anachitiswa manyadzo." 
Isaiah66:6 Ngavani mumzindamu chimpiningu, ngavani upoko-poko m'Nyumba ya Mulungu! Yeneyo ndi dungu ya MBUYA kubwezera anyamalwache malingana na mabasawo." 
Isaiah66:7 “Zioni mbadzati kulekwa, ambabala; iye mbadzati kuva mtswotswo, ambabala mwana wamamuna." 
Isaiah66:8 Chipo mbani adatomambo kuva pinthu ninga penepi? Mbani adatoma kuonambo pinthu ninga penepi? Ayi dziko nkhusasanyika nsiku ibodzi, penu dzinza ya anthu nkhubalwa ndzidzi ene ubodzi basi? Kwache sindzidzi zioni nkhuva mtswotswo, iye adabala anache.”" 
Isaiah66:9 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ayi ine ndinafikisa anthu anga ndzidzi wakubala mbandikhonda kuabazika? Ayi ine ndimbafunga nthumbo mwenemo ndikuabazika?" 
Isaiah66:10 Sekerani pabodzi pene na Yerusalemu mbamukomerwe pabodzi naye, monsenene anyakumfuna ale; numpha-numphani naye pabodzi, monsene anyakumsintili ale." 
Isaiah66:11 Thangwi munathondozwa mbamukhuta pamabele pache; munayamwa pyakwanga mbamukomerwa na kuinjipa kwa mkakache.” 
Isaiah66:12 Thangwi MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ine mtendere ndinati ndiufikise kuna iye ninga mkulo, pontho mfuma ya madzinza ninga mkulo wakukuka; imwe munayamwiswa mbamuthukulwa m'manja mwache penu kumululuza pamiyendo pache." 
Isaiah66:13 Ninga mumbachitira mama kuthondoza mwanache, sasawambo ine ndinakuthondozani; ndinakuchitisani kukomerwa mu Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah66:14 Imwe mungaona penepi, mtimanu unakomerwa, mbamukavuka ninga maudzu; mboko za MBUYA zinadziwika kuna anyabasache, mbwenye ukali wache unaonekera pana anyakumzonda.”" 
Isaiah66:15 Yang'anani, MBUYA akudza na moto, pontho pingolo pyache pyakhala ninga chivumbulu; iye anaonesa pakwecha ukali wache, pontho shungu yache ninga malulume a moto." 
Isaiah66:16 Thangwi na moto pontho na talasadache MBUYA anatchunyusa anthu onsene, pontho anthu ache azinji anaphiwa na MBUYA." 
Isaiah66:17 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Anthu ale anapipambula mbapichitisa okha ene kukhala akuchena kwenda kapita m'minda yakupambulika ale, kutewera ule ali pakatiletu pa anthu ale ambadya nyama ya nkhumba na matchiru pontho na pinthu pinango pyakunyansa, onsenewo anafera kubodzi kwene." 
Isaiah66:18 “Ine ndimbadziwa mabasawo na manyerezero awo, tenepo ine ndili chifupi kudza dzagumanyisa madzinza onsene, na anthu a pilongero pya mtundu onsene, tenepo iwo anabwera mbaona demelero yanga." 
Isaiah66:19 “Ine ndinaikha chidziwiso pakati pawo, pontho ndinatumiza mbodzi wa anyakufuna dzasalira na moyo pakati pa madzinza ale; a ku Tarisisi, Puti, na Ludi, amuna aluso pakuponya mauta, a ku Tubali na Grisi, pontho na madziko akutali, ale adzati kuva pyakuveka kwanga, penu kuona demelero yanga tayu. Iwo analalika pya demelero yanga pakati pa madzinza." 
Isaiah66:20 Pontho iwo anabwera na abale ako onsene kubulukira kumadzinza onsene kudza nawo kuphiri yanga yakuchena mu Yerusalemu ninga pyakupereka kuna MBUYA; pa akavalo, m'pingolo, na ngolovana pontho na pa anabulu na ngamila. Iwo anabwera nawo, ninga mumbachitira Aisraele kudza na pyakupereka pya mapira ku Nyumba ya Mulungu uku apiikha m'pyombo pyakuchena pamaso pa Mulungu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Isaiah66:21 Tenepo ine ndinasankhula anango a iwo kukhala anyansembe pontho Alevi. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.” 
Isaiah66:22 “Kulonga pya kudzulu kwachinchino na dziko yapansi yachinchino pinafuna ine dzasasanya pile, pinakhala kwenda na kwenda pamaso panga, sasawambo pidzukulu pyanu pontho dzinanu pinakhala pyakukhala na kukhala." 
Isaiah66:23 Anthu a madzinza onsene anabwera dzandipembedza mu Yerusalemu pamaphwando onsene akusekera kubalwa kwa mwezi, pontho pa Nsiku Zakupuma zonsene. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Isaiah66:24 Iwo angabuluka anaona mitembo ya anthu adandipandukira ale; kweneko mfunye zakuadya nkhabe dzafa, pontho moto wakuapisa nkhabe dzathima tayu. Iwo anakhala chinthu chakunyansa kuna anthu a madzinza onsene.”" 
Jeremiah1:1 Awa ndi mafala adalonga Yeremia mwana Hilikia, nyansembe wa muluwani ya Anatoti m'nthemba ya Benjemani." 
Jeremiah1:2 MBUYA adalonga kuna Yeremia chaka chakhumi na chitatu, ndzidzi ukhali Yosia mwana Amoni mfumu wa Yuda," 
Jeremiah1:3 mbalonga pontho kuna iye ndzidzi ukhali Yehoiakimu mwanache Yosia mfumu wa Yuda. Kubuluka penepo MBUYA adalonga kuna iye kazinji kene, mpakana chaka chakhumi na chibodzi cha utongi kwa Zedekia mwana Yosia. Mwezi wachishanu chaka chonthocho anthu a ku Yerusalemu adakwatwa kwenda kudziko ya unyaperezo." 
Jeremiah1:4 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Jeremiah1:5 “Ine mbindidzati kukuumba m'mimba mwa mako, ine ndidakudziwa kale, pontho iwe mbudzati balwa, ine ndidakupambula; ine ndidakusankhula kuti ukhale mprofeti kuna madzinza.”" 
Jeremiah1:6 Ine ndidatawira kuti, “Waa! MBUYA Mulungu, ine nkhabe dziwa kulonga tayu, podi ine ndine mwana ene pyanga.”" 
Jeremiah1:7 Mbwenye MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Leka longa kuti, ‘Ndine mwana ene pyanga.’ Iwe wathema kwenda kuna munthu onsene kunakutuma ineko, pontho kalonga pyonsene pene pinakutonga inepyo." 
Jeremiah1:8 Leka chita nawo mantha, thangwi ine ndili nawe mbandikutchinjiriza. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah1:9 Tenepo MBUYA adafuthula dzanjache mbakhuya milomo yanga mbalonga kuna ine mbati, “Chinchino ndaikha m'kanwa mwako mafala athema iwe kalonga." 
Jeremiah1:10 Yang'ana, lero ndikukupasa utongi pana madzinza na maufumu, kudula na kugwisa kwene, kuvunga na kufudza kwene, kumanga na kubzala kwene.”" 
Jeremiah1:11 MBUYA adandivunza mbati, “Ayi Yeremia, ukuonanji?” Ine ndidatawira kuti, “Ndikuona nthambi ya muti waalimondi.”" 
Jeremiah1:12 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Ndimomwene iwe hudaphophonye tayu, thangwi ine ndinaonesesa kuti mafalanga akwana-kwana.”" 
Jeremiah1:13 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga pontho kuna ine mbati, “Ninji chinaona iwe?” Ine ndidatawira kuti, “Ndikuona chikalango chikuperuka kumpoto, tenepo icho chapendamira kuno.”" 
Jeremiah1:14 Iye adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Kubulukira kumpoto kuvungika kunabwera pana anthu onsene ambakhala m'dziko yeneyi ale." 
Jeremiah1:15 Ine ndili chifupi kuchemeresa anthu onsene a m'maufumu akumpoto. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA. “Mafumu anabwera mbaikha mipando yawo m'misuwo ya mzinda wa Yerusalemu mbazungulira mafufu ache; iwo anamanga misasa kuzungulira mpandache onsene, pontho na maluwani onsene a Yuda." 
Jeremiah1:16 Ine ndinalalika pya kutchunyusa kunafuna ine dzachita pana anthu anga, thangwi ya kudawika kwawo pakundikhonda; iwo afukiza pyakununkhira kuna milungu inango, pontho apembedza pinthu pyasasanya manjawo." 
Jeremiah1:17 “Yeremia, sasanyika! Ndoko kapange anthu pyonsene pinakutonga ine. Leka chita nawo mantha, mwinango ine ene ndinakuchitisa kuchita mantha pikulu pene ndzidzi una iwe pakati pawo." 
Jeremiah1:18 Lero ndakuchitisa kukhala ninga mzinda wakutchingwa na mpanda, mzati wasimbi, pontho mpanda wankuwa kuimisana na dziko yonseneyi, kuimisana na mafumu a Yuda, mathubu ache, a nyansembe ache na anthu onsene a dziko yeneyi." 
Jeremiah1:19 Iwo anathimbana nawe, kwache iwo nkhabe dzakukunda tayu, thangwi ine ndili nawe kukutchinjiriza. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah2:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Jeremiah2:2 “Ndoko kalalike pamaso pa munthu onsene mu Yerusalemu kuti: Ndikukumbuka kupipereka kwako kuna ine mbuli mphale, kundifuna kwako ninga mwali wakukazhali kwene chinchino; iwe udanditewera m'thando yatchetcha monsene, m'dziko mule mukhali tsanga yokhokha." 
Jeremiah2:3 Iwe, Israele, ukhali wakupambulika kuna ine, nsapo zakutoma kucha za mbewu zanga; onsene adakuvunga ale akhali pamseru ukulu, pontho nyatwa zidagwa pana iwo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah2:4 Veserani mphangwa za MBUYA, imwe pidzukulu pya Yakobo, imwe dzinza ya Israele." 
Jeremiah2:5 MBUYA akulonga tenepa: “Ninji chakudawika chache chidandigumana na makolo anu, chile chidaachitisa kubauka kutali na ine? Iwo adapembedza mifanikizo yapezi-pezi, iwo ene mbasandukambo anthu akusowa basa." 
Jeremiah2:6 Iwo hadavunze tayu kuti, ‘MBUYA ali kupi, ule adatidzesa kuno kutibulusa kudziko ya Iguputo, mbatitsogolera kugwanda na m'mbuto yakusowa pyakumera, pontho na m'thando yatchetcha na m'maphedi, mbuto yakusowa madzi pontho yamdima wakugoswa, kule nkhabe khala anthu penu na kufambako kwene tayu.’" 
Jeremiah2:7 Ine ndidakudzesani m'dziko yamphonje kuti mudye nsapo na pinthu pyache pyadidi. Kwache imwe mudadza mbamuswipisa dziko yanga, mbamusandusa dziko idakupasani ine ile kukhala yakunyansa." 
Jeremiah2:8 Anyansembe hadavunze tayu kuti, ‘Ali kupi MBUYA?’ Anyakudziwa pya mwambo maka ale hadandidziwe tayu; anyakutsogolera adandipandukira. Maprofetimbo adalonga pyawo na dzina ya milungu Baala, mbapembedza mifanikizo yakusowa basa." 
Jeremiah2:9 “Natenepo ine ndinakutonga pontho mseru, ndinatonga mseru pidzukulu pyanu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah2:10 Wambukirani kuntchuwa ya Kipro mbamukaone, gwinyani munthu ku Kedara mbakaonesese; mukaone ngakhala chipo kudatomambo chitika chinthu ninga ichi:" 
Jeremiah2:11 Ayi chipo dzinza idatomambo kuchinja milungu yawo, podi kwene kuti iyo si milungu chadi-chadi tayu? Mbwenye anthu anga demelero yawo aichinjisa na mifanikizo yakusowa basa." 
Jeremiah2:12 Tutumuka napyo penepi, iwe kudzulu mbuphatwe na mantha makulu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah2:13 Anthu anga achita pyakudawa pya mtundu uwiri: Iwo andikhonda, ine mphuno ya madzi akupasa moyo, iwo apisasanyira okha ene michera, ile njakubauka pontho nkhabe kwanisa kukoya madzi tayu." 
Jeremiah2:14 Ayi Israele ndi nyabasa penu adabalwa kukhala bitchu? Apo thangwi ninji anyamalwache akumkhulisa? 
Jeremiah2:15 Nkhalamu zabangula, izo zamkhumbzira. Iwo asandusa dziko yache kukhala madembe; maluwani ache apiswa pontho amala thawiwa," 
Jeremiah2:16 Anthumbo a ku Memfisi na Tapanesi akuchitiswa manyadzo pakugogodwa mumsolo. 
Jeremiah2:17 Ayi iwe, Israele, hudapidzesere wekha ene penepi tayu pakukhonda ine, MBUYA Mulungu wako, ndzidzi ukhakutsogolera ine kukuonesa njira?" 
Jeremiah2:18 Apo watani unaenda ku Iguputo, kamwa madzi a mumkulo wa Nailo? Thangwi yache ninji unaenda ku Asiria, kamwa madzi a mumkulo wa Yufurate?" 
Jeremiah2:19 Pyakudawika pyako pinati pikutchunyuse, pontho unakonwa na kubwerera kwako m'nduli. Toma nyerezera mbudzindikire kuti ntchinthu chakupha pontho chakuipa pyakwanga kuna iwe, kukhonda ine, MBUYA Mulungu wako mbukhonda kundigopa. Ndalonga ndine Mbuya, MBUYA Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene.”" 
Jeremiah2:20 MBUYA Mulungu akulonga kuti, “Israele, kale ene iwe udaswa goli-goli mbugwanda nkhambala ninga ng'ombe yakupenga; iwe udalonga kuti, ‘Ine nkhabe kukutumikirani tayu!’ Ande, paphiri yonsene yakulapha, pontho pansi pa muti onsene wakuvata, iwe udagonapo ninga puta." 
Jeremiah2:21 Ine ndidakubzala ninga mtawi wakupambulika pontho wadidi. Apo udatani kuti usanduke kuna ine mtawi wakuipa pontho wam'tsanga? 
Jeremiah2:22 Podi kwene kuti upichenese wekha ene na dotha, mbuphatisa basa mamina a mtondo azinji, kwache mathotho a pyakuipa asalira basi. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Jeremiah2:23 “Unalonga tani kuti, ‘Ine sidapiswipise ndekha ene tayu; ine sidapembedze milungu Baala tayu’? Yang'ana pinthu pyakuipa pidachita iwe paphedi; nyerezera pya pinthu pyachita iwe. Iwe wakhala ninga ngamila ikazi yakuthamanga pyakwanga uku na uku," 
Jeremiah2:24 penu bulu wam'tsanga wakukulitiri na m'thando yatchetcha. Ndzidzi unafuna iye mamuna, mbani anakwanisa kumkhuludza? Ngakhala mamuna anamfuna hambachita kutcherenga naye tayu; iye ndzidzi onsene ambasasanyikiratu kufuna kubebeswa na mamuna." 
Jeremiah2:25 Leka kusakaza manyalo ako, penu kuchitisa chikholingo chako kuuma. Kwache iwe udalonga kuti, ‘Nkhabe basa tayu! Ine ndimbafuna kupembedza milungu inango, pontho ndinati ndiiteweredi.’" 
Jeremiah2:26 “Ninga mumbaselusirwa mbava angaphatwa, sasawambo iwe dzinza ya Israele unaseluswambo, iwo, mafumu awo, na mathubu awo, anyansembe awo na maprofeti awo." 
Jeremiah2:27 Iwo ambalonga kuna muti kuti, ‘Iwe ndiwe babanga,’ pontho kuna mwala kuti, ‘Iwe ndiwe nyakundibala.’ Iwo andipasa nkhodolo, mbakhonda kundipasa nkhope zawo; kwache iwo angakhala pa nyatwa, ambalonga kuti, ‘Idzani mutipulumuse!’" 
Jeremiah2:28 Ili kupi mphapo milungu idapisasanyira iwe ile? Ileke idze ngakhala inakwanisa kukupulumusa ndzidzi unakhala iwe panyatwa! Thangwi iwe una milungu izinji pyakwanga ningambo kuinjipa kwa maluwani ana iwe, Yuda." 
Jeremiah2:29 “Thangwi yache ninji ukuchita pinthu pyakupokanyisana na ine? Iwe wandipandukira! Ndalonga ndine MBUYA. 
Jeremiah2:30 Ine ndidatchunyusa pezi pene anthu ako; kwache iwo hadaikhe konta kusumululwako tayu. Talasadako idavunga maprofeti ako ninga nkhalamu yaukali.” 
Jeremiah2:31 Imwe anthu a mfendu uno nyerezerani mafala a MBUYA: “Ayi ine ndakhala ninga thando yatchetcha kuna Israele, penu ninga dziko ya mdima wakugoswa? Thangwi yache ninji anthu anga ambalonga kuti, ‘Ife tina utumbe kuchita pyonsene pinafuna ife; ife nkhabeve pontho kudza kuna imwe tayu.’" 
Jeremiah2:32 Ayi mwali ambaduwalira pyakuthemesera napyo manungo ache, penu nyakukazhali kuduwalira pyakuvala pyache? Kwache anthu anga andiduwalira mwakuti nsiku zache nkhabe lengesekave tayu." 
Jeremiah2:33 Iwe ndiwedi nyaluso pakuchita pinthu pyauputa mwakuti na mkazi ene wakuipiratu anakwanisa kufunza kubulukira kuna makhaliro ako akuipa. 
Jeremiah2:34 Nguwo zako zina mathotho a chiropa cha atcherengi okhonda dawa, podi kwene kuti iwe nee udaaphate akuswa nyumba tayu. Kwache padzulu pa pyonsenepi," 
Jeremiah2:35 iwe umbalonga kuti, ‘Ine ndine nyakukhonda dawa; iye hadandizhangalire tayu.’ Kwache ine ndinakutonga mseru thangwi ya kulonga kuti, ‘Ine sidadawe tayu.’" 
Jeremiah2:36 Watani unati pedzengwa-pedzengwa, uku unaenda uku unaenda? Iguputo anati akuphatise fuwa ya moto ninga montho mudakuchitira anthu a ku Asiria." 
Jeremiah2:37 Iwe unabuluka pambuto yeneyo uku manja ali nama kunkhodolo, thangwi ine, MBUYA, ndakhonda anthu ambanyindira iwe ale; iwo nkhabe dzakuphedza tayu.”" 
Jeremiah3:1 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ngakhala mamuna anamwalana na mkazache, mkaziyo mbaenda pyache kasembwa na mamuna unango; ayi mamunayo athema kwenda basi kuna mkazi ule? Ayi penepi nkhabe chitisa dziko kukhala yakuswipa tayu? Kwache iwe wakhala ninga puta mbuthamanga na amuna azinji; ayi chinchino unabwerera kuna ine?" 
Jeremiah3:2 Kwiza maso kumapiri akupupwa mbuone. Ayi pana mbuto inango yasiya iwe okhonda chitapo uputa? M'khundu mwa njira, iwe udakhala pansi kudikhira pibwenji pyako, iwe udakhala ninga manzenza m'thando yatchetcha. Iwe waswipisa dziko na uputako pontho na pyakudawika pyako." 
Jeremiah3:3 Ndi thangwi yache mafazi aleka kuwaza, pontho mvula ya chaka hidavumbe tayu. Kwache iwe ukuoneka ninga puta basi; iwe nkhabe na manyadzo ene tayu." 
Jeremiah3:4 Ayi si chinchino pano tayu mwandichemera iwe kuti, ‘Baba, ndimwe nyakundionesa njira kutomera uphaleanga," 
Jeremiah3:5 ayi ndzidzi onsene munandizhangalira? Ayi ukali wanu unathimiza basi kuoneka pana ine kwenda na kwenda?’ Enewa ndiye malongero ako, kwache iwe umbachita basi pyakuipa ninga mumbafunira iwe.”" 
Jeremiah3:6 Pandzidzi wa utongi wa Mfumu Yosia, MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Ayi iwe waona kukhonda khulupirika kwachita Israele? Iye akwira paphiri yakulapha yonsene, pontho mbaenda pansi pa muti wakuvata onsene mbachita pyauputa penepo." 
Jeremiah3:7 Ine ndikhanyerezera kuti penu angamala chita penepi anabwerera kuna ine, kwache iye hadachite tenepo tayu, nanachembo Yuda adapiona pyonsenepi." 
Jeremiah3:8 Ine ndidampasa msiku Israele, mkazi okhonda khulupirikayi, mbandimgwinya kwawo thangwi ya uputa onsene wachita iye. Mbwenye Yuda, nanache Israele okhonda khulupirika ule hadachite mantha tayu. Iyembo adenda kachita uputa." 
Jeremiah3:9 Israele hadachite manyadzo na pang'ono pene tayu na pyakuzuda pyachepyo. Iye adaswipisa dziko mbazuda pyache podi na miyala na miti ene. 
Jeremiah3:10 Podi kwene kuti pikhali tenepo, Yuda nanache okhonda khulupirika ule, hadabwerere kuna ine na mtimache onsene tayu, mbwenye adapichita pyache mwatchekedzera. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah3:11 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Israele okhonda khulupirika ule, ndi mbwenye kusangiza na Yuda okhonda khulupirika." 
Jeremiah3:12 Tenepo ndoko kumpoto ukalonge mphangwa izi: Bwerera kuna ine, iwe Israele okhonda khulupirika! Ndalonga ndine MBUYA. Ine nkhabe dzakuzhangalirave tayu, thangwi ndine nyansisi, ine nkhabe dzazhangalive kwenda na kwenda tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah3:13 Tawira kwene basi kuti ndiwe nyakudawa pontho nyakupandukira MBUYA Mulungu wako. Bweka kuti pansi pa muti onsene wakuvata iwe udagwa maya na milungu yachilendo, pontho kuti hudandivere tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah3:14 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Anthu okhonda khulupirika, bwererani, thangwi mamunanu ndine pano. Ine ndinasankhula munthu kada luwani yonsene pontho awiri kada mbumba mbandikubwezerani ku Zioni." 
Jeremiah3:15 Tenepo ndinakupasani amakabuswa apamtima panga, ale anafuna dzakutsogolerani na nzeru pontho na kuvesa pinthu." 
Jeremiah3:16 Tenepo nsiku zenezo imwe mungainjipa m'dzikomo, anthu nkhabeve dzalonga tayu pya Bokosi ya Chiverano cha MBUYA. Iyo nkhabe dzakhalave m'manyerezero mwawo, penu kuikumbukave tayu; iyo nkhabe dzafunikave, penu dzasasanya pontho inango tayu." 
Jeremiah3:17 Ndzidzi wenewo ungafika, Yerusalemu anachemerwa Mpando Wachifumu wa MBUYA, tenepo madzinza onsene anagumanyikana mu Yerusalemu kulemedza dzina ya MBUYA. Iwo nkhabeve dzachita pinthu pimbafuna mtimawo wakuuma pontho wakuipa ule tayu." 
Jeremiah3:18 Anthu a ku Israele anaphatana na anthu a ku Yuda, tenepo pabodzi pene anabwera kubulukira kudziko yakumpoto kudza kudziko idapasa ine makolo awo kuti ikhale yawo ene ile.”" 
Jeremiah3:19 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Israele ine ndikhapifuna pyakwanga pene kuti ukhale ninga mwananga ene mbandikupasa dziko yakusiririka, pontho dziko yadidiletu kupiringana anango onsene padziko yapansi. Ine ndikhanyerezera kuti unandichemera Baba, mbukhonda leka kunditewera." 
Jeremiah3:20 Kwache ninga mkazi okhonda khulupirika kuna mankhadziache, sasawambo iwe Israele, hudakhulupirike tayu kuna ine. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah3:21 Chiliro chikuveka pamapiri akupupwa, kulira na kudembetera kwa anthu a ku Israele thangwi iwo aipisa makhaliro awo, pontho aduwalira MBUYA Mulungu wawo." 
Jeremiah3:22 “Bwererani imwe anthu akusowa chikhulupiro; ine ndinakuwangisani pakukuchitisani kukhala akukhulupirika. “Imwe mukulonga kuti, ‘Ande, ife tinati tidze kuna imwe, thangwi imwe ndimwe MBUYA Mulungu wathu." 
Jeremiah3:23 Ndimomwene, kupembedza milungu m'pitunda pontho pamapiri, kwalila kutinyengeza kwene basi; ndimomwene chipulumuso cha Israele chili kuna MBUYA Mulungu wathu." 
Jeremiah3:24 Kutomera uwanathu kupembedza kwathu milungu yakuchitisa manyadzoyi kwachitisa kuvunga mbewu zidabulusira makolo athu kaluma, mikumbi ya mabirawo na ng'ombe zawo, anawo achimuna na achikazi ene." 
Jeremiah3:25 Mbatigone pansi thangwi ya manyadzo mbatiphimbirwa na pinthu pyakusowa chilemedzo pidachita ife. Ife tadawira MBUYA Mulungu wathu; ife na makolo athu ene, kutomera uwanathu kufikirana lero, ife nee tavera matongero ache tayu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah4:1 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ngakhala munabwerera, ngakhala munabwerera kuna ine, Aisraele; ngakhala imwe munabulusa mifanikizo pamaso panga mbamukhonda bauka pontho," 
Jeremiah4:2 pontho ngakhala munadumbira mwakuonadi, mwakulungama na mwakuona mtima na dzina ya MBUYA wamoyo, penepo anthu a madzinza anango anapempha kuti ndiatsanzayise, mbandikuza.”" 
Jeremiah4:3 MBUYA akulonga kuna anthu a ku Yuda na Yerusalemu kuti, “Tipulani mindanu yokhonda limwayo, mbamuleke bzala mbewu zanu pakati pa ntcheswa." 
Jeremiah4:4 Koyani chiverano chanu na MBUYA mbamupereke mitimanu kuna ine, imwe anthu a ku Yuda na Yerusalemu, gopesera ukali wanga unakupisani ninga moto, thangwi ya pyakuipa pyachita imwe mbapasowa munthu wakuuthimisa." 
Jeremiah4:5 “Pivekeseni mu Yuda, pontho pilalikeni mu Yerusalemu mbamulonge kuti: Lizani ngoma m'dziko yonsene! Galuzani fala mbamulonge kuti: Gumanyikanani pabodzi! Tendeni tithawire kumizinda yakutchingwa na mpanda." 
Jeremiah4:6 Kwizani chidziwiso kuthonyeza ku Zioni! Thawirani kwakupata mbamukhonda chita nthontho! Thangwi ndikudzesa nyatwa kubulukira kumpoto, nyatwa zache nsikulu pyakwanga pene." 
Jeremiah4:7 Nkhalamu yavumbuka kubulukira kunkhwimba kwache; mphandu wa madzinza onsene avumbuka. Iye asiya mbuto yache, towera avunge dziko yanu. Maluwani anu anasanduka madembe, mbapasowa na mbodzi ene wakukhalamo." 
Jeremiah4:8 Tenepo valani masakha, lirani mbamukalala, thangwi ukali wakugoswa wa MBUYA hudabuluke tayu pana Yuda.”" 
Jeremiah4:9 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Nsiku zenezo mafumu na mathubu anataya mtima, anyansembe anachita mantha, pontho maprofeti anamalwa nzeru.”" 
Jeremiah4:10 Tenepo ndidalonga kuti, “Sha! MBUYA Mulungu, imwe mwanyengeza anthu a ku Yerusalemu monsene mwene pakulonga kuti panakhala mtendere, mwenemo talasada ili chinjike pakhosi pawo.”" 
Jeremiah4:11 Ndzidzi wenewo anthu a ku Yerusalemu anapangwa kuti mphepo yakupisa ikudza kuna iwo kubulukira kumapiri akupupwa m'thando yatchetcha. Iye hanakhala ninga mphepo ene pyayo imbatswaira dzungu ile tayu," 
Jeremiah4:12 mbwenye mphepo yakugoswa yakubulukira kuna ine. Chinchino ndikulonga mule munafuna ine dzatonga mseru anthu anga. 
Jeremiah4:13 Ngayang'ana, anyamalwako akudza ninga makole, pingolo pyache pikutitima ninga chivumbulu, akavalo ache akumbuluka pyakwanga kupiringana nyakasenera. Dzedze kuna ife, ife tili panyatwa!" 
Jeremiah4:14 Yerusalemu, tsuka pyakuipa pili mumtima mwako, towera upulumuke. Unaleka lini kunyerezera pyakuipa?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Anyamphangwa a ku Dani na a kudziko ya mapiri a Eferemu akulalika pya nyatwa zakugoswa kuti," 
Jeremiah4:16 “Kalonge penepi kuna madzinza, kapilalike ku Yerusalemu kuti: Anyamalwa akudza kubulukira kudziko yakutali na mkhuwo wa nkhondo pana mizinda ya Yuda." 
Jeremiah4:17 Iwo amzungulira ninga amuna akulondali munda, thangwi iye andipandukira. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah4:18 “Makhaliro anu pontho pinthu pimbachita imwe ndiye pyadzesa pinthu penepi pana imwe. Kweneku ndiye kutchunyuswa kwanu. Nkhwakupha pyakwanga! Kwakujogolani mtima pyakwanga!” 
Jeremiah4:19 Ndikuva kupha! Ine nkhabe kwanisa kupirira tayu! Mtimanga! Mtimanga ukudima-dima pikulu pene! Ine nkhabe kwanisa kumatama tayu. Ine ndikuva ngoma, pontho mkhuwo wa nkhondo." 
Jeremiah4:20 Nyatwa imbadza pa nyatwa inzache; dziko yonsene yasaliratu madembe. Kabodzi kene basi makumbi athu amala vungwa nguwo zache zakutchinga nazo zamala ng'ambwa-ng'ambwa. 
Jeremiah4:21 Ndinaleka lini kuona nkhondo ikumenyeka, pontho kuva kulira kwa ngoma?" 
Jeremiah4:22 Anthu anga ngakupupwa, iwo nkhabe kundidziwa tayu. Iwo mbana akusowa nzeru pontho nkhabe kuvesa pinthu tayu. Iwo ngaluso pakuchita pinthu pyakuipa, nkhabe dziwa chita chinthu chakulungama tayu." 
Jeremiah4:23 Ndidayang'ana padziko yapansi, iyo ikhali yakusowa pinthu; pontho kuthambo, iko kukhali nkhabe cheza tayu." 
Jeremiah4:24 Ine ndidayang'ana mapiri, iwo akhatekenyeka; pitunda pyonsene pikhalendeka ninga nyamderu." 
Jeremiah4:25 Ine ndidayang'ana, mbwenye nee ndidaona munthu na mbodzi ene tayu; mbalame zonsene pakhali nkhabepo." 
Jeremiah4:26 Ndidayang'ana mbandiona kuti dziko yamphonje idasanduka thando yatchetcha; mizindache idasanduka madembe pamaso pa MBUYA, thangwi ya ukali wache wakugoswa." 
Jeremiah4:27 MBUYA akulonga tenepa: “Dziko yonsene inasanduka madembe, podi kwene kuti ine sinaivunga monsene mwene tayu." 
Jeremiah4:28 Natenepo dziko yapansi inasintili, pontho kudzulu kunakhala mdima; thangwi ine ndalonga pontho nkhabe dzambombowesa ukali wanga tayu. Ine ndanyerezera kupichita, tenepo nkhabe dzabwerera m'nduli tayu.”" 
Jeremiah4:29 Munthu onsene anathawa pakuva mulikiti wa akavalo na anyamauta. Anango anathawira kumsitu, anangombo anakwira m'miyala. Maluwani onsene anasiyiwa okha ene mbapakhonda khala munthu na mbodzi ene wakukhalamo." 
Jeremiah4:30 Yerusalemu, uli panyatwa zikulu! Watani unavala nguwo zakufira ninga puta? Watani unavala pyakuthemesera mbutswinga ntchiye zako? Kupithemesera kwakoko nkhabe nako basa tayu! Pibwenji pyako pikukukhonda, pontho pikufuna pyakukupha." 
Jeremiah4:31 Ine ndikuva kukalala ninga kwa mkazi wa mimba pakubala, kubulira ninga mkazi wa mimba pakubala mwanache wautombo, kulira kwa ana achikazi a ku Zioni kuchimwana kupuma, uku akuthathamula manjache mbalonga mbati, “Mama ine, ndikufa; moyo wanga ukwenda m'manja mwa mapanga.”" 
Jeremiah5:1 Toma chitani kata-kata, pontho tchithi-tchithi m'misewu ya Yerusalemu! Toma mwazani maso mbamunyerezere, saka-sakani m'misikamu! Ngakhala munagumanambo mbodzi ene basi wakuchita pyakulungama, wakuyeserambo kusaka-saka pyakuonadi, penepo ine ndinalekerera mzindawu." 
Jeremiah5:2 Podi kwene kuti iwo ambadumbira na dzina ya MBUYA wamoyo, kwache pinadumbira iwopyo mphyakunama." 
Jeremiah5:3 Ayi MBUYA, imwe nkhabe yang'ana kukhulupirika kwa munthu tayu? Imwe mudaapamantha, kwache iwo hadave kupha tayu. Imwe mudaapeya, kwache iwo hadafune pyakusumululwa tayu. Iwo adaumisa mtima ninga mwala, mbakhonda kutchunyuka." 
Jeremiah5:4 Ine ndidanyerezera kuti, “Anthu enewa ngakutcherenga, pontho ngakupupwa; thangwi iwo nkhabe dziwa njira ya MBUYA, penu mwambo wa Mulungu wawo tayu." 
Jeremiah5:5 Tenepo ndinati ndiende kuna akadamu mbandikalonga kuna iwo; ndimomwene kuti iwo akudziwa njira ya MBUYA, penu mwambo wa Mulungu wawo.” Kwache onsene na manyerezero abodzi adaswa goli-goliya MBUYA mbamala gwanda nkhambala." 
Jeremiah5:6 Natenepo nkhalamu yakubulukira mumsitu inapwetedza. Matika akubulukira m'thando yatchetcha anaakhwadzula. Nyalugwe anabisala chifupi na maluwani kuti aphate anyakubuluka panja onsene, thangwi kupandukira kwawo nkhukulu pyakwanga, pontho kubwerera kwawo m'nduli nkhuzinji." 
Jeremiah5:7 MBUYA adavunza mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji ndikulekerereni? Ananu andikhonda mbadumbira na dzina ya milungu yapezi. Ine ndikhaapasa pyakusowa pyawo pyonsene, kwache iwo akhachita basi uputa mbapita m'nyumba za maputa." 
Jeremiah5:8 Iwo ambakhala ninga akavalo akudyeswa mwadidi pontho akusirira; munthu onsene kusirira mkazi wa tsanthembache. 
Jeremiah5:9 Ayi ine sidatheme tayu kuatchunyusa thangwi ya penepi? Ayi ine sidatheme tayu kubwezera dzinza ninga yeneyi? 
Jeremiah5:10 “Gwanda na m'mindache yamfesa, mbupwaire-pwairemo kwache mbukhonda kuzivungiratu monsene mwene. Khwadzula nthambi zache, thangwi anthu enewa si a MBUYA tayu." 
Jeremiah5:11 Dzinza ya Israele na mbumba ya Yuda asanduka okhonda khulupirika monsene mwene kuna ine. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.” 
Jeremiah5:12 Iwo alongera MBUYA pyakunama mbati, “Iye nkhabe chita pinthu tayu! Nkhabe chakugoswa chinafuna dzatigwera tayu; na kutani kwene ife nkhabe dzaona talasada penu njala ikulu tayu." 
Jeremiah5:13 Maprofeti akhala ninga mphepo ene pyawo. M'kanwa mwawo nkhabe mphangwa zakubulukira kuna MBUYA; tenepo pinalonga iwopyo mbapichitike kuna iwo.” 
Jeremiah5:14 Tenepo MBUYA Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga tenepa: “Yeremia, na thangwi yakuti anthu alonga mafala enewa, ndinachitisa mafalanga m'kanwa mwako kugaka ninga moto, iwombo mbakhala ninga nkhuni zache zimbagaka zile.”" 
Jeremiah5:15 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Imwe, anthu a ku Israele, ndinati ndidzese dzinza yakutali kuchita namwe nkhondo, dzinza yakuti chilongero chawo imwe nkhabe kuchidziwa tayu, pontho ale lulume yawo imwe nkhabe kuivesa mwadidi tayu." 
Jeremiah5:16 Pyakuikhira matswimo pyawo pyakhala ninga masiye akubauka; onsene mbanyankhondo amphamvu. 
Jeremiah5:17 Iwo anavunga pyakuvuna pyanu na phoso yanu ene; anapha ananu achikazi na achimuna ene. Iwo anavunga pifuyo pyanu, mfesa zanu pontho na makuyu anu ene. Na talasada iwo anavunga mizinda yakutchingwa na mpanda, mizinda imbanyindira iwe ile.”" 
Jeremiah5:18 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Podi na nsiku zenezo zene, ine sinakuvungani monsene mwene tayu.”" 
Jeremiah5:19 Tenepo anthu angavunza kuti, “Thangwi yache ninji MBUYA Mulungu wathu achita pyonsenepi kuna ife?” Iwe Yeremia, unaapanga kuti, “Podi imwe mudamkhonda MBUYA mbamupembedza milungu yachilendo m'dziko mwanu, chinchino imwe munatumikira milungu yachilendo m'dziko ile si yanu tayu.”" 
Jeremiah5:20 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Longa penepi kuna pidzukulu pya Yakobo. Pilalike m'dziko ya Yuda:" 
Jeremiah5:21 Veserani, imwe mapupwe pontho anthu akusowa nzeru, ale muna maso, kwache nkhabe kwanisa kuona, ale muna makutu, kwache nkhabe kwanisa kuva tayu." 
Jeremiah5:22 Ine ndine MBUYA; thangwi yache ninji munakhonda kundigopa? Ninji mumbakhonda tetemera pamaso panga? Ine ndidasasanya tchetcha kukhala madire a bara, madire akukhala na kukhala akuti nkhabe kwanisa kuanumpha tayu. Mabimbi anakwanisa kugabikira, kwache nkhabe kwanisa kuanumpha madire enewa tayu; iwo anakwanisa kumenya, kwache nkhabe kwanisa kuwambuka tayu." 
Jeremiah5:23 Kwache anthu enewa ngakuuma mtima pontho akupandukira, iwo azungunuka mbabauka kubuluka pamaso panga." 
Jeremiah5:24 Iwo nkhabe longa okha ene tayu kuti, ‘Tendeni tigope MBUYA Mulungu wathu, ule ambatipasa mvula pandzidzi wache wakuthema, phumphuli pontho mvula ya chaka, mbatipasa pyakuvuna pandzidzi wache chaka na chaka.’" 
Jeremiah5:25 Kudawa kwanu kwachitisa kuti penepi pileke chitika, pyakudawa pyanu pyakupokoserani pinthu pyadidipi." 
Jeremiah5:26 “Pakati pa anthu anga pana anyakudawika, ale ambabisala swiswiswi, ninga anyakuteyera msampha mbalame, pontho ninga anyakuteya misampha kufuna kumanga nayo anthu." 
Jeremiah5:27 Ninga chisangala chakudzala na mbalame, sasawambo nyumba zawo zamala dzala na pinthu pyakuba; iwo asanduka akufuma pontho amphamvu." 
Jeremiah5:28 Iwo amala nenepa pontho akudya pyadidi. Iwo angachita pyakuipa nkhabe vesera kunja tayu, iwo nkhabe ikhira kunduli ana masiye pamseru wawo tayu, anyakutcherengambo, iwo nkhabe kuapasa ufulu wawo tayu.”" 
Jeremiah5:29 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ayi ine sidatheme tayu kuatchunyusa thangwi ya penepi? Ayi ine sidatheme tayu kubwezera dzinza ninga yeneyi?" 
Jeremiah5:30 Chinthu chakugoswa pontho chakugumisa manungo chachitika m'dziko yeneyi. 
Jeremiah5:31 Maprofeti kwawo nkhulonga mphangwa zakunama; anyansembembo akukwata mwambo m'manja mwawo, tenepo anthu anga akukomerwa napyo penepi. Apo mamalisiro ache angafika, ayi iwo anachita tani?”" 
Jeremiah6:1 “Thawira kumbuto yakupata, iwe dzinza ya Benjemani! Thawamo mu Yerusalemu! Ngoma mbilizwe mu Tekoa! Kwizani m'dzulu chidziwiso pana Beti-Hakeremu! Thangwi nyatwa na kuvungika kukulu pikudza kubulukira kumpoto." 
Jeremiah6:2 Ndinavunga mzinda wa Zioni, ule ngwakubalika pontho mtete-mtete ene." 
Jeremiah6:3 Amakabuswa na mikumbi yawo ene anapokanyisana naye; iwo anamanga makumbi awo mwakumzungulira, munthu onsene mbamanga khundu yonsene inafuna iye.”" 
Jeremiah6:4 Iwo analonga kuti, “Sasanyikani kuchita nkhondo na Yerusalemu! Lamukani mbatimsoseni uku dzuwa ikuswa miti!” Kwache iwo anati alonge kuti, “Kunja kwadoka, pontho mithunzi ya mawulo yatoma kale kufika." 
Jeremiah6:5 Tinati timsose na mosiku mbativunga mpanda wa mzinda.” 
Jeremiah6:6 Ipi ndiye pyalonga MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene: “Gwisani miti ya mu Yerusalemu, pontho sasanyani pyakugomolera mpandache. Mzindawu wathema kutchunyuswa; thangwi wadzala na kuponderezana." 
Jeremiah6:7 Ninga mumbachitira mchera kububa madzi, sasawambo pyakuipa pimbabuba muna iye. Upandu na kuzunguzika pilimo mumzindamo; kuva kwache kupha na pironda pyache ine ndikupiona basi." 
Jeremiah6:8 Anthu a ku Yerusalemu, penepi mbapikhale pyakukucheuzani, gopesera ine ndinakupasani nkhodolo, mbandichitisa dziko yanu kukhala thando yatchetcha, towera muleke khalamo na mbodzi ene.”" 
Jeremiah6:9 Pyalonga MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene kuna ine mphipi: “Phalakatirani anyakusalira na moyo a Israele khala ninga munda wamfesa; chitani nyambwereza nthambi zache zonsene, towera pasale mphesi zokhokha.”" 
Jeremiah6:10 Ine ndidatawira kuti, “Mbani anafuna ine longa naye mbandimcheuza? Mbani anafuna kundivesera? Makutu awo amala phopha, towera aleke kwanisa kuva. Mafala a MBUYA kuna iwo ntchinthu chakunyansa, iwo nkhabe komerwa nawo tayu." 
Jeremiah6:11 Kwache ukali wa MBUYA wadzala muna ine, tenepo ine nkhabe kwanisa kuufungira tayu.” MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Ukhuthulire pana ana m'misewumu, pontho pana aphale amala gumanyikana pabodzi ale. Amuna na akazawo ene anakwatwa, podi na nkhalamba zene nkhabe dzasiyiwa na moyo tayu." 
Jeremiah6:12 Nyumba zawo zinaperekwa kuna anthu anango, pabodzi pene na mindawo na akazawo ene, thangwi ine ndinavunga anthu onsene m'dziko yeneyi. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah6:13 Munthu onsene, mkulu mpakana mwana, onsene nganyamtima kufuna pyakuganyali basi; maprofeti na anyansembe ntchibodzi-bodzi, onsene nkhabe chita mwakuona mtima tayu." 
Jeremiah6:14 Iwo ambamanga mwajumba njinda za anthu anga khala ninga si pironda tayu. Iwo ambalonga kuti, ‘Mtendere, mtendere’ podi kwene kuti mtenderewo nkhabepo." 
Jeremiah6:15 Ayi iwo ambachita manyadzo na pinthu pyakunyansa pidachita iwopi? Nkhabe, iwo nkhabe kuva napyo manyadzo; iwo nkhabe kula napyo msolo tayu. Tenepo iwo anagwa ninga mudagwera anzawo, ine ndingaatchunyusa kumala kwawo kunakhala konthoko. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah6:16 MBUYA adalonga kuna anthu ache mbati, “Imirani pamphambano mbamuyang'ane; vunza-vunzani pya njira zakale ene, vunzani kuna njira yadidi mbamufambemo, tenepo moyo wanu unagumana kupuma. Kwache imwe mudalonga kuti, ‘Ife nkhabe fambamo tayu.’" 
Jeremiah6:17 Ine ndidakusankhulirani anyakulondali mbandilonga kuti, ‘Veserani kulira kwa ngoma!’ Kwache imwe mudalonga kuti, ‘Ife nkhabe vesera tayu.’" 
Jeremiah6:18 Natenepo veserani, imwe madzinza; yang'anani imwe mboni, pinafuna dzachitika kuna iwo." 
Jeremiah6:19 Vesera, iwe dziko yapansi: Ndinati ndidzese nyatwa pana anthu enewa, kuatchunyusa thangwi ya pyakuipa pidasasanya iwo kuchita; thangwi iwo hadavesere tayu mafalanga, pontho akhonda kuvera matongero anga." 
Jeremiah6:20 Ninji pontho chinafuna ine tsalakana pya pyakufukiza pyakununkhira pya ku Sheba, penu pyakukomesera muliwo pya kudziko yakutali? Pyakupereka pyawo pyakupyerera, ine nkhabe kupitambira tayu; nsembe zawo, ine nkhabe komerwa nazo tayu.”" 
Jeremiah6:21 Natenepo MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ndinachitisa anthu enewa kugwegweduka mbagwa. Ababa pabodzi pene na anawo achimuna anagwegweduka; atsanthembawo na ashamwali awo anamala vungwa.”" 
Jeremiah6:22 Natenepo MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ngayang'anani anyankhondo akudza kubulukira kudziko yakumpoto; dzinza yamphamvu ya kumadolomero a dziko yapansi ikusasanyikira pya nkhondo ile." 
Jeremiah6:23 Iwo aphatirira mauta na madipa; iwo ngakukala mtima mbakhonda kuva nsisi. Iwo akuveka ninga madzi akukuka ndzidzi unadza iwo pa akavalo awo; iwo asasanyika kuchita nkhondo na iwe, mzinda wa Zioni.”" 
Jeremiah6:24 Anthu a ku Yerusalemu akulonga kuti, “Ife tava mbiri yakulonga pya iwo, tenepo manjathu achita chiwewa. Ife taphatwa na mantha makulu, tikuva kupha ninga mkazi wa mimba pakubala." 
Jeremiah6:25 Mbatileke buluka kwenda kuminda penu kufamba m'misewu, thangwi anyamalwathu aphatirira matalasada, pontho kukhundu zonsene kuna pyakugoswa.”" 
Jeremiah6:26 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Anthu anga, valani masakha mbamubulumunde padotha; lirani na chiliro chikulu khala ninga munthu akulira mwanache mbodzi ene basi, thangwi nyakuvunga anabwera pana imwe mwakututumusa." 
Jeremiah6:27 Yeremia, ine ndakusankhula kukhala nyakuyesa anthu anga ninga nyakuyesa ntove, towera uone kuti iwo akhala ninganji." 
Jeremiah6:28 Onsene mbakupandukira pontho anyakuuma mtima, iwo ambaenda mbalonga matsweda. Iwo akhala ninga nkuwa pontho simbi; iwo onsene ambachita mwakupotoka." 
Jeremiah6:29 Dzenje ya moto ikugaka mwakugoswa kuti unyunguluse utale, kwache kunyungulusako nkhabe basa tayu; masepu-sepuwo hakubuluka tayu muntovemo." 
Jeremiah6:30 Iwo anachemerwa siliva wakusowa basa, thangwi MBUYA aakhonda.”" 
Jeremiah7:1 MBUYA adapanga Yeremia kuti," 
Jeremiah7:2 “Imira pamsuwo wa Nyumba ya Mulungu, pontho penepo mbulalike mphangwa izi: “Veserani mafala a MBUYA, imwe monsene anthu a ku Yuda, ale ambapita na pamisuwo yeneyi dzapembedza MBUYA." 
Jeremiah7:3 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, Mulungu wa Israele akulonga kuti: Sanduzani makhaliro anu na mabasanu, tenepo ndinakutawirisani kuthimiza kukhala m'dzikomu." 
Jeremiah7:4 Lekani nyindira mafala akunama mbamulonga kuti, ‘Ino ndi Nyumba ya MBUYA! Ino ndi Nyumba ya MBUYA! Ino ndi Nyumba ya MBUYA!’" 
Jeremiah7:5 “Ngakhala imwe munasanduzadi makhaliro anu na mabasanu, pontho mungachitirana pyakulungama unango na mwanzache," 
Jeremiah7:6 ngakhala imwe munakhonda kupondereza alendo, ana masiye, penu amamfelwa, mbamuleka kuchuchisa chiropa cha anthu okhonda dawa pambuto yeneyi, pontho ngakhala munaleka kupembedza milungu inango, ile inakwanisa kukuvungani," 
Jeremiah7:7 penepo ine ndinakutawirisani kukhala pambuto yeneyi, dziko idapasa ine makolo anu ile kuti ikhale yawo ene kwenda na kwenda." 
Jeremiah7:8 Kwache ngayang'anani, imwe mumbanyindira mafala akunama, ale ngakusowa basa." 
Jeremiah7:9 “Imwe mumbathimiza kuba na kupha, pontho kuchita uputa na kudumbira pyakunama, na kufukiza pyakununkhira kuna milungu Baala, pontho kupembedza milungu inango ile chipo imwe nkhabe kuidziwa tayu." 
Jeremiah7:10 Kubuluka penepo mumbaimira pamaso panga m'Nyumbanga mbamulonga kuti, ‘Ife tili pakupata!’ Pakupata mwakuti munakwanisa kuchita pinthu pyonsene pyakunyansapi!" 
Jeremiah7:11 Kani Nyumba yeneyi, ile yakwata dzinangayi, yasanduka nyumba yakubisaliramo mapanga? Kwache ine ndapiyang'ana pyanga! Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah7:12 “Chinchino ndokoni ku Shilo, mbuto idatoma ine kuisankhula ile, mbamukaone pidachita ine kweneko, thangwi ya kudawika kwa anthu anga Aisraele." 
Jeremiah7:13 Ndzidzi ukhachita imwe pyonsenepi, ine ndikhalonga namwe kazinji kene, kwache imwe mudakhonda kundivesera; ine ndidakuchemerani, kwache imwe nee mudanditawira tayu." 
Jeremiah7:14 Natenepo pidachita ine kuna Shilo ndiye pinafuna dzachita ine kuna Nyumba yakwata dzinangayi, Nyumba inanyindira imweyi, mbuto idakupasani ine imwe na makolo anu ene ile." 
Jeremiah7:15 Ine ndinakubulusani pamaso panga ninga mudathamangisira ine abale anu, dzinza ya Eferemu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah7:16 MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Yeremia leka pempherera anthu enewa. Leka kualirira penu kuadembetera kuna ine m'mbuto mwawo; leka kundibulumbundira, thangwi ine sinakuvesera tayu." 
Jeremiah7:17 Ayi iwe nkhabe kuona tayu pinachita iwo m'maluwani a Yuda na m'misewu ya mzinda wa Yerusalemu? 
Jeremiah7:18 Ana akulokotera nkhuni, ababa akuphatisa moto, amamambo akumunya pitumbuwa kuti aphikire milungu ambachemera iwo, Matsano Wakudzulu. Iwo ambapereka nsembe za pyakumwa kuna milungu inango kundichitisa kuzhangali." 
Jeremiah7:19 Ayi ndine pano anazhangalisa iwo ule? Ayi kunachita iwo si kupikuwaza pontho kupichitisa okha ene manyadzo tayu? 
Jeremiah7:20 Natenepo, ine MBUYA Mulungu, ndinakhuthulira ukali na shungu yanga yonsene pana Nyumba yeneyi, pana munthu onsene, pana nyama zene, pana miti na pana mbewu zonsene. Ukali wanga unakhala ninga moto okhonda thimisika." 
Jeremiah7:21 “Ine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, Mulungu wa Israele ndikulonga tenepa: Anthu anga, thimizani pyakupereka pyakupyerera kuna nsembe zanu zinango mbamudye pyanu nyamazo." 
Jeremiah7:22 Thangwi pidabulusa ine makolo anu m'dziko ya Iguputo mbandilonga kuna iwo, ine sidaapase kwene matongero a pyakupereka penu nsembe zakupyerera tayu," 
Jeremiah7:23 mbwenye ndidaapasa matongero akuti: ndivereni, tenepo ine ndinakhala Mulungu wanu, imwembo mbamukhala anthu anga. Fambani m'njira zonsene zinakutongani ine, towera pinthu pyanu pikufambireni mwadidi." 
Jeremiah7:24 Kwache iwo hadavere penu kupiikha konta tayu. M'mbuto mwache iwo adakakamira kuchita pinthu pikhafuna mtimawo wakuuma pontho wakuipa ule. Iwo adabwerera m'nduli mbakhonda ikha maso awo patsogolo. 
Jeremiah7:25 Kubulukira pa ndzidzi udabuluka makolo anu m'dziko ya Iguputo kufikirana lero, nsiku na nsiku pontho kazinji kene, ine ndikhakutumizirani anyabasanga, maprofeti." 
Jeremiah7:26 Kwache nkhabe na mbodzi ene wa imwe adandivesera penu kupiikha konta tayu. M'mbuto mwache imwe ndiye mudanyanyiratu kuumisa mtima pontho kukhala akuipa kupiringana makolo anu. 
Jeremiah7:27 “Tenepo Yeremia, iwe ungaapanga pinthu pyonsenepi, iwo nkhabe dzakuvesera tayu; iwe ungaachemera, iwo nkhabe dzakutawira tayu." 
Jeremiah7:28 Natenepo longa kuna iwo kuti, ‘Yeneyi ndi dzinza ile hidavera MBUYA Mulungu wache tayu, penu kuva kusumululwa tayu. Pyakuonadi nkhabe pakati pawo, pontho pyabulukamo m'kanwa mwawo.’" 
Jeremiah7:29 Chinga tsisi yanu mbamuitaye; imbani nyimbo ya maliro pamapiri akupupwa, thangwi MBUYA na kuzhangali kwache akhonda pontho apasa nkhodolo mfendu wenewu, ule uli pansi pa ukali wache.”" 
Jeremiah7:30 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Anthu a ku Yuda achita pyakuipa pamaso panga. Iwo aswipisa Nyumbanga pakuikha mifanikizo yawo mwenemo." 
Jeremiah7:31 Iwo amanga mbuto yakupembedzerapo milungu pa Tofeti m'phedi ya Beni-Hinomu, towera apereke anawo achimuna na achikazi ene nsembe zakupyerera, chinthu chakuti sidaatonge ndine tayu kuchita tenepo, penu kukhala nachombo m'manyerezero mwanga." 
Jeremiah7:32 Natenepo ndzidzi unati udze wakuti iyo nkhabe dzachemerwave Tofeti, penu phedi ya Beni-Hinomu tayu, mbwenye inachemerwa phedi yakuchekana, thangwi iwo anafikhira mitembo ya anthu penepo mpakana mbuto yonsene imale." 
Jeremiah7:33 Mitembo ya anthu enewa inakhala pyakudya pya mbalame na nyama zam'tsanga, tenepo panakhala nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene wakuzigoswa tayu." 
Jeremiah7:34 Dziko inasanduka thando yatchetcha. M'mizinda ya Yuda na Yerusalemu ndinamalisamo mkhuwo wakusekera na kukomerwa, pontho mkhuwo wa maphwando akukazhali.”" 
Jeremiah8:1 MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Pandzidzi wenewo magogodo a mafumu na mathubu a ku Yuda, magogodo a anyansembe na maprofeti, pontho na magogodo a anthu anango onsene a mu Yerusalemu ale, anabuluswamo m'masiye." 
Jeremiah8:2 M'mbuto mwa kugumanyiswa na kufikhirwa, magogodo awo anakhala gwenjere-gwenjere pakwecha ninga ulowa. Dzuwa inaamenya pontho mwezi na nyenyezi pinaamwinikira, pinthu pile pikhafuna na kutumikira anthu enewa, pontho kudavunza iwo nzeru mbakapipembedza pile." 
Jeremiah8:3 Tenepo anthu anafuna dzasala na moyo a dzinza yakuipayi, ale ambakhala kumbuto zidaabalalisa ine zile, mbadafuna pyakwanga kufa pyawo kusiyana na kuthimiza kukhala na moyo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene.”" 
Jeremiah8:4 MBUYA andipanga kulonga kuna anthu ache kuti, “Munthu angagwa, ayi iye nkhabe lamuka tayu? Munthu angabauka, ayi hambabwererave tayu?" 
Jeremiah8:5 Apo thangwi yache njanji anthu enewa abauka? Njanji Yerusalemu ndzidzi onsene ambabauka? Iwo ambakakamira papinthu pyakunama; iwo akukhonda kubwerera kuna ine. 
Jeremiah8:6 Ine ndidaikha makutu pikhalonga iwo, kwache iwo nkhabe longa pyakuonadi tayu. Nkhabe na mbodzi ene anafuna tayu pya kuleka pyakudawa pyache, nkhabe mbodzi ambalonga kuti, ‘Chachita ine ninji?’ Munthu onsene ambathimiza kuchita pinafuna iye ninga kavalo kulikitika kunkhondo." 
Jeremiah8:7 Podi na chidokowe chene m'dzulu chimbadziwa ndzidzi wache wakubwerera; majiwa, anyanzeze na masili-sili ambadziwa ndzidzi wakufuluka pambuto. Mbwenye anthu anga nkhabe dziwa pinthu pimbafuna MBUYA tayu." 
Jeremiah8:8 “Ayi imwe mungalonge tani kuti, ‘Ife ndife anzeru, thangwi timbadziwa mwambo wa MBUYA,’ mwenemo mwambowo wasanduzwa wakunama na anyakulemba akunama?" 
Jeremiah8:9 Anyanzeru anati achitiswe manyadzo; iwo anati adzudzumike mbakweshwa na msampha. Podi iwo akhonda mafala a MBUYA, apo nzeru zache nsanji zina iwo?" 
Jeremiah8:10 Natenepo ndinapereka akazawo kuna amuna anango, pontho mazunde awo kuna anthu anango. Munthu onsene, mkulu penu mwana, onsene ngamtima, kwawo nkhufuna kuganyali basi; maprofeti na anyansembe ntchibodzi-bodzi, onsene nkhabe chita mwakuona mtima tayu." 
Jeremiah8:11 Iwo ambamanga mwajumba njinda za anthu anga khala ninga si pironda tayu. Iwo ambalonga kuti, ‘Mtendere, mtendere’ podi kwene kuti mtenderewo nkhabepo." 
Jeremiah8:12 Ayi iwo adachita manyadzo na pinthu pyakunyansa pidachita iwopi? Nkhabe, iwo nkhabe kuva napyo manyadzo tayu. Iwo nkhabe kula napyo msolo tayu. Tenepo iwo anagwa ninga mudagwera anzawo, ine ndingaatchunyusa kumala kwawo kunakhala konthoko. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah8:13 “Ine ndinapokosera pyakuvuna pyawo. M'mitawi yamfesa nkhabe dzakhalave mfesa tayu. M'miti yamkuyu nkhabe dzakhalave makuyu tayu, pontho masambawo anaunyala. Pinthu pyaapasa ine pile ndinati ndiapoke.”" 
Jeremiah8:14 Anthu akuvunza kuti, “Tatani tinakhala pano gumanyikane? Tendeni tithawire pyathu kumzinda wakutchingwa na mpanda mbatikafere pyathu kweneko! Thangwi MBUYA Mulungu wathu atichitisa kuti tivungike mbatipasa madzi akupha kuti timwe, thangwi ife tamdawira." 
Jeremiah8:15 Ife maso akhali kunjira kudikhira mtendere, kwache nkhabe chadidi chidachitika tayu, ife tikhadikhira kuwangiswa, kwache chidaona ife mphinthu pyakugoswa pene basi." 
Jeremiah8:16 Kumina kwa akavalo a anyamalwa kukuveka kubulukira ku Dani; dziko yonsene ikutetemera thangwi ya kulira kwa akavalo awo. Iwo adza dzavunga dziko na pyonsene pili mwenemopyo, mzinda na anthu ache onsene ambakhala mwenemo ale.”" 
Jeremiah8:17 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Khalani m'maso, ndinatumiza nyoka zakupha pakati panu, mibobo ile nkhabe kuva matsenga tayu, tenepo izo zinakulumani.”" 
Jeremiah8:18 Nyakundithondozanga pandzidzi wakutsukwala kwanga, mtimanga waphatwa na nsisi zikulu." 
Jeremiah8:19 Veserani kulira kwa anthu anga, kubulira kudziko yakutali pyakwanga kuti, “Ayi MBUYA halive mu Zioni tayu? Ayi mfumu wache halive kweneko tayu?” MBUYA akutawira kuti, “Thangwi yache ninji iwo andizhangalisa na mifanikizo yawo, pontho na milungu yawo yakusowa basa?”" 
Jeremiah8:20 Anthu akulonga kuti, “Ndzidzi wakuvuna wagwanda, mainja amala, apo ife nee tapulumuka tayu.”" 
Jeremiah8:21 Podi anthu anga ali panyatwa zikulu, ine ndikuva kupha; ine ndimbasintili pontho kuphatwa na mantha makulu." 
Jeremiah8:22 Ayi mu Gileadi nkhabemo mitombwe? Ayi na ang'anga ene nkhabemo? Thangwi yache ninji anthu anga nkhabe wanga tayu? 
Jeremiah9:1 Ndikhapifunadi kuti msolo wanga mbudakhala mphuno ya madzi, pontho maso anga mbadakhala pyawo mchera wa misozi! Ine mbidalira mosiku na masikati thangwi ya kuchekwa kwachitwa anthu anga." 
Jeremiah9:2 Ndikhafuna pyakwanga kukhala na mbuto kuthando yatchetcha, kule mbidakwanisa kuthawa anthu anga. Onsene mbanthu okhonda khulupirika, gulu ya mapanga." 
Jeremiah9:3 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Malulume awo ambasasanyika kulonga pyakunama ninga mauta kuponya matswimo; dziko yonsene yadzala na pyakunama, pyakuonadi nkhabemo. Iwo ambachita nyansanja-nsanja wa pyakudawa; iwo nkhabe kutawira tayu kuti ndine Mulungu wawo." 
Jeremiah9:4 Munthu onsene athema kuchita mphole-mphole na ashamwali ache, pontho aleke nyindira abale ache. Thangwi mbale ndi mphandu ninga mudachitira Yakobo, pontho shamwali onsene ndi mpeni walezi." 
Jeremiah9:5 Pimbachitika shamwali kunamiza shamwaliache, nkhabe na mbodzi ene ambalonga pyakuonadi tayu. Malulume awo amala kuafunzisa kulonga pyakunama; iwo ambapidambisa okha ene na kuchita pyakudawa." 
Jeremiah9:6 Chakudawa chimbatewera chakudawa chinzache, kunama kumbatewerambo kunama; iwo nkhabe funa kundidziwa tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah9:7 Natenepo MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga kuti, “Yang'anani, ine ndinaayesa kubulusa masepu-sepu muna iwo, thangwi ninji pontho chinafuna ine chita kuna iwo thangwi ya pyakudawa pya anthu anga?" 
Jeremiah9:8 Malulume awo akhala ninga matswimo akupha; ndzidzi onsene kwawo nkhulonga pyakunama basi. Munthu ambatapira m'kanwa kuna shamwaliache, mwenemo mumtima mwache mwadzala na manyerezero akuipa." 
Jeremiah9:9 Ayi ine sidatheme kuatchunyusa tayu thangwi ya penepi? Ayi ine sidatheme kubwezera tayu thangwi ya pinthu pyandichita dzinza yeneyi? Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.” 
Jeremiah9:10 Ine Yeremia ndinalira na kukalala thangwi ya mapiri, ndinalira maliro thangwi ya kududumuka kwa mpovu m'thando. Mbuto yasala yokha ene pontho nkhabe munthu akugwanda namove tayu, kulira kwa ng'ombe nkhabe vekamove tayu. Mbalame zamala thawamo pontho nyama zabulukamo." 
Jeremiah9:11 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ndinachitisa Yerusalemu kukhala mulu wa madongolomwa, mbuto yakukhala matika; mizinda ya Yuda inasanduka madembe mbuto yakukhonda khala munthu na mbodzi ene.”" 
Jeremiah9:12 Ine ndidavunza kuti, “Munthu wache mbani ana nzeru zakuvesa pinthu penepi? Munthu wache ngupi apangwa na MBUYA kuti afuthule pinthu penepi? Thangwi ache ninji dziko yasanduka madembe pontho thando yatchetcha, mwakuti nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene akugwanda namo pontho tayu.”" 
Jeremiah9:13 MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Thangwi yache njakuti iwo akhonda matongero anga adaapasa ine ale; iwo hadandivere, penu kuteweza matongero anga tayu." 
Jeremiah9:14 M'mbuto mwache iwo ateweza pinthu pimbafuna mtimawo wakuuma ule; iwo atewera milungu Baala ninga montho mudaafunzisira makolo awo.” 
Jeremiah9:15 Natenepo MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, Mulungu wa Israele akulonga kuti, “Yang'anani, ine ndinachitisa anthu enewa kudya pyakuwawa pontho kumwa madzi akupha." 
Jeremiah9:16 Ine ndinaabalalisa pakati pa madzinza akuti chipo nee iwo, penu makolo awo ambaadziwa tayu, pontho ine ndinati ndiathamangise na talasada mpakana ndimale kuavunga.”" 
Jeremiah9:17 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga kuti, “Nyerezerani pya pinthu pinachitikapi! Chemeresani akazi akulira maliro kuti adze; chemeresani anyaluso pakati pawo." 
Jeremiah9:18 Mbadze mwakuchimbiza dzatilira maliro, mpakana maso athu agwe misozi, pontho mikulo ya misozi ikuke m'maso mwathu." 
Jeremiah9:19 Kukalala kukuveka na ku Zioni kuti: Ife tamala vungwa! Ife tachitiswa manyadzo pikulu pene! Ife tathema kubuluka m'dziko muno, thangwi nyumba zathu zamala vungika.”" 
Jeremiah9:20 Ine ndidalonga kuti, “Imwe akazi, veserani pinthu pinalonga MBUYA; ikhani makutu anu kuna mafala a MBUYA. Funzisani ananu achikazi kulira maliro; funzisanani unango na mwanzache nyimbo za maliro." 
Jeremiah9:21 Imfa yapita na m'mazhanera pontho mumpanda wamphamvu; yagwanda pakhosi ana m'misewu pontho aphale m'misika. 
Jeremiah9:22 MBUYA andipanga kuti ndilonge mafala awa: Mitembo ya anthu inakhala ninga ulowa gwenjere-gwenjere m'minda, ninga mapira akusiyiwa m'nduli mwa anyakuvuna, wakusowa na mbodzi ene wakuaphalakatira.”" 
Jeremiah9:23 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Nyanzeru mbaleke nyadira nzeru zache, penu nyamphamvu kunyadira mboko zache, penu nyamfuma kunyadira ufumi wache." 
Jeremiah9:24 Mbwenye nyakufuna kunyadayo mbanyade na thangwi yakuti: iye ndi nyakuvesa pinthu pontho ambadziwa ine pano, kuti ndine MBUYA, nyakuafuna anthu kokhonda mala, nyakufuna chilungamo, pontho pyakulungama padziko yapansi, thangwi penepi ndiye pimbandikomera. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah9:25 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ndzidzi ukudza unafuna ine dzatchunyusa anthu ale ambagwanda nsonga yachimuna, ile imbachitwa pamanungo basi;" 
Jeremiah9:26 anthu a ku Iguputo, Yuda, Edomu, Amoni, Moabu na anthu a m'thando yatchetcha, ale ambachinga tsisi yawo. Thangwi madzinza onsenewa hadagwandwe nsonga yachimuna tayu, podi na dzinza yonsene ya Israele hidagwandwe mumtima tayu.”" 
Jeremiah10:1 Aisraele, veserani pinalonga MBUYA Mulungu kuna imwe." 
Jeremiah10:2 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Lekani tsanzira makhaliro a madzinza anango, penu kuchita mantha na pidzindikiro pinaoneka kuthambopi, podi kwene kuti madzinza anango akugoswerwa napyo." 
Jeremiah10:3 Thangwi mitemo ya madzinza anango njakusowa basa; iwo ambagwanda muti mumsitu, tenepo nyakusema ambausema na ntchemu." 
Jeremiah10:4 Iwo ambauthemesera na siliva pontho golidi, ambaukhoma na nyundo pontho mapedego, towera uleke limbuka." 
Jeremiah10:5 Ninga dzimunthu wakuthuswira mbalame m'munda wa makaka, mifanikizo yawo nkhabe kwanisa kulonga. Iyo yathema kuthukulwa heya-heya, thangwi iyo nkhabe kwanisa kufamba. Lekani kuigopa; thangwi iyo nkhabe kuchita chakugoswa penu chadidi tayu.”" 
Jeremiah10:6 MBUYA, nkhabe unango ninga imwe; imwe ndimwe wamkulu, pontho dzinanu njamphamvu pyakwanga." 
Jeremiah10:7 Mbani athema khonda kukugopani, imwe mfumu wa madzinza? Penepi mphinthu pyakukuthemerani. Pakati pa anyanzeru onsene m'madziko onsene, pontho m'maufumu mwawo onsene nkhabemo unango ninga imwe." 
Jeremiah10:8 Onsene ngakusowa nzeru pontho mapupwe; ninji chinafuna iwo kufunza kuna pinthu pyakusasanywa na muti? 
Jeremiah10:9 Imbakukutizwa na siliva wa ku Tarisisi, pontho na golidi wa ku Ufazi. Kubuluka penepo pinthu pyasasanya nyakusema-sema na nyakufula ntovepi, pimbavazikwa nguwo zachoza na zamsuzi wanyemba; pyonsenepi mphyakusasanywa na amuna aluso." 
Jeremiah10:10 Mbwenye MBUYA ndi Mulungu wakuonadi; iye ndi Mulungu wamoyo, mfumu wakwenda na kwenda. Iye angazhangali dziko yapansi imbatetemera. Madzinza nkhabe kwanisa kupirira na ukali wache tayu." 
Jeremiah10:11 Ndapangwa kulonga kuna anthu kuti: “Milungu yeneyi, ile hidasasanye thambo pontho dziko yapansi, inavungwa. Iyo nkhabe dzakhalave padziko yapansi, penu pansi pa thambo tayu.”" 
Jeremiah10:12 Na mphamvu zache MBUYA adasasanya dziko yapansi; iye adatanda dziko yapansi na nzeru zache, pontho na udziwisi wache iye adafuthula thambo." 
Jeremiah10:13 Iye angadima madzi a kudzulu ambavunduka; iye ambachitisa makole kukwira kudzulu kubulukira kumadolomero a dziko yapansi. Iye ambatumiza njazi pabodzi pene na mvula, mbafungulira mphepo kubulukira m'masubi mwayo. Iye ambatumiza njazi pabodzi pene na mvula, mbafungulira mphepo m'masubi mumbaikoya iye." 
Jeremiah10:14 Munthu onsene nkhabe nzeru, pontho nkhabe udziwisi tayu; nyakufula golidi onsene akuchita manyadzo na mifanikizo yasasanya iye ile. Milungu yasasanya iye njakupupwa; iyo nkhabe na muya ene tayu." 
Jeremiah10:15 Iyo njakusowa basa, pinthu pyakupasa ntchekwa; iyo inati ivungwe nsiku inafuna MBUYA dzatonga mseru." 
Jeremiah10:16 Iye ule ndi Mulungu wa Yakobo hadakhale ninga penepi tayu; thangwi iye ndiye nyakusasanya pinthu pyonsene, pontho iye adasankhula Israele kukhala dzinzache ene. MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndiye dzinache." 
Jeremiah10:17 Mangani mitolo yanu kubuluka m'dziko muno, thangwi imwe mwazungulirwa na anyamalwa." 
Jeremiah10:18 Thangwi MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Pandzidzi uno ndinaponyera kunja anyakukhala m'dziko yeneyi; ine ndinadzesa nyatwa pana iwo, towera onsene amale phatwa.”" 
Jeremiah10:19 Dzedze kuna ine thangwi ya kukuwazika kwanga! Chironda changa nkhabe kwanisa kupola tayu. Ande, ndidalonga ndekha ene kuti: Utendanga ngwenewu, ine ndathema kupirira nawo!" 
Jeremiah10:20 Khumbi yanga yamala vungwa; nkhambala zache zamala gwandika. Ananga amala kundithawa, pontho nkhabe na mbodzi ene asala tayu, nee mbodzi asala kuimisa khumbi yanga; penu kundimangira kambuto kakubisaliramo." 
Jeremiah10:21 Akadamu athu nkhabe nzeru, pontho iwo nkhabe vunza nzeru kuna MBUYA tayu; ndi thangwi yache pinthu pyawo nkhabe kuafambira mwadidi tayu, pontho anthu amala balalika ninga mabira." 
Jeremiah10:22 Veserani! Mbiri yaveka guduu, chimpiningu chikulu chikudza kubulukira kumpoto. Chinasandusa mizinda ya Yuda kukhala madembe, mbuto yakubisaliramo matika." 
Jeremiah10:23 MBUYA, ine ndikupidziwa kuti moyo wa munthu si wache ene tayu; yekha ene munthu nkhabe utongi na moyo wache tayu." 
Jeremiah10:24 Ndisumululeni MBUYA, kwache mwachilungamo nee mwakundituzulira maso tayu, gopesera munandisiyiratu nee pinthu tayu." 
Jeremiah10:25 Khuthulirani ukali wanu pana madzinza ambakhonda kukudziwani ale, pana anthu ambakhonda chemera kuna imwe ale, thangwi iwo avunga dzinzanu Yakobo mbamala fudza dziko yache monsene mwene." 
Jeremiah11:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine Yeremia mbati," 
Jeremiah11:2 “Vesera kuna matongero akulonga pya chiverano, pontho ndoko kaapange anthu akukhala mu Yuda na Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah11:3 Kalonge kuna iwo kuti MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele akulonga tenepa: Nyadzedze ngule anakhonda vera matongero akulonga pya chiveranochi," 
Jeremiah11:4 matongero adatonga ine makolo anu ndzidzi ukhabuluka iwo m'dziko ya Iguputo, dzenje yakunyungulusiramo utale ile. Ine ndidalonga kuti: Ndivereni mbamuchita pyonsene pinakutongani ine. Tenepo imwe munakhala anthu anga, inembo mbandikhala Mulungu wanu." 
Jeremiah11:5 Tenepo ine ndinachitisa kudumbira kudachita ine kuna makolo anu kule kukwana-kwana kuti ndinaapasa dziko yamphonje, dziko ile njawo ene na lero.” Ine ndidatawira kuti, “Ande, MBUYA, ndimomwene.”" 
Jeremiah11:6 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Lalika mafala onsenewa m'maluwani a Yuda na m'misewu ya Yerusalemu: ‘Veserani matongero akulonga pya chiveranochi mbamuateweze." 
Jeremiah11:7 Kubulukira ndzidzi udabulusa ine makolo anu m'dziko ya Iguputo kufikirana lero, ine kazinji kene ndidaacheuza kuti andivere." 
Jeremiah11:8 Kwache iwo hadavesere penu kupiikha konta tayu; m'mbuto mwache adateweza pinthu pikhafuna mtimawo wakuuma pontho wakuipa ule. Natenepo ine ndidadzesa dzedze yonsene yalongwa mwenemoyi pana iwo, thangwi ya kukhonda vera chiverano chidasasanya ine na iwo chile.’ ”" 
Jeremiah11:9 Kubuluka penepo MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Pana upandu ule unasasanya anthu a ku Yuda na ale ene ambakhala mu Yerusalemu kuuchita." 
Jeremiah11:10 Iwo abwerera pontho kuna pyakudawa pikhachita makolo awo, ale adakhonda kuchita pidatonga ine pile. Iwo ambatumikira na kupembedza milungu inango. Anthu a ku Israele na ku Yuda ene onsene aswa chiverano chidasasanya ine na makolo awo chile." 
Jeremiah11:11 Natenepo ine MBUYA ndikuacheuza kuti ndinadzesa pana iwo muliri wakuti iwo nkhabe kwanisa kuuthawa kwache tayu. Podi kwene kuti iwo alire kuna ine, ine nkhabe dzaavesera tayu." 
Jeremiah11:12 Tenepo anthu a ku Yuda na a ku Yerusalemu anaenda mbakalira kuna milungu imbafukiza iwo pyakununkhira ile, kwache iyo nkhabe dzaaphedza na pang'ono pene tayu, muliri ungaagwera." 
Jeremiah11:13 Anthu a ku Yuda ana milungu mizinji pyakwanga ninga kuinjipa kwachita mizindawo, pontho anthu a ku Yerusalemu amanga maguwa ansembe mazinji pyakwanga ninga kuinjipa kwachita misewu ya mu Yerusalemu kuti aperekerepo nsembe kuna Baala, milungu yakunyansayi." 
Jeremiah11:14 “Yeremia, leka pemphera penu kudembetera kuna ine m'mbuto mwa anthu enewa, thangwi ine nkhabe dzaavesera tayu, iwo angandichemera ndzidzi unakhala iwo panyatwa.”" 
Jeremiah11:15 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ayi anthu apamtimanga akuchitanji m'Nyumba mwanga podi adachita pyakuipa pyakwanga? Ayi nsembe za nyama zakupambulirwa kuna ine nkhukwanisa kumbombowesa ukali wanga pana iwo? Ndzidzi umbachita imwe pyakuipa, penepo imwe mumbakomerwa." 
Jeremiah11:16 “Kalene ine MBUYA ndidakuchemerani muti waolivi, ule ukhali na nsapo zakubalika pyakwanga. Kwache na uviya-viya wa chonzi, iye anaigasa moto, tenepo nthambi zache zinamala pyerera." 
Jeremiah11:17 “MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene adakubzalani ule, aikha muliri pana imwe, thangwi anthu a ku Yerusalemu na Yuda achita pinthu pyakuipa mbandizhangalisa pakufukiza pyakununkhira kuna milungu Baala.”" 
Jeremiah11:18 MBUYA adandicheuza papinthu pyakuipa pikhasasanya anyamalwanga kupichita kuna ine pile. 
Jeremiah11:19 Ine ndikhali ninga bira wakufulika kwenda kachekwa; ine sidadziwe na chinthu chene tayu pya pinthu pidasasanya iwo kupichita kuna ine. Iwo akhalonga mbati, “Tendeni tivunge muti na nsapo zache zene; tendeni timgwande kumbulusa m'dziko ya anyamoyo, towera dzinache ileke dzakumbukwave.”" 
Jeremiah11:20 Mbwenye MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, mtongi wachilungamo, ule ambayesa mtima na manyerezero, mbandikuoneni mukubwezera anthu enewa thangwi m'manja mwanu, ine ndatula pyonsene." 
Jeremiah11:21 Natenepo MBUYA alonga tenepa pya anthu a ku Anatoti, ale akusaka-saka moyo wanga mbati, “Ife tinati tikuphe ngakhala unathimiza kulonga mphangwa zakubulukira kuna MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah11:22 Natenepo MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga kuti, “Ine ndinati ndiatchunyuse! Aphale awo anafa pankhondo, anawo achimuna na achikazi ene anafa thangwi ya njala." 
Jeremiah11:23 Pakati pawo nkhabe dzasalave munthu na mbodzi ene na moyo tayu, thangwi ine ndinadzesa muliri pana anthu a ku Anatoti ndzidzi unafuna ine dzaatchunyusa ule.”" 
Jeremiah12:1 Ndzidzi onsene ndimwe nyakulungama, MBUYA, ndzidzi unadza ine na mseru wanga kuna imwe. Kwache ine ndikufuna kukuvunzani pya chilungamo chanu. Thangwi yache ninji anyakudawika pinthu pyawo pimbaafambira mwadidi? Ninji anyakukhonda khulupirika ambakhala pamtendere?" 
Jeremiah12:2 Nyakuabzalache ndimwepo, tenepo iwo amera mitsitsi; iwo ambakula mbabala nsapo. Dzinanu nkhabe buluka m'kanwa mwawo tayu, kwache mitimawo ili kutaliletu na imwepo." 
Jeremiah12:3 Kwache MBUYA, imwe mumbandidziwa, pimbachita ine, imwe mumbapiona mbamudziwa manyerezero anga. Ambulutheni ninga bira wakwenda kaphiwa! Aikheni pakhundu kudikhira nsiku yakuphiwa kwawo!" 
Jeremiah12:4 Ayi dziko inauma mpakana lini, pontho maudzu anaunyala m'minda mpakana lini? Na thangwi ya kudawika kwa anthu a mwenemo, nyama na mbalame pyamala kufamo. Kuthimiza penepo anthu akulonga kuti, “MBUYA nkhabe kuona tayu pinthu pimbachita ifepi.”" 
Jeremiah12:5 MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Yeremia, ngakhala iwe watopa kuchita bitcha-bitcha yakuthamanga na anthu, apo unakwanisa tani kubitchana na akavalo? Ngakhala iwe unagwegweduka pakuchena, apo unakwanisa tani kufamba mumsitu m'khundu-khundu mwa mkulo wa Yorodani?" 
Jeremiah12:6 Abale ako, anthu a kubanja kwako maka akusandukira; iwo averana pyakukuchita pyakuipa. Leka kuanyindira, podi kwene kuti iwo ambalonga mafala aushamwali.”" 
Jeremiah12:7 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Anthu anga, ine ndaapasa nkhodolo, ine ndaakhonda anthu anga; ndinapereka m'manja mwa anyamalwanga anthu ambafuna ine ale." 
Jeremiah12:8 Anthu anga ene asanduka kuna ine ninga nkhalamu mumsitu. Iwo akundikhumbza; natenepo ine ndikuazonda. 
Jeremiah12:9 Anthu anga akhala ninga mbalame yakuumbikirwa kukhundu zonsene na anyakasenera. Ndoko kachemere nyama zinango zam'tsanga zidye phwando. 
Jeremiah12:10 Akadamu azinji anavunga mundanga wamfesa mbapondedza-pondedza mundanga; mundanga wa mataka akubalisa pinthu iwo anausandusa thando yatchetcha. 
Jeremiah12:11 Tenepo unasanduka mbuto yokhonda balisa pinthu, yakulira kuna ine. Dziko yonsene yasanduka thando yatchetcha, pontho nkhabe na mbodzi ene akupitsalakana tayu." 
Jeremiah12:12 Kubulukira kumapiri onsene akupupwa m'thando yatchetcha anyakuvunga adza. Ine ndatumiza anyankhondo kavunga dziko yonsene; nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene anakwanisa dzakhala pakupata tayu. 
Jeremiah12:13 Iwo anabzala tirigu, kwache iwo anavuna ntcheswa; iwo anapitopesa okha ene mbakhonda ganyali napyo. Na thangwi ya ukali wakugoswa wa MBUYA iwo achita manyadzo na pyakuvuna pyawo.”" 
Jeremiah12:14 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Kulonga pya atsanthembanga akudawika ale adapokosera dziko idapasa ine anthu anga, Aisraele, ndinati ndiadule m'dziko mwawo ninga mbewu, pontho ndinapulumusa anthu a ku Yuda m'manja mwawo." 
Jeremiah12:15 Kwache ndingamala kuabulusamo, ndinaavera nsisi mbandibwezera kada munthu pinthu pyache pontho kudziko kwache." 
Jeremiah12:16 Ngakhala iwo anatewera na mtimawo onsene chipembedzo cha anthu anga, pontho mbadumbira na dzina ya MBUYA wamoyo, ninga mudachitira iwo kale kufunzisa ananga kudumbira na dzina ya milungu Baala, penepo iwo anakhazikiswa pakati pa anthu anga." 
Jeremiah12:17 Mbwenye ngakhala dzinza inango pyayo hinandivera tayu, penepo ndinaidula mbandiivunga monsene mwene. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah13:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Ndoko kagule kapundu wakuchena mbuvale, kwache mbaleke khuya madzi.”" 
Jeremiah13:2 Natenepo ine ndidagula kapunduyo mbandimvala ninga montho mudandipangira MBUYA. 
Jeremiah13:3 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga pontho kuna ine mbati," 
Jeremiah13:4 “Kwata kapundu agula iwe pontho avala iweyo mbuende chinchino pano ku Yufurate mbukambise kuchingolokodyo kwa mwala.” 
Jeremiah13:5 Natenepo ine ndidenda kambisa ku Yufurate ninga montho mukhadandipangira MBUYA. 
Jeremiah13:6 Pidagwanda nsiku zizinji zene, MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Ndoko chinchino pano ku Yufurate mbukakwate kapundu adakupanga ine kuti ukambise kweneko ule.”" 
Jeremiah13:7 Tenepo ine ndidenda ku Yufurate mbandikakumba kubulusa kapundu pambuto pakhadambisa ine pale, kwache ndzidzi wenewu ndidamgumana amala nyenyenwa pontho wakusowa basa monsene mwene." 
Jeremiah13:8 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga pontho kuna ine mbati," 
Jeremiah13:9 “Umu ndi mule munafuna ine dzavunga anthu akutumbama a ku Yuda na anyakunyada pikulu a ku Yerusalemu. 
Jeremiah13:10 Anthu akudawika ale akhonda kundivera, ale ateweza pinthu pimbafuna mtimawo wakuuma mbatumikira na kupembedza milungu inango, anakhala ninga kapundu weneyu, wakusowa basa monsene mwene!" 
Jeremiah13:11 Ninga mumbapipyangirira munthu kapundu, sasawambo ndapipyangirira anthu onsene a ku Yuda na Yerusalemu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA. Ine ndachita tenepo, towera iwo akhale anthu anga pontho mbakuza na kulemedza dzinanga. Kwache iwo hadandivesere tayu basi.”" 
Jeremiah13:12 MBUYA Mulungu adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Yeremia, panga anthu a ku Israele kuti mabudu onsene anthembe athema kudzazwa na vinyu. Tenepo ngakhala iwo analonga kuna iwe kuti, ‘Kani ife nkhabe dziwa kuti mabudu anthembe athema kudzazwa vinyu?’" 
Jeremiah13:13 Penepo kaapange kuti, ‘MBUYA alonga tenepa: Ine ndinati ndiledzerese anthu onsene ambakhala m'dziko yeneyi, kuthimizapo mafumu, ale mphidzukulu pya Davite, anyansembe, maprofeti, pontho na onsene ale ambakhala mu Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah13:14 Ine ndinaamenyanisa unango na mwanzache, makolo na anawo chibodzi-bodzi. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA. Ine nkhabe dzava nsisi penu kuakomera mtima penu kuva nawo nyambalo tayu ndingaavunga.’ ”" 
Jeremiah13:15 Veserani pontho fungulani makutu, lekani kutumbama, thangwi alonga ndi MBUYA." 
Jeremiah13:16 Mpaseni demelero MBUYA Mulungu wanu iye mbadzati gwisa mdima, mwenemo manyalo anu mbadzati gwegweduka pamapiri m'chidodo, mwenemo iye mbadzati sanduza cheza chinadikhira imwechi kukhala mdima wakugoswa." 
Jeremiah13:17 Mbwenye ngakhala imwe munakhonda vesera, ine ndinati ndilire chibwalo-bwalo, thangwi ya kudungudza kunachita imweko; maso anga analira pikulu, kukuka misozi thangwi mkumbi wa Mbuya unaphatwa kwenda kudziko ya unyaperezo." 
Jeremiah13:18 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Longa kuna mfumu na kuna matsano ene kuti, ‘Pitchithiseni mwekha ene pampando wachifumu, thangwi pipewu pyanu pyachifumu pinagwa kubulukira m'misolo mwanu.’" 
Jeremiah13:19 Mizinda ya kuthando yatchetcha ya Negebu yamala fungwa mwakuti nkhabe na mbodzi ene anakwanisa kuifungula tayu. Anthu onsene a ku Yuda anaendeswa kudziko ya unyaperezo, onsenene ene anamala kwatwa." 
Jeremiah13:20 Imwe anthu a mu Yerusalemu, chitani maso kwize mbamuone anyakudza kubulukira kumpoto ale. Ali kupi anthu adaikhwa m'manja mwanu ale, anthu ambanyadira imwe ale?" 
Jeremiah13:21 Munalonga tani anthu akhayesa imwe kuti mbashamwali anu ale angakukundani mbakutongani? Imwe munava kupha pyakwanga ninga mkazi wamimba pakubala. 
Jeremiah13:22 Tenepo ngakhala imwe munavunza mwekha ene kuti, ‘Penepi pyachitika tani kuna ife? Thangwi yache ninji nguwo zathu zamala ng'ambika pontho ninji taphatirirwa?’ Ndi thangwi ya kuinjipa kwachita pyakudawa pyanu."
