Jeremiah13:23 Ayi pingakwanisike munthu wa ku Etiopia kusanduza khandache, penu nyalugwe kubulusa mathotho-mathotho ache? Na kutani kwene imwe ale kudya kwanu nkhuchita pyakuipa nkhabe kwanisa kuchita pyadidi tayu." 
Jeremiah13:24 Ine ndinakubalalisani ninga dzungu kumbuluswa na mphepo ya kuthando. 
Jeremiah13:25 Penepi ndiye pyathema imwe kutambira thangwi ya kupandukira kwanu, pontho na thangwi yakuti imwe mwandiduwaliratu mbamunyindira milungu yapezi. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah13:26 Tenepo ine ene ndinakunjula nguwo zanu kuti muoneke pezi. 
Jeremiah13:27 Ndaona makhaliro anu akunyansa, kulira kwanu ninga akavalo kufuna kubebesa, pontho uputanu wakusowa nawo manyadzo pimbachita imwe pamapiri na m'minda pile. Dzedze kuna iwe Yerusalemu! Ayi unakhala wakunyansa mpakana lini?”" 
Jeremiah14:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine, Yeremia, pya njala kuti:" 
Jeremiah14:2 “Yuda akusintili, mizindache ikusanyika pikulu; iwo apigwisa pansi kusintili, Chiliro chikuveka kubulukira ku Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah14:3 Anyamfuma akutuma anyabasawo katunga madzi; iwo akutsalakatika kwenda kumichera kwache nkhabe gumanako madzi tayu. Iwo akubwerera uku pitomba pyawo pili kakata. Akutaya mtima pontho akusanyika mumtima, amala mpsampsira nkhope zawo." 
Jeremiah14:4 Mataka amala didimuka thangwi ya kusowa kwa mvula m'dzikomo; anyakulima amala taya mtima mbampsampsira nkhope zawo. 
Jeremiah14:5 Podi na mbala zene m'minda zikumenya butsu anawo abala iwo kwene, thangwi ya kusowa kwa maudzu." 
Jeremiah14:6 Mabulu am'tsanga ali njonjolokoto pamapiri akupupwa mbapuma puwe-puwe ninga mwanambwa; na thangwi ya kusowa mpovu, maso awo achita chidima.”" 
Jeremiah14:7 Anthu anga akulira kuti, “Podi kwene kuti pyakudawa pyathu pitipokanye, MBUYA tipulumuseni kuti dzinanu ileke lulupiswa. Kazinji kene ife tabauka kubuluka kuna imwe; ife takudawirani pikulu pene." 
Jeremiah14:8 Chidikhiro cha Israele ndimwe ene basi; dombo wache pandzidzi wa nyatwa, mwatani munakhala ninga mlendo m'dziko mwathu muno; ninga nyakugwanda pyache wakufuna kwene kugona mosiku ubodzi basi?" 
Jeremiah14:9 Mwatani munakhala ninga munthu wakuchita kututumuswa, ninga nyankhondo wakusowa mphamvu zakupulumusa nazo? Kwache imwe mumbakhala pakati pathu MBUYA, pontho ife tathukula dzinanu, tenepo lekani kutikhonda!”" 
Jeremiah14:10 MBUYA akulonga tenepa pya anthu enewa: “Anthu enewa ambakomerwadi kwene na kunzenza, iwo nkhabe pumisa manyalo awo tayu. Tenepo ine MBUYA nkhabe komerwa nawove tayu; chinchino ine ndinati ndiyang'ane kudawika kwawo mbandiatchunyusa thangwi ya pyakudawa pyawo.”" 
Jeremiah14:11 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Leka pemphera kuti anthu enewa pinthu pyawo piafambire mwadidi." 
Jeremiah14:12 Podi kwene kuti ambapimana kudya, ine nkhabe dzavesera kulira kwawoko tayu; podi kwene kuti ambapereka nsembe zakupyerera na pyakupereka pinango, ine nkhabe dzapitambira tayu. M'mbuto mwache ndinaapuluza na nkhondo, njala pontho muliri.”" 
Jeremiah14:13 Mbwenye ine ndidatawira kuti, “Waa! MBUYA Mulungu, maprofeti ambalonga kuna anthu kuti, ‘Imwe nkhabe dzaona nkhondo penu dzabonera na njala tayu, thangwi MBUYA adadumbira kuti anakupasani mtendere m'dziko mwanumo kwenda na kwenda.’ ”" 
Jeremiah14:14 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Maprofeti akulonga mphangwa zakunama pakuphatisa basa dzinanga. Ine sidaatume penu kuasankhula penu kulonga kuna iwo tayu. Iwo akulonga kuna imwe masomphenya akunama; kuombedza kwawo nkhwapezi-pezi, pontho pimbalonga iwo mphya mumsolo mwawo." 
Jeremiah14:15 Natenepo ine MBUYA ndikulonga tenepa pya maprofeti akunama ambaphatisa basa dzinanga ale: Ine sidachite kuatuma tayu, kwache iwo akulonga kuti, ‘Nkhabe nkhondo penu njala pinafuna dzaoneka m'dziko muno tayu.’ Maprofeti onthowa anafa pankhondo pontho na njala." 
Jeremiah14:16 Pontho anthu anapanga iwo mphangwa zakunamazi anafambo pankhondo pontho na njala mbaponywa m'misewu ya Yerusalemu. Panakhala nkhabe na mbodzi ene wakuaikha m'masiye, nee akazawo, nee amunawo penu anawo achikazi tayu. Ine ndinadzesa pana iwo nyatwa zathema iwo kuzitambira zile." 
Jeremiah14:17 “Mafala awa ndiye athema iwe kalonga kuna iwo: Maso anga mbakuke mikulo ya misozi mosiku na masikati onsene; kulirira mwananga wamwali, anthu anga; iwo akuwazwa pikulu pene na shoko yakupha." 
Jeremiah14:18 Ngakhala ine ndinaenda m'dzikomo ndimbaona anthu adachekwa na talasada ale; ngakhala ine ndinaenda mumzindamo, ndimbaona anyakusanyika thangwi ya njala. Onsene, maprofeti na anyansembe ene, ambaphata basawo m'dzikomo, kwache nkhabe dziwa pinachita iwo tayu.”" 
Jeremiah14:19 MBUYA, ayi imwe mwachita kumpasiratu nkhodolo Yuda naye dee? Ayi Zioni mwanyansirwa naye? Thangwi yache ninji mwatisanyisa tenepa, towera tichimwane na kuwangiswa kwene? Ife maso akhali kunjira kudikhira mtendere, kwache nkhabe chadidi chaona ife tayu; ife tikhadikhira kuwangiswa, kwache pyadza m'mbuto mwache mphyakugoswa." 
Jeremiah14:20 MBUYA, ife tatawira kukudawirani kwathu, pontho kudawa kudachita makolo athu. Ndimomwene ife takudawirani." 
Jeremiah14:21 Na thangwi ya dzinanu lekani kutilulupisa; lekani chitisa manyadzo mpando wanu wademelero. Kumbukani chiverano chidasasanya imwe na ife chile, pontho lekani kuchiswa." 
Jeremiah14:22 Ayi milungu yakusowa basa pyayo ya madzinzayi nkhukwanisambo kuvumbisa mvula? Ayi thambo payokha ene nkhukwanisa kugwisa mafazi? Nkhabe, ndimwe ene basi, MBUYA Mulungu wathu, ule ambachita penepi. Natenepo chidikhiro chathu chili muna imwe ene basi, thangwi ndimwe adasasanya pinthu pyonsene." 
Jeremiah15:1 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Podi kwene Mose, penu Samuele mbadaimira pamaso panga kundidembetera thangwi ya anthu enewa, ine nee mbidaavera nsisi tayu basi. Abuluse pamaso panga. Agwinye aende pyawo." 
Jeremiah15:2 Iwo angakuvunza kuti nkhupi kwathema iwo kwenda, apange kuti ine MBUYA ndalonga kuti: Anango athema kufa na utenda, kweneko ndiye kunafuna iwo kwenda! Anango athema kufa pankhondo, kweneko ndiye kunafuna iwo kwenda! Anango athema kufa thangwi ya njala yakugoswa, kweneko ndiye kunafuna iwo kwenda! Anango athema dzaphatwa unyaperezo, kweneko ndiye kunafuna iwo kwenda!" 
Jeremiah15:3 “Ine MBUYA ndanyerezera kuti nyatwa zakugoswa zinayizi zigwe pana iwo; iwo anaphiwa pankhondo; mitembo yawo inambuluthwa na anambwa; mbalame pontho nyama zam'tsanga zinadya na kuvunga mitembo yawo. 
Jeremiah15:4 Ine ndinaasandusa chinthu chakugumisa manungo kuna anthu onsene a padziko yapansi, thangwi ya pinthu pidachita Manase mwana Hezekia mu Yerusalemu pikhali iye mfumu wa Yuda.”" 
Jeremiah15:5 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Mbani anafuna kukuverani nsisi, imwe anthu a ku Yerusalemu? Anafuna kukuliraniyo mbani? Mbani anafuna dzapambuka kuvunza kuti imwe muli tani?" 
Jeremiah15:6 Imwe mwandikhonda mbamubwerera m'nduli ndzidzi onsene. Natenepo ine ndidafuthula mkono wanga kukuvungani; ine ndatopa na kukuverani nsisi. 
Jeremiah15:7 Ine ndinati ndiapepete na chisero pamsuwo wa mzinda onsene m'dzikomo. Ine ndinati ndivunge anthu anga, mbandipha anawo, thangwi iwo hadasanduze makhaliro awo tayu." 
Jeremiah15:8 Ndinachitisa amamfelwa kuinjipa pyakwanga kupiringana tchetcha ya pagombe ya bara. Dzuwa ili ngerengende, ndinadzesa chakuvunga kuna amawo a aphale; mwakututumusa ndinadzesa pana iwo kusanyika pontho mantha." 
Jeremiah15:9 Mama ule adabala ana anomwe akomoka mbaferatu. Cheza kuna ine chasanduka chidima; iye achitiswa manyadzo pontho asanyiswa mtima. Anyakusalira na moyo ndinati ndiaphe na talasada pamaso pa anyamalwawo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.” 
Jeremiah15:10 Dzedze kuna ine! Mama, mudandibaliranji, ine munthu ule dziko yonsene ikuthimbana pontho kupokanyisana naye? Ine sidafiyalise penu kufiyali cha munthu tayu, kwache munthu onsene akunditemberera." 
Jeremiah15:11 MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Ine ndinati ndikupulumuse kuti uchite basa yadidi; ndinati ndichitise anyamalwako kukudembetera pandzidzi wa nyatwa, pontho na pandzidzi wako wakusanyika." 
Jeremiah15:12 Ayi munthu ene pyache anakwanisa kuswa simbi, simbi yakubulukira kumpoto, penu nkuwa?" 
Jeremiah15:13 “Ufumi wanu na pinthu pyanu pyonsene ndinati ndipipereke kuna anango mwakukhonda kupagalwi, thangwi ya kudawa kwanu konsene kwachita imwe m'dziko mwanu monsene." 
Jeremiah15:14 Ndinakuchitisani kukhala mabitchu a anyamalwanu m'dziko inakhonda imwe dziwa, thangwi ukali wanga unagaka ninga moto kwenda na kwenda.”" 
Jeremiah15:15 Tenepo ine ndidalonga kuti, “MBUYA imwe mukudziwa; ndikumbukeni ine mbamundiyang'anire mwadidi. Bwezerani anyakundisanyisa pontho pirirani nane, pontho lekani tawirisa kuti abuluse moyo wanga; nyerezerani mule mudalulupisirwa ine thangwi ya dzinanu." 
Jeremiah15:16 Ndzidzi udalonga imwe, ine ndidakuveserani, mafalanu adachitisa mtimanga kusekera na kukomerwa monsene mwene; thangwi ine ndathukula dzinanu, MBUYA Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Jeremiah15:17 Ine sidakhale gulu ibodzi ene na anyatsenzo; ine sidakomerwe nawo pabodzi pene tayu. Ine ndidakhala pyanga theliyee ndekha ene thangwi mkono wanu ukhali pana ine, mbamundidzaza na kuzhangali kwanu." 
Jeremiah15:18 Thangwi yache ninji ndithimize kuva kupha tenepa? Thangwi yache ninji pironda nkhabe pola tayu? Ayi imwe munafuna pyakunditayisa mtima ninga mkulo wakuuma ndzidzi wa malimwe?” 
Jeremiah15:19 Natenepo MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Ngakhala iwe unazungunukira kuna ine, ine ndinati ndikutambire, tenepo unakhala pontho nyabasanga. Ngakhala iwe unalalika mafala akulungama nee akupupwa tayu, iwe unakhala pontho mprofeti wanga. Anthu enewa ndiye athema kudza kuna iwe, kwache iwe hudatheme kwenda kuna iwo tayu." 
Jeremiah15:20 Ine ndinakuchitisa kukhala mpanda kuna anthu enewa, mpanda wamphamvu wankuwa; iwo anamenyana nawe, kwache iwo nkhabe dzakukunda tayu, thangwi ine ndili nawe kukuombola pontho kukupulumusa. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah15:21 Ndinati ndikupulumuse m'manja mwa anyakudawika pontho ndinati ndikuombole m'manja mwa anyakukala mtima.” 
Jeremiah16:1 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Jeremiah16:2 “Iwe hudatheme kusemba na kubala ana achimuna na achikazi kumbuto yeneyi tayu. 
Jeremiah16:3 Thangwi MBUYA akulonga pya pinthu pinafuna dzachitika kuna ana achimuna na achikazi akubalwa m'mbuto yeneyi pontho kuna akazi ale mbamama pontho kuna amuna ale mbababa a ana enewa tenepa: 
Jeremiah16:4 Iwo anati afe na utenda wakugoswa mbapasowa munthu na mbodzi ene wakuasintili penu kuikha m'masiye mitembo yawo. Mitembo yawo inakhala ninga milu ya pinthu pyakutayiwa pakhuku. Iwo anafa pankhondo penu na njala, tenepo mbalame na nyama zam'tsanga pinadya mitembo yawo.”" 
Jeremiah16:5 MBUYA akulonga tenepa: “Iwe hudatheme kupita m'nyumba mule muna maliro tayu; leka kwendako kasintili penu kuonesa kutsukwala. Thangwi ine nkhabe dzatsanzayisa anthu anga na mtendere, penu kuafuna kokhonda mala na kuakomera mtima tayu." 
Jeremiah16:6 Anyakufuma na anyakutcherenga ene anafa m'dziko yeneyi, kwache panakhala nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene wakuasintili penu wakuikha m'masiye mitembo yawo tayu. Nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene anapicheka-cheka, penu kuchinga tsisi kuonesa kusintili tayu." 
Jeremiah16:7 Nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene anafuna dzaapasa kudya penu chakumwa kuathondoza anyakusintili ale tayu. Nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene anava nsisi tayu, nee kuvera nsisi munthu ule ataya babache penu mache tayu." 
Jeremiah16:8 “Leka pita m'nyumba mule anthu akuchita phwando, penu kukhala pansi kudya na kumwa." 
Jeremiah16:9 Thangwi MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, Mulungu wa Israele akulonga kuti: Ine ndinamatamisa mkhuwo wakukomerwa na kusekera pontho na mkhuwo wakukomerwa kwa anyakukazhali m'mbuto yeneyi. Iwe unati uone na maso ako penepi pikuchitika." 
Jeremiah16:10 “Ungamala kuapanga anthu enewa pinthu pyonsenepi, mbakuvunza kuti, ‘Thangwi yache ninji MBUYA adanyerezera kutitchunyusa mwavinga tenepa? Mseru wache ngwanji wasosa ife? Ayi MBUYA Mulungu wathu tamdawiranji?’" 
Jeremiah16:11 Penepo kaapange kuti: MBUYA alonga kuti, ‘Ndi thangwi yakuti makolo anu adandikhonda mbapembedza na kutumikira milungu yachilendo. Iwo adandikhonda mbakhonda kuvera matongero anga." 
Jeremiah16:12 Kwache imwe ndiye mwanyanya kuipa kupiringana makolo anu. Monsenene ndimwe akuuma mtima pontho akuipa; imwe nkhabe kundivera tayu. 
Jeremiah16:13 Natenepo ine ndinakubulusani m'dziko yeneyi mbandikuendesani kudziko ile chipo nee imwe penu makolo anu adzati kuidziwa tayu. Kweneko imwe munatumikira milungu inango mosiku na masikati, pontho ine nkhabe dzakuverani nsisi tayu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah16:14 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ndzidzi ukudza unafuna anthu khonda dzalonga pontho kuti, ‘Ndikudumbira na dzina ya MBUYA wamoyo, ule adabulusa Aisraele m'dziko ya Iguputo.’" 
Jeremiah16:15 M'mbuto mwache iwo analonga kuti, ‘Ndikudumbira na dzina ya MBUYA wamoyo, ule adabulusa Aisraele m'dziko yakumpoto, pontho pakati pa madziko kudaabalalisira iye kule.’ Ine ndinati ndiabwezere pontho kudziko kwawo, dziko idapasa ine makolo awo ile.”" 
Jeremiah16:16 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ine ndikutumiza amisiri a nsomba azinji ene kudza dzaphata anthu enewa. Kubuluka penepo ndinatumiza anyakukhulisa azinji ene dzaakhulisa m'mapiri monsene, m'pitunda pontho na kupingolokodyo kwene kwa miyala." 
Jeremiah16:17 Ine ndimbaona pyonsene pimbachita iwo. Ipyo pili pakwecha kuna ine; pyakudawa pyawo nkhabe bisika pamaso panga tayu. 
Jeremiah16:18 Ine ndinaachitisa kupagali kawiri thangwi ya pyakudawa na pyakuipa pyawo, thangwi iwo aswipisa dziko yanga na mifanikizo yakusowa moyo ninga mtembo ile, pontho amala kuidzaza na milungu yakunyansa.”" 
Jeremiah16:19 MBUYA, imwe ndimwe mphamvu zanga pontho mpandanga wamphamvu, pakubisala panga pandzidzi wa nyatwa, kuna imwe madzinza akumadolomero a dziko anati adze mbalonga mbati, “Makolo athu chikhali na iwo chene ndi milungu yapezi, mifanikizo yakusowa basa, ile hidaachitire na chinthu chene chadidi tayu.”" 
Jeremiah16:20 Ayi anthu angapisasanyire okha ene milungu? Ande, kwache iyo ndi mifanikizo ene pyayo." 
Jeremiah16:21 Natenepo ine ndinati ndiafunzise, kano ndinati ndiadziwise mphamvu na mboko zanga. Penepo iwo anati adziwe kuti dzinanga ndi MBUYA." 
Jeremiah17:1 Pyakudawa pya anthu a ku Yuda pyachita kulembwa pamwala na chakulembera chasimbi; ipyo pyachitwa kulembwa mumtima mwawo na mwala wakusongoka, pontho mbuchita kugobwa m'makhundu a maguwawo ansembe." 
Jeremiah17:2 Podi na anawo ene ambapembedza pamaguwa ansembe, pontho na adzimunthu a milungu Ashera pansi pa miti yakuvata na pansonga ya pitunda" 
Jeremiah17:3 pontho pamapiri m'dzikomo. Ndinachitisa anyamalwanu kukwata mfumanu na pinthu pyanu pyonsene, thangwi ya pyakudawa pyachita imwe m'dziko monsenemu." 
Jeremiah17:4 Na thangwi ya kudawa kwachita imwe, imwe munati mutaye mfumanu yonsene idakupasani ine ile. Ndinachitisa anyamalwanu dzakuphatani ninga mabitchu kwenda namwe kudziko inakhonda imwe dziwa, thangwi imwe mwagasa ukali wanga ninga moto tenepo unagaka kwenda na kwenda." 
Jeremiah17:5 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Dzedze kuna nyakunyindira munthu mnzache, munthu ule mphamvu zache zili muna munthu mnzache, pontho munthu ule abauka kubuluka kuna MBUYA." 
Jeremiah17:6 Iye anakhala ninga thenthere m'thando yatchetcha; iye nkhabe dzaona pinthu pyache kumfambira mwadidi tayu. Iye anakhala m'mbuto yakusowa madzi m'thando yatchetcha, m'mataka amunyu, kule nkhabe khala munthu na mbodzi ene tayu." 
Jeremiah17:7 “Mbwenye nyakutsanzaya ngule ambanyindira MBUYA, ule kunyindira kwache konsene kuli muna MBUYA." 
Jeremiah17:8 Iye anakhala ninga muti wakumera m'khundu-khundu mwa madzi, ule umbafikisa mitsitsi yache mumkulo. Mutiwo nkhabe gopa kupisa kwa dzuwa tayu; ndzidzi onsene masambache ngabithi-bithi. Iwo nkhabe swipa mtima tayu na chaka chakusowa mvula, pontho iwo nkhabe chimwana kubala nsapo tayu.”" 
Jeremiah17:9 “Papyonsene mtima ndiye wakunyenga; iwo nkhabe kwanisa kuwangisika tayu. Mbani anakwanisa kuuvesa mtima wa munthu? 
Jeremiah17:10 Ine MBUYA ndimbasakanyula mtima wa munthu mbandiyesa manyerezero ache, kuti ndimfupe malingana na makhaliro ache pontho malingana na mabasache.”" 
Jeremiah17:11 Ninga mbalame yakukhalira mazayi ale si ache tayu, ndi sasawa na munthu wakugumana kobiri m'njira zaufaka-faka, Iye anati ataye mfumache yonsene pandzidzi wa uphaleache, pakumalisira pache mbasanduka pupwe." 
Jeremiah17:12 Nyumba ya Mulungu yakhala ninga mpando wachifumu wademelero, wakukhala pansongalonga paphiri kubulukira pakutomaletu." 
Jeremiah17:13 MBUYA, chidikhiro cha Israele, anyakukukhondani onsene anachitiswa manyadzo. Anyakubauka kubuluka kuna imwe anafudzwa ninga madzina akulembwa pamataka, thangwi iwo akhonda MBUYA, mphuno ya madzi amoyo." 
Jeremiah17:14 Ndiwangiseni MBUYA, tenepo ine ndinati ndiwangedi; ndipulumuseni, ine ndinati ndipulumukedi, thangwi ndimwe ene basi ambakuza ine ule." 
Jeremiah17:15 Anthu ambalonga basi kuna ine kuti, “Pinthu pidatithuswa MBUYA pile pili kupi? Mbapikwane-kwanetu mphapo!”" 
Jeremiah17:16 Ine sidathawe tayu kukhala makabuswa; imwe mukudziwa kuti ine sidafune na pang'ono pene tayu nsiku yakusanyikayi, imwe mumbadziwa pyonsene pimbabuluka pamulomo pangapa." 
Jeremiah17:17 Lekani khala ninga chakugoswa kuna ine; imwe ndimwe pakubisala panga ndzidzi wanga wa nyatwa. 
Jeremiah17:18 Anyakundiboneresa mbachite manyadzo, mbwenye ine lekani kundichitisa manyadzo; iwo mbachite mantha, mbwenye ine lekani tawirisa kuti ndichite mantha. Dzesani nyatwa pana iwo mbamuavunge monsene mwene." 
Jeremiah17:19 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Yeremia ndoko ukalalike mphangwa kuna anthu kumsuwo wa mzinda pale pambapita na kubuluka na mafumu a Yuda. Kubuluka penepo ukaimire pontho pamisuwo inango yonsene ya mzinda wa Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah17:20 Ndoko ukalonge kuti, ‘Veserani mafala a MBUYA, imwe mafumu a Yuda pontho na anthu onsene a ku Yuda na onsene ale ambakhala mu Yerusalemu, ale ambapita na kubuluka na pamisuwo yeneyi." 
Jeremiah17:21 MBUYA akulonga tenepa: Chitani mphole-mphole kuti muleke thukula na mtolo ene pa Nsiku Yakupuma, penu kupita na kubuluka nawo pamisuwo ya Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah17:22 Lekani thukula mtolo kubuluka nawo m'nyumba mwanu penu kuphata na basa ene pa Nsiku Yakupuma, mbwenye nsikuyi ikhale yakupambulika kuna imwe ninga montho mudatongera ine makolo anu." 
Jeremiah17:23 Kwache iwo hadandivesere, penu kuikha konta pikhalonga ine pile tayu; iwo akhali akuuma mtima mbakhonda funa kundivesera penu kusumululwa." 
Jeremiah17:24 Mbwenye ngakhala imwe munandivera mbamukhonda kuthukula na mtolo ene kupita na kubuluka nawo pamisuwo ya mzindawu pa Nsiku Yakupuma, pontho Nsikuyi mbikhala yakupambulika kuna imwe pakukhonda phata na basa ene pansikuyi," 
Jeremiah17:25 penepo mafumu ale anakhala pampando wachifumu wa Davite anabwera na pamisuwo ya mzinda wenewu pabodzi pene na mathubu awo. Iwo na mathubu awo anabwera uku apakira pingolo, pa akavalo, pabodzi pene na amuna a ku Yuda na ale ambakhala mu Yerusalemu; ndzidzi onsene nkhabe dzasowa anthu akukhalamo tayu." 
Jeremiah17:26 Anthu anabwera kubulukira kumaluwani a Yuda na kumidzi yakuzungulira Yerusalemu, kunthemba ya Benjemani na m'tchinde mwa mapiri kumadokero dzuwa, kubulukira kudziko ya mapiri na kuthando yatchetcha ya Negebu kudza ku Nyumba ya Mulungu na pyakupereka pyakupyerera, nsembe zakupyerera, nsembe za mapira, pyakufukiza pyakununkhira, pontho na nsembe zakupereka nazo takhuta ku Nyumba ya MBUYA." 
Jeremiah17:27 Mbwenye ngakhala imwe munakhonda kundivera pakukhonda chitisa Nsiku Yakupuma kukhala yakupambulika pontho nee thukula tayu na mtolo ene kupita na kubuluka nawo pamisuwo ya Yerusalemu pa Nsiku yeneyi, penepo ine ndinagasa moto okhonda thima m'misuwo ya Yerusalemu, ule unafuna dzapisa nyumba zachifumu monsene mwene.’ ”" 
Jeremiah18:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine Yeremia mbati," 
Jeremiah18:2 “Tchithira kumusa kwa nyakuumba pyombo, kule kunafuna ine kakupanga mphangwa zanga.”" 
Jeremiah18:3 Natenepo ine ndidenda kumusa kwa nyakuumba pyombo mbandimgumana akuphata basa pachakuumbira chache. 
Jeremiah18:4 Kwache chitomba chikhaumba iye chile, dongo yache ikhalakatika m'manja mwache; tenepo iye akhachifudza mbaumba chinthu chinango chene ninga mudapifunira iye mwenechiroache." 
Jeremiah18:5 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Jeremiah18:6 “Ayi ine sina utongi tayu wakuchita pinafuna ine kuna imwe anthu a ku Israele ninga mwachitira nyakuumba pyomboyi? Imwe muli m'manja mwanga ninga mwachitira dongoyi kukhala m'manja mwa nyakuumba pyombo. 
Jeremiah18:7 Ngakhala pandzidzi unafuna inewo ndinalonga kuti ufumu penu dzinza wathema kubuluswa, kufudzwa penu kuvungwa," 
Jeremiah18:8 pontho ngakhala dzinza idacheuza ineyo inaleka pyakudawa pyawo, penepo ine ndinambombowesa ukali wanga mbandikhonda kuaonesa nyatwa ninga montho mukhadapinyerezera ine mule." 
Jeremiah18:9 Pontho ngakhala pandzidzi unango ndinalonga kuti dzinza penu ufumu wathema kumangwa penu kukhazikiswa," 
Jeremiah18:10 pontho ngakhala anthu anachita pyakuipa pamaso panga mbakhonda kundivera, penepo ine nkhabe dzaachitira udidi ninga montho mudachitira ine mule tayu." 
Jeremiah18:11 “Natenepo longa kuna anthu a ku Yuda na ale ambakhala mu Yerusalemu kuti MBUYA alonga tenepa: Yang'anani ine ndikusasanya pyakudzesa nyatwa pana imwe pontho ndikunyerezera pyakukutchunyusani. Tenepo lekani makhaliro anu akuipa pontho munthu onsene wa imwe mbasanduze makhaliro na mabasache akudawika ambaphata iye ale. 
Jeremiah18:12 “Kwache iwo anati alonge kuti, ‘Nkhabe, tatani kuti tichite tenepo? Ife tinathimiza na makhaliro athuwa mbatiteweza pyathu kuchita pyakuipa pinafuna mtimathu wakuumawu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah18:13 Natenepo MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Kavunze pakati pa madzinzawa: Chipo mbanimbo adatoma kuva chinthu ninga chenechi? Chinthu chakugumisa manungo chachita mwali weneyu Israele!" 
Jeremiah18:14 Ayi pamapiri a Lebanoni chipo padatomambo khala pakusowa madzi akuphatana thangwi ya kutonthola? Ayi madzi ache anonono akukuka kubulukira kumadziko akutali chipo adatomambo kupwa? 
Jeremiah18:15 Kwache anthu anga andiduwalira; iwo akufukiza pyakununkhira kuna milungu yakusowa basa, milungu idaagwegwedusa panjira pawo, pontho na m'njira zakaleletu zile. Iye adaachitisa kufamba na m'mikhondo, pontho na njira zokhonda fumbula." 
Jeremiah18:16 Dziko yawo inasanduka madembe, mbuto yakusekesa kwenda na kwenda. Anyakugwanda pyawo onsene na njira adakupusa msolo; iwo anati akupusedi misolo yawo kukusedegula." 
Jeremiah18:17 Ine ndinabalalisa anthu anga pamaso pa anyamalwa ninga fumbi yakumbuluka na mphepo kumabulukiro dzuwa. Ine ndinati ndiapase nkhodolo; ine nkhabe dzaaphedza tayu pandzidzi wawo wa nyatwa.” 
Jeremiah18:18 Anthu adalonga mbati, “Tendeni tisasanye pyakupha Yeremia. Ndzidzi onsene nkhabe dzasowambo anyansembe akutitonga pyakuchita tayu, anthu anzeru kutipanga mwambo, pontho maprofeti kutipanga mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu. Tenepo tendeni tigumane mathangwi akumsumira nawo, towera tileke ikha konta pinthu pinalonga iyepi.”" 
Jeremiah18:19 Natenepo ndidapemphera kuti, “Ngandivesereni MBUYA; veserani pinandilongera anyamalwangapi." 
Jeremiah18:20 Ayi pyadidi pyathema bwezerwa na pyakuipa? Kwache iwo andikumbira mulindi kuti ndigweremo. Kumbukani mudaimira ine mule pamaso panu mbandilonga m'mbuto mwawo, towera mumbombowese ukali wanu." 
Jeremiah18:21 Natenepo chitisani anawo kukulukutika na njala; aperekeni pyawo m'manja mwa anyankhondo. Akazawo mbakhale akusowa ana, pontho asanduke amamfelwa, amuna mbafe na muliri, pontho achiphale mbaphiwe pankhondo." 
Jeremiah18:22 Chiliro mbachiveke m'nyumba zawo ndzidzi unagwisa imwe chimpiningu pana iwo mwakututumusa, thangwi iwo akumba mulindi kuti ndigweremo pontho anditeyera msampha." 
Jeremiah18:23 Mbwenye, imwe mumbadziwa MBUYA pyonsene pinasasanya iwo kuchita kuna ine. Lekani lekerera upandu unafuna iwo chitawu penu kufudza pyakudawa pyawo. Achitiseni kubuluka pamaso panu; mbamuchite kuna iwo pinthu malingana na kuzhangali kwanu.”" 
Jeremiah19:1 MBUYA akulonga tenepa: “Ndoko kuna nyakuumba pyombo ukagule nyakatomba. Ndoko pabodzi pene na akulu-akulu anango a anthu na a anyansembe anango pang'ono," 
Jeremiah19:2 mbuende kuphedi ya Beni-Hinomu chifupi na msuwo wa Potishedi. Kweneko kalalike mafala anakupanga inewa 
Jeremiah19:3 mbukalonga kuti: Veserani mafala a MBUYA, imwe mafumu a Yuda na anthu a ku Yerusalemu. MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, Mulungu wa Israele, akulonga tenepa: Veserani! Ine ndinadzesa nyatwa m'mbuto yeneyi mwakuti zinachitisa mache khutu kulira." 
Jeremiah19:4 Thangwi iwo andikhonda mbachitisa mbutoyi kukhala yakupembedzera mifanikizo; iwo apereka nsembe zakupyerera kuna milungu inango yakuti chipo nee iwo penu makolo awo penu mafumu a Yuda nkhabe kupidziwa tayu, pontho iwo adzaza mbuto yeneyi na chiropa cha anyakukhonda dawa." 
Jeremiah19:5 Iwo amangira milungu Baala mbuto zakumpembedzerapo, towera apereke anawo nsembe zakupyerera kuna Baala, chinthu chakuti ine sidachitonge penu kuchilonga, penu kukhala nachombo kumtima tayu." 
Jeremiah19:6 Natenepo ndzidzi ukudza wakuti anthu nkhabe dzachemerave mbuto yeneyi Tofeti, penu phedi ya Beni-Hinomu tayu. M'mbuto mwache inachemerwa Phedi Yakuchekana." 
Jeremiah19:7 “Ine ndinadzudzumisa pinthu pyonsene pyasasanya anthu a ku Yuda na Yerusalemu kupichita pile. Ndinachitisa anyamalwawo anthu anasaka-saka moyo wawo ale kuapha pankhondo. Ndinachitisa mbalame kudya mitembo yawo pontho inakhala phoso kuna nyama zam'tsanga. 
Jeremiah19:8 Ine ndinasakaza mzinda wenewu mbusanduka chinthu chagumisa manungo mwakuti munthu onsene wakugwanda na penepo anatutumuka mbaseka, thangwi ya kuvungika kwache." 
Jeremiah19:9 Anyamalwa anauzungulira mzindawu mbayesa kupha anthu ache. Kuzungulirwa kweneku kunakhala kwakugoswa pyakwanga mwakuti anthu akukhala m'bwalo anadyana pyawo okhokha, podi na kudya anawo ene." 
Jeremiah19:10 “Penepo iswa chitombacho pamaso pa amuna akhadenda na iwe ale 
Jeremiah19:11 mbulonga kuna iwo kuti, ‘MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga tenepa: Ine ndinaswa anthu enewa na mzindawu ninga mwachitirambo nyakuumba pyomboyi kuswa nyakatomba ule nkhabe kwanisikave kuphatanizwa pontho tayu. Iwo anaikha anyakufa m'masiye mu Tofeti mpakana pasowe na mphondero ene." 
Jeremiah19:12 Penepi ndiye pinafuna ine dzachita m'dziko yeneyi na kuna anthu ambakhala mwenemo ale. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA. Ndinasandusa mzinda wenewu kukhala ninga Tofeti. 
Jeremiah19:13 Nyumba za mu Yerusalemu pontho na za mafumu a ku Yuda zinaswipiswa ninga mbuto yeneyi, Tofeti, nyumba zile pansoyi pache padafukizirwa pyakununkhira, pontho pale padaperekwa vinyu ninga nsembe kuna milungu inango.’ ”" 
Jeremiah19:14 Tenepo Yeremia adabwerera kubuluka ku Tofeti, kukhadamtuma MBUYA na mphangwa zauprofeti kule. Iye adenda mbakaimira muchintalo cha Nyumba ya Mulungu mbalonga kuna anthu mbati," 
Jeremiah19:15 “MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene Mulungu wa Israele akulonga kuti, ‘Veserani! Ine ndinadzesa nyatwa zidalonga ine zile, pana mzinda wenewu, pontho pana midzi yonsene yakuzungulira, thangwi iwo ngakuuma mtima pontho hadavesere mafalanga tayu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah20:1 Pidava nyansembe Pashuri mwana Imeri, thubu wamkulu wa ku Nyumba ya MBUYA, kuti Yeremia akhadalonga mphangwa zenezi zakubulukira kuna Mulungu," 
Jeremiah20:2 iye adatonga kuti mprofeti Yeremia amenywe mbamuikha pamatandadza pa Msuwo Wakumtunda wa Benjemani wa Nyumba ya Mulungu. 
Jeremiah20:3 Mangwana mwache na machibese pidamsudzula Pashuri pamatandadza, ine, Yeremia, ndidalonga kuna iye kuti, “MBUYA hadakupase dzina yakuti Pashuri tayu, mbwenye adakupasa dzina yakuti ‘Pyakugoswa konsene kwene.’" 
Jeremiah20:4 Thangwi MBUYA akulonga tenepa: ndinachitisa iwepo kukhala chinthu chakugoswa kuna iwe ene mwenechiroache na kuna ashamwali ako onsene; na maso ako iwe unaaona akufa na talasada ya anyamalwawo. Ndinati ndiapereke Ayuda onsene m'manja mwa mfumu wa ku Babiloni, ule anafuna dzaakwata kwenda nawo ku Babiloni penu kuapha na talasada." 
Jeremiah20:5 Ndinapereka m'manja mwa anyamalwawo mfuma yonsene ya mumzinda wenewu, pinthu pyonsene pimbasasanywa mwenemu, pinthu pyache pyakufunika pyonsene pontho na mfuma yonsene ya mafumu a Yuda. Iwo anapokosera pinthu pyonsene mbaenda napyo ku Babiloni." 
Jeremiah20:6 Iwembo Pashuri na anthu onsene a pabanja pako anakwatwa kwenda kudziko ya Babiloni. Kweneko iwe unafa mbuikhwa m'masiye pabodzi pene na ashamwali ako onsene, ale adapanga iwe mphangwa zakunamawa.”" 
Jeremiah20:7 MBUYA, imwe mudandinyengeza, pontho ine ndidanamizwa; imwe mudandikunda mbamundimala mphamvu. Munthu onsene akundisingirira mbandiselusa nsiku yonsene." 
Jeremiah20:8 Ndzidzi onsene umbalonga ine, ndimbalira kulonga pya kuzunguzika na kuvungika. Mafala a MBUYA andidzesera kutikanwa pontho kuseluswa nsiku yonsene." 
Jeremiah20:9 Mbwenye ngakhala ndinalonga kuti, “Ine sinamthulave MBUYA, penu kulonga pontho na dzinache tayu,” penepo mafalache ambakhala basi mumtima mwanga ninga moto wakugaka, ninga moto wakufungirwa m'magogodo mwanga. Ine ndatopa na kuukoya m'bwalo mwanga; natenepo ine sinakwanisave na pang'ono pene tayu." 
Jeremiah20:10 Ine ndimbava munthu onsene kulonga chapansipansi kuti, “Pyakugoswa pili kukhundu zonsene. Mpangirireni! Mbatimsumireni kuna atongi!” Ashamwali anga onsene akufuna pyakwanga kuona kugwa kwanga mbalonga mbati, “Mwinango iye anati anyengezwe, tenepo ife tinati timkunde mbatimbwezera.”" 
Jeremiah20:11 Kwache MBUYA ali nane ninga nyankhondo wamphamvu; tenepo anyakundisanyisa anagwegweduka mbachimwana kundikunda. Iwo anapichimwana mbachita manyadzo pikulu pene; manyadzo awo nkhabeve dzaduwalirwa tayu. 
Jeremiah20:12 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, nyakuyesa anyakulungama, ule ambaona mtima na manyerezero a munthu, mbandikuoneni mukubwezera pana iwo, thangwi pyonsene ndapitula m'manja mwanu." 
Jeremiah20:13 Imbirani MBUYA! Mkuzeni MBUYA! Iye ambapulumusa moyo wa anyakusowa m'manja mwa anyakuipa. 
Jeremiah20:14 Mbikhale na dzedze nsiku idabalwa ine, mbileke tsanzayiswa nsiku idandibala mama!" 
Jeremiah20:15 Nyadzedze ngule adadza na mphangwa kuna babanga, ule adamchitisa kukomerwa kulonga kuti, “Iwe una mwana, mphale!”" 
Jeremiah20:16 Iye mbakhale ninga mizinda ile MBUYA adaivunga mwakukhonda kuva nsisi. Iye mbave chiliro cha kuva kupha na machibese pontho na mkhuwo wa nkhondo na masikati," 
Jeremiah20:17 thangwi iye hadandiphere m'mimba tayu; penepo m'mimba mwa mama mbadakhala masiye anga. 
Jeremiah20:18 Thangwi yache ninji ndidaona kunja kuti ndione kwene nyatwa na kutsukwala, pontho kukhala na moyo wakuchitiswa manyadzo basi?" 
Jeremiah21:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine, Yeremia pidatuma Zedekia mfumu wa Yuda kuna ine Pashuri mwana Malikia pontho nyansembe Zefania mwana Maaseia. Iwo adalonga mbati," 
Jeremiah21:2 “Tivunzirembo nzeru kuna MBUYA chinchino pano, thangwi Mfumu Nebukadinezara wa ku Babiloni anafuna pyakuchita nafe nkhondo. Mwinango MBUYA anati atichitire chakudzudzumisa chibodzi ninga mukhachitira iye pakutoma, towera Nebukadinezara aleke manyerezero akufuna kuchita nafe nkhondo.”" 
Jeremiah21:3 Mbwenye Yeremia adaatawira mbati, “Kapangeni Zedekia kuti:" 
Jeremiah21:4 ‘MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele akulonga tenepa: Ine ndili chifupi kuchitisa pida pinaphatira iwe m'manja mwako kukutembenukira, pile pinaphatisa iwe basa kumenyana na mfumu wa ku Babiloni na anthu a ku Babiloni, ale akuzungulirani kunja kwa mpanda. Ine ndinati ndiagumanyise kupita m'bwalo mwa mzinda." 
Jeremiah21:5 Ine ene pano ndinamenyana nawe na mphamvu zanga zonsene, ukali wanga onsene kuzhangali kwanga konsene, pontho na shungu yanga yonsene." 
Jeremiah21:6 Ine ndinapha munthu onsene wakukhala mumzindamu, anthu na nyama zene; iwo anafa thangwi ya muliri wakugoswa." 
Jeremiah21:7 Kubuluka penepo ndinapereka Zedekia mfumu wa Yuda, mathubu ache, anthu anafuna dzasala na moyo kunkhondo, na njala pontho na utenda m'manja mwa Mfumu Nebukadinezara wa ku Babiloni, pontho m'manja mwa anyamalwa ambasaka-saka moyo wawo ale. Iye anaapha na talasada; iye nkhabe dzaakomera mtima penu kuavera nsisi penu nyambalo tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.’" 
Jeremiah21:8 “Kuthimiza penepa panga anthu kuti, ‘MBUYA akulonga tenepa: Yang'anani, ine ndikukupasani mwayi wakusankhula pakati pa njira ya ku moyo na njira ya ku imfa." 
Jeremiah21:9 Munthu onsene anasalira mumzindamu anaphiwa na talasada, njala penu na utenda. Mbwenye munthu onsene anabuluka mumzinda mbaimisa manja kuna anthu a ku Babiloni, akuzungulirani chinchino ale, anati akhale na moyo; iye anati apulumuse moyo wache." 
Jeremiah21:10 Ine ndanyerezera pya kuvunga mzindawu mbandikhonda kuusiya. Ndinaupereka m'manja mwa mfumu wa ku Babiloni, tenepo iye anaupisa moto. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.’" 
Jeremiah21:11 “Kwache kalonge kuna nyumba yachifumu ya Yuda kuti: Veserani mafala a MBUYA," 
Jeremiah21:12 imwe pidzukulu pya Davite. MBUYA akulonga tenepa: Onesesani kuti chilungamo chikutewezwa machibese onsene; pulumusani m'manja mwa nyakupondereza munthu onsene anaberwayo, gopesera ukali wanga unalamuka mbugaka ninga moto, thangwi ya pyakuipa pyonsene pyachita imwepi, ule munthu nkhabe kwanisa kuuthimisa tayu." 
Jeremiah21:13 Ine ndina mseru na iwepo, Yerusalemu; iwe unati njonga paphedi pamiyala ya mbuto yakukwira, iwe ule umbalonga kuti, ‘Mbani anakwanisa kuimisana nane? Mbani anakwanisa kufika mbuto yathu yakupatayi?’" 
Jeremiah21:14 Ine ndinakutchunyusa mwakuthemerana na mabasako, Ndinadumika moto msitu, tenepo motowo unapisa pyonsene pyakuzungulirapyo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah22:1 MBUYA akulonga tenepa: Tchithira kunyumba yachifumu ya Yuda mbukalonge mphangwa izi: 
Jeremiah22:2 Vesera mafala a MBUYA iwe mfumu wa Yuda, iwe nyakukhala pampando wachifumu wa Davite, iwe, mathubu ako pabodzi pene na anthu ako ale ambapita na kubuluka pamisuwo yeneyi." 
Jeremiah22:3 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Chitani pyakulungama pontho pyakuthema. Pulumusani m'manja mwa nyakupondereza munthu onsene anaberwayo. Lekani vuya penu kupondereza alendo, ana masiye penu amamfelwa, pontho lekani chuchisa chiropa cha anyakukhonda dawa m'dziko yakuchena." 
Jeremiah22:4 Thangwi imwe mungachita mphole-mphole kuvera matongero enewa; penepo mafumu anakhala pampando wachifumu wa Davite ale anabwera na m'misuwo ya nyumba yachifumuyi, uku apakira pingolo na akavalo, pabodzi pene na mathubu awo pontho anthu awo." 
Jeremiah22:5 Mbwenye ngakhala munakhonda vera matongero enewa, ine MBUYA ndikudumbira na dzinanga kuti nyumba yachifumuyi inasanduka madembe.”" 
Jeremiah22:6 Thangwi MBUYA akulonga pya nyumba yachifumu ya Yuda kuti, “Podi kwene kuti iwe ukhale pyako ninga Gileadi kuna ine ninga nsonga ya phiri ya Lebanoni, ine ndinati ndikusanduse basi thando yatchetcha, ninga maluwani okhonda khala anthu." 
Jeremiah22:7 Ndinatumiza anyakuvunga pana iwe, munthu onsene na chida m'manja mwache, tenepo iwo anagwanda-gwanda miti yadidi maka yamkungudza mbaipisa moto." 
Jeremiah22:8 “Madzinza azinji anagwanda chifupi na mzinda wenewu mbavunzana unango na mwanzache mbati, ‘Thangwi yache ninji MBUYA achita chinthu chenechi kuna mzinda ukulu ninga wenewu?’" 
Jeremiah22:9 Tenepo kutawira kwache kunakhala kwakuti: ‘Thangwi yache njakuti iwo akhonda chiverano chidasasanya iwo na MBUYA Mulungu wawo, pontho apembedza na kutumikira milungu inango.’ ”" 
Jeremiah22:10 Lekani kumsintili mfumu, penu kutsukwala thangwi ya imfache; mbwenye lirani pikulu pene thangwi ya ule ali kudziko ya unyaperezo, thangwi iye nkhabe dzabwererave tayu, penu kuponda pontho mataka a m'dziko mwache tayu." 
Jeremiah22:11 Thangwi MBUYA akulonga pya Shalumu mwana Yosia, nyakupita m'mbuto mwa babache ninga mfumu wa Yuda, kwache ule aenda pyache kubuluka pano: Iye nkhabe bwererave tayu." 
Jeremiah22:12 Iye anafera kudziko ya unyaperezo kudendeswa iye kule; iye nkhabe dzapondave mataka a m'dziko yeneyi tayu. 
Jeremiah22:13 Dzedze kuna nyakumanga nyumbache na njira zokhonda lungama, pontho nyakusasanya masubi ache a padzulu na njira zaufaka-faka, nyakuphatisa bule anthu a m'dziko mwache, mbakhonda kuapagali thangwi ya basa yaphata iwoyo." 
Jeremiah22:14 Iye ambalonga kuti, “Ine ndinati ndimange nyumba yachifumu ikulu, masubi ache a m'dzulu mbakhala na mbuto yakukwana. Tenepo iye ambasasanya mazhanera makulu-makulu, makhundu ache mbaphophamo na mapembo amkungudza mbaathemesera mwadidi na pyakufira." 
Jeremiah22:15 “Ayi kukhala na miti mizinji yamkungudza ndiye pimbakuchitisa kukhala mfumu? Ayi babako hakhali na phoso pontho pyakumwa tayu? Iye adachita pyakulungama pontho pyakuthema, tenepo pyonsene pidamfambira mwadidi." 
Jeremiah22:16 Iye akhaikhira kunduli anyakusowa pontho atcherengi pamiseru, tenepo pyonsene pidamfambira mwadidi. Ayi kundidziwa kumbalongwa kule, si kweneku tayu? Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah22:17 Kwache maso anu na mtimanu pimbakomerwa na kuganyali mwaunthawatawa kuchuchisa chiropa cha anyakukhonda dawa, kupondereza pontho kuchita vinga.”" 
Jeremiah22:18 Natenepo MBUYA akulonga tenepa pya Yehoiakimu mwana Yosia mfumu wa Yuda: “Iwo nkhabe dzamulira tayu kuti, ‘Mama mbaleanga! Mama nyamainganga ine!’ Iwo nkhabe dzamulira tayu kuti, ‘Mama mbuyanga! Mama demelero yache yaenda!’" 
Jeremiah22:19 Iye anaikhwa m'masiye ninga bulu, wakumbuluthwa mbatayiwa kunja kwa mzinda wa Yerusalemu.”" 
Jeremiah22:20 Imwe anthu a ku Yerusalemu, ndokoni ku Lebanoni mbamukakhuwe, chiliro chanu mbachiveke na kudziko ya Bashani; lirani mu Abarimu thangwi ashamwali anu onsene amala kundwa." 
Jeremiah22:21 Ine ndidakucheuzani ndzidzi ukhali imwe pakupata, kwache imwe mudalonga kuti, “Ife nkhabe kuvesera tayu!” Enewa ndiye makhaliro anu kutomera uwananu; imwe nee mwandivera tayu." 
Jeremiah22:22 Mphepo inatswaira akadamu onsene, pontho ashamwali anu anakwatwa kwenda kudziko ya unyaperezo. Penepo imwe munachitiswa manyadzo mbamululupiswa, thangwi ya pyakudawika pyanu pyonsene." 
Jeremiah22:23 Imwe anyakukhala mu Lebanoni; ale mumbabisala m'nyumba zakumangwa na miti yamkungudza, munabulira pyakwanga thangwi ya kuva kupha, kuva kupha ninga kwa mkazi wamimba pakubala." 
Jeremiah22:24 MBUYA adalonga kuna Yehoiakini mwana Yehoiakimu mfumu wa ku Yuda mbati, “Ine ninga Mulungu wamoyo, podi kwene kuti mbudakhala pyako mphete m'chala changa chamadyo, ine ndikudumbira kuti mbidakudula basi." 
Jeremiah22:25 Ine ndinakuikha m'manja mwa anthu anasaka-saka moyo wako ale, anthu anagopa iwe ale, m'manja mwa Nebukadinezara pontho m'manja mwa anthu ache a ku Babiloni." 
Jeremiah22:26 Ine ndinakuponyera kunja pabodzi na mako ene nyakukubala ule, kudziko inango, kule nee mbodzi wa imwe adabalirwa kweneko tayu, kweneko monsenene munafa." 
Jeremiah22:27 Imwe nkhabe dzabwerera pontho tayu kudziko idatchuwa imwe ile.” 
Jeremiah22:28 Ine ndidalonga kuti, “Ayi Yehoiakini weneyu ngule akhondwa, ninga chikalango chakubwededzeka, chinthu chakuti nkhabe na mbodzi ene wakuchifuna tayu? Thangwi yache ninji iye na anache ene aponyerwe kunja, kuponyerwa kudziko inakhonda iwo dziwa?”" 
Jeremiah22:29 Dzikowe, dzikowe, dzikowe! Vesera mafala analonga MBUYA!" 
Jeremiah22:30 MBUYA akulonga tenepa: “Lemba kuti munthu weneyo ayesiwe wakusowa ana, munthu ule pinthu pyache pyonsene nkhabe dzamfambira mwadidi tayu. Iye nkhabe dzakhala na chidzukulu na chibodzi chene, ule anafuna dzakhala pampando wachifumu wa Davite, penu dzakhala mtongi mu Yuda tayu.”" 
Jeremiah23:1 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Dzedze kuna amakabuswa ale ambavunga na kubalalisa mabiranga!”" 
Jeremiah23:2 MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele akulonga kuna amakabuswa, ale ambayang'anira anthu anga mbati, “Na thangwi yakuti imwe mwabalalisa mkumbi wa mabiranga mbamuaendesa m'tsanga kukhonda kuayang'anira, ine ndinati ndikutchunyuseni thangwi ya pyakuipa pyachita imwe. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah23:3 Ine ndinagumanyisa anyakusalira na moyo onsene pakati pa mkumbi wanga kubulukira kumadziko kudaabalalisira ine kule, mbandiabwezera kudziko kwawo. Iwo anakhala na ana azinji mbainjipa pyakwanga." 
Jeremiah23:4 Ine ndinaikha amakabuswa pakati pawo ale anafuna dzaayang'anira mwadidi. Tenepo iwo nkhabe dzachita mantha penu kugopa tayu, penu inango dzatayika tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah23:5 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ndzidzi ukudza unafuna ine dzasankhula chidzukulu cha Davite kukhala mfumu wakulungama, mfumu ule anatonga na nzeru mbachita pyakulungama pontho pyakuthema m'dziko yonsene." 
Jeremiah23:6 Pandzidzi wache Yuda anapulumuswa, pontho Israele anakhala pakupata. Ishi ndi dzina inafuna dzachemerwa na iye: ‘MBUYA Chilungamo chathu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah23:7 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ndzidzi ukudza ule anthu nkhabe dzadumbirave kuti, ‘Ndinadumbira na dzina ya MBUYA wamoyo, ule adabulusa Aisraele m'dziko ya Iguputo tayu.’" 
Jeremiah23:8 M'mbuto mwache anadumbira kuti, ‘Ndinadumbira na dzina ya MBUYA wamoyo ule adabulusa pidzukulu pya Aisraele m'dziko yakumpoto na kumadziko anango kudaabalalisira iye kule.’ Kweneko iwo anakhala m'dziko yawo ene.”" 
Jeremiah23:9 Kulonga pya maprofeti: Mtimanga ukusanyika; magogodo anga onsene akugedemera. Ine ndakhala ninga nyakuledzera, ninga nyakukhuta vinyu, na thangwi ya MBUYA pontho na mafalache akuchena." 
Jeremiah23:10 Dziko yadzala na maputa; na thangwi ya dzedze dziko yasanduka thando yatchetcha, pontho mpovu m'thando wamala unyala. Maprofeti akuteweza makhaliro awo akuipa, mbakhonda phatisa basa mwadidi chidzo chawo." 
Jeremiah23:11 “Maprofeti na anyansembe ene, onsenene mbanthu okhonda gopa Mulungu; podi na m'nyumba mwanga mwene ine ndimbaagumaniza akuchita pyakuipa." 
Jeremiah23:12 Natenepo njira zawo zinasanduka za mitherezi, pontho anaponyerwa kumdima mbagwako. Ndinadzesa nyatwa pana iwo ndzidzi unafuna ine dzaatchunyusa ule. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah23:13 “Pakati pa maprofeti a ku Samaria, ine ndaona chinthu chakunyansa ichi: Iwo ambalonga mphangwa zauprofeti na dzina ya milungu Baala mbabausa anthu anga Aisraele." 
Jeremiah23:14 Pakati pa maprofeti a ku Yerusalemu, ndaona chinthu chinango chakugumisa manungo: Iwo ambachita pyauputa; kunama mbakukhala kudya kwawo. Iwo ambaphedza anthu kuchita pyakudawika, towera paleke khala munthu na mbodzi ene wakuleka chita pyakudawa. Kuna ine iwo akhala ninga Sodomu; anthu a ku Yerusalemu akhala ninga Gomora.”" 
Jeremiah23:15 Natenepo MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga pya maprofeti enewa kuti, “Ine ndinaachitisa kudya pinthu pyakuwawa mbamwa madzi akupha, thangwi kubulukira kuna maprofeti a ku Yerusalemu kukhonda gopa Mulungu kwafalikira kudziko yonsene.”" 
Jeremiah23:16 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga kuti, “Lekani vesera mphangwa zauprofeti zinalonga maprofetiwa; kwawo nkhukunamizani kwene basi. Iwo ambalonga masomphenya a mumsolo mwawo, nee kubulukira m'kanwa mwa MBUYA tayu." 
Jeremiah23:17 Iwo nkhabe topa na kulonga kuna anthu ambalulupisa mafalanga ale kuti, ‘MBUYA akulonga tenepa: Imwe munakhala pa mtendere,’ pontho anyakuteweza pikhumbo pyawo ambalonga kuti, ‘Nkhabe chakugoswa chinafuna kudza tayu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah23:18 Ine ndidalonga kuti, “Apo mbani wa iwo ateweza uphungu wa MBUYA kuti aone na kuva mafalache? Mbani ava na kuvesera mafalache?" 
Jeremiah23:19 Yang'anani, chonzi cha MBUYA, chinaatswaira thangwi ya kuzhangali. Chivumbulu chinadza pamsolo wa anyakudawika." 
Jeremiah23:20 Ukali wa MBUYA nkhabe dzasiyiwa kukhala pana iwo tayu, mpakana iye amalise kuchita pinthu pyonsene pinafuna iye. Nsiku zenezo zingafika imwe munapivesa mwadidi.”" 
Jeremiah23:21 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Maprofeti enewa sidaatume ndine tayu, kwache iwo achita kuthamanga kudza na mphangwa zawo. Ine sidalonge kuna iwo tayu, kwache iwo alonga mphangwa zauprofeti." 
Jeremiah23:22 Mbwenye ngakhala iwo adavesera uphungu wanga, iwo mbadalonga mphangwa zanga kuna anthu anga, pontho mbadachitisa anthu anga kuzungunuka kuleka makhaliro awo akudawika na mabasawo akuipa." 
Jeremiah23:23 “Ayi ine ndine Mulungu wa chifupi ene basi, nee Mulungu wakutali tayu? Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah23:24 Mbani anakwanisa kubisala pambuto yakubisika pakuti ine sinakwanisa kumuona tayu? Ndalonga ndine MBUYA. Ayi ine sidadzaze kudzulu na padziko ya pansi tayu? Ndalonga ndine MBUYA. 
Jeremiah23:25 “Ine ndava mphangwa za maprofeti akunama ale, ambalonga pakuphatisa basa dzinanga. Iwo ambalonga kuti, ‘Ine ndalota! Ndalota ndoto!’" 
Jeremiah23:26 Ayi analeka lini maprofeti akunama enewa kupeka pinthu penepi mumsolo mwawo, ale ambalonga mphangwa zauprofeti zakunama." 
Jeremiah23:27 Iwo ambanyerezera kuti ndoto zimbapangana iwo unango na mwanzache zinachitisa anthu anga kundiduwalira, ninga mudachitira makolo awo kundiduwalira thangwi ya kupembedza milungu Baala." 
Jeremiah23:28 Mprofeti ule ana ndoto mulekeni pyache alonge ndoto zache, mbwenye ule ana mphangwa zakubulukira kuna ineyo mulekeni pyache azilonge mwakukhulupirika. Ayi mapira na makupu-kupu chakufunika ninji?" 
Jeremiah23:29 Ayi mafalanga hadakhale ninga moto tayu? Ayi mafalanga hadakhale ninga nyundo ile imbaswa miyala tayu? Ndalonga ndine MBUYA. 
Jeremiah23:30 “Ine ndina mseru na maprofeti, ale ambaberana mphangwa kuna unango na mwanzache khala ninga mphangwazo nsakubulukira kuna ine. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah23:31 Ande, ndina mseru pontho na ale ambabwebweta mphangwa zawo khala ninga nsakubulukira kuna ine." 
Jeremiah23:32 Veserani pinalonga ine MBUYA. Ine ndina mseru na maprofeti ale ambalonga mphangwa zawo zakunama. Na kunama kwawo pontho na kubwebweta kumbachita iwoko ambabausa anthu anga. Ine sidaatume penu kuatonga kuchita tenepo tayu. Tenepo iwo nkhabe na basa ene kuna anthu tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.” 
Jeremiah23:33 MBUYA adalonga kuna Yeremia mbati, “Penu ndi mbodzi wa anthu enewa, penu mprofeti, penu nyansembe angakuvunza kuti, ‘Ayi mphangwa zakunensa zakubulukira kuna MBUYA nsipi?’ Avunze kuti, ‘Mphangwa zipizo? Ine ndinakukhondani.’ Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah23:34 Penu ndi mbodzi wa anthu enewa, penu mprofeti penu nyansembe angalonga kuti, ‘Mphangwa zakunensa zakubulukira kuna MBUYA nsizi,’ Ine ndinati nditchunyuse munthu weneyo na banjache ene." 
Jeremiah23:35 Munthu onsene wa imwe ndzidzi onsene ambalonga kuna shamwaliache penu mbaleache mbati, ‘Ayi MBUYA ambatawira tani?’ penu, ‘Ayi MBUYA alonganji?’" 
Jeremiah23:36 Kwache imwe nee mwathema kulonga pontho, ‘Mphangwa zakunensa zakubulukira kuna MBUYA,’ tayu, thangwi mafalache ene ambalonga munthuwo ambasanduka mphangwa zakubulukira kuna iye ene, natenepo ambadzudzumisa mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu wamoyo, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, Mulungu wathu." 
Jeremiah23:37 Yeremia, iwe wathema kulonga ndzidzi onsene kuna maprofeti kuti, ‘Ayi MBUYA adakutawira tani? Ayi MBUYA alonganji kuna imwe?’" 
Jeremiah23:38 Podi kwene kuti iwe ulonge kuti, ‘Mphangwa zakunensa zakubulukira kuna MBUYA nsizi, MBUYA alonga tenepa,’ iwe udaphatisa basa mafala akulonga kuti, ‘MBUYA alonga tenepa,’ podi kwene kuti ine ndidakupanga kuti iwe hudatheme kuzilonga tayu kuti, ‘Mphangwa zakunensa zakubulukira kuna MBUYA nsizi.’" 
Jeremiah23:39 Natenepo ine ndinati ndiaduwalire mbandiaponya kutali na ine ninga mitolo yakunensa, iwo pabodzi pene na mzinda udaapasa ine, pontho kuna makolo awo ule." 
Jeremiah23:40 Ine ndinakululupisani pikulu pene, pontho ndinakuchitisani manyadzo kwenda na kwenda, pile nkhabe dzaduwalika tayu.”" 
Jeremiah24:1 MBUYA andionesa pitundu piwiri pya makuyu pikhali kunkhope kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu pile. Penepi pidachitika pikhadamala Nebukadinezara mfumu wa ku Babiloni kukwata Yehoiakini mwana Yehoiakimu mfumu wa Yuda ninga nyaperezo, kubulukira ku Yerusalemu kwenda naye ku Babiloni pabodzi pene na akadamu a Yuda, anyaluso pa mabasa a manja na amisiri anango ene." 
Jeremiah24:2 Chitundu chibodzi chidadzala na makuyu adidi, akutoma kufira ale; chitundu chinangocho chidadzala na nsapo zakuipa, zakuchimwanika na kudyeka kwene." 
Jeremiah24:3 Tenepo MBUYA adandivunza mbati, “Ayi, Yeremia ukuonanji?” Ine ndidatawira kuti, “Ndikuona makuyu. Adidiwa ngadidi pyakwanga, pontho akuipawa ngakuipa pyakwanga, akuchimwanika na kudyeka kwene.”" 
Jeremiah24:4 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Jeremiah24:5 “Ine MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele, ndikulonga tenepa: Anthu akwatwa kwenda kudziko ya unyaperezo ku Babiloni ale, kuna ine akhala ninga makuyu adidiwa." 
Jeremiah24:6 Ine ndinaayang'anira mwadidi mbandiadzesa kudziko ino. Ine nkhabe dzaafudza tayu, mbwenye ndinaagumanyisa; ine ndinaabzala, nee kuadula tayu." 
Jeremiah24:7 Ine ndinaapasa mtima wakufuna kudziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA. Tenepo iwo anakhala anthu anga, inembo mbandikhala Mulungu wawo, thangwi iwo anabwerera kuna ine na mtimawo onsene." 
Jeremiah24:8 “Kulonga pya Zedekia mfumu wa Yuda, mathubu ache, pontho na anyakusalira na moyo onsene a ku Yerusalemu, ale ambakhala m'dzikomo, penu adenda ku Iguputo ale, ndinaayesa ninga makuyu akuipa, akuchimwanika na kudyeka kwene." 
Jeremiah24:9 Ine ndinadzesa nyatwa zakugoswa pyakwanga pana iwo mwakuti madzinza onsene a padziko yapansi anachita mantha. Anthu anaasingirira, kuasedegula na kuatikana pontho anaphatisa basa dzinawo kutemberera nayo konsene kwene kwaabalalisa ine kule." 
Jeremiah24:10 Ine ndinadzesa nkhondo, njala pontho muliri pana iwo mpakana pakhonde sala munthu na mbodzi ene m'dziko idapereka ine kuna iwo na kuna makolo awo ene ile.”" 
Jeremiah25:1 Chaka chachinayi Yehoiakimu mwana Yosia, mbali mfumu wa Yuda, mphangwa za MBUYA zidadza kuna Yeremia kulonga pya anthu onsene a ku Yuda. Chenechi chikhali chaka chakutoma cha utongi wa Nebukadinezara mfumu wa Babiloni." 
Jeremiah25:2 Natenepo ine mprofeti Yeremia ndidalonga kuna anthu onsene a ku Yuda na ale akukhala mu Yerusalemu kuti," 
Jeremiah25:3 “Pyaka makumawiri na pitatu, kubulukira chaka chakhumi na chitatu Yosia mwana Amoni mbali mfumu wa Yuda mpakana lero, MBUYA alonga kuna ine, inembo ndalonga kuna imwe kazinji kene. Kwache imwe hamudapiikhe konta tayu." 
Jeremiah25:4 Imwe nee mudamvesere penu kupiikha konta tayu, podi kwene kuti MBUYA adathimiza kutuma kuna imwe anyabasache onsene maprofeti." 
Jeremiah25:5 Iwo adalonga mbati, ‘Munthu onsene wa imwe mbaleke makhaliro ache akudawika na mabasache akuipa, towera muthimize kukhala m'dziko idapereka MBUYA kuna imwe na makolo anu kuti ikhale yanu ene kwenda na kwenda ile." 
Jeremiah25:6 Lekani kupembedza na kutumikira milungu inango; lekani kundizhangalisa pakupembedza pinthu pidasasanya imwe na manjanu pile. Penepo ine nkhabe dzakuvungani tayu.’ ” 
Jeremiah25:7 MBUYA mwenechiroache akulonga kuti, “Kwache imwe mudakhonda kundivesera. M'mbuto mwache imwe mwandizhangalisa na pinthu pidasasanya imwe na manjanu, mbamupidzesera kuvungika mwekha ene." 
Jeremiah25:8 “Natenepo MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga tenepa: Na thangwi ya kuti imwe mudakhonda kundivesera," 
Jeremiah25:9 ine ndinachemeresa anthu onsene akumpoto, pabodzi pene na nyabasanga Nebukadinezara mfumu wa ku Babiloni. Ine ndinaachitisa kumenyana na Yuda pontho na anthu ache pontho na madzinza onsene akuzungulira. Ine ndinavungiratu dzinza yeneyi mbandiachitisa kukhala chinthu chakugumisa manungo, chakusekesa, pontho madembe kwenda na kwenda." 
Jeremiah25:10 Ine ndinamalisa kusekera na kukomerwa kumbachita iwoko, mkhuwo wa kukomerwa kwa anyakukazhali, kupeya kwa malibwe, pontho na cheza cha nyale." 
Jeremiah25:11 Dziko yonseneyi inasanduka madembe pontho thando yatchetcha, pontho madzinza enewa anatumikira mfumu wa ku Babiloni pyaka makumanomwe." 
Jeremiah25:12 “Kwache pyaka makumanomwe pingamala, ine ndinati nditchunyuse mfumu wa ku Babiloni na dziko yache ene, dziko ya anthu a ku Babiloni, thangwi ya kudawa kwawo mbandiachitisa kukhala madembe kwenda na kwenda. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah25:13 Ine ndinadzesa pana dziko yeneyi pinthu pyonsene pidalonga ine pile, pinthu pyonsene pyalembwa m'bukhu yeneyi, pontho pidalongwaletu na mprofeti Yeremia kuti pinachitika kuna madzinza onsene pile." 
Jeremiah25:14 Iwo makawo anakwatwa ninga mabitchu na madzinza azinji pontho mafumu akulu-akulu; ine ndinaabwezera malingana na makhaliro awo pontho na mabasa adaphata iwo na manjawo.” 
Jeremiah25:15 MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Kwata khomitcho yakudzala na vinyu wa ukali wanga ili m'manja mwangayi mbuchitise madzinza onsene kunakutuma ineko kuimwa." 
Jeremiah25:16 Iwo angamwa anadzedzereka mbachita nsala thangwi ya nkhondo inafuna ine dzadzesa pakati pawo ile.” 
Jeremiah25:17 Tenepo ine ndidakwata khomitcho ikhali m'manja mwa MBUYA ile mbandichitisa madzinza onsene kudandituma iye kule kuimwa: 
Jeremiah25:18 Yerusalemu na maluwani onsene a Yuda, mafumu na mathubu awo adamwa khomitcho yeneyi, towera asanduke madembe, chinthu chakugumisa manungo pontho chakusekesa, pontho na chadzedze ninga muna iwo lero." 
Jeremiah25:19 Ale adathema kumwa khomitcho ya ukali wa MBUYA mbawa: mfumu wa ku Iguputo, mathubu ache na anthu ache onsene; Aiguputo onsene na alendo ache akukhala mu Iguputo," 
Jeremiah25:20 na alendo onsene akhakhala kweneko; mafumu onsene a kudziko ya Uzi, mafumu onsene a kumizinda ya Ashikeloni, Gaza, Ekroni, na anyakusalira a ku Ashidodi m'nthemba ya Filisti;" 
Jeremiah25:21 anthu onsene a ku Edomu, Moabu, na Amoni;" 
Jeremiah25:22 mafumu onsene a ku Turo na Sidoni; mafumu onsene a nthemba ya Mediterania; 
Jeremiah25:23 anthu a m'mizinda ya Dedani, Tema na Buzi; anthu onsene ambachinga tsisi yawo ale;" 
Jeremiah25:24 mafumu onsene a ku Arabia, mafumu onsene a kumadzinza a m'thando yatchetcha;" 
Jeremiah25:25 mafumu onsene a ku Zimri, Elamu na Media," 
Jeremiah25:26 mafumu onsene akumpoto, a chifupi na akutali ene, kada munthu onsene, dzinza yonsene padziko ya pansi idathema kumwa khomitcho yeneyi. Pakumalisira pache anafuna kuimwa ndi mfumu wa ku Babiloni." 
Jeremiah25:27 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Panga anthu kuti: MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene Mulungu wa Israele akulonga tenepa: Imwani, ledzerani mbamutapika, mpakana kugwa mbamuchimwana na kulamuka kwene, thangwi ya nkhondo inafuna ine dzadzesa pakati pa imwe ile." 
Jeremiah25:28 Ngakhala iwo anakhonda kukwata khomitcho m'manja mwako mbamwa, apange kuti: MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga tenepa: Imwe mwathema kuimwa basi." 
Jeremiah25:29 Yang'anani, ndatoma kale basa yakuvunga mzinda umbaveka na dzinanga ule. Ayi imwe mukunyerezera kuti sinakutchunyusani tayu? Nkhabe, ine ndinati ndikutchunyuseni basi, thangwi ine ndinadzesa nkhondo pakati pa anthu onsene a padziko yapansi. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Jeremiah25:30 “Chinchino, Yeremia, longa kuna iwo mphangwa zauprofeti kupokanyisana nawo kuti, ‘MBUYA anabangula kubulukira kudzulu; mbadima kubulukira kumbuto yache yakuchena. Iye anagwenga pana anthu ache; iye anabangula ninga fala ya anyakuponda-ponda mfesa, kubangula pana anthu onsene ambakhala padziko yapansi ale." 
Jeremiah25:31 Mkhuwo wache unatayirira mpakana kumadolomero a dziko ya pansi, thangwi MBUYA anatonga mseru dziko yapansi; iye anatonga mseru anthu onsene mbapha na talasada anyakudawika. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.’ ”" 
Jeremiah25:32 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga tenepa: “Yang'anani, kuvungika kuli falanthi pakati pa madzinza; chonzi chagundika kumadolomero a dziko yapansi.”" 
Jeremiah25:33 Pandzidzi wenewo anyakuphiwa na MBUYA anakhala ponsene pene kubulukira kunkhomo kwa dziko mpakana kunkhomo inango. Iwo nkhabe dzalirwa penu dzasintilwi, penu dzagumanywa mbaikhwa m'masiye tayu, mbwenye anakhala gwenjere-gwenjere ninga ulowa." 
Jeremiah25:34 Lirani pontho kalalani, imwe amakabuswa; bulumundani pamataka, imwe anyakuyang'anira mikumbi ya anthu anga, thangwi ndzidzi wanu wakuchekwa wakwana; imwe munachekwa ninga mabira amuna." 
Jeremiah25:35 Amakabuswa anasowa kwakuthawira, anyakuyang'anira mikumbi ya anthu anga nkhabe kwanisa kubisala tayu." 
Jeremiah25:36 Ngavani chiliro cha amakabuswa, kukalala kwa anyakuyang'anira mikumbi ya anthu anga, thangwi mpovu wawo MBUYA amala kuuvunga." 
Jeremiah25:37 Mathanga awo a mtendere anasanduka madembe, thangwi ya ukali wakugoswa wa MBUYA." 
Jeremiah25:38 Ninga nkhalamu kusiya nkhwimbache, sasawambo iye asiya anthu ache; tenepo dziko yawo yasanduka thando yatchetcha, thangwi ya talasada ya anyakuaboneresa, pontho na thangwi ya ukali wakugoswa wa MBUYA." 
Jeremiah26:1 Sindzidzi Yehoiakimu mwana Yosia nkhupita ufumu wa Yuda, MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Jeremiah26:2 “Ndoko kaimire pachintalo cha Nyumba ya Mulungu mbukalalike kuna anthu onsene a kumaluwani a Yuda, ale adza dzapembedza kuno, pyonsene pinakupanga ine. Leka siya chinthu na chibodzi chene." 
Jeremiah26:3 Mwinango anthu anati avesere mbaleka makhaliro awo akuipa. Ngakhala anachitadi tenepo, penepo ine ndinambombowesa ukali wanga mbandikhonda dzaavunga thangwi ya kudawika kwawoko.”" 
Jeremiah26:4 Longa kuna anthuwo kuti, “MBUYA akulonga tenepa: Ngakhala imwe munakhonda kundivesera mbamukhonda kuteweza pifunziso pyakupasani inepi," 
Jeremiah26:5 pontho mbamukhonda vesera mafala analonga anyabasanga, maprofeti ambakutumirani ine kazinji kene ale, podi kwene kuti imwe nee mudaavesera tayu," 
Jeremiah26:6 penepo ine ndinachita kuna Nyumba yeneyi ninga pidachita ine kuna Shilo, pontho mbandichitisa madzinza onsene kuphatisa basa dzina ya mzindawu kutemberera nayo.”" 
Jeremiah26:7 Anyansembe, maprofeti na anthu onsene adava Yeremia akulonga mafala enewa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
Jeremiah26:8 Kwache sindzidzi nkhumalisa kulonga mafala adampanga MBUYA ale, iwo onsene adamphata mbakhuwa mbati, “Iwe wathema kuphiwa!" 
Jeremiah26:9 Thangwi yache ninji iwe ukulonga mphangwa zauprofeti na dzina ya MBUYA kuti Nyumba yeneyi inakhala ninga ya ku Shilo, pontho kuti mzindawu unavungwa mbusanduka madembe?” Natenepo anthu onsene adamuwumbikira Yeremia m'Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
Jeremiah26:10 Pidava mathubu a mu Yuda pidachitika pile, adenda ku Nyumba ya Mulungu kubulukira kunyumba yachifumu mbakakhala pambuto zawo pa Msuwo Utswa wa Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
Jeremiah26:11 Tenepo anyansembe na maprofeti adalonga kuna mathubu na anthu ale mbati, “Munthu weneyu athema kuphiwa thangwi alonga mphangwa zauprofeti kupokanyisana na mzindawu. Imwe mwapiva na makutu anu!”" 
Jeremiah26:12 Tenepo Yeremia adalonga kuna mathubu na anthu onsene ale mbati, “MBUYA adandituma dzalonga mphangwa zauprofeti zakupokanyisana na nyumbayi pontho mzindawu pinthu pyonsene pyava imwepi." 
Jeremiah26:13 Chinchino sanduzani makhaliro anu pontho mabasanu mbamuvere MBUYA Mulungu wanu. Penepo MBUYA anambombowesa ukali wache mbakhonda kudzesa nyatwa pana imwe ninga mudalongera iye mule. 
Jeremiah26:14 Kulonga pya ine, ndili m'manja mwanu, chitani kuna ine pyonsene pinanyerezera imwe kuti mphyadidi pontho pyakuthema." 
Jeremiah26:15 Kwache mupidziwedi kuti ngakhala munandipha, penepo chiropa cha munthu okhonda dawa chinati chigwere pamsolo panu, mzindanu na anthu akukhala mwenemo, thangwi pyakuonadi mphyakuti, MBUYA ndiye andituma kuna imwe dzalonga mafala ava imwewa.”" 
Jeremiah26:16 Tenepo mathubu na anthu onsene ale adalonga kuna anyansembe na maprofeti ale mbati, “Munthuyu hadatheme tayu kuphiwa! Iye alonga kuna ife na dzina ya MBUYA Mulungu wathu.”" 
Jeremiah26:17 Akulu-akulu anango a dzikoyo adaimira mbalonga kuna anthu onsene akhadagumanyikana penepo ale mbati," 
Jeremiah26:18 “Pikhali Hezekia mfumu wa Yuda, mprofeti Mika wa ku Moresheti adalonga mphangwa zauprofeti kuna anthu onsene a ku Yuda kuti: ‘MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga kuti: Zioni anatipulwa ninga munda; Yerusalemu anasanduka mulu wa madongolomwa, pontho phiri ile pana nyumba ya Mulungu inasanduka msitu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah26:19 Mfumu Hezekia wa ku Yuda penu munthu unango ene mu Yuda hadamphe Mika tayu. M'mbuto mwache Hezekia adagopa MBUYA mbafuna kuti amkomere mtima. Natenepo MBUYA adambombowesa ukali wache mbakhonda dzesa nyatwa pana iwo ninga montho mukhadapilongera iye mule. Chinchino ife tili chifupi kupidzesera tekha ene nyatwa zikulu! 
Jeremiah26:20 Pakhali munthu unango dzinache Uria mwana Shemaia wa ku Kiriati-Yearimu, ule adalonga mphangwa zauprofeti na dzina ya MBUYA. Iye adalonga mphangwa zauprofeti kupokanyisana na mzinda pontho dziko ninga montho mwalongera mprofeti Yeremia kupokanyisana na mzindawu pontho dzikoyi." 
Jeremiah26:21 Pidava Yehoiakimu na anyankhondo ache pontho mathubu ache pikhadalonga Uria pile, mfumu adayesera kumpha. Kwache Uria adapiva pikhafuna kuchita mfumu pile, natenepo iye adathawira ku Iguputo thangwi ya mantha." 
Jeremiah26:22 Kwache Mfumu Yehoiakimu adatuma Elinatani mwana Akibori pabodzi pene na amuna anango a ku Iguputo kakwata Uria. 
Jeremiah26:23 Iwo adenda kamphata Uria mu Iguputo mbabwerera naye kuna mfumu, ule adampha mbaponya mtembo wache pamasiye a anthu ene pyawo." 
Jeremiah26:24 Mbwenye na thangwi ya kuti, Ahikamu mwana Shafani adaikhira kunduli Yeremia, tenepo iye hadaperekwe tayu m'manja mwa anthu kuti aphiwe." 
Jeremiah27:1 Sindzidzi Yosia mwana Zedekia nkhupita ufumu wa Yuda, MBUYA adalonga kuna ine, Yeremia" 
Jeremiah27:2 mbati, “Sasanya goli-goli mbuimangire m'khosi mwako na nthambo za nthembe." 
Jeremiah27:3 Kubuluka penepo tuma mphangwa kuna mafumu a ku Edomu, Moabu, Amoni, Turo na Sidoni kudzera muna aimiriri a madziko awo adadza ku Yerusalemu ale dzaona Mfumu Zedekia wa ku Yuda.”" 
Jeremiah27:4 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, Mulungu wa Israele, andipanga kuatonga kuti akapangembo mafumu awo kuti, “MBUYA akulonga tenepa:" 
Jeremiah27:5 Na mboko zanga pontho na mphamvu zanga zikulu, ndidalenga dziko yonsene yapansi na anthu ache pontho na nyama zili mwenemozo; ndimbaipereka kuna munthu onsene ambakomerwa na ineyo." 
Jeremiah27:6 Ndine pano ndaikha madziko onsenewa pansi pa utongi wa nyabasanga Nebukadinezara mfumu wa ku Babiloni, pontho ndidachitisa kuti nyama zonsene zimtumikire ndine pano." 
Jeremiah27:7 Madzinza onsene anamtumikira, pontho iwo anatumikira mwanache na mdzukuluache ene mpakana ndzidzi unakwana wakuti dziko makayo inagwa. Penepo dziko yache inatumikira madziko amphamvu pontho mafumu makulu-makulu." 
Jeremiah27:8 “Mbwenye ngakhala dzinza penu ufumu unakhonda kutumikira penu kukhala pansi pa utongi wache, penepo ine ndinatchunyusa dzinza penu ufumu wenewo na nkhondo, njala pontho muliri mpakana ndichitise Nebukadinezara kuivunga monsene mwene." 
Jeremiah27:9 Lekani vesera maprofeti anu, anyakukhumiranu, anyakuloteranu, anyakuombedzanu na anyamatsenganu. Onsenewo akukupangani kuti muleke vera mfumu wa ku Babiloni." 
Jeremiah27:10 Iwo akukunyengezani na pinalonga iwo; imwe munati muphatwe kwenda kutali na dziko yanu. Ine ndinakuthamangisani m'dzikomu, tenepo imwe munavungwa." 
Jeremiah27:11 Mbwenye ngakhala dzinza inatawira kukhala pansi pa utongi wa mfumu wa ku Babiloni mbamtumikira, penepo ndinachitisa dzinzayo kukhala m'dziko yawo ene, kulima na kukhala mwenemo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah27:12 Mphangwa zontho-zonthozi ndidazitumizambo kuna Zedekia mfumu wa Yuda kuti, “Khala pansi pa utongi wa mfumu wa ku Babiloni. Mtumikire iye na anthu ache ene, tenepo imwe munakhala na moyo." 
Jeremiah27:13 Thangwi yache njanji kuti iwe na anthu ako ene mufe pankhondo, na njala, pontho na muliri? Pinthu pile pyalonga MBUYA kuti anachita kuna dzinza yonsene inakhonda kukhala pansi pa utongi wa mfumu wa ku Babiloni." 
Jeremiah27:14 Lekani vesera pinalonga maprofetiwa kuna imwe kuti imwe nkhabe dzatumikira mfumu wa ku Babiloni tayu, thangwi iwo akulonga mphangwa zakunama zauprofeti." 
Jeremiah27:15 Iwo si maprofeti chadi-chadi tayu. Iwo akulonga mphangwa zauprofeti zakunama na dzinanga. Natenepo ine ndinakuthamangisani; penepo imwe munamala vungika, imwe pabodzi pene na maprofeti anu ene anakupangani mphangwa zauprofeti zakunamawo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah27:16 Kubuluka penepo ine ndidalonga kuna anyansembe na kuna anthu onsene kuti, “MBUYA akulonga tenepa: Lekani vesera maprofeti ambalonga kuti chinchino pano pinthu pya m'Nyumba ya Mulungu pinati pibwezerwe kubulukira kudziko ya Babiloni. Iwo akukupangani mphangwa zauprofeti zakunama." 
Jeremiah27:17 Lekani kuavesera pinalonga iwopyo. Tumikirani mfumu wa ku Babiloni, tenepo imwe munakhala na moyo. Thangwi yache ninji kuti mzindawu usanduke madembe?" 
Jeremiah27:18 Ngakhala iwo ndiwodi maprofeti, pontho ana mphangwa zakubulukiradi kuna Mulungu, alekeni adembetere MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene kuti pinthu pyasalira m'Nyumba ya MBUYA na m'nyumba yachifumu mu Yuda na mu Yerusalemu pileke kwatwa kwenda ku Babiloni." 
Jeremiah27:19 Thangwi penepi ndiye pyalonga MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene pya nsanamira ziwiri, phiso ikulu, pigudumu na pinthu pinango pyakusalira m'Nyumba ya Mulungu," 
Jeremiah27:20 pile pidasiya Mfumu Nebukadinezara khonda kupikwata ndzidzi udaphata iye Yehoiakini mwana Yehoiakimu mfumu wa Yuda ule, kwenda kudziko ya unyaperezo ku Babiloni kubulukira naye ku Yerusalemu pabodzi pene na amuna akuveka a mu Yuda na Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah27:21 “Veserani pinalonga ine, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, Mulungu wa Israele, papinthu pyakusalira m'Nyumba ya Mulungu na m'nyumba yachifumu mu Yuda na mu Yerusalemu kuti," 
Jeremiah27:22 ‘Ipyo pinakwatwa kwenda kudziko ya Babiloni mbapikhala kweneko mpakana ndzidzi udzafike wakuti ine ndipinyerezere pontho. Tenepo ndinapichitisa kubwerera mbandipiikha pontho m'mbuto zache. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.’ ” 
Jeremiah28:1 Chaka chonthocho, mwezi wachishanu wa chaka chachinayi Zedekia mbali mfumu wa Yuda, mprofeti Hanania mwana Azuri wa ku Gibeoni adalonga kuna ine m'Nyumba ya Mulungu pamaso pa anyansembe na anthu onsene mbati," 
Jeremiah28:2 “MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, Mulungu wa Israele, akulonga tenepa: Ine ndinaswa goli-goli ya mfumu wa ku Babiloni." 
Jeremiah28:3 Chaka chachiwiri mbichidzati mala ndinachitisa kubwezeresa kwa pinthu pyonsene pya m'Nyumba ya Mulungu pidakwata Mfumu Nebukadinezara mbaenda napyo ku Babiloni pile. 
Jeremiah28:4 Ndinachitisa pontho Yehoiakini mwana Yehoiakimu mfumu wa Yuda kubwerera kumbuto ino pabodzi pene na anyakuphatwa anango, ale adaphatwa mu Yuda kwenda nawo ku Babiloni, thangwi ndinati ndiswe goli-goli ya mfumu wa ku Babiloni. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah28:5 Tenepo mprofeti Yeremia adatawira mprofeti Hanania ule pamaso pa anyansembe na anthu onsene adaimira penepowo m'Nyumba ya MBUYA mbati," 
Jeremiah28:6 “Ameni! MBUYA mbachite tenepo; MBUYA mbachitise kukwana-kwana mphangwa zauprofeti zalonga iwezi, pakuchitisa pinthu pya m'Nyumba ya Mulungu na anthu onsene adakwatwa kwenda ku Babiloni ale kubwerera pontho kumbuto ino." 
Jeremiah28:7 Kwache vesera pinafuna ine kulonga kuna iwe na anthu onsene. 
Jeremiah28:8 Maprofeti adalongeratu kale ene, ine na iwe ene mbatidzati, pya nkhondo, njala, pontho muliri m'madziko azinji pontho na m'maufumu akulu-akulu." 
Jeremiah28:9 Mbwenye mprofeti ule ambalonga mphangwa zauprofeti za mtendere, anadziwika ninga mprofeti wakutumwadi na MBUYA, ngakhala pyalonga iyepyo pyakwana-kwana.”" 
Jeremiah28:10 Tenepo mprofeti Hanania adabulusa goli-goli ikhali m'khosi mwa Yeremia ile mbaiswa," 
Jeremiah28:11 tenepo iye adalonga pamaso pa anthu onsene ale mbati, “MBUYA akulonga tenepa: Ntchibodzi-bodzi MBUYA anaswa goli-goli ya mfumu wa ku Babiloni m'khosi mwa madzinza onsene pandzidzi wa pyaka piwiri.” Kubuluka penepo mprofeti Yeremia adenda pyache." 
Jeremiah28:12 Sindzidzi mprofeti Hanania nkhuswa goli-goli ikhali m'khosi mwa Yeremia ile, MBUYA adalonga kuna Yeremia mbati," 
Jeremiah28:13 “Ndoko kapange Hanania kuti MBUYA akulonga tenepa: Iwe waswa goli-goli yamuti, mbwenye m'mbuto mwache ine ndinaikha goli-goli yasimbi." 
Jeremiah28:14 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, Mulungu wa Israele akulonga tenepa: Ine ndinati ndithukulise goli-goli yasimbi m'khosi mwa madzinza onsenewa mbatumikira Nebukadinezara mfumu wa ku Babiloni. Ine ndinati ndimpase pontho utongi wa pana nyama zene zam'tsanga.”" 
Jeremiah28:15 Natenepo mprofeti Yeremia adalonga kuna mprofeti Hanania mbati, “Vesera Hanania, adakutuma si MBUYA tayu, kwache iwe wachitisa anthuwa kuvera pyakunama!" 
Jeremiah28:16 Natenepo MBUYA akulonga tenepa: Ine ndili chifupi kukubulusa padziko ya pansi. Chaka chontho chino iwe unati ufe, thangwi iwe wafunzisa anthu pyakupandukira MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah28:17 Mwezi wachinomwe wa chaka chonthocho mprofeti Hanania adafa. 
Jeremiah29:1 Ine ndidalemba kalata kuna anyansembe, maprofeti, akadamu a anthu, na kuna anthu anango onsene, ale adakwatwa unyaperezo kubulukira ku Yerusalemu na Nebukadinezara kwenda nawo ku Babiloni." 
Jeremiah29:2 Kalatayi ndidailemba ndzidzi ukhadakwatwa Mfumu Yehoiakimu, na mache ene, mathubu a kunyumba yachifumu, akadamu a mu Yuda na mu Yerusalemu, anyaluso pabasa ya manja na anyaluso anango kwenda nawo kudziko ya unyaperezo." 
Jeremiah29:3 Iye adatumiza kalatayi na Elasa mwana Shafani, pontho na Gemaria mwana Hilikia, akhadatuma Zedekia mfumu wa Yuda kwenda kuna Nebukadinezara mfumu wa Babiloni ale. Kalatayi ikulonga tenepa:" 
Jeremiah29:4 “MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, Mulungu wa Israele, akulonga kuna anthu onsene ale akhadatayirisa iye Nebukadinezara kuaphata unyaperezo kubuluka nawo ku Yerusalemu kwenda nawo ku Babiloni mbati:" 
Jeremiah29:5 Mangani pyanu nyumba mbamukhazikike kweneko; limani pyanu minda mbamudye pinavuna imwepyo. 
Jeremiah29:6 Sembani pyanu mbamubale ana achimuna na achikazi; semberani na kusembesa ananu, towera iwo abale ana achimuna na achikazi. Injipani pyanu nee kupunguka tayu." 
Jeremiah29:7 Funani mtendere, pontho kufamba mwadidi kwa pinthu mumzinda kudakutamisani ine ule. Upempherereni kuna MBUYA, thangwi ngakhala pinthu pinafamba mwadidi, imwembo pinthu pinakufambirani mwadidi." 
Jeremiah29:8 Ande, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene Mulungu wa Israele akulonga tenepa: Lekani tawirisa maprofeti, penu anyakukhumira pakati panu kukunyengezani. Lekani vera ndoto zawo." 
Jeremiah29:9 Iwo akukupangani mphangwa zauprofeti zakunama na dzinanga. Sidaatume ndine tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA. 
Jeremiah29:10 “MBUYA adalonga tenepa: Pyaka makumanomwe pyakukhala kwanu ku Babiloni pingamala, ine ndinati ndidze kuna imwe mbandichitisa kudumbira kwanga kudachita ine kule kuti ndinakubwezeresani kudziko kwanu, kukwane-kwane." 
Jeremiah29:11 Thangwi ine mwenechiroache ndikudziwa pinthu pile pyasasanya ine dzakuchitirani: kuchitisa kuti pinthu pyanu pifambe mwadidi nee nyatwa tayu; kukupasani chidikhiro; pontho kukusasanyirani kutsogolo kwadidi. 
Jeremiah29:12 Tenepo imwe munabwerera kuna ine mbamupemphera kufuna chiphedzo, penepo ine ndinava kupemphera kwanu." 
Jeremiah29:13 Mungandisaka-saka, munandigumana, ngakhala munasaka-saka na mtimanu onsene." 
Jeremiah29:14 Imwe munati mundigumane, mbandikubwezerani kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo. Ine ndinakugumanyisani kubulukira kumadziko onsene na kumbuto zonsene kukhadakubalalisani ine kule, mbandikudzesani kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo kudakuendesani ine kule. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah29:15 “Imwe munakwanisa kulonga kuti, ‘MBUYA atitumizira maprofeti m'dziko ya Babiloni,’" 
Jeremiah29:16 kwache MBUYA alonga penepi pya mfumu akhala pampando wa chifumu wa Davite, pontho na anthu onsene asalira mumzinda ale, anzanu a kudziko kwanu ale hadende namwe tayu kudziko ya unyaperezo." 
Jeremiah29:17 Ande, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene alonga mbati, ‘Ine ndinati nditumize nkhondo, njala, pontho muliri pakati pawo mbandiachitisa kukhala ninga makuyu akuvunda ale nkhabe kwanisika kudyeka tayu." 
Jeremiah29:18 Ine ndinati ndiathamangise na nkhondo, njala, pontho muliri. Ine ndinaachitisa kukhala chinthu chakugumisa manungo kuna maufumu onsene a padziko yapansi; chinthu chakutemberera nacho, chakugoswa, chakusekesa, pontho chakuchitisa manyadzo pakati pa madzinza onsene kudaaendesa ine kule." 
Jeremiah29:19 Thangwi iwo hadavesere mafalanga, mafala adatumiza ine kazinji kene kudzera muna anyabasanga, maprofeti. Tenepo iwo hadaavesere na pang'ono pene tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.’" 
Jeremiah29:20 “Natenepo imwe, monsene adendesa ine kudziko ya unyaperezo ya Babiloni kubulukira ku Yerusalemu, veserani mafala analonga ine, MBUYA." 
Jeremiah29:21 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, Mulungu wa Israele, akulonga tenepa pya Ahabu mwana Kolaia na Zedekia mwana Maaseia ale akulonga mphangwa zauprofeti zakunama na dzinanga: Ine ndinaaikha m'manja mwa Nebukadinezara mfumu wa Babiloni, tenepo iye anaapha imwe mukuona maso." 
Jeremiah29:22 Ngakhala anthu adenda kudziko ya unyaperezo ku Babiloni kubulukira ku Yuda ale, anafuna kutemberera munthu, iwo analonga mbati, ‘MBUYA mbakuchitire ninga montho mudachitira iye kuna Zedekia na Ahabu, adaotchiwa amoyo na Mfumu Nebukadinezara ale.’" 
Jeremiah29:23 Thangwi iwo adachita pinthu pyakupitisa manungo mphepo mu Israele; iwo adachita uputa na akazi a atsanthembawo mbalonga pyakunama na dzinanga, pinthu pyakuti sidaatume ndine tayu kuti apilonge. Ine ndikupidziwa pontho ndine mboni wa pinthu penepi. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah29:24 Panga Shemaia wa ku Nehelamu kuti," 
Jeremiah29:25 “MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene Mulungu wa Israele akulonga tenepa: Iwe udatumiza makalata na dzinako kuna anthu onsene a ku Yerusalemu, kuna Zefania nyansembe mwana Maaseia, pontho na kuna anyansembe anango onsene. Iwe udalonga kuna Zefania kuti," 
Jeremiah29:26 ‘MBUYA adakusankhula kukhala nyansembe kupita mbuto ya Yehoiada, pontho mkadamu wa Nyumba ya Mulungu. Tenepo basako nkhuonesesa kuti nyansala pyache, ule ambapiyesa mprofeti, wammanga matandadza pontho kamuikha goli-goli yasimbi m'khosi mwache." 
Jeremiah29:27 Apo iwe watani unakhonda kumsumulula Yeremia wa ku Anatoti, ule ambapiyesa mprofeti pakati panu?" 
Jeremiah29:28 Iye athema kukhondeswa kuchita tenepo, thangwi iye adapanga anthu m'dziko ya Babiloni kuti anakhala pa unyaperezo kweneko ndzidzi ukulu ene, pontho kuti amange nyumba mbakhazikika, alime minda mbadya pinavuna iwopyo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah29:29 Kwache Zefania nyansembe adawerenga kalata ile kuna Yeremia mprofeti," 
Jeremiah29:30 natenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Yeremia mbati," 
Jeremiah29:31 “Tumiza mphangwa izi kuna anthu onsene ali pa unyaperezo ale: ‘MBUYA alonga pya Shemaia tenepa: Na thangwi yakuti Shemaia alonga mphangwa zauprofeti kuna imwe podi kwene kuti sidamtume ndine tayu, pontho iye akuchitisani kukhulupira pyakunama," 
Jeremiah29:32 natenepo MBUYA akulonga tenepa: Ine ndinati nditchunyuse Shemaia na pidzukulu pyache pene. Iye nkhabe dzasala na mbewu na ibodzi ene tayu pakati pa anthu ache, pontho iye nkhabe dzaona pinthu pyadidi pinafuna ine dzachitira anthu tayu, thangwi iye afunzisa anthu pyakundipandukira. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.’ ”" 
Jeremiah30:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna Yeremia mbati," 
Jeremiah30:2 “MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele akulonga tenepa: Lemba m'bukhu mafala onsene alonga inewa kuna iwe," 
Jeremiah30:3 thangwi ndzidzi unati ufike unafuna ine dzabweza anthu anga, Israele na Yuda. Ine ndinati ndiadzese kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo kwenda kudziko idapasa ine makolo awo ile. Tenepo iwo anaikwata pontho kukhala yawo ene. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah30:4 MBUYA akulonga pya anthu a ku Israele na Yuda tenepa: 
Jeremiah30:5 “Chiliro cha mantha chafika m'makutu mwanga, chiliro cha mantha nee mtendere tayu." 
Jeremiah30:6 Nyerezerani mbamuvunza kuti: Ayi mamuna anakwanisa kubala mwana? Apo thangwi yache ninji ndikuona mamuna wamphamvu ali manja nama pamimba ninga mkazi wa mimba pakubala? Thangwi yache ninji munthu onsene kunkhope kwache kwamala kwinyika-kwinyika? 
Jeremiah30:7 Nsiku yeneyo inakhala yakugoswa pyakwanga! Nkhabe nsiku inango inakhala ninga yeneyi tayu. Inakhala nsiku ya nyatwa kuna Yakobo, kwache iye anati adapulumuke.”" 
Jeremiah30:8 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga kuti, “Ine ndinabulusa goli-goli ili m'khosi mwawo, pontho ndinagwanda njema zawo; iwo nkhabe dzakhalave anyaperezo kudziko yachilendo tayu." 
Jeremiah30:9 M'mbuto mwache iwo anatumikira MBUYA Mulungu wawo, pontho Davite mfumu wawo, anafuna dzaasankhulira ine ale." 
Jeremiah30:10 Natenepo lekani chita mantha, imwe pidzukulu pya Yakobo. Imwe Aisraele, lekani taya mtima. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA. Ndinakupulumusani kubulukira kudziko ya kutali; ndinapulumusa pidzukulu pyako kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo. Imwe munakhala pontho pakupata na pamtendere; nkhabe munthu anafuna dzakukuthuswani tayu." 
Jeremiah30:11 Ine ndili namwe pontho ndinakupulumusani. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA. Podi kwene kuti ndinamala vunga madzinza onsene, kule kudakubalalisani ine pakati pawo, kwache ine nkhabe dzakuvungani monsene mwene tayu. Ine ndinakutchunyusani, kwache ndinapichita mwachilungamo; ine nkhabe dzakusiyani kwene okhonda kukutchunyusani tayu!”" 
Jeremiah30:12 MBUYA akulonga tenepa: “Chironda chanu chasanduka njinda mwakuti nkhabe kwanisa kupola tayu. 
Jeremiah30:13 Nkhabe na mbodzi ene wakukuikhirani kunduli tayu, nkhabe mtombwe wakuwangisa pironda pyanu, pontho nkhabe chidikhiro chakuti munawanga tayu." 
Jeremiah30:14 Ashamwali anu onsene amala kukuthawani; iwo nkhabeve kukutsalakanani tayu. Ine ndakumenyani ninga nyamalwa mbandikutchunyusani ninga nyakukala mtima, thangwi kudawa kwanu kwachita kunyanya, pontho pyakudawa pyanu pyainjipa pyakwanga pene." 
Jeremiah30:15 Mwatani munadungunya na pironda pyanupyo; ipyo nkhabe kwanisa kupola tayu. Ine ndakutchunyusani ninga tenepo, thangwi kudawa kwanu kwachita kunyanya, pontho pyakudawa pyanu pyainjipa pyakwanga pene." 
Jeremiah30:16 Kwache onsene anakusanyisani, anasanyiswambo; anyamalwanu onsene anati aendeswe kudziko ya unyaperezo. Onsene anakuponderezani ale, anaponderezwambo; onsene ale anakupokoserani pinthu pyanu, pinthu pyawo pinapokoserwambo." 
Jeremiah30:17 Kwache ndinakuchitisani pontho kukhala na moyo wadidi mbandiwangisa pironda pyanu, podi imwe mwayeswa ninga nyakusowa basa, Zioni, ule nkhabe na mbodzi ene ambatsalakana pya iye tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah30:18 MBUYA akulonga tenepa: “Ine ndinachitisa pontho pinthu pya pidzukulu pya Yakobo kufamba mwadidi, mbandivera nsisi banja yonsene; Yerusalemu anati amangwe pontho pamadembe pache, pontho nyumbache yachifumu inaimira pontho pambuto pache pale." 
Jeremiah30:19 Mwenemo munabuluka nyimbo zakupereka nazo takhuta, pontho mkhuwo wakukomerwa. Ndinaainjipisa, iwo nkhabe dzapunguka tayu; ndinaapasa chilemedzo, pontho iwo nkhabe dzalulupiswa tayu." 
Jeremiah30:20 Anawo anakhala ninga ontho a ndzidzi wa mvula zakale; dzinzawo inakhazikika pamaso panga; anyakuapondereza onsene ndinati ndiatchunyuse. 
Jeremiah30:21 Mkadamu wawo anakhala mbodzi wa iwo; mtongi wawo anabulukira pakati pawo. Ine ndinamdzesa chifupi mbakhala thiri-thiri na ine, thangwi mbani anawanga mtima dzapipereka yekha ene kukhala thiri-thiri na ine pano? Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah30:22 Tenepo imwe munakhala anthu anga, inembo ndinakhala Mulungu wanu.”" 
Jeremiah30:23 Yang'anani, chonzi cha MBUYA chinanyanduka, thangwi ya ukali wache, mphepo ya shungu inamenya pamsolo pa anyakudawa." 
Jeremiah30:24 Ukali wakugoswa wa MBUYA nkhabe dzambombowa tayu mpakana iye amalise pyonsene pikhafuna mtimache. Nsiku zinadzazi imwe munati mupivese penepi. 
Jeremiah31:1 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ndzidzi wenewo ine ndinakhala Mulungu wa madzinza onsene a Israele, tenepo iwo anakhala anthu anga.”" 
Jeremiah31:2 MBUYA akulonga tenepa: “Anthu adapulumuka pankhonda ale, ndinaakomera mtima m'thando yatchetcha; ndinabwera kupereka kupuma kuna Israele!”" 
Jeremiah31:3 M'nduli mule MBUYA adaonekera kuna ife kulonga kuti: “Na kukufunani kwanga kokhonda mala ine ndidakufunani; ine sidaleke tayu kukukomerani mtima. 
Jeremiah31:4 Ine ndinakuchitisani pontho kukhazikika, tenepo munakhazikikadi, imwe anthu a ku Israele. Imwe munati mukwate pontho pisekese pyanu mbamubuluka panja kuvina thangwi ya kukomerwa." 
Jeremiah31:5 Minda yamfesa imwe munailima pontho pamapiri a Samaria; anyakulima anabzala mfesa mbakomerwa na kuzidya. 
Jeremiah31:6 Inafika nsiku inafuna dzalira anyakulondali paphiri ya Eferemu kuti, ‘Tendeni tikwire ku Zioni, kuna MBUYA Mulungu wathu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah31:7 MBUYA akulonga tenepa: “Imbani na kukomerwa thangwi ya Yakobo; imbani thangwi ya tchamgudu wa madzinza. Kukuza kwanu MBUYA mbakuveke mbamulonge kuti, ‘MBUYA, pulumusani anthu anu, anthu akusalira a Israele ale.’ ”" 
Jeremiah31:8 Yang'anani, kubulukira kudziko yakumpoto ine ndinaadzesa mbandiagumanyisa kubulukira kumadolomero a dziko yapansi. Pakati pawo panakhala maboli-boli na anyakulamala, akazi amimba, pontho na akazi akulekwa; dzinza ikulu ikubwerera." 
Jeremiah31:9 Iwo anabwera chikakamira ntchichi; iwo anapemphera ndzidzi unaabweza ine. Kumikulo ya madzi ndinati ndiatsogolere, na njira zakumyalala, mule iwo nkhabe dzagwegweduka tayu, thangwi ndine babache Israele, pontho Eferemu ndi mtombo wanga." 
Jeremiah31:10 “Veserani mafala a MBUYA, imwe madzinza; mbamualalike kumadziko a m'khundu-khundu mwa bara. Iye ule adabalalisa Aisraele, anati aagumanyise mbaayang'anira ninga makabuswa kuyang'anira mabira." 
Jeremiah31:11 Thangwi ine, MBUYA, ndapulumusa Yakobo mbandiaombola m'manja mwa dzinza yamphamvu kupiringana iwo."
