Jeremiah31:12 Iwo anabwera mbaimba na kukomerwa pansonga ya phiri ya Zioni; iwo anasekera thangwi ya udidi wa MBUYA, mapira, vinyu na mafuta aolivi, anamphulu na anabira. Iwo anakhala ninga munda wakuthirirwa mwadidi, tenepo iwo nkhabe dzatsukwalave tayu." 
Jeremiah31:13 Amiyali anati avine mbakomerwa, aphale na nkhalamba zene chibodzi-bodzi. Kutsukwala kwawo ndinakusandusa kukomerwa; m'mbuto mwa kutsukwala ndinaachitisa kukomerwa mbandiapasa chithondozo." 
Jeremiah31:14 Anyansembe ndinaakhutisa na phoso yakuinjipa, pontho anthu anga ndinaapasa pinthu pyadidi. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah31:15 MBUYA akulonga tenepa: “Chiliro chikuveka mu Rama, kusintili na kukalala; Rakele akulira anache mbakhonda kupukutwa misozi, thangwi anache onsene amala lowa.”" 
Jeremiah31:16 “Matama, mbupukute misozi, thangwi mabasako onsene unatambira nawo mfupo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA. Kubulukira kudziko ya anyamalwa, iwo anati abwerere." 
Jeremiah31:17 Chidikhiro chilipo pontho kutsogolo kwako nkhwadidi; anako anabwerera kudziko yawo ene. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA. 
Jeremiah31:18 “Kusintili konsene kwa Aeferemu ndakuva kuti: ‘MBUYA, imwe mudatitchunyusa; ife takhala ninga mwanamphulu okhonda funziswa, kwache imwe mudatifunzisa kukuverani. Tibwezeni, tenepo tinati tibwerere kuna imwe; thangwi ndimwe MBUYA Mulungu wathu." 
Jeremiah31:19 Ife tidabauka kubuluka kuna imwe, mbwenye chinchino tatchunyuka; tenepo pidatoma ife kupivesa mwadidi, tidaphata phutu. Tidachitiswa manyadzo pontho tidalulupiswa, mbatitawira pyakudawa pya uphaleathu.’" 
Jeremiah31:20 Ayi Eferemu si mwananga wapamtima tayu, mwana ambakomerwa na ine ule? Podi kwene kazinji kene ndimbachita mwakupokanyisana naye, ine nkhabe dzamduwalira tayu. Natenepo mtimanga umbakhala pana iye; mbandimvera nsisi zikulu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah31:21 “Ikhani pikwangwani m'njira; m'njira ikhanimo pidziwiso. Kumbukani njira ikulu, msewu udadza na imwe ule. Anthu a ku Israele, bwererani, bwererani kumaluwani kwanu." 
Jeremiah31:22 Ayi munatsalakatika mpakana lini, imwe anthu okhonda khulupirika. MBUYA analenga chinthu chinango chitswa padziko yapansi, mkazi anatchinjiriza mamuna.”" 
Jeremiah31:23 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, Mulungu wa Israele akulonga kuti, “Ndingabwezera anthu kudziko ya kwawo, iwo anati alonge pontho m'dziko ya Yuda na maluwani ache ene kuti, ‘MBUYA mbakutsanzayise iwe, Mbuto yakulungama, pontho iwe, Phiri yakupambulika.’" 
Jeremiah31:24 Anthu anakhala pabodzi pene mu Yuda na maluwani ache onsene, anyakulima pabodzi pene na amakabuswa akudyesa mabirawo." 
Jeremiah31:25 Anyakutopa ndinati ndiasisimuse mbandikhutisa anyakukomoka na njala.” 
Jeremiah31:26 Penepa ndidalamuka mbandiyang'ana. Chitulo changa chikhali chakukoma pyakwanga! 
Jeremiah31:27 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Nsiku zikudza zinafuna ine kudzaza dziko ya Israele na Yuda na anthu pontho nyama." 
Jeremiah31:28 Ninga mudachitira ine mphole-mphole kuadula, kuagomola, kuavunga, na kuataya pontho kudzesa nyatwa pana iwo, sasawambo ndinachita mphole-mphole kuabzala na kuamanga." 
Jeremiah31:29 Ndzidzi wenewo ungafika anthu nkhabe dzalongave tayu kuti, ‘Makolo adya mfesa zakujuja, tenepo azwirizwa ndi mano a ana.’" 
Jeremiah31:30 “M'mbuto mwache munthu onsene anafa, thangwi ya pyakudawa pyache; munthu onsene anadya mfesa zakujujayo, mano ache ndiye anafuna zwirizwa.”" 
Jeremiah31:31 MBUYA akulonga tenepa: “Ndzidzi ukudza unafuna ine dzasasanya chiverano chachinchino na dzinza ya Israele, pontho na mbumba ya Yuda." 
Jeremiah31:32 Icho nkhabe dzakhala ninga chiverano chidasasanya ine na makolo awo chile, ndzidzi udaaphata ine pamkono kuabulusa m'dziko ya Iguputo ule tayu, thangwi iwo adaswa chiverano podi kwene kuti ine ndikhali mankhadzi awo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah31:33 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ichi ntchiverano chinafuna ine dzasasanya na anthu anga, Aisraele, nsiku zenezo zingagwanda: Ine ndinaikha mwambo wanga m'manyerezero mwawo mbandiulemba mumtima mwawo. Ine ndinakhala Mulungu wawo, iwombo mbakhala anthu anga." 
Jeremiah31:34 Nkhabeve dzafunika munthu kufunzisa tsanthembache, penu munthu kulonga tayu kuna mbaleache kuti, ‘Dziwa MBUYA,’ thangwi iwo onsene anandidziwa, mkulu mpakana mwana. Ine ndinalekerera pyakudawa pyawo, pontho nkhabe dzakumbukave tayu umambalawo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah31:35 MBUYA akulonga tenepa: “Iye ule nyakuchitisa dzuwa kugaka na masikati, ule adachitisa mwezi na nyenyezi kuonesa cheza na mosiku, ule ambavundula bara, towera mabimbi amenye, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndiye dzinache:" 
Jeremiah31:36 Ngakhala mwambo wa pinthu pyakulengwapi unafudzika pamaso panga, penepo pidzukulu pya Israele pinalekambo kukhala dzinza pamaso panga. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah31:37 Ngakhala thambo yakudzulu inakwanisa kupimwa, pontho ngakhala maziko a dziko yapansi anakwanisa kugumanwa, penepo ine ndinakhonda pidzukulu pyonsene pya Israele, thangwi ya pinthu pyonsene pyachita iwo pile. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah31:38 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ndzidzi ukudza unafuna Yerusalemu dzamangwa pontho ninga mzinda, kubulukira ku Nsanja ya Hananele kumadokero dzuwa mpakana ku Msuwo Wapankhomo." 
Jeremiah31:39 Madire ache anathimiza kwenda kumadokero dzuwa a phiri ya Garebu mpakana ku Goa. 
Jeremiah31:40 Phedi yonsene kule kuna masiye, pontho kukhuku, pontho kuminda yonsene kumtunda kwa phedi ya Kidroni mpakana kunkhomo ku Msuwo wa Akavalo kumabulukiro dzuwa, kunapambulirwa kuna MBUYA. Mzindawo nkhabeve dzavungwa penu kugomolwa tayu.”" 
Jeremiah32:1 Chaka chamakumawiri mwenemo Zedekia mbali mfumu wa Yuda, chile chikhali chaka chakhumi na chisere Nebukadinezara mbali mfumu wa Babiloni, MBUYA adalonga kuna ine, Yeremia." 
Jeremiah32:2 Ndzidzi wenewo anyankhondo a ku Babiloni adazungulira mzinda, tenepo ine, Yeremia mprofeti ndidafungirwa muchintalo cha anyakulondali cha nyumba yachifumu ya mu Yuda." 
Jeremiah32:3 Mfumu Zedekia akhadandifungira mwenemo mbandivunza mbati, “Thangwi yache njanji ukulonga mphangwa zauprofeti kuti, ‘MBUYA akulonga tenepa: Ine ndinachitisa mfumu wa ku Babiloni kudza dzapokosera mzindawu," 
Jeremiah32:4 pontho kuti Mfumu Zedekia nkhabe dzapulumuka tayu. Iye anaperekwa m'manja mwa mfumu wa ku Babiloni; iye anati aonane naye maso na maso mbalongesana naye. 
Jeremiah32:5 Iye anakwata Zedekia kwenda ku Babiloni mbakakhala kweneko mpakana ndichite kuna iye pinthu pinafuna ine. Ngakhala iwe unayesera kumenyana na anthu a ku Babiloni iwe nkhabe dzakwanisa kuakunda tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.’ ” 
Jeremiah32:6 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine, Yeremia, tenepa:" 
Jeremiah32:7 “Hanamele mwana wamamuna wa mbuyako Shalumu anati adze kuna iwe mbalonga kuti, ‘Gula mundanga wa ku Anatoti, thangwi iwe ninga mbaleanga chadi-chadi una utongi kugula mundawo, pontho ndiwe wathema kuuombola.’ ”" 
Jeremiah32:8 Tenepo ninga montho mukhadalongera MBUYA, Hanamele adadza kuna ine muchintalo cha anyakulondali mukhali ine mule mbalonga kuna ine kuti, “Gula mundanga wa ku Anatoti m'nthemba ya Benjemani, thangwi iwe utongi uli nawo wakuuombola mbuukwata kukhala wako ene, tenepo pigulire wekha ene mundawo.” Natenepo ine ndidapidziwa kuti MBUYA akhadandipanga kale pya pinthu penepi;" 
Jeremiah32:9 penepo ine ndidagula munda ku Anatoti wa mbuyanga Hanamele, mbandimulengesera kobiri zache pakonta ya masiliva khumi na anomwe." 
Jeremiah32:10 Ine ndidalembapo dzinanga pamakalata akutsikimizira pya munda udagula ine mbandiimyatira pamaso pa mboni. Tenepo ndidapima kobirizo na mdida. 
Jeremiah32:11 Ine ndidakwata makalata onsene awiri adagulira ine munda ale, ibodzi yakumyatirwa, ile ikhalonga pya pinthu pidaphatizana ife pakugula munda ule, pontho inango yokhonda myatirwa." 
Jeremiah32:12 Ine ndidapereka makalatawo kuna Baruki mwana Neria mdzukuluache Maseia. Ndidaapereka kuna iye pamaso pa Hanamele mwana mbuyanga ule, pontho pamaso pa mboni zikhadalembambo madzinawo pamakalata ale, pontho na pa Ayuda onsene akhakhala muchintalo cha anyakulondali ale." 
Jeremiah32:13 Ine ndidapereka pamaso pawo kuna Baruki na matongero akuti," 
Jeremiah32:14 “MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, Mulungu wa Israele, akukupanga kuti: Ukwate makalata onsene awiri, yakumyatirwa na yokhonda myatirwa akutsikimizira pyakugula kwa mundawo, mbupiikhe m'chitomba, towera pikoyeke mwenemo mpakana pyaka pinadzapyo." 
Jeremiah32:15 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, Mulungu wa Israele, akulonga tenepa: Nyumba, minda na minda yamfesa pinagulwa pontho m'dziko muno.”" 
Jeremiah32:16 Pidamala ine kupereka makalata akutsimikizira pya munda wenewu kuna Baruki mwana Neria, ndidapemphera kuna MBUYA kuti," 
Jeremiah32:17 “MBUYA Mulungu, ndimwe mudasasanya kudzulu na dziko yapansi na mphamvu zanu zikulu, pontho na mkono wanu wamphamvu; nkhabe chinthu chakunensa kuna imwe tayu." 
Jeremiah32:18 Imwe mumbaonesa kuafuna kwanu kokhonda mala anthu pikwi-pikwi, kwache imwe pontho mumbatchunyusa anthu thangwi ya kudawika kudachita makolo awo. Imwe ndimwe Mulungu wamkulu pontho wamphamvu; ule dzinache ndi MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Jeremiah32:19 Manyerezero anu ngakuzwika pyakwanga pontho mabasanu ngamphamvu. Maso anu ambakhala pana njira za anthu; imwe mumbafupa munthu onsene mwakuthemerana na makhaliro pontho na mabasache. 
Jeremiah32:20 Imwe mudachita pidzindikiro na pyakudodomesa m'dziko ya Iguputo mbamuthimiza kupichita mpakana lero, mu Israele na pakati pa madzinza anango onsene mwakuti imwe mwadziwika konsene kwene ninga muna ipyo lero." 
Jeremiah32:21 Imwe mudabulusa anthu anu, Aisraele, m'dziko ya Iguputo pakuchita pidzindikiro na pyakudodomesa na mphamvu zanu zikulu, pontho na mkono wanu wamphamvu, pontho na kugoswa kwanu kukulu." 
Jeremiah32:22 Imwe mudaapasa dziko yeneyi, dziko yamphonje idadumbira imwe kuna makolo awo ile." 
Jeremiah32:23 Iwo adapitamo mbaikwata kukhala yawo ene, kwache iwo hadakuvereni penu kuteweza mwambo wanu tayu; iwo hadachite pinthu pidaatonga imwe pile tayu. Tenepo imwe mudagwisa pana iwo nyatwa yonseneyi." 
Jeremiah32:24 “Yang'anani, anthu a ku Babiloni amuluka mataka kuzungulira mzindawu kufuna kuusosa. Nkhondo, njala, pontho muliri pinachitisa anyamalwa kupokosera mzindawu. Penepa munakwanisa kuona kuti mafala adalonga imwe ale akwana-kwana." 
Jeremiah32:25 Podi kwene kuti mzindawo unapokoserwa na anthu a ku Babiloni, kwache imwe MBUYA Mulungu mudalonga kuna ine kuti, ‘Gula mundawo na kobiri zasiliva pontho pakhale mboni kuti mundawo wauguladi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah32:26 Kubuluka penepo MBUYA adalonga kuna ine, Yeremia mbati," 
Jeremiah32:27 “Ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wa anthu onsene. Ayi pana chinthu chakunensa pyakwanga kuna ine? 
Jeremiah32:28 Natenepo MBUYA akulonga tenepa: Ine ndili chifupi kupereka mzindawu m'manja mwa anthu a ku Babiloni pontho kuna Nebukadinezara; iwo anati aupokosere. 
Jeremiah32:29 Anthu a ku Babiloni ale anasosa chinchino mzindawu, anapitamo mbaupisa moto; anaugomola pabodzi pene na nyumba, zile mudandizhangalisa anthu pakupereka pyakufukiza pyakununkhira pansoyi kuna milungu Baala, pontho pakupereka nsembe za kumwa kuna milungu inango." 
Jeremiah32:30 “Anthu a ku Israele na Yuda pyachita iwo pamaso panga kutomera uwanawo mphyakudawa pene basi nee chinango tayu; ndimomwene anthu andizhangalisa na pinthu pidasasanya iwo na manjawo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA. 
Jeremiah32:31 Kubulukira pa nsiku idamangwa mzindawo kufikirana lero, mzindawu walamusa kuzhangali kwanga pontho ukali wanga pikulu pene mwakuti ine ndathema kuubulusa pamaso panga." 
Jeremiah32:32 Anthu a ku Israele na Yuda andizhangalisa pakuchita pinthu pyakuipa pikulu, iwo pabodzi pene na mafumu awo, mathubu awo, anyansembe awo, maprofeti awo, pontho na mzika za ku Yuda na Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah32:33 Iwo andipasa nkhodolo, nee kundipasa nkhope zawo tayu; podi kwene kuti ine sidasiye kuafunzisa tayu. Iwo hadandivesere penu kuikha konta pinthu pikhalonga ine pile tayu." 
Jeremiah32:34 Iwo adaikha mifanikizo yakunyansa m'Nyumbanga, mule mudathema ine kupembedzwa, mbaiswipisa." 
Jeremiah32:35 Iwo amangira milungu Baala maguwa ansembe pa Phedi ya Beni-Hinomu, towera apereke nsembe anawo achimuna na achikazi ene kuna Moleki. Ine sidaatonge kuchita tenepo tayu, penumbo kupinyerezera kuti iwo achite pinthu pyakuchitisa manyadzo ninga penepi mbachitisa anthu a ku Yuda kudawa.”" 
Jeremiah32:36 MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Yeremia, anthu akulonga kuti nkhondo, njala pontho muliri ndiye pinafuna dzachitisa anthu a ku Babiloni dzapokosera mzindawu. Chinchino vesera pinthu pyonsene pinafuna ine longapi:" 
Jeremiah32:37 Ine ndinagumanyisa anthu onsene ale akhabulukira kumadziko onsene kukhadaabalalisira ine thangwi ya kuzhangali kwanga kukulu pontho ukali wanga wakugoswa, mbandiadzesa kumbuto yeneyi. Tenepo ndinaachitisa kukhala mwenemo pakupata." 
Jeremiah32:38 Iwo anakhala anthu anga, inembo mbandikhala Mulungu wawo." 
Jeremiah32:39 Ndinaachitisa kukhala na manyerezero abodzi ene basi moyo wawo onsene: kundilemedza ndzidzi onsene, towera pinthu pyawo iwo na pidzukulu pyawo piafambire mwadidi." 
Jeremiah32:40 Ine ndinachita nawo chiverano chokhonda mala. Ine nkhabe dzakhonda kuachitira pinthu pyadidi tayu, pontho ndinaachitisa kundigopa ine pano na mtimawo onsene, towera aleke bauka pontho kubuluka kuna ine." 
Jeremiah32:41 Ine ndinakomerwa na kuachitira pinthu pyadidi, pontho ndinakhala wakukhulupirika monsene mwene na mtimanga onsene kuakhazikisa m'dziko mwenemu." 
Jeremiah32:42 “Ninga montho mwadzesera ine nyatwayi pana iwo, tenepo ndinaapasa pinthu pyonsene pyadidi pidadumbira ine pile. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah32:43 Minda inagulwa pontho m'dziko yeneyi, ile ikhalonga anthu kuti inasanduka madembe kule mbalame penu nyama nkhabe dzakhalamo tayu, pontho ile yaperekwa m'manja mwa anthu a ku Babiloni." 
Jeremiah32:44 Anthu anagula minda mbapalembwa madzina pamakalata akutsikimizira pya kugula mindayo ale amyatirwa pamaso pa mboni. Penepi pinachitika m'nthemba ya Benjemani, m'midzi yakuzungulira Yerusalemu, m'maluwani a m'dziko ya mapiri, m'tchinde mwa mapiri, na kuthando yatchetcha ya Negebu. Ine ndinabwezera pontho anthu anga kudziko yeneyi. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah33:1 Pikhali ine, Yeremia, nyaperezo muchintalo cha anyakulondali, MBUYA adalonga pontho kuna ine." 
Jeremiah33:2 MBUYA, ule adasasanya dziko yapansi, adaiumba mbaithikitiza pambuto pache, dzinache ndi MBUYA, akulonga tenepa:" 
Jeremiah33:3 “Ndichemereni, tenepo ine ndinakutawirani; ine ndinakupangani pinthu pyakudodomesa pontho pyakuzwika pyakuti imwe nkhabe kupidziwa tayu." 
Jeremiah33:4 MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele akulonga tenepa pya nyumba za mu Yerusalemu, pontho na nyumba za chifumu za mu Yuda, zile zidagomolwa thangwi ya kuzungulirwa na kusoswako." 
Jeremiah33:5 Anthu a ku Babiloni akudza dzachita nkhondo. Iwo anadzaza nyumbazo na mitembo ya anthu anafuna ine dzapha thangwi ya kuzhangali pontho ukali wanga ale. Ine ndapasa nkhodolo mzindawu thangwi ya pinthu pyakuipa pidachita anthu ache. 
Jeremiah33:6 Kwache ine ndinawangisa mzinda na anthu ache ene mbandiapasa pontho mphamvu. Ine ndinaatchinjiriza monsene mwene mbandiapasa mtendere. 
Jeremiah33:7 Ndinachitisa pinthu pya Yuda na Israele kufamba mwadidi mbandiabwezera ninga montho mukhali iwo kale. 
Jeremiah33:8 Ine ndinaachenesera pyakudawa pikhachita iwo pile mbandialekerera pyakudawa na kupandukira kwawo konsene kudachita iwo kule. 
Jeremiah33:9 Yerusalemu anakhala phata ya kukomerwa, chilemedzo na kunyada kuna ine; dzinza yonsene padziko yapansi inachita mantha mbatetemera angava pya pinthu pyadidi pinachitira ine anthu anga a ku Yerusalemu, pontho na pya kufamba mwadidi kwa pinthu kunafuna ine dzachitisa mumzindamu.”" 
Jeremiah33:10 MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Anthu ambalonga kuti mbuto yeneyi yasanduka madembe mwakuti anthu penu nyama nkhabe khalamo tayu. Iwo akulonga pyakuona; maluwani a Yuda na misewu ya Yerusalemu nkhabemo anthu; nkhabemo anthu penu nyama tayu. Kwache m'mbuto zenezi imwe munavamo pontho" 
Jeremiah33:11 mkhuwo wa kukomerwa na kusekera pontho maphwando a kukazhali. Imwe munava anthu akuimba uku akudza na nsembe zakupereka nazo takhuta ku Nyumba ya Mulungu; iwo analonga kuti, ‘Perekani takhuta kuna MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, thangwi iye ngwadidi; kutifuna kwache nkhokhonda mala.’ Ndinachitisa dzikoyi pinthu pyache kufamba mwadidi ninga mukhali ipyo kale. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah33:12 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene adalonga mbati, “M'dziko yeneyi, ile ndi thando yatchetcha pontho nkhabe anthu penu nyama tayu, munakhala pontho mpovu, ule amakabuswa anakwanisa kudyesa mabirawo." 
Jeremiah33:13 M'maluwani a m'dziko ya mapiri, m'tchinde mwa mapiri, kuthando yatchetcha ya Negebu, m'nthemba ya Benjemani, m'midzi yakuzungulira Yerusalemu na m'maluwani a Yuda amakabuswa anati alengese pontho mabirawo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah33:14 MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Ndzidzi ukudza unafuna ine dzachitisa kudumbira kudachita ine kuna anthu a ku Israele na Yuda kukwana-kwana." 
Jeremiah33:15 Pandzidzi wenewo ndinasankhula chidzukulu chakulungama cha Davite kukhala mfumu. Mfumuyo anachita pinthu pyakulungama pontho pyakuthema m'dziko monsenemu. 
Jeremiah33:16 Anthu a ku Yuda na Yerusalemu anapulumuswa mbakhala mwakutchinjirizwa. Mzinda unachemerwa na dzina yakuti, ‘MBUYA Chipulumuso chathu.’" 
Jeremiah33:17 Thangwi MBUYA akulonga tenepa: Davite nkhabe dzasowa tayu chidzukulu chakukhala pampando wachifumu mu Israele," 
Jeremiah33:18 pontho anyansembe ale mbadzinza ya Levi nkhabe dzasowa tayu munthu wakundiphatira basa na kupereka nsembe zakupyerera, nsembe za mapira, na nsembe zinango kuna ine kwenda na kwenda.”" 
Jeremiah33:19 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine, Yeremia mbati," 
Jeremiah33:20 “MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Ine ndasasanya chiverano na masikati pontho na mosiku, towera ndzidzi onsene pichitike pandzidzi wache wakuthema." 
Jeremiah33:21 Montho-monthomo ndasasanya chiverano na nyabasanga Davite kuti ndzidzi onsene iye anakhala na chidzukulu kukhala mfumu, pontho ndasasanya chiverano na anyansembe a dzinza ya Levi kuti iwo anditumikire ndzidzi onsene; tenepo piverano penepi nkhabe kwanisa dzaswiwa tayu." 
Jeremiah33:22 Ine ndinainjipisa pidzukulu pya nyabasanga Davite, pontho anyansembe a Chilevi, ambaphata basa pamaso panga ale, mwakuti anakhala okhonda lengeseka ninga nyenyezi, pontho akukhonda pimika ninga tchetcha ya pagombe ya bara.”" 
Jeremiah33:23 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine, Yeremia mbati," 
Jeremiah33:24 “Ayi iwe waona mule munalongera anthu kuti, ‘MBUYA akhonda maufumu awiri adasankhula iye ale?’ Natenepo iwo akululupisa anthu anga mbakhonda kuayesa ninga dzinza." 
Jeremiah33:25 Kwache MBUYA akulonga tenepa: Ine ndidakhazikisa chiverano na masikati pontho na mosiku, pontho kuikha matongero akukhazikika ambafambisa kudzulu na dziko yapansi ale." 
Jeremiah33:26 Ninga mwapichitiradi ine penepi, natenepo ndinati ndikoye chiverano chidachita ine na pidzukulu pya Yakobo na Davite nyabasanga. Ine ndinati ndisankhule mbodzi wa pidzukulu pyache kutonga pidzukulu pya Abrahamu, Isake na Yakobo. Thangwi ndinavera nsisi anthu anga mbandichitisa pinthu pyawo kuafambira pontho mwadidi.”" 
Jeremiah34:1 Mfumu Nebukadinezara wa ku Babiloni, pontho anyankhondo ache onsene pabodzi pene na mafumu onsene na anthu awo akhali pansi pa utongi wache ale, adamenyana na Yerusalemu pabodzi pene na maluwani akuzungulira. Ndzidzi wenewo MBUYA adalonga kuna ine, Yeremia." 
Jeremiah34:2 MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele, adandipanga kwenda kuna Zedekia mfumu wa Yuda kampanga kuti, “MBUYA akulonga tenepa: Ine ndili chifupi kupereka mzindawu m'manja mwa mfumu wa ku Babiloni, tenepo iye anaupisa moto." 
Jeremiah34:3 Iwe nkhabe dzaphuzumuka m'manja mwache tayu; iwe unati uphatwe mbuperekwa m'manja mwache. Iwe unati uonane na mfumu wa ku Babiloni maso na maso mbulongesana naye; kubuluka penepo iwe unati ukwatwe kwenda ku Babiloni. 
Jeremiah34:4 Kwache iwe Zedekia mfumu wa Yuda, vesera pinafuna ine, MBUYA, kulonga kuna iwe: Iwe nkhabe dzaphiwa pankhondo tayu;" 
Jeremiah34:5 iwe unafa mwadidi. Ninga mudachitira anthu kuphatisa moto pamaliro a makolo ako, mafumu akale iwe mbudzati balwa ale, sasawa iwo anaphatisambo moto pamaliro pako. Iwo anakusintili mbalonga mbati, ‘Mama ine, mfumu wathu alowa!’ Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah34:6 Tenepo Yeremia mprofeti adenda katula mphangwa zenezi kuna Mfumu Zedekia mu Yerusalemu," 
Jeremiah34:7 mwenemo anyankhondo a ku Babiloni akhachita nkhondo na Yerusalemu pontho na mizinda inango ya mu Yuda, Lakishi na Azeka, thangwi mizinda miwiriyi ndiye idasalira yakutchingwa na mpanda mu Yuda." 
Jeremiah34:8 MBUYA adalonga kuna Yeremia pidamala Mfumu Zedekia na anthu a ku Yerusalemu kuchita chiverano chakusudzula mabitchu. 
Jeremiah34:9 Munthu onsene adathema kusudzula mabitchu ache a Chiheberi, amuna na akazi ene, towera paleke khala munthu na mbodzi ene wakukoya bitchu wa Chiheberi." 
Jeremiah34:10 Mathubu na anthu onsene adaphatizana kusudzula mabitchu awo, amuna na akazi ene, pontho kuti hanaayesave mabitchu tayu. Tenepo iwo adaasudzuladi." 
Jeremiah34:11 Mbwenye m'nduli mwache iwo adasanduza manyerezero awo mbaaphata amuna na akazi ene akhadasudzula iwo kale ale, kuakhakhamiza kukhala pontho mabitchu." 
Jeremiah34:12 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna ine, Yeremia, kapanga anthu kuti," 
Jeremiah34:13 “Ine, MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele, ndikulonga tenepa: Ine ndidasasanya chiverano na makolo anu pidaabulusa ine ku Iguputo, dziko ya ubitchu kule. Ine ndidaapanga kuti," 
Jeremiah34:14 ‘Pyaka pinomwe pyonsene munthu onsene wa imwe athema kusudzula mabitchu onsene a Chiheberi ale adapigulisa okha ene kuna imwe. Iye angamala kukuphatirani basa pyaka pitanthatu imwe mwathema kumsudzula.’ Kwache makolo anu hadapiikhe konta penu kuvesera pikhalonga ine pile tayu. 
Jeremiah34:15 Si kale ene tayu, idatawira imwe na mulomo wanu kuchita pinthu pyakundikomera. Munthu onsene wa imwe adasudzula mabitchu a Chiisraele, tenepo imwe mudachita chiverano pamaso panga m'Nyumba imbadziwika na dzinanga ile." 
Jeremiah34:16 Kwache m'nduli mwache imwe mudasanduza manyerezero anu mbamululupisa dzinanga. Monsenene mudaphata pontho mabitchu anu, amuna na akazi ene, adasudzula imwe kale mwakufuna kwanu ale, tenepo mudaakhakhamiza kukhala pontho mabitchu." 
Jeremiah34:17 Natenepo MBUYA akulonga tenepa: Imwe mudakhonda kundivera; imwe nee mudapereke utumbe kuna Aisraele anzanu tayu. Pano ndinakupasanimbo utumbe, utumbe wakufa pankhondo, na muliri, pontho na njala. Ine ndinakuchitisani kukhala chakugumisa manungo kuna maufumu onsene a padziko yapansi." 
Jeremiah34:18 Anthu ale aswa chiverano changa mbakhonda teweza matongero a chiveranocho, ine ndinaachitisa kukhala ninga mwanamphulu ambagwanda iwo mapindi mawiri, kubuluka penepo mbafamba na pakati pache ule." 
Jeremiah34:19 Akadamu a ku Yuda na Yerusalemu pabodzi pene na mathubu a kunyumba yachifumu, anyansembe na anthu onsene adasasanya chiverano na ine pakufamba pakati pa ng'ombe imuna ikhadagwandwa m'mapindi mawiri ile," 
Jeremiah34:20 ine ndinaapereka m'manja mwa anyamalwawo ambasaka-saka moyo wawo ale. Mitembo yawo inadyiwa na mbalame, pontho na nyama zam'tsanga." 
Jeremiah34:21 Ine ndinapereka Zedekia mfumu wa Yuda na mathubu ache m'manja mwa anyamalwawo ambasaka-saka moyo wawo ale, kuna anyankhondo a ku Babiloni, ale abanga leka kukusosani." 
Jeremiah34:22 Ine ndinatonga, tenepo iwo anabwerera kumzindawu. Iwo anausosa mbaupisa moto. Ine ndinachitisa maluwani a Yuda kusanduka thando yatchetcha kule nkhabe khala munthu na mbodzi ene tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah35:1 Pikhali Yehoiakimu mwana Yosia mfumu wa Yuda, MBUYA adalonga kuna ine, Yeremia mbati," 
Jeremiah35:2 “Ndoko kuna nkhonda Rekabu mbukaachemere kudza m'subi ibodzi ene m'Nyumba ya Mulungu mbuapase vinyu kuti amwe.” 
Jeremiah35:3 Tenepo ndidenda kuna nkhonda Rekabu yonsene, Yaazania, mwana munthu unango dzinache Yeremia, mwana Habazinia, pontho na abale ache na anache achimuna onsene." 
Jeremiah35:4 Ine ndidadza nawo m'Nyumba ya Mulungu kusubi ya ana a mprofeti Hanani mwana Igidalia munthu wa Mulungu. Subi yeneyi ikhali padzulu pa subi ya Maaseia mwana Shalumu, thubu wakufunika pyakwanga m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, pontho chifupi na masubi a mathubu anango." 
Jeremiah35:5 Kubuluka penepo ndidaikha makhomitcho na ndilo pyakudzala na vinyu pamaso pa nkhonda Rekabu mbandilonga kuna iwo kuti, “Imwani vinyuyo!”" 
Jeremiah35:6 Mbwenye iwo adatawira mbati, “Ife nkhabe kumwa vinyu tayu, thangwi kholo wathu Yonadabu mwana Rekabu adatitonga tenepa: ‘Nee imwe penu pidzukulu pyanu athema kumwa vinyu tayu." 
Jeremiah35:7 Imwe mwathema pontho nee kumanga nyumba, penu kulima na kubzala mfesa; imwe mwathema nee kuchita chibodzi cha pinthu penepi, mbwenye ndzidzi onsene imwe mwathema kukhala m'makumbi, towera imwe muthimize kukhala na moyo wakulapha m'dziko inakhala imwe ninga anyakudzayi.’" 
Jeremiah35:8 Ife tavera matongero onsene adatipasa kholo wathu Yonadabu mwana Rekabu ale. Nee ife penu akazathu, nee anathu achimuna penu achikazi chipo tidzati tamwa vinyu tayu," 
Jeremiah35:9 penu kupimangira nyumba ninga misathu, penu kukhala na minda yamfesa penu kubzala mbewu tayu." 
Jeremiah35:10 Ife tavera monsene mwene pyonsene pidatitonga Yonadabu kholo wathu, mbatikhala pyathu m'makumbi." 
Jeremiah35:11 Mbwenye pidapokosera Mfumu Nebukadinezara dzikoyi, ife tidalonga kuti, ‘Tendeni pyathu ku Yerusalemu kuthawa anyankhondo a ku Babiloni na ku Aramu.’ Ndi thangwi yache tili kuno ku Yerusalemu.”" 
Jeremiah35:12 Kubuluka penepo MBUYA adalonga kuna ine, Yeremia." 
Jeremiah35:13 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene Mulungu wa Israele adandipanga kwenda kuna anthu a ku Yerusalemu na Yuda kalonga kuti, “Ayi imwe nkhabe funzapo chinthu penepa tayu mbamuvera matongero anga? Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah35:14 Yonadabu mwana Rekabu adatonga pidzukulu pyache kuti iwo aleke kumwa vinyu, tenepo iwo avera matongero enewa. Na lero iwo nkhabe kumwa vinyu na pang'ono pene tayu, thangwi iwo adavera matongero a kholo wawo. Mbwenye ine sidaleke kulonga kuna imwe tayu, kwache imwe nee mudandivesere tayu." 
Jeremiah35:15 Ine ndidathimiza kutumiza kuna imwe anyabasanga onsene maprofeti. Iwo adakupangani kuti muleke pyakuipa pyanu mbamuchite pyakulungama, pontho kuti muleke tewera na kutumikira milungu inango, towera muthimize kukhala m'dziko idapereka ine kuna imwe na makolo anu ile. Kwache imwe nee mudandivesere, penu kuikha konta pinthu pikhalonga ine pile tayu." 
Jeremiah35:16 Pidzukulu pya Yonadabu mwana Rekabu pyavera matongero adaapasa makolo awo, mbwenye anthu enewa hadandivere tayu." 
Jeremiah35:17 Natenepo MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene Mulungu wa Israele akulonga tenepa: Ine ndinadzesa pana Yuda na pana anthu onsene ambakhala mu Yerusalemu kuvungika konsene kudadumbira ine kule. Ine ndidalonga kuna iwo, kwache iwo hadandivere tayu; ine ndidaachemera, kwache iwo hadanditawire tayu.”" 
Jeremiah35:18 Tenepo ine, Yeremia, ndidalonga kuna nkhonda Rekabu kuti MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, Mulungu wa Israele akulonga kuti, “Imwe mwavera matongero adakupasani Yonadabu kholo wanu ale mbamuteweza upangizi wache onsene, pontho kuchita pyonsene pidakutongani iye pile." 
Jeremiah35:19 Natenepo ine, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, Mulungu wa Israele, ndikulonga kuti: Yonadabu mwana Rekabu anakhala na chidzukulu chile chinafuna dzanditumikira ndzidzi onsene.”" 
Jeremiah36:1 Chaka chachinayi Yehoiakimu mwana Yosia mbali mfumu wa Yuda, MBUYA adalonga kuna ine, Yeremia mbati," 
Jeremiah36:2 “Kwata mpukutu mbulembemo mafala onsene alonga ine pya Israele na Yuda pabodzi pene na madzinza anango onsene kubulukira pa ndzidzi udatoma ine kulonga kuna iwe, mwenemo Yosia mbali mfumu kufikirana lero." 
Jeremiah36:3 Mwinango anthu a ku Yuda angava pya nyatwa zinafuna ine kuasanyisa nazo, munthu onsene wa iwo anati aleke kuchita pyakudawika; penepo ine ndinaalekerera kudawika kwawo konsene na pyakudawa pyawo pene.”" 
Jeremiah36:4 Tenepo Yeremia adachemeresa Baruki mwana Neria mbampanga pyonsene pidalonga MBUYA pile. Natenepo Baruki akhalemba pyonsenepyo mumpukutumo na ndzidzi ontho ukhampanga iyewo. 
Jeremiah36:5 Kubuluka penepo ine, Yeremia ndidampanga Baruki kuti, “Ine nkhabe tawiriswave tayu kupita m'Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
Jeremiah36:6 Kwache iwe, ndoko ku Nyumba ya Mulungu pansiku inafuna anthu kupimana kudya mbukawerenge mafala a MBUYA ali mumpukutu ukhadakulembesa ine ule. Kauwerenge kuna anthu onsene a ku Yuda, anadza kweneko kubulukira kumaluwani awo ale." 
Jeremiah36:7 Mwinango iwo anapemphera kuna MBUYA mbaleka pyakudawa pyawopyo; thangwi kuzhangali na ukali wa MBUYA pyaonekera pana anthu enewa mphyakugoswa pyakwanga.” 
Jeremiah36:8 Tenepo Baruki mwana Neria adachita pyonsene pidampanga Yeremia pile; pa Nyumba ya Mulungu pale iye adawerenga mafala a MBUYA kubulukira mumpukutu mule. 
Jeremiah36:9 Mwezi wachifemba chaka chachishanu Yehoiakimu mwana Yosia mbali mfumu wa Yuda, anthu adapimana kudya kuti MBUYA aavere nsisi. Anthu onsene akukhala mu Yerusalemu na anthu onsene adadza kweneko kubulukira m'maluwani a Yuda ale adapimana kudya." 
Jeremiah36:10 Mwenemo anthu onsene mbali kuvesera, Baruki adawerenga mpukutu ule pyonsene pikhadalonga Yeremia pile. Iye adachita penepi m'Nyumba ya MBUYA m'subi ya Gemaria mwana Shafani, nyakulemba m'thando ya miseru. Subi yache ikhali ya m'dzulu chifupi na Msuwo Utswa wa Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
Jeremiah36:11 Pidava Mikaia mwana Gemaria pontho mdzukuluache Shafani mafala onsene a MBUYA kubulukira mumpukutu mule," 
Jeremiah36:12 adatchitha kusubi ya nyakulemba m'nyumba yachifumu, kule kudakhala pansi mathubu onsene: Elishama nyakulemba, Delaia mwana Shemaia, Elinatani mwana Akibori, Gemaria mwana Shafani, Zedekia mwana Hanania na mathubu anango onsene." 
Jeremiah36:13 Pidamalisa Mikaia kuapanga pyonsene pidava iye Baruki akuwerenga kuna anthu, kubulukira mumpukutu mule," 
Jeremiah36:14 mathubu onsene adatuma Yehudi mwana Netania, pontho mdzukuluache Shelemia, mwana Kushi kalonga kuna Baruki kuti, “Idza kuno na mpukutu wawerenga iwe kuna anthu.” Tenepo Baruki adenda kuna iwo na mpukutu m'manja mwache." 
Jeremiah36:15 Iwo adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Taphata miyendo, khala pansi mbutiwerengere mpukutuwu.” Tenepo Baruki adaawerengera." 
Jeremiah36:16 Pidava iwo mafala onsenewo, adayang'anisana mwamantha mbalonga kuna Baruki mbati, “Ife tathema kalonga mafala enewa kuna mfumu.”" 
Jeremiah36:17 Tenepo iwo adamvunza Baruki mbati, “Ngatipange, ayi iwe wakwanisa tani kulemba pinthu pyonsenepi? Ayi adakulembesa penepi ndi Yeremia?”" 
Jeremiah36:18 Baruki adatawira mbati, “Ande, Yeremia adandipanga mafala onsenewa, tenepo ine ndidapilemba na tinta mumpukutumu.”" 
Jeremiah36:19 Penepo mathubu ale adalonga mbati, “Iwe na Yeremia mwathema kabisala. Munthu na mbodzi ene mbaleke dziwa kunaenda imwe kabisalako.”" 
Jeremiah36:20 Mathubu ale adaikha mpukutu ule m'subi ya Elishama, nyakulemba m'thando ya miseru, tenepo iwo adenda kuna mfumu mbakampanga pyonsene." 
Jeremiah36:21 Tenepo mfumu adatuma Yehudi kakwata mpukutuwo. Iye adenda kusubi ya Elishama kaukwata mbakauwerenga kuna mfumu, pontho na mathubu ache akhadaimira mwakumzungulira ale." 
Jeremiah36:22 Wenewu ukhali ndzidzi wakutonthola, tenepo mfumu akhakhala m'nyumba mukhakhala iye ndzidzi wakutonthola, uku akuotha moto." 
Jeremiah36:23 Sindzidzi Yehudi nkhumalisa kuwerenga ndima zitatu penu zinayi, mfumu akhaucheka na mpeni mbauponyera pamoto pale. Iye adathimiza kuchita tenepo mpakana mpukutu onsene ule udamala piswa moto." 
Jeremiah36:24 Kwache nee mfumu penu mbodzi wa mathubu ache, ale adava mafala onsenewa, adachita mantha penu kung'amba nguwo zawo kuonesa kutsukwala tayu." 
Jeremiah36:25 Podi kwene kuti Elinatani, Delaia na Gemaria adadembetera mfumu kuti aleke pisa mpukutuwo, iye hadapiikhe konta tayu." 
Jeremiah36:26 M'mbuto mwache mfumu adatonga Yerameele, mwana mfumu, na Seraia mwana Aziriele pontho na Shelemia mwana Abideele kamanga Baruki nyakulembanga pabodzi na ine, Yeremia mprofeti. Mbwenye MBUYA akhadaabisa." 
Jeremiah36:27 Pikhadamalisa Mfumu Yehoiakimu kupisa mpukutu ule ukhali na mafala akhadalembesa ine Baruki ule, MBUYA adalonga kuna ine, Yeremia mbati:" 
Jeremiah36:28 “Kwata mpukutu unango mbulembepo pyonsene pikhadalemba iwe mumpukutu wakutoma udapisa Yehoiakimu mfumu wa Yuda ule. 
Jeremiah36:29 Pontho panga Yehoiakimu mfumu wa Yuda kuti MBUYA akulonga tenepa: Iwe wapisa mpukutu ule mbulonga kuti, ‘Thangwi yache ninji udalemba mumpukutumo kuti mfumu wa ku Babiloni anati abwere dzavunga dzikoyi mbapha anthu ache na nyama zene?’" 
Jeremiah36:30 Natenepo ine, MBUYA, ndikulonga tenepa pya Yehoiakimu mfumu wa Yuda: Iye nkhabe dzakhala na chidzukulu chile chinafuna dzakhala pampando wachifumu wa Davite tayu; mtembo wako unaponywa pakwecha mbukhala padzuwa na masikati pontho pabume na mosiku." 
Jeremiah36:31 Ine ndinamtchunyusa iye, anache na anyabasache ene thangwi ya kudawika kwawo konsene; ndinadzesa pana iwo pontho anthu a mu Yerusalemu na a ku Yuda ene nyatwa zonsene zidalonga ine zile, thangwi hadaikhe konta tayu kuacheuza kwachita ine kule.”" 
Jeremiah36:32 Tenepo ine, Yeremia ndidakwata mpukutu unango mbandiupereka kuna Baruki mwana Neria, nyakulembanga. Pikhampanga ine na ndzidzi onthowo Baruki akhalemba mafala onsene akhali mumpukutu ukhadapisa Yehoiakimu mfumu wa Yuda ule mafala ontho akhadalembesa ine pakutoma ale." 
Jeremiah37:1 Mfumu Nebukadinezara wa ku Babiloni adapitisa Zedekia mwana Yosia ufumu wa Yuda; iye adapita m'mbuto mwa Yehoiakini mwana Yehoiakimu. 
Jeremiah37:2 Kwache nee Zedekia penu mathubu ache penu anthu ache adaikha konta tayu mafala adalonga MBUYA kudzera muna ine, mprofeti Yeremia." 
Jeremiah37:3 Mfumu Zedekia adatuma Yehukali mwana Shelemia pabodzi pene na Zefania mwana Maaseia nyansembe kuna ine na mphangwa zakuti, “Taphata miyendo ngatipemphererembo kuna MBUYA Mulungu wathu.”" 
Jeremiah37:4 Ndzidzi wenewu ine ndikhali wakusudzuka kwenda pakati pa anthu, thangwi ine nee ndikhadadzati ikhwa m'perezo tayu." 
Jeremiah37:5 Anyankhondo a mfumu wa ku Iguputo adabuluka m'dziko mwawo, tenepo pidava anyankhondo a ku Babiloni ale ndzidzi wenewu akhasosa Yerusalemu, adathawa kubuluka ku Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah37:6 Kubuluka penepo MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Jeremiah37:7 “MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele akulonga tenepa: Panga mfumu wa Yuda ule akutuma kuna ine kuti, ‘Anyankhondo a ku Iguputo akudza dzakuphedza. Kwache iwo anati abwerere kwawo." 
Jeremiah37:8 Tenepo anyankhondo a ku Babiloni anabwera mbasosa mzindawu. Iwo anaupokosera mbaupisa moto.’ 
Jeremiah37:9 Ine MBUYA ndikulonga tenepa: Leka kupinyengeza wekha ene kunyerezera kuti anthu a ku Babiloni hanadza tayu; iwo anati adzedi. 
Jeremiah37:10 Podi kwene pichitike kuti ukwanise kukunda anyankhondo onsene a ku Babiloni anakusosani ale, towera pasale kwene anyakukuwazika kugona m'makumbi mwawo, amunawo anati alamuke basi mbapisa mzinda wenewu.”" 
Jeremiah37:11 Pidamala anyankhondo a ku Babiloni kuthawa Yerusalemu, thangwi ya anyankhondo a ku Iguputo," 
Jeremiah37:12 ine, Yeremia, ndidatoma kubuluka mumzinda kwenda kunthemba ya Benjemani kuti ndikatambire khundu ya pinthu pyanga pakati pa anthu a kweneko." 
Jeremiah37:13 Mbwenye pidafika ine pa Msuwo wa Benjemani, mkadamu wa anyakulondali dzinache Iria mwana Shelemia pontho mdzukuluache Hanania, adandiphata mbalonga mbati, “Kunachita iweku nkhuthawa anyankhondo a ku Babiloni.”" 
Jeremiah37:14 Ine ndidatawira kuti, “Si pyakuona tayu. Ine nee ndikuthawa anyankhondo a ku Babiloni tayu. Mbwenye Iria hadavesere tayu pikhalonga ine pile tayu. M'mbuto mwache adandimanga mbaenda nane kuna mathubu." 
Jeremiah37:15 Mathubu ale adandizhangalira mbatonga kuti ndimenywe, pontho ndifungirwe m'nyumba ya Yonatani, nyakulemba m'thando ya miseru, ule nyumbache ikhadasanduswa perezo." 
Jeremiah37:16 Ine ndidaponywa m'kadyaboso yapansi, kule kudakhala ine ndzidzi ukulu ene.”" 
Jeremiah37:17 Kubuluka penepo Mfumu Zedekia adandichemeresa, tenepo ndidadzeswa kunyumba yachifumu. Kweneko iye adandivunza chibiso-biso mbati, “Ayi pana mphangwa zakubulukira kuna MBUYA?” Ine, Yeremia ndidatawira kuti, “Ande, imwe munaperekwa m'manja mwa mfumu wa ku Babiloni.”" 
Jeremiah37:18 Penepa ine, Yeremia ndidavunza Mfumu Zedekia kuti, “Mseru wasosa ine ngwanji, mseru una ine na imwe, mathubu anu penu anthu anu kuti mundiikhe nawo m'perezo?" 
Jeremiah37:19 Maprofeti anu ali kupi, ale adalonga mphangwa zauprofeti kuna imwe mbati, ‘Mfumu wa ku Babiloni nkhabe dzachita nkhondo na imwe penu na mzindawu tayu’?" 
Jeremiah37:20 Kwache lero, mbuyanga mfumu, veserani kudungunya kwanga pamaso panu, pontho lekani kundibwezera kunyumba ya Yonatani nyakulemba, gopesera ndinafera konthoko.”" 
Jeremiah37:21 Mfumu Zedekia adatonga kuti ine ndiikhwe muchintalo cha anyakulondali pontho kuti ndipaswe mikate nsiku na nsiku kubulukira kuna anyakuphika mikate mpakana mikate yonsene mumzindamo imalemo. Natenepo ine, Yeremia, ndidakhala muchintalo cha anyakulondali." 
Jeremiah38:1 Shefatia mwana Matani, Gedalia mwana Pashuri, Yehukali mwana Shelemia pontho na Pashuri mwana Malikia adava pinthu pyonsene pidalonga ine, Yeremia kuna anthu kuti" 
Jeremiah38:2 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Munthu onsene anakhala mumzindamu anati afe pankhondo, na njala, pontho na muliri, mbwenye munthu onsene anaenda kudziko ya Babiloni, anati akhale na moyo. Iye anati athawise moyo wache mbakhala na moyo.”" 
Jeremiah38:3 Ndikhaapanga pontho kuti MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Mzinda wenewu unaperekwa m'manja mwa anyankhondo a ku Babiloni mbupokoserwa.”" 
Jeremiah38:4 Penepo mathubu adalonga kuna mfumu mbati, “Munthu weneyu athema kuphiwa. Iye akuchitisa anyankhondo akusalira mumzinda muno, pontho na anthu onsene kugwa mfuwa na pinthu pinaapanga iyepi. Iye nkhabe chita pinthu pyakuphedza napyo anthu tayu, mbwenye kuavunga kwene basi.”" 
Jeremiah38:5 Mfumu Zedekia adatawira mbati, “Iye ali m'manja mwanu. Chitani naye pyonsene pinafuna imwe. Ine, Mfumu, nkhabe pokanyisana napyo tayu.”" 
Jeremiah38:6 Tenepo iwo adandiphata mbandigwisira mumchera wa Malikia mwana mfumu, ule ukhali muchintalo cha anyakulondali. Iwo adandichithisira na nkhambala mumchera; mumcheramo mukhali nkhabe madzi mbwenye mathaphwinya ene basi. Tenepo ine ndidabira m'mathaphwinyamo." 
Jeremiah38:7 Mbwenye Ebedi-Meleki munthu wa ku Kushi pontho thubu wa kunyumba yachifumu adava kuti ndagwisirwa mumchera. Pikhakhala mfumu pa Msuwo wa Benjemani," 
Jeremiah38:8 Ebedi-Meleki adabuluka panja kukhali mfumu kule mbalonga kuna iye mbati," 
Jeremiah38:9 “Mbuyanga mfumu, pyonsene pyachita anthuwa kuna mprofeti Yeremia mphyakudawika. Iwo amgwisira mumchera, mule anati akukutike na njala mbafa, thangwi mumzinda muno nkhabeve mikate tayu.”" 
Jeremiah38:10 Tenepo mfumu adatonga Ebedi-Meleki munthu wa ku Kushi mbati, “Kwata amuna makumatatu mbakamnule Yeremia mumchera, iye mbadzati kufamo.”" 
Jeremiah38:11 Natenepo Ebedi-Meleki pabodzi pene na amuna ale adenda kusubi pansi pa chakukoyeramo kobiri m'nyumba ya chifumu. Iye adakwata nguwo zamasakala pontho zakung'ambika-ng'ambika mbazitchithisira mumchera mukhali ine mule pabodzi pene na nkhambala. 
Jeremiah38:12 Ebedi-Meleki munthu wa ku Kushi adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Ikha masakala na nguwo zakung'ambika-ng'ambikazo m'khaphwa mwako kuti ziphatise nkhambala.” Ine ndidachitadi tenepo," 
Jeremiah38:13 kubuluka penepo iwo adandikweya na nkhambala zile kundibulusa mumchera mule. Tenepo ndidathimiza kukhala muchintalo cha anyakulondali. 
Jeremiah38:14 Kubuluka penepo Mfumu Zedekia adandichemeresa, tenepo ndidadzeswa pamsuwo wachitatu wa Nyumba ya MBUYA. Tenepo mfumu adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Ine ndinati ndikuvunze chinthu chinango, tenepo leka kundibisira chinthu na chibodzi chene.”" 
Jeremiah38:15 Ine ndidatawira kuti, “Ngakhala ndinakutawirani, ayi imwe nkhabe kundipha tayu? Podi kwene kuti ine ndikupaseni uphungu, imwe nee munauvesera tayu.”" 
Jeremiah38:16 Mbwenye Mfumu Zedekia adadumbira pikulu pene kuna ine chibiso-biso mbati, “Ndinadumbira na dzina ya MBUYA ambatipasa muya ule, kuti ine sinakupha penu kukupereka m'manja mwa anthu anasaka-saka moyo wako ale tayu.”" 
Jeremiah38:17 Tenepo ine ndidalonga kuna Zedekia kuti, “MBUYA Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene, Mulungu wa Israele akulonga tenepa: Ngakhala imwe munaimisa manja kuna mfumu wa ku Babiloni moyo wanu unapulumuka pontho mzindawu hunapiswa tayu; imwe na banjanu munakhala na moyo." 
Jeremiah38:18 Mbwenye ngakhala imwe munakhonda kuimisa manja kuna mathubu a mfumu wa Babiloni, mzindawu unati uperekwe m'manja mwa anthu a ku Babiloni, tenepo iwo anaupisa moto; imwe maka nkhabe dzakwanisa kupulumuka tayu m'manja mwawo.”" 
Jeremiah38:19 Mfumu Zedekia adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Ine ndikuchita mantha na Ayuda aenda ku Babiloni ale, thangwi anthu a ku Babiloni anakwanisa kundipereka m'manja mwawo, tenepo iwo anandivuya.”" 
Jeremiah38:20 Ine ndidatawira kuti, “Iwo nkhabe dzakuperekani m'manja mwawo tayu. Imwe mwathema kuvera MBUYA pakuchita pinthu pyonsene pinakupangani inepi. Tenepo pyonsene pinakufambirani mwadidi, pontho nkhabe dzaphiwa tayu." 
Jeremiah38:21 Mbwenye ngakhala munakhonda kuimisa manja, MBUYA andionesera kumasomphenya pinthu pinafuna dzachitika." 
Jeremiah38:22 Akazi onsene akusalira m'nyumba yachifumu ya ku Yuda anaperekwa kuna mathubu a ku Babiloni. Tenepo akazi enewo analonga kuti, ‘Ashamwali anu akunyindirika akuphatisani fuwa mbakukundani. Manyalo anu alilima m'matope; ashamwali anu amala kukuthawani.’" 
Jeremiah38:23 “Akazanu na ananu onsene anabuluswa panja kuna anthu a ku Babiloni. Imwe ene nkhabe dzakwanisa kuapulumusa m'manja mwawo tayu, mbwenye munaphatwa na mfumu wa ku Babiloni; mzindawu unapiswa moto.”" 
Jeremiah38:24 Tenepo Zedekia adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Leka panga munthu na mbodzi ene pya pinthu pyalonga ifepi, gopesera unafa." 
Jeremiah38:25 Ngakhala mathubu anava kuti ndidalonga nawe, iwo anati adze kuna iwe mbalonga kuti, ‘Ngatipange pidalonga iwe na mfumu, pontho pidalongambo mfumu kuna iwe; leka kutibisira, gopesera tinakupha.’" 
Jeremiah38:26 Mbwenye apange kwene kuti ukhandidembetera kuti ndileke kukutumiza pontho kuperezo ya m'nyumba ya Yonatani kuti ukafere konthoko.” 
Jeremiah38:27 Kubuluka penepo mathubu onsene adadza kuna ine mbandivunza, tenepo ine ndidaapanga pyonsene pidandipanga mfumu pile. Natenepo mathubu ale hadalonge pinthu tayu, thangwi nkhabe na mbodzi ene akhadava pinthu pidalonga ine na mfumu pile tayu." 
Jeremiah38:28 Ine ndidathimiza kukhala muchintalo cha anyakulondali mpakana nsiku idapokoserwa Yerusalemu. 
Jeremiah39:1 Mwezi wakhumi wa chaka chachinomwe Zedekia mbali mfumu wa Yuda, Nebukadinezara mfumu wa ku Babiloni adadza pabodzi pene na anyankhondo ache onsene dzachita nkhondo na mzinda wa Yerusalemu mbauzungulira." 
Jeremiah39:2 Pansiku yachifemba ya mwezi wachinayi wa chaka chakhumi na chibodzi cha ufumu wa Zedekia mpandawo udapholwa. 
Jeremiah39:3 Tenepo mathubu onsene a mfumu wa ku Babiloni adadza mbakhala pansi pa Msuwo Wapakati: penepo pakhali Nerigali-Sharezere wa ku Samugari, Nebo-Saresekimu thubu wamkulu, Nerigali-Sharezere thubu wachiwiri, pabodzi pene na mathubu anango onsene a mfumu wa ku Babiloni." 
Jeremiah39:4 Pidaaona Mfumu Zedekia wa ku Yuda na anyankhondo ache onsene, adathawa; iwo adathawa mumzindamo na mosiku na njira ya m'munda wa mfumu mbabuluka na pamsuwo wa pakati pa mafufu mawiri, tenepo adenderatu kuphedi ya Yorodani." 
Jeremiah39:5 Mbwenye anyankhondo a ku Babiloni adaathamangisa mbaphata Zedekia paphedi chifupi na Yeriko. Iwo adamkwata kwenda naye kuna Mfumu Nebukadinezara, ule akhali mumzinda wa Ribila m'nthemba ya Hamati. Kweneko Nebukadinezara adamtonga mseru." 
Jeremiah39:6 Kweneko ku Ribila Mfumu Nebukadinezara adapha ana onsene a Zedekia pamaso pache mbapha pontho amuna akufunika a mu Yuda. 
Jeremiah39:7 Tenepo iye adamkonombola maso mbammanga na njema kwenda naye ku Babiloni. 
Jeremiah39:8 Ndzidzi wenewu anthu a ku Babiloni akhadapisa kale nyumba yachifumu na nyumba za anthu mbagwisa mpanda wa Yerusalemu. 
Jeremiah39:9 Nebuzaradani mkadamu wa anyankhondo adaphata anthu adasalira mumzinda, pabodzi pene na anthu akhadaimisa manja kuna iye ale, pontho na anthu anango onsene kwenda nawo ku Babiloni." 
Jeremiah39:10 Kwache iye adasiya m'nthemba ya Yuda anthu akutcherengaletu, ale nkhabe na chinthu chene tayu; tenepo ndzidzi wenewo iye adaapasa minda yamfesa na minda inango ene." 
Jeremiah39:11 Mfumu Nebukadinezara wa ku Babiloni akhadatonga pya Yeremia kudzera muna Nebuzaradani, mkadamu wa anyankhondo mbati," 
Jeremiah39:12 “Mkwateni mbamukamuyang'anire mwadidi; lekani kumkuwaza, mbwenye mchitireni pyonsene pinapempha iyepyo.”" 
Jeremiah39:13 Tenepo Nebuzaradani mkadamu wa anyakulondali, Nebushazibani thubu wamkulu, Nerigali-Sharezere thubu wachiwiri, pabodzi pene na mathubu anango onsene a mfumu wa ku Babiloni" 
Jeremiah39:14 adatuma amuna kabulusa Yeremia muchintalo cha anyakulondali. Iwo adampereka kuna Gedalia mwana Ahikamu pontho mdzukuluache Shafani kuti aende naye kumusa kwache. Tenepo iye adakhala pakati pa anthu ache. 
Jeremiah39:15 Pidafungirwa Yeremia muchintalo cha anyakulondali, MBUYA adalonga kuna iye mbati," 
Jeremiah39:16 “Ndoko kuna Ebedi-Meleki munthu wa ku Kushi kampanga kuti MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene Mulungu wa Israele akulonga kuti: Ine ndili chifupi kudzesa pana mzindawu nyatwa zidalonga ine zile nee kufamba mwadidi kwa pinthu tayu. Pandzidzi wenewo ipyo pinakwana-kwana mwenemo iwe ukupiona na maso ako. 
Jeremiah39:17 Kwache pansiku yeneyo ine, MBUYA, ndinakupulumusa; iwe nkhabe dzaperekwa m'manja mwa anthu anagopa iwewa tayu." 
Jeremiah39:18 Ine ndinakupulumusa, iwe nkhabe dzafa tayu, mbwenye unathawisa moyo wako, thangwi iwe umbanyindira ine pano. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah40:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna Yeremia, pidamsudzula Nebuzaradani mkadamu wa anyankhondo ku Rama. Iye adagumana Yeremia amangwa na njema pakati pa anthu akhadaphatwa unyaperezo ale a ku Yerusalemu na Yuda mbaendeswa ku Babiloni dziko ya unyaperezo." 
Jeremiah40:2 Pidagumana mkadamu wa anyakulondali Yeremia, adalonga kuna iye mbati, “MBUYA Mulungu wako adalongeratu kuti anadzesa nyatwa yeneyi pana mzindawu." 
Jeremiah40:3 Tenepo chinchino MBUYA aidzesadi; iye apichita ninga montho mudalongera iye. Pyonsenepi pyachitika thangwi imwe anthu mwadawira MBUYA mbamukhonda kumvera. 
Jeremiah40:4 Kwache lero ndikukusudzula njema zili m'chuno mwakozi. Tende pabodzi na ine ku Babiloni, ngakhala unafuna ine ndinakuyang'anira mwadidi; mbwenye ngakhala hunafuna tayu, leka kwenda. Yang'ana dziko yonsene, iwe unakwanisa kusankhula, tenepo unakwanisa kwenda konsene kwene kunafuna iweko.”" 
Jeremiah40:5 Kwache ine, Yeremia mbandidzati zungunuka kwenda pyache, Nebuzaradani adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Bwerera kuna Gedalia mwana Ahikamu pontho mdzukuluache Shafani, asankhulwa na mfumu wa ku Babiloni kuti ayang'anire maluwani a Yuda ule. Ndoko ukakhale naye pabodzi pakati pa anthu, penu uende pyako konsene kwene kunafuna iweko.” Kubuluka penepo mkadamu ule adampasa pyakudya na mtukwa, tenepo iye adenda pyache." 
Jeremiah40:6 Ine, Yeremia ndidenda kuna Gedalia mwana Ahikamu ku Mizipa mbandikakhala naye pabodzi kweneko pakati pa anthu adasalira m'dziko ale." 
Jeremiah40:7 Pidava akadamu a nkhondo na anthu anango onsene adasalira m'midzi ale kuti mfumu wa ku Babiloni akhadasankhula Gedalia mwana Ahikamu kukhala mkulu wa boma m'dzikomo. Pidapivambo iwo kuti iye adapasa utongi pana amuna, akazi na ana, anthu akutcherengaletu a m'dziko mule, ale hadakwatwe kwenda kudziko ya Babiloni tayu," 
Jeremiah40:8 iwo adenda kuna Gedalia ku Mizipa. Pakati pawo pakhali Ishimaele mwana Netania, Yohanani na Yonatani ana Karea, Seraia mwana Tanihumeti, ana Efai wa ku Netofa na Yaazania mwana Maaka pabodzi pene na amunawo." 
Jeremiah40:9 Gedalia adaatsikimizira mbati, “Lekani gopa kutumikira anthu a ku Babiloni. Khazikikani m'dzikomu mbamutumikire mfumu wa ku Babiloni, tenepo pinthu pyanu pyonsene pinakufambirani mwadidi." 
Jeremiah40:10 Ine ene ndinakhala mu Mizipa kukhala nyakukuimirirani kuna Ababiloni angabwera. Mbwenye imwe mwathema kuvuna mfesa na nsapo zinango mbamukoya vinyu na mafuta m'mabuyawo mwanu mbamukhala m'maluwani akwata imwe ale.” 
Jeremiah40:11 Ayuda onsene a ku Moabu, Amoni, Edomu na madziko anango onsene adava kuti mfumu wa ku Babiloni asiya anthu anango mu Yuda, pontho kuti asankhula Gedalia mwana Ahikamu pontho mdzukuluache Shafani kukhala mtongi wawo." 
Jeremiah40:12 Natenepo iwo adadza ku Yuda kuna Gedalia ku Mizipa kubulukira kumadziko onsene kukhadabalaliswa iwo kule. Iwo adavuna mfesa na nsapo zakuinjipa pyakwanga. 
Jeremiah40:13 Yohanani mwana Karea na akadamu onsene ankhondo, akhakhala m'midzi ale, adadza kuna Gedalia ku Mizipa" 
Jeremiah40:14 mbalonga mbati, “Kadi imwe nkhabe kupidziwa tayu kuti Baalisi mfumu wa Amoni atuma Ishimaele mwana Netania kuti akupheni?” Kwache Gedalia hadapikhulupire tayu." 
Jeremiah40:15 Tenepo Yohanani adalonga chibiso-biso kuna Gedalia mbati, “Nditawiriseni kapha Ishimaele, tenepo nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene anafuna kupidziwa tayu. Thangwi yache ninji kuti iye anafuna kukuphani mbachitisa Ayuda onsene agumanyikana mwakukuzunguliraniwa kubalalika mbapakhonda salira munthu na mbodzi ene mu Yuda?”" 
Jeremiah40:16 Mbwenye Gedalia adalonga kuna Yohanani mbati, “Leka chita chinthu ninga chenechi. Pinalonga iwe pya Ishimaele si pyakuona tayu.”" 
Jeremiah41:1 Mwezi wachinomwe wachaka chenecho, Ishimaele mwana Netania mdzukuluache Elishama wa banja yachifumu, pontho mbodzi wa mathubu akulu a mfumu, adenda ku Mizipa pabodzi pene na amuna khumi kaona Gedalia mwana Eliakimu. Pikhadya iwo, pabodzi pene na" 
Jeremiah41:2 Ishimaele na amuna khumi akhali na iye adalamuka mbampha na talasada Gedalia, munthu adasankhulwa na mfumu wa ku Babiloni kukhala mkulu wa boma m'dzikomo ule." 
Jeremiah41:3 Ishimaele adapha pontho Ayuda onsene akhali pabodzi pene na Gedalia ku Mizipa ale, pontho na anyankhondo a ku Babiloni akhali penepo ale." 
Jeremiah41:4 Mangwana mwache pidaphiwa Gedalia, munthu onsene mbadzati kupidziwa," 
Jeremiah41:5 amuna makumasere akubulukira ku Shekemu, Shilo na Samaria adafika. Iwo akhadachinga ndevu zawo, adang'amba nguwo zawo mbapicheka-cheka okha ene. Iwo akhadza na nsembe za mapira na pyakufukiza pyakununkhira ku Nyumba ya MBUYA." 
Jeremiah41:6 Ishimaele adabuluka ku Mizipa kagumanikana nawo uku akulira pikhaenda iye. Pidagumanikana iye nawo adalonga mbati, “Pitani muone Gedalia mwana Ahikamu.”" 
Jeremiah41:7 Pidapita iwo mumzindamo Ishimaele, pabodzi pene na amuna khumi akhali na iye ale, adaapha mbaaponya mumchera." 
Jeremiah41:8 Mbwenye amuna khumi ale adalonga kuna Ishimaele mbati, “Lekani kutipha! Ife tina tirigu, barele, mafuta na manyuchi pyabisa ife m'munda.” Tenepo iye adaasiya mbakhonda kuapha pabodzi pene na anango ale." 
Jeremiah41:9 Mchera ukhadaponya iwo mitembo ya amuna onsene ale ukhali ukulu pyakwanga, ule ukhadakumbisa Mfumu Asa kutchinjiriza nawo Baasha mfumu wa Israele. Ishimaele adadzaza mcherawo na mitembo." 
Jeremiah41:10 Ishimaele adakwata unyaperezo ana achikazi a mfumu pontho na anthu anango onsene adasalira mu Mizipa, ale Nebuzaradani mkadamu wa anyankhondo adaaikha pansi pa utongi wa Gedalia. Ishimaele adaakwata unyaperezo mbawambukira nawo ku Amoni." 
Jeremiah41:11 Pidava Yohanani mwana Karea pabodzi pene na akadamu a anyankhondo onsene akhali na iye ale pya upandu onsene udachita Ishimaele," 
Jeremiah41:12 iwo adakwata amunawo onsene mbaenda kamenyana na Ishimaele. Iwo adaphatana nawo chifupi na thawale ikulu mu Gibeoni. 
Jeremiah41:13 Pidaona anthu onsene akhali na Ishimaele ale, Yohanani pabodzi pene na akadamu a anyankhondo akhali na iye ale adakomerwa pyakwanga." 
Jeremiah41:14 Anthu onsene adaphata Ishimaele ku Mizipa ale adatendeuka mbaenda kukhundu kwa Yohanani. 
Jeremiah41:15 Mbwenye Ishimaele na amuna masere akhali na iye ale adathawira ku Amoni kuthawa Yohanani. 
Jeremiah41:16 Tenepo Yohanani na akadamu a anyankhondo ale akhali na iye pabodzi adakwata kubulukira ku Mizipa anthu, adapulumusa iye m'manja mwa Ishimaele ale, pidamala iye kupha Gedalia: anyankhondo, akazi, ana, mathubu a kunyumba yachifumu akhadakwata iye kubulukira ku Gibeoni ale." 
Jeremiah41:17 Tenepo iwo adathimiza kwenda, mbwenye adaimira ku Geruti-Kimuhamu chifupi na Betelehemu panjira pawo kwenda ku Iguputo," 
Jeremiah41:18 kuthawa anthu a ku Babiloni. Iwo akhachita mantha nawo thangwi Ishimaele akhadapha Gedalia, adasankhula mfumu wa ku Babiloni kukhala mkulu wa boma wa dziko ule." 
Jeremiah42:1 Kubuluka penepo akadamu onsene a anyankhondo, kuthimizapo Yohanani mwana Karea na Azaria mwana Hoshaia, pabodzi na anthu onsene, mkulu mpakana mwana, adadza kuna" 
Jeremiah42:2 mprofeti Yeremia mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Taphata miyendo ngava kupempha kwathu. Tipemphererembo kuna MBUYA Mulungu wako, kupempherera anthu akusalira a ife ale. Thangwi pakutoma ife tikhali azinji ene, mbwenye lero tasala akuchepa, ninga munapionera iwemu." 
Jeremiah42:3 Pemphera kuti MBUYA Mulungu wako ationese njira yathema ife kuitewera, pontho kutionesa pinthu pyathema ife kupichita.”" 
Jeremiah42:4 Yeremia mprofeti adatawira mbati, “Ine ndava pyapempha imwe. Ine ndinati ndipemphere kuna MBUYA Mulungu wanu ninga mwapemphera imwe. Ndinakupangani pyonsene pinandipanga MBUYA mbandikhonda kukubisirani na chinthu chene.”" 
Jeremiah42:5 Tenepo iwo adalonga kuna Yeremia mbati, “MBUYA mbakhale mboni wakuona pontho wakukhulupirika kupokanyisana na ife tingakhonda kuvera matongero onsene anakupasa MBUYA Mulungu wako kuti utipange." 
Jeremiah42:6 Podi pitikomere penu pikhonde kutikomera kwene tani ife tinati tivere MBUYA Mulungu wathu, kunakutuma ife kule, towera pinthu pyathu pifambe mwadidi, thangwi tinavera MBUYA Mulungu wathu.”" 
Jeremiah42:7 Pidagwanda nsiku khumi MBUYA adalonga kuna Yeremia; 
Jeremiah42:8 natenepo iye adagumanyisa anthu onsene pabodzi pene na Yohanani, akadamu a anyankhondo akhali na iye ale, pontho na anthu onsene, mkulu mpakana mwana." 
Jeremiah42:9 Iye adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele kudandituma imwe kukupemphererani kule akulonga tenepa:" 
Jeremiah42:10 Ngakhala imwe munakhala m'dziko muno ndinakukhazikisani, mbandikhonda dzakuvungani; ndinakubzalani, mbandikhonda kukudulani, thangwi ndikutsukwala na nyatwa idakusanyisani ine nayo ile." 
Jeremiah42:11 Lekani chita mantha na mfumu wa ku Babiloni, anagopa imwe chinchinoyi. Lekani kuchita naye mantha, thangwi ine ndili namwe. Ine ndinakupulumusani pontho kukuombolani m'manja mwawo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah42:12 Na thangwi yakuti ine ndine nyakuva nyambalo, ine ndinamchitisa kuva namwembo nyambalo, mbandikubwezerani pontho kudziko kwanu." 
Jeremiah42:13 “Kwache ngakhala imwe munalonga kuti, ‘Ife nkhabe khala m'dziko muno tayu,’ mbamukhonda vera MBUYA Mulungu wanu," 
Jeremiah42:14 pontho ngakhala munalonga kuti, ‘Nkhabe, ife tinaenda kakhala kudziko ya Iguputo, kule ife nkhabe kuona nkhondo, penu kuva kulira kwa ngoma kutichemera kunkhondo, penu kusowa mikate tayu;’" 
Jeremiah42:15 penepo imwe anthu akusalira mu Yuda veserani pinalonga ine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene Mulungu wa Israele kuti: Ngakhala imwe mukuchita phinga kwenda ku Iguputo mbamuendadi kakhazikika kweneko," 
Jeremiah42:16 penepo nkhondo inagopa imwe ile inati ikupuluzeni kweneko, pontho njala inachita na imwe mantha ile inati ikutewereni, tenepo munafera konthoko." 
Jeremiah42:17 Ndimomwene, onsene ale anachita phinga kwenda ku Iguputo kakhazikika kweneko anafa pankhondo, na njala, pontho na muliri; nkhabe na mbodzi ene wa iwo anafuna dzasala na moyo, penu kuthawa nyatwa inafuna ine dzadzesa pana iwo ile tayu." 
Jeremiah42:18 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, Mulungu wa Israele akulonga tenepa: Ninga montho mudakhuthulira ine ukali wanga na kuzhangali kwanga pana anthu a ku Yerusalemu, sasawambo ukali wanga unakhuthulirwa pana anthu enewa ngakhala imwe munaenda ku Iguputo. Imwe munasanduka anyadzedze, chinthu chakugumisa manungo, chakutemberera nacho, pontho chakusekesa. Imwe nkhabe dzaonave dzikoyi tayu.”" 
Jeremiah42:19 Tenepo Yeremia adathimiza kulonga kuti, “Imwe anyakusalira na moyo a Yuda, MBUYA adakupangani kuti muonesese kuti muleke kwenda ku Iguputo. Ine ndakucheuzani lero" 
Jeremiah42:20 kuti imwe mudadawa pikulu pidandituma imwe kuna MBUYA Mulungu wanu, mbamulonga kuti, ‘Tipemphererembo kuna MBUYA Mulungu wathu, tipangeni pyonsene pinalonga iye pontho ife tinati tipichite.’" 
Jeremiah42:21 Ine lero ndakupangani, kwache imwe nee mwavera MBUYA Mulungu wanu papyonsene pyandipanga iye kuti ndikupangenimbo." 
Jeremiah42:22 Tenepo chinchino mupidziwe kuti imwe munafa pankhondo, na njala, pontho na muliri kudziko kunafuna imwe kwenda kakhazikikako.”" 
Jeremiah43:1 Pidamala Yeremia kupanga anthu pyonsene pidalonga MBUYA Mulungu wawo, pyonsene pikhadampanga MBUYA kuti akaapange pile," 
Jeremiah43:2 Azaria mwana Hoshaia, Yohanani mwana Karea na amuna onsene akutumbama adalonga kuna Yeremia mbati, “Ukunama pyako! MBUYA Mulungu wathu hadakutume kulonga kuti ife nee tathema kwenda ku Iguputo kukhazikika kweneko tayu." 
Jeremiah43:3 Baruki mwana Neria ndiye akupasa chipapu chenechi kuti utipereke m'manja mwa anthu a ku Babiloni, towera iwo atiphe, penu kutikwata unyaperezo ku Babiloni.”" 
Jeremiah43:4 Natenepo Yohanani mwana Karea na akadamu onsene a anyankhondo pontho na anthu onsene adakhonda kuvera matongero a MBUYA akuti akhale m'dziko ya Yuda. 
Jeremiah43:5 M'mbuto mwache Yohanani na akadamu onsene a anyankhondo adenda ku Iguputo na anthu onsene akusalira mu Yuda, ale akhadabwerera dzakhala mu Yuda kubulukira kumadziko onsene kukhadabalalikira iwo kule." 
Jeremiah43:6 Iwo adakwata pontho amuna onsene, akazi, ana, na ana achikazi a mfumu, ale adaikha Nebuzaradani mkadamu wa anyankhondo pansi pa utongi wa Gedalia mwana Ahikamu pontho mdzukuluache Shafani. Iye adakwata pontho mprofeti Yeremia na Baruki mwana Neria." 
Jeremiah43:7 Iwo adakhonda kuvera MBUYA mbapita mu Iguputo mbaenda mpakana ku Tapanesi. 
Jeremiah43:8 Kweneko MBUYA adalonga kuna ine, Yeremia mbati," 
Jeremiah43:9 “Mwenemo Ayuda akuona maso, kwata miyala mikulu-mikulu mbuifikhire pansi m'njira yakumangwa na njerwa pamsuwo wa nyumba ya mfumu wa ku Iguputo mu mzinda wa Tapanesi." 
Jeremiah43:10 Kubuluka penepo longa kuna iwo kuti: ‘MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene Mulungu wa Israele akulonga kuti: ndinatuma nyabasanga Mfumu Nebukadinezara wa ku Babiloni, tenepo iye anakhazikisa ufumu wache pamiyala yafikhira imwe panoyi; iye anatandika khumbi yache yachifumu pana miyala yeneyi." 
Jeremiah43:11 Iye anabwera dzavunga dziko ya Iguputo. Ale athema kufa na muliri anati afe na muliri, ale athema kukwatwa unyaperezo anati akwatwe unyaperezo, pontho ale athema kufa pankhondo anati afe pankhondo." 
Jeremiah43:12 Iye anapisa moto nyumba zakupembedzeramo milungu ya ku Iguputo; iye anapisa nyumba zawo zakupembedzeramo mbakwata mifanikizo yawo. Ninga mumbafindikira makabuswa chakufindika chache, sasawambo iye anakukutiza dziko ya Iguputo mbaenda pyache wakukhonda na kukolozeka kwene." 
Jeremiah43:13 Iye anavunga chiguwa chakupambulika cha Heliopolisi wa ku Iguputo, pontho anapisa nyumba zakupembedzeramo milungu ya mu Iguputo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah44:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna Yeremia, pya Ayuda onsene akukhala kumwera kwa Iguputo m'mizinda ya Migidoli, Tapanesi na Memfisi, pontho na nthemba yakumwera kwa Iguputo." 
Jeremiah44:2 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, Mulungu wa Israele akulonga kuti, “Iwe ene waona nyatwa zadzesa ine pana Yerusalemu na pana mizinda inango yonsene ya Yuda. Podi lero ene pana madembe pontho nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene akukhalamo tayu," 
Jeremiah44:3 thangwi ya pyakuipa pyachita iwo pile. Iwo andizhangalisa pakufukiza pyakununkhira, pontho kupembedza milungu inango yakuti chipo nee iwo, penu iwe penu makolo ako ambaidziwa tayu." 
Jeremiah44:4 Kazinji kene ine ndikhatuma anyabasanga, maprofeti, ale adaapanga kuti aleke chita pinthu pyakuipa ninga penepi, pimbazonda ine pile." 
Jeremiah44:5 Kwache iwo hadapivesere penu kupiikha konta tayu; iwo hadaleke pyakudawa pyawo, penu kufukiza pyakununkhira kuna milungu inango kukhachita iwo kule tayu." 
Jeremiah44:6 Natenepo ukali wanga wakugoswa udaoneka pana iwo, maluwani a Yuda na m'misewu ya Yerusalemu, mbandiachitisa kusanduka madembe ninga muna iyo leromu." 
Jeremiah44:7 “Natenepo MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene Mulungu wa Israele akulonga tenepa: Thangwi yache ninji munapidzesera mwekha ene nyatwa ninga yeneyi pakupibulusa mwekha ene mu Yuda, amuna, akazi, ana pontho na akachiya ene okhonda siya na chitsa chene." 
Jeremiah44:8 Mwatani munandizhangalisa na pinthu pidasasanya imwe na manjanu pile, kufukiza pyakununkhira kuna milungu inango mu Iguputo kwadza imwe dzakhala kule? Imwe munapivunga mwekha ene mbamusanduka chinthu chakutemberera nacho, pontho chakusekesa pakati pa madzinza onsene a padziko yapansi." 
Jeremiah44:9 Ayi imwe mwaduwalira pyakuipa pyonsene pidachitwa na makolo anu, na mafumu a Yuda na akazawo, na imwe, pontho na akazanu ene m'maluwani a Yuda na m'misewu ya Yerusalemu mwene?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Kwache na lero imwe nee mwapichepesa mwekha ene, penu kundilemedza penu kuteweza matongero adapereka ine kuna imwe na makolo anu ale tayu." 
Jeremiah44:11 “Natenepo MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, Mulungu wa Israele, akulonga tenepa: Ine ndina phinga kufuna kudzesa nyatwa pana imwe, pontho kuvunga dziko yonsene ya Yuda." 
Jeremiah44:12 Kulonga pya anthu a ku Yuda adasalira ale, pontho akuchita phinga kwenda ku Iguputo ale, ndinaonesesa kuti onsenewo amala vungwa. Onsenene, mkulu penu mwana, anafa m'dziko ya Iguputo, na njala penu nkhondo. Iwo anasanduka anyadzedze, chinthu chakugumisa manungo, chakutemberera nacho, pontho chakusekesa." 
Jeremiah44:13 Ine ndinatchunyusa anthu akukhala mu Iguputo na nkhondo, njala, pontho muliri, ninga montho mudatchunyusira ine anthu a ku Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah44:14 Nee munthu na mbodzi ene wa anyakusalira a dzinza ya Yuda aenda kakhala m'dziko ya Iguputo ule, anathawa, penu kupulumuka kuti abwerere ku Yuda tayu; nkhabe na mbodzi ene anafuna dzabwerera tayu, kupambula anthu akuchepa anafuna dzathawa ale.”" 
Jeremiah44:15 Kubuluka penepo amuna onsene ale akhadziwa kuti akazawo akhafukiza pyakununkhira kuna milungu inango, pabodzi pene na akazi onsene akhali penepowo, mgumano ukulu, pontho anthu onsene akukhala m'nthemba yakumwera kwa Iguputo adalonga kuna Yeremia mbati," 
Jeremiah44:16 “Ife nkhabe vesera tayu mphangwa zalonga iwe kuna ifezi na dzina ya MBUYA. 
Jeremiah44:17 Ife tinachita pyonsene pidalonga ife pile: Ife tinati tifukize pyakununkhira kuna milungu ya Matsano Wakudzulu, mbatipereka nsembe za pyakumwa kuna iye, ninga mudachitirambo ife, makolo athu, mafumu na mathubu athu m'maluwani a Yuda na m'misewu ya Yerusalemu. Pandzidzi wenewo ife tikhali na phoso izinji, pinthu pikhatifambira mwadidi mbatikhonda gopa chinthu na chibodzi chene." 
Jeremiah44:18 Mbwenye kutomera ndzidzi udaleka ife kufukiza pyakununkhira kuna Matsano Wakudzulu, pontho kupereka nsembe za pyakumwa kuna iye, nkhabe chinthu chadidi chinaona ife tayu; ndzidzi onsene kwathu nkhupuluzika na nkhondo pontho njala.”" 
Jeremiah44:19 Akazi adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Ndzidzi ukhafukiza ife pyakununkhira kuna Matsano Wakudzulu mbatipereka nsembe za pyakumwa kuna iye, ayi amunathu hakhapidziwa tayu kuti ife tikhasasanya pitumbuwa pyakuoneka ninga iye, pontho kupereka nsembe za pyakumwa kuna iye?”" 
Jeremiah44:20 Tenepo Yeremia adalonga kuna anthu onsene amuna na akazi ene akhamtawira ale mbati," 
Jeremiah44:21 “Ayi MBUYA hadakumbuke, penu kunyerezera tayu pya pyakununkhira pidafukiza imwe m'maluwani a Yuda na m'misewu ya Yerusalemu, imwe pabodzi pene na makolo anu, mafumu anu, mathubu anu, na anthu a m'dzikomo?" 
Jeremiah44:22 Pidachimwana MBUYA kupirira na makhaliro anu akudawika pontho na pinthu pyakuchitisa manyadzo pidachita imwe pile, dziko yanu idasanduka yakutembererwa pontho madembe, mwakuti anthu nkhabe khalamo tayu na lero." 
Jeremiah44:23 Na thangwi yakuti imwe mwafukiza pyakununkhira pontho mwadawira MBUYA pakukhonda vera matongero ache, mwambo wache na pifunziso pyache pyonsene nyatwa yakugoswa yadza pana imwe, ninga munapionera imwemu.”" 
Jeremiah44:24 Kubuluka penepo Yeremia adalonga kuna anthu onsene ale kuthimizapo akazi mbati, “Imwe anthu onsene a ku Yuda akukhala mu Iguputo, veserani mafala a MBUYA." 
Jeremiah44:25 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene Mulungu wa Israele akulonga tenepa: Imwe na akazanu ene na mabasa adaphata imwe ndzidzi udadumbira imwe kuti, ‘Ife tinati tichite pinthu pidadumbira ife kuti tinafukiza pyakununkhira mbatipereka pyakupereka pyakumwa kuna Matsano Wakudzulu?’ “Apo thimizani kuchita pinachita imwepo, chitisani kudumbira konsene kudachita imwe kule kukwana-kwana!" 
Jeremiah44:26 Mbwenye imwe Ayuda monsene akukhala m'dziko ya Iguputo veserani mafala a MBUYA akuti: Ndinadumbira na dzinanga ikulu kuti nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene wakubulukira ku Yuda dzakhala mu Iguputo analulupisa pontho dzinanga penu kuiphatisa basa kudumbira nayo tayu kuti, ‘Ninga MBUYA Mulungu wamoyo.’" 
Jeremiah44:27 Ine ndinaonesesa kuti pinthu pyanu pileke kukufambirani mwadidi, mbwenye munavungwa. Monsenene munati mufe pankhondo, pontho na muliri mpakana paleke sala munthu na mbodzi ene." 
Jeremiah44:28 Kwache anango a imwe munapulumuka mbamubwerera ku Yuda kubulukira ku Iguputo. Penepo anyakusalirawo anadziwa kuti mafala akuonadi ngapi pakati pa mafalawo na mafalanga. 
Jeremiah44:29 Ine MBUYA ndinatsikimizira kuti ine ndinakutchunyusani m'dziko yeneyi mbandigwisa nyatwa zidadumbira ine zile. 
Jeremiah44:30 MBUYA akulonga tenepa: Ine ndinapereka Hofara mfumu wa Iguputo m'manja mwa anthu anasaka-saka moyo wache ale ninga montho mudaperekera ine Zedekia mfumu wa Yuda m'manja mwa Nebukadinezara mfumu wa ku Babiloni, nyamalwa akhasaka-saka moyo wache ule.”" 
Jeremiah45:1 Chaka chachinayi Yehoiakimu mwana Yosia mbali mfumu wa Yuda, Baruki mwana Neria adalemba mafala mumpukutu akhampanga Yeremia kuti alembe ale akuti:" 
Jeremiah45:2 “MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele akulonga tenepa kuna iwe, Baruki:" 
Jeremiah45:3 Iwe ukulonga kuti, ‘Dzedze kuna ine, thangwi MBUYA athimizira kutsukwala panyatwa zinaona inezi. Ine ndamala topa na kubulira, pontho ine nkhabe kwanisa kupuma tayu.’" 
Jeremiah45:4 “Mbwenye MBUYA adandipanga kulonga mafala awa kuna iye: ‘Baruki, MBUYA akulonga tenepa: Ine ndinagwisa pinthu pidamanga ine, pontho ndinadula pidatcheka ine. Ine ndinachita penepi m'dziko yonseneyi." 
Jeremiah45:5 Thangwi yache ninji kuti upisakire wekha ene pinthu pikulu-pikulu? Leka chita tenepo. Thangwi ndinadzesa nyatwa pana anthu onsene, kwache konsene kwene kunaenda iweko ndinakuchitisa kuthawisa moyo wako. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.’ ”" 
Jeremiah46:1 Awa ndi mafala adalonga MBUYA kuna Yeremia pya madzinza anango: 
Jeremiah46:2 Kulonga pya Iguputo: Izi ndi mphangwa zakupokanyisana na anyankhondo a Mfumu Neko wa ku Iguputo, adakundwa na Nebukadinezara mfumu wa ku Babiloni ule, pa Karikemishi chifupi na mkulo wa Yufurate chaka chachinayi Yehoiakimu mbali mfumu wa Yuda:" 
Jeremiah46:3 “Sasanyani pyakugedera matswimo pyanu pikulu-pikulu na ping'ono-ping'ono pene; bulukani kwenda kunkhondo pamulikiti! 
Jeremiah46:4 Sasanyani akavalo anu mbamukapakirepo, Ndandalikani mbuto zanu za nkhondo; valani pipewu pyasimbi. Nozwani madipanu; valani pida pyanu pyankhondo." 
Jeremiah46:5 Ninji chinaona ine? Iwo akuchita mantha mbachita fundamtako; anyankhondo awo amphamvu amala kundwa. Iwo akuthawa mbakhonda kucheuka, pontho kukhundu zonsene kuna pyakugoswa. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah46:6 Anyakululupa miyendo nkhabe kwanisa kuthawa, anyamphamvu nkhabe kwanisa kumzwenga tayu, Kumpoto chifupi na mkulo wa Yufurate, iwo akugwegweduka mbagwa." 
Jeremiah46:7 “Mbani weneyu anakukuma ninga mkulo wa Nailo, ninga mkulo wakutayikira?" 
Jeremiah46:8 Ndi Iguputo ule ambakukuma ninga mkulo wa Nailo, ninga mkulo wakutayikira. Iguputo adalonga mbati, ‘Ine ndinakukuma mbandidya dziko yapansi; ndinavunga mizinda na anthu awo ene.’" 
Jeremiah46:9 Kutumukani, imwe, akavalo! Anyakufambisa pingolo mbapithamangise pyakwanga! Likitikani imwe anyankhondo a mphamvu, amuna a ku Kushi na Puti, imwe anyakuthukula pyakugedera matswimo, pontho amuna a ku Ludi anyakudziwa kukweya mauta." 
Jeremiah46:10 Kwache nsiku yeneyo nja Mbuya, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, Nsiku yakubwezera kwache, kubwezera pyonsene pidamchita anyamalwache. Talasada inati iadye mpakana kukhuta, inati imwe chiropa mpakana nyota kumala. Thangwi Mbuya, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, anathira nsembe m'dziko yakumpoto chifupi na mkulo wa Yufurate." 
Jeremiah46:11 “Ndokoni ku Gileadi mbamukasake mitombwe! Imwe anthu a ku Iguputo, Mitombwe yanu yonsene imbanyindira imwe ile lero nkhabeve basa, nkhabeve kwanisa kukuwangisani tayu." 
Jeremiah46:12 Madzinza anava pyakuchitisa manyadzo pinafuna dzakuchitikirani pile; chiliro chanu chafika konsene kwene. Anyankhondo anagwegwedusana, onsene uwiriawo anagwa pansi.”" 
Jeremiah46:13 Pidadza Mfumu Nebukadinezara wa ku Babiloni dzachita nkhondo na Iguputo MBUYA adalonga kuna Yeremia mprofeti mbati," 
Jeremiah46:14 “Lalika penepi m'maluwani a mu Iguputo, pilonge penepi mu Migidoli; pilalike pontho mu Memfisi na Tapanesi. Khalani m'mbuto zanu za nkhondo mbamusasanyike, thangwi talasada ikudya anthu akuzunguliraniwa." 
Jeremiah46:15 Thangwi yache ninji anyankhondo ako achitiswe manyadzo? Iwo nkhabe kwanisa kuimisana nawo tayu, thangwi MBUYA anamala kuagwisa onsenewo." 
Jeremiah46:16 Iwo anagwegweduka njira yonsene, mbagwerana pyawo okhokha. Iwo analonga kuti, ‘Lamukani tendeni tibwerere kwathu, kudziko idabalwa ife, kuthawa talasada ya anyakutiboneresayi.’" 
Jeremiah46:17 Mtchanduleni Mfumu wa ku Iguputo dzina yachinchino, ‘Mfumu Tchotcho, wakutaya mwayi.’" 
Jeremiah46:18 Ine ninga wamoyo, pontho Mfumu, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, ndikudumbira kuti: mbodzi wakukhala ninga Tabori pakati pa mapiri, pontho ninga Karimele m'khundu-khundu mwa Bara anati adze." 
Jeremiah46:19 Mangani mitolo yanu kwenda kudziko ya unyaperezo, imwe anyakukhala m'dziko ya Iguputo, thangwi Memfisi anasanduka thando yatchetcha, pontho madembe mbamukhonda khala anthu." 
Jeremiah46:20 “Iguputo akhala ninga ng'ombe yakubalika, kwache bulula ikudza pana iye kubulukira kudziko yakumpoto." 
Jeremiah46:21 Anyankhondo ache aganyo akhala ninga anamphulu akunenepa. Iwo anazungunuka mbathawa pabodzi, iwo nkhabe kwanisa dzaimira tayu, thangwi nsiku yakuchekwa ikudza pana iwo, nsiku inafuna iwo dzavungwa ile." 
Jeremiah46:22 Aiguputo anathawa ninga nyoka, ndzidzi unalikitika anyamalwawo. Iwo anabwera kuna iwo na mbadzo, ninga anyakugwanda miti." 
Jeremiah46:23 Iwo anagwisa miti ya mumsitu, podi iphophe pyawo tani. Iwo ngakuinjipa pyakwanga kupiringana nyadzombe, iwo nkhabe kwanisa kulengeseka tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA," 
Jeremiah46:24 Anthu a ku Iguputo anachitiswa manyadzo, anaperekwa m'manja mwa anthu akumpoto.”" 
Jeremiah46:25 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, Mulungu wa Israele akulonga kuti, “Ine ndili chifupi kutchunyusa Amoni, milungu ya ku Tebesi, mfumu wa Iguputo, dziko ya Iguputo na milungu yache ene, na mafumu ache ene pontho na anthu ambanyindira mfumu wa Iguputo ale." 
Jeremiah46:26 Ine ndinaapereka m'manja mwa anthu ambasaka-saka moyo wawo ale, kuna Nebukadinezara mfumu wa ku Babiloni na mathubu ache ene. Kwache m'nduli mwache anakhalamo pontho m'dziko ya Iguputo, ninga mudachitira iwo pakutoma. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah46:27 “Leka chita mantha, Yakobo nyabasanga; leka taya mtima, iwe Israele. Ine ndinati ndikupulumuse kukubulusa kudziko ya kutali, pontho kupulumusa pidzukulu pyako kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo kule. Yakobo anakhala pontho pamtendere, pontho pakupata, nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene anafuna dzamgoswa tayu." 
Jeremiah46:28 Leka chita mantha, iwe Yakobo nyabasanga, thangwi ine ndinakhala nawe. Podi kwene kuti ndivunge madzinza onsene kudakubalalisa ine kule, ine sinakuvungiratu tayu. Mbwenye ine nkhabe leka kukhonda kukutchunyusa, kwache ndinakutchunyusa mwachilungamo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah47:1 Mfumu wa ku Iguputo mbadzati chita nkhondo na Gaza, MBUYA adalonga kuna Yeremia pya Afilisti." 
Jeremiah47:2 MBUYA akulonga tenepa: “Yang'ana, kuvunduka kunachita madzi kumpoto; iwo anati asanduke madzi makulu. Iwo anati atayikire m'dzikomo, mbadya dziko yonseneyo, m'maluwani na anthu ambakhala mwenemo ale. Anthu anakhuwa; onsene anyakukhala mwenemo anakalala," 
Jeremiah47:3 thangwi ya kuva mchiti wa njondo za akavalo, ugubudu-gubudu wa pingolo na ukhwetchere-khwetchere wa magaleta. Ababa nkhabe dzazungunuka kuphedza anawo tayu; manjawo anachita chiwewa." 
Jeremiah47:4 Thangwi nsiku yakwana yakuvunga Afilisti onsene, pontho kupuluza onsene anyakusalira na moyo, ale anafuna pyakuphedza Turo na Sidoni. MBUYA ali chifupi kuvunga Afilisti, anyakusalira pagombe ya Krete." 
Jeremiah47:5 Gaza anachinga tsisi yache thangwi ya kusintili; Ashikeloni anasanduka madembe. Imwe Afilisti anyakusalira munapicheka-cheka mwekha ene kufikirana lini kuonesa kusintili kwanu? 
Jeremiah47:6 “Imwe mukulira kuti, ‘Sha! Iwe, talasada ya MBUYA, unakadza kufikirana lini? Pitchokomeze wekha ene m'mbuto mwako, khala pyako mwenemo kupuma.’" 
Jeremiah47:7 Kwache inapuma tani, podi aitonga kuchita tenepo ndine, MBUYA, mwenemo ndaitonga kusosa Ashikeloni na anyamgombe?”" 
Jeremiah48:1 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, Mulungu wa Israele akulonga pya Moabu kuti, “Dzedze kuna mzinda wa Nebo, thangwi anamala vungwa. Kiriataimu analulupiswa mbaphatwa; mpandache wamphamvu unachitiswa manyadzo mbugomolwa." 
Jeremiah48:2 Moabu nkhabe dzakhalave na mkola tayu; anyamalwa anasasanya pyakusosa Heshiboni: ‘Tendeni tiipuluze dzinza yeneyi.’ Iwembo Madimeni unaphopha mulomo; talasada inati ikuthamangiseni. 
Jeremiah48:3 Veserani ku Horonaimu chiliro, chiliro cha dzunguzo na kuvungika." 
Jeremiah48:4 Moabu anati avungwe; akachiyache anati akalale. 
Jeremiah48:5 Iwo akukwira ku Luhiti, uku akulira pikulu pene; m'njira yakubidira ku Horonaimu chiliro chakusanyika thangwi ya kuvungika kwa pinthu chikuveka." 
Jeremiah48:6 Thawani! Pulumusani moyo wanu; thamangani ninga mbidzi ya m'thando yatchetcha. 
Jeremiah48:7 Podi imwe mumbanyindira mabasanu pontho mfuma ina imwe, na imwe enembo munaphatwa, pontho Kemoshi anaendeswa kudziko ya unyaperezo pabodzi pene na anyansembe na mathubu ache ene." 
Jeremiah48:8 Nyakuvunga anabwera pana luwani yonsene, tenepo nkhabe luwani inafuna dzapulumuka tayu. Maphedi anasakazika, pontho pitunda pinavungwa. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah48:9 Wazani munyu pana Moabu thangwi iye anasanduka madembe; maluwani ache anamala thawiwa, mbapasowa munthu na mbodzi ene wakukhalamo." 
Jeremiah48:10 “Dzedze kuna nyachinyindo pabasa ya MBUYA! Dzedze kuna nyakukhonda cholola talasadache kuchuchisa chiropa. 
Jeremiah48:11 Moabu wakhala pakupata kutomera uphaleache, ninga vinyu wakusalira pansiletu, wakukhonda khuthulirwa m'mulinga na mulinga; iye hadaphatwe kwenda kudziko ya unyaperezo tayu. Natenepo iye ngwakudzipa pyakwanga ninga mwakale, pontho okhonda mala ngwadi-gwadi wache." 
Jeremiah48:12 Ine, MBUYA, ndikulonga kuti ndzidzi unati udze unafuna ine dzatumiza amuna, ale anakhuthulira vinyuyu m'milinga kumkhuthulira pansi; iwo anaswa milinga ya pezi mbaphumudza mabuyawo ache." 
Jeremiah48:13 Tenepo Moabu anachita manyadzo na Kemoshi, milungu yawo, ninga montho mudachitira manyadzo Aisraele, ndzidzi ukhanyindira iwo milungu Betele." 
Jeremiah48:14 “Ayi munalonga tani kuti, ‘Ife ndife anyankhondo amphamvu, amuna aluso pankhondo’?" 
Jeremiah48:15 Moabu anavungwa, maluwani ache mbapokoserwa; aphale ache anakwatwa kwenda kachekwa. Ndalonga ndine Mfumu, ule dzinache ndi MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Jeremiah48:16 Kuvungwa kwa Moabu kuli nenene, nyatwache inati ifike chinchino pano." 
Jeremiah48:17 Msintilini Moabu, imwe atsanthembache onsene; ale onsene mumbava pya kuveka kwache. Longani kuti, ‘Mama ine, ndodo yache yachifumu yakhoboka, ndodo yache yademelero yatchoka.’" 
Jeremiah48:18 “Imwe anyakukhala ku Diboni, tchithani pambuto zanu zachilemedzozo, mbamukhala pansi pa fumbi; thangwi nyakufuna kuvunga Moabu anati adze, iye anadza pana imwe, mbavunga maluwani anu onsene akutchingwa na mpanda." 
Jeremiah48:19 Imirani m'khundu mwa njira mbamuone, imwe anyakukhala mu Aroeri. Mvunzeni mamuna anathawayo, mbamumvunze mkazi anayesera kupulumusa moyo wacheyo kuti, ‘Kwagwanji?’" 
Jeremiah48:20 Moabu amala lulupiswa, thangwi iye amala vungwa. Lirani pontho kalalani! Kapilalikeni na m'khundu-khundu mwa mkulo wa Arinoni kuti Moabu amala vungwa." 
Jeremiah48:21 Kutonga kwa MBUYA kwatchithira mizinda ya pamapiri, pana Holoni, Yaza, na Mefaati;" 
Jeremiah48:22 pana Diboni, Nebo na Beti-Dibilataimu," 
Jeremiah48:23 pana Kiriataimu, Beti-Gamuli na Beti-Meoni" 
Jeremiah48:24 pana Kerioti na Bozira, pana maluwani onsene a Moabu a chifupi na akutali ene." 
Jeremiah48:25 Nyanga ya Moabu yagwandika; mkono wache wakhumuka. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.” 
Jeremiah48:26 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Muledzereseni thangwi iye adapandukira MBUYA. Mulekeni pyache Moabu athubudze m'matapiko ache; iye mbasanduke chinthu chakusekesa kuna anthu." 
Jeremiah48:27 Ayi Israele kuna iwe hakhalimbo tayu chakusekesa? Kuphatwambo pakati pa mbava kudachita iye, ayi iwe ungalonga pya penepi, msolo wako umbakula tayu?" 
Jeremiah48:28 Bulukanimo m'maluwani mwanumo mbamukakhale m'miyala, imwe anyakukhala mu Moabu. Khalani ninga jiwa wakumanga nsanjache kukanwa kwa nkhwimba." 
Jeremiah48:29 “Ife tava pya kulunkuma kwa Moabu, pya kudungudza na kutumbama kwache, na kugaya na kupithemba kwache konsene pontho kupiikhamo kwache." 
Jeremiah48:30 Ine, MBUYA, ndimbadziwa pya kugaya kumbachita iye, kwache iye nkhabe fika napyo kutali tayu; kutumbama kunachita iyeko nkhwapezi nako." 
Jeremiah48:31 Natenepo ine ndikulira thangwi ya Moabu, ndikukalala thangwi ya Moabu onsene. Ndikusintili anthu a ku Kiri-Hareseti." 
Jeremiah48:32 Ndikulirira anthu a ku Sibima kupiringana mumbalirira ine anthu a ku Yazere. Mfesa za Sibima, nthambi zako zavata mpakana ku Bara; izo zatanthawira mpakana kubara ya Yazere. Nyakuvunga afika pana nsapo zamfesa zako zakutoma kutokota zile." 
Jeremiah48:33 Kukomerwa na kusekera kule kwamalamo m'minda ya nsapo na minda inango ene mu Moabu. Ine ndalekesa kukuka kwa vinyu, kubulukira kudzenje yakutchitchithira vinyu; nkhabe na mbodzi ene akuponda-ponda mphezazo na kukomerwa. Podi kwene kuti muna mkhuwo, kwache mkhuwo si wakukomerwa nawo tayu." 
Jeremiah48:34 “Chiliro chawo chikuveka na ku Eleale mpakana ku Heshiboni na Yahazi, na ku Zoari mpakana ku Horonaimu pontho ku Egilati-Shelishia, podi na madzi ene a mu Nimurimu amala uma kakata." 
Jeremiah48:35 Mu Moabu, ine ndinamalisamo anyakupereka nsembe pambuto za chipembedzo, pontho na anyakufukiza pyakununkhira kuna milungu yawo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah48:36 “Natenepo mtimanga ukulira Moabu ninga chitoliro; ukulira ninga chitoliro kulira amuna a ku Kiri-Hareseti. Mfumawo yonsene yamala balalika. 
Jeremiah48:37 Msolo onsene wamala chingwa, pontho ndevu zawo zonsene zamala chingwa; mikono yonsene yamala chekwa-chekwa, pontho m'chuno mwawo mwamala vala masakha." 
Jeremiah48:38 Pansoyi zonsene za nyumba m'Moabu, pontho na m'misika muna kusintili basi, thangwi ndaswa Moabu ninga mulinga ule munthu nkhabe kuufunave tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah48:39 Moabu amatamiswa! Moabu akukalala. Moabu akubwerera na manyadzo! Moabu asanduka chinthu chakusekesa, pontho chinthu chakugumisa manungo kuna atsanthembache onsene.”" 
Jeremiah48:40 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Yang'anani! Mphamba akuphama pansi uku maphaphido ache ali ndataa pana Moabu." 
Jeremiah48:41 Mizinda ya Kerioti inapokoserwa, pontho mipandache yamphamvu inapokoserwa. Ndzidzi wenewo ungafika mitima ya anyankhondo amphamvu a ku Moabu inakhala ninga mitima ya akazi amimba pakulekwa." 
Jeremiah48:42 Moabu anavungwa mwakuti nkhabe dzakhalave dzinza tayu, thangwi iye apandukira MBUYA." 
Jeremiah48:43 Pyakugoswa, milindi na misampha pikudikhira anthu a ku Moabu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah48:44 Nyakuyesera kuthawa pyakugoswa penepiyo, anagwera m'mulindi, pontho nyakuyesera kubuluka m'mulindimo anakweshwa na msampha, thangwi ine, MBUYA, ndaikha ndzidzi wakuvungika kwa Moabu." 
Jeremiah48:45 M'mithunzi ya Heshiboni, anyakuthawa kwawo ali thekwa-thekwa kusowa basa, thangwi moto wavumbuluka kubulukira ku Heshiboni, kugaka kubulukira mu Sihoni; ukupisa akadamu a ku Moabu, kupisa pibade pyamsolo pya anyakunyada." 
Jeremiah48:46 Una dzedze ndiwe Moabu! Anthu a ku Kemoshi amala vungwa; ananu achimuna amala endeswa kudziko yantomi, pontho ananu achikazi amala phatwa ninga anyaperezo."
