Jeremiah48:47 “Kwache ndzidzi ukudza unafuna ine dzachitisa pinthu pya Moabu kufamba pontho mwadidi. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.” Kutchunyuswa kunafuna MBUYA dzachita Moabu kwamalira penepa. 
Jeremiah49:1 MBUYA akulonga pya Amoni kuti, “Ayi Israele nkhabe ana achimuna? Ayi nkhabe anango anafuna iye dzasiyira mfumache? Thangwi yache ninji mphapo Moleki apokosera Gadi pinthu pyache? Ninji anthu ache akukhala m'maluwani a Gadi?" 
Jeremiah49:2 Kwache ndzidzi ukudza unafuna ine, MBUYA, dzachitisa mgogogo wa nkhondo kuveka mu Raba, m'nthemba ya Amoni. Raba anasanduka mulu wa madongolomwa pontho midzi yonsene yakuzungulira inapiswa moto. Penepo Aisraele anathamangisa m'dzikomo anthu adaathamangisambo ale. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah49:3 “Kalala, iwe Heshiboni thangwi mzinda wa Ai wamala vungwa! Khuwani, imwe anyakukhala mu Raba! Valani masakha mbamusintili; thamangani uku na uku mumpandamo, thangwi Moleki anaendeswa kudziko ya unyaperezo pabodzi pene na anyansembe pontho na mathubu ache ene." 
Jeremiah49:4 Mwatani munatumbama na maphedi anuwo, kudungudza kuti ana mataka akubalisa pinthu? Imwe anthu okhonda khulupirika kunyindira mfumanu mbamulonga kuti, ‘Nkhabe unango anafuna dzandisosa tayu.’" 
Jeremiah49:5 Ine ndinati ndidzese pyakugoswa pana imwe kubulukira kuna atsanthembanu. Ndalonga ndine Mbuya, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene. Munthu onsene wa imwe anati athamangiswe; nkhabe unango anafuna dzagumanyisa anyakuthawa tayu." 
Jeremiah49:6 “Kwache m'nduli mwache ndinachitisa pontho pinthu pya Aamoni kufamba mwadidi. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.” 
Jeremiah49:7 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga pya Edomu kuti, “Ayi mu Temani nkhabemo nyanzeru tayu? Ayi mapungu udziwisi waamalira? Ayi nzeru zanu zamala vunguma?" 
Jeremiah49:8 Zungunukani mbamuthawe, bisalani kungolokodyo za nkhwimba, imwe anyakukhala mu Dedani, thangwi ine ndinadzesa nyatwa pana pidzukulu pya Esau, ndzidzi unafuna ine dzaatchunyusa ule." 
Jeremiah49:9 Ngakhala anyakutchola mfesa anadza kuna iwe, ayi iwo nkhabe siya na nsapo zene tayu? Ngakhala mbava zinadza kuna iwe na mosiku, ayi iwo nkhabe kwata kwene pinthu pinafuna iwo tayu?" 
Jeremiah49:10 Mbwenye Esau ndinamsiya chitakwa-takwa; ine ndinabwanyula mbuto zache zakubisala, towera achimwane kupibisa yekha ene. Anache, abale ache na atsanthembache ene anamala kufa, pontho iye hanaonwave tayu." 
Jeremiah49:11 Siya anako masiye; ine ndinatchinjiriza moyo wawo. Amamfelwako anakwanisa kunyindira ine pano.” 
Jeremiah49:12 MBUYA akulonga tenepa: “Ngakhala anthu ale hadatheme kumwa khomitcho ya nyatwa tayu, athema kuimwadi, ayi thangwi yache ninji ndikusiye kwene okhonda kukutchunyusa? Iwe hunaenda kwene okhonda tchunyuswa tayu, mbwenye wathemadi kumwa khomitchoyo." 
Jeremiah49:13 Ine ndinadumbira na dzinanga kuti mzinda wa Bozira unavungwa mbusanduka chinthu chakugumisa manungo, chinthu chakusekesa, pontho chakutemberera nacho; midzi yache yonsene ya chifupi inasanduka madembe kwenda na kwenda. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah49:14 Ine ndava mphangwa zakubulukira kuna MBUYA. Nyamphangwa adatumwa kuna madzinza kulonga kuti, “Gumanyikanani mbamusasanyike kachita nkhondo na mzindawo. Lamukani muende kunkhondo!" 
Jeremiah49:15 “Ine, MBUYA, ndinakuchepesa pamaso pa madzinza anango onsene mbukhondwa pakati pa anthu." 
Jeremiah49:16 Kutumbama kwako kwakunyengeza, nkhabe na mbodzi ene anakugopave ninga mumbapinyerezera iwe mule tayu, iwe nyakukhala kungolokodyo za miyala pontho na pansonga za mapiri. Podi kwene kuti udamanga pisa pyako kunsongaletu ninga mphamba, ine ndinati ndikudedzule penepo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah49:17 Edomu anasanduka chinthu chakugumisa manungo; onsene anyakugwanda na penepo anatutumuka mbaseka, thangwi ya kuona pironda pyache pyonsene pina iye." 
Jeremiah49:18 Ninga montho mudavungirwa Sodomu na Gomora, pabodzi pene na maluwani awo akuazungulirawo; sasawambo nkhabe munthu anakhala mwenemo tayu; nkhabe na mbodzi ene nyakufuna dzapondamo tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah49:19 “Ninga nkhalamu yakubulukira mumsitu wa Yorodani kwenda ku mpovu, ine ndinathamangisa Edomu m'dziko mwache mwakututumusa. Mbani munthu wache wakusankhulika anafuna ine dzampasa basa yeneyi? Mbani akhala ninga ine pano, pontho mbani anakwanisa kuimisana nane? Ngupi makabuswache anakwanisa kuketesana na ine?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Natenepo veserani manyerezero a MBUYA kupokanyisana na Edomu, pontho pinthu pinafuna iye kupichita pana Temani: Anawo ene anambuluthwa, pontho anthu anatutumuka thangwi ya dzedze idaagwera ile." 
Jeremiah49:21 Na kugwa kunafuna dzachita Aedomu, dziko yapansi inatetemera; chiliro chawo chinaveka na ku Nyanza Yakufira." 
Jeremiah49:22 Yang'anani mphamba unaphama pansi uku maphaphido ache ali ndataa pana Bozira! Pansiku yeneyo anyankhondo amphamvu a Edomu anachita mantha pyakwanga ninga mkazi wamimba pakulekwa.” 
Jeremiah49:23 MBUYA akulonga pya Damasiko kuti, “Hamati na Aripadi aswipa mtima thangwi ava mbiri yakupasa mantha. Iwo ataya mtima ninga mabimbi a nyanza ale nkhabe kwanisa kumbombowa tayu." 
Jeremiah49:24 Damasiko agoboka m'mabondo, tenepo azungunuka mbathawa. Iye ali pampani-pani pikulu pene; kutsukwala na mtswotswo pyamphata ninga mkazi wamimba pakulekwa." 
Jeremiah49:25 Thangwi yache ninji mzinda wakuveka ule, lero wasandukiratu madembe, mzinda ukhakomerwa kale ule?" 
Jeremiah49:26 Ndimomwene aphale ache anaphiwa m'misewu ya mzinda; anyankhondo ache anamalwa mphamvu pansiku yeneyo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene. 
Jeremiah49:27 Ndinagasa moto mpanda wa Damasiko; ndinadumika moto mbuto zakutchingwa na mpanda za Mfumu Beni-Hadadi.” 
Jeremiah49:28 MBUYA akulonga tenepa pya dzinza ya Kedara na maufumu a Hazori adakundwa na Nebukadinezara mfumu wa ku Babiloni ale: “Ndoko kachite nkhondo na Kedara, pontho kavunge anthu akumabulukiro dzuwa." 
Jeremiah49:29 Makumbi awo na mikumbi ya pifuyo pyawo pinakwatwa; nguwo zakutchinga nazo, pinthu pyawo pyonsene na ngamila zawo zene pinapokoserwa. Anthu anakhuwa kuna iwo mbati, ‘Pyakugoswa pili kukhundu zonsene zene!’" 
Jeremiah49:30 “Chimbizani kuthawa! Kabisaleni kunkhwimba, imwe anthu a ku Hazori. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA. Nebukadinezara mfumu wa ku Babiloni asasanya pya kukuphani; iye asasanya njira zakukupuluzani nazo." 
Jeremiah49:31 “Lamukani tikachite nkhondo, ife tinati tikasose anthu analonga kuti ali pakupata ale. Mzinda ule nkhabe misuwo penu mphinga tayu, pontho iyo nkhabe londalwi mwadidi tayu." 
Jeremiah49:32 “Ndinakwata ngamila na pifuyo pyawo. Ndinabalalisa konsene kwene anthu ana mtemo wakuchinga tsisi yawo ale, pontho ndinadzesa nyatwa pana iwo kubulukira kukhundu zonsene." 
Jeremiah49:33 Hazori anasanduka mbuto yakukhala matika, pontho madembe kwenda na kwenda. Nkhabe na mbodzi ene anafuna dzakhalamo pontho tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Jeremiah49:34 MBUYA adalonga kuna Yeremia mprofeti pya Elamu, pyaka pyakutoma pya Zedekia mfumu wa Yuda." 
Jeremiah49:35 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga tenepa: “Yang'anani, ine ndinatchola mauta a anthu a ku Elamu, pinthu pile pagona mphamvu zawo." 
Jeremiah49:36 Ndinadzesa pana Elamu mphepo kubulukira kunkhomo zonsene zinayi; ine ndinaabalalisa kunkhomo zonsene zinayi, tenepo nkhabe dzasala dzinza na ibodzi ene kule kunakhonda funa dzathawira anthu enewa." 
Jeremiah49:37 Ndinachitisa anthu a ku Elamu kugopa anyamalwawo, anthu anasaka-saka pyakupha moyo wawo ale. Na thangwi ya ukali wanga wakugoswa, ndinadzesa nyatwa pana iwo. Ndinaathamangisa na talasada mpakana ndimale kuapuluza monsene mwene. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah49:38 Ndinakhazika mpando wanga wachifumu mu Elamu mbandivunga mafumu na akadamu awo ene. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA. 
Jeremiah49:39 “Kwache ndzidzi unadzawo ndinachitisa pontho pinthu pya Elamu kufamba mwadidi. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.” 
Jeremiah50:1 MBUYA adalonga tenepa pya Babiloni pontho na anthu ache kudzera muna mprofeti Yeremia: 
Jeremiah50:2 “Longa pontho lalika pakati pa madzinza, kwiza bandera m'dzulu mbulalike; leka bisa na chinthu chene, mbwenye longa kuti: Babiloni anaphatwa; milungu yawo ya Beli inachitiswa manyadzo, milungu yawo ya Mariduki inaphatwa na mantha. Mifanikizo yache inachitiswa manyadzo, pontho milungu yache inaphatwa na mantha." 
Jeremiah50:3 Dzinza yakumpoto inachita naye nkhondo mbisanduka madembe dziko yache. Nkhabe na mbodzi ene anafuna dzakhalamo tayu; anthu pabodzi pene na nyama anathawamo.” 
Jeremiah50:4 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Nsiku zenezo pontho pandzidzi wenewo anthu a ku Israele na anthu a ku Yuda pabodzi pene anaenda uku akulira kwenda kusaka MBUYA Mulungu wawo." 
Jeremiah50:5 Iwo anavunza njira yakwendera ku Zioni, mbakwata njira yakwendera kweneko. Iwo anabwera mbakakamira kuna MBUYA na chiverano chokhonda mala, chile nkhabe dzaduwalika tayu." 
Jeremiah50:6 “Anthu anga atayika ninga mabira; amakabuswa aabausa m'tsanga mbaachitisa kwenda pyawo chimpune-mpune m'mapiri. Iwo akwenda mbatsalakatika m'mapiri na m'pitunda mbaduwalira kuthanga kwawo. 
Jeremiah50:7 Nyakuagumana onsene akuapha pyache; anyamalwawo adalonga mbati, ‘Ife sidaphophonye tayu, thangwi iwo adawira MBUYA, mpovu wawo chadi-chadi, MBUYA chidikhiro cha makolo awo.’" 
Jeremiah50:8 “Thawani mu Babiloni; bulukanimo m'dziko ya Babiloniyo, pontho khalani ninga mbuzi zakutsogolera mkumbi." 
Jeremiah50:9 Thangwi ndinachitisa gulu ya madzinza amphamvu yakumpoto kudza dzachita nkhondo na Babiloni. Iwo anakhala m'mbuto zawo zankhondo mbachita naye nkhondo, pontho anyakubulukira kumpoto anamkunda. Matswimo awo anakhala ninga matswimo a anyakukhulisa aluso, ale nkhabe khwitcha tayu." 
Jeremiah50:10 Tenepo Babiloni anapokoserwa pinthu pyache; anyakumpokoserawo anakwata pyonsene ninga munafunira iwo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA. 
Jeremiah50:11 “Imwe, Ababiloni, mudavunga dziko yanga. Imwe mukusekera na kukomerwa, imwe mukunumpha-numpha ninga ng'ombe kugwedula mapira, pontho kusekera ninga kavalo," 
Jeremiah50:12 mbwenye mzindanu unachitiswa manyadzo pikulu pene; mzinda udakubalani ule unati ululupiswe. Babiloni anakhala wamng'onoletu pakati pa madzinza onsene, thando yatchetcha, mbuto yakusowa madzi pontho pyakumera." 
Jeremiah50:13 Na thangwi ya kuzhangali kwa MBUYA, m'dzikomo nkhabe dzakhala anthu tayu, mbwenye anasaliratu madembe. Anyakugwanda na m'dziko ya Babiloni onsene anatutumuka mbaseka thangwi ya kuvungika kwache." 
Jeremiah50:14 “Imwe anyamauta, khalani mbuto zanu zankhondo kumenyana na Babiloni. Imwe ale mwakunga mautanu, mulaseni mbamuleke siya na tswimo ene, thangwi iye adawira MBUYA." 
Jeremiah50:15 Mkuwizeni kukhundu zache zonsene kufuna kumenyana naye! Iye aimisa manja, nsanjache yagwa, pontho mafufu ache a mpanda amala gwiswa. Podi kunachita MBUYA nkhubwezera, mbwezereni! Chitani kuna iye ninga montho mudachitira iye kuna anthu anango." 
Jeremiah50:16 Lekani tawira mbewu kubzalwa m'dziko ya Babiloni; penu kutawirisa anthu kuvuna. Munthu onsene wakukhala m'dzikomo anachita mantha mbabwerera kwawo thangwi ya talasada ya anyamalwa.” 
Jeremiah50:17 MBUYA akulonga mbati, “Aisraele akhala ninga mabira akumwazikana, ale abalaliswa na nkhalamu. Nyakutoma kuaphata akhali mfumu wa ku Asiria; nyakumalisira kuabwededza na magogodo ene akhali Nebukadinezara mfumu wa ku Babiloni.”" 
Jeremiah50:18 Natenepo MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene Mulungu wa Israele akulonga tenepa: “Ine ndinatchunyusa mfumu wa ku Babiloni na anthu ache ninga mudatchunyusira ine mfumu wa ku Asiria. 
Jeremiah50:19 Kwache ndinabwezera Aisraele kumpovu kwache, tenepo iye anagwedula-gwedula paphiri ya Karimele na Bashani; iye anapha chamaba pamapiri a Eferemu na Gileadi." 
Jeremiah50:20 Nsiku zenezo pontho pandzidzi wenewo kusakanyula pyakudawika pya Israele, pontho na pyakudawa pya Yuda ene kunachitika, kwache nkhabe dzagumanwa na chibodzi chene tayu, thangwi ndinalekerera pyakudawa pya ale anafuna ine dzasiya na moyo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah50:21 “Chitani nkhondo na dziko ya Merataimu, pontho onsene ambakhala mu Pekodi ale. Athamangiseni mbamuaphe na kuavunga monsene mwene. Chitani pyonsene pyakutongani ine. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah50:22 Mgogogo wa nkhondo ukuveka m'dzikomo, pontho muna kuvungika kukulu!" 
Jeremiah50:23 Babiloni aswa dziko yonsene yapansi m'mapindi-mapindi na nyundo, lero nyundo yacheyo yamala lala. Babiloni asanduka chinthu chakugumisa manungo pakati pa madzinza!" 
Jeremiah50:24 Ndakuteyera msampha, iwe Babiloni, tenepo iwe wakweshwa nawo mbudzati kuuona; iwe udafikitizwa mbuphatwa thangwi udapokanyisana na MBUYA." 
Jeremiah50:25 MBUYA afungula subi yakukoyeramo pida pyache pyankhondo mbabulusamo pida pyache pyaukali, thangwi MBUYA Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene ana basa yakuti aphate m'dziko ya Ababiloni." 
Jeremiah50:26 Idzani pana iye kubulukira kumadziko akutali mbamung'ambe pikwa pyache; mmulukeni ninga mapira. Mvungeni monsene mwene mbamukhonde siya na moyo munthu na mbodzi ene. 
Jeremiah50:27 Iphani anyankhondo ache onsene; akwateni kwenda nawo kaacheka. Dzedze kuna iwo! Thangwi ndzidzi wawo wafika, nsiku inafuna iwo kutchunyuswa." 
Jeremiah50:28 Veserani anyakuthawa nkhondo ku Babiloni, pontho anyakusaka pakubisala; iwo akudza ku Zioni kulonga pya kubwezera kwachita MBUYA Mulungu wathu, kubwezera thangwi ya kuvungika kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
Jeremiah50:29 “Chemeresani anyamautanu kwenda kachita nkhondo na Babiloni; tumizaniko munthu onsene wakudziwa kukweya uta. Mangani misasa na kumzungulira; mbapaleke khala munthu na mbodzi ene kuthawa. Mbwezereni thangwi ya mabasache; chitani kuna iye mwakuthemerana na pidachita iyembo, thangwi iye atikana MBUYA, Nyakuchena wa Israele." 
Jeremiah50:30 Natenepo aphale ache anafa m'misewu; anyankhondo ache onsene anamala phophwa mulomo pansiku yeneyo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA, Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Jeremiah50:31 “Yang'anani, ine ndina mseru na iwe, Babiloni, nyakutumbama; thangwi ndzidzi wako wafika, nsiku inafuna iwe kutchunyuswa. Ndalonga ndine Mbuya, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Jeremiah50:32 Nyakulunkumayo anagwegweduka mbagwa, tenepo nkhabe unango anafuna dzamulamusa tayu; mizindache yonsene ndinati ndiipise moto, ule anafuna dzavunga pyonsene pyakumzungulira.”" 
Jeremiah50:33 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga tenepa: “Aisraele akuponderezwa, pontho na anthu ene a ku Yuda ntchibodzi-bodzi. Anyakuaphata onsene ali nawo kakaidwe m'manja mbakhonda kualeka kwenda pyawo." 
Jeremiah50:34 Kwache Dombo wawo ngwamphamvu; MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndiye dzinache. Iye anaphatisa basa mphamvu zache kuatchinjiriza, towera adzese mtendere m'dziko mwawo, kwache mbadzesa kuvunganizika kuna anyakukhala mu Babiloni.”" 
Jeremiah50:35 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Nkhondo mbiotoke pana anthu a ku Babiloni! Mbiotoke pana anthu ambakhala m'dziko ya Babiloni ale, pontho na mathubu na anthu ache anzeru onsene." 
Jeremiah50:36 Nkhondo mbiotoke pana maprofeti akunama; iwo anasanduka mapupwe. Nkhondo mbiotoke pana anyankhondo ache; iwo anaphatwa na mantha! 
Jeremiah50:37 Nkhondo mbiotoke pana akavalo na pingolo pyache pyonsene, pontho na pana gulu a anyankhondo ache onsene achilendo; onsenewo anakhala ninga akazi. Mfumache yonsene mbimale nyamkhadza-khadza; tenepo anapokoserwa yonsene." 
Jeremiah50:38 Madzi ache onsene mbamale uma! Iwo anamala kupwa. Thangwi Babiloni adzala na mifanikizo, mifanikizo ile idayalusa anthu nsala." 
Jeremiah50:39 “Nyama zam'tsanga na matika pinakhala mwenemo, pontho na madzidzi anakhala mwenemo. M'dzikomo nkhabe dzakhalamove anthu tayu, mpakana mifendu yonsene nkhabe dzakhalamo anthu tayu." 
Jeremiah50:40 Ninga montho mudavungira Mulungu Sodomu na Gomora, pabodzi pene na maluwani ache akuzungulira, sasawambo nkhabe munthu anakhala mwenemo tayu; nkhabe na mbodzi ene nyakufuna dzapondamo tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah50:41 “Ngayang'anani! Gulu ya anyankhondo akumpoto ikudza; dzinza yamphamvu pontho mafumu azinji akusasanyikira pya nkhondo kubulukira kumadolomero a dziko yonsene yapansi. 
Jeremiah50:42 Iwo aphatira mauta na madipa; iwo ngakukala mtima pontho akusowa nsisi. Iwo akuula ninga mabimbi a m'bara uku akuvanduka pa akavalo awo. Iwo akudza ninga akusasanyika kale dzachita nkhondo na Babiloni. 
Jeremiah50:43 Mbiri yawo yafika m'makutu mwa mfumu wa ku Babiloni, tenepo manjache achita chiwewa. Iye aphatwa na mantha mbava kupha ninga mkazi wamimba pakulekwa." 
Jeremiah50:44 Ninga nkhalamu kubulukira mumsitu wa Yorodani kaphata mabira kumpovu, ine ndinathamangisa anthu a ku Babiloni m'dziko mwawo kabodzi kene basi. Tenepo ndinasankhula munthu ule anafuna ine dzaatonga. Mbani anakwanisa sangizwa na ine pano mbakwanisambo kuketesana na ine? Makabuswache ngupi anakwanisa kuimisana na ine pano?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Natenepo veserani manyerezero a MBUYA akupokanyisana na Babiloni, pinthu pyanyerezera iye kuchita pana anthu a ku Babiloni. Anawo anambuluthwa, pontho anthu anatutumuka mbaseka thangwi ya dzedze idaagwera ile." 
Jeremiah50:46 Babiloni angagwa, dungu yache inatekenya dziko yapansi; kulira kwache kunaveka pakati pa madzinza anango.”" 
Jeremiah51:1 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Yang'anani, pana Babiloni, ine ndikulamusa mphepo yakuvunga, pontho na pa anthu a ku Lebo-Kamai." 
Jeremiah51:2 Ndinatumiza alendo ku Babiloni kamvunga ninga mumbachitira mphepo kupepesa maudzu; nsiku yakuvunga ingafika, iwo anachita naye nkhondo kukhundu zonsene mbasiya m'dzikomo mwakusowa na chinthu chene." 
Jeremiah51:3 Lekani tawirisa anyamauta kukunga mautawo; penu kuatawirisa kuvala pida pyawo pyankhondo. Lekani siya na moyo aphale ache na mbodzi ene; vungani anyankhondo ache monsene mwene. 
Jeremiah51:4 Iwo anakhala gwenjere-gwenjere m'dziko ya Babiloni uku amala chekwa pakhosi m'misewu. 
Jeremiah51:5 Thangwi Israele na Yuda hadapaswe nkhodolo tayu na Mulungu wawo, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, podi kwene kuti m'dziko mwawomo mwadzala na pyakudawa pamaso pa Nyakuchena wa Israele." 
Jeremiah51:6 “Thawani kubuluka mu Babiloni! Thawisani moyo wanu! Lekani tawira kuvungwa thangwi ya pyakudawa pyache. Uno ndi ndzidzi wache MBUYA kuti abwezere; iye anati abwezere malingana na pinthu pidachita iye. 
Jeremiah51:7 Babiloni akhakhala ninga khomitcho yagolidi m'manja mwa MBUYA; adaledzeresa anthu onsene a padziko yonsene yapansi. Iye adaledzeresa madzinza na vinyu wache; natenepo iwo amala yaluka. 
Jeremiah51:8 Babiloni anati agwe mbagomoka kabodzi kene. Lirani thangwi ya Babiloni. Mpaseni mtombwe thangwi ya mtswotswo unava iyewo; mwinango anakwanisa kuwangiswa. 
Jeremiah51:9 Alendo a ku Babiloni adalonga mbati, ‘Ife mbatidawangisa Babiloni, kwache iye nkhabe kwanisa kuwangisika tayu; mbatendeni timsiye pyathu, munthu onsene kwenda pyache kwawo, thangwi Mulungu amtchunyusa na mphamvu zache zonsene, pontho amala kumvunga monsene mwene.’ ”" 
Jeremiah51:10 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Anthu anga akulonga kuti, ‘MBUYA ationesa kuti ife nee tadawa tayu; tendeni, tipangembo anthu a ku Zioni pinthu pyachita MBUYA Mulungu wathu.’" 
Jeremiah51:11 “Nozwani matswimo, kwatani pyakugedera matswimo! MBUYA anyandula mafumu a ku Media thangwi pinafuna iye pene nkhuvunga Babiloni basi. MBUYA anati abwezere, kubwezera thangwi ya kuvungika kwa Nyumbache." 
Jeremiah51:12 Kwizani m'dzulu bandera ninga chidziwiso kugomola mpanda wa Babiloni! Khazikisani anyakutchinjiriza amphamvu, ikhani anyakulondali m'mbuto zawo, pontho ikhani anyankhondo kubisala m'tsanga! MBUYA anati achite pinthu pyanyerezera iye kupichita kuna anthu a ku Babiloni." 
Jeremiah51:13 Imwe ale anyakukhala chifupi na mikulo mizinji, ale muna mfuma kutapa kutaya, lero ndzidzi wanu wakwana ndzidzi wakuti mubuluswe padziko yapansi." 
Jeremiah51:14 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene adumbira na dzinache: Ndinati ndidzaze dziko yako na anyankhondo ninga uwumbi-wumbi wa nyadzombe, tenepo iwo anakhuwa thangwi ya kukunda kwawo.”" 
Jeremiah51:15 Na mphamvu zache MBUYA adasasanya dziko yapansi; iye adatanda dziko yapansi na nzeru zache, pontho na udziwisi wache iye adafuthula thambo." 
Jeremiah51:16 Iye angadima, madzi a kudzulu ambavunduka; iye ambachitisa makole kukwira kudzulu kubulukira kumadolomero a dziko yapansi. Iye ambatumiza njazi pabodzi pene na mvula mbafungulira mphepo m'masubi mumbaikoya iye." 
Jeremiah51:17 Munthu onsene nkhabe nzeru, pontho nkhabe udziwisi tayu; nyakufula golidi onsene akuchita manyadzo na mifanikizo yasasanya iye ile. Milungu yasasanya iye njakupupwa; iyo nkhabe na muya ene tayu." 
Jeremiah51:18 Iyo njakusowa basa, pinthu pyakupasa ntchekwa; iyo inati ivungwe nsiku inafuna MBUYA dzatonga mseru." 
Jeremiah51:19 Iye ule ndi Mulungu wa Yakobo hadakhale ninga penepi tayu; thangwi iye ndiye nyakusasanya pinthu pyonsene, pontho iye adasankhula Israele kukhala dzinzache ene. MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndiye dzinache." 
Jeremiah51:20 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Iwe Babiloni ndiwe chigomba changa, pontho chida changa cha nkhondo, na iwepo ndimbathibula madzinza mbandivunga maufumu," 
Jeremiah51:21 na iwepo ndimbalikita akavalo na anyakuapakirache ene mbandivunga pingolo na anyakufambisache ene. 
Jeremiah51:22 Na iwepo ndimbapha amuna na akazi ene, kucheka pakhosi nkhalamba na ana ene, kupha aphale na atsikana ene," 
Jeremiah51:23 na iwepo ndimbapha amakabuswa na mabirawo ene mbandipha anyakulima na ng'ombe zawo zene, kutinthimula mafumu na mathubu awo ene.”" 
Jeremiah51:24 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ine ndinabwezera Babiloni na anthu ache, uku imwe mukuona na maso, thangwi ya pyakudawa pyonsene pyachita iwo mu Zioni." 
Jeremiah51:25 Ine ndina mseru na iwe, phiri yakuvunga, pana iwe nyakuvunga dziko yapansi. Ndinafuthula mkono wanga kukutchunyusa, pontho kukubulumundisa m'matelero mbandikuchitisa kupya na moto." 
Jeremiah51:26 Nkhabe mwala unakwatwa muna iwe kuti ukakhale mwala wapankhomo wa nyumba tayu, nee mwala wakumanga nawo maziko tayu, thangwi iwe unasanduka thando yatchetcha kwenda na kwenda. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah51:27 “Kwizani m'dzulu bandera m'dzikomo. Lizani ngoma pakati pa madzinza. Chitisani madzinza kamenya naye nkhondo; chemeresani mafumu awa dzachita naye nkhondo: Ararati, Mini na Ashikenazi. Sankhulani mkadamu wa anyankhondo kumenyana naye; mutumizeko akavalo ninga nyadzombe." 
Jeremiah51:28 Chitisani madzinza kamenyana naye, mfumu wa ku Media, akulu a boma na mathubu ache onsene, pontho na madziko onsene ali pansi pa utongi wawo ale." 
Jeremiah51:29 Dziko ikutetemera pontho ikugedemera, thangwi ya pinthu pyasasanya MBUYA kupichita kuna Babiloni, kusandusa dzikoyo thando yatchetcha, mwakuti nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene anafuna dzakhalamo tayu." 
Jeremiah51:30 Anyankhondo a ku Babiloni atula pansi pida; iwo amala bisala mumpanda mwawo. Mphamvu zawo zamala kwenda; iwo asanduka ninga akazi. Mbuto yache yamala piswa moto; mphinga zache zamala gwandika-gwandika. 
Jeremiah51:31 Anyamphangwa ali thuthuthu kuthamangira kalonga kuna mfumu wa ku Babiloni kuti mzindache onsene wamala pokoserwa," 
Jeremiah51:32 mwakuwambukira mkulo monsene mwapokoserwa, tsanga yakubisalira anyankhondo yamala piswa moto, pontho anyankhondo aphatwa na mantha.”" 
Jeremiah51:33 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, Mulungu wa Israele akulonga tenepa: “Babiloni lero wakhala ninga mbuwa ndzidzi umbabubudwa mapira; ndzidzi wache wakumvuna unati ukwane chinchino pano.”" 
Jeremiah51:34 Anthu a ku Yerusalemu akulonga kuti, “Nebukadinezara, mfumu wa ku Babiloni, amala kutivunga; iye atichitisa kudzudzumika pikulu pene, iye atichitisa kukhala ninga mtete wakusowa pinthu. Iye atikhudyula ninga ntchato mbakhutisa mimbache na manungo athu kubuluka penepo mbatilukula.”" 
Jeremiah51:35 Anthu a ku Zioni akulonga kuti, “Pinthu pyakuipa pidatichitira iye pile, lero mbapichitwe kuna Babiloni.” Anthu a ku Yerusalemu akulonga kuti, “Chiropa chathu mbachigwere pamsolo pa anyakukhala mu Babiloni.”" 
Jeremiah51:36 Natenepo MBUYA akulonga kuna anthu ache kuti, “Yang'anani, ine ndinakuikhirani kunduli mbandichitisa anyamalwanu kukubwezerani pyavunga iwo pile. Ine ndinaumisa kakata mikulo ya Babiloni, pontho mphuno za madzi zonsene zinamala uma." 
Jeremiah51:37 Babiloni anasanduka mulu wa madongolomwa, mbuto yakubisala matika, ninga chinthu chakugumisa manungo pontho chakusekesa, mbuto yakuti na mbodzi ene nkhabe dzakhalamo tayu." 
Jeremiah51:38 Anthu ache onsene akubangula ninga nkhalamu mbakhumbza ninga ana nkhalamu. 
Jeremiah51:39 Podi iwo ngamtima, ine ndinaasasanyira phwando, mbandialedzeresa towera akomerwe na kusekera, kubuluka penepo agone chitulo chakufa nacho, mbakhonda fungula maso kwenda na kwenda. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah51:40 Ine ndinamponderera pansi ninga bira wakufuna kuchekwa, ninga bira pontho mbuzi.”" 
Jeremiah51:41 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Babiloni apokoserwadi, chinthu chimbanyindira dziko yonsene yapansi chile. Babiloni asanduka chinthu chakugumisa manungo pakati pa madzinza." 
Jeremiah51:42 Bara inatayikira pana Babiloni; mabimbi ache amphamvu anammbiza. 
Jeremiah51:43 Maluwani ache anasanduka madembe, mbuto yakusowa madzi pontho thando yatchetcha, mule anthu nkhabe dzakhalamo tayu, pontho mule anthu nkhabe gwanda namo tayu." 
Jeremiah51:44 Ine ndinati nditchunyuse Beli, milungu ya Ababiloni, mbandimchitisa kulukula pinthu pyonsene pidakhudyula iye pile. Madzinza nkhabe dzathamangirave kuna iye tayu. “Mpanda wa Babiloni wagwa." 
Jeremiah51:45 Bulukani mu Babiloni, imwe anthu anga! Thawisani moyo wanu! Thawani ukali wakugoswa wa MBUYA." 
Jeremiah51:46 Lekani taya mtima penu kuchita mantha mungava mphekesera m'dzikomu; chaka chino anthu analonga pino, chaka chamangwana analonga pinango, mphekesera ya chimpiningu m'dzikomo, pontho mafumu kupandukirana pyawo okhokha." 
Jeremiah51:47 Thangwi ndzidzi unati ukwane unafuna ine dzatchunyusa milungu yonsene ya Babiloni; dziko yache yonsene inalulupiswa, pontho mitembo ya anthu ache onsene inakhala gwenjere-gwenjere m'dziko mwachemo." 
Jeremiah51:48 Kudzulu na dziko yapansi na pyonsene pili mwenemo pinakhuwa thangwi ya kukomerwa na pinthu pyachitikira Babiloni, thangwi anyakuvunga akubulukira kumpoto anati achite naye nkhondo, Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah51:49 Babiloni athema kukundwa thangwi ya kupha anthu a ku Israele, ninga montho mwafera anthu anango onsene a padziko yapansi thangwi ya Babiloni." 
Jeremiah51:50 “Imwe anyakupulumuka kunkhondo ya Babiloni, ndokoni pyanu mbamukhonda yang'ana m'nduli. Kumbukani MBUYA, imwe anyakukhala kumadziko akutali, pontho nyerezerani pya Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah51:51 Imwe mukulonga kuti, ‘Ife talulupiswa, ife tachitiswa manyadzo mwakuti nkhope zathu zamala tota, thangwi alendo apita m'mbuto zakuchena za Nyumba ya MBUYA.’ ”" 
Jeremiah51:52 Mbwenye MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ndzidzi unafika unafuna ine dzatchunyusa milungu yache, pontho anyakukuwazwa anabulira m'dziko mwache monsene." 
Jeremiah51:53 “Podi kwene kuti Babiloni aphate pyache thambo tani, pontho kuti mpandache ukhale pyawo wamphamvu tani, ine ndinatuma anyakuvunga pana iye. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Jeremiah51:54 “Chiliro chikuveka ku Babiloni, dzunguzo ikulu ikuveka thangwi ya kuvungika m'dziko ya Babiloni." 
Jeremiah51:55 MBUYA anati avunge dziko ya Babiloni; iye anati amatamise kusokosa kwacheko. Mabimbi a anyamalwa analikitika ninga madzi makulu; kutitima kwawo kunaveka. 
Jeremiah51:56 Anyakuvunga anati adze pana Babiloni; anyankhondo ache amphamvu anati aphatwe, pontho mauta anatchoka-tchoka. Thangwi MBUYA ndi Mulungu wakutchunyusa anyakuipa; iye anaabwezera monsene mwene mwakuthemerana na pyakuipa pyawo." 
Jeremiah51:57 Ine ndinaledzeresa mathubu ache na anthu ache anzeru, akulu ache a boma, akadamu ankhondo pontho na anyankhondo ache ene; iwo anagona chitulo chakufa nacho mbakhonda fungula maso kwenda na kwenda. Ndalonga ndine Mfumu, ule dzinache ndi MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene.”" 
Jeremiah51:58 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga kuti, “Mpanda wamphamvu wa Babiloni unasalazwa, pontho misuwo yache yakulapha inapiswa moto; pyonsene pidabulusira anthu kaluma pyasanduka pyakusowa basa; pyonsene pidatopesa madzinza pile pyamalira pamoto.”" 
Jeremiah51:59 Izi ndi mphangwa zidapereka Yeremia kuna Seraia ndodo ya mfumu, ule akhali mwana Neria, pontho mdzukuluache Maseia, pidenda iye ku Babiloni pabodzi pene na Zedekia mfumu wa ku Yuda chaka chachinayi iye mbali mfumu." 
Jeremiah51:60 Yeremia akhadalemba mpukutu pya nyatwa zikhadza pana Babiloni zile, pyonsene pikhadalembwa pya Babiloni pile." 
Jeremiah51:61 Iye adalonga kuna Seraia mbati, “Iwe ungaenda ku Babiloni, uonesese kuti wawerenga mafala onsenewa mwakugaluza fala." 
Jeremiah51:62 Kubuluka penepo ulonge kuti, ‘MBUYA, imwe mudalonga kuti munavunga dzikoyo, towera muleke dzakhalave munthu penu nyama; inasanduka thando yatchetcha kwenda na kwenda.’" 
Jeremiah51:63 Ungamala kuwerenga mpukutuwu, uumangirire mwala mbuuponye mumkulo wa Yufurate" 
Jeremiah51:64 mbulonge kuti ‘Chibodzi-bodzi Babiloni anabira mbakhonda belukave thangwi ya nyatwa zinafuna ine, MBUYA dzesa pana iyezi.’ ” Mafala a Yeremia amalira penepa." 
Jeremiah52:1 Zedekia akhali pyaka makumawiri na chibodzi pikhapita iye ufumu wa Yuda mbatonga mu Yerusalemu pyaka khumi na chibodzi. Mache akhali Hamutala mwana Yeremia wa kumzinda wa Libina. 
Jeremiah52:2 Mfumu Zedekia adachita pyakuipa pamaso pa MBUYA ninga montho mudachitira Mfumu Yehoiakimu. 
Jeremiah52:3 MBUYA adazhangalira pyakwanga anthu a ku Yerusalemu na Yuda mwakuti adaabulusa pamaso pache. Zedekia adapandukira Mfumu Nebukadinezara wa ku Babiloni. 
Jeremiah52:4 Natenepo Nebukadinezara adadza pabodzi pene na anyankhondo ache onsene dzachita nkhondo na Yerusalemu pansiku yachikhumi ya mwezi wakhumi wa chaka chachifemba Zedekia mbali mfumu. Iwo adamanga misasa kuzungulira mzinda mbasasanya pyakugomolera mpanda. 
Jeremiah52:5 Mzindawo udazungulirwa na anyankhondo mpakana chaka chakhumi na chibodzi Zedekia mbali mfumu. 
Jeremiah52:6 Pansiku yachifemba ya mwezi wachinayi wa chaka chonthocho, pidakaka njala mwakuti anthu adasowaletu chakuti adye," 
Jeremiah52:7 mafufu a mpanda adaswiwa. Podi kwene kuti Ababiloni akhazungulira mzindawo, anyankhondo onsene adamala thawa mumzindamo na mosiku. Iwo adathawa na njira ya kumunda wachifumu mbapita na pamsuwo wa pakati pa mafufu mawiri, kuthawira kuphedi ya Yorodani." 
Jeremiah52:8 Kwache anyankhondo a ku Babiloni adathamangisa mfumu Zedekia mbamphatira m'phedi chifupi na Yeriko. Tenepo anyankhondo ache onsene adamala thawa mbamsiya yekha. 
Jeremiah52:9 Zedekia adaphatwa mbaendeswa kuna Mfumu Nebukadinezara, ule akhali mumzinda wa Ribila m'nthemba ya Hamati, natenepo kweneko Nebukadinezara adamtonga mseru." 
Jeremiah52:10 Kweneko ku Ribila Mfumu Nebukadinezara adapha ana a Zedekia iye akuona maso; iye adapha pontho mathubu onsene a mu Yuda. 
Jeremiah52:11 Kubuluka penepo iye adamkonombola maso mbammanga na njema mbaenda naye ku Babiloni kudaikhwa iye m'perezo mpakana kufa kwache kule. 
Jeremiah52:12 Pansiku yachikhumi ya mwezi wachishanu wa chaka chakhumi na chifemba Nebukadinezara mbali mfumu wa ku Babiloni, Nebuzaradani phungu wa mfumu pontho mkadamu wa anyankhondo, adapita mu Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah52:13 Iye adapisa moto Nyumba ya Mulungu, nyumba yachifumu na nyumba za anthu onsene akufunika mu Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah52:14 Tenepo anyankhondo ache adagomola mpanda wa Yerusalemu. 
Jeremiah52:15 Kubuluka penepo Nebuzaradani adakwata anthu adasalira mumzindamo ale, amuna aluso pamabasa akusiyana-siyana, pontho na ale akhadapipereka okha ene kuna mfumu wa ku Babiloni kwenda nawo ninga anyaperezo ku Babiloni." 
Jeremiah52:16 Mbwenye mu Yuda adasiyamo kwene anyakutcherengaletu, ale akhali nkhabe na chinthu chene tayu kuti aphate basa m'minda yamfesa na minda inango." 
Jeremiah52:17 Anthu a ku Babiloni adagomola m'mapindi-mapindi nsanamira ziwiri zankuwa na pigudumu pikhali m'Nyumba ya Mulungu pile, pabodzi pene na phiso ikulu yankuwa mbakwata nkuwa onsene kwenda nawo ku Babiloni." 
Jeremiah52:18 Iwo adakwata pontho mafosholo, pontho pyakuwolera dotha paguwa yansembe, pyakukwizira tsakala ya nyale, ndilo zakuchuchisiramo chiropa cha nsembe, ndilo zakufukizira pyakununkhira pontho na pyombo pinango pyonsene pyankuwa pyakuphatiswa basa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
Jeremiah52:19 Mkadamu wa anyankhondo adakwata mphale, ndilo, pikalango, pyakuikhirapo nyale, piwaya pyakufukizira pyakununkhira na ndilo zinango zikhaphatiswa basa kupereka chakupereka chakumwa, pinthu pyonsene pidasasanywa na golidi chadi-chadi pontho siliva pile." 
Jeremiah52:20 Pinthu pyankuwa pidasasanya Mfumu Solomoni kuti pikhale m'Nyumba ya Mulungu: Nsanamira ziwiri, pigudumu, phiso ikulu na ng'ombe zankuwa khumi na ziwiri; pikhali pyakulemera pyakwanga mwakuti kulemera kwapyo kukhali kokhonda dziwika." 
Jeremiah52:21 Nsanamira ziwirizo zikhali sasawa; ibodzi kulapha kwayo ikhali makhono masere pontho manungo ache akhali makhono mashanu. Izo zikhali na mgwawa m'bwalo mwache, pontho ntchindu yache yankuwa ikhali dzanja ibodzi." 
Jeremiah52:22 Padzulu pa nsanamira zonsene ziwiri pakhali mphanda ziwiri zankuwa, zile ulaphiache ukhali makhono mawiri, pontho kuzungulira mphanda yonsene pakhali mangalade ankuwa akuthemeserwa na pinango pyakuoneka ninga ntheme zankuwa." 
Jeremiah52:23 Pyakuthemesera pyonsene pamzati onsene pakhali ntheme zankuwa dzana ibodzi. Tenepo ntheme makumafemba na zitanthatu zikhaonekera na pansi. 
Jeremiah52:24 Kuthimiza penepo Nebuzaradani mkadamu wa anyankhondo adakwata Seraia Nyansembe Wamkulu, Zefania wachiwiri kwa Nyansembe Wamkulu, pontho na akulu-akulu akufunika atatu ku m'Nyumba ya Mulungu mbaenda nawo ninga anyaperezo." 
Jeremiah52:25 Kubulukira mumzindamo iye adakwata mkadamu wa anyankhondo ule, mapungu anomwe a mfumu akhadasalira mumzindamo ale, wachiwiri kwa mkadamu wa anyankhondo, ule akhayayang'anira mabukhu a nkhondo, pabodzi pene na amuna anango makumatanthatu akufunika." 
Jeremiah52:26 Nebuzaradani adaakwata kwenda nawo kuna mfumu wa ku Babiloni, ule ndzidzi wenewu akhali mumzinda wa Ribila," 
Jeremiah52:27 m'nthemba ya Hamati. Kweneko mfumu adatonga kuti anthu ale amenywe mbaphiwa. Natenepo anthu a ku Yuda adakwatwa m'dziko mwawo kwenda kudziko ya unyaperezo. 
Jeremiah52:28 Ili m'tchindeyi ndi konta ya anthu adakwata Nebukadinezara ninga anyaperezo: chaka chachinomwe adakwata Ayuda pikwi pitatu na makumawiri na pitatu; 
Jeremiah52:29 chaka chakhumi na chisere cha Nebukadinezara iye adakwata anthu madzana masere na makumatatu na awiri kubulukira mu Yerusalemu. 
Jeremiah52:30 Chaka chache chamakumawiri na chitatu, Nebuzaradani mkadamu wa anyankhondo adakwata anthu madzana manomwe na makumanayi na mashanu. Onsene pabodzi pene akhalipo pikwi pinayi na madzana matanthatu." 
Jeremiah52:31 Chaka chidapita Evili-Merodaki ufumu wa Babiloni adakomera mtima Mfumu Yehoiakini wa ku Yuda mbambulusa m'perezo. Penepi pidachitika pansiku yamakumawiri na chishanu ya mwezi wakhumi na chiwiri wa chaka chamakumatatu na chinomwe pidakwatwa Yehoiakini ninga nyaperezo. 
Jeremiah52:32 Evili-Merodaki adamkomera mtima pyakwanga mbampasa chidzo chikulu chene kupiringana mafumu anzache akhadaphatwa pabodzi na iye kwenda ku Babiloni ninga anyaperezo ale. 
Jeremiah52:33 Natenepo Yehoiakini akhatawiriswa kudula nguwo zache za unyaperezo kuvala zinango zene, pontho kudya pathebulu pa mfumu moyo wache onsene." 
Jeremiah52:34 Nsiku na nsiku moyo wache onsene, iye akhapaswa na mfumu wa ku Babiloni pikhasowa iye mpakana nsiku idafa iye." 
Lamentations1:1 Ngayang'anani, Yerusalemu asaliratu pyache madembe, mzinda ule kale ene udadzala na anthu! Iye asanduka pyache ninga mamfelwa, ule pakutoma akhali wakuveka pyakwanga pakati pa madzinza onsene! Iye ule akhali mfumukazi pakati pa madzinza, mbwenye lero asanduka bitchu." 
Lamentations1:2 Na mosiku iye ambalira pikulu pene, misozi imbakuka m'maputu mwache. Pakati pa pibwenji pyache pyonsene nkhabe na mbodzi ene asala kumthondoza tayu. Ashamwaliache onsene amsandukira; iwo asanduka anyamalwache." 
Lamentations1:3 Na kusanyiswa pontho na kuchitirwa vinga, Yuda amala kwenda kudziko ya unyaperezo. Iye akukhala pakati pa madzinza anango! Iye nkhabe gumana mbuto yakupumirapo tayu. Anyakumthamangisa onsene ale amfitikiza; iye ali panyatwa zikulu." 
Lamentations1:4 Misewu yakwenda mu Zioni ikusintili, thangwi nkhabe na mbodzi ene ambadza kumaphwando ache akupambulika tayu. Misuwo yache yonsene ya mpanda yamala vungika; a nyansembe ache akubulira, amiyali ache akutsukwala, pontho iye akusanyika mtima pikulu pene." 
Lamentations1:5 Anyakumzonda asanduka anyakumtongache; anyamalwache pinthu pyawo pikuafambira mwadidi. MBUYA amchitisa kuona nyatwa thangwi pyakudawa pyache mphizinji. Anache amala kwenda kudziko ya unyaperezo; iwo amala phatwa na anyakuazonda. 
Lamentations1:6 Demelero yonsene ya Zioni yamala kumbulukira. Atongi ache akhala ninga nyasa wakusowa mpovu; na kusowa kwawo mphamvuku iwo athawa anyakuathamangisa. 
Lamentations1:7 Pansiku za kusanyika na kutsalakatika kwache, Yerusalemu ambakumbuka mfuma yonsene ikhali na iye dziko mbili mphonje. Pidaphatwa anthu ache na anyamalwa, pakhali nkhabe na mbodzi ene wakumphedza. Pidapiona anyamalwache, adamsedegula, thangwi ya kuvungika kwache." 
Lamentations1:8 Yerusalemu adawa pikulu, tenepo iye asanduka okhonda chena. Onsene akhamulemedza ale, lero akumululupisa, thangwi iwo amuona pezi; iye ene mwenechiroache akubulira mbazungunukira pyache kumbali." 
Lamentations1:9 Kukhonda chena kwache kuli phathi-phathi pa nguwo zache; iye hadatome nyerezera tayu pya pinthu pikhafuna dzamgwera. Kuvungwa kwache kukhali kwakugumisa manungo; pakhali nkhabe na mbodzi ene wakumthondoza tayu. Iye akulonga kwene kuti, “Ngayang'anani MBUYA nyatwa ina ineyi; thangwi anyamalwanga andikunda.”" 
Lamentations1:10 Anyamalwa adamala kumpokosera mfumache yonsene; iye adaona madzinza anango akupita m'mbuto yache yakuchena, madzinza adakhondesa imwe kupita mumgumano wa anyakupambulikanu." 
Lamentations1:11 Anthu ache onsene akubulira pinasaka-saka iwo phoso; ambachinjisana mfumawo na phoso, towera akhale na moyo. Iye akulonga kuti, “Ngayang'anani MBUYA mbamuchitepo pinthu, thangwi ine ndikululupiswa." 
Lamentations1:12 “Ayi imwe anyakugwanda pyawo na njira nkhabe tsalakana penepi tayu? Mwazani maso mbamuone. Ayi pana unango adatomambo ona nyatwa ninga zinaona inezi, nyatwa zidandidzesera MBUYA pansiku yakuzhangali kwache zile?" 
Lamentations1:13 “Kubulukira kudzulu iye adandigwisira moto, iwo udapita mpakana m'bwalo mwa magogodo anga. Iye adanditeyera msampha, towera akweshe manyalo anga mbandibweza. Iye adandisiya khuma; nsiku yonsene ndimbakhalira kukomoka kwene." 
Lamentations1:14 “Pyakudawa pyanga pyamangirirwa kubodzi kwene na goli-goli; na manja ache ipyo pidalukwa pabodzi pene. Ipyo pili kocha-kocha m'khosi mwanga, pontho Mbuya andimala mphamvu. Iye andipereka m'manja mwa anthu akuti ine nkhabe kwanisa kuimisana nawo tayu." 
Lamentations1:15 “MBUYA apasa nkhodolo anyankhondo anga onsene; iye achemeresa anyankhondo dzamenyana na ine kudzapuluza amunanga achiphale. Mbuya apondedza Yuda, anthu ache akupambulika, ninga mfesa m'dzenje yakutchitchithira vinyu." 
Lamentations1:16 “Ndi thangwi yache ine ndimbalira, pontho maso anga ali thubu-thubu na misozi. Nkhabe na mbodzi ene ali m'khundu mwanga kundithondoza tayu, nkhabe na mbodzi ene wakundipasa mphamvu. Ananga asiyiwa kwene pyawo gwamwa, thangwi anyamalwa amala vunga anthu anga.”" 
Lamentations1:17 Zioni athambidzira mkono wache, kwache pakhali nkhabe na mbodzi ene wakumthondoza. MBUYA apikira Yakobo mwakuti atsanthembache onsene asanduka anyamalwache; Yerusalemu asanduka chinthu chokhonda chena pakati pawo." 
Lamentations1:18 “MBUYA ngwakulungama, mbwenye ine ndiye ndidapandukira matongero ache. Ngavani kuno imwe, madzinza onsene, ngayang'anani nyatwa ina ineyi. Aphale anga na atsikananga amala kwenda kudziko ya unyaperezo." 
Lamentations1:19 “Ine ndidachemeresa ashamwali anga, mbwenye iwo adandisandukira. Anyansembe anga na akadamu anga adamala puluzika mumzindamu, pikhasaka-saka iwo phoso, gopa kufa na njala." 
Lamentations1:20 “Yang'anani, MBUYA, kusanyika mtima kunachita ineku! Matumbo anga amala mangana, pontho mtimanga wasweka, thangwi ndidanyanya kupandukira. M'misewu anthu akuphiwa na matalasada m'misambo ndiye muna imfa." 
Lamentations1:21 “Anthu ava pya kubulira kwanga, kwache nkhabe na mbodzi ene wakundithondoza tayu. Anyamalwanga onsene ava pya kusanyika kwanga mtima; iwo akusekera thangwi ya pinthu pyandichita imwe. MBUYA chitisani nsiku idalalika imwe ile kudza, towera iwo asandukembo ninga ine." 
Lamentations1:22 “Pyakudawa pyawo pyonsene mbipioneke pamaso panu; atchunyusenimbo ninga montho mudandichita imwe, thangwi ya pyakudawa pyanga pyonsene. Ine ndikubulira pyakwanga, pontho ndikusanyika mtima pikulu.”" 
Lamentations2:1 Ngayang'anani mule mwaphimbira Mbuya mzinda wa Zioni na makole a kuzhangali kwache. Iye akunundula demelero ya Israele mbaiponyera pansi kubulukira kudzulu; pansiku ya kuzhangali kwache, iye hadakumbukeve tayu chakutsamizira manyalo ache." 
Lamentations2:2 Mwakusowa nsisi Mbuya adavunga misa yonsene ya Yakobo; na kuzhangali kwache iye agwisa mizinda yakutchingwa na mpanda ya Yuda. Iye achitisa manyadzo ufumu na atongi ache ene. 
Lamentations2:3 Na shungu yache ikulu iye amala khutcha mano anyamphamvu a Israele. Ndzidzi udafika anyamalwawo iye adabulusa pana iwo mkono wache wakuatchinjiriza Iye adayerima pana Yakobo ninga moto wakugaka, ule umbanyekesa pinthu pyonsene pyakuuzungulira." 
Lamentations2:4 Ninga nyamalwa iye akweya kale utache; mkono wache wa madyo uli chinjike. Na mkono wache wamphamvu iye adamala cheka onsene akhamkomera m'maso mwache ale; iye akhuthulira ukali wache ninga moto pana anthu a mumzinda wa Zioni. 
Lamentations2:5 Mbuya akhala ninga nyamalwa; iye avunga Israele monsene mwene. Iye amala vunga nyumba zache zonsene zachifumu mbagomola mbuto zache zakutchingwa na mpanda. Iye ainjipisa kulira na kusintili pakati pa anthu mu Yuda. 
Lamentations2:6 Iye adafudza Nyumbache khala ninga khumbi ya m'munda; iye avunga mbuto yache yakugumaniranako. MBUYA amalisa mu Zioni maphwando akupambulika, pontho na Nsiku zakupuma. Na kuzhangali kwache kukulu, iye apasa nkhodolo mfumu na anyansembe ene." 
Lamentations2:7 Mbuya aikhonda guwache yansembe mbapasa nkhodolo mbuto yache yakuchena. Iye adapereka m'manja mwa anyamalwache mafufu a nyumba zachifumu za Zioni; m'Nyumba maka mwa MBUYA, mkhuwo udaveka, khala ninga ikhali nsiku ya phwando." 
Lamentations2:8 MBUYA adachita phinga kuti avungiretu mpanda onsene wa mzinda wa Zioni. Iye adaupima na nkhambala yache, towera iye aleke khonda kuuvunga monsene mwene. Iye adachitisa mpanda na mafufu ache kulira, pyonsenene pidamala vungika monsene mwene." 
Lamentations2:9 Misuwo yache ya mpanda yamala fikhirika pansi; mphinga zache zamala gwandika na kupanduka-panduka. Mfumu na mathubu ache amala kwatwa kwenda kudziko ya unyaperezo; mwambo wa Mulungu nkhabeve gumanwa tayu; maprofeti ache nkhabeve ona masomphenya akubulukira kuna MBUYA tayu. 
Lamentations2:10 Akulu-akulu a mu Zioni ali fulike pansi. Iwo apiwaza fumbi mumsolo mwawo pontho amala vala masakha. Akazi a ku Yerusalemu ali tchuli-tchuli. 
Lamentations2:11 Maso anga ali thubu-thubu na kulira; matumbo anga amala mangana. Mumtima mwanga mwadzala na nsisi zikulu, thangwi anthu anga onsene amala vungika, thangwi ana na akachiya ene akhakomokera m'njira za mumzindamo." 
Lamentations2:12 Iwo ambalonga kuna amawo mbati, “Mkate na chakumwa pili kupi?” Ndzidzi unachita iwo chipupu moyo ninga anyakukuwazwa m'misewu ya mumzindamo, ndzidzi unamalisika iwo m'manja mwa amawo." 
Lamentations2:13 Chinafuna ine kulonga kuna iwe Yerusalemu ninji? Chinafuna ine kukusangiza nacho ninji? Iwe Zioni ndinakusangiza nanji towera ndikuthondoze? Njindako ili zwikoo ninga bara; mbani anakwanisa kukuwangisa? 
Lamentations2:14 Masomphenya a maprofeti ako akhali akunama pontho apezi. Iwo hadaonese pakwecha pyakudawa pyako tayu, towera pinthu pyako pifambe pontho mwadidi. Mphangwa zikhalonga iwo kuna imwe zile, zikhali zakunama pontho zakuendesa munthu m'tsanga." 
Lamentations2:15 Onsene anyakugwanda na njira akukuseka; iwo akupidula mbasedegula Yerusalemu mbati: “Ayi mzindache ngwenewu ukhachemerwa wakubalika monsene mwene ule, mzinda wakukomwerwa dziko yonsene yapansi ule?”" 
Lamentations2:16 Anyamalwako onsene, ali mano jentchenene; iwo ambakikita mano awo mbakusedegula mbati, “Ife tamkhudyula. Ehede! Nsiku yache njino ikhadikhilira ife ile; ife tina moyo kuti tiione nsiku yeneyi.”" 
Lamentations2:17 MBUYA achita pidasasanya iye; iye achitisa mafalache kukwana-kwana, mafala adalonga iye kale ene ale. Iye akukunda mwakusowa nsisi, iye atawirisa anyamalwako kukusingirira, iye achitisa anyamalwako kufamba na nthuku phaa." 
Lamentations2:18 Mitima ya anthu imbalira kuna Mbuya. Iwe mpanda wa Zioni, misozi yako mbikuke ninga mkulo mosiku na masikati; leka khala na ndzidzi wakupuma, pontho maso ako mbaleke mala misozi." 
Lamentations2:19 Lamukani, mbamukhuwe na mosiku mbamulire chiphedzo mosiku onsene; khuthulani mtimanu ninga madzi pamaso pa Mbuya. Kwizani manjanu kuna iye thangwi ya moyo wa ananu, ale adakomoka na njala pankhomo ya njira yonsene." 
Lamentations2:20 Ngayang'anani MBUYA mbamunyerezere! Mbani adatoma imwe kumchita pinthu ninga penepi? Ayi akazi achite kudya anawo, ana alera iwo ale? Ayi anyansembe na maprofeti aphiwe m'mbuto yakuchena ya Mbuya?" 
Lamentations2:21 Aphale na nkhalamba zene ali thasa-thasa m'misewu; aphale na atsikananga amala phiwa pankhondo. Imwe mwaapha pansiku idazhangali imwe ile; imwe mwamala kuacheka mwakusowa nsisi. 
Lamentations2:22 Ninga montho mumbachemerera imwe anthu kuphwando, montho-monthomo mwandichemerera pyakugoswa kubulukira kumakhundu onsene. Imwe MBUYA, pansiku ya kuzhangali kwanu nkhabe na mbodzi ene adathawa penu kupulumuka tayu. Onsenene adabala ine mbandialera, anyamalwanga amala kuavunga." 
Lamentations3:1 Ine ndine munthu ule asanyiswa na ndodo ya ukali wa MBUYA. 
Lamentations3:2 Iye andiendesa kumbuto zamdima, mbandichitisa kufamba mumdima wa ndiwe ani." 
Lamentations3:3 Ndimomwene, iye anditchunyusa na mkono wache mbapichita kawiri-kawiri, nsiku yonsene." 
Lamentations3:4 Iye achitisa khanda na mnofu wanga kukhwidzimbira, pontho iye aswa magogodo anga." 
Lamentations3:5 Iye andisosa mbandizungulira na misasa ya mtswotswo pontho nyatwa. 
Lamentations3:6 Iye andichitisa kukhala mumdima ninga ale adafa kale. 
Lamentations3:7 Iye andifungira mumpanda, towera ndichimwane thawa; iye andimbuluthira pansi na nkhambala." 
Lamentations3:8 Podi ndichemere pyanga tani, penu kukhuwa kufuna chiphedzo. Iye nkhabe vesera kupempha kwanga tayu." 
Lamentations3:9 Iye atchinga njiranga na miyala; iye achitisa njiranga kugongonyeka-gongonyeka. 
Lamentations3:10 Ninga mumbachitira nyalugwe swiswiswi, pontho ninga nkhalamu kubisalira chinthu," 
Lamentations3:11 iye adandikwekweta kundibulusa m'njira, mbandinyedza-nyedza, pontho andisiya wakusowa chiphedzo." 
Lamentations3:12 Iye adakweya utache, mbandithamswira na matswimo ache." 
Lamentations3:13 Iye adandilasa pamtima na matswimo akubulukira m'chakuikhiramo chache. 
Lamentations3:14 Ine ndasanduka chakusekesa kuna anthu anga onsene; nyimbo zawo zimbakhala kuimba ine nsiku yonsene. 
Lamentations3:15 Iye andimwesa mwavi mbandiledzeresa na khomitcho ya nyatwa. 
Lamentations3:16 Iye akhutcha mano anga na ntchangalabwe; iye andiviviniza padotha. 
Lamentations3:17 Mtendere ukhali na ine, iye andibulusira; ine ndaduwalira kuti ufumi ninji." 
Lamentations3:18 Natenepo ndimbalonga kuti, “Demelero yanga yaenda, pyonsene pile pikhadikhira ine kuna MBUYA.”" 
Lamentations3:19 Ine ndimbakhalira kukumbuka kusanyika kwanga, pontho na umanzenzanga, mwavi udamwa ine na nyatwa zanga." 
Lamentations3:20 Penepi pene ndiye pimbakumbuka ine mwakuti ndikusanyika mtima pikulu pene. 
Lamentations3:21 Kwache ndingakumbuka ipi, penepo ine ndimbakhala na chidikhiro:" 
Lamentations3:22 Na thangwi ya kutifuna kukhonda mala kwa MBUYA ife nee tamaliratu tayu, thangwi iye nkhabe dzaleka tayu kuva nafe nyambalo." 
Lamentations3:23 Nsisi zache zimbaoneka zachinchino machibese onsene; kukhulupirika kwache nkhukulu pyakwanga. 
Lamentations3:24 Ine ndimbalonga ndekha ene kuti, “MBUYA ndiye pinthu pimbafuna ine basi; natenepo ndinati ndimnyindire.”" 
Lamentations3:25 MBUYA ngwadidi kuna ale, chidikhiro chawo chili muna iye, kuna anyakumsaka-saka." 
Lamentations3:26 Mphyadidi kukhala pyako fule kudikhira chipulumuso cha MBUYA. 
Lamentations3:27 Mphyadidi kuna munthu, kuthukula pyache goli-goli mbali mphale." 
Lamentations3:28 Mulekeni akhale pyache mulomo phoo, thangwi MBUYA ndiye amthukulisa." 
Lamentations3:29 Mulekeni agone na fufumimba pamataka, mwinango anagumanamo chidikhiro." 
Lamentations3:30 Mulekeni pyache aperekere phutu yache kuna nyakufuna kumgasa mbama, pontho mulekeni achitiswe manyadzo." 
Lamentations3:31 Thangwi Mbuya nkhabe pasa nkhodolo tayu anthu ache kwenda na kwenda. 
Lamentations3:32 Podi kwene kuti iye ambadzesa pyakutsukwalisa, iye anati ave nyambalo; kutifuna kwache kokhonda mala nkhukulu pyakwanga." 
Lamentations3:33 Iye nkhabe komerwa na kudzesa nyatwa, penu pyakutsukwalisa pana anthu tayu." 
Lamentations3:34 Kuponderezwa kwa anyaperezo onsene a padziko yapansi," 
Lamentations3:35 kuponderezwa kwa ufulu wa munthu pamaso pa Nyakudzulu-dzulu," 
Lamentations3:36 pontho kupotoza chilungamo pamseru wa munthu, ayi Mbuya nkhabe kupiona pinthu ninga penepi tayu?" 
Lamentations3:37 Mbani anakwanisa kutonga, pinthupyo mbapichitikadi, ngakhala hadapitonge ndi Mbuya tayu?" 
Lamentations3:38 Ayi si m'kanwa mwa Nyakudzulu-dzulu tayu, mule mumbabuluka dzedze na mtsanzayiso?" 
Lamentations3:39 Thangwi yache njanji munthu wamoyo ambadungunya, angatchunyuswa thangwi ya pyakudawa pyache." 
Lamentations3:40 Tendeni tione mwadidi njira zathu na kuziyesa, pontho mbatibwerere kuna MBUYA." 
Lamentations3:41 Tendeni tifungule mtima mbatikwiza manjathu kuna Mulungu kudzulu, mbatilonge kuti," 
Lamentations3:42 “Ife tadawa pontho tapandukira, tenepo imwe hamudatilekerere tayu." 
Lamentations3:43 “Imwe mwatibiza na kuzhangali kwanu, mwatithamangisa mbamutipha mwakusowa nsisi." 
Lamentations3:44 Imwe mwapibisa mwekha ene na makole mwakuti kupemphera kwathu nkhabe fika kuna imwe. 
Lamentations3:45 Imwe mwatisandusa pakati pa madzinza anango ninga shuzhu pontho pyakunyansa. 
Lamentations3:46 “Anyamalwathu onsene kukanwa kuli yashaa kutisedegula. 
Lamentations3:47 Ife tagoswerwa pikulu mbitigwera m'dzenje; tavungika pontho tamaliratu. 
Lamentations3:48 Mikulo ya misozi ikukuka m'maso mwanga, thangwi anthu anga amala vungika." 
Lamentations3:49 “Misozi m'maso mwanga nkhabe dzauma tayu, pontho nkhabe dzapuma tayu" 
Lamentations3:50 kufikirana MBUYA ayang'ane pansi kubulukira kudzulu mbapiona. 
Lamentations3:51 Pyonsene pimbaikha ine maso pimbandidzesera kutsukwala, thangwi ya dzedze ina akazi onsene a mumzinda mwanga." 
Lamentations3:52 “Ale akhali anyamalwanga okhonda na thangwi ene adandikhulisa ninga mbalame. 
Lamentations3:53 Iwo adandiponya wamoyo m'dzenje mbandiponyera miyala; 
Lamentations3:54 madzi adandibiza, tenepo ndidanyerezera kuti, ‘Ine ndili chifupi kusiyana nayo dziko.’" 
Lamentations3:55 “M'dzenje yakuzwika mule, ine ndidachemera dzinanu MBUYA." 
Lamentations3:56 Imwe mudava kupempha kwanga kuti, ‘Lekani phopha makutu anu pinalira ine kufuna chiphedzo.’" 
Lamentations3:57 Imwe mudadza chifupi pidakuchemerani ine, pontho mudalonga kuti, ‘Leka chita mantha.’" 
Lamentations3:58 “Mbuya imwe mudakwata mseru wanga; imwe mudaombola moyo wanga. 
Lamentations3:59 Imwe MBUYA mwaona kusowa chilungamo kwachitirwa ine. Tongani mseru wanga mwakundikomera! 
Lamentations3:60 Imwe mwaona kubwezerwa kukulu kwachita iwo, pyonsene pyasasanya iwo kupokanyisana na ine." 
Lamentations3:61 “MBUYA, imwe mwava kunditikana kukulu kwandichita iwo, pyonsene pyasasanya iwo kupokanyisana na ine," 
Lamentations3:62 pinthu pinalonga anyamalwanga chiwere-were kupokanyisana na ine nsiku yonsene yamumphu. 
Lamentations3:63 Ayang'aneni, pinachita iwo khale-khale pontho chiliri-chiliri, nyimbo zawo nsakusingirira nazo ine pano." 
Lamentations3:64 “MBUYA abwezereni mwakuthemerana na pidachita iwo, thangwi ya pinthu pidachita manjawo." 
Lamentations3:65 Phimbirani mitimawo na chakumpsampsira, pontho apaseni dzedze!" 
Lamentations3:66 Athamangiseni mwakuzhangali, MBUYA, mbamuatswaire pansi pa thambo.”" 
Lamentations4:1 Golidi wathu wadidi ule amala tinta, golidi chadi-chadi asanduka wakupupwa, miyala yakudula ya Nyumba ya Mulungu ili pyayo balala-balala pankhomo zonsene za misewu." 
Lamentations4:2 Ana a ku Zioni, ale akhali akufunika ninga golidi, lero asanduka pikalango, basa ya manja a nyakuumba pyombo." 
Lamentations4:3 Podi mbinzi ene ambayamwisa anache, mbwenye anthu anga asanduka akukala mtima, ninga nkhukutembo yakukhonda anache m'thando." 
Lamentations4:4 Na thangwi ya nyota, anawo ambakhala kwene lulume phesere kunja; ana ambachita kupempha kudya, kwache nkhabe na mbodzi ene ambaapasa tayu." 
Lamentations4:5 Anthu ale pakutoma akhadya pyakufewa, lero akuchita kulokotera m'misewu. Alembo adakulira pakutonthola, lero ali pakhuku kusaka-saka kudya." 
Lamentations4:6 Kutchunyuswa kwachita anthu anga nkhukulu kupiringana anthu a mu Sodomu, ale adavungwa kabodzi kene mbapasowa unango wakuaphedza." 
Lamentations4:7 Atongi awo akhali angwiro kupiringana matalala, pontho akuchena kupiringana mkaka, manungo awo akhali akumyalala kupiringana miyala ya rubi, pontho kuoneka kwawo kukhali ninga miyala ya safire." 
Lamentations4:8 Mbwenye lero ngakuswipa ninga nyamu-nyamu; m'misewumo anthu nkhabe kuadzindikirave tayu, khandawo yaumirira kumagogodo awo; iyo ili gugudu ninga kamuti kakuuma." 
Lamentations4:9 Ale ambafa pankhondo ndi mbwenye, kusiyana na ale ambafa na njala. Na njala iwo ambakulukutika, thangwi ya kusowa pyakudya." 
Lamentations4:10 Na manjawo akazi akuva nyambalo adatereka anawo ene adabala iwo; anawo adasanduka phoso yawo ndzidzi udavungwa anthu anga. 
Lamentations4:11 Ukali wa MBUYA wadzaziratu phamu-phamu; iye akhuthula kuzhangali kwache kwakugoswa. Iye adagasa moto mu Zioni ule udanyekesa maziko onsene. 
Lamentations4:12 Mafumu a dziko yapansi hadakhulupire tayu, podi na anthu ene onsene a dziko yapansi, kuti anyamalwa na mapanga adakwanisa kupita na pamisuwo ya mpanda wa Yerusalemu." 
Lamentations4:13 Kwache penepi pidachitika thangwi ya kudawa kwa maprofeti ache, pontho umambala wa anyansembe ache, ale adachuchisa chiropa cha anyakulungama mwenemo." 
Lamentations4:14 Iwo adafamba m'misewu chigumu-gumu ninga maboli-boli. Iwo amala ipiswa na chiropa mwakuti nkhabe munthu adawanga mtima kukhuya nguwo zawo tayu. 
Lamentations4:15 Anthu adakhuwa kuna iwo mbati, “Ndokoni kutaliko! Imwe anthu okhonda chena. Bulukani! Bulukani! Lekani kutikhuya!” Pidathawa iwo mbanzenza pakati pa madzinza anthu adalonga mbati, “Iwo hanakhalave kuno tayu.”" 
Lamentations4:16 MBUYA mwenechiroache ndiye aabalalisa; iye hakuayang'anirave tayu. Anyansembe nkhabeve paswa chilemedzo tayu, pontho akulu-akulu hakukomerwave mtima tayu." 
Lamentations4:17 Padzulu pa penepi, maso athu atopa, kuyang'ana kunjira kudikhira chiphedzo; kubulukira pa nsanja zathu ife tidayang'anira dzinza, ile nkhabe kwanisa kutipulumusa tayu." 
Lamentations4:18 Anthu akhatilonda manyalo konsene kwene, natenepo ife nee tidakwanisa kufamba m'misewu yathu tayu. Kumala kwathu kukhali chifupi, nsiku zathu zikhali zakulengeseka, thangwi kumala kwathu kukhadafika." 
Lamentations4:19 Anyakutithamangisa akhathamanga pyakwanga ninga mphamba. Iwo adatithamangisa mpakana kumapiri mbatibisalira m'thando yatchetcha. 
Lamentations4:20 Nyakudzozwache wa Mbuya, ule akhali chidikhiro cha moyo wathu, adakweshwa na misamphawo. Ife tikhanyerezera kuti pansi pa mthunzi wache tinakhala pakati pa madzinza." 
Lamentations4:21 Komerwa pontho sekera iwe Edomu, iwe nyakukhala m'dziko ya Uzi. Kwache kuna iwembo khomitcho ya nyatwa inati idzeswe; iwe unati uledzereswe mbuduliswa nguwo." 
Lamentations4:22 Iwe Zioni, kutchunyuswa kwako kunamala; MBUYA nkhabe dzakuendesave pontho kudziko ya unyaperezo tayu. Mbwenye iwe Edomu, iye anati akutchunyuse thangwi ya kudawa kwako, mbabulusa pakwecha pyakuipa pyako." 
Lamentations5:1 Kumbukani MBUYA pyonsene pyatichitikirapi. Yang'anani, mbamuone kululupiswa kwachita ifeku." 
Lamentations5:2 Pinthu pidatisiyira makolo athu pile, lero pyasanduka pya alendo; misathu yasanduka ya anyakudza." 
Lamentations5:3 Ife tasanduka ana masiye, ana akusowa ababawo; amathu asanduka amamfelwa." 
Lamentations5:4 Ife tathema kugula madzi anamwa ifewa; nkhuni zathu zonthozi tathema kuzipagalira. 
Lamentations5:5 Anyakutithamangisa ale akhala ninga goli-goli m'khosi mwathu; ife tatopa, pontho nkhabe tawiriswa kupuma tayu." 
Lamentations5:6 Ife tidaimisa manja kuna Aiguputo na Aasiria, towera tigumane pyakudya pyakukwana." 
Lamentations5:7 Makolo athu adadawa, pontho adamala kufa, tenepo kutchunyuswa kwawo kwagwera pamsolo pathu." 
Lamentations5:8 Mabitchu ndiye asanduka atongi athu mwakuti nkhabe na mbodzi ene wakutipulumusa m'manja mwawo tayu. 
Lamentations5:9 Ife timbagumana kudya kwathu kubulukira m'thando yatchetcha, kuikha moyo wathu pamoto, thangwi ya mapanga a m'thandomo." 
Lamentations5:10 Khanda yathu ikuveula ninga dzenje yamoto, thangwi ya kupha kwa njala." 
Lamentations5:11 Akazi a mu Zioni amala phatirirwa, pontho na amiyali ene a m'maluwani a Yuda." 
Lamentations5:12 Atongi athu adamangirirwa m'dzulu na manjawo; akulu-akulu nkhabe lemedzwave tayu. 
Lamentations5:13 Aphale akukhakhamizwa kupeya palibwe ninga mabitchu; ana achimuna akutchima nayo mitolo ya nkhuni. 
Lamentations5:14 Akulu-akulu nkhabeve tonga miseru pamsuwo wa mzinda; aphalembo aleka pyawo kuimba nyimbo zawo. 
Lamentations5:15 Kukomerwa kwabulukamo mumtima mwathu; kuvina-vina kwathu kwasanduka kulira. 
Lamentations5:16 Chipewu chachifumu chagwa mumsolo mwathu. Dzedze kuna ife, thangwi tadawa!" 
Lamentations5:17 Na thangwi ya penepi mitimathu yalenduka; na thangwi ya penepi maso athu achita chidima," 
Lamentations5:18 thangwi phiri ya Zioni yavungika; pontho matika akusenzekamo. 
Lamentations5:19 Kwache imwe MBUYA, ndimwe mtongi kwenda na kwenda; mpando wanu wachifumu umbakhalapo mpakana mifendu yonsene." 
Lamentations5:20 Apo mwatani ndzidzi onsene mumbatiduwalira? Thangwi yache ninji mwatisiya tekha tenepa ndzidzi ukulu ene? 
Lamentations5:21 Tibwezereni kuna imwe MBUYA, towera tibwerere kuna imwe; chitisani nsiku zathu kukhala ninga montho mwakale," 
Lamentations5:22 ngakhala imwe nee mudatikhonderatu monsene mwene tayu, pontho kuzhangali kwanu nee kudapiringane madire tayu." 
Ezekiel1:1 Chaka chamakumatatu, pansiku yachishanu ya mwezi wachinayi, pikhali ine pabodzi pene na anthu adakwatwa kwenda kudziko ya unyaperezo chifupi na mkulo wa Kebari, kudzulu kudafunguka mbandiona Mulungu kumasomphenya." 
Ezekiel1:2 Pansiku yachishanu ya mwezi onthowo, chenecho chikhali chaka chachishanu kubulukira ndzidzi udakwatwa Mfumu Yehoiakini kwenda kudziko ya unyaperezo," 
Ezekiel1:3 kweneko m'khundu mwa mkulo wa Kebari m'dziko ya Babiloni, MBUYA adalonga kuna ine, Ezekiele nyansembe, mwana Buzi. Kweneko mphamvu za MBUYA zidandigudumira." 
Ezekiel1:4 Ine ndidakwiza maso, tenepo ndidaona chonzi chikudza kubulukira kumpoto, makole akulu akuzungulirwa na cheza chakugaka moto pyakwanga pene, pontho na kuchetuma kwa njazi. M'bwaloletu mwa motowo mukhayetimira ninga nkuwa wakupukutwa mwadidi," 
Ezekiel1:5 pontho m'motomo mukhaoneka pinango ninga pyakulengwa pinayi pyamoyo. Ipyo makhaliro awo akhaoneka ninga anthu," 
Ezekiel1:6 kwache chakulengwa chonsene chikhali na nkhope zinayi na maphaphido manayi. 
Ezekiel1:7 Miyendo yawo ikhali yakudzongoka; manyalo awo akhaoneka ninga njondo za ng'ombe mbaziyetimira ninga nkuwa wakupukutwa mwadidi. 
Ezekiel1:8 Kunsi kwa maphaphido awo onsene kumakhundu awo manayi ipyo pikhali na manja a munthu. Pyonsene pinayi pikhali na nkhope na maphaphido," 
Ezekiel1:9 tenepo maphaphido a chibodzi adaphatana na a chinzache, towera chakulengwa chonsene chiyang'ane kukhundu kwache; pingafuna kubuluka pimbabuluka ninga gulu mbapikhonda zungunuza manungo awo." 
Ezekiel1:10 Nkhope zawo zikhaoneka ninga tenepa: Pyakulengwa pyonsene pinayi, chonsene chikhali na nkhope ya munthu kutsogolo kwache, kukhundu ya kumadyo chikhali na nkhope ya nkhalamu, kukhundu ya kumabzere chikhali na nkhope ya ng'ombe imuna, pontho kunduli chikhali na nkhope ya mphamba." 
Ezekiel1:11 Zenezi ndiye zikhali nkhope zawo. Maphaphido awiri chakulengwa chonsene adafuthukira kunja chakudzulu, towera maphaphido a chibodzi adaphatane na maphaphido a chinzache; mwenemo maphaphido anango awiri a chakulengwa chonsene akhaphimbira nawo manungo ache." 
Ezekiel1:12 Chakulengwa chonsene chidenderatu patsogolo. Konsene kwene kukhaenda mzimuko, ipyo pikhaendambo konthoko, okhonda zungunuka ndzidzi ukhaenda ipyo." 
Ezekiel1:13 Pakati na kati pa pyakulengwa pyamoyo pakhaoneka ninga pana makala akuyerima penu ninga nsakali ya moto. Motowo ukhachita kwenda patsogolo mbubwerera m'nduli pakati pa pyakulengwa pyamoyo; motowo ukhagaka pyakwanga pene, pontho njazi idachetuma kubulukira mwenemo." 
Ezekiel1:14 Pyakulengwapyo pikhathamanga kutsogolo mbapibwerera m'nduli ninga kuchetuma kwa njazi. 
Ezekiel1:15 Pikhayang'ana ine pyakulengwa pinayi pile, ndidaona galeta ili pansi pache m'khundu mwa chakulengwa chonsene chakukhala na nkhope zinayi." 
Ezekiel1:16 Enewa ndiye akhali makhaliro a magaletawo: Iwo akhathothomuka ninga kirisolite, pontho magaleta onsene manayi akhaoneka sasawa. Galeta yonsene ikhapingisana na galeta inango." 
Ezekiel1:17 Pikhafamba iwo, iwo akhaenda kukhundu yonsene pamakhundu anayi kwayang'ana chakulengwacho. Magaleta ale hakhazungunuka tayu ndzidzi ukhaenda pyakulengwa pile." 
Ezekiel1:18 Magaletawo akhali njenga m'dzulu, pontho akupasa mantha, tenepo magelata onsene manayi ale adamala dzala na maso ponsene pene." 
Ezekiel1:19 Ndzidzi onsene ukhafamba pyakulengwa, magaleta a m'khundu mwawo akhafambambo, pontho ngakhala pyakulengwa pinathukuka magaleta ale akhachitambo chibodzi-bodzi." 
Ezekiel1:20 Konsene kwene kukhaenda mzimuko, ipyo pikhaendambo konthoko, tenepo magaleta ale akhathukukambo pabodzi pene napyo, thangwi mzimu wa pyakulengwa pile ukhali m'magaleta mule." 
Ezekiel1:21 Pyakulengwa pile pingafamba, magaleta ale akhafambambo; pyakulengwa pile pingaimira, magaleta ale akhaimirambo; pyakulengwa pile pingathukuka, magaleta ale akhathukukambo pabodzi pene napyo, thangwi mzimu wa pyakulengwa pile ukhali m'magaleta mule." 
Ezekiel1:22 Padzulu pa misolo ya pyakulengwa pile pakhali chinthu chinango chakuoneka ninga thambo chakuyetimira ninga krusitali, pontho chikhali chakupasa mantha." 
Ezekiel1:23 Pansi pa thamboyo maphaphido awo adafuthuka phaphido kuyang'anizana na inango, pontho na maphaphido anango awiri chakulengwa chonsene chikhaphimbira manungo ache." 
Ezekiel1:24 Pikhafamba pyakulengwa pile, ine ndidava dungu ya maphaphido awo ninga kukukuma kwa madzi a m'bara, ninga kusokosa kwa gulu ikulu ya anyankhondo, ninga fala ya Nyamphamvu zonsene. Pidaimira ipyo, pidafunya maphaphido awo." 
Ezekiel1:25 Kubuluka penepo padaveka fala kubulukira padzulu pa thambo, pale pakhali padzulu pa pamisolo yawo, mwenemo ipyo pyaimira, pontho kufunya maphaphido awo." 
Ezekiel1:26 Padzulu pa thambo, pale pakhali padzulu pa misolo pawo, pakhali chinthu chinango chakuoneka ninga mpando wachifumu wa safire, pontho padzulu pa mpando pakhali chinango chakuoneka ninga munthu." 
Ezekiel1:27 Kubulukira pa chinthu chinango chakuoneka ninga chuno chache kukwira m'dzulu ndidaona chinango chakuyetimira ninga nkuwa wakupukutwa mwadidi, pontho kubulukira m'chuno chache kutchitha pansi ndidaona chinango chakuoneka ninga moto; cheza chikulu pyakwanga chidamzungulira munthuyo." 
Ezekiel1:28 Cheza chakuyetima chakumzungulira chikhali sasawa na taleza m'makole pansiku ya mvula. Chenechi ndiye chikhali cheza chakuyetima chile chimbaonesa demelero ya MBUYA. Pidapiona ine, ndidapigwisa na fufumimba. Tenepo ndidava fala ya munthu ule akhalonga." 
Ezekiel2:1 Iye adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Iwe mwana munthu, lamuka mbuimire na manyalo ako, tenepo ine ndinalonga nawe.”" 
Ezekiel2:2 Pikhalonga iye, Mzimu wa Mulungu adapita muna ine mbandiimirisa dzololo, tenepo ndidamva akulonga kuna ine." 
Ezekiel2:3 Iye adalonga mbati, “Iwe mwana munthu, ine ndikukutuma kuna Aisraele, dzinza ya anyakupandukira ile; iwo na makolo awo andidawira mpakana lero." 
Ezekiel2:4 Kunakutuma ine kule anthu ache ngakuuma mtima pontho akuchimwanika. Natenepo kalonge kuna iwo kuti, ‘MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa.’" 
Ezekiel2:5 Podi kwene iwo akavesere penu akakhonde kuvesera (thangwi iwo ndi dzinza yakupandukira) kwache anati apidziwe kuti pakati pawo pakhali mprofeti. 
Ezekiel2:6 Kulonga pya iwe, mwana munthu, leka chita nawo mantha, penu kugopa mafala analonga iwo ale. Leka chita mantha, podi kwene kuti iwe wazungulirwa na ntcheswa na nyakhanche, pontho kuti ukukhala pakati pa akong'a. Kwache leka chita mantha na pinthu pinalonga iwo, penu kugoswerwa napyo, thangwi iwo ndi dzinza yakupandukira." 
Ezekiel2:7 Iwe wathema kulonga mafalanga kuna iwo, podi kwene avesere, penu akhonde kuvesera, kumbuka kuti iwo mbanthu akupandukira." 
Ezekiel2:8 Mbwenye kulonga pya iwe, mwana munthu, vesera pinakupanga inepi. Leka khalambo wakupandukira ninga dzinza yeneyi; yashamula mbudye pinafuna ine kukupasa.”" 
Ezekiel2:9 Tenepo ndidayang'ana mbandiona dzanja ikuthambidzira kuna ine. M'manjamo mukhali mpukutu," 
Ezekiel2:10 ule adaufuthula mwenemo ine ndikuona maso. Kukhundu zonsene ziwiri mpukutu ule ukhadalembwa mafala a chiliro, akusintili na akulonga pya dzedze." 
Ezekiel3:1 Tenepo iye adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Iwe mwana munthu, idya chinaona iwechi, idya mpukutuwo; ungamala penepo ndoko kalonge kuna dzinza ya Israele.”" 
Ezekiel3:2 Natenepo ndidayashamula, tenepo iye adandipasa mpukutu ule kuti ndiudye." 
Ezekiel3:3 Iye adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Iwe mwana munthu, idya mpukutu wakupasa inewu mbukhutise mimbako.” Natenepo ndidaudya mbutapira ninga uchi m'kanwa mwanga." 
Ezekiel3:4 Kubuluka penepo iye adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Iwe mwana munthu, ndoko kuna Aisraele mbukalonge kuna iwo mafalangawa." 
Ezekiel3:5 Ine nee ndikukutuma kuna dzinza yakulonga chilongero chachilendo pontho chakunensa tayu, mbwenye kuna Aisraele," 
Ezekiel3:6 nee kuna anthu akulu-akulu akulonga pilongero pyakunensa pyakuti iwe nkhabe kupivesa tayu. Ndimomwene kuti ine mbidakutuma kuna anthu enewa, iwo mbadakuvesera." 
Ezekiel3:7 Mbwenye Aisraele nkhabe funa pyakuvesera, thangwi iwo nkhabe funa kundivesera tayu, podi dzinza yonsene ya Israele njakuuma mtima pontho yakuchimwanika." 
Ezekiel3:8 Kwache ine ndinakuchitisambo iwepo kukhala wakukhonda kuva pontho wakuuma mtima ninga iwombo. 
Ezekiel3:9 Ndinachitisa chipumu chako kukhala chakuwanga pyakwanga ninga mwala, chakuwanga ninga mwala wa daimondi; leka chita nawo mantha penu kugoswerwa nawo, podi kwene onsenewo ndi dzinza yakupandukira.”" 
Ezekiel3:10 Tenepo iye adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Iwe mwana munthu, vesera mwadidi pontho mbuikhe mumtima mwako mafala onsene analonga ine kuna iwe." 
Ezekiel3:11 Chinchino ndoko kuna anthu ako ale ali kudziko ya unyaperezo mbukalonge kuna iwo pinafuna ine, MBUYA Mulungu kulonga kuna iwo, podi akakuvesere penu akhonde pyawo kukuvesera.”" 
Ezekiel3:12 Tenepo Mzimu wa Mulungu adandithukula, penepo ndidava kunduli kwanga kugwenga kwa fala kuti, “Mbikuzwe demelero ya MBUYA Mulungu kumbuto kumbakhala iye kule!”" 
Ezekiel3:13 Ndidava kuphiphidzana kwa maphaphido a pyakulengwa unango na mwanzache pikhambuluka iwo, pontho na ungwinjiri-ngwinjiri wa magaleta a m'khundu ale, ipyo pikhasokosa pyakwanga." 
Ezekiel3:14 Mzimu wa MBUYA adandithukula mbandibulusa pakhali ine pale, tenepo ndidapita mwenemo mwakupha mtima pontho kuzhangali pikulu pene, uku mphamvu za MBUYA zandigudumira pikulu pene." 
Ezekiel3:15 Natenepo ndidafika ku Telabibu, kule kukhakhala anyakukwatwa unyaperezo m'khundu-khundu mwa mkulo wa Kebari. Ine ndidakhala pakati pawo nsiku zinomwe, wakumalwa nzeru na pinthu pidandichitikira pile." 
Ezekiel3:16 Pidagwanda nsiku zinomwe MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel3:17 “Iwe mwana munthu, lero ndakuikha nyakulondali dzinza ya Israele; tenepo vesera mafala analonga inewa mbukacheuze nawo anthu." 
Ezekiel3:18 Ngakhala ine ndinalonga kuna munthu wakuipa kuti, ‘Iwe unati ufe,’ mbwenye iwe mbukhonda kumcheuza, penu kulonga pinthu kuti aleke pyakuipa pyachepyo, towera apulumuse moyo wache, munthu weneyo anati afe nyakudawa; kwache chiropa chachecho chinagwera pamsolo pako." 
Ezekiel3:19 Mbwenye ngakhala iwe unamcheuza nyakudawikayo, iye mbakhonda leka pyakudawa pyache, penu mabasache akuipa, iye anati afe thangwi ya pyakudawa pyache; kwache iwe unapulumusa moyo wako." 
Ezekiel3:20 “Pontho ngakhala nyakulungama anataya njira mbachita pyakuipa, inembo mbandimuikhira pyakumgwegwedusa m'njira mwache, iye anati afedi. Ngakhala iwe hudamcheuze tayu, iye anati afe thangwi ya pyakudawa pyache. Kulungama kwache konsene nkhabe dzakumbukwave tayu, tenepo chiropa chache chinagwera pamsolo pako." 
Ezekiel3:21 Mbwenye ngakhala iwe unamcheuza nyakulungama kuti aleke dawa, iye mbalekadi pyakudawa pyache, iye anakhala na moyo thangwi adava kucheuzwa, pontho iwe unapulumusa moyo wako.”" 
Ezekiel3:22 Penepo mphamvu za MBUYA zidandigudumira, pontho iye adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Lamuka, ndoko kuphedi, tenepo kweneko ndinakalonga nawe.”" 
Ezekiel3:23 Natenepo ndidalamuka mbandienda kuphedi kule. Tenepo demelero ya MBUYA idaimira penepo, ninga demelero yontho ikhadaona ine m'khundu-khundu mwa mkulo wa Kebari ile. Penepo ine ndidapigwisa na fufumimba." 
Ezekiel3:24 Kubuluka penepo Mzimu wa MBUYA adapita muna ine mbandichitisa kuimira dzololo. Iye adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Ndoko kapifungire m'nyumba mwako." 
Ezekiel3:25 Iwembo mwana munthu, iwo anati akumange na nkhambala; iwe unamangwa mwakuti unachimwana na kubuluka kwene panja kwenda pakati pa anthu ako." 
Ezekiel3:26 Ine ndinachitisa lulume yako kumangika, towera ukhale pyako mulomo phoo, pontho udzachimwane kuasumulula podi kwene kuti iwo ndi dzinza yakupandukira." 
Ezekiel3:27 Mbwenye ine ndingalonga nawe, ndinafungula mulomo wako, tenepo iwe wathema kulonga kuna iwo kuti, ‘MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Munthu onsene anafuna pyakuveserayo, mbavesere, pontho munthu onsene anakhonda funa pyakuveserayo mbakhonde pyache; thangwi iwo ndi dzinza yakupandukira.’ ”" 
Ezekiel4:1 Mulungu adalonga mbati, “Chinchino iwe mwana munthu, kwata pyakulemberapo piwiri pyadongo mbupiikhe kutsogolo kwako, pontho ujambulepo mzinda wa Yerusalemu." 
Ezekiel4:2 Manga misasa kusangiza kuzungulirwa kwa mzinda na anyamalwa; manga nsanja ya anyankhondo, mbumuluke mataka kutsamira mpandawo, pontho kusasanya pyakugomolera mpanda kukhundu zonsene." 
Ezekiel4:3 Kubuluka penepo kwata chiwaya cha simbi mbuchiimise ninga fufu pakati pa iwe na mzindamo mbuyang'ane kumzindako. Mzindawo unazungulirwa na anyamalwa, tenepo nyakufuna dzauzungulira ndiwepo. Chenechi chinakhala chidzindikiro kuna dzinza ya Israele." 
Ezekiel4:4 “Kubuluka penepo gona khundu yakumabzere, mbukwate kutchunyuswa konsene kunafuna dzachitwa dzinza ya Israele. Iwe wathema kukwata kutchunyuswa kwawo nsiku zonsene zinagona iwe kukhundu kwako." 
Ezekiel4:5 Ine ndakuikhira nsiku madzana matatu na makumafemba zakuti iwe ukwate kutchunyuswa kwawo. Nsiku ibodzi kuimirirambo chaka chibodzi pya kutchunyusa kunafuna ine dzachita dzinza ya Israele. 
Ezekiel4:6 Iwe ungamalisa kuchita penepi, gona pontho kachikano kukhundu yakumadyo mbukwate kutchunyuswa kwa dzinza ya Yuda. Ine ndakuikhira nsiku makumanayi, nsiku ibodzi kuimirirambo chaka chibodzi." 
Ezekiel4:7 “Yang'anisa maso ako kuna misasa yazungulira Yerusalemu ile, mbukwize shoko yako m'dzulu kulonga mphangwa zauprofeti zakupokanyisana na mzindawo." 
Ezekiel4:8 Ine ndinakumanga na nkhambala, towera uleke fukunyuka kufikirana umalise nsiku zakuonesa kuzungulira kwako mzindawo ninga anyamalwa." 
Ezekiel4:9 “Chinchino kwata tirigu na barele, chimbamba na nyimo, pontho mapira na mulumbi; upiikhe pyonsenepyo m'mbodzi mwene mbusasanye mkate. Penepyo ndiye pinafuna iwe dzadya pansiku madzana matatu na makumafemba anafuna iwe dzagonera khundu ya kumabzere." 
Ezekiel4:10 Iwe unatawiriswa kudya mkate wakukwana dzanja basi pansiku, pontho wathema kudya pansiku kabodzi." 
Ezekiel4:11 Pima madzi akumwa akukwana makhomitcho mawiri, pontho wathema kuamwa pansiku kabodzi." 
Ezekiel4:12 Idya kudya ninga mumbadyera iwe pitumbuwa pya barele; piphike mwenemo anthu akuona maso, nkhuni zache mbazikhala matubzi akuuma a anthu.”" 
Ezekiel4:13 MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Na njira yeneyi anthu a ku Israele anadya pyakudya pyokhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu pakati pa madziko kunafuna ine dzaathamangisira kule.”" 
Ezekiel4:14 Mbwenye ndidatawira kuti, “Tayu, MBUYA Mulungu! Chipo ine ndidzati ndapiswipisa ndekha ene pamaso pa Mulungu tayu. Kutomera uwananga mpakana lero nee ndidzati kudya chinthu chakufa chokha, penu yakuchita kuphiwa na nyama zam'tsanga tayu. Chipo chinthu chokhonda chena chadzati pita pakanwa pangapa tayu.”" 
Ezekiel4:15 Iye adalonga mbati, “Pyakoma! Ndinakutawirisa kuphika mikate yako na ulowa wa ng'ombe m'mbuto mwa matubzi a munthu.”" 
Ezekiel4:16 Tenepo iye adalonga mbati, “Iwe mwana munthu, ine ndinati ndifunge pinthu pyonsene pimbadzesa kudya mu Yerusalemu. Anthu anadya pyakudya mwakunyentchera pyakuchitwa kupimwa, pontho anamwa madzi akuchita kupimwa mbasanyika napyo," 
Ezekiel4:17 thangwi mikate na madzi pinasowa. Iwo anataya mtima pyakwanga angayang'anana mbavungika thangwi ya pyakudawa pyawo.” 
Ezekiel5:1 MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Iwe mwana munthu, chinchino kwata talasada yakutwa mbuiphatise basa ninga lezi kupala ndevu na tsisi yako ene. Kubuluka penepo pima kulemera kwa tsisiyo mbuigawe patatu." 
Ezekiel5:2 Tenepo nsiku zakuzungulira kwako mzinda ninga anyamalwa zingamala, pisa khundu yachitatu ya tsisiyo mumzindamo. Kwata khundu inango mbuigwande-gwande na talasada pinafamba iwe kuzungulira mzindawo. Khundu yakusalirayo uiwazire m'dzulu towera imbuluke na mphepo, thangwi ine ndinaibalalisa uku talasada ili chinjike." 
Ezekiel5:3 Kwache isiye tsisi inango pang'ono, yeneyo uimangirire pamfundo wa mkhanjo wako." 
Ezekiel5:4 Ukwate pontho pang'ono uiponye pamoto mbuipise. Kubuluka penepo moto unafalikira kuna dzinza yonsene ya Israele.” 
Ezekiel5:5 MBUYA Mulungu adalonga mbati, “Mzinda wenewu ndi Yerusalemu, mzinda waikha ine pakati na kati pa madzinza, ule wazungulirwa na madziko anango." 
Ezekiel5:6 Kwache anthu a ku Yerusalemu adakhonda kuteweza matongero na mwambo wanga mbanyanya kudawa kupiringana madzinza na madziko azungulira ale. Iwo akhonda kuvera mwambo wanga mbakhonda kuteweza matongero anga. 
Ezekiel5:7 Natenepo ine, MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Iwe wapandukira kupiringana madzinza akuzungulirawa, iwe wakhonda kuteweza matongero anga penu kuvera mwambo wanga. Iwe watsanzira mitemo ya anthu a madzinza anango." 
Ezekiel5:8 Natenepo ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Ine mwenechiro ndasanduka nyamalwanu. Ine ndinati ndikutchunyuseni pamaso pa madzinza onsene. 
Ezekiel5:9 Na thangwi ya mifanikizo yanu yonsene yakuchitisa manyadzo ile, ine ndinati ndichite kuna imwe chinthu chakuti chipo ndidzati kuchichita tayu pontho sinachichitave tayu." 
Ezekiel5:10 Mamalisiro ache mu Yerusalemu anakhala akuti makolo anadya anawo, anambo anadya makolo awo. Ndinati ndikutchunyuseni mbandibalalisa konsene kwene onsenene anyakusalira na moyo." 
Ezekiel5:11 “Natenepo ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga kuti: Ine ninga Mulungu wamoyo, ndikudumbira kuti ine nkhabe dzakuverani nsisi, penu kukuyang'anani kwene tayu. Ine ndinakupuluzani, thangwi imwe mwaswipisa mbuto yanga yakuchena na mifanikizo yanu yakupupwa, pontho na pinthu pyakunyansa pidachita imwe pile." 
Ezekiel5:12 Khundu ibodzi ya makhundu matatu ya anthu anu anafa na muliri penu njala mumzindamo; khundu inango inamala puluzika pankhondo kunja kwa mzinda; pontho khundu yakusalirayo ndinaabalalisa kukhundu zonsene zinayi za dziko yapansi, pontho ine ndinaathamangisa na talasadanga." 
Ezekiel5:13 “Penepo shungu yanga nkhabe dzaleka, pontho ukali wanga nkhabe dzambombowa pana imwe tayu, kufikirana ndakhuthulira ukali wanga pana imwe mbandiva kululupirwa. Penepo munapidziwa kuti ine MBUYA ndalonga penepi thangwi ya ntchanje yanga na imwe." 
Ezekiel5:14 “Ine ndinakuchitisani kuvungika, pontho kukhala chinthu chakusekesa pakati pa madzinza akuzungulirani ale, pontho pamaso pa onsene akugwanda pyawo na njira." 
Ezekiel5:15 Imwe munasanduka chinthu chakusekesa pontho chakunyansa, chinthu chakucheuza nacho anango, pontho chakugumisa manungo kuna madzinza onsene akuzunguliraniwa, ndzidzi unafuna ine dzakutchunyusani thangwi ya kuzhangali kwanga, ukali wanga na kukusumululani kwanga. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Ezekiel5:16 Ine ndingaponya pana imwe matswimo akupha pontho akugoswa anjala, chinafuna ine nkhukuvungani kwene basi. Njalayo ndinati ndiinyanyise pyakwanga pene pakati panu mbandibulusa pyonsene pimbakudzeserani pyakudya pile." 
Ezekiel5:17 Ine ndinagwisa njala pontho kutumiza nyama zam'tsanga pakati panu, tenepo ipyo pinakusiyani akusowa ana. Muliri na upandu pinagwa pakati panu mbandidzesa nkhondo pakati panu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Ezekiel6:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel6:2 “Iwe mwana munthu, yang'ana kumapiri a Israele mbulonge mphangwa zanga zakupokanyisana nawo" 
Ezekiel6:3 kuti: Imwe mapiri a Israele, veserani mafala a MBUYA Mulungu. MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa kuna mapiri, pitunda, mikulo na maphedi: Ine ndili chifupi kudzesa nkhondo pakati panu, mbandivunga mbuto zanu zonsene zakupembedzerapo milungu." 
Ezekiel6:4 Maguwanu ansembe anagomolwa, pontho maguwanu akufukizirapo pyakununkhira anagwiswa; ndinacheka na talasada anthu anu onsene pamaso pa mifanikizo yanu." 
Ezekiel6:5 Ndinamwaza mitembo ya anthu a ku Israele pamaso pa mifanikizo yawo; ndinamwaza magogodo anu pakati pa maguwanu ansembe. 
Ezekiel6:6 Konsene kwene kunakhala imweko, maluwani onsene anasanduka madembe pontho mbuto zakupembedzerapo milungu zinagomolwa, towera maguwanu ansembe avungike pontho kusakazika, mifanikizo yanu iswiwe na kuvungwa, maguwa akufukizirapo pyakununkhira amale gomolwa, pontho pyonsene pidasasanya imwe pidzamale vungwa monsene mwene." 
Ezekiel6:7 Anthu anu anaphiwa ponsene pene, tenepo imwe munapidziwadi kuti ine ndine MBUYA." 
Ezekiel6:8 “Kwache ine ndinasiya anthu anango na moyo, thangwi anango a imwe anapulumuka pankhondo ndzidzi unafuna imwe dzabalaliswa pakati pa madzinza anango." 
Ezekiel6:9 Tenepo anango a imwe, ale anafuna dzapulumuka pankhondo mbakwatwa kwenda kudziko ya unyaperezo, anandikumbuka, mule mwandizhangalisa iwo, thangwi mitimawo yakusowa chikhulupiro idabauka kubuluka kuna ine mbakwatika na mifanikizo. Penepo iwo ananyansirwa napyo okha ene thangwi ya pinthu pyakuipa na pyakunyansa pyachita iwo pile." 
Ezekiel6:10 Iwo anapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA; ine nkhabe kuacheuza kwene pezi pene tayu kuti ndinaatchunyusa.” 
Ezekiel6:11 MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: “Menyesani manjanu! Dindani pansi manyalo anu mbamulire kuti ‘Mama ine!’ na thangwi ya pinthu pyakudawika pontho pyakunyansa pyonsene pyachita Aisraele. Iwo anati afe pankhondo, njala na muliri." 
Ezekiel6:12 Ale ali kutali pyakwanga anati afe na muliri, alembo ali chifupi anati afe pankhondo; alembo anafuna dzapulumuka mbasala na moyo anati afe na njala. Natenepo ine ndinati ndikhuthulire ukali wanga onsene pana iwo." 
Ezekiel6:13 Iwo anapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA, mitembo ya anyakuphiwa ingakhala nadza-nadza pakati pa mifanikizo yawo pontho na kuzungulira maguwawo ansembe, pamapiri akulapha ponsene, pontho na pansonga ya phiri yonsene, pansi pa muti onsene wakuvata na muti onsene wamthundu wakugudumira, pambuto pale pakhafukiza iwo pyakununkhira kuna mifanikizo yawo yonsene." 
Ezekiel6:14 Ine ndinati ndifuthule mkono wanga kuavunga mbandisandusa dziko yawo madembe kubulukira kuthando yatchetcha mpakana ku Ribila, konsene kwene kumbakhala iwo. Penepo iwo anapidziwadi kuti ine ndine MBUYA.”" 
Ezekiel7:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel7:2 “Iwe mwana munthu, ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa kuna dziko ya Israele: Mamalisiro! Mamalisiro afika kunkhomo zonsene zinayi za dziko!" 
Ezekiel7:3 Chinchino mamalisiro afika pana iwepo, Israele, tenepo ndinakhuthulira ukali wanga pana iwe. Ndinati ndikutonge mseru malingana na makhaliro ako mbandibwezera thangwi ya pinthu pyonsene pyakunyansa pyachita iwe."
