Ezekiel7:4 Ine nkhabe dzakuvera nsisi, penu kukuyang'ana kwene tayu; ndinati ndikutchunyuse thangwi ya makhaliro ako, pontho pinthu pyonsene pyakunyansa pyachita iwe. Penepo iwe unapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA.”" 
Ezekiel7:5 MBUYA Mulungu akulonga kuti, “Kuvungika! Kuvungika, kule chipo kudzati veka tayu kukudza pana iwe." 
Ezekiel7:6 Mamalisiro afika! Mamalisiro afika! Akufikirani! Mamalisiro afikadi! 
Ezekiel7:7 Nyatwa ikulu yadza pana imwe, ale mumbakhala m'dzikomo. Ndzidzi wafika, nsiku ili chifupi; anthu ali pampani-pani, nee kukomerwa paphiri tayu." 
Ezekiel7:8 “Ine ndili chifupi kukhuthulira ukali wanga pana imwe, pontho shungu yanga yonsene inamalira pana imwepo; ine ndinati ndikutongeni mseru malingana na makhaliro anu, pontho dzabwezera thangwi ya pinthu pyakunyansa pyachita imwepo." 
Ezekiel7:9 Ine nkhabe dzakuverani nsisi, penu kukuyang'ana kwene tayu; ine ndinati ndikutchunyuseni malingana na makhaliro anu pontho thangwi ya pinthu pyakunyansa pyachita imwe. Penepo imwe munapidziwa kuti ndine pano MBUYA aponya mashoko enewa." 
Ezekiel7:10 “Nsiku yafika, pontho yafikadi! Nyatwa ikulu yanyanduka, ndodo yaphwitha, kutumbama kwachita maluwa!" 
Ezekiel7:11 Kuzunguzika kwasanduka ndodo kuti itchunyuse kudawika; nee na mbodzi ene anafuna dzasiyiwa tayu, nee na chinthu chawo chene, nee mfuma penu demelero tayu." 
Ezekiel7:12 Ndzidzi wakwana, nsiku yafika. Nyakugula mbaleke kukomerwa, penu nyakugulisa kuphata phutu, thangwi ukali wa Mulungu unagwa pana munthu onsene." 
Ezekiel7:13 Nyakugulisa nkhabe dzaombola pontho pinthu pidagulisa iye kale pile tayu, mwenemo onsene nyakugulisa na nyakugulayo mbali moyo, thangwi masomphenya akulonga pya kuvungika kwa anthu onsene ale nkhabe dzasanduzika tayu. Na thangwi ya pyakudawa pyawo, nee mbodzi wa iwo anapulumusa moyo wache tayu." 
Ezekiel7:14 Podi kwene iwo ambaliza ngoma mbasasanyika monsene mwene, nkhabe munthu anafuna dzaenda kunkhondo tayu, thangwi ukali wanga uli pana munthu onsene." 
Ezekiel7:15 “Kuyang'ana kunja kuna nkhondo, ndingati soo m'bwalo muna njala na muliri; anyakukhala kunja kwa mzinda anafa pankhondo, pontho anyakukhala mumzindamo anafa na njala pontho muliri." 
Ezekiel7:16 Onsene ale anafuna dzapulumuka mbasala na moyo anathawira kumapiri mbalira ninga jiwa m'phedi, munthu onsene kulira thangwi ya pyakudawa pyache." 
Ezekiel7:17 Manja a munthu onsene anachita chiwewa, pontho mabondo onsene anagogobodoka." 
Ezekiel7:18 Iwo anavala masakha mbaphatwa na mantha makulu. Nkhope zawo zinagwa thangwi ya manyadzo mbapala mpala mumsolo mwawo. 
Ezekiel7:19 Silivawo anamtaya m'njira, pontho golidi wawo anakhala ninga chinthu chakunyansa. Golidi na silivawo nkhabe kwanisa dzaapulumusa tayu pansiku inafuna dzaoneka ukali wa MBUYA. Iwo nkhabe dzakwanisa kumalisa njalawo, penu kukhutisa pifu pyawo tayu na penepyo, thangwi penepyo pyaadawisa." 
Ezekiel7:20 Iwo akhanyada na pinthu pyakuthemesera napyo manungo awo mbapiphatisa basa kusasanyira mifanikizo yakunyansa ikhapembedza iwo ninga milungu. Ndi thangwi yache ine ndidasandusa mfumawoyo kukhala chinthu chakunyansa kuna iwo. 
Ezekiel7:21 Pyonsenepyo ndinati ndipipereke m'manja mwa anyakupokosera achilendo, pontho kuna amuna akudawika a padziko yapansi, tenepo iwo anapiswipisa." 
Ezekiel7:22 Ine ndinaapasa nkhodolo, pontho iwo anaswipisa mbuto yanga yakupambulika; mbava zinapita mwenemo mbaiswipisa." 
Ezekiel7:23 “Sasanyani njemazo, thangwi m'dziko mwadzala na upandu pontho mumzindamo mwadzala na kuchita pyakuzunguzika." 
Ezekiel7:24 Ine ndinati ndidzese anthu akudawikaletu pakati pa madzinza kuti apokosere nyumba zawo; ine ndinamalisa kunyada kwa anyamphamvu, pontho mbuto zawo za chipembedzo zinaswipiswa." 
Ezekiel7:25 Pyakugoswa pingafika, iwo anasaka-saka mtendere, kwache hanaugumana tayu." 
Ezekiel7:26 Dzedze pa dzedze inango, pontho mbiri pa mbiri inango mwakulondozana. Iwo anayesera kufuna kuva masomphenya kubulukira kuna maprofeti; nkhabe dzakhalapove chifunziso cha mwambo kubulukira kuna anyansembe tayu, pontho na uphungu ene wa akulu-akulu unasowa." 
Ezekiel7:27 Mfumu anasintili, mwana mfumu kwache kunakhala kusanyika mtima, pontho manja a anthu a m'dzikomo anatetemera na mantha. Ine ndinachita kuna iwo mwakuthemerana na makhaliro awo, pontho ndinaatonga mseru sasawa na mudatongerambo iwo anango. Iwo anapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA.”" 
Ezekiel8:1 Chaka chachitanthatu, pansiku yachishanu ya mwezi wachitanthatu wa unyaperezo wathu, pikhali ine m'nyumba mwanga, pabodzi pene na akulu-akulu a Yuda, penepo mphamvu za MBUYA Mulungu zidandigudumira." 
Ezekiel8:2 Ndidayang'ana mbandiona chinthu chinango chakuoneka ninga munthu. Kubulukira pale pakhaoneka ninga m'chuno mwache kutchitha pansi, akhaoneka ninga moto, pontho kubulukira penepo kukwira m'dzulu akhayetimira ninga nkuwa wakupukutwa mwadidi." 
Ezekiel8:3 Iye adafuthula chinthu chinango chile chikhaoneka ninga mkono wa munthu, tenepo adandithukula pakundikweya tsisi yanga. Kumasomphenya enewa Mzimu wa Mulungu adandiendesa m'dzulu pakati pa dziko yapansi na kudzulu. Tenepo iye adandiendesa ku Yerusalemu, kumsuwo wa m'bwaloletu wa mpanda wakumpoto wa Nyumba ya Mulungu, mule mukhali mfanikizo udazhangalisa Mulungu ule." 
Ezekiel8:4 Penepo pamaso panga padaoneka demelero ya Mulungu wa Israele ninga montho mudapionera ine kumasomphenya m'phedi mule. 
Ezekiel8:5 Tenepo iye adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Iwe mwana munthu, yang'ana kumpoto.” Ine ndidayang'anadi, tenepo msuwo wakumpoto chifupi na guwa yansembe ndidaonako mfanikizo udazhangalisa Mulungu ule." 
Ezekiel8:6 Tenepo Mulungu adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Iwe mwana munthu, ayi ukuona pinthu pinachita iwopi, pinthu pyakunyansa pinachita Aisraele, pinthu pile pinandichitisa kwenda pyanga kutali na mbuto yanga yakuchenayi? Kwache unati uone pinthu pizinji, pyakunyansa kupiringana penepi.”" 
Ezekiel8:7 Kubuluka penepo adandiendesa kumsuwo wa pachintalo. Ndidayang'ana mbandiona benga pa fufu. 
Ezekiel8:8 Iye adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Iwe mwana munthu, chinchino kumba fufuyi.” Natenepo ndidaikumbadi fufu ile mbandionapo msuwo." 
Ezekiel8:9 Natenepo adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Pita mwenemo mbukaone pinthu pyakudawika, pontho pyakunyansa pinachita iwo pano.”" 
Ezekiel8:10 Natenepo ndidapita mwenemo mbandiyang'ana. Ndidaona m'mafufu monsene mwamala jambulwa pinthu pyakukambadza pya mtundu na mtundu na nyama zokhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu, pontho na mifanikizo yonsene ya dzinza ya Israele." 
Ezekiel8:11 Patsogolo pawo padaimira akulu-akulu makumanomwe a dzinza ya Israele, pontho Yaazania mwana Shafani akhaimirambo pakati pawo. Munthu onsene m'manja mwache akhali na chiwaya chakufukizira pyakununkhira, pontho utsi wa pyakununkhira pile ukhakwira kudzulu." 
Ezekiel8:12 Iye adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Iwe mwana munthu, ayi ukuona pinachita akulu-akulu a dzinza ya Israele mumdima, kada munthu kupembedza mifanikizo yache m'nyumba mwache? Iwo akulonga kuti, ‘MBUYA hakutiona tayu; MBUYA aikhonda dziko yathuyi?’ ”" 
Ezekiel8:13 Iye adalonga pontho mbati, “Iwe unati uaone basi akuchita pinthu pyakunyansa pyakwanga kupiringana penepi.”" 
Ezekiel8:14 Natenepo adandiendesa kumsuwo wakumpoto kwa Nyumba ya MBUYA, mbandiona akazi akhala mwenemo kusintili thangwi ya kufa kwa milungu ya Tamuzu." 
Ezekiel8:15 Iye adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Iwe mwana munthu, ayi ukupiona pinachitikapi? Iwe unati uone pinthu pinango pyakunyansa kupiringana penepi.”" 
Ezekiel8:16 Kubuluka penepo adandipitisa muchintalo cham'bwalo cha Nyumba ya MBUYA, penepo pamsuwo wa Nyumba ya MBUYA, pakati pa subi yakupitira m'Nyumba ya MBUYA na guwa yansembe, pakhali amuna ninga makumawiri na ashanu. Iwo adapolamira ku Nyumba ya Mulungu mbayang'ana kumabulukiro dzuwa, pontho akhalambira dzuwa pikhabuluka iyo." 
Ezekiel8:17 Iye adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Iwe mwana munthu, ayi waona penepi? Ayi chenechi ntchinthu ching'ono kuti dzinza ya Yuda achite chinthu chakunyansa ninga chenechi? Ayi iwo athema kudzaza dzikoyi na kuchita pyakuzunguzika, pontho kuthimiza kundizhangalisa basi? Yang'ana pinachita iwo kundishola pikulu pene." 
Ezekiel8:18 Natenepo ine ndinati ndiatchunyuse na kuzhangali kwanga; ine nkhabe dzaavera nsisi, penu kuayang'ana kwene tayu. Podi kwene kuti iwo akhuwe pikulu pene kuna ine, ine nkhabe dzaavesera tayu.”" 
Ezekiel9:1 Kubuluka penepo ndidava MBUYA akuchemera mwakugaluza fala kuti, “Dzani kuno imwe, anyakufuna dzatchunyusa mzindawu. Kada munthu mbadze na chida cha nkhondo m'manja mwache.”" 
Ezekiel9:2 Natenepo ndidaona amuna atanthatu akudza kubulukira kumsuwo wakumtunda pontho wakuyang'ana kumpoto wa Nyumba ya MBUYA. Kada munthu aphatira chida chakugoswa m'manja mwache. Pabodzi pene nawo pakhali munthu unango wakuvala nguwo zakuchena, ule akhadakwapatira chakulembera na pakulembera. Iwo adapita mwenemo mbaimira m'khundu mwa guwa yansembe yankuwa." 
Ezekiel9:3 Penepa demelero ya Mulungu wa Israele idakwira m'dzulu kubulukira padzulu pa pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido, pakhakhala iyo pale mbienda kumsuwo wa Nyumba ya Mulungu. Kubuluka penepo MBUYA adachemera munthu adavala nguwo zakuchena, pontho ule adakwapatira chakulembera na pakulembera ule," 
Ezekiel9:4 mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ndoko mbufamba-famba mumzinda onsene wa Yerusalemu, pontho ikha chidindo pachipumu cha munthu onsene ule anasintili, penu kulira thangwi ya pinthu pyonsene pyakunyansa pinachitikapyo.”" 
Ezekiel9:5 Pikhavesera ine tenepo, iye adalonga kuna anthu anango mbati, “Mtewereni pinaenda iye mumzinda monsenemo mbamuphe mwakukhonda kuva nsisi penu nyambalo." 
Ezekiel9:6 Iphani nkhalamba, aphale, amiyali, akazi na ana ene, kwache lekani kupha munthu onsene wakukhala na chidindo. Tomani na mbuto yanga yakupambulika makayo.” Natenepo iwo adatoma na akulu-akulu akhali kunkhope kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu ale." 
Ezekiel9:7 Kubuluka penepo iye adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Swipisani pyanu Nyumbangayo mbamudzaze pintalo pyonsene na mitembo. Ndokoni!” Natenepo iwo adenda mbatoma na kupha anthu a mumzinda monsenemo." 
Ezekiel9:8 Pikhapha iwo anthu, mbandisiyiwa ndekha ene, ine ndidapigwisa na fufumimba mbandikhuwa kuti, “Sha, MBUYA Mulungu! Ayi imwe munafunadi kuvunga Aisraele onsene akusalirawo na ukali wanu wakhuthulira imwe pana Yerusalemu?”" 
Ezekiel9:9 MBUYA adanditawira mbati, “Pyakudawa pya dzinza ya Israele na Yuda pyanyanya maka; dziko yadzala na upandu okhokha pontho mumzindamo chilungamo nkhabemo. Iwo akulonga kuti, ‘MBUYA aikhonda dzikoyi; MBUYA hakutiona tayu?’" 
Ezekiel9:10 Natenepo ine nkhabe dzaavera nsisi, penu kuayang'ana kwene tayu. Ine ndinagwisa nyatwa pana iwo, thangwi ya pinthu pyachita iwopyo.”" 
Ezekiel9:11 Kubuluka penepo munthu adavala nguwo zakuchena, pontho adakwapatira chakulembera na pakulembera ule, adabwerako mbalonga kuna MBUYA mbati, “Ndachita pyonsene ninga mudanditongera imwe.”" 
Ezekiel10:1 Ndidayang'ana kuthambo padzulu pa misolo ya pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido pile, mbandiona chinango chakukhala ninga mpando wachifumu wa safire." 
Ezekiel10:2 MBUYA adalonga kuna munthu adavala nguwo zakuchena ule mbati, “Pita mwenemo pakati pa magaleta pansi pa pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido; dzaza manjako na makala a moto akubulukira pakati pya pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido mbuawazire kumzinda.” Tenepo iye adapita, mwenemo uku ndikuona na maso anga." 
Ezekiel10:3 Pikhapita munthu ule mwenemo, pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido pikhaimira kukhundu yakumwera kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu. Tenepo makole adadzala muchintalo cham'bwalo." 
Ezekiel10:4 Demelero ya MBUYA idabuluka padzulu pa pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido pile mbienda kumsuwo kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu. Makole adadzala Nyumba yonsene ya Mulungu, pontho pachintalo pache padzala na kuyetima kwa demelero ya MBUYA." 
Ezekiel10:5 Kuphiphidza kwa maphaphido a pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido pile kukhaveka na kuchintalo chakunja, khala ninga fala ya Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene angalonga." 
Ezekiel10:6 Pidatonga MBUYA munthu adavala nguwo zakuchena ule kuti, “Kwata moto pakati pa magaleta kubulukira pa pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido pile,” munthu ule adapitadi mwenemo mbakaimira m'khundu mwa galeta." 
Ezekiel10:7 Kubuluka penepo chakulengwa chakukhala na maphaphido chibodzi chidafuthula dzanjache kuifikisa pamoto ukhali pakati pawo ule. Icho chidapala motowo mbauikha m'manja mwa munthu adavala nguwo zakuchena ule. Iyembo adaukwata mbabuluka nawo panja. 
Ezekiel10:8 Pansi pa maphaphido a pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido pile pakhaoneka chinthu chinango chakuoneka ninga manja a munthu. 
Ezekiel10:9 Ndidayang'ana mbandiona magaleta manayi m'khundu mwa pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido pile. Galeta ibodzi kukhundu ibodzi ya pyakulengwa pile; magaleta ale akhayetimira ninga mwala wa kirisolite. 
Ezekiel10:10 Kulonga pya kuoneka kwa magaleta ale, onsene manayi akhaoneka sasawa; pontho galeta yonsene ikhapingisana na galeta inango." 
Ezekiel10:11 Pikhafamba iwo, akhakwanisa kwenda kumakhundu onsene manayi, kule kwayang'ana pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido; pyakulengwa pile pingafamba, magaleta nkhabe funika kuzungunuka tayu. Pyakulengwapyo pikhaenda kukhundu konsene kwayang'ana msolo kule mwakukhonda zungunuka pingafamba." 
Ezekiel10:12 Manungo awo onsene, kuthimizapo kunduli kwawo, manjawo na maphaphido awo ponsene pene pakhali maso okhokha ninga mudachitirambo magaleta manayi ale." 
Ezekiel10:13 Ine ndidava magaleta ale akuchemerwa kuti, “Magaleta akulira ngwinjiri-ngwinjiri!”" 
Ezekiel10:14 Chakulengwa chakukhala na maphaphido chonsene chikhali na nkhope zinayi: nkhope ibodzi ikhaoneka ninga ng'ombe imuna; inango ikhaoneka ninga nkhope ya munthu; yachitatu ikhaoneka ninga nkhope ya nkhalamu; yachinayi ikhaoneka ninga nkhope ya mphamba. 
Ezekiel10:15 Tenepo pyakulengwa pyamoyo pile pidathukuka. Pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphidopi mphile pikhadaona ine chifupi na mkulo wa Kebari. 
Ezekiel10:16 Pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido pile pingafamba magaleta a m'khundu akhafambambo; pontho pyakulengwa pile pingafuthula maphaphido awo kufuna kumbuluka, magaleta ale hakhabuluka kukhundu kwawo tayu." 
Ezekiel10:17 Pyakulengwa pile pingaimira dzololo na magaleta enembo akhaimira; pyakulengwa pile pingathukuka na magaleta enembo akhathukuka nawo pabodzi, thangwi mzimu wa pyakulengwa pya moyo pile ukhali muna iwo." 
Ezekiel10:18 Kubuluka penepo demelero ya MBUYA idabuluka pamsuwo wa Nyumba ya Mulungu ile mbiimira padzulu pa pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido. 
Ezekiel10:19 Pikhayang'anisisa ine pyakulengwa pile, pidafuthula maphaphido awo mbapimbuluka kubulukira pansi; tenepo pikhaenda ipyo magaleta ale akhaenda napyo pabodzi. Ipyo pidaphama pamsuwo wa mpanda wakumabulukiro dzuwa a Nyumba ya MBUYA, tenepo demelero ya Mulungu wa Israele ikhali padzulu papyo." 
Ezekiel10:20 Penepi ndiye pikhali pyakulengwa pile pidaona ine pansi pa mpando wachifumu wa Mulungu wa Israele chifupi na mkulo wa Kebari, tenepo ndidapidzindikira kuti ipyo pikhali pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido pile." 
Ezekiel10:21 Chakulengwa chakukhala na maphaphido chonsene chikhali na nkhope zinayi, na maphaphido manayi, pontho pansi pa maphaphido awo pakhaoneka chinthu chinango chakukhala ninga manja a munthu." 
Ezekiel10:22 Nkhope zawo zidaoneka sasawa na zile zidaona ine pamkulo wa Kebari. Chakulengwa chonsene chidenderatu m'tsogolo. 
Ezekiel11:1 Kubuluka penepo Mzimu wa Mulungu udandithukula kwenda nane kumsuwo wa mpanda wakumabulukiro dzuwa wa Nyumba ya Mulungu. Penepo pene pamsuwo wa mpandawo pakhali amuna makumawiri na ashanu, pontho pakati pawo ndidaonapo Yaazania mwana Azuri na Pelatia mwana Benaia, akadamu a anthu ale." 
Ezekiel11:2 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Iwe mwana munthu, amunache mbenewa ambasasanya kuchita pyakuipa mbapereka uphungu wakuipa mumzindamu." 
Ezekiel11:3 Iwo ambalonga kuti, ‘Ayi chinchino ndzidzi unati ukwane tayu wakuti tipimangire nyumba? Mzindawu wakhala ninga chikalango, ife takhala ninga nyama m'chikalango kutchinjirizwambo pang'ono kuna moto.’" 
Ezekiel11:4 Natenepo longa mphangwa zauprofeti kupokanyisana nawo; longa iwe mwana munthu.” 
Ezekiel11:5 Kubuluka penepo Mzimu wa MBUYA udadza pana ine mbandipanga pinthu pyakuti ndilonge mbati, “MBUYA akulonga tenepa: Imwe dzinza ya Israele pinalonga imwe mphenepi, pontho ndikupidziwa pili m'manyerezero mwanu." 
Ezekiel11:6 Imwe mwapha anthu azinji mumzinda muno mbamudzaza m'misewu yache na mitembo. 
Ezekiel11:7 “Natenepo MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: mitembo yataya imwe kweneko ndiye nyama, mzindawu ndiye chikalango, kwache ine ndinati ndikuthamangiseni mumzindamo." 
Ezekiel11:8 Imwe mumbagopa talasada, kwache talasadayo ndiye inafuna kudza na ine kukusosani. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Ezekiel11:9 Ndinakuthamangisani mumzindamu mbandikuperekani m'manja mwa anyakudza mbakutchunyusani. 
Ezekiel11:10 Imwe munaphiwa pankhondo, pontho ine ndinakutchunyusani mpakana kumadire a dziko ya Israele. Penepo imwe munapidziwadi kuti ine ndine MBUYA." 
Ezekiel11:11 Mzindawu nkhabe dzakhala chikalango kuna imwe kukutchinjirizani, penu imwe dzakhala nyama mwenemo tayu. Ine ndinati ndikutchunyuseni mpakana kumadire a dziko ya Israele." 
Ezekiel11:12 Tenepo munapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA thangwi imwe hamudateweze matongero anga tayu, penu kukoya mwambo wanga tayu, mbwenye mwatsanzira mitemo ya madzinza akuzunguliraniwa.”" 
Ezekiel11:13 Pikhalonga ine mphangwa zauprofeti, Pelatia mwana Benaia adafa. Tenepo ndidapigwisa na fufumimba mbindilira mwakugaluza fala kuti, “Mama ine, MBUYA Mulungu! Ayi munafunadi kuvunga Aisraele onsene adasalira ale?”" 
Ezekiel11:14 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel11:15 “Iwe mwana munthu, abale ako ale mbabale ako chadi-chadi, na banja yonsene ya Israele, mbale akhalonga anthu mu Yerusalemu pya iwo kuti, ‘Ali kutali pyakwanga na MBUYA; dziko yeneyi idaperekwa kuna ife kukhala yathu ene.’" 
Ezekiel11:16 “Natenepo longa kuti, ‘MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Podi kwene kuti ndidaathamangisira kutali pakati pa madzinza mbandiabalalisira pakati pa madziko anango, kwache ndzidzi pang'ono ine ndakhala kuna iwo ninga mbuto yawo yakundipembedzerapo m'dziko yaenda iwo kakhala ile.’" 
Ezekiel11:17 “Natenepo uapange kuti, ‘MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Ine ndinati ndikugumanyiseni kubulukira kuna madzinza anango mbandikubwezerani m'dziko ya Israele kubulukira kudakubalalisirani ine kule, mbandikubwezerani pontho dziko ya Israele kukhala yanu ene.’" 
Ezekiel11:18 Iwo angabwerera mwenemo, athema kubulusa mifanikizo yonsene yakunyansa pontho milungu yakuipa ile." 
Ezekiel11:19 Ine ndinati ndiapase mtima utswa na manyerezero atswa. Ndinati ndibuluse mtima wamwala muna iwo mbandiapasa mtima wamnofu. 
Ezekiel11:20 Tenepo iwo anakoya mwambo wanga mbachita mphole-mphole kuvera matongero anga. Iwo anakhala anthu anga, inembo mbindikhala Mulungu wawo." 
Ezekiel11:21 Mbwenye kulonga pya ale mitimawo imbafuna basi pyakupembedza mifanikizo yakunyansa pontho milungu yakuipa ile, ine ndinati ndiatchunyuse malingana na pinthu pyachita iwo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu.”" 
Ezekiel11:22 Kubuluka penepo pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido, pyakukhala na magaleta m'khundu mwawo pile, pidafuthula maphaphido awo mbapimbuluka, tenepo demelero ya MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele ikhali padzulu pawo." 
Ezekiel11:23 Tenepo demelero ya MBUYA idabuluka mumzinda mule mbienda kaimira paphiri kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa. 
Ezekiel11:24 Mzimu wa Mulungu adandithukula mbandiendesa kuna anthu akhadakwatwa unyaperezo kudziko ya Babiloni ale. Penepi pikhachitika kumasomphenya adandionesera Mzimu wa Mulungu ale. Kubuluka penepo masomphenya ale adakungunuka. 
Ezekiel11:25 Natenepo ndidapanga anthu akhadakwatwa unyaperezo ale pyonsene pikhadandionesa MBUYA pile. 
Ezekiel12:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel12:2 “Iwe mwana munthu, iwe ukukhala pakati pa anthu akupandukira. Iwo ana maso, kwache nkhabe kwanisa kuona; iwo ana makutu, kwache nkhabe kwanisa kuva, thangwi iwo ngakupandukira." 
Ezekiel12:3 “Natenepo iwe mwana munthu, manga mitolo yako khala ninga nyakuthawa kwawo mbulamuke kwenda, uku dzuwa ikuswa miti. Munthu onsene mbakuone ukubuluka kwenda kumbuto inango. Mwinango anavesa podi kwene kuti iwo mbanthu akupandukira." 
Ezekiel12:4 Uku dzuwa ikuswa miti, pontho uku iwo akuona maso, manga mitolo yako khala ninga nyakuthawa kwawo. Tenepo na mosiku uku iwo akuona maso, buluka kwenda pyako khala ninga anyakuthawa kwawo." 
Ezekiel12:5 Uku iwo akuona maso, phola benga pa fufu ya nyumbako mbubuluse pinthu pyako na pabengapo." 
Ezekiel12:6 Uku iwo akuona maso, thukula mitolo yako paphewa mbulamuke na mosiku, mwenemo wampsampsika nkhope yako, towera uleke kuona dziko ya kwanu. Pinachita iwepyo ntchidziwiso kucheuza nacho Aisraele.”" 
Ezekiel12:7 Natenepo ine ndidachita ninga mudapangirwa ine. Uku dzuwa ikuswa miti ine ndidabulusa mitolo yanga khala ninga nyakuthawa kwawo. Na mawulo mwache ndidaphola benga pa fufu ya nyumbanga na manja mbandibulusa na penepo pinthu pyanga pyonsene. Na mosiku mwache ine ndidathukula mitolo yanga paphewa uku akuona maso mbindienda pyanga. 
Ezekiel12:8 Mangwana mwache na machibese MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel12:9 “Iwe mwana munthu, na thangwi yakuti Aisraele akupandukirawa akukuvunza kuti pinachita iwepi ninji," 
Ezekiel12:10 apange kuti MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: ‘Mphangwa zenezi nsa mfumu wa mu Yerusalemu pabodzi pene na Aisraele onsene a mwenemo.’ 
Ezekiel12:11 Apange pontho kuti pyachita iwepi ntchidziwiso chakuacheuza nacho cha pinthu pinafuna dzaachitikira pile. Iwo anathawa kwawo mbakwatwa kwenda kudziko ya unyaperezo. 
Ezekiel12:12 “Mfumu, ule anaatonga, anathukula mitolo yache paphewa pache na mosiku mbathawa. Benga inampholwa pafufu kuti iye abuluke napo. Iye anapsampsira nkhope yache, towera aleke kwanisa kuona dziko ya kwawo." 
Ezekiel12:13 Ine ndinati ndimteyere msampha mbandimkwesha. Kubuluka penepo ndinamkwata kwenda naye ku Babiloni, dziko ya Akaladea, kwache iye nkhabe dzaiona tayu. Kweneko iye anafa." 
Ezekiel12:14 Ine ndinabalalisa kukhundu zonsene zinayi za dziko yapansi anthu onsene ambakhala m'khundu mwache, mathubu ache na anyankhondo ache; onsene ale ndinaathamangisa uku talasada ili chinjike pana iwo." 
Ezekiel12:15 “Iwo anapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA, ndingaabalalisa pakati pa madzinza anango, pontho kumadziko anango." 
Ezekiel12:16 Kwache ndinasiya na moyo anthu anango pang'ono pakati pawo kubulukira pa nkhondo, njala, na utenda, towera kweneko pakati pa madzinza anango adzindikire kuti pinthu pikhachita iwo pikhali pyakunyansa pyakwanga. Penepo iwo anapidziwadi kuti ine ndine MBUYA.”" 
Ezekiel12:17 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel12:18 “Iwe mwana munthu, pakudya utetemere, pontho pakumwa ugedemere na mantha." 
Ezekiel12:19 Longa kuna anthu a m'dzikomo kuti MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa kuna anthu akukhala mu Yerusalemu na m'dziko ya Israele: Iwo anatetemera na mantha pakudya, pontho anataya mtima pakumwa madzi. M'dziko mwawo pinthu pyonsene pinavungwa mwakuti nkhabe dzakhala pinthu tayu, thangwi munthu onsene wakukhala mwenemo ngwakuzunguzika." 
Ezekiel12:20 M'maluwani mule mwadzala anthu chinchino munati muvungwe, pontho midzi yawo inati isanduke thando yatchetcha. Tenepo anapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA.”" 
Ezekiel12:21 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel12:22 “Iwe mwana munthu, mwambi wenewu ngwanji nawo umbalongwa m'dziko ya Israele kuti: ‘Nsiku zikugwanda basi, pontho pidalonga maprofeti pile nkhabe chitika tayu!’" 
Ezekiel12:23 Natenepo apange kuti MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Mwambi wenewu ndinati ndiumalise, pontho hunalongwave tayu mu Israele. M'mbuto mwache apange kuti nsiku zili chifupi zakuti pyonsene pidalonga maprofeti pile pichitike!" 
Ezekiel12:24 “Thangwi pakati pa anthu a ku Israele nkhabe dzakhalave tayu masomphenya akunama, penu kuombedza pile pimbabausa anthu." 
Ezekiel12:25 Ine MBUYA ndinati ndilonge pinafuna ine, pontho pinati pichitikedi mwakukhonda dembuka. Thangwi nsiku za moyo wanu, imwe dzinza yakupandukira, ndinachitisa kukwana-kwana pyonsene pyalonga ine. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu.”" 
Ezekiel12:26 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel12:27 “Iwe mwana munthu, Aisraele ambalonga kuti masomphenya ako anaona iwewa pinakwata pyaka pizinji pene kuti akwane-kwane, pontho na mphangwa zako zene zakulonga pya pinthu pinafuna dzachitika kutali m'tsogolo.”" 
Ezekiel12:28 Natenepo longa kuna iwo kuti, “MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Mafala onsene alonga ine nkhabe dzadembuka tayu; pyonsene pyalonga ine pinakwana-kwana. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu.”" 
Ezekiel13:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel13:2 “Iwe mwana munthu, longa mwakupokanyisana na maprofeti a Israele ale akupeka mphangwa zauprofeti. Longa kuna anthu ale ambalonga mphangwa za mumsolo mwawo kuti avesere mafala a MBUYA." 
Ezekiel13:3 Ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Dzedze kuna maprofeti akupupwawa, ale ambapeka mphangwa zawo, pontho ale chipo hadaone masomphenya tayu." 
Ezekiel13:4 Imwe anthu a ku Israele, maprofeti anu ngakusowa basa ninga mibinzi yakukhala pakati pa madembe." 
Ezekiel13:5 Iwo hadakwire tayu m'mafufu kamangira anthu a ku Israele mwakugumuka, towera mpandawo uleke dzagwa pandzidzi wa nkhondo pansiku ya MBUYA." 
Ezekiel13:6 Masomphenya awo ngapezi-pezi, pontho kuombedza kwawo nkhwakunama. Iwo ambalonga kuti, ‘Alonga ndi MBUYA,’ mwenemo adaatuma si ine, MBUYA tayu. Kwache ambadikhira kuti mafala awo akwane-kwane!" 
Ezekiel13:7 Mbwenye ndikulonga kuti masomphenya anaona imwe ngakunama, pontho kuombedza kumbachita imwe nkhwapezi-pezi. Imwe mumbalonga kuti, ‘Alonga ndi MBUYA,’ podi kwene kuti ine sidalonge namwe tayu." 
Ezekiel13:8 “Natenepo ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Na thangwi ya mafalanu akunama pontho masomphenya anu akunamawo, ine ndina mseru na imwe. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Ezekiel13:9 Ine ndinatchunyusa maprofeti ale ambaona masomphenya akunama, pontho na kuombedza pile pimbabausa anthu. Iwo nkhabe dzakhala pabodzi na anthu anga, penu kuwerengerwa panyandandanda wa banja ya Aisraele tayu, penu dzapita m'dziko ya Israele nkhabe. Penepo imwe munapidziwadi kuti ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Ezekiel13:10 “Ndimomwene, maprofeti ale akubausa anthu anga pakulonga kuti, ‘Mtendere,’ mwenemo mtenderewo nkhabemo, pontho pinamanga anthu mafufu akupotoka, iwo ambadza mbakhwaza ntoto." 
Ezekiel13:11 Natenepo apange anyakukhwaza ntoto mafufu ale kuti mafufuwo anati agwe. Mvula yamphamvu inati ivumbe, pontho ndinagwisira matalala pa mafufuwo, pontho chonzi chinamenya mafufuwo." 
Ezekiel13:12 Mafufuwo angagwa, anthu nkhabe dzakuvunzani tayu kuti, ‘Apo ntoto udakhwaza imwe ule uli kupi?’" 
Ezekiel13:13 “Natenepo ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Na kuzhangali kwanga ndinagwisa chonzi, pontho na ukali wanga ndinagwisa mvula na matalala kuti pivunge mafufuwo." 
Ezekiel13:14 Mafufu akhwaza imwe ntoto ale, ndinati ndiagwise mbandiamwalaza, towera maziko ache asale nyimwa pakwecha. Iwo angagwa, imwe munati mumale vungika; penepo imwe munapidziwadi kuti ine ndine MBUYA." 
Ezekiel13:15 Natenepo ukali wanga ndinaukhuthulira pana mafufu na pana ale ene adaakhwaza ntoto. Ine ndinalonga kuna imwe kuti, ‘Mafufuwo avungwa, sasawambo na ale ene adaakhwaza ntoto," 
Ezekiel13:16 ale ndi maprofeti a ku Israele, ale akhalonga mphangwa zauprofeti kuna Yerusalemu mbaona masomphenya akuti panakhala mtendere, mwenemo mtenderewo nkhabemo tayu!’ Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Ezekiel13:17 “Chinchino iwe mwana munthu, pasa nkhodolo akazi pakati pa anthu ako ale akulonga mphangwa zauprofeti za mumsolo mwawo. Longa mwakupokanyisana nawo kuti" 
Ezekiel13:18 MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Dzedze kuna imwe akazi, ale ambamangirira mphinjiri m'mikono mwa anthu, mbasasanya pyakumpsampsikira nkhope kuti anthu a mathunga onsene avale, towera akweshe napyo moyo wa anthu. Ayi imwe mungakweshe moyo wa anthu anga mbamukoya moyo wanu?" 
Ezekiel13:19 Imwe mwandilulupisa pamaso pa anthu anga, towera mugumane barele wakudzala m'manja pontho manyenyeswa a mikate. Imwe mumbapha anthu ale hadatheme kufa, mbamukoya na moyo anthu ale hadatheme kukhala na moyo tayu, pakunamiza anthu anga, ale ambakomerwa na kuvesera pyakunama." 
Ezekiel13:20 “Natenepo ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Ine ndimbanyansirwa na mphinjiri zanu zile zimbaphatisa imwe basa kukwesha nazo moyo wa anthu. Ine ndinazithumula m'mikono mwawo; ine ndinasudzula anthu anga adakwesha imwe ninga mbalame ale. 
Ezekiel13:21 Ndinang'amba pyakumpsampsira napyo nkhope pimbavazika imwe anthu anga, mbandiapulumusa m'manja mwanu, tenepo iwo nkhabeve dzakhala pansi pa utongi wanu tayu. Penepo imwe munapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA." 
Ezekiel13:22 Na kunama kwanuku mudachitisa anyakulungama kutaya mtima, ale ine nkhabe funa kuavunga tayu. Imwe mudawangisa mtima anthu akuipa kuthimiza kuchita pyakuipa pyawo, mbakhonda pulumusa moyo wawo." 
Ezekiel13:23 Natenepo imwe nkhabe dzaonave masomphenya anu akunama penu kuombedza tayu. Ine ndinasudzula anthu anga kubulukira m'manja mwanu. Penepo munapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA.” 
Ezekiel14:1 Akadamu anango a Aisraele adadza kuna ine mbakhala pamaso panga. 
Ezekiel14:2 Natenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel14:3 “Iwe mwana munthu, anthu enewa aikha mitimawo pana mifanikizo, mbaikha maso awo pana pinthu pimbaadawisa pile. Ayi ine nkhuatawirisa basi kuvunza nzeru kuna ine?" 
Ezekiel14:4 Natenepo longa kuna iwo mbuapange kuti ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Ngakhala Muisraele onsene, ule aikha mtimache pana mifanikizo mbaikha maso ache pana pinthu pimbamdawisa pile, pontho ule lero akudza kuna mprofeti kumvunza nzeru, ine ene MBUYA ndinati ndimtawire, thangwi ya kuinjipa kwa mifanikizo imbapembedza iye ile!" 
Ezekiel14:5 Ine ndinachita penepi, towera kubweza mitima ya Aisraele, ale adabauka kubuluka kuna ine kupembedza mifanikizo yawo." 
Ezekiel14:6 “Natenepo longa kuna dzinza ya Israele kuti ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Lekani pyakudawa pyanu, mbamubwerere kubuluka kuna mifanikizo yanu, pontho kuleka pinthu pyakunyansa pimbachita imwe pile!" 
Ezekiel14:7 “Ngakhala mbodzi wa Aisraele, penu mlendo wakukhala pakati pa Aisraele anabauka kubuluka kuna ine kuikha mtimache pana mifanikizo, pontho kuikha maso ache pana pinthu pimbamdawisa pile, kubuluka penepo mbavunza nzeru kuna mprofeti, ine ene MBUYA ndinati ndimtawire." 
Ezekiel14:8 Ine ndinati ndimpase nkhodolo. Anzache anati aonere iye. Ine ndinati ndimbuluse pakati pa anthu anga mbakhala chinthu chakusekesa. Penepo munapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA. 
Ezekiel14:9 “Ngakhala mprofeti ananyengezwa mbalonga mphangwa zauprofeti, ndamnyengeza ndine ene MBUYA. Ine ndinati ndimtchunyuse na mkono wanga mbandimbulusa pakati pa anthu anga Israele." 
Ezekiel14:10 Onsene pabodzi pene mprofeti na ule ene anavunza nzeru kuna iye anatchunyuswa sasawa. 
Ezekiel14:11 Penepo Aisraele nkhabe dzabaukave kubuluka kuna ine tayu, penu kupiswipisa okha ene na pyakudawa pyawo pyonsene. Iwo anakhala anthu anga, pontho ine ndinakhala Mulungu wawo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu.”" 
Ezekiel14:12 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel14:13 “Iwe mwana munthu, ngakhala dziko inandidawira pakukhonda khulupirika kuna ine, ine ndinafuthula mkono wanga kuitchunyusa mbindifunga njira zache zakudzesera phoso. Ndinagwisa m'dzikomo njala ikulu ile inafuna dzapha anthu na nyama zawo zene." 
Ezekiel14:14 Podi kwene kuti amuna atatu awa, Nowa, Daniele, na Yobu mbadakhala kweneko, kulungama kwawo mbakudapulumusa kwene moyo wawo basi. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Ezekiel14:14 Podi kwene kuti amuna atatu awa, Nowa, Daniele, na Yobu mbadakhala kweneko, kulungama kwawo mbakudapulumusa kwene moyo wawo basi. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Ezekiel14:15 “Penu ngakhala ndinatumiza nyama zam'tsanga kupha anthu m'dziko monsene, towera isanduke yakugoswa mwakuti nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene anakwanisa kugwanda na mwenemo tayu," 
Ezekiel14:16 podi kwene kuti amuna atatu ale mbadakhala kweneko, ine ninga MBUYA Mulungu wamoyo ndikudumbira kuti iwo nee mbadakwanisa kupulumusa moyo wa anawo achimuna penu achikazi tayu. Iwo mbadakwanisa kwene kupulumusa moyo wawo ene basi, pontho dziko mbidasanduka thando yatchetcha. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Ezekiel14:17 “Penu ngakhala ndinadzesa nkhondo m'dzikomo mbandilonga kuti, ‘Nkhondo mbipuluze pinthu pyonsene m'dzikomo,’ pontho ngakhala ndinapha anthu onsene na nyama zawo zene," 
Ezekiel14:18 podi kwene kuti amuna atatu ale mbadakhala kweneko, ine ninga MBUYA Mulungu wamoyo ndikudumbira kuti iwo nee mbadakwanisa tayu kupulumusa moyo wa anawo achimuna penu achikazi, mbwenye kupulumusa moyo wawo ene basi." 
Ezekiel14:19 “Penu ngakhala ndinagwisa muliri m'dzikomo, pontho kukhuthulira ukali wanga pana dzikoyo pakuchuchisa chiropa, kupha anthu na nyama zawo zene," 
Ezekiel14:20 podi Nowa, Daniele, na Yobu mbadakhala penepo, ine ninga MBUYA Mulungu wa moyo ndikudumbira kuti iwo mbadakwanisa kupulumusa nee moyo wa anawo achimuna penu achikazi tayu, mbwenye kupulumusa moyo wawo ene basi thangwi ya kulungama kwawo.”" 
Ezekiel14:20 podi Nowa, Daniele, na Yobu mbadakhala penepo, ine ninga MBUYA Mulungu wa moyo ndikudumbira kuti iwo mbadakwanisa kupulumusa nee moyo wa anawo achimuna penu achikazi tayu, mbwenye kupulumusa moyo wawo ene basi thangwi ya kulungama kwawo.”" 
Ezekiel14:21 MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: “Apo pinakhala pyakunyanya tani ndingatumiza pinthu pyakugoswa pinayi kutchunyusa napyo anthu mu Yerusalemu, nkhondo, njala, nyama zam'tsanga, na muliri, kupha anthu na nyama zawo zene." 
Ezekiel14:22 Kwache panakhala anango akusalira na moyo, ana achimuna na achikazi ene anafuna dzabuluka mwenemo. Iwo anabwera kuna imwe, tenepo mungaona makhaliro na mabasawo akuipa, munadzindikira kuti ndachita chilungamo pakumtchunyusa Yerusalemu, nyatwa zonsene zidadzesa ine kuna iye." 
Ezekiel14:23 Mungaona makhaliro na mabasawo akuipa, penepo munapidziwa kuti ine sidachite kwene penepi pezi pene tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu.”" 
Ezekiel15:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel15:2 “Iwe mwana munthu, ayi mtawi una udidi wanji kusangiza na nthambi ya miti yamtundu onsene ya mumsitu?" 
Ezekiel15:3 Ayi mtawi udatomambo kukhala thabwa kusasanya nayo chinthu chadidi? Ayi munthu anakwanisa kusasanya ntchiri kubulukira kumtawi zakumanikirapo pinthu? 
Ezekiel15:4 Nkhabe, umbaponywa pamoto ninga nkhuni basi. Moto unganyekesa nsonga na phulo mbusalira pakati wakuvulika, ayi chakusaliracho unakwanisa kusasanyira nacho chinthu chinango chakufunika?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Ngakhala icho chikhali chakusowa basa ndzidzi ukhali icho chamumphu, apo ndi tani na pyamala icho nyeka pontho kuvulika? Chasanduka chakusoweratu basa!" 
Ezekiel15:6 “Natenepo MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Ninga montho mumbachitirwa mtawi kukwatwa mumsitu kudzayeswa nkhuni, sasawambo ine ndinati ndiyese nkhuni anthu ale ambakhala mu Yerusalemu." 
Ezekiel15:7 Ine ndinati ndiapase nkhodolo. Podi kwene kuti iwo achita kwene kuvulika, kwache motowo unati uanyekese basi. Tenepo ine ndingakupasani nkhodolo, imwe munapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA." 
Ezekiel15:8 Ine ndinasandusa dziko kukhala thando yatchetcha, thangwi iwo hadakhulupirike tayu kuna ine. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu.”" 
Ezekiel16:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel16:2 “Iwe mwana munthu, sumulula Yerusalemu thangwi ya pinthu pyakunyansa pyachita iye" 
Ezekiel16:3 mbulonge kuti ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa kuna Yerusalemu: “Kanani ndi dziko ya makolo ako, pontho iwe udabalirwa kweneko. Babako akhali wa Chiamori pontho mako akhali wa Chihiti." 
Ezekiel16:4 Pidabalwa iwe, nkhabe munthu adagwanda tchombo yako tayu, penu kukusambisa, penu kukukhwaza munyu, penu kukukukutiza mwadidi na nguwo tayu." 
Ezekiel16:5 Nkhabe na mbodzi ene adakuvera nsisi mbava nawe nyambalo kukuchitira chibodzi mwa pinthu penepi tayu. M'mbuto mwache pidabalwa iwe, udaponywa kunja kuminda, thangwi adanyansirwa nawe." 
Ezekiel16:6 “Tenepo ine ndidagwanda pyanga chifupi na penepo mbindikuona iwe ukuvidzula-vidzula m'chiropa chako. Pikhasamba iwe chiropa, ine ndidalonga kuna iwe kuti, ‘Khala na moyo.’" 
Ezekiel16:7 Ine ndidakuchitisa kukula ninga mmera. Iwe udakula mbusanduka mtsikana wakubalika pyakwanga. Mabele ako adaimira mwadidi mwene, pontho tsisi yako ikhali yakulapha mwadidi, iwe ule kale ukhali chipezi-pezi pontho chitakwa-takwa." 
Ezekiel16:8 “Ndidagwanda pontho na penepo, tenepo pidaikha ine maso anga pana iwe, ndidaona kuti ndiwe wathunga ene kuti ndinakwanisa kugwa nawe maya. Ndidakuvazika chakufinika changa kubisa pezi pako. Ine ndidakuvunzira mbandichita nawe chiverano cha banja, natenepo udasanduka wanga ene. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Ezekiel16:9 “Kubuluka penepo ndidakusambisa kubulusa chiropacho mbandikudzoza mafuta. 
Ezekiel16:10 Ine ndidakuvazika nguwo zakulukwa mwadidi, pontho nkhwaira za nthembe yadidiletu. Ndidakuvazika nguwo zakuchena mbandikufinikiza nguwo zakudula." 
Ezekiel16:11 Ndidakuvazika pontho pyakukuthemesera pinango. Ndidakuvazika pibangili mumkono mwako, pontho mkufu m'khosi mwako." 
Ezekiel16:12 Ndidafeka nthona pamphuno pako, pontho mphete m'makutu mwako mbandikumanga dunku yakubalika mumsolo mwako." 
Ezekiel16:13 Ndidakuthemesera na golidi pontho siliva; nguwo zako zikhali zakuchena, zakudula pontho zakulukwa mwadidi. Pyakudya pyako pikhali pyakusasanywa na ufa wadidi, uchi na mafuta aolivi. Iwe udasanduka wakubalika pyakwanga, mbukhala matsano." 
Ezekiel16:14 Iwe udaveka konsene kwene kuna madzinza onsene thangwi ya kubalika kwako, pontho demelero idakupasa ine ile idakuchitisa kuoneka wakubalika monsene mwene. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Ezekiel16:15 “Kwache iwe udanyadira kubalika kwako mbuphatisa basa kuveka kwako kusanduka puta. Iwe ukhachita uputa na munthu onsene wakugwanda pyache na njira. 
Ezekiel16:16 Iwe udaphatisa basa nguwo zako zinango kuthemesera mbuto zako zakupembedzerapo milungu mbuchitirapo uputa. Pinthu ninga penepi chipo nee pidzati chitika, pontho nee pinachitikave tayu." 
Ezekiel16:17 Iwe pontho udakwata pyakuthemesera napyo manungo pidakupasa ine pile, pyakusasanywa na siliva na golidi pile, mbupisasanyira wekha ene adzimunthu amuna kukhala milungu, m'nduli mwache udachita nawo pyakuzuda." 
Ezekiel16:18 Iwe udakwata nguwo zakulukwa mwadidi zidakupasa ine zile, mbuzivazika adzimunthuwo. Tenepo udapereka kuna ipyo mafutanga aolivi na pyakufukiza pyakununkhira ninga nsembe." 
Ezekiel16:19 Phoso idakupasa ine kuti udye, ufa wadidi, mafuta aolivi, na uchi, iwe udapipereka pyako ninga nsembe zakhwema yadidi kuna milunguyo. Penepi ndiye pidachita iwe. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Ezekiel16:20 “Iwe udakwata anako achimuna na achikazi ene adandibalira iwe ale mbuapereke ninga nsembe yakudya kuna milunguyo. Ayi uputa ukhachita iwewo hudakukwane tayu? 
Ezekiel16:21 Iwe udacheka ananga mbuapereka nsembe kuna milunguyo. 
Ezekiel16:22 Pyakunyansa pyonsene pikhachita iwe, pontho na uputa onsene ukhachita iwe, iwe hudakumbuke tayu nsiku za utsikanako pikhali iwe chipezi-pezi pontho chitakwa-takwa, kuvidzula-vidzula m'chiropa chako kukhachita iwe kule." 
Ezekiel16:23 “Dzedze! Dzedze kuna iwe. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu! Kuthimizira papyakudawika pyako pinango pyonsene pyachita iwe," 
Ezekiel16:24 iwe udapisasanyira mbuto yakupembedzerapo milungu, pontho kuchita uputa m'khundu-khundu mwa njira zonsene." 
Ezekiel16:25 Pamphambano ponsene iwe udasasanya mbuto zakupembedzerapo milungu mbululupisa kubalika kwako penepo pakupereka manungo ako kuna munthu onsene wakugwanda pyache na njira mbunyanya kuchita uputa. 
Ezekiel16:26 Anthu a ku Iguputo iwe udachita nawo pyauputa, atsanthembako achimaso-maso ale. Penepo udandizhangalisa, thangwi udanyanya kuchita uputa." 
Ezekiel16:27 “Natenepo ine ndidafuthula dzanjanga kukutchunyusa mbandichepesa madire ako; ndidakuperekani m'manja mwa Afilisti, ambakuzonda, pontho adatutumuka na makhaliro ako akunyansa ale." 
Ezekiel16:28 Iwe udachita pontho uputa na Aasiria, thangwi pikhumbo pyako pidainjipa; podi kubuluka penepo, ipyo hapidakukwane tayu." 
Ezekiel16:29 Tenepo udathimiza basi kuchita uputa na Ababiloni, dziko ya anyamalonda, mbwenye podi kwene kuti pikhali tenepo, iwe nee udakwane napyo tayu.”" 
Ezekiel16:30 MBUYA Mulungu akulonga kuti, “Iwe mtimako ngwakukwatika msanga! Iwe udachita pinthu pyonsenepi ninga puta wakusowa manyadzo." 
Ezekiel16:31 Iwe udapisasanyira mbuto yakupembedzerapo milungu, pontho kuchita uputa m'khundu-khundu mwa njira zonsene. Kwache iwe nee ukhachita ninga mumbachitira maputa anango, thangwi iwe nee ukhafuna kupagalwi tayu." 
Ezekiel16:32 “Iwe mkazi okhonda khulupirika! Iwe umbafuna amuna achilendo kupiringana mamunako chadi-chadi. 
Ezekiel16:33 Puta onsene ambapagalwi na mamuna onsene anagona na iye, mbwenye iwe umbapereka mitukwa kuna pibwenji pyako pyonsene kuanyengerera kuti adze kuna iwe kubulukira konsene kwene dzagona nawe." 
Ezekiel16:34 Natenepo uputako wasiyana na uputa wa anango; pakhali nkhabe na mbodzi ene akhachita kukuvunzira kuti ugone naye. Iwe ndiwe wakusiyanadi na anango, thangwi umbaapagali amunawo ndiwepo mbukhonda pagalwi na kobiri ene." 
Ezekiel16:35 “Natenepo iwe puta, vesera pinalonga MBUYA!" 
Ezekiel16:36 MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Na thangwi ya pikhumbo pyako pyakuipa, pontho kupionesa kwako pezi pakugonana na pibwenji pyako, pontho na thangwi ya mifanikizo yako yonsene yakunyansa, pontho na kupereka chiropa cha anako kuna milungu ninga nsembe," 
Ezekiel16:37 natenepo ine ndinati ndigumanyise pibwenji pyako pyonsene pimbakomerwa na iwe pile, pile pimbafuna iwe na pile pene pimbazonda iwe. Ine ndinati ndiagumanyise onsenewo kubulukira konsene kwene mwakupokanyisana nawe mbandikudula nguwo zako pamaso pawo, tenepo iwo anakuona pezi." 
Ezekiel16:38 Ine ndinati ndikutchunyise ninga mumbatchunyusirwa maputa pontho mphandu. Thangwi ya ntchanje yanga ndinakupha mwakuzhangali pyakwanga. 
Ezekiel16:39 Ine ndinakupereka m'manja mwa pibwenji pyakopyo, tenepo ipyo pinavunga mbuto zako zakupembedzerapo milungu pontho zakuchitirapo uputa zile. Ipyo pinakudula nguwo zako na pyakuthemesera pyako mbusiyiwa chipezi-pezi pontho chitakwa-takwa." 
Ezekiel16:40 Iwo anakudzesera gulu ya anthu ale anafuna dzakuponyera miyala, pontho anakugwanda-gwanda m'mapindi na matalasadawo." 
Ezekiel16:41 Ipyo pinapisa nyumba zako mbapikutchunyusa pakwecha mwenemo akazi azinji akuona maso. Ine ndinamalisa uputako, tenepo iwe nkhabe dzapagali pontho pibwenji pyako tayu." 
Ezekiel16:42 Penepo ukali wanga pana iwe unambombowa, pontho ntchanje yanga inamala; mtimanga unakhala pansi mbandikhonda kukuzhangalira pontho tayu." 
Ezekiel16:43 “Na thangwi yakuti iwe udaduwalira nsiku za utsikanako mbundizhangalisa na pinthu pyonsene pyachita iwe, ine ndinati ndipiikhe pamsolo pako pyonsene pyachita iwe. Ayi iwe hudathimize tayu kuchita pyakuzuda padzulu papinthu pinango pyonsene pyakunyansa pikhachita iwe pile? Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu.”" 
Ezekiel16:44 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Iwe Yerusalemu, anthu analonga pya iwe mwambi wakuti, ‘Mwana ambaonera pimbachita mache.’" 
Ezekiel16:45 Iwe ndiwe mwana chadi-chadi wa mako, ule adakhondambo mamunache na anache ene; iwe ndiwe nana chadi-chadi wa abale ako, ale adakhondambo amunawo na anawo. Mako akhali wa Chihiti, babakombo akhali wa Chiamori." 
Ezekiel16:46 Nanako akhali Samaria, ule akhakhala kumpoto kwako pabodzi pene na anache achikazi, pontho nyamsolo wako, ule akhakhala kumwera kwako, akhali Sodomu." 
Ezekiel16:47 Iwe hudateweze kokha njira zawo, penu kutsanzira makhaliro awo akunyansawo tayu, mbwenye pidagwanda ndzidzi pang'ono, makhaliro ako onsene adanyanyiratu kuipa kupiringana iwo.”" 
Ezekiel16:48 MBUYA Mulungu adalonga mbati, “Ine ninga Mulungu wamoyo ndikudumbira kuti nyamsolo wako Sodomu na midzi yakumzungulira hadachite pyakuipa ninga pyachita iwe na ananakopi tayu." 
Ezekiel16:49 Natenepo pyakudawa pya nanako Sodomu mphipi: Iye na midzi yakumzungulira akhali akutumbama, akhadya pyadidi, mbakhala pakutonthola: iwo hadatsalakane pya anyakutcherenga na anyakusowa tayu." 
Ezekiel16:50 Iwo akhali akunyada mbachita pinthu pyakunyansa pamaso panga. Ndi thangwi yache ine ndidaavunga ninga pinaona imwe chinchinopi. 
Ezekiel16:51 Samaria hadachite na jada ene ya pyakudawa pyachita iwepi tayu. Iwe ndiye wanyanya kuchita pinthu pyakunyansa kupiringana iye, pontho wachitisa abale ako kuoneka ninga mbwenye na pinthu pyakunyansa pyonsene pyachita iwepi." 
Ezekiel16:52 Natenepo ndiwe wathema kuchita manyadzo, thangwi wachitisa abale ako kuonekambo ninga akulungama kusiyana na iwepo. Na thangwi yakuti pyakudawa pyako ndiye pidanyanya kuipa kusangiza na pyawo, iwo akuoneka ninga akulungama kupiringana iwepo. Natenepo chita manyadzo mbukule msolo, thangwi iwe wachitisa mbale ako akuoneka ninga mbwenye.”" 
Ezekiel16:53 MBUYA akulonga kuna Yerusalemu kuti, “Kwache ndinati ndichitise pinthu pya Sodomu na midzi yakumzungulira, pontho pya Samaria na midzi yakumzungulira kufamba pontho mwadidi. Na iwe enembo ndinati ndichitise pinthu pyako kufamba pontho mwadidi," 
Ezekiel16:54 towera iwe udzachite manyadzo, pontho kukula msolo na pinthu pyonsene pyachita iwe kuonesa kuti abale ako ndi mbwenye kusiyana na iwe." 
Ezekiel16:55 Kulonga pya abale ako, Sodomu na midzi yakumzungulira pontho Samaria na midzi yakumzungulira, anati abwerere ninga montho mukhali iwo kale; iwembo na midzi yakukuzungulira munati mubwerere ninga montho mukhali iwe kale." 
Ezekiel16:56 Ayi si iwe tayu adasedegula Sodomu nsiku zile zikhanyada iwe," 
Ezekiel16:57 mwenemo pyakuipa pyako pidzati onekera tayu pakwecha? Lero wakhalambo ninga iye, kusanduka chakusekesa kuna Aedomu, na atsanthembako onsene pontho na Afilisti, onsene anyakukuzungulira ambakululupisa ale." 
Ezekiel16:58 Iwe wathema kuona nyatwa thangwi ya pyakuzuda, pontho pyakunyansa pyachita iwe. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu.”" 
Ezekiel16:59 MBUYA Mulungu adalonga mbati, “Ine ndinati ndichite kuna iwe mwakuthemerana na pinthu pidachita iwe, thangwi iwe walulupisa kudumbira kudachita ine pakuswa chiverano." 
Ezekiel16:60 Kwache ndinati ndikumbuke chiverano chidachita iwe na ine, mwenemo mbuli mtsikana. Ndinati ndikhazikise nawe chiverano chokhonda mala." 
Ezekiel16:61 Tenepo iwe unakumbuka makhaliro ako akale mbuchita manyadzo kutambira pontho mbaleako wamkulu na wamng'ono ene. Ine ndinaapereka kuna iwe ninga anako achikazi, kwache nee na thangwi ya chiverano chidachita iwe na ine chile tayu." 
Ezekiel16:62 Ndinati ndikhazikise chiverano changa na iwe, pontho unapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA." 
Ezekiel16:63 Ine ndinakulekerera pyakudawa pyako pyonsene, kwache unapikumbuka mbuchita napyo manyadzo mwakuti iwe nkhabe na kufuna kwene kupilonga tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu.”" 
Ezekiel17:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel17:2 “Iwe mwana munthu, longa nthanthi kuna dzinza ya Israele, pontho uphatise basa msangani." 
Ezekiel17:3 Longa kuna iwo kuti MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Pidachitwa na mphamba ukulu wakukhala na maphaphido amphamvu, manthenga akulapha akudzala na mathotho akusiyana-siyana, ule udadza ku Lebanoni. Iwo udakaula nsonga ya muti yamkungudza," 
Ezekiel17:4 iwo udakhwadzula mphukira yakunsongalonga mbaithukula kwenda nayo kudziko ya malonda. Kweneko adaitcheka mumzinda wa anyamalonda. 
Ezekiel17:5 “Kubuluka penepo iwo udakwata mbewu pang'ono kubulukira m'dzikomo. Iwo adaibzala m'mataka adidi ninga mkotamu m'khundu-khundu mwa madzi. 
Ezekiel17:6 Mbewuyo idamera mbisanduka mtawi wakuwanga mwadidi. Nthambi zache zidatanthawira m'dzulu kukhali mphamba ule, pontho mitsitsi yache idapita pansi. Tenepo mtawi ule udasanduka ukulu ene mbugudumira." 
Ezekiel17:7 “Pakhali pontho mphamba unango ukulu wakukhala na maphaphido amphamvu na manthenga akulapha. Ndzidzi wenewu mtawi ule udayang'anisa mitsitsi yache kukhali mphamba ule, kubulukira pa mbuto pakhadabzalwa iwo pale, pontho udatanthawirisa nthambi zache kuna iwo kufuna kuti umpase madzi." 
Ezekiel17:8 Kwache mtawi ule ukhadabzalwa kale m'mataka akubalisa pinthu, m'khundu-khundu mwa madzi, towera ugudumire, kubala nsapo, pontho kukhala mtawi wadidiletu." 
Ezekiel17:9 “Longa kuna iwo kuti MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Ayi mtawi wenewu unakuladi mwadidi? Ayi mphamba wakutoma anaudula tayu mbaupuluza nsapo zache, towera mtawiwo uunyale pyawo? Mphukira zache zachinchino zonsene zinaunyala. Mtawi ule nkhabe funika anyamphamvu penu anthu azinji ene kuti audule tayu." 
Ezekiel17:10 Podi kwene kuti mbudachita kutchekwa panango pene, ayi iwo mbudakula mwadidi? Ayi mbudadudumuka monsene mwene pidamenya mphepo yakumabulukiro dzuwa, kududumuka pambuto padabzalwa iwo pale tayu?”" 
Ezekiel17:11 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel17:12 “Longa kuna dzinza yakupandukirayi kuti, ‘Ayi imwe nkhabe dziwa tayu kuti msangani wenewu ukulonganji?’ Longa kuna iwo kuti mfumu wa ku Babiloni adenda ku Yerusalemu mbakwata unyaperezo mfumu na mathubu ache kwenda nawo ku Babiloni." 
Ezekiel17:13 Iye adakwata mbodzi wa m'banja yachifumu mbachita naye chiverano pakumdumbirisa. Iye adakwata pontho anthu akuveka a m'dzikomo," 
Ezekiel17:14 towera ufumuwo umale mphamvu mbukhonda dzalamuka pontho, mbukhalapo thangwi ya kukoya chiverano chile." 
Ezekiel17:15 Mbwenye mfumu wa Yuda adampandukira pakutumiza aimiriri a dziko kuna mfumu wa Iguputo, towera akakwate akavalo pontho na gulu ikulu ya anyankhondo. Ayi penepi pinamchitisa kupikwanisa? Ayi iye ule ambachita pinthu penepi anakwanisa kupulumuka? Ayi iye anakwanisa kuswa chiverano mbathawa?" 
Ezekiel17:16 “Ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga kuti ine ninga Mulungu wamoyo ndikudumbira kuti mfumu weneyu anati akafere ku Babiloni, thangwi iye adaswa kudumbira kwache na chiverano chidachita iye na mfumu wa ku Babiloni, ule adampitisa ufumu." 
Ezekiel17:17 Mfumu wa ku Iguputo na anyankhondo ache amphamvu nkhabe dzamphedza tayu pankhondo yeneyi, ndzidzi unafuna dzamulukwa mataka kutsamira mpanda, pontho kumanga nsanja za anyankhondo kuzungulira mizinda ya Yuda, towera apuluze anthu azinji ene." 
Ezekiel17:18 Iye adalulupisa kudumbira kudachita iye pakuswa chiverano. Na thangwi yakuti iye akhadadumbira kukhala wakuvera, kwache adachita pinthu pyonsenepi, tenepo iye nkhabe dzapulumuka tayu.”" 
Ezekiel17:19 MBUYA Mulungu adalonga mbati, “Ine ninga Mulungu wamoyo ndikudumbira kuti ndinati ndimtchunyuse thangwi adalulupisa chiverano chidadumbira iye na dzinanga." 
Ezekiel17:20 Ine ndinamzungulira na kokota mbakweshwa na msampha. Ine ndinamdzesa ku Babiloni mbandimtchunyusa kweneko, thangwi ya kukhonda kwache khulupirika kuna ine." 
Ezekiel17:21 Anyankhondo ache onsene anafuna dzathawa ale anamala kuphiwa pankhondo, pontho anyakusalira na moyo anabalaliswa kunkhomo zonsene zinayi za dziko yapansi. Penepo imwe munapidziwa kuti ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu.”" 
Ezekiel17:22 MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: “Ine ene ndinagwedula mphukira kubulukira pa nsongalonga pa muti wamkungudza mbandiitcheka; ndinakaula nthambi itete mbandikaitcheka pansonga ya phiri yakulapha. 
Ezekiel17:23 Padzululetu pa mapiri a Israele ndiye panafuna ine kaitcheka; iyo inamera nthambi, pontho kubala nsapo mbusanduka mkungudza wakukoma m'maso. Mbalame zamtundu na mtundu zinamanga pisa pyawo mwenemo; izo zinagumana mthunzi munthambi zachezo." 
Ezekiel17:24 Miti yonsene ya m'dzikomo inadziwa kuti ndine MBUYA ndimbagwanda miti yakulapha mbindichitisa miti ing'ono-ing'ono kulapha. Ine ndimbaunyalisa miti yakubiriwira mbandichitisa miti yakududumuka kubiriwira. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA, pontho ndinati ndipichitedi.”" 
Ezekiel18:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel18:2 “Ayi imwe anthu munafuna kulonganji, pakuphatisa basa mwambi ufu kulonga pya dziko ya Israele: ‘Makolo adadya nsapo zakujuja, kwache mano a ana ndiye adazirizwa?’ ”" 
Ezekiel18:3 MBUYA Mulungu adalonga mbati, “Ine ninga Mulungu wamoyo ndikudumbira kuti imwe nkhabe dzaphatisave basa mwambi wenewu tayu mu Israele." 
Ezekiel18:4 Thangwi munthu onsene ana moyo ngwanga; baba munthu na mwana ene, onsene pabodzi nganga. Nyakudawa onsene ndiye athema kufa." 
Ezekiel18:5 “Tisangize kuti pana nyakulungama, ule ambachita pyakulungama pontho pyadidi." 
Ezekiel18:6 Iye nkhabe kwenda kadya pambuto zakupembedzerapo milungu pamapiri, penu kupembedzambo nawo mifanikizo ya dzinza ya Israele. Iye nkhabe chita pyakuzuda na mkazi tsanthembache, penu kugona na mkazi wakumwezi." 
Ezekiel18:7 Iye nkhabe pondereza na munthu ene tayu, mbwenye iye ambabwezera chinthu chidakwata iye pinyolo; iye nkhabe bera munthu tayu, mbwenye ambapasa pyakudya anyanjala mbapereka pyakuvala kuna anyakupisowa." 
Ezekiel18:8 Iye nkhabe chitisa katapira tayu angafiyalisa, penu kufiyalisa ninga mumbachitira anyamalonda. Iye ambakhondesa manjache kuchita pyakudawika mbatonga na chilungamo mseru wa pakati pa munthu na mwanzache." 
Ezekiel18:9 Iye ambavera mwambo wanga, mbachita mphole-mphole kuteweza matongero anga. Munthu ninga weneyu ngwakulungama; iye anati akhale na moyo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu.”" 
Ezekiel18:10 “Tisangiza kuti munthu weneyu ana mwanache, ule ambapha na kuba, pontho kuchita pinthu pinango pyakuipa ninga penepi," 
Ezekiel18:11 pinthu pyakuti chipo babache hadzati kupichita tayu. Iye ambaenda kadya pambuto zakupembedzerapo milungu pamapiri. Iye ambachita pyakuzuda na mkazi tsanthembache. 
Ezekiel18:12 Iye ambapondereza anyakutcherenga na anyakusowa. Iye ambaba. Iye nkhabe bwezera pinthu pidakwata iye pinyolo. Iye ambaenda kumbuto zakupembedzerapo mifanikizo. Iye ambachita pinthu pyakunyansa. 
Ezekiel18:13 Iye ambachitisa katapira. Iye ambafiyalisa ninga mumbachitira anyamalonda. Ayi munthu ninga weneyu athema kukhala na moyo? Nkhabe tayu! Na thangwi yakuti iye achita pinthu pyonsene pyakunyansapi, iye anati aphiwe chiropa chache mbachidzagwera pamsolo pache." 
Ezekiel18:14 “Kwache tisangize weneyumbo ana mwana wamamuna, ule ambaonera babache akuchita pyakudawa pyonsenepi, kwache podi kwene kuti iye ambaonera pinachita babacheyo, iye nkhabe kupitsanzira tayu." 
Ezekiel18:15 “Iye nkhabe kwenda kadya pambuto zakupembedzerapo milungu pamapiri, penu kupembedzambo nawo mifanikizo ya dzinza ya Israele. Iye nkhabe chita pyakuzuda na mkazi tsanthembache." 
Ezekiel18:16 Iye nkhabe pondereza na munthu ene tayu, mbwenye iye ambabwezera chinthu chidaphatira iye pinyolo; iye nkhabe bera munthu tayu, mbwenye ambapasa pyakudya anyanjala mbapereka pyakuvala kuna anyakupisowa." 
Ezekiel18:17 Iye ambakhondesa manjache kuchita pyakudawika, iye nkhabe kuchitisa katapira tayu, penu kufiyalisa ninga mumbachitira anyamalonda. Iye ambavera mwambo wanga, mbachita mphole-mphole kuteweza matongero anga. “Iye nkhabe dzafa tayu thangwi ya kudawa kwa babache; iye anati akhale na moyo." 
Ezekiel18:18 Mbwenye babacheyo anati afe, thangwi ya kupondereza anango, kubera mwanzache, pontho kuchita pinthu pyakuipa kuna anthu onsene." 
Ezekiel18:19 “Kwache imwe mumbavunza kuti, ‘Thangwi yache ninji kuti mwana aleke tchunyuswa thangwi ya pyakudawa pya babache?’ Podi mwanayo achita pinthu pyakulungama pontho pyakuthema mbachita mphole-mphole kutewera matongero anga, iye anati akhale na moyo." 
Ezekiel18:20 Nyakudawayo ndiye athema kufa. Mwana hadatheme tayu kutchunyuswa thangwi ya pyakudawa pya babache, penu babambo kutchunyuswa thangwi ya pyakudawa pya mwanache. Kulungama kwache munthu ndiye kunafuna iye dzafupwa nako, pontho kuipa kwache munthu ndiye kunafuna iye dzatchunyuswa nako." 
Ezekiel18:21 “Mbwenye ngakhala nyakuipa analeka chita pyakudawa pyonsene pyachita iye mbakoya mwambo wanga, pontho kuchita pyakulungama pontho pyakuthema, iye anati akhale na moyo; iye hanafa tayu." 
Ezekiel18:22 Pyakudawa pyache pyonsene pyachita iye pinalekererwa. Na thangwi ya pyakulungama pyonsene pyachita iye, anati akhale na moyo." 
Ezekiel18:23 Ayi ine ndimbakomerwa na imfa ya munthu wakuipa? Nkhabe! Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu. Nkhabe tayu, ine ndimbakomerwa nyakudawa angaleka pyakudawa pyache mbakhala na moyo." 
Ezekiel18:24 “Mbwenye ngakhala nyakulungama analeka chita pyakulungama mbatoma kuchita pyakuipa, mbachita pinthu pyakunyansa pimbachita anyakuipa pile, ayi weneyo athema basi kukhala na moyo? Pinthu pyakulungama pyonsene pyachita iye nee chibodzi chinawerengerwa tayu. Na thangwi ya kukhonda khulupirika kwache, iye adawa pontho thangwi ya pyakudawa pyachita iyepyo, iye anati afe." 
Ezekiel18:25 “Kwache imwe mumbalonga kuti, ‘Njira zache MBUYA si zakulungama tayu.’ Ngavani kuno imwe Aisraele: Ayi njira zanga nsakukhonda lungama? Ayi zakupotoka si njira zanuzo tayu?" 
Ezekiel18:26 Ngakhala nyakulungama analeka chita pyakulungama mbatoma kuchita pyakuipa, iye anati afe thangwi ya kudawa kwacheko; na thangwi ya pyakuipa pyachita iye, iye anati afe." 
Ezekiel18:27 Mbwenye ngakhala nyakuipa analeka pyakudawika pyonsene pyachita iye mbachita pyakulungama pontho pyadidi, iye anati apulumuse moyo wache." 
Ezekiel18:28 Podi iye adzindikira pyakuipa pyachita iye mbapileka, iye anati akhale na moyo; iye nkhabe dzafa tayu." 
Ezekiel18:29 Kwache dzinza ya Israele imbalonga kuti, ‘Njira za MBUYA si zakulungama tayu?’ Ayi imwe dzinza ya Israele, njira zanga si zakulungama tayu? Ayi zakupotoka si njira zanuzo tayu?" 
Ezekiel18:30 “Natenepo imwe dzinza ya Israele, ine ndinakutongani mseru, kada munthu malingana na mabasache! Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu. Lekani pyakudawa pyanu! Zungunukani kubuluka kuna pyakuipa pyachita imwe; penepo kudawa nkhabe dzakuvungani tayu." 
Ezekiel18:31 Pikhondeseni mwekha ene kuchita pyakuipa pyamtundu onsene mbamukhale na mtima utswa pontho na mzimu wachinchino. Thangwi yache ninji imwe Aisraele munafuna kufa? 
Ezekiel18:32 Thangwi ine nkhabe komerwa tayu kuti munthu na mbodzi ene afe. Lekani pyakudawa pyanu mbamukhale na moyo! Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu.” 
Ezekiel19:1 MBUYA andipanga kuimba nyimbo ya maliro kulonga pya atongi a Israele 
Ezekiel19:2 kuti: “Mako akhalidi ninga nkhalamu ikazi pakati pa nkhalamu. Iye akhagona pakati pa ana a nkhalamu mbalera mwadidi anache. 
Ezekiel19:3 Iye adakuza mwanache mbodzi, tenepo mwanayo adasanduka nkhalamu yamphamvu. Iye adafunziswa kuphata nyama, pontho akhadya anthu." 
Ezekiel19:4 Madzinza adava pya iye, mbamkwesha na mulindi. Na ngoloweko iwo adamkwekwetera kudziko ya Iguputo." 
Ezekiel19:5 “Pidaona nkhalamu ikazi ile kuti pikhadikhira iye pyachimwanika, chidikhiro chache chonsene chidamala kwenda; iye adakwata pontho mwanache unanago mbamsanduza nkhalamu yamphamvu." 
Ezekiel19:6 Iye adafamba na nkhalamu zinzache, thangwi iye adasanduka nkhalamu yamphamvu. Iye adafunziswambo kuphata nyama, pontho akhadya anthu." 
Ezekiel19:7 Iye adagwisa mbuto zawo zakutchingwa na mpanda, mbasakaza maluwani. Dziko na anthu akhakhala mwenemo ale, adaphatwa na mantha na kubangula kwache." 
Ezekiel19:8 Madzinza adadza dzachita naye nkhondo, ale adadza kubulukira kunthemba zonsene zakuzungulira. Iwo adamteyera misamphawo tenepo iwo adamkwesha na mulindi wawo." 
Ezekiel19:9 Na ngoloweko yawo iwo adampitisa m'thanga mbadza naye kuna mfumu wa ku Babiloni mbamuikha m'perezo, tenepo kubangula kwache hakudavekeve tayu pamapiri a Israele." 
Ezekiel19:10 “Mako akhali ninga mtawi m'munda wamfesa wakubzalwa m'khundu-khundu mwa mkulo; ukhali na nsapo zizinji pontho wakugudumira thangwi ya kuinjipa kwa madzi. 
Ezekiel19:11 Nthambi zache zikhali za mphamvu zakuthema kusasanyira ndodo ya mfumu. Iwo udalapha pyakwanga mbubulukira kunja kupiringana pyakumera pinango, ukhaoneka pyadidi thangwi ya kulapha kwache pontho na kuinjipa kwa nthambi zache zizinji." 
Ezekiel19:12 Kwache iye adaudula mwakuzhangali mbaugwisa pansi. Iwo udauma thangwi ya mphepo yakumabulukiro dzuwa, nsapo zache zidamala puluzika; nthambi zache zamphamvu zidamala kuuma tenepo moto udamala kuupisa." 
Ezekiel19:13 Chinchino wabzalwa m'thando yatchetcha, m'dziko yakusowa madzi." 
Ezekiel19:14 Moto udafalikira kubulukira kunthambi yache ikulu mbupisa nsapo zache zonsene. Nthambizo nkhabeve dzakhala zakuwanga tayu Nkhabeve nthambi yamphamvu na ibodzi ene idasalira yakuthemerana na kusasanyira ndodo ya mfumu tayu.” Yeneyi ndi nyimbo ya maliro, ile imbaimbwa kawiri-kawiri." 
Ezekiel20:1 Chaka chachinomwe, pansiku yachikhumi ya mwezi wachishanu wa unyaperezo wathu, anango mwa akulu-akulu a Aisraele adavunza nzeru kuna MBUYA, tenepo iwo adakhala pansi pamaso panga." 
Ezekiel20:2 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel20:3 “Iwe mwana munthu, longa kuna akulu-akulu a Aisraele mbuapange kuti, ‘MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Ayi imwe mwadza dzavunza nzeru kuna ine? Ine ninga Mulungu wamoyo, ndikudumbira kuti ine nkhabe kukutawirisani kuvunza nzeru kuna ine tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu.’" 
Ezekiel20:4 “Ayi mwana munthu, iwe unaatonga mseru? Ayi iwe unakwanisa kuatonga mseru? Penepo asumulule, thangwi ya pinthu pyonsene pyakunyansa pikhachita makolo awo pile" 
Ezekiel20:5 mbulonge kuti ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Pansiku idasankhula ine Israele, ndidadumbira kuna pidzukulu pya Yakobo. Ine ndidapitchulula ndekha ene kuna iwo m'dziko ya Iguputo mbindilonga kuna iwo kuti: Ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu." 
Ezekiel20:6 Pansiku yeneyo ine ndidadumbira kuna iwo kuti ndinaabulusa m'dziko ya Iguputo kudza nawo kudziko idaasankhulira ine, dziko yamphonje, pontho yadidiletu pakati pa madziko anango onsene ile." 
Ezekiel20:7 Tenepo ine ndidalonga kuna iwo kuti: Munthu onsene wa imwe ataye mifanikizo yakunyansa pambaikha imwe maso anu pale, pontho lekani kupiswipisa mwekha ene na mifanikizo ya mu Iguputo. Thangwi ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu." 
Ezekiel20:8 “Kwache iwo adandipandukira mbakhonda pyakundivesera; iwo hadataye tayu mifanikizo yawo yakunyansa pambaikha iwo maso awo pale, penu kuleka kupembedza milungu ya mu Iguputo. Tenepo ndidalonga kuti ndinakhuthulira ukali wanga pana iwo mbandionesa shungu yanga yonsene pana iwo mu Iguputo monthomo." 
Ezekiel20:9 Kwache na thangwi ya dzinanga, ndidachita pinthu pyakuti dzinanga ileke lulupiswa pakati pa madzinza anango kukhakhala iwo kule, madzinza ale kukhadapitchulula ine ndekha ene pakubulusa Aisraele m'dziko ya Iguputo." 
Ezekiel20:10 Natenepo ine ndidaabulusadi m'dziko ya Iguputo mbandiadzesa m'thando. 
Ezekiel20:11 Ine ndidaapasa mwambo wanga mbandiafunzisa matongero anga, thangwi munthu onsene ambaavera ule, anakhala na moyo." 
Ezekiel20:12 Ine ndidaapasa pontho Nsiku Yakupuma ninga chidzindikiro cha chiverano chidachita ine na iwo chile, towera apidziwe kuti ine MBUYA ndiye ndidaachitisa kukhala akupambulika." 
Ezekiel20:13 “Kwache anthu a ku Israele adandipandukira m'thando. Iwo adakhonda kuvera matongero anga mbapasa nkhodolo mwambo wanga, podi kwene kuti munthu onsene anaaveserayo anakhala na moyo, pontho iwo adaswipisa Nsiku Yakupuma monsene mwene. Natenepo ndidalonga kuti ndinakhuthulira ukali wanga pana iwo mbandiavungira m'thando monthomo." 
Ezekiel20:14 Kwache na thangwi ya dzinanga, ndidachita pinthu pyakuti dzinanga ileke lulupiswa pakati pa madzinza anango, ale adandiona na maso awo ndikubulusa Aisraele m'dziko ya Iguputo." 
Ezekiel20:15 Natenepo ndidadumbira m'thandomo kuna iwo kuti ine nkhabe dzaadzesave kudziko ikhadaapasa ine ile tayu, dziko yamphonje, pontho yadidiletu pakati pa madziko anango onsene," 
Ezekiel20:16 thangwi iwo adapasa nkhodolo mwambo wanga, mbakhonda kuvera matongero anga, pontho adaswipisa Nsiku Yakupuma, podi iwo adaikha mtimawo onsene pana mifanikizo yawo." 
Ezekiel20:17 “Kwache ndidava nawo nsisi mbandikhonda kuavunga, penu kuapuluzira m'thando monthomo." 
Ezekiel20:18 Ine ndidalonga kuna anawo m'thandomo kuti: Lekani teweza mitemo ya makolo anu, penu kukoya mwambo wawo, penu kupiswipisa mwekha ene na mifanikizo yawo." 
Ezekiel20:19 Ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu; verani matongero anga mbamuchita mphole-mphole kukoya mwambo wanga. 
Ezekiel20:20 Chitisani Nsiku Yakupuma kukhala yakuchena, towera ikhale chidzindikiro cha chiverano chidachita ife. Penepo imwe munapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu." 
Ezekiel20:21 “Kwache anawo adandipandukira: Iwo adapasa nkhodolo mwambo wanga mbakhonda kuvera matongero anga, podi kwene kuti munthu onsene anaaveserayo anakhala na moyo, pontho iwo adaswipisa Nsiku Yakupuma. Natenepo ndidalonga kuti ndinakhuthulira ukali wanga pana iwo mbandiavungira m'thando monthomo." 
Ezekiel20:22 Kwache ine sidachite tenepo tayu, pontho na thangwi ya dzinanga, ndidachita pinthu pyakuti dzinanga ileke lulupiswa pakati pa madzinza anango kukhakhala iwo kule, madzinza ale akhadandiona na maso awo ndikubulusa Aisraele m'dziko ya Iguputo." 
Ezekiel20:23 Natenepo ndidadumbira m'thandomo kuna iwo kuti ine ndinaabalalisira pakati pa madzinza pontho kuathamangisira kumadziko onsene," 
Ezekiel20:24 thangwi iwo hadakoye mwambo wanga tayu mbapasa nkhodolo matongero anga, pontho adaswipisa Nsiku Yakupuma, mbaikha maso awo pana mifanikizo ya makolo awo." 
Ezekiel20:25 Padzulu pache ine ndidaaleka pyanga kuvera mwambo ule si wadidi tayu, pontho matongero ale nkhabe dzesa moyo tayu." 
Ezekiel20:26 Ine ndidaaleka pyanga kuti apiswipise okha ene pakupereka mitukwa, pontho anawo ene autombo ninga nsembe kuna milungu yawo. Ndidachita tenepo, towera ndiasakaze. Penepo iwo anati apidziwe kuti ine ndine MBUYA." 
Ezekiel20:27 “Natenepo iwe mwana munthu, longa kuna Aisraele kuti MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Na njira yeneyi pontho makolo anu adandishola pakundikhonda kudachita iwo kule." 
Ezekiel20:28 Pidaadzesa ine kudziko ikhadadumbira ine kuna iwo ile, iwo mbaona mapiri akulapha na miti yakuvata, penepo iwo adapereka nsembe kuna milungu. Iwo adandizhangalisa pakufukiza pyakununkhira pontho na kupereka nsembe za pyakumwa." 
Ezekiel20:29 Tenepo ine ndidalonga kuna iwo kuti, ‘Ayi mbuto zakupembedzerapo milunguzi kumbaenda imweko nsanji nazo?’ Na lero mbutozo zimbachemerwa ‘Mbuto zakupembedzerapo milungu.’" 
Ezekiel20:30 “Natenepo longa kuna dzinza ya Israele kuti ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Mwatani munapiswipisa mwekha ene ningambo mudachitira makolo anu mbamukwatika na kupembedza milungu yawo yakunyansa ile? 
Ezekiel20:31 Imwe mumbapereka mitukwa, pontho kupereka nsembe ananu pamoto mbamuthimiza basi kupiswipisa mwekha ene na kupembedza milungu kunachita imwe mpakana leroku. Ayi imwe Aisraele, ine ndathema kukutawirisani basi kuvunza nzeru kuna ine? Ine ninga MBUYA Mulungu wamoyo ndikudumbira kuti sinakutawirisani tayu dzavunza nzeru kuna ine. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Ezekiel20:32 Imwe mukulonga kuti, ‘Ife tinafuna kukhalambo ninga madzinza anango, ninga anthu a padziko yapansi ale ambapembedza pyawo miti na miyala.’ Kwache pinthu pinanyerezera imwepyo nkhabe dzachitika tayu." 
Ezekiel20:33 “Ine ninga MBUYA Mulungu wamoyo, ndikudumbira kuti ine ndinakutongani na mkono wanga wamphamvu, pontho na kuzhangali kwanga konsene." 
Ezekiel20:34 Na mkono wanga wamphamvu, pontho na kuzhangali kwanga konsene, ine ndinakudzesani kubulukira pakati pa madzinza mbandikugumanyisani kukubwezani kubulukira kumadziko onsene kukhadakubalalisirani ine kule." 
Ezekiel20:35 Ine ndinakudzesani m'thando yatchetcha ya madzinza, tenepo kweneko, ndinakutongani mseru maso na maso." 
Ezekiel20:36 Ine ndinati ndikutongeni mseru ninga montho mudachitira ine na makolo anu m'thando yatchetcha m'dziko ya Iguputo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu. 
Ezekiel20:37 “Ndinakulengesani posi-posi na ndodo yanga ninga mumbachitira makabuswa na mabirache mbandikuchitisani kukoya chiverano chathu. 
Ezekiel20:38 Ndinabulusa pakati panu anthu ale ambandidawira pontho kundipandukira. Podi kwene kuti ndiabuluse m'dziko inakhala iwo chinchinoyi, kwache iwo nkhabe dzapita tayu m'dziko ya Israele. Penepo munapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA." 
Ezekiel20:39 “Kulonga pya imwe, dzinza ya Israele, MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Munthu onsene wa imwe mbaende pyache kapembedza mifanikizo! Kwache m'nduli mwache munati mundivesere mbamubasikiratu kululupisa dzinanga yakuchena na mitukwanu pontho na mifanikizo imbapembedza imwe ile." 
Ezekiel20:40 Thangwi paphiri yanga yakuchena, phiri yakulapha ya Israele, penepo dziko yonsene ya Israele anthu anandipembedzapo. Ine ndinakomerwa namwe mbanditambira pyakupereka pyanu pontho na mitukwanu inango yadidiletu ile pabodzi pene na nsembe zanu zakupambulika zile. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Ezekiel20:41 Ndinakutambirani khala ninga nsembe za pyakufukiza pyakununkhira ndzidzi unafuna ine dzakubulusani m'madziko, pontho kukugumanyisani kubulukira kumadziko kukhadakubalalisirani ine kule. Ine ndinapionesa ndekha ene nyakuchena pakati panu uku madzinza akuona maso." 
Ezekiel20:42 Penepo imwe munapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA, ndingakudzesani kudziko ya Israele, dziko idadumbira ine kuna makolo anu ile," 
Ezekiel20:43 Imwe munakumbuka makhaliro anu pontho na mabasanu onsene akuipa adakuchitisani kupiswipisa mwekha ene ale. Imwe munanyansirwa pyakwanga thangwi ya pinthu pyakuipa pidachita imwe. 
Ezekiel20:44 Imwe munapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA, ndingachita pinthu kuna imwe, Aisraele, nee malingana na makhaliro anu akuipa, pontho na pinthu pyakupotoka pyachita imwe pile tayu, mbwenye na kufuna kuti dzinanga ilemedzwe. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu.”" 
Ezekiel20:45 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel20:46 “Iwe mwana munthu, yang'ana kumwerako; longa mwakupokanyisana na anthu akumwera, pontho longa mphangwa zauprofeti kupokanyisana na msitu wakumwera." 
Ezekiel20:47 Longa tenepa kuna msitu wakumwera: Vesera mafala a MBUYA. MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Ine ndili chifupi kukudumika moto, tenepo unapisa miti yako yonsene iwisi na yakuuma ene. Motowo nkhabe dzathimiswa tayu, pontho chinthu chonsene kubulukira kumwera mpakana kumpoto chinamala kupya." 
Ezekiel20:48 Munthu onsene anaona kuti agasa moto wenewu ndine pano MBUYA; iwo nkhabe dzathimiswa tayu.” 
Ezekiel20:49 Tenepo ndidalonga kuti, “Zhi, MBUYA Mulungu! Anthu ambalonga pya ine kuti, ‘Iye akulonga kwene pyache nthanthi.’ ”" 
Ezekiel21:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel21:2 “Iwe mwana munthu, pasa nkhodolo mzinda wa Yerusalemu, mbulalike mwakupokanyisana na mbuto yakuchenayi. Longa mphangwa zauprofeti zakupokanyisana na dziko ya Israele" 
Ezekiel21:3 mbulonge kuna iye kuti MBUYA akulonga tenepa: Ine ndine nyamalwako. Ndinati ndicholole m'mbuto mwache talasadanga mbandikukhamwadzani monsenene anyakulungama na anyakuipa ene. 
Ezekiel21:4 Na thangwi yakuti ndinakhamwadza anyakulungama na anyakuipa ene, talasadanga inakhakhatha munthu onsene kutomera kumpoto mpakana kumwera." 
Ezekiel21:5 Penepo anthu onsene anapidziwa kuti ine MBUYA, ndacholola talasadanga m'mbuto mwache; iyo nkhabe dzabwererave tayu." 
Ezekiel21:6 “Natenepo iwe mwana munthu, bulira! Bulira mwakusanyika mtima pikulu pontho mwakutsukwala towera munthu onsene akwanise kukuona." 
Ezekiel21:7 Tenepo iwo angakuvunza kuti, ‘Thangwi yache ninji unabulira?’ Iwe wathema kulonga kuti, ‘Ndi thangwi ya mphangwa zinafuna kudzazi. Mitima ya anthu inanyunguluka na mantha, pontho manjawo anachita chiwewa; kuwanga kwawo mtima kunamala, pontho mabondo awo anagogobodoka.’ Ipyo pikudzadi, pontho pinati pichitikedi. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu.”" 
Ezekiel21:8 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel21:9 “Iwe mwana munthu, longa mphangwa zauprofeti kuti Mbuya akulonga tenepa: Talasada, talasada, yakunozwa, pontho yakupukutwa mwadidi," 
Ezekiel21:10 yakunozwa towera icheke, yakupukutwa mwadidi towera ichetume ninga njazi! “Ayi tinasekera tani, mwenemo anthu anga alulupisa ndodo yanga yakutchunyusa nayo?" 
Ezekiel21:11 “Talasada ikupukutwa mwadidi, towera ifumbatwe m'manja; ikunozwa na kumusiliswa, kusasanyika kutelegalwi m'manja mwa nyakucheka." 
Ezekiel21:12 Khuwa pontho kalala, iwe mwana munthu, thangwi talasadayi yasasanyirwa anthu anga; yasasanyirwa atongi onsene a Israele. Iwo aphiwa kubodzi kwene na anthu anga onsene. Tenepo khumatani kuonesa kutsukwala." 
Ezekiel21:13 “Kuyeserwa kunati kudze. Apo ndi tani ngakhala iwo analulupisa ndodo yakuatchunyusa nayo ile? Ayi ipyo nkhabe dzachitika tayu? Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu. 
Ezekiel21:14 “Natenepo iwe mwana munthu, longa mphangwa zauprofeti, mbukhethese manjako pabodzi pene. Talasadayi mbikhamwadze kawiri, podi katatu kene. Talasadayo basache nkhucheka; talasada yakucheka kukulu, kuaikha pampani-pani khundu zonsene." 
Ezekiel21:15 Towera mitima inyunguluke, pontho anyakuchekwa akhale azinji ene, ndaikha talasada m'misuwo yawo yonsene ya mpanda. Ande! Iyo yasasanywa kuti ichetume ninga njazi, pontho ili kale m'manja kuti icheke." 
Ezekiel21:16 Iwe talasada, kadza kumadyo, kubuluka penepo kumabzere. Kadza konsene kwene kunazungunukira mano ako." 
Ezekiel21:17 Inembo ndinakhethesambo manjanga pabodzi pene, penepo ukali wanga unambombowa. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Ezekiel21:18 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel21:19 “Iwe mwana munthu, ikha chidziwiso kumisewu miwiri kule kunafuna dzabwera mfumu wa ku Babiloni na talasadache. Yonsene iwiriyo inatoma dziko ibodzi. Ikha pikwangwani pamphambano yakwenda mumzinda." 
Ezekiel21:20 Ikha chidziwiso kunjira yakwendera ku Raba, mzinda wa Aamoni, kule kunafuna pita na talasada, pontho inangoyo njakwenda ku Yerusalemu, mzinda wa Yuda, wakutchingwa mwadidi na mpanda." 
Ezekiel21:21 Thangwi mfumu wa ku Babiloni anaimira pamphambano, pana chikwangwani pale. Iye anaombedza, towera adziwe njira inafuna kupita na iye: iye anaphatisa basa matswimo ninga ntsango kuvunza nzeru kuna milungu yache; pontho anasakanyula fafa ya nyama inafuna perekwa nsembeyo." 
Ezekiel21:22 Kumadyo kwache ntsango unagwera Yerusalemu, kule kunafuna iye dzasasanya pyakugomolera mpanda, kupereka matongero akuti nkhondo iotoke, kuliza ngoma za nkhondo, kusasanya pyakukhutchira misuwo ya mpanda, kumuluka mataka kutsamira mpanda, pontho kumanga nsanja za anyankhondo." 
Ezekiel21:23 Kuna anthu a ku Yerusalemu, ale adadumbira kukhala akukhulupirika kuna mfumu wa Babiloni, ipyo pinaoneka ninga kuombedza kwa pezi-pezi. Mbwenye mfumu anaakumbusa pya kudawa kwawo, pontho anaaphata unyaperezo." 
Ezekiel21:24 Natenepo MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Na thangwi yakuti imwe mwandikumbusira pyakudawa pyanu pakupandukira pakwecha kwachita imwe, kuonesa pakwecha pyakudawa pyanu papyonsene pimbachita imwe; na thangwi yakuti imwe mwachita penepi, imwe munati mukwatwe unyaperezo." 
Ezekiel21:25 “Iwe mtongi wakunyansa, pontho wakuipa wa Israele, ule nsiku yache yafika, pontho ndzidzi wache wakutchunyuswa wafika pakundendeya." 
Ezekiel21:26 Ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Dula nduwirako pontho chipewu chako chachifumu. Pinthu nkhabe dzakhalave ninga mwakale tayu: Anyakutcherenga anakwizwa, pontho anyapadzulu anatchithiswa." 
Ezekiel21:27 Madembe! Madembe! Ande ndinati ndichitise mzindawo kusanduka madembe. Iwo nkhabe dzamangwa pontho tayu mpakana munthu adasankhula ine kuti atonge mzindawo abwere; ine ndinapipereka kuna iye. 
Ezekiel21:28 “Iwe mwana munthu, longa mphangwa zauprofeti kuti MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa pya Aamoni na kutikana kwawo konsene: Talasada, talasada, yasasanyika kuvunga; yapukutwa kuti iphate basache, pontho ichetume ninga njazi." 
Ezekiel21:29 Masomphenya anaona imwe ngakunama, pontho kuombedza kumbachita imwe nkhwapezi-pezi. Talasada inakhala chinjike pakhosi panu, anyakudawikamwe pontho anyakuipamwe. Nsiku yanu yafika, ndzidzi wanu wakutchunyuswa wafika pakundendeya." 
Ezekiel21:30 Bwezerani talasada m'mbuto mwache! Ine ndinati ndikutongeni mseru kumbuto kudalengwa imwe kule, kudziko ya makolo anu," 
Ezekiel21:31 Ine ndinakhuthulira ukali wanga pana imwe mbandipepesa shungu yanga pana imwe; ndinakuperekani m'manja mwa anyakukala mtima, anyaluso na kuvunga ale." 
Ezekiel21:32 Imwe munakhala nkhuni zakugasira moto, chiropa chanu chinachuchiswa m'dziko mwanu monthomo, imwe nkhabe dzakumbukwave tayu; thangwi ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Ezekiel22:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel22:2 “Iwe mwana munthu, ayi iwe unatonga mzinda wenewu? Ayi iwe unautonga mseru thangwi ya kuchuchisa chiropa? Msumulule thangwi ya pinthu pyakunyansa pyonsene pyachita iye" 
Ezekiel22:3 mbulonge kuti MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Iwe mzinda, wapidzesera wekha ene kuvungika, thangwi ya kuchuchisa chiropa mbupiswipisa wekha ene pakupembedza mifanikizo." 
Ezekiel22:4 Iwe wasanduka nyakudawa thangwi ya chiropa chidachuchisa iwe, pontho wapiswipisa wekha ene thangwi ya mifanikizo idasasanya iwe ile. Nsiku zako wazigwandiza wekha, pontho pyaka pyako pyamala. Natenepo ine ndinakusandusa kukhala chinthu chakusekesa kuna madzinza anango, pontho madziko onsene anakusedegula." 
Ezekiel22:5 Anyakukhala chifupi na iwe na anyakukhala kutali ene anakululupisa, iwe mzinda wa mbiri yakuipa, pontho wakudzala na pyakuzunguzika." 
Ezekiel22:6 “Yang'ana mule munachitira atongi onsene a Israele, ale ali muna iwe, munaphatisira iwo mphamvu zawo kuchuchisa chiropa." 
Ezekiel22:7 Muna iwe ababa na amama ene alulupiswa; alendo aponderezwa, pontho ana masiye na amamfelwa avuyiwa." 
Ezekiel22:8 Iwe wakhonda pinthu pyanga pyakuchena, pontho kuswipisa Nsiku yanga Yakupuma." 
Ezekiel22:9 Muna iwe muna anthu ale ambasasanya pyakuchuchisa chiropa, pontho anango ale ambadya nsembe pambuto zakupembedzerapo milungu pamapiri mbachita pinthu pyakuzuda." 
Ezekiel22:10 Muna iwe muna ale ambalulupisa matalimba a babawo, pontho ale ambakhakhamiza akazi akumwezi kugona nawo." 
Ezekiel22:11 Anango ambachita pyakuzuda na akazi a atsanthembawo, anangombo ambagonana na akwenyawo, anango ambaphatirira anyamaingawo a bele inango." 
Ezekiel22:12 Muna iwe muna anango ale ambatawira kudyekerwa kuti achuchise chiropa; ambachitisa katapira, ambafiyalisa kobiri ninga mumbachitira anyamalonda kuna atsanthembawo kupifumisa okha ene. Tenepo imwe mwandiduwalira. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Ezekiel22:13 “Ine ndinakhethesa manjanga thangwi ya kubera anthu kwachita imweku, pontho na thangwi ya kuchuchisa chiropa kwachita imwe m'dziko mwanu." 
Ezekiel22:14 Ayi iwe ukunyerezera kuti unakwanisa kupirira penu kukhala pontho na mphamvu ndingamala kukutchunyusa? Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu, pontho ndinati ndipichitedi." 
Ezekiel22:15 Ine ndinati ndibalalise anthu ako pakati pa madzinza mbandiathamangisira kumadziko onsene; pyakuipa pinachita iwepi ndinati ndipimalise. 
Ezekiel22:16 Iwe ungalulupiswa pamaso pa madzinza anango, iwe unapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA.”" 
Ezekiel22:17 Kubuluka penepo MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel22:18 “Iwe mwana munthu, dzinza ya Israele kuna ine yasanduka masepu-sepu; onsenewo akhala ninga nkuwa, lata, simbi, na ntove, ule umbasalira pamoto siliva anganyunguluswa." 
Ezekiel22:19 Natenepo ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Na thangwi yakuti monsenene mwasanduka masepu-sepu, ine ndinakugumanyisani kudza mu Yerusalemu." 
Ezekiel22:20 Ninga montho mumbagumanyira anthu siliva, nkuwa, simbi, ntove, na lata kumponya m'dzenje yamoto kuti anyunguluswe na moto wa shungu, inembo ndinakugumanyisani thangwi ya kuzhangali na ukali wanga mbandikuponyani mumzindamo kukunyungulusani." 
Ezekiel22:21 Ande, ndinakugumanyisani mu Yerusalemu mbandiphatisa moto wa shungu yanga, tenepo imwe munamala kunyunguluka mwenemo" 
Ezekiel22:22 Ninga mumbanyungulusirwa siliva m'dzenje yamoto, sasawambo imwe munanyunguluswambo mwenemo. Penepo imwe munapidziwa kuti ine MBUYA ndatchanyula ukali wanga pana imwe.”" 
Ezekiel22:23 MBUYA adalonga pontho kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel22:24 “Iwe mwana munthu, longa kuna dziko ya Israele kuti, ‘Iwe ndiwe dziko yakutembererwa, ile ikhali nkhabe mvula penu mafazi pansiku ya kuzhangali kwanga.’" 
Ezekiel22:25 Akadamu ache akhala ninga nkhalamu yakubangula thangwi ya nyama yapha iyo. Iwo ambapha anthu mbakwata mfuma na chinthu chonsene chakufunika, pontho na upandu umbachita iwo ule, ambachitisa akazi azinji kukhala amamfelwa." 
Ezekiel22:26 Anyansembe ache aswa mwambo wanga, pontho aswipisa pinthu pyanga pyakuchena; iwo nkhabe siyanisa tayu pakati pa pinthu pyakuchena na pyakukhonda chena. Iwo nkhabe funzisa anthu tayu pakati pa pinthu pyakuchena na pyakukhonda chena, pontho nkhabe tsalakana pya Nsiku yanga Yakupuma. Natenepo Aisraele nkhabe kundilemedza tayu." 
Ezekiel22:27 Mathubu ache akhala ninga mibinzi yakukhwadzula nyama yapha iyo. Iwo ambachuchisa chiropa mbapha anthu, towera afume na njira zakupotoka." 
Ezekiel22:28 Maprofeti ache ambakhwaza ntoto mabasa akuipawa. Iwo ambaona masomphenya akunama mbaombedza pyapezi-pezi. Iwo ambalonga kuti, ‘MBUYA Mulungu ndiye akulonga penepi,’ mwenemo ine, MBUYA Mulungu sidalonge nawo tayu." 
Ezekiel22:29 Anthu a m'dzikomo ambadyera nkope-kope anzawo mbaabera pinthu pyawo; iwo ambapondereza anyakutcherenga na anyakusowa pinthu, mbavuya alendo pakukhonda kuachitira chilungamo."
