Ezekiel22:30 “Ine ndidayang'ana-yang'ana munthu unango pakati pawo ule mbadakwanisa kumanga pontho mpanda, pontho kuimira pamaso panga ninga mvunuliri wa dzikoyo, towera ine ndileke kuivunga dzikoyo, kwache ine sidamgumane tayu." 
Ezekiel22:31 Natenepo ndinakhuthulira ukali wanga pana iwo mbandiapisa na shungu yanga. Ndidagwisira pinthu pyonsene pyachita iwo pamsolo pawo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu.” 
Ezekiel23:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel23:2 “Iwe mwana munthu, pidachitwa na akazi awiri, ale mawo akhali mbodzi ene." 
Ezekiel23:3 Iwo adasanduka maputa pikhakhala iwo m'dziko ya Iguputo mbachita pyauputa kutomera utsikanawo. M'dzikomo anthu akhaasisita pagangafuwa mbatinya-tinya mabele awo. 
Ezekiel23:4 Mkulu dzinache ikhali Ohola, mng'onoache dzinache ikhali Oholiba. Ndidaasemba mbandibala nawo ana achimuna na achikazi ene. Ohola akuimirira mzinda wa Samaria, pontho Oholiba akuimirira Yerusalemu." 
Ezekiel23:5 “Ohola akhachita pyauputa, mwenemo mbali mkazanga, tenepo iye adathamanga na pibwenji pyache pya ku Asiria, anyankhondo" 
Ezekiel23:6 akuvala nguwo zachoza, akulu a boma, akadamu ankhondo; onsenewo akhali achiphale akubalika, pontho anyakupakira akavalo." 
Ezekiel23:7 Iye adapipereka yekha ene ninga puta kuna anyakubalika onsene a ku Asiria, tenepo adapiswipisa yekha ene pakupembedza mifanikizo yawo yonsene ikhasirira iye ile." 
Ezekiel23:8 Iye hadaleke tayu kuchita pyauputa pidatoma iye kupichita ku Iguputo, kule kukhagonwa iye kutomera utsikanache; iwo akhatinya-tinya mabele ache, pontho akhachita naye pyauputa." 
Ezekiel23:9 “Natenepo ine ndidampereka m'manja mwa pibwenji pyache pya ku Asiria akhasirira iye pyakwanga ale. 
Ezekiel23:10 Iwo adamdula nguwo mbamkwatira anache achimuna na achikazi ene. Kubuluka penepo iwo adampha na talasada. Iye adasanduka chinthu chakusekesa pakati pa akazi anango, thangwi ya kutchunyuswa kudachitwa iye." 
Ezekiel23:11 “Podi kwene kuti Oholiba mbaleache wamng'ono adaona penepi, kwache adakwatirambo makhaliro akusirira mbanyanya kuchita pyauputa kupiringana nanache Ohola." 
Ezekiel23:12 Iyembo adasirira pyakwanga amuna a ku Asiria, akulu a boma, akadamu ankhondo, anyankhondo amphamvu akuvala nguwo zankhondo, anyakupakira akavalo, onsene aphale akubalika ale." 
Ezekiel23:13 Ine ndidaona kuti iyembo adapiswipisa yekha ene; onsene uwiriawo makhaliro awo akhali abodzi ene. 
Ezekiel23:14 “Kwache iye adathimiza basi kuchita pyauputa. Iye adaona pithunzi-thunzi pya amuna m'mafufu, pithunzi-thunzi pya amuna a ku Akaladea, pyakujambulwa na tinta yakufira," 
Ezekiel23:15 uku amanga mthimbalimba m'chunu mwawo na pipewu kumsolo kwawo; onsenewo akhaoneka ninga mathubu a pingolo, mzika za ku Babiloni." 
Ezekiel23:16 Sindzidzi iye nkhupiona, adapisirira mbatumiza anyamphangwa kuna Akaladea kuti adze." 
Ezekiel23:17 Tenepo anthu a ku Babiloni adadza dzagona naye. Iwo adamswipisa pikulu pene na pyakuzuda pyawo kufikirana iye adanyansirwa nawo mbabuluka pana iwo. 
Ezekiel23:18 Pidathimiza iye akuchita pakwecha pyauputa pyache mbapionesa yekha ene pezi, ine ndidanyansirwa naye mbandimpasa nkhodolo ninga mudachitira ine na nanache." 
Ezekiel23:19 Kwache iye ndiye adanyanyiratu kuchita pyauputa ninga mukhachitira iye mbali mtsikana m'dziko ya Iguputo. 
Ezekiel23:20 Kweneko iye akhathamanga na pibwenji pyache, ale akhali am'chuno ninga bulu, pontho achimaso-maso ninga kavalo." 
Ezekiel23:21 Natenepo iwe Oholiba ukhafuna kuchita pontho pyakuzuda ninga montho mukhachitira iwe ku Iguputo mbuli mwali, kweneko amuna akhakusisita pagangafuwa mbakutinya-tinya mabele." 
Ezekiel23:22 “Natenepo, iwe Oholiba, ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Ine ndinachitisa pibwenji pyako kukusandukira, amuna adaphulira iwe mata ale, tenepo ndinaadzesa kubulukira kukhundu zonsene dzapokanyisana nawe." 
Ezekiel23:23 Ndinadzesa Ababiloni, Akaladea onsene, Apekodi, Ashua na Akoa, pontho na Aasiria onsene, aphale akubalika, ale ndi akulu a boma na akadamu ankhondo, mathubu na anyankhondo amphamvu, onsene anyakupakira akavalo." 
Ezekiel23:24 Iwo anabwera kubulukira kumpoto dzachita nawe nkhondo na gulu ikulu ya anyankhondo, na pingolo pyankhondo na pigudumu; iwo anakuzungulira kukusosa kukhundu zonsene uku aphatira pyakugedera matswimo pikulu na ping'ono pene mbavala pipewu. Ine ndinakupereka m'manja mwawo kuti akutchunyuse, tenepo iwo anakutchunyusa ninga munapifunira iwo." 
Ezekiel23:25 Ine ndinaatawirisa kukutchunyusa mwaukali thangwi ndakuzhangalira pyakwanga. Iwo anagwanda mphuno na makutu ako, pontho onsene anafuna dzasalira ale anaphiwa na talasada. Ande, iwo anakwata anako achimuna na achikazi, pontho na onsene anafuna dzasalira na moyo ale mbaapisa pamoto." 
Ezekiel23:26 Iwo anakudula nguwo zako mbakwata pyakuthemesera napyo manungo ako. 
Ezekiel23:27 Natenepo ine ndinati ndimalise pyakuzuda na uputako onsene udatoma iwe m'dziko ya Iguputo. Iwe nkhabe dzakhumbira pontho pinthu penepi, penu kukumbuka pontho Iguputo tayu." 
Ezekiel23:28 “Thangwi ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Ine ndili chifupi kukupereka m'manja mwa anyakukuzonda, pontho kuna anthu adaphulira iwe mata ale." 
Ezekiel23:29 Iwo anakuchitira vinga, pontho anakupokosera pinthu pyako pyonsene pyaphatira iwe basa. Iwo anakusiya chipezi-pezi, pontho chimanja-manja, penepo manyadzo a pikhumbo pyauputako pinaonekera pakwecha. Kuzuda kwako na uputako" 
Ezekiel23:30 ndiye pyakudzesera penepi, thangwi iwe udathamanga na amuna a madzinza anango mbupiswipisa wekha ene na mifanikizo yawo." 
Ezekiel23:31 Iwe udapondambo manyalo a nanako; natenepo ndinati ndikumwesembo khomitcho cha nyatwa idamwesa ine nanako ile.” 
Ezekiel23:32 MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: “Iwe unati umwe khomitcho idamwambo nanako, ikulu pontho yakuzwika ile; anthu onsene anakusedegula pontho kukuseka, khomitcho njakudzala pyakwanga." 
Ezekiel23:33 Iwe unaledzera pontho kutsukwala; thangwi ya khomitcho yakugoswa pontho yakusakaza, khomitcho ya nanako Samaria ile." 
Ezekiel23:34 Iwe unaimwa mbuisiyiratu kakata; iwe unaiphumudza mbuchekeka nayo mabele ako. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu. 
Ezekiel23:35 “Natenepo ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Podi iwe wandiduwalira mbundipasa nkhodolo, iwe wathema kuona nyatwa zikulu thangwi ya kuzuda pontho uputako onsene.”" 
Ezekiel23:36 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Iwe mwana munthu, ayi unatonga mseru Ohola na Oholiba? Tenepo asumulule thangwi ya pinthu pyakunyansa pyachita iwo pile." 
Ezekiel23:37 Iwo achita pyauputa, pontho m'manja mwawo mwadzala na chiropa. Iwo ambachita uputa na mifanikizo yawo; iwo ambapereka kuna mifanikizo yawo anawo adandibalira iwo ale ninga nsembe za pyakudya." 
Ezekiel23:38 Padzulu pa penepi iwo adachita pinthu ipi kuna ine: iwo adaswipisa Nyumbanga, mbaswipisa pontho Nsiku Yakupuma." 
Ezekiel23:39 Nsiku yontho idapereka iwo anawo nsembe kuna mifanikizo, iwo adapita m'mbuto yanga yakuchenesa mbaiswipisa. Penepi ndiye pidachita iwo kuna Nyumbanga!" 
Ezekiel23:40 “Si pyokhapyo tayu, iwo adatuma anyamphangwa kachemera amuna kudza kubulukira kutali. Pidafika amunawo, iwe udasamba mwadidi, kutswinga ntchiye zako na tinta mbuvala pyakuthemesera napyo manungo." 
Ezekiel23:41 Iwo akhakhala pamakadera adidi, pontho patsogolo pawo akhaikhapo thebulu yakudzala na pyakudya pyadidi kuthimizapo pyakufukiza pyakununkhira na mafutanga aolivi." 
Ezekiel23:42 “Kusokosa kwa mwinji wa anyatsenzo kudamzungulira; gulu ya Asebea idadza kubulukira kuthando pabodzi pene madombe. Iwo adavazika pibangili m'mikono mwa mkaziyo na nanache ene, pontho adaavazika pipewu pyachifumu mumsolo mwawo." 
Ezekiel23:43 Kubuluka penepo ndidalonga pya ule adachita kusakaliratu na uputa kuti, ‘Alekeni pyawo amphatise basa ninga puta, thangwi iye maka ndi puta.’" 
Ezekiel23:44 Tenepo iwo adagona nawo. Ninga mumbachitira amuna kugona na puta, sasawambo iwo adagona na akazi awiri akuzuda ale, Ohola na Oholiba." 
Ezekiel23:45 Mbwenye amuna akulungama anati atonge akazi enewa pamseru wakuchita pyauputa na kuchuchisa chiropa, thangwi iwo ambachita uputa pontho m'manja mwawo ngakudzala na chiropa.”" 
Ezekiel23:46 MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: “Dzani na gulu ya anthu kuapokanyisa, mbamuachitise kuvungika pontho kupokoserwa pinthu pyawo." 
Ezekiel23:47 Gulu ya anthuyo inaaponyera miyala mbiaakhamwadza na talasadawo; iwo anapha anawo achimuna na achikazi ene mbapisa nyumba zawo. 
Ezekiel23:48 “Natenepo ndinati ndimalise kuzuda konsene m'dziko, towera kucheuza akazi onsene pontho kuti aleke kukwatira makhaliro anu akuzuda." 
Ezekiel23:49 Imwe munati muone nyatwa thangwi ya uputanu, pontho munaona nyatwa thangwi ya pyakudawa pyanu pakupembedza mifanikizo. Penepo imwe munapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu.”" 
Ezekiel24:1 Chaka chachifemba, pansiku yachikhumi ya mwezi wakhumi wa unyaperezo wathu, MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel24:2 “Iwe mwana munthu, lemba nsiku ya lero, lero pano, thangwi lero ndi nsiku ile mfumu wa ku Babiloni amanga misasa yankhondo kuzungulira Yerusalemu." 
Ezekiel24:3 Panga dzinza yakupandukirayi msangani ufu mbulonge kuna iwo kuti ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Sanzika supulia pamoto; isanzike mbuikhemo madzi. 
Ezekiel24:4 M'supuliamo ikhamo nthuli za nyama, nthuli zadidiletu, mwendo na phewa; dzaza supulia na magogodo adidiletu." 
Ezekiel24:5 Kwata bira wadidiletu kubulukira pa mkumbi. Ikha nkhuni pansi pa supulia kuti uphike nthulizo; kwindimula moto kuti awire mbutokotese magogodowo mwenemo.” 
Ezekiel24:6 “Thangwi ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Dzedze kuna mzinda wakuchuchisa chiropa, wakhala ninga supulia waubzimbiri okhonda tsuka. Bulusamo m'chikalango nthuli na nthuli okhonda kupichitira ntsango." 
Ezekiel24:7 Thangwi chiropa chachuchisa iye chili mumzindamo; iye adachita kuchikhuthulira pakwecha pamwala; mbakhonda kuchikhuthulira pansi, pale mataka mbadachiphimbira." 
Ezekiel24:8 Ine ndasiya chiropa penepo, pale pakuti nkhabe bisika mwakuti chimbandilirira kubwezera mwaukali.”" 
Ezekiel24:9 Natenepo MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: “Dzedze kuna mzinda wakuchuchisa chiropa! Inembo ndinati ndiikhe mulu ukulu wa nkhuni. 
Ezekiel24:10 Mulukani nkhuni mbamuphatise moto. Nyamayo iphikeni mwadidi, mbamuikhemo pyakukomesera; tenepo magogodowo muapyereze." 
Ezekiel24:11 Kubuluka penepo thikitiza pamakala supulia wakusowa pinthuyo, mpakana apise pyakwanga mwakuti simbi ifire, towera pyakunyansa mwenemo pinyunguluke, pontho ubzimbiri ubuluke." 
Ezekiel24:12 Basa yonsene yaenda m'madzi, ubzimbiri wakuthimbirira hudabuluswe tayu, nee na moto ene tayu." 
Ezekiel24:13 “Iwe Yerusalemu, kuzuda kwako kwakuswipisa. Na thangwi yakuti ine ndidayesera kukukwecha, mbwenye iwe udachimwanika kuchena. Iwe nkhabe dzakhalave wakuchena tayu kufikirana ndikhuthulire ukali wanga onsene pana iwe." 
Ezekiel24:14 “Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu. Ndzidzi wafika wakuti ine ndichitepo pinthu. Ine nkhabe dzakuyang'anani kwene tayu; ine sinakuverani nsisi, penu ukali wanga kumbombowa tayu. Imwe munatchunyuswa malingana na makhaliro anu pontho mabasanu achita imwe. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu.”" 
Ezekiel24:15 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel24:16 “Iwe mwana munthu, na shoko ene ibodzi basi ine ndili chifupi kukubulusira mkazako, wapamtima pako ule. Kwache iwe leka tsukwala penu kusintili, penu kugwisa msozi na pang'ono pene." 
Ezekiel24:17 Lira pyako chibwalo-bwalo; leka sintili thangwi ya nyakufayo. Leka dula nduwirako, penu kufamba wakusowa nkhwaira; leka bisa nkhope yako penu kudya pyakudya pya anyakusintili ninga mwamtemo wache.”" 
Ezekiel24:18 Natenepo mangwana mwache na machibese ine ndidalonga kuna anthu, tenepo na mawulo mwache mkazanga adafa. Mangwana mwache na machibese ndidachita ninga montho mukhadapangirwa ine mule." 
Ezekiel24:19 Tenepo anthu adandivunza kuti, “Thangwi yache ninji ukuchita pinthu ninga penepi? Apo pikulonganji kuna ife?”" 
Ezekiel24:20 Natenepo ndidalonga kuna iwo kuti, “MBUYA adandipanga" 
Ezekiel24:21 kulonga kuna dzinza ya Israele kuti: MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Ine ndili chifupi kuvunga Nyumbanga yakuchena, mbuto yakupata imbanyadira imwe ile, chinthu chakukoma m'maso mwanu, pontho chimbakhumba mtimanu chile. Ananu adasiya imwe mu Yerusalemu ale anati afe pankhondo." 
Ezekiel24:22 Penepo imwe munachitambo pinthu ninga pyachita Ezekielepi. Imwe nkhabe dzabisa nkhope zanu tayu, penu kudya pyakudya pimbadya anyakusintili ninga mwamtemo tayu." 
Ezekiel24:23 Imwe nkhabe dzadula nduwira zanu, penu dzafamba kwene wakusowa nkhwaira tayu. Imwe nkhabe dzasintili penu kulira tayu, kwache imwe munamala pakatika thangwi ya pyakudawa pyanu, pontho munabulirana pyanu mwekha ene." 
Ezekiel24:24 Ezekiele ndiye anafuna dzakhala chidziwiso chakukucheuzani nacho; imwe munachitambo ninga montho mwachita iye. Tenepo penepi pingachitika, imwe munapidziwadi kuti ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Ezekiel24:25 “Kulonga pya iwe mwana munthu, pansiku inafuna ine dzabulusa mbuto yawo yakupata, chinthu chimbakomerwa na iwo chile, demelero yawo, chinthu chakukoma m'maso mwawo, chinthu chimbakhumba mtimawo chile, pontho na anawo ene," 
Ezekiel24:26 pansiku yeneyo, munthu unango wakuthawa mumzindamo anabwera kuna imwe dzakupangani mphangwa za kuvungikaku." 
Ezekiel24:27 Na nsiku yonthoyo lulume yako inasudzuka; iwe unalonga nawo mbukhonda dzakhala mulomo phoo. Tenepo iwe unakhala chidziwiso chakucheuza nacho anthu, penepo iwo anapidziwadi kuti ine ndine MBUYA.”" 
Ezekiel25:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel25:2 “Iwe mwana munthu, pasa nkhodolo Aamoni mbulonge mphangwa zauprofeti zakupokanyisana nawo." 
Ezekiel25:3 Longa kuna iwo kuti: Veserani mafala a MBUYA Mulungu. MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Na thangwi yakuti imwe mudaseka chihehede, thangwi ya kuvungwa kwa mbuto yanga yakuchena, kuona dziko ya Israele ikusakazika, pontho kuona anthu a ku Yuda akukwatwa unyaperezo," 
Ezekiel25:4 natenepo ine ndinakuperekani m'manja mwa madzinza akumabulukiro dzuwa. Iwo anamanga misasa pontho makumbi awo pakati panu; iwo anadya nsapo zanu na kumwa mkakanu. 
Ezekiel25:5 Mzinda wa Raba ndinati ndiusanduse mbuto ya mpovu ya ngamila, pontho Amoni ndinamsandusa kukhala mbuto yakupumirako mabira. Penepo munapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA." 
Ezekiel25:6 Thangwi MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Na thangwi yakuti imwe mukhachita kuimbira manja na kunumpha-numpha, kukomoka na kuseka thangwi ya dziko ya Israele," 
Ezekiel25:7 natenepo ine ndinati ndifuthule mkono wanga kukutchunyusani, mbandikuperekani m'manja mwa madzinza anango kuti akupokosereni pinthu pyanu pyonsene. Ine ndinakuvungani monsene mwene kuna madzinza kunakhala imwe kule mwakuti imwe nkhabe dzakhalave dzinza tayu. Penepo munapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA.”" 
Ezekiel25:8 MBUYA Mulungu adalonga mbati, “Na thangwi yakuti Moabu adalonga kuti dzinza ya Yuda yasandukambo ninga madzinza anango onsene," 
Ezekiel25:9 natenepo ine ndinachitisa kuti mizinda yakutchingwa na mpanda m'madire a Moabu ivungwe, yeneyi ndi Beti-Yeshimoti, Baala-Meoni na Kiriataimu, demelero ya dziko yache." 
Ezekiel25:10 Ine ndinapereka Amoabu pabodzi pene na Aamoni m'manja mwa madzinza akumabulukiro dzuwa, towera Aamoni aleke dzakumbukwave pakati pa madzinza;" 
Ezekiel25:11 pontho ndinatchunyusa Amoabu. Penepo iwo anapidziwadi kuti ine ndine MBUYA.” 
Ezekiel25:12 MBUYA Mulungu adalonga mbati, “Na thangwi yakuti Aedomu adabwezera mwavinga dzinza ya Yuda mbadawa pikulu pakuchita tenepo," 
Ezekiel25:13 natenepo MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Ine ndinati ndifuthule mkono wanga kutchunyusa Edomu mbandipha munthu na nyama zonsene mwenemo. Ndinasandusa dzikoyo kukhala thando yatchetcha; mbandiapuluza onsenewo pankhondo kutomera kumzinda wa Temani mpakana kumzinda wa Dedani. 
Ezekiel25:14 Ine ndinabwezera Aedomu pakuphatisa basa anthu anga Aisraele, pontho iwo anati achite kuna Aedomu malingana na kuzhangali kwanga, pontho na ukali wanga. Tenepo iwo anadziwa kubwezera kumbachita ine. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu.”" 
Ezekiel25:15 MBUYA Mulungu adalonga mbati, “Na thangwi yakuti Afilisti abwezera mwavinga na mtima wakuipirwa, mbaavunga Ayuda malingana na chizondi chakale chikhali na iwo," 
Ezekiel25:16 natenepo ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Ine ndili chifupi kufuthula mkono wanga kutchunyusa Afilisti. Ndinapha Akereti onsene mbandipha anthu onsene asalira m'magombe a bara ale. 
Ezekiel25:17 Ine ndinati ndibwezere pikulu pene mbandiatchunyusa na ukali wanga. Penepo iwo anapidziwadi kuti ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu ndingaabwezera.” 
Ezekiel26:1 Chaka chakhumi na chibodzi, pansiku yakutoma ya mwezi wa unyaperezo wathu, MBUYA adalonga kuna ine:" 
Ezekiel26:2 “Iwe mwana munthu, na thangwi yakuti anthu a ku Turo akusedegula Yerusalemu kuti, ‘Hehede, Yerusalemu, ule akhali mzinda wakuchitira malonda na madzinza anango avungika, natenepo anyamalonda anabwera kuna ife. Na thangwi yakuti iye avungika ife tinati tifume!’" 
Ezekiel26:3 “Natenepo ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Ine ndina mseru na iwe, Turo, pontho ndinadzesa madzinza azinji kuchita nawe nkhondo, ale anafuna dzabwera ninga nyanza kukapiza mabimbi ache." 
Ezekiel26:4 Iwo anavunga mpanda wa Turo mbagwisa nsanja zache; ine ndinaunga madongolomwa ache onsene mbandimsiya nyimwa. 
Ezekiel26:5 Iye anasanduka mbuto, ile amisiri a nsomba anathasikapo makokotawo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu. Madzinza anapokosera pinthu pyache," 
Ezekiel26:6 pontho ale ambakhala m'midzi yache yakumtunda anamala phiwa pankhondo. Penepo iwo anapidziwadi kuti ine ndine MBUYA.” 
Ezekiel26:7 MBUYA Mulungu akulonga kuti, “Kubulukira kumpoto ine ndinati ndidzese Mfumu Nebukadinezara wa ku Babiloni, mfumu wamkulu pakati pa mafumu onsene, pabodzi pene na akavalo ache na pingolo pyache, anyakupakira akavalo na anyankhondo azinji dzachita nkhondo na Turo." 
Ezekiel26:8 Iye anavunga midzi yako yakumtunda na nkhondo; iye anamanga nsanja za anyankhondo kukuzungulira, iwe Turo, mbamuluka mataka kutsamira mpandako. Iye anakwiza m'dzulu pyakugedera pyache matswimo kuthimbana nawe." 
Ezekiel26:9 Iye anasasanya mphinga zakugomolera mafufu ako mbagwisa nsanjako na mbadzo. 
Ezekiel26:10 Akavalo ache anainjipa pyakwanga mwakuti fumbi yawo inakuphimbira. Mpandako unatekenyeka thangwi ya mulikiti wa akavalo, pingolo pyankhondo na pigudumu, ndzidzi unapita iye na pamsuwo wako wa mpanda ninga mumbakhalira ipyo anyankhondo kupita mumpanda wakugomoka." 
Ezekiel26:11 Njondo za akavalo awo zinakumba-kumba misewu yako yonsene; iye anapha anthu ako na talasada, pontho mizati yamphamvu maka ile inamala gomolwa." 
Ezekiel26:12 Iwo anakupokosera mfumako mbakwata pinthu pimbachita iwe napyo malonda; iwo anagomola mafufu ako mbagwisa nyumba zako zadidi mbaponyera m'bara miyalako, matabwako na madongolomwako." 
Ezekiel26:13 Ine ndinamalisa nyimbo zako zakusokosa, pontho nyimbo zako zakuimbwa na anyakatangale nkhabe dzavekave tayu." 
Ezekiel26:14 Ine ndinakuchitisa kusala nyimwa mbusanduka mbuto yakuthasikirapo makokota. Mzindawo nkhabe dzamangwa pontho tayu, thangwi ndapilonga ndine MBUYA. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu.”" 
Ezekiel26:15 MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa kuna mzinda wa Turo: “Ayi anyamgombe nkhabe dzatetemera tayu na mantha angava kuvungwa kwako, kubulira kwa anyakukukuwazwa, pontho na kuphiwa kwa anthu ako?" 
Ezekiel26:16 Natenepo mafumu onsene a m'magombe anatchitha pamipando yawo mbaikha mikhanjo yawo pakhundu mbadula nguwo zawo zakukhala na pyakuthemesera. Iwo anachita mantha mbakhala pansi uku akutetemera okhonda lekeza, kututumuka na kuona dzedze yako." 
Ezekiel26:17 Iwo anaimba nyimbo ya maliro kulira nayo iwepo mbalonga kuna iwe tenepa: ‘Wavungwa tani tenepa, iwe mzinda wakuveka, miyadiyako ikulu-ikulu nkhabe onekave pabara! Iwe ukhali nyamphamvu pabara; iwe na mzika zako zene mukhathuswa anyamgombe onsene." 
Ezekiel26:18 Chinchino anyamgombe akutetemera thangwi ya nsiku ya kuvungwa kwako; anyamntchuwa akugoswerwa na kuvungwa kwako.’ 
Ezekiel26:19 “MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Ndingakusandusa madembe, ninga mizinda inango ile nkhabe khalamo anthu tayu, pontho ndingakubiza na bara yakuzwika, pontho na madzi makulu," 
Ezekiel26:20 penepo ine ndinakutchithisira ku Chiphompho chikulu, kule kumbakhala anthu a mvula zakale. Ine ndinakuchitisa kukhala m'dziko ya anyakufa pansi pa mataka, kumadembe akale pabodzi na anyakwenda ku Chiphompho chikulu ale. Iwe nkhabe dzabwererako, penu kukhalambo na mbuto yako m'dziko ya anthu a moyo tayu." 
Ezekiel26:21 Mamalisiro ako anakhala akugumisa manungo, pontho iwe nkhabe dzaonekave tayu. Iwe unasakwa-sakwa, kwache hunagumanwave tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu.”" 
Ezekiel27:1 MBUYA Mulungu adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel27:2 “Iwe mwana munthu, imba nyimbo ya maliro yakulonga pya Turo." 
Ezekiel27:3 Longa kuna Turo, ule ali pagombe ninga msuwo wa kubara mbachita malonda na anthu akukhala m'magombe azinji kuti MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: “Iwe Turo, umbapilonga wekha ene kuti, ‘Ndine wakubalika monsene mwene.’" 
Ezekiel27:4 Musako ndi bara ikulu; amisiri ako adakusasanya kukhala mwadiya wadidiletu. 
Ezekiel27:5 Matabwako onsene akhali a paina a ku Seniri, mbaphatisa basa muti wamkungudza wa ku Lebanoni kukhala chakuphatisira chinguwo chakufambisira mwadiya." 
Ezekiel27:6 Na mithundu ya ku Bashani iwo adasasanya ng'ombo; na matabwa anjale akubulukira kumagombe a Kipro iwo adasasanya subi yakuthemeserwa na nyanga ya nzowu. 
Ezekiel27:7 Nguwo zakuthemeserwa mwadidi za ku Iguputo ndiye zikhali chinguwo chakukufambisa nacho mbachikhala ninga bandera kuna iwe; nsoyi yako idaphimbirwa na nguwo yachoza yakubulukira kumagombe a Kipro. 
Ezekiel27:8 Amuna a ku Sidoni na Arivadi ndiye akhali anyakuchapako; iwe Turo, amunako aluso akhali anyakufambisa mwadiya." 
Ezekiel27:9 Anyakusasanya mwadiya akhali anyampala matabwa aluso a ku Gebali. Miyadiya yonsene ya pabara na anyakuifambisache akhadza dzachita nawe malonda. 
Ezekiel27:10 “Amuna a ku Peresia, Ludi na Puti adaphata basa ninga anyankhondo ako. Iwo adakoloweka m'mafufu mwako pyakugedera matswimo pyawo na pipewu pyawo; iwo adakudzesera demelero." 
Ezekiel27:11 Amuna a ku Arivadi na Heleki adalondali mpandako kukhundu zonsene; amuna a ku Gamadi akhali munsanja zako. Iwo adakoloweka pyakugedera matswimo pyawo m'mafufu mwako monsene; iwo adakuchitisa kukhala wakubalika monsene mwene. 
Ezekiel27:12 “Iwe udachita malonda na anthu a ku Tarisisi. Iwo adakupagali siliva, simbi, lata na ntove kuchinjisana na pinthu pyako pyakuinjipa pile." 
Ezekiel27:13 Iwe udachita malonda na anthu a ku Grisi, Tubali, Mesheki; iwo adakupasa mabitchu na pyombo pyankuwa kuchinjisana na pinthu pyako." 
Ezekiel27:14 Anthu ku Beti-Togarima adakupasa akavalo, akavalo ankhondo na mabulu kuchinjisana na pinthu pyako." 
Ezekiel27:15 Anthu a ku Rodesi adachita nawe malonda; anyamgombe azinji adakupasa nyanga za nzowu na mphingwe kuchinjisana na pinthu pyako. 
Ezekiel27:16 Anthu a ku Aramu adachita nawe malonda, thangwi ya pinthu pyako pizinji. Iwo adakupasa miyala ya emeradi, nguwo zamsuzi wanyemba, nguwo zakulukwa, nguwo zakuchena, korali na miyala ya rubi kuchinjisana na pinthu pyako." 
Ezekiel27:17 “Yuda na Israele adachita nawe malonda; iwo adakupasa tirigu wa ku Miniti, pijejede, manyuchi, mafuta aolivi na mitombwe kuchinjisana na pinthu pyako." 
Ezekiel27:18 “Na thangwi ya kuinjipa kwa pinthu pimbasasanya iwe pontho na mfuma izinji ina iweyo, Damasiko adachita nawe malonda. Iwo adakupasa vinyu wa ku Heleboni pontho na ubweya wa mabira wa ku Zahari kuchinjisana na pinthu pyako." 
Ezekiel27:19 “Anthu a dzinza ya Dani na Agriki kubulukira ku Uzali adagulambo pinthu pyako pakukupasa simbi, pontho pyakukomesera napyo muliwo pya kasia, na kalamusi." 
Ezekiel27:20 “Anthu a ku Dedani adakupasa pyakukhalira pamsana pa mabulu kuchinjisana na pinthu pyako. 
Ezekiel27:21 “Arabia na atongi onsene a ku Kedara akhali anyakukugulako; iwo akhachita nawe malonda a anabira, mabira amuna, na mbuzi." 
Ezekiel27:22 “Anyamalonda a ku Sheba na Raama akhachitambo nawe malonda basi; iwo adakupasa pyakukomesera muliwo pyadidi pyamtundu onsene, pontho miyala yakudula na golidi kuchinjisana na pinthu pyako." 
Ezekiel27:23 “Mizinda ya Harani, Kane na Edeni, pontho na anyamalonda a ku Sheba, Ashuri na Kilimadi adachitambo nawe malonda." 
Ezekiel27:24 Kuchinjisana na pinthu pyako iwo adakupasa nguwo zakukoma m'maso, nguwo zachoza, nguwo zakulukwa, nguwo zakuthasika pansi zamtundu-mtundu, pontho nkhambala zakulukwa mwaluso." 
Ezekiel27:25 “Miyadiya mikulu-mikulu ya ku Tarisisi ikhaphata basa yakuthukula mitolo yako. Iwe wamala dzala na mitolo yakulemera pakatiletu pa bara. 
Ezekiel27:26 Anyakukuchapa akuendesa kwakuzwika, kwache mphepo ya mbalu inati ikupandule pakatiletu pa bara." 
Ezekiel27:27 Mfumako, pinthu pyako, na mitolo yako, anyakukufambisako, anyakuchapako, anyakusasanya miyadiyako na anyamalondako, anyankhondo ako onsene, pontho na munthu onsene apakira m'mwadiyamo analilima pakatiletu pa bara pansiku inafuna dzapanduka iwe." 
Ezekiel27:28 Magombe anatekenyeka na thangwi ya kukhuwa kwa amunako ali m'mwadiyamo. 
Ezekiel27:29 Anyakuchapa onsene anaisiya pyawo miyadiyawo; anyakufambisa mwadiya onsene na akadamu awo anaimira pyawo pagombe. 
Ezekiel27:30 Iwo anakusintili mbakulira pikulu pene; iwo anawaza fumbi mumsolo mwawo mbabulumunda padotha. 
Ezekiel27:31 Iwo anachinga tsisi yawo thangwi ya iwepo mbavala masakha. Iwo anakulira mwakusanyika mtima, pontho mbakusintili pikulu pene." 
Ezekiel27:32 Ndzidzi unafuna iwo dzakulira na kusintili, iwo anaimba nyimbo ya maliro yakulonga pya iwe kuti, ‘Chipo mbani avungwa ninga Turo, ule abizwa m'bara?’" 
Ezekiel27:33 Pikhafamba anyamalondako pabara iwe udachitisa madzinza mazinji ene kukhuta; na mfumako izinji, pontho pinthu pyako iwe udafumisa mafumu a padziko yapansi." 
Ezekiel27:34 Lero iwe wavungwa na bara; wabizwa m'madzi akuzwika; mitolo yako na anthu onsene akhali na iwe ale wamala kwenda nawo pabodzi pene. 
Ezekiel27:35 Onsene akukhala m'magombe atutumuka na kuona dzedze yako; mafumu awo aphatwa na mantha, pontho kunkhope kwawo kukuonesa mantha makulu." 
Ezekiel27:36 Anyamalonda a madzinza anango akukusedegula; mamalisiro ako ngakuchitisa mantha pyakwanga, tenepo iwe nkhabe dzakhalapove tayu.”" 
Ezekiel28:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel28:2 “Iwe mwana munthu, longa kuna mfumu wa ku Turo kuti MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Na kunyada kwakoko iwe umbapilonga kuti, ‘Ine ndine mulungu; ndimbakhala pampando wachifumu wa milungu pakatiletu pabara.’ Mbwenye ndiwe munthu ene pyako, nee mulungu tayu, podi kwene kuti umbapiyesa pyako wanzeru ninga mulungu." 
Ezekiel28:3 Ayi iwe ndiwe nyanzeru kupiringana Daniele? Ayi iwe nkhabe bisirwa pinthu tayu? 
Ezekiel28:3 Ayi iwe ndiwe nyanzeru kupiringana Daniele? Ayi iwe nkhabe bisirwa pinthu tayu? 
Ezekiel28:4 Na nzeru zako pontho kuvesa kwako pinthu iwe wapifumisa wekha ene mbupigumanyira golidi na siliva mzinji m'masubi mwako. 
Ezekiel28:5 Na luso ina iwe pamalonda iwe wathimizira mfumako, pontho na thangwi ya mfuma ina iweyo, wasanduka nyakugaya." 
Ezekiel28:6 “Natenepo ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Podi iwe umbapiyesa wekha ene nyanzeru, nyanzeru ningambo mulungu," 
Ezekiel28:7 ndinati ndidzese alendo pana iwe, madzinza avinga pyakwanga; iwo anacholola matalasadawo kukhamwadza nawo pinthu pyako pyonsene pyakubalika pyagumana iwe na nzeru zako, mbatema-tema demelero yako yonsene." 
Ezekiel28:8 Iwo anakugwisira m'Chiphompho chikulu, mbufa mwakusanyika pakatiletu pabara." 
Ezekiel28:9 Ayi penepo unakwanisa kulonga pamaso pa anthu adakupha ale kuti ndiwe mulungu? Iwe unakhala kwene munthu pyache nee mulungu tayu, m'manja mwa anthu ambakucheka pakhosi ale." 
Ezekiel28:10 Iwe unafa ninga montho mumbafera anthu okhonda gwandwa nsonga yachimuna, m'manja mwa madzinza achilendo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu.”" 
Ezekiel28:11 MBUYA adalonga pontho kuna ine: 
Ezekiel28:12 “Iwe mwana munthu, imba nyimbo ya maliro yakulonga pya mfumu wa ku Turo mbulonge kuna iye kuti MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Iwe udatandwa mwakuthema monsene mwene, wakudzala na nzeru pontho wakubalika monsene mwene." 
Ezekiel28:13 Iwe ukhali mu Edeni, m'munda wa Mulungu; mbuthemeserwa na mwala wakudula wamtundu onsene: karinelioni, topazi, na yasipere, kirisolite, berili na onikisi, safire, rubi na emeradi. Pyakuikhamo miyala pyako pikhali pya golidi; pansiku idalengwa iwe, pyonsenepi adamala kukusasanyiraletu." 
Ezekiel28:14 Ndidakuikhira mngelo wamphamvu kukuzondera. Iwe ukhali paphiri yakuchena ya Mulungu; iwe ukhafamba pakati pa miyala ya moto. 
Ezekiel28:15 Makhaliro ako akhali akusowa chakupokanyisa kubulukira pa nsiku idalengwa iwe, kufikirana pyakudawika pidatoma kugumanwa muna iwe." 
Ezekiel28:16 Na thangwi ya kuinjipa kwa malonda akhachita iwe, iwe ndiye udandendeya kuchita pyakuzunguzika, mamalisiro ache mbudawa napyo. Natenepo ninga chinthu chakunyansa ndidakuthamangisa paphiri ya Mulungu, mbandikubulusa pamaso panga. Mngelo wakukuzondera ule adakuthamangisambo kukubulusa pakati pa miyala yakugaka moto." 
Ezekiel28:17 Wasanduka nyakugaya, thangwi ya kubalika kwako, pontho wamala pupwisa nzeru zako kufuna demelero. Natenepo ine ndidakuponyera padziko yapansi; ndidakusandusa chakusekesa pamaso pa mafumu." 
Ezekiel28:18 Na pyakudawa pyako pizinjipyo, pontho na malondako aufaka-faka nawo, iwe waswipisa mbuto yako yakuchena. Natenepo ndidachitisa moto kubuluka muna iwe mbukupisa pikulu pene, mbandikusandusa dotha padziko yapansi pamaso pa anthu onsene akhakuyang'ana ale." 
Ezekiel28:19 Madzinza onsene akhakudziwa kale ale, adatutumuka na kuona dzedze yako; mamalisiro ako mbakugoswa pyakwanga, pontho iwe nkhabe dzaonekave tayu.”" 
Ezekiel28:20 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel28:21 “Iwe mwana munthu, pasa nkhodolo mzinda wa Sidoni; longa mphangwa zauprofeti mwakupokanyisana naye" 
Ezekiel28:22 mbulonge kuti MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Ine ndina mseru na iwe, Sidoni; ine ndinatambira demelero na pinthu pinafuna ine dzachita kuna iwepo. Anthu anapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA, ndzidzi unafuna ine dzakutchunyusa mbandionesa kuchena kwachita ine." 
Ezekiel28:23 Ndinagwisa muliri pana iye mbandichitisa chiropa kukuka m'misewu mwache. Iye anasoswa kukhundu zache zonsene, pontho anyakuchekwawo anati agwe muna iye. Penepo iwo anapidziwadi kuti ine ndine MBUYA." 
Ezekiel28:24 “Dzinza ya Israele nkhabe dzakhalave na atsanthemba akuatikana na kuakuwaza ninga ntcheswa na nyakhanche tayu. Penepo iwo anapidziwadi kuti ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu.” 
Ezekiel28:25 MBUYA Mulungu akulonga kuti, “Ine ndingagumanyisa anthu a ku Israele kubulukira kumadziko kudaabalalisira ine, ine ndinaonesa kuchena kwanga pakati pawo uku madzinza anango akuona na maso awo. Tenepo iwo anakhala m'dziko mwawo mwene, dziko idapereka ine kuna nyabasanga Yakobo ile." 
Ezekiel28:26 Kweneko iwo anakhala pakupata mbamanga nyumba na kubzala mfesa; iwo anakhala pakupata mwenemo ine ndikutchunyusa atsanthembawo akhaachitira pyakuipa ale. Penepo iwo anapidziwadi kuti ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wawo.” 
Ezekiel29:1 Chaka chakhumi, pansiku yakhumi na chiwiri ya mwezi wakhumi wa unyaperezo wathu, MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel29:2 “Iwe mwana munthu, pasa nkhodolo mfumu wa ku Iguputo mbulonge mphangwa zakupokanyisana naye, pontho na dziko yonsene ya Iguputo." 
Ezekiel29:3 Longa kuna iye kuti ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: ‘Ine ndina mseru na iwe, mfumu wa Iguputo, iwe nyangume, chirombo cha m'madzi, uku wagona tambza pakati pa madzi.’ Iwe umbalonga kuti, ‘Mkulo wa Nailo ngwanga; ndidachita kuusasanya ndekha ene.’ ”" 
Ezekiel29:4 Kwache ndinati ndipitise chimedzo m'malakwi mwako mbandichitisa nsomba za m'mikulo mwako kukakamira m'mabade mwako. Tenepo ndinakumbuluthira kumtunda, mwenemo nsomba zili phathi-phathi m'mabade mwako." 
Ezekiel29:5 Ine ndinakusiya m'thando yatchetcha, iwe na nsomba zako za m'mikulo mwakozo. Iwe unati ugwe pakwecha mbukhonda kugumanywa penu kufikhirwa. Ine ndinakupereka ninga phoso kuna nyama zam'tsanga na kuna mbalame." 
Ezekiel29:6 Penepo Aiguputo anapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA. “Iwe wakhala ninga ndodo yamtete kuna dzinza ya Israele. 
Ezekiel29:7 Ndzidzi udakuphata iwo na manjawo, iwe udaatchonkha mbuaalasa paphewa pawo; ndzidzi udakutsamira iwo, iwe udasweka, tenepo misanawo idakhumuka." 
Ezekiel29:8 “Natenepo ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Ine ndinadzesa talasada pana iwe mbandipha amunako na nyama zako zene. 
Ezekiel29:9 Iguputo anasanduka thando yatchetcha, dziko yokhonda khala anthu. Penepo iwo anapidziwadi kuti ine ndine MBUYA. “Na thangwi yakuti iwe udalonga kuti, ‘Mkulo wa Nailo ngwanga, ndidausasanya ndine ene pano,’" 
Ezekiel29:10 natenepo ine ndina mseru na iwepo, mbandisasanya kuchita pinthu pana mikulo yako. Ndinachitisa dziko ya Iguputo kuvungika pontho kusanduka thando yatchetcha kubulukira ku Migidoli mpakana ku Asiwani, nkhwenderatu kumadire na Kushi." 
Ezekiel29:11 Nee dzinyalo ya munthu, penu nyama inafuna dzagwanda pontho na mwenemo tayu; pyaka makumanayi m'dzikomo nkhabe dzakhala munthu tayu." 
Ezekiel29:12 Ndinachitisa dziko ya Iguputo kukhala yakusakazika pakati pa madziko onsene a padziko yapansi, pontho pyaka makumanayi m'mizindache nkhabe dzakhala anthu tayu. Ine ndinabalalisa anthu a ku Iguputo pakati pa madzinza mbandiathamangisira kumadziko anango.”" 
Ezekiel29:13 Kwache MBUYA Mulungu akulonga kuti, “Pakumala pyaka makumanayi ndinagumanyisa pontho anthu a ku Iguputo kubulukira kumadziko kudaabalalisira ine kule." 
Ezekiel29:14 Ine ndinaabweza kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo mbandidza nawo ku Patirosi, nthemba ya mu Iguputo, kukhakhala makolo awo pakutoma kule. Kweneko iwo anakhala ufumu wakusowa maka chilemedzo." 
Ezekiel29:15 Unakhala ufumu ung'onoletu mbukhonda kupikwizambo okha ene pakati pa madzinza anangowa. Ndinauchitisa kukhala wakusowaletu mphamvu mwakuti nkhabe kwanisa kukhala na utongi pana madzinza anango tayu. 
Ezekiel29:16 Anthu a ku Israele nkhabeve dzanyindira dziko ya Iguputo tayu, mbwenye kutchunyuswa kwa Iguputo kunakhala ninga chikumbuso kuna Aisraele cha pyakudawa pyawo chakwenda kuna iye kufuna chiphedzo. Penepo iwo anapidziwadi kuti ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu.”" 
Ezekiel29:17 Chaka chamakumawiri na chinomwe, pansiku yakutoma ya mwezi wakutoma wa unyaperezo wathu, MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel29:18 “Iwe mwana munthu, Nebukadinezara mfumu wa Babiloni adadza na anyankhondo ache dzachita nkhondo na Turo. Iye adaakhakhamiza kuthukula mitolo yakulemera mwakuti misolo yawo yonsene idamala kupuka, pontho mapewa onsene adamala tokota. Kwache iye na anyankhondo ache nkhabe mfupo watambira iwo tayu, thangwi ya nkhondo idachita iwo na Turo ile." 
Ezekiel29:19 Natenepo ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Ine ndinaikha Iguputo m'manja mwa Nebukadinezara mfumu wa Babiloni. Iye anapokosera na kukwata mfuma yonsene ya dzikoyo mbikhala ninga chakupagali nacho anyankhondo ache. 
Ezekiel29:20 Ine ndaikha m'manja mwache Iguputo ninga mfupo thangwi ya basache yonsene idaphata iye na anyankhondo ache m'mbuto mwanga ile. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu. 
Ezekiel29:21 “Pansiku yeneyo ndinachitisa dzinza ya Israele kumera pontho nyanga, mbandipereka mphamvu kuna iwe, Ezekiele, kuti ulonge pakati pawo. Penepo iwo anapidziwadi kuti ine ndine MBUYA.”" 
Ezekiel30:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel30:2 “Iwe mwana munthu, longa mphangwa zauprofeti kuti ine, MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Kalala mbulonge kuti, ‘Mama ine, nsiku yadzedze ikudza!’" 
Ezekiel30:3 Thangwi nsiku ili chifupi, nsiku ya MBUYA ili chifupi; nsiku ya makole, ndzidzi wa dzedze ya madzinza." 
Ezekiel30:4 Talasada inabwera pana Iguputo, pontho kusanyika kukulu kunabwera pana Kushi. Anthu azinji anaphiwa mu Iguputo, mfumache inakwatwa, pontho maziko ache anamala tchikhulwa." 
Ezekiel30:5 Kushi na Puti, Ludi na Arabia onsene, Libia na anthu a m'madziko, ale akhali na Iguputo gulu ibodzi ya nkhondo, anafa na talasada pabodzi pene na iye." 
Ezekiel30:6 “Ine, MBUYA ndikulonga tenepa: Anyagulu ibodzi na Iguputo anamala kundwa, pontho anyankhondo ache akudungudza anaphiwa. Kubulukira ku Migidoli mpakana ku Asiwani iwo anamala phiwa pankhondo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Ezekiel30:7 Dziko ya Iguputo inasakazika kupiringana madziko anango onsene a padziko yapansi, pontho mizindache inamala vungwa." 
Ezekiel30:8 Penepo iwo anapidziwadi kuti ine ndine MBUYA, ndingadumika moto Iguputo mbandimala kuvunga anyakumphedzache onsene." 
Ezekiel30:9 “Pansiku yeneyo ndinatuma anyamphangwa na miyadiya kwenda kathuswa anthu a ku Kushi, ale nkhabe famba chewu-chewu tayu. Iwo anaphatwa na mantha makulu nsiku inava iwo pya kuvungika kwa dziko ya Iguputo, thangwi nyatwazo zinati zimgwere basi." 
Ezekiel30:10 “Ine, MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Ine ndinamala vunga magulu a anyankhondo a ku Iguputo pakuphatisa basa mphamvu za Nebukadinezara mfumu wa Babiloni." 
Ezekiel30:11 Iye na anyankhondo ache ene, madzinza avinga pyakwanga ale, anadzeswa dzavunga dzikoyo. Iwo anasolola matalasadawo pana Iguputo mbadzaza dziko yonsene na anyakuchekwa." 
Ezekiel30:12 Mkulo wa Nailo ndinamala kuuumisa mbandigulisa dzikoyo kuna amuna akuipa; na mkono wa anthu akudza pyawo, ndinavunga dziko na pyonsenene pili mwenemo pile. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Ezekiel30:13 “Ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Ine ndinavunga mifanikizo mbandimalisa kupembedza milungu mu Memfisi. Mu Iguputo nkhabe dzakhalave mfumu tayu, m'dziko monsenemo ndinati ndigwisemo mantha." 
Ezekiel30:14 Nthemba ya Patirosi ndinaisakaza, ndinadumika moto Zoani, mbanditchunyusa mzinda wa Tebesi." 
Ezekiel30:15 Ukali wanga ndinaukhuthulira pana Pelusiamu, mzinda wakutchingwa na mpanda mu Iguputo ule, mbandivunga magulu a anyankhondo mu Tebesi." 
Ezekiel30:16 Ndinadumika moto Iguputo; Pelusiamu anava kupha pyakwanga. Tebesi anambumbuluthwa na chonzi; Memfisi anaona nyatwa nsiku na nsiku. 
Ezekiel30:17 Aphale a kumizinda ya Heliopolisi na Bubasitisi anaphiwa na talasada, pontho anthu awo anakwatwa unyaperezo." 
Ezekiel30:18 Mu Tahipanihesi masikati anasanduka mdima, ndzidzi unafuna ine dzamalisa mphamvu za Iguputo; penepo anyankhondo ache akudungudza ndinamala kuavunga. Iguputo anaphimbirwa na makole, pontho anthu a m'midzi yache anamala kwatwa unyaperezo." 
Ezekiel30:19 Na njira yeneyi ndinatchunyusa Iguputo, penepo iwo anapidziwadi kuti ine ndine MBUYA.”" 
Ezekiel30:20 Chaka chakhumi na chibodzi, pansiku ya chinomwe ya mwezi wakutoma wa unyaperezo wathu, MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel30:21 “Iwe mwana munthu, ine ndakhumula mkono wa mfumu wa ku Iguputo. Iwo nkhabe mangwa tsakala kuti uwange, penu kumangirirwa kansekete tayu kuti ukhale na mphamvu zakuphata pontho talasada." 
Ezekiel30:22 Natenepo ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Ine ndina mseru na mfumu wa ku Iguputo. Ine ndinakhumula mikono yache yonsene miwiri, mkono wadidi maka wasala ule, pontho na wakukhumuka kale ule, mbandichitisa talasada kudoda pyayo yokha ene m'manja mwache." 
Ezekiel30:23 Anthu a ku Iguputo ndinaabalalisa pakati pa madzinza anango mbandiathamangisira kumadziko onsene. 
Ezekiel30:24 Ndinapasa mphamvu mikono ya mfumu wa ku Babiloni mbandiikha talasadanga m'manja mwache, kwache ndinakhumula mikono ya mfumu wa ku Iguputo, tenepo iye anabulira pamaso pache ninga munthu wakukuwazwa pikulu pene." 
Ezekiel30:25 Ndinapasa mphamvu mikono ya mfumu wa ku Babiloni, mbwenye mikono ya mfumu wa ku Iguputo inachita chiwewa. Penepo iwo anapidziwadi kuti ine ndine MBUYA, ndingaikha talasadanga m'manja mwa mfumu wa ku Babiloni, iyembo mbaiphatisa basa pana Iguputo." 
Ezekiel30:26 Anthu a ku Iguputo ndinaabalalisa pakati pa madzinza anango mbandiathamangisira kumadziko onsene. Penepo iwo anapidziwadi kuti ine ndine MBUYA.” 
Ezekiel31:1 Chaka chakhumi na chibodzi, pansiku yakutoma ya mwezi wachitatu wa unyaperezo wathu, MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel31:2 “Iwe mwana munthu, longa kuna mfumu wa Iguputo na magulu a anyankhondo ache kuti: Mbani anakwanisa kusangizwa na iwe mfumu?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Iwe wakhala ninga muti wamkungudza mu Lebanoni, wakukhala na nthambi wakubalika, pontho wakuvata; iwo udalapha kufika kudzulu mbupiringana miti inango yonsene yakulapha." 
Ezekiel31:4 Madzi adauthirira mwadidi, mphuno za madzi zidauchitisa kulapha; mikulo idafamba mwakuzungulira tchinde yache, pontho idatumiza migelo ya madzi kuna miti yonsene mumsitumo." 
Ezekiel31:5 Natenepo mutiwo udalapha pyakwanga kupiringana miti inango yonsene ya mumsitumo; nthambi zache zidainjipa pyakwanga, nthambi zache zidakula pontho mbazivata mwadidi, thangwi ya kuinjipa kwa madzi." 
Ezekiel31:6 Mbalame zamtundu onsene zidamanga pisa pyawo m'nthambizo, pontho nyama zonsene zam'tsanga zidateyana pansi pache; madzinza onsene a padziko yapansi adapuma pansi pa mthunzi wache." 
Ezekiel31:7 Mutiwo ukhali ukulu pontho wakubalika pyakwanga, wakukhala na nthambi zakuvata mwadidi, thangwi mitsitsi yache idapita pansi kuna madzi azinji." 
Ezekiel31:8 Mikungudza ya m'munda wa Mulungu ule hidakwanise tayu kuupiringana, nee muti wapaina kukhala sasawa na nthambi ninga zenezi tayu, penu miti ya njale kukhala ninga nthambi zache tayu, nee muti na ubodzi ene m'munda wa Mulungu wakukoma m'maso ninga muti wenewu tayu." 
Ezekiel31:9 Ine ndidauchitisa kukhala wakukoma m'maso wakukhala na nthambi zizinji. Muti onsene mu Edeni, m'munda wa Mulungu ukhachita bivu na muti wenewu." 
Ezekiel31:10 “Natenepo ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Na thangwi yakuti muti wenewu udalapha pyakwanga pene kupiringana miti yonsene ya mumsitu, pontho kuti ukhanyada na kulapha kwacheko," 
Ezekiel31:11 ine ndidaupasa nkhodolo mbandiupereka m'manja mwa mtongi wa madzinza kuti achite pyache pyonsene pinafuna iye malingana na kudawika kwache. 
Ezekiel31:12 Tenepo alendo akubulukira kuna madzinza avingaletu adaugwanda mbausiya pyawo gwamwa. Nthambi zache zonsene zidagwera pamapiri na m'phedi; nthambi zache zidamala thyokera m'mikulo yonsene m'dzikomo. Madzinza onsene a padziko yapansi adabuluka mumthunzi mwachemo mbaenda pyawo. 
Ezekiel31:13 Mbalame zonsene zidadza mbizikhazikika m'muti wakugwawo, pontho nyama zonsene zam'tsanga zidakhala m'nthambi zachezo." 
Ezekiel31:14 Natenepo kutomera lero kwenda mtsogolo, nkhabe muti na ubodzi ene wakukhala m'khundu-khundu mwa madzi unalaphave ninga wenewo tayu, penu nsonga zache kulapha kupiringana miti yonsene ya mumsitu tayu. Nkhabe miti inango yakuthirirwa mwadidi inalapha ninga muti wenewu tayu; yonsene yathema kuvungwa, pabodzi pene na anthu a padziko yapansi, ambafa mbatchithira ku Chiphompho chikulu ale." 
Ezekiel31:15 “Ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Pansiku idendeswa mutiwo kudziko ya anyakufa, ndidafunga mphuno za madzi kuonesa kusintili kwanga; mikulo yonsene ndidamala kuiphata, tenepo madzi awo azinji ale adaleka kufamba. Na thangwi ya mutiwo, ine ndidagudumira Lebanoni na mdima ukulu, tenepo miti yonsene ya mumsitu wenewu idamala unyala." 
Ezekiel31:16 Ndidachitisa madzinza kutetemera na kuva dungu ya kuvungwa kwache, ndzidzi udautchithisira ine kudziko ya anyakufa pabodzi pene na anyakwenda ku Chiphompho chikulu ale. Penepo miti yonsene ya mu Edeni, miti yadidiletu pontho yakusankhulika ya ku Lebanoni, miti ikhathirirwa mwadidi ile, idasekera m'dziko ya anyakufa thangwi yakuvungika kwache." 
Ezekiel31:17 Onsene ale akhakhala mumthunzi mwache, ashamwali ache pakati pa madzinza, adendambo naye pabodzi kudziko ya anyakufa ale, kakhala pabodzi na anthu adaphiwa pankhondo ale." 
Ezekiel31:18 “Ngupi muti wache mu Edeni unakwanisa kusangizwa na iwe kubalika pontho kukhala na chilemedzo? Kwache iwembo unaponyerwa kudziko ya anyakufa pabodzi pene na miti ya mu Edeni; iwe unagona pakati pa anthu okhonda gwandwa nsonga yachimuna, na anthu adaphiwa pankhondo ale. “Mutiwo ndi mfumu wa ku Iguputo na magulu ache onsene a anyankhondo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu.”" 
Ezekiel32:1 Chaka chakhumi na chiwiri, pansiku yakutoma ya mwezi wakhumi na chiwiri wa unyaperezo wathu, MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel32:2 “Iwe mwana munthu, imba nyimbo ya maliro yakulonga pya mfumu wa ku Iguputo mbulonge kuna iye kuti: Iwe wapiyesa wekha ene ninga nkhalamu pakati pa madzinza, kwache iwe wakhala ninga ng'ona m'madzi, ule ambathubudza pikulu m'mikulo kukuvulira madzi na manyalo ako pontho kuswipisa mikulo na matope." 
Ezekiel32:3 “Ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Na msoka ukulu wa madzinza ndinati ndikuponyere kokota yanga, tenepo iwo anakukuludza na kokotayo." 
Ezekiel32:4 Ine ndinakuponyera kumtunda mbandikusiya pakwecha phesere. Ndinachitisa mbalame zonsene kuphama pana iwe, pontho nyama zam'tsanga padziko yonsene yapansi zinakukhwadzula-khwadzula." 
Ezekiel32:5 Pamapiri ponsene ndinathasikapo nyamako mbandidzaza maphedi onsene na manyenyeswa a mtembo wako. 
Ezekiel32:6 Ndinachitisa dziko kukuka na chiropa chanu mpakana kumapiri, pontho mikulo inadzala na manyenyeswako." 
Ezekiel32:7 Ndingamala kukuvungani, ndinaphopha kudzulu mbandiswipisa nyenyezi; dzuwa ndinaibisa na makole, pontho mwezi nkhabe dzaonesa cheza chache tayu." 
Ezekiel32:8 Pyakumwinikira pyonsene pyakudzulu ndinati ndipithimise pana imwe; ndinadzesa chidima padziko yapansi. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu. 
Ezekiel32:9 “Ndinachitisa mitima ya anthu azinji kusanyika pyakwanga ndingavekesa mbiri yakuvungika kwako pakati pa madzinza, pontho kuna madziko anakhonda iwe dziwa ale." 
Ezekiel32:10 Ndinachitisa anthu azinji kututumuka na kuona dzedze yako, pontho mafumu awo anagedemera na mantha, ndzidzi unafuna ine dzadzesa talasadanga pana iwe. Pansiku ya kuvungwa kwako onsenewo anatetemera na mantha okhonda lekeza, thangwi ya kugopa pinafuna dzaachitikira." 
Ezekiel32:11 “Ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Talasada ya mfumu wa ku Babiloni inabwera pana iwe. 
Ezekiel32:12 Ndinachitisa magulu a anyankhondo ako kuphiwa na matalasada a anyankhondo amphamvu, amuna akukalaletu mtima pakati pa madzinza anango onsene ale. Iwo anasakaza pinthu pyonsene pimbanyada na Iguputo, pontho magulu a anyankhondo ache onsene anamala phiwa." 
Ezekiel32:13 Ndinavunga ng'ombe zako zonsene m'khundu-khundu mwa mikulo yonsene. Panakhala nkhabe munthu kuswipisa madziwo, penu manyalo a ng'ombe kukuvulira madziwo tayu." 
Ezekiel32:14 Penepo ndinachitisa madzi ache kudenkhera, pontho kuchitisa mikulo yache kufamba ninga mafuta. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Ezekiel32:15 Ndingasandusa Iguputo thando yatchetcha, mbandisakaza dzikoyo monsene mwene, ndingapha anthu onsene ambakhala mwenemo ale, penepo iwo anapidziwadi kuti ine ndine MBUYA." 
Ezekiel32:16 “Yeneyi ndi nyimbo ya maliro inafuna iwo dzamulira nayo. Akazi a madzinza anango anaiimba kusintili nayo; kusintili Iguputo na magulu a anyankhondo ache onsene. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu.” 
Ezekiel32:17 Chaka chakhumi na chiwiri, pansiku ya khumi na chishanu ya mwezi wakutoma wa unyaperezo wathu, MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel32:18 “Iwe mwana munthu, lira thangwi ya magulu a anyankhondo a Iguputo. Agwinyeni pabodzi pene na madzinza anango amphamvu kuti aende ku Chiphompho chikulu." 
Ezekiel32:19 Longa kuna iwo kuti, ‘Ayi iwe ndiye nyakubalika pikulu kupiringana anango onsene? Ndoko ku Chiphompho chikulu mbukagone kweneko pakati pa anyakukhonda gwandwa nsonga yachimuna.’" 
Ezekiel32:20 Iwo anagwera kubodzi na anthu onsene adaphiwa pankhondo ale. Talasada yachololwa, mulekeni ambuluthwe kubodzi kwene na magulu ache onsene a anyankhondo ale." 
Ezekiel32:21 M'bwaloletu m'dziko ya anyakufa akadamu amphamvu analonga pya Iguputo na ashamwali ache onsene kuti, ‘Iwo atchithira kuno, tenepo iwo ali gada na anthu okhonda gwandwa nsonga yachimuna, pabodzi pene na anthu adaphiwa pankhondo ale.’" 
Ezekiel32:22 “Asiria ali kweneko pabodzi pene na anyankhondo ache onsene; iye azungulirwa na nthumbi za anthu ache adaphiwa ale, onsene adamala phiwa pankhondo ale." 
Ezekiel32:23 Masiye awo ali pansiletu m'Chiphompho chikulu, pontho anyankhondo ache ali gada-gada kuzungulira masiye ache. Onsene ale akhadathuswa dziko ya anthu a moyo ale thasa-thasa, amala phiwa pankhondo." 
Ezekiel32:24 “Elamu alimbo kweneko uku nthumbi yache yazungulirwa na magulu a anyankhondo ache onsene, onsenewo ali thasa-thasa, amala phiwa pankhondo. Onsene akhathuswa dziko ya anthu a moyo ale, aenda okhonda gwandwa nsonga yachimuna kudziko ya anyakufa. Iwo akuchita manyadzo pabodzi pene na anthu ambaenda ku Chiphompho chikulu ale." 
Ezekiel32:25 Elamu asasanyirwa talimba pakati anyakuchekwa. Iye azungulirwa na masiye a magulu a anyankhondo ache onsene. Onsenewo mbanthu okhonda gwandwa nsonga yachimuna, adaphiwa pankhondo ale. Na thangwi ya kuthuswa anthu kudachita iwo konsene kwene m'dziko ya anthu amoyo, lero iwo akuchita manyadzo pabodzi pene na anthu ambaenda ku Chiphompho chikulu ale; iwo ali gada-gada pakati pa anthu adaphiwa pankhondo ale." 
Ezekiel32:26 “Mesheki na Tubali ali kwenekombo pabodzi pene na magulu a anyankhondo awo onsene kuzungulira masiye awo. Onsenewo mbanthu okhonda gwandwa nsonga yachimuna, adaphiwa pankhondo ale, thangwi ya kuthuswa anthu kudachita iwo konsene kwene m'dziko ya anthu amoyo." 
Ezekiel32:27 Iwo hadaikhwe m'masiye na demelero tayu ninga anyankhondo akuveka a anthu okhonda gwandwa nsonga yachimuna, ale adatchithira kudziko ya anyakufa na pida pyawo pyankhondo pene, uku atsamira matalasadawo ninga nsago, pontho magogodo awo aphimbirwa na pyakugedera matswimo pyawo. Kalene anyankhondo akuvekawa akhathuswa anthu konsene kwene m'dziko ya anthu amoyo." 
Ezekiel32:28 “Iwembo mfumu wa ku Iguputo unavungwa mbugonambo pakati pa anthu okhonda gwandwa nsonga yachimuna, anthu adaphiwa pankhondo ale." 
Ezekiel32:29 “Edomu ali kweneko pabodzi pene na mafumu ache pontho atongi ache onsene; podi kwene kuti iwo akhali amphamvu pyakwanga, mbwenye lero ali gada pabodzi pene na anyakuphiwa pankhondo. Iwo ali gada na anthu okhonda gwandwa nsonga yachimuna, ale adenda ku Chiphompho chikulu." 
Ezekiel32:30 “Atongi onsenene akumpoto ali kweneko, pontho na anthu onsene a ku Sidoni; iwo aenda pabodzi pene na anyakuphiwa mwakuchitiswa manyadzo, thangwi ya kuthuswa konsene kukhachita iwo na mphamvu zawo. Iwo mbanthu okhonda gwandwa nsonga yachimuna, pontho ali gada pabodzi pene na anthu adaphiwa pankhondo ale. Iwo adachita manyadzo pabodzi pene na anthu ambatchithira ku Chiphompho chikulu ale." 
Ezekiel32:31 “Mfumu wa Iguputo, pabodzi pene na anyankhondo ache onsene, anaona mbasekera thangwi ya kuvungika kwa magulu a anyankhondo ache onsene ale adamala phiwa pankhondo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Ezekiel32:32 “Podi kwene kuti ndine ndidamchitisa kuthuswa m'dziko ya anyamoyo, kwache mfumu wa ku Iguputo pabodzi pene na magulua anyankhondo ache onsene a anyankhondo anagona gada pabodzi na anthu okhonda gwandwa nsonga yachimuna, anthu adaphiwa pankhondo ale. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu.”" 
Ezekiel33:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel33:2 “Iwe mwana munthu, longa kuna anthu ako kuti: Ine ndingadzesa nkhondo m'dziko, tenepo anthu a m'dzikomo angasankhula mbodzi wa anthu awo mbamuikha kukhala nyakulondali," 
Ezekiel33:3 tenepo munthuyo angaona anyamalwa akudza, iye mbaliza ngoma ya chidziwiso kucheuza anthu," 
Ezekiel33:4 tenepo ngakhala munthu anava kulira kwa ngomayo mbakhonda ikha konta, nkhondoyo mbifikadi munthuyo mbafa, chiropa chache chinati chigwere pamsolo pache." 
Ezekiel33:5 Podi iye adava kulira kwa ngoma kumcheuza mbakhonda kupiikha konta, penepo chiropa chache chinati chigwere pamsolo pache. Iye mbadaikha konta kucheuzwa kule, iye mbadapipulumusa yekha ene." 
Ezekiel33:6 Kwache ngakhala nyakulondali anaona anyamalwa akudza, iye nee liza ngoma kucheuza anthu tayu, tenepo anyamalwawo angadza mbapha mbodzi wa anthuwo, penepo munthu weneyo anaphiwa thangwi ya pyakudawa pyache, kwache chiropa chache chinagwera pamsolo pa nyakulondaliyo." 
Ezekiel33:7 “Iwe mwana munthu, ine ndakuikha kukhala nyakulondali wa dzinza ya Israele; tenepo vesera mafala analonga inewa mbukacheuze nawo anthu." 
Ezekiel33:8 Ngakhala ndinalonga kuti, ‘Iwe nyakudawa, unati ufe,’ iwe mbukhonda kulonga kuna iye kumcheuza kuti aleke pyakudawa pyache, munthu weneyo anati afe thangwi ya pyakudawa pyache, kwache chiropa chache chinagwera pamsolo pako." 
Ezekiel33:9 Mbwenye ngakhala iwe unamcheuza nyakudawika kuti aleke pyakudawa pyache, iye mbakhonda kuchita tenepo, iye anati afe, thangwi ya pyakudawa pyachepyo, kwache iwe unapulumusa moyo wako." 
Ezekiel33:10 “Iwe mwana munthu, longa kuna dzinza ya Israele kuti: Imwe mukulonga kuti, ‘Umambalathu na pyakudawa pyathu pikutilemera, pontho tikumala pakatika thangwi ya pinthu pimbachita ife. Apo tinakwanisa tani kukhala na moyo?’" 
Ezekiel33:11 Longa kuna iwo kuti MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Ine ninga Mulungu wamoyo, nkhabe komerwa na imfa ya anyakudawika tayu. Mbwenye ndimbakomerwa kuona anyakudawikawo aleka pyakudawa pyawo mbakhala na moyo. Imwe dzinza ya Israele zungunukani! Lekani pyakudawa pyanu! Thangwi yache ninji munafuna kuti mufe?" 
Ezekiel33:12 “Natenepo, iwe mwana munthu, longa kuna anthu a dzinzako kuti, ‘Munthu wakulungama angadawa, kulungama kwacheko nkhabe dzampulumusa tayu, pontho ngakhala nyakudawa analeka pyakudawa pyache, iye nkhabe dzatchunyuswa tayu thangwi ya pyakudawa pidachita iye pile. Ngakhala nyakulungama anadawa, iye nkhabe dzakhala na moyo tayu thangwi yakuti pakutoma iye akhali nyakulungama.’" 
Ezekiel33:13 Mbwenye ngakhala ndinampanga nyakulungama kuti iye anati akhale na moyo, kwache iye mbanyindira kulungama kwacheko mbachita pyache pyakuipa, ine nkhabe dzawerengera tayu na chibodzi chene pa mabasache adidi adachita iye ale; iye anafa thangwi ya pyakudawa pyachita iye." 
Ezekiel33:14 Pontho ngakhala ndinalonga kuna nyakudawika kuti, ‘Iwe unati ufe,’ kwache m'nduli mwache mbaleka pyakudawa pyache mbachita pyakulungama pontho pyadidi" 
Ezekiel33:15 ngakhala iye anabwezera pinthu pidaphatira iye pinyolo pile penu kubwezera pinthu pidaba iye, mbateweza matongero akupasa moyo, pontho kuleka pyakudawa pyache, iye anati akhale na moyo; iye nkhabe dzafa tayu." 
Ezekiel33:16 Nkhabe na chibodzi chene cha pyakudawa pyachita iye pinakumbukwa tayu. Iye anati akhale na moyo, thangwi achita pyakulungama pontho pyadidi." 
Ezekiel33:17 “Kwache anthu a dzinzako ambalonga kuti, ‘Njira za Mbuya si zakulungama tayu.’ Nkhabe, zakupotoka ndi njira zawo." 
Ezekiel33:18 Ngakhala nyakulungama analeka chita pyakulungama mbachita pyakuipa, iye anati afe thangwi ya penepi." 
Ezekiel33:19 Ngakhala nyakuipa analeka pyakudawa pyache mbachita pyakulungama pontho pyadidi, iye anapulumusa moyo wache." 
Ezekiel33:20 Kwache imwe dzinza ya Israele mumbalonga kuti, ‘Njira za MBUYA si zakulungama tayu.’ Kwache ine ndinatonga mseru munthu onsene wa imwe malingana na mabasache.”" 
Ezekiel33:21 Chaka chakhumi na chiwiri, pansiku yachishanu ya mwezi wakhumi wa unyaperezo wathu, munthu unango ule akhadathawa ku Yerusalemu adadza kuna ine mbalonga kuti, “Mzinda wavungwa.”" 
Ezekiel33:22 Usiku mwache munthuyo mbadzati fika mphamvu za MBUYA zidandigudumira. Mbwenye na machibese mwache, pidafika munthu ule, MBUYA adandifungula mulomo. Tenepo mulomo wanga udafunguka mbandikhonda khalave mulomo phoo." 
Ezekiel33:23 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel33:24 “Iwe mwana munthu, anthu ale anakhala m'madembe a dziko ya Israele akulonga kuti, ‘Abrahamu akhali munthu mbodzi basi, kwache iye adapaswa dziko yonsene ninga yache ene. Mbwenye ife ndife azinji, ndimomwene dziko yaperekwa kuna ife.’" 
Ezekiel33:25 “Natenepo longa kuna iwo kuti: Ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Podi imwe mukuthimiza basi kudya nyama kubodzi kwene na chiropa chache, kupembedza mifanikizo, pontho kuchuchisa chiropa, ayi imwe nkhukwata basi dzikoyi ninga yanu ene?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Imwe mumbanyindira matalasadanu mbamuchita pinthu pyakunyansa, pontho munthu onsene wa imwe ambachita pyakuzuda na mkazi tsanthembache. Apo imwe nkhukwata basi dzikoyi ninga yanu ene?" 
Ezekiel33:27 “Longa kuna iwo kuti: Ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Ine ninga Mulungu wamoyo, anthu asalira m'madembe ale anaphiwa pankhondo. Anthumbo anakhala kutsanga ale, anadyiwa na nyama zam'tsanga, pontho ale anabisala m'mbuto zakupata pontho kunkhwimba, anafa na muliri." 
Ezekiel33:28 Ine ndinasandusa dzikoyi thando yatchetcha, pontho mphamvu zikhanyada na iwo zile zinati zimale. Mapiri a Israele anasanduka msitu wakugoswa pyakwanga mwakuti nkhabe munthu anafuna dzagwanda namove tayu." 
Ezekiel33:29 Penepo anapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA, ine ndingasakaza dzikoyo mbandiisandusa thando yatchetcha, thangwi ya pinthu pyakunyansa pyachita iwo pile." 
Ezekiel33:30 “Kulonga pya iwe, mwana munthu, anthu a dzinzako akulonga pya iwe kuna unango na mwanzache pinagumanyikana iwo pampanda, pontho m'misuwo ya nyumba zawo kuti, ‘Tendeni, tivesere mafala akubulukira kuna MBUYA.’" 
Ezekiel33:31 Anthu anga ambadza kuna iwe ninga mumbachitira iwo ndzidzi onsene mbakhala pamaso pako kufuna kuvesera pinafuna iwe longa, kwache iwo nkhabe chita pinthu pimbaapanga iwe pile tayu. Na m'kanwa mwawo iwo ambaonesadi kuti ambandifuna, kwache mitimawo imbakhumba kuganyali mwakuba." 
Ezekiel33:32 Kuna iwo, iwe si pinthu tayu kusangiza na munthu ule ambaimba nyimbo zakukoma na chikolingo mbaimba pontho mwadidi na pyakuimbira, thangwi iwo ambavesera mafalako, kwache iwo nkhabe chita tayu pinalonga iwepyo." 
Ezekiel33:33 Kwache pinthu pyonsenepi pingakwana-kwana; ande, ipyo pinati pichitikedi, penepo iwo anapidziwadi kuti pakati pawo pakhali mprofeti.”" 
Ezekiel34:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel34:2 “Iwe mwana munthu, longa mwakupokanyisana na amakabuswa a Aisraele. Longa mphangwa zauprofeti kuna iwo kuti MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Dzedze kuna imwe amakabuswa a Aisraele, ale mumbatsalakana pya imwe mwekha basi! Ayi imwe mudatheme tayu kuyang'anira mabira?" 
Ezekiel34:3 Imwe mumbamwa mafuta amkaka mbamuvala nguwo zakusasanywa na ubweya, pontho kupha mabira akunenepa, kwache imwe nkhabe tsalakana mabira tayu." 
Ezekiel34:4 Mabira akusowa mphamvu imwe nee mwaapasa mphamvu tayu, penu kuwangisa mabira akudwala tayu. Imwe nee mwamanga tsakala mabira akukuwazika, penu kubweza kokha mabira akwenda pyawo chimpune-pune, penu kusaka mabira akutayika tayu. M'mbuto mwache imwe mumbaachitira vinga pontho kuakalira mtima." 
Ezekiel34:5 Natenepo iwo adamala balalikana thangwi pakhali nkhabe makabuswa, tenepo pidabalalika iwo, adasanduka nyama kuna pirombo pyonsene pyam'tsanga." 
Ezekiel34:6 Mabira anga adenda pyawo mbatsalakatika m'pitunda na m'mapiri. Iwo amala balalikira ponsene pene padziko yapansi mbapasowa munthu na mbodzi ene wakuakusa penu kuasaka-saka tayu. 
Ezekiel34:7 “Natenepo imwe amakabuswa veserani mafala a MBUYA! 
Ezekiel34:8 Ine ninga Mulungu wa moyo, ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Mabiranga akusowa makabuswa, pontho aphatwa mbasanduka nyama kuna pirombo pyonsene pya m'tsanga. Amakabuswa hadende kaasaka tayu, m'mbuto mwache mbatsalakana pya iwo okha basi, nee kutsalakana mabiranga tayu." 
Ezekiel34:9 Natenepo imwe amakabuswa, veserani mafala a MBUYA Mulungu!" 
Ezekiel34:10 Ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Ine ndina mseru na amakabuswa, pontho chiropa cha mabiranga chinagwera pamsolo pawo. Iwo nkhabeve dzakhala amakabuswa a mabiranga tayu. Ine ndinaalekesa kuyang'anira mabiranga, towera amakabuswa aleke kupinenepesa okha ene. Ine ndinapokosera mabiranga kukanwa kwawo, tenepo iwo nkhabe dzakhalave pyakudya kuna iwo tayu." 
Ezekiel34:11 “Ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Ine ene mwenechiroache ndinaasaka-saka mabiranga mbandiayang'anira ndekha ene. 
Ezekiel34:12 Ninga mumbachitira makabuswa kuyang'anira mabirache akhadabalalika ale mwenemo iye ali nawo, sasawambo ine ndinayang'anira mabiranga. Ine ndinati ndiakuse kubulukira kumbuto zonsene kukhadabalaliswa iwo kule pansiku yamdima pontho yakugoswa ile." 
Ezekiel34:13 Ine ndinati ndiabuluse pakati pa madzinza mbandiagumanyisa kubulukira kumadziko anango, tenepo ndinaadzesa kudziko yawo ene. Ine ndinadyesa pamapiri a Israele, m'maphedi, pontho na mbuto zonsene zinakhala anthu zile." 
Ezekiel34:14 Ine ndinaadyesa mpovu wadidi, pontho mapiri a Israele ndiye anafuna dzakhala mbuto yawo ya mpovu. Kweneko iwo anagona pyawo lamba-lamba mumpovu wa bidoo mbadya pyawo mpovu wadidi ninga munafunira iwo pamapiri a Israele." 
Ezekiel34:15 Ine ene mwenechiroache ndinakhala makabuswa wa mabiranga, mbandiachitisa kugona pyawo lamba-lamba kupuma. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Ezekiel34:16 “Ndinasaka-saka mabira onsene akutayika mbandibweza mabira onsene akwenda pyawo chimpune-pune. Mabira akukuwazika ndinaamanga pironda pyawo mbandipasa mphamvu mabira onsene akusowa mphamvu, kwache onsene akunenepa pontho amphamvu ndinamala kuavunga. Thangwi ndine makabuswa wakuchita pyakulungama." 
Ezekiel34:17 “Kulonga pya imwe mkumbi wanga, ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Ine ndinatonga mseru pakati pa bira na bira mnzache, pontho pakati pa mabira amuna na mbuzi." 
Ezekiel34:18 Ayi kudya mpovu wadidi hamudakwane nako tayu? Ayi imwe mwathema kupondedza pyanu na manyalo anu mpovu wakusalira ule? Ayi kumwa madzi akudenkhera nkhabe kwana nako tayu? Ayi imwe mwathema kukuvulira pyanu na manyalo anu madzi asalirawo? 
Ezekiel34:19 Ayi mabiranga athema kudya mpovu wamala imwe pondedzawo, mbamwa madzi amala imwe kuvulirawo?" 
Ezekiel34:20 “Natenepo ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa kuna iwo: Yang'anani, ine ene ndekha ndinati nditonge mseru pakati pa mabira akunenepa na akusowa mphamvu." 
Ezekiel34:21 Podi imwe mabira akusowa mphamvu mudaamenya mbamuagwinyira kutali, pontho mudaadima na nyanga zanu kuathamangisira kutali," 
Ezekiel34:22 ine ndinati ndipulumuse mabiranga. Tenepo iwo nkhabe dzaphatwave pontho tayu. Ine ndinatonga mseru pakati pa bira na bira mnzache. 
Ezekiel34:23 Ine ndinaaikhira nyabasanga Davite kukhala makabuswawo mbodzi ene basi, tenepo iye anaayang'anira mwadidi. Iye anaayang'anira mwadidi mbakhala makabuswawo." 
Ezekiel34:24 Ine MBUYA ndinakhala Mulungu wawo, pontho nyabasanga Davite anakhala mfumu pakati pawo. Ndalonga ndine pano." 
Ezekiel34:25 “Ine ndinachita nawo chiverano chamtendere mbandibulusa nyama zonsene zakugoswa m'dzikomo, towera mabiranga akwanise kukhala m'tsanga, pontho kugona m'misitu pakupata." 
Ezekiel34:26 Ine ndinaatsanzayisa mbakhala mbuto zakuzungulira phiri yanga. Kweneko ndinawazirako mafazi pandzidzi wache; mafaziwo anakhala mtsanzayiso. 
Ezekiel34:27 Miti inabala nsapo, pontho mataka anabalisa mbewu; anthu anakhala pakupata m'dzikomo. Iwo anapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA, ndingabulusa goli-goli m'khosi mwawo, pontho kuabulusa m'manja mwa anthu akhadaachitisa kukhala mabitchu ale." 
Ezekiel34:28 Madzinza nkhabe dzapokoserave pinthu pyawo tayu, pontho iwo nkhabe dzadyiwa na nyama zam'tsanga tayu. Iwo anakhala pakupata, pontho nkhabe munthu unango anafuna dzaathuswa tayu." 
Ezekiel34:29 Ine ndinaapasa dziko ya mataka akubalisa pinthu, tenepo iwo nkhabe dzatcherengave na njala m'dzikomo, penu dzasekwa na madzinza anango tayu." 
Ezekiel34:30 Penepo iwo anapidziwadi kuti ine, MBUYA Mulungu wawo ndili nawo, pontho kuti iwo, dzinza ya Israele, mbanthu anga. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Ezekiel34:31 Imwe mabiranga, mkumbi umbadya mpovu wanga ule, ndimwe anthu anga, inembo ndine Mulungu wanu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu.”" 
Ezekiel35:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel35:2 “Iwe mwana munthu, pasa nkhodolo dziko ya mapiri ya Edomu, longa mphangwa zauprofeti zakupokanyisana naye" 
Ezekiel35:3 mbulonge kuti, ‘MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Ine ndina mseru na iwe Edomu; ndinafuthula mkono wanga kukutchunyusa, pontho ndinakusandusa thando yatchetcha." 
Ezekiel35:4 Maluwani ako ndinaasandusa madembe, pontho iwe maka unasanduka thando yatchetcha. Penepo imwe munapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA.’" 
Ezekiel35:5 “Na thangwi yakuti iwe ukhali nyamalwa na kale ene wa Israele mbuchitisa anthu ache kuphiwa pankhondo pandzidzi wache wa nyatwa, ndzidzi udafika kutchunyuswa kwache pakundendeya," 
Ezekiel35:6 natenepo ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Ine ninga Mulungu wamoyo, ine ndinakupereka m'manja mwa anyachirope, tenepo iwe unati uphiwe. Podi iwe udafuna pyakwanga kuchita pyaupandu, iwe unafambo na upandu onthowo." 
Ezekiel35:7 Ndinasandusa dziko ya mapiri ya Edomu thando yatchetcha mbandipha munthu onsene ule ambapita na kubuluka mwenemo. 
Ezekiel35:8 Mapiri ako onsene anamala dzala na mitembo yokhokha; mitembo ya anyakuphiwa pankhondo inakhala thasa-thasa m'mapiri, m'maphedi na m'mikulo yako yonsene." 
Ezekiel35:9 Ndinasandusa dziko yako thando yatchetcha kwenda na kwenda; maluwani ako nkhabe dzakhalamo munthu na mbodzi ene tayu. Penepo imwe munapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA. 
Ezekiel35:10 “Na thangwi yakuti imwe mudalonga kuti, ‘Madzinza onsene awiriwa, Yuda na Israele, pabodzi pene na madziko awo tinaakwata kukhala athu ene,’ podi kwene kuti ine MBUYA ndikhali Mulungu wawo," 
Ezekiel35:11 natenepo ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Ine ninga Mulungu wamoyo, ndinakubwezerani malingana na kuzhangali, bivu pontho chizondi pikhali na imwe na anthu anga. Ine ndinapichitisa ndekha ene kudziwika pakati pawo ndzidzi unafuna ine dzakutchunyusani." 
Ezekiel35:12 Penepo imwe munapidziwa kuti ine MBUYA ndidava kushola konsene kukhachita imwe mapiri a Israele. Imwe mudalonga kuti, ‘Iwo asanduka madembe, pontho aikhwa m'manja mwathu kuti tiavunge.’" 
Ezekiel35:13 Imwe mudalonga kuna ine mwakugaya pontho nyamphotcho-photcho. Ine ndidava pyonsene pidalonga imwe. 
Ezekiel35:14 Natenepo ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Ine ndinakusandusa madembe monsene mwene mwakuti dziko yonsene inakuseka. 
Ezekiel35:15 Na thangwi yakuti imwe mudaseka ndzidzi udasanduka dzinza ya Israele madembe, ine ndinachitambo chibodzi-bodzi kuna imwe. Imwe mapiri a Seiri, munasanduka thando yatchetcha, imwepo na dziko yonsene ya Edomu. Penepo anthu onsene anapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA.”" 
Ezekiel36:1 MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Iwe mwana munthu, longa mphangwa zauprofeti kuna mapiri a Israele mbuapange kuti: Imwe mapiri a Israele veserani mafala a MBUYA." 
Ezekiel36:2 MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Anyamalwanu adalonga pya imwe mbati, ‘Ehede! Mapiri akale ale asanduka athu ene.’" 
Ezekiel36:3 Natenepo longa mphangwa zauprofeti kuti MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Iwo adakusakazani, pontho kukuvungani kukhundu zonsene mwakuti imwe mudasanduka chinthu cha anthu a madzinza adakuzungulirani ale. Imwe mwasanduka chinthu chakusekesa na chakulongwa tsweda." 
Ezekiel36:4 Natenepo, imwe mapiri a Israele veserani mafala a MBUYA Mulungu! MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa kuna imwe mapiri, pitunda, mikulo na maphedi, kuna imwe madembe, pontho kuna maluwani adathawiwa na anthu awo ale, pontho ale adapokoserwa pinthu pyawo mbalulupiswa na madzinza onsene akuazungulira." 
Ezekiel36:5 Ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Na thangwi ya kugaka kwa ukali wanga ine ndikulonga mwakupokanyisana na madzinza anango onsene, pontho na Aedomu ene. Na kuseka kukulu pontho kuipirwa pikulu iwo adapokosera dziko yanga mbakwata na mbuto zampovu zene kukhala zawo zene." 
Ezekiel36:6 “Natenepo longa mphangwa zauprofeti pya Israele mbulonge kuna mapiri, pitunda, mikulo, na maphedi ene kuti: Ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Ine ndidalonga na ntchanje, thangwi ya kuzhangali na kukutikanani kudakuchitani madzinza anango." 
Ezekiel36:7 Natenepo ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Ndikudumbira pikulu pene kuti madzinza akuzunguliraniwa anatikanwambo. 
Ezekiel36:8 Mbwenye imwe, mapiri a Israele, munati mukhale na miti, ile inabala nsapo kuti ikhale phoso ya anthu anga Aisraele, thangwi chinchino anati abwerere kwawo." 
Ezekiel36:9 Ine ndava namwe nyambalo, tenepo ndinakukomerani mtima; imwe munalimwa, pontho kubzalwa mbewu." 
Ezekiel36:10 Ndinainjipisa anthu muna imwe, podi na dzinza yonsene ene ya Israele. M'maluwani munakhala pontho anthu; madembe anu anamangwa pontho." 
Ezekiel36:11 Ndinainjipisa anthu na pifuyo pene muna imwe, tenepo iwo anabalana mbainjipa pyakwanga. Ine ndinachitisa anthu kukhazikika muna imwe ninga mukhali ipyo pakutoma pale, pontho ndinachitisa pinthu pyanu kukufambirani mwadidi kupiringana kale. Penepo imwe munapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Ezekiel36:12 Ine ndinachitisa anthu, anthu anga Aisraele kudzaponda matakanu. Iwo anakhazikika muna imwe mbamukhala yawo ene. Imwe nkhabeve dzaachitisa kukhala akusowa ana tayu." 
Ezekiel36:13 “Ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Na thangwi yakuti anthu ambalonga kuna imwe kuti, ‘Imwe mumbavunga anthu mbamuchitisa anthu a m'dziko yawo kukhala akusowa ana,’" 
Ezekiel36:14 natenepo kutomera lero kwenda m'tsogolo imwe nkhabe dzavungave anthu, penu kuchitisa anthu a m'dziko yawo kukhala akusowa ana. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Ezekiel36:15 Ine nkhabe dzakuchitisani pontho kuva kukutikanani kumbachita madzinza anango kule tayu, penu kuva kupha na kukusedegulani kumbachita madzinza anango. Imwe nkhabe dzachitisa anthu a m'dziko yawo kugwa tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu.”" 
Ezekiel36:16 MBUYA adalonga pontho kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel36:17 “Iwe mwana munthu, ndzidzi ukhakhala Aisraele m'dziko mwawo, iwo adaiswipisa na makhaliro awo, pontho na mabasawo. Makhaliro awo akhali okhonda chena pamaso panga ninga mumbachitira mkazi wakumwezi." 
Ezekiel36:18 Natenepo ine ndidakhuthulira ukali wanga pana iwo, thangwi ya kuchuchisa chiropa kudachita iwo m'dzikomo, pontho na thangwi yakuti iwo adaswipisa dzikoyo na mifanikizo ikhapembedza iwo ile." 
Ezekiel36:19 Ine ndidaabalalisira pakati pa madzinza anango, tenepo iwo akhali falanthi m'madziko onsene; ine ndidatonga mseru malingana na makhaliro awo pontho mabasawo." 
Ezekiel36:20 Natenepo konsene kwene kukhaenda iwo pakati pa madzinza anango, iwo adalulupisa dzinanga yakuchena, thangwi anthu akhalonga pya iwo kuti, ‘Awa mbanthu a MBUYA, kwache iwo adakhakhamizwa kubuluka m'dziko mwache.’" 
Ezekiel36:21 Kwache ikhali na ine kumtima ndi dzinanga yakuchena, ile idalulupisa Aisraele pakati pa madzina anango kukhadenda iwo kule." 
Ezekiel36:22 “Natenepo longa kuna dzinza ya Israele kuti MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Ine ndachita penepi nee na thangwi ya imwe dzinza ya Israele tayu, mbwenye na thangwi ya dzinanga yakuchena, ile idalulupisa imwe pakati pa madzina anango kukhadenda imwe kule." 
Ezekiel36:23 Ine ndinaonesa kuchena kwachita dzinanga ikulu, dzina yalulupisa imwe pakati pawo ile. Penepo madzinza anango anapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA, ndingapionesa ndekha ene wakuchena pamaso pa madzinza anango kudzera muna imwepo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Ezekiel36:24 “Ine ndinakubulusani pakati pa madzinza; ndinakugumanyisani kubulukira kumadziko onsene mbandikudzesani kudziko yanu ene. 
Ezekiel36:25 Ine ndinakuwazirani madzi akuchena, tenepo imwe munakhala akuchena; ine ndinakuchenesani kuna pyokhonda chena pyanu pyonsene, pontho kuna mifanikizo yanu yonsene." 
Ezekiel36:26 Ine ndinakupasani mtima utswa mbandiikha muna imwe mzimu wachinchino; ine ndinabulusa muna imwe mtima wamwala mbandikupasani mtima wamnofu. 
Ezekiel36:27 Pontho ndinaikha mzimu wanga muna imwe, pontho ndinakuchitisani kuvera matongero anga pontho kukoya mwambo wanga onsene udakupasani ine ule." 
Ezekiel36:28 Imwe munakhala m'dziko idapasa ine makolo anu ile; imwe munakhala anthu anga, inembo mbandikhala Mulungu wanu." 
Ezekiel36:29 Ine ndinakupulumusani kuna pyakunyansa pyanu pyonsene. Ndinachitisa phoso kukhala dala-dala, towera muleke dzavave njala." 
Ezekiel36:30 Ndinainjipisa nsapo m'miti, pontho mbewu m'mindanu, towera madzinza anango aleke kukululupisani thangwi ya njala." 
Ezekiel36:31 Imwe mungakumbuka makhaliro akuipa na pyakudawika pyachita imwe, penepo munakula msolo, thangwi ya pyakuipa na pyakudawa pyachita imwe pile." 
Ezekiel36:32 Ine ndinafuna kuti imwe Aisraele, mupidziwe kuti ine ndikuchita penepi nee na thangwi ya imwepo tayu. Chitani manyadzo mbamukule msolo thangwi ya makhaliro anu, imwe Aisraele! Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Ezekiel36:33 “Ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Pansiku inafuna ine kukuchenesani kuna pyakudawa pyanu pyonsene, ine ndinakuchitisani kukhazikika m'maluwani mwanu, pontho madembe anati amangwe pontho." 
Ezekiel36:34 Dziko ile idasanduka thando yatchetcha inati ilimwe pontho m'mbuto mwa kukhala kwene thando yatchetcha pamaso pa anthu onsene ambagwanda na mwenemo ale. 
Ezekiel36:35 Iwo analonga kuti, ‘Dziko ile kale ikhali thando yatchetcha, lero yasanduka ninga munda wa Edeni; mizinda ile kale ikhali madembe, yakusakazi, pontho yakuvungwa monsene mwene, lero njakutchingwa na mpanda pontho anthu akukhalamo’." 
Ezekiel36:36 Penepo madzinza akuzungulirani adasalira ale, anapidziwa kuti ine MBUYA ndamanga pontho mizinda yakuvungika ile mbandibzala pontho mbewu m'dziko idasanduka thando yatchetcha ile. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA, tenepo ndinati ndipichitedi." 
Ezekiel36:37 “Ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Ndinati ndichite penepi malingana na kundidembetera kwa dzinza ya Israele: ndinachitisa anthu awo kuinjipa ninga mabira," 
Ezekiel36:38 kuinjipa ninga mkumbi wa mabira akuperekwa nsembe mu Yerusalemu pandzidzi wache wa maphwando akusankhulika. Sasawambo mizinda ile kale ikhali madembe inadzala na mwinji wa anthu. Penepo iwo anapidziwadi kuti ndine MBUYA.” 
Ezekiel37:1 Mphamvu za MBUYA zidandigudumira, tenepo Mzimu wache adandithukula mbandidzesa kuphedi; phediyo ikhali magogodo nadza-nadza." 
Ezekiel37:2 Iye adandifambisa uku na uku pakati pa magogodo ale, tenepo ndidaona magogodo azinji akulu-akulu pansi m'phedi mule, pontho magogodowo akhali kukutu kuuma." 
Ezekiel37:3 Iye adandivunza mbati, “Iwe mwana munthu, ayi magogodowa anakwanisa kukhala na moyo?” Ine ndidatawira kuti, “MBUYA Mulungu, penepyo munapidziwa ndimwepo!”" 
Ezekiel37:4 Tenepo iye adalonga mbati, “Longa mphangwa zauprofeti kuna magogodowa kuti, ‘Imwe magogodo akuuma, veserani mafala a MBUYA!" 
Ezekiel37:5 MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa kuna magogodowa: ndinapepesera muya muna imwe, tenepo munakhala pontho na moyo." 
Ezekiel37:6 Ndinakuphatanizani na uzingo pontho kukupasani mnofu mbandikuphimbirani na khanda; ndinapepesera muya muna imwe, tenepo imwe munakhala na moyo. Penepo imwe munapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA.’ ”" 
Ezekiel37:7 Natenepo ndidalonga mphangwa zauprofeti ninga mudapangirwa ine. Pikhalonga ine mphangwa zauprofeti zile, ndidava ugogobodo-gogobodo, tenepo magogodo ale akhaphatana inango na inzache." 
Ezekiel37:8 Ine ndidayang'ana mbandiona kuti magogodo ale akhali na uzingo mbakukutizwa na mnofu, pontho khanda, kwache akhali nkhabe muya tayu." 
Ezekiel37:9 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Longa mphangwa zauprofeti kuna muya; longa iwe mwana munthu kuti MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Idza iwe muya kubulukira kunkhomo zonsene zinayi za dziko yapansi mbupepesere muna anyakufawa, towera akhale pontho na moyo.”" 
Ezekiel37:10 Natenepo ine ndidalonga mphwangwa zauprofeti ninga mudapangirwa ine, tenepo muya udapita muna magogodo ale; iwo adakhala pontho na moyo mbaimira dzololo, gulu ya anyankhondo azinji ene." 
Ezekiel37:11 Kubuluka penepo MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Iwe mwana munthu, dzinza ya Israele yakhala ninga magogodowa. Iwo ambalonga kuti, ‘Magogodo athu amala uma pontho ife nkhabeve chidikhiro tayu; ife nkhabe tsogolo tayu.’" 
Ezekiel37:12 Natenepo longa mphangwa zauprofeti kuna Aisraele mbuapange kuti ine, MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Imwe anthu anga, ine ndinafukula nthumbi zanu mbandikubulusanimo; ine ndinakudzesani pontho kudziko ya Israele." 
Ezekiel37:13 Penepo imwe anthu anga, munapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA, ine ndingafukula nthumbi zanu mbandikubulusanimo." 
Ezekiel37:14 Ine ndinaikha Mzimu wanga muna imwe, tenepo munakhala pontho na moyo. Ine ndinakuchitisani kukhazikika m'dziko yanu ene. Penepo imwe munapidziwa kuti ndalonga ndine MBUYA, pontho kuti ndapichita ndine pano. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Ezekiel37:15 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel37:16 “Iwe mwana munthu, kwata ndodo mbulembepo mafala akuti, ‘Ya Yuda na Aisraele onsene pabodzi naye.’ Kubuluka penepo kwata ndodo inango mbulembepo mafala akuti, ‘Ya Yosefe (ndodo ya Eferemu) na Aisraele onsene pabodzi naye.’" 
Ezekiel37:17 Phataniza ndodo ziwiri kukhala ndodo ibodzi ene, towera ikhale ndodo ibodzi ene m'manja mwako." 
Ezekiel37:18 Anthu ako angakuvunza kuti, ‘Ayi hunatipanga tayu kuti penepi pikufuna kulonganji?’" 
Ezekiel37:19 Longa kuna iwo kuti, ‘Ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Ine ndinakwata ndodo ya Yosefe na madzinza anango a Aisraele, yaphatira Eferemu ile, mbandiiikha pabodzi na ndodo ya Yuda kuti ikhale ndodo ibodzi ene, tenepo inasanduka ndodo ibodzi ene m'manja mwangamu.’" 
Ezekiel37:20 “Phatira ndodo zalemba iwezi m'manja mwako pamaso pawo," 
Ezekiel37:21 mbulonge kuna iwo kuti, ‘Ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Ine ndinabulusa Aisraele pakati pa madzinza anango kukhadenda iwo kule. Ine ndinaagumanyisa kubulukira kumadziko onsene mbandiadzesa kudziko yawo ene." 
Ezekiel37:22 Ine ndinaachitisa kukhala dzinza ibodzi ene m'dzikomo, pamapiri a Israele. Pakati pawo panakhala mfumu mbodzi ene basi kuatonga, pontho iwo nkhabeve dzakhala madzinza awiri, penu dzakhala pontho maufumu mawiri akugawikana tayu." 
Ezekiel37:23 Iwo nkhabe dzapiswipisave okha ene na mifanikizo yawo, penu pinthu pyawo pyakunyansa pontho na pyakudawa pinango pene tayu, thangwi ine ndinaapulumusa thangwi ya kubwerera kwawo m'nduli mbandiachenesa kuna pyakudawa pyawo; penepo iwo anakhala anthu anga, inembo ndinakhala Mulungu wawo’." 
Ezekiel37:24 “Mfumu ninga nyabasanga Davite ule anakhala mfumu wawo, tenepo onsene anakhala pansi pa makabuswa mbodzi. Iwo anakoya mwambo wanga mbateweza matongero anga mwakukhulupirika." 
Ezekiel37:25 Iwo anakhala m'dziko idapereka ine kuna nyabasanga Yakobo, dziko ikhakhala makolo anu ile. Iwo na anawo pontho pidzukulu pyawo anakhala kweneko kwenda na kwenda, tenepo mfumu ninga nyabasanga Davite anakhala mfumu wawo kwenda na kwenda." 
Ezekiel37:26 Ine ndinachita nawo chiverano cha mtendere; icho chinakhala chiverano cha kwenda na kwenda. Ine ndinaakhazikisa mbandiachitisa kuinjipa, penepo ndinaikha nyumbanga yakuchena pakati pawo kwenda na kwenda;" 
Ezekiel37:27 Mbuto yanga yakukhalako inakhala nawo pakati pawo; ine ndinakhala Mulungu wawo, iwombo anakhala anthu anga." 
Ezekiel37:28 Penepo madzinza anadzipidziwa kuti ine MBUYA ndimbachitisa Israele kukhala wakuchena, ndzidzi unaikha ine mbuto yanga yakuchena pakati pawo kwenda na kwenda.”" 
Ezekiel38:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Ezekiel38:2 “Iwe mwana munthu, longa mwakupokanyisana na Gogi wa m'dziko ya Magogi, mfumu wamkulu wa ku Mesheki na Tubali. Longa mphangwa zauprofeti mwakupokanyisana naye" 
Ezekiel38:3 kuti ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Ine ndina mseru na iwe Gogi, mfumu wamkulu wa ku Mesheki na Tubali." 
Ezekiel38:4 Ine ndinakubulumundisa mbandiikha chimedzo m'malakwi mwako mbandikukwekwetera kunja, pabodzi pene na anyankhondo ako onsene, akavalo ako na anyakuapakirache aphatira pida ale, gulu yonsene ya anyankhondo ache onsene akukhala na pyakugedera matswimo ping'ono na pikulu pene, uku onsene amala phatira matalasadawo." 
Ezekiel38:5 Amuna a ku Peresia, Kushi, na Puti anakhala nawo pabodzi, onsene akukhala na pyakugedera matswimo na pipewu pyankhondo." 
Ezekiel38:6 Gomeri na anyankhondo ache onsene, pontho Beti-Togarima wakumpoto pabodzi pene na anyankhondo ache onsene, madzinza azinji ene ale akhali pabodzi pene na iwe." 
Ezekiel38:7 “Sasanyika; usasanyike iwe pabodzi pene na gulu yako ya anyankhondo ale akuzungulira, pontho uatonge pyakuchita." 
Ezekiel38:8 Pangagwanda nsiku zizinji zene iwe unati uchemerwe kunkhondo. Pyaka pinadzapyo iwe unasosa dziko ile yabuluka kwene pankhondo chinchino, ile anthu ache adagumanyiswa kubulukira kumadzinza azinji mbadzeswa kumapiri a Israele, ale akhadasanduka madembe pyaka pizinji. Iwo akhadadzeswa kubulukira pakati pa madzinza, tenepo onsene chinchino akukhala pakupata." 
Ezekiel38:9 Iwe na anyankhondo ako onsene pabodzi pene madzinza azinji ana iwe ale, anaenda nawe pabodzi kwenda ninga chonzi; iwe unakhala ninga makole akugudumira dziko yonsene." 
Ezekiel38:10 “Ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Pandzidzi wenewo manyerezero anapita muna imwe, tenepo munakhala na manyerezero akuipa." 
Ezekiel38:11 Imwe munalonga kuti, ‘Ine ndinasosa dziko ya maluwani okhonda tchingwa na mpanda; ine ndinasosa dziko yamtendere, pontho ile anthu ache nkhabe famba chewu-chewu tayu, onsene akukhala m'maluwani okhonda tchingwa na mpanda, yakusowa misuwo na mphinga."
