Ezekiel38:12 Ine ndinapokosera na kukwata pinthu pya anthu pontho kusakaza mizinda, ile pakutoma ikhali madembe, mbwenye chinchino ikukhala anthu, ale akhadagumanyiswa kubulukira kuna madzinza anango mbakhala na pifuyo pizinji na pinthu pinango, pontho ale akukhala pamchombo wa dziko yapansi.’" 
Ezekiel38:13 Sheba na Dedani na anyamalonda a ku Tarisisi na midzi yache yonsene anakuvunzani kuti, ‘Ayi imwe mwadzera dzapokosera pinthu pyawo? Ayi imwe mwagumanyisa anyankhondo anu kufuna kusosa, towera mukwate siliva na golidi, pifuyo na pinthu pinango pya anthu, pontho na pyakupokosera pizinji?’" 
Ezekiel38:14 “Natenepo iwe mwana munthu, longa mphangwa zauprofeti kuna Gogi kuti ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Pansiku yeneyo, anthu anga angakhala pakupata, ayi imwe nkhabe dzapidziwa tayu?" 
Ezekiel38:15 Iwe unabulukira kumbuto yako kumpoto kutali, iwe na madzinza azinji ana iwe, onsene apakira akavalo, gulu ikulu ya anyankhondo, pontho anyankhondo amphamvu." 
Ezekiel38:16 Iwe unachita nkhondo na anthu anga Israele ninga makole akugudumira dziko yapansi. Nsiku zinadzazo, iwe Gogi, ndinakuchitisa kumenyana na dziko yanga, towera madzinza andidziwe, ine ndingapionesa kuti ndine nyakuchena pamaso pawo kudzera muna imwe." 
Ezekiel38:17 “Ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Ayi munthu wache si iwe tayu akhalonga ine pakutoma pale, kudzera muna anyabasanga, maprofeti a Israele? Pandzidzi wenewo iwo adalonga mphangwa zauprofeti pyaka pizinji pene kuti ine ndinati ndikuchitise kusosa anthu anga." 
Ezekiel38:18 Ipi ndiye pinafuna dzachitika pansiku yeneyo: Gogi angasosa dziko ya Israele, ukali wanga unalamuka. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Ezekiel38:19 Na phinga yanga pontho ukali wanga ine ndikulonga kuti pansiku yeneyo panakhala chiteke-teke chakugoswa m'dziko ya Israele. 
Ezekiel38:20 Nsomba na mbalame zonsene, pirombo pya m'tsanga na nyama zonsene zimbafamba padziko yapansi zile, pontho anthu onsene a padziko yapansi anatetemera na mantha pamaso panga. Mapiri anagwa, matelero onsene anamwalazwa, pontho fufu yonsene inagomoka." 
Ezekiel38:21 Ndinachemeresa talasada kuti ivunge Gogi pamapiri anga onsene. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu. Talasada ya munthu onsene inakhamwadza mwanzache. 
Ezekiel38:22 Ine ndinamtchunyusa na muliri pontho nkhondo; ndinavumbisa mvula yakugoswa, matalala pontho na moto wakugaka na miyala ya moto ya sulufule pana iye, anyankhondo ache, pontho na madzinza onsene azinji ali kukhundu kwache ale." 
Ezekiel38:23 Na njira yeneyi ndinaonesa madzinza onsene ukulu wanga pontho kuchena kwanga. Penepo iwo anapidziwadi kuti ine ndine MBUYA. 
Ezekiel39:1 “Iwe mwana munthu, longa mphangwa zauprofeti kupokanyisana na Gogi. Umpange kuti ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Ine ndina mseru na iwe Gogi, mfumu wamkulu wa ku Mesheki na Tubali." 
Ezekiel39:2 Ine ndinakubulumundisa mbandikukwekweta uku na uku. Ndinakudzesa kubulukira kutali kumpoto mbandikutumiza kapokanyisana na anthu akukhala pamapiri a Israele. 
Ezekiel39:3 Penepo ndinatchola utako kubulukira kumkono wako wamabzere, mbandichitisa matswimo ako kudoda kumkono wako wamadyo." 
Ezekiel39:4 Penepo pamapiri a Israele iwe unagwa, iwe pabodzi pene na anyankhondo ako, pontho na madzinza azinji ali kukhundu kwako ale. Ine ndinakusandusa phoso ya malezi na nyama zam'tsanga." 
Ezekiel39:5 Iwe unagwera pakwecha kutsanga, thangwi ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Ezekiel39:6 Ine ndinagasa moto pana Magogi pabodzi pene na anyamgombe, onsene ambakhala pakupata ale, penepo iwo anapidziwadi kuti ine ndine MBUYA." 
Ezekiel39:7 “Ine ndinachitisa dzinanga yakuchena kudziwika pakati pa Aisraele. Ine nkhabe dzayang'ana kwene tayu kuti dzinanga yakuchena ilulupiswe. Penepo madzinza anapidziwa kuti ine MBUYA ndine Nyakuchena wa Israele. 
Ezekiel39:8 Ikudza! Ande pinati pichitike. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu. Yeneyi ndi nsiku yalonga ine ile. 
Ezekiel39:9 “Penepo anthu ale ambakhala m'maluwani a Israele anabuluka kwenda mbaphatisa basa pida pyankhondo ninga nkhuni mbapipisa, pyakugedera matswimo ping'ono na pikulu pene, mauta na matswimo, pigomba pyankhondo na madipa. Pyaka pinomwe ipyo pinaphatiswa basa ninga nkhuni." 
Ezekiel39:10 Iwo nkhabe dzafunikave kusaka nkhuni kubulukira kuminda penu kutema miti mumsitu tayu, thangwi iwo anaphatisa basa pida ninga nkhuni. Iwo anapokosera pinthu pya anthu adaapokoserambo pinthu pyawo ale. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Ezekiel39:11 “Pansiku yeneyo ndinapereka masiye kuna Gogi mu Israele, m'phedi ya anyaulendo kumabulukiro dzuwa kwa bara. Iyo inatchinga njira ya anyaulendo, thangwi Gogi na gulu yache ya anyankhondo anaikhwa m'masiye kweneko. Tenepo mbutoyo inachemerwa Phedi ya Hamoni-Gogi." 
Ezekiel39:12 “Miyezi minomwe dzinza ya Israele anaikha m'masiye mitembo ya anthu enewa, towera achenese dzikoyo." 
Ezekiel39:13 Anthu onsene m'dzikomo anaphedzana kuaikha m'masiye, tenepo pansiku inafuna ine dzatambira demelero inakhala nsiku ile kuna iwo nkhabe dzaduwalika tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Ezekiel39:14 Anthu anango analembwa basa, towera achenese dzikoyo. Anango anazungulira m'dzikomo, pontho kuthimizira penepo, anango anaikha m'masiye anthu ale anafuna dzasalira m'dzikoyo. Pakumala kwa miyezi minomweyi, iwo anatoma basa yakusakanyula-sakanyula." 
Ezekiel39:15 Ndzidzi onsene unafamba-famba iwo m'dzikomo, tenepo mbodzi wa iwo mbaona gogodo ya munthu, iye anaikhapo chidzindikiro mpakana anyakukumba masiye aifikhire m'mphedi ya Hamoni-Gogi." 
Ezekiel39:16 (Panakhala pontho luwani yakuchemerwa Hamona.) Natenepo iwo anachenesa dzikoyo.” 
Ezekiel39:17 MBUYA Mulungu adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Iwe mwana munthu, chemeresa mbalame na nyama zam'tsanga zene mbulonge kuti, ‘Gumanyikanani kubulukira konsene kwene kunakhala imwe mbamudze kuna phwando ya nsembe inakusasanyirani ine ile, nsembe ikulu pamapiri a Israele. Kweneko iwo anadya nyama na kumwa chiropa." 
Ezekiel39:18 Imwe munadya manungo a anyankhondo amphamvu mbamusuta chiropa cha ana mafumu apadziko yapansi khala ninga akudya mabira amuna, anabira, mbuzi na ng'ombe zimuna, zonsenezo nyama zakunenepa zakubulukira ku Bashani." 
Ezekiel39:19 Paphwando ya nsembe inakusasanyirani ine ile, imwe munadya mpakana kukhuta, pontho kumwa chiropa mpakana muledzere." 
Ezekiel39:20 Pathebulu panga imwe munadya mbamukhuta chonsene chinafuna iwo pa akavalo na anyakuapakirache, anyankhondo a mphamvu pontho na anyankhondo a mtundu onsene.’ Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu.”" 
Ezekiel39:21 MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Ine ndinati ndionese demelero yanga pakati pa madzinza, tenepo madzinza anaona kuatchunyusa kunafuna ine dzaachita na mkono wanga." 
Ezekiel39:22 Kutomera penepo kwenda m'tsogolo dzinza ya Israele anapidziwa kuti ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wawo. 
Ezekiel39:23 Pontho madzinza anango anapidziwa kuti dzinza ya Israele idenda kudziko ya unyaperezo thangwi ya pyakudawa pyawo, thangwi iwo akhali okhonda khulupirika kuna ine. Natenepo ine ndidabisa nkhope yanga mbandiatawirisa anyamalwawo kuakunda, tenepo iwo adafa pankhondo." 
Ezekiel39:24 Ine ndidachita kuna iwo malingana na kukhonda chena kwawo, pontho na umambalawo, tenepo ine ndidaabisira nkhope yanga." 
Ezekiel39:25 “Natenepo ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Ine ndinamdzesa Yakobo kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo, pontho ndinavera nsisi dzinza ya Israele mbandikhala na chipapu na dzinanga yakuchena." 
Ezekiel39:26 Iwo anaduwalira manyadzo akhali na iwo ale, pontho kukhonda khulupirika kwawo konsene kuna ine iwo angakhala pakupata m'dziko mwawo mbapakhonda khala na mbodzi ene wakuathuswa." 
Ezekiel39:27 Ine ndingaabweza kubulukira pakati pa madzinza anango, pontho kuagumanyisa kubulukira kumadziko a anyamalwawo, ine ndinapionesa ndekha ene kuna madzinza azinji kuti ndine nyakuchena kudzera muna iwo." 
Ezekiel39:28 Penepo iwo anapidziwadi kuti ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wawo, podi kwene kuti ine ndidaaendesa kudziko ya unyaperezo pakati pa madzinza. Ine ndinaagumanyisa kuabwezera kudziko yawo ene mbandikhonda kusiya m'nduli munthu na mbodzi ene." 
Ezekiel39:29 Ine nkhabe dzaabisirave nkhope yanga tayu, thangwi ndinakhuthulira Mzimu wanga pana dzinza ya Israele. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu.”" 
Ezekiel40:1 Chaka chamakumawiri na chishanu pikhali ife pa unyaperezo, kutoma kwa chaka, pansiku yachikhumi ya mwezi, chaka chakhumi na pinayi pidakundwa Yerusalemu, pansiku yonthoyo mphamvu za MBUYA zidandigudumira, tenepo iye andandithukula kwenda nane ku Yerusalemu." 
Ezekiel40:2 Kumasomphenya Mulungu adandithukula kwenda nane kudziko ya Israele mbandiimirisa paphiri yakulapha, ile kumwera kwache kukhali nyumba zakuoneka ninga mzinda." 
Ezekiel40:3 Iye adandiendesa kweneko, tenepo ndidaonako munthu ule makhaliro ache akhaoneka ninga nkuwa; iye akhaimira pamsuwo wa mpanda uku m'manja mwache aphatira nkhambala yakuchena pontho na mdida wa ndodo." 
Ezekiel40:4 Munthu ule adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Iwe mwana munthu, yang'ana na maso ako mbuvesere na makutu ako pontho ikha mtima kuna pinthu pyonsene pinafuna ine kukuonesa; ndi thangwi yache iwe wadzeswa kuno. Iwe wathema kupanga dzinza ya Israele pyonsene pinaona iwe.”" 
Ezekiel40:5 Ine ndidaona mpanda wazungulira Nyumba ya Mulungu monsene mwene. Kulapha kwa mdida wa ndodo idaphatira munthu ile kukhali makhono matatu. Iye adapima mpanda ule; ntchindu yache ikhali ulaphi wa mdida ule, pontho chengo chache chikhali ulaphi wa mdida ule." 
Ezekiel40:6 Tenepo munthu ule adenda kumsuwo wakumabulukiro dzuwa. Iye adakwira nsikada mbapima mafufu a msuwowo; ntchindu yache ikhali ulaphi wa mdida ule. 
Ezekiel40:7 M'bwalomo kukhundu yonsene kukhali masubi matatu a anyakulondali, kada subi ulaphiache ukhali kulapha kwa mdida ule, pontho umimbache ukhali kulapha kwa mdida ule. Mafufu akugawa masubi a anyakulondali ntchindu yache ikhali makhono mawiri na kati ya khono. Kupiringana masubiwo kukhali msuwo unango wakupitira m'subi yakuyang'ana chintalo cha Nyumba ya Mulungu, ntchindu ya mafufu a msuwo wenewu ukhali kulapha kwa mdida ule." 
Ezekiel40:8 Kubuluka penepo iye adapima subi yeneyi, ulaphiache ukhali makhono manayi. Tenepo iye adapima msuwo wakupitira muchintalo cha Nyumba ya Mulungu, pontho ntchindu ya mafufu a msuwo wenewu ukhali khono ibodzi." 
Ezekiel40:9  
Ezekiel40:10 M'bwalo mwa msuwo wakumabulukiro dzuwa mukhali masubi a anyakulondali kukhundu yonsene, pontho ulaphiache akhali sasawa. Mafufu onsene akugawa masubiwo, ntchindu yache akhali sasawa." 
Ezekiel40:11 Tenepo iye adapima umimba wa msuwo ule; msuwowo ukhali makhono mashanu, pontho umimba wa subi yakupitira muchintalo ikhali makhono matanthatu na kati ya khono." 
Ezekiel40:12 Kutsogolo kwa masubi a anyakulondali onsene kukhali fufu ile chengo chache pontho umimbache pikhali kati ya khono, pontho masubi a anyakulondali akhali sasawa makhono matatu kukhundu zonsene." 
Ezekiel40:13 Kubuluka penepo iye adapima umimbache msuwo wakumabulukiro dzuwa. Kubulukira pa fufu yakunduli ya subi ya anyakulondali ibodzi ile mpakana kufufu yakunduli kwa subi inango yakuyang'anisana ile, umimbache ukhali makhono khumi na awiri na kati ya khono." 
Ezekiel40:14 Iye adapima subi yakuyang'ana chintalo, umimbache ukhali makhono khumi." 
Ezekiel40:15 Kubuluka pa fufu ya pamsuwo wa mpanda kunkhomo kwa subi yakuyang'ana chintalo, ulaphiache ukhali makhono makumawiri na mashanu." 
Ezekiel40:16 Mafufu akunja a masubi a anyakulondali, pontho mafufu akugawa masubi a anyakulondali akhali na mazhanera. Mafufu a subi yakuyang'ana chintalo ikhali pontho na mazhanera. Pamafufu a m'bwalomo padathemeserwa na pithunzi-thunzi pya miti yamdikhwa." 
Ezekiel40:17 Kubuluka penepo munthu ule adandipitisa muchintalo chakunja. Kweneko ndidaona masubi makumatatu m'khundu-khundu mwa chintalo. Kunkhope kwa masubi enewa pakhali njira yakuphophwa na miyala ponsene pene," 
Ezekiel40:18 pontho ikhapita na m'khundu-khundu mwa misuwo ile, mwakuti umimbache ukhali wakulingana na kulapha kwa misuwoyo. Chintalo chakunjachi chikhali m'tchinde mwa chintalo cham'bwalo." 
Ezekiel40:19 Tenepo iye adapima chintalo chakunja; kubulukira pa msuwo wakupitira muchintalo chakunja mpakana kumsuwo wakupitira muchintalo cham'bwalo, ulaphiache ukhali makhono makumashanu." 
Ezekiel40:20 Kubuluka penepo iye adapima ulaphi na umimba wa msuwo wakuyang'ana kumpoto wakupitira muchintalo chakunja. 
Ezekiel40:21 Masubi a anyakulondali ache, atatu kukhundu yonsene, mafufu akugawa masubi a anyakulondali na subi yakuyang'ana chintalo, kukula kwache kukhali sasawa na kukula kwa msuwo wakumabulukiro dzuwa ule. Ulaphiache ukhali makhono makumawiri na ashanu, pontho umimbache ukhali makhono khumi na awiri na kati ya khono." 
Ezekiel40:22 Mazhanerache, subi yache yakuyang'ana chintalo, na pyakuthemesera pya miti yamdikhwa, pyonsene pikhali sasawa na pya pamsuwo wakumabulukiro dzuwa. Pamsuwo pakhali nsikada zinomwe, pontho zikhayang'anisana na subi yakuyang'ana chintalo." 
Ezekiel40:23 Kuyang'anisana na msuwo wakumpoto pakhali msuwo wakupitira muchintalo cham'bwalo, ninga montho mukhali ipyo na msuwo wakumabulukiro dzuwa. Iye adapima kubulukira pa msuwo ubodzi mpakana kumsuwo unango wakuyang'anisana nawo; ulaphiache ukhali makhono makumashanu." 
Ezekiel40:24 Kubuluka penepo munthu ule adenda nane kukhundu yakumwera, tenepo kweneko ndidaona msuwo wakuyang'ana kumwera. Iye adapima mafufu ache na subi yache yakuyang'ana chintalo, tenepo ipyo pikhali sasawa na pinango pile." 
Ezekiel40:25 Msuwo wenewu na subi yache yakuyang'ana chintalo ikhali na mazhanera ponsene pene, sasawa na mazhanera a m'misuwo inango ile. Ulaphiache ukhali makhono makumawiri na mashanu, umimbache mbukhala makhono khumi na mawiri na kati ya khono." 
Ezekiel40:26 Pamsuwo pakhali nsikada zinomwe, pontho zikhayang'anisana na subi yakuyang'ana chintalo; pamafufu a m'bwalomo padathemeserwa na pithunzi-thunzi pya miti yamdikhwa kukhundu yonsene." 
Ezekiel40:27 Chintalo cham'bwalo chikhalimbo na msuwo wakuyang'ana kumwera, tenepo iye adapima kubulukira pa msuwo wenewu mpakana kumsuwo unango wakunja kukhundu yakumwera. Ulaphiache ukhali makhono makumashanu." 
Ezekiel40:28 Kubuluka penepo munthu ule adandipitisa muchintalo cham'bwalo kupita na msuwo wakumwera. Iye adapima msuwo wakumwera; ulaphiache na umimbache pikhali sasawa na misuwo inango yonsene ile. 
Ezekiel40:29 Masubi a anyakulondali ache, mafufu akugawa musubi a anyakulondali na subi yakuyang'ana chintalo, kukula kwache kukhali sasawa na kukula kwa misuwo inango ile. Mafufu a masubi ache akhali na mazhanera ponsene pene. Ulaphiache ukhali makhono makumawiri na ashanu, pontho umimbache ukhali makhono khumi na awiri na kati ya khono." 
Ezekiel40:30 Kumisuwo yakupitira muchintalo cham'bwalo kuzungulira ponsene pene kukhali masubi. Masubi onsenewo ulaphiache ukhali makhono khumi na awiri na kati ya khono, pontho umimbache ukhali makhono mawiri na kati ya khono." 
Ezekiel40:31 Subi yache idayang'ana chintalo chakunja; pamafufu a m'bwalo padathemeserwa na pithunzi-thunzi pya miti yamdikhwa, pontho pamsuwo wenewu pakhali nsikada zisere." 
Ezekiel40:32 Kubuluka penepo munthu ule adandipitisa muchintalo cham'bwalo kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa, tenepo iye adapima subi ya kumsuwo; ulaphiache na umimbache ukhali sasawa na inango ile." 
Ezekiel40:33 Masubi ache a anyakulondali, mafufu akugawa masubi a anyakulondali na subi yakuyang'ana chintalo, kukula kwache kukhali sasawa na kukula kwa misuwo inango ile. Mafufu a masubi ache akhali na mazhanera ponsene pene. Ulaphiache ukhali makhono makumawiri na ashanu, pontho umimbache ukhali makhono khumi na awiri na kati ya khono." 
Ezekiel40:34 Subi yache idayang'ana chintalo chakunja; pamafufu a m'bwalomo padathemeserwa na pithunzi-thunzi pya miti yamdikhwa, pontho pamsuwo wenewu pakhali nsikada zisere." 
Ezekiel40:35 Kubuluka penepo adenda nane kumsuwo wakumpoto mbaupima. Ulaphiache na umimbache pikhali sasawa na inango ile," 
Ezekiel40:36 ningambo masubi ache a anyakulondali, mafufu akugawa masubi a anyakulondali na subi yakuyang'ana chintalo. Mafufu a masubi ache akhali na mazhanera ponsene pene. Ulaphiache ukhali makhono makumawiri na ashanu, pontho umimbache ukhali makhono khumi na awiri na kati ya khono." 
Ezekiel40:37 Subi yache idayang'ana kuchintalo chakunja; pamafufu a m'bwalomo padathemeserwa na pithunzi-thunzi pya miti yamdikhwa kukhundu zonsene, pontho pamsuwo wenewu pakhali nsikada zisere." 
Ezekiel40:38 Pamsuwo wakumpoto pakhali subi inango, kule kukhatsukirwa nsembe zakupyerera. Subi yeneyi ikhali na msuwo wakupitira m'subi yakuyang'ana chintalo chakunja," 
Ezekiel40:39 M'subi yeneyi mukhali mathebulu awiri kukhundu zonsene, pale pakhachekerwa nsembe zakupyerera, nsembe zakulekerera nazo pyakudawa pontho nsembe zakupagalira nayo pyakudawa." 
Ezekiel40:40 Kunja m'khundu-khundu mwa fufu ya subi yakuyang'ana chintalo, chifupi na nsikada za pamsuwo wakumpoto pakhali mathebulu awiri, pontho kukhundu inango ya nsikada zile kukhali pontho mathebulu anango awiri." 
Ezekiel40:41 Natenepo pakhali mathebulu anayi kukhundu ibodzi ya msuwo pontho mathebulu anayi kukhundu inango ya msuwo, pabodzi pene akhalipo mathebulu masere, pale pakhachekerwa nsembe zakupyerera." 
Ezekiel40:42 Pakhali pontho mathebulu anayi a miyala yakusema akuperekerapo nsembe zakupyerera. Thebulu yonsene ulaphiache ukhali khono ibodzi, umimbache mbukhala kati ya khono, pontho chengo chache ikhafika ntchafu. Pathebulopo pakhali piphano pyakuchekera nsembe zakupyerera na nsembe zinango." 
Ezekiel40:43 Pontho pyakujobolera nyama pyakulapha ninga dzanja pyakukhala na ngoloweko pidamanikwa m'mafufu ponsene pene. Mathebulu ale akhali akuikhapo nyama za nsembe. 
Ezekiel40:44 Tenepo iye adandipitisa muchintalo cham'bwalo, mule mukhali masubi mawiri. Subi ibodzi ikhali kukhundu ya msuwo wakumpoto kuyang'ana kumwera, pontho subi inangoyo ikhali kukhundu ya msuwo wakumwera kuyang'ana kumpoto." 
Ezekiel40:45 Tenepo iye adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Subi yayang'ana kumwerayi nja anyansembe, ale ambayang'anira Nyumba ya Mulungu," 
Ezekiel40:46 subimbo yayang'ana kumpotoyi nja anyansembe, ale ambayang'anira guwa yansembe. Enewa mbana Zadoki, pontho mbale ene basi anakwanisa kufika chifupi na MBUYA mbatumikira pamaso pache.”" 
Ezekiel40:47 Kubuluka penepo munthu ule adapima chintalo. Ulaphiache na umimbache pikhali sasawa, mathanyo makumashanu khundu zonsene. Guwa yansembe ikhali kunkhope kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
Ezekiel40:48 Kubuluka penepo iye adandipitisa m'subi yakupitira m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, pontho iye adapima msuwo; umimbache ukhali makhono anomwe, pontho ulaphiache ukhali makhono mawiri na kati ya khono kukhundu yonsene. Mafufu a pamsuwo, ntchindu yache ikhali khono ibodzi na kati ya khono kukhundu yonsene." 
Ezekiel40:49 Subi yakupitira m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, umimbache ukhali makhono khumi, pontho ulaphiache kubulukira kunkhope kwenda kunduli ukhali makhono matanthatu. Penepo pakhali nsikada, pontho mizati miwiri kukhundu yonsene ya mafufu a pamsuwo." 
Ezekiel41:1 Kubuluka penepo munthu ule adandidzesa kusubi yakuchena ya Nyumba ya Mulungu. Iye adapima mafufu a pamsuwo wache, ntchindu yache ikhali makhono matatu kukhundu yonsene." 
Ezekiel41:2 Msuwo, umimbache ukhali makhono ashanu, pontho ulaphiache ukhali makhono mawiri na kati ya khono. Iye adapima pontho subi yakuchena, ulaphiache ukhali makhono makumawiri, pontho umimbache ukhali makhono khumi." 
Ezekiel41:3 Kubuluka penepo adapita m'subi yam'bwaloletu. Iye adapima mafufu a pamsuwo; ntchindu yache ikhali khono ibodzi. Msuwo umimbache ukhali makhono matatu, pontho ulaphiache ukhali makhono matatu na kati ya khono." 
Ezekiel41:4 Kubuluka penepo iye adapima pontho subi yam'bwaloletuyo; ulaphiache na umimbache ukhali makhono khumi sasawa makhundu onsene. Tenepo iye adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Yeneyi ndi Mbuto Yakuchenesesa.”" 
Ezekiel41:5 Kubuluka penepo iye adapima mafufu a Nyumba ya Mulungu; ntchindu yache ikhali makhono matatu, pontho subi yonsene yakutsamira Nyumba ya Mulungu kukhundu zonsene, umimbache ukhali makhono mawiri." 
Ezekiel41:6 Masubi enewa akhali m'nyumba zitatu zakusanjikizana, ibodzi padzulu pa inzache, yonsene mbikhala na masubi makumatatu. Kunja kwa mafufu a Nyumba ya Mulungu adamangwa ninga nsikada zikulu zitatu mwakuti mitandache ya nyumba zitatu zakusanjikizana zile zidatsamira pansikadazo, towera ileke pita m'mafufu a Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
Ezekiel41:7 Natenepo masubi onsene akunja kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu akhali akubulukira kunja, ale adamangwa mwakutumulirwa kubulukira pansi mpakana padzulu kutewezana na pyakutchinjikira masubi pile. Pakhali nsikada kubulukira nyumba zapansiletu mpakana nyumba zapadzululetu kupita na m'masubi a nyumba zapakati." 
Ezekiel41:8 Ndidaona kuti kuzungulira Nyumba ya Mulungu pakhali thako yakukwira m'dzulu mbakhala maziko a masubi akutsamira Nyumba ale. Chengo chache chikhali kulapha kwa mdida ule, makhono matatu." 
Ezekiel41:9 Mafufu akunja a masubi akutsamira Nyumba ale, ntchindu yache ikhali makhono mawiri na kati ya khono. Chintalo cha pakati pa mafufu akutsamira Nyumba ya Mulungu ale," 
Ezekiel41:10 pontho na masubi a anyansembe, umimba akhali makhono khumi kuzungulira Nyumba ya Mulungu ile." 
Ezekiel41:11 Pakhali misuwo yakupitira m'masubi akutsamira Nyumba ale kubulukira pa chintalo, msuwo ubodzi kumpoto, unangombo kumwera; umimba wa chiguwa chakubulukira kumasubi ale kwenda kuchintalo ukhali makhono mawiri na kati ya khono." 
Ezekiel41:12 Nyumba inango ile idayang'ana chintalo cha Nyumba ya Mulungu kumabulukiro dzuwa, umimbache ukhali makhono makumatatu na ashanu. Ntchindu ya mafufu ache ikhali makhono mawiri na kati ya khono, pontho ulaphiache ukhali makhono makumanayi na ashanu." 
Ezekiel41:13 Kubuluka penepo munthu ule adapima kunja kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu mbagumana kuti ulaphiache ukhali makhono mashanu. Chintalo cha Nyumba ile na mafufu ache ene adakwana pontho makhono makumashanu. 
Ezekiel41:14 Kumsuwo kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu kumabulukiro dzuwa kuthimizapo chintalo kukhundu zonsene ziwiri chile kudakwana pontho makhono makumashanu. 
Ezekiel41:15 Kubuluka penepo iye adapima pontho ulaphi wa nyumba yakuyang'anisana na chintalo kunduli kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu kumadokero dzuwa, kuthimizapo njira zakupitira m'masubi a m'bwalo kukhundu zonsene; iyo ikhali makhono makumashanu. Subi yakupitira m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, Mbuto Yakuchena, pontho Mbuto Yakuchenesesa," 
Ezekiel41:16 mafufu ache onsene kutomera pansi mpakana m'mazhanera adaphophwa na matabwa. Mazhanera adafungwa na matabwa. 
Ezekiel41:17 Mafufu onsene a m'bwalo mwa Nyumba ya Mulungu mpakana padzulu pa misuwo ponsene pene 
Ezekiel41:18 padathemeserwa na pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido pontho na miti yamdikhwa. Chakulengwa chakukhala na maphaphido chonsene chidapakizana na muti wamdikhwa. Chakulengwa chonsene chikhali na nkhope ziwiri," 
Ezekiel41:19 nkhope ya munthu kuyang'ana mdikhwa khundu ibodzi, pontho nkhope ya nkhalamu kuyang'ana mdikhwa khundu inango. Ipyo pidaikhwa tenepo kuzungulira Nyumba ya Mulungu yonsene." 
Ezekiel41:20 Kubulukira pansi mpakana padzulu pa msuwo pakhali pithunzi-thunzi pyakuchita kusemwa pya pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido na miti yamdikhwa. 
Ezekiel41:21 Msuwo wakupitira Mbuto Yakuchena mafufu ache akhali na nkhomo zinayi zakulingana, pontho msuwo wakupitira Mbuto Yakuchenesesa ukhali sasawa." 
Ezekiel41:22 Pakhali guwa yansembe yakusasanywa na matabwa; chengo chache chikhali khono na kati ya khono, ulaphiache na umimbache ukhali sasawa, khono ibodzi khundu zonsene. Nkhomo zache zinayi, thako yache, na m'khundu mwache, pyonsene pikhali pya matabwa. Munthu ule adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Yeneyi ndi thebulu ile imbakhala pamaso pa MBUYA.”" 
Ezekiel41:23 Mbuto Yakuchena, sasawambo na Mbuto Yakuchenesesa, ikhali na msuwo wakukhala na misuwo miwiri yakufungira." 
Ezekiel41:24 Msuwo onsene ukhali na mwakufunya muwiri. 
Ezekiel41:25 Misuwo yonsene idathemeserwa na pyakulengwa pyakukhala na maphaphido na miti yamdikhwa pyakuchita kusemwa ningambo pidaikhwa m'mafufu pile. Padzulu pa msuwo wa subi yakupitira m'Nyumba ya Mulungu pakhali chipewu cha matabwa. 
Ezekiel41:26 Subi yakupitira m'Nyumba ya Mulungu ikhali na mazhanera ang'ono-ang'ono, pontho mafufu ache kukhundu zonsene ziwiri adathemeserwa na miti yamdikhwa yakuchita kusemwa." 
Ezekiel42:1 Kubuluka penepo munthu ule adenda nane kukhundu yakumpoto muchintalo chakunja mbapita nane m'masubi akuyang'anisana na chintalo cha Nyumba ya Mulungu, pontho kuyang'anisana na fufu yakunja kukhundu yakumpoto." 
Ezekiel42:2 Nyumba ile msuwo wache udayang'ana kumpoto ulaphiache ukhali makhono makumashanu, pontho umimbache ukhali makhono makumawiri na ashanu." 
Ezekiel42:3 Khundu ibodzi idayang'ana kuchintalo cham'bwalo ile kukula kwache kukhali makhono khumi, pontho khundu inango idayang'ana kunjira yamiyala ya chintalo chakunja. Nyumba yeneyi idamangwa mwakusanjikizana katatu." 
Ezekiel42:4 Kutsogolo kwa masubi a nyumbayi kukhali njira ile umimbache ukhali makhono mashanu, pontho ulaphiache ukhali makhono makumashanu. Misuwo ya masubi ache ikhali kukhundu yakumpoto." 
Ezekiel42:5 Masubi a nyumba yapadzululetu ile akhali ang'ono-ang'ono, thangwi njirache idakunda mbuto izinji ene kusiyana na njira za panyumba yapakati na yapansiletu." 
Ezekiel42:6 Masubi a nyumba yapadzululetu akhali nkhabe mizati, ninga mukhali ipyo na pintalo; tenepo masubi apadzululetu akhali ang'ono kusiyana na apansiletu na apakati." 
Ezekiel42:7 Pakhali fufu yakunja kwa masubi yapansiletu ile ikhatewezana na masubi ile ulaphiache ukhali makhono makumawiri na ashanu, pontho idayang'anisana na chintalo chakunja." 
Ezekiel42:8 Masubi akuyang'ana chintalo chakunja, ulaphiache ukhali makhono makumawiri na mashanu, pontho masubi akuyang'ana Nyumba ya Mulungu, ulaphiache ukhali makhono makumashanu." 
Ezekiel42:9 Masubi a nyumba yapansiletu akhali na msuwo kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa ngakhala munthu anapita mwenemo na muchintalo chakunja. 
Ezekiel42:10 Kukhundu yakumwera m'khundu-khundu mwa fufu ya chintalo chakunja, pontho kuyang'anisana na fufu yakunja kukhali masubi anango" 
Ezekiel42:11 akukhala na njira kunkhope kwache. Iwo akhali ningambo masubi akukhundu yakumpoto; ulaphiache na umimbache ukhali sasawa. Misuwo yache na kukula kwache pikhali sasawa. Ninga misuwo ya kukhundu yakumpoto 
Ezekiel42:12 ndi sasawambo na misuwo ile ikhali m'masubi a kukhundu yakumwera. Kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa kwa njira na fufu yache yakunja kukhali msuwo, ule ukhaphatisa anthu basa kupita nawo m'masubi." 
Ezekiel42:13 Tenepo munthu ule adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Masubi akumpoto na akumwera akuyang'ana chintalo cha Nyumba ya Mulungu ale, nganyansembe, mule munafuna dzadyera anyansembe, ambafika chifupi na MBUYA ale, nsembe zakupambulikaletu. M'masubi enewa iwo anaikhamo nsembe zakupambulikaletu, pyakupereka pya mapira, nsembe zakulekerera pyakudawa na nsembe zakupagalira pyakudawa, thangwi mbutoyo njakuchena." 
Ezekiel42:14 Anyansembe angapita kwene m'mbuto zakuchenazo, iwo mbaleke bulukamo kwenda mbakapita muchintalo chakunja mpakana adule nguwo zidavala iwo ndzidzi ukhatumikira iwo pamaso pa MBUYA ule, thangwi nguwozo nsakuchena. Iwo athema kuvala nguwo zinango mbadzati fika kumbuto zimbakhala anthu zile.”" 
Ezekiel42:15 Pidamalisa iye kupima pyonsene pya m'bwalo mwa Nyumba ya Mulungu ile, munthu ule adabuluka nane kunja na pamsuwo wa kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa. Penepo iye adapima mbuto yonsene yakuzungulira Nyumba ya Mulungu:" 
Ezekiel42:16 Iye adapima khundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa na mdida; ulaphiache ukhali makhono madzana mawiri na makumashanu. 
Ezekiel42:17 Kubuluka penepo adapima khundu yakumpoto na mdida; ulaphiache ukhali makhono madzana mawiri na makumashanu. 
Ezekiel42:18 Tenepo iye adapima khundu yakumwera na mdidache; ulaphiache ukhali makhono madzana mawiri na makumashanu. 
Ezekiel42:19 Kubuluka penepo iye adazungunuka mbapima khundu yakumadokero dzuwa; ulaphiache ukhali makhono madzana mawiri na ashanu. 
Ezekiel42:20 Natenepo adapima khundu zonsene zinayi zakuzungulira Nyumba ya Mulungu. Pakhali mpanda kuzungulira chintalo chonsenecho, ulaphiache ukhali makhono madzana mawiri na makumashanu, pontho umimbache ukhali makhono madzana mawiri na makumashanu. Mpandawo ukhalekanisa pinthu pyakuchena na pinthu pene pyapyo." 
Ezekiel43:1 Kubuluka penepo munthu ule adenda nane kumsuwo wakuyang'ana kumabulukiro dzuwa. 
Ezekiel43:2 Kweneko ndidaonako demelero ya Mulungu wa Israele ikubulukira kumabulukiro dzuwa. Falache ikhaveka ninga kutitima kwa madzi, pontho dziko yapansi idayetimira na kuchena kwa demelero yache." 
Ezekiel43:3 Masomphenya adaona inewa ndi sasawa na masomphenya adaona ine ndzidzi udadza MBUYA dzavunga Yerusalemu. Pikhali pontho ninga masomphenya adaona ine m'khundu-khundu mwa kumkulo wa Kebari ale. Natenepo ine ndidapigwisa na fufumimba. 
Ezekiel43:4 Demelero ya MBUYA idapita m'Nyumba ya Mulungu na pamsuwo wa kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa. 
Ezekiel43:5 Penepo Mzimu wa MBUYA adandithukula mbandipitisa muchintalo cham'bwalo. Tenepo demelero ya MBUYA idadzaza m'Nyumba mwachemo. 
Ezekiel43:6 Pikhaimira munthu ule chifupi na ine, ndidava unango akulonga kuna ine kubulukira m'Nyumba ya Mulungu ile." 
Ezekiel43:7 Iye adalonga mbati, “Iwe mwana munthu, yeneyi ndi mbuto yakukhalamo mpando wanga wachifumu, pontho mbuto yakusanjikirapo manyalo anga. Kuno ndiye kunafuna ine dzakhala pakati pa anthu anga Aisraele kwenda na kwenda. Dzinza ya Israele nkhabeve dzalulupisa dzinanga yakuchena tayu, nee iwo penu mafumu awo, na uputa umbachita iwo ule, pontho na mifanikizo yakufa ile imbapembedza mafumu awo pambuto zawo zachipembedzo." 
Ezekiel43:8 Iwo akhamanga nyumba zawo zachifumu chifupi na Nyumbanga, madire ache mbakhala fufu ene basi pakati pa iwo na ine. Iwo adalulupisa dzinanga yakuchena na pyakunyansa pikhachita iwo pile, natenepo na kuzhangali kwanga, ine ndidaavunga." 
Ezekiel43:9 Chinchino iwo athema kuleka pyauputa pikhachita iwo, pontho kutaya mifanikizo yakufa ya mafumu awo ile, penepo ine ndinakhala pakati pawo kwenda na kwenda." 
Ezekiel43:10 “Iwe mwana munthu, longa kuna Aisraele pya Nyumba ya Mulungu, towera iwo achite napyo manyadzo pyakudawa pyawopyo. Iwo mbanyerezere kutandwa mwadidi kwachita Nyumba ya Mulungu," 
Ezekiel43:11 tenepo iwo angachita manyadzo na pyonsene pyachita iwopyo, penepo iwe wathema kuaonesa kutandwa kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu na pinthu pyache, misuwo yache yakupitira m'bwalo na yakubulukira kunja ene, masasanyiro ache onsene, pontho mwambo na matongero ache onsene. Lemba pyonsenepi pamaso pawo, towera iwo akwanise dzakumbuka masasanyiro ache na kuteweza matongero ache onsene." 
Ezekiel43:12 Mwambo wa Nyumba ya Mulungu ngufu: Mbuto yonsene yazungulira Nyumbayo padzulu pa phiri inakhala yakuchena pyakwanga. Wenewu ndiye mwambo wa Nyumba ya Mulungu.” 
Ezekiel43:13 Guwa yansembe kukula kwache ikhali tenepa malingana na mdida ontho udaphatiswa basa kupima Nyumba ya Mulungu: Pansi pa thako yache pakhali mgelo ule kuzwika na umimbache ndi kati ya khono. Ntchindu ya milomo ya mgelowo ikhali ninga kulapha kwa dzanja. 
Ezekiel43:14 Kubulukira pansi pa mgelo wa guwayo thako yache ikhali khono ibodzi pontho idabulukira kunja kati ya khono. Kubulukira pa thako kufika padzulu pa chigundiro cha guwa, ulaphiache ukhali makhono mawiri, pontho umimbache ukhali kati ya khono." 
Ezekiel43:15 Mbuto yakugasirapo moto paguwa yansembe chengo chache chikhali makhono mawiri, pontho padzulu pache pakhali nyanga zinayi." 
Ezekiel43:16 Mbuto yakugasirapo moto kulapha kwache kukhali makhono matanthatu, khundu zonsene zinayi zikhali sasawa." 
Ezekiel43:17 Chigundiro cha padzulu ulaphiache na umimbache pikhali sasawa, makhono manomwe kukhundu zonsene. Chikhali na viri kulapha kwache dzanja ibodzi, pontho na mgelo kuzwika kwache manja mawiri kuzungulira chigundirocho. Nsikada za guwayo zikhayang'ana kumabulukiro dzuwa." 
Ezekiel43:18 Kubuluka penepo munthu ule adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Iwe mwana munthu, MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Awa ndiye anafuna dzakhala matongero a maperekero a nsembe zakupyerera, pontho mawaziro a chiropa paguwa yansembe ingamala mangwa:" 
Ezekiel43:19 Anyansembe a dzinza ya Levi, a m'banja ya Zadoki, ndiwo ene basi athema kudza chifupi na ine dzanditumikira. Iwe wathema kuapasa mwanamphulu wamamuna kukhala nsembe yakubulusira pyakudawa. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Ezekiel43:20 Iwe wathema kukwata chiropa cha mwanamphuluyo mbuchitswinga kunyanga zinayi za guwa, pontho pankhomo zinayi kuzungulira chigundiro chapadzulu, pontho na viri yonsene yakuzungulira. Na njira yeneyi guwayo inacheneswa mbikhala yakupambulika kuna ine." 
Ezekiel43:21 Kubuluka penepo iwe wathema kukwata mwanamphulu wamamuna ule aperekwa kukhala nsembe yakubulusira pyakudawa mbumpise pambuto yache yakusankhulika muchintalo cha Nyumba ya Mulungu kunja kwa Mbuto Yakuchena. 
Ezekiel43:22 “Mangwana mwache iwe wathema kupereka bokho wakusowa chilema ninga nsembe yakubulusira pyakudawa, pontho guwa yansembe yathema kucheneswa ninga montho mudacheneserwa iyo na chiropa cha mwanamphulu ule." 
Ezekiel43:23 Ungamala kuchenesa guwa yansembe ile, iwe wathema kuperekapo mwanamphulu wamamuna na bira wamamuna, pyonsene pyakusowa chilema." 
Ezekiel43:24 Penepi wathema kupipereka pamaso pa MBUYA, pontho anyansembe athema kupiwaza munyu, tenepo upipereke kuna MBUYA ninga nsembe yakupyerera." 
Ezekiel43:25 Nsiku na nsiku pansiku zinomwe, iwe wathema kudza na bokho ninga nsembe yakubulusira pyakudawa; iwe wathema pontho kudza na mwanamphulu wamamuna na bira wamamuna, pyonsene pyakusowa chilema." 
Ezekiel43:26 Nsiku zinomwezo iwo athema kuchita mtemo wakuchenesa guwa yansembe, towera ikhale yakupambulika kuna ine, MBUYA." 
Ezekiel43:27 Kumala kwa nsiku zenezi, kutomera pansiku yachisere kwenda m'tsogolo, anyansembe athema kupereka paguwa yansembe nsembe zanu zakupyerera pontho na nsembe zanu zachiphatizano. Penepo ine ndinakutawirani ninga anthu anga. Ndalonga tenepo ndine MBUYA Mulungu.”" 
Ezekiel44:1 Kubuluka penepo munthu ule adandikwata mbaenda nane kumsuwo wakunja wa Nyumba ya Mulungu, wakuyang'ana kumabulukiro dzuwa. Tenepo msuwowo ukhali wakufungwa." 
Ezekiel44:2 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Msuwo wenewu mbukhale wakufungwa ndzidzi onsene. Iwo hudatheme kufungulwa tayu; munthu na mbodzi ene mbaleke pita na penepa. Iwo wathema kukhala wakufungwa ndzidzi onsene, thangwi MBUYA Mulungu wa Israele apita na penepa." 
Ezekiel44:3 Mfumu yekha basi ndiye anakwanisa kukhala pansi m'subi ya pamsuwo wenewo mbadya pamaso pa MBUYA. Iye athema kupita na kubuluka pakuphatisa basa subi ya pamsuwo.” 
Ezekiel44:4 Kubuluka penepo munthu ule adandipitisa na pamsuwo wakumpoto mbitifika kunkhope kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu. Ndidamwaza maso mbandiona demelero ya Mulungu yadzala m'Nyumba mwache mule. Penepo ine ndidapigwisa na fufumimba. 
Ezekiel44:5 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Iwe mwana munthu, yang'ana mwadidi, pontho uvesere mwadidi mbuikhe khutu kuna pyonsene pinakupanga ine pya mwambo na matongero a Nyumbangayi. Iwe wathema kudziwa mwadidi mwene kuti mbani athema kupita m'Nyumba muno, pontho mbani hadatheme kupitamo tayu." 
Ezekiel44:6 Longa kuna dzinza yakupandukira ya Israele kuti MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: Ine ndakwana napyo pyakunyansa pimbachita imwepyo, imwe Aisraele." 
Ezekiel44:7 Padzulu pa pyakunyansa pyonsene pimbachita imwepyo, imwe mudaswipisa Nyumbanga, pakupitisa alendo m'mbuto yanga yakupambulika, ale nkhabe tsalakana pya Mulungu mumtima mwawo tayu, pontho okhonda gwandwa nsonga yachimuna, ndzidzi ukhapereka imwe nsembe za mafuta na chiropa, natenepo mwaswa chiverano changa." 
Ezekiel44:8 M'mbuto mwa kuphata basanu mwakuthemerana na pinthu pyanga pyakupambulika, imwe mwasankhula alendo kuyang'anira mbuto yanga yakupambulika." 
Ezekiel44:9 “Ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Nee nyakudza pyache okhonda tsalakana pya Mulungu mumtima mwache pontho okhonda gwandwa nsonga yachimuna athema kupita m'mbuto yanga yakupambulika, nee alendo ale ambakhala pakati pa Aisraele tayu." 
Ezekiel44:10 “Kuna Alevi, ale adabauka kubuluka kuna ine ndzidzi ukhadabauka Aisraele, pontho ale adazungunukira kuna mifanikizo, athema kutchunyuswa thangwi ya pyakudawa pyawo." 
Ezekiel44:11 Iwo anakwanisa kuphata kwene basa kumbuto yanga yakupambulika mbayang'anira misuwo ya Nyumba ya Mulungu pontho na kuphata mabasa anango ene kweneko. Iwo anakwanisa kucheka nyama zakuperekwa na anthu kukhala nsembe zakupyerera na nsembe zinango. Iwo anaphata basa kufiliviri anthu. 
Ezekiel44:12 Mbwenye na thangwi yakuti iwo adatumikira dzinza ya Israele ndzidzi ukhapembedza iwo mifanikizo mbaachitisa kudawa, natenepo ine ndikudumbira na mphamvu zanga zonsene kuti iwo athema kutchunyuswa thangwi ya pyakudawa pyawo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Ezekiel44:13 Iwo hadatheme tayu kufika chifupi na ine dzanditumikira ninga nyansembe, penu kudza chifupi na pinthu pyanga pyakupambulika, penu pyakupereka pyanga pyakuchenaletu. Iwo athema kuchitiswa manyadzo thangwi ya mabasawo akunyansa." 
Ezekiel44:14 Kwache ine ndinaapasa basa yakuyang'anira Nyumba ya Mulungu, pontho na kuphata mabasa anango ene ale athema kuphatwa mwenemo." 
Ezekiel44:15 “Mbwenye anyansembe a m'dzinza ya Levi, ale mphidzukulu pya Zadoki, pontho ale adaphata mwakukhulupirika basa ya kunditumikira m'mbuto yanga yakupambulika ndzidzi ukhadabauka Aisraele ule, enewa ene basi ndiye athema kudza chifupi na ine mbanditumikira; iwo athema kuimira pamaso panga kupereka nsembe za mafuta na chiropa. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Ezekiel44:16 Enewo ene basi ndiye athema kupita kumbuto yanga yakupambulika; iwo ene basi athema kufika chifupi na thebulu yanga kutumikira pamaso panga, pontho kuphata mabasanga." 
Ezekiel44:17 “Iwo angapita pamisuwo ya chintalo cham'bwalo, iwo athema kuvala nguwo zakuchena; iwo hadatheme tayu kuvala nguwo zaubweya wa bira ndzidzi unanditumikira iwo pamisuwo ya chintalo cham'bwalo pontho na m'Nyumba mwanga." 
Ezekiel44:18 Iwo athema kuvala nduwira za nguwo zakuchena na makapundu. Iwo aleke vala chinthu chonsene chakuti anachita nacho kaluma. 
Ezekiel44:19 Iwo angabuluka kuchintalo chakunja, kule kuna anthu, iwo athema kudula nguwo zawo zonsene zidavala iwo ndzidzi ukhatumikira iwo zile mbazisiya m'masubi akupambulika, tenepo athema kuvala nguwo zinango, gopesera anthu anavungwa thangwi ya kuchena kwa nguwoko." 
Ezekiel44:20 “Anyansembe mbaleke chinga mpala penu kusiya kwene tsisi nyaviliri tayu. Mbwenye ndzidzi onsene aiyepule kwene basi. 
Ezekiel44:21 Anyansembe aleke kumwa vinyu angapita muchintalo cham'bwalo. 
Ezekiel44:22 Anyansembe aleke semba mamfelwa penu mkazi wakulekana na mamunache; iwo athema kusemba mwali okhonda dziwa mamuna, pontho wa dzinza ya Israele, penu mamfelwa ule mamunache akhalimbo nyansembe." 
Ezekiel44:23 “Iwo athema kufunzisa anthu anga kusiyana kwa pinthu pyakupambulika na pinthu pene pyapyo, pontho kuafunzisa kusiyanisa pakati pa pinthu pyakukhonda chena na pyakuchena pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Ezekiel44:24 “Ngakhala pana miseru, anyansembe athema kutonga miseruyo mwakutewezana na matongero anga. Iwo athema kukoya mwambo na kuteweza matongero anga a pya maphwando anga onsene akusankhulika, pontho athema kuchitisa Nsiku Yakupuma kukhala yakupambulika." 
Ezekiel44:25 “Nyansembe mbaleke kupiswipisa yekha ene pakukhuya mtembo; kwache ngakhala nyakumwalirayo ndi babache penu mache, mwanache wamkazi penu wamamuna, nanache penu nyamaingache okhonda sembwa, penepo iye anakwanisa kupiswipisa yekha ene." 
Ezekiel44:26 Angamala kupichenesa, iye athema kudikhira nsiku zinomwe." 
Ezekiel44:27 Pansiku inafuna iye kapita muchintalo cham'bwalo cha Nyumba ya Mulungu katumikira mwenemo, iye athema kupereka nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa pyache. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Ezekiel44:28 “Anyansembe mbaleke khala na chinthu chawo chene padzulu pa ine pano. Imwe mwathema nee kuapasa chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu mu Israele; ine ndiye ndinafuna dzakhala chinthu chinafuna iwo dzatambira. 
Ezekiel44:29 Iwo anadya pyakupereka pya mapira, pontho nsembe zakubulusira pyakudawa pontho na nsembe zakupagalira pyakudawa; pontho pinthu pyonsene pyapereka Aisraele kuna MBUYA pinakhala pyawo." 
Ezekiel44:30 Nsapo zadidiletu zakutoma kutokota na mitukwanu yonsene yakupambulika pinakhala pya anyansembe. Imwe mwathema kuapasa ufanu wadidiletu watoma imwe kuusinjawo, towera panyumba panu pakhale mtsanzayiso." 
Ezekiel44:31 Nyansembe mbaleke kudya mbalame penu nyama yakufa yokha ene, penu yakuchita kuphiwa na pirombo pyam'tsanga." 
Ezekiel45:1 “Imwe mungagawa dzikoyi kuna anthu kukhala yawo ene, imwe mwathema kupereka khundu inango kuna MBUYA ninga nthemba yakupambulika. Ulaphiache ukhale mathanyo pikwi khumi na piwiri na madzana mashanu, pontho umimbache mathanyo pikwi khumi. Mbuto yonseneyo inakhala yakuchena." 
Ezekiel45:2 Khundu yapakati ya mbuto yeneyi yakukwana mathanyo madzana mawiri na makumashanu, ulaphiache na umimbache ene, ndiye kunafuna dzamangwa Nyumba ya Mulungu, pontho yathema kuzungulirwa na chintalo chakukwana mathanyo makumawiri na ashanu." 
Ezekiel45:3 M'nthemba yakupambulika, pima khundu yakukwana mathanyo pikwi khumi na piwiri na madzana mashanu ulaphiache, pontho na umimbache wakukwana mathanyo pikwi pishanu. Penepo panakhala Nyumba ya Mulungu, Mbuto Yakuchenesesa." 
Ezekiel45:4 Mbuto yeneyi inakhala khundu yakuchena ya dzikoyo yakupambulirwa anyansembe, ale ambatumikira MBUYA m'Nyumba mwache. Mwenemo munakhala nyumba zawo na mbuto yakumangapo Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
Ezekiel45:5 Khundu inango yakukwana mathanyo pikwi khumi na piwiri na madzana mashanu ulaphiache, pontho mathanyo pikwi pishanu umimbache, yathema kukhala ya Alevi, ale ambatumikira m'Nyumba ya Mulungu. Kweneko ndiye kunafuna dzakhala maluwani awo." 
Ezekiel45:6 “Iwe wathema kupereka khundu inango kuna mzindawo ninga mbuto yakukwana mathanyo pikwi khumi na piwiri na madzana mashanu ulaphiache, pontho umimbache mathanyo pikwi piwiri na madzana mashanu, kuphatanizana na mbuto yakupambulika ile; mbuto yeneyi inakhala ya dzinza yonsene ya Israele." 
Ezekiel45:7 “Mfumu anakhala na mbuto yakuchita madire kukhundu zonsene na mbuto ile ndi nthemba yakupambulika pontho na mbuto ile nja mzinda. Mbutoyo inafumukira kukhundu yakumadokero dzuwa mpakana ku Bara ya Mediterania, pontho kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa mpakana kumadire akukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa a dziko. Ulaphiache unakhala sasawa na nthemba yakuperekwa kuna dzinza yonsene ya Israele." 
Ezekiel45:8 Nthemba yeneyo ndiye inakhala yache enembo mu Israele. Natenepo mafumu anga nkhabe dzaponderezave anthu anga tayu, mbwenye anatawirisa madzinza a Israele kukhala na nthemba yawo ene malingana na dzinzawo.”" 
Ezekiel45:9 MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: “Imwe atongi a Israele mwachita kundendeya! Lekani kuchita upandu pontho kuboneresa anthu kunachita imweko mbamuchita pinthu pyakuthema pontho pyakulungama. Alekeni pyawo anthu anga akhale m'mbuto zawo mbamukhonda kuabulusamo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu. 
Ezekiel45:10 “Imwe mwathema kuphatisa basa midida ya chitundu na ndowa yakuona. 
Ezekiel45:11 Chitundu na ndowa pyathema kukhala sasawa mwakuti homeri ibodzi yathema kupita pitundu khumi, pontho homeri ibodzi yathema kupita ndowa khumi. Midida yonsene miwiriyi yathema kutewezana na kukula kwa homeri." 
Ezekiel45:12 Mdida wa sekeli wathema kukhala wakukwana magera makumawiri. Mdida wa mina wathema kukhala wakukwana masekeli makumatanthatu. 
Ezekiel45:13 “Mtukwa wakupambulika wathema imwe dzapereka ngufu: Chibodzi papinthu makumatanthatu pya tirigu; chibodzi papinthu makumatanthatu pya barele; 
Ezekiel45:14 pontho chibodzi papinthu dzana pya mafuta. Mididache njishi: pitundu khumi ndi sasawa na homeri, pontho midida ya homeri na kori ntchibodzi-bodzi." 
Ezekiel45:15 Perekani bira mbodzi pa mabira madzana mawiri onsene kubulukira pa mikumbi yadidi ya Israele. Mwenemu ndiye munafunira imwe dzapereka pyakupereka pyanu pya mapira, nsembe zakupyerera, pontho nsembe zachiphatizano, towera pyakudawa pyanu pilekererwe. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Ezekiel45:16 “Anthu onsene a m'dzikomo athema dzaperekambo mitukwa yakupambulika kuti iphatiswe basa na mfumu wa Israele. 
Ezekiel45:17 Inakhala basache mfumu kudza na nsembe zakupyerera, pyakupereka pya mapira, na nsembe za pyakumwa pandzidzi wa maphwando akusekera kubalwa kwa mwezi, Nsiku Yakupuma na maphwando anango onsene akusankhulika a dzinza yonsene ya Israele. Iye athema kupereka nsembe zakulekerera pyakudawa, pyakupereka pya mapira, nsembe zakupyerera, na pyakupereka pya chiphatizano, towera pikhale nsembe zakulekerera nazo pyakudawa pya dzinza ya Israele." 
Ezekiel45:18 “Ine MBUYA Mulungu ndikulonga tenepa: Pansiku yakutoma ya mwezi wakutoma, imwe mwathema kukwata mwanamphulu wamamuna wakusowa chilema mbamuchenese Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
Ezekiel45:19 Nyansembe athema kukwata chiropa pang'ono cha nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa ile, mbachitswinga pamafufu a misuwo ya Nyumba ya Mulungu, pankhomo zinayi zachigundiro chapadzulu cha guwa yansembe, pontho na pamafufu a misuwo ya mpanda ya muchintalo cham'bwalo." 
Ezekiel45:20 Pansiku yachinomwe ya mwezi imwe mwathema kuchita chibodzi-bodzi na munthu onsene ule adawa mwasusudewu penu mwamadengwa; tenepo imwe mwathema kupereka nsembe yakuchenesa nayo Nyumba ya Mulungu. 
Ezekiel45:21 “Pansiku yakhumi na chinayi ya mwezi wakutoma, imwe mwathema kuchita Phwando ya Paska, ile imbamala nsiku zinomwe. Ndzidzi wenewu imwe mwathema kudya mikate yakusowa chakufufumisira." 
Ezekiel45:22 Pansiku yeneyo mfumu athema kupereka ng'ombe imuna ninga nsembe yakulekerera pyakudawa pyache na pya anthu onsene m'dzikomo. 
Ezekiel45:23 Nsiku na nsiku, pansiku zinomwe iye athema kudza na ng'ombe zimuna zinomwe na mabira amuna anomwe, pyonsene pyakusowa chilema, kukhala nsembe yakupyerera kuna MBUYA. Iye athema kuperekambo bokho kukhala nsembe yakubulusira pyakudawa." 
Ezekiel45:24 Iye athema pontho kupereka ninga pyakupereka pya mapira chakukwana ndowa ibodzi padzulu pa nsembe ya ng'ombe yonsene, pontho ndowa ibodzi pa bira onsene pabodzi pene na tugwe mbodzi wa mafuta aolivi padzulu pa ndowa yonsene." 
Ezekiel45:25 “Pandzidzi wa nsiku zonsene zinomwe za Phwando ya Misasa, ile imbatoma pansiku yakhumi na chishanu ya mwezi wachinomwe, mfumu athema kudza na pyakupereka ninga pyontho-pyonthopyo kukhala nsembe zakulekerera pyakudawa, nsembe zakupyerera, pontho pyakupereka pya mapira na mafuta aolivi.”" 
Ezekiel46:1 MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: “Msuwo wakupitira muchintalo cham'bwalo kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa wathema kukhala wakufungwa nsiku zonsene zitanthatu zakuphata basa, mbwenye pa Nsiku Yakupuma na pa Phwando yakusekera Kubalwa kwa Mwezi wathema kufungulwa." 
Ezekiel46:2 Mfumu athema kupita m'subi ya pamsuwoyo kubulukira kuchintalo chakunja mbaimira chifupi na mafufu a pamsuwo. Anyansembe athema kupereka nsembe zache zakupyerera pontho na pyakupereka pyache pyachiphatizano. Iye athema kupembedza pamsuwopo, tenepo angamala penepo abuluke pyache panja. Msuwo mbuleke fungwa kufikirana dzuwa kuthobila." 
Ezekiel46:3 Pansiku Zakupuma zonsene pontho na pa Maphwando akusekera Kubalwa kwa Mwezi, anthu onsene athema kupembedza MBUYA patsogolo pamsuwopo." 
Ezekiel46:4 Nsembe zakupyerera zimbadza na mfumu kuna MBUYA pa Nsiku Yakupuma zile zathema kukhala ana mabira amuna atanthatu, pontho na bira wamamuna mbodzi, onsene akhale akusowa chilema." 
Ezekiel46:5 Pyakupereka pya mapira pile pimbaperekwa kubodzi kwene na bira wamamuna pyathema kukhala ndowa ibodzi, pontho na pyakupereka pya mapira pile pyaperekwa kubodzi kwene na mwanabira onsene, pyathema kupereka ninga munapifunira iye, kubodzi kwene na tugwe wa mafuta aolivi pa ndowa ibodzi yonsene." 
Ezekiel46:6 Pansiku ya Phwando yakusekera Kubwalwa kwa Mwezi, iye athema kupereka mwanamphulu wamamuna, anabira atanthatu, na bira wamamuna mbodzi; pyonsene pikhale pyakusowa chilema." 
Ezekiel46:7 Iye athema kupereka pyakupereka pya mapira pyakukwana ndowa ibodzi pa ng'ombe ibodzi imuna, ndowa ibodzi pabodzi pene na bira mbodzi wamamuna, pontho na anabira azinji ene ninga munapifunira iye kupereka, pabodzi pene na tugwe wa mafuta aolivi pa ndowa ibodzi yonsene." 
Ezekiel46:8 Mfumu angapita, athema kupita na pamsuwo wa chintalo chakunja, pontho athema kubuluka panja na pamsuwo ontho-onthowo." 
Ezekiel46:9 “Anthu a m'dzikomo angadza dzapembedza pamaso pa MBUYA pandzidzi wakusankhulika wa maphwando, munthu onsene anapita na pamsuwo wakumpoto kapembedza ule, athema kubuluka panja na pamsuwo wakumwera; pontho munthu onsene anapita na pamsuwo wakumwera kapembedza ule, athema kubuluka panja na pamsuwo wakumpoto. Munthu na mbodzi ene mbaleke buluka panja na pamsuwo ontho udapita na iye ule tayu, mbwenye iye athema kubuluka na pamsuwo unango." 
Ezekiel46:10 Mfumu athema kukhalambo pakati pawo, kupitambo na anthu pabodzi ndzidzi unapita iwo m'bwalo, pontho kubulukambo panja ndzidzi unabuluka anthu panja." 
Ezekiel46:11 “Pansiku za phwando na pansiku zinango zakusankhulika, pyakupereka pya mapira pyathema kukhala pyakukwana ndowa ibodzi pabodzi pene na ng'ombe imuna, ndowa ibodzi pabodzi pene bira wamamuna, pontho pabodzi pene na anabira azinji ene ninga munapifunira iye, pontho na tugwe wa mafuta aolivi pa ndowa ibodzi yonsene." 
Ezekiel46:12 “Ndzidzi unapereka mfumu pyakupereka kuna MBUYA mwakufuna kwache, podi pikhale nsembe yakupyereza, penu pyakupereka pyachiphatizano, msuwo wakukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa wathema kufungulwa kuti iye apite napo. Iye athema kupereka nsembe zache zakupyerera penu pyakupereka pyache pyachiphatizano ninga mumbachitira iye pa Nsiku Yakupuma. Kubuluka penepo iye athema kubuluka panja, tenepo angabuluka panja, msuwowo wathema kufungwa.”" 
Ezekiel46:13 “Nsiku na nsiku imwe mwathema kupereka kuna MBUYA mwanabira wa chaka chibodzi wakusowa chilema ninga nsembe yakupyerera; imwe mwathema pereka nsembe yeneyi machibese onsene. 
Ezekiel46:14 Imwe pontho mwathema machibese onsene kupereka chakupereka cha mapira akukwana makilogramu mawiri. Imwe mwathema kupereka pontho khundu ibodzi ya makhundu matatu a tugwe a mafuta aolivi akumunyira ufa. Nsembe yeneyi yakuperekwa kuna MBUYA yathema kuchitika kwenda na kwenda. 
Ezekiel46:15 Tenepo mwanabira, ufa, mafuta aolivi pyathema kuperekwa machibese onsene, towera pikhale nsembe zakupyerera za nsiku na nsiku.”" 
Ezekiel46:16 MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: “Ngakhala mfumu apereka khundu inango ya mfuma kuna mbodzi wa anache ninga mtukwa, penepyo pinakhala pontho pya pidzukulu pyache; penepyo pyathema kukhala pyawo ninga pinthu pyathema iwo kusiyirwa na kholo wache." 
Ezekiel46:17 Kwache ngakhala mfumu anapereka khundu inango ya mfumache kuna mbodzi wa anyabasache ninga mtukwa, nyabasayo inakwanisa kukhala yache mpakana Chaka cha Kubwezera; kubuluka penepo chathema kubwezerwa kuna mfumu mwenechiroache. Pinthu pina iye mphya anache ene basi, thangwi ipyo mphyawo." 
Ezekiel46:18 Mfumu mbaleke pokosera chinthu chonsene chasiyira anthu anawo kukhala chache chene, kuathamangisira kutali na pinthu pyawo pene. Iye athema kusiyira anache pinthu pyakubulukira pa mfumache ene basi, towera paleke khala munthu na mbodzi ene wa anthu anga wakulekaniswa na mfuma yathema iye kusiyirwa.”" 
Ezekiel46:19 Kubuluka penepo munthu ule adandipitisa na pamsuwo wa chifupi na msuwo wa masubi akupambulika akuyang'ana kumpoto, ale akhali masubi a anyansembe, mbandionesa mbuto ya kunkhomo kumadokero dzuwa." 
Ezekiel46:20 Iye adalonga mbati, “Yeneyi ndi mbuto ile inafuna anyansembe dzaterekerapo nsembe zakuperekwa kulekerera pyakudawa penu nsembe zakupagalira pyakudawa, pontho kuphika mikate ya ufa ule, towera aleke kudza nazo muchintalo chakunja, gopesera anthu anavungwa thangwi ya kuchena kwa nsembe zenezi.”" 
Ezekiel46:21 Kubuluka penepo adandidzesa muchintalo chakunja mbandizungulisa nkhomo zache zonsene zinayi, tenepo kweneko ndidaona chintalo chinango pankhomo yonsene." 
Ezekiel46:22 Pankhomo zinayi za chintalo chakunja pakhali pintalo ping'ono-ping'ono. Chintalo chonsene m'nkhomo zache zonsene zinayi zikhali sasawa; ulaphiache ukhali makhono makumawiri, pontho umimbache ukhali makhono khumi na mashanu." 
Ezekiel46:23 Pintalo pyonsene pidazungulirwa na mpanda wa miyala. Mbuto yakugasirapo moto idamangwa m'tchinde mwa mpanda ule. 
Ezekiel46:24 Munthu ule adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Zenezi ndi mbuto zakuterekerapo, zile zinafuna anyakutumikira m'Nyumba ya Mulungu dzaterekerapo nsembe zimbapereka anthu.”" 
Ezekiel47:1 Munthu ule adandidzesa pontho kumsuwo wa Nyumba ya Mulungu, tenepo ndidaona madzi akubulukira pansi pa msuwo wa Nyumba ya Mulungu kwenda kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa, kukhadayang'ana Nyumba ya Mulungu kule. Madzi akhakuka kubulukira pansi kukhundu yakumwera kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu, kukhundu yakumwera kwa guwa yansembe." 
Ezekiel47:2 Kubuluka penepo munthu ule adandibulusa kunja na pamsuwo wakumpoto mbandizungulisa kunja kwenda nane kumsuwo wakukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa, tenepo madzi akhafamba kukhundu yache yakumwera." 
Ezekiel47:3 Pikhaenda munthu ule kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa na mdida m'manja mwache adapima nsinzo wakukwana mathanyo madzana mashanu, kubuluka penepo adandiendesa kupita na m'madzi, ale akhandifika m'mphundupundu." 
Ezekiel47:4 Iye adapima pontho nsinzo unango wakukwana mathanyo madzana mashanu, mbandiendesa pontho na m'madzi ale akhandifika m'mabondo. Iye adapima pontho nsinzo unango wakukwana mathanyo anango madzana mashanu mbandiendesa pontho na m'madzi, ale akhandifika m'chuno." 
Ezekiel47:5 Iye adapima pontho nsinzo unango wakukwana mathanyo madzana mashanu, kwache ndzidzi wenewu pakhali mkulo ule ine mbidakwanisa kuuwambuka tayu, thangwi madzi akhadadzala pyakwanga mwakuti munthu mbadakwanisa kuwambuka pakuchita kusambirira kwene basi." 
Ezekiel47:6 Iye adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Iwe mwana munthu, ayi penepi ukupiona?” Kubuluka penepo munthu ule adandiendesa pontho m'khundu-khundu mwa mkulo." 
Ezekiel47:7 Pidafika ine kweneko, ndidaona miti mizinji kukhundu zonsene za mkulo ule." 
Ezekiel47:8 Iye adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Madzi enewa ambakukira kunthemba yakumabulukiro dzuwa mbutchithira m'phedi ya Yorodani mbakagwera m'Nyanza Yakufa. Madzi angagwera m'nyanzamo, iwo ambasandusa madzi amunyu kukhala adidi." 
Ezekiel47:9 Mikumbi ya pyakulenga pya mtundu onsene pinakhala konsene kwene kunaenda mkulowo. Panakhala nsomba zizinji thangwi madzi enewa akufamba mwenemo, pontho akuchitisa madzi amunyu kukhala adidi; natenepo konsene kwene kunaenda mkuloko pinthu pyonsene pinakhala na moyo." 
Ezekiel47:10 Amisiri a nsomba anaimira m'magombe a nyanza; kubulukira ku Engedi mpakana ku Eneglaimu zinakhala mbuto zakugwisira makokota. Nsomba zinakhala zamtundu na mtundu ninga nsomba za m'Bara ya Mediterania. 
Ezekiel47:11 Mbwenye madzi a m'mathawale na m'madukunundu hanasanduswa adidi tayu; iwo anathimiza kupasa anthu munyu. 
Ezekiel47:12 Nsapo zamtundu na mtundu zinamera kukhundu zonsene za mkulowo. Masambache nkhabe dzaunyala penu nsapo dzakhala malolokwa tayu. Iyo inabala nsapo mwezi na mwezi, thangwi madzi akubulukira ku Nyumba ya Mulungu ambakapira kweneko. Nsapo zache zinaphatiswa basa ninga phoso, pontho masambache ninga mtombwe.”" 
Ezekiel47:13 MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: “Enewa ndi madire athema dzikoyi kugawiwa pakati pa madzinza khumi na awiri a Israele kuti ikhale yawo ene, pabodzi pene na makhundu awiri kuna Yosefe." 
Ezekiel47:14 Imwe mwathema kugawa dzikoyi sasawa pakati panu. Podi ine ndidachita kudumbira na dzanjanga kuipereka dziko kuna makolo anu, dzikoyi inati ikhale yanu ene." 
Ezekiel47:15 “Madire a dzikoyo mbawa: Kukhundu yakumpoto madire anabulukira ku Bara ya Mediterania m'khundu-khundu mwa msewu wa Hetiloni, kugwanda na pamakata a Hamati kwenda kumzinda wa Zedadi," 
Ezekiel47:16 mzinda wa Berota, Sibraimu, (ule uli pakati pa madire a Damasiko na Hamati), mpakana ku Hazeri-Hatikoni, madire a nthemba ya Haurani." 
Ezekiel47:17 Madire anafumuka kubulukira ku Bara ya Mediterania kwenda kumzinda wa Hazari-Enani kutewera madire na akumpoto a Damasiko na Hamati. Madire enewa anakhala akumpoto. 
Ezekiel47:18 “Kukhundu yamabulukiro dzuwa madire anagwanda na pakati pa Damasiko na Haurani, kutewera mkulo wa Yorodani kuchita madire pakati pa dziko ya Israele na Gileadi, kwenda kumabulukiro dzuwa mpakana ku Tamara. Madire enewa anakhala akumabulukiro dzuwa." 
Ezekiel47:19 “Kukhundu yakumwera madire anagwanda na ku Tamara mpakana ku madzi a Meriba-Kadeshi kutewera madire a Iguputo kwenda ku Bara ya Mediterania. Madire enewa anakhala akumwera. 
Ezekiel47:20 “Kukhundu yakumadokero dzuwa madire ache anakhala Bara ya Mediterania mpakana pambuto pale payang'anisana na makata a Hamati. Madire enewa anakhala akumabulukiro dzuwa. 
Ezekiel47:21 “Imwe mwathema kugawana dzikoyi pakati panu malingana na madzinza a Israele. 
Ezekiel47:22 Imwe mwathema kuigawa, towera dzikoyi ikhale yanu ene, pontho na alendo ale akhazikika pakati panu mbabalambo anawo. Imwe mwathema kuayesa ningambo enechiro mataka; pabodzi pene na imwe, iwo athema kugawanambo nawo dzikoyi pakati pa madzinza a Israele." 
Ezekiel47:23 Podi kwene mlendo akhazikika pyache dzinza ipi, kweneko imwe mwathema kumpasa mbuto yathema iye kutambira ninga khundu yache. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Ezekiel48:1 “Ufu ndi nyandandanda wa madzinza malingana na madzinawo: Kumadire akumpoto, Dani anatambira khundu ibodzi; madire ache anatewera msewu wa Hetiloni kwenda kumakata a Hamati; Hazari-Enani na madire akumpoto kwa Damasiko kwenda chifupi na Hamati, ndiye anakhala madire ache kubulukira kumabulukiro dzuwa kwenda kumadokero dzuwa." 
Ezekiel48:2 “Asheri anatambira khundu ibodzi; iye anakhala tsamadire wa Dani kubulukira kumabulukiro dzuwa kwenda kumadokero dzuwa. 
Ezekiel48:3 “Nafitali anatambira khundu ibodzi; iye anakhala tsamadire wa Asheri kubulukira kumabulukiro dzuwa kwenda kumadokero dzuwa. 
Ezekiel48:4 “Manase anatambira khundu ibodzi; iye anakhala tsamadire wa Nafitali kubulukira kumabulukiro dzuwa kwenda kumadokero dzuwa. 
Ezekiel48:5 “Eferemu anatambira khundu ibodzi; iye anakhala tsamadire wa Manase kubulukira kumabulukiro dzuwa kwenda kumadokero dzuwa. 
Ezekiel48:6 “Rubeni anatambira khundu ibodzi; iye anakhala tsamadire wa Eferemu kubulukira kumabulukiro dzuwa kwenda kumadokero dzuwa. 
Ezekiel48:7 “Yuda anatambira khundu ibodzi; iye anakhala tsamadire wa Rubeni kubulukira kumabulukiro dzuwa kwenda kumadokero dzuwa. 
Ezekiel48:8 “Madire a Yuda kubulukira kumabulukiro dzuwa kwenda kumadokero dzuwa anakhala khundu ile yathema imwe kupereka ninga mtukwa wakupambulika. Umimbache unakhala mathanyo pikwi khumi na piwiri na madzana mashanu, pontho ulaphiache kubulukira kumabulukiro dzuwa kwenda kumadokero dzuwa unakhala sasawa na mbuto inafuna dzatambira madzinza ile; Nyumba ya Mulungu inakhala pakati na kati pa mbuto yeneyi." 
Ezekiel48:9 “Khundu yakupambulika pyakwanga yathema imwe kuipereka kuna MBUYA ikhale ulaphiache mathanyo pikwi khumi na piwiri na madzana mashanu, pontho umimbache ukhale mathanyo pikwi pishanu." 
Ezekiel48:10 Yeneyi inakhala khundu yakupambulika ya anyansembe. Ulaphiache ukhale mathanyo pikwi khumi na piwiri na madzana mashanu kukhundu yakumpoto, umimbache ukhale pikwi pishanu kukhundu yakumadokero dzuwa, pontho umimbache ukhale mathanyo pikwi pishanu kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa, pontho kukhundu yache yakumwera ulaphiache wathema kukhala mathanyo pikwi khumi na piwiri na madzana mashanu. Pamchomboletu pa mbuto yeneyi panakhala Nyumba ya MBUYA." 
Ezekiel48:11 Mbuto yeneyi inakhala ya anyansembe akupambulika, pidzukulu pya Zadoki. Enewa adanditumikira mwakukhulupirika pontho hadabauke tayu kubuluka kuna ine ninga mudachitira dzinza ya Levi ndzidzi udabauka Aisraele ule." 
Ezekiel48:12 Mbuto yeneyi inakhala mtukwa wakupambulika kuna iwo kubulukira pa mbuto yakuchena ya dzikoyo, mbuto yakupambulikaletu, ile yachita madire na nthemba ya Alevi." 
Ezekiel48:13 “M'khundu-khundu mwa madire a nthemba ya anyansembe, Alevi anakhala na mbuto ulaphiache mathanyo pikwi khumi na piwiri na madzana mashanu, pontho umimbache mathanyo pikwi pishanu. Ulaphiache onsene unakhala mathanyo pikwi khumi na piwiri na madzana mashanu, pontho umimbache mathanyo pikwi pishanu." 
Ezekiel48:14 Iwo hadatheme kugulisa penu kuchinjisa khundu na ibodzi ene ya mbutoyo tayu. Yeneyi ndi khundu yadidi pyakwanga ya dzikoyo, natenepo mbileke paswambo munthu unango pyache tayu, thangwi mbutoyo njakuchena kuna MBUYA." 
Ezekiel48:15 “Khundu yakusalira pa nthemba yakufunikaletu, ile ulaphiache ndi mathanyo pikwi khumi na piwiri na madzana mashanu, pontho umimbache ndi pikwi piwiri na madzana mashanu, ilekerwe mabasa anango ene a mumzindamo, kumangirapo nyumba na kukhala mbuto za mpovu. Mzinda unakhala pakati na kati pa nthembayo," 
Ezekiel48:16 pontho kukula kwache kunakhala tenepa: kukhundu yakumpoto mathanyo pikwi piwiri na madzana mawiri na makumashanu, kukhundu yakumwera mathanyo pikwi piwiri na madzana mawiri na makumashanu, kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa mathanyo pikwi piwiri na madzana mawiri na makumashanu, pontho kukhundu yakumadokero dzuwa mathanyo pikwi piwiri na madzana mawiri na makumashanu." 
Ezekiel48:17 Mbuto ya mpovu ya mzindawo kukula kwache kunakhala tenepa: kukhundu yakumpoto mathanyo dzana na makumawiri na ashanu, kukhundu yakumwera dzana na makumawiri na ashanu, kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa mathanyo dzana na makumawiri na ashanu, kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa dzana na makumawiri na ashanu." 
Ezekiel48:18 Khundu inafuna salira pambutoyo ile yachita madire na Mbuto yakuchenayo, ulaphiache unakhala mathanyo pikwi pishanu kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa, pontho pikwi pishanu kukhundu yakumadokero dzuwa. Iyo inabulusa phoso yakukwanisa kudyesa anyakuphata basa onsene a mumzindamo." 
Ezekiel48:19 Anyakuphata basa mumzindamo ale ambaulima anabulukira kumadzinza onsene a Israele. 
Ezekiel48:20 Mbuto yonseneyo kukula kwache kunakhala mathanyo pikwi khumi na piwiri na madzana mashanu kumakhundu ache onsene anayi. Ninga mtukwa wakupambulika imwe mwathema kuikha pakhundu mbuto yakuchena pabodzi pene na mbuto ya mzindawo. 
Ezekiel48:21 “Khundu yakusalira pamakhundu onsene awiri a nthemba yakuchena pontho mbuto ya mzinda inakhala ya mfumu. Madire ache anafumukira kumabulukiro dzuwa mathanyo pikwi khumi na piwiri na madzana mashanu kubulukira kukhundu ya mbuto yakupambulikaletu, pontho kukhundu yakumadokero dzuwa mathanyo pikwi khumi na piwiri na madzana mashanu kwenda kumadire a kukhundu yakumadokero dzuwa. Mbuto ziwirizi, zile kukula kwache ndi sasawa na mbuto zidaperekwa kuna madzinza, zinaperekwa kuna mfumu, pontho mbuto yakuchena na Nyumba ya Mulungu pinakhala pakati na kati pa iwo." 
Ezekiel48:22 Natenepo mbuto ya Alevi na mbuto ya mzinda pinakhala pakati na kati pa mbuto ile nja mfumu. Mbuto ile nja mfumu inakhala pakati mbichita madire na Yuda pontho Benjemani khundu inango. 
Ezekiel48:23 “Kulonga pya madzinza anango akusalirawo: Benjemani anatambirambo khundu yache; madire ache anafumuka kutomera kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa kwenda kukhundu yakumadokero dzuwa. 
Ezekiel48:24 “Simioni anatambirambo mbuto yache; iye anachita madire na nthemba ya Benjemani kutomera kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa mpakana kukhundu yakumadokero dzuwa. 
Ezekiel48:25 “Isakara anatambirambo mbuto yache; iye anachita madire na nthemba ya Simioni kutomera kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa mpakana kukhundu yakumadokero dzuwa. 
Ezekiel48:26 “Zebuloni anatambirambo mbuto yache; iye anachita madire na nthemba ya Isakara kutomera kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa mpakana kukhundu yakumadokero dzuwa. 
Ezekiel48:27 “Gadi anatambirambo mbuto yache; iye anachita madire na nthemba ya Zebuloni kutomera kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa mpakana kukhundu yakumadokero dzuwa. 
Ezekiel48:28 “Madire a kukhundu yakumwera a Gadi anaenda kubulukira kukhundu yakumwera kwa Tamara kwenda kumadzi a Meriba-Kadeshi, kubuluka kweneko anatewera madire a Iguputo kwenda ku Bara ya Mediterania." 
Ezekiel48:29 “Yeneyi ndi dziko yathema iwe kuigawa kuna madzinza a Israele ninga chinthu chathema iwo kutambira, pontho zenezi ndiye zinafuna dzakhala mbuto zawo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Ezekiel48:30 “Ili m'tchindemu ndiye inafuna dzakhala misuwo yakubuluka nayo kunja kwa mzinda: Kutomera kukhundu yakumpoto, ile ulaphiache ndi makhono pikwi piwiri na madzana mawiri na makumashanu," 
Ezekiel48:31 misuwo ya mzindawo inachemerwa na madzina a madzinza a Israele. Misuwo mitatu ya kukhundu yakumpoto inachemerwa msuwo wa Rubeni, msuwo wa Yuda, na msuwo wa Levi." 
Ezekiel48:32 “Kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa, ile ulaphiache ndi pikwi piwiri na madzana mawiri na makumashanu kunakhala misuwo mitatu: Msuwo wa Yosefe, msuwo wa Benjemani, na msuwo wa Dani." 
Ezekiel48:33 “Kukhundu yakumwera, ile ulaphiache ndi pikwi piwiri na madzana mawiri na makumashanu kunakhala misuwo mitatu: Msuwo wa Simioni, msuwo wa Isakara na msuwo wa Zebuloni." 
Ezekiel48:34 “Kukhundu yakumadokero dzuwa, ile ulaphiache ndi pikwi piwiri na madzana mawiri na makumashanu kunakhala misuwo mitatu: Msuwo wa Gadi, msuwo wa Asheri na msuwo wa Nafitali." 
Ezekiel48:35 “Nsinzo wache kuzungulira mbuto yonseneyo ndi mathanyo pikwi pifemba. Natenepo dzina ya mzindawo kutomera ndzidzi wenewo kwenda m'tsogolo inachemerwa: ‘MBUYA-Ali-Pano.’ ” 
Daniel1:1 Chaka chachitatu Yehoiakimu mbali mfumu wa Yuda, Nebukadinezara, mfumu wa ku Babiloni adachita nkhondo na Yerusalemu mbazungulira mzindawo." 
Daniel1:2 Mbuya adamtawirisa kuphata Mfumu Yehoiakimu, pontho kukwata pyombo pinango pya ku Nyumba ya Mulungu. Penepi adenda napyo ku Babiloni mbakapiikha m'subi yakukoyeramo pinthu m'nyumba yakupembedzeramo milungu yache." 
Daniel1:3 Kubuluka penepo mfumu adapanga Ashipenazi, thubu wamkulu, kusankhula aphale anango pakati pa Aisraele akhadakwatwa unyaperezo ale, akubulukira m'banja yachifumu, pontho m'mabanja achilemedzo." 
Daniel1:4 Aphalewo adathema kukhala akusowa chilema, akubalika, anzeru, akufunza mwadidi, akuvesa pinthu, pontho akukwana kuphata basa m'nyumba yachifumu. Ashipenazi ndiye adathema kuafunzisa kuwerenga na kulemba chilongero cha ku Babiloni." 
Daniel1:5 Mfumu adalonga kuti nsiku na nsiku iwo adathema kupaswa pyakudya na vinyu kubulukira pa thebulu ya mfumu. Iwo adathema kufunziswa pyaka pitatu, kubuluka penepo kudzeswa pamaso pa mfumu dzamtumikira." 
Daniel1:6 Pakati pa anthu adasankhulwa ale pakhali anango akubulukira ku Yuda: Daniele, Hanania, Mishaele na Azaria." 
Daniel1:7 Mkadamu wa mathubu ale adaatchandula madzinawo ninga tenepa: Daniele adamtchandula Beleteshazara, Hanania adamtchandula Shadraki, Mishaele adamtchandula Meshaki, pontho Azaria adamtchandula Abedenego." 
Daniel1:8 Daniele adanyerezera kukhonda kupiswipisa yekha ene pakudya na kumwa pya kunyumba ya mfumu, pinthu pyokhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu pile. Tenepo iye adapempha Ashipenazi kuti amtawirise kuchita tenepo." 
Daniel1:9 Mulungu adachitisa Ashipenazi kukomera mtima pontho kuvera nsisi Daniele. 
Daniel1:10 Kwache Ashipenazi adalonga kuna Daniele mbati, “Ine ndikugopa mbuya mfumu, ule apereka pyakudya na pyakumwa pyakuthemerana na imwepo. Thangwi yache ninji iwe uli nkhong'o-nkhong'o na anzako anangowa? Penepo mfumu anati andiphe thangwi ya penepyo.”" 
Daniel1:11 Tenepo Daniele adalonga kuna mkadamu, adaikha Ashipenazi kuyang'anira Daniele, Hanania, Mishaele na Azaria ule mbati," 
Daniel1:12 “Ndaphata miyendo, tiyeseni nsiku khumi. Tipaseni muliwo wa masamba okhokha na madzi akumwa." 
Daniel1:13 Tenepo tisiyaniseni na aphale anadya pyakudya pyachifumuwa mbamuchite kuna ife malingana na munafuna dzationera imwe.” 
Daniel1:14 Iye adatawira kuayesa nsiku khumi. 
Daniel1:15 Tenepo pidakwana nsiku khumi, iwo adaoneka a manungo amphamvu pontho akumusira kupiringana aphale onsene akhadya pyakudya pyachifumu ale." 
Daniel1:16 Natenepo mkadamu ule adabulusa pyakudya pyadidi na vinyu pile pidathema iwo kudya na kumwa, m'mbuto mwache adaapasa muliwo wa masamba okhokha." 
Daniel1:17 Mulungu adapasa amuna anayi ale udziwisi na luso, pontho nzeru pamabukhu akusiyana-siyana na papifunziso pyonsene, kwache Daniele Mulungu adampasa luso yakuthumbusula masomphenya na ndoto pya mtundu onsene." 
Daniel1:18 Pakumala kwa pyaka pitatu, ndzidzi udatonga mfumu ule kuti adzeswe pamaso pache, Ashipenazi adenda na amuna ale kuna Mfumu Nebukadinezara." 
Daniel1:19 Mfumu adalonga nawo onsenewo, mbwenye Daniele, Hanania, Mishaele na Azaria adachitisa mfumu kukomerwa pyakwanga kupiringana anango onsene ale. Tenepo iwo adasanduka anyakutumikira mfumu." 
Daniel1:20 Podi kwene mfumu avunze pyache mvunzo wakunensa tani, penu akhale na nyatwa yakutani, amuna anayiwa adaoneka anzeru kakhumi kupiringana anyakuombedza penu anyamatsenga onsene a muufumuwo." 
Daniel1:21 Daniele adathimiza kukhala kunyumba ya mfumu mpakana chaka chakutoma cha utongi wa Kirusi mfumu wa Peresia. 
Daniel2:1 Chaka chachiwiri Nebukadinezara mbali mfumu, adalota ndoto. Ndotozo zidamsanyisa pyakwanga pene mwakuti hadaone nazo chitulo tayu," 
Daniel2:2 natenepo adachemeresa mapungu ache anyakuombedza, anyamatsenga, mfiti na anyakulotera kuti amthumbusulire ndoto zache zile. Pidadza iwo onsene mbaimira pamaso pa mfumu," 
Daniel2:3 iye adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ine ndikusanyika mumtima na ndoto zalota ine. Chinafuna ine nkhudziwa kuti ndotozo zikulonganji basi.”" 
Daniel2:4 Mapungu a mfumu ale adatawira mfumuyo m'Chiaramu mbati, “Mfumu mbakhale na moyo kwenda na kwenda! Ngatipangeni ndoto zanuzo, tenepo ife tinakuthumbusulirani.”" 
Daniel2:5 Mfumu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ine ndanyerezera kuti mundipange ndoto zalota ine, kubuluka penepo mundipange kuti ndotozo zikulonganji. Ngakhala imwe munachimwana kuchita tenepo, munati mugwandwe nthuli-nthuli mbandichitisa misanu kusanduka madembe." 
Daniel2:6 Kwache mungandipanga ndotozo, pontho kundithumbusulira kuti zikulonganji, penepo ndinakufupani na mitukwa, pontho na chilemedzo chikulu. Natenepo ngandipangeni ndotozo, pontho kundithumbusulira kuti zikulonganji.”" 
Daniel2:7 Iwo adatawira kachiwiri kache mbati, “Mfumu, ngakhala imwe munatipanga ndotozo, ife tinakwanisa kuzithumbusula.”" 
Daniel2:8 Penepo mfumu adatawira mbati, “Ndimomwene anachita imwe ndi masalapita, thangwi mukudzindikira kuti penepi ndiye pyanyerezera ine." 
Daniel2:9 Mungakhonda kundipanga ndotozo munati mupione pinafuna buluka m'mabondo mwanu. Imwe mwapangana kundipanga pinthu pyakunama pontho pyapezi-pezi kunyerezera kuti mwinango pinthu pinachinja. Tenepo mungandipanga ndotozo, ine ndinapidziwa kuti imwe munakwanisa kuzithumbusula.”" 
Daniel2:10 Mapungu a mfumu ale adamtawira mfumu mbati, “Nkhabe munthu padziko yapansi anakwanisa kuchita pinafuna imwepyo tayu. Nkhabe tayu mfumu, chipo nee munthu wakuveka penu wamphamvu adapempha chinthu ninga chenechi kuna anyakuombedza, anyamatsenga, penu mfiti tayu." 
Daniel2:11 Pinapempha imwe mfumu mphyakunensa pyakwanga mwakuti nkhabe na mbodzi ene anakwanisa kukupangani tayu, kupambula milungu; apo milunguyo nkhabe khala pakati pa anthu tayu.”" 
Daniel2:12 Na mafala enewa mfumu adazhangali pyakwanga mbatonga kuti mapungu onsene a mfumu mu Babiloni amale phiwa. 
Daniel2:13 Natenepo matongerowo adaperekwa kuti mapungu a mfumu aphiwe, pontho amuna adatumwa kasaka-saka Daniele na ashamwali ache ene kuti aphiwe." 
Daniel2:14 Kubuluka penepo Daniele adenda kuna Arioki, mkadamu wa anyakulondali mfumu, ule akhadatongwa kupha mapungu a mfumu. Iye adalonga naye mwanzeru pontho mphole-mphole" 
Daniel2:15 kumvunza thangwi idachitisa mfumu kupereka matongero avinga ninga enewa. Tenepo Arioki adampanga Daniele pikhadachitika pile. 
Daniel2:16 Kabodzi kene Daniele adenda kuna mfumu kampempha kuti ampase ndzidzi kuti athumbusule ndoto zachezo. 
Daniel2:17 Tenepo Daniele adenda kwawo mbakapangambo ashamwali ache, Hanania, Mishaele na Azaria pikhadachitika pile." 
Daniel2:18 Iye adaapanga kuti apemphere kuna Mulungu wa kudzulu kuti aavere nsisi, pontho kupempha kuti atchulule pinthu pyakubisikapi kuna iwo, towera aleke pherwa kubodzi kwene na mapungu a mfumu a mu Babiloni." 
Daniel2:19 Na mosiku mwache Mulungu adatchulula pyakubisika pile kuna Daniele kumasomphenya, tenepo iye adakuza Mulungu wa kudzulu mbati," 
Daniel2:20 “Mbikuzwe dzina ya Mulungu kwenda na kwenda; nzeru pontho mphamvu mphyache. 
Daniel2:21 Iye ambatonga pyakuchitika padziko yapansi; iye ambapitisa pampando mafumu, pontho ambaabulusa pampandopo. Iye ambapereka nzeru kuna anyanzeru mbapasa udziwisi kuna anyakuvesa pinthu." 
Daniel2:22 Iye ambatchulula pinthu pyakuzwika pontho pyakubisika; iye ambadziwa pimbachitika mumdima, pontho cheza chili muna iye." 
Daniel2:23 Ndinapereka takhuta kuna imwe, pontho ndinakukuzani, imwe Mulungu wa makolo athu. Imwe mwandipasa nzeru na mphamvu; imwe mwatidziwisa pinthu pyakupemphani ife; imwe mwatitchululira ndoto za mfumu.”" 
Daniel2:24 Kubuluka penepo Daniele adenda kuna Arioki, akhadatongwa kupha mapungu a mfumu onsene a mu Babiloni. Iye adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Lekani kuapha. Ndiendeseni kuna mfumu, tenepo ine ndinakampanga kuti ndotozo zikulonganji.”" 
Daniel2:25 Kabodzi kene Arioki adenda na Daniele pamaso pa Mfumu Nebukadinezara mbampanga mfumu mbati, “Ndamgumana munthu pakati pa anyakukwatwa unyaperezo a Chiyuda, ule anakwanisa kukupangani kuti ndoto zanu zikulonganji.”" 
Daniel2:26 Mfumu adalonga kuna Daniele (ule akhachemerwa pontho Beleteshazara) mbati, “Ayi iwe unakwanisa kundipanga ndoto zidalota ine, pontho kundithumbusulira?”" 
Daniel2:27 Daniele adatawira mbati, “Mbuya mfumu, nkhabe mfiti, nyamatsenga, nyakuombedza penu nyakulotera anakwanisa kuthumbusula kuna mfumu pinthu pyakubisika pinafuna imwepyo tayu," 
Daniel2:28 mbwenye pana Mulungu wa kudzulu ule ambatchulula pinthu pyakubisika. Iye akudziwisani pinthu pyonsene pinafuna dzachitika m'tsogolo muno. Chinchino ndinakupangani ndoto zanu, pontho masomphenya adaona imwe pikhagona imwe." 
Daniel2:29 “Pikhagona imwe mfumu, mudalota pya m'tsogolo, tenepo Mulungu nyakutchulula pinthu pyakubisika adakuonesani pinthu pinafuna dzachitika m'tsogolo muno." 
Daniel2:30 Tenepo ndinakupangani pinthu pyakubisika pyatchululwa kuna inepi, nee na thangwi yakuti ndine wanzeru pyakwanga kupiringana munthu unango onsene tayu, mbwenye kuti imwe mfumu mudzindikire kuti ndoto zanu zikulonganji, pontho kuvesa pinthu pili m'manyerezero mwanu." 
Daniel2:31 “Mfumu, imwe mudalota chidzimunthu chaimira pamaso panu, chikulu pyakwanga, chakuyetimira pontho chakugoswa pyakwanga." 
Daniel2:32 Msolo wache udasasanywa na golidi chadi-chadi, gangafuwa na mikono yache pidasasanywa na siliva, pontho chuno chache na ntchafu zache pidasasanywa na nkuwa;" 
Daniel2:33 miyendo yache idasasanywa na simbi, pontho manyalo ache akhali pang'ono simbi pang'ono dongo." 
Daniel2:34 Pikhachiyang'ana imwe, mwala ukulu udatchodoka okha ene, tenepo udagwera pamanyalo a pang'ono simbi pang'ono dongo ale, penepo manyalo ale adavavadika." 
Daniel2:35 Kabodzi kene simbi, dongo, nkuwa, siliva na golidi pidamala peyeka mbapisanduka ninga masundu-sundu pambuwa ndzidzi wa malimwe. Mphepo idapimbulusa mbikhonda siya na nyenyeswa ene. Mwala udagwera chidzimunthu ule, udakula mbusanduka phiri, ile idadzala dziko yonsene yapansi." 
Daniel2:36 “Ndoto zanu zikhali zenezi. Tenepo ndinakupangani kuti ndotozo zikulonganji. 
Daniel2:37 Mfumu, imwe ndimwe wamkulu pakati pa mafumu onsene. Mulungu wa kudzulu akuchitisani kukhala mfumu mbakupasani mphamvu, mboko pontho chilemedzo." 
Daniel2:38 Iye adakuchitisani kukhala mtongi wa anthu onsene a padziko yonsene yapansi, pontho adakupasani utongi pana nyama na mbalame zene. Imwe mwakhala ninga msolo wa golidi ule." 
Daniel2:39 “Mungabuluka imwe, panabwera mfumu unango nee wamkulu kupiringana imwe tayu. Kubuluka weneyo panabwera unango wachitatu, ufumu wa nkuwa, ule anatonga dziko yonsene yapansi." 
Daniel2:40 Kubuluka weneyo panabwera unango wachinayi, mfumu wamphamvu pyakwanga ninga simbi, ile imbavunga na kuswa pinthu. Tenepo ninga mumbavungira simbi pinthu, iye anavunga na kupwetedza mafumu onsene akutoma ale." 
Daniel2:41 Imwe mudaona pontho manyalo na pyala kuti pikhali pang'ono simbi pang'ono dongo. Penepi pikulonga kuti ufumuwo unagawikana. Kwache unakhala na mphamvu za simbi pang'ono, ninga mudapionera imwe simbi kuvungazikana na dongo." 
Daniel2:42 Pyala pile pikhali pang'ono simbi pang'ono dongo, nkhulonga kuti khundu ibodzi ya ufumu inakhala yamphamvu, khundu inangomboyo mbikhala yakusowa mphamvu." 
Daniel2:43 Ninga mudaonera imwe simbi kuvungazikana na dongo, penepa nkhulonga kuti atongi muufumu wenewo anayesera kuphatizana pakusemberana, kwache iwo nkhabe dzakwanisa kuphatizana tayu, ninga montho mumbachitira simbi na dongo kukhonda vungazikana." 
Daniel2:44 Pandzidzi wa mafumu enewo, Mulungu wa kudzulu anakhazikisa ufumu ule nkhabe dzamala tayu. Iwo nkhabe dzakundwa tayu, mbwenye unavunga monsene mwene mafumu anango onsene mbukhalapo kwenda na kwenda." 
Daniel2:45 Imwe mudaona mule mudatchodokera mwala okha ene, nee na manja a munthu tayu, pontho mule mudapwetedzera iwo dzimunthu wakusasanywa na simbi, nkuwa, dongo, siliva na golidi ule. Mulungu wamkulu akukupangani imwe mfumu pinthu pinafuna dzachitika m'tsogolo. Ine ndakupangani mwakuonadi ndoto zanu mbandikuthumbusulirani pyakuona pyokhokha.”" 
Daniel2:46 Tenepo Mfumu Nebukadinezara adalamba pamaso pa Daniele pontho mbamulemedza mbatonga kuti nsembe na pyakupereka piperekwe kuna Daniele. 
Daniel2:47 Mfumu adalonga kuna Daniele mbati, “Mulungu wako ngwamkulu kupiringana milungu yonsene, MBUYA wa mafumu pontho nyakudziwa kutchulula pinthu pyakubisika. Ine ndadziwa penepi, thangwi iwe wakwanisa kuthumbusula pyakubisika penepi.”" 
Daniel2:48 Tenepo iye adampasa Daniele chidzo chikulu chene mbamuunjikira mitukwa yadidiletu. Padzulu pache adamuikha kukhala mtongi wa dziko yonsene ya Babiloni, pontho kukhala mkadamu wa mapungu onsene a mfumu." 
Daniel2:49 Mfumu adaikha Shadraki, Meshaki na Abedenego kukhala anyakufambisa boma ya Babiloni malingana na kupempha kudachita Daniele kuna mfumu; kwache Daniele adathimiza basi kukhala kunyumba yachifumu." 
Daniel3:1 Mfumu Nebukadinezara adasasanya mfanikizo wa golidi kulapha kwache kukhali makhono makumawiri na anomwe, pontho manungo ache ukhali nenene makhono matatu. Iye adautchimika m'phedi ya Dura m'dziko ya Babiloni." 
Daniel3:2 Tenepo mfumu adapereka matongero kuti mathubu ache onsene adze pabodzi pene, atongi, akulu a boma, mapungu, anyakukoya kobiri, anyakutonga miseru na atsanthemba, na akulu-akulu anango onsene a muufumu wache. Iwo adenda kumwambo wakupambulira mfanikizo udatchimika Mfumu Nebukadinezara ule." 
Daniel3:3 Pidamala gumanyikana mathubu onsene ale kuchita mwambo wakupambulira mfanikizo ule, pontho kuimira kutsogolo kwa mfanikizo ule," 
Daniel3:4 nyakulalika adagaluza fala kulonga kuna anthu mbati, “Anthu a madzinza onsene, mtundu onsene pontho chilongero chonsene mukutongwa kuti:" 
Daniel3:5 Sindzidzi imwe nkhuva kulira kwa ngoma, chitoliro, bangwe, nyakatangale, malimba na ng'oma, pontho na chakuimbira chinango cha mtundu onsene, imwe mwathema kulamba kupembedza mfanikizo wa golidi watchimika Mfumu Nebukadinezara ule." 
Daniel3:6 Munthu onsene anakhonda kulambayo anaponywa kabodzi kene m'dzenje yakuyerima moto.” 
Daniel3:7 Natenepo, sindzidzi iwo nkhuva kulira kwa ngoma, chitoliro, bangwe, nyakatangale, valimba na ng'oma, pontho na chakuimbira chinango cha mtundu onsene, anthu a madzinza onsene, mtundu onsene, pontho chilongero chonsene akhalamba kupembedza mfanikizo wa golidi udatchimika Mfumu Nebukadinezarawu." 
Daniel3:8 Pandzidzi wenewu anthu anango a ku Babiloni adagumana mwayi wakusumira Ayuda. 
Daniel3:9 Iwo adalonga kuna Mfumu Nebukadinezara mbati, “Dondowe Mfumu!" 
Daniel3:10 Imwe mudapereka matongero akuti sindzidzi munthu nkhuva kulira kwa chakuimbira cha mtundu onsene, iye athema kulamba kupembedza mfanikizo wa golidi," 
Daniel3:11 pontho kuti munthu onsene anakhonda lamba kupembedzayo anaponywa m'dzenje yakuyerima moto. 
Daniel3:12 Mbwenye pana Ayuda anango adaikha imwe kuyang'anira nthemba zinango m'dziko ya Babiloni muno: Shadraki, Meshaki na Abedenego, ale nkhabe ikha konta matongero adapereka imwe mfumu tayu. Iwo nkhabe pembedza milungu yanu, penu kulambira mfanikizo udatchimika imwe ule tayu.”" 
Daniel3:13 Mfumu Nebukadinezara adazhangali pyakwanga mbatonga kuti amuna atatu ale adzeswe pamaso pache.
