Daniel3:14 Iye adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Shadraki, Meshaki na Abedenego, ayi mphyakuona kuti imwe mwakhonda kupembedza milungu yanga, pontho kukhonda lambira mfanikizo udatchimika ine ule?" 
Daniel3:15 Chinchino sindzidzi imwe nkhuva kulira kwa ngoma, chitoliro, bangwe, malimba, nyakatangale na ng'oma, pontho na chakuimbira chinango cha mtundu onsene, imwe mwathema kulambira na kupembedza mfanikizo. Ngakhala imwe nkhabe chita tenepo tayu, munati muponywe kabodzi na kabodzi m'dzenje yakuyerima moto. Penepo mbani mulungu wacheyo anafuna kukuombolani m'manja mwanga?”" 
Daniel3:16 Shadraki, Meshaki na Abedenego adamtawira mfumu mbati, “Mfumu, ife nkhabe funa kuyesera kupitchinjiriza tekha ene pamseru wenewu tayu." 
Daniel3:17 Mulungu anatumikira ifeyu ndiye anakwanisa kutipulumusa kudzenje ya moto, pontho m'manja mwanu mfumu." 
Daniel3:18 Mbwenye ngakhala iye hanapichita tayu, ife tinafuna mupidziwe kuti na kutani kwene ife nkhabe tumikira milungu yanu, penu kupembedza mfanikizo wa golidi udatchimika imwe ule tayu.”" 
Daniel3:19 Penepo Mfumu Nebukadinezara adazhangalira Shadraki, Meshaki na Abedenego mbaatuzulira maso. Iye adatonga kuti dzenje ya moto iseserwe kanomwe kupiringana nsiku zonsene" 
Daniel3:20 mbatonga anyankhondo ache amphamvuletu kumanga Shadraki, Meshaki na Abedenego mbaaponya m'dzenje yakuyerima moto ile." 
Daniel3:21 Natenepo amuna enewa uku avala mikhanjo, mabuluku na pipewu, pontho na nguwo zinango, adamangwa mbaponywa m'dzenje yakuyerima moto." 
Daniel3:22 Na thangwi yakuti mfumu akhali na shungu pyakwanga adachitisa motowo kupisa pyakwanga mwakuti mbebe wa motowo udapisa anyankhondo adaponya Shadraki, Meshaki na Abedenego m'dzenje ya moto ale," 
Daniel3:23 tenepo amuna atatu ale uku amangwa mwadidi mwene adagwera m'dzenje yakuyerima moto mule. 
Daniel3:24 Kabodzi kene Mfumu Nebukadinezara adalamuka mwakudodoma mbavunza mapungu ache mbati, “Ayi ife sidaamange anthu atatu mbatiaponyera m'dzenje ya motomu tayu?” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Ande ndimomwene, mfumu.”" 
Daniel3:25 Iye adavunza mbati, “Apo thangwi yache ninji ndikuona amuna anayi akufamba-famba m'motomo? Iwo hadamangwe tayu, pontho nee na kupya kwene tayu; munthu wachinayi ache akuoneka ninga mwana milungu.”" 
Daniel3:26 Tenepo Mfumu Nebukadinezara adenda kumsuwo wa dzenje yakuyerima moto mbachemera mbati, “Shadraki, Meshaki na Abedenego! Anyabasa a Mulungu Wakudzulu-dzulu, bulukanimo.” Tenepo iwo adabulukamo kabodzi kene." 
Daniel3:27 Penepo atongi, akulu a boma, mapungu na mathubu anango a mfumu adagumanyikana dzaona amuna atatu, ale hadapye na pang'ono pene na moto ule tayu. Tsisi yawo hidavulike, penu nguwo zawo kupya tayu; iwo nee akhanunkha na utsi ene tayu." 
Daniel3:28 Penepo Mfumu Nebukadinezara adalonga mbati, “Mbakuzwe Mulungu wa Shadraki, Meshaki na Abedenego, ule atumiza mngelo wache dzapulumusa anyabasache! Iwo adamnyindira mbakhonda vera matongero anga, pontho adatawira kutaya moyo wawo kusiyana na kutumikira, penu kupembedza milungu inango pambali pa Mulungu wawo." 
Daniel3:29 Natenepo ndikutonga kuti ngakhala munthu onsene wa dzinza yonsene, wa mtundu onsene, penu chilongero cha mtundu onsene anatikana Mulungu wa Shadraki, Meshaki na Abedenego, weneyo athema kugwandwa nthuli-nthuli, pontho musache mbusanduke madembe. Nkhabe mulungu unango anakwanisa kupulumusa ninga tenepa tayu.”" 
Daniel3:30 Tenepo mfumu adapasa chidzo chikulu chene kuna Shadraki, Meshaki na Abedenego m'dziko ya Babiloni." 
Daniel4:1 Mfumu Nebukadinezara adatumiza mphangwa kuna anthu a madzinza onsene, mtundu onsene na chilongero chonsene padziko yonsene yapansi mbati, “Mwenyikiro!" 
Daniel4:2 Ndakomerwa pyakwanga kukupangani pya pidzindikiro na pyakudodomesa pyandionesera Mulungu Wakudzulu-dzulu. 
Daniel4:3 “Mphikulu pyakwanga pidzindikiro pyache; mphyamphamvu pyakwanga pyakudodomesa pyache! Ufumu wache ngokhonda mala; utongi wache ngwakwenda na kwenda kubulukira mfendu mpakana mfendu unango. 
Daniel4:4 “Ine Nebukadinezara, ndikhakhala pyanga kunyumba yachifumu wakukomerwa, mwenemo pinthu pyanga pikundifambira mwadidi." 
Daniel4:5 Kwache ndidalota ndoto zakuchitisa mantha, pontho ndidaona masomphenya akugoswa pikhagona ine patalimba panga." 
Daniel4:6 Ine ndidachemeresa mapungu onsene a mu Babiloni kudza pamaso panga, towera andipange kuti ndotozo zikulonganji." 
Daniel4:7 Tenepo anyakuombedza, anyamatsenga, mfiti na anyakulotera onsene akhadadzeswa pamaso panga. Ine ndidaapanga ndoto zile, kwache iwo adachimwana kuzithumbusula." 
Daniel4:8 Pakumalisira pache Daniele adadza pamaso panga, tenepo ine ndidampanga ndoto zanga zile. (Iye ambadziwika pontho na dzina yakuti Beleteshazara, dzina ya milungu yanga, pontho ule mzimu wa milungu yakuchena uli muna iye.)" 
Daniel4:9 Ine ndidalonga kuna iye kuti: Beleteshazara, mkadamu wa anyakuombedza, ine ndimbapidziwa kuti mzimu wa milungu yakuchena uli muna iwe, pontho kuti iwe umbadziwa pyakubisika pyonsene. Ndoto zanga nsizi, tenepo ngandipange kuti zikulonganji." 
Daniel4:10 “Pikhagona ine patalimba panga, ndidaona kumasomphenya muti ukulu pyakwanga pakati na kati pa dziko. Mutiwo ukhali wakulapha pyakwanga." 
Daniel4:11 Muti ule udakula pyakwanga, pontho ukhali wamphamvu mwakuti nsonga yache idaphata thambo mbukwanisa kuoniwa na munthu onsene padziko yapansi." 
Daniel4:12 Masambache akhali akubalika pyakwanga, pontho ukhali na nsapo zizinji pyakwanga zakukwana kudyesa anthu onsene a padziko yapansi. Nyama zam'tsanga zikhapuma pamthunzi wache, mbalame zidamanga pisa pyawo mwenemo, pontho chinthu chonsene cha moyo chikhadya nsapo zache." 
Daniel4:13 “Kuchitulo konthoko kumasomphenya, ndidayang'ana mbandiona nyamphangwa, nyakuchena, akudza kubulukira kudzulu." 
Daniel4:14 Iye adalonga mwakugaluza fala mbati, ‘Gwanda mutiwo mbukadze nthambi zachezo; sadzula masambache mbumwaze-mwaze nsapo zache. Thamangisa nyama zili pansi pachezo, pontho na mbalame zili m'mutiwo." 
Daniel4:15 Kwache siya chitsa na mitsisi yache ene, pile pyamangwa na mthimbalimba wa simbi na nkuwa. Chisiye m'mundamo pakati pa maudzu. “‘Muleke anyontholerwe na bume, pontho muleke akhale pyache pakati pa nyama na pyakumera." 
Daniel4:16 Manyerezero ache aumunthu mbasanduzwe kukhala aunyama mpakana pyaka pinomwe pimale. 
Daniel4:17 Penepi ndiye pinthu pidalonga anyamphangwa akuchena, towera anthu apidziwe kuti Mulungu Wakudzulu-dzulu ndi mtongi wa maufumu a anthu mbapereka ufumu kuna munthu onsene anafuna iye, podi na kuna anthu okhonda funika ene.’" 
Daniel4:18 “Ndoto zidalota ine, Mfumu Nebukadinezara, nsenezi. Tenepo Beleteshazara ngandipange pinalonga ndoto zenezi. Nee mbodzi wa mapungu anga akwanisa kuzithumbusula tayu, mbwenye iwe unakwanisa kuzithumbusula, thangwi mzimu wa milungu yakuchena uli muna iwe.”" 
Daniel4:19 Penepa Daniele, ule akhadziwika pontho na dzina yakuti Beleteshazara, adaswipa mtima ndzidzi ene mbaphatwa na mantha. Mfumu adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Beleteshazara ndotozi na pinalonga izo mbapileke kukuchitisa mantha.” Beleteshazara adalonga mbati, “Mfumu ndikhapifuna pyakwanga kuti ndoto zenezi mbamudazilotera anyamalwanu nee imwe tayu." 
Daniel4:20 Muti udaona imwe ule, udakula mbukhala wamphamvu mwakuti nsonga yache idaphata thambo mbukwanisa kuoniwa na munthu onsene padziko yapansi." 
Daniel4:21 Masambache akhali akubalika pyakwanga, pontho ukhali na nsapo zizinji zakukwanisa kudyesa dziko yonsene yapansi. Nyama zam'tsanga zikhapuma pamthunzi wache, mbalame zikhamanga pisa m'nthambi zache." 
Daniel4:22 “Muti wenewu ndimwe ene mfumu. Imwe mwasanduka wamkulu, pontho wamphamvu. Kuveka kwanu kwafika kuthambo, pontho mphamvu zanu zafalikira konsene kwene padziko yapansi." 
Daniel4:23 Mfumu, pikhaona imwe nyamphangwa wakuchena akudza kubulukira kudzulu mbalonga kuna imwe mbati, ‘Gwanda mutiwo mbuuvunge, kwache usiye chitsa chache, chile chamangwa na mthimbalimba wa simbi na nkuwa, m'mundamo pakati pa maudzu. Munthuyo mbanyontholerwe na bume, pontho mbakhale pyache ninga nyama zam'tsanga pyaka pinomwe.’" 
Daniel4:24 “Mfumu, ndotozo zikulonga tenepa, pontho matongero apereka Mulungu Wakudzulu-dzulu kupokanyisana na mbuya mfumu ngakuti:" 
Daniel4:25 Imwe munabuluswa pakati pa anthu mbamukhala pakati pa nyama zam'tsanga; munadya maudzu ninga ng'ombe mbamunyontholerwa na bume pyaka pinomwe. Kubuluka penepo imwe munatawira kuti Mulungu Wakudzulu-dzulu ndi mtongi wa maufumu onsene mbaupereka kuna munthu onsene anafuna iyeyo, podi na kuna anthu okhonda funika ene." 
Daniel4:26 Nyamphangwa wakuchena ule adalonga kuti chitsa na mitsitsi yache pisiyiwe, nkhulonga kuti ufumu wanu unabwezerwa pontho kuna imwe mungatawira kuti Mulungu wa kudzulu ndi mtongi wa dziko yonsene." 
Daniel4:27 Natenepo mfumu chitani pinafuna ine kukupangani. Lekani pyakudawa pyanu mbamuchite pyakulungama. Lekani kupondereza anyakutcherenga. Penepo pinthu pyanu pinathimiza kukufambirani mwadidi.” 
Daniel4:28 Pyonsenepi pidachitikadi kuna Mfumu Nebukadinezara. 
Daniel4:29 Pidagwanda kwene miyezi khumi na miwiri basi, pikhathamula mfumu miyendo pansoyi ya nyumbache mu Babiloni," 
Daniel4:30 iye adalonga mbati, “Ngayang'anani kukula kwachita Babiloni! Ine ndidaumanga mzinda ukulu ninga wenewu kuonesa mphamvu na mboko zanga, demelero yanga na ufumu wanga.”" 
Daniel4:31 Iye mbadzati bulusa fala, padaveka fala yakubulukira kudzulu kulonga kuti, “Mfumu Nebukadinezara vesera pinalonga inepi! Mphamvu zako zachifumu zapokoserwa." 
Daniel4:32 Iwe unabuluswa pakati pa anthu mbukakhala pakati pa nyama zam'tsanga; unadya maudzu ninga ng'ombe pyaka pinomwe. Penepo iwe unadzindikira kuti Mulungu Wakudzulu-dzulu ndi mtongi wa maufumu onsene mbaupereka kuna munthu onsene anafuna iyeyo!” 
Daniel4:33 Kabodzi na kabodzi pyonsene pidalongwa pya Nebukadinezara pidachitika. Iye adabuluswa pakati pa anthu mbadya maudzu ninga ng'ombe. Manungo ache adanyontholerwa na bume mpakana tsisi yache idasanduka ninga manthenga a mphamba, pontho ngole zache zidasanduka ninga pyala pya mbalame." 
Daniel4:34 Tenepo mfumu adalonga mbati, “Pidagwanda pyaka pyonsene pinomwe, ine Nebukadinezara ndidakwiza maso anga kudzulu, pontho umunthu wanga udabwereramo. Tenepo ndidakuza Mulungu Wakudzulu-dzulu; ine ndidapereka chilemedzo na demelero kuna nyakukhala na moyo okhonda mala ule. “Utongi wache ngokhonda mala; ufumu wache ngwakwenda na kwenda kubulukira mfendu mpakana mfendu unango." 
Daniel4:35 Anthu onsene a padziko yapansi kuna iye si pinthu tayu. Iye ambachita pinafuna iye kuna angelo a kudzulu pontho na kuna anthu a padziko yapansi. Nkhabe na mbodzi ene anakwanisa kumkhondesa pinthu, penu kulonga kuna iye kuti, ‘Pyachita imwepi ninji?’" 
Daniel4:36 “Pidabwereramo umunthu wanga, na ndzidzi onthowo chilemedzo changa na demelero ya ufumu wanga pidabwezerwa kuna ine. Mapungu anga na mathubu anga adanditambira mwadidi. Tenepo ndidabwezerwa pampando wanga wachifumu mbandisanduka wamkulu pyakwanga kupiringana pakutoma pale." 
Daniel4:37 “Natenepo ine, Nebukadinezara, ndikukuza, kulemedza na kupereka demelero kuna Mfumu wa kudzulu, thangwi pyonsene pimbachita iye mphyakulungama, pontho njira zache nsachilungamo, pontho iye anakwanisa kuchepesa anyakutumbama onsene.”" 
Daniel5:1 Mfumu Beleshazara adasasanyira mathubu ache chikwi phwando ikulu, tenepo iye adamwa vinyu pabodzi pene nawo." 
Daniel5:2 Pikhamwa Beleshazara vinyu wache, iye adatonga kuti makhomitcho agolidi na asiliva, pontho na ndilo zidakwata babache Nebukadinezara m'Nyumba ya MBUYA mu Yerusalemu pidzeswe pamaso pache, towera mfumu, mathubu ache, akazache na akazache achibitchu apimwere vinyu." 
Daniel5:3 Kabodzi kene makhomitcho na ndilo pile pidadzeswa mwenemo, tenepo mfumu na mathubu ache, akazache na akazache achibitchu adapimwera." 
Daniel5:4 Pikhamwa iwo vinyu, iwo adakuza milungu yakusasanywa na siliva, golidi na nkuwa, simbi, matabwa pontho miyala." 
Daniel5:5 Vumbu-vumbu dzanja ninga ya munthu idaoneka mbitoma kulemba pafufu chifupi na pachakuikhirapo nyale m'nyumba yachifumu. Mfumu adayang'ana pikhalemba dzanja pile. 
Daniel5:6 Nkhope yache idabuluka kaluma mbaphatwa na mantha pikulu pene mwakuti mabondo ache adatoma kugedemera. 
Daniel5:7 Iye adagaluza fala kuchemera anyamatsenga, anyakukhumira na anyakulotera kuti adze mwenemo. Pidapita iwo mwenemo iye adalonga kuna mapungu ale mbati, “Munthu ule anakwanisa kuwerenga mafala enewa mbandipanga kuti mafalawo akulonganji, anavazikwa mkhanjo wamsuzi wanyemba mbavazikwa mkufu wa golidi m'khosi mwache, pontho anakhala wachitatu kutonga muufumu.”" 
Daniel5:8 Kubuluka penepo mapungu onsene a mfumu adapita mwenemo, kwache iwo adachimwana kuwerenga pidalembwa pafufu pile, penu kupanga mfumu kuti mafalawo akulonganji." 
Daniel5:9 Mfumu Beleshazara adanyanyiratu kugoswerwa, pontho nkhope yache ndiye idanyanyiratu kubuluka kaluma. Tenepo mathubu ache adasowa chakuchita." 
Daniel5:10 Pidava mache mfumu kulonga-longa kukhachita mfumu na mathubu ache kule adapita m'subi mukhadyerwa phwando mule. Iye adalonga mbati, “Dondowe mfumu! Lekani chita mantha. Nkhope mbileke buluka kaluma." 
Daniel5:11 Muufumu mwanu muno muna munthu ule ana mzimu wa milungu yakuchena. Babanu mbali mfumu, munthu weneyu adaoneka kuti akhali waudziwisi, wakuvesa pinthu, pontho wanzeru ninga nzeru za milungu. Tenepo babanu, Mfumu Nebukadinezara, adamsankhula kukhala mkadamu wa anyakuombedza, anyamatsenga, mfiti na anyakulotera onsene." 
Daniel5:12 Munthu weneyu Daniele, ule mfumu adamtchandula Beleteshazara adaoneka ninga nyaudziwisi, nyanzeru pontho nyakuvesa pinthu, pontho nyakukwanisa kuthumbusula ndoto, kufuthula nthanthi pontho kudziwa pinthu pyakubisika. Tenepo chemeresani Daniele, tenepo iye anakupangani kuti pyalembwa penepapi pikulonganji.”" 
Daniel5:13 Natenepo Daniele adadzeswa pamaso pa mfumu, tenepo mfumu adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ayi ndiwe Daniele, munthu adadzesa babanga ninga nyaperezo kubulukira ku Yuda ule." 
Daniel5:14 Ine ndava kuti mzimu wa milungu yakuchena ili muna iwe, pontho kuti ndiwe nyakuvesa pinthu, nyaudziwisi pontho nyanzeru pikulu." 
Daniel5:15 Mapungu na anyakukhumira adadza muno dzawerenga pidalembwa pafufu pile, pontho kundipanga kuti pikulonganji. Kwache iwo adapichimwana." 
Daniel5:16 Mbwenye ine ndava kuti iwe umbakwanisa kuthumbusula ndoto, pontho kudziwa pinthu pyakubisika. Ngakhala iwe unakwanisa kuwerenga mafala enewa mbundipanga kuti pikulonganji, iwe unavazikwa mkhanjo wamsuzi wanyemba na mkufu wagolidi m'khosi mwako, pontho unakhala wachitatu kutonga muufumu mwanga.”" 
Daniel5:17 Daniele adatawira mbati, “Imwe munakwanisa kukoya pyanu mitukwayo, penu kuipasa munthu unango ene. Kwache ine ndinakuwerengerani pyalembwa penepapi mbandikupangani kuti pikulonganji." 
Daniel5:18 “Mulungu Wakudzulu-dzulu adaikha babanu Nebukadinezara kukhala mfumu wamkulu mbampasa chilemedzo na demelero. 
Daniel5:19 Iye akhali mkulu pyakwanga mwakuti anthu a madzinza onsene, mtundu onsene na chilongero chonsene akhamgopa pontho akhatetemera naye. Ngakhala iye akhafuna pyakupha munthu, iye akhapha pyache; ngakhala akhafuna pyakukhonda kumpha, iye nee akhampha tayu. Iye akhalulupisa na kulemedza munthu onsene akhafuna iyeyo." 
Daniel5:20 Mbwenye podi iye adasanduka wakulunkuma, wakuuma mtima pontho wakukala mtima, iye adabuluswa pampando wachifumu mbapokoserwa chilemedzo chache chonsene." 
Daniel5:21 Iye adabuluswa pakati pa anthu, pontho manyerezero ache adasanduzwa aunyama. Iye adakhala pakati pa mabulu am'tsanga mbadya maudzu ninga ng'ombe. Iye adagona pamtetete mbapasowa chinango chakumtchinjiriza kuna bume. Pakumalisira pache iye adatawira kuti Mulungu Wakudzulu-dzulu ndi mtongi wa maufumu onsene, pontho ambaupereka kuna munthu onsene anafuna iye." 
Daniel5:22 “Mbwenye imwe mwanache, Beleshazara, nee mwapichepesa mwekha ene tayu, podi kwene kuti imwe mukupidziwa pinthu pyonsenepi." 
Daniel5:23 Imwe mudachita mwakupokanyisana na MBUYA wa kudzulu mbamudza muno na makhomitcho na ndilo pidakwatwa ku Nyumba ya Mulungu. Imwe, mathubu anu, akazanu, na akazanu achibitchu mudapiphatisa basa kumwera vinyu pinthu penepi, pontho imwe mudalemedza milungu yakusasanywa na golidi, siliva, nkuwa, simbi, thabwa na miyala, milungu ile nkhabe kwanisa kuona, kuva, penu kudziwa pinthu tayu. Imwe nee mudalemedze Mulungu, ule ambakoya moyo wanu m'manja mwache, mbadziwa pyonsene pimbachita imwe ule tayu." 
Daniel5:24 Ndi thangwi yache Mulungu atumiza dzanja yeneyi kulemba mafala enewa. 
Daniel5:25 “Mafala adalembwa ale mbawa: ‘MENE, MENE, TEKELE, PARASINI.’" 
Daniel5:26 Mafala enewa akulonga tenepa: Mene: Mulungu alengesa nsiku za ufumu wanu mbaumalisa; 
Daniel5:27 Tekele: Imwe mwapimwa na mdida mbamugumanwa kuti mwacherewera pyakwanga pene; 
Daniel5:28 Parasini: Ufumu wanu wagawiwa mbuperekwa kuna Amedi na Aperesi.” 
Daniel5:29 Penepo Mfumu Beleshazara adatonga anyabasache kuti avazike Daniele mkhanjo wamsuzi wanyemba wachifumu, pontho kuvazikwa mkufu wa golidi m'khosi mwache. Tenepo iye adapaswa chidzo chakukhala wachitatu muufumu." 
Daniel5:30 Mosiku onthowo Beleshazara, mfumu wa Babiloni, adaphiwa," 
Daniel5:31 natenepo Dariusi wa ku Medi adapita m'mbuto mwache ninga mfumu uku ana pyaka makumatanthatu na piwiri. 
Daniel6:1 Pidamkomera Dariusi kusankhula amuna dzana na makumawiri kukhala akulu a boma muufumu wache onsene. 
Daniel6:2 Padzulu pawo iye adasankhula pontho amuna anango atatu, mbodzi mwa iwo mbakhala Daniele, kukhala atongi kuyang'anira akulu a boma, towera pinthu pya mfumu pifambe mwadidi." 
Daniel6:3 Sindzidzi Daniele adaoneka wakupikwanisa pyakwanga kupiringana atongi anzache awiri ale, pabodzi pene na akulu a boma dzana na makumawiri adasankhulwa ale. Na thangwi ya penepi mfumu adanyerezera kumuikha kukhala mtongi wa ufumu onsene." 
Daniel6:4 Atongi anzache awiri na akulu a boma ale adayesa-yesa kugumana mathangwi akumdawisa nawo Daniele, pa mafambisiro ache a ufumu, kwache iwo adachimwana kugumana na thangwi ene, thangwi Daniele akhali munthu wakukhulupirika, wakuona mtima pontho okhonda funa pyakudyekerwa." 
Daniel6:5 Pakumalisira pache amuna enewa adalonga okha ene mbati, “Ife nkhabe kwanisa tayu kugumana mathangwi akumdawisa nawo tingakhonda phatisa basa pya chipembedzo chache.”" 
Daniel6:6 Tenepo atongi awiri na akulu a boma ale adenda kuna mfumu mbalonga mbati, “Dondowe Mfumu Dariusi!" 
Daniel6:7 Tonsenefe ale timbafambisa ufumu wanu, atongi, akulu a boma, mapungu na mathubu anango onsene taphatizana kuti imwe, Mfumu, muikhe matongero amphamvu mbamutonge kuti munthu na mbodzi ene mbaleke kuaswa. Tongani kuti nsiku makumatatu paleke khala munthu na mbodzi ene wakupempha chinthu kuna mulungu unango, penu kuna munthu ene pyache tayu, kupambula kuna imwe ene basi, Mfumu. Munthu onsene anaswa matongero enewa athema kuponywa m'dzenje ya nkhalamu." 
Daniel6:8 Chinchino, Mfumu, perekani matongero mbamuikhepo chidindo chanu, towera aleke kufudzika malingana na mwambo wa Amedi na Aperesi, ule nkhabe kwanisa kufudzika tayu.”" 
Daniel6:9 Natenepo Mfumu Dariusi adapereka matongero akukhala na chidindo chache ale. 
Daniel6:10 Pidapidziwa Daniele kuti pakhadaperekwa matongero akuchita kulembwa, iye adenda kumusa kwache mbakakwira subi ya m'dzulu, kule mazhanera ache adayang'ana ku Yerusalemu. Ninga mwa nsambo wache iye adagodama pazhanera yakufungula mbapemphera pontho kupereka takhuta kuna Mulungu wache katatu pansiku." 
Daniel6:11 Pidamgumaniza anyamalwache akupemphera, pontho kupempha chiphedzo kuna Mulungu wache," 
Daniel6:12 onsene ale pabodzi pene adenda kuna mfumu kasumira Daniele. Iwo adalonga mbati, “Mfumu, ayi si imwe tayu mudapereka matongero akuchita kulembwa akuti nsiku makumatatu munthu onsene, ule anapempha chinthu kuna mulungu unango, penu kuna munthu unango ene pyache, kupambula imwe ene basi, Mfumu, athema kuponywa m'dzenje ya nkhalamu?” Mfumu adatawira mbati, “Ande, ine ndidapereka matongero amphamvu malingana na mwambo wa Amedi na Aperesi, ule nkhabe kwanisa kufudzika tayu.”" 
Daniel6:13 Iwo adalonga kuna mfumu mbati, “Daniele, ule ndi nyaperezo wa ku Yuda, nkhabe kukuverani tayu, penu kuikha konta tayu matongero akukhala na chidindo chanu adapereka imwe ale. Iye ambathimiza basi kupemphera katatu pansiku.”" 
Daniel6:14 Pidapiva mfumu adasanyika napyo mtima pyakwanga mbayesa-yesa kugumana njira yadidi yakupulumusira nayo Daniele. Iye adathimiza basi kuyesa-yesa kuchita tenepo mpakana dzuwa kuthobila. 
Daniel6:15 Tenepo amuna ale adadza pontho kuna mfumu mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Mfumu kumbukani kuti malingana na mwambo wa Amedi na Aperesi, nkhabe matongero penu mwambo ambapereka mfumu athema kufudzika tayu.”" 
Daniel6:16 Natenepo mfumu adatonga kuti Daniele aponywe m'dzenje ya nkhalamu. Iye adalonga kuna Daniele mbati, “Mulungu wako ambatumikira iwe mwakukhulupirika ule, mbakupulumuse.”" 
Daniel6:17 Mwala udaikhwa kufunga nawo msuwo wa dzenje mbauzweremetha, pontho mfumu adaikha chidindo chache chachifumu, pontho na chidindo cha mathubu ache pamsuwo pale, towera paleke khala munthu na mbodzi ene wakufuna pyakupulumusa Daniele." 
Daniel6:18 Kubuluka penepo mfumu adabwerera kumusa kwache mbakhala mosiku onsene okhonda ona chitulo, penu kudya, pontho okhonda tawira chinthu na chibodzi chene chakumchitisa kukomerwa." 
Daniel6:19 M'makalakwecha mfumu adalamuka mbachimbiza kwenda kudzenje ya nkhalamu ile. 
Daniel6:20 Pidafika iye chifupi na dzenjeyo adachemera Daniele mwakuva nsisi pikulu pene mbati, “Daniele, nyabasa wa Mulungu wamoyo! Ayi Mulungu ambatumikira iwe ule, akwanisa kukupulumusa kuna nkhalamu?”" 
Daniel6:21 Daniele adatawira mbati, “Dondowe mfumu!" 
Daniel6:22 Mulungu wanga adatuma mngelo wache kuphopha kukanwa kwa nkhalamuzi, towera zileke kundikuwaza. Iye achita penepi, thangwi apidziwa kuti ine sidadawe tayu pamaso pache, pontho sidakudawireni tayu, imwe mfumu.”" 
Daniel6:23 Mfumu adakomerwa pyakwanga pene mbatonga kuti Daniele abuluswemo m'dzenje ya nkhalamu ile. Tenepo iwo adambulusa mbaona kuti iye nee hadakuwazike na pang'ono pene tayu, thangwi iye adanyindira Mulungu wache." 
Daniel6:24 Mfumu adatonga kuti amuna onsene akhadasumira Daniele ale aphatwe, iwo ene pabodzi pene na akazawo na anawo mbaponywe m'dzenje ya nkhalamu. Natenepo iwo mbadzati fika pansi pa dzenje ile, nkhalamu zidaanumphira mbiziapwetedza na magogodo ene." 
Daniel6:25 Kubuluka penepo Mfumu Dariusi adalembera kuna anthu a madzinza onsene, mtundu onsene pontho na chilongero chonsene muufumu onsenewo kuti, “Mwenyikiro!" 
Daniel6:26 Ndikupereka matongero muufumu wanga onsene kuti munthu onsene athema kugopa na kupembedza Mulungu wa Daniele. “Thangwi iye ndi Mulungu wamoyo; iye ambatonga kwenda na kwenda. Ufumu wache nkhabe dzavungika na pang'ono pene tayu, pontho mphamvu zache nkhabe dzammalira tayu." 
Daniel6:27 Iye ndi Nyankhombo pontho Dombo; iye ambachita pyakudodomesa pontho pidzindikiro, kudzulu na padziko yapansi pene pano. Iye adapulumusa Daniele kuna mphamvu za nkhalamu.”" 
Daniel6:28 Natenepo Daniele pinthu pyache pyonsene pidamfambira mwadidi pandzidzi wa Mfumu Dariusi, pontho na Kirusi, mfumu wa ku Peresia." 
Daniel7:1 Chaka chakutoma wa Beleshazara mbali mfumu wa Babiloni, Daniele adalota, pontho adaona masomphenya pikhagona iye na mosiku. Ndotozo adazilemba, tenepo pidalota iyepyo pikhali tenepa:" 
Daniel7:2 Ine, Daniele ndidaona kumasomphenya mphepo ikumenya kubulukira makhundu onsene manayi mbivundula madzi a m'bara ikulu." 
Daniel7:3 Pirombo pikulu-pikulu pinayi pidaluthuka m'bara mule, chonsene mbichikhala na makhaliro akusiyana na chinzache." 
Daniel7:4 Chakutoma chikhaoneka ninga nkhalamu, pontho chikhali na maphaphido ninga mphamba; pikhachiyang'ana ine maphaphido ache adakhwadzuka. Tenepo icho chidalamuswa mbachiimira na miyendo miwiri ninga munthu. Natenepo icho chidapaswa mtima wa munthu." 
Daniel7:5 Chirombo chachiwiri chidaoneka ninga thika wakuimira todoga na miyendo yache ya m'nduli. Icho chidapananga mbavu zitatu kukanwa kwache, tenepo icho chidapangwa kuti, “Lamuka, idya pyako nyama ninga munakwanisira iwe!”" 
Daniel7:6 Ndili m'kati kuyang'ana, chirombo chinango chidaoneka. Icho chikhaoneka ninga nyalugwe, kwache kunduli kwache chikhali na maphaphido anayi ninga a mbalame. Chirombo chenechi chikhali na misolo minayi, tenepo chidapaswa mphamvu zakutonga nazo." 
Daniel7:7 Pikhathimiza ine kuyang'ana, ndidaona chirombo chinango chachinayi. Chenechi chikhali chakuchitisa mantha, chakugoswa pontho champhamvu. Icho chikhali na mano makulu-makulu ninga mapaza; icho chikhadya na kupwetedza na kuponderera pyonsene pyakusalira. Icho chikhali na nyanga khumi kusiyana na pirombo pinango pile." 
Daniel7:8 Pikhayang'ana ine nyanga zile, ndidaona kanyanga kang'ono kamera pakati pa nyanga zile. Iko kadakhutcha nyanga zinango zitatu zikhali penepo kale zile. Kanyanga keneka kakhali na maso ninga a munthu, pontho kanwache ikhalonga pinthu pyakulunkuma." 
Daniel7:9 Pikhathimiza ine kuyang'ana, mipando ikhaikhwa m'mbuto mwache. Nyakukhalapo kwenda na kwenda adakhala pampando wache. Nguwo zache zikhali zakuchena ninga matalala; tsisi ya mumsolo mwache ikhali yakuchena ninga thonje. Mpando wache ukhayerima moto, pontho magaletache onsene akhagaka moto." 
Daniel7:10 Mkulo wakugaka moto ukhakuka kubulukira kuna iyeko. Pikwi-pikwi pya anthu adamutumikira; anthu pikwi khumi na kumanyalo adaimira pamaso pache. Thando ya miseru idatoma basache, tenepo mabukhu adamala fungulwa." 
Daniel7:11 Tenepo ine ndidathimiza kuyang'ana, thangwi ya mafala akulunkuma akhalonga kanyanga kale. Ine ndidathimiza basi kuchiyang'ana mpakana chirombo chachinayi chile chidaphiwa mbichiponywa pamoto, tenepo chidamala pyerera." 
Daniel7:12 Pirombo pinango pitatu pile pidapokoserwa utongi wawo. Kwache ipyo pidatawiriswa kuthimiza kukhala na moyo ndzidzi ene pang'ono. 
Daniel7:13 Pidaona ine masomphenya enewa na mosiku mwache, ndidaona unango wakuoneka ninga mwana munthu. Iye akhadza pamakole akudzulu mbaenda kuna Nyakukhalapo kwenda na kwenda ule, mbaimira pamaso pache." 
Daniel7:14 Iye adapaswa utongi, chilemedzo na ufumu, towera anthu a madzinza onsene, a mtundu onsene na chilongero chonsene ampembedze. Utongi wache ukhali wakwenda na kwenda, pontho ufumu wache ukhali okhonda mala." 
Daniel7:15 Masomphenya adaona ine ale adandichitisa mantha mbandimalwa nawo nzeru. 
Daniel7:16 Penepo ndidafedza chifupi na ule akhaimira penepo mbandimvunza chadi-chadi chache cha pinthu penepi. Tenepo iye adanditchululira pinthu penepyo ninga tenepa: 
Daniel7:17 “Pirombo pikulu-pikulu pinayipi pikuimirira maufumu anayi, ale anafuna dzaoneka padziko yapansi." 
Daniel7:18 Kwache anthu akuchena a Nyakudzulu-dzulu anatambira ufumu, tenepo unakhala wawo ene kwenda na kwenda.”" 
Daniel7:19 Kubuluka penepo ine ndikhafuna kudziwa chadi-chadi chache cha pya chirombo chachinayi, chile chikhali chakusiyana makhaliro na pinango pyonsene, pontho chakugoswa pyakwanga, chakukhala na mano ninga mapaza, pontho na ngole zankuwa, chirombo chile chimbadya na kupwetedza nyama pontho kuponderera pyonsene pyakusalira." 
Daniel7:20 Ine ndikhafuna pontho kudziwa pya nyanga khumi zikhali pamsolo pache zile, pontho na kanyanga kadamera m'nduli mwache, kale kadakhutcha nyanga zinango zonsene zitatu zile. Nyanga yeneyi ikhali na maso pontho kanwa mbalonga mwakulunkuma. Nyanga yeneyi ikhali yakugoswa pyakwanga kupiringana inango yonsene." 
Daniel7:21 Pikhayang'ana ine, nyanga yeneyi ikhachita nkhondo na anthu akuchena a Mulungu, pontho akhaakunda." 
Daniel7:22 Tenepo Nyakukhalapo kwenda na kwenda ule adadza mbatonga mseru mwakukomera anthu akuchena a Nyakudzulu-dzulu, pontho ndzidzi udafika udatambira iwo ufumu." 
Daniel7:23 Iye adandithumbusulira ninga tenepa: “Chirombo chachinayi chikuimirira ufumu wachinayi, ule unafuna dzakhala padziko yapansi, pontho mbukhala wakusiyana na unango onsene. Iwo unapwetedza, pontho kupondedza dziko yonsene yapansi." 
Daniel7:24 Nyanga khumi zile ndi mafumu khumi anafuna dzatonga ufumu wenewo ale. Kubuluka penepo mfumu unango anaoneka; iye anakhala wakusiyana na mafumu akutoma ale mbakunda mafumu atatu. 
Daniel7:25 Iye analonga mwakupokanyisana na Nyakudzulu-dzulu mbavuya anthu ache akuchena. Iye anayesera kusanduza maphwando awo akupambulika na matongero awo a chipembedzo. Anthu a Mulungu anakhala pansi pa utongi wache pyaka pitatu na miyezi mitanthatu. 
Daniel7:26 Kubuluka penepo thando ya miseru ya kudzulu inatoma basache, tenepo iye anapokoserwa mphamvu zache mbavungwa monsene mwene." 
Daniel7:27 Mphamvu, demelero na ukulu onsene pya maufumu a padziko yapansi pinaperekwa kuna anthu akuchena a Nyakudzulu-dzulu. Ufumu wawo nkhabe dzamala tayu, pontho atongi onsene a padziko yapansi anaatumikira na kuavera.”" 
Daniel7:28 Kweneku ndiye kumala kwa pinthu penepi. Ine Daniele ndidaphatwa na mantha pyakwanga mwakuti nkhope yanga idabuluka kaluma, thangwi ya pinthu pidaona inepi, kwache ndidakoya pyonsenepi mumtima mwanga." 
Daniel8:1 Chaka chachitatu Beleshazara mbali mfumu, ine Daniele ndidaona masomphenya anango, pidamala ine kuona masomphenya akutoma ale." 
Daniel8:2 Ine ndidaona kumasomphenya kuti ndikhali mumpanda wa mzinda wa Susa m'nthemba ya Elamu; ine ndikhaimira chifupi na mkulo wa Ulai. 
Daniel8:3 Tenepo ndidakwiza maso mbandiona bira wa nyanga ziwiri zakulapha aimira m'khundu-khundu mwa mkulo. Nyanga ibodzi ikhali yakulapha kupiringana inangoyo, podi kwene kuti ndiye ikhali yakumalisira kumera." 
Daniel8:4 Ndidayang'ana birayo, tenepo na nyanga zache iye adathamangira kumadokero dzuwa, kumpoto na kumwera. Nkhabe nyama inango idakwanisa kuimisana naye, penu kupulumuka m'manja mwache tayu. Bira ule adachita pyokhokha pyakumkomera mbasanduka wakutumbama." 
Daniel8:5 Pikhanyerezera ine pya penepi, vumbulukutu mbuzi idadza kubulukira kumadokero dzuwa uku ikuthamanga pyakwanga mwakuti njondo zache nee zikhakhuya pansi tayu. Iyo ikhali na nyanga ikulu pakati pa diso na diso inango." 
Daniel8:6 Mbuziyo idadza chifupi na bira, adaona ine aimira m'khundu-khundu mwa mkulo ule, mbathamangira kukhali bira kule na mphamvu zache zonsene." 
Daniel8:7 Ine ndidaona mbuzi ile ikudima bira ule. Mbuzi ile idazhangali pyakwanga mwakuti idanumphira bira ule mbimkhumula nyanga zache ziwiri zile. Bira ule akhali nkhabe mphamvu zakukwanisa kuimisana naye tayu. Bira adagwa pansi mbapondedzwa, tenepo pakhali nkhabe na mbodzi ene wakumvunulira tayu." 
Daniel8:8 Mbuzi ile idathimiza na kulunkuma, kwache pidakula iyo mphamvu, nyangache ikulu ile idagwandika, tenepo m'mbuto mwache mudamera nyanga zinango zikulu-zikulu zinayi mbiziyang'ana kumakhundu onsene anayi." 
Daniel8:9 Panyanga inango ibodzi padamera nyanga inango, ile idatoma ing'ono-ng'ono, kwache idakula mphamvu mpakana kumwera, pontho kumabulukiro dzuwa, pontho kwenderatu ku Dziko Yakubalika." 
Daniel8:10 Nyanga ile idathimiza kukula mpakana idaphata nyenyezi, gulu ya anyankhondo a kudzulu ile, mbaatchithisira padziko yapansi, pontho adaapondedza." 
Daniel8:11 Iyo idapikhazika yokha ene kukhala ninga Mfumu wa anyankhondo a kudzulu onsene; idamalisa nsembe zimbaperekwa nsiku na nsiku, tenepo adalulupisa Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
Daniel8:12 Na thangwi ya kudawa kwa anthu, anyankhondo a kudzulu ale na nsembe za nsiku na nsiku zile pidaperekwa m'manja mwacho. Pinthu pyache pyonsene pikhachita nyanga ile pikhamfambira mwadidi, pontho chipembedzo chakuona chidaponyerwa pansi." 
Daniel8:13 Penepo ndidava mngelo akulonga, pontho mngelo unango adalonga kuna mwanzache mbati, “Ayi masomphenya anakwana-kwana lini kani, masomphenya akulonga pya nsembe za nsiku na nsiku, pyakudawa pile pidadzesa kuvungika, pontho na kuponderezwa kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu, na anyankhondo a kudzulu ale?”" 
Daniel8:14 Iye adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Penepi pinachitika mpakana nsiku pikwi piwiri na madzana matatu machibese na mawulo; kubuluka penepo Nyumba ya Mulungu inabwezerwa ninga mukhali iyo kale.”" 
Daniel8:15 Pikhaona ine Daniele masomphenya ale, pontho kufuna kuvesa kuti akhalonganji, vumbu-vumbu pamaso panga padaimira unango wakuoneka ninga munthu." 
Daniel8:16 Tenepo ndidava fala ya munthu kumkulo wa Ulai kuchemera kuti, “Gabriele, panga munthu weneyu kuti masomphenya enewa akulonganji?”" 
Daniel8:17 Gabriele adadza mbaimira chifupi na ine, tenepo ine ndidachita naye mantha pyakwanga mwakuti ndidagwa na fufumimba. Iye adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Iwe mwana munthu, wathema kuvesa kuti masomphenya enewa akulonga pya nsiku zakumala kwa dziko yapansi.”" 
Daniel8:18 Pikhalonga iye tenepo kuna ine, ine ndikhali m'chitulo chakufa nacho, mwenemo ndagona na fufumimba. Iye adandiphata mbandiimirisa." 
Daniel8:19 Iye adalonga mbati, “Ine ndinakupanga pinthu pinafuna dzachitika thangwi ya kuzhangali kwa Mulungu, podi masomphenyawo akulonga pya nsiku zakumala kwa dziko yapansi." 
Daniel8:20 “Bira wa nyanga ziwiri adaona iwe ule, akuimirira maufumu a Amedi na Aperesi." 
Daniel8:21 Mbuzi yakupenga ile ikuimirira mfumu wa Grisi, pontho nyanga yakudodomesa, idamera pakati pa diso na diso ile, ikuimirira mfumu wakutoma." 
Daniel8:22 Nyanga zinayi zidamera pidagwandika nyanga yakutoma ile, akuimirira mafumu anayi, ale anafuna dzabalwa muufumu, kwache nkhabe dzakhala sasawa mphamvu na ufumu wakutoma ule tayu." 
Daniel8:23 “Ndzidzi wa kumala kwa maufumu ungafika chifupi, mwenemo anyakupandukira afika pachimache na pyakudawika, panaoneka mfumu wakuuma mtima, wakukala mtima pontho wakunama." 
Daniel8:24 Iye anakhala na mphamvu, kwache nee na mphamvu zache zene tayu. Iye anachitisa kuvungika kukulu pyakwanga mbapikwanisa papyonsene pimbachita iye. Iye anavunga anyamphamvu zawo pontho na anyakuchena ene a Mulungu." 
Daniel8:25 Iye anachitisa kunama kukhala ponsene pene mbapiyesa yekha ene wakufunika. Ndzidzi unanyerezera anthu kuti ali pakupata, iye anavunga anthu azinji ene mwakukhonda kuacheuza. Iye anatikana Mfumu wa mafumu onsene, kwache iye anavunga mwakukhonda phatisa basa mphamvu za munthu." 
Daniel8:26 “Masomphenya enewa akulonga pya nsembe zakuperekwa machibese na mawulo, atchululwa kuna iwe ale, ngakuonadi. Kwache pikoye mumtima mwako, thangwi akulonga pya pinthu pile pinafuna dzachitika m'tsogololetu.”" 
Daniel8:27 Ine Daniele ndidatonthola magogodo mbandifeluka nsiku zizinji zene. Tenepo ndidalamuka mbandienda kaphata basanga idandipasa mfumu ile. Ine ndidamalwa nzeru nawo masomphenya enewa mwakuti sidakwanise kuavesa tayu. 
Daniel9:1 Chaka chakutoma cha Dariusi mwana Ahasuwero wa dzinza ya Medi, ule adaikhwa kukhala mfumu wa Babiloni" 
Daniel9:2 chaka chakutoma cha utongi wache, ine Daniele ndidavesa kubulukira m'Malemba kuti kuvungika kwa Yerusalemu kunakhala mpakana pyaka makumanomwe malingana na mafala a MBUYA kudzera muna mprofeti Yeremia." 
Daniel9:3 Tenepo ndidapemphera kuna Mbuya Mulungu na mtimanga onsene, kumdembetera, kupimana kudya, kuvala masakha pontho na kupikhwaza dotha." 
Daniel9:4 Ine ndidapemphera kuna MBUYA Mulungu wanga mbandibweka kudawa kwa anthu anga. Ine ndidalonga kuti, “Mbuya, Mulungu wamkulu pontho wakugopeka, ndimwe nyakukoya chiverano chanu mbamuonesa kuafuna kwanu kokhonda mala anthu ale ambakufunani pontho ambavera matongero anu." 
Daniel9:5 “Ife tadawa, pontho tachita pyakuipa. Ife ndife akudawika, pontho tapandukira; ife takhonda kuvera matongero anu mbatibauka kubuluka kuna mwambo wanu." 
Daniel9:6 Ife sidavere anyabasanu maprofeti tayu, ale adalonga na dzinanu kuna mafumu athu, atongi athu, makolo athu, pontho na dzinzathu yonsene." 
Daniel9:7 “Mbuya, imwe ndimwe nyakulungama, mbwenye lero ife tapichitisa tekha ene manyadzo; amuna a mu Yuda na Yerusalemu, pontho na Aisraele onsene kumadziko onsene akutali na achifupi ene kudatibalalisira imwe, thangwi ya kukhonda khulupirika kwathu kuna imwe." 
Daniel9:8 MBUYA, ife, mafumu athu, atongi athu na makolo athu ene tamala phatwa na manyadzo, thangwi takudawirani." 
Daniel9:9 Mbuya Mulungu wathu ngwansisi, pontho wakulekerera pyakudawa, podi kwene kuti ife tampandukira;" 
Daniel9:10 ife nee tidavere MBUYA Mulungu wathu, penu kokoya mwambo udatipasa iye kudzera muna anyabasache maprofeti ule tayu." 
Daniel9:11 Aisraele onsene adaswa mwambo wanu mbabauka pyawo, kukhonda kukuverani. “Natenepo dzedze na kupikira konsene kudalembwa m'mwambo wa Mose, nyabasanu wa Mulungu ule, pyakhuthulirwa pana ife, thangwi ife takudawirani." 
Daniel9:12 Imwe mwachitisa kukwana-kwana mafala adalongwa mwakupokanyisana na ife, pontho atongi athu, pakudzesa nyatwa zikulu pakati pathu. Nkhabe kwinango pansi pa thambo kule kwachitwa pinthu ninga pile pyachitika muno mu Yerusalemu." 
Daniel9:13 Ninga montho mwalemberwa ipyo m'mwambo wa Mose, nyatwa zonsenezi zagwa pana ife, kwache ife nee tidayese kuchita pinthu pyakukomera imwe, MBUYA Mulungu wathu pakuleka pyakudawa pyathu mbatiteweza pyakuonadi pyanu tayu." 
Daniel9:14 Imwe MBUYA Mulungu wathu hamudachite nthontho kudzesa nyatwa pana ife tayu, thangwi pyonsene pimbachita imwe mphyakulungama; kwache ife nee tidakuvereni tayu." 
Daniel9:15 “Mbuya Mulungu wathu, ule mudaonesa mphamvu zanu pakubulusa anthu anu m'dziko ya Iguputo, pontho ule mbiri yanu ikuveka basi na lero, ife tadawa, pontho tachita pyakudawika." 
Daniel9:16 Mbuya, kufuna kuonesa kuti ndimwe nyakulungama, malisani kuzhangali kwanu, pontho mbombowesani ukali wanu pana Yerusalemu, thangwi wenewu ndi mzindanu, pontho phiri yanu yakuchena. Pyakudawa pyathu, pontho na pyakuipa pya makolo athu pyachitisa kuti Yerusalemu na anthu ache ene akhale chakusekesa kuna anthu onsene atizungulirawa." 
Daniel9:17 “Chinchino, Mulungu wathu, veserani kupemphera, pontho yang'anani kudembetera kunachita nyabasanu. Na thangwi ya dzinanu Mbuya, komerani mtima Nyumbanu yakuvungika ile." 
Daniel9:18 Ikhani khutu mbamuvesere Mulungu wanga; fungulani maso mbamuone madembe a mzinda wakwata dzinanu ule. Ife nkhabe kupempha kuna imwe thangwi ndife akulungama tayu, mbwenye kuti imwe ndimwe nyansisi." 
Daniel9:19 MBUYA ngaveserani! MBUYA tilekereni! MBUYA ngaveserani kupemphera kwathu mbamuchitepo pinthu! Na thangwi ya dzinanu, Mulungu wanga, lekani chita nthontho, podi mzindanu na anthu anu ene pyakwata dzinanu.”" 
Daniel9:20 Pikhalonga ine, pontho kupemphera, kubweka kudawa kwanga na kwa anthu anga ene Aisraele, pontho kudembetera MBUYA Mulungu wanga thangwi ya phiri yache yakuchena," 
Daniel9:21 pikhathimiza ine kupemphera, Gabriele, ule akhadaona ine kumasomphenya anga akutoma, adadza kuna ine na kumbuluka. Ndzidzi wenewo ukhali ndzidzi wakupereka nsembe zakumawulo." 
Daniel9:22 Iye adadza mbalonga kuna ine mbati, “Daniele, ine ndadza pano dzakupasa udziwisi na nzeru." 
Daniel9:23 Sindzidzi iwe nkhutoma kupemphera, Mulungu adava kupemphera kwako, tenepo ine ndadza dzakupanga kukutawira kwachita iye, thangwi iye ambakufuna pyakwanga pene. Natenepo nyerezera mwadidi mphangwazi mbuvese masomphenyawa." 
Daniel9:24 “Pyaka makumanomwe kupiinjipisa na kanomwe ndi ndzidzi ule unafuna Mulungu dzamalisa pyaumambala pyonsene pakati pa anthu ako, pontho na mzindako wakuchena. Iye anamalisa pyakudawa, kulekerera pyakudawa, kukhazikisa chilungamo chakwenda na kwenda, kuchitisa masomphenya na mphangwa zauprofeti kukwana-kwana, pontho na kupambulira pontho Nyumbache kuna iye." 
Daniel9:25 “Dziwa mbuvese pinthu penepi: Kubulukira pa ndzidzi unaperekwa matongero akuti Yerusalemu amangwe pontho mpakana kudza kwa Mtongi, Nyakusankhulika wa Mulungu ule, panagwanda pyaka pinomwe kupiinjipisa na kanomwe. Tenepo pyaka makumatanthatu na piwiri kupiinjipisa na kanomwe Yerusalemu anamangwa pontho na misewu yache ene, pontho mgelo unakumbwa kuuzungulira kunja kwache kuutchinjiriza, kwache penepi pinachitika pandzidzi wa nyatwa." 
Daniel9:26 Pangagwanda pyaka makumatanthatu na piwiri kupiinjipisa na kanomwe, Nyakusankhulwa wa Mulungu ule, anaphiwa mwakusowa chilungamo. Anyankhondo a mtongi wakufuna kudza ndzidzi wenewo anavunga mzinda na Nyumba ya Mulungu. Mamalisiro anafika ninga kudza kwa madzi makulu: Nkhondo inathimiza kumenyeka mpakana mamalisiro afike, podi Mulungu asasanya kuvungika kukulu." 
Daniel9:27 Mtongi weneyo anakhazikisa chiverano na anthu azinji ene pyaka pinomwe. Pakati na kati pa ndzidzi wenewu, iye anamalisa kupereka nsembe, pontho na pyakupereka pinango. Pontho iye anaikha chinthu chakunyansa chimbavunga chile m'Nyumba ya Mulungu mbachikhala penepo mpakana mamalisiro ache adaikhirwa icho ale afike.”" 
Daniel10:1 Chaka chachitatu Kirusi mbali mfumu wa ku Peresia, mphangwa zidatchululwa kuna Daniele, (ule pontho akhachemerwa Beleteshazara). Mphangwazo zikhali zakuonadi, pontho zikhalonga pya nkhondo ikulu. Mphangwazo zidatchululwa kuna iye kumasomphenya." 
Daniel10:2 Pandzidzi wenewo ine, Daniele ndidamala madimingu matatu kusintili." 
Daniel10:3 Sidadye pyakudya pyadidi tayu; sidadye nyama penu kumwa vinyu tayu, penu kudzola mafuta tayu mpakana kumala kwa madimingu atatu amumphu ale." 
Daniel10:4 Pansiku ya makumawiri na chinayi ya mwezi wakutoma wa chaka, ine ndikhaimira m'khundu-khundu mwa mkulo ukulu wa Tigrisi." 
Daniel10:5 Ndidakwiza maso anga m'dzulu mbandiona munthu avala nguwo zakuchena mbamanga bande ya golidi chadi-chadi m'chuno mwache. 
Daniel10:6 Manungo ache akhayetimira ninga mwala wakudula. Nkhope yache ikhang'azimira ninga kuchetuma kwa njazi, pontho maso ache akhayerima moto. Mikono na miyendo yache pikhayetimira ninga nkuwa wakupukutwa mwadidi, pontho falache ikhaveka ninga ya mwinji." 
Daniel10:7 Ine, Daniele ndikhali ine ene basi ule adaona masomphenya enewa. Amuna akhali na ine penepo hadaone na chinthu chene tayu, kwache iwo adatetemera na mantha mbathawa kabisala." 
Daniel10:8 Ine ndidasala ndekha ene basi penepo, kuona masomphenya akudodomesawa. Nkhope yanga idabuluka kaluma, pontho ndidamaliratu mphamvu mbandikhala wakusowa chiphedzo." 
Daniel10:9 Penepo ine ndidava iye akulonga, tenepo pikhavesera ine ndidapigwisa na fufumimba mbandigona chitulo chakufa nacho." 
Daniel10:10 Penepo dzanja idandiphata mbindilamusa uku manjanga na mabondo anga pyaphata pansi; ine ndikhagedemera na mantha. 
Daniel10:11 Iye adalonga mbati, “Daniele, ule ambafunwa pyakwanga pene na Mulungu, nyerezera mafala anafuna ine kulonga kuna iwe, pontho lamuka thangwi ine ndatumwa kudza kuna iwe.” Tenepo pidalonga iye penepi kuna ine, ine ndidalamuka uku ndikugedemera na mantha." 
Daniel10:12 Iye adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Leka chita mantha Daniele. Thangwi kutomera nsiku idanyerezera iwe kufuna kuvesa, pontho kupichepesa wekha ene pamaso pa Mulungu wako, kupempha kwako kudaveka. Tenepo ine ndadza dzakupanga kukutawira kwachita Mulungu." 
Daniel10:13 Kwache mngelo wakutchinjiriza ufumu wa Aperesi akhanditchinga-tchinga nsiku makumawiri na ibodzi zagwandazo. Mbwenye Mikaele, mbodzi wa angelo akulu-akulu adadza dzandiphedza, thangwi ine ndikhadadembukiswa penepa na mfumu wa ku Peresia." 
Daniel10:14 Ine ndadza dzakuchitisa kuvesa pinthu pinafuna dzachitikira anthu ako m'tsogolo muno. Masomphenya enewa akulonga pya pinthu pinafuna dzachitika m'tsogolo.” 
Daniel10:15 Pidalonga iye penepi, ine ndidatchulima wakusowa chakulonga." 
Daniel10:16 Tenepo unango wakuoneka ninga munthu ule, adakhuya milomo yanga. Penepo ndidafungula mulomo wanga mbanditoma kulonga. Ine ndidalonga kuna munthu adaimira pamaso panga m'khundu mwanga ule kuti, “Mbuyanga, ine ndaphatwa na mantha pyakwanga thangwi ya masomphenya, pontho ine nkhabe chiphedzo tayu." 
Daniel10:17 Ayi nyabasanune ndinakwanisa tani kulonga namwe Mbuyanga? Mphamvu zanga zamala kwenda, pontho ine ndikuchimwana kupuma mwadidi.”" 
Daniel10:18 Kachiwiri kache munthu ule adandiphata mbandiwanga pontho mphamvu. 
Daniel10:19 Iye adalonga mbati, “Leka chita mantha, iwe munthu ambafunwa pyakwanga pene na Mulungu. Mtendere mbukhale nawe, chinchino khala wamphamvu, pontho wanga mtima.” Pikhalonga iye penepi, ine ndiye ndidanyanyiratu kuwanga mphamvu mbandilonga kuti, “Mbuyanga, longani, podi imwe mwandipasa mphamvu.”" 
Daniel10:20 Natenepo iye adalonga mbati, “Ayi ukudziwa thangwi yandidzesa kuna iwe? Chinchino pano ine ndathema kubwerera kamenyana na mngelo wakutchinjiriza ufumu wa Aperesi. Tenepo ine ndingaenda, mngelo wakutchinjiriza ufumu wa Grisi anati adze;" 
Daniel10:21 kwache chakutoma ndinati ndikupange pya malemba a m'Bukhu ya Pyakuonadi. (Nkhabe na mbodzi ene wakundiphedza tayu kumenyana nawo kupambula Mikaele ene basi mngelo wakutchinjiriza Israele. 
Daniel11:1 “Pontho chaka chakutoma wa Dariusi mfumu wa Medi, ine ndidaimira kumphedza pontho kumtchinjiriza.)" 
Daniel11:2 Tenepo pinthu pinafuna ine kukupanga chinchinopi mphyakuona pyokhokha.” Mngelo adalonga mbati, “Mafumu anango atatu anatonga dziko ya Peresia, m'nduli mwache mbabwera mfumu wachinayi, ule anakhala nyakufuma pyakwanga kupiringana anango onsene ale. Iye anakula mphamvu pyakwanga thangwi ya mfumacheyo mbachitisa munthu onsene kupokanyisana na ufumu wa Grisi." 
Daniel11:3 “Tenepo mfumu wamphamvu zache anabwera, ule anafuna dzatonga na utongi onsene mbachita pyache pyonsene pyakumkomera." 
Daniel11:4 Kwache pidakula iye wamphamvu ufumu wache unavungika mbugawiwa m'makhundu manayi. Ufumuwo nkhabe dzaenda kuna pidzukulu pyache, penu kukhala pontho na mphamvu ninga zikhali na iye zile tayu, thangwi iye anapokoserwa ufumu mbuperekwa kuna anango." 
Daniel11:5 “Mfumu wa Kumwera anakhala wamphamvu, kwache mbodzi wa akadamu ache a nkhondo ndiye anafuna dzakhala na mphamvu kupita iye, mbatonga ufumu wache ene na mphamvu zikulu." 
Daniel11:6 Pyaka pingasi pingagwanda, mfumu wa Kumwera anasasanya chiphatizano na mfumu wa Kumpoto. Mwana wamkazi wa mfumu wa Kumwera anasembwa na mfumu wa Kumpoto kufuna kuwangisa chiphatizano chawo. Kwache chiphatizano chawo nkhabe dzakhala ndzidzi ukulu ene tayu. Nsiku zenezo mwanache wamkazi anaperekwa m'manja mwa anyamalwa pabodzi pene na mathubu ache achifumu na babache ene, pontho na onsene ale akhali kukhundu kwache." 
Daniel11:7 “Sindzidzi nkhubuluka penepo mbodzi wa abale ache mwana wamkaziyo anapita ufumu. Iye anachita nkhondo na anyankhondo a mfumu wa Kumpoto mbapita mumpanda wa anyankhondo ache mbamala kuakunda. 
Daniel11:8 Iye anakwata mifanikizo yawo, pontho na pyombo pyawo pya golidi na siliva pidapambulirwa kuna milungu pile, mbabwerera napyo ku Iguputo. Pingagwanda pyaka pizinji pene iye analeka kumenyana na mfumu wa Kumpoto." 
Daniel11:9 Tenepo mfumu wa Kumpoto anachita nkhondo na mfumu wa Kumwera na anyankhondo ache, kwache iye anakhakhamizwa kuthawa." 
Daniel11:10 “Ana a mfumu wa Kumpoto anasasanyikira pya nkhondo mbagumanyisa anyankhondo azinji ene, ale anafuna dzakukulula ninga madzi makulu, tenepo anakakisa nkhondo mpakana kumpanda wa anyamalwawo." 
Daniel11:11 Na thangwi yakuzhangali, mfumu wa Kumwera anachita nkhondo na mfumu wa Kumpoto, ule anagumanyisa anyankhondo azinji, kwache iwo anakundwa." 
Daniel11:12 Mfumu wa Kumwera anatumbama thangwi ya kukunda kwacheko, pontho na thangwi ya anyankhondo pikwi-pikwi adapha iye ale. Kwache iye nkhabe dzathimiza kukunda tayu." 
Daniel11:13 “Mfumu wa Kumpoto anagumanyisa pontho anyankhondo azinji kupiringana akhali na iye pakutoma ale. Tenepo pandzidzi wache wakuthema iye anabwerera na anyankhondo ache azinji, pontho aluso." 
Daniel11:14 “Penepo anthu azinji anagalukira mfumu wa Kumwera. Amuna anango akuzunguza a m'dzinza mwako, iwe Daniele, anapandukira kufuna chitisa masomphenya aona iwe ale kukwana-kwana. Kwache iwo anati akundwe." 
Daniel11:15 Tenepo mfumu wa Kumpoto na anyankhondo ache anazungulira mzinda wakutchingwa na mpanda mbamuluka mataka kuzungulira mzindawo. Anyankhondo a ku Kumwera anasowa mphamvu zakubwezera; podi na anyankhondo awo ene aluso maka nkhabe dzakwanisa kuimisana nawo na pang'ono pene tayu. 
Daniel11:16 Anyankhondo a ku Kumpoto anachita nawo pyonsene pene pyakuakomera mbapasowa munthu na mbodzi ene wakuimisana nawo. Iye anapikhazika yekha ene m'Dziko Yakubalika mbakhala na mphamvu zakuvunga nazo. 
Daniel11:17 “Mfumu wa Kumpoto anachita phinga kudza na amuna amphamvu a muufumu wache onsene mbachita chiphatizano na mfumu wa Kumwera pakumsembesa mwanache wamkazi, towera apokosere ufumuwo; kwache pinasasanya iyepyo nkhabe dzachitika tayu." 
Daniel11:18 Kubuluka penepo iye anaenda kachita nkhondo na anyamgombe mbakunda madzinza azinji ene. Kwache mkadamu wakudzambo pyache ndiye anafuna dzamkunda mbamalisa kutumbama kwache; iye anati amchitise manyadzo. 
Daniel11:19 Tenepo mfumu anabwerera kumpanda wa anyankhondo a m'dziko mwache makamo, kwache iye anakundwa; kweneko kunakhala kumala kwache." 
Daniel11:20 “Nyakupita m'mbuto mwache anatuma thubu kakhakhamiza anthu kukhoma msonkho, towera ainjipise demelero ya ufumu wache. Ndzidzi pang'ono basi mfumu weneyo anati aphiwe, kwache nee na thangwi ya kuzhangali naye, penu pankhondo tayu.”" 
Daniel11:21 Mngelo ule adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Nyakufuna dzapita ufumu wa Kumpoto anakhala munthu wakuipa, ule hadatheme kukhala mfumu tayu. Iye anapokosera ufumuwo mwenemo anthu ache akuona ninga ali pakupata mbapichita mwaunthawatawa." 
Daniel11:22 Munthu onsene wakupokanyisana naye, podi na Nyansembe Wamkulu ene wa Mulungu, anakukululwa basi mbavungwa monsene mwene." 
Daniel11:23 Pakuchita nawo chiphatizano iye ananyengeza madzinza azinji ene, tenepo iye anakhala na mphamvu pyakwanga, podi kwene kuti atonge pyache dzinza ing'ono tani." 
Daniel11:24 Iye anapokosera madziko amfuma mwakukhonda kuacheuza, pontho anachita pinthu pyakuti chipo ababache, penu makolo ache adzati kupichita tayu. Kubuluka penepo iye anagawa pinthu pidakwata iye pankhondo pile, pakati pa anyakumtewerache. Iye anasasanya njira zakusosera mpanda wa anyamalwache, kwache ndzidzi wakuchita penepi unakhala wakuchepa." 
Daniel11:25 “Na gulu ikulu ya anyankhondo iye analamuka na mphamvu zache zonsene pontho na kuwanga mtima kuchita nkhondo na mfumu wa Kumwera, ulembo anasasanyika pyakuimisana naye na gulu ikulu pontho yamphamvu. Kwache mfumu wa Kumwera anachimwana kuimisana naye, thangwi ya upandu udamsasanyira iye." 
Daniel11:26 Mapungu ache achifupiletu anayesa kumsandukira. Gulu yache ya anyankhondo inamala puluzwa, pontho anyankhondo ache azinji anaphiwa pankhondo." 
Daniel11:27 Mafumu mawiri anakhala pathebulu kudya, kwache iwo anakhala na manyerezero akuipa. Tenepo ananamizana pyawo okhokha. Iwo nkhabe gumana chinafuna iwo tayu, thangwi ndzidzi wawo hudzati kwana tayu." 
Daniel11:28 Mfumu wa Kumpoto anabwerera kwawo na pinthu pizinji pyapokosera iye, mbakhala na phinga kuvunga chipembedzo cha anthu a Mulungu. Iye anachita pyache pyakumkomera, tenepo anabwerera kudziko kwache." 
Daniel11:29 “M'nduli mwache iye anachita pontho nkhondo na Kumwera, kwache ndzidzi wenewu nee pinakhalave ninga mudachitira iye pakutoma pale tayu." 
Daniel11:30 Miyadia yakubulukira kumadokero dzuwa yakukhala m'khundu-khundu mwa bara inamenyana naye, tenepo iye anataya mtima. Kubuluka penepo iye anabwerera mwakuzhangali pyakwanga mbayesera pontho kuvunga chipembedzo cha anthu a Mulungu. Iye anakomera mtima anthu ambakhondambo chipembedzo chenechi ale." 
Daniel11:31 “Anyankhondo ache anaswipisa Nyumba ya Mulungu mbalekesa nsembe za nsiku na nsiku zile. Penepo iwo anaikhapo chinthu chakunyansa chimbavunga chile. 
Daniel11:32 Na thangwi ya kutapira m'kanwa, mfumu ananyengerera anthu azinji ale adakhonda kale chipembedzo chawo, kwache anthu ale ambatewera Mulungu wawo anaimira dzololo kumenyana naye." 
Daniel11:33 “Amuna anzeru anapereka uphungu kuna anthu azinji ene. Kwache ndzidzi pang'ono basi anango a iwo anati aphiwe pankhondo, penu kupiswa moto, anangombo anaphatwa mbasanduka anyaperezo." 
Daniel11:34 Mwenemo kuphako mbakuli m'kati, anthu a Mulungu anatambira chiphedzo chakuchepa, pontho anthu, ale si akuona mtima tayu, anapitambo m'gulu mwawo." 
Daniel11:35 Anango a anthu anzeru anasanyiswa, towera acheneswe, ayeswe mbachitiswa kukhala akusowa na chakupokanyisa chene mpakana mamalisiro afike, thangwi penepi pinachitika pandzidzi wache wasankhula Mulungu ule." 
Daniel11:36 “Mfumu wa Kumpoto anachita pyache pyakumkomera. Iye anagaya kuti ngwamkulu kupiringana milungu inango pontho anashola Mulungu Nyakudzulu-dzulu. Iye anakwanisa kuchita tenepo mpakana ndzidzi unafuna dzaoneka ukali wa Mulungu. Mulungu anachita ninga montho mukhadapisasanyira iye kudzapichita mule. 
Daniel11:37 Mfumu anapasa nkhodolo milungu ikhapembedza makolo ache ile, pontho na milungu ene ikhafunwa na akazi ile. Ndimomwene iye anati apasa nkhodolo milungu yonsene, thangwi iye anapithemba kuti ngwamkulu kupiringana milungu yeneyo." 
Daniel11:38 M'mbuto mwache iye anathimiza kulemedza milungu imbatchinjiriza mipanda ya anyankhondo ile. Iye anapereka golidi, siliva, miyala yakudula pontho na mitukwa inango yadidi ninga nsembe kuna milungu idakhonda pembedza makolo ache ile." 
Daniel11:39 Kufuna kutchinjiriza mipandache ya anyankhondo, iye anaphatisa basa anthu ale ambapembedza milungu yachilendo. Iye analemedza pikulu pene anthu ale ambamdziwa kuti iye ndiye mtongi mbaapasa chidzo chakutonga anthu azinji, pontho kuapasa mbuto ninga mfupo wawo." 
Daniel11:40 “Ndzidzi wakumalisa wa mfumu wa Kumpoto ungafika, mfumu wa Kumwera anachita naye nkhondo, tenepo na mphamvu zache zonsene mfumu wa Kumpoto anaimisana naye, pakuphatisa basa pingolo pya nkhondo, akavalo na miyadia mizinji. Iye anapokosera madziko azinji ene mbaakukulula ninga madzi makulu." 
Daniel11:41 Iye anapokosera na Dziko Yakubalika ene. Madziko azinji ene anakundwa, kwache madziko a Edomu, Moabu, pontho akadamu a Amoni anapulumuswa m'manja mwache." 
Daniel11:42 Iye anafikisa utongi wache kumadziko azinji ene; podi na Iguputo ene nkhabe dzasiyiwa tayu. 
Daniel11:43 Iye anapokosera mfuma ya golidi na siliva ya mu Iguputo, pontho na pinthu pinango pyonsene pyakudula. Iye anakunda Libia na Kushi." 
Daniel11:44 Mbwenye mphangwa zakubulukira kumabulukiro dzuwa na kumpoto zinampasa mantha, tenepo iye anaenda mwakuzhangali pyakwanga kavunga na kupha anthu azinji ene." 
Daniel11:45 Iye anamanga makumbi ache akulu achifumu pakati pa bara na phiri yakubalika ya Zioni. Kwache iye anati afe mbapasowa munthu na mbodzi ene wakumphedza.” 
Daniel12:1 Mngelo wakuvala nguwo zakuchena adalonga mbati, “Pandzidzi wenewo mngelo wamkulu Mikaele, ule ambatchinjiriza anthu anu, anabwera. Kubuluka penepo panakhala ndzidzi wakusanyika pyakwanga, ule chipo hudzati khalapo tayu kutomera ndzidzi udalengwa madzinza. Kwache ndzidzi wenewu ungafika anthu onsene a dzinzako, ale madzinawo alembwa m'bukhu ya Mulungu anapulumuka." 
Daniel12:2 Anthu azinji adagonera kale mkono ale, analamuswa kuimfa: anango kwenda kumoyo okhonda mala, anangombo kumbuto yakuchitiswa manyadzo, pontho kutchunyuswa kwenda na kwenda." 
Daniel12:3 Amuna anzeru ale anagaka ninga cheza chakuthambo. Onsenembo ale adapereka uphungu wakulungama kuna anthu azinji, anaonesa cheza ninga nyenyezi zakuthambo kwenda na kwenda." 
Daniel12:4 “Kwache iwe Daniele, chinchino funga mpukutuwo mbuumyatire mpakana ndzidzi wakumalisa. Ndzidzi uno anthu anakhala njekuma-njekuma kuyesera kuthimiza udziwisi.”" 
Daniel12:5 Kubuluka penepo ndidaona amuna awiri aimira m'khundu-khundu mwa mkulo, mbodzi kukhundu ibodzi, unangomboyo khundu inango." 
Daniel12:6 Mbodzi wa amuna ale adavunza mngelo akhadavala nguwo zakuchena, ule adaimira kumtunda kwa mkulo mbati, “Ayi panakwata ndzidzi ukulu tani pinthu penepi pyakudodomesapi mbapidzati kwana-kwana?”" 
Daniel12:7 Mngelo akhadavala nguwo zakuchena, pontho adaimira kumtunda kwa mkulo ule, adakwiza manjache awiri ene m'dzulu, pontho ndidamva akudumbira pikulu pene na dzina ya Mulungu Wakukhala na kukhala ule kuti, “Panakwata pyaka pitatu na miyezi mitanthatu. Anthu a Mulungu angamala sanyiswa, pinthu penepi pinakhala pyamala chitika kale.”" 
Daniel12:8 Ine ndidava pidalonga iyepyo, kwache sidapivese tayu. Tenepo ndidavunza kuti, “Mbuyanga, ayi pyonsenepi pinamala tani?”" 
Daniel12:9 Iye adatawira mbati, “Daniele, chinchino iwe wathema kwenda, thangwi mafala enewa athema kukhala akumyatirwa pontho akubisika mpakana ndzidzi wakumalisa ufike." 
Daniel12:10 Anthu azinji anacheneswa, anayeswa, mbachitiswa kukhala akusowa na chakupokanyisa chene, kwache anyakudawika anathimiza basi kukhala anyakudawika; nkhabe nyakudawika na mbodzi ene apivesa penepi tayu, mbwenye anyanzeru ene basi ndiye anafuna kupivesa penepi." 
Daniel12:11 “Kubulukira ndzidzi unafuna dzalekeswa nsembe za nsiku na nsiku, pontho unafuna khazikiswa chinthu chakunyansa chakuvunga chile, panagwanda nsiku chikwi na madzana mawiri na makumafemba." 
Daniel12:12 Nyakutsanzaya ngule anathimiza kukhala wakukhulupirika mpakana kumala kwa nsiku chikwi na madzana matatu na makumatatu na zishanu! 
Daniel12:13 “Kulonga pya iwe Daniele, thimiza kukhala wakukhulupirika mpakana mamalisiro. Tenepo iwe unagonera mkono, kwache unalamuka kuimfa kutambira mfupo wako pakumala kwa dziko yapansi.”" 
Hosea1:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna Hosea mwana Beeri, pandzidzi wa utongi wa Uzia, Yotamu, Ahazi na Hezekia, mafumu a Yuda, pontho pandzidzi wa utongi wa Yeroboamu, mwana Yehoasi, mfumu wa Israele." 
Hosea1:2 Pidatoma MBUYA kulonga kuna Israele kudzera muna Hosea, MBUYA adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ndoko kasembe puta mbubale naye ana, tenepo anawo anakhalambo okhonda khulupirika ninga mawo. Thangwi, ninga puta, dzikoyo yasanduka yokhonda khulupirika kuna ine, MBUYA.”" 
Hosea1:3 Natenepo Hosea adasemba mkazi dzinache Gomeri, mwana Dibulaimu. Iye adakwata mimba mbabala mwanache wautombo wamamuna." 
Hosea1:4 MBUYA adalonga kuna Hosea mbati, “Dzinache mthule Yezereele, thangwi chinchino pano ndinati nditchunyuse mfumu wa Israele, thangwi ya upandu udachita kholo wache Yehu mu Yezereele. Ine ndinati ndipuluze ufumu wa Israele." 
Hosea1:5 Pansiku yeneyo ndinavunga anyankhondo amphamvu a Israele m'phedi ya Yezereele.” 
Hosea1:6 Gomeri adakwata pontho mimba, ndzidzi wenewu adabala mwana wamkazi. Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna Hosea mbati, “Dzinache mthule ‘Nyakukhonda-funwa,’ thangwi ine nkhabeve dzaonesa anthu a ku Israele kuafuna kwanga, penu kualekerera pyakudawa pyawo tayu." 
Hosea1:7 Kwache anthu a ku Yuda ndinaaonesa kuafuna kwanga. Ine ene MBUYA Mulungu wawo ndinaapulumusa, nee na nkhondo, penu talasada, mauta penu matswimo, penu akavalo na anyakupakira akavalo tayu.”" 
Hosea1:8 Pidalekesa iye mwanache wamkazi ule bele, Gomeri adakwata pontho mimba mbabala mwana wamamuna." 
Hosea1:9 MBUYA adalonga kuna Hosea mbati, “Dzinache mthule ‘Si-anthu-anga-tayu,’ thangwi Aisraele si anthu anga tayu, pontho ine si ine Mulungu wawo tayu.”" 
Hosea1:10 Kwache Aisraele anakhala ninga tchetcha ya pagombe, ile nkhabe kwanisa kupimwa, penu kulengeseka tayu. Pambuto pale padalongwa iwo kuti, “Imwe si imwe anthu anga tayu”, penepo pene iwo anachemerwa, “Ana a Mulungu wamoyo.”" 
Hosea1:11 Anthu a ku Yuda na a ku Israele anakhala abodzi. Iwo anasankhula mkadamu wawo mbodzi, pontho iwo anainjipa, pinthu pyawo mbapiafambira mwadidi m'dziko mwawomo. Thangwi nsiku ya Yezereele inakhala nsiku ikulu pyakwanga." 
Hosea2:1 “Natenepo Aisraele anzako achemere, ‘Anthu a Mulungu,’ pontho anyamaingako achemere, ‘Anyapamtima a MBUYA.’" 
Hosea2:2 “Mlongereni manu, manu msumululeni, thangwi iye si mankhadziangave tayu, pontho ine si ine mamunacheve tayu. Mpangeni aleke makhaliro ache auputa, kukhonda khulupirika kwacheko mbakuleke." 
Hosea2:3 Gopesera ndinamdulisa nguwo zache mbandimsiya chitakwa-takwa ninga nsiku idabuluka iye m'mimba mwa mache; ndinamchitisa kukhala ninga thando yatchetcha, kumsandusa mataka amunyu, tenepo anafa na nyota." 
Hosea2:4 Anache ine nkhabe dzaaonesave kuafuna kwanga tayu, thangwi iwo mbana puta." 
Hosea2:5 Mawo nkhabe khulupirika tayu mbaakwatira mimba ya patsanga. Iye adalonga mbati, ‘Ine ndinati ndiende kuna pibwenji pyanga, ale ambandipasa phoso na madzi ene, nguwo zaubweya na nguwo zakuchena, mafuta na pyakumwa pene.’" 
Hosea2:6 “Natenepo ndinati nditchinge njirache na matsamvu aminga; ndinati ndimfungire mumpanda, towera achimwane kubulukamo." 
Hosea2:7 “Iye anati athamangire pibwenji pyache mbakhonda kuaphata; iye anaasaka-saka, kwache nkhabe kuagumana tayu. Penepo iye analonga kuti, ‘Ndinabwerera pyanga kuna mankhadzianga ninga pakutoma pale, thangwi ndzidzi wenewo ndikhali mbwenye, kupiringana muna ine leromu.’" 
Hosea2:8 “Iye hadatawire tayu kuti akhali ine pano, ule adampasa mapira, mafuta na vinyu achinchino, ule adamfumisa na siliva pontho golidi, pinaphatisa iye basa kupembedza napyo milungu Baala pile." 
Hosea2:9 Natenepo pandzidzi wakuvuna, ndinampokosera mapiranga na vinyu wachinchino. Ndinampokosera ubweya wabira na nguwo zakuchena, pikhadampasa ine kuti ampsampsike napyo pezi pache pile." 
Hosea2:10 Ndinamdulisa nguwo pamaso pa pibwenji pyache, tenepo nkhabe munthu anafuna kumsomphola m'manga mwanga tayu." 
Hosea2:11 Maphwando ache onsene ndinati ndiamalise: maphwando a chaka na chaka, Maphwando akusekera Kubalwa kwa Mwezi, pontho Nsiku Yakupuma, maphwando ache onsene akupambulika ale." 
Hosea2:12 Mfesa zache zonsene ndinamala kuzipwayula-pwayula, kuna miti yache yamakuyu ndinachita chibodzi-bodzi, pile pikhalonga iye kuti mphyakupagalwi pyache kubulukira kuna pibwenji pyache; ndinati ndipichitisa kuphopha ninga msitu, pontho nyama zam'tsanga zinapivunga." 
Hosea2:13 Ndinamtchunyusa thangwi ya kufukiza pyakununkhira kudachita iye kuna milungu Baala; iye adathemesera manungo ache na mphete, pontho na pyakuthemesera pinango mbaenda na kuthamangira pibwenji pyache, kwache ine andiduwalira. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Hosea2:14 “Natenepo ndinati ndimnyengerere; ine ndinati ndiende naye kuthando yatchetcha; kweneko ndinati ndikalonge naye mafala akuonesa kumfuna kwanga. 
Hosea2:15 Kweneko ndinati ndimbwezere mindache yamfesa, mbandisandusa Phedi ya Nyatwa kukhala Msuwo wa Chidikhiro. Kweneko iye anaimba nyimbo ninga nsiku ya utsikanache, ninga nsiku idabuluka iye m'dziko ya Iguputo." 
Hosea2:16 Ine MBUYA ndikulonga kuti pansiku yeneyo iwe unandichemera, ‘Mankhadzianga,’ iwe nkhabe kundichemerave, ‘Mbuyanga’ tayu." 
Hosea2:17 Dzina ya milungu Baala m'kanwa mwawo, ndinati ndiibulusiletu; nkhabeve pontho na kuithula kwene tayu." 
Hosea2:18 “Pansiku yeneyo ndinati ndichite nawo chiverano, na nyama zam'tsanga, na mbalame, pontho na pyakukambadza pyonsene. Mauta na matalasada pontho nkhondo pinamaliratu ngwindi m'dzikomo, towera pyonsene pikhale pamtendere pontho pakupata." 
Hosea2:19 Israele, ndinakuchitisa kukhala mankhadzianga kwenda na kwenda; ine ndinakhala wakuona mtima pontho wakukhulupirika, wakukufuna kokhonda mala, pontho wakuva nyambalo." 
Hosea2:20 Ine ndinakuchitisa kukhala mankhadzianga, mbindikhala wakukhulupirika, tenepo iwe unatawira kuti ndine MBUYA.”" 
Hosea2:21 Ine, MBUYA ndikulonga kuti, “Pansiku yeneyo ndinati ndive kupempha kwanu, ine ndinalonga kuna thambo, tenepo thambo inavumbisa mvula padziko yapansi;" 
Hosea2:22 matakambo anabalisa mapira, mfesa na miti yaolivi, tenepo ipyo pinapereka phoso kuna Yezereele." 
Hosea2:23 Israele, ndinamkhazikisa m'dzikomo. Kuna ule ndzidzi unango adachemera ine kuti, ‘Nyakukhonda-funwa,’ chinchino ndinati ndionese kumfuna kwanga. Kuna anthu ale ambachemera ine kuti, ‘Si-anthu-anga-tayu,’ ndinati ndiachemere, ‘Imwe ndimwe anthu anga,’ tenepo iwo analonga kuti, ‘Imwe ndimwe Mulungu wathu.’ ”" 
Hosea3:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Ndoko pontho ukaonese mkazako kumfuna kwako, podi kwene kuti iye asanduka puta mbathamanga na mamuna unango. Mfune ninga mumbafunira MBUYA Aisraele, podi kwene kuti iwo azungunukira kuna milungu inango mbakomerwa na kupereka nsembe zamfesa zakuuma kuna mifanikizo.”" 
Hosea3:2 Natenepo ine ndidamgula na masiliva khumi na ashanu, pontho barele wakukwana makilogramu dzana na makumashanu." 
Hosea3:3 Kubuluka penepo ndidampanga kuti, “Iwe wathema kukhala na ine nsiku zizinji zene. Leka khalave puta, penu kugona na mamuna unango, pontho ine nkhabe dzagona nawe msanga tayu.”" 
Hosea3:4 Thangwi montho-monthomo Aisraele athema kukhala ndzidzi ukulu ene akusowa mfumu penu mtongi, okhonda pereka nsembe penu kuimisa piguwa pyakupambulika, okhonda kukhumira, penu kuombedza na mifanikizo." 
Hosea3:5 Kwache m'nduli mwache Aisraele anazungunuka mbasaka MBUYA Mulungu wawo, pontho chidzukulu cha Davite mfumu wawo. Iwo anabwera mwakutetemera kuna MBUYA, pakumalisira pache anatambira mtsanzayiso wache wadidi." 
Hosea4:1 Veserani mafala a MBUYA, imwe Aisraele, thangwi imwe muna mseru na MBUYA, imwe ale mumbakhala m'dziko yeneyi. M'dzikomu nkhabemo kukhulupirika, pontho na kufunana kwene kwamalamo, kutsalakana pya Mulungu nkhabemo tayu." 
Hosea4:2 Kwasalamo nkhutembererana na kunama, kuchita upandu, kuba na uputa ene basi; kudawa kwawo nkhabe nako madire tayu, pontho ambachuchisa chiropa mwakuti upandu kuchitambo kundondolozana." 
Hosea4:3 Na thangwi ya penepi dziko ikusintili, pontho pinthu pyonsene pyakukhala mwenemo pikumala kufamo; nyama zam'tsanga na mbalame, pontho nsomba za m'bara pikumala kufa." 
Hosea4:4 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Kwache mbapaleke khala munthu kuasumulula, anthu mbaleke sumirana okhokha pyawo, thangwi anthu ako akhala ninga ambasumira nyansembe ale." 
Hosea4:5 Mosiku na masikati kwanu nkhugwegweduka; maprofetimbo ambagwegweduka namwe kubodzi. Natenepo manuyo, Israele, ndinati ndimvunge." 
Hosea4:6 Anthu anga avungwa thangwi yakusowa udziwisi; podi imwe mwakhonda udziwisi, inembo sinakuyesanive anyansembe anga tayu; podi imwe mwakhonda mwambo wa Mulungu wanu, inembo ndinapasa nkhodolo ananu." 
Hosea4:7 “Anyansembe kuinjipa nkhuinjipa kwache, ndiye anyanyiratu kuchita pyakudawika; iwo akuchinjisa demelero yawo na pinthu pyakuchitisa manyadzo." 
Hosea4:8 Phoso yawo mphyakudawa pya anthu anga; muliwo wawo mbukhala pyakuipa pya anthu anga. 
Hosea4:9 Tenepo ipyo pinakhala tenepa: Ninga anthu, chibodzi-bodzi anyansembe, ine ndinati nditchunyuse onsenewo, thangwi ya makhaliro awo, mbandiabwezera thangwi ya mabasawo akuipa." 
Hosea4:10 “Kudya anadya, kwache nkhabe khuta tayu; iwo anachita pyauputa, kwache nkhabe injipa tayu, thangwi iwo akhonda MBUYA, mbapereka manungo awo" 
Hosea4:11 kuchita uputa, pontho kumwa vinyu wakale na wachinchino, ule ambambwambwanisa nzeru za" 
Hosea4:12 anthu anga. Iwo ambavunza nzeru kuna dzimunthu, mbatawirwa na chinthu chakusema. Chizimu cha uputa chaaendesa m'tsanga; iwo nkhabe khulupirika tayu kuna Mulungu wawo." 
Hosea4:13 Iwo ambapereka nsembe pamapiri, mbafukiza pyakununkhira m'pitunda pansi pa miti yamthundu, mtondo na mfuma, pale pambakhala mthunzi wanonono. “Natenepo ananu achikazi asandukambo maputa, pontho akwenyanu asanduka akuzuda." 
Hosea4:14 Ine sinatchunyusa ananu achikazi, iwo angasanduka maputa tayu, penu akwenyanu iwo angachita pyakuzuda tayu, thangwi amuna makawo ambakhala berengu-berengu na maputa, pontho ambapereka nsembe na maputa m'nyumba zawo zakupembedzeramo, anthu akusowa nzeru anati avungike." 
Hosea4:15 “Israele, podi kwene kuti iwe ukuchita pyauputa, Yuda mbaleke gumanwa na mseru wenewu. Lekani kwenda ku Giligala; lekani kukhwiza ku Beti-Aveni. Pontho lekani dumbira kuti, ‘Ninga MBUYA wamoyo!’" 
Hosea4:16 Aisraele mtima uli nganganga kuwanga, ninga kuuma mtima kwa ng'ombe imuna. Ayi MBUYA nkhukwanisa basi kuapasa pyakudya ninga mabira mumpovu wadidi?" 
Hosea4:17 Eferemu ali phatane m'khosi na mifanikizo; mlekeni pyache! 
Hosea4:18 Iwo angamala khuta pyakuledzeresa, iwo ambasusuka kuchita pyauputa. Iwo ambafuna pyakwanga kuchita pinthu pyakululupisa manungo kupiringana pinthu pyakupasa chilemedzo." 
Hosea4:19 Chivumbulu chinati chiatswaire; iwo anachitiswa manyadzo thangwi ya nsembe imbapereka iwo kuna mifanikizo.” 
Hosea5:1 “Veserani kuno, imwe anyansembe. Ikhani makutu kuno, imwe Aisraele! Nyumba yachifumu, veserani kuno! Mseru wenewu ngwanu imwepo: Iwe wasanduka msampha mu Mizipa, ninga malitchera ale, ali ndataa mu Tabori." 
Hosea5:2 Mphandu ndiye zapita na kuchita pyakudawa; ine ndinati ndiatchunyuse onsenewo. 
Hosea5:3 Eferemu ndimbamdziwa mwadidi mwene; kuna ine Israele ali ngangambanda pakwecha. Eferemu, iwe wasanduka puta; Israelembo asanduka okhonda chena pamaso pa MBUYA.”" 
Hosea5:4 Mabasawo nkhabe kuatawirisa kubwerera kuna Mulungu wawo tayu. Chizimu cha uputa chaagudumira; iwo nkhabe tsalakana pya MBUYA tayu. 
Hosea5:5 Kutumbama kwa Israele ngumboni wakupokanyisana naye; Aisraele, podi na Eferemu ene akugwegweduka na pyakudawa pyawo; na Yuda enembo akugwegweduka nawo kubodzi." 
Hosea5:6 Iwo ambapereka nsembe za mabira na ng'ombe kusaka-saka MBUYA, mbwenye iwo nkhabe kumgumana tayu; iye aabulukira pamaso pawo." 
Hosea5:7 Iwo nkhabe khulupirika tayu kuna MBUYA; iwo ambabala ana a patsanga. Chinchino chipembedzo cha milungu inango chinati chivunge iwo na mindawo ene. 
Hosea5:8 Lizani ngoma mu Gibea, nkhwiyo mbiimbwe mu Rama. Nyamgogogo wa nkhondo mbuveke mu Beti-Aveni; tsogolera ndiwepo Benjemani." 
Hosea5:9 Eferemu anasala madembe pansiku inafuna iye dzatchunyuswa. Pakati pa madzinza a Aisraele, ine ndikulalika chadi-chadi chache cha penepi." 
Hosea5:10 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Akadamu a Yuda akhala ninga anyakubulusa pidzindikiro pya madire a miyala. Ninga madzi makulu, ine ndinabomera ukali wanga pana iwo." 
Hosea5:11 Eferemu akuponderezwa, kuva kupha na kutchunyuswa, thangwi ya kukakamira mifanikizo." 
Hosea5:12 Kuna Eferemu, ine ndakhala ninga uchenje, ninga chakuvunguma kuna anthu a ku Yuda." 
Hosea5:13 “Pidaona Eferemu utendache, pontho Yuda maso phaa pironda pyache, penepo Eferemu adazungunukira kuna Asiria, mbapempha chiphedzo kuna mfumu wamkulu. Kwache iye nkhabe kwanisa kukuwangisa tayu, pontho nkhabe kwanisa kuchiza pironda pyako tayu." 
Hosea5:14 Thangwi kuna Eferemu, ine ndinakhala ninga nkhalamu, ninga nkhalamu ikulu kuna Yuda. Ndinaakhwadzula-khwadzula mbandienda pyanga; ine ndinaathukula nawo bzaa, mbapasowa na dombo ene." 
Hosea5:15 Kubuluka penepo ndinabwerera kumbuto kwanga, kufikirana iwo atawire kudawa kwawo. Tenepo iwo anandisaka-saka; na kutsukwala kwawo kweneko, anandisaka-saka na mtimawo onsene.”" 
Hosea6:1 Anthu akulonga mbati, “Ngatendeni, tibwerere kuna MBUYA. Podi kwene kuti iye adatikhwadzula-khwadzula, iye anati atiwangise basi. Iye anamanga basi pironda pyathu, podi kwene kuti iye amala kutikuwaza." 
Hosea6:2 Sindzidzi nsiku ziwiri nkhugwanda, iye anatisisimusa pontho; pansiku yachitatu yache, anatibwezera pontho mphamvu zathu, towera tikwanise kukhalambo pamaso pache." 
Hosea6:3 Tendeni MBUYA timdziwe; mbatithimizeni kumdziwa. Ninga mumbachitira dzuwa kubuluka, iye anati aonekere, iye anati abwere kuna ife ninga mvula, ninga phumphuli kutotesa mataka padziko yapansi.”" 
Hosea6:4 Mbwenye MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ayi iwe Eferemu, ndinachita nawe tani? Nditani nawe, iwe Yuda? Kundifuna kwako kwakhala ninga nkhungu kumachibese, ninga bume ya machibese imbakungunuka ile." 
Hosea6:5 Natenepo ndidakugwanda m'mapindi-mapindi na maprofeti anga. Ine ndidakupha na mafala akubulukira m'kanwa mwanga; kutonga kwanga mseru kukuchetuma pana iwe ninga njazi. 
Hosea6:6 Thangwi chimbafuna ine nkhundifuna kokhonda mala, nee nsembe tayu, pontho kudziwa kuti ndine Mulungu kusiyana na kupereka nsembe zakupyerera." 
Hosea6:7 Ningambo Adamu, iwo aswa chiverano, kweneko iwo akhali okhonda khulupirika kuna ine." 
Hosea6:8 Gileadi ndi mzinda wa anyakudawika, pontho wa anyachirope." 
Hosea6:9 Ninga mumbachitira mapanga kubisalira anthu, ndi sasawambo na magulu a anyansembe; iwo ambapha anthu panjira yakwendera ku Shekemu, iwo ambachita pyaupandu pyakugoswa." 
Hosea6:10 Mu Israele ndaonamo chinthu chakugumisa manungo. Kweneko Eferemu akuchita pyauputa, pontho Israele asanduka okhonda chena pamaso pa MBUYA." 
Hosea6:11 “Kulongambo pya iwe, Yuda, ndzidzi wako wakutchunyuswa ukudza.”" 
Hosea7:1 “Ndzidzi unafuna ine kuchitisa pinthu pya anthu anga kufamba pontho mwadidi, pontho unafuna ine kuwangisa Israele, na ndzidzi onthowo kudawika kwa Eferemu kunaoniwa, pontho upandu onsene wa Samaria unakhala nyimwa pakwecha. Kunama nkhudya kwawo, mbava zimbaswa nyumba, mapanga basawo nkhukhalira anthu m'misewu;" 
Hosea7:2 kwache iwo nkhabe dzindikira tayu kuti ine ndimbaona mabasawo onsene akudawika ale. Pyakudawika pyawo pyamala kuabiza; ipyo pili chena pamaso panga.” 
Hosea7:3 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Na kudawika kwawoko, iwo ambachitisa mfumu kukomerwa, pontho atongi na kunama kwawo." 
Hosea7:4 Onsene ndi maputa, akugaka ninga uvuni, ule nyakuphika mikate nkhabe funa kuusesera tayu, kubulukira pa kumunya mpambo mpakana kufufuma." 
Hosea7:5 Pansiku ya phwando ya mfumu wathu, atongi adakhuta vinyu, pontho iye ambaphatana dakamawu na anyakusingirira." 
Hosea7:6 Mitimawo yakhala ninga uvuni; iwo ambafedza chifupi na iye mwaunthawatawa. Shungu yawo imbapuchira mosiku onsene; mbiyerima na machibese ninga malulume a moto. 
Hosea7:7 “Onsene ali nganda-nganda ninga uvuni; iwo ambapha akadamu awo. Mafumu awo onsene amala phiwa, nkhabe na mbodzi ene ambaikha maso ache pana ine tayu.”" 
Hosea7:8 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Eferemu avungazikana na madzinza anango; Eferemu akhala ninga mkate wakuphaphathika, wakukhonda sanduzwa-sanduzwa." 
Hosea7:9 Alendo amala kumuyamwa mphamvu zache, kwache iye nkhabe kupidzindikira tayu. Tsisi yache yamala dzala imvi, kwache iye nkhabe na kupiona kwene tayu." 
Hosea7:10 Kutumbama kwa Israele ngumboni wakupokanyisana naye, kwache podi kwene kuti iye akuona pyonsenepi, iye nkhabe funa pyakubwerera kuna MBUYA Mulungu wache, penu kumsaka-saka tayu." 
Hosea7:11 “Eferemu akhala ninga nkhangaiwa wakukhonda nensa kunyengezwa pontho wakusowa nzeru, lero kuyang'ana kuna Iguputo, mangwana kuna Asiria." 
Hosea7:12 Ndzidzi unaenda iwo, ndinaateyera msampha; ndinaamkweya ninga mbalame. Ndinaatchunyusa thangwi ya pyakuipa pyawo." 
Hosea7:13 “Dzedze kuna iwo, thangwi iwo abauka kubuluka kuna ine! Kuvungika mbakuagwere, thangwi iwo andipandukira! Ine ndimbapifuna pyakwanga kuti ndiaombole, kwache iwo ambandilongera pyakunama." 
Hosea7:14 Iwo nkhabe lira kuna ine kubulukira pansi pa mtima tayu, mbwenye kukalala kwene pamatalimba pawo. Iwo ambagumanyikana kufuna mapira na vinyu wachinchino, kwache iwo abauka kubuluka kuna ine." 
Hosea7:15 Podi kwene kuti ndidaafunzisa ndine, pontho kuapasa mphamvu ndine, kwache iwo ambasasanya basi pyakundichitira pyakuipa." 
Hosea7:16 Iwo nkhabe zungunukira kuna Nyakudzulu-dzulu tayu; iwo akhala ninga uta wakuthimfuka. Akadamu awo anafa pankhondo, thangwi ya mafalawo akushola. Na thangwi yeneyi iwo analulupiswa m'dziko ya Iguputo.”" 
Hosea8:1 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Fekani ngoma pamulomo panu! Ninga malezi, anyamalwa awumbikira Nyumba ya MBUYA, thangwi anthu aswa chiverano changa, pontho apandukira mwambo wanga." 
Hosea8:2 Israele akulira kuna ine mbati, ‘Ife takutawirani kuti ndimwe Mulungu wathu!’" 
Hosea8:3 Kwache Israele akhonda chinthu chadidi; anyamalwa anati amthamangise. 
Hosea8:4 Iwo ambapitisa pyawo mafumu okhonda kundipempha; iwo ambasankhula atongi, okhonda ine kuatsikimizira. Na siliva pontho golidi wawo, iwo ambapisasanyira mifanikizo, pinthu pyakuti pimbavunga enechiroache onthowo." 
Hosea8:5 Taya mfanikizo wako wa mwanamphulu, iwe Samaria! Kuzhangali kwanga kukugaka pana iwepo. Iwo anakhala okhonda chena kufikirana lini?" 
Hosea8:6 Icho ntchakubulukira ku Israele! Mwanamphuluyu, mfanikizo wakusasanywa na manja a nyaluso; icho si Mulungu tayu. Icho chinati chigwandwe m'mapindi-mapindi, mfanikizo wa ku Samaria ule!" 
Hosea8:7 “Israele ambabzala mphepo mbavuna chivumbulu. Mphesi nkhabe ngala tayu; izo nkhabe dzabulusa ufa tayu. Podi kwene kuti udzabuluse mapira, anyakudza pyawo ndiye anadya mapirawo." 
Hosea8:8 Israele amala khudyulwa; chinchino iye ali pakati pa madzinza ninga chinthu chakusowa basa. 
Hosea8:9 Thangwi iwo aenda mpakana ku Asiria ninga bulu wam'tsanga wakwenda pyache mbatsalakatika. Eferemu apigulisa yekha ene kuna pibwenji pyache. 
Hosea8:10 Podi kwene kuti apigulisa okha ene pakati pa madzinza, chinchino ndinati ndiagumanyise pabodzi pene. Iwo anati asanyike pikulu pene, thangwi ya nyatwa zakubulukira kuna mfumu wa Asiria." 
Hosea8:11 “Podi kwene kuti Eferemu adapimangira maguwa azinji ene akupereka nsembe zakubulusira pyakudawa, maguwa enewa asanduka akuchitira pyakudawa." 
Hosea8:12 Ine ndidaalembera pinthu pizinji pyakulonga pya matongero anga, kwache iwo adapiyesa ninga pinthu pinango pyachilendo." 
Hosea8:13 Iwo ambapereka nsembe zanyama kuna ine, tenepo ambadya pyawo nyamazo, kwache ine, MBUYA, nkhabe komerwa nawo tayu. Chinchino ndaikha konta pyakudawa pyawo pyonsene, mbandiatchunyusa thangwi ya pyakudawa pyawo. Iwo anabwerera ku Iguputo." 
Hosea8:14 Israele aduwalira Nyakumsasanya, mbamanga pyache nyumba zachifumu; Yuda amanga mizinda mizinji yakutchingwa na mpanda; kwache ndinati ndigwise moto pana mizindawo, ule unafuna vunga nyumba na mipandawo ene.”" 
Hosea9:1 Leka komerwa, iwe Israele; leka sekera ninga mumbachitira madzinza anangowa, thangwi iwe wakhonda khulupirika kuna Mulungu wako; iwe umbakomerwa na kupagalwi thangwi ya uputako pambuwa ponsene pene panaponda iwepo." 
Hosea9:2 Mbuwa na madzenje akutchitchithira vinyu nkhabe kwanisa kukhutisa anthu tayu; vinyu wachinchino nkhabe dzakhalapo tayu. 
Hosea9:3 Iwo nkhabe thimiza kukhala m'dziko ya MBUYA tayu. Eferemu anabwerera ku Iguputo mbadya pyakudya pyokhonda chena mu Asiria. 
Hosea9:4 Iwo nkhabe dzapereka nsembe ya vinyu kuna MBUYA, penu nsembe zawozo kumchitisa kukomerwa tayu. Kuna iwo nsembe ninga zenezi zinakhala ninga mikate ya anyakusintili, onsene anyakuidya anasanduka okhonda chena. Pyakudya penepi pinakhala pyawo pene basi, ipyo nkhabe kupitiswa m'Nyumba ya MBUYA tayu." 
Hosea9:5 Ayi munachita tani pansiku ya maphwando anu akupambulika, pansiku ya phwando ya MBUYA?" 
Hosea9:6 Podi kwene kuti iwo ayesere pyawo tani kuthawa nyatwa, Iguputo anati aagumanyise, pontho Memfisi anati afikhire. Mfumawo ya siliva inaphimbirwa na matenthere, pontho minga inaphimbira makumbi awo." 
Hosea9:7 Nsiku zikudza zinafuna iwo kutchunyuswa; nsiku zakuona nyatwa zili pamsuwo; Israele mbadziwe penepi. Na thangwi yakuti pyakudawa pyako mphizinji pyakwanga, pontho wadzala na chizondi, kuna iwe mprofeti ambayeswa pupwe, pontho munthu waudziwisi ambayeswa nyansala," 
Hosea9:8 Mulungu andiikha kukhala mprofeti kucheuza anthu ache, Israele, kwache misampha ikundidikhira m'njira zonsene, pontho anyakundizonda ali m'Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
Hosea9:9 Iwo amala bira m'mathaphwinya a pyakuipa ninga mukhali ipyo na amuna a mu Gibea. Mulungu nkhabe dzaduwalira kudawika kwachita iwo, mbaatchunyusa thangwi ya pyakudawa pyawo." 
Hosea9:10 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ndzidzi udagumana ine Israele pikhali ninga ndagumana mfesa m'thando yatchetcha. Pidaona ine babako pikhali ninga kuona nsapo zakuchimbiza kufira m'muti wamakuyu. Mbwenye pidadza iwo ku Baala-Peori, iwo adapipambulira okha ene kuna mfanikizo wakuchitisa manyadzo ule mbasanduka akunyansa ninga mfanikizo ontho umbafuna iwo ule." 
Hosea9:11 Demelero ya Eferemu inambuluka ninga mbalame, nee kubala, nee mimba penu kukwata mimba tayu." 
Hosea9:12 Podi kwene kuti iwo akuze pyawo ana tani, ine ndinaapuluza onsenewo mbandikhonda dzasiya na moyo na mbodzi ene. Anyadzedze ndiwo ndingaapasa nkhodolo!”" 
Hosea9:13 Eferemu ine ndamuona ninga Turo, wakubzalwa m'mataka adidi. Kwache Eferemu anapereka anache m'manja mwa mphandu." 
Hosea9:14 MBUYA apaseni, ninji chinafuna imwe kuapasa? Apaseni nthumbo zakupolozwa, pontho mabele ale nkhabe buluka mkaka tayu." 
Hosea9:15 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Na thangwi ya pyakudawa pyawo pyonsene pidachita iwo mu Giligala, ine ndidanyansirwa nawo kweneko. Na thangwi ya makhaliro awo akuipa ine ndinaathamangisa m'Nyumba mwanga. Ine nkhabe kuafunave tayu; akadamu awo onsene ngakupandukira." 
Hosea9:16 Eferemu amala unyala, mitsitsi yache yamala dudumuka, tenepo iye nkhabe bala nsapo tayu. Podi kwene kuti iwo abale ana, ine ndinapha ana apamtima pawo makawo.”" 
Hosea9:17 Mulungu wanga anati aakhonde, thangwi iwo hadamvere tayu; iwo anasanduka manzenza pakati pa madzinza." 
Hosea10:1 Israele akhali mtawi wamfesa wakuvata mbapidzesera yekha ene nsapo zizinji. Pikhainjipa nsapo zache, iye akhamanga maguwa mazinji ansembe; pikhafamba mwadidi pinthu m'dziko mwache, iye adafuna pyakwanga kupembedza piguwa pyakupambulika." 
Hosea10:2 Mitimawo njakunama, natenepo chinchino iwo athema kuona nyatwa, thangwi ya kudawa kwawo. MBUYA anagomola maguwawo ansembe mbavunga piguwa pyawo pyakupambulika." 
Hosea10:3 Penepo iwo anati alonge kuti, “Ife nkhabe mfumu, thangwi MBUYA sidamgope tayu. Mbwenye podi kwene kuti mbatidakhala naye mfumu, ayi iye mbadatichitiranji?”" 
Hosea10:4 Iwo ambalonga mafala apezi, ambadumbira pyakunama, mbachita piverano pyakunama unango na mwanzache; natenepo miseru ikuchita kuphukira ninga dawe m'munda wakutipula kale."
