Hosea10:5 Anyakukhala mu Samaria aswipa mtima na mfanikizo wa mwanamphulu wa ku Beti-Aveni. Anthu ache anati ausintili, mbachita chibodzi-bodzi kuna anyansembe ache ale ambapembedza mifanikizo, ale kale akhakomerwa na demelero yache, thangwi abuluswa pakati pawo kwenda kudziko ya unyaperezo." 
Hosea10:6 Mfanikizowo unakwatwa kwenda ku Asiria ninga mtukwa kuna mfumu wamkulu. Eferemu anachitiswa manyadzo; Israele analulupiswa thangwi ya mifanikizo yache ya miti. 
Hosea10:7 Samaria na mfumu wache ene anabeluka kwenda ninga chigo kubeluka pamadzi. 
Hosea10:8 Mbuto zakupembedzerapo milungu za Aveni zinavungwa, kweneko nkhule kudadawisa Aisraele. Ntcheswa na dawe pinakula mbapiphimbira maguwawo. Tenepo iwo analonga kuna mapiri mbati, “Tiphimbireni pyathu!” Pontho kuna pitunda mbati, “Tigwereni pyathu!”" 
Hosea10:9 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Kutomera pandzidzi wa Gibea, iwe Israele wadawa, mbukhala pyako theliyee. Ayi nkhondo hidapuluze tayu anyakuchita pyakuipa a mu Gibea?" 
Hosea10:10 Ndingapifuna, ndinati nditchunyuse mphanduzi; madzinza anagumanyikana kupokanyisana nawo, kuamanga na njema thangwi ya kuinjipa kwa pyakudwa pyawo." 
Hosea10:11 “Eferemu akhala ninga mwanamphulu wakufunziswa mwadidi, wakusasanyika kububuda mapira, tenepo ndinammangira goli m'khosi mwache yamyaa. Eferemu ndinamfambisa, pontho Yuda athema kutipula, Yakobombo athema kuchakacha mataka." 
Hosea10:12 Pibzalire wekha ene kulungama, tchola nsapo za kufunana kokhonda mala; mbutipule mundako okhonda tipulwa, thangwi uno ndi ndzidzi wakusaka-saka MBUYA kufikirana iye adze mbavumbisa mafazi a pyakulungama pana iwe." 
Hosea10:13 Kwache iwe wabzala pyakudawika, iwe wavuna pyakuipa mbudya nsapo za pinthu pyakunama. Na thangwi yakuti iwe wanyindira mphamvu zako, pontho anyankhondo ako azinjiwo," 
Hosea10:14 nkhondo inaotoka pana iwe mwakuti mipandako yonsene yamphamvu inamala vungwa ninga mudavungira Mfumu Shalimani mzinda wa Beti-Aribele pansiku ya nkhondo, pikhamenyeswa amama pansi pabodzi pene na anawo." 
Hosea10:15 Penepi ndiye pinafuna kuchitika kuna iwe, Betele, thangwi wanyanya kudawa. Nsiku yeneyo ingafika mfumu wa ku Israele anamala vungwa monsene mwene.”" 
Hosea11:1 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Pikhali Israele mwana, ine ndikhamfuna, mbandimchemera ninga mwananga kubuluka mu Iguputo." 
Hosea11:2 Kwache kunyanya kuachemera Aisraele kukhachita ine, iwo ndiye adanyanyiratu kubauka kubuluka kuna ine. Iwo adapereka nsembe kuna milungu Baala mbafukiza pyakununkhira kuna mifanikizo." 
Hosea11:3 Ndine pano ndidamfunzisa Eferemu kuthatchira, kumphata pamkono, kwache iye hadapidzindikire tayu kuti adamuwangisa ndine pano." 
Hosea11:4 Ine ndidamkweyera kuna ine mwakumfuna, pontho na kukoma kwanga mtima. Ine ndidamthukula mbandimtsamirisa paphutu panga; ine ndidakotama kumdyesa." 
Hosea11:5 “Ayi iwo nkhabe bwerera ku Iguputo, pontho Aasiria nkhabe kuatonga tayu, na thangwi yakuti iwo akhonda leka pyakudawa pyawo?" 
Hosea11:6 Matalasada anachetuma-chetuma m'mizinda mwawo; mphinga za misuwo ya mzinda zinamala vungwa, pontho anthu anavungwa thangwi ya pinthu pyasasanya iwo dzapichita." 
Hosea11:7 Anthu anga ana phinga kufuna kubauka kubuluka kuna ine. Podi kwene iwo alire tani thangwi ya goli-goli yawo, kwache nkhabe na mbodzi ene wakuabulusira tayu." 
Hosea11:8 “Ayi iwe, Israele ndikukhonderenji? Thangwi yache ninji ndikupase nkhodolo iwe? Ndikuvungirenji ninga mudachitira ine na mizinda ya Adima, penu Zeboimu? Mtimanga nkhabe kunditawirisa kuchita tenepo tayu; nyambalo andikulira pyakwanga." 
Hosea11:9 Ukali wanga nkhabe dzaukhuthula tayu, penu kuzungunuka kumvunga Eferemu nkhabe tayu. Thangwi ine ndine Mulungu, nee munthu tayu, Nyakuchena pakati panu. Ine nkhabe kudza mwakuzhangali tayu." 
Hosea11:10 “Anthu anga anatewera ine, MBUYA; ine ndingabangula ninga nkhalamu, ananga anati abwere na kutetemera kubulukira kumadokero dzuwa." 
Hosea11:11 Iwo anabwera na kutetemera na mantha ninga mbalame kubulukira ku Iguputo, ninga majiwa kubulukira ku Asiria. Ine ndinaakhazikisa m'misa mwawo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Hosea11:12 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Eferemu andizungulira na pyakunama; Israele andizungulira na ufaka-faka. Yuda akuthimbanambo pyache na Mulungu, kuthimbana pyache podi na Nyakuchena wakukhulupirika makayo.”" 
Hosea12:1 “Eferemu kwache nkhudya mphepo; nsiku zonsene iye ambathamangisa pyache mphepo yakumabulukiro dzuwa, mbapithimizira yekha ene pyakunama na kuzunguzika. Iye ambachita chiverano na dziko ya Asiria mbatumiza mafuta aolivi ku Iguputo.”" 
Hosea12:2 MBUYA ana mseru na Yuda; iye anatchunyusa Yakobo malingana na makhaliro ache mbambwezera mwakuthemerana na mabasache. 
Hosea12:3 M'mimba mwa mache, iye adaphata chitende cha mbaleache; pidasanduka iye mamunamkulu, iye adathimbana na Mulungu." 
Hosea12:4 Iye adathimbana na mngelo mbamkunda; iye adalira mbampempha kuti amkomere mtima. Iye adamgumana pa Betele mbalongesana naye penepo," 
Hosea12:5 MBUYA Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene, MBUYA ndi dzina yache imbadziwika na iye." 
Hosea12:6 Mbwenye imwe mwathema kubwerera kuna Mulungu wanu; thimizani khalani akufunana mbamuchite chilungamo; ndzidzi onsene khalani na chidikhiro pana Mulungu wanu. 
Hosea12:7 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Israele akhala ninga nyamalonda ule ambaphatisa basa midida yakunama; iye ambakomerwa na kuchita pinthu mwakuba." 
Hosea12:8 Eferemu ambagaya pyache mbati, ‘Ehede! Ndine nyakufuma pyakwanga pene. Na mfuma yonsene ina ine, iwo nkhabe kundigumana na chakuipa, penu na chakudawa tayu.’" 
Hosea12:9 “Ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu, adakubulusani m'dziko ya Iguputo ule; ndinakuchitisani pontho kukhala m'makumbi ninga mukhali ipyo nsiku za maphwando anu akupambulika ale." 
Hosea12:10 Ine ndidalonga na maprofeti, ndidaaonesa masomphenya azinji ene mbandilonga misangani kudzera muna iwo." 
Hosea12:11 Ayi Gileadi ndi nyakudawa? Ayi anthu ache ngakusowa basa? Ayi iwo ambapereka nsembe ng'ombe zimuna mu Giligala? Maguwawo ansembe anasanduka milu ya madongolomwa m'munda wakutipulwa.” 
Hosea12:12 Yakobo adathawira kudziko ya Aramu; Israele adaphata basa kuti asembe mkazi, tenepo kuti iye akwate mkazi, iye adaphata basa yakudyesa mabira." 
Hosea12:13 MBUYA adaphatisa basa mprofeti kuti abuluse Israele mu Iguputo, tenepo pakuphatisa basa mprofetiyo, iye adamuyang'anira mwadidi." 
Hosea12:14 Kwache Eferemu amzhangalisa pikulu pene; kuchuchisa chiropa konsene kudachita iwo MBUYA anati akugwesere pamsolo pache mbabwezera thangwi ya kutikana kwache konsene. 
Hosea13:1 Ndzidzi udabulusa Eferemu fala, anthu adatetemera; iye adapaswa chilemedzo mu Israele. Kwache iye adadawa pakutenukira kuna milungu Baala, natenepo iye adafa." 
Hosea13:2 Chinchino akuthimiza basi kudawa; na siliva iwo ambapisasanyira milungu, iwo ambasasanya mifanikizo yawo mwaluso; yonseneyo basa ya manja aluso. Pya anthu enewa ambalongwa kuti, “Iwo ambapereka anthu ninga nsembe mbampsompsona milomo ya mifanikizo ya mwanamphulu.”" 
Hosea13:3 Natenepo iwo anakhala ninga nkhungu ya kumachibese, ninga bume ile imbakungunuka pyayo, ninga dzungu yakumbuluka pyayo kubulukira pa mbuwa, ninga utsi wakubuluka na pazhanera." 
Hosea13:4 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Kwache ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu, adakubulusani m'dziko ya Iguputo ule. Imwe nee mwathema kukhala na Mulungu unango tayu, mbwenye ine ene basi, nkhabe Nyankhombo unango padzulu pa ine pano." 
Hosea13:5 M'thando yatchetcha, mbuto yakupisa pyakwanga ile, ine ndidakuyang'anirani mwadidi." 
Hosea13:6 Ndzidzi udaapasa ine phoso, iwo adakhuta; pidakhuta iwo, adatoma kugaya; kubuluka penepo adandiduwalira pyawo." 
Hosea13:7 Natenepo ndinabwera pana iwo ninga nkhalamu; ninga nyalugwe, ine ndinaabisalira swiswiswi." 
Hosea13:8 Ninga mbinzi wakuberwa anache, ine ndinati ndiaphate, ndinati ndiatumbule pamimba. Ninga nkhalamu ndinati ndiakhudyule, ninga chirombo cham'tsanga ndinati ndiakhwadzule khwadzule." 
Hosea13:9 “Israele, ndinati ndikuvunge. Ayi pana unango ule anakwanisa kukuphedza?" 
Hosea13:10 Ali kupi mfumu wako kuti akupulumuse? Atongi ako ale ali kupi m'maluwani mwako monsene; atongi adalonga iwe pya iwo ale kuti, ‘Ngandipase mfumu pontho atongi?’" 
Hosea13:11 Tenepo na kuzhangali kwanga ine ndidakupasa mfumu, pontho na ukali wanga ine ndidambulusa." 
Hosea13:12 Pyakuipa pya Eferemu pikukoyiwa; pyakudawa pyache pyachita kulembwa m'bukhu. 
Hosea13:13 Mtswotswo khala ninga mkazi wamimba pakulekwa, lero wamgwerambo, kwache iye ndi mwana wakusowa nzeru; ndzidzi wache ungakwana iye nkhabe buluka m'mimba mwa mache tayu." 
Hosea13:14 “Ine nkhabe dzaapulumusa tayu kuna mphamvu za masiye; ine nkhabe dzaaombola kuimfa tayu. Ayi iwe imfa, ili kupi miliri yako? Mphamvu zako zili kupi, iwe dziko ya anyakufa? “Ine nkhabe dzava nyambalo tayu," 
Hosea13:15 podi kwene kuti pinthu pyache pimfambire mwadidi pakati pa abale ache. Mbalu inabwera kubulukira kuna MBUYA, kudima kubulukira kuthando yatchetcha; mphuno zache za madzi nkhabe dzabulusa madzi tayu, pontho micherache inamala uma kakata. Mfumache yonsene inamala pokoserwa kubulukira m'nyumbache mumbaikoyiwa iye mule." 
Hosea13:16 Anthu a ku Samaria, pyakuipa pyawo pyathema kugwera pamsolo pawo, thangwi iwo apandukira Mulungu wawo. Iwo anafa pankhondo; anawo anamenyeswa pansi, akazawo amimba anatumbulwa.”" 
Hosea14:1 Bwerera, Israele, kuna MBUYA Mulungu wako. Pyakudawa pyako ndiye pyakubwezera m'nduli!" 
Hosea14:2 Chita kumdembetera, mbubwerere kuna MBUYA. Longa kuna iye kuti, “Tilekerereni pyakudawa pyathu pyonsene mbamutitambire na kukoma kwanu mtima, towera tikukuzeni na pakanwa pathu." 
Hosea14:3 Anthu a ku Asiria nkhabe kutipulumusa tayu; ife nkhabe dzapakira akavalo ankhondo tayu. Ife nkhabe dzalongave pontho tayu kuti, ‘Milungu yathu,’ kuna pinthu pyasasanya manjathu, thangwi imwe mumbava nyambalo na ana masiye.”" 
Hosea14:4 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ine ndinaabulusira kukhonda khulupirika kwawo, mbandiafuna pikulu pene, thangwi ukali wanga wabuluka pana iwo." 
Hosea14:5 Kuna Aisraele ine ndinakhala ninga bume; iwombo anachita maluwa ninga maluwa a m'madzi. Ninga mikungudza ya ku Lebanoni, iwo anaikha mitsitsi yawo pansi pyakwanga." 
Hosea14:6 Iwo anakhala na mphukira; kubalika kwawo kunakhala ninga muti waolivi, mgwadi-gwadi wawo ninga mikungudza ya ku Lebanoni." 
Hosea14:7 Anthu anakhala pontho m'mithunzi mwanga; iwo anakavuka ninga mapira. Iwo anachita maluwa ninga mfesa, pontho kuveka kwawo kunakhala ninga vinyu wa ku Lebanoni." 
Hosea14:8 Iwe Eferemu, taya kutali mifanikizo. Ine ndinakutawira mbandikuyang'anira mwadidi. Ine ndakhala ninga muti uwisi wapaina; mtsanzayiso wako umbabulukira kuna ine pano.”" 
Hosea14:9 Nyanzeru mbani? Iye anati adzindikire pinthu ipi. Mbani ana udziwisi? Iye anati avesere pinthu penepi. Njira za MBUYA nsakulungama; anyakulungama ambazitewera, mbwenye anyakupandukira ambagwegwedukamo." 
Joel1:1 Izi ndi mphangwa za MBUYA, zile zidadza kuna Yowele mwana Petuele." 
Joel1:2 Ngavani kuno imwe akulu-akulu, veserani imwe monsene ale anyakukhala m'dzikomo. Ayi chipo pinthu ninga penepi pidzati kukuchitikirani, penu nsiku za makolo anu?" 
Joel1:3 Longani penepi kuna ananu, ananumbo apilongembo kuna anawo, pontho anawombo apilonge kuna mfendu unangowo." 
Joel1:4 Pinthu pyasiya nyadzombe mabobo amala kupidya; pinthu pyasiya mabobo, mphombo zamala kupidya; pinthu pyasiya mphombo nthete zamala kupidya." 
Joel1:5 Kungunukani imwe madombe, mbamulire! Sintilini imwe, anyakumwa vinyu; sintilini thangwi vinyu wanu wachinchino mwapokoserwa uku ali pamulomo panu." 
Joel1:6 Anyankhondo apita m'dziko mwanga ninga nyadzombe, amphamvu pontho okhonda lengeseka. Iwo ana mano ninga a nkhalamu; ntchabwada zawo ninga nkhalamu ikazi." 
Joel1:7 Iwo amala vunga mitawi yanga yamfesa mbavunga miti yanga yamkuyu. Iwo akupula mabade a miti yanga mbaataya, mbasiya nthambi zili nyimwa-nyimwa." 
Joel1:8 Sintilini ninga mwali wakuvala masakha, kulira thangwi ya kufa kwa mamuna adavunzirwa na iye." 
Joel1:9 Mapira na pyakumwa nkhabe perekwave tayu ninga nsembe m'Nyumba ya MBUYA. Anyansembe akusintili, anyakutumikira pamaso pa MBUYA ale." 
Joel1:10 Minda yamala guga; mataka ali kakata; mapira amala vungika, vinyu wachinchino amala uma, mafuta aolivi achimwana kubuluka." 
Joel1:11 Tayani mtima imwe anyakulima; lirani imwe anyakulima munda wamfesa; sintilini thangwi ya tirigu na barele, thangwi pyakuvuna pyonsene pya m'munda pyamala vungika." 
Joel1:12 Mfesa waumiratu kakata, pontho makuyu aunyala; ntheme, mdikhwa, na mapoza, miti yonsene ya m'munda yamala dudumuka; ndimomwene kukomerwa kwa munthu kwamala kwenda." 
Joel1:13 Valani masakha, imwe anyansembe mbamulira; sintilini imwe anyakutumikira paguwa yansembe. Idzani, valani masakha mosiku onsene, imwe anyakutumikira pamaso pa Mulungu wanga; thangwi mapira na pyakumwa nkhabe perekwave tayu ninga nsembe m'Nyumba ya Mulungu wanu." 
Joel1:14 Khazikisani ndzidzi wakupimana kudya; chemeresani mgumano wakupambulika. Chemeresani akulu-akulu na onsene anyakukhala m'dzikomo, kudza ku Nyumba ya MBUYA Mulungu wanu mbamulirire kuna MBUYA." 
Joel1:15 Mama ine! Thangwi nsiku ya MBUYA ili chifupi! Iyo inafika na kuvunga kubulukira kuna Nyamphamvu zonsene. 
Joel1:16 Ayi ife sidapione tayu na maso athu kuti phoso yathu yamala vungika, pontho kukomerwa na kusekera kwabuluswa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu wathu?" 
Joel1:17 Mbewu zikufa m'mataka akuuma. Nyumba zakukoyeramo pinthu zamala sanduka madembe, pikwa pyamala vungwa, thangwi mapira amala uma pyawo." 
Joel1:18 Ng'ombe ndiye zanyanya kulira, pifuyo pikwenda pyawo mbapinzenza, thangwi nkhabe mpovu kuti ipyo pidye; podi na mikumbi ene ya mabira ili nkhong'o-nkhong'o." 
Joel1:19 Ine ndikulira kuna imwe MBUYA thangwi moto wamala vunga mpovu, pontho malulume a moto amala pisa miti yonsene ya m'minda." 
Joel1:20 Podi na nyama zene zam'tsanga zikulira kuna imwe; mikulo ya madzi yamala uma, pontho moto wamala vunga mpovu onsene." 
Joel2:1 Lizani ngoma mu Zioni; lizani nkhwiyo paphiri yanga yakuchena. Onsene ale ambakhala m'dzikomo mbatetemere na mantha, thangwi nsiku ya MBUYA ikudza. Iyo yafika kale chifupi," 
Joel2:2 nsiku ya mdima pontho kutsukwala, nsiku ya makole pontho mdima wa mbani weneyo. Ninga makole kumwinikira paphiri yonsene, gulu ikulu ya anyankhondo amphamvu inabwera, ile chipo hidzati khalapo tayu, penu nkhabe khalapove tayu mifendu yonsene." 
Joel2:3 Patsogolo pawo moto ukuvunga pinthu, m'nduli mwawo moto ukuyerima. Patsogolo pawo dziko yakhala ninga munda wa Edeni, m'nduli mwawo ndi thando yatchetcha, nkhabe chinthu na chibodzi chene chasala na moyo tayu." 
Joel2:4 Iwo ambaoneka ninga akavalo; ambathamanga ninga akavalo ankhondo. 
Joel2:5 Iwo ambanumpha pansonga ya mapiri mbathamanga ninga pingolo pyankhondo. Iwo akuthothomuka ninga maudzu akupiswa moto, pontho ninga gulu ya anyankhondo amphamvu iwo andandalika kumenya nkhondo." 
Joel2:6 Madzinza angati kwene nawo soo, ambatetemera na mantha; nkhope ya munthu onsene imbabuluka kaluma." 
Joel2:7 Iwo ambasosa ninga anyankhondo amphamvu; ambakwira mafufu ninga anyankhondo. Onsene ambafamba pamzera ubodzi ene mbakhonda bauka. 
Joel2:8 Iwo nkhabe gwinyana-gwinyana tayu. Munthu onsene maso ali patsogolo uku akufamba. Iwo akugwanda na pakati pa pida pyankhondo mbakhonda kuimiswa. 
Joel2:9 Iwo ambanumphira mumzindamo; iwo ambathamanga na padzulu pa mpanda. Iwo ambakwira mpanda mbapita m'nyumba; ninga mbava, iwo ambapita m'nyumbazo na pa mazhanera." 
Joel2:10 Dziko imbatekenyeka pamaso pawo, thambo imbatetemera na mantha. Dzuwa na mwezi pyamala chita chidima, pontho nyenyezi nkhabeve onesa cheza tayu." 
Joel2:11 MBUYA akudima ninga chiphaliwali patsogolo pa anyankhondo ache; anyankhondo ache nkhabe lengeseka tayu, pontho anyamphamvu ngale ambavera matongero ache. Nsiku ya MBUYA njikulu pyakwanga; iyo njakupasa mantha. Mbani anakwanisa kupirira nayo?" 
Joel2:12 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Podi chinchino ene pano bwererani kuna ine na mtimanu onsene, na kupimana kudya, pontho kulira na kusintili.”" 
Joel2:13 Ng'ambani mtimanu, nee pyakuvala pyanu tayu, bwererani kuna MBUYA Mulungu wanu, thangwi iye ngwakukoma mtima, pontho wakuva nyambalo; iye nkhabe chipsu tayu, pontho kuafuna kwache anthu nkhokhonda mala. Iye ndzidzi onsene ngwakusasanyika kumbombowesa ukali wache, nee kugwisa nyatwa tayu." 
Joel2:14 Mbani anapidziwa? Mwinango anambombowesa ukali wache mbakuverani nsisi, pontho mbakutsanzayisani na phoso. Tenepo munakhala na mapira na pyakumwa kuti piperekwe nsembe kuna MBUYA Mulungu wanu." 
Joel2:15 Lizani ngoma mu Zioni, khazikisani ndzidzi wakupimana kudya, chemeresa mgumano wakupambulika." 
Joel2:16 Gumanyisani anthu, uchitiseni kukhala mgumano wakupambulika. Gumanyisani pabodzi pene akulu-akulu, ana ang'ono agumanyiseni, ali kubele kwa amawo kuyamwa ale. Nyakukazhali mbasiye subi yache pontho nyakusembwa mbabuluke m'nyumba mwache." 
Joel2:17 Anyansembe, ale ambatumikira m'nyumba ya MBUYA, mbalire pakati pa guwa yansembe na msuwo wa Nyumba ya Mulungu. Iwo mbalonge kuti, “Verani nsisi anthu anu MBUYA. Lekani chitisa anthu anu kukhala chinthu chakusekesa chakusedegulwa pakati pa madzinza anango. Thangwi yache ninji kuti iwo alonge pakati pa madzinza anango kuti, ‘Ali kupi Mulungu wawo?’ ”" 
Joel2:18 Penepo MBUYA adachita ntchanje na dziko yache, mbavera nsisi anthu ache." 
Joel2:19 MBUYA adatawira mbati, “Ine ndinakutumizirani mapira, vinyu wachinchino na mafuta, pyakukwanisa kukhutisa mimba zanu; ine nkhabeve kukuchitisani kukhala chakusekesa pakati pa madzinza anango tayu." 
Joel2:20 “Ine ndinati ndithamangise kutali anyankhondo akumpoto, mbandiagwinyira kudziko yakuuma pontho yakusowa pyakumera, akutsogolo ndinaathamangisira ku Nyanza Yakufa, pontho akunduli ndinaathamangisira ku Bara ya Mediterania. Penepo mitembo yawo inanunkha pyakwanga; khwemache mbikalangira. “Ndimomwene MBUYA aphata basa pikulu." 
Joel2:21 Leka gopa iwe dziko; komerwa pontho sekera. Ndimomwene MBUYA aphata basa pikulu. 
Joel2:22 Lekani chita mantha imwe nyama zam'tsanga, thangwi mbuto zakuuma zasanduka za mpovu. Miti ikubala nsapo zache; makuyu na mfesa zabulusa nsapo zizinji." 
Joel2:23 “Komerwani imwe anthu a mu Zioni, sekerani thangwi ya pinthu pyachita MBUYA Mulungu wanu. Iye ambakuvumbisirani phumphuli pandzidzi wache. Iye ambakutumizirani mafazi azinji ene, mvula ya chaka na ya mainja ene ninga pakutoma pale." 
Joel2:24 Mbuwa zinadzala na mapira; mabuyawu anatayikira na vinyu wachinchino pontho na mafuta aolivi. 
Joel2:25 “Ine ndinati ndikubwezereni pyonsene thangwi ya pyaka pidadya nyadzombe, mabobo, mphombo na nthete, anyankhondo anga amphamvu adatumiza ine pakati panu ale." 
Joel2:26 Imwe munakhala na phoso izinji, mpakana kukhutisa mimba zanu, penepo imwe munakuza dzina ya MBUYA Mulungu wanu, ule adachita pyakudodomesa pakati panu; anthu anga nkhabeve dzachita manyadzo tayu." 
Joel2:27 Penepo munapidziwa kuti ine ndili mu Israele, kuti ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu pontho kuti nkhabeve unango tayu; anthu anga nkhabeve dzachita manyadzo tayu." 
Joel2:28 “Kubuluka penepo ndinakhuthulira mzimu wanga pana anthu onsene: ananu achimuna na achikazi analonga mphangwa zauprofeti, nkhalamba zinalota ndoto, aphalembo anaona masomphenya." 
Joel2:29 Podi na anyabasanga ene, amuna na akazi ene, ndinati ndiakhuthulire mzimu wanga nsiku zenezo." 
Joel2:30 Ine ndinati ndionese pyakudodomesa kudzulu, pontho padziko yapansi, panakhala chiropa, moto na utsi ukulu." 
Joel2:31 Dzuwa inasanduka mdima, pontho mwezi unasanduka chiropa, mbidzati fika nsiku ikulu, pontho yakugoswa ya MBUYA." 
Joel2:32 Tenepo onsene ale ambachemera dzina ya MBUYA anapulumuswa; thangwi paphiri ya Zioni na mu Yerusalemu panakhala kupulumuswa ninga montho mwapilongera MBUYA, pakati pa anyakusalira na moyo, ale adachemerwa na MBUYA.”" 
Joel3:1 “Nsiku zenezo pontho pandzidzi wenewo ndingachitisa pinthu pya Yuda na Yerusalemu kufamba pontho mwadidi," 
Joel3:2 ndinagumanyisa madzinza onsenene mbandiadzesa ku Phedi ya Yehosafati. Kweneko ine ndinaatonga mseru, thangwi ya pidachita iwo kuna anthu anga Israele; thangwi iwo adabalalisa anthu anga pakati pa madzinza anango, mbagawana pyawo dziko yanga." 
Joel3:3 Iwo adachitira ntsango anthu anga mbachinjisa aphale na maputa; iwo adagulisa atsikana na vinyu, towera iwo amwe." 
Joel3:4 “Ayi pinayesera imwe kuchita kuna ine ninji, imwe anthu a ku Turo na Sidoni, pontho na anthu onsene a nthemba za Afilisti? Ayi imwe munafuna pyakubwezera thangwi ya pinthu pyachita ine? Ngakhala imwe mukundibwezera, ndinati ndigwesere pamsolo panu, mwakuchimbiza, pinthu pyandichita imwepi." 
Joel3:5 Thangwi imwe mudakwata siliva na golidi wanga mbamukwata pontho mfumanga yadidiletu kwenda nayo kunyumba zakupembedzeramo milungu yanu. 
Joel3:6 Imwe mudagulisa anthu anga a ku Yuda na Yerusalemu kuna Agriki, towera muaendese kutali na dziko yawo." 
Joel3:7 “Yang'anani, ine ndinati ndiabuluse kumbuto zidaagulisa imwe zile, pontho ndinati ndigwesere pamsolo panu pyonsene pyachita imwe pile." 
Joel3:8 Ine ndinati ndigulise ananu achimuna na achikazi ene kuna anthu a ku Yuda, iwombo mbaagulisa kuna Asabea, dzinza ya kudziko yantomi. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Joel3:9 Lalikani penepi pakati pa madzinza: Sasanyikirani pya nkhondo! Lamusani anyankhondo amphamvu! Anyakumenya nkhondo onsene mbadze chifupi pontho mbasose. 
Joel3:10 Fulani mapazanu kukhala matalasada, pontho mipeni yakukadzira kukhala madipa. Anyakusowa mphamvu mbalonge kuti, “Ine ndawanga mphamvu!”" 
Joel3:11 Chimbizani kudza, imwe madzinza onsene akubulukira kumakhundu onsene, mbamugumanyike penepo. Tumizani anyankhondo anu amphamvu, MBUYA!" 
Joel3:12 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Madzinza mbalamuke kusasanyika; iwo mbadze ku Phedi ya Yehosafati, thangwi kweneko ine ndinakhala pansi mbanditonga mseru madzinza onsene akubulukira kumakhundu onsene." 
Joel3:13 Kwedzani na chikwakwacho thangwi mbewu zatokota. Dzani mbamufinye mfesa thangwi dzenje yakutchitchithira vinyu yadzala, pontho maphiso akutayikira, pyakudawa pyawo mphizinji pyakwanga.”" 
Joel3:14 Chimwinji, chimwinji m'phedi ya kutonga mseru! Thangwi nsiku ya MBUYA ili chifupi m'phedi ya kutonga mseru." 
Joel3:15 Dzuwa na mwezi pinaswipiswa, pontho nyenyezi nkhabe dzaonesa cheza tayu." 
Joel3:16 MBUYA anabangula mu Zioni, mbadima mu Yerusalemu; dziko yapansi na kudzulu inatetemera. Kwache MBUYA anakhala pakubisala pa anthu ache, pontho mpanda wamphamvu kuna Aisraele." 
Joel3:17 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Penepo munapidziwa kuti ine MBUYA Mulungu wanu; ndimbakhala mu Zioni, phiri yanga yakuchena. Yerusalemu anakhala wakuchena; alendo nkhabeve dzachita naye nkhondo tayu." 
Joel3:18 “Pansiku yeneyo mapiri anachucha vinyu wachinchino, pontho pitunda pinakuka na mkaka; mikulo yonsene ya Yuda inadzala madzi. Mphuno ya madzi inatumbuka m'Nyumba ya MBUYA, mbithirira madzi m'phedi ya Akesha." 
Joel3:19 Mbwenye Iguputo anasanduka thando, Edomu anasanduka thando yatchetcha, thangwi ya pyaupandu pidachitwa kuna anthu a Yuda, m'dziko mwawo mule mudachuchisa iwo chiropa cha anyakukhonda dawa." 
Joel3:20 Mu Yuda munakhala anthu kwenda na kwenda, pontho mu Yerusalemu mpakana mifendu yonsene." 
Joel3:21 Kuchuchisa chiropa kudachita iwo, kule kudakhonda ine kualekerera, ine ndinati ndialekerere.” MBUYA ambakhala mu Zioni." 
Amos1:1 Awa ndi mafala a Amose, mbodzi wa amakabuswa a ku Tekoa, akulonga pya pinthu pidaona iye pya Israele, pyaka piwiri chiteke-teke mbichidzati chitika, pontho pandzidzi ukhali Uzia mfumu wa Yuda, pontho Yeroboamu mwana Yehoashi mfumu wa Israele." 
Amos1:2 Amose adalonga mbati, “MBUYA akubangula mu Zioni, pontho akudima mu Yerusalemu; mpovu wa amakabuswa wamala dudumuka, pontho maudzu pansonga ya phiri ya Karimele amala unyala.”" 
Amos1:3 MBUYA akulonga tenepa: “Na thangwi ya nyambwereza wa pyakudawa achita Damasiko, ine nkhabe mbombowesa tayu ukali wanga. Na thangwi yakuti iwo adabubuda anthu a ku Gileadi na muti wakukhala na mafena," 
Amos1:4 ine ndinagwisa moto pana nyumba ya Hazaele, ule unafuna kunyekesa mipanda yamphamvu ya Mfumu Beni-Hadadi." 
Amos1:5 Ine ndinati ndikhutche msuwo wa mpanda wa Damasiko; ndinati ndivunge mfumu ule ambakhala m'phedi ya Aveni, pontho na ule ambaphatira ndodo yachifumu mu Beti-Edeni. Anthu a ku Aramu anakwatwa unyaperezo kudziko ya Kiri. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Amos1:6 MBUYA akulonga tenepa: “Na thangwi ya nyambwereza wa pyakudawa achita Gaza, ine nkhabe kumbombowesa tayu ukali wanga. Na thangwi yakuti iwo adakwata dzinza yonsene mbaagulisa ninga mabitchu a Aedomu," 
Amos1:7 ine ndinagwisa moto pana mpanda wa mzinda wa Gaza, ule unafuna kunyekesa mipandache yamphamvu." 
Amos1:8 Ine ndinavunga mfumu wa ku Ashidodi, pontho ule ambaphatira ndodo yachifumu mu Ashikeloni. Na mkono wanga wamphamvu ine ndinavunga Ekroni mpakana Afilisti onsene amale phiwa. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu.”" 
Amos1:9 MBUYA akulonga tenepa: “Na thangwi ya nyambwereza wa pyakudawa achita Turo, ine nkhabe kumbombowesa tayu ukali wanga. Na thangwi yakuti iye adakwata dzinza yonsene mbagulisa ninga mabitchu ku Edomu, nee nyerezera pya chiverano cha ushamwali chidasasanya iwo chile tayu," 
Amos1:10 ine ndinagwisa moto pana mpanda wa mzinda wa Turo, ule unafuna kunyekesa mipandache yamphamvu.”" 
Amos1:11 MBUYA akulonga tenepa: “Na thangwi ya nyambwereza wa pyakudawa achita Edomu, ine nkhabe kumbombowesa tayu ukali wanga. Na thangwi yakuti iye adathamangisa mbale ache na talasada, mwakuuma mtima mbakhonda kumvera nsisi, thangwi kuzhangali kwache kukhaenda mbukuthimizirika basi, pontho ukali wache hudambombowe tayu," 
Amos1:12 ine ndinagwisa moto pana mzinda wa Temani, ule unafuna kunyekesa mipanda yamphamvu ya Bozira.”" 
Amos1:13 MBUYA akulonga tenepa: “Na thangwi ya nyambwereza wa pyakudawa achita Amoni, ine nkhabe kumbombowesa tayu ukali wanga. Na thangwi yakuti iye adatumbula akazi a mimba a ku Gileadi, towera afumule madire ache," 
Amos1:14 ine ndinagwisa moto pana mpanda wa mzinda wa Raba, ule unafuna kunyekesa mipandache yamphamvu. Panakhala chiliro chikulu nsiku ya nkhondo; kumenyana kwawo kunakhala fumbi nyodo ninga chivumbulu pansiku ya chonzi." 
Amos1:15 Mfumu wache anakwatwa kudziko yaunyaperezo, iye pabodzi pene na mathubu ache. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Amos2:1 MBUYA akulonga tenepa: “Na thangwi ya nyambwereza wa pyakudawa achita Moabu, ine nkhabe dzambombowesa tayu ukali wanga. Na thangwi yakuti iye adapisa magogodo a mfumu wa Edomu mpakana kuchita kusanduka dotha," 
Amos2:2 ine ndinagwisa moto pana dziko ya Moabu, ule unakuna kunyekesa mipanda yamphamvu ya Kerioti. Anthu a ku Moabu anafa pankhondo, mwenemo anyankhondo akukhuwa na kuliza ngoma." 
Amos2:3 Ine ndinati ndiaphere mtongi wawo, mbandipha pontho na mathubu awo onsene. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Amos2:4 MBUYA akulonga tenepa: “Na thangwi ya nyambwereza wa pyakudawa achita Yuda, ine nkhabe kumbombowesa tayu ukali wanga. Na thangwi yakuti iwo akhonda mwambo wa MBUYA, pontho akhonda kuvera matongero ache, na thangwi yakuti iwo abauswa na milungu yapezi, milungu ikhapembedza makolo awo ile," 
Amos2:5 ine ndinagwisa moto pana Yuda, ule unafuna kunyekesa mipanda yamphamvu ya Yerusalemu.”" 
Amos2:6 MBUYA akulonga tenepa: “Na thangwi ya nyambwereza wa pyakudawa achita Israele, ine nkhabe kumbombowesa tayu ukali wanga. Iwo adagulisa anyakulungama na siliva, pontho anyakutcherenga na nkhwaira." 
Amos2:7 Iwo ambapondedza misolo ya anyakutcherenga ninga akupondedza mataka, pontho mbakhondera chilungamo anyakuponderezwa. Baba munthu na mwana munthu akugona na mtsikana mbodzi eneyo; pakuchita tenepo iwo akululupisa dzinanga yakuchena." 
Amos2:8 Iwo ambagona pyawo m'khundu-khundu mwa guwa yonsene ya nsembe panguwo zidaphatira iwo pinyolo zile. M'Nyumba ya Mulungu iwo ambamwa vinyu apokosera iwo anyamangawawo. 
Amos2:9 “Ine ndidavunga Aamori iwo akuona maso. Podi kwene kuti iwo akhali akulapha ninga muti wamkungudza pontho amphamvu ninga mthundu, ine ndidavunga nsapo zache za padzulu, mbandigwanda mitsitsi yache pansi." 
Amos2:10 “Ine ndidakubulusani mu Iguputo, mbandikutsogolerani pyaka makumanayi m'thando towera ndikupaseni dziko yeneyi ya Aamori." 
Amos2:11 Ine ndidasankhula ananu achimuna kukhala maprofeti, pontho aphale anu kukhala Anaziri. Ayi penepi si pyakuona tayu, imwe anthu a ku Israele? Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Amos2:12 “Kwache imwe mudachitisa Anaziri kumwa vinyu, mbamutonga maprofeti kuti aleke longa mphangwa zauprofeti." 
Amos2:13 “Natenepo lero ndinati ndikupanduleni ninga mumbachitira chingolo kupanduka chingalemerwa pyakwanga na mapira. 
Amos2:14 Nyakululupa miyendo nkhabe dzakwanisa kuthawa tayu, nyamphamvu maka nkhabe dzakhalave na mphamvu tayu, nyankhondo nkhabe dzapulumusa moyo wache tayu." 
Amos2:15 Nyamauta nkhabe dzaimira dzololo tayu; nyankhondo wakuthamanga nkhabeve dzakwanisa kuthawa tayu. Podi na nyakupakira akavalo ene nkhabe dzapulumusa moyo wache tayu. 
Amos2:16 Podi na nyankhondo ene wakuwangaletu mtima, anathawa chipezi-pezi pansiku yeneyo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Amos3:1 Ngavani mafala alonga MBUYA kupokanyisana na imwe anthu a ku Israele, kupokanyisana na dzinza yonsene idabulusa ine ku Iguputo ile:" 
Amos3:2 “Ndimwe ene basi asankhula ine pakati pa mabanja onsene a padziko yapansi; natenepo ine ndinati ndikutchunyuseni, thangwi ya pyakudawa pyanu pyonsene.”" 
Amos3:3 Ayi anthu awiri ambafambira mbodzi mwene mbadzati phatizana kuchita tenepo? 
Amos3:4 Ayi nkhalamu imbabangula mumsitu mbidzati ona nyama? Ayi iye ambalira khunzwa kwene m'dzimba mwache mbidzati phata nyama? 
Amos3:5 Ayi mbalame imbakweshwa na msampha pale msampha nkhabepo? Ayi msampha umbafumphuka okha ene mwenemo nkhabe chinthu chakuutekenya? 
Amos3:6 Ngoma ingalizwa mumzinda, ayi anthu nkhabe tetemera tayu na mantha? Nyatwa zingadza mumzinda, ayi si MBUYA tayu achitisa?" 
Amos3:7 Ndimomwene kuti MBUYA Mulungu nkhabe chita chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu mbadzati tchulula manyerezero ache kuna anyabasache maprofeti. 
Amos3:8 Nkhalamu ingabangula; mbani ambakhonda chita mantha? MBUYA Mulungu angalonga, mbani anakwanisa kukhala mulomo phoo, okhonda longa mphangwa zauprofeti?" 
Amos3:9 Lalika kuna mipanda yamphamvu ya Ashidodi, pontho na kuna mipanda yamphamvu ya Iguputo kuti: “Gumanyikanani pamapiri a Samaria; yang'anani chimpiningu muna iye, pontho na kuponderezwa pakati pa anthu ache.”" 
Amos3:10 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Iwo nkhabe dziwa kuchita pyakulungama, anthu ale ambadzaza mipandawo yamphamvu na pinthu pidapokosera iwo mwaupandu pile.”" 
Amos3:11 Natenepo MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: “Nyamalwa anazungulira dziko yanu iye anagwisa mpandanu wamphamvu mbapokosera pinthu pyanu.” 
Amos3:12 MBUYA akulonga tenepa: “Ninga mumbachitira makabuswa kupokosera kwene miyendo miwiri, penu phindi ene ya khutu ya birache m'kanwa mwa nkhalamu, sasawambo Aisraele anapulumuswa ninga monthomo, ale ambakhala mu Samaria m'minenwa mwa matalimbawo, pontho mu Damasiko pa makadera awo." 
Amos3:13 “Ngavani kuno mbamuchitire umboni kupokanyisana na pidzukulu pya Yakobo. Ndalonga ndine Mbuya, MBUYA Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Amos3:14 “Nsiku inafuna ine kutchunyusa Israele, thangwi ya pyakudawa pyawo, ine ndinavunga maguwa onsene a ku Betele; nyanga za guwa yansembe zinagwandwa, tenepo zinagwera pansi." 
Amos3:15 Ine ndinagwisa nyumba zimbakhala imwe pandzidzi wa mainja, na nyumba zimbakhala imwe pandzidzi wa malimwe. Nyumba zakuthemeserwa na nyanga za nzowu zinavungwa, pontho nyumba zikulu-zikulu zakumangwa na miyalazi zinagomolwa. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Amos4:1 Ngavani kuno, imwe ng'ombe za ku Bashani paphiri ya Samaria, imwe akazi ale mumbapondereza anyakutcherenga, pontho ale mumbavuya anyakusowa mbamulonga kuna amunanu kuti, “Ngatipaseni kuno pyakufewesa kukhosi!”" 
Amos4:2 MBUYA Mulungu adumbira na kuchena kwache mbati, “Ndzidzi unati ufikedi, ule unafuna imwe dzakwekwetwa na chimedzo, kukumbuluthani na chimedzo mpakana munthu wakumalisiraletu." 
Amos4:3 Munthu onsene wa imwe anakwekwetwa na m'minyanja ya mpanda, pontho anaponyerwa kutali kwendera ku Harimoni. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Amos4:4 “Ndokoni ku Betele mbamukachite pyakudawa; ndokoni ku Giligala mbamukathimize kuchita pyakudawa. Dzani na nsembe zanu na machibese onsene, pontho na chakhumi chanu nsiku yachitatu yonsene." 
Amos4:5 Perekani mikate yanu yakukhala na chakufufumisira ninga nsembe yakupereka nayo takhuta. Lalikani pachintalo pya pyakupereka pya kufuna kwanu, tumbamani thangwi ya penepyo imwe Aisraele; thangwi penepi ndiye pimbakomerwa na imwe kupichita. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Amos4:6 “Ndine ndakuchitisani kumimba kade-kade mumzinda monsenemu, pontho mkate ene kusowa m'maluwani monsene. Kwache imwe nee mwabwerera kuna ine tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Amos4:7 “Ine ndidaphata mvula, mwenemo umeranu ukali ung'ono-ung'ono. Ine ndidavumbisa mvula kuluwani ibodzi mbindikhonda vumbisa kuluwani inango. Munda ubodzi mukhavumba mvula; munda unango kakata, nee na dontho ene." 
Amos4:8 Anthu adatsalakatika luwani kwenda luwani inango kusaka madzi, mbwenye hadagumane akukwanira tayu. Kwache imwe hamudabwerere kuna ine tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Amos4:9 “Kazinji kene ine ndidaumisa mindanu na mindanu yamfesa, ine ndidagwisa utenda na chikukuyi pana mbewu zanu. Nyadzombe adamala kudya miti yanu yamakuyu na yaolivi, kwache imwe hamudabwerere kuna ine tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Amos4:10 “Ine ndidagwisa miliri pakati panu ninga mudachitira ine kuna Aiguputo. Ine ndidapha aphale anu pankhondo mbandipokosera akavalo anu. Ine ndidachitisa mphuno zanu kuva kununkha, thangwi ya mitembo mumsasa mwanu. Kwache imwe hamudabwerere kuna ine tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Amos4:11 “Anango a imwe ndidaavunga ninga mudachitira ine na Sodomu pontho Gomora. Imwe anyakusalira na moyo mwakhala ninga nkhuni yakuthimisirwa. Kwache imwe hamudabwerere kuna ine tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA. 
Amos4:12 “Natenepo chenechi ndiye chinafuna ine kuchita kuna imwe Aisraele, pontho na thangwi yakuti ine ndinati ndipichitedi kuna imwe, sasanyikani kutongwa mseru na Mulungu wanu, imwe Aisraele.”" 
Amos4:13 Ande, ule ambaumba mapiri, mbalenga mphepo, pontho kutchulula manyerezero ache kuna munthu; ule ambasanduza masikati kukhala mosiku, mbafamba padzulu pa dziko yapansi, weneyo dzinache ndi MBUYA, Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Amos5:1 Ngavani kuno imwe dzinza ya Israele, chiliro chinachita ine cha imwe:" 
Amos5:2 Mwali Israele agwa, mbakhonda lamukave! Iye adasiyiwa kwene gwamwa m'dziko mwachemo, mbapasowa munthu na mbodzi ene wakumulamusa." 
Amos5:3 MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: “Mzinda ule umbaenda kunkhondo na anyankhondo amphamvu chikwi, unasala kwene na anyankhondo dzana basi. Luwani ile imbaenda kunkhondo na anyankhondo amphamvu dzana, anyankhondo khumi basi ndiye anafuna dzasala.”" 
Amos5:4 MBUYA akulonga tenepa kuna dzinza ya Israele: “Bwererani kuna ine mbamukhale na moyo. 
Amos5:5 Lekani kwenda ku Betele, lekani kwenda ku Giligala, lekani manga ulendo kwenda ku Beeresheba. Thangwi Giligala anati aende kudziko yaunyaperezo, pontho Betele anati amala vungwa.”" 
Amos5:6 Bwererani kuna MBUYA mbamukhale na moyo, gopesera iye anamala nyanguta mbumba ya Yosefe ninga moto; iwo unavunga pyakwanga mu Betele mbapasowa na mbodzi ene wakuuthimisa motowo." 
Amos5:7 Muna dzedze ndimwe anyakupotoza chilungamo kukhala chinthu chakuipa, pontho kupondereza pansi pyakulungama." 
Amos5:8 Iye ule adasasanya mteme ndikutemembo pontho khwasa, mbasanduza mdima kukhala makalakwecha, pontho masikati kukhala mosiku, ule ambagumanyisa madzi a m'bara mbaakhuthulira pamataka a dziko yapansi, weneyo dzinache ndi MBUYA." 
Amos5:9 Iye ambagomola mipanda yamphamvu mbavungiratu mizinda yakutchingwa na mpanda. 
Amos5:10 Imwe mumbazonda nyakutonga mseru wakusumulula pyakuipa mbamunyansirwa na nyakulonga pyakuonadi. 
Amos5:11 Imwe mumbapondereza anyakutcherenga mbamuakhakhamiza kuti akupaseni mapira. Natenepo podi kwene kuti mwamanga nyumba zikulu-zikulu za miyala, imwe nkhabe dzakhalamo tayu; podi kwene kuti imwe mwabzala minda yadidi yamfesa, imwe nkhabe dzamwa vinyu wache tayu." 
Amos5:12 Thangwi ine ndikudziwa kuinjipa kwachita upandu wanu, pontho kuinjipa kwachita pyakudawa pyanu. Imwe mumbapondereza anyakulungama mbamutawira kudyekerwa, pontho mumbapotoza chilungamo pamseru wa anyakutcherenga." 
Amos5:13 Ndi thangwi yache nyanzeru, ndzidzi ninga wenewu, ambakhala pyache mulomo phoo, thangwi ndi ndzidzi wakuipa." 
Amos5:14 Saka-sakani kuchita pyadidi nee pyakuipa tayu, towera mukhale na moyo. Penepo MBUYA Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene anakhala namwe, ninga montho mumbapilongera imwe kuti iye ndiye." 
Amos5:15 Zondani pyakuipa, funani pyadidi; chitani chilungamo pa miseru. Mwinango MBUYA anavera nsisi anthu a dzinza yeneyi, anyakusalira na moyo ale." 
Amos5:16 Natenepo MBUYA Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga tenepa: “Panakhala kukalala m'misewu monsene, pontho chiliro chakusanyika m'misika monsenene. Anyakulima anachemerwa dzalirambo, pontho anyakusintili anati akalale." 
Amos5:17 Pnakhal chiliro chikulu m'minda yonsene yamfesa, thangwi ine ndinagwanda pakati panu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Amos5:18 Dzedze kuna imwe, ale mumbalirira kuona Nsiku ya MBUYA. Thangwi yache ninji mumbalirira kuona Nsiku ya MBUYA? Nsiku yeneyi inakhala ya mdima nee cheza tayu." 
Amos5:19 Nsiku yeneyi inakhala ninga munthu wakuthawa nkhalamu, mbakagumanikana na nyalugwe; khala ninga munthu wakupita m'nyumba mwache mbatsamisa dzanjache pafufu mbalumwa na nyoka." 
Amos5:20 Nsiku ya MBUYA inakhala yamdima, nee cheza na pang'ono pene tayu; mdima wa ndiwe ani, nee cheza na ching'ono chene tayu." 
Amos5:21 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ine ndimbapizonda mbandinyansirwa nawo maphwando anu achipembedzo; ine nkhabe komerwa nayo tayu migumano yanu yachipembedzo." 
Amos5:22 Podi kwene mundidzesere nsembe zakupyerera na za mapira, ine nkhabe dzapitambira tayu. Podi kwene mundidzesere nyama zakunenepa ninga nsembe zachiphatizano, ine nkhabe dzapiikha konta tayu." 
Amos5:23 Lekani kundigontha m'khutu na nyimbo zanuzo; ine nkhabe dzavesera anyakatangale anu tayu. 
Amos5:24 M'mbuto mwache chilungamo mbachikuke ninga mkulo; pyakulungama pifambe ninga mkulo okhonda kupwa. 
Amos5:25 “M'thando mule pyaka makumanayi pile, ayi mudandidzesera nsembe na pyakupereka, imwe dzinza ya Israele?" 
Amos5:26 Nkhabe! Podi imwe mwapembedza mifanikizo, milungu Sakuti ninga mfumu wanu, pontho Kaiwani, milungu yanu ya nyenyezi, imwe munati muithukule mifanikizo yeneyo," 
Amos5:27 nsiku inafuna ine dzakuendesani kudziko ya unyaperezo, m'dziko yakutali kupiringana Damasiko. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA, ule dzinache ndi Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene.”" 
Amos6:1 Dzedze kuna imwe anthu, ale nkhabe famba chewu-chewu mu Zioni, pontho ale mumbakhala pakupata paphiri ya Samaria. Dzedze kuna imwe akadamu akudziwika pakati dzinza yakuveka ya Israele, kuna imwe kule kumbadza anthu kufuna chiphedzo!" 
Amos6:2 Ndokoni kumzinda wa Kaline mbamukauone; kubuluka kweneko ndokoni kumzinda ukulu wa Hamati, pontho tchithirani kumzinda wa Gati mu Filisti. Ayi iwo ali padidi kupiringana maufumu anu awiriwa? Ayi iwo dziko yawo njikulu kupiringana yanuyi?" 
Amos6:3 Imwe nkhabe ikha konta tayu pya nsiku yakutchunyuswa inadzayo, mbwenye pyakuchita pyanupyo pimbachimbizisa nsikuyo." 
Amos6:4 Imwe mumbagonera matalimba akuthemeserwa na nyanga za nzowu, mbamugona dedede pakaderanu. Imwe mumbadya nyama ya anabira na anamphulu akunenepa." 
Amos6:5 Imwe basanu nkhupeka nyimbo ninga Davite, mbamuziimba na anyakatangale." 
Amos6:6 Imwe mumbamwa vinyu m'ndiko za kudzala mbamudzola mafuta akugwadira pyakwanga, kwache imwe nkhabe tsukwala tayu na kuvungika kwa dziko ya Yosefe." 
Amos6:7 Natenepo imwe munakhala akutoma kwenda kudziko ya unyaperezo; maphwando anu na tsenzo yanu pinamala. 
Amos6:8 MBUYA Mulungu adumbira na dzinache, MBUYA Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga tenepa: “Ine ndimbazonda kunyada kumbachita Yakobo, pontho ndimbanyansirwa na mipandache yamphamvu. Ine ndinapereka m'manja mwa anyamalwawo mzinda wenewu na pyonsene pili mwenemo.”" 
Amos6:9 Ngakhala amuna khumi anasiyiwa m'nyumba, iwo pontho anati afe." 
Amos6:10 Pontho ngakhala mbale, nyakuyang'ana pya maliro ule, anapita m'nyumbamo kaibulusamo, mbavunza munthu onsene wakubisala mwenemo kuti, “Ayi una munthu unango muno?” Iye mbatawira kuti, “Nkhabe,” penepo iye analonga kuti, “Shi! Ife mbitileke thula dzina ya MBUYA.”" 
Amos6:11 Ndimomwene, MBUYA angapereka kwene utongi, nyumba zikulu-zikulu zinagomolwa mbazisanduka maphaphi-maphaphi, pontho na nyumba zing'ono-zing'ono mbizisanduka madongolomwa." 
Amos6:12 Ayi kavalo angakwanise kuthamanga m'miyala? Mbani adatoma kulima pabara na phaza yakukweya na ng'ombe? Kwache imwe mwasanduza chilungamo kukhala nyongo pontho nsapo za pyakulungama kukhala zakuwawa. 
Amos6:13 Imwe ale mumbasekera kuti mudakunda Lodebara mbamulonga kuti, “Ayi ife hatidakunde tayu mzinda wa Karanaimu na mphamvu zathu zene?”" 
Amos6:14 MBUYA Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga kuti, “Ine ndinati ndilamuse dzinza inango dzachita nkhondo na imwe, dzinza ya Israele, ile inafuna dzakusanyisani m'njira monsenene kutomera pamakata a Hamati mpakana ku phedi ya Araba.”" 
Amos7:1 MBUYA Mulungu adandionesa pinthu ipi: Iye akhasasanyika kugwisa nyadzombe sindzidzi khundu ya phoso imbaperekwa kuna mfumu nkhumala vunwa, pontho pandzidzi ukhamera magoko." 
Amos7:2 Pidamala nyadzombe kudya pyakumera pyonsene m'dzikomo, ine ndidalira kuti, “MBUYA Mulungu lekererani pyakudawa pya anthu anu! Ayi Yakobo anakwanisa tani kukhala na moyo? Iye ngwakusowa mphamvu!”" 
Amos7:3 Natenepo MBUYA adambombowesa ukali wache mbalonga mbati, “Penepi nkhabe dzachitika tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu.”" 
Amos7:4 Kubuluka penepo MBUYA Mulungu adandionesa chinthu ichi: MBUYA Mulungu akhasasanyikira pyakutchunyusa anthu na moto. Motowo udaumisa pyakwanga mataka, dziko yonsene mbivungikiratu." 
Amos7:5 Natenepo ine ndidalira, “MBUYA Mulungu ndikukupemphani kuti mutome imira! Yakobo anakwanisa tani kukhala na moyo? Iye ngwakusowa mphamvu!”" 
Amos7:6 Natenepo MBUYA adambombowesa ukali wache mbalonga mbati, “Penepi pontho nkhabe dzachitika tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu.”" 
Amos7:7 Kubuluka penepo MBUYA adandionesa pontho chinthu chinango: Mbuya akhaimira chifupi na fufu ile ikhadamangwa pakuphatisa basa nkhambala yakudzongolera fufu. Iye akhali na nkhambala yakudzongolera fufu m'manja mwache. 
Amos7:8 Penepo MBUYA adandivunza mbati, “Ayi Amose ukuonanji?” Ine ndidatawira kuti, “Ndikuona nkhambala yakudzongolera fufu.” Natenepo MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Ngayang'ana ine ndikuphatisa basa nkhambala yakudzongolera fufu kufuna kuonesa kuti anthu anga Aisraele akhala ninga fufu yakugongonyeka. Ine nkhabe kualeka kwene okhonda kuatchunyusa tayu." 
Amos7:9 “Mbuto zakupembedzerapo za Isake zinati zivungwe, pontho mbuto zakupambulika za Israele zinasanduka madembe; na talasadanga ine ndinachita nkhondo na banja ya Yeroboamu.”" 
Amos7:10 Kubuluka penepo Amazia nyansembe wa ku Betele adatumiza mphangwa kuna Yeroboamu mfumu wa Israele kuti: “Amose akusasanya kukuchitirani upandu pakati pene pa Israele. Mafalache anati adzudzumise dziko yonseneyo. 
Amos7:11 Thangwi pinalonga Amose kuno mphipi: ‘Yeroboamu anati afe pankhondo, pontho Israele anati aende kudziko ya unyaperezo, mbaenda kutali na dziko yawo.’ ”" 
Amos7:12 Kubuluka penepo Amazia adalonga kuna Amose mbati, “Ndoko uko, iwe nyakulotera! Bwerera kudziko ya Yuda. Mphangwa zako zauprofeti ukalongere konthoko, pontho anthu a kweneko mbakupagali ninga mprofeti wawo." 
Amos7:13 Leka longave mphangwa zauprofeti muno m'Betele, thangwi ino ndi mbuto yakupambulika ya mfumu, pontho ndi Nyumba ya Mulungu ya m'dzikomu.”" 
Amos7:14 Amose adatawira Amazia mbati, “Ine nee ndikhali mprofeti, penu mwanache mprofeti tayu, mbwenye ndikhali makabuswa ene pyanga, pontho nyakulima miti ya makuyu." 
Amos7:15 Mbwenye MBUYA ndiye adandikwata kundibulusa pabasanga yakudyesa mabira mbalonga kuna ine mbati, ‘Ndoko ukalonge mphangwa zauprofeti kuna anthu anga Israele.’" 
Amos7:16 Chinchino pano ngava mafala alonga MBUYA. Iwe ukulonga kuti, ‘Leka longa mphangwa zauprofeti kupokanyisana na Israele, pontho leka lalika mwakupokanyisana na banja ya Isake.’" 
Amos7:17 “Natenepo MBUYA akulonga kuti, ‘Mkazako anasanduka puta mumzindamu, pontho anako achimuna na achikazi anaphiwa pankhondo. Dziko yanu inapimwa anthu mbaigawana pyawo, pontho iwe ene unati ufere m'dziko ya anyakukhonda tsalakana MBUYA. Israele anati aendedi kudziko ya unyaperezo kutali na dziko yawo.’ ”" 
Amos8:1 MBUYA Mulungu adandionesa chinthu ichi: Chitundu cha nsapo zakufira. 
Amos8:2 Iye adavunza mbati, “Ukuonanji Amose?” Ine ndidatawira kuti, “Chitundu cha nsapo zakufira.” Tenepo MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Ndzidzi wakumalisa wafika pana anthu anga Israel; ine nkhabe kualeka kwene khonda kuatchunyusa tayu." 
Amos8:3 “Pansiku yeneyo nyimbo zimbaimba iwo m'Nyumba ya Mulungu zinasanduka chiliro. Mitembo ya anthu inaponyerwa kunja mbikhala nadza-nadza, pontho kunjaku kunakhala lukutu noo! Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu.”" 
Amos8:4 Ngavani kuno imwe anthu, ale mumbapondereza anyakusowa mbamumaliratu anyakutcherenga a m'dzikomo," 
Amos8:5 mbamulonga kuti, “Ayi Phwando yakusekera Kubalwa kwa Mwezi inamala lini, towera tikagulise mapirathu? Apo Nsiku Yakupuma inamala lini, towera ife tikagulise tirigu wathu, kupinza mididathu, kukwiza konta ya pinthu pyathu, kubera anthu na miyezo yakunama," 
Amos8:6 pontho kugulisa na masundu-sundu ene a tirigu kuti tigule anyakutcherenga na siliva, pontho anyakusowa pinthu na nkhwaira.”" 
Amos8:7 MBUYA, ule ana a Yakobo ambamnyadira, adumbira kuti, “Ine nkhabe duwalira tayu chonsene chachita Israele." 
Amos8:8 “Dziko inati itetemere thangwi ya penepi, pontho onsene anyakukhala mwenemo anati asintili. Dziko yonsene inakukuma ninga mkulo wa Nailo; inavunduka mbimbombowa ninga mkulo wa Nailo mu Iguputo." 
Amos8:9 “Ndzidzi wenewo ndinachitisa dzuwa kuthobila na masikati, pontho mdima pa dziko yapansi mwenemo dzuwa ikuswa miti. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Amos8:10 Maphwando anu achipembedzo ndinaasandusa kusintili, pontho kuimba kwanu kukhala kulira. Monsenene ndinakuchitisani kuvala masakha, pontho kuchinga mpala. Ndzidzi wenewo ndinauchitisa kukhala ninga munthu kulira mwanache mbodzi ene basi, pontho mamalisiro ache anakhala ninga nsiku yakuva kupha." 
Amos8:11 “Ndzidzi unadza, ule unafuna ine dzatumiza njala ikulu m'dziko yonsene, nee njala ya phoso penu nyota yakufuna madzi tayu, mbwenye njala yakufuna kuva mafala a MBUYA. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu." 
Amos8:12 Anthu anazenza kubara mpakana kubara mbatsalakatika kubulukira kumpoto mpakana kumabulukiro dzuwa kusaka-saka mafala a MBUYA, kwache iwo nkhabe dzaagumana tayu." 
Amos8:13 “Pansiku yeneyo amiyali akubalika na aphale amphamvu anakomoka thangwi ya nyota. 
Amos8:14 Ale ambadumbira na dzina ya milungu ya Samaria, kulonga kuti, ‘Ninga mulungu wako ngwamoyo, iwe Dani,’ penu kulonga kuti, ‘Ninga mulungu wa Beeresheba ngwamoyo’ enewo anamala kufa mbakhonda lamukave pontho.”" 
Amos9:1 Ine ndidaona MBUYA aimira chifupi na guwa yansembe mbalonga mbati, “Gwisani nsanamira za Nyumba ya Mulungu, towera maziko ache atekenyeke. Zigwisireni pa misolo ya anthu onsene. Anyakusalira na moyowo ndinati ndiaaphere pankhondo. Nkhabe na mbodzi ene anafuna kuthawa, nkhabe na mbodzi ene anafuna pulumuka tayu." 
Amos9:2 Podi kwene kuti achite kukumba pansi mpakana kudziko ya anyakufa, kweneko mkono wanga unati uabuluseko; podi achite pyawo kukwira mpakana kudzulu, kweneko ine ndinati ndiatchodoleko." 
Amos9:3 Podi kwene kuti iwo abisale pansonga ya phiri ya Karimele, kweneko ine ndinamphemphesa mbandiphata. Podi abisale kwene pyawo pansi pa bara, kweneko ine ndinatonga mbuvi kualuma." 
Amos9:4 Podi kwene kuti akwatwe na anyamalwa kwenda kudziko ya unyaperezo, kweneko ndinatonga talasada kuti iakhamwadze. Maso anga anati akhale phanamana pana iwo, towera kuadzesera nyatwa, nee pyadidi tayu.”" 
Amos9:5 Mbuya, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, ule ambaphata dziko yapansi mbinyunguluka, pontho anyakukhala mwenemo mbasintili, dziko yonsene inakukuma ninga mkulo wa Nailo, tenepo inambombowa ninga mkulo wa Nailo mu Iguputo." 
Amos9:6 Ule ambamanga nyumbache yachifumu kudzulu, mbakhazika maziko ache padziko yapansi; ule ambachemera madzi a m'bara mbakhuthulira padziko yapansi. Weneyo dzinache ndi MBUYA." 
Amos9:7 MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Pamaso panga imwe anthu a ku Israele mwakhala ninga Akushi. Ayi ine sidadzese tayu Aisraele kubulukira ku Iguputo, Afilisti kubulukira ku Krete, pontho Aaramu kubulukira ku Kiri?" 
Amos9:8 “Ndimomwene maso a MBUYA Mulungu ali pana ufumu wakudawika wa Israele. Ine ndinati ndiavunge kuabulusa padziko yapansi, kwache ine nkhabe dzavungiratu pidzukulu pyonsene pya Yakobo tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Amos9:9 “Thangwi ine ndinapereka matongero, pontho ndinachitisa dzinza ya Israele kutekenyeka uku na uku pakati pa madzinza onsene, ninga montho mumbachitira sefa kutekenyeka uku na uku, towera kubulusa anyakuipa onsene m'dzinzamo." 
Amos9:10 Anyakudawika onsene pakati pa anthu anga anati aphiwe na talasada, onsene ale ambalonga kuti, ‘Nyatwa nkhabe kutikunda penu kutifikira tayu.’ ”" 
Amos9:11 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Pansiku yeneyo ndinabwezera pontho ufumu wakuvungika wa Davite. Ine ndinati ndisasanye mwakugumukamo, kumanga pontho madembe ache, mbandimangapo khala ninga montho mukhali ipyo kale," 
Amos9:12 towera iwo akwanise kupokosera khundu yakusalira ya dziko ya Edomu pabodzi pene na madzinza onsene ale pakutoma akhali anga. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA, ule anafuna dzachita pinthu penepi.”" 
Amos9:13 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Nsiku zikudza, zile zinafuna nyakulima dzabitcha nyakuvuna, pontho nyakubzala mfesa dzabitcha nyakutchitchitha vinyu. Vinyu wachinchino anatumbuka kubulukira m'mapiri mbakuka kubulukira m'pitunda." 
Amos9:14 Ine ndinabwezera kwawo anthu anga Israele kubulukira ku dziko ya unyaperezo. Iwo anamanga pontho mizindawo yakuvungika ile, mbakhalamo; iwo analima mfesa mbamwa vinyu wache; anabzala miti ya nsapo mbadya nsapo zache." 
Amos9:15 Israele ndinati ndimkhazikise m'dziko mwache chadi-chadi; iwo nkhabe dzatchikhulwave m'dziko idaapasa ine ile tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Mulungu wanu.” 
Obadiah1:1 Awa ndi masomphenya adaona Obadia a pinthu pidalonga MBUYA Mulungu pya dzinza ya Edomu. Ife tava mphangwa zakubulukira kuna MBUYA: MBUYA atuma nyamphangwache kuna madzinza kalonga kuti: “Sasanyikani! Tendeni kamenyana nkhondo na Edomu!” 
Obadiah1:2 MBUYA akulonga kuna Edomu, “Yang'ana, ndinati ndikuchitise kukhala wamng'ono pakati pa madzinza; munthu onsene anati akululupise." 
Obadiah1:3 Kunyada kwako kwakunyengeza, iwe ule umbakhala pakupata pamatelero; mbumanga musako pansonga ya mapiri; ule umbapilonga wekha ene kuti, ‘Mbani anakwanisa kunditchithisa pansi?’" 
Obadiah1:4 Podi kwene kuti umbuluke padzululetu ninga mphamba, mbumanga chisa chako pakati pa nyenyezi, kubulukira kweneko ine ndinati ndikutchithise pansi basi. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Obadiah1:5 “Ngakhala mbava zinakudzera, mapanga mbakufikira na mosiku, ayi iwo nkhabe kuba ninga munafunira iwo tayu? Ngakhala anyakutchola mfesa anadza m'munda mwako, ayi iwo nkhabe siya zakuchepa tayu? Mbwenye anyamalwako akusakaziratu monsene mwene." 
Obadiah1:6 Iwe, dziko ya Esau wasaliratu masakala ene, mfumako yonsene yamala vungwa." 
Obadiah1:7 Ashamwali ako akunyengeza; iwo akuthamangisamo m'dziko mwako. Ale adachita na iwe mphatizano pankhondo akusandukira, anzako akhadya na iwe pabodzi mkate lero akuteyera msampha mbalonga kuti, ‘Kuchenjera kwache kuli kupi?’ ”" 
Obadiah1:8 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Pansiku yeneyo ine ndinavunga anyanzeru a mu Edomu, amuna akuchenjera m'mapiri a Esau." 
Obadiah1:9 Anyankhondo ako amphamvu, iwe Temani, anaphatwa na mantha makulu, pontho munthu onsene m'mapiri a Esau anachekwa pakhosi." 
Obadiah1:10 “Na thangwi yakuti iwe udachita pyakuzunguzika kuna Yakobo mbaleako iwe unaphatwa na manyadzo makulu; iwe unati uvungwe kwenda na kwenda. 
Obadiah1:11 Pansiku idaimira iwe manja balire kunduli, mwenemo anyamalwa apita mumpanda wa Yerusalemu, kupokosera mfumache mbaigawana pakuchita ntsango, iwe ukhakhala ninga uli nawo khundu ibodzi ene." 
Obadiah1:12 Iwe hudatheme tayu kululupisa mbaleako pandzidzi unamgwera dzedze, penu kuseka anthu a ku Yuda, pansiku ya kuvungika kwawo, penu kugaya pikulu pansiku inaona iwo nyatwa." 
Obadiah1:13 Iwe hudatheme tayu kupita na pamsuwo wa mpanda wa anthu anga, pandzidzi wa dzedze yawo, pansiku yawo yakusanyika, pontho kakwata mfumawo pansiku inaagwera dzedze." 
Obadiah1:14 Iwe hudatheme tayu kuimira pamphambano kuphata anyakuyesera kupulumusa moyo wawo, penu kupereka m'manja mwa anyamalwa anyakusalira na moyo, pansiku idaona iwo nyatwa." 
Obadiah1:15 “Nsiku ya MBUYA ili chifupi inafuna iye dzatonga mseru madzinza onsene. Ninga mwachitira iwe, Edomu, pyontho-pyonthopyo pinachitwambo kuna iwe; mabasako anati agwere pamsolo pako." 
Obadiah1:16 Ninga montho mudamwera imwe, Aisraele khomitcho ya nyatwa paphiri yanga yakuchena, sasawambo madzinza onsene anaimwambo mwakukhonda lekeza; iwo anamwa mbapapira mbakhonda aonekave." 
Obadiah1:17 “Mbwenye pa Phiri ya Zioni panakhala anyakupulumuka; mbutoyo inakhala yakuchena; pidzukulu pya Yakobo pinakwata pontho dziko yawo ikhadapokoserwa ile. 
Obadiah1:18 Pidzukulu pya Yakobo pinakhala ninga moto, pontho pidzukulu pya Yosefe ninga malulume a moto; pidzukulu pya Esau pyakhala ninga maudzu akuuma, tenepo anaadumika moto mbapya. Nkhabe chidzukulu cha Esau na chibodzi chene chinafuna salira na moyo tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Obadiah1:19 “Anthu a kuthando yatchetcha ya Negebu anaapokosera mapiri a Esau, pontho anthu a m'tchinde mwa mapiri anakwata dziko ya Afilisti ninga yawo ene. Iwo anapokosera nthemba ya Eferemu na Samaria; Benjemani anapokosera Gileadi." 
Obadiah1:20 Aisraele ale adakwatwa unyaperezo kwenda kudziko ya Kanani anabwerera mbapokosera dziko mpakana ku Zarefati; anyakukwata unyaperezo kubulukira ku Yerusalemu kwenda ku Sefaradi anabwerera mbapokosera maluwani a m'thando yatchetcha ya Negebu. 
Obadiah1:21 Anyakukunda a paphiri ya Zioni anasosa mbatonga dziko ya mapiri ya Esau. Tenepo ufumuwo unakhala wa MBUYA.” 
Jonah1:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna Yona, mwana Amitai mbati," 
Jonah1:2 “Ndoko kumzinda ukulu wa Ninevi, mbukalalike mwakupokanyisana nawo; thangwi ndaona kudawika kwa anthu a mwenemo.”" 
Jonah1:3 Mbwenye Yona kufuna kuthawa pamaso pa MBUYA adalamuka kwenda kudziko ya Tarisisi. Iye adatchithira kumzinda wa Yopa, kule kudagumana iye mwadiya ukulu wakwenda ku Tarisisi. Pidapagali iye kobiri, adapakira mwadiya kwenda ku Tarisisi kuthawa pamaso pa MBUYA." 
Jonah1:4 Mbwenye MBUYA adalamusa mphepo ikulu pabara pale, pontho chonzi chakugoswaletu chidagundika mwakuti mwadiyawo ukhali chifupi kupanduka." 
Jonah1:5 Anyakufambisa mwadiyawo onsene adagoswerwa pyakwanga, tenepo kada munthu adalira kuna milungu yache. Tenepo iwo adaponyera m'madzi mitolo, towera mwayidawo ululupirwe. Mbwenye Yona akhadenda pyache pansiletu pa mwadiya ule, kule kudagona iye chitulo chakufa nacho." 
Jonah1:6 Mkadamu wa mwadiya ule adenda kuna iye mbamvunza mbati, “Watani unagona pyako? Lamuka mbupemphere kuna milungu yako. Mwinango inativera nsisi mbapulumusa moyo wathu.”" 
Jonah1:7 Anyakufambisa mwadiya ale adalonga kuna unango na mwanzache mbati, “Tendeni tichite ntsango, towera tione mbani anationesa nyatwayi.” Iwo adachitadi ntsango mbaphatwa ndi Yona." 
Jonah1:8 Natenepo iwo adamvunza mbati, “Chinchino pano ngatipange thangwi yache njanji kuti nyatwa yeneyi yatigwera? Umbaphata basa yanji? Umbabulukira kupi? Kwanu nkhupi? Apo ndiwe mtundu wanji wa munthu?”" 
Jonah1:9 Yona adatawira mbati, “Ine ndine Mheberi. Ndimbapembedza MBUYA, Mulungu wa kudzulu, nyakulenga dziko na bara ene.”" 
Jonah1:10 Yona adathimiza kulonga kuti iye akhathawa pamaso pa MBUYA. Tenepo anyakufambisa mwadiya ale adagoswerwa pyakwanga mbalonga mbati, “Chachita iwe ninji!”" 
Jonah1:11 Bara ile idanyanya kuvunduka. Tenepo iwo adavunza mbati, “Apo ife tichite nawe tani, towera bara imbombowe?”" 
Jonah1:12 Yona adatawira mbati, “Ndiponyeni pyanu m'bara, tenepo bara inati imbombowe. Ndikupidziwa kuti mphepo ikulu yakugwerani thangwi ya ine.”" 
Jonah1:13 M'mbuto mwache anyakufambisa mwadiya ale adayesa-yesa kuti mwadiya ule aenda nawo kumthunda, kuchapa na mphamvu zawo zonsene. Mbwenye iwo adapichimwana, thangwi chonzi chile chikhaenda mbichikula." 
Jonah1:14 Natenepo iwo adakhuwa pikulu kuna MBUYA mbati, “MBUYA taphata miyendo, lekani tawirisa kuti tife, thangwi ya kupha moyo wa munthuyi tayu. Lekani kutitchunyusa thangwi ya kupha munthu okhonda dawa, thangwi imwe MBUYA mwachita pyakukukomerani.”" 
Jonah1:15 Kubuluka penepo iwo adamthukula Yona mbamponya m'bara. Natenepo bara idamatama. 
Jonah1:16 Penepi pidachitisa anyakufambisa mwadiya ale kugopa MBUYA mwakuti adapereka nsembe kuna iye mbadumbira kuti anamtumikira iye ene basi. 
Jonah1:17 Kwache MBUYA adatonga nsomba ikulu kukhudyula Yona. Natenepo iye adakhala m'mimba mwa nsomba nsiku zitatu, mosiku na masikati." 
Jonah2:1 M'mimba mwa nsomba mule Yona adapemphera kuna MBUYA, Mulungu wache." 
Jonah2:2 Iye adalonga mbati, “Panyatwa zanga, MBUYA, ndidakuchemerani, tenepo mudanditawira. Kubulukira pansi pa dziko ya anyakufa ndidakhuwa kufuna chiphedzo, tenepo imwe mudandiva kulira kwanga." 
Jonah2:3 Imwe mudandiponyera pansi pakuzwika, pansiletu pabara, kule kukhadandizungulira madzi onsene, pontho mabimbi anu amphamvu andibulumundisa." 
Jonah2:4 Ine ndidalonga kuti, ‘Ndatayikiratu kubuluka pamaso panu. Ayi ndinati ndikaione pontho Nyumbanu Yakuchena?’" 
Jonah2:5 Madzi adandifika m'khosi mbandikhamika nawo; bara idandibiziratu monsene mwene, pontho usekere udandipyangirira-pyangirira mumsolo mwanga." 
Jonah2:6 Ine ndidabira mpakana pansi pa mitsitsi ya mapiri, kudziko ile idandifungira na mphinga kwenda na kwenda. Mbwenye imwe MBUYA, Mulungu wanga, mudandibulusa wamoyo ku Chiphompho chikulu." 
Jonah2:7 “Pikhakomoka moyo wanga, ine ndidakumbuka imwe MBUYA, pontho kupemphera kwanga kudafika kuna imwe, ku Nyumbanu yakuchena." 
Jonah2:8 “Anthu ale ambakakamira kupembedza mifanikizo yapezi, ambataya kukhulupirika kwawo kuna imwe." 
Jonah2:9 Mbwenye ine, na nyimbo zakupereka nazo takhuta, ndinapereka nsembe kuna imwe. Pinthu pidadumbira ine kuna imwe, ndinati ndipichitedi. Chipulumuso chimbabulukira kuna MBUYA.”" 
Jonah2:10 MBUYA adatonga nsomba ile, natenepo chidalukula Yona kumtunda." 
Jonah3:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna Yona kachiwiri kache mbati," 
Jonah3:2 “Ndoko kumzinda ukulu wa Ninevi mbukalalike kweneko mphangwa zinakupanga inezi.” 
Jonah3:3 Natenepo Yona adavera MBUYA mbaenda ku Ninevi. Ninevi ukhali mzinda ukulu pyakwanga mwakuti munthu anakwanisa kukwata nsiku zitatu kugwanda namo. 
Jonah3:4 Yona adatoma kufamba mumzindamo, tenepo pidamala iye kufamba nsinzo wa nsiku ibodzi, adalalika mbati, “Pangamala nsiku makumanayi, kutomera lero, Ninevi unavungwa!”" 
Jonah3:5 Anthu a ku Ninevi adakhulupira mphangwa za Mulungu. Iwo adaverana kupimana kudya, natenepo onsene a iwo, mkulu penu mwana, adavala masakha kuonesa kuti akhadaleka pyakudawa kwawo." 
Jonah3:6 Pidava mfumu wa Ninevi penepi, adalamuka pampando wache wachifumu. Iye adadula mkhanjo wache mbavalambo masakha mbaenda kakhala padotha." 
Jonah3:7 Iye adapereka matongero kuna anthu a ku Ninevi kuti, Na utongi wa mfumu, pontho mathubu ache: “Munthu onsene, penu nyama, ng'ombe na mabira, mbaleke lawa na chinthu chene; lekani kupitawirisa kudya penu kumwa madzi." 
Jonah3:8 Mbwenye anthu na pifuyo pyene mbavale masakha. Munthu onsene mbadembetere kuna Mulungu. Iwo mbaleke makhaliro awo akuipa pontho akuzunguzika. 
Jonah3:9 Mbani anapidziwa? Mwinango Mulungu anambombowesa ukali wache, pontho thangwi yakuva kwache nyambalo iye analeka kutizhangalira, towera tileke vungwa.”" 
Jonah3:10 Pidaona Mulungu pidachita iwo pile, pontho mule mudalekera iwo makhaliro awo akudawika, iye adava nawo nyambalo mbasanduza manyerezero ache, pontho mbakhonda kuatchunyusa ninga mukhadapisasanyira iye." 
Jonah4:1 Mbwenye Yona hadakomerwe napyo penepi tayu mbaipirwa napyo pyakwanga. 
Jonah4:2 Iye adapemphera kuna MBUYA mbati, “MBUYA, ayi pidalonga ine ndzidzi ukhali ine kwathu si penepi tayu? Ndi thangwi yache sidachite nthontho tayu kuthawira pyanga kudziko ya Tarisisi. Ine ndikhapidziwa kuti imwe ndimwe Mulungu wakukoma mtima pontho wakuva nyambalo. Imwe ndimwe wakusowa chipsu pontho wakuonesa anthu kuafuna kwanu kokhonda mala, pontho Mulungu wakuuphata mtima kukhonda gwisa nyatwa pana anthu." 
Jonah4:3 Chinchino MBUYA, ndipheni pyanu, thangwi mphyadidi kufa pyanga kusiyana na kukhala na moyo.”" 
Jonah4:4 Mbwenye MBUYA adamtawira mbati, “Ayi chachita iwechi ntchinthu chakuthema kuzhangali ninga tenepa?”" 
Jonah4:5 Yona adabuluka mumzindamo mbaenda kukhundu yakumabulukiro dzuwa mbakhala pansi. Iye adamanga kakhumbi kache mbakhala pamthunzi mwenemo kuti aone ninji chinafuna chitika kuna Ninevi ule. 
Jonah4:6 MBUYA Mulungu adachitisa mtawi kumera mbauchitisa kukula padzulu pa Yona kuti umpase mthunzi, towera alulupirwe mumtima; Yona adakomerwa nawo pyakwanga mtawi ule." 
Jonah4:7 Mbwenye mangwana mwache m'makalakwecha, Mulungu adatuma mfunye, towera zinyenyene mtawi ule. Natenepo mtawi ule udaunyala." 
Jonah4:8 Pidavuka dzuwa, Mulungu adatumiza mphepo yakupisa yakumabulukiro dzuwa. Tenepo Yona akhali chifupi kukomoka, thangwi ya kupisa kwa dzuwa kukhammenya pamsolo pache kule. Natenepo iye adapifuna kuti afe pyache. Iye adalonga mbati, “Mphyadidi mbidafa pyanga kusiyana na kukhala na moyo.”" 
Jonah4:9 Mbwenye Mulungu adalonga kuna Yona mbati, “Ayi chachita iwechi ntchinthu chakuthema kuzhangalira mtawiwu?” Yona adatawira Mulungu mbati, “Ande chachita inechi ntchakuthema, kuzhangali kwanga ndinakwanisa kufa nako.”" 
Jonah4:10 Mbwenye MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Iwe ukuva nsisi na mtawi, podi kwene kuti hudautsalakane penu kuukuza tayu. Iwo udamera mosiku ubodzi basi, mbufa mosiku ubodzi basi." 
Jonah4:11 Apo ndi tani na mzinda ukulu wa Ninevi? Ayi ine sidatheme kuuvera nsisi tayu mzinda wa anthu akupiringana pikwi dzana na makumawiri, ale nkhabe kwanisa kusiyanisa tayu pakati pa chadidi na chakuipa, pontho ule una pifuyo pizinji.”" 
Micah1:1 MBUYA adalonga kuna Mika wa kuluwani ya Moresheti, mwenemo Yotamu, Ahazi na Hezekia, mbali mafumu a Yuda. MBUYA adamuonesa masomphenya akulonga pya Samaria na Yerusalemu." 
Micah1:2 Vani kuno, imwe madzinza onsene, vesera, iwe dziko yapansi na onsene anyakukhala mwenemo! MBUYA Mulungu anachita umboni wakupokanyisana namwe; Mbuya akulonga kubulukira kunyumbache yakuchena." 
Micah1:3 Ngayang'anani! MBUYA akudza kubulukira kumbuto yache imbakhala iye; iye atchitha mbafamba pansonga ya mapiri. 
Micah1:4 Mapiri ananyunguluka pansi pa manyalo ache pontho maphedi anadidimuka, ninga upula kunyunguluka pamoto, ninga madzi akuthamanga pamtelero." 
Micah1:5 Pyonsenepi pinachitika, thangwi ya umambala wa pidzukulu pya Yakobo, thangwi ya pyakudawa pya dzinza ya Israele. Ayi umambala wa pidzukulu pya Yakobo ngwanji? Ayi si Samaria tayu? Ayi mbuto yakupembedzerapo milungu mu Yuda njipi? Ayi si Yerusalemu tayu?" 
Micah1:6 Natenepo MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ine ndinati ndisanduse Samaria kukhala mulu wa madongolomwa, mbuto yakulimamo mfesa. Miyalache ndinati ndiitayire kuphedi, pontho maziko ache mbandiasiya nyimwa." 
Micah1:7 Mifanikizo yache yonsene ndinaigwanda-gwanda; pinthu pya m'nyumba yakupembedzeramo milungu pile pidapagalwi maputache pinapiswa moto; ine ndinavunga milungu yache yonsene. Podi Samaria adagumanyisa pinthu kubulukira kuna maputache, ipyo pinati pikwatwe na anyamalwache kupagalimbo napyo maputa panyumba zinango zakupembedzerapo milungu.”" 
Micah1:8 Tenepo Mika adalonga mbati, “Na thangwi ya penepi, ine ndinalira na kusintili. Ine ndinafamba pyanga chipezi-pezi pontho wakusowa nsapato. Ndinagwenga ninga thika, pontho ndinalira ninga dzidzi." 
Micah1:9 Thangwi pironda pyache nkhabe kuva mtombwe tayu; ipyo pyafika mpakana ku Yuda. Kuvungika kwache kwafika chifupi na mzinda wa anthu anga, mpakana na ku Yerusalemu kwene.”" 
Micah1:10 Lekani kupilonga kuna anthu a ku Gati; lekani lira na pang'ono pene. Mu Beteleafira anthu mbabulumunde padotha. 
Micah1:11 Ndokoni kudziko ya unyaperezo chipezi-pezi pontho mwamanyadzo, imwe anthu a ku Shafiri. Anyakukhala mu Zaanani, mbaleke yesera kubuluka kunja tayu. Mungava anthu a ku Betezele kusintili, penepo iwo nkhabe dzakutchinjirizanive tayu." 
Micah1:12 Anyakukhala mu Maroti aswipa mtima kudikhira chiphedzo, thangwi nyatwa zadza kubulukira kuna MBUYA, podi na kuna msuwo wa Yerusalemu ene." 
Micah1:13 Imwe anyakukhala mu Lakishi, mangani akavalo papingolo. Imwe mudatsanzira kudawa kwa Israele, mbamudawisa anthu a ku Zioni." 
Micah1:14 Natenepo gonekanani na anthu a ku Moresheti-Gati. Anthu a kuluwani ya Akizibu anaphatisa fuwa mafumu a ku Israele. 
Micah1:15 Ine ndinadzesa nyakukunda kuna imwe, anyakukhala mu Maresha, ule anapokosera luwani yanu. Akadamu a Israele anaenda kabisala m'khwimba ku Adulamu." 
Micah1:16 Anthu a ku Yuda, chingani tsisi yanu kuonesa kusintili, thangwi ya ananu ambakomerwa na imwe ale; khalani mpala ngeti-ngeti khala ninga m'khosi mwa nkhanga, thangwi iwo anati abuluswe pamaso panu kwenda kudziko ya unyaperezo." 
Micah2:1 Dzedze kuna anyakusasanya kuchita pyakuipa, kuna ale ambanyerezera pyakuipa uku ali dedede patalimba pawo! Iwo ambapichita angalamuka na machibese, thangwi mphamvu zakuchitira penepi ali nazo." 
Micah2:2 Iwo ambasirira minda mbaipokoseraletu; pontho nyumba mbazikwatiratu ninga zawo zene. Iwo ambadyera nkope-kope munthu na musache, pontho mbaphata m'maso nyapinthu pyache." 
Micah2:3 Natenepo MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ine ndikusasanya pyakudzesa nyatwa pana imwe, zile imwe nkhabe kwanisa kuzithawa tayu. Imwe nkhabe dzafambave mwakulunkuma tayu, thangwi wenewu unakhala ndzidzi wa nyatwa." 
Micah2:4 Ndzidzi wenewo anthu anakutikanani; iwo anakusedegulani na nyimbo ya maliro kuti, ‘Ife tamala vungika monsene mwene; dziko yathu yamala gawanwa pyawo. MBUYA amala kutipokosera! Mindathu amala kuipereka kuna anyamalwathu.’ ”" 
Micah2:5 Natenepo nkhabe na mbodzi ene wa imwe anafuna dzatambira khundu pa dziko tayu ndzidzi unafuna MBUYA kubwezera pontho dziko kuna anthu ache. 
Micah2:6 Anthu ambalonga kuna ine kuti, “Leka kutilalikira! Leka longa-longa pinthu ninga penepi; ife nkhabe dzachitiswa manyadzo tayu." 
Micah2:7 Imwe pidzukulu pya Yakobo ayi imwe mwathema kulonga pyanu kuti, ‘Ayi kuuphata mtima kwa MBUYA kwamala? Ayi iye nkhuchita pinthu ninga penepi? Ayi mafalache nkhabe dzesa udidi tayu kuna iye nyakuchita pyakulungama?’ ”" 
Micah2:8 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Kwache imwe mwasosa anthu anga ninga nyamalwa. Imwe mumbadula mbamuba mkhanjo wa anyakugwanda pyawo na njira, anyakudza kubulukira kunkhondo kunyerezera kuti ali pakupata." 
Micah2:9 Imwe mumbathamangisa akazi a anthu anga kuabulusa m'misawo yadidi maka ile, pontho mumbaabera mitsanzayiso yanga kuna anawo kwenda na kwenda." 
Micah2:10 Lamukani bulukani pano! Ino si mbuto yanu yakupumirapo tayu, thangwi yamala swipiswa na pyakudawika pyanu, tenepo yavungika monsene mwene." 
Micah2:11 “Ngakhala panadza nyakunama pontho nyakuphata anthu m'maso kulonga kuti, ‘Ine ndinati ndilonge mphangwa zauprofeti kuti panakhala vinyu na bwadwa mataka ene,’ mprofeti ninga weneyo ndiye ambafuna anthu enewa!" 
Micah2:12 “Ine ndinati ndigumanyise munthu onsene wa imwe, imwe pidzukulu pya Yakobo. Ndimomwene ndinakudzesani pabodzi pene, imwe anyakusala na moyo onsene a Aisraele. Ndinakugumanyisani pabodzi ninga mabira m'thanga, ninga mkumbi wa mabira mumpovu; dzikoyi inati idzale na anthu.”" 
Micah2:13 Nyakufumbula njira anati aende patsogolo pawo; iwo anati aswe misuwo ya mpanda kuabulusamo. Nyakutoma dzagwanda na penepo ndi mfumu wawo, msolo wawo mbakhala MBUYA." 
Micah3:1 Tenepo ine ndidalonga kuti, “Veserani kuno, imwe akadamu a pidzukulu pya Yakobo, imwe atongi a dzinza ya Israele. Ayi imwe hamudatheme tayu kuteweza chilungamo?" 
Micah3:2 Imwe mumbazonda kuchita pyadidi mbamukomerwa na kuchita pyanu pyakuipa; imwe mumbasuwa khanda pa manungo a anthu anga mbamubulusa mnofu m'magogodo mwawo. 
Micah3:3 Imwe mumbadya pyanu manungo a anthu anga, kusuwa khanda yawo, pontho kubwededza magogodo awo; mumbachekera anthu anga, ninga nyama yakufuna kukazingirwa m'chiwaya, ninga nthuli zakufuna kuterekwa m'chikalango." 
Micah3:4 “Tenepo imwe munalira kuna MBUYA, kwache iye nkhabe kukutawirani tayu. Pandzidzi wenewo iye anakubisirani nkhope yache thangwi ya pinthu pyakuipa pyachita imwe.”" 
Micah3:5 MBUYA akulonga tenepa: “Kulonga pya maprofeti, ale ambabausa anthu anga, ngakhala munthu anaapasa phoso, iwo ambalonga kuti, ‘Mtendere;’ kwache angakhonda chita tenepo, iwo ambasasanya pyakuchita naye nkhondo." 
Micah3:6 Kuna imwe, maprofeti mosiku nkhabe kukudzeserani masomphenya tayu, pontho mdima wakusowa nawo ndoto zauprofeti. Kunja kunakudokerani, pontho masikati anasanduka mdima kuna imwe.”" 
Micah3:7 Anyakulotera anachitiswa manyadzo, pontho anyakuombedza onsene analulupiswa; iwo onsene anaphimbira nkhope, thangwi Mulungu hakuatawirabi." 
Micah3:8 Mbwenye kulonga pya ine, MBUYA andidzaza na mphamvu, pontho na Mzimu wache, na chilungamo pontho kuwanga mtima, towera nditchulule kuna mbumba ya Yakobo umambalawo, kuonesa pakwecha kuna Aisraele kudawa kwawo." 
Micah3:9 Ngavani kuno, imwe akadamu a mbumba ya Yakobo imwe atongi a dzinza ya Israele, ale mumbazonda chilungamo, mbamupotoza pinthu pyonsene pyakulungama;" 
Micah3:10 ale mumbamanga mzinda wa Zioni na upandu, pontho Yerusalemu na njira zakudawika." 
Micah3:11 Akadamu ache nkhabe tonga mseru tayu okhonda dyekerwa; anyansembe ache nkhabe funzisa tayu okhonda pagalwi, pakusowa kobiri maprofeti ache nkhabe longa mphangwa zauprofeti tayu. Kwache onsenewa ambapithemba mbalonga kuti, “MBUYA ali pakati pathu? Nkhabe chakuipa chinafuna kudza pana ife tayu.”" 
Micah3:12 Natenepo na thangwi ya imwe, Zioni anatipuliwa ninga munda; Yerusalemu anasanduka milu ya madongolomwa, pontho paphiri pale pana Nyumba ya Mulungu panasanduka msitu." 
Micah4:1 Pansiku yakumalisa phiri ile, pale pana Nyumba ya MBUYA, inakhazikiswa ninga phiri yakulaphaletu kupiringana mapiri anango onsene, tenepo madzinza azinji anagomokera kweneko." 
Micah4:2 Madzinza azinji anabwera mbalonga mbati, “Tendeni tikwire paphiri ya MBUYA, ku Nyumba ya Mulungu wa Yakobo. Iye anakatifunzisa njira zache, towera ife tikwanise kuzitewera.” Chifunziso cha MBUYA chimbadza kubulukira ku Zioni; pontho ku Yerusalemu kumbabulukira mafalache." 
Micah4:3 Iye anatonga mseru pakati pa anthu azinji; mbamalisa kukhonda vana pakati pa madzinza amphamvu achifupi na akutali ene. Iwo anafula matalasadawo kukhala mapaza, pontho madipawo kukhala mipeni yakusadzulira. Dzinza nkhabe dzachita nkhondo na dzinza inzache, penu kufunzisana pya nkhondo nkhabe tayu." 
Micah4:4 Kada munthu anakhala pansi kuchedza pamitawi yache yamfesa na miti yamkuyu, tenepo nkhabe unango anafuna dzaagoswa tayu, thangwi alonga ndi MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Micah4:5 Madzinza anango onsene anakwanisa kuteweza njira za milungu yawo; mbwenye ife tinati titeweze njira za MBUYA Mulungu wathu kwenda na kwenda. 
Micah4:6 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ndzidzi ukudza unafuna ine dzagumanyisa anyakulamala; ndinagumanyisa anthu onsene adakwatwa kwenda kudziko ya unyaperezo, pontho ale adachitisa ine kutsukwala." 
Micah4:7 Anyakulamala na anyakutamiswa onsene ndinabwezera kwawo; anyakusalira na moyo ale ndinaachitisa kukhala pontho dzinza yamphamvu. Ine MBUYA, ndinakhala mtongi wawo paphiri ya Zioni kubulukira nsiku yeneyo pontho kwenda na kwenda.”" 
Micah4:8 Kulonga pya iwe, iwe nsanja ya nyakulondali mabira, iwe mpanda wamphamvu wa Zioni, demelero yakutoma ile inabwezerwa kuna iwe; ufumu unabwerera mu Yerusalemu." 
Micah4:9 Watani unakalala tenepa? Thangwi yache ninji ukuva mtswotswo ninga mkazi wamimba pakubala? Ayi iwe nkhabe mfumu? Kani mapungu ako amala kufa? 
Micah4:10 Khukhunyika iwe Zioni, thangwi ya mtswotswo ninga mkazi wamimba pakubala. Thangwi chinchino wathema kubuluka mumzindamu mbukakhala mumsasa kutsanga. Iwe unati uende ku Babiloni; kwache kweneko iwe unati upulumuswe. Kweneko MBUYA anati akuombole m'manja mwa anyamalwako." 
Micah4:11 Kwache lero madzinza azinji agumanyikana kufuna kuchita nawe nkhondo. Iwo akulonga kuti, “Yerusalemu mbaswipiswe pyache. Maso athu mbayang'ane pana kuvungika kwa Zioni!”" 
Micah4:12 Kwache iwo nkhabe dziwa tayu manyerezero a MBUYA; iwo nkhabe vesa pinthu pimbasasanya iye tayu, iye ule ambaakulumanya ninga misumbu ya tirigu mbadza nayo pambuwa kuti ambubude." 
Micah4:13 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Iwe Zioni, lamuka mbuabubude thangwi ine ndinakupasa nyanga zasimbi; ine ndinakupasa njondo zamkuwa, tenepo unapondedza-pondedza madzinza azinji. Iwe unapereka m'manja mwa ine, MBUYA pinthu pyagumana iwo pakuchita upandu, unadzesa mfumawo kuna ine, Mbuya, mtongi wa dziko yonsene yapansi.”" 
Micah5:1 Anyankhondo ako mbalikitike, iwe mzinda wa anyankhondo, thangwi iwe wazungulirwa na anyamalwa. Iwo anamenya mtongi wa Israele paphutu na ndodo." 
Micah5:2 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Mbwenye iwe, Betelehemu wa mu Efurata, podi kwene kuti ndiwe wamng'onoletu pakati pa madzinza a Yuda, kubulukira muna iwe munaoneka mtongi ule anafuna dzatonga Israele, ule phatache njakale na kale, kubulukira ndzidzi wakutomaletu.”" 
Micah5:3 Natenepo MBUYA anapasa Israele nkhodolo kufikirana mkazi, ule ana mimba, abale. Tenepo abale ache anango onsene adatamiswa ale abwerera kwawo kukhala pabodzi na Aisraele anzawo." 
Micah5:4 Iye anayang'anira anthu ache ninga makabuswa na mphamvu zakubulukira kuna MBUYA, pontho na ukulu wa MBUYA Mulungu wache. Iwo anakhala pakupata, thangwi ndzidzi wenewo ukulu wache unafika mpakana kumadolomero a dziko yapansi." 
Micah5:5 Tenepo iye anaapasa mtendere. Aasiria angapita m'dziko mwathu mbafamba mulikiti m'mipandathu yamphamvu, ife tinaenda kamenyana nawo na atongi athu azinji, pontho na akadamu ene ankhondo," 
Micah5:6 ale anafuna dzakunda dziko ya Asiria, na talasada, dziko ya Nimirodi na talasada yakuchololwa. Mfumu wathu anatipulumusa m'manja mwa Aasiria, iwo angapita m'dziko mwathu, mbafamba pamulikiti kupita m'madire mwathu." 
Micah5:7 Anyakusalira na moyo a mbumba ya Yakobo anakhala pakati pa madzinza azinji ninga bume yakubulukira kuna MBUYA; iwo anakhala ninga mafazi akuwazira maudzu, ale nkhabe dikhira matongero a munthu tayu penu kudembuka thangwi ya munthu tayu." 
Micah5:8 Anyakusalira na moyo a mbumba ya Yakobo anakhala pakati pa madzinza azinji, ninga nkhalamu pakati pa pirombo pyam'tsanga, ninga mwana nkhalamu pakati pa mabira, ule ambafamba mbaanumphira na kuapwetedza mbapasowa na mbodzi ene wakuapulumusa." 
Micah5:9 Imwe Aisraele munati mukunde anyamalwanu mbaavunga onsenewo, pontho anyakukuzondani onsene anamala vungwa." 
Micah5:10 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Pandzidzi wenewo ine ndinavunga akavalo anu mbandigujula-gujula pingolo pyanu pyankhondo." 
Micah5:11 Ndinavunga mizinda yonsene ya m'dziko mwanu mbandigwisa mipandanu yonsene yamphamvu. 
Micah5:12 Ine ndinamalisa matsenganu onsene, mbandikhonda siya na nyakuombedza ene." 
Micah5:13 Ine ndinavunga mifanikizo yanu yonsene pontho piguwa pyanu pyonsene pyakupambulika; imwe nkhabeve dzagodamira tayu pinthu pyasasanywa imwe na manjanu. 
Micah5:14 Ndinatchikhula pakati panu adzimunthu onsene a milungu Ashera mbandivunga mizindanu. 
Micah5:15 Na kuzhangali kwanga pontho ukali wanga ndinati nditchunyuse madzinza, adakhonda kundivera ale.”" 
Micah6:1 Veserani mafala a MBUYA kulonga kuti, “Lamukani mbamudembetere mseru wanu kuna mapiri; pitunda mbapive pinafuna imwe longapyo." 
Micah6:2 Vani imwe mapiri, mseru wa MBUYA, veserani imwe, maziko akukhala na kukhala a dziko yapansi. Thangwi MBUYA ana mseru na anthu ache; iye anafuna apokanyisane na Aisraele.”" 
Micah6:3 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Anthu anga, ayi chachita ine ninji kuna imwe? Ayi ndakunensani? Nganditawireni mphapo!" 
Micah6:4 Ine ndidakubulusani m'dziko ya Iguputo; mbandikuombolani kudziko yaubitchu. Ndidatuma Mose dzakutsogolerani, pontho Aroni na Miriamu." 
Micah6:5 Anthu anga, kumbukani uphungu udapereka Balaki, mfumu wa Moabu, pontho kutawira kudachita Balamu mwana Beori. Kumbukani ulendo wanu kubulukira ku Shitimu kwenda ku Giligala, towera mukwanise kudziwa mabasa akulungama a MBUYA.”" 
Micah6:6 Ninji chinafuna ine kwata kuti ndidze nacho pamaso pa MBUYA mbandigodamira Mulungu Wakudzulu-dzulu? Ayi ndidze pamaso pache na nsembe yakupyerera, na anamphulu a chaka chibodzi?" 
Micah6:7 Ayi MBUYA anakomerwa napyo ndingadza kuna iye na mabira pikwi-pikwi penu mikulo pikwi khumi ya mafuta aolivi? Ayi ndipereke nsembe mwananga wautombo thangwi ya umambalanga, mwana wakubuluka m'chuno mwanga, thangwi ya pyakudawa pya moyo wanga?" 
Micah6:8 Iye akuonesa kale, iwe munthu, kuti chadidi ntchipi. Chinafuna iye kuna ife ntchichi: kuchita chilungamo, kuonesa kufunana kukulu, na kukhala na moyo wakupichepesa pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Micah6:9 Kukhala na nzeru nkhugopa MBUYA. MBUYA akuchemera mzinda wa Yerusalemu kuti, “Veserani, imwe dzinza, ile imbagumanyikana mumzindamo!" 
Micah6:10 Ayi ndathema kulekerera, imwe dzinza ya anyakuipa, thangwi ya mfumanu idagumana imwe mwakubayo, pontho mdida wakunama wa efa ule ngwakutembererwa?" 
Micah6:11 Ayi ndathema kuyesa nyakukhonda dawa munthu wakuphatisa basa midida yakunama wakukhala na mkuku wa miyezo yakuba? 
Micah6:12 Amuna a mumzindamo akufuma ale ngakuzunguzika; anthu ache kunama nkhudya kwawo, pontho iwo ngakutapira m'kanwa." 
Micah6:13 Natenepo ine ndatoma kale kukuvungani, kukusakazani thangwi ya pyakudawa pyanu." 
Micah6:14 Imwe munadya, kwache nkhabe dzakhuta tayu; imwe munakhala basi mimba kade-kade. Imwe munakoya pinthu, kwache m'thumba yakuphoka, pontho na ping'ono pene pyakoya imwe pile ndinapichitisa kuvungika pankhondo." 
Micah6:15 Munabzala mbewu, kwache nkhabe kuzivuna tayu; imwe munasikinya mafuta aolivi, kwache imwe maka nkhabe kuaphatisa basa tayu; imwe munatchitchitha vinyu, kwache vinyuyo imwe nkhabe kummwa tayu." 
Micah6:16 Imwe mwatewera pifunziso pya Mfumu Omri, mbamutewezambo makhaliro akuipa a mwanache, Mfumu Ahabu na banjache ene. Imwe mwatsanzira mitemo yawo, natenepo ndinati ndikusakazeni, pontho madzinza anango anakuimbirani nswinyo; iwo anakuselusani.”" 
Micah7:1 Ine ndatsukwaladi kwene! Ine ndakhala ninga munthu wanjala wakuchimwana kugumana nsapo ndzidzi wa malimwe, pontho ndzidzi wakutchola mfesa; nkhabe na tsaputu ene yakuti ndinadya tayu, nkhabe na makuyu ene akuchimbiza kufira kuti ndinakwanisa kuva chamaba tayu." 
Micah7:2 Anyakukhulupirika pamaso pa Mulungu onsene amala tswairwamo m'dzikomo; nkhabe nyakulungama asalira tayu. Onsene ambabisala kufuna kuchuchisa chiropa; munthu onsene ambateyera mbaleache msampha. 
Micah7:3 Onsene mbanthu aluso kuchita pyakuipa; mathubu kwawo nkhafuna kutambira mitukwa basi, anyakutonga miseru ambafuna pya kudyekerwa, Anyamphamvu ambachita kutonga pinafuna iwo; iwo onsene ambapangana pyakuipa." 
Micah7:4 Pyadidiletu pinakwanisa iwo kuchita pyakhala ninga ntcheswa; chakulungama chinakwanisa iwo kuchita ntchakuipaletu kupiringana nyakhanche. Nsiku yafika inafuna Mulungu kutchunyusa anthu, malingana na kuacheuza kudachita iye kudzera muna anyakulondali awo, maprofeti. Chinchino ndi ndzidzi unafuna iwo zunguzika msolo." 
Micah7:5 Munthu mbaleke nyindira tsanthembache; penu kunyindira shamwaliache. Munthu mbachite mphole-mphole na malongero ache podi na kuna ule akhumbatira iye pagangafuwa pache. 
Micah7:6 Thangwi mwana wamamuna akutikana babache, mwana wamkazimbo akupandukira mache, mkwenya nkhabe lemedza mebzalache tayu; anyamalwa a munthu mbanthu a pamsuwo pache." 
Micah7:7 Mbwenye kulonga pya ine, maso anga ali pana MBUYA, ine ndinati ndimdikhire Mulungu Nyankhombo wanga; Mulungu wanga anati andive." 
Micah7:8 Lekani kundiseka, imwe anyamalwanga. Podi kwene kuti ndagwa, ndinati ndilamuke pontho. Podi kwene kuti ndikukhala mumdima, MBUYA ndiye anafuna khala cheza changa." 
Micah7:9 Podi ine ndamdawira MBUYA, ine ndathema kuona nyatwa na ukali wache kufikirana andiikhire kunduli pamseru wanga, pontho andichitire chilungamo. Iye anati andibuluse mumdima kundidzesa kuna cheza; ine ndinaona chipulumuso chache." 
Micah7:10 Tenepo anyamalwanga anaona penepi mbachitiswa manyadzo pikulu pene, ale adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Ali kupi MBUYA Mulungu wako?” Maso anga anaona kuvungika kwawo; podi na lero, iwo akupondedzwa pansi ninga matope m'njira." 
Micah7:11 Anthu a ku Yerusalemu, ndzidzi unafika unafuna imwe dzamanga mpanda wa mzinda, ndzidzi unafuna imwe dzafumulira madire anu."
