Micah7:12 Ndzidzi wenewo anthu anabwerera kuna imwe kubulukira ku Asiria na kumizinda ya Iguputo, kubulukira ku Iguputo mpakana kumkulo wa Yufurate, kubulukira kubara mpakana kubara, kubulukira kumapiri mpakana kumapiri." 
Micah7:13 Dziko inasanduka thando yatchetcha, thangwi ya pyakudawika pya anyakukhala mwenemo." 
Micah7:14 MBUYA, dyesani mwadidi anthu anu na ndodo yanu, mkumbi wa mabira wa dzinzanu, ule uli okha ene m'tsanga, podi kwene kuti ali chifupi na mpovu. Alekeni akadye pyawo mu Bashani pontho Gileadi ninga mukhachitira iwo kale ene." 
Micah7:15 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ninga mukhali ipyo ndzidzi udabuluka imwe m'dziko ya Iguputo, ine ndinakuonesani pyakudodomesa pyanga.”" 
Micah7:16 Madzinza anati apione penepi mbachita manyadzo, onsene mbamala khutchwa mano. Iwo anati aphate pakanwa pawo pontho makutu awo anagontha." 
Micah7:17 Iwo anabwira fumbi ninga nyoka, ninga nyama zakukambadza. Iwo anasokoloka mwamantha m'madzimba mwawo; iwo anafika mwakutetemera pamaso pa MBUYA Mulungu wathu, pontho anachita naye mantha." 
Micah7:18 Mbani pontho unango ninga imwe, Mulungu, nyakufudza pyakudawa pya anthu pontho nyakulekerera pyakudawa pya anyakusalira na moyo pakati pa anthu ache? Imwe nkhabe zhangali kwenda na kwenda tayu, mbwenye mumbakomerwa na kuavera nsisi." 
Micah7:19 Imwe munava pontho nafe nyambalo; munapondedza pyakudawa pyathu pansi pa manyalo anu, mbamuponya pabara yakuzwika umambalathu onsene." 
Micah7:20 Imwe munakhulupirika kuna Yakobo, mbamukomera mtima Abrahamu, malingana na kudumbira kudachita imwe kale ene kuna makolo athu." 
Nahum1:1 Izi ndi mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu zakulonga pya masomphenya adaona Nahumu wa ku Elikoshi pya mzinda wa Ninevi. 
Nahum1:2 MBUYA ndi Mulungu wantchanje pontho wakubwezera; MBUYA ambabwezera; pontho ngwakudzala na ukali. MBUYA ambabwezera anyakumzonda, ukali wache mbuthimiza kukhala pana anyamalwache." 
Nahum1:3 MBUYA nkhabe chipsu tayu, pontho mphamvu zache nsikulu pyakwanga; MBUYA nkhabe dzaleka kwene anyakudawa okhonda kuatchunyusa tayu. Njirache imbafamba na iye ile ili m'chivumbulu pontho m'chonzi, makole ndi fumbi ya kumanyalo kwache." 
Nahum1:4 Iye ambalongera bara iyombo mbiumiratu kakata; iye ambachitisa mikulo yonsene kuuma gugudu. Minda ya Bashani na Phiri ya Karimele pimbamala unyala, pontho maluwa a ku Lebanoni ambafyokotoka." 
Nahum1:5 Mapiri ambatekenyeka pamaso pache; pitunda pimbamala nyunguluka. Dziko yapansi imbatetemera pamaso pache, dziko yapansi na onsene ambakhala mwenemo ale." 
Nahum1:6 Mbani anakwanisa kupirira na shungu yache? Mbani anakwanisa kupirira kuzhangali kwache kwakugoswa? Ukali wache wakhuthuka ninga moto; miyala mikulu-mikulu imbapeyeka pamaso pache. 
Nahum1:7 MBUYA ngwadidi, iye ndi mbuto yakupata ndzidzi wa nyatwa. Iye ambatsalakana mwadidi anyakumnyindira ale." 
Nahum1:8 Kwache ninga madzi makulu, iye anavunga monsene mwene anyakumzonda ale. Iye anathamangisira anyamalwache kumdima." 
Nahum1:9 Pyakuipa pyonsene pinasasanya iwo kupokanyisana na MBUYA, iye anati apimalise. Anyamalawache nkhabe dzabwera kachiwiri tayu." 
Nahum1:10 Iwo anamangika pakati pa minga, pontho ninga madombe iwo amala ledzera; iwo anapiswa ninga maudzu akuuma." 
Nahum1:11 Kubulukira kuna iwe, Ninevi, padza munthu unango, ule ambasasanya pyakuipa kupokanyisana na MBUYA, pontho ule ambapereka uphungu wakudawika." 
Nahum1:12 MBUYA akulonga tenepa kuna anthu ache Aisraele: “Podi kwene kuti Aasiria ngamphamvu pontho akuinjipa, onsenewo anati amale vungwa mbakhonda dzaoneka pontho. Podi kwene kuti imwe anthu a ku Yuda ndidakuchitisani ndine kubonera, kwache ine nkhabe dzapichita pontho tayu." 
Nahum1:13 Chinchino ndinati ndiswe magoli-goli a Aasiria kuabulusa m'khosi mwanu na kudumula nkhambala zidamangwa na imwe zile.” 
Nahum1:14 MBUYA apereka matongero awa pya imwe, Aasiria: “Imwe nkhabe dzakhala na pidzukulu tayu, pile pinafuna dzakoya dzinanu. Ine ndinati ndivunge mifanikizo yanu, ile ili m'nyumba zanu zakupembedzeramo milungu, mifanikizo ya miti na ntove ene mbandiitayira kunja. Ine ndinakusasanyirani masiye thangwi imwe mwasanduka chivunde!”" 
Nahum1:15 Ngayang'ana pamapiri manyalo a munthu wakudza na Mphangwa Zadidi, ule ambalalika pya mtendere! Sekera maphwando ako, iwe Yuda mbuchitise kukwana-kwana pinthu pidadumbira iwe pile. Nkhabeve anyakudawika anapita pontho m'dziko mwako tayu; iwo anamala vungwa monsene mwene." 
Nahum2:1 Nyakusosa akudza kuna iwe, Ninevi. Londali mpandako wamphamvu, tchinjiriza misewu yako! Pivazike wekha ene pida pyankhondo; mangani matimbira kusasanyikira nkhondo!" 
Nahum2:2 MBUYA anabwezera demelero ya Yakobo, ya Israele ninga mukhali ipyo kale, podi kwene kuti anyakuvunga adamsandusa madembe pontho kuti adamala pwayula mfesa zache." 
Nahum2:3 Pyakugedera matswimo pya anyankhondo ache pili piriwiri; anyankhondo ache amphamvu amala vala pyakufira. Pisimbi pya pingolo pili yeti-yeti kusasanyikira nsiku inafuna ipyo dzaphata basa; akavalo akufukula-fukula pansi. 
Nahum2:4 Pingolo pili fumbi nyodo m'misewu kuthamanga uku na uku m'pithando pya mzinda. Ipyo pikuyerima ninga nsakali, pontho kumbuluka ninga ching'ani-ng'ani." 
Nahum2:5 Akadamu ankhondo akuchemereswa, kwache iwo akwenda mbagwegweduka pyawo. Iwo akuchimbiza kwenda kumafufu a mpanda wa mzindawo; pontho anyakuphatira pyakugedera matswimo amala khala m'mbuto zawo." 
Nahum2:6 Mwakufungira mikulo mwamala funguka; nyumba yachifumu yagwa. 
Nahum2:7 Matongero aperekwa kuti anthu a mumzindawo akwatwe unyaperezo; anyabasache achikazi akulira ninga nkhangaiwa mbakhumata thangwi ya kutsukwala. 
Nahum2:8 Ninga madzi akubaula thawale, anthu a ku Ninevi akubulukamo. Kulira kukuveka kuti, “Ngaimirani! Ngaimirani!” Kwache nkhabe na mbodzi ene akubwerera tayu." 
Nahum2:9 Pokoserani siliva! Pokoserani golidi! Mfumache nkhabe mala tayu, pontho njokhonda lengeseka." 
Nahum2:10 Ninevi amala vungwa, iye apokoserwa pinthu pyache mbasala chipezi-pezi! Mitima ikunyunguluka, mabondo akugedemera na mantha, manungo akutetemera, pontho nkhope yonsene ikubuluka kaluma thangwi ya mantha." 
Nahum2:11 Apo ili kupi nkhwimba ya nkhalamu, mzinda wa Ninevi, kumbuto kukhadyesera iwo anawo kule kule kukhaenda nkhalamu imuna na ikazi, pontho anawo mbakhala pakupata?" 
Nahum2:12 Nkhalamu idapha nyama yakukwanira anache mbaikhwadzula-khwadzula nyama ile kuti mkazache adye; mbadzaza nkhwimbache na nyama yapha iye ile, pontho nyumbache na nyama yakhwadzula iye ile." 
Nahum2:13 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga kuti, “Ine ndina mseru na imwe. Ine ndinapisa pingolo pyanu, pontho talasada inakhamwadza ana nkhalamu. Ine nkhabe dzakusiyirani nyama tayu yakuti mudye padziko yapansi. Fala ya anyamphangwanu nkhabe dzaveka pontho tayu.”" 
Nahum3:1 Dzedze kuna mzinda wachirope, wakudzala na pyakunama, wakudzala na pyakupokosera, wakuti nkhabe leka chita pyaupandu." 
Nahum3:2 Veserani kulira kwa mtswamu, ugwegwere-gwegwere wa magaleta, mchiti wa akavalo, pontho ugubudu-gubudu wa pingolo." 
Nahum3:3 Anyakupakira akavalo apomokera, matalasada akuchetuma-chetuma, madipa akuyetimira! Anthu azinji amala kuwazwa, milu ya anyakufa, mitembo yokhonda lengeseka mwakuti anthu akuchita kugwegweduka nayo!" 
Nahum3:4 Pyonsenene pyachitika thangwi ya kuzuda kwa puta weneyu, Ninevi, mkazi wakudziwa kutopola na mchenache, ule na uputache adakwesha madzinza azinji, pontho na matsengache adabausa anthu azinji." 
Nahum3:5 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga kuti, “Ndinati ndikutchunyuse iwe, Ninevi! Ndinakukunjula nguwo mpakana kumsolo mbandionesa pezi pako kuna madzinza pontho maufumu anaona manyadzo ako." 
Nahum3:6 Ine ndinakukapira pyakunyansa. Ine ndinati ndikululupise, mbandikuchitisa kukhala chakusekesa." 
Nahum3:7 Onsene anafuna kuona anakuchalira mbalonga kuti, ‘Ninevi asala madembe ene pyache! Mbani anafuna kumsintili?’ Nkhupi kunafuna ine kagumana nyakukupukuta misozi?”" 
Nahum3:8 Ayi iwe Ninevi, ndiwe wadidi kupiringana Tebesi, wakukhala pamkulo wa Nailo, uku azungulirwa na madzi? Mkulo ndiye ukhamtchinjiriza, madzi mbakhala mafufu ache." 
Nahum3:9 Kushi na Iguputo ndiye akhali mphamvu zache zokhonda mala; Puti na Libia ndiye akhali kukhundu kwache. 
Nahum3:10 Kwache iye adakwatwa unyaperezo mbaendeswa kudziko yantomi. Anache adamalwa nyedzwa-nyedzwa pankhomo yonsene ya njira. Akulu-akulu ache onsene amala tapatwa; anyakuaphata aachitira ntsango kuagawana. 
Nahum3:11 Iwembo unaledzera; unaenda kabisala mbukasaka mbuto yakupata kuthawa anyamalwako. 
Nahum3:12 Mipandako yonsene yamphamvu yakhala ninga miti yamkuyu yakukhala na nsapo zache zakutoma fira; mitiyo ingatekenyeka makuyu ambagwera m'kanwa mwa anyakuadya. 
Nahum3:13 Ngayang'ana magulu ako ankhondo, onsene mbakazi okhokha! Misuwo ya mpanda m'dziko mwako ili khanang'ana pamaso pa anyamalwako; moto wamala pisa mphinga zache." 
Nahum3:14 Tungiratu madzi ndzidzi mbudzati fika wakuzungulirwa na anyamalwa wangisa pyakukutchinjiriza napyo! Phatisa basa dongo pontho munya mataka, umba njerwa!" 
Nahum3:15 Kweneko kwene moto unakuvunga; talasada inakugwanda-gwanda, ninga mabobo kutedza-tedza mapira. Mwaswana ninga nthete, mwainjipa ninga nyadzombe!" 
Nahum3:16 Imwe mwainjipisa anyamalondanu kufikirana iwo ainjipa kupiringana nyenyezi za kuthambo. Kwache mwakhala ninga nyadzombe, ule adamala sakaza dziko mbathawa pyache." 
Nahum3:17 Anyakulondali anu akhala ninga nyadzombe, mathubu anu akhala ninga uwumbi-wumbi wa nyadzombe, ule ambaphama m'mafufu pandzidzi wakutonthola, mbwenye dzuwa ingagaka onsene ambamala mbuluka pontho nkhabe na mbodzi ene ambadziwa kwaenda iye tayu." 
Nahum3:18 Iwe, mfumu wa ku Asiria, amakabuswako akuodzira; mathubu ako ali gunundu-gunundu kupuma. Anthu ako ali balala-balala m'mapiri, wakusowa na mbodzi ene wakuagumanyisa." 
Nahum3:19 Nkhabe mtombwe unakwanisa kuchiza chironda chako tayu chirondacho chasanduka njinda. Munthu onsene ule ava pyakuchitikira pile ambaimba m'manja thangwi ya kuvungwa kwako, thangwi mbani adakhonda lawa kukala mtima kwako kokhonda mala." 
Habakkuk1:1 Izi ndi mphangwa zidatambira mprofeti Habakuku kubulukira kuna Mulungu: 
Habakkuk1:2 Mpakana lini MBUYA, ndichemere kufuna chiphedzo, kwache imwe nkhabe kundivesera tayu? Penu kulira kuna imwe kuti, “Upandu!” Mbwenye imwe nkhabe kupulumusa tayu?" 
Habakkuk1:3 Thangwi yache ninji munandichitisa kuyang'ana pinthu pyakusowa chilungamo? Mwatani munatawirisa pyakudawika kuchitika? Kuvungika na upandu pyandizungulira, nthonga na mapoko-poko pyafika pachimache." 
Habakkuk1:4 Natenepo mwambo wamala mphamvu, pontho chilungamo nkhabe chitikave tayu. Anyakudawika akuponda pamsolo anyakulungama, mwakuti chilungamo chikupotozwa." 
Habakkuk1:5 Natenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna anthu ache mbati, “Chitani maso kwize pana madzinza anangowa mbamuone, pontho mbamudodome monsene mwene. Thangwi ine ndinati ndichitepo pinthu pandzidzi wa moyo wanu, mwakuti imwe nkhabe kupikhulupira tayu podi kwene kuti munthu unango achite pyache kukupangani tani." 
Habakkuk1:6 Ine ndinachitisa Ababiloni kukhala na mphamvu, dzinza ya anthu avinga pontho akuzunguzika ile, ale anafuna dzatswaira dziko yonsene yapansi kupokosera mbuto zakukhalamo zile si zawo tayu." 
Habakkuk1:7 Iwo ndi dzinza ya anthu akugoswa pontho akugopeka; iwo ambakwata mwambo m'manja mwawo mbapigumanira okha ene chilemedzo. 
Habakkuk1:8 “Akavalo awo ngakuthamanga pyakwanga kupiringana nyalugwe, ngakugoswa pyakwanga kupiringana thika m'chidodo. Anyakavalo akudza kubulukira kudziko yakutali; akavalo awo akufukula-fukula pansi. Iwo ambambuluka ninga mphamba kufuna kugonkha mwanapiye." 
Habakkuk1:9 “Onsenewo akudza na upandu ukulu. Magulu awo ankhondo akudza ninga mphepo ya m'thando yatchetcha mbagumanyisa anyaperezo khala ninga tchetcha. 
Habakkuk1:10 Iwo ambaselusa mafumu mbalulupisa atongi. Mizinda yonsene yakutchingwa na mpanda iwo ambaisedegula; iwo adamuluka milu ya mataka kutsamira mpanda mbaigwisa. 
Habakkuk1:11 Tenepo iwo ambathamanga mbagwanda pyawo ninga mphepo, amuna akudawika, ale amphamvu zawo ndi milungu yawo.”" 
Habakkuk1:12 MBUYA, ayi si imwe ule tayu mulipo kubulukira pakutomaletu? Mulungu wanga, Nyakuchena wanga, ule ambakhala na moyo kwenda na kwenda. MBUYA imwe mwaasankhula kuti atitchunyuse; imwe Phanzwi, mwaapasa mphamvu, towera ationese nyatwa." 
Habakkuk1:13 Maso anu ngakuchena pyakwanga mwakuti imwe nkhabe yang'ana pyakuipa; imwe nkhabe kwanisa kupirira na pyakuipa tayu. Apo thangwi yache ninji munayang'ana kwene mphandu kuchita pinafuna izo? Mwatani munakhala kwene mulomo phoo, mwenemo iwo akuvunga anthu, ale ngakulungama kupiringana iwo?" 
Habakkuk1:14 Mwatani mwasandusa anthu kukhala ninga nsomba za m'bara, ninga pyakulengwa pya m'madzi pile nkhabe mtongi tayu?" 
Habakkuk1:15 Ababiloni akuchita kuamedza anthuwo na chimedzo, penu kuamanga na malitchera, iwo ambaagumanyisa onsenewo na kokotawo; natenepo ambakomerwa na kusekera." 
Habakkuk1:16 Tenepo iwo akupereka nsembe kuna malitcherawo mbafukiza pyakununkhira kuna kokotawo, thangwi na malitcherawo iwo ambakhala na tsenzo mbakomerwa na kudya pyakudya pyadidiletu." 
Habakkuk1:17 Ayi iwo athema kuthimiza basi kuonja malitcherawo pontho kuvunga madzinza mwakusowa nsisi? 
Habakkuk2:1 Ine ndinakhala ninga nyakulondali mbindikwira pansanja. Ndinaimira penepo kuti ndione chinafuna longa MBUYA kuna ine, pontho kutawira kunafuna iye chita thangwi ya kudungunya kweneku." 
Habakkuk2:2 Tenepo MBUYA adatawira mbati, “Lemba mwakuoneka mwadidi papyakulemberapo pya miyala pyonsene pinafuna ine kukutchululira, towera nyakuwerenga onsene awerenge mwakukhonda nensa." 
Habakkuk2:3 Thangwi kutchulululwa kweneku kudikhira nsiku yache yakusankhulika; ipyo pikulonga pya mamalisiro pontho nkhabe dzalonga pyakunama tayu. Podi kwene kuti pichite nthontho tani, lila dikhira kwene basi; ipyo pinati pidze mbapikhonda dembuka." 
Habakkuk2:4 “Ngayang'anani, anyakuipa anamala kufa, kwache anyakulungama anati akhale na moyo thangwi ya kukhulupirika kwawo kuna Mulungu.”" 
Habakkuk2:5 Ndimomwene mfuma imbanamiza; anyakutumbama nkhabe puma tayu. Podi kwene kuti iwo ngamtima ninga masiye pontho ninga imfa, iwo nkhabe khuta tayu, ambapigumanyira okha ene madzinza mbaphata unyaperezo anthu azinji ene." 
Habakkuk2:6 Ayi onsene a iwo nkhabe dzamsanyisa, kumtikana pontho kumsedegula tayu kuti, “Dzedze kuna iye ule ambapiinjipisira pinthu pyakuba mbapifumisa yekha ene na kudyera anango nkope-kope? Ayi penepi pyathema kuchitika mpakana lini?”" 
Habakkuk2:7 Ayi anyamalwako nkhabe dzavumbuluka kabodzi kene tayu? Ayi iwo nkhabe dzalamuka mbakuchitisa mantha tayu? Tenepo iwo anapokosera pinthu pyako pyonsene. 
Habakkuk2:8 Na thangwi yakuti iwe wapokosera pinthu pya madzinza azinji ene, anyakusalira na moyo ale anati apokoserembo pinthu pyako. Thangwi iwe wachuchisa chiropa cha anthu azinji; iwe wavunga madziko pontho mizinda na anthu onsene a mwenemo." 
Habakkuk2:9 Dzedze kuna nyakumanga musache na njira zakupotoka, nyakumanga chisa chache padzulu, kufuna kuthawa kuvungika." 
Habakkuk2:10 Iwe wasasanya pyakuvunga madzinza azinji, kwache penepyo pyagwera iwe ene mwenechiroache kuchitisa manyadzo musako pontho kuvunga moyo wako." 
Habakkuk2:11 Miyala ya mpanda inalira, pontho mphalupalu zinatayirira." 
Habakkuk2:12 Dzedze kuna nyakumanga mzinda thangwi yakuchuchisa chiropa mbakhazikisa luwani na kuchita pyaupandu. 
Habakkuk2:13 Ayi MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene nkhabe funa tayu kuti basa yonsene yakupha yaphata anthu isanduke ninga nkhuni zakuphatisira moto, pontho kuti kaluma yonsene yabulusa madzinza a anthu isanduke yakusowa basa?" 
Habakkuk2:14 Thangwi dziko inadzala na udziwisi wa demelero ya MBUYA, ninga mumbachitira madzi kudzala bara." 
Habakkuk2:15 Dzedze kuna nyakupasa tsanthembache chakumwa cha ukali wa MBUYA, kumchitisa kuledzera thophi-thophi towera amuonere pezi." 
Habakkuk2:16 Iwe unachita manyadzo pikulu pene m'mbuto mwa kukhala na demelero. Lerombo pyagwera iwepo! Imwa mbuonekembo pezi! Khomitcho ya kudzanja ya madyo ya MBUYA ikudza pana iwe, pontho demelero yako inasanduka manyadzo." 
Habakkuk2:17 Pyakuzunguzika pyonsene pyachita iwe kuna Lebanoni pinati pikuvunge, pontho kuvunga nyama konsene kudachita iwe kunati kukuchitisembo mantha. Thangwi wachuchisa chiropa cha anthu; iwe wavunga madziko pontho mizinda na anthu onsene a mwenemo." 
Habakkuk2:18 Ayi mfanikizombo una basa yanji, podi wachitwa kusemwa na munthu? Penu dzimunthu ule ambafunzisa pyakunama? Thangwi yache ninji nyakupisasanya onsene ambanyindira pinthu pidasasanya manjache? Iye ambasasanya mifanikizo, ile nkhabe kwanisa kulonga tayu." 
Habakkuk2:19 Dzedze kuna munthu ule ambalonga kuna thabwa kuti, “Khala m'maso!” Penu kulonga kuna mwala wakusowa muya kuti, “Ngalamukave!” Ayi icho chinakwanisa kumpanga munthu nzeru? Icho chakukutizwa na siliva pontho golidi, icho nkhabe muya tayu." 
Habakkuk2:20 Kwache MBUYA ali m'Nyumbache yakuchena; dziko yonsene yapansi mbimatame pamaso pache. 
Habakkuk3:1 Kupemphera kwa mprofeti Habakuku. 
Habakkuk3:2 MBUYA, kuveka kwanu m'makutu mwanga kwafika, ine mabasanu, MBUYA, ndili nawo tetete. Achitiseni kukhala atswa nsiku zathu zino, achitiseni kudziwika pandzidzi wathu uno; tivereni nsisi, podi kwene kuti mwazhangali." 
Habakkuk3:3 Mulungu akudza kubulukira ku Temani; Nyakuchena akudza kubulukira kuphiri ya Parani. Demelero yache yampsampsira kudzulu, pontho ukulu wache wamala dzala padziko yapansi." 
Habakkuk3:4 Demelero yache ikhali ninga kubuluka kwa dzuwa; cheza chidachetuma kubulukira m'manja mwache mudabisala mphamvu zache mule. 
Habakkuk3:5 Muliri udenda patsogolo pache; imfambo idaponda mphondero yache. 
Habakkuk3:6 Iye angaimira, dziko yonsene teke-teke; iye angayang'ana madzinza ambatetemera na mantha. Mapiri akale ambadidimuka pontho pitunda pya mvula zakale pimbalikitika. Njira zache nsakwenda na kwenda." 
Habakkuk3:7 Ine ndidaona anthu a ku Kushi kuchita mantha pontho anyakukhala ku Midiani kusanyika mtima pikulu pene. 
Habakkuk3:8 MBUYA, ayi imwe mudazhangalira mikulo? Ayi ukali wanu ukhali pana mikhwawa? Ayi imwe mudazhangalira bara, ndzidzi udapakira imwe pa akavalo anu pontho pingolo pyanu pyakukunda napyo?" 
Habakkuk3:9 Imwe mudasolola utanu m'chakuikhiramo mwache mbamuchemeresa matswimo azinji ene. Dziko yapansi imwe mudaing'amba na mikulo," 
Habakkuk3:10 mapiri adakuonani mbakhunyata. Madzi makulu adatswaira; bara yakuzwika idavunduka mbikapiza mabimbi ache mpakana m'dzulu. 
Habakkuk3:11 Dzuwa na mwezi pidaimira kudzulu na kuyetimira kwa matswimo anu akuthamanga, pontho na kuona uchetu-chetu wa madipanu." 
Habakkuk3:12 Na kuzhangali kwanu, imwe mudagwanda na padziko yapansi pontho na ukali wanu, imwe mudabubuda madzinza." 
Habakkuk3:13 Imwe mudenda kaombola anthu anu; kupulumusa nyakudzozwanu. Imwe mudapeya mkadamu wa dziko yakudawika imwe mudamdulisa nguwo kubulukira kumsolo mpakana kumanyalo. 
Habakkuk3:14 Na mombache onthowo, imwe mudamulasa nawo msolo wache, pidatiwumbikira anyankhondo ache kuti atibalalise. Iwo akhasekera khala ninga akhafuna kukhudyula anyakusowa mphamvu akhabisala ale." 
Habakkuk3:15 Imwe mudapondedza bara na akavalo anu, kuvundula madzi makulu." 
Habakkuk3:16 Ine ndidava pyonsenepi mtimanga mbudima, milomo yanga idagedemera na mantha, makhono anga adatonthola, pontho miyendo yanga idagogobodoka. Kwache ndinati ndidikhire mwakupirira nsiku ya nyatwa kudza pana madzinza anachita na ife nkhondowa." 
Habakkuk3:17 Podi kwene kuti muti wamkuyu nkhabe chita maluwa tayu, pontho mtawi wamfesa nkhabe bala msapo tayu; podi kwene kuti miti yaolivi ichimwane pyayo kubala tani, pontho minda kuchimwana kubulusa phoso; podi kwene kuti mabira amale pyawo kufa pontho mathanga mbasowa pyawo ng'ombe tani," 
Habakkuk3:18 kwache ndinasekera basi thangwi ya MBUYA, ndinakomerwa thangwi ya Mulungu Nyankhombo wanga." 
Habakkuk3:19 MBUYA Mulungu ndiye mphamvu zanga; manyalo anga iye ambaachitisa kukhala ninga manyalo a nyasa, iye ambandichitisa kwenda pamapiri." 
Zephaniah1:1 Pandzidzi ukhali Yosia mwana Amoni mfumu wa Yuda, MBUYA adalonga kuna Zefania mwana Kushi. Kushi akhali mwana Gedalia, Gedalia akhali mwana Amaria, Amaria akhali mwana Hezekia." 
Zephaniah1:2 MBUYA adalonga mbati, “Ine ndinati nditswaire pyonsene kupibulusa padziko yapansi.”" 
Zephaniah1:3 Ine ndinatswaira anthu na nyama zene; ine ndinatswaira mbalame na nsomba zene za m'bara. Anyakudawika ndinamala kuavunga pandzidzi unafuna ine dzabulusa munthu padziko yapansi. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA. 
Zephaniah1:4 “Ine ndinati ndifuthule mkono wanga kutchunyusa Yuda, pontho na onsene anyakukhala mu Yerusalemu. Ine ndinabulusa m'dziko muno anyakusalira onsene ale ambapembedza milungu Baala, pontho anyansembe ale ambapembedza milungu inango; ndinafudza madzina onsene a anyakukhonda pembedza MBUYA." 
Zephaniah1:5 Ndinavunga ale ambalamba pansoyi za nyumba kupembedza dzuwa, mwezi na nyenyezi, ale ambalamba mbadumbira na dzina ya MBUYA na ndzidzi onthowo mbadumbira na dzina ya milungu Moleki," 
Zephaniah1:6 ale adabauka mbakhonda kutewera MBUYA, pontho mbakhonda kusaka-saka MBUYA, penu kuvunza nzeru kuna iye." 
Zephaniah1:7 “Matamani pamaso pa MBUYA Mulungu, thangwi nsiku inafuna MBUYA dzatonga mseru ili chifupi. MBUYA asasanya nsembe, iye apipambulira anthu ambachemera iye ale." 
Zephaniah1:8 Pansiku ya nsembe ya MBUYA, ine ndinatchunyusa mathubu na ana a mfumu, pontho na anthu onsene ambatsanzira pyachilendo ale." 
Zephaniah1:9 Pansiku yeneyo ndinati nditchunyuse onsene ale ambapembedza milungu yachilendo, ale ambadzaza nyumba ya milungu yawo na pyakuzunguzika pontho pyakunama.”" 
Zephaniah1:10 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Pansiku yeneyo kukalala kunaveka kubulukira ku Msuwo wa Nsomba, kulira kubulukira kukhundu itswa ya mzinda, pontho na kutitima kubulukira kumapiri." 
Zephaniah1:11 Lirani, imwe anyakukhala m'misika; anyamalonda onsene anamala puluzwamo, onsene ale ambagulisa pinthu anamala vungwa." 
Zephaniah1:12 “Pandzidzi wenewo ndinasaka-saka Yerusalemu na nyale, pontho ndinatchunyusa ale ambakhala pyawo thikithi mbagaya mumtima mwawo kuti, ‘MBUYA nkhabe dzatichita pinthu chadidi penu chakuipa tayu.’" 
Zephaniah1:13 Mfumawo inapokoserwa, nyumba zawo zinamala gomolwa. Iwo anamanga nyumba, kwache nkhabe dzakhalamo tayu. Iwo anabzala mfesa, kwache nkhabe dzamwa vinyu wache tayu.”" 
Zephaniah1:14 “Nsiku ikulu ya MBUYA ili chifupi, ili chifupi pontho ikuchimbiza kudza. Ngavani! Kulira pa Nsiku ya MBUYA kunakhala kwakuvesa kupha, pontho panaveka kukhuwa kwa anyankhondo amphamvu." 
Zephaniah1:15 Nsiku yeneyi inakhala nsiku ya ukali, nsiku yakusanyika pontho nyatwa, nsiku ya dzedze pontho kuvungika, nsiku ya mdima pontho kutsukwala, nsiku ya makole pontho yankhungu," 
Zephaniah1:16 nsiku ya kulizwa kwa ngoma pontho mkhuwo wa anyankhondo kumenyana na mizinda yakutchingwa na mpanda, pontho kumenyana na nsanja za m'nkhomo mwa mpanda." 
Zephaniah1:17 “Ine ndinadzesa nyatwa ikulu pana anthu, tenepo iwo anafamba ninga maboli-boli, thangwi iwo adawira MBUYA. Chiropa chawo chinakhuthulira pansi ninga fumbi, manungo awo anavunda mbanunkha.”" 
Zephaniah1:18 Nee siliva penu golidi wawo pinafuna dzaapulumusa pansiku ya ukali wa MBUYA. Na ntchanje yache ya moto, dziko yonsene yapansi inamala piswa, thangwi iye anamaliratu gwebede mwakututumusa anthu onsene akukhala m'dziko yapansi." 
Zephaniah2:1 Gumanyikanani, gumanyikani pabodzi, imwe dzinza yakuchitisa manyadzo" 
Zephaniah2:2 mbudzati fika ndzidzi unafuna imwe dzatswairwa ninga masundu-sundu, mbukudzati fika pana imwe kuzhangali kwakugoswa kwa MBUYA, nsiku ya ukali wa MBUYA mbidzati fika pana imwe." 
Zephaniah2:3 Saka-sakani MBUYA, imwe anyakupichepesa a m'dzikomo, imwe ale mumbavera matongero ache. Chitani pyakulungama, pontho khalani akupichepesa; mwinango munakwanisa dzagumana pakuoserapo pansiku ya kuzhangali kwa MBUYA." 
Zephaniah2:4 Nthemba ya Gaza inapaswa nkhodolo, pontho Ashikeloni anasala madembe. Dzuwa ili ngerengende Ashidodi anathamangiswa m'dziko mwawo, pontho Ekroni anamala dulwamo." 
Zephaniah2:5 Dzedze kuna imwe anyamgombe, imwe anthu a ku Kereti; MBUYA akulonga mwakupokanyisana nawe, iwe Kanani, dziko ya Afilisti. “Ine ndinati ndikuvungeni, pontho nkhabe na mbodzi ene anafuna dzasala na moyo tayu.”" 
Zephaniah2:6 Dziko ile ili m'khundu-khundu mwa bara, kule kumbakhala Akereti, inakhala mbuto yakudyeserapo pifuyo pontho mathanga a mabira." 
Zephaniah2:7 Iyo inakhala m'manja mwa anyakusalira a m'banja ya Yuda; kweneko iwo anagumanako mpovu. Na mosiku iwo anagona m'nyumba za Ashikeloni. MBUYA Mulungu wawo anaayang'anira mwadidi; iye anachitisa pontho pinthu pyawo kufamba mwadidi. 
Zephaniah2:8 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga kuti, “Ine ndava kutikana kumbachita Amoabu, pontho ndaona kupidula kumbachita Aamoni, ale adatikana anthu anga mbaathuswa m'dziko mwawo monthomo." 
Zephaniah2:9 Natenepo ine ninga Mulungu wa moyo, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, pontho Mulungu wa Israele, ndikudumbira kuti: Moabu anati asanduke ninga Sodomu, Amonimbo ninga Gomora, mbuto yakuphopha na tsanga, pontho madzenje a munyu, mbuto yakusowa basa kwenda na kwenda. Anyakusalira na moyo a anthu anga anati apokosere pinthu pyawo; pontho anyakupulumuka a dzinzanga anapita mbakwata dziko yawo.”" 
Zephaniah2:10 Penepi ndiye pinafuna iwo dzapagalwi, thangwi ya kunyada kwawo, thangwi ya kutikana pontho kusedegula anthu a MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Zephaniah2:11 MBUYA anakhala wakugoswa kuna iwo; iye angavunga milungu yonsene m'dzikomo. Anyamgombe a madzinza onsene anati ampembedze, kada munthu m'dziko mwache." 
Zephaniah2:12 “Imwembo anthu a ku Kushi munati muphiwe na talasadanga.” 
Zephaniah2:13 MBUYA anafuthula mkono wache kupokanyisana na anthu akumpoto mbavunga Asiria. Ninevimbo anasaliratu pyache madembe, mbasanduka wakuuma kakata ninga thando ya tchetcha." 
Zephaniah2:14 Mikumbi ya mabira na ng'ombe pinagona kweneko gunundu-gunundu, pyakulengwa pya mtundu onsene. Ng'ombe-ng'ombe na muyi pinaphama pamadembe. Kulira kwa madzidzi kunatayirira na m'mazhanera, makhungubwe anakhala m'misuwo yawo. Mphalupalu zamkungudza zinasala nyimwa." 
Zephaniah2:15 Wenewu ndiye mzinda ule akhapiona ninga kuti uli pakupata pontho wakukhazikika, ule mumtima mwache ukhalonga kuti, “Ndine ene basi, nkhabepo pontho unango!” Apo lero ngayang'anani kuvungika kwachita iwo. Iwo wasanduka msitu wakukhala nyama zam'tsanga. Munthu onsene wakugwanda na penepo anasedegula mbapidula." 
Zephaniah3:1 Dzedze kuna Yerusalemu, mzinda wa anyakupondereza, anyakupandukira pontho anyakukhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Zephaniah3:2 Iye nkhabe vesera munthu na mbodzi ene tayu. Iye nkhabe tawira tayu kusumululwa. Iye nkhabe nyindira MBUYA, penu kudza chifupi na Mulungu wache tayu." 
Zephaniah3:3 Mathubu ache akhala ninga nkhalamu zakubangula, pontho atongi ache akhala ninga matika na mosiku, ale nkhabe siya mkhutche tayu kuti adye mangwana mwache na machibese." 
Zephaniah3:4 Maprofeti ache ngakutumbama; iwo mbanthu okhonda nyindirika. Anyansembe ache aswipisa mbuto yakuchena, pontho ambapotoza mwambo kufuna kupiganyalisa." 
Zephaniah3:5 Kwache MBUYA ngwakulungama mumzindamo; iye nkhabe chita chakuipa tayu. Na machibese onsene okhonda tchotchesa iye ambatonga na chilungamo. Kwache anyakukhonda lungama ambathimiza kudawa, mbakhonda chita napyo manyadzo." 
Zephaniah3:6 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ine ndamala vunga madzinza; mipandawo yamphamvu ndamala kuigwisa. Misuwo yawo yamala phopha tsanga mwakuti nkhabe na mbodzi ene ambagwanda namo tayu. Mizindawo yamala vungwa; nkhabe ubodzi wasala, nee na ubodzi ene tayu." 
Zephaniah3:7 Ine ndidanyerezera kuti anthu anga anati andigope mbatawira kusumululwa! Penepo ine nkhabe dzaatchunyusa penu dzaabulusa mbuto zawo tayu, Kwache iwo adakakamira basi kuchita pyakupotoka papyonsene pikhachita iwo.”" 
Zephaniah3:8 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ndidikhireni, dikhirani nsiku inafuna ine dzatonga mseru. Ine ndanyerezera pya kugumanyisa madzinza na maufumu onsene mbandikhuthulira ukali wanga pana iwo, kuzhangali kwanga konsene. Dziko yonsene yapansi inamala kupya na moto wa ukali wantchanje yanga." 
Zephaniah3:9 “Tenepo ine ndinasandusa lulume ya madzinza onsene kukhala yangwiro, towera iwo onsene akwanise kuchemera dzina ya MBUYA na kumtumikira mwakuphatizana." 
Zephaniah3:10 Podi kutali kumikulo ya Kushi, anthu anga adabalalikana ale, anabwera na pyakupereka pyawo kuna ine." 
Zephaniah3:11 Pansiku yeneyo imwe, anthu anga, nkhabe dzachitiswa manyadzo tayu, thangwi ya pyakudawa pyonsene pidachita imwe kuna ine pile. Ine ndinathamangisa mumzindamo anthu ale ambagaya na kutumbama kwawo, pontho imwe nkhabeve dzandipandukira paphiri yanga yakuchena tayu." 
Zephaniah3:12 Mbwenye pakati panu ndinati ndisiye anyakufulika na anyakupichepesa, ale ambanyindira ine, MBUYA." 
Zephaniah3:13 Anyakusalira na moyo a Israele nkhabe dzachita pyakudawa tayu; iwo nkhabe dzalonga pyakunama, penu pyakunama kubuluka pakanwa pawo nkhabe. Iwo anadya mbagona pyawo gadaa, mbapasowa munthu na mbodzi ene wakuathuswa.”" 
Zephaniah3:14 Imbani, imwe anthu a ku Zioni; galuzani fala imwe Aisraele! Komerwani pontho sekerani na mtima onsene, imwe anthu a ku Yerusalemu!" 
Zephaniah3:15 MBUYA abulusa kukutchunyusani kukhafuna iye kukuchitani; iye athamangisa anyamalwanu. MBUYA, Mfumu wa Israele, ali pakati panu; imwe nkhabe dzachita mantha tayu na chakugoswa." 
Zephaniah3:16 Pansiku yeneyo iwo analonga kuna Yerusalemu kuti, “Leka chita mantha iwe, Zioni; manjako mbaleke chita chiwewa." 
Zephaniah3:17 MBUYA Mulungu wako ali nawe, iye ngwamphamvu pyakwanga mwakuti anakwanisa kukupulumusa. Iye anakomerwa nawe pyakwanga pene, iye anakuthondoza na kukufuna kwache, iye anakuimbira nyimbo zakusekera nazo," 
Zephaniah3:18 ninga mumbachitira anthu pansiku za maphwando awo akupambulika.” MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ine ndinakubulusira dzedze, thangwi mphyakunensa kuna iwe, pontho mphyakukululupisa." 
Zephaniah3:19 Pandzidzi wenewo ine ndinatchunyusa anthu onsene akhakuponderezani ale. Ine ndinapulumusa anyakulamala mbandigumanyisa onsene ale akhadabalaliswa. Ndinaapasa chilemedzo, pontho ndinaachitisa kusimbwa m'dziko monsene mule mukhadachitiswa iwo manyadzo." 
Zephaniah3:20 Pandzidzi wenewo ndinakugumanyisani; pandzidzi wenewo ndinakudzesani kwanu. Ine ndinakupasani chilemedzo, mbamusimbwa na anthu pakati pa madzinza onsene a padziko yapansi ndingachitisa pontho pinthu pyanu kufamba mwadidi imwe mukuona maso. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Haggai1:1 Chaka chachiwiri Dariusi mbali mfumu, pansiku yakutoma ya mwezi wachitanthatu, MBUYA adalonga kuna Zerubabele mwana Shealatiele, mkulu wa boma ya Yuda, pontho kuna Yoswa mwana Yehozadaki Nyansembe Wamkulu kudzera muna mprofeti Hagai kuti:" 
Haggai1:2 “Ine, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndikulonga tenepa: Anthu enewa ambalonga kuti, ‘Ndzidzi hudzati kwana tayu wakuti Nyumba ya Mulungu imangwe.’ ”" 
Haggai1:3 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kudzera muna Hagai kuti," 
Haggai1:4 “Imwe anthu anga, ayi penepi mphyadidi kuti imwe mukhale m'nyumba zakumangwa mwadidi, mwenemo Nyumbanga yasanduka madembe?" 
Haggai1:5 “Chinchino ine, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndikulonga tenepa: Nyerezerani mwadidi pinthu pinakuchitikiranipi." 
Haggai1:6 Imwe mwabzala pizinji, kwache mwavuna pyakuchepa. Imwe mumbadya, kwache nkhabe khuta tayu. Imwe mumbamwa, kwache nkhabe kwana tayu. Imwe mumbavala nguwo, kwache nkhabe khumbirwa tayu. Imwe mumbatambira kobiri, kwache mumbaziikha m'mabudu akuphoka." 
Haggai1:7 “Ine, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndikulonga tenepa: Nyerezerani mwadidi pinthu pinakuchitikiranipi." 
Haggai1:8 Ndokoni kumapiri mbamukasake matabwa kuti mumange pontho Nyumbanga, towera ndikwanise kukomerwa nayo mbanditambirambo chilemedzo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Haggai1:9 “Imwe mukhadikhira kuvuna pizinji pene, kwache yang'anani pyavuna imwe pili kwene jada. Pyakuvuna pidadza na imwe kumusa ndidamala kupimbulusa na mphepo. Penepo ine, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndikulonga kuti: Apo thangwi yache ninji? Ndi thangwi ya Nyumbanga ile yamala sanduka madembe, mwenemo munthu onsene wa imwe ali kaluma tolo-tolo kumanga nyumbache." 
Haggai1:10 Natenepo na thangwi ya imwe, ine ndaiphata mvula, pontho mindanu nkhabemo mbewu tayu." 
Haggai1:11 Ine ndadzesa njala ikulu padziko, pamapiri, m'minda yamapira, m'minda yamfesa na m'minda yaolivi, pambuto ponsene pale pambamera pyakumera, pana anthu na nyama zene pontho na pana pinthu pyonsene pyaphatira imwe basa.”" 
Haggai1:12 Kubuluka penepo Zerubabele mwana Shealatiele, Yoswa mwana Yehozadaki, Nyansembe Wamkulu, na anthu onsene ale akhadabwera kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo adavera matongero a MBUYA Mulungu wawo, pontho mphangwa zidadza na Hagai, thangwi akhadamtuma ndi MBUYA Mulungu wawo. Tenepo anthu adagopa MBUYA." 
Haggai1:13 Natenepo Hagai, nyamphangwa wa MBUYA, adalonga kuna anthu mphangwa zakubulukira kuna MBUYA mbati, “Ine ndili namwe. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Haggai1:14 MBUYA adapereka chipapu kuna Zerubabele, mkulu wa boma ya Yuda, pontho Yoswa, Nyansembe Wamkulu, pontho na kuna anthu onsene ale akhadabwerera ale. Iwo adadza mbatoma basa yakumanga pontho Nyumba ya Mulungu wawo, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene," 
Haggai1:15 pansiku ya makumawiri na chinayi ya mwezi wachitanthatu chaka chachiwiri Dariusi mbali mfumu. 
Haggai2:1 Pansiku ya makumawiri na ibodzi ya mwezi wachinomwe, MBUYA adalonga kudzera muna mprofeti Hagai." 
Haggai2:2 Iye adapanga Hagai kuvunza Zerubabele mkulu wa boma ya Yuda, Yoswa, Nyansembe Wamkulu, na anthu onsene akhadabwerera ale kuti," 
Haggai2:3 “Ayi pana unango pakati panupa ule akukumbuka demelero ikhali na Nyumbangayi! Apo lero mukuiona tani? Ayi iyo hikuoneka ninga si pinthu tayu? 
Haggai2:4 Kwache chinchino wanga mtima, iwe Zerubabele, mwana Shealatiele, wanga mtima iwe, Yoswa mwana Yehozadaki, Nyansembe Wamkulu. Wangani mtima imwe anthu onsene a m'dziko mbamuphate basa, thangwi ine ndili namwe. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Haggai2:5 Lekani chita mantha, thangwi Mzimu wanga uli pakati panu, ninga montho mudadumbira ine pikhabuluka imwe m'dziko ya Iguputo." 
Haggai2:6 “Ine, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndikulonga tenepa: Pangagwanda ndzidzi pang'ono ene basi, ine ndinati nditekenye kudzulu na dziko yapansi, bara na nthunda ene." 
Haggai2:7 Madziko onsene ndinaatekenya, tenepo mfuma ya madzinza onsenene inabwera, natenepo ine ndinadzaza Nyumba yeneyi na demelero. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Haggai2:8 Siliva ngwanga, pontho na golidi ene ngwanga basi. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Haggai2:9 Demelero ya Nyumba yeneyi inakhala ikulu pyakwanga kupiringana demelero ya Nyumba yakutoma ile. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene. Pontho pambuto yeneyi panakhala mtendere. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene.” 
Haggai2:10 Pansiku ya makumawiri na chinayi ya mwezi wachifemba, chaka chachiwiri Dariusi mbali mfumu, MBUYA adalonga kudzera muna mprofeti Hagai mbati," 
Haggai2:11 “Ine, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndikulonga tenepa: Vunzani anyansembe pinthu pinalonga mwambo." 
Haggai2:12 Ngakhala munthu anathukula nyama yakupambulirwa kuna MBUYA m'mkhanzwa mwache, pontho ngakhala nguwozo zinakhuya mkate, msuzi, vinyu, mafuta, penu pyakudya pinango pene, ayi chinthu chenecho chimbasanduka chakupambulika pamaso pa MBUYA?” Anyansembe adatawira mbati, “Nkhabe tayu.”" 
Haggai2:13 Kubuluka penepo Hagai adavunza mbati, “Ngakhala munthu apiswipisa yekha ene pakukhuya mtembo, mbaphata chibodzi mwa pinthu penepi, ayi chinthucho chimbasanduka chokhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu?” Anyansembe adatawira mbati, “Ande, chinthucho chinasanduka chokhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu?”" 
Haggai2:14 Tenepo Hagai adalonga mbati, “MBUYA akulonga kuti: Ndi sasawambo na anthu enewa pontho dzinza yeneyi pamaso panga. Pyonsenene pimbaphata iwo, pontho pyonsene pimbapereka iwo mphyakukhonda chena pamaso panga.”" 
Haggai2:15 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Chinchino kubulukira lero kwenda m'tsogolo, nyerezerani mwadidi pinthu penepi, nyerezerani mule mukhali pinthu kale, mwenemo mwala mbudzati sanjikwa padzulu pa unzache pa Nyumba ya MBUYA." 
Haggai2:16 Munthu akhaenda kuna mulu wa mapira kunyerezera kuti anagumanako pitundu makumawiri, mbwenye kagumanako kwene pitundu khumi basi. Munthu akhaenda katunga vinyu mabuyawo makumashanu kubulukira m'phiso, mbwenye kagumanamo kwene mabuyawo makumawiri basi." 
Haggai2:17 Ine ndidagwisa utenda, ukunguyi na matalala pana imwe na mbewu zanu zonsene zidabzala imwe, kwache imwe nee mudazungunukire kuna ine tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Haggai2:18 Kubulukira lero, pansiku ya makumawiri na chinayi ya mwezi wachifemba, nsiku idamaliswa kumangwa maziko a Nyumba MBUYA kwenda m'tsogolo nyerezerani mwadidi pinthu pinafuna dzachitika." 
Haggai2:19 Ayi m'pikwa mwanu mwasala mbewu? Podi na ndzidzi uno ene mitawi yamfesa, miti yamkuyu, ntheme na yaolivi nee pidzati bala nsapo tayu. Kwache kubulukira ndzidzi uno kwenda m'tsogolo ndinati ndikutsanzayiseni.”" 
Haggai2:20 MBUYA adapanga Hagai kachiwiri kache pansiku ya makumawiri na chinayi ya mwezi onthowo 
Haggai2:21 kulonga kuna Zerubabele mkulu wa boma ya Yuda kuti, “Ine ndili chifupi kutekenya kudzulu na dziko yapansi." 
Haggai2:22 Ine ndinachitisa maufumu kugwa mbandiakhutcha mano. Ine ndinapidigula pingolo na anyakufambisache ene; akavalo na anyakuapakirache ene anati agwe. Munthu onsene anaphiwa na talasada ya mwanzache. 
Haggai2:23 “Ine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndikulonga tenepa: Pansiku yeneyo, ine ndinakukwata iwe, nyabasanga Zerubabele mwana Shealatiele, mbandikuchitisa kutonga na dzinanga, thangwi ndakusankhula ndine pano. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene.”" 
Zechariah1:1 Mwezi wachisere, chaka chachiwiri Dariusi mbali mfumu wa Peresia, MBUYA adalonga kuna mprofeti Zekaria, mwana Berekia, mdzukuluache Ido." 
Zechariah1:2 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene adapanga Zekaria kulonga kuna anthu mbati, “Ine MBUYA ndazhangali pyakwanga na makolo anu," 
Zechariah1:3 mbwenye chinchino ndikulonga tenepa: Bwererani kuna ine, inembo ndinabwerera kuna imwe. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Zechariah1:4 Lekani khala ninga makolo anu, ale adava mphangwa zidalalika maprofeti akale zile. MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene adalonga tenepa: ‘Bulukani kuna njira zanu zakuipa, pontho lekani mabasanu akuipawo.’ Kwache iwo hadapivesere, penu kupiikha konta tayu kuna pinthu pikhalonga ine. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Zechariah1:5 Chinchino makolo anu ali kupi? Apo maprofeti ana moyo kwenda na kwenda? 
Zechariah1:6 Kudzera muna anyabasanga maprofeti ine ndidapereka matongero kuna makolo anu pontho kuacheuza, kwache iwo hadaavesere tayu, mbaoneswa nyatwa? M'nduli mwache iwo adatchunyuka mbalonga mbati, ‘MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene achita kuna ife malingana na mabasathu pontho makhaliro athu akuipa ninga montho mukhadapisasanyira iye.’ ”" 
Zechariah1:7 Pansiku ya makumawiri na chinayi ya mwezi wa khumi na chibodzi, mwezi wa Shebati, chaka chachiwiri Dariusi mbali mfumu, MBUYA adalonga kuna mprofeti Zekaria, mwana Berekia, mdzukuluache Ido." 
Zechariah1:8 Na mosiku ine ndidaona kumasomphenya munthu apakira kavalo wakufira. Iye akhaimira pakati pa mikesha mumkhwawa. Kunduli kwache kukhali akavalo anango akufira, akuswipirira na akuchena." 
Zechariah1:9 Ine ndidavunza kuti, “MBUYA, penepi pikulonganji?” Mngelo akhalonga na ine ule adatawira mbati, “Ine ndinati ndikupange kuti penepi pikulonganji.”" 
Zechariah1:10 Tenepo munthu akhaimira pakati pa mikesha ule adalonga mbati, “Enewa mbale atumwa na MBUYA kuti afambire dziko yonsene yapansi.”" 
Zechariah1:11 Iwo adapanga mngelo wa MBUYA, ule akhaimira pakati pa mikesha mbati, “Ife tafambira dziko yonsene yapansi mbatigumana kuti anthu akupuma pyawo, pontho ali pamtendere.”" 
Zechariah1:12 Tenepo Mngelo wa MBUYA adalonga mbati, “MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, imwe mwazhangalira Yerusalemu na mizinda ya Yuda pyaka makumanomwe. Ayi panakwata ndzidzi ukulu tani imwe mbamudzati kuavera nsisi?”" 
Zechariah1:13 MBUYA adamtawira mngelo akhalonga na ine ule na mafala akumthondoza nawo. 
Zechariah1:14 Penepo mngelo akhalonga na ine ule adalonga mbati, “Lalika mafala awa: MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga tenepa: Ine ndina ntchanje pyakwanga na Yerusalemu pontho Zioni," 
Zechariah1:15 kwache ndazhangalira pyakwanga madzinza ale ali pakupata ndzidzi uno. Ine ndikhadaazhangalira kwene pang'ono basi, mbwenye iwo adathimiza kuvuya anthu anga." 
Zechariah1:16 “Natenepo MBUYA akulonga tenepa: Ine ndabwerera pontho kuna Yerusalemu kuti ndivere nsisi mzindawu. Nyumbanga inamangwa pontho. Nkhambala yakudzongolera fufu inaikhwa pana Yerusalemu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene. 
Zechariah1:17 “MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga tenepa: Thimiza kulalika kuti maluwani anga pinthu pyawo pinaafambira mwadidi, pontho MBUYA anathondoza Zioni mbasankhula Yerusalemu.”" 
Zechariah1:18 Tenepo ndidakwiza maso mbandiona kumasomphenya nyanga zinayi! 
Zechariah1:19 Ndidavunza mngelo akhalonga na ine ule kuti, “Ninji penepi?” Iye adatawira kuti, “Nyanga zenezi zikuimirira anyamphamvu a dziko yapansi ale adabalalisa anthu a ku Yuda, Israele na Yerusalemu.”" 
Zechariah1:20 Kubuluka penepo MBUYA adandionesa anyakusema-sema anayi. 
Zechariah1:21 Ine ndidavunza kuti, “Ayi enewa adzeranji?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Enewa ndi nyanga zinayi, ale adabalalisa anthu a mu Yuda, towera paleke khala unango wakukwanisa kuyenusa msolo. Mbwenye anyakusema-sema adza dzaathuswa na kukunda manyanga enewa a madzinzawo ale akudima na nyangawo dziko ya Yuda na kubalalisa anthu ache.”" 
Zechariah2:1 Kubuluka penepo ndidakwiza maso mbandiona kumasomphenya munthu aphatirira mdida wa nkhambala m'manja mwache. 
Zechariah2:2 Ine ndidavunza kuti, “Ayi ukwenda kupi?” Iye adanditawira mbati, “Ndikwenda kapima Yerusalemu kufuna kuona umimbache na ulaphiache ene!”" 
Zechariah2:3 Tenepo mngelo adalonga na ine ule adabulukapo, pontho mngelo unango adadza dzagumanikana naye," 
Zechariah2:4 mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Thamanga ndoko kapange mphale ana mdida ule kuti Yerusalemu anakhala mzinda wakusowa mpanda, thangwi ya kuinjipa kwa anthu na pifuyo pene." 
Zechariah2:5 MBUYA adumbira kuti iye ene anakhala mpandache wa moto kuzungulira mzindawo, pontho demelero yache inakhala mwenemo.”" 
Zechariah2:6 MBUYA akulonga mbati, “Idzani, dzani, thawanimo m'dziko yakumpoto, thangwi ine ndakubalalisani kumakhundu onsene anayi a dziko yapansi. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA." 
Zechariah2:7 “Tendeni, thawirani ku Zioni, imwe ale akhadakwatwa unyaperezo kudziko ya Babiloni!" 
Zechariah2:8 Munthu onsene anakukuwazaniyo iye akukuwaza mboni ya diso yanga.” Natenepo MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene andilemedza mbandituma kuna madzinza ale akhadapokosera pinthu pya anthu ache na mphangwa zakuti: 
Zechariah2:9 “Ine ene maka MBUYA ndinati ndimenyane nawo, pontho ale akhali mabitchu awo makawo anati apokosere pinthu pyawo.” Penepo iwo anapidziwadi kuti andituma ndi MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Zechariah2:10 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Khuwani pontho komerwani, imwe anthu a ku Zioni. Ine ndikudza, pontho ndinati ndikhale pakati panu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Zechariah2:11 Madzinza azinji ene pandzidzi wenewo anakhala khundu ibodzi na MBUYA mbasanduka anthu ache. Iye anakhala pakati panu, tenepo imwe munapidziwa kuti MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndiye andituma kuna imwe." 
Zechariah2:12 Dziko ya Yuda inakhala khundu yache ene m'dziko yakuchena, pontho Yerusalemu unakhala mzindache wakusankhulika." 
Zechariah2:13 Matamani, imwe anthu onsene pamaso pa MBUYA, thangwi iye akudza kubulukira kumbuto yache yakuchena kumbakhala iye kule." 
Zechariah3:1 Kumasomphenya anango MBUYA adandionesa Nyansembe Wamkulu Yoswa, uku aimira pamaso pa mngelo wa MBUYA, pontho Satana aimirambo kumadyo kwache kumsumira." 
Zechariah3:2 MBUYA adalonga kuna Satana mbati, “MBUYA akukulongera iwe Satana! MBUYA ule adasankhula Yerusalemu, akukusumulula. Ayi munthu weneyu hadakhale ninga chikuni chakubuluswa pamoto tayu?”" 
Zechariah3:3 Yoswa akhaimira pamaso pa mngelo ule uku avala nguwo zakukhonda chena. 
Zechariah3:4 Mngelo ule adalonga kuna anthu akhadaimira pamaso pache ale mbati, “Mduleni nguwo zache zokhonda chenazi.” Penepo iye adalonga kuna Yoswa mbati, “Ngayang'ana, ine ndakubulusira pyakudawa pyako, tenepo ndinakuvazika nguwo zitswa.”" 
Zechariah3:5 Tenepo ine ndidalonga kuti, “Mvazikeni nduwira yakuchena mumsolo mwache.” Natenepo iwo adamvazika nduwira mumsolo mwache, pontho nguwo zakuchena, mwenemo mngelo wa MBUYA ali dzololo penepo." 
Zechariah3:6 Mngelo wa MBUYA adapanga Yoswa kuti 
Zechariah3:7 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga tenepa: “Ngakhala iwe unateweza njira zanga mbukoya matongero anga, penepo iwe unathimiza kukhala mkadamu wa Nyumbanga na pintalo pyache pene, pontho ndinakupasa utongi kukhala pabodzi pene na anango aimira pamaso panga ale." 
Zechariah3:8 “Vesera iwe Yoswa Nyansembe Wamkulu, na anyansembe anzako onsene akhala pamaso pako ale, thangwi monsenene ndimwe chidzindikiro cha pinthu pyadidi pinafuna kudza m'tsogolo pile. Ine ndinati nditchulule nyabasanga ule ambachemerwa Nthambi." 
Zechariah3:9 Yang'anani mwala waikha ine kutsogolo kwa Yoswa. Pamwala wenewu pana maso manomwe, pontho ndinati ndilembepo pakuchita kugoba mbindibulusa pyakudawa pya dziko yeneyi nsiku ibodzi ene basi. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Zechariah3:10 “Pansiku yeneyo munthu onsene wa imwe anachemera tsanthembache kachedza pansi pa mitawi yanu yamfesa na miti yamkuyu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene.” 
Zechariah4:1 Penepo mngelo akhalonga na ine ule adadza pontho mbandilamusa ninga mumbalamusirwa munthu kuchitulo. 
Zechariah4:2 Iye adandivunza mbati, “Ayi ukuonanji?” Ine ndidatawira kuti, “Ndikuona chakuikhirapo nyale cha golidi chakukhala na ndilo padzulu pache pontho nyale zinomwe, nyale ibodzi yakukhala na matsakala anomwe." 
Zechariah4:3 M'khundu mwache mukhali miti miwiri yaolivi, ubodzi kukhundu ya kumadyo, unangombo kukhundu ya kumabzere.”" 
Zechariah4:4 Ine ndidavunza mngelo akhalonga na ine ule kuti, “Ayi penepi ninji, mbuya?”" 
Zechariah4:5 Iye adatawira mbati, “Ayi iwe nkhabe dziwa tayu kuti penepi ninji?” Ine ndidatawira kuti, “Nkhabe tayu, mbuya.”" 
Zechariah4:6 Tenepo iye adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Enewa ndi mafala a MBUYA kuna Zerubabele: MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene alonga kuti, ‘Nee na mphamvu, penu na nkhondo tayu, mbwenye na Mzimu wanga. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene.’ ”" 
Zechariah4:7 Ayi iwe phiri ikulu, ndiwe ani? Pamaso pa Zerubabele iwe unasalazwa. Iye anamanga pontho Nyumba ya MBUYA, tenepo pinaikha iye mwala wa pankhomo anthu anakhuwa kuti, “Ikukoma m'maso! Ikukoma m'maso!”" 
Zechariah4:8 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Zechariah4:9 “Manja a Zerubabele ndiye amanga maziko a Nyumba ya MBUYA, manjache ndiye anafuna kuimalisa. Penepo imwe munapidziwa kuti MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndiye andituma kuna imwe." 
Zechariah4:10 “Mbani analulupisa nsiku ya pinthu ping'ono? Anthu anasekera angaona mdida wa nkhambala m'manja mwa Zerubabele. “Enewa ndi maso anomwe a MBUYA, ale ambaona konsene kwene padziko yapansi.”" 
Zechariah4:11 Tenepo ndidavunza mngelo ule kuti, “Apo miti yaolivi ili kumadyo na kumabzere kwa chakuikhirapo nyalechi mphyanji napyo?”" 
Zechariah4:12 Ine ndidavunza pontho kuti, “Ayi nthambi ziwiri zaolivi m'khundu mwa mipembe iwiri ya golidi, ile imbabulusa mafuta a golidi njanji nayo?”" 
Zechariah4:13 Iye adatawira mbati, “Ayi iwe nkhabe dziwa tayu kuti penepi ninji?” Ine ndidatawira kuti, “Nkhabe tayu, mbuya!”" 
Zechariah4:14 Natenepo iye adalonga mbati, “Enewa mbanthu awiri ale adzozwa kuti atumikire Mbuya wa dziko yonsene yapansi.”" 
Zechariah5:1 Ndidakwiza pontho maso mbandiona mpukutu ukumbuluka. 
Zechariah5:2 Iye adandivunza mbati, “Ayi ukuonanji?” Ine ndidatawira kuti, “Ndikuona mpukutu ukumbuluka, ule ulaphiache ndi makhono mafemba pontho manungo ache makhono manayi na kati ya khono.”" 
Zechariah5:3 Tenepo iye adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Yeneyi ndi dzedze inafuna dzagwera dziko yonsene yapansi; thangwi malingana na pinthu pidalembwa kukhundu ibodzi, mbava yonsene inati ibuluswe, pontho malingana na pinthu pidalembwa kukhundu inangomboyo, munthu onsene wakudumbira pyakunama anati abuluswe." 
Zechariah5:4 Ine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndikulonga kuti ine ndinati ndiutumize, tenepo unapita m'nyumba mwa mbava, pontho na onsene nyakudumbira pyakunama na dzinanga. Mpukutuwo unathimiza kukhala m'nyumba mwachemo mbuvunga nyumbayo, matabwa na miyalache ene.”" 
Zechariah5:5 Kubuluka penepo mngelo akhalonga na ine ule adadza kuna ine mbalonga mbati, “Chita kwize maso mbuone chinthu chinadzacho.”" 
Zechariah5:6 Ine ndidavunza kuti, “Ayi chenechi ninji?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Wenewu ndi msekete, ule ukuimirira kudawa kwa anthu onsene a padziko yapansi.”" 
Zechariah5:7 Msekete ule ukhali na mphampha yasimbi. Pikhayang'ana ine, mphampha ile idafunguka tenepo ndidaonamo mkazi." 
Zechariah5:8 Iye adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Penepi nkhudawika.” Tenepo iye adamfinyirira kumbwezera mumsekete monthomo, mbafunga na mphampha ile." 
Zechariah5:9 Kubuluka penepo ndidakwiza maso mbandiona akazi awiri akumbuluka kudza kuna ine. Iwo akhali na maphaphido amphamvu ninga a chidokowe. Tenepo iwo adathukula msekete ule mbambuluka nawo chidzulu-dzulu. 
Zechariah5:10 Ine ndidavunza mngelo akhalonga na ine ule kuti, “Ayi mseketewu akwenda nawo kupi?”" 
Zechariah5:11 Iye adatawira mbati, “Akwenda nawo kudziko ya Babiloni kuti akaumangire nyumbache. Nyumbayo ingamala, mseketewo unaikhwa mwenemo.”" 
Zechariah6:1 Ndidakwiza pontho maso mbandiona pingolo pinayi pikudza kubulukira pakati pa mapiri awiri, mapiri amkuwa." 
Zechariah6:2 Chingolo chakutoma chikhali na akavalo akufira, chachiwiri chikhali na akuswipa," 
Zechariah6:3 chachitatu chikhali na akavalo akuchena, pontho chachinayi chikhali na akavalo adotha a madamba-madamba, onsenewo akhali a mphamvu pyakwanga." 
Zechariah6:4 Tenepo ine ndidavunza mngelo akhalonga na ine ule kuti, “Ayi penepimbo ninji, mbuyanga?”" 
Zechariah6:5 Mngelo adanditawira mbati, “Yeneyi ndi mizimu minayi ya kudzulu; iyo idadza kubulukira pamaso pa MBUYA wa dziko yonsene yapansi." 
Zechariah6:6 Chingolo chile china akavalo akuswipa chikwenda kumpoto kudziko ya Babiloni, chingolo cha akavalo akuchena chikwenda kumabulukiro dzuwa, pontho chingolo cha akavalo adotha chikwenda kumwera.”" 
Zechariah6:7 Pidabuluka akavalo amphamvu kwenda, akhali na chipapu kufuna kufambira dziko yonsene yapansi. Tenepo mngelo adalonga mbati, “Ndokoni padziko yonsene yapansi.” Natenepo iwo adenda padziko yonsene yapansi." 
Zechariah6:8 Tenepo iye adandichemera mbati, “Ngayang'ana, akavalo aenda kumpoto kudziko ya Babiloni ale ambombowesa ukali wa MBUYA.”" 
Zechariah6:9 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Zechariah6:10 “Kwata siliva na golidi kubulukira kuna Helidai, Tobia, na Yedaia, amuna ale adza kubulukira kudziko ya unyaperezo ku Babiloni. Na nsiku yonthoyo ndoko kunyumba ya Yosia mwana Zefania." 
Zechariah6:11 Kwata siliva na golidi mbusasanye chipewu chachifumu mbuchivazike mumsolo mwa Yoswa, Nyansembe Wamkulu, mwana Yehozadaki." 
Zechariah6:12 Mpange kuti MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga tenepa: ‘weneyu ndiye munthu ule dzinache ndi Nthambi, tenepo iye anaphwitha pambuto pache mbamanga Nyumba ya MBUYA." 
Zechariah6:13 Iye ngule anafuna dzamanga Nyumba ya MBUYA, pontho iye anavala nguwo zachifumu mbakhala pampando wache wachifumu kutonga. Nyansembe anaimira chifupi na mpando wache wachifumu, pontho pakati pa awiriwa panakhala mtendere!’" 
Zechariah6:14 Chipewu chachifumu chinaperekwa kuna Helidai, Tobia, Yedaia, pontho Yosia mwana Zefania ninga chikumbuso cha Nyumba ya MBUYA." 
Zechariah6:15 “Anthu ali kutali anabwera mbaphedza kumanga Nyumba ya MBUYA, tenepo imwe munapidziwa kuti MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndiye andituma kuna imwe. Penepi pinachitika ngakhala imwe munavera monsene mwene matongero a MBUYA Mulungu wanu.”" 
Zechariah7:1 Chaka chachinayi Dariusi mbali mfumu, MBUYA adalonga kuna Zekaria pansiku yachinayi ya mwezi wachifemba, mwezi wa Kisilevi." 
Zechariah7:2 Anthu a ku Betele akhadatuma Sharezere na Regemu-Meleki, pabodzi pene na amunawo ku Nyumba ya Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene kapempha kukoma mtima kwa MBUYA," 
Zechariah7:3 pontho kavunza anyansembe a ku Nyumba ya Mulungu, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene na maprofeti kuti, “Ayi ine ndathema kusintili na kupimana kudya mwezi wachishanu ninga montho mwachitira ine pyaka pizinji pene?”" 
Zechariah7:4 Tenepo MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene adalonga kuna ine mbati," 
Zechariah7:5 “Vunza anthu onsene a m'dzikomo pabodzi pene na anyansembe awo kuti, ‘Ndzidzi udapimana imwe kudya pontho kusintili mwezi wachishanu na wachinomwe pyaka makumanomwe pyagwandapyo, ayi kupimana kudya kweneku mukhakuchitiradi kundilemedza?" 
Zechariah7:6 Ndzidzi ukhadya imwe pontho kumwa, ayi imwe hamukhadya kwene tayu kufuna kupichitisa mwekha ene kukomerwa?" 
Zechariah7:7 Ayi enewa si mafala a MBUYA ale adalalikwa kudzera muna maprofeti akutoma tayu, mwenemo Yerusalemu na maluwani ache akuzungulira akhali pakupata pontho pinthu pyawo pikhaafambira mwadidi, pontho thando ya Negebu na maluwani a m'tchinde mwa phiri amala khazikika?’ ”" 
Zechariah7:8 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga pontho kuna Zekaria mbati," 
Zechariah7:9 “MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga tenepa: ‘Onesesani kuti chilungamo chikutewezwadi; komeranani mtima, pontho veranani nyambalo unango na mwanzache." 
Zechariah7:10 Lekani pondereza amamfelwa penu ana amasiye, alendo penu anyakutcherenga. Lekani nyerezera mumtima mwanu pyakuchitirana pyakuipa unango na mwanzache.’" 
Zechariah7:11 “Kwache anthu anga adakhonda kupiikha konta; mwakuuma mtima iwo adandipasa nkhodolo mbaphopha makutu awo. 
Zechariah7:12 Iwo adaumisa mtimawo ninga mwala mbakhonda kuvera matongero anga penu mafala akhadatumiza ine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene na Mzimu wanga kudzera muna maprofeti akale ale. Natenepo ine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndidazhangali pyakwanga. 
Zechariah7:13 “Ndzidzi udaachemera ine, iwo hadandivesere tayu, tenepo pidandichemerambo iwo, ine sidaavesere tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Zechariah7:14 Ine ndidaabalalisa na chivumbulu pakati pa madzinza anango kudakhala iwo ninga alendo kule. Dziko yawo idasanduka madembe mwakuti nkhabe na mbodzi ene akhakwanisa kupita penu kubulukamo tayu. Mwenemu ndi mule mudasandusira iwo dziko yamphonje ile kukhala thando yatchetcha.” 
Zechariah8:1 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene adalonga pontho kuna ine mbati," 
Zechariah8:2 “Ine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndikulonga tenepa: Ine ndina ntchanje pikulu na Zioni, ntchanje yache ina ineyo njamoto." 
Zechariah8:3 “Ine MBUYA ndikulonga tenepa: Ine ndinati ndibwerere basi mu Zioni mbandikhala mu Yerusalemu. Penepo Yerusalemu anachemerwa Mzinda wa Pyakuonadi, pontho Phiri ya MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene inachemera Phiri Yakuchena." 
Zechariah8:4 “Ine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndikulonga tenepa: Amuna na akazi a mvula zakale anati akhale pontho m'misewu ya Yerusalemu, kada munthu mthondodzo wache m'manja thangwi ya kukalamba." 
Zechariah8:5 Misewu ya mzinda munadzala na aphale na atsikana kusenzekamo. 
Zechariah8:6 “Ine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndikulonga kuti penepi pinakwanisa kuoneka pyakuchimwanika kuna anyakusalira na moyo a dzinza yeneyi pandzidzi wenewo, kwache kuna ine penepi nkhabe dzakhala pyakuchimwanika tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Zechariah8:7 “Ine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndikulonga tenepa: Ine ndinapulumusa anthu anga m'manja mwa anthu a kumadziko akumabulukiro na akumadokero dzuwa ene. 
Zechariah8:8 Ine ndinaadzesa kuti akhale mu Yerusalemu; iwo anakhala anthu anga, inembo ndinakhala kuna iwo wakukhulupirika pontho wakulungama ninga Mulungu wawo." 
Zechariah8:9 “Ine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndikulonga tenepa: Wangani mphamvu, towera mumange Nyumba ya MBUYA, imwe ale chinchino mwavesera mafala adalongwa na maprofeti, ale akhalipo ndzidzi udamangwa maziko a Nyumba ya Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Zechariah8:10 Ndzidzi wenewo mbudzati fika kukhali nkhabe kupagali nyaganyo penu nyama. Nkhabe na mbodzi ene akhali pakupata kuna anyamalwache tayu, thangwi ndidachitisa munthu kusandukira tsanthembache." 
Zechariah8:11 Mbwenye chinchino ine nkhabe chitave pinthu kuna anyakusalira na moyo a dzinza yeneyi ninga mudachitira ine m'nduli mule tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene. 
Zechariah8:12 “Mbewu zinakula mwadidi, mfesa zinabala nsapo, mataka anapha phoso, pontho kudzulu kunagwisa bume. Ndinapereka pyonsenepi ninga mtsanzayiso kuna anyakusalira na moyo a dzinzanga." 
Zechariah8:13 Ine ndinakupulumusani pontho kukutsanzayisani, imwe anthu a ku Yuda na Israele, podi kwene kuti mukhali chinthu chakutemberera nacho pakati pa madzinza. Lekani chita mantha, mbwenye wangani mphamvu.”" 
Zechariah8:14 MBUYA Mulungu akulonga tenepa: “Ninga montho mukhadapisasanyira ine kudzesa nyatwa pana imwe mbandikhonda kuva nsisi ndzidzi udandizhangalisa makolo anu, ine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndikulonga kuti" 
Zechariah8:15 chinchino ndasasanya kuchita pontho udidi kuna Yerusalemu na Yuda. Lekani chita mantha. 
Zechariah8:16 Imwe mwathema kuchita pinthu ipi: Longani pyakuonadi kuna unango na mwanzache, pontho tongani miseru na chilungamo, towera kudzesa mtendere." 
Zechariah8:17 Lekani sasanya kuchitira pyakuipa tsanthembanu, pontho lekani komerwa na kudumbira pyakunama. Ine ndimbazonda pyonsenepi. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Zechariah8:18 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene adalonga pontho kuna ine mbati," 
Zechariah8:19 “Ine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndikulonga tenepa: Kupimana kudya kumbachita imwe pa mwezi wachinayi, wachishanu, wachinomwe na wakhumi kunasanduka maphwando akukomerwa na kusekera kuna anthu a ku Yuda. Natenepo funani pyakuonadi na mtendere.”" 
Zechariah8:20 “Ine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndikulonga kuti madzinza azinji pontho anyakukhala m'mizinda izinji anabwera ku Yerusalemu. 
Zechariah8:21 Anthu a kumzinda ubodzi anaenda kuna anthu a kumzinda unango mbakalonga kuti, ‘Ife tikwenda kapembedza MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene mbatikampempha kuti akatikomere mtima. Tenepo tendeni nafe pabodzi pene!’" 
Zechariah8:22 Tenepo anthu a madzinza azinji na amphamvu anabwera ku Yerusalemu dzapembedza MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene pontho kupempha kuti aakomere mtima.” 
Zechariah8:23 “Ine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndikulonga kuti nsiku zenezo amuna khumi akubulukira kumadzinza a pilongero pyakusiyana-siyana anaphata mkhanjo wa Myuda mbodzi mbalonga mbati, ‘Ngatikwatembo tende nawe pabodzi, thangwi tava kuti Mulungu ali namwe.’ ”" 
Zechariah9:1 MBUYA akupokanyisana na dziko ya Hadiraki; iye anati atchunyuse Damasiko, thangwi mzinda ukulu wa Aramu ngwa MBUYA, sasawambo madzinza onsene a Israele ngache." 
Zechariah9:2 Mzinda wa Hamati ngwache pontho, ule ndi tsamadire wa Hadiraki; Turo na Sidoni ngache, podi kwene kuti iwo ngaluso pyakwanga." 
Zechariah9:3 Turo apimangira yekha ene mpanda wamphamvu; iye apimulukira siliva ninga fumbi pontho golidi ninga mataka mumsewu. 
Zechariah9:4 Kwache Mbuya anati ampokosere mfumache, mbatayira m'bara pyonsene pimbanyindira iye, pontho iye anati avungwe na moto." 
Zechariah9:5 Ashikeloni anapiona mbachita mantha; Gaza anakhunyata thangwi ya kuva kupha, Ekroni chibodzi-bodzi, thangwi chidikhiro chache chinamala unyala. Gaza anataya mfumu wache, Ashikelonimbo anati asiyiwe yekha ene." 
Zechariah9:6 Mtundu wakuvungazikana unakhazikika mu Ashidodi. MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Kunyada konsene kwa Afilisti ndinati ndikumalise." 
Zechariah9:7 Ine ndinaakhondesa kudya nyama ikali na chiropa chache monthomo, penu pyakudya pinango pyokhonda chena. Anyakusalira na moyo ale anakhala ache a Mulungu wathu mbasanduka ninga dzinza ya Yuda; Ekroni anasandukambo ninga Ayebusi." 
Zechariah9:8 Kwache ine ndinalondali Nyumbanga, towera paleke gwanda nyamalwa na mbodzi ene, anyakupondereza nkhabe dzavuyave anthu anga tayu, thangwi maso anga ali pana iwo.”" 
Zechariah9:9 Sekerani pikulu pene imwe, anyakukhala mu Zioni, khuwani, imwe anthu a mu Yerusalemu! Ngayang'anani mfumu wanu akudza kuna imwe, wakulungama pontho wakukunda, wakupichepesa pontho uku apakira bulu, mwana bulu." 
Zechariah9:10 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ine ndinapokosera pingolo pya Eferemu, pontho pingolo pyankhondo pya mu Yerusalemu, na mauta ankhondo ene anati akhumulwe. Mfumuyo anakhazikisa mtendere pakati pa madzinza onsene. Utongi wache unatanthawira kubulukira kubara mpakana kubara, pontho kubulukira kumkulo wa Yufurate mpakana kumadolomero a dziko yapansi." 
Zechariah9:11 Kulonga pya imwe, na thangwi ya chiverano chakutsikimizirwa na chiropa chidachita ine namwe chile, ndinasudzula anyaperezo onsene ale ali m'dzenje yakusowa madzi." 
Zechariah9:12 Ngabwererani kumpanda kwanu, imwe anyaperezo akukhala na chidikhiro, podi chinchino ene pano ndikulalika kuti ndinati ndikubwezereni kawiri pinthu pikhadapokoserwa imwe pile." 
Zechariah9:13 Ndinakukunga iwe Yuda ninga mumbachitira ine na utanga, pontho Eferemu anakhala ninga tswimo yanga. Anako iwe Zioni ndinaakwata kuti akamenyane na ana a Grisi, mbandikuchitisa kukhala ninga talasada yankhondo ya nyamphamvu.”" 
Zechariah9:14 Tenepo MBUYA anaonekera pakati pawo; matswimo ache anachetuma ninga ching'ani-ng'ani. MBUYA Mulungu analiza ngomache; iye anaenda na mlikiti na chonzi chakumwera. 
Zechariah9:15 Tenepo MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndiye anafuna dzakhala chakugedera matswimo chawo. Iwo anavunga mbakunda anyamalwawo pakuponyera miyala. Iwo anamwa chiropa chawo mbakhuwa ninga anthu akuledzera vinyu; iwo anakhuta ninga ndilo yakudzala yakuwazira nayo chiropa kunyanga za guwa yansembe. 
Zechariah9:16 Pansiku yeneyo MBUYA Mulungu wawo anapulumusa anthu ache thangwi iwo ndi mabirache. Iwo anakhazimira m'dziko mwache ninga pyakuthemesera m'chipewu chachifumu. 
Zechariah9:17 Iwo anakhala akusiririka pontho akubalika; aphale na atsikana anachitiswa kukhala amphamvu, thangwi ya kuinjipa kwa mapira na vinyu wachinchino." 
Zechariah10:1 Mpempheni MBUYA akupaseni mvula ndzidzi wa malimwe. Ndi MBUYA ule ambasasanya makole amvula. Iye ambapereka mafazi kuna anthu mbameresa mbewu m'munda mwa munthu onsene. 
Zechariah10:2 Mifanikizo kwayo nkhunyengeza anthu; anyakuombedza masomphenyawo ngakunama, anyakulotambo ndoto zawo nsakusowa basa. Kuwangisa mtima kumbachita iwo nkhwapezi nako. Natenepo anthu akwenda pyawo chimpune-pune ninga mabira akusanyika thangwi ya kusowa makabuswa." 
Zechariah10:3 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Kuzhangali kwanga kukugaka moto pana amakabuswa, pontho ine ndinaatchunyusa akadamu; thangwi MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene anayang'anira mwadidi mabirache, dzinza ya Yuda. Iye anaachitisa kukhala ninga kavalo wakudungudza pankhondo." 
Zechariah10:4 Mtongi onsene anabulukira mu Yuda; iwo anakhala ninga mwala wa pankhomo, ninga ntchiri ya khumbi, pontho ninga uta wa pankhondo." 
Zechariah10:5 Pabodzi pene iwo anakhala ninga amuna amphamvu zawo, kupondedza mathaphwinya m'misewu pankhondo. Na thangwi yakuti MBUYA ali nawo, iwo anamenya nkhondo mbakunda anyakavalo onsene." 
Zechariah10:6 “Ine ndinapasa mphamvu dzinza ya Yuda pontho ndinapulumusa mbumba ya Yosefe. Ndinaabwezera kwawo, thangwi ndimbava nawo nyambalo. Iwo anakhala ninga anthu ale sidaakhonde tayu, thangwi ine ndine MBUYA Mulungu wawo, pontho ine ndinati ndiatawire." 
Zechariah10:7 Dzinza ya Eferemu inasandukambo ninga amuna amphamvu; mitimawo inakomerwa pyakwanga ninga munthu wakumwa vinyu. Anawo anapiona penepi mbakomerwa napyo pyakwanga; mitimawo inasekera thangwi ya MBUYA. 
Zechariah10:8 “Ndinaimba nkhwiyo kuti anthu anga agumanyikane pabodzi. Ine ndinati ndiapulumuse; iwo anainjipa kupiringana pakutoma. 
Zechariah10:9 Podi kwene kuti ndidaabalalisa pakati pa madzinza anango, kwache kweneko kumadziko antomi iwo anati andikumbuke basi. Iwo na anawo ene anapulumuka, tenepo iwo anati abwerere." 
Zechariah10:10 Ine ndinaabweza kubulukira ku Iguputo mbandiagumanyisa kubulukira ku Asiria. Ndinaadzesa ku Gileadi na ku Lebanoni, tenepo kweneko nkhabe dzakhala mbuto yakukwanira onsenewo tayu." 
Zechariah10:11 Iwo anawambuka na pa bara ya nyatwa; mabimbi aukali anambombowa, pontho mkulo wakuzwika wa Nailo unaumiratu kakata. Kudungudza konsene kwa Asiria kunamala, pontho ndodo yachifumu ya Iguputo inakhumuka." 
Zechariah10:12 Ine MBUYA ndinaawangisa mphamvu anthu anga, tenepo iwo ananyadira dzina ya MBUYA. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Zechariah11:1 Fungula misuwo yako, iwe Lebanoni, towera moto upyereze miti yako yamkungudza!" 
Zechariah11:2 Kalalani, imwe miti ya paina, thangwi mikungudza yamala limbuka; miti imbanyadira dziko ile yamala vungika! Lirani imwe miti yamthundu ya ku Bashani msitu wakuphopha ule miti yache yamala temwa!" 
Zechariah11:3 Ngaveserani kukalala kunachita amakabuswa; mpovu wawo onsene wamala vungwa! Veserani kubangula kwa nkhalamu; msitu wakupata wa Yorodani lero uli mphalanga-mphalanga. 
Zechariah11:4 MBUYA Mulungu wanga adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Dyesa mwadidi mabira anafuna dzaphiwa ale." 
Zechariah11:5 Anyakuagula ale ambaapha, kwache iwo nkhabe tchunyuswa tayu. Anyakuagulisa ambalonga kuti, ‘MBUYA mbakuzwe, ine ndafuma!’ Amakabuswawo ene nkhabe dzavera nsisi mabirawo tayu." 
Zechariah11:6 Thangwi ine nkhabe dzaverave nsisi anthu a m'dziko yeneyi tayu. Anthu onsene ndinaapereka m'manja mwa atsanthembawo, pontho m'manja mwa mafumu awo. Iwo anapondereza dziko, tenepo ine nkhabe dzaapulumusa tayu m'manja mwawo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA.”" 
Zechariah11:7 Natenepo ine ndidadyesa mwadidi mabira akhafuna dzaphiwa na anyakuagulisa ale, Tenepo ndidakwata ndodo ziwiri, ibodzi ndidaithula Kukoma mtima, inangomboyo ndidaithula Mphatizano. Ine ndidadyesa mwadidi mabira." 
Zechariah11:8 Pidakwana mwezi ubodzi ndidabulusa amakabuswa atatu ale. Mkumbi wa mabira udaipirwa nane, tenepo inembo sidakwanise kupirira nawo tayu," 
Zechariah11:9 mbandilonga kuti, “Ine sinakhalave makabuswanu tayu. Bira anafuna kufa mbafe pyache, ule anafuna kutayika mbatayike pyache. Anyakusalirambo na moyo ale mbadyane pyawo.”" 
Zechariah11:10 Penepo ine ndidakwata ndodo yanga yakuchemerwa Kukoma mtima ile, mbandiikhumula pyanga, kukhonda chiverano chidachita ine na madzinza onsene." 
Zechariah11:11 Chiveranocho chidamala pansiku yeneyo, tenepo anyakugula na kugulisa mabira akhandiyang'ana ale, adapidziwa kuti pidachita ine zikhali mphangwa zakubulukira kuna MBUYA." 
Zechariah11:12 Ine ndidalonga kuna iwo kuti, “Ngakhala pinakukomerani ndipagalinitu mphapo; mbwenye ngakhala nkhabe, koyani pyanu kobiri zanu.” Tenepo iwo adandipagali masiliva makumatatu." 
Zechariah11:13 MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Ziponye kobirizo m'chakukoyeramo kobiri,” konta ya kobiri idalonga iwo kuti ndathema kuitambira ile! Tenepo ndidakwata masiliva makumatatu ale, mbandiaponya m'chakukoyeramo kobiri cha m'Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
Zechariah11:14 Kubuluka penepo ndidakhumula ndodo inango yakuchemerwa Mphatizano ile, kufudza ubale wa pakati pa Yuda na Israele." 
Zechariah11:15 Tenepo MBUYA adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Kwata pontho basa ya makabuswa, kwache mbuchite ninga makabuswa wakupupwa." 
Zechariah11:16 Thangwi ine ndinaikha makabuswa m'dzikomo, ule nkhabe dzatsalakana mabira akutayika, penu kwenda kasaka anawo, penu kumanga pironda pya mabira akukuwazika, penu kudyesa mabira adidi tayu. Mbwenye anadya nyama ya mabira adidi makawo kubulusa na njondo zawo zene." 
Zechariah11:17 “Dzedze kuna makabuswa wakupupwa wakuthawa mabirache! Talasada mbikhamwadze mkono wache pontho diso yache ya madyo. Mkono wache mbulamale diso yache ya madyo mbileke na kuona kwene.” 
Zechariah12:1 Awa ndi mafala a MBUYA akulonga pya Israele, MBUYA ule adafuthula thambo, ule adaikha maziko a dziko yapansi, pontho ule adasasanya mzimu wa munthu. Iye akulonga kuti," 
Zechariah12:2 “Ine ndinachitisa Yerusalemu kukhala khomitcho ya vinyu, ule anafuna dzachitisa madzinza azinji ene kuledzera. Yuda na Yerusalemu ene anazungulirwa na anyamalwa." 
Zechariah12:3 Pansiku yeneyo madzinza onsene a padziko yapansi angagumanyikana pabodzi pene kachita naye nkhondo, ndinachitisa Yerusalemu kukhala ninga mwala okhonda thukuswa kuna madzinza onsene. Onsene anayesera kuuthukusa anapikuwaza yekha ene." 
Zechariah12:4 Pandzidzi wenewo kavalo onsene ndinamuikha pampani-pani, pontho kusandusa nsala anyakuapakira onsene. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA. Maso anga anakhala pana Yuda, kwache ndinachitisa akavalo onsene a madzinza anango kusanduka maboli-boli." 
Zechariah12:5 Penepo akadamu a Yuda analonga okha ene kuti, ‘Anthu a ku Yerusalemu ngamphamvu pyakwanga, thangwi MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene ndiye Mulungu wawo.’" 
Zechariah12:6 “Pandzidzi wenewo ndinachitisa akadamu a Yuda kukhala ninga khala ya moto pamilu ya nkhuni, pontho ninga nsakali yakugaka pakati pa misumbu ya maudzu. Iwo anavunga kumadyo na kumabzere kwene madzinza onsene akuazungulira. Kwache mu Yerusalemu anthu anathimiza basi kukhala pakupata." 
Zechariah12:7 “Chakutoma ine MBUYA ndinapulumusa anthu a ku Yuda, towera chilemedzo chonsene cha dzinza ya Davite na anyakukhala mu Yerusalemu chileke piringana chilemedzo china Yuda chile." 
Zechariah12:8 Pandzidzi wenewo MBUYA anatchinjiriza anyakukhala mu Yerusalemu, towera podi na anyakusowa mphamvu ene pakati pawo akhale ninga Davite, tenepo dzinza ya Davite inakhala ninga Mulungu ene, ninga angelo a MBUYA kwenda patsogolo pawo." 
Zechariah12:9 Pandzidzi wenewo ndinaenda kavunga madzinza onsene anachita nkhondo na Yerusalemu ale. 
Zechariah12:10 Ndinaikha pana dzinza ya Davite na anyakukhala mu Yerusalemu mzimu wakukoma mtima pontho wakupemphera. Iwo anayang'ana pana ine, munthu adalasa iwo ule, pontho iwo anamlira ninga munthu kulirira mwanache mbodzi ene basi, mbatsukwala naye pikulu pene ninga munthu kutsukwala mwanache wautombo wamamuna." 
Zechariah12:11 Pandzidzi wenewo mu Yerusalemu munakhala chiliro chikulu ninga chiliro cha Hadadi-Rimoni m'phedi ya Megido. 
Zechariah12:12 Dziko inasintili, kada mbumba kupisintili yokha ene pontho na akazawo ene: Mbumba ya Davite na akazawo ene, mbumba ya Natani na akazawo ene," 
Zechariah12:13 mbumba ya Levi na akazawo ene, mbumba ya Shimei na akazawo ene," 
Zechariah12:14 pontho na mbumba inango yonsene na akazawo ene. 
Zechariah13:1 “Pandzidzi wenewo mphuno yamadzi inabaulwa kuna dzinza ya Davite na kuna anyakukhala mu Yerusalemu kuachenesa kuna pyakudawa pyawo, pontho kukhonda chena kwawo pamaso pa MBUYA." 
Zechariah13:2 “Pandzidzi wenewo ndinafudziratu na madzina ene a mifanikizo ya m'dzikomo, tenepo ipyo nkhabe dzakumbukwave tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene. Ndinabulusa maprofeti na mizimu yakuipa m'dzikomo." 
Zechariah13:3 Tenepo ngakhala munthu anathimiza kulonga basi mphangwa zauprofeti, babache na mache, anyakumbala ale, analonga kuna iye kuti, ‘Iwe wathema kufa, thangwi iwe waphatisa basa dzina ya MBUYA kutinamiza.’ Iye angalonga mphangwa zauprofeti, makolo ache maka ndiye anafuna dzamulasa na mpeni." 
Zechariah13:4 “Pandzidzi wenewo mprofeti onsene anachita manyadzo na masomphenyache aona iye. Iye nkhabe dzavala nguwo zauprofeti zaubweya tayu kuti anamize anthu. 
Zechariah13:5 Iye analonga kuti, ‘Si ine mprofeti tayu. Ndine pyanga nyakulima. Ine ndaphata basa yakulima kutomera uphale wanga.’" 
Zechariah13:6 Ngakhala unango anamvunza kuti, ‘Apo pironda pili m'manungo mwakombopi mphyanji napyo?’ Iye anatawira kuti, ‘Pirondapi ndidapikwata kumusa kwa ashamwali anga.’ ”" 
Zechariah13:7 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga kuti, “Lamuka iwe, talasada, phata basako pana makabuswanga, pana munthu ule ali chifupi na ine. Khamwadza makabuswa, tenepo mabira anabalalikana, kubuluka penepo ndinatchunyusa anabirawo.”" 
Zechariah13:8 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “M'dziko monsenemo makhundu mawiri pa makhundu matatu anaphiwa; kwache khundu ibodzi inasiyiwa na moyo mwenemo." 
Zechariah13:9 Khundu yachitatuyi ndinaidzesa pamoto mbandiabulusa masepu-sepu ninga siliva, pontho ndinaayesa ninga golidi. Iwo anachemera dzinanga, tenepo inembo ndinaatawira; ndinalonga kuti, ‘Iwo mbanthu anga,’ iwombo analonga kuti, ‘MBUYA ndi Mulungu wathu.’ ”" 
Zechariah14:1 Nsiku ya MBUYA ikudza ile inafuna anyamalwanu dzagawana pamaso panu pinthu pidapokosera iwo. 
Zechariah14:2 MBUYA anagumanyisa madzinza onsene dzachita nkhondo na Yerusalemu; mzinda unagwa, nyumba kusakazwa, pontho akazi kuphatirirwa. Khundu ibodzi ya mzindawo anthu ache anakwatwa kwenda kudziko ya unyaperezo, kwache khundu inango yakusalirayo nkhabe dzabuluswamo tayu mumzindamo." 
Zechariah14:3 Tenepo MBUYA yekha ene anaenda kachita nkhondo na madzinza ninga mumbachitira iye pansiku ya nkhondo. 
Zechariah14:4 Pansiku yeneyo iye anaimira pa Phiri ya Olivi kumabulukiro dzuwa a mzinda wa Yerusalemu. Tenepo phiri ya Olivi inagawanika pakati, kubulukira kumabulukiro dzuwa mpakana kumadokero dzuwa, kusasanya phedi ikulu pakati pache, khundu ibodzi ya phiri kwenda kumpoto, khundu inangoyo kwenda kumwera." 
Zechariah14:5 Imwe munathawa na phediyi ya pakati pa phiri ya MBUYA, thangwi phediyo inafika mpakana ku Azele. Imwe munathawa ninga mudachitira imwe kuthawa chiteke-teke nsiku za Uzia mfumu wa Yuda. Penepo MBUYA Mulungu wanga anabwera pabodzi pene na anyakuchenache onsene." 
Zechariah14:6 Pansiku yeneyo nkhabe dzakhala kutonthola penu bume tayu. 
Zechariah14:7 Inakhala nsiku nyampita-pita, nee masikati penu mosiku tayu, nsiku yakudziwika na MBUYA. Mosiku ungakwana, panakhala cheza." 
Zechariah14:8 Pansiku yeneyo madzi amoyo anakuka kubulukira ku Yerusalemu, khundu ibodzi kagwera m'Nyanza Yakufira kumabulukiro dzuwa, khundu inangoyo kagwera m'bara ya Mediterania kumadokero dzuwa. Madzi anakuka chaka chonsene chamumphu, m'mainja na m'malimwe ene." 
Zechariah14:9 MBUYA anakhala mfumu wa dziko yonsene yapansi. Pansiku yeneyo MBUYA anakhala mbodzi ene basi, pontho dzinache mbikhala yontho ene basi." 
Zechariah14:10 Dziko yonsene kubulukira ku Geba kwenda ku Rimoni, kumwera kwa Yerusalemu kunasanduka ninga Araba. Kwache Yerusalemu anakhala panthunda mbakhazikika pambuto pache, kubulukira ku Msuwo wa Benjemani mpakana kukhundu ina Msuwo Wakutoma ile, kwenda ku Msuwo Wapankhomo, pontho kubulukira ku Nsanja ya Hananele kwenda kudzenje yachifumu yakutchitchithira vinyu." 
Zechariah14:11 Mumzindamo munakhala na anthu; nkhabe dzavungwave tayu. Yerusalemu anakhala pakupata. 
Zechariah14:12 Wenewu ndiye muliri unafuna MBUYA dzasanyisa nawo madzinza anamenyana na Yerusalemu ale: Manungo awo anavunda mwenemo iwo akali moyo, maso awo anavunda mwenemo ali pambuto pache, pontho lulume yawo inamala vunda m'kamwa mwawo." 
Zechariah14:13 Pansiku yeneyo MBUYA anaachitisa kukhala pampani-pani mwakuti munthu anaphata mwanzache ana iye chifupi mbamenyana naye. 
Zechariah14:14 Na anthu a ku Yuda enembo anamenya nkhondo mu Yerusalemu. Mfuma yonsene ya madzinza akuzungulira inagumanyiswa, golidi na siliva mzinji ene, pontho na pyakuvala." 
Zechariah14:15 Muliri ninga onthowu unapha akavalo, mabulu, ngamila na nyulu, pontho na pana nyama zonsene mumsasa wa anyamalwa." 
Zechariah14:16 Tenepo anyakusalira na moyo pakati pa madzinza anango ale asosa Yerusalemu, anaenda kweneko chaka na chaka kapembedza Mfumu, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, pontho kasekera Phwando ya Misasa." 
Zechariah14:17 Ngakhala dzinza inango pakati pa anthu a padziko yapansi anakhonda kwenda ku Yerusalemu kapembedza Mfumu, MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, penepo iwo nkhabe dzaona mvula tayu." 
Zechariah14:18 Ngakhala anthu a ku Iguputo nkhabe kwendako kachitambo na anthu pimbachitika kwenekopyo, iwo nkhabe dzaona mvula tayu. MBUYA anadzesa pana iwo muliri umbasanyisa na iye anthu ambakhonda kwenda kweneko kasekera Phwando ya Misasa ale." 
Zechariah14:19 Kweneku ndiye kunafuna dzakhala kutchunyuswa kwa Iguputo, pontho madzinza onsene ambakhonda kwenda ku Yerusalemu kasekera Phwando ya Misasa ale." 
Zechariah14:20 Pansiku yeneyo podi na masimbi ene anafuna dzavala akavalo pankhondo analembwa kuti, “Kupambulika kuna MBUYA,” pontho pikalango pya m'Nyumba ya Mulungu pinakhala pyakupambulika ninga ndilo zakukhala patsogolo pa guwa yansembe." 
Zechariah14:21 Pikalango pyonsene mu Yerusalemu na mu Yuda pinakhala pyakuchena kuna MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene. Tenepo munthu onsene anafuna dzabwera kupereka nsembe ule anakwata pikalango pinango mbakapiphatisambo basa kupiterekera. Pansiku yeneyo m'Nyumba ya MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene nkhabe dzakhalamove anyamalonda tayu. 
Malachi1:1 Izi ndi mphangwa zakubulukira kuna MBUYA kwenda kuna Aisraele kudzera muna Malaki. 
Malachi1:2 MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ine ndidakufunani pyakwanga.” “Mbwenye imwe mukuvunza kuti, ‘Imwe mwatifuna tani?’ ” MBUYA akulonga kuti, “Ayi Esau hakhali mbaleache Yakobo tayu? Kwache ine ndidamfuna Yakobo," 
Malachi1:3 mbindizondana na Esau; ine ndasandusa dziko yache yamapiri kukhala thando yatchetcha; dziko idampasa ine ile ndidaisandusa ya matika.” 
Malachi1:4 Edomu anakwanisa kulonga kuti, “Podi kwene kuti ife tapeyiwa, tinati timange pontho basi madembe.” Mbwenye MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga kuti, “Iwo anakwanisa kumanga, kwache ndinapigomola pontho. Iyo inachemerwa dziko yakuipa, ile anthu ache azhangalirwa na MBUYA kwenda na kwenda.”" 
Malachi1:5 Imwe Aisraele munapiona na maso anu mbamulonga kuti, “Ukulu wa MBUYA wafalikira konsene, podi na kunumpha madire ene a Israele.”" 
Malachi1:6 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga kuti, “Mwana ambalemedza babache, pontho nyabasa ambalemedza mbuyache. Ngakhala ine ndine baba, apo chilemedzo chakundithemerambo chili kupi? Ngakhala ine ndine mbuya, apo chilemedzo chakundithemerambo chili kupi? “Ndimwepo anyansembe ale mumbalulupisa dzinanga! “Kwache imwe mumbavunza kuti, ‘Apo ife dzinanu tailulupisa tani?’" 
Malachi1:7 “Imwe mumbapereka pyakudya pyakunyansa paguwanga ya nsembe. “Kwache imwe mumbavunza kuti, ‘Ayi ife takululupisani tani?’ “Pakulonga kuti guwa yansembe ya MBUYA njakululupiswa." 
Malachi1:8 Imwe mungadza na nyama yakusweka maso dzaipereka nsembe, ayi kweneko si kudawa tayu? Mungapereka nsembe nyama yakulamala penu yakudwala, ayi kweneko si kudawa tayu? Dzayeserenimbo kupipereka pinthu ninga penepi kuna mkulu wanu wa boma! Ayi iye anakomerwa namwe? Ayi iye anakukomerani mtima? Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene.”" 
Malachi1:9 Imwe anyansembe, chinchino yeserani kupempha Mulungu kuti akukomereni mtima. Na pyakupereka pyanu ninga penepi, ayi iye nkhukukomerani mtima basi? MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akuthimiza kulonga kuti," 
Malachi1:10 “Mbapidakhala pyadidi mbodzi wa imwe mbadafungiratu misuwo ya Nyumbanga, towera muleke gasa moto wakusowa basa paguwanga yansembe. Ine nkhabe komerwa namwe tayu, pontho ine nkhabe dzatambira nsembe zimbapereka imwe tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Malachi1:11 Dzinanga inakhala ikulu pakati pa madzinza, kutomera kumabulukiro dzuwa mpakana kumadokero dzuwa. Pambuto zonsene, pyakufukiza pyakununkhira na pyakupereka pyakuchena pinaperekwa kuna ine, thangwi dzinanga inakhala ikulu pakati pa madzinza. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Malachi1:12 “Mbwenye imwe mumbandilulupisa pakulonga pya guwa yansembe ya MBUYA kuti, ‘Iyo yaipiswa,’ pontho kulonga pya pyakudya pyaikhwa penepo kuti ‘Mphyakunyansa.’" 
Malachi1:13 Imwe mumbalonga kuti, ‘Penepi pyatopesa,’ pontho mumbandipidula. Imwe mungadza na nyama zakupheka, zakulamala, penu zakudwala mbamuzipereka ninga nsembe, ayi ine nkhupitambira basi penepyo? Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Malachi1:14 “Dzedze kuna munthu wakunama, ule ana bira wadidi wamamuna pa mkumbiache mbadumbira kumpereka, mbwenye m'nduli mwache mbapereka nsembe nyama yokhonda chena kuna Mbuya. Ine ndine Mfumu wamkulu, tenepo dzinanga yathema kugopiwa pakati pa madzinza. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene.”" 
Malachi2:1 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga kuti, “Imwe anyansembe, matongero enewa akulonga kuna imwe." 
Malachi2:2 Mungakhonda kundivera mbamukhonda lemedza dzinanga, ndinakutembererani. Ndinatemberera na pinthu pyadidi pene pimbatambira imwepyo. Ande ine ndapitemberera kale, thangwi imwe hamudaikhe mtima kundilemedza tayu." 
Malachi2:3 “Na thangwi ya imwepo, ine ndinatchunyusa pidzukulu pyanu; ine ndinakutswingani ulowa wa nsembe zanu kunkhope zanu mbandikutayirani pakhuku ya ulowawo." 
Malachi2:4 Penepo imwe munapidziwa kuti ndine pano ndidakupasani matongero enewa, towera chiverano changa na anyansembe, pidzukulu pya Levi, chithimize kwenda m'tsogolo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Malachi2:5 “Chiverano changa chidachita ine na iye, chikhali chiverano cha moyo pontho mtendere; inembo ndidapipereka kuna iye. Ndidachita penepi kuti andigope, tenepo adandigopadi mbalemedza dzinanga." 
Malachi2:6 Uphungu ukhalonga iye ukhali wakuonadi, pontho nkhabe chinthu chakunama chidabuluka m'kanwa mwache tayu. Iye adafamba nane pabodzi mwamtendere pontho mwachilungamo, mbachitisa anthu azinji kuleka pyakudawika."
