Malachi2:7 “Thangwi mulomo wa nyansembe wathema kulonga pya nzeru, pontho anthu athema kugumana uphungu wadidi kubulukira m'kanwa mwache, thangwi iye ndi nyamphangwa wa MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Malachi2:8 “Kwache imwe anyansembe, mwabauka kusiya njiranga, pontho na pifunziso pyanu mwagwegwedusa anthu azinji; imwe mwaswa chiverano chidachita ine na Levi. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Malachi2:9 Natenepo ine ndakuchitisani kukhala anthu akululupa pontho akusowa chilemedzo pamaso pa anthu onsene, thangwi imwe hamudatewere njira zanga tayu, mbwenye mwatonga anthu anga mseru mwakuyang'ana nkhope.”" 
Malachi2:10 Ayi tonsenefe babathu si mbodzi ene tayu? Ayi adatilenga Mulungu wache si mbodzi ene tayu? Apo thangwi yache ninji tikululupisa chiverano cha makolo athu pakukhonda khulupirika kuna unango na mwanzache? 
Malachi2:11 Anthu a ku Yuda ataya chikhulupiro chawo. Chinthu chakunyansa chachitika mu Israele na mu Yerusalemu. Anthu a ku Yuda aswipisa Nyumba ya Mulungu, idafunwa pikulu na MBUYA ile, pakusemba akazi akupembedza milungu yachilendo." 
Malachi2:12 Mbwenye kulonga pya munthu ule ambachita penepi, penu akhale pyache tani, MBUYA mbambuluse m'banja ya Yakobo, podi kwene kuti iye ambadza na pyakupereka kuna MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Malachi2:13 Chinthu chinango chimbachita imwe ntchichi: Misozi yanu imbachita kukuka paguwa yansembe ya MBUYA. Imwe mumbalira na kukalala, thangwi MBUYA nkhabe ikha konta kuna pyakupereka pyanu, penu kupitambira mwakukomerwa kubulukira m'manja mwanu tayu." 
Malachi2:14 Imwe mumbavunza kuti, “Apo thangwi yache ninji?” Ndi thangwi yakuti MBUYA akupichita ninga umboni pakati pa imwe na mkazanu adakazhali na imwe, thangwi imwe hamudakhulupirika tayu kuna iye, podi kwene kuti iye ndi mankhadzi anu, mkazi adachita na imwe chiverano cha banja ule." 
Malachi2:15 Ayi MBUYA hadaasasanye iwo kukhala mbodzi tayu? Kumanungo na ku uzimu kwene iwo mbache. Apo thangwi yache ninji adaachitisa kukhala mbodzi? Thangwi iye akhafuna ana akupembedza Mulungu. Natenepo piyang'anireni mwekha ene mumzimu, pontho lekani khala okhonda khulupirika tayu kuna mkazi adakazhali na imwe ule." 
Malachi2:16 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, Mulungu wa Israele alonga mbati, “Ine ndimbazondana na kumwalana. Ine nkhabe komerwa tayu na mamuna wakuchitira vinga mkazache.” Natenepo piyang'anire wekha ene mumzimu, pontho leka khala okhonda khulupirika tayu kuna mkazako." 
Malachi2:17 Imwe mwanyangula MBUYA na mafalanu ambalonga imwewa. Imwe mukuvunza kuti, “Ayi ife tamnyangula tani?” Pakulonga kuti, “Onsene ale ambachita pyakuipa ngadidi pamaso pa MBUYA,” pontho kuti, “Iye akukomerwa nawo,” penu kulonga kuti, “Ali kupi Mulungu wachilungamo ule?”" 
Malachi3:1 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga mbati, “Ngayang'anani, ine ndinatuma nyamphangwa patsogolo panga, ule anafuna dzandisasanyira njira. Tenepo mwakututumusa Mbuya ule anasaka-saka imwe anati adze ku Nyumbache; nyamphangwa anafuna imwe ule, anati adze dzalalika pya chiverano changa.”" 
Malachi3:2 Kwache mbani anapirira pansiku inafuna iye kudza? Iye angabwera mbani anafuna dzaphanisira? Thangwi iye anakhala ninga moto wakunyungulusira utale, penu ninga sopo wa nyakufula nguwo." 
Malachi3:3 Iye anachita kukhalira pansi ninga misiri wakunyungulusa utale m'dzenje ya moto kubulusa masepu-sepu; iye anachenesa pidzukulu pya Levi mbaabulusa masepu-sepu ninga golidi na siliva. Kubuluka penepo MBUYA anakhala na anthu ale anafuna kumdzesera pyakupereka mwakulungama. 
Malachi3:4 Tenepo pyakupereka pya Yuda na Yerusalemu pinatawirwa pamaso pa MBUYA ninga montho mukhali ipyo kale pyaka pya m'ndulimu. 
Malachi3:5 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga kuti, “Natenepo ine ndinadza chifupi na imwe dzakutongani mseru. Ine ndinachimbiza dzalonga umboni wakupokanyisana na anyamatsenga, maputa na anyakutuna pamiseru; kupokanyisana na ale ambapagali anyabasawo mwakuabera; ale ambapondereza amamfelwa na ana masiye pontho mbakhonda chitira alendo chilungamo, kuna onsene ale ambakhonda kundigopa.”" 
Malachi3:6 “Ine MBUYA nkhabe chinja tayu. Ndi thangwi yache imwe pidzukulu pya Yakobo nkhabe vungwa tayu. 
Malachi3:7 Na kale ene, kutomera ndzidzi wa makolo anu, imwe mwabauka kubuluka kuna matongero anga mbamukhonda kuakoya. Bwererani kuna ine, inembo ndinati ndibwerere kuna imwe. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene. “Kwache imwe mumbavunza kuti, ‘Tinabwerera tani?’" 
Malachi3:8 “Ine ndikukuvunzani kuti, ‘Ayi munthu nkhukwanisa kubera Mulungu?’ Kwache imwe mumbandibera. “Imwe mumbavunza kuti, ‘Ife timbakuberani tani?’ “Imwe mumbandibera pakukhonda kundipasa chakhumi na pyakupereka pinango." 
Malachi3:9 Imwe muna dzedze, thangwi imwe mukundibera; dzinzanu yonsenene." 
Malachi3:10 Dzani na chakhumi chonsene kumasubi akukoyeramo pinthu, towera m'Nyumba mwanga mukhale phoso. Ndiyesereni napyo ngakhala sinakufungulirani tayu misuwo yakudzulu mbandikukhuthulirani mtsanzayiso wakuti munasowa nawo mbuto yakukwanira kuukoyeramo. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Malachi3:11 Ine ndinakhondesa pirombo kuti pileke dzadya mbewu zanu, pontho mfesa zanu nkhabe dzambwera na pang'ono pene tayu. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Malachi3:12 Penepo madzinza onsene anakuchemerani anyakutsanzaya, thangwi dziko yanu inakhala yakusiririka pyakwanga. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Malachi3:13 “Imwe mwandilongera mafala a mkaka uwawi. “Kwache mumbavunza kuti, ‘Mafalache nganji alonga ife mwakupokanyisana namwe?’" 
Malachi3:14 “Imwe mwalonga kuti, ‘Ntchinthu chapezi-pezi kutumikira Mulungu. Chimbaganyali ife ninji kuchita pinatonga iye, pontho kufamba khuma-khuma pamaso pa MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene, thangwi ya pyakudawa pyathu?" 
Malachi3:15 Kwache lero anyakutumbama ndiye anaona ife kuti ngakutsanzaya. Ndimomwene anyakuipa pinthu pyawo pimbaafambira mwadidi; podi na ale ene ambaketesana na Mulungu ambapaswa njira.’ ” 
Malachi3:16 Tenepo anyakugopa MBUYA adalongesana unango na mwanzache. Tenepo MBUYA adavesera mbava pinalonga iwo. Mpukutu wa chikumbuso udalembwa pamaso pache kulonga pya ale ambagopa MBUYA mbalemedza dzinache. 
Malachi3:17 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga mbati, “Iwo anakhala anthu apamtima panga, pansiku inafuna ine dzasankhula. Ine ndinaapulumusa ninga montho mumbachitira munthu wakuva nyambalo na mwanache ambamfiliviri ule." 
Malachi3:18 Pontho munaona kusiyana kwache pakati pa anyakulungama na anyakudawika, pakati pa anthu ale ambanditumikira, na ale ambakhonda kunditumikira.”" 
Malachi4:1 MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene akulonga kuti, “Ndimomwene nsiku ikudza; iyo inagaka ninga dzenje ya moto. Onsene anyakutumbama na anyakuchita pyakuipa anamala kupya, pontho nsiku yeneyo inafuna kudza ile, iwo anagaswa moto. Nkhabe mtsitsi penu na nthambi ene inafuna dzasalira pana iwo tayu." 
Malachi4:2 Mbwenye kulonga pya imwe, ale mumbalemedza dzinanga, chipulumuso changa chinakumwinikirani ninga dzuwa mbachidzadzesa cheza chakuwangisa anthu. Penepo imwe munabuluka na kunumpha-numpha ninga anamphulu akufungulirwa m'thanga." 
Malachi4:3 Penepo imwe munapondereza anyakudawika; iwo anakhala fumbi ya kumanyalo kwanu pansiku inafuna ine chita penepi. Ndalonga ndine MBUYA Wamphamvu zonsene. 
Malachi4:4 “Kumbukani pifunziso pya nyabasanga Mose, mwambo na matongero pidampasa ine paphiri ya Sinai kuti apereke kuna Aisraele." 
Malachi4:5 “Ngayang'anani, ine ndinati ndikutumireni mprofeti Elia, nsiku ikulu pontho yakugoswa ya MBUYA mbidzati fika." 
Malachi4:6 Iye anachitisa ababa na anawo kuphatizana pontho, mbachitisambo ana kuphatizana na ababawo, gopesera ine ndinadza dzavunga na kutemberera dziko yawoyo.”" 
Matthew24:15 “Imwe munaona chinthu chakuipa chimbavunga, chidalonga mprofeti Daniele chile, chikuimira m'Nyumba ya Mulungu. Chidziwiso kuna nyakuwerenga ntchichi: vesa mwadidi kuti penepi pikulonganji!" 
Luke3:25 mwana Matatia, mwana Amose, mwana Nahumu, mwana Hesili, mwana Nagai," 
Luke3:25 mwana Matatia, mwana Amose, mwana Nahumu, mwana Hesili, mwana Nagai," 
Romans9:25 Penepi ndiye pinalonga iye m'bukhu ya mprofeti Hosea kuti, “Anthu okhonda khala anga, ndinati ndiachemere kuti, ‘Anthu anga.’ Anthu ale si apamtima panga tayu, ndinati ndiachemera kuti, ‘Anthu a pamtima panga.’"
